Genesis1:1 Mu ntangiriro Imana yaremye ijuru n’isi. 
Genesis1:2 Isi yari ikivangavange kitagira ishusho kandi iriho ubusa. Umwijima wari ubundikiye inyanja y’amazi, n’umwuka w’Imana wahuhiraga hejuru yayo." 
Genesis1:3 Imana iravuga iti «Nihabeho urumuri!» Urumuri rubaho. 
Genesis1:4 Imana ibona ko urumuri ari rwiza, nuko itandukanya urumuri n’umwijima." 
Genesis1:5 Urumuri irwita amanywa, umwijima iwita ijoro. Burira buracya, uba umunsi wa mbere." 
Genesis1:6 Imana iravuga iti «Nihabeho ikirere hagati y’amazi, gitandukanye amazi n’ayandi mazi!»" 
Genesis1:7 Imana ihanga ikirere maze itandukanya amazi ari mu nsi y’ikirere n’amazi ari hejuru y’ikirere. Biba bityo. 
Genesis1:8 Ikirere Imana icyita ijuru. Burira buracya, uba umunsi wa kabiri." 
Genesis1:9 Imana iravuga iti «Amazi ari mu nsi y’ijuru nateranire hamwe, maze ahumutse hagaragare!» Biba bityo." 
Genesis1:10 Ahumutse Imana ihita ubutaka, ibidendezi by’amazi ibyita inyanja. Imana ibona ari byiza." 
Genesis1:11 Imana iravuga iti «Ubutaka nibumere ubwatsi butoshye, n’ibyatsi bifite imbuto zibyara ibindi, n’ibiti byeraho imbuto zifitemo umurama, bikurikije ubwoko bwa buri giti!» Biba bityo." 
Genesis1:12 Ubutaka bumera ubwatsi butoshye, n’ibyatsi bifite imbuto zibyara ibindi, n’ibiti byeraho imbuto zifitemo umurama, bikurikije ubwoko bwa buri giti. Imana ibona ari byiza." 
Genesis1:13 Burira buracya, uba umunsi wa gatatu." 
Genesis1:14 Imana iravuga iti «Nihabeho ibinyarumuri mu kirere cy’ijuru, bitandukanye amanywa n’ijoro, bibe ibimenyetso biranga ibihe by’amakoraniro, bijye kandi biranga iminsi n’imyaka;" 
Genesis1:15 byakire mu kirere cy’ijuru, kugira ngo bimurikire isi!» Biba bityo." 
Genesis1:16 Nuko Imana ihanga ibinyarumuri binini bibiri: ikinyarumuri kinini kugira ngo kigenge amanywa, n’ikinyarumuri gito ngo kigenge ijoro; ihanga n’inyenyeri." 
Genesis1:17 Imana ibishyira mu kirere cy’ijuru kugira ngo bimurikire isi," 
Genesis1:18 no kugira ngo bigenge amanywa n’ijoro, bitandukanye urumuri n’umwijima. Imana ibona ari byiza." 
Genesis1:19 Burira buracya, uba umunsi wa kane." 
Genesis1:20 Imana iravuga iti «Amazi najagatemo utunyamaswa tuzima, n’ibiguruka biguruke hejuru y’isi, mu nsi y’ikirere cy’ijuru!»" 
Genesis1:21 Imana irema ibikoko nyamunini by’inyanja, n’ibyinyagambura by’amoko yose byuzura amazi, irema n’ibiguruka byose bya buri bwoko. Imana ibona ari byiza." 
Genesis1:22 Imana ibiha umugisha, ivuga iti «Nimwororoke mugwire, mwuzure amazi y’inyanja, n’ibiguruka bigwire ku isi!»" 
Genesis1:23 Burira buracya, uba umunsi wa gatanu." 
Genesis1:24 Imana iravuga iti «Ubutaka nibubyare inyamaswa nzima zikurikije amoko yazo: izishobora gutungwa, izikururuka hasi, izo mu ishyamba, zose zikurikije amoko yazo!» Biba bityo." 
Genesis1:25 Imana ihanga inyamaswa z’ishyamba, n’izishobora gutungwa zikurikije ubwoko bwazo, n’intondagizi zose zikurikije ubwoko bwazo. Imana ibona ari byiza." 
Genesis1:26 Imana iravuga iti «Noneho duhange Muntu mu ishusho ryacu, mu misusire yacu, maze ategeke ifi zo mu nyanja, ibiguruka byo mu kirere, inyamaswa zitungwa n’izo mu ishyamba, n’intondagizi zose!»" 
Genesis1:27 Nuko Imana irema Muntu mu ishusho ryayo, imurema mu ishusho ry’Imana; ibarema ari umugabo n’umugore." 
Genesis1:28 Imana ibaha umugisha, irababwira iti «Nimwororoke, mugwire, mukwire isi yose, muyitegeke. Mugenge ifi zo mu nyanja n’ibiguruka byo mu kirere, n’ikizima cyose kikurura ku butaka!»" 
Genesis1:29 Imana iravuga iti «Dore mbahaye icyatsi cyose cyera imbuto ku isi hose, n’igiti cyose cyeraho imbuto zifitemo umurama; bizaba ibiryo byanyu." 
Genesis1:30 Inyamaswa zose zo mu gasozi, ibiguruka byose byo mu kirere, icyikurura hasi cyose, icyifitemo ubuzima cyose, mbihaye ibimera bitohagiye ngo birishe!» Nuko biba bityo." 
Genesis1:31 Imana ireba ibyo yari imaze gukora byose isanga ari byiza rwose. Burira buracya, uba umunsi wa gatandatu." 
Genesis2:1 Ijuru n’isi n’ibirimo byose byashojwe bityo. 
Genesis2:2 Ku munsi wa karindwi Imana isoza umurimo yakoraga, nuko kuri uwo munsi wa karindwi iruhuka umurimo yari imaze gukora." 
Genesis2:3 Imana iha umugisha umunsi wa karindwi irawiyegurira, kuko ari wo munsi yaruhutseho umurimo wose yari imaze gukora." 
Genesis2:4 Ngayo amavu n’amavuko y’ijuru n’isi, igihe biremwe. Umunsi Uhoraho Imana ahanga ijuru n’isi," 
Genesis2:5 ku isi nta n’agahuru ko mu gasozi kaharangwaga, nta n’icyatsi cyari cyakamera ku misozi, nta n’umuntu wariho ngo ahinge ubutaka." 
Genesis2:6 Ariko isoko yapfupfunukaga mu kuzimu ikabobeza hejuru y’ubutaka hose. 
Genesis2:7 Nuko Uhoraho Imana abumba Muntu mu ibumba rivuye mu gitaka, amuhuha mu mazuru umwuka w’ubuzima, nuko Muntu aba muzima." 
Genesis2:8 Ubwo Uhoraho Imana atera ubusitani iburasirazuba, muri Edeni, ahatuza Muntu yari amaze kubumbabumba." 
Genesis2:9 Uhoraho Imana ameza mu gitaka ibiti by’amoko yose binogeye amaso, kandi biryoshye; ameza n’igiti cy’ubugingo mu busitani hagati, n’igiti cy’ubumenyi bw’icyiza n’ikibi." 
Genesis2:10 Uruzi rwaturukaga muri Edeni, rugasukira ubusitani, rukahava rwigabanyamo amashami ane." 
Genesis2:11 Izina ry’uruzi rwa mbere ni Pishoni; ni rwo ruzenguruka igihugu cyose cya Hawila, ari cyo kibamo zahabu," 
Genesis2:12 kandi zahabu y’icyo gihugu ni nziza cyane; kibamo n’amabuye y’agaciro, nka budeliyumu na onigisi." 
Genesis2:13 Izina ry’uruzi rwa kabiri ni Gihoni; ni rwo ruzenguruka igihugu cya Kushi. 
Genesis2:14 Uruzi rwa gatatu ni Tigiri; ni rwo rutemba runyura mu burasirazuba bwa Ashuru. Uruzi rwa kane ni Efurati. 
Genesis2:15 Uhoraho Imana ashyira Muntu mu busitani bwa Edeni, ngo abuhinge kandi aburinde." 
Genesis2:16 Nuko Uhoraho Imana ategeka Muntu, ati «Igiti cyose cyo muri ubu busitani, ushobora kukiryaho;" 
Genesis2:17 ariko igiti cy’ubumenyi bw’icyiza n’ikibi ntuzakiryeho, kuko umunsi waramutse ukiriyeho uzapfa nta kabuza!»" 
Genesis2:18 Nuko Uhoraho Imana aravuga ati «Si byiza ko Muntu aba wenyine, ngiye kumugenera umufasha bakwiranye.»" 
Genesis2:19 Uhoraho Imana abumba mu gitaka inyamaswa zose zo mu ishyamba, n’inyoni zose zo mu kirere, azizanira Muntu ngo arebe uko Muntu azita amazina, maze ikinyabuzima cyose kigire izina cyiswe na we." 
Genesis2:20 Muntu yita amazina ibitungwa byose, n’inyoni zose zo mu kirere, n’inyamaswa zose zo mu ishyamba. Ariko Muntu ntiyabonamo umufasha bakwiranye." 
Genesis2:21 Nuko Uhoraho Imana atera Muntu gusinzira ibitotsi bikomeye, arasinzira; afata rumwe mu mbavu ze, maze asubiranya umubiri." 
Genesis2:22 Urwo rubavu Uhoraho Imana avanye mu mugabo, akoramo umugore, umugore amushyira umugabo." 
Genesis2:23 Umugabo ariyamira aravuga ati «Noneho dore igufwa ryo mu magufwa yanjye, n’umubiri uvuye mu mubiri wanjye; uyu azitwa umugore, kuko mu mugabo ariho avuye.»" 
Genesis2:24 Ni cyo gituma umugabo asiga se na nyina, akizirika ku mugore we, bakaba umubiri umwe." 
Genesis2:25 Bombi bari bambaye ubusa, ari umugabo ari n’umugore we, ariko ntibyari bibateye isoni." 
Genesis3:1 Inzoka yari inyaryenge kurenza izindi nyamaswa zose zo mu gasozi Uhoraho yari yahanze. Ibaza umugore, iti «Koko Imana yaravuze ngo ntimukagire igiti cyo muri ubu busitani muryaho?»" 
Genesis3:2 Umugore asubiza inzoka, ati «Imbuto z’ibiti byo muri ubu busitani dushobora kuziryaho," 
Genesis3:3 naho ku mbuto z’igiti kiri hagati y’ubusitani, Imana yaravuze iti ’Ntimuzaziryeho, ntimuzazikoreho, ejo mutazapfa.’»" 
Genesis3:4 Inzoka ibwira umugore, iti «Gupfa ntimuzapfa!" 
Genesis3:5 Ahubwo Imana izi ko umunsi mwaziriyeho, amaso yanyu azahumuka, maze mukamera nk’Imana, mukamenya icyiza n’ikibi.»" 
Genesis3:6 Umugore arareba asanga cya giti kiryoshye, kinogeye amaso, kandi cyanashobora gutanga ubwenge. Asoroma imbuto zacyo, aryaho, ahaho n’umugabo we bari kumwe. Na we ararya." 
Genesis3:7 Nuko amaso yabo bombi arahumuka, bamenya ko bambaye ubusa. Nuko badodekanya amababi y’umutini, maze barayacocera." 
Genesis3:8 Ngo bumve Uhoraho Imana wagendagendaga mu busitani mu mafu y’igicamunsi, umugabo n’umugore we bihisha Uhoraho Imana mu biti by’ubusitani." 
Genesis3:9 Uhoraho Imana ahamagara Muntu aramubaza ati «Uri hehe?» 
Genesis3:10 Undi arasubiza ati «Numvise ijwi ryawe mu busitani, ngira ubwoba kuko nambaye ubusa, ndihisha.»" 
Genesis3:11 Uhoraho Imana ati «Ni nde waguhishuriye ko wambaye ubusa? Aho ntiwariye ku giti nari nakubujije kuryaho?» 
Genesis3:12 Muntu arasubiza ati «Umugore wanshyize iruhande, ni we wampaye kuri cya giti ndarya.»" 
Genesis3:13 Uhoraho Imana abwira umugore, ati «Wakoze ibiki?» Umugore arasubiza ati «Inzoka yampenze ubwenge, ndarya.»" 
Genesis3:14 Uhoraho Imana abwira inzoka ati «Kuko wakoze ibyo, ubaye ruvumwa mu nyamaswa zose z’agasozi; uzakurura inda hasi, maze urye umukungugu iminsi yose y’ukubaho kwawe." 
Genesis3:15 Nshyize inzigo hagati yawe n’umugore, hagati y’urubyaro rwawe n’urubyaro rwe; ruzakujanjagura umutwe, nawe urukomeretse ku gatsinsino.»" 
Genesis3:16 Abwira umugore ati «Nzongera imiruho yawe igihe utwite, maze uzabyare ubabara; uzahora wifuza umugabo wawe, na we agutegeke.»" 
Genesis3:17 Hanyuma abwira Muntu ati «Kuko witaye ku magambo y’umugore wawe ukarya ku giti nari nakubujije nkubwira nti ’Ntuzakiryeho’, ubutaka buravumwe ku mpamvu yawe. Uzabukuramo ikizagutunga bikugoye, iminsi yose y’ukubaho kwawe;" 
Genesis3:18 buzakwerera amahwa n’ibitovu, maze uzatungwe n’ibyatsi byo ku gasozi." 
Genesis3:19 Umugati wawe uzawurya wiyushye akuya kugeza ubwo uzasubira mu gitaka, kuko ari cyo wavuyemo. Koko rero uri umukungugu, kandi uzasubira mu mukungugu.»" 
Genesis3:20 Nuko Muntu yita izina umugore we, amwita Eva, kuko ari we wabaye nyina w’abazima bose." 
Genesis3:21 Uhoraho Imana akanira Muntu n’umugore we impu arazibambika: 
Genesis3:22 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Dore Muntu yabaye nk’umwe muri twe, mu kumenya icyiza n’ikibi. Reka atavaho asingira igiti cy’ubugingo, akakiryaho maze akazabaho iteka!»" 
Genesis3:23 Uhoraho Imana amwirukana mu busitani bwa Edeni, ngo ajye guhinga ubutaka yari yarakuwemo." 
Genesis3:24 Nuko yirukana Muntu, maze mu burasirazuba bw’ubusitani bwa Edeni ahashyira Abakerubimu bafite inkota y’umuriro wikaragaga, ngo barinde inzira igana ku giti cy’ubugingo." 
Genesis4:1 Muntu abonana na Eva, umugore we. Eva arasama, abyara Kayini, maze aravuga ati «Nungutse umuntu nkesha Uhoraho.»" 
Genesis4:2 Ku buheta abyara Abeli murumuna we. Abeli aba umushumba w’amatungo naho Kayini aba umuhinzi w’ubutaka. 
Genesis4:3 Igihe kirahita, Kayini ashyira Uhoraho amaturo avuye mu myaka y’imirima ye." 
Genesis4:4 Abeli na we azana uburiza mu matungo ye, agerekaho n’ibinure byayo. Uhoraho ashima Abeli n’amaturo ye," 
Genesis4:5 ariko ntiyashima Kayini n’amaturo ye. Kayini biramurakaza cyane, maze mu maso he harahinduka, yubika umutwe." 
Genesis4:6 Uhoraho abaza Kayini ati «Urakajwe n’iki? Kandi ni iki cyatumye uhinduka utyo mu maso? 
Genesis4:7 Nugenza neza, ntuzubura umutwe se? Naho nutagenza neza, itonde kuko icyaha kibunze ku irebe ry’umuryango wawe ngo kigusumire, ariko wowe ugomba kukirusha amaboko.»" 
Genesis4:8 Kayini abwira murumuna we Abeli, ati «Tujyane mu mirima.» Nuko igihe bari mu mirima, Kayini asimbukira murumuna we Abeli maze aramwica." 
Genesis4:9 Uhoraho abaza Kayini ati «Abeli murumuna wawe ari hehe?» Undi ati «Simbizi! Mbese ndi umurinzi wa murumuna wanjye?» 
Genesis4:10 Uhoraho ati «Wakoze ibiki? Amaraso ya murumuna wawe wamennye, ngaha arantabariza mu gitaka." 
Genesis4:11 Ubu ngubu ubaye ikivume ku butaka, bwo bwasamye ukabwuhira amaraso ya murumuna wawe." 
Genesis4:12 Nuhinga ubutaka, ntibuzongera kukurumbukira; uzahora uri inzererezi yangara ku isi.»" 
Genesis4:13 Kayini abwira Uhoraho, ati «Igihano umpaye kirakabije." 
Genesis4:14 Dore unyirukanye kuri ubu butaka, unciye no mu maso yawe. Nzahora ndi inzererezi, nangara ku isi, kandi uzambona wese azanyica!»" 
Genesis4:15 Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Yewe, uzica Kayini uwo ari we wese, azabihanirwa karindwi.» Nuko Uhoraho ashyira ikimenyetso kuri Kayini, kugira ngo uwo bazahura wese atazamukubita mu ngusho." 
Genesis4:16 Nuko Kayini ava mu maso y’Uhoraho, ajya gutura mu gihugu cyitwa Nodi, mu burasirazuba bwa Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Kayini abonana n’umugore we, umugore arasama abyara Henoki. Nuko Kayini agiye kubaka umugi, awitirira umuhungu we, awita Henoki." 
Genesis4:18 Henoki abyara Iradi; Iradi abyara Mehuyayeli, Mehuyayeli abyara Metushayeli; Metushayeli abyara Lameki." 
Genesis4:19 Nuko Lameki azana abagore babiri; umwe akitwa Ada, undi akitwa Sila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada abyara Yabali; ni we wabaye sekuruza w’abatura mu mahema bakagira amatungo. 
Genesis4:21 Murumuna we yitwa Tubali; ni we wabaye sekuruza w’abacuranga inanga, bakavuza n’imyirongi." 
Genesis4:22 Sila we abyara TubaliKayini; ni we wabaye sekuruza w’abacuzi bose b’umuringa n’ubutare. Mushiki wa Tubali‐Kayini yari Nahama. 
Genesis4:23 Lameki abwira abagore be, ati «Ada na Sila, nimuntege amatwi! Bagore ba Lameki, nimwumve ijambo ryanjye! Nishe umugabo ankomerekeje, nica n’umwana ansaritse." 
Genesis4:24 Ubwo Kayini yahorewe karindwi, Lameki we azahorerwa mirongo irindwi na karindwi!»" 
Genesis4:25 Adamu abonana n’umugore we; umugore abyara umuhungu amwita Seti, ati «kuko Imana inshumbushije indi mbuto, mu kigwi cya Abeli, Kayini yishe.»" 
Genesis4:26 Seti na we abyara umuhungu amwita Enoshi. Nuko kuva ubwo batangira kwambaza Izina ry’Uhoraho. 
Genesis5:1 Ngiki igitabo cy’urubyaro rwa Adamu: Umunsi Imana irema umuntu, yamuremye mu misusire y’Imana." 
Genesis5:2 Yabaremye ari umugabo n’umugore, ibaha umugisha, ibita Muntu umunsi ibarema." 
Genesis5:3 Adamu amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo itatu avutse, abyara umuhungu basa mu misusire ye no mu ishusho rye, amwita Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Amaze kubyara Seti, Adamu abaho indi myaka magana inani, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:5 Iminsi yose Adamu yabayeho ni imyaka magana cyenda na mirongo itatu, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis5:6 Seti amaze imyaka ijana n’itanu avutse, abyara Enoshi." 
Genesis5:7 Amaze kubyara Enoshi, Seti abaho indi myaka magana inani n’irindwi, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:8 Iminsi yose Seti yabayeho ni imyaka magana urwenda na cumi n’ibiri, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis5:9 Enoshi amaze imyaka mirongo urwenda avutse, abyara Kenani." 
Genesis5:10 Amaze kubyara Kenani, Enoshi abaho indi myaka magana inani na cumi n’itanu, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:11 Iminsi yose Enoshi yabayeho ni imyaka magana urwenda n’itanu, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis5:12 Kenani amaze imyaka mirongo irindwi avutse, abyara Mahalaleli." 
Genesis5:13 Amaze kubyara Mahalaleli, Kenani abaho indi myaka magana inani na mirongo ine, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:14 Iminsi yose Kenani yabayeho ni imyaka magana urwenda n’icumi, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis5:15 Mahalaleli amaze imyaka mirongo itandatu n’itanu avutse, abyara Yeredi." 
Genesis5:16 Amaze kubyara Yeredi, Mahalaleli abaho indi myaka magana inani na mirongo itatu; abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:17 Iminsi yose Mahalaleli yabayeho, ni imyaka magana inani na mirongo urwenda n’itanu, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis5:18 Yeredi amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo itandatu n’ibiri avutse, abyara Henoki." 
Genesis5:19 Amaze kubyara Henoki, Yeredi abaho indi myaka magana inani, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:20 Iminsi yose Yeredi yabayeho, ni imyaka magana urwenda na mirongo itandatu n’ibiri, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis5:21 Henoki amaze imyaka mirongo itandatu n’itanu avutse, abyara Metushalomu." 
Genesis5:22 Amaze kubyara Metushalomu, Henoki abaho indi myaka magana atatu, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:23 Iminsi yose Henoki yabayeho ni imyaka magana atatu na mirongo itandatu n’itanu. 
Genesis5:24 Hanyuma Henoki arabura: Imana yaramwitwariye, kuko yagendanaga na yo." 
Genesis5:25 Metushalomu amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo inani n’irindwi avutse, abyara Lameki." 
Genesis5:26 Amaze kubyara Lameki, Metushalomu abaho indi myaka magana arindwi na mirongo inani n’ibiri, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:27 Iminsi yose Metushalomu yabayeho, ni imyaka magana cyenda na mirongo itandatu n’icyenda, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis5:28 Lameki amaze imyaka ijana na mirongo inani n’ibiri avutse, abyara umuhungu." 
Genesis5:29 Amwita Nowa, ati «Uyu azaduhoza, aturuhure imirimo inaniza duterwa no guhinga ubu butaka bwavumwe n’Uhoraho.»" 
Genesis5:30 Amaze kubyara Nowa, Lameki abaho indi myaka magana atanu na mirongo urwenda n’itanu, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis5:31 Iminsi yose Lameki yabayeho, ni imyaka magana arindwi na mirongo irindwi n’irindwi, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis5:32 Nowa amaze imyaka magana atanu avutse, abyara Semu, Kamu na Yafeti." 
Genesis6:1 Abantu batangira kugwira ku isi, bamaze no kubyara abakobwa," 
Genesis6:2 abahungu b’Imana babona abakobwa b’abantu ari beza. Ni bwo bihitiyemo abo bishakiye babagira abagore babo. 
Genesis6:3 Nuko Uhoraho aravuga ati «Umwuka wanjye ntuzongera kuguma mu muntu ngo arambe igihe kirekire; ni ikinyamubiri, kandi kubera amakosa ye, iminsi ye ntizarenga imyaka ijana na makumyabiri.»" 
Genesis6:4 Muri ibyo bihe, (ndetse no hanyuma) ku isi habagaho abantu barebare kandi banini cyane; kubera ko abahungu b’Imana babanaga n’abakobwa b’abantu, abo bakobwa bababyariraga abantu b’ibyamamare; ni bo za ntwari za kera, ba bagabo b’ibirangirire mujya mwumva." 
Genesis6:5 Uhoraho arareba asanga ububi bw’abantu bwakwiriye ku isi; ibitekerezo by’umutima wabo nta bindi bitari ubugizi bwa nabi. 
Genesis6:6 Uhoraho yicuza kuba yarashyize umuntu ku isi, maze arababara mu mutima we." 
Genesis6:7 Ni ko kuvuga, ati «Ngiye gutsemba ku isi abantu naremye; kandi hamwe na bo nzatsembe amatungo n’ibikoko, ndetse n’ibiguruka mu kirere, kuko nicuza icyatumye mbirema.»" 
Genesis6:8 Nowa ariko agira ubutoni mu maso y’Uhoraho. 
Genesis6:9 Dore rero amateka ya Nowa. Nowa yari umuntu w’intungane, ntiyari ameze nk’abo mu gihe cye, ahubwo yagendanaga n’Imana." 
Genesis6:10 Nowa abyara abahungu batatu: Semu, Kamu na Yafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Isi yose irandavura mu maso y’Imana, yuzura ubwicanyi." 
Genesis6:12 Imana irebye isi isanga yarandavuye, kubera ubugiranabi bwa buri muntu." 
Genesis6:13 Imana ibwira Nowa, iti «Ikinyamubiri cyose kigiye gutsembwa! Dore, isi yuzuye ubwicanyi kubera abantu; ngiye kubatsemba hamwe n’ibiri ku isi byose." 
Genesis6:14 Iyubakire ubwato mu biti by’imizonobari. Uzabugabanyemo ibyumba. Hanyuma ubuhomeshe ubujeni imbere n’inyuma. 
Genesis6:15 Dore ukuntu uzubaka ubwato: buzagira uburebure bw’imikono magana atatu, ubugari bw’imikono mirongo itanu, n’ubuhagarike bw’imikono mirongo itatu." 
Genesis6:16 Ubwato uzabuhe igisenge, maze uburangirize ku mukono umwe uturutse ku gasongero. Umuryango w’ubwato uzawushyire mu rubavu rwabwo, hanyuma uzabwubakemo amagorofa atatu: imwe hasi, indi hagati, n’indi hejuru." 
Genesis6:17 Jyewe dore ngiye guteza ku isi umwuzure w’amazi yo gutsemba ikinyabuzima cyose gihumekera aha mu nsi y’ijuru, maze ibiri ku isi byose bizapfe." 
Genesis6:18 Ariko nzagirana nawe Isezerano. Uzinjire mu bwato, wowe n’abahungu bawe, n’umugore wawe n’abakazana bawe." 
Genesis6:19 Mu binyabuzima byose, mu binyamubiri byose, uzinjize mu bwato bibiri bibiri, ingabo n’ingore muri buri bwoko, kugira ngo birokoke hamwe nawe." 
Genesis6:20 Inyoni ukurikije amoko yazo, ibikoko uko bimeze mu moko yabyo, inyamaswa zikururuka hasi ukurikije ubwoko bwazo, hazajya haza bibiri bibiri bya buri bwoko bigusange, kugira ngo birokoke." 
Genesis6:21 Naho wowe, uzafate ku bishobora kuribwa byose, uzabihunike, bizakubere ibiryo bizagutunga wowe n’izo nyamaswa.»" 
Genesis6:22 Nowa agenza atyo; uko Imana yari yamutegetse, ni ko yabigenjeje." 
Genesis7:1 Uhoraho abwira Nowa, ati «Injira mu bwato, wowe n’inzu yawe yose, kuko mu bantu b’iki gihe nasanze intungane mu maso yanjye ari wowe gusa." 
Genesis7:2 Mu nyamaswa zose zitazira, uzafate indwi za buri gitsina, ingabo n’ingore. Naho mu zizira uzafate ebyiri ebyiri, ingabo n’ingore." 
Genesis7:3 No mu nyoni zo mu kirere, uzafate indwi za buri gitsina, ingabo n’ingore, kugira ngo ubwoko bwazo bwoye kuzacika ku isi." 
Genesis7:4 Impamvu ni uko hasigaye iminsi irindwi, nkagusha imvura ku isi mu minsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine, nkazatsemba ku isi ibifite ubuzima byose naremye.»" 
Genesis7:5 Nowa akora byose uko Uhoraho yari yamutegetse. 
Genesis7:6 Nowa yari afite imyaka magana atandatu igihe ku isi hateye umwuzure w’amazi. 
Genesis7:7 Nuko Nowa yinjira mu bwato, ajyana n’abahungu be n’umugore we n’abakazana be, bahunga amazi y’umwuzure." 
Genesis7:8 Mu nyamaswa zitazira no mu nyamaswa zizira, mu nyoni, no mu bikururuka hasi byose," 
Genesis7:9 hava ebyiri ebyiri, ingabo n’ingore, zisanga Nowa mu bwato, nk’uko Imana yari yabitegetse Nowa." 
Genesis7:10 Hashize iminsi irindwi, amazi y’umwuzure akwira ku isi." 
Genesis7:11 Mu mwaka wa magana atandatu w’ubuzima bwa Nowa, mu kwezi kwa kabiri, ku munsi wa cumi n’irindwi w’ukwezi, amasoko yose y’ikuzimu aravubura, maze ibigomera amazi byose byo ku ijuru birafunguka." 
Genesis7:12 Imvura y’urushyana igwa ku isi iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine. 
Genesis7:13 Uwo munsi nyine Nowa n’abahungu be: Semu, Kamu na Yafeti, muka Nowa n’abakazana be, binjira mu bwato." 
Genesis7:14 Ajyanamo n’inyamaswa zose, ukurikije amoko yazo, amatungo ukurikije amoko yayo, n’ibisimba bikururuka hasi ukurikije amoko yabyo, hamwe n’inyoni ukurikije amoko yazo, n’ibiguruka n’ibifite amababa byose." 
Genesis7:15 Ziza zisanga Nowa, ziza ebyiri ebyiri, zivuye mu bihumeka byose." 
Genesis7:16 Izinjiraga zari ingabo n’ingore, zivuye mu bihumeka byose uko Imana yari yabitegetse Nowa. Hanyuma Uhoraho urugi arukingira inyuma." 
Genesis7:17 Nuko ku isi haba umwuzure iminsi mirongo ine. Amazi aruzura yerereza ubwato hejuru y’isi. 
Genesis7:18 Amazi ariyongera aba menshi ku isi, ubwato busigara bugenda hejuru y’amazi." 
Genesis7:19 Amazi arushaho kwiyongera cyane hejuru y’isi, maze mu nsi y’ikirere imisozi miremire yose iriho ku isi irarengerwa." 
Genesis7:20 Amazi yari yiyongereyeho imikono cumi n’itanu y’ubuhagarike, imisozi irarengerwa." 
Genesis7:21 Nuko igihumeka cyose kinyagambura hano ku isi kirapfa: inyoni, amatungo, inyamaswa, ibikururuka hano ku isi byose birapfa, hamwe n’abantu bose." 
Genesis7:22 Ibihumeka byose, ibyifitemo umwuka w’ubuzima biri ku butaka byose birapfa." 
Genesis7:23 Nguko uko Uhoraho yarimbuye ibintu byose byari ku isi, kuva ku bantu kugeza ku matungo, kugeza ku nyamaswa n’izikururuka hasi, no ku nyoni zo mu kirere. Bitsembwa ku isi, hasigara Nowa gusa n’abari kumwe na we mu bwato." 
Genesis7:24 Amazi akomeza kwiyongera ku isi iminsi ijana na mirongo itanu yose. 
Genesis8:1 Imana yibuka Nowa, yibuka n’inyamaswa zose n’amatungo yose yari kumwe na we mu bwato. Imana ihuhera umuyaga ku isi, maze amazi aratuza." 
Genesis8:2 Nuko amasoko yose y’ikuzimu n’ibigomera amazi byose byo ku ijuru birafungwa. Imvura ntiyongera kumanuka mu ijuru, maze amazi ahizuka ku isi." 
Genesis8:3 Hashize iminsi ijana na mirongo itanu, amazi aragabanuka." 
Genesis8:4 Mu kwezi kwa karindwi, ku munsi wa cumi n’irindwi w’ukwezi, ubwato buruhukira ku musozi wa Ararati." 
Genesis8:5 Amazi agenda agabanuka kugeza mu kwezi kwa cumi, ku wa mbere wako, impinga z’imisozi ziragaragara." 
Genesis8:6 Hashize iminsi mirongo ine, Nowa akingura idirishya ry’ubwato yari yakoze." 
Genesis8:7 Arekura igikona. Kirasohoka, kirakomeza kiraguruka, kirajarajara, kugeza ko amazi akamye, ubutaka bukagaragara." 
Genesis8:8 Hanyuma Nowa arekura inuma, ngo arebe niba amazi yagabanutse ku isi." 
Genesis8:9 Ariko inuma ntiyabona aho ikandagira, ni ko kumugarukaho mu bwato, kuko amazi yari akiri ku isi hose. Nowa atega ikiganza, arayisingira ayigarura mu bwato." 
Genesis8:10 Yirenza iminsi irindwi, arongera arekura inuma." 
Genesis8:11 Inuma ihindukira nimugoroba, itwaye mu kanwa ishami ritoshye ry’umuzeti! Nuko Nowa amenya ko amazi yari yagabanutse ku isi." 
Genesis8:12 Arongera ategereza indi minsi irindwi arekura inuma, ariko yo ntiyongera kumugarukaho." 
Genesis8:13 Mu mwaka wa magana atandatu n’umwe w’ubuzima bwa Nowa, mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku munsi wako wa mbere, amazi arakama, ubutaka buragaragara. Nowa yegura igisenge cy’ubwato, arebye asanga ubutaka bwumutse." 
Genesis8:14 Mu kwezi kwa kabiri, ku munsi wako wa makumyabiri n’irindwi, isi irumuka." 
Genesis8:15 Imana ibwira Nowa, iti" 
Genesis8:16 «Sohoka uve mu bwato, wowe n’umugore wawe, n’abahungu bawe, n’abakazana bawe." 
Genesis8:17 Sohokana n’inyamaswa n’ibinyamubiri byose muri kumwe: inyoni, amatungo, n’ibikururuka hasi, ubisohokane byose, kugira ngo byuzure ku isi, byororoke bigwire ku isi.»" 
Genesis8:18 Nuko Nowa asohokana n’abana be, n’umugore we, n’abakazana be." 
Genesis8:19 Inyamaswa zose, amatungo yose, inyoni zose, n’ibikururuka hasi byose, biva mu bwato, ukurikije amoko yabyo." 
Genesis8:20 Nowa yubakira Uhoraho urutambiro. Mu matungo yose atazira, no mu nyoni zitazira, arobanuramo izo guturaho ibitambo bitwikwa kuri urwo rutambiro." 
Genesis8:21 Uhoraho ahumurirwa n’umwuka ugusha neza w’ibitambo. Nuko aribwira ati «Sinzongera kuvuma ubutaka ukundi ku mpamvu y’umuntu. N’ubwo kuva mu bwana bwe nta kindi umutima we urarikira uretse ikibi, sinzongera kwica ibifite ubugingo nk’uko nabigenje." 
Genesis8:22 Iminsi yose isi izamara, ibiba n’isarura, imbeho n’ubushyuhe, icyi n’itumba, amanywa n’ijoro, ntibizigera bivaho.»" 
Genesis9:1 Imana iha Nowa n’abahungu be umugisha, irababwira iti «Mwororoke, mugwire, mwuzure isi." 
Genesis9:2 Inyamaswa zose z’isi n’inyoni zose zo mu kirere zizabatinya, muzitere ubwoba. Ibikururuka ku isi byose, hamwe n’amafi yose yo mu nyanja, murabigabiwe." 
Genesis9:3 Ibikururuka byose byifitemo ubuzima, mbibahayeho ikiribwa, kimwe n’ibimera bitohagiye." 
Genesis9:4 Icyakora ntimuzarye inyama ikifitemo ubuzima, ari yo maraso." 
Genesis9:5 Kandi amaraso yanyu, arimo ubuzima bwanyu, sinzabura kuyahorera. Ari inyamaswa, ari umuntu uzaba yayamennye, nzayamuryoza. Buri muntu wese azishyura ubuzima bwa mugenzi we." 
Genesis9:6 Usheshe amaraso y’umuntu, aye azaseswa n’undi muntu, kuko Imana yaremye umuntu imwishushanyije." 
Genesis9:7 Naho mwebwe nimwororoke mugwire, mwuzure isi muyigenge.»" 
Genesis9:8 Imana ibwira Nowa n’abahungu be, iti" 
Genesis9:9 «Dore ngiranye Isezerano namwe n’urubyaro rwanyu," 
Genesis9:10 kimwe n’ibinyabuzima byose muri kumwe: inyoni, n’amatungo n’inyamaswa zose zo ku isi, mbese ibivuye mu bwato byose, ntavanyemo n’inyamaswa z’ishyamba." 
Genesis9:11 Ngiri rero Isezerano ngiranye namwe: nta kinyamubiri kizongera kurimburwa n’amazi y’umwuzure, kandi nta n’umwuzure uzongera kurimbura isi.»" 
Genesis9:12 Imana iravuga iti «Dore ikimenyetso cy’Isezerano ngiranye namwe, n’ibifite ubuzima byose muri kumwe, uko ibisekuruza byanyu bisimburana:" 
Genesis9:13 nshyize umukororombya wanjye mu gicu, uzaba ikimenyetso cy’Isezerano ngiranye n’isi." 
Genesis9:14 Ninkoranyiriza ibicu hejuru y’isi, mukabona uwo mukororombya," 
Genesis9:15 nzibuka Isezerano nagiranye namwe, n’ikinyabuzima cyose; amazi ntazongera kuba umwuzure warimbura ibinyamubiri byose." 
Genesis9:16 Umukororombya niwitambika mu bicu, nanjye nzawitegereza nibuke Isezerano rizahoraho jyewe Imana ngiranye n’ikinyamubiri cyose cyo ku isi.»" 
Genesis9:17 Imana ibwira Nowa, iti «Icyo ni cyo kimenyetso cy’Isezerano ngiranye n’ikinyamubiri cyose cyo ku isi.»" 
Genesis9:18 Bene Nowa basohotse mu bwato, ni Semu, Kamu na Yafeti; Kamu ni se wa Kanahani." 
Genesis9:19 Abo uko ari batatu, ni bo Nowa yabyaye; ni bo bakomotsweho n’abakwiriye ku isi yose." 
Genesis9:20 Nowa aba umuhinzi, atera imizabibu." 
Genesis9:21 Nuko aza kunywa divayi arasinda, yambara ubusa ari mu ihema rye." 
Genesis9:22 Kamu, se wa Kanahani, abona se yambaye ubusa, abibwira abavandimwe be bombi bari hanze." 
Genesis9:23 Semu na Yafeti benda igishura cya Nowa, bagishyira ku bitugu byabo, bagenza umugongo, batwikira ubwambure bwa se. Bityo ntibabona se yambaye ubusa." 
Genesis9:24 Nowa asindutse, amenya ibyo umuhererezi we yamugiriye," 
Genesis9:25 nuko atera hejuru ati «Kanahani aravumwe, azaba umucakara wa nyuma mu bacakara ba bene se!»" 
Genesis9:26 Arongera ati «Nihasingizwe Uhoraho Imana ya Semu, maze Kanahani azamubere umucakara!" 
Genesis9:27 Yafeti na we, Imana imutoneshe, azature mu mahema ya Semu, maze Kanahani amubere umucakara!»" 
Genesis9:28 Nyuma y’umwuzure, Nowa abaho indi myaka magana atatu na mirongo itanu." 
Genesis9:29 Iminsi yose Nowa yabayeho ni imyaka magana cyenda na mirongo itanu, nuko arapfa." 
Genesis10:1 Dore urubyaro rwa bene Nowa, ari bo Semu, Kamu na Yafeti. Umwuzure ushize babyaye abahungu:" 
Genesis10:2 Bene Yafeti ni Gomeri, Magogi, Madayi, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki na Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Bene Gomeri ni Ashikenazi, Rifati na Togarima." 
Genesis10:4 Bene Yavani ni Elisha, Tarishishi, Kitimu na Rodanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Guhera kuri bo amahanga yatangiye kwigabanya ibirwa. Buri wese agahabwa igihugu cye, ukurikije ururimi rwe, n’ihanga rye, n’ubwoko bwe." 
Genesis10:6 Bene Kamu ni Kushi, Misiri, Puti na Kanahani." 
Genesis10:7 Bene Kushi ni Seba, Havila, Sabuta, Rahema, Sabuteka. Bene Rahema ni Sheba na Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Kushi yabyaye Nemurodi, ari we ntwari ya mbere ku isi." 
Genesis10:9 Aba umuhigi ukomeye imbere y’Uhoraho. Ni cyo gituma baca uyu mugani ngo: kuba umuhigi w’intwari imbere y’Uhoraho aka Nemurodi. 
Genesis10:10 Imirwa mikuru ku ngoma ye, ni Babeli, Ereki na Akadi, mu gihugu cya Shineyari." 
Genesis10:11 Yavuye muri icyo gihugu ajya mu cya Ashuru, yubaka Ninivi, Rehoboti na Kalahi." 
Genesis10:12 Hanyuma yubaka Reseni, wa murwa munini uri hagati ya Ninivi na Kalahi." 
Genesis10:13 Misiri yabyaye Abaludi, Abanamu, Abalehavu, Abanafutuwa," 
Genesis10:14 Abapaturusi, Abakasiluwa ari bo Abafilisiti bakomokaho, n’Abakafutori." 
Genesis10:15 Kanahani yabyaye Sidoni imfura ye, abyara na Heti." 
Genesis10:16 Abyara Umuyebuzi, Umuhemori, Umugirigashi," 
Genesis10:17 Umuhivi, Umwaruki, Umusini," 
Genesis10:18 Umwaruvadi, Umusemari n’Umuhamati. Hanyuma imiryango ya bene Kanahani iratatana." 
Genesis10:19 Imbibi za Kanahani zatangiriraga kuri Sidoni werekeza i Gaza no mu cyerekezo cya Sodoma na Gomora, Adama na Seboyimu, kugeza i Lesha." 
Genesis10:20 Ngurwo urubyaro rwa Kamu, ukurikije imiryango n’indimi byabo, uko bariho mu bihugu byabo no mu mahanga yabo." 
Genesis10:21 Semu mukuru wa Yafeti, na we yarabyaye, aba sekuruza wa bene Eberi bose." 
Genesis10:22 Bene Semu ni Elamu, Ashuru, Arupagishadi, Ludi na Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Bene Aramu ni Husi, Huli, Geteri na Mashi." 
Genesis10:24 Arupagishadi yabyaye Shelaki, Shelaki abyara Eberi." 
Genesis10:25 Eberi yabyaye abahungu babiri: uwa mbere bamwise Pelegi (ari byo kuvuga igabanya) kuko mu gihe cye isi yagabanyijwemo imigabane; yari afite murumuna we akitwa Yokitani. 
Genesis10:26 Yokitani yabyaye Alimodadi, Shelefi, Hasarimaweti, Yeraki," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoramu, Huza, Dikila," 
Genesis10:28 Obali, Abimayeli, Saba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Havila na Yobabu. Abo bose ni bene Yokitani;" 
Genesis10:30 aho bari batuye ni mu misozi y’iburasirazuba uturutse i Mesha werekeza i Sefari. 
Genesis10:31 Abo rero ni bo bene Semu, uko bari bameze mu miryango yabo, no mu ndimi zabo bavugaga, no mu bihugu bari batuyemo, ukurikije amahanga yabo." 
Genesis10:32 Ngiyo imiryango ya bene Nowa, ukurikije imbyaro zabo n’amahanga yabo. Amahanga yose ari ku isi, nyuma y’umwuzure, ni bo yakomotseho." 
Genesis11:1 Ku isi yose hari ururimi rumwe, n’imvugo imwe." 
Genesis11:2 Mu iyimuka ry’abantu bava mu burasirazuba, babona ikibaya mu gihugu cya Shineyari, barahatura." 
Genesis11:3 Nuko barabwirana bati «Nimuze, tubumbe amatafari, tuyatwikire mu itanura.» Amabuye bayasimbuza amatafari, n’urwondo rwo kuyafatanisha barusimbuza ubujeni." 
Genesis11:4 Nuko bati «Nimuze twiyubakire umugi n’umunara ukora ku ijuru, maze izina ryacu ribe ikirangirire, kugira ngo tutazatatana ku isi hose.»" 
Genesis11:5 Uhoraho aramanuka, aza kureba uwo mugi n’uwo munara bene Muntu bubakaga." 
Genesis11:6 Nuko Uhoraho aravuga ati «Dore bose hamwe baremye umuryango umwe, bafite n’imvugo imwe. Ubwo batangiye gukora biriya, nta wundi mugambi uzabananira!" 
Genesis11:7 Reka tumanuke maze ururimi bavuga turusobanye, hatazagira uwongera kumva icyo undi avuze!»" 
Genesis11:8 Nuko Uhoraho abakura aho abanyanyagiza ku isi hose, ibyo kubaka wa mugi barabireka." 
Genesis11:9 Ni cyo cyatumye uwo mugi bawita Babeli (ari byo kuvuga isobanya), kuko ari ho Uhoraho yasobanyirije indimi zo ku isi yose." 
Genesis11:10 Dore rero urubyaro rwa Semu: Semu amaze imyaka ijana avutse, abyara Arupagishadi mu mwaka wa kabiri umwuzure ushize." 
Genesis11:11 Amaze kubyara Arupagishadi, Semu abaho indi myaka magana atanu, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis11:12 Arupagishadi amaze imyaka mirongo itatu n’itanu avutse, abyara Shela." 
Genesis11:13 Arupagishadi amaze kubyara Shela, abaho indi myaka magana ane n’itatu, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis11:14 Shela amaze imyaka mirongo itatu avutse, abyara Eberi." 
Genesis11:15 Shela amaze kubyara Eberi, abaho indi myaka magana ane n’itatu, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis11:16 Eberi amaze imyaka mirongo itatu n’ine avutse, abyara Pelegi." 
Genesis11:17 Eberi amaze kubyara Pelegi, abaho indi myaka magana ane na mirongo itatu, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis11:18 Pelegi amaze imyaka mirongo itatu avutse, abyara Rewu." 
Genesis11:19 Pelegi amaze kubyara Rewu, abaho indi myaka magana abiri n’icyenda, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis11:20 Rewu amaze imyaka mirongo itatu n’ibiri avutse, abyara Serugu." 
Genesis11:21 Rewu amaze kubyara Serugu, abaho indi myaka magana abiri n’irindwi, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis11:22 Serugu amaze imyaka mirongo itatu avutse, abyara Nahori." 
Genesis11:23 Serugu amaze kubyara Nahori, abaho indi myaka magana abiri, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori amaze imyaka makumyabiri n’icyenda avutse, abyara Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Nahori amaze kubyara Tera, abaho indi myaka ijana na cumi n’icyenda, abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Genesis11:26 Tera amaze imyaka mirongo irindwi avutse, abyara Abramu, Nahori na Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Dore urubyaro rwa Tera: Tera yabyaye Abramu, Nahori na Harani. Harani yabyaye Loti." 
Genesis11:28 Harani apfa mbere ya se Tera, agwa mu gihugu cye kavukire, ari cyo Uri y’Abakalideya." 
Genesis11:29 Abramu na Nahori bararongora; muka Abramu yitwaga Sarayi, muka Nahori akitwa Milika, umukobwa wa Harani. Uwo Harani yari se wa Milika, akaba na se wa Yisika." 
Genesis11:30 Sarayi ariko yari ingumba, nta mwana yagiraga." 
Genesis11:31 Tera ajyana Abramu umuhungu we, na Loti mwene Harani umwuzukuru we, na Sarayi umukazana we, umugore wa Abramu; nuko abavana Uri y’Abakalideya ngo abajyane mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Bageze i Harani, barahatura." 
Genesis11:32 Iminsi yose Tera yabayeho ni imyaka magana abiri n’itanu, nuko apfira i Harani." 
Genesis12:1 Uhoraho abwira Abramu ati «Wimuke uve mu gihugu cyawe, mu muryango wawe, mu nzu ya so, ujye mu gihugu nzakwereka." 
Genesis12:2 Nzakugira umuryango munini, nzaguha umugisha. Izina ryawe nzarigira ikirangirire, uzaba umunyamugisha." 
Genesis12:3 Abazakuvuga neza, nzabaha umugisha; uzagutuka nzamuvuma. Imiryango yose y’isi izaguherwamo umugisha.»" 
Genesis12:4 Nuko Abramu aragenda, agenza uko Uhoraho yamubwiye, na Loti barajyana. Abramu yimuka mu mugi wa Harani; yari ageze mu kigero cy’imyaka mirongo irindwi n’itanu." 
Genesis12:5 Abramu ahagurukana n’umugore we Sarayi, na Loti umuhungu wa mwene se, hamwe n’ibintu byose bari batunze, n’abagaragu bose bari barahakiye i Harani; bagenda berekeza mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Nuko bagera mu gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Genesis12:6 Abramu yambukiranya igihugu cyose, agera ahantu hitwa Sikemu, ku giti cy’umushishi wa More. Abakanahani bari bagituye muri icyo gihugu." 
Genesis12:7 Uhoraho abonekera Abramu, aramubwira ati «Urubyaro rwawe nzaruha iki gihugu.» Aho ngaho Abramu ahubaka urutambiro, arwubakira Uhoraho wari wamubonekeye." 
Genesis12:8 Ahavuye, ajya ku musozi uri iburasirazuba bwa Beteli. Nuko ashinga ihema rye hagati ya Beteli iburengerazuba, na Hayi mu burasirazuba. Aho ni ho yubakiye urutambiro Uhoraho, maze ahambariza izina rye." 
Genesis12:9 Hanyuma Abramu agenda yimuka, agana muri Negevu." 
Genesis12:10 Haza gutera inzara mu gihugu; Abramu ni ko kumanuka ajya mu Misiri guturayo, kuko inzara yari yabiyogoje mu gihugu." 
Genesis12:11 Igihe agiye kugera mu Misiri abwira umugore we Sarayi, ati «Dore, uri umugore mwiza mu maso, ufite uburanga." 
Genesis12:12 Abanyamisiri nibakubona bazavuga bati ’Uriya ni umugore we!’ Jyewe bazanyica, wowe bakureke ubeho." 
Genesis12:13 Ndabigusabye, uravuge ko uri mushiki wanjye, kugira ngo bamfate neza kubera wowe; mbone no gukiza amagara yanjye, mbikesha wowe.»" 
Genesis12:14 Koko rero Abramu ageze mu Misiri, Abanyamisiri basanga umugore we ari mwiza byahebuje." 
Genesis12:15 Abatware ba Farawo bamaze kumubona, bajya kumuratira Farawo; uwo mugore bamuzana mu ngoro ye." 
Genesis12:16 Nuko bafata neza Abramu ku mpamvu z’uwo mugore, abona amatungo magufi n’amatungo maremare, n’indogobe, n’abagaragu n’abaja, n’indogobe z’ingore n’ingamiya." 
Genesis12:17 Ariko Uhoraho ahanisha ibyago bikomeye Farawo n’urugo rwe, amuhora Sarayi umugore wa Abramu." 
Genesis12:18 Farawo ni ko guhamagaza Abramu, aramubwira ati «Wangize ibiki? Ni iki cyatumye utamenyesha ko ari umugore wawe?" 
Genesis12:19 Kuki wambwiye ngo ni mushiki wawe, bigatuma mugira umugore wanjye? Ngaho noneho, dore umugore wawe, mufate ugende!»" 
Genesis12:20 Farawo ategeka abantu be, baramwirukana, we, n’umugore we, n’ibye byose." 
Genesis13:1 Abramu azamuka ava mu Misiri ajya muri Negevu, azamukana n’umugore we n’ibyo yari atunze byose. Loti na we bari kumwe." 
Genesis13:2 Abramu yari umutunzi cyane, akize kuri zahabu na feza." 
Genesis13:3 Nuko agenda yimuka, ava muri Negevu yerekeza i Beteli. Agera ahantu yari yarigeze gucumbika, hagati ya Beteli na Hayi." 
Genesis13:4 Aho nyine yari yarigeze kuhubaka urutambiro, yongera kuhambariza izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Genesis13:5 Loti wimukanaga na Abramu, na we yari atunze amatungo, amagufi n’amaremare, hamwe n’amahema." 
Genesis13:6 Igihugu nticyari kibahagije bombi, kandi kubera ubwinshi bw’amatungo yabo, kubana ntibyashobokaga." 
Genesis13:7 Haje kuvuka intonganya mu bashumba ba Abramu n’aba Loti. — Icyo gihe Abakanahani n’Abaperezi bari bagituye mu gihugu. — 
Genesis13:8 Abramu abwira Loti, ati «Ntihakabe intonganya muri twe, no ku bashumba banjye n’abawe, kuko turi abavandimwe." 
Genesis13:9 Mbese nturora iki gihugu cyose? Reka dutandukane. Nujya ibumoso nzajya iburyo, nujya iburyo nzajya ibumoso.»" 
Genesis13:10 Loti aterera amaso, abona ikibaya cyose cya Yorudani, n’uko cyatembaga amazi impande zose. — Ibyo byabaye igihe Uhoraho yari atararimbura Sodoma na Gomora; muri icyo gihe icyo kibaya kugeza kuri Sowari cyari kimeze nk’ubusitani bw’Uhoraho, kimwe n’igihugu cya Misiri.—" 
Genesis13:11 Loti yihitiramo ikibaya cyose cya Yorudani, agenda rero agana iburasirazuba. Batandukana batyo." 
Genesis13:12 Abramu we atura mu gihugu cya Kanahani, naho Loti atura mu migi y’icyo kibaya, amahema ye ayashinga hafi ya Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Abantu b’i Sodoma bari inkozi z’ibibi, bahoraga bacumura kuri Uhoraho." 
Genesis13:14 Loti amaze gutandukana na Abramu, Uhoraho abwira Abramu, ati «Ubura amaso uhereye aho uri, maze urebe mu majyaruguru no mu majyepfo, urebe mu burasirazuba no mu burengero bwaryo." 
Genesis13:15 Igihugu cyose uruzi ndakiguhaye burundu, wowe n’urubyaro rwawe." 
Genesis13:16 Urubyaro rwawe nzaruha kororoka rugwire nk’umukungugu wo ku isi. Mbese hari umuntu washobora kubara umukungugu w’isi? Ni ko n’urubyaro rwawe batazashobora kurubara! 
Genesis13:17 Haguruka utambagire iki gihugu mu burebure bwacyo no mu bugari bwacyo, kuko nkiguhaye.»" 
Genesis13:18 Abramu ashingura amahema ye, ajya gutura hafi y’ibiti by’imishishi ya Mambure biri i Heburoni. Ahubakira Uhoraho urutambiro." 
Genesis14:1 Muri icyo gihe, Amurafeli umwami wa Shineyari, Ariyoki umwami wa Elasari, Kedorilahomeri umwami wa Elamu, Tideyali umwami wa Goyimu," 
Genesis14:2 batera Bera umwami wa Sodoma, Birisha umwami wa Gomora, Shineyavu umwami wa Adama, Shemeveri umwami wa Seboyimu, n’umwami wa Bela ari yo Sowari." 
Genesis14:3 Abatewe baremera urugamba mu kibaya cya Sidimu, ahari Inyanja y’Umunyu." 
Genesis14:4 Kedorilahomeri yari yarabigaruriye imyaka cumi n’ibiri yose, maze mu wa cumi n’itatu baragaramba." 
Genesis14:5 Mu wa cumi n’ine haza Kedorilahomeri n’abami bari mu gice cye. Baneshereza Abarefayimu ahitwa Ashitaroti‐Karinayimu; Abazuzi bo banesherezwa i Hamu; Abahemi banesherezwa i Shawe‐Kiriyatayimu; 
Genesis14:6 Abahori banesherezwa mu misozi yabo ya Seyiri, kugeza kuri Eli‐Parani, hafi y’ubutayu." 
Genesis14:7 Hanyuma Kedorilahomeri n’abami bari kumwe basubirayo, bagera ku iriba rya Eni‐Mishipati, ari ryo Kadeshi; bayogoza igihugu cy’Abamaleki kimwe n’Abahemori bari batuye i Hasasoni‐Tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Nuko umwami wa Sodoma n’uwa Gomora, uwa Adama, uwa Seboyimu n’uwa Bela ari yo Sowari, barema urugamba mu kibaya cya Sidimu." 
Genesis14:9 Abo batanu barwana n’aba bane: Kedorilahomeri umwami wa Elamu, Tideyali umwami wa Goyimu, Amurafeli umwami wa Shineyari, na Ariyoki umwami wa Elasari." 
Genesis14:10 Maze muri icyo kibaya cya Sidimu hakaba ibinamba byinshi by’ubujeni; mu guhunga kwabo umwami wa Sodoma n’uwa Gomora babigwamo, abasigaye bahungira mu misozi." 
Genesis14:11 Abatsinze banyaga ibintu byose bya Sodoma n’ibya Gomora, batwara imyaka yose, nuko baragenda." 
Genesis14:12 Bafata na Loti, umuhungu wabo wa Abramu, wari utuye i Sodoma; baramujyana hamwe n’ibye byose." 
Genesis14:13 Uwacitse ku icumu aza kubibwira Abramu w’Umuhebureyi wari utuye hafi y’ibiti by’imishishi bya Mambure. Uwo Mambure yari Umuhemori, akaba mwene nyina wa Eshikoli na Aneri bari bashyize hamwe na Abramu." 
Genesis14:14 Abramu yumvise ko umuhungu wabo yajyanywe bunyago, akoranya abagaragu be bavukiye iwe, bageze kuri magana atatu na cumi n’umunani, nuko bakurikirana ababisha kugeza ahitwa i Dani." 
Genesis14:15 Abramu n’abe bigabanyamo imitwe, babatera nijoro, barabanesha, barabirukana babageza i Hoba hakurya ya Damasi." 
Genesis14:16 Abramu yigarurira ibintu byose, agarura na mwene wabo Loti n’ibintu bye, kimwe n’abagore na bene wabo." 
Genesis14:17 Abramu ubwo yahindukiraga amaze kunesha Kedorilahomeri n’abandi bami bari kumwe, umwami wa Sodoma amusanganirira mu kibaya cya Shave, umubande w’Umwami." 
Genesis14:18 Malekisedeki umwami wa Salemu azana umugati na divayi; yari umuherezabitambo w’Imana Isumbabyose. 
Genesis14:19 Asabira Abramu umugisha avuga ati «Abramu nagire umugisha w’Imana Isumbabyose yaremye ijuru n’isi! 
Genesis14:20 Kandi hasingizwe Imana Isumbabyose yashyize abanzi bawe mu maboko yawe!» Nuko Abramu amutura igice cya cumi kuri byose. 
Genesis14:21 Umwami wa Sodoma abwira Abramu, ati «Mpa abantu, wijyanire ibintu.»" 
Genesis14:22 Ariko Abramu asubiza umwami wa Sodoma, ati «Ndahiriye imbere y’Imana Isumbabyose yaremye ijuru n’isi," 
Genesis14:23 ko kuva ku rudodo kugeza ku gashumi k’inkweto, nta kintu cyawe njyana, hato utazavuga uti ’Ni jye wakijije Abramu’." 
Genesis14:24 Nta cyo nshaka, keretse ibiryo by’abagaragu banjye. Naho abo twatabaranye, Aneri, Eshikoli na Mambure bafate umugabane wabo ubwabo!»" 
Genesis15:1 Ibyo birangiye, Uhoraho abwirira Abramu mu nzozi, ati «Abramu, ntutinye, ndi ingabo igukingiye; ibihembo byawe bizaba byinshi cyane.»" 
Genesis15:2 Abramu aramusubiza ati «Nyagasani Mana, wampa iki? Jyewe ngiye gupfa nta kana, kandi uzanzungura ni Eliyezeri w’i Damasi.»" 
Genesis15:3 Ati «Dore nta rubyaro wampaye, none ngiye kuzungurwa n’umwe mu bagaragu banjye.»" 
Genesis15:4 Uhoraho ni ko kumubwira ati «Nta bwo ari we uzakuzungura, ahubwo uzazungurwa n’uzaturuka mu maraso yawe.»" 
Genesis15:5 Nuko Uhoraho amujyana hanze, aramubwira ati «Ubura amaso urebe hejuru, maze ubare inyenyeri niba ushobora kuzibara.» Nuko aramubwira ati «Dore ni kuriya urubyaro rwawe ruzangana.»" 
Genesis15:6 Abramu yemera Uhoraho, bituma amubonamo ubutungane." 
Genesis15:7 Aramubwira ati «Ndi Uhoraho wagukuye muri Uri y’Abakalideya, kugira ngo nzakugabire iki gihugu.»" 
Genesis15:8 Abramu aramusubiza ati «Nyagasani Mana, nzabwirwa n’iki ko nzagitunga?»" 
Genesis15:9 Uhoraho ati «Jya kunshakira inyana y’imyaka itatu, uzane n’ihene y’imyaka itatu, isekurume y’intama y’imyaka itatu hamwe n’intungura n’inuma.»" 
Genesis15:10 Abramu amuzanira ayo matungo yose, ayasaturamo kabiri, igisate kimwe akirambika imbere y’ikindi, ariko inyoni ntiyazibaga atyo." 
Genesis15:11 Inkongoro ziza kurya izo ntumbi, Abramu arazirukana." 
Genesis15:12 Izuba rigiye kurenga, Abramu afatwa n’ibitotsi, arasinzira araheranwa. Ubwoba bumutaha ari bwinshi, abutewe n’umwijima w’icuraburindi." 
Genesis15:13 Uhoraho abwira Abramu, ati «Menya neza ko abazagukomokaho bazasuhukira mu gihugu kitari icyabo; bazakibamo abacakara, bazicishwe uburetwa imyaka magana ane yose." 
Genesis15:14 Ariko abo bazaba barabereye abacakara na bo nzabahana. Hanyuma abazagukomokaho bazahimukane ibintu byinshi. 
Genesis15:15 Naho wowe uzigendera mu mahoro, usange ba sokuruza bawe; uzahambwa mu mahoro ugeze mu zabukuru." 
Genesis15:16 Bazagaruka ino ku gisekuruza cya kane, kuko ibyaha by’Abahemori bitarashira inyuma.»" 
Genesis15:17 Igihe izuba rimaze kurenga, n’umwijima umaze gukwira hose, ifumba icumbeka n’ikibatsi cy’umuriro binyura hagati ya za nyamaswa zaciwemo kabiri." 
Genesis15:18 Uwo munsi Uhoraho agirana amasezerano na Abramu, muri aya magambo ati «Iki gihugu ngihaye urubyaro rwawe, kuva ku ruzi rwa Misiri kugeza ku ruzi runini rwa Efurati.»" 
Genesis15:19 Ni igihugu cy’Abakeniti, Abakenisi, Abakadimoni," 
Genesis15:20 Abaheti, Abaperezi, Abarefayimu," 
Genesis15:21 Abahemori, Abakanahani, Abagirigashi, n’Abayebuzi." 
Genesis16:1 Sarayi, umugore w’Abramu, nta mwana yari yaramubyariye; ariko akaba yari afite umuja w’Umunyamisirikazi, akitwa Hagara." 
Genesis16:2 Sarayi ni ko kubwira Abramu, ati «Nyamuneka, ndabigusabye, dore Uhoraho yambujije kubyara. Sanga uriya muja wanjye, none ahari nazamubonaho umwana.» Abramu yemera iyo nama ya Sarayi." 
Genesis16:3 Hari hashize imyaka cumi Abramu atuye mu gihugu cya Kanahani, ubwo Sarayi umugore we amuzaniye Hagara umuja we w’Umunyamisiri, kugira ngo amubere umugore." 
Genesis16:4 Abramu arongora Hagara, nuko Hagara asama inda. Abonye atwite ntiyaba akita kuri nyirabuja." 
Genesis16:5 Nuko Sarayi abwira Abramu, ati «Ni wowe utera aka gasuzuguro ngirirwa! Ni jye waguhaye umuja wanjye. None aho amariye kubona atwite, sinkigira agaciro kuri we. Ngaho Uhoraho naducire urubanza twembi!»" 
Genesis16:6 Abramu abwira Sarayi, ati «Dore umuja wawe ni wowe umugenga; umugire uko ushatse.» Ubwo Sarayi aramutoteza, undi arahunga, aramubisa." 
Genesis16:7 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aza guhurira na Hagara mu butayu, hafi ya rya riba riri ku nzira igana i Shuru." 
Genesis16:8 Nuko aramubaza ati «Hagara, muja wa Sarayi, urava he ukajya he?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Ndahunga mabuja Sarayi.»" 
Genesis16:9 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Subira kwa nyokobuja maze ujye umwumvira.» 
Genesis16:10 Arongera ati «Nzongera abazagukomokaho, nzabagira benshi ku buryo batazashobora kubarika.»" 
Genesis16:11 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho ati «Uratwite, kandi uzabyara umwana w’umuhungu, ukazamwita rero Ismaheli kuko Uhoraho yumvise agasuzuguro bagusuzuguye." 
Genesis16:12 Naho we azaba nk’indogobe y’ishyamba itimirwa! Azarwanya bose, bose bamurwanye. Azahora atura yitaruye bene nyina.»" 
Genesis16:13 Hagara yambaza izina ry’Uhoraho wari umaze kumubwira ibyo ngibyo, avuga ati «Uri Imana imbona». Yaribwiraga ati «Ese koko aha ni ho namuboneye, We uhora ambona?»" 
Genesis16:14 Ni cyo cyatumye iryo riba baryita Iriba rya Lahayi‐Royi (irya Nyir’ubuzima umbona), rikaba hagati ya Kadeshi na Beredi." 
Genesis16:15 Hagara abyarira atyo Abramu umwana w’umuhungu, maze uwo mwana Abramu amwita Ismaheli." 
Genesis16:16 Abramu yari afite imyaka mirongo inani n’itandatu, igihe Hagara amubyariye Ismaheli." 
Genesis17:1 Nuko ageze mu kigero cy’imyaka mirongo urwenda n’icyenda, Uhoraho aramubonekera, aramubwira ati «Ni jye Mana Nyir’ ububasha. Ukurikire inzira zanjye ube intungane." 
Genesis17:2 Ngiranye nawe Isezerano kandi nzaguha kororoka bitagira urugero.» 
Genesis17:3 Abramu yubika umutwe ku butaka, Imana iramubwira iti" 
Genesis17:4 «Ngiri rero Isezerano ryanjye nawe: uzaba sekuru w’imiryango itabarika. 
Genesis17:5 Nta bwo bazongera kukwita Abramu, ahubwo izina ryawe kuva ubu ribaye Abrahamu, kuko nzakugira sekuru w’imiryango itabarika." 
Genesis17:6 Nzaguha kororoka cyane, nzakuvanamo imiryango, kandi abami bazakuvukaho." 
Genesis17:7 Nzagirana Isezerano nawe, nzanarigirane n’abazagukomokaho. Iryo Sezerano rizahoraho, kugira ngo mbe Imana yawe, n’iy’urubyaro rwawe ubuziraherezo." 
Genesis17:8 Wowe n’urubyaro rwawe nzabaha gutunga burundu iki gihugu wasuhukiyemo, igihugu cyose cya Kanahani, maze nzababere Imana.»" 
Genesis17:9 Imana ibwira Abrahamu, iti «Uzakomeze rero Isezerano ryanjye, wowe n’abo uzabyara, uko ibisekuru bizasimburana." 
Genesis17:10 Dore rero iryo Sezerano nzagirana nawe n’urubyaro rwawe: umwana wanyu wese w’umuhungu, azagenywe." 
Genesis17:11 Muzikatisha agashishwa ku ruhu rw’umubirigabo wanyu, maze bizabe ikimenyetso cy’Isezerano ryanjye namwe." 
Genesis17:12 Umwana wese w’umuhungu namara iminsi munani azagenywa, uko muzajya mubabyara: ari uwavutse mu nzu yanyu, ari n’umuvamahanga mwaguze feza utari uwo mu bwoko bwawe." 
Genesis17:13 Umugaragu wavutse iwanyu muzamugenye, uwo mwaguze feza na we muzamugenye. Bityo Isezerano ryanjye rigaragarira mu mubiri wanyu rizaba iry’iteka ryose." 
Genesis17:14 Ariko utazagenywa wese, umwana w’umuhungu batazakuraho agahu ko ku mubirigabo we, uwo muntu azacibwe mu muryango wamubyaye, azaba yarishe Isezerano ryanjye.»" 
Genesis17:15 Imana ibwira Abrahamu, iti «Sarayi umugore wawe, ntuzongere kumwita Sarayi, ahubwo uzamwita Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Nzamuha umugisha, ndetse nzamuha kukubyarira umwana w’umuhungu. Nzamuha umugisha, azaba nyirakuruza w’amahanga, n’abami b’imiryango bazamukomokaho.»" 
Genesis17:17 Abrahamu yubika umutwe hasi, araturika araseka. Aribwira ati «Mbese hari umwana wavuka ku musaza w’imyaka ijana? Na Sara ufite imyaka mirongo urwenda, yashobora kubyara?»" 
Genesis17:18 Abrahamu ni ko kubwira Imana, ati «Icyampa gusa ngo Ismaheli umukomereze ubugingo!»" 
Genesis17:19 Imana iti «Reka da! Ahubwo ni Sara uzakubyarira umwana, ukazamwita Izaki. Nzagirana Isezerano na we, Isezerano rizahoraho iteka kuri we n’urubyaro rwe." 
Genesis17:20 Naho ku byerekeye Ismaheli, ndakumva. Muhaye umugisha, nzamuha kugwira no kororoka bitagira urugero. Azaba se w’ibikomangoma cumi na bibiri, kandi nzamugira umuryango ukomeye." 
Genesis17:21 Nyamara Isezerano ryanjye nzarigirana na Izaki, uwo Sara azakubyarira undi mwaka iki gihe.»" 
Genesis17:22 Imana imaze kuvugana na Abrahamu, imusiga aho, irazamuka." 
Genesis17:23 Nuko uwo munsi nyine, Abrahamu agenya Ismaheli umwana we, n’abari mu rugo rwe bose, n’abo yari ahatse buja yarabaguze feza, abahungu bose bari mu rugo rwe, mbese nk’uko Imana yari yabimubwiye." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahamu yari mu kigero cy’imyaka mirongo urwenda n’icyenda igihe yigenyesheje. 
Genesis17:25 Naho umuhungu we Ismaheli yari umwana w’imyaka cumi n’itatu, igihe bamukase agahu k’umubirigabo we." 
Genesis17:26 Uwo munsi Abrahamu n’umuhungu we Ismaheli barabagenya. 
Genesis17:27 Ab’igitsinagabo bose bo mu rugo rwe, ari abagaragu bahavukiye, ari n’abanyamahanga yari yaraguze feza, bose bagenyerwa hamwe na we." 
Genesis18:1 Imana yongera kubonekera Abrahamu ku biti by’imishishi bya Mambure. Abrahamu yari yiyicariye ku muryango w’ihema rye, igihe cy’icyokere cyo ku manywa y’ihangu." 
Genesis18:2 Ngo yubure amaso, abona abagabo batatu bamuhagaze imbere. Ababonye ava aho yari yicaye ku butaka." 
Genesis18:3 Aravuga ati «Shobuja, niba ngize ubutoni mu maso yawe, ntuce ku mugaragu wawe." 
Genesis18:4 Nibazane utuzi, mwoge ibirenge, muruhukire mu nsi y’iki giti;" 
Genesis18:5 mbazanire n’igisate cy’umugati, musame agatima mbere yo gukomeza urugendo, ubwo mwanyuze hafi y’umugaragu wanyu.» Baramubwira bati «Kora uko ubivuze.»" 
Genesis18:6 Abrahamu yihuta agana ihema asanga Sara, aramubwira ati «Gira bwangu, wende incuro eshatu z’ifu, uyikate, maze wotse utugati.»" 
Genesis18:7 Hanyuma Abrahamu yirukira mu bushyo bw’inka, afatamo akamasa gashishe karyoshye, maze agaha umugaragu we ngo yihutire kugatunganya." 
Genesis18:8 Yenda amata n’amavuta, n’inyama z’ako kamasa yateguje, arabibahereza; we ahagarara mu nsi y’igiti iruhande rwabo, barafungura." 
Genesis18:9 Nuko baramubaza bati «Sara umugore wawe ari hehe?» Arabasubiza ati «Ari hariya mu ihema.» 
Genesis18:10 Uhoraho ati «Nzagaruka iwawe undi mwaka iki gihe; icyo gihe Sara, umugore wawe, azaba yarabyaye umwana w’umuhungu.» Ubwo Sara yarumvaga, ahagaze inyuma ya Abrahamu mu muryango w’ihema." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahamu na Sara bari bashaje cyane, kandi Sara yari yararetse kugira ibyo abandi bagore bagira." 
Genesis18:12 Nuko Sara araturika asekera mu mutima, yibwira ati «Ubu ko nashaje, nashobora nte kugira ibyishimo, kandi ko na databuja ari umukambwe?»" 
Genesis18:13 Uhoraho abwira Abrahamu, ati «Ni iki gishekeje Sara, kigatuma yibaza ngo mbese ubu nzabyara, ko nshaje?" 
Genesis18:14 Hari ikintu se kinanira Uhoraho? Undi mwaka iki gihe, nzagaruka iwawe, Sara azaba yarabyaye umwana w’umuhungu.»" 
Genesis18:15 Sara ahakana avuga ati «Sinigeze nseka», kuko yari afite ubwoba. Uhoraho ati «Nyamara wasetse!»" 
Genesis18:16 Ba bagabo barahaguruka berekeza amaso kuri Sodoma; Abrahamu ajyana na bo abaherekeje. 
Genesis18:17 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Ese nahisha Abrahamu icyo ngiye gukora? 
Genesis18:18 Kandi Abrahamu azaba umuryango munini unakomeye, maze amahanga yose y’isi akazamuherwamo umugisha." 
Genesis18:19 Koko rero naramutoye kugira ngo azatoze abana be n’abo mu nzu ye kuzakomeza inzira y’Uhoraho, bakurikiza ubutabera n’ubutungane, amaze gusaza; bityo Uhoraho azabone kurangiriza Abrahamu icyo yamusezeranyije.»" 
Genesis18:20 Hanyuma Uhoraho ati «Induru iterwa na Sodoma na Gomora imaze kuba ndende, n’icyaha cyabo kirakabije!" 
Genesis18:21 Ngiye kumanuka ndebe niba iby’induru yangezeho ari ko babigenjeje koko. Niba atari ibyo kandi na byo mbimenye.» 
Genesis18:22 Ba bagabo bagenda berekeje i Sodoma, Abrahamu we akomeza guhagarara imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Genesis18:23 Abrahamu aramwegera ati «Koko ugiye kwica intungane hamwe n’umunyabyaha? 
Genesis18:24 Hari n’aho wenda haboneka abantu mirongo itanu b’intungane mu mugi! Ubwo se koko warimbura uriya mugi? Ntiwababarira hariya hantu ugiriye izo ntungane mirongo itanu? 
Genesis18:25 Uramenye ntukabigenze utyo, ngo wice umunyabyaha hamwe n’intungane; intungane zaba zipfuye urw’abagome. Ntibikabeho! Ucira imanza isi yose ntakarenganye!»" 
Genesis18:26 Uhoraho ati «Ninsanga muri Sodoma hari intungane mirongo itanu, nzahagirira imbabazi, nzahasonera kubera izo ntungane mirongo itanu.»" 
Genesis18:27 Abrahamu ati «Jye mukungugu, jyewe w’ivu, nongeye kuvugisha Databuja." 
Genesis18:28 Za ntungane mirongo itanu, nihaburamo eshanu, bizatuma usenya uriya mugi wose?» Uhoraho ati «Nimpasanga intungane mirongo ine n’eshanu, sinzahasenya.»" 
Genesis18:29 Abrahamu ati «Ahari wenda haboneka mirongo ine!» Uhoraho ati «Sinzawusenya, ngiriye abo mirongo ine.»" 
Genesis18:30 Abrahamu ati «Databuja ntarakare, nongeye kubaza: ahari wenda haboneka mirongo itatu.» Uhoraho ati «Sinzawusenya, ninywusangamo mirongo itatu.»" 
Genesis18:31 Abrahamu ati «Nongeye kwiyemeza kubaza Databuja: ahari wenda haboneka makumyabiri?» Uhoraho ati «Sinzahasenya nihaboneka makumyabiri.» 
Genesis18:32 Abrahamu ati «Databuja ntarakare, reka noneho mvuge ubwa nyuma: ahari wenda haboneka icumi gusa.» Uhoraho ati «Sinzahasenya, ngiriye abo cumi.»" 
Genesis18:33 Uhoraho ngo arangize kuvugana na Abrahamu, aragenda, maze Abrahamu asubira iwe." 
Genesis19:1 Ba Bamalayika uko ari babiri bagera i Sodoma nimugoroba. Loti yari yicaye ku irembo ry’umugi. Loti ngo ababone arahaguruka, arabasanganira, arapfukama yubika umutwe ku butaka." 
Genesis19:2 Nuko aravuga ati «Ndabinginze, ba databuja, nimwinjire mu nzu y’umugaragu wanyu, mwoge ibirenge, murare, maze ejo muzazinduke mukomeze urugendo rwanyu.» Baramubwira bati «Oya, turarara hariya ku irembo.»" 
Genesis19:3 Arakomeza arabahata, baremera bajya iwe, binjira mu nzu. Abategurira ibyo kurya, abatekeshereza utugati tudasembuye, bararya." 
Genesis19:4 Babaye batararyama, baterwa n’abagabo bo muri uwo mugi wa Sodoma, kuva ku muto kugeza ku musaza, mbese abaturage bose, inzu barayigota." 
Genesis19:5 Nuko bahamagara Loti bati «Abo bagabo baje iwawe iri joro bari hehe? Batuzanire tubishimisheho.» 
Genesis19:6 Loti arasohoka asiga akinze. 
Genesis19:7 Arababwira ati «Bavandimwe, ndabibasabye mwikora ishyano." 
Genesis19:8 Dore mfite abakobwa babiri b’isugi, ngiye ahubwo kuba ari bo mbaha mubakoreshe icyo mushaka; naho bariya bagabo ntimugire icyo mubatwara, kuko ari abashyitsi banjye.»" 
Genesis19:9 Baramusubiza bati «Hoshi igirayo!» Barabwirana bati «Uyu nguyu asuhukiye ino vuba, none dore arigira umucamanza! Turaza kumugirira nabi kurusha uko twari kuyigirira abo bantu.» Loti baramuhirika, begera urugi ngo barumene." 
Genesis19:10 Ariko ba bagabo babiri bakingira Loti amaboko yabo, bamugarura mu nzu, barafunga." 
Genesis19:11 Naho ya mbaga yari ihagaze ku muryango w’inzu babahuma amaso kuva ku muto kugeza ku mukuru, ntibashobora kumenya aho umuryango uherereye." 
Genesis19:12 Abo bagabo babaza Loti, bati «Hari abandi bantu bawe bari hano? Hari umukwe? Hari abahungu cyangwa abakobwa bawe? Abo ufite mu mugi bose, uhabakure!" 
Genesis19:13 Tugiye kuharimbura, kuko induru iterwa na Sodoma ari ndende imbere y’Uhoraho. None yatwohereje ngo tubarimbure.»" 
Genesis19:14 Loti ni ko gusohoka abwira abakwe be yari kuzashyingira abakobwa be ati «Nimuhaguruke muve aha hantu, kuko Uhoraho agiye kuhasenya.» Ariko abakwe be bakabona ko ari amashyengo." 
Genesis19:15 Umuseke ukebye abamalayika batota Loti, bati «Haguruka, n’umugore wawe n’abakobwa bawe babiri bari hano, kugira ngo ejo mutazavaho muzira ibyaha by’uyu mugi.»" 
Genesis19:16 Agishidikanya, abamalayika babafata ukuboko, we n’umugore we, n’abakobwa be uko ari babiri, nuko barabasohokana, kuko Uhoraho yari yamugiriye impuhwe." 
Genesis19:17 Babagejeje hanze, baramubwira bati «Kiza amagara yawe! Nturebe inyuma, ntugire aho uhagarara muri iki kibaya cyose. Uhungire mu misozi, udapfa.»" 
Genesis19:18 Loti arababwira ati «Oya, Nyagasani!" 
Genesis19:19 Dore, jyewe umugaragu wawe, nagize ubutoni mu maso yawe kandi wangiriye ineza ikomeye, ukiza amagara yanjye. Ariko sinashobora guhunga ngo ngere kuri uriya musozi, icyo cyago kitaramfata ngo mpfe." 
Genesis19:20 Dore, kariya kadugudu ureba kari hafi bihagije kugira ngo nkageremo; ni kanzinya cyane, reka abe ari ho mpungira, maze mbeho!»" 
Genesis19:21 Undi ati «Nongeye kukugirira ubuntu, sinsenya kariya kadugudu uvuze." 
Genesis19:22 Ngaho rero ihute uhungireyo. Kuko nta cyo nshobora gukora utaragerayo.» Ni cyo cyatumye ako kadugudu bakita Sowari (ari byo kuvuga kanzinya). 
Genesis19:23 Izuba ryarashe Loti ageze i Sowari. 
Genesis19:24 Nuko Uhoraho agusha kuri Sodoma na Gomora imvura y’umuriro uvanze n’ubumara biturutse ku ijuru no kuri Uhoraho. 
Genesis19:25 Atsemba iyo migi yombi n’ikibaya cyose; atsemba abaturage b’iyo migi, n’ibimera byose ku butaka birakongoka." 
Genesis19:26 Umugore wa Loti aza kureba inyuma, ahita ahinduka igishyinga cy’umunyu." 
Genesis19:27 Abrahamu azindukira aho yari yaraye ahagaze imbere y’Uhoraho. 
Genesis19:28 Yerekeza amaso kuri Sodoma na Gomora, kuri cya kibaya; abona umwotsi ucucumuka mu butaka nk’uva mu itanura." 
Genesis19:29 Nguko rero uko Imana yibutse Abrahamu, ikavana Loti mu byago, igihe irimbuye imigi y’akarere Loti yari atuyemo." 
Genesis19:30 Loti azamuka ava i Sowari ajya gutura mu misozi yirengeye, ajyana n’abakobwa be babiri. Yatinye rero gutura i Sowari, ahubwo yiturira mu buvumo, we n’abakobwa be uko ari babiri." 
Genesis19:31 Umukuru aza kubwira umuto ati «Data arashaje, kandi mu gihugu cyose nta ho tuzabona umugabo ngo aturongore, nk’uko bigenda ahandi hose." 
Genesis19:32 Ngwino tunyweshe data divayi, maze turyamane, kugira ngo dutume data asiga imbuto.»" 
Genesis19:33 Iryo joro batereka se divayi. Umukuru ararana na se. Se ntiyabimenya, ntiyamenya igihe umukobwa yaryamiye n’igihe yabyukiye." 
Genesis19:34 Bukeye umukuru abwira umuto ati «Dore ejo nararanye na data; twongere iri joro tumutereke divayi, uze uryamane na we. Bityo tuzaba dutumye data asiga imbuto.»" 
Genesis19:35 Iryo joro na none batereka se divayi. Umuto arahaguruka ajya kurarana na we. Se ntiyabimenya, ntiyamenya igihe umukobwa yaryamiye, n’igihe yabyukiye." 
Genesis19:36 Abakobwa ba Loti basama inda batyo, bazitewe na se." 
Genesis19:37 Umukuru abyara umuhungu amwita Mowabu; ni we sekuru w’Abamowabu, bakiriho n’ubu." 
Genesis19:38 Umuto na we abyara umuhungu, amwita izina rya Benihami; ni we sekuru w’Abahamoni, bakiriho n’ubu." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahamu ava aho ngaho ajya mu gihugu cya Negevu, atura hagati ya Kadeshi na Shuru, hanyuma ajya i Gerari ahamara igihe." 
Genesis20:2 Abrahamu aza kuvuga ko Sara umugore we ari mushiki we. Nuko Abimeleki, umwami w’igihugu cya Gerari, yohereza abantu kumuzanira Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Ariko Imana isanga Abimeleki mu nzozi nijoro, iramubwira iti «Ugiye gupfa uzize umugore wacyuye kuko afite umugabo.»" 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleki yari ataramwegera. Nuko aravuga ati «Nyagasani, ese uzanyica n’abanjye bose kandi turi intungane?" 
Genesis20:5 Uwo mugabo ntiyari yambwiye ati ’Ni mushiki wanjye’? N’uwo mugore akambwira ati ’Ni musaza wanjye’? Ibyo nakoze nabigiranye umutima utaryarya, ndi umwere.»" 
Genesis20:6 Imana imusubiriza mu nzozi, igira iti «Nanjye nari nzi ko wabigiranye umutima utaryarya, ni cyo cyatumye nkubuza kuncumuraho. Ni yo mpamvu ntakwemereye kumukoraho." 
Genesis20:7 Noneho subiza uriya muntu umugore we, kuko uriya ari umuhanuzi; azagusabira, ubeho. Niba utamumushubije, umenye ko uzapfa nta kabuza wowe n’abawe bose.»" 
Genesis20:8 Abimeleki arazinduka, ahamagaza abagaragu be bose abatekerereza ibyo byose. Abantu bashya ubwoba." 
Genesis20:9 Hanyuma ahamagaza Abrahamu, aramubaza ati «Watugize ibiki! Nagucumuyeho iki cyatumye jye n’igihugu cyanjye udushyira mu cyaha gikomeye gityo? Wangiriye ibidakorwa!»" 
Genesis20:10 Abimeleki arongera ati «Ibyo wabigize ushaka kugera ku ki?» 
Genesis20:11 Abrahamu ati «Ni uko nibwiraga nti ’Aha hantu ntibubaha Imana na gato, bazanyica banziza umugore wanjye.’" 
Genesis20:12 Byongeye kandi ni mushiki wanjye koko, kuko dusangiye data, ariko ntidusangiye mama; ubu ni umugore wanjye." 
Genesis20:13 Ubwo Imana yankuraga mu nzu ya data, ikanzerereza, nabwiye Sara nti ’Dore ineza uzajya ungirira aho tuzajya tugera hose: uzajye uvuga yuko ndi musaza wawe.’»" 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleki azana intama n’inka, abagaragu n’abaja, abiha Abrahamu, kandi amusubiza Sara umugore we." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleki aramubwira ati «Mbese nturora igihugu cyanjye cyose? Uzature aho uzashaka hose.» 
Genesis20:16 Abwira Sara, ati «Dore mpaye musaza wawe amasikeli igihumbi ya feza; koko ni yo azabera abo muri kumwe nk’agatambaro kabakinze mu maso kugira ngo ibyabaye boye kubibonamo ishyano, naho wowe ubaye umwere rwose.»" 
Genesis20:17 Abrahamu atakambira Imana ikiza Abimeleki, ikiza n’umugore we n’abaja be, barabyara." 
Genesis20:18 Kuko Imana yari yaragumbahishije abagore bose bo mu rugo rwa Abimeleki, ibahora Sara umugore wa Abrahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Uhoraho agenderera Sara nk’uko yari yarabivuze, amugenzereza uko yari yaramubwiye." 
Genesis21:2 Sara asama inda, abyarira umusaza Abrahamu umwana w’umuhungu, ku gihe Imana yari yavuze." 
Genesis21:3 Abrahamu yita umuhungu we Izaki, uwo Sara yari yamubyariye." 
Genesis21:4 Hanyuma Abrahamu agenya Izaki ku munsi wa munani, nk’uko Imana yari yarabimutegetse." 
Genesis21:5 Izaki avuka, Abrahamu yari ageze mu kigero cy’imyaka ijana." 
Genesis21:6 Sara araterura ati «Imana inteye guseka, n’undi wese uzabyumva azansekera!»" 
Genesis21:7 Arongera ati «Ni nde wigeze abwira Abrahamu ngo ’Sara azonsa abana’? Nyamara dore mubyariye umuhungu mu zabukuru!» 
Genesis21:8 Umwana arakura, aracuka. Umunsi wo gucutsa Izaki, Abrahamu akoresha ibirori, ararika abantu benshi, arabagaburira." 
Genesis21:9 Bukeye, wa muhungu Hagara Umunyamisirikazi yari yarabyariye Abrahamu, Sara amubona akina." 
Genesis21:10 Ni ko kubwira Abrahamu, ati «Menesha uriya muja n’umwana we, kuko umwana w’uriya muja atagomba kuzagabana umurage n’umwana wanjye Izaki.»" 
Genesis21:11 Ibyo birakaza Abrahamu cyane, kuko yari umuhungu we." 
Genesis21:12 Ariko Imana iramubwira iti «Iby’umuhungu wawe n’umuja wawe ntibigutere umutima mubi. Icyo Sara akubwira cyose umwumve, kuko Izaki ari we umuryango witiriwe izina ryawe uzaturukaho." 
Genesis21:13 Naho umuhungu w’umuja wawe, na we nzamugira umuryango, kuko na we ari uwawe.»" 
Genesis21:14 Abrahamu arazinduka cyane, yenda umugati n’isaho y’uruhu irimo amazi, abiha Hagara amuhekesha umwana ku bitugu, aramusezerera. Aragenda ajya kuzerera mu butayu bwa Berisheba." 
Genesis21:15 Amazi aza gushira muri ya saho y’uruhu, umwana amuta mu gihuru." 
Genesis21:16 Aragenda ajya kwicara ahitaruye, nk’intera y’aho umuheto wageza. Ubwo yaribwiraga ati «Noye kureba aho umwana wanjye apfa!» Yicara ahitegeye, atera hejuru ararira." 
Genesis21:17 Imana yumva ijwi ry’umwana, maze Malayika w’Imana ahamagarira Hagara mu ijuru ati «Hagara, ni iki? Wigira ubwoba, kuko Imana yumvise ijwi ry’umwana aho ari." 
Genesis21:18 Haguruka! Ujyane umwana umufashe ukuboko, kuko nzamugira umuryango mugari.»" 
Genesis21:19 Imana imuhumura amaso, abona iriba aragenda avoma amazi yuzuza isaho, aramiza umwana." 
Genesis21:20 Nuko Imana ibana n’uwo muhungu, arakura, atura mu butayu, aba umurashi." 
Genesis21:21 Atura mu butayu bwa Parani, nyina amushyingira umukobwa wo mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Genesis21:22 Muri iyo minsi Abimeleki na Pikoli, umutware w’ingabo ze, babwira Abrahamu bati «Imana iri kumwe nawe mu byo ukora byose." 
Genesis21:23 Noneho rero ngaho ndahira ku Mana tukiri aha ngaha, ko utazampenda ubwenge, jyewe, umwana wanjye, cyangwa umwuzukuru wanjye. Uzatubera incuti, jyewe n’igihugu utuyemo, nk’uko twakubereye incuti." 
Genesis21:24 Abrahamu ati «Ndabirahiye.» 
Genesis21:25 Abrahamu yinubira Abimeleki ku by’iriba abagaragu b’Abimeleki bari bamunyaze. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki atera hejuru ati «Sinzi uwabigize! Nawe nta bwo wigeze ugira icyo ubimbwiraho, kandi nanjye ni uyu munsi nabyumvise.»" 
Genesis21:27 Abrahamu azana amatungo magufi n’amaremare, abiha Abimeleki; bombi bagirana isezerano." 
Genesis21:28 Abrahamu arobanura abana b’intama z’inyagazi, indwi zo mu mukumbi we." 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki abwira Abrahamu, ati «Utwo twana tw’intama tw’utunyagazi turindwi urobanuye, bisobanura iki?»" 
Genesis21:30 Aramusubiza ati «Uko ari turindwi, ndatuguha kugira ngo bimbere gihamya cy’uko ari jye wafukuye iryo riba.»" 
Genesis21:31 Ni cyo cyatumye aho hantu bahita Berisheba, kuko ari ho barahiriye bombi." 
Genesis21:32 Nuko bagirana isezerano i Berisheba. Abimeleki ahagurukana na Pikoli umutware w’ingabo ze, basubira mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti." 
Genesis21:33 Abrahamu atera igiti cya tamarisi, agitera i Berisheba, yambarizayo Izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana y’ubuziraherezo." 
Genesis21:34 Abrahamu amara iminsi muri icyo gihugu cy’Abafilisiti yari yarasuhukiyemo. 
Genesis22:1 Nyuma y’ibyo Imana igerageza Abrahamu, iramubwira iti «Abrahamu!» Arayisubiza ati «Ndi hano.»" 
Genesis22:2 Imana iti «Fata umwana wawe, umwana wawe w’ikinege ukunda, Izaki; ujye mu karere ka Moriya. Nuhagera uzamutambeho igitambo gitwikwa, ku musozi nzakwereka.»" 
Genesis22:3 Abrahamu arazinduka, yasa inkwi z’igitambo gitwikwa; ategura indogobe ye, nuko aragenda hamwe n’abagaragu be babiri na Izaki umwana we w’umuhungu, berekeza mu karere Imana yari yamubwiye." 
Genesis22:4 Ku munsi wa gatatu, Abrahamu yubura amaso; aho hantu ahabonera kure." 
Genesis22:5 Maze abwira abagaragu be, ati «Nimugume hano n’iyi ndogobe; jye n’umwana turabanza tugende tujye gusenga, hanyuma turahindukira tubasange.»" 
Genesis22:6 Abrahamu yenda inkwi z’igitambo gitwikwa, azikorera umuhungu we Izaki; ajyana urujyo rurimo amakara yaka, n’icyuma. Nuko bombi barajyanirana." 
Genesis22:7 Izaki abwira se Abrahamu, ati «Dawe!» Undi ati «Ni ibiki, mwana wanjye?» Izaki ati «Ko mbona umuriro n’inkwi, intama yo gutamba iri hehe?»" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahamu aramusubiza ati «Imana iri burebe aho yibonera intama yo gutamba, mwana wanjye!» Nuko bombi barakomeza barajyanirana." 
Genesis22:9 Bageze aho Imana yari yaramweretse, Abrahamu ahubaka urutambiro, arugerekaho inkwi, aboha umwana we Izaki, amushyira kuri urwo rutambiro hejuru y’inkwi." 
Genesis22:10 Nuko Abrahamu abangura ukuboko, afata icyuma ngo atambe umwana we." 
Genesis22:11 Ubwo Malayika w’Uhoraho amuhamagarira mu ijuru ati «Abrahamu! Abrahamu!» Undi ati «Ndi hano.» 
Genesis22:12 Malayika w’Uhoraho ati «Ntukoze ukuboko kuri uwo mwana! Ntugire icyo umutwara, kuko ubu ngubu menye ko wubaha Imana, ukaba utanyimye umwana wawe w’ikinege.»" 
Genesis22:13 Abrahamu ngo yubure amaso, abona inyuma ye imfizi y’intama; amahembe yayo yari yafatiwe mu gihuru. Abrahamu aragenda, arayifata, ayituraho igitambo gitwikwa mu kigwi cy’umwana we." 
Genesis22:14 Aho hantu Abrahamu ahita Hareba — Uhoraho; ni cyo gituma na n’ubu bakivuga ngo ’Ku musozi Uhoraho areberwaho’. 
Genesis22:15 Malayika w’Uhoraho ahamagarira Abrahamu mu ijuru ubwa kabiri," 
Genesis22:16 aramubwira ati «Ndahiye mu izina ryanjye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ubwo wangenjereje utyo, ntunyime umwana wawe w’ikinege," 
Genesis22:17 nzaguha umugisha; abazagukomokaho nzabaha kororoka nk’inyenyeri zo mu kirere, n’umusenyi wo ku nkombe y’inyanja, maze bazigarurire amarembo y’abanzi babo." 
Genesis22:18 Kandi urubyaro rwawe, ni rwo amahanga yose y’isi azifurizanyamo umugisha, kuko wumviye ijambo ryanjye.»" 
Genesis22:19 Abrahamu arahindukira, asanga abagaragu be; nuko barahaguruka, basubira i Berisheba; arahatura." 
Genesis22:20 Nyuma y’ibyo, bamenyesha Abrahamu, bati «Dore, Milika na we yabyariye murumuna wawe Nahori abana b’abahungu:" 
Genesis22:21 imfura ye ni Husi, hagataho murumuna we Buzi, na Kemuweli se wa Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 na Kesedi, Hazo, Pilidashi, Yilidafi na Betuweli.»" 
Genesis22:23 Betuweli ni we se wa Rebeka. Abo uko ari umunani ni bo Milika yabyariye Nahori murumuna wa Abrahamu. 
Genesis22:24 Inshoreke ye yitwa Rewuma na yo ibyara Tevahi, Gahamu, Tahashi na Mahaka." 
Genesis23:1 Sara yabayeho imyaka ijana na makumyabiri n’irindwi. 
Genesis23:2 Sara yapfiriye i Kiriyati — Haruba, ari yo Heburoni, mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Abrahamu aramuririra, aramwiraburira." 
Genesis23:3 Hanyuma arahaguruka, ava ku murambo we ngo ajye kumvikana na bene Heti." 
Genesis23:4 Nuko arababwira ati «Ndi umusuhuke n’umushyitsi muri mwe; nimumpe ikibanza cyo guhambamo umuntu wanjye witahiye.» 
Genesis23:5 Bene Heti basubiza Abrahamu bamubwira bati 
Genesis23:6 «Shobuja, umva icyo tukubwira. Imana yakugize umuntu ukomeye muri twe. Uhambe umuntu wawe mu mva uri buhitemo mu mva zacu zose. Ntawakwima imva yo guhambamo umuntu wawe.»" 
Genesis23:7 Abrahamu arahaguruka, arapfukama, yubika umutwe ku butaka imbere ya bene igihugu, ari bo bene Heti." 
Genesis23:8 Arababwira ati «Niba koko mwemera ko mpamba umuntu wanjye wigendeye, mu mva y’iwanyu, munyumve: nimunyingingire Efuroni mwene Sohari," 
Genesis23:9 maze ampe ubuvumo bwe buri i Makipela ku rubibi rw’umurima we. Ahangurishe ku giciro gikwiye cya feza, abe ari ho haba irimbi ryanjye iwanyu.»" 
Genesis23:10 Efuroni yari yicaranye na bene Heti. Efuroni w’Umuheti rero asubiza Abrahamu mu maso ya bene Heti, ari na bo bahitaga ku irembo ry’umugi wabo. Nuko aravuga ati" 
Genesis23:11 «Shobuja, umva icyo nkubwira: uwo murima ndawuguhaye, n’ubuvumo burimo ndabuguhaye; mbiguhereye imbere y’umuryango wanjye. Hamba umuntu wawe.»" 
Genesis23:12 Abrahamu arapfukama, yubika umutwe ku butaka imbere ya bene igihugu." 
Genesis23:13 Abwira Efuroni, bene igihugu bamwumva, ati «Ndakwinginze, umva icyo nkubwira: ndakwishyura igiciro cy’uwo murima; cyemere nkiguhe, mpambe umuntu wanjye.»" 
Genesis23:14 Efuroni asubiza Abrahamu, ati" 
Genesis23:15 «Shobuja, akarima kaguze amasikeli magana ane ya feza kanteranye nawe? Genda uhambe umuntu wawe.»" 
Genesis23:16 Abrahamu yumvikana na Efuroni, amupimira ifeza yavuze, bene Heti babireba, amasikeli magana ane ya feza, uko abacuruzi bayapimaga." 
Genesis23:17 Nuko umurima wa Efuroni wari i Makipela, ahareba i Mambure, wo n’ubuvumo burimo, n’ibiti byose byari biwuzitiye, biba ibya Abrahamu." 
Genesis23:18 Bemera ko biba ubukonde bwe, byemererwa imbere ya bene Heti n’imbere y’abahitaga ku irembo ry’umugi bose." 
Genesis23:19 Nyuma y’ibyo, Abrahamu ahamba Sara umugore we muri ubwo buvumo buri mu murima w’i Makipela, ahareba i Mambure; ni yo Heburoni mu gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Genesis23:20 Nuko bene Heti barekera Abrahamu uwo murima n’ubuvumo buwurimo, ngo bimubere imbago yo guhambamo." 
Genesis24:1 Abrahamu yari umukambwe ageze mu zabukuru, kandi Uhoraho yari yaramuhaye umugisha muri byose." 
Genesis24:2 Abrahamu abwira umukuru mu bagaragu be wategekaga ibintu bye byose ati «Shyira ikiganza cyawe mu nsi y’ikibero cyanjye," 
Genesis24:3 urahire Uhoraho, Imana y’ijuru n’isi, ko utazashakira umwana wanjye umugore mu bakobwa b’Abakanahani dutuyemo." 
Genesis24:4 Ahubwo uzajye mu gihugu cyanjye, mu bavandimwe banjye, abe ari ho ushakira umugore umuhungu wanjye Izaki.»" 
Genesis24:5 Umugaragu aramubaza ati «Ahari wenda umugore ntazakunda kunkurikira muri iki gihugu. Nzajyane se umuhungu wawe mu gihugu waturutsemo?» 
Genesis24:6 Abrahamu ati «Uzirinde gusubizayo umwana wanjye. 
Genesis24:7 Uhoraho Imana y’ijuru yankuye mu nzu ya data no mu gihugu cyanjye navukiyemo; yarambwiye kandi arandahira ati ’Iki gihugu nzakigabira abazagukomokaho’; kandi ni we uzohereza umumalayika we akujye imbere, kugira ngo ubonere umugore umwana wanjye iyo ngiyo." 
Genesis24:8 Niba kandi umugore adashatse kugukurikira, uzaba ubaye umwere ku ndahiro wangiriye. Ariko ntuzasubize umuhungu wanjye iyo ngiyo.»" 
Genesis24:9 Nuko wa mugaragu ashyira ikiganza cye mu nsi y’ikibero cya shebuja Abrahamu, maze arabimurahira." 
Genesis24:10 Umugaragu yenda ingamiya cumi mu za shebuja, afata ibyiza mu bintu shebuja yari atunze, aragenda. Nuko arahaguruka yerekeza mu ntara ya Aramu yo hagati y’inzuzi ebyiri, mu mugi wa Nahori." 
Genesis24:11 Abyagiza ingamiya hirya y’umugi, hafi y’iriba; ubwo bwari bugorobye, nk’igihe abagore basohoka mu ngo bajya kuvoma." 
Genesis24:12 Nuko arasenga, ati «Uhoraho, Mana ya databuja, mpa guhura n’uwo nshaka, wereke databuja Abrahamu ubuntu bwawe." 
Genesis24:13 Dore mpagaze hafi y’iriba kandi abakobwa b’ino bagiye kuza kuvoma. 
Genesis24:14 Umukobwa nza kubwira nti ’Cisha bugufi ikibindi cya we ninywere amazi’, na we akansubiza ati ’Cyo nywa, ndetse ndakuhirira n’ingamiya’, azabe ari we wageneye umugaragu wawe Izaki, maze ibyo bizamenyeshe ko wagaragarije databuja Abrahamu ubuntu bwawe.»" 
Genesis24:15 Akivuga ibyo, Rebeka aba asohotse mu mugi. Yari umukobwa wa Betuweli, mwene Milika muka Nahori murumuna wa Abrahamu. Nuko aza atwaye ikibindi ku rutugu." 
Genesis24:16 Uwo mukobwa akaba mwiza cyane, kandi yari akiri isugi, nta mugabo wari waramumenye. Amanuka mu iriba, yuzuza ikibindi arazamuka." 
Genesis24:17 Umugaragu yirukanka amusanga, aramubwira ati «Niba ubishaka, reka ninywere intama ku mazi yo mu kibindi cyawe.»" 
Genesis24:18 Umukobwa arasubiza ati «Cyo nywa, shobuja.» Maze ako kanya acisha bugufi ikibindi, amuha amazi yo kunywa." 
Genesis24:19 Amaze kumuha icyo anywa, aravuga ati «Ngiye kuvomera n’ingamiya zawe, na zo nzuhire kugeza ubwo zishira inyota.»" 
Genesis24:20 Aranguriza bwangu ikibindi mu kibumbiro, yongera kwirukankira ku iriba kugira ngo avome, maze avomera ingamiya zose." 
Genesis24:21 Nyamugabo yamurebaga yicecekeye, yibaza niba Uhoraho yamugejeje cyangwa se atamugejeje ku cyo yifuzaga." 
Genesis24:22 Igihe ingamiya zimaze kunywa, wa mugabo afata impeta ya zahabu y’uburemere bw’igice cy’isikeli, arayimwambika, naho ku maboko amwambika ibitare bya zahabu y’uburemere bw’amasikeli cumi." 
Genesis24:23 Nuko aramubaza ati «Uri umukobwa wa nde? Bimbwire ndabigusabye.» Arongera ati «Ese hari umwanya waboneka kwa so ngo tujye kurarayo?» 
Genesis24:24 Rebeka aramusubiza ati «Ndi umukobwa wa Betuweli, umuhungu Milika yabyariye Nahori.»" 
Genesis24:25 Ati «Iwacu hari isaso n’ubwatsi bwinshi, hari n’umwanya w’icumbi.»" 
Genesis24:26 Nuko umugabo arapfukama yubika umutwe ku butaka, aramya Uhoraho," 
Genesis24:27 avuga ati «Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, Imana ya databuja Abrahamu, We utamuhishe ineza n’ubuntu bwe: kuko Uhoraho yanyoboye inzira ijya ku bavandimwe ba databuja.»" 
Genesis24:28 Umukobwa yiruka ajya kubwira nyina ibyo yari amaze kubona. 
Genesis24:29 Rebeka yari afite musaza we akitwa Labani. Labani uwo arasohoka, yiruka bwangu, asanga wa mugabo ku iriba." 
Genesis24:30 Yari yabonye impeta n’ibitare mushiki we yari yambaye, amaze no kumva mushiki we Rebeka avuga uko uwo mugenzi yamuvugishije, niko kumusanganira ku iriba aho yari ahagaze iruhande rw’ingamiya ze." 
Genesis24:31 Aramubwira ati «Ngwino, muhire w’Uhoraho. Kuki waheze hanze, kandi inzu nayitunganije, hari n’ikiraro cy’ingamiya?»" 
Genesis24:32 Uwo mugabo aza mu rugo, ingamiya azikuraho imitwaro yazo. Baziha ubwatsi, baziha icyarire, naho we n’abari bamuherekeje babaha amazi yo koga ibirenge." 
Genesis24:33 Baramufungurira, ariko aranga ati «Simfungura ntaravuga icyo ngomba kuvuga.» Labani ati «Ngaho kivuge.»" 
Genesis24:34 Ati «Ndi umugaragu wa Abrahamu. 
Genesis24:35 Uhoraho yasendereje imigisha kuri databuja. Yamugize umuntu ukomeye cyane. Yamuhaye amatungo magufi n’amaremare, amuha feza na zahabu, amuha abagaragu n’abaja, amuha ingamiya n’indogobe." 
Genesis24:36 Na Sara, umugore wa databuja, igihe yari ageze mu zabukuru yamubyariye umuhugu, none yamuraze ibyo atunze byose." 
Genesis24:37 Databuja yandahiye iyi ndahiro ati ’Umwana wanjye ntuzamushakire umugore mu gihugu cy’Abakanahani dutuyemo.’ 
Genesis24:38 Ati ’Ahubwo uzajye mu muryango wanjye, mu nzu ya data, uzabe ari ho umumushakira.’" 
Genesis24:39 Nabwiye databuja nti ’Wenda uwo mugore ntazemera kunkurikira.’ 
Genesis24:40 Maze aransubiza ati ’Uhoraho mpora ngenda imbere azakoherereza umumalayika, azakugeza ku cyo ushaka: uzabonere umuhungu wanjye umugore wo mu muryango wanjye no mu nzu ya data." 
Genesis24:41 Numara kugera mu muryango wanjye, umuvumo wanjye ntuzaba ukikokamye. Nibanamukwima nabwo, uzaba ubaye umwere.’" 
Genesis24:42 Uyu munsi nageze ku iriba ndavuga nti ’Uhoraho, Mana ya databuja Abrahamu, niba urugendo ndimo warugize ruhire," 
Genesis24:43 dore ndi ku iriba, ngusabye ibi: umukobwa uza gusohoka aje kuvoma, nkaza kumubwira nti: Niba ubishaka reka ninywere utuzi two mu kibindi cyawe," 
Genesis24:44 maze akansubiza ati: Cyo nywa ubwawe, kandi ndavomera n’ingamiya zawe, azabe ari we mugore Uhoraho yageneye mwene databuja.’" 
Genesis24:45 Mbaye ntararangiza kwibwira ibyo, Rebeka aba arasohotse, atwaye ikibindi ku rutugu. Amanuka ajya ku iriba, maze aravoma. Ndamubwira nti ’Mpa icyo kunywa niba ubishaka.’" 
Genesis24:46 Ako kanya acisha bugufi ikibindi arambwira ati ’Cyo nywa, kandi nduhira n’ingamiya zawe.’ Nanyoye kandi yuhira n’ingamiya zanjye." 
Genesis24:47 Namubajije nti ’Uri umukobwa wa nde?’ Ati ’Ndi umukobwa wa Betuweli, umuhungu Milika yabyariye Nahori.’ Nuko mperako mwambika impeta ku zuru, mwambika n’ibitare ku maboko." 
Genesis24:48 Hanyuma ndapfukama ndamya Uhoraho, nubitse umutwe ku butaka, kandi nsingiza Uhoraho Imana ya databuja Abrahamu yanyoboye mu nzira kugira ngo mbonere umuhungu we umugeni, umukobwa wa murumuna wa databuja." 
Genesis24:49 None rero nimushaka kugirira databuja ubuntu n’ineza, ntimunderege, mumbwire. Nimutabyemera na bwo, mubimenyeshe, maze njye iburyo cyangwa se ibumoso.»" 
Genesis24:50 Labani na Betuweli barasubiza bati «Ibyo biturutse kuri Uhoraho, nta cyo twashobora kubikubwiraho, ari icyiza ari ikibi." 
Genesis24:51 Dore Rebeka ari imbere yawe, mujyane maze abe umugore w’umuhungu wa shobuja, nk’uko Uhoraho abivuze.»"
