Genesis24:52 Umugaragu wa Abrahamu yumvise ayo magambo yubika umutwe ku butaka, imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Genesis24:53 Hanyuma azana feza, azana zahabu n’imyenda, abiha Rebeka; aha na musaza we, na nyina, ibintu by’igiciro kinini." 
Genesis24:54 We n’abo bazanye bararya baranywa, bararara. Bukeye mu gitondo, bamaze kubyuka arababwira ati «Nimunsezerere, nsubire kwa databuja.»" 
Genesis24:55 Musaza w’umukobwa na nyina baramusubiza bati «Umukobwa nagume hano hamwe natwe iminsi mike, mbese nk’iminsi icumi, hanyuma azabone kugenda.»" 
Genesis24:56 Arabasubiza ati «Mwintinza kuko Uhoraho yampaye urugendo ruhire, nimundeke ngende nsubire kwa databuja.»" 
Genesis24:57 Bati «Duhamagare umukobwa noneho, tumubaze icyo atekereza.»" 
Genesis24:58 Nuko bahamagara Rebeka, baramubaza bati «Urashaka kujyana n’uyu mugabo?» Arabasubiza ati «Turajyana.»" 
Genesis24:59 Nuko bareka umwana wabo Rebeka aragenda, hamwe n’umuja wamureze, n’umugaragu wa Abrahamu n’abantu be." 
Genesis24:60 Rebeka bamuha umugisha baramubwira bati «Mushiki wacu, urabe umubyeyi w’ibihumbi n’agahumbagiza; urubyaro rwawe ruzigarurire amarembo y’abanzi rubahashye.»" 
Genesis24:61 Rebeka n’abaja be barahaguruka, burira ingamiya, bakurikira umugaragu wa Abrahamu. Nuko uwo mugabo afata Rebeka baragenda." 
Genesis24:62 Ku kagoroba, Izaki aza aturutse ku iriba rya Lahayi‐Royi. Icyo gihe yari atuye mu ntara ya Negevu." 
Genesis24:63 Nuko kuri uwo munsi mu kabwibwi, ajya gutembera mu gasozi; ngo yubure amaso, abona ingamiya ziraje." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka na we yubuye amaso, arabukwa Izaki, yururuka ku ngamiya." 
Genesis24:65 Abaza umugaragu wa Abrahamu, ati «Uriya mugabo uri ku musozi uje atugana ni nde?» Umugaragu ati «Ni databuja.» Ako kanya Rebeka yenda igitambaro cyo mu mutwe aritwikira." 
Genesis24:66 Umugaragu atekerereza Izaki ibyo yari yarakoze byose. 
Genesis24:67 Izaki yinjiza Rebeka mu ihema rye. Izaki arongora Rebeka, amubera umugore. Aramukundwakaza, na we amuhoza urupfu rwa nyina Sara." 
Genesis25:1 Abrahamu ashaka undi mugore witwaga Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Amubyarira Zimurani, Yokishani, Medani, Madiyani, Yishibaki na Shuwa." 
Genesis25:3 Yokishani abyara Sheba na Dedani. Bene Dedani rero ni Abashuru, Abaletushi, Abalewumi." 
Genesis25:4 Bene Madiyani ni Eyifa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida na Elida. Abo bose babyawe na Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahamu araga Izaki ibyo yari atunze byose. 
Genesis25:6 Ariko abana b’inshoreke na bo abagabira akiriho, hanyuma abohereza mu gihugu cy’iburasirazuba, kure ya Izaki." 
Genesis25:7 Dore rero umubare w’imyaka Abrahamu yarambye ku isi: ni ijana na mirongo irindwi n’itanu. 
Genesis25:8 Hanyuma Abrahamu arapfa. Yari ageze mu zabukuru asaza neza, asanga abakurambere be." 
Genesis25:9 Abahungu be, Izaki na Ismaheli bamushyingura muri bwa buvumo bw’i Makipela, buri mu murima wa Efuroni, mwene Sohari w’Umuheti, uwo murima ukaba ahareba i Mambure." 
Genesis25:10 Ni wo murima Abrahamu yari yaraguze na bene Heti. Ni ho bahambye Abrahamu n’umugore we Sara. 
Genesis25:11 Abrahamu amaze gupfa, Imana iha umugisha Izaki umuhungu we. Izaki yari atuye hafi y’iriba rya Lahayi‐Royi." 
Genesis25:12 Dore urubyaro rwa Ismaheli mwene Abrahamu, uwo Umunyamisirikazi Hagara, umuja wa Sara, yabyaranye na Abrahamu." 
Genesis25:13 Dore amazina ya bene Ismaheli, ukurikije ibisekuru byabo: Imfura ya Ismaheli ni Nebayoti, hagataho Kedari, Adibyeli, Mibusamu," 
Genesis25:14 Mishuma, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadadi, Tema, Yeturi, Nafishi na Kedima." 
Genesis25:16 Abo ni bo bene Ismaheli, ngayo amazina yabo, akurikije insisiro n’ingando zabo. Bari bafite abatware cumi na babiri nk’uko imiryango yabo yanganaga." 
Genesis25:17 Imyaka Ismaheli yaramye ni ijana na mirongo itatu n’irindwi, hanyuma arapfa, asanga abakurambere be." 
Genesis25:18 Abayismaheli batura kuva i Havila, kugeza i Shuru, ahateganye na Misiri na Ashuru. Bityo babona aho batura hatari muri bene Abrahamu bandi." 
Genesis25:19 Dore ibisekuru bya Izaki, mwene Abrahamu. Abrahamu yabyaye Izaki." 
Genesis25:20 Izaki yari amaze imyaka mirongo ine avutse, igihe ashatse Rebeka umukobwa wa Betuweli, Umwaramu wari utuye mu kibaya cya Aramu; akaba na mushiki wa Labani, Umwaramu." 
Genesis25:21 Izaki yambaza Uhoraho kuko umugore we yari ingumba. Uhoraho aramwumva, Rebeka asama inda." 
Genesis25:22 Abana bataravuka babyiganiraga mu nda ye; aravuga ati «Kuki ari jyewe ibi bibayeho?» Nuko ajya guhanuza Uhoraho. 
Genesis25:23 Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Inda yawe irimo amahanga abiri; mu bura bwawe hazasohoka amoko abiri. Ubwoko bumwe buzarusha ubundi amaboko; umukuru akazaba umugaragu w’umuto.» 
Genesis25:24 Igihe cye cyo kubyara kigeze, asanga koko ko yari atwite babiri." 
Genesis25:25 Gakuru avuka ari ikigina, afite ubwoya umubiri wose nk’uruhu rw’igikoko, ni ko kumwita Ezawu (ari byo kuvuga Cyoya)." 
Genesis25:26 Hakurikiraho Gatoya, aza afashe agatsinsino ka Ezawu. Bamwita Yakobo. Bavutse, ise Izaki afite imyaka mirongo itandatu." 
Genesis25:27 Abahungu barakura. Ezawu aba umuhigi wabuhiriye, akiruka imisozi. Yakobo yari umuntu utuje, akigumira mu mahema." 
Genesis25:28 Izaki yakundaga Ezawu, kuko umuhigo we wamuryoheraga; Rebeka we akikundira Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Umunsi umwe Ezawu ahiguka ananiwe cyane, nuko asanga Yakobo atetse ikinyiga." 
Genesis25:30 Ezawu abwira Yakobo, ati «Mpa ndye kuri icyo kinyiga cy’ikigina, kuko ndembye.» Ni cyo cyatumye bamwita Edomu (ari byo kuvuga ikigina)." 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo ati «Keretse tukiguze ubutware bwawe uhabwa no kuba imfura ya data!» 
Genesis25:32 Ezawu ati «Ubundi se ko ngiye gupfa, ubutware bumariye iki?»" 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo aramubwira ati «Ngaho birahire nonaha!» Ezawu ahera ko arabimurahira, agura na Yakobo ubutware bwe." 
Genesis25:34 Nuko Yakobo aha Ezawu umugati amuha n’ikinyiga cy’inkori. Ezawu ararya aranywa, arahaguruka aragenda. Nguko uko Ezawu yasuzuguye ubutware bwe, yakeshaga kuba ari we mfura ya se." 
Genesis26:1 Mu gihugu hatera indi nzara, itari ya yindi yateraga Abrahamu akiriho. Izaki ahungira i Gerari kwa Abimeleki, umwami w’Abafilisiti." 
Genesis26:2 Uhoraho aramubonekera, aramubwira ati «Ntumanuke ngo ujye mu Misiri, ahubwo uzature mu gihugu nzakubwira." 
Genesis26:3 Uzagume muri icyo gihugu, nzaba ndi kumwe nawe kandi nguhe umugisha. Kuko wowe n’urubyaro rwawe nzabaha ibi bihugu byose, kandi nkazakomeza indahiro narahiriye so Abrahamu." 
Genesis26:4 Nzagwiza urubyaro rwawe, rungane n’inyenyeri zo mu kirere, kandi nzabaha ibi bihugu byose. Imiryango yose y’isi izabaherwamo umugisha." 
Genesis26:5 Nzabigirira Abrahamu, kuko yanyumviye, akita ku mabwiriza n’amategeko yanjye, ku matangazo n’amateka yanjye.»" 
Genesis26:6 Izaki ni ko gutura i Gerari. 
Genesis26:7 Abantu b’aho baza kumubaza ibyerekeye umugore we. Arabasubiza ati «Ni mushiki wanjye», atinya kuvuga ko ari umugore we. Kuko yari afite ubwoba bwo kwicwa n’abantu b’aho, bamuhora Rebeka wari mwiza cyane mu maso." 
Genesis26:8 Amazeyo igihe kirekire, Abimeleki, umwami w’Abafilisiti, arungurukira mu idirishya, abona Izaki akina n’umugore we, baseka." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleki ahamagaza Izaki, aramubwira ati «Biragaragara ko ari umugore wawe. Ni kuki rero wavuze uti ’Ni mushiki wanjye’?» Izaki ati «Ni uko nibwiraga nti be kunyica bamumpora.»" 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki ati «Ibyo watugize ni ibiki? Habuze gato ngo hagire umwe muri twe uryamana n’umugore wawe. Ubwo rero uba waraduteye gucumura.» 
Genesis26:11 Abimeleki aca iteka mu bantu bose ati «Uzakora kuri uriya mugabo cyangwa se ku mugore we, azapfa nta kabuza.»" 
Genesis26:12 Izaki abiba imbuto muri icyo gihugu, uwo mwaka yeza ibingana n’incuro ijana z’ibyo yabibye. Uhoraho amuha umugisha." 
Genesis26:13 Uwo mugabo aba igikomerezwa, agenda arushaho gukira, bigeza ku bukungu bw’akarenga." 
Genesis26:14 Yari afite imikumbi n’amashyo, n’abagaragu benshi. Abafilisiti bagirira Izaki ishyari;" 
Genesis26:15 nuko baza gusiba amariba yose abagaragu ba se bari barafukuye Abrahamu akiriho, bayuzuzamo ibitaka." 
Genesis26:16 Abimeleki abwira Izaki ati «Genda tuvire aha, kuko usigaye uturusha amaboko cyane.»" 
Genesis26:17 Izaki arahava, ashinga amahema ye mu kibaya cy’i Gerari, aturayo." 
Genesis26:18 Asibuza amariba bari barafukuye se Abrahamu akiriho, kuko Abafilisiti bari barayasibye Abrahamu amaze gupfa. Ayita amazina se yayise." 
Genesis26:19 Abagaragu ba Izaki bafukura muri icyo kibaya, bahasanga iriba ry’amazi adudubiza." 
Genesis26:20 Abashumba b’i Gerari batonganira ayo mazi n’abashumba ba Izaki, bavuga bati «Ni ayacu.» Iryo riba Izaki aryita Eseki (ari byo kuvuga ngo ’Impaka’.)" 
Genesis26:21 Bongera gufukura irindi riba, na ryo bararitonganira. Aryita Sitina (ari byo kuvuga ngo ’Inzangano’.)" 
Genesis26:22 Avayo, afukuza irindi riba; ryo ntibaritonganira. Aryita Rehovoti (bigasobanura ’ahagutse’), kuko yavugaga ati «Noneho Uhoraho adushyize ahagutse, kandi twasaruye imbuto zo muri iki gihugu.»" 
Genesis26:23 Avayo, arazamuka ajya i Berisheba." 
Genesis26:24 Uhoraho amubonekera iryo joro, aramubwira ati «Ndi Imana ya so Abrahamu; witinya kuko ndi kumwe nawe. Nzaguha umugisha, ngwize urubyaro rwawe, ngiriye umugaragu wanjye Abrahamu.»" 
Genesis26:25 Izaki yubakayo urutambiro, ahambariza izina ry’Uhoraho, ahashinga ihema rye, abagaragu be na bo bahafukura iriba." 
Genesis26:26 Abimeleki aza kumusanga, aturuka i Gerari, azanye na Ahuzati umujyanama we, na Pikoli umutware w’ingabo ze." 
Genesis26:27 Izaki arababaza ati «Ni iki kibazanye hano kandi munyanga, mukaba mwaranyirukanye?»" 
Genesis26:28 Baramusubiza bati «Twabonye neza ko Uhoraho muri kumwe, turibwira tuti ’Reka tugirane amasezerano, ashingiye ku ndahiro!’" 
Genesis26:29 Ngaho rahira ko utazatugirira nabi nk’uko natwe tutayikugiriye; ahubwo twagufashe neza, tugusezerera amahoro. None Uhoraho akaba yaraguhaye umugisha.»" 
Genesis26:30 Nuko Izaki abakorera umunsi mukuru; bararya, baranywa." 
Genesis26:31 Mu gitondo cya kare barabyuka, bagirana amasezerano; hanyuma Izaki arabasezerera, bava iwe amahoro." 
Genesis26:32 Uwo munsi nyine, abagaragu ba Izaki baza kumumenyesha iby’iriba bari bafukuye, bati «Twabonye amazi.»" 
Genesis26:33 Iriba ni ko kuryita Sheba, n’umugi ririmo Berisheba (ari byo kuvuga ’iriba ry’indahiro’), wararyitiriwe kugeza na n’ubu." 
Genesis26:34 Ezawu amaze imyaka mirongo ine, arongora Yudita umukobwa wa Beri w’Umuheti, arongora na Basemata mwene Eloni w’Umuheti na we." 
Genesis26:35 Abo bagore babuza amahoro Izaki na Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Izaki ageze mu zabukuru, amaso ye arahuma ntiyaba akibona. Nuko ni ko guhamagara Ezawu, umuhungu we w’imfura, aramubwira ati «Mwana wanjye!» Undi ati «Ndi hano.»" 
Genesis27:2 Izaki ati «Dore ndashaje, sinzi umunsi nzapfiraho." 
Genesis27:3 None fata intwaro zawe, umutana n’umuheto wawe, ujye mu ishyamba, unyicireyo inyamaswa y’umuhigo." 
Genesis27:4 Hanyuma uyintegurire uko mbikunda, unzanire ndye, maze nguhe umugisha ntarapfa.»" 
Genesis27:5 Rebeka yari ateze amatwi Izaki aganira na Ezawu umuhungu we. Nuko Ezawu ajya mu ishyamba kwicayo inyamaswa y’umuhigo ngo awuzanire se. 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka abwira umuhungu we Yakobo, ati «Numvise so aganira na Ezawu umuvandimwe wawe amubwira ati" 
Genesis27:7 ’Nzanira inyama y’umuhigo, untegurire ndye, mbone kuguha umugisha imbere y’Uhoraho ntarapfa.’" 
Genesis27:8 None rero, mwana wanjye, tega amatwi, maze ugenze uko ngutegeka:" 
Genesis27:9 genda ujye mu matungo, unzanire abana b’ihene babiri, kugira ngo ntegurire so ibyo kurya uko abikunda." 
Genesis27:10 Uraza kubishyira so, afungure, maze aguhe umugisha atarapfa.»" 
Genesis27:11 Yakobo asubiza nyina Rebeka, ati «Ezawu mwene data afite ibyoya ku mubiri wose, naho jye nta byo mfite." 
Genesis27:12 None data yankorakora agasanga mubeshya, naba nikururiye umuvumo aho guhabwa umugisha.»" 
Genesis27:13 Nyina aramubwira ati «Nakuvuma, bimpame ari jye, mwana wanjye. Nyumva gusa, maze ugende unzanire icyo nkubwiye.»" 
Genesis27:14 Nuko Yakobo aragenda, azanira nyina ibyo yari yamutumye. Nyina abiteguramo ibyo kurya uko Izaki yabikundaga." 
Genesis27:15 Hanyuma Rebeka yenda umwambaro mwiza cyane w’umuhungu we mukuru Ezawu yari abitse mu nzu, awambika umuhungu we muto Yakobo." 
Genesis27:16 Naho impu za ba bana b’ihene, azimwambika ku maboko no mu ijosi, ahatari ubwoya." 
Genesis27:17 Nuko ahereza Yakobo umuhungu we ibiryo n’umugati yari yateguye. 
Genesis27:18 Yakobo yinjira kwa se, aramubwira ati «Dawe!» Undi ati «Ye! Uri nde se, mwana wanjye?»" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo asubiza se, ati «Ndi Ezawu, umwana wawe w’imfura. Nakoze uko wambwiye. Eguka, wicare, urye inyama y’umuhigo wanjye, maze umpe umugisha wawe.»" 
Genesis27:20 Izaki aramubwira ati «Mbega ngo uraronka vuba, mwana wanjye!» Undi ati «Ni uko Uhoraho Imana yawe yampaye kuronka.»" 
Genesis27:21 Izaki abwira Yakobo, ati «Igira hino ngukoreho, mwana wanjye, numve niba uri Ezawu umwana wanjye, cyangwa se niba utari we.»" 
Genesis27:22 Yakobo yegera se Izaki, nuko se aramukorakora, aravuga ati «Ijwi ni irya Yakobo, ariko amaboko ni aya Ezawu.»" 
Genesis27:23 Ntiyamumenya, kuko amaboko ye yari yuzuye ibyoya nk’amaboko ya mwene nyina Ezawu. Nuko Izaki amuha umugisha." 
Genesis27:24 Aramubaza ati «Ese koko ni wowe umwana wanjye Ezawu?» Undi ati «Ni jye.» 
Genesis27:25 Ati «Ngaho, mwana wanjye, mpereza ndye ku muhigo wawe maze nguhe umugisha wanjye.» Aramuhereza, ararya, hanyuma amuzanira na divayi, aranywa." 
Genesis27:26 Nuko umubyeyi we Izaki aramubwira ati «Igira hino umpobere, mwana wanjye.»" 
Genesis27:27 Yakobo aramwegera, aramuhobera. Izaki yumva impumuro y’imyambaro ye, amuha umugisha agira ati «Impumuro y’umuhungu wanjye ni nk’impumuro y’umurima Uhoraho yahaye umugisha." 
Genesis27:28 Imana niguhe urume rumanuka ku ijuru, iguhe n’uburumbuke bw’ubutaka, ingano na divayi bigwire bisendere!" 
Genesis27:29 Imiryango izakugaragire n’amahanga azagupfukamire! Ube umutware wa bene so, na bene nyoko bagupfukamire! Hazavumwe uzakuvuma, hagire umugisha uzakuvuga neza!»" 
Genesis27:30 Izaki akirangiza guha Yakobo umugisha, na Yakobo agisohoka kwa se, Ezawu mukuru we aba aratungutse, avuye guhiga." 
Genesis27:31 Na we ategura ibyo kurya, abizanira se. Abwira se ati «Umubyeyi niyeguke, arye ku muhigo w’umwana we, maze ampe umugisha.»" 
Genesis27:32 Se Izaki aramubaza ati «Uri nde?» Arasubiza ati «Ni jye, imfura yawe Ezawu.»" 
Genesis27:33 Izaki ahinda umushyitsi aratengurwa, aravuga ati «Ni nde wahize, akanzanira inyama y’umuhigo? Nariye kuri byose, utaraza. Namuhaye umugisha, kandi ni we uzagira umugisha.»" 
Genesis27:34 Ezawu ngo yumve ayo magambo ya se, acura imiborogo yuzuye intimba, hanyuma abwira se ati «Dawe, nanjye mpa umugisha.»" 
Genesis27:35 Se ati «Murumuna wawe yakoresheje uburiganya, atwara umugisha wawe.»" 
Genesis27:36 Undi ati «Ese bamwitiye Yakobo kugira ngo azanyimure kabiri kose? Yantwaye ubutware, none antwaye n’umugisha!» Yungamo ati «Nta mugisha wansigiye?»" 
Genesis27:37 Izaki abwira Ezawu, ati «Namugize umutware wawe, bene se bose nabagize abagaragu be; namuhaye umugisha wo kweza ingano no kugira divayi nyinshi. Nkugirire nte se, mwana wanjye?»" 
Genesis27:38 Ezawu abwira se, ati «Dawe, ugira umugisha umwe gusa? Nanjye mpa umugisha, dawe!» Nuko atera hejuru ararira." 
Genesis27:39 Izaki se aramubwira ati «Uzatura kure y’ubutaka burumbuka, na kure y’urume rumanuka mu ijuru." 
Genesis27:40 Uzatungwa n’inkota yawe. Murumuna wawe uzamugaragira, ariko uzigobotora, ujugunye umuzigo azaba yashyize ku ntugu zawe.»" 
Genesis27:41 Guhera ubwo, Ezawu azira Yakobo, amuhora umugisha se yari yamuhaye. Mu mutima yigira inama, ati «Iminsi yo kwiraburira data iregereje; nyuma y’aho nzica Yakobo murumuna wanjye!»" 
Genesis27:42 Baza kubwira Rebeka amagambo ya Ezawu, umwana we w’imfura. Nuko atumiza Yakobo, aramubwira ati «Dore Ezawu mukuru wawe agiye kwihorera, akwice." 
Genesis27:43 None tega amatwi, wumve icyo nkubwira. Haguruka, uhungire kwa musaza wanjye Labani utuye i Harani." 
Genesis27:44 Uzabe uhamye iwe iminsi mike, kugeza igihe uburakari bwa mukuru wawe buzashirira." 
Genesis27:45 Maze uburakari bwe nibucurama, akibagirwa ibyo wamugiriye, nzakoherereza intumwa ikugarura. Ni iki cyatuma mbapfusha mwembi umunsi umwe?»" 
Genesis27:46 Rebeka abwira Izaki ati «Ndarambiwe, kubaho bimvuye ku nzoka, kubera bariya Bahetikazi Ezawu yarongoye! Yakobo na we aramutse arongoye undi nk’aba mu bakobwa b’iki gihugu, kubaho byaba bimariye iki?»" 
Genesis28:1 Nuko Izaki ahamagaza Yakobo, amuha umugisha, amutegeka amubwira ati «Ntuzashake umugore mu bakobwa b’i Kanahani." 
Genesis28:2 Haguruka ugende ujye mu kibaya cya Aramu, kwa sokuru Betuweli; uzahishakire umugore mu bakobwa ba Labani, nyokorome." 
Genesis28:3 Imana Nyir’ububasha niguhe umugisha, iguhe kororoka no kugwira, uzabe ikoraniro ry’imiryango!" 
Genesis28:4 Wowe n’urubyaro rwawe, izabahe umugisha yahaye Abrahamu, kugira ngo uzatunge igihugu wimukiyemo, igihugu Imana yahaye Abrahamu!»" 
Genesis28:5 Nuko Izaki yohereza Yakobo, aragenda ajya mu kibaya cya Aramu kwa Labani, mwene Betuweli w’Umwaramu, akaba musaza wa Rebeka, nyina wa Yakobo na Ezawu." 
Genesis28:6 Ezawu azirikana uko Izaki yahaye umuhugu we Yakobo umugisha, akamutegeka kudashaka umugore mu bakobwa b’i Kanahani, akanamwohereza mu kibaya cya Aramu gushakayo umugore." 
Genesis28:7 Abonye kandi ko Yakobo yumviye se na nyina, akigira mu kibaya cya Aramu," 
Genesis28:8 noneho Ezawu amenya atyo ko se Izaki atishimiraga abakobwa b’i Kanahani. 
Genesis28:9 Ni bwo asanze Ismaheli ngo acyure Mahalata, umukobwa wa Ismaheli mwene Abrahamu. Mahalata uwo yari mwene se wa Nebayoti. Nuko Ezawu amuharika abagore bandi yari atunze." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo rero ava i Berisheba agana i Harani. 
Genesis28:11 Aza kugera ahantu araharara, kuko izuba ryari rimaze kurenga. Yenda ibuye ry’aho hantu, araryisegura, maze araryama." 
Genesis28:12 Aza kurota abona urwego rushinze ku isi rukagera ku ijuru, abamalayika b’Imana barumanuka, bakaruzamuka." 
Genesis28:13 Nuko abona nguyu Uhoraho amuhagaze iruhande, amubwira ati «Ndi Uhoraho, Imana ya so Abrahamu, Imana ya Izaki. Ubutaka uryamyeho nzabuguha, mbuhe n’urubyaro rwawe." 
Genesis28:14 Abazagukomokaho bazangana n’umukungugu wo ku isi, bazisanzurira mu burasirazuba no mu burengerazuba, mu majyepfo no mu majyaruguru. Amoko yose y’isi azaherwa umugisha muri wowe no mu rubyaro rwawe." 
Genesis28:15 Dore, ndi kumwe nawe; nzakurinda aho uzajya hose, kandi nzakugarura muri iki gihugu. Sinzagutererana, kugeza ubwo nzaba nujuje ibyo nakubwiye byose.»" 
Genesis28:16 Yakobo ava mu bitotsi, ariyamirira, ati «Mu by’ukuri Uhoraho ari aha hantu, ariko jye nkaba ntari mbizi!»" 
Genesis28:17 Ubwoba buramutaha; ati «Mbega aha hantu ko hateye ubwoba! Aha hantu si ikindi kitari Inzu y’Imana, aha hantu ni ryo rembo ry’ijuru!»" 
Genesis28:18 Nuko Yakobo arazinduka, yenda rya buye yari yiseguye, araryegura ararishinga, arisukaho amavuta ku isonga." 
Genesis28:19 Aho hantu ahita Beteli (ari byo kuvuga ’Inzu y’Imana’), ariko mbere uwo mugi witwaga Luzi." 
Genesis28:20 Nuko Yakobo arahiga ati «Imana niba turi kumwe ikandinda muri uru rugendo ndimo, nimpa ifunguro ikampa n’umwambaro," 
Genesis28:21 ninsubiza amahoro kwa data, Uhoraho ni we uzambera Imana koko." 
Genesis28:22 Iri buye nshinze rizaba inzu y’Imana, kandi mu byo uzampa byose nzajya nkuraho kimwe cya cumi nkiguture.»" 
Genesis29:1 Yakobo arahaguruka, yerekeza mu gihugu cya Kedemu iburasirazuba." 
Genesis29:2 Aragenda aza kugera ku iriba riri mu rwuri. Hafi yaryo hari habyagiye imikumbi itatu y’intama, kuko kuri iryo riba ari ho buhiraga amatungo. Ibuye rinini ryatwikiraga iryo riba." 
Genesis29:3 Iyo amatungo yose yamaraga kuhateranira, basunikaga ibuye, bagapfundura iriba, bakayuhira, hanyuma bagasubiza ibuye mu mwanya waryo, ku rugara rw’iriba." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobo arababaza ati «Bavandimwe, muri aba hehe?» Bati «Turi abo kuri Harani.»" 
Genesis29:5 Ati «Mbese Labani wa Nahori muramuzi?» Bati «Turamuzi.» 
Genesis29:6 Ati «Araho?» Baramusubiza bati «Araho, ndetse dore n’umukobwa we Rasheli araje azanye amatungo.»" 
Genesis29:7 Yakobo arababwira ati «Haracyari ku manywa y’ihangu. Igihe cyo gukoranya amatungo ntikiragera, nimuyuhire, mugende muyaragire.»" 
Genesis29:8 Baramusubiza bati «Nta bwo tubishobora, amatungo yose ataraterana, ngo bakureho ibuye ritwikiriye iriba. Ubwo ni bwo tuza kuhira.»" 
Genesis29:9 Akivugana na bo, Rasheli aba arahageze ashoreye intama za se, kuko yari umushumba." 
Genesis29:10 Yakobo abonye Rasheli, umukobwa wa Labani ari we nyirarume, abonye n’intama za Labani nyirarume, ako kanya ahirika rya buye ritwikiriye iriba, yuhira intama za Labani, nyirarume." 
Genesis29:11 Hanyuma Yakobo ahobera Rasheli, araturika ararira." 
Genesis29:12 Yakobo abwira Rasheli ko ari uwo mu muryango wa se, akaba umuhungu wa Rebeka. Rasheli yiruka ajya kubimenyesha se." 
Genesis29:13 Labani yumvise yuko ari Yakobo, umuhungu wa mushiki we uje, ni ko kumusanganira n'ingoga. Nuko aramuhobera aramusoma, amwinjiza iwe. Yakobo atekerereza Labani ibyabaye byose." 
Genesis29:14 Labani aramubwira ati «Ni ukuri, uri igufwa ryanjye n’umubiri wanjye.» Nuko Yakobo amara kwa Labani ukwezi kose." 
Genesis29:15 Labani abwira Yakobo ati «Ese uzankorera ku buntu ngo ni iki uri umuvandimwe wanjye? Mbwira rwose icyo nzajya nguhemba.» 
Genesis29:16 Labani akaba yari afite abakobwa babiri: umukuru akitwa Leya, umuto akitwa Rasheli." 
Genesis29:17 Leya yari afite mu maso habi, naho Rasheli akaba yari mwiza wese, akagira mu maso heza." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo yikundiraga Rasheli. Abwira Labani ati «Nzagukorera imyaka irindwi, maze uzampe Rasheli umukobwa wawe muto.»" 
Genesis29:19 Labani ati «Koko ikiruta ni uko namukwihera aho kumuha undi: igumire iwanjye.» 
Genesis29:20 Nuko Yakobo akorera Labani imyaka irindwi yose, ashaka Rasheli. Ariko iyo myaka imubera nk’iminsi mike, kuko yamukundaga." 
Genesis29:21 Nyuma Yakobo abwira Labani ati «Nshyingira, kuko iminsi nagombaga kurangiza yuzuye ndashaka kubana n’umugore wanjye.»" 
Genesis29:22 Labani atumiza abantu bose b’aho, arabakoranya, bagira umunsi mukuru ukomeye wo gusangira." 
Genesis29:23 Bugorobye, afata umukobwa we Leya, amujyana kwa Yakobo, ngo amurongore." 
Genesis29:24 Labani aha umukobwa we Leya umwe mu baja be witwaga Zilipa, ngo ajye amukorera." 
Genesis29:25 Ngo bucye, Yakobo atangazwa n’uko ari Leya bari bamuhaye! Ni ko kubwira Labani ati «Wangenjeje ute? Sinagukoreye ngo umpe Rasheli? Wanshukiye iki?»" 
Genesis29:26 Labani aramusubiza ati «Mu muco wacu, ntibashyingira umukobwa muto mbere ya mukuru we." 
Genesis29:27 Banza urangize icyumweru cy’ubukwe hamwe na Leya, hanyuma n’undi tuzamuguhera indi myaka irindwi uzankorera.»" 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo abigenza atyo. Arangiza icyumweru cy’ubukwe hamwe na Leya, nuko Labani amushyingira na Rasheli, umukobwa we." 
Genesis29:29 Labani aha umukobwa we Rasheli umwe mu baja be, witwaga Biliha, ngo ajye amukorera." 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo arongora Rasheli, ndetse yamukundaga kuruta Leya. Arongera akorera Labani indi myaka irindwi." 
Genesis29:31 Uhoraho abonye ko Leya yabaye intabwa, amuha kubyara, naho Rasheli akomeza kuba ingumba." 
Genesis29:32 Leya asama inda, abyara umwana w’umuhungu amwita Rubeni (bisobanura ngo ’Uhoraho yabonye agahinda kanjye’), ati «Ubu noneho umugabo wanjye agiye kunkunda.»" 
Genesis29:33 Ashubijeho abyara undi muhungu. Ati «Uhoraho yumvise ko ntakunzwe, none ampaye n’uyu nguyu.» Amwita Simewoni (bisobanura ngo ’Uhoraho yaranyumvise.’)" 
Genesis29:34 Yongera gusama, abyara na none umuhungu. Aravuga ati «Noneho umugabo wanjye azanyegukira, kuko mubyariye abahungu batatu.» Ni yo mpamvu yamwise Levi (bisobanura ngo ’Azanyegukira’.)" 
Genesis29:35 Arongera asama indi nda, abyara umwana w’umuhungu. Aravuga ati «Ubu ndasingiza Uhoraho!» Ni cyo cyatumye amwita Yuda (bisobanura ngo ’Nzasingiza’.) Nuko aracura." 
Genesis30:1 Rasheli abonye ko atabyariye Yakobo, agirira mukuru we ishyari; abwira Yakobo ati «Mpa kubyara, nibyanga mpfe!»" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobo arakarira Rasheli, aramubwira ati «Mbese ndi mu cyimbo cy’Imana yazibye inda yawe?»" 
Genesis30:3 Rasheli ati «Dore umuja wanjye Biliha; musange azambyarire ku bibero, nanjye ngire urubyaro.»" 
Genesis30:4 Amuha Biliha, umuja we, ho umugore. Yakobo aramutunga." 
Genesis30:5 Biliha asama inda, abyarira Yakobo umwana w’umuhungu." 
Genesis30:6 Rasheli ariyamira ati «Imana yanciriye urubanza neza, kandi yumvise ijwi ryanjye; none impaye umwana!» Ni cyo cyatumye amwita Dani (bisobanura ngo ’Ni Yo Mucamanza wanjye’.)" 
Genesis30:7 Biliha, umuja wa Rasheli, nanone asama inda, abyara umwana w’umuhungu." 
Genesis30:8 Rasheli ati «Narwanye intambara ikomeye na mwene data, none ndatsinze!» Nuko amwita Nefutali (bisobanura ngo «Nararwanye».)" 
Genesis30:9 Leya abonye ko atakibyara, umuja we Zilipa amwegurira Yakobo." 
Genesis30:10 Zilipa, umuja wa Leya, abyarira Yakobo umwana w’umuhungu." 
Genesis30:11 Leya ariyamira ati «Mbega umugisha!» Umwana amwita Gadi (bisobanura ngo ’Umugisha’.) 
Genesis30:12 Zilipa, umuja wa Leya, nanone abyarira Yakobo umwana w’umuhungu." 
Genesis30:13 Leya ati «Ngize amahirwe! Kandi abakobwa bose bazanyita umuhire.» Umwana amwita Asheri (bisobanura ngo ’Muhire’.) 
Genesis30:14 Igihe cy’isarura ry’ingano Rubeni ajya mu mirima, abona imbuto zitwa ’iz’urukundo’, azizanira nyina Leya. Rasheli abwira Leya ati «Ndakwinginze, mpa izo mbuto z’urukundo umuhungu wawe yakuzaniye.»" 
Genesis30:15 Leya aramusubiza ati «Ese ntibyaguhagije kuba warantwaye umugabo, none urashaka no kuntwara n’imbuto z’urukundo nazaniwe n’umwana wanjye?» Rasheli aravuga ati «Noneho iri joro murarane! Bibe igihembo cy’imbuto z’urukundo umwana wawe yazanye.»" 
Genesis30:16 Nimugoroba Yakobo araza, avuye mu mirima. Leya aramusanganira ati «Iri joro uragomba kundaza; kuko ari ko nabyumvikanyeho na murumuna wanjye watwaye imbuto z’urukundo nazaniwe n’umwana wanjye.» Nuko Yakobo ararana na Leya iryo joro." 
Genesis30:17 Imana yumva Leya, arasama, abyara umwana w’umuhungu wa gatanu." 
Genesis30:18 Leya ariyamira ati «Imana yampaye ibihembo byanjye, kuko umugabo wanjye namuhaye umuja wanjye.» Umwana amwita Isakari (bisobanura ngo ’Igihembo’.)" 
Genesis30:19 Leya arongera asama inda, abyara undi mwana w’umuhungu wa gatandatu." 
Genesis30:20 Ariyamira ati «Imana ingabiye neza! Noneho umugabo wanjye azanyubaha, kuko mubyariye abahungu batandatu.» Umwana amwita Zabuloni (bisobanura ngo ’Azanyubaha’.)" 
Genesis30:21 Hanyuma Leya abyara umwana w’umukobwa, amwita Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Imana iza kwibuka Rasheli; Imana iramwumva, na we imuha kubyara." 
Genesis30:23 Asama inda, abyara umwana w’umuhungu. Ariyamirira ati «Imana inkijije ikimwaro!»" 
Genesis30:24 Umwana amwita Yozefu (bisobanura ngo ’Niyongere’), agira ati «Imana irakanyongereraho undi mwana w’umuhungu!»" 
Genesis30:25 Nuko Rasheli amaze kubyara Yozefu, Yakobo abwira Labani ati «Nsezerera ntahe, njye mu gihugu cyacu." 
Genesis30:26 Mpa abana banjye n’abagore banjye, kuko nababonye ngukoreye, maze nigendere. Uzi neza imirimo yose narangirije iwawe.»" 
Genesis30:27 Labani aramubwira ati «Ubonye nagize ubutoni mu maso yawe!... Nahishuriwe ko Imana yampaye umugisha ku mpamvu yawe.» 
Genesis30:28 Yungamo ati «Mbwira igihembo wifuza nzakiguhe.» 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo ati «Uzi uko nagukoreye n’uko amatungo yawe yabaye meza nyaragira. 
Genesis30:30 Kuko ayo wari ufite yari make ntaraza, none akaba yarororotse cyane. Uhoraho yaguhaye umugisha. Ubu se nzatangira ryari gukorera urugo rwanjye?»" 
Genesis30:31 Labani ati «Nguhe iki?» Yakobo aramusubiza ati «Nta cyo! Ariko nungenzereza uko ngiye kukubwira, nzongera nkuragirire amatungo." 
Genesis30:32 Uyu munsi ndanyura mu matungo yawe yose, nkuremo intama z’utugondo n’iz’amatobo zose zishobora kubyara: ni zo zizaba igihembo cyanjye. No ku ihene nzabigenza ntyo." 
Genesis30:33 Ejo nuza kureba igihembo cyanjye, izitazaba utugondo, cyangwa amatobo, uzazite inyibano; nuzisangamo nzaba ndi igisambo.»" 
Genesis30:34 Labani ati «Nemeye ko bizaba bityo.» 
Genesis30:35 Uwo munsi nyine, Labani arobanura mu bushyo bwe ihene n’intama z’ibihuga, z’utugondo, n’iz’amatobo, yaba amapfizi cyangwa inyagazi zishobora kubyara. Nuko zose azishinga abahungu be," 
Genesis30:36 abategeka kuzijyana kure ya Yakobo nk’urugendo rw’iminsi itatu. Yakobo we yaragiraga amatungo yasigaye mu bushyo bwa Labani. 
Genesis30:37 Nuko Yakobo yenda udushami tubisi tw’ibiti by’amoko atatu, akuraho utugozi tw’igishishwa, ku buryo haboneka imirongo yera." 
Genesis30:38 Hanyuma twa dushami adushyira imbere y’ibibumbiro, aho amatungo ashokera, ngo intama zitubone. Zaza kunywa, zikarinda." 
Genesis30:39 Amapfizi n’inyagazi zakwimanyiriza imbere y’utwo dushami, bigatuma inyagazi zibyara utwana tw’ibihuga, tw’utugondo cyangwa tw’amatobo." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobo akazirobanura. Akerekeza intama ku dushami dufite imirongo yera; nuko zamara kubyara, akibonera atyo umukumbi we bwite, ntawuvange n’amatungo ya Labani." 
Genesis30:41 Uko amatungo y’amajigija yarindaga, ni ko Yakobo yashyiraga udushami aho ashokera, kugira ngo yimanyirize imbere y’utwo dushami." 
Genesis30:42 Ariko yaba mabi ntadushyireho, bigatuma amabi aba aya Labani, ameza akaba aya Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Uwo mugabo agwiza amatungo cyane, agwiza abaja, abagaragu, ingamiya n’indogobe." 
Genesis31:1 Yakobo aza kumenya ko abahungu ba Labani binubaga, bavuga ngo «Yakobo yatwaye ibya data byose, umutungo wa data ni wo wamukungahaje!»" 
Genesis31:2 Yakobo areba Labani, asanga batakimeranye neza nka mbere." 
Genesis31:3 Uhoraho abwira Yakobo ati «Subira mu gihugu cya basokuru, mu gihugu cyanyu. Nzaba ndi kumwe nawe.»" 
Genesis31:4 Yakobo ahamagaza Rasheli na Leya ku gasozi, aho yaragiraga." 
Genesis31:5 Arababwira ati «So ndamureba, ngasanga atakindeba nka mbere, ariko Imana ya data yamye iri kumwe nanjye." 
Genesis31:6 Naho mwebwe muzi neza ukuntu nakoreye so n’imbaraga zanjye zose. 
Genesis31:7 Ariko so yagiye ampenda ubwenge, ahindura ibihembo byanjye byose incuro cumi. Nyamara Imana ntiyamukundiye kugira icyo antwara." 
Genesis31:8 Yarambwiraga ati ’Iz’ubugondo zose ni zo zawe’, umukumbi wose ukabyara ubugondo. Yambwira ati ’Iz’ibihuga ni zo zawe’, umukumbi wose ukabyara ibihuga." 
Genesis31:9 Uko ni ko Imana yatse so amatungo ikayanyihera. 
Genesis31:10 Igihe umukumbi wose warindaga, nubuye amaso ndota, mbona amapfizi y’ibihuga, n’ay’ubugondo, n’ay’amatobo yimije inyagazi." 
Genesis31:11 Malayika w’Imana ampamagarira mu nzozi ati ’Yakobo’. Nditaba. 
Genesis31:12 Arambwira ati ’Ubura amaso, urebe aya mapfizi yose y’ibihuga, n’ay’ubugondo, n’ay’amatobo, yimije inyagazi, kuko nabonye ibyo Labani akugirira." 
Genesis31:13 Ndi Imana wasigiye amavuta ibuye i Beteli umaze kurishinga bukingi. Ni na ho wambwiriye umuhigo wawe. Ubu rero haguruka, uve muri iki gihugu, usubire mu gihugu cy’abawe.’»" 
Genesis31:14 Rasheli na Leya baramusubiza bati «Mu rugo rwa data se, hari umugabane cyangwa ibyo twaragwa tugifiteyo?" 
Genesis31:15 Ntiyatugize se nk’aho tutari abe, we watuguze akanarya ikiguzi cyacu?" 
Genesis31:16 Ubutunzi bwose Imana yatse data ubwo bubaye ubwacu, n’ubw’abana bacu. Noneho kora uko Imana yakubwiye.»" 
Genesis31:17 Nuko Yakobo arahaguruka, yuriza abahungu be n’abagore be ingamiya." 
Genesis31:18 Ajyana n’amatungo ye n’ibyo yari yararonkeye mu kibaya cya Aramu byose ngo atahuke kwa se Izaki, mu gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Genesis31:19 Igihe Labani yari yagiye kogosha intama ze, Rasheli yiba ibishushanyo by’ibigirwamana bya se." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo ahenda ubwenge Labani w’Umwaramu, ahunga atabimubwiye." 
Genesis31:21 Nuko ahungana ibyo yari atunze byose; arahaguruka yambuka Uruzi, agenda yerekeje mu misozi ya Gilihadi." 
Genesis31:22 Ku munsi wa gatatu, babwira Labani ko Yakobo yahunze." 
Genesis31:23 Ajyana na bene wabo, amukurikirana iminsi irindwi, amushyikira ageze mu misozi ya Gilihadi." 
Genesis31:24 Nijoro Imana ibwirira Labani w’Umwaramu mu nzozi iti «Uramenye, ntugire icyo ubwira Yakobo, cyaba cyiza, cyaba kibi!»" 
Genesis31:25 Labani ashyikira Yakobo. Yakobo yari yashinze ihema rye mu misozi ya Gilihadi; nuko Labani n’abavandimwe be na bo babigenza batyo. 
Genesis31:26 Labani abwira Yakobo ati «Wangenjeje ute? Wampenze ubwenge, ujyana abakobwa banjye nk’abanyagano?" 
Genesis31:27 Watewe n’iki guhunga rwihishwa, ukambeshya, ntumbwire ngo ngusezerere mu byishimo, n’indirimbo, n’ingoma, n’inanga?" 
Genesis31:28 Ntiwaretse mpobera abahungu n’abakobwa banjye. Rwose wagenjeje nk’umupfu! 
Genesis31:29 Nashoboraga kubagirira nabi, ariko Imana y’abasokuru bawe yaraye imbwiriye mu nzozi iti ’Uramenye, ntugire icyo ubwira Yakobo, cyaba cyiza, cyaba kibi.’" 
Genesis31:30 None se ubwo wacitse ukumbuye iwanyu, ni iki cyatumye ucikana imana zanjye?»" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo asubiza Labani, ati «Ni uko nari mfite ubwoba bw’uko wanyambura abakobwa bawe." 
Genesis31:32 Icyakora uwo uza gusangana imana zawe, ntakabeho! Imbere ya bene data, saka icyawe cyaba kiri mu byanjye, ugisubirane.» Yakobo ntiyari azi ko ari Rasheli wibye imana za se." 
Genesis31:33 Nuko Labani yinjira mu ihema rya Yakobo, nyuma mu rya Leya, no mu mahema y’abaja b’abo bagore bombi. Ntiyagira icyo ahasanga. Ava mu ihema rya Leya ajya mu ihema rya Rasheli." 
Genesis31:34 Rasheli yari yenze ibyo bishushanyo by’ibigirwamana, abihisha mu nsi y’intebe bashyira ku ngamiya, nuko ayicaraho. Labani ashakira mu ihema hose, ntiyabibona." 
Genesis31:35 Rasheli abwira se ati «Databuja ntarakare, kuko ndashobora guhaguruka, ndi mu mugongo.» Labani arashakashaka, ibishushanyo bye ntiyabibona." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobo ararakara, atonganya Labani; aravuga ati «Igicumuro cyanjye ni ikihe? Icyaha nakoze ni ikihe, kugira ngo unkurikirane utyo?" 
Genesis31:37 Aho washakashakiye mu bintu byanjye, icyo wahasanze cy’iwawe ni iki? Cyerekane imbere y’abavandimwe bawe n’abanjye, maze baducire urubanza!" 
Genesis31:38 Dore imyaka ibaye makumyabiri turi kumwe, intama zawe n’ihene zawe ntayigeze iramburura! Kandi nta sekurume n’imwe nariye mu mukumbi wawe." 
Genesis31:39 Sinigeze nkugarurira itungo ryabaga ryakomeretse, nararikurihaga! Kandi iryibwe, ari ku manywa, ari nijoro, wararinyishyuzaga!" 
Genesis31:40 Izuba ryandengeyeho, imvura inshikiraho, amaso yanjye ntaheruka udutotsi!" 
Genesis31:41 Imyaka ibaye makumyabiri ndi iwawe; nagukoreye imyaka cumi n’ine nshaka abakobwa bawe, n’imyaka itandatu mpakiwe amatungo. Wahinduye igihembo cyanjye incuro cumi!" 
Genesis31:42 Imana ya data, Imana ya Abrahamu, ikaba n’Umubyeyi wa Izaki, iyo tutaba kumwe, uba waransezereye amara masa! Ariko Imana yarebye amagorwa yanjye n’imiruho y’amaboko yanjye; nuko muri iri joro irandenganura!»" 
Genesis31:43 Labani asubiza Yakobo ati «Aba bakobwa ni abanjye, aba bana ni abanjye, aya matungo ni ayanjye: ibyo ureba byose ni ibyanjye! Ariko se ubu ngubu nakorera iki abakobwa banjye, n’abana babyaye?" 
Genesis31:44 Ngwino rero tugirane amasezerano, jyewe nawe, maze habe gihamya y’ubumwe buduhuza.»" 
Genesis31:45 Yakobo yenda ibuye, arishinga bukingi." 
Genesis31:46 Abwira bene wabo ati «Nimuzane andi mabuye»; barayazana, bayakoramo ikirundo. Nuko barira hejuru y’icyo kirundo." 
Genesis31:47 Labani acyita Yegari Sahaduta, naho Yakobo acyita Galeyedi." 
Genesis31:48 Labani aravuga ati «Iki kirundo kitubere gihamya uyu munsi.» Ni cyo cyatumye bacyita Galeyedi (bisobanura ngo ’Ikirundo cya gihamya’). 
Genesis31:49 Kandi cyitwa na Misipa (bisobanura ngo ’Aho bagenzura’), kuko Labani yavuze ati «Uhoraho azatugenzure, igihe tuzaba tutakibonana." 
Genesis31:50 Nugirira nabi abakobwa banjye, cyangwa se nubaharika, n’iyo ndetse hatagira undi muntu ubimenya, uzibuke ko Imana ari yo muhamya wa twembi.»" 
Genesis31:51 Labani arongera abwira Yakobo, ati «Reba iki kirundo cy’amabuye nshyize hagati yacu, urebe n’iyi nkingi nshinze." 
Genesis31:52 Iki kirundo kibe gihamya, n’iyi nkingi ibe gihamya. Jyewe ndahiye ko ntazarenga iki kirundo n’iyi nkingi ngo ngutere, nawe rahira ko utazakirenga ngo untere, maze tukagirirana nabi." 
Genesis31:53 Imana ya Abrahamu, ikaba n’Imana ya Nahori, iratubere umucamanza!» — Kwari ukurahiza Imana y’abasekuruza babo — Naho Yakobo arahiza Imana, Umubyeyi wa se Izaki." 
Genesis31:54 Nuko Yakobo aturira igitambo kuri uwo musozi, atumira bene wabo, barasangira, barara kuri uwo musozi." 
Genesis32:1 Labani azinduka kare cyane, ahobera abuzukuru be n’abakobwa be, abaha umugisha; nyuma asubira iwe." 
Genesis32:2 Yakobo akomeza urugendo. Agira atya ahura n’intumwa z’Imana. 
Genesis32:3 Yakobo azibonye aravuga ati «Aha ni inkambi y’Imana». Aho hantu ahita Mahanayimu (bisobanura ngo «Inkambi ebyiri ».) 
Genesis32:4 Yakobo yohereza intumwa kuri Ezawu mukuru we, aho yari ari i Seyiri mu mirambi ya Edomu." 
Genesis32:5 Arabategeka ati «Muzabwire databuja Ezawu muti ’Umugaragu wawe Yakobo aradutumye ngo: Nabaye kwa Labani, ndahatinda kugeza ubu." 
Genesis32:6 Mfite ibimasa, indogobe, n’andi matungo. Mfite abagaragu n’abaja. None nsanze ari ngombwa kohereza intumwa ngo mbimenyeshe databuja Ezawu kugira ngo mugushe neza»." 
Genesis32:7 Intumwa zigaruka kuri Yakobo zivuga ziti «Twageze kuri mwene so Ezawu, ariko agusanganije igitero cy’abantu magana ane.»" 
Genesis32:8 Yakobo ashya ubwoba, umutima urakuka; hanyuma agabanya abantu, amashyo yose, n’ingamiya mo inkambi ebyiri." 
Genesis32:9 Aribwira ati «Ezawu natera inkambi ya mbere akabatsinda, abo mu nkambi ya kabiri bazashobora guhunga.»" 
Genesis32:10 Yakobo ariyamirira, ati «Mana ya data Abrahamu, Mana ya data Izaki, Uhoraho, wowe wambwiye uti ’Subira mu gihugu cyawe, mu gihugu cya ba sokuruza, nzakugirira neza’," 
Genesis32:11 sinkwiriye ubuntu n’ineza wagiriye umugaragu wawe w’intamenyekana! Dore nambutse Yorudani iyi ngiyi, nitwaje inkoni gusa; none mpindukiye ngabye inkambi ebyiri." 
Genesis32:12 Ndakwinginze, unkize mwene data Ezawu; ndamutinya, ndatinya ko aza akatwica, ari jye, ari abagore n’abana." 
Genesis32:13 Kandi warambwiye uti ’Nzakugirira neza, ngwize urubyaro rwawe nk’umusenyi wo ku nkombe y’inyanja utabarika’!»" 
Genesis32:14 Yakobo arara aho ngaho iryo joro. Yakobo yenda mu byo yari atunze, akuramo ibyo gutura mukuru we Ezawu:" 
Genesis32:15 ihene magana abiri, isekurume makumyabiri, intama magana abiri n’isekurume zazo makumyabiri," 
Genesis32:16 ingamiya zikamwa mirongo itatu n’izazo, inka mirongo ine, imfizi icumi, indogobe z’ingore makumyabiri n’iz’ingabo icumi." 
Genesis32:17 Buri shyo arishyira ukwaryo, maze yose ayashinga abagaragu be; arababwira ati «Munjye imbere, musige intera hagati y’amashyo.»" 
Genesis32:18 Umugaragu wa mbere aramutegeka ati «Mukuru wanjye nimumara guhura, akakubaza ati ’Uri uwa nde? Urajya hehe? Ayo matungo ushoreye ni aya nde?’" 
Genesis32:19 Uzamusubize uti ’Ni ay’umugaragu wawe Yakobo, ni ayo atuye databuja Ezawu, kandi dore aje adukurikiye.’»" 
Genesis32:20 Uwa kabiri n’uwa gatatu, mbese abagaragu be bose bari bashoreye amatungo, abategeka kuvuga kimwe. Arababwira ati «Ngayo amagambo muzabwira Ezawu nimuhura," 
Genesis32:21 muzavuge muti ’Dore umugaragu wawe Yakobo na we ari inyuma’.» Kuko yibwiraga ati «Ndamwuruza amaturo andangaje imbere; hanyuma dushobore guhuza amaso, wenda yanyakira neza.»" 
Genesis32:22 Nuko ya maturo barayajyana, naho we yongera kurara aho." 
Genesis32:23 Iryo joro Yakobo arahaguruka, ahagurukana n’abagore be uko ari babiri, n’abaja be uko ari babiri, ntiyasiga abana be cumi n’umwe; nuko yambuka umugezi wa Yaboki." 
Genesis32:24 Arabambutsa bose, yambutsa n’ibyo yari atunze byose." 
Genesis32:25 Yakobo asigara aho wenyine. Haza umugabo akirana na we, kugeza mu museke." 
Genesis32:26 Abonye ko adashoboye gutsinda Yakobo, amukora ku mutsi wo ku nyonga y’itako, igihe bari hasi ku butaka, itako rirakuka, rikuka bagikirana." 
Genesis32:27 Wa mugabo aramubwira ati «Ndekura ngende, dore umuseke urakebye.» Yakobo ati «Sinkurekura utampaye umugisha.»" 
Genesis32:28 Undi aramubaza ati «Witwa nde?» Ati «Nitwa Yakobo.» 
Genesis32:29 Undi ati «Ntibazongere kukwita Yakobo, ahubwo Israheli, kuko wakiranye n’Imana n’abantu, kandi ugatsinda.»" 
Genesis32:30 Yakobo aramubwira ati «Ndakwinginze, mpishurira izina ryawe.» Undi ati «Izina ryanjye urarimbariza iki?» Nuko amuha umugisha, awumuhera aho ngaho." 
Genesis32:31 Aho hantu Yakobo ahita Penuweli (bisobanura ngo ’Mu maso y’Imana’), agira ati «Kuko nahaboneye Imana mu maso, nkarenga nkabaho.»" 
Genesis32:32 Izuba ryarashe arenga Penuweli, agenda acumbagira itako." 
Genesis32:33 Ni yo mpamvu kugeza na n’ubu Abayisraheli batarya umutsi uri mu itako. Kuko Imana yari yakoze Yakobo ku mutsi wo ku nyonga y’itako. 
Genesis33:1 Yakobo ngo yubure amaso, abona Ezawu aje aherekejwe n’abantu magana ane. Abana abaha Leya na Rasheli n’abaja bombi." 
Genesis33:2 Abaja n’abana babo bajya imbere, hakurikiraho Leya n’abana be, hanyuma hakurikiraho Rasheli na Yozefu." 
Genesis33:3 Naho we abarangaza imbere, yunama karindwi ku butaka, arinda agera kuri Ezawu mukuru we." 
Genesis33:4 Ezawu amusanganira n'ingoga, amugwa mu nda, aramuhobera, aranamusoma, nuko bombi baraturika bararira." 
Genesis33:5 Ezawu yubura amaso abona abagore n’abana, hanyuma arabaza ati «Bariya mupfana iki?» Yakobo ati «Ni abana Imana yahaye umugaragu wawe.»" 
Genesis33:6 Nuko abaja n’abana babo baregera, barapfukama." 
Genesis33:7 Leya na we araza hamwe n’abana be, barapfukama. Hanyuma haza Rasheli na Yozefu, na bo barapfukama." 
Genesis33:8 Ezawu aravuga ati «Iriya nkambi yose twahuye ni iy’iki?» Yakobo ati «Ni ukugira ngo databuja andebe neza.» 
Genesis33:9 Ezawu ati «Ibyo mfite birampagije, muvandimwe, ibyawe bigume bibe ibyawe!»" 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo ati «Reka da! Niba undebye neza, urakira amaturo nguhaye, kuko nabonye amaso yawe nk’uko umuntu abona mu maso h’Imana, maze ukanyakira neza." 
Genesis33:11 Akira rero amaturo nakugejejeho, kuko Imana yankungahaje, nkaba nta cyo mbuze.» Aramuhata, undi aremera." 
Genesis33:12 Ezawu ati «Ngwino tugende, ndakugenda iruhande.»" 
Genesis33:13 Yakobo ati «Databuja azi ko abana ari ngombwa kubitondesha, kandi ko ngomba kwita ku ntama, n’inka z’imbyeyi. Uwazihutisha n’umunsi n’umwe, amatungo yose yashira." 
Genesis33:14 Databuja rero nangende imbere, jye ndaza nitonze, nkurikije ingendo y’amatungo nshoreye n’intambwe y’abana turi kumwe, kugeza igihe tuzagerera iwawe i Seyiri.»" 
Genesis33:15 Ezawu ati «Reka se, ahubwo ngusigire bamwe mu bantu banjye turi kumwe.» Yakobo ati «Ni ab’iki? Mfa kubona gusa ubugwaneza bwa databuja!»" 
Genesis33:16 Uwo munsi nyine, Ezawu ni ko gufata inzira ye, yisubirira i Seyiri." 
Genesis33:17 Naho Yakobo agenda agana ahitwa Sukoti; ahubaka inzu, ahubaka n’ibiraro by’amatungo ye. Ni cyo cyatumye aho hantu ahita Sukoti (bisobanura ngo «ibiraro».)" 
Genesis33:18 Yakobo avuye mu kibaya cya Aramu, agaruka amahoro ku mugi wa Sikemu, uri mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Nuko aca ingando imbere y’umugi." 
Genesis33:19 Agura umurima aho ngaho i Sikemu, aho yari yashinze ingando; awugura ibiceri ijana bya feza na bene Hamori, se wa Sikemu nyine." 
Genesis33:20 Ahubaka urutambiro arwita ’El, Imana ya Israheli’." 
Genesis34:1 Dina, umukobwa wa Leya yari yarabyaranye na Yakobo, yigeze gusohoka, ajya kugenderera abakobwa bo muri icyo gihugu." 
Genesis34:2 Sikemu mwene Hamori w’Umuhivi, igikomangoma cy’icyo gihugu, aramubona, aramufata, amusambanya ku ngufu." 
Genesis34:3 Nyuma ariko aza kumukunda koko, umutima we ugwa kuri Dina umukobwa wa Yakobo, amugaragariza urukundo rwe." 
Genesis34:4 Nuko abwira se Hamori ati «Nsabira uyu mwana ambere umugore.» 
Genesis34:5 Yakobo aza kumva ko Sikemu yononnye umukobwa we Dina. Ariko kuko abahungu be bari bahuye ubushyo ku gasozi, Yakobo araceceka kugeza igihe bacyuriye." 
Genesis34:6 Hagati aho, Hamori se wa Sikemu ajya kwa Yakobo baravugana." 
Genesis34:7 Bene Yakobo bamaze gucyura, bahita babyumva. Bararakara barabisha, kuko Sikemu yari yakoze ishyano aryamana n’umukobwa wa Yakobo, kandi bene ibyo bidakwiye gukorwa muri Israheli." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori arababwira ati «Umutima w’umuhungu wanjye Sikemu wigombye umukobwa wanyu, mubishatse mwamumuhaho umugore." 
Genesis34:9 Mbese dushyingirane: mudushyingire abakobwa banyu, namwe murongore abacu." 
Genesis34:10 Tuzaturane: igihugu kibe icyanyu namwe, mugiture, mugikungahariremo, mugitungiremo!»" 
Genesis34:11 Sikemu abwira se w’umukobwa na basaza be, ati «Icyampa nkabanyura mukandeba neza; icyo muzanca nzagitanga." 
Genesis34:12 Inkwano n’impano, igiciro n’ibijyana na cyo bindi bihanitse, mubince, nzabibaha uko muzaba mwabivuze, ariko mumpe uwo mukobwa ho umugeni!»" 
Genesis34:13 Bene Yakobo basubiza Sikemu na se Hamori, ariko bavugisha uburiganya, kuko Sikemu yari yononnye mushiki wabo Dina." 
Genesis34:14 Barababwira bati «Ibyo ntidushobora kubigira, ntidushobora guha mushiki wacu umuntu utagenywe, byaba kwitukisha." 
Genesis34:15 Ikizatuma twemera, ni uko mwaba nka twe, mukagenya abahungu banyu bose." 
Genesis34:16 Ubwo ni bwo tuzabona kubashyingira, namwe mukadushyingira, tugaturana, tukaba umuryango umwe." 
Genesis34:17 Niba mutemeye ngo mwigenyeshe, umukobwa wacu turamubaka twigendere.»" 
Genesis34:18 Ayo magambo ashimisha Hamori, n’umuhungu we Sikemu." 
Genesis34:19 Wa musore ntiyatindiganyije kubikora, kuko yari akunze umukobwa wa Yakobo. Uwo musore kandi yari umwe mu barusha abandi icyubahiro mu rugo rwa se." 
Genesis34:20 Hamori na Sikemu umuhungu we baraza bahagarara ku irembo ry’umugi wabo; babwira abaturage b’aho, bati" 
Genesis34:21 «Bariya bantu ni abanyamahoro. Nimureke bature mu gihugu cyacu, bagikungahariremo, na bo kibe icyabo. Abakobwa babo tuzabarongora, natwe tubashyingire abacu." 
Genesis34:22 Ariko ikizatuma bemera ko duturana tukaba umuryango umwe, ni uko twagenya buri mwana w’umuhungu wacu nk’uko na bo babigenza." 
Genesis34:23 Amatungo yabo n’ibyo batunze byose ubwo se ntibizaba ibyacu? Nitwemere dukore ibyo bifuza, maze duturane!»" 
Genesis34:24 Abahitaga ku irembo ry’umugi bose basohoka bumva ayo magambo ya Hamori na Sikemu umuhungu we; nuko ab’igitsinagabo bose baragenywa uko bahitaga ku irembo ry’umugi. 
Genesis34:25 Ku munsi wa gatatu, abagenywe bakibirwaye, Simewoni na Levi bene Yakobo, basaza ba Dina, bakura inkota binjira muri Sikemu nta we ubakoma imbere, bica ab’igitsinagabo bose." 
Genesis34:26 Bicisha ubugi bw’inkota Hamori na Sikemu, bavana Dina mu rugo rwa Sikemu, baramutahana." 
Genesis34:27 Bene Yakobo binjira mu mugi baribata inkomere, barasahura, kuko mushiki wabo bari baramwononnye." 
Genesis34:28 Banyaga amatungo magufi n’amaremare, bataretse indogobe, banyaga icyari mu mugi n’icyari mu gasozi cyose." 
Genesis34:29 Umutungo waho barawutwara, bajyana utwana na ba nyina ho imbohe, n’amazu barayasahura." 
Genesis34:30 Yakobo abwira Simewoni na Levi, ati «Mwanteye ibyago bikomeye, mujya kunteranya na bene igihugu, Abakanahani n’Abaperezi! Jye mfite abantu bake cyane; nibishyira hamwe bakantera, bazanesha, bantsembane n’umuryango wanjye wose.»" 
Genesis34:31 Na bo baramusubiza bati «None se mushiki wacu bamugire ihabara?» 
Genesis35:1 Imana ibwira Yakobo, iti «Haguruka uzamuke ujye i Beteli, uhagume iminsi; maze Imana yakubonekeye igihe wahungaga mumuru wawe Ezawu, uyihubakire urutambiro.»" 
Genesis35:2 Nuko Yakobo abwira urugo rwe n’abo babanaga bose ati «Muvaneho ibigirwamana by’ibinyamahanga mufite, mwisukureihe wahungaga mukuru wawe, muhindure imyambaro." 
Genesis35:3 Maze duhaguruke tuzamuke i Beteli! Nzahubakira Imana urutambiro, yo yanyumvise mu minsi y’ibyago byanjye kandi ikaba kumwe nanjye mu rugendo nagenze.»" 
Genesis35:4 Ibigirwamana by’ibinyamahanga bari bafite hamwe n’amaherena, byose babiha Yakobo, abihamba mu nsi ya cya giti cy’umushishi kiri hafi ya Sikemu." 
Genesis35:5 Nuko baragenda. Imana itera ubwoba bukabije mu migi ikikije Sikemu, ntihagira n’umwe ukurikirana abahungu ba Yakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Yakobo agera i Luzi ho mu gihugu cya Kanahani, ari yo Beteli; ahagerana n’abantu bose bari kumwe." 
Genesis35:7 Ahubaka urutambiro, aho hantu ahita ’Imana y’i Beteli’, kuko ari ho Imana yari yamubonekereye ahunga mukuru we." 
Genesis35:8 Debora wari warareze Rebeka arasaza, bamushyingura hepfo y’i Beteli, mu nsi y’igiti cy’umushishi; nuko icyo giti acyita ’Umushishi w’amarira’." 
Genesis35:9 Imana yongera kubonekera Yakobo aho aviriye mu kibaya cya Aramu, imuha umugisha." 
Genesis35:10 Imana iramubwira iti «Izina ryawe ryari Yakobo. Ariko ntibazongera kukwita Yakobo, izina ryawe rizaba Israheli!» Nuko imwita Israheli." 
Genesis35:11 Imana irongera iti «Ndi Imana Nyir’ububasha. Wororoke ugwire, uzabyara umuryango, ndetse n’imiryango myinshi izagukomokaho, n’abami bazaguturukaho." 
Genesis35:12 Igihugu nahaye Abrahamu na Izaki ndakiguhaye, nzakigabira n’urubyaro rwawe.»" 
Genesis35:13 Imana irazamuka imusiga aho bari bavuganiye. 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo ahashinga ibuye bukingi, arishinga nyine aho bari bavuganiye. Iryo buye arisukaho divayi, anarisigaho amavuta y’imizeti." 
Genesis35:15 Nuko Yakobo yita Beteli aho hantu yari yavuganiye n’Imana. 
Genesis35:16 Bava i Beteli, Rasheli abyara bashigaje urugendo ruto ngo bagere ku musozi wa Efurata. Abyara ariko bimuruhije." 
Genesis35:17 Muri ubwo bubabare, umubyaza aramubwira ati «Wigira ubwoba, ni umuhungu wongeye kubyara.»" 
Genesis35:18 Yumvise agiye gushiramo umwuka, yenda gupfa, umwana amwita Benoni (bisobanura ngo ’Umwana w’ububabare bwanjye’.) Se w’umwana aranga, amwita Benyamini (bisobanura ngo ’Umwana w’amahirwe’.)" 
Genesis35:19 Rasheli arapfa, bamuhamba hafi y’inzira ijya Efurata, ari yo Betelehemu." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo ashinga ibuye bukingi ku mva ye: ni ryo buye rishinze ryo ku mva ya Rasheli; riracyariho na n’ubu. 
Genesis35:21 Israheli arahava, ihema rye arishinga hakurya ya Migidalederi." 
Genesis35:22 Igihe Israheli yari atuye muri iyo ntara, Rubeni aza kuryamana na Biliha, inshoreke ya se, Israheli arabimenya. Bene Yakobo bari cumi na babiri:" 
Genesis35:23 Leya yabyaye Rubeni, imfura ya Yakobo. Hanyuma abyara Simewoni, Levi, Yuda, Isakari na Zabuloni." 
Genesis35:24 Rasheli yabyaye Yozefu na Benyamini. 
Genesis35:25 Biliha umuja wa Rasheli yabyaye Dani na Nefutali. 
Genesis35:26 Zilipa umuja wa Leya yabyaye Gadi na Asheri. Ngabo abahungu Yakobo yabyariye mu kibaya cya Aramu. 
Genesis35:27 Yakobo agaruka kwa se Izaki i Mambure, hafi ya Kiriyati‐Haruba, ari yo Heburoni, aho Abrahamu na Izaki bari batuye mbere." 
Genesis35:28 Izaki yamaze imyaka ijana na mirongo inani. 
Genesis35:29 Hanyuma abona gupfa, asanga abakurambere. Yari ashaje cyane, ageze mu zabukuru. Abahungu be Ezawu na Yakobo baramutabariza, baramushyingura." 
Genesis36:1 Dore urubyaro rwa Ezawu, ari we Edomu:" 
Genesis36:2 Ezawu yarongoye abakobwa bo mu gihugu cya Kanahani: Ada, umukobwa wa Eliyoni w’Umuheti; na Oholibama, umukobwa wa Ana, mwene Sibewoni w’Umuhivi." 
Genesis36:3 Arongora na Basimata, umukobwa wa Ismaheli, mushiki wa Nebayoti." 
Genesis36:4 Ada abyarira Ezawu Elifazi, naho Basimata amubyarira Rehuweli." 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama amubyarira Yewushi, Yawelamu na Kora. Abo ni bo bene Ezawu bavukiye mu gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Genesis36:6 Nyuma y’ibyo Ezawu ajya mu kindi gihugu, kure ya murumuna we Yakobo. Ava rero muri Kanahani, ajyana n’abagore be, n’abahungu n’abakobwa be, n’abagaragu be, n’amashyo ye, amatungo ye yose n’ibintu bye byose yari yarahahiye muri icyo gihugu." 
Genesis36:7 Byatewe n’uko ibintu bari batunze byabaye byinshi, ntibaba bagishoboye guturana. Aho bari barasuhukiye ntihari hakibahagije, ku mpamvu y’amatungo menshi bari batunze." 
Genesis36:8 Ezawu aragenda, atura ku musozi wa Seyiri. Ezawu ni we Edomu." 
Genesis36:9 Dore rero urubyaro rwa Ezawu, sekuruza w’Abanyedomu batuye mu misozi ya Seyiri." 
Genesis36:10 Ngaya amazina y’abahungu ba Ezawu: Elifazi mwene Ada, muka Ezawu, na Rehuweli mwene Basimata, muka Ezawu." 
Genesis36:11 Abahungu ba Elifazi ni Temani, Omari, Sefo, Gayetamu na Kenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Timuna wari inshoreke ya Elifazi mwene Ezawu, amubyarira Amaleki. Abo ni bo buzukuru ba Ezawu na Ada, umugore we." 
Genesis36:13 Abahungu ba Rehuweli ni Nahati, Zerahi, Shama na Miza. Abo ni bo buzukuru ba Ezawu na Basimata, umugore we." 
Genesis36:14 Dore abahungu ba Oholibama, umukobwa wa Ana, mwene Sibewoni: Oholibama muka Ezawu yabyaye Yewushi, Yawelamu na Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Dore abatware b’imiryango ya bene Ezawu. Abatware ba bene Elifazi, imfura ya Ezawu, ni Temani, Omari, Sefo, Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 Kora, Gayetamu, Amaleki. Abo ni bo batware ba Elifazi, mu gihugu cya Edomu bakaba abana ba Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Abatware ba bene Rehuweli, mwene Ezawu, ni Nahati, Zerahi, Shama, na Miza. Abo ni bo batware ba bene Rehuweli, mu gihugu cya Edomu, bakaba abana ba Basimata muka Ezawu." 
Genesis36:18 Abatware ba bene Oholibama muka Ezawu, ni Yewushi, Yawelamu, na Kora. Bakaba abatware ba Oholibama, mwene Ana, muka Ezawu." 
Genesis36:19 Ngabo bene Ezawu, ngabo abatware babo. Ezawu ni we Edomu." 
Genesis36:20 Dore bene Seyiri w’Umuhori, bari batuye icyo gihugu: ni Lotani, Shobali, Sibewoni, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dishoni, Eseri na Dishani. Abo ni bo batware b’Abahori, bene Seyiri, mu gihugu cya Edomu." 
Genesis36:22 Bene Lotani ni Hori, na Hemami; mushiki wa Lotani yitwaga Timina." 
Genesis36:23 Bene Shobali ni Aluwani, Manahati, Ebali, Shefo na Onamu." 
Genesis36:24 Bene Sibewoni ni Aya na Ana. Ana uwo nguwo ni we wigeze kubona amariba mu butayu, aragiye indogobe za se Sibewoni." 
Genesis36:25 Bene Ana ni Dishoni na Oholibama umukobwa wa Ana. 
Genesis36:26 Bene Dishoni ni Hemudani, Eshibani, Yitirani, na Kerani." 
Genesis36:27 Bene Eseri ni Bilihani, Zawani na Akwani." 
Genesis36:28 Bene Dishani ni Husi na Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Abatware b’Abahori ni Lotani, Shobali, Sibewoni, Ana," 
Genesis36:30 Dishoni, Eseri na Dishani. Abo ni bo batware b’imiryango y’Abahori mu gihugu cya Seyiri." 
Genesis36:31 Dore abami bimye ingoma muri Edomu, Israheli itaragira umwami." 
Genesis36:32 Bela, mwene Bewori, yari umwami muri Edomu; izina ry’umurwa we rikaba Dinihava." 
Genesis36:33 Bela atanze, hima Yobabu mwene Zerahi, w’i Bosira." 
Genesis36:34 Yobabu atanze, hima Hushami wo mu gihugu cy’Abatemani." 
Genesis36:35 Hushami atanze, hima Hadadi mwene Bedadi, ni we waneshereje Madiyani mu misozi ya Mowabu; izina ry’umurwa we rikaba Awiti." 
Genesis36:36 Hadadi atanze, hima Samula w’i Masireka." 
Genesis36:37 Samula atanze, hima Sawuli w’i Rehoboti yo kuri Efurati." 
Genesis36:38 Sawuli atanze, hima Behali‐Hanani, mwene Akibori." 
Genesis36:39 Behali‐Hanani atanze, hima Hadari; izina ry’umurwa we rikaba Pawu. Umugore we yitwaga Mehetabela, umukobwa wa Matiredi mwene Mezahabu." 
Genesis36:40 Dore amazina y’abatware ba Ezawu, ukurikije imiryango yabo, n’aho bari batuye. Abo batware ni Timuna, Aluwa, Yeteti," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 Kenazi, Temani, Mibizari," 
Genesis36:43 Magidiyeli na Iramu. Ngabo rero abatware ba Edomu, ukurikije aho bari batuye, mu gihugu cyari icyabo. Ngibyo ibya Ezawu, sekuruza w’Abanyedomu bose." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo rero yatuye mu gihugu se yari yarasuhukiyemo, ari cyo gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Genesis37:2 Dore amateka yo kwa Yakobo: Yozefu, amaze kugera mu kigero cy’imyaka cumi n’irindwi, yaragiranaga amatungo na bene se. Uwo musore yajyanaga n’abahungu ba Zilipa na Biliha, abagore ba se. Bukeye abwira se ukuntu babavugaga nabi." 
Genesis37:3 Israheli akikundira Yozefu kuruta abandi bahungu be bose, agatsinda yari umwana wo mu zabukuru. Yari yaramuboheye ikanzu y’amaboko maremare." 
Genesis37:4 Bene se babonye ko amutonesheje, baramwanga, ntibongera kumuvugisha neza." 
Genesis37:5 Umunsi umwe, Yozefu ararota, arotorera bene se; noneho barushaho kumwanga." 
Genesis37:6 Arababwira ati «Nimutege amatwi, mwumve inzozi narose." 
Genesis37:7 Nagize ntya mbona duhambira imiba mu murima; ngiye kubona, mbona umuba wanjye uregutse urahagarara, imiba yanyu irawukikiza, irawunamira.»" 
Genesis37:8 Bene se bati «Mbese urashaka kuzatubera umwami cyangwa umutware ngo udutegeke?» Barushaho kumwanga, bamuhora inzozi ze n’amagambo ye." 
Genesis37:9 Yozefu arongera ararota, arotorera bene se, ati «Dore nongeye kurota, ndota izuba n’ukwezi n’inyenyeri cumi n’imwe zinyunamira.»" 
Genesis37:10 Ibyo abirotorera se na bene se. Se aramutonganya, ati «Izo nzozi warose, ni nzozi ki? Ubwo se ni ukuvuga ko jye na nyoko na bene so, tuzakunamira?»" 
Genesis37:11 Bene se bamugirira ishyari, naho se abibika mu mutima." 
Genesis37:12 Umunsi umwe, bene se bari bahuye amatungo ya se kuri Sikemu." 
Genesis37:13 Yakobo abwira Yozefu, ati «Abo muva inda imwe ntibaragiye i Sikemu? Ngwino, nkohereze aho bari.» Yozefu ati «Ndaje.»" 
Genesis37:14 Yakobo ati «Genda rero, urebe uko abo muva inda imwe bamerewe, urebe uko amatungo ameze, maze uzaze umbwire amakuru yabo.» Amwohereza aho bari mu kibaya cya Heburoni. Nuko Yozefu aragenda, agera i Sikemu." 
Genesis37:15 Umugabo aza kumubona abungera mu gasozi; uwo mugabo aramubaza, ati «Urashaka iki?»" 
Genesis37:16 Yozefu ati «Ndashaka bene data. Ndakwinginze, ndangira aho baragiye.»" 
Genesis37:17 Wa mugabo ati «Aha bahavuye, kuko numvise bavuga bati ’Tujye i Dotani.’» Nuko Yozefu agenda akurikiranye bene se, koko abasanga i Dotani." 
Genesis37:18 Bamubonera kure; atarabageraho, batangira kumugambanira ngo bamwice." 
Genesis37:19 Baravugana bati «Dore wa murosi araje! 
Genesis37:20 Nimuze tumwice ubu noneho, tumujugunye muri rimwe muri ariya mariba. Tuzavuge ko inyamaswa y’inkazi yamumize, maze tuzarebe aho za nzozi ze zizamugeza!»" 
Genesis37:21 Rubeni arabyumva, agerageza kumubakiza. Arababwira ati «Twoye kumwica.»" 
Genesis37:22 Rubeni yungamo ati «Mwimena amaraso, ahubwo nimumujugunye muri ririya riba riri ku gasi, ariko mwoye kugira ikindi mumutwara.» Kwari ukugira ngo amubakize, azamusubize se." 
Genesis37:23 Nuko Yozefu akibageraho, baramufata, bamwambura ikanzu ye, ya kanzu y’amaboko maremare," 
Genesis37:24 bamujugunya mu iriba ryakamye, ritakirimo amazi." 
Genesis37:25 Baricara bararya. Bagiye kubona, babona urushorerane rw’Abayismaheli bari baturutse i Gilihadi, ingamiya zabo zikoreye amakakama yosa, imibavu n’ishangi, bajya kubicuruza mu Misiri." 
Genesis37:26 Nuko Yuda abwira bene se, ati «Kwica murumuna wacu tugahisha amaraso ye bitumariye iki?" 
Genesis37:27 Nimuze tumugure na bariya Bayismaheli, tutagira icyo tumutwara kandi tuva inda imwe, dusangiye n’amaraso.» Iyo nama bene se barayishima." 
Genesis37:28 Haza kuza Abamadiyani b’abacuruzi; Yozefu ni ko kumukura muri rya riba, bamugura n’Abayismaheli, bamugura amasikeli makumyabiri ya feza, Yozefu bamujyana mu Misiri." 
Genesis37:29 Rubeni agarutse ku iriba, asanga Yozefu atakirimo. Ashishimura imyambaro ye." 
Genesis37:30 Agaruka asanga bene se, ati «Umwana ntagihari! Ndakwirwa he?»" 
Genesis37:31 Benda ya kanzu ya Yozefu, babaga isekurume y’ihene, binika ya kanzu mu maraso yayo." 
Genesis37:32 Hanyuma ikanzu bayoherereza se bamubwira bati «Dore ibintu twatoraguye, reba niba yaba ikanzu y’umuhungu wawe, cyangwa se niba atari yo.»" 
Genesis37:33 Yakobo arayimenya, ariyamirira ati «Ni ikanzu y’umwana wanjye! Inyamaswa y’inkazi yaramuriye, Yozefu yaratanyaguwe!»" 
Genesis37:34 Nuko Yakobo ashishimura imyambaro ye, yambara igunira, yiraburira umwana we igihe kirekire." 
Genesis37:35 Abahungu be n’abakobwa be baza kumuhoza, yanga guhozwa, avuga ati «Nziraburira umwana wanjye kugeza ko tuzahurira ikuzimu.» Nuko aramuririra." 
Genesis37:36 Abamadiyani bageze mu Misiri, Yozefu bamugurura na Potifari, umukone wa Farawo, akaba n’umutegeka w’abarinzi be." 
Genesis38:1 Muri icyo gihe, Yuda amanuka ava aho bene se bari batuye, ajya kwa Hira, umugabo wari utuye i Adulamu." 
Genesis38:2 Yuda ahabona umukobwa wa Shuwa w’Umunyakanahani, aramurongora barabana." 
Genesis38:3 Asama inda, abyara umwana w’umuhungu, bamwita Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Arongera asama indi nda, abyara umuhungu, bamwita Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Yongeye kubyara umwana w’umuhungu, bamwita Shela. Yamubyaye bari i Kizibu." 
Genesis38:6 Yuda ashakira umugore Eri, umuhungu we w’imfura, amushakira uwitwa Tamara." 
Genesis38:7 Eri, imfura ya Yuda, aza kubera Uhoraho umuntu mubi, Uhoraho aramwica." 
Genesis38:8 Yuda ni ko kubwira Onani, ati «Sanga umugore wa mwene nyoko, urangize umurimo wa mukuru wawe, umubyarire.»" 
Genesis38:9 Onani yari azi ariko ko uwo mwana atazaba uwe, ni cyo cyatumaga asohorera hasi iyo yegeraga umugore wa mwene nyina, kugira ngo atazamubyarira." 
Genesis38:10 Ibyo yakoraga, Uhoraho arabigaya, aramwica na we." 
Genesis38:11 Yuda abwira umukazana we Tamara, ati «Igumire iwanyu mu bupfakazi bwawe, kugeza igihe umuhungu wanjye Shela azakurira.» Ubwo yaribwiraga, ati «Hato na we atazapfa nka bakuru be!» Nuko Tamara asubira kwa se." 
Genesis38:12 Hashize iminsi myinshi, umukobwa wa Shuwa, umugore wa Yuda, arapfa. Yuda ararira, arahora, hanyuma azamukana n’incuti ye Hira w’i Adulamu, asanga abakemuraga amatungo ye, i Timuna." 
Genesis38:13 Babibwira Tamara, bati «Sobukwe azamutse agana i Timuna, agiye kogosha intama ze.»" 
Genesis38:14 Tamara yiyambura imyambaro ye y’ubupfakazi, atega igitambaro; amaze kwimiramiza ngo hatagira umumenya, yicara ku irembo ry’umugi wa Enayimu, ku nzira ijya i Timuna. Yari yabonye neza ko Shela yari amaze kuba mukuru, ntibamumushyingira." 
Genesis38:15 Yuda amubonye amwitiranya n’umugore w’ihabara, kuko yari yitwikiriye no mu maso." 
Genesis38:16 Aramusanga, aramubwira ati «Nyemerera turyamane.» Nta bwo yari yamenye ko ari umukazana we. Undi ati «Urampa iki ngo ungereho?»" 
Genesis38:17 Yuda ati «Nzakoherereza umwana w’ihene nkuye mu matungo yanjye.» Umugore ati «Ndabyemeye, ariko unsigire ingwate, kugeza igihe uzoherereza iyo hene.»" 
Genesis38:18 Yuda ati «Ingwate nguha ni iyihe?» Undi ati «Ikashe yawe, umukufi wayo, n’iyo nkoni witwaje.» Arabimuha, bararyamana, nuko Tamara arasama." 
Genesis38:19 Hanyuma arahaguruka aragenda, yiyambura cya gitambaro, asubira kwambara ya myenda ye y’ubupfakazi." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda yohereza wa mwana w’ihene, atumye ya ncuti ye y’i Adulamu ngo inamugarurire ingwate ze. Ariko iyo ncuti ntiyabona uwo mugore." 
Genesis38:21 Abaza abantu b’aho ngaho, ati «Wa mugore w’ihabara wari ku nzira ijya i Enayimu ari hehe?» Bati «Nta habara yigeze iba hano.»" 
Genesis38:22 Agaruka kwa Yuda aramubwira ati «Nta we nabonye, ndetse n’abantu b’aho bambwiye ko nta habara yigeze ihaba!»" 
Genesis38:23 Yuda ati «Nagumane byose! Tutazavaho twisuzuguza. Ibyo ari byo byose, namwoherereje umwana w’ihene, ariko wowe ntiwamubonye!»" 
Genesis38:24 Hashize amezi atatu, baza kubwira Yuda, bati «Tamara umukazana wawe yabaye ihabara, dore ndetse n’ubu aratwite!» Yuda aravuga ati «Nibamusohore, maze bamutwike!»" 
Genesis38:25 Abonye bamujyanye, Tamara atuma kuri sebukwe, ati «Inda ni iya nyir’ibi bintu.» Ati «Ibuka nyir’iyi kashe, n’uyu mukufi n’iyi nkoni!»" 
Genesis38:26 Yuda arabimenya, ati «Yandushije ubutungane, kuko ntamushyingiye umuhungu wanjye Shela.» Kuva ubwo ntiyongeye kumwegera ukundi." 
Genesis38:27 Tamara ari hafi kubyara, asanga atwite babiri." 
Genesis38:28 Mu gihe cyo kubyara, umwana wa mbere abanza ikiganza; umugore ubyaza aragisingira, agishyiraho akadodo gatukura, ati «Uyu ni we wa mbere.»" 
Genesis38:29 Ariko uwo mwana asubizayo ikiganza; habanza kuvuka indi mpanga. Umugore ati «Uciye he?» Nuko bamwita Pereshi (bisobanura ngo ’Icyuho’.) 
Genesis38:30 Nyuma wa wundi wari ufite akadodo gatukura ku kiganza, na we aravuka. Bamwita Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Yozefu bamujyana mu Misiri. Potifari, Umunyamisiri, umukone wa Farawo watwaraga abarinzi be, amugura n’Abayismaheli bari bamujyanyeyo." 
Genesis39:2 Uhoraho yari kumwe na Yozefu; agira ukuboko kwiza, aba umunyanzu wa shebuja, uwo Munyamisiri." 
Genesis39:3 Shebuja abona ko Uhoraho yari kumwe na Yozefu, kuko ibyo yakoraga byose byamuhiraga." 
Genesis39:4 Yozefu aratona cyane. Potifari amugira umugaragu we, ndetse amuha ubutware mu by’urugo, amushinga ibyo yari atunze byose." 
Genesis39:5 Amaze kumugira umutware w’iby’urugo, no kumushinga ibyo yari atunze byose, Uhoraho aha umugisha urugo rw’uwo Munyamisiri, agirira Yozefu; umugisha w’Uhoraho ukwira ibye byose, urugo n’imirima." 
Genesis39:6 Ashinga Yozefu ibyo atunze byose, ntiyagira icyo yongera kugenzura, uretse kwita ku byo yaryaga! Yozefu yari mwiza wese, akagira mu maso heza." 
Genesis39:7 Bukeye umugore wa shebuja areba Yozefu, aramubenguka; aramubwira ati «Turyamane.»" 
Genesis39:8 We aranga, ahubwo abwira nyirabuja, ati «Dore databuja nta cyo akingenzuraho, ndetse yanshinze n’ibyo atunze byose." 
Genesis39:9 Uru rugo ntarundutamo, nta cyo ajya anyima, uretse wowe, kuko uri umugore we. None nashobora nte gukora ishyano nk’iryo, ngacumura ku Mana?»" 
Genesis39:10 N’ubwo nyirabuja yabimubwiraga buri munsi ngo baryamane basambane, Yozefu yanga kumwumva." 
Genesis39:11 Umunsi umwe Yozefu yinjira mu nzu gukora imirimo ye, nta n’umwe mu bantu bo mu rugo wari aho." 
Genesis39:12 Uwo mugore amufata umwenda, aramubwira ati «Turyamane!» Yozefu amurekera umwenda, ahunga asohoka." 
Genesis39:13 Umugore abonye amusigiye umwenda mu ntoki agahunga asohoka," 
Genesis39:14 ahamagara abantu bo mu rugo, arababwira ati «Nimurore! Batuzanyemo Umuhebureyi, umugabo w’inkubaganyi! Yanyegereye ngo turyamane, ntera hejuru, mvuza induru." 
Genesis39:15 Yumvise nteye hejuru, ata umwambaro we iruhande rwanjye, arahunga, arasohoka.»" 
Genesis39:16 Nuko umwenda wa Yozefu awurambika iruhande rwe, kugeza igihe umugabo we atahiye." 
Genesis39:17 Aje amubwira kwa kundi, ati «Wa mugaragu w’Umuhebureyi watuzaniye, yanteye ngo ankinishe." 
Genesis39:18 Ariko yumvise nteye hejuru, ata umwambaro we iruhande rwanjye, arahunga, arasohoka.»" 
Genesis39:19 Shebuja yumvise amagambo umugore we amubwiye, agira ati «Ngibyo iby’umugaragu wawe yangiriye», uburakari bwe buragurumana." 
Genesis39:20 Shebuja wa Yozefu aramufata, amuta mu buroko, ahafungirwaga imbohe z’umwami. Nuko Yozefu aguma mu buroko." 
Genesis39:21 Ariko Uhoraho aba kumwe na Yozefu, impuhwe ze zimwururukiraho, amuhesha ubutoni mu maso y’umutware w’uburoko." 
Genesis39:22 Uwo mutware aha Yozefu gutegeka abanyururu bose bari mu buroko. Ibyo bahakoreraga byose, ni we wabikoreshaga." 
Genesis39:23 Umutware w’uburoko ntiyagira ikindi yongera kugenzura mu byo yari yamushinze, kuko Uhoraho yari kumwe na Yozefu. Uhoraho agahora amuha kugira ukuboko kwiza, mu byo yakoraga byose." 
Genesis40:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, umunyanzoga wa Misiri, n’umutetsi w’imigati bacumura kuri shebuja, umwami wa Misiri." 
Genesis40:2 Farawo arakarira cyane ibyo byegera bye, umutetsi mukuru w’imigati n’umunyanzoga mukuru, uko ari babiri." 
Genesis40:3 Abafungira mu nzu y’umutware w’abarinda umwami, mu buroko nyirizina aho Yozefu yari afungiye." 
Genesis40:4 Umutware w’abarinda umwami abashinga Yozefu, ngo abakorere. Umunyanzoga n’umutetsi w’imigati b’umwami wa Misiri bamara igihe bafungiye muri ubwo buroko." 
Genesis40:5 Bombi baza kurota inzozi, umwe ku buryo bwe undi ku bwe, ariko mu ijoro rimwe, kandi izo nzozi zari zifite ibisobanuro binyuranye." 
Genesis40:6 Bukeye mu gitondo, Yozefu abasanga aho bari, abona bashavuye." 
Genesis40:7 Ni ko kubaza ibyegera bya Farawo byari bifunganywe na we mu nzu kwa shebuja, ati «Ni kuki uyu munsi noneho mwijimye?»" 
Genesis40:8 Nuko baramusubiza bati «Twarose, tubura uwadusobanurira inzozi.» Yozefu arababwira ati «Imana se si yo yonyine ishobora gusobanura inzozi? Ngaho nimuntekerereze uko mwarose.»" 
Genesis40:9 Umunyanzoga mukuru arotorera Yozefu inzozi ze, ati «Narose umuzabibu ushinze imbere yanjye." 
Genesis40:10 Kuri uwo muzabibu hari amashami atatu. Mbona urapfunditse urarabya, imbuto zirera." 
Genesis40:11 Igikombe cya Farawo nari ngifite mu ntoki, nenda imbuto z’imizabibu nzikamuriramo, mpereza Farawo.»" 
Genesis40:12 Yozefu aramubwira ati «Dore uko zisobanurwa. Amashami atatu ni iminsi itatu. 
Genesis40:13 Nihashira iminsi itatu Farawo azakunamura, weguke agusubize ubutware bwawe, wongere ujye guhereza Farawo igikombe cya divayi nk’uko wahoze ubigira." 
Genesis40:14 Numara kugira amahirwe, uzibuke ko twabanye: uzangirire ubuntu maze umpakirwe kuri Farawo, ankure muri iyi nzu ndimo." 
Genesis40:15 Kuko bankuye mu gihugu cy’Abahebureyi. N’aha ndi, nta cyaha nakoze kugira ngo bamfungire mu buroko.»" 
Genesis40:16 Umutetsi mukuru w’imigati abonye ko Yozefu yasobanuriye undi inzozi ze neza, na we aramubwira ati «Jyeweho narose nikoreye inkangara eshatu z’imigati y’ifu yera." 
Genesis40:17 Mu nkangara yo hejuru, harimo amoko menshi y’utugati Farawo akunda kurya. Ariko inyoni zikaza, zikaturira mu nkangara nari nikoreye.»" 
Genesis40:18 Yozefu aramubwira ati «Dore igisobanuro: Inkangara eshatu ni iminsi itatu. 
Genesis40:19 Nihashira iminsi itatu Farawo azakunamura; ariko azunamura umutwe wawe, akumanike ku giti, maze inyoni zikurye!»" 
Genesis40:20 Nuko hashize iminsi itatu, ku munsi bibukagaho ivuka rye, Farawo agirira abagaragu be bose ibirori n’isangira. Ubwo yibuka umunyanzoga mukuru n’umutetsi mukuru w’imigati, yunamura umutwe wabo." 
Genesis40:21 Umunyanzoga mukuru, Farawo amusubiza ku murimo we, yongera kujya ahereza Farawo igikombe cye;" 
Genesis40:22 naho umutetsi mukuru w’imigati, aramumanika. Biba nk’uko Yozefu yari yasobanuye inzozi zabo." 
Genesis40:23 Ariko wa munyanzoga mukuru ntiyibuka Yozefu, ahubwo aramwibagirwa." 
Genesis41:1 Imyaka ibiri ihise, Farawo na we aza kurota. Arota ahagaze ku ruzi rwa Nili;" 
Genesis41:2 abona inka ndwi nziza zibyibushye zitumburuka ziva muri Nili, zitangira kurishiriza mu rufunzo." 
Genesis41:3 Hanyuma haza izindi ndwi zizikurikiye na zo ziva muri Nili: zo zari umwaku, zinanutse. Zihagarara iruhande rw’izindi ku nkombe y’Uruzi." 
Genesis41:4 Nuko za nka ndwi zinanutse zadukira za zindi ndwi nziza zibyibushye, ziraziyongobeza. Farawo aribambura." 
Genesis41:5 Arongera aribikira, arota ubwa kabiri, ngo amahundo arindwi yera ku giti kimwe, ahunze neza, aryoheye ijisho." 
Genesis41:6 Maze andi mahundo arindwi y’iminambe, yumishijwe n’umuyaga uturuka iburasirazuba, akurikiraho, arakura." 
Genesis41:7 Ayo mahundo y’iminambe amira ya mahundo ahunze neza, atsitse uko ari arindwi. Farawo aribambura amenya ko zari inzozi." 
Genesis41:8 Mu gitondo Farawo yari yakutse umutima, ahamagaza abapfumu n’abacurabwenge bose bo mu Misiri. Farawo abarotorera inzozi ze, ariko ntihagira n’umwe ushobora kuzimusobanurira." 
Genesis41:9 Ubwo umunyanzoga mukuru abwira Farawo, ati «Uyu munsi ngiye kwirega icyaha cyanjye." 
Genesis41:10 Farawo yari yarakariye abagaragu be, maze amfungira mu nzu y’umutware w’abamurinda, jyewe n’umutetsi mukuru w’imigati." 
Genesis41:11 Tuza kurota mu ijoro rimwe, we nanjye turota inzozi zifite ibisobanuro binyuranye." 
Genesis41:12 Twari kumwe n’umusore w’Umuhebureyi, akaba umugaragu w’umutware w’abarinzi. Tumutekerereza inzozi zacu, arazisobanura; agenda asobanurira buri muntu inzozi ze." 
Genesis41:13 Biza kutugendekera nk’uko yari yabidusobanuriye: jye banshubije ku murimo wanjye w’ubuhereza, we baramumanika.»" 
Genesis41:14 Farawo aherako atumiza Yozefu. Bihutira kumukura mu buroko. Baramwogosha, ahindura imyambaro, yitaba Farawo." 
Genesis41:15 Farawo abwira Yozefu, ati «Narose, maze mbura uwansobanurira inzozi. Nyamara ariko numvise ko ngo inzozi bajya bakurotorera, ushobora kuzisobanura!»" 
Genesis41:16 Yozefu abwira Farawo, ati «Si jye, ni Imana iri busubize Farawo ijambo ry’amahoro.»" 
Genesis41:17 Farawo abwira Yozefu, ati «Narose mpagaze ku nkombe y’uruzi rwa Nili." 
Genesis41:18 Ngiye kubona, mbona muri Nili hatumburutsemo inka ndwi nziza zibyibushye, zirishiriza mu rufunzo." 
Genesis41:19 Nyuma zikurikirwa n’izindi ndwi mbi, zinanutse, zazonzwe. Sinigeze mbona inka mbi nk’izo, mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Genesis41:20 Izo nka mbi kandi zinanutse zimiragura za zindi ndwi za mbere nziza zibyibushye. 
Genesis41:21 Zinjira mu nda zazo; nyamara ntawari kumenya ko zinjiye mu gifu cyazo, kuko zakomeje kuba mbi nka mbere. Ubwo ndibambura." 
Genesis41:22 Ndongera mbona nanone mu nzozi amahundo arindwi yera ku giti kimwe, ahunze neza, aryoheye ijisho." 
Genesis41:23 Ngiye kubona, mbona andi mahundo arindwi y’iminambe, yumishijwe n’umuyaga uturuka iburasirazuba, na yo akurikiraho arakura." 
Genesis41:24 Ayo mahundo y’iminambe amira ya mahundo ahunze neza uko ari arindwi! Nabirotoreye abapfumu bose, ariko nta muntu n’umwe washoboye kubinsobanurira.»" 
Genesis41:25 Yozefu abwira Farawo, ati «Inzozi za Farawo ni zimwe. Ibyo Imana igiye kugirira Farawo, yabimuhishuriye." 
Genesis41:26 Za nka ndwi nziza ni imyaka irindwi, na ya mahundo meza arindwi, ni imyaka irindwi: ntaho bitaniye." 
Genesis41:27 Na za nka mbi ndwi zinanutse zazikurikiye, ni imyaka irindwi, kimwe na ya mahundo arindwi y’iminambe, yumishijwe n’umuyaga w’iburasirazuba: izaba imyaka irindwi y’inzara." 
Genesis41:28 Ubwo ni bwo butumwa nagombaga kubwira Farawo, kandi icyo Imana igiye gukora, yakigaragarije Farawo." 
Genesis41:29 Dore mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri hagiye kuza imyaka irindwi y’uburumbuke bwinshi. 
Genesis41:30 Hanyuma hazakurikiraho imyaka irindwi y’inzara, ubwo burumbuke bwose bwibagirane mu gihugu cya Misiri, inzara iyogoze igihugu." 
Genesis41:31 Uburumbuke bwoye kwibukwa kubera inzara izaza ibukurikiye, kuko izaba ari icyorezo." 
Genesis41:32 Kuba izo nzozi zabonekeye Farawo kabiri, ni ikimenyetso cy’uko Imana yabitegetse kandi yiyemeje kubigira vuba." 
Genesis41:33 None rero, Farawo nashake umuntu w’umunyabwenge witonda, amugire umutware w’intebe mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Genesis41:34 Farawo ashyireho abagenzuzi, bahunikishe igice cya gatanu cy’umusaruro w’igihugu cya Misiri, muri iyo myaka y’uburumbuke uko ari irindwi!" 
Genesis41:35 Bateranye ibihunikwa by’iyo myaka y’uburumbuke igiye gutaha, bahunike ingano mu migi, maze Farawo azirindishe." 
Genesis41:36 Ibyo bihunitse, bazabizigamire imyaka irindwi y’inzara izatera mu gihugu cya Misiri, bityo abaturage boye kuzarimburwa n’inzara.»" 
Genesis41:37 Iyo nama inyura Farawo n’abagaragu be bose. 
Genesis41:38 Farawo ni ko kubaza abagaragu be, ati «Umuntu nk’uyu wifitemo umwuka w’Imana azaboneka he?»" 
Genesis41:39 Farawo abwira Yozefu, ati «Ubwo Imana yakweretse ibyo byose, nta muntu w’umunyabwenge witonda kukurusha." 
Genesis41:40 Ni wowe mpaye ubutware bw’urugo rwanjye, kandi imbaga yanjye yose izumvira itegeko ryawe. Icyo nzakurusha gusa ni intebe ya cyami.»" 
Genesis41:41 Farawo abwira Yozefu, ati «Kuva ubu nkugize umutware w’igihugu cya Misiri cyose.»" 
Genesis41:42 Ni ko gukuramo impeta ye yari yambaye ku rutoki, ayambika Yozefu. Amwambika n’imyambaro myiza ya hariri, n’urunigi rwa zahabu mu ijosi." 
Genesis41:43 Amushyira ku igari rikururwa n’ifarasi, amugira umwungirije mu butegetsi. Nuko bamurangaza imbere, bakagenda bavuga bati «Nimutange inzira!» Farawo amuha rero ubutegetsi mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Genesis41:44 Nuko abwira Yozefu, ati «Jyewe ndi Farawo! Ariko nta muntu n’umwe uzarevura mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri, utabimuhereye uruhusa.»" 
Genesis41:45 Farawo yita Yozefu irindi zina, amwita Safunati‐Paneya, anamushyingira Asinata, umukobwa wa Poti‐Fera, akaba umuherezabitambo wo mu mugi witwa Oni. Nuko Yozefu atambagira igihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Genesis41:46 Yozefu, ubwo ahawe ubutware na Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, yari mu kigero cy’imyaka mirongo itatu. Yozefu asezera kuri Farawo, ngo atambagire igihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Genesis41:47 Muri iyo myaka irindwi y’ubukungu, imirima irera cyane." 
Genesis41:48 Yozefu ahunikisha ibiribwa byose by’iyo myaka irindwi y’uburumbuke bwa Misiri. Abihunika mu migi. Buri mugi akawuhunikamo imyaka y’imirima iwukikije. 
Genesis41:49 Yozefu ahunika ingano nyinshi, nyinshi cyane nk’umusenyi wo ku nkombe y’inyanja, ku buryo atongeye kwirushya abara, kuko nta washoboraga kubipima." 
Genesis41:50 Mbere y’uko inzara itera, Yozefu abyara abahungu babiri kuri Asinata umukobwa wa Poti‐Fera, umuherezabitambo wo mu mugi witwa Oni." 
Genesis41:51 Uw’imfura Yozefu amwita Manase (bisobanura ngo ’Yanyibagije’), agira ati «mbitewe n’uko Imana yanyibagije umuruho wanjye n’inzu ya data.»" 
Genesis41:52 Uwa kabiri amwita Efurayimu (bisobanura ngo ’Yampaye kororoka’), avuga ati «mbitewe n’uko Imana yampaye kororokera mu gihugu naboneyemo akababaro.»" 
Genesis41:53 Ya myaka irindwi y’uburumbuke mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri irashira. 
Genesis41:54 Hatangira kuza ya yindi irindwi y’inzara, nk’uko Yozefu yari yarabivuze. Inzara itera mu bindi bihugu byose, ariko mu Misiri hose hari ibyo kurya." 
Genesis41:55 Misiri yose imaze kuyogozwa n’inzara, abantu batakira Farawo, bamwaka ibyo kurya. Farawo abwira Abanyamisiri bose, ati «Nimusange Yozefu, mukore icyo abategetse.»" 
Genesis41:56 Inzara ikwira igihugu cyose. Yozefu ni ko gukingura ibigega byose yahunitse mu migi, agurisha Abanyamisiri ingano. Inzara iranga irakomera cyane mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Genesis41:57 Ariko ibindi bihugu biza bigana Misiri ngo bagure na Yozefu ingano. Koko rero, inzara yari yabaye icyago ku isi hose." 
Genesis42:1 Yakobo amenye ko mu Misiri hari amahaho koko, abwira abahungu be, ati «Ni kuki murebana gusa?»" 
Genesis42:2 Ati «Numvise ko mu Misiri hari amahaho. Cyo nimumanuke mujyeyo kuduhahira, tubeho, tutazashira.»" 
Genesis42:3 Bene Yakobo bamanuka ari icumi, bajya guhaha ingano mu Misiri." 
Genesis42:4 Yakobo ariko ntiyohereza Benyamini, murumuna wa Yozefu, ngo ajyane na bakuru be; kuko yibwiraga ati «Hatazagira icyago kimubaho.»" 
Genesis42:5 Bene Israheli bagera rero mu Misiri baje kugura ingano, nk’abandi bahashyi, kuko inzara yari ikaze mu gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Genesis42:6 Yozefu ni we watwaraga igihugu cyose, akaba ari we uhahisha abaturage bose. Bene se rero baraza, baramuramutsa bubitse umutwe ku butaka." 
Genesis42:7 Yozefu abonye bene se, arabamenya, ariko abahisha uwo ari we; ababwira abakanika, ati «Mbe murava he?» Bati «Tuvuye mu gihugu cya Kanahani, tuje guhaha ingano.»" 
Genesis42:8 Yozefu yari yamenye abavandimwe be, ariko bo ntibamumenya." 
Genesis42:9 Ubwo Yozefu yibuka za nzozi yari yararose ziberekeyeho. Arababwira ati «Muri abatasi! Mwazanywe no kugenzura ahatarinzwe neza mu gihugu!» 
Genesis42:10 Baramusubiza bati «Oya, shobuja! Abagaragu bawe tuje guhaha." 
Genesis42:11 Twese uko utureba turi abana b’umugabo umwe. Turavuga ukuri kuzira ikinyoma. Abagaragu bawe nta bwo turi abatasi.» 
Genesis42:12 Yozefu ati «Oya ye! Mwaje gutata ahatarinzwe neza mu gihugu.» 
Genesis42:13 Bati «Abagaragu bawe twari abavandimwe cumi na babiri, turi abana b’umugabo umwe wo mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Umuto yasigaranye na se, undi ntakiriho.»" 
Genesis42:14 Yozefu ati «Sinababwiye ko muri abatasi? 
Genesis42:15 Dore uko mugiye kugeragezwa; ndahiye Farawo, nta bwo muzava ino murumuna wanyu uwo ataje." 
Genesis42:16 Nimwohereze umwe muri mwe ajye gushaka murumuna wanyu. Mwe muzasigara mufunze, kugira ngo tubanze tugenzure ukuri kw’imvugo yanyu, tumenye niba muri mu kuri. Bitabaye ibyo, ndahiye Farawo, muzaba muri abatasi koko!»" 
Genesis42:17 Nuko abafunga iminsi itatu. 
Genesis42:18 Ku munsi wa gatatu, Yozefu arababwira ati «Nimukore uko ngiye kubabwira, mukunde mubeho. Ntinya Imana." 
Genesis42:19 Niba muvugisha ukuri, umwe muri mwe agume ino ari imbohe mu nzu mufungiyemo. Abandi mugende mujyane ingano zo kurengera imiryango yanyu ishonje." 
Genesis42:20 Hanyuma muzagarukane murumuna wanyu w’umuhererezi, kugira ngo tuzagenzure ukuri kw’imvugo yanyu, mutazapfa mugashira.» Babigenza batyo." 
Genesis42:21 Barabwirana, bati «Ni ishyano! Twese twacumuye kuri murumuna wacu igihe yari mu kaga, yishwe n’agahinda ntitumwumve, kandi atwinginga. Ni cyo gitumye natwe tugwa muri aka kaga.»" 
Genesis42:22 Rubeni ni ko kubasubiza, ati «Sinababwiye ngo ’Mwoye guhemukira uwo mwana!’ Ariko mwanze kunyumva, none dore amaraso ye arahowe.»" 
Genesis42:23 Ntibamenya yuko Yozefu ahita yumva ibyo bavugaga, kuko yari yazanye umusemuzi." 
Genesis42:24 Yozefu abasiga aho, ajya ahiherereye ararira. Hanyuma arahindukira, avugana na bo; afata Simewoni, bamuboha bene se bareba." 
Genesis42:25 Hanyuma Yozefu ategeka ko buzuza ingano mu mifuka yabo, na feza bari batanzeho ikiguzi bakazisubiza mu mufuka wa buri muntu, nyuma bakabaha impamba y’urugendo. Ni uko yabagenjereje." 
Genesis42:26 Nuko bajyana ingano zitwawe n’indogobe zabo, baragenda." 
Genesis42:27 Bageze ku icumbi, umwe muri bo aza guhambura umufuka we ngo ahe indogobe ye icyo kurya; nuko abona feza ze ziri hejuru y’ingano!" 
Genesis42:28 Abwira bene se, ati «Banshubije feza zanjye, dore ziracyari mu mufuka wanjye!» Bakuka umutima, bahinda umushyitsi, baravugana bati «Imana yatugize ite?»"
