Genesis42:29 Bageze kwa se Yakobo mu gihugu cya Kanahani, bamutekerereza ibyababayeho byose, bati" 
Genesis42:30 «Umugabo utegeka icyo gihugu yatubwiye adukanika, adufata nk’abantu baje gutata igihugu." 
Genesis42:31 Twamubwiye ko turi abantu bavugisha ukuri, tuti ’Nta bwo turi abatasi." 
Genesis42:32 Turi abavandimwe, twabyawe n’umubyeyi umwe; twari cumi na babiri, umwe ntakiriho, umuto yasigaranye na data mu gihugu cya Kanahani.’" 
Genesis42:33 Nuko uwo mugabo utegeka igihugu aratubwira ati ’Dore ikizamenyesha ko muvugisha ukuri: Nimunsigire umwe muri mwe, mwende ibyo mushyira imiryango yanyu ishonje, maze mugende." 
Genesis42:34 Muzanzanire umuhererezi wanyu: ni ho nzamenya ko mutari abatasi, ahubwo ko muvugisha ukuri. Nanjye nzabasubiza mwene so, kandi muzabona uburenganzira bwo guhaha hose.’»" 
Genesis42:35 Mu gihe cyo guhambura imifuka yabo, buri muntu akajya asanga feza ze mu isaho ye. Barabibona, na se arabibona, bashya ubwoba." 
Genesis42:36 Se Yakobo arababwira, ati «Erega mumazeho abana! Yozefu ntakiriho, Simewoni ntakiriho, none ngo mwantwara na Benyamini? Ibyo byose ni jye bigwiririye.»" 
Genesis42:37 Nuko Rubeni abwira se, ati «Nintamukugarurira uzice abahungu banjye bombi. Umunshinge nzamukugarurira.»" 
Genesis42:38 Yakobo ati «Umwana wanjye nta bwo azamanukana namwe. Mukuru we yarapfuye, asigara wenyine. Aramutse agiriye ibyago mu nzira muzacamo, mwatuma njyana imvi n’agahinda ikuzimu.»" 
Genesis43:1 Inzara mu gihugu irabiyogoza. 
Genesis43:2 Bamaze ingano bari bavanye mu Misiri, se arababwira, ati «Nimusubireyo, muduhahire icyadutunga.»" 
Genesis43:3 Yuda aramusubiza, ati «Wa mugabo yaratwihanangirije, ngo ’Ntimuzanca iryera, nimutazana murumuna wanyu.’" 
Genesis43:4 Nutwohereza turi kumwe n’umuhererezi wacu, tuzajyayo guhaha;" 
Genesis43:5 ariko nutamwohereza ntituzajyayo, kuko uwo mugabo yatubwiye ati ’Ntimuzanca iryera, nimutazana na murumuna wanyu.’»" 
Genesis43:6 Israheli arababaza, ati «Ni iki cyatumye mungirira nabi mutyo, mujya kumenyesha uwo mugabo ko mufite undi muvandimwe?»" 
Genesis43:7 Baramusubiza, bati «Uwo mugabo yaduhase ibibazo byinshi bitwerekeyeho, byerekeye n’umuryango wacu, avuga ati ’So aracyariho? Ese hari umuvandimwe wundi mugira?’ Natwe twagombye kumusubiza uko atubajije. Twashoboraga kumenya dute ko aza kutubwira, ati ’Muzamanukane murumuna wanyu’?" 
Genesis43:8 Yuda abwira se, Israheli, ati «Reka umwana mujyane. Duhaguruke tugende, tubeho tutazicwa n’inzara, nawe n’utwana twacu." 
Genesis43:9 Jyewe ndamwishingiye, uzamumbaze. Nintamukugarurira ngo mugushyikirize, nzaba ngucumuyeho bitazamvaho." 
Genesis43:10 Iyo tudatindiganya dutya, ubu tuba tuvuyeyo kabiri." 
Genesis43:11 Se Israheli ariyamirira, ati «Ubwo ari uko bimeze, nimugenze mutya: nimujyane mu mifuka yanyu imbuto zo muri iki gihugu ziruta izindi ubwiza, muzishyire uwo mugabo, muzimuture. Mujyane utubavu, ubuki, amakakama yosa, ishangi, n’ubunyobwa n’ibindi nk’ibyo." 
Genesis43:12 Kandi mujyane na feza z’ingereka, hamwe na feza zagarutse mu mifuka yanyu; ahari ni amazinda yatumye zigaruka." 
Genesis43:13 Mujyane na murumuna wanyu, muhaguruke musubire kuri uwo mugabo." 
Genesis43:14 Imana Nyir’ububasha izabahe kubabarirwa n’uwo mugabo, azabareke mutahane na mwene so wundi, na Benyamini! Jyeweho ngiye gusigara nta mwana, nk’aho nta bo nigeze.»" 
Genesis43:15 Abo bagabo benda ayo maturo bajyana feza z’ingereka, bajyana na Benyamini. Nuko barahaguruka, bamanuka basubiza iya Misiri. Bahinguka imbere ya Yozefu." 
Genesis43:16 Yozefu ngo abone Benyamini ari kumwe na bo, abwira igisonga cye, ati «Injiza aba bantu mu nzu yanjye, ubage, utegure ibyo kurya, kuko nza gusangira na bo.»" 
Genesis43:17 Uwo mugabo akora ibyo Yozefu yamutegetse. Yinjiza abo bagabo mu nzu ya Yozefu. 
Genesis43:18 Ubwoba burabataha, babonye ko babinjije mu nzu ya Yozefu. Baribwira bati «Turazira feza bashyize mu mifuka yacu igihe duheruka ino. Baratujyanye hamwe n’indogobe zacu ngo batwiroheho, batugirire nabi, tubabere abacakara.»" 
Genesis43:19 Nuko begera cya gisonga cya Yozefu, bageze ku muryango iwe baravuga bati" 
Genesis43:20 «Shobuja, mbere twaramanutse tuje guhaha;" 
Genesis43:21 tugeze ku icumbi, duhambura imifuka yacu, umuntu wese asanga feza ze ziri hejuru y’ingano. Izo feza zacu dusanga zingana uko zanganaga, none turazigaruye," 
Genesis43:22 kandi tuzanye izindi feza zo guhaha. Nta bwo tuzi uwashubije feza za mbere mu mifuka yacu.» 
Genesis43:23 Arabasubiza ati «Mushyitse umutima mu nda, ntimugire ubwoba. Imana yanyu, Imana ya so yashyize ubukungu mu mifuka yanyu. Feza zanyu nari nazibonye.» Nuko asohora Simewoni, aramubazanira." 
Genesis43:24 Nuko uwo mugabo abinjiza mu nzu ya Yozefu, abahereza amazi, boga ibirenge, aha ubwatsi indogobe zabo." 
Genesis43:25 Begeranya amaturo kugira ngo Yozefu naza ku manywa bayamuture, kuko bari bumvise ko bari buze kuhasangirira." 
Genesis43:26 Yozefu yinjira mu nzu, bamutura amaturo bari bafite. Hanyuma bamuramutsa bubitse umutwe ku butaka." 
Genesis43:27 Yozefu ababaza uko bameze. Arongera ati «So, wa musaza mwavugaga, aracyariho? Ni muzima?»" 
Genesis43:28 Baramusubiza bati «Data, umugaragu wawe, aracyariho; ni muzima.» Hanyuma barapfukama baramwunamira." 
Genesis43:29 Yozefu yubura amaso abona Benyamini murumuna we, mwene nyina. Arababaza ati «Uyu ni we murumuna wanyu w’umuhererezi mwambwiye?» Hanyuma ati «Imana ikugirire ubuntu, mwana wanjye.»" 
Genesis43:30 Nuko Yozefu amaze kubona murumuna we, agira ikiniga, asohoka vuba vuba, yinjira mu cyumba cye, araturika ararira." 
Genesis43:31 Amaze kwiyuha amarira, aragaruka, arikomeza, maze aravuga ati «Nimuhereze ibyo gufungura.»" 
Genesis43:32 Bamuhereza ukwe, babahereza ukwabo. Abanyamisiri basangiraga na Yozefu babahereza ukwabo; ntibashoboraga gusangira n’Abahebureyi: kuri bo ryaba ari ishyano mu Misiri." 
Genesis43:33 Babicaza imbere ye, umukuru mu mwanya w’ubukuru bwe, umuhererezi mu mwanya w’ubuhererezi: bararebana baratangara." 
Genesis43:34 Yozefu ategeka ko babaha ku biryo byari imbere ye. Igaburo rya Benyamini barikuba incuro eshanu. Baranywa baranezerwa, hamwe na we." 
Genesis44:1 Hanyuma Yozefu ategeka igisonga cye, ati «Uzuza ingano mu mifuka ya bariya bantu, uko bashobora kuyikorera; hanyuma hejuru mu mufuka wa buri wese ushyiremo feza ze." 
Genesis44:2 Byongeye, hejuru mu mufuka w’umuhererezi ushyiremo inkongoro yanjye ya feza, uyishyiranemo n’ikiguzi cy’ingano ze.» Nuko abigenza uko Yozefu yari yabivuze." 
Genesis44:3 Igitondo gitangaje, bohereza abo bantu n’indogobe zabo." 
Genesis44:4 Bakiva mu mugi kandi bataragera kure, Yozefu abwira igisonga cye, ati «Haguruka, wiruke ukurikire bariya bantu, ubafate, maze ubabwire uti ’Kuki mwitura inabi ineza?" 
Genesis44:5 Mbese icyo mwibye si inkongoro databuja anywesha, kandi akayikoresha aragura. Mwagize nabi rwose.’»" 
Genesis44:6 Nuko uwo mugabo amaze kubafata, ababwira ayo magambo." 
Genesis44:7 Baramusubiza bati «Kuki databuja yavuga atyo? Ntibikabe yuko abagaragu bawe bakora ikintu kimeze gityo! 
Genesis44:8 Twakugaruriye feza twasanze mu mifuka yacu y’ingano, tuzikugarurira tuzikuye mu gihugu cya Kanahani; bishoboka bite ko twakwiba mu nzu ya shobuja feza cyangwa zahabu?" 
Genesis44:9 Uwo mu bagaragu bawe basangana icyo kintu bamwice! Natwe ubwacu duhinduke abacakara ba databuja!» 
Genesis44:10 Arabasubiza ati «Ngaho rero, nibibe uko mwabivuze. Uwo dusangana icyo kintu araba umucakara wanjye, naho mwebwe mube abere.»" 
Genesis44:11 Ako kanya buri muntu ashyira hasi umufuka we w’ingano arawufungura. 
Genesis44:12 Uwo Munyamisiri atangira gusaka ahereye ku uw’imfura, aherukira ku muhererezi; basanga inkongoro mu mufuka wa Benyamini." 
Genesis44:13 Nuko bashishimura imyambaro yabo; bongera guhekesha imitwaro indogobe zabo, buri muntu yongera gukorera indogobe ye, bagaruka mu mugi." 
Genesis44:14 Yuda na bene se bageze kwa Yozefu, na we yari agihari, bikubita hasi imbere ye." 
Genesis44:15 Yozefu arabatonganya, ati «Mwakoze ibiki? Ntimwari muzi ko umuntu nkanjye aragura?»" 
Genesis44:16 Nuko Yuda aramusubiza ati «Twabwira iki se databuja? Twavuga iki? Twiregure dute? Ni Imana yagaragaje icyaha cy’abagaragu bawe. Dore turi abacakara ba databuja, twese n’uwo basanganye inkongoro.»" 
Genesis44:17 Maze ariko Yozefu arabasubiza ati «Gukora ntyo ntibikambeho; umuntu bafatanye inkongoro yanjye ni we uzambera umucakara, naho mwe nimutahe kwa so amahoro.»" 
Genesis44:18 Nuko Yuda aramwegera, maze aravuga ati «Nyamuneka, shobuja, ndakwinginze ngo wemerere umugaragu wawe agire icyo abwira databuja. Wirakarira umugaragu wawe, n’ubwo uri nka Farawo ubwe." 
Genesis44:19 Databuja ubwe yari yabajije abagaragu be, ati ’Mbese muracyafite so n’umuvandimwe wundi?’" 
Genesis44:20 Nuko dusubiza databuja, tuti ’Dufite umukambwe n’agahererezi yabyaye mu busaza bwe; uwo bava inda imwe we yarapfuye. Nta mwene nyina wundi asigaranye kandi data aramukunda.’" 
Genesis44:21 Hanyuma wabwiye abagaragu bawe, uti ’Muzamunzanire murebe’." 
Genesis44:22 Dusubiza databuja, tuti ’Uwo mwana ntashobora kuva iruhande rwa se; aramutse ahavuye, se yapfa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Nawe urakomeza ubwira abagaragu bawe, uti ’Umuhererezi wanyu natamanukana namwe, ntimuzongera kumbona.’" 
Genesis44:24 Igihe rero dusubiye kwa data, umugaragu wawe, twamushyikirije ubutumwa bwa databuja." 
Genesis44:25 Hanyuma data atubwiye ati ’Nimusubireyo, mujye kuduhahira’," 
Genesis44:26 turamusubiza tuti ’Nta bwo dushobora kumanuka. Icyakora turi kumwe n’umuhererezi wacu, twakwemera tukagenda, naho ubundi ntitwabonana n’uwo muntu, tutari kumwe n’umuhererezi wacu.’" 
Genesis44:27 Nuko umugaragu wawe, data, aratubwira ati ’Muzi ko umugore wanjye twabyaranye abana babiri gusa." 
Genesis44:28 Umwe naramubuze, hanyuma ndavuga nti: nta kabuza yatanyagujwe n’inyamaswa! Kandi kugeza ubu sindongera kumubona." 
Genesis44:29 None mwongeye kuntwara n’uyu nguyu! Naramuka agize ibyago, muzatuma imvi zanjye zimanukana ishavu ikuzimu.’" 
Genesis44:30 None ubu ningera imbere y’umugaragu wawe, ari we data, ntari kumwe n’umwana, akabona ntagarukanye umwana umutima we wiziritseho, arahita apfa!" 
Genesis44:31 Ubwo rero, abagaragu bawe bazaba bamanuranye ishavu imvi z’umugaragu wawe, data, ikuzimu." 
Genesis44:32 Menya ko jyewe, umugaragu wawe, nishingiye uyu mwana imbere ya se, ngira nti ’Niba ntamukugaruriye nzaba ngukoreye icyaha nzagumana iteka’." 
Genesis44:33 Noneho emera ko jyewe, umugaragu wawe, nsigara aha, mbe umucakara wa databuja, mu cyimbo cy’umwana, naho we ajyane na bene se!" 
Genesis44:34 Rwose nshobora nte gutunguka imbere ya data ntari hamwe n’umwana? Sinkabone ibyago bizagwira data!» 
Genesis45:1 Nuko Yozefu ananirwa kwitsinda imbere y’abo bari kumwe bose, arangurura ijwi, ati «Nimusohore abantu bose bambise.» Nuko ntihagira usigara iruhande rwe, igihe Yozefu yibwiraga bene se." 
Genesis45:2 Maze araboroga arira, nuko Abanyamisiri baramwumva, ndetse n’abo mu ngoro ya Farawo." 
Genesis45:3 Yozefu abwira bene se, ati «Ndi Yozefu! Data aracyariho?» Nuko bene se ntibashobora kumusubiza, kuko badagadwaga imbere ye." 
Genesis45:4 Maze Yozefu abwira bene se ati «Nimwigire hino.» Nuko baramwegera. Aravuga ati «Ndi Yozefu umuvandimwe wanyu mwaguze mu Misiri. 
Genesis45:5 Noneho nimushire agahinda, kandi mwibabazwa n’uko mwangurishije hano. Ni Imana yanyohereje imbere yanyu kugira ngo ndamire ubuzima bwanyu." 
Genesis45:6 Koko kandi dore inzara imaze imyaka ibiri mu gihugu, kandi hasigaye imyaka itanu batazahinga, ntibasarure." 
Genesis45:7 Imana yanyohereje imbere yanyu, kugira ngo mbahunikire ibiryo mu gihugu, mushobore kubaho, irokore ityo benshi muri mwe." 
Genesis45:8 Maze rero nta bwo ari mwe mwanyohereje hano, ni Imana kandi yangize nka se wa Farawo, ingira umuyobozi w’urugo rwe rwose, n’umutware w’igihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Genesis45:9 Ngaho nimwihute muzamuke, musange data, maze mumubwire muti ’Dore uko umwana wawe Yozefu avuze: Imana yangize umutware wa Misiri yose, manuka unsange udatinze." 
Genesis45:10 Uzatura mu gihugu cya Gosheni kandi uzaba hafi yanjye, wowe ubwawe, abana bawe, abuzukuru bawe, umukumbi n’amashyo yawe, n’ibyo utunze byose." 
Genesis45:11 Ni ho nzaguteganyiriza ibizagutunga, byatuma udakena, wowe n’urugo rwawe, n’abawe bose, kuko inzara ishigaje imyaka itanu.’" 
Genesis45:12 Namwe murareba, kandi na mwene mama Benyamini arirebera ko ari jyewe ubwanjye ubibwirira." 
Genesis45:13 Muzabwire data ikuzo ryose mfite mu Misiri, n’ibyo mwabonye byose, kandi muzihutire kumanukana data hano.»" 
Genesis45:14 Maze Yozefu agwa mu nda ya mwene nyina Benyamini, asuka amarira. Benyamini na we ararira bahoberana." 
Genesis45:15 Ahobera na bene se arira, hanyuma bene se baganira na we." 
Genesis45:16 Inkuru igera mu ngoro ya Farawo ngo: Bene se wa Yozefu baje. Nuko Farawo n’abagaba be babyakira neza. 
Genesis45:17 Farawo abwira Yozefu, ati «Bwira abo muva inda imwe, uti ’Nimugenze mutya: nimwihutishe indogobe zanyu, musubire mu gihugu cya Kanahani;" 
Genesis45:18 muzagarukane na so n’umuryango wanyu maze munsange. Nzabaha ameza mu masambu yo mu Misiri, maze muzatungwe n’ibyiza by’igihugu.’" 
Genesis45:19 Naho wowe, ubategeke uti ’Dore uko muzabigenza: Muzajyane amagare yo mu Misiri kugira ngo abahekere abana n’abagore, na so, hanyuma muze." 
Genesis45:20 Ntimuzicuze ibyo muzasiga, kuko ibyiza byose byo mu Misiri bizaba ari ibyanyu.’»" 
Genesis45:21 Bene Israheli babigenza batyo. Yozefu abaha amagare, abahambirira n’impamba, uko Farawo yabitegetse." 
Genesis45:22 Aha buri muntu muri bo, umwenda w’umurimbo, naho Benyamini amuha amasikeli ya feza magana atatu, n’imyenda itanu y’umurimbo." 
Genesis45:23 Na se amwoherereza indogobe cumi zikoreye ibyiza byo mu Misiri, hamwe n’indogobe cumi z’ingore bari bakoreye ingano, n’imigati n’impamba yari yageneye se." 
Genesis45:24 Nuko asezera kuri bene se, ariko abanje kubihanangiriza, ati «Muramenye ntimutonganire mu nzira.»" 
Genesis45:25 Nuko bava mu Misiri, bagera mu gihugu cya Kanahani, kwa se Yakobo." 
Genesis45:26 Baramubwira bati «Yozefu aracyariho, ndetse ni na we mutware wa Misiri yose!» Maze ariko umutima wa Yakobo urakakara, ntiyabemera." 
Genesis45:27 Nyamara bamaze gusubira mu magambo yose Yozefu yari yababwiye, amaze no kubona amagare Yozefu yari yamwoherereje kugira ngo amuzane, Yakobo arahembuka." 
Genesis45:28 Nuko Israheli aravuga ati «Nimurekere aho! Noneho nemeye ko Yozefu umwana wanjye akiriho! Reka njye kumureba, ntarapfa.»" 
Genesis46:1 Israheli ashyira nzira, ajyana ibyo yari atunze byose. Ageze i Berisheba, atura ibitambo Imana ya se Izaki." 
Genesis46:2 Nuko Imana ibwira Israheli imubonekeye nijoro mu nzozi, iti «Yakobo, Yakobo». Na we arasubiza ati «Ndi hano»." 
Genesis46:3 Iramubwira iti «Ndi Imana, Imana ya so. Witinya kujya mu Misiri, kuko nzahakugirira umuryango ukomeye." 
Genesis46:4 Nzamanukana nawe mu Misiri; byongeye kandi, ni jye uzakuzamurayo. Kandi Yozefu ni we uzahumbya amaso yawe.»" 
Genesis46:5 Yakobo ava i Berisheba. Nuko abahungu ba Israheli bashyira se, abana babo, n’abagore babo ku magare Farawo yari yohereje ngo abazane." 
Genesis46:6 Bajyana imikumbi yabo n’ibyo bari barungukiye mu gihugu cya Kanahani byose. Nuko Yakobo agenda yerekeza mu Misiri, hamwe n’urubyaro rwe rwose." 
Genesis46:7 Abahungu be n’abakobwa be, n’abana babo bose, mbese urubyaro rwe rwose, abajyana mu Misiri." 
Genesis46:8 Dore amazina y’abahungu ba Israheli, ari we Yakobo, uko bagiye mu Misiri. Rubeni, imfura ya Yakobo." 
Genesis46:9 Bene Rubeni ni Hanoki, Palu, Hesironi na Karumi." 
Genesis46:10 Bene Simewoni ni Yemuweli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Sohari, na Sawuli, umuhungu w’Umukanahanikazi." 
Genesis46:11 Bene Levi ni Gerishoni, Kehati na Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Bene Yuda ni Eri, Onani, Shela, Pereshi na Zera. Ariko Eri na Onani bari baraguye mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Bene Pereshi ni Hesironi na Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Bene Isakari ni Tola, Puwa, Yobu na Shimeroni." 
Genesis46:14 Bene Zabuloni ni Seredi, Eloni na Yahuleyeli." 
Genesis46:15 Abo ni bo bahungu Leya yabyariye Yakobo mu kibaya cya Aramu; yamubyariye kandi n’umukobwa Dina. Bose hamwe, abahungu n’abakobwa bari mirongo itatu na batatu." 
Genesis46:16 Bene Gadi ni Sifiyoni, Hagi, Shuni, Esiboni, Eri, Arodi na Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Bene Asheri ni Yimuna, Yishiwa, Yishiwi, Beriya na mushiki wabo Sera. Bene Beriya ni Heberi na Malikiyeli." 
Genesis46:18 Abo ni bo bahungu ba Zilipa, umuja Labani yari yarahaye umukobwa we Leya. Abo ni bo yabyariye Yakobo, abantu cumi na batandatu." 
Genesis46:19 Abana ba Rasheli muka Yakobo ni Yozefu na Benyamini. 
Genesis46:20 Yozefu yabyariye mu Misiri Manase na Efurayimu, ababyarana na Asinata, umukobwa wa Poti‐Fera, umuherezabitambo wo mu mugi witwa Oni." 
Genesis46:21 Bene Benyamini ni Bela, Bekeri, Ashibeli, Gera, Nahamani, Ehi, Roshi, Mupimu, Hupimu na Aridi." 
Genesis46:22 Abo ni bo bahungu Rasheli yabyariye Yakobo; bose hamwe ni abantu cumi na bane. 
Genesis46:23 Mwene Dani ni Hushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Bene Nefutali ni Yahiceli, Guni, Yezeri na Shilemu." 
Genesis46:25 Abo ni bo bana ba Biliha, umuja Labani yari yarahaye umukobwa we Rasheli. Abo ni bo yabyariye Yakobo, abantu barindwi." 
Genesis46:26 Abantu bose bo mu muryango wa Yakobo bamukomokaho, basuhukiye mu Misiri, abagore b’abahungu ba Yakobo batabariwemo, bari mirongo itandatu na batandatu." 
Genesis46:27 Abahungu Yozefu yabyariye mu Misiri bari babiri. Umubare w’abantu bose bo mu nzu ya Yakobo bagiye mu Misiri bari mirongo irindwi. 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo atuma Yuda kuri Yozefu ngo bahurire muri Gosheni. Nuko bagera mu gihugu cya Gosheni. 
Genesis46:29 Yozefu ateguza igare rye, maze ajya gusanganira se Israheli muri Gosheni. Akimubona, aherako amugwa mu nda, ararira, bishyira kera amuhobera." 
Genesis46:30 Israheli abwira Yozefu, ati «Noneho n’aho napfa nta cyo bitwaye, ubwo maze kukubona ukaba ukiriho.»" 
Genesis46:31 Nuko Yozefu abwira abavandimwe be n’umuryango wa se, ati «Ngiye kubimenyesha Farawo, maze mubwire nti ’Abavandimwe banjye n’inzu ya data bari batuye mu gihugu cya Kanahani baje bansanga." 
Genesis46:32 Abo bantu ni abashumba, borora amatungo. Bazanye imikumbi n’amashyo yabo n’ibiri ibyabo byose.’" 
Genesis46:33 Bityo Farawo nabahamagara akababaza, ati ’Umwuga wanyu ni uwuhe?’" 
Genesis46:34 muze kumusubiza, muti ’Abagaragu bawe turi abashumba kuva mu buto bwacu kugeza ubu, twebwe ubwacu kimwe na ba sogokuru bacu.’ Bityo muzashobora gutura mu gihugu cya Gosheni, kuko Abanyamisiri bazira uwitwa umushumba wese.»" 
Genesis47:1 Nuko Yozefu ajya kubimenyesha Farawo, ati «Data n’abo tuva inda imwe baje bava mu gihugu cya Kanahani bazanye imikumbi n’amashyo yabo, n’ibyo batunze byose. Ubu bari mu karere ka Gosheni.»" 
Genesis47:2 Yozefu yari yajyanye na bene se batanu, abasohoza kwa Farawo." 
Genesis47:3 Nuko Farawo abaza abo bavandimwe ba Yozefu, ati «Umwuga wanyu ni uwuhe?» Baramusubiza bati «Abagaragu bawe turi abashumba, twe kimwe n’abasokuru.»" 
Genesis47:4 Babwira kandi Farawo, bati «Twasuhukiye muri iki gihugu, kuko amashyo y’abagaragu bawe yabuze urwuri. Inzara iraca ibintu mu gihugu cya Kanahani, none turagusaba ngo wemerere abagaragu bawe gutura mu karere ka Gosheni.»" 
Genesis47:5 Nuko Farawo abwira Yozefu, ati «So n’abavandimwe bawe bagusanze." 
Genesis47:6 Igihugu cya Misiri ni icyawe: uhe so n’abavandimwe bawe ahantu harusha ahandi kuba heza. Nibature muri Gosheni. Kandi niba hari abo uzi muri bo babishoboye, ubagire abashumba b’amashyo yanjye.»" 
Genesis47:7 Yozefu yinjiza se Yakobo, amushyikiriza Farawo; nuko Yakobo asuhuza Farawo." 
Genesis47:8 Farawo abaza Yakobo, ati «Umaze imyaka ingahe?»" 
Genesis47:9 Nuko Yakobo asubiza Farawo, ati «Imyaka maze ngenda ni ijana na mirongo itatu. Iyo myaka yanjye ni mike, kandi nayigizemo ingorane, nta n’ubwo igeze ku myaka ba sokuruza bamaraga mu ngendo zabo.»" 
Genesis47:10 Yakobo asezera kuri Farawo, arikubura aragenda." 
Genesis47:11 Yozefu atuza se na bene se, abakebera isambu mu karere ka Ramusesi, aharusha ahandi kuba heza muri Misiri yose, uko Farawo yari yabitegetse." 
Genesis47:12 Yozefu agenera se ibizamutunga, abigenera bene se n’inzu ya se yose, akurikije uko abantu banganaga." 
Genesis47:13 Mu gihugu hose bari babuze icyo barya, kuko inzara yacaga ibintu, bigatuma rubanda bahondobera mu Misiri yose no mu gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Genesis47:14 Yozefu akoranya feza zose zari mu gihugu cya Misiri n’izavaga mu gihugu cya Kanahani, izo bahahishaga ingano, azohereza mu ngoro ya Farawo." 
Genesis47:15 Feza zose zari mu Misiri n’izari mu gihugu cya Kanahani zimaze gushira, Abanyamisiri bose basanga Yozefu, baramubwira bati «Duhe icyo kurya! Ese tukugwe mu maso, kuko nta feza tugifite?»" 
Genesis47:16 Nuko Yozefu arababwira ati «Munzanire amatungo yanyu. Niba nta feza mugifite ibyo kurya ndabibaguranira, mumpe amatungo yanyu.»" 
Genesis47:17 Bazanira Yozefu amatungo yabo, na we abaha ibyo kurya, akurikije ikiguzi cy’amafarasi, intama, ihene, inka n’indogobe. Abaha ibyo kurya uwo mwaka wose, abiguranye amatungo yabo." 
Genesis47:18 Umwaka urashira; ukurikiyeho barongera baramusanga baramubwira, bati «Nta cyo dushobora guhisha databuja: rwose feza zadushizeho, kandi amashyo yacu yose yabaye aya databuja. Nta cyo dusigaranye twazanira databuja, keretse twebwe ubwacu n’ubutaka bwacu." 
Genesis47:19 Ese tukugwe mu maso? Ubutaka bwacu nta cyo bukitumariye. Tugure twe n’ubutaka bwacu; uduhe icyo kurya, twe n’ubutaka bwacu tuzaba imbata za Farawo. Maze ariko uduhe imbuto, kugira ngo dushobore kubaho, twe gupfa kandi n’ubutaka bwacu bwe kurara.»" 
Genesis47:20 Nguko uko Yozefu yaguriye Farawo ubutaka bwose bwa Misiri: buri Munyamisiri wese yagurishaga umurima we, ku mpamvu y’inzara yari yabatangatanze, nuko igihugu cyose gihinduka icya Farawo." 
Genesis47:21 Naho rubanda bahinduka abacakara be, kuva ku rubibi rw’igihugu cya Misiri kugera ku rundi." 
Genesis47:22 Keretse ubutaka bw’abaherezabitambo bwonyine, ni bwo Yozefu ataguze, kuko Farawo yari yaciye iteka riberekeyeho: ngo abaherezabitambo bazajya batungwa n’ibyo Farawo yemeye kubaha. Ni cyo cyatumye batagurisha ubutaka bwabo." 
Genesis47:23 Hanyuma Yozefu abwira rubanda, ati «Noneho ubu narabaguze, mwe n’ubutaka bwanyu muri aba Farawo. Muzahabwa imbuto kugira ngo muhinge ubutaka bwanyu." 
Genesis47:24 Ariko mu byo muzasarura, muzagomba kujya muha Farawo umugabane wa gatanu, naho indi migabane uko ari ine ibe iyanyu, muyikuremo imbuto n’ibibatunga, mwe, imiryango yanyu, n’abana banyu." 
Genesis47:25 Baramusubiza, bati «Waramiye ubuzima bwacu. Dupfa gusa kugira ubutoni kuri databuja, tuzaba abacakara ba Farawo.»" 
Genesis47:26 Kubera ibyo, Yozefu ashyirishaho itegeko rigenga ubutaka bwa Misiri kugeza na magingo aya: umugabane wa gatanu uhabwa Farawo, keretse ubutaka bw’abaherezabitambo, ni bwo butabaye ubwa Farawo." 
Genesis47:27 Israheli atura mu Misiri mu karere ka Gosheni. Abayisraheli bungukirayo ibintu, barororoka, baba benshi cyane." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo amara imyaka cumi n’irindwi mu gihugu cya Misiri; iminsi yose Yakobo yabayeho, ni imyaka ijana na mirongo ine n’irindwi." 
Genesis47:29 Israheli yumvise ko igihe cye cyo gupfa kigeze, ahamagara umwana we Yozefu, aramubwira ati «Niba unkunda koko, shyira ikiganza cyawe mu nsi y’ikibero cyanjye, ungirire ubuntu n’ubudahemuka, unsezeranire ko utazampamba mu Misiri." 
Genesis47:30 Nimara gusanga ba sokuruza, uzamvane mu Misiri maze umpambe mu mva yabo.» Aramusubiza ati «Nzabigenza uko uvuze.»" 
Genesis47:31 Maze ariko Yakobo abikomeraho, ati «Ndahira!» Yozefu aramurahira, nuko Israheli yunama ku musego, amushimira." 
Genesis48:1 Ibyo bimaze kuba, baza kubwira Yozefu, bati «So ararwaye.» Nuko ajyana abahungu be bombi, Manase na Efurayimu." 
Genesis48:2 Babwiye Yakobo, bati «Dore umwana wawe Yozefu yaje kukureba», Israheli arihangana, yicara ku buriri." 
Genesis48:3 Yakobo abwira Yozefu, ati «Imana Nyir’ububasha yambonekeye i Luzi mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Yampaye umugisha," 
Genesis48:4 maze irambwira, iti ’Nzaguha kororoka no kugwira, nzaguhindura imbaga y’imiryango. Kandi iki gihugu nzagiha urubyaro rwawe, kibe ubukonde iteka ryose.’" 
Genesis48:5 None rero, abahungu bombi wabyariye mu Misiri, mbere yuko ngusanga mu Misiri, ni abanjye. Efurayimu na Manase bazaba abanjye kimwe na Rubeni na Simewoni." 
Genesis48:6 Naho abana wakurikijeho bazaba abawe; bazahabwa umurage wabo babikesheje bakuru babo. 
Genesis48:7 Igihe navaga mu kibaya cya Aramu, nababajwe no gupfusha nyoko Rasheli mu gihugu cya Kanahani, dushigaje gato ngo tugere Efurata. Ni ho namuhambye, iruhande rw’inzira igana Efurata, ari yo Betelehemu.»" 
Genesis48:8 Israheli abona abahungu bombi ba Yozefu, maze arabaza ati «Abo ni ba nde?»" 
Genesis48:9 Yozefu asubiza se, ati «Ni abahungu Imana yampereye ino.» Na we aramubwira ati «Banyegereze mbahe umugisha.»" 
Genesis48:10 Ubusaza bwari bwaratumye Israheli ahuma amaso, ntiyari akibona. Yozefu arabamwegereza, undi arabasoma, arabahobera." 
Genesis48:11 Nuko Israheli abwira Yozefu, ati «Nta bwo nari ngifite icyizere cyo kukubona, nyamara dore Imana impaye no kubona none urubyaro rwawe!»" 
Genesis48:12 Yozefu abavana ku bibero bya se, maze aramwunamira." 
Genesis48:13 Yozefu afata abahungu be bombi; Efurayimu amufatisha ukuboko kwe kw’iburyo kugira ngo abe ibumoso bw’Israheli, Manase amufatisha ukw’ibumoso kugira ngo abe iburyo bw’Israheli. Nuko arabamwegereza." 
Genesis48:14 Nyamara ariko Israheli aramburira ukuboko kwe kw’iburyo ku mutwe wa Efurayimu wari umuhererezi, aramburira ukuboko kwe kw’ibumoso ku mutwe wa Manase, anyuranyije amaboko. Manase ni we wari imfura." 
Genesis48:15 Aha Yozefu umugisha, agira ati «Imana ba sogokuru Abrahamu na Izaki bagenze imbere, Imana yandagiye mu buzima bwanjye bwose kugeza ubu," 
Genesis48:16 ikaba ari yo Mumalayika wandinze ibibi byose, nihe aba bahungu umugisha. Maze kubera bo, izina ryanjye risingizwe, kimwe n’aya ba sogokuru Abrahamu na Izaki. Aba bana bazagwire, bakwire igihugu!»" 
Genesis48:17 Yozefu abonye ko se yari yashyize ikiganza cy’iburyo ku mutwe wa Efurayimu, biramubabaza. Afata ikiganza cya se kugira ngo agikure ku mutwe wa Efurayimu, agishyire ku mutwe wa Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Ati «Data, wibigenza utyo, kuko uyu ari we mfura. Shyira ikiganza cyawe cy’iburyo ku mutwe we.»" 
Genesis48:19 Se ariko aranga, ati «Ndabizi, mwana wanjye, ndabizi. Na we azahinduka umuryango, na we azaba igihangange. Nyamara murumuna we azamurusha kuba igihangange, urubyaro rwe ruzaba imiryango myinshi.»" 
Genesis48:20 Nuko uwo munsi abaha umugisha, avuga ati «Dore uko muri Israheli bazifurizanya umugisha: bazavuga bati ’Imana irakakugira nka Efurayimu na Manase.’» Ashyira atyo Efurayimu imbere ya Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Hanyuma Israheli abwira Yozefu, ati «Dore ngiye gupfa, ariko Imana izabana namwe kandi izabasubiza mu gihugu cy’abasokuru." 
Genesis48:22 Byongeye, nkuraze umugabane usumba uwa bene so, ari wo Sikemu nanyaze Abahemori, nyibanyagisha inkota n’umuheto.»" 
Genesis49:1 Yakobo ahamagaza abana be, maze arababwira ati «Nimuterane, mbamenyeshe ibizababaho mu bihe bizaza." 
Genesis49:2 Nimwegerane mwumve, bana ba Yakobo, mwumve so Israheli." 
Genesis49:3 Rubeni, uri imfura yanjye, imbaraga zanjye, umuganura w’ingufu zanjye. Wuzuye ishema n’ububasha." 
Genesis49:4 Wisumagira nk’amazi yo mu isumo! Kuko wuriye uburiri bwa so, ukanduza uburyamo bwanjye." 
Genesis49:5 Simewoni na Levi ni abavandimwe, inkota zabo zifatanya mu bwicanyi." 
Genesis49:6 Umutima wanjye ntukajye mu migambi yabo, sinkifatanye n’amateraniro yabo; kuko bishe abantu mu burakari bwabo, maze mu burahuke bwabo bagatema ibitsi by’amapfizi!" 
Genesis49:7 Burakavumwa uburakari bwabo bukaze, n’umujinya wabo ukabije! Nzabavangura muri Yakobo, mbanyanyagize muri Israheli." 
Genesis49:8 Yuda, woweho abo muva inda imwe bazagusingiza. Ukuboko kwawe gutsikamiye ijosi ry’abanzi bawe, na bene so bazagupfukamira." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda, uri nk’icyana cy’intare, mwana wanjye, uzamutse uvuye ku rugamba! Yaciye bugufi, abunda nk’intare, kandi nk’intare y’ingore, ni nde wamutsimbura?" 
Genesis49:10 Inkoni y’ubwami ntizatirimuka mwa Yuda, n’inkoni y’ubutware ntizajya kure y’ibirenge bye, kugeza igihe Uwo igenewe azazira, Uwo amahanga azayoboka." 
Genesis49:11 Azirika ku muzabibu indogobe ye, ku ishami ryawo umutavu w’indogobe ye y’ingore. Amesa umwambaro we muri divayi, n’igishura cye mu mutuku w’imizabibu." 
Genesis49:12 Amaso ye yatukujwe na divayi, n’amenyo ye yezwa n’amata." 
Genesis49:13 Zabuloni azatura ku nkombe y’inyanja, ku cyambu cy’amato, Sidoni bazagabana imbibi." 
Genesis49:14 Isakari ni indogobe ikomeye, iryamye mu nzitiro rwagati." 
Genesis49:15 Yumvise uko kuruhuka ari byiza, kandi abona ko igihugu gihimbaje, maze atega umugongo ngo bamukorere, yemera imirimo y’uburetwa." 
Genesis49:16 Dani azaca imanza mu muryango we, nk’uko indi miryango ya Israheli ibigenza." 
Genesis49:17 Dani arabe inzoka mu muhanda, impiri mu kayira, iruma ifarasi ku gitsi, maze uwo yari ihetse agacuranguka." 
Genesis49:18 Uhoraho, niringiye agakiza kawe!" 
Genesis49:19 Gadi, abambuzi baramwambura, na we akambura abasigaye inyuma." 
Genesis49:20 Asheri agira ibyo kurya binuze, akagabura ibyo kurya bikwiye umwami." 
Genesis49:21 Nefutali ni imparakazi yiruka cyane, ikabyara ibyana biteye ubwuzu." 
Genesis49:22 Yozefu ni urugemwe rushinze hafi y’isoko idudubiza, amashami yarwo akarenga hejuru y’urukuta rw’urugo." 
Genesis49:23 Abarashi baramugondoje, bamurasa bamusagariye." 
Genesis49:24 Ariko umuheto we ntiwavunwe, n’amaboko ye yagumanye umurego, abikesheje ikiganza cy’Imana, Nyir’ubutwari ya Yakobo, n’izina ry’Umushumba n’Urutare bya Israheli," 
Genesis49:25 abikesheje Imana, Imana ya so, ihora igufasha, na Nyir’ububasha uguha umugisha! Imigisha y’ijuru mu kirere, imigisha y’inyenga ibundikiye ikuzimu, imigisha y’amabere n’iy’inda ibyara!" 
Genesis49:26 Dore imigisha ya so isumba imigisha y’imisozi yahozeho n’ibyifuzo by’imirambi ya kera: irakoranire ku mutwe wa Yozefu, ku ruhanga rw’uwagizwe indatwa mu bavandimwe be." 
Genesis49:27 Benyamini ni ikirura gitanyagura, mu gitondo aconshomera icyo yishe, nimugoroba akagabagabanya iminyago.»" 
Genesis49:28 Abo bose ni bo bagize imiryango cumi n’ibiri ya Israheli. Kandi ngibyo ibyo se yababwiye. Yabahaye umugisha; aha buri muryango umugisha uwukwiriye. 
Genesis49:29 Nuko arabategeka, ati «Ngiye gusanga abanjye; muzampambe hamwe na ba sokuru, mu buvumo buri mu murima wa Efuroni w’Umuheti." 
Genesis49:30 Ubwo buvumo buba mu murima w’i Makipela, ahareba i Mambure, mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Abrahamu yawuguze na Efuroni w’Umuheti ngo ube ubukonde, bajye bawuhambamo." 
Genesis49:31 Aho ni ho Abrahamu n’umugore we Sara bahambwe, ni ho Izaki n’umugore we Rebeka bahambwe; ni na ho nahambye Leya." 
Genesis49:32 Uwo murima n’ubuvumo buwurimo byaguzwe kuri bene Heti.» 
Genesis49:33 Yakobo amaze guha ayo mategeko abana be, asubiza amaguru ku buriri, arapfa, asanga abe." 
Genesis50:1 Nuko Yozefu yubama ku ruhanga rwa se, arusukaho amarira, kandi ararusoma." 
Genesis50:2 Nyuma Yozefu ategeka abaganga be kosa umurambo wa se, maze abo baganga bosa umurambo wa Israheli." 
Genesis50:3 Ibyo bimara iminsi mirongo ine yose, kuko bosaga iminsi ingana ityo. Abanyamisiri bamuririra iminsi mirongo irindwi." 
Genesis50:4 Igihe cyo kurira kirangiye, Yozefu abwira abo mu ngoro ya Farawo, ati «Niba mbafiteho ubucuti, nimugende mubwire farawo, muti" 
Genesis50:5 ’Data yandahije agira ati: Ngiye gupfa, mfite imva nicukuriye mu gihugu cya Kanahani; ni ho uzampamba.’ Undeke ngende njye guhamba data, nzagaruka.»" 
Genesis50:6 Farawo arasubiza ati «Genda, uhambe so uko yabikurahije.»" 
Genesis50:7 Yozefu ajya guhamba se. Agenda aherekejwe n’abagaba ba Farawo bose, n’abanyacyubahiro bo mu ngoro ye, n’abanyacyubahiro bo mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Genesis50:8 Bazamukana n’umuryango wa Yozefu wose, na bene se, n’umuryango wa se. Mu karere ka Gosheni bahasiga gusa abana, imikumbi n’amashyo." 
Genesis50:9 Bajyana n’amagare n’abahetswe n’amafarasi, mbese bagiye ari ikivunge." 
Genesis50:10 Bageze i Goreni‐ha‐Atadi, hakurya ya Yorudani, bahacurira umuborogo mwinshi kandi ukomeye. Naho Yozefu yiraburira se iminsi irindwi." 
Genesis50:11 Bene igihugu, Abakanahani, babonye iyo mihango yo kwirabura yaberaga i Go‐reni‐ha‐Atadi, baravuga bati «Dore ukwirabura gukomeye kw’Abanyamisiri.» Ngiyo impamvu yatumye bita aho hantu Abeli‐Misirayimu (bisobanura ngo ’Ukwirabura kwa Misiri’); ni hakurya ya Yorudani." 
Genesis50:12 Abahungu ba Yakobo bamugenzereza uko yari yababwiye. 
Genesis50:13 Bamujyana mu gihugu cya Kanahani, bamuhamba mu buvumo buri mu murima w’i Makipela, Abrahamu yari yaraguze na Efuroni w’Umuheti, ngo ube ubukonde bwo guhambamo, ahareba i Mambure." 
Genesis50:14 Amaze guhamba se, Yozefu asubira mu Misiri hamwe na bene se n’abari bajyanye na we gutabara." 
Genesis50:15 Bene se wa Yozefu babonye se amaze gupfa, barabwirana bati «None Yozefu yatwanga akatwitura inabi twamugiriye?»" 
Genesis50:16 Ni ko gutuma kuri Yozefu, bati «Mbere yo gupfa, so yaradutegetse ngo" 
Genesis50:17 muzabwire Yozefu muti ’Nyabuneka, babarira bene so igicumuro n’icyaha bakoze. Ni koko, bakugiriye nabi bitavugwa! None, nyabuneka, babarira igicumuro cy’abagaragu b’Imana ya so.’» Nuko Yozefu arizwa n’ayo magambo bamubwiye." 
Genesis50:18 Bene se na bo ubwabo bariyizira, bikubita hasi imbere ye, baramubwira bati «Dore turi abacakara bawe!»" 
Genesis50:19 Yozefu arabasubiza ati «Nimushyitse umutima mu nda. Mbese murakeka ko ngiye kwishyira mu cyimbo cy’Imana? 
Genesis50:20 Inabi mwari mwangiriye, Imana yayihinduyemo ibyiza, kugira ngo imbaga nyamwinshi irokoke, uko mubiruzi none." 
Genesis50:21 Maze noneho nimushyitse umutima mu nda! Nzabatunga, mwebwe n’abana muri kumwe.» Arabahumuriza, kandi ababwirana umutima utaryarya." 
Genesis50:22 Nuko Yozefu n’umuryango wa se batura mu Misiri. Yozefu aramba imyaka ijana n’icumi," 
Genesis50:23 abona abuzukuruza bavuka kuri Efurayimu, ndetse abahungu ba Makiri mwene Manase bavukira ku bibero bye." 
Genesis50:24 Yozefu abwira bene se, ati «Dore ngiye gupfa ariko Imana izabatabara maze ibakure muri iki gihugu, ibajyane mu gihugu yasezeranyije indahiro Abrahamu, Izaki, na Yakobo.»" 
Genesis50:25 Nuko Yozefu arahiza bene Israheli, ati «Umunsi Imana yabatabaye muzajyane amagufwa yanjye.»" 
Genesis50:26 Yozefu apfa amaze imyaka ijana na cumi. Bosa umurambo, nuko bawushyira mu isanduku yo guhambamo, mu Misiri." 
Exodus1:1 Dore amazina y’abana ba Israheli baje mu Misiri hamwe na Yakobo. Bahageze buri muntu ari kumwe n’urugo rwe. 
Exodus1:2 Abo ni Rubeni, Simewoni, Levi na Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Isakari, Zabuloni na Benyamini;" 
Exodus1:4 Dani na Nefutali; Gadi na Asheri. 
Exodus1:5 Abantu bakomoka kuri Yakobo bari mirongo irindwi bose hamwe; Yozefu we yari asanzwe atuye mu Misiri. 
Exodus1:6 Nuko Yozefu arapfa kimwe n’abavandimwe be bose, n’igisekuru cye cyose." 
Exodus1:7 Abayisraheli barororoka, baragwira, bahinduka ishyano ryose, bagenda bunguka amaboko, kugeza aho buzura igihugu." 
Exodus1:8 Ubwo mu gihugu cya Misiri haza kwima undi mwami utari waramenye Yozefu. 
Exodus1:9 Abwira ingabo ze, ati «Dore umuryango w’Abayisraheli uranga ukaturuta ubwinshi, kandi ukaturusha amaboko." 
Exodus1:10 Nimucyo tuwigire ubwenge, ejo utazarushaho kugwira, maze intambara yatera ukifatanya n’abanzi bacu, ukaturwanya, hanyuma ukazava muri iki gihugu!»" 
Exodus1:11 Ubwo Abanyamisiri bashyiriraho Abayisraheli abategeka b’akazi, kugira ngo babicishe imirimo y’agahato. Ni bwo bubakiye batyo Farawo imigi y’ibihunikwa: uwa Pitomu n’uwa Ramusesi." 
Exodus1:12 Nyamara uko babakandamizaga, ni ko umubare wabo warushagaho kwiyongera, bagakwira hose. Nuko Abanyamisiri batangira kwanga urunuka Abayisraheli." 
Exodus1:13 Abanyamisiri bakoresha Abayisraheli by’agahato n’ubugome," 
Exodus1:14 babatera kuzinukwa ubuzima bwabo ku mpamvu y’uburetwa bukabije: nko gukata ibumba, kubumba amatafari, kuvunwa n’ubuhinzi, n’indi mirimo yose inaniza babagerekagaho ku gahato." 
Exodus1:15 Mu Bahebureyi hari abagore babiri bazi kubyaza, umwe akitwa Shifira, undi akitwa Puwa. Umwami wa Misiri arababwira, ati" 
Exodus1:16 «Igihe muzajya mubyaza abagore b’Abahebureyi, maze mwakwitegereza igitsina cy’umwana mugasanga ari umuhungu, mujye mumwica; naho naba umukobwa, mujye mumureka abeho.»" 
Exodus1:17 Ariko abo bagore b’ababyaza batinya Imana; ntibagenza uko umwami wa Misiri yari yarababwiye, maze abahungu barabareka babaho." 
Exodus1:18 Umwami wa Misiri ahamagaza abo bagore bazi kubyaza, arabatonganya ati «Mwabigiriye iki kureka abahungu babaho?»" 
Exodus1:19 Abagore basubiza Farawo, bati «Ni uko abagore b’Abahebureyi batameze nk’Abanyamisirikazi: ni abanyangufu, maze bakabyara umubyaza atarahagera!»" 
Exodus1:20 Imana igirira neza abo babyaza. Nuko umuryango uriyongera, ugwiza amaboko." 
Exodus1:21 Abo bagore babiri b’ababyaza, Imana ibahembera ko bayitinye, ibaha urubyaro." 
Exodus1:22 Ni bwo Farawo ahaye igihugu cye cyose itegeko, agira ati «Umuhungu wese w’Umuhebureyi uzavuka, mujye mumujugunya mu Ruzi, naho abakobwa bo mujye mubareka babeho.»" 
Exodus2:1 Hariho umugabo wo mu nzu ya Levi, ajya kurongora umukobwa wo kwa Levi." 
Exodus2:2 Uwo mugore arasama, abyara umuhungu. Abonye ko ari mwiza, aramuhisha bimara amezi atatu." 
Exodus2:3 Kubera ko yari atagishoboye gukomeza kumuhishahisha, amubohera agatebo k’urufunzo, agahomesha ubujeni n’amakakama, aryamishamo umwana, maze amurambika mu rufunzo ku nkombe y’Uruzi." 
Exodus2:4 Mushiki w’umwana yicara ahitaruye ngo arebe icyaza kumugwirira. 
Exodus2:5 Nuko rero umukobwa wa Farawo amanuka ku Ruzi ajya koga, naho abaja be bagendagenda ku nkombe y’Uruzi. Ngo arabukwe ka gaebo mu rufunzo, yohereza umuja we aragaterura." 
Exodus2:6 Ngo agapfundure, abonamo akana k’agahungu kariraga. Nuko agira impuhwe, aravuga ati «Ni umwana w’Abahebureyi we!»" 
Exodus2:7 Ubwo mushiki w’umwana abwira umukobwa wa Farawo, ati «Mbese urashaka ko njya kugushakira umurezi mu bagore b’Abahebureyi, kugira ngo akonkereze uyu mwana?»" 
Exodus2:8 Umukobwa wa Farawo aramusubiza ati «Ngaho genda.» Nuko umukobwa ajya gushaka nyina w’umwana. 
Exodus2:9 Umukobwa wa Farawo aramubwira ati «Jyana uyu mwana, umunyonkereze, nzaguhemba.» Umugore atwara umwana, maze akajya amwonsa." 
Exodus2:10 Amaze gukura, amuzanira umukobwa wa Farawo, nuko amugira umwana we, ati «Mwise Musa, kuko namukuye mu mazi.»" 
Exodus2:11 Muri icyo gihe, Musa amaze kuba mukuru, ajya gusura bene wabo. Nuko yibonera ubwe imirimo y’agahato yari ibashikamiye, ndetse n’Umunyamisiri wakubitaga Umuhebureyi wo mu bavandimwe be." 
Exodus2:12 Areba hirya areba hino, maze asanze nta muntu umubona, agira wa Munyamisiri amutsinda aho, amutaba mu musenyi." 
Exodus2:13 Bukeye yongera gusohoka, abona Abahebureyi babiri barwanaga. Abwira uwarenganyaga undi, ati «Ni iki gituma ukubita mugenzi wawe?»" 
Exodus2:14 Uwo muntu aramusubiza ati «Ni nde wakugize umutware n’umucamanza wacu? Mbese uribwira ko wanyica, nk’uko wishe wa Munyamisiri?» Musa agira ubwoba, aribwira ati «Nta kabuza, byaramenyekanye!»" 
Exodus2:15 Farawo ngo abimenye, ashaka kwica Musa. Ariko Musa ahita ahunga Farawo, acikira mu gihugu cya Madiyani; yicara iruhande rw’iriba." 
Exodus2:16 Hariho umuherezabitambo w’i Madiyani wari ufite abakobwa barindwi. Baza kuvoma amazi, buzuza ibibumbiro ngo buhire amatungo ya se." 
Exodus2:17 Ariko haza kuza abashumba, birukana abo bakobwa. Ubwo Musa arahaguruka, arabatabara; maze yuhira amatungo yabo." 
Exodus2:18 Igihe basubiye imuhira, se Rehuweli arababaza ati «Ni iki gitumye noneho mubanguka uyu munsi?»" 
Exodus2:19 Baramusubiza bati «Hari Umunyamisiri wadukijije abashumba, ndetse aratudahirira, yuhira amatungo.»" 
Exodus2:20 Rehuweli abaza abakobwa be, ati «Uwo mugabo ari hehe? Ni iki cyatumye mumusiga? Nimumuhamagare, aze tumuhe icyo kurya.»" 
Exodus2:21 Nuko Musa yemera kuguma kwa Rehuweli; Rehuweli amushyingira umukobwa we Sipora. 
Exodus2:22 Sipora abyara umuhungu, Musa amwita Gerishomu (Umusuhuke ino), kuko yavugaga ati «Ndi umusuhuke mu gihugu cy’amahanga.»" 
Exodus2:23 Hashira imyaka myinshi, nuko umwami wa Misiri arapfa. Abayisraheli baganyira aho bari mu bucakara, baraboroga, maze induru bavugirije mu bucakara irarenga igera ku Mana." 
Exodus2:24 Imana yumva imiborogo yabo, yibuka Isezerano yagiranye na Abrahamu, Izaki na Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Imana ireba Abayisraheli, maze imenya (amagorwa barimo)..." 
Exodus3:1 Musa yari aragiye ubushyo bwa sebukwe Yetero umuherezabitambo w’i Madiyani. Ayobora ubushyo hirya y’ubutayu, maze agera ku musozi w’Imana, i Horebu." 
Exodus3:2 Nuko Umumalayika w’Uhoraho amubonekera mu kibatsi cy’umuriro waka mu gihuru rwagati. Musa aritegereza, asanga umuriro ugurumana mu gihuru cyose, ariko cyo ntigikongoke." 
Exodus3:3 Musa aravuga ati «Reka njyeyo ndebe aka kataraboneka, n’impamvu ituma igihuru kidakongoka.»" 
Exodus3:4 Uhoraho abona aje hafi kureba ibyo ari byo. Nuko Imana imuhamagarira mu gihuru rwagati iti «Musa! Musa!» Undi ati «Ndi hano.» 
Exodus3:5 Nuko Imana iramubwira iti «Wikwegera hano! Ndetse kuramo inkweto zawe, kuko ahantu uhagaze ari ubutaka butagatifu.»" 
Exodus3:6 Irongera iti «Ndi Imana ya so, Imana ya Abrahamu, Imana ya Izaki, Imana ya Yakobo.» Musa yipfuka mu maso, kuko yatinyaga kureba Imana." 
Exodus3:7 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Amagorwa y’umuryango wanjye uri mu Misiri narayitegereje, kandi imiborogo baterwa n’abakoresha b’imirimo narayumvise, n’imiruho barimo ndayizi." 
Exodus3:8 Ndamanutse ngo mbagobotore mu maboko y’Abanyamisiri, maze mbavane muri icyo gihugu, mbajyane ku butaka bw’indumbuke kandi bugari, mu gihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki, ahantu hatuwe n’Abakanahani, n’Abaheti, n’Abahemori, n’Abaperezi, n’Abahivi, n’Abayebuzi." 
Exodus3:9 None ngaha induru y’Abayisraheli yangezeho, maze mbona ukuntu Abanyamisiri babica urupfu rubi." 
Exodus3:10 Ubu ngubu rero genda: ngutumye kuri Farawo kugira ngo uvane mu Misiri Abayisraheli, umuryango wanjye.»" 
Exodus3:11 Musa abwira Imana, ati «Jyewe ndi nde wo gusanga Farawo no kuvana Abayisraheli mu Misiri?»" 
Exodus3:12 Imana iravuga iti «Ndi kumwe nawe; kandi dore ikizakubera ikimenyetso ko ari jye wagutumye: Numara kuvana umuryango wanjye mu Misiri, muzasengera Imana kuri uyu musozi.»" 
Exodus3:13 Musa abwira Imana, ati «Ngaho rero ningende nsange Abayisraheli, mbabwire ngo ’Imana y’abakurambere banyu yabantumyeho!’ Nibambaza ngo izina ryayo ni irihe, nzabasubiza ngo iki?»" 
Exodus3:14 Nuko Imana ibwira Musa, iti «NDI UHORAHO ». Irongera iti «Uzabwire utyo Abayisraheli, uti ‘UHORAHO ni we ubantumyeho.’»" 
Exodus3:15 Imana yongera kubwira Musa, iti «Uzabwire Abayisraheli uti ’UHORAHO Imana y’abakuramere banyu, Imana ya Abrahamu, Imana ya Izaki, Imana ya Yakobo, yabantumyeho.’ Ngiryo izina ryanjye iteka ryose, nguko uko bazajya banyita banyambaza kuva mu gisekuru kugera mu kindi." 
Exodus3:16 Genda rero ukoranye abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli, maze ubabwire uti ‘Uhoraho Imana y’abakurambere banyu, Imana ya Abrahamu, Imana ya Izaki, Imana ya Yakobo yambonekeye maze arambwira ati: Niyemeje kubagoboka, kandi nzi ibyo mugirirwa mu Misiri, maze ndavuga nti" 
Exodus3:17 ‘Nzabakura mu magorwa murimo mu Misiri, mbajyane mu gihugu cy’Abakanahani, n’Abaheti, n’Abahemori, n’Abaperezi, n’Abahivi, n’Abayebuzi, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki.’" 
Exodus3:18 Bazumva ijwi ryawe, maze wowe n’abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli musange umwami wa Misiri, muzamubwire muti ‘Uhoraho Imana y’Abahebureyi yaratubonekeye. Ubu ngubu rero, uturekure tujye mu rugendo rw’iminsi itatu mu butayu gutura ibitambo Uhoraho Imana yacu.’" 
Exodus3:19 Nzi neza ko umwami wa Misiri atazareka mugenda, keretse hagize ukuboko kw’ingufu kumucogoza." 
Exodus3:20 Nzarambura rero ukuboko kwanjye, maze nyogoze Misiri, mpakorere ibitangaza byinshi bibatera ubwoba. Nyuma yabyo, Farawo azabareka mugende." 
Exodus3:21 Nzatuma iyo mbaga ibona agahenge ku Banyamisiri, maze igihe muzahagurukira mwekuzagenda amara masa." 
Exodus3:22 Ahubwo buri mugore azasange mugenzi we baturanye cyangwa umucumbikiye, amutire ibintu bya feza, n’ibintu bya zahabu, n’imyambaro muzambika abahungu n’abakobwa banyu, bityo muzasahure Abanyamisiri.»" 
Exodus4:1 Musa arasubiza ati «Ntibazanyemera, kandi ntibazanyumva, ahubwo bazavuga ngo ’Uhoraho ntiyakubonekeye!’»" 
Exodus4:2 Uhoraho rero aramubwira ati «Ufite iki mu ntoki?» Undi ati «Ni inkoni.» 
Exodus4:3 Nuko Uhoraho aravuga ati «Yijugunye hasi.» Ayijugunya hasi maze ihinduka inzoka, Musa atangira kuyihunga." 
Exodus4:4 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Rambura ukuboko uyifate umurizo.» Arambura ukuboko, ayifata umurizo, nuko yongera guhinduka inkoni mu ntoki ze." 
Exodus4:5 Uhoraho ati «Ibyo ni ukugira ngo bazamenye ko wabonekewe n’Uhoraho Imana y’abakurambere babo, Imana ya Abrahamu, Imana ya Izaki, Imana ya Yakobo!»" 
Exodus4:6 Uhoraho yongera kumubwira ati «Shyira ikiganza mu gituza cyawe.» Undi ashyira ikiganza mu gituza cye; hanyuma akivanaho, asanga cya kiganza cyasheshe ibibembe byererana nk’urubura." 
Exodus4:7 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Subiza ikiganza mu gituza cyawe.» Undi asubiza ikiganza mu gituza cye; hanyuma akivanaho asanga cyongeye kuba kizima nk’umubiri we usanzwe. 
Exodus4:8 Nuko aramubwira ati «Niba rero batakwemeye, kandi ntibumve iki kimenyetso cya mbere, bazemezwa n’icya kabiri." 
Exodus4:9 Niba kandi batemeye ibyo bimenyetso byombi, maze ntibumvire ijwi ryawe, uzende amazi yo mu Ruzi, uyasese ku butaka, maze amazi uzaba wavanye mu Ruzi, ahinduke amaraso.»" 
Exodus4:10 Musa abwira Uhoraho, ati «Nyamuna Mutegetsi wanjye, nta bwo ndi umuntu ubangukirwa no kuvuga: sinabyigeze rwose, ndetse no kuva aho uvuganiye n’umugaragu wawe ntacyahindutse. Ngira umunwa uremerewe, n’uruimi rwagobwe.»" 
Exodus4:11 Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Ni nde wahaye umuntu umunwa wo kuvuga cyangwa akamugira ikiragi, cyangwa se igipfamatwi? Ni nde uhumura cyangwa se uhumisha? Nta bwo ari jyewe, Uhoraho?" 
Exodus4:12 None rero genda; jye ndi kumwe n’umunwa wawe, nzakwigisha ibyo uzavuga!»" 
Exodus4:13 Ubwo Musa aravuga ati «Nyamuna Mutegetsi wanjye, ahubwo utume undi wishakiye kohereza!»" 
Exodus4:14 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira Musa, maze aravuga ati «Mbese ntihari mwene nyoko Aroni, Umulevi? Nzi ko we avuga neza. Ndetse ashyize nzira agusanga; nakubona azishima mu mutima we." 
Exodus4:15 Uzamubwire ibyo agomba kuvuga, ubimutoze. Jye ndi kumwe n’umunwa wave, nkaba kandi kumwe n’umunwa we; nzabigisha ibyo mugo mba gukora." 
Exodus4:16 Ni we uzavugana na rubanda mu mwanya wawe, maze azabe ari we uba umunwa wawe, woweho ube umubwiriza we." 
Exodus4:17 Naho iyi nkoni uyifate mu ntoki, kuko ari yo uzakoresha ibimenyetso!»" 
Exodus4:18 Musa aragenda, asubira kwa sebukwe Yetero; aramubwira ati «Ndagusabye, reka ngende, nsubire muri bene wacu bari mu Misiri, kugira ngo ndebe ko bakiriho.» Yetero asubiza Musa, ati «Genda amahoro!»" 
Exodus4:19 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu gihugu cya Madiyani, ati «Genda, usubire mu Misiri, kuko abahigaga amagara yawe bapfuye bose.»" 
Exodus4:20 Musa agira umugore we n’abahungu be, abashyira ku ndogobe, maze basubirana mu gihugu cya Misiri; Musa agumana inkoni y’Imana mu ntoki ze," 
Exodus4:21 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Dore uri mu nzira igusubiza mu Misiri; ibuka rero bya bitangaza byose naguhereye ububasha; uzabikorere imbere ya Farawo. Naho jyewe nzatera umutima we kunangira, maze yekureka imbaga ngo igende" 
Exodus4:22 Ubwo uzabwire Farawo, uti ‘Uhoraho aravuze ati: Umwana wanjye w’imfura ni Israheli. Ndakubwiye ngo" 
Exodus4:23 Rekura umwana wanjye agende, ajye kunsenga; niba kandi wanze kumurekura ngo agende, jyewe nzica umwana wawe w’imfura.’»" 
Exodus4:24 Mu rugendo, Uhoraho asanga Musa aho yari acumbitse, maze asa n’ushaka kumwica." 
Exodus4:25 Ni bwo Sipora yenze isarabwayi, akata agashishwa k’umubirigabo w’umuhungu we, maze agakoza ku birenge bya Musa, avuga ati «Kuri jyewe ubaye umugabo w’amaraso!»" 
Exodus4:26 Nuko Uhoraho aramureka. Ubwo Sipora nyine yari amaze kuvuga ngo «umugabo w’amaraso», ashaka kuvuga ibyo kugenya." 
Exodus4:27 Uhoraho abwira Aroni, ati «Genda usanganire Musa mu butayu.» Aroni ashyira nzira, ahurira na Musa ku musozi w’Imana, aramuhobera." 
Exodus4:28 Musa arondorera Aroni amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yaramutumye, kandi n’ibimenyetso yari yaramutegetse gukora." 
Exodus4:29 Musa na Aroni baragenda, bakoranya abakuru bose b’imiryango y’Abayisraheli." 
Exodus4:30 Aroni abarondorera amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yarabwiye Musa, kandi akorera ibimenyetso mu maso y’imbaga." 
Exodus4:31 Nuko imbaga iremera; bamenya ko Uhoraho yasuye Abayisraheli, maze akabona amagorwa yabo. Nuko barapfukama, barasenga." 
Exodus5:1 Hanyuma Musa na Aroni basanga Farawo, baramubwira bati «Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli aravuze ngo ’Rekura umuryango wanjye kugira ngo bagende bajye mu butayu kunkorera umunsi mukuru, bansenga!’»" 
Exodus5:2 Farawo arabasubiza ati «Uhoraho ni nde byo kugira ngo numvire ijwi rye, maze ndekure Abayisraheli bagende? Uhoraho simuzi, kandi sinzareka Abayisraheli bagenda!»" 
Exodus5:3 Baravuga bati «Imana y’Abahebureyi yaratubonekeye. Duhe uruhusa rwo gukora urugendo rw’iminsi itatu mu butayu, kugira ngo duture ibitambo Uhoraho Imana yacu, maze yekuduteza umuze cyangwa inkota.»" 
Exodus5:4 Naho umwami wa Misiri arababwira ati «Mwebwe, Musa na Aroni, ni iki gituma mutesha rubanda imirimo? Nimujye ku kazi kanyu!»" 
Exodus5:5 Farawo arongera ati «Dore ubu bene wanyu babaye ishyano ryose mu gihugu, maze mwebwe mugashaka kubatesha akazi!»" 
Exodus5:6 Muri icyo gihe Farawo aha abakoresha n’abagenzuzi b’imirimo ya rubanda itegeko, avuga ati" 
Exodus5:7 «Mwikomeza guha rubanda ibyatsi byo kubumbisha amatafari, nk’uko mwabigenzaga ejo n’ejo bundi: nibajye ubwabo kwitoragurira ibyatsi!" 
Exodus5:8 Nyamara muzabace umubare w’amatafari ungana n’uwo basanzwe babumba, mutagize icyo mugeruraho. Ni abanebwe! Ni na cyo gituma batera amahane bavuga ngo ‘Turashaka kujya gutura Imana yacu ibitambo!’" 
Exodus5:9 Abo bantu nimubicishe uburetwa, bakore badahumeka; bareke kwita ku magambo y’abanyabinyoma!»" 
Exodus5:10 Abakoresha n’abagenzuzi baraza babwira rubanda, bati «Farawo aravuze ngo ’Sinzongera kubaha ibyatsi ukundi’;" 
Exodus5:11 ngo ‘Nimugende ubwanyu, mushake ubwatsi aho muzabusanga, nyamara ariko ntakizagerurwa ku cyate cyanyu.’»" 
Exodus5:12 Rubanda banyanyagira mu gihugu cya Misiri batoragura udufunzo two gukekaguramo ibyatsi. 
Exodus5:13 Abakoresha barabatotaga bavuga bati «Nimurangize icyate cyanyu, murangize icyategetswe buri munsi, nk’uko mwagenzaga igihe mwahabwaga ibyatsi!»" 
Exodus5:14 Abanyamisiri bakubita abagenzuzi b’Abayisraheli bari barashyizweho n’abakoresha ba Farawo. Bakavuga bati «Ni iki cyatumye ari ejo ari na none mutarangiza umubare w’amatafari utegetswe nk’uko mwabigenzaga mbere?» 
Exodus5:15 Abagenzuzi b’Abayisraheli bajya kuregera Farawo, bavuga bati «Ni iki gituma ugenzereza utyo abagaragu bawe?" 
Exodus5:16 Ntibagiha abagaragu bawe ibyatsi, kandi bakatubwira ngo ‘Nimubumbe amatafari!’ None dore abagaragu bawe barakubitwa, imbaga yawe ikarengana!»" 
Exodus5:17 Farawo arabasubiza ati «Hoshi muri abanebwe! Ni yo mpamvu ituma muvuga ngo ‘Turashaka kujya gutura Uhoraho ibitambo!’ 
Exodus5:18 Noneho ubu ngubu nimujye gukora. Ntibazabaha ibyatsi, kandi muzatanga umubare utegetswe w’amatafari.»" 
Exodus5:19 Abagenzuzi b’Abayisraheli basanga bari mu kaga, ubwo bababwiraga bati «Ntimuzagerura na busa ku matafari ategetswe; buri munsi ugire icyate cyawo!»" 
Exodus5:20 Bagisohoka kwa Farawo, bahubirana na Musa na Aroni bari babategereje." 
Exodus5:21 Barababwira bati «Uhoraho narebe, ace urubanza! Ni mwebwe mwatumye duhinduka ba ruvumwa mu maso ya Farawo no mu y’abagaragu be. Dore mwabashyize mu ntoki inkota yo kutwica.»" 
Exodus5:22 Ubwo Musa yongera gusanga Uhoraho, aramubwira ati «Nyagasani, ni iki cyatuma ugirira inabi iyi mbaga? Ni iki cyatumye untuma?" 
Exodus5:23 Kuva aho nagiriye kuvugana na Farawo mu izina ryawe, arica iyi mbaga urubozo, ariko woweho nta bwo urokora imbaga yawe!»" 
Exodus6:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ugiye kuzabona vuba icyo nzakorera Farawo: azabareka bagende, abihatiwe n’ukuboko kwanjye gufite imbaraga; azabirukana mu gihugu cye abihatiwe n’ukuboko kwanjye gufite imbaraga!»" 
Exodus6:2 Imana ivugana na Musa, maze iramubwira iti «Ndi Uhoraho." 
Exodus6:3 Nabonekeye Abrahamu, Izaki na Yakobo nitwa Imana Nyir’ububasha, ariko sinabiyeretse nitwa Uhoraho." 
Exodus6:4 Nagiranye Isezerano na bo, mbasezeranya kuzabaha igihugu cya Kanahani, aho bazereraga nk’abadafite aho baba." 
Exodus6:5 Numvise kandi imiborogo y’Abayisraheli, bashikamiwe n’Abanyamisiri mu bucakara, maze nibuka Isezerano ryanjye." 
Exodus6:6 Ni cyo gituma uzabwira Abayisraheli uti ‘Ndi Uhoraho! Nzabavana mu buretwa bw’Abanyamisiri, mbagobotore mu bucakara; nzabarokoza ukuboko gufite imbaraga n’ubushobozi." 
Exodus6:7 Nzabagira umuryango wanjye bwite, maze mbabere Imana. Muzamenya ko ari jyewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, yabakuye ku gahato k’imirimo y’Abanyamisiri." 
Exodus6:8 Nzabinjiza mu gihugu narahiye kuzaha Abrahamu, Izaki na Yakobo; nzakibahaho umunani: Ndi Uhoraho!’»" 
Exodus6:9 Musa abwira Abayisraheli atyo; nyamara ntibamwumva, ku mpamvu y’ubwoba n’ubucakara bwabo bukabije." 
Exodus6:10 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Musa ati 
Exodus6:11 «Jya kubwira Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, arekure Abayisraheli bave mu gihugu cye.»" 
Exodus6:12 Musa asubiza Uhoraho, ati «N’Abayisraheli ntibanyumvise, Farawo we yanyumva ate, jyewe ufite ururimi rugobwe?»" 
Exodus6:13 Uhoraho yongera kuvugana na Musa na Aroni, abaha amategeko agenewe Abayisraheli, n’andi agenewe Farawo umwami wa Misiri, kugira ngo Abayisraheli bazave mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Exodus6:14 Dore amazina y’abatware b’imiryango yabo: Bene Rubeni imfura ya Israheli ni Henoki, Palu, Hesironi, na Karumi. Abo ngabo ni amazu yo kwa Rubeni." 
Exodus6:15 Bene Simewoni ni Yemweli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Sowari na Shawuli, umuhungu w’Umukanahanikazi. Abo ngabo ni amazu yo kwa Simewoni." 
Exodus6:16 Dore amazina ya bene Levi, kimwe n’urubyaro rwabo: ni Gerishoni, Kehati na Merari. Imyaka y’ukubaho kwa Levi yabaye ijana na mirongo itatu n’irindwi." 
Exodus6:17 Bene Gerishoni ni Libuni, na Shimeyi, ukurikije amazu yabo." 
Exodus6:18 Bene Kehati ni Amuramu, Yishari, Heburoni, na Uziyeli. Imyaka y’ukubaho kwa Kehati yabaye ijana na mirongo itatu n’itatu." 
Exodus6:19 Bene Merari ni Mahuli na Mushe. Abo ngabo ni amazu yo kwa Levi, hamwe n’urubyaro rwabo." 
Exodus6:20 Amuramu arongora Yokebedi nyirasenge, babyarana Aroni na Musa. Imyaka y’ukubaho kwa Amuramu yabaye ijana na mirongo itatu n’irindwi." 
Exodus6:21 Bene Yishari ni Kore, Nefegi na Zikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Bene Uziyeli ni Mishayeli, Elisafani na Sitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Aroni arongora Elizabeti umukobwa wa Aminadabu, mushiki wa Nahashoni. Babyarana Nadabu, Abihu, Eleyazari na Itamari." 
Exodus6:24 Bene Kore ni Asiri, Elikana na Abiyasafu; abo ngabo ni amazu yo kwa Kore." 
Exodus6:25 Eleyazari mwene Aroni arongora umwe mu bakobwa ba Putiyeli; babyarana Pinehasi. Ngabo abatware b’amazu y’Abalevi, bikurikije ubwoko bwabo." 
Exodus6:26 Aroni na Musa abo ni bo Uhoraho yabwiye, ati «Nimuvane Abayisraheli mu gihugu cya Misiri, mubanje kubagabanyamo imitwe.»" 
Exodus6:27 Ni bo bavuganye na Farawo umwami wa Misiri, kugira ngo bavane Abayisraheli mu gihugu cya Misiri. Ni bo ubwabo, Musa na Aroni." 
Exodus6:28 Igihe Uhoraho avuganiye na Musa mu gihugu cya Misiri," 
Exodus6:29 yaramubwiye, ati «Ndi Uhoraho! Ugeze kuri Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, ibyo nkubwira byose.»" 
Exodus6:30 Nuko Musa asubiza Uhoraho ati «Dore nifitiye ururimi rugobwe, none se Farawo azanyumva ate?»" 
Exodus7:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Dore wowe nakugize nk’imana imbere ya Farawo, naho Aroni mwene nyoko azavuga mu mwanya wawe." 
Exodus7:2 Wowe uzajye uvuga icyo ngutegetse cyose, naho Aroni mwene nyoko azajye avugana na Farawo, kugira ngo uwo mwami areke Abayisraheli basohoke mu gihugu cye." 
Exodus7:3 Jyewe rero nzatera umutima wa Farawo kunangira. Nzagwiza ibimenyetso byanjye n’ibitangaza byanjye mu gihugu cya Misiri," 
Exodus7:4 ariko Farawo nta bwo azabumva. Nzaramburira ukuboko kwanjye kuri Misiri, maze ku bubasha bwanjye mvane mu gihugu cya Misiri ingabo zanjye, umuryango wanjye, Abayisraheli." 
Exodus7:5 Abanyamisiri bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho, ubwo nzaba naramburiye ukuboko kwanjye kuri Misiri, maze nkavanayo Abayisraheli.»" 
Exodus7:6 Musa na Aroni bagenza batyo: uko Uhoraho yari yabategetse aba ari ko bakora. 
Exodus7:7 Musa yari amaze imyaka mirongo inani, na Aroni imyaka mirongo inani n’itatu igihe bavuganye na Farawo." 
Exodus7:8 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Exodus7:9 «Farawo nababwira avuga ngo ’Nimubitangire icyemezo’, uzabwire Aroni uti ’Fata inkoni yawe maze uyijugunye imbere ya Farawo, ihinduke inzoka.’»" 
Exodus7:10 Nuko rero Musa na Aroni baza kwa Farawo; bagenza uko Uhoraho yari yabategetse. Aroni ajugunya inkoni ye imbere ya Farawo n’imbere y’abagaragu be, ihinduka inzoka." 
Exodus7:11 Ubwo Farawo atumiza abahanga n’abapfumu be; maze abapfumu ba Misiri na bo babigenza batyo, bakoresheje amayeri yabo:" 
Exodus7:12 buri muntu ajugunya inkoni ye hasi, zihinduka inzoka. Ariko inkoni ya Aroni imira inkoni zabo." 
Exodus7:13 Nyamara umutima wa Farawo ugumya kunangira, maze ntiyumva Musa na Aroni, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze." 
Exodus7:14 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Farawo ntava ku izima; yanze kurekura imbaga yanjye." 
Exodus7:15 Usange rero Farawo mu gitondo, igihe agiye ku nkombe y’amazi, maze umutegerereze ku nkombe y’Uruzi; ube kandi ufite mu ntoki ya nkoni yahindukaga inzoka." 
Exodus7:16 Umubwire uti ’Uhoraho Imana y’Abahebureyi yakuntumyeho kukubwira, ngo: Rekura umuryango wanjye, kugira ngo bajye kunsengera mu butayu. None dore kugeza ubu ngubu nturabyumva!" 
Exodus7:17 Uhoraho aravuze ati: ‘Dore icyo uzamenyeraho ko ndi Uhoraho: ngiye gukubitisha amazi yo mu Ruzi inkoni mfite mu ntoki, maze ahinduke amaraso.’" 
Exodus7:18 Amafi y’uruzi ari bupfe, maze uruzi runuke, kugeza aho Abanyamisiri batazashobora kunywa amazi y’Uruzi.’»" 
Exodus7:19 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Bwira Aroni uti ’Fata inkoni yawe, maze werekeze ukuboko kwawe ku mazi yose yo mu Misiri, no ku migezi yabo, no ku miyoboro yabo, no ku biyaga byabo, no ku bireko byabo, kugira ngo bihinduke amaraso; maze hazabe amaraso hose mu gihugu cya Misiri kugeza no ku bivomesho by’ibibazanyo n’iby’amabuye!’»" 
Exodus7:20 Musa na Aroni bakora icyo Uhoraho yari ategetse. Aroni abangura inkoni ye, ayikubita amazi y’Uruzi, Farawo n’abagaragu be babyirebera n’amaso yabo; nuko amazi y’Uruzi yose ahinduka amaraso." 
Exodus7:21 Amafi yari mu Ruzi arapfa, uruzi rwose ruhinduka umunuko; Abanyamisiri ntibaba bagishoboye kunywa amazi y’Uruzi. Nuko mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri haba amaraso." 
Exodus7:22 Nyamara abapfumu ba Misiri bagenza batyo na bo, ku mayeri yabo. Maze umutima wa Farawo ugumya kunangira, ntiyumva Musa na Aroni, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze." 
Exodus7:23 Farawo arikubita aragenda, yisubirira iwe, ntiyirirwa anabyitaho." 
Exodus7:24 Abanyamisiri bafukura ahegereye Uruzi ngo babone amazi yo kunywa, kuko batashoboraga kunywa amazi y’Uruzi." 
Exodus7:25 Kuva igihe Uhoraho akubitiye Uruzi, haciyeho iminsi irindwi." 
Exodus7:26 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Sanga Farawo maze umubwire uti ‘Uhoraho aravuze ngo rekura umuryango wanjye kugira ngo ujye kunsenga." 
Exodus7:27 Niba kandi wanze kuwurekura ngo ugende, dore igihugu cyawe cyose ngiye kugiteza icyago cy’imitubu." 
Exodus7:28 Uruzi ruzajagatamo imitubu; izazamuka, maze yinjire mu ngoro yawe, mu cyumba uraramo no ku buriri bwawe, mu nzu y’abagarage bawe kandi no mu mazu y’abaturage bawe, kugeza no mu bikoni batekeramo imigati." 
Exodus7:29 Imitubu izatondagira kuri wowe, ku baturage bawe, no ku bagaragu bawe bose.’»" 
Exodus8:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Bwira Aroni, uti ’Ramburira ukuboko kwawe n’inkoni yawe ku migezi, ku miyoboro, no ku biyaga, maze uvundurire imitubu ku gihugu cya Misiri.’»" 
Exodus8:2 Aroni aramburira ukuboko kwe ku mazi ya Misiri, maze imitubu iravundura izimagiza igihugu cya Misiri." 
Exodus8:3 Nyamara abapfumu na bo babikora batyo ku mayeri yabo, maze bavundurira imitubu ku gihugu cya Misiri." 
Exodus8:4 Farawo ahamagaza Musa na Aroni, arababwira ati «Nimwinginge Uhoraho kugira ngo yigizeyo imitubu, kuri jye no ku baturage banjye, maze nzareke Abayisraheli bajye gutura Uhoraho ibitambo.»" 
Exodus8:5 Musa asubiza Farawo, ati «Mbwira igihe ngomba kwambarizaho ngusabira, wowe n’abagaragu bawe n’abaturage bawe, kugira ngo Uhoraho yigizeyo imitubu, kuri wowe no ku mazu yawe, maze isigare gusa mu Ruzi.»" 
Exodus8:6 Farawo arasubiza ati «Ejo!» Nuko Musa ati «Bizagenda nk’uko ubivuze, kugira ngo umenyereho ko nta n’umwe uhwanye n’Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Exodus8:7 Imitubu izava kuri wowe no ku mazu yawe, ku bagaragu bawe no ku baturage bawe, izasigare gusa mu Ruzi.»" 
Exodus8:8 Musa na Aroni basohoka kwa Farawo, maze Musa atakambira Uhoraho ku byerekeye imitubu yari yaraterereje Farawo." 
Exodus8:9 Uhoraho agenza nk’uko Musa abimusabye; maze imitubu yari mu mazu, ku mbuga no mu mirima irapfa irashira." 
Exodus8:10 Barayirundarunda, iba ibirundo n’ibirundo, maze igihugu gihinduka umunuko kubera iyo mpamvu." 
Exodus8:11 Nyamara Farawo, abonye ko habonetse ubuhumekero, agumya kunangira umutima, maze ntiyumva Musa na Aroni, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze." 
Exodus8:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Bwira Aroni, uti ’Bangura inkoni yawe, ukubite umukungugu w’isi, maze uhinduke imibu mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri.’»" 
Exodus8:13 Babigenza batyo. Aroni arambura ukuboko, abangura inkoni, maze akubita umukungugu w’isi; nuko imibu yirara ku bantu no ku nyamaswa. Umukungugu wose w’isi uhinduka imibu, mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Exodus8:14 Abapfumu na bo barabigana bakoresheje amayeri yabo ngo bagerageze guhimba imibu; nyamara ntibabishobora. Imibu yari ku bantu no ku nyamaswa. 
Exodus8:15 Nuko abapfumu babwira Farawo, bati «Biriya byo, bikozwe n’Imana!» Nyamara umutima wa Farawo ugumya kunangira, maze ntiyumva Musa na Aroni, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze." 
Exodus8:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Uhaguruke mu gitondo cya kare, maze uhinguke imbere ya Farawo ku isaha agiraho ku nkombe y’amazi; umubwire uti ’Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Rekura umuryango wanjye kugira ngo ujye kunsenga." 
Exodus8:17 Niba kandi utaretse umuryango wanjye ngo ugende, ngiye kuguteza ibibugu, wowe, n’abagaragu bawe, n’abaturage bawe, n’ingo zawe. Ingo z’Abanyamisiri zizuzuramo ibibugu, kimwe n’ubutaka batuyeho." 
Exodus8:18 Nyamara uwo munsi nzarobanura igihugu cya Gosheni, aho umuryango wanjye utuye, maze hoye guterwa n’ibibugu. Bityo uzamenya ko jyewe, Uhoraho, mba muri icyo gihugu rwagati!" 
Exodus8:19 Nzaca urugabano hagati y’imbaga yanjye n’iyawe; kandi icyo kimenyetso kizaba ejo.’» 
Exodus8:20 Uhoraho abigenza atyo. Haduka ibibugu gica, bitera mu rugo rwa Farawo n’urw’abagaragu be, no mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri; igihugu kiyogozwa n’ibibugu." 
Exodus8:21 Farawo ahamagaza Musa na Aroni, arababwira ati «Nimugende muture Imana yanyu ibitambo, ariko muri iki gihugu!»" 
Exodus8:22 Musa arasubiza ati «Ntibikwiriye ko dukora dutyo, kuko ibitambo dutura Uhoraho Imana yacu ari amahano ku Banyamisiri. Niba se duturiye mu maso y’Abanyamisiri ibitambo babona ko ari amahano kuri bo, ntibazatwicisha amabuye?" 
Exodus8:23 Turashaka kwigira mu ntera y’urugendo rw’iminsi itatu mu butayu, ngo duturireyo ibitambo Uhoraho Imana yacu, nk’uko azabitubwiriza.»" 
Exodus8:24 Farawo aravuga ati «Ngaho! Nzabareka mugende, mujye mu butayu gutura ibitambo Uhoraho Imana yanyu: icyakora ntimuzajye kure cyane! Kandi muzansabire.»" 
Exodus8:25 Musa arasubiza ati «Nimara kugusezeraho, ndajya kwinginga Uhoraho; maze guhera ejo, ibibugu bizareke Farawo, abagaragu be n’abaturage be. Gusa rero Farawo ntakomeze kuduhenda ubwenge, yanga kureka Abayisraheli ngo bajye gutura Uhoraho ibitambo!»" 
Exodus8:26 Musa asezera kuri Farawo, maze yinginga Uhoraho." 
Exodus8:27 Uhoraho abigenza nk’uko Musa abimusabye, maze ibibugu bireka Farawo, abagaragu be, n’abaturage be; ntihasigara na kimwe." 
Exodus8:28 Nyamara Farawo na none yanga kuva ku izima ntiyareka rubanda ngo bagende. 
Exodus9:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Genda usange Farawo, umubwire uti ’Uhoraho Imana y’Abahebureyi aravuze ngo: Rekura umuryango wanjye kugira ngo ujye kunsenga;" 
Exodus9:2 niba kandi wanze kubarekura ngo bagende, ugakomeza kubabuza," 
Exodus9:3 ngaha ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kugiye gushikama ku mashyo yawe ari mu gasozi, ku mafarasi, ku ndogobe, ku ngamiya, ku nka, no ku matungo magufi; byose umuze ubitsembe!" 
Exodus9:4 Nyamara Uhoraho azarobanura amashyo ya Israheli mu mashyo y’Abanyamisiri, maze hekuzagira igipfa na kimwe mu matungo y’Abayisraheli.’»" 
Exodus9:5 Nuko Uhoraho agena igihe, avuga ati «Ejo Uhoraho azakora ibyo ngibyo mu gihugu.»" 
Exodus9:6 Uhoraho abigenza atyo kuva bukeye bwaho. Amatungo y’Abanyamisiri yose arapfa, ariko ntihagira itungo ripfa ryo mu mashyo y’Abayisraheli." 
Exodus9:7 Farawo arabaririza, asanga nta tungo na rimwe ryapfuye mu mashyo ya Israheli! Nyamara umutima wa Farawo wanga kuva ku izima, ntiyareka rubanda bagenda." 
Exodus9:8 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati «Nimuyore umurayi w’itanura, wuzuye ibiganza; Musa aze kuwujugunya mu kirere ari imbere ya Farawo." 
Exodus9:9 Uraza guhinduka urwavumba rutwarwe n’umuyaga hejuru y’igihugu cyose cya Misiri, utere abantu n’amatungo gupfuruta no gututumba ibibyimba ku mubiri, mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri.»" 
Exodus9:10 Benda rero umurayi w’itanura, maze bahinguka imbere ya Farawo. Musa awujugunya hejuru, maze utera abantu n’inyamaswa gupfuruta no gututumba ibibyimba ku mubiri." 
Exodus9:11 Na ba bapfumu ntibashobora guhinguka imbere ya Musa ku mpamvu y’ibibyimba, kuko abo bapfumu bari buzuyeho ibibyimba nk’Abanyamisiri bandi." 
Exodus9:12 Nyamara Uhoraho atera umutima wa Farawo kunangira, maze Farawo ntiyumva Musa na Aroni, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabibwiye Musa." 
Exodus9:13 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Uhaguruke mu gitondo cya kare, maze uhinguke imbere ya Farawo; umubwire uti ’Uhoraho, Imana y’Abahebureyi, aravuze ngo: Rekura umuryango wanjye kugira ngo ujye kunsenga." 
Exodus9:14 Kuko ubu ngubu ho, ibyorezo byanjye byose ngiye kubiguteza, wowe n’abagaragu bawe n’abaturage bawe, kugira ngo umenyereho ko nta n’umwe ku isi duhwanye." 
Exodus9:15 Iyo mbishaka, mba nararambuye ukuboko kwanjye, maze nkaguteza umuze, wowe n’abaturage bawe, ukaba wararimbutse ku isi." 
Exodus9:16 Nyamara dore icyatumye nkureka ukagumaho: ni ukugira ngo nkwereke ububasha bwanjye, maze bazasingize izina ryanjye ku isi hose." 
Exodus9:17 Niba rero ukomeje kuziga umuryango wanjye, ukawubuza kugenda," 
Exodus9:18 dore ejo kuri aya magingo nzagusha urubura rw’urucukirane, rutigeze rubaho mu Misiri kuva aho yaremewe kugeza ubu ngubu." 
Exodus9:19 None rero, ubu ngubu ohereza intumwa, bahungishe amatungo yawe, n’icyo ufite cyose ku gasozi; kuko abantu bose n’inyamaswa zose bizaba byagumye ku gasozi, ntibizabe byugamishijwe mu mazu, bizahondagurwa n’urubura, maze bipfe.’»" 
Exodus9:20 Mu bagaragu ba Farawo, uwatinye ijambo ry’Uhoraho wese ahungishiriza mu mazu abagaragu be n’amatungo ye;" 
Exodus9:21 naho abahinyuye ijambo ry’Uhoraho barekera abagaragu babo n’amatungo ku gasozi. 
Exodus9:22 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Rambura ukuboko kwawe werekeza ku ijuru, kugira ngo urubura rugwe mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri, ku bantu, no ku nyamaswa, no ku bimera byose mu mirima.»" 
Exodus9:23 Musa atunga inkoni ye hejuru, maze Uhoraho arekura inkuba n’urubura, imirabyo iracicikana ku isi; nuko Uhoraho agusha urubura mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Exodus9:24 Hagwa urubura ruvanze n’inkuba, urubura ruteye ubwoba, rutigeze rumera nk’urwo mu gihugu cya Misiri kuva aho cyitiwe igihugu." 
Exodus9:25 Mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri, urubura ruhondagura ibyari ku gasozi byose, kuva ku bantu kugera ku nyamaswa; urubura ruhondagura ibimera byose mu mirima, kuva ku byatsi kugeza ku biti." 
Exodus9:26 Ntihagira ahantu rutagwa, uretse mu gihugu cy Gosheni, aho Abayisraheli bari batuye." 
Exodus9:27 Farawo ahamagaza Musa na Aroni, maze arababwira ati «Ubu ngubu ho nemeye ko nacumuye; Uhoraho ni we uri mu kuri, naho jyewe n’igihugu cyanjye tukaba mu cyaha." 
Exodus9:28 Nimwinginge Uhoraho kugira ngo izo nkuba zikaze n’urubura bisigeho! Nzabareka mugende, mwekuguma hano ukundi.»" 
Exodus9:29 Musa aramubwira ati «Ninsohoka mu mugi, ndatega amaboko ntakambire Uhoraho, maze inkuba zirorere kandi n’urubura rureke kugwa, kugira ngo umenye ko isi yose ari iy’Uhoraho." 
Exodus9:30 Nyamara wowe n’abagaragu bawe, nzi neza ko mutaragera aho gutinya Uhoraho Imana.»" 
Exodus9:31 Ibiti byera ubudodo, n’ingano za bushoki bihinduka imirara. Koko rero za bushoki zari amahundo, n’ibiti byera ubudodo ari uruyange." 
Exodus9:32 Ariko ingano zindi n’inganogaju ntibyononekara, kuko byo byera bitinze." 
Exodus9:33 Musa ava kwa Farawo, asohoka mu mugi; atega amaboko atakambira Uhoraho, maze inkuba n’urubura birarorera, kandi imvura ntiyongera kwisuka ku isi." 
Exodus9:34 Farawo ngo abone ko imvura n’urubura n’inkuba bihosheje, akomeza gucumura; we n’ibyegera bye banga kuva ku izima." 
Exodus9:35 Umutima wa Farawo ugumya kunangira, maze ntiyareka Abayisraheli bagenda, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabibwiye Musa." 
Exodus10:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Genda usange Farawo, kuko ari jye wateye umutima we kutava ku izima, kimwe n’uw’ibyegera bye, kugira ngo mbone uko nkorera ibimenyetso byanjye muri bo rwagati." 
Exodus10:2 Bityo uzatekerereze umuhungu wawe n’umwuzukuru wawe ukuntu nasumbirije Abanyamisiri, n’ukuntu nakoreye ibimenyetso iwabo, kugira ngo mumenye ko ari jyewe Uhoraho.»" 
Exodus10:3 Musa na Aroni basanga Farawo, maze baramubwira bati «Uhoraho Imana y’Abahebureyi aravuze ngo: Uzanga kwiyoroshya imbere yanjye uzahereze hehe? Rekura umuryango wanjye kugira ngo ujye kunsenga;" 
Exodus10:4 niba kandi wanze kurekura umuryango wanjye ngo ugende, guhera ejo nzateza inzige mu gihugu cyawe." 
Exodus10:5 Zizatwikira igihugu cyose, maze begushobora kubona ubutaka. Zizarya ibyari byararokotse, ibyo urubura rwagusigiye, zizarye ibiti byose bikurira mu mirima yanyu." 
Exodus10:6 Zizuzura mu mazu yawe, no mu mazu y’abagaragu bawe bose, no mu mazu y’Abanyamisiri bose; ibyo kandi ababyeyi bawe n’abakurambere bawe ntibigeze babibona kuva aho babereyeho ku isi kugera uyu munsi.» Musa arikubura, asiga Farawo aho ngaho." 
Exodus10:7 Abagaragu ba Farawo baramubwira bati «Uriya muntu azatubuza uburyo ahereze hehe? Reka abo bantu bagende, bajye gusenga Uhoraho Imana yabo. Mbese ntubona ubu ngubu ko Misiri imaze kuzahara?»" 
Exodus10:8 Bahamagaza Musa na Aroni kwa Farawo, nuko arababwira ati «Ngaho nimugende, musenge Uhoraho Imana yanyu! Ati ariko se ni bande bagomba kujyayo?»" 
Exodus10:9 Musa arasubiza ati «Tuzagenda hamwe n’abana n’abakambwe bacu, tuzagenda hamwe n’abahungu n’abakobwa bacu, hamwe n’intama zacu n’inka zacu; kuko kuri twe ari urugendo rugenewe kubaha Uhoraho.»" 
Exodus10:10 Nuko Farawo arababwira ati «Uhoraho abane namwe, niba koko mbarekuye mukagenda hamwe n’abana banyu! Nyamara ariko murabyitondere, kuko mbona mufite imigambi mibi!" 
Exodus10:11 Na ko ntibishoboka! Nihagende gusa mwebwe abagabo, maze musenge Uhoraho Imana yanyu, umva ko ari byo muharanira da!» Nuko babirukana mu maso ya Farawo." 
Exodus10:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ramburira ukuboko kwawe ku gihugu cya Misiri, kugira ngo inzige zaduke mu gihugu cya Misiri, zirye ibimera byose mu butaka, ibyo urubura rwari rwasize byose.»" 
Exodus10:13 Musa aramburira inkoni ye ku gihugu cya Misiri, maze uwo munsi wose n’ijoro ryose, Uhoraho ayobora hejuru y’igihugu umuyaga w’iburasirazuba; igitondo gitangaje, umuyaga w’iburasirazuba uba wazanye inzige." 
Exodus10:14 Inzige ziroha mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri, maze zizimagiza ubutaka bwose bwa Misiri. Zari nyinshi cyane, zirenze umubare utigeze uboneka kandi utazongera kuboneka ukundi." 
Exodus10:15 Zitwikira ubutaka bwose, kugeza aho butakigaragara. Ziyongobeza ibyatsi byo mu gihugu, n’imbuto zose ziri ku biti, izo urubura rwari rwarasize; maze ntihasigara ibabi na rimwe ku biti, cyangwa icyatsi na kimwe mu mirima y’igihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Exodus10:16 Farawo yihutira guhamagaza Musa na Aroni, aravuga ati «Nacumuriye Uhoraho Imana yanyu, kandi namwe ndabahemukira." 
Exodus10:17 Nanone emera umbabarire icyaha cyanjye ubu ngubu bwonyine, maze wambaze Uhoraho Imana yanyu, kugira ngo nibura ankize uru rupfu.»" 
Exodus10:18 Musa asohoka kwa Farawo, maze yambaza Uhoraho." 
Exodus10:19 Nuko wa muyaga, Uhoraho awuhindura uw’iburengerazuba urahuhera cyane. Ukubura inzige, maze uziroha mu nyanja y’Urufunzo; ntihasigara uruzige na rumwe mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri." 
Exodus10:20 Nyamara Uhoraho atera umutima wa Farawo kunangira, maze Farawo ntiyareka Abayisraheli bagenda." 
Exodus10:21 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Rambura ukuboko kwawe werekeza ku ijuru, maze mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri hacure umwijima ubuditse, ku buryo umuntu yawukorakora.»" 
Exodus10:22 Musa arambura ukuboko kwe akwerekeza ku ijuru, maze hacura umwijima ubuditse mu gihugu cyose cya Misiri; umara iminsi itatu." 
Exodus10:23 Nta washoboraga kubona uwo bava inda imwe; ntihagira uva aho yari ari, muri iyo minsi itatu! Nyamara ahantu Abayisraheli bari batuye, wasangaga habona." 
Exodus10:24 Farawo ahamagaza Musa, aramubwira ati «Ngaho nimugende musenge Uhoraho! Icyakora intama zanyu n’inka zanyu byo bizasigare hano; naho abana banyu n’abagore banyu, bo mushobora kujyana.»" 
Exodus10:25 Musa arasubiza ati «Ese ni wowe uzaduherayo ibyo gutamba, no gutwikira Uhoraho Imana yacu?" 
Exodus10:26 Reka da! Tuzajyana n’amatungo yacu! Nta tungo na rimwe rizasigara ino, kuko ari yo tuzavanamo ibyo gutura Uhoraho Imana yacu, kandi ntitwamenya ibyo tuzatura Uhoraho tutaragera aho hantu!»" 
Exodus10:27 Nyamara Uhoraho atera umutima wa Farawo kunangira, yanga kubarekura." 
Exodus10:28 Farawo aramubwira ati «Hoshi mva iruhande! Wirinde kongera kumpinguka imbere, kuko umunsi uzampinguka imbere, nzakwica!»" 
Exodus10:29 Musa arasubiza ati «Urabivuze, sinzongera guhinguka imbere yawe!»" 
Exodus11:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Nshigaje koherereza Farawo na Misiri icyago kimwe gusa; hanyuma akabarekura mukava ino, ndetse ari byo akabirukana mukagenda burundu." 
Exodus11:2 Ubwire rubanda, buri mugabo asange umuturanyi we, na buri mugore asange mugenzi we baturanye, maze babasabe ibintu bya feza n’ibintu bya zahabu.»" 
Exodus11:3 Nuko Uhoraho atera Abanyamisiri kubakira neza. Na Musa kandi ubwe yarebwagaho igihangange mu gihugu cya Misiri, mu bagaragu ba Farawo no muri rubanda." 
Exodus11:4 Musa aravuga ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Mu ijoro rishyira igicuku, nzambukiranya Misiri;" 
Exodus11:5 maze icyavutse uburiza cyose mu gihugu cya Misiri kizapfe, kuva ku mfura ya Farawo yari kuzamusimbura ku ngoma kugeza ku mfura yavutse ku muja upfukamye inyuma y’urusyo, no kugeza ku buriza bwose bw’amatungo." 
Exodus11:6 Mu gihugu cya Misiri hose hazacura imiborogo, batigeze bumva mbere kandi batazongera kumva ukundi." 
Exodus11:7 Nyamara mu Bayisraheli bose nta n’imbwa izamokera umuntu cyangwa inyamaswa, kugira ngo mumenyereho ko Uhoraho atandukanya Misiri na Israheli." 
Exodus11:8 Icyo gihe aba bagaragu bawe bazamanuka bansange, bampfukame imbere, banyinginge bati ’Sohoka ugende, wowe n’imbaga yose uyobora’. Hanyuma rero nzagende.» Nuko Musa asohoka kwa Farawo afite uburakari bwinshi." 
Exodus11:9 Uhoraho yungamo abwira Musa, ati «Farawo nta bwo azakumva, kugira ngo ibitangaza byanjye byigwize mu gihugu cya Misiri.»" 
Exodus11:10 Musa na Aroni bari bakoreye ibyo bitangaza byose imbere ya Farawo, ariko Uhoraho atera umutima wa Farawo kunangira, maze ntiyarekura Abayisraheli ngo bagende bave mu gihugu cye." 
Exodus12:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni bari mu gihugu cya Misiri, ati" 
Exodus12:2 «Uku kwezi kuzababere intangiriro y’amezi, kuzabe ukwa mbere mu mezi y’umwaka wanyu." 
Exodus12:3 Nimubwire imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli, muti ’Ku munsi wa cumi w’uku kwezi, muzafate itungo rimwe muri buri muryango, itungo muri buri rugo." 
Exodus12:4 Niba urugo rurimo abantu bake kuri iryo tungo, bazarifatanye n’umuturanyi ubari hafi cyane, baringanize n’umubare w’abantu. Muzahitemo iryo tungo mukurikije icyo buri muntu ashobora kurya." 
Exodus12:5 Iryo tungo rizabe ridafite inenge, kandi ari isekurume imaze umwaka umwe. Muzaritoranye mu bana b’intama cyangwa mu bana b’ihene." 
Exodus12:6 Muzarigumane kugeza ku munsi wa cumi n’ine w’uku kwezi, maze ikoraniro ryose ry’imbaga y’Abayisraheli bazaribage mu mugoroba w’akabwibwi." 
Exodus12:7 Bazende ku maraso y’iryo tungo, bayasige ku nkomanizo z’imiryango no ku mitambiko y’inzugi z’amazu bazaririramo." 
Exodus12:8 Bazarye inyama zaryo muri iryo joro. Bazazirye zokeje, bazirishe imigati idasembuye n’imboga zisharira." 
Exodus12:9 Ntimuzagire icyo murya cyazo ari kibisi cyangwa se cyatetswe mu mazi: byose bizabe byokeje gusa, ari umutwe, ari amaguru n’amara." 
Exodus12:10 Mugomba kuzaba mwarangije butaracya; kandi nihagira ibisaguka mu gitondo, muzabitwike." 
Exodus12:11 Iryo tungo muzarirya mutya: muzabe mukenyeje umukoba, mwambaye inkweto mu birenge, mufite inkoni mu ntoki; kandi muzarye mugira bwangu, kuko ari Pasika y’Uhoraho." 
Exodus12:12 Muri iryo joro, nzambukiranya igihugu cya Misiri, maze nice icyavutse uburiza cyose mu gihugu cya Misiri, guhera ku bantu kugeza ku nyamaswa; kandi n’ibigirwamana bya Misiri byose mbicire imanza. Ni jye Uhoraho!" 
Exodus12:13 Amaraso azababera ikimenyetso ku mazu muzaba murimo. Nzabona amaraso, maze mbahiteho, mwoye kuzarimburwa igihe nzaba ndiho noreka igihugu cya Misiri." 
Exodus12:14 Uwo munsi uzababere urwibutso; buri mwaka muzajye mukora urugendo rwo kujya gusingiza Uhoraho. Muzajye muhimbaza uwo munsi uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana. Ngiryo itegeko ridakuka mbahaye.’» 
Exodus12:15 Uhoraho yungamo ati «Mu minsi irindwi, muzajya murya imigati idasembuye. Guhera ku munsi wa mbere, muzavane mu mazu yanyu icyitwa umusemburo cyose. Kandi nihagira urya umugati usembuye, kuva ku munsi wa mbere kugeza ku munsi wa karindwi, uwo azaba aciwe muri Israheli." 
Exodus12:16 Ku munsi wa mbere muzagire ikoraniro ritagatifu, no ku munsi wa karindwi mugenze mutyo. Muri iyo minsi, nta murimo n’umwe bazakora, uretse gutegura ibyo kurya." 
Exodus12:17 Muzubahirize umunsi mukuru w’imigati idasembuye, kuko kuri uwo munsi nyine ari bwo navanye ingabo zanyu mu gihugu cya Misiri. Muzubahirize rero uwo munsi mukuru uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana. Ngiryo itegeko ridakuka mbahaye." 
Exodus12:18 Mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku munsi wa cumi n’ine w’ukwezi nimugoroba, muzajye murya imigati idasembuye kuzageza ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’umwe w’ukwezi nimugoroba." 
Exodus12:19 Mu minsi irindwi ntihazagire imisemburo iba mu mazu yanyu. Kandi nihagira urya umugati usembuye, uwo muntu azaba aciwe mu ikoraniro rya Israheli; yaba umusuhuke, yaba umwenegihugu." 
Exodus12:20 Ntimuzagire icyo murya na kinzinya kirimo umusemburo. Aho muzaba mutuye hose, muzajye murya imigati idasembuye.»" 
Exodus12:21 Musa atumiza abakuru bose b’imiryango ya Israheli, maze arababwira ati «Nimugende mutoranye itungo, murebe irikwiranye n’ingo zanyu, maze mutambe Pasika." 
Exodus12:22 Muzende umushandiko w’icyuhagiro, mwinike mu maraso azaba ari ku ibesani; ayo maraso azaba ari ku ibesani muyasige ku mutambiko w’urugi no ku nkomanizo zombi. Naho mwebwe, ntihazagire umuntu urenga umuryango w’inzu ye, kugeza mu gitondo." 
Exodus12:23 Igihe Uhoraho azambukiranya Misiri kugira ngo ayoreke, azabona amaraso ku mutambiko w’umuryango no ku nkomanizo zawo zombi, maze Uhoraho atambuke uwo muryango, yegutuma Umunyacyorezo yinjira mu mazu yanyu ngo abarimbure." 
Exodus12:24 Ibyo maze kubabwira ni itegeko muzakurikiza, wowe n’abana bawe, iteka ryose." 
Exodus12:25 Igihe rero muzaba mwarinjiye mu gihugu Uhoraho azabaha nk’uko yabivuze mbere, muzubahirize uwo muhango." 
Exodus12:26 Abana banyu nibababaza ngo: Uwo muhango mukoze uvuga iki? 
Exodus12:27 muzabasubize muti ’Ni igitambo cya Pasika dutuye Uhoraho; kuko yahise imbere y’ingo z’Abayisraheli igihe bari mu Misiri, akica Abanyamisiri, nyamara akarokora ingo zacu.’» Nuko imbaga irapfukama, barasenga." 
Exodus12:28 Hanyuma Abayisraheli barataha, maze ibyo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa na Aroni, byose babigenza uko yabibabwiye." 
Exodus12:29 Igicuku rero kinishye, Uhoraho yica icyavutse uburiza cyose mu gihugu cya Misiri, guhera ku mfura ya Farawo yari kumusimbura ku ngoma kugeza ku mfura y’umunyururu uri mu buroko, no ku buriza bwose bw’amatungo."
