Exodus12:30 Muri iryo joro, Farawo arabyuka kimwe n’abagaragu be bose n’Abanyamisiri bose; maze mu Misiri hose hacura imiborogo, kuko nta rugo na rumwe rutari rufite intumbi." 
Exodus12:31 Nuko Farawo ahamagaza Musa na Aroni nijoro, arababwira ati «Nimuhaguruke mugende, mumvire mu gihugu, mwebwe n’Abayisraheli banyu, mujye gutura ibitambo Uhoraho nk’uko mwabishakaga." 
Exodus12:32 Mushorere kandi n’amatungo yanyu, amagufi n’amaremare, nk’uko mwabisabye, maze mugende! Ariko nanjye munsabire umugisha.»" 
Exodus12:33 Abanyamisiri bashushubikanya Abayisraheli ngo babavire mu gihugu ako kanya. Koko rero baravugaga bati «Twese tugiye gupfira gushira!» 
Exodus12:34 Imbaga y’Abayisraheli ihagurukana icyanga cy’imigati kitaratangira gututumba; ibyibo babipfunyika mu bishura byabo, maze babiterera ku ntugu." 
Exodus12:35 Abayisraheli bari bagenjeje uko Musa yari yababwiye: bari batiye Abanyamisiri ibintu bya feza, ibintu bya zahabu, n’imyambaro," 
Exodus12:36 kuko Uhoraho yari yatumye Abanyamisiri borohera imbaga ye, maze babemerera ibyo babasabaga. Nuko basahura batyo Abanyamisiri!" 
Exodus12:37 Abayisraheli bahaguruka i Ramusesi berekeza i Sukoti; bagenda ari abagabo nk’ibihumbi magana atandatu, utabariyemo abagore n’abana." 
Exodus12:38 Byongeye, hari ikivange cy’abantu b’impunzi baturutse hirya no hino, bazamukana na bo, hamwe n’amashyo yabo menshi y’intama n’inka." 
Exodus12:39 Icyanga cy’imigati bari bavanye mu Misiri baracyotsa, kivamo udusheshe tw’imigati idasembuye, kuko cyari kitaraganya gututumba igihe birukanwaga mu Misiri hutihuti. Bagiye ubudatindiganya, ndetse badateguye n’impamba." 
Exodus12:40 Abayisraheli bamaze imyaka magana ane na mirongo itatu mu Misiri. 
Exodus12:41 Iyo myaka yose imaze gushira, kuri uwo munsi nyine, imbaga y’Uhoraho yose isohoka mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Exodus12:42 Ryabaye ijoro ryo gutaramira Uhoraho igihe abavanye mu Misiri. Kuva ubwo, iryo joro nyine Abayisraheli barigenera Uhoraho, maze buri mwaka bakarikoramo igitaramo, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana." 
Exodus12:43 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati «Dore amabwiriza yerekeye Pasika: Nta munyamahanga uzayiryaho." 
Exodus12:44 Umucakara wese uzaba yaraguzwe ifeza, uzabanze umugenye, maze abone kuyiryaho." 
Exodus12:45 Naho umushyitsi n’umucanshuro, bo ntibazayiryeho." 
Exodus12:46 Muzayirire mu nzu nyirizina. Ntihazagire inyama zayo musohokana hanze, kandi ntihazagire igufwa ryayo muvuna." 
Exodus12:47 Imbaga yose ya Israheli izahimbaze Pasika. 
Exodus12:48 Nihagira umusuhuke ucumbitse iwawe, agashaka na we guhimbaza Pasika yo gusingiza Uhoraho, bizaba ngombwa ko uwitwa umuhungu wese umukomokaho abanza kugenywa; hanyuma azemererwe kuyihimbaza, kuko noneho azaba abaye nk’umwenegihugu. Ariko nta n’umwe uzayiryaho atabanje kugenywa." 
Exodus12:49 Itegeko rero rizaba rimwe ku muturage no ku musuhuke uzaba abatuyemo.» 
Exodus12:50 Abayisraheli bose bakora uko Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa na Aroni; babigenza batyo. 
Exodus12:51 Nuko kuri uwo munsi nyine, Uhoraho avana Abayisraheli mu gihugu cya Misiri, akurikije imitwe baremye." 
Exodus13:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa aya magambo, ati" 
Exodus13:2 «Uburiza bwose muri Israheli, uzabunture, bwaba ari ubw’umuntu cyangwa se ubw’itungo: ni ubwanjye.»" 
Exodus13:3 Musa abwira rubanda, ati «Muzajye mwibuka wa munsi mwaviriyeho mu Misiri, mu nzu y’ubucakara, kuko Uhoraho yabakuyeyo abigirishije imbaraga z’ukuboko kwe. Ntimuzarye imigati isembuye kuri uyu munsi," 
Exodus13:4 kuko musohotse ubu ngubu mu kwezi kw’Amahundo. 
Exodus13:5 Igihe rero Uhoraho azaba yakwinjije mu gihugu cy’Abakanahani, n’Abahiti, n’Abahemori, n’Abahivi, n’Abayebuzi, ari na cyo yarahiriye abakurambere bawe ko azakiguha, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki, uzakore uyu muhango muri uku kwezi nyine." 
Exodus13:6 Uzamare iminsi irindwi utunzwe gusa n’imigati idasembuye; maze ku munsi wa karindwi hazabe umunsi mukuru wo gusingiza Uhoraho. 
Exodus13:7 Bazamara iminsi irindwi barya imigati idasembuye. Ntihazagire umugati usembuye uboneka iwawe, ntihazagire umusemburo uboneka iwawe mu gihugu cyawe cyose." 
Exodus13:8 Kuri uwo munsi uzasobanurire umwana wawe, uti ’Tugenza dutyo twibuka ibyiza Uhoraho yatugiriye igihe adukuye mu Misiri.’" 
Exodus13:9 Uhoraho yagukuye mu Misiri abigirishije imbaraga z’ukuboko kwe. Ngicyo ikizakubera nk’ikimenyetso mu kiganza cyawe, cyangwa urwibutso ruri hagati y’amaso, kugira ngo itegeko ry’Uhoraho rihame mu kanwa kawe." 
Exodus13:10 Uzubahirize iryo tegeko igihe cyaryo kigeze, uko imyaka igenda isimburana." 
Exodus13:11 Igihe rero Uhoraho azaba yakwinjije mu gihugu cy’Abakanahani, maze akakikwegurira nk’uko yabikurahiye ubwawe n’abakurambere bawe," 
Exodus13:12 uzature Uhoraho ikivutse uburiza cyose ku mugore, n’ikivutse uburiza cyose ku matungo uzaba ufite: uburiza bwose bw’igitsinagabo bugenewe Uhoraho." 
Exodus13:13 Icyakora uburiza bwose bw’indogobe, uzabucunguze isekurume y’intama; niba utayibucunguje, uzabuvune ijosi. N’umuhungu wese w’imfura mu bana bawe, na we uzamucunguze itungo." 
Exodus13:14 Igihe rero umwana wawe azakubaza ngo: ’Ibi ngibi bivuga iki?’ uzamusubize uti ’Ni uko Uhoraho yatuvanye mu Misiri, mu nzu y’ubucakara, abigirishije imbaraga z’ukuboko kwe." 
Exodus13:15 Koko rero, Farawo yari yanze kuturekura ngo tugende, maze Uhoraho yica ibyavutse uburiza byose mu gihugu cya Misiri, kuva ku mfura y’umuntu kugeza ku buriza bw’amatungo. Ngiyo impamvu ituma ntura Uhoraho igitambo cy’ibivutse uburiza byose by’igitsinagabo, ariko ngacungura imfura yose mu bahungu banjye.’" 
Exodus13:16 Ibyo bizakubera nk’ikimenyetso mu kiganza cyawe, cyangwa hagati y’amaso yawe, byibutse ko Uhoraho yatuvanye mu Misiri ku bubasha bw’ukuboko kwe.»" 
Exodus13:17 Farawo amaze kurekura imbaga y’Abayisraheli ngo bigendere, Imana ntiyabanyujije mu nzira iboneza mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti, n’ubwo ari yo yari iy’ubusamo; kuko Imana yibwiraga iti «Hato iyi mbaga itazisubiraho ku mpamvu yo gutinya imirwano, maze bakisubirira mu Misiri!»" 
Exodus13:18 Imana rero inyuza rubanda mu nzira iziguye, ahagana mu butayu bwegereye Inyanja y’Urufunzo. Abayisraheli bimutse mu gihugu cya Misiri bigabanyijemo imitwe." 
Exodus13:19 Musa yimukana amagufwa ya Yozefu, kuko Yozefu uwo yari yarabisabye Abayisraheli, akabarahiza ababwira ati «Imana ntizabura kubatabara; icyo gihe muzave muri iki gihugu mujyanye n’amagufwa yanjye!»" 
Exodus13:20 Bahaguruka rero i Sukoti, baca ingando ahitwa Etamu, ku musezero w’ubutayu." 
Exodus13:21 Uhoraho ubwe yabagendaga imbere: ku manywa yabaga ari mu nkingi y’agacu kugira ngo abayobore inzira, nijoro akaba ari mu nkingi y’umuriro kugira ngo abamurikire; bityo bagashobora kugenda ku manywa na nijoro." 
Exodus13:22 Inkingi y’agacu ntiyaburaga na rimwe kujya rubanda imbere ku manywa, n’inkingi y’umuriro ikabagenda imbere nijoro." 
Exodus14:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Exodus14:2 «Bwira Abayisraheli bahindure icyerekezo, maze bagaruke bace ingando ahateganye na Pi‐Hahiroti, hagati y’i Migidoli n’Inyanja. Hafi y’i Behali‐Sefoni, ahateganye n’aho hantu, ku nkombe y’Inyanja, ni ho bazaca ingando." 
Exodus14:3 Maze Farawo azabone ubwigamba ku Bayisraheli ngo: Dore bayobagurikiye mu gihugu, ubutayu bwabazitiye!" 
Exodus14:4 Ubwo nzatera umutima wa Farawo kunangira, maze azabakurikirane. Nyamara nzagaragaza ikuzo ryanjye, nkorere ishyano Farawo n’ingabo ze zose, maze Abanyamisiri bazamenyereho ko ari jyewe Uhoraho.» Nuko Abayisraheli babigenza batyo." 
Exodus14:5 Umwami wa Misiri aza kumenya ko umuryango w’Abayisraheli wacitse. Ubwo ngubwo umutima wa Farawo n’uw’abagaragu be urabirinduka; maze baravuga bati «Byagenze bite rwose kugira ngo tureke Abayisraheli bagenda, bekuzadukorera ukundi?»" 
Exodus14:6 Nuko Farawo azirikisha amafarasi ku igare rye, akoranya n’ingabo ze, baragenda." 
Exodus14:7 Yajyanye amagare magana atandatu y’indobanure, n’amagare yose ya Misiri, hamwe n’abagabo bita kuri buri gare." 
Exodus14:8 Nuko Uhoraho atera umutima wa Farawo umwami wa Misiri kunangira, maze yiruka ku Bayisraheli, kuri abo Bayisraheli nyine bari basohotse bishimiye kwigenga." 
Exodus14:9 Abanyamisiri rero babirukaho, maze babashyikirira aho baciye ingando iruhande rw’Inyanja: amafarasi yose akurura amagare ya Farawo, n’abarwanira ku mafarasi, hamwe n’izindi ngabo ze, babashyikirira hafi y’i Pi‐Hahiroti, hateganye na Behali‐Sefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Kubera ko Farawo yari amaze kubasatira, Abayisraheli bakebutse, babona Abanyamisiri baje babateye! Nuko Abayisraheli bakuka umutima bitavugwa, baganyira Uhoraho." 
Exodus14:11 Babwira Musa, bati «Mbese Misiri yari ibuze imva byatuma utuzana ngo tugwe hano mu butayu? Watugenjeje ute kugira ngo utuvane mu Misiri?" 
Exodus14:12 Nta bwo twari twarakubwiriye mu Misiri tuti ’Tureke tube abagaragu b’Abanyamisiri, kuko ikiruta ari uko twaba abagaragu b’Abanyamisiri, aho kugwa mu butayu?’»" 
Exodus14:13 Musa rero abwira rubanda, ati «Mwigira ubwoba! Nimukomere, maze muze kwirebera uko Uhoraho abarokora uyu munsi! Koko rero Abanyamisiri muruzi none, nta bwo muzongera kubabona ukundi." 
Exodus14:14 Uhoraho ubwe ni we uri burwane mu kigwi cyanyu, naho mwebwe mwigaramiye!»" 
Exodus14:15 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Igituma ukabya kuntakambira ni iki? Bwira Abayisraheli bashyire nzira." 
Exodus14:16 Naho wowe, ngaho bangura inkoni yawe, urambure ukuboko ukwerekeza ku nyanja, uyicemo icyambu, maze Abayisraheli bagende ku maguru mu ngeri y’inyanja humutse." 
Exodus14:17 Naho jyewe ngiye gutera umutima w’Abanyamisiri kunangira, kugira ngo bayishokemo babakurikiye, maze ngaragaze ikuzo ryanjye nkorera ishyano Farawo n’ingabo ze zose, n’amagare ye n’abanyamafarasi be." 
Exodus14:18 Abanyamisiri bazamenya ko ari jyewe Uhoraho, nimara kugaragaza ikuzo ryanjye nkorera ishyano Farawo n’amagare ye n’abanyamafarasi be.»" 
Exodus14:19 Umumalayika w’Imana wari urangaje imbere y’ingabo z’Abayisraheli, aragenda maze noneho ajya inyuma yabo; na ya nkingi y’agacu yabahoraga imbere, irimuka ihagarara inyuma yabo," 
Exodus14:20 ijya hagati y’ingando y’Abanyamisiri n’ingando y’Abayisraheli. Haba ka gacu kamurika, ariko haba n’umwijima mwinshi, bituma ingamba zombi zidashyikirana ijoro ryose." 
Exodus14:21 Musa arambura ukuboko kwe akwerekeza ku nyanja, maze muri iryo joro ryose Uhoraho atsurisha inyanja umuyaga w’inkubi uturuka mu burasirazuba. Inyanja irakama; amazi yayo yigabanyamo kabiri," 
Exodus14:22 ku buryo Abayisraheli bagendaga ku maguru mu ngeri y’inyanja, naho amazi yemaraye nk’inkike iburyo n’ibumoso bwabo." 
Exodus14:23 Nuko Abanyamisiri babirukaho, amafarasi yose ya Farawo hamwe n’amagare ye n’abanyamafarasi be bashoka mu nyanja nyirizina babakurikiye." 
Exodus14:24 Ngo bigere mu museke, Uhoraho arebera ingabo z’Abanyamisiri muri ya nkingi y’umuriro n’agacu, maze atera impagarara mu ngabo z’Abanyamisiri;" 
Exodus14:25 abuza ibiziga by’amagare yabo kugenda, kuyatwara bikabagora. Ubwo Abanyamisiri barabwirana bati «Nimuze duhunge Abayisraheli, kuko Uhoraho arwana mu kigwi cyabo yibasiye Misiri!»" 
Exodus14:26 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Rambura ukuboko kwawe werekeza ku nyanja, kugira ngo amazi agaruke yibumbire hejuru y’Abanyamisiri, hejuru y’amagare yabo n’abanyamafarasi babo!»" 
Exodus14:27 Musa rero arambura ukuboko kwe akwerekeza ku nyanja; maze izuba rigiye kurasa, amazi agaruka mu mwanya yari asanzwemo. Abanyamisiri bakubana bayahunga, ariko Uhoraho yararika Abanyamisiri mu ngeri y’inyanja." 
Exodus14:28 Amazi asubiranye, atwikira amagare n’abanyamafarasi, n’izindi ngabo zose za Farawo zari zashotse mu nyanja zikurikiranye Abayisraheli; ntihagira n’umwe ucika ku icumu." 
Exodus14:29 Nyamara Abayisraheli bo bari binyuriye mu nyanja nyirizina humutse, amazi yemaraye nk’inkike iburyo n’ibumoso bwabo." 
Exodus14:30 Nuko uwo munsi Uhoraho akiza Abayisraheli igitero cy’Abanyamisiri; maze Abayisraheli babona ku nkombe y’inyanja Abanyamisiri babaye imirambo. 
Exodus14:31 Abayisraheli babona ukuntu Uhoraho yatsembesheje Abanyamisiri ububasha bukomeye; maze imbaga yose itangira gutinya Uhoraho, yemera Uhoraho na Musa umugaragu we." 
Exodus15:1 Nuko Musa hamwe n’Abayisraheli baririmbira Uhoraho iyi ndirimbo, bavuga bati «Ndaririmba Uhoraho, kuko yisesuyeho ikuzo, ifarasi n’uyirwaniraho yabiroshye mu nyanja!" 
Exodus15:2 Uhoraho ni we mbaraga zanjye, ni we ndirimba. Ni we wankijije! Ni we Mana yanjye, reka musingize, ni we Imana ya data, reka mushimagize." 
Exodus15:3 Uhoraho ni intwari ku rugamba, izina rye ni Uhoraho!" 
Exodus15:4 Amagare ya Farawo hamwe n’ingabo ze yabiroshye mu nyanja, abanyamafarasi be b’imena bamirwa n’Inyanja y’Urufunzo." 
Exodus15:5 Ibizenga by’ikuzimu birabatwikira, barigita mu mazi ikuzimu boshye ibuye!" 
Exodus15:6 Uhoraho, indyo yawe irangwa n’ububasha, indyo yawe, Uhoraho, yajanjaguye umwanzi;" 
Exodus15:7 urimbura abanzi bawe ubigiranye ubuhangange butangaje, maze uburakari bwawe bukaze bukabatwika nk’ibyatsi byumye." 
Exodus15:8 Wahumekeye mu mazuru yawe, maze amazi arakorana, imivumba ihagarara nk’ikirundo, imihengeri yemarara mu nyanja nyirizina." 
Exodus15:9 Umwanzi yari yibwiye ati «Ndabirukaho mbafate, ndigabanya iminyago, maze inda yanjye iyihage; ndakura inkota, maze ukuboko kwanjye kubatsembe.»" 
Exodus15:10 Wabyukije umuyaga wawe, maze inyanja irabatwikira, barokera nk’ibuye ry’icyuma mu ngeri y’amazi!" 
Exodus15:11 Uhoraho, mbese ni iyihe mana yahwana nawe? Ni iyihe ihwanye nawe, wowe urabagirana ubutungane? Ugatera ubwoba mu byo ukora bitangaje? Ugakora ibintu bihebuje?" 
Exodus15:12 Warambuye indyo yawe, isi irabamira." 
Exodus15:13 Wabaye indahemuka, uyobora imbaga wironkeye, ku bubasha bwawe uyerekeza mu Ngoro yawe ntagatifu." 
Exodus15:14 Amahanga yarabyumvise ahinda umushyitsi, Abafilisiti barakangarana," 
Exodus15:15 Abatware ba Edomu bakuka umutima, ibikomangoma bya Mowabu biradagadwa, abaturage bose b’i Kanahani babura iyo bakwirwa." 
Exodus15:16 Ubukangarane n’ubuhahamuke birabataha, ubuhangange bw’ukuboko kwawe, Uhoraho, bwatumye bajunjama nk’ibuye, baraceceka igihe imbaga yawe iriho itambuka, igihe imbaga wironkeye iriho itambuka." 
Exodus15:17 Abawe uzabijyanira, maze ubatuze ku musozi wagize ubukonde bwawe, ahantu wigiriye ikibanza cyawe, Uhoraho, mu Ngoro wiyubakiye n’amaboko yawe, Nyagasani." 
Exodus15:18 Uhoraho ni Umwami ingoma ibihumbi!» 
Exodus15:19 Amafarasi ya Farawo hamwe n’amagare ye n’abayarwaniraho binjiye mu nyanja, maze amazi y’inyanja Uhoraho ayabagarura hejuru, naho Abayisraheli bo bigendera ahumutse mu nyanja nyirizina." 
Exodus15:20 Nuko umuhanuzikazi Miriyamu, mushiki wa Aroni, afata ingoma mu ntoki, maze abagore bose bamukurikira bavuza utugoma kandi babyina." 
Exodus15:21 Miriyamu abaterera, agira ati «Nimuririmbe Uhoraho, kuko yisesuyeho ikuzo, ifarasi n’uyirwaniraho yabiroshye mu nyanja!»" 
Exodus15:22 Musa ahagurutsa Abayisraheli ku Nyanja y’Urufunzo, bagenda berekeje mu butayu bwa Shuru. Bamara iminsi itatu bagenda muri ubwo butayu, batabona amazi." 
Exodus15:23 Bagera i Mara, ariko ntibashobora kunywa amazi y’i Mara, kuko yaruraga: ni na cyo cyatumye aho hantu bahita Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Nuko rubanda bitotombera Musa, bati «Turanywa iki?»" 
Exodus15:25 Musa atakambira Uhoraho, maze Uhoraho amurangira igiti cy’ubwoko atari azi. Musa ngo akijugunye muri ayo mazi, amazi ahita aryoha. Aho ngaho ni ho Uhoraho yabahereye amategeko n’imigenzo bazajya bakurikiza; ni na ho Uhoraho yabageragereje." 
Exodus15:26 Hanyuma aravuga ati «Niwumva neza ibyo Uhoraho Imana yawe akubwira, ugakora ibitunganye mu maso ye, ugatega amatwi amategeko ye kandi ugakurikiza amateka ye yose, nta bwo nzaguteza icyago na kimwe mu byo nateje Abanyamisiri; kuko ari jye Uhoraho ugukiza.»" 
Exodus15:27 Amaherezo bagera ahitwa Elimu: hari amasoko cumi n’abiri y’amazi n’ibiti mirongo irindwi by’imikindo. Nuko baca ingando aho ngaho iruhande rw’amazi. 
Exodus16:1 Bahaguruka Elimu, maze imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli itaha mu butayu bwa Sini buri hagati ya Elimu na Sinayi; hari ku munsi wa cumi n’itanu w’ukwezi kwa kabiri kuva aho bimukiye mu Misiri." 
Exodus16:2 Aho mu butayu, ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli ryitotombera Musa na Aroni." 
Exodus16:3 Abayisraheli barababwira bati «Yewe! Iyo byibura twicwa n’ukuboko k’Uhoraho tukiri mu gihugu cya Misiri, igihe twari twiyicariye iruhande rw’inkono z’inyama, twirira n’imigati uko dushaka! Ubu mwatuzanye muri ubu butayu kugira ngo mwicishe inzara iyi mbaga yose!»" 
Exodus16:4 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Dore ngiye kubagushaho nk’imvura umugati uturutse mu ijuru. Uko bukeye rubanda bazajya basohoka, batoragure ibyo bakeneye uwo munsi. Nzabagerageza ntyo, ndebe niba bazakurikiza amategeko yanjye cyangwa niba batazayakurikiza." 
Exodus16:5 Ku munsi wa gatandatu, nibategura ibyo bazaba batoraguye, bazasanga ari incuro ebyiri z’ibyo batoraguraga buri munsi.»" 
Exodus16:6 Musa na Aroni babwira Abayisraheli bose, bati «Iki kigoroba muraza kumenya ko Uhoraho ari we wabavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri;" 
Exodus16:7 kandi mu gitondo muzabona ikuzo ry’Uhoraho, kuko yumvise umwijujuto wanyu mwitotombera Uhoraho. Twebwe se turi iki ngo mutwijujutire?»" 
Exodus16:8 Musa arongera ati «Iki kigoroba Uhoraho araza kubaha inyama zo kurya, n’ejo mu gitondo azabahe imigati ibahagije; kuko Uhoraho yumvise umwijujuto wanyu mumwijujutira! Naho se twebwe turi iki? Si twebwe mwijujutira, ahubwo ni Uhoraho ubwe.»" 
Exodus16:9 Musa abwira Aroni, ati «Bwira imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli uti ’Nimwigire hafi imbere y’Uhoraho, kuko yumvise umwijujuto wanyu.’»" 
Exodus16:10 Mu gihe Aroni yabwiraga ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli, berekeza amaso ahagana mu butayu, maze ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ribabonekera riri mu gacu." 
Exodus16:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Exodus16:12 «Numvise umwijujuto w’Abayisraheli. Babwire uti ‘Nimugoroba, mu kabwibwi, murarya inyama; n’ejo mu gitondo muzahage umugati, maze mumenyereho ko ari jye Uhoraho Imana yanyu.’»" 
Exodus16:13 Ngo bugorobe, haduka inkware zigwa ari nyinshi mu ngando; na mu gitondo basanga mu mpande z’ingando hatonze ikime kibambitse." 
Exodus16:14 Icyo kime kimaze kweyuka, babona mu butayu utuntu tumeze nk’utubuto, twererana nk’urubura ku butaka." 
Exodus16:15 Abayisraheli baritegereza, maze barabazanya bati «Man hu», ari byo kuvuga ngo «Iki ni iki?» kuko batari bazi icyo ari cyo. Musa arababwira ati «Icyo ni umugati Uhoraho abahaye ngo murye." 
Exodus16:16 Dore icyo Uhoraho yategetse: Buri muntu atoragure ibihwanye n’ibyo abashije kurya; mutoragure omeru imwe kuri buri muntu, bikurikije umubare w’abantu bo mu ihema rye.»" 
Exodus16:17 Abayisraheli babigenza batyo. Baratoragura: bamwe byinshi, abandi bike." 
Exodus16:18 Hanyuma bagapimisha omeru; uwabaga yatoraguye byinshi ntagire na busa arenzaho, kandi n’uwabaga yatoraguye bike ntatubirwe na busa: mbese buri muntu yatoraguraga ibyo yari abashije kurya." 
Exodus16:19 Musa arababwira ati «Ntihazagire ugira icyo araza!» 
Exodus16:20 Nyamara bamwe ntibumvira Musa, bagira ibyo babika kugeza mu gitondo; ariko hazamo inyo, biranuka. Nuko Musa arabarakarira." 
Exodus16:21 Kuva ubwo, buri gitondo bakajya batoragura ibihwanye n’ibyo buri muntu abashije kurya; izuba ryava, ibisigaye bigashonga." 
Exodus16:22 Ku munsi wa gatandatu batoraguraga ibyo kurya bihwanye n’incuro ebyiri, omeru ebyiri kuri buri muntu. Abakuru b’imbaga bose baza kubimenyesha Musa." 
Exodus16:23 Arabasubiza ati «Ibyo ni byo Uhoraho yavuze. Ejo ni umunsi w’ikiruhuko, isabato y’Uhoraho: nimuteke ibyo mufite guteka, mushyushye mu mazi ibyo mufite byo gushyushya mu mazi, maze ibisagutse mubizigamire umunsi ukurikiyeho.»" 
Exodus16:24 Babizigamira umunsi ukurikiyeho nk’uko Musa yari yabitegetse. Nyamara byo ntibyagaga, kandi ntibyagwa inyo." 
Exodus16:25 Musa aravuga ati «Nimubirye uyu munsi wa none, kuko none ari isabato y’Uhoraho; uyu munsi ntimwabibona ku gasozi." 
Exodus16:26 Mujye mubitoragura mu minsi itandatu; naho umunsi wa karindwi, ni ikiruhuko, ntibizajya biboneka.»" 
Exodus16:27 Nyamara ku munsi wa karindwi, abantu bamwe bajya kubitoragura, ariko ntibagira icyo babona." 
Exodus16:28 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Muzahereza hehe kwanga gukurikiza amategeko yanjye n’amabwiriza yanjye?" 
Exodus16:29 Umva, kubera ko Uhoraho yabahaye isabato, ni cyo gituma ku munsi wa gatandatu abaha n’ifunguro ry’iminsi ibiri. Nimugume rero iwanyu, ntihakagire umuntu uva ahantu ari ku munsi wa karindwi.»" 
Exodus16:30 Nuko rubanda bakajya baruhuka ku munsi wa karindwi. 
Exodus16:31 Inzu ya Israheli ibyita izina rya manu. Byari bimeze nk’utubuto twa koriyanderi, bikererana kandi bikaryoha nk’agasheshe k’umugati gakoreshejwe ubuki." 
Exodus16:32 Musa aravuga ati «Dore ibyo Uhoraho ategetse: Nimwuzuze izo manu mu kabindi, mukabike neza kugira ngo urubyaro rwanyu ruzarebe umugati nabagaburiye mu butayu, igihe mbavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri.»" 
Exodus16:33 Musa abwira Aroni, ati «Wende urwabya, usukemo manu ingana na omeru imwe, maze urutereke imbere y’Uhoraho, kugira ngo ubizigamire urubyaro rwanyu.»" 
Exodus16:34 Uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa, Aroni atereka ka kabindi imbere y’Imana, mu ihema ryayo ritagatifu, kugira ngo bibikwe." 
Exodus16:35 Abayisraheli batunzwe na manu imyaka mirongo ine, kugeza igihe bagereye mu gihugu gituwe; bariye manu kugeza igihe bagereye ku mipaka y’igihugu cya Kanahani." 
Exodus16:36 Omeru ni igipimo gihwanye na kimwe cya cumi cy’igipimo bita efa. 
Exodus17:1 Imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli ihaguruka mu butayu bwa Sini, ngo bakomeze urugendo rwabo uko Uhoraho yabishakaga. Bageze i Refidimu bahaca ingando, ariko ntibahabona amazi yo kunywa." 
Exodus17:2 Nuko rubanda batera amahane kuri Musa, bakamubwira bati «Duhe amazi yo kunywa!» Musa arabasubiza ati «Kuki munteraho amahane? Igituma mugerageza Uhoraho ni iki?»" 
Exodus17:3 Nuko imbaga yose yicirwa n’inyota mu butayu, rubanda bitotombera Musa, bavuga bati «Kuki watuvanye mu Misiri? Ni ukugira ngo utwicishe inyota hamwe n’abana bacu n’amatungo yacu?»" 
Exodus17:4 Musa atakambira Uhoraho avuga ati «Iyi mbaga ndayigenza nte? Ni akanya gato bakanyicisha amabuye!» 
Exodus17:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Jya imbere ya rubanda, ujyane na bamwe mu bakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli; ufate na ya nkoni yawe wakubitaga mu ruzi, maze ugende." 
Exodus17:6 Dore ndi buguhagarare imbere, hejuru ya ruriya rutare ruri ku musozi wa Horebu. Uze gukubita urutare, rutobokemo amazi, maze rubanda banywe.» Musa rero abigenza atyo, mu maso y’abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli." 
Exodus17:7 Aho hantu ahita izina rya Massa na Meriba, (ari byo kuvuga Kigeragezo na Rwiyenzo), ku mpamvu y’urwiyenzo Abayisraheli bari bamushatseho, no kubera ko bari bagerageje Uhoraho, bavuga ngo: Mbese Uhoraho aturimo, cyangwa se si byo?" 
Exodus17:8 Nuko igitero cy’Abamaleki kiraza, maze kirwanya Israheli i Refidimu." 
Exodus17:9 Ni bwo Musa abwiye Yozuwe, ati «Dutoranyirize intwari, maze ujye kurwanya Abamaleki; ejo nzahagarara mu mpinga ya kariya gasozi, mfite inkoni y’Imana mu kiganza cyanjye.»" 
Exodus17:10 Yozuwe agenza uko Musa yari yamubwiye. Arwana n’Abamaleki; naho Musa na Aroni na Huru bazamuka mu mpinga y’agasozi. 
Exodus17:11 Iyo Musa yabaga ateze amaboko, Abayisraheli baraganzaga; naho yaba amanuye amaboko, Abamaleki bakaganza." 
Exodus17:12 Hashize igihe, amaboko ya Musa aza kunanirwa. Nuko benda ibuye barimwicazaho; Aroni na Huru bakaramira amaboko ye, umwe ari mu ruhande rumwe, undi mu rundi. Bityo amaboko ye aguma hamwe, kugeza igihe izuba rirenga." 
Exodus17:13 Nuko Yozuwe amarira ku bugi bw’inkota Amaleki n’ingabo ze. 
Exodus17:14 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Andika ibyo ngibyo mu gitabo, bizabe urwibutso, kandi umenyeshe Yozuwe ko nzasibanganya burundu Abamaleki mu nsi y’ijuru, ku buryo batazongera kubibuka!»" 
Exodus17:15 Musa yubaka urutambiro, arwita ‘Uhoraho‐ibendera‐ryanjye.’" 
Exodus17:16 Nuko aravuga ati «Ubwo Amaleki yamanitse ukuboko irwanya ijabiro ry’Uhoraho, Uhoraho na Amaleki bazagirana inzigo ingoma ibihumbi!»" 
Exodus18:1 Yetero, umuherezabitambo w’i Madiyani, sebukwe wa Musa, aza kumenya ibyo Imana yagiriye Musa na Israheli umuryango wayo, amenya ukuntu Uhoraho yavanye Israheli mu Misiri." 
Exodus18:2 Yetero, sebukwe wa Musa, ajyana Sipora umugore wa Musa (kuko Musa yari yaramwohereje iwabo)," 
Exodus18:3 ajyana kandi n’abahungu ba Sipora. Umwe yitwaga Gerishomu (ari byo kuvuga Musuhuke) kuko Musa yavugaga ati «Ndi umusuhuke mu gihugu cy’amahanga»; 
Exodus18:4 undi akitwa Eliyezeri (ari byo kuvuga Hakizimana yanjye) kuko Musa yavugaga ati «Imana ya data yarantabaye, maze inkiza inkota ya Farawo.»" 
Exodus18:5 Yetero, sebukwe wa Musa, hamwe n’abahungu ba Musa n’umugore we, baza bamusanga aho yari acumbitse mu butayu ku musozi w’Imana." 
Exodus18:6 Atuma kuri Musa, ati «Ni jyewe Yetero sobukwe; nje ngusanga ndi kumwe n’umugore wawe n’abahungu be bombi bamuherekeje.»" 
Exodus18:7 Musa ajya gusanganira sebukwe. Amugeze imbere, arapfukama, aramuhobera. Bamaze kuramukanya, binjira mu ihema." 
Exodus18:8 Nuko Musa atekerereza sebukwe ibyo Uhoraho yakoreye Farawo na Misiri byose ku mpamvu ya Israheli, amubwira n’amagorwa yose bari bagiriye mu nzira, n’ukuntu Uhoraho yayabakijije." 
Exodus18:9 Yetero yishimira ibyiza byose Uhoraho yari yaragiriye Abayisraheli igihe abakijije ikiganza cy’Abanyamisiri. 
Exodus18:10 Nuko Yetero aravuga ati «Haragasingizwa Uhoraho wabakijije Abanyamisiri na Farawo, maze imbaga akayikiza ubucakara bw’Abanyamisiri!" 
Exodus18:11 Noneho menye neza ko Uhoraho aruta imana zose, kuko yazitsinze igihe zahigiraga abe.»" 
Exodus18:12 Nuko Yetero, sebukwe wa Musa, atura igitambo gitwikwa, n’ibindi bitambo bigenewe Imana. Aroni n’abakuru bose b’imiryango ya Israheli baza kwifatanya na sebukwe wa Musa basangirira imbere y’Imana izo nyama z’ibitambo." 
Exodus18:13 Bukeye Musa yicara mu nteko ngo acire rubanda imanza. Rubanda rero bakirirwa bahagaze imbere ya Musa kuva mu gitondo kugeza nimugoroba. 
Exodus18:14 Sebukwe wa Musa ngo abone ibyo yakoreraga rubanda, aravuga ati «Mbese ibyo ni iki ugirira bariya bantu? Ni iki gituma uca imanza wenyine, maze rubanda bose bakirirwa baguhagaze imbere kuva mu gitondo kugeza nimugoroba?»" 
Exodus18:15 Musa asubiza sebukwe, ati «Ni uko rubanda bansanga kugira ngo basiganuze Imana." 
Exodus18:16 Iyo bafite icyo bapfa, baransanga, nkabakiranura; hanyuma nkabamenyesha amabwiriza y’Imana n’amategeko yayo.»" 
Exodus18:17 Sebukwe wa Musa aramusubiza ati «Uko ugenza uko, nta bwo ari byiza!" 
Exodus18:18 Bizagera aho bikurembye, binanize n’iyi mbaga muri kumwe. Uwo murimo uzakuvuna; nta bwo ushobora kuwurangiza wenyine." 
Exodus18:19 Noneho umva nkubwire! Ngiye kukugira inama, maze Imana ibe kumwe nawe. Wowe ujye uhagararira rubanda imbere y’Imana, abe ari wowe ugeza imanza zabo ku Mana," 
Exodus18:20 ubatoze amabwiriza n’amategeko, kandi ubamenyeshe inzira bagomba kunyuramo, hamwe n’ibyo bagomba gukora." 
Exodus18:21 Ahasigaye, utoranye muri rubanda rwose abantu b’inyangamugayo kandi batinya Imana, abantu b’intabera kandi batikanyiza; maze ubagire abatware bategeka abantu igihumbi, n’abatware bategeka abantu ijana, n’abatware bategeka abantu mirongo itanu, n’abatware bategeka abantu cumi." 
Exodus18:22 Bajye bacira rubanda imanza zisanzwe; imanza zikomeye bajye bazikuzanira, naho bo bace imanza zoroheje. Bityo ugabanye umuzigo wawe, mufatanye kuwikorera." 
Exodus18:23 Nukora utyo, uzashobora kurangiza icyo Imana igushakaho, kandi iyi mbaga izashobore gusubira imuhira amahoro.»" 
Exodus18:24 Musa yumvira sebukwe, maze akora ibyo yari yavuze byose." 
Exodus18:25 Musa atoranya muri Israheli yose abantu b’inyangamugayo, maze abashyiraho ngo babe abatware ba rubanda: abatware bategeka abantu igihumbi, n’abatware bategeka abantu ijana, n’abatware bategeka abantu mirongo itanu, n’abatware bategeka abantu icumi." 
Exodus18:26 Bagacira rubanda imanza zisanzwe; bagashyira Musa imanza zose ziruhije, naho bo bagaca imanza zose zoroheje." 
Exodus18:27 Nuko Musa asezerera sebukwe, asubira mu gihugu cy’iwabo." 
Exodus19:1 Mu kwezi kwa gatatu nyuma y’aho Abayisraheli baviriye mu Misiri, uwo munsi nyine, bagera mu butayu bwa Sinayi." 
Exodus19:2 Bari bahagurutse i Refidimu, bataha mu butayu bwa Sinayi, nuko baca ingando muri ubwo butayu. Israheli ica ingando aho ngaho, hateganye n’umusozi." 
Exodus19:3 Musa rero azamuka umusozi asanga Imana. Uhoraho amuhamagarira mu mpinga y’umusozi, avuga ati «Bwira utya inzu ya Yakobo, kandi utangarize Abayisraheli, uti" 
Exodus19:4 ’Mwiboneye ubwanyu ibyo nakoreye Misiri, n’ukuntu mwebwe nabahetse nk’uko kagoma iguruka ihetse abana bayo, maze nkabazana mbiyegereza." 
Exodus19:5 None rero nimwumva ibyo mbabwira, mukubahiriza Isezerano ryanjye, muzaba abanjye bwite mu miryango yose, n’ubwo isi yose na yo ari iyanjye;" 
Exodus19:6 ariko mwebwe muzambera urugaga rw’intore zinshengerera n’umuryango mutagatifu’. Ngayo amagambo uza kubwira Abayisraheli.» 
Exodus19:7 Musa araza, akoranya abakuru ba rubanda, maze abasubirira muri ayo magambo yose, uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse." 
Exodus19:8 Imbaga yose uko yakabaye isubiza nk’umuntu umwe, iti «Ibyo Uhoraho yavuze byose tuzabirangiza!» Nuko Musa ashyira Uhoraho igisubizo cy’imbaga." 
Exodus19:9 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Dore ngiye kugusanga ndi mu gicu kibuditse, kugira ngo imbaga ishobore kumva uko nzaba mvugana nawe, kandi nawe ubwawe bashobore kukwizera ubudatezuka.» Nuko Musa amenyesha Uhoraho igisubizo cy’imbaga." 
Exodus19:10 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Genda usange rubanda maze ubatunganye none n’ejo; bamese imyambaro yabo." 
Exodus19:11 Bazabe biteguye ku munsi wa gatatu, kuko ku munsi wa gatatu nyine ari bwo Uhoraho azamanukira ku musozi wa Sinayi imbaga yose ibyirebera." 
Exodus19:12 Uzashingire rubanda urubibi batazarenga, ubabwire uti ‘Mwirinde kuzamuka ku musozi, ndetse no kwegera uru rubibi’. Umuntu wese uzakandagira ku musozi, azicwa:" 
Exodus19:13 ntihazagire umukoraho, ahubwo bazamwicishe amabuye cyangwa bamurase imyambi: ryaba itungo cyangwa umuntu, ntibikabeho. Ihembe nirivuga, abantu bamwe bazazamuke ku musozi.»" 
Exodus19:14 Nuko Musa amanuka umusozi asanga imbaga. Atunganya imbaga; bamesa imyambaro yabo. 
Exodus19:15 Hanyuma abwira imbaga, ati «Mwitegure mu minsi itatu; ntimwegere abagore banyu.»" 
Exodus19:16 Ku munsi wa gatatu, bugicya, inkuba zirahinda; imirabyo irarabya, igicu kirabudika hejuru y’umusozi, n’ijwi ry’impanda riroroma cyane; maze imbaga yose aho iri mu ngando iradagadwa." 
Exodus19:17 Musa asohora imbaga mu ngando ngo basanganire Imana, maze bahagarara mu nsi y’umusozi." 
Exodus19:18 Umusozi wa Sinayi wose wacucumukaga umwotsi, kuko Uhoraho yari yawumanukiyeho mu muriro; umwotsi wawo wacucumukaga nk’uw’itanura, n’umusozi wose ukanyeganyega bikomeye." 
Exodus19:19 Imyoromo y’impanda igenda irushaho gusakabaka: Musa yaravugaga, maze Imana ikamusubirisha imyoromo y’inkuba." 
Exodus19:20 Uhoraho rero amanukira ku musozi wa Sinayi, mu mpinga yawo, maze Uhoraho ahamagara Musa ngo aze mu mpinga y’umusozi; nuko Musa azamuka umusozi." 
Exodus19:21 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Manuka, wihanangirize rubanda, bamenye ntibarenge urubibi bashaka kureba Uhoraho, hato badapfamo benshi." 
Exodus19:22 Ndetse n’abaherezabitambo basanzwe begera Uhoraho, na bo bagomba kubanza kwitunganya, hato Uhoraho atabacurangura.»" 
Exodus19:23 Musa abwira Uhoraho, ati «Rubanda ntibari bushobore kuzamuka ku musozi wa Sinayi, kuko watwihanangirije uvuga uti ‘Shinga urubibi uzengurutse umusozi, maze uwegurire Uhoraho.’»" 
Exodus19:24 Nuko Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Ngaho manuka, hanyuma uze kuzamukana na Aroni; nyamara, ari abaherezabitambo ari na rubanda, ntibarenge umupaka ngo bazamuke bagana Uhoraho, hato atabacurangura!»" 
Exodus19:25 Musa rero amanuka asanga rubanda, maze arababwira......" 
Exodus20:1 Nuko Imana ivuga aya magambo yose, iti" 
Exodus20:2 «Ni jyewe Uhoraho Imana yawe wagukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, mu nzu y’ubucakara:" 
Exodus20:3 Nta mana zindi uzagira kereka jyewe. 
Exodus20:4 Ntuzikorere ishusho ry’iribazanyo cyangwa se ikindi kibonetse cyose; cyaba gisa n’ibiri hejuru mu kirere cyangwa n’ibiri hasi ku isi cyangwa se n’ibiri mu mazi akikije isi. 
Exodus20:5 Ntuzapfukame imbere y’ibyo bigirwamana kandi ntuzabiyoboke; kuko Imana yawe ari jyewe Uhoraho, nkaba Imana ifuha, ihanira icyaha cy’ababyeyi mu bana babo, kugeza mu gisekuruza cya gatatu no mu cya kane cy’abanyanga," 
Exodus20:6 nyamara abankunda bagakurikiza amategeko yanjye, mbagaragariza ubudahemuka bwanjye ingoma ibihumbi." 
Exodus20:7 Ntuzavuge izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe mu bintu by’amanjwe, kuko Uhoraho atazareka guhana uzaba yavuze izina rye mu bintu by’amanjwe." 
Exodus20:8 Urajye wibuka umunsi w’isabato, uwegurire Imana." 
Exodus20:9 Uzakore imirimo yawe yose mu minsi itandatu," 
Exodus20:10 naho uwa karindwi ni isabato y’Uhoraho Imana yawe; ntuzagire umurimo n’umwe ukora: ari wowe, ari umuhungu wawe, ari umugaragu wawe, ari umuja wawe, ari itungo ryawe, ari n’umusuhuke waje iwanyu." 
Exodus20:11 Kuko mu minsi itandatu Uhoraho yahanze ijuru n’isi, inyanja n’ibiyirimo byose, maze akaruhuka ku munsi wa karindwi. Ni cyo cyatumye Uhoraho aha umugisha umunsi w’isabato, akawiyegurira." 
Exodus20:12 Wubahe so na nyoko, kugira ngo uzarambe mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye." 
Exodus20:13 Ntuzice umuntu. 
Exodus20:14 Ntuzasambane. 
Exodus20:15 Ntuzatware umuntu ngo umugire uwawe ku ngufu. 
Exodus20:16 Ntuzavuge ibinyoma ubeshyera mugenzi wawe. 
Exodus20:17 Ntuzararikire inzu ya mugenzi wawe, ntuzararikire umugore wa mugenzi wawe, cyangwa umugaragu we cyangwa umuja we cyangwa inka ye cyangwa indogobe ye, mbese ikintu cya mugenzi wawe icyo ari cyo cyose.»" 
Exodus20:18 Icyo gihe, imbaga yose yumvaga inkuba n’imyoromo y’impanda, bakabona ibishashi by’umuriro n’umusozi ucucumuka umwotsi; uko babyitegereza bagahinda umushyitsi, maze bagahagarara ahitaruye." 
Exodus20:19 Babwira Musa, bati «Utwibwirire wowe, tuzumva; naho Imana ntituvugishe, hato bitatuviramo gupfa!»" 
Exodus20:20 Musa asubiza imbaga, ati «Mwigira ubwoba! kuko Imana yazanywe no kugira ngo ibagerageze, maze muhore muyitinya kandi mwekuzacumura.»" 
Exodus20:21 Nuko Imbaga iguma ahitaruye, naho Musa yegera umwijima ubuditse, aho Imana yari iri." 
Exodus20:22 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ubwire Abayisraheli uti ‘Mwiboneye ubwanyu ko nabavugishije nturuka mu ijuru." 
Exodus20:23 Ntimuzangenzereze nk’imana icuzwe muri feza cyangwa se muri zahabu; muramenye ntimuzihimbire ibintu nk’ibyo. 
Exodus20:24 Uzanyubakire urutambiro rw’igitaka, ari na rwo uzaturiraho ibitambo byawe bitwikwa, n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro, intama zawe n’ibimasa byawe. Ahantu hose nzaguhamagarira kunsenga, nkwibutsa izina ryanjye, nzahagusanga maze mpaguhere umugisha." 
Exodus20:25 Niba unyubakiye urutambiro rw’amabuye, ntuzarwubakishe amabuye abajwe, kuko kuyabajisha umutwero — byaba kuyaka ubusugi bwayo." 
Exodus20:26 Ntuzazamukire ku madarajya ujya ku rutambiro rwanjye, kugira ngo batabona ko nta cyo wambariyeho." 
Exodus21:1 Dore amategeko uzabasobanurira: 
Exodus21:2 Nugura umucakara w’Umuhebureyi, azagukorera imyaka itandatu, mu wa karindwi azigendere yigenge, atagize icyo yishyura." 
Exodus21:3 Niba yaraje iwawe ari wenyine, azigendera wenyine; niba yari afite umugore, uwo mugore bazajyana." 
Exodus21:4 Naho niba ari shebuja wamuhaye umugore, bakabyarana abahungu cyangwa abakobwa, umugore n’abana be bazaba aba shebuja, naho we yigendere wenyine." 
Exodus21:5 Niba umucakara avuze ati «Nkunze databuja, n’umugore wanjye, n’abana banjye, sinshaka kugira ubwigenge»," 
Exodus21:6 ubwo ngubwo shebuja azabimurahiza imbere y’Imana; nuko amujyane iruhande rw’umuryango cyangwa ku nkomanizo zawo, hanyuma shebuja azatoboze ugutwi kwe uruhindu, maze amukorere gicakara burundu." 
Exodus21:7 Igihe umuntu azaba yaraguze umukobwa we ngo abe umuja, nta bwo azigendera nk’abacakara b’abagabo." 
Exodus21:8 Nadashimisha shebuja wari waramwigeneye, shebuja ashobora kumugurisha. Nyamara ntazashobora kumugurisha ku munyamahanga, kuko byaba ari ukumuhemukira." 
Exodus21:9 Niba yaramugeneye umuhungu we, azamugenzereza nk’uko bagenzereza abakobwa bashyingirwa." 
Exodus21:10 Niba yishakiye undi mugore, nta cyo azagerura ku byo yahaga uwa mbere: ari ibiryo, ari imyambaro, ari n’ibihe byo kuryamana." 
Exodus21:11 Niba kandi atamugiriye ibyo ngibyo uko ari bitatu, umuja azashobora kwigendera nta ncungu, atagize icyo yishyura." 
Exodus21:12 Umuntu wese uzakubita undi akamwica, na we bazamwice." 
Exodus21:13 Ariko niba atari yamwubikiye, maze Imana ikamugusha gitumo mu maboko ye, nzakwereka ahantu azashobora guhungira." 
Exodus21:14 Naho umuntu nahigira mugenzi we, akamwica amwubikiye, uzamuhubuze ndetse no ku rutambiro rwanjye kugira ngo bamwice." 
Exodus21:15 Umuntu uzakubita se cyangwa nyina agomba kwicwa. 
Exodus21:16 Nihagira ushimuta umuntu akamutwara kugira ngo amucuruze, uwo nguwo agomba kwicwa, yaba amaze kumugurisha cyangwa bamumugobotoye mu maboko." 
Exodus21:17 Uzatuka se cyangwa nyina, agomba kwicwa." 
Exodus21:18 Abantu nibarwana, maze umwe agatera undi ibuye cyangwa akamukubita ikofe, ariko ntamwice, ahubwo akamukomeretsa ku buryo agomba kuryama," 
Exodus21:19 uwamukubise azababarirwa icyaha niba nyir’ugukomereka ageze aho akabasha kubyuka no gusohoka, kabone n’aho yaba agendera ku kibando. Gusa, uwamukubise azamuriha iminsi yose yamaze atikorera, kandi agomba kumuvuza kugeza igihe akiriye." 
Exodus21:20 Umuntu nakubita inkoni umugaragu we cyangwa umuja we, maze bagapfira mu maboko ye, bazahorerwa;" 
Exodus21:21 ariko niba babayeho umunsi umwe cyangwa ibiri, ntibazahorerwa, kuko bari basanzwe ari abo yiguriye ku mari ye." 
Exodus21:22 Abantu nibarwana, maze bagahutaza umugore utwite, ariko umwana akavuka nta ngorane zindi, bazatanga indishyi y’akababaro isabwe n’umugabo w’uwo mugore, bayitange bakurikije ibyemejwe n’ababakiranura." 
Exodus21:23 Naho rero uwo mugore niba bimugendekeye nabi, ubugingo buzishyurwe ubugingo, ijisho ryishyurwe ijisho," 
Exodus21:24 iryinyo ryishyurwe iryinyo, ikiganza cyishyurwe ikiganza, ikirenge cyishyurwe ikirenge," 
Exodus21:25 ubushye bwishyurwe ubushye, ubukoboke bwishyurwe ubukoboke, uruguma rwishyurwe uruguma." 
Exodus21:26 Umuntu nakubita umugaragu we cyangwa umuja we akamumena ijisho, azabegurira ubwigenge, bube indishyi y’ijisho ryabo;" 
Exodus21:27 nakubita umugaragu we cyangwa umuja we, akamukura iryinyo, na bwo azabegurira ubwigenge, bube indishyi y’iryinyo ryabo." 
Exodus21:28 Inka nitera ihembe umugabo cyangwa umugore, bagapfa, iyo nka izicishwa amabuye, kandi ntibazarye inyama zayo; nyamara nyirayo azaba ari umwere." 
Exodus21:29 Ariko niba inka yari isanzwe yica, maze nyirayo aho abimenyeye ntajye ayigendaho, maze ikica umugabo cyangwa umugore, ikabahwanya, izicishwe amabuye, kandi nyirayo na we azicwe." 
Exodus21:30 Niba nyirayo bamuciye gutanga incungu y’amagara ye, agomba gutanga ibyo bazamuca byose." 
Exodus21:31 Inka niyica umuhungu cyangwa umukobwa, nyirayo bazamugenzereza ibihuje n’iryo tegeko." 
Exodus21:32 Inka niyica umucakara cyangwa umuja, bazishyura shebuja amasikeli mirongo itatu y’ifeza, hanyuma iyo nka yicishwe amabuye." 
Exodus21:33 Umuntu nasiga iriba rirangaye, cyangwa agafukura iriba ntaripfundikire, hanyuma inka cyangwa indogobe ikarigwamo, nyir’iriba azatanga indishyi:" 
Exodus21:34 azariha nyir’itungo igiciro cya feza gihwanye n’iryo tungo, maze we asigarane ibyapfa byaryo." 
Exodus21:35 Inka y’umuntu nitera ihembe inka y’undi ikayihwanya, ba nyirazo bazagurishe inka isigaye ari nzima, bigabanye ikiguzi cyayo; bagabane kandi n’inka yapfuye." 
Exodus21:36 Niba byari bizwi ko iyo nka yari isanzwe yica, maze nyirayo ntayigendeho, azatanga indishyi, inka yishyurwe indi, we asigarane ya nka yapfuye." 
Exodus21:37 Umuntu niyiba inka cyangwa intama, maze akayibaga cyangwa akayigurisha, azariha inka eshanu zihwane n’iyo nka, n’intama enye zihwane n’iyo ntama." 
Exodus22:1 Umujura nafatirwa mu cyuho nijoro, bakamukubita agapfa, nta we uzabazwa amaraso ye;" 
Exodus22:2 nyamara niba afashwe yiba ku manywa y’ihangu, bazabazwa amaraso ye. Uwo mujura agomba kuriha ibyo yibye; niba ari nta cyo atunze, azagurishwe ubwe, kugira ngo arihe ibyo yibye." 
Exodus22:3 Itungo azaba yibye, — ari inka, ari indogobe cyangwa intama —, narifatanwa rikiri rizima, azaririha incuro ebyiri." 
Exodus22:4 Umuntu nareka amatungo ye akajya kona imyaka cyangwa imizabibu y’undi, ntayakuremo, azariha ibyangijwe, atange ibivuye mu murima we uruta iyindi cyangwa ibivuye mu muzabibu we uruta iyindi afite." 
Exodus22:5 Umuntu nacana umuriro, ukagurumana, ugakwira mu bihuru by’amahwa, maze ugatwika imirara y’ingano, cyangwa ingano zigihagaze mu murima, uzaba yacanye iyo nkongi azatanga indishyi y’ibyo yangije." 
Exodus22:6 Umuntu nabitsa undi imari ye, yaba ifeza cyangwa ibindi bintu, maze bikibirwa mu nzu y’ubibitse, umujura nafatwa azabiriha incuro ebyiri." 
Exodus22:7 Niba umujura atabonetse, nyir’ukubitswa azajya kurahirira imbere y’Imana, kugira ngo rubanda bamenye ko atari we wibye ibintu bya mugenzi we." 
Exodus22:8 Impaka zose zerekeye inka, indogobe, intama, cyangwa umwambaro byibwe, cyangwa se ikintu cyose cyazimiye, ku buryo bavuga ngo «Ni naka wabigize», ababurana bombi bazajyane urubanza rwabo imbere y’Imana; uwo Imana izaba yerekanye ko atsinzwe, azariha mugenzi we incuro ebyiri." 
Exodus22:9 Umuntu naragiza mugenzi we inka, intama, cyangwa irindi tungo, iryo tungo rigapfa cyangwa rikavunika, cyangwa se rikanyagwa ntawabibonye," 
Exodus22:10 uwo muturanyi azarahirira imbere y’Uhoraho ko atibye itungo ry’undi. Nyir’itungo azabyemere kubera iyo ndahiro, maze undi yegutanga indishyi." 
Exodus22:11 Ariko itungo niryibirwa iwe, azaririha nyiraryo." 
Exodus22:12 Niba itungo ryatanyaguwe n’inyamaswa, azagaragaze icyemezo cyabyo, maze yekuzariha itungo ryatanyaguwe." 
Exodus22:13 Umuntu natira undi itungo, hanyuma rikavunika cyangwa rigapfa nyiraryo atahibereye, azagomba kuririha." 
Exodus22:14 Niba ibyo bibaye nyirayo ahibereye, nyir’ukuritira ntagomba kuririha; niba itungo ryakodeshejwe, nyir’ukurikodesha azatange gusa igiciro cy’ubukodeshe." 
Exodus22:15 Umuntu nagusha mu bishuko umukobwa utarasabwa, maze akaryamana na we, azagomba gutanga inkwano kugira ngo abe umugore we." 
Exodus22:16 Niba se yanze kumumushyingira, uwo mugabo azishyure ifeza zihwanye n’inkwano basanzwe baka ku bakobwa." 
Exodus22:17 Uwitwa umupfumukazi wese uzamurwanye, yoye gukomeza kubaho." 
Exodus22:18 Umuntu wese ufashwe asambana n’inyamaswa, agomba kwicwa." 
Exodus22:19 Uzatura ibitambo izindi mana, uretse Uhoraho wenyine, azavumirwe kurimbuka." 
Exodus22:20 Ntuzanyunyuze imitsi y’umusuhuke cyangwa ngo umukandamize, kuko namwe mwabaye abasuhuke mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Exodus22:21 Ntimuzagirire nabi umupfakazi cyangwa imfubyi. 
Exodus22:22 Numugirira nabi akantakira, nzumva amaganya ye," 
Exodus22:23 maze uburakari bwanjye bugurumane, mbamarire ku nkota, abagore banyu bapfakare, n’abana banyu babe imfubyi." 
Exodus22:24 Niba ugurije amafeza umuntu wo mu muryango wanjye, cyane cyane umutindi muturanye, ntuzamugenzereze nk’abaharanira gukira vuba: ntuzamushakeho urwunguko." 
Exodus22:25 Niba igishura cya mugenzi wawe ugitwayeho ingwate, uzakimusubize mbere y’uko izuba rirenga;" 
Exodus22:26 kuko ari cyo kiringiti cye rukumbi, n’umwambaro yifubika. None se yaryama mu ki? Nantakambira nzamwumva, kuko jyeweho ndi umunyampuhwe." 
Exodus22:27 Ntuzatuke Imana, kandi ntuzatuke umuntu wese ufite ubutegetsi mu gihugu." 
Exodus22:28 Uzaze kuntura bidatinze ibingenewe mu musaruro wawe n’umutobe w’imizabibu yawe. Uzanture imfura mu bahungu bawe; 
Exodus22:29 uzabigenze utyo no ku buriza bw’inka yawe n’ubw’intama yawe. Izagumane na nyina iminsi irindwi, ku wa munani uyinture." 
Exodus22:30 Muzambere abantu b’intungane! Ntimuzarye itungo ryatanyaguriwe n’igikoko mu gasozi; muzarijugunyire imbwa. 
Exodus23:1 Ntugakwize impuha. Ntuzafashe umugiranabi, uhamya ibinyoma ngo umubere." 
Exodus23:2 Ntuzakurikire inzira ya ba nyamwinshi ngo ukore nabi, kandi ntuzabe umugabo mu rubanza ngo ubogamire kuri ba nyamwinshi banyuranya n’itegeko." 
Exodus23:3 Mu rubanza ntuzagire uwo ubera, n’ubwo yaba umukene." 
Exodus23:4 Nuhura n’inka y’umwanzi wawe cyangwa indogobe ye ibungera, ugomba kuyimugarurira." 
Exodus23:5 Nubona indogobe y’umuntu ukwanga urunuka yagwanye umuzigo wayo, uzirinde kuyitererana: uzayifashe kubyuka." 
Exodus23:6 Ntuzayobagize uburenganzira bw’umukene mu rubanza rwe. 
Exodus23:7 Uzitaze urubanza rw’amahugu. Ntuzice umuntu utacumuye n’intungane; kuko umugiranabi wese ntamwita umwere. 
Exodus23:8 Ntuzemere guhabwa ruswa, kuko ruswa ihuma amaso y’ababona ukuri, maze igatsindisha intungane mu rubanza." 
Exodus23:9 Ntuzakandamize umusuhuke; namwe muzi neza imibereho y’umusuhuke, kuko mwabaye abasuhuke mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Exodus23:10 Mu myaka itandatu yose uzabibe imbuto mu mirima yawe, usarure ibyezemo." 
Exodus23:11 Ariko mu mwaka wa karindwi, uzateme ibyezemo, ubirekere mu murima, kugira ngo abakene bo mu gihugu cyawe abe ari bo babirya, ibyo bashigaje biribwe n’inyamaswa zo mu gasozi; imizabibu yawe n’imizeti yawe, na byo uzabigenzereze utyo." 
Exodus23:12 Mu minsi itandatu uzakore imirimo wifuza, ariko ku munsi wa karindwi uzareke gukora, kugira ngo inka yawe n’indogobe yawe bibone na byo ikiruhuko, n’umuhungu w’umuja wawe cyangwa umusuhuke na bo bahumeke." 
Exodus23:13 Muzitondere ibyo nababwiye byose: ntimuziyambaze izina ry’imana z’inyamahanga, ntihazagire n’uwumva muzivuga." 
Exodus23:14 Uzankorere umunsi mukuru gatatu mu mwaka. 
Exodus23:15 Mbere na mbere, uzubahirize iminsi mikuru y’imigati idasembuye. Mu minsi irindwi uzarye imigati idasembuye nk’uko nabitegetse; uzabigire mu gihe cyagenwe, mu kwezi kw’amahundo, kuko muri uko kwezi nyine ari bwo wasohotse mu Misiri. Kandi ntihazagire uhinguka amara masa imbere y’uruhanga rwanjye." 
Exodus23:16 Ubundi, uzatunganye umunsi mukuru w’Isarura, ari wo w’umuganura w’imirimo yawe, w’ibyo uzaba warateye mu mirima. Hanyuma uzatunganye umunsi mukuru w’Ihunika, mu ndunduro y’umwaka, igihe usarura mu mirima imyaka wejeje." 
Exodus23:17 Gatatu mu mwaka, ab’igitsinagabo bose bazahinguke imbere ya Nyagasani, Uhoraho." 
Exodus23:18 Ntuzanture igitambo cy’amaraso giherekejwe n’umugati usembuye, kandi ntuzabike ikinure cy’itungo untuye ngo kigeze mu gitondo." 
Exodus23:19 Uzazane mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho Imana yawe umuganura w’imbuto zeze mbere mu murima wawe. Ntuzateke umwana w’ihene mu mahenehene ya nyina. 
Exodus23:20 Dore nohereje umumalayika imbere yawe, kugira ngo akurinde mu rugendo, maze azakwinjize mu gihugu naguteguriye." 
Exodus23:21 Witonde kandi wumve ijwi rye: ntuzamubere intumva, kuko atakwihanganira igicumuro cyawe, ubwo ambereye mu cyimbo." 
Exodus23:22 Naho niwumva ijwi rye, ugakurikiza ibyo mvuze, nzaba umwanzi w’abanzi bawe, n’umubisha w’ababisha bawe." 
Exodus23:23 Umumalayika wanjye azakugenda imbere, maze azakugeze mu gihugu cy’Abahemori, n’Abaheti, n’Abaperezi, n’Abakanahani, n’Abahivi n’Abayebuzi: abo nkazabatsemba." 
Exodus23:24 Ntuzapfukame imbere y’imana zabo kandi ntuzaziyoboke; ntuzagenze uko bagenza, ahubwo uzasenye amashusho yazo kandi uhirike amabuye ashinze yazeguriwe." 
Exodus23:25 Nimuyoboka Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ubwo azaha umugisha umugati wawe n’amazi yawe, kandi nzakurinda indwara." 
Exodus23:26 Mu gihugu cyawe, nta mugore uzakuramo inda cyangwa uzaba ingumba; nzaguha kuramba iminsi myinshi." 
Exodus23:27 Mu gihugu cyose uzahingukamo, nzakangaranya ab’aho, mbacemo igikuba, nuko abanzi bawe bose bazagutere umugongo baguhunga." 
Exodus23:28 Nzohereza imbere yawe amavubi, yirukane kure yawe Abahivi, Abakanahani n’Abaheti, ndetse utaragera iwabo." 
Exodus23:29 Nyamara sinzabirukana imbere yawe mu mwaka umwe, hato igihugu kidahinduka ikibira, maze inyamaswa z’ishyamba zikakigwiramo." 
Exodus23:30 Nzabirukana buhoro buhoro, kugeza ubwo wororoka, maze ugashobora kwigarurira igihugu cyose." 
Exodus23:31 Nzagukebera igihugu guhera ku Nyanja y’Urufunzo kugeza ku Nyanja y’Abafilisiti, no guhera ku butayu kugeza ku Ruzi. Nimara kukwegurira abaturage b’icyo gihugu, maze ukabanesha," 
Exodus23:32 uramenye ntuzagirane amasezerano na bo, cyangwa n’imana zabo!" 
Exodus23:33 Ntibazongere gutura mu gihugu cyawe, hato batazabatera kuncumuraho; kuko wazayoboka imana zabo, maze bikaba byakubera umutego.»" 
Exodus24:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Zamuka umusozi unsange, uze uri kumwe na Aroni, na Nadabu, na Abihu, n’abantu mirongo irindwi mu bakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli, maze mupfukame ahitaruye." 
Exodus24:2 Ariko Musa wenyine abe ari we uza hafi y’Uhoraho, abandi ntibaze kwegera, kandi rubanda ntibazamuke hamwe na we.»" 
Exodus24:3 Musa agarutse, amenyesha imbaga amagambo yose y’Uhoraho, hamwe n’amabwiriza ye yose. Nuko imbaga yose isubiza mu ijwi rimwe, iti «Amagambo yose Uhoraho yavuze, tuzayakurikiza!»" 
Exodus24:4 Musa yandika amagambo y’Uhoraho yose. Hanyuma azinduka mu gitondo cya kare, yubaka urutambiro mu nsi y’umusozi, anahashinga amabuye cumi n’abiri yibutsa Imiryango cumi n’ibiri ya Israheli." 
Exodus24:5 Hanyuma yohereza abasore b’Abayisraheli; batura Uhoraho ibitambo bitwikwa, maze ibimasa babitambaho ibitambo by’ubuhoro." 
Exodus24:6 Musa yenda igice cy’amaraso ayashyira mu nzeso; asigaye ayatera ku rutambiro. 
Exodus24:7 Nuko yenda igitabo cy’Isezerano, agisomera imbaga. Baravuga bati «Ibyo Uhoraho yavuze byose, tuzabikora kandi tuzamwumvira.»" 
Exodus24:8 Musa yenda amaraso asigaye, ayatera imbaga, avuga ati «Aya ni amaraso y’Isezerano Uhoraho yagiranye namwe, bishingiye kuri aya magambo yose yavuze.»" 
Exodus24:9 Musa azamuka umusozi ari kumwe na Aroni, na Nadabu, na Abihu, n’abantu mirongo irindwi mu bakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli." 
Exodus24:10 Maze babona Imana ya Israheli; mu nsi y’ibirenge byayo hari hashashe amabuye y’agaciro, ubururu bwayo bukabengerana nk’ijuru." 
Exodus24:11 Nyamara ntiyagira icyo atwara izo nyamibwa z’Abayisraheli; bitegereza Imana, maze bararya kandi baranywa." 
Exodus24:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Zamuka unsange ku musozi uhagume; maze nzaguhe ibimanyu by’amabuye nanditseho amategeko n’amabwiriza yanjye ngo bibabere inyigisho.»" 
Exodus24:13 Musa ajyana na Yozuwe umufasha we, bazamuka ku musozi w’Imana." 
Exodus24:14 Ariko akaba yabwiye abakuru b’imiryango, ati «Mudutegerereze hano kugeza igihe tugarukira. Dore muri kumwe na Aroni na Huru; nihaboneka umuntu ufite urubanza, azabe ari bo abaza.»" 
Exodus24:15 Musa azamuka ku musozi, maze igihu kiwubudikaho." 
Exodus24:16 Ikuzo ry’Uhoraho riguma hejuru y’umusozi wa Sinayi, igihu kiwubudikaho iminsi itandatu yose. Ku munsi wa karindwi, Uhoraho ahamagarira Musa mu gihu rwagati." 
Exodus24:17 Ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryabonekeraga Abayisraheli rimeze nk’umuriro ugurumanira mu mpinga y’umusozi. 
Exodus24:18 Musa rero yinjira mu gihu, maze azamuka ku musozi. Musa aguma ku musozi, ahamara iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine." 
Exodus25:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa muri aya magambo, ati" 
Exodus25:2 «Ubwire Abayisraheli banzanire umusanzu, muzakire ibyo umuntu wese azatangana umutima ukeye." 
Exodus25:3 Dore umusanzu bazaguha: ni zahabu, feza, imiringa," 
Exodus25:4 imyenda y’isine, iy’umuhemba, n’itukura; hariri inetereye, n’ubwoya bw’ihene;" 
Exodus25:5 impu z’amapfizi y’intama zivanzemo ikigina, impu z’ibihura n’ibiti by’iminyinya;" 
Exodus25:6 amavuta y’imizeti yo gucana mu itara, imibavu igenewe kuvangwa n’amavuta yo gusiga, n’imibavu yo gutwikwa;" 
Exodus25:7 amoko yose y’amabuye y’agaciro yo gutaka ku mwenda w’umusanganyagihimba no ku mwenda w’umusesuragituza. 
Exodus25:8 Bazanyubakire Ingoro, maze nzature muri bo rwagati." 
Exodus25:9 Ngaho nkwereke igipimo cy’iyo ngoro, n’igipimo cy’ibintu bizayijyamo byose: muzabe ari ko mubikora." 
Exodus25:10 Bazabaza ubushyinguro mu giti cy’umunyinya, bufite uburebure bw’imikono ibiri n’igice, umukono n’igice by’ubugari, n’umukono n’igice by’ubuhagarike." 
Exodus25:11 Imbere n’inyuma uzomekeho zahabu iyunguruye, unabuzengurutseho umusozo wa zahabu." 
Exodus25:12 Uzashongeshe zahabu, uyikoremo ibifunga bine, ubishyire ku maguru yabwo ane; ibifunga bibiri mu ruhande rumwe n’ibindi bibiri mu rundi." 
Exodus25:13 Uzabaze imijishi mu giti cy’umunyinya, maze uyomekeho zahabu." 
Exodus25:14 Uzinjize iyo mijishi mu bifunga biri mu mpande z’ubushyinguro, ikazakoreshwa mu kubuheka." 
Exodus25:15 Imijishi izagume mu bifunga by’ubushyinguro, yekujya isohorokamo." 
Exodus25:16 Uzashyire mu bushyinguro urwibutso nzaguha. 
Exodus25:17 Uzakore urwicurizo muri zahabu iyunguruye, rufite uburebure bw’imikono ibiri n’igice, n’umukono n’igice by’ubugari." 
Exodus25:18 Uzakore n’Abakerubimu babiri muri zahabu, uzabacure muri zahabu itsitse, ku mitwe yombi y’urwicurizo." 
Exodus25:19 Abo Bakerubimu uzabashyire umwe ku ruhande rumwe, n’undi ku rundi; kandi bakozwe mu cyuma kimwe n’urwicurizo." 
Exodus25:20 Abakerubimu bazagire amababa aramburiye hejuru, ku buryo urwicurizo barutwikiriza amababa yabo. Bazabe berekeranye, ku buryo uruhanga rwabo ruzaba rwunamiye ku rwicurizo." 
Exodus25:21 Uzashyire urwicurizo hejuru y’ubushyinguro, hanyuma ushyire mu bushyinguro urwibutso nzaguha." 
Exodus25:22 Aho ngaho nzajya mpabonanira nawe, maze hejuru y’urwicurizo, hagati y’Abakerubimu bazaba bari hejuru y’ubushyinguro bw’urwibutso, nzahakubwirire ibyo ntegeka Abayisraheli byose." 
Exodus25:23 Uzakore ameza mu giti cy’umunyinya, afite uburebure bw’imikono ibiri, umukono umwe mu bugari, n’umukono umwe n’igice mu buhagarike." 
Exodus25:24 Uzayomekeho zahabu iyunguruye hanyuma uzayazengurutseho umusozo wa zahabu. 
Exodus25:25 Hagati y’amaguru y’ameza uzatambikeho utubaho tungana no mu kiganza, maze utwo tubaho uzadutakeho zahabu." 
Exodus25:26 Uzakore ibifunga bine bya zahabu, maze ubishyire ku nkokora enye zizaba ziri ku maguru ane y’ameza." 
Exodus25:27 Ibifunga bizaba hafi y’utubaho dutambitse ku maguru, kugira ngo bishyirwemo imijishi bazakoresha baheka ameza." 
Exodus25:28 Imijishi uzayikore mu biti by’iminyinya, maze uyomekeho zahabu, kugira ngo bayikoreshe baheka ameza." 
Exodus25:29 Uzakore kandi amasahani yayo, imbehe zayo n’ibikopo byayo, n’udukombe twayo, byo gukoreshwa igihe cy’ibitambo biseswa; uzabikore muri zahabu iyunguruye." 
Exodus25:30 Hejuru y’ameza uzateguraho imigati y’umumuriko, ihore imbere yanjye ubudahwema." 
Exodus25:31 Uzakore ikinyarumuri muri zahabu iyunguruye. Ibice byose by’icyo kinyarumuri bazabicure bifatanye: ikirenge n’uruti byacyo, hamwe n’amababi n’indabo bigitatse, byose bizabe bifatanye." 
Exodus25:32 Amashami atandatu azashingira ku mpande: amashami atatu y’ikinyarumuri ku ruhande rumwe rwacyo, n’andi mashami atatu ku rundi ruhande rwacyo." 
Exodus25:33 Kuri buri shami hazabe imitako ishushanya umubumburo w’ururabo. Bizagende bityo kuri ya mashami atandatu y’ikinyarumuri. 
Exodus25:34 Uruti rw’ikinyarumuri ubwarwo ruzagire imitako ine ishushanya umubumburo w’ururabo. 
Exodus25:35 Hazabe umutako mu nsi y’amashami abiri ya mbere ashingiye ku ruti rwacyo, n’umutako mu nsi y’amashami abiri akurikiyeho ashingiye kuri cyo, n’umutako mu nsi y’amashami abiri aheruka ashingiye kuri cyo. Bityo kuri ya mashami atandatu ashingiye ku kinyarumuri." 
Exodus25:36 Ibice byose by’icyo kinyarumuri, ari amashami, ari imitako, byose bazabicure muri zahabu iyunguruye, bifatanye." 
Exodus25:37 Uzakore amatara yacyo arindwi, maze uzayagishyireho ku buryo amurika imbere yacyo." 
Exodus25:38 Ibikoresho bigenewe gutunganya ayo matara bizabe bikozwe muri zahabu iyunguruye. 
Exodus25:39 Ikinyarumuri kizakorwe n’italenta imwe ya zahabu iyunguruye, hamwe n’ibikoresho byacyo byose." 
Exodus25:40 Itegereze, maze uzakore ukurikije urugero werekewe hejuru y’umusozi." 
Exodus26:1 Ingoro ubwayo izabe igizwe n’imyenda cumi. Iyo myenda izadodwe n’abahanga bazi gukoresha hariri inetereye, n’ubudodo bw’ubwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba, n’ubutukura, maze bazatakeho Abakerubimu." 
Exodus26:2 Buri mwenda uzareshya n’imikono makumyabiri n’umunani mu burebure, n’imikono ine mu bugari." 
Exodus26:3 Muri iyo myenda bazateranya itanu ukwayo, n’indi itanu bibe uko, ku buryo izahinduka imyenda ibiri, minini cyane." 
Exodus26:4 Hanyuma uzakore imikondo igizwe n’utugozi tw’ubwoya butukura busobekeranye. 
Exodus26:5 Uzashyire imikondo mirongo itanu ku ruhande rumwe rw’urufatane rwa mbere, uzabigenze utyo no ku rufatane rwa kabiri. Iyo mikondo igomba kuba iteganye." 
Exodus26:6 Byongeye, uzakore n’ibifunga mirongo itanu bya zahabu, ari byo uzafungisha imikondo ifatanya ya myenda yombi minini, bityo Ingoro izakomere ku mpande zose." 
Exodus26:7 Ubundi, uzakore n’indi myenda y’ubwoya bw’ihene, igenewe na yo gutwikira Ingoro nk’uko amahema ameze. Uzakoremo cumi n’umwe." 
Exodus26:8 Iyo myenda yose uko ari cumi n’umwe izaba ingana: imikono mirongo itatu mu burebure, n’imikono ine mu bugari." 
Exodus26:9 Muri iyo myenda bazateranya itanu ukwayo, n’indi itandatu ukwayo, ku buryo izahinduka na yo imyenda ibiri minini. Umwenda uheruka ugasaguka iyindi, uzanagana imbere y’umuryango w’ihema." 
Exodus26:10 Uzashyire imikondo mirongo itanu ku ruhande rw’urufatane rwa mbere, maze uzabigenze utyo no ku rufatane rwa kabiri." 
Exodus26:11 Uzakore n’ibifungo mirongo itanu by’umuringa, ari byo uzafungisha imikondo irebana. Bityo ihema rizatwikirwe neza." 
Exodus26:12 Kuko iyo myenda igizwe n’ubwoya bw’ihene isumba iya mbere mu burebure, ibizasagukaho bizanagana inyuma y’Ingoro" 
Exodus26:13 no mu mpande zayo zombi. Bityo ihema ryose rizasakarwe neza. 
Exodus26:14 Ndetse uzaryongereho n’impu z’amasekurume n’iz’ibihura. 
Exodus26:15 Uzashinge kandi n’inkuta z’imbaho zibajwe mu biti by’umunyinya, zigenewe gushyigikira Ingoro." 
Exodus26:16 Buri rubaho ruzagire uburebure bw’imikono cumi, n’ubugari bw’umukono umwe n’igice." 
Exodus26:17 Kandi izo mbaho uzazifatanye zibe indumane, ukoresheje inkwikiriro ebyiri zegeranye." 
Exodus26:18 Imbaho makumyabiri zifatanye zizashyigikira Ingoro mu ruhande rwerekera muri Negevu, mu majyepfo." 
Exodus26:19 Mu nsi ya buri rubaho uko ari makumyabiri, uzahashyire ibishyigikizo bibiri bya feza, byose hamwe bizabe mirongo ine." 
Exodus26:20 No ku rundi ruhande, mu majyaruguru, uzahashyire imbaho makumyabiri;" 
Exodus26:21 hamwe n’ibishyigikizo byazo mirongo ine bya feza: ibishyigikizo bibiri mu nsi y’urubaho rumwe, n’ibishyigikizo bibiri mu nsi y’urundi." 
Exodus26:22 Naho mu ruhande rw’uburengerazuba, inyuma y’Ingoro, uzahashyire imbaho esheshatu." 
Exodus26:23 No mu maguni y’Ingoro, uzahashyire imbaho ebyiri," 
Exodus26:24 zirusha izindi gufatana kubera inkwikiriro zazo nyinshi. 
Exodus26:25 Inyuma y’Ingoro rero hazabe imbaho munani, hamwe n’ibishyigikizo bibiri bya feza mu nsi ya buri rubaho; ibishyigikizo byose hamwe bizaba cumi na bitandatu." 
Exodus26:26 Uzakore kandi imitambiko mu biti by’iminyinya, itanu igenewe imbaho z’uruhande rumwe rw’Ingoro," 
Exodus26:27 n’imitambiko itanu igenewe imbaho z’urundi ruhande rw’Ingoro n’imitambiko itanu igenewe imbaho z’uruhande rw’inyuma y’Ingoro, aherekeye iburengerazuba." 
Exodus26:28 Hazabe umutambiko umwe wambukiranya imbaho zose, kuva ku rwa mbere kugeza ku rwa nyuma, unyuze hagati yazo." 
Exodus26:29 Imbaho uzazomekeho zahabu, n’ibifunga byazo bizanyuzwamo iyo mitambiko, uzabigire zahabu, maze n’imitambiko uzayomekeho zahabu." 
Exodus26:30 Uzubake Ingoro ukurikije urugero werekewe hejuru y’umusozi. 
Exodus26:31 Uzakore umubambiko w’umwenda w’isine, n’umuhemba, n’umutuku, kandi wa hariri ihotoye; hanyuma bazatakeho Abakerubimu, byose bikozwe n’abahanga." 
Exodus26:32 Uzawumanike ku nkingi enye z’ibiti by’umunyinya zometseho zahabu, zikabaho intendekero za zahabu, kandi zishinze mu bishyigikizo bine bya feza." 
Exodus26:33 Uzashyire umubambiko mu nsi ya bya bifunga; maze aho ngaho inyuma y’umubambiko, azabe ari ho winjiza Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano. Uwo mubambiko uzababere urugabano rw’Ingoro nyirizina no mu mbere yayo." 
Exodus26:34 Uzashyire urwicurizo hejuru y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano mu mbere y’Ingoro. 
Exodus26:35 Utereke ameza hino y’umubambiko mu ruhande rw’amajyaruguru y’Ingoro. Naho ikinyarumuri uzagishyire ku ruhande rw’amajyepfo, ahateganye n’ameza." 
Exodus26:36 Umuryango w’ihema uzawukorere uwundi mubambiko mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba, n’ubw’umutuku, na hariri ihotoye, byose bizakorwe n’umudozi w’umuhanga." 
Exodus26:37 Uwo mubambiko uzawukorere inkingi eshanu z’ibiti by’iminyinya, maze uzazomekeho zahabu; zizagire intendekero za zahabu, kandi uzacure ibishyigikizo bitanu by’umuringa bizashyirwa mu nsi y’izo nkingi." 
Exodus27:1 Uzubake urutambiro mu biti by’iminyinya, rufite uburebure bw’imikono itanu, n’ubugari bw’imikono itanu. Urutambiro ruzabe rufite impande zireshya, rugire n’ubuhagarike bw’imikono itatu." 
Exodus27:2 Ku nguni zarwo uko ari enye, uzahubake amahembe. Ayo mahembe azakorwe mu giti gifatanye n’urutambiro, maze uzayomekeho icyuma cy’umuringa." 
Exodus27:3 Urutambiro uzarukorere ibyungo byo gukuburiramo ivu ryarwo, ibidahuzo byarwo, ibisukirizo byarwo, n’ibirahuzwa amakara byarwo, byose uzabikore mu cyuma cy’umuringa." 
Exodus27:4 Urutambiro uzarukorere uruzitiro mu twuma tw’umuringa, dushandikiranyije nk’urushundura, maze urwo rushundura uzarushyireho ibifunga bine by’umuringa ku mfuruka zarwo enye." 
Exodus27:5 Urwo ruzitiro ruzazenguruka urutambiro, ruhereye hasi rukageza mu cya kabiri cy’ubujyejuru bwarwo." 
Exodus27:6 Uzakorere urutambiro imijishi mu giti cy’umunyinya, uyomekeho icyuma cy’umuringa." 
Exodus27:7 Bazinjize iyo mijishi mu bifunga, maze izajye ihora mu mpande z’urutambiro igihe bazajya baruheka." 
Exodus27:8 Uzarukore mu mbaho, urugire umurangara mu nda, nk’uko wabyerekewe hejuru y’umusozi." 
Exodus27:9 Uzubake kandi urugo ruzengurutse Ingoro. Mu ruhande rw’amajyepfo yayo, urugo ruzakingirizwe n’imibambiko ya hariri ihotoye, ku burebure bw’imikono ijana." 
Exodus27:10 Iyo mibambiko izafatwe n’inkingi makumyabiri, zifite ibishyigikizo makumyabiri by’icyuma cy’umuringa; intendekero zo ku nkingi n’ibifunga byazo, bizabe bikozwe muri feza." 
Exodus27:11 Bityo kandi, mu cyerekezo cy’amajyaruguru, hazabe imibambiko ku burebure bw’imikono ijana, ifatwe n’inkingi makumyabiri, n’ibishyigikizo makumyabiri by’icyuma cy’umuringa; intendekero zo ku nkingi n’ibifunga byazo, bizabe bikozwe muri feza." 
Exodus27:12 Mu ruhande rw’iburengerazuba, ku bugari bw’urugo, hazabe imibambiko y’imikono mirongo itanu, ifatwe n’inkingi cumi, n’ibishyigikizo cumi byazo." 
Exodus27:13 Mu ruhande rw’iburasirazuba, urugo ruzagire ubugari bw’imikono mirongo itanu," 
Exodus27:14 kandi mu ruhande rumwe hazabe imibambiko y’imikono cumi n’itanu, ifatwe n’inkingi eshatu, n’ibishyigikizo bitatu byazo." 
Exodus27:15 Mu rundi ruhande naho hazabe imibambiko y’imikono cumi n’itanu mu ruhande rwa kabiri, ifatwe n’inkingi eshatu, n’ibishyigikizo bitatu byazo." 
Exodus27:16 Naho irembo ry’urugo rizakingishwe umwenda w’imikono makumyabiri, ukozwe mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba, n’ubutukura, na hariri ihotoye, byaboshywe n’umudozi w’umuhanga, ufatwe n’inkingi enye, n’ibishyigikizo bine byazo." 
Exodus27:17 Inkingi zose zizengurutse urugo zizafatanishwe imbariro za feza, zigire n’intendekero za feza, n’ibishyigikizo by’umuringa." 
Exodus27:18 Uburebure bw’urugo buzabe imikono ijana impande zombi, ubugari bwarwo buzabe imikono mirongo itanu impande zombi, n’ubuhagarike bw’urugo buzabe imikono itanu." 
Exodus27:19 Ibikoresho byose bigenewe imirimo y’Ingoro, inkingi zayo zose n’inkingi zose z’urugo, bizabe mu cyuma cy’umuringa." 
Exodus27:20 Uzabwire na none Abayisraheli bakuzanire amavuta arongoroye y’imizeti isekuye, agenewe itara." 
Exodus27:21 Hahore iteka itara ryaka mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Aroni n’abahungu be bazaryiteho ku buryo rimurika kuva ku mugoroba kugeza mu gitondo imbere y’Uhoraho. Ni itegeko ridakuka mu Bayisraheli, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana." 
Exodus28:1 Ikindi kandi, wigize hafi yawe Aroni umuvandimwe wawe, kugira ngo abe umuherezabitambo wanjye; unahamagare mu Bayisraheli abahungu ba Aroni, ari bo Nadabu, Abihu, Eleyazari na Itamari." 
Exodus28:2 Umuvandimwe wawe Aroni, umudodeshereze imyambaro y’ubuherezabitambo imuhesha ikuzo n’icyubahiro." 
Exodus28:3 Uzabwire rero abadozi b’abahanga, abo nahaye ububasha bukomeye, maze bazadodere Aroni imyambaro imugenewe, kugira ngo abe intore ntagatifu, ashingwe umurimo w’ubuherezabitambo bwanjye." 
Exodus28:4 Dore imyambaro bazakora: umusesuragituza, umusanganyagihimba, igishura, ikanzu itatse, igitambaro batamiriza, n’umukandara. Iyo myambaro mitagatifu bazayikorere Aroni umuvandimwe wawe, n’abahungu be, kugira ngo babe abaherezabitambo banjye." 
Exodus28:5 Bazabikore muri zahabu, mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba, n’ubutukura, na hariri inetereye." 
Exodus28:6 Umusanganyagihimba bazawukoreshe zahabu, ubwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba n’ubutukura, na hariri ihotoye: uzadodwe n’umuhanga." 
Exodus28:7 Uwo mwambaro uzafatwe n’imishumi ibiri iteye ku mitwe yawo yombi. 
Exodus28:8 Umukandara wo kuwukenyeza na wo uzakorwe muri zahabu, ubwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba, n’ubutukura, na hariri ihotoye." 
Exodus28:9 Uzende amabuye abiri y’imboneranyi, maze uyandikeho amazina y’abana ba Israheli:" 
Exodus28:10 uzandike amazina atandatu ku ibuye rya mbere, yandi atandatu asigaye ku ibuye rya kabiri, uko bakurikirana mu mavuka yabo." 
Exodus28:11 Umubaji w’amabuye, uzi gucura za kashe, azabe ari we usharaga amazina y’abana ba Israheli kuri ayo mabuye yombi, maze uyafungire mu tugotesho twa zahabu." 
Exodus28:12 Uzashyire ayo mabuye yombi ku mishumi y’intugu ifata umusanganyagihimba, kugira ngo mujye mwibuka iteka abana ba Israheli. Bityo Aroni ajye ajyana amazina yabo ho urwibutso ku ntugu ze, imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Exodus28:13 Umaze gukora utwo tugotesho twa zahabu," 
Exodus28:14 uzanakore imikufi ibiri ya zahabu iyunguruye, kandi yacuranywe ubuhanga, maze azabe ari yo uzatakisha utwo tugotesho." 
Exodus28:15 Uzakore umusesuragituza ugenewe kumara impaka, ukorwe n’abahanga, bawutake kimwe n’umusanganyagihimba. Uzawukoreshe zahabu, ubwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba, n’ubutukura, na hariri ihotoye." 
Exodus28:16 Uzamere nk’uruhago rufite impande zireshya; uburebure bwawo buzabe igice cy’umukono, n’ubugari bwawo bube igice cy’umukono." 
Exodus28:17 Uzawutakeho imisitari ine y’amabuye y’agaciro. Mu musitari wa mbere hashyirwe isarudoni, itopazi na emerodi." 
Exodus28:18 Mu musitari wa kabiri hashyirwe malakita, isafiri na diyama." 
Exodus28:19 Mu musitari wa gatatu hashyirwe opali, agate na emetista." 
Exodus28:20 Mu musitari wa kane hashyirwe: ikrizoliti, imboneranyi na jasipi. Ayo mabuye azabe afungiye mu tugotesho twa zahabu." 
Exodus28:21 Amabuye azahwane n’amazina y’abana ba Israheli; azabe cumi n’abiri nk’amazina yabo bazayasharage nka za kashe, maze buri buye rizagire izina ryaryo, rimwe mu mazina y’imiryango cumi n’ibiri." 
Exodus28:22 Umusesuragituza uzawukorere imikufi ya zahabu iyunguruye, iboshye nk’utuziriko." 
Exodus28:23 Uzanakorere umusesuragituza ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu, maze uzashyire bya bifunga byombi ku mitwe yombi y’umusesuragituza." 
Exodus28:24 Uzafunge ya mikufi ibiri ya zahabu mu bifunga byombi, ku mitwe yombi y’umusesuragituza:" 
Exodus28:25 maze uzapfundike imisozo yombi y’imikufi mu tugotesho twombi dutatse imishumi y’intugu y’umusanganyagihimba, ahareba imbere." 
Exodus28:26 Uzakore n’ibindi bifunga bibiri bya zahabu; uzabishyire ku mitwe yombi yo hepfo y’umusesuragituza, ku ruhande rukora ku musanganyagihimba." 
Exodus28:27 Uzongere ukore ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu; uzabishyire mu nsi y’imishumi yombi y’intugu y’umusanganyagihimba, aherekera imbere hejuru y’umukandara." 
Exodus28:28 Umusesuragituza bazawupfundikishe ibyo bifunga ku bifunga by’umusanganyagituza bacishijemo injishi y’isine, kugira ngo ube hejuru y’umukandara wo ku musanganyagituza, maze umusesuragituza wekuzashobora gutandukana n’umusanganyagihimba." 
Exodus28:29 Aroni rero igihe azinjira mu Ngoro nyirizina, azajye ajyana ku mutima we amazina y’abana ba Israheli, ku musesuragituza ugenewe gukemura impaka, bibe urwibutso rw’iteka imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Exodus28:30 Kandi mu musesuragituza, uzashyiremo Urimu na Tumimu, maze bizahore ku mutima wa Aroni, igihe azajya ahinguka imbere y’Uhoraho. Bityo, Aroni azahorane iteka ku mutima we ubucamanza bw’abana ba Israheli." 
Exodus28:31 Uzakore igishura cy’umusanganyagituza mu bwoya bw’isine bwihariye. 
Exodus28:32 Muri cyo rwagati, hazabemo umwenge banyuzamo umutwe, kandi uwo mwenge uzazengurukwe n’umusozo w’umubohano, nk’umuguno w’ikoti ry’intambara, kugira ngo igishura kitazatanyuka." 
Exodus28:33 Ku musozo wo hasi uzashyireho amapfundo y’ubwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba, n’ubutukura, kandi uzongereho n’amayugi ya zahabu awuzengurutse." 
Exodus28:34 Impande zose ku musozo wo hasi y’igishura, iyugi rya zahabu rizakurikirane n’ipfundo ry’umuhemba, bityo bityo." 
Exodus28:35 Aroni azajye acyambarira gukora umurimo w’Uhoraho, maze bajye bamwumva ajegeza amayugi igihe azaba yinjiye mu Ngoro nyirizina imbere y’Uhoraho, n’igihe azasohokamo, bityo nta bwo azapfa." 
Exodus28:36 Kandi uzakore n’ikamba rya zahabu iyunguruye, ritatswe n’ururabo imbere, maze uzasharageho aya magambo uti «Uweguriwe Uhoraho.»" 
Exodus28:37 Uzarifungishe umushumi w’isine, uzabe ku gitambaro cyo mu mutwe. Uwo mutako ugomba kuba imbere ku gitambaro cyo mu mutwe." 
Exodus28:38 Uzahore mu ruhanga rwa Aroni, kugira ngo yigerekeho ibyaha byakozwe n’Abayisraheli mu bintu bitagatifu: uzahore iteka mu ruhanga rwe kugira ngo babone ubutoni imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Exodus28:39 Hanyuma, uzadodeshe ikanzu mu budodo bwa hariri inetereye, kandi ukore n’igitambaro cyo mu mutwe, n’umukandara; byose bizakorwe n’umuhanga uzi gutaka." 
Exodus28:40 Abahungu ba Aroni na bo uzabakorere amakanzu n’imikandara, ubakorere n’ingofero zibahesha ikuzo n’icyubahiro." 
Exodus28:41 Iyo myambaro yose uzayambike Aroni umuvandimwe wawe, hamwe n’abahungu be. Uzabasige amavuta, maze ubahe ububasha bwo gutunganya imihango mitagatifu; uzabanyegurira, babe abaherezabitambo banjye." 
Exodus28:42 Uzabakorere amakabutura ya hariri kugira ngo boye kwambara ubusa; azahera mu rukenyerero kugeza ku bibero. 
Exodus28:43 Aroni n’abahungu be bazajya bayambara igihe bazaba binjiye mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, cyangwa igihe bagiye ku rutambiro gukora imirimo yo mu Ngoro nyirizina, kugira ngo batazikururira igicumuro maze bagapfa. Iryo tegeko ni indakuka, kuri we no ku bazamukomokaho." 
Exodus29:1 Dore uko uzagenza kugira ngo ubahindure abaherezabitambo banjye banyeguriwe. Uzende ikimasa n’amasekurume abiri y’intama atagira inenge; 
Exodus29:2 uzende kandi imigati idasembuye, n’udutsima tudasembuye, dukoreshejwe amavuta y’imizeti, n’uduhwahure tw’imigati isizeho amavuta y’imizeti; byose uzabikore mu ifu igogoye y’ingano." 
Exodus29:3 Uzabishyire mu gatebo, maze uzature ako gatebo hamwe na cya kimasa na ya masekurume abiri y’intama." 
Exodus29:4 Uzazane Aroni n’abahungu be ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, maze uzabuhagize amazi." 
Exodus29:5 Hanyuma uzende imyambaro, wambike Aroni ikanzu, ugerekeho igishura cy’umusanganyagihimba ubwawo, n’umusesuragituza, maze uzawukindikirishe umukandara wo ku musanganyagihimba." 
Exodus29:6 Uzamutamirize igitambaro ku mutwe, maze hejuru y’igitambaro uhashyire ikamba ry’uweguriwe Uhoraho." 
Exodus29:7 Uzende amavuta yo gusiga, uyasuke ku mutwe we, maze uyamusige." 
Exodus29:8 Uzigize hino n’abahungu be, maze ubambike amakanzu." 
Exodus29:9 Uzabakindikirishe umukandara, ubambike n’ingofero zibahesha icyubahiro. Nuko ubuherezabitambo buzababere umurage w’umwihariko, ku bw’itegeko ridakuka. Nguko rero uko uzegurira Aroni n’abahungu be umurimo bashinzwe." 
Exodus29:10 Uzazane cya kimasa imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro, maze Aroni n’abahungu be baramburire ibiganza ku mutwe w’ikimasa." 
Exodus29:11 Ikimasa uzagitambirire imbere y’Uhoraho, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Exodus29:12 Uzende ku maraso y’ikimasa, uyakozemo urutoki rwawe, maze uyasige ku mahembe y’urutambiro; amaraso yose asigaye uzayasese mu nsi y’urutambiro." 
Exodus29:13 Uzende ikinure cyose cyoroshe amara n’umwijima; wende n’impyiko zombi kimwe n’ikinure kizoroshe, maze ibyo byose ubitwikire ku rutambiro." 
Exodus29:14 Naho inyama z’ikimasa, n’uruhu n’amayezi, uzabitwikire inyuma y’ingando: ni igitambo gihongerera ibyaha." 
Exodus29:15 Uzende imwe mu mapfizi y’intama, maze Aroni n’abahungu be baramburire ibiganza ku mutwe w’iyo mpfizi y’intama." 
Exodus29:16 Uzabage iyo mpfizi y’intama, utege amaraso yayo, maze uyamishe ku mpande zose z’urutambiro." 
Exodus29:17 Uzatanyagure impfizi y’intama, woze amara n’amaguru, ubigereke hejuru y’indi myanya no ku mutwe wayo," 
Exodus29:18 maze utwikire impfizi y’intama yose ku rutambiro. Ni igitambo gikongokeye Uhoraho, gifite impumuro imugusha neza, ikiribwa gikongokeye Uhoraho." 
Exodus29:19 Uzende impfizi y’intama ya kabiri, maze Aroni n’abahungu be bazaramburire ibiganza ku mutwe w’iyo mpfizi y’intama." 
Exodus29:20 Uzabage iyo mpfizi y’intama, maze wende ku maraso yayo, uyarabe ku gikobokobo cy’ugutwi kw’iburyo kw’Aroni, no ku gikobokobo cy’ugutwi kw’iburyo kw’abahungu be, no ku gikumwe cy’ikiganza cyabo cy’iburyo, no ku ino rinini ry’ikirenge cyabo cy’iburyo, maze usese amaraso ku mpande zose z’urutambiro." 
Exodus29:21 Uzende amaraso azaba ari ku rutambiro, n’amavuta yo gusiga, maze ubimishe kuri Aroni no ku myambaro ye, ku bahungu be no ku myambaro yabo. Bityo, azaba yeguriwe Uhoraho, we n’imyambaro ye, kimwe n’abahungu be n’imyambaro yabo." 
Exodus29:22 Hanyuma uzende ikinure cy’impfizi y’intama: umurizo, ikinure cyoroshe amara, n’ikinure kiri ku mwijima; wende n’impyiko zombi hamwe n’ikinure kizorosheho, ndetse n’itako ry’iburyo, kuko ari yo rugeyo y’intangizamirimo yabo." 
Exodus29:23 Byongeye uzende ikimanyu cy’umugati, umutsima ukoreshejwe amavuta y’imizeti n’agahwahure k’umugati biri mu gatebo gateretse imbere y’Uhoraho;" 
Exodus29:24 uzashyire ibyo byose mu biganza bya Aroni no mu biganza by’abahungu be, kugira ngo babiture Uhoraho babimwereka." 
Exodus29:25 Hanyuma uzabivane mu biganza byabo, maze ubikongereze ku rutambiro, biri hamwe n’igitambo gitwikwa, bibe impumuro igusha neza Uhoraho: igitambo gikongokeye Uhoraho." 
Exodus29:26 Hanyuma uzende inkoro ya rugeyo y’intangizamirimo ya Aroni, uyiture Uhoraho uyimwereka; nuko bizabe umugabane wawe." 
Exodus29:27 Nguko uko uzegurira Uhoraho inkoro n’itako bya rugeyo y’intangizamirimo ya Aroni n’abahungu be. 
Exodus29:28 Bizaba umusogongero Aroni n’abahungu be bazahabwa n’Abayisraheli, mu bitambo byabo byose by’ubuhoro. Ni itegeko ridakuka; ni umusogongero bazagenera Uhoraho." 
Exodus29:29 Aroni napfa, imyambaro ye izahabwe abahungu be, bayambare igihe bazaba bagiye gusigwa amavuta, no gushingwa umurimo w’ubuherezabitambo." 
Exodus29:30 Uwo mu bahungu be uzaba umuherezabitambo mu mwanya we, azajya ayambara mu minsi irindwi, igihe cyose azinjira mu ihema ry’ibonaniro gukorera imihango mu Ngoro nyirizina." 
Exodus29:31 Uzende rugeyo y’intangizamirimo, maze utekeshe inyama zayo ahantu hatagatifu." 
Exodus29:32 Aroni n’abahungu be bazarira inyama za rugeyo ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, hamwe n’umugati uzaba uri muri ka gatebo." 
Exodus29:33 Bazarye rero batyo ikizaba cyakoreshejwe guhongerera ibyaha byabo, ku munsi wabo wo kwegurirwa Uhoraho no gutangira imirimo yabo. Nta wundi uzaziryaho, kuko zizaba ari ibintu bitagatifu." 
Exodus29:34 Bukeye bwaho niba hari icyasigaye ku nyama z’intangizamirimo, no ku migati, uzatwike ibyo bisigazwa. Ntibazabirye, kuko bizaba ari ibintu bitagatifu." 
Exodus29:35 Uzagenzereze utyo Aroni n’abahungu be, ukurikije amabwiriza naguhaye. Imihango yo kubashinga imirimo yabo mitagatifu izamare iminsi irindwi yose." 
Exodus29:36 Uzajye utura buri munsi ikimasa kibe igitambo gihongerera ibyaha; uzakureho utyo ubwandure bw’urutambiro, maze urusige amavuta kugira ngo urutagatifuze." 
Exodus29:37 Mu minsi irindwi uzakorera urutambiro imihango yo kurukiza ubwandure, maze urwegurire Imana; nuko urutambiro ruzabe rutagatifu rwose, n’ikizakora ku rutambiro cyose kizabe gitagatifu." 
Exodus29:38 Dore ibyo uzatura ku rutambiro: uzatambe abana b’intama b’umwaka umwe, buri munsi babiri, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana iteka." 
Exodus29:39 Uzatambe umwe muri abo bana b’intama mu gitondo, maze undi uwutambe nimugoroba, mu kabwibwi." 
Exodus29:40 Byongeye, hamwe n’uwo mwana w’intama wa mbere, uzature akebo kuzuye ifu igogoye y’ingano, ivangavanze n’amavuta y’imizeti yakuzura akabindi, n’agacuma ka divayi." 
Exodus29:41 Uzatambe umwana w’intama wa kabiri nimugoroba, mu kabwibwi; uyigeretseho amaturo, na divayi y’igitambo gisheshwe, bimeze nk’ibyo mu gitondo. Bizaba impumuro igusha neza Uhoraho, n’igitambo kimutwikiwe." 
Exodus29:42 Ngicyo igitambo gitwikwa kizagomba guturwa namwe ubuziraherezo, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana, mukabikorera ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, imbere y’Uhoraho, aho nzajya mbigaragariza kugira ngo nkuvugishe." 
Exodus29:43 Nzajya mbonanira aho ngaho n’Abayisraheli, hazatagatifuzwe n’ikuzo ryanjye." 
Exodus29:44 Nzatagatifuza ihema ry’ibonaniro n’urutambiro, ntagatifuze kandi Aroni n’abahungu be ngo begukire ubuherezabitambo bwanjye." 
Exodus29:45 Nzatura mu Bayisraheli rwagati, maze mbe Imana yabo." 
Exodus29:46 Bazamenya ko Imana yabo ari jyewe Uhoraho, wabavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, ngo mbaturemo rwagati. Jyewe Uhoraho, ni jye Mana yabo." 
Exodus30:1 Uzubake urutambiro rwo gutwikiraho imibavu; uzarukore mu giti cy’umunyinya. 
Exodus30:2 Uburebure bwarwo buzabe umukono umwe, n’ubugari bwarwo bube umukono umwe; ruzabe rufite rero impande zingana. Ruzagire n’ubuhagarike bw’imikono ibiri, kandi amahembe yarwo azabe akozwe mu giti kimwe na rwo." 
Exodus30:3 Uzarwomekeho zahabu iyunguruye ku ruhande rwo hejuru, ku mpande zarwo hirya no hino, no ku mahembe yarwo, maze uzaruzengurutseho umuguno wa zahabu." 
Exodus30:4 Uzarutereho ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu, mu nsi y’umuguno ku mpande ebyiri. Uzabishyire mu mbavu ebyiri, kugira ngo bizinjizwemo imijishi bazajya bahekesha urutambiro." 
Exodus30:5 Imijishi uzayikore mu giti cy’umunyinya, na yo uyomekeho zahabu." 
Exodus30:6 Uzashyire urutambiro imbere y’umubambiko ukingirije ubushyinguro, aho nzajya mbonanira nawe." 
Exodus30:7 Aroni azajye ahatwikira imibavu igenewe gutwikwa; abigire buri gitondo igihe atunganya amatara. 
Exodus30:8 Kandi igihe Aroni azajya acana amatara nimugoroba, mu kabwibwi, naho azayitwike. Bizaba umubavu w’iteka ryose imbere y’Uhoraho, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana." 
Exodus30:9 Hejuru y’urwo rutambiro ntimuzagerekeho umubavu udatagatifujwe, cyangwa igitambo gitwikwa, cyangwa ituro, kandi ntimuzarusukeho igitambo giseswa." 
Exodus30:10 Byongeye, Aroni azakorere umuhango wo guhongerera ibyaha, ku mahembe y’urutambiro rimwe mu mwaka. Azajye arusukura akoresheje amaraso y’igitambo gihongerera ibyaha, rimwe mu mwaka, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana iteka. Urwo rutambiro ruzabera Uhoraho ahantu hatagatifu rwose.»" 
Exodus30:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa, avuga ati" 
Exodus30:12 «Igihe uzabarura Abayisraheli, buri muntu muri bo azahe Uhoraho ingurane y’ubugingo bwe, kugira ngo hatazagira icyorezo cyabadukamo, ku mpamvu y’iryo barura." 
Exodus30:13 Dore icyo bazatanga: buri muntu mu bagomba kubarurwa azatanga igice cy’isikeli gipimiye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro, ingana n’amagera makumyabiri. Icyo gice cya sikeli kizaba ikoro ry’Uhoraho." 
Exodus30:14 Umuntu wese uzaba afite imyaka makumyabiri, cyangwa ayirengeje, azatanga iryo koro ry’Uhoraho, igihe azajya kubarurwa." 
Exodus30:15 Igihe muzazana ikoro ry’Uhoraho ngo ribe ingurane y’ubugingo bwanyu, umukungu ntazasumbyeho, n’umukene ntazatange ikiri hasi y’igice cy’isikeli." 
Exodus30:16 Abayisraheli bazaguhe ifeza y’iyo ngurane, maze uyikoreshe imirimo y’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Ibyo bizabera Abayisraheli urwibutso rw’ingurane y’ubugingo bwanyu mu maso y’Uhoraho.»" 
Exodus30:17 Uhoraho abwira Musa muri aya magambo, ati" 
Exodus30:18 «Uzakore igikarabiro mu cyuma cy’umuringa n’urugata rwacyo mu cyuma cy’umuringa, bajye bakisukuriramo. Uzagishyire hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’urutambiro, maze uzasukemo amazi," 
Exodus30:19 kugira ngo Aroni n’abahungu be bayogerezemo ibiganza n’ibirenge. 
Exodus30:20 Igihe bazinjira mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, bazajye bakaraba ayo mazi kugira ngo batazapfa; kimwe n’igihe bazegera urutambiro ngo bakore imirimo yabo, batwikira Uhoraho ibitambo." 
Exodus30:21 Bazajye biyoza ibirenge n’ibiganza kugira ngo batazapfa. Bizabe itegeko ridakuka kuri Aroni no ku bazamukomokaho, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana.»" 
Exodus30:22 Uhoraho abwira Musa aya magambo, ati"
