Exodus30:23 «Ushake imibavu y’indobanure: uburemere bw’amasikeli magana atanu ya manemane y’umushongi; igice cy’ubwo buremere ari byo kuvuga amasikeli magana abiri na mirongo itanu ya sinamomu; n’amasikeli magana abiri na mirongo itanu y’imbingo zihumura cyane; 
Exodus30:24 amasikeli magana atanu ya kasa, byose bipimiye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro, hamwe n’urwabya rw’amavuta y’imizeti." 
Exodus30:25 Uzabikoremo amavuta matagatifu agenewe gusiga, bibe ikivange gihumura cyane nk’imibavu yakozwe n’umuhanga; bizabe amavuta matagatifu agenewe gusiga." 
Exodus30:26 Uzayasige ihema ry’ibonaniro, Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano," 
Exodus30:27 ameza n’ibikoresho byayo byose, ikinyarumuri n’ibigendana na cyo byose, urutambiro rw’imibavu," 
Exodus30:28 urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibikoresho byarwo byose, igikarabiro hamwe n’urugata rwacyo." 
Exodus30:29 Uzabitagatifuze, bihinduke bitagatifu rwose; maze n’ikizabikoraho na cyo kizabe gitagatifu." 
Exodus30:30 Uzasige Aroni n’abahungu be, maze ubatagatifuze ngo begukire ubuherezabitambo bwanjye." 
Exodus30:31 Hanyuma uzabwire Abayisraheli, uti ‘Aya ngaya ni amavuta matagatifu agenewe gusiga; uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana.’" 
Exodus30:32 Ntibazayasige ku mubiri w’umuntu, kandi ntibazakore ayandi ameze nka yo. Ni ikintu gitagatifu, maze azakomeze ababere matagatifu." 
Exodus30:33 Nihagira ugerageza gukora amavuta nk’ayo, cyangwa akayasiga ku muntu usanzwe, uwo nguwo azacibwa mu muryango we.»" 
Exodus30:34 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ushake imibavu: amakakama atoranyijwe, imbingo zihumura z’amoko yose, n’ububani bw’indobanure, byose mu rugero ruhwanye." 
Exodus30:35 Uzabikoremo umubavu utwikwa, uvanze ku buryo bw’abahanga; uzongeremo umunyu, maze byose bihinduke umubavu usukuye kandi mutagatifu." 
Exodus30:36 Uzasye mukeya, maze uwushyire imbere y’urwibutso rw’Isezerano, mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, aho nzajya mbonanira nawe. Uzakubere ikintu gitagatifu rwose." 
Exodus30:37 N’uwo mubavu uzakora, ntuzagire undi wikorera umeze nka wo; uzakubere ikintu cyeguriwe Uhoraho." 
Exodus30:38 Nihagira umuntu ukora undi nka wo, ngo awinukirize, azacibwa mu muryango we.»" 
Exodus31:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Exodus31:2 «Dore mpamagaye mu izina rye Besaleli, mwene Uri, umwuzukuru wa Huri, wo mu nzu ya Yuda." 
Exodus31:3 Namwujujemo umwuka w’Imana, maze muha ubuhanga, ubwenge n’ubumenyi bw’imyuga iyo ari yo yose," 
Exodus31:4 kugira ngo ahimbe ibikoresho by’agaciro, bicuzwe muri zahabu, feza, n’umuringa;" 
Exodus31:5 kandi aconge amabuye y’indobanure, abaze ibiti, anatunganye imirimo iyo ari yo yose." 
Exodus31:6 Kandi dore nashyize Oholiyabu, mwene Ahisamaki wo mu nzu ya Dani, hamwe na we. Umutima wa buri muhanzi nawushyizemo ubuhanga, kugira ngo bazakore ibyo nagutegetse byose:" 
Exodus31:7 ihema ry’ibonaniro n’ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano, urwicurizo ruri hejuru yabwo, n’ibintu byose byo mu ihema," 
Exodus31:8 nk’ameza n’ibikoresho byayo, ikinyarumuri cya zahabu iyunguruye n’ibigendana na cyo byose, kimwe n’urutambiro rw’imibavu," 
Exodus31:9 urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibikoresho byarwo byose, igikarabiro n’urugata rwacyo," 
Exodus31:10 imyambaro y’imihango n’imyambaro mitagatifu ya Aroni umuherezabitambo, kimwe n’imyambaro abahungu be bambara bakora iby’ubuherezabitambo," 
Exodus31:11 amavuta yo gusiga n’imibavu ihumura igenewe Ingoro. Ibyo byose bazabirangize bakurikije ayo mabwiriza yose naguhaye.» 
Exodus31:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa aya magambo, ati" 
Exodus31:13 «Ubwire Abayisraheli, uti ’Muzubahirize amasabato yanjye mubishishikariye, kuko ari cyo kimenyetso nashyize hagati yanjye namwe, uko ibisekuru byanyu bikurikirana, kugira ngo bamenye ko ari jye Uhoraho ubatagatifuza." 
Exodus31:14 Muzakurikize rero isabato, kuko ari umunsi mutagatifu kuri mwe. Utazayubahiriza wese, azicwe.’ Umuntu wese uzakora umurimo kuri uwo munsi, azacibwe mu bo bava inda imwe." 
Exodus31:15 Mu minsi itandatu bazajye bakora imirimo, maze umunsi wa karindwi ube uw’ikiruhuko cy’isabato, umunsi mutagatifu wagenewe Uhoraho. Umuntu wese uzakora umurimo ku munsi w’isabato, azicwe." 
Exodus31:16 Abayisraheli bazakurikize rero isabato, maze isabato izababere Isezerano ry’indahinduka kuva mu gisekuru kujya mu kindi." 
Exodus31:17 Ni ikimenyetso kizahoraho iteka ryose hagati yanjye n’Abayisraheli, kuko Uhoraho yaremye ijuru n’isi mu minsi itandatu, ariko ku munsi wa karindwi agahagarika imirimo, akaruhuka.»" 
Exodus31:18 Uhoraho amaze kuvuganira na Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi, amuha ibimanyu bibiri by’amabuye y’urwibutso rw’Isezerano. Ayo mabuye yari abaje, kandi yandikishijweho urutoki rw’Imana." 
Exodus32:1 Imbaga ibonye ko Musa atinze kumanuka ku musozi, ikoranira iruhande rwa Aroni, maze baramubwira bati «Ngaho dukorere imana zo kutugenda imbere; kuko Musa uriya, watuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, tutazi uko byamugendekeye!»" 
Exodus32:2 Aroni arababwira ati «Nimukure impeta za zahabu ku matwi y’abagore banyu, n’ay’abahungu banyu n’abakobwa banyu, maze muzinzanire.»" 
Exodus32:3 Bose biyambura impeta za zahabu bari bafite ku matwi, bazizanira Aroni." 
Exodus32:4 Nuko yakira iyo zahabu, arayishongesha, ayicuramo ishusho ry’ikimasa. Nuko baravuga bati «Israheli, dore imana zawe zakuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri!»" 
Exodus32:5 Aroni ngo abibone, yubaka urutambiro imbere y’icyo kigirwamana, maze avuga aranguruye ati «Ejo hazaba umunsi mukuru wo kubaha Uhoraho!»" 
Exodus32:6 Bukeye bwaho rero, mu gitondo cya kare, batura ibitambo bitwikwa, bazana n’igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Nuko imbaga iricara, bararya, baranywa, nyuma barahaguruka barabyina." 
Exodus32:7 Ubwo ngubwo Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Hogi manuka, kuko umuryango wawe, wa muryango wavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, wihumanije!" 
Exodus32:8 Ntibatindiganije guteshuka inzira nari narabategetse; bihimbiye ikigirwamana cy’ikimasa, bapfukama imbere yacyo, maze bagitura ibitambo, bavuga ngo ’Israheli, dore imana zawe zakuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri’»!" 
Exodus32:9 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ndabona neza ko uyu muryango ufite ijosi rishingaraye!" 
Exodus32:10 Ubu ngubu noneho ndeka, maze uburakari bwanjye bugurumane, mbarimbure! Nyamara wowe nzakugira ihanga rikomeye!»" 
Exodus32:11 Musa yurura Uhoraho Imana ye, avuga ati «Mbese Uhoraho, kuki uburakari bwawe bwagurumanira umuryango wawe, wivaniye ubwawe mu gihugu cya Misiri ukoresheje ububasha bukaze bw’ukuboko kwawe?" 
Exodus32:12 Ni iki cyatuma Abanyamisiri bavuga ngo ’Yabimuye ino abitewe n’ubugome, agira ngo abicire mu misozi, abatsembe ku isi!’ Cubya uburakari bwawe bukaze, maze ureke inabi wari ugiye kugirira umuryango wawe." 
Exodus32:13 Wibuke indahiro wirahiriye ubwawe usezeranya Abrahamu, na Izaki na Yakobo, abagaragu bawe, ugira uti ‘Nzagwiza urubyaro rwanyu nk’inyenyeri zo mu kirere, kandi iki gihugu navuze cyose nzagiha abana banyu, maze bagitunge ingoma ibihumbi.’»" 
Exodus32:14 Nuko Uhoraho yisubiraho, areka inabi yari yashatse kugirira umuryango we." 
Exodus32:15 Musa arahindukira, amanuka umusozi atwaye bya bimanyu bibiri by’amabuye y’urwibutso rw’Isezerano. Ayo mabuye yari abaje kandi yanditseho ku mpande zombi, imbere n’inyuma." 
Exodus32:16 Ibyo bimanyu byari byakozwe n’Imana, kandi n’inyandiko yari inyandiko y’Imana, isharaze kuri ibyo bimanyu by’amabuye." 
Exodus32:17 Yozuwe yumva urwamu rw’imbaga yasakabakaga, maze abwira Musa, ati «Ndumva urwamu rw’intambara mu ngando!»" 
Exodus32:18 Musa arasubiza ati «Urwo rwamu si indirimbo y’umutsindo, si n’amaganya y’abatsinzwe. Jyeweho ndumva ari urwamu rw’indirimbo z’ababyina!»" 
Exodus32:19 Ngo agere hafi y’ingando, abona cya kimasa n’abakibyiniraga. Nuko uburakari bwa Musa buragurumana; ajugunya bya bimanyu by’amabuye, bijanjagurikira mu nsi y’umusozi." 
Exodus32:20 Maze yenda cya kimasa bari bakoze, aragitwika, agisyamo ivu rigogoye, arivanga n’amazi, maze aryuhira Abayisraheli." 
Exodus32:21 Musa abwira Aroni, ati «Uyu muryango wakugenje ute kugira ngo wemere kuwukoresha igicumuro gikomeye?»" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni arasubiza ati «Uburakari bwa databuja nibwoye kugurumana! Ubwawe ntuyobewe ko uyu muryango ubogamiye ku kibi. 
Exodus32:23 Bambwiye bati ‘Dukorere imana zo kutugenda imbere, kuko Musa uriya, wa mugabo watuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, tutazi uko byamugendekeye!’" 
Exodus32:24 Ndababwira rero nti ‘Abafite zahabu nibaziyambure ku matwi.’ Barazimpa, nzishongesha mu muriro, maze havamo icyo kimasa!»" 
Exodus32:25 Musa abona ukuntu imbaga yatannye, ko Aroni ari we wari wayiteye gutana, bigatuma abanzi bayo bayiha urw’amenyo!" 
Exodus32:26 Nuko Musa ahagarara ku irembo ry’ingando, aravuga ati «Indahemuka z’Uhoraho, nimunsange!» Nuko abahungu ba Levi bose bakoranira iruhande rwe." 
Exodus32:27 Arababwira ati «Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, aravuze ngo ’Buri muntu muri mwe niyambare inkota ye ku itako, maze mugende mu ngando, muzenguruke hose muva ku nzu imwe mujya ku yindi; buri muntu yice uwo bahuye, yaba mwene nyina, yaba incuti ye, cyangwa undi bafitanye isano!’»" 
Exodus32:28 Abahungu ba Levi bakora icyo Musa abategetse, maze uwo munsi mu mbaga hagwa abantu nk’ibihumbi bitatu." 
Exodus32:29 Hanyuma Musa aravuga ati «Kuva uyu munsi Uhoraho arabiyeguriye, kuko ari ntawashidikanyije kurwanya umuhungu we, cyangwa se mwene nyina; uyu munsi Uhoraho nabahe umugisha.»" 
Exodus32:30 Bukeye bwaho, Musa abwira rubanda, ati «Mwakoze icyaha gikomeye! None ubu ngubu ngiye kuzamuka njye imbere y’Uhoraho, wenda nashobora kubaronkera imbabazi z’igicumuro cyanyu.»" 
Exodus32:31 Musa yongera gusanga Uhoraho, maze aravuga ati «Nta byo! Uyu muryango wakoze icyaha gikomeye: bihimbiye ibigirwamana bya zahabu!" 
Exodus32:32 None rero, ubabarire igicumuro cyabo, bitabaye ibyo unsibanganye mu gitabo wanditse!»" 
Exodus32:33 Uhoraho asubiza Musa, ati «Uwancumuyeho ni we nzasibanganya mu gitabo cyanjye!" 
Exodus32:34 Ngaho genda, uyobore umuryango aho nakubwiye, umumalayika wanjye ni we uzakugenda imbere. Ariko umunsi wo kubahana nugera, nzabahanira igicumuro cyabo!»" 
Exodus32:35 Nuko Uhoraho ahana imbaga kubera ikimasa bari bacuze, cya kindi Aroni yari yakoze." 
Exodus33:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Genda uve aha hantu, wowe n’umuryango wavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, maze uzamuke ugana mu gihugu nasezeranije Abrahamu, na Izaki na Yakobo, nkabarahira mvuga nti ’Nzagiha urubyaro rwawe.’" 
Exodus33:2 Nzohereza umumalayika akujye imbere, maze nzirukane Abakanahani, n’Abahemori, n’Abaheti, n’Abaperezi, n’Abahivi, n’Abayebuzi." 
Exodus33:3 Ngaho zamuka ugana mu gihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki. Ariko jye sinzajyana namwe, kuko muri umuryango ufite ijosi rishingaraye, hato ntazabatsembera mu nzira.»" 
Exodus33:4 Imbaga yumvise ayo magambo akarishye, irashavura, maze ntihagira umuntu wambara iby’umurimbo." 
Exodus33:5 Uhoraho rero abwira Musa, ati «Ubwire Abayisraheli uti ’Muri umuryango ufite ijosi rishingaraye! Ndamutse njyanye namwe akanya gatoya, nabarimbura. Ngaho nimufashe hasi imyambaro yanyu y’imirimbo, ndaba ndeba uko ngomba kubagenza.’»" 
Exodus33:6 Abayisraheli biyambura imyambaro yabo y’imirimbo, guhera aho bari bari ku musozi wa Horebu." 
Exodus33:7 Musa yendaga ihema, maze akarishinga hirya y’ingando, ahitaruye, rikitwa ihema ry’ibonaniro. Nuko uwashakaga wese kugisha inama Uhoraho, akajya ku ihema ry’ibonaniro ryari hanze y’ingando." 
Exodus33:8 Iyo Musa yasohokaga ngo ajye ku ihema, imbaga yose yarahagurukaga, buri muntu agahagarara ku muryango w’ihema rye; nuko bagakurikiza Musa amaso kugeza igihe yinjiriye mu ihema." 
Exodus33:9 Musa yamara kwinjira mu ihema, ya nkingi y’agacu ikamanuka, maze igahagarara ku muryango w’ihema, Uhoraho akaganira na Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Imbaga yose yabaga ireba inkingi y’agacu gahagaze ku muryango w’ihema; maze imbaga yose igahaguruka, buri muntu agapfukama ku muryango w’ihema rye." 
Exodus33:11 Uhoraho rero akavugana na Musa bahanganye amaso, mbese nk’uko umuntu avugana n’undi. Hanyuma Musa agasubira mu ngando; ariko umufasha we, umusore witwa Yozuwe mwene Nuni, ntave mu ihema." 
Exodus33:12 Musa abwira Uhoraho, ati «Dore urambwira ngo ’Nyobore iyi mbaga’, ariko ntiwamenyesheje uwo uzatuma ngo tujyane. Nyamara ni wowe wivugiye uti ’Ndakuzi mu izina’, urongera uti ’Wagize ubutoni mu maso yanjye!’" 
Exodus33:13 None rero, niba koko mfite ubutoni mu maso yawe, ngaho mbwira inzira zawe maze nkumenye, bityo ngire ubutoni mu maso yawe. Ikindi kandi, ibuka ko iri hanga ari umuryango wawe!»" 
Exodus33:14 Uhoraho ati «Ese uribwira ko ari jye ubwanjye tuzajyana ngo nguhe ihumure?» 
Exodus33:15 Musa ati «Niba utaje ngo tujyane, wikwirirwa uduhagurutsa aha ngaha." 
Exodus33:16 Naho ubundi se, ni iki kizerekana ko jyewe n’umuryango wawe dufite ubutoni mu maso yawe? Si uko wajyana natwe, bityo jyewe n’umuryango wawe ntiduse n’indi miryango iri ku bwisanzure bw’isi?»" 
Exodus33:17 Uhoraho asubiza Musa, ati «Icyo unsabye na cyo nzagikora, ku mpamvu y’uko ufite ubutoni mu maso yanjye, kandi nkaba nkwiyiziye mu izina.»" 
Exodus33:18 Musa ati «Ngaho rero nyereka ikuzo ryawe!» 
Exodus33:19 Uhoraho ati «Ndanyuza ububengerane bwanjye bwose imbere yawe, maze ntangaze izina ryanjye ’Uhoraho’. Ngirira ibambe uwo nishakiye, nkagirira impuhwe uwo nishakiye.»" 
Exodus33:20 Yungamo ati «Nta bwo washobora kubona uruhanga rwanjye, kuko nta muntu wabasha kumbona ngo agumye abeho.»" 
Exodus33:21 Uhoraho arongera ati «Ngwino nkwereke aho uba uhagaze iruhande rwanjye. Ndaguhagarika hejuru y’urutare. 
Exodus33:22 Igihe rero ikuzo ryanjye riza guhita, ndagushyira mu bwihugiko bw’urutare, maze ngutwikirize ikiganza cyanjye kugeza ubwo ntambutse." 
Exodus33:23 Hanyuma nkuvaneho ikiganza, maze umbone mu mugongo gusa; naho uruhanga rwanjye, ntawashobora kurureba.»" 
Exodus34:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ubaze ibimanyu bibiri by’amabuye nk’ibya mbere, maze kuri ibyo bimanyu nandikeho amagambo yari kuri bya bimanyu bya mbere wamenaguye." 
Exodus34:2 Uzabe witeguye ejo mu gitondo cya kare, maze bugicya uzazamuke hejuru y’umusozi wa Sinayi, uhagarare imbere yanjye, hariya mu mpinga y’umusozi." 
Exodus34:3 Ntihazagire umuntu uzamukana nawe; ntihazagire n’ukandagira kuri uwo musozi aho ariho hose; ndetse n’amatungo magufi cyangwa maremare ntazarishe ahegereye uyu musozi.» 
Exodus34:4 Nuko Musa abaza ibimanyu bibiri by’amabuye nk’ibya mbere. Arazinduka, azamuka umusozi wa Sinayi, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse, maze ajyana mu ntoki ibimanyu bibiri by’amabuye." 
Exodus34:5 Nuko Uhoraho amanuka mu gacu, ahahurira na we, maze atangaza izina rye «Uhoraho»." 
Exodus34:6 Uhoraho rero anyura imbere ya Musa, maze avuga aranguruye ati «Ndi Uhoraho, Uhoraho Imana igira impuhwe n’ineza, itinda kurakara, yuje ubuntu n’ubudahemuka," 
Exodus34:7 Imana igaragariza ubuntu bwayo ibisekuru ibihumbi n’ibihumbi, ikihanganira igicumuro, ubwigomeke n’icyaha, ariko ntireke guhanira igicumuro cy’ababyeyi mu bana n’abuzukuru babo, kugeza mu gisekuru cya gatatu n’icya kane!»" 
Exodus34:8 Ako kanya Musa akubita amavi ku butaka, arapfukama." 
Exodus34:9 Nuko aravuga ati «Nyagasani, niba koko mfite ubutoni mu maso yawe, ngaho databuja niyemere kugendana natwe. Yego turi umuryango ufite ijosi rishingaraye; ariko rero utubabarire ibicumuro byacu n’ibyaha byacu, maze utugire ubukonde bwawe!»" 
Exodus34:10 Uhoraho rero aravuga ati «Ngiye kugirana nawe Isezerano! Mu ruhame rw’umuryango wawe wose, ngiye gukora ibintu bitangaje, bitigeze bibaho mu gihugu na kimwe cyangwa mu ihanga na rimwe; maze imbaga yose igukikije yibonere igikorwa cy’Uhoraho, kuko ibintu ngiye gukorana nawe biteye ubwoba!" 
Exodus34:11 Urakurikize neza ibyo ngutegeka uyu munsi. Dore nzirukana imbere yawe Umuhemori, Umukanahani, Umuheti, Umuperezi, Umuhivi n’Umuyebuzi." 
Exodus34:12 Uzirinde kugirana isezerano n’abaturage b’igihugu ugiyemo, hato bitazakubera umutego." 
Exodus34:13 Ahubwo muzahirike intambiro zabo, mumenagure inkingi z’amabuye bashinze, kandi mutemagure ibiti byeguriwe ibigirwamana byabo." 
Exodus34:14 Ntuzagire rero indi mana upfukamira, kuko izina ry’Uhoraho ari Rudaharikwa, akaba Imana ifuha." 
Exodus34:15 Uramenye ntuzagirane isezerano n’abatuye icyo gihugu, hato batazagutumira igihe bazaba bakora ibibi basenga ibigirwamana byabo, babitura ibitambo, maze ukarya ku bitambo byabo." 
Exodus34:16 N’umuhungu wawe ntuzamusabire mu bakobwa babo, hato abo bakobwa batazatera abahungu bawe gukora ibibi basenga ibigirwamana byabo." 
Exodus34:17 Ntuziremere imana zicuzwe mu cyuma. 
Exodus34:18 Uzubahirize iminsi mikuru y’imigati idasembuye. Mu minsi irindwi uzarye imigati idasembuye nk’uko nabigutegetse, ku itariki nashyizeho y’ukwezi kw’Amahundo, kuko ukwezi kw’Amahundo ari ko wimutseho mu Misiri." 
Exodus34:19 Umuhungu wavutse uburiza wese ni uwanjye, kimwe n’icyavutse uburiza cyose cy’igitsinagabo mu matungo yawe, ari inka, ari intama." 
Exodus34:20 Uburiza bw’indogobe uzabucunguze umwana w’intama; niba utayibucunguje, uzabuvune ijosi. Uburiza bwose bw’abahungu bawe na bwo uzabucungure. Kandi ntihazagire uhinguka amara masa imbere yanjye." 
Exodus34:21 Uzakore imirimo iminsi itandatu, ariko ku munsi wa karindwi uzaruhuke; kabone n’aho haba ari igihe cy’ihinga cyangwa icy’isarura, uzaruhuke." 
Exodus34:22 Uzubahirize umunsi mukuru w’Ibyumweru ubigirira kurya umuganura w’ingano zeze. Uzubahirize n’umunsi mukuru w’Ihunika mu ndunduro y’umwaka. 
Exodus34:23 Gatatu mu mwaka, abagabo bose bazaze kwiyereka Nyagasani Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli." 
Exodus34:24 Koko rero nimara kwirukana amahanga imbere yawe, no kwagura igihugu cyawe, nta wundi uzararikira isambu yawe igihe uzaba wagiye kwiyereka Uhoraho Imana yawe, gatatu mu mwaka." 
Exodus34:25 Ntuzanture igitambo cy’amaraso giherekejwe n’imigati isembuye; kandi igitambo uturiye umunsi mukuru wa Pasika ntikizarenge ijoro ngo kigere mu gitondo. 
Exodus34:26 Uzazane mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho Imana yawe umuganura w’imbuto zeze mu murima wawe. Ntuzateke umwana w’ihene mu mahenehene ya nyina.» 
Exodus34:27 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Andika aya magambo witonze, kuko Isezerano ngiranye nawe kimwe na Israheli rishingiye kuri ayo magambo.»" 
Exodus34:28 Musa agumana aho ngaho n’Uhoraho iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine, nta kurya umugati, nta no kunywa amazi. Nuko yandika ku bimanyu by’amabuye amagambo y’Isezerano, ari yo ya magambo cumi." 
Exodus34:29 Musa amanuka ku musozi wa Sinayi afite mu ntoki ibimanyu bibiri by’amabuye byanditseho Isezerano. Ubwo yamanukaga, ntiyari azi ko mu ruhanga rwe harabagiranaga kubera ko yaganiriye n’Uhoraho." 
Exodus34:30 Aroni n’Abayisraheli bose babona Musa, n’ukuntu mu maso he harabagiranaga! Nuko bagira ubwoba bwo kumwegera." 
Exodus34:31 Musa arabahamagara; Aroni n’abatware bose b’imbaga bagaruka bamusanga, maze arabavugisha." 
Exodus34:32 Hanyuma Abayisraheli bose baramwegera, abamenyesha amategeko yose Uhoraho yari yamubwiriye hejuru y’umusozi wa Sinayi." 
Exodus34:33 Musa arangije kubibabwira, yipfuka igitambaro mu maso." 
Exodus34:34 Iyo Musa yabaga yinjiye imbere y’Uhoraho ngo avugane na we, yavanagaho icyo gitambaro kugeza igihe asohokeye mu ihema; yagera hanze, akabwira Abayisraheli ibyo yabaga yategetswe:" 
Exodus34:35 Abayisraheli babonaga mu maso ha Musa harabagirana. Nuko Musa agasubiza igitambaro mu maso, kugeza ubwo yongera kwinjira ngo avugane n’Uhoraho." 
Exodus35:1 Musa ahamagaza imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli, arababwira ati «Nimwumve ibyo Uhoraho abategetse kujya mukora." 
Exodus35:2 Mu minsi itandatu muzakore imirimo, naho umunsi wa karindwi uzababere isabato ntagatifu, umunsi w’ikiruhuko weguriwe Uhoraho. Umuntu wese uzakora kuri uwo munsi azicwa." 
Exodus35:3 Ntimuzacana umuriro mu nzu yanyu n’imwe ku munsi w’isabato.» 
Exodus35:4 Musa abwira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli aya magambo, ati «Nimwumve icyo Uhoraho yategetse." 
Exodus35:5 Nimugabanye ku bintu byanyu ituro ry’Uhoraho. Umuntu wese w’umutima utagundira azazanira Uhoraho imfashanyo ye: zahabu, na feza, n’umuringa," 
Exodus35:6 imyenda y’isine, n’iy’umuhemba, n’itukura, hariri inetereye, n’ubwoya bw’ihene," 
Exodus35:7 impu z’amapfizi y’intama zirabyemo ikigina, n’impu z’ibihura, n’ibiti by’iminyinya," 
Exodus35:8 n’amavuta y’imizeti yo gucana itara, imibavu igenewe kuvangwa n’amavuta yo gusiga, n’imibavu yo gutwika;" 
Exodus35:9 amabuye y’agaciro, n’amabuye yo gutaka ku musanganyagihimba no ku musesuragituza." 
Exodus35:10 N’abakozi banyu bose b’abahanga nibaze, maze barangize icyo Uhoraho yategetse." 
Exodus35:11 Ibyo ni Ingoro n’ihema ryayo, umutwikiro waryo, ibifunga byaryo, imbaho zaryo, imitambiko yaryo, imiganda yaryo, n’ibishyigikizo byaryo;" 
Exodus35:12 ubushyinguro n’imijishi yabwo, urwicurizo n’umubambiko ubikingiye;" 
Exodus35:13 ameza hamwe n’imijishi yayo n’ibikoresho byayo byose, hamwe n’imigati y’umumuriko;" 
Exodus35:14 ikinyarumuri cyo kumurika, hamwe n’ibikoresho byacyo, amatara yacyo n’amavuta y’imizeti akigenewe;" 
Exodus35:15 urutambiro rw’imibavu n’imijishi; amavuta yo gusiga n’imibavu yo gutwika; umubambiko ukinze ku muryango w’Ingoro; 
Exodus35:16 urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa n’uruzitiro rwarwo rw’umuringa, imijishi yarwo n’ibikoresho byarwo byose; igikarabiro n’urugata rwacyo;" 
Exodus35:17 imibambiko ikingiye urugo, inkingi zayo, ibishyigikizo byayo, n’umubambiko ukingiye irembo ry’urugo rw’Ingoro;" 
Exodus35:18 imiganda y’Ingoro, imiganda y’inkike z’Ingoro hamwe n’ibiziriko byazo;" 
Exodus35:19 imyambaro y’ibirori igenewe imihango mu Ngoro, imyambaro mitagatifu y’umuherezabitambo Aroni, n’imyambaro abahungu be bazambara batunganya imirimo y’ubuherezabitambo.»" 
Exodus35:20 Nuko ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli rimaze kuva iruhande rwa Musa," 
Exodus35:21 ab’umutima ukeye kandi wuzuye ubuntu bose baraza, batanga umusanzu w’Uhoraho mu bwubatsi bw’ihema ry’ibonaniro, n’imirimo yaryo yose, n’imyambaro mitagatifu." 
Exodus35:22 Haza abagabo kimwe n’abagore; ab’umutima ugira ubuntu bazana amaherena, n’impeta, n’inigi, n’ibintu bya zahabu by’amoko yose, maze buri muntu wabituraga Uhoraho, akabimuhereza nk’uko batura zahabu." 
Exodus35:23 Bazana n’ibindi bafite imuhira: imyenda y’isine, n’iy’umuhemba n’itukura, hariri inetereye, n’ubwoya bw’ihene, impu z’amapfizi y’intama zirabyemo ikigina, n’impu z’ibihura." 
Exodus35:24 Abari bateganyije bose ituro rya feza n’umuringa, babizanira Uhoraho. Abari bafite imuhira ibiti by’iminyinya bigenewe imirimo yose y’ubwubatsi, barabizana." 
Exodus35:25 Abagore bose bari bafite ubuhanga bwo gukaraga ubudodo, barabuboha, barabuzana: ubw’isine, n’ubw’umuhemba n’ubw’umutuku, n’ubwa hariri inetereye." 
Exodus35:26 Abagore bose bari babifitiye ubuhanga, bakaraga ubwoya bw’ihene." 
Exodus35:27 Abatware b’imiryango bazana amabuye y’agaciro, n’amabuye yo gutaka ku musanganyagihimba no mu musesuragituza," 
Exodus35:28 bazana imibavu n’amavuta y’imizeti bigenewe amatara, amavuta yo gusiga n’imibavu yo gutwika." 
Exodus35:29 Mbese Abayisraheli bose, ari abagabo ari n’abagore, bafite umutima ukeye, bazanira Uhoraho amaturo bigeneye, kugira ngo batunganye imirimo yose Uhoraho yari yabategetse abitumye Musa." 
Exodus35:30 Nyuma Musa abwira Abayisraheli, ati «Nimurebe, Uhoraho yihamagariye mu izina Besaleli mwene Uri, umwuzukuru wa Huri, wo mu nzu ya Yuda." 
Exodus35:31 Yamwujujemo umwuka w’Imana, kandi yamuhaye ubuhanga, ubwenge, n’ubumenyi bw’imyuga iyo ari yo yose," 
Exodus35:32 kugira ngo ahimbe ibikoresho by’agaciro, bicuzwe muri zahabu, feza n’umuringa;" 
Exodus35:33 kugira ngo aconge amabuye y’indobanure, abaze ibiti, anatunganye imirimo iyo ari yo yose." 
Exodus35:34 Yashyize kandi mu mutima we ingabire yo kubyigisha, nk’uko yayihaye na Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki, wo mu nzu ya Dani." 
Exodus35:35 Bombi yabujujemo ubwenge bwo gukora imirimo yose yo gusharaga, gushushanya, gutaka amabara ku myenda y’isine, y’umuhemba n’itukura, kuri hariri inetereye, no kuboha imyenda; mbese gutunganya amoko yose y’imirimo no guhimba ibikorwa by’ubwenge." 
Exodus36:1 Besaleli, Oholiyabu, n’abantu bose b’abanyabwenge, abo Uhoraho yashyizemo ubwenge n’ubuhanga bwo gutunganya imirimo yose igenewe imihango y’Ingoro, bazabirangize uko Uhoraho yabitegetse.»" 
Exodus36:2 Musa ahamagaza Besaleli, na Oholiyabu, n’abantu bose b’abanyabwenge, abo Uhoraho yashyize ubwenge mu mutima; bashishikarira uwo murimo ngo bawurangize." 
Exodus36:3 Musa abaha amaturo yose Abayisraheli bari barazaniye gutunganya imirimo y’ubwubatsi bw’Ingoro kandi buri gitondo imbaga igakomeza kuzanira Musa amaturo yishakiye. 
Exodus36:4 Nuko abo bahanga bakoraga imirimo y’Ingoro, bahagarika akazi bari bashishikariye, buri wese aza kubwira Musa, ati" 
Exodus36:5 «Imbaga iratura ibirengeje kure ibya ngombwa bigenewe kurangiza imirimo Uhoraho yategetse gukora!» 
Exodus36:6 Musa atanga itegeko, maze batangaza mu ngando hose ngo «Ntihagire umuntu, ari umugabo ari umugore, wongera guhihibikanira iby’amaturo y’Ingoro.» Nuko bahagarika rubanda," 
Exodus36:7 kuko ibyo bari bazanye byari bihagije ku mirimo yose yagombaga gukorwa, ndetse binarengejeho." 
Exodus36:8 Nuko abakozi bose barushaga abandi ubuhanga bashinga Ingoro. Bategura imyenda cumi muri hariri ihotoye, no mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba n’ubutukura, hamwe n’Abakerubimu batatseho." 
Exodus36:9 Uburebure bw’umwenda bwari imikono makumyabiri n’umunani. Ubugari bw’umwenda bukaba imikono ine. Imyenda yose yaraeshyaga. 
Exodus36:10 Bafatanya itanu muri iyo myenda, umwe ku wundi; bafatanya n’iyindi itanu umwe ku wundi." 
Exodus36:11 Bashyira utugozi tw’umuhemba w’ibihogo ku muguno w’umwenda waherukaga urufatane rwa mbere; babigenza batyo no ku mwenda wabanzirizaga urufatane rwa kabiri. 
Exodus36:12 Bapfundika utugozi mirongo itanu ku mwenda waherukaga urufatane rwa mbere; bapfundika n’utugozi mirongo itanu ku mwenda wabanzirizaga urufatane rwa kabiri, maze utwo tugozi tukagenda dutegana, kamwe ku kandi." 
Exodus36:13 Bakora ibifungo mirongo itanu bya zahabu bafungisha urufatane rwa mbere ku rundi, bityo Ingoro irakomera ku mpande zose." 
Exodus36:14 Bakora kandi n’indi myenda y’ubwoya bw’ihene, maze bayitwikiriza Ingoro, nk’uko amahema amera; bakora bene iyo myenda cumi n’umwe." 
Exodus36:15 Uburebure bw’umwenda bwari imikono mirongo itatu, n’ubugari bw’umwenda bukaba imikono ine. Iyo myenda cumi n’umwe yarareshyaga." 
Exodus36:16 Muri iyo myenda bateranya itanu ukwayo, n’indi itandatu ukwayo, (ku buryo na yo ihinduka ibifatane bibiri)." 
Exodus36:17 Bashyira utugozi mirongo itanu ku musozo w’umwenda waherukaga urufatane rumwe; bashyira kandi utugozi mirongo itanu ku musozo w’umwenda wabanzirizaga urufatane rwa kabiri. 
Exodus36:18 Bakora n’ibifungo mirongo itanu by’umuringa byo gufungisha ibyo bifatane byombi. Bityo ihema ryose rikaba risakawe neza. 
Exodus36:19 Byongeye ihema barikorera umutwikiro w’impu z’amapfizi y’intama zirabyemo ikigina, barikorera n’umutwikiro w’impu z’ibihura wo kugereka hejuru." 
Exodus36:20 Ingoro kandi bayikorera inkuta z’imbaho mu biti by’iminyinya zishinze impagarike. 
Exodus36:21 Uburebure bw’urubaho bwari imikono cumi, n’ubugari bw’urubaho bwari umukono umwe n’igice." 
Exodus36:22 Kuri buri rubaho hari inkwikiriro ebyiri zifatanye rumwe ku rundi. Babigenza batyo ku mbaho zose z’Ingoro. 
Exodus36:23 Bategurira Ingoro imbaho makumyabiri ku ruhande rw’amajyepfo. 
Exodus36:24 Mu nsi y’izo mbaho makumyabiri, bahashyira ibishyigikizo mirongo ine bya feza, ibishyigikizo bi biri mu nsi ya buri rubaho, bigenewe inkwikiriro zarwo zombi." 
Exodus36:25 Ku ruhande rwa kabiri rw’Ingoro rwerekeye amajyaruguru, bahategura imbaho makumyabiri," 
Exodus36:26 kimwe n’ibishyigikizo byazo mirongo ine bya feza, ibishyigikizo bibiri mu nsi ya buri rubaho." 
Exodus36:27 N’urukuta rw’inyuma y’Ingoro barutegurira imbaho esheshatu, aherekeye iburengerazuba;" 
Exodus36:28 bategura n’imbaho ebyiri zigenewe inguni z’inyuma y’Ingoro. 
Exodus36:29 Izo zarushaga izindi gufatana kubera inkwikiriro zazo nyinshi. 
Exodus36:30 Bityo hari imbaho munani kumwe n’ibishyigikizo byazo bya feza, ibishyigikizo cumi na bitandatu, ibishyigikizo bibiri mu nsi ya buri rubaho." 
Exodus36:31 Bakora n’imitambiko mu biti by’iminyinya: itanu igenewe imbaho o ku ruhande rwa mbere rw’Ingoro," 
Exodus36:32 itanu igenewe imbaho zo ku ruhande rwa kabiri rw’Ingoro, n’indi itanu igenewe imbaho z’inyuma y’Ingoro aherekeye iburengerazuba." 
Exodus36:33 Bategura umutambiko umwe wambukiranyaga imbaho, kuva ku rwa mbere kugeza ku rwa nyuma, unyuze hagati yazo." 
Exodus36:34 Imbaho bazomekaho zahabu, n’ibifunga byazo bigenewe gushyirwamo imitambiko babikora muri zahabu, kandi n’imitambiko bayomekaho zahabu." 
Exodus36:35 Bakora umubambiko mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba n’ubw’umutuku, no muri hariri ihotoye; maze batakaho n’Abakerubimu." 
Exodus36:36 Bawubariza inkingi enye z’umunyinya zometseho zahabu, n’intendekero zazo za zahabu; bazicurira ibishyigikizo bine bya feza." 
Exodus36:37 Umuryango w’ihema bawudodera uwundi mubambiko watatswe n’umuhanga mu bwoya bw’isine, n’ubw’umuhemba, n’ubw’umutuku, no muri hariri ihotoye." 
Exodus36:38 Uwo mubambiko bawukorera inkingi eshanu, n’intendekero zazo, n’amasonga yazo, n’ibifunga byazo, maze babyomekaho zahabu. Ibishyigikizo byazo bitanu byari bikozwe mu muringa." 
Exodus37:1 Besaleli abaza ubushyinguro mu giti cy’umunyinya. Uburebure bwabwo bwari imikono ibiri n’igice, ubugari bwabwo bukaba umukono umwe n’igice, n’ubuhagarike bwabwo bukaba umukono umwe n’igice." 
Exodus37:2 Imbere n’inyuma, abwomekaho zahabu iyunguruye, maze abuzengurutsaho umusozo wa zahabu." 
Exodus37:3 Abucurira ibifunga bine bya zahabu bigenewe amaguru yabwo, ibifunga bibiri mu ruhande rumwe n’ibifunga bibiri mu rundi." 
Exodus37:4 Abaza imijishi mu giti cy’umunyinya maze ayomekaho zahabu. 
Exodus37:5 Mu bifunga biri ku mpande z’ubushyinguro yinjizamo imijishi yo kubuheka. 
Exodus37:6 Akora urwicurizo muri zahabu iyunguruye, rufite uburebure bw’imikono ibiri n’igice, n’ubugari bw’umukono umwe n’igice." 
Exodus37:7 Akora Abakerubimu babiri muri zahabu. Abacura muri zahabu itsitse, ku mitwe yombi y’urwicurizo," 
Exodus37:8 Umukerubimu umwe ku mutwe umwe n’undi Mukerubimu ku wundi mutwe. Abashyira ku mitwe yombi y’urwicurizo, kandi bafatanye na rwo." 
Exodus37:9 Abakerubimu bari bafite amababa aramburiye hejuru y’urwicurizo, bakarutwikiriza amababa yabo kandi berekeranye; uruhanga rwabo rukaba rwunamiye ku rwicurizo." 
Exodus37:10 Akora ameza mu giti cy’umunyinya. Uburebure bwayo bwari imikono ibiri, ubugari bwayo bukaba umukono umwe, n’ubuhagarike bwayo bukaba umukono umwe n’igice." 
Exodus37:11 Ayomekaho zahabu iyunguruye, maze ayazengurutsaho umusozo wa zahabu." 
Exodus37:12 Hagati y’amaguru y’ameza atambikaho utubaho tungana no mu kiganza, maze utwo tubaho adushyiraho zahabu." 
Exodus37:13 Ameza ayacurira ibifunga bine bya zahabu, maze ashyira ibyo bifunga ku nkokora enye z’amaguru yayo." 
Exodus37:14 Iruhande rw’imitambiko, ahashyira ibifunga byo kwinjizwamo imijishi yo guheka ameza." 
Exodus37:15 Akora imijishi mu biti by’iminyinya, maze ayomekaho zahabu, kugira ngo bajye bayikoresha baheka ameza." 
Exodus37:16 Akora ibikoresho bigenewe ameza: amasahani, imbehe, ibikopo, n’udukombe bigenewe ibitambo biseswa; abikora muri zahabu iyunguruye." 
Exodus37:17 Hanyuma Besaleli akora ikinyarumuri muri zahabu iyunguruye. Ikirenge cyacyo n’uruti rwacyo, hamwe n’amababi n’indabo bigitatse, byari bifatanye na cyo." 
Exodus37:18 Amashami atandatu yari ashingiye ku mpande zacyo: amashami atatu mu ruhande rumwe rw’ikinyarumuri, n’amashami atatu mu rundi ruhande." 
Exodus37:19 Ku ishami rimwe hari imitako itatu ishushanya umubumburo w’ururabo, bikamera bityo ku mashami atandatu yari ashingiye ku kinyarumuri." 
Exodus37:20 Uruti ubwarwo rw’ikinyarumuri rwari rufite imitako ine ishushanya umubumburo w’ururabo. 
Exodus37:21 Hari umutako mu nsi y’amashami abiri ya mbere ashingiye ku ruti rwacyo, umutako mu nsi y’amashami abiri akurikiyeho ashingiye kuri cyo, n’undi mutako mu nsi y’amashami abiri aheruka ashingiye kuri cyo; bikagenda bityo ku mashami atandatu ashingiye ku kinyarumuri." 
Exodus37:22 Iyo mibumburo n’ayo mashami byari bifatanye n’ikinyarumuri; byose byari bicuze muri zahabu itsitse kandi iyunguruye. 
Exodus37:23 Akora amatara yacyo arindwi, n’ibikoresho bigenewe gutunganya ayo matara, muri zahabu iyunguruye." 
Exodus37:24 Akoresha italenta imwe ya zahabu iyunguruye, kugira ngo arangize icyo kinyarumuri hamwe n’ibikoresho byacyo byose." 
Exodus37:25 Akora urutambiro rw’imibavu mu giti cy’umunyinya; uburebure bwarwo bwari umukono umwe, ubugari bwarwo bukaba umukono umwe; impande zarwo zarareshyaga, kandi ubujyejuru bwarwo bwari imikono ibiri. Amahembe yarwo yari mu giti kimwe na rwo." 
Exodus37:26 Arwomekaho zahabu iyunguruye ku ruhande rwo hejuru, ku mpande zarwo hirya no hino, no ku mahembe, kandi aruzengurutsaho umuguno wa zahabu." 
Exodus37:27 Arukorera ibifunga muri zahabu mu nsi y’umuguno warwo, bibiri ku mpande ebyiri zarwo, byo kwinjizwamo imijishi igenewe guheka urutambiro." 
Exodus37:28 Akora imijishi mu biti by’iminyinya maze ayomekaho zahabu. 
Exodus37:29 Ategura amavuta agenewe isigwa ritagatifu, n’umubavu w’indobanure wo gutwika, byose bikozwe ku buryo bw’abahanga." 
Exodus38:1 Akora urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa, mu biti by’iminyinya, rufite uburebure bw’imikono itanu, n’ubugari bw’imikono itanu — urutambiro rero rwari rufite impande zireshya — n’ubuhagarike bw’imikono itatu." 
Exodus38:2 Ku mfuruka zarwo enye, ashyiraho amahembe, ayo mahembe yari akozwe mu giti kimwe n’urutambiro; maze arwomekaho icyuma cy’umuringa." 
Exodus38:3 Akora ibikoresho byose by’urutambiro: ibyungo byo kuyoreramo ivu, ibidahuzo, ibisukirizo, amakanya n’ibirahuzwa amakara; ibyo bikoresho byose bicuzwe mu cyuma cy’umuringa." 
Exodus38:4 Urutambiro arukorera uruzitiro rw’utwuma tw’umuringa, dushandikiranije nk’urushundura; urwo ruzitiro rwazengurukaga urutambiro ruhereye hasi rukageza mu cya kabiri cy’ubujyejuru bwarwo." 
Exodus38:5 Acura ibifunga bine bigenewe imfuruka enye z’uruzitiro rw’umuringa ngo byinjizwemo imijishi. 
Exodus38:6 Akora imijishi mu biti by’iminyinya, maze ayomekaho umuringa." 
Exodus38:7 Yinjiza imijishi mu bifunga, ku mpande z’urutambiro, kugira ngo izakoreshwe baruheka. Yarukoze mu mbaho zikorogoshoye." 
Exodus38:8 Akora igikarabiro mu muringa, n’urugata rwacyo mu muringa, hamwe n’indorerwamo z’abagore babaga ku izamu ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Exodus38:9 Yubaka urugo rukikije Ingoro. Mu ruhande rw’amajyepfo yayo, urugo rwakingirizwaga n’imibambiko ya hariri ihotoye: ifite uburebure bw’imikono ijana." 
Exodus38:10 Iyo mibambiko yari ifashwe n’inkingi makumyabiri, zifite ibishyigikizo makumyabiri by’umuringa; intendekero zo ku nkingi, kimwe n’ibifunga byabyo, byari bikozwe muri feza." 
Exodus38:11 Mu ruhande rw’amajyaruguru hari imibambiko ifite uburebure bw’imikono ijana, hamwe n’inkingi makumyabiri n’ibishyigikizo byazo makumyabiri by’umuringa; intendekero zo ku nkingi n’ibifunga byabyo bikaba na byo muri feza." 
Exodus38:12 Mu ruhande rw’uburengerazuba hari imibambiko ifite uburebure bw’imikono mirongo itanu hamwe n’inkingi cumi n’ibishyigikizo byazo cumi; intendekero zo ku nkingi n’ibifunga byabyo, bikoze muri feza." 
Exodus38:13 No mu ruhande rw’uburasirazuba, ubugari bw’urugo bwari imikono mirongo itanu:" 
Exodus38:14 hakaba imikono cumi n’itanu y’imibamiko mu ruhande rumwe, hamwe n’inkingi eshatu n’ibishyigikizo byazo bitatu; bityo no ku rundi ruhande." 
Exodus38:15 Ubwo rero mu ruhande rumwe rw’irembo ry’urugo no mu rundi ruhande hari hameze kimwe: imikono cumi n’itanu y’imibambiko, hamwe n’inkingi eshatu n’ibishyigikizo byazo bitatu." 
Exodus38:16 Imibambiko yose yakingirizaga urugo yari ikozwe muri hariri ihotoye. 
Exodus38:17 Ibishyigikizo by’inkingi byari bikozwe mu muringa, intendekero zo ku nkingi n’ibifunga byabyo bikozwe muri feza, n’amasonga y’inkingi bikozwe muri feza. Inkingi zose z’urugo zigafatanywa n’imitambiko ya feza." 
Exodus38:18 Umwenda w’irembo ry’urugo wari uboshywe mu bwoya bw’isine, n’ubw’umuhemba, n’ubutukura, na hariri ihotoye. Uburebure bwawo bwari imikono makumyabiri, n’ubujyejuru bwari imikono itanu, kimwe n’imibambiko y’urugo." 
Exodus38:19 Inkingi zazo enye n’ibishyigikizo byazo bine byari bikozwe mu muringa, intendekero zazo zikozwe muri feza, amasonga n’ibifunga byazo byometseho feza." 
Exodus38:20 Inkingi zose z’Ingoro n’iz’urugo zari mu muringa. 
Exodus38:21 Dore umubare w’ibintu byakoreshejwe bubaka Ingoro, Ingoro y’Isezerano: byabaruwe ku itegeko rya Musa, bigirwa n’Abalevi, bayobowe na Itamari mwene Aroni, umuherezabitambo." 
Exodus38:22 Besaleli mwene Uri, umwuzukuru wa Huri, wo mu nzu ya Yuda, yari yarangije ibyo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa byose." 
Exodus38:23 Yabifashijwemo na Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki, wo mu nzu ya Dani, wari umuhanga cyane mu mirimo yose yo gucura no kubaza no gutakisha imyenda indodo z’isine, n’iz’umuhemba, n’izitukura, na hariri inetereye." 
Exodus38:24 Zahabu yose bari batuye kandi yakoreshejwe umurimo wo kubaka Ingoro, yanganaga n’amatalenta makumyabiri n’icyenda, n’amasikeli magana arindwi na mirongo itatu, bikurikije isikeli y’Ingoro." 
Exodus38:25 Feza yazanywe igihe babaruraga ikoraniro, yanganaga n’amatalenta ijana, n’amasikeli igihumbi magana arindwi na mirongo irindwi n’atanu bikurikije isikeli y’Ingoro." 
Exodus38:26 Buri muntu wari ufite imyaka makumyabiri cyangwa ayirengeje, yasoze «ibeka», ari byo kuvuga igice cya sikeli, bikurikije isikeli y’Ingoro, kandi abagombaga gusora bari abantu ibihumbi magana atandatu na bitatu na magana atanu na mirongo itanu." 
Exodus38:27 Amatalenta ijana ya feza yakoreshejwe gucuramo ibishyigikizo by’Ingoro n’ibishyigikizo by’umubambiko; ibishyigikizo ijana ku matalenta ijana bihwanye rero n’italenta imwe ku gishyigikizo kimwe. 
Exodus38:28 Naho ya masikeli igihumbi magana arindwi mirongo irindwi n’atanu ya feza, bayakoresha intendekero zo ku nkingi, bayomeka ku masonga yazo, kandi bayakoramo n’imitambiko." 
Exodus38:29 Umuringa bari batuye wanganaga n’amatalenta mirongo irindwi n’amasikeli ibihumbi bibiri magana ane. 
Exodus38:30 Bayakoresha ibishyigikizo by’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, urutambiro rw’umuringa n’uruzitiro rwarwo rw’umuringa, n’ibikoresho byose by’urutambiro," 
Exodus38:31 ibishyigikizo by’urugo rukikije Ingoro, ibishyigikizo by’irembo ry’urugo n’inkingi zose z’Ingoro, n’inkingi zose zikikije urugo." 
Exodus39:1 Badoda imyambaro mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba n’ubutukura, igenewe imihango yo mu Ngoro; maze bakorera Aroni imyambaro mitagatifu, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Bakora umusanganyagihimba muri zahabu, mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba n’ubutukura no muri hariri ihotoye." 
Exodus39:3 Zahabu bayihwahuza inyundo, maze bayisaturamo udukwege two gusobekeranya n’indodo z’isine, z’umuhemba, n’izitukura, na hariri inetereye: bikorwa n’umuhanga." 
Exodus39:4 Bakora n’imishumi ibiri iteye ku mitwe yombi y’umusanganyagihimba igenewe kuwufatisha ku ntugu. 
Exodus39:5 Umukandara wawo uciye hejuru, byari bidoze kimwe: muri zahabu, mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba, n’ubutukura, no muri hariri ihotoye, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Batunganya amabuye y’agaciro, afungiye mu tugotesho twa zahabu, bayasharagamo amazina y’abana ba Israheli, nk’uko basharaga za kashe." 
Exodus39:7 Bashyira ayo mabuye ku mishumi y’intugu ifata umusanganyagihimba, kugira ngo ajye ababera iteka urwibutso rw’abana ba Israheli nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Hanyuma bakora umusesuragituza wahimbanywe ubuhanga, ukorwa kimwe n’umusanganyagituza muri zahabu, mu bwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba n’ubutukura, no muri hariri ihotoye." 
Exodus39:9 Wari ufite impande zireshya, kandi umeze nk’uruhago. Uburebure bwawo bwari igice cy’umukono, n’ubugari bwawo ari igice cy’umukono; wari inkubirane." 
Exodus39:10 Bawutakaho imisitari ine y’amabuye. Umusitari wa mbere wariho isarudoni, itopazi, na emerodi;" 
Exodus39:11 umusitari wa kabiri wariho malakita, isafiri na diyama;" 
Exodus39:12 umusitari wa gatatu wariho opali, agate, na emetisita;" 
Exodus39:13 umusitari wa kane wariho ikirizoliti, imboneranyi, na jasipi. Ayo mabuye yari mu tugotesho twa zahabu twari tuyafunze." 
Exodus39:14 Amabuye yari ahwanye n’amazina y’abana ba Israheli uko ari cumi na babiri. Yari asharazwe nko muri kashe, buri buye rifite izina ryaryo, rimwe mu mazina y’imiryango cumi n’ibiri." 
Exodus39:15 Umusesuragituza bawucurira imikufi ya zahabu iyunguruye iboshye nk’utuziriko. 
Exodus39:16 Bakora utugotesho tubiri twa zahabu n’ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu, maze ibyo bifunga byombi babishyira mu mitwe yombi y’umusesuragituza." 
Exodus39:17 Imitwe ya ya mikufi ibiri ya zahabu bayinjiza mu tugotesho twombi. 
Exodus39:18 Nuko babishyira hejuru y’imishumi y’intugu z’umusanganyagihimba, ahareba imbere." 
Exodus39:19 Bakora ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu, babishyira mu nsi y’imishumi y’intugu y’umusesuragituza, ku ruhande rukora ku musanganyagihimba." 
Exodus39:20 Barongera bakora ibifunga bibiri bya zahabu, ahareba imbere, hafi y’ipfundikiro ryawo, hejuru y’umukandara w’umusanganyagihimba." 
Exodus39:21 Umusesuragituza bawupfundikisha ibifunga byawo ku bifunga by’umusanganyagihimba, bacishijemo injishi y’umuhemba w’ibihogo, ku buryo umusesuragituza uba hejuru y’umukandara w’umusanganyagihimba. Bityo umusesuragituza ntiwashoboraga kwitandukanyan’umusanganyagihimba, uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Bakora igishura cy’umusanganyagituza, gikozwe n’umuboshyi kikaba umuhemba w’ibihogo." 
Exodus39:23 Mu gishura rwagati, harimo umwenge unyuramo umutwe, nk’uw’ikoti ry’intambara; maze uwo mwenge ukazengurutswaho umuguno w’umubohano, kugira ngo igishura kitazatanyuka." 
Exodus39:24 Ku musozo wo hasi batendekaho amapfundo y’ubwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba n’ubutukura, na hariri inetereye." 
Exodus39:25 Bakora amayugi ya zahabu iyunguruye, maze bayashyira ku musozo w’igishura hasi, arawuzenguruka. Impande zose ku musozo wo hasi, amayugi n’amapfundo bikagenda bikurikirana:" 
Exodus39:26 iyugi rimwe n’ipfundo rimwe, iyugi rimwe n’ipfundo rimwe, ku musozo w’igishura, kugira ngo batunganye imihango nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Baboha n’amakanzu ya hariri, agenewe Aroni n’abahungu be." 
Exodus39:28 Bakora igitambaro cy’umutwe muri hariri, n’imitako y’ingofero za hariri, amakabutura ya hariri ihotoye;" 
Exodus39:29 imikandara ya hariri ihotoye n’ubwoya bw’isine, bw’umuhemba n’ubutukura; byose byatatswe mu buhanga, uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Bakora ikamba muri zahabu iyunguruye, ritatswe n’ururabo imbere, maze basharagamo aya magambo ngo «Uweguriwe Uhoraho»." 
Exodus39:31 Bashyiraho injishi y’umuhemba w’ibihogo yo kurifunga ku gitambaro cyo mu mutwe, uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Nguko uko imirimo yose y’Ingoro n’iy’ihema ry’ibonaniro yarangiye. Abayisraheli batunganyije byose, bakurikije ibyo Uhoraho yari yarategetse Musa." 
Exodus39:33 Bamurikira Musa ibigize Ingoro ari byo ibi ngibi: ihema n’ibikoresho byaryo, ibifungo byaryo, imbaho zaryo, imitambiko yaryo, inkingi zaryo n’ibishyigikizo byaryo;" 
Exodus39:34 umutwikiro w’impu z’amapfizi y’intama zirabyemo ikigina, umutwikiro w’impu z’ibihura, n’umubambiko ugabanya Ingoro mo kabiri;" 
Exodus39:35 ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano hamwe n’imijishi yabwo, n’urwicurizo;" 
Exodus39:36 ameza hamwe n’ibikoresho byayo n’imigati y’umumuriko; 
Exodus39:37 ikinyarumuri cya zahabu iyunguruye, amatara yo kugitondekanyaho, ibigendana na cyo byose, n’amavuta yo gucana;" 
Exodus39:38 urutambiro rwa zahabu, amavuta yo gusiga, n’imibavu yo gutwika, umwenda ugenewe gukinga umuryango w’ihema;" 
Exodus39:39 urutambiro rw’umuringa, uruzitiro rwarwo rw’umuringa, imijishi yarwo n’ibikoresho byarwo byose; igikarabiro hamwe n’urugata rwacyo;" 
Exodus39:40 imibambiko y’urugo rukikije Ingoro, inkingi zarwo, ibishyigikizo byarwo; umwenda ugenewe irembo ry’urugo, injishi zawo, inkingi zawo, n’ibikoresho byose bigenewe imirimo y’Ingoro, ari yo hema ry’ibonaniro;" 
Exodus39:41 imyambaro mitagatifu igenewe imihango yo mu Ngoro, imyambaro ya Aroni umuherezabitambo n’imyambaro y’abahungu be bazambara batunganya imirimo y’ubuherezabitambo." 
Exodus39:42 Abayisraheli bakoze iyo mirimo yose bakurikije ibyo Uhoraho yari yarategetse Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Musa areba ibyakozwe byose, maze asanga barabitunganyije; babikora uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse. Nuko Musa abasabira umugisha." 
Exodus40:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa aya magambo, ati" 
Exodus40:2 «Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere, uzashinge ihema ry’ibonaniro ribe Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
Exodus40:3 Uzarishyiremo ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano, maze ubwo bushyinguro ubukingeho umubambiko." 
Exodus40:4 Uzazane ameza, maze uyashyireho ibiyagenewe; uzazane ikinyarumuri, maze ucane amatara yacyo." 
Exodus40:5 Urutambirourwa zahabu rugenewe imibavu uzarutereke imbere y’ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano, kandi uzabambike umwenda ku muryango w’Ingoro." 
Exodus40:6 Urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa uzarutereke imbere y’umuryango w’Ingoro, ari yo hema ry’ibonaniro." 
Exodus40:7 Igikarabiro uzagitereke hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’urutambiro, maze usukemo amazi." 
Exodus40:8 Uzatunganye urugo hirya no hino, maze uzabambike umwenda ku irembo ryarwo." 
Exodus40:9 Uzende amavuta yo gusiga, uyasige Ingoro n’ibiyirimo byose; uzayitagatifuze hamwe n’ibiyiteguwemo byose, maze ibe ntagatifu." 
Exodus40:10 Uzasige amavuta urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa, n’ibikoresho byarwo byose, maze urutambiro rube rutagatifu rwose." 
Exodus40:11 Uzasige amavuta igikarabiro hamwe n’urugata rwacyo, maze ugitagatifuze." 
Exodus40:12 Uzigize Aroni n’abahungu be imbere y’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, maze uzabuhagize amazi;" 
Exodus40:13 hanyuma wambike Aroni imyambaro mitagatifu, umusige amavuta, maze umutagatifuze, ambere umuherezabitambo." 
Exodus40:14 N’abahungu be, numara kubigiza imbere, uzabambike amakanzu," 
Exodus40:15 ubasige amavuta nk’uko uzaba wasize se amavuta, nuko bazambere abaherezabitambo. Bityo, amavuta basizwe azabahesha kuba abaherezabitambo iteka ryose, uko ibisekuru bigenda biha ibindi.»" 
Exodus40:16 Musa arumvira, akora ibyo Uhoraho yari yamutegetse byose." 
Exodus40:17 Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere k’umwaka wa kabiri Ingoro irashingwa. 
Exodus40:18 Musa ashinga Ingoro; ashinga ibishyigikizo byayo, ashyiraho imbaho n’imitambiko, ashinga n’imiganda." 
Exodus40:19 Arambura ihema hejuru y’Ingoro, maze agerekaho umutwikiro w’ihema, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus40:20 Yenda amabuye y’Isezerano, maze ayashyira mu bushyinguro, asoheka imijishi mu bushyinguro, atereka n’urwicurizo hejuru y’ubushyinguro." 
Exodus40:21 Nuko ajyana ubushyinguro mu Ngoro; amanika umubambiko muri yo rwagati, ahisha ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus40:22 Atereka ameza mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, mu ruhande rw’amajyaruguru y’Ingoro, imbere y’umubambiko," 
Exodus40:23 maze ayateguraho urutonde rw’imigati imbere y’Uhoraho, nk’uko Uhoraho nyine yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus40:24 Ashyira ikinyarumuri mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, akibangikanya n’ameza, mu ruhande rw’amajyepfo y’Ingoro;" 
Exodus40:25 nuko agishyiraho amatara imbere y’Uhoraho, nk’uko Uhoraho nyine yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus40:26 Ashinga urutambiro rwa zahabu mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, imbere y’umubambiko;" 
Exodus40:27 nuko atwikiraho imibavu, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus40:28 Abambika umwenda ku muryango w’ihema. 
Exodus40:29 Ashinga urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa ku muryango w’Ingoro, ari yo hema ry’ibonaniro, maze aruturiraho igitambo gitwikwa n’amakoro y’ubuhoro, nk’uko Uhorho nyine yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus40:30 Ashyira igikarabiro hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’urutambiro, maze asukamo amazi yo kwisukura." 
Exodus40:31 Musa, Aroni n’abahungu be bakarabiragamo, bakiyoza n’ibirenge." 
Exodus40:32 Igihe cyose binjiraga mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, n’iyo begeraga urutambiro, bisukuzaga amazi, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa." 
Exodus40:33 Atunganya urugo ruzengurutse Ingoro n’urutambiro, kandi abambika umwenda ku irembo ry’urugo. Nuko Musa arangiza atyo imirimo yose." 
Exodus40:34 Ubwo rero agacu kabudika ku ihema ry’ibonaniro, maze ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryuzura mu Ngoro;" 
Exodus40:35 Musa ntiyashobora kwinjira mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, kubera ko agacu kari kayigumye hejuru, kandi n’ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryagumye kuzura mu Ngoro." 
Exodus40:36 Iyo agacu kavaga ku Ngoro, kakazamuka hejuru, Abayisraheli barahagurukaga, bagakomeza urugendo rwabo." 
Exodus40:37 Naho iyo agacu kabaga katavuye ku Ngoro ngo kazamuke hejuru, ntibahagurukaga, kugeza umunsi kazazamukira." 
Exodus40:38 Koko rero, agacu k’Uhoraho kagumaga hejuru y’Ingoro ku manywa, nijoro mu gacu hakakamo umuriro, ukabonwa n’inzu yose ya Israheli. Byagenze bityo igihe cyose, ku ndaro zose bagiye barara." 
Leviticus1:1 Uhoraho ahamagara Musa maze amubwirira mu ihema ry’ibonaniro ati 
Leviticus1:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Muri mwe nihagira uzanira Uhoraho ituro, rizabe iry’amatungo maremare cyangwa iry’amagufi." 
Leviticus1:3 Niba ashaka gutura igitambo gitwikwa cyo mu matungo maremare, azazane ikimasa kidafite inenge, maze agiturire ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro kugira ngo Uhoraho agishime;" 
Leviticus1:4 maze arambike ikiganza ku mutwe w’icyo gitambo, bityo gikunde kimubere igitambo cy’impongano." 
Leviticus1:5 Iryo tungo azarisogotera imbere y’Uhoraho, nuko abaherezabitambo ari bo bene Aroni bamurike amaraso yaryo, maze bayamishe impande zose z’urutambiro ruri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus1:6 Icyo gitambo bazagikuraho uruhu, bakigabanyemo imirwi," 
Leviticus1:7 maze bene Aroni umuherezabitambo bacane umuriro ku rutambiro bawugerekeho inkwi. 
Leviticus1:8 Hanyuma ya mirwi, igihanga, hamwe n’ibinure biri ku mara, abaherezabitambo ari bo bene Aroni bazabigereke hejuru y’inkwi ziri ku rutambiro." 
Leviticus1:9 Ibyo mu nda, amaguru hamwe n’amaboko bazabyogesha amazi, maze umuherezabitambo atwikire ibyo byose ku rutambiro. Icyo ni igitambo gitwikwa, igitambo cy’ibiribwa gikongotse burundu, kandi gifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus1:10 Niba hari ushaka gutura igitambo gitwikwa cyo mu matungo magufiya yo mu bana b’intama cyangwa b’ihene, azazane isekurume idafite inenge." 
Leviticus1:11 Azayicira imbere y’Uhoraho ahagana mu majyaruguru y’urutambiro, maze abaherezabitambo ari bo bene Aroni bamishe amaraso yayo mu mpande zose z’urwo rutambiro." 
Leviticus1:12 Nyuma y’ibyo, bazayigabanyemo imirwi, maze igihanga hamwe n’ibinure, byose umuherezabitambo abigereke hejuru y’inkwi ziri ku rutambiro." 
Leviticus1:13 Ibyo mu nda, amaguru n’amaboko bazabyogesha amazi, maze umuherezabitambo abitwikire byose ku rutambiro. Icyo ni igitambo gitwikwa, igitambo cy’ibiribwa gikongotse burundu, kandi gifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus1:14 Niba ashaka gutura Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa cy’inyoni, azazane intungura cyangwa inuma." 
Leviticus1:15 Umuherezabitambo azabijyana ku rutambiro, abice umutwe, abitwikireho, maze amaraso yabyo arutembeho." 
Leviticus1:16 Hanyuma, bazakuremo agatorero uko kakabaye, bakajugunye iruhande rw’urutambiro, iburasirazuba aho barunda ivu." 
Leviticus1:17 Iyo nyoni bazayisaturira hagati y’amababa, ariko boye kuyatandukanya, maze umuherezabitambo ayitwikire ku rutambiro hejuru y’inkwi ziri ku muriro. Icyo ni igitambo gitwikwa, igitambo cy’ibiribwa gikongotse burundu, kandi gifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus2:1 «Nihagira umuntu uzanira Uhoraho ikoro ry’ibihingwa, rizabe ari ifu azasukamo amavuta y’imizeti, kandi ayishyiremo ububani," 
Leviticus2:2 ayishyikirize abaherezabitambo ari bo bene Aroni. Kuri iyo fu ivanze n’amavuta, umuherezabitambo azayoreho incuro y’urushyi by’umuhango, abitwikire ku rutambiro. Iryo ni ituro ry’ibiribwa rikongotse burundu, kandi rifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus2:3 Ibisagutse kuri iryo turo, bizabe ibya Aroni n’abahungu be. Ni umugabane mutagatifu rwose, kuko ari ibyasagutse ku maturo y’ibiribwa byakongokeye Uhoraho burundu." 
Leviticus2:4 Nuzana ikoro ry’umutsima watetswe mu ifuru, rizabe rigizwe n’utugati tw’ifu tudasembuye kandi twafunyangiwe mu mavuta, cyangwa ribe rigizwe n’udutsima tudasembuye dusize amavuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Nuzana ituro ry’ikintu cyatetswe ku ipanu, kizave mu ifu ivanze n’amavuta, kandi nta musemburo urimo." 
Leviticus2:6 Mbere yo kubitura, uzabe wabanje kubigabanyamo ibice no kubisukaho amavuta. Iryo ni ikoro." 
Leviticus2:7 Nuzana ituro ryakaranzwe ku ipanu, rizave mu ifu yavuganywe n’amavuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Uzazana iryo turo ryateguriwe Uhoraho rityo, urishyikirize umuherezabitambo, maze na we arijyane ku rutambiro." 
Leviticus2:9 Umuherezabitambo azagabanya kuri iryo turo iby’umuhango, maze abitwikire ku rutambiro. Icyo ni igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongotse burundu, kandi bifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus2:10 Ibisagutse kuri iryo turo, bizabe ibya Aroni n’abahungu be. Ni umugabane mutagatifu rwose: kuko ari ibyasagutse ku maturo y’ibiribwa byakongokeye Uhoraho burundu." 
Leviticus2:11 Ikoro ryose muzatura Uhoraho ntirizabe ari umutsima wavuganywe n’umusemburo. Koko rero, muramenye ntimuzagire umusemburo cyangwa ubuki mutwika mushaka ko biba ituro ry’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho." 
Leviticus2:12 Cyakora, muzajya mubituraho ituro ry’umuganura, ariko ntimuzabijyane ku rutambiro mwibwira ko bifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus2:13 Ituro ryose uzazana, uzariminjireho umunyu. Ntuzibagirwe na rimwe gushyira ku ituro ryawe, umunyu w’Isezerano ry’Imana yawe. Buri turo ryawe ryose, uzajye uritura ririmo umunyu." 
Leviticus2:14 Nuzanira Uhoraho ituro ry’umuganura, rizabe ari iry’amahundo yokeje. Cyangwa ifu y’igiheri cy’imbuto nshyashya, ni yo uzazana, ibe ituro ry’umuganura." 
Leviticus2:15 Iryo turo uzarisukemo amavuta, unarishyireho ububani. Iryo ni ikoro." 
Leviticus2:16 Hanyuma, kuri iyo fu y’igiheri no kuri ayo mavuta, umuherezabitambo azagabanyeho iby’umuhango, maze abitwikane na bwa bubani bwose. Iryo ni ituro, igitambo cy’ibiribwa gikongokeye Uhoraho burundu." 
Leviticus3:1 Umuntu natura igitambo cy’ubuhoro agikuye mu matungo maremare, cyaba ikimasa cyangwa inyana, ajye amurikira Uhoraho itungo ridafite inenge." 
Leviticus3:2 Arambike ikiganza ku mutwe w’icyo gitambo, akicire ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, nuko abaherezabitambo ari bo bene Aroni bamishe amaraso yacyo impande zose z’urutambiro." 
Leviticus3:3 Ibizava kuri icyo gitambo cy’ubuhoro babiture Uhoraho bibe igitambo cy’ibiribwa gikongotse burundu, n’ibinure biri ku mara, ibinure byose bitwikiriye amara" 
Leviticus3:4 n’impyiko zombi hamwe n’ikinure kizifasheho n’igifashe ku byaziha, urugimbu rwo ku mwijima na rwo bazarwomoreho rusange impyiko." 
Leviticus3:5 Hanyuma, ibyo byose bene Aroni bazabitwikire ku rutambiro, babigeretse ku gitambo gitwikwa kiri hejuru y’inkwi bashyize ku muriro. Icyo ni igitambo cy’ibiribwa gikongotse burundu, kandi gifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus3:6 Umuntu natura igitambo cy’ubuhoro agikuye mu matungo magufi, azamurike itungo ridafite inenge, ryaba isekurume cyangwa inyagazi." 
Leviticus3:7 Niba ari umwana w’intama ashaka gutangaho ituro, azawuzanire Uhoraho," 
Leviticus3:8 awurambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe, maze awicire imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Nuko bene Aroni bazamishe amaraso yawo mu mpande zose z’urutambiro." 
Leviticus3:9 Kuri icyo gitambo cy’ubuhoro, ibizaba ituro ry’ibiribwa rikongokeye Uhoraho burundu, ni inyama zose ziriho ibinure. Ni ukuvuga umurizo wose bazacira mu nguge, n’ibinure byoroshe amara, ikinure cyose gitwikiriye amara" 
Leviticus3:10 hamwe n’impyiko zombi n’urugimbu rwazo rufatanye n’ibyaziha. Urugimbu rwo ku mwijima na rwo barwomoreho rusange impyiko. 
Leviticus3:11 Hanyuma, ibyo byose umuherezabitambo azabitwikire ku rutambiro, bibe igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu." 
Leviticus3:12 Niba ari ihene ashaka gutura, azayizane imbere y’Uhoraho," 
Leviticus3:13 ayirambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe, maze ayicire ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Nuko rero, bene Aroni bamishe amaraso yayo impande zose z’urutambiro." 
Leviticus3:14 Ibizaba ituro ry’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu ni ikinure kiri ku mara, ikinure cyose gitwikiriye amara," 
Leviticus3:15 n’impyiko zombi hamwe n’urugimbu ruzifasheho n’urufashe ku byaziha. Urugimbu rwo ku mwijima barwomoreho rusange impyiko. 
Leviticus3:16 Izo nyama zose, umuherezabitambo azazitwikire ku rutambiro. Ni igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongotse burundu, kandi gifite impumuro yurura. Ibinure byose bizajya biba umugabane w’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus3:17 Iryo ni itegeko ridakuka kuri mwebwe, kuva mu gisekuru kugera mu kindi, aho muzaba mutuye hose. Icyitwa ikinure cyose, hamwe n’icyitwa amaraso cyose, ntimuzabirye.»" 
Leviticus4:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Bwira Abayisraheli uti" 
Leviticus4:2 ’Nihagira umuntu ukora icyaha kubera uburangare, agaca kuri rimwe mu mategeko y’Uhoraho, maze agakora ibyabujijwe, dore uko muzagenza." 
Leviticus4:3 Niba uguye mu cyaha ari umuherezabitambo wasizwe amavuta, kubera iyo mpamvu agatuma umuryango wose ucumura, azatura Uhoraho ikimasa cy’igisore kidafite inenge; kibe igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Leviticus4:4 Icyo kimasa cy’igisore azakijyana ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, akirambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe, maze agisogotere imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus4:5 Umuherezabitambo wasizwe amavuta azafata ku maraso y’icyo kimasa cy’igisore, ayajyane mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus4:6 Umuherezabitambo azakoza urutoki rwe muri ya maraso, maze imbere y’Uhoraho ayamishe incuro ndwi ku ruhande rugaragara rw’umubambiko w’ahantu hatagatifu." 
Leviticus4:7 Hanyuma, umuherezabitambo afate kuri ayo maraso, ayasige ku mahembe y’urutambiro rw’imibavu imbere y’Uhoraho, mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, andi maraso asigaye yose y’ikimasa ayasese hasi y’urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa ruri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus4:8 Kuri icyo kimasa cyatuweho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, azakureho inyama zose zifite ibinure: Ni ukuvuga ibinure byose biri ku mara, ibinure byose byoroshe amara," 
Leviticus4:9 n’impyiko zombi hamwe n’ikinure kizifasheho n’igifashe ku byaziha. Urugimbu rwo ku mwijima na rwo bazarwomoreho rusange impyiko. 
Leviticus4:10 Mbese izo nyama zose bazazikureho nk’uko babigenza ku kimasa gituweho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Hanyuma, umuherezabitambo azatwikire ibyo byose ku rutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa." 
Leviticus4:11 Uruhu rw’icyo kimasa, inyama zacyo zose, zirimo igihanga, amaguru n’amaboko, ibyo mu nda n’amayezi," 
Leviticus4:12 mbese ibyasigaye kuri icyo kimasa byose, azabijyane ku muriro w’inkwi. Aho ngaho nyine barunda ivu ni ho bizatwikirwa." 
Leviticus4:13 Niba ari imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli yacumuye itabizi ariko icyo cyaha ntikimenyekane, nibaca kuri rimwe mu mategeko y’Uhoraho, bityo bikababarwaho," 
Leviticus4:14 icyo cyaha nikimenyekana, ikoraniro rizatura ikimasa cy’umusore cy’impongano y’icyaha; icyo kimasa bazakijyane imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Leviticus4:15 maze abakuru b’ikoraniro bakirambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe, bacyicire imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus4:16 Umuherezabitambo wasizwe amavuta azajyane igice kimwe cy’amaraso ya cya kimasa ku ihema ry’ibonaniro. 
Leviticus4:17 Uwo muherezabitambo azakoze urutoki mu maraso yageruye maze imbere y’Uhoraho ayamishe incuro ndwi ku ruhande rugaragara rw’umubambiko. 
Leviticus4:18 Hanyuma azafate kuri ayo maraso, ayasige ku mahembe y’urutambiro ruri imbere y’Uhoraho mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, andi asigaye yose, ayasese mu nsi y’urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa ruri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus4:19 Inyama zose ziriho ibinure azazikebe, maze azitwikire ku rutambiro." 
Leviticus4:20 Icyo kimasa azakigirira nk’uko yagenjereje cya kimasa kindi cyatuweho impongano y’icyaha. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera ku ikoraniro umuhango wo gukiza icyaha, icyo gihe rizaba ribabariwe." 
Leviticus4:21 Icyo kimasa arategeke kukijyana kure y’ingando, maze agitwikireyo nk’uko yatwitse cya kindi cya mbere. Ngicyo igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha cy’ikoraniro." 
Leviticus4:22 Niba ari umutware w’umuryango wacumuye kubera uburangare agaca kuri rimwe mu mategeko y’Uhoraho Imana ye, bityo akagwa mu cyaha," 
Leviticus4:23 maze bakamumenyesha icyaha yakoze, azazane isekurume y’ihene, idafite inenge, ayiture;" 
Leviticus4:24 ayirambikeho ikiganza ku mutwe, maze ayicire imbere y’Uhoraho, aho bicira ibitambo bitwikwa. Icyo ni igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Leviticus4:25 Nuko, umuherezabitambo azakoze urutoki mu maraso y’icyo gitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, ayasige ku mahembe y’urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa, hanyuma andi asigaye yose ayasese mu nsi y’urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa." 
Leviticus4:26 Inyama zose ziriho ibinure azazitwikire ku rutambiro nk’uko yagenjeje za zindi z’igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera ku mutware umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha yakoze, ubwo ni ho azaba akibabariwe." 
Leviticus4:27 Niba ari umuntu wo muri rubanda rusanzwe wacumuye kubera uburangare, agaca kuri kimwe mu byabujijwe n’amategeko y’Uhoraho, bityo akandikwaho icyaha" 
Leviticus4:28 maze bakamumenyesha icyaha cye, azazana ihene y’inyagazi idafite inenge, ayitureho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha yakoze." 
Leviticus4:29 Azarambike ikiganza ku mutwe w’icyo gitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, maze akicire aho baturira ibitambo bitwikwa." 
Leviticus4:30 Umuherezabitambo azakoze urutoki rwe mu maraso yacyo, ayasige ku mahembe y’urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa, hanyuma andi asigaye ayasese mu nsi y’urutambiro." 
Leviticus4:31 Inyama zose zifite ibinure azazikebeho, nk’uko asanzwe abigenza ku gitambo cy’ubuhoro, maze azitwikire ku rutambiro, zibe igitambo gifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera ku wakoze icyaha umuhango wo kukimuhanaguraho, ubwo azaba akibabariwe." 
Leviticus4:32 Niba ari umwana w’intama ashaka guturaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, azazane uw’inyagazi udafite inenge." 
Leviticus4:33 Azarambike ikiganza ku mutwe w’icyo gitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, maze uwo mwana w’intama awusogotere aho basanzwe baturira igitambo gitwikwa, awutureho igitambo cy’impongano." 
Leviticus4:34 Umuherezabitambo azakoze urutoki rwe mu maraso y’icyo gitambo, ayasige ku mahembe y’urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa, hanyuma andi yose asigaye ayasese mu nsi y’urutambiro." 
Leviticus4:35 Inyama zose zifite ibinure azazikureho, nk’uko bagenza umwana w’intama utuweho igitambo cy’ubuhoro, maze umuherezabitambo azitwikire ku rutambiro, ziyongere ku gitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera ku wakoze icyaha umuhango wo kukimuhanaguraho, ubwo azaba akibabariwe." 
Leviticus5:1 Iyo barahije umuntu ngo avuge ukuri ariko we akicecekera, kandi ikibi cyakozwe yarakiboneye ubwe cyangwa se yarakibwiwe, maze ntatangaze icyo yamenye, ubwo aba yigeretseho umutwaro w’icyaha cye." 
Leviticus5:2 Nanone kandi, nihagira ukora ku kintu gihumanya atabizi, — nk’intumbi y’inyamaswa yo mu ishyamba, intumbi y’itungo ry’imuhira rihumanya, cyangwa se iy’agasimba gahumanya, ubwo na we azaba ahumanye kandi ahindutse umunyacyaha." 
Leviticus5:3 Nanone kandi umuntu nakora ku kintu cyandujwe n’undi muntu atabizi — ku kintu cyose gihumanya — maze akaza kubimenya, azaba ahindutse umunyacyaha." 
Leviticus5:4 Nanone kandi umuntu navugana ubuhubutsi; agashinga indahiro atitondeye, mu bintu byamugirira nabi cyangwa byamukiza — mbese mu bintu byose umuntu ashobora kugiramo indahiro ahubukiye — icyo gihe, nabimenya, azaba ahindutse umunyacyaha." 
Leviticus5:5 Nihagira rero ukora icyaha abitewe n’uko yagwiriwe na kimwe muri ibyo bintu, agomba kwirega igicumuro cye," 
Leviticus5:6 hanyuma akazanira Uhoraho igitambo cy’impongano, kubera ko yacumuye: icyo gitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha kizabe ari itungo rigufi ry’inyagazi; umwana w’intama cyangwa ihene, maze umuherezabitambo azamukorereho umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha cye." 
Leviticus5:7 Niba umuntu afite amikoro make, akaba adashobora kubona rimwe mu matungo magufi, nashaka gutura igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, azazanire Uhoraho intungura ebyiri cyangwa inuma ebyiri, imwe izaturweho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, indi ibe iy’igitambo gitwikwa." 
Leviticus5:8 Azazizanira umuherezabitambo abanze gutura iy’igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha: icyo azaba atuye azakivuna ijosi, ariko yirinde kugica umutwe." 
Leviticus5:9 Nyuma, amaraso make y’icyo gitambo, azayamishe ku rukuta rumwe rw’urutambiro, naho andi asigaye ayasese mu nsi yarwo. Icyo ni igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Leviticus5:10 Naho intungura ya kabiri, azayitureho igitambo gitwikwa akurikije imihango yabyo. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera kuri uwo mukene umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha yakoze, ubwo azaba akibabariwe." 
Leviticus5:11 Niba umuntu adashoboye kubona intungura ebyiri cyangwa inuma ebyiri, kugira ngo abitureho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha yakoze, ashobora nibura kuzana akebo k’ifu, kakaba igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo fu ntazayisukeho amavuta cyangwa ngo ayimeneho umubavu, kuko izaba ari iyo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Leviticus5:12 Azayishyikirize umuherezabitambo; umuherezabitambo ayoreho iyuzuye urushyi y’umuhango, maze ayitwikire ku rutambiro, yiyongere ku gitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu. Icyo ni gitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Leviticus5:13 Iyo umuntu yakoze icyaha kimwe muri biriya, maze umuherezabitambo akamukoreraho umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho igicumuro cye, ubwo aba akibabariwe. Umuherezabitambo azarangiza rero imihango yose nk’uko abigenza ku yandi maturo.»" 
Leviticus5:14 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus5:15 «Umuntu nakora ishyano biturutse ku burangare akabigira yima Uhoraho ibyamugenewe, indishyi y’akababaro azazanira Uhoraho igomba kuba ari imfizi y’intama idafite inenge, itoranyiiwe mu matungo magufi, kandi ifite agaciro k’umubare uringaniye w’amasikeli y’ifeza, apimiye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro, maze ayitureho igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro." 
Leviticus5:16 Ibyo azaba yaragomwe ingoro, azabyishyure, yongereho kimwe cya gatanu cyabyo, maze abishyikirize umuherezabitambo. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera kuri uwo muntu umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha cye, yifashishije ya mfizi y’intama atuyeho igitambo cyo kwigorora, ubwo azabe ababariwe igicumuro cye." 
Leviticus5:17 Niba umuntu yakoze icyaha atabizi, agaca kuri kimwe mu byabujijwe n’amategeko y’Uhoraho, bityo agacumura, akigerekaho umutwaro w’icyaha cye," 
Leviticus5:18 azazanire umuherezabitambo imfizi y’intama idafite inenge itoranyijwe mu matungo magufi, bikurikije igiciro cyagenwe ku bitambo by’indishyi y’akababaro. Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera kuri uwo muntu umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha yakoze biturutse ku burangare cyangwa ubujiji, ubwo azaba akibabariwe." 
Leviticus5:19 Icyo ni igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro, kuko mu by’ukuri uwo muntu yari yacumuriye Uhoraho.»" 
Leviticus5:20 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus5:21 «Nihagira umuntu ucumura agahemukira Uhoraho, akabigira ariganya mugenzi we kugira ngo amuhuguze ibyo yamubikiye, ibyo yamugujije, ibyo yamwibye, cyangwa se akabigira arya mugenzi we imitsi," 
Leviticus5:22 cyangwa se abeshya kugira ngo yitwarire ikintu cyatakaye akagitoragura, maze akagerekaho kurahira ibinyoma avuga ko atakoze kimwe muri ibyo byaha," 
Leviticus5:23 uwacumuye atyo akisiga icyaha, agomba gusubiza ibyo yibye, cyangwa ibyo yambuye mugenzi we ku ngufu, cyangwa ibyo yabikijwe cyangwa ibyatakaye yatoraguye," 
Leviticus5:24 cyangwa ikintu cyose cyatumye agira indahiro y’ibinyoma. Azabisubize byose nyirabyo, igihe azaba atura igitambo cy’impongano. Ndetse agerekeho kimwe cya gatanu cy’igiciro cyabyo." 
Leviticus5:25 Naho ku byerekeye igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro igenewe Uhoraho, azazanire umuherezabitambo imfizi y’intama idafite inenge, itoranyijwe mu matungo magufi, kandi ifite igiciro cyagenwe ku bitambo by’indishyi y’akababaro." 
Leviticus5:26 Umuherezabitambo namara gukorera kuri uwo muntu umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho igicumuro cye, imbere y’Uhoraho ubwo azaba akibabariwe n’aho yaba yarakoze ikimeze gite.»" 
Leviticus6:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus6:2 «Uhe Aroni n’abahungu be aya mabwiriza: Dore imihango yerekeye igitambo gitwikwa: igitambo gitwikwa kizagume ijoro ryose ku nkekwe icanye ku rutambiro burinde bucya, kandi uwo muriro urare waka." 
Leviticus6:3 Umuherezabitambo rero azambare ikanzu ye ya hariri n’amakabutura ya hariri, maze ayore ivu rituruka ku gitambo cyakongokeye ku rutambiro, arirunde iruhande rw’urutambiro." 
Leviticus6:4 Hanyuma yiyambure iyo myenda, yambare iyindi; maze rya vu arijyane hirya y’ingando, ahantu hatanduye." 
Leviticus6:5 Naho wa muriro wo ku rutambiro, uzahore ucanye ubutazima. Buri gitondo, umuherezabitambo azajye awukoranyirizaho inkwi, arambikeho igitambo gitwikwa, atareho inyama ziriho ibinure z’ibitambo by’ubuhoro." 
Leviticus6:6 Ku rutambiro, hagomba guhora haka umuriro ubutazima." 
Leviticus6:7 Dore rero imihango yerekeye ituro ry’ibiribwa: Bene Aroni ni bo bazarihereza Uhoraho, bari ahateganye n’urutambiro." 
Leviticus6:8 Ku ifu y’ituro, ku mavuta hamwe n’ububani buri kuri iryo turo, bazayoreho ibyuzuye urushyi, maze babitwikire ku rutambiro, bibe igitambo cy’urwibutso kandi gifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus6:9 Ibizasigara, Aroni n’abahungu be bazabirye; ibyo biribwa bidasembuye bizarirwa ahantu hasukuye mu rugo rw’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus6:10 Kirazira kubikoramo umutsima usembuye. Uwo ni wo mugabane mbahaye ku maturo nturwa, agakongorwa n’umuriro. Ni ikintu gitagatifu rwose, kimwe n’ibindi bisaguka ku gitambo cy’impongano cyangwa ku gitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro." 
Leviticus6:11 Umuntu wese wo muri bene Aroni ashobora kukiryaho. Kuva mu gisekuruza kugera mu kindi, ngiryo iposho mugenewe buri gihe, rikava ku biribwa biturwa Uhoraho bigakongorwa n’umuriro. Ikizabikoraho cyose kizaba kibaye ikintu gitagatifu.»" 
Leviticus6:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus6:13 «Dore ituro Aroni kimwe n’abahungu be azazanira Uhoraho ku munsi azasigwaho amavuta: icya cumi cya efa y’ifu ni cyo kizaba ituro rihoraho, igice kimwe giturwe mu gitondo, ikindi nimugoroba." 
Leviticus6:14 Iryo turo rizategurirwe ku ipanu, rikarangwe mu mavuta, maze ubizane bivanze neza; ibisate by’iryo turo ry’umutsima uzabihereze Uhoraho bibe igitambo gifite impumuro imwurura." 
Leviticus6:15 Umuherezabitambo wo mu bana ba Aroni uzasigwa amavuta ngo azamuzungure, na we azajye abigenza atyo. Iryo rizababere ituro rihoraho, kandi rizajye ritwikwa ryose, nta cyo mugabanyijeho." 
Leviticus6:16 Ituro ry’umuherezabitambo riherezwa ryose, nta muntu uriyeho na gato.»" 
Leviticus6:17 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus6:18 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Aroni n’abahungu be ku byerekeye imihango y’impongano y’icyaha: igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha kizasogoterwe aho basanzwe bicira ibitambo bitwikwa, imbere y’Uhoraho kuko ari ikintu gitagatifu." 
Leviticus6:19 Umuherezabitambo ni we uyobora imihango y’icyo gitambo, ni na we kandi ushobora kukirya, akakirira mu rugo rw’ihema ry’ibonaniro, ahantu hasukuye." 
Leviticus6:20 Umuntu wese uzakora ku nyama z’icyo gitambo, azaba asukuwe; nihagira kandi amaraso yacyo ameneka ku mwambaro, muzawumesere ahantu hasukuye." 
Leviticus6:21 Inkono cyatetswemo niba iy’ibumba muzayimene, niba iy’umuringa muzayoze, muyunyugurishe amazi." 
Leviticus6:22 Umuntu wo mu baherezabitambo wese ashobora kurya kuri icyo gitambo: ni ikintu gitagatifu rwose. 
Leviticus6:23 Naho igitambo cyose bazafataho amaraso bakayazana mu ihema ry’ibonaniro kugira ngo bayakoreshe umuhango wo guhanagurira ibyaha ahantu hatagatifu, inyama zacyo ntizizajya ziribwa, zigomba gutwikwa." 
Leviticus7:1 Dore imihango igenga igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro. Ni ikintu gitagatifu rwose. 
Leviticus7:2 Igitambo cyo kwigorora bazakicira aho basanzwe bicira ibitambo bitwikwa, maze umuherezabitambo aminjagire amaraso yacyo impande zose z’urutambiro." 
Leviticus7:3 Inyama zose ziriho ibinure azitangeho ituro; ari umurizo, ari ibinure biri ku mara," 
Leviticus7:4 ari impyiko zombi hamwe n’urukiryi. Umwijima wo, azawukuranaho na za mpyiko." 
Leviticus7:5 Izo nyama zose, umuherezabitambo azazitwikira ku rutambiro, zibe ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho. Icyo ni cyo gitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro." 
Leviticus7:6 Uwo mu baherezabitambo wese ashobora kukiryaho, kandi akakirira ahantu hasukuye kuko ari ikintu gitagatifu rwose." 
Leviticus7:7 Uko mubigenza ku gitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, ni na ko muzabigenza ku cy’indishyi y’akababaro: umuhango uzaba umwe kuri byombi. Inyama z’icyo gitambo kandi zihabwa umuherezabitambo wakoze uwo muhango wo guhanagura icyaha." 
Leviticus7:8 Iyo umuherezabitambo aturiye umuntu igitambo gitwikwa, atwara uruhu rw’icyo gitambo nyine." 
Leviticus7:9 Ituro ryokerejwe ku ziko, hamwe n’iritetse mu nkono cyangwa irikaranze ku ipanu, bizaba iby’umuherezabitambo uzabitura; ni ibye." 
Leviticus7:10 Kandi amaturo yose, ari avanze n’amavuta cyangwa ari ayumutse, azaba aya bene Aroni, bayagabane banganye." 
Leviticus7:11 Dore kandi imihango igenga igitambo cy’ubuhoro giturwa Uhoraho. 
Leviticus7:12 Nikiba ikijyanirana no gushimira Uhoraho, kizaherekezwe n’utugati tudasembuye kandi dusize amavuta hamwe n’imitsima idasembuye, na yo ivugishijwe amavuta." 
Leviticus7:13 Azongereho kandi n’utugati tw’ifu tuvitse mu mavuta. Imigati idasembuye, azayitura Uhoraho, iherekeze igitambo cy’ubuhoro cyo gushimira." 
Leviticus7:14 Bazafata akagati ka buri bwoko, bagature Uhoraho, maze bagahe umuherezabitambo uzaba yaminjagiye amaraso y’igitambo cy’ubuhoro." 
Leviticus7:15 Naho inyama za cya gitambo cy’ubuhoro cyo gushimira, ziribwa ku munsi zaturiweho, nta n’imwe irajwe ngo izaribwe bukeye." 
Leviticus7:16 Hari ubwo igitambo gishobora guturwa ari icyo guhigura umuhigo, cyangwa kigaturwa kubera ubushake bw’umuntu. Inyama zacyo rero zigomba kuribwa kuri uwo munsi cyatuweho. Cyakora, bukeye bwaho, bashobora kurya izaraye." 
Leviticus7:17 Ariko ku munsi wa gatatu izizaba zasagutse zose, bazazitwika." 
Leviticus7:18 Nihagira umuntu urenga kuri ibyo, maze ku munsi wa gatatu akarya ku nyama z’igitambo cye cy’ubuhoro, icyo gihe, nta bwo icyo gitambo cyakwakiranwa ishimwe kandi n’uwagituye na we ntiyagishimirwa. Inyama zacyo ziba zanduye; uwaziryaho wese yaba yihamije icyaha." 
Leviticus7:19 Ubundi kandi, inyama yose izaba yakoze ku kintu cyahumanijwe ntimuzayirye, ahubwo muzayitwike. Umuntu wese usukuye ashobora kurya ku nyama z’icyo gitambo." 
Leviticus7:20 Naho rero, umuntu wese uzaba yifitemo ubwandure, maze akarenga akarya kuri izo nyama z’igitambo cy’ubuhoro gituwe Uhoraho, uwo nyine azacibwa mu muryango we »." 
Leviticus7:21 Nanone kandi, uzaziryaho yakoze ku muntu wahumanijwe, ku nyamaswa yahumanijwe, na we azacibwe mu muryango we.»" 
Leviticus7:22 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus7:23 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Ibinure ibyo ari byo byose, ari iby’ikimasa, ari iby’intama cyangwa iby’ihene ntimuzabirye." 
Leviticus7:24 Ibinure by’itungo ryapfuye cyangwa iby’iryatanyaguwe n’inyamaswa, mushobora kubikoresha imirimo ibonetse yose, ariko ntimuzabiryeho." 
Leviticus7:25 Koko rero, umuntu wese uzarya ibinure by’itungo ryakongokeye Uhoraho, uwo nguwo azacibwe muri bene wabo." 
Leviticus7:26 Aho muzaba mutuye hose, muzirinde kunywa amaraso, ari ay’inyoni, ari n’ay’inyamaswa." 
Leviticus7:27 Umuntu uzabicaho akanywa amaraso ayo ari yo yose azacibwe muri bene wabo.» 
Leviticus7:28 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus7:29 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Uzazanira Uhoraho igitambo, azamuture umugabane wamugenewe." 
Leviticus7:30 Uwo muntu ubwe, ni we uzazana ibiribwa bikongokera Uhoraho; ni ukuvuga inyama zose z’ibinure. Azazizane hamwe n’inkoro maze abimurikire Uhoraho." 
Leviticus7:31 Izo nyama zose z’ibinure rero, umuherezabitambo azazitwikire ku rutambiro, naho inkoro ibe iya Aroni n’abahungu be." 
Leviticus7:32 Byongeye kandi, umuherezabitambo muzamuhe itako ry’iburyo, ribe umugabane we ku bitambo byanyu by’ubuhoro." 
Leviticus7:33 Iryo tako ry’iburyo rizabe umugabane w’uwo muri bene Aroni uzaba yakoze umuhango wo kumurika amaraso n’ibinure by’igitambo cy’ubuhoro. 
Leviticus7:34 Koko rero, inkoro iherezwa Uhoraho, hamwe n’itako rikurwa ku bitambo by’ubuhoro nabyatse Abayisraheli maze mbigenera umuherezabitambo Aroni n’abahungu be. Rizaba umugabane wabo igihe cyose." 
Leviticus7:35 Urwo ni rwo ruhare rwa Aroni n’abahungu be ku bitambo by’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho. Ni wo mugabane wabo kuva umunsi bazaba bagizwe abaherezabitambo, bakiyegurira imirimo y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus7:36 Ni ko Uhoraho yategetse Abayisraheli: uwo mugabane uzaharirwa bene Aroni guhera umunsi azaba yabasutseho amavuta y’isigwa. Kuva ku gisekuruza kugera ku kindi, iryo rizababera itegeko ridakuka.»" 
Leviticus7:37 Ngiryo rero itegeko rigenga umuhango w’ibitambo by’impongano y’icyaha, iby’indishyi y’akababaro hamwe n’iby’ubuhoro. Ni na ryo kandi rigenga umuhango wo gushyiraho umuherezabitambo mushyashya." 
Leviticus7:38 Iryo tegeko Uhoraho yarihereye Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi. Kuri uwo munsi nyine, mu butayu bwa Sinayi, ni na ho Uhoraho yategekeye Abayisraheli kumuzanira amaturo yabo." 
Leviticus8:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus8:2 «Hamagara Aroni n’abahungu be, kandi wiyegereze imyenda y’umuherezabitambo, amavuta yo gusiga, ikimasa cyo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, amasekurume y’intama abiri, hamwe n’igitebo cyuzuye imigati idasembuye." 
Leviticus8:3 Nyuma y’ibyo ukoranyirize imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli imbere y’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro.» 
Leviticus8:4 Musa agenza uko Uhoraho yari yamutegetse, maze imbaga yose ikoranira imbere y’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus8:5 Nuko Musa abwira ikoraniro, ati «Dore ibyo Uhoraho yategetse gukora.»" 
Leviticus8:6 Musa yigiza hino Aroni n’abahungu be, maze abuhagiza amazi." 
Leviticus8:7 Nyuma y’ibyo, yambika Aroni ikanzu anamusesuraho umusanganyagihimba, maze amukenyeza n’umukandara wawo kugira ngo awumukomezeho." 
Leviticus8:8 Musa, amaze kwambika Aroni umusesuragituza, yawushyizemo amabuye y’ubufindo." 
Leviticus8:9 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse, Musa yambitse Aroni igitambaro cyo mu mutwe, maze no mu ruhanga rwe amutamiriza ikamba rya zahabu ari cyo kimenyetso cy’uko yeguriwe Imana." 
Leviticus8:10 Musa yafashe amavuta yo gusiga, ayamisha ku Ngoro, maze yo n’ibyari biyirimo byose arabitagatifuza." 
Leviticus8:11 Amaze kumisha ayo mavuta incuro ndwi ku rutambiro, arayarusiga, rwo n’ibikoresho byarwo, igikarabiro hamwe n’igishyigikizo cyacyo. Ubwo kwari ukugira ngo abitagatifuze." 
Leviticus8:12 Andi mavuta ayasiga ku mutwe wa Aroni, amusigira kumutagatifuza." 
Leviticus8:13 Musa yigiza hino bene Aroni, abambika amakanzu, abakenyeza imikandara, maze abategesha n’ingofero z’abaherezabitambo nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse." 
Leviticus8:14 Musa yiyegereza cya kimasa cy’igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, maze Aroni n’abahungu be bamaze kukiramburiraho ibiganza ku mutwe," 
Leviticus8:15 Musa aragisogota. Amaraso yacyo arayareza maze ayasigisha urutoki rwe ku mahembe y’urutambiro, hirya no hino, ararusukura. Andi maraso yayasheshe mu nsi y’urutambiro, arukoreraho umuhango wo kuruhumanura." 
Leviticus8:16 Hanyuma Musa yafashe ibinure byose biri ku mara, ibyo ku mwijima, hamwe n’impyiko zombi n’ibinure byazo, maze abikongereza hejuru y’urutambiro." 
Leviticus8:17 Naho ikimasa, uruhu rwacyo, inyama zacyo n’amayezi yacyo, abitwikira kure y’ingando nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse." 
Leviticus8:18 Musa yiyegereje na ya sekurume y’intama y’igitambo gitwikwa, maze Aroni n’abahungu be bamaze kuyiramburiraho ibiganza ku mutwe, arayisogota." 
Leviticus8:19 Nuko amaraso yayo ayamisha impande zose z’urutambiro. 
Leviticus8:20 Ya sekurume y’intama, Musa ayitera imirwi, maze ari igihanga, ari ibinure, ari n’iyo mirwi nyine, byose arabitwika." 
Leviticus8:21 Amara n’amaguru abyogesha amazi, maze ya sekurume y’intama yose ayikongereza ku rutambiro. Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa, icyo ni cyo cyabaye igitambo gitwikwa kandi gifite impumuro yurura; igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu." 
Leviticus8:22 Musa yongeye kwiyegereza isekurume y’intama ya kabiri yari igenewe umuhango wo gushyiraho umuherezabitambo mushyashya. Aroni n’abahungu be bamaze kuyiramburiraho ibiganza ku mutwe," 
Leviticus8:23 Musa arayisogota, hanyuma yafashe ku maraso yayo, ayasi ga Aroni ku kireberebe cy’ugutwi kw’iburyo, ku gikumwe cy’ikiganza cy’iburyo, no ku ino rinini ry’ikirenge cy’iburyo."
