Leviticus8:24 Musa yigiza hino bene Aroni, na bo abasiga amaraso ku kireberebe cy’ugutwi kw’iburyo, ku gikumwe cy’ikiganza cy’iburyo, no ku ino rinini ry’ikirenge cy’iburyo. Nuko nyuma, andi maraso Musa ayasesa mu mpande zose z’urutambiro." 
Leviticus8:25 Musa yakoranyirije hamwe inyama zose z’ibinure, ni ukuvuga umurizo, ibinure biri ku mara, ibyo ku mwijima, impyiko zombi n’ibinure byazo, hamwe n’itako ry’iburyo." 
Leviticus8:26 Mu gitebo cy’imigati idasembuye yari imbere y’Uhoraho na ho, yakuyemo akagati kadasembuye, hamwe n’akagati gatekesheje amavuta, n’agatsima, maze abigereka hejuru ya za nyama z’ibinure na rya tako ry’iburyo." 
Leviticus8:27 Ibyo byose rero, abishyira mu biganza bya Aroni n’iby’abahungu be, maze abategeka gukora umuhango wo kubihereza Uhoraho." 
Leviticus8:28 Barangije, Musa abikura mu biganza byabo, maze abikongereza ku rutambiro hamwe n’igitambo gitwikwa. Icyo ni cyo cyabaye igitambo cyo gushyiraho abaherezabitambo bashyashya. Impumuro yacyo irurura, kandi ni igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongokeye burundu Uhoraho." 
Leviticus8:29 Musa afata inkoro ya ya sekurume y’intama, maze ayihereza Uhoraho ho ituro. Ako gatuza ni ko kabaye umugabane wa Musa kuri iyo sekurume y’intama, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse." 
Leviticus8:30 Noneho, Musa afata amavuta yo gusiga, n’amaraso yari ku rutambiro, maze asiga Aroni n’abahungu be, kandi amisha no ku myambaro yabo. Nguko uko Musa yeguriye Uhoraho Aroni n’abahungu be, akanatagatifuza imyambaro yabo." 
Leviticus8:31 Musa abwira Aroni n’abahungu be, ati «Nimutekeshereze inyama imbere y’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro; ni ho muzazirira hamwe n’imigati yo mu gitebo twakoresheje mu muhango wo kubagira abaherezabitambo. Ibyo muzabikora nk’uko nabitegetse ngira nti ’Aroni n’abahungu be, ni bo bazazirya’." 
Leviticus8:32 Ibizasigara ku nyama no ku migati, muzabitwika." 
Leviticus8:33 Mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi, ntimuzava imbere y’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Muzahaguma kugeza ubwo igihe cyagenewe imihango yo kubagira abaherezabitambo kizaba kirangiye; kuko mu minsi irindwi ariho muzagirwa abahereza bitambo," 
Leviticus8:34 uko byagenze uyu munsi. Koko Uhoraho yabitegetse kugira ngo mugirirweho umuhango wo guhanagurwaho ibyaha. 
Leviticus8:35 Muzaguma imbere y’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro umunsi n’ijoro, mumare iminsi irindwi. Hanyuma, muzashobora gutunganya imirimo y’Uhoraho mutikanga urupfu. Ayo ni yo mategeko nahawe.»" 
Leviticus8:36 Aroni n’abahungu be bubahiriza amategeko Uhoraho yari yatanze, atumye Musa." 
Leviticus9:1 Ku munsi wa munani, Musa ahamagara Aroni n’abahungu be, hamwe n’abakuru ba Israheli." 
Leviticus9:2 Musa rero abwira Aroni, ati «Shaka ikimasa cyo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, hamwe n’isekurume y’intama yo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa. Ayo matungo yombi, uzayamurika imbere y’Uhoraho, ariko azabe atagira inenge." 
Leviticus9:3 Hanyuma uzabwira Abayisraheli aya magambo, uti ’Mufate isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa." 
Leviticus9:4 Mufate kandi ikimasa hamwe n’isekurume y’intama byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro imbere y’Uhoraho. Ntimwibagirwe kandi n’ituro ry’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta. Impamvu y’ibyo byose ni uko uyu munsi ariho Uhoraho ari bubabonekere.’» 
Leviticus9:5 Abayisraheli bazana imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro ibyo Musa yari yategetse byose, maze ikoraniro ryose rihagarara imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus9:6 Nuko Musa aravuga ati «Dore ibyo Uhoraho yabategetse gukora kugira ngo ikuzo rye ribigaragarize.» 
Leviticus9:7 Nuko Musa abwira Aroni, ati «Egera urutambiro, uture igitambo cyawe cy’impongano y’ibyaha n’igitambo cyawe gitwikwa, kugira ngo wikorereho ubwawe no ku muryango umuhango ubahanaguraho icyaha. Hanyuma, umurike amaturo y’umuryango kugira ngo uwukorereho umuhango uwuhanaguraho icyaha nk’uko Uhoraho yabitegetse.»" 
Leviticus9:8 Aroni yegera urutambiro, maze asogota ikimasa cyo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha cye bwite." 
Leviticus9:9 Abahungu be bamuzanira amaraso, akozamo urutoki, asiga ku mahembe y’urutambiro, maze asigaye ayasesa mu nsi yarwo." 
Leviticus9:10 Ibinure, impyiko zombi n’umwijima by’icyo gitambo, yabitwikiye ku rutambiro nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Inyama zindi hamwe n’uruhu, byo yabitwikiye kure y’ingando." 
Leviticus9:12 Itungo ryari rigenewe igitambo gitwikwa, na ryo ararisogota, abahungu be bamuzanira amaraso yaryo, maze ayaminjagira mu mpande zose z’urutambiro." 
Leviticus9:13 Barongeye bamuzanira igihanga n’imirwi y’icyo gitambo gitwikwa, maze abikongereza ku rutambiro." 
Leviticus9:14 Amara n’amaguru arabyoza maze na byo abitwikira ku rutambiro hamwe na cya gitambo gitwikwa. 
Leviticus9:15 Aroni kandi amurika amaturo y’umuryango; afata isekurume y’ihene yari igenewe igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha cy’umuryango arayisogota, maze arayitura, nk’uko yari yagenjeje ku gitambo cya mbere." 
Leviticus9:16 Yamuritse igitambo gitwikwa, anagitura uko byateganijwe." 
Leviticus9:17 Ahereza kandi ituro ry’ifu, ayoraho iyuzuye urushyi, maze ayitwikira ku rutambiro, yiyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa cya mu gitondo." 
Leviticus9:18 Ikimasa hamwe n’isekurume y’intama umuryango wari watuyeho igitambo cy’ubuhoro, yarabyishe, maze abahungu be bamuzanira amaraso yabyo, ayaminjagira impande zose z’urutambiro." 
Leviticus9:19 Umurizo, urugimbu ruri ku mara, impyiko n’umwijima, mbese inyama z’ibinure za cya kimasa n’iza ya sekurume y’intama," 
Leviticus9:20 bazigereka ku nkoro z’ibyo bitambo, maze azikongereza ku rubambiro." 
Leviticus9:21 Aroni yakoze umuhango wo guhereza Uhoraho inkoro n’itako ry’iburyo, maze arabimutura nk’uko Musa yari yabimutegetse." 
Leviticus9:22 Hanyuma Aroni yaramburiye ibiganza hejuru y’imbaga, ayiha umugisha maze aramanuka. Ubwo yari arangije gutura igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, igitambo gitwikwa, hamwe n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro." 
Leviticus9:23 Nyuma y’ibyo, Musa na Aroni binjira mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, barisohotsemo baha imbaga umugisha, maze ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryigaragariza umuryango wose." 
Leviticus9:24 Ikibatsi cy’umuriro gituruka imbere y’Uhoraho, gikongeza igitambo gitwika n’ibinure byari ku rutambiro. Imbaga yose ibonye ibyo, itera hejuru, ibyishimo birayisaga, abantu bose ni ko kugwa hasi bubitse umutwe." 
Leviticus10:1 Abahungu ba Aroni, Nadabu n’Avihu, bafashe ibyotezo byabo, bacanamo umuriro, bashyiramo umubavu, maze bamurikira Uhoraho umuriro udatagatifujwe, atari yabategetse." 
Leviticus10:2 Bityo ikibatsi cy’umuriro gituruka imbere y’Uhoraho kirabakongeza, bapfira mu maso ye." 
Leviticus10:3 Nuko Musa abwira Aroni, ati «Uhoraho yari yabivuze ukuri: ’Ubutungane bwanjye bugaragarira mu banyegera, kandi ngomba guherwa ikuzo imbere y’umuryango wose.’» Aroni araceceka, arumirwa." 
Leviticus10:4 Musa ahamagara Mishayeli na Elisafari, bene Uziyeli se wabo wa Aroni, arababwira ati «Nimuze, muterure abavandimwe banyu, mubakure imbere y’ahantu hatagatifu, mubajyane kure y’ingando.»" 
Leviticus10:5 Nuko baraza babaterurira mu makanzu yabo, babakura mu ngando nk’uko Musa yari yabitegetse." 
Leviticus10:6 Musa abwira Aroni hamwe n’abahungu be Eleyazari na Itamari, ati «Ntimusandaze imisatsi yanyu, kandi ntimushishimure imyenda yanyu, hato mudapfa cyangwa mugatera Uhoraho kurakarira ikoraniro ryose. Uretse mwebwe, abandi bavandimwe banyu bose bo mu nzu ya Israheli, bazaririre abo Uhoraho yatsembesheje umuriro." 
Leviticus10:7 Mwebwe ntimugomba kuva ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro kugira ngo mudapfa, kuko murangwa n’ikimenyetso cy’amavuta y’Uhoraho mwasizwe.» Nuko bagenza uko Musa yari yategetse." 
Leviticus10:8 Uhoraho abwira Aroni, ati" 
Leviticus10:9 «Niba muri bujye mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, ntimuzanywe divayi cyangwa ikindi gisindisha; bityo nta bwo muzapfa. Kuva mu gisekuru kugera ku kindi, bizababere itegeko ridakuka." 
Leviticus10:10 Ibyo byose ni ukugira ngo muzashobore gutandukanya ibintu bitagatifu n’ibitari byo, ibyahumanye n’ibyahumanuwe," 
Leviticus10:11 kandi ngo mwigishe Abayisraheli bose amategeko yose Uhoraho yatanze atumye Musa.» 
Leviticus10:12 Aroni n’abahungu bari basigaye ari bo Eleyazari na Itamari, Musa yarababwiye ati «Mujyane ibisigaye ku ituro ry’ifu ryatwikiwe Uhoraho, muyitekemo imigati idasembuye, kandi muyirire iruhande rw’urutambiro, kuko ari ikintu gitagatifu rwose." 
Leviticus10:13 Muzayirira ahantu hatagatifu, kuko ari wo mugabane wawe n’abawe ku bitambo biturwa Uhoraho bigakongokera Uhoraho. Iryo ni ryo tegeko nahawe." 
Leviticus10:14 Naho inkoro yaherejwe Uhoraho hamwe n’itako ryagabanijwe ku gitambo, muzabirira ahantu hasukuye, wowe, abahungu bawe n’abakobwa bawe. Uwo ni wo mugabane wawe n’abana bawe ku bitambo by’ubuhoro by’Abayisraheli." 
Leviticus10:15 Iryo tako ryagabanijwe ku gitambo, iyo nkoro yaherejwe Uhoraho, bazabizana hamwe n’inyama z’ibinure zo gutwikwa, kugira ngo babihereze Uhoraho. Nyuma, wowe n’abahungu bawe, bizaba umugabane wanyu ubuziraherezo nk’uko Uhoraho yabitegetse.»" 
Leviticus10:16 Musa abajije ibya ya sekurume y’ihene y’igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, amenya ko bari bayitwitse. Ubwo yarakariye cyane Eleyazari na Itamari bene Aroni bari basigaye, maze arababaza ati" 
Leviticus10:17 «Ni kuki kiriya gitambo mutakiririye ahantu hatagatifu kandi ari umugabane mutagatifu rwose? Uhoraho yari yarakibahaye kugira ngo ikoraniro ryose rikorere mu maso ye umuhango wo kwihanaguraho icyaha. 
Leviticus10:18 Kubera ko amaraso yacyo mutayajyanye ahantu hatagatifu, mwagombaga kukirira ahantu hatagatifu nk’uko nari nabitegetse.»" 
Leviticus10:19 Aroni abwira Musa, ati «Umva, kuri uwo munsi Abayisraheli bamurikiye Uhoraho ibitambo by’impongano y’icyaha hamwe n’ibitambo bitwikwa, none dore ibyambayeho. Ubu se ku munsi nk’uwo Uhoraho yashima ko ndiye igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha?»" 
Leviticus10:20 Musa amaze kubyumva, arabishima." 
Leviticus11:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Leviticus11:2 «Muzabwire Abayisraheli mutya: Mu nyamaswa zose ziri ku isi, dore izo muzashobora kurya:" 
Leviticus11:3 izifite ikinono gisatuye, kandi zuza." 
Leviticus11:4 Mu nyamaswa rero zuza kandi zifite ibinono, dore izo mutazarya: Ingamiya, kuko yuza ariko ntigire ibinono; ntimuzayirye, yabanduza." 
Leviticus11:5 Impereryi, kuko yuza ariko ntigire ibinono; murayizira; yabanduza." 
Leviticus11:6 Urukwavu, kuko rwuza ariko ntirugire ibinono; muraruzira, rwabanduza." 
Leviticus11:7 Ingurube, kuko ifite ibinono bisatuye, ariko ntiyuze; murayizira, yabanduza." 
Leviticus11:8 Izo nyamaswa zose, muzira inyama zazo no gukora ku ntumbi zazo, kuko zabanduza." 
Leviticus11:9 Dore mu nyamaswa ziba mu mazi, izo muzashobora kurya: inyamaswa yose iba mu mazi, haba mu nyanja cyangwa mu mugezi, niba ifite amababa yogesha n’isharankima, mushobora kuyirya." 
Leviticus11:10 Cyakora, inyamaswa zose, zitagira amababa zogesha n’isharankima, ari udusimba two mu mazi, ari n’ibindi biba mu nyanja cyangwa mu migezi, byose murabizira." 
Leviticus11:11 Birabujijwe ntimuzigere na rimwe murya inyama zabyo, kandi ntihazagire n’ukora ku ntumbi zabyo." 
Leviticus11:12 Inyamaswa yose yo mu mazi idafite amababa yogesha n’isharankima, murayizira." 
Leviticus11:13 Mu nyoni, dore izo mutazakoraho kandi ntimuzirye kuko muzizira: kagoma, icyanira, icyaruzi," 
Leviticus11:14 sakabaka, amoko yose y’ibyanira," 
Leviticus11:15 amoko yose y’ibikona," 
Leviticus11:16 mbuni, igishihanyi, rushorera, agaca n’amoko yako yose," 
Leviticus11:17 igihunyira, sarumfuna, igihunyira cy’amatwi," 
Leviticus11:18 inyange, igishondabagabo, ikizu," 
Leviticus11:19 itanangabo, samusure n’agacurama, hamwe n’uruyongoyongo n’amoko yarwo yose." 
Leviticus11:20 Igisimba cyose kiguruka kandi kikagira amaguru ane, ni umuziro kuri mwe." 
Leviticus11:21 Cyakora muri ibyo bisimba biguruka kandi bikagira amaguru ane, ibyo mushobora kuzarya, ni ibifite amaguru atuma bisimbagurika ku butaka." 
Leviticus11:22 Ibyo mushobora kurya rero, ni inzige, isanane, amajeri, hamwe n’amoko yabyo yose." 
Leviticus11:23 Bityo rero, igisimba cyose kiguruka kandi kikagira gusa amaguru ane ariko ntigisimbagurike, murakizira." 
Leviticus11:24 Izo nyamaswa zose rero zirahumanya; uzakora ku ntumbi yazo azaba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba. 
Leviticus11:25 Uzaterura intumbi yazo wese, azamese imyenda ye, kuko azaba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus11:26 Inyamaswa zose zifite ibinono bidasatuye cyangwa ntizuze, izo murazizira. Uzikozeho aba yanduye." 
Leviticus11:27 Byongeye, mu nyamaswa zose zigenza amaguru ane, izidafite ibinono zikandagiza amajanja, murazizira. Uzakora ku ntumbi yazo wese, azaba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus11:28 Uzaterura intumbi yazo wese, azamese imyenda ye, kuko aba yahumanye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus11:29 Mu dusimba tujagata ku butaka twose, utwo muzira ni utu: ifuku, umushushwe, amoko yose y’umuserebanya," 
Leviticus11:30 umukara, umucamano, icyugu hamwe n’uruvu." 
Leviticus11:31 Ngutwo utuzira mu dusimba twose. Uzakora ku ntumbi yatwo wese, azaba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus11:32 Igikoresho cyose intumbi yatwo izagwaho, kizaba cyanduye. Cyaba igikoresho cyo mu giti, umwambaro, uruhu se cyangwa isaho, mbese igikoresho icyo ari cyo cyose, ibyo byose bizogeshwa amazi kuko biba byanduye kugeza nimugoroba. Nyuma y’ibyo, ni ho bizaba bisukuye." 
Leviticus11:33 Bene ako gasimba nikagwa mu gikoresho cy’ibumba, ibikirimo bizaba byanduye, n’icyo gikoresho kigomba kumenwa." 
Leviticus11:34 Ibiribwa byose n’ibinyobwa byose bizatarukirwa n’amazi yari muri ibyo bikoresho, bizaba byanduye." 
Leviticus11:35 Ikintu cyose intumbi y’utwo dusimba izagwaho, kizaba cyanduye. N’aho cyaba iziko cyangwa amashyiga, muzakimenagure, kuko kiba cyanduye kandi muzakizira." 
Leviticus11:36 Nyamara isoko cyangwa iriba ryafukuriwe kubika amazi, byo ntibishobora guhumana, naho ubundi ukoze ku ntumbi y’utwo dusimba aba yanduye." 
Leviticus11:37 Nanone kandi intumbi yatwo nigwa ku ntete zigenewe kuzabibwa, nta bwo zizahumana." 
Leviticus11:38 Cyakora, iyo mbuto niba yageze mu mazi, maze intumbi y’utwo dukoko ikayigwaho, izaba ishobora kubanduza." 
Leviticus11:39 Inyamaswa yose mushobora kurya niyipfusha, uzakora ku ntumbi yayo azaba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus11:40 Uriye ku ntumbi yayo na we kandi, arahumana kugeza nimugoroba. Agomba rero kumesa imyambaro ye. Ni kimwe n’uwayiteruye, na we agomba kumesa imyambaro ye, kuko aba yahumanye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus11:41 Udusimba twose tujagata ku butaka, muratuzira, ntimuzaturye." 
Leviticus11:42 Twaba utugendesha inda, utugendesha amaguru ane cyangwa arenga, ntimuzaturye kuko mutuzira." 
Leviticus11:43 Ntimuzihumanye maze ngo mwiyanduze kubera utwo dusimba twikurura hasi. 
Leviticus11:44 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu, muzisukure mube abatagatifu nk’uko nanjye ndi umutagatifu. Mwebwe ubwanyu, ntimuzihumanye ku mpamvu ya turiya dusimba tujagata ku butaka." 
Leviticus11:45 Ndi Uhoraho, wabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri kugira ngo mbabere Imana. Mugomba rero kuba abatagatifu kuko nanjye ndi umutagatifu." 
Leviticus11:46 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye inyamaswa, inyoni hamwe n’utundi dusimba twose twoga mu mazi cyangwa tujagata ku butaka." 
Leviticus11:47 Ayo mategeko azatuma mushobora gutandukanya icyanduza n’ikitanduza, kandi mumenye inyamaswa ziribwa n’izitaribwa." 
Leviticus12:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus12:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Umugore nasama inda akabyara umuhungu, azamara iminsi irindwi ari mu miziro, nk’uko bigenda iyo ari mu muhango w’abakobwa." 
Leviticus12:3 Ku munsi wa munani, umwana bazamugenya," 
Leviticus12:4 hanyuma nyina amare iminsi mirongo itatu n’itatu ategereje ko amaraso ye asukurwa. Ntazagire ikintu gitagatifu akoraho cyangwa ngo ajye mu Ngoro, kugeza ubwo igihe cy’isukurwa rye kizarangira." 
Leviticus12:5 Nabyara umukobwa, azamara ibyumweru bibiri ari mu miziro nk’uko bigenda nyine iyo ari mu muhango w’abakobwa. Hanyuma nanone azamara iminsi mirongo itandatu n’itandatu ategereje ko amaraso ye asukurwa." 
Leviticus12:6 Igihe cy’isukurwa rye nikirangira, yaba yabyaye umuhungu cyangwa umukobwa, azasanga umuherezabitambo ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Ubwo azaba amuzaniye umwana w’intama wo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa, hamwe n’inuma cyangwa intungura zo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Leviticus12:7 Ibyo byose umuherezabitambo abimurika imbere y’Uhoraho, maze yamara gukorera kuri uwo mubyeyi umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha, akaba amusukuye ubwandu yatewe no kuva amaraso.» Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye umugore wabyaye umuhungu cyangwa umukobwa." 
Leviticus12:8 «Niba uwo mubyeyi adashobora kubona umwana w’intama, azafate inuma ebyiri cyangwa intungura ebyiri; imwe iturweho igitambo gitwikwa, indi ayitureho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo umuherezabitambo amaze kumukoreraho umuhango wo kumusukura, ubwo nyine aba asukuwe.»" 
Leviticus13:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Leviticus13:2 «Ku mubiri w’umuntu nihavukaho ikibyimba, amahumane cyangwa isekera, maze bikamuviramo indwara yo mu bwoko bw’ibibembe, bazamushyikirize umuherezabitambo Aroni, cyangwa undi muherezabitambo mu bahungu be." 
Leviticus13:3 Umuherezabitambo asuzume iyo ndwara yo ku mubiri. Niba ubwoya bwo muri icyo gisebe bwererana, kandi kikaba kirigita mu mubiri, azamenye ko ari ibibembe. Umuherezabitambo namara kumusuzuma, azatangaza ko uwo muntu yahumanye." 
Leviticus13:4 Iyo ku mubiri hari ibara ryera, ariko uruhu rutarigise mu nyama kandi n’ubwoya butahindutse umweru, umuherezabitambo aha uwo murwayi akato mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus13:5 Ku munsi wa karindwi, umuherezabitambo ni bwo yongera kumusuzuma. Iyo asanze uburwayi butiyongereye ngo busatire undi mubiri, umuherezabitambo arongera akamuha akato mu kindi gihe cy’iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus13:6 Ku munsi wa karindwi umuherezabitambo amusuzuma bundi bushya. Iyo asanze uburwayi bwasibanganye, butakomeje ngo busatire undi mubiri, ubwo riba ryari isekera. Umuherezabitambo rero ahita atangaza ko uwo muntu adahumanye. Ubwo na we amesa imyambaro ye, maze akaba asukuwe." 
Leviticus13:7 Ariko umuherezabitambo najya kwemeza ko uwo murwayi atahumanye, hanyuma uwo muntu agasanga isekera risatira undi mubiri," 
Leviticus13:8 azongere yisuzumishe ku muherezabitambo bundi bushya. Isekera rero niriba ryarasatiriye undi mubiri, bizaba ari ibibembe. Ubwo umuherezabitambo azatangaza ko uwo muntu yanduye." 
Leviticus13:9 Nihagira umuntu ufatwa n’indwara yo mu bwoko bw’ibibembe, bazamushyire umuherezabitambo," 
Leviticus13:10 maze amusuzume. Nasanga ku mubiri we inyama zanamye mu kibyimba cyererana, kandi ubwoya bwarahindutse umweru," 
Leviticus13:11 bizaba ari ibibembe byamwaritse mu mubiri. Ubwo umuherezabitambo azahita atangaza ko uwo muntu yanduye. Ntazirushye yigora ngo aramuha akato, biba bigaragara ko yanduye." 
Leviticus13:12 Nyamara niba ibyo bibembe byasheshe ku mubiri wose bikawupfukirana kuva ku mutwe kugeza ku birenge," 
Leviticus13:13 umuherezabitambo azasuzuma ubwo burwayi. Ibibembe nibiba bikwiriye ku mubiri wose n’ubwoya bukaba bwahindutse umweru, umuherezabitambo azatangaza ko uwo murwayi atanduye." 
Leviticus13:14 Ariko ku mubiri we inyama nizanama, azaba yanduye." 
Leviticus13:15 Inyama iyo zanamye ziranduza, biba ari ibibembe. Iyo rero umuherezabitambo amaze kubisuzuma, atangaza ko uwo muntu yanduye." 
Leviticus13:16 Iyo izo nyama zanamye zongeye zigahinduka umweru, umurwayi asanga umuherezabitambo," 
Leviticus13:17 maze akisuzumisha. Kuko rero aharwaye hazaba habaye umweru, umuherezabitambo atangaza ko iyo ndwara itanduza. Umurwayi na we aba asukuwe." 
Leviticus13:18 Niba ku mubiri w’umuntu harigeze ikibyimba ariko kigakira," 
Leviticus13:19 nyuma mu nkovu hakavukamo uruheri rwererana cyangwa hakazaho ibara ry’umweru uvanze n’ikigina," 
Leviticus13:20 uwo muntu nyine azisuzumishe ku muherezabitambo. Iryo bara niba ryaracengeye mu mubiri kandi n’ubwoya bwarahindutse umweru, umuherezabitambo azatangaza ko uwo muntu yanduye. Izaba ari indwara y’ubwoko bw’ibibembe itangiye gusesa ahahoze hari ikibyimba." 
Leviticus13:21 Ariko nanone niba asuzumye agasanga nta rwoya rw’umweru ruhari, n’iryo bara ritaracengeye mu mubiri, ahubwo rikaba risa n’irisibangana, umuherezabitambo azahe uwo muntu akato mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus13:22 Niba iryo bara rikomeje gusatira undi mubiri, umuherezabitambo atangaza ko uwo murwayi yanduye. Iyo iba ari indwara." 
Leviticus13:23 Niba ariko ryagumye hamwe ntirisatire undi mubiri, iba ari inkovu ya cya kibyimba, umuherezabitambo atangaza ko uwo muntu atanduye." 
Leviticus13:24 Urundi rugero rw’indwara yo ku mubiri: umuntu natwikwa n’umuriro maze mu gisebe hakavukamo ibara ry’umweru w’ikigina," 
Leviticus13:25 umuherezabitambo azamusuzume. Nasanga ubwoya bwarahindutse umweru kandi igisebe na cyo gicengera mu mubiri, bizaba ari ibibembe bishaka gusesa mu bushye. Izaba ari indwara yo mu bwoko bw’ibibembe; umuherezabitambo azatangaze ko uwo muntu yanduye." 
Leviticus13:26 Ariko kandi nasuzuma agasanga nta bwoya bwera buhari, n’igisebe kikaba cyaragumye hamwe ntigicengere mu mubiri, umuherezabitambo azahe uwo muntu akato mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus13:27 Ku munsi wa karindwi umuherezabitambo azasuzuma, maze nasanga icyo gisebe cyarasatiriye undi mubiri, atangaze yuko uwo muntu yanduye. Izaba ari indwara yo mu bwoko bw’ibibembe." 
Leviticus13:28 Ariko, niba iryo bara ryaragumye hamwe, ndetse rigasa n’irisibangana aho gusatira undi mubiri, buzaba ari ububyimba butewe n’ubushye. Kuko izaba ari inkovu y’ubushye, umuherezabitambo azatangaze ko uwo muntu atanduye." 
Leviticus13:29 Umugabo cyangwa umugore nibafatwa n’igisebe ku mutwe cyangwa ku kananwa," 
Leviticus13:30 umuherezabitambo azabasuzume. Icyo gisebe nikiba gisa n’icyacengeye mu mubiri, ubwoya bwaho bukaba butatanye kandi bwarahindutse ikigina, umuherezabitambo azatangaza ko uwo muntu yanduye. Ibyo biba ari ibihushi, ni ukuvuga ibibembe byo mu mutwe cyangwa ku kananwa." 
Leviticus13:31 Ariko nanone, nasuzuma ibyo bihushi agasanga bidacengera mu mubiri, n’ubwo nta bwoya bw’umukara buzaba buhari, umuherezabitambo azahe uwo murwayi akato mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus13:32 Ku munsi wa karindwi, umuherezabitambo azasuzuma iyo ndwara. Iyo asanze ubwoya butarahindutse ikigina, ibihushi na byo ntibibe byarasatiriye undi mubiri cyangwa ngo bicengere imbere mu nyama," 
Leviticus13:33 umuherezabitambo asaba umurwayi kwiyogoshesha ahandi hose agasiga aharwaye. Hanyuma umuherezabitambo arongera agaha uwo murwayi akato mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi. 
Leviticus13:34 Ku munsi wa karindwi, umuherezabitambo asuzuma ibyo bihushi. Iyo bitasatiriye undi mubiri cyangwa ngo bicengere imbere mu ruhu, umuherezabitambo atangaza ko uwo muntu atanduye. Uwo murwayi na we iyo amaze kumesa imyenda ye, ubwo aba asukuye." 
Leviticus13:35 Ariko rero, iyo yamaze gutangaza ko uwo muntu atanduye, maze nyuma akabona ibihushi byasatiriye undi mubiri," 
Leviticus13:36 umuherezabitambo arongera akamusuzuma. Kuko rero ibihushi bizaba byasatiriye undi mubiri, umuherezabitambo ntazirirwe areba ko ubwoya bwahindutse ikigina; uwo muntu aba yaranduye." 
Leviticus13:37 Ariko rero iyo asanze harameze ubwoya bw’umukara, ibihushi na byo bitariyongereye ndetse ahubwo byarakize, uwo murwayi aba asukuye. Umuherezabitambo na we atangaza ko uwo muntu atanduye." 
Leviticus13:38 Ku mubiri w’umugabo cyangwa w’umugore nihazaho ibibara byera," 
Leviticus13:39 umuherezabitambo azabisuzume. Ibyo bibara byo ku ruhu nibiba bifite ibara ry’umweru w’ikigina, kizaba ari ikibibi cyavutse ku mubiri. Ukirwaye kandi ntazaba yanduye." 
Leviticus13:40 Niba umuntu apfutse imisatsi, umutwe we ugasigara ari imbuga, aba asukuye." 
Leviticus13:41 Niba umuntu apfutse umusatsi w’imbere, umutwe w’imbere ugasigarana ubwambure, aba asukuye." 
Leviticus13:42 Nyamara muri urwo ruhara rwo mu gihorihori cyangwa mu masoso, nihavukamo igisebe cy’umweru w’ikigina, bizaba ari ibibembe byahasheshe." 
Leviticus13:43 Umuherezabitambo azasuzuma iyo ndwara. Niba icyo gisebe cyo mu gihorihori cyangwa mu masoso gifite ibara ry’umweru w’ikigina, kandi kikaba gisa n’ibibembe by’uruhu," 
Leviticus13:44 uwo muntu aba yaranduye kuko ari umunyabibembe. Uwo murwayi aba yafashwe n’ibibembe ku mutwe; umuherezabitambo rero atangaza ko uwo muntu yanduye. 
Leviticus13:45 Umubembe wafashwe n’iyo ndwara yambara imyenda y’ibishwangi ntasokoze umusatsi we, ndetse n’ubwanwa bwe akabupfuka. Ubundi kandi aho ageze agomba kurangurura ati «Uwahumanye! Uwahumanye!»" 
Leviticus13:46 Aba yaranduye kuko nyine indwara yamufashe iba ihumanya. Azatura ukwe wenyine, urugo rwe azarushinga kure y’ingando." 
Leviticus13:47 Hari ubwo umwambaro ukoze mu bwoya bw’intama cyangwa muri hariri ushobora kugwaho ibirabagwe by’ibibembe. 
Leviticus13:48 Ari ku mwambaro udoze mu mwenda, ari ku mupira uboshye mu bwoya bw’intama cyangwa muri hariri, ari ku mpu cyangwa ku kintu icyo ari cyo cyose kizikozemo," 
Leviticus13:49 ibyo bibara nibiba icyatsi kibisi cyangwa umutuku bizaba ari ibirabagwe by’ibibembe. Umuherezabitambo azagomba kubisuzuma. 
Leviticus13:50 Umuherezabitambo namara gusuzuma icyo kintu cyanduye, azagifungirana ahantu mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus13:51 Ku munsi wa karindwi, umuherezabitambo arongera agasuzuma icyo kirabagwe kiri ku mwambaro udoze mu mwenda, ku mupira uboshye cyangwa ku kintu gikoze mu ruhu icyo ari cyo cyose. Nasanga rero ibyo bibara byariyongereye, ubwo bizaba ari ibirabagwe by’ibibembe bihari. Icyo kintu biriho na cyo kiba cyanduye." 
Leviticus13:52 Uwo mwambaro, waba udoze mu mwenda, waba uboshye mu bwoya bw’intama, muri hariri se cyangwa ukoze mu ruhu, bazawutwika. Icyo kintu kigomba gutwikwa kuko ibibembe biba byakigezemo." 
Leviticus13:53 Ariko rero, iyo umuherezabitambo asuzumye uwo mwambaro udoze mu mwenda, uwo mupira, cyangwa icyo kintu gikoze mu ruhu icyo ari cyo cyose, agasanga icyo kibara kitariyongereye," 
Leviticus13:54 ategeka kumesa icyo kintu cyanduye, maze akagifungirana ahantu mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus13:55 Iyo bamaze kumesa, umuherezabitambo arongera agasuzuma. Iyo asanze icyo kirabagwe kitarahinduye ibara, n’ubwo cyaba kitiyongereye, icyo kintu kiba cyaranduye. Uzagitwike. Uwo mwambaro, ibibembe biba byarawononnye biturutse imbere cyangwa inyuma." 
Leviticus13:56 Ariko nibamara kumesa, umuherezabitambo yasuzuma agasanga cya kibara gisa n’igisibangana, azagikata maze acyomore kuri uwo mwambaro ukoze mu mwenda, mu ruhu cyangwa mu mupira." 
Leviticus13:57 Nyuma y’ibyo cya kibara nikigaruka kuri uwo mwambaro, buzaba ari ubututike bw’ibibembe, muzahite muwutwika." 
Leviticus13:58 Umwambaro udoze mu mwenda, umupira cyangwa ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose gikoze mu ruhu, iyo ukimeshe, ikirabagwe kigasibangana, urongera ukakimesa bwa kabiri, maze kikaba gisukuwe.»" 
Leviticus13:59 Ngayo amategeko yerekeye ibirabagwe by’ibibembe bitunguka ku mwambaro udoze mu bwoya bw’intama cyangwa muri hariri, ku mupira, cyangwa ku kintu icyo ari cyo cyose gikoze mu ruhu; ayo mabwiriza ni yo azatuma bemeza ko ibyo bintu byanduye cyangwa bitanduye." 
Leviticus14:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus14:2 «Dore umuhango muzakurikiza, umunsi muzasukura umubembe: Muzamushyikiriza umuherezabitambo," 
Leviticus14:3 maze na we amusohokane kure y’ingando, abe ariho amusuzumira. Uwo muntu umaze gukira indwara yo mu bwoko bw’ibibembe, agashaka kwisukura," 
Leviticus14:4 umuherezabitambo azamutegeka kuzana inyoni ebyiri nzima zisukuye, umwenda w’umuhemba hamwe n’amashami ya sederi na hisopo." 
Leviticus14:5 Umuherezabitambo azategeka kwicira inyoni ya mbere hejuru y’urwabya rw’ibumba rurimo amazi yo mu iriba. 
Leviticus14:6 Azafata inyoni nzima isigaye hamwe n’umwenda w’umuhemba, ishami rya sederi n’irya hisopo; abyinike mu maraso ya ya nyoni biciye hejuru y’amazi yo mu iriba." 
Leviticus14:7 Namara kuminjagira incuro ndwi kuri wa wundi ushaka kwisukuraho ibibembe, azatangaza ko asukuwe. Ubwo umuherezabitambo azarekura ya nyoni nzima yigire ku gasozi." 
Leviticus14:8 Ushaka kwisukura na we, azamesa imyambaro ye, yogoshe ubwoya bwose afite, yiyuhagire mu mazi, maze abe asukuwe. Nyuma azasubira mu ngando, ariko amare iminsi irindwi atarinjira mu ihema rye." 
Leviticus14:9 Ku munsi wa karindwi, azogosha ubwoya bwose afite, ku mutwe, ku kananwa no ku bitsike by’amaso. Azamesa kandi imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, maze abe asukuwe." 
Leviticus14:10 Ku munsi wa munani, azamurika abana b’intama babiri, umwana w’intama w’inyagazi ufite umwaka umwe kandi utagira inenge, urweso rw’amavuta hamwe n’utwibo dutatu tw’ifu ivanze n’amavuta." 
Leviticus14:11 Umuherezabitambo urangiza uwo muhango, amurika uwo muntu ugomba gusukurwa hamwe n’amaturo ye, imbere y’Uhoraho ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus14:12 Umuherezabitambo afata umwana w’intama wa mbere akawuturaho igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro, kigaherekezwa na rwa rwabya rw’amavuta. Ibyo byose umuherezabitambo abimurika imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus14:13 Uwo mwana w’intama awicira aho basanzwe bicira igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha cyangwa igitambo gitwikwa, ni ukuvuga ahantu hatagatifu. Kandi rero, ari igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro, ari n’igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, byose biba iby’umuherezabitambo. Ni ibintu bitagatifu." 
Leviticus14:14 Umuherezabitambo akoza urutoki mu maraso y’igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro, agasiga uwisukurisha ku kireberebe cy’ugutwi kw’iburyo, ku gikumwe cy’ikiganza cy’iburyo, no ku ino rinini ryo ku kirenge cy’iburyo." 
Leviticus14:15 Umuherezabitambo afata ya mavuta ari mu rwabya, akisukaho make mu kiganza cy’ibumoso." 
Leviticus14:16 Ayo mavuta yo ku rushyi rw’ibumoso, umuherezabitambo ayakozamo urutoki incuro ndwi imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus14:17 Amavuta asigaye ku rushyi, umuherezabitambo ayasiga uwisukurisha ku kireberebe cy’ugutwi kw’iburyo, ku gikumwe cy’ikiganza cy’iburyo, no ku ino rinini ryo ku kirenge cy’iburyo. Ubwo nyine asiga ayo mavuta aho yasize ya maraso y’igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro." 
Leviticus14:18 Amavuta asigaye ku rushyi, umuherezabitambo ayasiga uwisukurisha ku mutwe, maze imbere y’Uhoraho, akamukoreraho umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha." 
Leviticus14:19 Ubwo noneho umuherezabitambo atura igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, maze agakorera ku wisukurisha umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho ubwandure. Hanyuma yica itungo rigenewe igitambo gitwikwa," 
Leviticus14:20 maze akakimurikira ku rutambiro hamwe n’ituro ry’ifu. Umuherezabitambo arangiza akorera ku wisukurisha umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho ubwandure, maze akaba asukuwe." 
Leviticus14:21 Niba uwanduye ari umukene, akaba adashobora kubona ibyo byose, azazane umwana w’intama umwe awumurikeho igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro, kugira ngo bamukorereho umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho ubwandure. Azamurika kandi ituro ry’akebo kamwe k’ifu ivugishije amavuta hamwe n’urwabya rw’amavuta. Akurikije uko yifite," 
Leviticus14:22 azongeraho inuma ebyiri cyangwa intungura ebyiri, imwe ibe iy’igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, indi na yo ibe iy’igitambo gitwikwa." 
Leviticus14:23 Ku munsi wa munani, naza kwisukurisha, ibyo byose azabishyikiriza umuherezabitambo imbere y’Uhoraho, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus14:24 Umuherezabitambo azafata wa mwana w’intama w’igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro hamwe na rwa rwabya rw’amavuta, maze abimurike imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus14:25 Namara kwica umwana w’intama w’igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro, amaraso yawo azayasiga uwisukurisha ku kireberebe cy’ugutwi kw’iburyo, ku gikumwe cy’ikiganza cy’iburyo, no ku ino rinini ryo ku kirenge cy’iburyo." 
Leviticus14:26 Umuherezabitambo asuka amavuta make mu kiganza cy’ibumoso. 
Leviticus14:27 Ayo mavuta yo ku rushyi rw’ibumoso, umuherezabitambo ayakozamo urutoki rw’ikiganza cy’iburyo, maze akayaminjagira incuro ndwi imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus14:28 Naho ayo mavuta ari ku rushyi, umuherezabitambo ayasiga uwisukurisha ku kireberebe cy’ugutwi kw’iburyo, ku gikumwe cy’ikiganza cy’iburyo, no ku ino rinini ry’ikirenge cy’iburyo. Ubwo nyine asiga ayo mavuta aho yasize ya maraso y’igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro." 
Leviticus14:29 Amavuta asigaye ku rushyi, umuherezabitambo ayasiga uwisukurisha ku mutwe, maze imbere y’Uhoraho, akamukoreraho umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho ubwandure." 
Leviticus14:30 Uwisukurisha naba yazanye inuma cyangwa intungura, mbese muri izo nyoni azaba yashoboye kubona," 
Leviticus14:31 imwe izaturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, indi na yo ibe iy’igitambo gitwikwa kigaherekeza ituro ry’ifu. Nyuma y’ibyo, umuherezabitambo akorera ku wisukurisha umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho ubwandure, imbere y’Uhoraho.»" 
Leviticus14:32 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye umubembe w’umukene utashobora kubona ibya ngombwa byajyana n’umuhango wo kumusukura. 
Leviticus14:33 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Leviticus14:34 «Nimumara kugera mu gihugu cya Kanahani nabeguriye, maze ngashyira ibibara by’ibibembe mu nzu y’icyo gihugu kizaba icyanyu," 
Leviticus14:35 nyiri iyo nzu nyine azajya kubimenyesha umuherezabitambo. Azamubwira ati «Nabonye ibibara bisa n’iby’ibibembe mu nzu yanjye.» 
Leviticus14:36 Umuherezabitambo azategeka ko iyo nzu bayikuramo ibirimo byose, mbere y’uko yinjiramo ngo asuzume ibyo bibara. Ibyo bizatuma nta kintu cyo muri iyo nzu cyandura. Nibirangira, umuherezabitambo azinjira muri iyo nzu kugira ngo asuzume ibyo bibara." 
Leviticus14:37 Nasanga bisa n’ibicengera mu rukuta, kandi byariyashijemo imitutu y’icyatsi kibisi cyangwa itukura," 
Leviticus14:38 umuherezabitambo azasohoka, maze nagera ku muryango w’ihema, iyo nzu ayifunge mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus14:39 Ku munsi wa karindwi, umuherezabitambo azagaruka maze yongere asuzume. Nasanga ibyo bibara bishaka gukwira ku nkuta z’inzu," 
Leviticus14:40 umuherezabitambo azategeka ko amabuye yanduye bayomora, maze bakayajugunya hirya y’umugi, ahantu hahumanye." 
Leviticus14:41 Ibitaka byose byanduriye ku nkuta mu nzu imbere, bazabiharure maze babisuke hirya y’umugi, ahantu hahumanye." 
Leviticus14:42 Bazashaka andi mabuye bayasimbuze aya mbere, kandi bafate urundi rwondo bahome ya nzu bundi bushya." 
Leviticus14:43 Hari ubwo bakomora ya mabuye, bagaharura icyondo, ndetse bakongera guhoma bundi bushya, ariko bya bibara bikanga bikagaruka kuri ya nzu." 
Leviticus14:44 Icyo gihe umuherezabitambo azagenda yongere asuzume. Nasanga ibyo bibara byariyongereye, bizaba ari ibibembe byasabitse iyo nzu. Izaba yaranduye;" 
Leviticus14:45 muzayisenye. Ibizayivaho, ari amabuye, ibiti cyangwa urwondo byose muzabijyane hirya y’umugi, ahantu hahumanye." 
Leviticus14:46 Igihe cyose iyo nzu izaba ifunze, uzayinjiramo azaba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus14:47 Naho uzayiryamamo cyangwa akayiraramo, azagomba kumesa imyenda ye." 
Leviticus14:48 Cyakora rero, umuherezabitambo niyinjira, maze yasuzuma agasanga ibibara bitariyongereye bamaze guhoma bundi bushya, azatangaza ko iyo nzu itanduye. Izaba isukuye kuko ubwandu buzaba bwakize." 
Leviticus14:49 Kugira ngo ahumanure iyo nzu, azazana inyoni ebyiri, umwenda w’umuhemba, hamwe n’amashami y’ibiti bya sederi na hisopo." 
Leviticus14:50 Inyoni ya mbere azayicira hejuru y’urwabya rurimo amazi yo mu isoko. 
Leviticus14:51 Amashami y’ibiti bya sederi na hisopo, umwenda w’umuhemba, hamwe na ya nyoni ikiri nzima, azabyinika mu mazi yo mu isoko no mu maraso ya ya nyoni yapfuye. Ibyo byose azabiminjagira ya nzu incuro ndwi." 
Leviticus14:52 Nguko uko azahumanura iyo nzu, akoresheje amaraso y’inyoni, amazi yo mu isoko, inyoni nzima, umwenda w’umuhemba, hamwe n’amashami y’ibiti bya sederi na hisopo." 
Leviticus14:53 Umuherezabitambo kandi azarekura ya nyoni nzima igurukire hirya y’umugi ahagana ku gasozi, maze na we akorere kuri iyo nzu umuhango wo kuyihumanura. Nyuma y’ibyo rero, ni ho izaba isukuwe.»" 
Leviticus14:54 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye indwara zose zo mu bwoko bw’ibibembe; ari urushimba," 
Leviticus14:55 ari ibibara byo ku mwambaro cyangwa ku nzu," 
Leviticus14:56 ari ikibyimba, amahumane cyangwa isekera." 
Leviticus14:57 Ni amabwiriza asobanura igihe ikintu kiba cyanduye cyangwa kitanduye. Mbese ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye ibibembe. 
Leviticus15:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Leviticus15:2 «Dore ibyo muzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Iyo umugabo afashwe n’indwara ituma aninda ku gitsina, ubwo aba yanduye." 
Leviticus15:3 Igihe cyose igitsina cy’umugabo kizaba kininda cyangwa cyarazibye, azaba yaranduye. Azagengwa n’aya mategeko." 
Leviticus15:4 Uburiri bwose uwo mugabo azaba yaryamyeho, buzaba bwanduye. Ubundi kandi ikintu cyose uwo muntu azicaraho kizaba cyanduye." 
Leviticus15:5 Uzakora kuri ubwo buriri azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:6 Uzicara ku kintu cyose uninda igitsina yicayeho, azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:7 Uzakora ku mubiri w’uninda igitsina, azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:8 Umuntu usukuye, nacirwa amacandwe n’uninda igitsina, azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:9 Intebe yo ku ngamiya cyangwa ku ndogobe uninda igitsina azajya ku rugendo yicayeho, izaba yanduye." 
Leviticus15:10 Ukoze ku kintu uninda igitsina yicayeho, aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba. Uzikorera ikintu nk’icyo, na we azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:11 Umuntu wese uzakorwa n’uninda igitsina atakarabye, azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:12 Umuntu uninda igitsina nakora ku gikoresho cyo mu ibumba, bazakimene. Nakora ku cyabajwe mu giti, bazacyogeshe amazi." 
Leviticus15:13 Iyo ndwara yo kuninda igitsina nikira, uwo mugabo azabare iminsi irindwi, nuko kuri uwo wa karindwi amese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire amazi yo mu isoko, bityo abe asukuwe." 
Leviticus15:14 Ku munsi wa munani, azafate inuma ebyiri n’intungura ebyiri, maze mu maso y’Uhoraho azishyikirize umuherezabitambo ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus15:15 Muri izo nyoni, imwe umuherezabitambo azayituraho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, indi ayitureho igitambo gitwikwa. Nyuma y’ibyo, umuherezabitambo azakorera kuri uwo muntu umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho ubwandu yatewe no kuninda igitsina." 
Leviticus15:16 Umugabo natakaza intanga, aziyuhagire umubiri wose, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:17 Izo ntanga nizigwa ku mwambaro cyangwa ku kindi gikoresho gikoze mu ruhu, muzabimese kuko biba byanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:18 Umugore naryamana n’umugabo, baziyuhagire kuko baba banduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:19 Umugore nafatwa no kuva, maze amaraso agasohoka mu gitsina cye, azamara iminsi irindwi ari mu mihango y’abakobwa. Uzamukoraho wese azaba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:20 Naba ari muri iyo mihango y’abakobwa, ikintu cyose azicaraho cyangwa akakiryamaho, kizaba cyanduye." 
Leviticus15:21 Umuntu wese uzakora ku buriri bwe, aziyuhagire, amese imyenda ye, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:22 Umuntu wese uzakora ku kintu cyose uwo mugore yicayeho, aziyuhagire, amese imyenda ye, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:23 Ikintu kizaba kiri aho yicaye cyangwa ku buriri bwe, uzagikoraho azaba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:24 Iyo umugabo atinyutse kuryamana n’uwo mugore, amara iminsi irindwi yanduye, kandi n’uburiri aryamyeho bwose, buba bwanduye." 
Leviticus15:25 Hari ubwo umugore yafatwa n’indwara yo kuva, akamara iminsi irenga iyo imihango y’abakobwa isanzwe imara. Muri icyo gihe cyose aba ava, ubwandu bwe arabugumana nk’uko nyine aba abufite iyo ari mu mihango y’abakobwa." 
Leviticus15:26 Nk’uko bigenda iyo ari mu mihango y’abakobwa, muri icyo gihe cyo kuva, uburiri azaryamaho cyangwa ikintu cyose azicarira, kizaba cyanduye." 
Leviticus15:27 Ibyo bintu uzabikoraho wese, azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba." 
Leviticus15:28 Iyo ndwara yo kuva amaraso iyo ikize, uwo mugore abara iminsi irindwi, maze kuri uwo wa karindwi akaba asukuwe." 
Leviticus15:29 Ku munsi wa munani, afata inuma ebyiri, akazishyikiriza umuherezabitambo ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus15:30 Muri izo nyoni, imwe umuherezabitambo ayituraho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, indi akayituraho igitambo gitwikwa. Nyuma y’ibyo, imbere y’Uhoraho, umuherezabitambo akorera kuri uwo mugore umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho ubwandu yatewe no kuva amaraso." 
Leviticus15:31 Abayisraheli bazaba baranduye, muzabamenyeshe ko bagomba kugendera kure Ingoro yanjye, kugira ngo batayanduza maze bikababyarira urupfu.»" 
Leviticus15:32 Ayo ni yo mategeko yerekeye umugabo wafashwe n’indwara yo kuninda igitsina, uwatakaje intanga," 
Leviticus15:33 cyangwa umugore uri mu mihango y’abakobwa. Mbese ayo mategeko yerekeye umuntu wese wafashwe n’indwara yo kuninda igitsina, hamwe n’umugabo waryamanye n’umugore wanduye." 
Leviticus16:1 Nyuma y’urupfu rw’abahungu babiri ba Aroni bazize gutura Uhoraho ibyotezo bitamukwiriye," 
Leviticus16:2 Uhoraho nyine abwira Musa, ati «Umenyeshe umuvandimwe wawe Aroni ko atagomba kwinjira mu Ngoro yanjye igihe ashakiye cyose, ngo arenge umubambiko uteganye n’urwicurizo ruri hejuru y’ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano. Ibyo bizamurinda gupfa igihe nzigaragariza mu gicu hejuru y’urwicurizo." 
Leviticus16:3 Dore uko Aroni azitegura mbere yo kwinjira mu Ngoro: azitwaze ikimasa kigenewe guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, hamwe n’isekurume y’intama igenewe igitambo gitwikwa." 
Leviticus16:4 Azambare ikanzu ntagatifu ikoze muri hariri, amakabutura ya hariri, akenyere umukandara wa hariri, kandi n’umutwe we awuzingurizeho igitambaro cya hariri. Kuko iyo myambaro ari mitagatifu, azayambare amaze kwiyuhagira umubiri wose." 
Leviticus16:5 Nyuma y’ibyo Abayisraheli bazamushyikirize amasekurume abiri y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa. 
Leviticus16:6 Cya kimasa, Aroni azagituraho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha cye, maze yikorereho umuhango uhanagura icyaha, anawukorere ku nzu ye." 
Leviticus16:7 Za sekurume z’intama ebyiri, azazishyira imbere y’Uhoraho, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Leviticus16:8 maze azikorereho ubufindo, kugira ngo atandukanye igenewe Uhoraho n’ihabwa Azazeli." 
Leviticus16:9 Izaba iy’Uhoraho, Aroni azayituraho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Leviticus16:10 Naho indi igenewe Azazeli, bazayishyira imbere y’Uhoraho ari nzima, bayikorereho umuhango wo guhanagura ibyaha, maze bayishumurire Azazeli mu butayu." 
Leviticus16:11 Cya kimasa, Aroni azagituraho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha cye, maze yikorereho umuhango uhanagura icyaha, anawukorere ku nzu ye. Nyuma, icyo kimasa cy’impongano y’icyaha cye, azacyica." 
Leviticus16:12 Azafata ku makara yakira ku rutambiro imbere y’Uhoraho, ayuzuze icyotezo; afate n’imibavu ihumura yuzuye amashyi; nuko ibyo byose abijyane inyuma y’umubambiko." 
Leviticus16:13 Uwo mubavu azawutwikira imbere y’Uhoraho, maze igicu cy’umwotsi wawo gitwikire urwicurizo ruri hejuru y’ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano." 
Leviticus16:14 Azakoza urutoki rwe mu maraso ya cya kimasa, maze aminjagire urwicurizo mu ruhande rw’iburengerazuba; hanyuma ahagarare imbere y’urwicurizo, aruminjagire incuro ndwi akoresheje urutoki." 
Leviticus16:15 Azica isekurume y’ihene igenewe igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha cy’umuryango, maze amaraso yayo ayajyane inyuma y’umubambiko. Nk’uko yagenjeje ya maraso y’ikimasa, andi na yo azayaminjagira urwicurizo ahagaze iruhande rwarwo n’imbere yarwo." 
Leviticus16:16 Ingoro na yo azayikoreraho umuhango utuma Abayisraheli bababarirwa ukwivumbura kwabo n’ibicumuro byabo, mbese ibyaha byabo byose. Uko ni ko azagenzereza n’ihema ry’ibonaniro, kuko riba hagati y’abayisraheli b’abanyabyaha." 
Leviticus16:17 Igihe umuherezabitambo yinjiye mu Ngoro kugira ngo ayikorere umuhango wo kuyisukura, nta muntu ugomba kuba ari mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, kugeza ubwo wa muherezabitambo nyine asohotse. Iyo akiriyo, akora umuhango wo guhanagura icyaha kuri we ubwe, ku nzu ye, no ku muryango wose w’Abayisraheli." 
Leviticus16:18 Nyuma y’ibyo, asohoka yerekeza ku rutambiro ruri imbere y’Uhoraho maze akarukoreraho umuhango wo kurusukura. Afata ku maraso y’ikimasa no ku maraso y’isekurume y’ihene, akayasiga ku mahembe y’urutambiro hirya no hino." 
Leviticus16:19 Akoza urutoki muri ayo maraso, maze akaminjagira urutambiro incuro ndwi. Bityo azaba arukijije ubwandure bwose bw’Abayisraheli, rube rusukuwe." 
Leviticus16:20 Iyo arangije gusukura Ingoro, n’ihema ry’ibonaniro ryose, n’urutambiro, umuherezabitambo amurika ya sekurume y’ihene ikiri nzima." 
Leviticus16:21 Aroni aramburira ibiganza bye ku mutwe wa ya sekurume y’ihene nzima, maze akayisabiraho imbabazi z’ibyaha byose by’Abayisraheli. Ibicumuro byabo, imyivumbagatanyo, mbese ibyaha byabo byose, abigereka kuri iyo sekurume, maze akayishumurira mu butayu iyobowe n’umuntu ubishinzwe." 
Leviticus16:22 Iyo sekurume y’ihene yohohana ibyaha byabo byose, ikabijyana mu butayu ahantu hatera. Namara gushumurira iyo sekurume y’ihene mu butayu," 
Leviticus16:23 Aroni azajye mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, yambure imyambaro ya hariri yambaye yinjira mu Ngoro, maze ayihabike." 
Leviticus16:24 Aziyuhagirira ahantu hasukuye, maze abone kongera kwambara imyambaro ye isanzwe. Ubwo rero, azasohoka, ature igitambo cye gitwikwa hamwe n’icy’umuryango. Azakora kandi umuhango wo guhanagura icyaha kuri we ubwe, no ku muryango wose." 
Leviticus16:25 Nyuma y’ibyo, ibinure bya ya matungo yatuweho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, azabitwikira ku rutambiro." 
Leviticus16:26 Umuntu uzaba yayoboye ya sekurume y’ihene igenewe Azazeli mu butayu, na we azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, maze abone gusubira mu ngando." 
Leviticus16:27 Cya kimasa na ya sekurume y’ihene byatuweho igitambo cy’impongano n’amaraso yabyo yajyanywe mu Ngoro ngo bayakoreshe umuhango wo gukiza ibyaha, bazabijyane hirya y’ingando, maze, ari impu, inyama cyangwa amayezi babitwike." 
Leviticus16:28 Uzabitwika na we azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi, maze abone gusubira mu ngando." 
Leviticus16:29 Iri rizababere itegeko ridakuka: Ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa karindwi, ari umunyagihugu kavukire cyangwa umunyamahanga ubarimo, mwese muzareke kurya, kandi mwoye kugira umurimo mukora." 
Leviticus16:30 Koko rero, kuri uwo munsi ni ho bazabakoreraho umuhango wo kubasukura. Ubwo rero, imbere y’Uhoraho, muzaba muhanaguweho ibyaha byanyu byose." 
Leviticus16:31 Uwo munsi uzababera nk’uw’isabato; ni umunsi w’ikiruhuko, kandi muzirinde kugira icyo murya. Iryo rizababere itegeko ridakuka." 
Leviticus16:32 Urangiza umuhango wo guhanagura ibyaha, ni umuherezabitambo wasutsweho amavuta yo gusiga, kandi akaba yareguriwe uwo murimo mu kigwi cya se. Aba yambaye imyenda ya hariri mitagatifu," 
Leviticus16:33 maze agakorera ku Ngoro, ku ihema ry’ibonaniro no ku rutambiro, umuhango wo guhanagura icyaha; azawukorera no ku bandi baherezabitambo no ku iteraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli." 
Leviticus16:34 Iryo ni itegeko ridakuka ryerekeye umuhango ugamije guhanagura ibyaha byose by’Abayisraheli. Uwo muhango nyine, ukorwa rimwe mu mwaka.» Abayisraheli bubahirije ibyo Uhoraho yari yarategetse Musa." 
Leviticus17:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus17:2 «Itegeko ry’Uhoraho rikurikira uzarimenyeshe Aroni, abahungu be, hamwe n’Abayisraheli bose." 
Leviticus17:3 Hari ubwo umuntu wo mu nzu ya Israheli ashobora kwica ikimasa cy’inkone, umwana w’intama, cyangwa ihene. Iyo abyiciye mu ngando cyangwa inyuma yayo," 
Leviticus17:4 ntabijyane ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro ngo abiture Uhoraho, ayo maraso aba yamennye aramuhama. Umuntu nk’uwo azacibwe mu muryango we." 
Leviticus17:5 Bityo Abayisraheli, aho guturira amatungo yabo ku gasozi, bazajya bayashyikiriza umuherezabitambo ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Ayo matungo azaniwe Uhoraho rero, bazajya bayamuturaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro." 
Leviticus17:6 Amaraso y’ibyo bitambo, umuherezabitambo, azayaminjagira ku rutambiro rw’Uhoraho ruri imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Ibinure na byo, umuherezabitambo azabitwika, bibe igitambo gifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus17:7 Ibyo bizarinda Abayisraheli kongera kubahiriza za ruhaya zirya zibuyera mu butayu, no kuzitura ibitambo bikojeje isoni. Kuva mu gisekuru kugera mu kindi, ibyo bizababera itegeko ridakuka." 
Leviticus17:8 Uzongere kandi ubabwire uti ’Umuntu wese wo mu nzu ya Israheli cyangwa umunyamahanga ubatuyemo, natura igitambo gitwikwa cyangwa igitambo kindi," 
Leviticus17:9 ntakijyane imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro kugira ngo akimurikire Uhoraho, uwo muntu nyine azacibwe mu muryango we." 
Leviticus17:10 Umuntu wese wo mu nzu ya Israheli cyangwa umunyamahanga ubatuyemo nibanywa amaraso, nzabarakarira maze mbace mu muryango wabo." 
Leviticus17:11 Impamvu y’ibyo ni uko ubuzima bw’ikiremwa buba mu maraso yacyo; kandi rero jyewe ayo maraso narayabahaye kugira ngo mukorere ku rutambiro umuhango wo kurokora ubuzima bwanyu. 
Leviticus17:12 Ni yo mpamvu nabwiye Abayisraheli ko nta n’umwe muri bo uzanywa amaraso, yaba umunyagihugu kavukire cyangwa umunyamahanga ubatuyemo." 
Leviticus17:13 Umuntu wese wo mu nzu ya Israheli cyangwa umunyamahanga ubatuyemo nahiga inyamaswa cyangwa inyoni iribwa maze akayica, amaraso yayo azayasuke hasi, ayarenzeho igitaka." 
Leviticus17:14 Impamvu ni uko, igihe cyose ikiremwa kiba kigihagaze, amaraso yacyo aba ari yo buzima bwacyo. Ni cyo gituma nabwiye Abayisraheli ko batazanywa amaraso y’ikiremwa icyo ari cyo cyose, kuko amaraso yacyo aba ari yo buzima bwacyo. Uzayanywa, azacibwe mu muryango we." 
Leviticus17:15 Umuntu wese, yaba umunyagihugu kavukire cyangwa umunyamahanga, narya itungo ryapfuye cyangwa ryatanyaguwe n’inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba, azamese imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire mu mazi kuko aba yanduye kugeza nimugoroba. Hanyuma, azaba asukuwe." 
Leviticus17:16 Utazamesa imyambaro ye, maze ngo yiyuhagire, icyaha cye kizamuhama.’»" 
Leviticus18:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus18:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu. Ibyakorwaga mu gihugu cya Misiri mwatuyemo, ntimuzabyigane." 
Leviticus18:3 Ibikorwa mu gihugu cya Kanahani ngiye kubatuzamo na byo, ntimuzabyishinge." 
Leviticus18:4 Ntimuzakurikize amategeko yabo, ahubwo muzafate imico nabatoje, kandi mwubahirize amabwiriza yanjye. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus18:5 Muzite ku mategeko yanjye kandi mufate imico yanjye. Umuntu uzubahiriza ibyo, ni we uzagira ubuzima. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus18:6 Ntihazagire n’umwe muri mwe wegera uwo bafitanye isano kugira ngo baryamane. Ndi Uhoraho. 
Leviticus18:7 Ntuzaryamane na nyoko; kuko kumwambika ubusa byaba ari ukubahuka so, na nyoko wakubyaye." 
Leviticus18:8 Ntuzaryamane na muka so, kuko kumwambika ubusa byaba ari ukubahuka so." 
Leviticus18:9 Ntuzaryamane na mushiki wawe, n’iyo muhuje so cyangwa nyoko gusa, yaba yaravukiye mu nzu yawe cyangwa yaravukiye ahandi." 
Leviticus18:10 Ntuzaryamane n’umwuzukuru wawe, kuko kumwambika ubusa, byaba ari ukwiyubahuka ubwawe." 
Leviticus18:11 Ntuzaryamane n’umwana wa muka so; kuko so aba yaramubyaye, aba ari mushiki wawe nyine." 
Leviticus18:12 Ntuzaryamane na nyogosenge, kuko aba asangiye umubiri umwe na so." 
Leviticus18:13 Ntuzaryamane na nyoko wanyu, kuko aba asangiye umubiri umwe na nyoko wakubyaye." 
Leviticus18:14 Ntuzaryamane n’umugore wa so wanyu, kuko waba wubahutse umuvandimwe wa so." 
Leviticus18:15 Ntuzaryamane n’umukazana wawe, kuko aba ari umugore w’umuhungu wawe, ntuzamwambike ubusa." 
Leviticus18:16 Ntuzaryamane n’umugore w’umuvandimwe wawe; kuko kumwambika ubusa byaba ari ukubahuka umuvandimwe wawe ubwe. 
Leviticus18:17 Nuba waryamanye n’umugore, ntuzasambanye umukobwa we; ndetse uzirinde kwegera abuzukuru be kuko baba basangiye umubiri umwe na we. Ubikoze byaba ari ishyano." 
Leviticus18:18 Umugore wawe naba akiriho, ntuzarongore umukobwa bava inda imwe, kuko wabatera amahari." 
Leviticus18:19 Umugore uri mu mihango y’abakobwa, aba yanduye, ntimuzaryamane." 
Leviticus18:20 Ntuzasambane n’umugore wa mugenzi wawe, byagukururira kwandura." 
Leviticus18:21 Ntuzagire n’umwe mu bana bawe utura Moleki umumutwikira, kandi ntuzasuzugure izina ry’Imana yawe. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus18:22 Umugabo ntazaryamane n’undi mugabo nk’uko aryamana n’umugore. Byaba ari ishyano. 
Leviticus18:23 Ntuzasambanye inyamaswa, byagutera kwandura. Ntihazagire kandi umugore uryamana na yo, byaba ari ukwitesha agaciro." 
Leviticus18:24 Ntimuzakurikize iyo migenzereze bitazabaviramo kwandura. Ni yo yanduje abanyamahanga nzirukana bakabahunga. 
Leviticus18:25 Igihugu cyabo cyaranduye, ni yo mpamvu nagihannye, nkaba ngiye kucyirukanamo abaturage bacyo." 
Leviticus18:26 Mwebwe, ari umunyagihugu kavukire cyangwa umunyamahanga ubatuyemo, muzirinde ayo mahano, maze mwite ku mategeko yanjye kandi mufate imico nabatoje." 
Leviticus18:27 Igihugu cya Kanahani cyahumanyijwe n’amahano abantu bababanjirijemo bakoze. 
Leviticus18:28 Mwebwe nimutagihumanya, sinzakibakuramo nk’uko nagenjereje abagituye mbere yanyu." 
Leviticus18:29 Ariko rero, umuntu wese uzakora na rimwe muri ayo mahano, azacibwe mu muryango we." 
Leviticus18:30 Muzakurikize amategeko yanjye, mwirinde iyo mico iteye isoni y’abababanjirije, kugira ngo bitabaviramo kwandura. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.»" 
Leviticus19:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus19:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Muzabe intungane, kuko jyewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu ndi intungane." 
Leviticus19:3 Buri muntu muri mwe azubahe se na nyina, kandi yizihize buri cyumweru umunsi wa Sabato. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:4 Ntimuzayoboke ibigirwamana cyangwa ngo mucure amashusho yabyo. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu. 
Leviticus19:5 Nimutura Uhoraho igitambo cy’ubuhoro, dore uko muzagenza kugira ngo gishimwe:" 
Leviticus19:6 Muzakirya umunsi cyatuweho ndetse na bukeye bwaho. Ibyaramuka bisigaye, ku munsi wa gatatu muzabitwike." 
Leviticus19:7 Uwabirengaho akakirya no ku munsi wa gatatu, yaba ariye inyama zanduye. Nta bwo yabishimirwa," 
Leviticus19:8 ndetse ahubwo icyaha cyo kuba yandaritse igitambo cy’Uhoraho, cyamuhama. Uwakora ibyo rero, yacibwa mu muryango we." 
Leviticus19:9 Nimusarura imirima yanyu, mu rubibi rwayo mujye muhasiga; ntimuzasubire inyuma ngo mujye guhumba imbuto zasigayeyo," 
Leviticus19:10 kandi numara gusarura imbuto z’imizabibu yawe, ntuzasubire inyuma ngo uhumbe izasigayemo, ahubwo mujye muzirekera abakene n’abanyamahanga. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:11 Ntuzibe mugenzi wawe, ntuzamubeshye cyangwa ngo umuhende ubwenge." 
Leviticus19:12 Ntuzarahize izina ryanjye mu binyoma, kuko waba usuzuguye izina ry’Imana yawe. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:13 Ntuzariganye mugenzi wawe cyangwa ngo umwibe; igihembo azaba yakoreye ntuzakirarane utakimuhaye. 
Leviticus19:14 Ntuzatuke igipfamatwi cyangwa ngo ushyire umutego imbere y’impumyi. Nugenza utyo, uzaba wubashye Imana yawe. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:15 Nimuca imanza ntimukaziyobye, ngo mubere umukene cyangwa umukire, ahubwo mujye mukiranura bagenzi banyu mukurikije ubutabera." 
Leviticus19:16 Uzirinde gusebya umuryango uvukamo, kandi ntuzashinje mugenzi wawe icyaha cyamucisha umutwe. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:17 Ntuzagirire umutima mubi umuvandimwe wawe, ariko mugenzi wawe nacumura, ntuzatinye kumuhana kugira ngo hato atazavaho agupfana." 
Leviticus19:18 Uzirinde kwihorera no kugirira inzika abo mu muryango wawe. Ahubwo uzakunde mugenzi wawe nkawe ubwawe. Ndi Uhoraho. 
Leviticus19:19 Muzakurikize amategeko yanjye. Amatungo yawe naba adahuje ubwoko, ntuzayabanguranye. Mu murima wawe, ntuzateremo imbuto ebyiri zinyuranye. Kandi ntuzambare imyenda yaboshywe mu ndodo z’amoko abiri anyuranye." 
Leviticus19:20 Hari ubwo umugabo ashobora kuryamana n’umuja w’inshoreke y’undi mugabo. Iyo uwo mugore atacunguwe cyangwa ngo ahabwe ubwigenge, uwo mugabo baryamanye azaha shebuja w’uwo muja indishyi. Cyakora ariko, nta bwo uwo mugabo azicwa kuko uwo mugore aba atarahawe ubwigenge." 
Leviticus19:21 Uwo mugabo wakoze icyaha ajyana isekurume y’intama ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, maze akayitura Uhoraho ho igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro." 
Leviticus19:22 Umuherezabitambo yifashisha iyo sekurume y’intama y’igitambo cy’indishyi y’akababaro, maze imbere y’Uhoraho, agakorera kuri uwo mugabo umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha yakoze. Nyuma y’ibyo, icyaha cye aba akibabariwe." 
Leviticus19:23 Nimugera mu gihugu cya Kanahani, maze mugatera ibiti by’amoko menshi, muzamenye ko imbuto zabyo zizaba zanduye. Ibyo biti bizamara imyaka itatu byanduye, muzirinde kubiryaho." 
Leviticus19:24 Umwaka wa kane nugera, izo mbuto muzaziture Uhoraho mu birori byo kumuhesha ikuzo." 
Leviticus19:25 Mu mwaka wa gatanu, ni ho muzaba mushobora kuzirya. Nimubigenza mutyo, ni ho umusaruro wanyu uzajya wiyongera. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:26 Ntimuzagire icyo murya kirimo amaraso. Muzirinde kuragura cyangwa gushika. 
Leviticus19:27 Ntuzogoshe uruziga mu mpande z’umusatsi wawe, kandi ntuzakate ubwanwa bwawe bwo mu misaya." 
Leviticus19:28 Nihagira umuntu upfa, ntimuzicishe indasago ku mubiri. Ubundi kandi muzirinde no kwicisha imanzi. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:29 Ntuzagayishe umukobwa wawe umushora mu busambanyi. Ibyo byatuma igihugu cyose cyandura uwo muco mubi maze kikuzuramo ingeso mbi. 
Leviticus19:30 Muzizihize iminsi yanjye ya sabato, kandi mwubahe Ingoro yanjye. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:31 Ntimuziyambaze abazimu cyangwa ngo mubisunge kuko byabaviramo kwandura. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu. 
Leviticus19:32 Umutwe wejeje imvi ujye uhaguruka uwubahirize, maze ujye ugirira umukambwe icyubahiro cyinshi. Nugenza utyo ni ho uzaba wubashye Imana yawe. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:33 Umusuhuke naza gutura mu gihugu cyanyu, ntimuzamukandamize." 
Leviticus19:34 Muzamufate nk’umunyagihugu kavukire, mbese nk’aho ari uwo muri mwe. Muzamukunde nkamwe ubwanyu, kuko namwe mwabaye abasuhuke mu gihugu cya Misiri. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:35 Nimukoresha ibipimo, ari iby’uburebure, ari iby’uburemere cyangwa iby’ubusukanure, ntimuzagire uwo muhuguza." 
Leviticus19:36 Iminzani yanyu hamwe n’amabuye yayo bizajye biba bitabeshya. Nimujya kugira icyo mugera, muzakoreshe akebo cyangwa ikibindi byemewe. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Leviticus19:37 Muzite ku mategeko yanjye yose, muyakurikize, kandi mufate imico yose nabatoje. Ndi Uhoraho.»" 
Leviticus20:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus20:2 Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Nihagira uwo muri mwe cyangwa umusuhuke ubana namwe utura Moleki umwe mu bana be, azicwe. Imbaga yose izamutere amabuye, apfe." 
Leviticus20:3 Jyewe, nzarakarira uwo muntu, muce mu muryango we, kuko azaba yatuye Moleki umwe mu bana be, akanduza Ingoro yanjye, kandi agasuzugura izina ryanjye ritagatifu." 
Leviticus20:4 Nihagira Abayisraheli birengagiza uwo muntu uzaba yatuye umwana we Moleki, maze bagatinya kumwica," 
Leviticus20:5 jye nzamurakarira we n’abe bose, hanyuma mbace mu muryango wabo. Uwo muntu, hamwe n’abandi bose bazamukurikiza bakayoboka Moleki, nzabaca mu muryango wabo." 
Leviticus20:6 Umuntu wese uzirukira abazimu maze akabisunga, nzamurakarira muce mu muryango we." 
Leviticus20:7 Nimwitagatifuze rero maze mube intungane, kuko jyewe Uhoraho, ari jye Mana yanyu." 
Leviticus20:8 Muzite ku mategeko yanjye kandi muyakurikize. Ndi Uhoraho ubatagatifuza. 
Leviticus20:9 Bityo rero, umuntu natuka se cyangwa nyina, azicwe. Kubera ko yatutse se na nyina, azaba yihamagariye urupfu." 
Leviticus20:10 Umugabo nasambanya umugore wa mugenzi we, bombi bazicwe; umugabo w’umusambanyi kimwe n’umugore." 
Leviticus20:11 Umuntu nasambana na muka se; ni nk’aho yakwambitse se ubusa, bombi bazicwe; ni bo bazaba bihamagariye urupfu." 
Leviticus20:12 Umugabo nasambanya umukazana we, bombi bazicwe; bazaba bitesheje agaciro kandi bihamagariye urupfu." 
Leviticus20:13 Umugabo naryamana n’undi nk’uko asambana n’umugore, bombi bazicwe kuko bazaba bakoze ishyano. Ni bo bazaba bihamagariye urupfu." 
Leviticus20:14 Umugabo narongora umukobwa na nyina, bazaba bakoze ishyano, bose uko ari batatu muzabatwike. Bityo, nta shyano nk’iryo rizongera kuba hagati yanyu." 
Leviticus20:15 Umuntu nasambana n’inyamaswa, muzamwicane na yo." 
Leviticus20:16 Nihagira umugore wemera inyamaswa ikamusambanya, muzamwicane na yo, ni we uzaba yihamagariye urupfu." 
Leviticus20:17 Umugabo narongora mushiki we basangiye se cyangwa nyina, maze bombi bakabonana bambaye ubusa, bizaba ari ishyano. Muzakoranya imbaga, maze mubace mu muryango wabo. Uwo mugabo aba yasambanije mushiki we, icyo cyaha cye kiba kigomba kumuhama." 
Leviticus20:18 Umugabo naryamana n’umugore uri mu mihango y’abakobwa, maze akamwambika ubusa, bombi bazacibwe mu muryango wabo; kubera ko uwo mugabo azaba yambitse ubusa isoko y’amaraso uwo mugore yavaga, n’uwo mugore ubwe akayambika ubusa." 
Leviticus20:19 Ntuzasambanye nyoko wanyu cyangwa nyogosenge. Uzabikora azaba yambitse ubusa uwo basangiye umubiri umwe; bombi rero, icyo cyaha kizabahama." 
Leviticus20:20 Umuntu naryamana n’umugore wa se wabo, ni nk’aho ari uwo muvandimwe wa se azaba yambitse ubusa. Nibabikora rero, icyo cyaha kizabahama, maze barinde basaza nta mwana babyaye." 
Leviticus20:21 Umugabo narongora umugore w’umuvandimwe we, azaba yiyanduje. Ni nk’aho ari mwene se aba yambitse ubusa. Nibabikora rero, bazarinda basaza nta mwana babyaye." 
Leviticus20:22 Muzubahirize amategeko yanjye, mufate imico nabatoje, kugira ngo ntazabirukana mu gihugu nzabinjizamo ngo mugiture." 
Leviticus20:23 Ntimuzakurikize amategeko y’abo ngiye kwirukana bakabahunga. Ayo mategeko bakurikizaga ni yo yatumye mbazinukwa 
Leviticus20:24 maze mwe ndababwira nti ’Ni mwebwe muzatunga igihugu cyabo, gitemba amata n’ubuki, kandi ni jye ukibagabiye ngo mugiture.’ Ni jye Uhoraho Imana yanyu wabahisemo mu yandi mahanga." 
Leviticus20:25 Mwebwe rero mujye mutandukanya inyamaswa n’inyoni zanduza n’izitanduza, kugira ngo zitazabahumanya. Izo nyoni zanduza n’ibindi byose bijagata ku butaka narabibabwiye kugira ngo mumenye ko bishobora kubahumanya." 
Leviticus20:26 Muzabe abanjye, mube intungane nk’uko jyewe Uhoraho ndi intungane. Nabahisemo mu yandi mahanga yose kugira ngo mube abanjye." 
Leviticus20:27 Muri mwe nihagira umugore cyangwa umugabo utinyuka kuragura cyangwa gushika, bazicishwe amabuye. Koko, ni bo ubwabo bazaba bihamagariye urupfu.»" 
Leviticus21:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha abaherezabitambo bene Aroni: Ntihazagire umuherezabitambo wegera intumbi y’umuntu wo mu muryango we, kuko byamuviramo kwandura." 
Leviticus21:2 Cyakora uwo mupfu naba ari mwene wabo wa bugufi basangiye umubiri umwe, azamwegere. Ni ukuvuga nyina, se, umuhungu we, umukobwa we, cyangwa umuvandimwe we." 
Leviticus21:3 Mushiki we na we, iyo apfuye akiri isugi, umuherezabitambo ashobora kumwegera akemera akiyanduza, kuko nta wundi mugabo wigeze kumutunga, kandi akaba akiri muri bene wabo ba bugufi." 
Leviticus21:4 Umuherezabitambo ni we mutware mu muryango we, azirinde rero kwiyanduza kuko byamutesha icyubahiro." 
Leviticus21:5 Abaherezabitambo ntibaziyogosheshe amasunzu, ntibaziyogoshe uruziga, cyangwa ngo bicishe indasago ku mubiri." 
Leviticus21:6 Abaherezabitambo bazegurirwa Imana, ni bo bazatura Uhoraho igitambo cy’ibiribwa. Bityo rero, bazahore ari intungane, maze boye gusuzuguza izina ry’Imana yabo." 
Leviticus21:7 Kuko beguriwe Imana, abaherezabitambo bazirinde kurongora umugore w’indaya, uw’icyomanzi cyangwa uwasenzwe n’undi mugabo." 
Leviticus21:8 Umuherezabitambo ni we utura Imana yawe igitambo cy’ibiribwa, ugomba kumenya rero ko ari intungane. Na we kandi azakubere intungane kuko jyewe Uhoraho ndi intungane, kandi ni jye ubatagatifuza." 
Leviticus21:9 Umukobwa w’umuherezabitambo niyitesha agaciro akigira icyomanzi, bazamutwike kuko ari se aba akojeje isoni." 
Leviticus21:10 Umuherezabitambo mukuru, ni we userukira abavandimwe be bose; ni we wasizwe amavuta kandi yemererwa kwambara imyambaro mitagatifu. Kubera izo mpamvu rero, ntazatendeze imisatsi ye cyangwa ngo atabure imyambaro ye." 
Leviticus21:11 Ntazagire intumbi n’imwe yegera, n’iyo yaba iya se cyangwa iya nyina, kuko byamuviramo kwandura." 
Leviticus21:12 Kuko yasizwe amavuta, ntazasohoke mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho kugira ngo atayisuzuguza. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus21:13 Umuherezabitambo mukuru agomba kurongora umukobwa ukiri isugi. 
Leviticus21:14 Azirinde gushaka umupfakazi cyangwa uwasenzwe n’undi mugabo cyangwa umugore wigize icyomanzi akitesha agaciro. Ahubwo azarongore umwari wo mu muryango we. 
Leviticus21:15 Ibyo bizarinda umuryango we kuvukamo abuzukuru bahumanye. Ndi Uhoraho, kandi ni jye ubatagatifuza.»" 
Leviticus21:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus21:17 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Aroni: Umuntu wo mu nkomoko yawe, naba afite ubumuga ku mubiri, azirinde gutura Uhoraho igitambo cy’ibiribwa. Ibyo kandi bizababere itegeko ridakuka kuva mu gisekuruza kugera mu kindi." 
Leviticus21:18 Koko rero, umuntu w’impumyi, ucumbagira, ufite izuru ribwataraye cyangwa amaboko yaremaye," 
Leviticus21:19 uwavunitse akaguru cyangwa akaboko," 
Leviticus21:20 uhetse inyonjo, uwazonzwe, ufite ijisho ry’umuturi, urwaye ubuheri cyangwa amahumane, ufite inturugunyu zamenetse, mbese umuntu wese urangwaho inenge, ntashobora kwegera Uhoraho." 
Leviticus21:21 Nuko rero umuntu wo mu nkomoko y’umuherezabitambo Aroni, naba yaramugaye, ntazature Uhoraho igitambo cy’ibiribwa. Kuko nyine aba ari ikimuga, ntazigore atura Imana ye igitambo cy’ibiribwa." 
Leviticus21:22 Cyakora ibyo biribwa by’Imana ari yo maturo matagatifu, ashobora kubiryaho," 
Leviticus21:23 ariko azirinde kwegera umubambiko cyangwa urutambiro. Abikoze kandi yaramugaye, yaba asuzuguje ingoro yanjye n’ibiyirimo, kuko ari jye Uhoraho ubatagatifuza.»" 
Leviticus21:24 Ibyo Musa yabimenyesheje Aroni n’abahungu be, hamwe n’Abayisraheli bose." 
Leviticus22:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus22:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Aroni n’abahungu be: Hari igihe bazajya birinda kwegera amaturo Abayisraheli bantura, kugira ngo badasuzuguza izina ryanjye ritagatifu." 
Leviticus22:3 Umuntu wo mu nkomoko yanyu naba arangwaho ubwandure, azirinde kwegera amaturo matagatifu Abayisraheli bantura. Uzabirengaho bazamwigiza kure yanjye. Kuva mu gisekuruza kugera mu kindi, ibyo bizababere itegeko ridakuka. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus22:4 Umuntu wo mu nkomoko ya Aroni naba arwaye ibibembe cyangwa aninda igitsina, azirinde kurya ku maturo matagatifu mbere y’uko yisukura. Umuntu wese wahumanye agomba kubigenza atyo, yaba uwandujwe no gukora undi wakoze intumbi, yaba uwatakaje intanga," 
Leviticus22:5 cyangwa uwandujwe n’akandi gasimba ako ari ko kose. 
Leviticus22:6 Uwakoze kuri ibyo bintu bihumanya rero, aba yanduye kugeza uwo munsi nimugoroba. Azarya ku maturo matagatifu ari uko amaze kwiyuhagira mu mazi." 
Leviticus22:7 Iyo izuba rirenze, uwo muntu aba asukuwe. Ubwo rero ni ho aba ashobora kurya ku maturo matagatifu kuko ari ibiribwa bye." 
Leviticus22:8 Ntazarye itungo ryipfushije cyangwa ryatanyaguwe n’inyamaswa, kuko byamuviramo kwandura. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus22:9 Bazakurikize amategeko yanjye kugira ngo ibyo biribwa bitazabakururira icyaha. Nibaramuka babisuzuguye, bazapfa. Ndi Uhoraho ubatagatifuza." 
Leviticus22:10 Umuntu wese utari umuherezabitambo azirinde kurya ibiribwa bitagatifu. Umushyitsi w’umuherezabitambo cyangwa umukozi, na bo ntibazabiryeho." 
Leviticus22:11 Ariko uwo umuherezabitambo azaba yaragabanye amutanzeho ikiguzi cy’ifeza, kimwe n’umugaragu wavukiye mu nzu ye, abo bazashobora kurya kuri ibyo biribwa." 
Leviticus22:12 Umukobwa w’umuherezabitambo narongorwa n’umugabo utari umuherezabitambo, ntazarye ku biribwa bigabanyijwe ku maturo matagatifu." 
Leviticus22:13 Cyakora hari ubwo umukobwa w’umuherezabitambo ashobora gupfakara cyangwa agasendwa n’umugabo nta mwana arabyara. Icyo gihe, iyo agiye kwa se agasubira uko yahoze akiri inkumi, ubwo aba ashobora kurya ku biribwa bya se, n’ubwo nta wundi muri rubanda ubiryaho." 
Leviticus22:14 Nihagira umuntu urya kuri ibyo biribwa bitagatifu atamenye ko bibujijwe, azariha ibingana na byo, yongereho na kimwe cya gatanu cyabyo, maze abihe umuherezabitambo." 
Leviticus22:15 Ntihazagire abasuzuguza ibyo Abayisraheli bagabanya ku maturo yabo bakabigenera Uhoraho. 
Leviticus22:16 Abazarya kuri ayo maturo matagatifu batabigenewe, bazaba bihamije icyaha bagomba kwicuza. Ndi Uhoraho ubatagatifuza.»" 
Leviticus22:17 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus22:18 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Aroni, abahungu be, hamwe n’Abayisraheli bose: Hari ubwo umuntu wo mu nzu ya Israheli cyangwa umunyamahanga uhatuye yakwifuza gutura Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa, ari ku bushake bwe cyangwa ari ukubera umuhigo yahize." 
Leviticus22:19 Kugira ngo rero ibyo bitambo mubishimirwe, mujye mutura imfizi itagira inenge iturutse mu bushyo bw’ibimasa, intama cyangwa ihene." 
Leviticus22:20 Muzirinde gutura itungo rifite inenge, nta bwo mwabishimirwa." 
Leviticus22:21 Nanone, hari ubwo umuntu yakwifuza gutura Uhoraho igitambo cy’ubuhoro, ari ku bushake bwe cyangwa ari ukubera umuhigo yahize. Icyo gitambo giturutse mu matungo maremare cyangwa amagufi, kugira ngo cyemerwe kigomba kuba kidafite ubwandu na busa." 
Leviticus22:22 Itungo ryahumanye, iryavunitse, iryataye urugingo, irirwaye ibisebe, ubuheri cyangwa amasekera, mbese irifite inenge iyo ari yo yose, rirabujijwe. Itungo nk’iryo ntimuzirirwe muritura Uhoraho cyangwa ngo muritwikire ku rutambiro kugira ngo rimubere ituro ry’ibiribwa bikongerejwe Uhoraho burundu." 
Leviticus22:23 Itungo rigufi cyangwa rirerire niriba ryararemaye cyangwa ryarazonzwe, ushobora kurituraho igitambo witangiye ku bushake bwawe. Ariko rero icyo gitambo nikiba ari icy’umuhigo wahize, iryo tungo ntirishobora kwemerwa." 
Leviticus22:24 Ntimuzature Uhoraho itungo rifite amabya yahenengeye n’iryayamenetse, cyangwa se iryakonwe n’iryashahuwe. Ibyo rwose ntimuzigere mubikora mu gihugu cyanyu." 
Leviticus22:25 Ntihazagire umunyamahanga ubaha amatungo nk’ayo ngo muyature Uhoraho ho ibiribwa. Kubera ko ayo matungo baba barayakuyeho urugingo, aba afite inenge. Muyatuye rero, nta bwo mwabishimirwa.»" 
Leviticus22:26 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus22:27 «Inyana, umwana w’intama cyangwa uw’ihene, nibimara kuvuka bizajya bimara iminsi irindwi iruhande rwa nyina. Guhera ku munsi wa munani, ni ho bizaba bishobora guturwa Uhoraho ho igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongejwe burundu, maze bikemerwa." 
Leviticus22:28 Cyakora, ntimuzice itungo, ari inka, intama cyangwa ihene, maze ngo muryicire umunsi umwe n’umwana waryo." 
Leviticus22:29 Nimutura Uhoraho igitambo cyo kumuhesha ikuzo, dore uko muzabigenza kugira ngo mugishimirwe:" 
Leviticus22:30 Muzakirya kuri uwo munsi cyose mwoye kugira na gato muraza. Ndi Uhoraho. 
Leviticus22:31 Muzamenye amategeko yanjye kandi muyakurikize. Ndi Uhoraho. 
Leviticus22:32 Muzirinde gusuzuguza izina ryanjye ritagatifu, bityo nzaba mbonye ikuzo hagati y’Abayisraheli. Ndi Uhoraho ubatagatifuza." 
Leviticus22:33 Ndi Uhoraho, wabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri kugira ngo mbabere Imana.»" 
Leviticus23:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus23:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Iminsi mikuru y’Uhoraho nigera, muzajya muhamagaza amakoraniro matagatifu. Ayo makoraniro tuzajya duhuriramo ni aya:" 
Leviticus23:3 Muzajya mumara iminsi itandatu mwikorera imirimo yanyu, ariko uwa karindwi, muwuharire isabato. Aho muzaba mutuye hose, kuri uwo munsi muzahamagaza ikoraniro ritagatifu. Ntimuzagire undi murimo mukora. Ni umunsi w’ikiruhuko, umunsi w’isabato y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus23:4 Iminsi mikuru y’Uhoraho ni iyi ikurikira. Kuri iyo minsi yateganijwe kandi, ni ho muzajya muhamagaza amakoraniro matagatifu." 
Leviticus23:5 Mu kabwibwi k’umunsi wa cumi n’ine w’ukwezi kwa mbere, ni Pasika y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus23:6 Ku munsi wa cumi n’itanu w’uko kwezi, hatangira iminsi mikuru y’imigati idasembuye, yagenewe Uhoraho. Muzamara iminsi irindwi murya imigati idasembuye." 
Leviticus23:7 Ku munsi wa mbere muzahamagaza ikoraniro ritagatifu, kandi mwoye kugira umurimo unaniza mukora." 
Leviticus23:8 Buri munsi muri iyo irindwi, muzatura Uhoraho igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongejwe burundu. Ku munsi wa karindwi, ni ho muzahamagaza ikoraniro ritagatifu kandi mwoye kugira umurimo unaniza mukora.»" 
Leviticus23:9 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus23:10 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Nimumara kugera mu gihugu nabahaye, maze mukeza imyaka, muzazanire umuherezabitambo umuba w’amahundo ya mbere y’umusaruro wanyu." 
Leviticus23:11 Ku munsi ukurikira Sabato, umuherezabitambo azaturira uwo muba imbere y’Uhoraho kugira ngo muwushimirwe." 
Leviticus23:12 Umunsi muzamurika uwo muba, muzature Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa cy’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe kandi utagira inenge." 
Leviticus23:13 Icyo gitambo kandi kizaherekezwa n’ituro ry’utwibo tubiri tw’ifu ivanze n’amavuta, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa cya kimwe cya kane cy’ikibindi cya divayi. Icyo ni cyo gitambo gikongokeye Uhoraho burundu kandi gifite impumuro imwurura." 
Leviticus23:14 Uwo munsi wo kumurika ituro ry’Imana yanyu nuba utaragera, muzirinde kurya ari imigati, ari amahundo yokeje cyangwa amabisi. Kuva ku gisekuruza kugera ku kindi, iryo rizababere itegeko ridakuka aho muzaba mutuye hose." 
Leviticus23:15 Kuva ku munsi ukurikira isabato, mbese kuva ku munsi muzaba mwatuye Uhoraho umuba w’amahundo ya mbere, muzatangire kubara ibyumweru birindwi byuzuye." 
Leviticus23:16 Nimugeza ku isabato ya karindwi mubara, umunsi uzakurikiraho uzaba ari uwa mirongo itanu." 
Leviticus23:17 Aho muzaba mutuye hose, muzasanga Uhoraho, mumuture imigati ibiri isembuye kandi ikoze mu ifu yuzuye utwibo tubiri. Uwo ni wo muganura ugomba guhabwa Uhoraho." 
Leviticus23:18 Uretse iyo migati kandi, Uhoraho muzamutura igitambo gitwikwa kigizwe n’ibi bikurikira: ikimasa kimwe, hamwe n’amasekurume y’intama abiri. Icyo gitambo gitwikwa kizaherekezwa n’ituro hamwe n’igitambo giseswa byategetswe. Icyo ni igitambo cy’ibiribwa gikongokeye Uhoraho burundu, kandi bifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Leviticus23:19 Ubundi kandi hari isekurume y’ihene izaturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, hamwe n’abana b’intama babiri b’umwaka umwe, bakazaba ab’igitambo cy’ubuhoro." 
Leviticus23:20 Ibyo byose, umuherezabitambo azabimurikira Uhoraho, maze ba bana b’intama babiri baherezwe hamwe na ya migati y’umuganura. Ibyo byose kandi ni amaturo matagatifu y’Uhoraho; ni umugabane w’umuherezabitambo." 
Leviticus23:21 Kuri uwo munsi nyine, muzahamagaze ikoraniro ritagatifu, kandi mwoye kugira umurimo unaniza mukora. Kuva mu gisekuruza kugera mu kindi, iryo rizababere itegeko ridakuka aho muzaba mutuye hose." 
Leviticus23:22 Nimusarura imirima yanyu, ku mbibi mujye muhasiga, kandi ntimuzasubire inyuma ngo muhumbe ibyasigayemo. Mujye mubiharira abakene n’abasuhuke. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.»" 
Leviticus23:23 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus23:24 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa karindwi, muzajye muruhuka. Ni umunsi w’urwibutso, ukaba kandi uwo guhimbaza Uhoraho mu ikoraniro ritagatifu." 
Leviticus23:25 Icyo gihe muzajya mutura Uhoraho igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongejwe burundu, kandi mwoye kugira umurimo unaniza mukora.»" 
Leviticus23:26 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus23:27 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Umunsi wa cumi w’uko kwezi kwa karindwi, ni umunsi mukuru w’imbabazi. Muzahamagaza ikoraniro ritagatifu, mwirinde kurya, kandi muture Uhoraho igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu." 
Leviticus23:28 Ntimuzagire umurimo unaniza mukora, kuko ari umunsi mukuru w’imbabazi, ukaba ari na wo mukorerwaho umuhango ubahanaguraho ibyaha imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus23:29 Bityo rero, utazasiba kurya ku munsi nk’uwo, azacibwa mu muryango we." 
Leviticus23:30 Uzakora umurimo unaniza ku munsi nk’uwo, na we nzamuca mu muryango we." 
Leviticus23:31 Ntimuzagire umurimo mukora, kandi kuva mu gisekuruza kugera mu kindi, iryo rizababere itegeko ridakuka aho muzaba mutuye hose." 
Leviticus23:32 Uwo munsi, muzirinde kurya. Kuri mwebwe ni nk’umunsi w’isabato, ukaba n’umunsi w’ikiruhuko. Kuva ku mugoroba w’umunsi wa cyenda w’uko kwezi, kugeza ku wundi mugoroba, muzubahirize icyo kiruhuko cy’isabato.»" 
Leviticus23:33 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus23:34 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Umunsi wa cumi n’itanu w’uko kwezi kwa karindwi, ni umunsi mukuru w’amahema. Ni igihe cy’ibirori byo guhesha ikuzo Uhoraho, kigomba kumara iminsi irindwi." 
Leviticus23:35 Ku munsi wa mbere, ntimuzagire umurimo unaniza mukora, ahubwo muzahamagaze ikoraniro ritagatifu." 
Leviticus23:36 Icyo cyumweru cyose, muzakimara mutura Uhoraho buri munsi igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongejwe burundu. Ku munsi wa munani, muzahamagaza ikoraniro ritagatifu, maze nanone muture Uhoraho igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu. Kuri uwo munsi ni ho muzasoza ibirori, ntimuzagire rero umurimo unaniza mukora." 
Leviticus23:37 Iyo ni yo minsi mikuru y’Uhoraho. Kuri iyo minsi ni ho muzahamagaza ikoraniro ritagatifu, maze mugatura Uhoraho ibi bikurikira: igitambo cy’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho burundu, igitambo gitwikwa cyangwa ibitambo biseswa, mukurikije imihango ya buri munsi." 
Leviticus23:38 Nanone kandi ibyo bizaza bisanga amaturo y’isabato y’Uhoraho, hamwe n’andi maturo asanzwe cyangwa ibitambo mumutura ku bushake bwanyu cyangwa kubera umuhigo mwahize." 
Leviticus23:39 Ku munsi wa cumi n’itanu w’ukwezi kwa karindwi nanone, nimumara gusarura imyaka mu mirima yanyu, muzasanga Uhoraho mu Ngoro ye, ngo mumukorere ibirori by’iminsi irindwi. Umunsi wa mbere n’uwa munani izaba iy’ikiruhuko." 
Leviticus23:40 Mu ntangiriro z’ibyo birori, muzitwaze imbuto ziryoshye cyane, amashami y’imikindo, ay’ibiti bisagambye kandi binini, hamwe n’ingemwe z’imikinga yo ku mugezi, kandi muzamara iminsi irindwi mwishimira imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus23:41 Buri mwaka muzasanga mutyo Uhoraho kugira ngo mumwizihize mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi. Ibyo birori bizajya biba mu kwezi kwa karindwi. Kuva mu gisekuruza kugera mu kindi, iryo rizababere itegeko ridakuka." 
Leviticus23:42 Umuyisraheli wese kavukire azamara iminsi irindwi aba mu mahema. 
Leviticus23:43 Uko ibisekuruza bizagenda bisimburana, ibyo bizatuma mwiyibutsa ko igihe nakuraga Abayisraheli mu gihugu cya Misiri nabatuje mu mahema. Ndi Uhoraho, Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus23:44 Nuko rero Musa amenyesha Abayisraheli uburyo bazajya babonana n’Uhoraho mu bihe by’iminsi mikuru. 
Leviticus24:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus24:2 «Tegeka Abayisraheli bakuzanire amavuta arongoroye y’imizeti agenewe ikinyarumuri, kuko amatara yacyo agomba guhora yakirana" 
Leviticus24:3 imbere y’umubambiko w’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano buri mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Aroni ni we uzategura ayo matara ku buryo ahora yakirana imbere y’Uhoraho. Kuva mu gisekuruza kugera mu kindi, iryo rizababere itegeko ridakuka." 
Leviticus24:4 Ayo matara, Aroni azayashyira ku kinyarumuri gikoze muri zahabu, maze ajye ahora yakirana imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus24:5 Uzafate agafu, uzatekemo utugati cumi na tubiri, buri kose gakozwe n’ifu yuzuye utwibo tubiri." 
Leviticus24:6 Uzaturambike ku meza ya zahabu, urunda dutandatu dutandatu imbere y’Uhoraho. Kuri buri kirundo cy’utugati," 
Leviticus24:7 uzanyanyagizaho umubavu uboneye. Ibyo bizakubera urwibutso mu kigwi cy’umugati n’ibiribwa bikongokeye Uhoraho. 
Leviticus24:8 Buri gihe uko isabato itashye, uzajye utereka utwo tugati imbere y’Uhoraho, uzirikana ko ugirira Abayisraheli bose. Iryo ni isezerano rizahoraho iteka." 
Leviticus24:9 Ibyo biribwa bizaba ibya Aroni n’abahungu be. Iyo migati rero, bazayirira ahantu hasukuye kuko kuri bo ari ikintu gitagatifu cyagabanijwe ku biribwa bigenewe Uhoraho. Uwo uzaba umugabane wabo ubuziraherezo.»" 
Leviticus24:10 Hari umugore w’Umuyisraheli wari ufite umuhungu yabyaranye n’Umunyamisiri. Bukeye uwo muhungu arihandagaza, maze atonganira mu ngando rwagati n’umugabo w’Umuyisraheli kavukire." 
Leviticus24:11 Uwo muhungu yaratinyutse atuka Uhoraho, maze asuzuguza izina rye. Abayisraheli babibonye batyo, bamushyikiriza Musa. Nyina yitwaga Shelomita, umukobwa wa Diviri wo mu nzu ya Dani." 
Leviticus24:12 Abayisraheli rero babaye bakingiranye uwo muhungu, mu gihe bari bategereje icyo Uhoraho abategeka kumukorera." 
Leviticus24:13 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus24:14 «Uwo watukanye musohore mu ngando, maze abamwumvise bose bamuramburire ibiganza ku mutwe. Nyuma y’ibyo ikoraniro ryose rimwicishe amabuye." 
Leviticus24:15 Ubundi kandi, dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Nihagira umuntu utuka Imana ye, icyo cyaha cye kizamuhama."
