Leviticus24:16 Bityo rero, umuntu uzasuzuguza izina ry’Uhoraho, agomba kwicwa. Yaba umunyamahanga cyangwa umwene gihugu kavukire, ikoraniro ryose rizamwicishe amabuye. Agomba gupfa kuko aba yasuzuguje izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus24:17 Nihagira umuntu wica undi, na we agomba kwicwa." 
Leviticus24:18 Inyamaswa yo nihagira uyica, azajya yishyura inzima." 
Leviticus24:19 Nihagira umuntu ukomeretsa mugenzi we, na we bazamukomeretse:" 
Leviticus24:20 imvune ihorerwe indi, n’ijisho rihorerwe irindi. Mbese ubumuga azaba yateye mugenzi we, na we ni bwo bazamutera." 
Leviticus24:21 Uwishe inyamaswa arayiriha, naho uwishe umuntu, na we agomba gupfa." 
Leviticus24:22 Mwebwe n’abanyamahanga muri kumwe, muzakurikiza amategeko amwe. Ndi Uhoraho, kandi ni jye Mana yanyu.»" 
Leviticus24:23 Ibyo rero Musa amaze kubibwira Abayisraheli, uwari watutse izina ry’Uhoraho bamusohoye mu ngando, maze bamwicisha amabuye. Abayisraheli bubahiriza batyo ibyo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Uhoraho abwirira Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi, ati" 
Leviticus25:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Nimumara kwinjira mu gihugu nabahaye, imirima yanyu muzajya muyiraza mu mwaka w’isabato kugira ngo mushimishe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus25:3 Mu gihe cy’imyaka itandatu, uzaba ushobora kubiba imirima yawe, ukicira imizabibu yawe kandi ugasoroma imbuto zayo." 
Leviticus25:4 Ariko umwaka wa karindwi, icyo gihe ni isabato. Icyo gihe imirima yose igomba kurara kuko ari isabato y’Uhoraho. Muri uwo mwaka, uzirinde gusarura umurima wawe, kwicira imizabibu," 
Leviticus25:5 cyangwa gusarura ibizaba byimejeje nyuma y’umusaruro wa nyuma. Iyo mizabibu yawe uzaba utariciye, niyera imbuto ntuzazisorome. Uwo mwaka ni uw’isabato; imirimo yose igomba guhagarara." 
Leviticus25:6 Cyakora ibizaba byimejeje muri uwo mwaka w’isabato uzabirye, wowe n’abo utunze iwawe, ari abagaragu, abagererwa, abashyitsi, mbese abantu bose bazaba bataha mu nzu yawe." 
Leviticus25:7 Amatungo yawe hamwe n’inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba, na byo bizatungwa n’ibizaba byarimejeje muri icyo gihugu cyawe." 
Leviticus25:8 Uzahere ku mwaka wa mbere ubara, nugera ku wa karindwi wongere utangire, bityo bityo, maze ubigire incuro ndwi. Nurangiza, icyo gihe cyose uzaba warabaze kizaba kingana n’imyaka mirongo ine n’icyenda." 
Leviticus25:9 Ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa karindwi, uzavuze ihembe ryo kwizihiza Uhoraho. Ku munsi mukuru w’imbabazi, ni ho ihembe rizavuga mu gihugu cyanyu cyose." 
Leviticus25:10 Muzatangaze mu gihugu cyanyu ko uwo mwaka wa mirongo itanu ari mutagatifu, kandi ukaba uwo guhimbaza ukubohorwa kw’abaturage bose. Mbese izaba ari yubile yanyu, buri muntu azasange umuryango we, asubire mu isambu ye." 
Leviticus25:11 Uwo mwaka wa mirongo itanu uzaba ari uwa yubile yanyu. Muzirinde kubiba imirima yanyu, kuyisaruramo ibyimejeje, cyangwa gusoroma imbuto zo ku mizabibu izaba itariciwe." 
Leviticus25:12 Kuko uwo mwaka uzaba uwa yubile yanyu, ukazababera umwaka mutagatifu. Muzatungwa n’ibizamera mu mirima." 
Leviticus25:13 Muri uwo mwaka wa yubile, buri muntu muri mwe azasubira mu isambu ye." 
Leviticus25:14 Niba uri umucuruzi, mugenzi wawe akakuguraho ikintu cyangwa ukakimuguraho, uzirinde kumwungukaho. Mbese mwembi ntimuzahendane, muri abavandimwe." 
Leviticus25:15 Nugura isambu na mugenzi wawe, igiciro cyayo kijye gikurikiza umubare w’imyaka ishize yubile ibaye. Na we kandi azajya akwaka ikiguzi akurikije incuro uzasarura uwo murima." 
Leviticus25:16 Niba awuguhereye kuwuhinga imyaka myinshi, igiciro kizaba kinini, niba kandi imyaka ari mike, ikiguzi kizaba gito. Koko rero kugura umurima ni nko kugura umubare w’incuro uzawusaruramo." 
Leviticus25:17 Ntihazagire rero umuntu wungukira kuri mugenzi we. Bityo, muzatinya Imana yanyu. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus25:18 Muzubahirize amategeko yanjye, mufate imico nabatoje, ibyo bizatuma mugira amahoro mu gihugu cyanyu." 
Leviticus25:19 Nimugenza mutyo, igihugu kizera imbuto, murye, muhage, kandi mugiture mu mudendezo." 
Leviticus25:20 Ubwo yenda ahari muribaza muti ’Ko mu mwaka wa karindwi tutazabiba ngo dushobore kubona umusaruro, tuzatungwa n’iki?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Jyewe mu mwaka wa gatandatu, nzabasenderezaho umugisha wanjye, maze mushobore kweza ibyo muzarya imyaka itatu yose!" 
Leviticus25:22 Mu mwaka wa munani, muzashobora kubiba, ariko ubwo muzakomeza gutungwa n’ibyeze mbere kugeza mu mwaka wa cyenda. Mbere y’uko umusaruro wo mu mwaka wa cyenda uboneka, muzakomeza gutungwa n’ibyeze mbere yaho." 
Leviticus25:23 Ubutaka bw’igihugu ni ubwanjye, mwebwe mukirimo nk’abasuhuke cyangwa abashyitsi. Ntihazagire rero ugurisha isambu ye ubutazayisubirana." 
Leviticus25:24 Aho muzaba mutuye hose muri icyo gihugu kizaba icyanyu, mugomba gutanga uburenganzira bwo kugaruza isambu yagurishijwe." 
Leviticus25:25 Hari ubwo umuvandimwe wawe yaba arimo imyenda, bigatuma agurisha igice kimwe cy’isambu ye. Icyo gihe rero, ufite uburenganzira bwo kugaruza iyo sambu, ni ukuvuga mwene wabo wa bugufi, azaza ayigaruze." 
Leviticus25:26 Hari ubwo nanone ushobora kubura umuntu ufite uburenganzira bwo kugaruza ibyawe, ariko wowe ukazabona ibya ngombwa byo kubikora." 
Leviticus25:27 Icyo gihe, uzabara imyaka ishize muguze, umusubize ibihwanye n’igihe cyari gisigaye, maze ukunde usubirane isambu yawe." 
Leviticus25:28 Ariko wowe niba udafite ibya ngombwa byo kuwugaruza, uwo murima uzakomeza kuba uw’uwawuguze kugeza mu mwaka wa yubile. Icyo gihe nyine ni ho uwo murima uzarekurwa ugasubiranwa na nyirawo." 
Leviticus25:29 Inzu yo guturamo, iyo iri mu mugi ukikijwe n’inkike z’amabuye, maze umuntu akayigurisha, uburenganzira bwo kuyigaruza bushirana n’uwo mwaka yaguzwemo." 
Leviticus25:30 Iyo umwaka wose urangiye nta we urayigaruza, iyo nzu itwarwa burundu n’uwayiguze, na we akazayisigira abazamukomokaho. Ndetse n’iyo yubile igeze, iyo nzu iri mu mugi ikikijwe n’inkike z’amabuye, ikomeza kuba iy’uwayiguze." 
Leviticus25:31 Amazu yo mu nsisiro zidakikijwe n’inkike z’amabuye, muzayafate nk’imirima isanzwe yo mu gihugu. Uburenganzira bwo kuyagaruza ntibugira igihe, kandi iyo umwaka wa yubile ugeze, ararekurwa akagarukira bene yo." 
Leviticus25:32 Abalevi bazahorana uburenganzira bwo kugaruza imigi yabo n’amazu bafitemo. 
Leviticus25:33 N’iyo yaba ari undi Mulevi waguze inzu cyangwa umugi by’Abalevi, bigomba kurekurwa mu mwaka wa yubile, bikagarukira bene byo. Impamvu ni uko ayo mazu yo mu migi y’Abalevi aba ari wo mugabane beguriwe hagati y’Abayisraheli." 
Leviticus25:34 N’imirima ikikije imigi y’abalevi, na yo ntishobora kugurishwa; ni umugabane wabo ubuziraherezo." 
Leviticus25:35 Umuvandimwe wawe, umusuhuke cyangwa umushyitsi wawe, naba umukene, akageza aho atishoboye, uzamushyigikire, maze na we ashobore kubaho muri mwe." 
Leviticus25:36 Uzirinde kumuhenda ubwenge ngo umwungukeho, bityo uzatuma abaho iruhande rwawe, kandi unatinye Imana yawe." 
Leviticus25:37 Numuguriza feza cyangwa ukamuha ibiryo, ntuzamusabe ko akungukira." 
Leviticus25:38 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakuye mu Misiri kugira ngo mbagabire igihugu cya Kanahani, kandi mbabere Imana." 
Leviticus25:39 Niba umuvandimwe wawe akurimo umwenda, yabura uko agira akishyira mu maboko yawe, uzirinde kumwicisha akazi nk’umucakara." 
Leviticus25:40 Ahubwo, uzamukoreshe neza nk’umugererwa cyangwa umushyitsi. Azaba umugaragu wawe kugeza mu mwaka wa yubile." 
Leviticus25:41 Icyo gihe ni ho we n’abana be bazava iwawe, bagasubira mu muryango wabo, mu isambu ya ba sekuru." 
Leviticus25:42 Koko rero abo nakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri ni abagaragu banjye. Ntibishoboka rero ko bagurishwa nk’abacakara. 
Leviticus25:43 Muzirinde kubategekesha igitugu, bityo muzaba mutinye Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus25:44 Nimushaka gutunga abagaragu n’abaja, muzabagure mu bihugu bibakikije." 
Leviticus25:45 Mushobora kandi no gufata bamwe mu bana bo mu miryango y’abasuhuke baje kubaturamo, bakabyarira mu gihugu cyanyu." 
Leviticus25:46 Abo ngabo nimubafata, bazaba ari umugabane wanyu; muzabasigira n’abana banyu babitwarire burundu. Abo ngabo, mushobora kubakoresha ubuziraherezo, ariko muri mwebwe Abayisraheli, ntihazagire utegekesha umuvandimwe we igitugu." 
Leviticus25:47 Hari ubwo umuntu wo mu muryango w’abasuhuke cyangwa umushyitsi uri iwawe yaba akize kuri feza, maze umuvandimwe wawe yabura uko amwishyura imyenda amurimo, akishyira mu maboko ye." 
Leviticus25:48 Icyo gihe, n’iyo yaba yaraguzwe byararangiye, uwo muvandimwe wawe aba afite uburenganzira bwo gucungurwa." 
Leviticus25:49 Umwe mu bo bavukana, nyirarume, mubyara we, cyangwa undi mwene wabo wa bugufi, mbese abo bose baba bashobora kumucungura. Na we kandi ubwe, abonye ibya ngombwa, ashobora kwicungura." 
Leviticus25:50 Icyo gihe rero, yumvikana na shebuja, maze bakabara imyaka iri hagati y’igihe yamwihaye ngo amugure na yubile itaha, maze bakemeza igiciro gihwanye n’iyo myaka yari kuzamukorera. Icyo giciro kigomba kujyana n’igihembo umugererwa afata ku munsi." 
Leviticus25:51 Mu icungurwa rero, imyaka isigaye ngo yubile ibe, niba ari myinshi, azasubiza shebuja igiciro yamuguzeho ariko agabanyeho ibihwanye n’igihe yamukoreye." 
Leviticus25:52 Ariko niba hasigaye igihe gito, bazabara maze amusubize igiciro gihwanye n’imyaka yari ibuzeho." 
Leviticus25:53 Ariko kandi, uko imyaka ishira, ni na ko uwo muntu waguzwe agomba kubona igihembo cye kwa shebuja. Ntimuzihanganire ko bamutegekesha igitugu." 
Leviticus25:54 Umuntu kandi uzaba yarabuze uburyo yacungurwa, umwaka wa yubile nugera, we n’abana be bazabarekura bigenge." 
Leviticus25:55 Abayisraheli ni abagaragu banjye. Ni jye wabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, bagomba rero kuba ari jye gusa babera abagaragu. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus26:1 Muzirinde kwihangira ibigirwamana. Ntimuzasenge ibishushanyo cyangwa inkingi z’amabuye. Mu gihugu cyanyu ntimuzahazane amabuye abaje maze ngo muyunamire. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu. 
Leviticus26:2 Muzubahirize isabato zanjye, kandi mwubahe Ingoro yanjye. Ndi Uhoraho." 
Leviticus26:3 Muzite ku mabwiriza yanjye, kandi mukurikize amategeko yanjye." 
Leviticus26:4 Nimugenza mutyo, imvura izajya igwira igihe, ubutaka bwanyu burumbuke, kandi n’ibiti byo mu mirima yanyu byere imbuto." 
Leviticus26:5 Mu gihugu cyanyu, muzajya musarura mutararangiza no guhura ibyeze mu mwaka ushize. Nanone kandi ibiba rizajya risanga mugisarura. Muzajya murya amafunguro yanyu muhage, kandi muture mu gihugu cyanyu umudendezo." 
Leviticus26:6 Igihugu cyanyu nzagisenderezamo amahoro, nkirukanemo inyamaswa zigira nabi, bityo mujye musinzira nta nkomyi." 
Leviticus26:7 Inkota ntizongera kwica mu gihugu cyanyu, ahubwo ababisha banyu muzajya mubirukana mubatsembeshe inkota zanyu." 
Leviticus26:8 Batanu muri mwe bazajya bamenesha ababisha ijana, naho ijana bo bameneshe ibihumbi cumi, maze muzabamarishe inkota zanyu." 
Leviticus26:9 Nzabagarukira, mbatere gusagamba maze murumbuke. Nzakomeza Isezerano twagiranye." 
Leviticus26:10 Muzajya mutungwa n’imyaka yaguguye, ndetse mugire n’ubwo muyisohora mu nzu kugira ngo mushobore kubika imishyashya." 
Leviticus26:11 Sinzigera mbarakarira, nzahora ngendana namwe, ndetse nzashyira n’Ingoro yanjye hagati yanyu." 
Leviticus26:12 Nzababera Imana, namwe mumbere umuryango." 
Leviticus26:13 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakuye mu gihugu cy’Abanyamisiri kugira ngo mureke kubabera abacakara. Ni jye wabakuye ku ngoyi yari yarabahese umugongo, mbaha kugendana ishema." 
Leviticus26:14 Hari ubwo mwakwanga kunyumvira ntimukurikize amabwiriza n’amategeko yanjye," 
Leviticus26:15 mukanga gufata imico nabatoje, bityo mukaba mwishe Isezerano twagiranye." 
Leviticus26:16 Dore rero uko nzabagenzereza nimukora mutyo: Kugira ngo mbakange, nzabahuramo indwara y’ubuhahamuke cyangwa iyo gushishira, maze zibahondobereze amaso n’ubuzima bwanyu bukendere. Muzajya muhingira ubusa, kandi mubibire abanzi banyu birire." 
Leviticus26:17 Nzabakuraho amaso n’umutima, maze abanzi banyu bazabiganzure. Abanzi banyu bazabakandamiza, maze mujye muhunga nta we ubirukanye." 
Leviticus26:18 Nimbaha ibyo bihano ntimunyumvire, noneho nzabikuba incuro ndwi kugira ngo mwihane." 
Leviticus26:19 Izo mbaraga zanyu mwiratana, nzazihindura ubusa. Ijuru ryanyu nzarikamya ribe nk’icyuma, naho ubutaka bwo mbuhindure nk’umuringa." 
Leviticus26:20 Muzigorera ubusa muhinga, imirima yanyu nta cyo izongera kwera. Kandi ibiti byo mu gihugu cyanyu ntibizongera gutanga imbuto." 
Leviticus26:21 Nimukomeza kugoma mukanga kunyumvira, ibyo bihano nzabikuba incuro ndwi kugira ngo mwihane." 
Leviticus26:22 Nzabahuramo inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba zibahekure abana, ziyogoze amatungo yanyu, namwe ubwanyu zibatsembe ku buryo nta n’umwe uzatinyuka kunyura mu nzira zanyu." 
Leviticus26:23 Ibyo bihano na byo nimwanga kubyumva mukansuzugura," 
Leviticus26:24 nanjye nzakomeza mbarwanye, ndetse nzabikuba incuro ndwi kugira ngo mbahane." 
Leviticus26:25 Nzabahuramo inkota yo guhorera Isezerano mwishe, maze muhungire mu migi yanyu. Ubwo naho nzabaterereza icyorezo, maze umubisha wanyu abonereho kubatsemba." 
Leviticus26:26 Nzabanyaga imigati mwaryaga, ku buryo abagore cumi bazajya batekera imigati yanyu mu ziko rimwe. Iyo migati bazabazanira na yo bazayipima ku munzani; ntimuzajya muyirya ngo muhage." 
Leviticus26:27 Ibyo byose nimubirengaho, mugakomeza kugoma no kutanyumvira," 
Leviticus26:28 nanjye nzabarwanya ndetse mbarakarire, maze ibyo bihano mbikube incuro ndwi nanone." 
Leviticus26:29 Muzarya abahungu n’abakobwa banyu. 
Leviticus26:30 Ahirengeye muturira ibitambo byanyu hamwe na za nkingi zanyu z’amabuye zeguriwe izuba, byose nzabisenya mbimareho. Muzatuma mbazinukwa, maze intumbi zanyu nzigereke hejuru y’ibimene by’ibigirwamana byanyu." 
Leviticus26:31 Imigi yanyu nzayizimya, amasengero yanyu nzayangize, noye kuzongera guhumurirwa n’imibavu yanyu ukundi." 
Leviticus26:32 Igihugu cyanyu nzakirimbura maze n’abanzi banyu nibaza kugitura batangare. 
Leviticus26:33 Mwebwe ubwo muzaba mwarakwiriye imishwaro mu mahanga yose, kandi na ho nzahabakurikiza inkota. Igihugu cyanyu kizazima, imigi yanyu isigare ari amatongo." 
Leviticus26:34 Muri icyo gihe cy’amakuba, mwe muzaba mwarajyanywe bunyago mu banzi banyu, naho igihugu cyanyu kizaba cyaratereranywe, kizaruhuka kugira ngo cyubahirize isabato zose zitubahirijwe mbere." 
Leviticus26:35 Koko, muri icyo gihe cy’amakuba, igihugu kizaruhuka, kibe aho kidahingwa, kibonereho kubahiriza isabato zishyura izo kizaba kitararuhutseho igihe mwari mugituye." 
Leviticus26:36 Abo muri mwebwe bazaba bararokotse, bari mu bihugu by’ababisha, nzabakurikirana kugeza ubwo biheba. Akababi nikamanuka ku giti kazajya kabakura umutima biruke nk’abahunga inkota, maze bajye bikubita hasi kandi nta we ubirukanye." 
Leviticus26:37 Bazajya bagwirirana, nk’uko bagwa bahunga inkota kandi nta we ubirukanye. Ntimuzashobora kurwanya abanzi banyu," 
Leviticus26:38 ahubwo muzayogorezwa mu mahanga, maze igihugu cy’abanzi banyu kizabamire." 
Leviticus26:39 Abazarokoka muri mwe bazasereberera mu bihugu by’abanzi bazize ibyaha byabo bikubitiyeho no kwiyongera ku bya ba sekuruza. 
Leviticus26:40 Nyamara abo ngabo bazihamya icyaha cyabo n’icya ba sekuru, maze bemere ko bakoze ishyano bakandwanya." 
Leviticus26:41 Bazumva ko nanjye byandakaje maze nkabacira mu gihugu cy’abanzi. Cyangwa se nanone, umunsi umwe umutima wabo utagenywe uzicisha bugufi maze bemere igihano bahawe." 
Leviticus26:42 Jyewe nzahora nibuka Isezerano nagiranye na Yakobo; nzibuka kandi n’iryo nagiranye na Izaki, sinzibagirwa ndetse n’irindi nagiranye na Abrahamu, maze nzahore nibuka igihugu cyanyu." 
Leviticus26:43 Bityo, muri iyo minsi y’amakuba, igihugu kizaba cyaratereranywe, cyararaye nta we ugihinga, maze kizabonereho kubahiriza isabato zacyo zitubahirijwe mbere. Muri icyo gihe kandi, abo bantu bazajya mu gihano, kuko banze gufata imico nabatoje, bakanasuzugura amategeko yanjye." 
Leviticus26:44 N’ubwo ndetse bazaba baraciriwe mu gihugu cy’abanzi babo, jyeweho nta bwo nzabanga kugeza aho nzasesa Isezerano twagiranye. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Leviticus26:45 Nzabagirira ibambe nibuke Isezerano nagiranye n’abasekuruza babo navanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, amahanga yakangaranye, ari ukugira ngo jyewe Uhoraho, mbabere Imana.»" 
Leviticus26:46 Izo ni zo nyigisho, amategeko n’amabwiriza Uhoraho yagejeje ku Bayisraheli, yifashishije Musa, ku musozi wa Sinayi." 
Leviticus27:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Leviticus27:2 «Dore ibyo uzamenyesha Abayisraheli: Hari ubwo umuntu ashobora kugirana umuhigo n’Uhoraho, akamwemerera kuzamwegurira ikiremwamuntu, hanyuma agashaka kugisimbuza feza;" 
Leviticus27:3 icyo gihe dore ibiciro azakurikiza: Umugabo uri hagati y’imyaka makumyabiri na mirongo itandatu, bazamutangaho sikeli za feza mirongo itanu zipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro." 
Leviticus27:4 Umugore uri hagati y’iyo myaka, we bazamutangaho sikeli mirongo itatu." 
Leviticus27:5 Uri hagati y’imyaka itanu na makumyabiri, niba ari umuhungu bazamutangaho sikeli makumyabiri, naba umukobwa bamutangeho icumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Umwana uri hagati y’ukwezi kumwe n’imyaka itanu, niba ari umuhungu bazamutangaho sikeli eshanu za feza, naba umukobwa bamutangeho eshatu." 
Leviticus27:7 Umuntu ufite imyaka mirongo itandatu cyangwa irenga, niba ari umugabo bazamutangaho sikeli cumi n’eshanu, naba umugore bamutangeho icumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Hari ubwo uwo muntu wahize umuhigo yaba ari umukene, ntashobore kubona igiciro cyateganijwe. Icyo gihe uwo muntu azanira umuherezabitambo cya kiremwamuntu yari yaremereye Uhoraho kumwegurira, maze umuherezabitambo akagena ikiguzi cyo kugisimbuza akurikije ubushobozi bw’uwahize uwo muhigo." 
Leviticus27:9 Hari ubwo itungo na ryo ryateganirizwa guhigura umuhigo. Niba ari rimwe muri ya yandi ashobora guturwa Uhoraho, iryo tungo riba ari ikintu gitagatifu." 
Leviticus27:10 Nta we ushobora kurisimbuza ikindi kintu cyangwa ngo arigurane irindi. Iryiza ntirishobora gusimbura iribi, kimwe n’uko iribi ridasimbura iryiza. Iyo hari ubirenzeho akarigurana irindi, ayo matungo yombi aba ari ibintu bitagatifu." 
Leviticus27:11 Naho ryaba ari itungo ryanduye ryo muri ya yandi adashobora guturwa Uhoraho," 
Leviticus27:12 barizanira umuherezabitambo akaba ari we ugena igiciro cyaryo akurikije ko ari ryiza cyangwa ribi. Icyo gihe kandi icyo umuherezabitambo yemeye ntigisubirwaho. 
Leviticus27:13 Iyo nyir’itungo ashaka kurigombora, yongera kimwe cya gatanu ku giciro cyemejwe." 
Leviticus27:14 Inzu yawe yaba mbi cyangwa nziza, iyo wiyemeje kuyihiguza umuhigo, umuherezabitambo agena igiciro cyayo. Icyo gihe kandi icyo yemeje ntigisubirwaho." 
Leviticus27:15 Ariko nanone, iyo nyirayo ashatse kuyigombora, yongera kimwe cya gatanu ku giciro cyemejwe, maze ikamugarukira." 
Leviticus27:16 Umuntu nashaka kwegurira Uhoraho umurima wo mu isambu ye, igiciro cyawo kizapimirwa ku mbuto bashobora kubibamo. Urugero: aho umuntu ashobora kubiba ikigega cy’ingano za bushoki, hazagurwa amasikeli mirongo itanu ya feza." 
Leviticus27:17 Igiciro nk’icyo kizajya gishyirwaho, ari uko uwo murima weguriwe Uhoraho guhera mu mwaka wa yubile." 
Leviticus27:18 Iyo uwo murima weguriwe Uhoraho nyuma ya yubile, umuherezabitambo yemeza igiciro cyawo akurikije imyaka isigaye kugira ngo indi yubile ibe. Ubwo rero ni ukuvuga ko igiciro cyagenwe kigomba kugabanuka." 
Leviticus27:19 Nanone kandi, iyo nyiri uwo murima ashaka kuwugomboza, yongera kimwe cya gatanu ku giciro cyemejwe n’umuherezabitambo, maze ukamugarukira." 
Leviticus27:20 Ariko rero, iyo awugurishije n’undi muntu, atarawugombora, ntaba akiwugaruje ukundi." 
Leviticus27:21 Ahubwo iyo yubile igeze, aho kugira ngo umugarukire, uhinduka ikintu gitagatifu kimwe n’indi mirima yose yeguriwe Uhoraho burundu. Icyo gihe rero, uwo murima uba umugabane w’umuherezabitambo." 
Leviticus27:22 Hari ushobora kwegurira Uhoraho umurima yiguriye utari uwo mu isambu y’abasekuruza be. 
Leviticus27:23 Icyo gihe, umuherezabitambo abara igihe gisigaye ngo yubile igere, maze yagena igiciro, kigatangwa uwo munsi kuko ari ikintu gitagatifu cy’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus27:24 Iyo umwaka wa yubile ugeze, uwo murima usubizwa uwo bawuguzeho, ari na we uwufiteho umurage w’abasekuruza." 
Leviticus27:25 Igiciro cyose kizajya kigurwa amasikeli y’Ingoro. Sikeli imwe kandi ingana na gera makumyabiri. 
Leviticus27:26 Birumvikana ko nta muntu ushobora kwegurira Uhoraho icyavutse uburiza mu matungo ye, kuko bisanzwe bizwi ko ari icy’Uhoraho. Cyaba icyo mu matungo maremare cyangwa amagufi, ni umugabane w’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus27:27 Iyo ari itungo ryahumanye ugashaka kurigombora, wongera kimwe cya gatanu ku giciro cyagenwe n’umuherezabitambo. Naho iryo tungo iyo utarigomboye, rigurishwa ku giciro cyagenwe." 
Leviticus27:28 Byongeye, ikintu utunze iwawe, yaba umuntu, itungo cyangwa umurima, iyo ucyeguriye Uhoraho burundu, ntuba ugishoboye kukigurisha cyangwa kukigombora. Bene icyo kiba ari ikintu gitagatifu cy’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus27:29 Umuntu na we, iyo yeguriwe Uhoraho burundu, ntashobora kugombozwa, ahubwo aricwa." 
Leviticus27:30 Ituro rya kimwe cy’icumi mugabanya ku myaka y’imirima yanyu no ku mbuto z’ibiti, riba ari umugabane w’Uhoraho. Ni ikintu gitagatifu kigenewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus27:31 Iyo ushaka kugira icyo ugombora kiri muri iryo turo, wongera kimwe cya gatanu ku giciro cyagenwe." 
Leviticus27:32 Naho ku byerekeye amatungo yawe maremare cyangwa amagufi, uzegurira Uhoraho rimwe ku icumi, urishyireho ikimenyetso." 
Leviticus27:33 Yaba meza, yaba mabi, ayo matungo ntashobora kuguranwa, ngo rimwe risimbure irindi. Iyo babirenzeho bakayagurana, yombi aba ari ibintu bitagatifu. Ayo matungo nta we ushobora kuyagomboza.»" 
Leviticus27:34 Ayo ni yo mategeko Uhoraho yahereye Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi, kugira ngo ayamenyeshe Abayisraheli." 
Numbers1:1 Ku wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa kabiri kw’umwaka wa kabiri, Abayisraheli bavuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu butayu bwa Sinayi, mu ihema ry’ibonaniro ati" 
Numbers1:2 «Mukore ibarura ry’imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli. Mujye muri buri muryango, no muri buri nzu," 
Numbers1:3 maze mubare abantu bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’abayirengeje kandi bashoboye kujya ku rugamba. Wowe na Aroni muzababarure mukurikije imitwe y’ingabo zabo. 
Numbers1:4 Muzifashishe umuntu umwe wa buri muryango, mbese usanzwe ari umutware w’inzu y’iwabo." 
Numbers1:5 Dore amazina y’abo bantu muzifashisha: kwa Rubeni ni Elisuri mwene Shedewuri; 
Numbers1:6 kwa Simewoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Shurishadayi; 
Numbers1:7 kwa Yuda ni Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu; 
Numbers1:8 kwa Isakari ni Netaneli mwene Suwari; 
Numbers1:9 kwa Zabuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni; 
Numbers1:10 naho muri bene Yozefu: kwa Efurayimu ni Elishama mwene Amihudi no kwa Manase ni Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri; 
Numbers1:11 kwa Benyamini ni Abidani mwene Gidewoni; 
Numbers1:12 kwa Dani ni Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi; 
Numbers1:13 kwa Asheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okrani; 
Numbers1:14 kwa Gadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Dewuyeli; 
Numbers1:15 kwa Nefutali ni Ahira mwene Eyinani.» 
Numbers1:16 Ngabo abari bahagarariye imbaga ari na bo bakuru b’imiryango ya ba sekuruza, bakaba abagaba b’ingabo za Israheli." 
Numbers1:17 Musa na Aroni rero bafata abo bantu batoranijwe, maze babagira ibisonga byabo." 
Numbers1:18 Ubwo Musa na Aroni bakoranya imbaga yose, ku wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa kabiri, nuko Abayisraheli batangira umwirondoro w’ibisekuruza byabo muri buri muryango na buri nzu. Bagendaga babara amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’abayirengeje umwe umwe." 
Numbers1:19 Mbese nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa, ababarurira mu butayu bwa Sinayi." 
Numbers1:20 Bamaze kubarura bene Rubeni, imfura ya Israheli, mu mazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:21 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Rubeni yose, basanze ari 46,500." 
Numbers1:22 Bene Simewoni: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashoboye kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:23 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Simewoni yose, basanze ari 59,300." 
Numbers1:24 Bene Gadi: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashoboye kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:25 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Gadi yose, basanze ari 45,650." 
Numbers1:26 Bene Yuda: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:27 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Yuda yose, basanze ari 74,600." 
Numbers1:28 Bene Isakari: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:29 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Isakari yose, basanze ari 54,400." 
Numbers1:30 Bene Zabuloni: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:31 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Zabuloni yose, basanze ari 57,400." 
Numbers1:32 Naho bene Yozefu: kwa Efurayimu, bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashoboye kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:33 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Efurayimu yose, basanze ari 40,500." 
Numbers1:34 Kwa Manase: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:35 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Manase yose, basanze ari 32,200." 
Numbers1:36 Bene Benyamini: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:37 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Benyamini yose, basanze ari 35,400." 
Numbers1:38 Bene Dani: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:39 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Dani yose, basanze ari 62,700." 
Numbers1:40 Bene Asheri: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:41 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Asheri yose, basanze ari 41,500." 
Numbers1:42 Bene Nefutali: bamaze kubarura amazina y’abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashobora kujya ku rugamba," 
Numbers1:43 mu mazu no mu miryango ya Nefutali yose, basanze ari 53,400." 
Numbers1:44 Iyo ni yo mibare y’ababaruwe na Musa na Aroni, na ba batware cumi na babiri uko bagiye bava muri buri muryango wa Israheli." 
Numbers1:45 Umubare w’abari bagejeje bose ku myaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kandi bashoboye kujya ku rugamba, uko bagiye babarurwa mu mazu yabo yo kwa sekuruza," 
Numbers1:46 ni 603.550. 
Numbers1:47 Cyakora abo mu muryango wa Levi, nk’uko basanzwe ari igihumbi cy’umuryango, ntibabaruriwe hamwe n’abandi." 
Numbers1:48 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers1:49 «Umuryango wa Levi wonyine ntuzawubare, kandi ntuzawubarure hamwe n’abandi Bayisraheli." 
Numbers1:50 Ahubwo Abalevi uzabashinge imirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano, n’ibijyana na yo, n’ibikoresho byayo byose. Bazayiheka, yo n’ibyayo byose, bayiteho, kandi bazagandike bayikikije." 
Numbers1:51 Ingoro y’Uhoraho nijya guhaguruka, Abalevi bazayiremura, maze nihagarara bayiremekanye. Nihagira utari uwo muri bo uhegera, azicwe." 
Numbers1:52 Abayisraheli bazagandike buri wese mu ngando ye, hafi y’ibendera rye, bakurikije imitwe y’ingabo." 
Numbers1:53 Abalevi bonyine bazagandika hirya no hino y’Ingoro y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano, maze bazayiteho. Ibyo bizatuma uburakari bw’Uhoraho butagurumanira Abayisraheli.»" 
Numbers1:54 Abayisraheli bagenza batyo; bakora ibyo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa byose. 
Numbers2:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Numbers2:2 «Buri Muyisraheli azagandike mu mutwe w’ingabo we, hafi y’ibendera ry’inzu akomokamo. Abayisraheli kandi bazagandika berekeye ihema ry’ibonaniro, ariko boye kuryegera cyane." 
Numbers2:3 Abazagandika imbere y’abandi iburasirazuba, ni imitwe y’ingabo zo mu ngando ya Yuda. Umutware wa bene Yuda ni Nashoni mwene Aminadabu;" 
Numbers2:4 umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 74,600." 
Numbers2:5 Abazashinga ingando iruhande rwe, ni umuryango wa Isakari hamwe n’uwa Zabuloni. Umutware wa bene Isakari ni Netaneli mwene Shuwari," 
Numbers2:6 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 54,400." 
Numbers2:7 Umutware wa bene Zabuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni," 
Numbers2:8 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 57,400." 
Numbers2:9 Abantu bari muri iyo mitwe y’ingabo uko ari itatu yo mu ngando ya Yuda, bose hamwe ni 186,400. Abo rero ni bo bazafata iya mbere mu rugendo." 
Numbers2:10 Imitwe y’ingabo yo mu ngando ya Rubeni izaherera mu majyepfo. Umutware wa bene Rubeni ni Elishuri mwene Shedewuri," 
Numbers2:11 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 46,500." 
Numbers2:12 Abazashinga ingando iruhande rwe ni umuryango wa Simewoni hamwe n’uwa Gadi. Umutware wa bene Simewoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Shurishadayi," 
Numbers2:13 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 59,300." 
Numbers2:14 Umutware wa bene Gadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Rewuyeli," 
Numbers2:15 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 45,650." 
Numbers2:16 Abantu bari muri iyo mitwe y’ingabo uko ari itatu yo mu ngando ya Rubeni, bose hamwe ni 151,450. Abo rero ni bo bazajya bahaguruka aba kabiri." 
Numbers2:17 Nyuma hazagenda ihema ry’ibonaniro rikurikirwe n’inteko y’Abalevi izaba iri hagati y’izindi nteko. Muzagende mukurikije uko muri mu ngando, buri wese mu mwanya we, inteko imwe inyuma y’indi." 
Numbers2:18 Imitwe y’ingabo yo mu ngando ya Efurayimu izaherera mu burengerazuba. Umutware wa bene Efurayimu ni Elishama mwene Amihudi," 
Numbers2:19 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 40,500." 
Numbers2:20 Abazashinga ingando iruhande rwe, ni umuryango wa Manase hamwe n’uwa Benyamini. Umutware wa bene Manase ni Gamaliyeli mwene Pedashuri," 
Numbers2:21 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 32,200." 
Numbers2:22 Umutware wa bene Benyamini ni Avidani mwene Gidewoni," 
Numbers2:23 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 35,400." 
Numbers2:24 Abantu bari muri iyo mitwe y’ingabo uko ari itatu yo mu ngando ya Efurayimu, bose hamwe ni 108.100. Abo ni bo bazajya bahaguruka aba gatatu." 
Numbers2:25 Imitwe y’ingabo yo mu ngando ya Dani, izaherera mu majyaruguru. Umutware wa bene Dani ni Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi," 
Numbers2:26 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 62,700." 
Numbers2:27 Abazashinga ingando iruhande rwe ni umuryango wa Asheri hamwe n’uwa Nefutali. Umutware wa bene Asheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okrani," 
Numbers2:28 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 41,500." 
Numbers2:29 Umutware wa bene Nefutali ni Ahira mwene Eyinani," 
Numbers2:30 kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze ukabamo abagabo 53,400." 
Numbers2:31 Abantu bari muri iyo ngando ya Dani ni 157,600. Bazajya bahaguruka aba nyuma, buri mutwe w’ingabo inyuma y’uwundi." 
Numbers2:32 Ngabo rero abana ba Israheli uko babaruriwe mu mazu yabo; umubare rusange w’ingabo zose zabaruriwe mu ngando no mu mitwe yazo ni 603.550. 
Numbers2:33 Cyakora Abalevi, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa, ntibashyizwe muri iryo barurwa ry’Abayisraheli." 
Numbers2:34 Ibyo, Abayisraheli barabyubahirije, bakurikiza ugushaka kw’Uhoraho, ari mu guca ingando, ari no mu guhaguruka, buri wese akurikije umuryango we n’inzu akomokamo." 
Numbers3:1 Dore urubyaro rwa Aroni n’urwa Musa, igihe Uhoraho avuganiye na Musa ku musozi wa Sinayi." 
Numbers3:2 Dore kandi amazina ya bene Aroni: imfura ni Nadabu, hanyuma Avihu, Eliyazari na Itamari." 
Numbers3:3 Ngayo amazina ya bene Aroni, abaherezabitambo basutsweho amavuta y’isigwa maze begurirwa umurimo w’ubuherezabitambo." 
Numbers3:4 Nadabu na Avihu bapfiriye mu butayu bwa Sinayi imbere y’Uhoraho kuko bari bamutuye ibyotezo bitamukwiye; bapfa nta gahungu basize. Eleyazari na Itamari rero, ni bo bakoreraga mu maso ya se Aroni umurimo w’ubuherezabitambo." 
Numbers3:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers3:6 «Igiza hino Abalevi, maze ubashyikirize umuherezabitambo Aroni, kugira ngo bazajye bamufasha." 
Numbers3:7 Bazamukorera we n’imbaga yose mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, kandi banatunganye imirimo yose y’Ingoro." 
Numbers3:8 Bazita ku bikoresho byose by’ihema ry’ibonaniro, baserukire Abayisraheli mu itunganya ry’imirimo yerekeye Ingoro." 
Numbers3:9 Abalevi uzashyikiriza Aroni n’abahungu be, bazaba babahawe burundu, babe mu cyimbo cy’abandi Bayisraheli bose." 
Numbers3:10 Aroni n’abahungu be, uzabegurire imirimo yose y’ubuherezabitambo; utari uwo muri bo akabivangamo, azicwe.»" 
Numbers3:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers3:12 «Jyewe ubwanjye nitoreye bene Levi mu Bayisraheli bose, ngo babe ingurane z’uburiza bwose bwavutseho imbyaro ya mbere ku Bayisraheli. Abalevi ndabiyeguriye." 
Numbers3:13 Kuko icyitwa uburiza cyose ari icyanjye: kuva umunsi nishe icyitwa uburiza cyose mu gihugu cya Misiri, ubwo niyeguriye icyitwa uburiza cyose muri Israheli, ari uburiza bw’abantu cyangwa bw’amatungo. Ni ubwanjye. Ndi Uhoraho!»" 
Numbers3:14 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu butayu bwa Sinayi, ati" 
Numbers3:15 «Barura Abalevi ukurikije imiryango yabo n’amazu yabo. Uzabarura Abalevi bose b’igitsinagabo, kuva ku ruhinja rw’ukwezi kumwe.»" 
Numbers3:16 Musa rero ababarura akurikije itegeko ry’Uhoraho nk’uko yari yabibwirijwe. 
Numbers3:17 Dore rero amazina ya bene Levi: Gerishoni, Kehati, na Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Bene Gerishoni, ukurikije amazu yabo, ni Libini na Shimeyi." 
Numbers3:19 Bene Kehati, ukurikije amazu yabo, ni Amuramu, Yisehari, Heburoni, na Uziyeli." 
Numbers3:20 Bene Merari, ukurikije amazu yabo, ni Mihali na Mushe. Ngayo amazu y’Abalevi, uko babaruwe mu miryango yabo." 
Numbers3:21 Abakomoka kuri Gerishoni ni inzu y’Abalibini n’iy’Abashimeyi. Ayo ni yo yari amazu y’Abagerishoni. 
Numbers3:22 Ab’igitsinagabo bose hamwe uhereye ku ruhinja rw’ukwezi kumwe, umubare wabo ugera ku 7,500." 
Numbers3:23 Amazu y’Abagerishoni yagandikaga inyuma y’Ingoro mu burengerazuba. 
Numbers3:24 Umutware w’umuryango w’Abagerishoni yari Eliyasafu mwene Layeli. 
Numbers3:25 Mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, bene Gerishoni bari bashinzwe ibi bikurikira: Ingoro, ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Numbers3:26 imyenda n’umubambiko byo ku irembo ry’urugo rukikije Ingoro n’urutambiro, hamwe n’imigozi yakenerwaga mu mirimo yose yo kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
Numbers3:27 Abakomokaga kuri Kehati ni inzu y’Abamuramu, iy’Abahisehari, iy’Abaheburoni, n’iy’Abahuziyeli. Ayo ni yo yari amazu y’Abakehati." 
Numbers3:28 Ab’igitsinagabo bose, ubaze guhera ku ruhinja rw’ukwezi kumwe, bari 8,600. Bose kandi bari bashinzwe imirimo yo mu Ngoro." 
Numbers3:29 Amazu y’Abakehati yagandikaga iruhande rw’Ingoro, mu majyepfo." 
Numbers3:30 Umutware w’umuryango w’Abakehati yari Elisafani mwene Uziyeli. 
Numbers3:31 Bari bashinzwe ibi bikurikira: ubushyinguro, ameza, ikinyarumuri, intambiro n’ibikoresho by’imihango y’Ingoro, hamwe n’umubambiko n’imirimo yose yo kubaka Ingoro." 
Numbers3:32 Umutware w’ikirenga w’Abalevi, ni Eleyazari mwene Aroni, umuherezabitambo. Ni we wategekaga abagabo bakoraga mu Ngoro." 
Numbers3:33 Abakomokaga kuri Merari, ni inzu y’Abamihali n’iy’Abamushe. Ayo ni yo yari amazu ya Merari." 
Numbers3:34 Abamerari b’igitsinagabo bose, ubaze guhera ku ruhinja rw’ukwezi kumwe, bari 6,200." 
Numbers3:35 Amazu y’Abamerari yagandikaga iruhande rw’Ingoro, mu majyaruguru. Umutware w’Abamerari ni Suriyeli mwene Avihayili." 
Numbers3:36 Abamerari bari bashinzwe ibi bikurikira: inkomanizo z’Ingoro, imbariro zayo, inkingi zayo, n’ibitereko byazo, hamwe n’ibigendana na byo byose, n’imirimo yose yo kubishinga." 
Numbers3:37 Bari bashinzwe kandi inkingi zose z’inkike izengurutse ingombe, inshingiriro zayo, hamwe n’imiganda yayo n’injishi zabyo." 
Numbers3:38 Abagandikaga imbere y’Ingoro, iburasirazuba, ni ukuvuga imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro, ni Musa, Aroni n’abahungu be. Ni bo bakoraga imihango yo mu Ngoro, mu izina ry’Abayisraheli. Iyo hagira utari uwo muri abo uhegera, yari kwicwa." 
Numbers3:39 Umubare w’Abalevi bose uko babaruwe mu mazu yabo na Musa na Aroni, ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho, ni 22,000. Abalevi bose b’igitsinagabo, ubaze uhereye ku ruhinja rw’ukwezi kumwe, ni uko banganaga." 
Numbers3:40 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ubarure abana b’uburiza bose b’igitsinagabo b’Abayisraheli. Uhere ku mpinja z’ukwezi kumwe, maze urondore amazina yabo." 
Numbers3:41 Uzanzigamire Abalevi mu mwanya w’abana b’uburiza b’Abayisraheli. Ndi Uhoraho. Uzanzigamire kandi n’amatungo y’Abalevi mu mwanya w’uburiza bw’amatungo ya Israheli.» 
Numbers3:42 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse, Musa abarura abana b’uburiza b’Abayisraheli." 
Numbers3:43 Abana b’uburiza b’igitsinagabo; abandikiwe amazina bahereye ku mpinja z’ukwezi kumwe, bose bari 22,273." 
Numbers3:44 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers3:45 «Ufate Abalevi mu mwanya w’abana b’uburiza b’Abayisraheli, amatungo y’Abalevi na yo uyafate mu mwanya w’amatungo y’Abayisraheli: Abalevi ni abanjye; ndi Uhoraho." 
Numbers3:46 Kugira ngo bariya bana b’uburiza 273 barenga ku mubare w’Abalevi bacungurwe," 
Numbers3:47 uzahabwe kuri buri muntu, amasikeli atanu apimiye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro ifite uburemere bwa gera makumyabiri." 
Numbers3:48 Iyo feza uzayiha Aroni n’abahungu be, ibe ikiguzi cy’ugucungurwa kwa ba bana b’uburiza barenga ku mubare w’Abalevi.»" 
Numbers3:49 Musa yakira iyo feza y’incungu, ayiherewe ba bana basagukaga ku mubare w’abana b’uburiza bacunguwe n’Abalevi." 
Numbers3:50 Iyo feza yatangiwe abana b’uburiza b’Abayisraheli, yanganaga n’amasikeli y’Ingoro 1,365." 
Numbers3:51 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse, Musa ashyikiriza Aroni n’abahungu be, iyo feza y’incungu, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimubwirije." 
Numbers4:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Numbers4:2 «Muri bene Levi, mubarure abahungu ba Kehati mukurikije amazu yabo n’imiryango yabo," 
Numbers4:3 mubare abantu bose bafite imyaka mirongo itatu kugeza kuri mirongo itanu, bagomba gutunganya imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:4 Umurimo w’Abakehati mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, ni ukwita ku bikoresho bitagatifu." 
Numbers4:5 Ingando nijya guhaguruka, Aroni n’abahungu be bazamanura umwenda w’umubambiko, maze bawutwikirize ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano." 
Numbers4:6 Hejuru yabwo bazarenzeho uruhu rw’ibihura, byose babisesureho umwenda w’umuhemba, hanyuma bafunge imijishi y’ubushyinguro mu bifunga byayo." 
Numbers4:7 Ameza y’umumuriko bazayasanzureho umwenda w’umuhemba, maze bazagerekeho amasahani, ibiyiko n’ibikopo, hamwe n’udukombe tujyamo amazi y’icyuhagiro. Hejuru y’ayo meza hazaba hari umugati utazigera ubura." 
Numbers4:8 Hejuru y’ibyo byose, bazagerekaho umwenda w’ibara rya nyirakayanja maze boroseho uruhu rw’ibihura, hanyuma bakanyage imijishi y’ameza mu bifunga byayo." 
Numbers4:9 Bazende umwenda w’umuhemba, bawuzingurize ku kinyarumuri, maze utwikire amatara yacyo, n’ibihanaguzo byacyo, n’icyotezo cyacyo, hamwe n’iminoga y’amavuta bagicanisha." 
Numbers4:10 Icyo gitereko cy’amatara hamwe n’ibigendana na cyo byose, bazabizingira mu ruhu rw’ibihura, maze babishyire mu ngobyi." 
Numbers4:11 Urutambiro rwa zahabu, bazaruramburaho umwenda w’umuhemba, barworose uruhu rw’ibihura, hanyuma bakanyage imijishi mu bifunga byayo." 
Numbers4:12 Ibikoresho byose byo mu mihango y’Ingoro, bazabirambika ku mwenda w’umuhemba, babitwikirize uruhu rw’ibihura, hanyuma babishyire mu ngobyi." 
Numbers4:13 Urutambiro, bazaruhunguraho ivu, barutwikirize umwenda w’umuhemba," 
Numbers4:14 maze bawugerekeho ibikoresho byose birugenewe: ibyuma byo kwatsa umuriro, ibitiyo byo kuyora amakara n’ivu, mbese ibikoresho byose by’urutambiro. Nyuma rero bazoroseho uruhu rw’ibihura, maze bakanyage imijishi y’urutambiro mu bifunga byayo." 
Numbers4:15 Ingando nihaguruka, Aroni n’abahungu be bazaba barangije gutwikira Ingoro n’ibikoresho byayo byose, maze bene Kehati baze bayiheke. Ntibazakore ku Ngoro kuko byabaviramo gupfa. Ngibyo ibyo bene Kehati bashinzwe kwikorera mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:16 Eleyazari mwene Aroni umuherezabitambo, ashinzwe amavuta y’igitereko cy’amatara, imibavu itwikwa, ituro rihoraho, hamwe n’amavuta y’isigwa. Ashinzwe kandi kwita ku Ngoro n’ibiyirimo byose.»" 
Numbers4:17 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Numbers4:18 «Amazu ya bene Kehati, uzayarinde gucibwa mu bandi Balevi." 
Numbers4:19 Ahubwo muzabagenzereze mutya kugira ngo igihe bazegera ahantu hatagatifu rwose, bazarokoke be kuzapfa: Aroni n’abahungu be bazahagarika buri Mukehati iruhande rw’umuzigo we, hafi y’icyo agomba kwikorera." 
Numbers4:20 Bityo ntibazaze kurebera Ingoro y’Uhoraho n’akanya na gato, kuko byabaviramo gupfa!»" 
Numbers4:21 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers4:22 «Bene Gerishoni na bo, mubakorere ibarura mu mazu yabo no mu miryango yabo." 
Numbers4:23 Muzabare abantu bose bafite imyaka mirongo itatu kugeza kuri mirongo itanu, ba bandi bashinzwe kurangiza imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:24 Dore uruhare rw’amazu y’Abagerishoni, ibyo bagomba gukora cyangwa kwikorera:" 
Numbers4:25 bazatwara ibisaswa mu Ngoro, mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, n’uruhu rw’ibihura ruritwikiriye, hamwe n’umubambiko wo ku muryango waryo." 
Numbers4:26 Bazatwara kandi imibambiko y’inkike, umubambiko w’irembo ryinjira mu kibuga cy’Ingoro, maze ugakingira Ingoro n’urutambiro impande zose, imigozi yabyo hamwe n’ibindi bikoresho byose bahawe mu murimo wabo." 
Numbers4:27 Imirimo yose ya bene Gerishoni, ibyo bakora cyangwa bikorera, bazaba babitegetswe na Aroni hamwe n’abahungu be. Ni mwe muzabashinga kumenya ibyo bazagomba kwikorera." 
Numbers4:28 Uwo ni wo murimo weguriwe bene Gerishoni mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Uwo ni wo murimo bashinzwe kandi bakazawugengwamo n’umuherezabitambo Itamari mwene Aroni. 
Numbers4:29 Naho bene Merari, muzabakorere ibarura mu mazu yabo no mu miryango yabo." 
Numbers4:30 Muzabare abantu bose bafite imyaka mirongo itatu kugeza kuri mirongo itanu, ba bandi bashinzwe kurangiza imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:31 Dore ibyo bagomba kwikorera, kandi ni wo murimo wonyine bashinzwe mu ihema ry’ibonaniro: inkomanizo z’Ingoro n’imbariro zazo, inkingi zayo n’ibitereko byazo," 
Numbers4:32 inkingi zizengurutse Ingoro n’ibitereko byazo, imambo zayo n’imigozi yazo, hamwe n’ibindi bikoresho byose. Muzereka buri wese ibintu agomba kwikorera." 
Numbers4:33 Uwo ni wo murimo weguriwe amazu ya bene Merari, kandi ni na wo murimo wonyine bashinzwe mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Bazawugenzurwamo n’umuherezabitambo Itamari mwene Aroni.»" 
Numbers4:34 Nuko Musa, Aroni n’abatware b’imbaga babarura bene Kehati mu mazu yabo no mu miryango yabo." 
Numbers4:35 Babaze abantu bose bafite imyaka mirongo itatu kugeza kuri mirongo itanu, bagombaga gushingwa imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:36 Amazu yabo yose hamwe yarimo abagabo 2,750." 
Numbers4:37 Uwo ni wo mubare w’abari mu mazu y’Abakehati bashinzwe kurangiza imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Ni bo Musa na Aroni babaruye babitegetswe n’Uhoraho yabibwirije Musa. 
Numbers4:38 Dore bene Gerishoni, uko babaruriwe mu miryango n’amazu yabo," 
Numbers4:39 bahereye ku bafite imyaka mirongo itatu kugeza kuri mirongo itanu, kandi bashinzwe kurangiza imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Numbers4:40 basanze amazu yabo n’imiryango yabo irimo abagabo 2,630." 
Numbers4:41 Uwo ni wo mubare w’abari mu mazu ya bene Gerishoni, bashinzwe kurangiza imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Abo ni bo bagaragaye mu ibarura Musa na Aroni bakoze ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho." 
Numbers4:42 Dore bene Merari, uko babaruriwe mu miryango n’amazu yabo," 
Numbers4:43 babaze abafite imyaka mirongo itatu kugeza kuri mirongo itanu, kandi bashinzwe kurangiza imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Numbers4:44 basanze amazu yabo arimo abagabo 3,200." 
Numbers4:45 Uwo ni wo mubare w’abari mu mazu ya bene Merari mu ibarura Musa na Aroni bakoze ku itegeko Uhoraho yari yahaye Musa. 
Numbers4:46 Dore umubare w’Abalevi bose mu mazu yabo no mu miryango yabo: Musa, Aroni n’abatware ba Israheli babaze abantu bose" 
Numbers4:47 bafite imyaka mirongo itatu kugeza kuri mirongo itanu, kandi bashinzwe kurangiza imirimo yo kubaka cyangwa kwikorera ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Numbers4:48 basanga ari abagabo 8,580." 
Numbers4:49 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse, kandi bayobowe na Musa, buri wese ahabwa icyo yagombaga gukora no kwikorera. Buri wese yari afite umurimo yagenewe uko Uhoraho yari yarabibwirije Musa." 
Numbers5:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers5:2 «Tegeka Abayisraheli kwirukana kure y’ingando abanyabibembe, abaninda ku bitsina bose, cyangwa abandujwe no gukora intumbi." 
Numbers5:3 Muzabirukane, baba abagore cyangwa abagabo muzabirukane kure y’ingando. Batazanduza ingando y’Abayisraheli kandi ntuye rwagati muri bo.»" 
Numbers5:4 Abayisraheli babigenza batyo: babirukana kure y’ingando, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabibwiye Musa." 
Numbers5:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers5:6 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Umugabo cyangwa umugore, nacumurira Uhoraho akora kimwe mu byaha bisanzwe mu bantu, uwo muntu kizamuhame." 
Numbers5:7 Bazicuza icyaha bazaba bakoze; maze uwacumuye kuri mugenzi we amusubize ibyo yamutwaye byose, yongereho kimwe cya gatanu cy’igiciro cyabyo." 
Numbers5:8 Niba uwacumuweho adafite umubyeyi baha iyo ndishyi, izasubizwa Uhoraho, yakirwe n’umuherezabitambo, hongeweho isekurume y’intama uwacumuye azatura ngo igirirweho umuhango w’impongano z’icyaha cye." 
Numbers5:9 Ibizagerurwa ku maturo yose y’Abayisraheli, kimwe n’ibintu byose bigenewe Ingoro bigashyikirizwa umuherezabitambo, ibyo bizaba umugabane we." 
Numbers5:10 Ibyo buri muntu agenera Ingoro, biba ari ibye; ibyo buri wese agenera umuherezabitambo, biba bimuhawe." 
Numbers5:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers5:12 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Hari ubwo umugore yakwifata nabi agahemukira umugabo we," 
Numbers5:13 akaryamana n’undi rwihishwa, akihumanya hatagize ubabona cyangwa ngo abafate." 
Numbers5:14 Niba rero umugabo we agize urwikekwe, agatangira gufuhira umugore we amukekaho ubwiyandarike amubeshyera cyangwa bikaba ari ukuri," 
Numbers5:15 azamushyikirize umuherezabitambo, amutangirire ituro ryagenwe: kimwe cya cumi cy’ifu y’ingano yuzuye akebo. Ntazayisukeho amavuta cyangwa ngo ayishyiremo umubavu, kuko ari ituro ritewe no gufuha, ituro ryo gushinja icyaha." 
Numbers5:16 Umuherezabitambo azigiza umugore hafi, amwereke Uhoraho." 
Numbers5:17 Umuherezabitambo azavome ku mazi y’umugisha, ayashyire mu rwabya, afate no ku gitaka cy’aho hantu abivange." 
Numbers5:18 Umuherezabitambo azazana uwo mugore imbere y’Uhoraho maze amukure igitambaro mu mutwe, ashyire mu biganza bye ituro rimushinja, ni ukuvuga ituro ritewe no gufuha. Umuherezabitambo we, azaba afite mu ntoki ya mazi y’umushari atera umuvumo." 
Numbers5:19 Umuherezabitambo arahize uwo mugore, agira ati ’Niba koko nta mugabo mwaryamanye, ukaba utariyandaritse ngo witeshe agaciro ubeshya umugabo wawe, umuvumo uri muri aya mazi y’umushari ntugufate." 
Numbers5:20 Nyamara niba warifashe nabi, ukitesha agaciro uryamana n’undi mugabo utari uwawe... ’" 
Numbers5:21 Umuherezabitambo azamutongera amurahiza ati ’Uhoraho azakugire urugero rw’abavumwe bose mu muryango wawe, uzafatwe n’urushwima kandi uhinduke ingumba." 
Numbers5:22 Aya mazi y’umuvumo agucengere mu nda, agutere urushwima, kandi aguhindure ingumba.’ Naho umugore azasubize ati ’Ndabyemeye, ndabyemeye’." 
Numbers5:23 Maze iyo mivumo, umuherezabitambo ayandikishe ku mbaho. Hanyuma izo nyuguti azogeshe ya mazi asharira." 
Numbers5:24 Ayo mazi asharira y’umuvumo ayahe wa mugore ayanywe; amucengeremo asharira. 
Numbers5:25 Umuherezabitambo azakura mu biganza by’uwo mugore ituro ritewe no gufuha, arimurikire Uhoraho, hanyuma arijyane ku rutambiro." 
Numbers5:26 Umuherezabitambo azagabanya kuri ya fu y’ituro urushyi rumwe rw’urwibutso, maze ayitwikire ku rutambiro; narangiza ahe umugore ya mazi ayanywe." 
Numbers5:27 Namara kuyanywa dore uko bizagenda: niba yariyanduje agahemukira umugabo we, amazi y’umuvumo azamucengeramo ashaririye; inda ye ibyimbe, akurizeho no kuba ingumba. Uwo mugore azahinduka intangarugero rw’abavumwe mu muryango we." 
Numbers5:28 Ariko niba uwo mugore ataritesheje agaciro, akaba atari umwandure, icyaha kizamuhanagurwaho kandi akomeze kubyara.»" 
Numbers5:29 Iryo ni itegeko ryerekeye gufuhira umugore wifata nabi akitesha agaciro abeshya umugabo we," 
Numbers5:30 cyangwa umugabo wagize urwikekwe agatangira gufuhira umugore we. Umugabo azamujyana imbere y’Uhoraho, maze umuherezabitambo amukorereho ibiteganijwe n’iri tegeko." 
Numbers5:31 Umugabo azaba umuziracyaha, naho umugore niba yaracumuye, azabihanirwa." 
Numbers6:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers6:2 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Niba umugabo cyangwa umugore yiyemeje kwiyegurira Uhoraho nk’uko abanazireya babigenza," 
Numbers6:3 agomba kureka divayi n’izindi nzoga zisindisha zose. Uwo munazireya ntazanywe siki na divayi, inzoga zisembuye, cyangwa ikindi kinyobwa cyose kivuye ku muzabibu. Ntazarye n’imbuto zawo, ari izumye cyangwa ari imbisi." 
Numbers6:4 Igihe cyose akiri muri ayo masezerano, ntazagire icyo arya gikomoka ku giti cyose cy’amasezerano ye, nta cyogosho kizamugera ku mutwe." 
Numbers6:5 Muri icyo gihe cyose azaba yiyeguriye Uhoraho, azaba ari umutagatifu, kandi azareke imisatsi y’umutwe we ikure uko ishaka." 
Numbers6:6 Muri icyo gihe cyose azaba yariyeguriye Uhoraho, ntazegere intumbi." 
Numbers6:7 Yaba se cyangwa nyina, musaza we cyangwa mushiki we, ntazihumanye abegera bamaze gupfa kuko azaba afite ku mutwe we ikimenyetso cy’uko yiyeguriye Imana ye." 
Numbers6:8 Muri icyo gihe cyose azaba yariyeguriye Uhoraho, azamubere umutagatifuzwe." 
Numbers6:9 Niba hari umuntu umuguye iruhande azize urupfu rw’impanuka, akamwanduriza ikimenyetso gitagatifu cyo ku mutwe we, aziyogoshesha ku munsi wa karindwi, ari wo munsi wo kwisukura kwe." 
Numbers6:10 Ku munsi wa munani azashyira umuherezabitambo, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, inuma ebyiri cyangwa intungura ebyiri." 
Numbers6:11 Umuherezabitambo azatura imwe ho igitambo kubera icyo cyaha, indi ayitwike yose. Maze umuherezabitambo azakorere ku munazireya umuhango wo kumuhanaguraho icyaha azaba yatewe na wa mupfu. Kuri uwo munsi kandi, umunazireya azatagatifuza umutwe we," 
Numbers6:12 maze yongere yiyegurire Uhoraho igihe kingana n’icyo yari yaramuteganirije. Azazana n’intama y’umwaka umwe iturweho igitambo cyo kwigorora ku Mana. Iminsi yabanjirije gusukurwa kwe, ntizabarwa, kuko ukwiyegurira Imana kwe kuzaba kwandavuye." 
Numbers6:13 Dore itegeko ryerekeye umunazireya: umunsi usoza igihe cye cyo kwiyegurira Imana, bazamujyana ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Numbers6:14 azaniye Uhoraho ituro rye: agasekurume k’intama k’umwaka umwe katagira inenge ko guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa, akanyagazi k’umwaka umwe katagira inenge ko guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, n’impfizi y’intama itagira inenge yo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro;" 
Numbers6:15 agatebo k’imigati idasembuye ikoze mu ifu igogoye, imitsima ivugishijwe amavuta, n’utugati tudasembuye dusize amavuta, abitangeho ituro hamwe n’amaturo aseswa yategetswe." 
Numbers6:16 Umuherezabitambo ajyane ibyo byose imbere y’Uhoraho, abitureho igitambo gitwikwa n’igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha cy’uwo muntu." 
Numbers6:17 Naho ya sekurume, azayitura Uhoraho ho igitambo cy’ubuhoro hamwe na cya gitebo cy’imigati idasembuye. Nuko, umuherezabitambo abiherezeho igitambo hamwe n’ituro riseswa uko byategetswe." 
Numbers6:18 Noneho umunazireya yogoshere umutwe we watagatifujwe ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, afate imisatsi y’umutwe we watagatifujwe, ayijugunye mu muriro wakira mu nsi y’igitambo cy’ubuhoro." 
Numbers6:19 Umuherezabitambo azafate urutugu rw’isekurume rumaze gushya, hamwe n’umutsima udasembuye wo mu gitebo n’akagati kadasembuye, abishyire mu biganza by’umunazireya umaze kwiyogoshesha imisatsi miremire yarangaga ukwiyegurira Uhoraho kwe." 
Numbers6:20 Umuherezabitambo azazamura ayo maturo matagatifu, ayamurikire Uhoraho; ni ikintu gitagatifu kigenewe umuherezabitambo, kimwe n’inkoro n’itako yari asanzwe ahabwa. Kuva ubwo uwahoze ari umunazireya azashobora kunywa divayi." 
Numbers6:21 Iryo ni ryo tegeko ryerekeye umunazireya urangije igihe cy’amasezerano ye; n’ayo ni yo maturo agomba guha Uhoraho kuko yamwiyeguriye, utabariyemo n’andi yakwitangira ku bushake bwe. Azubahiriza rero amasezerano ye, akurikije itegeko ry’ubunazireya yiyemeje gukurikiza." 
Numbers6:22 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers6:23 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Aroni n’abahungu be: Abayisraheli muzajya mubaha umugisha muvuga muti: 
Numbers6:24 ’Uhoraho aguhe umugisha kandi akurinde! 
Numbers6:25 Uhoraho akurebane impuhwe kandi agusakazemo inema ze! 
Numbers6:26 Uhoraho akwiteho, kandi aguhe amahoro!’" 
Numbers6:27 Nguko uko bazambariza izina ryanjye ku Bayisraheli, nanjye mbahe umugisha.»" 
Numbers7:1 Umunsi Musa yarangijeho kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho yayisutseho amavuta yo gusiga, ayegurira Uhoraho hamwe n’ibikoresho byayo byose. Urutambiro na rwo hamwe n’ibikoresho byarwo byose, arusukaho amavuta y’isigwa, aranabitagatifuza." 
Numbers7:2 Abatware bahagarariye imiryango ya Israheli, bazana amaturo yabo imbere y’Uhoraho:" 
Numbers7:3 amagare atandatu atwikiriye n’ibimasa cumi na bibiri; igare rimwe rigaturwa n’abatware babiri, naho buri mutware agatura ikimasa kimwe; babyigiza imbere y’Inzu." 
Numbers7:4 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers7:5 «Akira ayo maturo bakuzaniye; azakoreshwa imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Uzabishinga Abalevi, ukurikije uko buri wese abikeneye mu kazi ke.»" 
Numbers7:6 Musa yakira amagare n’ibimasa, abishyikiriza Abalevi." 
Numbers7:7 Aha abahungu ba Gerishoni amagare abiri n’ibimasa bine, nk’uko bari babikeneye mu kazi kabo." 
Numbers7:8 Ayandi magare ane n’ibindi bimasa munani abiha umuherezabitambo Itamari mwene Aroni, kugira ngo abishyikirize abahungu ba Merari, nk’uko bari babikeneye mu kazi kabo." 
Numbers7:9 Ntiyagira icyo aha abahungu ba Kehati, kuko imirimo bari bashinzwe yari iyo gutwara ku ntugu ibikoresho bitagatifu." 
Numbers7:10 Abatware bazanye amaturo yo gutaha urutambiro ku munsi rwasutsweho amavuta y’isigwa; maze bigiza amaturo yabo imbere yarwo. 
Numbers7:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Buri mutware azagira umunsi we wo gutanga ituro ryo gutaha urutambiro.»" 
Numbers7:12 Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu wo mu muryango wa Yuda ni we wazanye ituro rye ku munsi wa mbere. 
Numbers7:13 Iryo turo ryari rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70, byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo gutura Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:14 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:15 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:16 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongerera icyaha. 
Numbers7:17 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu." 
Numbers7:18 Ku munsi wa kabiri, Netaneli mwene Shuwari, akaba n’umutware w’umuryango w’Isakari, azana ituro rye." 
Numbers7:19 Ryari rigizwe n’ibi bintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimiye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:20 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:21 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:22 azana n’isekurume yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:23 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Netaneli mwene Shuwari." 
Numbers7:24 Umunsi wa gatatu wabaye uwa Eliyabu mwene Heloni, akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Zabuloni." 
Numbers7:25 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70, byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:26 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:27 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:28 azana n’isekurume yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:29 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Eliyabu mwene Heloni." 
Numbers7:30 Umunsi wa kane wabaye uwa Elishuru mwene Shedewuru akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Rubeni. 
Numbers7:31 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibi bintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo gutura Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:32 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:33 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama umaze umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:34 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:35 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Elishuru mwene Shedewuru." 
Numbers7:36 Umunsi wa gatanu wabaye uwa Shelumyeli mwene Shurishadayi akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Simewoni. 
Numbers7:37 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibi bintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:38 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:39 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:40 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:41 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Shelumyeli mwene Shurishadayi." 
Numbers7:42 Umunsi wa gatandatu wabaye uwa Eliyasafu mwene Dewuyeli akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Gadi. 
Numbers7:43 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:44 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima sikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:45 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:46 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:47 Azana kandi n’ibimasa by’inkone bibiri, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Eliyasafu mwene Dewuyeli." 
Numbers7:48 Umunsi wa karindwi wabaye uwa Elishama mwene Amihudi akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Efurayimu. 
Numbers7:49 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:50 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:51 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:52 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:53 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Elishama mwene Amihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Umunsi wa munani wabaye uwa Gameliyeli mwene Pedashuri akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Manase. 
Numbers7:55 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:56 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:57 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:58 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:59 Azana kandi n’ibimasa by’inkone bibiri, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Gameliyeli mwene Pedashuri." 
Numbers7:60 Umunsi wa cyenda wabaye uwa Avidani mwene Gidewoni akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Benyamini. 
Numbers7:61 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:62 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:63 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:64 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:65 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Avidani mwene Gidewoni." 
Numbers7:66 Umunsi wa cumi wabaye uwa Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Dani. 
Numbers7:67 Ituro rye rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:68 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:69 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:70 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:71 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi." 
Numbers7:72 Umunsi wa cumi n’umwe wabaye uwa Pagiyeli mwene Okrani, akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Asheri." 
Numbers7:73 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibi bintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:74 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:75 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:76 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:77 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Pagiyeli mwene Okrani." 
Numbers7:78 Umunsi wa cumi n’ibiri wabaye uwa Ahira mwene Eyinani, akaba n’umutware w’abahungu ba Nefutali." 
Numbers7:79 Ituro rye ryari rigizwe n’ibintu bikurikira: isahani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 130, n’ibesani ya feza ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli 70; byose bipimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro. Byombi byari byuzuye ifu ivanze n’amavuta byo guturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers7:80 Yazanye kandi n’agakombe ka zahabu gapima amasikeli 10 kuzuye umubavu," 
Numbers7:81 ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’umwana w’intama w’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa;" 
Numbers7:82 azana n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha. 
Numbers7:83 Azana kandi n’ibimasa bibiri by’inkone, amasekurume y’intama atanu, amasekurume y’ihene atanu, n’utwana tw’intama dutanu tw’umwaka umwe byo guturwaho igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Iryo ni ryo ryabaye ituro rya Ahira mwene Eyinani." 
Numbers7:84 Ayo ni yo yabaye amaturo y’abatware ba Israheli yo gutaha urutambiro, umunsi barusukaho amavuta y’isigwa: amasahani cumi n’abiri ya feza, amabesani cumi n’abiri ya feza, n’udukombe cumi na tubiri twa zahabu." 
Numbers7:85 Buri sahani ya feza yapimaga amasikeli 130, naho ibesani imwe igapima amasikeli 70. Ibyo bintu byose hamwe byari amasikeli ya feza 2,400, upimye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro," 
Numbers7:86 n’udukombe cumi na tubiri twa zahabu twuzuye umubavu, twose hamwe dupima amasikeli 120 ya zahabu." 
Numbers7:87 Amatungo yo gutura ibitambo bitwikwa yose hamwe yari agizwe n’ibimasa cumi na bibiri, amasekurume y’intama cumi n’abiri, n’utwana tw’intama tw’umwaka umwe cumi na tubiri hamwe n’amaturo yagenwe, wongeyeho amasekurume y’ihene cumi n’abiri yo guturaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha." 
Numbers7:88 Amatungo yo gutura igitambo cy’ubuhoro yose hamwe yari agizwe n’ibimasa by’inkone makumyabiri na bine, amasekurume y’intama mirongo itandatu, n’utwana tw’intama tw’umwaka umwe mirongo itandatu. Ayo ni yo maturo yo gutaha urutambiro igihe bari bamaze kurusukaho amavuta y’isigwa." 
Numbers7:89 Iyo Musa yinjiraga mu Ihema ry’ibonaniro ngo avugane n’Uhoraho, yumvaga ijwi riturutse hejuru y’urwicurizo, hagati y’Abakerubimu babiri – urwicurizo rwari hejuru y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano. Nuko Musa akavugana n’Uhoraho." 
Numbers8:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers8:2 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Aroni: Nucana amatara yo ku kinyarumuri uko ari arindwi, ajye amurika imbere yacyo.»" 
Numbers8:3 Aroni abigenza atyo: acana amatara imbere y’ikinyarumuri nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa. 
Numbers8:4 Dore uko icyo kinyarumuri cyari gikoze: cyari gicuze muri zahabu kuva hasi kugeza ku mitako yo hejuru. Icyo kinyarumuri cyari cyarakozwe bakurikije urugero Uhoraho yari yareretse Musa. 
Numbers8:5 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers8:6 «Mu bana ba Israheli ushyire Abalevi ukwabo maze ubasukure. 
Numbers8:7 Uzabagenzereza utya kugira ngo ubasukure: Uzabasukeho amazi yo kubahanaguraho icyaha, na bo banyuze urwogosho ku mubiri wose, bamese kandi n’imyenda yabo, bisukure." 
Numbers8:8 Bazafata ikimasa hamwe n’ituro ryategetswe ry’ifu ivanze n’amavuta, nawe ufate ikindi kimasa uzaturaho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha." 
Numbers8:9 Uzajyana Abalevi imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro, maze ukoranye imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli." 
Numbers8:10 Uzajyana Abalevi imbere y’Uhoraho maze Abayisraheli babaramburireho ibiganza. 
Numbers8:11 Hanyuma Aroni azegurira Uhoraho Abalevi ho umugabane ahawe n’Abayisraheli bose, maze bagenerwe gutunganya imihango yose y’Uhoraho." 
Numbers8:12 Abalevi bazaramburira ibiganza byabo ku ruhanga rwa bya bimasa, maze wowe ubwawe uzabiture Uhoraho, kimwe ugitangeho igitambo cyo guhongera ibyaha, ikindi ugitangeho igitambo gitwikwa, kugira ngo ukorere ku Balevi umuhango w’ibabarirwa ry’ibyaha." 
Numbers8:13 Uzashyire Abalevi imbere ya Aroni n’abahungu be, maze uzabegurire Uhoraho ho umugabane we." 
Numbers8:14 Uzarobanure Abalevi mu Bayisraheli bose babe abanjye. 
Numbers8:15 Nyuma y’ibyo, Abalevi bazajya gutunganya imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Uzabasukura rero maze ubamurikeho ituro ritanzwe." 
Numbers8:16 Kuko mbahaweho ituro, ndabeguriwe rwose mu Bayisraheli. Mbagize abanjye mu kigwi cy’uburiza bwose, ni ukuvuga abavutse ari imfura ku Bayisraheli," 
Numbers8:17 kuko icyavutse uburiza cyose muri Israheli ari icyanjye, cyaba umuntu cyangwa itungo. Nabyigeneye umunsi ntsemba ibyavutse uburiza byose byo mu Misiri." 
Numbers8:18 Cyakora ubu niyeguriye Abalevi mu kigwi cy’abavutse uburiza bose bo muri Israheli. 
Numbers8:19 Abo Balevi mbashinze Aroni n’abahungu be kugira ngo bajye bahagararira Abayisraheli bose mu mirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, banabakorereho umuhango wo kubakiza ibyaha. Bityo Abayisraheli ntibazongera guterwa n’icyorezo cy’uko begereye ahantu hatagatifu.»" 
Numbers8:20 Uko ni ko Musa, Aroni n’imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli bagenjereje Abalevi. Abayisraheli bagenzereza Abalevi nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa." 
Numbers8:21 Abalevi barisukura, bamesa n’imyenda yabo. Aroni abamurikira Uhoraho, kugira ngo bamubere ituro, maze abakoreraho umuhango ubakiza ibyaha ukanabasukura." 
Numbers8:22 Kuva ubwo Abalevi batangirira mu maso ya Aroni n’abahungu be imirimo yabo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. Abalevi babagenzereza uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse Musa. 
Numbers8:23 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers8:24 «Dore amategeko agenga Abalevi: guhera ku myaka makumyabiri n’itanu, Umulevi azaba ashinzwe kurangiza imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers8:25 Nagira imyaka mirongo itanu azava kuri ako kazi, ntazongera gukora." 
Numbers8:26 Azafasha abavandimwe be mu kurangiza imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, ariko ntazakore imirimo iruhije. Ayo ni yo mategeko uzashyiraho yerekeye imirimo y’Abalevi.»" 
Numbers9:1 Mu kwezi kwa mbere k’umwaka wa kabiri bavuye mu Misiri, Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu butayu bwa Sinayi ati" 
Numbers9:2 «Abayisraheli bajye bahimbaza Pasika ku munsi wategetswe. 
Numbers9:3 Bazajye bayihimbaza ku munsi wa cumi na kane w’uko kwezi, nimugoroba mu kabwibwi. Muzayihimbaza mukurikije amategeko n’imigenzo yayo yose.»" 
Numbers9:4 Nuko Musa abwira Abayisraheli guhimbaza Pasika. 
Numbers9:5 Bayihimbariza mu butayu bwa Sinayi ku munsi wa cumi na kane nimugoroba mu kabwibwi. Abayisraheli babigenza uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa. 
Numbers9:6 Nyamara ariko, hariho abantu batashoboye guhimbaza Pasika kuri uwo munsi kuko bari bahumanijwe no gukora intumbi. Uwo munsi basanga Musa na Aroni barababwira bati" 
Numbers9:7 «N’ubwo twahumanijwe no gukora intumbi, ni iki cyatubuza kuzanira Uhoraho ituro ryacu ku munsi wategetswe kimwe n’abandi Bayisraheli bose?»" 
Numbers9:8 Musa arabasubiza ati «Mube mutegereje mbanze menye icyo Uhoraho yemeza kuri mwe.» 
Numbers9:9 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers9:10 «Bwira Abayisraheli aya magambo uti: Nihagira umuntu muri mwe cyangwa mu bazabakomokaho uhumanywa no gukora intumbi cyangwa yaragiye mu rugendo rwa kure, ibyo ntibizamubuze guhimbaza Pasika y’Uhoraho," 
Numbers9:11 ariko bo bazajya bayihimbaza mu kwezi kwa kabiri, ku munsi wa cumi na kane, nimugoroba mu kabwibwi. Bazarya umwana w’intama, bawurishe imigati idasembuye n’imboga zisharira." 
Numbers9:12 Ntibazagire ibyo baraza ngo bigeze mu gitondo, kandi ntibazavunagure amagufa y’uwo mwana w’intama. Bazahimbaza Pasika bakurikije amategeko n’imigenzo yayo yose." 
Numbers9:13 Ariko nihagira umuntu utahumanye kandi ntabe no mu rugendo, ntahimbaze Pasika, uwo nguwo azacibwa mu muryango we, kuko atazaba yazaniye ituro rye Uhoraho ku munsi wategetswe. Uwo muntu kandi azabona ingaruka z’icyaha cye." 
Numbers9:14 Niba hari umunyamahanga uri iwanyu, agashaka guhimbaza Pasika y’Uhoraho, azakurikize amategeko n’imigenzo yayo. Iyo mihango izaba imwe ku munyamahanga no ku munyagihugu kavukire.»" 
Numbers9:15 Ku munsi bubatseho Ingoro, ari ryo hema ry’ibonaniro, haje igicu kirayitwikira; nimugoroba gipfukira Ingoro gisa n’umuriro kugeza mu gitondo." 
Numbers9:16 Bigahora bigenda bityo: buri joro igicu cyatwikiraga Ingoro, gisa n’umuriro." 
Numbers9:17 Uko igicu cyavaga ku ngoro, kikazamuka hejuru, Abayisraheli barahagurukaga, bagakomeza urugendo rwabo. Aho icyo gicu cyahagararaga ni ho Abayisraheli bashingaga ingando." 
Numbers9:18 Bityo Abayisraheli bakagenda babitegetswe n’Uhoraho, bakanashinga ingando ari we ubibategetse. Bakayigumamo igihe cyose igicu kikiri hejuru y’Ingoro." 
Numbers9:19 N’iyo cyahagumaga igihe kirekire Abayisraheli bumviraga Uhoraho bagakomeza kumukorera ntibagende. 
Numbers9:20 Hari ubwo icyo gicu cyamaraga iminsi mike ku Ngoro. Bityo ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho bagashinga ingando, ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho bakagenda." 
Numbers9:21 Hari n’ubundi igicu cyagumaga ku Ngoro ijoro rimwe, mu gitondo cyahaguruka na bo bakagenda." 
Numbers9:22 Igihe cyose igicu cyamaraga ku Ngoro, ari iminsi ibiri, ukwezi kumwe cyangwa kikahatinda kurushaho, Abayisraheli bashingaga ingando ntibagende; cyahaguruka na bo bakagenda." 
Numbers9:23 Bityo ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho bagashinga ingando, ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho bakagenda. Abayisraheli bumviraga Uhoraho bagakurikiza amategeko ye, uko yari yarayababwiye ayanyujije kuri Musa." 
Numbers10:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers10:2 «Koresha impanda ebyiri uzicurishe muri feza. Uzazifashisha uhamagara imbaga cyangwa uhagurutsa ingando. 
Numbers10:3 Nibavuza izo mpanda, imbaga yose izakoranira iruhande rwawe ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers10:4 Nihavuga imwe gusa, abatware b’imiryango bonyine ni bo bazakoranira iruhande rwawe." 
Numbers10:5 Nibavuza mu ijwi riranguruye, ingando z’iburasirazuba zizagenda." 
Numbers10:6 Nibavuza ubwa kabiri mu ijwi riranguruye, ingando zo mu majyepfo zizagenda. Ingando zose zizahagurutswa n’ijwi riranguruye." 
Numbers10:7 Naho mu guhamagaza imbaga, muzavuza mu ijwi rirongoroye, ariko ritaranguruye." 
Numbers10:8 Abaherezabitambo ari bo bahungu ba Aroni ni bo bonyine bazavuza izo mpanda. Ibyo bibabere itegeko ridakuka kuri mwebwe no ku bazabakomokaho. 
Numbers10:9 Umwanzi nabatera mu gihugu cyanyu, mukajya kumurwanya, mujye muvuza izo mpanda mu ijwi riranguruye. Bityo Uhoraho Imana azabibuka maze abakize ababisha banyu." 
Numbers10:10 Ku munsi w’ibyishimo, uw’ibirori na buri wa mbere w’ukwezi, muzavuza izo mpanda kugira ngo amajwi yazo aherekeze ibitambo byanyu bitwikwa cyangwa by’ubuhoro; ibyo bizatuma Imana yanyu ibibuka. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.»" 
Numbers10:11 Mu mwaka wa kabiri, ku munsi wa makumyabiri w’ukwezi kwa kabiri, igicu kizamuka kiva ku ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers10:12 Abayisraheli bahaguruka mu butayu bwa Sinayi, buri muryango ukwawo, maze igicu gihagarara mu butayu bwa Parani." 
Numbers10:13 Bwari ubwa mbere bahaguruka ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho bari bagejejweho na Musa. 
Numbers10:14 Habanje kugenda abari mu ngando ya bene Yuda, n’imitwe y’ingabo zabo. Ingabo za bene Yuda zategekwaga na Nashoni mwene Aminadabu." 
Numbers10:15 Ingabo za bene Isakari zategekwaga na Netaneli mwene Shuwari. 
Numbers10:16 Naho ingabo za bene Zabuloni zigategekwa na Eliyabu mwene Heloni. 
Numbers10:17 Ingoro y’Uhoraho barayiremura, bene Gerishoni na bene Merari bagenda bayihetse." 
Numbers10:18 Abari mu ngando ya Rubeni na bo bahagurukana n’imitwe y’ingabo zabo. Ingabo za bene Simewoni zategekwaga na Elishuru mwene Shedewuru. 
Numbers10:19 Ingabo za bene Simewoni zategekwaga na Shelumiyeli mwene Shurishadayi. 
Numbers10:20 Naho ingabo za bene Gadi zigategekwa na Eliyasafu mwene Dewuyeli. 
Numbers10:21 Hakurikiraho Abakehati, bagenda bikoreye ibikoresho bitagatifu. Abandi bose bababanza imbere, kuko bagombaga gushinga Ingoro Abakehati batarahagera." 
Numbers10:22 Hongera gukurikiraho abari mu ngando ya bene Efurayimu, n’imitwe y’ingabo zabo. Ingabo za bene Efurayimu zategekwaga na Elishama mwene Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Ingabo za bene Manase zategekwaga na Gameliyeli mwene Pedashuri. 
Numbers10:24 Naho ingabo za bene Benyamini zategekwaga na Avidani mwene Gidewoni. 
Numbers10:25 Nyuma iyaherutse izindi zose, ni ingando ya bene Dani, n’imitwe y’ingabo zayo. Ingabo za bene Dani zategekwaga na Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi." 
Numbers10:26 Ingabo za bene Asheri zategekwaga na Pagiyeli, mwene Okrani." 
Numbers10:27 Naho ingabo za bene Nefutali zigategekwa na Ahira mwene Eyinani. 
Numbers10:28 Uko ni ko Abayisraheli bahagurutse n’imitwe y’ingabo zabo, nuko baragenda." 
Numbers10:29 Musa abwira Hobabu mwene Rewuyeli w’Umumadiyani, ari we sebukwe, ati «Tugiye mu gihugu Uhoraho yadusezeranije, agira ati ’Ndakibahaye’. None, ngwino tujyane, tuzasangire ihirwe Uhoraho yasezeranije Israheli.»" 
Numbers10:30 Hobabu aramusubiza ati «Ntituzajyana, ndifuza gusubira mu gihugu cyanjye, muri bene wacu.»" 
Numbers10:31 Musa arongera ati «Widutererana! Kuko wowe uzi ahantu twashobora gushinga ingando mu butayu, uzatuyobore inzira." 
Numbers10:32 Kandi nuza tukajyana, ihirwe Uhoraho azatugirira, uzaribonaho.»" 
Numbers10:33 Ubwo bava ku musozi w’Uhoraho, bafata urugendo rw’iminsi itatu. Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho bwabagendaga imbere, kugira ngo bubashakire ahantu bashoboraga gushinga ingando." 
Numbers10:34 Igicu cy’Uhoraho cyabatwikiraga ku manywa, iyo babaga bavuye mu ngando." 
Numbers10:35 Iyo ubushyinguro bwahagurukaga, Musa yaravugaga, ati «Haguruka Nyagasani, abanzi bawe batatane, abakurwanya bahunge kure yawe!»" 
Numbers10:36 Igicu cyahagarara, akavuga ati «Garuka, Nyagasani, uture mu mbaga nyamwinshi y’Abayisraheli!»" 
Numbers11:1 Umunsi umwe, imbaga y’Abayisraheli itangira kwijujuta, maze Uhoraho abyumvise ntibyamushimisha, ahubwo biramurakaza cyane. Nuko umuriro w’Uhoraho uyogoza imbaga, utwika uruhande rumwe rw’ingando." 
Numbers11:2 Imbaga itakira Musa, na we atakambira Uhoraho, maze umuriro urahosha." 
Numbers11:3 Aho hantu bahita Tavera, ari byo kuvuga ’ahayogojwe’, kuko umuriro w’Uhoraho wari wahayogoreje Abayisraheli." 
Numbers11:4 Muri bo hari agatsiko k’abantu, bafatwa n’amerwe, bituma n’Abayisraheli ubwabo batangira kwijujuta bavuga bati «Ni nde uzaduha inyama zo kurya?" 
Numbers11:5 Turibuka amafi twariraga ubuntu mu Misiri, ibihaza, imyungu, hamwe n’ibitunguru by’ibibabi, n’iby’ibijumba!" 
Numbers11:6 Nta na kimwe tukibona muri ibyo, none ubuzima bwacu burakendera! Nta kindi turya uretse manu.»" 
Numbers11:7 Manu iyo yari imeze nk’urubuto rwa koriyanderi ikererana nk’ubujeni buva mu biti. 
Numbers11:8 Imbaga yayagaraga ijya kuyitoragura; bakayisya ku rushyo, cyangwa bakayisekura. Nyuma igatekwa mu nkono, igakorwamo utugati. Yaryohaga nk’umutsima bavugishije amavuta." 
Numbers11:9 Iyo urume rwatondaga ku ngando nijoro, ni na ho manu yayigwagaho." 
Numbers11:10 Musa yumva imbaga yijujuta, buri muntu ari ku muryango w’ihema rye. Uhoraho biramurakaza cyane maze Musa abwirana agahinda Uhoraho agira ati" 
Numbers11:11 «Ni iki gituma ugirira nabi umugaragu wawe? Ni iki gituma untererana ukankorera umutwaro wo kuyobora iyi mbaga yose? 
Numbers11:12 Ni jye se wasamye inda ndababyara kugira ngo untegeke kubabumbatira ku gituza nk’uko umurezi abumbatira umwana muto, bakazarinda bagera mu gihugu wasezeranije ba sekuruza?" 
Numbers11:13 Nzakura hehe inyama zo guha iriya mbaga yose ihora inyijujutaho ivuga ngo ’Duhe inyama zo kurya.’ 
Numbers11:14 Jyewe jyenyine singishoboye kwihanganira umutwaro undemereye cyane wo kuyobora iyi mbaga. 
Numbers11:15 Niba uzahora ungenzereza utya, ndakwinginze ngo umbabarire unyice aho kugira ngo nkomeze kubabazwa n’ibyago byanjye!»" 
Numbers11:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Nkoranyiriza abantu mirongo irindwi bo mu batware ba Israheli, abagabo uziho kuba abakuru n’abacamanza b’umuryango. Uzabajyane ku ihema ry’ibonaniro, bahagararane nawe imbere yanjye." 
Numbers11:17 Nzamanuka nkuvugishe, maze mfate ku mwuka ukurimo nywubashyiremo bazajye bagufasha kuyobora imbaga; bityo ntuzongera kwikorera uwo mutwaro wenyine." 
Numbers11:18 Kandi ubwire imbaga y’Abayisraheli, uti ’Nimwisukurire umunsi w’ejo, muzashobore kurya inyama kuko Uhoraho yumvise imyijujuto yanyu igihe mwavugaga muti: Ni nde usaduha inyama zo kurya? Ko twari twimereye neza mu Misiri! Uhoraho rero agiye kubaha inyama maze muzazirye." 
Numbers11:19 Kandi ntimuzazirya umunsi umwe, ibiri, itanu, icumi cyangwa makumyabiri yonyine," 
Numbers11:20 ahubwo muzazirya ukwezi kose kugeza ubwo zizajya zibaca mu mazuru, kugeza ubwo zizabatera iseseme. Ibyo byose kuko mwitandukanyije n’Uhoraho mukamwinuba muvuga ngo: Ni kuki rwose twimutse mu Misiri?»" 
Numbers11:21 Musa arasubiza ati «Uyu muryango ndimo ufite abantu barenga ibihumbi magana atandatu, nawe ukavuga ko ugiye kubaha inyama bakazazirya ukwezi kose!" 
Numbers11:22 N’iyo umuntu yabaga umukumbi w’ubushyo bw’amatungo yose, urabona byabahaza? N’iyo umuntu yabarobera amafi yose yo mu nyanja, hari aho yabakora?»"
