Numbers11:23 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ububasha bw’ukuboko kw’Uhoraho bwaba bwabaye buke? Uzaba ureba niba ijambo ryanjye nakubwiye rizahera!»" 
Numbers11:24 Musa asohoka mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, ajya kubwira imbaga amagambo y’Uhoraho. Akoranya abantu mirongo irindwi bo mu bakuru b’imiryango, baraza bakikiza ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers11:25 Uhoraho amanukira mu gacu, avugisha Musa. Agabanyaho muke ku mwuka wari muri Musa kugira ngo awuhe ba bakuru mirongo irindwi b’imiryango. Wa mwuka ubagezemo batangira guhanura ariko baza kurekeraho." 
Numbers11:26 Hari abagabo babiri Elidadi na Medadi, bari basigaye mu ngando. Bari mu murongo w’abagombaga guhabwa umwuka, uretse ko batari basohotse ngo bajye ku ihema ry’ibonaniro. Ariko na bo umwuka ubajyaho, nuko bahanurira mu ngando." 
Numbers11:27 Umwana w’umuhungu aza yiruka abwira Musa, ati «Elidadi na Medadi barimo barahanurira mu ngando!»" 
Numbers11:28 Yozuwe mwene Nuni wari umufasha wa Musa kuva mu buto bwe, aravuga ati «Shobuja Musa, babuze!»" 
Numbers11:29 Musa aramusubiza ati «Waba se wabagiriye ishyari kubera jyewe? Iyaba Uhoraho yarasakaje umwuka we ku muryango we wose, maze bose bagahinduka abahanuzi!»" 
Numbers11:30 Musa n’abakuru ba Israheli basubira mu ngando. 
Numbers11:31 Umuyaga woherejwe n’Uhoraho uturuka mu nyanja, uzana inkware uzigusha ku ngando no ku mpande zayo zose, zandagara ahantu h’urugendo rw’umunsi wose, ikirundo cyazo kireshya n’imikono ibiri." 
Numbers11:32 Imbaga irahaguruka yiriza uwo munsi wose, ikesha ijoro, ifatira n’undi munsi wose igitoragura izo nkware. Uwari yatoye nke yujuje intonga cumi. Izo nkware bazanika mu mpande zose z’ingando." 
Numbers11:33 Inyama zazo, bakizikozaho iryinyo, batararangiza kuzitapfuna, Uhoraho arabarakarira cyane, nuko imbaga y’Abayisraheli ayahuramo icyorezo gikaze." 
Numbers11:34 Aho hantu bahita i Kiviroti-Tawa ari byo kuvuga ’Imva zatewe n’umururumba’, kuko ariho bahambye imbaga y’abantu bari bafashwe n’umururumba." 
Numbers11:35 Imbaga y’Abayisraheli yavuye i Kiviroti-Tawa yerekeza i Haseroti. 
Numbers12:1 Bamaze kuhagera ni bwo Miriyamu na Aroni baneguraga Musa ko yashatse umugore w’Umunyekushi. 
Numbers12:2 Baribazaga bati «Ese ubundi Uhoraho yavugishije Musa wenyine? Twebweho ntiyatuvugishije?» Nuko Uhoraho arabyumva. 
Numbers12:3 Musa yari umugabo uzi kwiyoroshya, nta muntu n’umwe ku isi wamurushaga kwicisha bugufi." 
Numbers12:4 Uhoraho atungura Musa, Aroni na Miriyamu, arababwira ati «Mwese uko muri batatu mujye ku ihema ry’ibonaniro.» Nuko bose uko ari batatu bajya ku ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers12:5 Uhoraho amanukira mu nkingi y’igicu, ahagarara ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, maze ahamagara Aroni na Miriyamu, bombi bigira imbere ye." 
Numbers12:6 Arababwira ati «Nimwumve neza amagambo yanjye: Niba muri mwe harimo umuhanuzi, ni uko jyewe Uhoraho mubonekera nkamwibwira, cyangwa nkamuvugisha mu nzozi." 
Numbers12:7 Nta bwo rero ari nk’uko ngenzereza umugaragu wanjye Musa; we ni umugabo w’inkoramutima nashinze umuryango wanjye wose. 
Numbers12:8 Muvugisha imbonankubone bitari mu marenga, nkamwiyereka, bityo akabona ishusho y’Uhoraho. None se mutinyutse mute kunegura umugaragu wanjye Musa?»" 
Numbers12:9 Uhoraho arabarakarira cyane maze aragenda. 
Numbers12:10 Agacu karazimira hejuru y’ihema ry’ibonaniro, naho Miriyamu we aba yasheshe ibibembe byererana nk’urubura. Aroni arahindukira areba Miriyamu asanga yafashwe n’ibibembe." 
Numbers12:11 Abwira Musa, ati «Shobuja, ndakwinginze, widushyiraho ingaruka z’icyaha twakoze, dusanzwe turi abapfu, tukaba n’abanyabyaha!" 
Numbers12:12 Ndagusabye Miriyamu ye guhinduka nk’umwana wapfuye akivuka, agasohoka mu nda ya nyina umubiri we waraboze igihande kimwe!»" 
Numbers12:13 Musa atakambira Uhoraho, agira ati «Mana, gira impuhwe umukize!»" 
Numbers12:14 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Iyo se aba yamuciriye mu maso, ntiyari gukorwa n’isoni iminsi irindwi yose? Noneho rero niyirukanwe mu ngando, namara iminsi irindwi hanze yayo azabone kugaruka mu mwanya we.»" 
Numbers12:15 Miriyamu bamwirukana mu ngando mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi, imbaga y’Abayisraheli na yo ntiyaba ikivuye aho mbere y’uko agaruka mu mwanya we." 
Numbers12:16 Nyuma y’ibyo, Abayisraheli bavuye i Haseroti, bajya gushinga ingando mu butayu bwa Parani." 
Numbers13:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers13:2 «Ohereza abantu bajye gutata igihugu cya Kanahani jyewe ngabiye Abayisraheli. Muzohereza abantu bavuye muri buri nzu, buri wese ahagarariye inzu y’abasekuruza be; kandi abazoherezwa bazava mu batware ba Israheli.»" 
Numbers13:3 Guhera mu butayu bwa Parani, Musa arabohereza, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse. Abo bantu bose bari bavuye mu batware ba Israheli." 
Numbers13:4 Dore amazina yabo: Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Rubeni, ni Shamuwa mwene Zakuri." 
Numbers13:5 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Simewoni, ni Shafati mwene Hori." 
Numbers13:6 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Yuda, ni Kalebu mwene Yefune." 
Numbers13:7 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Isakari, ni Yigweyali mwene Yozefu." 
Numbers13:8 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Efurayimu, ni Hosheya mwene Nuni." 
Numbers13:9 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Benyamini, ni Paliti mwene Rafu." 
Numbers13:10 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Zabuloni, ni Gadiyeli mwene Sodi." 
Numbers13:11 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Yozefu ari yo ya Manase, ni Gadi mwene Susi." 
Numbers13:12 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Dani, ni Amiyeli mwene Gemali." 
Numbers13:13 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Asheri, ni Sheturi mwene Mikayeli." 
Numbers13:14 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Nefutali, ni Nahibi mwene Wofusi." 
Numbers13:15 Uwari uhagarariye inzu ya Gadi, ni Gewuyeli mwene Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Ayo ni yo mazina y’abantu Musa yohereje gutata igihugu cya Kanahani; Hosheya mwene Nuni, Musa amwita izina rya Yozuwe." 
Numbers13:17 Musa abohereza gutata igihugu cya Kanahani, agira ati «Mugende, munyure kuri Negevu, muterere umusozi" 
Numbers13:18 maze murebe niba abaturage b’aho ari abanyembaraga cyangwa niba ari abanyantege nkeya. 
Numbers13:19 Muzarebe niba icyo gihugu gituwe n’abo bantu ari cyiza cyangwa ari kibi, murebe niba imigi batuyemo ari ingando cyangwa niba ari ibigo by’intavogerwa." 
Numbers13:20 Muzarebe niba icyo gihugu cyera imyaka cyangwa niba kiyirumbya, murebe kandi niba giteye amashyamba cyangwa niba ari nta yo. Muzanashirike ubute maze musorome ku mbuto z’icyo gihugu.» Koko rero cyari igihe cy’imizabibu ya mbere." 
Numbers13:21 Nuko barazamuka batata icyo gihugu, bahera ku butayu bwa Sini bagera i Rehovu hafi ya Lebo-Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Bazamukira kuri Negevu, bagera kuri Heburoni ahari hatuwe na Ahimani, Sheshayi na Talumayi, abuzukuru b’Abanaki. Heburoni iyo yari yarubatswe imyaka irindwi mbere y’uko Tanisi yo mu Misiri yubakwa." 
Numbers13:23 Bageze mu kibaya cya Eshikoli, bahatema ishami ry’umuzabibu rifite iseri bagombye guhekesha umutsibo ari babiri. Basoromye kandi ku matunda, no ku mbuto z’imitini." 
Numbers13:24 Aho hantu bahita ikibaya cya Eshikoli, ari byo kuvuga ’Ikibaya cy’iseri’, kubera rya seri ry’umuzabibu Abayisraheli bahasoromye." 
Numbers13:25 Ubutasi bw’icyo gihugu babumazemo iminsi mirongo ine. 
Numbers13:26 Bagaruka i Kadeshi mu butayu bwa Parani, bahasanga Musa, Aroni n’imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli. Bababwira iby’urugendo rwabo, banabereka imbuto zo muri icyo gihugu bavuyemo." 
Numbers13:27 Batekerereza Musa iyi nkuru, bati «Twagiye mu gihugu watwoherejemo, dusanga rwose ari igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki; mbese dore n’imbuto cyera!" 
Numbers13:28 Ariko rero, abantu bagituye ni abanyamaboko cyane, imigi yabo ni ibigo bigari, bikikijwe n’inkuta z’amabuye. Twahasanze kandi n’abuzukuru b’Abanaki." 
Numbers13:29 Abamaleki batuye mu ntara ya Negevu, Abahiti, Abayebuzi n’Abahemori batuye mu misozi, naho Abakanahani batuye hafi y’inyanja no ku nkombe z’uruzi rwa Yorudani.»" 
Numbers13:30 Kalebu acecekesha imbaga yari itaramiye Musa, agira ati «Reka tugende, tuzamuke, twigabize kiriya gihugu; nta gushidikanya ko tuzagitsinda, tukakigarurira.»" 
Numbers13:31 Ariko abari bajyanye na Kalebu muri ubwo butasi, baramusubiza bati «Ntidushobora gutera bariya bantu kuko baturusha amaboko.»" 
Numbers13:32 Ndetse batangira no kugayira cyane Abayisraheli, icyo gihugu bari baratase, bavuga bati «Igihugu twazengurutse kugira ngo tugitate, twasanze ari igihugu kica nabi abagituye, kandi n’abantu twahabonye ni abagabo barebare b’inkorokoro." 
Numbers13:33 Twanahabonye ba bantu b’ibihangange, bene Anaki, bo mu bwoko bw’abantu b’ibihambati. Imbere yabo twumvaga turi nk’inzige, kandi koko na bo ubwabo ni ko babonaga tungana.»" 
Numbers14:1 Imbaga yose yishyira hamwe irasakabaka ndetse irara irira ijoro ryose. 
Numbers14:2 Abayisraheli bose bagarambira Musa na Aroni; maze imbaga ibabwirira icyarimwe iti «Iyaba twaraguye mu gihugu cya Misiri! Cyangwa se tugapfira muri ubu butayu! 
Numbers14:3 Ni kuki Uhoraho atujyanye muri kiriya gihugu ngo tuzaharimburirwe n’inkota? Abagore bacu n’abana bacu bazabanyaga. Ese ikiruta kuri twebwe si uko twakwisubirira mu Misiri?» 
Numbers14:4 Nuko barabwirana bati «Twitorere umutware maze twisubirire mu Misiri!» 
Numbers14:5 Musa na Aroni bikubita hasi bubika amaso ku butaka, imbere y’imbaga y’Abayisraheli." 
Numbers14:6 Yozuwe mwene Nuni na Kalebu mwene Yefune bari mu mubare w’abagiye gutata icyo gihugu bashishimura imyambaro yabo. 
Numbers14:7 Maze ni ko kubwira ikoraniro ry’Abayisraheli, bati «Icyo gihugu twazengurutse kugira ngo tugitate, ni igihugu cyiza cyane!" 
Numbers14:8 Uhoraho nadutonesha, azatujyana muri icyo gihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki, maze akiduhe." 
Numbers14:9 Mureke rero kwivumburira Uhoraho, mwoye no gutinya abantu bo muri kiriya gihugu; mu kubatsinda tuzabayongobeza mu kanya gato! Imana zabo ntizikibarinda, ngo zibatwikirize igicucu cyazo, ariko twebwe Uhoraho ari kumwe natwe. Mwibatinya rero!»" 
Numbers14:10 Imbaga yose yari mu migambi yo kubicisha amabuye, nuko ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryigaragariza Abayisraheli bose ku ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers14:11 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Uriya muryango uzansuzugura kugeza na ryari? Bazamburira icyizere kugeza ryari n’ibimenyetso byose nagiriye rwagati muri bo?" 
Numbers14:12 Ngiye kubahuramo icyorezo, mbambure umurage wabo, noneho wowe nzagukomoreho umuryango munini kandi ukomeye kurusha uriya.»" 
Numbers14:13 Musa asubiza Uhoraho, ati «Abanyamisiri bazi ko uyu muryango wavanywe iwabo n’imbaraga zawe," 
Numbers14:14 ndetse babikwije no mu batuye iki gihugu. Ubu bazi ko wowe Uhoraho uri muri uyu muryango rwagati, ukaba uwiyereka imbonankubone, kandi ko igicu cyawe kiwutwikiriye. Bazi ko wowe ubwawe, ku manywa uwugenda imbere mu nkingi y’igicu, naho nijoro ukawugenda imbere mu nkingi y’umuriro." 
Numbers14:15 None ngo wakwica uyu muryango nk’umuntu umwe! Amahanga yamenye inkuru y’ubwamamare bwawe yakurizaho kuvuga ngo 
Numbers14:16 ’Uhoraho ntiyari ashoboye gucyura uriya muryango mu gihugu yawusezeranije, ni na yo mpamvu yawutikirije mu butayu.’" 
Numbers14:17 Ahubwo ndasaba ngo imbaraga z’umutegetsi wanjye zigaragaze! Kuko wabyivugiye muri aya magambo, uti" 
Numbers14:18 ’Ndi Uhoraho, sindakara vuba, nuje ubudahemuka kandi nihanganira uncumuyeho n’unyiteyeho hejuru, ariko sindenzaho ngo nibagirwe, igicumuro cy’ababyeyi ngikurikirana ku bana babo, nkageza ku buzukuruza cyangwa ku buvivi.’" 
Numbers14:19 Kuko impuhwe zawe zahebuje, babarira uyu muryango icyaha cyawo, nk’uko nanone wawihanganiye kuva mu Misiri kugeza aha.»" 
Numbers14:20 Uhoraho asubiza Musa, ati «Ndabababariye nk’uko wabisabye." 
Numbers14:21 Ariko rero, ndabirahiye uko izina ryanjye ari Uhoraho, Nyir’ubuzima, n’uko ikuzo ryanjye risakaye ku isi yose:" 
Numbers14:22 Bariya bantu babonye ikuzo ryanjye n’ibimenyetso nakoreye mu Misiri no mu butayu, hanyuma bakaba bamaze kungerageza incuro cumi zose banga kunyumvira," 
Numbers14:23 nta n’umwe muri bo, ndabirahiye, uzabona igihugu nasezeranije ababyeyi babo; nta n’umwe muri bariya bansuzuguye uzakibona!" 
Numbers14:24 Ariko umugaragu wanjye Kalebu, kuko afite undi mutima, akaba yarankurikiye atajijinganya, nzamujyana muri icyo gihugu yavuye gutata, maze abuzukuru be bazagitunge;" 
Numbers14:25 naho Abamaleki n’Abakanahani bazakomeze bature mu kibaya. Guhera ejo, muzasubize inyuma, mwerekeze mu butayu mugana ku nyanja y’Urufunzo.»" 
Numbers14:26 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Numbers14:27 «Nzihanganira iyi mbaga iteye icyangiro idasiba kunyiteruraho ngeze ryari? Numvise neza amagambo y’imyijujuto Abayisraheli badahwema kuntera. 
Numbers14:28 Ubabwire rero, uti ’Ndabirahiye, mu izina ryanjye Uhoraho, Nyir’ubuzima: nzabagenzereza ibihuje n’akabavamo niyumviye. Uwo ari Uhoraho ubivuga!" 
Numbers14:29 Mwebwe mwese ababaruwe mugejeje ku myaka makumyabiri, mwebwe mwese abanyiteruyeho, uko mungana, ni muri ubu butayu intumbi zanyu zizagarama." 
Numbers14:30 Ndabirahiye: nta bwo muzinjira mu gihugu nari naragiriye indahiro yo kubatuzamo; usibye Kalebu mwene Yefune mwene Nuni. 
Numbers14:31 Naho abana banyu mwavugaga ko bazaba iminyago, nzakibajyanamo maze bamenye icyo gihugu mwebwe mwanze." 
Numbers14:32 Mwebwe mwenyine, intumbi zanyu zizagarama muri ubu butayu." 
Numbers14:33 Mu gihe cy’imyaka mirongo ine, abahungu banyu bazararagira mu butayu, bashengurwe n’intimba y’ubuhemu bwanyu, kugeza ubwo intumbi zanyu zose zizagarama muri ubu butayu." 
Numbers14:34 Mbese uko iminsi yabaye mirongo ine yo gutata igihugu, umunsi umwe nzawubara ho umwaka, maze mu gihe cy’imyaka mirongo ine, muzashengurwe n’intimba y’ibyaha byanyu, maze muzamenyereho icyo ari cyo umugayo wanjye." 
Numbers14:35 Jyewe Uhoraho ndabivuze kandi ndabirahiriye, nguko uko nzagenzereza iriya mbaga iteye icyangiro yampagurukiye. Amaherezo yabo bose ni aha mu butayu, ni ho bazagwa.»" 
Numbers14:36 Ba bagabo Musa yari yohereje gutata cya gihugu, bagahindukira bagisebya, bakanamuteza imbaga yose," 
Numbers14:37 abo ngabo rero bari bagize ubugome bwo gusebya icyo gihugu, urupfu rw’impanuka rwabakubitiye mu maso y’Uhoraho." 
Numbers14:38 Yozuwe mwene Nuni na Kalebu mwene Yefune ni bo bonyine barokotse mu bari baragiye gutata icyo gihugu. 
Numbers14:39 Musa yagejeje ku Bayisraheli bose ayo magambo, maze batangira kwicwa n’agahinda." 
Numbers14:40 Bukeye mu museso, bazamuka bagana mu misozi miremire bavuga bati «Ni koko twaracumuye, noneho turemeye, tugiye mu gihugu Uhoraho yatweretse.»" 
Numbers14:41 Musa arasubiza ati «Ibyo mukora ni ibiki? Muraca ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho! Nta bwo bizabahira! 
Numbers14:42 Mwikwirirwa muzamuka kuko Uhoraho atakiri kumwe namwe; mwikwishyira ababisha banyu ngo babatsinde. 
Numbers14:43 Abamaleki n’Abakanahani bari hariya imbere yanyu, muzagwa ku bugi bw’inkota zabo. Kandi ubwo mwaretse kumukurikira, Uhoraho ntakiri kumwe namwe.»" 
Numbers14:44 Ariko bo baranga, barazamuka berekeza mu misozi miremire, kandi ari Musa ari n’ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, ntibava mu ngando." 
Numbers14:45 Abamaleki n’Abakanahani bari batuye muri iyo misozi baramanuka, barabarwanya, barabatsemba kugeza i Horima." 
Numbers15:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers15:2 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Igihe muzamara gutaha mu gihugu nzabaha ngo muzagiture; 
Numbers15:3 igihe muzatura Uhoraho ibiribwa, igitambo gitwikwa cyangwa icy’amatungo magufi n’amaremare, nimushaka kurangiza indahiro mwahize, cyangwa gutura igitambo ku bushake bwanyu, cyangwa se ari igitambo cyo mu minsi mikuru yanyu, nimutura rero Uhoraho ibiribwa bifite impumuro imwurura," 
Numbers15:4 uzabimushyira azatange ituro ry’icyibo cy’ifu ivugishijwe kimwe cya kane cy’akabindi k’amavuta. 
Numbers15:5 Naho divayi y’igitambo giseswa, uzatura kimwe cya kane cy’akabindi giherekejwe n’igitambo gitwikwa, cyangwa n’igitambo gisanzwe niba ari umwana w’intama." 
Numbers15:6 Niba ari isekurume y’intama, uzatura ibyibo bibiri by’ifu ivugishijwe kimwe cya gatatu cy’akabindi k’amavuta," 
Numbers15:7 wongereho na kimwe cya gatatu cy’akabindi ka divayi yo guturwaho igitambo giseswa. Uzatura utyo Uhoraho ibyo biribwa bifite impumuro imwurura. 
Numbers15:8 Uhoraho numutura ikimasa ho igitambo gitwikwa cyangwa igitambo cy’ubuhoro," 
Numbers15:9 icyo kimasa kizaherekezwa n’ituro ry’ibyibo bitatu by’ifu ivugishijwe kimwe cya kabiri cy’akabindi k’amavuta. 
Numbers15:10 Naho divayi y’igitambo giseswa, uzatura kimwe cya kabiri cy’akabindi. Ibyo bizabera Uhoraho ifunguro rifite impumuro imwurura." 
Numbers15:11 Ituro ryaba ikimasa, isekurume y’intama, umwana w’intama cyangwa ihene, ni uko muzajya mugenza." 
Numbers15:12 Amatungo muzatura uko azaba angana kose, muzagenza mutyo kuri buri tungo." 
Numbers15:13 Ni uko umunyagihugu kavukire wese azajya atura ibitambo, igihe azaba ashyikiriza Uhoraho ibiribwa bifite impumuro imwurura." 
Numbers15:14 Umunyamahanga uzaba ubatuyemo vuba, cyangwa ubamazemo ibisekuruza byinshi, natura Uhoraho ibiribwa bifite impumuro imwurura, azakore nk’uko mubigenza." 
Numbers15:15 Kuko mwishyize hamwe, mwebwe ubwanyu n’umunyamahanga uzaba atuye iwanyu, muzagira umuhango umwe. Uzaba umuhango udahinduka mu maso y’Uhoraho, kuri mwebwe no ku munyamahanga mu myaka yose." 
Numbers15:16 Hazaba itegeko rimwe, n’umuhango umwe, kuri mwebwe no ku munyamahanga uzaba atuye iwanyu.»" 
Numbers15:17 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers15:18 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Nimumara kugera mu gihugu ngiye kubajyanamo," 
Numbers15:19 mukarya ku migati yacyo, muzagabanyeho iy’ituro mugomba guha Uhoraho." 
Numbers15:20 Ku mutsima w’umuganura, muzagabanyeho irobe ry’ituro mugomba guha Uhoraho. Iryo gabanya muzarikora nk’uko musanzwe mubigenza ku yindi misaruro." 
Numbers15:21 Ku mitsima y’umuganura, muzagomba guhaho ituro Uhoraho; muzabigenze mutyo no mu myaka yose." 
Numbers15:22 Hari ubwo, kubera uburangare, muzaca kuri rimwe muri ayo mategeko Uhoraho yabwiye Musa," 
Numbers15:23 mukarenga ku byo yategetse abinyujije kuri Musa kuva ku munsi yabitegetseho na nyuma yaho uko ibisekuru byagiye bisimburana. 
Numbers15:24 Icyo cyaha kitagambiriwe, n’iyo cyaba cyakozwe ikoraniro ritabizi, ikoraniro ryose rizatura Uhoraho ikimasa ho igitambo gitwikwa gifite impumuro imwurura. Rizatanga kandi ituro risanzwe n’ibitambo biseswa uko byateganijwe, kandi n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Numbers15:25 Umuherezabitambo azakora umuhango wo guhanagura icyaha ku ikoraniro ry’Abayisraheli, bityo babe baronse imbabazi. Kuko ari icyaha kitagambiriwe, kandi bazaba bazaniye Uhoraho amaturo yabo, ibiribwa hamwe n’ibitambo by’impongano y’icyo cyaha." 
Numbers15:26 Imbabazi zizahabwa ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli n’umunyamahanga uzaba abarimo, kuko icyo cyaha kitagambiriwe kizaba cyahamye umuryango wose." 
Numbers15:27 Niba ari umuntu umwe ukoze icyaha atagambiriye, azatura ihene y’umwaka umwe ho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Numbers15:28 Umuherezabitambo azakorera mu maso y’Uhoraho umuhango wo guhanagura icyaha kitagambiriwe kuri uwo muntu uzaba yagikoze kubera uburangare. Azamukoreraho umuhango wo guhanagura icyaha, bityo imbabazi abe azironse." 
Numbers15:29 Yaba uwo mu Bayisraheli, umunyagihugu kavukire cyangwa umunyamahanga ubatuyemo, muzakurikiza itegeko rimwe ku muntu wakoze icyaha kubera uburangare." 
Numbers15:30 Ariko umuntu ukoze icyaha yabigambiriye, yaba umunyagihugu kavukire cyangwa umunyamahanga, aba atutse Uhoraho. Uwo muntu azacibwa mu muryango we," 
Numbers15:31 kuko azaba yasuzuguye ijambo ry’Uhoraho, akanaca ku mategeko ye. Uwo muntu agomba gucibwa, icyaha cye kigakomeza kumuhama." 
Numbers15:32 Abayisraheli bari bakiri mu butayu, maze umugabo umwe afatwa atora inkwi ku munsi wa Sabato." 
Numbers15:33 Abari bamufashe atora inkwi bamujyana imbere ya Musa, Aroni n’ikoraniro ryose." 
Numbers15:34 Baba bamurinze igihe bategereje amabwiriza yerekeye igihano ari buhabwe. 
Numbers15:35 Uhoraho rero abwira Musa, ati «Uriya mugabo azicwe; ikoraniro ryose rizamuterere amabuye hanze y’ingando.»" 
Numbers15:36 Ikoraniro ryose rimujyana hanze y’ingando, bamutera amabuye, maze arapfa. Ibyo ni byo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers15:38 «Abayisraheli n’abazabakomokaho bazatere incunda ku misozo y’imyenda yabo. Izo ncunda zirenga ku myenda yabo, bazazidodereho agashumi gatukura." 
Numbers15:39 Kazabafasha kurema wa musozo; nimuwubona, muzibuka amategeko y’Uhoraho maze muzayakurikize, mwoye gushukwa n’imitima yanyu cyangwa n’amaso yanyu, byabakururira ubuhemu." 
Numbers15:40 Bityo muzatekereza kubahiriza amategeko yanjye, maze mutunganire Imana yanyu." 
Numbers15:41 Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri kugira ngo mbe Imana yanyu. Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.»" 
Numbers16:1 Kore umuhungu wa Yishari mwene Kehati wa Levi agomesha abuzukuru ba Rubeni ari bo Datani na Abiramu bene Eliyabu, hamwe na Oni mwene Peleti." 
Numbers16:2 Bo rero, bafatanije n’abandi Bayisraheli magana abiri na mirongo itanu, bivumbura kuri Musa. Bari abantu b’ibirangirire, b’abatware b’umuryango, bakaba ari na bo bahagarariraga ikoraniro." 
Numbers16:3 Nuko rero biterura kuri Musa na Aroni bavuga bati «Twabarambiwe! Abagize ikoraniro bose ni abatagatifu kandi Uhoraho ari hagati yabo; mwakuye he ububasha bwo kwigira abategetsi b’ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho?» 
Numbers16:4 Musa yumvise ayo magambo yitura hasi, yubika umutwe ku butaka." 
Numbers16:5 Hanyuma abwira Kore n’abafatanije na we, ati «Ejo mu gitondo, Uhoraho azatumenyesha umuntu uri uwe, w’umutagatifu, kandi unemerewe kumwegera. Uwo azaba yahisemo, azamwemerera kumwegera." 
Numbers16:6 None rero wowe, Kore n’abantu bawe, nimugenze mutya: mufate ibyotezo," 
Numbers16:7 ejo muzabicanemo umuriro, maze imbere y’Uhoraho mubishyiremo ububani. Umuntu Uhoraho azahitamo ni we uzaba ari umutagatifu. Nanjye kandi, mwebwe bene Levi, nabarambiwe!»" 
Numbers16:8 Musa arongera abwira Kore, ati «Bene Levi, nimutege amatwi!" 
Numbers16:9 Koko ntimuranyurwa, kuba Imana ya Israheli yarabahisemo ikabemerera kuyegera! Ni mwe murangiza imirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, mukanahagararira ikoraniro igihe muyobora imihango mu izina rya bose." 
Numbers16:10 Yabemereye kumwegera, wowe, Kore n’abavandimwe bawe bose b’Abalevi. Ibyo mwasanze bitabahagije ku buryo mwarwanira no kuba abaherezabitambo!" 
Numbers16:11 Ubwo ni icyo cyatumye, wowe n’abantu bawe, mwishyira hamwe mukiterura kuri Uhoraho! Aroni se we ni muntu ki kugira ngo mumwijujuteho?»" 
Numbers16:12 Musa ahamagaje Datani na Abiramu bene Eliyabu, baramubwira bati «Nta bwo tuzazamuka ngo tujye muri kiriya gihugu." 
Numbers16:13 Ibyo ntibihagije kubona waratuzamuye ukadukura mu gihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki, kugira ngo tugwe muri ubu butayu? None ibyo bivuyeho ugashaka no kudutegeka?" 
Numbers16:14 Oya, mu by’ukuri nta bwo watujyanye mu gihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki! Nta bwo waduhaye umurage w’imirima cyangwa uw’imizabibu. Ese urakeka ko bariya bantu ari impumyi? Nta bwo tuzajyayo!»" 
Numbers16:15 Musa ararakara cyane, maze abwira Uhoraho, ati «Ntiwakire ituro ryabo. Nta n’indogobe yabo nigeze mfata. Nta n’umwe muri bo nagiriye nabi.»" 
Numbers16:16 Musa abwira Kore, ati «Wowe n’ingabo zawe, ejo muzabe muri imbere y’Uhoraho hamwe na Aroni." 
Numbers16:17 Muzafate mwese ibyotezo byanyu, mushyiremo ububani, maze buri wese azabimurikire imbere y’Uhoraho. Byose hamwe bizaba ari magana abiri na mirongo itanu; wowe na Aroni, buri wese azaba afite icye.»" 
Numbers16:18 Bose bafata ibyotezo byabo, bacanamo umuriro, bashyiraho ububani, maze bo, Musa na Aroni bahagarara ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers16:19 Kore akoranyiriza abantu be iruhande rwa Musa na Aroni, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Nuko ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryigaragariza imbaga yose," 
Numbers16:20 maze Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Numbers16:21 «Nimwitandukanye na bariya bantu, muri aka kanya ngiye kubarimbura.»" 
Numbers16:22 Bikubita hasi, maze bubika umutwe ku butaka bavuga bati «Mana, Mana, wowe uha umwuka ikiremwa cyose, umuntu umwe aracumura maze ukarakarira ikoraniro ryose!»" 
Numbers16:23 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers16:24 «Bwira ikoraniro rijye kure y’ingo za Kore, Datani na Abiramu.»" 
Numbers16:25 Musa ahagurutse ngo ajye gushaka Datani na Abiramu, abakuru b’imiryango baramukurikira." 
Numbers16:26 Abwira ikoraniro ryose aya magambo, ati «Mujye kure y’amahema ya bariya bagome, kandi ntimugire ikintu cyabo mukoraho, hato namwe mutavaho murimbuka kubera ibyaha byabo byose!»" 
Numbers16:27 Rubanda rero bajya kure y’ingo za Kore, Datani na Abiramu. Datani na Abiramu bari basohokanye n’abagore babo, abana n’abuzukuru babo, maze bahagarara ku miryango y’amahema yabo." 
Numbers16:28 Musa aravuga ati «Dore ikizabemeza ko Uhoraho ari we wanyohereje kurangiza bya bikorwa byose, nkaba nta cyo nkora ku bushake bwanjye." 
Numbers16:29 Bariya bantu, nibicwa n’urupfu rusanzwe rutwara abandi, bakanogoka uko abandi banogoka, Uhoraho ntazaba yaranyohereje." 
Numbers16:30 Ariko rero Uhoraho nakora igitangaza, maze isi ikicamo urwobo ikabamirana n’ibyo batunze byose, bakarigita ikuzimu ari bazima, muzamenya ko bariya bantu bari barasuzuguye Uhoraho.»" 
Numbers16:31 Yarangije kuvuga ayo magambo, nuko ubutaka busadukira ku birenge bya Datani na Abiramu." 
Numbers16:32 Isi yicamo urwobo, ibamirana n’imiryango yabo, hamwe n’abantu ba Kore bose n’ibyabo byose." 
Numbers16:33 Bo n’ibyo bari batunze byose, birigita ikuzimu ari bazima, isi ibarengaho; nuko bava mu ikoraniro batyo." 
Numbers16:34 Abayisraheli bari babakikije, bumvise induru zabo, bahunga babwirana bati «Nimucyo duhunge! naho ubundi isi iratumira!»" 
Numbers16:35 Nyuma, Uhoraho yohereza ikibatsi cy’umuriro gitwika ba bagabo magana abiri na mirongo itanu bariho batura imibavu." 
Numbers17:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers17:2 «Kuko ibyotezo ari ibintu bitagatifu, bwira umuherezabitambo Eleyazari mwene Aroni abikure mu bishashi by’umuriro, kandi na wo ajye kuwunyanyagiriza kure." 
Numbers17:3 Ibyotezo by’abo bantu bacumuye bakikururira urupfu, bazabicurishe babikuremo ibyuma byo kubambika ku rutambiro. Kuko babituye Uhoraho, ubu byabaye bitagatifu. Bizabera kandi Abayisraheli urwibutso.»" 
Numbers17:4 Umuherezabitambo Eleyazari afata bya byotezo by’imiringa byatuwe n’abatwitswe n’umuriro, maze babicuramo ibyo kubambika ku rutambiro." 
Numbers17:5 Yagenjeje atyo kugira ngo bibere Abayisraheli urwibutso, kandi ngo hatagira umuntu uteguriwe Uhoraho, ni ukuvuga udakomoka kuri Aroni, uhegera ngo atwikire imibavu imbere y’Uhoraho. Ibyo bizamurinda kubona ibyago nk’ibya Kore n’abantu be; ibyo byago kandi Uhoraho yari yarabihanuye akoresheje Musa." 
Numbers17:6 Bukeye, ikoraniro ry’Abayisraheli ryose riburanya Musa na Aroni rivuga riti «Mwicishije umuryango w’Uhoraho!»" 
Numbers17:7 Icyo gihe ikoraniro ryabivumburagaho, Musa na Aroni barahindukiye bareba ku ihema ry’ibonaniro, basanga igicu cyaritwikiriye; maze ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ririgaragaza." 
Numbers17:8 Nuko Musa na Aroni bajya ku ihema ry’ibonaniro. 
Numbers17:9 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers17:10 «Nimwitandukanye na ririya koraniro, ngiye kuririmbura mu mwanya muto!» Bikubita hasi bubika umutwe ku butaka," 
Numbers17:11 Musa ni ko kubwira Aroni, ati «Fata icyotezo cyawe, urahuriremo umuriro wo ku rutambiro, ushyiremo n’imibavu. Hanyuma wihute usange ikoraniro urikorereho umuhango wo kurihanaguraho icyaha, kuko Uhoraho yarakaye cyane, none icyorezo cyatangiye kuyogoza.»" 
Numbers17:12 Nk’uko Musa yari yabimubwiye, Aroni afata icyotezo, ariruka ajya mu ikoraniro. Koko rero icyorezo cyari cyatangiye kuyogoza umuryango. Ashyira umubavu mu cyotezo, maze akora umuhango wo guhanagura icyaha ku muryango." 
Numbers17:13 Ahagarara hagati y’intumbi n’abakiri bazima, icyorezo kirahosha." 
Numbers17:14 Abishwe n’icyo cyorezo bari ibihumbi cumi na bine na magana arindwi, utabariyemo n’abari baguye muri ka gakungu ka Kore." 
Numbers17:15 Aroni asubira iruhande rwa Musa ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, icyorezo cyari cyashize." 
Numbers17:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers17:17 «Saba Abayisraheli ko buri muryango uguha inkoni. Ni ukuvuga ko uzashyikirizwa inkoni cumi n’ebyiri z’abatware b’imiryango yose. Uzandika izina rya buri mutware ku nkoni ye. 
Numbers17:18 Ku nkoni ya Levi gusa uzandikeho izina rya Aroni. Bityo buri mutware w’umuryango azagira inkoni imuranga. 
Numbers17:19 Uzarambika izo nkoni mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, imbere y’ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano, hamwe njya mbasanga." 
Numbers17:20 Nyir’inkoni izatoha umumero, ni we nahisemo. Bityo nzaba nigije kure yanjye, amagambo y’imyijujuto Abayisraheli babatera.»" 
Numbers17:21 Musa abwira Abayisraheli ayo magambo, maze buri mutware w’umuryango amushyikiriza inkoni ye. Zose hamwe ziba inkoni cumi n’ebyiri, kandi iya Aroni yari iziri hagati." 
Numbers17:22 Musa arambika izo nkoni imbere y’Uhoraho mu ihema ry’ibonaniro. 
Numbers17:23 Bukeye, Musa yinjira mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, asanga inkoni ya Aroni wo mu nzu ya Levi yatoshye umumero. Yari yazanye umumero, ifite ururabo, kandi yeze n’imbuto z’amandi zihishije." 
Numbers17:24 Musa akura inkoni zose imbere y’Uhoraho, arazisohokana kugira ngo azereke Abayisraheli bose. Barazibona maze buri mutware asubirana inkoni ye." 
Numbers17:25 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Subiza inkoni ya Aroni imbere y’ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano, uyihagumishe, maze izabere ikimenyetso abigomeka. Uzaba unkijije imyijujuto yabo; na bo kandi ntibazadukwamo n’urupfu.»" 
Numbers17:26 Musa agenza atyo, akora ibyo Uhoraho yari yamutegetse." 
Numbers17:27 Abayisraheli babwira Musa, bati «Reba nawe, turapfa, tukarimbuka, ahubwo twese tugiye gushira!" 
Numbers17:28 Ugiye hafi y’Ingoro y’Uhoraho wese, uyegereye wese, urupfu ruramutwara. Ubu se twese tugiye kurimbuka kugeza ku wa nyuma?»" 
Numbers18:1 Uhoraho abwira Aroni, ati «Wowe n’abahungu bawe n’umuryango wawe, ni mwe muzabazwa ibyaha bizakorwa mu murimo wanyu w’ubuherezabitambo." 
Numbers18:2 Uziyegereze kandi abavandimwe bawe, bo mu nzu ya Levi, inkomoko yo kwa so. Bazakubere abafasha kandi bagukorere, ari wowe ari n’abahungu bawe, imbere y’ihema ry’Isezerano." 
Numbers18:3 Bazagutunganyirize imirimo kimwe n’iy’Ingoro. Cyakora ntibazegere urutambiro n’ibikoresho byatagatifujwe, hato batazikururira urupfu namwe mutiretse." 
Numbers18:4 Bazaba abafasha bawe, bajye batunganya imirimo yose yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, nta we uzifatanya namwe, utari uwo muri mwe." 
Numbers18:5 Ni mwe muzatunganya imirimo yo mu Ngoro n’iyo ku rutambiro. Bityo Abayisraheli ntibazongera kurimburwa n’umujinya wanjye. 
Numbers18:6 Urabibona ko ari jyewe ubwanjye witoreye Abalevi mu bavandimwe banyu b’Abayisraheli, ndababaha. Beguriwe Uhoraho kugira ngo batunganye imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers18:7 Wowe n’abahungu bawe muzakora imirimo y’ubuherezabitambo, ari iyo ku rutambiro cyangwa iy’inyuma y’umubambiko; kandi muzayitunganye neza. Mbahaye kuba abaherezabitambo, ni wo murimo mbashinze. Utari uwo muri mwe uzabyivangamo azicwe." 
Numbers18:8 Uhoraho abwira Aroni, ati «Dore nkweguriye igice cy’amaturo yose matagatifu Abayisraheli bagomba kumurikira. Ni wo mugabane nkweguriye, wowe n’abahungu bawe, ku buryo budasubirwaho." 
Numbers18:9 Dore uruhare rwawe ku maturo matagatifu azaba atatwitswe: mu byo bazamurikira byose, ni ukuvuga amaturo y’ifu, ibitambo by’impongano z’ibyaha, n’ibitambo byose byo kunyihongaho, ayo maturo yose matagatifu, ni ayawe n’abahungu bawe." 
Numbers18:10 Muzayarira ahantu hatagatifu, kandi abagabo bose bashobora kuzayaryaho. Uzamenye neza ko ayo maturo ari ibintu bitagatifu." 
Numbers18:11 Ubundi kandi n’ibi bikurikira bizaba ibyawe: ibyo bagabanya ku maturo yose Abayisraheli bamurikira; wowe ubwawe, abahungu bawe n’abakobwa bawe, ndabibahaye ku buryo budasubirwaho. Abantu bose bo mu nzu yawe bazaba basukuye bazabiryaho." 
Numbers18:12 Umugabane w’ingenzi w’amavuta mashyashya, uwa divayi nshyashya n’uw’ingano, hamwe n’imiganura iturwa Uhoraho, ndabiguhaye." 
Numbers18:13 Imiganura y’imyaka yose yera mu gihugu cyabo bakayizanira Uhoraho, na yo ndayiguhaye. Abantu bose bo mu nzu yawe bazaba basukuye, bazayiryaho." 
Numbers18:14 Uretse ibyo, ikindi cyose kizegurirwa Uhoraho burundu, na cyo kizaba icyawe." 
Numbers18:15 Icyavutse uburiza mu biremwa byose bazatura Uhoraho, ari abantu cyangwa amatungo, ndabiguhaye. Cyakora abana b’uburiza b’umuntu bazacungurwa, n’uburiza bw’amatungo ahumanye buzacungurwe." 
Numbers18:16 Ibigomba gucungurwa byose, bizaguranwe bimaze ukwezi kumwe, ku giciro wowe uzagena, ni ukuvuga ku giciro cy’amasikeli atanu ya feza apimiye kuri sikeli y’Ingoro ifite uburemere bwa gera makumyabiri." 
Numbers18:17 Ariko ibyavutse uburiza ku nka, ku ntama cyangwa ku ihene, ntuzabigurane kuko ari ibintu bitagatifu. Uzasesa amaraso yabyo ku rutambiro, urugimbu rwabyo urutwike nk’ibiribwa bifite impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Numbers18:18 Inyama zabyo zizaba izawe nk’uko ubusanzwe inkoro n’itako ry’iburyo byamuritswe bikugarukira. 
Numbers18:19 Amaturo yose agabanyijwe ku bintu bitagatifu, Abayisraheli bakayatura Uhoraho, wowe n’abahungu bawe n’abakobwa bawe, ndayabahaye ku buryo budasubirwaho. Iryo ribe Isezerano rikoreshejwe umunyu, kandi ridakuka mu maso y’Uhoraho, kuri wowe no ku bazagukomokaho.»" 
Numbers18:20 Uhoraho abwira Aroni, ati «Ntuzabona umurage mu gihugu cyabo, nta n’ubwo uzahabwa umugabane hagati yabo. Ni jye uzaba umugabane wawe, mbe n’umurage wawe hagati y’Abayisraheli." 
Numbers18:21 Abalevi na bo, kubera imirimo bashinzwe yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, mbahaye kuzajya bagabana kimwe cya cumi cy’umutungo w’Abayisraheli." 
Numbers18:22 Bityo Abayisraheli ntibazongera kwegera ihema ry’ibonaniro kuko byababyarira icyaha cyabakururira urupfu. 
Numbers18:23 Abalevi bazatunganya imirimo yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro, nihagira ikidatungana, ni bo bazakibazwa. Iryo rizaba itegeko ridakuka mu bisekuruza byanyu. Nta murage Abalevi bazabona mu Bayisraheli," 
Numbers18:24 ariko nzabaha kugabana kimwe cya cumi buri Muyisraheli wese agabanya ku mutungo we akagitura Uhoraho. Ni yo mpamvu nababwiye ko nta murage bazabona hagati y’Abayisraheli.» 
Numbers18:25 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers18:26 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abalevi: Abayisraheli bazabaha icyo nabageneyeho umurage ari cyo kimwe cya cumi cy’umutungo wabo. Icyo gihe ku byo muzahabwa, muzagomba kugabanyaho kimwe cya cumi nanone, kigaturwa Uhoraho." 
Numbers18:27 Iryo ni ryo rizaba ituro ryanyu, nk’uko abandi Bayisraheli na bo batura divayi nshyashya cyangwa ingano bayoye ku mbuga bazihuriraho." 
Numbers18:28 Bityo rero namwe, kuri kimwe cya cumi muzahabwa n’Abayisraheli ku mutungo wabo, muzagabanyaho ituro ry’Uhoraho ryose nta na gato mutubijeho." 
Numbers18:29 Ku biruta ibindi ubwiza muri ibyo bintu muzahabwa, muzagabanyeho ituro ritagatifu." 
Numbers18:30 Uzongere ubabwire aya magambo uti: Mwebwe Abalevi, nimugabanya ibiruta ibindi ubwiza kuri ibyo bintu, bizaba bihwanye na divayi nshyashya cyangwa ingano zihuriwe ku mbuga." 
Numbers18:31 Mwebwe n’ingo zanyu, mujye mubirira aho mushatse hose, kuko ari cyo gihembo cyanyu kubera imirimo mushinzwe yo mu ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers18:32 Ibyo nimubikora, nta cyaha kizababarwaho kuko muzaba mwangeneye uruhare rw’ingenzi. Ntimuzaba mwanduje amaturo matagatifu y’Abayisraheli, kandi nta n’urupfu muzaba mwikururiye.»" 
Numbers19:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Numbers19:2 «Dore amabwiriza y’itegeko ry’Uhoraho: Bwira Abayisraheli bakuzanire inka y’ibihogo itarangwaho inenge iyo ari yo yose, kandi izaba ari itungo ritigeze ryikorera imizigo." 
Numbers19:3 Muzayishyikiriza umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, hanyuma muyijyane hanze y’ingando, muyicire imbere ye." 
Numbers19:4 Umuherezabitambo Eleyazari azakoza urutoki mu maraso ya ya nka, maze ayaminjagire incuro ndwi yerekeza ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers19:5 Hanyuma, iyo nka bazayitwikire mu maso ye; bakongeze uruhu, inyama, amaraso, n’amase yayo." 
Numbers19:6 Umuherezabitambo azafata inkwi z’ibiti bya sederi na hisopo hamwe n’agatambaro k’umuhemba, abirohe muri wa muriro inka izaba ikongokeramo." 
Numbers19:7 Nyuma y’ibyo, umuherezabitambo azamesa imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire cyane umubiri wose n’amazi, maze asubire mu ngando. Ariko ubwo, azagumana uguhumana kwe kugeza ku mugoroba." 
Numbers19:8 Uzaba yatwitse ya nka na we azamesa imyenda ye, aniyuhagire cyane umubiri wose n’amazi, kandi agumane uguhumana kwe kugeza ku mugoroba." 
Numbers19:9 Hazaze umuntu utahumanijwe, abe ari we uyora ivu rya ya nka, arirunde hanze y’ingando, ahantu hasukuye. Iryo vu rizabikwa, ikoraniro ry’Abayisraheli rijye ririkoresha igihe bategura amazi y’icyuhagiro. Uwo muhango uhwanye n’igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha." 
Numbers19:10 Uzaba yayoye ivu rya ya nka na we azamesa imyambaro ye, kandi agumane uguhumana kwe kugeza ku mugoroba. Ibyo bizaba itegeko ridakuka ku Bayisraheli, no ku munyamahanga utuye iwabo." 
Numbers19:11 Uzakora intumbi iyo ari yo yose, azamara iminsi irindwi yarahumanye." 
Numbers19:12 Ku munsi wa gatatu azakora umuhango we wo kwisukura, akoresheje ya mazi y’icyuhagiro, maze ku munsi wa karindwi azaba asukuye. Ariko ku munsi wa gatatu nadakora umuhango we wo kwisukura, ku munsi wa karindwi nta bwo azaba asukuye." 
Numbers19:13 Uwakora intumbi y’umuntu umaze gupfa, hanyuma ntiyisukure, yakwanduza Ingoro y’Uhoraho. Uwo muntu bazamuce mu Bayisraheli. Kuko batamuteye amazi y’icyuhagiro, aba yanduye kandi agumana uguhumana kwe." 
Numbers19:14 Dore itegeko: Umuntu napfira mu ihema, uzaba aririmo cyangwa akaryinjiramo, azamara iminsi irindwi yarahumanijwe." 
Numbers19:15 Kandi igikoresho cyose kirangaye kidafite igipfundikizo, kizaba cyanduye." 
Numbers19:16 Uzajya mu mirima, agatsitara ku muntu wishwe n’inkota, ku ntumbi cyangwa ku magufa y’umuntu, cyangwa ku mva, na we azamara iminsi irindwi yarahumanijwe." 
Numbers19:17 Kugira ngo uwo muntu asukurwe, dore uko muzabigenza: Muzayora ivu rya ya nka yatuweho igitambo cyo guhongera icyaha, murishyire mu rwabya, hanyuma murivange n’amazi yo mu isoko." 
Numbers19:18 Umuntu usukuye azafata ishami ry’igiti cya hisopo, arikoze muri ya mazi, maze aminjagire ihema n’ibikoresho byose, hamwe n’abantu bazaba baririmo. Azaminjagira kandi na wa wundi uzaba yarakoze uwishwe n’inkota, intumbi cyangwa amagufa y’umuntu, cyangwa imva." 
Numbers19:19 Ku munsi wa gatatu no ku wa karindwi, umuntu usukuye azaminjagira amazi ku wahumanijwe; ku munsi wa karindwi, azaba yamuhanaguyeho icyaha cye. Uwahumanye azamesa imyambaro ye, yiyuhagire umubiri wose, nimugoroba azaba asukuye." 
Numbers19:20 Ariko umuntu wahumanijwe, ntakore umuhango we wo kwisukura, azacibwe mu ikoraniro, kuko yakwanduza Ingoro y’Uhoraho. Uwo muntu aba ahumanijwe, kuko ataminjagiye amazi y’icyuhagiro." 
Numbers19:21 Ibyo bizababere itegeko ridakuka. Uwaminjagiye amazi y’icyuhagiro, agomba kumesa imyambaro ye. Naho uzaba yakoze muri ayo mazi we, azagumana ubwandure bwe kugeza nimugoroba." 
Numbers19:22 Icyo umuntu uhumanijwe azakoraho cyose, kizaba cyanduye, kandi umuntu uzakora kuri icyo kintu azaba ahumanijwe kugeza nimugoroba." 
Numbers20:1 Mu kwezi kwa mbere, imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli igera mu butayu bwa Sini, maze umuryango utura i Kadeshi. Aho ni ho Miriyamu yaguye, baramuhamba." 
Numbers20:2 Imbaga yari yabuze amazi, nuko yivumbura kuri Musa na Aroni." 
Numbers20:3 Imbaga yiyenza kuri Musa ivuga iti «Iyo natwe tuza kujyana n’abavandimwe bacu igihe bapfiraga imbere y’Uhoraho! 
Numbers20:4 Ni kuki wazanye ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho muri ubu butayu? Kwari ukugira ngo dupfe twebwe n’amatungo yacu! 
Numbers20:5 Ni kuki wadukuye mu Misiri ukatuzana aha hantu h’amakuba? Nta mwaka wahahingwa, ari imitini, ari imizabibu cyangwa amakomamanga; ahantu hataba n’amazi yo kunywa!»" 
Numbers20:6 Musa na Aroni bava mu mbaga baza ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro; bikubita hasi bubitse umutwe ku butaka, maze ikuzo ry’Uhoraho rirababonekera." 
Numbers20:7 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers20:8 «Tora inkoni yawe, wowe n’umuvandimwe wawe Aroni, mukoranye imbaga, maze mu maso yayo mubwire urutare rubahe amazi. Urwo rutare urarubyaza amazi, uyahe imbaga inywe hamwe n’amatungo yabo.»" 
Numbers20:9 Nk’uko yari yabitegetswe, Musa atora inkoni yari imbere y’Uhoraho," 
Numbers20:10 maze we na Aroni bakoranyiriza imbaga hafi y’urwo rutare, barayibwira bati «Nimutege amatwi, mwa byigomeke mwe! Mbese dushobora kubavuburira amazi muri uru rutare?»" 
Numbers20:11 Musa arega ukuboko, ya nkoni ayikubita ku rutare incuro ebyiri, maze amazi menshi arapfupfunuka. Nuko imbaga iranywa, buhira n’amatungo yabo." 
Numbers20:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati «Nta bwo mwanyemeye ngo muhamye ubutungane bwanjye imbere y’Abayisraheli. Kubera iyo mpamvu ntimuzageza iriya mbaga mu gihugu nayisezeranije.»" 
Numbers20:13 Ayo ni yo mazi y’i Meriba, ari byo kuvuga ’Urwiyenzo’, kuko ariho Abayisraheli biyenjeje kuri Uhoraho, na we akahagaragariza ubutungane bwe." 
Numbers20:14 Bageze i Kadeshi, Musa yoherereza umwami wa Edomu intumwa kumubwira ziti «Dore icyo abavandimwe bawe b’Abayisraheli bavuze: Amakuba yose twagize urayazi." 
Numbers20:15 Abasokuruza bacu baramanutse bajya mu Misiri, maze umuryango wacu uhatura igihe cy’iminsi myinshi cyane. Abanyamisiri ariko badufashe nabi, baratuburagiza, twebwe n’abasokuruza bacu." 
Numbers20:16 Twatakiye Uhoraho yumva induru yacu, nuko atwoherereza umumalayika wo kudukura mu Misiri. None ubu rero tugeze i Kadeshi, umugi uri ku mupaka w’igihugu cyawe." 
Numbers20:17 Turagusaba ngo uduhe inzira mu gihugu cyawe! Nta bwo tuzakunyurira mu mirima no mu mizabibu, cyangwa ngo tunywe amazi mu mariba yawe. Tuzaboneza umuhanda mugari twoye gutandukira na gato ngo tujye iburyo cyangwa ibumoso, kugeza ubwo tuzamara kwambuka igihugu cyawe.»" 
Numbers20:18 Ariko umwami wa Edomu arabasubiza ati «Nta bwo muzanyurira mu gihugu. Nimubigerageza, nzasohoka mbasanganize ingabo zanjye.»" 
Numbers20:19 Abayisraheli baramubwira bati «Tuzikurikirira umuhanda; kandi nitunywa ku mazi yawe, jyewe cyangwa amatungo yanjye, nzakuriha ikiguzi cyayo. Ndagusaba gusa ko utureka tukitambukira.»" 
Numbers20:20 Ariko umwami wa Edomu arasubiza ati «Nta bwo muzatambuka.» Nuko asohokana n’imbaga y’abantu basanganiza Abayisraheli intwaro n’ingufu nyinshi. 
Numbers20:21 Abanyedomu bima batyo Abayisraheli inzira mu gihugu cyabo. Nuko Abayisraheli na bo bishakira indi nzira. 
Numbers20:22 Bavuye i Kadeshi, imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli igera ku musozi wa Hori." 
Numbers20:23 Bageze aho i Hori ku mupaka w’igihugu cya Edomu, Uhoraho abwira Musa na Aroni, ati" 
Numbers20:24 «Aroni agomba gupfa agasanga ba sekuru. Nta bwo azinjira mu gihugu nahaye Abayisraheli kuko mwasuzuguye ijwi ryanjye igihe cya ya mazi ya Meriba. 
Numbers20:25 Jyana rero Aroni n’umuhungu we Eleyazari, mujye ku musozi wa Hori." 
Numbers20:26 Ufate imyambaro ye y’umuherezabitambo uyambike umuhungu we Eleyazari. Aho ni ho Aroni azagwa.» 
Numbers20:27 Musa akora nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse, maze mu maso y’imbaga yose bazamuka ku musozi wa Hori." 
Numbers20:28 Musa yambura Aroni imyenda ye ayambika Eleyazari umuhungu we. Aroni arapfa, agwa aho mu mpinga y’umusozi. Birangiye, Musa na Eleyazari baramanuka bava ku musozi." 
Numbers20:29 Imbaga yose ibona ko Aroni yapfuye, nuko umuryango wa Israheli wose umara iminsi mirongo itatu umuririra." 
Numbers21:1 Umwami wa Aradi, Umukanahani wari utuye muri Negevu, amenya ko Abayisraheli baturutse mu nzira y’ahitwa Atarimu, maze araza arabarwanya, anabafatamo imfungwa." 
Numbers21:2 Nuko Abayisraheli bakorera imbere y’Uhoraho uyu muhigo, bati «Niba wemeye kutwegurira bariya bantu, imigi yabo tuzayizimya.»" 
Numbers21:3 Uhoraho yumva ijwi ry’Abayisraheli, maze abegurira Abakanahani. Abayisraheli babarimburana n’imigi yabo barabazimya. Aho hantu bahita izina rya Horima, risobanura ngo ’Irimburwa’." 
Numbers21:4 Bava hafi y’umusozi wa Hori, bafata inzira iva ku nyanja y’urufunzo, bakagenda bakikira igihugu cya Edomu. Ariko imbaga iza gucikira intege mu nzira," 
Numbers21:5 itangira kugaya Imana na Musa ivuga iti «Mwadukuriye iki mu Misiri? Mwagira ngo tugwe muri ubu butayu butagira amazi ntibubemo n’umugati! Twarambiwe guhora turya iriya ngirwamugati.» 
Numbers21:6 Uhoraho aterereza Abayisraheli inzoka zifite ubumara butwika, zirabarya, bapfamo abantu benshi cyane." 
Numbers21:7 Imbaga iza isanga Musa, iramubwira iti «Twakoze icyaha igihe twakugayaga wowe n’Uhoraho. None twingingire Uhoraho adukize ziriya nzoka!» Musa asabira imbabazi umuryango" 
Numbers21:8 maze Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Curisha inzoka isa n’izo zabateye, uyimanike ku giti. Uwo zizajya zirya akayireba azajya akira.»" 
Numbers21:9 Musa acurisha inzoka y’umuringa, ayimanika ku giti. Iyo rero inzoka yaryaga umuntu maze akareba iyo y’umuringa, yahitaga akira." 
Numbers21:10 Abayisraheli baragenda bashinga ingando ahitwa Ovoti," 
Numbers21:11 bahavuye bajya kugandika ahitwa Iye-Avarimu mu butayu bw’iburasirazuba ahateganye na Mowabu. 
Numbers21:12 Bavuye aho bajya kugandika ku nkombe yo hakurya y’uruzi rwa Arunoni ruturuka mu butayu, rukanyura mu gihugu cy’Abahemori." 
Numbers21:13 Urwo ruzi rwa Arunoni ni rwo koko rugabanya Mowabu n’Abahemori. 
Numbers21:14 Ni yo mpamvu byanditswe mu Gitabo cy’Intambara z’Uhoraho ngo: «... Uruzi rwa Wahebu yo muri Sufa, n’imigezi yarwo; uruzi rwa Arunoni" 
Numbers21:15 n’imigezi yarwo, zitemba zigana mu ntara ya Ari, ni zo kandi ziri mu rugabano rwa Mowabu.»" 
Numbers21:16 Bavuyeyo, bagera ahitwa i Beri ari byo kuvuga ’Iriba’. Aho kandi ni ho Uhoraho yabwiriye Musa, ati «Koranya imbaga yose maze nyihe amazi.»" 
Numbers21:17 Nuko Abayisraheli batera iyi ndirimbo, bati «Amazi ari mu iriba nadudubize! Maze muvuze impundu" 
Numbers21:18 Iriba ryafukuwe n’abatware, rigacukurwa n’abanyacyubahiro bo mu muryango, bakoresheje inkoni zabo z’ubutegetsi, n’utubando twabo.»... Bavuye mu butayu bajya i Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 bavuye i Matana bajya i Nahaliyeli; bavuye i Nahaliyeli bajya i Bamoti," 
Numbers21:20 barenze Bamoti batungukira ku kibaya kiri mu nsi y’umusozi wa Mowabu. Impinga y’umusozi wa Pisiga iri ahirengeye, uyiriho abona ubutayu bwose." 
Numbers21:21 Abayisraheli bohereza intumwa kwa Sihoni, umwami w’Abahemori, kumubwira ziti" 
Numbers21:22 «Duhe inzira mu gihugu cyawe. Igihe tuzaba tugeze iwawe, tuzaboneza umuhanda mugari, twoye gutandukira ngo tukugire mu mirima cyangwa mu mizabibu. Nta n’ubwo tuzanywa amazi yo mu mariba yawe.»" 
Numbers21:23 Ariko Sihoni yanga ko Abayisraheli bamunyurira mu gihugu. Ndetse ahita ahuruza ingabo ze zose zijya mu butayu, maze zishinga ibirindiro imbere ya Israheli. Sihoni yigira ahitwa Yahashi, aba ariho ashoreza intambara." 
Numbers21:24 Abayisraheli babiraramo, babamarira ku bugi bw’inkota, maze igihugu cya Sihoni baracyigabiza. Icyo gihugu cyavaga ku ruzi rwa Arunoni, kikagera ku rwa Yaboki. Cyakoraga no ku rugabano rwa bene Hamoni rwari rurinzwe n’ingabo z’intwari cyane." 
Numbers21:25 Abayisraheli bigabiza iyo migi yose y’Abahemori, barayitura. Umugi wa Heshiboni n’iyindi yari hafi aho yose barayikwiza." 
Numbers21:26 Heshiboni rero yari umurwa wa Sihoni, umwami w’Abahemori; naho Sihoni akaba ari we warwanije umwami wa Mowabu wabanjirije uwategekaga icyo gihe, amunyaga igihugu cye cyose cyageraga ku ruzi rwa Arunoni." 
Numbers21:27 Aho ni ho abasizi bakurije iki gisigo ngo: «Muze i Heshiboni! Hongere hubakwe, umugi wa Sihoni usubirane!" 
Numbers21:28 Ikibatsi cy’umuriro cyaturutse i Heshiboni, ibishashi byawo bitwika Ari yo muri Mowabu, bitsemba abahinza bo mu mpinga ya Arunoni." 
Numbers21:29 Wowe, Mowabu, amakuba yakugarije! Murapfuye, bantu ba Kemoshi! Abahungu babo bagizwe impunzi, naho abakobwa babo bagizwe iminyago y’umwami Sihoni w’Umuhemori!" 
Numbers21:30 Twabarashe imyambi; tuva Heshiboni dutsemba byose tugera Divoni; intara yose igera Nofa, turayogoza tugera Madaba.»" 
Numbers21:31 Abayisraheli rero batura mu gihugu cy’Abahemori. 
Numbers21:32 Musa yohereza abantu gutata umugi wa Yazeri, baragenda bigabiza ako karere kose, maze Musa amenesha Abahemori bahabaga." 
Numbers21:33 Hanyuma, barahindukira baterera umuhanda ugana mu gihugu cya Bashani. Ogi, Umwami w’icyo gihugu, asohokana n’ingabo ze zose, agira ngo basakiranire ahitwa Edereyi." 
Numbers21:34 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Ntutinye! Ndamukugabije, we n’abantu be n’igihugu cye cyose. Uzamugirira ibyo wakoreye Sihoni umwami w’Abahemori wari uganje i Heshiboni.»" 
Numbers21:35 Abayisraheli baramutsinda, we n’abahungu be, n’abaturage be bose, ntihagira n’umwe ucika ku icumu; igihugu cyabo barakigabiza." 
Numbers22:1 Abayisraheli barahaguruka, bajya gushinga amahema mu bibaya bya Mowabu, hakurya y’uruzi rwa Yorudani, ahateganye na Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Balaki, mwene Sipori, yibonera ibyo Abayisraheli bari bakoreye Abahemori byose." 
Numbers22:3 Abamowabu babonye uwo muryango ari munini, barumirwa, ubwoba burabataha." 
Numbers22:4 Ni ko kubwira abakuru b’i Madiyani bati «Iriya mbaga y’abantu noneho igiye kuturishuza impande zose, nk’uko ikimasa kirishaguza ubwatsi mu rwuri.» Muri icyo gihe Balaki, mwene Sipori, ni we wari umwami wa Mowabu." 
Numbers22:5 Yohereza intumwa mu gihugu cye kavukire ari cyo Petori yo hafi y’uruzi, maze zijya guhuruza Balamu mwene Bewori zivuga ziti «Hari abantu bavuye mu Misiri ariko rero buzuye isi yose. None bari bugufi y’igihugu cyanjye." 
Numbers22:6 Rwose ndakwinginze ngwino ubamvumire kuko jye bandusha amaboko; ahari nazashobora kubaganza, nkanabirukana mu gihugu cyanjye. Kandi ndabizi, uwo uhaye umugisha aba ahirwa, naho uwo uvumye aba ikivume.»" 
Numbers22:7 Abakuru b’i Mowabu n’ab’i Madiyani bashyira nzira, bagenda bitwaje ingemu yo guhemba wa mupfumu. Bageze kwa Balamu, bamubwira ubutumwa bwa Balaki." 
Numbers22:8 Balamu arababwira ati «Nimurare hano, nzabasubiza ejo, nkurikije nanjye uko Uhoraho aza kumbwira.» Bityo abanyacyubahiro b’i Mowabu barara kwa Balamu." 
Numbers22:9 Imana isanga Balamu iramubaza iti «Bariya bantu bari iwawe ni ba nde?» 
Numbers22:10 Balamu abwira Imana, ati «Balaki mwene Sipori, Umwami wa Mowabu, yantumyeho agira ati" 
Numbers22:11 ’Dore hari abantu bavuye mu Misiri, none buzuye isi yose. Ngwino rero ubamvumire, wenda ahari nazashobora kubarwanya maze nkabirukana’.»" 
Numbers22:12 Imana ibwira Balamu, iti «Ntuzajyane na bo, kandi ntuzavume uriya muryango kuko wahawe umugisha.»" 
Numbers22:13 Bukeye, Balamu arabyuka maze abwira ba banyacyubahiro ba Balaki, ati «Nimwisubirire mu gihugu cyanyu; Uhoraho yanze kundeka ngo njyane namwe.»" 
Numbers22:14 Abanyacyubahiro ba Mowabu barahaguruka, basubira kwa Balaki, baramubwira bati «Balamu yanze ko tuzana.»" 
Numbers22:15 Ariko Balaki we arongera yohereza abandi banyacyubahiro barushaga aba mbere ubwinshi n’agaciro. 
Numbers22:16 Bageze kwa Balamu baramubwira bati «Dore uko Balaki mwene Sipori avuze, ngo ’Rwose gira impuhwe, wikwanga kuza iwanjye!" 
Numbers22:17 Nuza, nzaguhemba bishimishije, kandi nzagukorera icyo uzashaka cyose. Rwose ngwino umvumire bariya bantu.’»" 
Numbers22:18 Balamu asubiza abagaragu ba Balaki, ati «N’aho Balaki yampa feza yose na zahabu yose bishobora kuzura inzu ye, nta kintu na gito nakora nyuranije n’itegeko ry’Uhoraho Imana yanjye." 
Numbers22:19 Namwe iri joro murare aha, maze muze kumva icyo Uhoraho ambwira.»" 
Numbers22:20 Nijoro, Imana isanga Balamu iramubwira iti «Niba bariya bantu baje kuguhuruza, haguruka mujyane. Ariko uzakora icyo nzakubwira cyonyine.»" 
Numbers22:21 Bukeye mu gitondo, Balamu arabyuka, yegura indogobe ye, nuko ajyana na ba banyacyubahiro b’i Mowabu." 
Numbers22:22 Ariko Imana ibonye agiye irarakara. Igihe yari mu nzira, yicaye ku ndogobe ye kandi aherekejwe n’abagaragu be babiri, Umumalayika w’Uhoraho amwitambika imbere kugira ngo amubuze inzira." 
Numbers22:23 Indogobe ibonye Umumalayika w’Uhoraho yabambiye inzira, afite inkota irabagirana, iraberereka ijya kwicira mu mirima. Balamu na we akubita ya ndogobe kugira ngo ayicyamure igaruke mu nzira." 
Numbers22:24 Noneho, Umumalayika w’Uhoraho ahagarara mu muhora wacaga hagati y’inkuta ebyiri zari zizitiye imirima y’imizabibu." 
Numbers22:25 Indogobe ibonye umumalayika w’Uhoraho yisunga urukuta, maze irutsikamiriraho ikirenge cya shebuja. Nuko Balamu arongera arayikubita." 
Numbers22:26 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho abatanga imbere, ahagarara mu nzira y’imfungane ku buryo nta ho umuntu yabererekera ngo ajye iburyo cyangwa ibumoso." 
Numbers22:27 Indogobe ibonye Umumalayika w’Uhoraho, noneho iragandara. Balamu wari uyiriho ararakara, atangira kuyihondaguza inkoni." 
Numbers22:28 Uhoraho avugisha ya ndogobe, maze ibwira Balamu, iti «Nagutwaye iki kugira ngo unkubite incuro eshatu zose?»" 
Numbers22:29 Balamu asubiza ya ndogobe, ati «Ni uko unsuzugura uko wishakiye! Ubu iyo ngira inkota mu kiganza, nahitaga nkwica!»" 
Numbers22:30 Indogobe iramubwira iti «Nta bwo se ndi indogobe yawe wagendeyeho kuva kera? Hari ubwo se nari nsanganywe iyi ngeso yo kugusuzugura ntya?» Balamu arasubiza ati «Oya.» 
Numbers22:31 Uhoraho afungura amaso ya Balamu, maze abona Umumalayika we ahagaze mu nzira, afite inkota irabagirana mu kiganza. Nuko Balamu arunama yubika umutwe ku butaka." 
Numbers22:32 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Ni kuki wakubise indogobe yawe incuro eshatu zose? Urabibona, ni jyewe waje kukubambira inzira, kuko uko mbibona, uru rugendo urimo ntirufashe." 
Numbers22:33 Indogobe yambonye, inyitaza incuro eshatu zose. Iyo itaza kumpunga, mba nagutsinze aho, naho yo nkayirekera ubuzima bwayo.»" 
Numbers22:34 Balamu abwira Umumalayika w’Uhoraho, ati «Nacumuye kuko ntamenye ko ari wowe wari uhagaze imbere yanjye mu nzira. None rero niba uru rugendo rutakunyuze, ndasubira iwanjye.»" 
Numbers22:35 Ariko umumalayika w’Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Jyana na bariya bantu, ariko uzavuga ijambo nzakubwira ryonyine.» Nuko Balamu ajyana n’abanyacyubahiro ba Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Balaki yumvise ko Balamu yaje, aza kumusanganirira ku mupaka w’igihugu cye, ahitwa Iri-Mowabu, hafi y’umugezi wa Arunoni." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki aramubwira ati «Ese abantu nohereje kuguhamagara ntibari bahagije? Ni kuki se utari waraje? Ese wabonaga ntashobora kukwakirana icyubahiro?» 
Numbers22:38 Balamu asubiza Balaki, ati «Ndabishimye nageze iwawe, ariko se ndaza gushobora kugira icyo mvuga? Amagambo Uhoraho aza kumbwira, ni yo yonyine ndi buvuge.»" 
Numbers22:39 Balamu ajyana na Balaki bagera i Kiriyati-Hushoti. 
Numbers22:40 Balaki atura igitambo cy’amatungo yose, maze ayohererezaho imigabane Balamu n’abanyacyubahiro bari bamuherekeje." 
Numbers22:41 Bukeye mu gitondo, Balaki azamukana Balamu i Bamoti-Behali, aho bashoboraga kubona igice kimwe cy’imbaga y’Abayisraheli." 
Numbers23:1 Balamu abwira Balaki, ati «Nyubakira hano intambiro ndwi, untegurire ibimasa birindwi n’amasekurume y’intama arindwi.»" 
Numbers23:2 Balaki akora ibyo Balamu yamusabye, maze bombi batura ikimasa n’isekurume y’intama kuri buri rutambiro." 
Numbers23:3 Balamu abwira Balaki, ati «Wowe guma iruhande rw’igitambo cyawe gitwikwa, maze jyewe nigireyo, ahari Uhoraho yansanga. Amagambo ari bumbwire ayo ari yo yose, ndayakumenyesha.» Nuko Balamu afata inzira aragenda," 
Numbers23:4 maze Imana imusanze, arayibwira ati «Nubakishije intambiro ndwi, kandi ntura ikimasa n’isekurume y’intama kuri buri rutambiro.»" 
Numbers23:5 Uhoraho amaze kubwira Balamu ibyo aza kuvuga, amwohereza agira ati «Ngaho subira kwa Balaki, umubwire utyo.»" 
Numbers23:6 Balamu yasubiye kwa Balaki, asanga ahagaze iruhande rw’igitambo cye gitwikwa. Yari kumwe n’abanyacyubahiro bose b’i Mowabu." 
Numbers23:7 Balamu na we abahanurira muri iki gisigo, agira ati: «Balaki yampubuye muri Aramu, umwami wa Mowabu antumaho mu misozi y’iburasirazuba, ngo ninze nshore umuvumo mu bana ba Yakobo, maze Abayisraheli mbambike umugayo." 
Numbers23:8 Navuma nte uwo Imana itavumye? Uwo Uhoraho atigeze agaya, namwambika umugayo nte?" 
Numbers23:9 Iyo ndebeye hejuru y’urutare, ngatera ijisho ndi mu mpinga y’imisozi, nsanga ari umuryango udasa n’iyindi, ntashyira mu mubare w’amahanga yandi." 
Numbers23:10 Ni nde washobora kubara abuzukuru ba Yakobo, akabarura imbaga nyamwinshi y’Abayisraheli? Icyampa nanjye ngapfa nk’intungane, indunduro yanjye ikazasa n’iyabo!»" 
Numbers23:11 Balaki abwira Balamu, ati «Wangenje ute? Narakuzanye ngo uvume ababisha banjye, none dore ahubwo urabasakazamo imigisha!»" 
Numbers23:12 Balamu aramusubiza ati «Nta bwo se uzi ko iyo mbumbuye umunwa, mba ngomba kuvuga ibyo Uhoraho yambwiye byonyine?»" 
Numbers23:13 Balaki arongera ati «Ngwino nkwereke aho tujya ushobore kureba neza iriya mbaga. Mbere wayibonaga igice, ariko nuhagera, urashobora kuyibona yose, maze uyimvumire!»" 
Numbers23:14 Amujyana ahantu hitaruye, mu mpinga y’umusozi wa Pisiga, ahubaka intambiro." 
Numbers23:15 Balamu abwira Balaki, ati «Wowe guma iruhande rw’igitambo cyawe gitwikwa, maze jyewe nigire hariya ntegereze... »" 
Numbers23:16 Uhoraho aza imbere ya Balamu, amubwira ibyo agomba kuvuga, nuko amwohereza agira ati «Ngaho sanga Balaki, umubwire utyo.»" 
Numbers23:17 Balamu asanga Balaki, wari uhagaze iruhande rw’igitambo cye gitwikwa. Yari kumwe n’abanyacyubahiro bose b’i Mowabu. Balaki aramubaza ati «Uhoraho yakubwiye iki?»" 
Numbers23:18 Nuko Balamu abahanurira muri iki gisigo, agira ati: «Balaki, haguruka wumve! Wowe, mwene Sipori, ntega amatwi!" 
Numbers23:19 Imana si umuntu ngo irabeshya, si mwene Adamu ngo irisubiraho. Yavuga icyo itazakora se? Ijambo yavuze se ryapfa guhera aho?" 
Numbers23:20 Nujuje umuhango wo gutanga umugisha, ubwo kandi ari Uhoraho wawitangiye, jyewe sinasubizayo." 
Numbers23:21 Nta cyorezo wasanga mu nzu ya Yakobo, mu nzu ya Israheli ntihajya harangwa umubabaro. Uhoraho, Imana ye, ihorana na we, iwe havuga impundu z’umwami." 
Numbers23:22 Imana yamukuye mu Misiri; imbaraga ze ni nk’iz’imbogo. 
Numbers23:23 Mu nzu ya Yakobo ntihakavugwe indagu, mu nzu ya Israheli ntihakarangwe ubupfumu. Iyo igihe kigeze, Imana ni yo ivugana na Yakobo, ari we Israheli, ikamubwira ibikorwa byayo." 
Numbers23:24 Dore umuryango uhingutse nk’igihanyaswa, ukaba uhagurutse nk’intare. Ntiryama itamazeho umuhigo wayo, kandi itanyoye amaraso y’icyo yishe." 
Numbers23:25 Balaki abwira Balamu, ati «Niba wanze kubavuma, wikomeza rero kubaha umugisha.»" 
Numbers23:26 Balamu aramusubiza ati «Ese sinari nakubwiye ko nkora ibyo Uhoraho ambwira byose?» 
Numbers23:27 Balaki abwira Balamu, ati «Ngwino nkujyane ahandi hantu, ahari Imana yakwemera ko umvumira uriya muryango.»" 
Numbers23:28 Nuko Balaki ajyana Balamu mu mpinga ya Pewori, umusozi witaruye ubutayu." 
Numbers23:29 Balamu abwira Balaki, ati «Nyubakira hano intambiro ndwi, maze untegurire ibimasa birindwi n’amasekurume arindwi.»" 
Numbers23:30 Balaki akora ibyo Balamu yamubwiye, maze atura ikimasa n’isekurume y’intama kuri buri rutambiro." 
Numbers24:1 Balamu abona ko Uhoraho yishimiye guha umugisha Abayisraheli, maze ntiyongera kwivuna abaririza icyo Uhoraho ashaka, ahubwo arahindukira yirebera mu butayu." 
Numbers24:2 Balamu yubuye amaso, abona Abayisraheli bashinze ingando, buri nzu iri ukwayo. Umwuka w’Imana umusakaramo," 
Numbers24:3 maze abahanurira muri iki gisigo, agira ati: «Arabivuze Balamu mwene Bewori, arabivuze umugabo ureba akageza kure," 
Numbers24:4 arabivuze uwumva amagambo y’Uhoraho, akabona ibyo Uhoraho amweretse, maze yaba yatwawe mu Mana, amaso ye agafunguka!" 
Numbers24:5 Mbega amahema yawe, Yakobo, ngo araba meza, kimwe n’ingando zawe, Israheli;" 
Numbers24:6 ameze nk’amazi atemba ava mu isumo, ameze nk’ubusitani bwo ku nkombe y’uruzi, ameze nk’imisaga yiterewe n’Uhoraho, cyangwa amasederi yo ku nkombe y’umugezi." 
Numbers24:7 Ni nk’amazi yarenze imiyoboro, agasendera mu mbuto. Umwami wa Israheli azaganza Agagi, maze ingoma ye isagambe." 
Numbers24:8 Imana yamwikuriye mu Misiri afite imbaraga nk’iz’imbogo. Azayogoza amahanga y’ababisha, abakonyagure amagufa, abahamye imyambi ye." 
Numbers24:9 Aca bugufi, akabyagira nk’intare: ni nde wabyutsa iyo nyamaswa y’inkazi? Arahirwa uzaguha umugisha, kandi uzakuvuma na we azabe ikivume!»" 
Numbers24:10 Balaki arakarira Balamu, maze akubita agatoki ku kandi avuga ati «Naguhamagariye kumvumira ababisha, none dore bubaye ubwa gatatu ubasenderezaho imigisha!" 
Numbers24:11 Niba ari ibyo byawe, genda usubire mu gihugu cyawe! Nari nemeye kuguhemba bishimishije, none dore Uhoraho arabikuvukije.»" 
Numbers24:12 Balamu asubiza Balaki, ati «Nta bwo se nari nabwiye intumwa wanyoherereje nti" 
Numbers24:13 ’N’aho Balaki yampa feza na zahabu byakuzura inzu ye, sinshobora guca ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho ngo mpamagare ikibi cyangwa icyiza ku bushake bwanjye! Nzavuga icyo Uhoraho azambwira.’" 
Numbers24:14 None rero ubu ndagiye, nsubiye mu banjye. Ariko igira hino, nkubwire uko uriya muryango uzagenzereza uwawe mu gihe kiri imbere.»" 
Numbers24:15 Nuko abahanurira muri iki gisigo, agira ati: «Ndabivuze Balamu mwene Bewori, ndi umugabo ureba nkitegereza," 
Numbers24:16 amagambo y’Imana ni jyewe abwirwa kandi ntunze ubwenge nahawe n’Umushoborabyose. Iyo nsenze cyane ngatwarwa, amaso yanjye agafunguka, ndangamira ibyo Ushoborabyose anyeretse:" 
Numbers24:17 ibizaba ndabyiyumvira, nyamara si ibya vuba, ndabyitegereza ariko ntibindi bugufi: mu nzu ya Yakobo hazavuka inyenyeri, mu muryango wa Israheli hazaboneka inkoni y’ubwami izamenagura imitwe y’abatuye Mowabu, inatsembe bene Seti bose." 
Numbers24:18 Edomu izatsindwa, inyagwe; nayo Seyiri, ababisha bazayigabiza. Israheli igiye kugaragaza imbaraga zayo!" 
Numbers24:19 Mu nzu ya Yakobo hazaduka umutware uzatsemba ababisha basigaye mu mugi wabo. 
Numbers24:20 Balamu arongera areba Abamaleki, maze abahanurira muri iki gisigo, agira ati: «Amaleki ni igihangange mu mahanga, ariko amaherezo yayo ni ukurimburwa.»" 
Numbers24:21 Arongera areba Abakeniti, maze abahanurira muri iki gisigo, agira ati «Amazu yawe arakomeye, n’icyari cyawe cyubatse ku rutare." 
Numbers24:22 Ariko Kayini azakongorwa n’indimi z’umuriro, nibishyira kera Ashuru ibagire imfungwa.»" 
Numbers24:23 Arongera ahanurira muri iki gisigo, agira ati «Mbega ibyago! Ni nde uzarokoka ukuboko kw’Uhoraho?" 
Numbers24:24 Dore amato araje avuye i Kitimu... Abanzi bazakandamiza Ashuru na Eberi; ariko na bo ubwabo imbere yabo hari imanga.» 
Numbers24:25 Birangiye Balamu arigendera asubira mu gihugu cye, Balaki na we anyura inzira ye, arataha." 
Numbers25:1 Israheli igeze i Shitimu irahatura, maze rubanda batangira gusambana n’abakobwa b’Abamowabu." 
Numbers25:2 Abo bakobwa babatumiye mu bitambo by’imana zabo, maze rubanda baragenda baraharira, banapfukamira za mana zabo." 
Numbers25:3 Bityo Abayisraheli bishyira mu maboko y’ikigirwamana Behali cyo muri Pewori, maze Uhoraho arabarakarira cyane." 
Numbers25:4 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Fata abatware b’umuryango bose, ubamanike ku biti imbere y’Uhoraho, ahateganye n’izuba. Bityo umujinya Uhoraho afitiye Abayisraheli uzahosha.»" 
Numbers25:5 Musa abwira abacamanza ba Israheli, ati «Buri wese muri mwe yice abo mu bantu be bishyize mu maboko y’ikigirwamana Behali cyo muri Pewori!»" 
Numbers25:6 Icyo gihe babona umwe mu Bayisraheli azanye umukobwa w’Umumadiyanikazi maze amugeza mu bavandimwe be rwagati. Yamutunguye ku mugaragaro imbere ya Musa n’abandi Bayisraheli, ubwo bariho baririra ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers25:7 Umuherezabitambo Pinehasi, mwene Eleyazari wa Aroni abibonye, ahaguruka mu ikoraniro yitwaje icumu mu ntoki, abakurikirana mu mbere z’ihema ryabo." 
Numbers25:8 Agezemo abatera rya cumu, bombi rirabahinguranya. Nyuma y’ibyo, icyorezo cyari cyatangiye kuyogoza Abayisraheli kirahosha." 
Numbers25:9 Abahitanywe n’icyo cyorezo bari 24000. 
Numbers25:10 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers25:11 «Umuherezabitambo Pinehasi, mwene Eleyazari wa Aroni, yahanaguye umujinya nari mfitiye Abayisraheli. Yerekaniye hagati yabo ko yagize ishyari mu kigwi cyanjye. Ni yo mpamvu ntaganjwe n’uburakari nari mfite, ngo ndimbure Abayisraheli." 
Numbers25:12 None rero umumenyeshe ko ngiranye na we amasezerano azamubera isoko y’amahoro. 
Numbers25:13 Ayo masezerano nyagiranye na we hamwe n’abazagukomokaho, kandi ni yo azabahesha kuba abaherezabitambo ubuziraherezo, kuko yagaragaje ishyaka afitiye Imana ye, bityo agakorera ku Bayisraheli umuhango wo kubakiza icyaha.»" 
Numbers25:14 Umuyisraheli wicanywe na wa mukobwa w’Umumadiyanikazi yitwaga Zimiri mwene Salu, akaba ndetse yari n’umutware w’inzu imwe mu muryango wa Simewoni." 
Numbers25:15 Uwo mugore w’Umumadiyanikazi wishwe yitwaga Kozibi, akaba mwene Suru na we wari umutware w’inzu imwe mu miryango ya Madiyani." 
Numbers25:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers25:17 «Nimutere Abamadiyani maze mubarimbure. 
Numbers25:18 Barabasembuye babashyiraho n’uburyarya bwinshi, igihe mukurikira imana y’i Pewori, mukanacyura mushiki wabo Kozibi, umukobwa w’umutware w’i Madiyani, wiciwe muri cya cyorezo cy’i Pewori.»" 
Numbers25:19 Nyuma y’icyo cyorezo," 
Numbers26:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari mwene Aroni, ati" 
Numbers26:2 «Mukore ibarura ry’imbaga y’Abayisraheli. Mujye muri buri muryango, mubarure abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri cyangwa irenga, kandi bashoboye gutabara mu mitwe y’ingabo ya Israheli.»" 
Numbers26:3 Musa n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari babibwirira Abayisraheli mu bibaya bya Mowabu, ku nkombe z’uruzi rwa Yorudani, ahateganye na Yeriko, bagira bati" 
Numbers26:4 «Nk’uko Uhoraho yabitegetse Musa, tugiye kubarura abagabo bose bafite imyaka makumyabiri cyangwa irenga.» Dore imiryango y’Abayisraheli yari yaravuye mu Misiri:" 
Numbers26:5 Rubeni ni we mfura ya Israheli. Bene Rubeni ni Hanoki sekuruza w’Abahanoki, Palawu sekuruza w’Abapalawu," 
Numbers26:6 Hesironi sekuruza w’Abahesironi, na Karumi sekuruza w’Abakarumi." 
Numbers26:7 Abo ni bo bari bagize amazu yo kwa Rubeni. Bose hamwe bari abantu 43,730." 
Numbers26:8 Abakomokaga kuri Palawu, ni Eliyabu" 
Numbers26:9 n’abahungu be Nemuweli, Datani na Abiramu. Datani na Abiramu abo, ni bamwe bahagarariraga imbaga, maze baza kwivumbura kuri Musa na Aroni. Bari bafatanije n’abayoboke ba Kore, igihe biteruraga kuri Uhoraho." 
Numbers26:10 Icyo gihe isi yiciyemo urwobo, ibamirana na Kore, abantu be barapfa, maze n’umuriro uyogoza abagabo magana abiri na mirongo itanu. Ibyo byabereye abandi Bayisraheli urugero." 
Numbers26:11 Abahungu ba Kore bo ariko nta bwo bapfuye. 
Numbers26:12 Bene Simewoni, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Nemuweli sekuruza w’Abanemuweli; Yamini sekuruza w’Abayamini; Yakini sekuruza w’Abayakini;" 
Numbers26:13 Zerahi sekuruza w’Abazerahi, na Shawuli sekuruza w’Abashawuli." 
Numbers26:14 Ayo ni yo yari amazu yo mu muryango wa Simewoni. Abantu bari bayarimo bageraga ku 22,200." 
Numbers26:15 Bene Gadi, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Sefoni sekuruza w’Abasefoni; Hagi sekuruza w’Abahagi; Shuni sekuruza w’Abashuni," 
Numbers26:16 Ozini sekuruza w’Abahozini; Eri sekuruza w’Abaheri; 
Numbers26:17 Arodi sekuruza w’Abarodi; n’Areli sekuruza w’Abareli. 
Numbers26:18 Ayo ni yo yari amazu y’abahungu ba Gadi. Abantu bari bayarimo bageraga ku 40,500." 
Numbers26:19 Abahungu ba Yuda bitwaga Eri na Onani, ari na bo bapfiriye mu gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Numbers26:20 Bene Yuda, ukurikije amazu yabo, ni aba: Shela sekuruza w’Abashela; Peresi sekuruza w’Abaperesi; Zerahi sekuruza w’Abazerahi." 
Numbers26:21 Bene Peresi ni aba: Hesironi sekuruza w’Abahesironi; na Hamuli sekuruza w’Abahamuli. 
Numbers26:22 Ayo ni yo yari amazu yo mu muryango wa Yuda. Abantu bari bayarimo bageraga ku 76,500." 
Numbers26:23 Bene Isakari, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Tola sekuruza w’Abatola; Puwa sekuruza w’Abapuni;" 
Numbers26:24 Yashuvi sekuruza w’Abashuvi; na Shimuroni sekuruza w’Abashimuroni. 
Numbers26:25 Ayo ni yo yari amazu yo mu muryango wa Isakari. Abantu bari bayarimo bageraga ku 64,300." 
Numbers26:26 Bene Zabuloni, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Seredi sekuruza w’Abaseredi; Eloni sekuruza w’Abaheloni; na Yahaleli sekuruza w’Abayahaleli." 
Numbers26:27 Ayo ni yo mazu yo mu muryango wa Zabuloni. Abantu bari bayarimo bageraga ku 60,500." 
Numbers26:28 Bene Yozefu ni Manase na Efurayimu. 
Numbers26:29 Kwa Manase hari Abamakiri bakomokaga kuri Makiri. Makiri uwo yabyaye Gilihadi ari we sekuruza w’Abagilihadi. 
Numbers26:30 Bene Gilihadi, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Yezeri sekuruza w’Abayezeri; Heleki sekuruza w’Abaheleki;" 
Numbers26:31 n’Aziriyeli sekuruza w’Abaziriyeli; Shekemu sekuruza w’Abashekemu; 
Numbers26:32 Shemida sekuruza w’Abashemida; Heferi sekuruza w’Abaheferi. 
Numbers26:33 Selofehadi mwene Heferi nta muhungu yabyaye, yasize abakobwa gusa; bakitwa Mahila, Nowa, Hagila, Milika na Tirisa." 
Numbers26:34 Ayo ni yo yari amazu yo mu muryango wa Manase. Abantu bari bayarimo bageraga ku 52,700." 
Numbers26:35 Bene Efurayimu, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Shutelahi sekuruza w’Abashutelahi; Bekeri sekuruza w’Ababekeri; na Tahani sekuruza w’Abatahani." 
Numbers26:36 Umuhungu wa Shuletahi ni Erani sekuruza w’Abaherani. 
Numbers26:37 Ayo ni yo mazu yo mu muryango wa Efurayimu. Abari bayarimo bageraga ku 32,500. Ngabo rero abakomokaga kuri Yozefu uko bagiye babarurwa mu mazu yabo." 
Numbers26:38 Bene Benyamini, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Bela sekuruza w’Ababela; Ashibeli sekuruza w’Abashibeli; Ahiramu sekuruza w’Abahiramu;" 
Numbers26:39 Shefufamu sekuruza w’Abashefufamu; na Hufamu sekuruza w’Abahufamu. 
Numbers26:40 Bene Bela ni Aridi sekuruza w’Ababaridi, na Namani sekuruza w’Abanamani." 
Numbers26:41 Ngabo rero abakomokaga mu muryango wa Benyamini uko bagiye babarurwa mu mazu yabo. Bose bari bageze ku 45,600." 
Numbers26:42 Umuryango wa Dani wari ugizwe n’amazu y’Abashuhamu bakomokaga kuri Shuhamu. Abo ni bo bakomokaga mu muryango wa Dani uko bagiye babarurwa mu mazu yabo. 
Numbers26:43 Bose hamwe bageraga ku 64,400." 
Numbers26:44 Bene Asheri, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Yimuna sekuruza w’inzu ya Yimuna; Yishwi sekuruza w’Abayishwi; na Beriya sekuruza w’Ababeriya." 
Numbers26:45 Bene Beriya ni Heberi sekuruza w’Abaheberi, na Malikiyeli sekuruza w’Abamalikiyeli." 
Numbers26:46 Umukobwa wa Asheri we yitwaga Serahi. 
Numbers26:47 Ayo ni yo yari amazu yo mu muryango wa Asheri. Abantu bari bayarimo bageraga ku 53,400." 
Numbers26:48 Bene Nefutali, ukurikije amazu yabo ni aba: Yahiseli sekuruza w’Abayahiseli; Guni sekuruza w’Abaguni;" 
Numbers26:49 Yeseri sekuruza w’Abayeseri; na Shilemu sekuruza w’Abashilemu. 
Numbers26:50 Ayo ni yo mazu yo mu muryango wa Nefutali uko bagiye babarurwa mu mazu yabo. Bose hamwe bari 45,400." 
Numbers26:51 Umubare w’Abayisraheli bose hamwe wageraga ku 601.730. 
Numbers26:52 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers26:53 «Igihugu muzakigabanya aya mazu, maze imigabane irutane mukurikije umubare w’abantu bari muri buri nzu." 
Numbers26:54 Inzu irimo abantu benshi, izahabwa umugabane munini, naho irimo bake ihabwe umugabane muto. Buri nzu muzayihe umugabane mukurikije abantu itunze." 
Numbers26:55 Ariko rero mu kugabanya igihugu, muzakoreshe ubufindo gusa. Bazabona imigabane bakurikije umubare w’abantu bari mu mazu yabo yo kwa sekuru." 
Numbers26:56 Kugira ngo bamenye aho bagomba guha amazu afite abantu benshi n’afite abantu bake, bazakoreshe ubufindo, ni bwo buzemeza neza umugabane wa buri nzu." 
Numbers26:57 Dore umubare w’Abalevi bose uko bagiye babarurwa mu mazu yabo: Abagerishoni bakomokaga kuri Gerishoni; Abakehati bakomokaga kuri Kehati, naho Abamerari bagakomoka kuri Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Amazu yo kwa Levi ni aya: inzu y’Abalivini, iy’Abaheburoni, iy’Abamahili, iy’Abamushi, n’iy’Abakore. Kehati yabyaye Amuramu." 
Numbers26:59 Umugore wa Amuramu yitwaga Yokebedi ari we mukobwa Levi yabyaranye n’umugore we mu Misiri. Yokebedi na Amuramu babyaranye Aroni na Musa, na mushiki wabo Miriyamu." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni na we yabyaye Nadabu, Avihu, Eleyazari na Itamari." 
Numbers26:61 Nadabu na Avihu ni bamwe barimbutse kubera ko bari bamurikiye Uhoraho ibyotezo bitamukwiye. 
Numbers26:62 Babaze kuva ku ruhinja rw’ukwezi kumwe, basanga umubare w’Abalevi b’igitsina gabo ugeze ku 23,000. Ni byo koko nta bwo babaruriwe hamwe n’abandi Bayisraheli kuko nta mugabane bigeze bahabwa muri bo." 
Numbers26:63 Abo ni bo Musa n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari babaruye mu gihe cy’ibarura ryabereye mu bibaya bya Mowabu, hafi y’uruzi rwa Yorudani, ahateganye na Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Nta n’umwe wari usigaye wo muri ba bandi Musa n’umuherezabitambo Aroni babaruye igihe cy’ibarura ry’Abayisraheli ryabereye mu butayu bwa Sinayi. 
Numbers26:65 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarababwiye ko bazagwa mu butayu, koko nta n’umwe waharokotse uretse Kalebu mwene Yefune, na Yozuwe mwene Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Selofehadi yari umuhungu wa Heferi mwene Gilihadi wa Makiri mwene Manase. Abakobwa be bitwaga Mahila, Nowa, Hogila, Milika na Tirsa; bakaba kandi abo mu nzu yo kwa Manase." 
Numbers27:2 Abo bakobwa rero bagiye imbere ya Musa, umuherezabitambo Eleyazari n’abatware b’imiryango n’ikoraniro ryose bari ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, maze barabaza bati" 
Numbers27:3 «Data utubyara yaguye mu butayu. Ariko yazize ibyaha bye bwite, ntiyari muri ba bayoboke ba Kore biteruye kuri Uhoraho. Cyakora nta muhungu yigeze abyara." 
Numbers27:4 None se izina ry’umubyeyi wacu rizasibangane mu muryango we ngo ni uko atabyaye abahungu? Natwe nimuduhe isambu nk’uko mwayihaye ba data wacu. 
Numbers27:5 Icyo kibazo cyabo rero Musa agishyikiriza Uhoraho. 
Numbers27:6 Maze Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers27:7 «Abakobwa ba Selofehadi baravuga ukuri. Uzabahe umugabane w’isambu nk’uko wayihaye ba se wabo, bityo bazaba bahawe umurage wa se wababyaye." 
Numbers27:8 Kandi Abayisraheli ubabwire uti ’Umugabo napfa nta muhungu asize, ibye bizajya bihabwa umukobwa we." 
Numbers27:9 Niba nta mukobwa yigeze, ibye bizahabwa abavandimwe be." 
Numbers27:10 Niba nta bavandimwe yigeze, bizahabwa ba se wabo." 
Numbers27:11 Niba kandi se w’uwo mugabo nta bavandimwe yari afite, bizahabwa mwene wabo uri hafi mu nzu ye. Uwo ni we uzabyegukana.’ Nk’uko Uhoraho yabibwiye Musa, ibyo bizabera Abayisraheli itegeko rigenga irangiza ry’imanza.»" 
Numbers27:12 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati «Zamuka ujye muri iriya misozi ya Avarimu, maze witegereze igihugu nahaye Abayisraheli." 
Numbers27:13 Uzakireba, hanyuma nawe upfe usange abasokuruza bawe nk’uko Aroni yabasanze." 
Numbers27:14 Impamvu y’ibyo ni uko mwansuzuguriye mu butayu bwa Sini, igihe imbaga yanshakagaho urwiyenzo. Nabategetse kugaragaza ubutungane bwanjye imbere y’Abayisraheli, muvubura amazi mu rutare, nyamara musuzugura ijambo ryanjye.» Ayo mazi ni ya yandi y’i Meriba ya Kadeshi mu butayu bwa Sini." 
Numbers27:15 Nuko Musa abwira Uhoraho, ati" 
Numbers27:16 «Uhoraho, Imana, yo iha umwuka ikiremwa cyose, niyihitiremo umuntu uzayobora imbaga," 
Numbers27:17 akayirangaza imbere mu igenda no mu igaruka. Bityo imbaga y’Imana ntizaba nk’intama zitagira umushumba.» 
Numbers27:18 Uhoraho asubiza Musa, ati «Fata Yozuwe mwene Nuni; ni umugabo wahawe umwuka w’Imana. Uzamuramburireho ikiganza," 
Numbers27:19 umushyikirize umuherezabitambo Eleyazari n’imbaga yose, maze umuhere ubutware imbere yabo." 
Numbers27:20 Uzamuhe umugabane ku butegetsi bwawe, kugira ngo imbaga yose y’Abayisraheli ijye imwumvira." 
Numbers27:21 Azasanga umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, uzambaza ugushaka kwanjye akoresheje amabuye y’ubufindo. Igisubizo bazahabwa icyo ari cyo cyose, ni cyo Yozuwe n’imbaga yose bazajya bakurikira.»" 
Numbers27:22 Musa agenza uko Uhoraho yari yamutegetse, maze afata Yozuwe amushyikiriza umuherezabitambo Eleyazari hamwe n’imbaga yose." 
Numbers27:23 Musa amurambikaho ibiganza, maze amuha gutwara mu mwanya we nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse." 
Numbers28:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers28:2 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Muzanzanire, mu gihe cyateganijwe, amaturo yanjye n’ibiribwa bifite impumuro yurura." 
Numbers28:3 Uzababwire kandi uti ’Dore ibiribwa muzamurikira Uhoraho: buri munsi, muzazana abana b’intama babiri, batagira inenge, bo guturwaho igitambo gitwikwa gihoraho." 
Numbers28:4 Umwana w’intama umwe uzaturwa mu gitondo, undi uturwe nimugoroba mu kabwibwi." 
Numbers28:5 Ibyo bizaherekezwa n’ituro ry’icyibo cy’ifu ivugishijwe kimwe cya kane cy’akabindi k’amavuta arongoroye y’imizeti isekuye. 
Numbers28:6 Ni igitambo gitwikwa kandi gihoraho, nk’uko cyaturwaga ku musozi wa Sinayi, kigizwe n’ibiribwa by’impumuro yurura Uhoraho." 
Numbers28:7 Ku gitambo giseswa, giherekeje umwana w’intama wa mbere, muzatura Uhoraho mu Ngoro ye, muzakoreshe kimwe cya kane cy’akabindi ka divayi ihiye." 
Numbers28:8 Umwana w’intama wa kabiri, uzaturwa nimugoroba mu kabwibwi. Ituro n’igitambo giseswa bizawuherekeza, bizaba ari bimwe n’ibya mu gitondo. Ibyo bizabera Uhoraho ibiribwa bifite impumuro imwurura." 
Numbers28:9 Ku munsi wa Sabato, muzatura abana b’intama babiri batagira inenge, hamwe n’ituro ry’utwibo tubiri tw’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta, n’igitambo giseswa cyategetswe." 
Numbers28:10 Icyo ni igitambo gitwikwa cyo kuri Sabato; kandi kikiyongera buri Sabato ku gitambo gihoraho n’igiseswa bya buri munsi. 
Numbers28:11 Mu ntangiriro ya buri kwezi, muzamurikira Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa: ibimasa bibiri, isekurume y’intama imwe, abana b’intama barindwi b’umwaka umwe, kandi ayo matungo yose akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers28:12 Kuri buri kimasa, muzazana ituro ry’utwibo dutatu tw’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta, ku isekurume y’intama muzazane ituro ry’utwibo tubiri tw’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta," 
Numbers28:13 kuri buri mwana w’intama na ho, muzane ituro ry’icyibo cy’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta. Ni igitambo gitwikwa gifite impumuro yurura, ni ibiribwa by’Uhoraho." 
Numbers28:14 Ibitambo biseswa byategetswe ni ibi: kimwe cya kabiri cy’akabindi ka divayi kuri buri kimasa, kimwe cya gatatu cy’akabindi ka divayi kuri buri sekurume y’intama, na kimwe cya kane cy’akabindi ka divayi kuri buri mwana w’intama. Icyo ni cyo gitambo gitwikwa cyo ku mboneko z’ukwezi, muzajya mugitura mu ntangiriro y’amezi yose y’umwaka." 
Numbers28:15 Byongeye kandi muzatura Uhoraho isekurume y’ihene ho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Izaturwa, maze yiyongere ku gitambo gihoraho n’igiseswa bya buri munsi." 
Numbers28:16 Ku munsi wa cumi na kane w’ukwezi kwa mbere, muzizihiza Pasika yo guhesha Uhoraho icyubahiro." 
Numbers28:17 Umunsi wa cumi na gatanu w’uko kwezi, ni umunsi w’ibirori. Muzamara iminsi irindwi murya imigati idasembuye." 
Numbers28:18 Ku munsi wa mbere, muzagira iteraniro ritagatifu, kandi ntimuzagire umurimo unaniza mukora." 
Numbers28:19 Dore ibiribwa bitwikwa muzatura Uhoraho: ibimasa bibiri, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’abana b’intama barindwi b’umwaka umwe. Muzahitemo kandi amatungo atagira inenge." 
Numbers28:20 Ibyo byose bizaherekezwa n’ituro ryategetswe ry’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta. Kuri buri kimasa muzatanga utwibo dutatu tw’ifu, naho kuri buri sekurume y’intama mutange utwibo tubiri." 
Numbers28:21 Ba bana b’intama na bo, kuri umwe muzatanga akebo kamwe k’ifu." 
Numbers28:22 Muzongereho kandi isekurume y’ihene ituweho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, kugira ngo mukore umuhango ubahanaguraho icyaha." 
Numbers28:23 Ibyo byose bizakorwa bisanga cya gitambo gitwikwa cya mu gitondo, ari na cyo gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho." 
Numbers28:24 Buri munsi muri cya gihe cy’iminsi irindwi, muzatura Uhoraho ibiribwa bifite impumuro imwurura. Muzabitura bisanga cya gitambo gihoraho n’igiseswa bya buri munsi." 
Numbers28:25 Ku munsi wa karindwi muzagira iteraniro ritagatifu, kandi ntimuzagire umurimo unaniza mukora." 
Numbers28:26 Ku munsi w’umuganura, nimumurikira Uhoraho ituro ry’umusaruro w’uwo mwaka, muzagire iteraniro ritagatifu, kandi ntihazagire umurimo unaniza mukora." 
Numbers28:27 Muzatura Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa gifite impumuro yurura, kandi kigizwe n’ibi bikurikira: ibimasa bibiri, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’abana b’intama barindwi b’umwaka umwe," 
Numbers28:28 byose biherekezwe n’ituro ryategetswe ry’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta. Kuri buri kimasa muzatanga utwibo dutatu tw’ifu, no kuri buri sekurume y’intama mutange utwibo tubiri tw’ifu." 
Numbers28:29 Ba bana b’intama na bo, kuri umwe muzatanga akebo kamwe k’ifu." 
Numbers28:30 Muzongeraho kandi n’isekurume y’ihene yo gukora umuhango ubahanaguraho icyaha. 
Numbers28:31 Ibyo byose bizaturanwa n’ibitambo biseswa, bize bisanga igitambo gihoraho n’ituro rigiherekeza; muzahitamo amatungo atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:1 Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa karindwi, muzagira iteraniro ritagatifu, kandi nta murimo unaniza muzakora. Uzababera umunsi w’impundu." 
Numbers29:2 Muzatura Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa, gifite impumuro yurura, kandi kigizwe n’ibi bikurikira: ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’abana b’intama barindwi b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo yose kandi akazaba atarangwaho inenge."
