Numbers29:3 Icyo gitambo kizaherekezwe n’ituro ryategetswe ry’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta. Ku kimasa muzatange utwibo dutatu tw’ifu, no ku isekurume y’intama mutange utwibo tubiri." 
Numbers29:4 Ba bana b’intama barindwi na bo, kuri umwe muzatanga akebo kamwe k’ifu." 
Numbers29:5 Muzongeraho kandi isekurume y’ihene iturweho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha, kugira ngo mukore umuhango ukibahanaguraho." 
Numbers29:6 Ibyo byose bizaza byiyongera ku maturo y’ibitambo bitwikwa, ari igihoraho, ari n’icy’uwa mbere wa buri kwezi, hamwe n’ibitambo biseswa bibiherekeza nk’uko imihango yabyo ibiteganya. Ibyo bitambo byose, bizabera Uhoraho ibiribwa bifite impumuro imwurura." 
Numbers29:7 Ku munsi wa cumi w’uko kwezi kwa karindwi, muzagira iteraniro ritagatifu. Muzasibe kurya, kandi ntimuzagire umurimo unaniza mukora." 
Numbers29:8 Muzatura Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa, gifite impumuro yurura, kandi kigizwe n’ibi bikurikira: ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, n’abana b’intama barindwi b’umwaka umwe. Muzahitemo kandi amatungo atarangwaho inenge." 
Numbers29:9 Icyo gitambo kizaherekezwe n’ituro ryategetswe ry’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta. Ku kimasa muzatange utwibo dutatu tw’ifu, no ku isekurume y’intama mutange utwibo tubiri." 
Numbers29:10 Ba bana b’intama barindwi na bo, kuri umwe muzatanga buri gihe akebo kamwe k’ifu." 
Numbers29:11 Muzongeraho kandi isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha yo ku munsi mukuru w’imbabazi, ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho n’ituro ryacyo, hamwe n’ibitambo biseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:12 Ku munsi wa cumi na gatatu w’ukwezi kwa karindwi, muzagira iteraniro ritagatifu kandi ntimuzagire umurimo unaniza mukora. Muzahimbaza Uhoraho, mumukorere itambagira ry’iminsi irindwi." 
Numbers29:13 Uhoraho muzamutureho igitambo gitwikwa ibi biribwa bifite impumuro yurura: ibimasa cumi na bitatu, amasekurume y’intama abiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo yose kandi akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:14 Icyo gitambo kizaherekezwa n’ituro ryategetswe ry’ifu ivugishijwe amavuta. Kuri buri kimasa muzatange utwibo dutatu tw’ifu, kuri buri sekurume y’intama mutange utwibo tubiri," 
Numbers29:15 naho kuri buri mwana w’intama mutange buri gihe akebo kamwe k’ifu. 
Numbers29:16 Muzongeraho kandi isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo sekurume y’ihene iziyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:17 Dore ibigize igitambo cyo ku munsi wa kabiri: ibimasa cumi na bibiri, amasekurume abiri y’intama, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo yose kandi akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:18 Nk’uko bisanzwe bigenda, icyo gitambo kizaherekezwa n’ituro n’ibitambo biseswa byategetswe kuri buri kimasa, buri sekurume y’intama no kuri buri mwana w’intama." 
Numbers29:19 Muzongeraho kandi isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo sekurume y’ihene iziyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:20 Dore ibigize igitambo cyo ku munsi wa gatatu: ibimasa cumi na kimwe, amasekurume y’intama abiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo yose kandi akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:21 Nk’uko bisanzwe bigenda, icyo gitambo kizaherekezwa n’ituro, n’ibitambo biseswa byategetswe kuri buri kimasa, buri sekurume y’intama no kuri buri mwana w’intama." 
Numbers29:22 Muzongeraho isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo sekurume y’ihene iziyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:23 Dore ibigize igitambo cyo ku munsi wa kane: ibimasa cumi, amasekurume y’intama abiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo yose kandi akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:24 Nk’uko bisanzwe bigenda, icyo gitambo kizaherekezwa n’ituro, n’ibitambo biseswa byategetswe kuri buri kimasa, buri sekurume y’intama no kuri buri mwana w’intama." 
Numbers29:25 Muzongeraho n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo sekurume y’ihene iziyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:26 Dore ibigize igitambo cyo ku munsi wa gatanu: ibimasa icyenda, amasekurume y’intama abiri, abana b’intama cumi na bane b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo yose kandi akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:27 Nk’uko bisanzwe bigenda, icyo gitambo kizaherekezwa n’ituro, n’ibitambo biseswa byategetswe kuri buri kimasa, buri sekurume y’intama no kuri buri mwana w’intama." 
Numbers29:28 Muzongeraho isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo sekurume y’ihene iziyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:29 Dore ibigize igitambo cyo ku munsi wa gatandatu: ibimasa munani, amasekurume y’intama abiri, abana b’intama cumi na bane b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:30 Nk’uko bisanzwe bigenda, icyo gitambo kizaherekezwa n’ituro, n’ibitambo biseswa byategetswe kuri buri kimasa, buri sekurume y’intama no kuri buri mwana w’intama." 
Numbers29:31 Muzongeraho isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo sekurume y’ihene iziyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:32 Dore ibigize igitambo cyo ku munsi wa karindwi: ibimasa birindwi, amasekurume y’intama abiri, abana b’intama cumi na bane b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:33 Nk’uko bisanzwe bigenda, icyo gitambo kizaherekezwa n’ituro, n’ibitambo biseswa byategetswe kuri buri kimasa, buri sekurume y’intama, no kuri buri mwana w’intama." 
Numbers29:34 Muzongereho n’isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo sekurume y’ihene iziyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:35 Ku munsi wa munani, ni ho muzasoza umunsi mukuru wanyu, kandi ntimuzagire umurimo unaniza mukora." 
Numbers29:36 Ibiribwa bikurikira muzabitura Uhoraho ho igitambo gitwikwa gifite impumuro imwurura: ikimasa kimwe, isekurume y’intama imwe, abana barindwi b’intama b’umwaka umwe; ayo matungo yose akazaba atagira inenge." 
Numbers29:37 Nk’uko bisanzwe bigenda, icyo gitambo kizaherekezwa n’ituro, n’ibitambo biseswa byategetswe ku kimasa, ku isekurume y’intama, no kuri buri mwana w’intama." 
Numbers29:38 Muzongeraho isekurume y’ihene yo guturwaho igitambo cy’impongano y’icyaha. Iyo sekurume y’ihene iziyongera ku gitambo gitwikwa gihoraho, hamwe n’igitambo giseswa bigiherekeza." 
Numbers29:39 Ibyo ni byo muzatura Uhoraho ku minsi yabiteganirijwe. Bizaza bisanga kandi ibitambo by’imihigo yanyu, ibyo mwituriye ku bushake bwanyu, ibitambo bitwikwa, amaturo y’ifu, ibitambo biseswa hamwe n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro.»" 
Numbers30:1 Musa abwira Abayisraheli ibyo Uhoraho yari yamutegetse byose. 
Numbers30:2 Musa abwira abatware b’amazu ya Israheli, ati «Dore itegeko Uhoraho yatanze:" 
Numbers30:3 Umuntu nagirira Uhoraho umuhigo, cyangwa akagira icyo yiyemeza mu ndahiro, ntazanyuranye n’ijambo rye. Ahubwo azubahirize muri byose amasezerano yamuvuye mu kanwa." 
Numbers30:4 Igihe umukobwa w’inkumi ukiri kwa se agiriye Uhoraho umuhigo, cyangwa akagira icyo yiyemeza ku giti cye," 
Numbers30:5 iyo se amenye ko yakoze ayo masezerano cyangwa ko hari icyo yiyemeje ku giti cye, ntagire icyo amubwira, byose bizahama." 
Numbers30:6 Ariko umunsi se yabimenye akamubuza, iyo mihigo ye n’ibyo yiyemeje ku giti cye, byose bizaba bisheshwe. Uhoraho azamubabarira kuko se azaba yamubujije." 
Numbers30:7 Uwo mukobwa kandi ashobora kurongorwa akirangwaho iyo mihigo hamwe n’ibyo yiyemeje ku ijambo ryavuye mu kanwa ke. 
Numbers30:8 Umugabo we iyo abimenye ntagire icyo amubwira kuri uwo munsi, umuhigo we n’ibyo yiyemeje byose ku giti cye bikomeza guhama." 
Numbers30:9 Ariko umugabo we namubuza ku munsi yabimenyeyeho, uwo muhigo hamwe n’ibyo yiyemeje byose ku ijambo rivuye mu kanwa ke, bizaba bisheshwe. Uhoraho na we azamubabarira." 
Numbers30:10 Cyakora, umuhigo w’umupfakazi cyangwa w’umugore wirukanywe mu nzu, uzahama uko azaba yawiyemeje kose." 
Numbers30:11 Ariko uwo muhigo nawugirira mu nzu y’umugabo we, akagira icyo yiyemeza ku ndahiro," 
Numbers30:12 hanyuma umugabo yabimenya ntagire icyo avuga ngo amubuze, ayo masezerano ye yose azahama." 
Numbers30:13 Ariko umugabo we niyiyemeza kuyasesa ku munsi yayamenyeyeho, amagambo y’uwo mugore yerekeye umuhigo n’andi masezerano yose, azaba impfabusa. Kuko umugabo we azaba yayasheshe, Uhoraho azababarira uwo mugore." 
Numbers30:14 Ari umuhigo cyangwa indahiro umugore yiyemeje akanabisibirira, umugabo we ni we uzabiha ishingiro cyangwa akabisesa." 
Numbers30:15 Uwo mugabo natagira icyo avuga kugera bukeye, iyo mihigo y’umugore hamwe n’ayo masezerano ye, azaba abihaye guhama. Azaba abihaye ishingiro kuko nta cyo azaba yabivuzeho ku munsi yabimenye." 
Numbers30:16 Ariko umugabo niyiyemeza kubisesa nyuma y’umunsi yabibwiweho, ni we uzabazwa icyaha cy’umugore we.»" 
Numbers30:17 Ayo ni yo mategeko Uhoraho yabwiye Musa. Yerekeye umugabo n’umugore we, kimwe n’umugabo n’umukobwa we w’inkumi ukiri iwabo." 
Numbers31:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers31:2 «Ugomba guhorera Abayisraheli inabi Abamadiyani babagiriye. Ibyo nubirangiza, uzapfa usange ba sokuru.»" 
Numbers31:3 Musa ni ko kubwira imbaga, ati «Muri mwe nihagire abagabo bategura intwaro zabo, maze bajye ku rugamba. Bazatera igihugu cya Madiyani kugira ngo bahorere Uhoraho." 
Numbers31:4 Imiryango ya Israheli yose izatabara, umwe ugende wohereza ku rugamba abagabo igihumbi.»" 
Numbers31:5 Mu mbaga nyamwinshi y’Abayisraheli, batoranyije abantu igihumbi muri buri muryango. Abari bakereye gutabara bose hamwe rero bari abagabo ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
Numbers31:6 Uko bari bavuye muri buri muryango ari ibihumbi, Musa abohereza ku rugamba. Bajyana n’umuherezabitambo Pinehasi mwene Eleyazari, wari utwaye ibikoresho bitagatifu n’impanda zo kuvuzwa." 
Numbers31:7 Nuko batera igihugu cya Madiyani, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Musa, maze bica abagabo bose." 
Numbers31:8 Bishe kandi n’abami batanu ba Madiyani ari bo: Ewi, Rekemu, Suri, Huri na Reva. Barongera bicisha inkota Balamu mwene Bewori." 
Numbers31:9 Abayisraheli bagira imfungwa abagore b’i Madiyani hamwe n’abana babo; babanyaga amatungo yabo yose hamwe n’ibyabo byose. 
Numbers31:10 Batwika imigi yose yari ituwe n’Abamadiyani n’ingando zabo zose. 
Numbers31:11 Nuko bacyura iminyago yose, ari iy’abantu ari n’iy’amatungo." 
Numbers31:12 Izo mfungwa zari zafatiwe mu ntambara hamwe n’iminyago yose, babimurikira Musa, umuherezabitambo Eleyazari n’ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli. Ibyo byose babijyana mu ngando yari mu bibaya bya Mowabu bikikije Yorudani iteganye na Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Musa, n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, hamwe n’abatware b’ikoraniro bose barasohoka, bajya kubasanganira hanze y’ingando." 
Numbers31:14 Musa arakarira abatware b’ingabo bari bavuye muri icyo gitero, agira ati" 
Numbers31:15 «Mwishe abandi musiga abagore! 
Numbers31:16 Kandi ari bo, mu gihe cya Balamu, batumye Abayisraheli batatira Uhoraho bakishyira mu maboko y’ikigirwamana cy’i Pewori, maze icyorezo kikayogoza ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho!" 
Numbers31:17 None rero nimwice abana b’abahungu bose n’abagore bose bigeze kuryamana n’umugabo. 
Numbers31:18 Ariko abana b’abakobwa batigeze baryamana n’umugabo, mubakomeze, mubagire abanyu." 
Numbers31:19 Naho mwebwe, mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi, muzarara hanze y’ingando. Mwebwe mwese abishe umuntu cyangwa mugakora intumbi, muzakora umuhango wo kwisukura ku munsi wa gatatu no ku wa karindwi. Abagore b’imfungwa mwazanye, na bo bazagenza batyo." 
Numbers31:20 Ubundi kandi, ibitambo byose, ibintu bikozwe mu ruhu byose, ibikozwe mu bwoya bw’ihene byose, n’ibikoresho bibajwe mu giti byose, muzabikoreraho umuhango wo kubisukura.»" 
Numbers31:21 Umuherezabitambo Eleyazari abwira ingabo zari zaragiye ku rugamba, ati «Dore amabwiriza y’itegeko Uhoraho yahaye Musa:" 
Numbers31:22 zahabu, feza, umuringa," 
Numbers31:23 n’andi moko yose y’ibyuma bidashongeshwa n’umuriro, muzabiwushyiramo kugira ngo mubisukure. Muri uwo muhango kandi, muzakoresha n’amazi y’icyuhagiro. Naho ibintu bishobora gutwikwa n’umuriro, muzabisukuza amazi." 
Numbers31:24 Muzamesa kandi imyambaro yanyu ku munsi wa karindwi, bityo mube musukuwe. Nyuma y’ibyo muzasubira mu ngando.»" 
Numbers31:25 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers31:26 «Wowe ubwawe, n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari hamwe n’abatware b’imiryango y’ikoraniro, mubare ibyafashweho iminyago byose, ari abantu, ari n’amatungo." 
Numbers31:27 Iminyago uzayigabanya ingabo zagiye ku rugamba, n’ikoraniro ryose." 
Numbers31:28 Ku byo uzaha ingabo zitabarutse, uzagabanyeho ituro ry’Uhoraho ku buryo bukurikira: ku mfungwa magana atanu, imwe izaba iy’Uhoraho; no ku matungo magana atanu, ari ibimasa, ari indogobe, ari n’amatungo magufi, rimwe rizaba iry’Uhoraho." 
Numbers31:29 Ibyo uzabifata ku mugabane wabo, ubihe Eleyazari umuherezabitambo, ribe ari ryo turo bagomba guha Uhoraho." 
Numbers31:30 Ku mugabane w’abandi Bayisraheli, naho uzafata kimwe cya mirongo itanu ku mfungwa, ku bimasa, ku ndogobe no ku yandi matungo yose, maze ugihe Abalevi bashinzwe imirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho.»" 
Numbers31:31 Musa n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, bakora ibyo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa." 
Numbers31:32 Ibyari bisigaye ku minyago yazanywe n’ingabo zagiye ku rugamba, ni ibi: amatungo magufi 675.000," 
Numbers31:33 amatungo meremare 72,000," 
Numbers31:34 n’indogobe 61,000." 
Numbers31:35 Abantu, ni ukuvuga abakobwa batigeze baryamana n’umugabo, bari 32,000." 
Numbers31:36 Kimwe cya kabiri cyahawe ingabo zari zagiye ku rugamba cyari kigizwe n’ibi bikurikira: amatungo magufi 337.500," 
Numbers31:37 ariko muri yo 675 yatanzweho ituro ry’Uhoraho; 
Numbers31:38 ibimasa 36,000, ariko muri byo 72 bitangwaho ituro ry’Uhoraho;" 
Numbers31:39 indogobe 30,500, ariko muri zo 61 zitangwaho ituro ry’Uhoraho;" 
Numbers31:40 n’abakobwa 16,000, bagabanyijweho 32 babatura Uhoraho." 
Numbers31:41 Iryo turo ry’Uhoraho Musa yari yagabanyije ku minyago, yarihaye umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse." 
Numbers31:42 Naho umugabane wahawe Abayisraheli," 
Numbers31:43 ari na wo Musa yagabanyije ku minyago y’ingabo zivuye ku rugamba, wari ugizwe n’ibi bikurikira: amatungo magufi 337.500," 
Numbers31:44 ibimasa 36,000," 
Numbers31:45 indogobe 30,500," 
Numbers31:46 n’abantu 16,000." 
Numbers31:47 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimutegetse, ku mugabane w’Abayisraheli, Musa afataho kimwe cya mirongo itanu ku mfungwa no ku matungo, maze agiha Abalevi bari bashinzwe imirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Numbers31:48 Abari bagabye imitwe y’ingabo ku rugamba, abagengagihumbi n’abagengajana, begera Musa," 
Numbers31:49 maze baramubwira bati «Abagaragu bawe babaze ingabo tuyobora basanga nta n’umwe ubuzemo. 
Numbers31:50 Ni yo mpamvu rero tuzaniye Uhoraho ituro ryacu, kugira ngo mu maso ye, dukore umuhango uhanagura icyaha ku bantu bacu. Twazanye rero ibintu byose bikoze muri zahabu buri muntu yasahuye: imiringa yo ku maboko, impeta z’amoko yose, amahelena yo ku matwi, hamwe n’imikufi.»" 
Numbers31:51 Musa n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari bakira iyo mitako yose ya zahabu yazanywe n’abatware b’ingabo. 
Numbers31:52 Zahabu yose yatuwe n’abatware b’imitwe y’ingabo n’ab’amatorero yapimaga amasikeli 16,750." 
Numbers31:53 Ingabo zo zari zasahuye buri muntu ku giti cye. 
Numbers31:54 Musa n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari rero, bakira iyo zahabu y’abatware b’imitwe y’ingabo n’ab’amatorero bayijyana mu ihema ry’ibonaniro kugira ngo mu maso y’Uhoraho, ibere Abayisraheli urwibutso." 
Numbers32:1 Bene Rubeni na bene Gadi bari bafite amashyo y’amatungo menshi cyane. Barebye igihugu cya Yazeri n’icya Gilihadi, basanga iyo ntara irimo urwuri rwiza rw’ayo matungo yabo." 
Numbers32:2 Bene Rubeni na bene Gadi basanga Musa, n’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, n’abatware b’umuryango, barababwira bati" 
Numbers32:3 «Ataroti, Divoni, Yazeri, Nimura, Heshiboni, Eleyale, Sevamu, Nebo na Bewoni," 
Numbers32:4 iyo ntara Uhoraho yatsindiye imbaga y’Abayisraheli, ni igihugu kibereye ubworozi bw’amatungo. Kandi rero urabizi, twe abagaragu bawe, dufite amashyo." 
Numbers32:5 Turakwinginze rero ngo kiriya gihugu ukiduheho umugabane twebwe abagaragu bawe, maze woye kutwambutsa Yorudani.»" 
Numbers32:6 Ariko Musa asubiza bene Gadi na bene Rubeni, ati «Ngaho rero! Abavandimwe banyu bagiye ku rugamba, namwe ngo mwisigarire hano!" 
Numbers32:7 Ni kuki mushaka guca intege abandi Bayisraheli ngo boye kujya mu gihugu Uhoraho yabahaye? 
Numbers32:8 Ni nk’uko kandi abasokuruza banyu babigenje igihe twari i Kadeshi-Barineya, nkabohereza gutata igihugu basezeranijwe." 
Numbers32:9 Barazamutse bagera mu kibaya cya Eshikoli, maze bareba icyo gihugu. Mu kugaruka, baje baca intege Abayisraheli, bababuza kwinjira mu gihugu Uhoraho yabasezeranije." 
Numbers32:10 Kuri uwo munsi Uhoraho yararakaye cyane, maze arahira agira ati" 
Numbers32:11 ’Bariya bantu bavuye mu Misiri, bakaba bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’irenga, kuko banze kunkurikira, bazapfa batabonye igihugu nasezeranije Abrahamu, Izaki na Yakobo.’" 
Numbers32:12 Abarokotse muri abo ni Kalebu mwene Yefune w’Umukenisi, na Yozuwe mwene Nuni, kuko bari bakurikiye Uhoraho nta gushidikanya." 
Numbers32:13 Uhoraho yarakariye cyane Abayisraheli, maze ababungagiza mu butayu imyaka mirongo ine, kugeza ubwo abari bakoze ibitamunyuze bose bashaje bagashira." 
Numbers32:14 None rero namwe, bwoko bw’abanyabyaha, mugiye kugenza nka ba so, mukururire Israheli yose uburakari bw’Uhoraho!" 
Numbers32:15 By’ukuri, nimwanga kumukurikira, azahamisha Israheli muri ubu butayu, muzabe ari mwe mpamvu y’ukurimbuka k’uyu muryango.»" 
Numbers32:16 Baramwegera, maze baramubwira bati «Tugiye kubaka hano ibiraro by’amashyo y’intama zacu, twubake n’imigi y’abana bacu." 
Numbers32:17 Naho twebwe tuzihutira gufata intwaro tugende imbere y’Abayisraheli kugeza ubwo na bo tuzaba tumaze kubinjiza iwabo. Abana bacu bazasigara hano mu migi y’intavogerwa, aho batazaterwa n’abaturage b’iki gihugu." 
Numbers32:18 Nta bwo tuzagaruka mu mazu yacu mbere y’uko buri Muyisraheli wese agira umunani we. 
Numbers32:19 Ariko ntituzagabana na bo igihugu kiri hakurya ya Yorudani, twebwe umunani wacu uherereye hano, iburasirazuba bwa Yorudani.»" 
Numbers32:20 Musa arabasubiza ati «Nimubigenza mutyo, mugafata intwaro imbere y’Uhoraho, mukajya ku rugamba," 
Numbers32:21 ingabo zanyu zikambuka Yorudani kugeza ubwo Uhoraho azirukana imbere ye abanzi be bose," 
Numbers32:22 maze mukazahindukira ari uko icyo gihugu cyaganjwe, nta cyo muzabazwa imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere ya Israheli, kandi iki gihugu kizaba umugabane wanyu." 
Numbers32:23 Ariko nimutagenza mutyo, muzaba mucumuriye Uhoraho; kandi mumenye ko icyaha cyanyu cyabakurikirana." 
Numbers32:24 Nimwubake imigi y’abana banyu n’ibiraro by’intama zanyu, ariko ijambo ryavuye mu munwa wanyu muzaryubahirize.»" 
Numbers32:25 Bene Gadi na bene Rubeni babwira Musa, bati «Twebwe abagaragu bawe, tuzubahiriza neza amategeko ya databuja." 
Numbers32:26 Abagore n’abana bacu, amashyo yacu n’amatungo yacu yose, bizasigara hano mu migi ya Gilihadi." 
Numbers32:27 Naho twebwe abagaragu bawe, abakereye itabaro, tuzashoza urugamba imbere y’Uhoraho, nk’uko databuja abivuze.»" 
Numbers32:28 Iby’abo bantu rero, Musa abishinga umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, na Yozuwe mwene Nuni, hamwe n’abatware b’imiryango ya Israheli." 
Numbers32:29 Yarababwiye ati «Bene Gadi na bene Rubeni nibafata intwaro mukambukana Yorudani, bakajya ku rugamba, nimumara kuganza kiriya gihugu, muzabahe intara ya Gilihadi ho umugabane." 
Numbers32:30 Ariko nibadafata intwaro hamwe namwe, bazahabwa umugabane wabo hagati yanyu mu gihugu cya Kanahani.»" 
Numbers32:31 Bene Gadi na bene Rubeni barasubiza bati «Tuzakora ibyo Uhoraho yabwiye abagaragu bawe. 
Numbers32:32 Twebwe ubwacu, tuzafata intwaro tujye mu gihugu cya Kanahani imbere y’Uhoraho, kandi umugabane wacu uzaba uyu wo hakuno ya Yorudani.»" 
Numbers32:33 Igihugu cya Sihoni umwami w’Abahemori, icya Ogi umwami wa Bashani, imigi yabyo n’intara ziyegereye, byose Musa abyegurira bene Gadi, bene Rubeni, n’igice kimwe cy’umuryango wa Manase mwene Yozefu." 
Numbers32:34 Bene Gadi bubaka bundi bushya imigi ya Divoni, Ataroti, Aroweri," 
Numbers32:35 AtirotiShofani, Yazeri, Yogiboha," 
Numbers32:36 Beti-Nimura, na Beti-Harani. Iyo migi barayubatse barayikomeza, bubaka n’ibiraro by’amatungo yabo." 
Numbers32:37 Bene Rubeni bubaka bundi bushya imigi ya Heshiboni, Eleyale, Kiriyatayimu," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Behali-Mewoni na Sivima. Uretse Sivima, amazina y’iyo migi yose bubatse bundi bushya barayahinduye bayita ayandi mashyashya." 
Numbers32:39 Bene Makiri, umuhungu wa Manase, bagiye muri Gilihadi, icyo gihugu barakigabiza, bakirukanamo Abahemori bari bagituye." 
Numbers32:40 Nuko Gilihadi, Musa ayiha Makiri mwene Manase, arahatura." 
Numbers32:41 Yayiri mwene Manase aragenda yigabiza umugi wa Kenati n’iyindi mito iwukikije, maze awitirira izina rye Novahi." 
Numbers33:1 Dore indaro Abayisraheli baraye igihe basohotse mu Misiri n’ingabo zabo, bayobowe na Musa na Aroni." 
Numbers33:2 Ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho Musa yagiye yandika ahantu bageraga bakahatinda, nyuma bakaza kuhava. Dore rero ahantu bagiye bahagarara, cyangwa bakahaca ingando." 
Numbers33:3 Bahagurutse i Ramusesi ku munsi wa cumi na gatanu w’ukwezi kwa mbere. Hari bukeye bwa Pasika, ubwo Abayisraheli basohokaga nta nkomyi, mu maso y’Abanyamisiri bose." 
Numbers33:4 Icyo gihe Abanyamisiri barimo bahamba abantu babo Uhoraho yari yishe kugira ngo ahinyuze imana zabo. Abo bishwe ni abari bavutse uburiza bose. 
Numbers33:5 Abayisraheli bahagurutse i Ramusesi bajya gushinga ingando i Sukoti. 
Numbers33:6 Bahagurutse i Sukoti, bajya gushinga ingando ahitwa Etamu ku rubibi rw’ubutayu." 
Numbers33:7 Bahagurutse ahitwa Etamu bagaruka kuri Pi-Hahiroti, ahateganye na Behali-Sefoni, bashinga ingando imbere ya Migidoli." 
Numbers33:8 Bahagurutse imbere ya Hahiroti, bambuka inyanja, bagera mu butayu bwa Etamu; nyuma y’urugendo rw’iminsi itatu bashinga ingando i Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Bahagurutse i Mara bagera ahitwa Elimu hari amasoko cumi n’abiri n’imikindo mirongo irindwi; aho ni ho bashinze ingando. 
Numbers33:10 Bahagurutse i Elimu, bashinga ingando hafi y’inyanja y’Urufunzo." 
Numbers33:11 Bahagurutse hafi y’inyanja y’Urufunzo, bajya gushinga ingando mu butayu bwa Sini." 
Numbers33:12 Bahagurutse mu butayu bwa Sini, bajya gushinga ingando i Dofuka." 
Numbers33:13 Bahagurutse i Dofuka bajya gushinga ingando ahitwa Alushi. 
Numbers33:14 Bahagurutse Alushi, bajya gushinga ingando i Refidimi, hamwe umuryango wageze ukabura amazi yo kunywa." 
Numbers33:15 Bahagurutse i Refifimu, bajya gushinga ingando mu butayu bwa Sinayi." 
Numbers33:16 Bahagurutse mu butayu bwa Sinayi bajya gushinga ingando i Kiviroti-Tawa. 
Numbers33:17 Bahagurutse i Kiviroti-Tawa bajya gushinga ingando i Haseroti. 
Numbers33:18 Bahagurutse i Haseroti, bajya gushinga ingando i Ritima." 
Numbers33:19 Bahagurutse i Ritima bajya gushinga ingando i Rimoni-Peresi. 
Numbers33:20 Bahagurutse i Rimoni-Peresi bajya gushinga ingando i Livina. 
Numbers33:21 Bahagurutse i Livina, bajya gushinga ingando i Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Bahagurutse i Risa, bajya gushinga ingando i Kehelata." 
Numbers33:23 Bahagurutse i Kehelata, bajya gushinga ingando ku musozi wa Sheferi." 
Numbers33:24 Bahagurutse ku musozi wa Sheferi, bajya gushinga ingando i Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Bahagurutse i Harada, bajya gushinga ingando i Makeheloti." 
Numbers33:26 Bahagurutse i Makeheloti, bajya gushinga ingando i Tahati." 
Numbers33:27 Bahagurutse i Tahati, bajya gushinga ingando i Terahi." 
Numbers33:28 Bahagurutse i Terahi, bajya gushinga ingando i Mitika." 
Numbers33:29 Bahagurutse i Mitika, bajya gushinga ingando i Hashimona." 
Numbers33:30 Bahagurutse i Hashimona, bajya gushinga ingando i Moseroti." 
Numbers33:31 Bahagurutse i Moseroti, bajya gushinga ingando i Bene-Yakani." 
Numbers33:32 Bahagurutse i Bene-Yakani, bajya gushinga ingando i Hori-Gidigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Bahagurutse i Hori-Gidigadi, bajya gushinga ingando i Yotivata." 
Numbers33:34 Bahagurutse i Yotivata, bajya gushinga ingando ahitwa Avirona." 
Numbers33:35 Bahagurutse Avirona, bajya gushinga ingando ahitwa Esiyoni-Geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Bahagurutse Esiyoni-Geberi, bajya gushinga ingando mu butayu bwa Sini ahitwa Kadeshi." 
Numbers33:37 Bahagurutse i Kadeshi, bajya gushinga ingando ku musozi wa Hori, ku rubibi rw’igihugu cya Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa gatanu, Abayisraheli bamaze imyaka mirongo ine bimutse mu Misiri, umuherezabitambo Aroni nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse, aterera umusozi wa Hori arahapfira." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni yari amaze imyaka ijana na makumyabiri n’itatu ubwo yagwaga ku musozi wa Hori. 
Numbers33:40 Icyo gihe ni ho Aradi umwami w’Abakanahani wari utuye muri Negevu, yamenye ko Abayisraheli baje bamusatira." 
Numbers33:41 Bahagurutse ku musozi wa Hori, bajya gushinga ingando i Salumona." 
Numbers33:42 Bahagurutse i Salumona, bajya gushinga ingando i Punoni." 
Numbers33:43 Bahagurutse i Punoni bajya gushinga ingando ahitwa Ovoti. 
Numbers33:44 Bahagurutse Ovoti bajya gushinga ingando ahitwa Iye-Avarimu, ku rubibi rwa Mowabu." 
Numbers33:45 Bahagurutse Iye-Avarimu bajya gushinga ingando i Divoni-Gadi. 
Numbers33:46 Bahagurutse i Divoni-Gadi, bajya gushinga ingando ahitwa Alunoni-Divilatayima." 
Numbers33:47 Bahagurutse Alunoni-Divilitayima, bajya gushinga ingando mu misozi ya Avarimu, aharebana na Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Bahagurutse mu misozi ya Avarimu, bajya gushinga ingando mu bibaya bya Mowabu, ku nkombe ya Yorudani ahateganye na Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Ku nkombe ya Yorudani, bahashinga ingando zavaga i Beti-Heshimoti ahitwa AveliShitimu mu bibaya bya Mowabu." 
Numbers33:50 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu bibaya bya Mowabu ku nkombe ya Yorudani ahateganye na Yeriko, ati" 
Numbers33:51 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli: Nimumara kwambuka Yorudani mukajya muri Kanahani," 
Numbers33:52 muzirukane imbere yanyu abaturage bose bo muri icyo gihugu. Ari ibigirwamana babaje mu mabuye, ari amashusho bacuze mu byuma bashongesha, hamwe n’amasengero yabo y’ahirengeye, byose muzabisenye mubikureho." 
Numbers33:53 Icyo gihugu muzakigabize mugiture, kuko ari mwe ngihaye ngo mugitunge." 
Numbers33:54 Muzakigabanya imiryango yanyu mukoresheje ubufindo. Umuryango urimo abantu benshi uzahabwa umugabane munini, naho urimo bake na wo uhabwe umugabane muto. Buri muntu azahabwa umugabane w’aho ubufindo buzerekana, kandi muzagabane mukurikije imiryango yanyu yo kwa ba sokuru." 
Numbers33:55 Ariko nimutirukana abaturage bo muri icyo gihugu, abo muzareka muri bo, bazababera nk’uruhehe rubarya mu maso cyangwa amahwa abahanda mu mbavu. Icyo gihugu muzatura bazakibajujubyamo," 
Numbers33:56 ndetse n’ibyo nari natekereje gukorera abo ngabo ni mwebwe nzabigirira.» 
Numbers34:1 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers34:2 «Dore ibyo uzategeka Abayisraheli: Mugiye kwinjira muri Kanahani, icyo ni cyo gihugu mwahaweho umugabane; imbibi zacyo ziteye zitya." 
Numbers34:3 Mu majyepfo, urubibi rwanyu ruturuka mu butayu bwa Sinayi rugakurikira umupaka w’igihugu cya Edomu. Iburasirazuba, urubibi rwanyu ruva ku mpera y’inyanja y’Umunyu," 
Numbers34:4 rukigobya mu majyepfo y’umuzamuko w’Akarabimu, rugaca i Sini, maze rugahinguka i Kadeshi-Barineya. Rukongera rukerekeza i Hasari-Adari, rugaca ahitwa Asimoni," 
Numbers34:5 maze rukiheta rugana mu mugezi wa Misiri, aho ruhurira n’inyanja." 
Numbers34:6 Iburengerazuba ho, inyanja nini ni yo izababera urubibi. Urwo ni rwo rubibi rwanyu iburengerazuba." 
Numbers34:7 Mu majyaruguru, muzashinge imbago z’urubibi rwanyu muhereye ku Nyanja Nini, mugeze ku musozi wa Hori." 
Numbers34:8 Nimuhava, mukomeze i LeboHamati, n’i Sedadi," 
Numbers34:9 mugane i Zifironi, maze muhagararire i Hasari-Eyinani. Urwo ni rwo rubibi rwanyu rwo mu majyaruguru." 
Numbers34:10 Iburasirazuba, muzashinga imbago z’urubibi rwanyu guhera i Hasari-Eyinani kugera i Shefami," 
Numbers34:11 mumanuke kuri Rivila iburasirazuba bwa Ayini, maze mukomeze mugere ku misozi iri mu burasirazuba bw’Inyanja ya Kinereti," 
Numbers34:12 mwongere mugere kuri Yorudani, muze guhagararira ku Nyanja y’Umunyu. Icyo ni cyo gihugu cyanyu n’imbibi zacyo zigikikije.»" 
Numbers34:13 Musa aha Abayisraheli amabwiriza, agira ati «Icyo ni cyo gihugu muzagabana mukoresheje ubufindo. Ni igihugu Uhoraho yategetse ko gihabwa imiryango icyenda hamwe n’igice kimwe cy’umuryango wa Manase." 
Numbers34:14 Koko rero, umuryango wa bene Gadi n’uwa bene Rubeni hamwe n’igice kimwe cy’umuryango wa Manase, bari bahawe umugabane wabo." 
Numbers34:15 Iyo miryango ibiri n’icyo gice cy’umuryango bahawe umugabane wabo hakurya ya Yorudani iburasirazuba, ahateganye na Yeriko.»" 
Numbers34:16 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers34:17 «Dore amazina y’abazabagabanya igihugu: ni umuherezabitambo Eleyazari na Yozuwe mwene Nuni. 
Numbers34:18 Muri buri muryango kandi muzatoremo umuntu uzagabanya igihugu. 
Numbers34:19 Dore rero amazina y’abo bantu: mu muryango wa Yuda ni Kalebu mwene Yefune. 
Numbers34:20 Mu muryango wa bene Simewoni, ni Shemuyeli mwene Amihudi." 
Numbers34:21 Mu muryango wa Benyamini, ni Elidadi mwene Kisiloni." 
Numbers34:22 Mu muryango wa bene Dani, uwatowe ni Buki mwene Yogili." 
Numbers34:23 Kwa bene Yozefu, mu muryango wa bene Manase, uwatowe ni Haniyeli mwene Efodi;" 
Numbers34:24 mu muryango wa bene Efurayimu, uwatowe ni Kemuyeli mwene Shifutani." 
Numbers34:25 Mu muryango wa bene Zabuloni, uwatowe ni Elisafani mwene Parinaki." 
Numbers34:26 Mu muryango wa bene Isakari, uwatowe ni Palitiyeli mwene Azani." 
Numbers34:27 Mu muryango wa bene Asheri, uwatowe ni Ahihudi mwene Shelomi." 
Numbers34:28 Mu muryango wa bene Nefutali, uwatowe ni Pedaheli mwene Amihudi.»" 
Numbers34:29 Abo ni bo bagabo Uhoraho yategetse gukwiza Abayisraheli imigabane mu gihugu cya Kanahani. 
Numbers35:1 Uhoraho abwirira Musa mu bibaya bya Mowabu hafi ya Yorudani ahateganye na Yeriko, ati" 
Numbers35:2 «Tegeka Abayisraheli ko ku mugabane wabo, bahaho Abalevi imigi yo guturamo. Muzabahe kandi n’imirima ikikije iyo migi." 
Numbers35:3 Iyo migi muzabaha bazayituramo, naho iyo mirima bazayishyiramo ibikoresho byabo, banaragiremo amatungo yabo yose." 
Numbers35:4 Imirima ikikije iyo migi muzaha Abalevi, izaba ituruka ku rukuta rw’umugi, igere mu mikono igihumbi impande zose." 
Numbers35:5 Muzaturuka inyuma y’umugi, mu ruhande rw’iburasirazuba mupime imikono ibihumbi bibiri, mu majyepfo mupime ibihumbi bibiri, mu burengerazuba naho mupime imikono ibihumbi bibiri. Ubwo umugi muzaba muwugoteye hagati. Iyo ni yo mirima izaba ikikije imigi Abalevi bazahabwa." 
Numbers35:6 Mu migi izahabwa Abalevi, itandatu muri yo, izaba iy’ubugingo kugira ngo abicanyi bajye bahahungira. Muzongeraho kandi n’indi migi mirongo ine n’ibiri;" 
Numbers35:7 ni ukuvuga ko imigi izegurirwa Abalevi yose hamwe izaba mirongo ine n’umunani. Buri mugi kandi, uzajyana n’imirima yawo." 
Numbers35:8 Muri iryo tanga ry’imigi y’Abayisraheli, umuryango ufite myinshi muzawake myinshi, ufite mike muwake mike. Buri muryango uzaha Abalevi imigi, mu kigereranyo cy’umugabane uzaba wegukanye.»" 
Numbers35:9 Uhoraho abwira Musa, ati" 
Numbers35:10 «Dore ibyo uzabwira Abayisraheli. Uti ’Nimumara kwambuka Yorudani mujya mu gihugu cya Kanahani," 
Numbers35:11 muzatoranye imigi izababera iy’ubuhungiro. Umuntu uzaba yishe undi atabigize nkana, azajya ahahungira." 
Numbers35:12 Iyo migi izababera ubuhungiro kugira ngo murokoke. Umwicanyi ntazicwe mbere yuko acirirwa urubanza imbere y’ikoraniro. 
Numbers35:13 Muri iyo migi itandatu y’ubuhungiro," 
Numbers35:14 itatu muzayitoranye hakurya ya Yorudani, naho yindi itatu muyitoranye mu gihugu cya Kanahani. Iyo migi izababera iy’ubuhungiro." 
Numbers35:15 Iyo migi itandatu izaba iy’ubuhungiro bw’Abayisraheli, n’abasuhuke babarimo, kimwe n’umushyitsi uzabagenderera. Umuntu wese uzica undi atabigize nkana, azajya ahahungira." 
Numbers35:16 Umuntu uzicisha icyitwa icyuma cyose, azaba abaye umwicanyi; na we agomba kwicwa." 
Numbers35:17 Uzica undi ari uko yamuteye ibuye, azaba ari umwicanyi; na we agomba kwicwa." 
Numbers35:18 N’uzica undi ari uko yamuteye umujugujugu; na we azagomba kwicwa. 
Numbers35:19 Ugomba guhora, ni we ubwe uziyicira uwo mwicanyi nibahura." 
Numbers35:20 Umuntu uzahutaza undi abigiranye urwango, akagira se icyo amutera abigiranye ubugome," 
Numbers35:21 cyangwa akamukubita abigiranye urwango, maze akamwica, uwo uzaba yakubise, na we azicwe, kuko ari umwicanyi. Ugomba guhora, ni we ubwe uziyicira uwo mwicanyi nibahura." 
Numbers35:22 Ariko hari ubwo yashobora kugira ibyago agahutaza undi nta rwango, akagira icyo amutera nta bugome," 
Numbers35:23 cyangwa akamuhamya ibuye rikamwica atamubonye. Niba yabigize nta rugomo, nta n’inabi amwifuriza," 
Numbers35:24 ikoraniro rizaca urubanza rikurikije aya mategeko, maze rikiranure uwishe n’ugomba guhora." 
Numbers35:25 Uwo azaba yishe, ikoraniro rizamukura mu maso y’ugomba guhora, maze rimusubize aho yari yaracikiye mu mugi w’ubuhungiro. Azawugumamo kugeza ku rupfu rw’umuherezabitambo mukuru wakoreweho umuhango wo gusigwa amavuta matagatifu." 
Numbers35:26 Ariko uwo mwicanyi nasohoka mu mugi w’ubuhungiro," 
Numbers35:27 maze ugomba guhora akamusanga hanze yawo akamwica, nta cyaha azaba akoze." 
Numbers35:28 Uwo mwicanyi rero azaguma mu mugi w’ubuhungiro bwe kugeza ku rupfu rw’umuherezabitambo mukuru. Niyumva ngo yapfuye, azabone gusubira mu isambu ye." 
Numbers35:29 Aho muzatura hose, iryo rizababere itegeko rigenga irangiza ry’imanza, uko ibisekuruza bizagenda bisimburana." 
Numbers35:30 Mu manza z’ubwicanyi zose, umwicanyi azicwe ari uko ashinjwa n’abagabo babiri nibura. Ntihazagire uwo mucira urubanza rwo gupfa ashinjwa n’umuntu umwe gusa." 
Numbers35:31 Ntimuzemere ikiguzi cyo gucungura ubuzima bw’umwicanyi ukwiye urupfu; ahubwo muzamwice. 
Numbers35:32 Ntimuzemere ikiguzi kugira ngo mumureke acikire mu mugi w’ubuhungiro, cyangwa ngo agaruke mu gihugu cy’iwabo umuherezabitambo mukuru atarapfa." 
Numbers35:33 Ntimuzanduze igihugu muzaba murimo; koko rero, amaraso ni ikintu cyanduza igihugu. Kandi nta we ushobora guhanagura amaraso yamenetse mu gihugu, adakoresheje ay’uwayakimennyemo." 
Numbers35:34 Ntuzanduze igihugu mutuyemo. Ndi Uhoraho, kandi ubwanjye ntuye mu Bayisraheli rwagati.»" 
Numbers36:1 Nuko abatware b’inzu ya bene Gilihadi, mwene Makiri umuhungu wa Manase, wo mu muryango wa bene Yozefu, baza imbere ya Musa n’imbere y’abatware b’imiryango ya Israheli, baravuga bati" 
Numbers36:2 «Uhoraho yategetse databuja kugabanya Abayisraheli igihugu akoresheje ubufindo. Umunani w’umuvandimwe wacu Selofehadi, Uhoraho yategetse databuja ko uzahabwa abakobwa be." 
Numbers36:3 Nibaramuka rero barongowe n’umugabo wo mu wundi muryango w’Abayisraheli, umunani wabo uzavanwa ku uwo twahawe na ba data, maze wongerwe ku uwabo mu muryango bazashyingirwamo." 
Numbers36:4 Umwaka wa yubile nugera muri Israheli, umunani wabo uzakurwa burundu ku wa ba data, maze wongerwe ku uwo mu muryango bazashakamo.»" 
Numbers36:5 Ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho, Musa aha Abayisraheli amabwiriza akurikira, agira ati «Abahungu bo mu muryango wa Yozefu baravuga ukuri." 
Numbers36:6 Dore rero itegeko ry’Uhoraho ku kibazo cyerekeye abakobwa ba Selofehadi. Bazashake umugabo bikundiye; apfa gusa kuba ari uwo mu muryango ufitanye isano na se ubabyara. 
Numbers36:7 Bityo buri Muyisraheli azagumana umunani wo mu nzu yo kwa se, hoye kugira umunani uva mu muryango ngo ujye mu wundi." 
Numbers36:8 Umukobwa wese uzaragwa umunani w’umwe mu miryango y’Abayisraheli, ntashobora gushaka undi mugabo, uretse uwo mu nzu yo muri uwo muryango wo kwa se. Bityo, buri Muyisraheli wese azatunga umunani wo kwa se." 
Numbers36:9 Nta munani uzashobora kuva mu muryango ngo ujye mu wundi, ahubwo buri muryango w’Abayisraheli uzagumana umunani wawo.»" 
Numbers36:10 Abakobwa ba Selofehadi rero bakurikiza ibyo Uhoraho yari yategetse Musa. 
Numbers36:11 Nuko Mahila, Tirisa, Hogila, Milika, Nowa, mbese abakobwa ba Selofehadi bose, bashyingirwa ku bahungu ba se wabo." 
Numbers36:12 Ni ukuvuga ko bashyingiwe rero ku bagabo bakomoka mu mazu ya bene Manase, umuhungu wa Yozefu. Bityo, umunani wabo uguma mu muryango w’inkomoko ya se ubabyara." 
Numbers36:13 Ayo ni yo mategeko n’amabwiriza Uhoraho yahaye Abayisraheli, yifashishije Musa. Yayatangiye mu bibaya bya Mowabu, ku nkombe ya Yorudani ahateganye na Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Dore amagambo Musa yabwiriye Israheli yose hakurya ya Yorudani, mu butayu, muri Araba, ahateganye na Sufu, hagati ya Parani, Tofeli, Lavani, Haseroti na Di-Zahavu." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Kuva kuri Horebu kugera i Kadeshi-Barineya unyuze ku musozi wa Seyiri, hari urugendo rw’iminsi cumi n’umwe." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa cumi na kumwe k’umwaka wa mirongo ine kuva bimutse mu Misiri, Musa ageza ku Bayisraheli ibyo Uhoraho yari yamutegetse kubabwira byose." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Ubwo yari amaze gutsinda Sihoni umwami w’Abahemori wari utuye i Heshiboni, no gutsindira ahitwa Edereyi Ogi umwami wa Bashani wari utuye ahitwa Ashitaroti." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Nuko, bari hakurya ya Yorudani mu gihugu cya Mowabu, Musa aterura abasobanurira Amategeko ku buryo buteye butya:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 Turi ku musozi wa Horebu, Uhoraho Imana yacu yaravuze ati «Mumaze igihe kirekire bihagije kuri uyu musozi;" 
Deuteronomy1:7 none nimuhaguruke, mujye mu misozi y’Abahemori no mu tutere twose tuhegereye, mukwire muri Araba, no ku Misozi, no mu Bisiza, no muri Negevu no ku nkombe y’Inyanja, mu gihugu cya Kanahani no muri Libani, kugera ku Ruzi runini rwa Efurati." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ngicyo igihugu mbagabiye. Nimukijyemo, kibe icyanyu; ni cyo Uhoraho yarahiye kuzaha abakurambere banyu Abrahamu, Izaki na Yakobo, kimwe n’abazabakomokaho.»" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Icyo gihe narababwiye nti «Sinabasha kubatwara jyenyine! 
Deuteronomy1:10 Uhoraho Imana yanyu yarabagwije, none dore muhwanyije ubwinshi n’inyenyeri zo mu kirere." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Uhoraho Imana y’abakurambere banyu arabahe kororoka, murute incuro igihumbi uko mungana ubu ngubu, arabahe n’umugisha nk’uko yabibasezeranyije." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ubu se nabasha gutwara jyenyine intimba zanyu, intonganya n’imanza zanyu?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Nimushake mu miryango yanyu abantu bitonda, b’abanyabwenge kandi b’inararibonye, maze mbagire abatware banyu.»" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Namwe mwaranshubije muti «Ibyo utubwiye gukora ni byiza.» 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ni bwo rero ntoranyije abakuru b’imiryango yanyu, abantu b’impuguke kandi b’inararibonye, maze mbagira abatware b’imiryango yanyu: bamwe bagatwara abantu igihumbi, abandi ijana, abandi mirongo itanu, abandi icumi; nongeraho n’abashinzwe kubahiriza amategeko." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Icyo gihe nahaye abacamanza banyu amabwiriza ngira nti «Muzajye mwumva ibibazo by’abavandimwe banyu, mucire urubanza rw’intabera umuntu wese ufitanye akantu n’umuvandimwe we cyangwa n’umusuhuke ucumbitse iwe." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Mu guca imanza ntimuzagire aho mubogamira, abaciye bugufi n’abakomeye mujye mubumva kimwe; ntimuzagire uwo mutinya, kuko ubucamanza ari ubw’Imana. Nihagira ikibazo kibagora cyane, muzakinshyikirize, nzagikemura.»" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Icyo gihe rero, mbaha amategeko ku byo mwagombaga gukora byose." 
Deuteronomy1:19 Hanyuma twahagurutse i Horebu, twambukiranya bwa butayu bugari kandi buteye ubwoba mwiboneye; dukurikira inzira igana mu misozi y’Abahemori, nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yacu yari yabidutegetse; nuko tugera i Kadeshi-Barineya." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ndababwira nti «Mugeze mu misozi y’Abahemori Uhoraho Imana yacu aduhaye. 
Deuteronomy1:21 Dore Uhoraho Imana yawe akweguriye igihugu. Zamuka, ukigire icyawe nk’uko Uhoraho Imana y’abakurambere bawe yabigusezeranyije. Ntutinye, ngo ucike intege!»" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Icyo gihe mwese mwaranyegereye, murambwira muti «Reka dutume abatasi batubanzirize, badutatire icyo gihugu, batumenyeshe neza inzira tugomba kuzazamukiramo, n’imigi tuzageramo.»" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ibyo narabishimye; maze ntoranya muri mwe abagabo cumi na babiri, umwe umwe muri buri muryango." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Bashyira nzira, baterera iyo misozi. Bageze mu bikombe bya Eshikoli, barahatata." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Basoroma ku mbuto z’icyo gihugu, bahindukiye baraziduha. Badutekerereza n’iby’aho, bagira bati «Igihugu Uhoraho Imana yacu aduhaye ni igihugu cyiza!»" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Nyamara mwe mwanga kukijyamo, musuzugura ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu," 
Deuteronomy1:27 mwitotombera mu mahema yanyu muvuga, ngo «Kuba Uhoraho atwanga ni cyo cyatumye atuvana mu gihugu cya Misiri! Ngo kwari ukugira ngo atugabize Abahemori maze baturimbure!" 
Deuteronomy1:28 Muti ese turazamuka tujya he? Bene wacu baduciye intege batubwira yuko abantu baho badusumbya kure igihagararo n’imbaraga, ko bafite imigi minini kandi ikomeye, izengurutswe n’inkuta z’amabuye zikabakaba ku ijuru; ndetse twabonyeyo n’Abanaki!»" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Narababwiye nti «Mwihinda umushyitsi ngo mubatinye! 
Deuteronomy1:30 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ubagenda imbere azabarwanirira ubwe, nk’uko yabigenjeje mu Misiri mubyirebera," 
Deuteronomy1:31 kandi nk’uko yabigenjeje no mu butayu. Ese nta bwo wiboneye uko Uhoraho Imana yawe yaguhetse nk’uko umuntu aheka umwana we, mu rugendo rwose mwakoze kurinda mugera ino?»" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ibyo mwabirenzeho ntimwemera Uhoraho Imana yanyu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 kandi ari we wabagendaga imbere akabashakira aho mushinga ingando: nijoro akagenda mu nkingi y’umuriro ngo abereke inzira mucamo, ku manywa akagenda mu gicu." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Uhoraho yumvise amagambo mwavugaga, biramurakaza, bituma arahira ati" 
Deuteronomy1:35 «Ni ukuri, nta n’umwe muri aba bantu, nta n’umwe muri iyi nyoko mbi uzabona igihugu cyiza narahiriye kuzaha abakurambere banyu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 keretse Kalebu mwene Yefune: uwo we azakibona, kandi we n’urubyaro rwe nzabaha ubutaka yakandagiyeho, kuko igihe cyose yakurikiye Uhoraho ubudahwema.»" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Nanjye mwatumye Uhoraho andakarira; maze aravuga ati «Nawe ntuzinjiramo! 
Deuteronomy1:38 Yozuwe mwene Nuni umufasha wawe, ni we uzinjiramo: uramutere ubugabo umukomeze, kuko ari we uzatuma Abayisraheli bigarurira icyo gihugu." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Byongeye, abana banyu mwavugaga ko bazaba ingaruzwamuheto, abana banyu b’ibitambambuga bataramenya gutandukanya icyiza n’ikibi, bo bazakinjiramo. Ni bo nzagiha, ni bo bazagifata." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Naho mwebwe nimuhindukire musubire mu butayu, mugende mwerekeza ku Nyanja y’Urufunzo.»" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Mwaranshubije muti «Twacumuriye Uhoraho! Noneho tugiye kuzamuka, turwane nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yacu yabidutegetse.» Ni bwo rero buri wese muri mwe afashe intwaro ze, mwibwira ko guterera ya misozi byoroshye." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Ubwo Uhoraho yarantumye ati «Babwire uti ’Ntimuzamuke kandi ntimurwane, kuko tutari kumwe! Nimusigeho, hato mutaneshwa n’abanzi banyu!’»" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ibyo narabibabwiye, ariko ntimwumva, musuzugura ijwi ry’Uhoraho; maze kubera kwiyemera, mwiha guterera iyo misozi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ni bwo Abahemori batuye iyo misozi babasanganije intwaro, babomaho nk’irumbo ry’inzuki; maze barabacocagura, kuva i Seyiri kugera i Horima." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Mugarutse, mujya kuririra imbere y’Uhoraho; nyamara Uhoraho ntiyabitaho ngo abatege amatwi." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Nuko muguma i Kadeshi igihe kirekire, gihwanye n’icyo mwari mwarahamaze mbere." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Nyuma twarahindukiye tujya mu butayu, twerekeza ku nyanja y’Urufunzo nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabimbwiye; tuzenguruka umusozi wa Seyiri, bimara igihe kirekire." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Hanyuma Uhoraho yarambwiye ati 
Deuteronomy2:3 «Hashize igihe kirekire muzenguruka uyu musozi, none nimuhindukire mugane mu majyaruguru!" 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ati ha rubanda aya mabwiriza, uti dore mugiye kunyura ku butaka bwa bene wanyu, bene Ezawu batuye muri Seyiri. Bo bazabatinya, ariko rero namwe muzirinde," 
Deuteronomy2:5 ntimuzabarwanye; nta cyo nzabaha ku gihugu cyabo, habe n’ahangana n’aho umuntu yakandagiza ikirenge, kuko umusozi wa Seyiri naweguriye Ezawu." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Ibiryo muzarya muzabigure na bo, mubishyure amafeza; ndetse n’amazi yo kunywa, muzemere muyagure na bo mubishyure feza." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe yaguhereye umugisha mu byo uzakora byose, yitaye ku rugendo wakoreye muri ubu butayu bugari; dore imyaka ibaye mirongo ine Uhoraho Imana yawe ari kumwe nawe, kandi nta cyo wigeze ubura.»" 
Deuteronomy2:8 Nuko rero tunyura kure ya bene wacu, bene Ezawu batuye muri Seyiri, dukurikira inzira ica muri Araba iturutse mu karere ka Eliyati na Esiyoni-Geberi. Turakimirana, twerekeza mu butayu bwa Mowabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Maze Uhoraho arambwira ati «Uramenye ntugirire Mowabu urugomo, ntubarwanye, kuko nta cyo nzaguha ku gihugu cyabo: bene Loti ni bo nahaye umugi wa Ari ngo habe ubukonde bwabo.»" 
Deuteronomy2:10 – Kera hari hatuye Abahemi, bakaba abantu b’ibihangange, benshi, kandi barebare cyane nk’Abanaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Kimwe n’Abanaki, babarirwaga mu Barefayimu, ariko Abamowabu bakabita Abahemi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 No muri Seyiri kera hari hatuye Abahori, maze bene Ezawu barabasahura, barabamenesha, bityo barahiturira, nk’uko Abayisraheli babigenjeje mu gihugu Uhoraho yabahayeho ubukonde. –" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Uhoraho ati «Nimugende, mwambuke umugezi wa Zeredi.» Nuko twambuka umubande wa Zeredi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Urugendo twakoze kuva i Kadeshi-Barineya kugeza ubwo twambutse umugezi wa Zeredi rwamaze imyaka mirongo itatu n’umunani – kugeza ubwo nyine abaturwaniriraga bose icyo gihe basaza bagashira, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabirahiye;" 
Deuteronomy2:15 ndetse n’ukuboko k’Uhoraho kwarabashikamiye, kugira ngo bagabanuke mu ngando zacu, barinda bashira." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Urupfu rero rumaze gutsemba muri rubanda abari abatabazi bose icyo gihe," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Uhoraho arambwira ati 
Deuteronomy2:18 «Uyu munsi wambukiranye igihugu cya Mowabu, unyuze mu mugi wa Ari." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Nugera ahateganye na bene Hamoni, uramenye ntubagirire urugomo ngo ubarwanye, kuko nta cyo nzaguha ku gihugu cya bene Hamoni, kubera ko nacyeguriye bene Loti." 
Deuteronomy2:20 – Icyo gihugu cyitirirwaga kandi Abarefayimu, kuko Abarefayimu bari bagituye mbere, Abahamoni bakabita Abazamuzimi:" 
Deuteronomy2:21 bari abantu b’ibihangange, benshi kandi barebare cyane, mbese nk’Abanaki! Ariko Uhoraho yarabarimbuye ngo babise Abahamoni; nuko barabanyaga, barabazungura." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Ni na ko Uhoraho yari yaragiriye bene Ezawu batuye muri Seyiri arimbura Abahori ngo bababise; nuko barabanyaga, barabazungura, kugeza na n’ubu." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Byongeye kandi, Abakafutori baturutse i Kafutori, barimbuye Abahawi bari batuye mu nsisiro za Gaza, maze barabazungura —." 
Deuteronomy2:24 Nuko Uhoraho ati «Nimuhaguruke mugende, mwambuke umugezi wa Arunoni! Dore nkurekuriye Sihoni Umuhemori, umwami wa Heshiboni, hamwe n’igihugu cye. Tangira ucyigarurire, umutere murwane." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Uyu munsi, ndatangira gukangaranya amahanga yose atuye mu nsi y’ijuru, kugira ngo agutinye; abazumva bakuvuga, bazahinda umushyitsi, badagadwe imbere yawe.»" 
Deuteronomy2:26 Nuko igihe turi mu butayu bwa Kedemoti, ni bwo nohereje intumwa kwa Sihoni umwami wa Heshiboni, mubwira aya magambo y’amahoro, nti" 
Deuteronomy2:27 «Ndeka nyure mu gihugu cyawe! Nzaca mu nzira nyabagendwa, sinzagana iburyo cyangwa ibumoso;" 
Deuteronomy2:28 ibiryo bizantunga n’amazi nzanywa, uzabingurishe ku giciro cya feza; undeke gusa nitambukire ku maguru," 
Deuteronomy2:29 nk’uko bene Ezawu batuye muri Seyiri na bene Mowabu batuye umugi wa Ari bangenjereje, kugeza igihe nzambukira Yorudani nkagera mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yacu yaduhaye.»" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Nyamara Sihoni umwami wa Heshiboni ntiyemera ko tunyura mu gihugu cye, kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe yari yateye umutima we kunangira, ntunabashe gutekereza, kugira ngo uwo munsi amukurekurire." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati «Dore nabanje kukurekurira Sihoni hamwe n’igihugu cye; ngaho tangira ucyigarurire.» 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sihoni hamwe n’ingabo ze zose badusanganirira i Yahasa, kugira ngo baturwanye." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Nuko Uhoraho Imana yacu aramuturekurira, tumwicana n’abahungu be, kimwe n’ingabo ze zose." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Icyo gihe dufata imigi ye yose, maze buri mugi tuwutura Imana tuwurimbura: ari abagabo, ari abagore, ari abana, ntitwasiga n’uwakirazira;" 
Deuteronomy2:35 keretse amatungo yonyine, ni yo twajyananye n’ibyo twasahuye mu migi twari twafashe." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Uhereye kuri Aroweri yubatse ku musozi uri hejuru y’umugezi wa Arunoni, ugahera no ku mugi wubatse mu mubande waho, ukagera i Gilihadi, nta mugi n’umwe watunaniye: Uhoraho Imana yacu yari yatweguriye byose." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Igihugu cya bene Hamoni ni cyo gusa tutegereye: aho ni inkengero zose z’umugezi wa Yaboki n’imigi yo mu bisozi n’ahandi hantu hose Uhoraho Imana yacu yari yaratubujije. 
Deuteronomy3:1 Hanyuma twarahindukiye, tuzamukira mu nzira igana i Bashani, ariko Ogi umwami wa Bashani hamwe n’ingabo ze zose badutegera ahitwa Edereyi kugira ngo baturwanye." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Uhoraho rero arambwira ati «Ntutinye, kuko namukurekuriye, we n’ingabo ze zose n’igihugu cye cyose; uzamugire uko wagize Sihoni umwami w’Abahemori wari utuye i Heshiboni.»" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Nuko Uhoraho Imana yacu aturekurira Ogi umwami wa Bashani n’ingabo ze zose, turabatsemba ntihasigara n’umwe." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Icyo gihe dufata imigi ye yose, ntitwasigaza urusisiro na rumwe. Twafashe akarere kose ka Arugobu ho muri Bashani katwarwaga na Ogi, kari kagizwe n’imigi mirongo itandatu;" 
Deuteronomy3:5 yose yari ikomeye cyane, ikikijwe n’inkuta ndende, ikagira n’imiryango ikingishijwe inzugi z’ibyuma, tutiriwe tuvuga insisiro nyinshi cyane zo mu byaro." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Nuko tuyitura Uhoraho tuyirimbura, nk’uko twari twabigiriye Sihoni umwami wa Heshiboni; buri mugi turawutsemba: ari abagabo, ari abagore, ari abana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Ariko amatungo yose hamwe n’ibyo twasahuye muri iyo migi, tubijyanaho iminyago." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Icyo gihe rero, abo bami bombi b’Abahemori tubambura ibihugu byabo biri hakurya ya Yorudani, uhereye ku mugezi wa Arunoni ukagera ku musozi wa Herimoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Uwo musozi wa Herimoni, abaturage ba Sidoni bawita Siriyoni, naho Abahemori bo bakawita Seniri –." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Twari twafashe imigi yose yo ku Murambi, dufata Gilihadi yose, kugera i Salika na Edereyi, imigi yo mu gihugu cya Bashani, cyatwarwaga n’umwami Ogi." 
Deuteronomy3:11 – Ogi rero, umwami wa Bashani, ni we wenyine wari usigaye mu bakomoka ku Barefayimu; ndetse n’igitanda cye gikozwe mu cyuma si cyo kiri i Raba y’Abahamoni? Gifite uburebure bw’imikono cyenda, n’ubugari bw’imikono ine, dukurikije imikono isanzwe –." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Nuko icyo gihugu rero turakigarurira. Bene Rubeni na bene Gadi nabahaye igice kimwe cy’imisozi ya Gilihadi hamwe n’imigi yaho, uhereye ku mugi w’Aroweri wubatse hejuru y’umubande wa Arunoni." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Igice gisigaye cya Gilihadi hamwe na Bashani yose, ari yo gihugu cy’umwami Ogi, mbigabira igice kimwe cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase. Akarere kose ka Arugobu hamwe na Bashani yose ni byo byitwaga igihugu cy’Abarefayimu." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yayiri mwene Manase yigarurira Arugobu yose, ageza ku gihugu cy’Abageshuri n’icy’Abamahaka; nuko yiyitirira utwo turere twa Bashani, ku buryo n’ubu hakitwa «Insisiro za Yayiri»." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Makiri, we namuhaye Gilihadi." 
Deuteronomy3:16 Bene Rubeni na bene Gadi mbaha akarere gahera kuri Gilihadi kakagera ku mugezi wa Arunoni, uwo mugezi ukaba ari wo uba urubibi; bakagarurwa kandi n’umugezi wa Yaboki, ubagabanya na bene Hamoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Kandi mbaha Araba – Yorudani iba urugabano – kuva kuri Kinereti kugera ku nyanja ya Araba, ari yo Nyanja y’Umunyu iri mu nsi y’ibisi bya Pisiga, ahagana iburasirazuba." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Icyo gihe mbaha aya mabwiriza nti «Ni Uhoraho Imana yanyu wabeguriye iki gihugu. Nti intwari mwese, muzafate intwaro zanyu, mujye imbere y’Abayisraheli bene wanyu, mwambuke Yorudani." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Naho abagore banyu, n’abana banyu n’amatungo yanyu byonyine – kandi nzi ko mufite amatungo menshi – bizagume mu migi nabahaye," 
Deuteronomy3:20 kuzageza igihe Uhoraho azaha bene wanyu kuruhuka nk’uko namwe yabibahaye, na bo batunge igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye hakurya ya Yorudani; hanyuma muzabone ubugaruka, buri muntu ajye mu bukonde bwe namukebeye.»" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Icyo gihe Yozuwe na we muha aya mabwiriza, nti «Wiboneye n’amaso yawe ibintu byose Uhoraho Imana yanyu yagiriye ba bami bombi; uko ni ko Uhoraho azagirira ibihugu byose ugiye gusanga hakurya." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Ntimubatinye, kuko Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we ubwe ubarwanirira.»" 
Deuteronomy3:23 Nuko ninginga Uhoraho nti 
Deuteronomy3:24 «Uhoraho Mana, watangiye kwereka umugaragu wawe ubuhangange bwawe n’ububasha bw’ukuboko kwawe. Ese mu ijuru cyangwa ku isi hari indi mana muhwanya ibikorwa n’ububasha?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Undeke nambuke ngere hakurya, maze ndebe igihugu cyiza kiri hakurya ya Yorudani, ndebe iriya misozi myiza, ndebe na Libani!»" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Ariko kubera mwe, Uhoraho yarandakariye, ntiyanyumva. Uhoraho yarambwiye ati «Uherukire aho! Ntiwongere kugira icyo umbwira kuri ibyo!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Zamuka ujye mu mpinga ya Pisiga, uterere amaso iburengerazuba no mu majyaruguru, mu majyepfo no mu burasirazuba; uhitegereze neza, kuko utazambuka Yorudani iyi ngiyi!" 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ha Yozuwe amabwiriza yawe, umutere ubugabo umukomeze, kuko ari we uzagenda imbere y’iyi mbaga akambuka Yorudani, akaba ari we uzatuma bakukana kiriya gihugu ureba.»" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Nuko tuguma mu kibaya giteganye na Beti-Pewori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 None rero, Israheli, umva amategeko n’imigenzo mbigisha ubwanjye gukurikiza, maze muzabone kubaho no kwinjira mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana y’abasokuruza banyu abahaye ngo mucyigarurire." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Ntimuzagire icyo mwongera ku magambo y’amategeko mbahaye, ntimuzagire n’icyo mugabanyaho, kugira ngo mukomeze amategeko y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu mbashyikirije." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Mwiboneye n’amaso yanyu ibyo Uhoraho yakoreye i Behali-Pewori: abari bayobotse bose Behali y’i Pewori, Uhoraho yabatsembye muri mwe rwagati," 
Deuteronomy4:4 nyamara mwebwe abayoboke b’Uhoraho Imana yanyu muracyariho mwese na n’ubu. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Dore mbigishije amategeko n’imigenzo, nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yanjye yabintegetse, kugira ngo muzabikurikize mu gihugu mugiye kwinjiramo ngo mucyigarurire." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Muzayakomereho, muyakurikize; ni cyo kizatuma muba abanyabwenge mu maso y’amahanga. Abazabwirwa iby’aya mategeko yose, bazavuga bati «Ntakabuza, iri hanga rikomeye ritya rigomba kuba ari iry’abantu b’abanyabwenge kandi b’impuguke!»" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Koko se, hari irindi hanga rikomeye ryagira imana ziriba hafi nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yacu abigenza igihe cyose tumutabaje?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ni irihe hanga rikomeye ryagira amategeko n’imigenzo biboneye nk’iri Tegeko mbagejejeho uyu munsi? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Icyakora uririnde, umenye ntuzibagirwe ibintu wiboneye n’amaso yawe. Mu buzima bwawe bwose ntibizigere bikuva ku mutima; ahubwo uzabyigishe abana bawe n’abuzukuru bawe." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Wari uhagaze ubwawe imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe kuri Horebu, igihe Uhoraho ambwira ati «Koranyiriza rubanda hafi yanjye, mbumvishe amagambo yanjye, kugira ngo bige kuntinya iminsi yose bazabaho ku isi, no kugira ngo bazabyigishe abana babo.»" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Uwo munsi mwigiye hafi, muhagarara mu nsi y’umusozi wakaga umuriro, indimi zawo zitumbagira mu kirere, mu mwijima w’ibicu n’uw’ijoro ribuditse." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Uhoraho rero abavugisha ari muri uwo muriro rwagati: ijwi ryaravugaga mukaryumva, ariko ntimugire ishusho mubona, mwumvaga ijwi gusa." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Ni bwo abatangarije Isezerano rye, rigizwe na ya Mategeko cumi yabahaye ngo muyakurikize, akayandika ku bimanyu bibiri by’amabuye." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Maze nanjye Uhoraho antegeka kubigisha amategeko n’imigenzo bye, kugira ngo muzabikurikize mu gihugu mugiye kwinjiramo ngo mukigarurire." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Mwimenye, mwebwe ubwanyu: nta shusho mwigeze mubona cya gihe Uhoraho yabavugishirije kuri Horebu, ari mu muriro rwagati." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Muramenye ntimuzandavure mwiremera ikigirwamana, gikozwe mu ishusho iryo ari ryo ryose: ryaba iry’umugabo cyangwa iry’umugore," 
Deuteronomy4:17 ryaba iry’inyamaswa igendera ku butaka cyangwa iry’igisiga kiguruka mu kirere," 
Deuteronomy4:18 ryaba iry’igisimba gikururuka hasi, cyangwa se iry’ifi iba mu mazi akikije isi." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Uramenye ntuzararame ureba ku ijuru, ngo witegereze izuba, ukwezi cyangwa inyenyeri, n’ibindi byose bitatse ijuru, maze ngo utwarwe, ubipfukamire ubiramya. Koko rero, ibyo ni ibintu Uhoraho Imana yawe yahaye abantu bose bari mu nsi y’ijuru;" 
Deuteronomy4:20 ariko mwebwe Uhoraho yarabafashe, abakura mu itanura rishongesha ubutare ari ryo Misiri, kugira ngo mumubere umuryango, ubukonde bwe, nk’uko mumeze ubu ngubu." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Hanyuma Uhoraho yarandakariye kubera mwebwe, arahira ko ntazambuka Yorudani, ngo nanjye ngere mu gihugu cyiza Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho umunani." 
Deuteronomy4:22 None dore ngiye gupfira muri iki gihugu, ndashoboye kwambuka Yorudani; nyamara mwebwe muzayambuka, mwitungire icyo gihugu cyiza." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Muramenye rero ntimuzibagirwe Isezerano Uhoraho Imana yanyu yagiranye namwe, ngo mwiremere ikigirwamana gikozwe mu ishusho ry’ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose Uhoraho Imana yawe yakubujije." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Koko rero, Uhoraho Imana yawe ni nk’umuriro utsemba; ni Imana ifuha." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Numara kugira abana n’abuzukuru, mumaze kuba imbaga irambye muri icyo gihugu, maze mukandavura mwiremera ikigirwamana gikozwe mu kintu icyo ari cyo cyose, mugakora ibibi imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, mukayirakaza," 
Deuteronomy4:26 uyu munsi ntanze ijuru n’isi ho abagabo: muzahita murimbuka, mushire mu gihugu mugiye kwegurirwa mumaze kwambuka Yorudani; ntimuzakirambamo, kuko muzarimbukira gushira." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Uhoraho azabatatanyiriza mu bindi bihugu, musigare muri bake cyane hagati y’amahanga, aho Uhoraho azaba yabimuriye bunyago." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Nimugerayo, muzasenga imana zakozwe n’ibiganza by’abantu: mu biti, mu mabuye, zitabasha kubona no kumva, kurya no guhumurirwa." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Ubwo rero uzashakashakire iyo ngiyo Uhoraho Imana yawe; uzamubona kandi numushakashakisha umutima wawe wose, n’amagara yawe yose." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Mu minsi izaza rero, nugera mu kaga, ibyo byose bikakubaho, uzagarukira Uhoraho Imana yawe, maze wumve ijwi rye." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe ari Imana igira impuhwe: ntazagutererana, ntazakurimbura buhere, ntazibagirwa Isezerano yagiriye abasokuruza bawe ageretseho indahiro." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Ngaho baza ibihe byakubanjirije, uhereye ku munsi Imana yaremeyeho abantu ku isi, ubaririze kandi uhereye ku mpera y’isi ukagera ku yindi: Hari ikintu gikomeye nk’iki kigeze kubaho? Hari uwigeze yumva ibintu nk’ibi?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Hari undi muryango w’abantu wigeze wumva nkawe ijwi ry’Imana rivugira mu muriro rwagati, maze bagakomeza kubaho?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Cyangwa se hari indi mana yigeze igerageza kwikurira ihanga hagati y’irindi ikoresheje ibyago, ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza bikaze? Ikabigirisha kandi imirwano, n’imbaraga n’umurego by’ukuboko kwayo, n’imidugararo ikanganye, nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabibagenjereje mu Misiri, mubyibonera n’amaso yanyu?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Woweho warabyeretswe, kugira ngo umenyereho ko Uhoraho ari we Mana, ko nta yindi Mana ibaho uretse we." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Yaguhaye kumva ijwi rye riturutse mu ijuru kugira ngo akwigishe; ku isi ahakwerekera umuriro we w’inkongi, maze muri uwo muriro rwagati wumva haturutsemo amagambo ye." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Kubera ko yakunze abasokuruza bawe, yitoreye nyuma yabo urubyaro rwabo, maze akwikurira ubwe mu Misiri, akoresha imbaraga ze nyinshi" 
Deuteronomy4:38 kugira ngo yirukane imbere yawe amahanga akuruta ubwinshi kandi akurusha amaboko, maze akwinjize mu gihugu cyabo, akiguheho umunani, ari byo bibaye none." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Uyu munsi rero ubimenye kandi ujye ubizirikana mu mutima wawe: Uhoraho ni we Mana mu ijuru no ku isi, nta yindi ibaho." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Urajye ukurikiza amategeko n’amabwiriza ye nkugejejeho uyu munsi kugira ngo uzabone ubugira ihirwe, wowe n’abana bazagukomokaho, maze uzarambe ingoma ibihumbi mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Nuko rero Musa arobanura imigi itatu hakurya ya Yorudani, mu ruhande rw’iburasirazuba," 
Deuteronomy4:42 kugira ngo ibe ubuhungiro bw’umuntu wese wishe mugenzi we atabishaka, atabitewe n’uko yari asanzwe amwanga na mbere hose. Bene uwo mwishi nahungira muri umwe muri iyo migi, bazamureke akomeze kubaho." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Iyo migi ni iyi: umwe ni Beseri uri mu butayu mu gihugu cy’Imirambi, ukaba uwa bene Rubeni; undi ni Ramoti ho muri Gilihadi, ukaba uwa bene Gadi; uwa gatatu ni Golani ho muri Bashani, ukaba uwa bene Manase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ngayo amategeko Musa yashyikirije Abayisraheli. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Dore amateka, amategeko n’imigenzo Musa yatangarije Abayisraheli ubwo bimukaga mu Misiri," 
Deuteronomy4:46 igihe bari bageze hakurya ya Yorudani mu kibaya giteganye na Beti-Pewori, mu gihugu cya Sihoni umwami w’Abahemori wari utuye i Heshiboni. Musa n’Abayisraheli bari bamutsinze ubwo bimukaga bava mu Misiri," 
Deuteronomy4:47 bigarurira igihugu cye hamwe n’icya Ogi umwami wa Bashani. Abo bami bombi b’Abahemori bari batuye hakurya ya Yorudani, mu ruhande rw’iburasirazuba." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Nuko Abayisraheli bigarurira ibihugu byabo, guhera ku mugi w’Aroweri wubatse ku nkombe y’umugezi w’Arunoni, kugeza ku musozi wa Siyoni ari na yo Herimoni," 
Deuteronomy4:49 hamwe n’Araba yose hakurya ya Yorudani mu ruhande rw’iburasirazuba, bikageza ku Nyanja y’Araba iri mu nsi y’ibisi bya Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Musa ahamagaza Israheli yose, maze arayibwira ati «Israheli, tega amatwi, wumve amategeko n’amabwiriza nkubwira uyu munsi; muzayige muyafate, kandi mwihatire kuyakurikiza." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Uhoraho Imana yacu yagiranye natwe Isezerano kuri Horebu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Si abasokuruza bacu bagiranye n’Uhoraho iryo Sezerano, ahubwo ni twebwe ubwacu abari hano, twe tukiriho ubu ngubu." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Uhoraho yivuganiye namwe ubwanyu kuri uwo musozi, ari hagati y’umuriro waka;" 
Deuteronomy5:5 naho jye icyo gihe nkaba nari mpagaze hagati yanyu n’Uhoraho, kugira ngo mbagezeho ijambo ry’Uhoraho, kuko mwatinyaga umuriro, ntimuzamuke uwo musozi. Yaravuze ati" 
Deuteronomy5:6 «Ni jyewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, wagukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, mu nzu y’ubucakara." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Nta mana zindi uzagira kereka jyewe. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Ntuzikorere ishusho ry’iribazanyo cyangwa se ikindi kibonetse cyose, cyaba gisa n’ibiri hejuru mu kirere cyangwa n’ibiri hasi ku isi, cyangwa n’ibiri mu mazi akikije isi." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Ntuzapfukame imbere y’ibyo bigirwamana, kandi ntuzabiyoboke, kuko Imana yawe ari jyewe Uhoraho, nkaba Imana ifuha, ihanira icyaha cy’ababyeyi mu bana babo, kugeza mu gisekuru cya gatatu no mu cya kane cy’abanyanga." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Nyamara abankunda bagakurikiza amategeko yanjye, mbagaragariza ubudahemuka bwanjye ingoma ibihumbi." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Ntuzavuge izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe mu bintu by’amanjwe, kuko Uhoraho atazareka guhana uzaba yavuze izina rye mu bintu by’amanjwe." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Urajye wubahiriza umunsi w’isabato, uwegurire Imana, nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yawe yabigutegetse." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Uzakore imirimo yawe yose mu minsi itandatu," 
Deuteronomy5:14 naho uwa karindwi ni isabato y’Uhoraho Imana yawe. Ntuzagire umurimo n’umwe ukora: ari wowe, ari umuhungu wawe, ari umukobwa wawe, ari umugaragu wawe, ari umuja wawe, ari ikimasa cyawe, ari indogobe yawe, ari irindi tungo ryawe iryo ari ryo ryose, ari n’umusuhuke waje iwanyu, kugira ngo umugaragu wawe n’umuja wawe na bo baruhuke nkawe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Ujye wibuka ko wari umucakara mu gihugu cya Misiri, maze Uhoraho Imana yawe akagukuzayo imbaraga n’umurego by’ukuboko kwe: ngicyo igituma Uhoraho Imana yawe yagutegetse kubahiriza umunsi w’isabato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Wubahe so na nyoko nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yabigutegetse, kugira ngo iminsi yawe izarambe, kandi uzanezerwe mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Ntuzice umuntu. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Ntuzasambane. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Ntuzatware umuntu ngo umugire uwawe ku ngufu. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Ntuzavuge ibinyoma ubeshyera mugenzi wawe. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Ntuzararikire umugore wa mugenzi wawe. Ntuzararikire inzu ya mugenzi wawe cyangwa imirima ye, cyangwa umugaragu we cyangwa umuja we, cyangwa inka ye, cyangwa indogobe ye, mbese ikintu cya mugenzi wawe icyo ari cyo cyose." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Aya magambo, Uhoraho yayabwiriye ikoraniro ryanyu ryose kuri wa musozi, ari hagati y’umuriro waka, mu rwokotsi n’ijoro ribuditse; ayavugisha ijwi rirenga, kandi ntiyagira ikindi yongeraho; ayandika ku bimanyu bibiri by’amabuye, maze arabimpa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Nuko mwumvise ijwi riturutse mu mwijima rwagati, mu kibatsi cy’umuriro gitwikiriye umusozi, abatware banyu bose b’amazu n’abakuru banyu b’imiryango baranyegera," 
Deuteronomy5:24 maze bambwira mu izina ryanyu bati «Dore Uhoraho Imana yacu yatweretse ikuzo rye n’ubuhangange bwe, kandi twumvise ijwi rye avugira mu muriro rwagati; uyu munsi twiboneye ko Imana ishobora kuvugisha umuntu kandi ikamureka akabaho!" 
Deuteronomy5:25 None rero kuki twagomba gupfa dukongowe n’uyu muriro mwinshi? Nidukomeza kumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu, turapfa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Hari umuntu wigeze kumva nkatwe ijwi ry’Imana nzima rivugira mu muriro rwagati maze akagumya kubaho? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Reka abe ari wowe wigira hafi kugira ngo wumve amagambo yose y’Uhoraho Imana yacu, maze udusubiriremo ibyo Uhoraho Imana yacu azaba yakubwiye byose; twebwe tuzabyumva, tubikurikize.»" 
Deuteronomy5:28 Uhoraho yumva amagambo yose mwambwiraga; maze Uhoraho arambwira ati «Numvise amagambo yose iriya mbaga yakubwiye: ati bagize neza kuba babivuze. 
Deuteronomy5:29 Gusa iyaba bakomezaga kuntinya, bakanubahiriza amategeko yanjye yose iminsi yose, maze bo n’urubyaro rwabo bakazahirwa ingoma ibihumbi!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Genda ubabwire uti ’Nimusubire ku mahema yanyu!’ 
Deuteronomy5:31 Naho wowe, ugume hano hamwe nanjye; ngiye kukubwira amategeko yose, amabwiriza n’imigenzo uzabigisha, kugira ngo bazabikurikize mu gihugu mbahaye ngo bakigarurire.»" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Murajye rero mwihatira kugenza nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabategetse, nta kuyobera iburyo cyangwa ibumoso." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Murajye muhora mugenda mu nzira Uhoraho Imana yanyu yababwirije, kugira ngo muzakomeze kubaho, muzahirwe kandi murambe mu gihugu mugiye kwigarurira." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ngaya amategeko, amabwiriza n’imigenzo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yantegetse kubigisha, ngo muzajye mubikurikiza mu gihugu mugiye kujyamo ngo mukigarurire;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 bityo utinye Uhoraho Imana yawe, ari wowe, ari umwana wawe, ari n’umwuzukuru wawe, ubigire wubahiriza igihe cyose amategeko n’amabwiriza nguhaye, kugira ngo uzabone kuramba." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Israheli, tega amatwi kandi uzihatire kubikurikiza, bityo uzagira amahirwe kandi ni bwo muzagwira mube benshi cyane mu gihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki, nk’uko Uhoraho Imana y’abasokuruza bawe yabigusezeranyije." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Israheli, tega amatwi! Uhoraho Imana yacu ni we Nyagasani wenyine." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Urakunde Uhoraho Imana yawe n’umutima wawe wose, n’amagara yawe yose, n’imbaraga zawe zose." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Amategeko nguhaye uyu munsi araguhore ku mutima. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Uzayatoze abana bawe; uzayababwire igihe wicaye iwawe n’igihe ugenda mu nzira, igihe uryamye n’igihe ubyutse." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Uzayagire ikimenyetso kidasibangana mu kiganza cyawe, uyatamirize mu ruhanga hagati y’amaso yawe." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Uzayandike ku nkomanizo z’umuryango w’inzu yawe no ku marembo y’umugi wawe. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Uhoraho Imana yawe namara kukwinjiza mu gihugu yarahiriye abasokuruza bawe, Abrahamu, na Izaki na Yakobo ko azakiguha, uzahasanga imigi minini kandi myiza utubatse," 
Deuteronomy6:11 amazu yuzuye ubwoko bwose bw’ibintu byiza utahunitsemo, amariba ahora yuzuye utafukuye, imizabibu n’imizeti utateye;" 
Deuteronomy6:12 numara rero kurya ugahaga, uzirinde rwose kwibagirwa Uhoraho wagukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, mu nzu y’ubucakara." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Uzatinye Uhoraho Imana yawe, abe ari we uyoboka, izina rye abe ari ryo urahira." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ntimuzohoke ku zindi mana mu zo muzasangana amahanga abakikije," 
Deuteronomy6:15 kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe mubana ari Imana ifuha. Uritonde, uburakari bw’Uhoraho Imana yawe butazakugurumaniraho, maze akakurimbura ku isi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Ntimuzagerageze Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nk’uko mwabikoreye i Massa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Muzahore mukurikiza amategeko, amateka n’amabwiriza by’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nk’uko yabigutegetse." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Uzajye ukora ibitunganye n’ibiboneye mu maso y’Uhoraho, kugira ngo uzagire amahirwe kandi wigarurire igihugu cyiza Uhoraho yasezeranyije abasokuruza bawe abigirishije indahiro," 
Deuteronomy6:19 maze umeneshe abanzi bawe bose nk’uko Uhoraho yabisezeranye. 
Deuteronomy6:20 Ikindi gihe umwana wawe nakubaza ati «Aya mateka, n’aya mategeko n’iyi migenzo Uhoraho Imana yabahaye ni iby’iki?»" 
Deuteronomy6:21 uzasubize uwo mwana wawe uti «Twari abacakara ba Farawo mu Misiri, nuko Uhoraho adukuza mu Misiri imbaraga z’ukuboko kwe;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 Uhoraho yerekanira mu maso yacu ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza bihambaye, bigirira nabi Misiri, Farawo n’abe bose;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 naho twebwe adukurayo, kugira ngo atujyane mu gihugu yasezeranyije abasokuruza bacu abigirishije indahiro ko azakiduha." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Nuko Uhoraho adutegeka gukurikiza aya mabwiriza yose no gutinya Uhoraho Imana yacu, kugira ngo tugire amahirwe iminsi yose, kandi atubesheho nk’uko tumeze ubu ngubu." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Tuzaba rero intungane niba twihatiye gukurikiza aya mategeko yose, turangamiye Uhoraho Imana yacu, nk’uko yabitubwirije.»" 
Deuteronomy7:1 Uhoraho Imana yawe namara kukwinjiza mu gihugu ugiye kwigarurira, akirukana amahanga menshi imbere yawe, Abaheti, Abagirigashi, Abahemori, Abakanahani, Abaperezi, Abahivi n’Abayebuzi, amahanga arindwi akuruta ubwinshi kandi akurusha amaboko," 
Deuteronomy7:2 nuko Uhoraho Imana yawe akabakurekurira maze ukabatsinda, uzabatsembe rwose. Ntuzagirane na bo amasezerano, ntuzabababarire." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ntuzashyingirane na bo; ntuzahe umuhungu wabo umukobwa wawe, ntuzashakire umuhungu wawe umukobwa wabo," 
Deuteronomy7:4 kuko ibyo byatuma umuhungu wawe ahinduka ntankurikire, akayoboka izindi mana; uburakari rero bw’Uhoraho bukabagurumaniraho, maze ako kanya akakurimbura." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ahubwo dore uko muzagenza ayo mahanga: intambiro zabo muzazisenye, inkingi zabo z’amabuye muzimenagure, ibiti byabo bisengwa mubitemagure, n’amashusho y’imana zabo muyatwike." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Kuko wowe uri umuryango weguriwe Uhoraho Imana yawe; ni wowe Uhoraho Imana yawe yitoreye, kugira ngo mu miryango yose iri ku isi umubere umuryango w’umwihariko." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Niba Uhoraho yarabitayeho akabatora, si uko wenda mwari benshi kurusha indi miryango, kuko ari mwe bake cyane mu miryango yose." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Ahubwo niba Uhoraho yarabimuye iyo mwari muri abigirishije imbaraga z’ukuboko kwe, akababohora mu nzu y’ubucakara, mu maboko ya Farawo umwami wa Misiri, ni ukubera ko Uhoraho abakunda kandi agakomera ku ndahiro yagiriye abasokuruza banyu." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Uzamenye ko Uhoraho Imana yawe ari we Mana, Imana nyakuri; akomereza Isezerano rye n’ubudahemuka bwe abamukunda kandi bagakurikiza amategeko ye, akabibagirira mu bisekuru igihumbi." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Nyamara yitura ako kanya umwanga wese, akamukuraho: ntatindiganyiriza umwanga, amwitura ako kanya." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Uzite ku mategeko, n’amabwiriza n’imigenzo ngutegetse uyu munsi ngo ujye ubikurikiza." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Kubera ko muzaba mwarateze amatwi iyi migenzo, mukayikomeza kandi mukayikurikiza, Uhoraho Imana yawe azagukomereza nawe Isezerano n’ubudahemuka yarahiriye abasokuruza bawe." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Azagukunda, aguhe umugisha, aguhe kugwira; kandi azaha umugisha abana bawe, n’imbuto zikomoka mu mirima yawe, ingano zawe, divayi yawe nshya n’amavuta yawe; azaha umugisha inka zawe zihaka n’intama zawe zonsa, mu gihugu yarahiriye abasokuruza bawe ko azakiguha." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Uzagira umugisha kurusha indi miryango yose; nta bugumba buzabaho iwawe, ari ku bagabo, ari ku bagore, cyangwa se ku matungo yawe." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Uhoraho azakurinda indwara zose, na bya byorezo bya Misiri uzi neza; ntazabiguteza, ahubwo azabyoherereza abakwanga bose." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Uzarimbure amahanga yose Uhoraho Imana yawe azakurekurira, ntuzabababarire; kandi ntuzasenge imana zabo, kuko byakubera umutego." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Wenda wakwibwira uti «Ariya mahanga ko anduta ubwinshi, nzashobora nte kuyanyaga ibyayo?»" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Ntuzayatinye! Uzibuke ibyo Uhoraho Imana yawe yagiriye Farawo na Misiri yose," 
Deuteronomy7:19 wibuke bya byago bikomeye yahateje ubyibonera n’amaso yawe, wibuke bya bimenyetso n’ibitangaza bikaze, wibuke kandi imbaraga n’umurego by’ukuboko kw’Uhoraho Imana yawe, igihe agukuye mu Misiri! Nguko rero uko Uhoraho Imana yawe azagenzereza amahanga yose yashobora kugutera ubwoba." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ndetse Uhoraho Imana yawe azabaterereza gucika intege, kugeza ko harimbuka n’abazaba bacitse ku icumu bakakwihisha." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ntuzahinde umushyitsi imbere yabo, kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe, Imana ikomeye kandi iteye ubwoba, ari kumwe nawe." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Nyamara Uhoraho Imana yawe azamenesha ayo mahanga buhoro buhoro: ntiwashobora kubarimbura ako kanya, kuko bitabaye ibyo, inyamaswa zo mu gasozi zagwira, zikagutera." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Amaherezo ariko Uhoraho Imana yawe azakurekurira ayo mahanga, abakure umutima kugeza ubwo bazarimbuka." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Azakurekurira abami babo, amazina yabo yibagirane mu nsi y’ijuru; nta n’umwe uzakunanira kugeza ubwo bose uzabarimbura." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Amashusho y’imana zabo uzayatwike. Ntuzagire ibishuko byo kugumana feza cyangwa zahabu biyatatse, kuko byatuma ugwa mu mutego, kandi ari ishyano Uhoraho Imana yawe yanga urunuka." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Ntihazagire bene ibyo bintu by’amahano winjiza mu nzu yawe, kuko wakurikiranwa n’umuvumo nka byo. Uzabyirinde rwose, bikubere umuziro, kuko bikurikiranwe n’umuvumo." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Amategeko yose nguhaye uyu munsi muzihatire kuyakurikiza kugira ngo mubeho, mugwire kandi mwigarurire igihugu Uhoraho yasezeranyije indahiro abasokuruza banyu, maze mugitunge." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Uzajye wibuka urugendo rurerure Uhoraho Imana yawe yagukoresheje mu butayu mu myaka mirongo ine yose, kugira ngo agucishe bugufi, bityo akugerageze, amenye ikiri mu mutima wawe kandi amenye niba uzakurikiza amategeko ye cyangwa niba utazayakurikiza." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Yagucishije bugufi, atuma wicwa n’inzara, maze akugaburira manu wari utazi, n’abasokuruza bawe batigeze bamenya: ibyo ari ukugira ngo akumenyeshe ko umuntu adatungwa n’umugati gusa, ko ahubwo atungwa n’ijambo ryose riturutse mu kanwa k’Uhoraho" 
Deuteronomy8:4 Muri iyo myaka mirongo ine, imyenda yawe ntiyagusaziyeho, ibirenge byawe ntibyabyimbye" 
Deuteronomy8:5 kandi niba utekereza, urabona yuko Uhoraho Imana yawe yakwigishaga nk’uko umuntu agenzereza umwana we." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Uzakurikize amategeko y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, unyure mu nzira akuyoboyemo, kandi umutinye." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Uhoraho Imana yawe akwinjije mu gihugu cyiza: igihugu cy’imigezi n’amasoko, cy’amazi ari mu nda y’ubutaka akadudubiza mu bibaya no ku misozi," 
Deuteronomy8:8 igihugu cy’ingano na za bushoki, cy’imizabibu, cy’imitini n’amakomamanga, cy’amavuta y’imizeti n’ubuki;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 igihugu uzariramo umugati ugahaga, ntugire icyo ubura; igihugu cy’amabuye y’ubutare, n’imisozi yacyo icukurwamo umuringa." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Uzarya uhage, uzashimire Uhoraho Imana yawe igihugu cyiza azaba yaguhaye." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Uzirinde kwibagirwa Uhoraho Imana yawe udakurikiza amategeko ye, amabwiriza ye n’imigenzo ye nguhaye uyu munsi." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Nurya ugahaga, ukiyubakira amazu meza yo kubamo," 
Deuteronomy8:13 ukagwiza amatungo magufi n’amaremare; ukagwiza feza na zahabu, kimwe n’undi mutungo w’ubwoko bwose," 
Deuteronomy8:14 uramenye ntuzirate ngo wibagirwe Uhoraho Imana yawe. Ni we wagukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, mu nzu y’ubucakara;" 
Deuteronomy8:15 ni we wakunyujije muri bwa butayu bunini kandi buteye ubwoba, butuwe n’inzoka zifite ubumara butwika, na za manyenga, bukaba igihugu kigwengeye kitagira amazi; ni we wagukuriye amazi mu rutare rukomeye." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Muri ubwo butayu, ni we wakugaburiye manu, abasokuruza bawe batigeze bamenya. Ibyo byose kwari ukugira ngo agucishe bugufi kandi akugerageze, maze abone kuzaguha guhirwa mu bihe bizaza." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Ntuzibwire uti «Imbaraga zanjye bwite ni zo zangejeje kuri ubu burumbuke»," 
Deuteronomy8:18 ahubwo uzibuke ko ari Uhoraho Imana yawe uzaba yaraguhaye imbaraga zo kugera ku burumbuke, kugira ngo akomeze Isezerano yarahiriye abasokuruza bawe, nk’uko ubikora ubu ngubu." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Nuramuka wibagiwe Uhoraho Imana yawe, ukayoboka izindi mana, ukazikorera, ukazipfukamira, nemeje uyu munsi ko muzarimbukira gushira:" 
Deuteronomy8:20 nk’amahanga Uhoraho yarimburiye imbere yanyu, ni ko namwe muzarimbuka, kubera ko muzaba mutarateze amatwi ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Israheli, tega amatwi! Ubu ugiye kwambuka Yorudani, maze unyage umutungo w’amahanga akuruta ubwinshi kandi akurusha amaboko, afite imigi minini kandi icinyiye, izengurutswe n’inkuta z’amabuye zikabakaba ku ijuru," 
Deuteronomy9:2 imigi ituwe n’abantu bakomeye kandi barebare cyane, bitwa Abanaki. Urabizi, kandi wumvise bavuga ngo «Ni nde wahangara bene Anaki?»" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Ubu ngubu ugiye kumenya uko Uhoraho Imana yawe ari we uri bwambuke Yorudani, akakugenda imbere nk’umuriro utsemba; ni we uzabarimbura, ni we uzabagutsindira. Ubwo rero uzabanyaga ibyabo kandi ubarimbure ako kanya nk’uko Uhoraho yabigusezeranyije." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Uhoraho Imana yawe namara kubamenesha imbere yawe, ntuzibwire uti «Ubutungane bwanjye ni bwo bwateye Uhoraho kunzana muri iki gihugu ngo nkigarurire.» Ubwigomeke bw’ayo mahanga ni bwo bwateye Uhoraho kubanyaga ibyabo ngo abiguhe." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ubutungane bwawe cyangwa se ubwiza bw’umutima wawe si byo bitumye ugiye kwinjira mu gihugu cyabo ngo ukigarurire; mu by’ukuri, ubwigomeke bw’ayo mahanga ni bwo bwateye Uhoraho kubanyaga ibyabo ngo abiguhe. Indi mpamvu Uhoraho abigiriye, ni ukugira ngo akomeze indahiro yagiriye abasokuruza bawe Abrahamu, na Izaki na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Umenye rero yuko ubutungane bwawe atari bwo bwatumye Uhoraho Imana yawe aguha kiriya gihugu cyiza ngo ugitunge, kuko usanzwe uri umuryango ufite ijosi rishingaraye." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Jya wibuka, ntukibagirwe ko warakaje Uhoraho Imana yawe igihe wari mu butayu. Kuva wa munsi mwimukiyeho muva mu gihugu cya Misiri kugeza aho mugereye hano, ntimwahwemye kugomera Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Kuri Horebu mwarakaje Uhoraho, nuko Uhoraho arabarakarira kugeza ubwo ashatse kubarimburira gushira." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Igihe nzamutse uwo musozi ngo mpabwe bya bimanyu by’amabuye, ibimanyu byanditseho Isezerano Uhoraho yari yaragiranye namwe, nagumye kuri uwo musozi iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine, ntarya umugati ntanywa n’amazi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Nuko Uhoraho ampa ibyo bimanyu bibiri by’amabuye byanditsweho n’urutoki rw’Imana, bikaba byariho amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yababwiriye kuri uwo musozi, avugira mu muriro rwagati, igihe mwari mwakoranye." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine bishize, ni bwo Uhoraho yampaye ibyo bimanyu bibiri by’amabuye, ibimanyu biriho isezerano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Maze Uhoraho arambwira ati «Haguruka, umanuke bwangu, uve hano, kuko imbaga yawe, ya yindi wavanye mu Misiri, yiyandaritse; ntibatinze guteshuka inzira nari nabategetse: biremeye ishusho mu cyuma gishongeshejwe!»" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Uhoraho yungamo arambwira ati «Ndareba iriya mbaga, ngasanga ari imbaga ifite ijosi rishingaraye!" 
Deuteronomy9:14 Nyorohera mbarimbure, nzimanganye izina ryabo mu nsi y’ijuru; ariko woweho nzakubyaza ihanga ribaruta ubwinshi kandi ribarusha amaboko.»"
