Deuteronomy9:15 Nuko rero ndikubura, manuka umusozi, wa musozi wakaga wose umuriro, manuka mfatishije ibiganza byanjye byombi bya bimanyu bibiri biriho Isezerano." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Maze ndebye, mbona uko mwacumuriye Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukiremera ikimasa mu cyuma cyashongeshejwe: nta bwo mwatinye guteshuka inzira Uhoraho yari yabategetse." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ubwo nafashe bya bimanyu bibiri, mbijugunya n’amaboko yanjye yombi, mbimenagurira imbere yanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Nahise nikubita hasi imbere y’Uhoraho; mara iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine ntarya, ntanywa n’amazi, nk’ubwa mbere, ari ukubera ibyaha byose mwari mwakoze igihe mukoze ibidatunganiye amaso y’Uhoraho, kugeza aho kumurakaza." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Natinyaga uburakari n’umujinya Uhoraho yari abafitiye, bigeza aho ashaka kubarimbura; nyamara, n’ubwo ngubwo, Uhoraho yongera kunyumva." 
Deuteronomy9:20 N’Aroni ubwe Uhoraho yari yamurakariye cyane, kugeza ubwo ashatse kumurimbura; nuko n’Aroni ndamusabira." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Hanyuma icyaha mwari mwakoze, ari cyo cya kimasa, ndagifata, ndagitwika; ibidakongotse ndabihondahonda, ndabisya, bihinduka ifu, maze iyo fu nyimena mu kagezi kamanuka kuri wa musozi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Byongeye kandi i Tabera, i Massa n’i Kiberoti-Hatawa, na ho mwarakaje Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy9:23 N’i Kadeshi-Barineya, igihe Uhoraho abohereje avuga ati «Nimuzamuke, mwigarurire igihugu mbahaye», na bwo mwasuzuguye ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ntimwamwizera, ntimwatega amatwi ijwi rye." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Kuva nabamenya, igihe cyose mwabaye ibyigomeke imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy9:25 Igihe rero Uhoraho ashatse kubarimbura, nikubise hasi imbere ye, mpamara iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine nubamye." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ngatakambira Uhoraho ngira nti «Uhoraho Mana, wirimbura imbaga yawe, ubukonde bwawe, wabohoje ubuhangange bwawe, ukayikuza mu Misiri imbaraga z’ukuboko kwawe." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ibuka abagaragu bawe Abrahamu, Izaki na Yakobo. Wikwita ku gasuzuguro k’uwo muryango, ku bugome bwawo no ku byaha byawo." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Hato abo mu gihugu wadukuyemo batava aho bigamba bati ’Uhoraho yananiwe kugeza abantu be mu gihugu yabasezeranyije, kandi arabanga: ni cyo gituma yabakuye ino kugira ngo areke bapfire mu butayu.’" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Nyamara ni umuryango wawe, ubukonde bwawe, wimuyeyo ubigirishije imbaraga n’umurego by’ukuboko kwawe!»" 
Deuteronomy10:1 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati «Baza ibindi bimanyu bibiri by’amabuye bimeze nk’ibya mbere, hanyuma ubizamukane unsange ku musozi; ubaze n’ubushyinguro mu giti." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Kuri ibyo bimanyu by’amabuye nzandikaho amagambo yari ku bya mbere wamenaguye; hanyuma uzashyire ibyo bimanyu by’amabuye mu bushyinguro.» 
Deuteronomy10:3 Nuko mbaza ubushyinguro mu giti cy’umunyinya, mbaza n’ibimanyu bibiri by’amabuye bimeze nk’ibya mbere, maze nzamuka umusozi mfashe bya bimanyu bibiri by’amabuye mu ntoki." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Uhoraho rero, akoresheje umukono usa n’uwa mbere, yandika ku bimanyu bibiri by’amabuye ya Mategeko cumi yari yabatangarije ku musozi avugira mu muriro rwagati, igihe mwari mwakoranye. Nuko Uhoraho ansubiza ibyo bimanyu by’amabuye." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Hanyuma ndikubura manuka umusozi; mbishyira muri bwa bushyinguro nari nabaje, maze bigumamo nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabintegetse." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Nuko Abayisraheli bahaguruka bava ku mariba ya bene Yahakani berekeza i Mosera. — Aho ni ho Aroni yapfiriye, aranahahambwa; umuhungu we Eleyazari aramusimbura, aba umuherezabitambo. —" 
Deuteronomy10:7 Bahavuye, bajya i Gudigoda; nyuma bava i Gudigoda berekeza i Yotibata, mu karere k’utugezi twinshi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Icyo gihe Uhoraho arobanura umuryango wa Levi, awushinga kujya utwara ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, guhagarara imbere y’Uhoraho, gukora imihango imugenewe, no guha rubanda umugisha mu izina rye, nk’uko bakibikora na n’ubu." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ni cyo gituma Abalevi batagira umunani cyangwa umugabane w’umwihariko nk’abavandimwe babo; Uhoraho ni we munani wabo, nk’uko Uhoraho Imana yawe yabibasezeranyije." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Bityo, namaze kuri uwo musozi iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine nk’ubwa mbere, kandi na bwo Uhoraho yongera kunyumva; Uhoraho yisubiyeho, ntiyakurimbura." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati «Haguruka! Jya imbere y’imbaga, utange ikimenyetso cyo gushyira nzira, bajye mu gihugu narahiriye abasokuruza babo ko nzakibaha ngo bakigarurire.»" 
Deuteronomy10:12 None rero Israheli, ubu Uhoraho Imana yawe agutezeho iki? Icyo agutezeho ni uko watinya Uhoraho Imana yawe, ugakurikira inzira ze zose, ugakunda Uhoraho Imana yawe kandi ukamukorera n’umutima wawe wose, n’amagara yawe yose," 
Deuteronomy10:13 ugakomeza amategeko y’Uhoraho n’amabwiriza nguhaye uyu munsi, kugira ngo uzahirwe." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Dore Uhoraho Imana yawe ni nyir’ijuru, na nyir’ijuru rihatse ayandi, akaba na nyir’isi hamwe n’ibiyiriho byose." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Nyamara abasokuruza bawe bonyine ni bo Uhoraho yihambiriyeho arabakunda; nyuma yabo, abana babakomokaho, ari bo mwebwe, yabatoranyije mu yandi mahanga yose, nk’uko bigaragara ubu ngubu." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Nimugenye rero imitima yanyu, muherukire aho kumushingana ijosi," 
Deuteronomy10:17 kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe ari we Mana ihatse izindi, Umutegetsi w’abategetsi, Imana nkuru, y’igihangange kandi itinyitse, itarenganya kandi itagurirwa," 
Deuteronomy10:18 irenganura imfubyi n’umupfakazi, ikunda umusuhuke ikamuha icyo kurya n’icyo kwambara." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Muzakunde umusuhuke, kuko namwe mwabaye abasuhuke mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Uzatinye Uhoraho Imana yawe kandi umukorere, abe ari we wihambiraho, izina rye abe ari ryo urahira." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ni we ugomba gusingiza, ni we Mana yawe yagukoreye bya bintu byose bikomeye kandi bitangaje wiboneye n’amaso yawe." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Igihe abasokuruza bawe bamanutse bajya mu Misiri, bari abantu mirongo irindwi gusa; none dore Uhoraho Imana yawe yarakugwije, akunganya n’inyenyeri zo mu kirere." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Uzakunde rero Uhoraho Imana yawe, ukurikize amategeko ye, imigenzo ye, amabwiriza ye n’amateka ye, ubigire iminsi yose." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Mwe murabizi ubu — ariko abana banyu ntibabimenye kandi ntibabyiboneye — mwe mwamenye ukuntu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabigishije, mwamenye ubuhangange bwe, n’imbaraga n’umurego by’ukuboko kwe." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Mwabonye ibimenyetso bye n’ibigwi bye muri Misiri nyirizina, mwabonye ibyo yakoreye Farawo umwami wa Misiri n’igihugu cye cyose." 
Deuteronomy11:4 Mwamenye ibyo yakoreye ingabo z’Abanyamisiri, amafarasi yabo n’amagare yabo, akabubikaho amazi y’inyanja y’Urufunzo igihe bari babasatiriye, maze Uhoraho akabarimbura buheriheri." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Mwabonye kandi ibyo yabakoreye mwebwe, kuva igihe mwari mu butayu kurinda mugera hano," 
Deuteronomy11:6 n’ibyo yakoreye Datani na Abiramu, bene Eliyabu wo mu muryango wa Rubeni: imbere y’Abayisraheli bose, ubutaka bwarasamye bubamirana n’ab’iwabo bose, n’amahema yabo, ndetse n’abantu bose bari babashyigikiye." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Mbese mwiboneye n’amaso yanyu ibigwi by’Uhoraho! 
Deuteronomy11:8 Muzakomeze rero amategeko yose mbahaye uyu munsi, kugira ngo muzabe intwari, mwigarurire igihugu mugiye kwinjiramo ngo mugitunge," 
Deuteronomy11:9 maze muzarambe ku butaka Uhoraho yarahiriye kuzaha abasokuruza banyu hamwe n’urubyaro rwabo — igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Nanone igihugu ugiye kwinjiramo ngo ukigarurire nta bwo gihwanye n’igihugu cya Misiri mwavuyemo. Aho ngaho wabibaga imbuto zawe, ukaziyoboramo amazi ukoresheje ikirenge cyawe, nk’uko umuntu avomerera umurima w’imboga;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 naho igihugu mugiyemo ngo mukigarurire ni igihugu kirimo imisozi n’ibikombe, cyuhirwa amazi y’imvura:" 
Deuteronomy11:12 ni igihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe yitaho, Uhoraho Imana yawe agihozaho amaso kuva mu ntangiriro y’umwaka kugera ku ndunduro yawo." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Nimugira umwete wo kumvira koko amategeko yanjye, ayo nguhaye none, mukabigira mukunda Uhoraho Imana yanyu, munamukorera n’umutima wanyu wose n’amagara yanyu yose," 
Deuteronomy11:14 mu gihe gikwiye nzavubira ubutaka bwanyu imvura bukeneye, ari iy’umuhindo ari n’iy’urugaryi, muzasarure imyaka yanyu y’impeke na divayi nshya, n’amavuta y’imizeti;" 
Deuteronomy11:15 kandi nzameza ubwatsi bw’amatungo yawe mu nzuri zawe, maze uzarye uhage." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Muramenye, imitima yanyu itazoshywa mugateshuka inzira, mukayoboka izindi mana, mukazipfukamira;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 kuko icyo gihe uburakari bw’Uhoraho bwabagurumanira, akaziba ijuru, akica imvura, ubutaka ntibwongere kwera imyaka, bityo mukarimbuka bidatinze, mugashira mu gihugu cyiza Uhoraho abahaye." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Aya magambo yanjye mwumvise, muzayabike muri mwe, mu mitima yanyu, muyagire ikimenyetso kidasibangana mu biganza byanyu, muyatamirize mu ruhanga hagati y’amaso yanyu." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Muzayigishe abana banyu, muyabasubirishemo igihe wicaye iwawe n’igihe ugenda mu nzira, igihe uryamye n’igihe ubyutse." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Uzayandike ku nkomanizo z’umuryango w’inzu yawe, no ku marembo y’imigi yawe," 
Deuteronomy11:21 kugira ngo mwebwe n’abana banyu muzarambe mu gihugu Uhoraho yarahiriye kuzaha abasekuruza banyu, uko ijuru rizahora hejuru y’isi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Nimugira rwose umwete wo gukomeza ayo mategeko yose mbahaye ngo muyakurikize, mugakunda Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukagenda mu nzira ze zose, kandi mukamwihambiraho," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Uhoraho azamenesha ariya mahanga yose ari imbere yanyu, bityo munyage amahanga abaruta ubwinshi kandi abarusha amaboko." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Ahantu hose muzashinga ikirenge hazaba habaye ahanyu; kuva ku butayu bwo mu majyepfo, kugera kuri Libani mu majyaruguru, kuva ku ruzi rwa Efurati mu burasirazuba kugera ku Nyanja y’Iburengerazuba, ngicyo igihugu cyanyu." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Nta muntu uzatinyuka kubahangara; Uhoraho azakangaranya igihugu muzakandagiramo cyose, babatinye nk’uko yabibasezeranyije." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Dore, uyu munsi mbashyize imbere umugisha n’umuvumo." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Umugisha muzawubona nimwumvira amategeko y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu mbagejejeho none; 
Deuteronomy11:28 umuvumo muzawugira nimutumvira amategeko y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mugateshuka inzira mbabwirije none, ngo mwikurikirire izindi mana mutari muzi." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Kandi Uhoraho Imana yawe namara kukugeza mu gihugu ugiye kwinjiramo kugira ngo ukigarurire, uzavugire umugisha ku musozi wa Garizimu, n’umuvumo uwuvugire ku musozi wa Ebali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Iyo misozi yombi iri hakurya ya Yorudani, (hirya y’inzira igana iburengerazuba mu gihugu cy’Abakanahani batuye muri Araba), iteganye na Giligali, hafi y’ibiti by’imishishi by’i More." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Koko rero mugiye kwambuka Yorudani, mwigarurire igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye: muzakigarurira maze mugituremo..." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Ariko rero muzajye mwihatira gukurikiza amategeko yose n’imihango mbashyikirije uyu munsi. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Dore amategeko n’imihango mukwiye kuzitondera mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana y’abasokuruza bawe yaguhaye gutunga, muzabikurikize iminsi yose muzamara ku isi." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Ahantu hose amahanga mugiye kunyaga yasengeraga imana zabo, muzahasenye muhatsiratsize: haba ku misozi miremire, haba ku tununga cyangwa se mu nsi y’ibiti bitohagiye byose." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Muzasenye intambiro zabo, mumenagure inkingi zabo z’amabuye, mutwike ibiti byabo bisengwa, mumenagure amashusho yabo, mbese muzazimanganye amazina y’izo mana, yibagirane aho hantu." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Uhoraho Imana yanyu, we ntimuzamugirire nk’uko bo bagiriraga imana zabo;" 
Deuteronomy12:5 ahubwo ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azaba yihitiyemo mu miryango yanyu yose kugira ngo ahature, ni ho honyine uzajya umushakira, ukanahayoboka." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Azabe ari ho mujyana ibitambo byanyu bitwikwa, n’ibitambo byanyu bindi, n’icya cumi cy’umutungo wanyu, n’imisanzu yanyu, n’amaturo y’uguhigura, n’ibindi mutanze ku bwende, n’uburiza bw’amatungo yanyu maremare n’amagufi." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Azabe ari ho mujya kurira imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, muhadabagirire hamwe n’abo mu ngo zanyu, mwishimire ibikorwa byose Uhoraho Imana yanyu azaba yabahereyemo umugisha." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Ntimuzagenze nk’uko tugenza ubu ngubu hano, aho buri muntu yikorera uko abyumva." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Koko rero ntimuragera aho mwagenewe kuruhukira, mu bukonde Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Ariko mugiye kwambuka Yorudani, muture mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahayeho umunani; azabaha kuruhuka abanje kubakiza ababisha banyu bose babagose, maze muhature nta mpagarara mufite." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azaba yihitiyemo ngo ahatuze izina rye, ni ho muzajyana ibi mbategetse byose: ibitambo byanyu bitwikwa, n’ibitambo byanyu bindi, n’imisanzu yanyu, hamwe n’ibyo muzaba mwishakiye byose guha Uhoraho ngo bibe ituro ry’uguhigura." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Azabe ari ho mujya kwishimira imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mwebwe n’abahungu banyu, n’abakobwa banyu, n’abagaragu banyu n’abaja banyu, n’Abalevi bari mu migi yanyu, kuko bo badafite umugabane cyangwa umunani nkamwe." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Uzirinde guturira ibitambo byawe bitwikwa ahantu ubonye hose. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Ahubwo ahantu Uhoraho azihitiramo mu bukonde bw’umwe mu miryango yawe, ni ho honyine uzaturira ibitambo byawe bitwikwa; aho ni ho uzakorera ibyo ngutegetse byose." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Cyakora, ushobora gukinja amatungo no kurira inyama zayo mu migi yawe yose uko ushaka, bikurikije uko Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yaraguhaye umugisha. Abahumanye n’abadahumanye bemerewe kuzaryaho, nk’uko barya isirabo cyangwa impara." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Cyakora, ntimuzarye amaraso: muzayavushirize ku butaka nk’abamena amazi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Ikindi kandi, uramenye ntuzarire mu mugi wawe icya cumi cy’ingano zawe, n’icya divayi yawe nshya, n’icy’amavuta y’imizeti yawe, cyangwa se uburiza bw’amatungo yawe maremare n’amagufi, cyangwa ibitambo byose by’uguhigura, cyangwa ibintu utanze ku bwende, n’imisanzu;" 
Deuteronomy12:18 uzajye ubirira gusa imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ahantu Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yihitiyemo, ubisangire n’umuhungu wawe, n’umukobwa wawe, n’umugaragu wawe, n’umuja wawe, n’Umulevi uri mu mugi wawe; mudabagirire imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, wishimire ibyo wakoze byose." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Uzirinde kurangarana Umulevi igihe cyose uzamara ku butaka utuyeho. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Uhoraho Imana yawe namara kwagura igihugu cyawe nk’uko yabigusezeranyije, maze nawe ukibwira uti «Reka ndye inyama», bitewe n’uko umutima wawe uzishaka, uzarye inyama uko umutima wawe ushaka kose." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Niba ahantu Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yihitiyemo ngo ahatuze izina rye hakubereye kure, ukananirwa kujyayo, uzabage amwe mu matungo yawe maremare cyangwa amagufi Uhoraho azaba yaraguhaye, ubigire uko nagutegetse, maze urire izo nyama mu mugi wawe uko umutima wawe ushaka kose." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Rwose uzirire izo nyama nk’uko barya isirabo cyangwa impara! Abahumanye n’abadahumanye bazazirye kimwe. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Icyakora, uramenye uzirinde kurya amaraso, kuko amaraso ari yo buzima; ntuzaryane rero inyama n’ubuzima bwazo." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Uramenye ntuzayarye: amaraso uzajye uyavushiriza ku butaka nk’uko bamena amazi. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Uramenye ntuzayarye, kugira ngo wowe n’abana bazagukomokaho muzahirwe kubera ko uzaba wakoze igitunganye mu maso y’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Ibintu byonyine uzajyana ahantu Uhoraho azaba yarihitiyemo, ni ibyo uzaba wareguriye Imana kimwe n’amatungo yawe y’uguhigurwa." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Ibitambo bitwikwa – ni ukuvuga inyama hamwe n’amaraso – uzabiturire ku rutambiro rw’Uhoraho Imana yawe; amaraso y’ibitambo byawe azamenwe ku rutambiro rw’Uhoraho Imana yawe, naho inyama zabyo uzazirye." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Uritondere kumva amagambo yose y’amategeko nguha, kugira ngo wowe n’abana bazagukomokaho uko imyaka itashye muzahirwe mubikesheje kugenza neza no gukora igitunganye mu maso y’Uhoraho Imana yawe." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Uhoraho Imana yawe namara kurimbura imbere yawe amahanga ugiye gusanga ngo ubanyage ibyabo, nawe kandi numara kubanyaga ibyabo maze ugatura mu gihugu cyabo," 
Deuteronomy12:30 uramenye ntuzagwe mu mutego ngo ugenze nka bo nibamara kuzima imbere yawe; uzirinde kubaririza ibyerekeye imana zabo uvuga uti «Harya, ya mahanga yubahaga imana zayo ate, kugira ngo nanjye ngenze nka yo?»" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Uramenye ntuzagirire Uhoraho Imana yawe ibyo bagirira imana zabo, kuko ikintu cyose Uhoraho yita gukora ishyano, icyo yanga urunuka cyose, bo bagikoreye imana zabo: ndetse bagejeje n’aho kujya batwikira izo mana abahungu babo n’abakobwa babo!" 
Deuteronomy13:1 Aya mategeko yose mbahaye, murihatire kuyakurikiza; ntuzagire icyo wongeraho cyangwa icyo ugabanyaho." 
Deuteronomy13:2 Nihagira umuhanuzi cyangwa umubonekerwa waduka muri mwe n’aho yaguhanurira ikimenyetso cyangwa igitangaza kizaba," 
Deuteronomy13:3 maze icyo kimenyetso cyangwa icyo gitangaza yari yakubwiye kikaba koko – nuko akakoshya agira ati «Reka tuyoboke imana zindi, tuzisenge», imana utigeze umenya," 
Deuteronomy13:4 ntuzumve amagambo y’uwo muhanuzi cyangwa ngo witabire inzozi z’uwo mubonekerwa; kuko ubwo ari Uhoraho Imana yanyu uzaba ubagerageza, kugira ngo arebe niba koko muri abantu bakunda Uhoraho Imana yanyu n’umutima wanyu wose, n’amagara yanyu yose." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni we wenyine mugomba gukurikira no gutinya; amategeko ye ni yo mugomba gukurikiza; ijwi rye ni ryo mugomba kumva; ni we mugomba gusenga; ni we mugomba kwizirikaho. 
Deuteronomy13:6 Naho uwo muhanuzi cyangwa uwo mubonekerwa, muzamwice kubera ko azaba yababwirije kugomera Uhoraho Imana yanyu, wabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, akababohoza mu nzu y’ubucakara: uwo muntu yari agamije kubatesha inzira Uhoraho Imana yanyu yababwirije gukurikira. Muzakure ishyano hagati yanyu!" 
Deuteronomy13:7 Mwene so cyangwa mwene nyoko, umuhungu wawe cyangwa umukobwa wawe, umugore upfumbase cyangwa incuti yawe y’amagara, naramuka agusanze rwihishwa akakugira inama ati «Reka dusenge imana zindi» — imana utigeze umenya, na ba sogokuru batigeze bamenya," 
Deuteronomy13:8 imana z’amahanga agukikije, yaba ari aya hafi cyangwa ari aya kure, uhereye ku mpera y’isi ukagera ku yindi –" 
Deuteronomy13:9 ntuzamwemerere, ntuzamwumve, ntuzamugirire impuhwe, ntuzashake kumukiza, ntuzamuhishire;" 
Deuteronomy13:10 ahubwo ugomba kumwica nta kabuza. Ikiganza cyawe kizabe icya mbere mu kumwica, hanyuma habone gukurikiraho rubanda rwose." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Uzamutere amabuye, maze apfe azize ko azaba yagerageje kugushuka ngo agucishe ukubiri n’Uhoraho Imana yawe wagukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, mu nzu y’ubucakara." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Abayisraheli bose bazabyumva maze batinye, baherukire aho gukorera ibibi bimeze bityo muri mwe rwagati." 
Deuteronomy13:13 Mu migi Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye guturamo, nuramuka wumvise inkuru y’uko hari ahadutse abantu b’ibyohe muri mwe," 
Deuteronomy13:14 bagashuka abatuye mu rusisiro rwabo bababwira bati «Nimucyo tuyoboke imana z’ahandi», imana mutigeze mumenya," 
Deuteronomy13:15 icyo gihe uzabibaririze, ubisobanuze neza, ubigenzure witonze. Nusanga ari byo koko, yuko bene iryo shyano ryakorewe hagati yanyu," 
Deuteronomy13:16 ntuzatindiganye kumarira ku icumu abaturage b’uwo mugi bose, uwurimburane n’ibirimo byose, n’amatungo yabo uyamarire ku bugi bw’inkota." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Ibisahuwe byose uzabiteranyirize ku karubanda, maze uwo mugi hamwe n’ibintu byose bisahuwe uzabitwikire Uhoraho Imana yawe. Uwo mugi uzahinduka umuyonga ingoma ibihumbi, ntuzigere wongera kubakwa ukundi." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Ntuzagire ikintu na kimwe utwara mu bizaba byaciriwe umuvumo wo kurimburwa. Bityo Uhoraho azashira uburakari, maze akugirire impuhwe, akwereke ubugwaneza bwe, kandi aguhe kugwira nk’uko yabisezeranyije abasokuruza bawe;" 
Deuteronomy13:19 kuko uzaba wumviye ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ugakurikiza amategeko ye yose ngushyikirije uyu munsi, ugakora ibitunganiye Imana yawe." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Muri abana b’Uhoraho Imana yanyu. Ntimuziraburire uwapfuye mwica indasago ku mubiri cyangwa mwitega ibiharanjongo ku mutwe w’imbere. 
Deuteronomy14:2 Kuko uri ubwoko bweguriwe Uhoraho Imana yawe: ni wowe Uhoraho yihitiyemo, kugira ngo mu mahanga yose ari ku bwisanzure bw’isi, ube ubukonde bwe." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Ntuzarye ikintu cyose kizira. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Dore ubwoko bw’inyamaswa ushobora kurya: inka, intama, ihene," 
Deuteronomy14:5 impara, isirabo, indonyi, inyemera, impongo, ifumberi n’isha." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Mbese inyamaswa yose y’ikinono gisatuyemo kabiri kandi yuza, mushobora kuyirya." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ariko mu nyamaswa zuza n’izifite ikinono gisatuye, izo uzirinda kurya ni izi: ingamiya, urukwavu n’impereryi, kuko zuza ariko ntizigire ikinono; zabahumanya." 
Deuteronomy14:8 N’ingurube, kuko ifite ikinono ariko ntiyuze, na yo ni umuziro kuri mwe: ntimukarye inyama zayo cyangwa ngo mukore ku ntumbi yayo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Mu nyamaswa zose zo mu mazi, izo mushobora kurya ni izi: inyamaswa yose ifite amababa yogesha hamwe n’isharankima, mushobora kuyirya;" 
Deuteronomy14:10 naho idafite amababa yogesha, kimwe n’isharankima, muzirinde kuyirya; yabahumanya." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Igisiga cyose kidahumanya, mushobora kukirya." 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ariko ibisiga muzirinda kurya ni ibi: kagoma, itanangabo, icyaruzi," 
Deuteronomy14:13 nyirabarazana, ikizu, n’ubwoko bwose bw’ibyanira," 
Deuteronomy14:14 ubwoko bwose bw’ibikona," 
Deuteronomy14:15 inyombya, nyiramurobyi, ubwoko bwose bwa za sakabaka, mbuni," 
Deuteronomy14:16 igihunyira gito, n’igihunyira kinini, n’igihunyira cy’amatwi," 
Deuteronomy14:17 inzoya, inkongoro, na sarumfune," 
Deuteronomy14:18 igishondabagabo, ubwoko bwose bw’uruyongoyongo, umusure, n’agacurama." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Udusimba twose tuguruka ni umuziro kuri wowe, muzirinde kuturya." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Inyoni zose zidahumanya, mushobora kuzirya." 
Deuteronomy14:21 Inyamaswa yose yipfushije, ntimuzayirye: uzayirekere umusuhuke utuye mu mugi wawe, maze ayirye; cyangwa se uzayigurishe ku munyamahanga. Kuko woweho uri ubwoko bweguriwe Uhoraho Imana yawe. Ntuzateke umwana w’ihene mu mahenehene ya nyina." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Buri mwaka uzajye ugerura kimwe cya cumi ku bihingwa byose uzaba warabibye, ukabisarura mu mirima yawe." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Uzajye imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ahantu azaba yihitiyemo ngo ahatuze Izina rye, maze abe ari ho urira ituro ry’icya cumi cy’ingano wejeje, n’icya divayi yawe, n’icy’amavuta y’imizeti yawe, n’uburiza bw’amatungo yawe maremare n’amagufi; bityo uzigireho kujya utinya Uhoraho Imana yawe iminsi yose." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Niba urugendo ari rurerure cyane ku buryo udashobora kujyana ituro ry’icya cumi cy’ibyawe, kubera ko nyine ahantu Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yihitiyemo kugira ngo ahatuze Izina rye ari kure y’iwawe, niba kandi Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yarakugwijeho umugisha," 
Deuteronomy14:25 icyo gihe icya cumi cy’ibyawe uzakigurane feza, ugende uzicigatiye mu ntoki, maze abe ari zo ujyana ahantu Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yihitiyemo." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Nugerayo, uzatanga izo feza uziguremo icyo ushatse cyose: itungo rirerire cyangwa irigufi, divayi cyangwa indi nzoga, mbese ikintu cyose umutima wawe uzaba ushaka. Uzabirire aho ngaho imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ubisangire n’ab’iwawe, maze munezerwe." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Ariko ntuzarangarane Umulevi utuye mu mugi wawe, kuko we adafite umugabane cyangwa umunani nkawe." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Uko imyaka itatu ishize, uzajye ugerura icya cumi cy’imyaka yose wejeje muri uwo mwaka, maze ubibike mu mugi wawe." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Nuko Umulevi – kuko we adafite umugabane cyangwa umunani nkawe – kimwe n’imfubyi n’umupfakazi bari mu migi yawe, bazaze barye bahage uko bashaka, kugira ngo Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhere umugisha mu mirimo ukora yose." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Uko imyaka irindwi ishize, uzajye urekera imyenda abayikurimo." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Dore rero kubarekera imyenda icyo bivuga: Umuntu wese uzaba yaragize icyo yagurije mugenzi we, azareka uburenganzira agifiteho; ntazakoreshe agahato ngo yishyuze mugenzi we cyangwa mwene wabo, kuko hazaba hatangajwe igihe cyo guhara imyenda, bigiriwe Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Umunyamahanga we ushobora kumushyiraho agahato ngo akwishyure; ariko ibyo umuvandimwe wawe akurimo uzabimurekere. 
Deuteronomy15:4 Ndetse ntihakagire abakene baba muri mwe, kuko Uhoraho atazabura rwose kukugwizaho umugisha mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho ubukonde ngo ucyigarurire," 
Deuteronomy15:5 upfa gusa kwihatira kumvira Uhoraho Imana yawe ubishyizeho umwete, ukitondera gukurikiza aya mategeko yose ngushyikirije uyu munsi." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Uhoraho Imana yawe namara kuguha umugisha nk’uko yabigusezeranyije, uzajya uguriza amahanga menshi ku bugwate, ariko wowe ntuzayaguzaho ku bugwate; uzahaka amahanga menshi, wowe ntazaguhaka." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Nihaba muri mwe umukene, ari umwe wo muri bene wanyu, atuye muri umwe mu migi yawe, mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye, ntuzanangire umutima wawe ngo ugundire ibyawe, ubyimeho mwene wanyu w’umukene;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 ahubwo ntuzatinye kumuramburira intoki, maze wemere kumuguriza ku bugwate ibyo ashobora kuba akeneye byose." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Uramenye ntuzagire ku mutima wawe ibitekerezo bigoramye, wibwira uti «Dore umwaka wa karindwi ugiye gutaha, umwaka wo guhara imyenda», ibyo bigatuma rero urebana imbabazi nke mwene wanyu w’umukene, ukanga kugira icyo umuha. Kuko icyo gihe aramutse atakiye Uhoraho akurega, wabarwaho icyaha!" 
Deuteronomy15:10 Ntuzabure kumuha, kandi niba umuhaye, bigire utagononwa; kuko ibyo ari byo bizatuma Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhera umugisha mu mirimo ukora yose n’ibyo wimirije imbere byose." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Kubera ko abakene badateze gushira mu gihugu, nguhaye nanone iri tegeko: Ntuzabure kugira icyo uha mwene wanyu, n’umunyabyago, n’umutindi uri mu gihugu cyawe." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Nihagira mwene wanyu w’Umuhebureyi, yaba umugabo cyangwa umugore witanze ngo umugure, maze akagukorera imyaka itandatu ari umucakara, mu wa karindwi uzamurekure umusubize ubwigenge." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Kandi numurekura ngo agende abeho yigenga, ntuzamusezerere ngo agende amara masa;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 ahubwo uzamuhe ibintu byinshi ku matungo yawe no ku myaka usaruye, no ku muvure wawe wengeramo divayi: uko Uhoraho azaba yaraguhaye umugisha, azabe ari ko nawe umuha." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Uzibuke yuko nawe wari umucakara mu gihugu cya Misiri, maze Uhoraho Imana yawe akagucungura; ni cyo gituma nguhaye iryo tegeko uyu munsi." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Ariko uwo mucakara nakubwira ati «Sinshaka kuva iwawe», kubera urukundo agufitiye, wowe n’abo mu rugo rwawe, maze akaba amerewe neza iwawe," 
Deuteronomy15:17 uzende uruhindu, urumupfumuze ugutwi umwegetse ku rugi rw’iwawe, maze abe umugaragu wawe burundu. N’umuja wawe uzamugenze utyo." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Numurekura ngo akuveho, abeho yigenga, ntibizagutere agahinda; kuko kuba yaragukoreye imyaka itandatu yose, yakungukiye ibiruta incuro ebyiri ibyo umupagasi ahembwa; kandi Uhoraho Imana yawe azaguhera umugisha mu byo uzakora byose." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Uburiza bwose bw’igitsinagabo buzavuka ku matungo yawe maremare n’amagufi, uzabwegurira Uhoraho Imana yawe; ntugakoreshe imirimo uburiza bw’itungo ryawe rirerire cyangwa ngo wogoshe uburiza bw’intama yawe." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Buri mwaka uzajye ubujyana imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ahantu Uhoraho azaba yihitiyemo, maze uburireyo ubusangire n’abo mu rugo rwawe." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Niba hari inenge bwavukanye, bukaba bucumbagira cyangwa buhumye, cyangwa se bufite inenge yindi bwavukanye, ntuzabutambire Uhoraho Imana yawe:" 
Deuteronomy15:22 uzaburire iwanyu, ubusangire n’umuntu uhumanye kimwe n’udahumanye, nk’uko musangira isirabo n’impara." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Gusa rero uzirinde kurya amaraso yabwo, ahubwo uzayavushirize ku butaka nk’uko bamena amazi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Ujye wubahiriza ukwezi kw’Amahundo, wizihize n’umunsi wa Pasika, ubigirira Uhoraho Imana yawe, kuko mu kwezi kw’Amahundo ari bwo Uhoraho Imana yawe yakwimuye mu Misiri, nijoro." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Uzajye utura Uhoraho Imana yawe igitambo cya Pasika, ukivanye mu matungo yawe maremare n’amagufi, ugiturire ahantu Uhoraho azaba yihitiyemo ngo ahatuze Izina rye." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Ntuzakirishe umugati usembuye; uzamare iminsi irindwi utunzwe gusa n’imigati idasembuye — ni umugati w’amage, kubera ko wavuye mu gihugu cya Misiri bya huti huti —. Bityo rero, iminsi yose y’ukubaho kwawe uzajye wibuka wa munsi waviriyeho mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Muri iyo minsi uko ari irindwi, ntihazagire umusemburo uboneka iwawe, mu gihugu cyawe cyose; kandi inyama uzaba wabagiye gutamba ku munsi wa mbere nimugoroba, ntihazagire izirara ngo zigeze bukeye bwaho." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Uramenye ntuzaturire igitambo cya Pasika mu mugi ubonetse wose mu yo Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye; 
Deuteronomy16:6 ahubwo ahantu Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yihitiyemo ngo ahatuze Izina rye, ni ho honyine uzatambira Pasika, nimugoroba izuba rirenze, ku munsi w’isaha waviriyeho mu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Iryo tungo uzariteke, uririre ahantu Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yihitiyemo; hanyuma nibucya, wigendere, usubire ku mahema yawe." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Mu minsi itandatu, uzajye urya imigati idasembuye, ku wa karindwi habe ikoraniro ryo gusoza umunsi mukuru w’Uhoraho Imana yawe. Ntuzagire umurimo n’umwe w’amaboko ukora." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Byongeye, uzajye ubara ibyumweru birindwi: uzahere ku munsi batangiriraho kugesa imyaka yeze, maze ubare ibyumweru birindwi." 
Deuteronomy16:10 Hanyuma ubone kwizihiza Umunsi mukuru w’Ibyumweru, ubigirira Uhoraho Imana yawe; umuzanire amaturo uko umutima wawe ubishaka, ukurikije uko Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yakugwijeho imigisha." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Maze wishimire imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ufatanyije n’umuhungu wawe, n’umukobwa wawe, n’umugaragu wawe, n’umuja wawe, n’Umulevi utuye mu mugi wawe, n’umusuhuke, n’imfubyi n’umupfakazi baturanye nawe, mwishimire ahantu Uhoraho azaba yihitiyemo ngo ahatuze Izina rye." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Uzibuke ko wari umucakara mu Misiri, ukomeze ayo mategeko kandi uyakurikize." 
Deuteronomy16:13 Ku byerekeye Umunsi mukuru w’Amahema, uzajye uwizihiza iminsi irindwi yose, urangije guhunika ibivuye ku mbuga uhuriraho, no kubika divayi ivuye mu rwengero rwawe." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Uzishime kuri iyo minsi mikuru, ufatanyije n’umuhungu wawe, n’umukobwa wawe, n’umugaragu wawe, n’umuja wawe, n’Umulevi, n’umusuhuke, n’umupfakazi batuye mu migi yawe." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Mu minsi irindwi yose, uzajye gukorera ibirori Uhoraho Imana yawe, ubyizihirize ahantu Uhoraho azaba yihitiyemo, kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yaguhereye umugisha mu myaka usaruye yose, n’imirimo wakoze yose; nuko uzishime, unezerwe." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Gatatu mu mwaka, abagabo bose bazakore urugendo, bajye kwiyereka Uhoraho Imana yawe, bamusange ahantu azaba yihitiyemo: bazabigire mu minsi mikuru y’imigati idasembuye, ku Munsi mukuru w’ibyumweru, no mu minsi mikuru y’Amahema. Ntihazagire ujya kureba Uhoraho nta cyo yitwaje;" 
Deuteronomy16:17 ahubwo buri muntu azajye atanga amaturo y’ibimuvuye mu maboko, uko Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yaraguhaye umugisha." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Mu miryango yawe yose uzishyirireho abacamanza n’abashinzwe kubahiriza amategeko yose Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye, bazajye bacira rubanda imanza zitabera." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Ntuzagoreke imanza, ntuzite ku cyubahiro cy’umuntu, ntuzakire ruswa, kuko ruswa ihuma amaso abanyabwenge, ikaburizamo imanza z’intungane." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Uzaharanire ubutabera, kugira ngo uzabone kuramba no kwigarurira igihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Ntuzagire igiti gisengwa ushinga iruhande rw’urutambiro uzubakira Uhoraho Imana yawe. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Ntuzagire n’ubwo ushinga za nkingi z’amabuye, kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe azanga urunuka." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Ntuzatambire Uhoraho Imana yawe inka cyangwa intama ifite ubusembwa cyangwa indi nenge yavukanye, kuko ari ishyano Uhoraho Imana yanyu yanga urunuka." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Niba iwawe cyangwa muri umwe mu migi Uhoraho Imana yanyu aguhaye hari umugabo cyangwa umugore ukora ibintu bidatunganiye amaso y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, agaca ku Isezerano rye," 
Deuteronomy17:3 maze akajya kuyoboka izindi mana, akazipfukama imbere, agasenga izuba, ukwezi cyangwa ikindi kintu cyose mu biri ku ijuru, kandi narabibujije," 
Deuteronomy17:4 hanyuma bakamukuregera cyangwa ukagira ukundi wumva babivuga, uzaperereze ubyitondeye; maze nubona hari ibyemezo by’uko iryo shyano rikorwa muri Israheli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 uzasohore uwo mugabo cyangwa uwo mugore ukora iryo shyano, umujyane ku irembo ry’umugi wawe, maze uwo mugabo cyangwa uwo mugore uzabatere amabuye, kugeza igihe bapfira." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ntihazagire ucirwa bene urwo rubanza rwo gupfa hatabonetse abagabo babiri cyangwa batatu bamushinja; naho nashinjwa n’umuntu umwe gusa, ntibazamwice." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Abagabo bamushinja bazabe ari bo bafata iya mbere mu kumwica, hanyuma habone gukurikiraho rubanda rwose. Uzakure ishyano hagati yanyu." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Nihaboneka urubanza rukunaniye rwerekeye icyaha cy’ubwicanyi, amahane cyangwa gukomeretsa undiibyo biburanishirizwa mu rukiko rw’umugi wawe — uzashyire nzira ujye ahantu Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yihitiyemo;" 
Deuteronomy17:9 maze usange abaherezabitambo b’Abalevi hamwe n’umucamanza uzaba ariho icyo gihe, ubasobanuze: na bo bazakumenyesha uko baciye urubanza rwawe." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Nawe rero uzakurikize icyemezo bazaba bakubwiriye aho hantu Uhoraho azaba yarihitiyemo, wihatire gukora ukurikije ibisobanuro byabo byose." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Uko ibisobanuro baguhaye biteye n’uko urubanza rwawe baruciye, azabe ari ko ugenza, nta gutanira iburyo cyangwa ibumoso bw’icyemezo cy’urubanza bazaba bakumenyesheje." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Nihagira umuntu ugira ihinyu ntiyumvire umuherezabitambo ubereyeho gukora imirimo mitagatifu y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, cyangwa ntiyumvire umucamanza, uwo muntu agomba kwicwa. Uzakure ishyano muri Israheli." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Rubanda rwose bazabimenya, batinye, maze habure uwongera kuba umunyahinyu." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Numara kugera mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye, ukakigarurira, ukagituramo, maze ukibwira uti «Ndashaka umwami untegeka nk’uko ayandi mahanga yose ankikije ameze»," 
Deuteronomy17:15 umwami uzimika ngo agutegeke agomba kuba ari uwo Uhoraho Imana yawe yitoreye ubwe. Umwami uzimika ngo agutegeke, uzamushake mu bavandimwe bawe; uramenye ntuzimike umunyamahanga utari umuvandimwe wawe." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Ariko rero, azirinde gutunga amafarasi menshi, cyangwa gusubiza rubanda mu Misiri kugira ngo abone uko agwiza umubare w’amafarasi; kuko Uhoraho yababwiye ati «Oya, ntimuzasubize ukundi muri iyo nzira!»" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Ikindi kandi, ntagomba kugira abagore benshi cyane: ibyo byatuma umutima uteshuka inzira nziza. Ku byerekeye ifeza na zahabu, ntazashake gutunga ibirenze urugero." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Kandi namara kwima ingoma, aziyandukurire mu gitabo aya mategeko, ayashyikirijwe n’abaherezabitambo b’Abalevi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ayo mategeko azamugume hafi, ajye ayasoma iminsi yose y’ukubaho kwe, kugira ngo yige gutinya Uhoraho Imana ye, yitondera amagambo yose y’iri Tegeko n’amabwiriza arimo, kugira ngo abikurikize." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Bityo, azirinda kwirata imbere y’abavandimwe, no gutanira ibumoso cyangwa iburyo bw’ayo mategeko; maze azarambe ku ngoma, we n’urubyaro rwe, muri Israheli." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Abaherezabitambo b’Abalevi n’inzu yose ya Levi, ntibazagira umugabane n’ubukonde muri Israheli: bazatungwa n’ibitambo biturwa Uhoraho hamwe n’amakoro ye." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Umulevi nta munani agira mu bavandimwe be: Uhoraho ni we munani we nk’uko yabimubwiye. 
Deuteronomy18:3 Dore rero uburenganzira abaherezabitambo bazagira muri rubanda no ku bantu baza gutura ibitambo by’inka cyangwa intama: bazajya baha umuherezabitambo urushyi rw’ukuboko, imisaya n’igifu." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Uzajye umuha kandi umuganura w’ingano zawe, n’uwa divayi yawe, n’uw’amavuta y’imizeti yawe n’uw’ubwoya bw’intama zawe." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Kuko ari we Uhoraho Imana yawe yatoranyije mu miryango yawe yose, kugira ngo we n’urubyaro rwe bagume aho iteka, bakora imirimo mitagatifu mu izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Umulevi nava aho atuye, muri umwe mu migi yawe, aho ariho hose muri Israheli, agashaka kujya ahantu Uhoraho azaba yihitiyemo," 
Deuteronomy18:7 azajye akora imihango mitagatifu mu izina ry’Uhoraho Imana ye nk’uko ikorwa n’abavandimwe be bose b’Abalevi, ba bandi baguma imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Ku byerekeye ibibatunga, bose bazajye babona umugabane ungana, uretse ibyo buri muntu muri bo azashobora kuronka ku kiguzi cy’ibintu yarazwe n’abasokuruza be." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Numara kugera mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye, uramenye ntuzige gukora amahano akorwa n’ayo mahanga." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Muri mwe ntihazaboneke umuntu utura Imana umuhungu we cyangwa umukobwa we amujugunya mu muriro; ntihazaboneke umuntu uraguza cyangwa ukora imigenzo yo gutongera undi amarozi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 yo kuragura, kuzinga, guca inzaratsi, gushika abazimu n’abanzi, cyangwa se kuraguza ku bapfuye." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Kuko ukora ibyo wese, Uhoraho amuzira akamwanga urunuka; kandi bene ayo mahano ni yo yatumye Uhoraho Imana yawe amenesha ayo mahanga imbere yawe." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Uhoraho Imana yawe uzamwizirikeho rwose. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Koko rero ayo mahanga ugiye kunyaga ibyayo, akora ibyo gutongera n’ibyo kuragura. Woweho Uhoraho Imana yawe ntiyashatse ko ugenza utyo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Uhoraho Imana yawe azitorera umuhanuzi umeze nkanjye, ukomoka muri mwe, mu bavandimwe bawe; azabe ari we mwumva." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Ni na cyo wasabye Uhoraho Imana yawe kuri Horebu, kuri wa munsi w’ikoraniro, igihe wavugaga uti «Sinshaka gukomeza kumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yanjye, sinshaka gukomeza kubona uwo muriro mwinshi, kugira ngo ntapfa!»" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Ni bwo Uhoraho yambwiraga ati «Bagize neza kuba bavuze batyo! 
Deuteronomy18:18 Nzababonera umuhanuzi umeze nkawe, ukomoka mu bavandimwe babo; nzashyira amagambo yanjye mu kanwa ke, ajye ababwira ibyo mubwirije byose." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Kandi umuntu utazumva amagambo yanjye, ayo uwo muhanuzi nyine azavuga mu izina ryanjye, nzabimuryoza ubwanjye." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ariko uwo muhanuzi nahangara kuvuga mu izina ryanjye ijambo ntamubwirije kuvuga, cyangwa akavuga mu izina ry’imana zindi, icyo gihe uwo muhanuzi azapfa.»" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Yenda wakwibaza uti «Tuzamenya dute ko ijambo iri n’iri Uhoraho atari we warivuze?» 
Deuteronomy18:22 Umuhanuzi navuga mu izina ry’Uhoraho, maze icyo avuze ntikibe, ntigisohore, icyo gihe bizaba atari ijambo ryavuzwe n’Uhoraho; uwo muhanuzi azaba yavuze ibyo yihimbiye. Ntugomba kumutinya!" 
Deuteronomy19:1 Uhoraho Imana yawe namara gutsemba imbere yawe amahanga atuye mu gihugu Uhoraho aguhaye, maze ukabazungura, ugatura mu migi yabo no mu mazu yabo," 
Deuteronomy19:2 uzarobanure imigi itatu muri icyo gihugu cyawe, icyo Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye ngo ukigarurire;" 
Deuteronomy19:3 uharure imihanda iganayo, ugabanyemo gatatu igihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho ubukonde, maze umuntu wese wishe undi ajye abona ubuhungiro." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Dore rero igihe umuntu wishe undi azashobora kuhahungira kugira ngo abeho: ni igihe azaba yishe bitari nkana mugenzi we, umuntu atari asanzwe yanga na mbere." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Nk’umuntu wajyana n’undi mu ishyamba gutema ibiti; hanyuma yamanika intorezo, ikamucika igihe ashaka gutema igiti, igakuka, igatarukira mugenzi we, ikamwica: uwo muntu ashobora guhungira muri umwe muri iyo migi, maze agakira atyo." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ugomba guhorera uwe wapfuye ntazarakare, ngo atangire gukurikirana nyir’ukumwica, wenda amufatire mu nzira kubera ko urugendo ari rurerure, maze amutsinde aho. Koko rero, uwo mwishi ntakwiye guhanishwa urupfu, kubera ko mbere atari asanzwe yanga uwo yishe." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ni cyo gitumye nguhaye iri tegeko, nti «Uzarobanure imigi itatu.»" 
Deuteronomy19:8 Kandi Uhoraho Imana yawe niyagura ubwatsi bwawe, nk’uko yabirahiye abasokuruza bawe, maze akaguha igihugu cyose yasezeranye ko azakibaha —" 
Deuteronomy19:9 kubera ko uzaba wakomeje kandi ugakurikiza aya mategeko yose ngushyikirije uyu munsi, bityo ugakunda Uhoraho Imana yawe kandi ukanyura mu nzira ze iminsi yose — icyo gihe kuri ya migi itatu ya mbere uzongereho indi itatu." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Bityo amaraso y’umuntu utacumuye ntazamenekera mu gihugu cyawe Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho ubukonde: ayo maraso yazaguhama. 
Deuteronomy19:11 Ariko niba umuntu yari asanzwe yangana na mugenzi we, akamwubikira, akamugwa gitumo, akamukubita, undi agakurizaho gupfa; hanyuma uwo mwishi agahungira muri umwe muri ya migi," 
Deuteronomy19:12 abakuru bo mu mugi w’iwabo bazoherezeyo abantu bo kumufata bamukureyo, maze bamurekurire ugomba guhorera uwapfuye kugira ngo amwice." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Ntuzamugirire ibambe na busa. Uzahanagure ku Bayisraheli amaraso y’umuntu utacumuye, bityo uzagire amahoro." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Ntuzimure imbago z’umurima w’umuturanyi wawe, uko zashinzwe n’abakurambere mu bukonde uzakeberwa mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye ngo ukigarurire." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Umugabo umwe gusa ntazaze ngo ashinje umuntu wishe undi, cyangwa agakora icyaha cyangwa amafuti, ibyo ari byo byose; ubuhamya bw’abagabo babiri cyangwa batatu azabe ari bwo bashingiraho kugira ngo bashobore gutangiza urubanza." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Nihagira umugabo w’ibinyoma wihandagaza kugira ngo ashinje umuntu icyaha cy’ubwigomeke," 
Deuteronomy19:17 abo bantu bombi bazaba baburanira imbere y’Uhoraho, bazahagarare imbere y’abaherezabitambo n’abacamanza bazaba bariho icyo gihe." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Abacamanza bazaperereze neza, bavumbure ko nyakurega undi ari umuhamyabinyoma, urega umuvandimwe we ibintu by’ibihimbano." 
Deuteronomy19:19 Muzamucire urwo yashakaga gucira umuvandimwe we. Uzakure ishyano hagati yanyu. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Rubanda basigaye bazumva bivugwa, maze bashye ubwoba, baherukire aho gukorera muri mwe ibibi bimeze bityo." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ntuzagire ibambe: amagara azahorwe andi, ijisho rihorwe irindi, iryinyo rihorwe irindi, ikiganza gihorwe ikindi, ikirenge gihorwe ikindi." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Nuhagurukira kurema urugamba urwanya abanzi bawe, ukabona bafite amafarasi, amagare y’intambara n’ingabo biruta ibyawe kuba byinshi, ntukabatinye, kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe ari kumwe nawe, we wagukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Nimuzaba muri hafi yo kurema urugamba, umuherezabitambo azahagarare imbere, abwire rubanda ati" 
Deuteronomy20:3 «Israheli, tega amatwi! Uyu munsi mugiye kurwanya abanzi banyu. Muramenye ntimucike intege, ntimugire ubwoba, ntimute umutwe, ntimuhinde umushyitsi imbere yabo." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Koko rero Uhoraho Imana yanyu aragendana namwe, kugira ngo arwanye abanzi banyu mu kigwi cyanyu, mbese abatabare.»" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Abashinzwe kubahiriza amategeko na bo bazaze babwire rubanda bati «Hari umuntu uri hano waba yarubatse inzu nshya, none akaba atarayitaha? Nagende asubire iwe, kugira ngo hato atagwa ku rugamba, maze undi akaba ari we utaha iyo nzu ye." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Hari umuntu uri hano waba yarateye imizabibu, none akaba atararya imbuto zayo z’umuganura? Ngaho nagende yisubirire iwe, kugira ngo hato atagwa ku rugamba, maze undi akaba ari we urya imbuto z’umuganura." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Hari umuntu uri hano waba yarasabye umugeni none akaba ataramurongora? Ngaho nagende yisubirire iwabo, kugira ngo hato atagwa ku rugamba, maze undi muntu akaba ari we umurongorera umugeni.»" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Abashinzwe kubahiriza amategeko bazongere babwire rubanda nanone bati «Hari umuntu uri hano waba afite ubwoba, akaba yacitse intege? Ngaho nagende yisubirire imuhira, yoye gukura umutima abavandimwe be nk’uko uwe umeze.»" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Abashinzwe kubahiriza amategeko nibamara kubwira rubanda batyo, hazashyirweho abatware b’ingabo bo kuyobora rubanda." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Numara gusatira umugi ngo uwurwanye, bene wo uzabagire inama yo kugirana nawe amasezerano y’amahoro." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Nibagusubiza bati «Ngaho tugirane amasezerano y’amahoro», maze bakakugururira amarembo yabo, abantu uzasangamo bose uzabagire ingaruzwamuheto zawe, bajye bagukorera." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ariko nibanga kugirana nawe amasezerano y’amahoro, bagashaka kurwana, uzagote umugi wabo;" 
Deuteronomy20:13 Uhoraho Imana yawe azawukurekurira, maze abantu bawurimo bose ubamarire ku bugi bw’inkota." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Uzazigame gusa abakobwa, abana n’amatungo, n’ibindi byose biri muri uwo mugi bishobora gusahurwa, ubijyaneho iminyago. Uzarye ibyo wambuye abo babisha bawe, ibyo Uhoraho Imana yawe yaguhaye." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Azabe ari ko ugenza imigi ikuri kure cyane, itabarirwa mu migi y’ayo mahanga." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Ariko imigi y’ayo mahanga Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho ubukonde, ni yo yonyine utazareka hagira ikintu kizima gihonoka." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Ahubwo uzatsembe rwose uwitwa Umuheti, Umuhemori, Umukanahani, Umuperezi, Umuhivi n’Umuyebuzi, uko Uhoraho Imana yawe yabigutegetse," 
Deuteronomy20:18 kugira ngo batazabigisha gukora amahano bajya bakora bashaka gushimisha imana zabo: mwaba mucumuriye Uhoraho Imana yanyu. 
Deuteronomy20:19 Numara igihe kirekire ugose umugi, ukarwanira kuwutsinda, ntuzabangure intorezo ngo utemagure ibiti bya bene wo, kuko imbuto zabyo ari zo zizagutunga: ntuzabiteme rero. None se igiti cyo mu murima na cyo ni umuntu, kugira ngo ube wakirwanya?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Icyakora ibiti uzi ko bitera imbuto ziribwa, byo uzabiteme ubisature, ubikuremo ibikoresho bigufasha kugota umugi murwana, kugeza igihe uwutsindiye." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye ngo ukigarurire, nihaboneka intumbi y’umuntu wahotowe, ikaba igaramye ku gasozi batazi uwamwishe," 
Deuteronomy21:2 abakuru b’imiryango n’abacamanza bazasohoke bapime intera ziva aho iyo ntumbi iri, zikagera ku migi yose iyikikije;" 
Deuteronomy21:3 ibyo bizatuma bamenya umugi urusha iyindi kuba bugufi bw’iyo ntumbi: abakuru bo muri uwo mugi bazazane inyana y’isugi batigeze bakoresha mu gukurura imizigo. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Abakuru b’uwo mugi bazamanure iyo nyana mu kabande karimo akagezi kadakama, ahantu hadahinze, hatari mu mbibe y’imyaka. Nibagera aho ngaho, bazayivunire ijosi muri ako kagezi." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Nuko abaherezabitambo bene Levi bazayegere, kuko ari bo Uhoraho Imana yawe yahisemo ngo bajye bakora imihango kandi batange umugisha mu izina ry’Uhoraho, n’ijambo bavuze akaba ari ryo rimara impaka zose n’urubanza rwose rwerekeye gukomeretsa umuntu." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Abakuru bose b’umugi urusha iyindi kuba hafi ya wa muntu wishwe bazakarabire amazi y’akagezi hejuru y’iyo nyana yavunwe ijosi," 
Deuteronomy21:7 bavuga bati «Ibiganza byacu si byo byamennye aya maraso, kandi n’amaso yacu ntiyamubonye apfa." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Uhoraho, babarira Israheli umuryango wawe wacunguye, kandi ntiwemere ko amaraso y’utacumuye amenekera muri Israheli umuryango wawe.» Ubwo rero bazaba bakijijwe inzigo y’amaraso." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Nawe kandi uzaba wihanaguyeho amaraso y’utacumuye yamenekeye hagati yanyu, kuko uzaba wakoze igitunganye imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Nuhagurukira kurwana n’ababisha bawe, maze Uhoraho Imana yawe akabakurekurira, ukagira abo ujyana ari imbohe," 
Deuteronomy21:11 nuko muri izo ngaruzwamuheto ukabonamo umukobwa mwiza, ukamubenguka, ugashaka kumurongora," 
Deuteronomy21:12 uzamujyane iwawe mu nzu, maze yiyogosheshe umusatsi, ace inzara," 
Deuteronomy21:13 yiyambure imyenda yanyaganywe, agume mu nzu yawe, amaremo ukwezi kose aririra se na nyina; hanyuma uzamwegere umurongore, abe umugore wawe." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Uramutse ubonye ko atakikunogeye, uzamureke agende ajye aho ashaka; uramenye ntuzamugurishe cyangwa ngo umugirire nabi, kuko wari wamutunzeho umugore." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Umugabo nagira abagore babiri, umwe w’inkundwakazi n’undi w’intabwa, kandi bombi akabyarana na bo, ariko umuhungu w’imfura akaba uw’intabwa," 
Deuteronomy21:16 icyo gihe najya kuraga ibintu abahungu be, ntazahe ubutware umuhungu w’inkundwakazi ngo amurenze imfura ye nyakuri yavutse ku mugore w’intabwa;" 
Deuteronomy21:17 ahubwo agomba kwemera imfura ye, wa muhungu wavutse ku mugore w’intabwa, akamuraga imigabane ibiri ku byo atunze byose: kuko uwo muhungu ari we yabimburiyeho kubyara, akaba rero akwiye guharirwa ubutware." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Umuntu nagira umuhungu w’ikirara n’ikigomeke, utazi kumvira se na nyina, maze n’aho bamuhana kangahe akanga akaba intumva," 
Deuteronomy21:19 se na nyina bazamufate, bamushyire abakuru b’umugi wabo ku irembo ryawo." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Bazabwire abo bakuru b’umugi wabo bati «Uyu mwana wacu mureba ni ikirara n’ikigomeke, yanga kutwumvira; ni umunyangeso mbi n’umusinzi!»" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Abagabo bo mu mugi bose bazamutere amabuye, maze apfe. Muzakure ishyano hagati yanyu; Abayisraheli bose bazumva iyo nkuru, maze batinye." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Umuntu nakora icyaha, agacirwa urwo gupfa, maze ukamwica umumanitse ku giti," 
Deuteronomy21:23 intumbi ye ntizarare imanitse ku giti; ugomba kumuhamba uwo munsi, kuko umuntu umanitse ku giti ari umuvumo w’Imana. Bityo, ntuzahumanye ubutaka bwawe Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho ubukonde." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Nubona inka cyangwa intama y’umuvandimwe wawe yangara, ntuzirengagize ngo ubure kuyigarurira umuvandimwe wawe." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Niba uwo muvandimwe adatuye hafi y’iwawe cyangwa se utamuzi, uzacyure iryo tungo mu rugo rwawe, rigume iwawe kugeza igihe umuvandimwe wawe azaza kurishaka. Ubwo rero uzarimusubize." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Uzagenze utyo no ku ndogobe ye, uzagenze utyo no ku mwambaro we, uzagenze utyo mbese ku kintu cyose umuvandimwe wawe azaba yatakaje, maze wowe ukagitoragura: uramenye ntuzirengagize." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Nubona indogobe y’umuvandimwe wawe cyangwa inka ye yagandaye ku nzira, ntuzirengagize, ngo ubure gufasha umuvandimwe wawe kuyigandura." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Umugore ntakambare imyambaro y’abagabo; n’umugabo ntakambare imyambaro y’abagore; kuko ukora atyo wese aba abaye ishyano Uhoraho Imana yawe yanga urunuka. 
Deuteronomy22:6 Nusanga ku nzira yawe hari icyari cy’inyoni kirimo utwana cyangwa amagi, cyaba mu giti cyangwa se ku butaka, nyina ibundikiye utwo twana cyangwa ayo magi, ntuzatware nyina n’utwana twayo." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Uzareke nyina yigurukire, uduswi twayo abe ari two utwara. Bityo uzagira umugisha n’ubugingo burambye." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Niwubaka inzu nshya, uzazengurutse ku musozo wayo umuguno urinda umuntu kugwa: ntuzatume inzu yawe ibazwa amaraso yameneka igihe umuntu azaba ahanutse hejuru yayo." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Ntuzagire indi mbuto utera mu murima wawe w’imizabibu; naho ubundi, ari iyo mbuto wabibyemo, ari n’umusaruro w’imizabibu, byose byahinduka umuziro." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Ntuzahingishe ikimasa n’indogobe biziritse ku mugogo umwe. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Ntuzambare umwenda ubohesheje ubwoya bw’intama buvanze n’imigwegwe. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Uzatere inshunda ku misozo y’impande enye z’umwenda wambara. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Umuntu narongora umugore, akaryamana na we, hanyuma akamubenga," 
Deuteronomy22:14 agatangira kumurega ko yiyandaritse, akamutera urubwa avuga ngo «Uyu mugore naramurongoye, mwegereye nsanga atakiri isugi»," 
Deuteronomy22:15 icyo gihe se na nyina b’uwo mugore w’ikirongore bazatware ibimenyetso by’ubusugi bwe, babyereke abakuru b’umugi wabo bicaye ku irembo ryawo." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Se w’uwo mukobwa azabwire abakuru, ati «Uyu mukobwa ni uwanjye; namushyingiye uyu mugabo, none yamubenze." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Kandi dore aramurega ko ngo yiyandaritse, avuga ngo ’Umukobwa wawe ntakiri isugi!» Nuko bazarambure uwo mwenda imbere y’abakuru b’umugi." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Abakuru b’uwo mugi bazafate wa mugabo, bamuhane bikomeye." 
Deuteronomy22:19 Bazamuce icyiru cya sikeli ijana z’ifeza bazihe se w’umukobwa, kuko uwo mugabo yateye urubwa umwari wo mu Bayisraheli. Agomba kumugira umugore, kandi ntashobora kumusenda kugeza igihe azapfira." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Ariko icyo kirego kiramutse kibaye impamo, bagasanga uwo mukobwa yararongowe atakiri isugi," 
Deuteronomy22:21 bazamusohore bamusubize kwa se, maze abantu bo mu mugi wabo bazamutere amabuye kugeza igihe apfiriye, kuko yakoze ikizira mu Bayisraheli igihe yemera kubera indaya mu rugo rwa se. Muzakure ishyano hagati yanyu." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Umuntu nafatwa asambana n’umugore ufite umugabo, bombi bazabice: uwo mugabo wasambanyije umugore, n’umugore ubwe. Uzakure ishyano muri Israheli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Umukobwa w’isugi nasabwa n’umugabo, maze undi mugabo akabonanira na we mu mugi wabo, bakaryamana," 
Deuteronomy22:24 bombi muzabajyane ku irembo ry’uwo mugi, mubatere amabuye kugeza igihe bapfiriye! Umukobwa azire ko yari mu mugi wabo, nyamara ntatabaze; n’umugabo azire ko yononnye umugeni wa mugenzi we. Muzakure ishyano hagati yanyu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Ariko niba umugabo ahuriye mu gasozi n’umukobwa usabwa, akamufatira yo, akamusambanya, umugabo wamusambanyije azabe ari we wicwa wenyine;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 naho umukobwa, ntuzagire icyo umutwara, kuko atakoze icyaha gikwiriye kumwicisha. Ibyo bimeze nk’uko umuntu yakubikira mugenzi we, akamwica:" 
Deuteronomy22:27 wenda uwo mugabo yamusanze mu gasozi, umukobwa arataka, ntihagira uza kumutabara!" 
Deuteronomy22:28 Umugabo nahura n’umukobwa utarasabwa, akamufata, akamusambanya, bagafatwa," 
Deuteronomy22:29 icyo gihe uwo mugabo wasambanyije umukobwa azahongera se amasikeli mirongo itanu y’ifeza; kandi kubera ko azaba yamwononnye, agomba kumugira umugore we, ntashobora no kuzamusenda kugeza igihe azapfira." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Ntihazagire umuntu winjira muka se; ntazamworosoreho ikinyita cy’umwenda se yamworoshe. 
Deuteronomy23:2 Umuntu wamenetse amabya, kimwe n’uwashahuwe ntibakemererwe kujya mu ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Umuntu w’icyimanyi ntazemererwe kujya mu ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho; ndetse n’abazamukomokaho mu gisekuru cya cumi, ntibazemererwe kujya mu ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Umuhamoni cyangwa Umumowabu ntibazemererwe na rimwe kujya mu ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho; ndetse n’ababakomokaho mu gisekuru cya cumi, ntibazemererwe kujya mu ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho;" 
Deuteronomy23:5 kuko batabasanganije ibyo kurya n’amazi igihe mwari mu rugendo mwimuka mu Misiri, ndetse Mowabu yo ikagurira Balamu mwene Bewori, w’i Petori muri Aramu‐Naharayimu, kugira ngo akuvume." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Ariko Uhoraho Imana yawe yanze kumvira Balamu, ahubwo umuvumo we Uhoraho Imana yawe awuguhinduriramo umugisha, kuko Uhoraho Imana yawe agukunda." 
Deuteronomy23:7 Ingoma ibihumbi ntuzabashakire ubukire n’ihirwe igihe cyose ufite kubaho. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Ntuzange urunuka Umunyedomu, kuko ari mwene wanyu; ntuzange urunuka Umunyamisiri, kuko wabaye umusuhuke mu gihugu cye." 
Deuteronomy23:9 Ababakomokaho nyuma y’igisekuru cya gatatu bazemererwe kujya mu ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho. 
Deuteronomy23:10 Nuca ingando uteye ababisha bawe, uzirinde ikibi cyose." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Muri mwe nihaba umugabo wahumanyijwe n’uko yisohoreyeho nijoro asinziriye, azasohoke mu ngando, yoye kuyigarukamo:" 
Deuteronomy23:12 nibujya kwira aziyuhagire, maze izuba nirirenga asubire mu ngando." 
Deuteronomy23:13 Uzagire ahantu hikinze hatari mu ngando, abe ari ho wituma." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Mu bintu byawe, uzabe ufitemo n’igihosho, maze nujya hanze kwituma, ugicukuze umwobo, nyuma uze gutwikira imyanda yawe." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Koko rero Uhoraho Imana yawe ubhwe agendagenda mu ngando yawe, kugira ngo akurinde kandi akurekurire ababisha bawe. Ni cyo gituma ingando yawe ari ahantu hatagatifu; ntibikwiye rero ko Uhoraho ayibonamo ikintu cyamutera ishozi: naho ubundi, yareka kujyana nawe." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Nihagira umucakara ucika shebuja, agahungira iwawe, ntuzamumusubize;" 
Deuteronomy23:17 azagumane nawe, abe iwanyu, aho azatoranya muri umwe mu migi yanyu, kugira ngo amererwe neza. Ntuzashake kumurya imitsi." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Mu bakobwa b’Abayisraheli ntihazabeho indaya zigenewe gukorera ibigirwamana, no mu bahungu b’Abayisraheli ntihazabeho indaya zigenewe gukorera ibigirwamana." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ntuzajyanemo amaronko y’umukobwa w’indaya cyangwa igihembo cy’uwo muhungu w’inyana y’imbwa, ngo ubitangeho ituro ry’uguhigura; kuko bombi ari amahano Uhoraho yanga urunuka." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Ntuzagire icyo uguriza umuvandimwe wawe ngo umwake n’inyungu: cyaba ifeza, cyaba ibiribwa, cyangwa se ikindi kintu cyose cyashobora gushakwaho inyungu." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Umunyamahanga we, uzamugurize umutezeho inyungu; ariko umuvandimwe wawe ntuzamwake inyungu, kugira ngo Uhoraho Imana yawe azaguhere umugisha mu mirimo uzakorera mu gihugu ugiye kwinjiramo ngo ukigarurire." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Nugirira umuhigo Uhoraho Imana yawe, ntuzatinde kuwuhigura; naho ubundi Uhoraho Imana yawe ntiyabura kuwukuryoza, bikagukururira icyaha." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Ariko niwirinda kugira imihigo, ntibizagukururira icyaha." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Ijambo rikuvuye mu kanwa, jya ushishikarira kurishyira mu bikorwa, ukurikije umuhigo wagiriye Uhoraho Imana yawe ku bwende, ukawivugira ubwawe." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Nujya mu murima w’imizabibu w’umuturanyi wawe, wemerewe kurya imbuto z’imizabibu uko ushaka, ugashira ipfa; ariko uramenye ntuzasorome ibyo utwara." 
Deuteronomy23:26 Nujya mu murima weze w’umuturanyi wawe, ushobora gucamo amahundo n’intoki; ariko ntuzageze aho gufata umuhoro ngo ukarare imyaka y’umuturanyi wawe." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Umuntu nashaka umugore, akamurongora, nyuma yamubonaho inenge akareka kumukunda, akamwandikira urwandiko rwo kumusenda, akarumuhereza amwirukana mu rugo rwe," 
Deuteronomy24:2 uwo mugore akamuvira mu rugo akagenda, hanyuma agacyurwa n’undi mugabo," 
Deuteronomy24:3 niba uwo mugabo na we ageze aho akamuhararukwa, akamwandikira urwandiko rwo kumusenda, akarumuhereza amwirukana mu rugo rwe, cyangwa se uwo mugabo wari waramusumbakaje agapfa," 
Deuteronomy24:4 icyo gihe umugabo we wa mbere, wa wundi wabanje kumusenda, ntazamusubirane ngo amugire umugore, amaze kwihumanya atyo; kuko ibyo ari amahano mu maso y’Uhoraho. Uramenye ntuzagushe mu cyaha igihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho ubukonde." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Umugabo naba arongoye vuba, ntazatabare, kandi ntihazagire uza iwe kumubuza uburyo; azamare umwaka umwe yibereye iwe, ari nta cyo abazwa, maze anezereze umugore yarongoye." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Ntihakagire umuntu utwara urusyo cyangwa ingasire ho ingwate, kuko byaba ari ukugwatira ubugingo bw’undi." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Nihagira umuntu ushimuta umwe mu bavandimwe be b’Abayisraheli akamujyana, akamugira umucakara cyangwa akamugurisha, bene uwo mushimusi agomba kwicwa. Muzakure ishyano hagati yanyu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Uzirinde indwara z’ibibembe, witondera kureba neza no gukurikiza ibyo abaherezabitambo b’Abalevi bazabigisha byose. Muzitondere gukora mukurikije amabwiriza nabahaye." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Ibuka uko Uhoraho Imana yawe yagenjereje Miriyamu igihe mwari ku rugendo muva mu Misiri. 
Deuteronomy24:10 Nuramuka ugize ikintu uguriza mugenzi wawe, ntuzinjire mu nzu ye, ngo umutware ingwate yacyo." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Uzahagarare hanze, maze uwo muntu ugurije agusangishe iyo ngwate hanze." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Kandi niba asanzwe ari umuntu usuzuguritse, ntuzaryame utamushubije iyo ngwate ye;" 
Deuteronomy24:13 ugomba kuyimusubiza izuba rikirenga. Azaryama muri uwo mwambaro we, agusabire umugisha; ibyo bizatuma witwa intungane imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Ntuzanyunyuze imitsi umupagasi usuzuguritse kandi ukennye, yaba uwo mu bavandimwe bawe cyangwa se uwo mu basuhuke b’abanyamahanga batuye mu gihugu cyawe, mu migi yawe." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Uzajye umuha igihembo cye buri munsi akoze; izuba ntirikarenge utamwishyuye, kuko ari umukene, akaba arekereje kubona uwo mushahara. Ntazagombe gutakira Uhoraho akurega: byagukururira icyaha." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Ababyeyi ntibazicwe bazira ibyo abana babo bakoze, n’abana ntibazicwe bazira ibyakozwe n’ababyeyi babo; buri muntu azicwe azira icyaha yakoze ubwe." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Ntuzapfukirane uburenganzira bw’umusuhuke cyangwa ubw’impfubyi. Ntuzatwareho ingwate umwambaro w’umupfakazi. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Uzibuke ko nawe wabaye umucakara mu Misiri, maze Uhoraho Imana yawe akagucungura, akagukurayo. Ni cyo gituma ngutegetse gukurikiza ibyo maze kuvuga." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Nusarura umurima wawe, ukibagirirwa mu murima umuganda w’amahundo, ntuzasubireyo kuwutwara; uzabe uw’umusuhuke, cyangwa impfubyi, cyangwa umupfakazi, maze Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhere umugisha mu byo ukora byose." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Nucugusa igiti cy’umuzeti ukagusha imbuto zeze, ntuzagaruke gusoroma bwa kabiri; izisigaye zizabe iz’umusuhuke cyangwa impfubyi, cyangwa umupfakazi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Nusoroma imbuto z’umuzabibu wawe, ntuzasubiremo guhumba; izisigaye zizabe iz’umusuhuke cyangwa impfubyi cyangwa umupfakazi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Ujye wibuka ko nawe wabaye umucakara mu gihugu cya Misiri; ni cyo gituma ngutegeka gukurikiza ibyo maze kuvuga. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Abantu nibagira icyo bapfa, bazajye mu rukiko, babacire urubanza: uri mu kuri azabe ari we bavuga ko atsinze, uri mu cyaha abe ari we bavuga ko atsinzwe." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Nibasanga nyir’icyaha akwiye gukubitwa ibiboko, umucamanza azamuryamishe ku butaka, ategeke ko bamukubitira imbere ye ibiboko bihwanye n’icyaha cye." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Bazamukubite ibiboko mirongo ine; ntibazarenzeho, kugira ngo igihe bamukubita ibiboko byinshi batamutonyagura bikabije, maze umuvandimwe wawe akahavana ubusembwa uhora urora." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Ntuzahambire umunwa w’inka iri ku kazi ko guhonyora ingano. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Abavandimwe niba batuye hamwe, umwe muri bo akaza gupfa atarabyara akana k’agahungu, umugore wa nyakwigendera ntazashake umugabo utari uwo muri uwo muryango; ahubwo umugabo wabo azamusange amuhungure, amugire umugore we." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Umuhungu uwo mugore azabyara bwa mbere ni we uzakomeza izina rya wa muvandimwe wapfuye, bityo izina rye ryoye kwibagirana mu Bayisraheli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Uwo mugabo nadakunda guhungura umugore wabo, uwo mugore azajye ku irembo ry’umugi, asange abakuru, abaregere avuga ati «Umugabo wacu yanze ko izina rya mwene se riramba mu Bayisraheli, yanze kunkorera icyo ashinzwe.»" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Abakuru b’umugi wabo bazamuhamagaze, bavugane na we. Azaze ahagarare aho ngaho, maze avuge ati «Sinshaka kumuhungura.»" 
Deuteronomy25:9 Umugore yagombaga guhungura azamwegere, aho ari imbere y’abo bakuru, amwambure urukweto, amucire mu maso, hanyuma aterure avuga ati «Nguko uko bagenzereza umuntu wanze gucikura urugo rwa mwene se!»" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Nuko mu Bayisraheli bazajye bamwita «Nyakwamburwurukweto». 
Deuteronomy25:11 Umugabo n’umuvandimwe we nibaramuka basingiranye bakarwana, maze umugore w’umwe muri bo akaza gutabara umugabo we ukubitwa n’undi, agasodotsa intoki, agasingira uwo mubisha iwabo w’abantu, akamukama," 
Deuteronomy25:12 uzace ikiganza cy’uwo mugore. Ntuzamugirire ibambe! 
Deuteronomy25:13 Ntuzagire mu isaho yawe ibipimisho bibiri bidahwanye, ikiremereye n’ikitaremereye." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Ntukagire mu nzu yawe ibyibo by’urugero rumwe biciye ukubiri, ikinini n’igito." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Ahubwo igipimisho cy’uburemere uzahorana kizabe cyuzuye kandi kitabeshya, n’icyibo ugeresha incuro kizabe cyuzuye kandi kitabeshya, kugira ngo iminsi y’ukubaho kwawe izarambe mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Koko rero abakora ibintu nka biriya bose, abakora ibinyuranye n’ubutabera bose, baba ari ishyano Uhoraho Imana yawe yanga urunuka." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Jya wibuka ibyo Amaleki yakugiriye mu rugendo, igihe mwimukaga mu Misiri:" 
Deuteronomy25:18 yaje kugutegera mu nzira, aguca inyuma, maze atsemba abari bagikururuka inyuma bose; igihe wari wishwe n’umunaniro kandi waguye isari, ntiyatinye Imana." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ni cyo gituma Uhoraho Imana yawe namara kuguha kuruhuka, agukijije abanzi bawe bose bakugose, mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho ubukonde ngo ukigarurire, uzazimangatanya Amaleki, ikibagirana mu nsi y’ijuru. Uramenye ntuzabyibagirwe!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 Numara kugera mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhayeho ubukonde, ukakigarurira ukagituramo," 
Deuteronomy26:2 uzagerure incuro ku muganura w’imyaka yose wejeje mu butaka bwawe, imyaka uzasarura mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye. Ubishyire mu cyibo, maze ujye ahantu Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yihitiyemo kugira ngo ahatuze Izina rye." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Uzagende usange umuherezabitambo uzaba utahiwe muri icyo gihe, umubwire uti «Uyu munsi ndamenyesha Uhoraho Imana yawe yuko nageze mu gihugu Uhoraho yarahiye abasogokuruza bacu ko azakiduha.»" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Umuherezabitambo azakwakira cya cyibo, agitereke hasi imbere y’urutambiro rw’Uhoraho Imana yawe." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Nuko uvugire imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, uti «Sogokuruza yari Umwaramu wagendaga yangara, asuhukira mu Misiri; aba yo ari umusuhuke, ari hamwe n’abantu bake cyane bari bamuherekeje. Arahororokera, aba imbaga ikomeye, ifite amaboko kandi itubutse." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Ariko Abanyamisiri batugiriye nabi, baduhindura abatindi, banadukoresha ku gahato imirimo y’ubucakara iruhanyije." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Nuko dutakira Uhoraho Imana y’abasokuruza bacu. Uhoraho na we yumva imiborogo yacu; areba ukuntu twari indushyi, turi mu kaga, kandi tunashikamiwe." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Maze Uhoraho adukuza mu Misiri imbaraga n’umurego by’ukuboko kwe; abigira kandi agaragaza ibikorwa bikanganye, n’ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Atugeza aha hantu, aduha iki gihugu ari igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki." 
Deuteronomy26:10 None dore nzanye umuganura w’ibyeze mu butaka wampaye, wowe Uhoraho.» Uzabitereke hasi imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, wuname imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe;" 
Deuteronomy26:11 maze wishimire ibyiza byose Uhoraho Imana yawe yaguhaye ku buntu wowe n’urugo rwawe, ubigire ufatanyije n’Umulevi n’umusuhuke w’umunyamahanga mubana." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Mu mwaka wa gatatu, ari na wo mwaka wo gutanga icya cumi cy’umutungo, numara kugerura icya cumi ku byo wejeje byose no kugihaho Umulevi, umusuhuke w’umunyamahanga, imfubyi n’umupfakazi bari mu migi yawe, bakarya bagahaga," 
Deuteronomy26:13 icyo gihe uzavugire imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe aya magambo uti «Nakuye mu nzu yanjye umugabane wagenewe guturwa, nywuhaho Umulevi, umusuhuke w’umunyamahanga, imfubyi n’umupfakazi, nkurikije amategeko yawe yose wampaye, ntagize itegeko ryawe na rimwe nica nkana cyangwa nibagirwa." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Nta cyo nigeze ndya kuri uwo mugabane ndi mu cyunamo, nta cyo nakuyeho ndi umuhumane, nta cyo nahayeho abazimu. Rwose numviye Uhoraho Imana yanjye, ngenza uko amabwiriza yose wampaye abivuga." 
Deuteronomy26:15 None rero, wowe utuye mu ijuru, mu Ngoro ntagatifu, unama witegereze, maze uhe umugisha umuryango wawe, kimwe n’ubutaka waduhaye ari igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki, nk’uko wabirahiriye abasokuruza bacu.»" 
Deuteronomy26:16 Uyu munsi Uhoraho Imana yawe akubwirije gukurikiza ayo mategeko n’iyo migenzo: ujye ubyitaho, ubikurikize n’umutima wawe wose n’amagara yawe yose." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Uyu munsi, dore watumye Uhoraho avuga yeruye ko azakubera Imana, ariko nawe ugakurikiza inzira ze wita ku mategeko ye n’amabwiriza ye n’imigenzo ye, mbese ukajya wumvira ijwi rye." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Uyu munsi kandi, Uhoraho na we yatumye uvuga weruye ko uzamubera umuryango w’ubukonde yihariye, nk’uko yabigusezeranyije, kandi ko uzakomeza amategeko ye yose." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Icyo gihe rero azagukuza, agusumbishe ayandi mahanga yaremye yose, uyarushe icyubahiro, n’ubwamamare n’ishema; bityo ubere Uhoraho Imana yawe umuryango mutagatifu, nk’uko yabigusezeranyije." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Musa ari hamwe n’abakuru b’imiryango y’Abayisraheli, aha rubanda aya mabwiriza, ati «Mwite ku mategeko yose mbashyikirije uyu munsi." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Umunsi muzambuka Yorudani mujya mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye, uzashake amabuye manini uyashinge, maze uyasige ingwa." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Uzayandikeho amagambo yose y’iri Tegeko, igihe uzaba umaze kwambuka. Nuko uzinjire mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki, nk’uko Uhoraho Imana y’abasokuruza bawe yagusezeranyije." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Nimumara rero kwambuka Yorudani, muzashinge ku musozi wa Ebali ayo mabuye mukurikije amabwiriza mbahaye none, kandi muyasige ingwa." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Aho hantu uzahubake urutambiro rw’Uhoraho Imana yawe, urutambiro rwubakishije amabuye adaconzwe n’icyuma;" 
Deuteronomy27:6 uzubakishe urutambiro rw’Uhoraho Imana yawe amabuye adaconze; aho ni ho uzaturira Uhoraho Imana yawe ibitambo bitwikwa. 
Deuteronomy27:7 Uzahaturire n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro, uharire, maze wishimire imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yawe." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Uzandike kuri ayo mabuye amagambo yose y’iri Tegeko, uyandike ku buryo asomeka neza.»" 
Deuteronomy27:9 Hanyuma Musa, ari kumwe n’abaherezabitambo b’Abalevi, abwira Abayisraheli bose, ati «Bayisraheli, nimuceceke mwumve! Uyu munsi Uhoraho Imana yawe yakugize umuryango we." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Uzajye wumvira ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ukurikize amategeko ye n’amabwiriza ye ngushyikirije uyu munsi.»" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Uwo munsi nyine, Musa aha rubanda aya mabwiriza, ati" 
Deuteronomy27:12 «Dore abazahagarara ku musozi wa Garizimu kugira ngo basabire umugisha rubanda, nimumara kwambuka Yorudani: ni abo mu nzu ya Simewoni, Levi, Yuda, Isakari, Yozefu na Benyamini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Dore n’abazahagarara ku musozi wa Ebali kugira ngo basabe umuvumo: ni abo mu nzu ya Rubeni, Gadi, Asheri, Zabuloni, Dani na Nefutali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Abalevi bazavuge mu ijwi rirenga babwira Abayisraheli bose bati 
Deuteronomy27:15 «Arabe ikivume umuntu wese uzarema ikigirwamana mu ishusho ribajwe cyangwa rishongeshejwe, — ishyano Uhoraho yanga urunuka, ikintu gikozwe n’umuhanga wabyo — maze akacyimika rwihishwa!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen »." 
Deuteronomy27:16 «Arabe ikivume uzasuzugura se cyangwa nyina!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen». 
Deuteronomy27:17 «Arabe ikivume uzimura imbago z’isambu y’umuturanyi!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen». 
Deuteronomy27:18 «Arabe ikivume uzayobya impumyi inzira!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen». 
Deuteronomy27:19 «Arabe ikivume uzagoreka urubanza rw’umusuhuke w’umunyamahanga, cyangwa urw’imfubyi, cyangwa urw’umupfakazi!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen»." 
Deuteronomy27:20 «Arabe ikivume uzasambana na muka se, kuko azaba amworosoyeho umwenda yoroshwe na se!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen»." 
Deuteronomy27:21 «Arabe ikivume uzasambanya inyamaswa!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen». 
Deuteronomy27:22 «Arabe ikivume uzasambana na mushiki we, yaba uwo basangiye se cyangwa yaba uwo basangiye nyina!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen»." 
Deuteronomy27:23 «Arabe ikivume uzasambana na nyirabukwe!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen». 
Deuteronomy27:24 «Arabe ikivume umuntu uzica mugenzi we rwihishwa!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen». 
Deuteronomy27:25 «Arabe ikivume uzemera ruswa kugira ngo yice umuntu utacumuye!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen». 
Deuteronomy27:26 «Arabe ikivume utazubahiriza amagambo y’iri Tegeko ngo ayakurikize!» Nuko imbaga yose izasubize iti «Amen». 
Deuteronomy28:1 Niwumvira koko ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe, wihatira gukurikiza amategeko yose ngushyikirije uyu munsi, Uhoraho Imana yawe azagusumbisha amahanga yose ari mu gihugu;" 
Deuteronomy28:2 kandi dore imigisha yose izakumanukiraho, iguhame, mu rugero uzaba wumviye ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Uzagirira umugisha mu mugi, uzagirira umugisha no mu gasozi." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Umugisha uzaze ku bana bawe, ku myaka yo mu mirima yawe, ku matungo yawe, ku nka zawe zihaka no ku ntama zawe zonsa." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Umugisha uzaza mu kigega cyawe no mu nkono uvugiramo umutsima. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Uzagira umugisha igihe ugenda n’igihe ugaruka. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Abanzi nibahagurukira kugutera, Uhoraho azatuma batsindirwa imbere yawe; bazaza inzira imwe baguteye, baguhunge baciye inzira ndwi zinyuranye." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Uhoraho azategeka ko umugisha ukubaho, ari mu bigega byawe, ari no mu byo ukora byose, kandi azaguhera umugisha mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Uhoraho azakugira umuryango umweguriwe, nk’uko yabikurahiye, mu rugero uzaba witaye ku mategeko y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, maze ukagenda mu nzira akuyobora." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Amahanga yose ari ku isi azabona yuko witirirwa izina ry’Uhoraho, maze agutinye." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Uhoraho azaguha guhirwa, akugwirize abana, amatungo n’imyaka mu mirima, mu gihugu Uhoraho yarahiye abasokuruza bawe yuko azakiguha." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Uhoraho azagukingurira ibigega bitangaje by’amazi yo mu ijuru rye, maze agushirize imvura igihe cyayo mu gihugu cyawe, ahe umugisha imirimo y’amaboko yawe. Uzajya uguriza amahanga menshi, ariko wowe ntuzakenera kuguza." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Uhoraho azagushyira mu mwanya wa mbere, ntazagushyira mu mwanya wa nyuma; uzahora ujya ejuru nta gusubira hasi, kubera ko uzaba wumviye amategeko y’Uhoraho Imana yawe ngushyikirije uyu munsi kugira ngo uyiteho kandi uyakurikize;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 bityo ukirinda gutanira iburyo cyangwa ibumoso bw’inzira zose ngutegetse uyu munsi, kandi ntiwigere wohoka inyuma y’imana zindi kugira ngo uzikorere." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Ariko nutumvira ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ngo wihatire gukurikiza amategeko ye yose n’amabwiriza ngushyikirije uyu munsi, dore imivumo yose izakuzaho, ikaguhama:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Uzaba ikivume mu mugi, ube ikivume no mu gasozi." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Umuvumo uzaza mu kigega cyawe no mu nkono uvugiramo umutsima. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Umuvumo uzaza mu bana bawe, mu myaka yo mu mirima yawe, mu nka zawe zihaka no mu ntama zawe zonsa." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Uzaba ikivume igihe ugenda n’igihe ugaruka. 
Deuteronomy28:20 Uhoraho azakoherereza umuvumo, ibintu bikura umutima n’ibyago, mu byo uzagerageza gukora byose, kugeza igihe urimbukiye ukazima ako kanya, ku mpamvu y’ibibi uzaba wakoze igihe uncikaho." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Uhoraho azaguteza indwara y’icyorezo izashyira ikaguhitana, ikagutsemba mu gihugu ugiye kwinjiramo ngo ukigarurire." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Uhoraho azaguteza kuma uhagaze, ubuganga, ubupfurute, uburibwe, amapfa, ubugwangare na kagungu; bizagukurikirane kugeza igihe uzimiye." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ijuru ryo hejuru y’umutwe wawe rizahinduka umuringa, ubutaka uhagazeho buhinduke ubutare." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Aho kugusha imvura mu gihugu cyawe, Uhoraho azagusha umukungugu n’umucanga: bizacunshumuke mu ijuru bikugweho, kugeza igihe urimbukiye." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Uhoraho azatuma uneshwa n’ababisha bawe musakiranye: uzaza inzira imwe ubateye, ubahunge uciye inzira ndwi zinyuranye. Ingoma zose zigize icyo gihugu zizakwinuka, ziguhe akato." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Intumbi yawe izaba inyama z’ibisiga byose byo mu kirere, iribwe n’inyamaswa ziri mu gihugu, habure umuntu uza kuzitesha." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Uhoraho azaguteza ibishyute, nka bya bindi byo mu Misiri; kimwe n’amasazi, n’ubuheri, n’uburyaryate utazigera ukira." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Uhoraho azaguteza ibisazi, n’ubuhumyi n’ubuhungetwe." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Ku manywa y’ihangu, uzagenda ushakisha inzira nk’impumyi mu mwijima, unanirwe kugira icyo ugeraho; uzahora uri umuntu unyunyuzwa imitsi gusa kandi unyagwa ibye, habure uza kukurengera." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Uzisabira umugeni, arongorwe n’undi; uziyubakira inzu, woye kuyitahamo; uziterera umuzabibu, woye kurya imbuto zawo zeze mbere." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Inka yawe izabagirwa mu maso yawe, woye kuyiryaho; indogobe yawe izanyagwa ubireba, woye kuyisubizwa; intama zawe zizagabizwa abanzi bawe, habure uza kukurengera." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Abahungu bawe n’abakobwa bawe bazagabizwa undi muryango, amaso yawe ahere mu kirere, ananizwe no kubashakisha buri munsi, nyamara ari nta cyo ushobora kubikoraho na busa." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Imyaka yo ku butaka bwawe n’ibindi bikuvuye mu maboko byose bizaribwa n’undi muryango utazi, nuko uzahore uri umuntu unyunyuzwa imitsi kandi ushikamiwe iteka." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Amaherezo uzasazwa n’ibyo amaso yawe azibonera. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Uhoraho azaguteza kurwara imisozi ku maguru no mu bibero, woye kuyikira: ndetse azabiguteza guhera mu bworo bw’ikirenge bigere mu gitwariro." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Wowe n’umwami uziyimikira, Uhoraho azabajyana mu ihanga mutigeze mumenya, wowe n’abasokuruza bawe, maze nuhagera ukorere imana zindi zakozwe mu biti cyangwa amabuye!" 
Deuteronomy28:37 Mu mahanga yose Uhoraho azakwimuriramo, uzahinduka akarorero, ube iciro ry’imigani, n’urwo baseka." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Uzabiba imbuto nyinshi mu mirima, ariko usarure bike cyane, kubera ko inzige zizabyona byose." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Uzatera imizabibu uyihingire, ariko ntuzanywa divayi yayo; ndetse ari byo ntuziyumya ujya gusoroma imbuto zayo, kuko udusimba tuzarya byose." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Uzagira ibiti by’imizeti mu gihugu cyawe cyose, ariko ntuzabona utuvuta two kwisiga, kuko imizeti yawe izahungura imiteja ikaragarika." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Uzabyara abahungu n’abakobwa, ariko ntuzabagumana, kuko bazajyanwa ari ingaruzwamuheto." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Ibiti byawe byose n’imyaka yo ku butaka bwawe, inzige zizabyigabiza." 
Deuteronomy28:43 Umusuhuke w’umunyamahanga uba muri mwe azagenda akurusha gukira, naho wowe ugende urushaho gutindahara." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Ni we uzajya akuguriza, wowe ubure icyo umuguriza; azagumana umwanya wa mbere, wowe uhere mu mwanya wa nyuma." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Iyo mivumo yose izakuzaho, igukurikirane iguhame, kugeza igihe uzarimbukira, kubera ko uzaba utumviye ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe, ngo wite ku mategeko ye n’amabwiriza yaguhaye." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Iyo mivumo izakugwaho ibe ikimenyetso n’igitangaza, byanditse kuri wowe no ku bagukomokaho uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Kubera ko uzaba utarakoreye Uhoraho Imana yawe ufite umutima wishimye kandi unezerewe igihe wari utunze ibintu byose," 
Deuteronomy28:48 uzakorera abanzi Uhoraho azaguteza, wicwe n’inzara n’inyota, wambare ubusa, ubure ibyo ukeneye byose. Azagereka ku bitugu byawe umutwaro w’urutare kugeza igihe akurimburiye." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Uhoraho azaguteza ihanga riturutse kure cyane, ku mpera z’isi, rize riguruka nk’ikizu: rizaza ari ihanga rivuga ntiwumve," 
Deuteronomy28:50 ihanga rifite amatwara y’urugomo, ritubaha umusaza, ntirigirire umwana imbabazi." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Rizarya amatungo yawe, n’imyaka yo ku butaka bwawe, kugeza igihe uzarimbukira; nta cyo rizagusigira ku myaka yawe y’impeke cyangwa kuri divayi yawe nshya, cyangwa ku mavuta yawe y’imizeti, cyangwa ku nka zawe zihaka cyangwa ku ntama zawe zonsa, kugeza igihe rizakurimburira." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Iryo hanga rizakugariza mu migi yawe yose, kugeza igihe risenyeye inkike zawe ndende kandi zicinyiye, zikikije iyo migi, kandi ari zo wiringiraga, maze ziriduke mu gihugu cyawe cyose. Rizakugariza mu migi yawe yose, mu gihugu cyawe cyose, icyo Uhoraho Imana yawe aguhaye." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Nuko uzarye abana wabyaye, utungwe n’inyama z’abahungu bawe n’abakobwa bawe, Uhoraho Imana yawe azaba yaraguhaye; ibyo bizaba muri icyo gihe uzaba wugarijwe kandi uri mu kaga ushyizwemo n’abanzi bawe." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Umugabo wo muri mwe wadamaraye, kandi wamenyereye kugubwa neza gusa, azarebana imbabazi nke umuvandimwe we, ndetse n’umugore we yapfumbataga, kimwe n’abana be azaba asigaranye," 
Deuteronomy28:55 kugira ngo hatagira n’umwe muri bo aha ku nyama z’abana be azaba ariye, ntagire icyo asigaza na gito: ibyo bizaba muri icyo gihe uzaba wugarijwe kandi uri mu kaga ushyizwemo n’abanzi bawe, mu migi yawe yose." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Umugore wo muri mwe wadamaraye, kandi wamenyereye kugubwa neza gusa, utatinyukaga no gukandagiza ikirenge cye ku butaka ku mpamvu yo kudamarara no kumenyera kugubwa neza gusa, azarebana imbabazi nke umugabo yapfumbataga, kimwe n’umuhungu we n’umukobwa we," 
Deuteronomy28:57 ndetse n’uruhinja amaze kubyara hamwe n’ingobyi yarwo isohotse mu matako ye; kuko muri icyo gihe cyo kubura byose azabyadukira akabirya rwihishwa: ibyo bizaba muri icyo gihe uzaba wugarijwe kandi uri mu kaga ushyizwemo n’abanzi bawe, mu migi yawe yose." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Nutihatira gukurikiza amagambo yose y’iri Tegeko yanditse muri iki gitabo, ngo utinye iri zina ryanjye ryuje ishema kandi riteye ubwoba, ari ryo «UHORAHO IMANA YAWE»," 
Deuteronomy28:59 icyo gihe, wowe n’urubyaro rwawe, Uhoraho azabateza ibyo byago bitangaje, ibyago bikomeye kandi bidahwema, n’indwara mbi cyane zidakira."
