Joshua13:21 bahawe n’imigi yose yo ku murambi, igihugu cyose cya Sihoni, umwami w’Abahemori wategekeraga i Heshiboni, Musa akamwicira hamwe n’abategetsi b’i Madiyani: ari bo Ewi, Rekemi, Suri, Huri na Reba bari batuye mu gihugu bagategekwa na Sihoni." 
Joshua13:22 Mu bo Abayisraheli bishe hari na Balamu mwene Bewori w’umupfumu, bicishije inkota." 
Joshua13:23 Urubibi rwa bene Rubeni rwari Yorudani n’ibiyikikije. Uwo ni wo munani bene Rubeni bahawe, bakurikije amazu yabo, imigi n’imidugudu yabo." 
Joshua13:24 Musa kandi yari yahaye umugabane umuryango wa bene Gadi, akurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua13:25 Intara bahawe ni Yazeri, imigi yose ya Gilihadi n’icya kabiri cy’igihugu cy’Abahamoni kugera i Aroweri, ahateganye na Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 hanyuma bahawe kuva i Heshiboni kugera i Ramati‐Misipa na Betonimi, no kuva i Mahanayimu kugera ku rugabano rwa Lodebari." 
Joshua13:27 Mu kibaya bahawe na Betiharamu, Betinimira, Sukoti, Safoni, ahasigaye h’igihugu cya Sihoni, umwami wa Heshiboni, hamwe na Yorudani n’ibiyikikije kugera ku mpera z’inyanja ya Kinereti, hakurya ya Yorudani, iburasirazuba." 
Joshua13:28 Uwo ni wo munani Bene Gadi bahawe bakurikije amazu yabo, imigi n’imidugudu yabo." 
Joshua13:29 Icya kabiri cy’umuryango wa bene Manase, Musa yari yagihaye umugabane akurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua13:30 Intara bahawe ni uguhera i Mahanayimu, Bashani yose, igihugu cyose cya Ogi, umwami wa Bashani, n’ingando za Yayiri zose zari muri Bashani, byose hamwe biba imigi mirongo itandatu." 
Joshua13:31 Icya kabiri cy’intara ya Gilihadi, hamwe na Ashitaroti na Ediroti, imigi y’igihugu cy’umwami Ogi muri Bashani, byahawe icya kabiri cya bene Makiri, umuhungu wa Manase, bakurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua13:32 Uwo ni wo munani Musa yatanze mu bibaya bya Mowabu hakurya ya Yorudani, mu burasirazuba bwa Yeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Ariko Musa nta munani yahaye bene Levi; Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli ni we munani wabo nk’uko yari yabibabwiye." 
Joshua14:1 Dore ibyo Abayisraheli barazwe mu gihugu cya Kanahani, ibyo umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, Yozuwe mwene Nuni, n’abakuru b’amazu yo mu miryango ya Israheli babahayeho umurage." 
Joshua14:2 Bahabwaga umunani wabo hakoreshejwe ubufindo, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yatumye Musa kugira ngo abitegeke imiryango cyenda na kimwe cya kabiri cy’umuryango, itari yarawuhawe." 
Joshua14:3 Koko rero indi miryango ibiri na kimwe cya kabiri cy’undi muryango, Musa yari yarabahaye umunani wabo hakurya ya Yorudani. Abalevi, bo, nta munani bahawe mu bandi." 
Joshua14:4 Bene Yozefu bari bagabanijwemo imiryango ibiri, uwa Manase n’uwa Efurayimu; naho Abalevi nta wundi mugabane bahawe mu gihugu, uretse imigi yo kubamo n’imirima rusange yayo, kubera amatungo n’ibintu byabo." 
Joshua14:5 Abayisraheli bagenjeje nk’uko Uhoraho yategetse Musa, maze bigabanya igihugu." 
Joshua14:6 Bene Yuda baza kwa Yozuwe i Giligali, maze Kalebu mwene Yefune w’Umukenizi aramubwira ati «Uzi neza ibinyerekeyeho Uhoraho yabwiriye Musa, umuntu w’Imana, i Kadeshi‐Barineya." 
Joshua14:7 Ubwo Musa, umugaragu w’Imana, ari i Kadeshi‐Barineya, yanyohereje gutata iki gihugu, nari mfite imyaka mirongo ine kandi mugezaho ibyo yari yantumye nta buryarya." 
Joshua14:8 Nyamara abavandimwe twazamukanye baciye rubanda intege, naho jyewe, nkurikira ubutizigama Uhoraho, Imana yanjye." 
Joshua14:9 Uwo munsi Musa yarahiye atya ’Ndahiye yuko igihugu wakandagiyemo kizaba umunani wawe, n’uw’abana bawe ubuziraherezo, kuko wakurikiye ubutizigama Uhoraho, Imana yanjye.’" 
Joshua14:10 None dore, Uhoraho yanyihereye kuramba nk’uko yabinsezeranyije. Aho Uhoraho abwiriye Musa iryo jambo, igihe Israheli yari mu butayu, hashize imyaka mirongo ine n’itanu; none dore ubu nujuje imyaka mirongo inani n’itanu." 
Joshua14:11 Ingufu nsigaranye, ni nk’izo nari mfite ubwo Musa anyohereje mu butumwa; imbaraga mfite ubu zirangana n’izo nari mfite icyo gihe, haba mu kurwana, haba no mu gukora." 
Joshua14:12 Uriya musozi rero, Uhoraho yavuze uwo munsi hita uwumpa. Uwo munsi kandi wumvise ko hari hatuye Abanaki, hakaba n’imigi minini ikomeye; Uhoraho namfasha nk’uko Uhoraho yabivuze, nzahabanyaga.»" 
Joshua14:13 Yozuwe aha Kalebu, mwene Yefune, umugisha, amuha Heburoni ho umunani." 
Joshua14:14 Ni cyo gituma Kalebu, mwene Yefune w’Umukenizi, yahawe Heburoni ho umunani kugeza na n’ubu, kuko yakurikiye n’ubutizigama Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
Joshua14:15 Izina rya mbere rya Heburoni ryari KiriyatiAruba: Aruba uwo yari yarabaye umugabo w’ikirangirire mu Banaki. Ahasigaye igihugu kiratuza, intambara irahosha." 
Joshua15:1 Dore umugabane w’umuryango wa bene Yuda, bakurikije amazu yabo: wageraga ahagana ku rubibi rwa Edomu mu butayu bwa Sini muri Negevu, mu majyepfo." 
Joshua15:2 Urubibi rwabo mu majyepfo rwavaga ku mpera y’Inyanja y’Umunyu, kuva ku kigobe kiri ahateganye na Negevu," 
Joshua15:3 rugakomeza rugana mu majyepfo y’umuzamuko w’ Akarabimu rukanyura i Sini, maze rukazamukira mu majyepfo ya Kadeshi‐Barineya. Hanyuma urwo rubibi runyura i Hesironi, rukazamukana i Adari maze rugahindukira rugana i Karika," 
Joshua15:4 rukanyura i Asimoni rugakomeza ku kagezi ka Misiri, maze rugaca ku nyanja. Urwo ni rwo rubibi rwabo mu majyepfo." 
Joshua15:5 Mu burasirazuba, urubibi rwari Inyanja y’Umunyu kugeza ku mpera ya Yorudani. Mu majyaruguru, urubibi rwabo rwavaga ku kigobe cy’Inyanja y’Umunyu, aho Yorudani iyiroheramo," 
Joshua15:6 rukazamuka rugana i Betihogila, rugaca mu majyaruguru ya Betaraba, rugakomeza ku ibuye rya Bohani mwene Rubeni." 
Joshua15:7 Hanyuma rwakomezaga kuzamuka rugana i Debiri, rugaca mu kibaya cya Akori, maze mu majyaruguru rukerekeza ku Ruziga rw’Amabuye, ahateganye n’inzira izamuka ijya i Adumimu, mu majyepfo y’akagezi. Rwacaga hafi y’amazi ya Enishemeshi, rukagarukira Eni‐Rogeli." 
Joshua15:8 Urubibi rwazamukaga ku mukokwe wa Beni‐Hinomu mu ibanga ryo mu majyepfo y’Abayebuzi — ni ukuvuga Yeruzalemu —, hanyuma rukazamuka kugera mu mpinga y’umusozi uteganye n’umukokwe wa Hinomu mu burengerazuba, ku mpera y’ikibaya cy’Abarefayimu mu majyaruguru." 
Joshua15:9 Urubibi rugahindukirira mu mpinga y’umusozi kugera mu majyaruguru, ku isoko y’amazi y’i Nefitowa, rugakomeza no ku migi yo ku musozi wa Efuroni, rugahindukira rwerekera i Bahala, ari yo Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu." 
Joshua15:10 Kuva Bahala, urubibi rwerekeraga mu burengerazuba rugana ku musozi wa Seyiri, rugaca mu ibanga ry’umusozi w’Amashyamba mu majyaruguru — uwo musozi ni Kasaloni —, rukamanuka i Betishemeshi maze rukanyura i Timuna." 
Joshua15:11 Urubibi rugakomeza mu ibanga rya Ekironi mu majyaruguru, rugahindukirira i Shikaroni, rukarenga umusozi wa Bahala, rugakomeza i Yabuneyeli maze rukagarukira ku nyanja." 
Joshua15:12 Urubibi rwo mu burengerazuba, rwari Inyanja Nini n’ahayikikije. Ngiyo, mu mpande zose, intara ya bene Yuda, bakurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua15:13 Kalebu, mwene Yefune, yahawe umunani muri bene Yuda, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse Yozuwe. Uwo munani ni Kiriyati‐Aruba, — ari yo Heburoni —; Aruba uwo yari se wa Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebu ahanyaga bene Aruba uko ari batatu: Sheshayi, Ahimani na Talamayi, bakomokaga kuri Anaki." 
Joshua15:15 Yavuye aho, ajya gutera abaturage b’i Debiri; kera Debiri yitwaga Kiriyati‐Seferi." 
Joshua15:16 Kalebu ni ko kuvuga ati «Uzatsinda Kiriyati‐Seferi, nzamuha umukobwa wanjye Akisha, amugire umugore.»" 
Joshua15:17 Nuko Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi, umuvandimwe wa Kalebu, yigarurira umugi, maze Kalebu amushyingira umukobwa we Akisha." 
Joshua15:18 Akigera mu rugo, Akisha yoshya umugabo we gusaba sebukwe umurima. Hanyuma ava ku ndogobe ye, ahindukirira se; Kalebu aramubaza ati «Ni iki wifuza?»" 
Joshua15:19 Umukobwa we aramusubiza ati «Nkundira wumve icyo ngusaba. Ubwo untuje mu butayu bwa Negevu, mpa n’ibizenga.» Nuko Kalebu amuha ibizenga bya ruguru n’iby’epfo." 
Joshua15:20 Ng’uwo umunani wa Bene Yuda, bakurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua15:21 Imigi yo ku mpera z’urubibi rw’umuryango wa bene Yuda, ahagana ku rubibi rwa Edomu muri Negevu yari: Kabuseyeli, Ederi, Yaguri," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, Adeyada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedeshi, Hasori, Yitinani," 
Joshua15:24 Zifu, Telemu, Beyaloti," 
Joshua15:25 Hasori‐Hadata, Keriyoti‐Hesironi ari yo Hasori," 
Joshua15:26 Amamu, Shema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Hasari‐Gada, Heshimoni, Betipeleti," 
Joshua15:28 Hasari‐Shuwali, Berisheba, Biziyoteya," 
Joshua15:29 Bahala, Iyimu, Esemu," 
Joshua15:30 Elitolada, Kesili, Horima," 
Joshua15:31 Sikilagi, Madimana, Sansana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebayoti, Shilehimu, Ayini, Rimoni: yose hamwe ni imigi makumyabiri n’icyenda, utabariyemo imidugudu iyikikije." 
Joshua15:33 Dore imigi yabo yo mu ntara y’Imirambi: Eshitayola, Soreya, Ashina," 
Joshua15:34 Zanuwa, Eniganimu, Tapuwa, Enami," 
Joshua15:35 Yarimuti, Adulamu, Soko, Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 Sharayimu, Aditayimu, Gedera na Gederotayimu: imigi cumi n’ine n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:37 Senani, Hadasha, Migidali‐Gadi," 
Joshua15:38 Dileyani, Misipe, Yokiteli," 
Joshua15:39 Lakishi, Bosikati, Egiloni," 
Joshua15:40 Kaboni, Lahimasi, Kitilishi," 
Joshua15:41 Gederoti, Betidagoni, Nahama, Makeda: imigi cumi n’itandatu n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:42 Libuna, Etera, Ashani," 
Joshua15:43 Yifitahi, Ashina, Nesibu," 
Joshua15:44 Keyila, Akizibu, Maresha: imigi icyenda n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:45 Ekironi, n’imigi yagengwaga na yo n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:46 Kuva Ekironi ugana mu burengerazuba, imigi yo hafi ya Ashidodi yose n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:47 Ashidodi, n’imigi yagengwaga na yo n’imidugudu yayo yose. Gaza, n’imigi igengwa na yo n’imidugudu yayo kugera ku kagezi ka Misiri, Inyanja Nini ikabibera urubibi." 
Joshua15:48 Mu misozi: Shamiri, Yatiri, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kiriyati‐Seferi ari yo Debiri," 
Joshua15:50 Anabu, Eshitemo, Animu," 
Joshua15:51 Gosheni, Holoni, Gilo; imigi cumi n’umwe n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:52 Arabu, Duma, Esheyani," 
Joshua15:53 Yanumu, Betitapuwa, Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 Humeta, Kiriyati‐Aruba ari yo Heburoni, Siyori: imigi cyenda n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:55 Mawoni, Karumeli, Zifu, Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 Yizireyeli, Yokideyamu, Zanowa," 
Joshua15:57 Kayini, Gibeya, Timuna: imigi cumi n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:58 Halihuli, Betisuri, Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 Marati, Betanoti, Elitekoni: imigi itandatu n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriyati‐Behali, ari yo Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu, Raba: imigi ibiri n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:61 Mu butayu: Betaraba, Midini, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibushani, Irimelahi, Enigadi: imigi itandatu n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua15:63 Naho Abayebuzi bari batuye i Yeruzalemu, bene Yuda ntibashoboye kubambura ibyabo; Abayebuzi rero baturanye na bene Yuda i Yeruzalemu kugeza na n’ubu." 
Joshua16:1 Umugabane wa bene Yozefu waheraga kuri Yorudani hafi ya Yeriko; mu burasirazuba bw’amazi ya Yeriko, bwari ubutayu buva i Yeriko bugana ku musozi wa Beteli." 
Joshua16:2 Washoraga uva i Beteli ugana i Luzi, unyuze ku rubibi rw’Abariki, i Ataroti," 
Joshua16:3 ukamanuka ahagana ku rubibi rw’Abayafuleti mu burengerazuba, kugera ku ntara ya Betihoroni y’epfo no kugera i Gezeri, ukagarurwa n’inyanja." 
Joshua16:4 Bene Yozefu, Manase na Efurayimu, bahabwa batyo umunani wabo." 
Joshua16:5 Dore urubibi rwa bene Efurayimu, bakurikije amazu yabo: urubibi rw’umunani wabo mu burasirazuba, rwari Ataroti‐Adari kugera i Betihoroni ya ruguru." 
Joshua16:6 Mu burengerazuba, urubibi rwararomborezaga n’i Mikimetati mu majyaruguru, maze rwagera i Tanaki‐Silo rukerekera mu burasirazuba rugana i Yanoha." 
Joshua16:7 Hanyuma rukamanuka i Yanoha rugana i Ataroti na Nara no kuri Yeriko, maze rugakomeza no kuri Yorudani." 
Joshua16:8 Kuva Tapuwa, urubibi rwerekeraga mu burengerazuba ku kagezi ka Kana, maze rukagera ku nyanja. Nguwo umunani w’umuryango wa bene Efurayimu, uko amazu yabo yanganaga," 
Joshua16:9 hatabariwemo nanone imigi bari bafite mu munani wa bene Manase; ngiyo imigi yabo yose n’imidugudu yayo. 
Joshua16:10 Abakanahani bari batuye i Gezeri ntibabanyaze ibyabo; bityo bakomeza guturana na bene Efurayimu kugeza na n’ubu, uretse ko babakoreshaga imirimo y’uburetwa." 
Joshua17:1 Dore umugabane w’umuryango wa bene Manase, wari imfura ya Yozefu. Makiri, wari imfura ya Manase, akaba na se wa Gilihadi, yahawe intara ya Gilihadi n’iya Bashani, abikesheje ubutwari bwe ku rugamba." 
Joshua17:2 Dore umugabane wa bene Manase bandi, bakurikije amazu yabo, ari bo bene Abiyezeri, bene Heleki, bene Asiriyeli, bene Shekemu, bene Heferi na bene Shemida, ni ukuvuga abahungu bakomoka kuri Manase mwene Yozefu, bakurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua17:3 Selofehadi, mwene Heferi, mwene Gilihadi, mwene Makiri wa Manase, nta muhungu yagiraga, ahubwo yari afite abakobwa gusa, ari bo: Mahala, Nowa, Hogila, Milika na Tirisa." 
Joshua17:4 Baza imbere ya Eleyazari, umuherezabitambo, imbere ya Yozuwe mwene Nuni, n’imbere y’abakuru b’imiryango, maze barababwira bati «Uhoraho yategetse Musa kuduha umugabane mu bavandimwe bacu!» Nuko ku bw’itegeko ry’Uhoraho, babaha umunani muri bene se wabo." 
Joshua17:5 Imigabane yahawe Manase ni icumi, badashyizemo igihugu cya Gilihadi na Bashani biri hakurya ya Yorudani." 
Joshua17:6 Koko kandi, abakobwa ba Manase bahawe umunani kimwe n’abahungu be, ariko igihugu cya Gilihadi kiba icy’abandi bahungu ba Manase." 
Joshua17:7 Urubibi rwa Manase rwavaga kuri Asheri, i Mikimetati, ahateganye na Sikemu, rukagana i Yamini mu baturage b’i Enitapuwa." 
Joshua17:8 Manase yari afite igihugu cya Tapuwa, ariko Tapuwa yo ku rubibi rwa Manase yari iya bene Efurayimu." 
Joshua17:9 Urubibi rukamanuka no ku kagezi ka Kana. Imigi yo hepfo y’ako kagezi yari iya Efurayimu, uretse ya yindi Efurayimu yari afite rwagati mu munani wa Manase. Urubibi rwa Manase rwari ruguru y’akagezi kandi rukerekera ku nyanja." 
Joshua17:10 Mu majyepfo yako hari aha Efurayimu, mu majyaruguru hakaba aha Manase; iburengerazuba bombi bakagarurwa n’inyanja. Bari babangikanye na Asheri mu majyaruguru, na Isakari mu burasirazuba." 
Joshua17:11 Mu munani wa Isakari no mu munani wa Asheri, Manase yari ahafite Betishani n’imidugudu yayo, Yibuleyamu n’imidugudu yayo, abaturage b’i Dori, Tanaki na Megido, n’imidugudu y’iyo migi itatu yubatswe ahirengeye." 
Joshua17:12 Nyamara bene Manase ntibashoboye kwigarurira iyo migi, bituma Abakanahani bakomeza gutura muri icyo gihugu." 
Joshua17:13 Abayisraheli bamaze gukomera, bakoresheje Abakanahani imirimo y’uburetwa, ariko ntibashobora kubanyaga ibyabo." 
Joshua17:14 Bene Yozefu babwira Yozuwe bati «Kuki waduhaye umugabane umwe kandi turi imbaga nyamwinshi, tubikesheje umugisha Uhoraho yaduhaye?»" 
Joshua17:15 Yozuwe arabasubiza ati «Ubwo muri benshi, nimuzamuke mujye mu ishyamba, maze mwikebere igikingi mu gihugu cy’Abaperizi no mu Barefayimu, kubera ko umusozi wa Efurayimu wababanye muto.»" 
Joshua17:16 Bene Yozefu baramusubiza bati «Umusozi ntuteze kuzatubumba, unakubitiyeho ko Abakanahani bose bo mu kibaya bafite amagare y’ibyuma, kimwe n’abatuye i Betishani n’imidugudu yayo, ndetse n’abo mu kibaya cya Yizireyeli.»" 
Joshua17:17 Nuko Yozuwe abwira umuryango wa Yozefu, — ari wo Efurayimu na Manase —, ati «Muri benshi, n’ingufu zanyu ni nyinshi; ntimukwiye umugabane umwe gusa." 
Joshua17:18 Ahubwo muzagira umusozi muremure n’ubwo ari ishyamba bwose; muzarikonde kandi muharinde. Abakanahani muzabanyage ibyabo, n’ubwo bafite amagare y’ibyuma bwose kandi bakaba banakomeye.»" 
Joshua18:1 Umuryango w’Abayisraheli wose ukoranira i Silo, maze bahashinga Ihema ry’ibonaniro. Igihugu cyari kimaze kubayoboka." 
Joshua18:2 Mu Bayisraheli hari hasigaye imiryango irindwi itarabona umunani. 
Joshua18:3 Yozuwe abwira Abayisraheli, ati «Mutegereje iki kugira ngo mujye kwigarurira igihugu, Uhoraho, Imana ya basokuru, yabahaye?" 
Joshua18:4 Nimugene abantu batatu muri buri muryango mbohereze. Bazahaguruka bagende igihugu cyose, bagenzure imiterere y’izo ntara maze baze babimenyeshe." 
Joshua18:5 Bazahagabanamo karindwi: Yuda azaguma mu ntara ye yo mu majyepfo, inzu ya Yozefu izagume mu yayo, mu majyaruguru." 
Joshua18:6 Mwebwe rero, muzasuzume uko icyo igihugu twakigabanyamo iminani irindwi, maze muze kubimenyesha. Nanjye nzakibagabanyisha ubufindo, hano imbere y’Uhoraho, Imana yanyu." 
Joshua18:7 Ariko Abalevi nta mugabane bazahabwa muri mwe, kuko umunani wabo ari ubuherezabitambo bw’Uhoraho. Naho Gadi, Rubeni n’icya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase, babonye mu burasirazuba, hakurya ya Yorudani, umunani bahawe na Musa, umugaragu w’Uhoraho.»" 
Joshua18:8 Abo bantu barahaguruka, baragenda. Yozuwe aha iri tegeko abari bagiye kwitegereza igihugu, ati «Mugende muzenguruke igihugu, mugenzure uko kimeze, maze mugaruke. Nzakibagabanyisha ubufindo imbere y’Uhoraho, hano i Silo.»" 
Joshua18:9 Abo bantu barahaguruka, bambukiranya igihugu cyose, maze bakigabanyamo imigabane irindwi bakurikije imigi, babikorera inyandiko. Hanyuma bagaruka mu ngando kwa Yozuwe i Silo." 
Joshua18:10 Yozuwe abakorera ubufindo imbere y’Uhoraho, i Silo, maze igihugu akigabanya Abayisraheli akurikije uko imiryango yabo ingana." 
Joshua18:11 Ubufindo bugenera umuryango wa Benyamini, bukurikije inzu zabo. Intara ubufindo bwabageneye yari hagati y’iya bene Yuda n’iya bene Yozefu." 
Joshua18:12 Mu majyaruguru, urubibi rwabo rwageraga kuri Yorudani, rukazamukira mu ibanga rya Yeriko mu majyaruguru, rukazamuka umusozi rugana mu burengerazuba, maze rukagarukira ku butayu i Betaweni." 
Joshua18:13 Urubibi rugaca aho rugana i Luzi, mu ibanga ry’amajyepfo ya Luzi — ari yo Beteli —, rukamanuka kuva Atarotadari, iri mu mpinga y’umusozi mu majyepfo ya Betihoroni y’epfo." 
Joshua18:14 Hanyuma urubibi rugahindukira, rukerekera ku ruhande rw’iburengerazuba hagana mu majyepfo, kuva ku musozi uteganye na Betihoroni mu majyepfo, maze rugahagararira i Kiriyati‐Behali, ari yo Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu, umugi wa bene Yuda. Ubwo ni uburengerazuba." 
Joshua18:15 Mu majyepfo, urubibi rwaheraga i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu rugakomeza mu burengerazuba, ahagana ku isoko y’amazi y’i Mefitoya." 
Joshua18:16 Rwamanukaga rugana ku mpera y’umusozi uteganye n’umukokwe w’i Betihinomu, uri mu kibaya cy’Abarefayimu, mu majyaruguru. Rukamanuka umukokwe w’i Hinomu mu ibanga ry’epfo ry’Abayebuzi, maze rukerekeza i Enirogeli." 
Joshua18:17 Rwakomezaga mu majyaruguru, maze rukagera i Enishemeshi n’i Galiloti, ahateganye n’ahazamuka hagana i Adumini, hanyuma rukamanukana ku Ibuye rya Bohani, mwene Rubeni." 
Joshua18:18 Rwanyuraga mu ibanga rya ruguru ahateganye na Araba, rukamanuka rugana Araba nyine." 
Joshua18:19 Urubibi rwanyuraga mu ibanga rya Betihogila mu majyaruguru, maze rukagarukira ku kigobe cy’Inyanja y’Umunyu mu majyaruguru, ku mpera y’amajyepfo ya Yorudani. Urwo ni urubibi rw’amajyepfo." 
Joshua18:20 Urubibi mu burasirazuba rwari Yorudani. Nguwo umunani wa bene Benyamini, bakurikije amazu yabo, hamwe n’imbibi zawo ku mpande zose." 
Joshua18:21 Imigi y’umuryango wa bene Benyamini, bakurikije amazu yabo, yari: Yeriko, Betihogila, Emekesisi," 
Joshua18:22 Betaraba, Semarayimu, Beteli," 
Joshua18:23 Avimu, Para, Ofura," 
Joshua18:24 Kefaramoni, Ofini, Geba: imigi cumi n’ibiri n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua18:25 Gibewoni, Rama, Beyeroti," 
Joshua18:26 Misipa, Kefira, Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 Rekimu, Yiripeyeli, Tareyala," 
Joshua18:28 Selahefili, Yebuzi ari yo Yeruzalemu, Gibeya, na Kiriyati: imigi cumi n’ine n’imidugudu yayo. Uwo ni wo munani wa bene Benyamini, bakurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua19:1 Ubwa kabiri, ubufindo bwerekanye ko haramukiwe Simewoni, umuryango wa bene Simewoni, hakurikijwe amazu yabo. Umunani wabo wari rwagati mu mugabane wa bene Yuda." 
Joshua19:2 Mu munani wabo bahawe: Berisheba, Sheba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Hasari‐Shuwali, Bala, Esemu," 
Joshua19:4 Elitoladi, Betuli, Horima," 
Joshua19:5 Sikilagi, Betimarikaboti, Hasori‐Susa," 
Joshua19:6 Betilebawoti, Sharuheni: imigi cumi n’itatu n’imidugudu yayo;" 
Joshua19:7 Hayini, Rimoni, Eteri na Ashani; imigi ine n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:8 Bahawe n’imidugudu yose ikikije iyo migi kugera i Bahalati‐Beyeri, ari yo Ramati y’epfo. Uwo ni wo mugabane wa bene Simewoni, ukurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua19:9 Umunani wa bene Simewoni wafashwe ku wa bene Yuda, kuko umugabane wa bene Yuda wari munini kuri bo. Uko rero ni ko bene Simewoni babonye umunani wabo rwagati muri bene Yuda." 
Joshua19:10 Ubwa gatatu, ubufindo bwerekana bene Zabuloni, nk’uko amazu yabo ameze. Urubibi rw’umunani wabo rwageraga i Saridi," 
Joshua19:11 rukazamuka rugana mu burengerazuba n’i Maryala, rugakora kuri Dabesheti, hanyuma ku kagezi gateganye na Yokineyamu." 
Joshua19:12 Kuva i Saridi, rwarahindukiraga rukerekeza mu burasirazuba, aho izuba rirasira, ku rubibi rwa Kisiloti‐Taboru, rugakomeza rugana i Daberati maze rukazamuka n’i Yafiya." 
Joshua19:13 Kuva aho, rukanyura mu burasirazuba i Gatiheferi, i Itakasini, rugakomeza n’i Rimoni maze rugahindukira rugana i Neya." 
Joshua19:14 Mu majyaruguru, urubibi rwazengurukaga Hanatoni, rugaherera ku mukokwe w’i Yefitaheli;" 
Joshua19:15 hamwe na Katati, Nahalali, Shimironi, Yideyala, Betelehemu: imigi cumi n’ibiri n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:16 Uwo ni wo munani wa bene Zabuloni, bakurikije amazu yabo: iyo ni yo migi yabo n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:17 Ubwa kane, ubufindo bwaguye kuri Isakari, abahungu ba Isakari bakurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua19:18 Urubibi rwabo rwaganaga i Yizireyeli, Kesuloti, Shunemu," 
Joshua19:19 Hafarayimu, Shiyoni, Anarahati," 
Joshua19:20 Rabiti, Kishyoni, Ebesi," 
Joshua19:21 Remeti, Eniganimu, Enihada, Betipasesi." 
Joshua19:22 Urubibi rwakoraga kuri Taboru, Shahasima, Betishemeshi maze rukagarukira kuri Yorudani: imigi cumi n’itandatu n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:23 Uwo ni wo munani wa bene Isakari nk’uko amazu yabo angana: iyo ni yo migi yabo n’imidugudu yayo. 
Joshua19:24 Ubwa gatanu, ubufindo buhira umuryango wa bene Asheri nk’uko amazu yabo angana." 
Joshua19:25 Urubibi rwabo rwari Helekati, Hali, Beteni, Akishafi," 
Joshua19:26 Alameleki, Ameyadi, Misheyali; rwageraga kuri Karumeli mu burengerazuba, n’i Shihori‐Libinati." 
Joshua19:27 Hanyuma rukagarukira mu burasirazuba rugana i Betidagoni, rugakora kuri Zabuloni no ku mukoke w’i Yifitaheli, mu majyaruguru ya Betemeki na Nehiyeli; rugakomeza ibumoso rugana i Kabuli," 
Joshua19:28 Eburoni, Rehobu, Hamoni na Kana, kugera kuri Sidoni nini." 
Joshua19:29 Urubibi rwahindukiraga rwerekera i Rama, kugera ku kigo cy’i Tiri, maze rugakomeza rugana i Hoza no ku nyanja, mu karere ka Akizibu;" 
Joshua19:30 hamwe na Ako, Afeki, Rehobu: imigi makumyabiri n’ibiri n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:31 Uwo ni wo munani w’umuryango wa bene Asheri bakurikije inzu zabo, iyo ni yo migi yabo n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:32 Ubwa gatandatu, ubufindo bufata bene Nefutali bakurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua19:33 Urubibi rwabo rwaheraga i Helefi no kuva i Eloni, runyuze i Sananimu, i Adami‐Nekebu, i Yebuneyeli kugera i Lakumu, rukagarurwa na Yorudani." 
Joshua19:34 Urubibi rwahindukiraga rwerekera mu burengerazuba i Azinoti‐Taboru, rukahava rukomeza i Hukoki. Rwakoraga kuri Zabuloni mu majyepfo no kuri Asheri mu burengerazuba, hanyuma rugakora kuri Yorudani mu burasirazuba." 
Joshua19:35 Imigi yabo izitiwe yari: Sidimu, Seri, Hamati, Rakati, Kinereti," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Hasori," 
Joshua19:37 Kedeshi, Edereyi, Enihasori," 
Joshua19:38 Yireyoni, Migideli, Horemu, Betanata, Betishemeshi: imigi cumi n’icyenda n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:39 Uwo ni wo munani w’umuryango wa bene Nefutali bakurikije amazu yabo, iyo ni yo migi yabo n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:40 Ubwa karindwi, ubufindo bwerekana umuryango wa bene Dani, bakurikije amazu yabo." 
Joshua19:41 Urubibi rw’umunani wabo rwari Soreya, Eshitayoli, Irishemeshi," 
Joshua19:42 Shalabimu, Ayaloni, Yitila," 
Joshua19:43 Eloni, Timuna, Ekironi," 
Joshua19:44 Eliteke, Gibetoni, Balati," 
Joshua19:45 Yehudi, Beneberaki, Gatirimoni," 
Joshua19:46 amazi ya Yarukoni, Rakoni, ndetse n’intara iteganye na Yafa." 
Joshua19:47 Ariko iyo ntara, bene Dani ntibayigarurira, ahubwo barazamuka batera Leshemu, maze barayitsinda. Abaturage baho babamarira ku icumu, maze barahigarurira. Barahatuye kandi Leshemu bayita Dani, bayitiriye umukurambere wabo, Dani." 
Joshua19:48 Uwo ni wo munani w’umuryango wa bene Dani, bakurikije amazu yabo, iyo ni yo migi yabo n’imidugudu yayo." 
Joshua19:49 Bamaze kugabanya igihugu bakurikije imbibi zacyo, Abayisraheli bahaye Yozuwe mwene Nuni, umunani muri bo." 
Joshua19:50 Nk’uko itegeko ry’Uhoraho ryabivugaga, bamuhaye umunani yari yarasabye, ari wo Timunati‐Seraki, mu misozi ya Efurayimu. Umugi arawuvugurura, maze awuturamo." 
Joshua19:51 Iyo ni yo migabane, Eleyazari umuherezabitambo, Yozuwe mwene Nuni, n’abakuru b’imiryango y’Abayisraheli batanze bakoresheje ubufindo, imbere y’Uhoraho i Silo, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Barangiza batyo kwigabanya igihugu." 
Joshua20:1 Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe, ati «Bwira utya Abayisraheli" 
Joshua20:2 ’Nimwigenere imigi y’ubuhungiro nabasezeranyije, ntumye Musa." 
Joshua20:3 Aho ni ho uzaba yishe umuntu atabishaka azajya ashobora guhungira, kandi izababere ubuhungiro kugira ngo murokoke umuhozi w’amaraso." 
Joshua20:4 Umwishi azajya ahungira muri umwe muri iyo migi, ahagarare mu marembo y’umugi, maze atekerereze ibye abakuru bawo, na bo bamwakire mu mugi iruhande rwabo, bamuhe aho ashobora gutura hamwe na bo." 
Joshua20:5 Umuhozi w’amaraso namukurikirana, ntibashobora kumumugabiza kuko yishe mugenzi we atabishaka, akaba atabigiranye urwango asanganywe." 
Joshua20:6 Azatura muri uwo mugi kugeza ubwo azaba yaciriwe urubanza imbere y’umuryango, kugeza kandi ubwo umuherezabitambo uzaba ariho icyo gihe apfuye; ubwo rero umwishi azagaruke iwe, mu mugi yahunze avamo.’»" 
Joshua20:7 Batoranya rero Kedeshi muri Galileya, mu misozi ya Nefutali, Sikemu mu misozi ya Efurayimu, na KiriyatiHaruba, ari yo Heburoni, mu misozi ya Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Hakurya ya Yorudani, mu burasirazuba bwa Yeriko, batoranya Beseri, yo mu mirambi y’ubutayu, mu muryango wa Rubeni, Ramoti ya Gilihadi yo mu muryango wa Gadi, na Golani muri Bashani ho mu muryango wa Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Iyo ni yo migi yashyiriweho Abayisraheli bose n’abasuhuke babarimo, kugira ngo ibe ubuhungiro bw’umuntu uzaba yishe atabishaka; bityo azabashe kurokoka umuhozi w’amaraso, mbere y’uko atungurwa imbere y’ikoraniro." 
Joshua21:1 Abakuru b’umuryango w’Abalevi basanga umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, Yozuwe mwene Nuni, n’abakuru b’inzu z’imiryango y’Abayisraheli." 
Joshua21:2 Bababwirira i Silo mu gihugu cya Kanahani, bati «Uhoraho, abitumye Musa, yategetse ko muduha imigi yo kubamo, n’imirima rusange kubera amatungo yacu.»" 
Joshua21:3 Nuko ku minani yabo, Abayisraheli baha Abalevi iyi migi ikurikira n’imirima rusange yayo, uko Uhoraho yabitegetse." 
Joshua21:4 Ubufindo bwerekanye amazu ya bene Kehati: nuko mu Balevi igice cya bene Aroni umuherezabitambo bahabwa imigi cumi n’itatu ivuye mu munani w’umuryango wa Yuda, mu wa Simewoni, no mu wa Benyamini." 
Joshua21:5 Abandi bahungu ba Kehati bahawe n’ubufindo imigi cumi ivuye mu munani w’umuryango wa Efurayimu, mu wa Dani, no mu w’igice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase." 
Joshua21:6 Bene Gerishoni bahawe hakoreshejwe ubufindo imigi cumi n’itatu muri Bashani ivuye mu munani w’umuryango wa Isakari, mu wa Asheri, mu wa Nefutali no mu w’igice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase." 
Joshua21:7 Bene Merari, ukurikije amazu yabo, babonye imigi cumi n’ibiri yo mu munani w’umuryango wa Rubeni, mu wa Gadi no mu wa Zabuloni." 
Joshua21:8 Abayisraheli bahaye Abalevi iyo migi n’imirima rusange yayo, bakoresheje ubufindo, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabitegetse, abitumye Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Mu muryango wa Yuda no mu muryango wa Simewoni batanze iyi migi ikurikira. 
Joshua21:10 Bene Aroni, mwene Kehati, wa Levi, begukanye umugabane wa mbere." 
Joshua21:11 Bahawe Kiriyati‐Haruba, ari yo Heburoni yo mu misozi ya Yuda, hamwe n’imirima rusange iyikikije; Haruba uwo yari se wa Anoki." 
Joshua21:12 Ariko imirima y’uwo mugi n’imidugudu yawo byahawe Kalebu, mwene Yefune." 
Joshua21:13 Bene Aroni umuherezabitambo, bahawe Heburoni, wa mugi w’ubuhungiro bw’umwishi, n’imirima rusange yayo, banahabwa Libuna n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:14 Yatiri n’imirima rusange yayo, Eshitenowa n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:15 Holoni n’imirima rusange yayo, Debiri n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:16 Hayini n’imirima rusange yayo, Yuta n’imirima rusange yayo, Betishemeshi n’imirima rusange yayo: yose hamwe ni imigi cyenda yafashwe ku munani w’iyo miryango yombi." 
Joshua21:17 Mu muryango wa Benyamini batanze iyi migi: Gibewoni n’imirima rusange yayo, Geba n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:18 Anatoti n’imirima rusange yayo, Alimoni n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ine." 
Joshua21:19 Imigi yose hamwe abaherezabitambo bene Aroni bahawe, ni cumi n’itatu n’imirima rusange yayo." 
Joshua21:20 Amazu y’Abalevi bene Kehati bandi, ubufindo bwayahesheje iyi migi yo mu muryango wa Efurayimu:" 
Joshua21:21 Sikemu, wa mugi w’ubuhungiro bw’umwishi uri mu misozi ya Efurayimu n’imirima rusange yayo, Gezeri n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:22 Kibisayimu n’imirima rusange yayo, Betihoroni n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ine." 
Joshua21:23 Mu muryango wa Dani batanze iyi migi: Eliteke n’imirima rusange yayo, Gibetoni n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:24 Ayaloni n’imirima rusange yayo, Gatirimoni n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ine." 
Joshua21:25 Kuri kimwe cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase, batanze Tanaki n’imirima rusange yayo, Gatirimoni n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ibiri." 
Joshua21:26 Imigi yose hamwe bene Kehati bandi bahawe ni icumi n’imirima rusange yayo. 
Joshua21:27 Bene Gerishoni bo mu mazu y’Abalevi bahawe Golani ho muri Bashani, wa mugi w’ubuhungiro bw’umwishi, mu gice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase, bahabwa na Beshitera, n’imirima rusange y’iyo migi yombi." 
Joshua21:28 Mu muryango wa Isakari bahawe Kishyoni n’imirima rusange yayo, Daberati n’imirima rusange yayo." 
Joshua21:29 Yarimuti n’imirima rusange yayo, Eniganimu n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ine." 
Joshua21:30 Mu muryango wa Asheri bahawe Misheyali n’imirima rusange yayo, na Abidoni n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:31 Helikati n’imirima rusange yayo, Rehobi n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ine." 
Joshua21:32 Mu muryango wa Nefutali bahawe Kedeshi ho muri Galileya, wa mugi w’ubuhungiro bw’umwishi, n’imirima rusange yayo, Hamotidori n’imirima rusange yayo, Karitani n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi itatu." 
Joshua21:33 Imigi yose hamwe y’Abagerishoni, nk’uko amazu yabo angana, ni cumi n’itatu n’imirima rusange yayo." 
Joshua21:34 Abalevi bandi bo mu nzu ya bene Merari bahawe ku mugabane w’umuryango wa Zabuloni: Yokineyamu n’imirima rusange yayo, Karita n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:35 Dimina n’imirima rusange yayo, Nahalali n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ine." 
Joshua21:36 Ku mugabane w’umuryango wa Rubeni bahawe Beseri, wa mugi w’ubuhungiro bw’umwishi, n’imirima rusange yayo, Yahasi n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoti n’imirima rusange yayo, Mefati n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ine." 
Joshua21:38 Ku mugabane w’umuryango wa Gadi bahawe Ramoti ya Gilihadi wa mugi w’ubuhungiro bw’umwishi, n’imirima rusange yayo, Mahanayimu n’imirima rusange yayo," 
Joshua21:39 Heshiboni n’imirima rusange yayo, Yazeri n’imirima rusange yayo: iba imigi ine." 
Joshua21:40 Imigi yose hamwe ubufindo bwahesheje bene Merari, mu bandi Balevi, bakurikije amazu yabo, ni imigi cumi n’ibiri." 
Joshua21:41 Rero imigi y’Abalevi rwagati mu gihugu cy’Abayisraheli, yose hamwe ni mirongo ine n’umunani, n’imirima rusange yayo." 
Joshua21:42 Buri mugi wari ukikijwe n’imirima rusange yawo; ni ko byari bimeze kuri iyo migi yose. 
Joshua21:43 Uhoraho aha Israheli igihugu cyose yari yararahiriye abasekuruza babo ko azabaha; barakigarurira, baragitura." 
Joshua21:44 Uhoraho abaha ikiruhuko ku mpande zose, nk’uko yari yarabisezeraniye abasekuruza babo. Nta n’umwe mu banzi babo washoboye kubananira, Uhoraho abegurira abanzi babo bose." 
Joshua21:45 Mu masezerano yose meza Uhoraho yabwiye umuryango wa Israheli, nta na rimwe ryapfuye ubusa; yose yarujujwe." 
Joshua22:1 Nuko Yozuwe ahamagara bene Rubeni, bene Gadi n’igice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase." 
Joshua22:2 Arababwira ati «Mwakurikije ibyo Musa, umugaragu w’Uhoraho, yabategetse byose kandi mwumviye ijwi ryanjye mu byo nabategetse byose." 
Joshua22:3 Mu myaka myinshi no kugeza ubu, ntimwigeze mutererana abavandimwe banyu, ahubwo mwitondeye gukurikiza amategeko y’Uhoraho, Imana yanyu." 
Joshua22:4 Ubu rero, ubwo Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, yahaye abavandimwe banyu ikiruhuko nk’uko yabibabwiye, mushobora noneho kwisubirira iwanyu, mu gihugu cyanyu mwahawe na Musa, umugaragu w’Uhoraho, hakurya ya Yorudani." 
Joshua22:5 Gusa, mwitondere gukurikiza amategeko n’amabwiriza ya Musa, umugaragu w’Uhoraho, Imana yanyu: mukunde Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, mugendere mu nzira ze, mwite ku mategeko ye, mumwizirikeho, mumukorere n’umutima wanyu wose n’amagara yanyu yose.»" 
Joshua22:6 Yozuwe abaha umugisha maze arabasezerera; nuko basubira iwabo. 
Joshua22:7 Musa yari yarahaye kimwe cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase umugabane muri Bashani, naho ikindi kimwe cya kabiri cyabo, Yozuwe abaha umugabane wundi mu bavandimwe babo, hakuno ya Yorudani, mu burengerazuba. Igihe Yozuwe yaboherezaga iwabo, na bo yabahaye umugisha." 
Joshua22:8 Arababwira ati «Musubire iwanyu mujyanye n’ubukire bwinshi n’amatungo menshi, imari, zahabu, umuringa, ubutare n’imyambaro, byose byinshi cyane: iyo minyago y’abanzi banyu rero muyigabane n’abavandimwe banyu.»" 
Joshua22:9 Bityo bene Rubeni, bene Gadi na kimwe cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase baratahuka; basiga abandi Bayisraheli i Silo mu gihugu cya Kanahani, bajya mu gihugu cya Gilihadi, mu gihugu cyabo bahaweho umunani nk’uko byategetswe n’Uhoraho atumye Musa." 
Joshua22:10 Bagera batyo ku Ruziga rw’amabuye ruri hafi ya Yorudani, mu gihugu cya Kanahani, maze bene Rubeni, bene Gadi na kimwe cya kabiri cya bene Manase bahubaka urutambiro, ku nkombe ya Yorudani, urutambiro rutagira uko rusa." 
Joshua22:11 Abayisraheli kandi baza kumva bavuga ngo «Bene Rubeni, bene Gadi na kimwe cya kabiri cya bene Manase bubatse urutambiro mu gihugu cya Kanahani, ku ruziga rw’amabuye ruri hafi ya Yorudani, mu ruhande rwacu.»" 
Joshua22:12 Bakibyumva, Abayisraheli bose bakoranira i Silo, ngo babatere." 
Joshua22:13 Nuko Abayisraheli bohereza Pinehasi, umuhungu w’umuherezabitambo Eleyazari, kuri bene Rubeni, bene Gadi no kuri kimwe cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase mu gihugu cya Gilihadi." 
Joshua22:14 Yari aherekejwe n’abakuru b’imiryango cumi, umukuru umwe muri buri muryango w’Abayisraheli, buri muntu akaba yari umutware mu muryango wabo, uko imiryango y’Abayisraheli yanganaga." 
Joshua22:15 Bagera kuri bene Rubeni, bene Gadi no kuri kimwe cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa bene Manase, mu gihugu cya Gilihadi, maze barababwira bati" 
Joshua22:16 «Nimwumve uko ikoraniro ryose ry’Uhoraho rivuga: Ubwo buhemu ni ubw’iki mugirira Imana ya Israheli, mukaba uyu munsi mwitandukanyije n’Uhoraho, mwiyubakira urutambiro kandi mukanamwigomekaho?" 
Joshua22:17 Igicumuro cy’i Pewori ntikiduhagije se? Nta bwo turagihonoka kugeza uyu munsi, n’ubwo ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho ryaguweho n’icyago bwose!" 
Joshua22:18 None namwe, uyu munsi mwitandukanyije n’Uhoraho! Mwigometse kuri Uhoraho uyu munsi, ejo ni we uzarakarira ikoraniro ryose rya Israheli." 
Joshua22:19 Niba rero musanze igihugu cyanyu cyarahumanye, nimugaruke mu gihugu cy’Uhoraho, ahari Ingoro ye, muhabwe amasambu muri twe, ariko mureke kwigomeka kuri Uhoraho, cyangwa se ngo mutwivumbureho mwubaka urundi rutambiro, iruhande rw’urutambiro rw’Uhoraho, Imana yacu." 
Joshua22:20 Ni ko se ye, ubwo Akani mwene Zerahi ahemutse agakora ibizira, uburakari bw’Uhoraho ntibwagurumaniye umuryango wose wa Israheli? Si we wenyine rero ikosa rye ryahitanye!»" 
Joshua22:21 Bene Rubeni, bene Gadi na kimwe cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa bene Manase basubiza abatware b’imiryango y’Abayisraheli, bagira bati" 
Joshua22:22 «Uhoraho, Imana isumba izindi zose, arabizi kandi na Israheli ibimenye! Niba ari ubwigomeke, bikaba ubuhemu ku Uhoraho, uyu munsi ntimudukize." 
Joshua22:23 Niba twariyubakiye urutambiro kugira ngo twitandukanye n’Uhoraho, kandi niba ari ukuhatambira ibitambo bitwikwa, iby’ubuhoro cyangwa se andi maturo, Uhoraho arabitubaze!" 
Joshua22:24 Si ibyo! Ahubwo twabitewe n’umutima uhagaze wo kwibaza tuti nk’ejo abahungu banyu batubajije bati ’Muhuriye he n’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli?" 
Joshua22:25 Hagati yacu namwe, bene Rubeni, na bene Gadi, Uhoraho yahashyize Yorudani ngo itubere urugabano. Nta ruhare na ruto mufite kuri Uhoraho!’ Bityo abahungu banyu bazatume abacu badatinya Uhoraho." 
Joshua22:26 Twigiriye inama rero tuti ’Dukwiye kubaka uru rutambiro, rutagenewe ibitambo bitwikwa cyangwa andi maturo," 
Joshua22:27 ahubwo ngo rube ikimenyetso hagati yacu namwe no hagati y’urubyaro rwacu, kigaragaza ko Uhoraho ari we dusenga, dutura ibitambo bitwikwa, ibitambo by’ubuhoro mu Nzu ye.’ Twagenjeje dutyo rero kugira ngo ejo abahungu banyu batazavaho babwira abacu ngo ’Nta ruhare mugira kuri Uhoraho.’" 
Joshua22:28 Twaribwiye tuti ’Ejo nihagira utuvugisha atyo, ari twe cyangwa urubyaro rwacu, tuzamusubiza ngo: Banza witegereze urutambiro rw’Uhoraho ababyeyi bacu bubatse, n’uko ruteye! Urasanga atari urw’ibitambo bitwikwa cyangwa andi maturo, ahubwo ari nk’intangamugabo hagati yacu namwe... ’" 
Joshua22:29 Hehe n’igitekerezo cyo kwigomeka kuri Uhoraho no kwitandukanya n’Uhoraho uyu munsi, twubaka urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa, amaturo n’ibindi bitambo, aho kubiturira ku rutambiro rw’Uhoraho, Imana yacu, ruri imbere y’Ingoro ye!»" 
Joshua22:30 Umuherezabitambo Pinehasi, abakuru b’imiryango n’abatware b’imiryango y’Abayisraheli, bamaze kumva ayo magambo ya bene Rubeni, bene Gadi na bene Manase, arabashimisha." 
Joshua22:31 Nuko Pinehasi, mwene Eleyazari umuherezabitambo, abwira bene Rubeni, bene Gadi na bene Manase, ati «Ubu noneho tumenye ko Uhoraho ari muri twe, ubwo mutahemukiye Uhoraho muri ibyo. Bityo, mukarokora Abayisraheli ikiganza cy’Uhoraho.»" 
Joshua22:32 Pinehasi, mwene Eleyazari umuherezabitambo, n’abakuru b’imiryango basezera kuri bene Rubeni na bene Gadi, bava mu gihugu cya Gilihadi, bagaruka mu gihugu cya Kanahani basanga abandi Bayisraheli, babatekerereza iby’urugendo rwabo." 
Joshua22:33 Abayisraheli birabashimisha, maze basingiza Imana, bareka batyo gutera no kurimbura igihugu cya bene Rubeni na bene Gadi." 
Joshua22:34 Bene Rubeni na bene Gadi bita urutambiro izina rya..., bagira bati «Ni intangamugabo muri twe, ko Uhoraho ari we Mana.»" 
Joshua23:1 Hari hashize igihe kirekire Uhoraho amaze guha Israheli ikiruhuko, no kuyikiza abanzi bayo bose bayikikije. Yozuwe yari amaze gusaza, ageze mu zabukuru;" 
Joshua23:2 nuko ahamagaza Israheli yose, abakuru b’imiryango, abatware, abacamanza n’abayobozi b’imirimo, maze arababwira ati «Dore ndashaje kandi ngeze mu zabukuru." 
Joshua23:3 Mwiboneye ubwanyu ibyo Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, yagiriye ibi bihugu byose kubera mwe; koko ni we, Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, yabarwaniriye!" 
Joshua23:4 Nimurebe uko nagabanyije imiryango yanyu ibi bihugu byose, byaba iby’amahanga natsinze, byaba iby’amahanga asigaye, kuva kuri Yorudani kugeza ku Nyanja Nini, mu burengerazuba." 
Joshua23:5 Ayo mahanga, Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, ubwe azayabigirizayo abanyage ibyabo imbere yanyu, kugeza ubwo muzaba mwigaruriye ibihugu byabo, nk’uko Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, yabibabwiye." 
Joshua23:6 Murakomere rero kandi mwitondere gukurikiza ibyanditswe byose mu gitabo cy’Itegeko rya Musa, nta guteshuka ngo muce iburyo cyangwa ibumoso." 
Joshua23:7 Ntimukagendererane n’abo banyamahanga basigaye muri mwe, ntimukagire icyo musaba imana zabo, ntimukarahire mu izina ryazo, ntimukazikorere kandi ntimukazipfukamire." 
Joshua23:8 Ahubwo nimwizirike kuri Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, nk’uko mwabigenjeje kugeza ubu;" 
Joshua23:9 ni cyo cyatumye Uhoraho anyaga imbere yanyu amahanga menshi kandi akomeye, kandi nta n’umwe wigeze abananira kugeza ubu." 
Joshua23:10 Umwe muri mwe yirukanaga igihumbi muri bo, kuko ari Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, wabarwaniriraga nk’uko yabibasezeranyije." 
Joshua23:11 Mwebwe rero ubwanyu, murimenye kandi mukunde Uhoraho, Imana yanyu." 
Joshua23:12 Ariko nimwitandukanya na we, mukifatanya n’abo banyamahanga basigaye muri mwe, nimushyingirana, mukagendererana," 
Joshua23:13 mumenye neza ko Uhoraho, Imana yacu, atazakomeza kubimura imbere yanyu, ahubwo ayo mahanga azababera nk’urushundura n’umutego, cyangwa se nk’ikiboko kibakubita mu mbavu, n’amahwa abamena amaso, kugeza ubwo muzashira kuri ubu butaka bwiza mwahawe n’Uhoraho, Imana yanyu." 
Joshua23:14 Dore ubu ndigendeye nk’uko ibintu byose byo ku isi bishira, ariko mwe, mumenye n’umutima wanyu wose n’amagara yanyu yose, ko nta kantu na kamwe katujujwe mu masezerano yose meza Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, yabagiriye." 
Joshua23:15 Nuko rero, nk’uko amagambo yose y’akataraboneka Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, yababwiye yakurikijwe, ni na ko Uhoraho azakurikiza amagambo ye mabi yose, kugeza ubwo muzaba mwashize kuri ubu butaka bwiza, Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, yabahaye." 
Joshua23:16 Koko, nimwica Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, Isezerano mwagiranye, maze mugakorera ibigirwamana kandi mukabipfukamira, uburakari bw’Uhoraho buzabagurumanira, bubamarire muri iki gihugu cyiza yabahaye." 
Joshua24:1 Yozuwe akoranyiriza imiryango ya Israheli yose i Sikemu maze ahamagaza abakuru ba Israheli, abatware, abacamanza, abayobozi b’imirimo; baza imbere y’Imana." 
Joshua24:2 Yozuwe abwira rubanda rwose, ati «Dore uko Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli avuga: Abakurambere banyu, Tera, se wa Abrahamu na Nahori, kera bari batuye hakurya y’Uruzi, kandi basengaga ibigirwamana." 
Joshua24:3 Nakuye Abrahamu, umukurambere wanyu, hakurya y’Uruzi maze munyuza mu gihugu cya Kanahani cyose, mugwiriza urubyaro kandi muha Izaki." 
Joshua24:4 Izaki muha Yakobo na Ezawu, kandi Ezawu mugabira umusozi wa Seyiri. Ariko Yakobo n’abahungu be baramanuka bajya mu Misiri." 
Joshua24:5 Hanyuma nohereza Musa na Aroni, kandi mpanisha Misiri ibikorwa byanjye nabakubitishije, noneho mbavanayo." 
Joshua24:6 Ba so nabavanye mu Misiri, muraza mugera ku nyanja. Abanyamisiri bakurikiranye ba so kugera ku nyanja y’Urufunzo, bari ku magare no ku mafarasi." 
Joshua24:7 Nuko ba so batakira Uhoraho, maze acisha igihu hagati yanyu n’Abanyamisiri, inyanja ayigarura ku Banyamisiri, bose bararohama. Mwiboneye ubwanyu ibyo nakoreye mu Misiri, hanyuma mugeze mu butayu muhamara igihe kirekire." 
Joshua24:8 Nabinjije mu gihugu cy’Abahemori batuye hakurya ya Yorudani, ariko barabarwanya. Narababeguriye, mwigarurira igihugu cyabo, nabatsembye imbere yanyu." 
Joshua24:9 Balaki, mwene Sipori, umwami wa Mowabu, arahaguruka ngo arwanye Israheli; atuma kuri Balahamu mwene Bewori, kugira ngo abavume." 
Joshua24:10 Ariko sinashatse kumva Balahamu; byatumye abaha umugisha maze mbakura mu nzara ze. 
Joshua24:11 Mwambutse Yorudani maze mugera i Yeriko, abategetsi b’i Yeriko barabarwanya, Umuhemori, Umuperizi, Umukanahani, Umuheti, Umugirigashi, Umuhivi, n’Umuyebuzi, ariko narababeguriye." 
Joshua24:12 Nohereza imbere yanyu amavubi yirukaniraga kure yanyu abami bombi b’Abahemori; si inkota yawe cyangwa umuheto wawe wabikoze. 
Joshua24:13 Naguhaye igihugu utavunikiye, n’imigi utigeze wubaka, none ukaba uyibamo; nguha imizabibu n’imizeti utateye, none ukaba urya imbuto zayo." 
Joshua24:14 Ubu rero, nimutinye kandi mukorere Uhoraho mu butabera n’ubudahemuka. Nimwigizeyo ibigirwamana ba so bayobotse hakurya y’Uruzi no mu Misiri, maze mukorere Uhoraho." 
Joshua24:15 Ariko niba gukorera Uhoraho bitabashimishije, uyu munsi muhitemo uwo mushaka gukorera: byaba ibigirwamana ba so bayobotse bakiri hakurya y’Uruzi cyangwa se iby’Abahemori mubereye mu gihugu. Naho jye n’inzu yanjye tuzakorera Uhoraho.»" 
Joshua24:16 Rubanda baramusubiza bati «Hehe n’igitekerezo cyo kwimura Uhoraho ngo dukorere ibigirwamana! 
Joshua24:17 Uhoraho ni We Mana yacu, We watuvanye mu Misiri twe n’ababyeyi bacu, akatuvana mu nzu y’ubucakara, agakorera ibyo bimenyetso bikomeye mu maso yacu. Yaturwanyeho mu rugendo rurerure twakoze no mu mahanga yose twagiye tunyuramo." 
Joshua24:18 Uhoraho yirukanye amahanga yose imbere yacu, cyane cyane Abahemori batuye igihugu. Natwe rero tuzakorera Uhoraho, kuko ari We Mana yacu.»" 
Joshua24:19 Yozuwe abwira rubanda ati «Nta bwo muzashobora gukorera Uhoraho kandi ari Imana y’Intungane, n’Imana ifuha itazihanganira ubwigomeke bwanyu n’ibyaha byanyu." 
Joshua24:20 Nimwitandukanya n’Uhoraho mugakorera ibigirwamana by’amahanga, azahindukira abagirire nabi, abatsembe nyuma y’ineza yose yabagiriye.»" 
Joshua24:21 Rubanda basubiza Yozuwe bati «Reka da! Ntibikabe kuko tuzakorera Uhoraho.» 
Joshua24:22 Yozuwe arababwira ati «Musanzwe muzi ko ari mwe ubwanyu mwihitiyemo gukorera Uhoraho.» Barasubiza bati «Turabyiyemeje.» 
Joshua24:23 Yozuwe arakomeza ati «Noneho rero, nimwigizeyo ibigirwamana by’amahanga biri muri mwe, maze mwerekeze umutima wanyu kuri Uhoraho, Imana yanyu.»" 
Joshua24:24 Rubanda basubiza Yozuwe bati «Tuzakorera Uhoraho, Imana yacu, kandi twumvire ijwi rye.»" 
Joshua24:25 Uwo munsi i Sikemu, Yozuwe agirana isezerano na rubanda; abaha amategeko n’umuco bazagenderaho." 
Joshua24:26 Ayo magambo Yozuwe ayandika mu gitabo cy’Itegeko ry’Imana. Afata ibuye rinini arishingisha aho ngaho, mu nsi y’igiti cy’umushishi cyari bugufi y’Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
Joshua24:27 Yozuwe abwira rubanda rwose ati «Dore iri buye ni ryo rizadushinja, kuko ryumvise amagambo y’Uhoraho avugana natwe; rizabashinja kugira ngo mutabeshya Imana yanyu.»" 
Joshua24:28 Yozuwe yohereza rubanda, buri muntu mu isambu ye." 
Joshua24:29 Nyuma y’ibyo byose, Yozuwe mwene Nuni, umugaragu w’Uhoraho, apfa agejeje ku myaka ijana na cumi." 
Joshua24:30 Ahambwa mu munani we i Timunati‐Seraki mu misozi ya Efurayimu, mu majyaruguru y’umusozi wa Gahashi." 
Joshua24:31 Israheli yayobotse Uhoraho igihe cyose Yozuwe yabayeho, ndetse Yozuwe amaze gupfa yakomeje kumuyoboka igihe cyose hari hakiriho abakuru b’imiryango bari barabanye na we, kandi bari bazi ibyo Uhoraho yakoreye Israheli byose." 
Joshua24:32 Naho amagufa ya Yozefu Abayisraheli bari bavanye mu Misiri, bayahamba i Sikemu mu gisate cy’umurima Yakobo yari yaraguze feza ijana n’abahungu ba Hamori, umukuru wa Sikemu; uwo murima wari mu munani wa bene Yozefu." 
Joshua24:33 Nuko Eleyazari mwene Aroni na we arapfa, maze bamuhamba ku murenge umuhungu we Pinehasi yahawe, mu misozi ya Efurayimu." 
Judges1:1 Yozuwe amaze gupfa, Abayisraheli babaza Uhoraho, bagira bati «Ni nde muri twe uzazamuka bwa mbere akajya gutera Abakanahani kugira ngo abarwanye?»" 
Judges1:2 Uhoraho arabasubiza ati «Yuda ni we uzazamuka bwa mbere. Dore maze kwegurira igihugu mu biganza bye.» 
Judges1:3 Yuda abwira Simewoni umuvandimwe we, ati «Tuzamuke tujye mu mugabane wanjye, maze turwanye Abakanahani. Hanyuma nanjye nzajyana nawe mu mugabane wawe.» Nuko Simewoni ajyana na we." 
Judges1:4 Yuda arazamuka, maze Uhoraho yegurira Abakanahani n’Abaperizi mu biganza byabo. I Bezeki bahatsinda abantu ibihumbi cumi muri bo." 
Judges1:5 Aho i Bezeki, bahasanga Adoni‐Bezeki baramurwanya; batsinda Abakanahani n’Abaperizi." 
Judges1:6 Adoni‐Bezeki arahunga, ariko baramukurikira baramufata, maze bamuca ibikumwe by’ibiganza n’iby’ibirenge." 
Judges1:7 Adoni‐Bezeki aravuga ati «Abami mirongo irindwi bari baraciwe ibikumwe by’ibiganza n’iby’ibirenge, batoraguraga ibisigazwa byo mu nsi y’ameza yanjye. Ibyo nabakoreye, Imana irabinyituye.» Bamuzana i Yeruzalemu, ari na ho yaguye." 
Judges1:8 Bene Yuda batera Yeruzalemu maze barayigarurira, bamarira ku nkota abahatuye kandi umugi barawutwika." 
Judges1:9 Nyuma y’ibyo, Bene Yuda baramanuka kugira ngo barwanye Abakanahani bari batuye mu karere k’imisozi miremire, n’i Negevu no mu karere k’imisozi migufi." 
Judges1:10 Hanyuma Yuda atera Abakanahani bari batuye i Heburoni — icyo gihe yitwaga Kiriyati‐Haruba — maze batsinda Sheshayi, Ahimani na Talimayi." 
Judges1:11 Yuda ava aho ajya gutera abaturage b’i Debiri — icyo gihe yitwaga Kiriyati‐Seferi —. 
Judges1:12 Kalebu ni ko kuvuga ati «Umuntu uzatsinda Kiriyati‐Seferi maze akayigarurira, nzamushyingira Akisha, umukobwa wanjye.»" 
Judges1:13 Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi, umuvandimwe wa Kelebu w’umuhererezi, yigarurira umugi, maze Kalebu amushyingira Akisha, umukobwa we." 
Judges1:14 Nuko akihagera, Akisha yoshya umugabo we gusaba sebukwe umurima. Bukeye, Akisha amanuka ku ndogobe ye, maze Kalebu aramubaza ati «Icyo wifuza ni iki?»" 
Judges1:15 Undi aramusubiza ati «Ngirira ubuntu. Ubwo wampaye isambu i Negevu, umpe n’ibizenga by’amazi». Nuko Kalebu amuha ibizenga bya ruguru n’iby’epfo." 
Judges1:16 Abahungu ba wa Mukeniti, sebukwe wa Musa, bazamukana na Bene Yuda, bava mu mugi w’Imikindo berekeza mu butayu bwa Yuda bwari mu majyepfo ya Aradi. Nuko baraza babana n’abahatuye." 
Judges1:17 Yuda ajyana na Simewoni, umuvandimwe we, batsinda Abakanahani bari batuye i Sefati, umugi wose barawutsemba, maze bawita Horima (ari byo kuvuga «itsembwa»)." 
Judges1:18 Yuda yigarurira umugi wa Gaza n’intara yawo, uwa Ashikeloni n’intara yawo, uwa Ekironi n’intara yawo." 
Judges1:19 Uhoraho yari kumwe na Yuda, ubwo yigaruriraga akarere k’imisozi miremire. Nyamara ntibashoboye kwirukana abatuye mu kibaya, kuko bari bafite amagare y’ibyuma." 
Judges1:20 Nk’uko byari byarategetswe na Musa, Heburoni bayigabira Kalebu, ayinyaga abahungu batatu ba Anaki." 
Judges1:21 Naho Abayebuzi bari batuye i Yeruzalemu, Bene Benyamini ntibabanyaze, ahubwo Abayebuzi bakomeje guturana na Bene Benyamini i Yeruzalemu kugeza na n’ubu." 
Judges1:22 Abo mu nzu ya Yozefu na bo barazamuka, batera Beteli, kandi Uhoraho yari kumwe na bo." 
Judges1:23 Inzu ya Yozefu ijya gutata umugi wa Beteli, wahoze witwa Luzi." 
Judges1:24 Nuko intasi zibona umugabo usohotse mu mugi, maze ziramubwira ziti «Twereke aho twakwinjirira mu mugi, maze tuzabikwiture.»" 
Judges1:25 Uwo mugabo arahabereka, maze umugi wose bawumarira ku nkota, naho we baramureka arigendera n’abe bose." 
Judges1:26 Uwo mugabo ajya mu gihugu cy’Abaheti, ahubaka umugi awita Luzi, ari na ko ukitwa kugeza na n’ubu." 
Judges1:27 Manase ntiyashoboye gutsinda abaturage b’i Betishani, Tanaki, Dori, Yibileyamu, Megido, habe n’abo mu midugudu ihakikije, maze Abakanahani bakomeza gutura muri icyo gihugu." 
Judges1:28 Nyamara aho Israheli ikomereye, yakoresheje imirimo y’uburetwa Abakanahani, ariko ntiyashobora kubirukana." 
Judges1:29 Efurayimu ntiyashoboye kwirukana Abakanahani bari batuye i Gezeri, nuko Abakanahani bakomeza guturana na Bene Efurayimu i Gezeri." 
Judges1:30 Zabuloni ntiyashoboye kwirukana abaturage b’i Kitironi kimwe n’ab’i Nahaloli; Abakanahani baturana na Bene Zabuloni, ariko baragoka bakoreshwa uburetwa." 
Judges1:31 Asheri ntiyashoboye kwirukana abaturage b’i Ako kimwe n’ab’i Sidoni, ab’i Ahilavi, ab’i Akizibu, ab’i Heluba, ab’i Afiki n’ab’i Rehobu." 
Judges1:32 Bene Asheri baturanye n’Abakanahani bari batuye igihugu, kubera ko batashoboye kubirukana." 
Judges1:33 Nefutali ntiyashoboye kwirukana abaturage b’i Betishemeshi kimwe n’ab’i Betanati, nuko baturana n’Abakanahani bari batuye igihugu, ariko abaturage b’i Betishemeshi n’ab’i Betanati bakoreshwa imirimo y’uburetwa." 
Judges1:34 Abahemori baheza Bene Dani mu karere k’imisozi miremire, ntibabakundira kumanuka ngo bagere mu kibaya." 
Judges1:35 Abahemori bakomeza gutura i Hari‐Heresi, i Ayaloni n’i Shalivimu, ariko inzu ya Yozefu imaze gukomera, ibakoresha imirimo y’uburetwa." 
Judges1:36 Igihugu cy’Abahemori cyaheraga ku muzamuko w’i Karabimu, kuva ahitwa ku Rutare, maze ugakomeza ukazamuka." 
Judges2:1 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho ava i Giligali, arazamuka agana i Bokimu, maze aravuga ati «Nabavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, mbinjiza mu gihugu nari nararahiriye kuzaha abasekuruza banyu. Naravuze nti ’Sinzigera na rimwe nca ku Isezerano nagiranye namwe," 
Judges2:2 none rero, ntimuzagirane isezerano n’abaturage b’iki gihugu, ahubwo muzasenye intambiro zabo.’ Ariko ntimwumvise ijwi ryanjye. Ubwo se ibyo mwakoze ni ibiki!" 
Judges2:3 None rero ndababwiye nti ’Sinzabirukana imbere yanyu; maze bazababere umutego muzagwamo muramya ibigirwamana byabo.’» 
Judges2:4 Nuko Umumalayika w’Uhoraho amaze kubwira Abayisraheli bose ayo magambo, imbaga itera hejuru maze bararira." 
Judges2:5 Aho hantu bahita Bokimu (ari byo kuvuga «Abarira»), maze bahaturira Uhoraho ibitambo." 
Judges2:6 Yozuwe asezerera imbaga y’Abayisraheli, baragenda buri muntu ajya mu munani we, kugira ngo bature igihugu." 
Judges2:7 Umuryango wakomeje kuyoboka Uhoraho igihe cyose Yozuwe yabayeho, ndetse Yozuwe amaze gupfa, bakomeje kumuyoboka igihe cyose hari hakiriho abakuru b’imiryango bari barabanye na we, kandi bari barabonye ibyo Uhoraho yakoreye Israheli byose." 
Judges2:8 Yozuwe mwene Nuni, umugaragu w’Uhoraho, apfa agejeje ku myaka ijana na cumi." 
Judges2:9 Bamuhamba mu munani we i Timunati‐Seraki mu misozi ya Efurayimu, mu majyaruguru y’umusozi wa Gahashi." 
Judges2:10 Nuko icyo gisekuru cyose gisanga abasekuruza bacyo; nyuma y’aho habyiruka ikindi gisekuru, ariko cyo nticyari cyarigeze kimenya Uhoraho, cyangwa se ngo kimenye ibyiza yari yarakoreye Israheli." 
Judges2:11 Abayisraheli bakora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, maze bayoboka za Behali." 
Judges2:12 Bitandukanya n’Uhoraho, Imana y’abasekuruza babo, wabavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, bayoboka izindi mana z’amahanga abakikije; bazipfukama imbere maze bacumura kuri Uhoraho." 
Judges2:13 Bitandukanyije n’Uhoraho, bayoboka Behali na za Ashitaroti." 
Judges2:14 Nuko uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira Israheli, maze abagabiza ababanyaga kandi abegurira abanzi babo babakikije. Ntibaba bagishoboye guhangara abanzi babo." 
Judges2:15 Aho bajyaga hose, ikiganza cy’Uhoraho cyabaga kibariho ngo kibateze ibyago, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabibabwiye kandi akanabirahirira; umubabaro wabo urushaho kwiyongera." 
Judges2:16 Ni bwo Uhoraho aboherereje abacamanza, abakiza abanzi babanyagaga." 
Judges2:17 Ariko n’abo bacamanza ntibabumva, bararikira izindi mana, barazipfukamira, bateshuka bidatinze inzira y’abasekuruza babo bari barumvise amategeko y’Uhoraho; ntibagenza nka bo." 
Judges2:18 Igihe cyose Uhoraho yabohererezaga umucamanza, Uhoraho yahoranaga na we mu buzima bwe bwose, kuko yumvaga amaganya baterwaga n’ababarenganya, maze akabagirira impuhwe." 
Judges2:19 Ariko iyo umucamanza yamaraga gupfa, barongeraga bakihindanya cyane kurusha abasekuruza babo, bakayoboka izindi mana, bakazikorera kandi bakazipfukamira; ntibarekaga n’umwe mu migirire no mu myifatire yabo mibi, ahubwo bakanangira umutima." 
Judges2:20 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira Israheli. Nuko aravuga, ati «Kubera ko iyi mbaga yishe Isezerano ryanjye nagiranye n’abasekuruza babo, kandi ntiyumve ijwi ryanjye," 
Judges2:21 nanjye sinzongera kwirukana imbere yabo ihanga na rimwe mu yo Yozuwe yahasize igihe apfuye.» 
Judges2:22 Ibyo byari ukugerageza Israheli, kugira ngo arebe niba izakurikira inzira y’Uhoraho nk’uko abasekuruza babo babigenjeje, cyangwa se niba batazayikurikiza." 
Judges2:23 Ni cyo cyatumye Uhoraho areka ayo mahanga, ntahite ayirukana kandi ntayagabize Yozuwe." 
Judges3:1 Dore ayo mahanga Uhoraho yaretse akagumaho, kugira ngo ayageragereshe Abayisraheli bose batigeze bamenya intambara za Kanahani;" 
Judges3:2 — ibyo byakorewe gusa kugira ngo yigishe ibisekuru bishya bya Israheli, abamenyereze intambara kuko batari bigeze bayimenya —:" 
Judges3:3 muri ayo mahanga harimo abatware batanu b’Abafilisiti, Abakanahani bose, Abasidoni n’Abahivi bari batuye mu misozi ya Libani, uhereye ku musozi wa Behali‐Herimoni ukageza i Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Abo bari abo kugerageresha Israheli, kugira ngo Uhoraho amenye ko bazumvira amategeko yahaye abasekuruza babo akoresheje Musa." 
Judges3:5 Abayisraheli baturana n’Abakanahani, Abaheti, Abahemori, Abaperizi, Abahivi n’Abayebuzi;" 
Judges3:6 barongora abakobwa bo muri ayo mahanga, na bo babashyingira ababo bwite; nuko bayoboka imana z’abo banyamahanga." 
Judges3:7 Abayisraheli bakora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho: birengagije Uhoraho, Imana yabo, maze bayoboka za Behali na za Ashitaroti." 
Judges3:8 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira Israheli, maze abagabiza Kushani‐Risheyatayimu, wari umwami w’Abaramu mu gihugu cyo hagati y’inzuzi zombi; Abayisraheli bakorera Kushani‐Risheyatayimu mu gihe cy’imyaka umunani." 
Judges3:9 Nuko Abayisraheli batakambira Uhoraho, ni ko kubagoborera umukiza: ari we Otinyeli mwene Kenazi, umuvandimwe wa Kalebu w’umuhererezi." 
Judges3:10 Umwuka w’Uhoraho umwuzuraho, maze ategeka Israheli. Arahaguruka agaba ibitero, maze Uhoraho amugabiza Kushani‐Risheyatayimu, umwami wa Aramu; amurusha amaboko, aramutsinda." 
Judges3:11 Igihugu kimara imyaka mirongo ine mu mutuzo, hanyuma Otinyeli, mwene Kenazi, arapfa." 
Judges3:12 Abayisraheli bongera gukora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, maze Uhoraho atera inkunga Egiloni, umwami wa Mowabu, kugira ngo arwanye Israheli, kubera ko yakoraga ibidatunganiye Uhoraho." 
Judges3:13 Egiloni yitabaza Abahamoni n’Abamaleki, hanyuma atera Israheli, arayitsinda, bigarurira umugi w’Imikindo." 
Judges3:14 Abayisraheli bakorera Egiloni, umwami wa Mowabu, mu gihe cy’imyaka cumi n’umunani." 
Judges3:15 Nuko Abayisraheli batakambira Uhoraho, maze Uhoraho abagoborera umukiza: ari we Ehudi mwene Gera w’Umubenyamini, watwariraga imoso. Abayisraheli bamuha amaturo, bamushinga kuyabagereza kuri Egiloni, umwami wa Mowabu." 
Judges3:16 Ehudi acurisha intambi y’amugi abiri, ayambara ku itako ry’iburyo, imbere y’imyambaro ye." 
Judges3:17 Nuko ashyira amaturo Egiloni, umwami wa Mowabu; Egiloni uwo akaba yari umugabo munini cyane." 
Judges3:18 Amaze kumuha amaturo, Ehudi aherekeza abantu baje bayikoreye," 
Judges3:19 ariko we ngo agere ku Bigirwamana byari bugufi ya Giligali, arakimirana maze abwira umwami, ati «Mwami, Mutegetsi wanjye, ngufitiye ubutumwa ariko ni ibanga!» Undi aravuga ati «Nimube mwigiyeyo!» maze abari aho iruhande rwe bose barasohoka." 
Judges3:20 Ehudi yegera Egiloni, wari wasigaye wenyine, yicaye mu cyumba cyo hejuru gifutse. Ehudi aramubwira ati «Mwami, ubutumwa ngufitiye ni ubw’Imana», nuko umwami ahaguruka ku ntebe ye." 
Judges3:21 Ehudi arambura ukuboko kw’ibumoso, afata intambi ku itako ry’iburyo maze ayitera umwami mu nda." 
Judges3:22 Ikirindi cy’intambi ubwacyo kirinjira, maze ibinure bipfukirana ubugi, kuko Ehudi atari yashinguye intambi mu nda y’umwami. Nuko Ehudi asohokera mu idirishya," 
Judges3:23 amaze gufunga inzugi zose z’icyumba cyo hejuru, ashyiraho n’ibihindizo." 
Judges3:24 Amaze gusohoka, abagaragu b’umwami baraza maze baritegereza: babonye ko inzugi z’icyumba cyo hejuru zari zifunze, barabwirana bati «Nta gushidikanya, agomba kuba yagiye kwituma muri ka kazu gafatanye n’icyumba gifutse.»" 
Judges3:25 Barategereza kugeza ubwo bumirwa. Babonye ko inzugi z’icyumba cyo hejuru zitigera zifunguka, bafata imfunguzo, barakingura. Nuko basanga shebuja arambaraye ku butaka, yapfuye." 
Judges3:26 Naho Ehudi yahunze mu gihe bari bagitegereje; arenga kuri bya Bigirwamana, ahunga yerekeza i Seyira." 
Judges3:27 Nuko ngo ahagere, avugiriza ihembe mu misozi miremire y’i Efurayimu; Abayisraheli bamanukana na we abarangaje imbere." 
Judges3:28 Arababwira ati «Nimunkurikire kuko Uhoraho yeguriye mu biganza byanyu Abamowabu, abanzi banyu.» Nuko bamanukana na we, bafata ibyambu bya Yorudani byategekwaga na Mowabu, ntibagira uwo bakundira kwambuka." 
Judges3:29 Icyo gihe batsinda Mowabu; mu bagabo bagera ku bihumbi cumi kandi b’intwari ntihagira n’umwe urokoka. 
Judges3:30 Uwo munsi Mowabu itsindwa na Israheli, nuko igihugu kimara imyaka mirongo inani mu mutuzo." 
Judges3:31 Nyuma ya Ehudi haza Shamugari mwene Anati. Atsinda Abafilisti bagera ku bagabo magana atandatu, abicisha igihosho bashorezaga ibimasa, nuko na we arokora Israheli." 
Judges4:1 Ehudi amaze gupfa, Abayisraheli bongera gukora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho." 
Judges4:2 Uhoraho abagabiza Yabini, umwami wa Kanahani, wari uganje i Hasori. Umugaba w’ingabo ze yari Sisera, ariko we yari atuye i Harosheti‐Goyimu." 
Judges4:3 Abayisraheli batakambira Uhoraho, kuko Sisera yari afite amagare y’intambara magana cyenda kandi akaba yarakandamije cyane Abayisraheli, mu gihe cy’imyaka makumyabiri yose." 
Judges4:4 Icyo gihe, umuhanuzikazi Debora, muka Lapidoti, yategekaga Israheli." 
Judges4:5 Yakundaga kwiyicarira mu nsi y’Umukindo wa Debora, hagati ya Rama na Beteli, mu misozi miremire ya Efurayimu, maze Abayisraheli bakajya bazamuka bakahamusanga, kugira ngo abacire imanza." 
Judges4:6 Nuko Debora ahamagaza Baraki, mwene Ahinowamu, w’i Kedeshi ya Nefutali, maze aramubwira ati «Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, yagutegetse ngo: Genda ufate abantu ibihumbi cumi muri bene Nefutali no muri bene Zabuloni, ubakoranyirize ku musozi wa Taboru." 
Judges4:7 Nanjye nzagusangisha Sisera, umugaba w’ingabo za Yabini, ku mugezi wa Kishoni, ndetse n’amagare ye n’ingabo ze, maze nzamwegurire ibiganza byawe.»" 
Judges4:8 Baraki aramusubiza ati «Nitujyana nzagenda, ariko nitutajyana nawe sinzagenda.»" 
Judges4:9 Debora aravuga ati «Nuko rero tuzajyana, ariko ikuzo ntirizaba iryawe, kuko ari umugore Uhoraho yahaye gutsinda Sisera.» Debora arahaguruka, ajyana na Baraki i Kedeshi." 
Judges4:10 Bukeye, Baraki ahamagaza Zabuloni na Nefutali i Kedeshi. Abantu ibihumbi cumi bazamukana na we, na Debora barajyana." 
Judges4:11 Ariko Heberi w’Umukeniti yari yaritandukanyije na Kayini wo muri bene Hobabu, sebukwe wa Musa, kandi yari yarashinze ihema rye iruhande rw’igiti cy’umushishi cy’i Sanayimu, bugufi ya Kedeshi." 
Judges4:12 Bamenyesha Sisera ko Baraki mwene Ahinowamu yazamutse ku musozi wa Taboru. 
Judges4:13 Nuko Sisera akoranyiriza i Harosheti‐Goyimu amagare ye y’intambara yose, uko ari magana cyenda, hamwe n’imbaga ye yose, maze abajyana ku mugezi wa Kishoni." 
Judges4:14 Debora abwira Baraki, ati «Haguruka, kuko uyu munsi ari bwo Uhoraho akugabije Sisera. Ni koko, Uhoraho arakugenda imbere.» Baraki amanuka ku musozi wa Taboru n’abantu ibihumbi cumi bamukurikiye." 
Judges4:15 Nuko Uhoraho atatanyiriza Sisera, n’amagare ye, n’ingabo ze imbere ya Baraki. Sisera ava ku igare rye, ahunga agenza ibirenge." 
Judges4:16 Baraki akurikirana amagare n’ingabo kugera i Harosheti‐Goyimu; ingabo zose za Sisera azimarira ku nkota; ntiyasigaza n’umwe. 
Judges4:17 Ubwo Sisera yahungaga agenza ibirenge, yerekeje ku ihema rya Yayeli, muka Heberi w’Umukeniti, kuko Yabini, umwami wa Hasori, yari afitanye ubwumvikane n’inzu ya Heberi w’Umukeniti." 
Judges4:18 Yayeli arasohoka asanganira Sisera, maze aramubwira ati «Mutegetsi wanjye, hagarara uruhukire iwanjye, kandi ntugire ubwoba.» Nuko Sisera yinjira mu ihema rye, naho undi amworosa ikiringiti." 
Judges4:19 Sisera aramubwira ati «Ndakwinginze ngo umpe utuzi, kuko inyota inyishe.» Uwo mugore apfundura igicuba cy’amata aramuha aranywa, nuko arongera aramworosa." 
Judges4:20 Sisera aramubwira ati «Hagarara hano ku muryango w’ihema, maze nihagira umuntu uza akakubaza ati ’Hari umuntu uri hano?’, umusubize uti ’Nta we’.»" 
Judges4:21 Ariko Yayeli, muka Heberi, afata urubambo rw’ihema n’inyundo, amwinjirana yitonze maze amushingira urubambo mu musaya, ruragenda rwishita ku butaka; Sisera wari unaniwe yari asinziriye cyane, nuko ahita apfa." 
Judges4:22 Ubwo Baraki aratunguka, agikurikiranye Sisera! Yayeli arasohoka ajya kumusanganira, maze aramubwira ati «Ngwino nkwereke umuntu washakaga.» Nuko barinjirana maze Baraki abona Sisera aho arambaraye yapfuye, urubambo rumushise mu musaya." 
Judges4:23 Uwo munsi Uhoraho acogoza Yabini, umwami wa Kanahani, imbere y’Abayisraheli." 
Judges4:24 Nuko Abayisraheli bamaze gukomera barwanya Yabini, umwami wa Kanahani, kugeza ubwo bamutsinze." 
Judges5:1 Uwo munsi Debora na Baraki mwene Ahinowamu, baririmba bavuga bati" 
Judges5:2 «Ubwo muri Israheli biteguye intambara, ubwo imbaga ubwayo yayitabiriye, nimushimire Uhoraho." 
Judges5:3 Bami nimwumve, namwe batware, nimutege amatwi! Ngiye kuririmbira Uhoraho, ngiye kurata Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
Judges5:4 Uhoraho, ubwo wavuye mu gihugu cya Seyiri, ugasohoka mu mayaga ya Edomu, isi yahinze umushyitsi, ijuru rirareta, ibicu birekura ibitonyanga," 
Judges5:5 imisozi itengagurikira imbere y’Uhoraho, imbere y’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
Judges5:6 Mu gihe cya Shamugari, mwene Anati, no mu gihe cya Yayeli, abantu bari bararetse kugenda urushorerane, n’abagendaga banyuraga mu mayira aziguye." 
Judges5:7 Nta batware bari bakiriho, abatware bari ingume muri Israheli, kugeza ubwo wowe, Debora, ukangutse, ukangutse, mubyeyi muri Israheli." 
Judges5:8 Bihitiragamo izindi mana; mu migi itanu nta wari kuhabona ingabo n’imwe, habe n’icumu na rimwe mu Bayisrahel ibihumbi mirongo ine." 
Judges5:9 Umutima wanjye uri kumwe n’abatware ba Israheli, n’abo mu mbaga bitanze ku bwende bwabo. Nimushimire Uhoraho!" 
Judges5:10 Mwebwe abicaye ku ndogobe z’imyeru, mwe abicaye ku mikeka, namwe abari ku rugendo, nimuririmbe!" 
Judges5:11 Ku mabuga aho bagabanira amazi, aho ni ho bazaratira ugutsinda k’Uhoraho, ugutsinda Israheli ikesha imbaraga ze. Nuko umuryango w’Uhoraho umanuka, ukajya ku marembo y’umugi." 
Judges5:12 Kanguka, kanguka, Debora we! Kanguka, kanguka, maze utere indirimbo! Haguruka nawe, Baraki mwene Ahinowamu, maze uganze abari bakwigaruriye!" 
Judges5:13 Nuko abarokotse baramanukana bishyira abanyacyubahiro, umuryango w’Uhoraho ukoranira iruhande rwe nk’intwari." 
Judges5:14 Abakomeye b’i Efurayimu bari mu kabande bakurikirwa na Benyamini bivanga mu ngabo zabo. Umuryango wa Makiri watanze abatware, naho inzu ya Zabuloni itanga abagaba b’ingabo." 
Judges5:15 Abatware mu ba Isakari bari kumwe na Debora, na Baraki yirukanka abasanga mu kibaya. Naho abo mu nzu ya Rubeni bari mu mpaka z’urudaca." 
Judges5:16 Ni iki cyakwicaje hagati y’ibiraro, uteze amatwi imyirongi abashumba bavugiriza amashyo yabo? Ni byo koko, mu nzu ya Rubeni ni ho habereye impaka z’urudaca!" 
Judges5:17 Muri Gilihadi bituriye hakurya ya Yorudani, naho abo kwa Dani, ni iki cyatumye mwigumira mu mato? Abo kwa Asheri bigumiye ku nkombe z’inyanja, maze batura bugufi y’ibyambu byabo." 
Judges5:18 Abo kwa Zabuloni bahaze amagara yabo bahinyura urupfu, kimwe n’abo kwa Nefutali, ntibatinya aho rukomeye." 
Judges5:19 Haduka abami bararwana, nuko abami ba Kanahani barwanira i Tanaki ku isoko y’i Megido; ariko nta munyago, nta na feza bahakuye." 
Judges5:20 Hejuru mu kirere, inyenyeri na zo zitabira intambara, ku bw’ingendo yazo zirwanya Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Umugezi wa Kishoni warabahururanye, Kishoni, umugezi wa kera cyane! None, bugingo bwanjye, genda gitwari usatira urugamba." 
Judges5:22 Nuko amafarasi ahita yanduruka, atabagura ibitaka n’ibinono byayo." 
Judges5:23 Nimuvume Merozi, ni ko Umumalayika w’Uhoraho avuze. Nimuvume abaturage bayo, kuko batavunnye Uhoraho, batatabaye Uhoraho hamwe n’intwari!" 
Judges5:24 Yayeli, muka Heberi w’Umukeniti, nahabwe umugisha mu bagore; mu bagore bose batuye mu mahema nahabwe umugisha!" 
Judges5:25 Sisera yamusabye amazi, we amuha amata; amuhereza ikivuguto mu nkongoro ya gipfura." 
Judges5:26 Arambura ukuboko afata urubambo, ukw’indyo gusingira inyundo y’abakozi; ayikubita Sisera amumena umutwe; aramujanjagura, maze amuhinguranya imisaya." 
Judges5:27 Arikuba yitura hasi arambaraye; imbere ye ni ho yaguye. Aho yaguye yikubye, ni ho yapfiriye." 
Judges5:28 Nyina wa Sisera ahanze amaso mu idirishya, ahanze amaso mu idirishya aganya agira ati ’Kuki igare rye ritinze kugera hano? Kuki amagare ye agenda buhoro, ategereje iki?’" 
Judges5:29 Umunyabwenge muri bagenzi be aramusubiza ati 
Judges5:30 ’Aho ntibabonye iminyago bakaba bayigabana: umukobwa umwe cyangwa babiri kuri buri muntu, umunyago w’imyenda y’amabara kuri Sisera, umutako umwe cyangwa ibiri iboshye yo kwambika ijosi rye!’" 
Judges5:31 Abanzi bawe bose, Uhoraho, baragapfa urwa Sisera, naho incuti zawe zimere nk’izuba rirasanye ingufu.» Nuko igihugu kimara imyaka mirongo ine mu mutuzo." 
Judges6:1 Abayisraheli bakora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho; nuko Uhoraho abagabiza Abamadiyani, mu gihe cy’imyaka irindwi." 
Judges6:2 Madiyani itsinda bikomeye Israheli, bituma Abayisraheli bihisha mu mikokwe yo ku misozi, mu buvumo no mu bisimu, kugira ngo barokoke Madiyani." 
Judges6:3 Ariko buri gihe, iyo Abayisraheli babaga bamaze kubiba imyaka mu mirima, Madiyani na Amaleki hamwe n’abantu b’iburasirazuba, barabateraga." 
Judges6:4 Bagaca ingando bugufi ya Israheli, bakangiza imyaka yose yeze mu gihugu kugeza hafi ya Gaza, kandi ntibagire icyo basigira Israheli cyo kuyitunga, habe n’intama n’imwe, ikimasa cyangwa indogobe." 
Judges6:5 Koko rero, bazamukanaga n’amashyo yabo n’amehema yabo, bakahagera ari benshi cyane nk’inzige, — bo ubwabo n’ingamiya zabo ntawashoboraga kubabarura — maze bakinjira mu gihugu bakakiyogoza." 
Judges6:6 Bityo, Israheli icika intege kubera ibyo Madiyani yayikoreraga; maze Abayisraheli batakambira Uhoraho." 
Judges6:7 Nuko rero Abayisraheli bamaze gutakambira Uhoraho kubera ibyago Madiyani yabatezaga," 
Judges6:8 Uhoraho aboherereza umuhanuzi kubabwira, ati «Dore uko Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli avuze: Ni jye wabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri no mu nzu y’ubucakara." 
Judges6:9 Nabakijije Abanyamisiri n’ababicishaga agahato bose; nabirukanye imbere yanyu maze mbaha igihugu cyabo. 
Judges6:10 Narababwiye nti ’Ndi Uhoraho, Imana yanyu. Ntimuzubahe imana z’Abahemori muturiye mu gihugu!’ Ariko mwanze kumva ijwi ryanjye!»" 
Judges6:11 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho araza, yicara mu nsi y’igiti cy’umushishi cy’i Ofura, cyari icya Yowasi wo mu nzu ya Abiyezeri. Umuhungu we Gideyoni yasekuriraga ingano mu kinogo bengeragamo, kugira ngo azihungishe Abamadiyani." 
Judges6:12 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aramubonekera maze aramubwira ati «Uhoraho ari kumwe nawe, musirikare w’intwari!»" 
Judges6:13 Gideyoni aramusubiza ati «Ni ko se, Mutegetsi wanjye! Niba Uhoraho ari kumwe natwe, ni kuki ibi byose bitwugarije? Byaba se biri he, ibitangaza byose abasekuruza bacu batubwiraga, bagira bati ’Uhoraho se, si We wadukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri?’ None rero Uhoraho yaradutereranye, atugabiza Abamadiyani!»" 
Judges6:14 Nuko Uhoraho arahindukira, aramwitegereza maze aramubwira ati «Genda ukoreshe izo mbaraga ufite, maze Israheli uyikize Madiyani. Koko kandi, ni jye ukohereje!»" 
Judges6:15 Ariko Gideyoni aramubaza ati «Ni ko se, Mutegetsi wanjye, Israheli nzayikiza nte? Inzu yanjye ni yo isuzuguritse mu mazu ya Manase; kandi nanjye, ni jye muto mu rugo rwa data!»" 
Judges6:16 Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Nzaba ndi kumwe nawe, bityo uzatsinda Abamadiyani bose icyarimwe.»" 
Judges6:17 Gideyoni aramusubiza ati «Niba koko nabonye ubutoni imbere yawe, binyerekeshe ikimenyetso ko ari wowe tuvugana." 
Judges6:18 Ndagusabye ngo ntutirimuke hano, kugeza ubwo ngaruka nkuzaniye ituro, maze no kurihereza imbere yawe.» Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Ndaguma aha kugeza ubwo uri bugaruke.»" 
Judges6:19 Gideyoni araza abaga umwana w’ihene, afata ifu yuzuye igitebo, ayikoresha imigati idasembuye. Ashyira inyama mu nkangara n’amaraso mu cyungo, maze byose abijyana mu nsi y’igiti cy’umushishi, arabihereza." 
Judges6:20 Umumalayika w’Imana aramubwira ati «Fata inyama n’imigati idasembuye, ubishyire hejuru y’urutare maze ubisukeho amaraso!» Nuko Gideyoni abigenza atyo." 
Judges6:21 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho atunga isonga y’inkoni yari afashe mu ntoki, maze ayikoza kuri za nyama no kuri ya migati idasembuye. Nuko umuriro ucucumuka muri rwa rutare, maze utwika za nyama na ya migati idasembuye. Ibyo birangiye, Umumalayika w’Uhoraho arazimira, ntiyongera kumubona." 
Judges6:22 Nuko Gideyoni abona ko yari Umumalayika w’Uhoraho, ni ko kuvuga ati «Nyagasani, Mana, koko nabonye Umumalayika w’Uhoraho!»" 
Judges6:23 Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Gira amahoro! Humura; ntuzapfa.» 
Judges6:24 Aho hantu Gideyoni ahubakira Uhoraho urutambiro, maze arwita «Uhoraho‐Mahoro.» Urwo rutambiro ruracyari i Ofura ya Abiyezeri kugeza na n’ubu." 
Judges6:25 Nuko muri iryo joro, Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni ati «Fata ikimasa cy’umushishe cya so, maze usenye urutambiro rwa Behali ruri kwa so, kandi uteme n’igiti cyeguriwe ibigirwamana biri iruhande rwarwo." 
Judges6:26 Hanyuma wubakire Uhoraho, Imana yawe, urutambiro rutunganye ku kanunga k’uriya musozi; ufate cya kimasa ugitureho igitambo gitwikwa hejuru y’inkwi za cya giti cyeguriwe ibigirwamana uri bube watemye.»" 
Judges6:27 Nuko Gideyoni afata abantu cumi mu bagaragu be, maze agenza uko Uhoraho yari yabimubwiye. Ariko kubera ko yatinyaga abantu bo mu nzu ya se n’abo mu mugi, aho kubikora ku manywa, abikora nijoro." 
Judges6:28 Mu gitondo, abantu bo mu mugi babona urutambiro rwa Behali rwarimbutse, ndetse n’igiti cyeguriwe ibigirwamana cyari iruhande rwarwo, basanga cyatemwe, bagitwikishije ikimasa ho igitambo ku rutambiro rwari rumaze kubakwa." 
Judges6:29 Nuko barabazanya bati «Ibi byakozwe na nde?» Bamaze kubaririza no gushakisha, baravuga bati «Gideyoni, mwene Yowasi ni we wabikoze!»" 
Judges6:30 Abantu bo mu mugi babwira Yowasi bati «Shyira ahagaragara umuhungu wawe maze apfe, kuko yarimbuye urutambiro rwa Behali, kandi agatema igiti cyeguriwe imana zacu cyari iruhande rwarwo.»" 
Judges6:31 Yowasi asubiza abari bamukikije bose, ati «Ese ni mwe mugomba kuburanira Behali? Cyangwa se ni mwe muje kumutabara? (Buri muntu wese ushaka kuburanira Behali, agomba kwicwa butaracya!) Niba Behali ari Imana, niyiburanire ubwe, kuko Gideyoni yarimbuye urutambiro rwe.»" 
Judges6:32 Uwo munsi Gideyoni bamwita Yerubehali, bavuga bati «Behali niyiburanire, kuko yarimbuye urutambiro rwe.»" 
Judges6:33 Madiyani yose na Amaleki, hamwe n’abantu b’iburasirazuba bamaze guhuza umugambi, barakorana, bambuka Yorudani maze baca ingando mu kibaya cy’i Yizireyeli." 
Judges6:34 Umwuka w’Uhoraho wisesura kuri Gideyoni, avuza ihembe maze ahamagara umuryango wose wa Abiyezeri ngo umutabare." 
Judges6:35 Yohereza impuruza mu mazu yose ya Manase, kugira ngo bamutabare. Arongera yohereza impuruza mu muryango wa Asheri, uwa Zabuloni n’uwa Nefutali, na bo bazamuka bamusanga." 
Judges6:36 Gideyoni abwira Imana ati «Niba ushaka gukirisha Israheli ikiganza cyanjye nk’uko wabivuze," 
Judges6:37 dore ngiye kurambura uruhu rw’ubwoya bwinshi ku mbuga: nihaboneka ikime ku ruhu honyine maze ubutaka bukagumya kumuka, ndamenyeraho ko ushaka gukirisha Israheli ikiganza cyanjye, nk’uko wabivuze.»" 
Judges6:38 Nuko bigenda bityo. Mu gitondo, Gideyoni abyutse azinga uruhu, maze abona ikime cyuzuye igikombe cy’amazi." 
Judges6:39 Gideyoni ni ko kubwira Imana, ati «Ntundakarire ninongera kuvuga rimwe gusa. Nyemerera nongere nshake ubwa nyuma icyemezo nkoresheje uru ruhu: noneho uruhu rwonyine rusigare rwumutse, naho ikime gitwikire ubutaka bwose.»" 
Judges6:40 Imana ibigenza ityo muri iryo joro: uruhu rwonyine rugumya kumuka, naho ikime gitwikira ubutaka bwose." 
Judges7:1 Yerubehali — ari we Gideyoni — abyuka mu gitondo cya kare, n’imbaga yose yari kumwe na we, maze baca ingando i Eyini‐Harodi, naho ingando ya Madiyani ikaba mu majyaruguru, mu kibaya aherekera ku musozi wa More." 
Judges7:2 Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni, ati «Imbaga muri kumwe ikabije ubwinshi, bitatuma nkugabiza Madiyani: hato Israheli itaziyitirira ikuzo ryanjye, ikavuga ngo ’Narokowe n’ikiganza cyanjye!’" 
Judges7:3 Kubera ibyo rero, utangarize imbaga ibi ngibi: ’Ufite ubwoba n’uwumva adagadwa wese, yisubirire iwe!’» Nuko Gideyoni arabagerageza, maze abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri muri iyo mbaga bitahira iwabo, hasigara abantu ibihumbi cumi." 
Judges7:4 Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni, ati «Iyi mbaga iracyakabije ubwinshi! Bamanure bajye ku nkombe y’amazi, abe ariho mbageragereza. Bityo uwo nzakubwira nti ’Uyu najyane nawe’, uwo azajyana nawe, naho buri muntu nza kukubwira nti ’Uyu ntajyane nawe’, uwo ntimuzajyana!’»" 
Judges7:5 Nuko Gideyoni amanukana imbaga ku nkombe y’amazi; maze Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Umuntu wese uza kurigata amazi n’ururimi nk’uko imbwa zibigenza, umushyire ukwe; naho abaza gupfukama kugira ngo bayayoreshe amashyi, na bo ubashyire ukwabo.»" 
Judges7:6 Nuko umubare w’abarigase amazi n’ururimi ugera ku bantu magana atatu, naho abasigaye bose bari bapfukamye kugira ngo begereze amazi ku munwa n’amashyi." 
Judges7:7 Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni, ati «Abo bantu magana atatu barigase amazi ni bo nzakoresha mbakiza, ni na bo kandi nzakoresha kugira ngo ngabize Madiyani ibiganza byawe. Imbaga nini isigaye, buri muntu natahe iwe.»" 
Judges7:8 Abo uko ari magana atatu bafata ibibindi byarimo impamba y’imbaga, bafata n’amahembe yabo, hanyuma Gideyoni asezerera abandi Bayisraheli bose basubira mu mahema yabo, agumana na ba bantu magana atatu. Ubwo ingando ya Madiyani yari mu kibaya, mu nsi y’iye." 
Judges7:9 Nuko muri iryo joro Uhoraho abwira Gideyoni, ati «Haguruka, umanuke ugane abanzi bawe kuko nabakugabije." 
Judges7:10 Ariko niba utinya kumanuka wenyine, jyana na Pura umugaragu wawe, werekeze ku ngando." 
Judges7:11 Uzumva ibyo bahavugira, urusheho kugira ubutwari kandi ushobore gusakiza ingando. Nuko amanukana na Pura umugaragu we, bagera ku barinzi ba mbere b’ingando." 
Judges7:12 Ubwo Madiyani, Amaleki hamwe n’abantu b’iburasirazuba bose, bari banyanyagiye mu kibaya ari nk’inzige; ntawabashaga kubara ingamiya zabo, na zo zari nyinshi nk’umusenyi wo ku nkombe y’inyanja." 
Judges7:13 Ahageze, Gideyoni yumva umuntu warotoreraga mugenzi we inzozi ze, agira ati «Narose mbona irobe ry’umutsima w’ingano za bushoki ritembagara mu ngando ya Madiyani, riraza ryisekura ku ihema, ririkoza hasi no hejuru kugeza ubwo riribirinduye!»" 
Judges7:14 Mugenzi we amusubiza, agira ati «Si ikindi kindi kandi kitari inkota ya Gideyoni, mwene Yowasi, w’Umuyisraheli. Imana yamugabije Madiyani n’ingando yayo yose.»" 
Judges7:15 Nuko Gideyoni amaze kumva irotorwa ry’izo nzozi n’igisobanuro cyazo, arapfukama ashimira Imana maze agaruka ku ngando ya Israheli; arababwira ati «Nimuhaguruke, kuko Uhoraho yabagabije ingando ya Madiyani!»" 
Judges7:16 Ba bantu uko ari magana atatu, Gideyoni abacamo amatsinda atatu. Buri muntu amuha ihembe n’ikibindi kirimo ubusa, muri buri kibindi hashinzemo ifumba y’umuriro." 
Judges7:17 Nuko arababwira ati «Muze kunyitegereza aho mba ndi, maze uko ndibugenze namwe mugenze mutyo." 
Judges7:18 Jyewe n’abo turi kumwe nituza kuvuza ihembe, namwe muhereko muvuza amahembe mu mpande zose z’ingando, maze mutere hejuru, mugira muti ’Ku bw’Uhoraho no ku bwa Gideyoni!’»" 
Judges7:19 Gideyoni n’abantu ijana bari kumwe na we bagera bugufi y’ingando ahagana mu gicuku, ubwo abanyezamu bari bamaze gusimburana. Baherako bavuza ihembe, bamenagura n’ibibindi bari bafite mu ntoki." 
Judges7:20 Nuko ya matsinda uko ari atatu avuza ihembe, amenagura n’ibibindi; mu kiganza cy’ibumoso bari bafashe ifumba y’umuriro, naho mu cy’iburyo bafashe amahembe bayavuza, maze bagatera hejuru bati «Ku bw’Uhoraho no ku bwa Gideyoni!»" 
Judges7:21 Igihe bagihagaze buri muntu mu mwanya we bakikije ingando, abo mu ngando bose uko bakabaye batangira kwiruka no guhunga, ari ko bagenda bavuza induru." 
Judges7:22 Nuko mu gihe ba bantu magana atatu bavuzaga amahembe yabo, Uhoraho atuma abari mu ngando basubiranamo, buri muntu agatera inkota mugenzi we, maze bose barahunga kugera i Betishita, ku ruhande rwerekera i Saritani, no kugera ku nkombe ya Abeli Mehola, bugufi ya Tabati." 
Judges7:23 Nuko Abayisraheli bose uko bahurujwe mu miryango ya Nefutali, Asheri na Manase, bakurikirana Abamadiyani." 
Judges7:24 Gideyoni yohereza intumwa mu karere k’imisozi miremire yose y’i Efurayimu kuvuga ziti «Mumanuke bwangu mutangire Abamadiyani, mubatange ku mariba y’amazi, kugera i Betibara ndetse no kuri Yorudani.» Abantu bose b’i Efurayimu barahuruzwa, maze babatanga ku mariba y’amazi, kugera i Betibara ndetse no kuri Yorudani." 
Judges7:25 Bafata mpiri abatware babiri b’Abamadiyani, Orebu na Zehebu. Orebu bamwicira ku rutare rwa Orebu, naho Zehebu bamwicira ku rwengero rwa Zehebu. Hanyuma bakomeza kubakurikirana ahagana Madiyani, maze bazanira Gideyoni umutwe wa Orebu n’uwa Zehebu hakurya ya Yorudani." 
Judges8:1 Abefurayimu babaza Gideyoni, bati «Ni iki cyaguteye kutaduhuruza, ugiye gutera Madiyani?» Nuko baramutonganya cyane." 
Judges8:2 Gideyoni arabasubiza ati «Nakoze iki se cyagereranywa n’ibyanyu? Ntimuzi ko uduhumbano tw’imizabibu ya Efurayimu dusumbye kure umusaruro wa Abiyezeri? 
Judges8:3 Imana se si mwe yagabije Orebu na Zehebu, abatware ba Madiyani? Naba narakoze iki se cyagereranywa n’ibyanyu?» Amaze kubabwira ayo magambo, uburakari bari bamufitiye buracogora."
