Judges8:4 Nuko Gideyoni n’abantu magana atatu bari kumwe na we bagera kuri Yorudani maze barambuka. N’ubwo bari baguye agacuho, bakomeza gukurikirana Abamadiyani." 
Judges8:5 Ageze i Sukoti abwira abantu baho, ati «Ndabinginze ngo mumpere abantu turi kumwe utugati kuko bishwe n’inzara, kandi nkaba ngikurikiranye Zebahi na Salimuna, abami ba Madiyani.»" 
Judges8:6 Ariko abatware ba Sukoti baramusubiza bati «Mbese Zebahi na Salimuna wabigaruriye ngo noneho tubone kugaburira ingabo zawe?» 
Judges8:7 Gideyoni ni ko kubasubiza, ati «Uhoraho namara kwegurira Zebahi na Salimuna mu biganza byanjye, mwebwe nzabakubitisha amahwa n’imifatangwe byo mu butayu.»" 
Judges8:8 Avuye aho, azamuka agana i Penuweli, na bo ababwira nk’uko yabwiye aba mbere, maze abantu b’i Penuweli na bo bamusubiza nk’ab’i Sukoti." 
Judges8:9 Nuko Gideyoni asubiza abo bantu b’i Penuweli, ati «Nindamuka ngarutse amahoro, nzasenya uyu munara wanyu!»" 
Judges8:10 Zebahi na Salimuna bari muri Karikori, n’ingabo zabo zigera ku bantu ibihumbi cumi na bitanu, ari bo bacitse ku icumu mu ngabo z’iburasirazuba. Ni koko kandi, mu ngabo zabo hari hapfuyemo abantu ibihumbi ijana na makumyabiri." 
Judges8:11 Gideyoni azamuka akurikiye inzira igana ku batuye mu mahema, iburasirazuba bwa Novahi na Yogiboha, nuko atsinda n’abari basigaye kandi bo bibwiraga ko bihagazeho." 
Judges8:12 Zebahi na Salimuna barahunga, ariko Gideyoni arabakurikirana; afata mpiri abo bami bombi ba Madiyani, Zebahi na Salimuna, maze aca igikuba mu ngabo zose." 
Judges8:13 Gideyoni, mwene Yowasi, atabarutse anyura ku musozi wa Heresi." 
Judges8:14 Agwa gitumo umusore w’i Sukoti, amubaza abatware n’abakuru b’imiryango babo, nuko uwo musore arabamwandikira bose, uko ari mirongo irindwi na barindwi." 
Judges8:15 Hanyuma Gideyoni asanga abantu b’i Sukoti maze arababwira ati «Nimurebe Zebahi na Salimuna, mwanciragaho umugani muvuga muti ’Mbese Zebahi na Salimuna wabigaruriye ngo noneho tubone kugaburira ingabo zawe zishonje?’»" 
Judges8:16 Ahera ko afata abatware b’umugi, afata n’amahwa n’imifatangwe byo mu butayu, abikubitisha abantu b’i Sukoti." 
Judges8:17 Amenagura umunara w’i Penuweli, arimbura n’abantu bose b’uwo mugi." 
Judges8:18 Hanyuma abaza Zebahi na Salimuna, ati «Abantu mwiciye ku musozi wa Taboru bari bameze bate?» Baramusubiza bati «Bari bameze nkawe. Buri muntu wasangaga asa n’umwana w’umwami.»" 
Judges8:19 Arababwira ati «Bari abavandimwe banjye, bene mama! None ndahiye ubuzima bw’Uhoraho ko iyo mubareka bakabaho nanjye sinari kubica!»" 
Judges8:20 Ni ko kubwira Yeteri, umuhungu we w’imfura, ati «Haguruka maze ubice!» Ariko uwo musore atinya gukura inkota, agira ubwoba kuko yari akiri muto." 
Judges8:21 Nuko Zebahi na Salimuna baravuga bati «Haguruka utwiyicire wowe ubwawe, kuko buri muntu akora uko imbaraga ze zingana.» Gideyoni arahaguruka, yica Zebahi na Salimuna, hanyuma afata imitako yari mu majosi y’ingamiya zabo." 
Judges8:22 Abayisraheli babwira Gideyoni, bati «Utubere umutware wowe ubwawe, hanyuma umuhungu wawe, nyuma na we azazungurwe n’umuhungu we, kuko waturokoye ikiganza cya Madiyani.»" 
Judges8:23 Gideyoni arabasubiza, ati «Ari jye, ari n’umuhungu wanjye, nta we uzababera umutware. Uhoraho nababere umutware!»" 
Judges8:24 Gideyoni yongera kubabwira ati «Nagira ngo ngire icyo mbabaza: buri muntu nampereze impeta avanye mu munyago we!» Kandi koko, abo bari batsinze bari bambaye impeta za zahabu, kuko bari Abayismaheli." 
Judges8:25 Baramusubiza bati «Rwose tugiye kuziguha!» Nuko basasa igishura maze buri muntu akajugunyaho impeta akuye mu munyago we. 
Judges8:26 Izo mpeta za zahabu Gideyoni yari yabasabye, zigira uburemere bugera ku masikeli magana arindwi ya zahabu, utabariyemo imitako, amaherena yo ku matwi n’imyenda y’imihemba yambarwaga n’abami b’i Madiyani, utabariyemo kandi n’imitako yo mu majosi y’ingamiya zabo." 
Judges8:27 Gideyoni azikoramo ishusho ry’ikigirwamana, arishyira mu mugi we i Ofura. Israheli yose ikaza kuramya iryo shusho, nuko ribera umutego Gideyoni n’inzu ye." 
Judges8:28 Madiyani itsindwa ityo n’Abayisraheli, ntiyongera no kubyutsa umutwe. Nuko igihugu kimara imyaka mirongo ine mu mutuzo, mu gihe cyose Gideyoni yari akiriho." 
Judges8:29 Yerubehali, mwene Yowasi, aragenda yigumira iwe." 
Judges8:30 Gideyoni yagize abahungu mirongo irindwi bamukomokaho, kuko yari atunze abagore benshi cyane." 
Judges8:31 Naho inshoreke ye yari i Sikemu, na yo yamubyariye umwana w’umuhungu, amwita Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Gideyoni, mwene Yowasi, apfa yisaziye neza, maze bamuhamba mu mva ya Yowasi, i Ofura ya Abiyezeri." 
Judges8:33 Ariko Gideyoni amaze gupfa, Abayisraheli bongera kuramya za Behali, bemera Behali‐Beriti ho imana yabo." 
Judges8:34 Abayisraheli ntibari bacyibuka Uhoraho, Imana yabo, wari warabarokoye abanzi babo bose babakikije," 
Judges8:35 kandi birengagiza inzu ya Yerubehali‐Gideyoni, nyuma y’ibyiza byose yari yarakoreye Israheli." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleki, mwene Yerubehali, ajya i Sikemu kureba bene nyina kugira ngo avugane na bo, ndetse n’umuryango wose w’inzu ya se n’iya nyina, maze arababwira ati" 
Judges9:2 «Mubwire mutya abantu b’i Sikemu: icyababera cyiza ni ikihe? Gutegekwa n’abantu mirongo irindwi — abahungu bose ba Yerubehali — cyangwa se gutegekwa n’umuntu umwe gusa? Mwibuke neza ko ndi uwo mu magufwa yanyu n’umubiri wanyu.» 
Judges9:3 Nuko bene nyina basubirira abantu b’i Sikemu bose muri ayo magambo ya Abimeleki, maze umutima wabo werekera kuri Abimeleki, kuko bibwiraga bati «Ni umuvandimwe wacu.»" 
Judges9:4 Baherako bamuha amasikeli mirongo irindwi y’umuringa bakuye mu ngoro ya Behali‐Beriti, ari na yo Abimeleki yaguzemo abantu b’imburamukoro n’ibyihebe, bamuherekezaga." 
Judges9:5 Nuko asubira mu nzu ya se i Ofura maze yica abavandimwe be, bene Yerubehali; abicira icyarimwe ari mirongo irindwi. Harokotse Yotamu, mwene Yerubehali w’umuhererezi wenyine, kuko yari yihishe." 
Judges9:6 Abanyacyubahiro b’i Sikemu n’ab’i Betimilo bose barakorana, bajya i Sikemu mu nsi y’igiti cy’umushishi, iruhande rw’ibuye rishinze bukingi ryari rihari, maze bimika Abimeleki aba umwami." 
Judges9:7 Nuko bamenyesha Yotamu ibyabaye, aherako ajya mu mpinga y’umusozi wa Garizimu; arangurura ijwi maze arababwira ati «Nimunyumve, bantu b’i Sikemu, namwe kandi Imana ibumve!" 
Judges9:8 Umunsi umwe, ibiti byafashe inzira bijya kwimika uzabibera umwami. Bibwira igiti cy’umuzeti, biti ’Tubere umwami!’" 
Judges9:9 Umuzeti urasubiza uti ’Ndeke gutanga amavuta yanjye ahesha icyubahiro imana n’abantu, ngo ngiye kwinaniza ntegeka ibindi biti?’" 
Judges9:10 Ibiti bibwira umutini, biti ’Ngwino utubere umwami!’" 
Judges9:11 Umutini urasubiza uti ’Ndeke gutanga uburyohe bwanjye n’imbuto zanjye nziza, ngo ngiye kwinaniza ntegeka ibindi biti?’" 
Judges9:12 Noneho ibiti bibwira umuzabibu, biti ’Ngwino utubere umwami!’" 
Judges9:13 Umuzabibu urasubiza uti ’Ndeke gutanga divayi yanjye ishimisha imana n’abantu, ngo ngiye kwinaniza ntegeka ibindi biti?’" 
Judges9:14 Nuko ibiti byose bibwira igihuru cy’amahwa, biti ’Ngwino utubere umwami!’" 
Judges9:15 Ariko igihuru cy’amahwa kirabibwira kiti ’Niba koko munyimitse mubishaka kugira ngo mbabere umwami, nimuze mwugame mu gicucu cyanjye. Ariko niba bitabaye ibyo, umuriro uzasohoka mu gihuru cy’amahwa, maze utsembe amasederi yose ya Libani.’»" 
Judges9:16 Yotamu akomeza, agira ati «Mwebwe se, ubwo mwimikaga Abimeleki ho umwami, mwabikoranye umurava n’umutima utaryarya? Ese mwabikoze muzirikana Yerubehali n’inzu ye yose, mutibagiwe ineza mukesha ibyo yabakoreye?" 
Judges9:17 Koko rero data yarabarwaniriye, ahara amagara ye maze abarokora ikiganza cya Madiyani." 
Judges9:18 None, dore uyu munsi mwahagurukiye inzu ya data; mwishe abahungu be, mwicira icyarimwe abantu mirongo irindwi, maze mwimika Abimeleki, umuhungu w’umugore w’inshoreke ngo abere umwami abanyacyubahiro b’i Sikemu, kuko ari umuvandimwe wanyu!" 
Judges9:19 Niba rero ibyo byose mwabikoranye umurava n’umutima utaryarya, mubigirira Yerubehali n’inzu ye yose, Abimeleki nabatere gusendera ibyishimo, namwe mubimusenderezemo!" 
Judges9:20 Niba kandi bitabaye bityo, umuriro uzasohoka muri Abimeleki maze utsembeho abanyacyubahiro b’i Sikemu na Betimilo; umuriro usohoke kandi mu banyacyubahiro b’i Sikemu na Betimilo, maze utwike Abimeleki!»" 
Judges9:21 Nuko Yotamu arahunga ajya i Beyeri; arahatura kuko hari kure ya Abimeleki, umuvandimwe we." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki ategeka Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka itatu," 
Judges9:23 hanyuma Imana itera umwuka mubi muri Abimeleki n’abatware b’i Sikemu, maze abatware b’i Sikemu bagomera Abimeleki." 
Judges9:24 Ibyo byabereye kugira ngo Abimeleki ahanirwe ubugome bwe, kuko yishe, akamena amaraso y’abahungu mirongo irindwi ba Yerubehali, abavandimwe be; no kugira ngo abatware b’i Sikemu bahanirwe ko bamwoheje kwica abavandimwe be." 
Judges9:25 Abatware b’i Sikemu bashaka gukoshesha Abimeleki, ni ko kugaba udutsiko tw’abantu mu mpinga z’imisozi, bacuza buri wese wahanyuraga; nuko Abimeleki aza kubimenya." 
Judges9:26 Ubwo rero Gahali mwene Ebedi agera i Sikemu ari kumwe n’abavandimwe be, maze abatware b’i Sikemu baramwizera." 
Judges9:27 Baherako barasohoka, bajya mu mizabibu yabo basarura imbuto maze benga amayoga, hanyuma bategura iminsi mikuru. Bajya mu ngoro y’imana yabo, bararya kandi baranywa, maze bavuma Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Gahali arababaza ati «Mbese Abimeleki yaba ari muntu ki kuri Sikemu, kugira ngo adutegeke? Ahubwo mwene Yerubehali na Zebuli icyegera cye, si bo bakwiye gutegekwa n’abantu ba Hamori, umukuru wa Sikemu? Ni kuki se ari twe twamugaragira?" 
Judges9:29 Uwampa gutegeka iki gihugu ngo urebe ukuntu nakwikiza Abimeleki! Namubwira nti ’Ongera ingabo zawe maze uze turwane.’» 
Judges9:30 Zebuli, umutegeka w’umugi, yumva ayo magambo ya Gahali mwene Ebedi, nuko ararakara." 
Judges9:31 Yohereza rwihishwa intumwa kuri Abimeleki kumubwira ziti «Dore Gahali mwene Ebedi n’abavandimwe be bari i Sikemu, bariho baroshya umugi kukugomera." 
Judges9:32 None rero, haguruka iri joro n’abantu muri kumwe, maze mwihishe mu gasozi." 
Judges9:33 Hanyuma nibucya, izuba rikimara kurasa, uzaze maze utere umugi. Igihe Gahali n’abantu bari kumwe na we bazasohoka baje kukurwanya, uzabagenera ikibakwiye.»" 
Judges9:34 Nuko Abimeleki n’abari kumwe na we bose babyuka mu gicuku, bicamo amatsinda ane maze bihisha bugufi ya Sikemu." 
Judges9:35 Gahali mwene Ebedi, arasohoka ahagarara ku irembo ry’umugi. Ako kanya Abimeleki n’ingabo ze bahita bava mu bwihisho." 
Judges9:36 Gahali abonye icyo gico cy’abantu, abwira Zebuli ati «Dore igico cy’abantu bamanuka mu mpinga z’imisozi.» Ariko Zebuli aramusubiza ati «Biriya ni ibicucu by’imisozi wita abantu.»" 
Judges9:37 Gahali arongera ati «Dore abantu bamanuka mu ibanga ry’umusozi, n’abandi baje baturuka ku giti cy’umushishi w’Abapfumu.»" 
Judges9:38 Zebuli aramusubiza ati «Ka karimi kawe se kagannye he? Si wowe wahoze uvuga ngo ’Mbese Abimeleki yaba ari muntu ki kuri Sikemu, kugira ngo adutegeke? ’Sohoka noneho maze umurwanye.»" 
Judges9:39 Gahali asohoka arangaje imbere y’abantu b’i Sikemu, arwana na Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Gahali arahunga, Abimeleki aramukurikirana, maze hagwa abantu benshi kugera ku irembo ry’umugi." 
Judges9:41 Hanyuma Abimeleki atura Aruma, naho Zebuli yirukana Gahali n’abavandimwe be, kugira ngo bataguma i Sikemu." 
Judges9:42 Bukeye, abatuye mu mugi basohoka bajya mu misozi, maze babimenyesha Abimeleki." 
Judges9:43 Nuko Abimeleki afata ingabo ze, azicamo amatsinda atatu, bajya kwihisha ku gasozi. Ngo arabukwe abaturage basohotse mu mugi, abagwa gitumo arabica." 
Judges9:44 Ubwo Abimeleki n’itsinda ryari kumwe na we baraza bigarurira amarembo y’umugi, naho amatsinda abiri asigaye atera abari mu gasozi, maze barabica bose." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki arwana umunsi wose n’abantu b’uwo mugi, hanyuma arawigarurira, yica abaturage bawo bose; umugi awunyanyagizaho umunyu." 
Judges9:46 Abatware b’i Migidali‐Sikemu babyumvise bateranira mu buvumo bwari mu nsi y’ingoro ya Eli‐Beriti. 
Judges9:47 Abimeleki aza kumenya ko abatware b’i Migidali‐Sikemu bahakoraniye. 
Judges9:48 Nuko Abimeleki n’ingabo ze barazamuka bajya ku musozi wa Salimoni. Abimeleki ni ko gufata ishoka, ayitemesha ishami ry’igiti, arariterura arishyira ku rutugu rwe, maze abwira ingabo ze, ati «Ibyo mubonye nkoze, namwe nimwihutire kubikora.»" 
Judges9:49 Buri muntu mu bo bari kumwe, na we atema ishami, nuko bakurikira Abimeleki. Hanyuma ya mashami bayarunda kuri bwa buvumo, barayakongeza maze ubuvumo burakongoka n’abari baburimo bose. Abaturage b’i Migidali‐Sikemu na bo baricwa, bapfa ari abagabo n’abagore bagera ku gihumbi." 
Judges9:50 Nuko Abimeleki arahaguruka yerekeza i Tebesi; arayigota kandi arayigarurira. 
Judges9:51 Muri uwo mugi hakaba umunara uzitiye, aho abantu bose, abagabo n’abagore ndetse n’abakuru b’umugi bari bahungiye. Bamaze gufunga inzugi, barazamuka bajya ahitaruye ku gisenge cy’umunara." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki aza gutera umunara, arawusatira kugera ku rugi, kugira ngo awutwike." 
Judges9:53 Nuko umugore amutera ingasire mu mutwe, maze amumena agahanga." 
Judges9:54 Ako kanya Abimeleki ahamagara umutwaje intwaro, aramubwira ati «Kura inkota yawe maze unsonge, hato bataza kunnyega bavuga ngo ’Yishwe n’umugore!’» Nuko umutwaje inkota aramusogota, arapfa." 
Judges9:55 Abayisraheli babonye ko Abimeleki apfuye, baragenda buri muntu asubira iwe." 
Judges9:56 Nguko uko Imana yahannye Abimeleki, kubera ibibi byose yakoreye se, yica abavandimwe be mirongo irindwi." 
Judges9:57 N’abantu b’i Sikemu, Imana yarabahannye kubera ubugome bwabo. Nuko imivumo Yotamu mwene Yerubehali yabavumye, irangira ityo." 
Judges10:1 Nyuma ya Abimeleki haza Tola mwene Puwa, mwene Dodo, akaba umugabo wo mu muryango wa Isakari, wari utuye i Shamiri mu karere k’imisozi miremire y’i Efurayimu, ahagurukira gukiza Israheli." 
Judges10:2 Aba umucamanza muri Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’itatu; arapfa maze ahambwa i Shamiri. 
Judges10:3 Nyuma ye haza Yayiri w’Umugilihadi, aba umucamanza muri Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’ibiri." 
Judges10:4 Yari afite abahungu mirongo itatu bagendaga ku ndogobe, kandi bari bafite imigi mirongo itatu mu gihugu cya Gilihadi, na n’ubu iracyitwa ingando za Yayiri." 
Judges10:5 Yayiri arapfa maze ahambwa i Kamoni. 
Judges10:6 Abayisraheli bongera gukora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho. Bayoboka za Behali na za Ashitaroti, bayoboka n’imana z’Abaramu, iz’i Sidoni, iz’i Mowabu, iz’Abahamoni n’iz’ Abafilisiti. Birengagiza Uhoraho, ntibongera kumuyoboka ukundi." 
Judges10:7 Nuko uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira Israheli, ni ko kubagabiza Abafilisiti n’Abahamoni." 
Judges10:8 Uwo mwaka bigabanya Israheli, maze mu gihe cy’imyaka cumi n’umunani bamerera nabi Abayisraheli bose bari hakurya ya Yorudani, mu gihugu cy’Abahemori, muri Gilihadi." 
Judges10:9 Abahamoni bambuka Yorudani kugira ngo batere Yuda, Benyamini n’inzu ya Efurayimu, maze Israheli irushaho kugira akaga kenshi." 
Judges10:10 Nuko Abayisraheli batakambira Uhoraho, bavuga bati «Twagucumuyeho, kuko twirengagije Imana yacu, tukayoboka za Behali.»" 
Judges10:11 Uhoraho abwira Abayisraheli, ati «Ubwo Abanyamisiri, Abahemori, Abahamoni, Abafilisiti," 
Judges10:12 Abasidoni, Amaleki na Madiyani bari babamereye nabi mukantakambira, sinabakijije se ibiganza byabo?" 
Judges10:13 Ariko mwebwe mwaranyirengagije, maze muyoboka izindi mana. Ni yo mpamvu ntazongera kubakiza." 
Judges10:14 Ngaho nimugende! Mutakambire imana mwahisemo; maze zijye zibatabara igihe muri mu kaga!» 
Judges10:15 Abayisraheli binginga Uhoraho, bavuga bati «Twaracumuye muri byose, utugenze uko ubyishakiye; ariko uyu munsi wongere udukize!»" 
Judges10:16 Baherako bitandukanya n’imana z’abanyamahanga, maze bayoboka Uhoraho utakwihanganira amakuba ya Israheli." 
Judges10:17 Bukeye, Abahamoni barakorana baca ingando i Gilihadi. Abayisraheli na bo barakorana, maze baca ingando i Misipa." 
Judges10:18 Rubanda n’abatware bari i Gilihadi barabazanya bati «Ni nde mugabo muri mwe uzashoza intambara, akarwanya Abahamoni? Uwo ni we uzaba umutware w’abatuye Gilihadi bose." 
Judges11:1 Yefute w’Umugilihadi yari umurwanyi w’intwari. Ise Gilihadi yari yaramubyaranye n’umugore w’ihabara. 
Judges11:2 Naho umugore wa Gilihadi, na we babyaranye abana b’abahungu; igihe rero abo bana bamaze kuba bakuru, bamenesha Yefute bamubwira bati «Nta murage na busa uteze mu nzu ya data, kuko uri umwana w’undi mugore.»" 
Judges11:3 Yefute ahungira kure abavandimwe be atura mu gihugu cya Tobi. Abantu b’imburamukoro bifatanya na Yefute, maze bakajya bagaba ibitero hamwe na we." 
Judges11:4 Nuko ngo hashire igihe gito, Abahamoni batera Israheli." 
Judges11:5 Abakuru ba Gilihadi ni ko kujya gushaka Yefute mu gihugu cya Tobi, kubera ko Abahamoni bateye Israheli." 
Judges11:6 Baramubwira bati «Ngwino utubere umugaba, tubashe kurwana n’Abahamoni.»" 
Judges11:7 Yefute asubiza abakuru ba Gilihadi, ati «Si mwebwe mwanyanze, kandi mukanyirukana kwa data? Ni mpamvu ki noneho mungarukiye, mubonye muri mu kaga?»" 
Judges11:8 Abakuru ba Gilihadi babwira Yefute, bati «Niba noneho tukugarukiye, ni ukugira ngo uze muri twe maze urwanye Abahamoni, kandi ngo utubere umutware, utegeke abatuye Gilihadi bose.»" 
Judges11:9 Yefute asubiza abakuru ba Gilihadi, ati «Niba mungarukiye kugira ngo ndwanye Abahamoni kandi n’Uhoraho akaramuka abangabije, ubwo ni jye uzaba umutware wanyu.»" 
Judges11:10 Abakuru ba Gilihadi baramusubiza bati «Uhoraho azadukiranura, nituramuka tutagenje uko wabivuze.»" 
Judges11:11 Yefute aherako ajyana n’abakuru ba Gilihadi, maze rubanda rumugira umutware n’umugaba warwo. Nuko Yefute asubira muri ya magambo yose imbere y’Uhoraho i Misipa." 
Judges11:12 Bukeye, Yefute yohereza intumwa ku mwami w’Abahamoni kumubwira ziti «Turapfa iki cyatuma uza kunterera igihugu?»" 
Judges11:13 Umwami w’Abahamoni asubiza za ntumwa za Yefute, ati «Impamvu, ni uko igihe Israheli yazamukaga mu Misiri, yanyaze igihugu cyanjye uhereye kuri Arunoni, ukageza kuri Yaboki no kuri Yorudani. None rero, ungarurire igihugu cyanjye ku neza!»" 
Judges11:14 Yefute yongera kohereza intumwa ku mwami w’Abahamoni," 
Judges11:15 kumubwira ziti «Yefute avuze atya: Abayisraheli ntibigeze banyaga igihugu cya Mowabu cyangwa cy’Abahamoni. 
Judges11:16 Kandi koko, ubwo Abayisraheli bazamukaga mu Misiri, banyuze mu butayu bagana ku Nyanja y’Urufunzo na Kadeshi." 
Judges11:17 Bahageze, Israheli ituma ku mwami wa Edomu, imubwira iti ’Turagusabye ngo ureke twambukire mu gihugu cyawe.’ Ariko umwami wa Edomu abima amatwi. Israheli yongera gutuma no ku mwami wa Mowabu ntiyabyemera, nuko baguma i Kadeshi." 
Judges11:18 Hanyuma bagenda mu butayu, bazenguruka igihugu cya Edomu, bagera mu burasirazuba bw’igihugu cya Mowabu. Baca ingando hakurya y’umugezi wa Arunoni ntibinjira mu gihugu cya Mowabu, kuko Arunoni ari yo mupaka wa Mowabu." 
Judges11:19 Ni bwo Israheli itumye kuri Sihoni, umwami w’Abahemori wari utuye i Heshiboni, imubwira iti ’Turagusabye ngo ureke twambukire mu gihugu cyawe, kugira ngo tugere mu gihugu cyacu.’" 
Judges11:20 Ariko Sihoni ntiyizera Israheli, ayangira kwambukira mu gihugu cye; ahubwo akoranya abantu be bose baca ingando i Yahashi, nuko atera Israheli." 
Judges11:21 Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, ibagabiza Sihoni n’ingabo ze, Israheli irabatsinda. Ubwo Israheli yigarurira icyo gihugu cy’Abahemori." 
Judges11:22 Abayisraheli bagumana batyo icyo gihugu cy’Abahemori, uhereye kuri Arunoni ukageza kuri Yaboki, ugahera kandi ku butayu ukageza kuri Yorudani." 
Judges11:23 None rero, ibyo Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli yanyaze Abahemori mu maso y’umuryango wayo Israheli, wowe urashaka kubibambura?" 
Judges11:24 Wowe se ntutunze ibyo Kamoshi, imana yawe yaguhaye? None se, ibyo Uhoraho, Imana yacu yaduhaye, ni mpamvu ki twe tutabitunga?" 
Judges11:25 Noneho se, uribwira ko waba uruta Balaki mwene Sipori, umwami wa Mowabu? Hari ubwo se yigeze yendereza Israheli, ashaka kuyirwanya?" 
Judges11:26 Dore ubu hashize imyaka magana atatu, Abayisraheli batuye i Heshiboni n’i Aroweri no mu mugi byegeranye, ndetse no mu migi yose iri ku nkombe ya Arunoni. Ni mpamvu ki utabanyaze icyo gihugu muri icyo gihe cyose?" 
Judges11:27 Ku bwanjye ndabona ntaragucumuyeho, ahubwo ari wowe ungirira nabi, ukandwanya. Uhoraho ni we mucamanza, akiranure Abayisraheli n’Abahamoni.»" 
Judges11:28 Ariko umwami w’Abahamoni ntiyita ku butumwa Yefute yamutumyeho. 
Judges11:29 Umwuka w’Uhoraho uza kuri Yefute. Nuko Yefute anyura mu karere ka Gilihadi no mu ntara ya Manase, hanyuma ajya i Misipa muri Gilihadi, ahavuye agera ku mupaka w’igihugu cy’Abahamoni." 
Judges11:30 Yefute asezeranira Uhoraho, agira ati «Nuramuka ungabije Abahamoni," 
Judges11:31 nzaguturaho igitambo gitwikwa umuntu uwo ari we wese uzasohoka bwa mbere mu nzu yanjye aje kunsanganira, ubwo nzaba ntabarutse amahoro maze gutsinda Abahamoni.»" 
Judges11:32 Yefute atambuka umupaka w’Abahamoni kugira ngo abarwanye, maze Uhoraho arabamugabiza." 
Judges11:33 Arabatsemba uhereye Aroweri ukageza ahagana i Miniti, yigarurira imigi makumyabiri yari muri ako karere, kugeza i Yabeli‐Keramimu. Yabishemo abantu benshi; nuko Abayisraheli bacogoza batyo Abahamoni." 
Judges11:34 Ubwo Yefute yari atabarutse atashye iwe i Misipa, umukobwa we aba arasohotse, aza abyina avuza n’ingoma aje kumusanganira. Uwo mukobwa kandi yari ikinege: nta kandi gakobwa cyangwa agahungu Yefute yagiraga." 
Judges11:35 Akimurabukwa, Yefute ashishimura imyambaro ye, maze aravuga ati «Ayiwe! Mwana wanjye, utumye niheba bikabije; uri mu binkururiye amakuba; nanjye kandi nabisezeraniye Uhoraho nkaba ntashobora kwivuguruza.»" 
Judges11:36 Umukobwa we aramusubiza ati «Dawe, niba warabisezeraniye Uhoraho, ngenza uko wabivuze, kuko Uhoraho yahoye abanzi bawe b’Abahamoni.»" 
Judges11:37 Arongera abwira se, ati «Icyo ngusabye ucyinyemerere: ngusabye amezi abiri gusa kugira ngo njyane na bagenzi banjye kubuyera mu misozi no kuririra ubusugi bwanjye.»" 
Judges11:38 Aramusubiza ati «Ngaho genda»; aramureka ngo agende amare amezi abiri. Nuko uwo mukobwa na bagenzi be baragenda bajya mu misozi, aririra ubusugi bwe." 
Judges11:39 Nyuma y’amezi abiri agaruka kwa se, maze se amuturaho igitambo gitwikwa nk’uko yari yarabisezeranye. Kubera ko yapfuye ari isugi, ibyo byahise biba umugenzo muri Israheli," 
Judges11:40 ko, uko umwaka utashye, abakobwa ba Israheli bagira iminsi ine mu mwaka yo kujya kurira bibuka umukobwa wa Yefute w’Umugilihadi." 
Judges12:1 Abefurayimu barakorana, bambuka Yorudani, bagana i Safoni. Babwira Yefute, bati «Kuki wambutse umupaka w’Abahamoni, ukajya kubarwanya utadutabaje? Tuzagutwikira mu nzu yawe!»" 
Judges12:2 Yefute arabasubiza ati «Jye n’abantu banjye twari dushyamiranye bikomeye n’Abahamoni. Igihe mbatabaje, ntimwabangobotora." 
Judges12:3 Mbonye ko mutankijije, nemera guhara amagara yanjye nambuka umupaka w’Abahamoni; nuko Uhoraho arabangabiza. Ni mpamvu ki rero uyu munsi mwampagurukiye, kugira ngo mundwanye?»" 
Judges12:4 Hanyuma Yefute akoranya ingabo zose za Gilihadi arwanya Efurayimu; abantu b’i Gilihadi bica Abefurayimu, kuko bari bavuze bati «Mwebwe Abagilihadi, kera mwahoze muri ab’ Efurayimu, none ubu mwahungiye hagati mu Bamanase.»" 
Judges12:5 Hanyuma Abagilihadi bigarurira ibyambu bya Yorudani bigana i Efurayimu. Nuko igihe umwe mu bacitse ku icumu ba Efurayimu avuze ati «Nimureke nambuke», Abagilihadi bakamubaza bati «Uri Umwefurayimu?» Iyo yasubizaga ati «Oya»," 
Judges12:6 baramubwiraga bati «Ngaho vuga ijambo Shiboleti.» Undi akavuga ati «Siboleti», kuko atashoboraga kurivuga neza. Nuko uwo bakamufata, bakamwicira aho hafi y’ibyambu bya Yorudani. Icyo gihe hagwa abantu ibihumbi mirongo ine na bibiri mu bantu b’i Efurayimu." 
Judges12:7 Yefute aba umucamanza muri Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka itandatu, hanyuma Yefute w’Umugilihadi arapfa, maze ashyingurwa mu mugi we wo muri Gilihadi." 
Judges12:8 Nyuma ya Yefute haza Ibusani w’i Betelehemu, aba umucamanza muri Israheli." 
Judges12:9 Yari afite abahungu mirongo itatu n’abakobwa mirongo itatu. Abo bakobwa abashyingira mu yindi miryango, maze abahungu be na bo abashakira abagore mu yindi miryango. Yabaye umucamanza muri Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka irindwi." 
Judges12:10 Ibusani arapfa, ashyingurwa i Betelehemu." 
Judges12:11 Nyuma ya Ibusani, haza Eloni wo mu muryango wa Zabuloni, aba umucamanza muri Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka cumi." 
Judges12:12 Eloni wo mu muryango wa Zabuloni arapfa, ashyingurwa i Eloni mu gihugu cya Zabuloni." 
Judges12:13 Nyuma ya Eloni, haza Abudoni mwene Hileli w’i Pireyatoni, aba umucamanza muri Israheli." 
Judges12:14 Yari afite abahungu mirongo ine n’abakobwa mirongo itatu, bagenderaga ku ndogobe mirongo irindwi. Yabaye umucamanza muri Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka umunani." 
Judges12:15 Nuko Abudoni mwene Hileli w’i Pireyatoni arapfa, ashyingurwa i Pireyatoni mu gihugu cya Efurayimu, ku musozi w’Abamaleki." 
Judges13:1 Abayisraheli bongera gukora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, nuko Uhoraho abagabiza Abafilisiti mu gihe cy’imyaka mirongo ine." 
Judges13:2 Mu karere ka Soreya hakaba umugabo wo mu muryango wa Dani, akitwa Manowa. Umugore we yari ingumba, nta kana yari yarigeze." 
Judges13:3 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho abonekera uwo mugore maze aramubwira ati «Nzi neza ko uri ingumba ukaba utarigeze akana, ariko noneho ugiye gusama, ukazabyara umuhungu." 
Judges13:4 Guhera ubu, wirinde kunywa divayi cyangwa n’ikindi kinyobwa gisindisha, kandi ntuzarye ikiribwa icyo ari cyo cyose cyahumanye," 
Judges13:5 kuko ugiye gusama inda maze ukabyara umuhungu. Urwembe ntiruzamugere ku mutwe, kuko uwo muhungu azegurirwa Imana akiri mu nda ya nyina, kandi akaba ari we uzatangira kugobotora Israheli mu biganza by’Abafilisiti.»" 
Judges13:6 Umugore arataha, abwira umugabo we, ati «Umuntu w’Imana yansanze aho nari ndi, nabonaga asa n’Umumalayika w’Imana, n’ubwo kumureba byari biteye ubwoba. Sinamubajije uwo ari we, kandi na we ntiyampishuriye izina rye." 
Judges13:7 Yambwiye ati ’Dore ugiye gusama, ukazabyara umuhungu. Guhera ubu, ntukanywe divayi cyangwa n’ikindi kinyobwa gisindisha; ntukarye kandi ikiribwa icyo ari cyo cyose cyahumanye, kuko uwo muhungu azegurirwa Imana kuva akiri mu nda ya nyina kugeza igihe azapfira.’»" 
Judges13:8 Nuko Manowa yambaza Uhoraho, agira ati «Nyagasani, ngusabye ko umuntu w’Imana wohereje yakongera akagaruka, kugira ngo atwigishe icyo tugomba gukorera uwo mwana, igihe azaba amaze kuvuka.»" 
Judges13:9 Imana yumva ijwi rya Manowa, maze Umumalayika w’Imana yongera gusanga wa mugore aho yari yicaye mu murima, ariko Manowa, umugabo we ntiyari ahari." 
Judges13:10 Ako kanya umugore ariruka, ajya kubimenyesha umugabo we, agira ati «Dore wa muntu wigeze kunsanga, yongeye kumbonekera.»" 
Judges13:11 Manowa arahaguruka akurikira umugore we, asanga wa muntu maze aramubaza ati «Mbese ni wowe wa muntu wigeze kuvugisha uyu mugore?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Ni jyewe rwose.»" 
Judges13:12 Manowa aramubaza ati «Ubwo ijambo ryawe rizaba ryujujwe, mbese ni irihe tegeko rizagenga uwo mwana w’umuhungu? Tuzamugenzereze dute?»" 
Judges13:13 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho asubiza Manowa agira ati «Ibyo nabujije uyu mugore byose, agomba kubyirinda:" 
Judges13:14 nta kinyobwa icyo ari cyo cyose giturutse ku mbuto y’umuzabibu agomba kunywa: ntazanywa divayi cyangwa n’ikindi kinyobwa gisindisha; ntazarya ikiribwa icyo ari cyo cyose gihumanye, kandi agomba kubahiriza ibyo namubwiye byose.»" 
Judges13:15 Manowa abwira Umumalayika w’Uhoraho, ati «Twemerere ko tukwakira, maze tugutegurire umwana w’ihene.»" 
Judges13:16 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho asubiza Manowa, ati «Naho wanyakira, sinarya ku mugati wawe, ariko kandi niba ushaka gutura igitambo gitwikwa, ugiture Uhoraho.» — Ni koko kandi, Manowa ntiyari azi ko ari Umumalayika w’Uhoraho —." 
Judges13:17 Manowa abaza Umumalayika w’Uhoraho, ati «Witwa nde, kugira ngo ibyo wavuze nibirangira tuzashobore kuguha icyubahiro?»" 
Judges13:18 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Ni mpamvu ki umbaza izina ryanjye? Ni ibanga.» 
Judges13:19 Manowa afata umwana w’ihene n’andi maturo, abishyira hejuru y’urutare maze abitura Uhoraho Nyir’ibanga." 
Judges13:20 Nuko, ubwo ikirimi cy’umuriro cyazamukaga ku rutambiro cyerekeza ku ijuru, Umumalayika w’Uhoraho azamuka muri icyo kirimi cy’umuriro cyo ku rutambiro. Manowa n’umugore we babibonye, bikubita hasi bubamye ku butaka." 
Judges13:21 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho ntiyongera ukundi kubonekera Manowa n’umugore we, nyamara Manowa amenya ko yari Umumalayika w’Uhoraho." 
Judges13:22 Manowa abwira umugore we, ati «Tugiye gupfa nta kabuza, kuko twabonye Imana.»" 
Judges13:23 Ariko umugore we aramusubiza ati «Iyaba Imana yashakaga kutwica, ntiyajyaga kwakira igitambo gitwikwa n’andi maturo twayituye; ntiyajyaga kutwereka biriya byose kandi ntiba yaduhaye n’ariya mabwiriza twumvise mu kanya.»" 
Judges13:24 Nuko uwo mugore abyara umuhungu, maze amwita Samusoni. Umuhungu arakura kandi Uhoraho amuha umugisha." 
Judges13:25 Samusoni yari i Mahane‐Dani hagati ya Soreya na Eshitayoli, igihe umwuka w’Uhoraho utangiye kumukoresha ubwa mbere." 
Judges14:1 Umunsi umwe, Samusoni aramanuka ajya i Timuna, abenguka umukobwa wo mu Bafilisiti." 
Judges14:2 Nuko atashye, abibwira se na nyina, ati «I Timuna, nahabengutse umukobwa wo mu Bafilisiti. None nimujye kumunsabira, ambere umugore.»" 
Judges14:3 Ababyeyi be baramusubiza bati «Wabuze umugore mu bakobwa ba bene wanyu no mu muryango wacu, kugira ngo ube wajya gushaka umugore muri ziriya ntagenywe z’Abafilisiti?» Ariko Samusoni asubiza se, ati «Umunsabire, kuko ari we wanguye ku mutima.»" 
Judges14:4 Ubwo ababyeyi be ntibari bazi ko ibyo byaturutse kuri Uhoraho, kuko yashakaga uburyo bwo kwiyenza ku Bafilisiti bari barigaruriye Israheli muri icyo gihe." 
Judges14:5 Samusoni aramanuka ajya i Timuna. Ageze ku mizabibu y’i Timuna, ahura n’icyana cy’intare kiza kimutontomera." 
Judges14:6 Umwuka w’Uhoraho umwinjiramo; ako kanya Samusoni utari ufite intwaro mu ntoki, ashwanyuza ya ntare, ayitanyuramo ibisate bibiri nk’uko batanyura umwana w’ihene, ariko ntiyabwira ababyeyi be ibyo yakoze." 
Judges14:7 Hanyuma amanuka ajya i Timuna, aganira n’uwo mukobwa maze yumva aranyuzwe." 
Judges14:8 Nyuma y’iminsi mike, Samusoni asubira i Timuna, agiye kuzana umugore we. Ageze mu nzira, abanza kunyura ha handi, ngo arebe intumbi ya ya ntare: asanga mu gikanka cyayo harimo irumbo ry’inzuki n’ubuki." 
Judges14:9 Ahakuramo ubuki mu kiganza, agenda aburya inzira yose. Ageze iwabo ahaho ababyeyi be na bo bararya, ariko ntiyababwira ko ubwo buki yabuhakuye mu gikanka cya ya ntare." 
Judges14:10 Hanyuma se aramanuka ajya iw’umukazana we, nuko Samusoni ahakorera ibirori by’ubukwe nk’uko abasore bose babigenzaga." 
Judges14:11 Abafilisiti bakimara kumubona, bitoranyamo abasore mirongo itatu bo kugumana na we." 
Judges14:12 Samusoni arababwira ati «Ngiye kubaha igisakuzo. Nimuramuka mucyishe muri iyi minsi irindwi y’ubukwe, mukabona icyo gisobanura, nzabaha amakanzu mirongo itatu n’imyambaro mirongo itatu yo guhinduranya." 
Judges14:13 Ariko nimuramuka mutacyishe, ni mwebwe muzampa amakanzu mirongo itatu n’imyambaro mirongo itatu yo guhinduranya.» Nuko baramusubiza bati «Tubwire igisakuzo cyawe, turakumva.»" 
Judges14:14 Samusoni araterura ati «Mu kiryana havuyemo ikiribwa, naho mu kinyamakare havamo ikiryohereye.» Mu minsi itatu yose, abo basore bari batarashobora kubona igisobanuro cy’icyo gisakuzo." 
Judges14:15 Nuko ku munsi wa kane babwira muka Samusoni, bati «Shukashuka umugabo wawe kugira ngo adusobanurire iki gisakuzo; niba wanze turagutwika hamwe n’inzu ya so. Mwaba se mwaradutumiriye kutwambura?»" 
Judges14:16 Muka Samusoni ajya kumuganyira, agira ati «Uranyanga gusa nta kindi; nta bwo unkunda. Cya gisakuzo wasakuje abasore bo mu muryango wanjye, nta bwo wambwiye icyo gisobanura.» Samusoni aramusubiza ati «Nta n’ubwo nigeze ngisobanurira ababyeyi banjye, none ni wowe nagisobanurira!»" 
Judges14:17 Umugore we akomeza kumuganyira mu minsi irindwi yose ibirori by’ubukwe byamaze. Ku munsi wa karindwi, Samusoni amusobanurira cya gisakuzo, kuko yari amaze kumurembya; maze umugore ajya kubwira ba basore bo mu muryango we icyo cya gisakuzo gisobanura." 
Judges14:18 Nuko ku munsi wa karindwi, mbere yuko izuba rirenga, abatuye umugi babwira Samusoni, bati «Ni iki cyaryohera kuruta ubuki, ni iki kandi cyagira amakare kuruta intare?» Samusoni arabasubiza ati «Iyo mutajya guhingisha inyana yanjye, ntimwari gushobora kwica igisakuzo cyanjye.»" 
Judges14:19 Nuko umwuka w’Uhoraho winjira muri Samusoni, aramanuka ajya i Ashikeloni yica abantu mirongo itatu mu baturage b’aho, abacuza imyambaro maze ayiha abari basobanuye cya gisakuzo. Uko yakarakaye yisubirira kwa se." 
Judges14:20 Naho umugore we, bamushyingira umuhungu w’incuti ya Samusoni, wari waramuherekeje aguma iruhande rwe muri iyo minsi yose y’ibirori." 
Judges15:1 Hashize iminsi mike, mu gihe cy’isarura ry’ingano, Samusoni ajya gusura umugore we, ajyana umwana w’ihene, maze aravuga ati «Ndashaka kwinjira iw’umugore wanjye, mu cyumba aryamamo.» Ariko sebukwe amubuza kwinjira," 
Judges15:2 ahubwo abwira Samusoni, ati «Mu by’ukuri, nibwiye ko wagiriye umugore wawe inzika, maze mushyingira umuhungu w’incuti yawe. Ariko se, murumuna we w’umuhererezi ntiyagushobokera kuruta mukuru we? Noneho rero, mujyane umushyire mu cyimbo cya mukuru we!»" 
Judges15:3 Samusoni aramusubiza ati «Ubu noneho ni nde uzandenganyiriza ikibi ngiye gukorera Abafilisiti?» 
Judges15:4 Samusoni aragenda, afata ingunzu magana atatu, ashaka amafumba, maze ingunzu ebyiri akazihambiranya imirizo, agashyira ifumba hagati y’iyo mirizo yombi." 
Judges15:5 Hanyuma akongeza ya mafumba, maze ingunzu azirekurira mu mirima y’ingano y’Abafilisiti, atwika imiba y’ingano ndetse n’izitarageswa, atwika imizabibu n’imizeti." 
Judges15:6 Abafilisiti barabaza bati «Ni nde wakoze ibi?» Barabasubiza bati «Ni Samusoni, umukwe w’umugabo w’i Timuna, akaba yabikoreye ko uwo mugabo yamunyaze umugore we, maze akamushyingira umuhungu w’incuti ye.» Abafilisiti baherako barazamuka, wa mugore bamutwikana na se." 
Judges15:7 Samusoni arababwira ati «Ubwo mubigenje mutyo, nzaruhuka ari uko maze kwihorera.»" 
Judges15:8 Nuko arabatera, maze abicamo benshi cyane, hanyuma arazamuka ajya kwibera mu buvumo bwari mu rutare i Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Abafilisiti barazamuka baca ingando muri Yuda, badendeza mu karere ka Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Bene Yuda barababaza bati «Ni mpamvu ki muzamutse mukaza kudutera?» Abafilisiti barabasubiza bati «Twazamuwe no kuboha Samusoni, kugira ngo tumugenze uko yatugize.»" 
Judges15:11 Nuko Bene Yuda ibihumbi bitatu baramanuka bajya ku buvumo bwari Etamu, babaza Samusoni, bati «Nta bwo uzi ko dutegekwa n’Abafilisiti? Ibyo wadukoreye ni ibiki?» Arabasubiza ati «Uko bangenjeje nanjye ni ko nabagize.»" 
Judges15:12 Baramubwira bati «Tuzanywe no kukuboha, kugira ngo tukwegurire Abafilisiti.» Samusoni arababwira ati «Nimundahire ko mwebwe ubwanyu mutazanyica.»" 
Judges15:13 Baramusubiza bati «Oya, turashaka gusa kukuboha maze tukakwegurira Abafilisiti, ariko nta bwo dushaka kukwica.» Nuko bamubohesha imigozi ibiri mishya, maze baramuzamukana bamukuye mu rutare." 
Judges15:14 Ngo bagere bugufi ya Lehi, Abafilisiti barabasanganira basakabaka, ariko umwuka w’Uhoraho umwinjiramo: imigozi yari imuboshye amaboko ihinduka nk’ubudodo bw’ihariri bushongeshejwe n’umuriro, ingoyi zibohora ku maboko ye." 
Judges15:15 Hanyuma arabukwa urwasaya rw’indogobe rukiri rubisi, arambura ukuboko ararufata, maze arwicisha abantu igihumbi." 
Judges15:16 Samusoni aravuga ati «Nafashe urwasaya rw’indogobe maze ndabarundanya; nicishije urwasaya rw’indogobe abantu igihumbi.» 
Judges15:17 Amaze kuvuga ibyo, rwa rwasaya arujugunya kure ye. Aho hantu ho bahise bahita Ramati‐Lehi (ari byo kuvuga «umusozi w’urwasaya»)." 
Judges15:18 Kubera ko Samusoni yari afite inyota, atakambira Uhoraho, agira ati «Ni wowe umugaragu wawe akesha uku gutsinda gukomeye. None ubu ngiye kwicwa n’inyota, maze ngwe mu biganza bya ziriya ntagenywe?»" 
Judges15:19 Nuko Imana ifukura iriba i Lehi, maze havubukamo isoko. Samusoni ahera ko aranywa, agarura ubuyanja kandi yongera kugira n’imbaraga. Ni yo mpamvu iyo soko bayise Eyini‐Kore (ari byo kuvuga «isoko y’uwatakambye»); na n’ubu iracyari aho i Lehi." 
Judges15:20 Samusoni amara imyaka makumyabiri ari umucamanza muri Israheli, mu gihe cy’Abafilisiti." 
Judges16:1 Samusoni ajya i Gaza, ahasanga umugore w’ihabara maze yinjira iwe." 
Judges16:2 Babimenyesha abaturage b’i Gaza, bati «Samusoni yaje hano.» Bahera ko bajagajaga umugi, baramwubikira ijoro ryose ku marembo yawo. Iryo joro ryose bari batuje, bibwira bati «Dutegereze ko bucya maze tumwice.»" 
Judges16:3 Ariko Samusoni ntiyakomeje kuryama, yagejeje mu gicuku arabyuka afata ibikingi by’amarembo, abirandurana n’inzugi zombi n’amapata yazo, abiterera ku bitugu maze arabijyana kugera ku mpinga y’umusozi uteganye na Heburoni." 
Judges16:4 Nuko ibyo birangiye, Samusoni abenguka umugore witwa Dalila, wari utuye aherekera ku kibaya cya Soreki." 
Judges16:5 Abatware b’Abafilisiti barazamuka bajya kubonana n’uwo mugore, baramubwira bati «Umushukashuke maze umenye aho akomora ziriya mbaraga zidasanzwe, kandi umenye n’ukuntu twashobora kumufata tukamuboha, tukamucogoza; tuzaguha buri muntu muri twe amasikeli igihumbi n’ijana ya feza.»" 
Judges16:6 Dalila abwira Samusoni, ati «Ndagusabye ngo umbwire aho izo mbaraga zawe zidasanzwe zikomoka, n’ukuntu wabohwa kugira ngo ucogore.»" 
Judges16:7 Samusoni aramusubiza ati «Bambohesheje injishi ndwi z’umuheto zikiri nshya kandi zitigeze zanikwa, nacogora maze nkamera nk’abandi bantu.»" 
Judges16:8 Abatware b’Abafilisiti bazanira Dalila injishi ndwi zikiri nshya kandi zitigeze zanikwa, arazimubohesha." 
Judges16:9 Uwo mugore yari yahishe abantu mu cyumba cye, atera hejuru ati «Urapfuye Samusoni we, Abafilisiti baragufashe.» Nuko Samusoni acagagura za njishi nk’aho zabaye urudodo rushongeshejwe n’umuriro. Ariko ntibashobora guhishura aho akura imbaraga ze." 
Judges16:10 Dalila ni ko kubwira Samusoni, ati «Wansuzuguye kandi urambeshya. None rero, ndakwinginze ngo umpishurire ukuntu ushobora kubohwa.»" 
Judges16:11 Samusoni aramusubiza ati «Bambohesheje imigozi mishya itigeze gukoreshwa, nacogora maze nkamera nk’abandi bantu.»" 
Judges16:12 Dalila afata imigozi mishya aramuboha, hanyuma atera hejuru ati «Urapfuye Samusoni we, Abafilisiti baragufashe.» Uwo mugore yari yahishe abantu mu cyumba cye, ariko Samusoni acagagura ya migozi yari imuboshye amaboko nk’aho yabaye urudodo." 
Judges16:13 Dalila abwira Samusoni, ati «Kugeza ubu waransuzuguye kandi urambeshya. Ndakwinginze ngo umpishurire rwose ukuntu ushobora kubohwa.» Samusoni aramusubiza ati «Ubohanyije amapfundo arindwi y’umusatsi wanjye, ukayazirika ku mushumi w’umwenda maze ukabifatisha urusokozo rw’umuboshyi w’imyenda, bityo nacogora nkamera nk’abandi bantu.»" 
Judges16:14 Uwo mugore aramubikira, amaze gusinzira abohanya amapfundo arindwi y’umusatsi, ayazirika ku mushumi w’umwenda, abifatisha urusokozo maze atera hejuru ati «Urapfuye Samusoni we, Abafilisiti baragufashe.» Ahera ko arakanguka, ashikuza rwa rusokozo, amapfundo y’umusatsi n’umushumi w’umwenda." 
Judges16:15 Dalila aramubwira ati «Ushobora kuvuga ute ngo ’Ndagukunda’, kandi utanyizera? Dore ubu bibaye incuro eshatu zose umbeshya, kandi nturampishurira impamvu zituma imbaraga zawe zingana zityo.»" 
Judges16:16 Buri munsi Dalila agakomeza kumuhata, amusubirira mu magambo amwe, bigeze aho Samusoni arananirwa byo gupfa, ntiyaba agishoboye kwihangana." 
Judges16:17 Nuko amuhishurira amabanga ye yose, agira ati «Nta rwembe rwigeze ku mutwe wanjye, kuko neguriwe Imana kuva nkiri mu nda ya mama. Iyo njya kogoshwa, imbaraga zanjye zajyaga kumvamo, maze ngacogora nkamera nk’abandi bantu.»" 
Judges16:18 Dalila abonye ko amuhishuriye amabanga ye yose, atuma ku Bafilisiti, ababwira ati «Noneho nimuzamuke, kuko yampishuriye amabanga ye yose.» Abatware b’Abafilisiti barazamuka baza iwe, bacigatiye za feza bari bamusezeranyije." 
Judges16:19 Nuko Dalila abikirira Samusoni ku bibero bye, ahamagara umuntu yogosha amapfundo arindwi y’umusatsi we, maze atangira gucika intege n’imbaraga ze zimuvamo." 
Judges16:20 Dalila aramubwira ati «Urapfuye Samusoni we, Abafilisiti baragufashe.» Samusoni akanguka yibwira ati «Birangendekera nk’uko bisanzwe, maze mbakire», ariko ntiyari azi ko Uhoraho yamwitaruye." 
Judges16:21 Abafilisiti baramufata bamunogoramo amaso; baramumanukana n’i Gaza, bamubohesha imikwege y’umuringa maze bamushyira mu nzu y’imbohe, bamutegeka kujya asya ingano." 
Judges16:22 Ariko bamaze kumwogosha, imisatsi yo ku mutwe we yongera kumera." 
Judges16:23 Nuko abatware b’Abafilisiti barakorana kugira ngo bature ibitambo Dagoni, ikigirwamana cyabo, no kugira ngo bakore umunsi mukuru. Baravuga bati «Imana yacu yatweguriye Samusoni, umwanzi w’Abafilisiti.»" 
Judges16:24 Rubanda ngo barabukwe Samusoni, batera hejuru bashimira imana yabo, bagira bati «Imana yacu yatweguriye umwanzi wacu, uwarimburaga igihugu cyacu, akatwicira abantu batabarika.»" 
Judges16:25 Nuko kubera ko bari banezerewe, bakavuga bati «Nimuhamagare Samusoni, maze tumwishimeho.» Bajya gushaka Samusoni mu nzu y’imbohe, bamushyira imbere yabo kugira ngo bamwishimeho, hanyuma bamuhagarika hagati y’inkingi." 
Judges16:26 Samusoni abwira umuhungu wari umurandase, ati «Nyobora maze umfatishe ku nkingi zishyigikiye iyi ngoro, kugira ngo nzishingikirizeho.»" 
Judges16:27 Ubwo iyo ngoro yari yuzuye abagabo n’abagore; hakaba kandi n’abatware b’Abafilisiti, naho ahitaruye hejuru y’igisenge cy’ingoro, hari abagabo n’abagore bagera ku bihumbi bitatu bitegerezaga amashyengo ya Samusoni." 
Judges16:28 Samusoni yambaza Uhoraho, agira ati «Ndakwinginze, Nyagasani Mana, ngo unyibuke maze ungaruremo imbaraga aka kanya, Mana yanjye, kugira ngo nibura rimwe rizima, nihorere Abafilisiti kubera amaso yanjye.»" 
Judges16:29 Nuko Samusoni ahera ko afata inkingi ebyiri zo hagati zari zishyigikiye ingoro, arazishingikiriza, imwe ayifatisha ukuboko kw’iburyo, indi ukw’ibumoso." 
Judges16:30 Samusoni atera hejuru, ati «Mpfane n’Abafilisiti!» Hanyuma izo nkingi azihirikisha imbaraga ze zose, ingoro iridukira ku batware b’Abafilisiti n’abari bayirimo bose. Abapfuye bahitanywe n’urupfu rwa Samusoni, baruta kure abo yari yarishe mu buzima bwe." 
Judges16:31 Abavandimwe be n’abo mu nzu ya se barazamuka baramutwara; bamushyingura hagati ya Soreya na Eshitayoli, mu mva ya se Manowa. Samusoni yabaye umucamanza muri Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka makumyabiri." 
Judges17:1 Hariho umugabo wo mu karere k’imisozi y’i Efurayimu, akitwa Mikayahu." 
Judges17:2 Umunsi umwe abwira nyina, ati «Ya masikeli igihumbi n’ijana ya feza bagutwaye, bigatuma uvumana ndetse nanjye ubwanjye nkabyumva, ndayafite; ni jye wari wayatwaye! None rero ndayagusubiza.» Nyina aramusubiza ati «Uhoraho aguhe umugisha, mwana wanjye!»" 
Judges17:3 Nuko Mikayahu asubiza nyina ya masikeli igihumbi n’ijana ya feza, ariko nyina aramubwira ati «Mu by’ukuri, izi feza nazeguriye Uhoraho kubera wowe, muhungu wanjye, kugira ngo uzikoreshemo imana n’ishusho ry’icyuma.»" 
Judges17:4 Nyina aherako afatamo amasikeli magana abiri ya feza ayaha umucuzi. Umucuzi na we akora ikigirwamana n’ishusho ry’icyuma gishongeshejwe, abishyira mu nzu ya Mikayahu." 
Judges17:5 Nyamara uwo mugabo Mika, yari yariyubakiye isengero. Nuko akoresha uruhago rw’amabuye y’ubufindo n’utundi dushushanyo tweguriwe Imana, maze ashyiraho umwe mu bahungu be ngo amubere umuherezabitambo." 
Judges17:6 Muri iyo minsi, nta mwami wariho muri Israheli; buri muntu yakoraga icyo abona kimutunganiye." 
Judges17:7 Nyamara i Betelehemu ya Yuda, hakaba umusore w’Umulevi wabanaga n’abo mu muryango wa Yuda." 
Judges17:8 Uwo musore ava i Betelehemu ya Yuda, ajya gushaka ahandi yakwibera. Ageze mu karere k’imisozi miremire y’i Efurayimu, ahingukira ku rugo rwa Mika." 
Judges17:9 Mika aramubaza ati «Uraturuka he?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Ndi Umulevi w’i Betelehemu ya Yuda, ndajya gushaka aho nakwibera.»" 
Judges17:10 Nuko Mika aramubwira ati «Igumire hano iwanjye, maze umbere data n’umuherezabitambo. Nzajya nguha amasikeli cumi ya feza mu mwaka, nkugerekereho imyambaro n’ibyo uzarya.»" 
Judges17:11 Uwo Mulevi yemera kuguma iwe, nuko Mika akamufata nk’umwe mu bahungu be." 
Judges17:12 Mika ashyiraho uwo musore w’Umulevi, ngo amubere umuherezabitambo, aguma atyo mu rugo rwe." 
Judges17:13 Mika aribwira ati «Noneho ndahamya ko Uhoraho azankorera ibyiza, kuko uyu Mulevi abaye umuherezabitambo wanjye.»" 
Judges18:1 Muri iyo minsi, nta mwami wariho muri Israheli. Hagati aho, umuryango wa Dani washakaga igihugu waturamo, kuko kugeza icyo gihe bo nta cyo bagiraga, mu miryango yose ya Israheli." 
Judges18:2 Abadani bafata abantu batanu b’intwari mu muryango wabo, babohereza mu karere ka Soreya na Eshitayoli kugira ngo bitegereze igihugu kandi bakimenye neza. Barababwira bati «Nimugende mumenye neza icyo gihugu.» Abo bantu batanu bagera mu karere k’imisozi miremire y’i Efurayimu, bahingukira ku rugo rwa Mika, baraharara." 
Judges18:3 Nuko igihe bari bugufi y’urugo rwa Mika, bamenya ijwi ry’uwo musore w’Umulevi. Ngo bamugere iruhande, baramubaza bati «Ni nde wakuzanye hano? Urahakora iki? Ni iki cyatumye uhaguma?»" 
Judges18:4 Arabasubiza ati «Mika yankoreye ibintu byinshi: yananshyizeho ngo mubere umuherezabitambo.» 
Judges18:5 Baramubwira bati «Nuko rero, baza Imana kugira ngo tumenye niba uru rugendo rwacu ruzaba ruhire.»" 
Judges18:6 Umuherezabitambo arabasubiza ati «Nimugende amahoro! Urugendo murimo rushyigikiwe n’Uhoraho!» 
Judges18:7 Ba bantu batanu baragenda, bagera i Layishi. Basanga abaturage b’aho bibereye mu mutekano nk’Abasidoni, bari batuje kandi bizerana. Byongeye kandi, nta mwami n’umwe wateraga icyo gihugu, nta n’uwajyagayo kugira ngo abategeke. Abaturage b’i Layishi bari kure y’Abasidoni, ntawabategekaga." 
Judges18:8 Ba bantu batanu baragaruka, basanga abavandimwe babo i Soreya n’i Eshitayoli, maze abavandimwe babo barababaza bati «Murabitekerezaho iki?»" 
Judges18:9 Barabasubiza bati «Duhaguruke! Tuzamuke tubatere, kuko igihugu twakibonye kandi kikaba ari cyiza cyane. Ariko kandi, dore mwibereye aho nta cyo mukora! Uwo mwete muke wanyu ntubabuze kugenda ngo mwinjire muri icyo gihugu kandi ngo mucyigarurire." 
Judges18:10 Nimukinjiramo, muzahasanga abantu bizerana. Igihugu kiragutse kandi Imana yakibeguriye. Ni ahantu hatabuze ikintu na kimwe mu byiza byo ku isi.»" 
Judges18:11 Nuko Abadani bagera ku bantu magana atandatu biteguye intambara, barahaguruka bava i Soreya n’i Eshitayoli." 
Judges18:12 Barazamuka baca ingando i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu, muri Yuda. Ni yo mpamvu aho hantu hitwa Ingando ya Mahanedani kugeza na n’ubu. Ni ahagana mu burengerazuba bwa Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu." 
Judges18:13 Bavuye aho ngaho, banyura mu karere k’imisozi miremire y’i Efurayimu, maze bahingukira ku rugo rwa Mika." 
Judges18:14 Ba bantu batanu bari baragiye gutata igihugu cya Layishi bafata ijambo, babwira abavandimwe babo, bati «Ese muzi ko muri uru rugo, harimo uruhago rw’amabuye y’ubufindo n’udushushanyo tweguriwe Imana, hakaba n’ikindi kigirwamana n’ishusho ry’icyuma gishongeshejwe? None rero, mumenye hakiri kare icyo muri bukore.»" 
Judges18:15 Nuko ba bantu batanu baca ku ruhande, binjira mu nzu ya wa musore w’Umulevi wari mu rugo rwa Mika, bamubaza amakuru ye," 
Judges18:16 naho ba bantu magana atandatu bo mu muryango wa Dani bari bahagaze ku marembo, bose bitwaje intwaro z’intambara." 
Judges18:17 Nuko ba bantu batanu bari baragiye gutata igihugu bazamuka mu nzu yo hejuru, barinjira maze bafata rya shusho ry’ikigirwamana, uruhago rw’amabuye y’ubufindo, udushushanyo tweguriwe Imana n’ishusho ry’icyuma cyashongeshejwe. Naho umuherezabitambo, yari ahagaze ku marembo hamwe na ba bantu magana atandatu bitwaje intwaro z’intambara." 
Judges18:18 Abari binjiye mu rugo kwa Mika bari basahuye rya shusho ry’ikigirwamana, uruhago rw’amabuye y’ubufindo, udushushanyo tweguriwe Imana n’ishusho ry’icyuma gishongeshejwe. Umuherezabitambo ni ko kubabaza, ati «Murakora iki aho ngaho?»" 
Judges18:19 Baramusubiza bati «Ceceka, kandi ushyire urushyi ku munwa wawe, maze udukurikire, utubere umubyeyi n’umuherezabitambo. Kuri wowe ibyaba byiza ni ibihe: ari ukuba umuherezabitambo w’urugo rw’umuntu umwe, cyangwa uw’umuryango wose wa Israheli?»" 
Judges18:20 Umuherezabitambo arabyishimira, aherako afata uruhago rw’amabuye y’ubufindo, udushushanyo tweguriwe Imana na rya shusho ry’ikigirwamana, maze ajyana n’iyo mbaga imushagaye." 
Judges18:21 Abadani barahindukira, babanza abana, amatungo n’imitwaro imbere, maze baragenda." 
Judges18:22 Bamaze kugera kure yo kwa Mika, ni bwo abaturage bari batuye mu ngo zegeranye n’urwo kwa Mika bakoraniye hamwe maze barabakurikira." 
Judges18:23 Uko basakuzaga inyuma y’Abadani, na bo barahindukiraga bakabaza Mika, bati «Ni iki cyatumye ukoranya aba bantu?»" 
Judges18:24 Akabasubiza ati «Mwanyaze umuherezabitambo n’imana nari narikoreshereje, maze murigendera. Icyo nasigaranye se ni iki? None mutinyutse kumbaza ngo ’Mbaye iki?’»" 
Judges18:25 Abadani baramubwira bati «Ntitwongere kukumva! Cyangwa se abanyamujinya muri twe baguhitane, maze upfe n’abo mu rugo rwawe bose.»" 
Judges18:26 Abadani bikomereza inzira yabo, naho Mika abonye ko bamurusha imbaraga, arahindukira yisubirira iwe." 
Judges18:27 Abadani rero bamaze kunyaga ibyo kwa Mika n’umuherezabitambo we, bagera i Layishi muri ba baturage b’aho bari batuje kandi bizeranaga, maze babatsembesha inkota; naho umugi barawutwika." 
Judges18:28 Ntihaboneka umuntu ushobora kuwurengera, kuko wari kure ya Sidoni kandi ntugire n’uwutegeka. Uwo mugi uri mu kibaya gihereranye na Betirehobu. Nuko bahiyubakira undi mugi, barahatura." 
Judges18:29 Uwo mugi bawitirira Dani, izina rya sekuruza wabo, wabyawe na Israheli, ariko mbere uwo mugi witwaga Layishi." 
Judges18:30 Nuko Abadani bashinga rya shusho ry’ikigirwamana; Yehonatani mwene Gerishomu, umwuzukuru wa Musa, aba umuherezabitambo w’umuryango wa Dani. Abahungu ba Yehonatani bakomeza uwo murimo kugeza igihe abaturage b’igihugu bajyanywe bunyago." 
Judges18:31 Nuko bahashinga iryo shusho ry’ikigirwamana Mika yari yarakoresheje, kirahaba kugeza igihe cyose Ingoro y’Imana yamaze i Silo." 
Judges19:1 Nuko muri iyo minsi — nta mwami wariho muri Israheli —, Umulevi wari utuye mu karere k’inyuma y’imisozi miremire y’i Efurayimu, afata umugore w’inshoreke w’i Betelehemu ya Yuda." 
Judges19:2 Uwo mugore aramuhemukira, hanyuma yahukanira kwa se i Betelehemu ya Yuda, ahamara amezi ane." 
Judges19:3 Umugabo we ajya kumureba, kugira ngo amwurure kandi amucyure, ajyana n’umugaragu we n’indogobe ebyiri. Uwo mugore amwinjiza mu nzu kwa se, maze sebukwe amubonye aza kumusanganira yishimye cyane." 
Judges19:4 Sebukwe amubuza gutaha, amara iwe iminsi itatu; barya, banywa kandi barara aho." 
Judges19:5 Nuko ku munsi wa kane babyuka mu gitondo cya kare, Umulevi aritegura kugira ngo atahe, sebukwe aramubwira ati «Nimurye igisate cy’umugati musame agatima, hanyuma mubone gutaha!»" 
Judges19:6 Bombi baricara barasangira. Hanyuma se w’uwo mugore abwira umukwe we, ati «Ndakwinginze ngo wemere urare hano, maze umutima wawe urusheho kunezerwa!»" 
Judges19:7 Uwo mugabo yari yiteguye gutaha, ariko sebukwe akomeza kumwinginga kugeza ubwo abiretse, arara aho ngaho." 
Judges19:8 Ku munsi wa gatanu abyuka mu gitondo cya kare kugira ngo atahe, ariko sebukwe aramubwira ati «Ndakwinginze ngo mubanze musamure, hanyuma muraba mugenda nimunsi», nuko barasangira." 
Judges19:9 Nuko umugabo yitegura gutaha, we n’umugore we n’umugaragu we, sebukwe aramubwira ati «Dore umunsi urakuze, bugiye kwira; nimurare! Dore umunsi uciye ikibu, nimurare hano maze umutima wawe unezerwe! Ejo mu gitondo, usubire iwawe.»" 
Judges19:10 Ariko uwo mugabo yanga kurara. Arahaguruka aragenda, we n’umugore we n’indogobe ze ebyiri, bagera ahateganye na Yebuzi — ari yo Yeruzalemu." 
Judges19:11 Igihe bageze bugufi ya Yebuzi, umunsi uba urakuze, umugaragu abwira shebuja, ati «Tugende duhagarare kuri uriya mugi w’Abayebuzi, maze tuharare!»" 
Judges19:12 Shebuja aramusubiza ati «Nta bwo twarara kuri uriya mugi w’abanyamahanga, na bo ubwabo batari Abayisraheli. Turakomeza kugera i Gibeya." 
Judges19:13 Tugane kamwe muri turiya turere, turare i Gibeya cyangwa i Rama.»" 
Judges19:14 Barakomeza baragenda, izuba rirenga bageze hafi y’i Gibeya yo kwa Benyamini." 
Judges19:15 Berekeza rero muri urwo ruhande, kugira ngo barare i Gibeya. Umulevi arinjira maze yicara ku karubanda, ariko ntihagira ubakira iwe ngo baharare." 
Judges19:16 Nuko nimugoroba, haza umusaza wari utashye avuye mu mirima ye. Uwo musaza yari uwo mu karere k’imisozi miremire y’i Efurayimu, ariko yari atuye i Gibeya, n’ubwo abaturage b’ako karere bari Ababenyamini." 
Judges19:17 Ngo yubure amaso, abona umugenzi wari aho ku karubanda, aramubaza ati «Urava he ukajya he?»" 
Judges19:18 Undi aramusubiza ati «Duturutse i Betelehemu, tukajya mu karere k’inyuma y’imisozi miremire y’i Efurayimu. Aho ni ho iwanjye. Nari nagiye i Betelehemu ya Yuda, none ngarutse iwanjye kandi nta muntu wigeze anyakira iwe." 
Judges19:19 Nyamara dufite ubwatsi n’ibiryo by’indogobe zacu; nkagira n’imigati na divayi byanjye n’umuja wawe, ndetse n’uyu musore, umugaragu wawe, umperekeje; nta cyo rero tubuze.»" 
Judges19:20 Umusaza arasubiza ati «Murakaza neza! Ibyo ukeneye byose abe ari jye bibazwa, ariko nturare aha ku karubanda!»" 
Judges19:21 Abajyana iwe maze aha indogobe ibyo zirya. Abagenzi barakaraba, bararya kandi baranywa." 
Judges19:22 Mu gihe bari bagifungura, haza abantu b’ibyihebe byo muri uwo mugi basakiza ya nzu, bahondagura bikabije ku rugi, babwira wa musaza nyir’urugo, bati «Garagaza uwo mugabo winjiye iwawe ngo turyamane.»" 
Judges19:23 Nyir’urugo arasohoka maze arababwira ati «Oya! Ndabinginze, bavandimwe, ngo mwoye kugira nabi! Mwikora iryo shyano ubwo uwo muntu yinjiye iwanjye!" 
Judges19:24 Dore umukobwa wanjye w’isugi, ngiye kumushyira ahagaragara, maze mumukoreshe icyo mushaka. Ariko ntimukore ishyano nk’iryo kuri uyu muntu!»" 
Judges19:25 Abo bantu banga kumwumva. Nuko uwo Mulevi afata umugore we, maze amubazanira hanze. Bamurengeraho, bamugirira nabi iryo joro ryose kugeza ko bucya, maze umuseke ukebye baramurekura." 
Judges19:26 Ahagana mu gitondo, wa mugore araza agwa ku muryango w’inzu ya wa musaza aho umugabo we yari ari, akomeza kugaragurika kugeza ko bucya." 
Judges19:27 Mu gitondo cya kare, umugabo we arabyuka, arakingura maze arasohoka ngo agende. Asanga umugore we aho agaragurika ku muryango, arambuye amaboko ku gitabo cy’inzu." 
Judges19:28 Aramubwira ati «Haguruka tugende!» Ariko umugore ntiyagira icyo asubiza. Nuko wa Mulevi amuhekesha indogobe maze aragenda ajya iwe. 
Judges19:29 Agezeyo, afata icyuma, yadukira umugore we, aramutemagura ingingo ku yindi, amucamo ibice cumi na bibiri, abyohereza mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli." 
Judges19:30 Nuko ubonye ibyo wese akavuga ati «Nta na rimwe ibintu nk’ibi byigeze biba cyangwa se biboneka, kuva aho Abayisraheli bazamukiye mu Misiri kugeza uyu munsi!» Umulevi yari yategetse abo bantu yohereje, ati «Mubwire mutya Abayisraheli: Hari ibintu nk’ibi byigeze kubaho, kuva aho Abayisraheli bazamukiye mu Misiri kugeza uyu munsi? Nimubitekerezeho, mubyige kandi mugire icyo mubivugaho!»" 
Judges20:1 Abayisraheli basohokera icyarimwe, bakoranira imbere y’Uhoraho i Misipa. Bari baturutse imihanda yose, kuva i Dani kugera i Berisheba, no kuva mu gihugu cya Gilihadi." 
Judges20:2 Abatware b’imbaga n’abakuru b’imiryango yose ya Israheli bahagarara imbere y’ikoraniro ry’Imana, bari abantu ibihumbi magana ane bashobora gutwara inkota." 
Judges20:3 Ababenyamini bamenya ko Abayisraheli bazamutse i Misipa. Nuko Abayisraheli baravuga bati «Tubwire ukuntu icyo gicumuro cyaje.» 
Judges20:4 Uwo Mulevi, umugabo wa wa mugore wari wishwe, arabasubiza ati «Jyewe n’umugore wanjye twari tugeze i Gibeya ya Benyamini, kugira ngo tuhacumbike." 
Judges20:5 Abanyagibeya bantera nijoro basakiza inzu nari ndimo bashaka kunyica. Ni bwo bafashe umugore wanjye bamugirira nabi kugeza ko apfuye. 
Judges20:6 Mfata umugore wanjye mutemamo ibice, maze mbyohereza mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli, kuko ubwo busambanyi n’ayo mahano byakorewe muri Israheli." 
Judges20:7 None rero, Bayisraheli mwese, uko mukoraniye hano, nimubijyeho impaka, mwese mwemeze icyo mugomba gukora!»" 
Judges20:8 Nuko Abayisraheli bose bahagurukira icyarimwe, bavuga bati «Nta n’umwe muri twe usubira mu ihema rye, kandi nta n’umwe usubira mu rugo rwe." 
Judges20:9 None rero, dore icyo tugiye gukorera Gibeya: tuzazamuka tuyitere tumaze gukora ubufindo;" 
Judges20:10 maze dufate abantu icumi ku ijana mu miryango yose ya Israheli, abantu ijana ku gihumbi, n’abantu igihumbi ku bihumbi cumi, bo gutwara impamba y’imbaga igiye gutera Gibeya ya Benyamini, kubera ayo mahano bakoreye muri Israheli.»" 
Judges20:11 Nuko Abayisraheli bose bakoranira hamwe, bitegura gutera uwo mugi." 
Judges20:12 Imiryango ya Israheli yohereza abantu ku muryango wose wa Benyamini kubabwira bati «Icyo gicumuro cyabonetse muri mwe ni bwoko ki? 
Judges20:13 Noneho rero, nimutange abo bantu b’ibyihebe bari i Gibeya tubice, maze duhanagure ikibi muri Israheli.» Nyamara Ababenyamini bima amatwi abavandimwe babo b’Abayisraheli." 
Judges20:14 Nuko Ababenyamini bava mu migi yabo, bakoranira i Gibeya kugira ngo bajye kurwana n’Abayisraheli." 
Judges20:15 Uwo munsi, Ababenyamini bavuye mu migi yabo barabarurwa: bari abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitandatu bazi kurwanisha inkota, utabariyemo abaturage b’i Gibeya bageraga ku bantu magana arindwi b’intwari." 
Judges20:16 Muri iyo mbaga yose, harimo abantu magana arindwi b’intwari batwarira imoso. Buri muntu muri bo n’umuhumetso we, yashoboraga kurekura umuhumetso, ntabe yahusha n’agasatsi atagahamije." 
Judges20:17 Abayisraheli na bo barabarurwa: bari abantu ibihumbi magana ane bazi kurwanisha inkota kandi bamenyereye intambara, utabariyemo Ababenyamini." 
Judges20:18 Baragenda, bazamuka bajya i Beteli kugira ngo babaze Imana, bati «Ni nde muri twe uzazamuka mbere gutera Ababenyamini, kugira ngo abarwanye?». Nuko Uhoraho arabasubiza ati «Ni Yuda uzabanza gutera!»" 
Judges20:19 Abayisraheli babyuka mu gitondo cya kare maze baca ingando hafi ya Gibeya. 
Judges20:20 Bukeye Abayisraheli barasohoka bajya ku rugamba kugira ngo barwanye Ababenyamini, ahateganye na Gibeya." 
Judges20:21 Ababenyamini na bo basohoka i Gibeya, uwo munsi bica abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri mu Bayisraheli." 
Judges20:22 Imbaga y’Abayisraheli irongera irisuganya, bajya ku rugamba aho bari baruremeye ku munsi wa mbere." 
Judges20:23 Abayisraheli ni ko kuzamuka, baganyira Uhoraho kugeza nimugoroba, nuko babaza Uhoraho, bati «Twongere se turwane n’Ababenyamini, abavandimwe bacu?» Uhoraho arabasubiza ati «Nimuzamuke mubatere!»" 
Judges20:24 Ku munsi wa kabiri, Abayisraheli basatira Ababenyamini." 
Judges20:25 Kuri uwo munsi wa kabiri, Ababenyamini basohoka i Gibeya basakirana na bo, maze bica na none abantu ibihumbi cumi n’umunani mu Bayisraheli, bose barwanishaga inkota." 
Judges20:26 Imbaga yose y’abana b’Abayisraheli barazamuka bajya i Beteli, bahageze bicara hasi baganyira Uhoraho, kandi uwo munsi basiba kurya kugeza nimugoroba, maze batura ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro, imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Judges20:27 Abayisraheli babaza Uhoraho — kandi koko muri iyo minsi, Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Imana bwari aho ngaho." 
Judges20:28 Pinehasi mwene Eleyazari, mwene Aroni, muri iyo minsi ni we wari ubushinzwe. Nuko Pinehasi arabaza, ati «Nongere ndwane na bene Benyamini umuvandimwe wanjye, cyangwa se mbyihorere?» Uhoraho arabasubiza ati «Muzamuke mubatere, kuko ejo nzababagabiza.»" 
Judges20:29 Abayisraheli bahisha abantu impande zose za Gibeya. 
Judges20:30 Ku munsi wa gatatu, Abayisraheli barazamuka batera Ababenyamini, baremera urugamba ahateganye na Gibeya nk’uko basanzwe babigenza." 
Judges20:31 Ababenyamini barasohoka bajya kurwana n’iyo mbaga, bitarura umugi wabo, nuko batangira kwica abantu nk’uko babigenje mu bihe bishize. Mu Bayisraheli hagwa abantu bagera kuri mirongo itatu ku gasozi, biciwe ku muhanda ugana i Beteli no ku muhanda ugana i Gibeya." 
Judges20:32 Nuko Ababenyamini barabwirana bati «Dore turabatsinze nk’uko byagenze ubushize!» Ariko Abayisraheli baribwiraga bati «Tugiye guhunga maze tubashuke bagere mu muhanda kure y’umugi.» 
Judges20:33 Hanyuma Abayisraheli bava aho bari bari hose, baremera urugamba i Behali‐Tamari, naho abari mu bwihisho babuvamo, bashinga ibirindiro mu burengerazuba bwa Geba." 
Judges20:34 Abantu ibihumbi cumi b’intwari batoranyijwe muri Israheli yose bagera ahateganye na Gibeya; urugamba rurakomera, ariko Ababenyamini ntibari bazi ibyago bigiye kubagwirira." 
Judges20:35 Uhoraho atsinda Ababenyamini mu maso ya Israheli, uwo munsi Abayisraheli bica abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu n’ijana mu Babenyamini, kandi bose bazi kurwanisha inkota." 
Judges20:36 Ubwo Ababenyamini babona ko batsinzwe. Abayisraheli barekeye urubuga Ababenyamini, kuko bizeraga abantu babo bari mu bwihisho mu mpande zose z’umugi wa Gibeya." 
Judges20:37 Abo bari bihishe bihutira kujya mu mugi wa Gibeya, barimbura umugi kandi bamarira ku nkota abawutuye bose." 
Judges20:38 Ariko Abayisraheli bakaba bari bumvikanye n’abantu babo bari mu bwihisho ko umwotsi nutumbagira hejuru y’umugi, ubabera ikimenyetso." 
Judges20:39 Nuko bawubonye, ako kanya Abayisraheli bahita babahindukirana, barabarwanya. Ni bwo Ababenyamini batangiye kubicamo, hagwa abantu bagera kuri mirongo itatu mu Bayisraheli. Ababenyamini baribwira bati «Dore turabatsinze koko, nko ku rugamba ruheruka!»" 
Judges20:40 Ariko cya kimenyetso cy’umwotsi cyari cyatangiye kuzamuka mu mugi, maze Ababenyamini ngo bahindukire babona umugi wose uragurumana, umwotsi utumbagira mu kirere." 
Judges20:41 Abayisraheli rero bari babakurikiranye, maze Ababenyamini bagira ubwoba kuko babonaga ko ibyago bibagwiririye." 
Judges20:42 Ababenyamini bahunga Abayisraheli berekeza mu butayu, ariko bari batangatanzwe n’abari babakurikiranye n’abari baturutse mu mugi, maze bicwa umugenda." 
Judges20:43 Abayisraheli basatira Ababenyamini, barabakurikirana ubutaruhuka babaribata inzira yose kugera mu burasirazuba bwa Gibeya." 
Judges20:44 Nuko hapfa abantu ibihumbi cumi n’umunani mu Babenyamini, bose b’intwari." 
Judges20:45 Abandi Babenyamini bahungiye mu butayu, ahagana ku rutare rw’i Rimoni. Ibihumbi bitanu muri bo bagwa mu mayira, abasigaye barabakurikirana kugera i Gidewomu, maze babicamo n’abandi ibihumbi bibiri." 
Judges20:46 Ababenyamini bapfuye uwo munsi bagera ku bihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu, kandi bose bazi kurwanisha inkota, bakaba n’intwari." 
Judges20:47 Abandi magana atandatu barahindukira bahungira mu butayu, ahagana ku rutare rw’i Rimoni, bibera aho ku rutare rw’i Rimoni mu gihe cy’amezi ane." 
Judges20:48 Abayisraheli baragaruka birara mu Babenyamini bari basigaye, bakava mu mugi bajya mu wundi, babamarira ku nkota kimwe n’amatungo, barimbura n’ibindi byari bihari byose. Byongeye kandi, batwikaga n’imigi yose banyuragamo." 
Judges21:1 Abayisraheli ubwo bari bakoraniye i Misipa bararahiye, bati «Nta n’umwe muri twe uzigera ashyingira umukobwa we ku Mubenyamini.»" 
Judges21:2 Imbaga yose iza i Beteli, maze bicara aho ngaho kugeza nimugoroba imbere y’Uhoraho. Nuko batera hejuru maze basesa amarira menshi." 
Judges21:3 Baravuga bati «Uhoraho, Mana ya Israheli, mbese ubu ni iki cyatuma Israheli yabura umwe mu miryango yayo?»" 
Judges21:4 Bukeye, babyuka mu gitondo cya kare, bahubaka urutambiro, batura ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro." 
Judges21:5 Abayisraheli baravuga bati «Mu miryango yose ya Israheli ni uwuhe utazamutse ngo ujye mu ikoraniro imbere y’Uhoraho?» Koko kandi, bari baragize indahiro ikomeye ku muntu wese utazazamuka ngo asange Uhoraho i Misipa, bagira bati «Azicwa nta kabuza!»" 
Judges21:6 Abayisraheli bagirira impuhwe abavandimwe babo b’Ababenyamini, baravuga bati «Uyu munsi, umwe mu miryango ya Israheli uyicitseho." 
Judges21:7 Tuzakora iki ngo tubonere abagore ababo basigaye, kandi twararahiye Uhoraho ko tutazabashyingira abakobwa bacu?»" 
Judges21:8 Nuko baravuga bati «Hari umuntu mu miryango ya Israheli waba atarazamutse ngo asange Uhoraho i Misipa?» Basanga nta muntu n’umwe w’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi wigeze aza aho bari bakoraniye mu ngando. 
Judges21:9 Barangije kubarura imbaga yose, basanga nta muntu n’umwe mu baturage b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi wari uhari." 
Judges21:10 Ikoraniro ryohereza abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri batoranyijwe mu ngabo, barabategeka bati «Nimugende, abaturage bose b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi mubarimbuze inkota, mubicane n’abagore n’abana!" 
Judges21:11 Dore icyo mugomba gukora: muzice umugabo wese, cyangwa umugore wigeze kuryamana n’umugabo, ariko muzasigaze abakobwa b’amasugi.» Nuko babigenza batyo." 
Judges21:12 Mu baturage b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi haboneka abakobwa b’amasugi magana ane batigeze baryamana n’umugabo, maze babazana mu ngando i Silo mu gihugu cya Kanahani." 
Judges21:13 Nuko ikoraniro ryose ryohereza intumwa ku Babenyamini bari ku rutare rw’i Rimoni, barabahumuriza." 
Judges21:14 Ababenyamini baherako barahindukira, maze babashyingira abagore muri abo bari barokotse i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi, ariko ntihaboneka ababakwiriye bose." 
Judges21:15 Imbaga yose igirira impuhwe Ababenyamini, kuko Uhoraho yari yaciye icyuho mu miryango ya Israheli." 
Judges21:16 Nuko abakuru b’ikoraniro baravuga bati «Twakora iki kugira ngo n’abasigaye babone abagore, kubera ko abagore bo muri Benyamini barimbuwe?" 
Judges21:17 Mbese Benyamini izagira ite abasigaye, kugira ngo umuryango umwe utazasibangana muri Israheli?" 
Judges21:18 Natwe ubwacu kandi, ntidushobora kubashyingira abakobwa bacu.» Kandi koko, Abayisraheli bari bararahiye, bagira bati «Avumwe, umuntu wese uzashyingira kwa Benyamini.»" 
Judges21:19 Ariko baza kwibuka bati «Turenda kujya mu munsi mukuru w’Uhoraho ubera buri mwaka i Silo, mu karere k’amajyaruguru ya Beteli, mu burasirazuba bw’umuhanda uva i Beteli ugana i Sikemu, no mu majyepfo ya Lebona.»" 
Judges21:20 Hanyuma bategeka Ababenyamini, bati «Mugende mwihishe mu mizabibu!" 
Judges21:21 Mwitegereze kugeza ubwo abakobwa b’i Silo basohoka baje kubyina mu makoraniro y’abaririmbyi, musohoke mu mizabibu mubagwe gitumo, buri muntu afate umugore mu bakobwa b’i Silo, hanyuma mubajyane mu gihugu cya Benyamini." 
Judges21:22 Ba se cyangwa abavandimwe babo nibaramuka baduteyeho amahane, tuzababwira tuti ’Nimubagirire ubuntu, kuko mu gihe twarwanyaga Yabeshi tutashoboye kubonera umugore buri muntu muri bo; byongeye kandi nta we uzabibarenganyiriza kuko atari mwebwe mwababashyingiye.’»" 
Judges21:23 Nuko Ababenyamini babigenza batyo. Muri abo bakobwa babyinaga bari bafashe, bahitamo abangana n’umubare wabo, kugira ngo bababere abagore. Nuko baragenda basubira mu gihugu cyabo, bongera kubaka imigi yabo maze barahatura." 
Judges21:24 Icyo gihe Abayisraheli bose baratatana, buri muntu ajya mu muryango we, mu nzu ye, no mu munani we." 
Judges21:25 Muri iyo minsi kandi, nta mwami wariho muri Israheli; buri muntu yakoraga icyo abona kimutunganiye." 
Ruth1:1 Kera, igihugu kigitegekwa n’abacamanza, inzara yarateye, maze umugabo wari utuye i Betelehemu muri Yuda arasuhuka, we n’umugore we, n’abahungu be babiri. Basuhukira mu gihugu cy’i Mowabu." 
Ruth1:2 Uwo mugabo yitwaga Elimeleki, umugore we akitwa Nawomi, naho abahungu be bakaba Mahiloni na Kiliyoni. Bari Abanyefurata b’i Betelehemu mu gihugu cya Yuda. Nuko bajya mu gihugu cya Mowabu, maze barahatura." 
Ruth1:3 Elimeleki, umugabo wa Nawomi, aza gupfa; Nawomi asigara aho n’abahungu be bombi." 
Ruth1:4 Abo basore bashaka abagore b’Abamowabukazi: umwe yitwaga Oripa, undi akitwa Ruta. Batura muri icyo gihugu imyaka igera ku icumi." 
Ruth1:5 Nyuma, Mahiloni na Kiliyoni na bo baza gupfa. Nuko uwo mugore asigara aho, nta bana nta mugabo." 
Ruth1:6 Nawomi arahaguruka n’abakazana be bombi, bava mu gihugu cya Mowabu, kuko aho i Mowabu yari yarumvise bavuga ko Uhoraho Imana yari yaragobotse umuryango wayo ikawuha icyo kurya." 
Ruth1:7 Nuko rero ava aho yari atuye, ajyana n’abakazana be bombi, bashyira nzira basubira mu gihugu cya Yuda." 
Ruth1:8 Bakigenda Nawomi abwira abakazana be, ati «Ngaho nimusubire iwanyu, buri wese asange nyina. Uhoraho arabagirire ubuntu nk’uko namwe mwabungiriye, mukabugirira n’abo twapfushije." 
Ruth1:9 Uhoraho azabahe kugira ituze mu rugo rwanyu hamwe n’uwo muzashakana.» Nuko abasezeraho. Bo baraturika bararira. 
Ruth1:10 Bati «Oya rwose, turagukurikira tujyane mu muryango wawe.»" 
Ruth1:11 Ariko Nawomi arababwira ati «Nimusubire iwanyu, bana banjye, kuki mwakwirushya munkurikira? None se iyi nda yanjye yabasha kubabyarira abagabo?" 
Ruth1:12 Ngaho nimwigendere musubire iwanyu, bana banjye. Dore nanjye ndashaje sinkiri uwo gushaka! Kandi rero, n’iyo navuga nti ’Iri joro ndarara mbonye umugabo’, nti ’Nzabyara abandi bahungu’," 
Ruth1:13 ese mwazategereza kugera igihe bazakurira? Murumva se ibyo ari byo byababuza kujya kwishakira abagabo? Oya, bana banjye. Agahinda mfite si ako kuvugwa, kararuta akanyu kure! Ukuboko k’Uhoraho kwarampagurukiye.»" 
Ruth1:14 Abakazana barushaho kurira. Hanyuma Oripa asezera kuri nyirabukwe, ariko Ruta we amwihambiraho." 
Ruth1:15 Nawomi aramubwira ati «Dore mukeba wawe asubiye iwabo, asanze umuryango we n’imana z’iwabo. Ngaho nawe kurikira mukeba wawe.»" 
Ruth1:16 Nuko Ruta aramusubiza ati «Wikomeza kumpatira kugusiga ngo nisubirire iwacu, kuko aho uzajya nzajya aho, aho uzarara nkarara aho. Igihugu cyawe kizaba icyanjye, Imana yawe ni yo izaba Imana yanjye;" 
Ruth1:17 aho uzagwa ni ho nzagwa bahampambe! Nihagira ikindi kidutandukanya usibye urupfu, Uhoraho azampane, ndetse akube kangahe!»" 
Ruth1:18 Nuko Nawomi abonye ko Ruta yiyemeje rwose ibyo kujyana na we, ntiyagira ikindi yongeraho." 
Ruth1:19 Nuko barajyana bagera i Betelehemu. Batungutse i Betelehemu, umugi wose urahurura uza kubareba. Abagore bati «Mbega uyu ni Nawomi?»" 
Ruth1:20 Ariko we arababwira ati «Mwinyita Nawomi (Umutoni), ahubwo noneho mujye munyita Mara (Maganya), kuko Ushoborabyose yampaye agahinda k’akamenamutima." 
Ruth1:21 Navuye ino mfite byinshi, none Uhoraho angaruye nta na busa. Kuki mwakomeza kunyita Nawomi kandi Uhoraho yararivuguruje; Ushoborabyose akaba yarangize umunyabyago!»" 
Ruth1:22 Nguko uko Nawomi yagarutse, we n’umukazana we Ruta w’Umumowabukazi, bavuye mu gihugu cya Mowabu. Icyo gihe bagera i Betelehemu, hari ku mwero w’ingano za bushoki." 
Ruth2:1 Ubwo rero Nawomi akaba yari afite mwene wabo w’umugabo we, wari umukungu ukomeye wo mu muryango wa Elimeleki, akitwa Bowozi." 
Ruth2:2 Ruta w’Umumowabukazi abwira Nawomi, ati «Ndagira ngo njye mu mirima guhumba ingano inyuma y’umusaruzi uri bunkundire akanyemerera.» Aramusubiza ati «Ngaho genda, mwana wanjye.»" 
Ruth2:3 Nuko aragenda ajya guhumba mu murima inyuma y’abasaruzi. Iby’ amahirwe, ajya guhumba mu murima wa Bowozi mwene wabo wa Elimeleki." 
Ruth2:4 Hashize umwanya Bowozi aba arahageze avuye i Betelehemu. Aramutsa abasaruzi be, ati «Nimugire Uhoraho!» Bati «Uhoraho aguhunde imigisha!»" 
Ruth2:5 Bowozi abaza umutware w’abasaruzi, ati «Ese uriya mugore ni uwa nde?»" 
Ruth2:6 Umutware w’abasaruzi aramusubiza ati «Uriya mugore ni Umumowabukazi, ni wawundi wazanye na Nawomi avuye i Mowabu." 
Ruth2:7 Yanyinginze ati ’Nagira ngo nihumbire ingano, ngende ntoragura izatakaye hagati y’imiba, aho abasaruzi bavuye.’ Yaje aguma hano kuva mu gitondo; kandi kugeza n’ubu ntiyigeze aruhuka!»" 
Ruth2:8 Nuko Bowozi abwira Ruta, ati «Urumva, mwana wa? Ntugire ahandi ujya guhumba. Rwose ntuve hano. Ukomeze ukurikire abakozi banjye;" 
Ruth2:9 umurima basarura ntuwukureho amaso, ubagende inyuma. Nihanangirije bariya basore ngo ntihagire ugushotora, si byo se? Kandi nugira inyota ugende, hariya hari ibibindi abakozi banjye bavomeyemo, maze winywere.»" 
Ruth2:10 Nuko Ruta amupfukama imbere, maze yubama ku butaka, aramubwira ati «Ni iki kiguteye kungirira neza utyo, ukanyitaho kandi ndi Umunyamahangakazi?»" 
Ruth2:11 Bowozi aramusubiza ati «Bambwiye ibyawe, bantekerereza ukuntu wafashe neza nyokobukwe nyuma y’aho umugabo wawe apfiriye; bambwira n’ukuntu wasize so na nyoko, ugasiga n’igihugu cyakubyaye, ukemera kujya mu gihugu utari uzi na gato." 
Ruth2:12 Rwose Uhoraho azaguhe ingororano y’ibyo wakoze byose. Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli azakwihere igihembo cyuzuye, kuko ari we wahungiyeho ngo aguhishe mu mababa ye.»" 
Ruth2:13 Nuko Ruta aramubwira ati «Rero uranyiteho, mubyeyi, ubwo wampumurije, ukambwira amagambo meza angera ku mutima, jyewe umuja wawe; ndetse sinkwiye no kuba umuja wawe!»" 
Ruth2:14 Igihe cyo gufungura kigeze, Bowozi aramubwira ati «Ngwino urye umugati, maze tuguhe n’uburisho.» Nuko yicara iruhande rw’abasaruzi. Bowozi amuha umugati ukaranze, ararya arahaga, ndetse aranasigaza." 
Ruth2:15 Igihe ahagurutse asubiye guhumba, Bowozi ategeka abakozi be, ababwira ati «Mumureke ahumbe no ku miba mwarunze, ntimumukoze isoni." 
Ruth2:16 Ndetse mujye mukora no ku miba mute amahundo hasi, maze abone icyo ahumba. Kandi ntihagire umubwira nabi.»" 
Ruth2:17 Ruta arakomeza ahumba muri uwo murima, kugeza ku mugoroba; amaze guhura ibyo yahumbye, yuzuza umufuka w’ingano." 
Ruth2:18 Arikorera arataha, asubira mu mugi. Yereka nyirabukwe ibyo yahumbye byose. Ndetse ahambura ibyasigaye ku ifunguro yahawe, abiha nyirabukwe." 
Ruth2:19 Nyirabukwe aramubaza ati «Wahumbye mu murima wa nde, mwana wa? Wiriwe mu kwa nde? Imana ihe umugisha uwo mugiraneza!» Ruta abwira nyirabukwe nyir’umurima yiriwe ahumbamo, ati «Niriwe mu murima w’umugabo witwa Bowozi.»" 
Ruth2:20 Nawomi abwira umukazana we, ati «Arakagira umugisha w’Uhoraho, we utibagirwa kugirira neza abazima n’abapfuye.» Nuko Nawomi aramubwira ati «Erega urya ni mwene wacu, ni umwe mu bagomba kugaruza ibyacu.»" 
Ruth2:21 Ruta Umumowabukazi ati «Ahubwo yanambwiye ngo nzakomeze mpumbe inyuma y’abakozi be, kugeza igihe bazarangiriza gusarura imirima ye yose.»" 
Ruth2:22 Nawomi abwira umukazana we, ati «Nuko, mwana wanjye, jya ukomeza ujye inyuma y’abakozi be, hato utazajya no mu k’undi hakagira uhagucunaguriza.»" 
Ruth2:23 Bityo Ruta akomeza guhumba mu kwa Bowozi, akurikiye abakozi, kugeza igihe isarura ry’ingano za bushoki rirangiye, n’isarura ry’ingano zisanzwe. Akomeza kubana na nyirabukwe." 
Ruth3:1 Nawomi abwira umukazana we, ati «Ni ko mwana wa, ese si jye ugomba kukurebera uburyo wabaho ngo ugubwe neza?" 
Ruth3:2 None se uriya Bowozi, shebuja wa ba bakozi mwiriranywe, si mwene wacu? Dore kandi iri joro arajya kugosoza ingano ze ku mbuga aho bazihuriye." 
Ruth3:3 Umva rero, nkubwire: wiyuhagire, wisige amavuta ahumura, wambare neza, maze umanuke ujye aho bagosorera. Ariko umenye ntumwiyereke atararangiza kurya no kunywa." 
Ruth3:4 Najya kuryama, umenye aho aryamye, ugende worosore ku birenge bye maze uryame. Na we arakwereka uko ugomba kubigenza.»" 
Ruth3:5 Ruta aramusubiza ati «Ibyo umbwiye byose ndabikora.» 
Ruth3:6 Nuko aramanuka ajya aho bagosorera, abigenza uko nyirabukwe yamubwiye." 
Ruth3:7 Bowozi ararya, aranywa, amererwa neza, maze ajya kuryama hafi y’ikirundo cy’ingano. Ruta aromboka, amworosora ibirenge, araryama." 
Ruth3:8 Nuko mu gicuku, Bowozi arashiguka, arebye imbere ye, abona umugore uryamye ku birenge bye." 
Ruth3:9 Ati «Yewe, uri nde?» Undi ati «Erega ndi Ruta, umuja wawe.» Yungamo ati «Ese wancyuye ko ari wowe ugomba kugaruza ibyo mu muryango?»" 
Ruth3:10 Bowozi ati «Urakagira umugisha w’Uhoraho, mwana wanjye. Ubu rwose unyeretse ubupfura bwawe, kurusha uko wabwerekanye mbere hose. Ngushimye rwose ko utirutse ku basore, baba abakire cyangwa abakene." 
Ruth3:11 None rero, mwana wanjye, ushyire umutima hamwe: icyo uzansaba cyose nzakigukorera. Abantu b’ino bose bazi ko uri umugore w’intwari." 
Ruth3:12 Cyakora n’ubwo ndi mu bagomba kugaruza iby’umuryango, hari undi wa bugufi ubifitiye uburenganzira kundusha." 
Ruth3:13 Iryamire; ejo nagutwara, ni byiza, azagutware. Ariko navuga ko adashaka kugucyura, jyewe nzagucyura. Ndahije Uhoraho Imana nzima! Ngaho iryamire, uzagenda hakeye.»" 
Ruth3:14 Nuko umugore arara aho ku birenge bye, burinda bucya. Ariko abyuka mu ruturuturu, igihe umuntu aba ataramenya undi. Bowozi yaribwiraga ati «Hatagira umenya ko uyu mugore yaraye aha bagosorera.»" 
Ruth3:15 Aramubwira ati «Zana uwo mwitero wawe, uwurambure neza.» Undi arawutega. Amusukiramo incuro makumyabiri z’ingano za bushoki, aramukorera. Nuko Ruta arataha, asubira mu mugi." 
Ruth3:16 Agitunguka, nyirabukwe ati «Byagenze bite, mwana wa?» Amutekerereza ibyo uwo mugabo yamugiriye byose." 
Ruth3:17 Ati «Yampaye n’uyu mutwaro w’ingano, arambwira ngo ’Ntiwasubira kwa nyokobukwe nta cyo ujyanye’!»" 
Ruth3:18 Nawomi aramubwira ati «Igumire aha, mwana wanjye, kugeza igihe umenyeye amaherezo yabyo. Uriya mugabo ntaruhuka atabitunganyije byose, uyu munsi ndetse!»" 
Ruth4:1 Bowozi ajya mu marembo y’umugi, aho inama yajyaga iteranira, maze arahicara. Wa mugabo wagombaga kugaruza iby’umuryango, umwe Bowozi yavugaga, aba arahanyuze. Bowozi aramuhamagara ati «Yewe mugenzi! Enda hano; ba wicaye aha.» Undi araza aricara." 
Ruth4:2 Nuko Bowozi atora abagabo cumi mu bakuru b’umugi. Arababwira ati «Nimube mwicaye aha.» Baricara. 
Ruth4:3 Maze Bowozi abwira nyir’ukugaruza iby’umuryango, ati «Ya sambu ya mwene wacu Elimeleki, dore Nawomi wagarutse aturutse mu gihugu cya Mowabu, arashaka kuyigurisha." 
Ruth4:4 Nasanze rero ngomba kubikumenyesha, nkakubwira nti ’Yigure aba bagabo n’abakuru b’umuryango bose bareba.’ None, niba ushaka kuyigaruza, ngaho yigaruze. Kandi niba utabishaka, ubimbwire mbimenye; kuko nta wundi ufite uburenganzira bwo kuyigaruza, nanjye nza nyuma yawe.» Uwo mugabo ati «Ndashaka kuyigaruza.»" 
Ruth4:5 Bowozi ati «Umenye rero ko umunsi wagaruje iyi sambu, Nawomi akayiguha, uzahita unacyura Ruta, wa Mumowabukazi, umugore wa nyakwigendera, kugira ngo ubyarire uwo nyakwigendera uzamusigarira ku itongo.»" 
Ruth4:6 Nuko wawundi wagombaga kugaruza iby’umuryango ati «Ubwo ari uko bimeze, sinshobora kuyigura, kuko byamviramo gutakaza umugabane wanjye. Ngaho yigurire, nguhaye uburenganzira nari nyifiteho.»" 
Ruth4:7 Kera rero uko byagendaga muri Israheli: iyo abagabo babiri babaga bamaze kumvikana, haba mu byo kugaruza iby’umuryango cyangwa mu byo kugura no kugurisha, umwe yakuragamo urukweto rwe akaruhereza undi. Ni uko muri Israheli bemeranyaga ikintu imbere y’abagabo." 
Ruth4:8 Ubwo rero wawundi wagombaga kugaruza iby’umuryango abwira Bowozi, ati «Ngaho igurire!» Nuko akuramo urukweto." 
Ruth4:9 Bowozi abwira abakuru b’imiryango n’imbaga yose yari aho, ati «Muzambere abagabo ko uyu munsi nguze na Nawomi ibyari ibya Elimeleki byose, kimwe n’ibya Kiliyoni, n’ibya Mahiloni." 
Ruth4:10 Ubu kandi mpise ncyura na Ruta w’Umumowabukazi muka Mahiloni, kugira ngo mbyarire nyakwigendera umwana uzamusigarira ku itongo, no kugira ngo kandi izina rye ritazibagirana mu bavandimwe be no mu marembo y’umugi. Uyu munsi muri abagabo bo kubihamya.»" 
Ruth4:11 Nuko rubanda rwose rwari aho mu nama, kimwe n’abakuru b’umuryango, baravuga bati «Turi abagabo! Uwo mugore ucyuye iwawe, Uhoraho azamugire nka Rasheli na Leya, bo inzu ya Israheli ishingiyeho. Ugende utunge, utunganirwe muri Efurata, maze izina ryawe ryamamare i Betelehemu." 
Ruth4:12 Abana Imana izaguha kubyarana n’uwo mugore bazatume urugo rwawe rukomera nk’urwa Pereshi mwene Yuda na Tamara.» 
Ruth4:13 Bowozi acyura Ruta maze amugira umugore we. Uhoraho amuha gusama abyara umuhungu. 
Ruth4:14 Abagore babwira Nawomi, bati «Uhoraho nashimwe, We utagutereranye ngo ubure uzakurengera, ahubwo akaguha umwuzukuru uzaba ikirangirire muri Israheli." 
Ruth4:15 Azatuma usubirana amagara wahoranye, maze akubere akabando ko mu zabukuru. Uyu mukazana wawe ugukunda ni we umukubyariye: ubu se ntakurutiye abahungu barindwi?»" 
Ruth4:16 Nawomi aterura umwana, amwiyegamiza ku gituza; kuva ubwo aba ari we umwirerera." 
Ruth4:17 Abagore b’abaturanyi baza kumwita izina, bavuga bati «Nawomi yabonye umuhungu!» Nuko bamwita Obedi. Ni we wabyaye Yese, se wa Dawudi." 
Ruth4:18 Dore abakomoka kuri Pereshi, n’uburyo bakurikirana. Pereshi yabyaye Hesironi;" 
Ruth4:19 Hesironi abyara Ramu; Ramu abyara Aminadabu; 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu abyara Nahasoni; Nahasoni abyara Salimu; 
Ruth4:21 Salimu abyara Bowozi; Bowozi abyara Obedi; 
Ruth4:22 Obedi abyara Yese; maze Yese abyara Dawudi.
