1Samuel1:1 I Ramatayimu‐Sofimu, ku musozi wa Efurayimu, hari umugabo akitwa Elikana, mwene Yerohamu, wa Elihu, wa Tohu, wa Sufu, akaba Umunyefurata." 
1Samuel1:2 Yari afite abagore babiri: umwe akitwa Ana, undi akitwa Penina. Penina yari afite abana, naho Ana nta bo agira." 
1Samuel1:3 Buri mwaka, uwo mugabo yavaga mu mugi yari atuyemo, akazamuka yerekeza i Silo kuramya Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, no kumutura igitambo. Aho i Silo, Hofini na Pinehasi, abahungu ba Heli, ni bo bari abaherezabitambo b’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel1:4 Nuko umunsi Elikana yakundaga guturaho igitambo uragera. Yari afite akamenyero ko guha umugore we Penina n’abahungu be n’abakobwa be bose imigabane ivuye kuri icyo gitambo. 
1Samuel1:5 Ariko Ana akamuha umugabane w’akarusho kuko ari we yakundaga, n’ubwo Uhoraho yari yaramugize ingumba." 
1Samuel1:6 Ikindi kandi, mukeba we ntiyasibaga kumukwena amwandagaza, kubera ko Uhoraho yamugize ingumba." 
1Samuel1:7 Ni ko byagendaga buri mwaka: igihe cyose bazamukaga bagana Ingoro y’Uhoraho, Penina yaramukwenaga. Nuko rimwe, Ana ararira yanga no kurya." 
1Samuel1:8 Umugabo we Elikana aramubaza ati «Ana we, urarizwa n’iki? Urabuzwa n’iki kurya? Ese sinkurutira abahungu cumi?»" 
1Samuel1:9 Bamaze kurira no kunywera aho i Silo, Ana arahaguruka. Umuherezabitambo Heli akaba yicaye ku ntebe, ku rwinjiriro rw’Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel1:10 Ana ashenguwe n’ishavu, asengana Uhoraho amarira menshi." 
1Samuel1:11 Nuko agira iri sezerano, ati «Uhoraho, Mushoborabyose, ukunze ukita ku kababaro k’umuja wawe, ukanyibuka, ntutererane umuja wawe, maze umuja wawe ukamuha agahungu, nazakegurira Uhoraho mu buzima bwako bwose, n’urwogosho ntiruzakagere ku mutwe.»" 
1Samuel1:12 Amara umwanya muremure imbere y’Uhoraho asenga. Ubwo Heli yitegerezaga umunwa we. 
1Samuel1:13 Ana yavugiraga mu mutima we: iminwa ye yonyine ni yo yanyeganyegaga; ijwi rye ntiryumvikanaga. Heli agira ngo uwo mugore yasinze," 
1Samuel1:14 maze aramubwira ati «Urasinda na ryari? Jya kuryamisha divayi yawe!» 
1Samuel1:15 Ana aramusubiza ati «Shobuja, nta divayi nanyoye, nta n’igisindisha na busa, ahubwo ndi umugore ushenguwe n’ishavu. Gusa, naganyiraga Uhoraho." 
1Samuel1:16 Wikwibwira ko umuja wawe ari umupfu; ahubwo ni ishavu n’agahinda byandenze bituma nivugisha kugeza magingo aya.» 
1Samuel1:17 Heli aramusubiza ati «Genda amahoro kandi Imana ya Israheli iguhe icyo wayisabye!» 
1Samuel1:18 Ana aramusubiza ati «Umuja wawe arakuronkereho umugisha!» Umugore aragenda, ararya, maze mu maso ye harakenkemuka." 
1Samuel1:19 Babyuka mu gitondo cya kare bunamira Uhoraho; nuko bataha iwabo i Rama. Elikana aryamana n’umugore we Ana, nuko Uhoraho yibuka Ana." 
1Samuel1:20 Nuko rero igihe kigeze, Ana wari utwite abyara umuhungu. Amwita Samweli, agira ati «Kuko namusabye Uhoraho.»" 
1Samuel1:21 Muri uwo mwaka, umugabo we Elikana azamukana n’umuryango we wose gutura Uhoraho igitambo nk’uko bisanzwe, no kurangiza isezerano rye." 
1Samuel1:22 Ariko Ana ntiyazamukana na bo, ahubwo abwira umugabo we, ati «Ntegereje ko umwana acuka: ni bwo nzamujyana, tumwegurire Uhoraho, maze abe ariho azaguma.»" 
1Samuel1:23 Umugabo we Elikana aramubwira ati «Kora ikigutunganiye. Sigara aha kugeza ubwo uzamucutsa. Gusa, Uhoraho yubahirize ijambo rye.» Umugore rero arasigara, yonsa umuhungu we kugeza ubwo amucukije." 
1Samuel1:24 Amaze kumucutsa, aramuzamukana hamwe n’ikimasa cy’imyaka itatu, incuro y’ifu y’ingano, n’uruhago rw’uruhu rurimo divayi, amwinjiza mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho i Silo, kandi umwana yari akiri muto." 
1Samuel1:25 Batamba cya kimasa, maze umwana bamushyikiriza Heli." 
1Samuel1:26 Ana ati «Umbabarire, shobuja! Uhorane ubugingo, shobuja! Ni jye wa mugore wari iruhande rwawe, aha ngaha, nsenga Uhoraho." 
1Samuel1:27 Uyu mwana ni we nasabaga, none Uhoraho yampaye icyo namusabye." 
1Samuel1:28 Nanjye ndamumuhaye: yeguriwe Uhoraho mu buzima bwe bwose.» Nuko bunamira Uhoraho aho ngaho. 
1Samuel2:1 Ana arasenga, ati «Umutima wanjye uhimbarijwe muri Uhoraho n’ubwemarare bwanjye mbukesha Imana yanjye. Ntinyutse kwihimura abanzi banjye, nejerejwe n’uko wabatsinze." 
1Samuel2:2 Nta we uhwanyije ubutungane n’Uhoraho, nta wundi wundi uretse wowe, nta rutare rwagereranywa n’Imana yacu." 
1Samuel2:3 Ntimukongere kuvuga amagambo menshi y’ubwirasi, ubutukanyi ntibugasohoke mu munwa wanyu, kuko Uhoraho ari Imana izi byose, kandi agacira imanza ibikorwa by’abantu." 
1Samuel2:4 Umuheto w’intwari uravunitse, naho abadandabiranaga bakindikije imbaraga." 
1Samuel2:5 Abari bijuse baraca incuro, naho abari bashonje baradamaraye. Umugore w’ingumba yabyaye karindwi, naho uwari yishimye abana aragumbaha." 
1Samuel2:6 Uhoraho arica kandi akabeshaho, yohereza ikuzimu kandi akavanayo." 
1Samuel2:7 Uhoraho arakenesha kandi agakungahaza, acisha bugufi, akanakuza." 
1Samuel2:8 Avana umutindi mu mukungugu, agakura umukene mu mwanda, kugira ngo abicaze hamwe n’ibikomangoma, kandi bahabwe icyicaro cy’icyubahiro. Kuko inkingi z’isi ari iz’Uhoraho; kandi akaba ari zo yayiteretseho." 
1Samuel2:9 Azarinda umuyoboke we, ariko abamugomeye bazatikirira mu mwijima, kuko nta we utsinda ku bw’imbaraga ze." 
1Samuel2:10 Uhoraho, abanzi be bazarimburwa, aho ari mu ijuru azabahindishaho inkuba. Uhoraho azacira isi yose urubanza, azahe ububasha umwami yiyimikiye, kandi akuze uwo yisigiye amavuta y’ubutore.»" 
1Samuel2:11 Elikana asubira iwe i Rama, naho umwana akomeza gukorera Uhoraho, mu maso y’umuherezabitambo Heli." 
1Samuel2:12 Abahungu ba Heli bari abantu b’abahemu, batitaga ku Uhoraho." 
1Samuel2:13 Dore uko abo baherezabitambo bagenzerezaga abaturage: iyo umuntu yaturaga igitambo, babaga bagiteka inyama, umugaragu w’umuherezabitambo akahashinga, afite ikanya y’amenyo atatu," 
1Samuel2:14 akayijomba mu isafuriya, mu ngunguru, mu nkono cyangwa mu cyungo. Ibyo iyo kanya yaruye byose bigaharirwa umuherezabitambo. Nguko uko bagenzerezaga Abayisraheli bose baje aho ngaho i Silo." 
1Samuel2:15 Ikindi kandi, mbere y’uko bashongesha urugimbu, umugaragu w’umuherezabitambo yajyaga kubwira uwaturaga igitambo, ati «Ha umuherezabitambo inyama zo kotsa. Nta bwo yemera ko umuha inyama zitetse, ashaka gusa inyama mbisi.»" 
1Samuel2:16 Iyo uwaturaga igitambo yamubwiraga ati «Reka babanze bashongeshe urugimbu, nyuma utware ibyo ushaka», umugaragu yaramubwiraga ati «Oya, zimpe aka kanya, naho ubundi ndazitwara ku gahato.»" 
1Samuel2:17 Mu maso y’Uhoraho igicumuro cy’abo basore cyari gikabije, kuko bubahukaga igitambo cy’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel2:18 Samweli yakoreraga Uhoraho. Yari umwana wambaye agakanzu kaboshye muri hariri. 
1Samuel2:19 Nyina yamuboheraga agashura akakamushyira buri mwaka, uko azamukanye n’umugabo we gutura igitambo cya buri mwaka." 
1Samuel2:20 Heli yasabiraga umugisha Elikana n’umugore we, agira ati «Uhoraho araguhe urubyaro kuri uyu mugore, rugushumbushe uweguriwe Uhoraho!» Hanyuma bagasubira iwabo." 
1Samuel2:21 Nuko Uhoraho agoboka Ana, arasama abyara abahungu batatu n’abakobwa babiri. Naho umwana Samweli akomeza kugimbuka mu maso y’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel2:22 Heli yari amaze gusaza, akumva bavuga imyifatire y’abahungu be imbere y’Abayisraheli bose, ndetse n’ukuntu baryamanaga n’abagore babaga ku rwinjiriro rw’Ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
1Samuel2:23 Arababwira ati «Kuki mugenza mutyo? Ibibi numva babavugaho, biravugwa na bose." 
1Samuel2:24 Nimusigeho, bana banjye, kuko amagambo umuryango w’Uhoraho ubavugaho atari meza!" 
1Samuel2:25 Nihagira umuntu uhemukira undi, Imana izabakiranure. Ariko se umuntu nahemukira Uhoraho, ni nde uzaca urubanza?» Ntibita ku byo se ababwiye, kuko Uhoraho yashakaga kubicisha." 
1Samuel2:26 Naho umwana Samweli yakuraga mu gihagararo no mu bwiza, imbere y’Uhoraho no mu maso y’abantu." 
1Samuel2:27 Haza umuntu w’Imana kureba Heli, aramubwira ati «Dore uko Uhoraho avuze: Cyo ye! Nigaragarije umuryango wa so igihe wari mu Misiri utegekwa n’umuryango wa Farawo." 
1Samuel2:28 So namutoranyije mu miryango yose ya Israheli mugira umuherezabitambo wanjye, ngo ajye yegera urutambiro rwanjye, ahatwikire umubavu, anambare umusanganyagihimba mu maso yanjye. Ibyo Abayisraheli batura byose, nabyeguriye umuryango wa so." 
1Samuel2:29 Ku mpamvu ki munyukanyuka igitambo cyanjye n’ituro ryanjye nategetse mu Ngoro yanjye? Kuki se wubaha abahungu bawe kunduta, maze mukikubira irishamaje mu maturo yose ya Israheli umuryango wanjye?" 
1Samuel2:30 Ni yo mpamvu — Uwo ni Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli ubivuga — n’ubwo nari nagize nti ’Umuryango wawe n’umuryango wa so izahorane nanjye iteka’, none ubu — Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuga — ishyano riraguye! Kuko nubaha abanyubaha, naho abansuzugura bagasuzugurwa." 
1Samuel2:31 Dore igihe kiraje nkaguca intege, wowe n’umuryango wa so: nta mukambwe uzongera kurangwa mu muryango wawe." 
1Samuel2:32 Mu Ngoro uzahasimburwa n’utari uwawe, uzamubona ubone n’ibyiza byose azakorera Israheli; naho mu muryango wawe, nta mukambwe uzaharangwa ukundi." 
1Samuel2:33 Nyamara ariko, nzagumisha umwe mu bawe ku rutambiro rwanjye, kugira ngo ajye ashengurwa n’ishyari n’ubwihebe, naho abandi bose bazakenyuka." 
1Samuel2:34 Uzabibonera gihamya kuko abahungu bawe babiri, Hofini na Pinehasi, bombi bazapfira umunsi umwe." 
1Samuel2:35 Nuko nitorere umuherezabitambo nyawe, uzakurikiza uko umutima wanjye ushaka n’icyo nifuza. Nzamwubakira inzu ihamye, kandi ahore anogeye uwo nzaba narasize amavuta." 
1Samuel2:36 Naho uwo mu muryango wawe uzarokoka, azamwunamira kugira ngo abone ka feza n’akagati, maze azamubwire ati ’Mbabarira, umpe akarimo k’ubuherezabitambo, kugira ngo mbone agace k’umugati ko kurya.’»" 
1Samuel3:1 Umwana Samweli yakoreraga Uhoraho ari kumwe na Heli. Muri iyo minsi Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryari imbonekarimwe, kubonekerwa ntibyabagaho kenshi." 
1Samuel3:2 Uwo munsi Heli yari aryamye mu mwanya we usanzwe. Amaso ye yari atangiye guhunyeza; ntiyari agishoboye kubona neza. 
1Samuel3:3 Itara ry’Imana ryari ritarazima, Samweli akaba aryamye mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, hafi y’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana." 
1Samuel3:4 Uhoraho ahamagara Samweli, arasubiza ati «Karame!»" 
1Samuel3:5 Yirukanka asanga Heli, ati «Ndaje kuko umpamagaye.» Heli aramusubiza ati «Sinaguhamagaye, mwana wanjye. Subira kwiryamira.» Ajya kuryama." 
1Samuel3:6 Uhoraho ahamagara Samweli bundi bushya. Samweli arabyuka ajya kureba Heli, aramubwira ati «Ndaje kuko umpamagaye.» Heli aramusubiza ati «Sinaguhamagaye, mwana wanjye. Subira kwiryamira.»" 
1Samuel3:7 Samweli yari ataramenya Uhoraho; Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryari ritaramwihishurira. 
1Samuel3:8 Uhoraho yongera guhamagara Samweli ubwa gatatu. Arabyuka ajya kureba Heli, aramubwira ati «Ndaje kuko umpamagaye.» Ubwo Heli amenya ko ari Uhoraho uhamagara umwana." 
1Samuel3:9 Heli abwira Samweli, ati «Subira kwiryamira. Naguhamagara, umubwire uti ’Vuga, Nyagasani, umugaragu wawe arumva.’» Nuko Samweli asubira kuryama mu mwanya we usanzwe." 
1Samuel3:10 Uhoraho na none araza, ahamagara nka mbere, ati «Samweli, Samweli!» Samweli ati «Vuga, umugaragu wawe arumva.»" 
1Samuel3:11 Uhoraho abwira Samweli, ati «Dore, hari ikintu ngiye gukora muri Israheli, kizatuma abazacyumva bose bakangarana." 
1Samuel3:12 Uwo munsi nzakorera inzu ya Heli ibyo nayivuzeho byose, nta cyo nsize inyuma." 
1Samuel3:13 Ndamumenyesha ko ndangiza urubanza rwaciriwe umuryango we iteka ryose, kubera icyaha cye: yari azi ko abahungu be batuka Imana, nyamara ntiyabacyaha." 
1Samuel3:14 Ni yo mpamvu ndahiriye inzu ya Heli: nta kizasibanganya igicumuro cy’inzu ya Heli, cyaba igitambo cyangwa ituro.»" 
1Samuel3:15 Samweli akomeza kuryama kugera mu gitondo, nyuma akingura inzugi z’Ingoro y’Uhoraho. Samweli yatinyaga gutekerereza Heli ibonekerwa rye." 
1Samuel3:16 Heli ahamagara Samweli, aramubwira ati «Samweli, mwana wanjye.» Undi ati «Karame!»" 
1Samuel3:17 Ati «Yakubwiye jambo ki? Ndagusabye wimpisha. Imana izaguhana numpisha ijambo na rimwe mu byo yakubwiye.» 
1Samuel3:18 Nuko Samweli amutekerereza byose, nta cyo amuhishe. Heli ati «Ni Uhoraho. Arakore uko abishaka.»" 
1Samuel3:19 Samweli arakura. Uhoraho yari kumwe nawe, kandi ntiyatuma hagira ijambo rye na rimwe riba impfabusa." 
1Samuel3:20 Israheli yose, kuva i Dani kugera i Berisheba, imenya ko Samweli yemeweho kuba umuhanuzi w’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel3:21 Uhoraho akomeza kubonekera i Silo. Koko rero, Uhoraho yigaragarizaga Samweli i Silo, akamuvugisha." 
1Samuel4:1 Kandi ijambo rya Samweli ryakirwaga n’Abayisraheli bose. Bukeye, Abayisraheli batera Abafilisiti, baca ingando hafi ya Ebenezeri, naho Abafilisiti bazica Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Abafilisiti bohereza ingabo zabo, zisakirana n’iz’Abayisraheli, urugamba rurakomera, maze Abayisraheli batsindwa n’Abafilisiti. Kuri urwo rugamba haguye abantu bagera ku bihumbi bine mu ngabo z’Abayisraheli." 
1Samuel4:3 Ingabo zihungira mu ngando, maze abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli baravuga bati «Ni kuki uyu munsi Uhoraho yaretse dutsindwa n’Abafilisiti? Tujye i Silo gushakayo Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, kugira ngo bujye hagati yacu kandi buturinde abanzi bacu!»" 
1Samuel4:4 Abayisraheli bohereza abantu i Silo, bavanayo Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho Nyir’ingabo, utetse ijabiro hejuru y’Abakerubimu. Hafi y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, hari abahungu babiri ba Heli, Hofini na Pinehasi." 
1Samuel4:5 Nuko Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho bugeze mu ngando, Abayisraheli bose baterera hejuru icyarimwe, mu ijwi riranguruye, maze isi iradagadwa." 
1Samuel4:6 Abafilisiti bumvise urwo rwamo, baravuga bati «Urwo rwamo rurenga ruturutse mu ngando y’Abahebureyi ni urw’iki?» Hanyuma baza kumenya ko Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho bwageze mu ngando." 
1Samuel4:7 Abafilisiti batahwa n’ubwoba, kuko bavugaga bati «Imana yageze mu ngando yabo!» Nuko baravuga bati «Turagowe! Ibi nta bwo byari biherutse kubaho." 
1Samuel4:8 Turagowe koko! Ni nde uzaturokora ikiganza cy’iyo Mana ishobora byose? Iyo Mana ni yo yateje Abanyamisiri ibyago by’ubwoko bwose mu butayu. 
1Samuel4:9 Bafilisiti mwe, nimukomere mube abagabo! Hato mutaba abaretwa b’Abayisraheli, nk’uko na bo bigeze kuba abacakara banyu. Nimube abagabo kandi murwane!»" 
1Samuel4:10 Nuko Abafilisiti baratera, Abayisraheli baratsindwa, maze buri muntu ahungira mu ihema rye. Baratsindwa bikabije: muri bo hapfa abantu ibihumbi mirongo itatu." 
1Samuel4:11 Ubushyinguro bw’Imana buranyagwa, kandi n’abahungu bombi ba Heli, Hofini na Pinehasi, barahagwa." 
1Samuel4:12 Umugabo wo mu Babenyamini ahubuka ku rugamba yiruka, ataha i Silo uwo munsi. Imyambaro ye yari yamushiriyeho kandi umutwe we wuzuye umukungugu." 
1Samuel4:13 Ubwo Heli akaba yicaye ku ntebe ye iruhande rw’inzira ahanzeyo amaso, kuko yari yakuwe umutima n’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana. Nuko uwo mugabo ageze mu mugi avuga uko byagenze, maze umugi wose ucura imiborogo." 
1Samuel4:14 Heli ngo yumve iyo miborogo, aribwira ati «Uru rusaku ruri muri rubanda ni urw’iki?» Ni bwo wa muntu aje yihuta, amumenyesha ibyari byabaye byose." 
1Samuel4:15 Heli yari agejeje ku myaka mirongo cyenda n’umunani, amaso ye wabonaga atumbiriye, nyamara atakibasha kugira icyo abona." 
1Samuel4:16 Nuko wa muntu abwira Heli, ati «Mvuye ku rugamba, naruhunze uyu munsi nyine.» Heli aramubaza ati «Byagenze bite se, mwana wanjye?»" 
1Samuel4:17 Iyo ntumwa iramusubiza iti «Israheli yahunze Abafilisiti kandi hapfuye abantu benshi; ndetse abahungu bawe bombi, Hofini na Pinehasi, na bo bapfuye, n’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bwanyazwe.»" 
1Samuel4:18 Amaze kumva iby’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana, Heli ahanuka ku ntebe ye, abirinduka iruhande rw’umuryango, akuba ijosi maze arapfa, kuko yari ashaje cyane kandi aremereye. Yategetse Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka mirongo ine." 
1Samuel4:19 Umukazana we, muka Pinehasi, yari atwite inda nkuru kandi yegereje igihe cyo kubyara. Ngo yumve inkuru y’uko Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bwanyazwe, n’uko sebukwe n’umugabo we bapfuye, aherako arapfukama arabyara, kuko ibise byari bimutunguye." 
1Samuel4:20 Kubera ko yendaga gupfa, abagore bamuri iruhande baramubwira bati «Komera, witinya: ubyaye umuhungu.» Ntiyagira icyo abasubiza, ndetse ntiyanabitaho." 
1Samuel4:21 Umwana we, yahise amwita Ikabodi (bigasobanura ngo ’icyubahiro kiracyari he?’), avuga ati «Icyubahiro kirashize kuri Israheli.» Ibyo yabivuze, abitewe n’uko Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bwanyazwe, n’ibyari byabaye kuri sebukwe no ku mugabo we." 
1Samuel4:22 Yaravuze ati «Icyubahiro kirashize kuri Israheli», kuko Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bwari bumaze kunyagwa." 
1Samuel5:1 Abafilisiti rero bamaze kunyaga Ubushyinguro bw’Imana, babuvanye i Ebenezeri, babujyana i Ashidodi." 
1Samuel5:2 Abafilisiti bafata Ubushyinguro bw’Imana, babujyana mu nzu y’ikigirwamana cyabo Dagoni, maze babushyira iruhande rwacyo." 
1Samuel5:3 Abashidodi ngo babyuke mu gitondo cya kare, basanga Dagoni yikubise hasi, imbere y’Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho. Begura Dagoni, bayisubiza mu mwanya wayo." 
1Samuel5:4 Bukeye bw’uwo munsi mu gitondo cya kare, basanga Dagoni yongeye kwitura hasi, imbere y’Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho. Umutwe n’ibiganza byombi byayimanyutseho byaguye ku gitabo cy’inzu yayo; hari hasigaye igihimba cyayo gusa." 
1Samuel5:5 Ni yo mpamvu na n’ubu aho i Ashidodi, abaherezabitambo ba Dagoni, kimwe n’abinjira mu nzu ya Dagoni bose, badakoza ikirenge ku gitabo cy’inzu yayo." 
1Samuel5:6 Nuko ikiganza cy’Uhoraho kimerera nabi Abashidodi, maze arabarimbura. Ateza ibibyimba Ashidodi n’abantu bayo bose." 
1Samuel5:7 Abashidodi babonye ibibabayeho, baravuga bati «Ubushyinguro bw’Imana ya Israheli ntibugume muri twe, kuko ikiganza cyayo kitumereye nabi, kimwe n’imana yacu Dagoni!»" 
1Samuel5:8 Nuko batumira abatware bose b’Abafilisiti, bamaze guterana barababwira bati «Tugenze dute Ubushyinguro bw’Imana ya Israheli?» Baremeza bati «Ubushyinguro bw’Imana ya Israheli bugomba kwimurirwa i Gati.» Nuko bajyana i Gati Ubushyinguro bw’Imana ya Israheli." 
1Samuel5:9 Bamaze kubwimurirayo, ikiganza cy’Uhoraho kimerera nabi uwo mugi; bashya ubwoba cyane. Uhoraho ahana bikomeye abantu bose b’uwo mugi abato n’abakuru; ateza imibiri yabo ibibyimba." 
1Samuel5:10 Ubwo bohereza Ubushyinguro bw’Imana Ekironi, ariko Abanyekironi baburabutswe bubagana, basakuriza icyarimwe, bati «Bimuriye Ubushyinguro bw’Imana ya Israheli iwacu, kugira ngo dushire n’abacu bose.»" 
1Samuel5:11 Baherako batumira abatware b’Abafilisiti, bamaze guterana barababwira bati «Nimwohereze Ubushyinguro bw’Imana ya Israheli busubire iyo bwari buri, hato tudapfira gushira n’abacu bose.» Uwo mugi wari wakangaranye byo gupfa, kuko ikiganza cy’Imana cyari kibamereye nabi bikabije." 
1Samuel5:12 Abatari bapfuye bafashwe n’ibibyimba, maze umuborogo w’abatuye umugi urazamuka ugera mu ijuru." 
1Samuel6:1 Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho bumara amezi arindwi mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti. 
1Samuel6:2 Bukeye, Abafilisiti bahamagara abaherezabitambo n’abapfumu, barababaza bati «Tugenze dute Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho? Mutwereke uko twabigenza, kugira ngo tubusubize iyo bwari buri.»" 
1Samuel6:3 Barabasubiza bati «Niba musubijeyo Ubushyinguro bw’Imana ya Israheli; ntimubwohereze bwonyine, ahubwo mugerekeho n’amaturo y’impongano. Muzaboneraho kurokoka kandi munamenye impamvu ikiganza cy’Imana gikomeza kubamerera nabi.»" 
1Samuel6:4 Baravuga bati «Ni mpongano ki tugomba kuyitura?» Barabasubiza bati «Muture ibibyimba bitanu bishushanyije muri zahabu n’imbeba eshanu zikozwe muri zahabu, mukurikije uko umubare w’abatware b’Abafilisiti ungana, kuko ari icyago musangiye mwese n’abatware banyu." 
1Samuel6:5 Muzakore rero ibishushanyo by’ibibyimba byanyu, n’iby’imbeba zayogoje igihugu cyanyu, kandi mukuze Imana ya Israheli. Bishobotse, yazunamura ikiganza cyayo kuri mwe, ku mana zanyu no ku gihugu cyanyu." 
1Samuel6:6 Bimaze iki kunangira umutima wanyu nk’Abanyamisiri na Farawo? Imana imaze kubabuza uburyo se, ntibabarekuye bakagenda?" 
1Samuel6:7 Nimukore rero igare rishya, mufate inka ebyiri zonsa kandi zitigeze zikorera umutwaro. Muzikureho izazo muzisubize mu kiraro, maze muzihambireho iryo gare." 
1Samuel6:8 Muzafate kandi Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho mubushyire kuri iryo gare, naho bya bintu bya zahabu mwoherejeho amaturo y’impongano, mubishyire mu gasanduku mugatereke iruhande rw’Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho, maze mubureke bugende." 
1Samuel6:9 Nuko muzitegereze: nibuzamuka bwerekeje i Betishemeshi, bugana mu gihugu cye, tuzamenyeraho ko ari Uhoraho ubwe waduteye icyago kingana gitya. Nibitaba bityo, tuzamenyeraho ko atari ikiganza cye cyaduteye, ahubwo ko ari impanuka yatugwiririye.»" 
1Samuel6:10 Nuko babigenza batyo: bafata inka ebyiri zonsa, bazihambiraho igare kandi basubiza inyana zazo mu kiraro." 
1Samuel6:11 Bashyira Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho kuri rya gare, hamwe n’agasanduku karimo za mbeba zikozwe muri zahabu n’ibishushanyo by’ibibyimba byabo." 
1Samuel6:12 Nuko izo nka ziboneza inzira yose igana i Betishemeshi, zigenda zabira nta gukebuka iburyo cyangwa ibumoso. Abatware b’Abafilisiti barazishorera kugera ku rugabano rwa Betishemeshi." 
1Samuel6:13 Abantu b’i Betishemeshi bagesaga ingano mu kibaya. Ngo bubure amaso, babona Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bubagana, maze birabashimisha cyane." 
1Samuel6:14 Nuko igare rigeze mu murima wa Yozuwe i Betishemeshi rirahagarara. Aho hantu hari ibuye rinini cyane. Baherako basatura imbaho zikoze rya gare, maze za nka bazitura Uhoraho ho igitambo." 
1Samuel6:15 Abalevi bari bamanuye Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho, hamwe n’agasanduku karimo bya bintu bya zahabu kari kumwe na bwo, babishyira hejuru ya rya buye rinini. Nuko uwo munsi, abantu b’i Betishemeshi bahaturira Uhoraho ibitambo by’amoko yose." 
1Samuel6:16 Maze ba batware batanu b’Abafilisiti bamaze kubibona, bagaruka i Ekironi uwo munsi." 
1Samuel6:17 Ngibyo ibibyimba bya zahabu Abafilisiti bahaye Uhoraho ho amaturo y’impongano: kimwe cyari icya Ashidodi, ikindi cya Gaza, ikindi cya Ashikeloni, ikindi cya Gati, n’ikindi cya Ekironi." 
1Samuel6:18 Kandi bamuhaye n’imbeba zikozwe muri zahabu, zingana n’umubare w’imigi abo batware batanu b’Abafilisiti bategekaga, kuva ku mugi uzitiwe kugeza ku rusisiro rutazitiwe. Gihamya y’ibyo iracyariho na n’ubu: ni rya buye rinini, aho bashyize Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho, ricyiri muri uwo murima wa Yozuwe i Betishemeshi." 
1Samuel6:19 Nyamara, mu bantu b’i Betishemeshi, bene Yekonyahu ntibari bishimye igihe Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho buje, maze Uhoraho abicamo abantu mirongo irindwi. Nuko rubanda rwose birabashavuza, kuko Uhoraho yabahannye bikomeye." 
1Samuel6:20 Abantu b’i Betishemeshi baravuga bati «Ni nde ushobora guhagarara imbere y’Uhoraho, Imana Nyir’ubutagatifu?» Barongera bati «Mbese ubundi yadusiga akajya he?»" 
1Samuel6:21 Nuko bohereza intumwa i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu kuvuga, bati «Abafilisiti bagaruye Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho. Nimumanuke mubujyane iwanyu.»" 
1Samuel7:1 Ab’i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu rero baraza, bazamukana Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho; babushyira mu nzu ya Abinadabu ku musozi, maze basiga amavuta Eleyazari umuhungu we, kugira ngo abe umurinzi w’Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel7:2 Guhera ku munsi Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bwagereyeho i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu, hari hashize igihe kirekire, nk’imyaka makumyabiri; nuko inzu yose ya Israheli ishaka kwigorora n’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel7:3 Ni bwo Samweli abwiye umuryango wose wa Israheli, ati «Niba mugarukiye Uhoraho n’umutima wanyu wose, nimujugunye kure ibigirwamana by’abanyamahanga na za Ashitaroti; mwerekeze umutima wanyu kuri Uhoraho, abe ari we mukorera wenyine, azabarokora ikiganza cy’Abafilisiti.»" 
1Samuel7:4 Nuko Abayisraheli bigizayo za Behali na za Ashitaroti, bakorera Uhoraho wenyine." 
1Samuel7:5 Samweli arababwira ati «Mukoranyirize Abayisraheli bose i Misipa: nanjye uwo munsi nzabatakambira kuri Uhoraho.» 
1Samuel7:6 Nuko bateranira i Misipa, bavoma amazi bayanyanyagiza imbere y’Uhoraho. Uwo munsi basiba kurya maze baravuga bati «Twacumuye kuri Uhoraho.» Nuko Samweli acira Abayisraheli imanza aho ngaho i Misipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Abafilisiti ngo bumve ko Abayisraheli bateraniye i Misipa, abatware babo barazamuka ngo babatere. Abayisraheli babyumvise batinya Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel7:8 Babwira Samweli, bati «Wiceceka, ntudutererane! Takambira Uhoraho Imana yacu, kugira ngo adukize ikiganza cy’Abafilisiti!»" 
1Samuel7:9 Nuko Samweli afata umwana w’intama utaracuka, awutura Uhoraho ho igitambo gitwikwa. Ubwo Samweli atakambira Abayisraheli, maze Uhoraho aramwumva." 
1Samuel7:10 Uko Samweli yaturaga igitambo, Abafilisiti begeraga Abayisraheli kugira ngo babarwanye. Uwo munsi ariko, Uhoraho akangaranya bikomeye Abafilisiti, arabatatanya maze Abayisraheli barabatsinda." 
1Samuel7:11 Abayisraheli baherako bava i Misipa, bakurikira Abafilisiti babica inzira yose, kugera bugufi y’i Betikari." 
1Samuel7:12 Maze Samweli afata ibuye, arishinga bukingi hagati ya Misipa na Yeshana; aryita Ebenezeri, ari byo bisobanura ngo ’Ibuye ry’Ubuvunyi’. Ati «Uhoraho yatuvunnye kugeza aha ngaha.»" 
1Samuel7:13 Nuko Abafilisiti batsindwa batyo, ntibongera kuvogera igihugu cya Israheli. Igihe cyose Samweli yari akiriho, ikiganza cy’Uhoraho cyakomeje kwibasira Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel7:14 Imigi yose yari yanyazwe n’Abafilisiti, kuva i Ekironi kugera i Gati, igarurirwa Abayisraheli, kandi Israheli inyaga Abafilisiti igihugu cyabo cyose. Kuva ubwo Abayisraheli babana neza n’Abahemori." 
1Samuel7:15 Nuko Samweli aba umucamanza wa Israheli, iminsi yose y’ubugingo bwe." 
1Samuel7:16 Uko umwaka utashye yajyaga i Beteli, i Giligali n’i Misipa, aho hose ari ko acira Abayisraheli imanza." 
1Samuel7:17 Hanyuma akajya asubira iwe i Rama, kuko ari ho yari atuye; akomeza gucira Abayisraheli imanza kandi ahubaka urutambiro rw’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel8:1 Samweli ageze mu zabukuru, yegurira abahungu be ubucamanza kuri Israheli." 
1Samuel8:2 Umuhungu we w’imfura yitwaga Yoweli, naho uw’ubuheta akitwa Abiya, nuko bagacira imanza i Berisheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Ariko abahungu be ntibakurikize amatwara ye, ahubwo bashukwa n’inyungu, bakakira ruswa mu manza kandi bakarenga ku mategeko." 
1Samuel8:4 Abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli bose barakorana, maze basanga Samweli i Rama." 
1Samuel8:5 Baramubwira bati «Dore urashaje kandi abahungu bawe ntibagukurikiza. None rero utwimikire umwami, ajye atuyobora nko mu yandi mahanga yose.»" 
1Samuel8:6 Ibyo bibabaza cyane Samweli, ubwo bavugaga bati «Twimikire umwami ajye atuyobora.» Nuko Samweli atakambira Uhoraho." 
1Samuel8:7 Uhoraho abwira Samweli, ati «Tega amatwi abo bantu n’ibyo bakubwira byose. Si wowe banze, ahubwo ni jye. Ntibashaka ko mba umwami wabo." 
1Samuel8:8 Barakugenzereza nk’uko bangenjeje kuva umunsi mbakuye mu Misiri kugeza uyu munsi, ubwo banyimuraga bakayoboka izindi mana." 
1Samuel8:9 None rero, umva icyo bakubwira; ariko kandi unabasobanurire neza uburyo uwo mwami bashaka azabategeka.»" 
1Samuel8:10 Nuko imbaga yasabaga umwami, Samweli ayisubiriramo amagambo yose Uhoraho yavuze." 
1Samuel8:11 Arababwira ati «Dore uko umwami musaba azabategeka: azafata abahungu banyu, abagire abanyamagare ye n’abanyamafarasi ye, maze bazajye birukanka imbere y’igare rye." 
1Samuel8:12 Azabagira abatware b’abantu igihumbi, n’ab’abantu mirongo itanu, abagire abahinzi b’imirima ye n’abasaruzi b’imyaka ye, bamucurire intwaro zo kurwanisha n’ibyuma byo gushyira ku mafarasi ye." 
1Samuel8:13 Azafata abakobwa banyu ho abakozi b’imibavu, abanyagikoni n’abatetsi b’imigati." 
1Samuel8:14 Azabatwara imirima yanyu, imizabibu n’imizeti yanyu y’inyamibwa, azabigabire abagaragu be." 
1Samuel8:15 Azafata umugabane wa cumi w’imbuto zanyu n’uw’imizabibu yanyu, maze abigabire abanyarugo be n’abagaragu be." 
1Samuel8:16 Azabanyaga abagaragu n’abaja banyu, n’inyamibwa zo mu basore banyu, n’indogobe zanyu, maze abikoreshe imirimo ye." 
1Samuel8:17 Azafata umugabane wa cumi w’amatungo yanyu, namwe ubwanyu muzahinduke abacakara be." 
1Samuel8:18 Nuko uwo munsi muzacure imiborogo mutewe n’uwo mwami mwihitiyemo, nyamara uwo munsi Uhoraho ntazabasubiza.»" 
1Samuel8:19 Ariko iyo mbaga yanga kumvira Samweli, baravuga bati «Icyo dushaka ni umwami," 
1Samuel8:20 kugira ngo natwe tuzamere nk’andi mahanga yose. Umwami wacu azatuyobora, azatujye imbere, anaturengere mu ntambara turwana.»" 
1Samuel8:21 Samweli atega amatwi ayo magambo yose ya rubanda, maze ayageza kuri Uhoraho." 
1Samuel8:22 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Samweli, ati «Bemerere, ubimikire umwami.» Samweli ni ko kubwira Abayisraheli, ati «Nimugende, buri muntu asubire mu mugi we.»" 
1Samuel9:1 Mu muryango wa Benyamini, harimo umugabo witwaga Kishi, akaba umuhungu wa Abiyeli, wa Serori, wa Bekorati, wa Afiyahi, wo mu nzu ya Benyamini, akaba umugabo w’umutunzi." 
1Samuel9:2 Yari afite umuhungu mwiza witwaga Sawuli. Nta musore n’umwe bari bahwanyije uburanga mu Bayisraheli, kandi yabasumbyaga bose umutwe n’intugu." 
1Samuel9:3 Bukeye, indogobe za Kishi, se wa Sawuli, ziza kuzimira, maze Kishi abwira umuhungu we Sawuli, ati «Ufate umwe mu bagaragu bacu, maze mujyane gushaka indogobe zazimiye.»" 
1Samuel9:4 Ni ko guhaguruka aragenda, azenguruka umusozi wose wa Efurayimu n’igihugu cyose cya Shalisha ntiyazibona. Ubwo banyura mu gihugu cya Shalimu barazibura, no mu gihugu cya Benyamini ntibagira izo babona." 
1Samuel9:5 Ngo bagere mu gihugu cya Sufu, Sawuli abwira umugaragu we, ati «Ngwino dutahe, hato data adatangira kuduhangayikira kurusha indogobe ze.»" 
1Samuel9:6 Umugaragu aramusubiza ati «Muri uriya mugi hari umuntu w’Imana kandi arubashywe, n’ibyo avuze byose birigaragaza. None rero, reka tujyeyo, ahari yagira icyo atubwira kuri ururugendo rwacu.»" 
1Samuel9:7 Sawuli abwira umugaragu we, ati «Ngaho tujyeyo, ariko se uwo muntu turamutura iki? Dore nta migati isigaye mu mifuka yacu, kandi nta n’ikindi dufite twatura uwo muntu w’Imana. Turamuha iki rero?»" 
1Samuel9:8 Umugaragu yongera kumusubiza, ati «Mfite hano feza nkeya, ingana n’igice cya kane cya sikeli, ndayitura umuntu w’Imana, maze atubwire ibyerekeye urugendo rwacu.»" 
1Samuel9:9 — Kera mu muco w’Abayisraheli, iyo umuntu yagiraga icyo ajya kubaza Imana, yaravugaga ati «Ngwino dusange umushishozi», kuko uwo ubu bita «umuhanuzi», icyo gihe yitwaga «umushishozi.» —" 
1Samuel9:10 Nuko Sawuli abwira umugaragu we, ati «Uvuze neza! Ngwino tujyeyo.» Baherako bajya mu mugi uwo muntu w’Imana atuyemo." 
1Samuel9:11 Igihe bakizamuka bagana mu mugi, bahura n’abakobwa bagiye kuvoma, maze barababaza bati «Umushishozi arahari?»" 
1Samuel9:12 Abo bakobwa barabasubiza bati «Arahari, ndetse ari aho imbere yanyu. Nimwihute kuko uyu munsi ari bwo akigera mu mugi, none abantu bakaba bagiye kujyana na we mu isengero ry’ahirengeye gutura ibitambo ku mugaragaro." 
1Samuel9:13 Mukigera mu mugi, murahita mumubona atarazamuka ngo ajye ahirengeye. Abantu ntibari burye atari yahagera, kuko ari we ugomba guha umugisha igitambo, hanyuma abatumiwe bakabona kurya. Ngaho rero nimugende, muramubona ako kanya.»" 
1Samuel9:14 Baherako bajya mu mugi. Bakinjira bahura na Samweli asohotse ngo ajye gusengera ahirengeye. 
1Samuel9:15 Kandi mbere y’uko Sawuli ahagera, Uhoraho yari yabihishuriye Samweli, agira ati" 
1Samuel9:16 «Ejo kuri iyi saha, nzakoherereza umugabo wo mu gihugu cya Benyamini, uzamusige amavuta y’ubutore abe umutware w’umuryango wanjye Israheli, kandi azawukize ikiganza cy’Abafilisiti. Kuko namaze kwitegereza umuryango wanjye, kandi ugutakamba kwawo kukaba kwangezeho.»" 
1Samuel9:17 Nuko Samweli akirabukwa Sawuli, Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Nguwo wa mugabo nakubwiye: uyu ni we uzategeka umuryango wanjye.»" 
1Samuel9:18 Sawuli asanga Samweli ku irembo ry’umugi, maze aramubwira ati «Ndagusabye ngo unyobore aho umushishozi atuye.»" 
1Samuel9:19 Samweli asubiza Sawuli, ati «Ni jye mushishozi! Ngwino rero tujyane ahirengeye gusenga, kuko uyu munsi uri busangire nanjye. Ejo mu gitondo uzaba uretse gutaha, kandi nzakubwira ibyo wifuza kumenya byose." 
1Samuel9:20 Naho iby’indogobe zawe zimaze iminsi itatu zizimiye, ntibiguhagarike umutima; zarabonetse. Ubundi se ibyiza byose byo muri Israheli bizigamiwe nde? Si wowe n’inzu ya so?»" 
1Samuel9:21 Maze Sawuli aramusubiza ati «Mbese sindi uwo mu muryango wa Benyamini, ari wo muto mu miryango yose muri Israheli, kandi inzu yanjye si yo isuzuguritse mu mazu yose ya Benyamini? Ni iki rero gitumye umbwira ibyo ngibyo?»" 
1Samuel9:22 Samweli aherako afata Sawuli n’umugaragu we, abajyana mu nzu, maze abaha imyanya y’icyubahiro mu batumirwa bageze kuri mirongo itatu." 
1Samuel9:23 Samweli ni ko kubwira umunyagikoni, ati «Zana ifunguro naguhaye ngo uribike.»" 
1Samuel9:24 Umunyagikoni azana inyama y’itako n’ibyaryo byose, abihereza Sawuli. Nuko Samweli aravuga ati «Ngurwo uruhisho rwawe, ngaho fungura! Ni wowe byahishiwe, kuko natumiye rubanda ari wowe nteganyiriza.»" 
1Samuel9:25 Bamaze gufungura baramanuka bava ahirengeye berekeza mu mugi, nuko bajya ahantu hitaruye hejuru y’inzu, baraganira." 
1Samuel9:26 Hanyuma Sawuli ajya kuryama. Umuseke ukebye, Samweli ahamagara Sawuli wari ukiri ha hantu hitaruye hejuru y’inzu, aramubwira ati «Haguruka nguherekeze.» Nuko Sawuli arahaguruka, maze bombi bajyana hanze y’umugi." 
1Samuel9:27 Bakimanuka ku rubibi rw’umugi, Samweli abwira Sawuli, ati «Bwira umugaragu wawe atambuke.» Nuko abajya imbere. Arongera ati «Naho wowe, ba uhagaze, nkubwire ijambo ry’Imana.»" 
1Samuel10:1 Nuko Samweli afata urwabya rw’amavuta, ayasuka ku mutwe wa Sawuli, aramuhobera, maze aravuga ati «Mbese aho si Uhoraho wagusize, ngo ube umutware w’umuryango we?" 
1Samuel10:2 Uyu munsi nitumara gutandukana, urahura n’abagabo babiri hafi y’imva ya Rasheli, ku rubibi rw’igihugu cya Benyamini i Selisa. Bari bukubwire bati ’Indogobe wari wagiye gushaka zarabonetse, kandi so ntagihagaritse umutima kubera indogobe, ahubwo awuhagaritse kubera wowe. Ariho aravuga ati ’Noneho iby’umwana wanjye byo ndabigira nte?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Nutirimuka aho ngaho, uzagera ku giti cy’umushishi w’i Taboru. Uzahahurira n’abagabo batatu bazamuka bajya gusenga Imana i Beteli, umwe azaba ahetse abana b’ihene batatu, undi atwaye imigati itatu, naho uwa gatatu yikoreye uruhago rw’uruhu rurimo divayi." 
1Samuel10:4 Bazakuramutsa kandi baguhe n’imigati ibiri: uzayakire. 
1Samuel10:5 Hanyuma uzagera i Gibeya ku musozi w’Imana, aho abatware b’Abafilisiti batuye. Niwinjira aho mu mugi, uzahahurira n’itorero ry’abahanuzi bariho bahanura; baherekejwe n’inanga, ingoma, imyirongi n’imiduri, bava ahirengeye gusenga." 
1Samuel10:6 Nuko umwuka w’Uhoraho uzakuzuremo, uhinduke umuntu mushya, maze nawe utangire guhanura hamwe na bo." 
1Samuel10:7 Ubwo numara kubona ibi bimenyetso, uzakore ikizaba gikwiye, kuko Imana izaba iri kumwe nawe." 
1Samuel10:8 Nyuma y’ibyo, uzantanga i Giligali, naho jye nzamanuka ngusangayo, kugira ngo duture Imana ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro. Uzantegereza iminsi irindwi kugeza ko ngusangayo, nkazakumenysha icyo ugomba gukora.»" 
1Samuel10:9 Uwo munsi, Sawuli agitirimuka aho yari kumwe na Samweli, Imana imushyiramo umutima mushya, na bya bimenyetso byose bihera ko birigaragaza." 
1Samuel10:10 Nuko ageze i Gibeya, itorero ry’abahanuzi riza rimusanga. Umwuka w’Uhoraho umwuzuramo, maze na we aratwarwa, atangira guhanura hamwe na bo." 
1Samuel10:11 Abari bamuzi kuva kera, bamubonye ahanura hamwe n’abandi bahanuzi, baravuga bati «Ni ibiki byabaye kuri mwene Kishi? Sawuli se na we ari mu bahanuzi?»" 
1Samuel10:12 Umwe mu batuye ako karere afata ijambo, agira ati «Mbese abo ni bene nde?» Ni cyo cyatumye iryo jambo riba nk’umugani, ngo «Sawuli se na we ari mu bahanuzi?»" 
1Samuel10:13 Nuko ngo bamare guhanura, Sawuli agera iwabo." 
1Samuel10:14 Se wabo wa Sawuli aramubaza, we n’umugaragu we, ati «Mbese mwari mwaragiye he?» Aramusubiza ati «Twari twaragiye gushaka indogobe zacu; tubonye tuzibuze tujya kwa Samweli.»" 
1Samuel10:15 Se wabo wa Sawuli aravuga ati «Ndakwinginze ngo umbwire ibyo Samweli yababwiye.» 
1Samuel10:16 Nuko Sawuli abwira se wabo, ati «Yatubwiye ko indogobe zacu zabonetse.» Ariko ibyerekeye ubwami Samweli yamubwiye, arabimuhisha." 
1Samuel10:17 Samweli akoranyiriza rubanda rwose imbere y’Uhoraho i Misipa. 
1Samuel10:18 Nuko abwira Abayisraheli, ati «Dore uko Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze: Ni jye wakuye Israheli mu Misiri, mbakiza ibiganza by’Abanyamisiri n’abami bose bari babashikamiye." 
1Samuel10:19 Ariko none mwebwe mwaretse Imana yanyu, Yo ibakiza mu byago byanyu no mu mibabaro yanyu yose, maze muravuga muti ’Ahubwo twimikire umwami.’ None rero, nimwiyereke Uhoraho, mukurikije imiryango n’amazu mukomokamo.»" 
1Samuel10:20 Nuko Samweli akoranya imiryango yose ya Israheli, maze hatorwa umuryango wa Benyamini." 
1Samuel10:21 Arongera akoranyiriza hamwe umuryango wa Benyamini, buri nzu ukwayo, maze inzu ya Matiri iba ari yo itorwa. Hanyuma akoranya inzu ya Matiri, umuntu ku wundi; maze hatorwa Sawuli mwene Kishi, ariko bamushatse baramubura." 
1Samuel10:22 Nuko babaza Uhoraho, bati «Mbese yaba yaje hano?» Uhoraho arabasubiza ati «Nguriya aho yihishe bugufi y’imitwaro.»" 
1Samuel10:23 Bagenda biruka baramuzana, ahagarara hagati ya rubanda: yanabasumbyaga bose umutwe n’intugu." 
1Samuel10:24 Samweli ni ko kubwira rubanda, ati «Mbese mwabonye uwo Uhoraho yatoranyije kubabera umwami? Nta n’undi uhwanye na we muri rubanda rwose!» Nuko baterera hejuru icyarimwe bavuga bati «Harakabaho umwami!»" 
1Samuel10:25 Samweli aherako abasobanurira imihango yose y’ubwami, ayandika mu gitabo, agishyira imbere y’Uhoraho. Nuko asezerera rubanda, buri muntu ajya iwe." 
1Samuel10:26 Sawuli na we ajya iwabo i Gibeya, ashagawe n’ingabo zatowe n’Imana." 
1Samuel10:27 Ariko bamwe b’ibiburabwenge baravuga bati «Mbese uyu nguyu azadukiza ate?» Baramusuzugura, ndetse banga no kumuha amaturo. Ibyo ariko Sawuli ntiyabyitaho." 
1Samuel11:1 Nahashi w’Umuhamoni arazamuka atera Yabeshi y’i Gilihadi. Ab’i Yabeshi bose baramubwira bati «Tugirane nawe isezerano, maze tuzagukorere.»" 
1Samuel11:2 Nahashi w’Umuhamoni arabasubiza ati «Ndemera ko tugirana isezerano, buri wese muri mwe niyemera ko munogoramo ijisho ry’iburyo, maze ngakoza isoni Israheli yose.»" 
1Samuel11:3 Abakuru b’i Yabeshi baramubwira bati «Tugusabye iminsi irindwi, twohereze intumwa mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli, niharamuka habuze uwadutabara, tuzakuyoboka.»" 
1Samuel11:4 Nuko izo ntumwa zigera i Gibeya aho Sawuli yari atuye, zibasubirira muri ayo magambo. Nuko rubanda ngo babyumve, baraturika bararira." 
1Samuel11:5 Ako kanya Sawuli aza akurikiye ibimasa bye abivanye mu murima, arabaza ati «Aba bantu bararizwa n’iki?» Bamutekerereza ibyo abo bantu b’i Yabeshi bari bamaze kubabwira." 
1Samuel11:6 Sawuli ngo yumve ayo magambo, umwuka w’Uhoraho umwuzuramo, maze afatwa n’uburakari bwinshi." 
1Samuel11:7 Afata ibimasa bibiri abitemamo ibice, abiha izo ntumwa ngo zibijyane mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli, zigenda zivuga ziti «Utazatabarana na Sawuli na Samweli, dore uko ibimasa bye bizagenzwa!» Nuko Uhoraho abahindisha umushyitsi, bagira ubwoba, bahagurukira icyarimwe." 
1Samuel11:8 Bateranira i Bezeki, Sawuli arabitegereza asanga Abayisraheli ari ibihumbi magana atatu, naho Abayuda ari ibihumbi mirongo itatu." 
1Samuel11:9 Nuko babwira za ntumwa, bati «Mubwire abantu b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi, muti ’Ejo ku manywa y’ihangu muzatabarwa.’» Intumwa ziraza zibimenyesha ab’i Yabeshi, nuko birabanezereza cyane." 
1Samuel11:10 Ab’i Yabeshi babwira Abahamoni, bati «Kuva ejo tuzabayoboka, maze mudukoreshe icyo mushaka.»" 
1Samuel11:11 Nuko bukeye bwaho, Sawuli agabanya abantu mo amatsinda atatu. Binjira mu ngando butari bwacya, bica Abahamoni kugeza ku manywa y’ihangu. Abacitse ku icumu baratatana, ntibongera guhura ukundi." 
1Samuel11:12 Rubanda babwira Sawuli, bati «Ni bande bavuze ngo ’Harya Sawuli ni we uzadutegeka?’ Tugabize abo bantu maze tubice.»" 
1Samuel11:13 Ariko Sawuli arababwira ati «Nta muntu uri bwicwe kuri uyu munsi, kuko uyu munsi Uhoraho yatabaruye Israheli.»" 
1Samuel11:14 Samweli abwira rubanda, ati «Nimuze tujye i Giligali, maze tuvugurure ubwami.»" 
1Samuel11:15 Bose bajya i Giligali, bahimikira Sawuli imbere y’Uhoraho, bahaturira ibitambo by’ubuhoro, maze Sawuli n’Abayisraheli bose bahagirira ibirori bikomeye." 
1Samuel12:1 Samweli abwira Abayisraheli bose, ati «Dore numvise ibyo mwambwiye byose, maze mbimikira umwami ngo abategeke." 
1Samuel12:2 None rero, nguyu umwami uzabajya imbere. Jye dore ndashaje, maze kumera imvi, n’abahungu banjye muri kumwe. Muzi ko nabagendaga imbere, guhera mu buto bwanjye kugera uyu munsi." 
1Samuel12:3 Ngaha ndi hano! Nimunshinje imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere y’uwo yasize: ni nde naba naranyaze ikimasa cye cyangwa indogobe ye? Ni nde nariganyije cyangwa nakandamije? Ni nde naba narahatiye kumpa ibiguzi ngo mbonereho kwirengagiza ibibi yakoze? Nihagira uboneka, nzabimuriha.»" 
1Samuel12:4 Baramusubiza bati «Nta cyo waturiganyijeho, nta we wakandamije, ndetse nta n’uwo wahatiye kuguha ibiguzi.»" 
1Samuel12:5 Arababwira ati «Uhoraho n’uwo yiyimikiye, ni bo bagabo bo guhamya ko nta kibi mwambonyeho uyu munsi.» Baravuga bati «Koko Uhoraho ni we muhamya.»" 
1Samuel12:6 Nuko Samweli abwira rubanda, ati «Uhoraho ubwe wakoresheje Musa na Aroni, maze akavana abasokuruza banyu mu gihugu cya Misiri, ni we ubihamya!" 
1Samuel12:7 None rero, nimuhaguruke mbasubirire mu bikorwa by’ubudahemuka Uhoraho yujurije imbere yanyu n’imbere y’abasokuruza banyu." 
1Samuel12:8 Ubwo Yakobo yageraga mu Misiri, Abanyamisiri barabatoteje. Ni bwo abasokuruza banyu batakambiye Uhoraho, aboherereza Musa na Aroni, bavana abasokuruza banyu mu Misiri, babatuza muri iki gihugu." 
1Samuel12:9 Ariko baje kwibagirwa Uhoraho Imana yabo, abagabiza Sisera umugaba w’ingabo za Hasori, Abafilisiti n’umwami w’i Mowabu, nuko babateza intambara." 
1Samuel12:10 Bukeye, batakambira Uhoraho, bavuga bati ’Twaracumuye kuko twaretse Uhoraho, tukayoboka imana z’abanyamahanga, ari zo za Behali na za Ashitaroti. None rero, udukize ibiganza by’abanzi bacu, maze tugukorere.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Nuko Uhoraho aboherereza Yerubehali, Baraki, Yefute na Samweli, abakiza abanzi banyu impande zose, mutura mu gihugu cyanyu mu mahoro." 
1Samuel12:12 Ariko aho muboneye Nahashi, umwami w’Abahamoni abateye, murambwira muti ’Reka da! Nihabeho umwami, azatuyobore!’ Nyamara Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ni we mwami wanyu." 
1Samuel12:13 None rero, nguyu umwami mwihitiyemo kandi mwisabiye; dore Uhoraho abahaye umwami!" 
1Samuel12:14 Nimutinya Uhoraho, mukamukorera, mukumva ijwi rye, mugakurikiza amategeko ye, mwebwe n’umwami wanyu muzakomeza mutyo gukurikira Uhoraho, Imana yanyu." 
1Samuel12:15 Ariko nimutumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho, ntimukurikize amategeko ye, ikiganza cy’Uhoraho kizabahana, nk’uko cyagenjereje abasokuruza banyu." 
1Samuel12:16 Ikindi kandi, nimugume hano murebe ikintu gikomeye Uhoraho agiye gukorera mu maso yanyu." 
1Samuel12:17 Mbese ubu si igihe cy’isarura ry’ingano? Ngiye gusaba Uhoraho ahindishe inkuba, agushe imvura, maze mumenyereho ko ububi bwanyu bwabaye bwinshi imbere y’Uhoraho, ubwo mwasabaga umwami.»" 
1Samuel12:18 Samweli asaba Uhoraho, ahindisha inkuba, agusha imvura, nuko uwo munsi rubanda batinya Uhoraho na Samweli." 
1Samuel12:19 Rubanda babwira Samweli, bati «Twingingire Uhoraho, Imana yawe, twoye gupfa, kuko ku byaha byacu twongereyeho icyo kwisabira umwami.»" 
1Samuel12:20 Samweli arababwira ati «Mwitinya! Koko ibyo bibi byose ni mwe mwabikoze, nyamara ntimukitarure Uhoraho, ahubwo nimumukorere n’umutima wanyu wose." 
1Samuel12:21 Ntimukamujye kure, kuko byaba ari ugukurikira ibigirwamana bitagira umumaro kandi bitagira icyo byabakiza, kubera ko na byo ubwabyo ari ubusa." 
1Samuel12:22 Koko rero, Uhoraho ntazatererana abantu be kubera izina rye rikomeye, kuko yagambiriye kubagira umuryango we." 
1Samuel12:23 Naho ku binyerekeyeko, nti bikabeho ko ncumura kuri Uhoraho, nkarorera kubasabira. Nzabayobora inzira nziza kandi itunganye." 
1Samuel12:24 Nyamara, mujye mutinya Uhoraho kandi mumukorere n’umutima wanyu wose, murebe ibyiza bikomeye yabagiriye!" 
1Samuel12:25 Ariko nimukomeza gucumura, muzarimbuka hamwe n’umwami wanyu.»" 
1Samuel13:1 Sawuli yari afite imyaka........., ubwo yimye ingoma. Yategetse Israheli imyaka...." 
1Samuel13:2 Bukeye yitoranyiriza abantu ibihumbi bitatu muri Israheli: ibihumbi bibiri bari kumwe na we i Mikimasi no ku musozi wa Beteli, abandi igihumbi bari kumwe na Yonatani i Gibeya yo kwa Benyamini. Naho rubanda basigaye arabasezerera, buri muntu ataha iwe." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonatani atsinda umwe mu batware bategekera Abafilisiti wari utuye i Gibeya, nuko Abafilisiti barabimenya. Hanyuma Sawuli ategeka ko bavuza ihembe mu gihugu cyose, agira ati «Abahebureyi babyumve!»" 
1Samuel13:4 Israheli yose yumva ko Sawuli yatsinze umutware w’Abafilisiti, kandi ko Abafilisiti barakariye cyane Israheli. Nuko rubanda rwose barakorana, bakurikira Sawuli i Giligali." 
1Samuel13:5 Abafilisiti na bo barakorana ngo barwanye Israheli. Bari bafite amagare ibihumbi mirongo itatu, abanyamafarasi ibihumbi bitandatu, n’igitero cy’abantu benshi bangana n’umusenyi wo ku nkombe y’inyanja. Barazamuka ngo bace ingando i Mikimasi, mu burasirazuba bwa Betaveni." 
1Samuel13:6 Abayisraheli babonye ko bari mu kaga, kuko Abafilisiti bari babasatiriye, bihisha mu buvumo, mu myobo, mu bitare, mu bisimu no mu mariba." 
1Samuel13:7 Ndetse bamwe bambuka Yorudani, kugira ngo bahungire mu gihugu cya Gadi n’icya Gilihadi. Naho Sawuli yari akiri i Giligali, rubanda rwose bari kumwe na we bahinda umushyitsi." 
1Samuel13:8 Sawuli ahamara iminsi irindwi ategereje Samweli, nk’uko bari babyumvikanyeho, ariko Samweli ntiyaza i Giligali. Nuko abantu baratatana, batangira kumushiraho." 
1Samuel13:9 Ni bwo Sawuli avuze ati «Nimunzanire igitambo gitwikwa, hamwe n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro.» Aherako atura igitambo gitwikwa." 
1Samuel13:10 Akimara gutura igitambo gitwikwa, Samweli arahatunguka. Nuko Sawuli ajya kumusanganira ngo baramukanye." 
1Samuel13:11 Samweli aramubaza ati «Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki?» Sawuli aramusubiza ati «Nabonye abantu bose banshizeho batatanye, mbonye nawe ubwawe utaje mu gihe twasezeranye, kandi Abafilisiti bamaze gukoranira i Mikimasi," 
1Samuel13:12 ndibwira nti ’Ubu ngubu Abafilisiti bagiye kumfatira i Giligali, kandi ntari nurura Uhoraho.’ Nuko niyemeza kumutura igitambo gitwikwa.»" 
1Samuel13:13 Samweli abwira Sawuli, ati «Wahubutse! Ntiwakurikije itegeko Uhoraho Imana yawe yaguhaye. Nyamara, Uhoraho yari gukomeza ubwami bwawe kuri Israheli iteka ryose." 
1Samuel13:14 Ariko noneho, ubwami bwawe ntibuzaramba. Uhoraho yamaze kwishakira undi muntu ashyizeho umutima, kandi ni we yashyizeho ngo abe umwami w’umuryango we, kuko utumviye icyo Uhoraho yagutegetse.»" 
1Samuel13:15 Samweli ashyiranzira ava i Giligali. Sawuli ajyana n’abari basigaranye na we, bava i Giligali berekeza i Geba yo kwa Benyamini, kugira ngo bahasange ingabo ze zindi. Ubwo Sawuli abara abantu basigaranye na we, asanga bagera kuri magana atandatu." 
1Samuel13:16 Sawuli n’umuhungu we Yonatani n’abari kumwe na bo, baguma i Geba yo kwa Benyamini, naho Abafilisiti baca ingando i Mikimasi." 
1Samuel13:17 Bukeye, Abafilisiti basohoka mu ngando, bigabanyamo amatsinda atatu: irya mbere ryerekeza Ofura mu gihugu cya Shuwali," 
1Samuel13:18 irya kabiri rijya i Betihoroni, naho irya gatatu ryerekeza ku rugabano ruri hejuru y’ikibaya bita icy’impyisi, giteganye n’ubutayu." 
1Samuel13:19 Icyo gihe nta mucuzi wari ukirangwa mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli, kuko Abafilisiti bavugaga bati «Abayisraheli ntibagomba kwicurira amacumu n’inkota.»" 
1Samuel13:20 Abayisraheli bose bagombaga kujya mu Bafilisiti, kugira ngo buri wese atyarishe umuhoro we, isuka ye, intorezo ye cyangwa itindo ye." 
1Samuel13:21 Uko gutyaza kwarihishwaga bibiri bya gatatu bya sikeli ku muhoro, intorezo, amasuka, maze bigasubirana ubugi bwabyo." 
1Samuel13:22 Ni yo mpamvu ku munsi w’urugamba, nta nkota cyangwa icumu byarangwaga mu ngando za Sawuli na Yonatani, keretse bo bonyine ni bo bari babyitwaje." 
1Samuel13:23 Nuko ingabo z’Abafilisiti zirasohoka, zijya mu nzira y’imfunganwa igana i Mikimasi." 
1Samuel14:1 Umunsi umwe, Yonatani mwene Sawuli abwira uwamutwazaga intwaro ze, ati «Ngwino twambuke tujye mu ngando y’abafilisiti iri hakurya hariya.» Ariko ntiyabibwira se." 
1Samuel14:2 Sawuli yari yicaye hafi y’urugabano rw’i Geba, mu nsi y’igiti cyari i Migironi. Yari kumwe n’abantu magana atandatu." 
1Samuel14:3 Ahiya, mwene Ahitubi, umuvandimwe wa Ikabodi mwene Pinehasi, mwene Heli umuherezabitambo w’Uhoraho i Silo, yari atwaye uruhago rw’amabuye y’ubufindo. Ariko rubanda ntibari bazi ko Yonatani yagiye." 
1Samuel14:4 Hagati aho, Yonatani ashaka kwambuka inzira y’imfunganwa ngo agere ku ngando y’Abafilisiti. Muri iyo nzira hakaba igitare gifite iryinyo rimwe mu ruhande rumwe, irindi mu rundi, rimwe rikitwa Bosesi, irindi rikitwa Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Rimwe muri ayo menyo y’icyo gitare ryari rihagaze ryerekeje mu majyaruguru, ahateganye na Mikimasi; irindi ryerekeje mu majyepfo, ahateganye na Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonatani abwira uwo muntu wamutwazaga intwaro, ati «Ngwino twambuke, tugere ku ngando ya ziriya ntagenywe, wenda Uhoraho araturwanirira; kuko twaba benshi cyangwa se bake, ntacyabuza Uhoraho kuduha gutsinda.»" 
1Samuel14:7 Uwo muntu aramusubiza ati «Genda, ukore icyo watekereje, kandi nanjye ndi kumwe nawe; ndakora icyo umutima wawe wifuza.»" 
1Samuel14:8 Yonatani aramubwira ati «Dore ubu turagenda tugana aho bari, maze abantu baho batubone." 
1Samuel14:9 Nibatubwira bati ’Nimuhagarare! Mutegereze ko tubegera’, tugume hamwe twoye kubasatira." 
1Samuel14:10 Ariko nibavuga bati ’Nimuze hano’, turaherako tubasanga, kuko Uhoraho aba abatugabije. Ni cyo kitubera ikimenyetso.»" 
1Samuel14:11 Nuko bombi bigaragariza abazamu b’Abafilisiti. Abafilisiti bababonye, barabwirana bati «Dore Abahebureyi basohotse mu myobo aho bari bihishe.»" 
1Samuel14:12 Abazamu bararengereza bahamagara Yonatani n’umutwaje intwaro, bati «Nimuze hano, tugire icyo tubabwira.» Yonatani abwira wa muntu we, ati «Nkurikira, kuko Uhoraho yabagabije ibiganza by’Abayisraheli.»" 
1Samuel14:13 Nuko Yonatani arazamuka, akoresheje amaboko n’amaguru, na wa muntu umutwaje intwaro amukurikiye. Nuko Yonatani akagenda yararika Abafilisiti, umutwaje intwaro akajya agenda abasonga inyuma ye." 
1Samuel14:14 Muri urwo rugamba rwa mbere rwa Yonatani n’umutwaje intwaro, hagwa abantu makumyabiri ahantu hatoya cyane." 
1Samuel14:15 Maze mu ngando, mu misozi yose no mu bantu bose igikuba kiracika, abazamu n’ingabo zose bakuka umutima, isi ihinda umushyitsi, ari Imana ibakangaranyije." 
1Samuel14:16 Intasi za Sawuli zari i Geba ya Benyamini zarabirebaga, zibona inteko z’abantu banyuranamo basohoka." 
1Samuel14:17 Nuko Sawuli abwira abantu bari kumwe na we, ati «Nimuhamagaze abantu, murebe niba hari uwo muri twe wagiye.» Barabahamagara: haburamo Yonatani n’umutwaza intwaro ze." 
1Samuel14:18 Sawuli abwira Ahiya, ati «Zana hano uruhago rw’ubufindo», kuko icyo gihe ari we wari urushinzwe mu Bayisraheli." 
1Samuel14:19 Uko Sawuli avugana n’umuherezabitambo, umuhindagano ukarushaho kwiyongera mu ngando y’Abafilisiti. Nuko Sawuli abwira umuherezabitambo, ati «Rekeraho tubyihorere!»" 
1Samuel14:20 Sawuli n’abantu bari kumwe na we barakorana, maze bajya ku rugamba. Bagezeyo, basanga Abafilisiti ubwabo bakuye inkota basubiranamo, biba urujijo rukabije." 
1Samuel14:21 Abahebureyi bari basanzwe bakorera Abafilisiti, bari aho mu ngando, barahindukira bifatanya n’Abayisraheli bari kumwe na Sawuli na Yonatani." 
1Samuel14:22 Ndetse n’Abayisraheli bose bari bihishe mu misozi y’i Efurayimu, bumvise ko Abafilisiti bahunze, na bo bava mu bwihisho barabakurikira bajya kubarwanya." 
1Samuel14:23 Uwo munsi Uhoraho aha Israheli gutsinda, nuko intambara irakomeza isingira no hirya ya Betihoroni." 
1Samuel14:24 Abayisraheli barahababariye cyane uwo munsi, kuko Sawuli yari yihanangirije rubanda mu ndahiro, ati «Havumwe umuntu ugira icyo arya butaragoroba, mbere y’uko mara kwihorera ku banzi banjye!» Nta n’umwe muri bo wari wagize icyo akoza ku munwa." 
1Samuel14:25 Ubwo ingabo zose ziza kugera mu ishyamba, ryarimo ubuki bushongera hasi ku butaka." 
1Samuel14:26 Ngo binjire muri rya shyamba, babona uwo mushongi w’ubuki. Ntihagira n’umwe utinyuka no gukoza intoki ku munwa, kuko bangaga kurenga ku ndahiro." 
1Samuel14:27 Ariko Yonatani we, mu gihe se yarahiraga abantu, nta bwo yari yabyumvise. Nuko akoza isonga y’inkoni yari yitwaje muri bwa buki, akozaho intoki aratamira, maze amaso ye arushaho kureba cyane." 
1Samuel14:28 Umwe mu bo bari kumwe aramubwira ati «So yihanangirije rubanda mu ndahiro ngo ’Ugira icyo arya uyu munsi avumwe.’ None abantu bishwe n’inzara.» 
1Samuel14:29 Yonatani aravuga ati «Data yagiriye abantu nabi; nimurebe ngo aho mariye kurya kuri buriya buki, amaso yanjye ararushaho kureba neza!" 
1Samuel14:30 Mbese uyu munsi, iyo abantu bajya kurya ku byo basahuye abanzi babo, ntitwari kuba twabonye imbaraga, tukarushaho kumara Abafilisiti?»" 
1Samuel14:31 Uwo munsi bakomeza gutsinda Abafilisiti, kuva i Mikimasi kugera Ayaloni, ariko kubera ko rubanda bari bamaze kunanirwa cyane," 
1Samuel14:32 baherako biyahura ku minyago. Bafata amatungo magufi, ibimasa n’inyana, babisogotera ku butaka maze babiryana amaraso." 
1Samuel14:33 Baza kubwira Sawuli, bati «Dore rubanda bacumuye kuri Uhoraho, kuko baryana inyama n’amaraso!» Sawuli aravuga ati «Muri abagambanyi! Ngaho nimuhirike ibuye rinini murinzanire hano!»" 
1Samuel14:34 Nuko Sawuli aravuga ati «Nimukwire muri rubanda bose mubabwire muti ’Buri muntu anzanire ikimasa cye cyangwa intama ye, mubyicire hano, hanyuma murye, aho gucumura kuri Uhoraho muryana inyama n’amaraso.’» Muri iryo joro, buri muntu muri rubanda azana itungo rye, maze bayabagira aho ngaho." 
1Samuel14:35 Sawuli aherako yubakira Uhoraho urutambiro, ari na rwo rwa mbere yari yubakiye Uhoraho." 
1Samuel14:36 Nuko Sawuli aravuga ati «Tumanuke dukurikire Abafilisiti muri iri joro, tubice kugeza ko bucya, twoye gusigaza n’umwe.» Baramusubiza bati «Ukore uko ushaka kose.» Nyamara umuherezabitambo arababwira ati «Nimwigire hino tubanze twegere Imana.»" 
1Samuel14:37 Sawuli ni ko kubaza Imana, ati «Mbese nkomeze nkurikirane Abafilisiti, waba wabagabije ikiganza cy’Abayisraheli?» Ariko uwo munsi, Imana ntiyagira icyo imusubiza." 
1Samuel14:38 Sawuli aravuga ati «Batware b’umuryango mwese, nimwigire hino! Mugerageze kwibukiranya icyaha cyaba cyakozwe uyu munsi." 
1Samuel14:39 Mbarahiye Uhoraho, Umukiza wa Israheli, ko n’aho yaba ari umuhungu wanjye Yonatani wacumuye, agomba gupfa nta kabuza.» Ntihagira n’umwe muri rubanda ugira icyo amusubiza." 
1Samuel14:40 Ni ko rero kubwira Abayisraheli, ati «Mwebwe, mujye mu ruhande rumwe, naho jye n’umuhungu wanjye Yonatani turajya mu rundi.» Baramusubiza bati «Ukore icyo ubona kigutunganiye.»" 
1Samuel14:41 Nuko Sawuli abwira Uhoraho, ati «Mana ya Israheli, erekana aho ukuri guherereye.» Maze bakora ubufindo, icyaha gihama Sawuli na Yonatani, naho rubanda barakira." 
1Samuel14:42 Sawuli arongera aravuga ati «Noneho, ngaho nimufindure nyir’ugucumura, niba ari jye cyangwa se umuhungu wanjye Yonatani.» Nuko icyaha gihama Yonatani." 
1Samuel14:43 Ni bwo Sawuli abwiye Yonatani, ati «Ntekerereza ibyo wakoze.» Yonatani arabimubwira, agira ati «Ni byo koko, nariye ku buki bwaje ku isonga y’inkoni nari nitwaje. None rero nta kundi niteguye gupfa.»" 
1Samuel14:44 Sawuli aravuga ati «Imana irampane bikomeye, nuramuka utishwe, wowe Yonatani!»" 
1Samuel14:45 Rubanda babwira Sawuli, bati «Mbese Yonatani yapfa ate, kandi ari we watabaruye Israheli? Ibyo byaba ishyano kuri Uhoraho. Nuko rero, nta gasatsi ko ku mutwe we kazagwa hasi, kuko ibyo yakoze uyu munsi byose yabikoze afatanyije n’Imana.» Uko ni ko rubanda bakijije Yonatani, maze ntiyapfa." 
1Samuel14:46 Nuko Sawuli arazamuka, areka gukurikirana Abafilisiti, kandi n’Abafilisiti basubira mu gihugu cyabo." 
1Samuel14:47 Sawuli yamaze kuba umwami wa Israheli, ashyamirana n’abanzi be b’impande zose, arwana na Mowabu, n’Abahamoni n’Abanyedomu, n’umwami w’i Shoba, n’Abafilisiti, kandi aho yaganaga hose yabagiriraga nabi." 
1Samuel14:48 Yagaragaje ubutwari bwe igihe atsinze Amaleki, akarokora Israheli mu kiganza cy’uwari warayigaruriye." 
1Samuel14:49 Abahungu ba Sawuli bari Yonatani, Ishyo na Malekishuwa, naho abakobwa be, uw’imfura yitwaga Meraba, umuhererezi akitwa Mikali." 
1Samuel14:50 Umugore wa Sawuli yitwaga Ahinowamu, umukobwa wa Ahimasi, naho umugaba w’ingabo ze akitwa Abuneri, mwene Neri se wabo wa Sawuli." 
1Samuel14:51 Kishi se wa Sawuli, na Neri se wa Abuneri, bari bene Abiyeli." 
1Samuel14:52 Ku ngoma ya Sawuli yose, intambara yakomeje kuba urudaca cyane ku Bafilisiti, kandi Sawuli iyo yabonaga umuntu w’intambara kandi w’intwari, yamushyiraga mu ngabo ze." 
1Samuel15:1 Samweli abwira Sawuli, ati «Ni jyewe Uhoraho yohereje kugusiga, ngo ube umwami wa Israheli, umuryango we. Tega amatwi rero ijwi ry’Uhoraho n’amagambo ye." 
1Samuel15:2 Uhoraho Umushoborabyose aravuze ati ’Nigiriye inama yo guhana Amaleki kubera ibyo yagiriye Abayisraheli, bababuza inzira igihe bavaga mu Misiri." 
1Samuel15:3 Ubu rero genda urimbure Amaleki, uzarimbure ibyo batunze byose, ntuzagire na kimwe usigaza. Uzice abagabo n’abagore, abana bato n’abakiri ku ibere, inka n’intama, ingamiya n’indogobe.’»" 
1Samuel15:4 Nuko Sawuli ahamagaza ingabo ze ziteranira i Telayimu, arazibara, asanga ari abantu ibihumbi magana abiri bagenza ibirenge, naho Abayuda bari ibihumbi cumi." 
1Samuel15:5 Ngo agere mu mugi wa Amaleki, Sawuli ajya mu kibaya cy’uruzi maze arubikira." 
1Samuel15:6 Sawuli abwira Abakeniti, ati «Mwe nimugende, muve mu bantu ba Amaleki, kuko byaba bibabaje kubicana na bo, kandi mwebwe mwaragiriye neza Abayisraheli igihe bavaga mu Misiri.» Nuko Abakeniti bitarura Abamaleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Sawuli rero yica Abamaleki, ahereye i Havila kugeza i Shuri, ahateganye na Misiri." 
1Samuel15:8 Afata mpiri Agagi, umwami w’Abamaleki, maze rubanda rwose arabarimbura, abamarira ku nkota." 
1Samuel15:9 Ariko Sawuli n’ingabo ze, ntibagira icyo batwara Agagi n’amatungo meza yo mu mashyo ye. Ibyari byiza byose, ari amatungo magufi, ari amaremare, byo ntibagira icyo babitwara. Nyamara ibindi bintu byose bidafite agaciro, barabirimbura." 
1Samuel15:10 Uhoraho ni ko kubwira Samweli muri aya magambo ati 
1Samuel15:11 «Ndicuza icyatumye mpa Sawuli ubwami, kuko yantengushye ntakurikize amategeko yanjye.» Nuko Samweli biramubabaza cyane, arara atakambira Uhoraho ijoro ryose." 
1Samuel15:12 Samweli abyuka mu gitondo cya kare, kugira ngo ajye gusanganira Sawuli. Baza kumubwira bati «Sawuli yageze i Karumeli ahishingira urwibutso, hanyuma aramanuka, akomeza ajya i Giligali.»" 
1Samuel15:13 Nuko Samweli amusangayo, maze Sawuli aramubwira ati «Gira amahoro y’Uhoraho! Amategeko y’Uhoraho nayakurikije.»" 
1Samuel15:14 Ariko Samweli aramubaza ati «Ko numva imihebebo, nkumva imyabiro, ni iby’iki?»" 
1Samuel15:15 Sawuli aramusubiza ati «Ni amatungo twavanye Amaleki, kuko ingabo zarokoye ay’inyamibwa mu nka no mu ntama, kugira ngo babitureho igitambo Uhoraho, Imana yawe. Naho ibindi byose twabirimbuye.»" 
1Samuel15:16 Ariko Samweli abwira Sawuli, ati «Ibyo birahagije. Reka nanjye nkubwire ibyo Uhoraho yamenyesheje iri joro.» Sawuli aramubwira ati «Ngaho mbwira.»" 
1Samuel15:17 Nuko Samweli aravuga ati «N’ubwo wigaya nawe ubwawe, ese ubundi nturi umutware w’imiryango ya Israheli? Uhoraho yagusigiye kuba umwami wa Israheli." 
1Samuel15:18 Uhoraho yakohereje ku rugamba, maze arakubwira ati ’Genda urimbure bariya Bamaleki b’abanyabyaha! Ubarwanye kugeza igihe ubatsembye bose, hatasigara n’umwe’." 
1Samuel15:19 None ni iki cyaguteye kutumvira Uhoraho? Ni iki cyatumye ufata iminyago, maze ugakora ikidashimisha Uhoraho?»" 
1Samuel15:20 Sawuli asubiza Samweli, ati «Numviye ijwi ry’Uhoraho, kuko nagabye igitero aho yanyohereje, nkazana Agagi umwami w’Amaleki, naho Amaleki ubwayo nkayirimbura." 
1Samuel15:21 Rubanda bafashe ku minyago iby’inyamibwa ku byagombaga kurimburwa, ari ku matungo magufi ari no ku maremare, kugira ngo babitureho igitambo Uhoraho Imana yawe, i Giligali.»" 
1Samuel15:22 Ariko Samweli aramubwira ati «Ugira ngo Uhoraho yishimira ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibindi bitambo, nk’uko ashimishwa n’uwumvira amategeko ye? Oya da! Kumvira biruta igitambo icyo ari cyo cyose, no kwitonda bigasumba kure ibinure bya za rugeyo." 
1Samuel15:23 Naho kwinubira Imana kukareshya n’icyaha cyo kuraguza, no kutava ku izima kukareshya n’ubupfumu. None rero, kubera ko wanze kumvira amategeko y’Uhoraho, nawe yakwangiye gukomeza kuba umwami.»" 
1Samuel15:24 Sawuli abwira Samweli, ati «Nacumuye, naciye ku itegeko ry’Uhoraho, no ku magambo yawe. Nabitewe n’ubwoba nagize kubera rubanda, maze ndabumvira." 
1Samuel15:25 None rero, ndakwinginze umbabarire icyaha cyanjye, maze tujyane kugira ngo ninginge Uhoraho.»" 
1Samuel15:26 Samweli aramusubiza ati «Nta bwo njyana nawe; kuko wanze kumvira ijambo ry’Uhoraho, na we yakwanze: nta n’ubwo ukiri umwami wa Israheli!»" 
1Samuel15:27 Nuko Samweli ahindukiye ngo agende, Sawuli asingira ikinyita cy’umwambaro we, maze kiracika." 
1Samuel15:28 Samweli aramubwira ati «Uhoraho uyu munsi yakunyaze ubwami bwa Israheli, abuha undi yihitiyemo ukuruta ubwiza." 
1Samuel15:29 Ikindi kandi, Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli ntiyivuguruza kandi ntiyicuza icyo yakoze, kuko atari umuntu ngo akeneye kwisubiraho.»" 
1Samuel15:30 Sawuli aravuga ati «Nacumuye! None ariko ndakwinginze, unyubahirize imbere y’abakuru b’umuryango wanjye n’imbere ya Israheli: tugarukane kugira ngo ninginge Uhoraho, Imana yawe.»" 
1Samuel15:31 Nuko Samweli arahindukira barajyana, maze Sawuli yinginga Uhoraho." 
1Samuel15:32 Nuko Samweli aravuga ati «Nimunzanire hano Agagi, umwami w’Amaleki.» Agagi ngo abyumve aza yishimye, yibwira ati «Ni ukuri koko, ubanza ahari ntagipfuye.»" 
1Samuel15:33 Samweli aravuga ati «Nk’uko inkota yawe yambuye abagore abana babo, ni na ko nyoko na we azamburwa umwana we, mu bandi bagore.» Aherako yica Agagi, imbere y’Uhoraho i Giligali." 
1Samuel15:34 Hanyuma Samweli ajya iwe i Rama, na Sawuli arazamuka ataha i Gibeya ya Sawuli." 
1Samuel15:35 Kuva ubwo Samweli ntiyongera kubonana na Sawuli kugeza ubwo apfuye; ahubwo yakomeje kumuririra, kuko Uhoraho yicuzaga ko yagize Sawuli umwami wa Israheli." 
1Samuel16:1 Uhoraho abwira Samweli, ati «Uzakomeza kuririra Sawuli kugeza ryari, kandi nanjye ubwanjye naramuzinutswe, akaba atazongera kuba umwami wa Israheli? Uzuza amavuta ihembe ryawe maze ugende! Nkohereje kwa Yese w’i Betelehemu, kuko nabonye umwami nshaka mu bahungu be.»" 
1Samuel16:2 Samweli aravuga ati «Nzajyayo nte? Sawuli nabyumva azanyica.» Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Ujyane inyana, maze uzavuge uti ’Nzanywe no gutura Uhoraho igitambo.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Nujya gutura igitambo, uzahamagare Yese. Ni jyewe ubwanjye uzakwereka icyo ugomba gukora, uwo nzakwereka uzamunsigira amavuta.»" 
1Samuel16:4 Samweli agenza uko Uhoraho yamubwiye. Ageze i Betelehemu, abakuru b’umugi bamusanganira badagadwa, maze baramubaza bati «Mbese uzanywe n’amahoro?»" 
1Samuel16:5 Samweli arabasubiza ati «Nzanywe n’amahoro? Nje gutura Uhoraho igitambo. Nimwitagatifuze maze duturane igitambo.» Nuko atagatifuza Yese n’abahungu be, maze abatumira mu gitambo." 
1Samuel16:6 Bamaze kuhagera, Samweli ngo arabukwe umuhungu wa Yese witwa Eliyabu, aribwira ati «Nta kabuza, uwo Uhoraho yatoye ageze imbere ye!»" 
1Samuel16:7 Uhoraho abwira Samweli, ati «Ntukangwe n’imisusire ye cyangwa n’igihagararo cye; jye si we natoye, simushaka: kuko Uhoraho atareba nk’abantu, bo bareba imisusire, naho Uhoraho akareba umutima.»" 
1Samuel16:8 Yese ahamagara Abinadabu, amuhagarika imbere ya Samweli, ariko Samweli atera hejuru avuga ati «Uyu nguyu na none si we Uhoraho yatoye.»" 
1Samuel16:9 Yese amwereka Shama, maze Samweli aravuga ati «Uyu na none si we Uhoraho yatoye.»" 
1Samuel16:10 Yese amwereka abahungu be barindwi, Samweli ati «Nta we Imana yatoye muri bo.»" 
1Samuel16:11 Ubwo Samweli abaza Yese, ati «Mbese abahungu bawe ni aba ngaba bonyine?» Yese aramusubiza ati «Hari umuhererezi, akaba aragiye amatungo.» Samweli ni ko kubwira Yese, ati «Tuma bajye kumuzana, kuko tutari bujye ku meza atageze hano.»" 
1Samuel16:12 Yese amutumaho. Uwo muhungu yari inzobe, akagira mu maso hateye ubwuzu kandi n’igihagararo cye cyizihiye. Uhoraho abwira Samweli, ati «Haguruka umusige amavuta, kuko ari we natoye.»" 
1Samuel16:13 Samweli afata ihembe ry’amavuta, amusigira hagati y’abavandimwe be, maze umwuka w’Imana wuzura muri Dawudi guhera uwo munsi. Samweli akomeza urugendo agana i Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Icyo gihe umwuka w’Imana wari wavuye muri Sawuli, kandi umwuka mubi utumwe n’Uhoraho wamubuzaga uburyo." 
1Samuel16:15 Abagaragu be baramubwira bati «Dore umwuka mubi utumwe n’Imana, ni wo ukubuza uburyo." 
1Samuel16:16 None shobuja, abagaragu bawe ngaba imbere yawe: tegeka ko bagushakira umucuranzi kugira ngo ugubwe neza.»" 
1Samuel16:17 Nuko Sawuli abwira abagaragu be, ati «Nimunshakire rero umuntu uzi gucuranga neza, maze mumunzanire!»" 
1Samuel16:18 Bukeye, umwe muri bo aramubwira ati «Nabonye umuhungu wa Yese w’i Betelehemu, azi gucuranga neza; ni umusore w’intwari kandi uzi kurwana, avugana ubwitonzi kandi akaba umuntu w’igikundiro. Uhoraho ari kumwe na we.»" 
1Samuel16:19 Sawuli ni ko kohereza intumwa kwa Yese, aramubwira ati «Nyoherereza umuhungu wawe Dawudi, wa mushumba w’amatungo.»" 
1Samuel16:20 Yese afata indogobe, ayihekesha imigati, umwana w’ihene n’umufuka w’uruhu urimo divayi, maze abiha Dawudi ngo abishyire Sawuli." 
1Samuel16:21 Dawudi agera atyo kwa Sawuli, atangira kumukorera. Sawuli aramukunda cyane, nuko Dawudi akajya amutwaza intwaro ze." 
1Samuel16:22 Sawuli atuma kuri Yese, ati «Ngusabye ko Dawudi akomeza kunkorera, kuko yanyuze.»" 
1Samuel16:23 Nuko umwuka mubi uturutse ku Mana waba ufashe Sawuli, Dawudi agafata inanga ye, akamucurangira, maze Sawuli agacururuka, akumva amerewe neza, kandi umwuka mubi ukamuvamo." 
1Samuel17:1 Abafilisiti bakoranya ingabo zabo ngo bajye ku rugamba. Bazikoranyiriza i Soko y’i Yuda, nuko baca ingando hagati ya Soko na Azeki, i Efesidamimu." 
1Samuel17:2 Sawuli n’Abayisraheli bakoranira hamwe, na bo baca ingando mu Kibaya cy’Umushishi ahateganye n’Abafilisiti, biteguye kubarwanya." 
1Samuel17:3 Abafilisiti bari ku musozi umwe, Abayisraheli ku wundi, ikibaya kiri hagati yabo." 
1Samuel17:4 Bukeye, mu ngando y’Abafilisiti hasohoka umugabo w’intwari witwaga Goliyati w’i Gati, yari afite igihagararo cy’imikono itandatu n’intambwe imwe y’intoki." 
1Samuel17:5 Mu mutwe we yari yambaye ingofero y’umuringa, yambaye n’ikoti rikozwe mu twuma dusobekeranye kandi riremereye cyane, nk’amasikeli ibihumbi bitanu by’umuringa." 
1Samuel17:6 Ku maguru ye yari ahafite ibyuma bikingira imirundi, yambaye n’inkota y’umuringa mu bitugu." 
1Samuel17:7 Uruti rw’icumu rye rwanganaga n’igiti cy’ababoshyi b’imyenda, kandi icumu ubwaryo ryapimaga amasikeli magana atandatu y’icyuma. Umutwaje ingabo ye yamugendaga imbere." 
1Samuel17:8 Araza ahagarara imbere y’ingabo za Israheli, maze arangurura ijwi, ati «Ni iki cyatumye muhagurutswa no gushoza intambara? Sindi Umufilisiti, naho mwe mukaba abacakara ba Sawuli? Mwihitemo umuntu umwe, maze amanuke ansange!" 
1Samuel17:9 Nagira imbaraga zituma turwana akanyica, ubwo tuzahinduka abacakara banyu; naho niturwana nkamurusha imbaraga nkamwica, ni mwebwe muzahinduka abacakara bacu, maze mudukorere.»" 
1Samuel17:10 Umufilisiti arongera, aravuga ati «Uyu munsi, nsembuye ingabo za Israheli; nimumpe umuntu aze turwane!»" 
1Samuel17:11 Sawuli n’Abayisraheli bose ngo bumve ayo magambo y’Umufilisiti, barakangarana bakuka umutima." 
1Samuel17:12 Dawudi yari umuhungu w’Umunyefurati w’i Betelehemu ya Yuda, witwaga Yese, wari ufite abahungu umunani. Mu gihe cya Sawuli, uwo mugabo yari ashaje, ageze mu zabukuru." 
1Samuel17:13 Abahungu bakuru batatu ba Yese bari baratabaranye na Sawuli. Abo uko ari batatu, ni uw’imfura Eliyabu, uw’ubuheta Abinadabu, n’uwa gatatu Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Dawudi rero yari umuhererezi, abo bakuru batatu bakaba ari bo bari baratabaranye na Sawuli. (" 
1Samuel17:15 Ariko Dawudi uko yajyaga kwa Sawuli, yagarukaga n’i Betelehemu kuragira amatungo ya se." 
1Samuel17:16 Nuko Umufilisiti akomeza kubasatira uko bukeye n’uko bwije, amara iminsi mirongo ine yose yigaragambya.)" 
1Samuel17:17 Bukeye Yese abwira umuhungu we Dawudi, ati «Akira izi ngano zikaranze n’iyi migati cumi, maze wihute ubigemurire bakuru bawe bari ku rugamba." 
1Samuel17:18 Naho aya masoro cumi y’amavuta, urayaha umutware w’umutwe w’ingabo barimo. Urebe bakuru bawe kandi bakubwire uko bamerewe aho ku rugamba, banaguhe ikimenyetso cy’uko wagezeyo." 
1Samuel17:19 Bari kumwe na Sawuli n’Abayisraheli bose mu Kibaya cy’Umushishi, bararwana n’Abafilisiti.»" 
1Samuel17:20 Nuko Dawudi azinduka mu gitondo cya kare, amatungo ayasigaho undi mushumba, afata izo ngemu, aragenda nk’uko Yese yabimutegetse. Agera mu ngando mu gihe ingabo zari zigiye kurwana zavuzaga urwamo rw’intambara." 
1Samuel17:21 Ingabo z’Abayisraheli n’iz ’Abafilisiti zari zishyamiranye. 
1Samuel17:22 Dawudi abitsa umunyabintu umutwaro we, aherako ariruka ajya ku rugamba, maze aramutsa bakuru be." 
1Samuel17:23 Igihe akivugana na bakuru be, ingabo z’Abafilisiti zirazamuka. Cya gihangange cyitwa Goliyati, Umufilisiti w’i Gati, azirangaje imbere, nuko atangira gusubira muri ya mihigo ye uko asanzwe, Dawudi aramwumva." 
1Samuel17:24 Ngo barabukwe uwo mugabo, Abayisraheli bose bagira ubwoba bwinshi, maze barahunga." 
1Samuel17:25 Abayisraheli baravuga bati «Mbese mwabonye uriya mugabo uzamuka? Nta kindi kimuzanye kitari ugukoza isoni Israheli. Umuntu uri bumwice, umwami azamugororera ibintu byinshi, azamushyingira umukobwa we kandi azaha inzu ye icyubahiro cy’akarenga muri Israheli.»" 
1Samuel17:26 Dawudi abaza abantu bari hafi ye, ati «Umuntu uzica uriya Mufilisiti agahanagura ikimwaro kuri Israheli, harya ngo azagororerwa iki? Mbese yaba ari muntu ki uriya Mufilisiti utagenywe, akaba asuzugura ingabo z’Imana Ihoraho?»" 
1Samuel17:27 Abantu bamusubirira mu byo umwami yavuze, bati «Uko ni ko bazagororera umuntu uzamwica.»" 
1Samuel17:28 Maze Eliyabu, mukuru we w’imfura, yumva Dawudi avugana n’abo bantu. Aramurakarira cyane maze aramubaza ati «Mbese wazanywe n’iki hano? Amatungo yawe wayasigiye nde mu butayu? Ndakuzi wowe n’amarere yawe n’ubwibone bwawe: ubwo wazanywe no kureba intambara!»" 
1Samuel17:29 Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Ariko se ngize nte? Nta kintu kibi nkoze, uretse kuganira.»" 
1Samuel17:30 Ubwo amuva iruhande asanga undi muntu, na we amubaza cya kibazo cye. Undi amusubiza na none nk’uko aba mbere bamushubije." 
1Samuel17:31 Nyamara, ayo magambo Dawudi yavuze bari bayumvise, bayasubiriramo Sawuli, nuko aramuhamagaza." 
1Samuel17:32 Dawudi abwira Sawuli, ati «Ntihagire n’umwe ukuka umutima kubera uriya Mufilisiti; jyewe umugaragu wawe ndajya kumurwanya.»" 
1Samuel17:33 Sawuli abwira Dawudi, ati «Ntiwashobora kurwana n’uriya Mufilisiti, kuko ukiri muto, naho we akaba ari umugabo wamenyereye intambara kuva mu busore bwe.»" 
1Samuel17:34 Dawudi asubiza Sawuli, ati «Jyewe, umugaragu wawe, nari umushumba w’amatungo ya data; iyo habaga haje intare cyangwa ikirura, maze igatwara intama imwe mu mukumbi," 
1Samuel17:35 narayikurikiranaga, nkayikubita, maze nkayiyambura; yaba impindukiranye nkayifata ubwoya, nkayitura hasi maze nkayica." 
1Samuel17:36 Ubwo umugaragu wawe yishe intare n’ikirura, uriya Mufilisiti utagenywe azamera nka kimwe muri ibyo, kubera ko yakojeje isoni ingabo z’Imana Ihoraho.»" 
1Samuel17:37 Dawudi arakomeza ati «Uhoraho wankijije inzara z’intare n’iz’ikirura, ubwe azandokora n’ikiganza cy’uriya Mufilisiti.» Sawuli abwira Dawudi, ati «Ngaho genda, maze Uhoraho abe kumwe nawe.»" 
1Samuel17:38 Nuko Sawuli yambika Dawudi imyambaro ye bwite, amwambika ingofero y’umuringa mu mutwe, amuha n’ikoti ry’icyuma." 
1Samuel17:39 Dawudi agerekaho n’inkota ya Sawuli, maze agerageza kugenda biba iby’ubusa kuko atari amenyereye iyo myambaro. Nuko Dawudi abwira Sawuli, ati «Sinshobora kugenda nambaye ibi byose, kuko ntabimenyereye.» Maze arabyiyambura." 
1Samuel17:40 Aherako afata inkoni ye mu ntoki, atoragura amabuyengeri atanu mu mugezi, ayashyira mu gahago ke ka gishumba, afata n’umuhumetso we maze agenda asanga Umufilisiti." 
1Samuel17:41 Umufilisiti na we aza arangajwe imbere n’umutwaje ingabo ye, atangira buhoro buhoro gusatira Dawudi." 
1Samuel17:42 Nuko Umufilisiti yitegereza Dawudi, maze aramusuzugura kuko yari akiri umwana, yari inzobe kandi afite uburanga buhebuje." 
1Samuel17:43 Umufilisiti ni ko kubwira Dawudi, ati «Mbese wabonye ndi imbwa kugira ngo unsange witwaje inkoni?» Nuko Umufilisiti avumisha Dawudi izina ry’imana ze." 
1Samuel17:44 Umufilisiti abwira Dawudi, ati «Ngaho niba wiyanga ngwino, nkubagire ibisiga byo mu kirere n’inyamaswa zo mu gasozi.»" 
1Samuel17:45 Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Wowe unteye witwaje inkota, intambi n’icumu; naho jyewe nje nitwaje izina ry’Uhoraho Umushoborabyose, Imana y’ingabo za Israheli wasuzuguye." 
1Samuel17:46 Uyu munsi Uhoraho arakungabiza, ndakwica maze nguce umutwe, kandi intumbi z’ingabo z’Abafilisiti ndazigaburira inyoni zo mu kirere n’inyamaswa zo mu gasozi. Maze isi yose izamenyereho ko muri Israheli hari Imana." 
1Samuel17:47 Bityo iri koraniro ryose rizamenya ko Uhoraho adakoresha inkota cyangwa icumu; ni we mugenga w’ingabo kandi arabagabiza ibiganza byacu.» 
1Samuel17:48 Nuko Umufilisiti uko yakemaraye, ava aho yari ari, aza asanga Dawudi. Ni bwo Dawudi akataje agana urugamba, asanganiye Umufilisiti." 
1Samuel17:49 Dawudi akora bwangu mu gahago ke, akuramo ibuye ariteresha umuhumetso, arikocora mu gahanga k’Umufilisiti, maze riracengera, agwa ku butaka yubamye." 
1Samuel17:50 Nguko uko Dawudi yivuganye Umufilisiti, akoresheje ibuye n’umuhuhumetso, amutsinda aho aramwica. Ibyo Dawudi yabikoze nta nkota afite mu ntoki." 
1Samuel17:51 Nuko Dawudi ariruka, ahagarara hejuru y’Umufilisiti, akura inkota y’uwo Mufilisiti mu rwubati, aramusonga kandi amuca umutwe. Abafilisiti ngo babone ko intwari yabo ipfuye, bariruka barahunga." 
1Samuel17:52 Ubwo Abayisraheli n’Abayuda barahaguruka, bavuza akamo k’intambara, bakurikirana Abafilisiti kugera i Gati no ku marembo ya Ekironi. Imirambo y’Abafilisiti yari irambaraye ku nzira, kuva i Sharayimu kugeza i Gati n’i Ekironi." 
1Samuel17:53 Bamaze kubakurikirana igihe kirekire, Abayisraheli barahindukira, basahura ingando abo Bafilisiti bari barimo." 
1Samuel17:54 Dawudi afata umutwe wa wa Mufilisiti awujyana i Yeruzalemu, naho intwaro yamucuje azibika mu ihema rye." 
1Samuel17:55 Ubwo Dawudi yajyaga kurwana n’Umufilisiti, Sawuli yaramwitegerezaga, maze abaza Abuneri, umugaba w’ingabo ze, ati «Uriya muhungu ni uwa nde, Abuneri we?» Abuneri aramusubiza ati «Ndagatuma utabaho, Nyagasani, nta bwo muzi.»" 
1Samuel17:56 Umwami arongera ati «Baririza se w’uriya muhungu uwo ari we.» 
1Samuel17:57 Aho Dawudi agarukiye amaze gutsinda Umufilisiti, Abuneri amuzana imbere ya Sawuli, afite umutwe w’Umufilisiti mu ntoki." 
1Samuel17:58 Sawuli aramubaza ati «Harya uri mwene nde, wa musore we?» Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Ndi umuhungu w’umugaragu wawe, Yese w’i Betelehemu.»" 
1Samuel18:1 Nuko Dawudi amaze kuvugana na Sawuli, Yonatani ahita amwihambiraho, amukunda nk’uko yikunda." 
1Samuel18:2 Uwo munsi, Sawuli ahita agumana Dawudi, ntiyamukundira gusubira kwa se." 
1Samuel18:3 Nuko Yonatani agirana isezerano na Dawudi, kuko yamukundaga nk’uko yikunda." 
1Samuel18:4 Yonatani yiyambura igishura yari yiteye, maze agiha Dawudi ndetse amuha n’ibyo yari yambaye ku rugamba, kugeza ku nkota ye, umuheto we n’umukandara we." 
1Samuel18:5 Aho Sawuli amwohereje gutabara hose, Dawudi yaratsindaga, bituma amugira umugaba w’ingabo ze. Yari akunzwe na rubanda rwose, ndetse n’abagaragu ba Sawuli baramukundaga." 
1Samuel18:6 Igihe batabarutse, Dawudi amaze gutsinda Umufilisiti, abagore basohoka mu migi yose ya Israheli baza gusanganira umwami Sawuli, bafite ingoma n’inanga, baririmba kandi babyina imbyino z’ibyishimo." 
1Samuel18:7 Abo bagore basingizaga bikiranya, bavuga bati «Sawuli yishe abantu igihumbi, naho Dawudi yica ibihumbagiza.»" 
1Samuel18:8 Sawuli yumvise ayo magambo aramurakaza cyane, maze aravuga ati «Dawudi bamubazeho abantu ibihumbagiza, naho jyewe bambaraho igihumbi cyonyine. None se ashigaje kindi ki kitari ubwami!»" 
1Samuel18:9 Guhera uwo munsi, Sawuli atangira kureba nabi Dawudi." 
1Samuel18:10 Bukeye, umwuka mubi uturutse ku Mana ufata Sawuli, atangira gusaragurika mu nzu ye. Ubwo Dawudi akaba aracuranga inanga ye, nk’uko yabigenzaga mu yindi minsi, naho Sawuli afite icumu rye mu ntoki." 
1Samuel18:11 Nuko Sawuli akorera icumu rye, yibwira ati «Ngiye kubamba Dawudi ku rukuta!» Maze Dawudi amwizibukira incuro ebyiri." 
1Samuel18:12 Sawuli yahise atinya Dawudi kuko Uhoraho yari kumwe na we, naho Sawuli, Uhoraho akaba yaramwitaruye." 
1Samuel18:13 Sawuli abibonye atyo amwikura iruhande, amugira umugaba w’ingabo igihumbi. Dawudi yatabaranaga na zo kandi bagatabarukana," 
1Samuel18:14 maze aho ateye hose akahatsinda, kuko Uhoraho yabaga ari kumwe na we." 
1Samuel18:15 Nuko Sawuli abonye ibyo bikorwa byose kandi bikomeye, aramutinya." 
1Samuel18:16 Naho Abayisraheli n’Abayuda bose bakomeza gukunda Dawudi, kuko yari umugaba wabo, agatabarana na bo kandi bagatabarukana." 
1Samuel18:17 Bukeye Sawuli abwira Dawudi, ati «Dore Meraba umukobwa wanjye w’imfura, ni we nzagushyingira, ariko urakomeze kuba intwari ku mirimo yanjye, kandi urwane intambara z’Uhoraho.» Sawuli yaribwiraga ati «Ntazangwaho, ahubwo azicwe n’Abafilisiti.»" 
1Samuel18:18 Dawudi abwira Sawuli ati «Jye naba ndi nde, cyangwa se ubwoko bwa data bwaba ari ubuhe muri Israheli, kugira ngo mbe umukwe w’umwami?»" 
1Samuel18:19 Ariko Meraba umukobwa wa Sawuli, ngo agere igihe cyo kumushyingira Dawudi, arongorwa na Adiriyeli w’i Mehola." 
1Samuel18:20 Hanyuma ariko, Mikali umukobwa wa Sawuli aza kubenguka Dawudi; babibwiye Sawuli biramushimisha." 
1Samuel18:21 Ubwo Sawuli yaribwiraga ati «Ngiye kumumushyingira amubere umutego, maze Abafilisiti bazabone uko bamwica.» Kabiri kose Sawuli abwira Dawudi, ati «Uyu munsi uraba umukwe wanjye.»" 
1Samuel18:22 Nuko Sawuli ategeka abagaragu be, ati «Mushyire Dawudi ahiherereye, maze mumubwire muti ’Dore umwami aragushima, ndetse n’abagaragu be bose baragukunda! Wemere ube umukwe w’umwami.’»" 
1Samuel18:23 Abagaragu ba Sawuli babwira Dawudi ayo magambo, maze Dawudi arabasubiza ati «Mbese murahamya ko byoroshye kuba umukwe w’umwami? Jyewe rero ndi umutindi kandi ndasuzuguritse!»" 
1Samuel18:24 Nuko abagaragu ba Sawuli bamutekerereza uko Dawudi yababwiye. 
1Samuel18:25 Sawuli yongera kubabwira ati «Muzabwire Dawudi muti ’Nta yindi nkwano umwami akeneye, itari ibinyita ijana bikebwe ku Bafilisiti, kugira ngo abone uko umuhorera abanzi be.’» Ubwo Sawuli yibwiraga ko Dawudi azicwa n’Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel18:26 Abagaragu ba Sawuli ngo bamare kubwira Dawudi ayo magambo, yishimira kuba umukwe w’umwami. Ariko igihe cyo kumushyingira kitari cyagera," 
1Samuel18:27 Dawudi arahaguruka ajyana n’ingabo ze ku rugamba, yica abantu magana abiri mu Bafilisiti. Nuko Dawudi azanira umwami ibinyita byakebwe ku Bafilisiti, babibarira imbere y’umwami, kugira ngo Dawudi abe umukwe we. Nuko Sawuli amushyingira umukobwa we Mikali." 
1Samuel18:28 Sawuli amenya neza ko Uhoraho ari kumwe na Dawudi, kandi ko n’inzu yose ya Israheli imukunda." 
1Samuel18:29 Nuko Sawuli arushaho gutinya Dawudi, kandi arushaho kumwanga." 
1Samuel18:30 Bukeye, Abafilisiti bongera kugaba ibitero. Buri gihe uko bateraga, Dawudi yarabatsindaga, akarusha kure abagaragu bose ba Sawuli. Nuko bituma izina rye riba icyamamare." 
1Samuel19:1 Nuko Sawuli amenyesha umuhungu we Yonatani n’abagaragu be bose imigambi ye yo kwica Dawudi. Nyamara ariko, Yonatani umuhungu wa Sawuli agakunda cyane Dawudi." 
1Samuel19:2 Ni bwo Yonatani abwiye Dawudi, ati «Data Sawuli arashaka kukwica, none rero ejo mu gitondo uzirinde kugaragara, uzihishe ahantu hiherereye." 
1Samuel19:3 Naho jyewe nzasohoka njyane na data ku gasozi, hafi y’aho uzaba wihishe. Nzamubwira ibikwerekeyeho, nimenya icyo abitekerezaho nzakikubwira.»" 
1Samuel19:4 Nuko Yonatani ahakirwa Dawudi kuri se, aramubwira ati «Nyagasani, uramenye ntugirire nabi umugaragu wawe Dawudi, kuko atigeze agucumuraho, ahubwo ibikorwa bye by’impangare bikaba byarakugiriye akamaro." 
1Samuel19:5 Yemeye guhara ubugingo bwe, arwana n’Umufilisiti aramutsinda, Uhoraho yuzuriza muri we igikorwa gikomeye muri Israheli. Ibyo warabyiboneye kandi biragushimisha. Noneni kuki ushaka gucumura, umena amaraso y’umwere Dawudi, ushaka kumwica nta mpamvu?»" 
1Samuel19:6 Sawuli ngo yumve amagambo ya Yonatani, aramurahira ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho ko ntazamwica!»"
