1Samuel19:7 Nuko Yonatani ahamagara Dawudi, amubwira amagambo yose yavuganye na se. Hanyuma amugarura kwa Sawuli, akomeza kumukorera nk’uko byari bisanzwe." 
1Samuel19:8 Bukeye, intambara y’Abafilisiti yongera kurota. Dawudi aratabara, arwana na bo, arabahashya bikomeye, maze barahunga." 
1Samuel19:9 Umwuka mubi uturutse kuri Uhoraho wongera gufata Sawuli, akaba yari yicaye mu nzu ye, afashe icumu mu ntoki, naho Dawudi acuranga inanga ye." 
1Samuel19:10 Sawuli ashaka kubambisha Dawudi ku rukuta icumu rye, ariko Dawudi araryizibukira, maze ryishinga mu rukuta. Dawudi akiza amagara ye ahita ahunga." 
1Samuel19:11 Muri iryo joro Sawuli aherako yohereza intumwa kwa Dawudi, kugira ngo bamwubikire, maze nibucya mu gitondo bazamwice. Mikali umugore we arabimenya, maze abwira Dawudi, ati «Nudakiza amagara yawe iri joro, ejo uzapfa.»" 
1Samuel19:12 Mikali ahungisha Dawudi amumanurira mu idirishya, aragenda maze akira atyo." 
1Samuel19:13 Nuko Mikali afata igishusho cy’ikigirwamana, akirambika ku buriri, ashyira ku musego umwenda w’ubwoya bw’ihene, maze acyorosa umwenda." 
1Samuel19:14 Sawuli yohereza intumwa ze gufata Dawudi, maze Mikali arazibwira ati «Dawudi ararwaye.»" 
1Samuel19:15 Nuko Sawuli ngo abyumve, yongera gutuma intumwa ze kureba Dawudi, arazibwira ati «Mugende mumuterure mu buriri bwe, maze mumunzanire mwice.»" 
1Samuel19:16 Intumwa ziraza, ngo zirebe mu buriri zihasanga cya gishusho na wa mwenda w’ubwoya bw’ihene ku musego." 
1Samuel19:17 Nuko Sawuli ararakara, abwira Mikali ati «Ni kuki wanshutse utyo, ugacikisha umwanzi wanjye?» Mikali asubiza Sawuli, ati «Ni we wambwiye ngo ’Ndeka ngende; naho ubundi ndakwica!’»" 
1Samuel19:18 Dawudi yabonye akize, aracika asanga Samweli i Rama. Amutekerereza ibyo Sawuli yamukoreye byose, nuko bombi bajya gutura i Nayoti." 
1Samuel19:19 Baza kubwira Sawuli, bati «Dawudi ari i Nayoti h’i Rama.»" 
1Samuel19:20 Nuko Sawuli yoherezayo intumwa gufata Dawudi. Ngo zigereyo, za ntumwa zihasanga itorero ry’abahanuzi bariho bahanura, na Samweli ahagaze imbere yabo. Ubwo umwuka w’Imana uzizamo, na zo ziratwarwa zitangira guhanura." 
1Samuel19:21 Babibwiye Sawuli, yongera koherezayo izindi ntumwa, na zo ngo zigereyo zirahanura. Sawuli yoherezayo ubwa gatatu izindi ntumwa, ariko na zo zigezeyo biba kwa kundi: ziratwarwa zirahanura." 
1Samuel19:22 Bukeye, Sawuli ubwe arahaguruka ajya i Rama, ahingukira ku iriba rinini ry’ahitwa i Seku. Ahageze, arabaza ati «Samweli na Dawudi bari hehe?» Baramusubiza bati «Bari i Nayoti h’i Rama.»" 
1Samuel19:23 Sawuli ni ko kujya i Nayoti h’i Rama. Na we, umwuka w’Imana umuzamo, aratwarwa atangira guhanura inzira yose kugera i Nayoti h’i Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 Agezeyo yiyambura imyambaro ye, maze atangira guhanura imbere ya Samweli. Hanyuma yitura hasi yambaye ubusa, aguma atyo umunsi n’ijoro. Ni yo mpamvu bavuga bati «Mbese Sawuli na we ari mu mubare w’abahanuzi?»" 
1Samuel20:1 Nuko Dawudi ahunga ava i Nayoti h’i Rama. Araza abaza Yonatani, ati «Nakoze iki, ikosa ryanjye ni irihe cyangwa se nacumuye iki kuri so, kugira ngo abe ashaka kunyambura ubuzima?»" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonatani aramusubiza ati «Ibyo ntibikavugwe! Nta bwo uteze gupfa. Data nta cyo ashobora gukora atambwiye; ni kuki se data yaba yarampishe ibyo ngibyo? Ndumva bidashoboka!» 
1Samuel20:3 Dawudi agerekaho indahiro, ati «So azi neza ko turi incuti, bigatuma atekereza, ati ’Yonatani nta cyo akwiye kumenya, kugira ngo atababara.’ Ariko ndagatuma utabaho, nkurahiye Uhoraho ko urupfu rundi bugufi.»" 
1Samuel20:4 Yonatani aramubwira ati «Icyo uzashaka cyose nzagikora.» 
1Samuel20:5 Dawudi abwira Yonatani, ati «Dore ejo ukwezi kuzaboneka, kandi nagombaga gusangira n’umwami. Ariko reka nigendere, maze nzihishe ku gasozi kuzageza ejobundi nimugoroba." 
1Samuel20:6 Ubwo so nambura ku meza uzamubwire uti ’Dawudi yanyinginze kugira ngo mureke anyarukire iwabo i Betelehemu, kuko uko umwaka utashye batura igitambo cy’umuryango wose.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Navuga ati ’Ni byiza!’ ubwo bizaba ari amahoro ku mugaragu wawe. Ariko nubona arakaye, uzamenyereho ko yiyemeje kunyica." 
1Samuel20:8 Nuko rero ntuhemukire umugaragu wawe, wibuke isezerano wagiranye na we mu izina ry’Uhoraho. Kandi niba hari icyo nacumuye, unyiyicire wowe ubwawe. Ni iki gituma ugomba kunjyana imbere ya so?»" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonatani aramubwira ati «Ibyo ntibikavugwe! Nkurahiye nkomeje ko ndamutse menye ko data ashaka kukwica, nabikumenyesha.»" 
1Samuel20:10 Dawudi abaza Yonatani, ati «Ni nde uzamenyesha ko so yagushubije nabi?»" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonatani aramusubiza ati «Ngwino tujye hanze!» Barasohoka bombi bajya ku gasozi. 
1Samuel20:12 Nuko Yonatani abwira Dawudi, ati «Nkurahiye Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, ko ejo cyangwa ejobundi nko kuri iyi saha, nzagerageza kumenya icyo data agutekerezaho. Ninsanga data akuvuga neza, simbikumenyeshe," 
1Samuel20:13 icyo gihe Uhoraho azabimpore! Nanone kandi ninsanga atekereza kukugirira nabi, na bwo nzabikumenyesha, ngusezerere wigendere mu mahoro. Kandi Uhoraho azakomeze kuba kumwe nawe nk’uko yabanaga na data!" 
1Samuel20:14 Ikindi kandi: uzakomeze umbere indahemuka uko Uhoraho abishaka, mu minsi y’ubugingo bwanjye bwose." 
1Samuel20:15 N’aho naramuka mfuye, ntuzareke kubera indahemuka inzu yanjye, kabone n’ubwo waba ari umunsi Uhoraho azaba yarimbuye abanzi bawe uko bangana mu nsi hose.»" 
1Samuel20:16 Nuko Yonatani agirana isezerano n’inzu ya Dawudi, ati «Uhoraho azaryibarize Dawudi!»" 
1Samuel20:17 Yonatani yongera kugirana isezerano na Dawudi kubera urukundo amufitiye, kuko yamukundaga nk’uko yikunda." 
1Samuel20:18 Yonatani aramubwira ati «Ejo ukwezi kuzaboneka, bazamenya ko udahari kuko intebe yawe izaba iriho ubusa." 
1Samuel20:19 Nugeza ejobundi, uzamanuke wihishe aho wari wihishe wa munsi, maze wicare hafi y’ibuye ry’i Ezeli." 
1Samuel20:20 Naho jyewe nzarasa imyambi itatu iruhande rw’ibuye, nk’aho ryabaye intego." 
1Samuel20:21 Hanyuma nzohereza umuhungu mubwire nti ’Genda untoragurire iriya myambi.’ Nimubwira nti ’Imyambi iri hino yawe, yitoragure, maze ugaruke’, uzashyire umutima hamwe; nkurahiye Uhoraho ko nta kibi kizaba kikuriho." 
1Samuel20:22 Ariko nimbwira uwo muhungu, nti ’Dore imyambi iri hirya yawe kure’, uzahunge kuko Uhoraho azaba yashatse ko ugenda." 
1Samuel20:23 Naho iri jambo tuvuganye twembi, Uhoraho abe hagati yawe nanjye iteka ryose.»" 
1Samuel20:24 Dawudi rero yihisha ku gasozi. Nuko bukeye ukwezi kuraboneka, umwami ajya ku meza ngo bamuhereze." 
1Samuel20:25 Umwami yari yicaye ku ntebe ye, yegereye urukuta nk’uko bisanzwe. Yonatani arahagarara, naho Abuneri yicara iruhande rwa Sawuli, ariko icyicaro cya Dawudi gisigaramo ubusa." 
1Samuel20:26 Uwo munsi umwami ntiyagira icyo avuga, kuko yibwiraga ati «Wenda hari icyamugwiririye, cyangwa se birashoboka ko yabonye adatunganye.»" 
1Samuel20:27 Ariko bukeye bw’aho, ukwezi kwaraye kubonetse, Dawudi yongera kubura mu mwanya we. Sawuli abaza umuhungu we Yonatani, ati «Kuki umuhungu wa Yese, ari ejo ari n’uyu munsi, ntamubonye ku meza?»" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonatani asubiza Sawuli, ati «Dawudi yansabye ngo mureke anyarukire iwabo i Betelehemu." 
1Samuel20:29 Yambwiye ati ’Ndakwinginze, reka ngende kuko mu mugi w’iwacu bazatura igitambo, kandi mukuru wanjye akaba yarantegetse kuba mpari. None rero ungiriye ubuntu wareka nkagenda, nkajya kureba abavandimwe banjye.’ Iyo ni yo mpamvu yamubujije kuza hano ku meza y’umwami.»" 
1Samuel20:30 Sawuli ni ko kurakarira Yonatani, aramubwira ati «Mwana w’umugore utagira umutima! Nzi neza ko ubogamiye mu ruhande rw’umuhungu wa Yese, kugira ngo wikoze isoni kandi uzikoze na nyoko!" 
1Samuel20:31 Kuko igihe cyose mwene Yese azaba akiri kuri iyi si, nta bwo uteze gukomera ari wowe ari n’ubwami bwawe. Ubu nonaha, umufate umunzanire, kuko akwiye gupfa nta kindi.»" 
1Samuel20:32 Yonatani asubiza Sawuli, ati «Ni kuki agomba gupfa? Ikibi yakoze ni ikihe?»" 
1Samuel20:33 Nuko Sawuli abangura icumu kugira ngo arimutere. Yonatani amenyeraho ko se yiyemeje kwica Dawudi. 
1Samuel20:34 Ako kanya Yonatani ahaguruka ku meza n’uburakari bwinshi, ntiyagira icyo arya kuri uwo munsi wa kabiri w’imboneko y’ukwezi, abitewe n’agahinda afitiye Dawudi, se yari amaze gutuka." 
1Samuel20:35 Bukeye mu gitondo, Yonatani arasohoka ajya ku gasozi, uko yari yarasezeranyije Dawudi, ajyana n’umwana w’umuhungu." 
1Samuel20:36 Nuko abwira uwo muhungu, ati «Irukanka untoragurire imyambi ngiye kurasa.» Umuhungu ariruka, maze Yonatani akarasa umwambi ku buryo awumurenza ukagwa imbere ye kure." 
1Samuel20:37 Umuhungu ngo agere hafi y’aho umwambi Yonatani yari amaze kurasa uri, Yonatani aramuhamagara maze aramubwira ati «Mbese umwambi nturi imbere yawe kure?»" 
1Samuel20:38 Yonatani akomeza kubwira wa muhungu, ati «Ngaho ihute wihagarara.» Nuko umuhungu atoragura umwambi, aragaruka asanga shebuja." 
1Samuel20:39 Ariko uwo muhungu ntiyari azi ibyo ari byo, uretse Yonatani na Dawudi bari babiziranyeho." 
1Samuel20:40 Nuko Yonatani ahereza wa muhungu intwaro ze, maze aramubwira ati «Genda uzijyane mu mugi.»" 
1Samuel20:41 Umuhungu amaze kugenda, Dawudi ava iruhande rwa rya buye aho yari yihishe, yitura hasi yubamye, amwikubita imbere incuro eshatu; maze barahoberana, bombi baririra icyarimwe kugeza ubwo Dawudi ahogora." 
1Samuel20:42 Yonatani abwira Dawudi, ati «Igendere amahoro! Ubwo twagiranye isezerano mu izina ry’Uhoraho, azakomeze kuba hagati yawe nanjye, azabe no hagati y’urubyaro rwawe n’urwanjye iteka ryose.»" 
1Samuel21:1 Dawudi ashyira nzira arigendera, naho Yonatani agaruka mu mugi." 
1Samuel21:2 Dawudi agera i Nobu kwa Ahimeleki, umuherezabitambo. Ahimeleki aza kumusanganira adagadwa, maze aramubaza ati «Ni kuki uri wenyine, nta bantu muri kumwe?»" 
1Samuel21:3 Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Umwami yantegetse ko nta muntu n’umwe ugomba kumenya ubutumwa yampaye. Naho abantu banjye, nababwiye aho tuza guhurira.»" 
1Samuel21:4 Dawudi yongera kubaza umuherezabitambo, ati «Mbese nta cyo mufite ngo mungaburire? Nibura mumpe imigati itanu cyangwa ikindi mwaba mufite icyo ari cyo cyose.»" 
1Samuel21:5 Nuko umuherezabitambo aramusubiza ati «Nta migati isanzwe dufite, ariko hari imigati yeguriwe Uhoraho; niba abo bantu bawe baririnze abagore bashobora kuyirya.»" 
1Samuel21:6 Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Ni koko, twabujijwe abagore, nk’uko bisanzwe iyo ngiye ku rugamba; kuri iyo ngingo ni abere rwose. Uru rugendo ni nk’urusanzwe, ariko rushimishije Uhoraho kubera impamvu zarwo.»" 
1Samuel21:7 Nuko umuherezabitambo amuha imigati akuye mu Ngoro kuko nta yindi yari ibonetse, uretse iyari iteguye ku meza y’Uhoraho, isimbuzwa ishyushye ku munsi bayikuyeho." 
1Samuel21:8 Uwo munsi kandi, hari umwe mu bagaragu ba Sawuli wari watinze mu Ngoro, imbere y’Uhoraho. Yitwaga Dowegi Umunyedomu, akaba yari umutware w’abashumba ba Sawuli." 
1Samuel21:9 Dawudi abaza Ahimeleki, ati «Mbese nta cumu cyangwa inkota ufite hano? Naje ntazanye inkota yanjye, habe n’indi ntwaro mfite, kuko ubutumwa bw’umwami bwihutirwaga.»" 
1Samuel21:10 Umuherezabitambo aramusubiza ati «Hano hari inkota ya Goliyati, wa Mufilisiti watsinze mu Kibaya cy’Umushishi: dore ngiriya aho izingiye mu gitambaro inyuma y’isanduku ibitse uruhago rurimo amabuye y’ubufindo. Niba rero uyishaka uyifate, kuko nta yindi iri hano.» Dawudi aravuga ati «Nta yindi yahwana na yo! Yimpereze.»" 
1Samuel21:11 Uwo munsi Dawudi afata inzira, ahungira kure ya Sawuli, agera kwa Akishi umwami w’i Gati." 
1Samuel21:12 Abagaragu ba Akishi baramubwira bati «Uyu se si we Dawudi, umwami w’igihugu? Si we bateyeho imbyino ngo: Sawuli yishe abantu igihumbi, naho Dawudi yica ibihumbagiza?»" 
1Samuel21:13 Dawudi azirikanye ayo magambo, bituma atinya cyane Akishi umwami w’i Gati." 
1Samuel21:14 Ubwo aherako arisarisha, asimbagurika mu maboko yabo, atangira guharabika inzugi, ari na ko ata inkonda zikamanuka mu bwanwa bwe." 
1Samuel21:15 Akishi ni ko kubwira abagaragu be, ati «Murabona neza ko uyu muntu ari umusazi! None ni kuki mumunzaniye?" 
1Samuel21:16 Ese abasazi ni cyo mbuze byatuma munzanira uyu ngo ansaragurike imbere? Ubu se, murabona uyu yakwinjira mu nzu yanjye?»" 
1Samuel22:1 Dawudi ava aho ngaho, ahungira mu buvumo bw’i Adulamu. Abavandimwe be na bene wabo barabimenya, baramanuka bamusangayo." 
1Samuel22:2 Nuko iruhande rwe hateranira abanyabyago, abanyamyenda n’abarenganywa, bose ababera umutware. Abari kumwe na we bari bageze kuri magana ane." 
1Samuel22:3 Dawudi yongera kuva aho ngaho ajya i Misipa y’i Mowabu, abwira umwami w’i Mowabu, ati «Ndakwinginze ngo wemerere data na mama baze mubane, kugeza igihe nzamenyera icyo Imana izangenera.»" 
1Samuel22:4 Nuko se na nyina abazanira umwami w’i Mowabu babana na we, bamarana igihe cyose Dawudi yari akiri mu buhungiro bwe." 
1Samuel22:5 Umuhanuzi Gadi aza kubwira Dawudi, ati «Wiguma mu buhungiro bwawe, ahubwo genda, ujye mu gihugu cya Yuda.» Nuko Dawudi arahava, ajya mu ishyamba ry’i Hereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Nyuma y’aho Sawuli aza kumenya ko Dawudi n’abo bari kumwe babonetse. Ubwo Sawuli akaba yari i Gibeya, yicaye mu nsi y’umunyinya wari mu mpinga, afite icumu rye mu ntoki n’abagaragu be bamukikije." 
1Samuel22:7 Sawuli abwira abagaragu be bamushagaye, ati «Munyumve neza, Babenyamini mwe! Harya ngo namwe mwese, mwene Yese, azabaha imirima n’imizabibu, azabagire abatware b’ingabo ijana n’ab’ibihumbi," 
1Samuel22:8 kugira ngo mwese muhuze umugambi wo kungambanira? Igihe umuhungu wanjye anywanye na mwene Yese, nta n’umwe muri mwe wigeze amburira, ibyo bikagaragaza ko mutakinyitayeho. Ubona ngo habure n’umwe umbwira, igihe umuhungu wanjye anteje umugaragu wanjye, kugira ngo antege imitego nk’uko ubu bimeze!»" 
1Samuel22:9 Ubwo Dowegi w’Umunyedomu yari ahagaze hamwe n’abagaragu ba Sawuli, asubiza umwami, ati «Mperutse kubona mwene Yese; yari i Nobu kwa Ahimeleki mwene Ahitobi." 
1Samuel22:10 Nuko Ahimeleki asiganuza Uhoraho ibimwerekeyeho, amuha n’ibyo kurya. Yamuhaye kandi n’inkota ya Goliyati, Umufilisiti.»" 
1Samuel22:11 Umwami abyumvise, ahamagaza Ahimeleki umuherezabitambo, mwene Ahitobi n’umuryango we wose, hamwe n’abaherezabitambo bose b’i Nobu; maze baramwitaba." 
1Samuel22:12 Bageze ibwami, Sawuli aravuga ati «Ntega amatwi, mwana wa Ahitobi!» Na we arasubiza ati «Karame Nyagasani.»" 
1Samuel22:13 Sawuli aramubaza ati «Ni iki cyatumye muhuza umugambi wo kungambanira, wowe na mwene Yese? Wamuhaye imigati n’inkota, wasiganuje Uhoraho kubera we, kugira ngo ampagurukire kandi antege imitego nk’uko bimeze uyu munsi.»" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki asubiza umwami, ati «Mbese mu bagaragu bawe bose, hari n’umwe ukwiye kwiringirwa nka Dawudi? Ni umukwe w’umwami, ni we ukurwanaho kandi yubahwa n’urugo rwawe rwose!" 
1Samuel22:15 Ese ugira ngo uwo munsi, ni bwo natangiye gusiganuza Uhoraho kubera we? Ibyo ntibikambeho! Nyabuneka, Mutegetsi wanjye, ibyo ntiwari ukwiye kubihora umugaragu wawe n’umuryango we wose, kuko ari nta cyo yari abiziho na gito.»" 
1Samuel22:16 Umwami aravuga ati «Ahimeleki, urapfa wowe n’umuryango wawe wose!»" 
1Samuel22:17 Umwami aherako abwira abarinzi be, ati «Nimuhindukire mwice abaherezabitambo b’Uhoraho, kuko na bo bashyigikiye Dawudi: bari bazi ko ari mu buhungiro, ntibamenyesha aho ari.» Ariko abagaragu be banga kwica abaherezabitambo b’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel22:18 Nuko umwami abwira Dowegi, ati «Wowe hindukira, maze wice abo baherezabitambo.» Dowegi Umunyedomu arahindukira arabica. Uwo munsi hapfa abantu mirongo inani na batanu, bose bambaye umusanganyagihimba, uboshye muri hariri." 
1Samuel22:19 Aho i Nobu, umugi w’abaherezabitambo, amarira ku nkota abagabo, abagore, abana bato n’abakiri ku ibere, ndetse n’inka, indogobe n’intama, byose bishirira ku nkota." 
1Samuel22:20 Nyamara umwe mu bahungu ba Ahimeleki mwene Ahitobi witwaga Abiyatari aratoroka, ni ko guhunga asanga Dawudi." 
1Samuel22:21 Nuko amenyesha Dawudi ko Sawuli yishe abaherezabitambo b’Uhoraho. 
1Samuel22:22 Dawudi abwira Abiyatari, ati «Urya munsi nari nzi ko Dowegi Umunyedomu ahari, ntekereza ko atazabura kubibwira Sawuli. Ni jyewe watumye urugo rwa so rwose rurimbuka." 
1Samuel22:23 Gumana nanjye, witinya; kandi nihagira ushaka kugirira nabi ubugingo bwawe, ntazaba aretse n’ubwanjye. Humura rero, nubana nanjye nta cyo uteze kuba.»" 
1Samuel23:1 Bukeye, baza kubwira Dawudi, bati «Dore Abafilisiti bateye i Keyila, kandi bariho barasahura ingano ku mbuga.»" 
1Samuel23:2 Dawudi abaza Uhoraho, ati «Ni ngombwa se ko njyayo ngatsinda abo Bafilisiti?» Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Genda, uzabatsinda kandi uzarokora Keyila.»" 
1Samuel23:3 Ingabo za Dawudi ziramubaza ziti «Ko dufite ubwoba turi hano muri Yuda, hazacura iki nitujya i Keyila kurwana n’Abafilisiti?»" 
1Samuel23:4 Nuko Dawudi yongera kubaza Uhoraho. Na we aramusubiza ati «Haguruka ujye i Keyila, kuko ngiye kukugabiza Abafilisiti ngo ubatsembe.»" 
1Samuel23:5 Dawudi n’ingabo ze baragenda bajya i Keyila, batera Abafilisiti. Babicamo abantu benshi kandi babanyaga n’amatungo yabo. Nuko Dawudi akiza atyo abaturage b’i Keyila." 
1Samuel23:6 Ubwo Abiyatari mwene Ahimeleki yahungiraga kwa Dawudi i Keyila, yari yahunganye rwa ruhago rw’amabuye y’ubufindo." 
1Samuel23:7 Bukeye, babwira Sawuli ko Dawudi yinjiye i Keyila. Sawuli aravuga ati «Imana yamungabije kuko yifungiranye, yinjira mu mugi ufungishije inzugi n’ibihindizo.»" 
1Samuel23:8 Nuko Sawuli akoranya ingabo ze zose ngo batere i Keyila, bagote Dawudi n’ingabo ze." 
1Samuel23:9 Dawudi amenya ko Sawuli yenda kumutera, maze abwira umuherezabitambo Abiyatari, ati «Zana uruhago rw’ubufindo.»" 
1Samuel23:10 Nuko Dawudi arasaba ati «Uhoraho, Mana ya Israheli, umugaragu wawe yumvise bavuga ko Sawuli agambiriye kuza i Keyila, no gusenya umugi ku mpamvu yanjye." 
1Samuel23:11 Mbese aho abatware b’Abanyakeyila ntibazamfata bakamungabiza? Ese koko Sawuli azaza nk’uko umugaragu wawe yabyumvise babivuga? Uhoraho, Mana ya Israheli, ndakwinginze ngo uburire umugaragu wawe.» Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Sawuli azaza.»" 
1Samuel23:12 Dawudi yongera kubaza ati «Aho se abatware b’Abanyakeyila ntibazanshyira ari jyewe, ari n’ingabo zanjye mu biganza bya Sawuli?» Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Bazabatanga.»" 
1Samuel23:13 Nuko Dawudi n’ingabo ze zigeze kuri magana atandatu bashyira nzira, bava i Keyila bahungira ahandi. Hanyuma baza kubwira Sawuli ko Dawudi yahunze, areka umugambi we wo gutera i Keyila." 
1Samuel23:14 Dawudi aguma mu bihanamanga no mu misozi y’ubutayu bw’i Zifu. Sawuli yakomeje kumushakashaka ubudahwema, ariko Imana ntiyamumugabiza." 
1Samuel23:15 Dawudi amenya ko Sawuli yari akimushakashaka hose, kugira ngo amwice. Ubwo yari mu butayu bw’i Zifu, i Horesha." 
1Samuel23:16 Bukeye, Yonatani mwene Sawuli, arahaguruka ajya kureba Dawudi i Horesha. Aramukomeza mu izina ry’Imana." 
1Samuel23:17 Aramubwira ati «Humura! Ikiganza cya data Sawuli ntigiteze kugushyikira. Ni wowe uzategeka Israheli, naho jyewe nkazakungiriza, ndetse na data Sawuli arabizi neza.»" 
1Samuel23:18 Nuko bombi bagirana isezerano imbere y’Uhoraho, Dawudi aguma i Horesha, Yonatani asubira iwe." 
1Samuel23:19 Abantu b’i Zifu barazamuka bajya kwa Sawuli i Gibeya, baramubwira bati «Mbese aho wamenye ko Dawudi yihishe iwacu, mu bihanamanga by’i Horesha, ku musozi wa Hakila, uri mu majyepfo y’amayaga?" 
1Samuel23:20 Nuko rero, Nyagasani, igihe uzashakira uzaze; ni twe ubwacu tuzamushyikiriza mu biganza byawe.»" 
1Samuel23:21 Sawuli aravuga ati «Uhoraho abahe umugisha, kuko mwangiriye impuhwe." 
1Samuel23:22 Nimugende rero, mwongere mwitegereze neza mumenye aho agana, kuko bambwiye ko ari umunyamayeri menshi." 
1Samuel23:23 Muzarebe ahantu hose yashobora kwihisha, maze muhitegereze; nimumara kuhamenya neza, muzagaruke kumbwira tuzajyana. Kandi niba ari hagati mu gihugu, nzamushakashaka mu mazu yose ya Yuda kugeza ubwo mubonye.»" 
1Samuel23:24 Nuko barahaguruka basubira i Zifu, mbere y’uko Sawuli agerayo. Dawudi n’ingabo ze bari bihishe mu kibaya kiri mu majyepfo y’amayaga, mu butayu bw’i Mawoni." 
1Samuel23:25 Sawuli n’ingabo ze barahaguruka bajya kumushaka, ariko Dawudi aza kubimenya; aramanuka yihisha mu nsi y’urutare rwo mu butayu bw’i Mawoni yigumirayo. Sawuli abyumvise, akurikira Dawudi mu butayu bw’i Mawoni." 
1Samuel23:26 Sawuli yanyuraga mu ibanga rimwe ry’umusozi, Dawudi n’ingabo ze bakanyura mu rindi; ariko Dawudi we yarihutaga cyane kugira ngo ahunge Sawuli. Igihe Sawuli n’ingabo ze bari bugufi yo kugota Dawudi n’abantu be ngo babafate mpiri," 
1Samuel23:27 intumwa iraza ibwira Sawuli iti «Ngwino banguka, Abafilisiti bateye igihugu!»" 
1Samuel23:28 Sawuli rero arekeraho gukurikira Dawudi, ajya kurwana n’Abafilisiti. Ni cyo cyatumye aho hantu bahita «Urutare rw’abatandukanye.»" 
1Samuel24:1 Nuko Dawudi ava aho ngaho, arazamuka ajya gutura mu bihanamanga bya Enigadi." 
1Samuel24:2 Igihe Sawuli avuye kumenesha Abafilisiti, baramubwira bati «Noneho Dawudi ari mu butayu bwa Enigadi.»" 
1Samuel24:3 Sawuli aherako atoranya ingabo ibihumbi bitatu zatoranyijwe muri Israheli, maze aragenda ajya gushaka Dawudi n’ingabo ze, mu bitare byabagamo ihene z’ishyamba." 
1Samuel24:4 Agera atyo ku biraro by’intama byari iruhande rw’inzira, aho ngaho hakaba hari ubuvumo. Sawuli abwinjiramo kugira ngo yitume. Dawudi n’ingabo ze bakaba bicaye mu muhero w’ubwo buvumo." 
1Samuel24:5 Ingabo za Dawudi ziramubwira ziti «Nguyu umunsi Uhoraho yakubwiye ati ’Dore neguriye umwanzi wawe mu biganza byawe, maze umwigenzereze uko ushaka.’» Nuko Dawudi arahaguruka, akeba rwihishwa agatambaro ku gishura cya Sawuli." 
1Samuel24:6 Ariko nyuma y’ibyo, Dawudi yumva umutima we uradiha, kuko yari akebye agatambaro ku gishura cya Sawuli." 
1Samuel24:7 Nuko abwira ingabo ze, ati «Uhoraho andinde kugenzereza ntyo uwo yasigishije amavuta y’ubutore. Sinatinyuka kumukozaho n’ikiganza cyanjye, kuko ari uwasizwe w’Uhoraho.»" 
1Samuel24:8 Nuko ayo magambo ya Dawudi acubya umurego w’ingabo ze, azibuza kwiroha kuri Sawuli. Ubwo rero Sawuli arahaguruka ava mu buvumo, yikomereza inzira ye." 
1Samuel24:9 Hanyuma Dawudi asohoka mu buvumo, ahamagara Sawuli, ati «Mwami, Mutegetsi wanjye!» Sawuli ngo akebuke inyuma, Dawudi arunama kugeza ku butaka, aramupfukamira." 
1Samuel24:10 Ni ko kubwira Sawuli, ati «Ni iki gituma wumva amabwire y’abantu, bavuga ko nshaka icyakugirira nabi?" 
1Samuel24:11 Uyu munsi wa none, wiboneye neza ko Uhoraho yakweguriye ibiganza byanjye, igihe wari mu buvumo. Ariko nanze kukwica nakubabariye, kandi ubwo bambwiraga kukwica, navuze nti ’Sinzakoza ikiganza cyanjye ku Mutegetsi wanjye, kuko ari uwasizwe amavuta w’Uhoraho.’" 
1Samuel24:12 Itegereze, Mubyeyi wanjye! Reba aka gatambaro ko ku gishura cyawe mfite mu ntoki zanjye. Ubwo nashoboye gukeba agatambaro ku gishura cyawe kandi sinkwice, umenyereho ko nta bubi bundimo cyangwa ubwigomeke, kandi ko nta cyo nagucumuyeho. Ahubwo ni wowe umpiga kugira ngo uncuze ubugingo bwanjye." 
1Samuel24:13 Ari wowe, ari nanjye, Uhoraho ni We uzaducira urubanza, maze Uhoraho azamporere. Naho jye, sinzagukozaho ikiganza cyanjye." 
1Samuel24:14 (Nk’uko umugani wa kera ubivuga ngo ’Ubugome buganje mu bagome, ariko jye sinzabukozaho ikiganza cyanjye.’)" 
1Samuel24:15 Mbese uwo umwami wa Israheli yiruka inyuma ni nde? Uwo ahiga ni nde? Ariruka inyuma y’imbwa yapfuye cyangwa se ni inyuma y’imbaragasa! 
1Samuel24:16 Uhoraho aratubere umucamanza, adukiranure, yitegereze maze andengere, andokore ikiganza cyawe!»" 
1Samuel24:17 Dawudi amaze kubwira Sawuli ayo magambo, Sawuli aravuga ati «Ese iryo jwi ni iryawe, Dawudi mwana wanjye?» Nuko Sawuli araturika ararira." 
1Samuel24:18 Hanyuma abwira Dawudi, ati «Urandusha ubutungane kuko wangiriye neza, kandi jye narakugiriye nabi." 
1Samuel24:19 Ariko wowe uyu munsi wangaragarije ubuntu wangiriye: ubwo Uhoraho yakunyeguriraga, maze ntunyice." 
1Samuel24:20 Mbese, iyo umuntu ahuye n’umwanzi we, aramureka akigendera mu mahoro? Uhoraho azakwiture ineza wangiriye uyu munsi." 
1Samuel24:21 Noneho ndabimenye ko uzaba umwami, kandi ubwami bwa Israheli bukazahora mu biganza byawe." 
1Samuel24:22 None rero, ndahira Uhoraho ko utazarimbura urubyaro rwanjye, kandi ko utazazimanganya izina ryanjye mu nzu ya data.»" 
1Samuel24:23 Dawudi aramurahira. Hanyuma Sawuli asubira iwe, naho Dawudi n’ingabo ze basubira mu buhungiro bwabo." 
1Samuel25:1 Samweli aza gupfa. Abayisraheli bose baraterana; bamaze kumuririra, bamuhamba iwe i Rama. Ubwo Dawudi arahaguruka, amanuka ajya mu butayu bw’i Parani." 
1Samuel25:2 Hakaba umugabo w’i Mawoni wari umukungu cyane, umutungo we wose ukaba i Karumeli. Yari atunze intama ibihumbi bitatu, n’ihene igihumbi. Ubwo yari yaje i Karumeli kogoshesha ubwoya bw’amatungo ye." 
1Samuel25:3 Uwo mugabo yitwaga Nabali n’umugore we akitwa Abigayila. Uwo mugore yari mwiza kandi akaba umunyabwenge, naho umugabo we akaba umunyamwaga n’umugome; yari uwo mu muryango w’Abakalebu." 
1Samuel25:4 Dawudi amenyera mu butayu ko Nabali yaje kogoshesha ubwoya bw’intama ze. 
1Samuel25:5 Ni ko kohereza abagaragu cumi, maze arababwira ati «Muzamuke mujye i Karumeli, muzahasanga Nabali kandi muzamundamukirize." 
1Samuel25:6 Muzamubwire muti ’Umwaka muhire! Amahoro kuri mwe, ku bawe no ku byo utunze byose!" 
1Samuel25:7 Numvise ko waje kogoshesha ubwoya bw’amatungo yawe, ariko kandi n’abashumba bawe twarabanye, nta nabi twabagiriye, nta n’icyo bajimije igihe cyose bamaze i Karumeli." 
1Samuel25:8 Ubaze abashumba bawe bazabikubwira. None rero, ndakwinginze ngo abagaragu banjye bakirwe neza iwawe, kuko tuje ari ku munsi mukuru, maze icyo ushobora kubona abe ari cyo uha abagaragu bawe n’umuhungu wawe Dawudi.’»" 
1Samuel25:9 Abagaragu ba Dawudi bagezeyo, babwira Nabali ubwo butumwa mu izina rya Dawudi, barangije baraceceka." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabali asubiza abagaragu ba Dawudi, ati «Uwo Dawudi se ni nde? Mwene Yese we se ni nde? Muri iyi minsi hari abagaragu benshi batoroka ba shebuja." 
1Samuel25:11 None ubu mfate ku migati yanjye, kuri divayi no ku nyama nateguriye abogoshi banjye, mbihe abantu ntazi n’iyo baturuka!»" 
1Samuel25:12 Nuko abagaragu ba Dawudi barahindukira, baritahira. Bagezeyo, bamutekerereza uko byose byagenze." 
1Samuel25:13 Dawudi abwira ingabo ze, ati «Buri wese niyambare inkota ye!» Nuko buri muntu yambara inkota ye, Dawudi na we yambara iye. Ingabo zigera ku bantu magana ane zizamukana na Dawudi, naho abandi bantu magana abiri basigara ku bintu byabo." 
1Samuel25:14 Umwe mu bagaragu aburira Abigayila muka Nabali, ati «Dore Dawudi aho ari mu butayu, aherutse kohereza intumwa ze zizaniye databuja indamutso, maze databuja azibuza uburyo zirigendera." 
1Samuel25:15 Nyamara abo bantu batugiriye neza, nta nabi yabo tuzi, kandi nta n’icyo twajimije igihe cyose twagendanye na bo, tukiri mu rugishiro." 
1Samuel25:16 Batubereye ikiramiro igihe cyose twamaranye na bo turagiye intama. 
1Samuel25:17 None rero, nagira ngo ubimenye kandi utekereze n’icyo uri bukore, kuko bamaze kwiyemeza kurimbura databuja n’urugo rwe rwose. Naho databuja we ndabona ari igipfamutima, nta wagira icyo amubwira.»" 
1Samuel25:18 Nuko Abigayila agira bwangu, afata imigati magana abiri, impago ebyiri z’impu zuzuye divayi, intama eshanu zitetse neza, ingero eshanu z’ingano zikaranze, amaseri ijana y’imizabibu yumye n’utugati magana abiri tw’imbuto z’umutini, abishyira ku ndogobe," 
1Samuel25:19 maze abwira abagaragu be, ati «Nimugende mbere, nanjye ndaza mbakurikiye.» Ariko ntiyagira icyo abwira Nabali, umugabo we." 
1Samuel25:20 Uko yakamanukaga mu ibanga ry’umusozi yicaye ku ndogobe, Dawudi n’abantu be na bo bamanuka bamusanga maze bahura na we." 
1Samuel25:21 Dawudi yaravugaga ati «Nakoreye ubusa, nita ku bintu byose by’uriya mugabo mu butayu, mugirira neza none anyituye inabi." 
1Samuel25:22 Imana izabihore Dawudi — ariko cyane cyane izabihore abanzi be — niba, burinze gucya, hari ikintu na kimwe musigiye, ndetse habe n’umwe mu bahungu be!»" 
1Samuel25:23 Nuko Abigayila akirabukwa Dawudi, amanuka bwangu ku ndogobe, agwa yubamye imbere ya Dawudi." 
1Samuel25:24 Agwa ku birenge bye maze aramubwira ati «Mutegetsi wanjye, iki cyaha kibe ari jye kibarwaho! Ndakwinginze ngo utege amatwi umuja wawe, wumve ugutakamba kwe." 
1Samuel25:25 Ndagusabye, mutegetsi wanjye, ntiwite kuri kiriya gipfamutima Nabali, kuko izina ari ryo muntu: yitwa Gipfamutima, kandi ubupfamutima bwe bwaramukurikiranye. Ariko jyewe umuja wawe, nta bwo nigeze mbona abagaragu umutegetsi wanjye yohereje." 
1Samuel25:26 Nyamara, mutegetsi wanjye, ndahiye Uhoraho nawe ubwawe, ko ari Uhoraho ubwe wakubujije kumena amaraso no kwihorera n’ikiganza cyawe. Ndetse abanzi bawe n’abandi bose bashaka kugirira nabi umutegetsi wanjye, na bo barakaba nka Nabali!" 
1Samuel25:27 None rero, mutegetsi wanjye, iri turo umuja wawe akuzaniye, urihe abagaragu bawe muri kumwe," 
1Samuel25:28 kandi ndakwinginze ngo ubabarire umuja wawe icyaha cye. Uhoraho ntazabura kubakira umutegetsi wanjye inzu ihamye, kuko umutegetsi wanjye arwana intambara z’Uhoraho, kandi ikibi ntikikakurangweho iminsi yose y’ubugingo bwawe." 
1Samuel25:29 Mutegetsi wanjye, abantu baraguhagurukiye, kugira ngo bagucuze ubugingo bwawe, ariko ubugingo bw’umutegetsi wanjye buzaba hamwe n’ubw’abazima iruhande rw’Uhoraho, Imana yawe. Naho ubw’abanzi bawe, Uhoraho azabujugunyisha kure umuhumetso we." 
1Samuel25:30 Igihe Uhoraho azakuzurizamo ibyiza byose yakuvuzeho, azakugira umutware wa Israheli." 
1Samuel25:31 Nuko rero, mutegetsi wanjye, wihugana umena amaraso ku busa, cyangwa se ngo uteshuke ushaka kwihorera ubwawe. Maze Uhoraho namara kugororera umutegetsi wanjye, uzibuke umuja wawe.»" 
1Samuel25:32 Dawudi asubiza Abigayila, ati «Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, yo yakohereje uyu munsi, kugira ngo unsanganire!" 
1Samuel25:33 Nihashimwe ubwenge bwawe kandi nawe ubwawe ubishimirwe, kuko uyu munsi wambujije kumena amaraso no kwihorera n’ikiganza cyanjye!" 
1Samuel25:34 Kandi ni ukuri koko, ndahiye Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli yambujije kukugirira nabi, kuko iyo utaza wihuta kunsanganira, bwari gucya nta gisigaye kwa Nabali, habe n’umwe mu bahungu be.»" 
1Samuel25:35 Nuko Dawudi yakira amaturo Abigayila yamuzaniye, maze aramubwira ati «Ngaho itahire iwawe amahoro! Ibyo wasabye nabyumvise kandi byose ndabikwemereye.»" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigayila agaruka kwa Nabali, asanga mu nzu iwe yatekesheje ibiribwa by’ibirori nk’iby’umwami. Umutima we wari unezerewe kubera ko yari yasinze cyane, bituma Abigayila atagira icyo amubwira kugeza ko bucya." 
1Samuel25:37 Bukeye mu gitondo, Nabali amaze gusinduka, umugore we amutekerereza ibyari byabaye byose. Nuko umutima wa Nabali urahahamuka, maze uhinduka nk’ibuye." 
1Samuel25:38 Hashize iminsi igera ku icumi, Uhoraho akubita Nabali arapfa." 
1Samuel25:39 Dawudi aza kumenya ko Nabali yapfuye, aravuga ati «Haragasingizwa Uhoraho wamburaniye mu bitutsi byose Nabali yantukaga, kandi akabuza umugaragu we kugira nabi, none Uhoraho akaba yituye Nabali inabi ye.» Dawudi atuma kuri Abigayila, kumubaza ko ashobora kumubera umugore." 
1Samuel25:40 Abagaragu ba Dawudi bajya kwa Abigayila i Karumeli, maze baramubwira bati «Dawudi yakudutumyeho ngo tumukuzanire umubere umugore.»" 
1Samuel25:41 Nuko arahaguruka, yubama ku butaka imbere yabo, maze aravuga ati «Dore umuja wawe yiteguye koza ibirenge by’abagaragu b’umutegetsi wanjye.»" 
1Samuel25:42 Abigayila ahaguruka bwangu ajya ku ndogobe ye, ajyana n’abaja be batanu, akurikira intumwa za Dawudi. Nuko aba umugore we." 
1Samuel25:43 Ubundi kandi Dawudi yari yaranarongoye Ahinowamu, wakomokaga i Yizireyeli; nuko bombi baba abagore be." 
1Samuel25:44 Naho Mikali, wahoze ari umugore wa Dawudi, ise Sawuli yari yaramushyingiye Paliti, mwene Layishi, wari utuye i Galimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Abantu b’i Zifu basanga Sawuli i Gibeya baramubwira bati «Mbese wamenye ko Dawudi yihishe ku musozi wa Hakila, ahateganye n’amayaga?»" 
1Samuel26:2 Sawuli aherako arahaguruka, ari kumwe n’abantu ibihumbi bitatu b’intwari muri Israheli, bajya gushaka Dawudi mu butayu bw’i Zifu." 
1Samuel26:3 Nuko Sawuli aca ingando ku musozi wa Hakila, iruhande rw’inzira ahateganye n’amayaga. Dawudi wiberaga mu butayu, abona ko Sawuli yaje mu butayu kumuhiga." 
1Samuel26:4 Ni ko kohereza intasi, amenya neza ko Sawuli yaje koko." 
1Samuel26:5 Nuko Dawudi arahaguruka, ajya ku ngando ya Sawuli. Ahageze abona aho Sawuli na Abuneri mwene Neri, umugaba w’ingabo, baherereye: Sawuli yari aryamye hagati mu ngando, naho ingabo ze zimukikije." 
1Samuel26:6 Dawudi ni ko kubaza Ahimeleki w’Umuhiti na Abishayi mwene Seruya, umuvandimwe wa Yowabu, ati «Ni nde ushaka ko tujyana mu ngando ya Sawuli?» Abishayi aramusubiza ati «Turajyana.»" 
1Samuel26:7 Dawudi na Abishayi baragenda, bagera muri za ngabo nijoro. Sawuli yari aryamye kandi asinziriye hagati yazo, icumu rye rishinze ku butaka hafi y’umusego we. Abuneri n’ingabo ze na bo baryamye bamukikije." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishayi abwira Dawudi, ati «Uyu munsi, Imana yashyize umwanzi wawe mu biganza byawe. None rero, ndeka mutere icumu rimwe rizira irya kabiri, maze mubambe ku butaka.»" 
1Samuel26:9 Nuko Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Sigaho kumwica! Ni nde ushobora gukoza ikiganza ku uwo Uhoraho yasize amavuta, maze ntabiryozwe?»" 
1Samuel26:10 Dawudi aravuga ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho ko ari we ubwe uzamwiyicira igihe cye nikigera, cyangwa se yazajya mu ntambara akayigwamo." 
1Samuel26:11 Uhoraho azabimpore, nindamuka nkojeje ikiganza ku uwo yiyimikiye! None rero, fata ririya cumu riri ku musego we n’igicuma cy’amazi, maze twigendere.»" 
1Samuel26:12 Dawudi atwara icumu n’igicuma cy’amazi byari ku musego wa Sawuli, maze barigendera. Nta n’umwe wababonye cyangwa ngo abimenye, kuko ntawakangutse. Bose Uhoraho yari yabasinzirije ubuticura." 
1Samuel26:13 Nuko Dawudi ahita mu rindi banga; aragenda ahagarara mu mpinga y’umusozi, kure y’aho bari bari. Hagati yabo hari intera ndende." 
1Samuel26:14 Ni ko kwerekeza ijwi aho Abuneri mwene Neri n’ingabo ze baciye ingando, arahamagara ati «Yewe Abuneri we, aho uranyumva?» Abuneri aramusubiza ati «Uri nde, yewe muntu usakuriza umwami?»" 
1Samuel26:15 Dawudi abwira Abuneri, ati «Uri umugabo koko, utagira undi bahwanye muri Israheli. Ariko se ye, ni iki cyatumye udashobora kurarira umwami, umutegetsi wawe? Umwe muri rubanda yaje kwica umwami, umutegetsi wawe." 
1Samuel26:16 Ndahiye Uhoraho ko ukwiye urupfu, kuko ibyo wakoze atari byiza, kuba utashoboye kurarira umutegetsi wawe, uwo Uhoraho yiyimikiye. Reba neza! Mbese ye icumu ry’umwami n’igicuma cy’amazi byari ku musego we biri hehe?»" 
1Samuel26:17 Sawuli amenya ijwi rya Dawudi, aravuga ati «Mbese ni wowe, Dawudi mwana wanjye?» Aramusubiza ati «Ni jyewe, Nyagasani, mutegetsi wanjye.»" 
1Samuel26:18 Dawudi aramubaza ati «Ni mpamvu ki rero, mutegetsi wanjye, yatumye ukurikirana umugaragu wawe? Mbese nakoze iki cyangwa se icyo nagucumuyeho ni ikihe?" 
1Samuel26:19 None rero, Nyagasani, mutegetsi wanjye, ndakwinginze ngo utege amatwi umugaragu wawe. Niba ari Uhoraho wakunteje, niyakire impumuro y’igitambo; ariko niba ari abantu bakunteza, nibavumwe imbere y’Uhoraho, kubera ko banciye kandi bakampeza ku murage w’Uhoraho bambwira ngo ’Genda, ujye gukorera izindi mana.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Maze rero, Uhoraho ntiyemere ko amaraso yanjye amenerwa kure ye, kuko umwami wa Israheli yazanywe no gushaka ubuzima bwanjye, nk’uko bahiga inkware ku gasozi.»" 
1Samuel26:21 Sawuli aravuga ati «Nacumuye. Garuka, Dawudi mwana wanjye, sinzongera kukugirira nabi, kuko uyu munsi wubahirije ubugingo bwanjye. Ni byo koko, nahubutse nk’umusazi kandi nibeshye bikabije.»" 
1Samuel26:22 Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Ngiri icumu ry’umwami, umwe mu bagaragu bawe niyambuke maze aze arijyane." 
1Samuel26:23 Uhoraho azitura buri wese akurikije ubutungane bwe n’umurava we. Ni we wakugabije ibiganza byanjye uyu munsi, ariko nanze gukoza ikiganza cyanjye ku uwo Uhoraho yiyimikiye." 
1Samuel26:24 Ubwoubugingo bwawe bwagize agaciro gakomeye kuri jye, ubwanjye na bwo buzakagire imbere y’Uhoraho, kandi arankize ibyago byose.»" 
1Samuel26:25 Sawuli abwira Dawudi, ati «Gira amahoro, Dawudi mwana wanjye! Uzakora ibintu bikomeye, kandi ni koko uzabishobora.» Nuko Dawudi arikomereza, naho Sawuli asubira iwe." 
1Samuel27:1 Hanyuma Dawudi aza kwibwira ati «Ibyo ari byo byose, umunsi umwe Sawuli azanyica nta kabuza. Nta kindi nakora, atari uko nahungira mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti. Bityo, Sawuli ntazongera kunshaka mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli kandi nzaboneraho kurokoka ikiganza cye.»" 
1Samuel27:2 Dawudi ahera ko aragenda n’abantu magana atandatu bari kumwe na we, anyura kwa Akishi mwene Mawoki, umwami w’i Gati." 
1Samuel27:3 Dawudi n’abantu be batura kwa Akishi, buri wese hamwe n’umuryango we; Dawudi na we akabana n’abagore be bombi, Ahinowamu Umunyeyizireyeli na Abigayila muka Nabali w’i Karumeli." 
1Samuel27:4 Nuko babwira Sawuli ko Dawudi yahungiye i Gati, maze aherukira aho kumushakashaka." 
1Samuel27:5 Dawudi abwira Akishi, ati «Niba ungiriye ubuntu, tegeka ko bankebera igikingi mu cyaro, maze nzabe ariho ntura. Ni iki se cyatuma umugaragu wawe agumya gutura mu murwa w’umwami?»" 
1Samuel27:6 Uwo munsi Akishi amugabira Sikilage. Ni yo mpamvu kugeza na n’ubu, Sikilage ikiri umugi w’abami ba Yuda." 
1Samuel27:7 Aho mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti, Dawudi ahamara umwaka n’amezi ane." 
1Samuel27:8 Hanyuma Dawudi n’ingabo ze barazamuka batera ab’i Geshuri, ab’i Girizi n’Abamaleki, kuko ari bo bari bahatuye kuva kera, ahateganye na Shuru kugeza ku gihugu cya Misiri." 
1Samuel27:9 Dawudi yatsembaga abantu mu gihugu cyose, ntiharokoke n’umwe yaba umugabo cyangwa umugore, akanyaga amatungo, amagufi n’amaremare, indogobe, ingamiya n’imyambaro. Iyo yatabarukaga, yasubiraga kwa Akishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akishi yamubaza ati «Uyu munsi wateye he?» Dawudi akamusubiza ati «Nateye Negevu ya Yuda», cyangwa «Negevu y’Abayerahimeli», cyangwa ati «Nateye Negevu y’Abakeniti.»" 
1Samuel27:11 Yaba umugabo cyangwa se umugore, Dawudi yirindaga kugira uwo azana i Gati ari muzima, kubera ubwoba. Yaribwiraga ati «Baramutse baganiriye, bamenyana bakadutamaza.» Nuko akomeza kugenza atyo, iminsi yose yamaze mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel27:12 Akishi yizeraga cyane Dawudi, akibwira ati «Ubwo Dawudi yigize akadakoreka muri Israheli umuryango we, bizatuma akomeza kumbera umugaragu iteka ryose.»" 
1Samuel28:1 Muri iyo minsi, Abafilisiti bakoranya ingabo zabo ngo batere Israheli. Akishi abwira Dawudi, ati «Urabe uzi ko wowe n’ingabo zawe tugomba kujyana ku rugamba.»" 
1Samuel28:2 Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Ni byiza rwose! Ni na ho uzamenyera icyo jyewe umugaragu wawe nzakora.» Ubwo Akishi abwira Dawudi, ati «Ni byiza; nanjye nzakugira n’umurinzi wanjye bwite iminsi yose.»" 
1Samuel28:3 Icyo gihe rero, Samweli yari yarapfuye, Abayisraheli bose bari baramuririye, baranamuhambye mu mugi we i Rama. Naho Sawuli yari yaraciye ubupfumu n’ibyerekeye gushikisha byose mu gihugu cyose." 
1Samuel28:4 Abafilisiti ngo bamare gukorana, baca ingando i Shunemu. Nuko Sawuli na we akoranya Abayisraheli bose, baca ingando i Gilibowa." 
1Samuel28:5 Sawuli abonye ingabo z’Abafilisiti ariheba, akuka umutima cyane." 
1Samuel28:6 Nuko atakambira Uhoraho, ariko haba mu nzozi, haba mu bufindo, haba se mu buhanuzi, Uhoraho ntiyagira icyo amusubiza." 
1Samuel28:7 Sawuli abwira abagaragu be, ati «Nimunshakire umushitsikazi, kugira ngo njye iwe gushikisha.» Abagaragu be baramusubiza bati «Keretse ahantu hitwa Enidori ni ho hari umushitsikazi.»" 
1Samuel28:8 Nuko Sawuli ahindura imyambaro ye, ariyoberanya maze aragenda, aherekejwe n’abagabo babiri; bagera kwa wa mugore nijoro. Sawuli aramubwira ati «Ndagusabye ngo ukoreshe ubushobozi bwawe, maze unshikire uwo nza kukubwira.»" 
1Samuel28:9 Umugore aramubaza ati «Mbese nta bwo uzi icyo umwami Sawuli yakoze: ko yatsembye ubushitsi mu gihugu cyose? Ni kuki ushaka kuntega umutego, kugira ngo unyicishe?»" 
1Samuel28:10 Sawuli aramurahira ati «Nkurahiye Uhoraho ko ibi utazabihanirwa.» 
1Samuel28:11 Umugore aramubaza ati «Uwo ushaka ko ngushikira ni nde?» Sawuli aramusubiza ati «Nshikira Samweli.» 
1Samuel28:12 Umugore ngo arabukwe Samweli, atera hejuru abaza Sawuli, ati «Ni iki cyatumye umbeshya? Ni wowe Sawuli!»" 
1Samuel28:13 Umwami aramubwira ati «Humura wigira ubwoba! Ariko se ye, icyo ubona ni iki?» Umugore arasubiza ati «Ndabona ikintu gisa n’imana izamuka iva ikuzimu.»" 
1Samuel28:14 Sawuli aramubaza ati «Urabona iyo mana isa ite?» Umugore aramusubiza ati «Ni umusaza uzamuka, yifubitse igishura.» Sawuli amenyeraho ko ari Samweli; aramwunamira, yubika uruhanga ku butaka." 
1Samuel28:15 Nuko Samweli abaza Sawuli, ati «Ni iki cyaguteye kumbuza uburyo, ugatuma ngomba kuzamuka?» Sawuli aramusubiza ati «Ubu ndi mu kaga gakomeye, Abafilisiti barampagurukiye kandi Imana yaranyitaruye ntikinsubiza, ndetse habe no mu bahanuzi cyangwa se mu nzozi. Naguhamagaye rero kugira ngo umenyeshe icyo ngomba gukora.»" 
1Samuel28:16 Samweli aramubaza ati «None se niba Uhoraho yarakwitaruye, icyo umbaza ni iki kandi ko wabaye ikirumbo?" 
1Samuel28:17 Uhoraho yakugenjereje uko yigeze kukuntumaho: yakunyaze ubwami, abuha undi ari we Dawudi." 
1Samuel28:18 Kubera ko utumviye ijwi ry’Uhoraho kandi ntucubye uburakari bwe igihe uteye Amaleki, ni yo mpamvu yakugenjereje atyo uyu munsi." 
1Samuel28:19 Ndetse ari wowe, ari n’Abayisraheli, mwese Uhoraho azabagabiza ikiganza cy’Abafilisiti. Ejo wowe n’abahungu bawe muzansanga, naho Israheli, Uhoraho azayigabize ibiganza by’Abafilisiti.»" 
1Samuel28:20 Ako kanya Sawuli yikubita hasi arambaraye, akuwe umutima n’ibyo Samweli amubwiye. Nta n’imbaraga yari agifite, kuko yari yiriwe ubusa akanaburara." 
1Samuel28:21 Hanyuma wa mugore asanga Sawuli, abonye ko yazahaye cyane, aramubwira ati «Dore jyewe umuja wawe nakumviye, nemera no guhara amagara yanjye, ariko numvira amategeko yawe." 
1Samuel28:22 None ndakwinginze, umva ijwi ry’umuja wawe, unyemerere nguhe nibura agace k’umugati urye, bityo ubone agatege ko gutaha.»" 
1Samuel28:23 Sawuli aramuhakanira, ati «Sinshaka kurya.» Ariko abagaragu be hamwe n’uwo mugore baramuhata, arabumvira, arabyuka maze yicara ku ntebe." 
1Samuel28:24 Uwo mugore yari afite inyana y’umushishe, aherako arayibaga, afata n’ifu maze ayitekamo imigati idasembuye." 
1Samuel28:25 Nuko agaburira Sawuli n’abagaragu be bararya; barangije barahaguruka, bataha muri iryo joro." 
1Samuel29:1 Abafilisiti bakoranyiriza ingabo zabo zose i Afeki, naho Abayisraheli baca ingando bugufi y’isoko y’amazi iri i Yizireyeli." 
1Samuel29:2 Abatware b’Abafilisiti bagendaga imbere y’ingabo zabo, uko zari zigabanyijwe mu mitwe y’abantu amagana n’ibihumbi, naho Dawudi n’ingabo ze bakabakurikira bari kumwe na Akishi." 
1Samuel29:3 Abatware b’Abafilisiti baravuga bati «Abo Bahebureyi se kandi bo ni ab’iki?» Akishi arabasubiza ati «Uyu ni we Dawudi, umugaragu wa Sawuli, umwami wa Israheli! Tumaranye imyaka igera kuri ibiri kandi nta kibi namubonyeho kugeza uyu munsi.»" 
1Samuel29:4 Abatware b’Abafilisiti barakarira Akishi, baramubwira bati «Ohereza uwo mugabo asubire mu gikingi wamukebeye; ntajyane natwe ku rugamba, hato ataduhindukira umugambanyi! Mbese uwo mugabo yashobora ate kongera kunga ubumwe na shebuja, uretse gutera aba bantu bacu akabatsemba?" 
1Samuel29:5 Mbese nta bwo ari we Dawudi babyinaga bikiranya, bati ’Sawuli yishe abantu igihumbi, naho Dawudi yica ibihumbagiza’?»" 
1Samuel29:6 Akishi ahamagara Dawudi aramubwira ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho ko uri umuntu utunganye. Nari nishimiye gutabarana no kuzatabarukana nawe ku rugamba, kuko nta kibi nakubonyeho kuva aho wagereye iwanjye kugeza uyu munsi. Nyamara ariko, abatware ntibakwishimiye." 
1Samuel29:7 Subirayo rero, maze ugende amahoro; ntugire icyo ukora kidashimishije abatware b’Abafilisiti.»" 
1Samuel29:8 Dawudi abaza Akishi, ati «Ariko se naba narakoze iki? Hari ikibi wabonye ku mugaragu wawe, kuva aho ntangiriye kugukorera kugeza uyu munsi, ku buryo naba ntagikwiriye kujya kurwanya abanzi b’umwami, umutegetsi wanjye?»" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi asubiza Dawudi, ati «Ku bwanjye, nzi ko unshimisha nk’umumalayika w’Imana, ariko abatware b’Abafilisiti bavuze bati ’Ntajyane natwe ku rugamba.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Nuko rero, wowe n’abagaragu ba shobuja mwazanye, mubyuke mu gitondo cya kare maze nibumara gucya mugende.»" 
1Samuel29:11 Dawudi n’ingabo ze babyuka kare, bagira ngo bagende, basubire mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti. Nuko Abafilisiti barazamuka bajya i Yizireyeli." 
1Samuel30:1 Nuko Dawudi n’ingabo ze bagera i Sikilage ku munsi wa gatatu, basanga Abamaleki bateye i Negevu n’i Sikilage, bayogoje Sikilage yose kandi uwo mugi bawutwitse." 
1Samuel30:2 Abamaleki bari batwaye bunyago abagore, abana bato n’abakuru. Ntibari bagize uwo bica, ahubwo bari babajyanye." 
1Samuel30:3 Dawudi n’ingabo ze ngo bagere mu mugi, basanga Abamaleki bawutwitse, kandi abagore babo, abahungu babo n’abakobwa babo babatwaye bunyago." 
1Samuel30:4 Dawudi n’abo bari kumwe baraturika bararira, barahogora kugeza ubwo batari bagifite imbaraga zo kurira." 
1Samuel30:5 Abagore ba Dawudi bombi, Ahinowamu Umunyeyizireyeli na Abigayila muka Nabali w’i Karumeli, na bo bari bafashwe." 
1Samuel30:6 Dawudi agira agahinda kenshi cyane, kuko abantu be bendaga kumutera amabuye: buri wese yari ababaye, atekereza abahungu be n’abakobwa be. Ariko Dawudi yishyiramo akanyabugabo ku bw’Uhoraho, Imana ye." 
1Samuel30:7 Nuko abwira Abiyatari umuherezabitambo, mwene Ahimeleki, ati «Ndakwinginze ngo unzanire uruhago rw’amabuye y’ubufindo.» Abiyatari aruzanira Dawudi." 
1Samuel30:8 Dawudi abaza Uhoraho, ati «Mbese nkurikire bariya bantu, ndi bubashyikire?» Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Bakurikire, urabashyikira kandi ugarure ibyawe byose.»" 
1Samuel30:9 Dawudi arabakurikira ari kumwe n’ingabo magana atandatu, maze bagera ku mugezi wa Besori." 
1Samuel30:10 Nuko bahageze, Dawudi akomeza kubakurikira, ari kumwe n’ingabo magana ane gusa, kuko izindi magana abiri zari zananiwe, ntizashobora kwambuka umugezi wa Besori." 
1Samuel30:11 Baza guhura n’Umunyamisiri ku gasozi, baramufata bamuzanira Dawudi. Bamuha umugati wo kurya n’amazi yo kunywa." 
1Samuel30:12 Bamuha kandi n’umutsima w’imitini n’amaseri abiri y’umuzabibu wumye. Amaze kurya agarura ubuyanja, kuko yari amaze iminsi itatu n’amajoro atatu, atarya kandi atanywa." 
1Samuel30:13 Nuko Dawudi aramubaza ati «Uri umugaragu wa nde kandi waba uturuka hehe?» Aramusubiza ati «Ndi umuhungu w’Umunyamisiri, umugaragu w’umwe mu Bamaleki. Hashize iminsi itatu databuja antaye, kuko nari ndwaye." 
1Samuel30:14 Ni twe twagabye igitero i Negevu y’Abakereti, icyo muri Yuda n’icy’i Negevu y’i Kalebu kandi dutwika umugi w’i Sikilage.»" 
1Samuel30:15 Dawudi aramubaza ati «Ubu se wanyobora ukangeza kuri abo bantu?» Aramusubiza ati «Banza undahire Imana ko utazanyica, cyangwa utazansubiza mu biganza bya databuja, maze mbone kukuyobora aho abo bantu baherereye.»" 
1Samuel30:16 Nuko uwo mugabo ajyana na Dawudi, basanga Abamaleki bakwiriye igihugu, barya kandi banywa, bakora ibirori byo kwishimira iminyago myinshi bari bavanye mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti no muri Yuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Dawudi atangira kubica, kuva mu museso kugera ku mugoroba w’undi munsi. Ntihagira n’umwe ucika ku icumu, uretse abasore magana ane buriye ingamiya zabo barahunga." 
1Samuel30:18 Dawudi agarura ibyo Abamaleki bari batwaye byose, akiza n’abagore be bombi." 
1Samuel30:19 Ntihagira n’umwe ubura, haba mu bakuru, cyangwa se mu bahungu n’abakobwa. Mbese icyari cyanyazwe cyose, Dawudi arakigarura." 
1Samuel30:20 Anyaga amatungo yose, amagufi n’amaremare, maze abashoreye ayo mashyo bakagenda, bavuga bati «Dore umunyago wa Dawudi»." 
1Samuel30:21 Dawudi aza kugera kuri ba bantu magana abiri yari yasize ku mugezi wa Besori, batashoboye gukomeza kumukurikira kubera umunaniro. Abo bantu barahaguruka bajya kumusanganira, we n’abo bari kumwe; Dawudi abageze imbere arabaramutsa." 
1Samuel30:22 Nuko ab’ibipfamutima n’abagome mu bari kumwe na Dawudi, batera hejuru icyarimwe baravuga bati «Ubwo bariya batajyanye natwe, nta cyo turi bubahe ku minyago twagaruje, uretse abagore babo n’abana babo; babafate bagende!»" 
1Samuel30:23 Ariko Dawudi arababwira ati «Bavandimwe, mwigenza mutyo ku byo Uhoraho yaduhaye, we waturinze kandi akatugabiza abaduteye." 
1Samuel30:24 Ni nde washobora kubashyigikira muri ibyo? Ari uwagiye ku rugamba, ari n’uwasigaye ku bintu: bose bagomba kugabana bakaringaniza.»" 
1Samuel30:25 Guhera uwo munsi, Dawudi abihindura itegeko n’umuco mwiza bagikurikiza kugeza na n’ubu muri Israheli." 
1Samuel30:26 Dawudi ageze i Sikilage yoherereza bene wabo, abatware ba Yuda, ku minyago maze arababwira ati «Ngayo amaturo yanyu, avuye ku byanyazwe abanzi b’Uhoraho.»" 
1Samuel30:27 Yoherereza kandi n’ab’i Betuli, ab’i Ramoti y’i Negevu, ab’i Yatiri," 
1Samuel30:28 ab’i Aroweri; ab’i Sifemoti, ab’i Eshitemowa," 
1Samuel30:29 ab’i Karumeli, abo mu migi y’Abanyerahameli n’abo mu y’Abakeniti," 
1Samuel30:30 ab’i Horima, ab’i Borashani, ab’i Eteri, ab’i Heburoni, mbese ab’ahantu hose Dawudi n’ingabo ze bari barabaye." 
1Samuel31:1 Ubwo Abafilisiti barwanaga n’Abayisraheli. Ingabo z’Abayisraheli zihunga Abafilisiti, imirambo y’abapfuye yari yararitse ku musozi wa Gilibowa." 
1Samuel31:2 Abafilisiti bakurikira Sawuli n’abahungu be, maze bica Yonatani, Abinadabu na Malikishuwa, bene Sawuli." 
1Samuel31:3 Nuko urugamba rusigara rwibasiye Sawuli, abanyamiheto baramuvumbura, Sawuli ngo abakubite amaso akuka umutima." 
1Samuel31:4 Ni ko kubwira umutwaje intwaro, ati «Kura inkota yawe maze unsogote, hato bariya bantu batagenywe bataza kunsogota, bakanankiniraho.» Ariko uwo mugaragu we aranga kuko yari afite ubwoba bwinshi. Nuko Sawuli afata inkota ayishitaho." 
1Samuel31:5 Uwari amutwaje intwaro abonye ko apfuye, na we yishita ku nkota ye; bapfa bombi." 
1Samuel31:6 Sawuli n’abahungu be batatu, uwamutwazaga intwaro ndetse n’ingabo ze zose, bapfira icyarimwe uwo munsi." 
1Samuel31:7 Abandi Bayisraheli, bo hakurya y’ikibaya n’abo hakurya ya Yorudani, ngo babone bene wabo bahunze banamenye ko Sawuli n’abahungu be bapfuye, ni ko guta imigi yabo barahunga, nuko Abafilisiti baraza bayituramo." 
1Samuel31:8 Bukeye bw’aho, Abafilisiti baza gucuza intumbi, basanga umurambo wa Sawuli n’iy’abahungu be batatu ku musozi wa Gilibowa." 
1Samuel31:9 Sawuli bamuca umutwe bamucuza n’intwaro ze. Baherako bakwira mu gihugu cyose cy’Abafilisiti, bamamaza iyo nkuru mu nsengero zabo no muri rubanda." 
1Samuel31:10 Intwaro za Sawuli bazishyira mu rusengero rw’ikigirwamana cyabo Ashitaroti, naho umurambo we bawumanika ku nkike y’umugi w’i Betishani." 
1Samuel31:11 Abaturage b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi bamenyeraho ibyo Abafilisiti bakoreye Sawuli. 
1Samuel31:12 Ab’intwari muri bo bagenda ijoro ryose, bamanura umurambo wa Sawuli n’iy’abahungu be ku nkike y’umugi w’i Betishani, barayizana bayitwikira i Yabeshi." 
1Samuel31:13 Hanyuma bafata amagufa yabo, maze bayahamba mu nsi y’umunyinya i Yabeshi, basiba kurya iminsi irindwi." 
2Samuel1:1 Sawuli amaze gupfa, ni bwo Dawudi yagarutse amaze gutsinda Abamaleki, amara iminsi ibiri i Sikilage." 
2Samuel1:2 Ku munsi wa gatatu, haza umuntu aturutse mu ngando kwa Sawuli, imyambaro ye yatanyaguritse, kandi umutwe we wuzuyemo umukungugu. Nuko ngo agere kwa Dawudi amwikubita imbere aramupfukamira." 
2Samuel1:3 Dawudi aramubaza ati «Uraturuka hehe?» Aramusubiza ati «Nahunze mva mu ngando y’Abayisraheli.» 
2Samuel1:4 Dawudi aramubaza ati «Byagenze bite? Ngaho mbwira!» Undi aramubwira ati «Imbaga bayitsinze kandi hapfuyemo abantu benshi, ndese na Sawuli n’umuhungu we Yonatani bapfuye!»" 
2Samuel1:5 Dawudi abaza uwo musore wari uje kumubikira, ati «Wamenye ute ko Sawuli yapfuye, kimwe n’umuhungu we Yonatani?»" 
2Samuel1:6 Nuko uwo musore aramusubiza ati «Nari ndi ku musozi wa Gilibowa, nuko mbona Sawuli yishingikirije icumu rye, kandi amagare y’intambara n’abanyamafarasi bamusatiriye impande zose." 
2Samuel1:7 Arakebuka maze arambona, ni ko kumpamagara, ndamusubiza nti ’Karame.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Arambaza ati ’Uri nde?’ Nuko ndamusubiza nti ’Ndi Umumaleki.’ 
2Samuel1:9 Nuko arambwira ati ’Guma iruhande rwanjye ndabigusabye kandi unyice, kuko merewe nabi n’ubwo ngitera akuka bwose.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ni ko kumuguma iruhande maze ndamwica, kuko nari nzi neza ko namara gutsindwa atazaba akibayeho. Nuko mfata ikamba yari afite mu mutwe n’igitare yari yambaye ku kaboko, none mbizaniye umutegetsi wanjye hano.»" 
2Samuel1:11 Dawudi yadukira imyambaro ye arayishishimura, n’abari kumwe na we bose babigenza batyo." 
2Samuel1:12 Nuko barababara, bararira kandi basiba kurya kugeza ku mugoroba kubera Sawuli na Yonatani umuhungu we, no kubera umuryango w’Uhoraho wose wa Israheli, kuko bari bamazwe n’inkota." 
2Samuel1:13 Dawudi abaza wa musore wamubikiye, ati «Uri uwa he?» Aramusubiza ati «Ndi umwana w’Umumaleki w’impunzi.»" 
2Samuel1:14 Dawudi aramubaza ati «Wabitewe n’iki rero, kugira ngo ube utatinye kurambura ikiganza cyawe, ukica uwo Uhoraho yasize amavuta y’ubwami?»" 
2Samuel1:15 Nuko Dawudi ahamagara umwe mu basore be, aramubwira ati «Mwegere maze umwice!» Nuko amutsinda aho." 
2Samuel1:16 Dawudi aravuga ati «Amaraso yawe abe ari wowe ahama, kuko wowe ubwawe wabyihamije uvuga ngo ’Ni jye wishe uwo Uhoraho yasize amavuta y’ubwami.’»" 
2Samuel1:17 Nuko Dawudi atera iyi ndirimbo y’amaganya, kubera urupfu rwa Sawuli n’umuhungu we Yonatani." 
2Samuel1:18 (Iyo «Ndirimbo y’Umuheto» yanditswe mu «Gitabo cy’Intungane», kugira ngo bajye bayigisha Abayuda.) Aravuga ati" 
2Samuel1:19 «Yewe Israheli we, mbese icyubahiro cyawe cyaguye mu mpinga y’imisozi? Ab’intwari baraguye!" 
2Samuel1:20 Ntimubitangaze muri Gati, ntimubyamamaze mu mayira ya Ashikeloni, hato abakobwa b’Abafilisiti batanezerwa, n’abakobwa b’abatagenywe bagasabagizwa n’ibyishimo!" 
2Samuel1:21 Misozi y’i Gilibowa, ntimugatonyangweho n’ikime cyangwa imvura, ntimukagire ukundi imirima irumbuka, kuko ari ho ingabo y’intwari yahindaniye! Ingabo ya Sawuli ntiyigeze isigwa amavuta," 
2Samuel1:22 uretse amaraso y’abishwe n’ibinure by’intwari; umuheto wa Yonatani ntiwasubiraga, n’inkota ya Sawuli ntitahe ubusa." 
2Samuel1:23 Sawuli na Yonatani abakundwaga cyane, abatatandukanaga mu buzima no mu rupfu, abatebukaga kurusha kagoma; abanyembaraga kurusha intare!" 
2Samuel1:24 Bakobwa ba Israheli, nimuririre Sawuli, wabambikaga imihemba n’imirimbo y’amoko yose, wabahaga kandi imitako ya zahabu mugeretse ku myambaro yanyu." 
2Samuel1:25 Intwari zaguye ku rugamba, Yonatani yiciwe mu mpinga y’imisozi!" 
2Samuel1:26 Mbega umubabaro ngufitiye, Yonatani muvandimwe! Nagukundaga byahebuje! Ubucuti bwawe bwambereye akataraboneka, bwasumbyaga ubwiza urukundo rw’abagore." 
2Samuel1:27 Intwari zaraguye! Ingenzi ku rugamba zarashize!» 
2Samuel2:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, Dawudi abaza Uhoraho, ati «Mbese nzamuke njye muri umwe mu migi ya Yuda?» Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Zamuka.» Dawudi ati «Njye ahagana he?» Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Jya i Heburoni.»" 
2Samuel2:2 Dawudi arazamuka n’abagore be bombi, Ahinowamu w’i Yizireyeli na Abigayila muka Nabali w’i Karumeli." 
2Samuel2:3 Dawudi azamukana kandi n’abari kumwe na we, buri muntu n’umuryango we, nuko batura i Heburoni no mu midugudu yayo." 
2Samuel2:4 Bukeye, abantu bo muri Yuda baraza, bahasigira Dawudi amavuta, kugira ngo abe umwami w’inzu ya Yuda. Baza kubwira Dawudi, bati «Abantu b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi ni bo bahambye Sawuli.»" 
2Samuel2:5 Nuko Dawudi yohereza intumwa kuri abo bantu b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi maze arababwira ati «Uhoraho abahe umugisha, mwebwe mwese abakoreye Sawuli umutegetsi wanyu icyo gikorwa cy’ubudahemuka, maze mukamuhamba." 
2Samuel2:6 None rero, Uhoraho abagirire impuhwe n’umurava. Nanjye kandi, nzabagirira ubuntu nk’ubwo, kubera ko mwagenjeje mutyo." 
2Samuel2:7 Ikindi kandi, nimukomere kandi mube abantu b’intwari. Yego na none, umutegetsi wanyu Sawuli yarapfuye, ariko kandi munamenye ko inzu ya Yuda yansize amavuta, kugira ngo nyibere umwami.»" 
2Samuel2:8 Abuneri mwene Neri, umugaba w’ingabo za Sawuli, yari yarajyanye na Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli, amugeza i Mahanayimu." 
2Samuel2:9 Nuko aramwimika ngo abe umwami wa Gilihadi, Asheri na Yizireyeli, kimwe na Efurayimu, Benyamini na Israheli yose." 
2Samuel2:10 Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli yari afite imyaka mirongo ine, ubwo yabaga umwami wa Israheli kandi amara imyaka ibiri ku ngoma. Ariko inzu ya Yuda yo ikayoboka Dawudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Dawudi yamaze imyaka irindwi n’amezi atandatu i Heburoni, ari umwami wa Yuda." 
2Samuel2:12 Abuneri mwene Neri n’abagaragu ba Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli, bava i Mahanayimu berekeza i Gibewoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Yowabu mwene Seruya n’abagaragu ba Dawudi, na bo barasohoka. Nuko bahurira ku kidendezi cy’i Gibewoni, baca ingando bamwe hakurya abandi hakuno y’icyo kidendezi." 
2Samuel2:14 Abuneri abwira Yowabu, ati «Ndagusabye ngo abasore bahaguruke, maze barwanire imbere yacu!» Yowabu aramusubiza ati «Ngaho nibahaguruke!»" 
2Samuel2:15 Barahaguruka maze barababarura: cumi na babiri bo kwa Benyamini na Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli, na cumi na babiri bo mu bagaragu ba Dawudi." 
2Samuel2:16 Buri muntu asumirana n’uwo bashyamiranye, amusogota inkota mu mbavu, nuko bose bacurangukira icyarimwe. Kubera iyo mpamvu aho hantu bahise «Umurima w’imbavu»; ukaba uri i Gibewoni." 
2Samuel2:17 Uwo munsi intambara irakara cyane, maze Abuneri n’Abayisraheli batsindwa n’abagaragu ba Dawudi." 
2Samuel2:18 Aho kandi hakaba abahungu batatu ba Seruya, ari bo Yowabu, Abishayi na Asaheli. Uwo Asaheli akagira akarenge kabuhiriye, boshye ingeragere yo mu gasozi." 
2Samuel2:19 Nuko Asaheli akurikirana Abuneri, ubudakebuka iburyo cyangwa ibumoso." 
2Samuel2:20 Abuneri arahindukira aramubaza ati «Asaheli, mbese ni wowe?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Ni jyewe.»" 
2Samuel2:21 Abuneri aramubwira ati «Gana iburyo cyangwa ibumoso, ufate umwe mu basore banjye, maze ibyo umucuje ubitware.» Ariko we yanga kumuvirira." 
2Samuel2:22 Abuneri yongera kubwira Asaheli, ati «Sigaho, rekera aho kunkurikirana! Cyangwa se ngombe kugutsinda aha ngaha? Ariko se ubwo nazarebana nte na mukuru wawe Yowabu?»" 
2Samuel2:23 Ariko Asaheli yanga kwigirayo, Abuneri ni ko kumutikura umuhunda w’icumu rye mu nda uhinguka inyuma, agwa aho ngaho maze arapfa. Nuko abageze aho Asaheli yaguye, bose bagahagarara." 
2Samuel2:24 Yowabu na Abishayi bakurikira Abuneri, izuba rirenga bageze ku musozi wa Ama, uri mu burasirazuba bwa Giya, ku nzira igana mu butayu bw’i Gibewoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Ababenyamini barakorana bakikije Abuneri, biremamo itsinda rimwe, maze bahagarara mu mpinga y’umusozi," 
2Samuel2:26 Abuneri ahamagara Yowabu aramubaza ati «Mbese inkota izakomeza ubudatuza kubaga abantu? Ntuzi se ko amaherezo ibyo bizarangira mu mubabaro? Uzabwira ryari abantu bawe kureka gukurikirana abavandimwe babo?» 
2Samuel2:27 Yowabu aramusubiza ati «Ndahiye Imana ko iyo utajya kuba ubivuze, abantu batari kurorera gukurikirana abavandimwe babo, kugeza ko bucya.»" 
2Samuel2:28 Nuko Yowabu avuza ihembe; abantu bose barahagarara, barekera aho gukurikirana Israheli, kandi ntibongera kurwana ukundi." 
2Samuel2:29 Abuneri n’ingabo ze bagenda ijoro ryose, banyura muri Araba, bambuka Yorudani, berekeza i Betironi maze bagera i Mahanayimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Ubwo Yowabu areka gukurikira Abuneri, akoranyiriza hamwe imbaga yose. Ahamagaye, mu bagaragu ba Dawudi haburamo abantu cumi n’icyenda na Asaheli." 
2Samuel2:31 Abagaragu ba Dawudi bo bari bishe abantu magana atatu na mirongo itandatu mu Babenyamini no mu ngabo za Abuneri. 
2Samuel2:32 Nuko baterura Asaheli, bamuhamba mu mva ya se i Betelehemu. Yowabu n’ingabo ze bagenda ijoro ryose, bucya bageze i Heburoni." 
2Samuel3:1 Ubwo inzu ya Sawuli n’iya Dawudi zirwana intambara y’urudaca. Dawudi akarushaho gukomera, naho inzu ya Sawuli ntihweme gucika intege." 
2Samuel3:2 I Heburoni, Dawudi ahabyarira abahungu. Uw’imfura yitwaga Aminoni, yabyaranye na Ahinowamu w’Umunyeyizireyeli;" 
2Samuel3:3 uw’ubuheta akaba Kileyabi, wa Abigayila muka Nabali w’i Karumeli, uwa gatatu ni Abusalomu, umuhungu wa Maka mwene Talimayi, umwami wa Geshuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 uwa kane ni Adoniya, umuhungu wa Hagita; uwa gatanu ni Shefatiya, umuhungu wa Abitali;" 
2Samuel3:5 uwa gatandatu ni Yitereyamu, wa Egala muka Dawudi. Abo ni bo bahungu ba Dawudi yabyariye i Heburoni." 
2Samuel3:6 Igihe cy’intambara y’inzu ya Sawuli n’iya Dawudi, Abuneri we yakomezaga kwibonamo umuntu ukomeye kwa Sawuli." 
2Samuel3:7 Sawuli yari yarahoranye inshoreke yitwaga Risipa, umukobwa wa Aya. Ishibosheti abaza Abuneri, ati «Ni kuki watashye ku nshoreke ya data?»" 
2Samuel3:8 Nuko Abuneri arakazwa cyane n’ayo magambo ya Ishibosheti, aramubwira ati «Mbese ndi imbwa y’Umuyuda? Kugeza ubu nagiriye neza inzu ya so Sawuli, abavandimwe be n’incuti ze, sinagutereranye ngo ugwe mu biganza bya Dawudi, none ushatse kumpamya icyaha n’uyu mugore!" 
2Samuel3:9 Kuva ubu rero Imana irankoreshe uko ishaka, nindakorera Dawudi ibyo Uhoraho yamurahiye:" 
2Samuel3:10 kuvana ubwami mu nzu ya Sawuli no gushinga ingoma ya Dawudi kuri Israheli no kuri Yuda, uhereye i Dani, ukageza i Berisheba.»" 
2Samuel3:11 Ishibosheti ntiyagira icyo asubiza Abuneri, kuko yari amuteye ubwoba." 
2Samuel3:12 Abuneri yohereza intumwa kwa Dawudi mu izina rye, avuga ati «Mbese iki gihugu ni icya nde?» Arongera kandi ati «Tugirane isezerano, maze nzagufashe kwigarurira Israheli yose.»" 
2Samuel3:13 Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Ibyo ni byo! Ngiye kugirana nawe isezerano, ariko icyo ngusaba ni kimwe: ntuzantunguke imbere, utabanje kunzanira Mikali umukobwa wa Sawuli, ubwo uzaza kunyiyereka.»" 
2Samuel3:14 Ubwo Dawudi yohereza intumwa kwa Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli, aramubwira ati «Nyoherereza umugore wanjye Mikali, nakoye ibinyita ijana bikebwe ku Bafilisiti.»" 
2Samuel3:15 Nuko Ishibosheti yohereza abamuvana iw’umugabo we Palitiyeli mwene Layishi. 
2Samuel3:16 Umugabo aramuherekeza kugera i Bahurimu, yari amukurikiye arira. Ariko Abuneri aramubwira ati «Genda subira imuhira!» Nuko asubirayo." 
2Samuel3:17 Bukeye, Abuneri aganira n’abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli, arababwira ati «Hashize igihe kirekire mushaka ko Dawudi ababera umwami." 
2Samuel3:18 None igihe kirageze. Koko rero, dore ibyo Uhoraho yavuze kuri Dawudi: ’Ku bw’ikiganza cya Dawudi umugaragu wanjye, nzarokora umuryango wanjye Israheli ikiganza cy’Abafilisiti nyirokore n’ikiganza cy’abanzi bayo bose.’»" 
2Samuel3:19 Ibyo byose Abuneri abibwira n’Ababenyamini. Hanyuma ajya i Heburoni kubwira Dawudi ibyashimishije Israheli yose, n’inzu yose ya Benyamini ikabyemera." 
2Samuel3:20 Nuko Abuneri n’abantu makumyabiri bamuherekeje, ajya kureba Dawudi i Heburoni. Dawudi azimanira Abuneri na bagenzi be." 
2Samuel3:21 Abuneri abwira Dawudi, ati «Ngiye gukoranyiriza Israheli yose imbere y’umwami, umutegetsi wanjye. Bazagirana nawe isezerano, maze utegeke aho wifuza hose.» Dawudi areka Abuneri, yigendera mu mahoro." 
2Samuel3:22 Ariko abagaragu ba Dawudi na Yowabu baza gutahuka bavuye mu ntambara, bazanye iminyago myinshi cyane. Abuneri ntiyari akiri i Heburoni kwa Dawudi, kuko yari yamuretse akagenda mu mahoro." 
2Samuel3:23 Igihe Yowabu n’ingabo ze bageze aho, baza kubwira Yowabu, bati «Abuneri mwene Neri yaje ibwami, maze umwami aramwihorera, yigendera mu mahoro.»" 
2Samuel3:24 Yowabu asanga umwami maze aramubaza ati «Ibyo wakoze ni ibiki? Dore Abuneri yaje iwawe! Ni kuki wamurekuye akagenda? 
2Samuel3:25 Uramuzi Abuneri mwene Neri: yazanywe no kukwinja, kugira ngo amenye itabara n’itabaruka ryawe, no kugira ngo amenye ibyo ukora byose.»" 
2Samuel3:26 Yowabu ngo asohoke kwa Dawudi, yohereza intumwa gukurikira Abuneri; bamugarurira ku iriba rya Sira, ariko Dawudi atabimenye." 
2Samuel3:27 Abuneri akigera i Heburoni, Yowabu amujyana imbere mu rugo ahiherereye, mbese nk’ugiye kuganira na we bitonze. Bahageze, amutikura mu nda aramwica, kugira ngo ahorere amaraso ya murumuna we Asaheli." 
2Samuel3:28 Hanyuma Dawudi ngo abyumve aravuga ati «Jye n’ubwami bwanjye iteka ryose mu maso y’Uhoraho, turi abere b’amaraso ya Abuneri mwene Neri." 
2Samuel3:29 Ahubwo azahame Yowabu n’umuryango we wose! Ntihazagire ubwo habura mu nzu ya Yowabu, abantu bafatwa n’ibisebe bininda amaraso, ibibembe, abanyantege nke, abicwa n’inkota cyangwa ababura ibyo kurya!»" 
2Samuel3:30 Abuneri yari yarishe Asaheli murumuna wabo mu ntambara y’i Gibewoni, ari na cyo cyatumye Yowabu na Abishayi umuvandimwe we bamwica." 
2Samuel3:31 Dawudi abwira Yowabu n’abari kumwe na we bose, ati «Nimushishimure imyambaro yanyu, mukenyere ibigunira maze muririre Abuneri.» Nuko Dawudi aherekeza ikiriba cye." 
2Samuel3:32 Abuneri bamuhamba i Heburoni. Umwami aririra hejuru y’imva ya Abuneri, maze n’imbaga yose isesa amarira." 
2Samuel3:33 Hanyuma umwami agira amaganya kubera Abuneri, maze aravuga ati" 
2Samuel3:34 «Mbese Abuneri we, wari ukwiye gupfa urw’umugome? Amaboko yawe nta bwo yari aboshye, ibirenge byawe ntibyari mu minyururu. Nk’uko umuntu agwa imbere y’abagome, nawe ni ko waguye!» Nuko imbaga yose yongera kumuririra." 
2Samuel3:35 Hanyuma imbaga yose ihatira Dawudi kugira icyo arya butarira. Ariko Dawudi arabarahira, ati «Imana inkorere icyo ishaka cyose, niba ndiye ku mugati cyangwa ikindi icyo ari cyo cyose, mbere y’uko izuba rirenga!»" 
2Samuel3:36 Imbaga yose irabimenya kandi irabyishimira; ndetse n’ibyo umwami yakoraga byose, ni ko byemerwaga na bose." 
2Samuel3:37 Uwo munsi, imbaga yose na Israheli yose bumviraho ko ukwicwa kwa Abuneri mwene Neri atari igikorwa cy’umwami." 
2Samuel3:38 Nuko umwami abwira abagaragu be, ati «Ntimuzi se ko uyu munsi muri Israheli hapfuye umutware, umuntu ukomeye?" 
2Samuel3:39 Uyu munsi nanjye nacitse intege n’ubwo nasizwe amavuta y’ubwami; kandi bariya bahungu ba Seruya bandusha gukaza umurego mu kumena amaraso. Ariko Uhoraho yitura umugiranabi, akurikije ububi bwe!»" 
2Samuel4:1 Bukeye, Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli ngo yumve ko Abuneri yiciwe i Heburoni, acika intege na Israheli yose ikuka umutima." 
2Samuel4:2 Kwa mwene Sawuli hakaba abagabo babiri b’abatware b’udutsiko; umwe yitwaga Bahana, undi akitwa Rekabu. Bari bene Rimoni w’i Beyeroti, bakaba Ababenyamini, kuko Beyeroti na yo yarebwagaho kuba umwe mu migi ya Benyamini." 
2Samuel4:3 Abantu b’i Beyeroti bari barahungiye i Gitayimu, maze bigumirayo kugeza na n’ubu." 
2Samuel4:4 Ubwo hakaba hakiriho umwana wa Yonatani mwene Sawuli wari wararemaye amaguru yombi. Yari afite imyaka itanu ubwo inkuru y’urupfu rwa Sawuli na Yonatani yavaga i Yizireyeli. Umurezi we ni bwo yamuteruye kugira ngo ahunge, maze kubera kwihuta, umwana yitura hasi maze agumya gucumbagira atyo. Uwo mwana yitwaga Mefibosheti." 
2Samuel4:5 Bukeye, ba bahungu ba Rimoni w’i Beyeroti, ari bo Rekabu na Bahana, baragenda bagera kwa Ishibosheti ku manywa y’ihangu. Naho we akaba araryamye aruhuka saa sita." 
2Samuel4:6 Umugore w’umunyarugi wajonjoraga ingano na we yarahunyizaga maze arasinzira. 
2Samuel4:7 Rekabu n’umuvandimwe we binjira bwombo mu nzu aho Ishibosheti yari aryamye mu cyumba. Nuko baramwica maze bamuca umutwe. Hanyuma batwara umutwe we, bagenda ijoro ryose banyuze Araba." 
2Samuel4:8 Nuko uwo mutwe wa Ishibosheti bawuzanira Dawudi i Heburoni, babwira umwami bati «Dore umutwe wa Ishibosheti mwene Sawuli, umwanzi wawe wahoraga agenza ubuzima bwawe. Uyu munsi, uhoraho yahaye umwami, umutegetsi wanjye, kwihorera kuri Sawuli n’urubyaro rwe.»" 
2Samuel4:9 Dawudi asubiza Rekabu na Bahana umuvandimwe we, bene Rimoni w’i Beyeroti, ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho, wankijije abashakaga kunyica bose!" 
2Samuel4:10 Umuntu waje kumbikira ngo ’Sawuli yapfuye’, na we yibwiraga ko anzaniye inkuru nziza. Ariko naramufashe mwicira i Sikilage. Icyo ni cyo gihembo namuhembeye inkuru nziza ye!" 
2Samuel4:11 None se mu by’ukuri, nk’aba bagome biciye intungane mu nzu ye, ku buriri bwe, singomba se nonaha kubaryoza amaraso ye akiri ku biganza byanyu, nkabavana ku isi?»" 
2Samuel4:12 Maze Dawudi ategeka abasore be barabica. Babaca ibiganza n’ibirenge, babibamba hafi y’ikidendezi cy’i Heburoni. Naho umutwe wa Ishibosheti bawuhamba mu mva ya Abuneri, i Heburoni." 
2Samuel5:1 Imiryango yose ya Israheli isanga Dawudi i Heburoni, maze iramubwira iti «Ngaho twitegereze, turi amagufa yawe n’umubiri wawe." 
2Samuel5:2 Kera, igihe Sawuli yari akiri umwami wacu, ni wowe watabaranaga na Israheli kandi ugatabarukana na yo. Kandi rero, Uhoraho yarakubwiye ati ’Ni wowe uzaragira umuryango wanjye Israheli, kandi ni wowe uzaba umutware wa Israheli.’»" 
2Samuel5:3 Nuko abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli bose basanga umwami i Heburoni, maze umwami Dawudi agirana na bo isezerano i Heburoni imbere y’Uhoraho, nuko basiga Dawudi amavuta, aba umwami wa Israheli yose." 
2Samuel5:4 Ubwo Dawudi abaye umwami, yari afite imyaka mirongo itatu; amara imyaka mirongo ine ku ngoma." 
2Samuel5:5 Yabaye umwami wa Yuda imyaka irindwi n’amezi atandatu atuye i Heburoni, aba umwami wa Yuda na Israheli imyaka mirongo itatu n’itatu atuye i Yeruzalemu." 
2Samuel5:6 Hanyuma umwami n’ingabo ze batera i Yeruzalemu kurwanya Abayebuzi bari batuye icyo gihugu. Nuko babwira Dawudi, bati «Ntuzinjira hano, impumyi n’abacumbagurika ni bo bazabikubuza!» Ibyo byashakaga kuvuga ngo «Dawudi ntazinjira hano!»" 
2Samuel5:7 Nyamara Dawudi afata ikigo cya Siyoni, gihinduka ’Umurwa wa Dawudi.’" 
2Samuel5:8 Kuri uwo munsi Dawudi yari yavuze ati «Ushaka gutsinda Abayebuzi, ni ngombwa ko anyura ku mugezi... Naho abo bacumbagurika n’impumyi, bo banteye iseseme!» (Ni yo mpamvu banavuze bati «Impumyi n’abacumbagira, ntibazinjira mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho.»)" 
2Samuel5:9 Dawudi aba muri icyo kigo; acyita ’Umurwa wa Dawudi.’ Hanyuma yubakisha impande zose urukuta ruwukikije, uhereye i Milo ukageza imbere yawo." 
2Samuel5:10 Dawudi akajya arushaho gukomera, kandi Uhoraho Imana Umugaba w’ingabo yari kumwe na we." 
2Samuel5:11 Bukeye, Hiramu umwami w’i Tiri, yohereza intumwa kuri Dawudi, n’ibiti by’amasederi, ababaji b’ibiti n’ab’amabuye yo kubaka inkuta, maze bubakira Dawudi ingoro." 
2Samuel5:12 Nuko Dawudi amenyeraho ko Uhoraho yamugize umwami wa Israheli, kandi ko yari akujije ubwami bwe kubera Israheli, umuryango we." 
2Samuel5:13 Aho yimukiye i Heburoni, Dawudi yakomeje gufata inshoreke n’abandi bagore i Yeruzalemu, nuko yongera kubyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
2Samuel5:14 Dore amazina y’abo yabyariye i Yeruzalemu: Shamuwa, Shobabu, Natani, Salomoni," 
2Samuel5:15 Yibuhari, Elishuwa, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliyada na Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 Bukeye, Abafilisiti bamenya ko Dawudi yasizwe amavuta, kugira ngo abe umwami wa Israheli. Nuko Abafilisiti bose barazamuka, bajya guhiga Dawudi. Dawudi na we arabimenya, maze aramanuka ajya mu buhungiro." 
2Samuel5:18 Ubwo Abafilisiti baraza, badendeza mu kibaya cy’Abarefayimu." 
2Samuel5:19 Dawudi ni ko kubaza Uhoraho, ati «Mbese nzamuke ntere Abafilisiti? Uri bubagabize ibiganza byanjye?» Uhoraho asubiza Dawudi, ati «Zamuka! Ndagabiza Abafilisiti ibiganza byawe.»" 
2Samuel5:20 Nuko Dawudi ajya i Behali‐Perasimu arabatsinda, maze aravuga ati «Uhoraho yaciye icyuho mu banzi banjye, kimeze nk’icyahombowe n’amazi.» Ni yo mpamvu aho hantu bahise Behali‐Perasimu, ari byo kuvuga ngo ’Umutware w’ibyuho.’" 
2Samuel5:21 Abafilisiti basiga amashusho y’ibigirwamana byabo aho ngaho, Dawudi n’ingabo ze barayatwara." 
2Samuel5:22 Na none, Abafilisiti bongera kuzamuka, maze badendeza mu kibaya cy’Abarefayimu." 
2Samuel5:23 Dawudi abaza Uhoraho, ni ko kumusubiza ati «Ntubatere ubaturutse imbere, ahubwo hindukira uturuke inyuma yabo, ahateganye n’ishyamba." 
2Samuel5:24 Niwumva ikiriri gihinda giturutse hejuru y’ishyamba, uhutireho! Ubwo Uhoraho araba ari bujye imbere yawe, kugira ngo utsinde Abafilisiti.»" 
2Samuel5:25 Dawudi abigenza uko Uhoraho yamutegetse, atsinda Abafilisiti kuva i Gibewoni kugeza mu mwinjiro wa Gezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Dawudi yongera gukoranyiriza hamwe ingabo ibihumbi mirongo itatu z’ingenzi muri Israheli. 
2Samuel6:2 Ubwo Dawudi aherako arahaguruka n’abari kumwe na we bose, aramanuka ajya i Bahala muri Yuda, kugira ngo bazamukane Ubushyinguro bw’Imana, ari na bwo bavugiyeho Izina ry’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, utetse ku Bakerubimu." 
2Samuel6:3 Nuko bashyira Ubushyinguro bw’Imana ku igare rishya, babuvana mu nzu ya Abinadabu yari mu mpinga y’umusozi. Uza na Ahiyo abahungu ba Abinadabu, bayobora iryo gare rishya." 
2Samuel6:4 Uza yagendaga iruhande rw’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana, naho Ahiyo akabugenda imbere." 
2Samuel6:5 Dawudi n’umuryango wose wa Israheli bagendaga biyereka imbere y’Uhoraho, bacuranga mu majwi menshi y’inanga, imiduri, iningiri, ingoma n’ibinyuguri." 
2Samuel6:6 Bageze ku mbuga y’i Nakoni, Uza arambura ukuboko kwe akwerekeje ku Bushyinguro bw’Imana araburamira, kuko ibimasa byakururaga igare byari bitsikiye." 
2Samuel6:7 Ubwo Uhoraho arakarira Uza, maze Imana imutsinda aho kubera icyo cyaha cye. Apfira aho bugufi y’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana." 
2Samuel6:8 Dawudi arababara, kubera ko Uhoraho yari abaciyemo icyuho, yica Uza. Na n’ubu aho hantu hitwa ’Peresi‐Uza’, ari byo kuvuga ’Icyuho cya Uza.’" 
2Samuel6:9 Uwo munsi Dawudi atinya Uhoraho, maze aravuga ati «Ubundi Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho bwashoboraga bute kuza iwanjye?»" 
2Samuel6:10 Dawudi rero yanga kujyana Ubushyinguro bw’Imana iwe, mu Murwa wa Dawudi, ahubwo abugarura mu rugo rwa Obedi‐Edomu w’Umugiti." 
2Samuel6:11 Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho bumara kwa Obedi‐Edomu w’Umugiti amezi atatu, nuko Uhoraho aha umugisha Obedi‐Edomu n’urugo rwe rwose." 
2Samuel6:12 Bukeye, baza kubwira Dawudi, bati «Uhoraho yahaye umugisha urugo rwa Obedi‐Edomu n’ibyo atunze byose kubera Ubushyinguro bw’Imana.» Dawudi rero ni ko kugenda, avana Ubushyinguro bw’Imana mu rugo rwa Obedi‐Edomu, maze abujyana mu Murwa wa Dawudi bishimye cyane." 
2Samuel6:13 Nuko abahetse Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho ngo bamare gutera intambwe esheshatu, Dawudi atura ikimasa n’inyana y’umushishe ho igitambo." 
2Samuel6:14 Ubwo ni ko Dawudi yiyerekaga imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbaraga ze zose, kandi yari akenyeye n’agatambaro kaboshye muri hariri." 
2Samuel6:15 Dawudi n’umuryango wa Israheli bazamukana Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho, bavuza urwamo rw’ibyishimo n’amakondera." 
2Samuel6:16 Nuko Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho butaha mu Murwa wa Dawudi. Mikali, umukobwa wa Sawuli, arebera mu idirishya, abona umwami Dawudi wasimbukaga, yiyereka imbere y’Uhoraho, maze yumva mu mutima we amuhinyuye." 
2Samuel6:17 Binjiza Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho, maze babushyira aho bwateguriwe hagati mu ihema Dawudi yari yarabwubakiye. Maze Dawudi atura ibitambo bitwikwa imbere y’Uhoraho, n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro." 
2Samuel6:18 Igihe Dawudi amaze gutura ibitambo bitwikwa n’iby’ubuhoro, aha umugisha umuryango w’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo." 
2Samuel6:19 Hanyuma agaburira umuryango wose; imbaga yose ya Israheli, abagabo n’abagore, aha buri wese akagati, umurwi w’inyama n’iseri ry’imizabibu yumye, maze imbaga yose irataha, umwe iwe undi iwe." 
2Samuel6:20 Dawudi na we arataha, kugira ngo ahe umugisha urugo rwe. Mikali, umukobwa wa Sawuli, asohoka asanganiye Dawudi, aramubwira ati «Mbega ukuntu uyu munsi umwami wa Israheli yihaye icyubahiro, yiyambura imbere y’abaja n’abacakara be, boshye umuntu utagira agaciro!»" 
2Samuel6:21 Nuko Dawudi asubiza Mikali, ati «Nabikoreye imbere y’Uhoraho wantoranyije, akandutisha so n’inzu ye yose maze akangira umutware wa Israheli, umuryango w’Uhoraho, kandi nzakomeza kwicisha bugufi imbere y’Uhoraho!" 
2Samuel6:22 Nzaba insuzugurwa mu maso yawe, naho imbere y’abaja uvuga, nziyubahisha.»" 
2Samuel6:23 Nuko Mikali, umukobwa wa Sawuli, ntiyongera kubyara kugeza gupfa." 
2Samuel7:1 Ubwo rero umwami atura mu ngoro ye, kandi Uhoraho amuha ihumure, amukiza abanzi bose bari bamukikije." 
2Samuel7:2 Bukeye, umwami abwira umuhanuzi Natani, ati «Dore ntuye mu nzu y’ibiti by’amasederi, naho Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bukaba mu ihema!»" 
2Samuel7:3 Natani abwira umwami, ati «Icyo utekereza gukora cyose, genda ugikore, kuko Uhoraho ari kumwe nawe.»" 
2Samuel7:4 Nuko muri iryo joro, ijambo ry’Uhoraho rigera kuri Natani muri aya magambo:" 
2Samuel7:5 «Genda ubwire umugaragu wanjye Dawudi uti ’Dore uko Uhoraho avuze: Aho ni wowe uzanyubakira inzu, kugira ngo nyituremo?" 
2Samuel7:6 Nta bwo nigeze ntura mu nzu, kuva ubwo nakuraga Abayisraheli mu Misiri kugeza uyu munsi, ahubwo nagendaga mu ihema ariho ntuye." 
2Samuel7:7 Ese mu gihe cyose nagendanaga n’Abayisraheli, hari ijambo na rimwe nigeze mbwira umwe mu batware ba Israheli nashyiriyeho kuragira umuryango wanjye Israheli, nti: Kuki mutanyubakiye inzu y’amasederi?" 
2Samuel7:8 None rero, uzabwire umugaragu wanjye Dawudi, uti: Dore uko Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo avuze: Ni jye wakuvanye mu rwuri inyuma y’amatungo, kugira ngo ube umutware wa Israheli, umuryango wanjye." 
2Samuel7:9 Nari kumwe nawe aho wajyaga hose, ngukiza abanzi bose bari baguhagurukiye. Izina ryawe nzarigira ikirangirire, mbese nk’iry’abandi bakomeye bo ku isi." 
2Samuel7:10 Nzagenera Israheli umuryango wanjye ahantu nyihashyire, ihature ari ahayo bwite. Ntizajegajega ukundi kandi abagome ntibazongera kuyibuza uburyo, nk’uko byagendaga kera," 
2Samuel7:11 mbese kuva igihe nshyizeho Abacamanza ngo bategeke Israheli umuryango wanjye kugeza na n’ubu. Naguhaye ihumure, ngukiza abanzi bawe bose, ndetse Uhoraho akubwiye ko we ubwe azakubakira inzu." 
2Samuel7:12 N’igihe iminsi yawe izaba yarangiye, maze ukazaba uri kumwe n’abasokuruza bawe, nzakomeza inkomoko yawe inyuma yawe; nzimika uzagukomokaho wowe ubwawe, kandi nkomeze ubwami bwe." 
2Samuel7:13 Uwo ni we uzubakira Inzu izina ryanjye, kandi nzakomeza ingoma ye iteka ryose." 
2Samuel7:14 Nzamubera umubyeyi, na we ambere umwana. Nakora nabi nzamukosora, muhanishe inkoni nk’abantu, kandi mukubite izitamwica." 
2Samuel7:15 Ariko imbabazi zanjye ntizizamuvaho, nk’uko nazivanye kuri Sawuli nakuye imbere yawe." 
2Samuel7:16 Inzu yawe n’ubwami bwawe bizahora imbere yanjye iteka, n’ingoma yawe izakomere iteka ryose.’»" 
2Samuel7:17 Natani abwira atyo Dawudi, akurikije ayo magambo yose n’iryo bonekerwa ryose." 
2Samuel7:18 Nuko umwami Dawudi aza kwicara imbere y’Uhoraho, aravuga ati «Ndi nde, Nyagasani Uhoraho, kandi inzu yanjye ni iyihe, kugira ngo ube ungejeje aha ngaha?" 
2Samuel7:19 None Nyagasani, usanze ibyo bidahagije, maze uhishurira umugaragu wawe uko inzu ye izamera no mu bihe bizaza! Mbese ni uko ukunda kugenzereza abantu, Nyagasani Uhoraho?" 
2Samuel7:20 Ese, aho Dawudi ashobora kongera kugira icyo akubwira, kandi wowe uzi neza umugaragu wawe, Nyagasani Uhoraho?" 
2Samuel7:21 Ukurikije umugambi w’umutima wawe wangiriye ubu buntu bungana butya, bwo kumenyesha ibyo byose umugaragu wawe." 
2Samuel7:22 Koko uri intagereranywa, Nyagasani Uhoraho, nta wundi muhwanye, kandi uretse wowe nta yindi Mana ibaho, duhereye ku byo twiyumviye n’amatwi yacu byose!" 
2Samuel7:23 Kandi nta wundi muryango uhwanye na Israheli, umuryango wawe! Mbese ku isi yose hari umuryango n’umwe wahagurukiye gucungura, ukawugira uwawe, ukawuha izina ry’ikirangirire nk’uko wagenjereje Israheli umuryango wawe? Haba se hari undi muryango wakoreye ibintu by’agatangaza bingana bityo, ukirukana imbere yawo amahanga menshi hamwe n’imana zayo?" 
2Samuel7:24 Wihangiye Israheli, umuryango wawe, kugira ngo ube iteka umuryango wawe bwite, kandi wowe Uhoraho, ube Imana yabo." 
2Samuel7:25 None rero, Uhoraho Mana yanjye, ijambo wavuze ku mugaragu wawe n’urubyaro rwe urikomeze iteka, kandi urirangize uko wabyivugiye." 
2Samuel7:26 Izina ryawe nirikuzwe iteka ryose, kandi bavuge bati ’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo ni Imana ya Israheli!’ Nuko inzu ya Dawudi umugaragu wawe izakomere imbere yawe." 
2Samuel7:27 Kuko ari wowe ubwawe, Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, Mana ya Israheli, wabihishuriye umugaragu wawe uvuga uti ’Nzakubakira inzu.’ Ngiyo impamvu umugaragu wawe yatinyutse kuvuga iri sengesho." 
2Samuel7:28 Ikindi kandi, Nyagasani Uhoraho, ni wowe Mana; amagambo yawe akaba ukuri, kandi ukaba usezeranyije umugaragu wawe iryo hirwe." 
2Samuel7:29 Nuko rero, ugire ubuntu uhe inzu y’umugaragu wawe umugisha, kugira ngo ihore iteka imbere yawe. Kuko ari wowe, Nyagasani Uhoraho, ubivuze, kandi ku bw’umugisha wawe, inzu y’umugaragu wawe ijye ihabwa imigisha iteka ryose.»" 
2Samuel8:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, Dawudi atsinda Abafilisiti maze arabacogoza, abanyaga n’ubutegetsi bwabo." 
2Samuel8:2 Atsinda n’Abamowabu, abarambika hasi maze abageresha umugozi; agera inkubwe ebyiri z’umugozi ku bari bwicwe, n’indi nkubwe imwe yuzuye y’umugozi ku bagomba kurokoka. Nuko Abamowabu bahinduka abagaragu ba Dawudi, bakamuha imisoro." 
2Samuel8:3 Dawudi atsinda Hadadezeri mwene Rehobu, umwami w’i Soba, ubwo Hadadezeri uwo yari amaze kugenda, agira ngo yigarurire uruzi rwa Efurati." 
2Samuel8:4 Nuko Dawudi amutwara abantu igihumbi na magana arindwi mu ngabo zigendera ku mafarasi, n’ibihumbi makumyabiri mu zigenza amaguru. Dawudi atema ibitsi by’amafarasi yose akurura amagare, ariko asigaza amafarasi ijana."
