2Samuel8:5 Bukeye, Abaramu b’i Damasi baza gutabara Hadadezeri, umwami w’i Soba. Ariko Dawudi yicamo abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri." 
2Samuel8:6 Nuko Dawudi ashyiraho abatware muri Aramu y’i Damasi, maze Abaramu bahinduka abagaragu ba Dawudi, bakamuha imisoro. Uhoraho yahaga Dawudi gutsinda, aho yateraga hose." 
2Samuel8:7 Dawudi afata ingabo za zahabu, abagaragu ba Hadadezeri bikingiraga, azijyana i Yeruzalemu." 
2Samuel8:8 Naho mu migi ya Hadadezeri, Tebahi na Berotayi, umwami Dawudi ahanyaga imiringa myinshi." 
2Samuel8:9 Towu, umwami w’i Hamati yumva ko Dawudi yatsinze ingabo zose za Hadadezeri." 
2Samuel8:10 Towu aherako yohereza umuhungu we Yoramu kumuramutsa, no kumushimira ko yatsinze Hadadezeri, kuko Hadadezeri yari umwanzi wa Towu. Yoramu amushyira ibintu byiza bya feza, zahabu n’umuringa." 
2Samuel8:11 Na byo umwami Dawudi abitura Uhoraho, hamwe n’ifeza na zahabu yari yaramutuye, abikuye mu mahanga yose yatsinze:" 
2Samuel8:12 ibya Aramu, ibya Mowabu, ibya bene Hamoni, iby’Abafilisiti n’iby’Abamaleki, kimwe n’iminyago yanyaze Hadadezeri mwene Rehobu, umwami w’i Soba." 
2Samuel8:13 Nuko Dawudi aba ikirangirire, ubwo yari atabarutse avuye gutsinda Abaramu ibihumbi cumi n’umunani mu kibaya cy’Umunyu." 
2Samuel8:14 Ashyira abatware muri Edomu yose, maze Abanyedomu bahinduka abagaragu ba Dawudi. Uhoraho agaha Dawudi gutsinda, aho yateraga hose." 
2Samuel8:15 Dawudi ategeka Israheli yose, agashyiraho amategeko kandi agacira imanza umuryango wose." 
2Samuel8:16 Yowabu mwene Seruya yari umugaba w’ingabo; Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi yari umunyamabanga w’umwami; 
2Samuel8:17 Sadoki mwene Ahitubi na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyatari, bari abaherezabitambo; naho Seraya akaba umwanditsi;" 
2Samuel8:18 Benayahu mwene Yehoyada yategekaga Abakereti n’Abapeleti, n’abahungu ba Dawudi bari abaherezabitambo." 
2Samuel9:1 Nuko bukeye, Dawudi arabaza ati «Mbese hari uwaba yararokotse wo mu nzu ya Sawuli, ngo mubere indahemuka kubera Yonatani?»" 
2Samuel9:2 Mu nzu ya Sawuli hari umugaragu witwaga Siba, baramuhamagaza aza kwa Dawudi. Umwami aramubaza ati «Ni wowe Siba?» Na we arasubiza ati «Ni jye, umugaragu wawe.»" 
2Samuel9:3 Umwami aramubaza ati «Harya nta muntu n’umwe wo mu nzu ya Sawuli waba akiriho, ngo mugirire igikorwa cy’ubudahemuka, gishimwa n’Imana?» Siba asubiza umwami ati «Haracyariho umuhungu wa Yonatani, wamugaye amaguru yombi.»" 
2Samuel9:4 Umwami aramubaza ati «Aba hehe?» Siba asubiza umwami, ati «Aba kwa Makiri mwene Amiyeli i Lodebari.»" 
2Samuel9:5 Umwami aherako amwohereza kumushaka kwa Makiri mwene Amiyeli, i Lodebari." 
2Samuel9:6 Nuko Mefibosheti mwene Yonatani, umuhungu wa Sawuli, agera kwa Dawudi. Ahageze, agwa yubamye ku butaka, aramupfukamira. Dawudi aramuhamagara ati «Mefibosheti!» Undi ati «Karame! Umugaragu wawe ndi hano!»" 
2Samuel9:7 Dawudi aramubwira ati «Ntugire ubwoba na gato; sinzaguhemukira kubera so Yonatani. Nzagusubiza ubutaka bwose bw’umukurambere wawe Sawuli, kandi nawe ubwawe, uzajya urira ku meza yanjye iminsi yose.»" 
2Samuel9:8 Mefibosheti arapfukama, aravuga ati «Umugaragu wawe yaba ari nde kugira ngo umwiteho, kandi jyewe ndi nk’imbwa yapfuye!»" 
2Samuel9:9 Umwami ahamagara Siba, umugaragu wa Sawuli, aramubwira ati «Ibyari ibya Sawuli n’inzu ye byose, mbigabiye umuhungu wa shobuja." 
2Samuel9:10 Naho wowe n’abahungu bawe n’abagaragu bawe muzamukorera, muhinge imirima ye, muzanire ibyo kurya umuhungu wa shobuja. Kandi Mefibosheti mwene shobuja, azajya arira ku meza yanjye iminsi yose.» Ubwo Siba yari afite abahungu cumi na batanu n’abagaragu makumyabiri." 
2Samuel9:11 Nuko Siba abwira umwami ati «Umugaragu wawe azakora uko umwami, umutegetsi wanjye, abitegetse umugaragu we.» Mefibosheti rero yariraga ku meza y’umwami nk’umwe mu bahungu b’umwami." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibosheti na we yari afite umwana w’umuhungu witwa Mika. Kandi n’abari mu rugo rwa Siba bose, bari abagaragu ba Mefibosheti." 
2Samuel9:13 Mefibosheti yari atuye i Yeruzalemu, kuko yasangiraga iteka n’umwami. Yaracumbagiraga kuko yari yararemaye amaguru yombi." 
2Samuel10:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, umwami w’Abahamoni aza gupfa, maze umuhungu we Hanuni amusimbura ku ngoma." 
2Samuel10:2 Nuko Dawudi aravuga ati «Sinzahemukira Hanuni mwene Nahashi, nk’uko se na we atampemukiye.» Dawudi ni ko kohereza abagaragu be kumuhoza mu kababaro k’urupfu rwa se. Bityo, abagaragu ba Dawudi bagera mu gihugu cy’Abahamoni." 
2Samuel10:3 Ariko abatware b’Abahamoni babwira umwami wabo Hanuni, bati «Uratekereza ko Dawudi akoherereje abo bantu be kuguhoza ari uko yubashye so? Ntuzi se ko yohereje abagaragu be kwitegereza umugi, kuwutata no kuwutsemba?»" 
2Samuel10:4 Nuko Hanuni afata abagaragu ba Dawudi, abogosha ubwanwa igice, akeba imyambaro yabo guhera hasi kugera ku matako, maze arabasezerera." 
2Samuel10:5 Babibwiye Dawudi, yohereza umuntu kubasanganira, kuko bari bakozwe n’ikimwaro. Nuko umwami abatumaho ati «Muhame i Yeriko, kugeza ubwo ubwanwa buzaba bumaze kumera. Ni bwo rero muzabona kugaruka.»" 
2Samuel10:6 Abahamoni babonye ko basuzuguye Dawudi bikabije, ni ko kohereza abantu ku Baramu b’i Betirehobu n’ab’i Soba kubasaba ngo bisungane; bakaba ingabo ibihumbi makumyabiri zigenza ibirenge. Umwami w’i Maka na we azana abantu igihumbi, naho ab’i Tobu bari abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
2Samuel10:7 Dawudi arabimenya, yohereza Yowabu n’ingabo zose zimenyereye intambara." 
2Samuel10:8 Bukeye, Abahamoni barasohoka barema inteko mu marembo y’umugi wabo, naho Abaramu b’i Soba n’ab’i Rehobu, abantu b’i Tobu n’ab’i Maka, bo bari ukwabo mu gasozi." 
2Samuel10:9 Yowabu abona ko yagombaga guturuka urugamba imbere n’inyuma, ni ko gutoranya abantu b’intwari mu ngabo za Israheli, maze abashyira ahateganye n’Abaramu." 
2Samuel10:10 Abasigaye bose abaha murumuna we Abishayi, maze abahagarika imbere y’Abahamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Nuko Yowabu abwira Abishayi, ati «Abaramu nibaramuka bandushije imbaraga, uraza kuntabara. Abahamoni kandi na bo nibakurusha imbaraga, ndibuze kugutabara." 
2Samuel10:12 Ukomere, tugaragaze ubutwari kubera umuryango wacu n’imigi y’Imana yacu! Kandi Uhoraho arakore uko abishaka.»" 
2Samuel10:13 Nuko Yowabu n’inteko ye basatira urugamba, kugira ngo barwane n’Abaramu, maze bo barabahunga." 
2Samuel10:14 Abahamoni ngo babone ko Abaramu bahunze, na bo baherako bahunga Abishayi bataha mu mugi. Yowabu areka atyo kurwana n’Abahamoni, agaruka i Yeruzalemu." 
2Samuel10:15 Abaramu babonye ko Israheli ibatsinze, bakoranira hamwe bose." 
2Samuel10:16 Bukeye, Hadadezeri yohereza intumwa ku Baramu bose bo hakurya y’Uruzi. Baraza bagera i Helamu; Shobaki, umugaba w’ingabo za Hadadezeri, abarangaje imbere." 
2Samuel10:17 Nuko babibwira Dawudi, na we akoranya Israheli yose, bambuka Yorudani, bagera i Helamu. Abaramu bambikana na Dawudi bararwana." 
2Samuel10:18 Ariko Abaramu baza guhunga Israheli, Dawudi abicamo abanyamagare magana arindwi, n’ibihumbi mirongo ine by’abanyamafarasi. Asogota na Shobaki, umugaba w’ingabo z’Abaramu, amutsinda aho." 
2Samuel10:19 Nuko abami bose, abagaragu ba Hadadezeri, babonye ko batsinzwe na Israheli baracogora, bayoboka Israheli, barayikorera. Kandi Abaramu batinya kugaruka gutabara Abahamoni." 
2Samuel11:1 Nuko ngo umwaka utahe, igihe abami batabaye, Dawudi yohereza Yowabu ku rugamba kumwe n’abagaragu be bose na Israheli yose. Batsemba Abahamoni, bagota umugi wabo Raba; naho Dawudi akaba yasigaye i Yeruzalemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Nimunsi, Dawudi abyutse mu buriri bwe, ajya gutembera ahantu hitaruye, hejuru y’igisenge cy’ingoro y’umwami. Igihe yari hejuru aho, arabukwa umugore wiyuhagiraga, kandi akaba umugore w’uburanga butangaje." 
2Samuel11:3 Dawudi rero atuma kubaririza uwo mugore uwo ari we, maze baramubwira bati «Si Betsabe, umukobwa wa Eliyamu, muka Uriya w’Umuhiti?»" 
2Samuel11:4 Nuko Dawudi yohereza intumwa zo kumumuzanira, aza iwe bararyamana. Ubwo kandi uwo mugore yari arangije kwisukura ukujya mu mugongo; nuko asubira iwe." 
2Samuel11:5 Umugore arasama, maze atuma kuri Dawudi kubimumenyesha, ati «Ndatwite!»" 
2Samuel11:6 Dawudi aherako atuma kuri Yowabu, ati «Nyoherereza Uriya w’Umuhiti.» Yowabu rero yohereza Uriya kwa Dawudi." 
2Samuel11:7 Uriya ngo agereyo, Dawudi amubaza amakuru ya Yowabu, ay’ingabo n’ay’intambara." 
2Samuel11:8 Hanyuma abwira Uriya, ati «Manuka ujye iwawe, maze woge ibirenge.» Uriya asohoka ibwami akurikiwe n’izimano yohererejwe n’umwami." 
2Samuel11:9 Ariko Uriya yiryamira ku rurembo rw’ibwami hamwe n’abagaragu ba shebuja, ntiyamanuka ngo ajye iwe." 
2Samuel11:10 Babimenyesha Dawudi, bati «Uriya ntiyamanutse ngo ajye iwe.» Nuko Dawudi abaza Uriya, ati «Mbese ntiwari uvuye mu rugendo? Ni kuki utamanutse ngo ujye iwawe?»" 
2Samuel11:11 Uriya asubiza Dawudi, ati «Ubushyinguro bw’Imana, Israheli na Yuda bari mu ngando, kandi na databuja Yowabu n’abagaragu b’umutegetsi wanjye bari mu gasozi, none jyewe ngo ningende njye iwanjye kurya, kunywa no kuryamana n’umugore wanjye! Ndahiye Imana Nyir’ubuzima, nkarahira n’ubuzima bwawe bwite, ko ntazakora ibintu nk’ibyo.»" 
2Samuel11:12 Dawudi abwira Uriya, ati «Wongere usibire uyu munsi, maze ejo nzakohereze.» Uriya rero asibira aho i Yeruzalemu uwo munsi na bukeye bwawo." 
2Samuel11:13 Dawudi aramutumira ngo arire kandi anywere imbere ye, nuko aramusindisha. Nimugoroba, Uriya arasohoka ajya kuryama ku buriri bwe, hamwe n’abagaragu ba shebuja, ariko ntiyamanuka ngo ajye iwe." 
2Samuel11:14 Bukeye mu gitondo, Dawudi yandikira Yowabu urwandiko, ararumwoherereza rujyanywe na Uriya." 
2Samuel11:15 Yari yanditse muri urwo rwandiko ati «Uriya mumushyire imbere aho urugamba rukaze, hanyuma mwisubirire inyuma, bamutere maze apfe.»" 
2Samuel11:16 Nuko Yowabu wari wagose umugi, ashyira Uriya ahantu yari azi ko hari abantu b’intwari." 
2Samuel11:17 Abantu bo mu mugi barasohoka, barwana na Yowabu. Benshi muri rubanda no mu bagaragu ba Dawudi barahagwa, Uriya w’Umuhiti na we arapfa." 
2Samuel11:18 Yowabu atuma kuri Dawudi kumumenyesha ibyabaye byose muri iyo ntambara. 
2Samuel11:19 Ategeka iyo ntumwa, ati «Igihe uzaba umaze kumenyesha umwami iby’intambara byose," 
2Samuel11:20 ukabona arakaye, akakubaza ati ’Ni iki cyatumye musatira cyane umugi kugira ngo murwane? Ntimwari muzi se ko barasira hejuru y’inkike?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ni nde wishe Abimeleki mwene Yerubehali? Nta bwo ari umugore wamuteye ingasire, ari hejuru y’inkike y’umugi agapfa atyo aguye i Tebesi? Ni kuki mwasatiriye cyane inkike?’ uzamusubize uti ’Umugaragu wawe Uriya na we yapfuye.’»" 
2Samuel11:22 Intumwa irahaguruka ijya kwa Dawudi kumumenyesha ibyo Yowabu yari ayitumye byose. 
2Samuel11:23 Iyo ntumwa ibwira Dawudi, iti «Abo bantu baturushaga amaboko; barasohoka badutera ku gasozi, ariko turabatsura tubageza ku marembo y’umugi." 
2Samuel11:24 Nuko abanyamiheto barasira abagaragu bawe hejuru y’inkike y’umugi, hapfa abantu benshi mu bagaragu b’umwami, ndetse n’umugaragu wawe Uriya w’Umuhiti na we yarapfuye.»" 
2Samuel11:25 Dawudi abwira iyo ntumwa, ati «Ubwire Yowabu uti ’Ibyo ntibikubabaze. Inkota yica ku buryo bwinshi. Gusa, komeza gukaza umurego wawe ku mugi, maze uwurimbure.’ Numubwira utyo, uzaba umukomeje.»" 
2Samuel11:26 Muka Uriya ngo amenye ko umugabo we yapfuye, aramuririra." 
2Samuel11:27 Igihe cyo kwirabura kirangiye, Dawudi atuma abamuzanira uwo mugore, amwakira iwe. Aba rero umugore we, maze amubyarira umuhungu. Ariko ibyo Dawudi yari yakoze bibabaza cyane Uhoraho." 
2Samuel12:1 Uhoraho yohereza Natani kwa Dawudi, aramusanga maze aramubwira ati «Habayeho abantu babiri mu mugi, umwe ari umukungu, undi ari umukene." 
2Samuel12:2 Umukungu akagira intama n’ibimasa bitabarika. 
2Samuel12:3 Umukene nta kantu na mba yari afite, uretse agatama yari yaraguze konyine. Yarakagaburiraga, maze gakurira iwe kumwe n’abana be. Kakarya ku byo yaryagaho, kakanywera ku nkongoro ye, kandi kakaryama mu gituza cye. Kari kamubereye rwose nk’umukobwa we." 
2Samuel12:4 Umukungu rero aza kugendererwa n’umushyitsi, ntiyatekereza gufata mu ntama ze no mu bimasa bye ngo azimanire uwo mugenzi waje iwe; ahubwo afata ka gatama ka wa mukene, nuko azimanira umushyitsi we.»" 
2Samuel12:5 Dawudi arakarira bikabije uwo muntu, abwira Natani, ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho Nyir’ubuzima! Umuntu wakoze ibyo akwiye urupfu." 
2Samuel12:6 Kandi ako gatama akazakishyura incuro enye, kubera ko yatinyutse gukora ibintu nk’ibyo, kandi akaba atagize impuhwe.»" 
2Samuel12:7 Nuko Natani abwira Dawudi, ati «Uwo muntu ni wowe! None Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya ’Ni jye wakwisigiye amavuta ngo ube umwami wa Israheli, kandi nkurokora ikiganza cya Sawuli." 
2Samuel12:8 Naguhaye inzu ya shobuja, nshyira mu maboko yawe abagore ba shobuja; naguhaye kandi inzu ya Israheli n’iya Yuda; niba ibyo bidahagije, nzongeraho n’ibindi nk’ibyo." 
2Samuel12:9 Ni iki cyatumye usuzugura ijambo ry’Uhoraho, ugakora ibitamushimisha? Wicishije inkota Uriya w’Umuhiti, ufata umugore we umugira uwawe, naho we umwicisha inkota y’Abahamoni." 
2Samuel12:10 Ubu rero, inkota ntizava mu nzu yawe, kubera ko wansuzuguye kandi ugacyura muka Uriya w’Umuhiti, ukamugira umugore wawe." 
2Samuel12:11 None rero, dore uko Uhoraho avuze: Nzaguteza ibyago bivuye mu nzu yawe bwite. Nzafata abagore bawe wirebera n’amaso yawe mbahe undi muntu, azaryamane na bo imbere yawe ku manywa y’ihangu." 
2Samuel12:12 Wowe wabikoreye mu bwihisho, ariko jye ibyo nzabikorera imbere ya Israheli yose, kandi ku mugaragaro amanywa ava.’»" 
2Samuel12:13 Dawudi abwira Natani, ati «Ni koko, nacumuye kuri Uhoraho.» Natani abwira Dawudi, ati «Uhoraho yaguhanaguyeho icyaha cyawe, nta bwo uri bupfe." 
2Samuel12:14 Ariko kubera ko muri ibyo watutse Uhoraho, umuhungu wabyaye, we azapfa.»" 
2Samuel12:15 Nuko Natani asubira iwe. Uhoraho yibasira umwana muka Uriya yari yabyaranye na Dawudi, maze araremba cyane." 
2Samuel12:16 Dawudi ni ko kwinginga Imana kubera uwo mwana, asiba kurya, kandi yataha iwe, akarambarara mu mukungugu bukarinda bucya." 
2Samuel12:17 Abakuru bo mu rugo rwe bamuguma iruhande ngo bamubyutse, ariko aranga kandi ntiyagira icyo asangira na bo." 
2Samuel12:18 Ku munsi wa karindwi, umwana arapfa. Abagaragu ba Dawudi batinya kumubikira ko umwana yapfuye, kuko bibwiraga bati «Ubwo umwana yari akirwaye, twaramuvugishaga ntatwumve, none ubu twahera he tumubwira ngo ’Umwana yapfuye’? Ari buducemo igikuba!»" 
2Samuel12:19 Dawudi abona abagaragu be bongorerana, maze amenyeraho ko umwana yapfuye. Nuko Dawudi arababaza ati «Mbese umwana yapfuye?» Baramusubiza bati «Yapfuye.»" 
2Samuel12:20 Dawudi aherako abaduka mu mukungugu, yisiga umubavu kandi ahindura imyambaro; hanyuma ajya mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, maze arapfukama arasenga. Agarutse iwe, asaba ko bamugaburira, nuko ararya." 
2Samuel12:21 Abagaragu be baramubaza bati «Ibyo ukora ni ibiki?» Ubwo umwana yari akiri muzima, wasibye kurya kandi uramuririra, none umwana amaze gupfa, urahaguruka maze urarya!»" 
2Samuel12:22 Arabasubiza ati «Igihe umwana yari akiri muzima, nasibye kurya kandi ndamuririra, kuko nibwiraga nti ’Ntawabimenya! Wenda Uhoraho yangirira impuhwe, maze umwana akabaho.’" 
2Samuel12:23 Ariko none yapfuye. Ndiyiriza ubusa kuki se kandi? Nashobora se kumugarura? Ni jyewe uzamusanga aho ari, naho we ntazagaruka aho ndi.»" 
2Samuel12:24 Dawudi ahoza Betsabe umugore we, ataha iwe maze aryamana na we. Bukeye, abyara umuhungu, Dawudi amwita Salomoni. Uhoraho akunda uwo mwana," 
2Samuel12:25 aherako atuma umuhanuzi Natani kubimenyesha Dawudi. Nuko Natani ahita amwita Yedidiya, ari byo kuvuga ’Uwakunzwe n’Uhoraho’, bikurikije ibyo Uhoraho yari yavuze." 
2Samuel12:26 Bukeye, Yowabu atera i Raba y’Abahamoni, maze afata umugi w’ibwami." 
2Samuel12:27 Nuko Yowabu yohereza intumwa kwa Dawudi kumubwira ziti «Nateye Raba ndetse nafashe umugi wo ku mazi. 
2Samuel12:28 None rero, koranya ingabo zisigaye, maze uze ufate umugi wose kandi uwigarurire. Bitabaye ibyo, jye ubwanjye nzawufata kandi bazawitirire izina ryanjye.»" 
2Samuel12:29 Nuko Dawudi akoranya ingabo zose, arahaguruka atera i Raba kandi arahigarurira." 
2Samuel12:30 Milikomu, ikigirwamana cyabo acyambura ikamba ku mutwe; ryari rifite uburemere nk’ubwa talenta imwe ya zahabu kandi ritatswe n’ibuye ry’agaciro, maze iryo buye Dawudi aritakisha ikamba rye. Maze muri uwo mugi, ahakura iminyago myinshi cyane." 
2Samuel12:31 Naho abaturage b’aho arabajyana, kugira ngo bakoreshe inkero, bakoreshe amapiki n’intorezo z’ibyuma, kandi babumbe n’amatafari. Uko ni ko yagenjereje imigi yose y’Abahamoni. Hanyuma Dawudi n’ingabo ze zose, basubira i Yeruzalemu." 
2Samuel13:1 Dore ibyaje gukurikiraho. Abusalomu mwene Dawudi yari afite mushiki we w’uburanga butangaje, akitwa Tamara. Aminoni mwene se aramubenguka." 
2Samuel13:2 Aminoni azongwa n’agahinda atewe na mushiki we Tamara kubera ko yari isugi, kandi kugira icyo amukoraho na byo byari bikomeye mu maso ya Aminoni." 
2Samuel13:3 Aminoni akagira incuti ye yitwa Yonadabu, mwene Shimeya umuvandimwe wa Dawudi, kandi Yonadabu uwo akaba n’umunyabwenge." 
2Samuel13:4 Abaza Aminoni, ati «Ni kuki, wa mwana w’umwami we, uzongwa uko bukeye? Ntushobora se kumbwira impamvu?» Aminoni aramusubiza, ati «Ni Tamara mushiki wa mwene data Abusalomu nabengutse.»" 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu aramubwira ati «Uryame ku buriri bwawe, maze wigire umurwayi, so naza kugusura uzamubwire uti ’Ndakwinginze ngo ureke mushiki wanjye Tamara aze ampe icyo ndya: ategure ibyo kurya imbere yanjye ku buryo mbona ko ari we ubwe wabitetse, maze mbashe kurya.’»" 
2Samuel13:6 Nuko Aminoni araryama, yihindura indembe. Umwami aza kumureba, maze Aminoni abwira umwami, ati «Ndakwinginze ngo Tamara mushiki wanjye aze hano imbere yanjye, antekere udutsima tubiri, atumpereze maze ndye.»" 
2Samuel13:7 Dawudi atuma kuri Tamara mu rugo, ati «Genda ujye kwa musaza wawe Aminoni, maze umutegurire ibyo kurya.»" 
2Samuel13:8 Tamara aherako ajya kwa musaza we Aminoni, asanga aryamye. Akora urwanga, abumba udutsima, maze adutekera imbere ye." 
2Samuel13:9 Hanyuma afata ipanu, ayishyira imbere ye, ariko we yanga kurya. Ahubwo aravuga ati «Mubanze muheze aba bantu bose hano.» Nuko abari iruhande rwe barasohoka." 
2Samuel13:10 Aminoni abwira Tamara, ati «Nzanira ibiryo mu cyumba maze ndye.» Tamara aterura twa dutsima yatetse, adushyira musaza we Aminoni mu cyumba." 
2Samuel13:11 Ngo amuhereze ibyo kurya, aramufata maze aramubwira ati «Ngwino turyamane, mwene data!»" 
2Samuel13:12 Undi aramusubiza ati «Oya, mwene data, winkoza isoni, kuko ibyo bidakorwa muri Israheli. Uramenye udakora iryo shyano!" 
2Samuel13:13 Mbese nkanjye, urabona izo soni nazazinyurana hehe? Nawe kandi wazafatwa nk’inkozi y’ibibi muri Israheli. None rero, ubivugane n’umwami, ntazakubuza kundongora.»" 
2Samuel13:14 Ariko we yanga kumwumva, aramukomeza ku gahato, maze aryamana na we." 
2Samuel13:15 Hanyuma ariko, Aminoni atangira kumwanga urunuka. Koko kandi, urwango yari amufitiye rwasumbaga kure urukundo yari yaramukunze. Aminoni aramubwira ati «Haguruka umvire aha!»" 
2Samuel13:16 Undi aramusubiza, ati «Nta ho njya, kuko kunyirukana byaba ari icyaha gikomeye kuruta icyo umaze kunkorera.» Ariko we ntiyashaka kumwumva." 
2Samuel13:17 Aherako ahamagara umugaragu we, aramubwira ati «Vana uyu mukobwa iwanjye, umusuke hanze maze umukingirane.»" 
2Samuel13:18 Tamara yari yambaye ikanzu y’amaboko maremare, uko abakobwa b’umwami bambaraga, iyo babaga bakiri abari. Nuko umugaragu wa Aminoni aramusohora, maze aramukingirana." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamara afata ivu aryisiga mu mutwe, atanyagura ikanzu ye y’amaboko maremare, yikorera amaboko maze agenda arira cyane." 
2Samuel13:20 Musaza we Abusalomu aramubaza ati «Mbese ni musaza wawe Aminoni wagufashe? None rero icecekere, muvandimwe; ni musaza wawe, ntiwongere no kubitekereza ukundi.» Nuko Tamara aguma atyo nk’umwage kwa musaza we Abusalomu." 
2Samuel13:21 Umwami Dawudi yumvise ibyo byose, ararakara cyane, ariko ntiyashaka gutera agahinda Aminoni, umuhungu we yakundaga cyane, kuko yari imfura ye." 
2Samuel13:22 Abusalomu ntiyagira ijambo na rimwe abwira mwene se Aminoni, kuko guhera ubwo Abusalomu yari yanze Aminoni, kubera ko yakojeje isoni mushiki we Tamara." 
2Samuel13:23 Ngo hashire imyaka ibiri, Abusalomu ashaka kujya i Behali‐Hasori, ahateganye n’i Efurayimu, kogoshesha intama ze. Nuko Abusalomu atumira abahungu bose b’umwami." 
2Samuel13:24 Abusalomu ni ko kujya ibwami, abwira umwami, ati «Dore iw’umugaragu wawe bagiye kogoshesha intama ubwoya. None ndakwinginze ngo umwami n’abagaragu be, baherekeze umugaragu wawe.»" 
2Samuel13:25 Umwami abwira Abusalomu, ati «Oya, mwana wanjye, ntitujyayo twese kuko atari ngombwa kukurushya.» Abusalomu aramuhata, ariko umwami yanga kwemera kujyayo, ahubwo amuha umugisha." 
2Samuel13:26 Abusalomu aravuga ati «Noneho, reka nibura mwene data Aminoni aduherekeze.» Umwami aramubaza ati «Ni kuki agomba kuguherekeza?»" 
2Samuel13:27 Abusalomu akomeza kumuhata, umwami ni ko kumureka ngo ajyane na Aminoni, n’abandi bahungu be bose." 
2Samuel13:28 Nuko Abusalomu ategeka abagaragu be, ati «Mwitegereze neza! Nimubona Aminoni amaze kunezerezwa na divayi, amaze gusinda, maze nkababwira nti ’Mukubite Aminoni’, ubwo muhite mumwica. Ntimutinye; none se si jyewe ubibategetse? Nimukomere kandi mube intwari!»" 
2Samuel13:29 Abagaragu ba Abusalomu bagenzereza Aminoni uko Abusalomu yabibategetse. Nuko abahungu bose b’umwami baherako barahaguruka, buri wese yurira inyumbu ye, maze barahunga." 
2Samuel13:30 Bakiri mu nzira, iyo nkuru igera kuri Dawudi ngo «Abusalomu yishe abahungu bose b’umwami, ntihasigaye n’umwe!»" 
2Samuel13:31 Umwami arahaguruka, atanyura imyambaro ye, aryama mu mukungugu. Abagaragu be bose bari aho, na bo bashishimura imyambaro yabo." 
2Samuel13:32 Ariko Yonadabu mwene Shimeya, umuvandimwe wa Dawudi, afata ijambo aravuga ati «Shobuja, ntugire ngo bishe abahungu bose b’umwami. Reka da, ahubwo hapfuye Aminoni wenyine. Kuko Abusalomu yari yarabigambiriye, guhera ku munsi Aminoni akojeje isoni mushiki we Tamara." 
2Samuel13:33 Nuko rero mwami, mutegetsi wanjye, ntukuke umutima ngo abahungu b’umwami bose bapfuye. Oya da! Aminoni wenyine ni we wapfuye;" 
2Samuel13:34 naho Abusalomu, yahunze.» Umusore w’umuzamu ngo yubure amaso, abona inteko y’abantu benshi baturuka inyuma ye mu ibanga ry’umusozi; ni ko kuza abwira umwami ati «Nabonye abantu bamanuka hariya mu ibanga ry’umusozi.»" 
2Samuel13:35 Nuko Yonadabu abwira umwami, ati «Dore abahungu b’umwami baraje. Byose byagenze nk’uko umugaragu wawe yabikubwiye.»" 
2Samuel13:36 Igihe atari yarangiza kuvuga, abahungu b’umwami barasesekara. Bakigera aho basesa amarira, umwami n’abagaragu be bose na bo bararira, barahogora." 
2Samuel13:37 Abusalomu ahungira kwa Talimayi mwene Amihuri, umwami w’i Geshuri, ahamara imyaka itatu." 
2Samuel13:38 Kandi muri icyo gihe cyose, Dawudi akomeza kuririra umuhungu we." 
2Samuel13:39 Hanyuma ariko, Dawudi areka kurakarira Abusalomu, kuko yari amaze gushira akababaro k’urupfu rwa Aminoni." 
2Samuel14:1 Bukeye, Yowabu mwene Seruya, amenya ko umwami akumbuye Abusalomu." 
2Samuel14:2 Aherako atuma intumwa i Tekowa, kuzanayo umugore w’umunyabwenge, maze aramubwira ati «Ndagusabye ngo wihindure nk’umuntu ubabaye, wambare imyambaro y’akababaro, ntiwisige imibavu; mbese muri make, umere nk’umugore umaze igihe kirekire mu kababaro k’umugabo we wapfuye." 
2Samuel14:3 Hanyuma ujye kureba umwami maze umubwire utya... » Nuko Yowabu amubwira ibyo yagombaga kuvuga byose. 
2Samuel14:4 Nuko rero, uwo mugore w’i Tekowa asanga umwami, yitura hasi yubamye ku butaka, aramuramya maze aravuga ati «Ntabara, mwami wanjye!»" 
2Samuel14:5 Umwami ni ko kumubaza ati «Ni ibiki?» Aramusubiza ati «Nta bwo! Ndi umupfakazi, umugabo wanjye yarapfuye." 
2Samuel14:6 Umuja wawe yari afite abana babiri, bukeye barakaranyiriza mu gasozi, kandi nta wundi muntu uhari wo kubakiza, nuko umwe akubita undi aramwica." 
2Samuel14:7 None rero, umuryango wose wahagurukiye umuja wawe, bariho baravuga bati ’Tanga uwo mwicanyi, bamuhore amaraso y’umuvandimwe we yishe’, kandi barimbure batyo uwo nageneye umurage. Uko ni ko bashaka kuzimya ikara nari nsigaranye, ngo badasigira umugabo wanjye izina cyangwa umukomokaho ku isi.»" 
2Samuel14:8 Nuko umwami abwira uwo mugore, ati «Ngaho taha iwawe. Ndi butange amategeko ku bikwerekeyeho.»" 
2Samuel14:9 Uwo mugore w’i Tekowa abwira umwami, ati «Mwami, mutegetsi wanjye, icyaha kibe kuri jye no ku muryango wanjye! Umwami n’ingoma ye ni abere.»" 
2Samuel14:10 Umwami aramubwira ati «Nihagira uwongera kubikubwira, uzamunzanire kandi ntazagusubira ukundi.»" 
2Samuel14:11 Umugore aramubwira ati «Ndagusabye, mutegetsi wanjye, ngo wibuke Uhoraho, Imana yawe, kugira ngo umuhozi atazanyongerera akababaro yica umuhungu wanjye.» Umwami aravuga ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho Nyir’ubuzima, ko nta n’agasatsi na kamwe k’umuhungu wawe kazagwa hasi.»" 
2Samuel14:12 Umugore aravuga ati «Ndakwinginze, ngo umuja wawe agire icyo abwira umwami, umutegetsi wanjye.» Aramusubiza ati «Ngaho mbwira»" 
2Samuel14:13 Nuko umugore aravuga ati «None rero, ni kuki wakoreye igikorwa nk’icyo umuryango w’Imana? Uhereye ku byo umwami avuze, yiciriye urubanza ubwe, kuko atagaruye umuhungu we yirukanye." 
2Samuel14:14 Yego, twese tuzapfa nta kabuza, kandi nk’uko amazi aseseka hasi ntayorwe, ni na ko uwapfuye Imana itamukura ikuzimu ngo agaruke mu bazima. Naho umwami we nagire icyo ategeka, kugira ngo uwari waciwe adakomeza kuba kure ye.»" 
2Samuel14:15 Umugore arongera ati «None rero, nazanywe no kubwira umwami, umutegetsi wanjye, ibyo nyine maze kumugezaho, mbitewe n’uko umuryango wanteye ubwoba. Nuko umuja wawe ni ko kwibwira nti ’Ngiye kubitekereza umwami," 
2Samuel14:16 wenda azakora icyo umuja we yamusabye, amukize umuntu washakaga kumuvutsa ku murage w’Imana, kimwe n’umuhungu wanjye.’" 
2Samuel14:17 Umuja wawe yibwiye ati ’Ijambo umwami umutegetsi wanjye ari buvuge ritume ngubwa neza; kuko umwami, umutegetsi wanjye, ari nk’umumalayika w’Imana: yumva icyiza n’ikibi.’ Nuko rero, Uhoraho Imana yawe ibane nawe!»" 
2Samuel14:18 Umwami abwira uwo mugore, ati «Ndakwinginze ngo ntugire icyo umpisha ku kibazo ngiye kukubaza.» Undi aravuga ati «Ngaho umwami umutegetsi wanjye navuge.»" 
2Samuel14:19 Umwami aramubaza ati «Mbese ni ikiganza cya Yowabu kikuyobora muri ibyo byose?» Umugore aramusubiza ati «Ndahiye ubugingo bw’umwami umutegetsi wanjye, ko nta muntu ushobora kunyuza ukubiri n’ibyavuzwe n’umwami umutegetsi wanjye. Koko rero, ni umugaragu wawe Yowabu wabintegetse, kandi ni na we wabwiye umuja wawe ibyo agomba kuvuga byose." 
2Samuel14:20 Yowabu yabikoreye kugira ngo agarure umwuka mwiza, ariko kandi umutegetsi wanjye ni umunyabwenge, ndetse ni umunyabwenge nk’umumalayika w’Imana: akamenya ibiba ku isi byose.»" 
2Samuel14:21 Umwami ni ko kubwira Yowabu, ati «Ni byo koko, ikibazo cyawe kibonye igisubizo. Genda ugarure uwo musore Abusalomu.»" 
2Samuel14:22 Yowabu agwa hasi yubamye, arapfukama ashimira umwami. Aravuga ati «Jyewe umugaragu wawe, uyu munsi menye ko ndi umutoni ku mwami umutegetsi wanjye, kuko wakoze icyo umugaragu wawe yagusabye.»" 
2Samuel14:23 Yowabu ashyira nzira ajya i Geshuri, maze agarura Abusalomu i Yeruzalemu." 
2Samuel14:24 Umwami aravuga ati «Nasubire iwe kandi ntazatunguke imbere yanjye.» Nuko Abusalomu asubira iwe, ntiyahinguka imbere y’umwami." 
2Samuel14:25 Nta muntu w’uburanga ndetse wanashimwaga muri Israheli nka Abusalomu: kuva ku birenge kugera ku mutwe nta nenge yagiraga. 
2Samuel14:26 Uko umwaka utashye yariyogosheshaga, igihe umusatsi wabaga umaze kuba mwinshi. Uko yiyogosheshaga, umusatsi we barawupimaga: ukaba amasikeli magana abiri ku gipimo cy’umwami." 
2Samuel14:27 Hanyuma Abusalomu abyara abahungu batatu n’umukobwa umwe witwaga Tamara. Yari umukobwa w’uburanga butangaje. 
2Samuel14:28 Nuko Abusalomu amara imyaka ibiri i Yeruzalemu, adahinguka imbere y’umwami." 
2Samuel14:29 Bukeye, Abusalomu atumira Yowabu kugira ngo amutume ku mwami, ariko we yanga kumwitaba. Yoherezayo intumwa ya kabiri, na none ntiyaza." 
2Samuel14:30 Abusalomu ni ko kubwira abagaragu be, ati «Murareba uriya murima w’ingano wa Yowabu, uri bugufi y’uwanjye: nimugende muwutwike!» Abagaragu ba Abusalomu rero, umurima barawutwika." 
2Samuel14:31 Yowabu ni ko kujya kwa Abusalomu, aramubaza ati «Ni kuki abagaragu bawe bantwikiye umurima?»" 
2Samuel14:32 Abusalomu asubiza Yowabu, ati «Ni uko nagusabye kuza iwanjye kugira ngo ngutume kubwira umwami ngo ’Kuki navuye i Geshuri? Ikiruta kuri jye ni uko naba nkiriyo.’ None rero ndashaka kubonana n’umwami, niba hari n’icyaha mfite azanyice.»" 
2Samuel14:33 Yowabu ajya kureba umwami, amubwira ibyo byose. Umwami ni ko guhamagaza Abusalomu, araza arapfukama, yunamira umwami. Nuko umwami ahobera Abusalomu." 
2Samuel15:1 Hanyuma y’ibyo, Abusalomu yishakira igare n’amafarasi, ndetse n’abantu mirongo itanu bo kumugenda imbere." 
2Samuel15:2 Mu gitondo cya kare, Abusalomu akazinduka, agahagarara ku nzira hafi y’umuryango w’urugi. Uko haje umuntu ufite urubanza agomba kujya ibwami kuburana, Abusalomu yaramuhamagaraga akamubwira ati «Uri uwo mu wuhe mugi?» Undi akamusubiza ati «Umugaragu wawe ni uwo mu muryango uyu n’uyu wa Israheli.»" 
2Samuel15:3 Nuko Abusalomu akamubwira ati «Umva, urubanza rwawe ni rwiza kandi ruraboneye, ariko nta muntu umwami yashyizeho wo kumva ibyawe.»" 
2Samuel15:4 Abusalomu akavuga ati «Yemwe, iyo njya kuba umucamanza muri iki gihugu, ni jye abafite imanza bose baba basanga, maze nkabacira imanza zitabera!»" 
2Samuel15:5 N’iyo hagiraga umuntu umwegera ngo amupfukamire, we yamuherezaga ikiganza, akamufata maze akamuhobera." 
2Samuel15:6 Abusalomu yakomeje kugenza atyo ku Bayisraheli bose bazaga ibwami gucirwa imanza, nuko yigarurira Abayisraheli." 
2Samuel15:7 Hashize imyaka ine, Abusalomu abwira umwami, ati «Ndakwinginze ngo ureke njye i Heburoni, kugira ngo ndangize isezerano nagiriye Uhoraho." 
2Samuel15:8 Kuko umugaragu wawe yagize isezerano, igihe yari i Geshuri ho muri Aramu. Yaravuze ati ’Koko Uhoraho naramuka angaruye i Yeruzalemu, nzaturira Uhoraho igitambo i Heburoni.’»" 
2Samuel15:9 Umwami aramusubiza ati «Ngaho genda amahoro!» Nuko arahaguruka ajya i Heburoni. 
2Samuel15:10 Bukeye, Abusalomu yohereza intumwa mu miryango yose ya Israheli kuvuga ngo «Nimwumva ihembe riranguruye, muzahereko muvuga muti ’Abusalomu yabaye umwami i Heburoni.’»" 
2Samuel15:11 Abantu magana abiri b’i Yeruzalemu bari baherekeje Abusalomu. Mu guhamagarwa ariko, bo bagendaga nta buriganya bafite, kuko muri ibyo nta na kimwe bari bazi." 
2Samuel15:12 Byongeye Abusalomu yohereza intumwa mu mugi wa Gilo gushaka Ahitofeli w’Umugilo, umujyanama wa Dawudi; araza bafatanya gutura ibitambo. Nuko umugambi urushaho gukomera, kandi n’abayoboke ba Abusalomu bakomeza kwiyongera." 
2Samuel15:13 Umuntu araza abwira Dawudi, ati «Imitima y’Abayisraheli yagarukiye Abusalomu.»" 
2Samuel15:14 Dawudi ni ko kubwira abagaragu be bose bari kumwe na we i Yeruzalemu, ati «Nimuhaguruke duhunge; kuko Abusalomu atazatureka. Nimuhaguruke bwangu, bitabaye ibyo, aradufata maze atugirire nabi kandi arimbuze umugi inkota.»" 
2Samuel15:15 Abagaragu b’umwami baramubwira bati «Abagaragu bawe biteguye gukora icyo umwami umutegetsi wabo ashaka.» 
2Samuel15:16 Umwami aherako asohoka ku maguru n’umuryango we wose, ariko ahasiga abagore cumi b’inshoreke ze, kugira ngo barinde ingoro." 
2Samuel15:17 Umwami asohoka ku maguru hamwe n’imbaga yose, ahagarara ku nzu ya nyuma." 
2Samuel15:18 Nuko abagaragu be bose bamuhitaho, Abakereti, Abapeleti, Abagiti, n’abantu magana atandatu bavuye i Gati bamukurikiye, bose banyura imbere ye." 
2Samuel15:19 Umwami abaza Itayi w’Umugiti, ati «Ni iki cyatuma nawe ujyana natwe? Subirayo ugumane n’undi mwami, kuko uri umunyamahanga, ukaba waraciwe mu gihugu cyawe." 
2Samuel15:20 Ko waje ejo, none nakujyana nte hamwe natwe, kandi nanjye ntazi aho ngiye? Subirayo kandi usubiraneyo n’abavandimwe bawe, maze Uhoraho akugirire ubuntu n’impuhwe!»" 
2Samuel15:21 Itayi asubiza umwami, ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho n’umwami umutegetsi wanjye, ko aho umwami umutegetsi wanjye azaba ari, haba mu rupfu cyangwa mu buzima, ni ho umugaragu wawe azaba.»" 
2Samuel15:22 Dawudi abwira Itayi, ati «Ngaho tambuka, uhite.» Nuko Itayi amuhitaho hamwe n’abantu be bose, n’abo mu rugo rwe bose." 
2Samuel15:23 Ubwo ni ko bose bariraga bahogoye, maze imbaga yose irahita. Umwami yambuka ikidendezi cya Sedironi n’abantu be bose, bamanuka berekeje mu nzira igana mu butayu." 
2Samuel15:24 Hari kandi na Sadoki, ari kumwe n’Abalevi bose batwaye Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Imana: bashyira Ubushyinguro bw’Imana hasi, maze Abiyatari abuhagarara iruhande, kugeza ubwo abantu bose basohokaga mu mugi barangije guhita." 
2Samuel15:25 Nuko umwami abwira Sadoki, ati «Subiza Ubushyinguro bw’Imana mu mugi. Niba Uhoraho angiriye impuhwe azangarura, nongere kububona n’aho butuye." 
2Samuel15:26 Ariko niba avuze ati ’Nta bwo ngushaka’; ubwo nta kundi azankoresha icyo ashaka!» 
2Samuel15:27 Umwami yongera kubwira Sadoki umuherezabitambo, ati «Ngaho munyumve! Musubire mu mugi amahoro wowe na Abiyatari, kandi Ahimasi na Yonatani, abo bahungu banyu bombi muzaba muri kumwe." 
2Samuel15:28 Naho jyewe ngiye kuzategerereza mu mfunganwa zo mu butayu, kugeza ko muzantumaho, mukambwira uko byifashe.»" 
2Samuel15:29 Sadoki na Abiyatari basubiza Ubushyinguro bw’Imana i Yeruzalemu, kandi bagumayo." 
2Samuel15:30 Dawudi azamuka mu nzira ijya ku musozi w’imizeti, yazamukaga arira, apfutse mu mutwe kandi agenza ibirenge bisa. Abantu bari bamuherekeje na bo barariraga kandi bapfutse mu mutwe, bazamuka barira." 
2Samuel15:31 Nuko baza kubwira Dawudi, bati «Ahitofeli ari mu bagambanyi bari kumwe na Abusalomu.» Dawudi ni ko kuvuga, ati «Ndakwinginze, Uhoraho, ngo imigambi ya Ahitofeli uyihindure ubusazi!»" 
2Samuel15:32 Ubwo Dawudi yari ageze mu mpinga y’umusozi, aho basengera Imana, maze Hushayi w’i Aruki arahatunguka, ikanzu ye yatanyaguritse kandi n’umutwe we wuzuye umukungugu." 
2Samuel15:33 Dawudi aramubwira ati «Nujyana nanjye, uzandushya." 
2Samuel15:34 Ariko nusubira mu mugi ukabwira Abusalomu, uti ’Nzaba umugaragu wawe, databuja; kera nahoze ndi umugaragu wa so, none ubu ndi umugaragu wawe’, ubwo wazanshoborera kandi no kuburizamo inama za Ahitofeli." 
2Samuel15:35 Mbese ubundi ntuzaba ufite hafi yawe Sadoki na Abiyatari, abaherezabitambo? Ibyo uzumva mu nzu y’umwami byose, uzajye ubibwira Sadoki na Abiyatari abaherezabitambo." 
2Samuel15:36 Kandi na bo bafiteyo abahungu babo, Ahimasi wa Sadoki na Yonatani wa Abiyatari; muzabantumeho ibyo muzaba mwumvise bavuga byose.»" 
2Samuel15:37 Nuko Hushayi incuti ya Dawudi asubira mu mugi mu gihe Abusalomu yari ageze i Yeruzalemu. 
2Samuel16:1 Dawudi yari amaze kurenga gato impinga y’umusozi, Siba umugaragu wa Mefibosheti aramusanganira n’indogobe ebyiri zihetse imigati magana abiri, amaseri ijana y’imizabibu yumye, imbuto ijana z’umwero n’uruhago rw’uruhu rurimo divayi." 
2Samuel16:2 Umwami abaza Siba, ati «Ibi ni iby’iki?» Siba aramusubiza ati «Indogobe ni izizaheka abo mu rugo rw’umwami; imigati n’imbuto ni ifunguro ry’abahungu bawe, naho divayi ni izamara inyota abazaba bananiriwe mu butayu.»" 
2Samuel16:3 Umwami aramubaza ati «Ariko se ye, Mefibosheti, umuhungu wa shobuja ari hehe?» Siba asubiza umwami, ati «Dore asigaye i Yeruzalemu, kuko yibwiraga ati ’Uyu munsi, inzu ya Israheli iransubiza ubwami bwa data!’»" 
2Samuel16:4 Umwami abwira Siba, ati «Kuva ubu, ibintu byose bya Mefibosheti ni ibyawe.» Nuko Siba aravuga ati «Dore mpfukamye imbere yawe! Nkomeze kukubaho umutoni, mwami mutegetsi wanjye.»" 
2Samuel16:5 Umwami Dawudi ageze i Bahurimu, hasohoka umugabo wo mu nzu ya Sawuli, witwaga Shimeyi mwene Gera. Uko yasohokaga ni ko yagendaga avumana." 
2Samuel16:6 Atera Dawudi n’abagaragu b’umwami bose amabuye, nyamara imbaga yose n’ab’intwari bose bakikiza Dawudi." 
2Samuel16:7 Dore ibyo Shimeyi yavugaga muri iyo mivumo ye «Genda, genda, wa mugome we umena amaraso!" 
2Samuel16:8 Uhoraho yakugaruyeho amaraso yose y’inzu ya Sawuli, wakuye ku ngoma. None Uhoraho yashubije ubwami mu biganza by’umuhungu wawe Abusalomu, naho wowe uri mu byago, kuko uri umuntu w’amaraso.»" 
2Samuel16:9 Nuko Abishayi mwene Seruya abwira umwami, ati «Ni kuki iriya mbwa yaboze yatuka umwami umutegetsi wanjye? Reka ntambuke, maze muce umutwe.»" 
2Samuel16:10 Umwami aravuga ati «Mpuriye he namwe, bene Seruya? Niba amvuma kandi akaba ari Uhoraho wamubwiye ati ’Genda uvume Dawudi’, ni nde wakubahuka kumubwira ati ’Kuki ukora ibyo ngibyo?’»" 
2Samuel16:11 Dawudi abwira Abishayi n’abagaragu be bose, ati «Niba umuhungu wanjye, uwo nibyariye, ashaka kunyica, uriya Mubenyamini we ntiyagombye kurushaho? Nimumureke avumane, niba Uhoraho yabimubwiye." 
2Samuel16:12 Ahari Uhoraho yazareba umubabaro wanjye, maze akansubiza ibyishimo mu mwanya w’imivumo y’uyu munsi.»" 
2Samuel16:13 Nuko Dawudi n’abantu be bakomeza inzira, naho Shimeyi anyura mu ibanga ry’umusozi ahateganye na Dawudi, akomeza kumuvuma no kumutera amabuye, ndetse ari na ko atumura n’imikungugu." 
2Samuel16:14 Hanyuma umwami n’abantu be bagera aho bananirwa, nuko bararuhuka." 
2Samuel16:15 Abusalomu n’inteko y’Abayisraheli bari barageze i Yeruzalemu, kandi na Ahitofeli yari kumwe na we." 
2Samuel16:16 Ubwo Hushayi w’i Aruki, incuti ya Dawudi, agera kwa Abusalomu. Hushayi abwira Abusalomu, ati «Harakabaho umwami! Niharambe umwami!»" 
2Samuel16:17 Abusalomu abaza Hushayi, ati «Mbese burya kwa kudahemuka kwawe ku ncuti yawe, ni aho kugarukiye? Kuki se utajyanye n’incuti yawe?»" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushayi asubiza Abusalomu, ati «Reka da! Ahubwo uwatoranyijwe n’Uhoraho ndetse n’iyi mbaga n’Abayisraheli bose, nanjye ndashaka kuba uwe kandi nkagumana na we!" 
2Samuel16:19 Byongeye kandi, uwo ngiye gukorera ni nde? Si umuhungu we? Nk’uko nabaye umugaragu wa so, ni na ko nawe nzagukorera.»" 
2Samuel16:20 Bukeye, Abusalomu abwira Ahitofeli, ati «Nimujye inama y’icyo tugomba gukora.»" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofeli abwira Abusalomu, ati «Taha ku nshoreke za so yasize ku rugo, bityo Abayisraheli bazamenyereho ko wananiye so, maze imbaga yose igushyigikiye igukomereho.»" 
2Samuel16:22 Bashingira Abusalomu ihema ahantu hitaruye, maze Abusalomu ataha kuri za nshoreke za se, Abayisraheli bose babireba." 
2Samuel16:23 Inama za Ahitofeli muri icyo gihe, bazifataga nk’ijambo ry’Imana; uko ni ko inama za Ahitofeli zari ziteye, ari izo yagiraga Dawudi cyangwa Abusalomu." 
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofeli abwira Abusalomu, ati «Reka nkoranye ingabo ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, maze nkurikire Dawudi muri iri joro." 
2Samuel17:2 Nzamugwa gitumo akinaniwe kandi yacitse intege, mutere ubwoba abantu be bahunge, maze mwice ubwo azaba asigaye wenyine." 
2Samuel17:3 Bityo nzakugarureho umuryango wose mbese nk’uko umugeni ataha iw’umugabo we! Uwo ushaka gukuraho ni umwe, maze umuryango wose ugakira.»" 
2Samuel17:4 Iyo nama ishimisha Abusalomu n’abakuru ba Israheli bose. 
2Samuel17:5 Abusalomu ni ko kuvuga ati «Nimuhamagare na Hushayi w’i Aruki, kugira ngo twumve na we icyo abivugaho.»" 
2Samuel17:6 Hushayi aritaba, Abusalomu aramubwira ati «Dore ibyo Ahitofeli yatubwiye. Dukore ibyo yavuze? Niba se atari byo, tubwire nawe uko ubyumva.»" 
2Samuel17:7 Hushayi asubiza Abusalomu, ati «Inama Ahitofeli yabagiriye, noneho nta bwo ari nziza.»" 
2Samuel17:8 Nuko Hushayi arakomeza, ati «Ubwawe uzi so n’ingabo ze: ni intwari kandi ubu bafite uburakari nk’ubw’ikirura cyajimije umwana wacyo mu gasozi. So kandi ni umuntu w’umurwanyi, nta bwo ari burare hamwe n’imbaga." 
2Samuel17:9 None rero, ubu yihishe mu mwobo cyangwa ahandi. Ahubwo, ubwo hazaba hatangiye kugira abapfa muri twe, uzabyumva wese azavuga ati ’Hamaze gupfa benshi mu ngabo za Abusalomu!’" 
2Samuel17:10 Ibyo bizatuma n’ufite umutima nk’uw’intare acogora, kuko Israheli yose izi ko so ari intwari, n’ingabo ze zikaba zidacogora." 
2Samuel17:11 Dore rero jye inama nabagira: koranyiriza Abayisraheli bose iruhande rwawe, uhereye i Dani ukageza i Berisheba, bangane n’umusenyi wo ku nyanja, nawe kandi ujyane na bo ku rugamba." 
2Samuel17:12 Tuzamugeraho aho azaba ari hose, tuzamutondeho nk’ikime kigwa ku butaka: ari we ari n’ingabo ze zose, ntihazasigara n’umwe." 
2Samuel17:13 Naramuka kandi hari umugi yinjiyemo, Israheli yose izazana imigozi, dukurure uwo mugi tuwurohe mu kidendezi, kugeza ndetse ubwo hatazasigara n’ibuye na rimwe.»" 
2Samuel17:14 Nuko Abusalomu n’Abayisraheli bose baravuga bati «Inama ya Hushayi Umwaruki, ni yo nziza kuruta iya Ahitofeli.» Uhoraho yari yagambiriye kuburizamo inama nziza za Ahitofeli, kugira ngo ateze Abusalomu ibyago." 
2Samuel17:15 Hushayi abwira Sadoki na Abiyatari abaherezabitambo, ati «Dore inama Ahitofeli yagiriye Abusalomu n’abakuru ba Israheli, naho jye dore iyo nabagiriye." 
2Samuel17:16 None rero, mutume vuba kuri Dawudi, mumubwire muti ’Iri joro nturare mu mayaga yo mu butayu, ahubwo wambuke; bitabaye ibyo, umwami n’ingabo ze barabagira umutamiro umwe.’»" 
2Samuel17:17 Yonatani na Ahimasi bari ahitwa Eni‐Rogeli: umuja yagombaga kujya kubibabwira, na bo bakajya kubimenyesha umwami Dawudi, kuko batashoboraga kwinjira mu mugi ku mugaragaro." 
2Samuel17:18 Ariko umusore aza kubabona, maze abimenyesha Abusalomu. Bombi bagenda bihuta, bagera ku rugo rw’umugabo w’i Bahurimu. Yari afite iriba ku muharuro we, nuko baryinjiramo." 
2Samuel17:19 Umugore aherako afata ihema, arirambura hejuru y’iriba yanika imyaka hejuru yaryo, ntihagira ikimenyekana." 
2Samuel17:20 Abagaragu ba Abusalomu binjira mu nzu kwa wa mugore, baramubaza bati «Ahimasi na Yonatani bari hehe?» Umugore arabasubiza ati «Bagiye berekeza ku mazi.» Nuko barabashaka ntibababona, basubira i Yeruzalemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Bamaze kugenda, abandi basohoka mu iriba, bajya kubwira umwami Dawudi, bati «Nimuhaguruke bwangu mwambuke uruzi, kuko inama ya Ahitofeli kuri mwe ari iyo ngiyo.»" 
2Samuel17:22 Nuko Dawudi ahera ko arahaguruka n’imbaga yari kumwe na we, maze bambuka Yorudani. Umuseke wakebye nta n’umwe usigaye atari yambuka." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahitofeli ngo abone ko batakurikije inama ze, afata indogobe ye, arahaguruka ajya mu mudugudu we. Amaze guha amategeko umuryango we, yimanika mu mugozi. Amaze gupfa bamuhamba mu mva ya se." 
2Samuel17:24 Bukeye, Dawudi agera i Mahanayimu, naho Abusalomu acyambuka Yorudani, we n’Abayisraheli bose." 
2Samuel17:25 Abusalomu yari yashyizeho Amasa kuba umugaba w’ingabo, mu mwanya wa Yowabu. Uwo Amasa yari umuhungu w’uwitwa Yitira w’Umuyismaheli, wari warashakanye na Abigayila, umukobwa wa Nahashi, mushiki wa Seruya, akaba nyina wa Yowabu." 
2Samuel17:26 Ubwo Abusalomu n’Abayisraheli baca ingando mu gihugu cya Gilihadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Dawudi akigera i Mahanayimu, Shobi mwene Nahashi w’i Raba y’Abahamoni, Makiri mwene Amiyeli w’i Lodebari na Barizilayi w’Umugilihadi utuye i Rogelimu," 
2Samuel17:28 bazana ibyo kuryamaho, imyambaro, imbehe zo kuriraho, ingano, ifu y’ingano, impeke z’ingano zikaranze, inkori, ndetse n’amahundo akaranze." 
2Samuel17:29 Bazana kandi ubuki, amavuta, intama n’inyama z’ibimasa, kugira ngo Dawudi n’imbaga yari kumwe na we babirye. Baribwiraga bati «Iyi mbaga yishwe n’inzara, umunaniro n’inyota byo mu butayu.»" 
2Samuel18:1 Nuko Dawudi abarura imbaga yari kumwe na we, maze ashyiraho abatware b’imitwe y’ingabo ibihumbi n’ab’iy’ijana." 
2Samuel18:2 Hanyuma Dawudi agabanya ingabo ze mu byiciro bitatu; icya mbere agiha Yowabu, icya kabiri agiha Abishayi mwene Seruya, murumuna wa Yowabu, naho icya gatatu agiha Itayi w’Umugiti. Umwami abwira imbaga, ati «Nanjye ubwanjye niteguye gutabarana namwe.»" 
2Samuel18:3 Baramubwira bati «Ntugomba gutabara, kuko twebwe turamutse duhunze ntibazatwitaho, n’iyo hapfa igice cya kabiri muri twe ntibatwitaho, naho wowe uhwanye n’abacu ibihumbi cumi. Ahubwo icyarutaho, ni uko waguma mu mugi ukaza kudutabara.»" 
2Samuel18:4 Umwami arababwira ati «Nzakora ibibashimisha.» Nuko ingabo zirasohoka, amagana n’ibihumbi, umwami yihagararira ku marembo." 
2Samuel18:5 Umwami ategeka Yowabu, Abishayi na Itayi, ati «Mumbabarire, mwitondere uwo mwana Abusalomu!» Imbaga yose yumva iryo tegeko umwami ahaye abatware bose, ku byerekeye Abusalomu." 
2Samuel18:6 Nuko ingabo zirasohoka zijya mu gasozi kurwana na Israheli, maze urugamba ruremera mu ishyamba ry’i Efurayimu." 
2Samuel18:7 Abagaragu ba Dawudi bahatsindira ingabo za Israheli; uwo munsi hapfa abantu benshi, bagera ku bihumbi makumyabiri." 
2Samuel18:8 Intambara ikwira mu gihugu cyose, uwo munsi n’ishyamba ubwaryo rihitana benshi kuruta abishwe n’inkota." 
2Samuel18:9 Hanyuma Abusalomu aza guhubirana n’abagaragu ba Dawudi. Ubwo Abusalomu akaba ku nyumbu ye, maze inyumbu yinjira mu nsi y’ingara z’amashami y’igiti cy’umushishi. Umutwe wa Abusalomu ufatirwa mu mashami y’umushishi, asigara anagana mu kirere hagati y’isi n’ijuru; naho inyumbu yari imuhetse irikomereza." 
2Samuel18:10 Umuntu aramubona, araza abwira Yowabu, ati «Nabonye Abusalomu anagana mu giti.»" 
2Samuel18:11 Yowabu asubiza ubimubwiye, ati «Koko se wamubonye! Ni kuki utamuteye ngo umutsinde aho ngaho? Nari kukugororera amasikeli icumi ya feza, ndetse nkaguha n’umukandara!»" 
2Samuel18:12 Uwo muntu abwira Yowabu, ati «N’aho wahita umpa amasikeli igihumbi ya feza, nta bwo nakoza ikiganza cyanjye ku mwana w’umwami, kuko twumvise umwami akwihanangiriza, kimwe na Abishayi na Itayi, agira ati ’Muririnde, hatagira ukora kuri uwo muhungu Abusalomu.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Na none kandi, iyo mba nakoze iryo shyano nkamwambura ubuzima, nta kintu na kimwe gisoba umwami, ndetse nawe ubwawe wajyaga kubyigurutsa.»" 
2Samuel18:14 Yowabu aravuga ati «Wikomeza kuntesha igihe.» Nuko afata mu kiganza cye ibihosho bitatu, maze abitera mu mutima wa Abusalomu, wari ukiri muzima yafashwe n’amashami y’igiti cy’umushishi." 
2Samuel18:15 Hanyuma abasore cumi batwara intwaro za Yowabu, bakikiza Abusalomu, baramusonga arapfa." 
2Samuel18:16 Yowabu avuza ihembe, maze ingabo zireka gukurikirana Abayisraheli, kuko Yowabu yari azigaruye." 
2Samuel18:17 Bafata Abusalomu, bamujugunya mu mwobo wari mu ishyamba, nuko barunda amabuye menshi hejuru ye. Israheli yose yari yahunze, buri wese asubira mu ihema rye." 
2Samuel18:18 Nyamara Abusalomu akiri muzima, yari yashingishije inkingi y’ibuye ho urwibutso mu kibaya cy’umwami, kuko yibwiraga ati «Nta muhungu mfite bazibukiraho izina ryanjye.» Nuko iyo nkingi ayita izina rye, ndetse na n’ubu bayita «Inkingi y’urwibutso rwa Abusalomu.»" 
2Samuel18:19 Bukeye, Ahimasi mwene Sadoki aravuga ati «Reka nirukanke mbwire Dawudi inkuru nziza, kuko Uhoraho yamurenganuye, akamukiza ikiganza cy’abanzi be.»" 
2Samuel18:20 Yowabu aramusubiza ati «Umwami nta bwo waba umuzaniye inkuru nziza! Uzajyayo undi munsi, ariko uyu munsi nyine ntiwaba uvuga inkuru nziza, kuko yaba ari iy’urupfu rw’umwana w’umwami.»" 
2Samuel18:21 Yowabu abwira Umukushi, ati «Jya kubwira umwami ibyo wabonye.» Umukushi apfukama imbere ya Yowabu, hanyuma agenda yiruka." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimasi mwene Sadoki yongera kubwira Yowabu, ati «Bibe uko byakabaye! Reka nanjye niruke, nkurikire Umukushi.» Yowabu aramubaza ati «Urirukira iki se, mwana wanjye, nibura ko atari inkuru nziza uzahemberwa?»" 
2Samuel18:23 Undi ati «Bibe uko byakabaye! Ndagiye.» Yowabu ati «Irukanka!» Ahimasi arirukanka anyura mu nzira y’ikibaya cya Yorudani, maze ahita kuri wa Mukushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Ubwo Dawudi akaba yicaye hagati y’amarembo yombi. Umurinzi ajya hejuru y’irembo ku rukuta, yubuye amaso abona umuntu wirukanka ari wenyine." 
2Samuel18:25 Umurinzi atera hejuru kugira ngo abimenyeshe umwami. Umwami aravuga ati «Ubwo ari wenyine, ni uko hari inkuru nziza aje kuvuga.» Igihe uwo muntu ageze bugufi," 
2Samuel18:26 umurinzi abona undi muntu na we wirukanka. Ubwo umurinzi wari uhagaze ku rukuta hejuru y’urugi atera hejuru ati «Dore undi muntu wirukanka ari wenyine.» Umwami aravuga ati «Uriya na we azanye inkuru nziza.» 
2Samuel18:27 Nuko umurinzi aravuga ati «Noneho menye imyirukire y’uwa mbere: ni iya Ahimasi mwene Sadoki.» Umwami aravuga ati «Ni umuntu mwiza! Azanye inkuru nziza cyane.» 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimasi atera hejuru abwira umwami, ati «Gira amahoro!» Nuko apfukama yubamye ku butaka imbere y’umwami, aravuga ati «Haragasingizwa Uhoraho, Imana yawe, wagukijije abari baguhagurukiye, mwami mutegetsi wanjye!»" 
2Samuel18:29 Umwami aramubaza ati «Byose se byagendekeye neza uwo musore Abusalomu?» Ahimasi aramusubiza ati «Narebaga abantu bacitsemo igikuba, igihe Yowabu yoherezaga umugaragu wawe, ariko rero sinamenye impamvu.»" 
2Samuel18:30 Umwami aramubwira ati «Igirayo, hagarara hariya.» Yigirayo maze aguma aho ngaho." 
2Samuel18:31 Nuko Umukushi arahagera, aravuga ati «Umwami, umutegetsi wanjye niyumve inkuru nziza: uyu munsi Uhoraho yakurenganuye, agukiza ibiganza by’abaguhagurukiye bose.»" 
2Samuel18:32 Umwami abaza Umukushi ati «Byose se byagendekeye neza n’uwo musore Abusalomu?» Umukushi aramusubiza ati «Abanzi b’umwami, umutegetsi wanjye, bose barakabona urwo uwo musore yabonye, kimwe n’abaguhagurukiye bose kugira ngo bakugirire nabi!»" 
2Samuel19:1 Nuko umwami abyumvise arasuhererwa, arazamuka ajya mu nzu yo hejuru y’irembo ararira. Yariraga avuga ati «Mwana wanjye Abusalomu! Mwana wanjye! Abusalomu mwana wanjye! Iyo njya gupfa mu mwanya wawe! Abusalomu mwana wanjye! Mwana wanjye!»" 
2Samuel19:2 Baza kubwira Yowabu, bati «Dore umwami ariho ararira kandi araganya, kubera Abusalomu.»" 
2Samuel19:3 Uwo munsi, umutsindo uhinduka amaganya mu mbaga yose, kuko bari bumvise bavuga ngo «Umwami yababajwe cyane n’umwana we.»" 
2Samuel19:4 Uwo munsi nyine, ingabo zose zigaruka rwihishwa mu mugi, boshye abakozwe n’isoni cyangwa abahunze urugamba." 
2Samuel19:5 Umwami yari yipfutse mu maso, agatera hejuru, ati «Mwana wanjye Abusalomu! Abusalomu mwana wanjye! Mwana wanjye!»" 
2Samuel19:6 Hanyuma Yowabu yinjira mu nzu asanga umwami, aramubwira ati «Uyu munsi wakojeje isoni uruhanga rw’abagaragu bawe, bagukirije ubuzima kimwe n’abahungu bawe n’abakobwa bawe, abagore bawe n’inshoreke zawe." 
2Samuel19:7 Ukunda abagutuka, ukanga abagukunda! Wagaragaje uyu munsi ko abatware bawe n’abagaragu bawe nta cyo bakumariye. None rero ndabimenye, iyo Abusalomu ajya kuba muzima, naho twe twese tukaba twapfuye uyu munsi, wari kubona ari byo bigutunganiye." 
2Samuel19:8 Ndagusabye rero, ngo uhaguruke ujye kugusha neza umutima w’abagaragu bawe, kuko nkurahiye Uhoraho, ko nutajyayo, nta n’umwe muri busigarane iri joro, kandi bizakuviramo ibyago bikomeye, bisumbye kure ibyo wabonye kuva mu buto bwawe kugeza uyu munsi.»" 
2Samuel19:9 Nuko umwami arahaguruka, araza yicara ku karubanda, maze babwira imbaga yose, bati «Dore umwami yicaye ku karubanda!» Nuko imbaga yose ikoranira imbere y’umwami. Abayisraheli bari bahunze, buri wese ajya mu mahema ye." 
2Samuel19:10 Mu miryango yose ya Israheli, impaka zari urudaca mu mbaga, bavuga bati «Umwami yadukuye mu biganza by’abanzi, aturokora ikiganza cy’Abafilisiti, none dore yahunze mu gihugu, ahunga Abusalomu." 
2Samuel19:11 Abusalomu na we twari twasize amavuta ngo atubere umwami, yaguye mu ntambara. Mutegereje iki noneho, kugira ngo mugarure Dawudi?»" 
2Samuel19:12 Ibyo Israheli yose yavugaga, bigera ku mwami. Nuko umwami Dawudi atuma kuri Sadoki na Abiyatari abaherezabitambo, ati «Mubwire abakuru b’imiryango ya Yuda muti ’Ni kuki mwaba abanyuma mu kugarura umwami iwe?" 
2Samuel19:13 Muri abavandimwe banjye, muri amagufa yanjye n’umubiri wanjye; ni kuki rero mwaba abanyuma mu kugarura umwami?’" 
2Samuel19:14 Muzabwire kandi Amasa, muti ’Nturi amagufa yanjye n’umubiri wanjye? Imana izankoreshe icyo ishatse cyose, niba udasimbuye Yowabu, ukaba umugaba w’ingabo zanjye iminsi yose.’»" 
2Samuel19:15 Nuko Dawudi ahindura atyo ibitekerezo by’Abayuda bose bahuza umugambi. Batuma ku mwami, bati «Garuka, wowe n’abagaragu bawe bose!»" 
2Samuel19:16 Bukeye, umwami arahaguruka agera kuri Yorudani. Abayuda bari baje i Giligali gusanganira umwami Dawudi, kugira ngo bamwambutse Yorudani." 
2Samuel19:17 Shimeyi mwene Gera, Umubenyamini w’i Bahurimu, yihutira kumanukana n’Abayuda gusanganira umwami Dawudi." 
2Samuel19:18 Yari kumwe n’Ababenyamini igihumbi, na Siba umunyagikari wo mu rugo rwa Sawuli, abahungu be cumi na batanu, n’abagaragu be makumyabiri. Bihutiraga kugera kuri Yorudani gusanganira umwami." 
2Samuel19:19 Nuko bihatira gutegura byose kugira ngo bambutse abo mu nzu y’umwami, kandi ngo bamukorere icyo ashaka. Shimeyi mwene Gera, aherako yijugunya imbere y’umwami, igihe yambukaga Yorudani," 
2Samuel19:20 maze abwira umwami, ati «Mwami, mutegetsi wanjye, ntumbareho icyaha. Ntiwibuke icyaha umugaragu wawe yakoze, umunsi umwami umutegetsi wanjye ava i Yeruzalemu. Umwami ntabigumane mu mutima we," 
2Samuel19:21 kuko jyewe umugaragu wawe nzi ko nacumuye. Ariko uyu munsi, mbaye uwa mbere mu muryango wa Yozefu wose umanutse gusanganira umwami, umutegetsi wanjye.»" 
2Samuel19:22 Abishayi mwene Seruya arahaguruka maze aravuga ati «Iyo se yaba impamvu yatuma batica Shimeyi, kandi yaravumye uwo Uhoraho yasize amavuta?»" 
2Samuel19:23 Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Ndapfa iki namwe, bene Seruya, cyatuma uyu munsi mumpora icyo ndi bukore? Uyu munsi se hari umuntu ukwiye kwicwa muri Israheli? Ubu se kandi uyu munsi, simenye neza ko ndi umwami wa Israheli?»" 
2Samuel19:24 Umwami abwira Shimeyi, ati «Humura, nturi bwicwe.» Nuko agerekaho n’indahiro." 
2Samuel19:25 Mefibosheti mwene Sawuli aramanuka, ajya gusanganira umwami. Ntiyari yigeze yisukura, habe no gukaraba ibirenge cyangwa se kwiyogoshesha ubwanwa, ndetse nta n’ubwo yari yarameshe n’imyambaro ye, kuva umwami yagenda kugeza uwo munsi agarutseho ari mutaraga." 
2Samuel19:26 Ngo agere i Yeruzalemu aje gusanganira umwami, umwami aramubaza ati «Mefibosheti, ni iki cyakubujije kujyana nanjye?»" 
2Samuel19:27 Aramusubiza ati «Mwami mutegetsi wanjye, umugaragu wanjye yarambeshye; mu by’ukuri nari namubwiye nti ’Untegurire indogobe yanjye, kugira ngo nzamuke njyane n’umwami’, kuko jyewe umugaragu wawe ndi ikimuga." 
2Samuel19:28 Rwose umugaragu wanjye yambeshyeye ku mwami, umutegetsi wanjye! Ariko rero, mwami mutegetsi wanjye, uri nk’umumalayika w’Imana, ukore icyo ubona kigutunganiye." 
2Samuel19:29 N’ubusanzwe, abo mu muryango wa data bose babarwaga mu bagomba gutsembwa n’umwami umutegetsi wanjye, nyamara wakiriye umugaragu wawe mu basangira nawe ku meza yawe. Naba ngifite kindi ki se nishingikirijeho? Ikindi nakongera gusaba umwami se kandi ni iki?»" 
2Samuel19:30 Umwami aramubwira ati «Ni kuki ukomeza kuvuga ibyo byose? Ndabitegetse: wowe na Siba muzagabana isambu.» 
2Samuel19:31 Mefibosheti abwira umwami, ati «N’iyo yayijyana yose, ubwo umwami umutegetsi wanjye agarutse iwe amahoro!»" 
2Samuel19:32 Barizilayi w’Umugilihadi yari yaramanutse i Rogelimu, yambukana n’umwami Yorudani, amusezereraho hafi ya Yorudani." 
2Samuel19:33 Barizilayi uwo yari ashaje cyane, afite imyaka mirongo inani. Ni we kandi watangaga ibitunga umwami, ubwo yari i Mahanayimu, kuko yari umuntu ukomeye cyane." 
2Samuel19:34 Umwami abwira Barizilayi, ati «Wowe komeza tujyane, nzagutunga uri bugufi yanjye i Yeruzalemu.»" 
2Samuel19:35 Ariko Barizilayi abwira umwami, ati «Ubu se nshigaje imyaka ingahe yo kubaho, kugira ngo nzamukane n’umwami i Yeruzalemu?" 
2Samuel19:36 Kugeza uyu munsi, mfite imyaka mirongo inani. Ubu se nashobora gutandukanya ikiri cyiza n’ikiri kibi? Umugaragu wawe se aracyaryoherwa n’icyo arya cyangwa anywa? Ndacyashobora se kumva amajwi y’abaririmbyi n’abaririmbyikazi? Ni kuki rero umugaragu wawe yaba akirushya umwami, umutegetsi wanjye?" 
2Samuel19:37 Ubwabyo birahagije, niba umugaragu wawe abashije kwambukana n’umwami Yorudani. Ariko se kandi ni iki cyatuma umwami ampa ingororano ingana ityo?" 
2Samuel19:38 Ahubwo ndakwinginze ngo ureke umugaragu wawe asubireyo, kugira ngo nsazire mu mugi wanjye hafi y’imva ya data na mama. Ariko kandi ng’uyu Kimuhamu umugaragu wawe, akomeze kujyana n’umwami, umutegetsi wanjye, kandi uzamukoreshe icyo ushaka cyose.»" 
2Samuel19:39 Umwami aramusubiza ati «Kimuhamu nakomeze kujyana nanjye, kandi nzamukorera icyo ushaka, n’icyo uzansaba cyose nzakigukorera.»" 
2Samuel19:40 Imbaga yose yambuka Yorudani, n’umwami arambuka. Hanyuma umwami ahobera Barizilayi kandi amusabira umugisha. Nuko undi asubira iwe" 
2Samuel19:41 Umwami arakomeza agana i Giligali, na Kimuhamu ajyana na we. Imbaga yose y’Abayuda, ndetse n’icya kabiri cy’Abayisraheli, baramuherekeza." 
2Samuel19:42 Nuko Abayisraheli begera umwami, baramubaza bati «Ni kuki abavandimwe bacu b’Abayuda bakwihereranye, kugira ngo bakwambutse Yorudani n’urugo rwawe rwose, hamwe n’abantu bawe bose?»" 
2Samuel19:43 Abayuda bose basubiza Abayisraheli, bati «Ni uko umwami ari mwene wacu. Ni kuki ibyo byabababaza? Hari icyo twariye giturutse ku mwami? Cyangwa se hari ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose yaba yaduhaye?»" 
2Samuel19:44 Abayisraheli basubiza Abayuda, bati «Dukubye incuro cumi uburenganzira mwe mufite ku mwami, ndetse yewe no kuri Dawudi. Ni kuki mutatwitayeho? Si twe twavuze mbere ibyo kugarura umwami?» Ariko Abayuda barusha Abayisraheli gushega." 
2Samuel20:1 Aho hakaba umuntu w’igipfamutima witwa Sheba mwene Bikuri, Umubenyamini. Avuza ihembe, maze aravuga ati «Nta mugabane dufitanye na Dawudi, nta n’umurage dusangiye na mwene Yese! Bayisraheli mwese, buri muntu najye mu mahema ye!»" 
2Samuel20:2 Abayisraheli bose barazamuka, bareka Dawudi kugira ngo bakurikire Sheba, mwene Bikuri. Ariko Abayuda basigarana n’umwami wabo, baramuherekeza kuva kuri Yorudani kugera i Yeruzalemu." 
2Samuel20:3 Dawudi ataha iwe i Yeruzalemu. Umwami afata ba bagore cumi b’inshoreke yari yasize ku rugo, maze abashyira mu nzu igenzurwa. Akabaha ibibatunga, ariko ntiyongera kubana na bo. Nuko baguma aho nk’imfungwa kugeza ku munsi w’urupfu rwabo; bameze nk’abapfakazi kandi umugabo akiriho." 
2Samuel20:4 Bukeye, umwami abwira Amasa, ati «Mpamagariza Abayuda bose, bazakwitabe mbere y’iminsi itatu, kandi nawe uzaba uhari.»" 
2Samuel20:5 Amasa ajya guhamagara Abayuda, ariko arenza igihe Dawudi yari yategetse." 
2Samuel20:6 Dawudi abwira Abishayi, ati «Noneho Sheba, mwene Bikuri, agiye kutumerera nabi kurusha Abusalomu. Fata abagaragu ba shobuja, ugende ukurikire Sheba, atavaho ashyikira imigi izitiwe, maze akaducika.»" 
2Samuel20:7 Nuko Abishayi n’ingabo za Yowabu, Abakereti, Abapeleti, n’abandi bose bamenyereye kurwana, bava i Yeruzalemu bakurikiye Sheba, mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:8 Bageze ku ibuye rinini riri i Gibewoni, ni bwo Amasa yaje arahabasanga. Yowabu yari yambaye imyambaro ye y’intambara, akenyeje umukandara uriho inkota ifashe ku itako, iri mu rwubati. Igihe atambutse, inkota iragwa." 
2Samuel20:9 Yowabu abwira Amasa, ati «Uraho neza se, muvandimwe?» Ikiganza cy’iburyo cya Yowabu gifata mu bwanwa bwa Amasa, kugira ngo amuhobere." 
2Samuel20:10 Ariko Amasa ntiyari yitaye ku nkota yari mu kiganza cya Yowabu, ni ko kuyimutera mu nda, amara ye adendeza ku butaka. Ahita apfa ako kanya, Yowabu atongeye kumutera bwa kabiri. Yowabu na murumuna we Abishayi bakomeza gukurikira Sheba, mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:11 Umwe mu ngabo za Yowabu yari yasigaye iruhande rw’umurambo wa Amasa. Uwo musore yaravugaga ati «Uri uwa Yowabu kandi akaba uwa Dawudi, nakurikire Yowabu!»" 
2Samuel20:12 Nyamara, Amasa yari yigaraguye mu maraso ye aho mu nzira, uwo muntu abona ko abahanyuraga bose bahakerererwa, akurura umurambo, awuvana mu nzira awushyira mu gisambu, maze aworosa umwenda, kubera ko abahahitaga bose bahahagararaga." 
2Samuel20:13 Amaze kuwuvana mu nzira, abahanyuraga bose bakurikira Yowabu, bajya gushaka Sheba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:14 Sheba azenguruka inzu za Israheli zose, kugera Abeli‐Betimaka, maze Ababikuri bose barakorana, baramukurikira." 
2Samuel20:15 Yowabu aza kugota Sheba muri Abeli‐Betimaka. Nuko barunda ikirundo cy’igitaka ku rukuta rw’umugi. Imbaga yose yari kumwe na Yowabu, icukura inkike kugira ngo ihirime." 
2Samuel20:16 Umugore w’umunyabwenge wari mu mugi atera hejuru, ati «Nimwumve! Nimwumve! Ndabinginze ngo mumbwirire Yowabu, muti ’Ngwino hano ngire icyo nkubwira.’»" 
2Samuel20:17 Yowabu aramwegera, umugore aramubaza ati «Mbese ni wowe Yowabu?» Aramusubiza ati «Ni jyewe.» Nuko aramubwira ati «Tega amatwi amagambo y’umuja wawe.» Undi aramusubiza ati «Ndakumva.»" 
2Samuel20:18 Umugore arakomeza ati «Kera iyo habaga impaka z’urudaca, hari umugenzo wo kuvuga ngo ’Bajye kugisha inama muri Abeli‐Betimaka, ubwo bikaba birangiye.’" 
2Samuel20:19 Uyu mugi wacu si wo munyamahoro kandi w’indahemuka mu yindi yose ya Israheli? Naho wowe, urashaka kuwurimbura, kandi ari umurwa mukuru muri Israheli! Urashakira iki koreka umurage w’Uhoraho?»" 
2Samuel20:20 Yowabu aramusubiza ati «Reka, ntibikambeho! Sinshaka koreka cyangwa kurimbura!" 
2Samuel20:21 Nta bwo ari ko bimeze, ahubwo umugabo wo mu misozi y’i Efurayimu witwa Sheba mwene Bikuri, yagomeye umwami Dawudi. Nimumutange wenyine, maze ndeke umugi wanyu.» Umugore abwira Yowabu, ati «Ibyo na byo, tugiye kukujugunyira umutwe we, tuwunyujije hejuru y’inkike.»" 
2Samuel20:22 Uwo mugore abwira imbaga yose inama yuje ubwenge, nuko batema umutwe wa Sheba mwene Bikuri, maze bawujugunyira Yowabu. Yowabu aherako avuza ihembe, bareka umugi baranyanyagira buri wese ataha mu mahema ye. Yowabu we, agaruka i Yeruzalemu bugufi y’umwami." 
2Samuel20:23 Yowabu yategekaga ingabo zose za Dawudi. Benayahu, mwene Yehoyada, agategeka Abakereti n’Abapeleti." 
2Samuel20:24 Adoramu ni we wari ushinzwe imirimo rusange. Yehoshafati, mwene Ahiludi, akaba umunyamabanga w’umwami," 
2Samuel20:25 Shiya yari umwanditsi; Sadoki na Abiyatari bakaba abaherezabitambo. 
2Samuel20:26 Hakaba na Ira w’i Yayiri, wari umuherezabitambo wa Dawudi." 
2Samuel21:1 Ku ngoma ya Dawudi hatera inzara, imara imyaka itatu ikurikiranye. Dawudi abaza Uhoraho, maze Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Ibyo bitewe na Sawuli n’umuryango we b’abicanyi, kubera ko bishe Abagibewoni.»" 
2Samuel21:2 Umwami ahamagaza Abagibewoni, arabibabwira. Abagibewoni rero nta bwo bari abo mu miryango ya Israheli, ahubwo bari Abahemori bacitse ku icumu, kandi bari baragiranye isezerano n’Abayisraheli, usibye ko Sawuli yashatse kubatsemba abitewe n’ishyaka yari afitiye Abayisraheli n’Abayuda." 
2Samuel21:3 Dawudi abaza Abagibewoni, ati «Nabagenzereza nte, cyangwa se ni ku buhe buryo nabigororaho, kugira ngo muvuge neza umurage w’Uhoraho?»" 
2Samuel21:4 Abagibewoni baramusubiza bati «Icyo dushaka kuri Sawuli n’umuryango we, si ifeza cyangwa zahabu, kandi ntidushaka no kugira uwo twica muri Israheli.» Dawudi aravuga ati «Icyo mumbwira cyose nzakibakorera.»" 
2Samuel21:5 Baramubwira bati «Uwo muntu washatse kuturimbura, kandi akibwira ko yadutsembye mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli," 
2Samuel21:6 nimuduhe barindwi mu bamukomokaho, maze tubashwanyagurize imbere y’Uhoraho i Gibeya ya Sawuli, ku musozi w’Uhoraho.» Umwami aravuga ati «Nzababaha.»" 
2Samuel21:7 Ariko umwami arokora Mefibosheti, umuhungu wa Yonatani mwene Sawuli, kuko yari yaragiranye na Yonatani isezerano imbere y’Uhoraho." 
2Samuel21:8 Nuko umwami afata abahungu babiri ba Risipa, umukobwa wa Aya, yari yarabyaranye na Sawuli, ari bo Arimoni na Mefibosheti, afata n’abahungu batanu ba Meraba, umukobwa wa Sawuli, yari yarabyaranye na Adiriyeli mwene Barizilayi w’i Mehola;" 
2Samuel21:9 abo bose abagabiza Abagibewoni, maze babashwanyaguriza ku musozi imbere y’Uhoraho, uko ari barindwi bapfira icyarimwe. Babishe mu minsi ya mbere y’isarura, mu ntangiriro y’isarura ry’ingano." 
2Samuel21:10 Risipa, umukobwa wa Aya, afata ikigunira acyisasira ku rutare, kuva mu ntangiriro y’isarura kugeza ubwo imvura ihinduye ikagwa kuri iyo mirambo. Ku manywa ntiyarekaga inyoni zo mu kirere zibarya, haba n’inyamaswa zo mu gasozi nijoro." 
2Samuel21:11 Bukeye, babwira Dawudi ibyo Risipa, umukobwa wa Aya, inshoreke ya Sawuli, yakoze." 
2Samuel21:12 Dawudi aherako ajya kuzana amagufa ya Sawuli n’aya Yonatani umuhungu we; ayavana mu bantu b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi bari barayanyaze ku mbuga y’i Betishani, aho Abafilisiti babamanitse, umunsi biciye Sawuli i Gilibowa." 
2Samuel21:13 Avanayo amagufa ya Sawuli n’ay’umuhungu we Yonatani, maze bayakoranyiriza hamwe n’amagufa y’abo barindwi bari barashwanyagujwe." 
2Samuel21:14 Amagufa ya Sawuli, ay’umuhungu we Yonatani, n’ay’abo barindwi bayahamba i Sela mu gihugu cya Benyamini, mu mva ya Kishi se wa Sawuli. Barangiza batyo ibyategetswe n’umwami byose, hanyuma Imana ibona kumerera neza igihugu." 
2Samuel21:15 Bukeye, Abafilisiti bongera gushyamirana n’Abayisraheli. Dawudi n’ingabo ze baramanuka bajya kurwana n’Abafilisiti, bakirwana, Dawudi yumva ananiwe." 
2Samuel21:16 Ishibo‐Benobu, wari uwo muri bene Rafa, ni bwo ashatse kwica Dawudi. Uwo mugabo yari afite igihosho gifite uburemere nk’ubw’amasikeli magana atatu y’umuringa, kandi yari yambaye inkota nshya." 
2Samuel21:17 Ariko Abishayi mwene Seruya arahagoboka, maze atera Umufilisiti aramwica. Ni bwo rero ingabo za Dawudi zimwinginze ziti «Ntuzongere gutabarana natwe, hato utazazimya itara rya Israheli!»" 
2Samuel21:18 Nyuma y’ibyo, hongera kuba intambara ku Bafilisiti i Goba. Ni bwo rero Sibekayi w’i Husha yishe Safu wo muri bene Rafa." 
2Samuel21:19 Bukeye, i Goba hongera kubera intambara ku Bafilisiti. Elihanani mwene Yayiri w’i Betelehemu yica Goliyati w’i Gati, wari ufite icumu ryanganaga n’igiti cy’umuboshyi w’imyenda." 
2Samuel21:20 Hongera kuba indi ntambara i Gati. Hakaba umurwanyi ufite intoki esheshatu ku kiganza n’amano atandatu ku kirenge, byose hamwe bikaba makumyabiri na bine, na we akaba akomoka kuri bene Rafa." 
2Samuel21:21 Ashaka gushotora Israheli, maze Yehonatani mwene Shimeya, umuvandimwe wa Dawudi, aramwica." 
2Samuel21:22 Abo bose uko ari bane, bari bene Rafa w’i Gati, nuko bose bicwa na Dawudi n’ingabo ze." 
2Samuel22:1 Dawudi aririmbira Uhoraho indirimbo, umunsi Uhoraho amurokoye ikiganza cy’abanzi be bose n’icya Sawuli." 
2Samuel22:2 Aravuga ati «Uhoraho ni urutare rwanjye, ni we mbaraga zanjye n’Umukiza wanjye." 
2Samuel22:3 Imana ni yo rutare rwanjye n’ingabo inkingira, intwaro yanjye n’inkingi yanjye; ni yo buhungiro bwanjye n’Umukiza wanjye, ni na yo inkiza abanyamaboko." 
2Samuel22:4 Uhoraho nahimbazwe! Naramutakambiye, maze ntsinda abanzi banjye." 
2Samuel22:5 Imyuzure y’urupfu yarantangatanze, n’ibidendezi bya Beliyali birangota." 
2Samuel22:6 Ingoyi z’ikuzimu zarangose, imitego y’urupfu intanga imbere." 
2Samuel22:7 Igihe nari mu makuba niyambaje Uhoraho, ntakambira Imana yanjye; mu Ngoro yayo yumvise ijwi ryanjye, ugutakamba kwanjye kugera mu matwi yayo." 
2Samuel22:8 Nuko isi iratengurwa, ihinda umushyitsi, imfatiro z’ijuru ziranyeganyega, maze byose bitigiswa n’uburakari bwayo." 
2Samuel22:9 Mu mazuru yayo hacucumuka umwotsi, umuriro utwika usohoka mu munwa wayo, n’amakara agurumana." 
2Samuel22:10 Yunamisha ijuru maze iramanuka, n’igicu kibudika mu nsi y’ibirenge byayo." 
2Samuel22:11 Iza ihetswe n’umukerubimu, igurukira hejuru y’amababa y’umuyaga." 
2Samuel22:12 Umwijima iwugira inturo yayo, ikikizwa n’ikirundo cy’amazi n’ibihu hejuru y’ibindi." 
2Samuel22:13 Urumuri rutangaje ruyijya imbere, n’amakara aragurumana." 
2Samuel22:14 Uhoraho ahindisha inkuba mu ijuru, Umusumbabyose yumvikanisha ijwi rye." 
2Samuel22:15 Arasa imyambi ye atatanya ibicu, yohereza imirabyo irabimenesha." 
2Samuel22:16 Ubutaka bwo hasi mu nyanja buraboneka, imfatiro z’isi ziragaragara, ku bw’umuhindagano w’Uhoraho, ku bw’inkubi y’umwuka usohoka mu mazuru ye." 
2Samuel22:17 Aho ari mu ijuru arambura ukuboko aramfata, ankura rwagati mu mazi magari." 
2Samuel22:18 Andokora umwanzi wanjye w’umunyamaboko, n’abampagurukiye kuko bandusha imbaraga." 
2Samuel22:19 Barantangatanze ku munsi w’amakuba yanjye, ariko Uhoraho ambera urwishingikirizo." 
2Samuel22:20 Yankuye mu makuba anshyira mu bwisanzure, yarandokoye kuko ankunda." 
2Samuel22:21 Uhoraho yanyitayeho akurikije ubutungane bwanjye, n’ubudacumura bw’ibiganza byanjye," 
2Samuel22:22 kuko natunganyije inzira z’Uhoraho, kandi singarambire Imana yanjye." 
2Samuel22:23 Amatangazo yahozeho mbere yanjye, n’amategeko yayo sinyavirire;" 
2Samuel22:24 nabanaga na yo ntunganye, nirinze gukora icyaha icyo ari cyo cyose." 
2Samuel22:25 Uhoraho yanyituye akurikije ubutungane bwanjye n’ubudahemuka bwanjye yiboneye n’amaso ye. 
2Samuel22:26 Ku badahemuka, uri indahemuka, naho ku ntwari ukaba indatsimburwa." 
2Samuel22:27 Ku ndacumura, uri indacumura, naho ku bagome, ugahana wihanukiriye." 
2Samuel22:28 Umuryango w’insuzugurwa uwuha umutsindo, ariko abikuza, indoro yawe ikabacisha bugufi." 
2Samuel22:29 Ni wowe tara ryanjye, Uhoraho; Uhoraho, ni we umurikira umwijima wanjye," 
2Samuel22:30 Iyo ndi kumwe nawe mbasha gutambuka imikokwe y’abanzi, iyo ndi kumwe n’Imana yanjye, nsimbuka inkike zabo." 
2Samuel22:31 Inzira z’iyi Mana ziraboneye; Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryarigaragaje. Ni ingabo ikingira abamufiteho ubuhungiro. 
2Samuel22:32 Ni nde Mana itari wowe? Ni nde rutare nk’Imana yacu? 
2Samuel22:33 Imana ni umwihariko wanjye, kandi inyuza mu nzira iboneye." 
2Samuel22:34 Ihindura ibirenge byanjye nk’iby’imparakazi, ikampagarika ku mpinga z’imisozi;" 
2Samuel22:35 yigisha ibiganza byanjye intambara, n’amaboko yanjye gufora umuheto w’umuringa." 
2Samuel22:36 Wampaye ingabo yawe ho agakiza, n’ubugwaneza bwawe bukankomeza;" 
2Samuel22:37 intambwe zanjye wazaguriye inzira, ibirenge byanjye ubirinda gutsitara." 
2Samuel22:38 Nakurikiranye abanzi banjye, ndabarimbura, sinagaruka ntamaze kubatsemba;" 
2Samuel22:39 narabakubise ntibabasha kweguka, baguye mu nsi y’ibirenge byanjye." 
2Samuel22:40 Wankenyeje imbaraga zo kurwana, abahagurukiye kuntera, urabancogoreza;" 
2Samuel22:41 watumye abanzi banjye bantera ibitugu, kugira ngo ndimbure abampagurukiye." 
2Samuel22:42 Baratakambye, ariko ntihagira ubatabara, batakira Uhoraho, ariko ntiyabasubiza;" 
2Samuel22:43 nabahinduye umukungugu, ndabanyukanyuka nk’urwondo mu nzira." 
2Samuel22:44 Wandokoye ukwivumbagatanya k’umuryango wanjye, ungira umutware w’amahanga; ihanga ntigeze no kumenya rirankorera." 
2Samuel22:45 Abanyamahanga baranyobotse, mvuga ijambo rimwe bakanyumvira;" 
2Samuel22:46 abanyamahanga baracogoye, basohoka mu ngo zabo badagadwa." 
2Samuel22:47 Himbazwa Uhoraho! Urutare rwanjye nirusingizwe! Nihatsinde Imana, yo rutare rw’agakiza kanjye!" 
2Samuel22:48 Iyi Mana yamporeye abanzi banjye, yatumye abanyamahanga, bampfukamira." 
2Samuel22:49 Wankijije abanzi banjye, umpa guhashya abampagurukiye, n’abanyamaboko urabangobotora." 
2Samuel22:50 Ni cyo gituma ngushimira, Uhoraho, rwagati mu mahanga, kandi ndaririmba ikuzo ry’izina ryawe:" 
2Samuel22:51 Wowe uha umwami wawe imitsindo ikomeye, ntuhemukire uwo wasize amavuta, ari we Dawudi n’urubyaro rwe iteka ryose.»" 
2Samuel23:1 Aya ni yo magambo ya nyuma ya Dawudi: «Uwo ni Dawudi mwene Yese ubivuze, uwo ni umugabo w’igikomangoma ubivuze, uwasizwe amavuta n’Imana ya Yakobo, uwo indirimbo za Israheli zikunda gusingiza." 
2Samuel23:2 Umwuka w’Uhoraho wamvugiyemo, n’ijambo rye riri ku rurimi rwanjye." 
2Samuel23:3 Imana ya Israheli yarabivuze, Urutare rwa Israheli yarabimbwiye: Ugenga amahanga akurikije ubutabera, agategeka mu gitinyiro cy’Imana." 
2Samuel23:4 Asa n’umuseke ukebye mu gitondo izuba rirashe, agasa n’igitondo kitagira igicu ku muhituko w’imvura, ubwo ibyatsi bibengeranishwa n’urumuri." 
2Samuel23:5 Inzu yanjye se, si ko imeze ku Mana, kuko yanyemereye isezerano ritazashira, ritunganye muri byose kandi ryubahirizwa? Imitsindo yanjye, n’ibinyura umutima byose, si yo mbikesha?" 
2Samuel23:6 Ariko abagome bose, bo bameze nk’amahwa bajugunye; hari uwatinyuka se kuyafata n’intoki?" 
2Samuel23:7 Ahubwo bayigirishayo umuhunda w’icumu n’uruti rwaryo, akazatwikwa, akazakongokera aho ngaho.»" 
2Samuel23:8 Aya ni yo mazina y’Intwari mu ngabo za Dawudi: Ishibehali, Umuhakemoni, wategekaga abitwa «Intwari eshatu». Umunsi umwe ni we wateye icumu abantu magana inani icyarimwe." 
2Samuel23:9 Akurikirwa na Eleyazari mwene Dodo, w’i Ahoti. Yari umwe muri za Ntwari eshatu, kandi yari kumwe na Dawudi i Pasi‐Damimu ubwo bashotoraga Abafilisiti bari bateraniye kurwana. Abayisraheli barahunze," 
2Samuel23:10 ariko we arakomeza yica Abafilisiti, kugeza ubwo ikiganza cye kinanirwa cyumirana n’inkota, maze uwo munsi Uhoraho amuha ugutsinda gukomeye. Imbaga yose iramugarukira, ariko ari ukugira ngo bitwarire iminyago gusa." 
2Samuel23:11 Ukurikiyeho ni Shama, mwene Aga w’Umuharari. Abafilisiti bari bibumbiye hamwe, aho hantu hakaba umurima urimo inkori, maze imbaga ihunga Abafilisiti." 
2Samuel23:12 Ariko we ahagarara hagati mu murima, arawigarurira, yica Abafilisiti, maze Uhoraho amuha ugutsinda gukomeye." 
2Samuel23:13 Igihe cy’isarura, batatu bo mu bitwa «Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena», baramanuka basanga Dawudi mu buvumo bw’i Adulamu. Ingabo z’Abafilisiti zikaba zaciye ingando mu Kibaya cy’Abarefayimu." 
2Samuel23:14 Icyo gihe Dawudi yari mu buhungiro, naho ingabo z’Abafilisiti ziri i Betelehemu." 
2Samuel23:15 Dawudi avuga icyifuzo cye, agira ati «Ni nde uzansomya ku mazi y’iriba riri ku irembo ry’i Betelehemu?»" 
2Samuel23:16 Maze abo bagabo batatu b’intwari, banyura mu ngando y’Abafilisiti barwana, bavoma amazi mu iriba riri hafi y’irembo ry’i Betelehemu, bayazanira Dawudi. We ariko yanga kuyanywa, ahubwo ayanyanyagiza imbere y’Uhoraho." 
2Samuel23:17 Aravuga ati «Uhoraho arandinde gukora kuri aya mazi! Aya ni amaraso y’abantu bahaze amagara yabo, bakajya hariya hantu!» Nuko yanga kuyanywa. Ibyo ni byo byakozwe na ba bagabo b’intwari uko ari batatu." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishayi, murumuna wa Yowabu, mwene Seruya, yategekaga abitwa «Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena».» Yakaraze icumu rye yica abantu magana atatu icyarimwe, bituma aba ikirangirire muri za Ntwari mirongo itatu." 
2Samuel23:19 Ikuzo rye ryasumbaga iry’abandi bose muri ba Mirongo Itatu, nyamara ntiyigeze asingira Intwari eshatu za mbere." 
2Samuel23:20 Benayahu mwene Yehoyada, umugabo w’intwari, wabarirwaga mu bakoze ibikorwa bikomeye, akaba akomoka i Kabuseli. Ni we wishe abahungu bombi ba Ariyeli Umumowabu; kandi aramanuka yica intare yari mu mwobo igihe cy’urubura." 
2Samuel23:21 Ni we kandi wishe Umunyamisiri w’intwari. Uwo Munyamisiri yari afite icumu mu ntoki, nuko Benayahu aramanuka amusanga yitwaje inkoni, yambura uwo Munyamisiri icumu rye, ararimwicisha." 
2Samuel23:22 Ngibyo ibyakozwe na Benayahu mwene Yehoyada, maze aba ikirangirire muri Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena." 
2Samuel23:23 Yarubashywe kurusha Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena, ariko ntiyashyikira Intwari eshatu za mbere. Maze Dawudi amugira umutware w’abamurindaga." 
2Samuel23:24 Asaheli, murumuna wa Yowabu, na we yabarirwaga muri Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena, kimwe na Elihanani mwene Dodo w’i Betelehemu." 
2Samuel23:25 Babarirwagamo kandi Shama na Elika b’i Harodi; 
2Samuel23:26 Helesi w’i Paliti, Ira mwene Ikeshi w’i Tekowa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiyezeri w’i Anatoti, Mebunayi w’i Husha," 
2Samuel23:28 Salumoni w’i Aho, Maharayi w’i Netofa," 
2Samuel23:29 Helebu mwene Bana w’i Netofa, Itayi mwene Ribayi w’i Gibeya mu Babenyamini," 
2Samuel23:30 Benayahu w’i Pireyatoni, Hidayi wo ku bidendezi by’i Gashi," 
2Samuel23:31 Abi‐Aluboni w’i Aruba, Azimaweti w’i Bahurimu," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliyahiba w’i Shaluboni na Yasheni w’i Gimizo. 
2Samuel23:33 Barimo kandi Yehonatani mwene Shama w’i Harari, Ahiyamu mwene Sharari w’i Arari," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti mwene Ahasibayi w’i Betimaka, Eliyamu mwene Ahitofeli w’i Gilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Hesirayi w’i Karumeli, Parayi w’i Arabi," 
2Samuel23:36 Yigali mwene Natani w’i Soba, Bani w’i Gadi," 
2Samuel23:37 Seleki w’Umuhamoni, Naharayi w’i Beroti, watwaraga intwaro za Yowabu mwene Seruya," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira w’i Yatiri, Garebu w’i Yatiri" 
2Samuel23:39 na Uriya w’Umuhiti. Bose bakaba mirongo itatu na barindwi. 
2Samuel24:1 Uhoraho yongera kurakarira Abayisraheli, maze abateza Dawudi, ati «Genda ubarure Israheli na Yuda.»" 
2Samuel24:2 Umwami abwira Yowabu, umugaba w’ingabo wari kumwe na we, ati «Uzenguruke imiryango yose ya Israheli, uhereye i Dani ukageza i Berisheba, maze ubarure imbaga, kugira ngo menye umubare wayo.»" 
2Samuel24:3 Yowabu abwira umwami, ati «Uhoraho, Imana yawe, agwize imbaga incuro ijana, kandi umwami umutegetsi wanjye abyirebera. Ariko se ni mpamvu ki umwami umutegetsi wanjye ashaka gukora ikintu nk’icyo?»" 
2Samuel24:4 Ariko biba iby’ubusa, itegeko ry’umwami riganza Yowabu n’abatware b’ingabo, nuko Yowabu ahagurukana n’abatware b’ingabo z’umwami, bajya kubarura imbaga ya Israheli." 
2Samuel24:5 Bambuka Yorudani, bahera i Aroweri no kuva ku mugi uri hepfo, iruhande rw’amasumo, hanyuma berekeza mu Bagadi n’i Yazeri." 
2Samuel24:6 Bagera muri Gilihadi no mu gihugu cy’Abahiti n’i Dani, maze barakomeza bagera i Sidoni." 
2Samuel24:7 Bukeye, binjira muri Tiri no mu migi yose y’Abahivi n’Abakanahani. Hanyuma bajya i Negevu ya Yuda, i Berisheba." 
2Samuel24:8 Bazenguruka batyo igihugu cyose, bagera i Yeruzalemu nyuma y’amezi icyenda n’iminsi makumyabiri." 
2Samuel24:9 Yowabu ashyikiriza umwami imibare y’ibarura ry’imbaga: Israheli yarimo abagabo b’intwari ibihumbi magana umunani bashobora gutwara inkota, naho Yuda harimo abagabo ibihumbi magana atanu." 
2Samuel24:10 Dawudi ngo amare kubarura imbaga, yumva umutima we udiha. Ni ko kubwira Uhoraho, ati «Ni icyaha gikomeye nakoze. None rero, Uhoraho, ndakwinginze ngo wirengagize icyaha cy’umugaragu wawe, kuko nakoze nk’umusazi.»" 
2Samuel24:11 Ngo bucye mu gitondo Dawudi abyutse, Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryigaragariza umuhanuzi Gadi, umushishozi wa Dawudi, muri aya magambo:" 
2Samuel24:12 «Genda ubwire Dawudi, uti ’Dore uko Uhoraho avuze: Ngushyize imbere ibihano bitatu. Hitamo kimwe muri byo, maze nzabe ari cyo nguhanisha.’»" 
2Samuel24:13 Gadi rero ajya kwa Dawudi, arabimumenyesha. Aramubwira ati «Ari uguterwa n’inzara imyaka itatu mu gihugu cyawe, ari ukumara amezi atatu uhunga umwanzi waguhagurukiye, cyangwa se iminsi itatu y’icyorezo mu gihugu cyawe, icyo uhisemo ni ikihe? Ngaho rero, tekereza neza, maze umbwire icyo ngomba gusubiza uwantumye.»" 
2Samuel24:14 Dawudi asubiza Gadi, ati «Ubu ndi mu makuba akomeye cyane... Reka tugwe mu biganza by’Uhoraho kuko ari umunyambabazi, aho kugira ngo ngwe mu biganza by’abantu!»" 
2Samuel24:15 Nuko Dawudi ahitamo icyorezo. Hari mu gihe cyo gusarura ingano. Uhoraho ni ko guteza icyorezo muri Israheli, kuva muri icyo gitondo kugeza igihe yateganyije, maze hapfa abantu ibihumbi mirongo irindwi, uhereye i Dani ukageza i Berisheba." 
2Samuel24:16 Umumalayika aramburira ikiganza kuri Yeruzalemu kugira ngo ayirimbure, ariko Uhoraho yisubiraho; ni ko kubwira uwo mumalayika wariho arimbura imbaga, ati «Ibyo birahagije. Ubu ngubu hina ukuboko.» Ubwo kandi uwo mumalayika w’Uhoraho yari bugufi bw’imbuga ya Arawuna w’Umuyebuzi." 
2Samuel24:17 Ubwo Dawudi yarebaga umumalayika wicaga imbaga, abwira Uhoraho, ati «Ni jye wacumuye, kandi ni jye wakoze icyaha, ariko se nk’iyi mbaga yo yakoze iki? Ndakwinginze ngo abe ari jye uhanwa n’abo mu rugo rwanjye!»" 
2Samuel24:18 Uwo munsi, Gadi asanga Dawudi aramubwira ati «Zamuka wubakire Uhoraho urutambiro ku mbuga ya Arawuna, Umuyebuzi.»" 
2Samuel24:19 Dawudi arazamuka nk’uko Gadi yabimubwiye, abitegetswe n’Uhoraho." 
2Samuel24:20 Arawuna akebutse, abona umwami n’abagaragu be baza bamusanga. Arasohoka, apfukama yubamye ku butaka imbere y’umwami." 
2Samuel24:21 Arawuna aramubaza ati «Mwami, mutegetsi wanjye, uzanywe n’amahoro ku mugaragu wawe?» Dawudi aramusubiza ati «Nje kugura imbuga yawe, kugira ngo nyubakeho urutambiro rw’Uhoraho. Bityo icyorezo kijye kure y’imbaga.»" 
2Samuel24:22 Arawuna abwira Dawudi, ati «Umwami, umutegetsi wanjye afate ibyo ashatse byose, kugira ngo ature igitambo gitwikwa. Dore n’izi nka ube ari zo uturaho igitambo gitwikwa, naho igare n’imitambiko yaryo bibe inkwi zo gucana.»" 
2Samuel24:23 Ibyo byose Arawuna abiha umwami. Nuko Arawuna abwira umwami, ati «Uhoraho Imana yawe ibigushimire!»." 
2Samuel24:24 Ariko umwami abwira Arawuna, ati «Oya, ahubwo ndabigura nawe, sinshaka gutura Uhoraho, Imana yanjye, ibitambo bitwikwa nta cyo mbiguze.» Dawudi rero, agura iyo mbuga n’izo nka ku masikeli mirongo itanu ya feza." 
2Samuel24:25 Aho ni ho Dawudi yubakiye Uhoraho urutambiro, kandi ahaturira ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro. Nuko Uhoraho abona kugirira neza igihugu, n’icyorezo kijya kure ya Israheli." 
1Kings1:1 Umwami Dawudi yari ashaje, ageze mu zabukuru; bamworosaga imyenda ariko ntashobore gususuruka." 
1Kings1:2 Abagaragu be baramubwira bati «Mwami, mutegetsi wacu, bagushakire umwari w’isugi mujye mubana, akubere umunyanzu; muzaryamana agupfumbate maze ususuruke.»" 
1Kings1:3 Bashaka inkumi nziza mu gihugu cyose cya Israheli, babona uwitwa Abishagi w’i Shunemu, nuko bamuzanira umwami."
