1Kings14:6 Ahiya yumvise imirindi y’ibirenge by’uwo mugore acyinjira mu muryango, aramubwira ati «Injira, mugore wa Yerobowamu! Kuki wihinduye undi mugore? Ngutumweho amagambo akomeye cyane." 
1Kings14:7 Genda ubwire Yerobowamu, uti ’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli aravuze ngo: Nagukuye muri rubanda nkugira umutware w’umuryango wanjye Israheli," 
1Kings14:8 nanyaze ubwami inzu ya Dawudi ndabuguha; ariko ntiwambereye nk’umugaragu wanjye Dawudi witonderaga amategeko yanjye, akankurikirana n’umutima we wose, akora gusa ibitunganiye amaso yanjye." 
1Kings14:9 Wakoze ibyaha kurusha abakubanjirije bose: uragenda wihimbira izindi mana z’amashusho abajwe ku buryo wansuzuguye; naho jyewe unjugunya hirya uranzinukwa. 
1Kings14:10 Ni yo mpamvu inteye guteza inzu ya Yerobowamu ibyago, nkica abantu b’igitsinagabo bo kwa Yerobowamu, baba abacakara cyangwa se abigenga muri Israheli; nkavanaho abakomoka mu nzu ya Yerobowamu nk’uko bakubura umwanda bakawumaraho." 
1Kings14:11 Umuntu wese wo mu muryango wa Yerobowamu uzapfira mu mugi azaribwa n’imbwa; naho uzagwa ku gasozi azaribwa n’ibisiga byo mu kirere, kuko ari ko Uhoraho yavuze.’" 
1Kings14:12 Naho wowe, mugore, haguruka utahe, nyamara uraba ugishinga ibirenge mu mugi, maze umwana wawe ahite apfa." 
1Kings14:13 Israheli yose izamuririra imuhambe, kuko ari we wenyine mu bo kwa Yerobowamu uzahambwa mu mva; ni na we wenyine mu bo mu nzu ya Yerobowamu wabonyweho ibyiza bishimisha Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
1Kings14:14 Uhoraho azishyiriraho undi mwami muri Israheli, abe ari we urimbura inzu ya Yerobowamu. Ni iby’uyu munsi! Mbivuge nte? Ni ibya nonaha!" 
1Kings14:15 Uhoraho azakubita Israheli ibe nk’urubingo runyeganyezwa n’amazi. Azarandura Abayisraheli muri iki gihugu cyiza yahaye abasekuruza kandi abatatanyirize hakurya y’uruzi, kuko biremeye ibiti byeguriwe ibimana byabo, bagacumura ku Uhoraho." 
1Kings14:16 Azahana Israheli abahoye ibyaha Yerobowamu yakoze n’ibyo yakoresheje Israheli.» 
1Kings14:17 Umugore wa Yerobowamu arahaguruka, aragenda agera i Tirisa. Akigera ku muryango w’inzu, umwana arapfa." 
1Kings14:18 Baramuhamba, Abayisraheli bose baramuririra nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze, abitumye umugaragu we Ahiya w’umuhanuzi." 
1Kings14:19 Ibindi bigwi bya Yerobowamu, uko yarwanye n’uko yategetse, ibyo byose byanditswe mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Israheli." 
1Kings14:20 Yerobowamu yamaze imyaka makumyabiri n’ibiri ku ngoma, aratanga. Umuhungu we Nadabu ni we wamuzunguye." 
1Kings14:21 Robowamu mwene Salomoni yimikirwa kuba umwami wa Yuda; Robowamu yimye amaze imyaka mirongo ine n’umwe avutse, amara ku ngoma imyaka cumi n’irindwi, ategekera i Yeruzalemu, umugi Uhoraho yitoranyirije mu miryango yose ya Israheli, kugira ngo bahubahirize izina rye. Nyina wa Robowamu yitwaga Nahama, akaba Umuhamonikazi." 
1Kings14:22 Abantu bo mu muryango wa Yuda bakoze ibyo Uhoraho yanga: ibyaha byabo bituma Uhoraho abarakarira kuruta uko yarakariye abasekuruza babo. 
1Kings14:23 Kimwe n’abo basekuruza, biyubakira ahirengeye inkingi z’amabuye n’ibiti byeguriwe ibimana byabo, ku misozi yose ihanitse no mu nsi y’igiti cyose kibisi; —" 
1Kings14:24 hadutse kandi mu gihugu abasore n’abakobwa b’amahabara biyegurira ibigirwamana! — bagakora ibibi byose by’abanyamahanga Uhoraho yari yarirukanye imbere y’Abayisraheli. 
1Kings14:25 Robowamu amaze imyaka itanu ari ku ngoma, Shishaki, umwami wa Misiri, yagabye igitero i Yeruzalemu." 
1Kings14:26 Yasahuye umutungo wo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, asahura n’umutungo wo mu ngoro y’umwami. Atwara byose abimaraho, ndetse yatwaye n’ingabo zose umwami Salomoni yari yaracurishije muri zahabu." 
1Kings14:27 Umwami Robowamu akoresha izindi ngabo mu miringa zo kuzisimbura, maze aziha abatware b’abasirikare barindaga amarembo y’ibwami." 
1Kings14:28 Buri gihe umwami yabaga yinjiye mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, abasirikare bamugendagaho bafite izo ngabo, yasohoka bakajya kuzibika mu nzu yabo." 
1Kings14:29 Ibindi bigwi bya Robowamu, ibyo yakoze byose, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Yuda?" 
1Kings14:30 Hakomeje kubaho intambara ziteranya Robowamu na Yerobowamu. 
1Kings14:31 Umwami Robowamu amaze gutanga, umurambo we washyinguwe mu Murwa wa Dawudi, hamwe n’abasekuruza be. Umuhungu we Abiyamu ni we wamuzunguye ku ngoma." 
1Kings15:1 Abiyamu yimitswe kuba umwami wa Yuda, mu mwaka wa cumi n’umunani w’ingoma ya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati." 
1Kings15:2 Yamaze imyaka itatu ari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Nyina yitwaga Mahaka, akaba umukobwa wa Abusalomu." 
1Kings15:3 Yakoze ibibi byose byakozwe na se mbere ye; umutima we ntiwatunganira Uhoraho, Imana ye, nk’uko uw’umubyeyi we Dawudi wamutunganiraga." 
1Kings15:4 Ariko kubera Dawudi, Uhoraho Imana ye yamusigiye urumuri muri Yeruzalemu, ihamishaho umwe mu bana be ngo akomeze Yeruzalemu," 
1Kings15:5 bitewe n’uko Dawudi yakoraga ibitunganiye amaso y’Uhoraho, ntiyateshuka ku byo Uhoraho yamutegetse gukora, keretse mu bya Uriya w’Umuhiti." 
1Kings15:6 Ibindi bigwi bya Abiyamu, ibyo yakoze byose, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Yuda? Habaye intambara y’urudaca hagati ya Abiyamu na Yerobowamu." 
1Kings15:7  
1Kings15:8 Abiyamu yaratanze, umurambo we ushyingurwa mu Murwa wa Dawudi. Umuhungu we Asa ni we wamuzunguye ku ngoma." 
1Kings15:9 Yerobowamu, umwami wa Israheli, amaze imyaka makumyabiri ari ku ngoma, Asa yimikiwe kuba umwami wa Yuda." 
1Kings15:10 Yamaze imyaka mirongo ine n’umwe i Yeruzalemu ari ku ngoma; nyirakuru yitwaga Mahaka, akaba umukobwa wa Abusalomu." 
1Kings15:11 Asa yakoze ibitunganiye Uhoraho, nk’uko sekuruza Dawudi yabigenje." 
1Kings15:12 Yaciye ubuhabara mu gihugu kandi akuraho amashusho y’ibigirwamana ba sekuruza bari baradukanye. 
1Kings15:13 Ndetse yavanye na nyirakuru Mahaka ku rwego rw’ubugabekazi kuko yari yikoreshereje ishusho ry’ikigirwamana Ashera; Asa yatemye icyo kigirwamana agitwikira mu kibaya cya Sedironi. 
1Kings15:14 Ariko amasengero y’ahirengeye ntiyavuyeho. Nyamara umutima wa Asa wakomeje gutunganira Uhoraho mu gihe cyose yabayeho. 
1Kings15:15 Yashyize mu Ngoro ibintu se na we ubwe beguriye Imana; nka feza, zahabu, n’ibindi bikoresho." 
1Kings15:16 Asa na Bayesha, umwami wa Israheli, barwanye mu gihe cyose babayeho." 
1Kings15:17 Bayesha, umwami wa Israheli, atera Yuda maze urugo rw’umugi wa Rama ararwubaka ararukomeza kugira ngo azibire inzira Asa, umwami wa Yuda." 
1Kings15:18 Asa afata feza na zahabu byari bisigaye byo mu mutungo w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho no mu mutungo w’ingoro y’umwami, abiha abagaragu be kugira ngo babyoherereze Beni‐Hadadi mwene Tibirimoni, umwuzukuru wa Heziyoni, akaba umwami wa Aramu kandi akaba yari atuye i Damasi. Asa abwira Beni‐Hadadi ati" 
1Kings15:19 «Reka tugirane isezerano, nk’uko data na so barigiranye. Nkohorereje amaturo ya feza na zahabu, maze uce ku isezerano wagiranye na Bayesha, umwami wa Israheli, areke gukomeza kuntera.»" 
1Kings15:20 Beni‐Hadadi yumvira umwami Asa; agaba ibitero bitera imigi ya Israheli, atsinda umugi wa Iyoni, uwa Dani, uwa Abeli‐Betimaka, akarere kose ka Kineroti n’igihugu cyose cya Nefutali." 
1Kings15:21 Bayesha amaze kumva iyo nkuru, ahita areka gukomeza umugi wa Rama, ajya kwibera i Tirisa." 
1Kings15:22 Umwami Asa atumira Abayuda bose, hatagize n’umwe usigara, barikora bajya i Rama aho Bayesha yubakaga, bahakura amabuye n’ibiti. Umwami Asa abyubakisha Geba y’Ababenyamini na Misipa." 
1Kings15:23 Ibindi bikorwa byose bya Asa, ubutwari bwe, ibyo yakoze byose, imigi yubatse, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Yuda, uretse ko ageze mu zabukuru yarwaye ibirenge?" 
1Kings15:24 Nuko Asa aratanga, umurambo we ushyingurwa mu Murwa wa sekuruza Dawudi. Umuhungu we Yozafati aba ari we umuzungura ku ngoma." 
1Kings15:25 Nadabu mwene Yerobowamu yabaye umwami wa Israheli, mu mwaka wa kabiri w’ingoma ya Asa, umwami wa Yuda; yamaze imyaka ibiri ategeka Israheli." 
1Kings15:26 Yakoze ibidatunganiye Uhoraho; agendera mu nzira za se kandi akurikiza icyaha se yari yarakoresheje Israheli. 
1Kings15:27 Bayesha mwene Ahiya wo mu muryango wa Isakari, aramugambanira. Bayesha amwicira i Gibetoni y’Abafilisti, mu gihe Nadabu n’Abayisraheli bose bari bagose Gibetoni." 
1Kings15:28 Bayesha yishe Nadabu mu mwaka wa gatatu w’ingoma ya Asa, umwami wa Yuda, aba ari we umuzungura ku ngoma." 
1Kings15:29 Akimara kwimikwa, yishe abo mu muryango wa Yerobowamu bose, arabatsemba, ntiyagira n’umwe asiga, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze atumye umugaragu we Ahiya w’i Silo." 
1Kings15:30 Abica abahoye ibyaha bya Yerobowamu n’ibyo yoheje Abayisraheli ngo bakore, bagacumura kuri Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
1Kings15:31 Ibisigaye by’ibikorwa bya Nadabu, ibyo yakoze byose, ibyo ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Israheli? (32)" 
1Kings15:32 Mu mwaka wa gatatu w’ingoma ya Asa, umwami wa Yuda, Bayesha mwene Ahiya yima ingoma, ategeka Israheli yose atuye i Tirisa mu gihe cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’ine." 
1Kings15:33 Yakoze ibidatunganiye amaso y’Uhoraho, akurikiza imigenzereze ya Yerobowamu, n’icyaha yari yarakoresheje Abayisraheli." 
1Kings16:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa Yehu mwene Hanani, ngo arigeze kuri Bayesha, muri aya magambo:" 
1Kings16:2 «Nari naragukuye mu mukungugu, nkugira umutware w’umuryango wa njye Israheli, nyamara wowe wakurikije imigenzereze ya Yerobowamu, utera umuryango wanjye Israheli gucumura kugira ngo ndakazwe n’ibyaha byabo." 
1Kings16:3 Ni yo mpamvu ngiye gutsemba Bayesha n’abari basigaye bo mu nzu ye. Inzu yawe nzayigira uko nagenje iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati. 
1Kings16:4 Umuntu wese wo mu muryango wa Bayesha uzapfa aguye mu mugi, azaribwa n’imbwa; naho uzagwa ku gasozi, azaribwe n’ibisiga byo mu kirere.»" 
1Kings16:5 Ibindi bigwi bya Bayesha, ibyo yakoze, n’ubutwari bwe, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Israheli?" 
1Kings16:6 Bayesha yaratanze asanga abasekuruza be, umurambo we ushyingurwa i Tirisa. Umuhungu we Ela amuzungura ku ngoma." 
1Kings16:7 Koko ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryabwiwe umuhanuzi Yehu mwene Hanani, kugira ngo arigeze kuri Bayesha n’inzu ye. Yarakaje Uhoraho bikabije, kubera ibibi byose yari yarakoreye mu maso ye, bituma amera nk’abo mu nzu ya Yerobowamu yari yaratsembye." 
1Kings16:8 Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n’itandatu w’ingoma ya Asa, umwami wa Yuda, Ela mwene Bayesha yimikirwa kuba umwami wa Israheli, atura i Tirisa, amara imyaka ibiri ari ku ngoma." 
1Kings16:9 Umugaragu we Zimiri wategekaga igice kimwe cy’abanyamagare be, aramugomera. Uwo munsi umwami yari i Tirisa, mu nzu ya Arisa, umunyarugo we, aho yanyweraga byo gusinda." 
1Kings16:10 Ni bwo Zimiri yinjiye, atera Ela, aramwica, maze aramuzungura. Hari mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n’irindwi Asa umwami wa Yuda ari ku ngoma." 
1Kings16:11 Zimiri akimara kwimikwa no kwicara ku ntebe y’ubwami, amarira ku icumu abo mu nzu ya Bayesha bose; ntiyagira umwana w’umuhungu n’umwe amusigira, haba mu muryango we cyangwa se mu ncuti ze." 
1Kings16:12 Zimiri atsemba inzu yose ya Bayesha, bikurikije ijambo ry’Uhoraho yatumye umuhanuzi Yehu kuri Bayesha." 
1Kings16:13 Ibyo byari bitewe n’ibyaha byose Bayesha n’umuhungu we Ela bari bakoze ubwabo kandi bakabikoresha na Israheli, bagasenga ibigirwamana, bikageza ubwo barakaza Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
1Kings16:14 Ibindi bigwi bya Ela, ibyo yakoze byose, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Israheli?" 
1Kings16:15 Mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n’irindwi w’ingoma ya Asa, umwami wa Yuda, Zimiri aba umwami i Tirisa, mu gihe cy’iminsi irindwi. Icyo gihe ingabo za Israheli zari zateye i Gibetoni y’Abafilisiti." 
1Kings16:16 Nuko izo ngabo zumva inkuru ivuga ngo «Zimiri yigometse, ndetse yica umwami!» Uwo munsi Abayisraheli bose, aho bari mu ngando, bimika Omari wari umugaba w’ingabo ngo ababere umwami." 
1Kings16:17 Omari n’Abayisraheli bose bazamuka bava i Gibetoni, bajya kugota Tirisa." 
1Kings16:18 Zimiri abonye ko umugi wafashwe, ahungira mu munara w’ingoro y’umwami, yitwikiramo, arapfa." 
1Kings16:19 Yazize ibyaha bye akora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, agakurikiza ingeso za Yerobowamu wari warateye Israheli gucumura." 
1Kings16:20 Ibindi Zimiri yakoze n’ubwigomeke bwe, ibyo ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Israheli?" 
1Kings16:21 Ubwo rero Abayisraheli bicamo ibice bibiri: igice kimwe gikurikira Tibini mwene Ginati kugira ngo bamwimike ababere umwami; naho abandi bakurikira Omari. 
1Kings16:22 Abantu bakurikiye Omari, barusha amaboko abakurikiye Tibini mwene Ginati, barabanesha. Tibini arapfa, maze Omari arimikwa." 
1Kings16:23 Omari yabaye umwami wa Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka cumi n’ibiri. Yimitswe mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n’umwe w’ingoma ya Asa, umwami wa Yuda. Yamaze imyaka itandatu ari i Tirisa," 
1Kings16:24 hanyuma agura na Shemeri umusozi wa Samariya ku matalenta abiri ya feza. Yubaka kuri uwo musozi arahakomeza, umugi ahubatse awita Samariya, akurikije izina rya nyirawo Shemeri." 
1Kings16:25 Omari akora ibidatunganiye amaso y’Uhoraho ndetse akora nabi kurusha abamubanjirije bose. 
1Kings16:26 Yakurikije ingeso zose za Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, kandi akurikiza ibyaha Yerobowamu yari yarakoresheje Abayisraheli bakarakaza Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, basenga ibigirwamana bitagira agaciro." 
1Kings16:27 Ibindi bigwi bya Omari, ibyo yakoze n’ubutwari bwe, ibyo ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Israheli?" 
1Kings16:28 Omari aratanga, umurambo we ushyingurwa i Samariya. Umuhungu we Akabu amuzungura ku ngoma." 
1Kings16:29 Akabu mwene Omari, yimye ingoma ya Israheli mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n’umunani w’ingoma ya Asa, umwami wa Yuda. Akabu mwene Omari, ategeka Israheli imyaka makumyabiri n’ibiri ari i Samariya." 
1Kings16:30 Akabu mwene Omari, akora ibibi mu maso y’Uhoraho, maze akora nabi kurusha abamubanjirije bose." 
1Kings16:31 Yabonye ko gukurikiza ibyaha bya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati ari ubusa kuri we, arongora Yezabeli, umukobwa wa Etibehali, umwami w’Abasidoni; ayoboka ikigirwamana Behali, maze arakiramya." 
1Kings16:32 Yubakira Behali inzu i Samariya, ayishyiramo urutambiro," 
1Kings16:33 n’igiti cyeguriwe ibigirwamana. Akabu akomeza gukora ibirakaza Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, ku buryo butambutse ubw’abami bose ba Israheli bamubanjirije." 
1Kings16:34 Ku ngoma ye ni bwo Hiyeli w’i Beteli yongeye kubaka Yeriko. Yubaka urufatiro rwayo, atura umwana we w’imfura witwaga Abiramu, amarembo yayo ayashyiraho inzugi, atura umwana we w’umuhererezi witwaga Segubi, biba nk’uko Uhoraho yari yaravuze atumye Yozuwe, mwene Nuni." 
1Kings17:1 Eliya Umutishibi, wo mu baturage b’i Gilihadi, abwira Akabu ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli nkorera, ko nta rume cyangwa imvura bizagwa muri iyi myaka, keretse jye mbitegetse!»" 
1Kings17:2 Uhoraho abwira Eliya, agira ati" 
1Kings17:3 «Va hano, ugende werekeza iy’iburasirazuba, maze wihishe ku nkombe y’umugezi wa Keriti uri mu burasirazuba bwa Yorudani." 
1Kings17:4 Uzanywe amazi y’uwo mugezi kandi nategetse ibikona kuzajya bikugemurira ibyo kurya.» 
1Kings17:5 Aragenda, agenza uko Uhoraho yategetse; ajya kuba ku nkombe y’umugezi wa Keriti wari mu burasirazuba bwa Yorudani." 
1Kings17:6 Ibikona byamuzaniraga umugati n’inyama mu gitondo na nimugoroba, akajya anywa amazi y’uwo mugezi." 
1Kings17:7 Hashize iminsi umugezi urakama, kuko nta mvura yari yaraguye mu gihugu." 
1Kings17:8 Uhoraho aramubwira ati 
1Kings17:9 «Haguruka ujye i Sareputa y’i Sidoni, maze uhagume; hariyo umugore w’umupfakazi nategetse kujya aguha ibigutunga.»" 
1Kings17:10 Eliya arahaguruka ajya i Sareputa, yinjira mu mugi. Ahasanga umugore w’umupfakazi watashyaga inkwi. Aramuhamagara maze aramubwira, ati «Ndakwinginze, jya kunzanira amazi make muri urwo rweso kugira ngo nywe!»" 
1Kings17:11 Umugore ajya kuyazana. Eliya aramuhamagara maze aravuga ati «Ndakwinginze, unzanire n’agasate k’umugati.»" 
1Kings17:12 Umugore aramusubiza ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho Nyir’ubuzima, Imana yawe! Nta ko mfite, usibye agafu ku rushyi nsigaranye kari mu kebo, n’utuvuta turi mu keso; nimara gutora udukwi ndataha nkavugemo umutsima, jyewe n’umwana wanjye, tuwurye, ahasigaye twipfire.»" 
1Kings17:13 Eliya aramubwira ati «Wigira ubwoba! Taha ubigenze uko ubivuze; ariko ubanze umvugireho akanjye ukanzanire, maze ubone kwivugira akawe n’umwana wawe," 
1Kings17:14 kuko Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Mu kebo ntihazaburamo ifu, amavuta yo mu keso ntazatuba, kugeza umunsi Uhoraho azagusha imvura ku butaka.»" 
1Kings17:15 Umugore aragenda, agenza uko Eliya yabivuze; amara iminsi afite icyo arya, we na Eliya n’urugo rwe." 
1Kings17:16 Mu kebo ntihaburamo ifu, n’amavuta yo mu keso ntiyatuba nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivugishije Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Nyuma y’ibyo, dore icyabaye: umwana w’uwo mugore nyir’urugo yararwaye. Indwara ye irakomera ku buryo yamuhitanye." 
1Kings17:18 Umugore abwira Eliya, ati «Mpfa iki nawe, muntu w’Imana? Ese wazanywe iwanjye no kwibutsa Imana icyaha cyanjye, ngo wicishe umwana wanjye?»" 
1Kings17:19 Eliya aramusubiza ati «Mpa umwana wawe!» Amumukura mu gituza, aramufata amujyana mu nzu yo hejuru yararagamo, amuryamisha ku buriri bwe." 
1Kings17:20 Hanyuma atakambira Uhoraho, agira ati «Uhoraho, Mana yanjye, ese urashaka kugirira nabi uyu mupfakazi wancumbikiye, umwicira umwana?»" 
1Kings17:21 Eliya arambarara gatatu hejuru y’umwana, maze atakambira Uhoraho, agira ati «Uhoraho, Mana yanjye, umwuka w’uyu mwana numugarukemo!»" 
1Kings17:22 Uhoraho yumva ijwi rya Eliya, maze umwuka w’umwana umugarukamo, asubirana ubuzima." 
1Kings17:23 Eliya afata umwana, amukura mu nzu yo hejuru aramumanukana amuhereza nyina. Eliya aravuga ati «Dore umwana wawe, ni muzima.»" 
1Kings17:24 Umugore abwira Eliya, ati «Yego, noneho ubu menye ko uri umuntu w’Imana, kandi ko ijambo ry’Uhoraho uvuga ari ukuri.»" 
1Kings18:1 Hashize iminsi myinshi, mu mwaka wa gatatu, Uhoraho abwira Eliya, ati «Genda wiyereke Akabu; ngiye kugusha imvura ku butaka.»" 
1Kings18:2 Eliya aragenda ajya kwiyereka Akabu. Ubwo inzara yacaga ibintu i Samariya. 
1Kings18:3 Akabu ahamagara Obadiyahu w’umunyarugo we. — Obadiyahu uwo yatinyaga cyane Uhoraho; 
1Kings18:4 bityo, ubwo Yezabeli yicaga abahanuzi b’Uhoraho, Obadiyahu yafashemo ijana ajya kubahisha mu buvumo bubiri, ashyira mirongo itanu muri buri buvumo, akajya abagemurirayo umugati wo kurya n’amazi yo kunywa.—" 
1Kings18:5 Akabu abwira Obadiyahu, ati «Genda mu gihugu, ugere ku masoko yose y’amazi no ku tugezi twose: yenda ahari twabona ubwatsi tugaburira amafarasi n’inyumbu, tutavaho dupfusha igice cy’amatungo yacu.»" 
1Kings18:6 Bigabanya igihugu ngo bakigende. Akabu anyura iye nzira, Obadiyahu na we anyura indi." 
1Kings18:7 Obadiyahu akigenda, ahura na Eliya. Obadiyahu aramumenya, amwikubita imbere yubamye, aramubwira ati «Ni wowe koko, shobuja Eliya?»" 
1Kings18:8 Undi aramusubiza ati «Ni jye! Genda ubwire shobuja, uti ’Eliya yaje!’»" 
1Kings18:9 Obadiyahu aramusubiza ati «Nacumuye iki cyatuma ungabiza Akabu, jye umugaragu wawe, kugira ngo anyice?" 
1Kings18:10 Ndahiye ubuzima bw’Uhoraho, Imana yawe, ko nta hanga cyangwa igihugu databuja atakwijemo abantu ngo bagushakashake; mu gihe bamuhakaniye ko udahari, akarahiza abo bami b’amahanga ko batakubonye koko." 
1Kings18:11 None ubu urambwiye ngo ngende mbwire databuja ko Eliya ari hano! 
1Kings18:12 Ariko nimara gutandukana nawe, umwuka w’Uhoraho urakujyana ahandi ntazi, maze nimenyesha Akabu akaza ntakubone, anyice. Nyamara kandi kuva mu bwana bwanjye, jye umugaragu wawe, nubahaga Uhoraho." 
1Kings18:13 Nta bwo babwiye databuja icyo nakoze, ubwo Yezabeli yicaga abahanuzi b’Uhoraho? Nahishe abahanuzi ijana b’Uhoraho mu buvumo bubiri, mirongo itanu muri buri buvumo, maze nkajya mbagaburira umugati nkabaha n’amazi yo kunywa." 
1Kings18:14 None ubu urambwiye ngo ngende mbwire databuja ngo Eliya ari hano! Aranyica!» 
1Kings18:15 Eliya aramusubiza ati «Ndahiye ubuzima bw’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo nkorera, ko uyu munsi niyereka Akabu." 
1Kings18:16 Obadiyahu ajya kubonana na Akabu arabimubwira; Akabu na we ajya kubonana na Eliya. 
1Kings18:17 Akabu abonye Eliya aramubwira ati «Uratinyutse uraje, kandi ari wowe wateje ibi byago muri Israheli!»" 
1Kings18:18 Eliya aramusubiza ati «Si jye wateje ibyago, ahubwo ni wowe n’inzu ya so, kuko mwirengagije amategeko y’Uhoraho mukiyegurira Behali." 
1Kings18:19 Noneho ntumirira Abayisraheli bose bateranire ku musozi wa Karumeli, kimwe n’abahanuzi magana ane na mirongo itanu ba Behali, barira ku meza ya Yezabeli.»" 
1Kings18:20 Akabu atumiza Abayisraheli bose n’abahanuzi, abakoranyiriza ku musozi wa Karumeli." 
1Kings18:21 Eliya yegera rubanda rwose maze aravuga ati «Muzahereza he gucumbagirira ku maguru yombi? Niba Uhoraho ari we Mana, nimumukurikire; niba kandi ari Behali, abe ari we mukurikira!» Ariko abantu ntibagira ijambo na rimwe bamusubiza." 
1Kings18:22 Eliya arongera abwira rubanda, ati «Ni jyewe muhanuzi w’Uhoraho usigaye jyenyine, naho abahanuzi ba Behali ni magana ane na mirongo itanu." 
1Kings18:23 Nibaduhe ibimasa bibiri; bihitiremo icyabo, bakibage maze bagishyire hejuru y’inkwi, ariko ntibacane umuriro. Nanjye ndabigenza ntyo ku kindi kimasa; ndakibaga ngishyire hejuru y’inkwi, ariko sincana umuriro." 
1Kings18:24 Hanyuma muze kwiyambaza izina ry’imana yanyu, nanjye ndiyambaza izina ry’Uhoraho. Imana iza gusubirisha umuriro, iraba ari yo Mana.» Abantu bose baramusubiza bati «Iryo jambo ni ryiza.»" 
1Kings18:25 Eliya abwira abahanuzi ba Behali, ati «Nimwihitiremo icyanyu kimasa, mube ari mwe mubanza kubaga kuko muri na benshi; hanyuma mwiyambaze izina ry’imana yanyu, ariko ntimucane umuriro.»" 
1Kings18:26 Bafata ikimasa bahawe, barakibaga, maze biyambaza izina rya Behali kuva mu gitondo kugera ku manywa y’ihangu, bavuga bati «Behali, dusubize!» Ariko ntihagira ijwi ryumvikana cyangwa ubasubiza n’umwe. Nuko babyinira iruhande rw’urutambiro bari bubatse." 
1Kings18:27 Bagejeje ku manywa y’ihangu, Eliya abashinyagurira, avuga ati «Nimuhamagare cyane kuko ari imana mubwira. Wenda ubu yaba yiherereye, cyangwa se yaba idahari, cyangwa se ikaba hari aho yazindukiye; wenda yaba isinziriye ikaba ikwiye gukangurwa!»" 
1Kings18:28 Barongera barangurura amajwi, maze ku buryo bw’imihango yabo, bisharambuza n’amacumu, kugeza ubwo bivushije amaraso." 
1Kings18:29 Amanywa arangiye, bakomeza guhanura kugeza igihe cyo gutura igitambo cya nimunsi. Ariko ntihagira ijwi ryumvikana, cyangwa ijambo, cyangwa se ikindi kimenyetso cy’uko bitaweho." 
1Kings18:30 Eliya abwira abantu bose, ati «Nimunyegere!» Bose baramusanga. Asana urutambiro rw’Uhoraho rwari rwarasenyutse." 
1Kings18:31 Afata amabuye cumi n’abiri, nk’uko imiryango ya bene Yakobo yanganaga, ari we Uhoraho yari yarabwiye ati «Uzitwa Israheli.»" 
1Kings18:32 Ayo mabuye Eliya ayubakisha urutambiro rw’Uhoraho, maze iruhande rw’urwo rutambiro ahacukura umuferege uruzengurutse, ukaba wari ufite intambwe ebyiri z’intoke z’ubujyakuzimu." 
1Kings18:33 Eliya agereka inkwi ku rutambiro, hanyuma abaga ikimasa, inyama zacyo azirambika hejuru y’inkwi." 
1Kings18:34 Abwira rubanda, ati «Nimwuzuze amazi mu bibindi bine, maze muyasuke hejuru y’igitambo no hejuru y’inkwi!» Babigenza batyo. Arababwira ati «Nimwongere!» Babikora incuro ya kabiri. Arakomeza arababwira, ati «Nimwongere ubwa gatatu!» Babigira incuro ya gatatu." 
1Kings18:35 Amazi asendera urutambiro, ndetse yuzura na wa muferege." 
1Kings18:36 Isaha yo gutura igitambo igeze, umuhanuzi Eliya yegera urutambiro, asenga agira ati «Uhoraho, Mana ya Abrahamu, na Izaki, na Israheli, erekana uyu munsi ko ari wowe Mana muri Israheli, naho jyewe nkaba umugaragu wawe, kandi ko ibyo byose nabikoze nkurikije ijambo ryawe." 
1Kings18:37 Ngaho nsubiza, Uhoraho, nsubiza kugira ngo iyi mbaga imenye ko wowe Uhoraho uri Imana, kandi ko ari wowe wigaruriye imitima yabo!»" 
1Kings18:38 Ubwo umuriro w’Imana uramanuka, utwika igitambo, inkwi, amabuye n’umukungugu, kandi ukamya amazi yari mu muferege." 
1Kings18:39 Abantu bose babibonye bikubita hasi bubamye, baravuga bati «Uhoraho ni we Mana! Uhoraho ni we Mana!»" 
1Kings18:40 Nuko Eliya arababwira ati «Nimufate abahanuzi ba Behali, ntihagire n’umwe ubacika!» Barabafata. Eliya abamanurira ku mugezi wa Kishoni, arahabicira." 
1Kings18:41 Eliya abwira Akabu, ati «Zamuka urye kandi unywe, kuko numvise umuhindo w’imvura y’impangukano.»" 
1Kings18:42 Akabu ajya kurya no kunywa, naho Eliya ajya mu mpinga y’umusozi wa Karumeli, maze arapfukama, umutwe awukoza ku mavi ye." 
1Kings18:43 Abwira umugaragu we, ati «Ngaho genda witegereze mu cyerekezo cy’inyanja!» Arazamuka aritegereza, maze aravuga ati «Nta cyo mbonye.» Eliya aramubwira ati «Subirayo», bigera ku ncuro ndwi." 
1Kings18:44 Ku ncuro ya karindwi, umugaragu aravuga ati «Dore mbonye igicu gito kingana n’ikiganza cy’umuntu, kizamuka kiva mu nyanja.» Eliya aramubwira ati «Zamuka ubwire Akabu, uti ’Shumika amafarasi ku igare, maze umanuke imvura itaza kugufatirana.’»" 
1Kings18:45 Mu mwanya muto ijuru rirahinduka, ryuzura ibicu n’umuyaga, maze hagwa imvura y’umurindi. Nuko Akabu yurira igare rye, ajya i Yizireyeli." 
1Kings18:46 Naho Eliya yuzura imbaraga z’Uhoraho, aracebura maze yiruka imbere ya Akabu, kugera mu marembo ya Yizireyeli." 
1Kings19:1 Akabu atekerereza Yezabeli ibyo Eliya yakoze byose, n’ukuntu yicishije inkota abahanuzi bose." 
1Kings19:2 Yezabeli yohereza intumwa kuri Eliya ngo imubwire iti «Niba ejo kuri iyi saha ntagukoreye ibyo wabakoreye, imana zizangire uko zishatse kose!»" 
1Kings19:3 Eliya abyumvise arahaguruka, agenda agira ngo akize amagara ye. Agera i Berisheba ho muri Yuda, maze ahasiga umugaragu we." 
1Kings19:4 We agenda urugendo rw’umunsi umwe mu butayu. Ahageze yicara mu nsi y’igiti cyari cyonyine. Yisabira gupfa, agira ati «Nta cyo ngishoboye. None Uhoraho, akira ubuzima bwanjye kuko ntaruta abasokuruza banjye.»" 
1Kings19:5 Nuko aryama mu nsi y’icyo giti cyari cyonyine, arasinzira. Umumalayika araza amukoraho, amubwira ati «Byuka urye!»" 
1Kings19:6 Aritegereza, abona ku musego we umugati wavumbitswe mu mabuye ashyushye n’akabindi k’amazi; ararya, aranywa, hanyuma arongera araryama." 
1Kings19:7 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aragaruka, amukoraho maze aramubwira ati «Byuka urye kuko ugifite urugendo rurerure.»" 
1Kings19:8 Eliya arahaguruka, ararya kandi aranywa, hanyuma amaze kumva ahembutse, agenda iminsi mirongo ine n’amajoro mirongo ine kugera i Horebu, umusozi w’Imana." 
1Kings19:9 Ahageze, yinjira mu buvumo araharara. Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rirambwira riti «Eliya, urakora iki hano?»" 
1Kings19:10 Eliya arasubiza ati «Nagize ishyaka ryo guharanira Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, kuko Abayisraheli baciye ku Isezerano ryawe, basenya intambiro zawe kandi bicisha inkota abahanuzi bawe; ni jye jyenyine usigaye, none barangenza ngo banyice.»" 
1Kings19:11 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Sohoka maze uhagarare ku musozi imbere y’Uhoraho; dore Uhoraho araje.» Ako kanya, haza inkubi y’umuyaga usatagura imisozi kandi umenagura amabuye imbere y’Uhoraho, ariko Uhoraho ntiyari muri uwo muyaga. Nyuma y’umuyaga haba umutingito w’isi, ariko Uhoraho ntiyari awurimo." 
1Kings19:12 Nyuma y’umutingito w’isi haza umuriro, ariko Uhoraho ntiyari awurimo. Noneho nyuma y’umuriro, haza akayaga gahuhera." 
1Kings19:13 Eliya akumvise, yipfuka igishura cye mu maso, maze arasohoka ahagarara ku muryango w’ubuvumo. Ijwi riramubaza riti «Eliya, urakora iki hano?»" 
1Kings19:14 Arasubiza ati «Nagurumanywemo n’ishyaka ry’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, kuko Abayisraheli banze kwita ku Isezerano ryawe, basenya intambiro zawe kandi bicisha inkota abahanuzi bawe; ni jye jyenyine wasigaye none barangenza ngo banyice.»" 
1Kings19:15 Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Genda, usubize inzira wajemo werekeze ku butayu bw’i Damasi. Nugerayo uzasiga amavuta Hazayeli, umwimikire kuba umwami wa Aramu." 
1Kings19:16 Na Yehu mwene Nimushi uzamusige amavuta, umwimikire kuba umwami wa Israheli. Hanyuma usige amavuta na Elisha mwene Shafati w’i Abeli‐Mehola, abe umuhanuzi mu mwanya wawe." 
1Kings19:17 Umuntu uzarokoka inkota ya Hazayeli, azicwa na Yehu, n’uzarokoka inkota ya Yehu, Elisha azamwica." 
1Kings19:18 Ariko nzasiga muri Israheli abantu ibihumbi birindwi batapfukamiye Behali, ntibanamuramye.»" 
1Kings19:19 Eliya ava aho ngaho aragenda, asanga Elisha mwene Shafati ahinga. Yahingaga umurima we ari kumwe n’abagaragu be; buri wese uko bari cumi na babiri ahingisha ibimasa bibiri, ari we ubwe uyoboye bibiri by’inyuma. Eliya amunyura iruhande, maze amujugunyira igishura cye." 
1Kings19:20 Elisha asiga ibimasa bye aho, yiruka kuri Eliya, aramubwira ati «Nyemerera njye gusezera kuri data na mama, mbone ubugukurikira.» Eliya aramubwira, ati «Genda! Subirayo! Hari icyo nagutwaye se?»" 
1Kings19:21 Elisha amusezeraho, maze afata bya bimasa bye bibiri, arabibaga abituraho ibitambo, naho ibihingisho by’ibiti byari bibishumitseho abitekesha inyama zabyo, maze agaburira abantu be. Hanyuma arahaguruka akurikira Eliya, akajya amukorera." 
1Kings20:1 Beni‐Hadadi, umwami wa Aramu, akoranya ingabo ze zose; yari kumwe n’abami mirongo itatu na babiri, n’amafarasi n’amagare. Arazamuka atera Samariya." 
1Kings20:2 Yohereza intumwa mu mugi kwa Akabu, umwami wa Israheli," 
1Kings20:3 kumubwira ziti «Beni‐Hadadi aravuze ngo ’Feza yawe na zahabu yawe ni ibyanjye; abagore bawe n’abana bawe barusha abandi uburanga ni abanjye.’» 
1Kings20:4 Umwami wa Israheli arasubiza ati «Bibe uko ubivuze, shobuja Mwami wanjye! Ndi uwawe n’ibyo ntunze byose.»" 
1Kings20:5 Intumwa zirongera ziragaruka, ziramubwira ziti «Beni‐Hadadi aravuze ngo ’Nagutumyeho intumwa ngira ngo uzimpere feza yawe, zahabu yawe, abagore bawe n’abana bawe." 
1Kings20:6 None rero ejo kuri iyi saha, nzohereza abagaragu banjye iwawe basake mu nzu yawe no mu mazu y’abagaragu bawe. Icyashimishaga amaso yawe cyose, bazagifata bakinzanire.’»" 
1Kings20:7 Umwami wa Israheli atumira abatware bo mu gihugu cye bose, arababwira ati «Murabona namwe ko uriya mugabo ashaka kutwiyenzaho! Yantumyeho ngo muhe abagore banjye, abana banjye, feza yanjye na zahabu, sinabimwimye.»" 
1Kings20:8 Abatware na rubanda rwose baramubwira bati «Ntumwumvire, wange!»" 
1Kings20:9 Akabu abwira intumwa za Beni‐Hadadi, ati «Mubwire umwami databuja muti ’Ibyo watumye bwa mbere ku mugaragu wawe, nzabikora; ariko ibi bya nyuma sinzabikora.’» Intumwa zirataha, zigeza kuri Beni‐Hadadi igisubizo cya Akabu." 
1Kings20:10 Beni‐Hadadi yongera kumutumaho, amubwira ati «Imana zizampane bikomeye Samariya, nintayihindura igiharambuga, ndetse ku buryo aba bantu turi kumwe batazahabona n’umukungugu wakuzura urushyi!»" 
1Kings20:11 Umwami wa Israheli arasubiza ati «Ngaho komeza wivugire! Ariko kandi uriho akenyera umukandara we, ntakirate nk’uriho awukenyurura.»" 
1Kings20:12 Ngo yumve iryo jambo, Beni‐Hadadi wari kumwe n’abandi bami banywera mu ihema rye, abwira abagaragu be ati «Tujye ku rugamba!» Nuko bitegura gutera umugi." 
1Kings20:13 Ubwo haza umuhanuzi, yegera Akabu, umwami wa Israheli, aramubwira ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo ’Wabonye ziriya ngabo ukuntu ari nyinshi? Ndazikugabiza uyu munsi, maze umenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
1Kings20:14 Akabu arasubiza ati «Ni nde uzazidukiza?» Na we aramusubiza ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo ’Ni abasore batoranyijwe n’abatware b’uturere.’» Akabu aravuga ati «Ni nde uzashoza urugamba?» Aramusubiza ati «Ni wowe!» 
1Kings20:15 Akabu akoranya umutwe w’ingabo z’abasore batoranyijwe n’abatware b’uturere, bakaba barageraga kuri magana abiri mirongo itatu na babiri, nyuma yabo akoranya Abayisraheli bose bageraga ku bihumbi birindwi." 
1Kings20:16 Igihe cy’amanywa y’ihangu baratera, ariko icyo gihe Beni‐Hadadi yari mu ihema yinywera yasinze, ashagawe na ba bami mirongo itatu na babiri." 
1Kings20:17 Umutwe w’ingabo z’abasore batoranyijwe n’abatware b’uturere ni wo washoje urugamba. Beni‐Hadadi yohereza abo kumurebera, baramubwira bati «Hari abantu bavuye i Samariya.»" 
1Kings20:18 Arababwira ati «Niba bazanywe n’amahoro mubafate mpiri, niba kandi bazanywe no kurwana, na bwo mubafate mpiri!»" 
1Kings20:19 Umutwe w’ingabo z’abasore batoranyijwe n’abatware b’uturere ni wo wari wavuye mu mugi, ukurikiwe n’izindi ngabo." 
1Kings20:20 Bararwana, buri wese yica uwe. Abaramu barahunga, Abayisraheli barabakurikirana. Beni‐Hadadi, umwami wa Aramu, yurira ifarasi, ahungana n’abandi bake." 
1Kings20:21 Hanyuma umwami wa Israheli arasohoka, afata amafarasi n’amagare asigaye, atsinda ingabo za Aramu ku buryo budasubirwaho." 
1Kings20:22 Umuhanuzi yegera umwami wa Israheli, aramubwira ati «Genda ube intwari, witegure utekereza uko uzabigenza, kuko umwami wa Aramu azagutera umwaka utaha.»" 
1Kings20:23 Abagaragu b’umwami wa Aramu baramubwira bati «Imana yabo ni imana yo mu misozi, ni yo mpamvu batunesheje. Ariko noneho, turwanire mu kibaya, ni ukuri tuzabanesha." 
1Kings20:24 Bigenze utya: bariya bami mwari kumwe, bakureho, ubasimbuze abatware b’ingabo!" 
1Kings20:25 Maze wowe ubwawe, ugabe ingabo zihwanye n’izo watakaje, ugire amafarasi n’amagare angana n’aya mbere, maze turwanire mu kibaya; ni ukuri tuzabanesha.» Arabumvira, abigenza atyo." 
1Kings20:26 Noneho umwaka ukurikiyeho, Beni‐Hadadi akoranya Abaramu, nuko azamuka ajya kuri Afeki kurwanya Israheli." 
1Kings20:27 Abayisraheli baraterana bahabwa impamba, maze bitegura kurwanya Abaramu. Abayisraheli baca ingando ahateganye na bo, bangana n’imikumbi ibiri mito y’ihene, naho Abaramu bari buzuye igihugu." 
1Kings20:28 Wa muntu w’Imana araza, yegera umwami wa Israheli, aramubwira ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo ’Kubera ko Abaramu bavuze ko Uhoraho ari Imana yo mu misozi, atari Imana yo mu kibaya, ngiye kukugabiza ziriya ngabo nyinshi, maze mumenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
1Kings20:29 Bamara iminsi irindwi bateganye; ku munsi wa karindwi, urugamba rurarema. Mu munsi umwe gusa, Abayisraheli bica Abaramu ibihumbi ijana b’ingabo zigenza amaguru." 
1Kings20:30 Abacitse ku icumu bahungira mu mugi wa Afeki, ariko urukuta rugwira abo bantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na birindwi bari basigaye. Beni‐Hadadi we yari yahunze, yigira mu mugi, arihisha akajya ava mu cyumba kimwe ajya mu kindi." 
1Kings20:31 Abagaragu be baramubwira bati «Twumvise bavuga ko abami b’inzu ya Israheli ari abanyambabazi. Reka dukenyere ibigunira, twibohe amaboko, maze dusohoke dusange umwami wa Israheli, wenda yakubabarira ntakwice.»" 
1Kings20:32 Bakenyera ibigunira kandi biboha amaboko, basanga umwami wa Israheli, baravuga bati «Umugaragu wawe Beni‐Hadadi aragusaba ngo umukize!» Akabu arabasubiza ati «Aracyari muzima? Ni umuvandimwe wanjye!»" 
1Kings20:33 Abo bantu babona ko icyo ari ikimenyetso gishimishije; bihutira kumukubira kuri iryo jambo, na bo baravuga bati «Beni‐Hadadi ni umuvandimwe wawe.» Akabu arababwira ati «Nimugende mumunzanire.» Beni‐Hadadi arasohoka asanga Akabu, agezeyo Akabu amwuriza igare rye bwite." 
1Kings20:34 Beni‐Hadadi aramubwira ati «Imigi data yanyaze so ndayigushubije; uziyubakire amaduka i Damasi nk’uko data yayiyubakiye i Samariya.» Akabu aravuga ati «Ndakureka ugende nitugirana isezerano.» Nuko basezerana ku buryo bunejeje Akabu, aramurekura aragenda." 
1Kings20:35 Umugabo umwe wo mu itorero ry’abahanuzi, abwira mugenzi we abitegetswe n’Uhoraho, ati «Ndakwinginze, nkubita.» Undi yanga kumukubita." 
1Kings20:36 Uwo muhanuzi arongera aramubwira ati «Kubera ko utumviye ijambo ry’Uhoraho, tukimara gutandukana intare irakwica.» Nuko bamaze gutandukana, ahura n’intare iramwica." 
1Kings20:37 Uwo muhanuzi ahura n’undi mugabo, aramubwira ati «Ndakwinginze, nkubita!» Umugabo aramukubita, aramukomeretsa." 
1Kings20:38 Umuhanuzi aragenda, ajya gutegera umwami mu nzira; yari yiyoberanyije yipfutse umwenda mu maso." 
1Kings20:39 Umwami ahise, amutakira agira ati «Jye umugaragu wawe nari negereye aho barwaniraga, nuko umwe mu bacu ava ku rugamba, anzanira umuntu arambwira ngo ’Rinda uyu muntu! Nagucika, nzakwica mu kigwi cye, cyangwa uzandihe italenta imwe ya feza.’" 
1Kings20:40 Ariko mu gihe umugaragu wawe yari agikora hirya no hino, wa mugabo aracika.» Umwami wa Israheli aramubwira ati «Urubanza ruragutsinze, urarwiciriye!»" 
1Kings20:41 Umuhanuzi yitwikurura vuba umwenda wari mu maso, noneho umwami wa Israheli amenya ko ari umwe mu bahanuzi." 
1Kings20:42 Uwo muhanuzi aramubwira ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo ’Kuko warekuye umuntu natanze ngo yicwe, uzapfa mu kigwi cye, n’abantu bawe bazicwe mu kigwi cy’abe.’»" 
1Kings20:43 Umwami wa Israheli ataha iwe i Samariya, afite agahinda n’uburakari." 
1Kings21:1 Dore icyakurikiye ibyo ngibyo. Naboti w’i Yizireyeli yari afite umurima w’imizabibu iruhande rw’ingoro ya Akabu, umwami wa Samariya." 
1Kings21:2 Akabu abwira Naboti, ati «Mpa umurima wawe w’imizabibu, nywugire ubusitani bwanjye, kuko uri iruhande rw’inzu yanjye. Nzakuguranira nguhe urusha uwawe ubwiza, cyangwa se nubishaka, nzaguhe ikiguzi cyawo mu giciro cya feza.»" 
1Kings21:3 Naboti asubiza Akabu, ati «Uhoraho arandinde gutanga umurage w’abasokuruza banjye!»" 
1Kings21:4 Akabu asubira iwe ababaye cyane kandi arakaye, kubera amagambo yari abwiwe na Naboti ngo «Sinzaguha umurage w’abasokuruza.» Aryama ku buriri bwe yerekeye urukuta, yanga kurya." 
1Kings21:5 Umugore we Yezabeli aza kumureba, aramubaza ati «Urakajwe n’iki gitumye utarya?»" 
1Kings21:6 Umwami aramusubiza ati «Ni uko nabwiye Naboti w’i Yizireyeli nti ’Tugure umurima wawe w’imizabibu, cyangwa se niba ubikunze nguhe ingurane yawo’, maze akanga.»" 
1Kings21:7 Umugore we Yezabeli aramubwira ati «Mbese si wowe utegeka ingoma ya Israheli? Byuka urye, maze umutima wawe unezerwe, ni jyewe uzaguha umurima w’imizabibu wa Naboti w’i Yizireyeli!»" 
1Kings21:8 Yandika amabaruwa mu izina rya Akabu, ayashyiraho ikimenyetso cy’ubwami, maze ayoherereza abatware n’abanyacyubahiro bari baturanye na Naboti mu mugi." 
1Kings21:9 Muri ayo mabaruwa yari yanditsemo ngo «Nimutangaze igisibo, maze mushyire Naboti ku murongo wa mbere w’imbaga y’abantu." 
1Kings21:10 Muzane abagabo babiri b’abagome mubashyire imbere ye, bamushinje amakosa bagira bati ’Watutse Imana n’umwami!’ Nuko muhereko mumusohora, mumutere amabuye, mumwice!»" 
1Kings21:11 Abantu bo mu mugi wa Naboti, ari bo batware n’abanyacyubahiro bari bahatuye, babigenza uko Yezabeli yabibasabye nk’uko byari byanditswe mu mabaruwa yaboherereje." 
1Kings21:12 Batangaza igisibo, bashyira Naboti imbere y’imbaga y’abantu bateraniye aho," 
1Kings21:13 hanyuma bazana abantu babiri b’abagome, babicaza imbere ye. Abo bagome bashinja Naboti mu ruhame rw’abantu, bavuga bati «Naboti yatutse Imana n’umwami!» Uwo mwanya baramufata, bamuvana mu mugi, bamutera amabuye arapfa." 
1Kings21:14 Batuma kuri Yezabeli kumubwira, bati «Bateye Naboti amabuye, maze arapfa.»" 
1Kings21:15 Yezabeli amaze kumva ko Naboti yatewe amabuye agapfa, abwira Akabu, ati «Haguruka, ugende ufate wa murima w’imizabibu Naboti yanze ko mugura, kuko Naboti atakiriho, yapfuye.»" 
1Kings21:16 Akabu amaze kumenya ko Naboti yapfuye, arahaguruka, aramanuka ajya mu murima w’imizabibu wa Naboti w’i Yizireyeli, arawuzungura." 
1Kings21:17 Ubwo ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa Eliya w’Umutishibi, riti" 
1Kings21:18 «Haguruka! Umanuke usange Akabu, umwami wa Israheli, utegekera i Samariya. Ari mu murima w’imizabibu wa Naboti yazunguye." 
1Kings21:19 Umubwire aya magambo, uti ’Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Umaze kwica, none utinyutse no kunyaga? Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho avuze ngo: Aho imbwa zarigatiye amaraso ya Naboti ni ho zizarigatira n’ayawe bwite.’»" 
1Kings21:20 Akabu abwira Eliya, ati «Urambonye, mwanzi wanjye!» Undi aramusubiza ati «Ndakubonye kuko watinyutse gukora ibyo Uhoraho yanga." 
1Kings21:21 Ubu ngiye kuguteza ibyago: nzagutsemba ntsiratsize; mu nzu ya Akabu nzamaraho ab’igitsinagabo bose, baba abacakara cyangwa se abigenga muri Israheli." 
1Kings21:22 Nzahindura inzu yawe nk’iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, kandi nk’iya Bayesha mwene Ahiya, kuko wancumuyeho kandi ukoshya Abayisraheli ngo bancumureho." 
1Kings21:23 Naho ku byerekeye Yezabeli, Uhoraho avuze atya: Imbwa zizarira Yezabeli mu murima w’i Yizireyeli." 
1Kings21:24 Umuntu wese wo mu muryango wa Akabu uzapfira mu mugi, imbwa zizamurya, naho uzagwa ku gasozi, azaribwa n’ibisiga byo mu kirere.»" 
1Kings21:25 Koko nta muntu n’umwe wigeze abaho w’umugome nka Akabu, ngo akore ibyo Uhoraho yanga, yohejwe n’umugore we Yezabeli." 
1Kings21:26 Yakoze nabi cyane, yiyegurira ibigirwamana nk’uko Abahemori babigenzaga, ari bo Uhoraho yirukanye imbere y’Abayisraheli." 
1Kings21:27 Akabu amaze kumva ayo magambo ya Eliya atanyagura imyenda ye, yambara ikigunira kandi asiba kurya; akaryama ku bigunira kandi akagenda yiyoroheje." 
1Kings21:28 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Eliya w’Umutishibi, ati" 
1Kings21:29 «Wabonye uko Akabu yicishije bugufi imbere yanjye? Kubera ko yicishije bugufi mu maso yanjye, sinzamuteza ibyago akiri ku ngoma, ahubwo nzabiteza inzu ye ku ngoma y’umuhungu we.»" 
1Kings22:1 Hashira imyaka itatu nta ntambara hagati y’Abaramu n’Abayisraheli. 
1Kings22:2 Mu mwaka wa gatatu, Yozafati, umwami wa Yuda, aramanuka asanga umwami wa Israheli." 
1Kings22:3 Umwami wa Israheli abwira abagaragu be, ati «Aho muzi ko Ramoti y’i Gilihadi ari iyacu, tukaba tudaharanira kuyigobotora mu maboko y’umwami wa Aramu?»" 
1Kings22:4 Abaza Yozafati, ati «Waza tukajya kurwana i Ramoti y’i Gilihadi?» Yozafati asubiza umwami wa Israheli, ati «Nta tandukaniro ryawe nanjye, ingabo zanjye ni zo zawe, n’amafarasi yanjye ni yo yawe.»" 
1Kings22:5 Yozafati yongera kubwira umwami wa Israheli, ati «Banza ugishe inama Uhoraho.»" 
1Kings22:6 Umwami wa Israheli akoranya abahanuzi bagera kuri magana ane, maze arababaza ati «Nzikore njye gutera Ramoti y’i Gilihadi, cyangwa se nzarorere?» Baramusubiza bati «Hatere! Uhoraho ahagabije umwami.»" 
1Kings22:7 Yozafati arabaza ati «Nta wundi muhanuzi w’Uhoraho ukiri hano ngo tumubaze?» 
1Kings22:8 Umwami wa Israheli asubiza Yozafati, ati «Haracyari umuntu twabasha kugishaho inama y’Uhoraho, ariko jye ndamwanga kuko atampanurira ibyiza, keretse ibibi: ni uwitwa Mikayehu mwene Yimila.» Yozafati aramusubiza ati «Mwami, wivuga utyo!»" 
1Kings22:9 Umwami wa Israheli ahamagara umwe mu byegera bye, aramubwira ati «Ihute uzane Mikayehu mwene Yimila.»" 
1Kings22:10 Umwami wa Israheli n’uwa Yuda bari ku karubanda ku irembo rya Samariya, bicaye ku ntebe zabo za cyami, buri wese ku ye, bambaye imyambaro yabo ya cyami, abahanuzi bose bahanurira imbere yabo." 
1Kings22:11 Sidikiyahu mwene Kenahana wari wicuriye amahembe y’ibyuma, aravuga ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Aya mahembe uzayakubitisha Abaramu kugeza igihe bazashirira!»" 
1Kings22:12 Abahanuzi bose bahanuraga batyo, bagira bati «Tabara, utere Ramoti y’i Gilihadi, uzatsinda! Uhoraho azayigabiza umwami.»" 
1Kings22:13 Intumwa yari yagiye guhamagara Mikayehu iramubwira iti «Dore abahanuzi bose bahuje amagambo ahanurira umwami ibyiza. Ntuze kunyuranya na bo, uhanure ibyiza!»" 
1Kings22:14 Mikayehu aramusubiza ati «Ndahiye ubuzima bw’Uhoraho, icyo Uhoraho ambwira ni cyo ndi buvuge.»" 
1Kings22:15 Ageze imbere y’umwami, umwami aramubaza ati «Mikayehu, dutere Ramoti y’i Gilihadi, cyangwa se turorere?» Aramusubiza ati «Genda! Uzatsinda! Uhoraho yayikugabije!»" 
1Kings22:16 Umwami aramubwira ati «Nzagusaba na ryari kugira ngo umbwire ukuri konyine mu izina ry’Uhoraho?» 
1Kings22:17 Mikayehu aramusubiza ati «Nabonye Israheli yose itataniye ku misozi, nk’intama zitagira umushumba; Uhoraho aravuga ati ’Bariya bantu ntibakigira ubategeka: buri muntu wese nasubire iwe mu mahoro!’»" 
1Kings22:18 Umwami wa Israheli abwira Yozafati, ati «Nta bwo nakubwiye ko atampanurira ibyiza, ahubwo ari ibibi?»" 
1Kings22:19 Mikayehu aravuga ati «Noneho, umva ijambo ry’Uhoraho. Nabonye Uhoraho atetse ijabiro ku ntebe ye, ingabo zose zo mu ijuru zimuhagaze iburyo n’ibumoso." 
1Kings22:20 Uhoraho arabaza ati ’Ni nde uzashukashuka Akabu ngo azamuke atere Ramoti y’i Gilihadi, maze agweyo?’ Imwe igasubiza ibyayo, indi na yo ibyayo." 
1Kings22:21 Nuko haza ingabo imwe, ihagarara imbere y’Uhoraho, iravuga iti ’Jyewe nzamushuka.’ Uhoraho arayibaza ati ’Uzabigenza ute?’" 
1Kings22:22 Iramusubiza iti ’Nzagenda mpinduke umwuka w’ibinyoma mu kanwa k’abahanuzi be bose.’ Uhoraho arayibwira ati ’Uzamushukashuke, kandi uzabishobora, genda ugenze utyo.’" 
1Kings22:23 Niba rero Uhoraho yashyize umwuka w’ikinyoma mu bahanuzi bawe bose, ni uko na we ubwe yakuvuzeho ibyago.»" 
1Kings22:24 Sidikiyahu mwene Kenahana yigira hafi, akubita Mikayehu urushyi; aramubaza ati «Ni hehe umwuka w’Uhoraho wanyuze umvamo ngo uze kuvugana nawe?»" 
1Kings22:25 Mikayehu aramusubiza ati «Dore, uzabimenya umunsi uzajya uva mu nzu ujya mu yindi, ushaka ubwihisho.»" 
1Kings22:26 Umwami wa Israheli aravuga ati «Nimufate Mikayehu, mumushyire Amoni, umutware w’umurwa, na Yowashi, umwana w’umwami;" 
1Kings22:27 maze mubabwire muti ’Umwami aravuze ngo: Nimushyire uyu muntu mu buroko, mujye mumuha umugati n’amazi by’intica ntikize, kugeza ubwo nzatabaruka amahoro.’»" 
1Kings22:28 Mikayehu aravuga ati «Nuramuka utabarutse amahoro, Uhoraho azaba ataramvugiyemo.»" 
1Kings22:29 Umwami wa Israheli na Yozafati, umwami wa Yuda, barikora batera i Ramoti y’i Gilihadi." 
1Kings22:30 Umwami wa Israheli abwira Yozafati, ati «Ngiye kwiyoberanya maze njye ku rugamba, naho wowe ambara imyambaro yawe ya cyami.» Umwami wa Israheli ariyoberanya, ajya ku rugamba." 
1Kings22:31 Umwami wa Aramu yari yategetse abatware be b’amagare, uko ari mirongo itatu na babiri, ati «Ari umuto, ari umukuru, ntimugire uwo murwanya, keretse umwami wa Israheli wenyine.»" 
1Kings22:32 Abatware b’amagare babonye Yozafati, baravuga bati «Uriya ni we mwami wa Israheli nta kabuza», baramuhindukirana ngo bamurwanye, Yozafati avuza induru." 
1Kings22:33 Maze abatware b’amagare babonye ko atari we mwami wa Israheli, barakimirana, bareka kumukurikira." 
1Kings22:34 Nuko umuntu umwe afora umuheto we, apfa kurasa, ahamya umwami wa Israheli mu ihuriro ry’imyambaro ye y’ibyuma. Umwami ni ko kubwira uwayoboraga igare rye, ati «Hindukiza igare, unkure ku rugamba, kuko maze gukomereka.»" 
1Kings22:35 Uwo munsi intambara irushaho gukomera, bituma basagasira umwami mu igare rye ahateganye n’Abaramu, ariko agejeje nimugoroba aratanga. Amaraso yavaga mu bikomere bye adendeza mu igare rye." 
1Kings22:36 Izuba rigiye kurenga, barangurura ijwi mu ngando, bati «Buri wese nasubire mu mugi we, buri wese mu gihugu cye! Umwami yatanze!»" 
1Kings22:37 Umurambo we bawuzana i Samariya, aba ari ho ushyingurwa." 
1Kings22:38 Igare rye baryogesha amazi menshi mu kizenga cya Samariya, imbwa zirigata amaraso ye, kandi aho ni ho abagore b’amahabara biyuhagirira, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabivuze." 
1Kings22:39 Ibindi bigwi bya Akabu, ibyo yakoze byose, inzu ye itatse amahembe y’inzovu, imigi yubatse, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Israheli?" 
1Kings22:40 Nuko Akabu aratanga, umuhungu we Okoziya amuzungura ku ngoma." 
1Kings22:41 Yozafati mwene Asa yimikiwe kuba umwami wa Yuda, mu mwaka wa kane w’ingoma ya Akabu, umwami wa Israheli." 
1Kings22:42 Yozafati yimye ingoma amaze imyaka mirongo itatu n’itanu avutse, ategeka Yeruzalemu igihe cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu. Nyina yitwaga Azuba, akaba umukobwa wa Shilihi." 
1Kings22:43 Yakurikije ingeso zose za se Asa, ntiyazitezukaho kandi akora ibitunganiye Uhoraho." 
1Kings22:44 Nyamara amasengero y’ahirengeye ntiyavanweho: abantu bari bakihaturira ibitambo, bakanahatwikira ububani." 
1Kings22:45 Yozafati yuzura n’umwami wa Israheli. 
1Kings22:46 Ibindi bigwi bya Yozafati, ubutwari bwe, intambara ze, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Yuda?" 
1Kings22:47 Yatsembye mu gihugu indaya zigenewe gukorera ibigirwamana zari zararokotse ku ngoma ya se Asa. 
1Kings22:48 Icyo gihe Edomu ntiyari ifite umwami. 
1Kings22:49 Yozafati yari afite amato cumi y’i Tarishishi, kugira ngo ajye kuzana zahabu mu gihugu cya Ofiri; ariko ntibagiyeyo kuko ayo mato yamenekeye i Esiyoni‐Geberi." 
1Kings22:50 Nuko Okoziya mwene Akabu abwira Yozafati, ati «Wakwemera ko abagaragu banjye bajyana n’abawe muri ariya mato?» Yozafati aranga." 
1Kings22:51 Yozafati aratanga, umurambo we ushyingurwa mu Murwa wa Dawudi. Umuhungu we Yoramu amuzungura ku ngoma." 
1Kings22:52 Okoziya mwene Akabu yimye ingoma ya Israheli i Samariya, mu mwaka wa cumi n’irindwi w’ingoma ya Yozafati, umwami wa Yuda. Yategetse Israheli mu gihe cy’imyaka ibiri." 
1Kings22:53 Yakoze ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, akurikiza ingeso za se, iza nyina, n’iza Yerobowamu mwene Nebati wari wateye Israheli gucumura." 
1Kings22:54 Yayobotse Behali kandi aramuramya; acumurira Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, akurikije ibyo se yakoraga byose." 
2Kings1:1 Nyuma y’urupfu rw’umwami Akabu, igihugu cya Mowabu cyagomeye Israheli." 
2Kings1:2 Okoziya ahanuka mu idirishya ry’icyumba cye cyo mu nzu yo hejuru i Samariya, yitura hasi arakomereka bikomeye. Yohereza intumwa arazibwira ati «Mujye kundaguriza kwa Behali‐Zebubu, imana y’i Ekironi, kugira ngo menye niba nzakira ibi bikomere byanjye!»" 
2Kings1:3 Ubwo Malayika w’Uhoraho abwira Eliya w’Umutishibi, ati «Haguruka! Usanganire intumwa z’umwami w’i Samariya, maze uzibaze uti ’Nta Mana iba muri Israheli, ku buryo mugomba kujya kuraguza kwa Behali‐Zebubu, imana y’i Ekironi?’" 
2Kings1:4 Uti ’Ni cyo gitumye Uhoraho avuze ngo: Uburiri uryamyeho, nta bwo uzabubyukaho, uzapfa nta kabuza.’» Nuko Eliya arigendera." 
2Kings1:5 Intumwa zirahindukira, umwami arazibaza ati «Kuki mugarutse?»" 
2Kings1:6 Ziramusubiza ziti «Twahuye n’umuntu aratubwira ati ’Nimugende musubire ku mwami wabohereje, maze mumubwire muti ’Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Mbese kohereza abantu kuraguza kwa Behali‐Zebubu, imana y’i Ekironi, ni uko nta Mana iba muri Israheli? Ngo ni yo mpamvu utazabyuka ku buriri uryamyeho, ngo uzapfa nta kabuza.’»" 
2Kings1:7 Umwami abaza intumwa, ati «Uwo muntu mwahuye akababwira ayo magambo ameze ate?»" 
2Kings1:8 Ziramusubiza ziti «Ni umugabo wari witeye umwenda w’ubwoya, akenyeye n’uruhu.» Nuko arababwira ati «Ni Eliya w’Umutishibi!»" 
2Kings1:9 Umwami yohereza kuri Eliya umutegeka w’umutwe w’abasirikare mirongo itanu, ajyana n’abo basirikare be. Uwo mutware arazamuka, asanga Eliya aho yari yicaye mu mpinga y’umusozi, maze aramubwira ati «Muntu w’Imana, umwami aravuze ngo: Manuka!»" 
2Kings1:10 Eliya asubiza wa mutegeka w’umutwe w’abasirikare mirongo itanu, ati «Niba ndi umuntu w’Imana, umuriro nuve mu ijuru ugutwikane n’abantu bawe mirongo itanu!» Uwo mwanya umuriro uva mu ijuru, umutwikana n’umutwe w’abasirikare mirongo itanu yayoboraga." 
2Kings1:11 Umwami arongera atuma kuri Eliya undi mutware w’umutwe w’abasirikare mirongo itanu, ajyana na bo. Umutware afata ijambo, aramubwira ati «Muntu w’Imana, umwami aravuze ngo: Gira vuba umanuke!»" 
2Kings1:12 Ariko Eliya aramusubiza ati «Niba ndi umuntu w’Imana, umuriro nuve mu ijuru, ugutwikane n’abantu bawe mirongo itanu!» Umuriro w’Imana uva mu ijuru, umutwikana n’umutwe w’abasirikare mirongo itanu." 
2Kings1:13 Umwami yohereza umutware wa gatatu w’abasirikare mirongo itanu. Ageze imbere ya Eliya arapfukama, aramwinginga ati «Muntu w’Imana, girira impuhwe ubuzima bwanjye n’ubw’abagaragu bawe, ari bo aba basirikare mirongo itanu!" 
2Kings1:14 Dore umuriro wavuye mu ijuru, utwika abatware babiri ba mbere hamwe n’abasirikare babo mirongo itanu. None ubu ngubu ndagusaba kubabarira ubuzima bwanjye!»" 
2Kings1:15 Malayika w’Uhoraho abwira Eliya, ati «Manukana na we! Wimutinya!» Eliya arahaguruka, amanukana na wa mutware basanga umwami, aramubwira ati" 
2Kings1:16 «Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Ko watumye abantu kujya kuraguza kwa Behali‐Zebubu, imana y’i Ekironi, ni uko nta Mana iba muri Israheli wagisha inama? Kubera iyo mpamvu, ntuzabyuka kuri ubwo buriri uryamyeho, uzapfa nta kabuza!»" 
2Kings1:17 Okoziya arapfa nk’uko byari byavuzwe na Eliya, atumwe n’Uhoraho. Bitewe n’uko atagiraga umwana w’umuhungu, yazunguwe na Yoramu murumuna we, mu mwaka wa kabiri w’ingoma ya Yoramu mwene Yozafati, umwami wa Yuda." 
2Kings1:18 Ibindi bigwi bya Okoziya, ibyo yakoze, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Israheli?" 
2Kings2:1 Dore uko byagenze igihe Uhoraho yajyanaga Eliya mu ijuru, mu nkubi y’umuyaga. Eliya na Elisha bavanye i Giligali, bafatanya urugendo." 
2Kings2:2 Bakigenda, Eliya abwira Elisha, ati «Ndakwinginze, sigara hano kuko Uhoraho anyohereje i Beteli.» Elisha aramusubiza ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho n’ubuzima bwawe, ko ntagusiga!» Nuko baramanukana bajya i Beteli." 
2Kings2:3 Abahanuzi bo mu itorero ry’i Beteli basanga Elisha, baramubaza bati «Uzi ko uyu munsi Uhoraho ajyana shobuja mu ijuru, hejuru yawe?» Arabasubiza ati «Nanjye ndabizi, nimuceceke!»" 
2Kings2:4 Eliya abwira nanone Elisha, ati «Elisha, ndakwinginze sigara hano, kuko Uhoraho anyohereje i Yeriko.» Aramusubiza ati «Nkurahiye Uhoraho n’ubuzima bwawe ko ntagusiga.» Nuko bagera i Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Abahanuzi bari i Yeriko basanga Elisha, baramubaza bati «Uzi ko uyu munsi Uhoraho ajyana shobuja mu ijuru, hejuru yawe?» Arabasubiza ati «Nanjye ndabizi, nimuceceke!»" 
2Kings2:6 Eliya yongera kubwira Elisha, ati «Sigara hano ndakwinginze, kuko Uhoraho anyohereje kuri Yorudani.» Undi aramusubiza ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho nawe bwite, ko ntazagutererana!» Ubwo barajyana." 
2Kings2:7 Abantu mirongo itanu bo mu itorero ry’abahanuzi barabakurikira, ariko bahagarara bareba Yorudani, Eliya na Elisha bari bahagaze bombi ku nkombe y’uruzi." 
2Kings2:8 Nuko Eliya yiyambura umwitero we, arawuzinga awukubita mu mazi yigabanyamo ibice bibiri; bombi bambuka n’amaguru urwo ruzi rwumutse." 
2Kings2:9 Bamaze kwambuka, Eliya abwira Elisha, ati «Nsaba icyo nagukorera mbere y’uko njyanwa kure yawe!» Elisha aramubwira ati «Iyaba nashoboraga kugabirwa incuro ebyiri z’umwuka w’ubuhanuzi ukurimo!»" 
2Kings2:10 Aramubwira ati «Usabye ikintu kiruhije. Numbona mu gihe nzaba njyanywe kure yawe, bizakubera uko ubishaka; niba atari byo, ntibizaba.»" 
2Kings2:11 Bakigenda baganira, igare ry’umuriro n’amafarasi y’umuriro biba biraje, birabatandukanya. Eliya azamuka mu ijuru mu nkubi y’umuyaga." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha abibonye, atera hejuru agira ati «Mubyeyi! Mubyeyi! Amagare n’amafarasi bya Israheli!» Hanyuma ntiyongera kubona Eliya; nuko afata imyenda ye, ayitanyuramo kabiri." 
2Kings2:13 Atora umwitero wa Eliya wari waguye, asubira kuri Yorudani, ahagarara ku nkombe zayo." 
2Kings2:14 Afata wa mwitero, awukubitisha amazi avuga ati «Uhoraho, Imana ya Elisha, ari hehe?» Elisha akubita amazi, amwe ajya ku ruhande rumwe, andi ku rundi, ubwo arambuka." 
2Kings2:15 Abahanuzi bo mu itorero ry’i Yeriko bamurebaga bamwitegeye, baravuga bati «Umwuka w’ubuhanuzi bwa Eliya winjiye muri Elisha.» Nuko baramusanganira, baramupfukamira, bakoza umutwe ku butaka." 
2Kings2:16 Baramubwira bati «Muri twe abagaragu bawe, harimo abagabo mirongo itanu b’intwari; emera bajye gushaka shobuja, yenda umwuka w’Uhoraho wamutwaye umujugunya ku musozi cyangwa mu mubande.» Arabasubiza ati «Ntimugire n’umwe mwohereza!»" 
2Kings2:17 Ariko bakomeza guhatiriza kugeza ubwo bamurembeje, arababwira ati «Nimubohereze!» Bohereza ba bantu mirongo itanu bashaka Eliya mu minsi itatu baramubura." 
2Kings2:18 Bagaruka kwa Elisha wari wasigaye i Yeriko, arababwira ati «Ese sinari nabanje kubabuza kujyayo?»" 
2Kings2:19 Abaturage b’i Yeriko babwira Elisha, bati «Nk’uko databuja abibona, birashimishije gutura muri uyu mugi, ariko kandi amazi y’aho ni mabi kandi n’ubutaka bw’aho burarumba.»" 
2Kings2:20 Arababwira ati «Nimunzanire urweso rushya mushyiremo umunyu!» Bararumuzanira. 
2Kings2:21 Arasohoka ajya ku isoko y’amazi, ajugunyamo umunyu, avuga ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Nsukuye aya mazi, ntazongere kwicana, ntazongere kurumbya.»" 
2Kings2:22 Kuva ubwo, amazi ntiyongera kurangwaho umwanda kugeza uyu munsi, nk’uko Elisha yari yarabivuze." 
2Kings2:23 Ava aho ngaho ajya i Beteli. Agenda mu nzira, haza abana bo mu mugi bamuseka, bavuga bati «Genda, wa munyaruhara we! Genda!»" 
2Kings2:24 Elisha arahindukira, arabitegereza, hanyuma abavuma mu izina ry’Uhoraho. Nuko ibirura bibiri bisohoka mu ishyamba, bishwanyaguza abana mirongo ine na babiri muri bo." 
2Kings2:25 Elisha ava aho ajya ku musozi wa Karumeli, avayo asubira i Samariya." 
2Kings3:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n’umunani w’ingoma ya Yozafati, umwami wa Yuda, ni bwo Yoramu mwene Akabu yimye ingoma ya Israheli i Samariya, amara imyaka cumi n’ibiri ku ngoma." 
2Kings3:2 Yakoze ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, icyakora ntiyari ahwanye na se na nyina, kuko yashenye inkingi y’ibuye se yari yarubakiye Behali." 
2Kings3:3 Ibyo ari byo byose, yibanze ku cyaha Yerobowamu mwene Nebati yari yarakoresheje Abayisraheli, ntiyakizibukira." 
2Kings3:4 Mesha, umwami w’i Mowabu, yari umutunzi akajya atura umwami w’Abayisraheli utwana tw’intama ibihumbi ijana n’amapfizi y’intama z’ubwoya bwinshi ibihumbi ijana." 
2Kings3:5 Ariko Akabu amaze gutanga, umwami w’i Mowabu yagomeye umwami wa Israheli." 
2Kings3:6 Umwami Yoramu ahita ava i Samariya, akoranya Abayisraheli bose." 
2Kings3:7 Hanyuma aragenda yohereza intumwa kwa Yozafati, umwami wa Yuda kumubwira ngo «Umwami w’i Mowabu yangomeye, ese ntiwaza tukajya kumurwanya?» Na we arasubiza ati «Nzazamuka; maze jyewe nawe bizatugendekere kimwe, umuryango wanjye ube nk’uwawe, ingabo zanjye zibe nk’izawe, kandi n’amafarasi yanjye abe nk’ayawe.»" 
2Kings3:8 Yongeraho ati «Tuzaca mu yihe nzira?» Aramusubiza ati «Tuzanyura inzira y’ubutayu bwa Edomu.» 
2Kings3:9 Umwami wa Israheli, umwami wa Yuda n’uwa Edomu bafata inzira, bagenda iminsi irindwi hanyuma amazi arabura, ingabo zirayabura, kimwe n’amatungo yari abikorereye imitwaro." 
2Kings3:10 Umwami wa Israheli aravuga ati «Ayiwe! Ko ubanza Uhoraho yadutumije, uko turi abami batatu, ngo atugabize Abamowabu!»" 
2Kings3:11 Yozafati arabaza ati «Nta muhanuzi w’Uhoraho uri hano ngo tumugishe inama y’Uhoraho?» Umwe mu bagaragu b’umwami wa Israheli arabasubiza ati «Hano hari Elisha mwene Shafati wagendanaga na Eliya.» 
2Kings3:12 Yozafati aravuga ati «Koko ijambo ry’Uhoraho rimurimo.» Uwo mwanya, umwami wa Israheli amanukana na Yozafati n’umwami wa Edomu, basanga Elisha." 
2Kings3:13 Elisha abaza umwami wa Israheli, ati «Mpuriye he nawe? Sanga abahanuzi ba so na nyoko.» Umwami wa Israheli aramusubiza ati «Oya, kuko Uhoraho yadutumije, uko turi abami batatu, kugira ngo adutererane mu maboko y’Abamowabu.»" 
2Kings3:14 Elisha aravuga ati «Ndahiye Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo nkorera, ko iyo nza kuba ntubaha Yozafati, umwami wa Yuda, wowe simba nkumvise, nta n’ubwo mba nkuroye!" 
2Kings3:15 None ubu nzanira umucuranzi!» Mu gihe wa mucuranzi yacurangaga, ikiganza cy’Uhoraho kiza kuri Elisha." 
2Kings3:16 Elisha aravuga ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Nibacukure imyobo myinshi kuri iki kibaya!» 
2Kings3:17 Arongera ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Nta muyaga muzumva uhuha, nta n’imvura muzabona igwa, nyamara iki kibaya kizasendera amazi maze munywe, mwuhire amashyo yanyu n’amatungo abikorereye imitwaro." 
2Kings3:18 Ariko kandi hari n’ikindi kirenzeho Uhoraho azabakorera: azagabiza Abamowabu mu biganza byanyu! 
2Kings3:19 Muzasenya imigi yabo yose ikomeye, muzatema ibiti byose byera imbuto ziribwa, muzasiba amasoko yose y’amazi kandi mwangize imirima yose ihinze muyijugunyamo amabuye.»" 
2Kings3:20 Bukeye, isaha yo gutura igitambo igeze, amazi atemba ava muri Edomu, asendera igihugu cyose." 
2Kings3:21 Abamowabu bose bari bamenye ko abami baje kubatera: ubwo batumira ingabo zabo zose zimenyereye kurwanisha inkota, ndetse n’abari bararengeje imyaka yo kurwana, maze bategera ku mupaka." 
2Kings3:22 Bahagurutse mu gitondo, babona izuba rirasiye ku mazi imbere yabo, ayo mazi atukura nk’amaraso." 
2Kings3:23 Nuko barabwirana bati «Ni amaraso! Ni ukuri, ba bami basubiranyemo barwanisha inkota, none bicanye. Twebwe Bamowabu, reka tujye kwisahurira!»" 
2Kings3:24 Begera ingando y’Abayisraheli. Nuko Abayisraheli barabahindukirana, barabanesha barahunga. Abayisraheli binjira mu gihugu cya Mowabu, baragitsinda." 
2Kings3:25 Abayisraheli basenya imigi, buri muntu akajugunya amabuye mu mirima ihinze barayuzuza, basiba amasoko yose y’amazi, batema ibiti byera imbuto ziribwa, hasigara gusa inkike z’amabuye z’i Kiri‐Heresi, ariko na ho abanyamihumetso barahagota, barahasenya." 
2Kings3:26 Umwami w’Abamowabu amaze kubona ko yaneshejwe, afata abagabo magana arindwi bitwaje inkota, ajyana na bo gutera umwami wa Edomu, ariko ntibabishobora." 
2Kings3:27 Noneho afata umuhungu we w’imfura wagombaga kuzamuzungura ku ngoma, amuturaho igitambo gitwikwa ku nkike y’amabuye yari izengurutse umugi. Abayisraheli babibonye, baradagadwa, nuko bava i Mowabu basubira mu gihugu cyabo." 
2Kings4:1 Umugore w’umwe mu bagize itorero ry’abahanuzi asanga Elisha, amutakambira agira ati «Umugaragu wawe ari we mugabo wanjye yarapfuye, kandi uzi ko yubahaga Uhoraho. None uwo yari abereyemo umwenda yaje gufata abahungu banjye babiri, ngo abajyane bajye kumukorera imirimo y’uburetwa.»" 
2Kings4:2 Elisha aramusubiza ati «Urumva nagukorera iki? Utunze iki iwawe?» Umugore aramusubiza ati «Umuja wawe nta cyo atunze imuhira na mba, uretse amavuta make yo kwisiga.»" 
2Kings4:3 Elisha aramubwira ati «Genda utire inzabya zirimo ubusa mu baturanyi bawe bose, utire izo uzashobora kubona zose," 
2Kings4:4 hanyuma uzatahe wikingiranire mu nzu n’abahungu bawe, maze ya mavuta uyasuke muri za nzabya, urwabya ruzaba rwuzuye urushyire iruhande.»" 
2Kings4:5 Umugore atandukana na Elisha, ageze iwe yinjira mu nzu n’abahungu be, arakinga. Abana bamuzanira inzabya azisukamo amavuta." 
2Kings4:6 Inzabya zimaze kuzura, abwira umuhungu we, ati «Nzanira urundi rwabya!» Umuhungu aramusubiza ati «Nta rundi rwabya rusigaye.» Nuko amavuta ntiyongera gutemba." 
2Kings4:7 Hanyuma uwo mugore asanga umuntu w’Imana kugira ngo amubwire ibyabaye, na we aramubwira ati «Genda ugurishe ayo mavuta, wishyure umwenda wawe, kandi amavuta azasigara azagutunga wowe n’abahungu bawe.»" 
2Kings4:8 Umunsi umwe, Elisha yanyuze ku murenge wa Shunemu. Ahasanga umugore ukize, uwo mugore amwingingira kuza iwe ngo afungure. Guhera ubwo, Elisha yahanyura akajyayo gufungura." 
2Kings4:9 Umugore abwira umugabo we, ati «Nzi ko uriya mugabo uhora aza iwacu ari umuntu w’Imana." 
2Kings4:10 None tumwubakire icyumba gito hejuru y’inzu yacu ahategamye, tumushyiriremo uburiri, ameza, intebe n’itara, maze naza kudusura, ajye acumbikamo.»" 
2Kings4:11 Umunsi umwe, Elisha agera aho iwabo, bamujyana mu cyumba cyo hejuru aryamamo." 
2Kings4:12 Abwira umugaragu we Gehazi, ati «Hamagara uwo Mushunemukazi!» Aramuhamagara, ahageze ahagarara imbere ye." 
2Kings4:13 Elisha abwira umugaragu we, ati «Mubwire ngo: Watweretse ko utwubashye cyane, none twakwitura iki? Ese tuzabwire umwami ineza yawe cyangwa se tuzakuratire umugaba w’ingabo?» Aramusubiza ati «Mbana n’abanjye mu mahoro, nta cyo mbuze.»" 
2Kings4:14 Elisha abaza umugaragu we, ati «Twamukorera iki?» Gehazi aramusubiza ati «Dore nta mwana agira kandi umugabo we arashaje.»" 
2Kings4:15 Elisha aramubwira ati «Muhamagare!» Aramuhamagara, umugore araza ahagarara mu muryango." 
2Kings4:16 Elisha aramubwira ati «Umwaka utaha nk’iki gihe, uzaba uhagatiye umwana w’umuhungu.» Umugore aramusubiza ati «Oya, shobuja muntu w’Imana, wibeshya umuja wawe!»" 
2Kings4:17 Umugore asama inda, maze mu mwaka ukurikiyeho, cya gihe yavuganagamo na Elisha kigeze, abyara umwana w’umuhungu, nk’uko Elisha yari yabimubwiye." 
2Kings4:18 Umwana arakura. Umunsi umwe asanga se mu basaruzi. 
2Kings4:19 Aramutakira avuga ati «Ndwaye umutwe! Ndwaye umutwe!» Se abwira umugaragu we, ati «Mushyire nyina!»" 
2Kings4:20 Umugaragu aramujyana, amushyikiriza nyina. Nyina aramukikira, ariko agejeje saa sita arapfa." 
2Kings4:21 Nyina arazamuka amurambika ku buriri bwa wa muntu w’Imana, hanyuma aramukingirana arisohokera." 
2Kings4:22 Ahamagara umugabo we, aramubwira ati «Ndagusabye, nyoherereza umwe mu bagaragu n’imwe mu ndogobe, ndagira ngo nyarukire kwa wa muntu w’Imana ngaruke.»" 
2Kings4:23 Umugabo aramubaza ati «Ni kuki ushaka kujya iwe uyu munsi, kandi atari ku mboneko y’ukwezi cyangwa kuri sabato?» Aramusubiza ati «Wihagarika umutima!»" 
2Kings4:24 Umugore ategeka ko bamutegurira icyicaro ku ndogobe, maze abwira umugaragu we, ati «Nyobora tugende, ariko ntumpagarike mu nzira ntabikubwiye!»" 
2Kings4:25 Aragenda asanga umuntu w’Imana ku musozi wa Karumeli. Umuntu w’Imana amurabutswe akiri kure, abwira umugaragu we Gehazi, ati «Nguriya wa Mushunemukazi!" 
2Kings4:26 Ihute umusanganire maze umubaze uti ’Amakuru ki? Umugabo wawe araho? Umwana ameze neza?’» Umugore aramusubiza, ati «Byose ni amahoro.»" 
2Kings4:27 Ageze ku muntu w’Imana aho yari ku musozi, amufata ibirenge. Gehazi amwegereye ngo amusunike, umuntu w’Imana aramubuza, agira ati «Mureke kuko afite agahinda, ariko Uhoraho yabimpishe, ntiyabimenyesheje.»" 
2Kings4:28 Umugore aravuga ati «Hari ubwo ari jye wisabiye databuja umwana w’umuhungu? Sinari nakubwiye nti reka kumbeshya?» 
2Kings4:29 Elisha abwira Gehazi, ati «Kenyera, ufate inkoni yanjye mu ntoki maze ugende; nuhura n’umuntu ntumuramutse kandi nihagira ukuramutsa ntumusubize. Iyi nkoni yanjye uzayishyira ku ruhanga rw’umwana.»" 
2Kings4:30 Nuko nyina w’umwana aravuga ati «Nkurahiye Uhoraho n’ubuzima bwawe, singusiga.» Elisha arahaguruka aramukurikira." 
2Kings4:31 Ubwo Gehazi yari yababanje imbere, ashyira inkoni ku ruhanga rw’umwana, ariko ntihagira ijwi cyangwa se ikindi kimenyetso kiboneka cy’ubuzima. Gehazi aragaruka ahura na Elisha, amubwira ibyabaye, avuga ati «Umwana ntiyakangutse.»" 
2Kings4:32 Elisha ageze mu nzu, asanga koko umwana yapfuye, aryamye ku buriri bwe." 
2Kings4:33 Arinjira, yikingirana mu nzu hamwe n’umwana, asenga Uhoraho." 
2Kings4:34 Hanyuma yubama ku mwana ahuje umunwa we n’uw’umwana, amaso ku yandi n’ibiganza ku bindi; akomeza kumwubararaho, umurambo w’umwana urasusuruka." 
2Kings4:35 Elisha amanuka mu nzu, arigenzagenza, akubita hirya, akubita hino, hanyuma yongera kuzamuka arambarara hejuru y’umwana kugeza ku ncuro ndwi. Ni bwo umwana yitsamuye, abumbura amaso." 
2Kings4:36 Elisha ahamagara Gehazi, aramubwira ati «Hamagara uwo Mushunemukazi.» Aramuhamagara. Yitabye, Elisha aramubwira ati «Jyana umwana wawe!»" 
2Kings4:37 Umugore yunama ku birenge bya Elisha, akoza umutwe ku butaka, hanyuma afata umwana we arasohoka." 
2Kings4:38 Elisha asubira i Giligali, ubwo inzara yacaga ibintu mu gihugu. Kubera ko abahanuzi bo mu itorero ry’aho bari bicaye imbere ye, yabwiye umugaragu we, ati «Shyira inkono nini ku ziko, maze uteke isupu y’abahanuzi.»" 
2Kings4:39 Umwe muri abo bahanuzi ajya ku gasozi gusoroma imboga. Abona umutanga wo mu ishyamba, awusoromaho ibihaza yuzuza umwenda we arataha, arabikeka, abishyira muri ya nkono, nta muntu n’umwe umenye ibyo ari byo." 
2Kings4:40 Bagaburira abantu, ariko bagisoma kuri iyo supu, batera hejuru bati «Iyi supu irimo uburozi, muntu w’Imana!» Ntibaba bagishoboye kurya." 
2Kings4:41 Umuntu w’Imana arababwira ati «Nimuzane ifu!» Barayimuzanira ayishyira mu nkono, hanyuma aravuga ati «Nimwarurire abantu barye!» Basanga nta kibi kikiri mu nkono." 
2Kings4:42 Haza umuntu aturutse i BehaliShalisha, azanira umuntu w’Imana ibiryo by’umuganura: byari imigati makumyabiri y’ifu y’ingano n’umufuka umwe wuzuye ingano zigisarurwa. Elisha aravuga ati «Nimubigaburire abantu barye!»" 
2Kings4:43 Umugaragu we aramusubiza ati «Nashobora nte kubigaburira abantu ijana?» Aramusubiza ati «Bibagaburire barye, kuko Uhoraho avuze ngo bazarya kandi basigaze!»" 
2Kings4:44 Umugaragu agaburira abantu, bararya kandi baranabisigaza, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze." 
2Kings5:1 Nahamani, umugaba w’ingabo z’umwami wa Aramu, yari umuntu wemerwa cyane na shebuja, ari umutoni we, kuko ari we Uhoraho yakoresheje agaha Aramu gutsinda. Ariko uwo mugabo w’intwari yari umubembe." 
2Kings5:2 Umunsi umwe Abaramu bari bateye mu gihugu cya Israheli bagiye kunyaga, bahavana umwana w’umukobwa ari imbohe, bamushyira umugore wa Nahamani amugira umuja we." 
2Kings5:3 Abwira nyirabuja, ati «Yewe, iyaba databuja yashoboraga gusanga umuhanuzi w’i Samariya! Nta kabuza yamukiza ibibembe bye.»" 
2Kings5:4 Nahamani ajya kumenyesha shebuja amagambo umukobwa waturutse mu gihugu cya Israheli yavuze. 
2Kings5:5 Umwami wa Aramu aramubwira ati «Genda! Ndandikira umwami wa Israheli ibaruwa.» Nahamani aragenda, ajyana amatalenta cumi ya feza, amasikeli ibihumbi bitandatu ya zahabu, n’imyambaro cumi yo kujya ahindura." 
2Kings5:6 Ashyikiriza umwami wa Israheli urwandiko rwavugaga ngo «Mu gihe uru rwandiko ruzaba rukugezeho, uzamenye ko nkoherereje umugaragu wanjye Nahamani, kugira ngo umukize ibibembe arwaye.»" 
2Kings5:7 Umwami amaze gusoma urwo rwandiko, ashishimura imyambaro ye, avuga ati «Ese ndi Imana yica kandi igakiza, kubona uriya mugabo anyoherereza umuntu ngo muvure ibibembe? Nimumenye neza kandi mubirebe: arashaka kunyendereza!»" 
2Kings5:8 Elisha, umuntu w’Imana, amaze kumenya ko umwami wa Israheli yashishimuye imyambaro ye, amutumaho agira ati «Ni iki cyatumye ushishimura imyambaro yawe? Nyoherereza Nahamani uwo, maze azamenye ko muri Israheli hari umuhanuzi!»" 
2Kings5:9 Nahamani azana n’amafarasi ye n’igare rye, maze ahagarara mu muryango w’inzu ya Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Elisha amutumaho umuntu wo kumubwira ngo «Genda! Wiyuhagire muri Yorudani incuro ndwi, uri busubirane umubiri mutaraga, maze ukire ibibembe.»" 
2Kings5:11 Nahamani ararakara, agenda avuga ati «Nibwiraga ko ari busohoke, akajya ahagaragara maze akambaza izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana ye, agashyira ikiganza cye aharwaye akankiza ibibembe." 
2Kings5:12 Ese imigezi y’i Damasi, ari yo Ebana na Paripari, ntitambutse kure amazi yose ya Israheli? Sinashoboraga se kwiyuhagiramo ngakira?» Arahindukira agenda arakaye." 
2Kings5:13 Abagaragu baramusanga, bamubwira bati «Mubyeyi! Iyaba umuhanuzi yagutegetse gukora ikintu gikomeye, ntuba wagikoze? Nkanswe kukubwira ngo genda wiyuhagire urakira!»" 
2Kings5:14 Nuko Nahamani aramanuka ajya kuri Yorudani, yibira mu mazi incuro ndwi nk’uko yabitegetswe n’umuntu w’Imana. Umubiri we uhinduka nk’uw’umwana muto, maze akira ibibembe." 
2Kings5:15 Nahamani asubira ku muntu w’Imana, abantu be bamushagaye. Agezeyo arinjira, amuhagarara imbere, maze aramubwira ati «Noneho menye ko nta Mana iriho ku isi hose, keretse muri Israheli. Ndakwinginze, emera wakire ituro jyewe umugaragu wawe ngutuye.»" 
2Kings5:16 Elisha aramusubiza ati «Nkurahiye Uhoraho nkorera, nta kintu na kimwe nakira!» Nahamani akomeza kumwinginga, ariko undi aranga." 
2Kings5:17 Nahamani aramubwira ati «Ubwo utabyemeye, umpe jyewe umugaragu wawe, imitwaro y’ibitaka yahekwa n’inyumbu ebyiri, kuko umugaragu wawe nta zindi mana azongera guha amaturo no gutura ibitambo bitwikwa, atari Uhoraho." 
2Kings5:18 Nyamara nizeye ko Uhoraho azajya ambabarira iki kintu kimwe: databuja umwami nazajya yinjira mu ngoro ya Rimoni imana yacu ngo ayiramye, azagenda yishingikirije ku kuboko kwanjye; ubwo se jyewe nazakwirinda nte kunamira Rimoni kandi nzaba ndi iruhande rw’umwami mu ngoro? Uhoraho azababarire umugaragu we kuri icyo gikorwa!»" 
2Kings5:19 Elisha aramusubiza ati «Genda amahoro.» Nahamani amaze kugera kure gato ya Elisha," 
2Kings5:20 Gehazi, umugaragu wa Elisha umuntu w’Imana, aribwira ati «Databuja yagiriye ubuntu uriya Nahamani w’Umwaramu yanga kwakira amaturo amuhaye. Ndahiye Uhoraho, ndirutse mushyikire, maze agire icyo anyihera.»" 
2Kings5:21 Gehazi akurikira Nahamani. Nahamani abonye amwirukaho, amanuka vuba ku igare rye, aramusanganira maze aramubaza ati «Ni amahoro?»" 
2Kings5:22 Undi aramusubiza ati «Ni amahoro.» Ati «Databuja anyohereje kukubwira ngo aka kanya haje abahungu babiri bo mu bahanuzi baturutse ku musozi wa Efurayimu, ngo arakwinginze ubamuhere italenta imwe ya feza n’imyambaro ibiri yo guhindura.»" 
2Kings5:23 Nahamani aramubwira ati «Akira amatalenta abiri.» Aramuhata, afata amatalenta abiri ya feza n’imyenda ibiri yo guhindura, abihambira mu mifuka ibiri ayikorera abagaragu be, kugira ngo babitwaze Gehazi." 
2Kings5:24 Bageze kuri Ofeli, Gehazi yaka imifuka ba bagabo babiri, ayishyira iwe, arabasezerera barataha." 
2Kings5:25 We aza kwa shebuja. Elisha aramubaza ati «Uraturuka he, Gehazi?» Aramusubiza ati «Nta ho umugaragu wawe yigeze ajya.»" 
2Kings5:26 Elisha aramubwira ati «Ese, umutima wanjye ntiwari kumwe nawe, igihe umuntu yamanukaga vuba ku igare rye aje kugusanganira? Ese bikumariye iki kwakira feza, imyambaro, imitini, imizabibu, impfizi z’intama n’iz’inka, abagaragu n’abaja," 
2Kings5:27 kandi ugiye gufatwa n’ibibembe bya Nahamani, ukazabirwara wowe n’urubyaro rwawe bikababaho akarande?» Gehazi atandukana na Elisha, maze umubiri we ugenda wera nk’urubura kubera ibibembe." 
2Kings6:1 Abahanuzi babwira Elisha, bati «Umwanya twicaramo hano imbere yawe ni muto cyane." 
2Kings6:2 Twemerere tujye kuri Yorudani, buri muntu akureyo igiti maze twiyubakire hano ahantu tuzajya twicara.» Arabasubiza ati «Nimugende!»" 
2Kings6:3 Umwe muri bo aramubwira ati «Ndakwinginze, emera kujyana n’abagaragu bawe.» Aramusubiza ati «Yego, ndaje.»" 
2Kings6:4 Nuko barajyana, bagera kuri Yorudani, batema ibiti." 
2Kings6:5 Mu gihe umwe muri bo agitema igiti cye, ishoka irakuka igwa mu mazi. Atera hejuru ataka, ati «Ayiwe, shobuja, ko iriya shoka yari intirano!»" 
2Kings6:6 Umuntu w’Imana aramubaza ati «Iguye he?» Arahamwereka. Elisha atema agashami ku giti, akajugunya mu mazi, ishoka irareremba." 
2Kings6:7 Elisha aramubwira ati «Yikurure uyizane!» Umugabo arambura ukuboko, arayisingira." 
2Kings6:8 Umwami wa Aramu yarwanaga n’Abayisraheli, noneho ajya inama n’abagaragu be, aravuga ati «Hariya ni ho hazaba ingando yanjye»," 
2Kings6:9 ariko umuntu w’Imana atuma ku mwami w’Abayisraheli, ati «Wirinde kunyura hariya hantu kuko ari ho Abaramu bamanukiye bajya kugutera.»" 
2Kings6:10 Umwami w’Abayisraheli yohereza abantu ha handi umuntu w’Imana yavuze. Elisha yaburiraga umwami kugira ngo yitegure, nuko abigira incuro nyinshi." 
2Kings6:11 Umwami wa Aramu ahagarika umutima cyane. Atumira abagaragu be, arababaza ati «Ntimwambwira umuntu muri twe ufatanyije n’umwami w’Abayisraheli?»" 
2Kings6:12 Umwe mu bagaragu be aramusubiza ati «Nta we, shobuja mwami, ahubwo Elisha, umuhanuzi wo muri Israheli, ni we ushobora kubwira umwami wa Israheli ibyo uvugira mu cyumba cyawe.»" 
2Kings6:13 Arababwira ati «Nimugende murebe aho ari, maze noherezeyo abamufata.» Baramusubiza bati «Ari i Dotani.»" 
2Kings6:14 Umwami yohereza amafarasi, amagare n’ingabo z’abasirikare zihagije, bagezeyo nijoro, bagota uwo mugi." 
2Kings6:15 Umugaragu w’umuntu w’Imana azinduka kare mu gitondo, arasohoka abona ingabo z’abasirikare, n’amafarasi, n’amagare bigose umugi. Abwira Elisha, ati «Shobuja, turabigenza dute?»" 
2Kings6:16 Aramusubiza ati «Witinya, ingabo zacu ziruta ubwinshi izabo.»" 
2Kings6:17 Elisha asenga, agira ati «Uhoraho, muhumure amaso arebe!» Uhoraho ahumura amaso y’uwo mugaragu, arareba abona umusozi wuzuye amafarasi n’amagare by’umuriro, bikikije Elisha!" 
2Kings6:18 Ingabo z’Abaramu zisanga Elisha; na we asaba Uhoraho muri aya magambo: «Huma amaso ya ziriya ngabo!» Uhoraho azihuma amaso nk’uko Elisha yabisabye. 
2Kings6:19 Elisha aravuga ati «Iyi si yo nzira mugomba kunyuramo, si na wo mugi mwoherejwemo. Nimunkurikire, ndabageza ku muntu mushaka.» Aherako abajyana i Samariya." 
2Kings6:20 Bakigera i Samariya, Elisha asenga, avuga ati «Uhoraho, humura amaso y’aba bantu maze babone!» Uhoraho abahumura amaso, barebye basanga bari mu mugi wa Samariya rwagati." 
2Kings6:21 Umwami wa Israheli ababonye abwira Elisha, ati «Mubyeyi, mbice?»" 
2Kings6:22 Aramusubiza ati «Wibica! Ufite se akamenyero ko kwica abo watsindishije inkota n’imiheto ukabagira imfungwa? Ahubwo bahe umugati n’amazi, barye kandi banywe hanyuma basange shebuja.»" 
2Kings6:23 Umwami abatekeshereza ibyo kurya byinshi, bararya kandi baranywa. Hanyuma arabasezerera basubira kwa shebuja. Kuva ubwo ingabo z’Abaramu zimara igihe zitongeye gutera igihugu cya Israheli." 
2Kings6:24 Nyuma y’ibyo, Beni‐Hadadi, umwami wa Aramu, akoranya ingabo ze zose, maze arazamuka bajya kugota Samariya." 
2Kings6:25 Hatera inzara ikaze muri Samariya. Umugi uragotwa ku buryo umutwe w’indogobe waguraga amasikeli mirongo inani ya feza, n’icya kane cy’igipimo cy’amahurunguru y’inuma kikagurwa amasikeli atanu ya feza." 
2Kings6:26 Rimwe, umwami wa Israheli anyura ku nkike z’amabuye zizengurutse umugi, nuko umugore aza amutakambira, agira ati «Ntabara, shobuja mwami!»" 
2Kings6:27 Umwami aramusubiza, ati «Niba Uhoraho atakurengeye, jye nagutabaza iki? Ngutabaze se ingano zo ku mbuga, cyangwa se ibinyobwa byo mu rwengero?»" 
2Kings6:28 Umwami yongera kumubaza, ati «Urashaka iki?» Undi aramusubiza ati «Uriya mugore yarambwiye ngo ’Zana umwana wawe tumurye none, uwanjye tuzamurya ejo’." 
2Kings6:29 Twatekesheje umwana wanjye turamurya; ku munsi ukurikiyeho musabye kuzana uwe ngo tumurye, ajya kumuhisha.»" 
2Kings6:30 Umwami amaze kumva amagambo y’uwo mugore, ashishimura imyenda ye, kandi bitewe n’uko yagendaga hejuru y’inkike z’amabuye, imbaga y’abantu ibona ko yambaye ibigunira ku mubiri, imbere y’imyambaro ye." 
2Kings6:31 Nuko aravuga ati «Imana inkorere uko ishaka, niba uyu munsi nimugoroba, Elisha mwene Shafati ntamucishije umutwe!»" 
2Kings6:32 Elisha yari yicaye iwe akikijwe n’abakuru b’umugi, nuko umwami amutumaho umwe mu bagaragu be. Intumwa itaramugeraho, Elisha abwira abakuru, ati «Nimurebe! Dore wa mwana w’umwicanyi anyoherejeho umuntu wo kunca igihanga. Intumwa nigera hano, muhite mukinga urugi muyibuze kwinjira. Ubundi se ntimwumva namwe imirindi ya shebuja uje amukurikiye?»" 
2Kings6:33 Akivuga ibyo, umwami ubwe aba arahageze, maze aramubwira ati «Ko ibi byago twabitejwe n’Uhoraho, namwizeraho iki kindi?»" 
2Kings7:1 Elisha arasubiza ati «Nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho. Aravuze ngo: Ejo nk’iki gihe, ku irembo rya Samariya incuro imwe y’ifu izagura sikeli imwe, incuro ebyiri z’ingano na zo zigure sikeli imwe.»" 
2Kings7:2 Umufasha w’umwami, ari na we yegamiraga, abaza umuntu w’Imana, ati «N’aho Uhoraho yafungura amadirishya y’ijuru, ese byaba nk’uko ubivuze?» Elisha aramusubiza ati «Uzabirebesha amaso yawe bwite, ariko ntuzabiryaho.»" 
2Kings7:3 Hari ababembe bane ku irembo ry’umugi. Baravugana bati «Kuki twaguma hano kugeza igihe tuzapfira? 
2Kings7:4 Nituvuga tuti ’Twinjire mu mugi, tuzahasanga inzara itwice, kandi nituguma hano, na bwo tuzapfa. Nimuze tujye mu ngando y’Abaramu; nibatwihorera tuzabaho, kandi nibatwica tuzapfe!»" 
2Kings7:5 Ku mugoroba w’akabwibwi, barahaguruka bajya mu ngando y’Abaramu, bahageze barayizenguruka yose, basanga nta muntu n’umwe uyirimo." 
2Kings7:6 Koko rero, Uhoraho yari yateje Abaramu kumva urusaku rw’amagare, urw’amafarasi n’urw’ingabo nyinshi, noneho Abaramu barabwirana bati «Umwami wa Israheli yaguriye abami b’Abaheti n’abami ba Misiri kugira ngo badutere.»" 
2Kings7:7 Ubwo nimugoroba mu kabwibwi Abaramu barahaguruka, barahunga. Bata amahema yabo n’amafarasi n’indogobe byabo, basiga ingando uko yakabaye, barahunga bagira ngo bakize amagara yabo." 
2Kings7:8 Ba babembe bamaze kuzenguruka ingando yose, binjira mu ihema rimwe bararya kandi baranywa, hanyuma bakuramo feza, zahabu n’imyambaro, bajya kubihisha. Barahindukira binjira mu rindi hema, bakuramo ibindi byarimo, na byo bajya kubihisha." 
2Kings7:9 Ba babembe barabwirana bati «Ibi dukora ntibikwiriye. Uyu munsi ni uw’inkuru nziza tutagomba kwihererana. Niba nta cyo tuvuze tugategereza ko bucya, tuzahanwa. Nimuze tugende twinjire mu mugi tubimenyeshe abo mu rugo rw’umwami.»" 
2Kings7:10 Baragenda; bageze mu mugi bahamagara abarinzi b’irembo ry’umugi, barababwira bati «Twagiye mu ngando y’Abaramu, dusanga nta muntu n’umwe uyirimo, nta jwi ry’umuntu riharangwa, uretse gusa amafarasi n’indogobe biziritse, kandi amahema ari uko yakabaye.»" 
2Kings7:11 Abo barinzi b’irembo bahamagara abari mu ngoro y’umwami, babamenyesha iyo nkuru." 
2Kings7:12 Nuko umwami arabyuka mu gicuku, abwira abagaragu be, ati «Mureke mbasobanurire umutego Abaramu baduteze: bamenye ko twishwe n’inzara, basohoka mu ngando yabo bajya kwihisha ku musozi, bibwira bati ’Nibasohoka bava mu mugi wabo turabafata mpiri, maze tugende twinjire mu mugi wabo.’»" 
2Kings7:13 Umwe mu bagaragu aramusubiza ati «Dufate amafarasi atanu mu yasigaye mu mugi — ubundi bwo ntagiye gushira nk’ayandi yose? — maze tuyohereze turebe.» 
2Kings7:14 Bafata amagare abiri n’amafarasi yayo, umwami arabohereza ngo bakurikire ingabo z’Abaramu, avuga ati «Nimugende murebe!»" 
2Kings7:15 Barazikurikira kugera ubwo bageze kuri Yorudani, basanga inzira yose yuzuye imyambaro n’ibindi bintu ingabo z’Abaramu zataye kubera guhunga zihuta cyane. Intumwa zigaruka kubwira umwami ibyo zabonye."
