2Kings23:30 Amaze gutanga, abagaragu be bahetse umurambo we mu igare, bawuvana i Megido bawujyana i Yeruzalemu, bawushyingura mu mva ye. Abaturage bafata Yowakazi mwene Yoziya, bamusiga amavuta maze baramwimika, azungura se ku ngoma." 
2Kings23:31 Yowakazi yimye ingoma amaze imyaka makumyabiri n’itatu avutse, amara amezi atatu ari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Nyina yitwaga Hamutali, umukobwa wa Yirimeyahu w’i Libuna." 
2Kings23:32 Yakurikije ingeso mbi zose z’abasekuruza be, akora ibidatunganiye Uhoraho." 
2Kings23:33 Farawo Neko yamufungiye i Ribula mu gihugu cya Hamati, agira ngo amukure ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Muri icyo gihe Farawo Neko ategeka igihugu cya Yuda gutanga umusoro w’amatalenta ijana ya feza n’amatalenta icumi ya zahabu." 
2Kings23:34 Yimika Eliyakimu mwene Yoziya, azungura se ku ngoma, ariko Farawo amuhindura izina, amwita Yoyakimu. Naho Yowakazi we aramufunga, amujyana mu Misiri agwayo." 
2Kings23:35 Yoyakimu aha Farawo feza na zahabu. Kugira ngo abone ibyategetswe na Farawo, ashyiraho umusoro mu gihugu: ahata abaturage bose gutanga feza na zahabu bakurikije ubutunzi bwa buri wese, nuko abiha Farawo Neko." 
2Kings23:36 Yoyakimu yimitswe amaze imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu avutse, amara imyaka cumi n’umwe ari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Nyina yitwaga Zebida, umukobwa wa Pedaya w’i Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Yakoze ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, akurikiza ibyo abasekuruza be bakoraga byose." 
2Kings24:1 Ku ngoma ye, Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni, aratera. Yoyakimu amuyoboka imyaka itatu, hanyuma arahinduka aramugomera." 
2Kings24:2 Maze Uhoraho ateza Yoyakimu ibitero by’ingabo z’Abakalideya, iby’ingabo z’Abaramu, iby’ingabo z’Abamowabu n’iby’ingabo za bene Hamoni; ibyo bitero bitsemba Yuda nk’uko byari byarahanuwe n’abahanuzi, abagaragu b’Uhoraho." 
2Kings24:3 Ibyo byose byabaye kuri Yuda bitewe n’itegeko ry’Uhoraho utari agishaka kubabona imbere ye, abahoye ibicumuro bya Manase n’ibindi byose yakoze." 
2Kings24:4 Koko Manase yamennye amaraso y’abantu benshi b’intungane, ayasendereza umurwa wa Yeruzalemu, nuko Uhoraho yanga kubimubabarira." 
2Kings24:5 Ibindi bigwi bya Yoyakimu, n’ibyo yakoze byose, ntibyanditswe se mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’abami ba Yuda?" 
2Kings24:6 Nuko Yoyakimu aratanga asanga abasekuruza be, umuhungu we Yoyakini amuzungura ku ngoma." 
2Kings24:7 Umwami wa Misiri we ntiyongeye kuva mu gihugu cye, kuko umwami wa Babiloni yari yarafashe ibihugu bye byose arabyigarurira, kuva ku mugezi wa Misiri kugera ku ruzi rwa Efurati." 
2Kings24:8 Yoyakini yimitswe amaze imyaka cumi n’umunani avutse, amara amezi atatu ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Nyina yitwaga Nehushita, akaba umukobwa wa Elinatani w’i Yeruzalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Yakoze nabi imbere y’Uhoraho, nk’uko se yabigenjeje." 
2Kings24:10 Muri icyo gihe, abagaragu ba Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni, batera Yeruzalemu; umurwa uragotwa." 
2Kings24:11 Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni, ubwe arahaguruka, asanga ingabo zariho zigota uwo murwa." 
2Kings24:12 Nuko Yoyakini, umwami wa Yuda aritanga, yiha umwami wa Babiloni, we na nyina, n’abagaragu be, n’ibikomangoma bye n’abatware be. Umwami wa Babiloni arabafata arabafunga, ubwo hari mu mwaka wa munani w’ingoma ye." 
2Kings24:13 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabivuze, umwami wa Babiloni asahura umutungo wose wo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho n’uwo mu ngoro y’umwami; amenagura ibintu byose bya zahabu Salomoni, umwami wa Israheli, yari yakoreshereje Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings24:14 Afata abaturage b’i Yeruzalemu, n’abatware babo bose, n’abantu b’abakungu, bose hamwe bagera ku bihumbi cumi, utabariyemo abanyabukorikori b’umuringa n’abacuzi bose; nuko ajya kubafungira mu gihugu cye. Ba rubanda rugufi ni bo bonyine basigaye aho i Yeruzalemu." 
2Kings24:15 Avana Yoyakini i Yeruzalemu ajya kumufungira i Babiloni, amujyanana na nyina, abagore be, ibikomangoma bye n’abatware b’igihugu." 
2Kings24:16 Abakungu bose bari ibihumbi birindwi, abanyabukorikori b’umuringa n’abacuzi bari igihumbi; abo bose umwami wa Babiloni abajyana bunyago i Babiloni hamwe n’abasirikare bose b’intwari." 
2Kings24:17 Nuko umwami wa Babiloni yimikira i Yeruzalemu Mataniya, se wabo wa Yoyakini, mu kigwi cye, ariko amuhindura izina amwita Sedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Sedekiya yimitswe amaze imyaka makumyabiri n’umwe avutse, amara imyaka cumi n’umwe ari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu. Nyina yitwaga Hamutali, umukobwa wa Irimeyahu w’i Libuna." 
2Kings24:19 Yakoze ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, nk’uko Yoyakimu yabigenjeje." 
2Kings24:20 Ni uburakari bw’Uhoraho bwatumye hatera ibyago i Yeruzalemu no muri Yuda, kugera ubwo Uhoraho yabajugunye kure ye. Nuko Sedekiya agomera umwami wa Babiloni." 
2Kings25:1 Ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa cumi mu mwaka wa cyenda w’ingoma ya Sedekiya, Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni, yajyanye n’ingabo ze zose atera Yeruzalemu. Ahageze ahatuza ingabo ze, umugi wose ziwuzengurutsa imikingo miremire." 
2Kings25:2 Umurwa ntiwafatwa kugeza mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe w’ingoma ya Sedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Nuko mu mugi inzara irabiyogoza, abantu babura icyo barya. Ku munsi wa cyenda w’ukwezi kwa kane," 
2Kings25:4 ni bwo Abakalideya baciye icyuho mu rukuta rw’umugi ariko bumaze kwira ingabo zose za Yuda ziracika, n’ubwo Abakalideya bari bagose Yeruzalemu yose. Bagenda banyuze mu muryango uri hagati y’inkike zombi hafi y’umurima w’Umwami, bagenda berekeza iya Araba." 
2Kings25:5 Nyamara ingabo z’Abakalideya zikurikira umwami, zimufatira mu kibaya cy’i Yeriko; ingabo ze zose ziramutererana." 
2Kings25:6 Ingabo z’Abakalideya zifata umwami Sedekiya ziramuboha, zimushyira umwami wa Babiloni wari i Ribula, amucira urubanza." 
2Kings25:7 Bahotorera abahungu ba Sedekiya imbere ye, hanyuma Nebukadinetsari anogora Sedekiya mo amaso, bamubohesha umunyururu w’inyabubiri w’umuringa maze bamujyana i Babiloni." 
2Kings25:8 Ku munsi wa karindwi w’ukwezi kwa gatanu, mu mwaka wa cumi n’icyenda w’ingoma ya Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni, ni ho Nebuzaradani, umutware w’abarinzi n’umugaragu w’umwami wa Babiloni, yinjiye muri Yeruzalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Atwika Ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro y’umwami, n’amazu yose y’i Yeruzalemu, cyane cyane ay’abantu bakomeye." 
2Kings25:10 Ingabo zose z’Abakalideya zari ziherekeje umutware w’abarinzi b’umwami, zisenya inkike zari zikikije Yeruzalemu." 
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradani, umutware w’abarinzi b’umwami, ajyana bunyago abantu bari basigaye aho mu mugi, n’Abayuda bari biyeguriye umwami wa Babiloni, n’abandi banyabukorikori bari basigaye." 
2Kings25:12 Umutware w’abarinzi asiga mu gihugu abantu bake muri rubanda rugufi gusa, kugira ngo bahinge imizabibu n’imirima." 
2Kings25:13 Abakalideya bamenagura inkingi ebyiri z’umuringa zari imbere y’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, n’ibitereko n’ikizenga cy’amazi by’umuringa byari biteretse imbere y’iyo Ngoro, imiringa yabyo bayijyana i Babiloni." 
2Kings25:14 Bajyana n’amabesani, ibitiyo, ibyuma byo kuyora ivu, ibikombe n’ibindi bikoresho byose by’umuringa byakoreshwaga mu Ngoro." 
2Kings25:15 Umutware wabo atwara ibyotezo by’imibavu n’ibyungo byari bicuzwe muri feza no mu muringa. 
2Kings25:16 Ntawamenya uburemere bw’imiringa yavuye kuri za nkingi zombi, no ku kizenga cy’amazi, no ku bitereko Salomoni yari yarakoreshereje Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings25:17 Ubuhagarike bw’inkingi imwe bwari ubw’imikono cumi n’umunani; hejuru yayo hari umutwe wacuzwe mu muringa ufite ubuhagarike bw’imikono itatu, wari usobekeranyijeho imitako y’inshundura n’imbuto zitukura, byose bicuzwe mu miringa. Inkingi ya kabiri na yo yasaga n’iya mbere." 
2Kings25:18 Umutware w’abarinzi b’umwami wa Babiloni afata Seraya umuherezabitambo mukuru, na Sefaniyahu umuherezabitambo wungirije, n’abarinzi batatu b’irembo." 
2Kings25:19 Arongera afata umutware w’ingabo, n’abantu batanu b’ibyegera by’umwami bari i Yeruzalemu, afata kandi n’umunyamabanga w’umutware w’ingabo, ari na we wari ushinzwe gutora muri rubanda abazajya ku rugamba, afata n’abagabo mirongo itandatu mu bari muri uwo mugi." 
2Kings25:20 Abo bose Nebuzaradani, umutware w’abarinzi b’umwami arabafunga, hanyuma abashyira umwami wa Babiloni i Ribula." 
2Kings25:21 Umwami wa Babiloni abakubitishiriza aho i Ribula mu gihugu cy’i Hamati maze arabicisha. Uko ni ko Yuda yajyanywe bunyago, bavanwa mu gihugu cyabo." 
2Kings25:22 Abantu Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni, yari yarekeye mu gihugu cya Yuda, abaha uwitwa Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu, mwene Shafani, ngo abategeke." 
2Kings25:23 Abagaba bose n’ingabo zose, bamaze kumva ko umwami wa Babiloni yahaye ubutware uwitwa Gedaliyahu, barikora basanga Gedaliyahu i Misipa; abo bagaba b’ingabo ni: Ismaheli mwene Netaniya, na Yohanani mwene Kareya, na Seraya mwene Tanihumeti w’i Netofa, na Yazaniyahu w’i Maka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliyahu arabarahira bo n’abantu babo, ati «Ntimutinye kuba abagaragu b’Abakalideya! Mugume muri iki gihugu, mwumvire kandi mukorere umwami wa Babiloni, muzahamererwa neza.»" 
2Kings25:25 Ariko mu kwezi kwa karindwi, Ismaheli mwene Netaniya, mwene Elishama, wo mu bwoko bwa cyami, azana n’abantu cumi, maze bica Gedaliyahu, hamwe n’Abayuda n’Abakalideya bari kumwe na we i Misipa." 
2Kings25:26 Nuko abantu bose, abakuru n’abato, abagaba b’ingabo, bafata inzira bajya mu Misiri kubera ko batinyaga Abakalideya." 
2Kings25:27 Ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’irindwi w’ukwezi kwa cumi n’abiri, mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n’irindwi w’ubunyagwe bwa Yoyakini, umwami wa Yuda, Evili‐Merodaki, umwami wa Babiloni, ababarira Yoyakini, umwami wa Yuda, aramufungura. Uwo mwaka ni wo Evili‐Merodaki yari yimitswemo." 
2Kings25:28 Amuganiriza gicuti kandi amuha intebe y’icyubahiro isumba iz’abandi bami bari hamwe i Babiloni. 
2Kings25:29 Amwambura imyambaro ya kinyururu, maze Yoyakini akajya asangira na we ku meza mu gihe yari akiriho." 
2Kings25:30 Umwami yemera kumuha ibimutunga buri munsi, mu gihe cyose yari akiriho." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu, Seti, Enoshi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Mahalaleli, Yeredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Henoki, Matushalomu, Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 Nowa, Semu, Kamu na Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Bene Yafeti ni Gomeri, Magogi, Madayi, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki na Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Bene Gomeri ni Ashikenazi, Rifati na Togarima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Bene Yavani ni Elisha, Tarishishi, Kitimu na Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Bene Kamu ni Kushi, Misiri, Puti na Kanahani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Bene Kushi ni Seba, Havila, Sabuta, Rahema na Sabuteka; bene Rahema ni Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi abyara Nemurodi, ari we ntwari ya mbere ku isi." 
1Chronicles1:11 Misiri abyara Abaludi, Abanamu, Abalehabu, Abanagutuwa," 
1Chronicles1:12 Abapaturusi, Abakasiluwa, n’Abakafutori, ari bo Abafilisiti bakomokaho." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanahani abyara Sidoni ari we mfura ye, abyara na Heti," 
1Chronicles1:14 Umuyebuzi, Umuhemori, Umugirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 Umuhivi, Umwaruki, Umusini," 
1Chronicles1:16 Umwaruvadi, Umusemari, Umuhamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Bene Semu ni Elamu, Ashuru, Arupagishadi, Ludi, Aramu. Bene Aramu ni Usi, Huli, Geteri, na Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arupagishadi abyara Shelaki, naho Shelaki abyara Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Kuri Eberi havuka abahungu babiri: uwa mbere yitwaga Pelegi, kuko mu gihe cye isi yagabanyijwemo imigabane, murumuna we yitwaga Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani abyara Alimodadi, Shelefi, Hasarimaweti, Yeraki," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu, Huza, Dikila," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali, Abimayeli, Saba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havila, na Yobabu. Abo bose ni bene Yokutani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Semu abyara Arupagishadi, Arupagishadi abyara Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Shela abyara Eberi, Eberi abyara Pelegi, Pelegi abyara Rewu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Rewu abyara Serugu, Serugu abyara Nahori, Nahori abyara Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Tera abyara Abramu ari we Abrahamu. 
1Chronicles1:28 Bene Abrahamu ni Izaki na Ismaheli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Dore imiryango yabo: Imfura ya Ismaheli ni Nebayoti, hagakurikiraho Kedari, Adibiyeli, Mibusamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishuma, Duma, Masa, Hadadi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafishi na Kedima. Abo ni bo bene Ismaheli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Bene Ketura, inshoreke ya Abrahamu ni aba: yabyaye Zimurani, Yokishani, Medani, Madiyani, Yishibaki na Shuwa. Bene Yokishani ni Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Bene Madiyani ni Eyifa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida na Elida. Abo bose ni bo bene Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahamu abyara Izaki. Bene Izaki ni Ezawu na Israheli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Bene Ezawu ni Elifazi, Rehuweli, Yehushi, Yelamu na Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Bene Elifazi ni Temani, Omari, Sefo, Gayetamu, Kenazi, Timuna na Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Bene Rehuweli ni Nahati, Zerahi, Shama na Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Bene Seyiri ni Lotani, Shobali, Sibewoni, Ana, Dishoni, Eseri na Dishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Bene Lotani ni Hori na Homamu. Mushiki wa Lotani yitwaga Timina. 
1Chronicles1:40 Bene Shobali ni Aluwani, Manahati, Ebali, Shefo na Onamu. Bene Sibewoni ni Aya na Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mwene Ana ni Dishoni. Bene Dishoni ni Hamurani, Eshibani, Yitirani na Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Bene Eseri ni Bilihani, Zawani, na Akwani. Bene Dishoni ni Husi na Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Dore abami bategetse igihugu cya Edomu mbere y’uko himikwa umwami w’Abayisraheli. Ni Bela mwene Bewori, kandi umurwa we witwaga Dinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela yaratanze azungurwa na Yobabu mwene Zeraki w’i Bosira. 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu amaze gutanga azungurwa na Hushami wo mu gihugu cy’Abatemani. 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushami amaze gutanga azungurwa na Hadadi mwene Bedadi. Atsindira Madiyani mu ntambara y’i Mowabu. Umurwa we witwaga Awiti. 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi amaze gutanga azungurwa na Samula w’i Masireka. 
1Chronicles1:48 Samula amaze gutanga azungurwa na Shawuli w’i Rehoboti ku ruzi rwa Efurati. 
1Chronicles1:49 Shawuli amaze gutanga azungurwa na Behali‐Hanani mwene Akibori. 
1Chronicles1:50 Behali‐Hanani amaze gutanga azungurwa na Hadadi; umurwa we witwaga Pawu. Umugore we yitwaga Mehetabela, umukobwa wa Matiredi, mwene Mezahabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi yamaze gutanga maze Edomu iyoborwa n’abatware, ari bo: Timuna, Aluwa, Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibisari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magidiyeli, na Iramu. Abo ni bo batware ba Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Dore abana ba Israheli: ni Rubeni, Simewoni, Levi na Yuda; Isakari na Zabuloni;" 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Yozefu na Benyamini; Nefutali, Gadi na Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Bene Yuda ni Eri, Onani na Shela. Bose uko ari batatu yababyaranye n’umukobwa wa Shuwa w’Umukanahani. Ariko Eri, imfura ya Yuda, acibwa imbere y’Uhoraho, aramwicisha." 
1Chronicles2:4 Umukazana wa Yuda, ari we Tamara amubyarira Pereshi na Zera. Bene Yuda bose hamwe bari batanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Bene Pereshi ni Hesironi na Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Bene Zera ni Zimiri, Etani, Emani, Kalikoli na Darida, bose hamwe ni batanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Umuhungu wa Karumi ni Akari wateje ibyago Israheli mu gucumura akora ibyabujijwe. 
1Chronicles2:8 Umuhungu wa Etani ni Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Abana bavutse kuri Hesironi ni Yerahumeyeli, Ramu na Kelubayi." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu abyara Aminadabu, Aminadabu abyara Nahasoni, umutware wa bene Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahasoni abyara Salimu. Salimu abyara Bowozi. 
1Chronicles2:12 Bowozi abyara Obedi. Obedi abyara Yese. 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese abyara Eliyabu imfura ye, uwa kabiri ni Abinadabu, uwa gatatu ni Shimeya," 
1Chronicles2:14 uwa kane ni Netaneli, uwa gatanu ni Radayi," 
1Chronicles2:15 uwa gatandatu ni Osemu, uwa karindwi ni Dawudi." 
1Chronicles2:16 Bashiki babo bitwaga Seruya na Abigayila. Bene Seruya bari batatu: Abishayi, Yowabu na Asaheli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayila abyara Amasa, kandi se wa Amasa yitwaga Yeteri w’Umwismaheli." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mwene Hesironi n’umugore we Azuba babyarana abana babiri: Isha na Yeriyoti. Dore abana babo: ni Yesheri, Shobabu na Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba amaze gupfa, Kalebu arongora Efurata babyarana Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri abyara Uri, naho Uri abyara Besaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Hanyuma Hesironi wari ufite imyaka mirongo itandatu y’amavuko yuzura n’umukobwa wa Makiri, se wa Gilihadi, maze amugira umugore; babyarana Segubi." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubi abyara Yayiri, wagize insisiro makumyabiri n’eshatu mu gihugu cya Gilihadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Nyamara abami b’i Geshuri na Aramu bigaruriye izo nsisiro za Yayiri, hamwe n’umugi wa Kenati n’insisiro mirongo itandatu ziwukikije. Abo bose bari bene Makiri se wa Gilihadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Nyuma y’urupfu rwa Hesironi, Kalebu acyura Efurata muka se Hesironi, babyarana Ashehuri se wa Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Bene Yerahumeyeli imfura ya Hesironi ni Ramu, imfura ye, na Buna, Oreni, Osemu na Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerahumeyeli yari afite undi mugore witwaga Atara; ni we nyina wa Onamu. 
1Chronicles2:27 Bene Ramu, imfura ya Yerahumeyeli, ni Mayasi, Yamini na Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Bene Onamu bari Shamayi na Yada; kandi bene Shamayi ni Nadabu na Abishuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Umugore wa Abishuri yitwaga Abihayila, kandi yamubyariye Ahibani na Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Bene Nadabu ni Seledi na Apayimu. Seledi yapfuye bucike. 
1Chronicles2:31 Mwene Apayimu ni Yisheyi. Mwene Yisheyi ni Sheshani. Mwene Sheshani ni Alayi. 
1Chronicles2:32 Bene Yada, umuvandimwe wa Shamayi, ni Yeteri na Yonatani. Yeteri yapfuye bucike." 
1Chronicles2:33 Bene Yonatani ni Peleti na Zaza. Ni bo bari bene Yerahumeyeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani ntiyabyaye abahungu ariko yari afite abakobwa. Sheshani yari afite umucakara w’Umunyamisiri witwaga Yara. 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshani ashyingira umukobwa we Yara, umucakara we, maze amubyaraho Atayi." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atayi abyara Natani, Natani abyara Zabadi." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi abyara Efulali. Efulali abyara Obedi. 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi abyara Yehu. Yehu abyara Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya abyara Helesi. Helesi abyara Eleyasa. 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyasa abyara Sisimayi. Sisimayi abyara Shalumi. 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalumi abyara Yekamiya. Yekamiya abyara Elishama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Bene Kalebu umuvandimwe wa Yerahumeyeli, ni Mesha w’imfura ye, akaba na se wa Zifu, na Maresha se wa Heburoni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Bene Heburoni ni Kora, Tapuwa, Rekemu na Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema abyara Rahamu se wa Yorikeyamu, Rekemu abyara Shamayi." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mwene Shamayi ni Mawoni, kandi Mawoni ni we se wa Betisuri." 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa, inshoreke ya Kalebu, abyara Harani, Mosa na Gazezi. Harani abyara Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Bene Yadayi ni Regemu, Yotamu, Geshani, Peleti, Eyifa na Shafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Mayaka, inshoreke ya Kalebu, abyara Sheberi na Tirana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Abyara kandi Shafi se wa Madumana, na Shewa wabyaye Makubena na Gibeya. Umukobwa wa Kalebu yitwaga Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Abo ni bo bari bene Kalebu. Bene Huri imfura ya Efurata ni Shobali washinze Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu; 
1Chronicles2:51 Salima washinze Betelehemu; Harefu washinze Betigaderi. 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobali washinze Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu yabyaye abana barimo Harowe, ari we igice cya kabiri cy’Abamanahi gikomokaho," 
1Chronicles2:53 hamwe n’imiryango y’i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu, ari yo Abayitiri, Abaputi, Abashumati, n’Abamishurayi. Ni bo Abasoreya n’Abeshitayoli bakomotsemo." 
1Chronicles2:54 Bene Salima ni Betelehemu, Abanetofa, Ataroti‐Betiyowabu, igice cy’Abamanahi, Abasoreya," 
1Chronicles2:55 n’imiryango y’Abasofiri batuye i Yabesi, Abatireya, Abashimeya, n’Abasuka. Ni Abakeniti bakomotse kuri Hamati, umukuru w’inzu ya Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Dore bene Dawudi yabyariye i Heburoni: uw’imfura yitwaga Aminoni, yabyaranye na Ahinowamu w’i Yizireyeli; uwa kabiri ni Daniyeli wa Abigayila w’i Karumeli;" 
1Chronicles3:2 uwa gatatu ni Abusalomu mwene Maka, umukobwa wa Talimayi, umwami wa Geshuri; uwa kane ni Adoniya mwene Hagita;" 
1Chronicles3:3 uwa gatanu ni Shefatiya wa Abitali; uwa gatandatu ni Yitereyamu wo ku mugore we Egula. 
1Chronicles3:4 Bose uko ari batandatu bavukiye i Heburoni. Aho ngaho Dawudi yahamaze imyaka irindwi n’amezi atandatu ari ku ngoma, naho mu gihe cy’imyaka mirongo itatu n’itatu yari ku ngoma i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Ngaba abo yabyariye i Yeruzalemu: ni Shimeya, Shobabu, Natani na Salomoni, bose uko ari bane babyawe na Batishuwa, umukobwa wa Amiyeli." 
1Chronicles3:6 Hakurikiraho Yibuhari, Elishuwa, Elifaleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishama, Eliyada na Elifeleti. Bose hamwe ni icyenda." 
1Chronicles3:9 Abo ni bo bene Dawudi bose, uretse abakomoka ku bagore b’inshoreke. Tamara yari mushiki wabo." 
1Chronicles3:10 Dore amazina y’abakomoka kuri Salomoni, uko bakurikiranye: ni Robowamu, Abiya, Asa, Yozafati," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yoramu, Okoziya, Yowasi," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amasiya, Azariya, Yotamu," 
1Chronicles3:13 Akhazi, Hezekiya, Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni, Yoziya." 
1Chronicles3:15 Bene Yoziya: uw’imfura ni Yohanani, uwa kabiri ni Yoyakimu, uwa gatatu ni Sedekiya, uwa kane ni Shalumi." 
1Chronicles3:16 Bene Yoyakimu ni Yekoniya na Sedekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Bene Yekoniya wari imfungwa i Babiloni ni Sheyalutiyeli," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malikiramu, Pedaya, Shenasari, Yekamiya, Hoshama na Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Bene Pedaya ni Zorobabeli na Shimeyi. Bene Zorobabeli ni Meshulamu, Hananiya na mushiki wabo Shelomita." 
1Chronicles3:20 Bene Meshulamu ni Hashuba, Oheli, Berekiya, Hasadiya, Yushabuhesedi: bose hamwe ni batanu." 
1Chronicles3:21 Bene Hananiya ni Pelatiya, Yeshaya, Arinani, Obadiya, na Shekanya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Bene Shekanya ni Shemaya, Hatushi, Yigeyali, Bariya, Neyariya na Shafati: bose hamwe ni batandatu." 
1Chronicles3:23 Bene Neyariya ni Eliyonayi, Hizikiya na Azurikamu: bose hamwe ni batatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Bene Eliyonayi ni Hodayiwahu, Eliyashibu, Pelaya, Akubu, Yohanani, Delaya na Anani: bose hamwe ni barindwi." 
1Chronicles4:1 Bene Yuda ni Pereshi, Hesironi, Karumi, Huri na Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Rehaya mwene Shobali abyara Yahati; Yahati abyara Ahumayi na Lahadi: ni bo Abasoreya bakomokaho. 
1Chronicles4:3 Dore bene Huri, se wa Etamu: ni Yizireyeli, Yishuma na Yidubashi, mushiki wabo yitwaga Haseleluponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Hakurikiraho Penuweli washinze Gedori, na Ezeri washinze Husha. Abo ni bo bari bene Huri, imfura ya Efurata, washinze Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashehuri washinze Tekowa yatunze abagore babiri: Heleya na Nahara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Nahara amubyarira Ahuzamu, Heferi, Abatimina n’Abahashutari. Bari bene Nahara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Bene Heleya ni Sereti, Sohari na Etunani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kosi abyara Anubi na Hasobeba n’ubwoko bwa Aharaheli mwene Harumi. 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabeshi yari afashwe neza kurusha abavandimwe be, kandi nyina yari yaramwise izina rya Yabeshi, agira ati «Nabyaranye ububabare.»" 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabeshi yambaza Imana ya Israheli, avuga ati «Niba koko umpaye umugisha, uzagura igihugu cyanjye, uzampozeho ukuboko kwawe, kandi uzandinde ibyago kugira ngo ntazababara.» Nuko Imana imwuzuriza ibyo yari yasabye." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu, umuvandimwe wa Shuha, abyara Mehiri wabaye se wa Eshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni abyara Betirafa, Paseya na Tehina washinze Irunahashi. Ni bo bantu b’i Rekabu." 
1Chronicles4:13 Bene Kenazi ni Otinyeli na Seraya. Bene Otinyeli ni Hatati na Mewonatayi. 
1Chronicles4:14 Mewonatayi abyara Ofura, naho Seraya abyara Yowabu washinze Geharashimu, kuko bari abanyabukorikori." 
1Chronicles4:15 Bene Kalebu umuhungu wa Yefune ni Iru, Ela na Nahamu. Mwene Ela ni Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Bene Yehaleleli ni Zifu, Zifa, Tiriya na Azareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Bene Ezira ni Yeteri, Meredi, Eferi na Yaloni. Dore kandi abahungu ba Bitiya, umukobwa wa Farawo, wari warashakanye na Meredi: ni Miriyamu, Shamayi na Yishuba washinze Eshitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Umugore we w’Umuyudakazi abyara Yeredi washinze Gedori, Heberi washinze Soko, na Yekutiyeli washinze Zanowa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Abahungu ba muka Hodiya, mushiki wa Nahamu, ni Umugarumi washinze Keyila, n’Umumahaka washinze Eshitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:20 Bene Shimoni ni Amunoni, Rina, Benihanani na Tiloni. Bene Yisheyi ni Zoheti na Benizoheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Bene Shela, umuhungu wa Yuda, ni Eri washinze Leka, Layeda washinze Maresha, imiryango yose y’ababohera imyenda ya hariri i Betashebaya," 
1Chronicles4:22 Yokimu, abantu b’i Kozeba, Yowashi, na Sarafi, bategekaga i Mowabu bakagaruka i Betelehemu — ni ibintu bya kera —;" 
1Chronicles4:23 bari ababumbyi baturaga i Netayimu n’i Sedera; bari bahaturanye n’umwami bamukorera. 
1Chronicles4:24 Bene Simewoni ni Nemweli, Yamini, Yaribi, Zera, Shawuli." 
1Chronicles4:25 Abakomoka kuri Shawuli ni Shalumi, Mibusamu, Mishuma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Bene Mishuma ni Hamweli, Zakuri na Shimeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimeyi yabyaye abahungu cumi na batandatu n’abakobwa batandatu; ariko abavandimwe be ntibabyaye abana benshi, imiryango yabo yose ntiyari myinshi nk’iy’Abayuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Bari batuye i Berisheba, Molada, Hasari‐Shuwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biloha, Esemu, Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuweli, Horima, Sikilage," 
1Chronicles4:31 Betimarukaboti, Hasari‐Susimu, Betibireyi, Sharayimu. Ni yo yari imigi yabo kugeza ku ngoma ya Dawudi," 
1Chronicles4:32 naho insisiro zabo zari Etamu, Ayini, Rimoni, Tokeni na Ashani: zari eshanu," 
1Chronicles4:33 kandi izo nsisiro zabo zose zari zikikije iyo migi kugeza i Balata. Ni zo zari inturo zabo kandi ni ryo rondora ry’ibisekuruza byabo bwite. 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobabu, Yamuleki, Yosha mwene Amasiya," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoweli, Yehu mwene Yoshibiya, Seraya mwene Asiyeli," 
1Chronicles4:36 Eliyonayi, Yakoba, Yeshohaya, Asaya, Adiyeli, Yesimiyeli, Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziza mwene Shifeyi, mwene Aloni, mwene Yedaya, mwene Shimiri, mwene Shemaya:" 
1Chronicles4:38 abo bamaze kurondorwa bari abatware b’imiryango yabo kandi imiryango yabo yariyongereye cyane. 
1Chronicles4:39 Barimutse bava i Gerari bagera mu burasirazuba bw’ikibaya bashaka ubwatsi bw’amatungo yabo; 
1Chronicles4:40 babona ubwatsi butoshye kandi bwiza n’igihugu cyari kigari, gifite ituze n’amahoro, kuko abari bahatuye kera bakomokaga kuri Kamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Abo bantu bamaze kuvugwa, baraje mu gihe cya Hezekiya, umwami wa Yuda, nuko basenya amahema n’ubuhungiro bw’abo bari bahasanze, babakoresha ibibujijwe kugera na n’ubu. Babazungura rero mu gihugu cyabo kuko cyarimo ubwatsi bw’amatungo yabo magufi." 
1Chronicles4:42 Bamwe muri bene Simewoni bajya ku musozi wa Seyiri: bari abagabo magana atanu bari bayobowe na Pelatiya, Neyariya, Refaya na Uziyeli, ari bo bene Yisheyi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Bica Abameleki bari bacitse ku icumu, nuko batura aho kugeza uyu munsi." 
1Chronicles5:1 Rubeni yari imfura ya Israheli, ariko amaze kuryamana na muka se, uburenganzira bwe bw’umwana w’imfura buhabwa bene Yozefu, mwene Israheli, nuko Rubeni abura atyo uburenganzira bw’umwana w’imfura." 
1Chronicles5:2 Naho Yuda we, yaruse abavandimwe be kandi kuri we havutse igikomangoma, nyamara uburenganzira bw’umwana w’imfura bwakomeje kuba ubwa Yozefu." 
1Chronicles5:3 Bene Rubeni, imfura ya Israheli, ni Hanoki, Palu, Hesironi na Karumi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Abakomoka kuri Yoweli uko bakurikiranye, ni Shemaya, Gogi, Shimeyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika, Reyaya, Behali," 
1Chronicles5:6 Beyera wanyazwe na Tegalati‐Falazari, umwami w’Ashuru. Yoweli uwo yari igikomangoma muri bene Rubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Abavandimwe be, hakurikijwe imiryango yabo uko yanditswe mu irondora ry’ibisekuruza, ni Yeweli wari umutware, Zekariyahu," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela mwene Azazi, mwene Shema, mwene Yoweli. Bene Rubeni bari batuye kuva i Aroweri kugera kuri Nebo na Behali‐Mewoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Iburasirazuba, bari batuye kuva ku ruzi rwa Efurati kugera ku butayu, kuko amatungo yabo yari menshi mu gihugu cya Gilihadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mu gihe cya Sawuli barwana n’Abahaguri barabica, maze batura mu mahema yabo ku butaka bwose bw’iburasirazuba bwa Gilihadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Bene Gadi batura babitegeye mu gihugu cya Bashani kugeza i Salika: 
1Chronicles5:12 umukuru yari Yoweli, uwa kabiri ari Shafamu, hakurikiraho Yenayi na Shafati i Bashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Abavandimwe babo, hakurikijwe imiryango yabo, bari Mikayeli, Meshulamu, Sheba, Yorayi, Yakani, Ziya na Eberi: bari barindwi." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ngaba bene Abihayili, umuhungu wa Huri, mwene Yarowa, mwene Gilihadi, mwene Mikayeli, mwene Yeshishayi, mwene Yahudo, mwene Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mwene Abudiyeli, mwene Guni, yari umutware w’imiryango yabo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Bari batuye muri Gilihadi, muri Bashani no mu nsisiro zaho, mu bwatsi bwose bw’i Sharoni kugera ku mipaka yayo." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bose babaruwe mu gihe cya Yotamu, umwami wa Yuda, no mu gihe cya Yerobowamu, umwami wa Israheli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Bene Rubeni, Abagadi n’igice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase, bari barimo abagabo b’intwari bitwaza ingabo n’inkota, barashisha imiheto kandi bazi iby’intambara — abashoboraga kujya ku rugamba bari abagabo ibihumbi mirongo ine na bine na magana arindwi na mirongo itandatu." 
1Chronicles5:19 Barwanyije Abahaguri i Yaturi, i Nafishi, i Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Baratabawe, maze Abahaguri batabwa mu maboko yabo hamwe n’abo bari kumwe bose, kuko mu gihe barwanaga batakambiye Imana irabumva kubera ko bari bayifitiye icyizere." 
1Chronicles5:21 Bafata amatungo yabo: yari ingamiya ibihumbi mirongo itanu, amatungo magufi ibihumbi magana abiri na mirongo itanu, indogobe ibihumbi bibiri, ndetse n’abantu ibihumbi ijana." 
1Chronicles5:22 Abantu benshi baratsindwa, baricwa, kuko Uhoraho yari yiyoboreye urwo rugamba. Babazungura mu byabo kugeza ubwo bajyanywe bunyago." 
1Chronicles5:23 Abantu b’igice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase bari batuye mu gihugu kiva kuri Bashani kikagera kuri Behali‐Herimoni, Seniri n’umusozi wa Herimoni: bari benshi rwose." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ngaba abatware b’amazu yabo: ni Eferi, Yisheyi, Eliyeli, Azuriyeli, Yirimeya, Hodaviya na Yahudiyeli. Bari abagabo b’intwari, bakaba n’ibirangirire, kandi ni bo batwaraga amazu yabo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Nyamara bahemukiye Imana y’abasekuruza babo, bararikira imana z’abanyamahanga Uhoraho yari yararimbuye imbere yabo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Nuko Imana y’Abayisraheli ibaterereza Pulu, umwami w’Abanyashuru, na Tegalati‐Falazari, umwami w’Abanyashuru, banyaga Abarubeni, n’Abagadi, n’igice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase, babajyana i Hala, i Habori, no ku ruzi rwa Gozani, na n’ubu baracyariyo." 
1Chronicles5:27 Bene Levi ni Gerishomu, Kehati na Merari." 
1Chronicles5:28 Bene Kehati ni Amuramu, Yishari, Heburoni na Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles5:29 Bene Amuramu ni Aroni, Musa na Miriyamu. Bene Aroni ni Nadabu, Abihu, Eleyazari na Itamari." 
1Chronicles5:30 Eleyazari abyara Pinehasi; Pinehasi abyara Abishuwa; 
1Chronicles5:31 Abishuwa abyara Buki; Buki abyara Uzi; 
1Chronicles5:32 Uzi abyara Zerahiya; Zerahiya abyara Merayoti; 
1Chronicles5:33 Merayoti abyara Amariya; Amariya abyara Ahitubi; 
1Chronicles5:34 Ahitubi abyara Sadoki; Sadoki abyara Ahimasi; 
1Chronicles5:35 Ahimasi abyara Azariya; Azariya abyara Yohanani; 
1Chronicles5:36 Yohanani abyara Azariya. Ni we wabaye umuherezabitambo mu Ngoro Salomoni yubatse i Yeruzalemu. 
1Chronicles5:37 Azariya abyara Amariya; Amariya abyara Ahitubi; 
1Chronicles5:38 Ahitubi abyara Sadoki; Sadoki abyara Shalumi; 
1Chronicles5:39 Shalumi abyara Hilikiya; Hilikiya abyara Azariya; 
1Chronicles5:40 Azariya abyara Seraya; Seraya abyara Yehosadaki; 
1Chronicles5:41 Yehosadaki yagiye igihe Uhoraho abateje Nebukadinetsari, akanajyana bunyago Yuda na Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles6:1 Bene Levi ni Gerishomu, Kehati na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Amazina ya bene Gerishomu ni aya: Libini na Shimeyi. 
1Chronicles6:3 Bene Kenati ni Amuramu, Yisehari, Heburoni na Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:4 Bene Merari ni Mahuli na Mushi. Iyo ni yo miryango ya Levi, hakurikijwe abasekuruza babo." 
1Chronicles6:5 Abakomoka kuri Gerishomu uko bakurikiranye ni Libini, Yahati, Zima," 
1Chronicles6:6 Yowa, Ido, Zera na Yewotarayi." 
1Chronicles6:7 Bene Kehati uko bakurikiranye ni Aminadabu, Kore, Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:8 Elikana, Ebiyasafi, Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:9 Tahati, Uriyeli, Uziya, na Shawuli." 
1Chronicles6:10 Bene Elikana ni Amasayi na Ahimoti. 
1Chronicles6:11 Abakomoka kuri Ahimoti uko bakurikirana ni Elikana, Sofayi, Nahati," 
1Chronicles6:12 Eliyabu, Yerohamu, Elikana, Samweli." 
1Chronicles6:13 Bene Samweli ni Yoweli w’imfura ye, uwa kabiri ni Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:14 Abakomoka kuri Merari uko bakurikiranye ni Mahuli, Libuni, Shimeyi, Uza," 
1Chronicles6:15 Shimeya, Hagwiya, na Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:16 Ngaba abo Dawudi yashinze iby’ indirimbo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, Ubushyinguro bukimara kugera mu buruhukiro." 
1Chronicles6:17 Bari bashinzwe kuririmbira imbere y’inzu y’ihema ry’ibonaniro kugeza ubwo Salomoni yubatse Ingoro y’Uhoraho i Yeruzalemu, bagatunganya umurimo wabo bakurikije itegeko ryabo." 
1Chronicles6:18 Ngaba abatunganyaga uwo murimo kimwe n’abahungu babo. Muri bene Kehati hari Hemani w’umuririmbyi, mwene Yoweli, mwene Samweli," 
1Chronicles6:19 mwene Elikana, mwene Yerohamu, mwene Eliyeli, mwene Towa," 
1Chronicles6:20 mwene Sufi, mwene Elikana, mwene Mahati, mwene Amasayi," 
1Chronicles6:21 mwene Elikana, mwene Yoweli, mwene Azariya, mwene Sefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:22 mwene Tahati, mwene Asiri, mwene Ebiyasafu, mwene Kore," 
1Chronicles6:23 mwene Yisehari, mwene Kehati, mwene Levi, mwene Israheli." 
1Chronicles6:24 Hanyuma hari umuvandimwe we wahagararaga iburyo bwe, ni Asafu mwene Berekiyahu, mwene Shimeya," 
1Chronicles6:25 mwene Mikayeli, mwene Bahaseya, mwene Malikiya," 
1Chronicles6:26 mwene Etuni, mwene Zera, mwene Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:27 mwene Etani, mwene Zima, mwene Shimeyi," 
1Chronicles6:28 mwene Yahati, mwene Gerishomu, mwene Levi." 
1Chronicles6:29 Abavandimwe babo bene Merari bari ku ruhande rw’ibumoso, ni Etani mwene Kishi, mwene Abudi, mwene Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:30 mwene Hashabiya, mwene Amasiya, mwene Hilikiya," 
1Chronicles6:31 mwene Amusi, mwene Bani, mwene Shemeri," 
1Chronicles6:32 mwene Mahuli, mwene Mushi, mwene Merari, mwene Levi." 
1Chronicles6:33 Abavandimwe babo b’Abalevi bakoraga imirimo yose yo mu ihema ry’Ingoro y’Uhoraho. 
1Chronicles6:34 Aroni n’abahungu be batwikiraga ibitambo ku rutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwika, no ku rutambiro rw’imibavu, bakamenya ikintu cyose cyerekeye icyumba gitagatifu rwose, bagakora imihango yo gusabira imbabazi Abayisraheli, bakurikije ibyategetswe byose na Musa, umugaragu w’Imana." 
1Chronicles6:35 Ngaba abakomoka kuri Aroni uko bakurikiranye: ni Eleyazari, Pinehasi, Abishuwa," 
1Chronicles6:36 Buki, Uzi, Zerahiya," 
1Chronicles6:37 Merayoti, Amariya, Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:38 Sadoki na Ahimasi. 
1Chronicles6:39 Dore uko bagiye batura hakurikijwe ingando zabo mu gihugu cyabo. Bene Aroni bo mu nzu y’Abakehati — kuko umugabane wabo wari uwa mbere — 
1Chronicles6:40 bahawe Heburoni mu gihugu cya Yuda n’imirima rusange yaho. 
1Chronicles6:41 Ariko ahakikije umugi n’insisiro zaho babiha Kalebu mwene Yefune. 
1Chronicles6:42 Baha bene Aroni umugi w’ubuhungiro ari wo Heburoni, babaha na Libuna, Yatiri, Eshitemowa," 
1Chronicles6:43 Hilezi, Debiri," 
1Chronicles6:44 Ashani, Betishemeshi n’imirima rusange yaho." 
1Chronicles6:45 Babahaye na Alemeti na Anatoti, bayivanye mu munani wa Benyamini, hamwe n’imirima rusange yaho. Imigi yabo yose hamwe ni cumi n’itatu bahawe hakurikijwe amazu yabo." 
1Chronicles6:46 Hakoreshejwe ubufindo, bene Kehati bandi bahawe umugabane w’imigi cumi ivanywe mu munani w’umuryango wa Efurayimu, uw’umuryango wa Dani n’uw’igice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase, babihabwa hakurikijwe amazu yabo." 
1Chronicles6:47 Bene Gerishomu, hakurikijwe amazu yabo bahawe imigi cumi n’itatu ivanywe mu munani w’umuryango wa Isakari, uw’umuryango wa Asheri, uw’umuryango wa Nefutali n’uw’umuryango wa Manase, i Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:48 Bene Merari, hakurikijwe amazu yabo, bahawe umugabane w’imigi cumi n’ibiri ivanywe mu munani w’umuryango wa Rubeni, uw’umuryango wa Gadi no mu uw’umuryango wa Zabuloni." 
1Chronicles6:49 Iyo migi yose Abayisraheli bayeguriye Abalevi, bayibahana n’imirima rusange yaho." 
1Chronicles6:50 Hari n’indi migi bahaweho umugabane hakoreshejwe ubufindo, ivanywe mu munani w’umuryango wa Yuda, mu uw’umuryango wa Simewoni no mu uw’umuryango w’Ababenyamini, maze bayitirira amazina yabo." 
1Chronicles6:51 Andi mazu ya bene Kehati ahabwa imigi yabo hagati mu muryango wa Efurayimu. 
1Chronicles6:52 Umugi w’ubuhungiro bahawe ni Sikemu, n’imirima rusange yaho, mu misozi ya Efurayimu; bahabwa na Gezeri," 
1Chronicles6:53 Yokimeyamu, Betihoroni," 
1Chronicles6:54 Ayaloni, Gati‐Rimoni, hamwe n’imirima rusange yaho." 
1Chronicles6:55 Naho mu gice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase, bahawe Aneri na Bileyamu hamwe n’imirima rusange yaho. Ibyo byose byari iby’inzu za bene Kehati bandi." 
1Chronicles6:56 Bene Gerishomu, hakurikijwe amazu yabo, mu gice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase bahawe Golani muri Bashani, na Ashitaroti." 
1Chronicles6:57 Mu muryango wa Isakari bahabwa Kedeshi, Daberati," 
1Chronicles6:58 Ramoti na Anemu. 
1Chronicles6:59 Mu muryango wa Asheri, bahawe Mashali, Abudoni," 
1Chronicles6:60 Hukoki na Rehobu. 
1Chronicles6:61 Naho mu muryango wa Nefutali bahabwa Kedeshi muri Galileya, Hamoni na Kiryatayimu. Iyo migi yose bayihanywe n’imirima rusange yaho." 
1Chronicles6:62 Bene Merari bandi, mu muryango wa Zabuloni, bahawe Rimoni na Taboru." 
1Chronicles6:63 Hakurya ya Yorudani mu burasirazuba bwayo hafi ya Yeriko, mu muryango wa Rubeni, bahabwa Beseri mu butayu, Yahisa," 
1Chronicles6:64 Kedemoti na Mefata. 
1Chronicles6:65 Naho mu muryango wa Gadi, bahawe Ramoti y’i Gilihadi, Mahanayimu," 
1Chronicles6:66 Heshiboni na Yezeri. Iyo migi yose bayihanywe n’imirima rusange yayo. 
1Chronicles7:1 Bene Isakari ni Tola, Puwa, Yashubu na Shimuroni: ni bane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Bene Tola ni Uzi, Refaya, Yeriyeli, Yahumayi, Yibusamu na Shemweli, ni bo bari abatware b’imiryango ya Tola; mu gihe cya Dawudi ababakomokagaho bari ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri na magana atandatu." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mwene Uzi ni Yizirahiya. Bene Yizirahiya ni Mikayeli, Obadiya, Yoweli, Yishiya, bose hamwe ni batanu." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ni bo bategekaga abantu ibihumbi mirongo itatu na bitandatu b’intwari bagabanijwe hakurikijwe amazu yabo, kuko harimo abagore n’abana benshi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Abavandimwe babo, bo mu mazu yose ya Isakari, bari abagabo b’intwari ibihumbi mirongo inani na birindwi, hakurikijwe ibarurwa ryabo." 
1Chronicles7:6 Bene Benyamini ni Bela, Bekeri, Yediyayeli: ni batatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bene Bela ni Esiboni, Uzi, Uziyeli, Yerimoti na Iri, ni batanu. Bari abatware b’amazu n’abagabo b’intwari; mu mazu yabo bamaze kubabara, basanze hari abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri na mirongo itatu na bane." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bene Bekeri ni Zemira, Yowashi, Eliyezeri, Eliyowenayi, Omari, Yeremoti, Abiya, Anatoti na Alemeti; abo bose ni bo bene Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Mu mazu yabo bamaze kubabara, basanze hari abagabo b’intwari ibihumbi makumyabiri na magana abiri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Mwene Yediyayeli ni Biluhani. Bene Biluhani ni Yewushi, Benyamini, Ehudi, Kenahana, Zetani, Tarishishi na Ahishahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Abo bose ni bo bene Yadiyayeli, abatware b’amazu, bategekaga abagabo ibihumbi cumi na birindwi na magana abiri b’intwari, mu bakereye urugamba." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shupimu na Hupimu bari bene Iri, naho Hushimu yari mwene Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Bene Nefutali ni Yahasiyeli, Guni, Yeseri na Shalumi. Bari bene Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Bene Manase ni Asiriyeli wabyawe n’Umwaramukazi w’inshoreke ye; ibyara na Makiri se wa Gilihadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 Abahungu be Hupimu na Shupimu, Makiri abashakira abagore. Mushiki we yitwaga Mahaka. Undi mwana we ni Selofehadi kandi Selofehadi yabyaye abakobwa gusa." 
1Chronicles7:16 Mahaka, umugore wa Makiri, yabyaye umuhungu amwita Pereshi; umuvandimwe we yitwaga Shereshi, wabyaye Ulamu na Rekemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mwene Ulamu ni Bedani. Abo ni bo bene Gilihadi, umuhungu wa Makiri mwene Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Mushiki we Moleketa abyara Ishehodi, Abiyezeri na Mahula." 
1Chronicles7:19 Bene Shemida ni Ahiyani, Shekemu, Likihi na Ayiyamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Abakomoka kuri Efurayimu uko bakurikiranye ni Shutela, Beredi, Tahati, Elada, Tahati," 
1Chronicles7:21 Zabadi na Shutela. Efurayimu yabyaye kandi Ezeri na Eleyadi; abo bombi, abantu b’i Gati barabishe kuko bari bamanutse bakajya mu gihugu cyabo gushimuta amatungo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Se Efurayimu abaririra iminsi myinshi maze abavandimwe be baza kumuhoza. 
1Chronicles7:23 Asanga umugore we; umugore arasama kandi abyara umwana w’umuhungu yise Beriya kuko yari yasigaye iwe mu byago bye. 
1Chronicles7:24 Umukobwa we yitwaga Shera wubatse Betihoroni y’epfo n’iya ruguru, na Uzeni‐Shera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Abakomoka kuri Beriya, uko bakurikiranye ni Refa, Reshefu, Tela, Tahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladani, Amihudi, Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 na Nuni, se wa Yozuwe." 
1Chronicles7:28 Umunani bene Efurayimu bahawe ni Beteli n’insisiro zayo, iburasirazuba ni Naharani, iburengerazuba ni Gezeri n’insisiro zayo, Sikemu n’insisiro zayo kugera i Aya n’insisiro zayo." 
1Chronicles7:29 Bene Manase bari bafite na Betisheyani, Tanaki, Megido, na Dori hamwe n’insisiro zaho. Iyo migi ni yo bene Yozefu, mwene Israheli, bari batuyemo." 
1Chronicles7:30 Abakomoka kuri Asheri ni Yimuna, Yishwa, Yishiwi, Beriya na mushiki wabo Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Bene Beriya ni Heberi na Malikiyeli wabyaye Birizayiti. 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi abyara Yafuleti, Shomeri, Hotamu na Shuwa mushiki wabo." 
1Chronicles7:33 Bene Yafuleti ni Pasaki, Bimuhali na Ashuwati. Abo ni bo bene Yafuleti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Bene Shomeri, umuvandimwe we, ni Ruhuga, Huba na Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Bene Helemu, umuvandimwe we, ni Sofa, Yimuna, Sheleshi na Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Bene Sofa ni Suwa, Harineferi, Shuwali, Beri, Yimura," 
1Chronicles7:37 Beseri, Hodi, Shama, Shilusha, Yitirani na Bera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Bene Yitirani ni Yefune, Pisipa na Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Bene Ula ni Ara, Hanyeli na Risiya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Abo bose ni bene Asheri, bari abakuru b’amazu, bakaba abanyembaraga n’abagabo b’intwari; bamaze kubarura abo mu mazu yabo, basanze abajya ku rugamba ari abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitandatu." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamini abyara Bela w’imfura ye, Ashubeli ni uwa kabiri, Ahura ni uwa gatatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha ni uwa kane na Rafa ni uwa gatanu. 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela abyara abahungu ari bo: Adari, Gera se wa Ehudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishuwa, Nahamani, Ahowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shefutani na Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Aba ni bo bene Ehudi, ni bo babaye abatware b’amazu y’abaturage b’i Geba, kandi babahungishiriza i Manahati:" 
1Chronicles8:7 ni Nahamani, Ahiya na Gera (ni we wabahungishije) kandi abyara Uza na Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Sharayimu yirukanye abagore be babiri Hushima na Bahara, ari mu mirambi ya Mowabu." 
1Chronicles8:9 Ku mugore we wundi Hodesha, abyara Yobabu, Sibiya, Mesha na Malikomu," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yawusi, Sakiya na Marima. Abo ni bo bahungu be, abatware b’amazu." 
1Chronicles8:11 Kuri Hushimu yari yarabyaye Abitubu na Elipali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Bene Elipali ni Eberi, Misheyamu na Shemedi. Ni we wubatse Ono na Lodi n’insisiro zaho." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya na Shema bari abakuru b’imiryango y’abatuye i Ayaloni. Ni bo birukanye abaturage b’i Gati barahunga. 
1Chronicles8:14 Abavandimwe babo bitwaga Shashaki na Yeremoti. 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadiya, Aradi, Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikayeli, Yishupa na Yoha bari bene Beriya." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadiya, Meshulamu, Hiziki, Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Yishumerayi, Yiziliya na Yobabu bari bene Elipali." 
1Chronicles8:19 Yakimu, Zikuri, Zabudi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Eliyonayi, Siletayi, Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Beraya, na Shimurati bari bene Shimeyi." 
1Chronicles8:22 Yishupani, Eberi, Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abudoni, Zikuri, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananiya, Elamu, Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Yifudeya na Penuweli bari bene Shashaki. 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamusherayi, Shehariya, Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yareshiya, Eliya, na Zikuri, bari bene Yerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Abo bose bari abatware b’amazu yabo, hakurikijwe ibisekuruza byabo. Bari batuye i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 I Gibewoni hari hatuye uwashinze Gibewoni, ari we Yeyeli; umugore we akitwa Mahaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 Yabyaye umuhungu we w’imfura Abudoni, na Suri, Kishi, Behali, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori, Ahiyo, Zekeri na Mikiloti." 
1Chronicles8:32 Mikiloti uwo abyara Shimeya. Abo na bo, kimwe n’abavandimwe babo, bari batuye i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri abyara Kishi, Kishi abyara Sawuli, Sawuli abyara Yonatani, Malekishuwa, Abinadabu na Eshibehali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Umuhungu wa Yonatani ni Meribehali. Meribehali abyara Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Bene Mika ni Pitoni, Meleki, Tareya na Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi abyara Yehoyada. Yehoyada abyara Alemeti, Azimaweti na Zimiri. Zimiri abyara Mosa." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa abyara Bineya, Bineya abyara Rafa, Rafa abyara Eleyasa, Eleyasa abyara Aseli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Aseli abyara abana batandatu, amazina yabo ni aya: Azirikamu, Bokuru, Ismaheli, Sheyariya, Obadiya na Hanani. Abo bose ni bo bene Aseli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Bene Esheki, umuvandimwe wa Aseli ni Ulamu w’imfura ye, uwa kabiri ni Yewushi, uwa gatatu ni Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles8:40 Bene Ulamu bari abagabo b’intwari ku rugamba bazi kurasanisha imiheto. Bari bafite abana benshi n’abuzukuru; bari ijana na mirongo itanu. Abo bose bari bene Benyamini. 
1Chronicles9:1 Abayisraheli bose barabaruwe kandi bandikwa mu gitabo cy’abami ba Israheli. Abayuda bajyanywe bunyago i Babiloni kubera gucumura kwabo. 
1Chronicles9:2 Bamaze kwemererwa gutaha mu migi yabo no gusubira mu masambu yabo, mu Bayisraheli, abatashye mbere ni abaherezabitambo, abalevi n’abahereza bo mu Ngoro." 
1Chronicles9:3 I Yeruzalemu hari hatuye bamwe mu Bayuda, mu Babenyamini, mu Befurayimu no mu Bamanase." 
1Chronicles9:4 Mu Bayuda ni Utayi mwene Amihudi, mwene Omari, mwene Imiri, mwene Bani umwe mu bahungu ba Peresi w’Umuyuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Mu Bashelani ni Asaya w’imfura n’abana be. 
1Chronicles9:6 Muri bene Zera ni Yehuweli. Hamwe n’abavandimwe babo, ni magana atandatu na mirongo urwenda." 
1Chronicles9:7 Mu Babenyamini ni Salu, mwene Meshulamu, mwene Hodaviya, mwene Hasenuwa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 Yibuneya mwene Yerohamu; Ela mwene Uzi, mwene Mikiri; Meshulamu mwene Shefatya, mwene Rehuweli, mwene Yibuniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Hamwe n’abavandimwe babo uko ibisekuru byari biri ni magana urwenda na mirongo itanu na batandatu. Abo bantu bose bari abakuru b’amazu mu miryango yabo. 
1Chronicles9:10 Mu baherezabitambo ni Yedaya, Yehoyaribu, Yakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 Azariya mwene Hilikiya, mwene Meshulamu, mwene Sadoki, mwene Merayoti, mwene Ahitubu umutware w’Ingoro y’Imana;" 
1Chronicles9:12 Adaya mwene Yerohamu, mwene Pashehuru, mwene Malikiya; na Masayi mwene Adiyeli, mwene Yahuzera, mwene Meshulamu, mwene Meshilemiti, mwene Imeri," 
1Chronicles9:13 hamwe n’abavandimwe babo, abakuru b’amazu, ni igihumbi na magana arindwi na mirongo itandatu, abagabo b’intwari bakora umurimo wo mu Ngoro y’Imana." 
1Chronicles9:14 Mu balevi, ni Shemaya mwene Hashubu, mwene Azirikamu, mwene Hashabiya wo muri bene Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 hari kandi Bakubakari, Hereshi, Galali na Matanya mwene Mika, mwene Zikiri, mwene Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Obadiya mwene Shemaya, mwene Galali, mwene Yedutuni; na Berekiya mwene Asa, mwene Elikana wari utuye mu nsisiro z’Abanetofati." 
1Chronicles9:17 Abanyanzugi ni Shalumi, Akubu, Talimoni na Ahimani. Shalumi yari umutware wabo," 
1Chronicles9:18 kandi kugeza uyu munsi ni we ucyemererwa gufata igihe ku rugi rw’umwami iburasirazuba. Ni bo bari abanyanzugi mu ngando za bene Levi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalumi mwene Kore, mwene Ebiyasafu, mwene Kore n’abavandimwe be bo mu nzu y’Abakore, bari bashinzwe umurimo wo kurinda umuryango w’Ihema, mbese nk’uko ba sekuruza babo barindaga irembo ry’ingando y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles9:20 Kera bategekwaga na Pinehasi mwene Eleyazari; Uhoraho nabane na we! 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mwene Meshelemiya yari umunyarugi w’irembo ry’Ihema ry’ibonaniro. 
1Chronicles9:22 Abari baratorewe kuba abanyanzugi bari bageze kuri magana abiri, nk’uko bari barabaruriwe mu nsisiro zabo. Ni Dawudi na Samweli Umushishozi babashyize kuri uwo murimo, kuko bari bazwiho kuba inyangamugayo." 
1Chronicles9:23 Bo n’abahungu babo bari bashinzwe kurinda inzugi z’Inzu y’Uhoraho, ari zo z’Ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abanyanzugi babaga ku nguni enye zayo, iburasirazuba, iburengerazuba, mu majyaruguru no mu majyepfo." 
1Chronicles9:25 Rimwe na rimwe abavandimwe babo bari mu nsisiro zabo bagombaga kuhabasanga bakamarana iminsi irindwi," 
1Chronicles9:26 ariko abanyanzugi bane b’abatware bo barahahoraga. Abalevi bamwe bari bashinzwe ibyumba n’umutungo by’Inzu y’Imana. 
1Chronicles9:27 Bararaga bakikije Inzu y’Imana kuko bagombaga kuyirinda, kandi bakayikingura buri gitondo." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abandi bari bashinzwe ibintu bikoreshwa mu mihango yo gusenga, bakajya babibara buri gihe babyinjije cyangwa babisohoye." 
1Chronicles9:29 Abandi bari bashinzwe inzabya, cyane cyane inzabya ntagatifu zabikwagamo ifu igogoye, divayi, amavuta, imibavu n’ibindi bihumura." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ariko abahungu b’abaherezabitambo ni bo bavangaga ibihumura. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitiya wo mu balevi, wari imfura ya Shalumi mwene Kore, yari ashinzwe gutekesha imigati." 
1Chronicles9:32 Mu bavandimwe babo b’Abakehati, bamwe bari bashinzwe gutegura imigati y’umumuriko ya buri Sabato." 
1Chronicles9:33 Abaririmbyi, abatware b’amazu y’abalevi, bacumbikirwaga mu byumba kandi ntibagire undi murimo bakora, kuko umurimo wabo bawutunganyaga umunsi n’ijoro." 
1Chronicles9:34 Abo ni bo batware b’amazu y’abalevi, hakurikijwe ibisekuruza byabo. Bari batuye i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 I Gibewoni hari hatuye uwitwa Yeweli, ari na we washinze Gibewoni, umugore we akitwa Mahaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Yari ahaturanye na Abudoni imfura ye, na Suri, Kishi, Behali, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori, Ahiyo, Zekariya na Mikuloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikuloti abyara Shimeyamu. Na bo, kimwe n’abavandimwe babo, bari batuye i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri abyara Kishi, Kishi abyara Sawuli, Sawuli abyara Yonatani, Malekishuwa, Abinadabu na Eshibehali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mwene Yonatani ni Meribehali. Meribehali abyara Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Bene Mika ni Pitoni, Meleki, Tahureya." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi abyara Yara, Yara abyara Alemeti, Azimaveti na Zimiri, Zimiri abyara Mosa," 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosa abyara Bineya, wabyaye Refaya, wabyaye Eleyasa, wabyaye Aseli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Aseli abyara abana batandatu, amazina yabo ni aya: Azurikamu, Bokuru, Ismaheli, Sheyariya, Obadiya na Hanani. Abo ni bene Aseli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Abafilisiti batera Abayisraheli. Ingabo z’Abayisraheli zihunga Abafilisiti, imirambo y’abapfuye yari yararitse ku musozi wa Gilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilisiti bakurikira Sawuli n’abahungu be, maze bica Yonatani, Abinadabu na Malikishuwa, bene Sawuli." 
1Chronicles10:3 Nuko urugamba rusigara rwibasiye Sawuli, abanyamiheto baramuvumbura, maze baramukomeretsa." 
1Chronicles10:4 Nuko Sawuli abwira umutwaje intwaro, ati «Kura inkota yawe maze unsogote, hato bariya bantu batagenywe bataza kunkiniraho.» Ariko uwo mugaragu we aranga kuko yari afite ubwoba bwinshi. Nuko Sawuli afata inkota ye ayishitaho." 
1Chronicles10:5 Uwari umutwaje intwaro abonye ko apfuye, na we yishita ku nkota ye; bapfa bombi." 
1Chronicles10:6 Sawuli n’abahungu be batatu, uwamutwazaga intwaro ndetse n’ingabo ze zose, bapfira icyarimwe uwo munsi." 
1Chronicles10:7 Abandi Bayisraheli bari mu kibaya, ngo babone bene wabo bahunze, banamenye ko Sawuli n’abahungu be bapfuye, ni ko guta imigi yabo barahunga; nuko Abafilisiti baraza bayituramo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Bukeye bw’aho, Abafilisiti baza gucuza intumbi, basanga umurambo wa Sawuli n’iy’abahungu be irambaraye ku musozi wa Gilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Umurambo wa Sawuli barawucuza, batwara umutwe we n’intwaro ze. Baherako bakwira mu gihugu cyose cy’Abafilisiti, bamamaza iyo nkuru mu masengero yabo no muri rubanda." 
1Chronicles10:10 Intwaro za Sawuli bazishyira mu rusengero rwabo, naho igihanga cye bakimanika mu nzu y’ikigirwamana cyabo Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Abaturage b’i Yabeshi ya Gilihadi bamenyeraho ibyo Abafilisiti bakoreye Sawuli. 
1Chronicles10:12 Ab’intwari bose muri bo baragenda, batwara umurambo wa Sawuli n’iy’abahungu be, bayizana i Yabeshi. Amagufa yabo bayahamba mu nsi y’umunyinya w’i Yabeshi, basiba kurya iminsi irindwi." 
1Chronicles10:13 Sawuli yapfuye atyo kubera ko yahemukiye Uhoraho, ntiyumvire ijambo rye, kandi no kubera ko yagiye guhanuza ku mushitsikazi," 
1Chronicles10:14 aho guhanuza Uhoraho. Nuko Uhoraho aramwicisha, maze ubwami abugabira Dawudi mwene Yese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Imiryango yose ya Israheli isanga Dawudi i Heburoni, maze iramubwira iti «Ngaho twitegereze, turi amagufa yawe n’umubiri wawe." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kera, igihe Sawuli yari akiri umwami wacu, ni wowe watabaranaga na Israheli kandi ugatabarukana na yo. Ikindi kandi, Uhoraho Imana yawe yarakubwiye ati ’Ni wowe uzaragira umuryango wanjye Israheli, kandi ni wowe uzaba umutware wa Israheli.’»" 
1Chronicles11:3 Nuko abakuru b’imiryango ya Israheli bose basanga umwami i Heburoni, maze Dawudi agirana na bo isezerano i Heburoni, imbere y’Uhoraho. Nuko basiga Dawudi amavuta, aba umwami wa Israheli, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabivugishije Samweli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Dawudi n’Abayisraheli bose bajya gutera Yeruzalemu, ari yo Yebuzi, no kurwanya Abayebuzi bari batuye icyo gihugu." 
1Chronicles11:5 Abaturage b’i Yebuzi babwira Dawudi, bati «Ntuzinjira hano!» Ariko Dawudi yigarurira ikigo cya Siyoni, ari na cyo cyabaye umurwa wa Dawudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Koko rero Dawudi yari yavuze ati «Utanga abandi kwica Umuyebuzi azaba umutware n’igikomangoma.» Nuko Yowabu mwene Seruya ababanziriza imbere, aba ari we uba umutware." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dawudi atura muri icyo kigo, bituma bacyita Umurwa wa Dawudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Hanyuma yubaka umugi n’ahakikije i Milo, mu mpande zose, naho Yowabu asana ahari hasigaye." 
1Chronicles11:9 Dawudi agenda arushaho gukomera, kandi Uhoraho Nyir’ububasha yari kumwe na we." 
1Chronicles11:10 Ngaba abatware b’intwari za Dawudi; ni bo bamuteye inkunga mu gihe cyose yari ku ngoma, kandi ni na bo bamwimitse, bafatanyije na Israheli yose, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabivugiye kuri Israheli." 
1Chronicles11:11 Ngiri irondora ry’intwari za Dawudi: Yashobeyamu mwene Hakumoni, umutware w’abitwa Abatatu b’imena. Ni we wabanguriye icumu rye ku bantu magana atatu abicira icyarimwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 Umukurikira ni Eleyazari mwene Dodo w’Umwahohi wari mu Batatu b’imena. 
1Chronicles11:13 Ni we wari hamwe na Dawudi i Pasidamimu igihe Abafilisiti bari bahakoraniye kugira ngo barwane. Aho hari umurima wa za bushoki nyinshi, nuko abantu bahunga Abafilisiti." 
1Chronicles11:14 Eleyazari uwo ahagarara hagati mu murima, arawurinda, maze atsinsura Abafilisiti. Bityo Uhoraho atsindira Israheli bikomeye." 
1Chronicles11:15 Batatu bo muri Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena baramanuka basanga Dawudi ku rutare ruri hafi y’ubuvumo bwa Adulamu, mu gihe Abafilisiti bari baciye ingando mu kibaya cy’Abarefayimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ubwo Dawudi yari mu buhungiro, naho igico cy’Abafilisiti kiri i Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dawudi avuga icyifuzo cye, agira ati «Ni nde uzampa ku mazi yo mu iriba riri ku irembo rya Betelehemu, nkayanywa?»" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ba batatu banyura mu ngando y’Abafilisiti barwana, bavoma amazi mu iriba riri ku irembo rya Betelehemu, barayajyana, bayashyikiriza Dawudi. We ariko yanga kuyanywa ahubwo ayaturaho Uhoraho ituro riseswa." 
1Chronicles11:19 Aravuga ati «Imana yanjye irandinde gukora kuri aya mazi! Aya ni amaraso y’abantu bahaze amagara yabo, bagira ngo bayanzanire!» Nuko yanga kuyanywa. Ibyo ni byo byakozwe na ba bagabo b’intwari, uko ari batatu." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishayi murumuna wa Yowabu, ni we wategekaga Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena. Ni we kandi wakaraze icumu rye, rihinguranya abantu magana atatu, bituma aba ikirangirire muri Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena." 
1Chronicles11:21 Yarubashywe kurusha Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena, ndetse aba umutware wabo, ariko ntiyashyikira Intwari eshatu za mbere." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya mwene Yehoyada, umwana w’umugabo w’intwari ukomoka i Kabuseli, yagaragaje ubutwari bwe kenshi. Ni we wishe abahungu bombi ba Ariyeli w’i Mowabu, ni na we wamanutse yicira intare ku iriba, ku munsi w’urubura." 
1Chronicles11:23 Ni we kandi wishe Umunyamisiri wari ufite uburebure bw’imikono itanu. Uwo Munyamisiri yari yitwaje icumu ringana n’igiti cy’ababoshyi b’imyenda. Amanuka amusanga yitwaje inkoni, ashikuza icumu Umunyamisiri, amwicisha icumu rye bwite!" 
1Chronicles11:24 Ngibyo ibyo Benayahu mwene Yehoyada yakoze; yamamaye muri Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena; 
1Chronicles11:25 yagize icyubahiro kurusha izo Ntwari mirongo itatu, ariko ntiyahwanye n’Intwari eshatu za mbere. Maze Dawudi amugira umurinzi we." 
1Chronicles11:26 Dore n’abandi babaye intwari zikomeye: ni Asaheli umuvandimwe wa Yowabu, Eluhanani mwene Dodo w’i Betelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamoti w’i Harodi, Helesi w’i Paloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira mwene Ikeshi w’i Tekowa, Abiyezeri w’i Anatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekayi w’i Husha, Ilayi w’i Ahoha," 
1Chronicles11:30 Mahurayi w’i Netofa, Heledi mwene Bahana w’i Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itayi mwene Ribayi w’i Gibeya y’Ababenyamini, Benaya w’i Pireyatoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurayi wo ku tugezi tw’i Gashi, Abiyeli w’i Aruba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azumaweti w’i Bahurimu, Eliyahuba w’i Shaluboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 Hashemu w’i Gizoni, Yonatani mwene Shage w’i Harani," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiya mwene Sakari w’i Harari, Elifali mwene Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi w’i Mekerati, Ahiya w’i Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Hesiro w’i Karumeli, Narayi mwene Ezubayi," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoweli umuvandimwe wa Natani, Mibuhari mwene Haguri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Seleki w’Umuhamoni, Nahurayi w’i Beroti, watwaraga intwaro za Yowabu mwene Seruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira w’i Yatiri, Garebu w’i Yatiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriya w’Umuhiti, Zabadi mwene Ahulayi," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mwene Shiza w’Umurubeni, umutware w’Abarubeni wagendanaga n’abantu mirongo itatu," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mwene Mayaka na Yoshafati w’i Mituni," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziya w’i Ashitaroti, Shama na Yeweli bene Yotamu w’i Aroweri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediyaweli mwene Shimuri na Yoha, umuvandimwe we w’i Tisi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliyeli w’i Mahawi, Yeribayi na Yoshaweya bene Elinahamu, Yituma w’Umumowabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliyeli, Obedi na Yasiyeli b’i Soba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ngaba abasanze Dawudi i Sikilagi igihe yari agikomeje kuba kure ya Sawuli mwene Kishi. Bari intwari zarwanaga aho rukomeye. 
1Chronicles12:2 Bari bitwaje imiheto, bagakoresha ikiganza cy’iburyo n’icy’ibumoso kugira ngo batere amabuye no kugira ngo barase imyambi." 
1Chronicles12:3 Mu bavandimwe ba Sawuli w’Umubenyamini hari: Ahiyezeri wari umutware wabo; Yowashi mwene Shema w’i Gibeya; Yeziyeli na Peleti bene Azumaweti; Beraka na Yehu b’i Anatoti; 
1Chronicles12:4 Yishumaya w’i Gibewoni, wari umwe muri za Ntwari mirongo itatu z’imena kandi akaba umutware wazo;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Yirimeya, Yahaziyeli, Yohanani na Yozabadi w’i Gedera;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Eluzayi, Yerimoti, Beyaliya, Shemariyahu na Shefatiyahu w’i Harifu;" 
1Chronicles12:7 Elikana, Yishiyahu, Azareli, Yohezeri na Yashobeyamu b’i Koriha;" 
1Chronicles12:8 Yowela na Zebadiya bene Yerohamu w’i Gedori. 
1Chronicles12:9 Abagadi bamwe baritandukanya kugira ngo basange Dawudi mu buhungiro mu butayu. Bari abagabo b’intwari, abagabo b’intambara bigishijwe kurwana, bitwaje ingabo n’amacumu, bafite imbaraga nk’intare kandi bihuta nk’amasha ku misozi." 
1Chronicles12:10 Ezeri yari umutware wabo, Obadiya amukurikira, Eliyabu ari uwa gatatu," 
1Chronicles12:11 Mishumana uwa kane, Yirimeya uwa gatanu," 
1Chronicles12:12 Atayi uwa gatandatu, Eliyeli uwa karindwi," 
1Chronicles12:13 Yohanani uwa munani, Elizabadi uwa cyenda," 
1Chronicles12:14 Yirimeyahu uwa cumi, Makubanayi uwa cumi n’umwe." 
1Chronicles12:15 Muri bene Gadi, abo bari abagaba b’ingabo, umuto muri bo yategekaga abasirikare ijana, umukuru muri bo agategeka igihumbi." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ni bo bambutse Yorudani mu kwezi kwa mbere, igihe yari yuzuye yarenze inkombe zayo, kandi birukana abari mu bibaya bose, iburasirazuba n’iburengerazuba." 
1Chronicles12:17 Bamwe mu Babenyamini n’Abayuda baza basanga Dawudi aho yari mu buhungiro. 
1Chronicles12:18 Asohoka abasanganira, nuko arababwira ati «Niba muzanywe n’amahoro mukaba muje kuntabara, ndabakirana umutima wanjye wose; ariko niba muzanywe no kungambanira ku banzi banjye, kandi nta bugome nigeze, Imana y’abasokuruza bacu ibirebe kandi ibacire urubanza!»" 
1Chronicles12:19 Umwuka uza kuri Amasayi, umutware wa Ba Mirongo Itatu b’imena, ati «Turi abawe, Dawudi, turi kumwe nawe, mwene Yese! Amahoro! Gira amahoro! N’abaje kugutabara, na bo bagire amahoro, kuko Imana yawe igutabaye!» Dawudi arabakira, abashyira mu batware b’ingabo." 
1Chronicles12:20 Abantu bamwe bo kwa Manase na bo bifatanya na Dawudi igihe yazanaga n’Abafilisiti kurwanya Sawuli, ariko ntiyemererwe gutabara Abafilisiti, kuko ibikomangoma byabo byagiye inama byirukana Dawudi, bivuga biti «Namara kutugambanira azifatanya na shebuja Sawuli maze badutsembe!»" 
1Chronicles12:21 Igihe Dawudi yajyaga i Sikilagi, abantu bamwe bo kwa Manase bifatanije na we: abo ni Aduna, Yozabadi, Yediyayeli, Mikayeli, Yozabadi, Elihu na Siletayi, bari abatware b’amazu mu Bamanase." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ni bo batabaye Dawudi n’ingabo ze, kuko bose bari abagabo b’intwari kandi baba abatware mu ngabo." 
1Chronicles12:23 Koko rero buri munsi abantu basangaga Dawudi bajya kumutabara, ku buryo ingando ye yiyongereye ikaba nini nk’ingando y’Imana." 
1Chronicles12:24 Ngiyi imibare y’imitwe y’abantu bitwaje intwaro z’intambara basanze Dawudi i Heburoni kugira ngo bamwimike abe umwami mu kigwi cya Sawuli, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabitegetse:" 
1Chronicles12:25 Muri bene Yuda: abagabo ibihumbi bitandatu na magana inani bafite ingabo n’amacumu kandi bakereye urugamba. 
1Chronicles12:26 Muri bene Simewoni: abagabo b’intwari mu ntambara ibihumbi birindwi n’ijana. 
1Chronicles12:27 Muri bene Levi: abagabo ibihumbi bine na magana atandatu; 
1Chronicles12:28 wongeyeho Yehoyada, umutware w’abo mu nzu ya Aroni, wajyanye n’ibihumbi bitatu na magana arindwi," 
1Chronicles12:29 ukongeraho na Sadoki, umusore w’intwari, n’abatware b’inzu makumyabiri na babiri." 
1Chronicles12:30 Mu Babenyamini n’abavandimwe ba Sawuli: abagabo ibihumbi bitatu, ariko kugeza icyo gihe abenshi bari basigaye bakorera Sawuli n’inzu ye." 
1Chronicles12:31 Muri bene Efurayimu: abagabo b’intwari ibihumbi makumyabiri na magana inani, abagabo bari ibyamamare mu mazu yabo." 
1Chronicles12:32 Abo mu gice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase: abagabo ibihumbi cumi n’umunani; bari bahamagawe mu mazina yabo, bategekwa kujya kwimika Dawudi ngo abe umwami." 
1Chronicles12:33 Muri bene Isakari, abagabo bazi icyo Israheli igomba gukora n’igihe cyo kugikora: abatware magana abiri n’abavandimwe babo bose bayoboraga." 
1Chronicles12:34 Muri bene Zabuloni: abagabo ibihumbi mirongo itanu bakereye urugamba, bitwaje intwaro zabo zose kandi biyemeje kurwana bashyizeho umwete nta kwizigama." 
1Chronicles12:35 Muri bene Nefutali: abatware igihumbi, hamwe n’abagabo ibihumbi mirongo itatu na birindwi bitwaje ingabo n’amacumu." 
1Chronicles12:36 Muri bene Dani: abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri n’umunani na magana atandatu bakereye urugamba. 
1Chronicles12:37 Muri bene Asheri: abagabo ibihumbi mirongo ine bakereye urugamba. 
1Chronicles12:38 Mu bo hakurya ya Yorudani, ari bo bene Rubeni, bene Gadi n’ab’ikindi gice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase: abagabo ibihumbi ijana na makumyabiri bitwaje intwaro z’amoko yose z’intambara." 
1Chronicles12:39 Izo ngabo zose, ziteguye kujya ku rugamba, zagiye i Heburoni zifite umutima utaryarya, kugira ngo zimike Dawudi, abe umwami wa Israheli yose. N’abandi Bayisraheli bose basigaye, bari bahuje umutima na bo ngo begurire Dawudi ubwami." 
1Chronicles12:40 Bamazeyo iminsi itatu, basangira na Dawudi ibiribwa n’ibinyobwa, kuko abavandimwe babo bari babateguriye byose." 
1Chronicles12:41 Abantu bo mu turere tuhegereye, kugera kuri Isakari, Zabuloni na Nefutali, na bo bazana ibiribwa ku ndogobe, ingamiya, inyumbu n’ibimasa: bazana amafu, imitsima y’imbuto z’imitini, imizabibu yumye, divayi, amavuta, amatungo maremare n’amagufi menshi, kuko hari ibyishimo muri Israheli." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dawudi ajya inama n’abatware bategeka ibihumbi n’abategeka amagana, hamwe n’abanyacyubahiro bose." 
1Chronicles13:2 Abwira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli, ati «Niba musanga bibatunganiye kandi ari na ko Uhoraho Imana yacu abishaka, dutumire abavandimwe bacu basigaye mu gihugu cya Israheli, hamwe n’abaherezabitambo n’abalevi mu migi yabo batuyemo, kugira ngo baze kwifatanya natwe." 
1Chronicles13:3 Hanyuma twiyegereze Ubushyinguro bw’Imana yacu, kuko tutabwitayeho mu gihe cya Sawuli.»" 
1Chronicles13:4 Ikoraniro ryose ryemera ko biba bityo, kuko uwo mugambi wari ubashimishije bose." 
1Chronicles13:5 Dawudi akoranya imbaga yose, kuva ku mugezi wa Misiri kugeza i Lebo‐Hamati, kugira ngo bavane Ubushyinguro bw’Imana i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dawudi azamukana n’Abayisraheli bose i Bahala, bajya i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu y’Abayuda, kugira ngo bazamure Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho utetse ku Bakerubimu, aho izina rye ryambarizwa." 
1Chronicles13:7 Nuko bashyira Ubushyinguro ku igare rishya, babuvana mu nzu ya Abinadabu. Uza na Ahiyo bayobora igare." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dawudi n’Abayisraheli bose babyinanaga imbaraga zabo zose imbere y’Imana baherekejwe n’indirimbo, imiduri, inanga, ingoma, ibinyuguri n’amakondera." 
1Chronicles13:9 Bageze ku mbuga ya Kidoni, Uza arambura ukuboko kugira ngo aramire Ubushyinguro, kuko ibimasa byari bigiye kubutura hasi." 
1Chronicles13:10 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira Uza, buramwica kuko yari yaramburiye ukuboko ku Bushyinguro. Agwa aho imbere y’Imana." 
1Chronicles13:11 Dawudi ababazwa n’uko Uhoraho abaciyemo icyuho, yica Uza. Nuko aho hantu bahita Peresi‐Uza, ari byo kuvuga ’Icyuho cya Uza’, kugeza na n’ubu." 
1Chronicles13:12 Dawudi atinya Imana uwo munsi, nuko aravuga ati «Nzageza nte iwanjye Ubushyinguro bw’Imana?»" 
1Chronicles13:13 Nuko Dawudi ntiyacyura Ubushyinguro iwe, mu Murwa wa Dawudi, ahubwo abujyana mu rugo rwa Obededomu w’Umugiti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ubushyinguro bumara amezi atatu kwa Obededomu mu rugo rwe, kandi Uhoraho aha umugisha urugo rwa Obededomu n’ibyo yari afite byose." 
1Chronicles14:1 Bukeye Hiramu, umwami wa Tiri, yohereza intumwa kwa Dawudi, hamwe n’ibiti by’amasederi, ababaji b’amabuye n’abubatsi kugira ngo bamwubakire inzu." 
1Chronicles14:2 Nuko Dawudi amenyeraho ko Uhoraho yamugize umwami w’Abayisraheli, kandi ko yari akujije ubwami bwe agiriye Israheli, umuryango we." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dawudi ashakira abandi bagore i Yeruzalemu, arongera abyara abahungu n’abakobwa." 
1Chronicles14:4 Ngaya amazina y’abana be bavukiye i Yeruzalemu: ni Shamuwa, Shobabu, Natani, Salomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Yibuhari, Elishuwa, Elipaleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Behaliyada na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Bukeye, Abafilisiti bamenya ko Dawudi yasizwe amavuta kugira ngo abe umwami w’Abayisraheli bose. Nuko Abafilisiti bose barazamuka, bajya gushakashaka Dawudi. Dawudi na we arabimenya, aza kubasanganira." 
1Chronicles14:9 Ubwo Abafilisiti baraza, badendeza mu kibaya cy’Abarefayimu." 
1Chronicles14:10 Dawudi ni ko kubaza Uhoraho, ati «Mbese nzamuke ntere Abafilisiti? Uri bubagabize ibiganza byanjye?» Uhoraho aramusubiza ati «Zamuka! Ndabagabiza ibiganza byawe.»" 
1Chronicles14:11 Nuko bazamuka i Behali‐Perasimu, Dawudi abatsinda aho. Dawudi aravuga ati «Imana yacishije ikiganza cyanjye icyuho mu banzi banjye, kimeze nk’igiciwe n’amazi ahombotse.» Ni yo mpamvu aho hantu bahise Behali‐Perasimu, ari byo kuvuga ngo ’Umutware w’ibyuho.’" 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilisiti basiga amashusho y’ibigirwamana byabo aho ngaho; Dawudi ategeka ko bayatwika. 
1Chronicles14:13 Abafilisiti bongera kudendeza mu kibaya. 
1Chronicles14:14 Dawudi yongera kubaza Imana, maze Imana iramubwira iti «Ntubatere ubaturutse imbere, ahubwo hindukira uturuke inyuma yabo, ahateganye n’ishyamba." 
1Chronicles14:15 Niwumva ikiriri gihinda giturutse hejuru y’ishyamba, uhutireho! Ubwo Imana iraba iri bujye imbere yawe, kugira ngo utsinde Abafilisiti.»" 
1Chronicles14:16 Dawudi abigenza uko Imana yamutegetse, atsinda Abafilisiti kuva i Gibewoni kugeza i Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Dawudi aramamara mu bihugu byose, kandi Uhoraho atuma atinywa n’amahanga yose." 
1Chronicles15:1 Dawudi yiyubakira amazu mu Murwa wa Dawudi; agena ahantu h’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana kandi abushingira Ihema. 
1Chronicles15:2 Nuko aravuga ati «Abalevi bonyine ni bo bazajya baheka Ubushyinguro kuko ari bo Uhoraho yitoreye ngo bajye baheka Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho kandi banabukorere ubuziraherezo.» 
1Chronicles15:3 Dawudi akoranyiriza Abayisraheli bose i Yeruzalemu kugira ngo bazamure Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho babujyane ahantu yabuteganyirije. 
1Chronicles15:4 Akoranya na bene Aroni n’abalevi: 
1Chronicles15:5 muri bene Kehati hari Uriyeli w’umutware n’abavandimwe be ijana na makumyabiri; 
1Chronicles15:6 muri bene Merari hari Asaya w’umutware n’abavandimwe be magana abiri na makumyabiri; 
1Chronicles15:7 muri bene Gerishomu hari Yoweli w’umutware n’abavandimwe be ijana na mirongo itatu; 
1Chronicles15:8 muri bene Elisafani hari Shemaya w’umutware n’abavandimwe be magana abiri; 
1Chronicles15:9 muri bene Heburoni hari Eliyeli w’umutware n’abavandimwe be mirongo inani; 
1Chronicles15:10 muri bene Uziyeli hari Aminadabu w’umutware n’abavandimwe be ijana na cumi na babiri. 
1Chronicles15:11 Dawudi atumiza abaherezabitambo Sadoki na Abiyatari, hamwe n’abalevi Uriyeli, Asaya, Yoweli, Shemaya, Eliyeli na Aminadabu." 
1Chronicles15:12 Maze arababwira ati «Muri abatware b’amazu y’abalevi; nimwitagatifuze mwebwe n’abavandimwe banyu, maze muzamure Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, mubujyane ahantu nabuteganyirije." 
1Chronicles15:13 Amambere koko ntimwari muhari, Uhoraho yaduciyemo icyuho, kuko tutari twamutunganirije uko bikwiye.»" 
1Chronicles15:14 Nuko Abaherezabitambo n’abalevi bitagatifuriza kuzamura Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Abalevi baheka Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bashyize imijishi yabwo ku ntugu zabo, nk’uko Musa yabitegetse akurikije ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles15:16 Maze Dawudi abwira abatware b’abalevi gushyira abavandimwe babo b’abaririmbyi mu mwanya wabo, bitwaje ibikoresho byabo, ari byo inanga, imiduri n’ibyuma birangira, kugira ngo babivuze cyane maze amajwi yabyo arangurure yuzuye ibyishimo." 
1Chronicles15:17 Nuko abalevi bahashyira Hemani mwene Yoweli, no mu bavandimwe be Asafu mwene Berekiyahu; muri bene Merari abavandimwe babo bahashyira Etani mwene Kushayahu;" 
1Chronicles15:18 hamwe na bo bahashyira na bene wabo, ari bo Zekariyahu mwene Yahaziyeli, Shemiramoti, Yehiyeli, Uni, Eliyabu, Benayahu, Maseyahu, Matitiyahu, Elifilehu na Mikineyahu, Obededomu na Yeweli; abo bose bari abanyanzugi." 
1Chronicles15:19 Mu baririmbyi, Hemani, Asafu na Etani bari bafite ibyuma birangira byo kurangurura amajwi;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Sekariya, Yahaziyeli, Shemiramoti, Yehiyeli, Uni, Yehiyeli, Maseyahu na Benayahu bari bafite inanga nini," 
1Chronicles15:21 naho Matitiyahu, Elifilehu, Mikineyahu, Obededomu, Yeweli na Azaziyahu bakagira inanga ntoya, kugira ngo bayobore indirimbo." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniyahu we yategekaga abalevi bari bashinzwe guheka Ubushyinguro, kuko yari abishoboye." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiya na Elikana bari abanyanzugi hafi y’Ubushyinguro. 
1Chronicles15:24 Abaherezabitambo Shebaniyahu, Yoshafati, Netaneli, Amasayi, Zekariyahu, Benayahu na Eliyezeri bavuzaga amakondera imbere y’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana. Naho Obededomu na Yahiya na bo bakaba abanyanzugi hafi y’Ubushyinguro." 
1Chronicles15:25 Nuko Dawudi, n’abakuru b’Abayisraheli, n’abatware bategekaga ibihumbi, bagenda bishimye bazamuye Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho babuvanye mu rugo rwa Obededomu." 
1Chronicles15:26 Imana yari kumwe n’abalevi bari bahetse Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, nuko batura ibitambo by’amapfizi arindwi n’amasekurume y’ihene arindwi." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dawudi yari yambaye igishura cy’ihariri, kimwe n’abalevi bose bari bahetse Ubushyinguro, n’abaririmbyi, na Kenaniya wayoboraga abahetsi b’Ubushyinguro. Dawudi yari akenyeye agatambaro kaboshye muri hariri." 
1Chronicles15:28 Nuko Abayisraheli bose bazamura Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho bakoma mu mashyi, kandi bavuza amahembe, amakondera n’ibyuma birangira, kandi bacuranga inanga zirangira." 
1Chronicles15:29 Nuko Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho butaha mu Murwa wa Dawudi. Mikali, umukobwa wa Sawuli, arebera mu idirishya, abona umwami Dawudi wasimbukaga, yiyereka imbere y’Uhoraho, maze amugayira mu mutima." 
1Chronicles16:1 Binjiza Ubushyinguro bw’Imana maze babushyira aho bwateguriwe hagati mu ihema Dawudi yari yarabwubakiye, hanyuma batura ibitambo bitwikwa n’iby’ubuhoro imbere y’Imana." 
1Chronicles16:2 Dawudi amaze gutura ibitambo bitwikwa n’iby’ubuhoro, aha umugisha rubanda mu izina ry’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles16:3 Hanyuma agaburira Abayisraheli bose, abagabo n’abagore; buri wese amuha akagati, umurwi w’inyama n’iseri ry’umuzabibu." 
1Chronicles16:4 Dawudi ashyiraho bamwe mu balevi imbere y’Ubushyinguro kugira ngo bajye bibutsa ibigwi by’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, bamusingize banamurate." 
1Chronicles16:5 Abo ni aba: Asafu w’umutware, Zekariya, umufasha we; hagakurikiraho Uziyeli, Shemiramoti, Yehiyeli, Matatiya, Eliyabu, Benayahu, Obededomu na Yehiyeli. Bari bafite inanga ntoya n’inini, naho Asafu yacurangaga ibyuma birangira." 
1Chronicles16:6 Abaherezabitambo Benayahu na Yahaziyeli ntibahwemaga kuvugiriza amakondera imbere y’Ubushyinguro bw’Imana. 
1Chronicles16:7 Ni uwo munsi Dawudi yategetse bwa mbere Asafu n’abavandimwe be gusingiza Uhoraho, muri aya magambo:" 
1Chronicles16:8 Nimusingize Uhoraho, mwamamaze izina rye, mumenyeshe amahanga ibigwi bye!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Nimumuririmbire, mumukinire; mwongere muvuge ibitangaza bye byose!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Mwishimire izina rye ritagatifu, kandi umutima w’abashakashaka Uhoraho unezerwe!" 
1Chronicles16:11 Nimushakashake Uhoraho Nyir’ububasha, mushake uruhanga rwe ubudahwema!" 
1Chronicles16:12 Mwiyibutse ibintu by’agatangaza yakoze, ibitangaza bye n’amateka amuva mu kanwa," 
1Chronicles16:13 mwebwe, bwoko bwa Israheli umugaragu we, mwebwe, bene Yakobo intore ze!" 
1Chronicles16:14 Ni we Uhoraho Imana yacu, utegeka isi yose!" 
1Chronicles16:15 Nimwiyibutse iteka isezerano rye, itegeko yatanze mu bisekuruza igihumbi," 
1Chronicles16:16 isezerano yagiranye na Abrahamu, rigakomezwa n’indahiro ya Izaki," 
1Chronicles16:17 akarigira ihame kuri Yakobo, isezerano rihoraho ku Bayisraheli," 
1Chronicles16:18 igihe avuze ati «Nguhaye ubutaka bwa Kanahani; ni wo munani ugabanye!» 
1Chronicles16:19 Icyo gihe bashoboraga kubarwa, bari icigata ry’abantu binjiye mu gihugu," 
1Chronicles16:20 bazereraga mu bihugu no mu mahanga, bakava hamwe bajya ahandi," 
1Chronicles16:21 ariko Uhoraho ntiyaretse hagira umuntu ubarenganya, ahana abami kubera bo, ati" 
1Chronicles16:22 «Ntimugakore ku ntore zanjye, abahanuzi banjye ntimukabagirire nabi!»" 
1Chronicles16:23 Isi yose, nimuririmbire Uhoraho! Mwamamaze ugukiza kwe uko bukeye," 
1Chronicles16:24 mumenyeshe abanyamahanga icyubahiro cye, mwogeze ibitangaza bye mu mahanga yose!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Kuko Uhoraho akomeye kandi akwiye gusingizwa, akaba ateye ubwoba kandi akaruta imana zose." 
1Chronicles16:26 Imana zose z’abanyamahanga ni ubusa, Uhoraho ni we waremye ijuru!" 
1Chronicles16:27 Icyubahiro n’igitinyiro biri mu ruhanga rwe; imbaraga n’ubutungane bikaba iwe. 
1Chronicles16:28 Miryango y’amahanga, nimuhe Uhoraho, nimumuhe icyubahiro n’imbaraga," 
1Chronicles16:29 izina rye murihe icyubahiro. Muzane amaturo yanyu, muze imbere ye; mwunamire Uhoraho, mu Ngoro ye ntagatifu!" 
1Chronicles16:30 Namwe, isi yose nimuhinde umushyitsi imbere ye! Koko yaremye isi, nta cyayinyeganyeza." 
1Chronicles16:31 Ijuru nirinezerwe, isi yishime, mu mahanga nibavuge bati «Uhoraho ni Umwami!»" 
1Chronicles16:32 Inyanja n’ibiyirimo byose nibyorome, iby’imusozi byose nibyishime;" 
1Chronicles16:33 ibiti byose by’amashyamba nibisabagizwe n’umunezero, imbere y’Uhoraho, kuko aje gutegeka isi!" 
1Chronicles16:34 Nimuhimbaze Uhoraho kuko ari umugwaneza, n’ubudahemuka bwe bugahoraho iteka ryose!" 
1Chronicles16:35 Nimugire muti «Dukize, Mana y’umukiro wacu, dukoranye udukure hagati y’amahanga, kugira ngo duhimbaze izina ryawe ritagatifu, twishimire kugusingiza.»" 
1Chronicles16:36 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, iteka ryose ubuziraherezo! Nuko abantu bose baravuga bati «Amen! Alleluya!»" 
1Chronicles16:37 Dawudi asiga aho, imbere y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, Asafu n’abavandimwe be bagombaga guhora bakorera imbere y’Ubushyinguro nk’uko byari itegeko rya buri munsi;" 
1Chronicles16:38 ahasiga na Obededomu hamwe n’abavandimwe be mirongo itandatu n’umunani. Obededomu mwene Yedutuni na Hosa ni bo bari abanyanzugi. 
1Chronicles16:39 Dawudi asiga umuherezabitambo Sadoki hamwe n’abandi bavandimwe be b’abaherezabitambo imbere y’ihema ry’Uhoraho, mu isengero ry’ahirengeye i Gibewoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 kugira ngo mu gitondo na nimugoroba bajye batura ubutitsa Uhoraho ibitambo bitwikwa ku rutambiro rubigenewe, no kugira ngo bajye batunganya ibyanditswe mu itegeko Uhoraho yahaye Abayisraheli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Hamwe na bo hari Hemani na Yedutuni n’abasigaye mu bari batoranyijwe kandi bakavugwa mu mazina yabo ngo bahimbaze Uhoraho: «Kuko ubudahemuka bwe ari ubw’iteka ryose». 
1Chronicles16:42 Kandi, Hemani na Yedutuni bari kumwe na bo bafite amakondera n’ibyuma birangira n’ibyuma biherekeza indirimbo z’Imana. Bene Yedutuni bari bashinzwe irembo." 
1Chronicles16:43 Abantu bose bataha buri wese iwe, na Dawudi asubira iwe gusabira urugo rwe umugisha." 
1Chronicles17:1 Dawudi amaze gutaha mu ngoro ye, yabwiye umuhanuzi Natani, ati «Dore ntuye mu nzu y’ibiti by’amasederi, naho Ubushyinguro bw’Imana bukaba mu ihema!»" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani abwira umwami, ati «Icyo utekereza gukora cyose, genda ugikore, kuko Uhoraho ari kumwe nawe.»" 
1Chronicles17:3 Nuko muri iryo joro, ijambo ry’Uhoraho rigera kuri Natani muri aya magambo riti" 
1Chronicles17:4 «Genda ubwire umugaragu wanjye Dawudi uti ’Dore uko Uhoraho avuze: Aho ni wowe uzanyubakira inzu, kugira ngo nyituremo?" 
1Chronicles17:5 Nta bwo nigeze ntura mu nzu, kuva ubwo nakuraga Abayisraheli mu Misiri kugeza uyu munsi, ahubwo nari ntuye mu mahema, nkava hamwe, njya ahandi." 
1Chronicles17:6 Ese mu gihe cyose najyaniranye n’Abayisraheli, hari ubwo nigeze mbwira umwe mu batware ba Israheli nashyiriyeho kuragira umuryango wanjye, nti: Kuki mutanyubakira inzu y’amasederi?" 
1Chronicles17:7 None rero, uzabwire umugaragu wanjye Dawudi, uti: Dore uko Uhoraho Nyir’ingabo avuze: Ni jye wakuvanye mu rwuri inyuma y’amatungo, kugira ngo ube umutware wa Israheli, umuryango wanjye." 
1Chronicles17:8 Nari kumwe nawe aho wajyaga hose, ngukiza abanzi bose bari baguhagurukiye. Izina ryawe nzarigira ikirangirire, mbese nk’iry’abandi bakomeye bo ku isi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Nzagenera Israheli umuryango wanjye ahantu nyihashyire, ihature ari ahayo bwite. Ntizazungaguzwa ukundi kandi abagome ntibazongera kuyibuza uburyo, nk’uko byagendaga kera," 
1Chronicles17:10 mbese nk’igihe nshyizeho Abacamanza ngo bategeke Israheli umuryango wanjye. Nzagukiza abanzi bawe bose, ndetse Uhoraho akubwiye ko we ubwe azakubakira inzu." 
1Chronicles17:11 N’igihe iminsi yawe izaba yarangiye, maze ukazaba uri kumwe n’abasokuruza bawe, nzakomeza inkomoko yawe nyuma yawe; nzimika uzagukomokaho wowe ubwawe, kandi nkomeze ubwami bwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Uwo ni we uzubakira inzu izina ryanjye, kandi nzakomeza ingoma ye iteka ryose." 
1Chronicles17:13 Nzamubera umubyeyi, na we ambere umwana. Sinzamukuraho umutima, nk’uko nazinutswe uwakubanjirije."
