1Chronicles17:14 Nzamugumisha mu nzu yanjye no mu bwami bwanjye ubuziraherezo, n’ingoma ye izakomere iteka ryose.’»" 
1Chronicles17:15 Natani abwira atyo Dawudi, akurikije ayo magambo yose n’iryo bonekerwa ryose." 
1Chronicles17:16 Nuko umwami Dawudi aza kwicara imbere y’Uhoraho, aravuga ati «Ndi nde, Nyagasani Uhoraho, kandi inzu yanjye ni iyihe, kugira ngo ube ungejeje aha ngaha?" 
1Chronicles17:17 None Nyagasani, usanze ibyo bidahagije, maze uhishurira umugaragu wawe uko inzu ye izamera no mu bihe bizaza! Ibyo byose urabinkoreye, Nyagasani Uhoraho, nk’aho nabaye umuntu ukomeye cyane!" 
1Chronicles17:18 Ubwo se Dawudi ashobora kongera kugira icyo akubwira, kandi wowe uzi neza umugaragu wawe wakujije, Nyagasani Uhoraho?" 
1Chronicles17:19 Ukurikije umugambi w’umutima wawe, Uhoraho, wagiriye umugaragu wawe ubuntu buhebuje umumenyesha ibyo byiza byose." 
1Chronicles17:20 Koko uri intagereranywa, Uhoraho, nta wundi muhwanye, kandi uretse wowe nta yindi Mana ibaho, duhereye ku byo twiyumviye n’amatwi yacu byose!" 
1Chronicles17:21 Kandi nta wundi muryango uhwanye na Israheli, umuryango wawe! Mbese ku isi yose hari umuryango n’umwe wahagurukiye gucungura, ukawugira uwawe, ukawuha izina ry’ikirangirire nk’uko wagenjereje Israheli umuryango wawe? Haba se hari undi muryango wakoreye ibintu by’agatangaza bingana bityo, ukawukura mu Misiri, ukirukana imbere yawo amahanga menshi?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Wihangiye Israheli, umuryango wawe, kugira ngo ikubere iteka umuryango wawe bwite, kandi wowe Uhoraho, ube Imana yawo." 
1Chronicles17:23 None rero, Uhoraho Mana yanjye, ijambo wavuze ku mugaragu wawe n’urubyaro rwe urikomeze iteka, kandi urirangize uko wabyivugiye." 
1Chronicles17:24 Koko, iryo jambo ryawe rikomeze, maze izina ryawe rikuzwe iteka ryose, kandi bavuge bati ’Uhoraho, Umushoborabyose ni Imana ya Israheli! Maze inzu ya Dawudi umugaragu wawe izakomere imbere yawe!’" 
1Chronicles17:25 Kuko ari wowe ubwawe, Mana yanjye, wabihishuriye umugaragu wawe uvuga uti ’Nzakubakira inzu.’ Ngiyo impamvu umugaragu wawe yatinyutse kuvuga iri sengesho." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ikindi kandi, Nyagasani Uhoraho, ni wowe Mana, kandi ukaba usezeranyije umugaragu wawe iryo hirwe." 
1Chronicles17:27 Nuko rero, ugire ubuntu uhe inzu y’umugaragu wawe umugisha, kugira ngo ihore iteka imbere yawe. Kuko ari wowe, Nyagasani Uhoraho, ubivuze, kandi ku bw’umugisha wawe, inzu y’umugaragu wawe ijye ihabwa imigisha iteka ryose.»" 
1Chronicles18:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, Dawudi atsinda Abafilisiti, maze arabacogoza. Afata Gati n’insisiro zayo, ayinyaga Abafilisiti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Atsinda n’Abamowabu, nuko Abamowabu bahinduka abagaragu ba Dawudi, bakamuha imisoro." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dawudi atsindira Hadadezeri, umwami w’i Soba, ahagana Hamati, ubwo Hadadezeri uwo yari amaze kugenda, agira ngo yigarurire uruzi rwa Efurati." 
1Chronicles18:4 Nuko Dawudi amutwara amagare igihumbi, abagendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi birindwi, n’ibihumbi makumyabiri byo mu ngabo zigenza amaguru. Dawudi atema ibitsi by’amafarasi yose akurura amagare, asiga ijana gusa." 
1Chronicles18:5 Bukeye Abaramu b’i Damasi baza gutabara Hadadezeri, umwami w’i Soba, ariko Dawudi abicamo abantu ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri." 
1Chronicles18:6 Nuko Dawudi ashyiraho abatware muri Aramu y’i Damasi, maze Abaramu bahinduka abagaragu ba Dawudi bakajya bamuha imisoro. Uhoraho yahaga Dawudi gutsinda aho yateraga hose." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dawudi anyaga abagaragu ba Hadadezeri ingabo za zahabu bikingiraga, azijyana i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 I Tibuhati n’i Kuni, imigi ya Hadadezeri, Dawudi ahakura imiringa myinshi cyane; ni na yo Salomoni yacuzemo ikizenga, inkingi n’ibindi bikoresho by’umuringa." 
1Chronicles18:9 Towu, umwami w’i Hamati, yumva ko Dawudi yatsinze ingabo zose za Hadadezeri, umwami w’i Soba." 
1Chronicles18:10 Towu aherako yohereza umuhungu we Hadoramu ku umwami Dawudi kugira ngo amuramutse kandi amushimire ko yarwanyije Hadadezeri akamunesha, kuko Hadadezeri yari umwanzi wa Towu. Nuko Towu ashyira Dawudi ibintu byiza byinshi bya zahabu, feza n’imiringa." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ibyo bintu na byo umwami Dawudi abitura Uhoraho, abyongera kuri feza na zahabu yari yaranyaze amahanga yose yatsinze: ari yo Edomu, Mowabu, bene Hamoni, Abafilisiti na Amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishayi mwene Seruya atsindira Abanyedomu ibihumbi cumi n’umunani mu kibaya cy’Umunyu. 
1Chronicles18:13 Ashyiraho abatware muri Edomu kandi Abanyedomu bose bahinduka abagaragu ba Dawudi. Uhoraho yahaga Dawudi gutsinda aho yateraga hose. 
1Chronicles18:14 Dawudi ategeka Israheli yose, acira abantu bose imanza z’intabera." 
1Chronicles18:15 Yowabu mwene Seruya yategekaga ingabo; Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi yari umunyamabanga w’umwami; 
1Chronicles18:16 Sadoki mwene Ahitubi na Abimeleki mwene Abiyatari bari abaherezabitambo; Shawusha yari umwanditsi; 
1Chronicles18:17 Benayahu mwene Yehoyada yategekaga Abakereti n’Abapeleti; naho bene Dawudi, bari ibyegera by’umwami." 
1Chronicles19:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, Nahashi, umwami w’Abahamoni, aza gupfa, maze umuhungu we amusimbura ku ngoma." 
1Chronicles19:2 Nuko Dawudi aravuga ati «Sinzahemukira Hanuni mwene Nahashi, nk’uko se na we atampemukiye.» Dawudi ni ko kohereza intumwa zo kumuhoza mu kababaro k’urupfu rwa se. Bityo, abagaragu ba Dawudi bagera mu gihugu cy’Abahamoni kwa Hanuni kugira ngo bamuhoze." 
1Chronicles19:3 Ariko abatware b’Abahamoni babwira umwami wabo Hanuni, bati «Uratekereza ko Dawudi akoherereje abo bantu be kuguhoza ari uko yubashye so? Ntuzi ahubwo ko yohereje abagaragu be kwitegereza igihugu, kugitata no kukigusha?»" 
1Chronicles19:4 Nuko Hanuni afata abagaragu ba Dawudi, abogosha ubwanwa, akeba imyambaro yabo guhera hasi kugera ku matako, maze arabasezerera." 
1Chronicles19:5 Babibwiye Dawudi, yohereza umuntu kubasanganira, kuko bari bakozwe n’ikimwaro. Nuko umwami abatumaho ati «Muhame i Yeriko, kugeza ubwo ubwanwa buzaba bumaze kumera. Ni bwo rero muzabona kugaruka.»" 
1Chronicles19:6 Hanuni n’Abahamoni babonye ko basuzuguye Dawudi bikabije, ni ko kohereza abantu ku Baramu b’i Naharayimu, ab’i Mahaka n’ab’i Soba kubasaba ngo bisungane, kandi ngo babahe amagare n’amafarasi." 
1Chronicles19:7 Bakodesha batyo amagare ibihumbi mirongo itatu na bibiri, nuko umwami wa Mahaka n’abantu be baraza, bashinga ingando yabo aharebana na Medeba, naho Abahamoni na bo barakorana, bava mu migi yabo bagiye ku rugamba." 
1Chronicles19:8 Dawudi arabimenya, yohereza Yowabu n’ingabo zose zimenyereye intambara." 
1Chronicles19:9 Bukeye, Abahamoni barasohoka barema inteko mu marembo y’umugi wabo, naho abami bari baje gutabara, bo bari ukwabo ku gasozi." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yowabu asanga agomba guturuka urugamba imbere n’inyuma, ni ko gutoranya abantu b’intwari mu ngabo za Israheli, maze abashyira ahateganye n’Abaramu." 
1Chronicles19:11 Abasigaye bose abaha murumuna we Abishayi, maze abahagarika imbere y’Abahamoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Nuko Yowabu abwira Abishayi, ati «Abaramu nibaramuka bandushije imbaraga, uraza kuntabara. Abahamoni kandi na bo nibakurusha imbaraga, ndibuze kugutabara." 
1Chronicles19:13 Ukomere, tugaragaze ubutwari kubera umuryango wacu n’imigi y’Imana yacu! Kandi Uhoraho arakore uko abishaka.»" 
1Chronicles19:14 Nuko Yowabu n’ingabo ze basatira urugamba, kugira ngo barwane n’Abaramu, maze bo barabahunga." 
1Chronicles19:15 Abahamoni ngo babone ko Abaramu bahunze, na bo baherako bahunga Abishayi bataha mu mugi wabo. Yowabu areka atyo kurwana n’Abahamoni, agaruka i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Abaramu babonye ko baneshejwe n’Abayisraheli, bohereza intumwa ngo zijye gutabaza n’Abaramu bo hakurya y’Uruzi. Shofaki, umugaba w’ingabo za Hadadezeri ni we wabategekaga." 
1Chronicles19:17 Babimenyesha Dawudi, na we akoranya Abayisraheli bose, yambuka Yorudani, abageraho, maze arabitegura. Dawudi ategura ingabo ze ngo zirwane n’Abaramu, nuko baba ari bo bashoza urugamba." 
1Chronicles19:18 Abaramu baza guhunga Abayisraheli, nuko Dawudi abicamo abanyamagare ibihumbi birindwi, n’abandi ibihumbi mirongo ine bo mu ngabo zagenzaga amaguru. Yica na Shofaki, umugaba w’ingabo." 
1Chronicles19:19 Abatabaye Hadadezeri babonye ko baneshejwe n’Abayisraheli, bahakwa kuri Dawudi, baramukorera. Abaramu kandi ntibongera gutabara Abahamoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Nuko ngo umwaka utahe, igihe abami batabaye, Yowabu azana ingabo ze atera igihugu cy’Abahamoni. Hanyuma agota Raba, naho Dawudi akaba yasigaye i Yeruzalemu. Yowabu atsinda Raba arayisenya." 
1Chronicles20:2 Nuko Dawudi yambura Milikomu ikamba ry’ubwami, asanga rifite uburemere bw’italenta imwe ya zahabu, kandi ririmo n’ibuye ry’agaciro. Nuko Dawudi atamiriza iryo kamba, kandi muri uwo mugi ahavana iminyago myinshi cyane." 
1Chronicles20:3 Naho abaturage b’aho, arabajyana kugira ngo bajye bakoresha inkero, amapiki n’intorezo. Uko ni ko Dawudi yagenjereje imigi yose y’Abahamoni. Hanyuma Dawudi n’ingabo ze zose basubira i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Nyuma y’ibyo, i Gezeri habaye intambara irwanya Abafilisiti. Ni bwo Sibekayi w’i Husha yanesheje Sipayi, umwe mu bana b’Abarefayimu, maze Abafilisiti barabagaragira." 
1Chronicles20:5 Hongera kuba intambara irwanya Abafilisiti. Ni bwo Elihanani mwene Yayiri yishe Lahumi umuvandimwe wa Goliyati w’i Gati; uruti rw’icumu rye rukaba rwanganaga n’igiti baboheraho imyenda. 
1Chronicles20:6 Hongera kuba intambara i Gati. Hari umugabo w’igihangange wari ufite intoki esheshatu ku biganza, n’amano atandatu ku birenge, byose hamwe bikaba makumyabiri na bine. Na we yakomokaga ku Barefayimu." 
1Chronicles20:7 Nuko agasuzugura Abayisraheli, ariko Yonatani mwene Shimeyi umuvandimwe wa Dawudi aramwica." 
1Chronicles20:8 Abo bantu bakomokaga kuri Rafa w’i Gati, bishwe na Dawudi n’abagaragu be." 
1Chronicles21:1 Sekibi atera Israheli, yoshya Dawudi kubarura Abayisraheli." 
1Chronicles21:2 Dawudi abwira Yowabu n’abatware b’umuryango, ati «Mugende, mubarure Abayisraheli muhereye i Berisheba kugera i Dani, maze muzambwire umubare wabo, nywumenye.»" 
1Chronicles21:3 Yowabu aravuga, ati «Uhoraho nakube umuryango we mo incuro ijana! Shobuja Mwami, ese abo bose si abagaragu bawe? Shobuja se, ibyo bigushishikarije iki? Kandi ni iki cyatuma Israheli yazabiryozwa?»" 
1Chronicles21:4 Ariko itegeko ry’umwami riganza Yowabu, aragenda, azenguruka Israheli yose, hanyuma agaruka i Yeruzalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Nuko Yowabu ashyikiriza Dawudi imibare y’abantu babaruwe. Abayisraheli bose bari abagabo miliyoni imwe n’ibihumbi ijana bashoboraga kurwanisha inkota, naho Abayuda bakaba abagabo ibihumbi magana ane na mirongo irindwi bashoboraga kurwanisha inkota." 
1Chronicles21:6 Nyamara muri bo Yowabu ntiyari yabaruriyemo Abalevi n’Ababenyamini, kuko itegeko ry’umwami ryari ryamubabaje cyane." 
1Chronicles21:7 Imana ntiyishimira ibyari bibaye, nuko ihana Israheli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Dawudi abwira Imana, ati «Ni icyaha gikomeye nakoze. None rero, ndakwinginze ngo ubabarire ikosa ry’umugaragu wawe, kuko nakoze nk’umusazi!»" 
1Chronicles21:9 Uhoraho abwira Gadi, umushishozi wa Dawudi, ati" 
1Chronicles21:10 «Genda ubwire Dawudi, uti ’Dore uko Uhoraho avuze: Ngushyize imbere ibihano bitatu. Hitamo kimwe muri byo, maze nzabe ari cyo nguhanisha.»" 
1Chronicles21:11 Nuko Gadi asanga Dawudi, aramubwira ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Muri ibi, uko ari bitatu, icyo uhisemo ni ikihe?" 
1Chronicles21:12 Ari amapfa y’imyaka itatu, ari ukumara amezi atatu uhunga umwanzi waguhagurukiye, cyangwa se mu minsi itatu ukarimburwa n’umumalayika w’Uhoraho, agateza icyorezo mu gihugu cyose? Ubu ngubu tekereza, maze umbwire icyo ngomba gusubiza Uwantumye.»" 
1Chronicles21:13 Dawudi abwira Gadi, ati «Ndashobewe! Reka ngwe mu maboko y’Uhoraho kuko impuhwe ze ari nyinshi cyane, aho kugwa mu maboko y’abantu!»" 
1Chronicles21:14 Nuko Uhoraho ateza Israheli icyorezo, hapfa abantu ibihumbi mirongo irindwi muri Israheli." 
1Chronicles21:15 Imana yohereza malayika i Yeruzalemu kugira ngo ayirimbure. Nk’aho yayirimbuye, Uhoraho arabireba maze agira impuhwe. Abwira malayika w’umurimbuzi, ati «Birahagije! Ubu ngubu hina ukuboko!» Ubwo malayika w’Uhoraho yarahagaze ku mbuga ya Orunani w’Umuyebuzi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dawudi yubuye amaso abona malayika w’Uhoraho ahagaze hagati y’isi n’ijuru, afite mu ntoki inkota itari mu rwubati, ayerekeje kuri Yeruzalemu. Dawudi n’abakuru bambaye ibigunira, barambarara ku butaka bubamye." 
1Chronicles21:17 Dawudi abwira Imana, ati «Ese si jye wategetse ko abantu babarurwa? None se si jyewe wacumuye kandi nkagira nabi? Ariko se ririya shyo ryakoze iki? Uhoraho Mana yanjye, ukuboko kwawe nikube ari jye gushikamira, jyewe n’uru rugo rwanjye, ariko umuryango wose uwurokore iki cyorezo!»" 
1Chronicles21:18 Malayika w’Uhoraho ategeka Gadi kubwira Dawudi, ati «Dawudi nazamuke yubake urutambiro rw’Uhoraho ku mbuga ya Orunani w’Umuyebuzi!»" 
1Chronicles21:19 Dawudi arazamuka nk’uko Gadi yari abimubwiye mu izina ry’Uhoraho. 
1Chronicles21:20 Orunani yahuraga ingano; ahindukiye abona malayika, nuko abana be bane bari kumwe na we bajya kwihisha." 
1Chronicles21:21 Dawudi asanga Orunani, nuko Orunani aritegereza abona umwami; ako kanya ava ku mbuga, yunama imbere ya Dawudi, akoza uruhanga ku butaka." 
1Chronicles21:22 Nuko Dawudi abwira Orunani, ati «Mpa imbuga yawe, tuyigure maze nyubakeho urutambiro rw’Uhoraho. Yimpe turayigura ku giciro cya feza ikwiye, maze dutsinde iki cyorezo!»" 
1Chronicles21:23 Orunani asubiza Dawudi, ati «Yitwarire, maze databuja umwami ayikoreshe uko ashaka. Reba, n’ibimasa ndabiguhaye bibe ibitambo bitwikwa, nguhaye n’ibiti byakururaga bibe inkwi, naho ingano zibe ituro; byose ndabiguhaye!»" 
1Chronicles21:24 Ariko umwami Dawudi abwira Orunani, ati «Oya! Ndabigura ku giciro cya feza gikwiye. Ibyawe sinabifatira Uhoraho ngo mbimutureho ibitambo bitwikwa nta cyo mbiguze!»" 
1Chronicles21:25 Nuko Dawudi aha Orunani zahabu ifite uburemere bw’amasikeli magana atandatu kuri iyo mbuga. 
1Chronicles21:26 Dawudi ayubakamo urutambiro rw’Uhoraho kandi atura ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibitambo by’ubuhoro. Yambaza Uhoraho, na we amusubirisha umuriro uvuye mu ijuru ujya ku rutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa." 
1Chronicles21:27 Hanyuma Uhoraho ategeka malayika gusubiza inkota ye mu rwubati. 
1Chronicles21:28 Dawudi rero abonye ko Uhoraho yamusubirije ku mbuga ya Orunani w’Umuyebuzi, ahaturira ibitambo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Muri icyo gihe Inzu y’Uhoraho n’urutambiro rw’ibitambo bitwikwa Musa yari yarubatse mu butayu, byari ahirengeye i Gibewoni." 
1Chronicles21:30 Ariko Dawudi ntiyashoboraga kujyayo ngo ahambarize Imana, kuko yari yarakanzwe n’inkota ya malayika w’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles22:1 Nuko Dawudi aravuga, ati «Aha ni ho habaye Ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana, kandi uru rutambiro rw’ibitambo ni rwo Abayisraheli bazajya baturiraho ibitambo bitwikwa!»" 
1Chronicles22:2 Dawudi ategeka ko bakoranya abanyamahanga bari mu gihugu cya Israheli, kandi ashyiraho ababaji b’amabuye bo gucukura amabuye agenewe kubaka Ingoro y’Imana." 
1Chronicles22:3 Dawudi ategura ibyuma byinshi byo gucuramo imisumari yo gutera mu bizingiti by’inzugi, n’iyo gutera amapata, ategura imiringa myinshi itagira uko ingana," 
1Chronicles22:4 n’ibiti by’amasederi bitabarika, kuko Abasidoni n’Abanyatiri bari bazaniye Dawudi ibiti byinshi by’amasederi." 
1Chronicles22:5 Dawudi yaribwiraga ati «Umuhungu wanjye Salomoni aracyari muto, ntarakomera, kandi iyo Ngoro ashinzwe kubakira Uhoraho igomba kwamamara mu bihugu byose kubera ubunini bwayo n’ubwiza bwayo; nzamutegurira ibya ngombwa.» Nuko Dawudi ategura byinshi mbere y’itanga rye." 
1Chronicles22:6 Dawudi ahamagara Salomoni umuhungu we, amutegeka kubakira Ingoro Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dawudi abwira Salomoni, ati «Mwana wanjye, nari mfite ku mutima kuzubakira izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yanjye Ingoro." 
1Chronicles22:8 Ariko Uhoraho yarambwiye ati ’Wamennye amaraso menshi kandi warwanye intambara zikomeye. Ntuzubakira izina ryanjye Ingoro, kuko wamennye amaraso menshi ku isi imbere yanjye." 
1Chronicles22:9 Dore wabyaye umwana, uzaba umuntu w’ituze; nzamuha kugirana amahoro n’abanzi be bamukikije, kuko azitwa Salomoni, kandi mu gihe cye nzaha Israheli amahoro n’ituze." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ni we uzubakira izina ryanjye Ingoro. Azambera umwana nanjye mubere umubyeyi, kandi nzakomeza ubwami bwe muri Israheli iteka ryose.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 None ubu ngubu Uhoraho nabane nawe, mwana wanjye, kugira ngo wubakane umurava Ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana yawe, nk’uko yabikuvuzeho!" 
1Chronicles22:12 Gusa, Uhoraho azaguhe ugushishoza n’ubuhanga mu gihe azaba agushyize muri Israheli ngo uhategeke, kugira ngo witondere Itegeko ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe!" 
1Chronicles22:13 Nuko rero, uzabona umugisha niwita kandi ugakurikiza amategeko n’amatangazo Uhoraho yahereye Musa Abayisraheli. Komera kandi ube intwari! Ntutinye kandi ntugire ubwoba." 
1Chronicles22:14 Dore nakoze uko nshoboye, nteganyiriza Ingoro y’Uhoraho amatalenta ibihumbi ijana ya zahabu n’amatalenta ibihumbi n’ibihumbi ya feza. Naho imiringa n’ibyuma, ntibigira uko bingana. Nateguye kandi ibiti n’amabuye, uzabyongera." 
1Chronicles22:15 Ufite abakozi benshi, abacukura amabuye, ababaza amabuye n’ibiti, n’abantu bazi imyuga y’amoko yose." 
1Chronicles22:16 Izahabu, feza, imiringa n’ibyuma, ntibibarika. Haguruka ukore, kandi Uhoraho nabane nawe!»" 
1Chronicles22:17 Dawudi ategeka abatware bose b’Abayisraheli gufasha umuhungu we Salomoni, agira ati" 
1Chronicles22:18 «Mbese Uhoraho Imana yanyu ntari kumwe namwe? Ese ntiyabahaye amahoro impande zose? Koko rero, yangabije abaturage b’igihugu cyaneshejwe n’Uhoraho n’umuryango we." 
1Chronicles22:19 Ubu ngubu nimushakashake Uhoraho Imana yanyu n’umutima wanyu wose n’amagara yanyu yose! Nimuhaguruke! Mwubake Ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu! Muzayinjizemo Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho hamwe n’ibikoresho byose byeguriwe izina ry’Uhoraho.» 
1Chronicles23:1 Dawudi yari ashaje kandi ageze mu zabukuru igihe yimikaga umuhungu we Salomoni ngo abe umwami w’Abayisraheli. 
1Chronicles23:2 Hanyuma akoranya abatware bose b’Abayisraheli, hamwe n’abaherezabitambo n’abalevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Maze abalevi bagejeje ku myaka mirongo itatu y’amavuko n’abayirengeje barabarwa. Umubare wabo, uko babazwe umwe umwe, wageraga ku bantu ibihumbi mirongo itatu n’umunani." 
1Chronicles23:4 Muri bo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine bashingwa kuyobora imirimo y’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, abandi ibihumbi bitandatu bagirwa abanditsi n’abacamanza," 
1Chronicles23:5 abandi ibihumbi bine bari abanyanzugi, n’ibihumbi bine basigaye bashingwa gusingiza Uhoraho bakoresheje ibyuma bibigenewe Dawudi yari yaracurishije." 
1Chronicles23:6 Dawudi abashyira mu mitwe itatu akurikije bene Levi, ari bo Gerishoni, Kehati na Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Abagerishoni ni Ledani na Shimeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Bene Ledani ni batatu: Yehiyeli w’umutware na Zetamu na Yoweli. 
1Chronicles23:9 Bene Shimeyi ni batatu: Shelomiti, Haziyeli na Harani; ni bo batware b’amazu yo kwa Ledani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Bene Shimeyi ni Yahati, Ziza, Yewushi na Beriya, ni bo bana bane ba Shimeyi." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahati yari imfura, Ziza ari uwa kabiri, naho Yewushi na Beriya, kubera ko batabyaye abahungu benshi, bafatwa nk’inzu imwe." 
1Chronicles23:12 Bene Kehati ni bane: Amurani, Yisehari, Heburoni na Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles23:13 Bene Amurani ni Aroni na Musa. Aroni ashyirwa ukwe kugira ngo we n’abahungu be bazahore bahereza Uhoraho amaturo matagatifu, no kugira ngo ajye yosereza imibavu imbere y’Imana, kandi amukorere, ahe rubanda umugisha mu izina rye ubuziraherezo." 
1Chronicles23:14 Musa yabaye umuntu w’Imana; abana be babariwe mu muryango wa Levi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Bene Musa ni Gerishomu na Eliyezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Mwene Gerishomu ni Shebuweli w’imfura. 
1Chronicles23:17 Mwene Eliyezeri ni Rehabiya w’umutware; nta bandi bahungu Eliyezeri yabyaye, ariko bene Rehabiya babaye benshi cyane." 
1Chronicles23:18 Mwene Yisehari ni Shelomiti w’imfura. 
1Chronicles23:19 Bene Heburoni ni Yeriyahu w’imfura, Amariya ni uwa kabiri, Yahaziyeli ni uwa gatatu, na Yekameyamu uwa kane." 
1Chronicles23:20 Bene Uziyeli ni Mikaya w’imfura, na Yishiya uwa kabiri." 
1Chronicles23:21 Bene Merari ni Mahuli na Mushi. Bene Mahuli ni Eleyazari na Kishi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleyazari yapfuye nta muhungu agira ariko afite abakobwa; bashyingirwa bene Kishi abavandimwe babo. 
1Chronicles23:23 Bene Mushi ni batatu: Mahuli, Ederi na Yeremoti." 
1Chronicles23:24 Abo ni bo bene Levi hakurikijwe amazu yabo. Bari abatware b’amazu yabo, kandi barabaruwe buri wese mu izina rye; bose kuva ku myaka makumyabiri gusubiza hejuru bakoreraga Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles23:25 Koko rero Dawudi yari yaravuze ati «Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, yahaye ituze umuryango we kandi atuye i Yeruzalemu ubuziraherezo." 
1Chronicles23:26 Kuva ubu abalevi ntibazongera guheka Ihema rye n’ibikoresho byaryo byose.» 
1Chronicles23:27 Iryo tegeko rya Dawudi ryo kubarura bene Levi bafite imyaka makumyabiri n’abayirengeje ryabaye kimwe mu byo yategetse bwa nyuma. 
1Chronicles23:28 Bagombaga kumvira bene Aroni mu mirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’iyo mu bikari no mu byumba; bagombaga no gusukura ibintu byose byeguriwe umurimo w’Ingoro y’Imana." 
1Chronicles23:29 Bari bashinzwe kwita ku migati y’umumuriko, ku ifu y’ituro, no ku yandi moko yose y’imigati, ari idasembuye, ari n’ikaranzwe. Ni bo kandi basuzumaga ibipimisho by’uburemere n’iby’uburebure." 
1Chronicles23:30 Uretse n’ibyo, buri gitondo bagombaga kuba biteguye kugira ngo bahimbaze kandi basingize Uhoraho, no ku mugoroba bikaba uko," 
1Chronicles23:31 ndetse no mu gihe cyo gutura Uhoraho ibitambo bitwikwa, ku masabato, ku mboneko z’ukwezi no ku minsi mikuru, nk’uko amategeko yabigennye." 
1Chronicles23:32 Bityo bagombaga kwita ku Ihema ry’ibonaniro, no gufasha bene Aroni, abavandimwe babo, mu cyitwa umurimo cyose wo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ngiyi imitwe ya bene Aroni: Bene Aroni ni Nadabu na Abihu, Eleyazari na Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadabu na Abihu bapfuye bucike mbere ya se; imirimo y’ubuherezabitambo ikorwa na Eleyazari na Itamari. 
1Chronicles24:3 Dawudi na Sadoki wo muri bene Eleyazari, na Ahimeleki wo muri bene Itamari, babagabanyamo imitwe bakurikije akazi kabo." 
1Chronicles24:4 Nyamara bene Eleyazari bari abagabo benshi kuruta bene Itamari; ni yo mpamvu bene Eleyazari bagabanyijwemo amazu cumi n’atandatu, naho bene Itamari bagabanywamo amazu umunani, hamwe n’abatware bayo." 
1Chronicles24:5 Babagabanyije bakoresheje ubufindo, kuko ari muri bene Eleyazari cyangwa se muri bene Itamari harimo ibikomangoma by’Ingoro n’ibikomangoma by’Imana." 
1Chronicles24:6 Shemaya mwene Netaneli, wari umwanditsi mu balevi, abandikira imbere y’umwami, wari kumwe n’ibikomangoma, n’umuherezabitambo Sadoki, na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyatari, n’abatware b’amazu y’abaherezabitambo n’ay’abalevi: nuko inzu imwe itoranyirizwa Eleyazari, naho indi itoranyirizwa Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ubufindo bwa mbere bwaguye kuri Yehoyaribu, ubwa kabiri kuri Yedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 ubwa gatatu kuri Harimu, ubwa kane kuri Seworimu," 
1Chronicles24:9 ubwa gatanu kuri Malikiya, ubwa gatandatu kuri Miyamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 ubwa karindwi kuri Hakosi, ubwa munani kuri Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 ubwa cyenda kuri Yeshuwa, ubwa cumi kuri Shekanyahu," 
1Chronicles24:12 ubwa cumi na rimwe kuri Eliyashibu, ubwa cumi na kabiri kuri Yakimu," 
1Chronicles24:13 ubwa cumi na gatatu kuri Hupa, ubwa cumi na kane kuri Ishibehali," 
1Chronicles24:14 ubwa cumi na gatanu kuri Biluga, ubwa cumi na gatandatu kuri Imeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 ubwa cumi na karindwi kuri Heziri, ubwa cumi n’umunani kuri Hapisesi," 
1Chronicles24:16 ubwa cumi n’icyenda kuri Petahiya, ubwa makumyabiri kuri Yehezikeli," 
1Chronicles24:17 ubwa makumyabiri na rimwe kuri Yakini, ubwa makumyabiri na kabiri kuri Gamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 ubwa makumyabiri na gatatu kuri Delayahu, n’ubwa makumyabiri na kane kuri Maziyahu." 
1Chronicles24:19 Uko ni ko imitwe y’abalevi yagabanyijwe kugira ngo binjire mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho hakurikijwe itegeko ryatanzwe na sekuru wabo Aroni, nk’uko yabitegetswe n’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
1Chronicles24:20 Dore amazina ya bene Levi basigaye: Muri bene Amurani ni Shubayeli; muri bene Shubayeli ni Yehideyahu. 
1Chronicles24:21 Kwa Rehabiyahu, mu bahungu be ni Yishiya w’imfura." 
1Chronicles24:22 Mu Bayisehari ni Shelomoti. Muri bene Shelomoti ni Yahati. 
1Chronicles24:23 Muri bene Heburoni ni Yeriyahu w’imfura, Amariyahu uwa kabiri, Yahaziyeli uwa gatatu, Yekamiyamu uwa kane." 
1Chronicles24:24 Mwene Uziyeli ni Mikaya, naho mwene Mikaya ni Shamiri." 
1Chronicles24:25 Umuvandimwe wa Mikaya ni Yishiya, naho muri bene Yishiya ni Zekariyahu." 
1Chronicles24:26 Bene Merari ni Mahuli, Mushi, na Yaziyahu." 
1Chronicles24:27 Bene Merari bo ku muhungu we Yaziyahu ni Shohamu, Zakuri na Iburi." 
1Chronicles24:28 Kwa Mahuli ni Eleyazari utarigeze umwana," 
1Chronicles24:29 na Kishi. Mwene Kishi ni Yerahumeyeli. 
1Chronicles24:30 Bene Mushi ni Mahuli, Ederi na Yerimoti. Abo ni bo bene Levi hakurikijwe amazu yabo." 
1Chronicles24:31 Na bo kimwe n’abavandimwe babo bene Aroni, bakoresheje ubufindo imbere y’umwami Dawudi wari kumwe na Sadoki, na Ahimeleki, n’abatware b’amazu y’abaherezabitambo, n’ay’abalevi. Bityo nta tandukanyirizo ryari hagati y’inzu y’imfura n’iy’umuhererezi." 
1Chronicles25:1 Dawudi n’abakuru b’ingabo batora bene Asafu, bene Hemani na bene Yedutuni kugira ngo bajye bahanura bifashishije inanga nto n’inini, n’ibyuma birangira. Dore amazina y’abantu bashinzwe uwo murimo:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Muri bene Asafu ni Zakuri, Yozefu, Netaniya na Asarela; bategekwaga na se Asafu, wahanuraga ayobowe n’umwami." 
1Chronicles25:3 Muri bene Yedutuni ni Gedaliyahu, Seri, Yeshayahu, Shimeyi, Hashabiyahu na Matitiyahu; uko bari batandatu bategekwaga na se Yedutuni, wahanuraga yifashishije inanga kugira ngo ahimbaze kandi asingize Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles25:4 Muri bene Hemani ni Bukiyahu, Mataniyahu, Uziyeli, Shebuweli, Yerimoti, Hananiya, Hanani, Eliyata, Gidaliti, Romamutezeri, Yoshubekasha, Maloti, Hotiri, na Mahaziyoti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Abo bose bari bene Hemani, umushishozi w’umwami wamenyeshaga umwami amagambo y’Imana. Kugira ngo Imana iheshe Hemani icyubahiro, yamuhaye abahungu cumi na bane n’abakobwa batatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Abo bose, se yarabayoboraga mu ndirimbo zo mu Ngoro y’Imana, bagakoresha ibyuma birangira, inanga nto n’inini. Nguko uko batunganyaga imihango yo mu Ngoro y’Imana, bayobowe n’umwami, na Asafu, na Yedutuni na Hemani." 
1Chronicles25:7 Bose, hamwe n’abavandimwe babo bari baratojwe kuririmbira Uhoraho, bakabigiramo ubuhanga, bari magana abiri na mirongo inani n’umunani." 
1Chronicles25:8 Bakoresha ubufindo kugira ngo barebe uko abo baririmbyi bazajya bakurikirana, badatandukanyije abasaza n’abasore, cyangwa abahanga n’abatangizi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Nuko ubufindo bwa mbere bugwa kuri Yozefu mwene Asafu. Ubwa kabiri ni kuri Gedaliyahu, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; bose hamwe baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:10 Ubwa gatatu kuri Zakuri, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:11 Ubwa kane kuri Yiseri, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:12 Ubwa gatanu kuri Netaniyahu, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:13 Ubwa gatandatu kuri Bukiyahu, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:14 Ubwa karindwi kuri Yesarela, abahungu n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:15 Ubwa munani kuri Yeshayahu, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:16 Ubwa cyenda kuri Mataniyahu, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:17 Ubwa cumi kuri Shimeyi, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:18 Ubwa cumi na rimwe kuri Azareli, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:19 Ubwa cumi na kabiri kuri Hashaviya, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:20 Ubwa cumi na gatatu kuri Shubayeli, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:21 Ubwa cumi na kane kuri Matitiyahu, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:22 Ubwa cumi na gatanu kuri Yeremoti, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:23 Ubwa cumi na gatandatu kuri Hananiyahu, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:24 Ubwa cumi na karindwi kuri Yoshibekasha, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:25 Ubwa cumi n’umunani kuri Hanani, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:26 Ubwa cumi n’icyenda kuri Maloti, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:27 Ubwa makumyabiri kuri Eliyata, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:28 Ubwa makumyabiri na rimwe kuri Hotiri, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:29 Ubwa makumyabiri na kabiri kuri Gidaliti, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:30 Ubwa makumyabiri na gatatu kuri Mahaziyoti, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:31 Ubwa makumyabiri na kane kuri Romamutezeri, abahungu be n’abavandimwe be; baba cumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles26:1 Dore imitwe y’abanyanzugi: Muri bene Kore ni Meshelemiyahu mwene Kore wa Ebiyasafu. 
1Chronicles26:2 Meshelemiyahu yabyaye abahungu, ari bo Zekariyahu w’imfura, Yediyayeli uwa kabiri, Zebadiyahu uwa gatatu, Yatinyeli uwa kane," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elamu uwa gatanu, Yehohanani uwa gatandatu, na Elihonayi uwa karindwi." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obededomu yabyaye abahungu, ari bo Shemaya w’imfura, Yehozabadi uwa kabiri, Yowa uwa gatatu, Sakari uwa kane, Netaneli uwa gatanu," 
1Chronicles26:5 Amiyeli uwa gatandatu, Isakari uwa karindwi, Pewuletayi uwa munani, kuko Imana yari yaramuhaye umugisha." 
1Chronicles26:6 Umuhungu we Shemaya yabyaye abahungu babaye abatware b’inzu yabo kuko bari abagabo b’intwari. 
1Chronicles26:7 Bene Shemaya ni Otini, Refayeli, Obedi, Elizabadi n’abavandimwe babo, Elihu na Semakiyahu, bari abagabo b’intwari." 
1Chronicles26:8 Abo bose bari bene Obededomu; hamwe n’abahungu babo n’abavandimwe babo bari abagabo b’intwari kubera umwete bagaragazaga ku murimo wabo. Bene Obededomu bose ni mirongo itandatu na babiri. 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemiyahu yari afite abahungu n’abavandimwe; bari abagabo b’intwari cumi n’umunani. 
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa wo muri bene Merari yari afite abahungu: ni Shimuri — ntiyari imfura, ariko se yamugize umutware kubera ubutwari bwe —," 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilikiyahu ni uwa kabiri, Zebadiyahu uwa gatatu, Zekariyahu uwa kane. Abahungu n’abavandimwe ba Hosa bose bari cumi na batatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Abagize iyo mitwe y’abanyanzugi hamwe n’abatware babo, bagombaga kwifatanya n’abavandimwe babo kugira ngo batunganye imirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles26:13 Kuva ku muto kugera ku mukuru bakoresheje ubufindo bakurikije amazu yabo kugira ngo bamenye abazarinda buri rugi. 
1Chronicles26:14 Iburasirazuba, ubufindo bugwa kuri Shelemiyahu. Umuhungu we Zekariyahu wari umujyanama w’umuhanga, ubufindo bumwegurira urugi mu majyaruguru." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obededomu ahabwa urw’amajyepfo, naho abahungu be bahabwa kurinda amazu y’ ububiko." 
1Chronicles26:16 Shupimu na Hosa bahabwa kurinda iburengerazuba hamwe n’urugi rwa Shaleketi ku muhanda uzamuka. Dore uko baharindaga: 
1Chronicles26:17 iburasirazuba habaga abalevi batandatu ku munsi, mu majyaruguru hakaba bane, mu majyepfo bane, no mu mazu y’ububiko babiri babiri." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ahitwa i Parubari iburengerazuba hari abalevi bane ku muhanda, hakaba n’abandi babiri imbere ya Parubari." 
1Chronicles26:19 Iyo ni yo yari imitwe y’abanyanzugi batoranyijwe muri bene Kore no muri bene Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Abalevi bamwe, abavandimwe babo, bari bashinzwe umutungo w’Ingoro y’Imana, n’umutungo w’amaturo matagatifu." 
1Chronicles26:21 Bene Ledani, umuhungu wa Gerishoni, bari bafite Abayehiyeli ho abatware b’amazu ya Ledani wa Gerishoni." 
1Chronicles26:22 Abahungu ba Yehiyeli, Zetamu na Yoweli umuvandimwe we, bari bashinzwe umutungo w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles26:23 Mu mazu ya Amuramu, Yishari, Heburoni na Uziyeli," 
1Chronicles26:24 bahisemo Shebuweli wakomokaga kuri Gerishomu, mwene Musa, ngo abe umutware w’ububiko." 
1Chronicles26:25 Uretse Shebuweli, se Eliyezeri yabyaye na Rehabiyahu, wabyaye Yeshayahu, wabyaye Yoramu, wabyaye Zikuri, wabyaye Shelomiti." 
1Chronicles26:26 Uwo Shelomiti hamwe n’abavandimwe be, yari ashinzwe umutungo wose w’amaturo matagatifu, umwami Dawudi, abatware b’amazu, abatware b’abantu ibihumbi n’ab’amagana, n’abagaba b’ingabo, bari beguriye Imana." 
1Chronicles26:27 Koko bayeguriraga ibyo bavanye mu munyago wo mu ntambara, bagira ngo babitakishe Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles26:28 N’ibyo Samweli umushishozi, na Sawuli mwene Kishi, na Abuneri mwene Neri, na Yowabu mwene Seruya, bari bareguriye Uhoraho byose byari bishinzwe Shelomiti n’abavandimwe be." 
1Chronicles26:29 Muri bene Yisehari, Kenaniyahu n’abahungu be bari bashinzwe iby’umubano mu Bayisraheli, bakabagira abanditsi n’abacamanza." 
1Chronicles26:30 Muri bene Heburoni, Hashabiyahu n’abavandimwe be, abagabo b’intwari igihumbi na magana arindwi, bari bashinzwe kugenzura Abayisraheli bo hakuno ya Yorudani, iburengerazuba, mu bibazo byose byerekeye Uhoraho n’umwami." 
1Chronicles26:31 Muri bene Heburoni, Yeriya ni we wari umutware. Mu mwaka wa mirongo ine w’ingoma ya Dawudi bashakishije hose abakomoka kuri Heburoni, basanga i Yezeri y’i Gilihadi hari abagabo b’intwari bavuka muri iyo nzu." 
1Chronicles26:32 Abavandimwe ba Yeriya bari abagabo b’intwari ibihumbi bibiri na magana arindwi, bakaba n’abatware b’amazu; nuko umwami Dawudi abashyiraho ngo bagenzure Abarubeni, Abagadi n’igice cya kabiri cy’umuryango wa Manase, mu bibazo byose byerekeye Imana n’umwami." 
1Chronicles27:1 Dore intondeke y’Abayisraheli bakoreraga umwami mu kintu icyo ari cyo cyose cyerekeye imitwe y’ingabo; bari abatware b’amazu bategekaga ingabo igihumbi cyangwa ijana, hamwe n’abanditsi babo. Koko imitwe y’ingabo yarakurikiranaga mu mwaka, buri kwezi umutwe umwe ukaza, undi ugataha, kandi buri mutwe warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:2 Umutware w’umutwe w’ingabo wa mbere wo mu kwezi kwa mbere yari Yashobeyamu mwene Zabudiyeli, kandi umutwe w’ingabo ze wabaraga abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:3 Yari uwo muri bene Pereshi kandi agategeka abagaba bose b’ingabo zo mu kwezi kwa mbere. 
1Chronicles27:4 Umutware w’ingabo w’umutwe wa kabiri wo mu kwezi kwa kabiri ni Dodayi w’i Aho; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:5 Umutware w’umutwe wa gatatu w’ingabo zo mu kwezi kwa gatatu yari Benayahu, umuhungu w’umuherezabitambo mukuru Yehoyada; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:6 Uwo Benayahu yari umugabo w’intwari wo muri Ba Mirongo itatu b’imena, kandi akaba umutware wabo. Umuhungu we Amizabadi na we yari mu mutwe w’ingabo ze." 
1Chronicles27:7 Umutware wa kane wo mu kwezi kwa kane yari Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu, yazunguwe n’umuhungu we Zebadiya. Umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:8 Umutware wa gatanu wo mu kwezi kwa gatanu yari Shamuhuti w’i Yizurahi; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:9 Umutware wa gatandatu wo mu kwezi kwa gatandatu yari Ira mwene Ikeshi w’i Tekowa; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:10 Umutware wa karindwi wo mu kwezi kwa karindwi yari Heleshi w’i Peloni, muri bene Efurayimu; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:11 Umutware wa munani wo mu kwezi kwa munani yari Sibekayi w’i Husha, muri bene Zarihi; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:12 Umutware wa cyenda, wo mu kwezi kwa cyenda, yari Abiyezeri w’i Anatoti, muri bene Benyamini; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:13 Umutware wa cumi wo mu kwezi kwa cumi yari Mahurayi w’i Netofa, muri bene Zerahi; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:14 Umutware wa cumi n’umwe wo mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe yari Benaya w’i Pereyatoni, muri bene Efurayimu; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:15 Umutware wa cumi na kabiri wo mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri yari Helidayi w’i Netofa, muri bene Otiniyeli; umutwe w’ingabo ze warimo abagabo ibihumbi makumyabiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:16 Mu miryango y’Abayisraheli, umutegeka w’abo kwa Rubeni ni Eliyezeri mwene Zikuri; uw’abo kwa Simewoni ni Shefatiyahu mwene Mayaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 uw’Abalevi ni Hashabiya mwene Kemuweli; uw’abo kwa Aroni ni Sadoki; 
1Chronicles27:18 uw’abo kwa Yuda ni Elihu wo mu bavandimwe ba Dawudi; uw’abo kwa Isakari ni Omari mwene Mikayeli; 
1Chronicles27:19 uw’abo kwa Zabuloni ni Yishimayahu mwene Obadiyahu; uw’abo kwa Nefutali ni Yerimoti mwene Aziriyeli; 
1Chronicles27:20 uw’abo kwa Efurayimu ni Hosheya mwene Azariyahu; uw’ab’igice kimwe cy’umuryango wa Manase ni Yoweli mwene Pedayahu; 
1Chronicles27:21 uw’ab’ikindi gice cy’umuryango wa Manase bo muri Gilihadi ni Ido mwene Zekariyahu; uw’abo kwa Benyamini ni Yasiyeli mwene Abuneri; 
1Chronicles27:22 uw’abo kwa Dani ni Azareli mwene Yerohamu. Abo ni bo bari abatware b’imiryango y’Abayisraheli. 
1Chronicles27:23 Dawudi ntiyabaruye abatararenza imyaka makumyabiri y’ubuvuke, kuko Uhoraho yari yaravuze ko azagwiza Abayisraheli akabanganya n’inyenyeri zo mu kirere." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabu mwene Seruya yari yatangiye kubabarura ariko ntiyarangiza, kuko uburakari bw’Uhoraho bwari bwageze ku Bayisraheli; nuko umubare wabo ntiwandikwa mu gitabo cy’Amateka y’umwami Dawudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Azimaweti mwene Adiyeli yari ashinzwe umutungo w’umwami. Yehonatani mwene Uziyahu ni we wacungaga ibibitswe mu mirima, mu migi, mu byaro no mu minara." 
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mwene Kelubi yari ashinzwe abahinzi bo mu mirima. 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimeyi w’i Rama yari ashinzwe imizabibu. Zabudi w’i Shefamu yategekaga abengaga divayi mu mizabibu bakanayishyingura. 
1Chronicles27:28 Behalihanani w’i Gederi yari ashinzwe ibiti by’imizeti n’iby’imitini byari mu kibaya. Yowashi yari ashinzwe ububiko bw’amavuta. 
1Chronicles27:29 Shiturayi w’i Saroni yari ashinzwe amatungo maremare yarishaga mu mibande. 
1Chronicles27:30 Obili wo muri bene Ismaheli yari ashinzwe ingamiya. Yedeyahu w’i Meranoti yari ashinzwe indogobe z’ingore. 
1Chronicles27:31 Yazizi muri bene Haguri yari ashinzwe amatungo magufi. Abo bose bacungaga ibintu by’umwami Dawudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yehonatani, se wabo wa Dawudi, yari umujyanama, akaba n’umwanditsi uciye akenge. Yehiyeli mwene Hakumoni yitaga ku bana b’umwami." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli yari umujyanama w’umwami, naho Hushayi w’Umwaruki yari incuti y’umwami." 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitofeli yazunguwe na Yehoyada, mwene Benayahu, na Abiyatari. Umugaba w’ingabo zose z’umwami yari Yowabu." 
1Chronicles28:1 Umwami Dawudi akoranyiriza i Yeruzalemu abatware b’Abayisraheli bose, ab’imiryango n’ab’imitwe y’ingabo zakoreraga umwami, hamwe n’abategekaga igihumbi n’abategekaga ijana, n’abashinzwe ibintu byose n’amatungo yose by’umwami n’iby’abahungu be, akoranya n’abakone, ingabo ze z’imena, n’izindi ntwari zose." 
1Chronicles28:2 Umwami Dawudi arahaguruka maze arababwira ati «Nimunyumve, bavandimwe kandi muryango wanjye. Nari mfite ku mutima igitekerezo cyo kubaka Ingoro y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, bwo ntebe y’ibirenge by’Imana yacu, ndetse nteganya ibya ngombwa." 
1Chronicles28:3 Ariko Imana yarambwiye iti ’Ntuzubaka Ingoro ikwiye izina ryanjye kuko uri umurwanyi kandi ukaba waravushije amaraso.’ 
1Chronicles28:4 Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, yantoranyije mu muryango wanjye wose ngo mbe umwami w’Abayisraheli ubuziraherezo. Koko yatoye Yuda ho umutware kandi mu muryango wa Yuda atoranyamo inzu ya data, no mu bana ba data, aba ari jye yishimira kugira umwami w’Abayisraheli." 
1Chronicles28:5 Mu bahungu banjye bose, — kuko Uhoraho yampaye abahungu benshi — yatoranyije umuhungu wanjye Salomoni ngo yicare ku ntebe y’ubwami muri Israheli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Hanyuma arambwira ati ’Umuhungu wawe Salomoni ni we uzubaka Ingoro yanjye n’ingo zanjye, kuko namutoranyije ngo ambere umwana nanjye mubere umubyeyi." 
1Chronicles28:7 Nzakomeza ubwami bwe ubuziraherezo ariko niba na we akomeje gukurikiza amategeko yanjye n’amateka yanjye nk’uko ubu abigenza.’ 
1Chronicles28:8 None rero, imbere y’Abayisraheli bose baduhanze amaso, imbere y’ikoraniro ryose ry’Uhoraho, n’imbere y’Imana yacu iduteze amatwi, ndabihanangirije: nimwubahirize amategeko yose y’Uhoraho Imana yacu, muyazirikane, kugira ngo mutunge iki gihugu cyiza kandi muzakirage abana banyu, bazagitunge ubuziraherezo." 
1Chronicles28:9 Nawe, mwana wanjye Salomoni, menya Imana ya so, uyikorere n’umutima utaryarya kandi utunganye kuko Uhoraho agenzura imitima yose, akamenya ibitekerezo biyirimo. Numushakashaka azakwiyereka, ariko numwirengagizaazakujugunya bidasubirwaho." 
1Chronicles28:10 Ubu ngubu bimenye: Uhoraho yaragutoranyije kugira ngo umwubakire Ingoro, komera maze ukore!»" 
1Chronicles28:11 Dawudi asobanurira umuhungu we Salomoni uburyo azubaka urwinjiriro rw’Ingoro, amazu yayo, ububiko bwayo, ibyumba byayo byo hejuru, ibyumba byayo by’imbere n’icyumba cy’urwicurizo." 
1Chronicles28:12 Anamwereka igishushanyo cy’ibikari by’Ingoro y’Imana, n’icy’amazu yose azayikikiza, n’icy’amazu bazabikamo umutungo w’Ingoro y’Imana n’ibintu byose byayeguriwe." 
1Chronicles28:13 Amusobanurira kandi ibyerekeye imitwe y’abaherezabitambo n’iy’abalevi, n’ibyerekeye ibizakorerwa mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles28:14 Amubwira n’uburemere bwa zahabu na feza bizagenerwa buri gikoresho cyo mu Ngoro. 
1Chronicles28:15 Amusobanurira uburemere bwa zahabu n’ubwa feza bizagenerwa ibitereko n’amatara bya zahabu n’ibya feza," 
1Chronicles28:16 n’uburemere bwa zahabu na feza bizagenerwa ameza y’umumuriko," 
1Chronicles28:17 n’uburemere bwa zahabu na feza bizagenerwa amakanya, ibikombe, amabesani ya zahabu n’aya feza, amasahani ya zahabu n’aya feza," 
1Chronicles28:18 n’uburemere bwa zahabu iyunguruye izagenerwa urutambiro rw’imibavu. Hanyuma amuha n’igishushanyo cy’Igare, n’icy’abakerubimu ba zahabu bazaramburira amababa yabo hejuru y’Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles28:19 Nuko Dawudi abwira Salomoni, ati «Ibyo byose biri mu nyandiko Uhoraho yangejejeho, ansobanurira uburyo iyo mirimo yose izakorwa.»" 
1Chronicles28:20 Nuko Dawudi yongera kubwira umuhungu we Salomoni, ati «Komera, ube intwari, maze ukore! Ntugire ubwoba kandi ntukuke umutima, kuko Uhoraho Imana yanjye ari kumwe nawe. Ntazagusiga kandi ntazagutererana kugeza igihe uzarangiriza ibikorwa byose byo ku Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles28:21 Dore imitwe y’abaherezabitambo n’iy’abalevi bashinzwe umurimo w’Ingoro, kandi muri ibyo bikorwa byose uzaba uri kumwe n’abantu b’abanyamwete kandi b’abahanga muri buri murimo, ndetse abatware na rubanda rwose bazumvira amategeko yawe.»" 
1Chronicles29:1 Umwami Dawudi abwira ikoraniro ryose, ati «Umuhungu wanjye Salomoni, uwo Imana yatoranyije wenyine, aracyari muto kandi nta mbaraga afite, kandi umurimo urakomeye kuko iyi Ngoro atari iy’umuntu ahubwo ari iy’Uhoraho Imana." 
1Chronicles29:2 Nakoresheje imbaraga zanjye zose, ntegurira Ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana yanjye zahabu ku bizakoreshwa zahabu, feza ku bizakoreshwa feza, imiringa ku bizakoreshwa imiringa, ibyuma ku bizakoreshwa ibyuma, ibiti ku bizakoreshwa ibiti, amabuye abengerana n’amabuye y’imitako, amabuye yirabura n’ay’amabara, n’andi mabuye y’agaciro y’amoko yose, n’amabuye yera atabarika." 
1Chronicles29:3 Byongeye kandi, kubera ko nishimiye Ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana yanjye, zahabu na feza byo mu mutungo wanjye bwite byose mbihaye Ingoro y’Imana yanjye, mbyongeye ku byo nateguriye iyi Ngoro Ntagatifu," 
1Chronicles29:4 ari byo amatalenta ibihumbi bitatu ya zahabu, zahabu yavuye i Ofiri; amatalenta ibihumbi birindwi ya feza yatunganyijwe kugira ngo izaterwe ku nkuta z’amazu;" 
1Chronicles29:5 iyo zahabu igenewe ibikwiye gukorwa muri zahabu, n’iyo feza igenewe ibikwiye kuyikorwamo, nk’uko abanyabukorikori bazabitunganya. Ubu rero, ni nde wundi wumva uyu munsi ashaka kugira icyo atura Uhoraho akivanye mu mutungo we?»" 
1Chronicles29:6 Nuko abatware b’amazu, abo mu miryango y’Abayisraheli, ab’igihumbi n’ab’ijana, n’abari bashinzwe imirimo y’umwami, batanga amaturo ku bushake bwabo," 
1Chronicles29:7 kugira ngo azakoreshwe imirimo y’Ingoro y’Imana. Batanze zahabu ihwanye n’amatalenta ibihumbi bitanu, n’amadariki ibihumbi cumi, na feza ihwanye n’amatalenta ibihumbi cumi, n’imiringa ihwanye n’amatalenta ibihumbi cumi n’umunani, n’ibyuma bihwanye n’amatalenta ibihumbi ijana." 
1Chronicles29:8 Abari bafite amabuye y’agaciro bayashyikiriza Yahiyeli w’Umugerishoni kugira ngo ayashyire mu mutungo w’Ingoro y’Imana. 
1Chronicles29:9 Nuko abantu bishimira amaturo yabo batanze babyishakiye, kuko bari bayaturanye umutima ukeye Uhoraho; n’umwami Dawudi arabyishimira cyane." 
1Chronicles29:10 Dawudi asingiriza Uhoraho imbere y’ikoraniro ryose, agira ati «Uragahora usingizwa, Uhoraho, Mana ya Israheli, umubyeyi wacu, ubu n’iteka ryose!" 
1Chronicles29:11 Ubuhangare, ububasha, igitinyiro, icyubahiro n’ikuzo ni ibyawe, Nyagasani, kuko ibiri mu ijuru no ku isi byose ari wowe bikesha kubaho. Uhoraho, ni wowe Mwami usumba byose!" 
1Chronicles29:12 Icyitwa ubukungu n’ikuzo cyose ni wowe biturukaho, kuko ari wowe ugenga byose. Mu kiganza cyawe harimo ububasha n’imbaraga; ukuboko kwawe gufite ubushobozi bwo gukomeza no gucogoza byose." 
1Chronicles29:13 None rero, Uhoraho, turagushimira kandi turagusingiriza izina ryawe rihebuje!" 
1Chronicles29:14 Naho jyewe, ndi nde, n’umuryango wawe ni iki, byatuma twagutura amaturo nk’aya, tubyishakiye? Byose bituruka kuri wowe, kandi n’ibyo tuguhaye bivuye mu kiganza cyawe." 
1Chronicles29:15 Kuko, kimwe na ba sogokuruza bose, turi abasuhuke n’abashyitsi imbere yawe; iminsi tumara ku isi ni nk’igicucu gihita, kandi nta cyizere." 
1Chronicles29:16 Uhoraho, Mana yacu, ibi bintu byose by’agaciro twateguye ngo tuzubakire inzu izina ryawe ritagatifu, ni wowe tubikesha, kuko byose ari ibyawe." 
1Chronicles29:17 Uhoraho Mana yacu, nzi ko usuzuma imitima kandi ugashimishwa n’ubutabera n’ubutungane. Nanjye ubwanjye ngutuye ibi byose, mbigiranye umutima utunganye; kandi n’umuryango wawe uri hano, nshimishijwe no kuwubona uguhereza amaturo yawo ubikuye ku mutima." 
1Chronicles29:18 Uhoraho, Mana y’abasogokuruza bacu, Abrahamu, Izaki, na Israheli, komeza iteka ryose ibitekerezo by’imitima y’umuryango wawe kandi imitima yawo uhore uyiyerekezaho." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ha umuhungu wanjye Salomoni umutima utunganye wo kubahiriza amategeko yawe, amabwiriza yawe n’amateka yawe, kugira ngo ajye ayubahiriza, maze abone kukubakira iyo Ngoro nateguye.»" 
1Chronicles29:20 Hanyuma Dawudi abwira ikoraniro ryose, ati «Nimuhimbaze Uhoraho Imana yanyu!» Nuko ikoraniro ryose rihimbaza Uhoraho, Imana y’abasekuruza babo. Baca bugufi, baramya Uhoraho n’umwami." 
1Chronicles29:21 Bukeye bw’uwo munsi, batura Uhoraho amaturo n’ibitambo bitwikwa: byari amapfizi y’inka igihumbi, amasekurume y’intama igihumbi, abana b’intama igihumbi, hamwe n’ibitambo byayo biseswa, hatabariwemo n’andi maturo menshi cyane y’Abayisraheli bose." 
1Chronicles29:22 Uwo munsi bararya kandi banywera imbere y’Uhoraho mu byishimo byinshi, kandi bimika ubwa kabiri umwami Salomoni mwene Dawudi. Basiga Salomoni amavuta ngo abe umutware w’Uhoraho, na Sadoki bamusigira kuba umuherezabitambo." 
1Chronicles29:23 Salomoni yicara ku ntebe y’ubwami bw’Uhoraho, aba umwami mu kigwi cya se Dawudi; nuko amererwa neza, Abayisraheli bose baramwumvira." 
1Chronicles29:24 Abatware bose, abagabo bose b’intwari, ndetse n’abana bose b’umwami Dawudi, bayoboka umwami Salomoni." 
1Chronicles29:25 Uhoraho akuza cyane Salomoni imbere y’Abayisraheli bose, kandi amuha igitinyiro gisumbye icy’abandi bami ba Israheli bamubanjirije." 
1Chronicles29:26 Dawudi mwene Yese yategetse Abayisraheli bose. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ingoma ye muri Israheli yamaze imyaka mirongo ine; i Heburoni yahategekeye imyaka irindwi, naho i Yeruzalemu ahategekera imyaka mirongo itatu n’itatu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Yatanze yisaziye neza, yaribereyeho mu mudendezo n’icyubahiro; maze umuhungu we Salomoni amuzungura ku ngoma." 
1Chronicles29:29 Ibigwi by’umwami Dawudi, kuva ku byabanje kugera ku byaherutse, byanditswe mu Mateka ya Samweli umushishozi, no mu Mateka y’umuhanuzi Natani, no mu ya Gadi umushishozi." 
1Chronicles29:30 Ndetse n’ubutegetsi bwe bwose, n’ububasha bwe, n’ibyamubayeho byose, kimwe n’ibyabaye kuri Israheli no ku bami b’ibindi bihugu byose, na byo ni ho byanditswe." 
2Chronicles1:1 Salomoni mwene Dawudi akomera mu bwami bwe; Uhoraho Imana ye aba kumwe na we kandi aramukuza cyane. 
2Chronicles1:2 Salomoni atumira Abayisraheli bose, abategetsi b’igihumbi n’ab’ijana, abacamanza n’abatware bose muri Israheli, hamwe n’abakuru b’amazu." 
2Chronicles1:3 Salomoni ashagawe n’iryo koraniro ryose bajyana ahirengeye i Gibewoni kuko ari ho hari Ihema ry’ibonaniro ry’Imana, rya rindi Musa umugaragu w’Uhoraho yari yarashinze mu butayu." 
2Chronicles1:4 Naho Ubushyinguro bw’Imana, Dawudi yari yarabuzamuye, abuvana i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu, abujyana ahantu yari yarabuteguriye, kuko yari yarabushingiye ihema i Yeruzalemu." 
2Chronicles1:5 Ariko urutambiro rw’umuringa rwari rwarakozwe na Basaleheli mwene Uri, mwene Huri, rwo rwabaga aho i Gibewoni imbere y’inzu y’Uhoraho, kandi ni ho Salomoni n’ikoraniro bambarizaga." 
2Chronicles1:6 Salomoni yegera urutambiro rw’umuringa, hafi y’Ihema ry’ibonaniro maze ahaturira ibitambo bitwikwa igihumbi." 
2Chronicles1:7 Muri iryo joro, Imana ibonekera Salomoni maze iramubwira iti «Saba! Urumva naguha iki?»" 
2Chronicles1:8 Salomoni asubiza Imana, ati «Wagaragarije data Dawudi ubudahemuka bukomeye maze uranyimika ndamuzungura." 
2Chronicles1:9 None, Uhoraho Mana, ijambo ryawe wabwiye data Dawudi nirikomezwe, kuko ari wowe wanyimikiye gutegeka abantu benshi bangana n’umukungugu wo ku isi." 
2Chronicles1:10 Ubu rero, mpa ubwitonzi n’ubuhanga kugira ngo menye uko nakwifata imbere y’uyu muryango. Ni nde koko wabasha gutegeka umuryango wawe ungana utya?»" 
2Chronicles1:11 Nuko Imana ibwira Salomoni, iti «Ubwo ari icyo umutima wawe wifuza, ukaba utisabiye ubukungu, ubutunzi cyangwa ikuzo, kandi ntunasabe ko abanzi bawe bapfa, ndetse ntusabe kuramba, ahubwo ukaba wisabiye ubuhanga no gusobanukirwa ngo utegeke umuryango wanjye nakwimikiye gutegeka," 
2Chronicles1:12 ubwitonzi n’ubuhanga urabihawe, kandi nguhaye n’ubukungu, ubutunzi n’ikuzo, bitigeze bihabwa abami bakubanjirije, kandi bitazabaho ukundi nyuma yawe.»" 
2Chronicles1:13 Salomoni ava ahirengeye h’i Gibewoni imbere y’Ihema ry’ibonaniro, agaruka i Yeruzalemu. Nuko ategeka Israheli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Salomoni akoranya amagare n’abagendera ku mafarasi. Yari afite amagare igihumbi na magana ane, n’amafarasi ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, abishyira mu migi icyurwamo amagare no hafi y’umwami, i Yeruzalemu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Umwami atuma i Yeruzalemu hagwira feza na zahabu zinganya ubwinshi n’amabuye, n’ibiti by’amasederi bingana ubwinshi n’imivumu yo mu bibaya." 
2Chronicles1:16 Amafarasi ya Salomoni yaturukaga i Musuri n’i Kuwe, bayaguze ku giciro cya feza." 
2Chronicles1:17 N’amagare bayavanaga i Musuri; rimwe bariguze amasikeli magana atandatu, naho ifarasi imwe bakayitangaho amasikeli ijana na mirongo itatu. Abacuruzi b’umwami baguraga n’andi magare n’amafarasi kuri icyo giciro, maze abami b’Abaheti n’Abaramu bakayabagururira babungukiye." 
2Chronicles1:18 Salomoni ategeka ko izina ry’Uhoraho baryubakira Ingoro, kandi na we bakamwubakira ingoro ya cyami." 
2Chronicles2:1 Salomoni ashyiraho abikorezi ibihumbi mirongo irindwi, abacukura amabuye mu misozi ibihumbi mirongo inani, n’abagenzura imirimo ibihumbi bitatu na magana atandatu." 
2Chronicles2:2 Salomoni atuma kuri Hiramu, umwami w’i Tiri, ati «Wafatanyije na data Dawudi umwoherereza ibiti by’amasederi byo kwiyubakira inzu yo guturamo." 
2Chronicles2:3 None dore nanjye ndashaka kubakira Ingoro izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yanjye, kugira ngo nyimwegurire no kugira ngo nosereze imbere ye imibavu ihumura, mpaturire imigati y’umumuriko n’ibitambo bitwikwa mu gitondo na nimugoroba, ku masabato, ku mboneko z’ukwezi, no ku minsi mikuru y’Uhoraho Imana yacu, maze ibyo bizahoreho iteka muri Israheli." 
2Chronicles2:4 Kandi Ingoro nshaka kubaka izaba nini, kuko Imana yacu isumba izindi mana zose." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ni nde ariko wagira ubushobozi bwo kuyubakira Ingoro kandi n’ijuru ari ijuru ubwaryo itarikwirwamo? Mbese jye ndi nde kugira ngo mbe nakubakira Ingoro Imana yacu, uretse kugira ngo umwotsi w’ibitambo ujye uzamuka uyigana?" 
2Chronicles2:6 None rero, ubu ngubu nyoherereza umuntu w’umuhanga uzi gucura zahabu, feza, imiringa, ibyuma, akamenya kuboha imyenda y’umuhemba n’iy’ibihogo, iy’umutuku n’iy’isine, kandi akaba azi kubaza amashusho; azafatanya n’abahanga turi kumwe muri Yuda n’i Yeruzalemu kandi batoranyijwe na data Dawudi." 
2Chronicles2:7 Nyoherereza kandi ibiti by’amasederi by’i Libani, iby’imyerezi, n’iby’imizonobari, kuko nzi ko abagaragu bawe bazi gutema ibiti by’i Libani. Abagaragu banjye bazafatanya n’abawe," 
2Chronicles2:8 maze bantegurire ibiti byinshi, kuko Ingoro y’Uhoraho nshaka kubaka igomba kuba nini kandi ikazahebuza ubwiza." 
2Chronicles2:9 Dore kandi abagaragu bawe bazatsinda ibiti, mbahaye ibigega ibihumbi makumyabiri by’ingano, ibigega ibihumbi makumyabiri bya za bushoki, intango ibihumbi makumyabiri za divayi n’intango ibihumbi makumyabiri z’amavuta.»" 
2Chronicles2:10 Hiramu, umwami w’i Tiri, asubirisha inyandiko umwami, agira ati «Kubera ko Uhoraho yakunze umuryango we byatumye akwimika kugira ngo uwutegeke.»" 
2Chronicles2:11 Hiramu yungamo ati «Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, yaremye ijuru n’isi, we wahaye umwami Dawudi umwana w’umuhanga, witonda kandi w’umunyabwenge, umwana uzubakira Uhoraho Ingoro, na we akiyubakira n’inzu ya cyami!" 
2Chronicles2:12 Ubu ngubu rero nkoherereje Huramabi, umuhanga w’umunyabwenge," 
2Chronicles2:13 umwana wabyawe n’umugore ukomoka mu muryango wa Dani, naho se akaba Umunyatiri. Uwo mugabo azi gucura zahabu, feza, imiringa, ibyuma, akamenya no kubaza amabuye, n’ibiti, ndetse akanaboha n’imyenda y’umuhemba n’iy’ibihogo, iy’isine, iy’ihariri, n’itukura; byongeye kandi azi no kubaza amashusho. Azatunganya rero umushinga wose azahabwa, maze azafatanye n’abahanga bawe, n’aba databuja, so Dawudi." 
2Chronicles2:14 Ingano na za bushoki, amavuta na divayi byavuzwe na databuja, nahite abyoherereza abagaragu be." 
2Chronicles2:15 Twebwe tuzatema ibiti by’i Libani uzaba ukeneye byose, tubikugereze i Yope, tubinyujije mu nyanja bihambiranyije; naho wowe uzabizamure i Yeruzalemu.»" 
2Chronicles2:16 Salomoni abara abanyamahanga bose bari mu gihugu cya Israheli, ahereye ku mubare se Dawudi yari yamugejejeho, nuko haboneka abantu ibihumbi ijana na mirongo itanu na bitatu na magana atandatu." 
2Chronicles2:17 Abakuramo abikorezi ibihumbi mirongo irindwi, abacukura amabuye mu misozi ibihumbi makumyabiri, n’abazabakoresha ibihumbi bitatu na magana atandatu." 
2Chronicles3:1 Salomoni atangira kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho aho yari yarayiteguriye i Yeruzalemu ku musozi wa Moriya, ari na ho Uhoraho yari yarabonekeye se Dawudi, ku mbuga ya Orunani w’Umuyebuzi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Yatangiye kuyubaka mu kwezi kwa kabiri ko mu mwaka wa kane w’ingoma ye. 
2Chronicles3:3 Dore ibipimo by’iyo Ngoro y’Imana, uko Salomoni yari yabigennye: yari ifite uburebure bw’imikono mirongo itandatu nk’uko bapimaga kera, ikagira n’ubugari bw’imikono makumyabiri." 
2Chronicles3:4 Urwinjiriro rw’imbere rwari rufite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri bureshya n’ubugari bw’Ingoro, kandi n’ubuhagarike bwarwo bukagira imikono ijana na makumyabiri. Arusigaho imbere zahabu iyunguruye." 
2Chronicles3:5 Icyumba kinini acyomekaho imbaho z’imizonobari zisizeho zahabu iyunguruye, kandi ashushanyaho imikindo n’imitako y’udukufi." 
2Chronicles3:6 Icyo cyumba agitakisha amabuye y’agaciro, na zahabu yavuye i Paruwayimu." 
2Chronicles3:7 Icyumba cyose Salomoni agisiga zahabu: ayisiga ku maburiti, ku miryango, ku nkuta, ku nzugi, kandi ashushanya abakerubimu ku nkuta." 
2Chronicles3:8 Hanyuma yubaka icyumba gitagatifu rwose: uburebure bwacyo bwareshyaga n’ubugari bw’Ingoro, bufite imikono makumyabiri, n’ubugari bwacyo bukagira imikono makumyabiri. Agisiga zahabu iyunguruye y’amatalenta magana atandatu." 
2Chronicles3:9 Imisumari yakoreshejwe yapimaga amasikeli ya zahabu ijana na mirongo itanu. Asiga zahabu n’amazu yo hejuru. 
2Chronicles3:10 Imbere mu cyumba gitagatifu rwose ashyiramo abakerubimu babiri babajwe mu giti, kandi abasiga zahabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Amababa y’abakerubimu yose hamwe yari afite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri; ibaba rimwe ry’uwa mbere ryari rifite uburebure bw’imikono itanu, kandi rigakora ku rukuta rw’ingoro, naho irindi baba na ryo ryari rifite uburebure bw’imikono itanu, kandi rigakora ku ibaba rimwe ry’umukerubimu wa kabiri." 
2Chronicles3:12 Ibaba rimwe ry’uwo mukerubimu wa kabiri ryari rifite imikono itanu kandi rikora ku rundi rukuta rw’Ingoro, naho irindi baba na ryo rikagira imikono itanu kandi rigakora ku ibaba ry’umukerubimu wa mbere." 
2Chronicles3:13 Amababa y’abo bakerubimu yari aramburiye ku mikono makumyabiri, naho bo bari bahagaze ahateganye n’icyumba gitagatifu." 
2Chronicles3:14 Umwenda ukingiriza icyumba gitagatifu rwose, Salomoni awudodesha mu bitambaro by’isine, umuhemba, umutuku na hariri; nuko awutakaho abakerubimu." 
2Chronicles3:15 Salomoni ashinga inkingi ebyiri imbere y’Ingoro: ubuhagarike bwazo bwari ubw’imikono mirongo itatu n’itanu, kandi hejuru yazo hari imitwe ifite imikono itanu." 
2Chronicles3:16 Akora n’imitako y’udukufi maze ayishyira hejuru y’inkingi. Acura imbuto zitukura ijana, azishyira ku mitako y’udukufi." 
2Chronicles3:17 Ashinga izo nkingi imbere y’Ingoro, imwe iburyo, indi ibumoso; iy’iburyo ayita «Yakini», naho iy’ibumoso ayita «Bowazi»." 
2Chronicles4:1 Salomoni yubakisha urutambiro rw’umuringa rufite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri, ubugari bw’imikono makumyabiri n’ubuhagarike bw’imikono cumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Abumba ikizenga cy’amazi mu miringa iyagijwe; ubugari bwacyo kuva ku rugara rumwe kugeza ku rundi bwari ubw’imikono cumi, kandi cyari gikoze nk’uruziga. Cyari gifite ubuhagarike bw’imikono itanu kandi umuzenguruko wacyo wapimwa n’umugozi w’imikono mirongo itatu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Mu nsi y’urugara rw’icyo kizenga hari hazengurutswe n’ibishushanyo by’impfizi bikurikiranye ku mikono mirongo itatu; byari bikikije rwose ikizenga. Ibyo bishushanyo byari ku mirongo ibiri igerekeranye kandi byari byakoranywe n’icyo kizenga. 
2Chronicles4:4 Cyari giteretse ku mashusho y’ibimasa cumi n’abiri: bitatu byarebaga mu majyaruguru, bitatu mu burengerazuba, bitatu mu majyepfo, na bitatu mu burasirazuba. Ikizenga cyari giteretswe hejuru y’ibimasa kandi byari biteranye imigongo." 
2Chronicles4:5 Umubyimba wacyo wanganaga n’intambwe imwe y’intoki, kandi urugara rwacyo rwari rubumbwe nk’urugara rw’ururabyo rwa lisi. Icyo kizenga cyashoboraga gusukwamo intango ibihumbi bitatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Salomoni acurisha imivure cumi; itanu ayishyira ibumoso, indi itanu ayishyira iburyo, kugira ngo bajye bayogerezamo: bogerezagamo ibikoresho bigenewe ibitambo bitwikwa, naho abaherezabitambo biyuhagiriraga mu kizenga cy’amazi cy’imiringa." 
2Chronicles4:7 Abumba muri zahabu ibitereko cumi by’amatara nk’uko yari yabitegetswe, maze abishyira mu cyumba gitagatifu, bitanu iburyo, bindi bitanu ibumoso." 
2Chronicles4:8 Abaza ameza cumi ayashyira mu cyumba gitagatifu, atanu iburyo, yandi atanu ibumoso. Abumba n’ibikombe ijana muri zahabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Yubaka urugo rw’abaherezabitambo, n’ikibuga kinini kandi inzugi zaho azisigaho umuringa." 
2Chronicles4:10 Naho ikizenga cy’amazi agitereka mu ruhande rw’iburyo, ahagana mu majyepfo y’iburasirazuba." 
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu acura amabesani, ibitiyo n’inzuho. Arangiza atyo imirimo yose yagombaga gukorera umwami Salomoni mu Ngoro y’Imana;" 
2Chronicles4:12 ari yo iyi: inkingi ebyiri, imitako y’imitwe ibiri yari hejuru y’inkingi, ibisa n’inshundura bibiri byo gutwikira iyo mitwe yari hejuru y’inkingi," 
2Chronicles4:13 imbuto zitukura magana ane zo ku bisa n’inshundura, imirongo ibiri y’imbuto zitukura zo ku bisa n’inshundura bitwikiriye imitwe yari hejuru y’inkingi," 
2Chronicles4:14 ibitereko cumi, imivure cumi yari ku bitereko," 
2Chronicles4:15 ikizenga cy’amazi — cyari kimwe gusa — giteretse ku bimasa cumi na bibiri," 
2Chronicles4:16 amabesani, ibitiyo, inzuho hamwe n’ibindi byose bigendana na byo. Ibyo byose Huramabi yabikoze mu muringa usennye, abikorera umwami Salomoni ngo bishyirwe mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles4:17 Umwami yabikoreshereje mu karere ka Yorudani hagati ya Sukoti na Sereda. 
2Chronicles4:18 Salomoni yabikoresheje ari byinshi cyane, ku buryo batashoboraga kumenya uburemere bw’imiringa yabigiyeho." 
2Chronicles4:19 Salomoni akoresha n’ibintu byose bigenewe Ingoro y’Imana, ari byo: urutambiro rwa zahabu, ameza ya zahabu yari agenewe gushyirwaho imigati y’umumuriko," 
2Chronicles4:20 ibitereko n’amatara yabyo yo gucana imbere y’icyumba gitagatifu nk’uko byari bitegetswe, bikozwe muri zahabu iyunguruye;" 
2Chronicles4:21 uburabyo, amatara, udufatisho, bikozwe muri zahabu iyunguruye;" 
2Chronicles4:22 ibyuma, inzuho, indosho, ibyotesho, bikozwe muri zahabu iyunguruye; irembo ry’Ingoro, inzugi z’imbere zireba icyumba gitagatifu rwose n’inzugi z’Ingoro zireba icyumba kinini, na byo bikozwe muri zahabu." 
2Chronicles5:1 Imirimo yose Salomoni yakoreshereje Ingoro y’Uhoraho irangiye neza, Salomoni atumiza ibintu byose se Dawudi yari yareguriye Imana, ari byo imari, zahabu n’ibikoresho by’amoko yose, nuko abishyira mu mutungo w’Ingoro y’Imana." 
2Chronicles5:2 Nuko Salomoni akoranyiriza i Yeruzalemu abakuru ba Israheli, abatware bose b’imiryango n’ibikomangoma byose byo mu mazu y’Abayisraheli, kugira ngo bazamure Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho, babuvane mu Murwa wa Dawudi, ari wo Siyoni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Abantu bose ba Israheli bateranira aho umwami ari mu munsi mukuru; ubwo hari mu kwezi kwa karindwi. 
2Chronicles5:4 Abakuru bose ba Israheli, bamaze kuhagera, abalevi baheka Ubushyinguro." 
2Chronicles5:5 Bazamura Ubushyinguro, Ihema ry’ibonaniro n’ibindi bintu byose byeguriwe Imana byari biririmo. Abaherezabitambo n’abalevi ni bo babizamuraga." 
2Chronicles5:6 Umwami Salomoni n’ikoraniro ryose rya Israheli rimukikije imbere y’Ubushyinguro, batura ibitambo by’amatungo magufi n’amaremare adashobora kubarwa no kurondorwa kubera ubwinshi bwayo." 
2Chronicles5:7 Abaherezabitambo bajyana Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho mu mwanya bwagenewe mu cyumba gitagatifu rwose cy’Ingoro, ari na ho hantu heguriwe Imana, nuko babutereka mu nsi y’amababa y’abakerubimu." 
2Chronicles5:8 Abakerubimu bari baramburiye amababa yabo hejuru y’Ubushyinguro bagatwikira Ubushyinguro n’imijishi yabwo. 
2Chronicles5:9 Bitewe n’uburebure bw’iyo mijishi, imitwe yayo yagaragariraga mu cyumba gitagatifu, ariko uri inyuma ntayibone, kandi na n’ubu ni ko bikimeze." 
2Chronicles5:10 Nta kintu na kimwe cyari mu Bushyinguro uretse ibisate bibiri by’amabuye Musa yashyizemo ari i Horebu, igihe Uhoraho yagiranaga Isezerano n’Abayisraheli bava mu Misiri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Hanyuma abaherezabitambo barasohoka, bava mu cyumba gitagatifu. Koko kandi bose bari bacyinjiyemo, bamaze kwisukura, batirobanuye mu mitwe yabo." 
2Chronicles5:12 Abalevi b’abaririmbyi uko bangana, Asafu, Hemani, Yedutuni, kimwe n’abahungu babo n’abavandimwe babo, bari bahagaze ahagana iburasirazuba bw’urutambiro, bambaye imyenda y’ihariri, bafite ibyuma birangira n’inanga. Bari hamwe n’abaherezabitambo ijana na makumyabiri bavuzaga amakondera." 
2Chronicles5:13 Abavuzaga amakondera n’abaririmbyi, bose hamwe bahuzaga amajwi basingiza kandi bahimbaza Uhoraho. Bakarangurura amajwi y’amakondera, y’ibyuma birangira n’ibicurangwa basingiza Uhoraho, «kuko ari umugwaneza, kandi ubudahemuka bwe bugahoraho iteka!» Ni bwo igihu cyuzuye Ingoro y’Uhoraho," 
2Chronicles5:14 maze abaherezabitambo ntibaba bagishoboye guhagarara mu Ngoro kugira ngo batunganye umurimo wabo bitewe n’icyo gihu, kuko Ingoro y’Imana yari yuzuwemo n’ikuzo ry’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles6:1 Nuko Salomoni aravuga, ati «Uhoraho, wiyemeje gutura mu gihu kibuditse!" 
2Chronicles6:2 Dore nakubakiye inzu ihebuje, aho uzatura iteka ryose.»" 
2Chronicles6:3 Umwami ahindukirira ikoraniro ryose rya Israheli ryari rihagaze, arisabira umugisha." 
2Chronicles6:4 Nuko aravuga, ati «Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, we wabwirishije umunwa we data Dawudi kandi agasoza n’ikiganza cye ibyo yasezeranye, avuga ati" 
2Chronicles6:5 ’Kuva umunsi navaniye umuryango wanjye mu Misiri, nta wundi mugi nahisemo mu miryango yose ya Israheli kugira ngo nubakemo Ingoro ikwiriye izina ryanjye, kandi nta muntu n’umwe nahisemo kugira ngo abe igikomangoma muri Israheli, umuryango wanjye;" 
2Chronicles6:6 ariko nahisemo Yeruzalemu kugira ngo izina ryanjye riyibemo kandi nahisemo Dawudi kugira ngo abe umutware w’umuryango wanjye Israheli.’ 
2Chronicles6:7 Data Dawudi yahoze azirikana kubaka Ingoro ikwiye izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
2Chronicles6:8 Ariko Uhoraho yabwiye data Dawudi, ati ’Wahoze uzirikana kubakira izina ryanjye Ingoro, kandi wagize neza." 
2Chronicles6:9 Nyamara si wowe uzubaka iyo Ngoro, ahubwo ni umuhungu wawe uzaba wibyariye; ni we uzubakira Ingoro izina ryanjye.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 Uhoraho yujuje ijambo yivugiye: nazunguye data Dawudi, nicara ku ntebe y’ubwami bwa Israheli nk’uko Uhoraho yari yarabivuze, nubaka Ingoro ikwiye izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli," 
2Chronicles6:11 kandi ni yo nateretsemo Ubushyinguro burimo Isezerano ry’Uhoraho yagiranye n’Abayisraheli, igihe yabakuraga mu gihugu cya Misiri.»" 
2Chronicles6:12 Salomoni ahagarara imbere y’urutambiro rw’Uhoraho, mu ruhame rw’ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli, nuko arambura amaboko." 
2Chronicles6:13 Koko kandi Salomoni yari yarategetse ko hagati mu gikari bahamwubakira ahantu hirengeye bakoresheje umuringa, hakagira imikono itanu y’uburebure, itanu y’ubugari, n’itatu y’ubuhagarike. Arahazamukira, hanyuma apfukama imbere y’ikoraniro ryose ry’Abayisraheli, arambura amaboko ayerekeje mu ijuru," 
2Chronicles6:14 maze aravuga ati «Uhoraho, Mana ya Israheli, nta Mana yindi iriho, ari mu ijuru, ari no ku isi, ihwanye nawe, wowe ukomereza Isezerano n’impuhwe abagaragu bawe, iyo bakugenda imbere n’umutima wabo wose." 
2Chronicles6:15 Wubahirije ibyo wasezeraniye umugaragu wawe data Dawudi: ibyo wavugishije umunwa wawe wabyuzurishije ikiganza cyawe, nk’uko biboneka uyu munsi." 
2Chronicles6:16 None ubu ngubu, Uhoraho Mana ya Israheli, komereza data ijambo wamubwiye, ugira uti ’Ntihazabura na rimwe umwe mu bana bawe uzicara imbere yanjye ku ntebe y’ubwami bwa Israheli, niba abana bawe babaye indahemuka mu mico, bagakurikiza amategeko yanjye, nk’uko wowe wabigenjeje.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 None ubu ngubu, Uhoraho Mana ya Israheli, ijambo wabwiye umugaragu wawe Dawudi nirihame!" 
2Chronicles6:18 Ariko se koko, Imana ishobora guturana n’abantu ku isi? Ijuru ubwaryo ndetse n’ishema ryaryo ntushobora kurikwirwamo, nkanswe iyi Ngoro nubatse!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Uhoraho, Mana ya Israheli, wite ku mugaragu wawe ugusenga agutakambira! Wumve induru n’isengesho umugaragu wawe akugezaho uyu munsi!" 
2Chronicles6:20 Amaso yawe uyahange kuri iyi Ngoro umunsi n’ijoro, aha hantu wavuze ko uzahashyira izina ryawe! Umva isengesho umugaragu wawe avugira aha hantu!" 
2Chronicles6:21 Jya wumva ugutakamba umugaragu wawe n’umuryango wawe Israheli bazagirira aha hantu! Wowe, ujye wumvira mu ijuru aho utuye, wumve kandi ugire impuhwe!" 
2Chronicles6:22 Nihagira umuntu uzaba yacumuriye undi maze bakamurahiza, kandi akaza kurahirira imbere y’urutambiro rwawe muri iyi Ngoro," 
2Chronicles6:23 wowe uzumvire mu ijuru maze utegeke, ucire abagaragu bawe urubanza: umugiranabi umukorere ibimukwiye, ukurikije imigenzereze ye mibi; naho umuziranenge, uzamugire umwere, umwiture ibihuje n’ubutungane bwe." 
2Chronicles6:24 Igihe umuryango wawe Israheli uzaba waneshejwe n’abanzi kubera kugucumuraho, nukugarukira ugasingiza izina ryawe," 
2Chronicles6:25 wowe uzumvire mu ijuru, maze ubabarire umuryango wawe Israheli icyaha cyawo, hanyuma uwugarure mu gihugu wahaye abasekuruza bawo." 
2Chronicles6:26 Igihe ijuru rizaba rikinze kandi imvura yarabuze kubera ko umuryango wawe uzaba wagucumuyeho, nuza gusengera aha ngaha, ugasingiza izina ryawe, ukicuza icyaha cyawo kuko uzaba wawucishije bugufi," 
2Chronicles6:27 wowe uzumvire mu ijuru, ubabarire abagaragu bawe icyaha cyabo n’icy’umuryango wawe Israheli, uzabereke inzira iboneye bagomba gukurikira, maze ugushe imvura mu gihugu cyawe, wahayeho umurage umuryango wawe." 
2Chronicles6:28 Nihatera inzara mu gihugu, hagatera icyorezo, imyaka ikarumba, hagatera inzige, n’ibihore, umwanzi agatera imigi yose y’igihugu, hakaduka icyorezo n’indwara iyo ari yo yose," 
2Chronicles6:29 maze umuntu wese wo mu muryango wa Israheli agasenga atakamba abitewe na kimwe muri ibyo, akiyumvisha ikibi kiri mu mutima we, maze akarambura amaboko ye ayerekeje kuri iyi Ngoro," 
2Chronicles6:30 wowe uzumvire mu ijuru aho utuye, ugire impuhwe, maze uhe buri muntu ibihuje n’imigenzereze ye, kuko uba uzi umutima we. Koko kandi ni wowe umenya imitima ya bose," 
2Chronicles6:31 bikazatuma bagutinya iminsi yose bazamara mu gihugu wahaye abasokuruza bacu. 
2Chronicles6:32 Ndetse n’umunyamahanga, utari uwo mu muryango wawe Israheli, naturuka mu gihugu cya kure ku mpamvu y’izina ryawe ry’ikirangirire, no ku mpamvu y’ikiganza cyawe gikomeye n’ukuboko kwawe kw’impangare, akaza agasengera muri iyi Ngoro," 
2Chronicles6:33 wowe, uzumvire mu ijuru aho utuye, maze wubahirize ibyo umunyamahanga azaba yagusabye byose, kugira ngo amahanga yose y’isi azamenye izina ryawe, maze agutinye nk’uko Israheli, umuryango wawe ubigenza, kandi bazamenye ko izina ryawe ryambarizwa muri iyi Ngoro nubatse." 
2Chronicles6:34 Igihe umuryango wawe uzatera abanzi bawo ukajya kubarwanyiriza aho uzaba wabohereje aho ari ho hose, nusenga Uhoraho werekeje ku murwa watoranyije n’Ingoro nubakiye izina ryawe," 
2Chronicles6:35 wowe, aho uri mu ijuru, uzumve isengesho ryawo, maze urengere abagutakambira." 
2Chronicles6:36 Abayisraheli nibagucumurira, kuko nta muntu udacumura, ukabarakarira, ukabateza ababisha, maze bagatsindwa bakajyanwa bunyago mu gihugu cya kure cyangwa cya hafi," 
2Chronicles6:37 nibagutekereza bari muri icyo gihugu bazaba bafungiwemo, bakihana kandi bakagutakambira bari mu gihugu cy’ababatsinze, bavuga bati ’Twaracumuye, turi abanyamafuti, turi ibicibwa’," 
2Chronicles6:38 bakakugarukira n’umutima wabo wose, n’amagara yabo yose, aho bari muri icyo gihugu bazaba bajyanywemo bunyago bakagusenga bareba aho igihugu cyabo giherereye, ari cyo gihugu wahaye abasekuruza babo, berekeje kandi umurwa watoranyije n’Ingoro nubakiye izina ryawe," 
2Chronicles6:39 wowe aho utuye mu ijuru, uzumve amasengesho yabo n’ugutakamba kwabo, maze batsindire ibyo bazaba baharaniye, maze ubabarire abantu bawe bazaba bagukoreye ibyaha." 
2Chronicles6:40 None rero, Mana yanjye, amaso yawe narebe, kandi amatwi yawe niyumve amasengesho avugirwa aha hantu!" 
2Chronicles6:41 Ubu rero, Uhoraho Mana, haguruka, wowe n’Ubushyinguro burimo imbaraga zawe, maze uze aha hantu h’uburuhukiro! Abaherezabitambo bawe, Uhoraho Mana, nibagire amahoro, kandi n’abayoboke bawe nibasabagizwe n’ibyishimo!" 
2Chronicles6:42 Uhoraho Mana, wikwitarura uruhanga rw’uwo wasize, ibuka ibyiza wagiriye umugaragu wawe Dawudi.»" 
2Chronicles7:1 Salomoni amaze gusenga, umuriro umanuka uva mu ijuru, ibitambo bitwikwa n’amaturo, birakongoka, maze ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryuzura Ingoro." 
2Chronicles7:2 Abaherezabitambo ntibashobora kwinjira mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho kuko ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryari ryuzuye Ingoro y’Uhoraho. 
2Chronicles7:3 Abayisraheli bose babonye umuriro n’ikuzo ry’Uhoraho bimanukiye ku Ngoro, barunama bakoza uruhanga ku butaka, maze baramya Uhoraho «kuko ari umugwaneza, n’ubudahemuka bwe bugahoraho iteka.»" 
2Chronicles7:4 Umwami na rubanda rwose bafatanya gutura ibitambo Uhoraho. 
2Chronicles7:5 Umwami Salomoni atura ibitambo by’ibimasa ibihumbi makumyabiri na bibiri, n’iby’intama ibihumbi ijana na makumyabiri. Uko ni ko umwami na rubanda rwose batashye Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles7:6 Abaherezabitambo bari bahagaze mu mwanya wabo, naho abalevi bari bafite ibyuma byo kuririmbira Uhoraho, bya bindi umwami Dawudi yari yarakoreshereje guhimbaza Uhoraho «Kuko ubudahemuka bwe buhoraho iteka!» Ni bo baririmbaga ibisingizo Dawudi yari yarahimbye. Abaherezabitambo babari iruhande bavuzaga amakondera, naho Abayisraheli bose bahagaze." 
2Chronicles7:7 Salomoni yegurira Uhoraho igice cyo hagati y’urugo ruri imbere y’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, akaba ari na ho yaturiye ibitambo bitwikwa n’urugimbu rw’ibitambo by’ubuhoro. Ntiyabituriye ku rutambiro rw’umuringa rwari rwarubatswe na Salomoni kuko rwari ruto cyane, rudashobora kujyaho ibitambo bitwikwa, amaturo n’ingimbu." 
2Chronicles7:8 Muri icyo gihe Salomoni akora ibirori bimara iminsi irindwi, ari hamwe n’Abayisraheli bose. Ryari ikoraniro rinini cyane rigizwe n’abaturutse mu gihugu cyose, kuva i Lebohamati kugeza ku mugezi wa Misiri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Ku munsi wa munani bose barakorana kugira ngo basoze ibirori, kuko bari bamaze iminsi irindwi bari mu byishimo, bizihiza itahwa ry’urutambiro." 
2Chronicles7:10 Nuko ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’itatu w’ukwezi kwa karindwi Salomoni asezerera abantu basubira mu mahema yabo, bagenda bishimye kandi imitima yabo inejejwe n’ibyiza Uhoraho yari yagiriye Dawudi, Salomoni, n’umuryango we Israheli." 
2Chronicles7:11 Salomoni yari amaze kuzuza Ingoro y’Uhoraho n’iy’umwami, kandi amaze gutunganya neza ibyo yari yarazirikanye byose gukora mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho no mu nzu ye bwite." 
2Chronicles7:12 Nuko Uhoraho aramubonekera nijoro maze aramubwira ati «Numvise amasengesho yawe kandi nahisemo aha hantu ngo habe Ingoro yo guturiramo ibitambo. 
2Chronicles7:13 Ninkinga ijuru imvura ntigwe, nintegeka inzige ngo zangize igihugu, ninohereza icyorezo mu bantu banjye," 
2Chronicles7:14 maze abantu banjye bitiriwe izina ryanjye bakicisha bugufi, bagasenga, bagashaka uruhanga rwanjye kandi bakareka ingeso mbi zabo, nanjye nzumvira mu ijuru mbabarire ibicumuro byabo kandi nkize igihugu cyabo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Ubu ngubu amaso yanjye arareba kandi amatwi yanjye arumva amasengesho avugirwa aha hantu. 
2Chronicles7:16 Kandi kuva ubu ntoranyije iyi Ngoro ndayitagatifuje kugira ngo izina ryanjye rizayibemo ubuziraherezo; nzayihozaho amaso kandi nyihozeho umutima wanjye iteka ryose. 
2Chronicles7:17 Naho wowe, nugenda imbere yanjye nk’uko so Dawudi yabigenje, ugakora ibyo nagutegetse byose, kandi ukitondera amateka yanjye n’amabwiriza yanjye," 
2Chronicles7:18 ni bwo nanjye nzakomeza ingoma yawe nk’uko nabisezeraniye so Dawudi, ngira nti ’Ntihazigera habura umuntu mu bawe uzategeka Israheli.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 Ariko nimunteshukaho, ntimwitondere amateka yanjye n’amategeko yanjye nabahaye, mukayoboka izindi mana kandi mukaziramya," 
2Chronicles7:20 ubwo nzabavana mu gihugu nabahaye kandi iyi Ngoro neguriye izina ryanjye nzayijugunya kure imve mu maso, maze izabe iciro ry’imigani n’agashinyaguro mu mahanga yose." 
2Chronicles7:21 Iyi Ngoro uko ingana uku, uzayinyura iruhande azatangara, yibaza ati ’Ni iki cyatumye Uhoraho akorera ibi ngibi iki gihugu n’iyi Ngoro?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Bazasubiza bati ’Ni uko baretse Uhoraho Imana y’abasekuruza babo yabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, bakiha izindi mana, bakaziramya kandi bakazikorera: ngicyo icyatumye Uhoraho abateza ibi byago byose.’" 
2Chronicles8:1 Imyaka makumyabiri ishize, ari na yo Salomoni yubatsemo Ingoro y’Uhoraho n’inzu ye bwite," 
2Chronicles8:2 Salomoni yongera kubaka imigi Huramu yari yaramuhaye maze ayituzamo Abayisraheli. 
2Chronicles8:3 Hanyuma Salomoni atera i Hamati‐Soba, arahigarurira." 
2Chronicles8:4 Yubaka Tadumori yo mu butayu kandi asana n’imigi yose y’ububiko yari mu karere ka Hamati. 
2Chronicles8:5 Asana Betihoroni yo haruguru na Betihoroni y’epfo, iyo migi ayikikiza inkike z’amabuye, ayikingisha inzugi, n’ibihindizo." 
2Chronicles8:6 Abigenza atyo no kuri Balati, no ku migi ye yose y’ububiko, no ku migi amagare y’intambara yatahagamo n’iyo abagendera ku mafarasi batahagamo. Salomoni yubaka kandi ibyo ashaka byose muri Yeruzalemu, no muri Libani no mu gihugu cyose yategekaga." 
2Chronicles8:7 Hari hasigaye abaturage benshi b’Abaheti, Abahemori, Abaperizi, Abahivi n’Abayebuzi, batari Abayisraheli." 
2Chronicles8:8 Nuko Salomoni akoranya abana babo bari bacitse ku icumu batarimbuwe n’Abayisraheli, abagenera gukora imirimo y’uburetwa kugeza n’ubu." 
2Chronicles8:9 Ariko mu Bayisraheli ntiyagira abo ashyira mu buhake kuko ari bo barwanaga intambara, bakaba abatware b’ingabo ze, n’abatware b’amagare ye n’ab’abagendera ku mafarasi." 
2Chronicles8:10 Dore umubare w’abatware bakuru b’umwami Salomoni; bari magana abiri na mirongo itanu bategekaga rubanda. 
2Chronicles8:11 Salomoni azamura umukobwa wa Farawo, amuvana mu murwa wa Dawudi, amujyana mu nzu yamwubakiye, kuko yibwiraga ati «Umugore wanjye ntagomba kuba mu nzu ya Dawudi, umwami w’Abayisraheli, kuko ari ahantu hatagatifu Ubushyinguro bw’Uhoraho bwinjiye.»" 
2Chronicles8:12 Nuko Salomoni aturira Uhoraho ibitambo bitwikwa ku rutambiro rw’Uhoraho yari yarubatse imbere y’Inzu y’Uhoraho," 
2Chronicles8:13 akabigenza atyo uko igihe cyo kubitura kigeze nk’uko byategetswe na Musa: ku masabato, mu mboneko z’ukwezi no ku minsi mikuru itatu yo mu mwaka, ari yo umunsi mukuru w’imigati idasembuwe, umunsi mukuru w’ibyumweru n’umunsi mukuru w’amahema." 
2Chronicles8:14 Akurikije icyemezo cya se Dawudi, ashyiraho imitwe y’abaherezabitambo mu mirimo yabo, ashyiraho abalevi kugira ngo bahimbaze Uhoraho, kandi batunganye buri munsi, imirimo yabo imbere y’abaherezabitambo; ashyira n’abarinzi b’inzugi kuri buri rugi uko imitwe yabo yari imeze, kuko iryo ryari itegeko rya Dawudi, umuntu w’Imana." 
2Chronicles8:15 Ntibagira itegeko na rimwe ry’umwami bacaho ku byerekeye abaherezabitambo n’abalevi, no ku kintu icyo ari cyo cyose cyo mu bubiko." 
2Chronicles8:16 Nuko imirimo yose ya Salomoni iratungana, kuva ku munsi bubatseho urufatiro rw’Ingoro y’Uhoraho kugera igihe Ingoro y’Uhoraho yuzuriye." 
2Chronicles8:17 Nuko Salomoni ajya i Esiyoni‐Geberi no mu cyerekezo cya Eloti, ku nkombe y’inyanja, mu gihugu cya Edomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Huramu amwoherereza amato arimo abagaragu be bamenyereye inyanja. Bajyana n’abagaragu ba Salomoni, baragenda bagera i Ofiri, bakurayo zahabu ingana n’amatalenta magana ane na mirongo itanu, bayizanira umwami Salomoni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Umwamikazi w’i Saba yumva bamamaza Salomoni. Nuko aza i Yeruzalemu ashagawe n’imbaga nyamwinshi, n’ingamiya zihetse imibavu na zahabu nyinshi n’amabuye y’agaciro gakomeye, azanywe no kumwinjisha ibibazo by’urusobekerane. Ageze kwa Salomoni amubwira ibyo yari afite ku mutima byose." 
2Chronicles9:2 Salomoni asubiza ibibazo bye byose, ntihagira na kimwe kimubera urujijo ku buryo yakiburira igisubizo." 
2Chronicles9:3 Umwamikazi w’i Saba abonye ubuhanga bwa Salomoni, inzu yari yarubatse," 
2Chronicles9:4 ibiribwa byo ku meza ye, amacumbi y’abagaragu be, imiherereze y’abagaragu be n’imyambarire yabo, abahereza b’inzoga be n’imyambarire yabo, ibitambo bitwikwa yaturiraga mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, arumirwa abura urwo avuga." 
2Chronicles9:5 Nuko abwira umwami, ati «Ibyo numvise mu gihugu cyanjye bakuvugaho, iby’imivugire yawe n’ubuhanga bwawe, byari ukuri." 
2Chronicles9:6 Sinemeraga ibyavugwaga kugeza ubwo niyizira nkibonera n’amaso yanjye; none nsanze nta n’icya kabiri cy’ubwenge bwawe bari bamenyesheje! Urengeje kure mu buhanga no mu mico ubwamamare nari narakumviseho. 
2Chronicles9:7 Hahirwa abagore bawe, hahirwa abagaragu bawe, bo bahora igihe cyose imbere yawe bumva ubuhanga bwawe!"
