Nehemiah3:18 Nyuma yabo hubakwa n’abavandimwe babo, barimo Binuwi mwene Henadadi, umutware w’igice cya kabiri cy’akarere ka Keyila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Akurikirwa na Ezeri mwene Yeshuwa, umutware w’i Misipa, aba ari we wubaka ikindi gice cy’ahazamuka hagana ku nzu babikagamo ibikoresho by’intambara, mu mfuruka y’inkike." 
Nehemiah3:20 Iruhande rwe, Baruki mwene Zabayi, yubakana umwete ikindi gice ahereye ku mfuruka y’inkike, ageza ku muryango w’inzu ya Eliyashibu, umuherezabitambo mukuru." 
Nehemiah3:21 Akurikirwa na Meremoti mwene Uriya, mwene Hakosi, aba ari we wubaka ikindi gice, ahereye ku muryango w’inzu ya Eliyashibu, ageza aho igarukira." 
Nehemiah3:22 Abaherezabitambo bo mu turere dukikije Yeruzalemu bakurikiraho, na bo barubaka." 
Nehemiah3:23 Bakurikirwa na Benyamini na Hashubi, bubaka ahateganye n’amazu yabo; Azariya mwene Maseya, mwene Ananiya na we akurikiraho, yubaka iruhande rw’inzu ye." 
Nehemiah3:24 Binuwi mwene Henadadi yubaka ku kindi gice, kuva ku nzu ya Azariya kugeza ku iguni ry’inkike." 
Nehemiah3:25 Hakurikiraho Palali mwene Uzayi, aba ari we wubaka hagati y’iguni n’umunara wo hejuru, wometse ku nzu y’umwami, bugufi y’ikibuga cy’abarinzi. Pedaya mwene Perewoshi," 
Nehemiah3:26 afatanyije n’abahereza bari batuye i Ofeli, yubaka agana mu burasirazuba, ageza imbere y’Irembo ry’Amazi no ku munara wo hejuru." 
Nehemiah3:27 Hakurikiraho abantu b’i Tekowa, baba ari bo bubaka ikindi gice, bahereye ahateganye n’umunara munini wo mu iguni, bageza ku nkike ya Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Kuva hejuru y’Irembo ry’Amafarasi, hubakwa n’abaherezabitambo, buri muntu imbere y’inzu ye." 
Nehemiah3:29 Abakurikiyeho ni Sadoki mwene Imeri, wubatse ahateganye n’inzu ye, na Shemaya mwene Shekaniya, umurinzi w’Irembo ry’iburasirazuba." 
Nehemiah3:30 Hananiya mwene Sheramiya, na Hanuni, ari we wa gatandatu muri bene Asafu, bubaka ikindi gice; bakurikirwa na Meshulamu, mwene Berekiya, wubatse imbere y’inzu ye." 
Nehemiah3:31 Malikiya, umucuzi wa zahabu, yubaka kugeza ku mazu y’abahereza n’ay’abacuruzi, ahateganye n’Irembo ry’Abagenzuzi, kugeza ku cyumba cyo hejuru y’iguni." 
Nehemiah3:32 Maze hagati y’icyumba cyo hejuru y’iguni n’Irembo ry’Intama, hubakwa n’abacuzi ba zahabu hamwe n’abacuruzi." 
Nehemiah3:33 Aho Sanabalati yumviye ko twubaka inkike, ararakara maze arabisha. Ahinyura Abayahudi" 
Nehemiah3:34 kandi avugira mu ruhame rw’abavandimwe be n’ingabo zari i Samariya, ati «Mbese bariya batindi b’Abayahudi bari mu biki? Aho ntibibwira ko biriya ari igikorwa cy’umunsi umwe? Mbese ye, ariya mabuye yahiye bariho batoragura mu matongo, ni yo agenewe kubaka?»" 
Nehemiah3:35 Na Tobiya w’Umuhamoni, wari iruhande rwe, ararisongera ati «Ngaho nibubake da! Ruriya rukuta rwabo, n’ingunzu imwe irwuriye, rwahita rutengagurika!»" 
Nehemiah3:36 Twumve, Mana yacu, kuko twasuzuguwe, maze ibitutsi badututse bibe ari bo bihama, kandi bazakorwe n’ikimwaro mu gihugu cy’ubucakara!" 
Nehemiah3:37 Wibababarira igicumuro cyabo cyangwa ngo ubahanagureho icyaha bakugiriye, kuko basuzuguye abubatsi." 
Nehemiah3:38 Nuko turakomeza twubaka inkike, maze bidatinze ziba zigeze hagati, kuko imbaga yakoranaga umwete." 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanabalati, Tobiya, Abarabu, Abahamoni n’Abashidodi bamaze kumenya ko isanwa ry’inkuta za Yeruzalemu rijya mbere, bumvise kandi ko dutangiye kuziba ibyuho, barushaho kurakara." 
Nehemiah4:2 Bahuza umugambi kugira ngo baze gutera Yeruzalemu maze bayivutsemo imidugararo. 
Nehemiah4:3 Nuko, tumaze gutakambira Imana yacu, dushyiraho abantu ngo babaturinde umunsi n’ijoro." 
Nehemiah4:4 Nyamara abo muri Yuda baravugaga bati «Imbaraga z’abubatsi zirakendereye, kandi amatongo ni menshi, birenze urugero! Izi nkike ntituzashobora kuzubaka!»!»" 
Nehemiah4:5 Naho abanzi bacu bo baravuga bati «Ntibazigera batubona cyangwa ngo babimenye, tuzabagwa gitumo, tubice maze ibyo batangiye birangirire aho.»" 
Nehemiah4:6 Abayahudi baturanye na bo baraza baratuburira, babigira nk’incuro cumi, batubwira bati «Barakorana, baturutse mu turere twose batuyemo, bagira ngo baze kudutera!»" 
Nehemiah4:7 Nuko nshyira rubanda inyuma y’inkike, nkabahagarika nkurikije amazu yabo, bitwaje inkota, amacumu n’imiheto byabo." 
Nehemiah4:8 Maze kugenzura uko bahagaze, ndahaguruka mbwira abanyacyubahiro, abakuru n’imbaga yose, nti «Mwitinya bariya bantu! Nimwibuke Nyagasani n’imbaraga ze zikangaranya, maze murwanirire abavandimwe n’abahungu banyu, abakobwa n’abagore banyu, ndetse n’ingo zanyu.»" 
Nehemiah4:9 Nuko abanzi bacu bumvise ko twaburiwe, Imana ibatera kureka umugambi wabo, maze twese tugaruka kubaka inkike, buri wese ku murimo we." 
Nehemiah4:10 Ariko guhera uwo munsi, igice kimwe gusa cy’abantu banjye barubakaga, naho abandi bagahorana amacumu, ingabo, imiheto n’imyambaro y’intambara, bahagaze inyuma y’abo muri Yuda bose bakoraga." 
Nehemiah4:11 Abikorezi bo, bakoreshaga akaboko kamwe, naho akandi gafashe intwaro." 
Nehemiah4:12 Buri wese mu bubatsi, na we yubakaga afite inkota mu rukenyerero. Uwavuzaga ihembe we, yagumaga iruhande rwanjye." 
Nehemiah4:13 Nuko mbwira abanyacyubahiro, abajyanama, ndetse n’imbaga yose, nti «Aho dukwiye gukora haracyari henshi kandi ntihegeranye, bigatuma dutatana ku mpande zose z’urukuta." 
Nehemiah4:14 None rero aho muzumva ihembe rivugiye, muzahadusange muhakoranire, ubundi Imana yacu izaturwanirira.»" 
Nehemiah4:15 Nuko abo mu gice kimwe bakajya ku mirimo naho abandi bagafata amacumu yabo, kuva igihe umuseke ukebye kugeza ubwo inyenyeri zimurika." 
Nehemiah4:16 Ubwo kandi ndongera mbwira imbaga, nti «Buri muntu n’umugaragu we bajye barara muri Yeruzalemu, bityo tuzagire abarinzi nijoro, naho ku manywa bakore.»" 
Nehemiah4:17 Naho jyewe hamwe n’abavandimwe banjye n’abagaragu banjye, ndetse n’abarinzi twagendanaga, nta n’umwe wiyamburaga imyambaro ye, buri wese yabaga afite intwaro ye, ayitwariye iburyo." 
Nehemiah5:1 Bukeye, abagabo n’abagore bo muri rubanda bijujutira abavandimwe babo b’Abayahudi." 
Nehemiah5:2 Bamwe bakavuga bati «Abahungu bacu, abakobwa bacu ndetse natwe ubwacu tugomba kwigwatiriza, kugira ngo tubone ingano zo kurya maze tubeho!»" 
Nehemiah5:3 Abandi bakavuga bati «Amasambu yacu, imizabibu yacu n’ingo zacu, tugomba kubitangaho ingwate, kugira ngo tubone ingano muri iki gihe cy’inzara.»" 
Nehemiah5:4 Abandi na bo bati «Kugira ngo tubone amakoro y’umwami, twagujije feza tugwatirije amasambu yacu n’imizabibu yacu." 
Nehemiah5:5 Nyamara twese turi bamwe, n’abahungu b’abavandimwe bacu ntibarusha abacu agaciro; ni iki rero cyatuma tugomba gutanga abahungu bacu n’abakobwa bacu kugira ngo babagaragire? Ndetse bamwe mu bakobwa bacu bababereye abaja! Kandi nta n’icyo tugishoboye gukora ngo tubacungure, kuko amasambu yacu n’imizabibu yacu byitungiwe n’abandi!»" 
Nehemiah5:6 Namaze kumva uko bijujuta n’amagambo yabo, ubwo mpita ndakara cyane." 
Nehemiah5:7 Nuko ngisha imitima inama, niyemeza gutonganya abanyacyubahiro n’abakuru, maze ndababwira nti «Mwese mukorera abavandimwe banyu umutwaro urenze urugero!» Hanyuma nkoranya abantu benshi kugira ngo tubamagane;" 
Nehemiah5:8 maze ndababwira nti «Twebwe ubwacu twakoze uko dushoboye, ducungura abavandimwe bacu b’Abayahudi bari baragurishijwe mu mahanga, none ni mwebwe musigaye mucuruza abavandimwe banyu, mukabagurisha cyangwa mukabagura!» Nuko baraceceka, babura icyo bavuga." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ndakomeza ndababwira nti «Ibyomukora nta bwo ari byiza. Mbese ntimwagombye guhorana igitinyiro cy’Imana yacu, kugira ngo mwirinde gukozwa isoni n’amahanga atwanga?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Nanjye ubwanjye, hamwe n’abavandimwe banjye n’abagaragu banjye, hari abo twagurije feza n’ingano. Nimuze tubaharire twese iyo myenda baturimo!" 
Nehemiah5:11 Uyu munsi wa none, nimubasubize amasambu yabo, imizabibu, ibiti by’imizeti n’amazu byabo, mubegurire kandi imyenda babarimo, yaba iya feza, ingano, divayi nshya cyangwa se amavuta mwari mwarabagurije.»" 
Nehemiah5:12 Barasubiza bati «Tuzabibasubiza kandi nta n’icyo tuzabaka; rwose tuzabigenza uko ubivuze.» Ubwo mpamagaza abaherezabitambo, maze ndahiza abantu imbere yabo ko bazagenza koko uko babyemeye." 
Nehemiah5:13 Hanyuma nkunkumura igishura cyanjye maze ndavuga nti «Imana iragakunkumura itya umuntu wese utazakurikiza iri jambo; maze imukure mu nzu ye no mu mutungo we! Ibye byose biragakunkumuka maze asigare amara masa.» Ikoraniro ryose ririkiriza riti «Amen!» kandi bose basingiza Uhoraho. Nuko imbaga ibikora uko byavuzwe. 
Nehemiah5:14 Igihugu cya Yuda nagitegetse imyaka cumi n’ibiri yose, kuva ku mwaka wa makumyabiri umwami Aritashuweru ari ku ngoma, kugeza ku wa mirongo itatu n’ibiri, nyamara muri icyo gihe cyose, ari jye, ari n’abavandimwe banjye, ntitwigeze dutungwa n’amaturo nk’ahabwa umutware." 
Nehemiah5:15 Naho abatware bambanjirije, bo bakandamizaga rubanda, buri munsi bakabaha amasikeli mirongo ine ya feza azagurwa imigati na divayi; abagaragu babo ndetse na bo bagashikamira imbaga. Ariko jye si ko nabigenjeje, kubera ko natinyaga Imana." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ahubwo nibanze cyane ku mirimo yo kubaka inkike, sinagira n’agasambu ngura. N’abagaragu banjye bose bafatanyaga n’abandi imirimo." 
Nehemiah5:17 Abakuru n’abanyacyubahiro twasangiriraga hamwe iwanjye, bagera ku bagabo ijana na mirongo itanu, hatabariwemo n’abazaga badusanga baturutse mu mahanga adukikije." 
Nehemiah5:18 Buri munsi habagwaga ikimasa kimwe, intama esheshatu z’indobanure n’inkoko zitari nke, ariko byose bikishyurwa ibivuye ku mutungo wanjye; iminsi cumi yashira bakazana divayi ihagije bose. Nyamara n’ubwo byari bimeze bityo sinigeze nturwa nk’abatware, kuko rubanda bashengurwaga n’uburetwa." 
Nehemiah5:19 Mana yanjye, ndakwinginze ngo ujye wibuka ibyo nakoze byose ngirira iyi mbaga, maze ubinyiture." 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanabalati, Tobiya, Geshemu w’Umwarabu n’abandi banzi bacu bamenya ko nongeye kubaka inkike, kandi ko nta cyuho na kimwe kikiharangwa, n’ubwo icyo gihe nari ntarashyira inzugi ku marembo." 
Nehemiah6:2 Ni bwo Sanabalati na Geshemu bantumyeho, bati «Uraze, duhurire i Kefirimu mu kibaya cya Ono.» Naho bo bari bacuze inama yo kungirira nabi." 
Nehemiah6:3 Nanjye mbatumaho, mbasubiza nti «Umurimo ndimo nkora urakomeye; sinshobora kuwureka ngo nze. Kandi ndamutse nsize imirimo nkaza iwanyu, yose yahagarara; ibyo se naba mbishakiye iki?»" 
Nehemiah6:4 Bakomeza kuntumaho batyo, babigira incuro enye zose, nanjye igisubizo kikaba cya kindi." 
Nehemiah6:5 Sanabalati yongera kuntumaho umugaragu we ubwa gatanu, ambwira kwa kundi. Yari yamuhaye ibaruwa ifunguye," 
Nehemiah6:6 yanditsemo ngo «Geshemu aremeza yuko hari inkuru yakwiriye ibihugu, ivuga ko wowe n’Abayahudi mushaka kwivumbagatanya, akaba ari na cyo cyatumye mwubaka inkike; kandi barahamya ko ari wowe uzababera umwami." 
Nehemiah6:7 Baravuga kandi ko waba warashyizeho abahanuzi kugira ngo bakwamamaze hose muri Yeruzalemu, bavuga ngo ’Igihugu cya Yuda gifite umwami!’ Ibyo byose kandi umwami azabimenya. None rero ngwino tujye inama.»" 
Nehemiah6:8 Ubwo nanjye mutumaho, nti «Nta na kimwe cyabaye mu byo uvuga; byose ni wowe ubyihimbira!»" 
Nehemiah6:9 Koko kandi bose babigiraga bashaka kudutera ubwoba, bibwira bati «Bazacika intege barambirwe, maze uwo murimo uhagarare!» Ibiramambu, ahubwo twarushagaho kuwushishikarira dushyizeho umwete." 
Nehemiah6:10 Nuko umunsi umwe njya kwa Shemaya, umuhungu wa Delaya mwene Mehetabeli, utari washoboye kwiyizira. Arambwira ati «Tuze guhurira mu Nzu y’Imana, maze twikingiranire imbere mu Ngoro; inzugi z’amarembo tuzifunge, kuko baza kukwica, iri joro nyine ni ho baza kukwica!»" 
Nehemiah6:11 Ndamusubiza nti «Umugabo nkanjye yahunga? Ni nde muntu nkanjye wakwihisha mu Ngoro, maze agakomeza kubaho? Reka da, sinjya kuyihishamo.»" 
Nehemiah6:12 Nari namenye ko ibyo ampanuriye atabitumwe n’Imana, ahubwo ko ari Tobiya wamuguriye." 
Nehemiah6:13 Bari bamuguriye, kugira ngo nze kugira ubwoba, nimbigenza ntyo mbe ncumuye, maze babone uko bankwiza igihugu, bankoze ikimwaro." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ndakwinginze, Mana yanjye, ngo ujye wibuka Tobiya kubera ubwo bugome bwe; kandi uzibuke na Noyadiya w’umuhanuzikazi, hamwe n’abandi bahanuzi bose, bashatse kuntera ubwoba." 
Nehemiah6:15 Nuko inkike zuzura ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’itanu w’ukwezi kwa Eluli; zari zubatswe mu minsi mirongo itanu n’ibiri. 
Nehemiah6:16 Aho abanzi bacu babimenyeye, amahanga yose aradutinya, maze barigaya ubwabo kandi bemera ko iyo mirimo twari tuyirangije tubikesha Uhoraho, Imana yacu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Muri icyo gihe amabaruwa abanyacyubahiro b’Abayahudi bandikiraga Tobiya aba urufaya, na we kandi akabasubiza." 
Nehemiah6:18 Koko rero, abenshi muri Yuda bari baragiranye na we amasezerano bashyiraho indahiro, kuko yari umukwe wa Shekaniya mwene Arahu; kandi na Yohanani, umuhungu we, yari yararongoye umukobwa wa Meshulamu, mwene Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Bandatiraga ibyiza Tobiya uwo akora kandi icyo mvuze cyose bakakimumenyesha, naho Tobiya akanyoherereza amabaruwa yo kuntera ubwoba." 
Nehemiah7:1 Inkike z’umugi zamaze kuzura maze ntera inzugi ku marembo, hanyuma nshyiraho abanyanzugi (n’abaririmbyi n’abalevi)." 
Nehemiah7:2 Nuko Hanani umuvandimwe wanjye mugira umutware wa Yeruzalemu, naho Hananiya aba umukuru w’ingabo zo mu kigo ntamenwa, kuko uwo mugabo w’inyangamugayo yarushaga abenshi kugirira Imana igitinyiro." 
Nehemiah7:3 Nuko ndabihanangiriza nti «Amarembo ya Yeruzalemu ntazakingurwe mbere y’uko izuba rirasa, nirijya kurenga mujye mukinga inzugi mushyireho ibihindizo; kandi abaturage ba Yeruzalemu mujye mubatoranyamo abarinzi, buri wese afate umwanya ahateganye n’inzu ye.»" 
Nehemiah7:4 Umugi wari munini mu mpande zawo zose ariko utuwe n’abantu bake cyane, kandi n’amazu yari atarongera kubakwa." 
Nehemiah7:5 Ni bwo Imana yanjye inshyizemo igitekerezo cyo gukoranya abanyacyubahiro, abacamanza hamwe n’imbaga yose, kugira ngo babarurwe hakurikijwe amazu yabo. Mbanza kureba mu gitabo cy’abagarutse mbere, nsanga handitsemo ngo:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Dore abantu bo muri iyi ntara, Nebukadinetsari umwami wa Babiloni yari yarajyanye bunyago, hanyuma bakagaruka i Yeruzalemu no muri Yuda, buri wese agasubira mu mugi we." 
Nehemiah7:7 Bazanye na Zorobabeli, Yozuwe, Nehemiya, Azariya, Ramiya, Nahamani, Morudokayi, Bilishani, Misipereti, Biguwayi, Nehumi na Bahana. Umubare w’imbaga ya Israheli ni uyu:" 
Nehemiah7:8 bene Parewoshi ni 2172; 
Nehemiah7:9 bene Shefatiya ni 372; 
Nehemiah7:10 bene Arahu ni 652; 
Nehemiah7:11 bene Pahati‐Mowabu, ari bo bene Yezuwe na Yowabu ni 2818;" 
Nehemiah7:12 bene Elamu ni 1254; 
Nehemiah7:13 bene Zatu ni 845; 
Nehemiah7:14 bene Zakayi ni 760; 
Nehemiah7:15 bene Binuwi ni 648; 
Nehemiah7:16 bene Bebayi ni 628; 
Nehemiah7:17 bene Azigadi ni 2322; 
Nehemiah7:18 bene Adonikamu ni 667; 
Nehemiah7:19 bene Biguwayi ni 2067; 
Nehemiah7:20 bene Adini ni 655; 
Nehemiah7:21 bene Ateri, ari bo bene Hizikiya ni 98;" 
Nehemiah7:22 bene Hashumi ni 328; 
Nehemiah7:23 bene Besayi ni 324; 
Nehemiah7:24 bene Harifu ni 112; 
Nehemiah7:25 bene Gibewoni ni 95; 
Nehemiah7:26 abantu b’i Betelehemu n’ab’i Netofa ni 188; 
Nehemiah7:27 abantu b’i Anatoti ni 128; 
Nehemiah7:28 abantu b’i Beti‐Azimaweti ni 42; 
Nehemiah7:29 abantu b’i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu, i Kefira n’i Beyeroti ni 743;" 
Nehemiah7:30 abantu b’i Rama n’ab’i Geba ni 621; 
Nehemiah7:31 abantu b’i Mikimasi ni 122; 
Nehemiah7:32 abantu b’i Beteli n’ab’i Hayi ni 123; 
Nehemiah7:33 abantu b’i Nebo ni 52; 
Nehemiah7:34 bene Elamu wundi ni 1254; 
Nehemiah7:35 bene Harimu ni 320; 
Nehemiah7:36 abantu b’i Yeriko ni 345; 
Nehemiah7:37 abantu b’i Lodi, Hadidi na Ono ni 721;" 
Nehemiah7:38 bene Senaya ni 3930. 
Nehemiah7:39 Abaherezabitambo ni aba: bene Yedaya, ari yo inzu ya Yozuwe, ni 973;" 
Nehemiah7:40 bene Imeri ni 1052; 
Nehemiah7:41 bene Pashuru ni 1247; 
Nehemiah7:42 bene Harimu ni 1017. 
Nehemiah7:43 Abalevi: bene Yozuwe, ari bo Kadamiyeli, Binuwi na Hodiya, ni 74." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abaririmbyi: bene Asafu ni 148. 
Nehemiah7:45 Abanyanzugi: bene Shalumi, bene Ateli, bene Talimoni, bene Akuba, bene Hatita na bene Shobayi, ni 138." 
Nehemiah7:46 Abahereza: bene Siha, bene Hasufa, bene Tabawoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 bene Kerosi, bene Siya, bene Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 bene Lebana, bene Hagaba, bene Shalimayi," 
Nehemiah7:49 bene Hanani, bene Gideli, bene Gahari," 
Nehemiah7:50 bene Reyaya, bene Resini, bene Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 bene Gazamu, bene Uza, bene Paseya," 
Nehemiah7:52 bene Besayi, bene Mewuni, bene Nefisi," 
Nehemiah7:53 bene Bakibuki, bene Hakufa, bene Harihuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 bene Basiliti, bene Mehida, bene Harisha," 
Nehemiah7:55 bene Barikosi, bene Sisera, bene Temahu," 
Nehemiah7:56 bene Nesiya na bene Hatifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Abahungu b’abagaragu ba Salomoni: bene Sotayi, bene Sofereti, bene Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 bene Yala, bene Darikoni, bene Gideli," 
Nehemiah7:59 bene Shefatiya, bene Hatili, bene Pokereti‐Hasebayimu na bene Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Abahereza bose n’abahungu b’abagaragu ba Salomoni, ni 392." 
Nehemiah7:61 Dore kandi n’abandi bazamutse bava i Teli Melahu, i Teli Harisha, i Kerubi, i Adoni, i Imeri; ariko bo ntibashoboye kubona icyemezo cy’uko amazu n’imiryango bavukamo ari iya Israheli koko." 
Nehemiah7:62 Barimo bene Delaya, bene Tobiya, bene Nekoda 642;" 
Nehemiah7:63 bakabamo na bamwe mu baherezabitambo ari bo bene Hobaya, bene Hakosi na bene Barizilayi, wari warashatse umugore mu bakobwa ba Barizilayi w’Umugilihadi, hanyuma akamwitirirwa." 
Nehemiah7:64 Abo bose babashatse mu gitabo cy’amavuko, ariko ntibakibabonamo; ni ko kubafata nk’abahumanye, bavanwa batyo ku murimo w’ubuherezabitambo." 
Nehemiah7:65 Umunyacyubahiro na we ababuza kurya ku biribwa bitagatifu, kugeza ubwo hazaboneka umuherezabitambo wabyemerewe, akabibaza Uhoraho akoresheje ubufindo." 
Nehemiah7:66 Ikoraniro ryose ryari rigizwe n’abantu 42360; 
Nehemiah7:67 utabariyemo abagaragu babo n’abaja, bari 7337; kandi bari bafite abaririmbyi n’abaririmbyikazi 245." 
Nehemiah7:68 Hari ingamiya 435, n’indogobe 6720." 
Nehemiah7:69 Abenshi mu batware b’amazu bazana imfashanyo, bazitangiye icyo gikorwa. Umunyacyubahiro ubwe yashyize mu bubiko amadarakima igihumbi ya zahabu, ibikombe mirongo itanu bakoresha mu isukurwa, atanga n’amakanzu magana atanu na mirongo itatu agenewe abaherezabitambo." 
Nehemiah7:70 Abo batware b’amazu bashyize muri ubwo bubiko amadarakima ibihumbi makumyabiri ya zahabu na mina ibihumbi bibiri na magana abiri bya feza. 
Nehemiah7:71 Naho rubanda, bo batanze amadarakima ibihumbi makumyabiri ya zahabu, mina ibihumbi bibiri bya feza, n’amakanzu mirongo itandatu n’arindwi agenewe abaherezabitambo." 
Nehemiah7:72 Nuko abaherezabitambo, abalevi n’igice kimwe cya rubanda batura i Yeruzalemu; naho abanyanzugi, abaririmbyi, abahereza n’abandi Bayisraheli basigaye, bo basubira mu migi yabo." 
Nehemiah8:1 maze imbaga yongera gukoranira ku kibuga cy’imbere y’Irembo ry’Amazi, bose bashyize hamwe. Nuko babwira Ezira, umwanditsi, ngo azane igitabo cy’Amategeko ya Musa, Uhoraho yari yarahaye Israheli." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ezira umuherezabitambo azana igitabo cy’Amategeko imbere y’ikoraniro ryose. Kuri uwo munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa karindwi, hari hateraniye abagabo, abagore, mbese n’abandi bose baciye akenge." 
Nehemiah8:3 Nuko kuva mu museke kugeza ku manywa y’ihangu, Ezira asomera icyo gitabo aho ku karubanda imbere y’Irembo ry’Amazi, hateraniye abagabo, abagore, mbese n’abandi bose baciye akenge. Imbaga yose yari yitonze, bateze amatwi igitabo cy’Amategeko." 
Nehemiah8:4 Umwanditsi Ezira yari ahagaze ahantu hirengeye bari bamuteguriye bakoresheje ibiti, iburyo bwe hahagaze Matatiya, Shema, Anaya, Uriya, Hilikiya na Maseya; naho ibumoso bwe hahagaze Pedaya, Mikayeli, Malikiya, Hashumu, Hashibadana, Zekariya na Meshulamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezira abumbura igitabo bose bamureba, kuko aho yari ahagaze yabasumbaga uko bangana, maze akimara kukibumbura, imbaga yose irahaguruka." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezira abanza gushimira Uhoraho, Imana y’Igihangange, maze imbaga na yo ishyira amaboko ejuru, bose bakikiriza icyarimwe, bati «Amen! Amen!» Nuko barunama, bapfukamira Uhoraho, bubitse uruhanga ku butaka." 
Nehemiah8:7 Hanyuma Yozuwe, Bani, Sherebiya, Yamini, Akubu, Shabatayi, Hodiya, Maseya, Kelita, Azariya, Yozabadi, Hanani na Pelaya bari abalevi, batangira gusobanura ayo mategeko; naho rubanda bakomeje guhagarara mu myanya yabo." 
Nehemiah8:8 Ibyo Ezira yamaraga gusoma mu gitabo cy’Amategeko y’Imana, yabihinduraga mu rurimi rwa bose kandi akabibasobanurira; maze bakabyumva." 
Nehemiah8:9 Nuko (Nehemiya, Umunyacyubahiro,) Ezira, umuherezabitambo n’umwanditsi, hamwe n’abalevi basobanuriraga rubanda, babwira imbaga bati «Uyu munsi weguriwe Uhoraho, Imana yanyu! Mwigira agahinda nk’aho mwapfushije, kandi mwirira!» Koko kandi, imbaga yari yamaze kumva ayo magambo, maze bose baraturika bararira." 
Nehemiah8:10 Ezira arongera arababwira ati «Nimugende murye inyama z’amatungo y’imishishe, munywe n’inzoga ziryohereye kandi musangire n’abatagize icyo bategura; kuko uyu munsi weguriwe Nyagasani. Ntimugire agahinda, kuko ibyishimo by’Uhoraho ari byo buhungiro bwanyu.»" 
Nehemiah8:11 Maze abalevi na bo bagahoza imbaga, bavuga bati «Nimuceceke, kuko uyu ari umunsi mutagatifu; kandi mwikomeza kugira agahinda!»" 
Nehemiah8:12 Nuko rubanda bose bajya kurya no kunywa, boherereza n’abatagize icyo bategura, maze bose baridagadura; kuko bari bumvise neza ijambo babwiwe." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ku munsi wa kabiri, abatware b’amazu y’umuryango wose, abaherezabitambo n’abalevi, bakoranira iruhande rwa Ezira, umwanditsi, kugira ngo bicengezemo ibivugwa mu Mategeko." 
Nehemiah8:14 Nuko muri ayo Mategeko Uhoraho yari yaratanze akoresheje Musa, basanga ahanditswe ngo «Mu minsi mikuru yo mu kwezi kwa karindwi, abana ba Israheli bazature mu mazu y’ibyatsi.»" 
Nehemiah8:15 Bakibimenya, bahita bohereza mu migi yose n’i Yeruzalemu iri tangazo: «Nimugende mujye mu misozi, muzane amashami y’imizeti ya kimeza, ay’imizeti yahinzwe, ay’ibiti bikorwamo imibavu, ay’imikindo n’ay’ibindi biti bifite amababi menshi, maze muyubakishe amazu, nk’uko byanditswe.»" 
Nehemiah8:16 Nuko rubanda baragenda, bazana amashami bayubakisha amazu matoya hejuru y’ibisenge by’ayo babagamo, mu bibuga byabo, no mu bikari by’Ingoro; ndetse no ku kibuga cy’imbere y’Irembo ry’Amazi n’icy’imbere y’irya Efurayimu na ho barayahubaka." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ikoraniro ry’abagarutse bava aho bari barajyanywe bunyago, bose bubaka bene ayo mazu y’ibyatsi kandi bakayabamo. Kuva mu gihe cya Yozuwe mwene Nuni kugeza ubwo, nta bundi bigeze bakora nk’ibyo; kandi bose bari banezerewe cyane." 
Nehemiah8:18 Buri munsi, kuva ku wa mbere kugeza ku wa nyuma, basomaga mu gitabo cy’Amategeko y’Imana. Ibyo birori, babyizihije mu minsi irindwi yose, maze ku munsi wa munani bongera gukoranira hamwe, nk’uko byari bitegetswe." 
Nehemiah9:1 Ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’ine w’uko kwezi, Abayisraheli barongera bakoranira hamwe kugira ngo basibe; bose baza bambaye ibigunira kandi binyanyagijeho umukungugu." 
Nehemiah9:2 Nuko abo mu bwoko bwa Israheli bivangura n’abanyamahanga, maze bishinja ibyaha byabo, barabyicuza, hamwe n’iby’abasekuruza babo." 
Nehemiah9:3 Hanyuma barahaguruka, bamara igice cya kane cy’umunsi basomerwa igitabo cy’Amategeko y’Uhoraho Imana yabo, buri wese agihagaze mu mwanya we; naho mu kindi gice cya kane cy’umunsi, bapfukama imbere y’Uhoraho, basaba imbabazi z’ibyaha byabo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Nyuma y’ibyo Yozuwe hamwe na Bani, Kadamiyeli, Shebaniya, Buni, Sherebiya, Bani na Kenani, bahaguruka aho bari mu mwanya wagenewe abalevi, maze barangurura ijwi, batakambira Uhoraho, Imana yabo." 
Nehemiah9:5 Nuko Yozuwe, Kadamiyeli, Bani, Hashabineya, Sherebiya, Hodiya, Shebaniya na Petahiya b’abalevi, baravuga bati «Nimuhaguruke! Nimusingize Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, ubu n’iteka ryose! Haragasingizwa Izina ryawe ry’ikuzo, ryo rirenze uko dushobora kurishima no kurisingiza.»" 
Nehemiah9:6 Nuko Ezira aravuga ati «Ni wowe wenyine Uhoraho! Ni wowe waremye ijuru, urema ikirere n’ingabo zacyo zose; isi uyiremana n’ibiyiriho byose, hamwe n’inyanja n’ibiyibamo; ibyo byose ni wowe bikesha kubaho kandi n’ingabo zo mu ijuru, imbere yawe zirunama." 
Nehemiah9:7 Uhoraho, ni wowe Mana, wihitiyemo Abramu, umuvana muri Uri y’Abakalideya, maze umwihera izina yitwa Abrahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Wabonye ko umutima we ukunogeye, maze ugirana na we isezerano ryo kuzamugabira iki gihugu cyari gituwe n’Abakanahani, Abaheti n’Abahemori, hamwe n’Abaperezi, Abayebuzi n’Abagirigashi, kugira ngo abamukomokaho bazagiture, kandi iryo wavuze ryaratashye, kuko wowe uri indahemuka!" 
Nehemiah9:9 Witegereje ibyago abasokuruza bacu bagiriye mu Misiri, maze ugutakamba kwabo ukumvira hafi y’Inyanja y’Urufunzo." 
Nehemiah9:10 Weretse Farawo ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza byinshi, abagaragu be n’abatuye igihugu cye ubigirizaho nkana, kuko wari uzi ko bishongoye ku bakurambere bacu, maze izina ryawe riba ikirangirire, kuva ubwo na n’ubu." 
Nehemiah9:11 Inyanja wayibaciriyemo icyambu, bayinyuramo rwagati humutse, naho abari babahomereye, ubabirindurira ikuzimu, nk’ibuye baroshye mu mazi magari." 
Nehemiah9:12 Wabayoboreshaga inkingi y’igicu ku manywa, na ho nijoro ukabayoboresha inkingi y’umuriro, ugira ngo ubamurikire mu nzira banyuramo." 
Nehemiah9:13 Wamanukiye ku musozi wa Sinayi, maze aho uri mu ijuru ukavugana na bo, ubaha amabwiriza azira kubera, n’amategeko atunganye, hamwe n’amateka n’amatangazo aboneye." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wabamenyesheje sabato yawe ntagatifu, maze ubaha amabwiriza, amategeko n’amateka, ukoresheje Musa umugaragu wawe." 
Nehemiah9:15 Wabamanuriye umugati mu ijuru ngo ubamare inzara, ubavuburira n’amazi mu rutare ngo abamare inyota. Wabategetse kuza muri iki gihugu ngo bakigarurire, kuko wari warakibasezeranyije, ugeretseho indahiro." 
Nehemiah9:16 Ariko abasokuruza bacu bo, bakwishongoyeho, bagushingana ijosi, banga kubahiriza amategeko yawe." 
Nehemiah9:17 Banze kumvira, biyibagiza ibyiza byose wabagiriye, bagushinganye ijosi, basigara bifuza kwisubirira mu bucakara bwo mu Misiri. Nyamara wowe, kuko uri Imana Nyir’imbabazi, ukaba umugwaneza n’umunyampuhwe, kandi ugatinda kurakara, n’impuhwe zawe ntizigereranywe, ntiwigeze ubatererana." 
Nehemiah9:18 N’igihe bayazaga ibyuma, bakabyicuriramo inyana, hanyuma bakavuga bati ’Dore Imana yawe yagukuye mu Misiri’, kandi bagakora n’ibindi bibi byinshi bakakubabaza;" 
Nehemiah9:19 wowe, kubera impuhwe zawe zitagereranywa, ntiwigeze ubatereranira mu butayu; inkingi y’igicu yakomeje kubayobora inzira ku manywa, naho nijoro inzira bakayiyoborwa n’inkingi y’umuriro." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wabamanuriyeho umwuka wawe mwiza, kugira ngo bamenye gushishoza; manu yawe bayihozaga mu itama, ukabaha n’amazi ngo bice akanyota." 
Nehemiah9:21 Mu myaka mirongo ine bamaze mu butayu wabamenyeraga ikibatunga, nta n’ikindi bigeze bashaka ngo bakibure, imyambaro yabo ntiyabashiriyeho, n’ibirenge byabo ntibyabyimbagana." 
Nehemiah9:22 Wabeguriye ingoma z’abami, ubagabira ibihugu, ibihugu bahana imbibi barabitura, bigarurira icya Sihoni, umwami wa Heshiboni, n’icya Ogi, umwami wa Bashani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Wabagwirije urubyaro, rungana n’inyenyeri zo ku ijuru, maze ubacyura mu gihugu wari warasezeranyije abakurambere babo, ko bazakinjiramo, bakagitura." 
Nehemiah9:24 Abana babo bagitashyemo, maze barakigarurira, Abakanahani bari bagituye, ubacisha bugufi imbere yabo, kimwe n’abami babo n’imiryango yose yo mu gihugu, maze urababagabiza ngo babakoreshe uko bashatse." 
Nehemiah9:25 Bigaruriye imigi yubakiye n’ubutaka burumbuka, batura mu mazu arimo ibyiza by’amoko yose, amariba afukuye, imizabibu n’imizeti biba ibyabo, ndetse n’ibiti byera imbuto bitagira uko bingana. Barariye barahaga, baranabyibuha, maze baradamarara kubera ineza yawe." 
Nehemiah9:26 Nyamara bo barakwivumburiye, bakwivumbagatanyaho, amategeko yawe bayahigikira kure, bica abahanuzi bawe bababwirizaga kukugarukira, kandi bakora n’ibindi bibi byinshi, birakubabaza." 
Nehemiah9:27 Ni bwo ubagabije abanzi babo barabashikamira, ariko mu kababaro kabo baragutakira, maze aho uri aho mu ijuru urabumva, kubera impuhwe ugira uboherereza abatabazi, ngo babakure mu nzara z’abanzi babo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Nyamara ihumure ryataha, bakongera gukora ibitakunyuze, nawe ukabatererana, abanzi babo bakabashikamira. Ariko bakongera gutera hejuru bagutabaza, aho uri, aho mu ijuru ukabumva; nuko kubera impuhwe zawe, ubarokora utyo incuro nyinshi." 
Nehemiah9:29 Warabihanangirije ngo bagarukire Amategeko yawe, naho bo barushaho kwishongora, basuzugura amategeko yawe, amabwiriza yawe bayarengaho, kandi ari yo aronkera ubuzima abayakurikiza. Bateruye intugu baba rubebe, bagushingana ijosi, banga kumvira." 
Nehemiah9:30 Warabihanije, imyaka ishira ari myinshi, ubamanuriraho umwuka wawe, urabihanangiriza, ndetse uboherereza n’abahanuzi, ariko bo banga kumva, maze worohera indi miryango yo mu bihugu, irabigabiza." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ariko kubera impuhwe zawe zitagereranywa, ntiwabatsembye cyangwa se ngo ubatererane, kuko uri Imana igwa neza, ukaba Nyir’impuhwe," 
Nehemiah9:32 None rero, Mana yacu, wowe Mana Musumba byose, ukaba umudatsimburwa n’igihangange, wowe ukomeza isererano ryawe, nturanganwe ubuhemu, wijenjekera aya makuba twagize, akagwirira abami n’abatware bacu, hamwe n’abaherezabitambo, abahanuzi n’abasokuruza bacu, ndetse n’umuryango wawe wose, kuva mu gihe cy’umwami wa Ashuru kugeza na n’ubu." 
Nehemiah9:33 Watubereye intabera mu byatubayeho byose, wowe wakurikiranye ukuri, naho twebwe twarahemutse." 
Nehemiah9:34 Ni byo koko, abami n’abatware bacu, hamwe n’abaherezabitambo ndetse n’abasokuruza, banze gukurikiza amategeko, amateka yawe ntibayitaho, basuzugura n’amabwiriza yawe." 
Nehemiah9:35 Mu gihe bari mu gihugu, bagitungiyemo byinshi wari wabihereye; mu gihugu kigari kandi kirumbuka wari wabagabiye, bo banze kukuyoboka, ntibisubiraho mu bikorwa byabo bibi." 
Nehemiah9:36 None ubu dore twabaye abacakara, n’igihugu wahaye abasokuruza bacu ngo kizabatunge, ni twebwe dusigaye tugihatswemo." 
Nehemiah9:37 Umusaruro w’iki gihugu urarumbuka, nyamara wikubirwa n’abami watugabije uduhora ibyaha byacu; badutwara uko bashaka kimwe n’amatungo yacu. Mbega amakuba turimo!»" 
Nehemiah10:1 Kubera ibyo byatubayeho, dufashe ibyemezo bidakuka kandi biranditswe, ndetse n’abatware bacu, abalevi, n’abaherezabitambo babishyizeho umukono." 
Nehemiah10:2 Abashyize umukono kuri iyo nyandiko ni aba: Nehemiya, mwene Hakaliya; hamwe na Sidikiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 Seraya, Azariya, Yirimeya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Pashuru, Amariya, Malikiya," 
Nehemiah10:5 Hatushi, Shebaniya, Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:6 Harimu, Meremoti, Obadiya," 
Nehemiah10:7 Daniyeli, Ginetoni, Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:8 Meshulamu, Abiya, Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:9 Maziya, Biligayi na Shemaya. Abo bari abaherezabitambo." 
Nehemiah10:10 Abalevi ni Yozuwe mwene Azaniya, Binuwi wo muri bene Henadadi, Kadamiyeli," 
Nehemiah10:11 hamwe n’abavandimwe babo Shekaniya, Hodiya, Kelita, Pelaya, Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:12 Mika, Rehobu, Hashabiya," 
Nehemiah10:13 Zakuru, Sherebiya, Shebaniya," 
Nehemiah10:14 Hodiya, Bani na Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:15 Abatware b’umuryango ni Parewoshi, Pahati‐Mowabu, Elamu, Zatu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:16 Buni, Azigadi, Bebayi," 
Nehemiah10:17 Adoniya, Biguwayi, Adini," 
Nehemiah10:18 Ateri, Hizikiya, Azuri," 
Nehemiah10:19 Hodiya, Hashumu, Besayi," 
Nehemiah10:20 Harifu, Anatoti, Nobayi," 
Nehemiah10:21 Magipiyashi, Meshulamu, Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:22 Meshezabeli, Sadoki, Yaduwa," 
Nehemiah10:23 Palatiya, Hanani, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:24 Hosheya, Hananiya, Hashubu," 
Nehemiah10:25 Haloheshi, Pilaha, Shobeki," 
Nehemiah10:26 Rehumu, Hashabina, Maseya," 
Nehemiah10:27 Ahiya, Hanani, Anani," 
Nehemiah10:28 Maluki, Harimu na Bahana." 
Nehemiah10:29 Naho ba rubanda basigaye, abaherezabitambo, abalevi, abanyanzugi, abaririmbyi n’abahereza — mbese abari bitandukanyije n’abanyamahanga batuye igihugu kugira ngo begukire amategeko Uhoraho yatanze akoresheje Musa umugaragu we, n’abandi bose bari baciye akenge —" 
Nehemiah10:30 na bo bifatanya n’abavandimwe babo n’abatware babo. Biyemeza gukurikiza amategeko Uhoraho yavugishije Musa umugaragu we, no kubahiriza amatangazo, amabwiriza n’amateka ye, kandi barabirahirira." 
Nehemiah10:31 Twese rero, twiyemeje ko abanyamahanga batuye iki gihugu tutazabashyingira abakobwa bacu, kandi n’ababo ntituzabashakira abahungu bacu." 
Nehemiah10:32 Abo bantu nibaza gucuruza imyaka, cyangwa se ibindi biribwa ku isabato, nta cyo tuzabagurira kuri uwo munsi, habe no ku wundi munsi mukuru. Kandi tuzajya turaza ubutaka, uko umwaka wa karindwi ugeze, n’abaturimo imyenda tuyibarekere." 
Nehemiah10:33 Twemeje kandi ko buri mwaka tuzajya dutanga icya gatatu cya sikeli kubera imirimo y’Ingoro y’Imana yacu. 
Nehemiah10:34 Ayo masikeli ni yo azagurwamo imigati y’umumuriko, ibitambo by’ubuhoro n’ibitambo bitwikwa bya buri munsi, hamwe n’ibyo ku masabato, mu mboneko z’ukwezi, ku minsi mikuru, ndetse n’amaturo matagatifu n’ibitambo byo guhongerera ibyaha bya Israheli; mbese imihango yose ikorerwa mu Ngoro y’Imana yacu." 
Nehemiah10:35 Dukoresheje ubufindo, twagennye igihe cyo mu mwaka buri muntu, yaba umuherezabitambo, umulevi cyangwa se undi wo muri rubanda, azajya agemura inkwi mu Ngoro y’Imana yacu; igihe cyabo nikigera abantu bo muri buri nzu, bazajya bazizana, kugira ngo zitwikirwe ku rutambiro rw’Uhoraho Imana yacu, nk’uko byanditswe mu Mategeko." 
Nehemiah10:36 Twiyemeje kandi ko buri mwaka tuzajya duha Ingoro y’Uhoraho umuganura w’ibyo tuzasarura mbere mu masambu yacu, n’imbuto zizera mbere ku biti byose," 
Nehemiah10:37 hamwe n’abana b’imfura b’abahungu bacu n’amariza yo mu bushyo bwacu, nk’uko byanditswe mu Mategeko. Amariza y’amatungo yacu magufi n’ay’amaremare azazanwa mu Ngoro y’Imana yacu, tuyashyikirize abaherezabitambo bakora imirimo yo mu Ngoro y’Imana yacu." 
Nehemiah10:38 Amafu tuzasya n’imbuto tuzasarura mbere, hamwe na divayi nshya n’amavuta, tuzabizanira abaherezabitambo, maze babibike mu byumba by’Ingoro bibigenewe, naho abalevi bahabwe igice cya cumi cy’ibizaba byasaruwe mu mirima yacu. Icyo gice cya cumi kandi, abalevi ni bo bazaza kukitwiyakira mu migi yose dutuyemo." 
Nehemiah10:39 Abalevi nibaza gusaruza icyo kimwe cya cumi, bazaba bari kumwe n’umuherezabitambo umwe wo muri bene Aroni, kugira ngo umugabane umwe wa cumi w’icyo kimwe cya cumi wegurirwe Ingoro y’Imana yacu, maze babigeze mu byumba by’inzu y’ububiko." 
Nehemiah10:40 Ibyo byumba kandi ni byo Abayisraheli n’abalevi bazajya babikamo ingano, divayi nshya n’amavuta y’imizeti bizatangwaho amaturo; ni ho hazabikwa ibikoreshwa mu Ngoro, hamwe n’ibigenewe abaherezabitambo bari ku gihe, abanyanzugi, n’abaririmbyi. Bityo ntituzongera kureka Ingoro y’Imana yacu icura igihunya." 
Nehemiah11:1 Nuko abatware b’umuryango wose baraza batura i Yeruzalemu. Rubanda basigaye bo, hakoreshwa ubufindo kugira ngo ku bantu icumi, umwe aze ature muri Yeruzalemu, umugi mutagatifu, naho icyenda bandi bagume mu migi yabo." 
Nehemiah11:2 Imbaga ishimira abantu bose bari biyemeje kuza gutura i Yeruzalemu, babyishakiye." 
Nehemiah11:3 Dore amazina y’abatware bo muri ako karere biyemeje gutura i Yeruzalemu. Naho Abayisraheli bandi, baba abaherezabitambo, abalevi, abahereza cyangwa se abahungu b’abagaragu ba Salomoni, bo bakwiriye imigi ya Yuda, buri wese atura mu isambu ye." 
Nehemiah11:4 I Yeruzalemu hatuwe na bene Yuda hamwe na bene Benyamini: Muri bene Yuda ni: Ataya mwene Uziya, mwene Zekariya, mwene Amariya, mwene Shefatiya, mwene Mahalaleli wo muri bene Pereshi;" 
Nehemiah11:5 na Maseya mwene Baruki, mwene Kolihoze, mwene Hazaya, mwene Adaya, mwene Yoyaribu, mwene Zekariya, mwene Shela." 
Nehemiah11:6 Bene Pereshi bose batuye i Yeruzalemu, bari abagabo 468 b’intwari." 
Nehemiah11:7 Naho bene Benyamini, ni Salu mwene Meshulamu, mwene Yowedi, mwene Pedaya, mwene Kolaya, mwene Maseya, mwene Itiyeli, mwene Yeshaya," 
Nehemiah11:8 hamwe n’abavandimwe be Gabayi na Salayi; bose hamwe bakaba 928. 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoweli mwene Zikuri yari umutegeka wabo, naho Yehuda mwene Hasenuwa akaba uwa kabiri mu butegetsi bw’umugi." 
Nehemiah11:10 Mu baherezabitambo, ni Yedaya mwene Yoyaribu, Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya mwene Hilikiya, mwene Meshulamu, mwene Sadoki, mwene Merayoti, mwene Ahitubi wategekaga Ingoro y’Imana," 
Nehemiah11:12 hamwe n’abavandimwe babo bakoraga mu Ngoro y’Imana; bose hamwe bakaba 822. Hari Adaya mwene Yerohamu, mwene Pelaliya, mwene Amisi, mwene Zekariya, mwene Pashuru, mwene Malikiya," 
Nehemiah11:13 n’abavandimwe be b’abatware b’amazu; bose hamwe bari 242. Hari na Amasayi mwene Azareli, mwene Ahizayi, mwene Meshilemoti, mwene Imeri," 
Nehemiah11:14 n’abavandimwe be, bose hamwe bari abagabo 128 b’intwari. Umutegeka wabo yari Zabadiyeli mwene Hagadoli." 
Nehemiah11:15 Mu Balevi, ni Shemaya mwene Hashubi, mwene Azirikamu, mwene Hashabiya, mwene Buni," 
Nehemiah11:16 hamwe na Shabatayi na Yozabadi, bari abatware b’abalevi, bashinzwe imirimo yo hanze ku Ngoro y’Imana." 
Nehemiah11:17 Hari Mataniya mwene Mika, mwene Zabadi, mwene Asafu wayoboraga indirimbo, agatera isengesho ryo gushimira. Hari na Bakibukiya uwa kabiri mu bavandimwe be, na Abuda mwene Shamuwa, mwene Galali, mwene Yedutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abalevi bose bari batuye mu Murwa Mutagatifu ni 284. 
Nehemiah11:19 Mu banyanzugi, ni Akubu, Talimoni hamwe n’abavandimwe babo barindaga amarembo, bose hamwe bari 172." 
Nehemiah11:20 Naho abandi Bayisraheli basigaye, abaherezabitambo n’abalevi, bo bakwiriye mu migi ya Yuda, buri wese atura mu munani we." 
Nehemiah11:21 Abahereza bari batuye muri Ofeli; Siha na Gishipa bakaba abatware babo. 
Nehemiah11:22 Umutware w’abalevi b’i Yeruzalemu yari Uzi, mwene Bani, mwene Hashabiya, mwene Mataniya, mwene Mika; yari umwe muri bene Asafu, baririmbaga mu Ngoro y’Imana." 
Nehemiah11:23 Koko kandi umwami yari yarabahaye amategeko n’amabwiriza kugira ngo buri munsi bashobore kurangiza neza uwo murimo wabo w’abaririmbyi. 
Nehemiah11:24 Petahiya mwene Meshezabeli wo muri bene Zerahi, mwene Yehuda, ni we wahagarariraga umwami, agakemura ibibazo byose byerekeye imbaga." 
Nehemiah11:25 Naho mu nsisiro zo ku misozi, Abayuda batuye i Kiriyati‐Araba no mu midugudu yaho; i Diboni no mu midugudu yaho, i Yekabuseli no mu nsisiro zaho;" 
Nehemiah11:26 i Yeshuwa, i Molada, i Betipeleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 i Hasari‐Shuwali, i Berisheba no mu midugudu yaho;" 
Nehemiah11:28 i Sikilage, i Mekona no mu nsisiro zaho;" 
Nehemiah11:29 i Eni‐Rimoni, i Soreya, i Yarimuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 i Zanowa, i Adulamu no mu midugudu yaho; i Lakishi no mu misozi yaho; i Azeka no mu midugudu yaho. Batura kuva i Berisheba kugeza ku kabande ka Hinomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ababenyamini bo batuye bahereye i Geba, i Mikimasi, i Aya, i Beteli no mu midugudu yaho;" 
Nehemiah11:32 i Anatoti, i Nobu, i Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 i Hasori, i Rama, i Gitayimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 i Hadidi, i Seboyimu, i Nebalati," 
Nehemiah11:35 i Lodi n’i Ono, ku kibaya cy’abashongesha ibyuma." 
Nehemiah11:36 Bamwe mu balevi bo mu turere twa Yuda, bajya guturana n’Ababenyamini." 
Nehemiah12:1 Dore abaherezabitambo n’abalevi bazanye na Zorobabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli, na Yozuwe: ni Seraya, Yirimeya, Ezira," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amariya, Maluki, Hatushi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekaniya, Rehumu, Meremoti," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginetoni, Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamini, Madiya, Biliga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaya, Yoyaribu, Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amoki, Hilikiya na Yedaya. Abo bari abatware b’abaherezabitambo n’ab’abavandimwe babo, mu gihe cya Yozuwe." 
Nehemiah12:8 Abalevi ni Yozuwe, Binuwi, Kadamiyeli, Sherebiya, Yehuda, na Mataniya; ni we wateraga indirimbo z’ibisingizo hamwe n’abavandimwe be." 
Nehemiah12:9 Naho Bakibukiya na Uni hamwe n’abavandimwe babo, babahagararaga imbere, buri wese mu cyiciro cye." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yozuwe abyara Yoyakimu, Yoyakimu abyara Eliyashibu, Eliyashibu abyara Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada abyara Yonatani, Yonatani abyara Yaduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Abaherezabitambo bari abatware b’amazu yabo mu gihe cya Yoyakimu ni aba: kwa Seraya ni Meraya; kwa Yirimeya ni Hananiya; 
Nehemiah12:13 kwa Ezira ni Meshulamu; kwa Amariya ni Yehohanani; 
Nehemiah12:14 kwa Maluki ni Yonatani; kwa Shekaniya ni Yozefu; 
Nehemiah12:15 kwa Harimu ni Adina; kwa Merayoti ni Helikayi; 
Nehemiah12:16 kwa Ido ni Zekariya; kwa Ginetoni ni Meshulamu; 
Nehemiah12:17 kwa Abiya ni Zikiri; kwa Minyamini ni...; kwa Moyadiya ni Pilitayi; 
Nehemiah12:18 kwa Biliga ni Shamuwa; kwa Shemaya ni Yehonatani; 
Nehemiah12:19 kwa Yoyaribu ni Matenayi; kwa Yedaya ni Uzi; 
Nehemiah12:20 kwa Salayi ni Kalayi; kwa Amoki ni Eberi; 
Nehemiah12:21 kwa Hilikiya ni Hashabiya; kwa Yedaya ni Netaneli. 
Nehemiah12:22 Mu gihe cya ba Eliyashibu, Yoyada, Yohanani na Yaduwa, ni ho abatware b’amazu y’abaherezabitambo banditswe, kugeza ku ngoma ya Dariyusi, umwami w’Abaperisi." 
Nehemiah12:23 Bene Levi babaye abatware b’amazu, na bo banditswe mu gitabo cy’Amateka, kugeza mu gihe cya Yohanani mwene Eliyashibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Abatware b’abalevi ni aba: Hashabiya, Sherebiya, Yozuwe, Binuwi, Kadamiyeli; bahagararaga bateganye n’abavandimwe babo, nk’uko Musa, umuntu w’Imana, yabitegetse, maze bagatera indirimbo zo gusingiza no gushimira, bakikiranya." 
Nehemiah12:25 Naho Mataniya, Bakibukiya, Obadiya, Meshulamu, Talimoni na Akubu, bo bari abanyanzugi; bakarinda amazu y’ububiko yari hafi y’amarembo." 
Nehemiah12:26 Babayeho mu gihe cya Yoyakimu mwene Yozuwe, mwene Yosadaki; ni na bwo Nehemiya yari umutware, naho Ezira ari umuherezabitambo n’umwigishamategeko." 
Nehemiah12:27 Igihe cyo gutaha inkike za Yeruzalemu kigeze, bajya gushaka abalevi aho babaga mu migi yabo ngo babazane i Yeruzalemu, kugira ngo baze bahimbaze ibyo birori, baririmbe indirimbo z’ibisingizo bavuza ibyuma birangira, inanga n’imiduri." 
Nehemiah12:28 Abaririmbyi, bene Levi, bakoranira i Yeruzalemu bavuye mu turere tuyikikije; baje baturutse mu nsisiro za Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 i Beti‐Giligali no mu misozi ya Geba na Azimaweti. Koko kandi abaririmbyi bari barubatse insisiro zabo mu karere ka Yeruzalemu. 
Nehemiah12:30 Nuko abaherezabitambo n’abalevi barisukura; hanyuma basukura n’imbaga yose, ndetse n’amarembo n’inkike zose." 
Nehemiah12:31 Nyuma y’ibyo, nuriza abatware ba Yuda bajya hejuru ku nkike, maze abaririmbyi na bo mbagabanyamo imitwe ibiri. Abo mu mutwe wa mbere banyura iburyo bagenda hejuru y’urukuta, berekeza ku Irembo ry’Imyanda." 
Nehemiah12:32 Inyuma yabo hakurikiraho Hoshaya, ari kumwe n’igice cya kabiri cy’abatware ba Yuda," 
Nehemiah12:33 hamwe na Azariya, Ezira, Meshulamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yehuda, Miyamini, Shemaya na Yirimeya," 
Nehemiah12:35 bari batoranyijwe mu baherezabitambo, kandi bafite amakondera. Bakurikirwa na Zekariya mwene Yonatani, mwene Shemaya, mwene Mataniya, mwene Mikaya, mwene Zakuri, mwene Asafu," 
Nehemiah12:36 hamwe n’abavandimwe be, Shemaya, Azareli, Milalayi, Gilalayi, Mayi, Netaneli, Yehuda, na Hanani; bose bafite ibikoresho byo kuririmba, nk’uko byategetswe na Dawudi umugaragu w’Imana. Ubwo kandi Ezira umwigishamategeko, ni we wari ubarangaje imbere." 
Nehemiah12:37 Bageze ku Irembo ry’Isoko, barombereza inzira, bazamuka ku madarajya y’umurwa wa Dawudi, barurira bajya hejuru y’inkike ibangikanye n’ingoro ya Dawudi, barakomeza baragenda maze bagera ku Irembo ry’Amazi, mu burasirazuba." 
Nehemiah12:38 Undi mutwe w’abaririmbyi, wo ugana ibumoso. Nanjye ubwanjye ndabakurikira, hamwe n’ikindi gice cya kabiri cy’abatware b’umuryango; tugenda hejuru y’inkike kuva ku munara w’Amatanura kugera ku Nkike Ngari." 
Nehemiah12:39 Turakomeza no hejuru y’Irembo rya Efurayimu, irya Yeshana n’iry’Amafi, turombereza inzira tugera ku munara wa Hananeli no ku uw’Ijana, maze tunyura ku Irembo ry’Intama, tugeze ku Irembo ry’Abarinzi turahagarara." 
Nehemiah12:40 Nuko ya mitwe yombi iraza, yinjira mu Ngoro y’Imana, bafata imyanya; nanjye ninjirana n’igice cya kabiri cy’abatware twari kumwe." 
Nehemiah12:41 Hari kandi n’abaherezabitambo: Eliyakimu, Maseya, Minyamini, Mikaya, Eliyonayi, Zekariya, na Hananiya, bari bafite amakondera;" 
Nehemiah12:42 hamwe na Maseya, Shemaya, Eleyazari, Uzi, Yehohanani, Malikiya, Elamu na Ezeri. Nuko abaririmbyi baratangira bararirimba, bayobowe na Yizirahiya." 
Nehemiah12:43 Maze uwo munsi batura ibitambo bitagira ingano kandi barishima cyane, kuko Imana yari yabahaye ikibanezereza. Abagore n’abana na bo barishima cyane; maze ibyishimo bya Yeruzalemu biramenyekana, bigera no mu misozi ya kure." 
Nehemiah12:44 Uwo munsi nyine, hashyirwaho abantu bashinzwe kurinda ibyumba bibikwamo amaturo, imiganura n’ibice bya cumi; kugira ngo bajye babikoranyirizamo ibyasaruzwaga mu migi, biteganyirijwe abaherezabitambo n’abalevi, nk’uko amategeko abigena. Koko kandi Yuda yari ishyigikiye umuherezabitambo cyangwa umulevi wese wabaga ari ku gihe." 
Nehemiah12:45 Bakoreraga Imana kandi bakarangiza n’imihango yo gusukura, babifashijwemo n’abaririmbyi n’abanyanzugi, bose bakabigenza uko Dawudi na Salomoni umuhungu we, bari barabitegetse." 
Nehemiah12:46 N’ubundi koko kuva na kera, mu gihe Dawudi yari akiriho, Asafu ni we wari umutware w’abaririmbyi, kandi bari barahimbye n’indirimbo z’ibisingizo n’izo gushimira." 
Nehemiah12:47 Ikindi kandi, no mu gihe cya Zorobabeli na Nehemiya, Israheli yatangaga umugabane wa buri munsi ugenewe abaririmbyi n’abanyanzugi. Naho abalevi bashyikirizwaga amaturo matagatifu, na bo bakayahamo bene Aroni umugabane ubagenewe." 
Nehemiah13:1 Uwo munsi kandi, basomera imbaga yose igitabo cya Musa maze bagisangamo ahanditswe ngo «Umuhamoni n’Umumowabu ntibazinjire na rimwe mu ikoraniro ry’Imana," 
Nehemiah13:2 kuko batasanganije Israheli umugati n’amazi, ahubwo bakagurira Balamu ngo ayivume, ariko iyo mivumo Imana ikayibahinduriramo imigisha.»" 
Nehemiah13:3 Ngo bumve iryo tegeko, bahera ko barobanura muri Israheli abanyamahanga bose bari babivanzemo." 
Nehemiah13:4 Muri icyo gihe, umuherezabitambo Eliyashibu ni we wari ushinzwe gucunga ibyumba byometse ku Ngoro y’Imana yacu. Kubera ko yari mwene wabo wa Tobiya," 
Nehemiah13:5 amutiza icyumba kinini bari basanzwe babikamo amaturo, imibavu, ibikoresho, ibice bya cumi by’ingano, divayi nshya n’amavuta, hamwe n’ibyabaga biteganyirijwe abalevi, abaririmbyi n’abanyanzugi, n’ibigenewe abaherezabitambo." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ibyo byose byabaye ntari i Yeruzalemu, kuko mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n’ibiri w’ingoma ye, nari nasanze umwami Aritashuweru. Nuko mpamaze iminsi, nsaba umwami uruhusa, ngaruka i Yeruzalemu." 
Nehemiah13:7 Mpageze menya ko Eliyashibu yakoze ishyano, agatiza Tobiya icyumba cyo mu gikari cy’Ingoro." 
Nehemiah13:8 Birandakaza cyane, maze njugunyanga hanze ibyo Tobiya yari yabitse muri icyo cyumba byose." 
Nehemiah13:9 Hanyuma ntegeka ko basukura ibyumba, bakabisubizamo ibikoresho by’Ingoro y’Imana, hamwe n’amaturo n’imibavu." 
Nehemiah13:10 Nongera kumenya ko imigabane igenewe abalevi itatanzwe, maze bituma abalevi n’abaririmbyi bata imirimo yabo, buri wese yisubirira mu isambu ye." 
Nehemiah13:11 Nuko ntonganya cyane abatware, ndababwira nti «Ni iki cyatumye mwemera ko Ingoro y’Imana isigara aho yonyine?» Nkoranya abalevi n’abaririmbyi, maze mbasubiza ku mirimo yabo;" 
Nehemiah13:12 na Yuda yose izana ingano, hamwe na divayi nshya n’amavuta y’imizeti, maze bishyirwa mu byumba by’ububiko." 
Nehemiah13:13 Hanyuma ibyo byumba by’ububiko mbishinga Sheremiya umuherezabitambo, Sadoki umwanditsi, na Pedaya, umwe mu balevi, hamwe na Hanani mwene Zakuri, mwene Mataniya; kuko bose bari bazwiho kuba inyangamugayo. Bari bashinzwe kugabanya ayo maturo, mu bavandimwe babo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Mana yanjye, urajye unyibuka kubera ibyo nakoze, kandi ntuzibagirwe umurava nagize mu gukorera Ingoro yawe, nkayubahiriza." 
Nehemiah13:15 Muri iyo minsi kandi, nkajya mbona abantu bamwe bo muri Yuda barabyiganira ku rwengero ku munsi w’isabato, naho abandi bahekesheje indogobe za divayi, imizabibu, imitini hamwe n’iyindi mitwaro y’amoko yose; bagiye kubicururiza i Yeruzalemu ku munsi w’isabato. Nuko mpita mbihanangiriza bariho bacuruza." 
Nehemiah13:16 Hari kandi n’Abanyatiri bari batuye i Yeruzalemu, bagatumiza amafi n’ibindi by’amoko yose, bakabihacururiza ku munsi w’isabato, babigura n’abantu bo muri Yuda." 
Nehemiah13:17 Nuko ntonganya abanyacyubahiro bo muri Yuda, maze ndababwira nti «Mbega ngo murakora ishyano mugatesha agaciro umunsi w’isabato!" 
Nehemiah13:18 Abasokuruza banyu se, na bo si ko babigenje, bigatuma Imana iduteza ibi byago, ikabiteza n’uyu mugi? None namwe murashaka gukaza uburakari ifitiye Israheli, mwanga kubahiriza umunsi w’isabato!»" 
Nehemiah13:19 Sabato iraye iri bube, mu mugoroba w’akabwibwi, ntegeka ko inzugi za Yeruzalemu bazikinga, bakazishyiraho ibihindizo maze zikazakingurwa sabato irangiye; ndetse nshyiraho n’abarinzi kugira ngo hatagira umutwaro n’umwe uzinjizwa kuri uwo munsi." 
Nehemiah13:20 Nuko abacuruzaga n’abadandazaga ibintu by’amoko yose, baguma inyuma y’umugi wa Yeruzalemu, bamwe baharara ijoro rimwe, abandi abiri." 
Nehemiah13:21 Maze ndabihanangiriza, ndababwira nti «Ni iki cyatumye muza kurara inyuma y’inkike? Muramenye! Nimwongera nzabafatisha!» Nuko kuva ubwo ntibongera kugaruka ku munsi w’isabato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Hanyuma ntegeka abalevi kwisukura no kujya kurinda amarembo, kugira ngo umunsi w’isabato wubahirizwe. Mana yanjye, n’ibyo bizatume ujya uhora unyibuka, maze unyirindire kubera ubudahemuka bwawe butagereranywa." 
Nehemiah13:23 Muri iyo minsi kandi, nkabona Abayahudi bari barashatse abagore b’Abashidodi, Abahamoni, n’Abamowabu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Igice cya kabiri cy’abana babo bavuga igishidodi cyangwa se urundi rurimi rwo mu mahanga; batazi kuvuga ikiyahudi. 
Nehemiah13:25 Nuko ndabatonganya, ndabavumagura, ndetse bamwe ndabakubita, mbapfura n’imisatsi; maze mbarahira Imana, mvuga nti «Abakobwa banyu ntimukabashyingire abahungu babo, kandi n’ababo ntimukabarongore cyangwa se ngo mubashakire abahungu banyu." 
Nehemiah13:26 Mbese si nk’uko Salomoni, umwami wa Israheli, yacumuye? Nyamara kandi, no mu mahanga menshi atabarika, nta wundi mwami wahwanye na we; Imana yaramwikundiye, maze imugira umwami wa Israheli yose." 
Nehemiah13:27 None namwe tubemerere, mukomeze muhemukire Imana; mukore ishyano mushaka abagore b’abanyamahanga?»" 
Nehemiah13:28 Ubwo mperako nirukana umwe mu bahungu ba Yoyada mwene Eliyashibu, umuherezabitambo mukuru, wari umukwe wa Sanabalati w’Umuhoroni maze ndamumenesha." 
Nehemiah13:29 Mana yanjye, urajye ubibuka kubera ko batesheje agaciro umurimo w’ubuherezabitambo, bakandavuza isezerano wagiranye n’abaherezabitambo n’abalevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Nuko mbatandukanya n’uwitwa umunyamahanga wese, maze abaherezabitambo n’abalevi mbaha amabwiriza, agenga buri wese mu murimo we." 
Nehemiah13:31 Hanyuma nshyiraho n’andi mabwiriza, agena uko amaturo y’inkwi hamwe n’ay’imbuto zizera mbere bizajya bigemurwa. Mana yanjye, urajye unyibuka, maze uzanyiture iyo neza!" 
Job1:1 Habayeho umugabo mu gihugu cya Usi, akitwa Yobu; yari umuntu w’inyangamugayo n’umunyamurava, agatinya Imana, kandi akanga ikibi." 
Job1:2 Yari yarabyaye abahungu barindwi n’abakobwa batatu. 
Job1:3 Yari atunze umukumbi w’intama ibihumbi birindwi, hamwe n’ingamiya ibihumbi bitatu, ibimasa by’inkone igihumbi, n’indogobe z’amanyagazi magana atanu, hamwe n’abagaragu benshi cyane. Uwo mugabo yarushaga ubukire abaturage bose b’iburasirazuba." 
Job1:4 Abahungu be bajyaga ibihe mu guteranira mu rugo rw’umwe muri bo, ibirori bikaba byose, kandi bagatumira bashiki babo batatu ngo baze basangire ibiryo n’ibinyobwa." 
Job1:5 Iyo bamaraga guhetura ingo zabo zose, Yobu yabatumiriraga kubasukura; maze akazinduka mu gitondo, agaturira buri wese igitambo gitwikwa. Koko rero, Yobu yaribwiraga ati «Wenda ahari abahungu banjye baba baracumuye, maze bakavuma Uhoraho mu mutima wabo.» Nguko uko Yobu yabigenzaga buri gihe." 
Job1:6 Umunsi umwe, abamalayika b’Imana baza gutaramira Uhoraho, Sekibi azana na bo." 
Job1:7 Uhoraho abaza Sekibi ati «Uturutse he?» Sekibi aramusubiza ati «Mvuye kuzerera isi no kuyitambagira.» 
Job1:8 Uhoraho abwira Sekibi ati «Ese witegereje umugaragu wanjye Yobu? Nta wundi usa na we ku isi; ni umuntu w’inyangamugayo n’umunyamurava, atinya Imana, kandi yirinda ikibi.»" 
Job1:9 Sekibi asubiza Uhoraho, ati «Ese kugira ngo Yobu atinye Imana, ni ku busa?" 
Job1:10 None se ntiwamuhaye uruzitiro rumurinda, rukazenguruka inzu ye n’ibyo atunze byose? Ibikorwa bye byose wabihaye umugisha, none amatungo ye yuzuye igihugu." 
Job1:11 Ariko, urambuye ukuboko kwawe, ugatsemba ibyo atunze byose, nta kabuza, azakuvuma urora.»" 
Job1:12 Uhoraho abwira Sekibi, ati «Ndabyemeye, ibye byose ndabikweguriye; gusa we ubwe ntugire icyo umutwara.» Nuko Sekibi arikubura aragenda." 
Job1:13 Umunsi umwe rero, abahungu n’abakobwa ba Yobu bari bateraniye kwa mukuru wabo, barya kandi banywa," 
Job1:14 nuko intumwa iza kubwira Yobu iti «Ibimasa byarimo bihinga, n’indogobe zirisha iruhande rwabyo," 
Job1:15 nuko Abanyesaba barahuruduka barabinyaga, bicisha inkota abagaragu bawe; ncika ku icumu jyenyine, ndahunga nza kubikumenyesha.»" 
Job1:16 Umwanya akibivuga, undi aba ashinze aho, ati «Inkongi y’umuriro w’Imana yamanutse ku ijuru, itwika intama n’abagaragu iratsemba; ni jye jyenyine warokotse, nza kubikumenyesha!»" 
Job1:17 Umwanya akivuga ibyo, undi aba aratungutse, ati «Abakalideya biciyemo ingamba eshatu, birara mu ngamiya zawe barazinyaga, bicisha abagaragu bawe inkota; ni jye jyenyine warokotse, nza kubikumenyesha!»" 
Job1:18 Igihe akivuga, undi aba ageze aho, ati «Abahungu n’abakobwa bawe bari mu nzu ya mukuru wabo, barya kandi banywa divayi," 
Job1:19 nuko inkubi y’umuyaga ituruka hakurya y’ubutayu, ihirika inkuta z’inzu zose uko ari enye, na yo irarindimuka ibagwa hejuru barapfa; ni jye jyenyine warokotse, nza kubikumenyesha!»" 
Job1:20 Yobu arahaguruka, ashishimura igishura cye, yikomboza umutwe, arambarara hasi," 
Job1:21 aramya agira ati «Navuye mu nda ya mama nambaye ubusa, kandi nzasubirayo nambaye ubundi. Uhoraho ni we wampaye, Uhoraho ni we wishubije; nihasingizwe izina ry’Uhoraho!»" 
Job1:22 Muri ayo makuba yose, Yobu ntiyigeze acumura; nta n’ijambo risebya Imana yigeze avuga." 
Job2:1 Nuko undi munsi, abamalayika b’Imana baje kuyitaramira, Sekibi azana na bo kwiyereka Uhoraho." 
Job2:2 Uhoraho abaza Sekibi, ati «Uturutse he?» Sekibi asubiza Uhoraho ati «Mvuye kuzerera isi no kuyitambagira.»" 
Job2:3 Uhoraho abwira Sekibi, ati «Ese witegereje umugaragu wanjye Yobu? Nta wundi usa na we ku isi; ni umuntu w’inyangamugayo n’umunyamurava, atinya Imana, yirinda ikibi, kandi yatsimbaraye ku bupfura bwe, n’ubwo wamunteranyijeho nta mpamvu ngo mwice.»" 
Job2:4 Sekibi asubiza Uhoraho, ati «Iby’ubu ni mpa nguhe! Ibyo umuntu atunze byose, arabitanga akarengera ubuzima bwe." 
Job2:5 Nyamara ariko urambuye ukuboko kwawe, ukagira icyo ukora ku magufa ye n’umubiri we, nta kabuza, azakuvuma urora!»" 
Job2:6 Uhoraho abwira Sekibi, ati «Ngaho ndabyemeye, ndamukweguriye, gusa wirinde kumwica.»" 
Job2:7 Sekibi asiga aho Uhoraho, aragenda, maze aterereza Yobu ibibembe, bimuhindura inyama kuva mu bworo bw’ikirenge kugera ku mutwe." 
Job2:8 Yobu afata urujyo rwo kwishima, maze yicara mu ivu." 
Job2:9 Umugore we aramubwira ati «Ubwo se kandi uzongera gutsimbarara ku bupfura bwawe? Vuma Imana, wipfire!»" 
Job2:10 Ariko aramusubiza ati «Uravuga nk’umugore w’igicucu. Ko twakira nk’umugisha ihirwe Imana iduhaye, ni kuki tutakwakira neza ibyago itwoherereza?» Muri ayo makuba yose, umunwa wa Yobu ntiwigera umutera gucumura." 
Job2:11 Incuti eshatu za Yobu zamenye ayo makuba yamugwiririye, buri wese ava mu gihugu cye, bajya inama y’ukuntu bamusanga bakamushyigikira, bakamuhumuriza. Elifazi yari avuye i Temani, Bilidadi avuye Shuwa, naho Sofari aturutse Nahama." 
Job2:12 Bubuye amaso bakiri kure, ntibamumenya; ni ko gutera hejuru bararira, bashishimura ibishura byabo, kandi binyanyagiza umukungugu ku mutwe." 
Job2:13 Nuko baguma aho, bicaye hasi iruhande rwe, bahamara iminsi irindwi n’amajoro arindwi, nta jambo bamubwiye, kuko babonaga umubabaro we ari mwinshi cyane." 
Job3:1 Nyuma y’ibyo, Yobu abumbura umunwa, avuma umunsi yavutseho." 
Job3:2 Nuko afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job3:3 «Umunsi navutseho ntukabeho, n’ijoro ryavuzwemo ngo ’Umwana w’umuhungu yasamwe!’" 
Job3:4 Uwo munsi uragahinduka umwijima w’igicuku; Imana Nyir’ijuru ntizongere kuwitaho, uzahore ari icuraburindi!" 
Job3:5 Uragahindanywa n’umwijima w’igicuku, ibihu biwubudikeho, maze biwukangaranye!" 
Job3:6 Iryo joro riragatahwa n’umwijima, kandi ntirikabarirwe mu yandi y’umwaka, ntirizongerwe ku yandi y’amezi!" 
Job3:7 Ni koko iryo joro rizahore ari ingumba, kandi ntihazagire impundu zirivugamo." 
Job3:8 Koko abateramwaku barakarivuma, bo batinyuka gukangura cya Leviyatani!" 
Job3:9 Inyenyeri zo mu rukerera rwaryo zirakazima, rijye ritegereza ko bucya rihebe, ntirikabone umuseke weya!" 
Job3:10 Kuko ritamfungiraniye mu nda ibyara, ngo noye kuzahura n’imibabaro integereje." 
Job3:11 Ni kuki ntavutse ndi igihwereye, cyangwa ngo mbe narahwereye nkibona izuba." 
Job3:12 Ibibero bya mama byankikiriye iki? Amabere ye yanyonkereje iki? 
Job3:13 Ubu none mba nibereye ikuzimu, niryamiye mu mahoro, kandi mba nsinziriye, niruhukira," 
Job3:14 ndi kumwe n’abami n’ibikomangoma, bari bariyubakiye amazu bahambwemo," 
Job3:15 cyangwa hamwe n’abatware bari batunze zahabu, amazu yabo barayahunitsemo feza." 
Job3:16 Ubonye ahubwo iyaba mama yarakuyemo inda, sinigere mbaho nk’abandi bapfa batabonye izuba!" 
Job3:17 Ikuzimu, abagome bashira ubukaka, ni ho abananiwe bajya kuruhukira." 
Job3:18 N’abahoze ari imbohe bagira ituze, ntibabe bacyumva ijwi ry’umurinzi." 
Job3:19 Aho hantu, abakuru n’abato barareshya, maze umucakara agasubirana ubwigenge." 
Job3:20 Ni iki gituma Imana ireka imbabare zikavuka, igaha ubugingo ab’umutima wuzuye amaganya;" 
Job3:21 bamwe bifuza urupfu bakarubura, bakarushakashaka kurusha umukiro wundi!" 
Job3:22 Nuko bakishimira kubona aho bazahambwa, bakanezezwa no kugenerwa imva." 
Job3:23 Umuntu utazi iyo agana kandi akaba yibasiwe n’Imana, kubaho yabiherewe iki?" 
Job3:24 Koko rero, mu kigwi cy’umugati, ntunzwe n’amaganya, kandi amarira yanjye atemba nk’umugezi." 
Job3:25 Icyanteraga ubwoba ni cyo kingwirira, icyo nishishaga ni cyo mbona." 
Job3:26 Nta gahenge, nta mahoro nkigira, habe emwe no kuruhuka, mpora ku nkeke.»" 
Job4:1 Elifazi w’i Temani afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job4:2 «Ese uwagira icyo akubwira, wabyihanganira? Ariko se umuntu yamenya aceceka ate!" 
Job4:3 Dore, wajyaga uhanura benshi, ugahumuriza abari bagiye kudohoka," 
Job4:4 Inama zawe zakomeje abendaga kwiheba, abacitse intege ukabarema umutima;" 
Job4:5 none, igihe utahiwe, unaniwe kwihangana, n’ibikubayeho ubwawe, bigukuye umutima!" 
Job4:6 Kuba wariringiye Imana se ntibikwiye kugukomeza, n’umurava wagize ukagutera amizero?" 
Job4:7 Ibuka neza: hari umuziranenge wigeze arimbuka? Ni hehe wumvise abanyamurava batsiratsizwa? 
Job4:8 Jye nzi ko abahinga ikibi, bakabiba agahinda, ari byo basarura;" 
Job4:9 umwuka w’Imana urabarimbura, uburakari bwayo bukabatsemba." 
Job4:10 Ari imitontomo y’intare, n’urusaku rw’ubukare bwayo, ari n’imikaka y’ibyana by’intare, byose birayoyoka." 
Job4:11 Intare yicwa no kubura umuhigo, n’ibyana by’intare y’ingore bikabuyera." 
Job4:12 Nanjye, hariho ijambo nongorewe, ugutwi kwanjye kurarisama." 
Job4:13 Nijoro, nari mu nzozi ziteye ubwoba, igihe abantu bose baba baguye agacuho," 
Job4:14 nuko ubwoba burantaha, mpinda umushyitsi amagufa yanjye yose arakomangana." 
Job4:15 Numvise nishishe, umusatsi unyorosokaho;" 
Job4:16 mbona umeze nk’umuntu ampagaze imbere, murebye sinamumenya, ariko ishusho ye inguma mu maso, hashize umwanya numva ijwi rinyongorera riti" 
Job4:17 ’Umuntu waremewe gupfa yatunganira ate Imana? Yabura inenge ate mu maso y’Iyamuhanze? 
Job4:18 Niba se itizera abagaragu bayo, ndetse n’abamalayika ntibaburemo inkumbi," 
Job4:19 hacura iki ku batuye amazu y’ibyondo, na yo yubatswe ku musenyi? Babahonyora nk’igiheri," 
Job4:20 abariho mu gitondo bahinduka ivu butaranagoroba, bararimbuka bagashira nta n’umenye uko bigenze." 
Job4:21 Bavanwaho, mbese nk’uko bashinguza umuganda w’ihema, nuko bagapfa bazize ubujiji bwabo.’" 
Job5:1 Cyo hamagara! Hari uri bukwitabe se? Uriyambaza se iyihe mu ntungane? 
Job5:2 Ni koko umusazi yicwa n’agahinda, naho umupfayongo agashegeshwa n’ipfunwe." 
Job5:3 Jyewe nabonye umusazi afata ikibanza, mperako mvuma inzu ye, nti" 
Job5:4 ’Abahungu be barakabura umukiro, barenganire ku karubanda, babure kivurira!" 
Job5:5 Umusaruro wabo uribwe n’umushonji, umutungo wabo ugotomerwe n’abafite inyota!’" 
Job5:6 Koko rero, icyago ntikivumbuka mu butaka, kandi umuruho ntumera ku butaka," 
Job5:7 ahubwo umuruho uva ku bantu, nk’uko imirabyo ituruka mu birere." 
Job5:8 Iyaba ari jyewe, nakwisunga Imana, ngatakambira Uhoraho." 
Job5:9 Ni we wakoze ibintu byinshi by’agatangaza, kandi bidashobora kubarurwa ngo birangire." 
Job5:10 Akwiza imvura ku isi yose, akanavubura amasoko mu misozi;" 
Job5:11 ni we ukuza ab’intamenyekana, n’abamanjiriwe bakaronka umukiro." 
Job5:12 Aburizamo imigambi y’abigize inyaryenge, amaboko yabo akaruhira ubusa." 
Job5:13 Ingirwabahanga azicisha imitego yazo, naho imigambi y’incabiranya ikaba impfabusa;" 
Job5:14 bityo bakarindagira mu mwijima, kandi ari ku manywa y’ihangu, bagasa n’abagenda mu ijoro, kandi amanywa ava." 
Job5:15 Uhoraho arinda imfubyi inkota, kandi umukene akamukiza umuhutaza." 
Job5:16 Ni uko umunyantege nke agira icyizere, maze umugome akamanjirwa." 
Job5:17 Hahirwa uwo Uhoraho akosora! kandi ntasuzugure inyigisho ya Nyir’ububasha. 
Job5:18 Koko rero ni we ukomeretsa, kandi ni we womora, arababaza, ariko ibiganza bye birakiza." 
Job5:19 Mu makuba menshi, azagutabara, kandi nugera mu kaga, nta cyago kizaguhungabanya." 
Job5:20 Mu nzara, azakurinda urupfu; ku rugamba, akurinde inkota." 
Job5:21 Uzaca ukubiri n’akanwa kabi ka rubanda, kandi icyorezo nigitera, ntuzagira ubwoba." 
Job5:22 Ntuzakangwa n’icyorezo cyangwa inzara, kandi ntuzatinya inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba." 
Job5:23 Ni koko uzagirana amasezerano n’amabuye yo mu murima, kandi wumvikane n’ibisimba by’agasozi." 
Job5:24 Uzasanga urugo rwawe ruguwe neza, nujya kurusura usange nta cyo rubuze." 
Job5:25 Uzabona urubyaro rwawe rwororoka, n’abagukomokaho bakura nk’ibyatsi byo mu mirima." 
Job5:26 Uzajya gupfa ushyize kera, nk’uko barunda imiba y’ingano zeze." 
Job5:27 Ibyo tukubwiye si inkuru mbarirano, ni ko bigenda! Ahasigaye, bizirikane, ku buryo byakugirira akamaro.»" 
Job6:1 Yobu afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job6:2 «Iyaba bashoboraga kumva agahinda kanjye, ngo bapimire ku munzani amakuba yanjye," 
Job6:3 basanze arusha uburemere umusenyi wo ku nyanja, ikaba ari na yo mpamvu mvuga amateshwa!" 
Job6:4 Koko kandi, imyambi ya Nyirububasha yantebeyemo, n’umutima wanjye wanyoye ubumara bwayo; uburakari bw’Imana bwankoraniyeho." 
Job6:5 Ese indogobe yahebeba ibona ubwatsi, cyangwa ikimasa kikabira kiri mu rwuri?" 
Job6:6 Ibiryo bibishye se, wabirya nta munyu? Umweru w’igi se ugira icyanga?" 
Job6:7 Ibiryo nk’ibyo nanze kubyasamira, n’umutima wanjye wazinutswe uwo mugati." 
Job6:8 Icyampa ngo icyo nsabye ngihabwe, maze Imana insubize amizero yanjye!" 
Job6:9 Icyampa ngo Imana ibe ari yo injanjagura, inkubite mu cyico inkureho." 
Job6:10 Bityo n’ubwo ndi mu kaga karenze urugero, byibura nashimishwa n’icyo cyizere cy’uko ntihakanye amagambo ya Nyirubutungane." 
Job6:11 Ubu se nsigaranye imbaraga ki ngo mbe nakwiyumanganya; ko ibyanjye birangiye, icyo nkizeye ni iki?" 
Job6:12 None se nacuzwe mu mabuye, cyangwa umubiri wanjye ukozwe mu muringa?" 
Job6:13 Hari ikindi kindi se nakwishingikirizaho, ko n’icyari kuntera inkunga cyose cyanyitaruye?" 
Job6:14 Utagiriye impuhwe mugenzi we, aba yanze kubaha Nyirububasha!" 
Job6:15 Abavandimwe banjye barantereranye, babaye nka ya migezi ihimba ari uko imvura yaguye." 
Job6:16 Mu itumba, usanga yuzuye amazi akonje, kubera imvura n’urubura byayujuje," 
Job6:17 ariko icyi cyaza igahita ikama, izuba ryacana, igaherako yuma." 
Job6:18 Ku mpamvu yayo, imbaga z’abagenzi ziteshwa inzira, zikaboneza iy’ubutayu, ziyobagurika." 
Job6:19 Imbaga z’abagenzi b’i Temani zikayishakashaka hose, ab’i Sheba ni yo bashingiyeho amizero." 
Job6:20 Amaherezo, icyizere cyabo kikagwa ku busa, bagera ku nkombe zayo, bagashoberwa." 
Job6:21 Namwe rero, ubu ni ko mumerewe, mwasanze nteye ubwoba, maze ibikoba birabakuka." 
Job6:22 Ese hari ubwo nigeze mbasaba nti ’Nimugire icyo mumpa, mukore mu mutungo wanyu mumfashe," 
Job6:23 kandi munkize ukuboko k’umubisha, munandinde abankandamiza’?" 
Job6:24 Ngaho nimumpanure, ndaceceka, munyereke aho natandukiriye, ngacumura." 
Job6:25 Amagambo y’ukuri umuntu yayihanganira; ariko se mwe ibyo munjora, bigamije iki?" 
Job6:26 Muranshinja se muhereye ku byo navuze, kandi ari imvugo y’uwihebye itwarwa n’umuyaga!" 
Job6:27 Ndumva mwebwe mwarya n’imfubyi, mukagambanira incuti yanyu!" 
Job6:28 Ngaho rwose nimundebe, ndabibasabye, imbere yanyu sinabeshya!" 
Job6:29 Ahasigaye mungarukire, mwoye kundenganya; mungarukire, kuko ntatezutse ku butabera." 
Job6:30 Ese hari ikinyoma musanze ku rurimi rwanjye? Umunwa wanjye se, waba utagishobora kuvangura icyago?" 
Job7:1 Hano ku isi, kubaho k’umuntu ni nko kurwana intambara, kandi ubuzima bwe nta ho butaniye n’ubw’umucancuro." 
Job7:2 Jyewe rero, nsa n’umucakara wifuza amafu, cyangwa umucancuro uharanira agahembo ke;" 
Job7:3 incuro yanjye yabaye amezi yo kumanjirwa, amajoro y’ububabare ambera igihembo." 
Job7:4 Iyo ndyamye, ndavuga ngo ’Icyampa ngo byuke’; naba mbyutse nti ’Ntibwira nkiriho’; nuko nkirirwa mbunza imitima ntyo umugoroba ugakika." 
Job7:5 Umubiri wanjye urajejeta inyo, wuzuye amaga n’imvuvu, uruhu rwanjye ruriyasa rugasuka amashyira." 
Job7:6 Iminsi y’ukubaho kwanjye iriruka amasigamana, irazimira ubutagaruka." 
Job7:7 Ibuka ko ubugingo bwanjye ari nk’umuyaga, amaso yanjye ntakibonye ihirwe ukundi." 
Job7:8 Amaso y’abantu amperutse ubu, n’ayawe azandora, ariko ntakiriho." 
Job7:9 Uko ibihu biyoyoka bikagenda, ni na ko umanukiye ikuzimu atahazamuka;" 
Job7:10 ntagaruka mu nzu ye, n’aho yari atuye ntihongera kumubona ukundi." 
Job7:11 Ni yo mpamvu ntashobora guceceka, nzavuga agahinda kanzengereza, namamaze amaganya anyuzuye umutima." 
Job7:12 Naba se ndi inyanja, cyangwa cya gikoko kiyibamo, ngo undindishe ijoro n’amanywa?" 
Job7:13 Iyo nibwiye nti «Nindyama, ndoroherwa, uburiri bungabanyirize amaganya»," 
Job7:14 wowe unyoherereza inzozi zikantera ubwoba, ibyo mbonye bikankura umutima." 
Job7:15 Yewe icyampa ngo baze bampotore! Kuri jyewe gupfa nkavaho byandutira iyi mibabaro yose. 
Job7:16 Nduma mpagaze, sinkibayeho, ukundi, have ndeka, ubuzima bwanjye ni akanyuzo!" 
Job7:17 Umuntu ni iki kugira ngo umwiteho bigeze aho, ngo uhore umuhanze amaso," 
Job7:18 ngo umusuzume buri gitondo, ngo umugenzure buri kanya?" 
Job7:19 Uzampozaho ijisho kugeza ryari? Wampaye nibura agahenge, nkamiraza amacandwe." 
Job7:20 Mbaye umunyabyaha, byaba bigutwaye iki, wowe, mugenzuzi w’abantu utarambirwa? Ni iki gituma unyibasira, nk’aho jye naba nkubangamiye?" 
Job7:21 Mbese, ntushobora kwihanganira igicumuro cyanjye, ngo icyaha cyanjye ucyirengeho? Nanone ejobundi nzaba ndyamye ikuzimu, uzanshakashaka ariko ntakiriho.»" 
Job8:1 Bilidadi w’i Shuwa afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job8:2 «Uzavuga utyo kugeza ryari, uzahereza he ayo magambo asa n’inkubi y’umuyaga?" 
Job8:3 Imana se yakwirengagiza ukuri, cyangwa se yacisha ukubiri n’ubutabera?" 
Job8:4 Abana bawe, niba barayigomeye, baryojwe ibyaha bakoze." 
Job8:5 Naho wowe, isunge Imana; ujye utakambira Nyir’ububasha!" 
Job8:6 Niba uri intungane ukaba n’umunyamurava, guhera ubu azakwitaho, agusubize ibiberanye n’ubutungane bwawe;" 
Job8:7 uko uzaba umeze, bizaba bisumbye kure uko wari uri mbere." 
Job8:8 Jya usobanuza abakuruta, kandi wite ku nama z’abasogokuru." 
Job8:9 Twebwe turi abana b’ejo, nta cyo tuzi, kandi hano ku isi ubuzima bwacu ni akanyuzo!" 
Job8:10 Naho bo, muzaganira bakwigishe, bagutoze iyi migani ibitse mu mutima wabo:" 
Job8:11 Urufunzo se rushobora kumera ahatari igishanga? Urukangaga rwamera ahatareka amazi? 
Job8:12 Iyo bikiri ingemwe kandi nta we ubitemye, binamba mbere y’ibindi byatsi byose." 
Job8:13 Ayo ni yo maherezo y’uwibagirwa Imana, kandi ni uko amizero y’uyigomera ayoyoka." 
Job8:14 Aba ameze nk’uwishingikirije ku kadodo, agasa nk’utuye mu cyari cy’igitagangurirwa." 
Job8:15 Iyo yegamiye inzu ye, irahirima, yakomeza kuyishingikirizaho, igasenyuka." 
Job8:16 Ameze nk’igiti kiyagirana ku zuba, ugasanga cyuzuyeho imimero," 
Job8:17 kigashora imizi mu rutare, ndetse no mu mabuye rwagati." 
Job8:18 Ariko iyo bakiranduye, ubutaka bwacyo buracyihakana buti ’Sinigeze nkubona!’" 
Job8:19 Ngicyo kirambaraye ku nzira kiriho kirabora, naho mu kibanza cyacyo haramera ibindi biti." 
Job8:20 Oya, Imana ntiyamagana umunyakuri, kandi ntishyigikira inkozi z’ibibi." 
Job8:21 Umunwa wawe izongera iwuzuze ibitwenge, umutima wawe unezerwe." 
Job8:22 Abanzi bawe bazakorwa n’isoni, kandi ihema ry’abagome rizasenyuka.»" 
Job9:1 Yobu afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job9:2 «Nzi neza ko ari uko bigenda, none se umuntu yatsinda Imana ate?" 
Job9:3 Iyo ashatse kujya impaka na yo, n’iyo yavuga kangahe, yo nta na rimwe imusubiza." 
Job9:4 Mu banyabuhanga buhanitse no mu banyembaraga b’indahangarwa, ni nde wigeze kuyihangara, hanyuma akayihonoka?" 
Job9:5 Ni yo yimura imisozi mu ibanga, yarakara, ikayibirindura." 
Job9:6 Ni yo iteza isi umutingito, iyo ijegajeza inkingi zayo." 
Job9:7 Ni yo itegeka izuba, ntirirase, ikabuza n’inyenyeri kumurika." 
Job9:8 Ni yo yonyine yahanze ikirere cy’ijuru, igatambagira hejuru y’inyanja." 
Job9:9 Ni yo yahanze inyenyeri, izishyira ahazigenewe, maze izita amazina yazo." 
Job9:10 Ni yo yaremye ibintu bikomeye, tudashobora gusobanukirwa, irema n’ibindi bitangaje kandi bitabarika." 
Job9:11 Iyo ihise iruhande rwanjye, sinyibona, n’iyo inyitseseho, simbyumva." 
Job9:12 Iramutse inyaze ikintu, ni nde wayikoma, maze ngo agire ati ’Urakora ibiki?’" 
Job9:13 Imana iyo yarakaye ntiyururwa, n’ibyegera bya Rahabu byubamye imbere yayo." 
Job9:14 Jyewe se nashobora nte kwihandagaza ngo ndaburana, ngo ndashaka ingingo zayitsinda." 
Job9:15 Jyewe, n’iyo naba mvuga ukuri, bimariye iki kwiregura; kandi ari yo Mucamanza wanjye, nkwiye gutakambira?" 
Job9:16 N’iyo nayihamagara ikaza, si byo byanyemeza ko yakumva ijwi ryanjye." 
Job9:17 Koko, Nyir’ububasha arankandamiza ku busa, akarushaho kundema inguma nta mpamvu;" 
Job9:18 ntarushya andeka ngo mpumeke, ahubwo ahora anyuzuzamo indurwe y’umubabaro!" 
Job9:19 Twapima imbaraga se? We arazinsumbya kure! Namurega mu rukiko se? Ni nde wamuhatira kwitaba? 
Job9:20 Nketse ko ndi mu kuri, umunwa we wancira urubanza, nivuzeho ubunyamurava, yampindura umugome!" 
Job9:21 Kuba umunyamurava byo, nanjye simbyiyiziho, kuko nsigaye narihaze!" 
Job9:22 Kuri jyewe byose ni kimwe, ni yo mpamvu mvuga nti ’Atsemba umunyamurava n’umunyabyaha.’" 
Job9:23 Iyo icyorezo cyagaritse ingogo, usanga ashungera abere bari mu kaga." 
Job9:24 Iyo igihugu gitegekwa n’umunyarugomo, apfukirana abacamanza bacyo; ubwo niba atari we ubitera, yaba nde wundi?" 
Job9:25 Nyamara, iminsi y’ubuzima bwanjye iriruka amasigamana, irahunga itareba amahirwe;" 
Job9:26 iranyerera nk’ubwato bwogoga inyanja, cyangwa kagoma iguye gitumo agakoko." 
Job9:27 Iyo ngize nti ’Reka niyibagize amaganya yanjye, nizihirwe kandi mwenyure’," 
Job9:28 ubwo icyoba kirantaha, nibutse amagorwa yanjye, kuko mba nzi ko atari uko ugenzereza intungane." 
Job9:29 Nzi ko nimburana, nzatsindwa, none se ubwo naba niruhiriza iki?" 
Job9:30 N’iyo nakwiyuhagiza amazi yo ku iteke, nkisukura n’isabune nziza," 
Job9:31 wakongera ukanzika mu musitwe, n’imyambaro yanjye ikanyinuka." 
Job9:32 Koko, we si umuntu nkanjye ngo mbe namusubiza, cyangwa se ngo tujye kuburana mu rukiko." 
Job9:33 Nta n’uri hagati yacu ngo atwumvire urubanza, maze ngo twembi adushyireho ikiganza," 
Job9:34 kugira ngo andinde ubukana bwe, n’urugomo rwe runtera ubwoba!" 
Job9:35 Ibyo ari byo byose, nzavuga ntamutinye, kuko, uko ankeka, atari ko ndi." 
Job10:1 Ubwo nazinutswe ubuzima bwanjye, nimundeke, nta kimbuza kwiganyira, ngo mvuge ishavu rishengura umutima." 
Job10:2 Nzabwira Nyir’ububasha nti ’Wincira urubanza, ahubwo mbwira icyaha unshinja." 
Job10:3 Ese ushimishwa no kunkandamiza, cyangwa kwandavuza ikiremwa cyawe, ukanezezwa n’imigambi y’abagome?" 
Job10:4 Waba se ufite amaso nk’ayacu, byatuma ureba nk’uko abantu bareba?" 
Job10:5 Ese ubuzima bwawe bwaba ari nk’ubw’abagenewe gupfa, cyangwa se imyaka yawe yaba ihita nk’iminsi yabo," 
Job10:6 ku buryo wakurikirana ibyaha byanjye, ukabaririza hose amakosa yanjye?" 
Job10:7 Nyamara uzi neza ko nta gicumuro kindangwaho, kandi nta n’ushobora kunkura mu maboko yawe!" 
Job10:8 Ibiganza byawe ni byo byandemye, none se washimishwa no kunkuraho!" 
Job10:9 Wibuke ko wandemye unkura mu gitaka, kandi ko uzakinsubizamo." 
Job10:10 Wambuganije mu nda ya mama nk’uko babuganiza amata, umbumbabumbiramo nk’uko babumba isoro ry’amavuta." 
Job10:11 Wanyambitse umubiri n’inyama, kandi unsobekamo amagufa n’imitsi." 
Job10:12 Wampaye ubuzima urantonesha, kandi kubera ineza yawe, urinda ubugingo bwanjye." 
Job10:13 Nyamara, icyo wari wahishe mu mutima wawe, ubu urakingaragarije; menye neza ko ari cyo wari ugambiriye!" 
Job10:14 Iyo ncumuye uba undeba, kandi nta kosa ryanjye rigusoba." 
Job10:15 Naba rero nacumuye, ubwo akanjye kakaba kageze! Cyangwa se naba ndi umwere, na bwo sinubure umutwe; none nuzuyemo ikimwaro n’agahinda." 
Job10:16 Iyo ngize ngo ndashingashinga, urampiga nk’intare, maze si ukunyigambaho, ukivayo." 
Job10:17 Uhora ushaka uko wantera, uburakari umfitiye bukiyongera, maze ingabo zawe z’inkwakuzi ukazinterereza." 
Job10:18 Ni kuki watumye mvuka? Ubu simba narapfuye, nta wigeze ambona?" 
Job10:19 Mba narabaye nk’utigeze abaho, nkava mu nda bahita bahamba." 
Job10:20 Ese iminsi y’ukubaho kwanjye ntibaze! Ba unyihoreye gato, maze nyuzemo mpumeke," 
Job10:21 mbere yo kugenda ubutazagaruka, mboneje mu gihugu cy’umwijima w’igicuku," 
Job10:22 igihugu cy’umwanda n’akajagari, aho n’amanywa ubwayo ari umwijima musa.»" 
Job11:1 Sofari w’i Nahama afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job11:2 «Harya ngo imvuzi ya cyane ntivuguruzwa! None se gusukiranya amagambo ni ko kuvuga ukuri? 
Job11:3 Amahomvu yawe se azacecekesha abandi, ukomeze kurocangwa nta we ukuvuguruza?" 
Job11:4 Waravuze ngo ’Ndi indakemwa, n’imyifatire yanjye iraboneye mu maso y’Imana.’" 
Job11:5 Nyamara Nyir’ububasha ashatse kubumbura umunwa, akagusubiza akweruriye;" 
Job11:6 aramutse aguhishuriye amabanga y’ubuhanga bwe, butambutse kure icyitwa ubumenyi cyose, ni ho wamenya ko akuryoje icyaha cyawe." 
Job11:7 Ese wibwira ko washobora gucengera amabanga y’Imana, ku buryo wakumva ubwiza bwa Nyir’ububasha?" 
Job11:8 Ko uzasanga busumba kure ijuru, uzabigenza ute? Ko bujya kure y’ikuzimu, uzabumenya ute?" 
Job11:9 Busumba isi mu burebure, bukarusha inyanja ubugari!" 
Job11:10 Igize uwo icakira, ikamufunga, ni nde wayibuza kumucira urubanza?" 
Job11:11 Koko rero, yo izi abantu b’abanyabinyoma; ibona icyaha, ikacyitegereza." 
Job11:12 Ab’ibicucu bakurizaho kwitonda, n’indogobe y’igihubutsi, igacisha make." 
Job11:13 Wowe rero, nukomeza umutima wawe kuri Nyir’ububasha, ukarambura amaboko uyamwerekejeho," 
Job11:14 nurinda ibiganza byawe gukora nabi, kandi ntube icyitso cy’abagome," 
Job11:15 ni bwo uzaba umuziranenge, ukagira umutima ukomeye, utagira ikiwukanga." 
Job11:16 Koko rero, ntuzongera kwibuka umuruho wawe, uzawibagirwa nk’amazi yatembye kera." 
Job11:17 Ubuzima bwawe buzarabagirana kurusha umucyo w’amanywa, ahari mu gicuku, hakubere nko mu gitondo." 
Job11:18 Icyizere cyawe kizatuma utuza, uzasinzira umudendezo, kuko uhagarikiwe." 
Job11:19 Uziruhukira nta we ugusagarira, rubanda benshi bamaranire kugutonaho." 
Job11:20 Naho abagiranabi bo, bazumirwa, babure ubuhungiro, amizero bazasigarana, abe ayo gupfa.»" 
Job12:1 Yobu afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job12:2 «Mu by’ukuri, ni mwebwe muhagarariye rubanda, kandi nimupfa, ubuhanga bwanyu muzajyana!" 
Job12:3 Nanjye mfite ubwenge, nta bwo mubundusha; none se muribwira ko ibyo hari utabizi?" 
Job12:4 Iyo umuntu yiyambaje Imana ngo imwumve, incuti ze zimuhindura urw’amenyo; uw’intungane n’inyangamugayo, ni we basigaye baseka." 
Job12:5 Abagwiririwe n’ibyago, ibyo ni akazi kabo — nguko uko abagashize bavuga — niba adandabiranye ni ukumuhirikisha umugeri." 
Job12:6 Nyamara ariko, abajura bafite amahoro mu mahema yabo, abashavuza Imana bari mu ituze, imana biringiye ni imbaraga zabo." 
Job12:7 Ngaho, uzibarize inyamaswa, zizakumenyeshe, n’inyoni zo mu kirere zizagusobanurire," 
Job12:8 ibikurura inda hasi bizakwigishe, n’amafi yo mu nyanja azakurondorere." 
Job12:9 Muri izo nyamaswa zose, nta n’imwe itazi ko Nyir’ububasha ari we wahanze byose." 
Job12:10 Ni we uhagaritse ikinyabuzima cyose, akabumbatira ubugingo bw’abantu!" 
Job12:11 Ese amagambo si yo anogera ugutwi, naho ibiryo bikaryohera akanwa?" 
Job12:12 Ubwenge bubarizwa mu basheshe akanguhe, kandi abasaza ni bo bamenya gushyira mu gaciro." 
Job12:13 Ariko we, ni Nyir’ubuhanga n’ububasha, ni we mujyanama w’ukuri, agashyira mu gaciro koko!" 
Job12:14 Icyo ashenye, nta we ugisana, uwo akingiranye, nta we umukingurira," 
Job12:15 iyo agomeye amazi, amapfa aratera, yayagomorora, agakundura ubutaka." 
Job12:16 Ni we Nyir’imbaraga n’ubwitonzi, ahashya inkozi z’ibibi n’abazibyoheje." 
Job12:17 Arindagiza abajyanama, abacamanza akabateza ibisazi;" 
Job12:18 abohora ingoyi z’abami, akaba ari bo ata muri yombi." 
Job12:19 Abaherezabitambo abahindura abatindi, ibikomerezwa akabihanantura ku ngoma." 
Job12:20 Ab’intyoza abagira ibiragi, abasaza akabambura ubushishozi;" 
Job12:21 asuzuguza ibikomangoma, abakomeye akabagira ibigwari." 
Job12:22 Umwijima awuzikura mu kuzimu, icuraburindi rigatangaza umwezi." 
Job12:23 Ni we werereza amahanga, kandi akayoreka. Ni we uha abantu kororoka, kandi akabatsemba." 
Job12:24 Abatware b’igihugu abahindura ibihungetwe, bakabungagira mu bigunda," 
Job12:25 bakarindagira mu mwijima, nta rumuri, bakagenda bagwira inzira nk’abasinzi." 
Job13:1 Ni koko, ibyo byose narabyiboneye n’amaso yanjye, amatwi yanjye arabyumva, arabisobanukirwa." 
Job13:2 Ibyo muzi, nanjye ndabizi, ndi umuntu nkamwe, ntimunduta!" 
Job13:3 Ariko jyewe Imana ni yo mbwira, Nyir’ububasha ni we nshaka ko ansobanurira." 
Job13:4 Naho mwebwe, muri abanyamahomvu gusa, muri abavuzi ba magendu, mwese uko mungana!" 
Job13:5 Ni kuki muticecekera? Ni byo byakwerekana ko muzi ubwenge. 
Job13:6 Nimwumve uko niregura, mutege amatwi ibyo mvuga." 
Job13:7 Uhoraho se ni we wabohereje kuvuga amahomvu, ni we se wabatumye kumbwira ibinyoma?" 
Job13:8 Ni we se muvuganira, ni we se muburanira?" 
Job13:9 Mbese none yaba abarora mu mutima? Muribwira ko mwamubeshya nk’uko bashuka umuntu? 
Job13:10 Nta shiti azabahana, niba mugamije kubera." 
Job13:11 Nyir’icyubahiro ntimumukangwa, ese nta n’ubwo ajya abatera ubwoba?" 
Job13:12 Impanuro zanyu ni nk’ivu, n’ibisubizo mumpa nta shingiro bifite." 
Job13:13 Nimuceceke, mundeke mvuge, maze igishaka kizabe!" 
Job13:14 Jyewe naritanze, nahaze amagara, ubuzima bwanjye ndabuhebye." 
Job13:15 Nashaka anyice, n’ubundi ni rwo nari ndindiriye, cyakora ndashaka kwisobanura imbere ye," 
Job13:16 ndetse nyine ngibyo ibintera kwizera ko azankiza, kuko nta nkozi y’ibibi n’imwe itinyuka kumutunguka imbere." 
Job13:17 Nimwumve, nimutege amatwi amagambo yanjye, kandi mwite ku byo mbatangariza." 
Job13:18 Dore niteguye kuburana, kandi nzi ko mfite ukuri." 
Job13:19 Ese hari uwatinyuka kunshinja, ngo nicecekere maze mpfe?" 
Job13:20 Uzandinde ibintu bibiri gusa, maze noye kuzihisha mu maso yawe:" 
Job13:21 Uzareke kunzibiranya, no kuntera ubwoba," 
Job13:22 hanyuma ubanze uvuge ngusubize, cyangwa se umpe ijambo mbanze, nawe unsubize." 
Job13:23 Ese mfite ibyaha n’ibicumuro bingahe? Nsobanurira ishyano nakoze, umbwire icyaha cyanjye." 
Job13:24 Ni kuki unyihisha, ukangenzereza nk’umwanzi wawe?" 
Job13:25 Urashaka se gukanga akababi gatwawe n’umuyaga, no kwibasira akatsi kumye?" 
Job13:26 Ubwo rero wirirwe unyandikaho ibirego bikaze, unshinje ibyaha byo mu buto bwanjye," 
Job13:27 unshandikire imitego impande zose, ungenzure aho nyuze hose, uronde aho nakandagiye hose!" 
Job13:28 None umubiri wanjye ushaje nk’igiti cyamunzwe, umeze nk’umwenda wariwe n’umuswa." 
Job14:1 Umuntu wabyawe n’umugore abaho igihe gito kandi na cyo cyuzuyemo imiruho. 
Job14:2 Ameze nk’ururabo, rurabya hanyuma rukuma; cyangwa igihu gihita nyuma kikayoyoka." 
Job14:3 None uwo ni we uhozaho ijisho, ni we ushinja mu rukiko!"
