Job14:4 Ikintu kibi se ni nde wakibyaza icyiza? Arakajya! 
Job14:5 Ubwo rero iminsi ye ibaze, ukaba uzi amezi azamara ariho, kandi waramugeneye igihe ntarengwa," 
Job14:6 mukureho amaso umwihorere, yirwanire n’iminsi nk’umucancuro." 
Job14:7 Koko rero, igiti nticyakwiheba, kuko n’iyo bagitemye, cyongera kigatoha, kigashibukaho imimero." 
Job14:8 Iyo imizi yacyo yasaziye mu butaka, igihimba cyacyo kikarengwaho n’igitaka," 
Job14:9 gipfa gusa kwikanga amazi, maze kigatoha, kigashamika nk’urugemwe." 
Job14:10 Umuntu we ariko, arapfa, akagagara; iyo apfuye se, hari ikiba gisigaye?" 
Job14:11 Nk’uko amazi ashira mu nyanja, inzuzi zikuma zigakama," 
Job14:12 ni na ko umuntu aryama ntabyuke; n’ijuru ubwaryo rizarinda rizimira, we atarakanguka, ngo ashiguke muri ibyo bitotsi." 
Job14:13 Ndakwinginze, ba umpishe mu nyenga, nikingeyo kugeza igihe umujinya wawe uzashirira. Iyaba wari umbwiye ko hari igihe uzanyibuka," 
Job14:14 — ariko se, iyo umuntu yapfuye, yakongera kubaho? — nzihangana mu minsi nkiri ku gihe, kugeza ubwo hazaza unkura." 
Job14:15 Icyo gihe wampamagara, nkakwitaba, wenda waba ushaka kureba ikiremwa cyawe." 
Job14:16 Aho kuba nk’ubu ungenza aho nyuze hose, waba utakitaye ku byaha byanjye" 
Job14:17 ibicumuro byanjye wabyirengagiza, ukampindura umwere." 
Job14:18 Ndishunga ariko: nk’uko umusozi ushyira ukariduka, n’urutare rukimuka," 
Job14:19 nk’uko amazi avungura amabuye, ubutaka bugatwarwa n’isuri, ni na ko upfobya amizero y’umuntu!" 
Job14:20 Koko uramukindura, akagenda burundu; ukamwandavuza, ahasigaye ukamwohera." 
Job14:21 Abana be baratengamara, ntabimenye, basuzugurwa, ntababone;" 
Job14:22 aba yibabarijwe n’umubiri we, hamwe n’umutima we uri mu gahinda.»" 
Job15:1 Elifazi w’i Temani afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job15:2 «Umuntu uzi ubwenge yasubizanya amahomvu ate, yavuga ate amagambo atagira ishingiro?" 
Job15:3 Yaburanisha amagambo y’amanjwe, cyangwa imvugo itagira icyo imaze?" 
Job15:4 Wowe ariko urakabya, utambamira iyobokamana, ubuzanya ibyo kuyizirikana." 
Job15:5 Ubucumuzi bwawe ni bwo bugutera kuvuga utyo, ukiha kuvuga nk’inkozi z’ibibi." 
Job15:6 Ntumpfane, urashinjwa n’umunwa wawe, akarimi kawe ni ko kakurega." 
Job15:7 Waba se ari wowe wavutse mbere y’abantu bose, ugatanga imisozi yose kubaho." 
Job15:8 Waba se waremerewe mu nama nkuru y’Imana kugira ngo ube warikubiye ubuhanga bwose? 
Job15:9 Icyo uzi, twe tutazi ni iki? Icyo usobanukiwe twe kitwihishe ni iki?" 
Job15:10 Iwacu na ho, hari abasheshe akanguhe b’inararibonye, ndetse baruta so mu myaka." 
Job15:11 Ese waba usuzugura ihumure ry’Imana, n’amagambo meza tukubwira?" 
Job15:12 Ni kuki uzengana uburakari bwinshi, ugahumbaguza n’amaso?" 
Job15:13 Ni kuki utura Imana umujinya wawe, kandi ugasukiranya amagambo aterekeranye?" 
Job15:14 Ugenewe gupfa yashobora ate kuba umwere; uwabyawe n’umugore se, yaba intungane ate?" 
Job15:15 Ndetse n’abo Imana yatonesheje nta bwo ijya ibizera, n’ikirere ubwacyo ibona kitabuze inenge," 
Job15:16 nkanswe cya kiremwa cyandavuye, kinateye ishozi, ari cyo muntu, ugotomera icyaha nk’amazi!" 
Job15:17 Ntega amatwi, ngiye kukwigisha, ibyo nabonye, ngiye kubigutekerereza;" 
Job15:18 nkubwire ibyo abanyabuhanga bazi, ntibabihishe, kandi bakabikomora ku basekuru babo." 
Job15:19 Ni bo bonyine bari barahawe igihugu, kandi nta munyamahanga wabivanzemo." 
Job15:20 Umugiranabi arahangayika igihe cyose akiriho, kandi imyaka y’umugome irabaze," 
Job15:21 induru igira itya ikamumena amatwi, umwanzi akamugwa gitumo, kandi amahoro ari yose." 
Job15:22 Ntajya yizera ko ibyago byamucaho, kuko asa n’uwagabijwe inkota," 
Job15:23 akamera nk’uzaribwa n’inkongoro. Azi neza ko yavukiye gusenyuka. Iyo umunsi w’amakuba ugeze, arahangayika;" 
Job15:24 umubabaro n’ubwoba bikamutahirana, uboshye umwami wenda kugaba igitero." 
Job15:25 Koko rero, aba yarwanije Imana, agashaka kwirata kuri Nyir’ububasha!" 
Job15:26 Yamwiyahuragaho, areze ijosi, yikingiye ingabo nini y’isuri." 
Job15:27 Mbega ibinure yari amaze gutekera mu maso, n’ukuntu ibyaziha bye byavunwaga n’ibicece!" 
Job15:28 Yari atuye mu migi yasenyutse, aba mu mazu beneyo bataye, kuko yari hafi kurunduka." 
Job15:29 Nta bwo azakira, n’umutungo we ntuzaramba, ndetse na we ubwe ntazatinda ku isi." 
Job15:30 Nta ho azahungira umwijima, indimi z’umuriro zizatwika urubyaro rwe, ibye byose bitwarwe n’umuyaga." 
Job15:31 Niyiringira ikinyoma, azarindagira, kuko igihembo cye ari ukuzakorwa n’isoni." 
Job15:32 Amababi ye azagwengera imbura gihe, amashami ye ye kuzashibuka ukundi." 
Job15:33 Imbuto ze zizahubuka ziteze nk’iz’umuzabibu, ururabo rwe ruhunguke nk’urw’umutini." 
Job15:34 Ni ko bigenda, inyoko y’abanyabyaha iragumbaha! Kandi umuriro uzayogoza amahema y’inkozi z’ibibi." 
Job15:35 Umuntu wasamye ikibi, azabyara ishyano, kandi icyo ahatse, kizavemo ubusa.»" 
Job16:1 Yobu afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job16:2 «Amagambo nk’ayo nayumvise kenshi, mwese murantera agahinda aho kumpoza!" 
Job16:3 Muravuga ngo ’Amahomvu yawe azashira ryari?’ cyangwa ngo ’Ni iki kiguteye gushyanukira gusubiza?’ 
Job16:4 Nanjye mba mvuga nkamwe, iyo muba mu kaga ndimo; nabahimbiraho amagambo, nkabannyega," 
Job16:5 nkabatera inkunga y’akarimi gusa, amagambo meza akabahoza akababaro." 
Job16:6 Ariko kuvuga, si byo binkiza ububabare, guceceka na byo, ntibinyorohereza." 
Job16:7 Noneho Imana ingejeje kure kubi, ibitero byayo birankuranwaho." 
Job16:8 Yanyibasiye, iranshinja nabi, n’ukunanuka kwanjye kurabigaragaza." 
Job16:9 Umujinya wayo urandya, uranyikomye, ari na ko impekenyera amenyo; umwanzi wanjye arampigisha ijisho." 
Job16:10 Baranyanjamye, baransebya, bakankubita inshyi, bose bahagurukiye kundwanya." 
Job16:11 Koko Imana yantegeje abagizi ba nabi, inta mu maboko y’abagome." 
Job16:12 Nari nibereye mu mahoro, iranturumbanya, imfata ku gakanu, inkubita hasi; impindura imashiro ryayo." 
Job16:13 Iranyuza imyambi impande zose, impinguranya impyiko itambabariye, indurwe yanjye iyisesa hasi." 
Job16:14 Iransumira nk’umurwanyi, ingwizaho inguma zayo." 
Job16:15 Niboheraho ikigunira, nkurunga uruhanga rwanjye mu mukungugu," 
Job16:16 amaso yanjye yatukujwe no kurira, none ibigohe byanjye byuzuyeho ibihu." 
Job16:17 Nyamara ariko nta nabi indangwaho, n’isengesho ryanjye ni iry’umwere!" 
Job16:18 Wa si we, wipfukirana amaraso yanjye, hatagira ikintangirira induru!" 
Job16:19 Kuva ubu, uwo nzatangaho umugabo ari mu ijuru, uzanyishingira ari hejuru hariya." 
Job16:20 Icyampa ngo induru yanjye igere ku Mana, mu gihe amarira yanjye yisesa imbere yayo." 
Job16:21 Iyaba yashoboraga gukemura urubanza umuntu afitanye na yo, nk’uko ikemura urw’umuntu na mugenzi we!" 
Job16:22 Koko rero imyaka nshigaje kubaho irabaze, none ngiye kuzimira ubutazagaruka." 
Job17:1 Umwuka urenda kunshiramo, ndarembye, ndi uwo guhambwa!" 
Job17:2 None se sinahindutse urw’amenyo, kandi ubugome bwabo si bwo bumbuza gusinzira?" 
Job17:3 Mana yanjye, unyiteho! Ni nde wundi wakwemera kunyishingira?" 
Job17:4 Koko rero, umutima wabo wawunyujije ukubiri n’ubwenge, ni yo mpamvu utazatuma bigamba." 
Job17:5 Bameze nk’umuntu ugabiza ibye rubanda, kandi abana be bamuhanze amaso." 
Job17:6 Wampinduye iciro ry’imigani, none nabaye uwo bavunderezaho amacandwe;" 
Job17:7 amaso yanjye yishwe n’agahinda, n’ingingo zanjye zose zaragagaye." 
Job17:8 Abanyamurava byabateye ubwoba, uw’intungane arakarira umugiranabi," 
Job17:9 kandi umunyakuri akomeza inzira ye, maze uw’umwere arushaho gukaza umurego." 
Job17:10 Ngaho rero mwese nimuhaguruke munshinje; nyamara nta munyabwenge n’umwe mbasangamo! 
Job17:11 Ubuzima bwanjye n’imigambi yanjye, byose byabaye impfabusa, n’igihe kiranshirana." 
Job17:12 Ijoro bo baryita umunsi, bwakwira bati ’Burakeye.’" 
Job17:13 Icyo ndindiriye ni iki? Inyenga yatashye iwanjye, uburiri bwanjye buri mu mwijima;" 
Job17:14 imva nsigaye nyita ’data’, naho inyo nkazita ’mama’ na mushiki wanjye!’" 
Job17:15 Icyizere nari mfite kiri he? Ya mahirwe nahoranye ni nde ukiyabona? 
Job17:16 Ese ibyo nzamanukana na byo tujyane ikuzimu, maze tuzimirire hamwe mu butaka?»" 
Job18:1 Bilidadi w’i Shuwa afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job18:2 «Muzizimba mu magambo mugeze ryari? Mwitonde mutekereze, hanyuma tuganire." 
Job18:3 Ni kuki waduhindura ibiburabwenge, mbese urabona turi ibicucu?" 
Job18:4 Dore wowe urasebwa n’umujinya, urakeka se ko biri buhindure igihugu itongo, cyangwa ko biri bwimure amabuye aho ari?" 
Job18:5 Ni koko, urumuri rw’umugome rurazima, n’ibishashi by’umuriro we bikayoyoka," 
Job18:6 urumuri rwo mu nzu ye rurakendera, n’itara rye rikamuzimiraho." 
Job18:7 Intambwe yateraga akataje, azazihina, n’imigambi yigiraga izabe ari yo imuroha." 
Job18:8 Koko rero, ni we wishora mu mutego, atambagira hejuru yawo." 
Job18:9 Umushibuka umufata akaguru, ipfundo rikaba ngiri ryikoze," 
Job18:10 umugozi wihishe mu butaka uba umutegereje, umutego uri bumufate uri mu nzira ye." 
Job18:11 Ubwoba bukamutangatanga impande zose, bukamusatira buhoro buhoro;" 
Job18:12 imbaraga ze zigashonga, maze ubutindi bukamwugariza." 
Job18:13 Indwara ikamukemba uruhu, intumwa y’urupfu ikamuguguna ingingo zose." 
Job18:14 Bakamuturumbura mu ituze ry’ihema rye, bakamujyana ku Mutegetsi uteye ubwoba." 
Job18:15 Ihema rishobora kongera guturwa, n’inzu ye bayikuyeho imiziro." 
Job18:16 Imizi ye yanambiye mu butaka, naho amashami ye yumira hejuru;" 
Job18:17 yaribagiranye mu gihugu cyose, ahantu hose, izina rye ryarasibanganye." 
Job18:18 Bamukuye mu rumuri bamuhirikira mu mwijima, maze acibwa ku isi." 
Job18:19 Nta ba sekuru, nta n’abuzukuru agira mu muryango we, n’aho aba, nta muntu uharangwa;" 
Job18:20 amakuba ye yatangaje ab’iburasirazuba, naho ab’iburengero bwaryo barumirwa." 
Job18:21 Ni koko, ayo ni yo maherezo y’inzu y’abanyabyaha, uwo ni wo mwanya wahariwe abatazi Imana.»" 
Job19:1 Yobu afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job19:2 «Muzahereza he kunshengura umutima, munsukiranyaho ayo magambo yanyu?" 
Job19:3 Dore bubaye ubwa cumi munsagarira, mukankoza hirya no hino nta cyo mwishisha." 
Job19:4 Kandi rero niba naranayobye, ibyo ni jye jyenyine bireba." 
Job19:5 Mu by’ukuri, niba munyigambaho, kandi mukanshinja ibyo nzira," 
Job19:6 mumenye ko Nyir’ububasha ari we wandenganyije amfatira mu mutego we. 
Job19:7 Ndataka ko ndengana, ntihagire unyumva, natabaza, nkabura undenganura!" 
Job19:8 Inzira yanjye yarayizitiye, sinshobora guhita, aho nyura yahashyize umwijima;" 
Job19:9 anyambura ikuzo ryanjye, ancuza ikamba ryari rindi ku mutwe;" 
Job19:10 yambujije epfo na ruguru, ndabyina mvamo, amizero yanjye yayagushije hasi nk’igiti batsinze;" 
Job19:11 uburakari bwe bwangurumaniyeho, angenzereza nk’umwanzi we;" 
Job19:12 ingabo ze zantereye icyarimwe, zishakira inzira iziyobora iwanjye, maze zishinga ingando ahakikije ihema ryanjye." 
Job19:13 Abavandimwe banjye barampunze, n’incuti zanjye zirantererana." 
Job19:14 Abaturanyi n’abo twari tuziranye, barigendeye, ntibakinyibuka." 
Job19:15 Ari abashyitsi baba mu rugo iwanjye, ari abaja banjye, bose bamfata nk’umuvantara; usanga mbateye imbogamizi." 
Job19:16 Iyo mpamagaye umugaragu wanjye, ntiyitaba, n’aho nahatiriza nkamwinginga;" 
Job19:17 umwuka wanjye utera umugore wanjye ishozi, none n’urubyaro rwanjye rusigaye runyinuka." 
Job19:18 Dore n’abana bato basigaye bansuzugura, naba ngize ngo ndavuga, bakiha inkwenene;" 
Job19:19 inkoramutima zanjye zose ziranyitaza, n’abo nakundaga, ubu barampindutse." 
Job19:20 Amagufa yanjye yumanye n’uruhu, nsigaye ngenda nshinyitse amenyo." 
Job19:21 Mwebwe ab’incuti zanjye, ndabatakambiye, nimumbabarire, dore Nyir’ububasha yaranshegeshe!" 
Job19:22 Ni kuki munyibasiye nk’Imana? Ese ntimuzageza aho mumpa agahenge? 
Job19:23 Icyampa ngo amagambo yanjye azandikwe, bayashyire ku rubaho rw’umuringa," 
Job19:24 bakoreshe ikaramu y’icyuma, maze bayasharage ku rutare ubutazasibangana!" 
Job19:25 Jyewe nzi ko umuvugizi wanjye ariho, amaherezo azatunguka ku isi, aze andengere;" 
Job19:26 namara kunkangura, azampagarika iruhande rwe, maze mbonere Imana mu mubiri wanjye." 
Job19:27 Koko ni jyewe ubwanjye uzayirebera, nzayibonesha amaso yanjye bwite, atari ay’undi; ngiyo inyota inyuzuye umutima." 
Job19:28 Iyo mwibwira muti ’Tuzamuturuka he, tuzakura he icyo tumushinja mu rubanza?’" 
Job19:29 mujye mutinya ko namwe inkota yabagwira, kuko uburakari buzibasira abagome, maze mukamenyereho ko urubanza ruzababaho.»" 
Job20:1 Sofari w’i Nahama afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job20:2 «Ni koko, ibitekerezo byanjye birashyugumbwa kugusubiza, ku buryo ntagishoboye kwihangana." 
Job20:3 Numvise inyigisho zawe zintuka, none ubwenge bwanjye bunyunguye icyo ngusubiza." 
Job20:4 Aho uzi neza ko kuva kera na kare, kuva umuntu yaremwa ku isi," 
Job20:5 umunezero w’abagome utamara kabiri, kandi ibyishimo by’abagomeramana ntibimare igihe." 
Job20:6 N’iyo yaba areshya n’aho bwakereye, umutwe we ugakora ku ijuru," 
Job20:7 ntazabura kuzimira burundu nka baringa; abamubonaga bagire bati ’Arigitiye he?’ 
Job20:8 Azayoyoka nk’inzozi zidafatika, azimire nk’ibyo umuntu arota nijoro;" 
Job20:9 ijisho ryamubonaga, ntirizamurabukwa ukundi, n’ahantu yabaga ntihazaba hakimumenya." 
Job20:10 Abana be bazatanga indishyi z’abakene, bazishyure bazikura mu mutungo we." 
Job20:11 Amagufa ye yarangwaga n’imbaraga za gisore, none aryamanye na we mu gitaka." 
Job20:12 Akanwa ke kari karyohewe n’icyaha, akagihisha mu nsi y’ururimi rwe," 
Job20:13 akagitsimbararaho ntakireke, agakomeza kukijundika mu matama ye," 
Job20:14 nyamara bene iyo ndyo igaga ikigera mu nda, igahinduka indurwe y’uburozi ikimugeramo!" 
Job20:15 Umutungo w’abandi yamiraguye, agomba kuwuruka, Imana ni yo iwuryoza inda ye." 
Job20:16 Yanyunyuje ubumara bw’inzoka, none reka yicwe n’ururimi rw’impiri!" 
Job20:17 Ntakibona ya migezi y’amavuta, n’inzuzi z’ubuki n’ikivuguto." 
Job20:18 Inyungu ye asigaye ayitanga aho kuyimira, ntakishimira ibyo yiyuhiye akuya." 
Job20:19 Koko rero, yatoteje abakene arabatsikamira, asahura inzu atubatse;" 
Job20:20 ntiyigeze ashira ipfa, bityo nta cyo azaramura mu byo atunze," 
Job20:21 kandi nta muntu n’umwe atambuye. Ni yo mpamvu umunezero we utazaramba," 
Job20:22 azatunga byinshi ariko ahangayike, ibyago byose bizamugwira." 
Job20:23 Kandi, n’ubwo yujuje inda ye, Imana izamuterereza uburakari bwayo, bumusabagire mu mubiri nk’ibiryo." 
Job20:24 Nanizibukira inkota y’icyuma, umuheto ucuze mu muringa uzamuhinguranya;" 
Job20:25 umwambi uzamutunguka mu bitugu, undi uhinguke mu mara, wahindutse urugina, maze amakuba yose amuteranireho." 
Job20:26 Umwijima w’icuraburindi uramutegereje, umuriro w’inkonkobotsi uzamuyogoza, ukongeze n’ibyari bisigaye mu ihema rye." 
Job20:27 Ijuru ryashyize ahagaragara icyaha cye, n’isi yahagurukiye kumurwanya." 
Job20:28 Icyorezo kizatsemba inzu ye, aterwe n’umwuzure ku munsi w’uburakari bw’umutegereje." 
Job20:29 Urwo ni rwo ruhare Imana igenera umugome, ni wo mugabane imuteganyiriza.»" 
Job21:1 Yobu afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job21:2 «Mutege amatwi, mwumve amagambo yanjye, ni cyo cyiza mwankorera." 
Job21:3 Mureke kunca mu ijambo, maze nimara kuvuga mubone kunseka." 
Job21:4 Ese mwagira ngo uwo ninuba ni umuntu? None se ubwo nabuzwa n’iki kurambirwa? 
Job21:5 Nimuhindukire mundebe, murumirwa, maze mwifate ku munwa." 
Job21:6 Iyo mbitekereje, nshya ubwoba, umubiri wanjye ugahinda umushyitsi." 
Job21:7 Ni kuki abagome bagira ubugingo, kandi bagasaza, n’ubukire bwabo bukiyongera?" 
Job21:8 Dore urubyaro rwabo rurakomera, n’abuzukuru babo bakagwira," 
Job21:9 ingo zabo zikabaho mu ituze, nta kibateye inkeke? Ibihano by’Imana ntibibageraho;" 
Job21:10 ibimasa byabo birororoka, n’inka zabo zibyara zitaramburuye." 
Job21:11 Bareka abana babo bakiruka nk’imitavu, ugasanga ibitambambuga byabo byikinangura." 
Job21:12 Batambira inanga n’ingoma, kandi bagatega amatwi ijwi ry’umwirongi." 
Job21:13 Barangiza ubuzima bwabo mu mutekano, bakajyanwa ikuzimu mu mahoro." 
Job21:14 Nyamara kandi babwiraga Imana bati ’Have igirayo, ntidushaka kumenya inzira zawe!" 
Job21:15 Nyir’ububasha se ni iki ngo tumugaragire, ese twakunguka iki tumutakambiye?’" 
Job21:16 Umukiro wabo ni bo bawigengaho, naho Imana bakayihigika mu migambi yabo." 
Job21:17 Hari uwakunze kubona itara ry’abagome rizima, cyangwa amakuba abagwirira? Ni kangahe Nyir’ububasha arakara akabaterereza ibyago?" 
Job21:18 Bameze se nk’akatsi gahuhwa n’umuyaga, cyangwa umurama utwawe na serwakira?" 
Job21:19 Naho mwe ngo ’Imana izabahanira mu bana babo!’ Icyaruta si uko yabihanira ubwabo, na bo bakireberaho!" 
Job21:20 Bityo umugome akabona ibye bicika, akanasogongera ku burakari bwa Nyir’ububasha!" 
Job21:21 Urugo rwe ruba rukimubwiye iki, atakiriho, iyo yamaze gukuramo ake karenge!" 
Job21:22 None se, Imana ni yo igiye gutozwa ubwenge, kandi ari yo icira urubanza ibikomerezwa byose?" 
Job21:23 Hari upfa akindutse agifite imbaraga ze zose, kandi atunze, atunganiwe," 
Job21:24 ashishe ku mubiri, n’umusokoro ucyorohereye mu magufa ye." 
Job21:25 Hari n’undi upfana agahinda, atanigeze ihirwe na rimwe." 
Job21:26 Abo bombi ariko, bahambwa mu gitaka! inyo zikabashokera icyarimwe!" 
Job21:27 Ni koko, ibitekerezo byanyu ndabizi, nzi n’ibyo muntekerezaho byose mundemera." 
Job21:28 Muribaza muti ’Ya nzu y’igikomangoma iri he? Rya hema ry’abagome rishinze hehe?’ 
Job21:29 Ese ntimujya mubaza n’abagenzi, cyangwa mwaba muhinyura ibyo bavuga?" 
Job21:30 Iyo amakuba yateye umugome ararokoka, ku munsi w’uburakari, akarusimbuka." 
Job21:31 Ni nde se umucyurira amafuti ye? Ibyo yakoze se, ni nde ubimwihimura?" 
Job21:32 Bamujyana mu irimbi, imva ye bakayirinda;" 
Job21:33 ubutaka bwo mu mucyamu bukamworohera, imbaga nyamwinshi ikamuherekeza, abantu batabarika bakamugenda imbere." 
Job21:34 Ni kuki mwiha kungira inama z’amahomvu? Ibisubizo mumpa, ni ukunkina ku mubyimba.»" 
Job22:1 Elifazi w’i Temani afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job22:2 «Ese umuntu yagirira akamaro Imana? Oya, umuntu uzi gushishoza, ni we ubwe wigirira akamaro." 
Job22:3 Nta cyo Nyir’ububasha yunguka iyo ubaye intungane, ubwo se wumva bimwungura iki iyo ubaye indakemwa?" 
Job22:4 None se kuba umukunze ni cyo aguhanira, bigatuma agucira urubanza?" 
Job22:5 Aho si ukubera ubugome bwawe bukabije, n’ibyaha byawe birenze urugero?" 
Job22:6 Wakaga abavandimwe bawe ingwate nta mpamvu, abakene ukabacuza utwambaro twabo." 
Job22:7 Uwabaga afite inyota wamwimaga icyo anywa, n’ushonje ukamwima umugati." 
Job22:8 Igihugu cyari icy’abafite amaboko, kandi kigaturwa n’abatoni bawe." 
Job22:9 Wirukanaga abapfakazi bakagenda amara masa, imfubyi ukazivunagura amaboko." 
Job22:10 Ni yo mpamvu rero waguye mu mutego, kandi ukaba wahiye ubwoba;" 
Job22:11 urumuri rwacuze umwijima, ntiwaba ukibona, urengwaho n’ikizenga cy’amazi." 
Job22:12 Imana se ntiyibera mu bushorishori bw’ijuru? Itegereze inyenyeri, urebe ukuntu ziri hejuru cyane!" 
Job22:13 None waravuze ngo ’Imana se izi iki? Yamenya ibintu inyuze he ibicu? 
Job22:14 Ibicu birayibambira, ntishobore kubona, ikagenda izenguruka ijuru.’" 
Job22:15 Urashaka se gukomeza ya nzira ya kera, imwe yanyuzwe n’abagome," 
Job22:16 ba bandi bamizwe imburagihe, igihe umwuzure urenze hejuru y’ibyo bari bubatse?" 
Job22:17 Babwiraga Imana ngo ’Have igirayo; Nyir’ububasha se yashobora kudukoraho iki?’ 
Job22:18 Nyamara ni we wari warujuje umutungo mu mazu yabo, ariko inama zabo zigacisha ukubiri na we!" 
Job22:19 Ukugwa kwabo gushimisha intungane, maze abaziranenge bakabasekera." 
Job22:20 Umutungo wabo warayogojwe, n’ibyo basize umuriro urabitwika!" 
Job22:21 Ngaho nawe igorore na Nyir’ububasha, mubane mu mahoro, bityo umutekano uzakugarukira;" 
Job22:22 ujye wumva inyigisho ze, ubike amagambo ye ku mutima." 
Job22:23 Nugarukira Nyir’ububasha, ukicisha bugufi, ukiyama uburiganya mu nzu yawe," 
Job22:24 nusuzugura zahabu, ukayijugunya mu bishingwe, n’andi mabuye y’agaciro ukayata mu misitwe," 
Job22:25 ubwo ni we ubwe uzaba zahabu yawe, akakubera ikirundo cya feza." 
Job22:26 Koko rero, Nyir’ububasha ni we uzakunezeza, maze uzubure umutwe urangamire Imana;" 
Job22:27 uyitakambire, ikubabarire, n’ibyo wifuza, ubigereho." 
Job22:28 Nugira umugambi ufata, uzaguhira, n’inzira zawe zirangwe n’umucyo," 
Job22:29 kuko, acubya uwikuza, agakiza uwiyoroheje;" 
Job22:30 arokora ab’intungane, kandi wowe uzakizwa n’ibikorwa byawe biboneye!»" 
Job23:1 Yobu afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job23:2 «Nanone, amaganya yanjye arakomeye, ukuboko kwa Nyir’ububasha kurankandamiza, nkaboroga." 
Job23:3 Ni nde uzamunyereka, akangeza aho atuye!" 
Job23:4 Navugira akababaro kanjye imbere ye, nkamubwira ingingo nshingiyeho," 
Job23:5 bityo nkamenya amagambo yansubiza, nkumva neza icyo ambwiye." 
Job23:6 Ese hari icyamuvuna mu kujya impaka nanjye? Oya, yapfa kuntega amatwi gusa;" 
Job23:7 akumva ukuntu uwo baburana avuga ukuri, maze urubanza rwanjye nkarutsindira burundu!" 
Job23:8 Ariko, iyo mushakiye iburasirazuba, simubona, mu burengero bwaryo na ho, simpamusange;" 
Job23:9 mushakishiriza mu majyaruguru, simuce iryera, nagana epfo na ho, simpamubone." 
Job23:10 Nyamara we azi uko merewe; ashatse yanyuza mu itanura, navamo nsa na zahabu iyunguruye." 
Job23:11 Nashinze ibirenge byanjye mu ntambwe ze, mboneza inzira ye nta kuyoba;" 
Job23:12 sinigeze nanga amategeko yampaye, kandi nzirikana mu mutima amagambo yambwiye." 
Job23:13 Ariko ni we utegeka, kandi nta we umuvuguruza, icyo yiyemeje, aragikora." 
Job23:14 Nanjye, azangenzereza uko yabigennye, kimwe n’indi migambi yose yifitemo!" 
Job23:15 Iyo ni yo mpamvu ituma nshya ubwoba imbere ye, maze uko mbitekereza, nkarushaho guhinda umushyitsi." 
Job23:16 Imana yanciye intege, Nyir’ububasha yankuye umutima;" 
Job23:17 kuko ikinshengura, atari umwijima ndimo, cyangwa ibihu byugarije amaso yanjye." 
Job24:1 «Kuki Imana Nyirububasha atagena igihe cy'urubanza? Kuki abayoboke bayo batamenya uwo munsi? 
Job24:2 Dore hariho abimura imbago z'amasambu yabo, hariho n'abaragiye amatungo bashimuse." 
Job24:3 Hariho abahuguza impfubyi indogobe yayo, hariho n'abatwara ikimasa cy'umupfakazi ho ingwate." 
Job24:4 Batoteza abatishoboye bakabayobya, abakene bo mu gihugu bakagomba kwihisha." 
Job24:5 Bameze nk'indogobe mu butayu, bazindukira mu butayu gushaka ibyokurya, bajyayo gushaka ibyo gutunga abana babo." 
Job24:6 Bahatirwa gutongora imirima y'abagome, bagahatirwa gusarura imizabibu yabo." 
Job24:7 Bararira aho nta cyo biyoroshe, nta cyo bagira cyo kwikinga imbeho." 
Job24:8 Imvura yo mu misozi ibacikiraho, babura ubwugamo bakikinga ku rutare." 
Job24:9 Imfubyi bayinyaga n'ibyayibeshagaho, naho abana b’umukene bakabagira ingwate." 
Job24:10 Bityo bagendera aho bambaye ubusa, bicwa n'inzara nyamara bikorereye abandi imiba y'ingano!" 
Job24:11 Bakamura amavuta mu minzeze, babengera divayi mu mizabibu, nyamara bo bicwa n'inyota." 
Job24:12 Mu mugi huzuye imiborogo y'abasamba, nyamara Imana ntiyita ku gutakamba kwabo! babura ubwugamo, bakisunga urutare." 
Job24:13 Abagome bazirana n'urumuri, ntibashaka kugendera mu mucyo, ntibaguma mu nzira zawo." 
Job24:14 Umwicanyi abyuka mu rukerera, yica umukene n'utishoboye, iyo ijoro riguye ajya kwiba." 
Job24:15 Umusambanyi ategereza ko bwira, agenda yipfutse mu maso, yibwira ati 'Nta wuri bumbone'." 
Job24:16 Abajura bamena amazu nijoro, ku manywa bakihisha, bazirana n'umucyo." 
Job24:17 Kuri bo igitondo kibabera nk'umwijima w'icuraburindi, koko rero bamenyereye ibitera ubwoba bya nijoro." 
Job24:18 Imibereho y'abagome ni nk'amazi ahita, aho batuye haravumwe, nta n'umwe muri bo ukigera mu mizabibu ye." 
Job24:19 Uko icyokere n’ubushyuhe bishongesha urubura, ni ko umunyabyaha azimirira ikuzimu." 
Job24:20 Nyina wamubyaye aramwibagirwa, inyo ziramurya ntiyongere kwibukwa. Arimbuka nk'igiti kirimburanywe n'imizi." 
Job24:21 Yagiriraga nabi abagore bagumbashye, yakandamizaga n'abapfakazi." 
Job24:22 Imana Nyirimbaraga irimbura abanyagitugu, iyo ibahagurukiye ntibaba bakirusimbutse." 
Job24:23 Haba ubwo Imana ibareka bakiyumvamo amahoro, icyakora igahoza ijisho ku migenzereze yabo." 
Job24:24 Bagubwa neza akanya gato, nyuma bakarimbuka, bacishwa bugufi bakamera nk'abandi bose, bararabirana bakamera nk’ihundo batemye." 
Job24:25 Ni nde wanyomoza ko ibyo atari ko biri? Nagaragaze ko ibyo mvuze ari amahomvu » 
Job25:1 Bilidadi w’i Shuwa afata ijambo, aravuga ati" 
Job25:2 «Imana ni yo nyir’ububasha n’igitinyiro, ni yo ituma amahoro aganza mu ijuru." 
Job25:3 Ni nde wabasha kubarura imitwe y’ingabo zayo? Ni nde umucyo w'Imana utamurikira? 
Job25:4 Mbese umuntu yabasha gutunganira Imana? Ese umuntu buntu yabasha ate kuba umwere? 
Job25:5 Mbese niba Imana ibona ukwezi kudacyeye, ese niba Imana ibona inyenyeri zitera de," 
Job25:6 kuri mwene muntu hacura iki, mwene muntu umeze nk’urunyo n’umunyorogoto?" 
Job26:1 Nuko Yobu arabasubiza ati ati 
Job26:2 «Mbega ngo uratera inkunga umunyantegenke! mbega ngo uragoboka utishoboye! 
Job26:3 Mbega ngo uragira inama ikiburabwenge! Mbega ngo urangaragariza ubushishozi buhambaye! 
Job26:4 Ariko se ayo magambo yose urayabwira nde? Ni nde wakoheje kuvuga uryo? 
Job26:5 Abapfuye barahindira umushyitsi ikuzimu, amazi n’ibiyabamo biradagadwa." 
Job26:6 Imana ireba ibiri ikuzimu, aho ikuzimu ntihihisha amaso yayo." 
Job26:7 Ni yo yahanitse ikirere, ni yo yatendetse isi ku busa busa." 
Job26:8 Amazi iyabumbira mu bicu bibuditse, nyamara nubwo biremereye ntibihanuka." 
Job26:9 Itwikira ukwezi, igutwikiriza ibicu byayo." 
Job26:10 Ishyiraho ikirere cy'urugabano hejuru y’amazi, urugabano rutandukanya umucyo n’umwijima." 
Job26:11 Imana itigisa inkingi z’ijuru, irazitigisa zigakangarana." 
Job26:12 Ububasha bwayo bwatumye icubya inyanja, ubwenge bwayo bwatumye irimbura Rahabu." 
Job26:13 Umwuka wayo wakenkemuye ijuru, ubwayo yivuganye cya gikoko kabutindi!" 
Job26:14 Niba ibi yakoze bidahambaye kuri yo, ibyo twe dushobora kumenya ni bike cyane! Ese ubwo ni nde wasobanukirwa n’ububasha bwayo?»" 
Job27:1 Nuko Yobu yongera gufata ijambo aravuga ati 
Job27:2 «Ndahiye Imana yanze kundenganura, ndahiye Nyirububasha unshavuza," 
Job27:3 igihe cyose ngihumeka, igihe cyose Imana ikimpaye umwuka," 
Job27:4 sinzigera ngira ikibi mvuga, nta n'ubwo nzigera mbeshya." 
Job27:5 Sinshobora kwemera na rimwe ko muvuga ukuri, nzarinda nipfira nkivuga ko ndi umwere!" 
Job27:6 Nzakomeza kuba intungane sinzabireka, igihe cyose nkiriho nta cyo nishinja." 
Job27:7 «Unyanga azapfe urw’abagome, umpagurukiye apfe urw'inkozi z'ibibi!" 
Job27:8 Umuhakanamana agira cyizere ki? Agira cyizere ki iyo yambuwe ubuzima bwe? 
Job27:9 Dore amakuba azamwugariza, mbese namwugariza Imana izumva ugutakamba kwe?" 
Job27:10 Umuntu nk’uwo ntiyakwishimira Nyirububasha, ntiyata igihe cye atakambira Imana." 
Job27:11 Jyeweho nzabamenyesha ububasha bw’Imana, sinzabahisha imigambi ya Nyirububasha." 
Job27:12 Erega namwe mwese mwarabyiboneye! None se ni iki gituma muvuga amagambo y'amahomvu? 
Job27:13 «Dore ibihembo Imana igenera umugome, dore igihano Nyirububasha agenera abanyagitugu:" 
Job27:14 abana abyara bazicwa n'inkota, abamukomokaho bazicwa n'inzara." 
Job27:15 Abe barokotse bazatsembwa n'icyorezo, abapfakazi babo ntibazabaririra." 
Job27:16 Nubwo yarunda ifeza nyinshi, nubwo yarunda imyambaro," 
Job27:17 iyo myambaro izambarwa n'intungane, ifeza na yo izajyanwa n'abere!" 
Job27:18 «Inzu y'umugome idigadiga nk’iy’igitagangurirwa, idigadiga nk'akaruri k'umurinzi w'umurima." 
Job27:19 Aryama akungahaye, akabyuka atindahaye, iyo akangutse asanga ibyo atunze byayoyotse." 
Job27:20 Ibitera ubwoba bimwisukiranyaho nk'amazi, nijoro serwakira ikamwamurukana." 
Job27:21 Umuyaga w’iburasirazuba uramutwara, uramutumukana akava aho yari atuye." 
Job27:22 Umuyaga umutumura nta mpuhwe, nta bwo abasha guhunga ubukana bwawo." 
Job27:23 Ababonye ibimubayeho baramukwena, aho agannye hose bamuha urw'amenyo!»" 
Job28:1 Koko rero, feza igira aho icukurwa, zahabu na yo igira aho itunganirizwa;" 
Job28:2 ubutare babukura mu butaka, babucanira, bukabyara umuringa." 
Job28:3 Bacukura bitwaje amatara agahashya umwijima, maze ibuye ryari ryihishe mu mwijima w’igicuku, rikagaragara ryose uko ryakabaye." 
Job28:4 Imbaga y’abacakara bacukuye amarongi ahantu hadatuwe, bayajyamo bamanukiye ku kiziriko, kibakoza hirya no hino nta muntu ubareba." 
Job28:5 Ubutaka bwera ibitunga abantu, ariko mu nda yabwo umuriro uhinda." 
Job28:6 Aho hantu hari amabuye y’agaciro, arimo na zahabu nyinshi!" 
Job28:7 Ni inzira ibyaruzi bitazi, emwe na kagoma ntiraharabukwa!" 
Job28:8 Inyamaswa z’ishyamba ntizirahagera, habe ngo n’intare irahazi." 
Job28:9 Amasarabwayi yarajanjaguwe, imisozi irarimbagurwa," 
Job28:10 urutare barucishaho imiyoboro, maze ibintu by’agaciro byose, umuntu arabibona." 
Job28:11 Bashakiye no mu masoko y’imigezi, ibyihishe byose bishyirwa ahagaragara." 
Job28:12 Ariko se ubuhanga, bwo bukomoka he? Indiri y’ubwenge iba he?" 
Job28:13 Umuntu ntazi inzira ibuganishaho, kandi nta bwo buri kuri iyi si y’abazima." 
Job28:14 Inyenga iravuga iti ’Nta bwo bundimo!’ n’inyanja na yo iti ’Nta bwo buba iwanjye!’ 
Job28:15 Nta bwo buguranwa zahabu iyunguruye, kandi ntibunagurwa uburemere bwa feza." 
Job28:16 Nta n’uwabugereranya n’amabuye y’agaciro, nka zahabu y’i Ofiri cyangwa safiri." 
Job28:17 Ni byo, nta ho buhuriye na zahabu cyangwa amasaro, nta n’uwabugurana igikombe cya zahabu." 
Job28:18 Nta ho buhuriye n’amabuye y’agaciro, kandi kubugira biruta gutunga ibirezi." 
Job28:19 Ntibugereranywa na topazi yo mu Misiri, kandi nta ho buhuriye na zahabu iyunguruye." 
Job28:20 Ariko se noneho, ubuhanga bukomoka he? indiri y’ubwenge ni iyihe?" 
Job28:21 Bwihishe amaso y’umuntu wese, n’inyoni zo mu kirere ntizibuzi." 
Job28:22 Inyenga y’ikuzimu yarivugiye iti ’Twigeze kumva babuvuga baburata.’ 
Job28:23 Imana yonyine ni yo izi inzira yabwo, kandi ikamenya aho buba," 
Job28:24 kuko ibona hose kugeza mu mpera z’isi, kandi ikitegereza ibiri mu nsi y’ijuru byose." 
Job28:25 Igihe yahaga umuyaga imbaraga ufite, ikagenera amazi urugero rwayo," 
Job28:26 igihe yahaga imvura amategeko ayigenga, igaca n’inzira y’imitontomo y’inkuba," 
Job28:27 icyo gihe, ni ho yabubonye, irabucengera, irabushima, kandi ibusuzuma impande zose," 
Job28:28 maze ibwira umuntu, iti ’Gutinya Nyagasani, ni bwo buhanga, kandi kuzibukira icyaha, ni bwo bwenge.’" 
Job29:1 Yobu akomeza umuvugo we, agira ati" 
Job29:2 «Ni nde uzansubiza imibereho nk’iyo nahoranye mbere, igihe Imana yandindaga," 
Job29:3 ubwo itara rye ryamurikiraga ku mutwe wanjye, maze urumuri rwe rukanyobora mu mwijima?" 
Job29:4 Uwansubiza uko nari meze, igihe nari ntengamaye, Nyir’ububasha ari we undinze," 
Job29:5 Imana ikiri kumwe nanjye, igihe abana banjye bankikizaga," 
Job29:6 niyuhagiza amata ibirenge, amavuta avubuka mu rutare, agatemba nk’imigezi!" 
Job29:7 Icyo gihe, nasohokeraga ku karubanda hafi y’umugi, nkahasanga intebe yangenewe," 
Job29:8 urubyiruko rwambona rukihisha, naho abakambwe bagahaguruka banyubahiriza;" 
Job29:9 abatware birindaga kuvuga, iminwa yabo bakayipfuka," 
Job29:10 ijwi ry’ibikomangoma rigacweza, ururimi rwabo bakaruca bakarumira." 
Job29:11 Ni koko, uwanyumvaga wese yanyitaga umuhire, n’umbonye wese akanyamamaza," 
Job29:12 kuko nakizaga umukene untakambiye, cyangwa imfubyi yabuze kirengera." 
Job29:13 Abihebye bose bapfaga bandamya, n’umutima w’umupfakazi nkawuha kwishima." 
Job29:14 Narangwagaho ubutungane, kandi bunyizihiye, ubutabera ni bwo bwari igishura n’ikamba ryanjye." 
Job29:15 Nareberaga impumyi, nkagendera igicumba," 
Job29:16 nari umubyeyi w’abakene, kandi nkita ku magorwa ya ba nyakamwe." 
Job29:17 Abagiranabi nabakuraga amenyo, nkabatesha abo bashakaga kurya." 
Job29:18 Ubwo naribwiraga nti «Nzapfa nshaje, mfite imyaka itabarika nk’umusenyi;" 
Job29:19 imizi yanjye izashorera mu mazi, maze nijoro urume rutonde ku mashami yanjye;" 
Job29:20 ikuzo ryanjye rizahora ari ryinshi, kandi umuheto wanjye uzasubirana umurego.»" 
Job29:21 Baracecekaga bakantega amatwi, bagategereza igitekerezo cyanjye." 
Job29:22 Iyo narangizaga kuvuga, nta wasubizagayo, ahubwo ijambo ryanjye ryarabacengeraga," 
Job29:23 ugasanga bampanze amaso, nk’abategereje imvura, bakasama nk’abarangamiye iy’umuhindo." 
Job29:24 Iyo nabasekeraga, baratangaraga, bakitegereza uko nsa nta na hamwe basize." 
Job29:25 Ni jye wabayoboraga, nkabarangaza imbere, nkamera nk’umwami uri hagati y’imbaga ye, aho mbajyanye bakajya aho." 
Job30:1 None dore nsigaye nsekwa n’abo nduta ubukuru, kandi ba se narajyaga mbakerensa, nkumva basumbwa n’imbwa zindindira amashyo." 
Job30:2 None se amaboko yabo yari kumarira iki? Ko imbaraga zari zarabashizemo," 
Job30:3 kubera ubutindi n’inzara. Babaga mu bigunda, ahantu h’itongo harariranye;" 
Job30:4 basaruraga imbuto zo mu ishyamba, bagatungwa no guhonda inguri." 
Job30:5 Bari ibicibwa mu bantu, basigaye babakwena nk’ibisambo." 
Job30:6 Bararaga mu mihora, mu buvumo cyangwa mu bikuku by’urutare;" 
Job30:7 bakagongerera mu bihuru, bakirundanya mu bitovu." 
Job30:8 Bari abana b’inyoko mbi, babyawe n’abatagira izina, bari ibicibwa mu gihugu cyose." 
Job30:9 None basigaye barantereyeho imbyino, nababereye iciro ry’imigani!" 
Job30:10 Nsigaye mbatera isesemi bakampunga, kandi ntibatinya kuncira mu maso." 
Job30:11 Umuheto wanjye, Uhoraho yarawureguye, arandibata, none bose barambonerana." 
Job30:12 Iburyo bwanjye nugarijwe n’ingegera, zishakisha uburyo zantembagaza." 
Job30:13 Barantangatanze, bambuza ubuhungiro, baraje, kandi nta we ubakoma imbere;" 
Job30:14 baciye icyuho kigari bangeraho, nuko bankumbagaza mu byavu." 
Job30:15 Ubwoba bwarantashye, amizero yanjye yose atumuka nk’umuyaga, umukiro wanjye uyoyoka nk’igicu!" 
Job30:16 None umutima wankutse, iminsi y’ubutindi iranyokamye." 
Job30:17 Nijoro, ububabare bumunga amagufa, n’imitsi yanjye ikarega yose." 
Job30:18 Uhoraho yanshikuje umwambaro wanjye, anigisha igishura cyanjye mu ijosi," 
Job30:19 ankumbagaza mu cyondo, none ndasa n’uwaraye mu ivu cyangwa mu mukungugu." 
Job30:20 Uhoraho, ndagutakambira ntunyumve, nakwiyereka, ntunyiteho." 
Job30:21 Wambereye gica, uranyibasira n’imbaraga zawe zose," 
Job30:22 wambagayuje serwakira, irancundagura, maze ndigitira muri iyo nkubi y’umuyaga." 
Job30:23 Ni byo ndabizi, uransubiza mu rupfu, aho abazima bose bazahurira." 
Job30:24 Ariko se abakene sinabateye inkunga, igihe ubutindi bwabugarizaga bakantakira?" 
Job30:25 Ese sinagiriye impuhwe uwo ubuzima bwari bukomereye, umutima wanjye ukaririra umukene?" 
Job30:26 Nari niteze umukiro, amakuba aba ari yo ansanga, nari nizeye urumuri, umwijima uba ari wo unsanga." 
Job30:27 Amara yanjye aragonga ubutitsa, iminsi y’amakuba yaranziye." 
Job30:28 Ndagenda nijimye, nta mucyo, mu ruhame, ndahaguruka ngasakuza," 
Job30:29 nabaye ruhabwanduru nk’umuhari, nibera mu butayu hamwe na za mbuni." 
Job30:30 Umubiri wanjye warirabuye, amagufa yanjye yashiririjwe n’umuriro w’amaseke." 
Job30:31 Inanga yanjye isigaye ari iy’amaganya gusa, naho umwirongi wanjye ugaherekeza amajwi y’abandirira." 
Job31:1 Amaso yanjye, twari twarumvikanye, ko atagomba kugira inkumi arangamira." 
Job31:2 None se uruhare Nyir’ijuru aha abantu ni uruhe? Ni uwuhe mugabane Nyir’ububasha abagenera? 
Job31:3 Aho none si amakuba abahemu bagabana, n’inkozi z’ibibi si akaga zigenewe?" 
Job31:4 Ese ntabona imyifatire yanjye, kandi akabara n’intambwe nteye zose?" 
Job31:5 Niba narabaye umunyabinyoma, nkaba naragenzwaga no kubeshya," 
Job31:6 Imana ninsuzume uko bikwiye, maze imenyereho umurava wanjye!" 
Job31:7 Niba narayobye inzira nyayo, umutima wanjye ugatomerera aho amaso awujyanye, none nkaba narahindanye ibiganza," 
Job31:8 ndabirahiye: nzabibe rubanda rwirire, n’urubyaro rwanjye ruzarimbuke!" 
Job31:9 Niba umutima wanjye warararukiye umugore w’undi, ngahora ndekereje ku rugi rw’umuturanyi," 
Job31:10 ndabirahiye: umugore wanjye azace incuro ku wundi, maze abandi bamwitungire!" 
Job31:11 Koko rero, iryo ni ishyano naba narakoze, ndetse ni icyaha gikwiye gucirwa urubanza," 
Job31:12 cyamviramo umuriro wantwika ukandimbura, ugakongeza umusaruro w’ibyo nejeje byose." 
Job31:13 Niba narakandamije umugaragu wanjye, nkarenganya umuja wanjye hari icyo dupfa," 
Job31:14 ubwo se nzabigenza nte Imana nihaguruka, ikaza kwibariza; nzasubiza iki?" 
Job31:15 Uwambyaye we se, si yo yamuremye, twese se si yo yatubumbabumbiye mu nda itubyara?" 
Job31:16 Ese hari ubwo nigeze nirengagiza icyifuzo cy’abakene, ngo ndeke amaso y’umupfakazi ampondoberera imbere?" 
Job31:17 Ese nisangizaga umugati jyenyine, ntawuhayeho impfubyi?" 
Job31:18 — kandi jyewe, kuva nkiri muto, Imana yarandeze kibyeyi, ikandengera kuva nkivuka!—" 
Job31:19 Ese hari ubwo nabonye umukene wambaye ubusa, mbona utishoboye yabuze icyo yiyorosa," 
Job31:20 maze ndeka kubahoza mbaha icyo bikinga, no kubasusurukisha uruhu rw’intama zanjye?" 
Job31:21 Ese hari ubwo nasagariye impfubyi ngo ni uko mbonye rubanda banshyigikiye? 
Job31:22 Niba rero narakoze bene ayo mahano, ndabirahiye: ndakanantukamo ijosi, ukuboko kwanjye gukonyokere mu nkokora!" 
Job31:23 Koko rero, ubwo Imana yazampindisha umushyitsi, sinshobore guhangarana n’ikuzo ryayo!" 
Job31:24 Niba zahabu ari yo nagize amiringiro yanjye, nkibwira ko zahabu iyunguruye ari wo mukiro wanjye," 
Job31:25 niba naranejejwe no kugira umutungo utubutse, nkaba narungutse ibintu byinshi," 
Job31:26 niba narabonye urumuri rubengerana, n’ukwezi kugendana ishema," 
Job31:27 maze umutima wanjye ukararuka, ngakurizaho kubisenga," 
Job31:28 icyo na cyo cyaba ari icyaha nzahanirwa, kuko naba narihakanye Imana yo mu ijuru." 
Job31:29 Ese nigeze nishimira ko umwanzi agize ibyago, mbyinira ku rukoma kubera ibyago byamwugarije?" 
Job31:30 Oya, umunwa wanjye ntiwigeze ucumura, ngo ntakambe musabira gupfa." 
Job31:31 Ese abo mu ihema ryanjye ntibavugaga bati ’Hari uwo wabona utarariye inyama ze ngo azihage?’ 
Job31:32 Nta muvantara wararaga hanze, imiryango yanjye nayikinguriraga umugenzi." 
Job31:33 Hari ubwo se nagenje nka bamwe, mpisha ibyaha byanjye, ibicumuro byanjye mbibika ku mutima?" 
Job31:34 Hari ubwo se natinye amagambo ya rubanda, n’umugayo w’imiryango, maze ndaceceka, ntinya gusohoka iwanjye?" 
Job31:35 Iyaba nashoboraga kugira umuntu wanyumva! Ijambo ryanjye ni iryo, ahasigaye Nyir’ububasha nansubize!" 
Job31:36 Naho ibirego by’umuburanyi wanjye, nzabiheka ku rutugu, ndetse mbyitamirize nk’ikamba." 
Job31:37 Nzamurikira Imana ibyo nakoze byose, nyegere nshinjagirana ishema, uboshye igikomangoma.»" 
Job31:38 Niba ubutaka bwanjye hari icyo bundega, n’imirima yanjye ikaba ibabajwe" 
Job31:39 n’uko nariye ibyo yeze ntishyuye, kandi narishe abayikoragamo, ndabirahiye:" 
Job31:40 niba ari byo, ndakameza amahwa mu mwanya w’ingano, meze na kimari mu mwanya w’indi myaka! Ngiyo indunduro y’amagambo ya Yobu." 
Job32:1 Ba bagabo batatu bageze aho ntibongera kuvuguruza Yobu, kuko atahwemaga kwiyita intungane." 
Job32:2 Nuko, ibyo birakaza cyane Elihu mwene Barakeli w’i Buzi, mu nzu ya Ramu. Yarakariye Yobu, kuko yishongoraga avuga ko afite ukuri imbere y’Imana." 
Job32:3 Yarakariye kandi za ncuti eshatu, kuko zabuze icyo zisubiza, ntizirenganure Imana." 
Job32:4 Igihe bamaze bavugana na Yobu, Elihu yari abateze amatwi, kuko bamurutaga ubukuru." 
Job32:5 Ariko Elihu amaze kubona ko ba bagabo batatu ibisobanuro byabakamanye, uburakari buramwegura." 
Job32:6 Elihu mwene Barakeli w’i Buzi afata ijambo, agira ati «Jyewe ndacyari muto, naho mwebwe musheshe akanguhe, ni yo mpamvu nagize ubwoba, ngatinya kubatangariza ubumenyi bwanjye." 
Job32:7 Ubwo nibwiraga nti ’Inararibonye zirabisobanura, reka ndeke abakuru baduhishurire ubuhanga.’" 
Job32:8 Ariko umwuka wa Nyir’ububasha, iyo ugiye mu muntu, ni ho amenya ubwenge;" 
Job32:9 abakuze si bo bene ubuhanga, n’abasaza si bo bene gushishoza." 
Job32:10 Ni yo mpamvu ngize nti ’Nimutege amatwi, nanjye mbatangarize ubumenyi bwanjye.’" 
Job32:11 Dore nakomeje gutegereza amagambo yanyu, ntega amatwi ibitekerezo byanyu; igihe mwashakashakaga amagambo," 
Job32:12 nari mbarangamiye. None dore nta n’umwe washoboye kunyomoza Yobu, muri mwe nta washubije amagambo ye." 
Job32:13 None rero ntimukibwire ngo ’Twashyikiriye ubuhanga, si umuntu watwigishije, ahubwo ni Imana.’" 
Job32:14 Jyewe sindondobekanya amagambo nk’ayanyu, kandi si na yo nza gukoresha musubiza." 
Job32:15 Bumiwe, ntibagisubiza, amagambo yabakamanye." 
Job32:16 Nategereje... Mbonye batavuga, barekeye, batagisubiza," 
Job32:17 niyemeza gusubiza ku giti cyanjye, ngatangaza nanjye ubumenyi bwanjye." 
Job32:18 Koko rero, amagambo araniganamo, ndiyumvamo umuhate wo kuvuga." 
Job32:19 Ni byo, umutima wanjye umeze nka divayi ipfutse hose, yashaka kubira, igataratsa ibibindi bishyashya." 
Job32:20 Ndashaka kuvuga kugira ngo ninigure, ngiye kubumbura umunwa wanjye maze nsubize." 
Job32:21 Kandi rero, nta we ndi bubere, cyangwa ngo muhakirizweho," 
Job32:22 sinjya menya guhakwa, kuko Iyandemye yahita inkuraho." 
Job33:1 Wowe rero Yobu, umva ibyo nkubwira, utege amatwi amagambo yanjye yose." 
Job33:2 Dore ngiye kubumbura umunwa, ururimi rwanjye rutobore ruvuge;" 
Job33:3 umutima wanjye wuzuye ubuhanga, kandi umunwa uravuga ukuri nyako." 
Job33:4 umwuka w’Imana ni wo wandemye, umwuka wa Nyir’ububasha ni wo wampaye ubuzima." 
Job33:5 Niba ubishoboye, unyomoze, itegure kwiregura, uhagarare imbere yanjye." 
Job33:6 Uko nkumereye, ni nk’uko nawe umeze ku Mana, nanjye navuye mu gitaka;" 
Job33:7 None rero, singutere ubwoba, nta cyo ndi bugukoreho." 
Job33:8 Ndacyumva rwose mu matwi yanjye, ijwi ry’amagambo yawe, ugira uti" 
Job33:9 ’Ndi intungane, nta cyaha ngira, ndi umwere, nta gicumuro kindangwaho," 
Job33:10 ariko Nyir’ububasha aranshakaho urwitwazo, akampindura umwanzi we," 
Job33:11 akantega imitego ngo nyigwemo, kandi akagenzura ibyo nkora byose.’" 
Job33:12 Reka rero ngusubize: nta bwo wavuze iby’ukuri! Kuko Imana isumba ikiremwa muntu; 
Job33:13 nta mpamvu ufite yo kuyishinja ngo ni uko amagambo yawe yose itayashubije! 
Job33:14 Imana ivuga rimwe, ntisubiramo ubwa kabiri." 
Job33:15 Iyo urota mu nzozi nijoro, igihe abantu baba bahwekereye, basinziriye ku mariri yabo," 
Job33:16 ni ho Nyir’ububasha yihishurira abantu, akababonekera bagashya ubwoba," 
Job33:17 ubwo ari ukugira ngo abuze muntu ibikorwa bye bibi, amuvanemo ubwirasi," 
Job33:18 arinde roho ye kurohama, n’ubuzima bwe bwoye kugwa mu mwobo w’ikuzimu." 
Job33:19 Ubundi yigishiriza umuntu n’aho aryamye, nk’igihe ahinda umushyitsi arwaye," 
Job33:20 umutima we wazinutswe ibyo kurya, n’iyo byaba biryoshye bite;" 
Job33:21 agatangira kuma ahagaze, amaguru ye agasigara yanamye," 
Job33:22 ubwo akagenda asanga urupfu, ikuzimu, aho abapfuye bandi baba." 
Job33:23 Nyamara, mu bihumbi by’abamalayika, habonetsemo umwe umwishingira ngo amwibutse icyo ategetswe," 
Job33:24 akanamusabira ku Mana, agira ati ’Mubabarire woye kumwica, namuboneye incungu’," 
Job33:25 ako kanya, uwo muntu yakwiyuburura, akongera gusubirana ubusore bwe." 
Job33:26 Uwambaza Imana wese iramwumva, agatunguka imbere yayo yasazwe n’ibyishimo, agatekerereza abandi uko yarokowe;" 
Job33:27 nuko akaririmbira imbere yabo, agira ati ’Nari naracumuye, nyoba inzira y’ukuri, nyamara nta bwo yampaniye icyaha cyanjye;" 
Job33:28 yarinze roho yanjye inyenga y’ikuzimu; none ubuzima bwanjye burarangwa n’umucyo.’ 
Job33:29 Ibyo ni byo Imana ihora ikora, kabiri gatatu, igirira muntu," 
Job33:30 kugira ngo imurinde inyenga y’ikuzimu, maze amurikirwe n’urumuri rw’abazima." 
Job33:31 Yobu itonde, utege amatwi, uceceke, maze jyewe mvuge." 
Job33:32 Niba hari icyo ufite kuvuga, unsubize, uvuge kuko nifuza ko uhuza n’ukuri;" 
Job33:33 niba kandi nta cyo, ntega amatwi, uceceke, maze ngutoze ubuhanga." 
Job34:1 Elihu arongera afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job34:2 «Mwebwe banyabuhanga, nimwumve amagambo yanjye, namwe bahanga, nimuntege amatwi;" 
Job34:3 kuko ugutwi kunyurwa n’amagambo nk’uko akanwa karyoherwa n’ibiryo. 
Job34:4 Tugerageze gushishoza tumenye igitunganye, turebere hamwe igikwiye." 
Job34:5 Ni koko, Yobu yaravuze ngo ’Ndi intungane, ariko Imana yarantereranye." 
Job34:6 Umurava wanjye ntumbuza kubabara, igikomere cyanjye ntigikira, kandi nta cyaha ngira!’" 
Job34:7 Ni nde wamera nka Yobu, umuntu wirata nk’unywa amazi," 
Job34:8 agacudika n’inkozi z’ibibi, kandi akagendana n’abagome?" 
Job34:9 Yarivugiye ngo ’Gukora ugushaka kw’Imana, nta cyo bimariye umuntu.’" 
Job34:10 None rero, bantu mushyira mu gaciro, nimuntege amatwi: Ubugome buri kure y’Imana, kandi akarengane ntikarangwa kuri Nyir’ububasha!" 
Job34:11 Buri wese amwitura ibyo yakoze, kandi akamugenera akurikije imyifatire ye." 
Job34:12 Oya rwose, Imana ntiba gito, kandi Nyir’ububasha si we wanga ukuri." 
Job34:13 Haba hari undi wamushinze kumenya isi, akanamuragiza ibiyiriho byose?" 
Job34:14 Ese aramutse yishubije umwuka we, akatuvanamo ubuzima akabwisubiza," 
Job34:15 ibinyamubiri byose ntibyapfira rimwe, umuntu agasubira mu gitaka?" 
Job34:16 Niba ufite ubwenge, umva ibyo nkubwira, utege amatwi amagambo yanjye." 
Job34:17 Ese uzirana n’ukuri yashobora gutegeka? Watinyuka se gushinja Nyir’ubutungane Ushobora byose? 
Job34:18 Ni we ubwira umwami, ati ’Nta cyo umaze’, akabwira ibikomangoma ati ’Muri abagome.’" 
Job34:19 Nta bwo arengera abatware, ntabera umukire ngo arenganye umukene, kuko bose ari we wabaremye." 
Job34:20 Bakinduka mu kanya gato, igicuku kinishye; arimbura abakire bakibagirana, kandi yamagana ibikomerezwa, bikabura gitabara." 
Job34:21 Koko rero, amaso ye ayahoza ku bantu, akabona aho banyuze hose;" 
Job34:22 nta mwijima cyangwa ijoro inkozi z’ibibi zamwihishamo. 
Job34:23 Imana ntiha umugambi umuntu, ngo ajye kwiregura imbere yayo." 
Job34:24 Ikindura abakomeye nta we ibajije, maze ku ntebe yabo ikahicaza abandi." 
Job34:25 Izi neza ibikorwa byabo, yahengera nijoro ikabahanantura bagahonyorwa." 
Job34:26 Ibatsibagura kimwe n’abagome, bagakubitirwa ku karubanda aho bose babona," 
Job34:27 kuko baba baranze kuyikurikira, bakirengagiza inzira zayo," 
Job34:28 bigatuma imiborogo y’abakene iyigeraho, ikumva n’induru z’abatishoboye." 
Job34:29 Imana se iretse kugira icyo ikora, hari uwayishinja? Ihishe uruhanga rwayo se, yabonwa na nde? Nyamara igenzura ibihugu n’abantu," 
Job34:30 kugira ngo hatagira umugome utegeka, muri babandi bashaka koreka imbaga mu mutego." 
Job34:31 Ariko, hagize ubwira Imana ati ’Narashutswe, sinzongera gukora icyaha," 
Job34:32 ibyo ntazi, ujye ubinyigisha, kandi niba naracumuye, sinzabyongera’," 
Job34:33 urumva se yamuhanira ibyaha bye? Ubwo rero unegura imigambi ye, ukaba ari wowe ugomba kwihitiramo igikwiye ntabigutegetse, ngaho ibyo uzi bivuge!" 
Job34:34 Nyamara, abantu bashyira mu gaciro, kimwe n’undi munyabuhanga wese ubyumva, bazavuga bati" 
Job34:35 ’Yobu aravuga nk’injiji, amagambo ye ntiyerekeranye.’" 
Job34:36 Koko rero, Yobu akwiye gufatirwa imigambi, kuko yavuze nk’abagiranabi;" 
Job34:37 yagize gucumura, none yongeyeho no kwivumbura, bigeza aho bamwe muri twe bashidikanya, kandi akomeza guhata Imana amagambo.»" 
Job35:1 Elihu afata ijambo, agira ati" 
Job35:2 «Ubwo uribwira ngo ufite ukuri, ukeka ko wakwiregura imbere y’Imana," 
Job35:3 uvuga uti ’Kuba indacumura bimariye iki? Hari akamaro bimfitiye?’ 
Job35:4 Ubu rero, ngiye kugusubiza, wowe n’incuti zawe." 
Job35:5 Itegereze ijuru, urirebe, uhange amaso ibicu, urasanga biri hejuru yawe." 
Job35:6 Ibyaha ukora wibwira se ko bishyikira Imana? Iyo wungikanya ibicumuro, wibwira ko hari icyo itakaza?" 
Job35:7 Iyo ubaye intungane se ho, hari icyo uyongerera? Hari icyo se uba uyihaye?" 
Job35:8 Abo ubugome bwawe bukoraho ni abantu nkawe, n’ubutungane bwawe bukarengera mwene muntu!" 
Job35:9 Iyo umuntu akandamijwe arataka, yahohoterwa n’abakomeye akavuza induru;" 
Job35:10 ariko nta we ugira ati ’Imana yaturemye iri he? Yo itera abantu kuyiramya nijoro," 
Job35:11 yo iduha ubwenge buruta ubw’inyamaswa zo ku isi, n’ubwitonzi burusha ubw’inyoni zo mu kirere?’" 
Job35:12 Bigatuma rero abantu batakamba, ntibasubize, bitewe n’ubwirasi bw’abagome." 
Job35:13 Nawe rero ugatera hejuru ngo Imana ntiyumva, ngo Nyir’ububasha ntabyitayeho!" 
Job35:14 Ubwo se yakumva ite, kandi uvuga ko utayibona, ko wayiregeye, none ukaba utegereje igisubizo;" 
Job35:15 ukemeza ko uburakari bwayo budahana, kandi ko ubwicanyi itakibwitaho!" 
Job35:16 Ngayo amagambo y’amahomvu Yobu avuga; ni ubwenge buke bumutera gusukagura amagambo.» 
Job36:1 Elihu akomeza ijambo rye, agira ati" 
Job36:2 «Ba uretse gato, nkwigishe, kuko ndacyafite amagambo Imana yantumye." 
Job36:3 Nzakora iyo bwabaga n’ubwenge bwanjye bwose, mburanire Iyandemye." 
Job36:4 Koko rero amagambo yanjye si ibinyoma, uwo muri kumwe ni umugabo w’imvugakuri." 
Job36:5 Menya ko Imana ifite ububasha buhagije, kandi ko idatererana umuntu w’intungane;" 
Job36:6 ntireka umugome ngo yibereho gusa, kandi irenganura abakene." 
Job36:7 ntiyirengagiza intungane, Yagabiye abami ingoma, ibicaza ku ntebe y’inteko ubuzira herezo, ariko bo barikuza," 
Job36:8 none dore bibohesheje ibiziriko, bari ku ngoyi y’ubutindi." 
Job36:9 Yaberetse ibikorwa byabo, ibahishurira ibyaha byabo batewe n’ubwirasi;" 
Job36:10 yazibuye amatwi yabo irababurira, kandi ibategeka kureka ikibi." 
Job36:11 Nibayitega amatwi, bakayiyoboka, bazasazana ihirwe, ubuzima bwabo burangirane umunezero." 
Job36:12 Ariko nibanga kumva, bazaboneza inzira y’ikuzimu, bapfe bazize kubura ubwenge." 
Job36:13 Naho ab’imitima yuzuye ubugome n’inzika, abo Imana iboha ntibayitakambire," 
Job36:14 barimbuka bakiri bato, bishwe no konona ubusore bwabo." 
Job36:15 Ariko umukene, imukirisha ubukene bwe, ubutindi bwe, ikabumuheramo kujijuka." 
Job36:16 Nawe, izagucisha ukubiri n’imibabaro, uzatengamara, hoye kugira ikikuziga, uzagira ibyo kurya bihagije kandi byiza." 
Job36:17 Ubwo rero, uzashinja abagome, maze uyoboke inzira y’ubutungane." 
Job36:18 Uramenye, ntuzashukwe n’abaguha ibintu, cyangwa ngo wicwe n’umurengwe." 
Job36:19 Umukire uzamucire urubanza kimwe n’udafite zahabu, umuntu ukomeye uzamugenzereze kimwe n’umunyantege nke." 
Job36:20 Ntugapyinagaze abantu b’abavantara, ngo ubasimbuze bene wanyu," 
Job36:21 uzirinde kandi, gukurikirana ikibi, kuko ari byo byaguteye kubabazwa bene ako kageni." 
Job36:22 Ni koko, Imana ifite ububasha bw’ikirenga, ni uwuhe mutware wayigereranya?" 
Job36:23 Ni nde se wayibwiriza ibyo ikora, akubahuka kuyibwira ngo ’Warahemutse’?" 
Job36:24 Ahubwo ujye wibuka kurata ibikorwa byayo, mbese nk’uko n’abandi babihimbaje;" 
Job36:25 ni iby’abantu bose bashobora kubona, kandi ntibyihishe, byigaragariza kure." 
Job36:26 Ni koko, Imana ifite ubwenge bw’ikirenga, kandi imyaka yayo ntibarika." 
Job36:27 Ni yo ibumbira hamwe amazi yo mu kirere; maze ikayahinduramo ibicu," 
Job36:28 ibicu na byo bikazabyara imvura, maze ibijojoba bigakwiragira imbaga y’abantu." 
Job36:29 Ni nde wakumva umutambagiro w’ibicu, agasobanukirwa n’ukuntu inkuba zibihindiramo?" 
Job36:30 Imana ni yo ikwiza hose ibihu, bigatwikira n’impinga z’imisozi;" 
Job36:31 Iyo mvura ni yo Imana itungisha amahanga, ikabaha ibyo kurya bihagije." 
Job36:32 Iba ifatishije umurabyo amaboko yombi, ikawurekura iwohereza ahantu." 
Job36:33 Inkuba ihinda itangaza ko ije, n’imvura y’amahindu ikagaragaza uburakari bwayo." 
Job37:1 Ngicyo igitera umutima wanjye kunsimbuka, maze ukava mu gitereko cyawo." 
Job37:2 Nimwumve urwamo rw’ijwi ry’Imana, mwumve n’urusaku ruyiva mu kanwa!" 
Job37:3 Ashumurira inkuba ze ku isi yose, umurabyo we ukagarukira aho ijuru riterwa inkingi." 
Job37:4 Umurabyo uza ukurikiwe n’ijwi ryayo, ijwi ritontoma ry’Imana, maze igihe iryo ricyumvikana, igashumura inkuba zayo." 
Job37:5 Ni koko Imana itwereka ibitangaza byayo, igakora ibintu bihambaye biturenze!" 
Job37:6 Ni yo ibwira urubura, iti ’Genda ugwe ku isi’ igategeka umuvumbi, iti ’Gwa umusubizo.’" 
Job37:7 Nuko igahagarika ityo imirimo y’amaboko y’abantu, kugira ngo bose bamenyereho ibikorwa byayo." 
Job37:8 Inyamaswa zitaha mu ndiri zazo, zikihisha mu myobo yazo." 
Job37:9 Inkubi y’imiyaga ituruka mu majyepfo, imbeho igaturuka mu majyaruguru." 
Job37:10 Imana iyo ihushye, amazi ahinduka amahindu, inyanja zigahinduka nk’urutare." 
Job37:11 Ni yo ituma ibicu bicumbeka, ikabikwirakwiza hose byuzuye imirabyo." 
Job37:12 Ngibyo birazenguruka hose bikurikije uko yabigeneye, kugira ngo birangirize ku isi ugushaka kwayo;" 
Job37:13 nuko ikabituma mu mahanga yose, kugira ngo byice cyangwa bikize." 
Job37:14 Yobu, tega amatwi ibyo nkubwira, itonde, uzirikane ibitangaza by’Imana." 
Job37:15 Ibyo se uzi uko Imana yabigennye, n’uburyo ituma igicu kirabagirana?" 
Job37:16 Ubwo se wumva ukuntu ibicu bigenda hejuru nta kibifashe, bikagaragaza ubumenyi butangaje bw’Imana?" 
Job37:17 Wowe, imyambaro itangira kotsa, iyo isi igeze ku manywa y’ihangu," 
Job37:18 washobora nka yo kubambika ibicu, maze bikarabagirana nk’umushonge w’icyuma?" 
Job37:19 Ngaho nyigisha icyo twabwira Imana, cyahe cyo kajya, ko turi mu mwijima!" 
Job37:20 Ese amagambo yanjye hari icyo ayibwiye? Hari ubwo se ihugukira ko umuntu agiye kuvuga? 
Job37:21 Urumuri rugeza aho rukazimira, kubera ibicu birukingirije, nyamara ntibitinda umuyaga urabihuha, bikayoyoka," 
Job37:22 urumuri rukamurikira mu majyaruguru nka zahabu. Imana yisesuyeho icyezezi kidasanzwe," 
Job37:23 ni yo Nyir’ububasha, ntawayigerera, irahebuje mu mbaraga no mu butabera; irangwa n’ubutungane bwinshi, kandi nta we yarenganya." 
Job37:24 Ni yo mpamvu abantu bayitinya, nta n’umwe yitaho mu bibwira ko ari abahanga!" 
Job38:1 Uhoraho asubiriza Yobu mu nkubi y’umuyaga, agira ati" 
Job38:2 «Uwo ni nde ubangamiye umugambi wanjye, yishingikirije amagambo ye y’amahomvu?" 
Job38:3 Kenyera kigabo rero ukomeze, maze nkubaze, unsubize." 
Job38:4 Igihe naremaga isi wari he? Ngaho bivuge, umva ko uzi ubwenge!" 
Job38:5 Imbibi zayo zashyizweho na nde, niba ubizi? Ni nde wayiringanije mu burebure?" 
Job38:6 Imfatiro zayo zishingiye kuki? Ni nde wayitereye ibuye yicayeho," 
Job38:7 igihe inyenyeri z’umuseke zahimbarwaga, n’abamalayika b’Imana bose bavuza impundu?" 
Job38:8 Ni nde wafatishije inyanja inkombe ebyiri igihe yapfupfunukaga mu nda y’isi; 
Job38:9 maze nkayisesuraho ibicu, nkayikindikiza ibihu bibuditse?" 
Job38:10 Nayishingiye urubibi, nyitangiriza inkombe n’ibigomezo," 
Job38:11 ndavuga nti ’Uzagarukira hano, ntuzaharenga; aha ni ho ingufu z’imivumba yawe zizacogorera.’" 
Job38:12 Kuva wabaho se, wigeze uha amategeko igitondo, n’umuseke uwubwira igihe ugomba gukebera," 
Job38:13 kugira ngo uturuke isi mu mpande, maze utahure abagome bayiriho?" 
Job38:14 Nuko ubutaka buhinduka urugina, rukwira agasozi nk’umwambaro." 
Job38:15 Abagome bo, urumuri rubazimirizwaho, maze uwari ubanguye ukuboko kuravunika." 
Job38:16 Hari ubwo wari wagera ku isoko y’inyanja, cyangwa ngo utembere mu nyenga y’ikuzimu?" 
Job38:17 Hari ubwo wigeze ubona imiryango yo kwa Nyirarupfu, cyangwa ngo ubone abarinze iryo rembo?" 
Job38:18 Wigeze se uzirikana ukuntu isi ari ngari? Ngaho gira icyo uvuga, niba byose ubizi!" 
Job38:19 Waba se uzi aho urumuri rutaha, cyangwa aho umwijima utuye," 
Job38:20 kugira ngo ube wabiyobora iwabyo, kuko waba uzi inzira ibicyura?" 
Job38:21 Niba ubizi ni uko icyo gihe wari waravutse, kandi ukaba umaze iminsi!" 
Job38:22 Wageze se mu bigega by’urubura, ubona aho amahindu ahunitse?" 
Job38:23 Ni yo nateganyirije igihe cy’amakuba, nyagenera iminsi y’imirwano n’intambara." 
Job38:24 Uzi urumuri ruca iyihe nzira, rujya kumurika, umuyaga w’iburasirazuba uzi ukwira ku isi unyuze he?" 
Job38:25 Ni nde waciye umuyoboro w’amazi y’imvura, kandi akereka inkuba aho zihindira," 
Job38:26 kugira ngo imvura igwe ahantu hadatuwe, mu butayu butarangwamo umuntu," 
Job38:27 amatongo n’ibisambu byaraye bigasoma, maze ahari ubutayu hagahinduka urwuri?" 
Job38:28 Ese ubundi imvura ibyarwa na nde? Naho se amazi y’urume ava he? 
Job38:29 Urubura se ruvuka mu yihe nda, amahindu se yo akomoka kuri nde?" 
Job38:30 igihe amazi yakomeye nk’ibuye, maze inzuzi zigafatana?" 
Job38:31 Washobora se guhuza inyenyeri zo mu kirere, cyangwa ukaba wazitandukanya?" 
Job38:32 Ni wowe se umurikisha inyenyeri zo mu gitondo, nyuma ukazimya izo mu rukerera?" 
Job38:33 Ese uzi amategeko agenga ikirere, ku buryo yakurikizwa no ku isi?" 
Job38:34 Washobora kugeza ijwi ryawe ku ijuru, ngo uhamagare imvura ikumvire?" 
Job38:35 Imirabyo se ishyira nzira ari uko uyohereje, cyangwa imaze kukubwira iti ’Turi hano’?" 
Job38:36 Ni nde wahaye nyirabarazana kwitonda, agaha isake ubwenge ifite?" 
Job38:37 Ubara ibicu atibeshya ni nde, agahengekera mu kirere ibigega by’imvura," 
Job38:38 igihe umukungugu utumuka ari mwinshi, n’ibinonko byakomeye nk’amabuye?" 
Job38:39 Yaba se ari wowe uhigira intare y’ingore ikiyitunga, ukamara ipfa ibyana byayo," 
Job38:40 iyo bibunze mu ndiri yabyo, byubikiye icyo byafata?" 
Job38:41 Ni nde ushakira ikiyoni ikigitunga, iyo ibyana byacyo bitakambira Imana, bikabungera, byabuze icyo birya?" 
Job39:1 Uzi se imibyarire y’impongo, cyangwa witegereje uko amasha abigenza abyara?" 
Job39:2 Ese wayabariye iminsi ahaka, ngo ube wamenya igihe azabyarira?" 
Job39:3 Aca bugufi rero, akabyara, akururuka icyo yahakaga;" 
Job39:4 ibyana byayo byamara kugimbuka, bigafata iy’agasozi, bikigendera ubutazagaruka." 
Job39:5 Ni nde washumuye indogobe y’agasozi, akayiha kwigira aho ishaka?" 
Job39:6 Ni jye wayigeneye kuba mu rwuri, nyituza mu bigarama by’urwunyunyu." 
Job39:7 Ntiyita ku rusaku rwo mu migi, cyangwa ngo imenwe amatwi n’urwamu rw’abarinzi." 
Job39:8 Ahubwo itambagira imisozi irishamo, ikagenda ishakashaka urwuri rutoshye." 
Job39:9 Imbogo se yo yakunda ko uyikoresha? Yakwemera se kurara mu kiraro cy’amatungo yawe," 
Job39:10 cyangwa ko uyishumika ikiziriko mu ijosi? Hari ubwo se washobora kuyihingisha imirima yawe? 
Job39:11 Wakwiringira se ko ifite imbaraga nyinshi, maze ukayishiburira imirimo yawe?" 
Job39:12 Wakwizera se ko izibwiriza ikaza, ngo ikwanurire imyaka iri ku mbuga?" 
Job39:13 Mbuni isabagirana ishema amababa yayo, ikishimira amabara meza ayitatse;" 
Job39:14 nyamara iyo yateye amagi yayo ikayarenzaho igitaka, ikayarekeramo ngo yumve ubushyuhe," 
Job39:15 ntiteganya ko hari uwayahonyora, cyangwa inyamaswa yayamenagura." 
Job39:16 Abana bayo ibafata nabi, nk’aho itababyaye, n’iyo bahonyotse ntibababazwa n’uko yagokeye ubusa." 
Job39:17 Ibyo ibiterwa n’uko Imana yayimye ubwenge, nta bumenyi yigeze iyigenera." 
Job39:18 Ariko, iyo irambuye intambwe, igatangira kwiruka, isiga ifarasi n’uyigenderaho." 
Job39:19 Imbaraga ifarasi igira, ni wowe se waziyiteye, umugara ukindikije ijosi ryayo ni wowe se wawuyambitse," 
Job39:20 cyangwa ni wowe uyitera kwikinangura nk’inzige? Iyo yivuganye ishema, ibintu birakangarana." 
Job39:21 Igera mu bigarama, igasaza imigeri, igakataza igana urugamba," 
Job39:22 yabera ntijya itinya ngo igire ubwoba, kandi ntikangwa inkota." 
Job39:23 Iyo imitana iyivugiza hejuru, amacumu yatukuje imbuga n’imyambi ivumera," 
Job39:24 usanga ica ibintu isa n’iyenda kuguruka, maze ihembe ryavuga ntihagire ikiyitangira," 
Job39:25 Iyo ihembe rivuze, na yo ivuza akamo, ikamenyeraho ko urugamba rushotswe, ku ikobe ry’abatware n’induru y’abarwana." 
Job39:26 Harya ni wowe utoza agaca kuguruka, maze kakaboneza iyo mu majyepfo?" 
Job39:27 Ni wowe se, utegeka kagoma gutumbagira hejuru, ikarika mu mpinga y’umusozi?" 
Job39:28 Urutare yarugize intaho yayo nijoro, ku isonga yarwo aho batayishyikira." 
Job39:29 Iharerekera icyo ishaka kwica, kandi amaso yayo aba yakibonye kare!" 
Job39:30 Ibyana byayo ibihaza inyama, aho intumbi ziri, na yo ntihatangwa.»" 
Job40:1 Uhoraho arakomeza, abwira Yobu, ati" 
Job40:2 «Umuburanyi wa Nyir’ububasha ntaremera se, ko yatsinzwe? Unyomoza Imana aracyafite icyo asubiza?»" 
Job40:3 Yobu asubiza Uhoraho, agira ati" 
Job40:4 «Ni koko, nakinnye mu bikomeye; nabona nsubiza iki? Ahasigaye ni ugupfuka umunwa ngaceceka." 
Job40:5 Dore imbara navugiye, sinzasubiza; navuze menshi, sinzongera.»" 
Job40:6 Uhoraho asubiza Yobu mu nkubi y’umuyaga, agira ati" 
Job40:7 «Kenyera kigabo rero ukomeze, maze nkubaze unsubize." 
Job40:8 Harya ngo ibyo nemeje uzabivuguruza, unshinje, maze untsinde?" 
Job40:9 Ese ufite ububasha nk’ubw’Imana, ijwi ryawe se, rirakangaranya nk’iryayo?" 
Job40:10 Ngaho rero itamirize ishema n’ububasha, wuzure icyubahiro n’ububengerane," 
Job40:11 ujye ukwiza hose uburakari bwawe, abirasi ubarebe igitsure bacebe," 
Job40:12 ukwiteruyeho wese umucubye, abakugomeye ubarimbure rugikubita," 
Job40:13 maze ubazike mu gitaka, ubafungiranire mu buroko." 
Job40:14 Nanjye ubwanjye nzaguhimbaza, kuko ubutwari bwawe bwagukijije." 
Job40:15 Zirikana ko imvubu nayiremye kimwe nawe, ikaba itunzwe no kurisha nk’imfizi." 
Job40:16 Uzayirebe, imbaraga zayo ziba mu matako, naho ubukaka bwayo bukaba mu gituza." 
Job40:17 Irega umurizo ukagira ngo ni ingiga y’igiti, imitsi y’amatako yayo irasobekeranye." 
Job40:18 Amagufa yayo, wagira ngo akoze mu byuma, amaguru n’amaboko byayo bikomeye nk’umutarimba." 
Job40:19 Irusha imbaraga ibiremwa by’Imana byose, yagizwe umutware w’ibindi bikoko," 
Job40:20 kuko n’imisozi iyihakwaho, kimwe n’ibindi bikoko byose byo mu ishyamba." 
Job40:21 Iryama mu rufunzo, ikabyagira mu ruseke rwo mu bishanga;" 
Job40:22 ikugama izuba mu gicucu cyarwo ikikijwe n’ibihuru byo ku ruzi. 
Job40:23 N’iyo uruzi rwuzuye, ntihangayika, n’iyo rwayigera mu menyo, iguma hamwe." 
Job40:24 Hari ushobora kuyinogoramo amaso se, cyangwa ngo ayipfumure amazuru?" 
Job40:25 Ese hari uwarobesha ingona urushundura, ngo ayishumike umugozi ku rurimi?" 
Job40:26 Uramutse se uyikuruye amazuru, ukayitoboza icyuma urwasaya," 
Job40:27 urakeka ko yagutakambira, ikakubwiza akarimi keza?" 
Job40:28 Ubwo se, wagirana na yo isezerano, kugira ngo ikubere umugaragu burundu?" 
Job40:29 Watinyuka se kuyikinisha nk’akanyoni, cyangwa kuyigiramo igikinisho cy’abakobwa bawe?" 
Job40:30 Abarobyi se bayigenera igiciro, maze bakayigemurira abacuruzi?" 
Job40:31 Uruhu rwayo se rwatoborwa n’imyambi, cyangwa igihanga cyayo amacumu yacyigerera?" 
Job40:32 Uzase n’uyikozaho ikiganza, urebe ukuntu ikwamagana, uzaherako uyizinukwa." 
Job41:1 Uzicuza icyatumye uyihangara, kuyikubita amaso byonyine bica intege." 
Job41:2 Nta watinyuka kuyikora mu jisho, kuko ntawakwigerera kuyirwanya." 
Job41:3 Ni nde wigeze ayisagarira, akayihonoka? Nta n’umwe ku isi yose!" 
Job41:4 Reka nyitake ibigango byayo, nkubwire ukuntu imbaraga zayo zihambaye." 
Job41:5 Ni nde wigeze ayorosoraho igikoba cyayo, cyangwa ngo ahinguranye uruhu rwayo?" 
Job41:6 Ni nde wigeze yasamura urwasaya rwayo? Imikaka yayo iteye ubwoba! 
Job41:7 Umugongo wayo ugizwe n’ingabo zigerekeranye, zihomesheje ubujeni bukomeye nk’ibuye." 
Job41:8 Imwe igiye imatana n’indi, ku buryo nta muyaga wazica hagati." 
Job41:9 Ziramatanye uko zikurikirana, ni urusobe rw’intamenwa.." 
Job41:10 Iritsamura, umuriro ukaka, amaso yayo ni nk’umutukurira wo mu museke." 
Job41:11 Mu rwasaya rwayo haba amafumba y’umuriro, ugasanga hatera ibishashi." 
Job41:12 Amazuru yayo aracumbeka, ukagira ngo ni intango y’amazi abira." 
Job41:13 Ihumekera ku bihuru bikababuka, mu rwasaya rwayo hagasohokamo ibishashi by’umuriro." 
Job41:14 Mu gikanu cyayo ni ho imbaraga zayo zagandiye, imbere yayo, ibihari byose bishya ubwoba." 
Job41:15 Urwakanakana rwayo ruratsitse, kandi ntirunyeganyega." 
Job41:16 Umutima wayo ukomeye nk’urutare, cyangwa nk’ibuye ry’urusyo." 
Job41:17 Iyo ibadutse, amazi arahungabana, imivumba y’inyanja igashya ubwoba." 
Job41:18 Ntikangwa inkota, kuko itayitobora, emwe habe n’icumu cyangwa umwambi." 
Job41:19 Kuyitera icumu ni nko kuyikubita akatsi, naho kuyirasa umwambi ni nko kuyitera agati kamunzwe." 
Job41:20 Ntitsimburwa n’imyambi y’abakogoto, kuyitera imihumetso ni nko kuyikozaho utwatsi." 
Job41:21 Kuyikubita ubuhiri ni nko kuyikirigitisha utwatsi, ntikangwa umuvumero w’icumu." 
Job41:22 Ku nda yayo hari ibivuvu bimeze nk’injyo zityaye, aho inyuze mu cyondo yikurura, ihasiga umugendo." 
Job41:23 Amazi yo mu marongi iyatera kubirirana, naho inyanja ikayihindura nk’icyotezo cyaka." 
Job41:24 Aho inyuze ihasiga urwererane, ukagira ngo hatwikiriwe n’igicu cyera." 
Job41:25 Nta cyo bingana ku isi, yaremwe ari igihangange." 
Job41:26 Izishirika ubwoba mu nyamaswa, zirayitinya, iz’intwari zose, yigize umutware wazo.»" 
Job42:1 Yobu asubiza Uhoraho agira ati 
Job42:2 «Nzi ko ushobora byose, kandi nta mugambi wawe uburizwamo." 
Job42:3 Ni nde wagutambamira, kandi atagira ubwenge? Ni koko, napfuye kuvuga ntasobanukiwe, mpubukira ibitangaza bindenze kandi ntazi." 
Job42:4 (Tega amatwi, ureke mvuge, ngiye kukubaza, nawe unsubize.)" 
Job42:5 Ubundi najyaga nkubwirwa mu nkuru, none, nakwiboneye n’amaso yanjye;" 
Job42:6 ni yo mpamvu nicujije ibyo navuze, ndabyihannye; dore nicaye mu ivu no mu mukungugu.»" 
Job42:7 Uhoraho amaze kugeza kuri Yobu ayo magambo, abwira Elifazi w’i Temani, ati «Nabarakariye cyane, wowe n’izo ncuti zawe ebyiri, kuko mutamvuze neza nk’uko umugaragu wanjye Yobu yabigenje." 
Job42:8 None rero, nimushake ibimasa birindwi n’amasekurume y’intama arindwi, maze musange umugaragu wanjye Yobu. Muzatura igitambo gitwikwa, umugaragu wanjye Yobu abasabire imbabazi. Nzamwumva, maze noye kubahanira ko mutamvuze neza nk’uko Yobu umugaragu wanjye yabigenje.»" 
Job42:9 Elifazi w’i Temani, Bilidadi w’i Shuwa, na Sofari w’i Nahama, baragenda bakora uko bari bategetswe, maze Uhoraho na we yumva icyo Yobu amusabye." 
Job42:10 Igihe Yobu yasabiraga imbabazi incuti ze, Uhoraho yamushubije umunezero we, umutungo yahoranye awukuba kabiri." 
Job42:11 Abavandimwe be, bashiki be n’incuti ze za kera, baza kumusura, basangira umugati mu nzu ye. Baramuririye, banamuhoza agahinda yatewe n’ibyago Uhoraho yamwoherereje. Buri wese agenda amuha igiceri cya feza, n’impeta ya zahabu." 
Job42:12 Nuko Uhoraho aha Yobu umugisha, urenze ndetse uwo yahoranye. Yatunze intama ibihumbi cumi na bine, ingamiya ibihumbi bitandatu, ibimasa by’inkone ibihumbi bibiri, n’indogobe z’amanyagazi igihumbi." 
Job42:13 Yabyaye abahungu barindwi n’abakobwa batatu. 
Job42:14 Umukobwa umwe yamwise «Nyiranuma», uwa kabiri amwita «Bwiza», uwa gatatu amwita «Mukaburanga»." 
Job42:15 Mu gihugu cyose, nta bakobwa beza nk’abo bari bahari. Yobu yabahaye iminani kimwe na basaza babo." 
Job42:16 Nyuma y’aho, Yobu yabayeho indi myaka ijana na mirongo ine, abona abuzukuru, abuzukuruza, ageza no ku buvivi." 
Job42:17 Nuko Yobu apfa yisaziye neza, yarabonye ibintu n’ibindi." 
Psalms1:1 Hahirwa umuntu udakurikiza inama y’abagiranabi, akirinda inzira y’abanyabyaha, kandi ntiyicarane n’abaneguranyi," 
Psalms1:2 ahubwo agahimbazwa n’amategeko y’Uhoraho, akayazirikana umunsi n’ijoro!" 
Psalms1:3 Ameze nk’igiti cyatewe iruhande rw’umugezi, kikera imbuto uko igihe kigeze, kandi amababi yacyo ntagire ubwo arabirana; uwo muntu ibyo akora byose biramuhira." 
Psalms1:4 Naho ku bagiranabi si uko bigenda: bo bameze nk’umurama uhuhwa n’umuyaga. 
Psalms1:5 Ni cyo gituma ku munsi w’urubanza batazegura umutwe, n’abanyabyaha ntibazajye mu iteraniro ry’intungane." 
Psalms1:6 Kuko Uhoraho yita ku nzira y’intungane, naho inzira y’abagiranabi ikagusha ruhabo." 
Psalms2:1 Ni iki gituma amahanga asakabaka, n’imiryango ikajujura ibitagira shinge?" 
Psalms2:2 Abami b’isi bahagurukiye icyarimwe, n’abatware bishyira hamwe ngo barwanye Uhoraho n’Intore ye," 
Psalms2:3 bati «Nimucyo ducagagure ingoyi badushyizeho, tunage kure iminyururu batubohesheje!»" 
Psalms2:4 Utetse ijabiro mu ijuru, we arabaseka, Uhoraho abaha urw’amenyo." 
Psalms2:5 Nuko ababwirana uburakari, ubukare bwe burabakangaranya," 
Psalms2:6 ati «Ni jye wiyimikiye umwami, kuri Siyoni, umusozi wanjye mutagatifu!»" 
Psalms2:7 Reka ntangaze iteka Uhoraho yaciye: yarambwiye ati «Uri umwana wanjye, jyewe uyu munsi nakwibyariye!" 
Psalms2:8 Binsabe, maze nguhe amahanga, abe umunani wawe, n’impera z’isi zibe ubukonde bwawe." 
Psalms2:9 Uzabamenaguza inkoni y’icyuma, ubajanjagure nk’urwabya rw’umubumbyi.»" 
Psalms2:10 None rero, bami, nimwumvireho, namwe, bacamanza b’isi, mwisubireho!" 
Psalms2:11 Nimukeze Uhoraho, mumufitiye icyubahiro, mupfukamire umwana we mudagadwa;" 
Psalms2:12 naho ubundi yarakara, mukarimbukira mu nzira, kuko uburakari bwe budatindiganya! Hahirwa abamuhungiraho bose." 
Psalms3:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi; igihe yahungaga umuhungu we Abusalomu. 
Psalms3:2 Uhoraho, mbega ngo abandwanya baraba benshi! Ni benshi bampagurukiye," 
Psalms3:3 ni benshi bamvugiraho ngo «Nta gakiza ateze ku Mana!» 
Psalms3:4 Nyamara wowe, Uhoraho, uri ingabo inkingira; ni wowe shema ryanjye, ni wowe nkesha kwegura umutwe." 
Psalms3:5 Ndangurura ijwi ngatabaza Uhoraho, maze akansubiriza ku musozi we mutagatifu." 
Psalms3:6 Ndaryama ngasinzira, nageraho ngakanguka: igihe cyose Uhoraho ni we unshyigikiye." 
Psalms3:7 Sintinya icyo gitero cy’abantu bangose impande zose. 
Psalms3:8 Uhoraho, tabara! Nkiza, Mana yanjye! Ni wowe umena amajigo abanzi banjye bose, abagome ukabakura amenyo." 
Psalms3:9 Uhoraho, ni wowe utanga umukiro! Umuryango wawe uwuhozaho umugisha!" 
Psalms4:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikajyana n’umurya w’inanga. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms4:2 Igihe ntabaje, jya unsubiza, Mana indenganura; mu magorwa ni wowe unkura ahaga. Gira ibambe, wumve isengesho ryanjye!" 
Psalms4:3 Mwa bantu mwe, muzahereza hehe kunangira imitima, mukunda ibitagira shinge, kandi mukararurwa n’ibinyoma?" 
Psalms4:4 Mumenye ko Uhoraho yatonesheje umuyoboke we; iyo ntakiye Uhoraho, aranyumva." 
Psalms4:5 Nimuhinde umushyitsi, mureke gucumura; aho muryamye nimwibaze, maze muceceke." 
Psalms4:6 Mujye mutura ibitambo ku buryo bukwiye, kandi mwiringire Uhoraho." 
Psalms4:7 Hari benshi bajya bavuga ngo «Ni nde uzaduha guhirwa?» Uhoraho, dusakazeho umucyo ugukomokaho!" 
Psalms4:8 Wanshyize mu mutima ibyishimo biruta iby’igihe bari bakize ku ngano no kuri divayi. 
Psalms4:9 Kubera ko wankungahaje nka bo, ndaryama ngasinzira, kuko wowe wenyine, Uhoraho, ungumisha mu mudendezo." 
Psalms5:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikajyana n’umwirongi. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms5:2 Uhoraho, tega amatwi ibyo nkubwira, ushishikarire kumva amaganya yanjye." 
Psalms5:3 Hugukira ijwi ryanjye rigutabaza; Mwami wanjye kandi Mana yanjye, ni wowe ntakambira." 
Psalms5:4 Uhoraho, guhera mu gitondo wumva ijwi ryanjye; kuva mu gitondo ndakwitegura, ngakomeza kuba maso." 
Psalms5:5 Nta bwo uri Imana yuzura n’ikibi, umugome ntiyakirwa iwawe." 
Psalms5:6 Umunyagasuzuguro ntaguhinguka imbere; uzirana n’abagizi ba nabi bose," 
Psalms5:7 ukarimbura abanyabinyoma. Umuntu wese w’umuhendanyi cyangwa w’umwicanyi, Uhoraho nta bwo arebana na we." 
Psalms5:8 Naho jyewe, ninjira mu nzu yawe, mbikesheje impuhwe zawe nyinshi. Mpfukamana icyubahiro, ndangamiye Ingoro yawe ntagatifu." 
Psalms5:9 Uhoraho, girira ubutungane bwawe, unyobore, umwaze abahora bangenza, untegurire inzira ushaka ko nyuramo." 
Psalms5:10 Kuko bo, nta cyakwizerwa cyabava mu kanwa, mu mutima wabo haganje ubugiranabi; umuhogo wabo ni imva yasamye, akarimi kabo ni ibinyoma gusa." 
Psalms5:11 Mana, gira ubaryoze ibyo byose! Imigambi yabo nibaviremo umutego ubahitana! Bameneshe kubera ibicumuro byabo byinshi, kuko bakugomera!" 
Psalms5:12 Naho abagufiteho ubuhungiro bose bazanezerwa, bahore basabagizwa n’ibyishimo; abakunda izina ryawe uzabarengera, ubahe kuvuza impundu." 
Psalms5:13 Uhoraho, ni wowe uha intungane umugisha, ineza yawe ikamukingira nk’ingabo." 
Psalms6:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikajyana n’inanga y’imirya munani. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms6:2 Uhoraho, mpana utandakariye, nkosora, utabishyizemo ubukare!" 
Psalms6:3 Gira ibambe, Uhoraho, dore nta ntege ngifite; Uhoraho, nkiza, dore amagufa yanjye arajegajega," 
Psalms6:4 ndahinda umushyitsi umubiri wose. Mbese Uhoraho, amaherezo azaba ayahe?" 
Psalms6:5 Uhoraho, garuka umbohore, nkiza ugiriye impuhwe zawe!" 
Psalms6:6 Koko rero abapfuye ntibakwibuka; ikuzimu se ni nde wagusingirizayo? 
Psalms6:7 Dore naciwe intege no kuganya. Uko ijoro riguye, umusego wanjye uhinduka amazi, uburiri bwanjye bukajandama kubera amarira." 
Psalms6:8 Amaso yanjye yahennye kubera agahinda, imboni zanjye zirahondobera ku mpamvu y’abandwanya." 
Psalms6:9 Nimumve iruhande mwese, mwa bagizi ba nabi mwe, kuko Uhoraho yumvise imiborogo yanjye." 
Psalms6:10 Uhoraho yumvise uko mutakira, maze yakira amasengesho yanjye." 
Psalms6:11 Abanyanga nibakorwe n’ikimwaro, bahindagane, bamwarwe bose, basubire inyuma!" 
Psalms7:1 Ni amaganya ya Dawudi. Yayiririmbiye Uhoraho abitewe na Kushi w’Umubenyamini. 
Psalms7:2 Uhoraho Mana yanjye, ni wowe buhungiro bwanjye; ntabara, unkize abankurikirana bose!" 
Psalms7:3 Naho ubundi, barampotora nk’intare, bakantanyaguza, nta we ubatesheje." 
Psalms7:4 Uhoraho, Mana yanjye, niba narahemutse mu byo nakoze, niba hari ubugome bundangwaho," 
Psalms7:5 niba narituye inabi uwangiriye neza, nkareka umubisha akabaho," 
Psalms7:6 nanjye umwanzi azankurikirane, amfate mpiri, andibatire ku butaka nkanuye amaso, anteshe ishema angaragura mu mukungugu!" 
Psalms7:7 Uhoraho, hagurukana uburakari! Cubya ubukana bw’abandwanya, kanguka, Mana yanjye, wowe ubwiriza umuntu iby’ubutabera." 
Psalms7:8 Imiryango nikorane igukikize, nawe uganze uyitegeke." 
Psalms7:9 Uhoraho ni we ucira imanza amahanga! Uhoraho, urancire urubanza ukurikije ubutungane, n’ubuziranenge bwanjye." 
Psalms7:10 Ubugome bw’abagizi ba nabi nibuhoshe, ukomeze ushyigikire intungane! Koko rero uzi akari mu mutima no mu nda y’umuntu, wowe Mana Nyir’ubutabera." 
Psalms7:11 Ingabo inkingira ni Imana ubwayo, ari na yo mukiza w’abafite umutima utunganye." 
Psalms7:12 Imana ni umucamanza utabera, ikaba n’Imana ikangara buri munsi." 
Psalms7:13 Iyo umugiranabi atigaruye, ityaza inkota yayo, ikabanga umuheto wayo maze igatamika." 
Psalms7:14 Yegeranya izo ntwaro za kirimbuzi, imyambi yayo ikayivubura ari ibishashi." 
Psalms7:15 Umugome we, asama inda y’ubugizi bwa nabi, agatwita inda y’ubwicanyi, akabyara ikinyoma." 
Psalms7:16 Acukura urwobo, akarugira rurerure, ariko uwo mutego akaba ari we uwugwamo!" 
Psalms7:17 Ubugome bwe ni we bukoraho, urugomo rwe rukamugaruka." 
Psalms7:18 Nzashimira Uhoraho ubutabera bwe, ndirimbe izina ry’Uhoraho, Umusumbabyose." 
Psalms8:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikajyana n’inanga y’Abagati. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms8:2 Uhoraho, Mutegetsi wacu, mbega ngo izina ryawe riramamara ku isi hose! Wowe, Nyir’ikuzo uganje mu ijuru," 
Psalms8:3 mu minwa y’abana n’iy’ibitambambuga, ni ho wizigamiye ububasha bwo gucubya abakurwanya, no gutsinda umwanzi n’umugome." 
Psalms8:4 Iyo nitegereje ijuru ryaremwe n’ibiganza byawe, nkareba ukwezi n’inyenyeri wahatendetse," 
Psalms8:5 ndibaza nti «Umuntu ni iki kugira ngo ube wamwibuka? Mwene muntu ni iki kugira ngo ube wamwitaho?» 
Psalms8:6 Rwose habuzeho gato ngo umunganye n’imana; umutamiriza ikamba ry’ikuzo n’uburanga," 
Psalms8:7 umugira umwami w’ibyo waremye, umwegurira byose ngo abitegeke:" 
Psalms8:8 amatungo yose, amaremare n’amagufi, ndetse n’inyamaswa zo mu gasozi," 
Psalms8:9 inyoni zo mu kirere n’amafi yo mu nyanja, hamwe n’ibyogoga mu mazi byose." 
Psalms8:10 Uhoraho, Mutegetsi wacu, mbega ngo izina ryawe riramamara ku isi hose!" 
Psalms9:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikaririmbwa mu majwi y’abana. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms9:2 Uhoraho, ndagushimira n’umutima wanjye wose, ndamamaza ibigwi byawe byose." 
Psalms9:3 Umpaye kubyina kubera ibyishimo, ndaririmba izina ryawe, wowe Musumbabyose." 
Psalms9:4 Ndabona abanzi banjye bihinda bahunga, bakadandabirana, bakarimbukira imbere yawe," 
Psalms9:5 kuko wandengeye, ukamburanira, wicaye ku ntebe y’umucamanza w’intabera!" 
Psalms9:6 Wakangaye amahanga, urimbura abatakuyoboka, usibanganya amazina yabo ubudasubirwaho." 
Psalms9:7 Abanzi warabatsembye, barazima buheriheri, imigi yabo urayisenyagura, iribagirana." 
Psalms9:8 Ariko Uhoraho aganje ubuziraherezo, ashinze intebe ye ngo ace imanza." 
Psalms9:9 Ni we ugengana isi ubutabera, agacira imanza imiryango ari nta ho abogamiye." 
Psalms9:10 Uhoraho nabe ubuvunyi bw’abashikamiwe, mu bihe by’amage nababere ubuvunyi." 
Psalms9:11 Abazi izina ryawe nibakwiringire, Uhoraho, kuko udatererana abagushakashaka!" 
Psalms9:12 Nimucyo turirimbire Uhoraho, uganje kuri Siyoni, nimwamamaze ibigwi bye mu mahanga!" 
Psalms9:13 Kuko akurikirana uwamennye amaraso, ntabirangarane, ntiyirengagize imiborogo y’abanyabyago." 
Psalms9:14 Uhoraho, gira ibambe, urebe ibyago ndimo, ni wowe wanzahura, ukankura mu maboko y’urupfu," 
Psalms9:15 kugira ngo namamaze ibisingizo byawe, nishimire umukiro uguturukaho, ndi mu marembo y’umurwa wa Siyoni." 
Psalms9:16 Amahanga yaguye mu rwobo yari yacukuye, amaguru yabo afatirwa mu mutego bari bateze." 
Psalms9:17 Uhoraho yimenyekanyije, aca urubanza, maze umugome aboheshwa ingoyi ze bwite." 
Psalms9:18 Abagiranabi nibasubire ikuzimu, n’abanyamahanga bose biyibagiza Imana." 
Psalms9:19 Ariko, umukene we ntazibagirana burundu, cyangwa ngo amizero y’umunyabyago ayoyoke." 
Psalms9:20 Uhoraho, haguruka, hoye kugira umuntu wigamba, abanyamahanga nibacirwe urubanza, ubyirebera!" 
Psalms9:21 Uhoraho, kangaranya ayo mahanga akuke umutima, yibuke ko ari abantu gusa!" 
Psalms10:1 Nyagasani, ni iki gituma witaza, ukihisha mu bihe by’amage?" 
Psalms10:2 Mu gihe umugiranabi yigamba, indushyi zifatirwa mu mutego yazishandikiye." 
Psalms10:3 Umugiranabi yirata ko yageze ku ntego ye, kuba yabonye icyo yifuzaga bigatuma atuka Uhoraho akamusuzugura." 
Psalms10:4 Umugiranabi ashinga ijosi, agaterera agati mu ryinyo, ngo «Nta Mana ibaho!» Ngubwo ubwenge bwe." 
Psalms10:5 Igihe cyose ibyo akora biramuhira; n’ubucamanza bwawe buramurenze, abanzi be akabasuzugura bikabije." 
Psalms10:6 Akunda kwibwira ngo «Ndi indatsimburwa, no mu bihe bizaza nta cyago kizankoraho.»" 
Psalms10:7 Akanwa ke kuzuye imivumo, ibinyoma n’uburyarya, ajunditse ubugiranabi n’ubugome." 
Psalms10:8 Yubikira hafi y’insisiro, akihishahisha ngo yice intungane; agahora agenza umunyantege nke." 
Psalms10:9 Arubikira nk’intare ibunze mu gihuru; akubikira ngo asumire umunyabyago, agasumira umunyabyago amuroha mu mutego we." 
Psalms10:10 Arabanza akabunda, agatega, maze uko yakabaye akiroha ku banyantege nke," 
Psalms10:11 yibwira ati «Imana ntibyitaho, yahishe uruhanga rwayo, nta cyo yigera ibona.»" 
Psalms10:12 Uhoraho, haguruka! Mana, kinga ukuboko, woye kwibagirwa abanyabyago!" 
Psalms10:13 Kuki umugiranabi yasuzugura Imana, akagenda yibwira ngo nta cyo uzamutwara?" 
Psalms10:14 Nyamara wowe ubona ishavu n’amarira, maze ukiyemeza kubyitaho; umunyantege nke arakwiragiza, kandi n’imfubyi ukayitabara." 
Psalms10:15 Burizamo ububasha bw’umugiranabi, umuryoze ububi bw’ibyo yakoze, he kuboneka n’agasigisigi k’ubugome bwe." 
Psalms10:16 Uhoraho ni Umwami w’ibihe byose, abatamuzi bashize mu gihugu cye." 
Psalms10:17 Uhoraho, wumva ibyifuzo by’abiyoroshya, ukabakomeza umutima, ugahora ubateze amatwi," 
Psalms10:18 maze imfubyi n’abaryamirwaga ukabakiranura, kugira ngo ku isi hatazagira umuntu wongera kwigira umuhinza." 
Psalms11:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho ni we buhungiro bwanjye. Mushobora mute rero kumbwira ngo «Hungira ku musozi nk’akanyoni!» 
Psalms11:2 Dore abagiranabi babanze imiheto, baratamika imyambi yabo ku njishi, kugira ngo barasire intungane mu mwijima." 
Psalms11:3 Igihe igihugu cyose cyataye umuco, intungane yaba igishoboye iki kandi?" 
Psalms11:4 Uhoraho ari mu Ngoro ye ntagatifu, Uhoraho afite intebe ye y’ubwami mu ijuru; ariko amaso ye ntayakura ku bantu, abasuzumisha indoro ye." 
Psalms11:5 Uhoraho anyurwa n’intungane, agahigika umugiranabi n’umunyarugomo." 
Psalms11:6 Abagiranabi azabamanuriraho umuriro n’amahindure! Inkubi y’umuyaga izabe umugabane ubakwiye. 
Psalms11:7 Koko rero Uhoraho ni intungane, agakunda ubutabera; ab’umutima uboneye ni bo bazamureba." 
Psalms12:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikajyana n’inanga y’imirya munani. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms12:2 Uhoraho, tabara! Nta ndahemuka ikibaho, ukuri kwarazimiye mu bantu!" 
Psalms12:3 Icyabo ni ukwirirwa babeshyana, baryoshya akarimi n’umutima wuje uburyarya." 
Psalms12:4 Uhoraho nazibe akanwa k’abanyabinyoma, n’ak’abaryoshya akarimi bose," 
Psalms12:5 bavuga ngo «Ijambo ni ryo ntwaro yacu, tuzi kwivugira, ni nde waduhangara?»" 
Psalms12:6 «Kubera ko abanyantege nke baryamirwa, n’abakene bakanganyira, jyewe ubu ngubu ndahagurutse, — Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze—, ntabaye uwo barenganya.»" 
Psalms12:7 Amagambo y’Uhoraho ni amagambo arongorotse, nka feza iva mu butaka, iyunguruwe karindwi." 
Psalms12:8 Uhoraho, ni wowe utwiragiriye: uzaturinda iteka iriya nyoko mbi." 
Psalms12:9 Abagiranabi barabungera hose, n’ubwomanzi bukiyongera mu bantu."
