Psalms13:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms13:2 Uhoraho, uzahereza hehe kunyibagirwa? Uzampisha uruhanga rwawe kugeza ryari?" 
Psalms13:3 Nzahereza hehe guhangayika, buri munsi intimba inshengura umutima? Umwanzi wanjye azahereza hehe kunyigambaho?" 
Psalms13:4 Uhoraho Mana yanjye, irebere maze unsubize! Murikira amaso yanjye, hato ntayabumbirako," 
Psalms13:5 maze umwanzi akigamba avuga ati «Ndamunesheje», n’abandi bandwanya bakishimira ko nabandagaye." 
Psalms13:6 Uhoraho, jyewe niringiye ubudahemuka bwawe; umutima wanjye nunezezwe n’umukiro wawe, ndirimbire Uhoraho kubera ibyiza yangiriye!" 
Psalms14:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Abapfayongo bihaye kuvuga ngo «Nta Mana ibaho!» Bapfuye umutima, biha gukora ibidakwiye, nta n’umwe ugikora neza." 
Psalms14:2 Uhoraho, aho ari mu ijuru, yarunamye yerekeje amaso kuri bene muntu, ngo arebe niba hari n’umwe ugifite ubwenge agashakashaka Imana." 
Psalms14:3 Ariko bose bararindagiye, bahujwe gusa n’ingeso mbi; nta n’umwe ugikora neza, habe n’umwe rwose!" 
Psalms14:4 Koko abo bagizi ba nabi bose ni ibiburabwenge, bo bihaye kurya imitsi y’umuryango wanjye, barya icyari kiwutunze, kandi ntibigere basenga Uhoraho." 
Psalms14:5 None dore batangiye guhinda umushyitsi, kuko Imana ishyigikiye ab’intungane." 
Psalms14:6 Murannyega amizero y’umunyabyago, nyamara Uhoraho ni we buhungiro bwe." 
Psalms14:7 Uwazana ngo umukiro wa Israheli uturuke kuri Siyoni! Igihe Uhoraho azagarukira umuryango we, bene Yakobo bazasagwa n’ibyishimo, bene Israheli banezerwe bitavugwa!" 
Psalms15:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, ni nde ukwiye kwinjira mu Ngoro yawe, ngo ature ku musozi wawe mutagatifu?" 
Psalms15:2 Ni umuntu utajorwa mu mibereho ye, agakurikiza ubutabera, kandi akavugisha ukuri k’umutima we." 
Psalms15:3 Ni umuntu utabunza akarimi, ntagirire abandi nabi, cyangwa ngo yihe gusebya mugenzi we." 
Psalms15:4 Uwo muntu arebana agasuzuguro uwigize ruvumwa, maze akubaha abatinya Uhoraho; icyo yarahiriye, n’aho cyamugwa nabi, nta bwo yivuguruza." 
Psalms15:5 Iyo agurije undi, ntamutegaho urwunguko, ntiyemera ruswa ngo arenganye utacumuye. Ugenza atyo wese, azahora ari indatsimburwa." 
Psalms16:1 Indirimbo ihebuje, iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Mana yanjye, unyiragirire kuko ari wowe buhungiro bwanjye." 
Psalms16:2 Uhoraho ndamubwiye nti «Ni wowe Mutegetsi wanjye, nta mahirwe yandi nagira atari wowe!»" 
Psalms16:3 Ibigirwamana by’iyi si, bya binyamaboko byanshimishaga, birarushaho gutwara benshi umutima, bakabyohokaho." 
Psalms16:4 Ariko jyeweho sinzongera kubitura ibitambo biseswa, nta n’ubwo nzongera kubivuga mu mazina bibaho!" 
Psalms16:5 Uhoraho, wowe munani wanjye n’umugabane wanjye, uko nzamera ni wowe ukuzi." 
Psalms16:6 Umugabane negukanye uranshimishije, umunani nahawe uranejereje." 
Psalms16:7 Ndashimira Uhoraho ungira inama, ndetse na nijoro umutima wanjye urabinyibutsa." 
Psalms16:8 Uhoraho mpora muzirikana ubudahwema, ubwo andi iruhande, sinteze guhungabana." 
Psalms16:9 Ni cyo gituma umutima wanjye unezerewe, amagara yanjye akamererwa neza, n’umubiri wanjye ukadendeza mu ituze;" 
Psalms16:10 kuko utazantererana ngo mpere ikuzimu, kandi ukaba utazemera ko umuyoboke wawe agupfana." 
Psalms16:11 Uzamenyesha inzira y’ubugingo; hafi yawe ni ho haba umunezero usendereye, iburyo bwawe hakaba umudabagiro udashira." 
Psalms17:1 Isengesho, riri mu yo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, ndenganura! Nyumva, wite ku maganya yanjye; tega amatwi isengesho ryanjye, ridaturutse mu munwa ubeshya." 
Psalms17:2 Ba ari wowe uncira urubanza, ijisho ryawe rirebe aho ukuri guherereye!" 
Psalms17:3 Wasuzumye umutima wanjye, ungenzura nijoro, ndetse urangerageza, ntiwagira ikibi unsangana: ururimi rwanjye narurinze gucumura." 
Psalms17:4 Kugira ngo ngenze nk’abantu bakurikiza amabwiriza yawe, nakomeje kunyura mu nzira wategetse," 
Psalms17:5 mpamya intambwe mu mayira yawe, ibirenge byanjye ntibyadandabirana." 
Psalms17:6 Mana yanjye, ndakwiyambaza, kuko unyumva; ntega amatwi, wumve ibyo nkubwira!" 
Psalms17:7 Garagaza impuhwe zawe zahebuje, wowe ukiza abiringira ububasha bwawe, bagahonoka batyo abahagurukiye kubarwanya." 
Psalms17:8 Urandinde nk’imboni y’ijisho ryawe, umpishe mu gicucu cy’amababa yawe," 
Psalms17:9 kure y’abanyarugomo banyaze ibyanjye, n’abanzi gica bantangatanze impande zose." 
Psalms17:10 Umutima wabo wapfukiranywe n’ibinure, umunwa wabo ukavugana agasuzuguro." 
Psalms17:11 Ngabo baransatiriye, none bamaze kungota; bampozaho ijisho bashaka uko bangarika ku butaka." 
Psalms17:12 Bameze nk’intare ikereye gushihagura, mbese nk’igisimba kibunze mu bwihisho." 
Psalms17:13 Uhoraho, haguruka! Ubatere, ubahashye! Inkota yawe ninkize umubisha!" 
Psalms17:14 Uhoraho, ukuboko kwawe nikubameneshe, bave mu bantu, bacike mu bantu no ku isi. Uwo ni wo mugabane ubagenewe muri ubu bugingo! Inda yabo niyuzure ibyo wabazigamiye, n’abahungu babo babiboneho babyijute, basigarize n’abana babo bakiri ku ibere." 
Psalms17:15 Naho jyewe birakwiye ko nzareba uruhanga rwawe; ninkanguka, nzanyurwa n’uburanga bwawe." 
Psalms18:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi, umugaragu w’Uhoraho. Yabwiye Uhoraho amagambo y’iyi ndirimbo igihe Uhoraho yari amaze kumukiza abanzi be bose bari bamumereye nabi, barimo Sawuli. Nuko aterura agira ati:" 
Psalms18:2 Uhoraho, ndagukunda, wowe mbaraga zanjye!" 
Psalms18:3 Uhoraho ni we rutare rwanjye, n’ibirindiro byanjye, akaba n’umurengezi wanjye. Ni Imana yanjye, n’urutare mpungiramo, akaba ingabo inkingira, n’intwaro nkesha gutsinda; ni na we buhungiro bwanjye budahangarwa." 
Psalms18:4 Natabaje Uhoraho, Nyakuberwa n’ibisingizo, maze mbasha gutsinda abanzi banjye." 
Psalms18:5 Ingoyi z’urupfu zari zandadiye, imivumba ya Beliyali inkura umutima," 
Psalms18:6 ingoyi z’Ikuzimu zirangota, n’imitego y’urupfu ishandikwa mu nzira nyuramo." 
Psalms18:7 Nuko mu magorwa yanjye, ntakambira Uhoraho, ntakira Imana yanjye; na we rero, yumvira ijwi ryanjye mu Ngoro ye, imiborogo yanjye imugeraho." 
Psalms18:8 Nuko isi irahindagana, ihinda umushyitsi, ibitereko by’imisozi birakangarana, birahungabana kubera uburakari bwe." 
Psalms18:9 Mu mazuru ye hacucumuka umwotsi, mu kanwa ke havubuka umuriro w’inkongi, hasohoka n’amakara agurumana." 
Psalms18:10 Abogeka ijuru, maze aramanuka, aza arangwa n’igicu kibuditse mu nsi y’ibirenge bye." 
Psalms18:11 Yicara ku gihu, maze araguruka, agenda ahorera mu nkubi y’umuyaga." 
Psalms18:12 Umwijima awugira ubwihisho bwe, yitwikira ibicu by’urucukirane: bimeze nk’amazi y’urwijiji." 
Psalms18:13 Akezezi kamubanza imbere, bya bicu biratamuruka, maze hagwa amahindu n’amakara yaka!" 
Psalms18:14 Uhoraho ahindira mu ijuru nk’inkuba zesa, Usumba byose arangurura ijwi;" 
Psalms18:15 arasa imyambi ye, ikwira hose, arekura imirabyo, maze isakara hose." 
Psalms18:16 Ubwo indiri y’inyanja irarangara, n’ibitereko by’isi biriyanika, kubera umuririmo wawe, Uhoraho, n’inkubi y’umuyaga uvubutse mu mazuru yawe." 
Psalms18:17 Nuko aho ari mu ijuru, arambura ukuboko aramfata, ankura mu mazi abira;" 
Psalms18:18 ankiza atyo umwanzi wanjye ukomeye, n’abandwanyaga bandusha amaboko." 
Psalms18:19 Bari bantanze imbere ku munsi w’amakuba, ariko Uhoraho ambera ikiramiro;" 
Psalms18:20 arangobotora, anshyira ahantu hisanzuye, nuko arankiza, kuko ankunda." 
Psalms18:21 Uhoraho yangiriye ibikwiranye n’ubutungane bwanjye, ampembera ibikorwa byanjye bizira amakemwa." 
Psalms18:22 Koko nakomeje inzira z’Uhoraho, nta bwo nigeze mba umuhemu ku Mana yanjye." 
Psalms18:23 Amategeko yayo yose nayitayeho cyane, sinaca ukubiri n’amabwiriza yayo." 
Psalms18:24 Nayibereye indakemwa, nirinda igicumuro icyo ari cyo cyose." 
Psalms18:25 Nuko Uhoraho anyitura ibikwiranye n’ubutungane bwanjye, asanze ibikorwa byanjye bizira amakemwa." 
Psalms18:26 Uw’indahemuka, umubera indahemuka, uw’indakemwa, ukamubera indakemwa." 
Psalms18:27 Uw’intungane ukamubera intungane, naho uw’incabiranya, ukamurusha ubwenge." 
Psalms18:28 Imbaga yasuzuguwe, ni wowe uyiha gutsinda, naho abibonabona ukabakoza isoni." 
Psalms18:29 Uhoraho, ni wowe uncanira itara; Mana yanjye, ngaho mboneshereza mu mwijima ndimo." 
Psalms18:30 Iyo turi kumwe, nsanganira igitero; iyo ndi kumwe n’Imana yanjye, nsimbuka inkike zihanitse." 
Psalms18:31 Inzira y’Imana ntihinyurwa na gato, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ntirikemangwa; ni we ngabo ikingira abamuhungiraho bose." 
Psalms18:32 None se, ni nde Mana uretse Uhoraho? Ni nde Rutare twisunga usibye Imana yacu?" 
Psalms18:33 Iyo Mana ni yo intera imbaraga, ikantunganyiriza inzira nyuramo," 
Psalms18:34 ikampa kunyaruka nk’impara, maze ikampagarika mu bitwa by’imisozi." 
Psalms18:35 Ni yo intoza kurwana, maze amaboko yanjye akamenya gufora umuheto w’icyuma." 
Psalms18:36 Nyagasani, umpa ingabo y’indatsimburwa, ukuboko kwawe kurandamira, unyitaho maze ukantera inkunga." 
Psalms18:37 Intambwe zanjye uzagurira inzira, maze intege zanjye ntizidandabirane." 
Psalms18:38 Ubu iyo nirukanye abanzi, ndabashyikira, maze simpindukire ntabatsembye." 
Psalms18:39 Ndabacocagura, ntibashobore kubyutsa umutwe, bakarambarara mu nsi y’ibirenge byanjye." 
Psalms18:40 Wanteye imbaraga zo kubatsinda, none abandwanyaga, ubu barampfukamiye." 
Psalms18:41 Abanzi banjye, watumye bavumwa barahunga, maze abari bampagurukiye ndabatsemba." 
Psalms18:42 Baratabaza, ariko ntihagira ubavuna, batakira Uhoraho ariko ntiyabasubiza." 
Psalms18:43 Nabahinduye nk’umukungugu utumurwa n’umuyaga, maze mbaribata nk’icyondo cyo mu nzira." 
Psalms18:44 Undinda imyivumbagatanyo ya rubanda, ukangira umutware w’amahanga; none imbaga y’abantu ntari nzi ndayihatse." 
Psalms18:45 Abahungu b’abanyamahanga bampatsweho, mvuga ijambo rimwe bakanyumvira." 
Psalms18:46 Abanyamahanga bacitse intege, basohoka mu buhungiro bwabo badagadwa." 
Psalms18:47 Uhoraho arakabaho! We Rutare nisunga, aragasingizwa! Imana nkesha umukiro niharirwe umutsindo," 
Psalms18:48 iyo Mana yamporeye, ikanyegurira ibihugu ngo mbitegeke!" 
Psalms18:49 Wankijije abanzi banjye, ndetse umpa guhashya abansembuye, kandi unkiza abantu b’abanyarugomo." 
Psalms18:50 Ni cyo gituma ngushimira, Uhoraho, rwagati mu mahanga, maze nkaririmba nshimagiza izina ryawe," 
Psalms18:51 mvuga nti «Agwiriza imitsindo umwami yimitse, agatonesha uwo yasize amavuta y’ubutore, ari we Dawudi n’abamukomokaho iteka ryose.»" 
Psalms19:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms19:2 Ijuru ryamamaza ikuzo ry’Imana, n’ikirere kikagaragaza ibyiza yakoze." 
Psalms19:3 Umunsi ubwira undi munsi inkuru yabyo, ijoro rikabimenyesha irindi joro." 
Psalms19:4 Nanone, nta nkuru, nta n’amagambo, kuko ijwi ryabyo ritumvikana!" 
Psalms19:5 Ariko ku isi hose urusobe rwabyo rurigaragaza, n’imvugo yabyo ikagera ku mpera z’isi. Hejuru iyo kure, ni ho Imana yashingiye ihema izuba;" 
Psalms19:6 maze na ryo, ak’umukwe usohotse mu nzu y’ubugeni, rikishimira gukataza mu nzira yaryo." 
Psalms19:7 Rirasira ku mpera imwe y’ijuru, rigataha ku yindi mpera, ubushyuhe bwaryo ntibugire aho busiga." 
Psalms19:8 Itegeko ry’Uhoraho ni indakemwa, rikaramira umutima. Amabwiriza y’Uhoraho ni amanyakuri, abacisha make akabungura ubwenge." 
Psalms19:9 Amateka y’Uhoraho araboneye, akanezereza umutima; amategeko y’Uhoraho ni uruhehemure, akamurikira umuntu." 
Psalms19:10 Igitinyiro cy’Uhoraho kiraboneye, kigahoraho iteka ryose. Ibyo Uhoraho yemeje ni amanyakuri, byose biba bitunganye." 
Psalms19:11 Bikwiriye kwifuzwa kurusha zahabu, kurusha ikirundo cya zahabu iyunguruye; biryohereye kurusha ubuki, kurusha ubuki bw’umushongi bukiva mu binyagu!" 
Psalms19:12 Ni cyo gituma umugaragu wawe abikesha kwitonda, kubikurikiza bikamugirira akamaro." 
Psalms19:13 Ni nde wamenya amakosa yose yakoze? Nyagasani, urangire umwere w’ibyaha ntiyiziho." 
Psalms19:14 Kandi urarinde umugaragu wawe abirasi, ntibakangireho ububasha! Ubwo rero nzaba intungane rwose, n’umwere w’igicumuro gikomeye." 
Psalms19:15 Amagambo mvuga, n’ibyo umutima wanjye uzirikana, nibijye bikunogera, wowe Uhoraho, Rutare nisunga n’umurengezi wanjye!" 
Psalms20:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms20:2 Uhoraho arajye akumva ku munsi w’amage, izina ry’Imana ya Yakobo rirakurengere!" 
Psalms20:3 Arakoherereze ubuvunyi buturutse mu ngoro ye, aho ari i Siyoni agushyigikire!" 
Psalms20:4 Aribuke amaturo yawe yose, ashime igitambo cyawe gitwikwa!" 
Psalms20:5 Araguhe icyo umutima wawe wifuza, akurangirize imigambi yawe yose!" 
Psalms20:6 Ubwo rero natwe tuzavuza impundu kuko watsinze, izina ry’Imana yacu turitwareho ibendera. Uhoraho arakore ibyo usabye byose!" 
Psalms20:7 Ubu ndabimenye: Uhoraho aha intore ye gutsinda; aho ari mu ngoro ye yo mu ijuru arayumva, akayiha gutsinda, ibikesheje ukuboko kwe." 
Psalms20:8 Bamwe biringira ibigare by’intambara, abandi bakiringira amafarasi y’urugamba, naho twebwe twiringira izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu, akaba ari we twiyambaza." 
Psalms20:9 Bo barahindagana, bakagwa, naho twebwe turahagarara, tukemarara." 
Psalms20:10 Uhoraho, uraduhere umwami kuganza, kandi natwe ujye utwumva igihe tukwiyambaje." 
Psalms21:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms21:2 Uhoraho, umwami wacu anejejwe n’ububasha bwawe; mbega ngo arishimira ubuvunyi bwawe!" 
Psalms21:3 Wamuhaye icyo umutima we wifuzaga, ntiwamwima icyo isengesho rye ryasabaga." 
Psalms21:4 Kuko wamusanganije imigisha n’ihirwe, maze ukamwambika ikamba rya zahabu inoze." 
Psalms21:5 Ubugingo yagusabaga, warabumuhaye, umuha kuzaramba ubuziraherezo." 
Psalms21:6 Ubuvunyi bwawe bwamuhesheje ikuzo ryinshi, umwungikanyaho icyubahiro n’ishema." 
Psalms21:7 Wamugize Ruhabwamigisha iteka ryose, iruhande rwawe ahabonera ibyishimo." 
Psalms21:8 Rwose, umwami wacu yiringiye Uhoraho, kandi ubuntu bw’Imana Isumba byose buzamugira indatsimburwa." 
Psalms21:9 Ikiganza cyawe kizafata mpiri abakurwanya bose, ukuboko kwawe gufate mpiri abakwanga bose;" 
Psalms21:10 nuhinguka, bazahinduka nk’umuriro w’itanura. Mu burakari bwe, Uhoraho azabaroha mu nyenga, maze umuriro ubatwike, bakongoke." 
Psalms21:11 Imbuto yabo, uzayitsemba ku isi, n’inyoko yabo uyirimbure mu bantu." 
Psalms21:12 N’aho baramuka bashatse kukugirira nabi, uwo mugambi bakawunoza, nta cyo bazashobora na busa;" 
Psalms21:13 kuko uzabatera guhunga, ukabanga umuheto wawe, maze ukabavuza imyambi." 
Psalms21:14 Uhoraho, hagurukana ububasha bwawe, maze tuzaririmbe, ducurange ibigwi by’ubutwari ugira." 
Psalms22:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Bayiririmba bakurikije injyana y’iyitwa «Imparakazi yo mu museke». Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms22:2 Mana yanjye, Mana yanjye, ni iki cyatumye untererana? Uri kure, ntuntabara; ndatakamba ntiwumve!" 
Psalms22:3 Mana yanjye, ku manywa nirirwa ntabaza, ariko ntunsubize, ndetse na nijoro sinigera nduhuka." 
Psalms22:4 Nyamara ni wowe Nyir’ubutagatifu, ugahora usingizwa na Israheli!" 
Psalms22:5 Abakurambere bacu bajyaga bakwiringira, bajyaga bakwiringira, maze nawe ukabakiza." 
Psalms22:6 Iyo bagutakiraga warabumvaga bakarokoka, barakwiringiraga, ntibakorwe n’ikimwaro." 
Psalms22:7 Jyeweho ariko sinkiri umuntu, nsigaye ndi nk’umunyorogoto; nabaye igiterashozi mu bantu, rubanda bakampa akato." 
Psalms22:8 Abambonye bose barankwena, bakampema kandi bakazunguza umutwe," 
Psalms22:9 bavuga bati «Ko yiringira Uhoraho, ngaho namubohore! Ngaho namukize, umva ko amukunda!»" 
Psalms22:10 Ni wowe wanyivaniye mu nda ya mama, unshyira mu maboko ye ngo mererwe neza." 
Psalms22:11 Ni wowe neguriwe kuva nkivuka, uba Imana yanjye kuva nkiva mu nda ya mama." 
Psalms22:12 None rero, wimba kure, kuko nagirijwe n’amagorwa, nkaba ndafite kirengera!" 
Psalms22:13 Dore ibimasa byinshi byica birankikije, dore amapfizi y’i Bashani yantangatanze;" 
Psalms22:14 binshinyikiye ibyinyo, boshye intare zishihagura, ari na ko zitontoma." 
Psalms22:15 Amagara arancika nk’amazi atemba, ingingo zanjye zose zarekanye. Umutima wanjye umeze nk’ibishashara, uranshongera mu nda nyirizina." 
Psalms22:16 Umuhogo wanjye wumiranye nk’urujyo, ururimi rwanjye rumfata mu nkanka: ahasigaye ni aho kundenzaho agataka!" 
Psalms22:17 Rwose, imbwa nyamwinshi zankubakubye, igitero cy’abagiranabi cyantaye hagati. Bamboshye ibiganza n’ibirenge," 
Psalms22:18 amagufwa yanjye yose nayabara! Baranyitegereza, bakanshungera," 
Psalms22:19 bigabanyije imyambaro yanjye, igishura cyanjye bakigiriraho ubufindo." 
Psalms22:20 None rero, Uhoraho, ntumbe kure, wowe, mbaraga zanjye, banguka untabare!" 
Psalms22:21 Rinda amagara yanjye ubugi bw’inkota, gira ungobotore mu majanja y’imbwa;" 
Psalms22:22 unkure mu rwasaya rw’intare, ungobotore mu mahembe y’imbogo!" 
Psalms22:23 Nzogeza izina ryawe mu bo tuva inda imwe, ngusingirize mu ruhame rw’ikoraniro," 
Psalms22:24 nti «Yemwe, abubaha Uhoraho, nimumusingize! Yemwe, bene Yakobo mwese, nimumukuze! Yemwe, bene Israheli mwese, nimumutinye!»" 
Psalms22:25 Kuko atigeze yirengagiza cyangwa ngo yinube umunyabyago wazahajwe n’ubutindahare, ngo amuhishe uruhanga rwe, ahubwo akamwumva igihe amutakiye." 
Psalms22:26 Nyagasani, ni wowe nzaharira ibisingizo byanjye mu ikoraniro rigari; imbere y’abagutinya, nzubahiriza amasezerano nakugiriye." 
Psalms22:27 Abakene bazarya, maze bahage, abashakashaka Uhoraho bazamusingiza, babwirana bati «Murakarama mwese, munezerwe ubuziraherezo!»" 
Psalms22:28 Isi yose, aho iva ikagera, izabyibuka maze igarukire Uhoraho, imiryango yose y’amahanga imupfukamire;" 
Psalms22:29 kuko ubwami ari ubw’Uhoraho, akaba ari we ugenga amahanga." 
Psalms22:30 Abakomeye bose bo ku isi baramupfukamiye, ababereyeho kuzapfa bose bemeye kumugandukira." 
Psalms22:31 Urubyaro rwabo ruzamukeza, ruzamenyekanye Uhoraho mu bisekuruza bizaza;" 
Psalms22:32 ruzamamaza ubutungane bwe, imbaga izavuka nyuma ruyitekerereze ibyo Uhoraho yakoze." 
Psalms23:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho ni we mushumba wanjye, nta cyo nzabura!" 
Psalms23:2 Andagira mu rwuri rutoshye, akanshora ku mariba y’amazi afutse, maze akankomeza umutima." 
Psalms23:3 Anyobora inzira y’ubutungane, abigiriye kubahiriza izina rye." 
Psalms23:4 N’aho nanyura mu manga yijimye nta cyankura umutima, kuko uba uri kumwe nanjye, inkoni yawe y’ubushumba intera ubugabo." 
Psalms23:5 Imbere yanjye uhategura ameza, abanzi banjye bareba, ukansiga amavuta mu mutwe, inkongoro yanjye ukayisendereza." 
Psalms23:6 Koko ineza n’urukundo byawe biramperekeza, mu gihe cyose nzaba nkiriho. Nanjye rero nzaza niturire mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, abe ari ho nibera iminsi yose." 
Psalms24:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Isi ni iy’Uhoraho, hamwe n’ibiyirimo, yose ni iye, hamwe n’ibiyituyeho byose." 
Psalms24:2 Ni we wayitendetse hejuru y’inyanja, anayitereka hejuru y’inzuzi ubutayegayega." 
Psalms24:3 Ni nde uzazamuka ku musozi w’Uhoraho, maze agahagarara ahantu he hatagatifu?" 
Psalms24:4 Ni ufite ibiganza bidacumura, n’umutima usukuye, ntararikire na busa ibintu by’amahomvu, kandi ntarahire ibinyoma." 
Psalms24:5 Uwo azabona umugisha w’Uhoraho, n’ubutungane bukomoka ku Mana umukiza we." 
Psalms24:6 Bene abo ni bo bagize ubwoko bw’abamushaka, bagashakashaka uruhanga rwawe, Mana ya Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Marembo, nimwaguke, namwe miryango ya kera na kare, nimukinguke, maze hinjire umwami wuje ikuzo!" 
Psalms24:8 Uwo mwami wuje ikuzo yaba ari nde? Ni Uhoraho, Umunyabubasha, Umudatsimburwa, ni Uhoraho, Umudatsimburwa ku rugamba." 
Psalms24:9 Marembo, nimwaguke, namwe miryango ya kera na kare, nimukinguke, maze hinjire umwami wuje ikuzo!" 
Psalms24:10 Uwo mwami wuje ikuzo yaba ari nde? Uhoraho, Umutegeka w’ingabo, ni we mwami wuje ikuzo." 
Psalms25:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, ni wowe umutima wanjye urangamiye." 
Psalms25:2 Ni wowe niringiye, Mana yanjye. Ndakwiragije, sinzakorwe n’ikimwaro, n’abanzi banjye ntibazanyishimeho!" 
Psalms25:3 Ntihakagire n’umwe mu bakwiringira ukorwa n’ikimwaro, ahubwo abaguhemukaho nta mpamvu bazabe ari bo bakorwa n’isoni!" 
Psalms25:4 Uhoraho, menyesha inzira zawe, untoze kugenda mu tuyira twawe." 
Psalms25:5 Nyobora mu kuri kwawe kandi ujye umbwiriza, kuko ari wowe Mana nkesha umukiro wose. Iminsi yose ni wowe niringira." 
Psalms25:6 Uhoraho, ibuka ineza n’urukundo wagaragaje kuva kera na kare." 
Psalms25:7 Ntiwite ku byaha n’amafuti nakoze nkiri muto, ahubwo unyiteho ukurikije impuhwe zawe, ugirire ubuntu bwawe, Uhoraho." 
Psalms25:8 Uhoraho agwa neza kandi ni indakemwa, ni cyo gituma abanyabyaha abagarura mu nzira nziza." 
Psalms25:9 Abiyoroshya abaganisha ku butungane, abacisha make akabatoza kunyura mu nzira ye." 
Psalms25:10 Amayira yose y’Uhoraho ni urukundo n’ubudahemuka, akabigirira abakomera ku isezerano rye no ku mategeko ye." 
Psalms25:11 Girira izina ryawe, Uhoraho, maze umbabarire ibicumuro byanjye, kuko bikabije!" 
Psalms25:12 Niba hari umuntu waba atinya Uhoraho, Uhoraho amwereka inzira agomba kunyura." 
Psalms25:13 Umutima we uhorana ihirwe, n’abamukomokaho bakazatunga igihugu." 
Psalms25:14 Ibanga ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa abamutinya, maze akabamenyesha isezerano rye." 
Psalms25:15 Amaso yanjye mpora nyahanze Uhoraho, kuko ari we ugobotora amaguru yanjye mu mutego." 
Psalms25:16 Nyerekezaho amaso yawe, ungirire imbabazi, kuko ndi inkeho nkaba n’umunyabyago." 
Psalms25:17 Akababaro mfite mu mutima ntikagira urugero, gira umvane mu magorwa ndimo." 
Psalms25:18 Reba akaga n’imiruho mfite, maze unkize ibyaha byanjye byose!" 
Psalms25:19 Reba ukuntu abanzi banjye ari benshi cyane, n’ukuntu banyanga urunuka." 
Psalms25:20 Rinda amagara yanjye, undokore, singakorwe n’ikimwaro ngufiteho ubuhungiro." 
Psalms25:21 Ubuziranenge n’umurava birankomeze, kuko ari wowe niringiye, Uhoraho." 
Psalms25:22 Mana, gira ubohore Israheli, uyikure mu magorwa yayo yose!" 
Psalms26:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, ndenganura, kuko ndi indakemwa mu mibereho, nkaba nizeye Uhoraho ubutagoragora." 
Psalms26:2 Uhoraho, nsuzuma, ndetse nushaka ungerageze, maze usukure ubura bwanjye n’umutima wanjye;" 
Psalms26:3 urukundo rwawe ni rwo mpora ndangamiye, kandi nkagenda nkurikiye ukuri kwawe." 
Psalms26:4 Sinigeze nicarana n’abanyabinyoma, cyangwa ngo ngenderere abantu b’indyarya;" 
Psalms26:5 nzirana n’aho abagiranabi bateraniye, sinigeze nicarana n’abagomeramana." 
Psalms26:6 Nkaraba ibiganza byanjye, mpamya ko ndi umwere, kugira ngo mbone ubwegera urutambiro rwawe, Uhoraho," 
Psalms26:7 maze nkagenda mpanitse indirimbo zigusingiza, kandi ari na ko ntondagura ibitangaza byawe byose." 
Psalms26:8 Uhoraho, nkunda cyane Ingoro uganjemo, aho hantu ikuzo ryawe rituye." 
Psalms26:9 None rero, ntunshyire mu rwego rumwe n’abanyabyaha, cyangwa ngo unshyire hamwe n’abantu b’abicanyi." 
Psalms26:10 Dore ibiganza byabo birarangwa n’ishyano bakoze, n’ukuboko kwabo kw’indyo gucigatiye za ruswa." 
Psalms26:11 Naho jyewe mpora ngendana ubudahemuka; Uhoraho, nkiza, ungirire ibambe." 
Psalms26:12 Ikirenge cyanjye gihora gishinze ahantu hategamye, ngasingiriza Uhoraho mu materaniro." 
Psalms27:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho ni urumuri rwanjye n’agakiza kanjye, ni nde wantera ubwoba? Uhoraho ni urugerero rw’ubugingo bwanjye, ni nde wankangaranya?" 
Psalms27:2 Igihe abagiranabi bampagurukiye kugira ngo bandye mbona, abo banzi banjye bandwanya, ni bo ahubwo badandabirana, bakitura hasi!" 
Psalms27:3 Kabone n’aho igitero cyose cyaza, kigashinga ingando kinyibasiye, umutima wanjye nta bwoba wagira na busa; n’aho intambara yarota, nakomeza kwizera." 
Psalms27:4 Ikintu kimwe nasabye Uhoraho, kandi nkaba ngikomeyeho, ni ukwiturira mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, iminsi yose y’ukubaho kwanjye, kugira ngo mpore nirebera uburanga bw’Uhoraho, kandi nite ku Ngoro ye ntagatifu." 
Psalms27:5 Koko rero, igihe cy’amage, ampa aho nikinga mu nzu ye, akampisha mu bwihugiko bw’ihema rye, akanshyira ahantu hakomeye nk’urutare." 
Psalms27:6 None ubu ngubu umutwe wanjye uremaraye, ku buryo ndebera ku rutugu abanzi bankikije. Ngiye mu Ngoro ye nakereye gutura ibitambo, ndirimbire Uhoraho kandi mucurangire." 
Psalms27:7 Uhoraho, umva ijwi ryanjye, ndagutakira; gira ibambe, unsubize!" 
Psalms27:8 Umutima wanjye wanyibukije ijambo ryawe, wowe wavuze uti «Nimushakashake uruhanga rwanjye!» None rero, Uhoraho, ni rwo nshakashaka," 
Psalms27:9 ntumpishe uruhanga rwawe! Wirakara ngo uhinde umuyoboke wawe, ni wowe muvunyi wanjye; ntunzinukwe ngo untererane, wowe Mana nkesha agakiza!" 
Psalms27:10 N’aho data na mama bantererana, Uhoraho we yanyakira!" 
Psalms27:11 Uhoraho, nyereka inzira yawe, unyuze mu nzira iboneye, n’ubwo hariho abanyubikiriye." 
Psalms27:12 Ntungabize ababisha banjye bandwaye inzika; dore abashinjabinyoma banyibasiye, bariho barancumbira urugomo." 
Psalms27:13 Nyamara jye nizeye kuzabona ubugiraneza bw’Uhoraho, mu gihugu cy’abazima." 
Psalms27:14 Ihangane, wizigire Uhoraho, ukomeze umutima, ube intwari! Rwose, wiringire Uhoraho!" 
Psalms28:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi Uhoraho, ndagutabaza, Rutare rwanjye, ntiwice amatwi! Kuko uramutse wicecekeye ntunyumve, nasigara ndi nk’indembe iraye iri bupfe!" 
Psalms28:2 Umva ijwi ryanjye ritakamba igihe ngutakiye, n’igihe nerekeje ibiganza byanjye ku Ngoro yawe ntagatifu." 
Psalms28:3 Ntunkumbane n’abagomeramana, cyangwa hamwe n’abagizi ba nabi, bavugana iby’amahoro n’abaturanyi babo, nyamara mu mitima yabo haganje ububisha." 
Psalms28:4 Urabahe ibikwiranye n’imigirire yabo, mbese ukurikije ububisha bw’ibikorwa byabo; ubagenzereze ibikwiranye n’ibyo bakora, ubiture ikibakwiriye!" 
Psalms28:5 Ubwo batitaye ku byo Uhoraho yakoze, ngo bahugukire ibikorwa by’amaboko ye, nabararike hasi ubutazabegura." 
Psalms28:6 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, kuko yumvise ijwi ryanjye rimutakambira!" 
Psalms28:7 Uhoraho ni we maboko yanjye n’ingabo nikingira, umutima wanjye waramwiringiye, maze arantabara. Ndasimbagizwa n’ibyishimo byansabye umutima, maze nkamushimira muririmbira." 
Psalms28:8 Uhoraho ni we mbaraga z’umuryango we, ni we buhungiro bukiza intore ye." 
Psalms28:9 Kiza umuryango wawe, uhe umugisha abo wagize imbata zawe; babere umushumba, uzahore ubaragiye iteka!" 
Psalms29:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Nimwegurire Uhoraho, bana b’Imana, nimwegurire Uhoraho ikuzo n’ububasha!" 
Psalms29:2 Nimwegurire Uhoraho ikuzo rikwiriye izina rye! Nimupfukamire Uhoraho, kuko yagaragaje ubutagatifu bwe!" 
Psalms29:3 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rihindiye hejuru y’amazi, Imana Nyir’ikuzo ihindishije inkuba, Uhoraho ahindiye hejuru y’amazi magari." 
Psalms29:4 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rivuganye ubukaka, ijwi ry’Uhoraho rivuganye ubuhangare." 
Psalms29:5 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rihwanyagura ibiti by’amasederi, Uhoraho agakonyagura amasederi yo muri Libani." 
Psalms29:6 Arakinagiza Libani nk’inyana y’umutavu, n’ibisi bya Siriyoni nk’ishashi y’imbogo." 
Psalms29:7 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho riravundereza ibishashi by’umuriro. 
Psalms29:8 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho ritera ubutayu gutigita, Uhoraho atera ubutayu bw’i Kadeshi gutenguka." 
Psalms29:9 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rirakangaranya impara ziriho zibyara, rigakokora amashyamba. No mu Ngoro ye, byose bikavuga ngo «Habwa ikuzo!»" 
Psalms29:10 Uhoraho aganje hejuru y’umwuzure, Uhoraho atetse ijabiro ari umwami iteka." 
Psalms29:11 Uhoraho azaha umuryango we kugira amaboko, Uhoraho azaha umuryango we umugisha wuje amahoro." 
Psalms30:1 Iyi zaburi ni indirimbo ijyana n’iyegurirwamana ry’Ingoro. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms30:2 Ndakurata, Uhoraho, kuko wampaye kwegura umutwe, maze ntureke abanzi banjye banyigambaho." 
Psalms30:3 Uhoraho, Mana yanjye, naragutakiye, maze urankiza;" 
Psalms30:4 Uhoraho, wanzamuye ikuzimu, maze ungarurira kure nenda gupfa." 
Psalms30:5 Nimucurangire Uhoraho, mwebwe abayoboke be, mumwogeze muririmba ubutungane bwe;" 
Psalms30:6 kuko uburakari bwe butamara akanya, naho ubutoneshe bwe bugahoraho iteka; ijoro ryose riba amarira gusa, ariko igitondo kigatangaza impundu z’ibyishimo." 
Psalms30:7 Jyewe, mu mudendezo narimo, naravugaga, nti «Nta giteze kumpungabanya bibaho!»" 
Psalms30:8 Uhoraho, ku neza yawe, wari waranshyize ahirengeye. Ariko ugeze aho umpisha uruhanga rwawe, maze ndakangarana." 
Psalms30:9 Ni bwo rero, Uhoraho, ngutabaje, ntakambira Umutegetsi wanjye," 
Psalms30:10 nti «Wakunguka iki mbuze ubuzima? Mpfuye bakampamba byakumarira iki? Mbese hari ubwo umukungugu wabasha kugusingiza, ukamamaza ubudahemuka bwawe?" 
Psalms30:11 Uhoraho rero, nyumva, ungirire ibambe; Uhoraho, urambere umuvunyi!»" 
Psalms30:12 Nuko amaganya yanjye uherako uyahindura imbyino, ikigunira nari nambaye ugisimbuza imyenda y’ibirori." 
Psalms30:13 Ni yo mpamvu umutima wanjye uzakuririmba ubudatuza, Uhoraho Mana yanjye, nzagusingiza iteka ryose." 
Psalms31:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms31:2 Uhoraho, ni wowe buhungiro bwanjye, singateterezwe bibaho! Girira ubutabera bwawe, maze umbohore;" 
Psalms31:3 ntega amatwi, maze ubanguke untabare! Mbera urutare rukomeye, n’urugo rucinyiye nzakiriramo." 
Psalms31:4 Koko rero ni wowe rutare rwanjye n’ingabo inkingira; nyobora, undandate ubigiriye kubahiriza izina ryawe." 
Psalms31:5 Ngobotora mu mutego banteze, kuko ari wowe mbaraga zanjye." 
Psalms31:6 Nshyize ubugingo bwanjye mu maboko yawe; ni wowe uncungura, Uhoraho, Mana nyir’ukuri." 
Psalms31:7 Nanga abayoboka ibigirwamana bitagira shinge, jyeweho niringira Uhoraho wenyine." 
Psalms31:8 Nzabyina nishimira cyane ubudahemuka bwawe, kuko wabonye akaga ndimo, ukamenya amagorwa yanjye." 
Psalms31:9 Ntiwantaye mu maboko y’umwanzi, ahubwo wampaye gushinga ibirindiro, unshyira ahagutse." 
Psalms31:10 Ngirira ibambe, Uhoraho, dore ndi mu kaga; amaso yanjye arahondobera kubera agahinda, umuhogo n’amara na byo byashengutse." 
Psalms31:11 Ubuzima bwanjye buhereye mu kababaro, imyaka y’ukubaho kwanjye ishiriye mu maganya. Kubera ko nacumuye byatumye imbaraga zanjye zikendera, n’amagufwa yanjye aramungwa." 
Psalms31:12 Abanzi banjye bose barampundazaho ibitutsi, n’abaturanyi banjye ntibakincira akari urutega. Incuti zanjye z’amagara nsigaye nzitera ishozi, abo duhuriye mu nzira barambona bagahunga." 
Psalms31:13 Nsigaye naribagiranye nk’uwapfuye, meze nk’akabindi kasandaye." 
Psalms31:14 Numva rubanda bamvuga nabi ngo «Yaciye igikuba hirya no hino!» Nuko bishyira hamwe barankomanyiriza, bajya imigambi yo kuncuza ubugingo." 
Psalms31:15 Ariko ndakwiringiye, Uhoraho, ndavuga nti «Imana yanjye ni wowe!»" 
Psalms31:16 Ibihe byanjye biri mu kiganza cyawe, ngaho rero ngobotora mu maboko y’abanzi banyibasiye!" 
Psalms31:17 Uruhanga rwawe nirumurikire umugaragu wawe, maze unkize ugiriye impuhwe zawe." 
Psalms31:18 Uhoraho, ntunkoze isoni kandi ari wowe niyambaje, ahubwo abagome abe ari bo bakorwa n’ikimwaro, baruce barumire nk’abagiye ikuzimu!" 
Psalms31:19 Iminwa ibeshya iragahinduka ibiragi, yo ivuga nabi intungane ibishyizemo ubushizi bw’isoni, ubwirasi n’agasuzuguro!" 
Psalms31:20 Mbega ukuntu ibyiza wageneye abagutinya ari byinshi! Ubiha abo ubereye ubuhungiro bose, kandi ukabibagwizaho rubanda rwose rubyirebera." 
Psalms31:21 Ubishyingura aho uhisha uruhanga rwawe, kure y’ubutiriganya bw’abantu, ukabibika ahiherereye, kure y’uruvugo rw’abantu." 
Psalms31:22 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, kuko ku neza ye yankoreye ibitangaza, none nkaba ndi mu mugi ucinyiye!" 
Psalms31:23 Naho jyewe nari nataye umutwe, mvuga nti «Nirukanywe kure y’amaso yawe.» Nyamara wumvise amaganya yanjye, igihe nagutabazaga." 
Psalms31:24 Nimukunde Uhoraho, mwebwe abayoboke be mwese! Uhoraho arinda abamwemera, naho abamushingana ijosi akabaha agera." 
Psalms31:25 Nimukomere kandi mwireme agatima, mwebwe mwese abizera Uhoraho!" 
Psalms32:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Ni inyigisho. Hahirwa umuntu wababariwe igicumuro cye, icyaha yakoze kikarenzwa amaso!" 
Psalms32:2 Hahirwa umuntu Uhoraho adahamya icyaha yakoze, n’umutima we ntugire uburiganya." 
Psalms32:3 Igihe cyose nakomeje kukizinzika, umubiri wanjye wagiye ushonga, waciwe intege n’iminiho ya buri munsi," 
Psalms32:4 kuko ukuboko kwawe kwanshenguraga amanywa n’ijoro, ubuzima bwanjye bukayonga nk’ubukubiswe n’icyunzwe cyo mu cyi." 
Psalms32:5 Ni bwo rero nkwirezeho icyaha cyanjye, sinazinzika amafuti yanjye. Naravuze nti «Ngiye kubwira Uhoraho ibicumuro byanjye», maze nawe untura umutwaro w’ibyaha byanjye." 
Psalms32:6 Ni ko ugenzereza umuyoboke wese ukwiyambaje, igihe cyose aje akugana. N’aho amazi y’umwuzure yasendera, nta bwo ateze kumugeraho." 
Psalms32:7 Ni wowe bwugamo bwanjye, ukandinda amakuba, ugatuma mpanika indirimbo z’abarokowe." 
Psalms32:8 Maze ukambwira uti «Ngiye kukujijura, nkwereke inzira ukwiye gukurikira; nzaguhozaho ijisho, njye nkugira inama!" 
Psalms32:9 Ntukamere nk’ifarasi cyangwa inyumbu bitagira ubwenge, bikenera umurunga n’umukoba ngo bicubye umurego, bityo ntuzagira icyo uba.»" 
Psalms32:10 Abagiranabi bazigamiwe imibabaro myinshi, naho uwiringira Uhoraho, agasakazwaho impuhwe ze." 
Psalms32:11 Ntungane, nimwizihirwe munezezwe n’Uhoraho, mudabagire mu byishimo, muvuze impundu mwese abanyamutima uboneye." 
Psalms33:1 Ntungane, nimukomere amashyi Uhoraho! Abantu b’umutima uboneye bakwiye kumusingiza." 
Psalms33:2 Nimusingize Uhoraho mucuranga icyembe, munamucurangire inanga y’imirya cumi." 
Psalms33:3 Nimumuririmbire indirimbo nshya, mumucurangire binoze muranguruye amajwi!" 
Psalms33:4 Kuko ijambo ry’Uhoraho ari intagorama, n’ibikorwa bye byose bikaba indahinyuka." 
Psalms33:5 Akunda ubutungane n’ubutabera, isi yuzuye ineza y’Uhoraho." 
Psalms33:6 Ijuru ryaremwe n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho, umwuka we uhanga ingabo zaryo zose." 
Psalms33:7 Amazi y’ibiyaga ayagomerera hamwe, inyanja azikoranyiriza mu bigega." 
Psalms33:8 Isi yose nitinye Uhoraho, abayituye bose bamugirire ubwoba." 
Psalms33:9 Kuko ibyo avuze byose biraba, yategeka, byose bikabaho." 
Psalms33:10 Uhoraho yaburijemo imigambi y’amahanga, ibitekerezo by’imiryango abihindura ubusa." 
Psalms33:11 Nyamara umugambi w’Uhoraho ugumaho iteka ryose, n’ibitekerezo by’umutima we bigahoraho, uko ibihe bigenda biha ibindi." 
Psalms33:12 Hahirwa ihanga Uhoraho abereye Imana, hahirwa umuryango yitoreye ngo ube imbata ye!" 
Psalms33:13 Uhoraho arebera mu bushorishori bw’ijuru, akabona bene muntu bose." 
Psalms33:14 Aho atetse ijabiro mu ngoro ye, ahoza ijisho ku batuye isi bose;" 
Psalms33:15 ni we wenyine mubaji w’imitima yabo, kandi akamenya ibyo bakora byose." 
Psalms33:16 Nta mwami ukizwa n’uko afite ingabo nyinshi, nta n’intwari irengerwa n’uko ifite imbaraga." 
Psalms33:17 Kwiringira ifarasi y’urugamba, ni ukwibeshya, imbaraga zayo zose si zo zitabarura." 
Psalms33:18 Ahubwo ni Uhoraho uragira abamwubaha, akita ku biringira impuhwe ze," 
Psalms33:19 kugira ngo abakize urupfu, anababesheho mu gihe cy’inzara." 
Psalms33:20 Twebwe rero twizigiye Uhoraho; ni we buvunyi bwacu n’ingabo idukingira. 
Psalms33:21 Ibyishimo biri mu mutima wacu ni we bikomokaho, amizero yacu akaba mu izina rye ritagatifu." 
Psalms33:22 Uhoraho, ineza yawe iraduhoreho, nk’uko amizero yacu agushingiyeho." 
Psalms34:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Ibivugwamo byerekeye igihe yihinduye nk’umusazi ahingutse imbere y’Abimeleki, maze undi yamwirukana, Dawudi akigendera." 
Psalms34:2 Nzashimira Uhoraho igihe cyose, ibisingizo bye bizahora ubudahwema mu munwa wanjye." 
Psalms34:3 Ishema mfite ryose ndikesha Uhoraho, ab’intamenyekana nibabyumve, maze bishime!" 
Psalms34:4 Nimwogeze Uhoraho hamwe nanjye, twese hamwe turatire izina rye icyarimwe." 
Psalms34:5 Nashakashatse Uhoraho, aransubiza, nuko ankiza ibyankuraga umutima byose." 
Psalms34:6 Abamurangamira bahorana umucyo, mu maso habo ntiharangwa ikimwaro." 
Psalms34:7 Umunyabyago yaratabaje, Uhoraho aramwumva, maze amuzahura mu magorwa ye yose." 
Psalms34:8 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aca ingando hafi y’abamutinya, akabagoboka." 
Psalms34:9 Nimushishoze maze mwumve ukuntu Uhoraho anogera umutima; hahirwa umuntu abereye ubuhungiro! 
Psalms34:10 Nimutinye Uhoraho, mwebwe abo yitoreye, kuko abamutinya nta cyo babura." 
Psalms34:11 Abakire bageza aho bakena bagasonza, naho abashakashaka Uhoraho nta cyo babura." 
Psalms34:12 Bana, nimuze muntege amatwi, mureke mbigishe uko mutinya Uhoraho." 
Psalms34:13 Ari hehe umuntu ukunda ubugingo, akifuza guhirwa mu buzima bwe bwose?" 
Psalms34:14 Ururimi rwawe rero urarurinde ikibi, n’umunwa wawe uwurinde amazimwe." 
Psalms34:15 Zibukira ikibi, ukore ikiri cyiza; shaka amahoro, abe ari yo uharanira." 
Psalms34:16 Amaso y’Uhoraho ayahoza ku bantu b’intungane, amatwi ye agahora yitaye ku maganya yabo." 
Psalms34:17 Uhoraho ashyamirana n’abagiranabi, kugira ngo azimanganye ku isi icyatuma babibuka." 
Psalms34:18 Intungane ziratabaza, Uhoraho akazumva, maze akazikiza amagorwa yazo yose." 
Psalms34:19 Uhoraho aba hafi y’abafite umutima washengutse, akaramira abafite umutima wihebye." 
Psalms34:20 Intungane igira ibyago byinshi, ariko buri gihe Uhoraho akabiyikiza." 
Psalms34:21 Arinda umubiri wayo wose, ntihagire igufwa ryayo na rimwe rivunika." 
Psalms34:22 Nyamara icyago gihitana umugome, abanga intungane bagahabwa igihano." 
Psalms34:23 Uhoraho arengera amagara y’abayoboke be, kandi nta n’umwe mu bamuhungiraho uzahabwa igihano." 
Psalms35:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, nawe shinja ibyaha ababindega, urwanye abihaye kundwanya." 
Psalms35:2 Fata ingabo yawe n’ingofero y’intamenwa, maze uhaguruke uze untabare." 
Psalms35:3 Kura icumu mu ntagara, wimire abanyirukana, maze umpumurize umbwira uti «Ni jye ukurengera!»" 
Psalms35:4 Abahigira amagara yanjye nibakorwe n’isoni, maze bamwarwe! Abagambiriye kungirira nabi, nibasubire inyuma bamanjirwe!" 
Psalms35:5 Bazamere nk’umurama mu muyaga, umunsi umumalayika w’Uhoraho azabahinda." 
Psalms35:6 Inzira bacamo izacure umwijima kandi inyerere, umunsi umumalayika w’Uhoraho azaba abirukana!" 
Psalms35:7 Banteze umutego banziza ubusa, bancukurira urwobo nta mpamvu." 
Psalms35:8 Icyorezo gikaze nikibatungure, bafatirwe mu mutego bateze ubwabo, maze urwo rwobo babe ari bo barugwamo." 
Psalms35:9 Ubwo rero nzasabagizwa n’ibyishimo nkesha Uhoraho, mbyine nishimira ko yankijije." 
Psalms35:10 Maze jyewe, uko nakabaye, nzavuge nti «Uhoraho, ni nde wamera nkawe? Utabara insuzugurwa, ukayikiza uwayirushaga amaboko, insuzugurwa n’umukene ukabamururaho abambuzi.»" 
Psalms35:11 Abashinjabinyoma bampagurukiye, barampata ibibazo ku bintu ntazi." 
Psalms35:12 Ineza mbagirira bayitura inabi, none nsigaye ndi inkeho." 
Psalms35:13 Nyamara, iyo babaga barwaye, jyewe nambaraga ikigunira, nkibabaza cyane ngasiba kurya, ngahora nsenga mbasabira." 
Psalms35:14 Nahoraga nshyashyana nk’aho ari incuti cyangwa umuvandimwe, ngahora nijimye kandi nacitse urukendero nk’aho ari mama wapfuye." 
Psalms35:15 Ariko naraguye, bo bakoranira kunkina ku mubyimba, ndetse n’abavantara ntazi barahurura, nuko baranshwanyaguza nta mbabazi." 
Psalms35:16 Abo bagomeramana b’abashinyaguzi, bangota bampekenyera amenyo." 
Psalms35:17 Nyagasani, ibyo uzabyihanganira kugeza ryari? Gira warure amagara yanjye muri icyo cyago, unkize ibyo byana by’intare," 
Psalms35:18 maze nzagushimirire mu ikoraniro rigari, ngusingirize hagati y’imbaga y’abantu." 
Psalms35:19 Abanyanga ku maherere ntukareke banyigambaho,, n’abantoteza nta mpamvu ntibakanyicanireho ijisho." 
Psalms35:20 Nta jambo ry’amahoro ribarangwaho, icyabo ni uguhimba ibirego byo gusebya abanyetuze bari mu gihugu." 
Psalms35:21 Baranyasamira bamvuga nabi ngo «Dore dore! Turamwiboneye!» 
Psalms35:22 Uhoraho, urabona nawe ko udakwiye kwicecekera! Nyagasani, wiguma kure yanjye!" 
Psalms35:23 Kanguka, uhagurukire kundenganura; umburanire, wowe Mana yanjye n’Umutegetsi wanjye!" 
Psalms35:24 Uhoraho Mana yanjye, ndenganura ukurikije ubutabera bwawe, maze woye gutuma banyigambaho!" 
Psalms35:25 Ntureke bavuga ngo «mama weee! Turamutera itama rimwe!» Ntibakabone n’uko bavuga ngo «Turamushyikiriye!» 
Psalms35:26 Bose icyarimwe nibakorwe n’ikimwaro, bo bishimiraga ibyago byanjye! Abanyigambagaho nibakorwe n’isoni, maze bamwazwe!" 
Psalms35:27 Naho abanyifurizaga gutsinda urubanza nibavuze impundu, bavuge ubudahwema bati «Uhoraho aratsinze, we washakiye umuyoboke we ihirwe.»" 
Psalms35:28 Bityo ururimi rwanjye ruzamamaze ubutabera bwawe, ndirimbe ibisingizo byawe iminsi yose." 
Psalms36:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi, umugaragu w’Imana." 
Psalms36:2 Nibutse ijambo ry’ubugomeramana ryavuzwe n’umunyabyaha: kuri we, ni iki cyatuma umuntu yatinya Imana?" 
Psalms36:3 Iyo yirebye yibwira ko ari indakemwa, ntabashe kubona amafuti ye ngo ayange." 
Psalms36:4 Amagambo yose avuga yuje ubugome n’ubuhendanyi, gushyira mu gaciro no gukora neza ntibimurangwaho." 
Psalms36:5 Iyo aryamye ni bwo acura imigambi y’ubugizi bwa nabi, agahata ibirenge inzira itari nziza, ntabe yatekereza guca ukubiri n’icyitwa ikibi." 
Psalms36:6 Uhoraho, impuhwe zawe ziganje mu ijuru, ubudahinyuka bwawe bugakabakaba mu bicu." 
Psalms36:7 Ubutungane bwawe butumburutse nk’imisozi miremire, ubucamanza bwawe bukareshya n’inyenga ngari. Uhoraho, ni wowe ukiza abantu n’inyamaswa;" 
Psalms36:8 Mana yanjye, mbega ineza yawe ngo iraba intagereranywa! Bene muntu babona ubuhungiro mu gicucu cy’amababa yawe," 
Psalms36:9 bakijuta amafunguro amara inzara babonera mu Ngoro yawe, maze ukabashora ku ruzi rw’ibyiza bikomoka iwawe." 
Psalms36:10 Koko rero, iwawe ni ho hari isoko y’ubugingo, kandi urumuri rwawe ni rwo natwe dukesha kubona urumuri." 
Psalms36:11 Ineza yawe urayikomereze abakumenye, n’ubutabera bwawe ubukomereze abafite umutima uboneye." 
Psalms36:12 Umunyagasuzuguro ntagakandagire iwanjye, n’ikiganza cy’umugiranabi ntikikantsimbure." 
Psalms36:13 Ngaha abagizi ba nabi baguye imirara, baratembagaye ubudashobora kubyutsa umutwe." 
Psalms37:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Ntugahangayikishwe n’abagiranabi, cyangwa ngo ugirire ishyari abahendanyi," 
Psalms37:2 kuko bagwangara bwangu nk’ibyatsi, bakuma nk’igisambu cyari gitohagiye." 
Psalms37:3 Iringire Uhoraho, kandi ugenze neza, kugira ngo ugume mu gihugu, kandi uhagirire amahoro." 
Psalms37:4 Nezezwa n’Uhoraho, na we azaguha icyo umutima wawe wifuza." 
Psalms37:5 Yoboka inzira igana Uhoraho, umwiringire: na we azakuzirikana," 
Psalms37:6 maze ubutungane bwawe abugaragaze nk’umuseke ukebye, n’ubutabera bwawe, bumere nk’amanywa y’ihangu." 
Psalms37:7 Gumana ituze imbere y’Uhoraho, umwiringire, ntugahangayikishwe n’uwahiriwe na byose, n’utunzwe n’amayeri ntakakubabaze." 
Psalms37:8 Reka uburakari, wime urwaho umujinya, woye kwijujuta, kuko byakugwa nabi." 
Psalms37:9 Koko rero, abagiranabi bazagera aho barimburwe, naho abiringira Uhoraho batunge igihugu." 
Psalms37:10 Hasigaye igihe gito, maze umugiranabi akavaho; uzamushakira aho yari atuye, usange atakiharangwa." 
Psalms37:11 Naho abakene bazatunga igihugu, bagire amahoro asagambye." 
Psalms37:12 Umugiranabi ahora acura inama yibasiye intungane, maze akayihekenyera amenyo." 
Psalms37:13 Ariko Nyagasani aramugaya, kuko aba aruzi umunsi we wegereje." 
Psalms37:14 Abagiranabi bakuye inkota, bafora n’imiheto, kugira ngo bice umukene n’indushyi, banasogote intungane." 
Psalms37:15 Nyamara inkota bafite izabagarukana ibahuranye umutima, n’imiheto yabo izavunagurike." 
Psalms37:16 Uduke intungane itunze turayihira kurusha ibyinshi by’abagiranabi," 
Psalms37:17 kuko amaboko y’abagiranabi azakenyagurika, ariko Uhoraho agashyigikira intungane." 
Psalms37:18 Uhoraho ateganya iminsi y’ab’indakemwa, n’umugabane wabo uzahoraho ubuziraherezo." 
Psalms37:19 Ntibazakorwa n’ikimwaro igihe cy’amage, n’igihe cy’inzara bazarya bahage." 
Psalms37:20 Naho abagiranabi bazarimbuka, abanzi b’Uhoraho bamere nk’ibyatsi byo mu gisambu, bayoyoke nk’umwotsi." 
Psalms37:21 Umugiranabi asaba inguzanyo, ariko ntiyishyure, naho intungane ikagira ibambe, igatanga ku buntu." 
Psalms37:22 Abo Uhoraho yahaye umugisha bazatunga igihugu, naho abo avumye barimbukire gushira." 
Psalms37:23 Uhoraho ni we utuma umuntu ashingura intambwe, maze inzira anyuzemo ikamuhira;" 
Psalms37:24 iyo atsikiye ntatembagara, kuko Uhoraho ari we umufashe ukuboko." 
Psalms37:25 Kuva mu buto bwanjye kugeza na n’ubu nshaje, sinigeze mbona intungane itereranwa, cyangwa urubyaro rwayo rusabiriza ibyo kurya." 
Psalms37:26 Iteka intungane igira ibambe, igatanga inguzanyo, n’urubyaro rwayo rukagira umugisha." 
Psalms37:27 Irinde ikibi, maze ukore icyiza, ni bwo uzagira aho utura ubuziraherezo;" 
Psalms37:28 kuko Uhoraho akunda ibitunganye, kandi ntatererane abayoboke be. Naho abagiranabi bazatsembwa bidasubirwaho, inyoko y’abagiranabi igende buheriheri." 
Psalms37:29 Intungane zo zizatunga igihugu, zigiture ubuziraherezo." 
Psalms37:30 Umunwa w’intungane uhora uvuga iby’ubuhanga, ururimi rwayo rukavuga ibitunganye." 
Psalms37:31 Amategeko y’Imana yayo iyahoza ku mutima, ikagenda itikanga icyayihutaza." 
Psalms37:32 Abagiranabi bahora bagenza intungane, bagashakashaka uko bayica;" 
Psalms37:33 ariko Uhoraho ntayibegurire, ntareke itsindwa mu rubanza." 
Psalms37:34 Iringire Uhoraho kandi ukomeze ukurikire inzira ye, azagushyira ejuru kugeza ubwo utunga igihugu, maze uzibonere ukuntu abagiranabi batsiratsizwa." 
Psalms37:35 Niboneye uko umugiranabi akoresha ubushobozi afite, mbona n’uko atumbagira nk’isederi yo muri Libani," 
Psalms37:36 ariko hanyuma nongeye guhita, nsanga yarazimiye, mushakashatse, sinongera kumubona." 
Psalms37:37 Nyamara irebere umuntu w’umuziranenge, wirebere umuntu w’inyangamugayo: koko umuntu w’amahoro asiga imbuto." 
Psalms37:38 Abigometse bose bazazimirira icyarimwe, n’inyoko y’abagiranabi icike burundu." 
Psalms37:39 Agakiza k’intungane gaturuka kuri Uhoraho, ni we buhungiro bwazo igihe cy’amakuba." 
Psalms37:40 Uhoraho arabafasha, akabarokora, akabakiza abagiranabi, maze akabarengera, kuko ari we bahungiyeho." 
Psalms38:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Yaririmbwe n’ugira ngo Imana imwibuke. 
Psalms38:2 Uhoraho, umpane nta mujinya ubigiranye, unkosore nta mwaga ufite." 
Psalms38:3 Imyambi yawe yampuriyeho, ikiganza cyawe kiranshikamiye." 
Psalms38:4 Kubera uburakari bwawe, umubiri wanjye nta ho ukiri mutaraga, ku mpamvu y’icyaha nakoze, nta gufwa na rimwe rikiri rizima." 
Psalms38:5 Koko rero ibicumuro byanjye birampfukiriye, birandemereye nk’umutwaro w’indashyigurwa." 
Psalms38:6 Ibisebe byanjye biranuka bikaninda amashyira, ibyo kandi bitewe n’ubupfayongo bwanjye." 
Psalms38:7 Dore nahetamye umugongo, nkagenda nandara; umunsi wose mpora nijimye," 
Psalms38:8 kubera ko ibyaziha byanjye bihinda umuriro, none nta rugingo rukiri ruzima mu mubiri wanjye." 
Psalms38:9 Naguye ibinya kandi ndahuhutwa; ndagongera, ngacura imiborogo." 
Psalms38:10 Nyagasani, ibyifuzo byanjye byose ni wowe ubizi, n’amaganya yanjye yose ntuyayobewe." 
Psalms38:11 Umutima wanjye uradihaguza, intege zanshizemo, ndetse n’amaso yanjye nta bwo agihunyeza." 
Psalms38:12 Incuti na bagenzi banjye bahunga ibisebe byanjye, na benewacu bakampa akato." 
Psalms38:13 Abahigira amagara yanjye banteze imitego, abanyifuriza icyago baramvuga amagambo mabi, umunsi wose bakanamanama bangambanira." 
Psalms38:14 Naho jyewe, nta cyo ncyumva, boshye igipfamatwi; meze nk’ikiragi kitabasha kuvuga," 
Psalms38:15 cyangwa se nk’umuntu utumva, kandi utabasha kugira icyo asubiza." 
Psalms38:16 Uhoraho, ni wowe nizeye, Nyagasani Mana yanjye, ni wowe uzamvuganira!" 
Psalms38:17 Naravuze nti «Abashaka kunkwena igihe mputaye, ntibazatsinde ngo bankine ku mubyimba»." 
Psalms38:18 None dore ngiye kubandagara, ububabare bwanjye ntibukimpa agahenge." 
Psalms38:19 Rwose, nemeye igicumuro cyanjye, kandi mpagaritse umutima kubera icyaha nakoze." 
Psalms38:20 Abanyangira ubusa ntibabarika, n’abanzira nta mpamvu ni ishyano ryose." 
Psalms38:21 Ineza mbagiriye bayitura inabi, naharanira gukora neza bakabimpora." 
Psalms38:22 None rero, Uhoraho, ntuntererane na rimwe, Mana yanjye, ntube kure yanjye!" 
Psalms38:23 Gira bwangu untabare, Nyagasani, mukiza wanjye!" 
Psalms39:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi yahimbwe na Yedutuni, ikaba mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms39:2 Naravuze nti «Mu migenzereze yanjye nzirinda gutandukira mu magambo; umunwa wanjye nzakomeza nywufunge, igihe cyose umugomeramana azaba andi imbere.»" 
Psalms39:3 Niyemeje kwigira ikiragi, ngumya guceceka, ndinumira, bishyira kera." 
Psalms39:4 Ariko bigeze aho, numva ububabare burandembeje, umutima wanjye ungurumanamo. Nkomeje kubizirikana numva umuriro uratse, ni bwo neruye ndavuga nti" 
Psalms39:5 «Uhoraho, menyesha amaherezo yanjye, umbwire n’iminsi nshigaje kubaho, bityo menye ukuntu ndi nyamuhitavuba!" 
Psalms39:6 Dore ubugingo bwanjye wabugize bugufiya, maze igihe nzamara kiba ubusabusa mu maso yawe. Buri wese ugihagaze ni umwuka w’akanya gato!" 
Psalms39:7 Umuntu akora hirya no hino nk’igicucu, ibyo arundarunze bikayoyoka; kandi ntanamenye uzabyegukana!»" 
Psalms39:8 None rero, Nyagasani, ni iki ngitegereje? Amizero yanjye ari muri wowe." 
Psalms39:9 Nkiza ibicumuro byanjye byose, undinde ibitutsi by’abasazi." 
Psalms39:10 Ndicecekeye, sinzongera kubumbura umunwa, ubwo ari wowe Mutegetsi" 
Psalms39:11 Ca inkoni izamba, dore ukuboko kwawe kurambandagaje." 
Psalms39:12 Igihe uhana umuntu wacumuye, burya uba umukosora, maze ibyo ararikiye ukabiteza imungu: kuko buri muntu ari nk’umwuka w’akanya gato!" 
Psalms39:13 Uhoraho, umva isengesho ryanjye n’imiborogo yanjye; amarira yanjye wiyima amatwi, ngo uyirengagize, kuko mu byawe ndi umucumbitsi, umugenzi wihitira nk’abakurambere banjye bose." 
Psalms39:14 Erekeza hirya amaso yawe, maze nibura mbe mpumekaho bukeya, mbere y’uko nigendera, nkareka kubaho." 
Psalms40:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms40:2 Niringiye Uhoraho, mwiringira ntatezuka; nuko anyitaho maze yumva amaganya yanjye." 
Psalms40:3 Ankura mu rwobo rukanganye, ansayura mu nzarwe ndende; arampagurutsa, ampagarika ku rutare, ampa gushinga ibirindiro." 
Psalms40:4 Yampaye guhanika indirimbo nshya, ndirimbira Imana yacu ibisingizo biyikwiye. Benshi bazabibona bayigirire igitinyiro, maze bakurizeho kwiringira Uhoraho." 
Psalms40:5 Hahirwa umuntu wiringira Uhoraho, ntashyire hamwe n’abagomeramana, cyangwa ngo ajye mu ishyaka ry’abanyabinyoma!" 
Psalms40:6 Uhoraho Mana yacu, wadukoreye ibintu byinshi cyane: udutegurira imigambi, utugaragariza n’ibitangaza, rwose, nta we twakunganya! Ni byinshi cyane, nta wabona uko abivuga." 
Psalms40:7 Ntiwifuje ibitambo cyangwa amaturo, ahubwo wanzibuye amatwi ngo numve; ntiwigombye igitambo gitwikwa cyangwa icy’impongano," 
Psalms40:8 ni yo mpamvu navuze nti «Ngaha ndaje! Mu muzingo w’igitabo handitswemo icyo unshakaho. 
Psalms40:9 Mana yanjye, niyemeje gukora ibigushimisha, maze amategeko yawe ajye ampora ku mutima!»" 
Psalms40:10 Namamaje ubutungane bwawe mu ikoraniro rigari; ibyo usanzwe ubizi, Uhoraho, sinigeze mbumba umunwa ngo nceceke." 
Psalms40:11 Ubutungane bwawe sinabuhishe mu mutima wanjye, namamaje ubudahemuka bwawe n’umukiro uguturukaho, sinahishahisha ineza n’ukuri byawe imbere y’ikoraniro rigari." 
Psalms40:12 Nawe rero, Uhoraho, ntunyime imbabazi zawe, ineza n’ukuri byawe bizandagire ubudahwema!" 
Psalms40:13 Amakuba atagira ingano aranyugarije, ibicumuro byanjye birampinduka, bikantera guhuma amaso; birusha ubwinshi umusatsi undi ku mutwe, bigatuma umutima wanjye ucika urukendero." 
Psalms40:14 Uhoraho, gira impuhwe maze umbohore! Uhoraho, banguka untabare!" 
Psalms40:15 Abashaka kumvutsa ubugingo bose nibakorwe n’ikimwaro, bamanjirwe! Abanyifuriza icyago bose nibasubire inyuma bafite ipfunwe!" 
Psalms40:16 Abanyigambaho bavuga ngo «Si we wabona!» nibahahamuke, bagende bishwe n’ikimwaro." 
Psalms40:17 Naho abagushakashaka bose nibahimbarwe bakwishimira! Abakunda umukiro wawe nibavuge ubudahwema, bati «Uhoraho ni igihangange!»" 
Psalms40:18 Jyeweho, ndi umukene n’indushyi, ariko Uhoraho aranzirikana. Koko, ni wowe muvunyi n’umukiza wanjye; Mana yanjye, ntutinde kungoboka!" 
Psalms41:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms41:2 Hahirwa uwita ku mukene no ku munyantege nke: ku munsi w’amakuba, Uhoraho azamukiza!" 
Psalms41:3 Uhoraho azamukomeza, amuhe guhirwa ku isi. Kandi ntazamugabiza abanzi be bamuhigira!" 
Psalms41:4 Uhoraho amuterera inkunga aho arwariye, akamuhindurira kenshi uburyamo arambarayeho" 
Psalms41:5 Naratakambye nti «Uhoraho, ngirira ibambe, maze unkize, kuko nagucumuyeho!»" 
Psalms41:6 Naho abanzi banjye bo bakamvuga nabi, ngo «Mbese azapfa ryari? Izina rye rizazima ryari?»" 
Psalms41:7 Iyo hagize uje kundeba, usanga avuga amateshwa, umutima we ukaba wuzuyemo ibitekerezo by’ubugome; maze yasohoka, akagenda abyandagaza mu nzira." 
Psalms41:8 Iyo bateraniye iwanjye, abanyanga bose banshimanira inzara; aho bari mu rugo rwanjye, icyabo ni ukureba aho icyago kingejeje," 
Psalms41:9 bati «Ibyamubayeho ni akaga rwose, ubwo yaryamye nta bwo agiteze kweguka!»" 
Psalms41:10 Ndetse n’incuti yanjye y’amagara nizeraga, tukanasangira ibiryo byanjye, na yo yanyigaritse!" 
Psalms41:11 Ariko wowe, Uhoraho, ungirire ibambe, umpagurutse, maze mbone uko mbiganzura!" 
Psalms41:12 Rwose nzamenya ko unkunda, ari uko mbonye umwanzi wanjye atongeye kunyigambaho." 
Psalms41:13 Kubera ubudakemwa bwanjye wakomeje kunshyigikira, maze ungarura iruhande rwawe ubuziraherezo." 
Psalms41:14 Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, kuva iteka kuzageza iteka ryose! Amen! Amen!" 
Psalms42:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni umuvugo w’abahungu ba Kore. 
Psalms42:2 Uko impara yahagira ishaka amazi afutse, ni ko umutima wanjye ugufitiye inyota, Mana yanjye." 
Psalms42:3 Umutima wanjye ufite inyota y’Imana, Imana Nyir’ubuzima; mbese nzajya ryari kureba uruhanga rw’Imana?" 
Psalms42:4 Nsigaye ntunzwe no kurira umunsi n’ijoro, ari na ko bambwira ngo «Imana yawe iba hehe?»" 
Psalms42:5 Ndabyibuka, bigatuma nsuhuza umutima, uko najyaniranaga n’inteko z’abantu, nyoboye umutambagiro ugana Ingoro y’Imana, mu rwamu rw’impundu n’ibisingizo, by’imbaga yakereye ibirori." 
Psalms42:6 Mbe mutima wanjye, ni iki kiguciye intege, kandi ukangiriramo amaganya? Izere Imana, kuko nzongera kuyisingiza, yo mukiza wanjye n’Imana yanjye!" 
Psalms42:7 Umutima wanjye waguye agacuho, Mana yanjye; ni cyo gituma nzirikana ka gasozi gato, kari hagati y’imisozi ya Yorudani n’ibitwa bya Herimoni." 
Psalms42:8 Imivumba y’amazi magari, ngiyo irasukiranya, ikurikiwe n’urusaku rw’insumo ziruruma; maze imivu n’imihengeri bikantemba hejuru." 
Psalms42:9 Ku manywa, Uhoraho agaba ineza ye, nijoro sintuze kumuririmba, bityo ngasenga Imana nkesha ubuzima." 
Psalms42:10 Ndashaka kubwira Imana, yo rutare rwanjye, nti «Kuki wanyibagiwe? Kuki nagomba kugenda nijimye, umwanzi ansumbirije?»" 
Psalms42:11 Dore ingingo zanjye zatagaranye, abanzi barantuka buri gihe, bambaza ubudatuza ngo «Imana yawe iba hehe?»" 
Psalms42:12 Mbe mutima wanjye, ni iki kiguciye intege, kandi ukangiriramo amaganya? Izere Imana, kuko nzongera kuyisingiza, yo mukiza wanjye n’Imana yanjye." 
Psalms43:1 Mana yanjye, ndenganura, unkiranure n’inyoko y’abagomeramana; maze unkize abahendanyi n’abagome." 
Psalms43:2 Mana yanjye, ko ari wowe mfiteho ubuhungiro, kuki usa n’uwanyihakanye? Kuki nagomba kugenda nijimye, umwanzi ansumbirije?" 
Psalms43:3 Ohereza urumuri rwawe n’ukuri kwawe, bijye binyobora inzira, maze bizangeze ku musozi wawe mutagatifu, aho Ingoro yawe yubatse." 
Psalms43:4 Ubwo nzegera urutambiro rw’Imana, nsange Imana nkesha umunezero wose; maze, Uhoraho Mana yanjye, ngusingize, ngucurangira inanga." 
Psalms43:5 Mbe mutima wanjye, ni iki kiguciye intege, kandi ukangiriramo amaganya? Izere Imana, kuko nzagumya kuyisingiza, yo mukiza wanjye n’Imana yanjye." 
Psalms44:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni umuvugo w’abahungu ba Kore. 
Psalms44:2 Mana yacu, twarabyiyumviye n’amatwi yacu, ba sogokuru barabitubwiye, badutekerereza ibyo wakoze kera mu gihe cyabo." 
Psalms44:3 Wakoresheje ukuboko kwawe, unyaga amahanga, ugira ngo ubabonere aho batura, kandi uburabuza ibihugu, ugira ngo ubabonere aho bisanzurira." 
Psalms44:4 Inkota zabo si zo bakesheje kwigarurira igihugu, imbaraga zabo si zo zabahaye gutsinda; ahubwo ni indyo yawe bwite, ukuboko kwawe, n’urumuri rw’uruhanga rwawe, kuko wabikundiye." 
Psalms44:5 Mana yanjye n’umwami wanjye, ni wowe watumaga bene Yakobo batsinda." 
Psalms44:6 Ku bwawe, twashoboye gutikura ababisha bacu, ku bw’izina ryawe turibata abaduteraga." 
Psalms44:7 Umuheto wanjye si wo niringiraga, inkota yanjye si yo yampaga gutsinda," 
Psalms44:8 ahubwo ni wowe wadukijije ababisha bacu, maze abatwanga ubakoza isoni." 
Psalms44:9 Nuko iminsi yose tukaririmba ibisingizo by’Imana, tugashimira izina ryawe ubudahwema." 
Psalms44:10 None ubu waradutaye, bituma dusuzugurika; ntugitabarana n’ingabo zacu." 
Psalms44:11 Utuma duhunga abaturwanya, maze ababisha bakadutwara iminyago uko bashaka." 
Psalms44:12 Usigaye udutanga nk’intama zigenewe kubagwa, maze ukadutatanyiriza mu mahanga." 
Psalms44:13 Umuryango wawe uwutanga ku giciro kigayitse, ntugire inyungu ubona muri ubwo buguzi." 
Psalms44:14 Utugabiza ibitutsi by’abaturanyi bacu, abo tubana bakadukwena, bakaduhindura urw’amenyo." 
Psalms44:15 Watugize iciro ry’imigani mu mahanga, mu bihugu byose bakatuzunguriza umutwe." 
Psalms44:16 Umunsi wose mbona uko nataye agaciro, maze ikimwaro kikansaba mu maso," 
Psalms44:17 ku mpamvu y’urusaku rw’abanyigambaho, ari na ko batuka Imana; nuko nkabura aho nkwirwa imbere y’umwanzi unyihimura." 
Psalms44:18 Ibyo byose byatubayeho kandi tutari twakwibagiwe, ngo duce ku masezerano twagiranye nawe;" 
Psalms44:19 umutima wacu ntiwari waciye ukubiri na yo, n’intambwe zacu ntizari zateshutse inzira yawe," 
Psalms44:20 ngo bibe byatuma uducocagurira mu gihugu cy’imbwebwe, maze ukatworosa igicucu cy’urupfu." 
Psalms44:21 Mbese iyo tuba twaribagiwe izina ry’Imana yacu, tugategera ibiganza imana z’inyamahanga," 
Psalms44:22 Imana ntiba yarabibonye, yo imenya amabanga ari mu mutima wa buri muntu?" 
Psalms44:23 Nyamara baratwica ubudahwema ari wowe batuziza, bakatugenzereza nk’intama zigenewe ibagiro!" 
Psalms44:24 Kanguka, Nyagasani, kuki wisinziriye? Baduka, woye kudutererana burundu!" 
Psalms44:25 Ni kuki ugumya guhisha uruhanga rwawe, maze ukirengagiza akaga n’ubwagirizwe turimo?" 
Psalms44:26 Koko amagara yacu aragaragurika mu mukungugu, inda yacu yumanye n’ubutaka." 
Psalms44:27 Haguruka, uze udutabare! Girira impuhwe zawe, utugobotore!" 
Psalms45:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikaririmbwa bakurikije injyana y’iyitwa «Ihogoza». Ni umuvugo w’abahungu ba Kore, ikaba indirimbo y’urukundo." 
Psalms45:2 Umutima wanjye uratemba amagambo ateye ubwuzu, reka mvuge ibisigo nahimbiye umwami; ururimi rwanjye rurabe nk’ikaramu y’umwanditsi w’umuhanga!" 
Psalms45:3 Uri mwiza kurusha bene muntu bose, igikundiro cyisesuye ku minwa yawe; ni cyo gituma Imana yaguhaye umugisha uzahoraho." 
Psalms45:4 Ambara inkota yawe ku itako, wa ntwari we, maze ugendane ishema n’ubukaka!" 
Psalms45:5 Wurire ifarasi yawe, maze uganze, urwanira ukuri, ubugwaneza n’ubutabera!" 
Psalms45:6 Indyo yawe izaca ibintu, imyambi yawe iratyaye, ingabo ziguteye uzazihindura imirara; bityo abanzi b’umwami ubahuranye umutima." 
Psalms45:7 Intebe yawe y’ubwami iragahoraho iteka, mbese nk’iy’Imana ubwayo, n’inkoni yawe ya cyami irabe iy’ubutabera!" 
Psalms45:8 Ukunda ubutungane, ukanga ubugiranabi; ni cyo cyatumye Imana, ari yo Mana yawe, yaragusize amavuta y’ubutore kandi y’ibyishimo, maze iguhitamo muri bagenzi bawe." 
Psalms45:9 Imyambaro yawe irahumura imibavu ya manemane, ishangi, n’ububani; ukanacurangirwa inanga nziza mu ngoro itatse amahembe y’inzovu." 
Psalms45:10 Abakobwa b’abami babarirwa mu nkoramutima zawe, n’umwamikazi aguhagaze iburyo, yambaye imyenda itatse zahabu y’i Ofiri." 
Psalms45:11 Umva mukobwa, itegereze maze utege amatwi: ibagirwa igihugu cyawe n’umuryango uvukamo," 
Psalms45:12 maze umwami abenguke uburanga bwawe! Ni we mutegetsi wawe: emera upfukame imbere ye! 
Psalms45:13 Nuko rero, mwari w’i Tiri, abakungu bo muri rubanda bazakugana bitwaje amaturo ngo bagushakeho ubutoni." 
Psalms45:14 Umukobwa w’umwami, nguyu atungutse arabagirana, yarimbanye umwambaro utatse zahabu!" 
Psalms45:15 Bamuhingutsa imbere y’umwami bamutatse, ahagerana n’abakobwa, bagenzi be bamuherekeje;" 
Psalms45:16 Babinjiza mu ngoro y’ibwami, batambagirana ibyishimo n’ubwuzu." 
Psalms45:17 Abahungu bawe ni bo bazasimbura ba sogokuruza, uzabagire ibikomangoma ku isi yose!" 
Psalms45:18 Maze nzarate izina ryawe mu mbyaro zose, n’imiryango izagusingize ubuziraherezo." 
Psalms46:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni indirimbo y’abahungu ba Kore, ikaririmbwa banihiriza ijwi." 
Psalms46:2 Imana ni yo buhungiro n’imbaraga zacu, ni yo muvunyi utigera abura mu gihe cy’amage." 
Psalms46:3 Ni cyo gituma tutagira ubwoba, n’aho isi yabirinduka, cyangwa imisozi igatengukira mu ngeri y’inyanja," 
Psalms46:4 n’amazi agahorera abira urufuro nk’amasumo, yakwitera hejuru imisozi igahungabana." 
Psalms46:5 Ariko hari uruzi rwagabye amashami, agahimbaza umurwa w’Imana, n’Ingoro y’Umusumbabyose irusha izindi ubutagatifu." 
Psalms46:6 Imana iba muri wo rwagati, ntuteze guhungabana; Imana iwutabara kuva bugicya." 
Psalms46:7 Amahanga yaritotombye, ingoma zirahungabana; maze Uhoraho aranguruye ijwi, isi irashonga!" 
Psalms46:8 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ari kumwe natwe; Imana ya Yakobo itubereye ubuhungiro bucinyiye!" 
Psalms46:9 Nimuze mwirebere ibyo Uhoraho yakoze, we wakwije amatongo ku isi!" 
Psalms46:10 Ahagarika intambara kugeza ku mpera z’isi, akonyagura imiheto n’amacumu by’abarwanyi, amagare y’intambara ayaha inkongi, agira ati" 
Psalms46:11 «Nimurekere aho kurwana, mwemere ko ndi Imana, nkaganza amahanga, nkaganza isi yose!»" 
Psalms46:12 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ari kumwe natwe, Imana ya Yakobo itubereye ubuhungiro bucinyiye!" 
Psalms47:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi y’abahungu ba Kore. 
Psalms47:2 Miryango mwese, nimukome yombi, musingize Imana mu rwamu rw’ibyishimo," 
Psalms47:3 kuko Uhoraho, Umusumbabyose, ari Ruterabwoba, akaba Umwami w’igihangange ku isi yose." 
Psalms47:4 Atuyoborera imiryango, tukayihaka; amahanga akayashyira mu nsi y’ibirenge byacu." 
Psalms47:5 Adutoranyiriza umugabane udukwiye, ukaba ishema rya Yakobo, inkoramutima ye." 
Psalms47:6 Imana izamutse bayiha impundu, Uhoraho azamutse avugirwa n’impanda." 
Psalms47:7 Nimucurangire Uhoraho, nimucurange! Nimucurangire Umwami wacu, nimucurange!" 
Psalms47:8 Kuko Imana ari yo mwami w’isi yose; nimucurange mwimazeyo, mubyamamaze." 
Psalms47:9 Uhoraho ni Umwami ugenga amahanga, Imana itetse ku ntebe yayo yuje ubutungane." 
Psalms47:10 Abatware b’ibihugu bakoranye, bishyira hamwe n’umuryango w’Imana ya Abrahamu, kuko Imana ari yo Nyir’ingabo zose zibaho ku isi, ikaba yatumbagiye hejuru ya byose." 
Psalms48:1 Ni indirimbo iri muri zaburi z’abahungu ba Kore. 
Psalms48:2 Uhoraho ni igihangange akwiriye gusingirizwa bihebuje mu murwa w’Imana yacu. 
Psalms48:3 Umusozi we mutagatifu urajimije mu bwiza, ukanezeza isi yose! Umusozi wa Siyoni uri hariya mu majyaruguru, ni wo wubatseho umurwa w’umwami w’igihangange;" 
Psalms48:4 Imana ituye hagati mu ngoro zaho, ikaherekanira ko ari yo buhungiro butavogerwa." 
Psalms48:5 Dore abami bari bawibasiye, bashyira nzira icyarimwe;" 
Psalms48:6 ngo bawurabukwe, bose bagwa mu kayubi, ubwoba burabataha, maze amaguru bayabangira ingata!" 
Psalms48:7 Umushyitsi ubafatira aho ngaho, baratengurwa nk’umugore wafashwe n’ibise." 
Psalms48:8 Ubwo bari batewe n’umuyaga w’iburasirazuba, wa wundi umenagura amato manini y’i Tarishishi." 
Psalms48:9 Uko twabyumvise, ni ko twabyiboneye, mu murwa w’Imana yacu, mu murwa w’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, wa wundi Imana ishyigikiye ubuziraherezo." 
Psalms48:10 Mana yacu, duhora tuzirikana ineza yawe, duteraniye mu Ngoro yawe nyirizina." 
Psalms48:11 Ak’izina ryawe, Mana yacu, n’ibisingizo byawe byarasakaye kugera ku mpera z’isi. Ukuboko kwawe guharanira ubutabera," 
Psalms48:12 umusozi wa Siyoni uranezerewe, n’imigi ya Yuda yose irasabagizwa n’ibyishimo, yishimiye uburyo uca imanza." 
Psalms48:13 Nimuzenguruke inkuta zikikije Siyoni, mubare iminara ihari;" 
Psalms48:14 mwitegereze inkike zayo, mubarure ingoro zubatsemo, maze muzabwire abo mu gisekuru gitaha" 
Psalms48:15 ko iyi Mana ari yo Mana yacu iteka ryose, akaba ari na yo ituyobora!" 
Psalms49:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi y’abahungu ba Kore. 
Psalms49:2 Nimwumve ibyo ngiye kuvuga, miryango mwese, nimutege amatwi, mwumve neza, abatuye isi mwese," 
Psalms49:3 rubanda rugufi namwe abakomeye, abakire namwe abakene, mbese mwese uko mungana!" 
Psalms49:4 Umunwa wanjye ugiye kuvuga amagambo y’ubuhanga, n’umutima wanjye uzirikane ibiboneye." 
Psalms49:5 Amatwi yanjye ahugukiye kumva umugani, igiteye inkeke ngisobanuze umurya w’inanga." 
Psalms49:6 Ni kuki nagira ubwoba mu minsi mibi, ngatinya ubugome bw’inyaryenge zinkikije," 
Psalms49:7 cyangwa abantu biringira ubukungu bwabo, maze bakiratana ko batunze byinshi?" 
Psalms49:8 Nta muntu n’umwe wabitanga ngo bimucungure, cyangwa ngo abihe Imana bimubere ingwate." 
Psalms49:9 N’uwatanga ibingana bite ngo agure ubuzima, namenye ko amaherezo buzazima burundu." 
Psalms49:10 None se hari uwabaho ubuziraherezo, akaguma aho adateze kujya mu mva?" 
Psalms49:11 Mbese ntimuhora mubona uko urupfu rutwara abanyabwenge, kimwe n’uko ruhitana umusazi n’umupfayongo, maze ibintu bari bafite bikaribwa n’abandi?" 
Psalms49:12 Mu mva ni ho bazatura imyaka n’imyaka, maze abe ari ho baguma ubuziraherezo, kabone n’ubwo biyitiriye imisozi yabo." 
Psalms49:13 Koko umuntu woga mu bukire ntamara kabiri; amera nk’itungo ryanogotse. 
Psalms49:14 Ngayo amaherezo y’abiyemera, n’ay’abanyurwa n’ibyo bivugaho." 
Psalms49:15 Babyagiye ikuzimu nk’intama mu gikumba; Nyirarupfu akaba ari we ubashorera abajyana mu rwuri, maze bwacya, abantu b’intungane bakabagenda hejuru; isura bahoranye ikayokera ikuzimu, bazabe ari ho batura iteka." 
Psalms49:16 Naho jyewe, Imana yiyemeje kundokora, no kungobotora ku ngoyi z’ikuzimu!" 
Psalms49:17 Ntibikagukange rero nubona umuntu abaye umukire, n’ubwamamare bwe bukagenda bwiyongera;" 
Psalms49:18 kuko umunsi yapfuye, nta na kimwe azajyana ikuzimu, n’icyubahiro yari afite ntazakimanukana iyo ngiyo." 
Psalms49:19 Akiriho yajyaga yirya icyara, akishimagiza, ati «Dore barakurata, kuko byose byaguhiriye!»" 
Psalms49:20 Nyamara ntazabura kujya aho abakurambere be bagiye, bo batazongera kubona izuba ukundi!" 
Psalms49:21 Koko umuntu woga mu bukire ntamara kabiri, amera nk’itungo ryanogotse!" 
Psalms50:1 Ni zaburi ya Asafu Imana nya mana, ari yo Uhoraho, ivuze ijambo rikoranya isi yose, guhera mu burasirazuba kugeza mu burengero bwaryo." 
Psalms50:2 Imana irabagiraniye kuri Siyoni, yo, bwiza buzira inenge." 
Psalms50:3 Imana iraje, maze ivuge yeruye! Dore imbere yayo haragurumana umuriro, n’impande zayo hagahuha umuyaga w’inkubi." 
Psalms50:4 Itumije ijuru, kimwe n’isi iri hasi, ngo bihugukire urubanza ifitanye n’umuryango wayo." 
Psalms50:5 Iti «Nimunkoranyirize abayoboke banjye, ba bandi twagiranye igihango kigasozwa n’igitambo!»" 
Psalms50:6 Nuko ijuru ryamamaza ubutabera bwayo, rigira riti «Ni koko, Imana ni yo mucamanza!»" 
Psalms50:7 Na yo iti «Tega amatwi, muryango wanjye, ngiye kuvuga; Israheli we, hari icyo ngiye kugushinja, jyewe Imana, nkaba n’Imana yawe!" 
Psalms50:8 Ibitambo untura, si byo nguhora, kuko ibitambo byawe bitwikwa bimpora imbere." 
Psalms50:9 Sinkeneye gufata ikimasa mu rugo rwawe, cyangwa se amasekurume mu rubumbiro rwawe." 
Psalms50:10 Kuko inyamaswa zose zo mu ishyamba ari izanjye, kimwe n’amatungo atabarika yose arisha ku gasozi;" 
Psalms50:11 nzi inyoni zose zo mu kirere, n’ibisimba byose ni ibyanjye." 
Psalms50:12 Ndamutse ngize inzara, sinaza kubikuganyira, kuko isi n’ibiyirimo byose ari ibyanjye." 
Psalms50:13 Ese koko nkeneye kurya inyama z’ibimasa, cyangwa kunywa amaraso y’amasekurume?" 
Psalms50:14 Ahubwo jya utura Imana igitambo cyo kuyishimira, kandi wuzuze amasezerano wagiriye Umusumbabyose;" 
Psalms50:15 hanyuma uzabone ubunyiyambaza igihe cy’amagorwa, ubwo rero nzagutabara, maze nawe unsingize.»" 
Psalms50:16 Naho umugiranabi, Imana iramubwira iti «Kuki ushyanukira gutondagura amategeko yanjye, no guhoza ku rurimi isezerano ryanjye," 
Psalms50:17 nyamara ntukunde gukosorwa, maze amagambo yanjye ukayata hirya?" 
Psalms50:18 Iyo ubonye umujura, umubera icyitso, mu busambanyi ugahabwa icyicaro." 
Psalms50:19 Umunwa wawe uwurundurira amagambo y’ubugome, ururimi rwawe rugahimbazwa no kuvuga ibinyoma." 
Psalms50:20 Uricara, ukavuga nabi umuvandimwe wawe, bityo ukandagaza mwene nyoko." 
Psalms50:21 Ibyo ni byo ukora, none ukabona ko naceceka? Wibwira se ko meze nkawe? Dore ndagushinja, byose mbisheshe imbere yawe." 
Psalms50:22 Murumvireho namwe, abiha kwirengagiza Imana, ejo ntazabashwanyaguza, ntimubone ubatabara." 
Psalms50:23 Untura ibisingizo ho igitambo, ni we umpa ikuzo, kandi aba aciye inzira nzamwerekeramo umukiro w’Imana.»" 
Psalms51:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms51:2 Yerekeranye n’ibyabaye igihe umuhanuzi Natani amusanze iwe, Dawudi amaze gusambanya Betsabe." 
Psalms51:3 Mana yanjye, ngirira imbabazi ukurikije ineza yawe; kubera impuhwe zawe nyinshi, umpanagureho ibyaha byanjye." 
Psalms51:4 Nyuhagiraho wese ibicumuro byanjye, maze unkize icyaha nakoze." 
Psalms51:5 Koko nemeye ibicumuro byanjye, icyaha cyanjye kimpora imbere." 
Psalms51:6 Uwo nacumuyeho ni wowe wenyine, maze ikibi wanga, mba ari cyo nkora! None rero, nubintonganyiriza ntuzaba undenganya, n’urubanza uzancira ntirugira amakemwa." 
Psalms51:7 Dore jyeweho navutse ndi umunyabyaha, kandi mama yansamanye igicumuro." 
Psalms51:8 Naho wowe ukunda umuntu utaryarya, maze ubushishozi ukabunyigishiriza mu mutima wanjye." 
Psalms51:9 Ntera icyuhagiro, nkire ubwandu bwose, unyuhagire, maze nererane kurusha amasimbi." 
Psalms51:10 Ongera unyumvishe impundu z’ibyishimo n’umunezero, maze amagufwa wajanjaguye ahimbarwe." 
Psalms51:11 Renza amaso ibyaha nakoze, ibicumuro byanjye byose ubimpanagureho." 
Psalms51:12 Mana yanjye, ndemamo umutima usukuye, maze umvugururemo ibitekerezo biboneye." 
Psalms51:13 Ntunyirukane ngo unte kure yawe, cyangwa ngo unkuremo umwuka wawe uzira inenge;" 
Psalms51:14 ahubwo mpa kwishimira ko nakijijwe, kandi unkomezemo umutima wuje ineza." 
Psalms51:15 Abagome nzabatoza inzira yawe, n’abanyabyaha bakugarukire." 
Psalms51:16 Mana yanjye, Mana ikiza, nkura mu nzigo ndimo, maze ururimi rwanjye ruzamamaze ubutungane bwawe." 
Psalms51:17 Nyagasani, bumbura umunwa wanjye, maze akanwa kanjye gatangaze ibisingizo byawe." 
Psalms51:18 Igitambo cyanjye si cyo ushaka, n’aho nagutura igitwikwa, nticyakunezeza." 
Psalms51:19 Ahubwo igitambo Imana ishima, ni umutima washengutse. Mana yanjye, ntuzirengagize umutima washegeshwe kandi wihana!" 
Psalms51:20 Ku mpuhwe zawe, girira neza Siyoni, maze wubake bundi bushya inkike za Yeruzalemu." 
Psalms51:21 Ni bwo rero uzashima ibitambo byategetswe, ibitwikwa hamwe n’ibiturwa burundu, maze bazaturire ibimasa ku rutambiro rwawe." 
Psalms52:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni inyigisho mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms52:2 Yerekeye iby’igihe Dowegi, Umunyedomu, aje kumenyesha Sawuli ko Dawudi yahungiye mu rugo rwa Ahimeleki." 
Psalms52:3 Kuki wiratana kuba umugizi wa nabi, wa ngirwamugabo we, kandi Imana yo ihorana ineza?" 
Psalms52:4 Ururimi rwawe rwuzuye ubugome, rwica nabi nk’urwembe rutyaye, rukagira amayeri menshi yo kubeshya." 
Psalms52:5 Wikundira ikibi kurusha icyiza, ugakunda ikinyoma aho kuvuga ukuri." 
Psalms52:6 Uri karimi kabi, nta kindi wikundira atari amagambo asebanya gusa!" 
Psalms52:7 Imana ubwayo izagukuraho buheriheri, izagushikanura, iguhubure mu nzu yawe, maze izakurandure ku isi y’abazima." 
Psalms52:8 Nuko ab’intungane nibabibona, bashye ubwoba, hanyuma baguhe urw’amenyo, bavuga" 
Psalms52:9 bati «Dore wa muntu wiyise intwari, akanga ko Imana imubera ubuhungiro butavogerwa, ahubwo akiringira ubukungu bwinshi yari afite, akiratana ibikorwa by’ubugome bwe!»" 
Psalms52:10 Naho jyewe, ak’umuzeti watohagiriye mu Ngoro y’Imana, mpora nizigiye ubuntu bwayo!" 
Psalms52:11 Iteka ryose nzahora ngushimira ibyo wakoze! Niringiye izina ryawe, kuko ryuje ineza, nzaryamamariza imbere y’abayoboke bawe." 
Psalms53:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikaririmbwa mu majwi y’urusobe. Ni inyigisho mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms53:2 Abapfayongo baribwira ngo «Nta Mana ibaho!» Bapfuye umutima, biha gukora ibidakwiye, nta n’umwe ugikora neza." 
Psalms53:3 Imana, aho iri mu ijuru, yarunamye yerekeza amaso kuri bene muntu, ngo irebe niba hari n’umwe ugifite ubwenge agashakashaka Imana." 
Psalms53:4 Ariko bose bararindagiye, bahujwe gusa n’ingeso mbi; nta n’umwe ugikora neza, habe n’umwe rwose!" 
Psalms53:5 Koko abo bagizi ba nabi ni ibiburabwenge, bo bihaye kurya imitsi y’umuryango wanjye, barya icyari kiwutunze, kandi ntibarushye basenga Imana!" 
Psalms53:6 Bazamarwa n’ubwoba kandi nta kibubateye! Imana yanyanyagije amagufwa y’abari bakugarije; none dore urabakora ku itama, kuko Imana yabagutsindiye." 
Psalms53:7 Ni nde uturuka i Siyoni agaha Israheli imitsindo? Iyo Imana igaruye abajyanywe bunyago bo mu muryango wayo, bene Yakobo basagwa n’ibyishimo, bene Israheli bakanezerwa bitavugwa!" 
Psalms54:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikajyana n’inanga z’imirya. Ni inyigisho mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms54:2 Yerekeye iby’igihe abaturage b’i Zifu baje kubwira Sawuli, bati «Dawudi se, ntiyihishe iwacu?»" 
Psalms54:3 Mana yanjye, girira izina ryawe maze untabare; koresha ububasha bwawe, maze undenganure!" 
Psalms54:4 Rwose, Mana yanjye, umva isengesho ryanjye, utege amatwi amagambo nkubwira!" 
Psalms54:5 Kuko abanyamahanga bampagurukiye, abanyarugomo bakaba bahigiye kunyica: Imana ntibayitayeho na busa." 
Psalms54:6 None Imana ni yo intabaye, Nyagasani ni we wenyine umbereye ikiramiro!" 
Psalms54:7 Abariho bangenza, nabiture inabi bangirira; koresha ububasha bwawe, maze ubatsembe!" 
Psalms54:8 Nzagutura ibitambo mbikuye ku mutima; Uhoraho, nzasingiza izina ryawe, kuko ryuje ineza!" 
Psalms54:9 Koko, wankuye ahaga, utuma ndebana ihinyu abanzi banjye!" 
Psalms55:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, igaherekezwa n’inanga z’imirya. Ni inyigisho mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms55:2 Mana yanjye, umva isengesho ryanjye, ntiwirengagize ugutakamba kwanjye." 
Psalms55:3 Wite ku byo nkubwira, maze unsubize! Dore nazindaye, ndaganya nteshaguzwa," 
Psalms55:4 kubera induru umwanzi amvuzaho, n’inkeke nshyizweho n’umugiranabi. Koko rero bampurijeho ubugome bwabo, bantera buje umujinya." 
Psalms55:5 Umutima wanjye urasabayangwa mu gituza cyanjye, ubukangarane simusiga bwambundikiye," 
Psalms55:6 ubwoba n’umushyitsi byantashye, none ubu ndatengurwa wese." 
Psalms55:7 Nuko ndavuga nti «Iyaba nari mfite amababa nk’ay’inuma, kugira ngo nigurukire, nshake aho mpungira." 
Psalms55:8 Koko nahungira kure, ijoro nkarirara mu butayu;" 
Psalms55:9 nagira bwangu, nkahasanga ubuhungiro bundinda umuyaga w’inkubi!»" 
Psalms55:10 Nyagasani, sobanya amagambo yabo, boye guhuza imvugo; kuko nduzi urugomo n’intonganya byabaye urudaca mu mugi," 
Psalms55:11 bigakomeza kwiyongera ku nkike zawo umunsi n’ijoro! Muri wo nyirizina hahora ubugome n’ubwicanyi," 
Psalms55:12 mu mugi rwagati hagakorerwa amahano, urugomo n’ubuhendanyi ntibitirimuke mu mihanda yawo." 
Psalms55:13 Yabaye ari umwanzi untuka, we namwihanganira; yabaye ari umubisha unteye akantsinda, we namwibeta, nkamucika." 
Psalms55:14 None ni wowe tureshya, wowe dusanganywe, ukaba n’incuti yanjye y’amagara!" 
Psalms55:15 Ni wowe twabwiranaga amabanga, tukajyana mu Ngoro y’Imana dushyize hamwe!" 
Psalms55:16 Baragashira barimbuke, barindimukire ikuzimu ari bazima, kuko ubugome bwagandiye iwabo, bukabarika mu mutima." 
Psalms55:17 Jyeweho, icyanjye ni ugutabaza Imana, kandi koko Uhoraho azandokora." 
Psalms55:18 Haba nimugoroba, haba mu gitondo cyangwa se ku gicamunsi, iyo nagirijwe n’ibyago ndaganya, ngataka, maze akumva ijwi ryanjye," 
Psalms55:19 akangoboka, akandinda kugira icyo mba, igihe hariho abandwanya, n’ubwo baba benshi kangahe!" 
Psalms55:20 Imana nibyumve, maze ibacishe bugufi, yo itetse ijabiro kuva kera kose! Bo ntibateze kwisubiraho, kuko badatinya Imana." 
Psalms55:21 Uwo muntu yabanguye ukuboko kwe, agirira nabi incuti ze, maze atatira igihango." 
Psalms55:22 Mu kanwa ke hasokoka amagambo aryohereye, ariko umutima we ugahora ushoza intambara; amagambo ye aza arusha amavuta koroha, ariko ntibiyabuze kuba inkota zityaye." 
Psalms55:23 Tura umuzigo wawe, uwukorere Uhoraho, na we azagutera inkunga; ntazemera ko intungane ihungabana na rimwe." 
Psalms55:24 Naho wowe, Mana, uzabaroha mu rwobo rwasamye; abantu b’abicanyi n’ababeshyi ntibazigera barama, ngo bacagase nibura iminsi y’ukubaho kwabo. Jyeweho, ni wowe niringiye." 
Psalms56:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikaririmbwa nk’iyitwa «Inuma iri kure cyane». Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Iririmbwa banihiriza ijwi. Yayihimbye igihe Abafilisiti bamufatiye i Gati." 
Psalms56:2 Mana yanjye, ngirira ibambe! Abanzi banjye barankurikiranye; umunsi wose bahora bandwanya, bakanyotsa igitutu." 
Psalms56:3 Umunsi wose ingenza zinyomaho, abandwanya ntibagira umubare, barandusha imbaraga." 
Psalms56:4 Igihe mfite ubwoba, ni wowe niringira." 
Psalms56:5 Niringira Imana, ari na ko ndata ijambo ryayo, nkiringira Imana, maze simbe nagira ubwoba: ubwo se muntu buntu yashobora kuntwara iki?" 
Psalms56:6 Umunsi wose birirwa bambabaza, nta kindi batekereza atari ukungirira nabi." 
Psalms56:7 Baca ibico, bakangenza, baronda aho nyuze hose, kugira ngo bamvutse ubugingo." 
Psalms56:8 Ku mpamvu y’ubwo bugome bwabo, bashobora bate guhonoka? Mana yanjye, uburakari bwawe nibukureho bene abo bantu!" 
Psalms56:9 Imiburagiro yanjye ni wowe uyizi; tega urwabya rwawe, amarira yanjye ahongobokeremo. None se si ko byanditse mu gitabo cyawe?" 
Psalms56:10 Abanzi banjye bazakubana bahunga, umunsi nagutabaje. Ndabizi Imana iri kumwe nanjye!" 
Psalms56:11 Niringira Imana, ari na ko ndata ijambo ryayo, niringira Uhoraho, ari na ko ndata ijambo rye," 
Psalms56:12 niringira Imana, maze simbe nagira ubwoba; ubwo se abantu bashobora kuntwara iki?" 
Psalms56:13 Mana yanjye, nkomeye ku masezerano nakugiriye; nzagutura ibitambo by’ibisingizo," 
Psalms56:14 kuko amagara yanjye wayakijije urupfu. None se ibirenge byanjye ntiwabirinze gutsikira, ugira ngo ngende imbere y’Imana mu rumuri rumurikira abazima?" 
Psalms57:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikaririmbwa nk’iyitwa «Witsemba». Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi, bakayiririmba banihiriza ijwi. Yayihimbiye mu buvumo, igihe yahungaga Sawuli." 
Psalms57:2 Gira ibambe, Mana yanjye, ngirira ibambe, kuko ari wowe nashatseho ubuhungiro, maze nikinga mu gicucu cy’amababa yawe, kugeza igihe ibyago ndimo bizashirira." 
Psalms57:3 Ndatakambira Imana, Musumbabyose, Imana indengera muri byose." 
Psalms57:4 Aho iganje mu ijuru ninyoherereze icyankiza! Dore umuntu unsatiriye yatutse Imana, none na yo nigaragaze ineza n’ubudahemuka bwayo!" 
Psalms57:5 Dore ndyamye hagati y’abantu bameze nk’intare, zimiragura bene muntu! Amacumu n’imyambi, ni byo menyo yabo, inkota ityaye ikaba ururimi rwabo." 
Psalms57:6 Mana yanjye, garagaza ububasha bwawe busumbye ijuru, ikuzo ryawe ritumbagire hejuru y’isi yose!" 
Psalms57:7 Mu nzira nyuramo, bahateze umutego: ariko narunamye ndawurokoka. Bari bacukuye urwobo imbere yanjye, none ni bo baruguyemo." 
Psalms57:8 Mana yanjye, umutima wanjye wasubiye mu gitereko! Umutima wanjye wasubiye mu gitereko, none reka ndirimbe, ncurange ibyishongoro!" 
Psalms57:9 Nti «Kanguka, shema ryanjye, kanguka, nanga y’imirya, nawe cyembe, maze nkangure umuseke!»" 
Psalms57:10 Nyagasani, nzagusingiriza mu yindi miryango, ngucurangire rwagati mu mahanga;" 
Psalms57:11 kuko ineza yawe ikabakaba ku ijuru, n’ubudahemuka bwawe bugatumbagira mu bicu." 
Psalms57:12 Mana yanjye, garagaza ububasha bwawe busumbye ijuru, ikuzo ryawe ritumbagire hejuru y’isi yose!" 
Psalms58:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikaririmbwa nk’iyitwa «Witsemba». Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi, bakayiririmba banihiriza ijwi." 
Psalms58:2 Banyabubasha, aho muvuga koko ibihuje n’ubutabera? Bana b’abantu, aho muca imanza mukurikije amategeko?" 
Psalms58:3 Oya! Ahubwo mugira nabi nkana, mugakwiza ku isi urugomo ruterwa n’ibiganza byanyu." 
Psalms58:4 Ni abagiranabi bayobye bakiri mu nda ya ba nyina, bakaba n’abanyabinyoma barindagiye bakivuka!" 
Psalms58:5 Ubumara bafite ni nk’ubumara bw’inzoka; bameze nk’impiri y’igipfamatwi, yica amatwi nkana," 
Psalms58:6 igira ngo itumva ijwi ry’umugombozi, n’ubwo yaba ari umugombozi w’umuhanga." 
Psalms58:7 Mana yanjye, menagura amenyo ari mu kanwa kabo, Uhoraho, kura imikaka y’izo ntare!" 
Psalms58:8 Nibamere nk’amazi atemba, Imana nitamike imyambi yayo, maze bahinduke imirara!"
