Psalms58:9 Nibamere nk’ikinyamujongo kigenda gishonga; nk’uko bigendekera ikirambu, na bo ntibakabone izuba!" 
Psalms58:10 Uburakari bw’Imana nibwihutire kubatsemba, kurusha uko umuriro utwika inkwi z’amahwa." 
Psalms58:11 Naho intungane izashimishwa no kubona uko ihorewe, yogereze ibirenge byayo mu maraso y’abagiranabi." 
Psalms58:12 Maze rubanda bazavuge bati «Koko ubusugire bw’intungane bubaho, kandi hariho Imana ica imanza ku isi!»" 
Psalms59:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikaririmbwa nk’iyitwa «Witsemba». Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi, bakayiririmba banihiriza ijwi. Yayihimbye igihe Sawuli yohereje abantu ngo bagote urugo rwe bamwice." 
Psalms59:2 Mana yanjye, nkiza abanzi banjye, undinde abaje kuntera." 
Psalms59:3 Nkiza abagiranabi, unkure mu maboko y’abantu b’imenamaraso." 
Psalms59:4 Koko rero ngaha baciye igico ari jye bibasiye, Uhoraho, dore abanyamaboko bakoraniye kuntera, kandi nta kosa nta n’icyaha nakoze!" 
Psalms59:5 Nta kibi cyangaragayeho, ariko dore bahururiye kuntega. Kanguka, uze aho ndi wirebere nawe," 
Psalms59:6 wowe Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, Mana ya Israheli! Kanguka, uhe ibihano ariya mahanga yose; abo bagambanyi b’abagiranabi, ntugire n’umwe ubabarira!" 
Psalms59:7 Nimugoroba bagaruka bakankama nk’imbwa, bakazenguruka umugi wose." 
Psalms59:8 Dore ngabo! Urwasaya rwabo rwuzuye urukonda, bafite inkota ku binwa byabo. Mbese hari ubumva?" 
Psalms59:9 Wowe, Uhoraho, urabaseka, abo banyamahanga bose ukabahinyura!" 
Psalms59:10 Mbaraga zanjye, ni wowe ndangamiye, Imana ni yo buhungiro bwanjye butavogerwa." 
Psalms59:11 Imana yuje ineza irangoboka, maze ikampa guhinyura abanyubikiye bose." 
Psalms59:12 Wihutiraho ngo ubice, ejo umuryango wanjye utava aho ubyibagirwa, ahubwo imbaraga zawe nizibatigise, zibacishe bugufi, Nyagasani, ngabo yacu nikingira!" 
Psalms59:13 Iyo babumbuye umunwa gusa, bahita bagwiza ibyaha: bazahanirwe ubwirasi bwabo, ku mpamvu y’imivumo n’ibinyoma bakwiza!" 
Psalms59:14 Batsembane ubukana, ntihagire n’umwe uhonoka, maze bamenye ko Imana ari yo iganje mu gihugu cya Yakobo, kugeza ku mpera z’isi." 
Psalms59:15 Nimugoroba bagaruka bakankama nk’imbwa, bakazenguruka umugi wose," 
Psalms59:16 bakawuzerera bashaka ibyo barya; baba batijuse, bagakesha ijoro baboroga." 
Psalms59:17 Jyeweho ndarata imbaraga zawe, nkamamaza ineza yawe kuva mu gitondo, kuko wambereye umurwa w’amakiriro, n’ubuhungiro ku munsi w’amage." 
Psalms59:18 Nzagucurangira, wowe mbaraga zanjye, wowe Mana imbereye umurwa w’amakiriro, wowe Mana yuje ineza!" 
Psalms60:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Iririmbwa nk’iyitwa «Lisi y’Isezerano». Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi, bakayiririmba banihiriza ijwi. Igenewe kwigisha." 
Psalms60:2 Yahimbwe igihe Dawudi arwanye n’Abanyaramu bo muri Mezopotamiya, kimwe n’ab’i Soba; hanyuma Yowabu yahindukira akanesha Edomu, basakiraniye mu mubande w’Umunyu, akajujubya abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
Psalms60:3 Mana yacu, waradutaye, turatagarana; wari waturakariye, ariko ongera udukomeze." 
Psalms60:4 Wahungabanyije isi, urayisatagura; none gira usane ibyuho byayo, kuko igiye kuriduka!" 
Psalms60:5 Umuryango wawe wawugejeje ahaga, maze utunywesha divayi isindisha!" 
Psalms60:6 Abakubaha wabahaye ikimenyetso, ugira ngo bahunge abarashi!" 
Psalms60:7 Kugira ngo inkoramutima zawe zirokoke, dukirishe indyo yawe, maze udusubize." 
Psalms60:8 Imana yavugiye mu Ngoro yayo ntagatifu, iti «Ndatsinze! Negukanye Sikemu, umubande wa Sukoti nywucemo imigabane!" 
Psalms60:9 Gilihadi ibaye iyanjye, na Manase ni iyanjye; Efurayimu ihindutse ingofero y’icyuma nambaye ku mutwe, naho Yuda ni inkoni yanjye y’ubutegetsi;" 
Psalms60:10 Mowabu yo ibaye igikarabiro niyuhagiriramo, inkweto zanjye nkazirambika kuri Edomu, ngakoma akamu, nteye Ubufilisiti.»" 
Psalms60:11 Ni nde uzanjyana mu mugi ucinyiye, ni nde uzangeza muri Edomu?" 
Psalms60:12 Nta wundi utari wowe, Mana yadutaye, none ukaba utagitabarana n’ingabo zacu." 
Psalms60:13 Gira uze udutabare, udufashe kurwanya abanzi, kuko ubuvunyi buturuka ku bantu ari nta cyo bugeraho." 
Psalms60:14 Nituba hamwe n’Imana ni bwo tuzatsinda, ni yo izaribata abanzi bacu." 
Psalms61:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, igaherekezwa n’inanga y’imirya. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi." 
Psalms61:2 Mana yanjye, umva ugutakamba kwanjye, uhugukire isengesho ryanjye." 
Psalms61:3 Aho ndi ku mpera z’isi, ni wowe niyambaza iyo umutima wanjye wacitse urukendero. Uzanjyana unshyire hejuru y’urutare rurerure ntakwigezaho," 
Psalms61:4 kuko ari wowe buhungiro bwanjye, n’umunara udahangarwa, imbere y’abanzi banjye." 
Psalms61:5 Icyampa ngo nibere mu ihema ryawe iteka ryose, akaba ari ho mpungira, nkihisha mu mababa yawe!" 
Psalms61:6 Koko, Mana yanjye, wumvise imihigo nakugiriye maze abatinya izina ryawe ukabaha umugabane bakwiye." 
Psalms61:7 Uhe umwami kumara iminsi n’iminsi, imyaka ye ihinduke ibisekuruza n’ibisekuruza." 
Psalms61:8 Nateke ijabiro ubuziraherezo mu maso y’Imana, ineza n’ubudahemuka byayo bimurinde." 
Psalms61:9 Ubwo rero nzacurangira izina ryawe ubuziraherezo, kandi nubahirize buri munsi imihigo nakugiriye." 
Psalms62:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Yahimbwe bakurikije Yedutuni. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms62:2 Imbere y’Imana yonyine, umutima wanjye ni ho ugubwa neza; agakiza kanjye, ni yo gakomokaho." 
Psalms62:3 Ni yo yonyine rutare rwanjye n’agakiza kanjye; ni yo buhungiro butavogerwa: sinteze guhungabana. 
Psalms62:4 Muzahereza hehe kwiroha mwese ku muntu umwe, kugira ngo mumwese hasi, agwe nk’urukuta rwari rusanzwe ruhengamye, cyangwa nk’inkike yari isanzwe inyeganyega?" 
Psalms62:5 Imigambi yabo ni iyo kumuziza umwanya arimo, bagahimbazwa no kumubeshyera gusa; ku rurimi ugasanga bavuga amagambo y’umugisha, nyamara mu mitima yabo haganje imivumo." 
Psalms62:6 Mutima wanjye, shakira amahoro iruhande rw’Imana yonyine, kuko amiringiro yanjye yose ari yo akomokaho." 
Psalms62:7 Ni yo yonyine rutare rwanjye n’agakiza kanjye, ni yo buhungiro butavogerwa, sinteze guhungabana." 
Psalms62:8 Agakiza kanjye n’ishema ryanjye mbikesha Imana; ni yo rutare rudahangarwa n’ubuhungiro bwanjye. 
Psalms62:9 Rubanda mwese, nimuyiringire igihe cyose, muyibwire ikibari ku mutima; rwose Imana ni yo buhungiro bwacu!" 
Psalms62:10 Koko bene muntu ni nk’umwuka ushira ako kanya, n’ab’ibikomerezwa ni ubusabusa; bose hamwe ubashyize ku munzani, wasanga umwuka ubarusha kuremera." 
Psalms62:11 Ntimukiringire gutwaza igitugu, ngo muhihibikanire kunyaga iby’abandi. Ubukungu nibwiyongera, ntimukabuzirikeho umutima wanyu!" 
Psalms62:12 Hari ikintu kimwe Imana yavuze, na bibiri numvise, ari byo by’ibi: icya mbere ni uko ububasha bwose ari ubw’Imana," 
Psalms62:13 koko, Nyagasani, ineza yose ni wowe iturukaho, ikindi ni uko uhemba buri muntu ukurikije ibikorwa bye." 
Psalms63:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi; yayihimbye igihe yari mu butayu bwa Yuda. 
Psalms63:2 Nyagasani, ni wowe Mana yanjye, mpora ngushaka uko bukeye! Umutima wanjye ugufitiye inyota, n’umubiri wanjye ukakugirira urukumbuzi, meze nk’ubutaka bw’agasi, bwabuze amazi bukumirana." 
Psalms63:3 Naguhanze amaso aho uri mu Ngoro ntagatifu, mbona ububasha bwawe n’ikuzo ryawe;" 
Psalms63:4 ineza yawe nsanga yaguranwa amagara y’umuntu, umunwa wanjye uhora ukwamamaza." 
Psalms63:5 Koko nzahora ngusingiza igihe cyose nkiriho, izina ryawe nditegere amaboko nkwiyambaza." 
Psalms63:6 Nzamera nk’umuntu wahaze ibinure n’imisokoro, ibitwenge bimpore ku munwa kubera ibyishimo, maze ndirimbe nezerewe kubera ibisingizo byawe." 
Psalms63:7 Iyo ngutekerereje aho ndyamye, mara amasaha ngusenga," 
Psalms63:8 kuko utahwemye kuntabara, nzavugiriza impundu aho nibereye mu gicucu cy’amababa yawe." 
Psalms63:9 Nkwizirikaho n’umutima wanjye wose, ukuboko kwawe kw’indyo kukandamira." 
Psalms63:10 Abibasiye rero amagara yanjye ngo bampitane, barakarimbuka ari bo, barindimukire ikuzimu mu nda y’isi!" 
Psalms63:11 Baragashirira ku bugi bw’inkota, bahinduke ibiryo by’ingunzu." 
Psalms63:12 Nuko umwami azanezezwe n’Imana: uzamurahira wese bizamuhesha ishema, naho akanwa k’abanyabinyoma kazibe." 
Psalms64:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms64:2 Mana yanjye, umva amaganya yanjye, urinde amagara yanjye umwanzi gica;" 
Psalms64:3 umpishe kure y’abicanyi bangambanira, kure y’abagizi ba nabi bahuje umugambi." 
Psalms64:4 Dore batyaje indimi zabo boshye inkota, batamika imyambi yabo, ari yo magambo asesereza bavuga," 
Psalms64:5 kugira ngo barase rwihishwa umuntu w’indakemwa, ngo bamurase bamutunguye nta cyo bishisha." 
Psalms64:6 Bahirimbanira kunguka inama mbi, bagahimba amayeri yo guhisha imitego bamutega, bavuga bati «Ni nde uzabimenya?»" 
Psalms64:7 Buzuriza hamwe imigambi y’ubugizi bwa nabi, bakigamba bavuga bati «Ibyo dushaka kugeraho turabinogeje rwose; burya mu nda ni kure, umutima w’umuntu ntugerwaho!»" 
Psalms64:8 Ariko Imana yagize itya irabarasa, umwambi irekuye ubagwa gitumo, urabakomeretsa!" 
Psalms64:9 Ururimi rwabo ni rwo rubahindutse, maze ubabonye wese akazunguza umutwe." 
Psalms64:10 Koko, umuntu wese byamukuye umutima, yamamaza ibyo Imana yakoze, kandi na we yumviraho." 
Psalms64:11 Intungane niyishimire Uhoraho, imushakeho ubuhungiro, abafite umutima uboneye bose babyishimire." 
Psalms65:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Ni indirimbo. 
Psalms65:2 Mana iri i Siyoni, abantu bakwiye kugusingiza, kandi bakarangiza imihigo bakugiriye." 
Psalms65:3 Wowe wumva isengesho bakubwiye, abantu bose baza bakugana." 
Psalms65:4 Ibyaha bikunda kutuganza, ariko wowe ukabitubabarira." 
Psalms65:5 Hahirwa umutumirwa wihitiyemo ubwawe; ukamuha kwigumira mu bikari by’Ingoro yawe. Tuzahazwa ibyiza byo mu rugo rwawe, ibintu bitagatifu byo mu Ngoro yawe." 
Psalms65:6 Mu butungane bwawe, uratwumva ukadukorera ibitangaza, wowe, Mana Mukiza wacu, mizero ya bose kugeza ku mpera z’isi, no ku batuye ibirwa byo mu nyanja za kure cyane." 
Psalms65:7 Ububasha bwawe bushyigikira imisozi, ugakindikiza ubutwari," 
Psalms65:8 ugahosha urusaku rw’inyanja, urusaku rw’imivumba yazo, ukanacubya imyivumbagatanyo y’ibihugu." 
Psalms65:9 Ku nkiko z’isi baratangarira ibimenyetso werekana, ab’iburasirazuba n’iburengerazuba wabateye kuvuza impundu." 
Psalms65:10 Wasuye isi, uyuhira amazi, maze uyigwizamo uburumbuke butagira ingano. Imigezi y’Imana isendereye amazi, maze ugategurira abantu imyaka ibatunga. Dore uko utegura ubutaka:" 
Psalms65:11 uyobora amazi mu mayogi, ugasanza amasinde, ukagusha imvura y’umurindi ngo ibworoshye, maze ugaha umugisha imbuto zimeramo." 
Psalms65:12 Umwaka uwusoza uwuhunda ibyiza byawe, aho unyuze hose hagasigara uburumbuke buteye ubwuzu." 
Psalms65:13 Ubwatsi bw’amatungo, buratohagira mu butayu, utununga ugasanga duteye ubwuzu," 
Psalms65:14 inzuri zikanyanyagiramo amashyo arisha, n’imibande ikazimagizwa n’imyaka yeze. Nuko byose bigasabagizwa n’ibyishimo, bikaririmba." 
Psalms66:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni indirimbo. Ni zaburi. Mahanga yose, nimusingize Imana," 
Psalms66:2 muririmbe ikuzo ry’izina ryayo, muyikuze muvuga ibisingizo byayo." 
Psalms66:3 Nimubwire Imana muti «Mbega ibikorwa byawe ngo biratera ubwoba! Abanzi bawe bageze aho kuguhakwaho kubera ububasha bwawe bukaze. 
Psalms66:4 Abatuye isi bose bapfukamye imbere yawe, bakagucurangira baririmba izina ryawe!»" 
Psalms66:5 Nimuze mwirorere ibikorwa by’Imana, yo abantu batinyira imyato:" 
Psalms66:6 yahinduye inyanja ubutaka bwumutse, n’uruzi barwambuka ku maguru rwakamye kare; ni yo mpamvu tuyigirira ibirori." 
Psalms66:7 Ku bubasha bwayo, iraganje ubuziraherezo, amaso yayo akagenzura amahanga yose, kugira ngo ibyigomeke bitabyutsa umutwe." 
Psalms66:8 Bihugu mwese, nimurate Imana yacu, muhanike amajwi muririmba ibisingizo byayo;" 
Psalms66:9 kuko ari yo itubeshejeho, kandi ntireke ibirenge byacu bidandabirana." 
Psalms66:10 Nyamara, Nyagasani, ntiwabuze kuduha ibigeragezo, maze uratuyungurura nk’uko bayungurura feza." 
Psalms66:11 Watuganishije aho umutego uri, maze uwo mutego udukobanya ibiyunguyungu." 
Psalms66:12 Wemeye ko batugira nk’itungo riheka imizigo, utunyuza mu muriro no mu mazi, ariko amaherezo ubidukuramo, turahumeka." 
Psalms66:13 None ninjiye mu Ngoro yawe nzanye ibitambo bitwikwa, nje kuguhigura nk’uko nabisezeranye," 
Psalms66:14 nkabyivugira ubwanjye igihe nari ngeze ahaga. 
Psalms66:15 Ndagutura ibitambo bitwikwa by’amatungo y’imishishe, hamwe n’impumuro nziza y’inyama z’amapfizi y’intama, ndetse ngerekeho n’ibimasa n’amasekurume y’ihene." 
Psalms66:16 Abubaha Imana mwese, nimuze mwumve, mbatekerereze ibitangaza yankoreye." 
Psalms66:17 Uko umunwa wanjye wamutakiraga, ni na ko ururimi rwanjye rwamusingizaga." 
Psalms66:18 Iyo umutima wanjye utwarwa n’ikibi, Nyagasani nta bwo aba yaranteze amatwi." 
Psalms66:19 Ariko Imana yaranyumvise, yita ku isengesho ryanjye riyitakambira." 
Psalms66:20 Imana iragahora isingizwa, yo itirengagije isengesho ryanjye, cyangwa ngo ireke kungirira ubuntu." 
Psalms67:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha; igaherekezwa n’inanga z’imirya. Ni zaburi igenewe kuririmbwa. 
Psalms67:2 Imana nitubabarire, maze iduhe umugisha, itwereke uruhanga rwayo rubengerana," 
Psalms67:3 kugira ngo ku isi bazamenye ko ari wowe ugenga, n’amahanga yose amenye ko ari wowe ukiza." 
Psalms67:4 Mana yacu, imiryango yose nigusingize, imiryango yose nigusingirize icyarimwe!" 
Psalms67:5 Amoko yose niyishime, aririmbe, kuko utegekana ubutabera ibihugu byose, ukagenga amahanga yose y’isi." 
Psalms67:6 Mana yacu, imiryango yose nigusingize, imiryango yose nigusingirize icyarimwe!" 
Psalms67:7 Ubutaka bwacu bweze imbuto, Nyagasani, Imana yacu, aduhunda atyo imigisha." 
Psalms67:8 Imana niduhe umugisha, kandi niyubahwe n’isi yose aho iva ikagera." 
Psalms68:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi, ni zaburi igenewe kuririmbwa." 
Psalms68:2 Imana nihaguruke, maze abanzi bayo bakwire imishwaro, n’abayirwanya bahungire kure yayo." 
Psalms68:3 Uko umwotsi uyoyoka, na bo ubahindure ubusa; uko ibishashara bishonga ku muriro, abo bagome bashirire imbere y’Imana." 
Psalms68:4 Naho intungane zihore mu byishimo, zitete imbere y’Imana, zihamirize ubudahwema zinezerewe." 
Psalms68:5 Nimuririmbire Imana, mucurange izina ryayo, nimurate Nyamugendera ku bicu; izina rye ni Uhoraho, nimumubyinire!" 
Psalms68:6 Ni Umubyeyi umenya impfubyi, akanarenganura abapfakazi; nguko uko Imana imeze mu Ngoro yayo ntagatifu." 
Psalms68:7 Abatagira kivurira, Imana ibubakira urugo, imfungwa ikazibohora, ikazisubiza umudendezo, naho abantu b’ibyigomeke ikabatuza ku gasi." 
Psalms68:8 Nyagasani, igihe wagendaga ku isonga y’imbaga yawe, igihe wakatazaga mu butayu," 
Psalms68:9 isi yahinze umushyitsi, ndetse n’ijuru rirashonga, imbere y’Imana yigaragarije kuri Sinayi, imbere y’Imana, Imana ya Israheli." 
Psalms68:10 Mana, wajyaga usesekaza imvura y’umurindi, wabona inyarurembo zawe zarembye, ukazisubiza imbaraga." 
Psalms68:11 Indeka yawe babonyemo ikibanza, ni wowe, Mana, wayibakebeye kubera ubuntu ugirira abakene." 
Psalms68:12 Nyagasani avuga ijambo rimwe, maze intumwa ze zigasesekara ari igitero," 
Psalms68:13 zigira ziti «Abami n’ingabo zabo bahunze, bahunze ubutarora inyuma, none imitako y’ingo zabo abagore bayigize iminyago, barayikwiza. Mwasigara muryamye mu macumbi mukora iki?" 
Psalms68:14 Hari amababa y’inuma ahunze feza, n’amoya yayo atatse zahabu." 
Psalms68:15 Umusumbabyose yatatanyije abami, ku musozi w’urwijiji haragwa amasimbi.»" 
Psalms68:16 Musozi w’Imana, musozi w’i Bashani! Musozi w’ibihanamanga, musozi w’i Bashani!" 
Psalms68:17 Misozi y’ibihanamanga, kuki mwarebana ishyari umusozi Imana yishakiye guturaho? Nyamara ni ko bimeze, Uhoraho azawuturaho mu bihe byose!" 
Psalms68:18 Amafarasi Imana iremesha urugamba ni uduhumbi n’uduhumbagiza! Ni yo Umutegetsi yajeho kuri Sinayi, ajya mu Ngoro ntagatifu." 
Psalms68:19 Wazamutse mu bitwa, maze ufata ingaruzwamuheto, abantu ubahabwaho amaturo, ndetse n’abigometse, ngo ubashe kwiyubakira Ingoro, Uhoraho Mana yacu!" 
Psalms68:20 Nyagasani aragahora asingizwa iminsi yose! Iyo Mana ni yo dukesha gutsinda. 
Psalms68:21 Iyo Mana ni yo itubera Imana yuje imitsindo, Nyagasani Uhoraho ni we utuma umuntu ahonoka urupfu." 
Psalms68:22 Ariko Imana ijanjagura imitwe y’abanzi bayo, ikamena agahanga gapfukiriyeho urusatsi, k’umuntu utunzwe no gukora nabi." 
Psalms68:23 Nyagasani aravuze ati «Nzagarura abagiye i Bashani, ndohore abarokeye mu ndiba y’inyanja," 
Psalms68:24 kugira ngo ubanyukanyukire mu maraso, maze imbwa zawe zirye imirambo y’abo banzi.»" 
Psalms68:25 Mana, babonye imitambagiro yawe, imitambagiro y’Imana yanjye, n’umwami wanjye, mu Ngoro ntagatifu." 
Psalms68:26 Abaririmbyi bagendaga imbere, abacuranzi bakabaza inyuma, hagati hari abakobwa bavuza utugoma." 
Psalms68:27 Nimusingize Imana mu makoraniro, musingirize Nyagasani ku isoko ya Israheli." 
Psalms68:28 Hari bene Benyamini, umuhererezi, hakaba ibikomangoma byo kwa Yuda, n’ibikomangoma byo kwa Zabuloni, n’ibyo kwa Nefutali." 
Psalms68:29 Imana yawe yakugeneye gukomera: Mana, erekana rero imbaraga zawe, wowe wagaragaje ibigwi ari twe urwanaho." 
Psalms68:30 Abami nibabona Ingoro yawe iri ahirengeye muri Yeruzalemu, bazatanguranwa bakuzanira amaturo." 
Psalms68:31 Kangara cya gikoko cyo mu rufunzo, na bwa bushyo bw’ibimasa n’inyana bitagira ingano, n’ibigendesha inda byose bifite imboho z’ifeza. Tatanya imiryango ikunda imirwano!" 
Psalms68:32 Abantu b’abakire baturutse mu Misiri, Abo muri Nubiya barambuye ibiganza babyerekeje ku Mana." 
Psalms68:33 Ngoma z’isi, nimuririmbire Imana, mucurangire Nyagasani!" 
Psalms68:34 We ugendera mu bushorishori bw’ijuru rya kera na kare! Ng’uwo aranguruye ijwi, ijwi rikomeye cyane:" 
Psalms68:35 ububasha nimubuharire Imana! Ububengerane bwayo buganje hejuru ya Israheli, ububasha bwayo bukaba mu bicu." 
Psalms68:36 Mana, aho uri mu Ngoro yawe, uhorana icyusa. Imana ya Israheli ni yo iha abantu bayo imbaraga n’ubushobozi. Imana nisingizwe!" 
Psalms69:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Mu ijwi rya «Amalisi». Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms69:2 Ndohora, Mana yanjye, kuko amazi angeze mu ijosi." 
Psalms69:3 Ndarigita mu isayo, simfite aho nashinga ikirenge; nazikamye mu kizenga, n’umuvumba urampururana." 
Psalms69:4 Singishobora no gutabaza, umuhogo wanjye wasaraye; amaso yanjye yaruhijwe no gutegereza Imana yanjye." 
Psalms69:5 Abanyangira ubusa, bararuta ubwinshi umusatsi wanjye; abo banyazi bafite amaboko, barampiga, baranyishyuza ibyo ntigeze niba." 
Psalms69:6 Mana, uzi neza ubupfu bwanjye, kandi n’ibicumuro byanjye ntibikwihishe." 
Psalms69:7 Nyagasani, Mugaba w’ingabo, sinzakoze isoni abakwiringira, ngo ntere ikimwaro abagushakashaka, Mana ya Israheli!" 
Psalms69:8 Niyumanganya ibitutsi, ku mpamvu yawe, nkemera gukozwa isoni n’ikimwaro;" 
Psalms69:9 nahindutse umunyamahanga mu bavandimwe, mba n’intamenyekana muri bene mama." 
Psalms69:10 Ni koko, ishyaka mfitiye Ingoro yawe riramparanya, n’ibyo bagutuka ni jye bishengura." 
Psalms69:11 Nicishije bugufi nsiba ibyo kurya, maze ibyo bimviramo ibitutsi;" 
Psalms69:12 nambaye ikigunira cy’agahinda, nuko mpinduka urw’amenyo;" 
Psalms69:13 abicaye ku irembo ni jye bataramiraho, n’abasinzi bangize indirimbo." 
Psalms69:14 Ubu rero, Uhoraho, wumve isengesho ryanjye; igihe cyo kuntabara kirageze, Mana, Nyir’ubuntu budashira, undengere kuko ari wowe nkesha agakiza." 
Psalms69:15 Unsayure mu nzarwe, nekuzikama; umvane mu minwe y’abanyibasiye, unkure mu mazi abira!" 
Psalms69:16 Sintwarwe n’amazi ahurura, ikizenga ntikindenge hejuru, kandi sincubire mu kuzimu kw’imva!" 
Psalms69:17 Unsubize, Uhoraho, kuko impuhwe zawe zihebuje; ugirire urukundo rwawe maze unyiteho;" 
Psalms69:18 ntuhishe umugaragu wawe uruhanga rwawe, ndi mu kaga, ntutinde kuntabara;" 
Psalms69:19 umbe hafi ngo undengere, unkize abanzi banjye." 
Psalms69:20 Uzi uko ntukwa, ngasuzugurwa, ngakozwa n’ikimwaro; abanzi banjye bose bakuri imbere." 
Psalms69:21 Ibitutsi byambihije umutima, bimviramo no kurwara; ntegereza uwangoboka, ndaheba, nshaka uwampoza, sinamubona!" 
Psalms69:22 Ibiryo byanjye babiroshyemo uburozi, inyota inyishe banyuhira indurwe." 
Psalms69:23 Ibirori byabo bizabagaruke, n’incuti zabo zibifatirwemo." 
Psalms69:24 Amaso yabo aragahumirako, n’umugongo ucike bubube." 
Psalms69:25 Ubacurireho umujinya wawe, n’umuriro w’uburakari bwawe ubokere." 
Psalms69:26 Urugo rwabo rurakaba itongo, amahema yabo abure abayatura." 
Psalms69:27 Barahuhura uwo wowe wihaniye, kandi bagashengura uwo wanegekaje." 
Psalms69:28 Ubahamye ibicumuro byabo byose, maze bekukugiraho ubwiregure;" 
Psalms69:29 bahanagurwe mu gitabo cy’ubuzima, maze bekubarirwa hamwe n’intungane." 
Psalms69:30 Naho jyewe, w’ingorwa n’umubabare, ubuvunyi bwawe, Mana, buranyunamure!" 
Psalms69:31 Ubwo nzaririmbe izina ryawe, kandi ndyamamaze mu bisingizo." 
Psalms69:32 Ibyo bizanyura Uhoraho, kurusha ikimasa namutura, cyangwa imfizi y’amahembe n’ibinono." 
Psalms69:33 Abiyoroshya nibabibona, bazishima, bati «Mwebwe abashakashaka Imana, murakagwira!»" 
Psalms69:34 Kuko Uhoraho yumva abatishoboye, ntatererane abe bari ku ngoyi." 
Psalms69:35 Ijuru n’isi nibimurate, hamwe n’inyanja n’ibiyirukamo byose." 
Psalms69:36 Kuko Imana izarokora Siyoni, ikazasana imigi ya Yuda, bakahasubirana, bakahatunga;" 
Psalms69:37 inkomoko y’abagaragu bayo ikazaharagwa, maze abakunda izina ryayo bakahatunga." 
Psalms70:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Ni iyo kwibuka. 
Psalms70:2 Mana, ngwino unyikirize, Uhoraho, banguka, undengere!" 
Psalms70:3 Nibakorwe n’ikimwaro, abanyifuriza urupfu bose! Nibasubire inyuma, kandi bakozwe isoni, abanyifuriza nabi bose;" 
Psalms70:4 abirirwaga banseka, nibatahane ikimwaro!" 
Psalms70:5 Ahubwo nibaguhimbarirwemo, abagushakashaka bose; kandi abakunda agakiza kawe, bavuge ubudahwema bati «Imana ni igihangange!»" 
Psalms70:6 Naho jyewe, w’umukene n’imbabare, Mana, ubanguke untabare! Ni wowe buvunyi bwanjye n’umukiza wanjye, Uhoraho, ntutindiganye!" 
Psalms71:1 Uhoraho, ni wowe buhungiro bwanjye, sinzateterezwa bibaho." 
Psalms71:2 Mu butabera bwawe unkiranure, undengere, untege amatwi maze undokore." 
Psalms71:3 Umbere urutare negamira, nshobora guhungiramo buri gihe; wiyemeje kunkiza, wowe rutare rwanjye rw’intamenwa." 
Psalms71:4 Mana yanjye, urankize abagiranabi, unkure mu minwe y’ababisha n’abagome." 
Psalms71:5 Ni wowe mizero yanjye, Nyagasani, Uhoraho, ni wowe niringira kuva mu buto bwanjye." 
Psalms71:6 Narakwisunze kuva nkivuka, unyitorera nkiva mu nda ya mama, ni cyo gituma nzahora ngusingiza." 
Psalms71:7 Abenshi baketse ko wamvumye, kandi ari wowe buhungiro bwanjye." 
Psalms71:8 Umunwa wanjye wuzuye ibisingizo byawe, iminsi yose ndirimba ikuzo ryawe." 
Psalms71:9 Ntunyibagirwe ngeze mu zabukuru, ngo untererane imbaraga zincika." 
Psalms71:10 Abanzi banjye baramvuga, n’abangenza banyumvikaniyeho." 
Psalms71:11 Baravuga bati «Imana yaramutereranye, nimumuhige, mumusumire, nta we uzamutabara!»" 
Psalms71:12 Mana, ntunjye kure, Mana yanjye, ubanguke undengere!" 
Psalms71:13 Abahiga amagara yanjye, nibagende bakorwe n’isoni! Abanyifuriza nabi, nibahazwe agasuzuguro n’ikimwaro!" 
Psalms71:14 Naho jyewe, nzahora nkwizera, nkuririmbire ubudahwema ibisingizo." 
Psalms71:15 Nzatangaza ukuntu uri indahemuka, iminsi yose namamaze agakiza kawe, kuko ibyiza byawe bitagira ingano." 
Psalms71:16 Nzageza n’aho ndata ibigwi byawe, Uhoraho, ahasigaye namamaze ubudahemuka bwawe." 
Psalms71:17 Mana, wanyiyigishirije kuva mu buto bwanjye, na n’ubu ndacyarata ibyiza byawe." 
Psalms71:18 None ubwo ngeze mu zabukuru, Mana, ntuzantererane, kugira ngo nzashobore kumenyesha urubyiruko, kimwe n’imbyaro zose zizaza ibikorwa by’ububasha bwawe." 
Psalms71:19 Mana, ubudahemuka bwawe burahebuje, wowe wakoze ibintu by’agatangaza, Mana, ni nde uhwanye nawe?" 
Psalms71:20 Ku mpamvu yawe nemeye amakuba n’ibyago; nyamara uzangarukira umbesheho, maze unzikure mu nyenga y’ikuzimu." 
Psalms71:21 Uzansubiza agaciro kanjye, maze wongere umpumurize." 
Psalms71:22 Nanjye nzagusingiriza ku murya w’inanga, nzagushimire ubudahemuka bwawe, Mana yanjye, nzagucurangira umuduri, wowe Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Psalms71:23 Nzagusingiriza mu ndirimbo, nkuvugirize impundu kuko wanyunamuye." 
Psalms71:24 Iminsi yose nzamamaza ubutabera bwawe, kuko abanyifuriza nabi, bahagijwe agasuzuguro n’ikimwaro!" 
Psalms72:1 Yitiriwe Salomoni Mana, umwami umwegurire ubucamanza bwawe, uwo mwana w’umwami, umutoze ubutabera bwawe;" 
Psalms72:2 acire umuryango wawe imanza ziboneye kandi arengere n’ingorwa zawe. 
Psalms72:3 Imisozi nikwize rubanda amahoro, n’imirenge ibazanire ubutabera." 
Psalms72:4 Azarenganura rubanda rugufi, arokore abatindahare, kandi aribate uwabakandamizaga." 
Psalms72:5 Azaramba ak’izuba, amare ibihe bitabarika nk’ukwezi;" 
Psalms72:6 amere nk’imvura igwa mu rwuri, mbese nk’imvura y’umurindi ibobeza ubutaka!" 
Psalms72:7 Mu gihe cye, ubutabera buzasagamba, n’amahoro asesure, mu mezi atabarika." 
Psalms72:8 Azategeka kuva ku nyanja kugera ku yindi, avane ku Ruzi ageze ku mipaka y’isi." 
Psalms72:9 Abamutambamiye bazapfukama imbere ye, maze abanzi be bazarigate umukungugu." 
Psalms72:10 Abami b’i Tarishishi n’ab’ibirwa bazamutura, abami b’i Seba, n’ab’i Saba bamurabukire." 
Psalms72:11 Abami bose bazapfukama imbere ye, amahanga yose amuyoboke." 
Psalms72:12 Azarokora ingorwa zitakamba, n’indushyi zitagira kirengera." 
Psalms72:13 Azagirira ibambe ingorwa n’utishoboye, aramire ubuzima bwabo." 
Psalms72:14 Azabakiza ububisha n’agahato, kuko we abona amagara yabo afite agaciro." 
Psalms72:15 Azaramba bamuture zahabu y’i Saba; bazamusabire ubudahwema, bamwifurize umugisha iminsi yose." 
Psalms72:16 Hazaba uburumbuke bw’ingano mu gihugu, amahundo ahungabane kugeza mu mpinga z’imisozi, atubuke nk’indabyo zo muri Libani, umusaruro ungane n’ibyatsi byo mu mirima!" 
Psalms72:17 Izina rye rizavugwa ubuziraherezo, ubwamamare bwe bumare igihe nk’izuba! Imiryango yose y’isi izamuherwemo umugisha, amahanga yose amwite umunyahirwe!" 
Psalms72:18 Haragasingizwa Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, we wenyine ukora ibitangaza!" 
Psalms72:19 Izina rye ry’ikuzo riragasingizwa ubuziraherezo, ikuzo rye riragasakara ku isi yose! Amen! Amen!" 
Psalms72:20 Ngiri iherezo ry’amasengesho ya Dawudi, mwene Yese." 
Psalms73:1 Ni zaburi ya Asafu. Koko, Imana ikunda Israheli, n’abafite umutima ukeye bose." 
Psalms73:2 Nyamara hari hato ngasitara, habuze gato ngo ngwe;" 
Psalms73:3 kubera ishyari nari mfitiye abagiranabi, kubona byose ari bo bihira!" 
Psalms73:4 Nta cyo bigomwa kugeza bapfa, igifu cyabo gihora cyuzuye;" 
Psalms73:5 nta cyo bazi mu miruho y’abantu, ibyago bibacaho bikagwira abandi." 
Psalms73:6 Ubwirasi burababereye nk’umutako, urugomo rubizihiye nk’umwambaro;" 
Psalms73:7 umurengwe ubatera kurebana agasuzuguro, ubucakura bukabasaguka umutima." 
Psalms73:8 Barannyegana, bakavugana ububisha, bigamba uko bari buhemuke;" 
Psalms73:9 imvugo yabo itera no mu ijuru, akarimi kabo kararitse ibyo ku isi." 
Psalms73:10 Ni yo mpamvu umuryango wanjye ubohokaho, bakawuhira amagambo yabo nk’amazi," 
Psalms73:11 bavuga bati «Imana izabimenya ite? Uwo hejuru iriya hari icyo yimenyera?» 
Psalms73:12 None ngaha abagiranabi, baragwiza umutungo, nta cyo bikanga." 
Psalms73:13 Naho jye kugumana ubupfura byamariye iki, ngo aha ndaharanira ubuziranenge!" 
Psalms73:14 Buri munsi ndakubitwa, kandi buri gitondo ngahabwa igihano;" 
Psalms73:15 nyamara iyo niyemeza kuvuga nka bo, najyaga kuba ngambaniye abana bawe tuva inda imwe!" 
Psalms73:16 Nuko mbanza gutekereza ngo mbyumve; ariko nsanga bimbereye urujijo," 
Psalms73:17 kugeza ubwo ninjira mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, maze nsobanukirwa iby’amaherezo yabo." 
Psalms73:18 Ni koko, wabaganishije aharindimuka, ngo ubagushe mu mutego!" 
Psalms73:19 Mbega ngo baracemererwa mu kanya gato! Bahindutse ubusa bishwe n’ubwoba! 
Psalms73:20 Nk’uko umuntu arota inzozi yakanguka akazibagirwa, nawe Nyagasani, uzabasuzugure, woye no kwibuka uko basa." 
Psalms73:21 Igihe umutima wanjye wari wuzuye amaganya, nashengutse umubiri wose," 
Psalms73:22 bwari ubugoryi bwo kutabyumva, nari igicucu mu maso yawe!" 
Psalms73:23 Koko icyo gihe cyose nari kumwe nawe, umfashe ukuboko kw’iburyo." 
Psalms73:24 Uzanyoboresha inama zawe, maze uzangeze mu ikuzo ryawe." 
Psalms73:25 Ni nde wundi ngira mu ijuru wo kuntabara? Nta kindi kindi nakwifuza hano ku isi, kandi ngufite!" 
Psalms73:26 Umubiri wanjye n’umutima wanjye bishobora gucogora, ariko wowe, Mana yanjye, uri urutare negamiye n’umugabane wanjye iteka ryose!" 
Psalms73:27 Ngaha abakujya kure bararimbuka, abaguhungaho ukabatsemba." 
Psalms73:28 Naho jyewe, kwegera Imana ni yo mahirwe yanjye; Nyagasani Uhoraho, ni we niringiye, kugira ngo nzarate ibyiza byose yakoze." 
Psalms74:1 Ni igisigo cya Asafu. Nyagasani, ni iki cyatumye uduta burundu? Ni iki cyatumye uburakari bwawe bugurumanira ubushyo bwo mu nkome yawe?" 
Psalms74:2 Ibuka ikoraniro ryawe wironkeye kuva kera, ubwoko wishakiye ko bukubera imbata, wibuke n’umusozi wa Siyoni washinzeho Ingoro yawe!" 
Psalms74:3 Zamuka werekeza muri ayo matongo; wirebere ibyo umwanzi yononnye byose mu Rusengero. 
Psalms74:4 Abagutambamiye bavugirije induru mu ijabiro ryawe watwakiriragamo, bahashinga amabendera yabo." 
Psalms74:5 Basaga n’abatutizi babanguye intorezo zabo mu ishyamba," 
Psalms74:6 bamenagurira icyarimwe amashusho, bayakubita intorezo n’amafuni!" 
Psalms74:7 Ingoro yawe bayihereje inkongi, bahirika ku butaka inteko y’izina ryawe!" 
Psalms74:8 Ubwo abo bagome banoza umugambi wo gutwika aho bagusengeraga hose mu gihugu. 
Psalms74:9 Nta hakiboneka ibimenyetso bikuranga, nta n’umuhanuzi ukibaho, kandi nta n’umwe muri twe uzi aho bizahereza!" 
Psalms74:10 Mana, umwanzi azadutuka bihereze hehe? Mbese umwanzi azakomeza agusuzugure na ryari?" 
Psalms74:11 Ni iki gituma udukuraho amaboko, ugakomeza kwipfumbata, nta cyo utumarira?" 
Psalms74:12 Nyamara, Mana, uri umwami wanjye kuva kera na kare, ni wowe wagobotoye igihugu cyacu!" 
Psalms74:13 Ni wowe wasatuye inyanja ku bubasha bwawe, ikiyoka cyo mu mazi, ukimenagura imitwe." 
Psalms74:14 Ni wowe wajanjaguye imitwe ya cya Leviyatani, ukigaburira inyamaswa zo mu nyanja." 
Psalms74:15 Ni wowe wavubuye isoko n’umugezi, wumisha inzuzi zidakama." 
Psalms74:16 Umunsi ni uwawe, ijoro na ryo ni iryawe; ni wowe wahanze ukwezi n’izuba;" 
Psalms74:17 ni wowe washinze imipaka yose y’isi, icyi n’itumba, ni wowe wabishyizeho." 
Psalms74:18 Uhoraho, uribuke ko umwanzi yagututse, ko inyoko y’abasazi yandavuje izina ryawe!" 
Psalms74:19 Ubuzima bw’abagukunda, ntubugabize ibikoko, ntutererane buheriheri ingorwa zawe zagirijwe." 
Psalms74:20 Ibuka Isezerano ryawe, maze wirebere: amikingo yose y’igihugu yabaye indiri y’urugomo!" 
Psalms74:21 Ntutume urenganywa atahana ikimwaro, ahubwo umukene n’imbabare bagende bakuramya!" 
Psalms74:22 Uhoraho, tabara; urengere ibyawe, wibuke ibitutsi bidahosha bya bariya basazi!" 
Psalms74:23 Ntiwibagirwe induru y’abanzi bawe, n’akamu kiyongera k’abagusembura!" 
Psalms75:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ijwi rya «Witsemba». Ni zaburi ya Asafu. 
Psalms75:2 Turagushimira, Mana, turagushimira, turiyambaza izina ryawe, tukamamaza ibyiza byawe." 
Psalms75:3 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Igihe nagennye nikigera, jyewe nzaca imanza zitabera." 
Psalms75:4 Isi ishobora guhungabana, kimwe n’abayituye bose, ariko ni jye ushyigikiye inkingi zayo." 
Psalms75:5 Nabwiye abirasi nti ’Nimurekere aho kwirata!’ n’abagiranabi nti ’Mutongera gushinga ijosi; 
Psalms75:6 nimwoye gukabiriza ububasha bwanyu, nimuhore ayo mateshwa yanyu!’»" 
Psalms75:7 Imana ntiturutse mu burasirazuba cyangwa mu burengero bwaryo, emwe ntinavuye mu butayu cyangwa mu misozi;" 
Psalms75:8 nyamara ngiyi iraje, yo mucamanza w’intabera, ucisha bugufi bamwe, abandi akabakuza." 
Psalms75:9 Uhoraho afite igikombe mu ntoki ze, kirimo divayi isharira kandi isembuye. Abagiranabi bose b’isi bazayinywa, bayikonoze kugeza ku matepfu." 
Psalms75:10 Naho jyewe, nzahora nsabagizwa n’ibyishimo, kandi nzacurangira Imana ya Yakobo," 
Psalms75:11 ari na yo izacubya ubwirasi bw’abagiranabi, maze ab’indahemuka babyutse umutwe." 
Psalms76:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ku nanga z’imirya. Iyi ndirimbo ni zaburi ya Asafu. 
Psalms76:2 Uhoraho yimenyekanyije muri Yuda, izina rye ryamamaye muri Israheli;" 
Psalms76:3 yashinze ihema rye i Salemu, naho i Siyoni ahagira ikambere." 
Psalms76:4 Ni ho yavunaguriye intwaro z’intambara, ingabo, inkota n’imyambi." 
Psalms76:5 Uhoraho, mbega ngo uraba impangare, kubera ibirundo by’iminyago wabacuje!" 
Psalms76:6 Ingabo z’intwari zaratsinzwe, zamburwa intwaro zazo zose, ari uko zatwawe n’ibitotsi." 
Psalms76:7 Igihe ubakangaranyije, Mana ya Yakobo, ibigari n’amafarasi byaracemerewe!" 
Psalms76:8 Mbega ukuntu uteye ubwoba! Ni nde waguhangara igihe cy’uburakari bwawe? 
Psalms76:9 Itangazo ryawe ryumvikanira mu ijuru, isi igahindagana maze igatuza," 
Psalms76:10 kuko Uhoraho ahagurukiye urubanza, ngo arokore intamenyekana zo ku isi." 
Psalms76:11 Ndetse n’ubukana bw’abakurwanya buzaguheshe ikuzo, maze abaguhonotse ubagire imbata." 
Psalms76:12 Nimugirire Uhoraho Imana yanyu amasezerano kandi mujye muyuzuza; mwebwe mwese abamwegereye, nimuzanire amaturo Imana y’Impangare." 
Psalms76:13 Ni we ucubya ubwirasi bw’ibikomangoma, agakangaranya abami b’isi." 
Psalms77:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, na Yedutuni. Iyi zaburi iri mu iza Asafu." 
Psalms77:2 Imana ni yo niyambaza, ndayitabaza, Imana ni yo niyambaza, kandi iranyumva." 
Psalms77:3 Igihe ndi mu kaga, ndangamira Uhoraho, mutegera amaboko ijoro ryose, ubutarambirwa, mbona ko nta kindi cyampoza." 
Psalms77:4 Iyo nibutse Imana, nsuhuza umutima, nakomeza kubizirikana, ngacika intege." 
Psalms77:5 Nyagasani, ntutuma ngoheka, mfite igishyika, nabuze icyo mvuga;" 
Psalms77:6 ndibuka iminsi ya kera, n’imyaka yo mu gihe cyahise;" 
Psalms77:7 ijoro ryose nkarara nibaza, ntekereza nshaka uko nabyumva." 
Psalms77:8 Mbese Uhoraho yadutererana burundu, bigatuma atazongera kudutonesha ukundi?" 
Psalms77:9 Mbese impuhwe ze zaba zarakamye, akaba nta cyo agifite kutubwira?" 
Psalms77:10 Mbese Imana yibagiwe impuhwe zayo? Uburakari se bwatumye idukuraho umutima? 
Psalms77:11 Ndibwira nti «Umubabaro wanjye, ni uko Nyir’ijuru yatuzinutswe!»" 
Psalms77:12 Ndibuka ibikorwa byose by’Uhoraho, nkiyibutsa ibitangaza byawe bya kera," 
Psalms77:13 nkazirikana ubutwari bwawe, maze nkagarukira ibigwi byawe." 
Psalms77:14 Mana, mbega uko inzira zawe ziboneye! Nta yindi mana yindi yagusumba!" 
Psalms77:15 Ni wowe wenyine ukora ibintu by’agatangaza: wagaragarije amahanga yose ububasha bwawe. 
Psalms77:16 Umuryango wawe wagobotowe n’ukuboko kwawe, ari bo nkomoko ya Yakobo na Yozefu." 
Psalms77:17 Mana, amazi yarakurabutswe, amazi yarakurabutswe maze arihinda, aribirindura kugeza no hasi ikuzimu!" 
Psalms77:18 Ibicu byavubuye amazi menshi, ari na ko inkuba zikubita, n’imyambi yawe inyuranamo." 
Psalms77:19 Uko inkuba yawe yoromaga, n’imirabyo ikamurika hose, ni na ko isi yatigitaga, igahinda umushyitsi." 
Psalms77:20 Wihangiye inzira mu nyanja, uca ikirari mu ndiri yayo, ntihagira n’umwe umenya aho unyuze." 
Psalms77:21 Umuryango wawe wawuyoboye nk’ishyo, ukoresheje ikiganza cya Musa na Aroni." 
Psalms78:1 Ni igisigo cya Asafu Muryango wanjye, wumve neza ibyo nkwigisha, utege amatwi amagambo y’umunwa wanjye;" 
Psalms78:2 ngiye kuvugira mu migani, ngo ntangaze amayoberane y’ibihe byahise." 
Psalms78:3 Ibyo twabwiwe, kandi tumenyereye, ibyo ba data batugejejeho," 
Psalms78:4 natwe ntituzabihisha abana bacu, ahubwo tuzamenyesha urubyaro rwacu, ibyo bazakurizaho gusingiza Uhoraho, ububasha bwe n’ibyiza yakoze." 
Psalms78:5 Yashingiye itegeko Yakobo, ashyiraho amabwiriza muri Israheli, ategeka ababyeyi bacu kubimenyesha abana babo," 
Psalms78:6 kugira ngo ab’igisekuruza kizaza babimenye, ari bo bana bazavuka, ngo na bo bazabigeze ku mbyaro zabo." 
Psalms78:7 Ni ibyo bizatuma bizera Imana, bakirinda kwibagirwa ibyo yakoze, ahubwo bagahugukira amategeko yayo;" 
Psalms78:8 bityo ntibazabe nk’ababyeyi babo, igisekuruza kitagira umutima ushyitse, ntikigire imigambi ihuje n’iy'Imana." 
Psalms78:9 Abo mu muryango wa Efurayimu bari bazi kurashisha umuheto, niba baratsimbuwe ku rugamba," 
Psalms78:10 ni uko bataye Isezerano ry’Imana, bakanga gukurikiza amategeko yayo." 
Psalms78:11 Biyibagije ibigwi byayo, n’ibyiza yari yarabagiriye," 
Psalms78:12 bya bitangaza yakoreye imbere y’ababyeyi babo, mu gihugu cya Misiri, mu mirambi ya Tanisi." 
Psalms78:13 Yasatuye inyanja, maze irabahitisha, kandi ihagarika amazi nk’inkike;" 
Psalms78:14 ku manywa ibayoboza agacu kererana, n’icyezezi cy’umuriro buri joro." 
Psalms78:15 Yasaturiye ibitare mu butayu, ngo ibuhire isoko y’amazi afutse;" 
Psalms78:16 urutare irubyaza imigezi itemba nk’amasumo. 
Psalms78:17 Nyamara bo bakomeje kuyicumuraho aho mu butayu, bagarambira Imana Isumbabyose;" 
Psalms78:18 biyemeza kwinja Imana, bayaka ibyo kurya ngo bahage." 
Psalms78:19 Bitotombeye Imana, bavuga bati «Mbese Imana yashobora kuduterera ameza mu butayu?" 
Psalms78:20 Ni koko, yakubise urutare, iruvuburamo imigezi y’amazi; ariko se, yashobora no gutanga umugati, cyangwa ikabonera inyama umuryango wayo?»" 
Psalms78:21 Uhoraho amaze kubyumva ararakara, umuriro wokera Yakobo, uburakari bugurumanira Israheli," 
Psalms78:22 kuko batari bizeye Imana, ntibiringire ubuvunyi bwayo." 
Psalms78:23 Nuko itegeka ibicu byo hejuru, maze yugurura amarembo y’ijuru;" 
Psalms78:24 ibanyanyagizaho manu ngo barye, ibaha ingano zo mu ijuru," 
Psalms78:25 muntu arya umugati w’abamalayika, iboherereza ibiribwa bibamaze ipfa." 
Psalms78:26 Nyuma ihuhera umuyaga w’iburasirazuba, kandi ku bubasha bwayo izana umuyaga w’amajyepfo," 
Psalms78:27 maze ibamanuriraho inyama zinganya ubwinshi n’umukungugu, ibagushaho inyoni z’uruhuri, nk’umusenyi wo ku nyanja;" 
Psalms78:28 izirekurira rwagati mu ngando, hirya no hino y’amahema yabo." 
Psalms78:29 Bararya, maze barahaga, ibamara ityo irari bari bafite." 
Psalms78:30 Igihe batarashira ipfa, bagifite ibiryo mu kanwa," 
Psalms78:31 uburakari bw’Imana burabagwira, maze ibicamo ab’intwari, igubangura abanyamaboko ba Israheli." 
Psalms78:32 Nyamara ibyo ntibyababujije gucumura, no kutizera ibitangaza byayo." 
Psalms78:33 Noneho ubuzima bwabo, ibuhuha nk’umuyaga, n’imyaka yabo ihita vuba na bwangu." 
Psalms78:34 Iyo yabiraragamo, ni bwo bayishakashakaga, bakisubiraho, bakayigarukira!" 
Psalms78:35 Ubwo bakibuka ko Imana ari yo rutare begamiye, ko Isumbabyose ari yo ibarengera!" 
Psalms78:36 Cyakora ntibayibwizaga ukuri, yari amagambo yo ku rurimi gusa;" 
Psalms78:37 umutima wabo wari uyiri kure, n’Isezerano ryayo bataryizeye." 
Psalms78:38 Nyamara yo, Nyir’ibambe, aho kubarimbura, ikabababarira; kenshi yacubije uburakari bwayo, ntiyakurikiza uko bayibabaje." 
Psalms78:39 Yibuka ko ari abantu gusa, barimo umwuka ushira vuba, ntugaruke." 
Psalms78:40 Mbega ngo barayigarambira mu butayu, bakayirakariza kenshi ahadatuwe!" 
Psalms78:41 Bongeye kwinja Imana, no gushavuza Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli," 
Psalms78:42 bibagirwa ibyo yabakoreye umunsi ibagobotora mu minwe y’abanzi! 
Psalms78:43 Nyamara yerekaniye ibimenyetso byayo mu Misiri, ikorera n’ibitangaza mu mirambi ya Tanisi;" 
Psalms78:44 imiyoboro y’amazi iyihindura amaraso, kugira ngo batanywa ku migezi yabo." 
Psalms78:45 Yaboherereje ibibugu birabarya, n’imitubu irabajujubya;" 
Psalms78:46 iterereza inzige mu myaka yabo, n’ibihore mu mbuto bavunikiye." 
Psalms78:47 Imizabibu yabo yayirimbuje urubura, n’imivumu yabo iyikobaguza amahindu;" 
Psalms78:48 amatungo yabo iyagabiza urubura, n’amashyo yabo iyaterereza inkuba." 
Psalms78:49 Yabateje umuriro w’uburakari bwayo, umujinya, ubukana, n’ubumanjirwe, ibagabiza igitero cy’abamalayika b’icyorezo." 
Psalms78:50 Mu burakari bwayo ntiyabaterereje urupfu gusa, ahubwo ubuzima bwabo bwose, ibuteza umuze." 
Psalms78:51 Nuko inangura icyitwa uburiza cyose mu Misiri, n’abavutse mbere bo mu mahema ya Kamu!" 
Psalms78:52 Hanyuma ihagurutsa imbaga y’umuryango wayo, iwuyobora mu butayu nk’ubushyo bw’intama." 
Psalms78:53 Ibayoborana ituze, nta kibatera inkeke, naho abanzi babo barenzweho n’inyanja." 
Psalms78:54 Yabinjije mu gihugu cyayo gitagatifu, ari wo musozi wigaruriwe n’indyo yayo." 
Psalms78:55 Yirukanye amahanga imbere yabo, igihugu cyayo ikibagabanyamo iminani, amahema yayo iyatuzamo imiryango ya Israheli." 
Psalms78:56 Nyamara bakomeje kugomera Imana Isumbabyose, no kuyitambamira baca ku mategeko yayo;" 
Psalms78:57 barayitengushye kimwe n’abasekuruza babo, basa n’umuheto uregutse ugatetereza nyirawo." 
Psalms78:58 Bayibabaje bajya mu masengero y’ahirengeye, bayitera ishyari kubera ibigirwamana byabo." 
Psalms78:59 Imana ibibonye ityo, irarakara, maze ihigika umuryango wa Israheli burundu;" 
Psalms78:60 yimuka mu Ngoro y’i Silo, mu ihema yari yarashinze rwagati mu bantu." 
Psalms78:61 Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano yaraburetse buranyagwa, icyayiheshaga ikuzo kigwa mu maboko y’abanzi;" 
Psalms78:62 umuryango wayo iwugabiza inkota, yibasira abari imbata zayo." 
Psalms78:63 Umuriro urimbura abasore babo, naho abakobwa babo ntibatahirwa ubukwe;" 
Psalms78:64 abaherezabitambo bicishwa inkota, maze abapfakazi babo ntibabaririra." 
Psalms78:65 Ubwo Nyagasani arakanguka, nk’uwari usinziriye, nk’intwari isindutse divayi;" 
Psalms78:66 maze atsemba abanzi abaturutse inyuma, abakoza isoni ibi bidasubirwaho." 
Psalms78:67 Ahigika umuryango wa Yozefu n’inzu ya Efurayimu ntiyayitora; 
Psalms78:68 ahubwo ahitamo inzu ya Yuda, umusozi wa Siyoni yikundira." 
Psalms78:69 Ahubaka Ingoro ye, arayikomeza nk’ibitwa by’ijuru, mbese nk’isi yashinze ubuziraherezo." 
Psalms78:70 Nuko yitorera Dawudi ho umugaragu, amukuye mu rwuri rw’intama;" 
Psalms78:71 amuvana inyuma y’intama zonsa, kugira ngo aragire Yakobo, umuryango we, na Israheli, umurage we." 
Psalms78:72 Na we abaragirana umutima udakemwa, maze abayoborana ubwitonzi n’ubuhanga." 
Psalms79:1 Ni zaburi ya Asafu Mana, abanyamahanga barakurengereye, bahumanije Ingoro yawe ntagatifu, Yeruzalemu bayihinduye amatongo." 
Psalms79:2 Imirambo y’abagaragu bawe, bayigaburiye ibisiga byo mu kirere; imibiri y’abayoboke bawe, bayigaburira inyamaswa zo ku gasozi." 
Psalms79:3 Amaraso yabo bayamennye nk’umuvu w’amazi, mu mpande zose za Yeruzalemu, kandi nta wasigaye ngo abahambe." 
Psalms79:4 Abaturanyi bacu baradutuka, twahindutse insuzugurwa mu badukikije." 
Psalms79:5 Mbese Uhoraho, uzarakara na ryari? ishyari ryawe se rizakomeza rigurumane nk’umuriro?" 
Psalms79:6 Ahubwo curira uburakari bwawe kuri ariya mahanga atakuzi, no kuri biriya bihugu bitakwiyambaza," 
Psalms79:7 kuko bariye Yakobo, umuryango wawe, bakayogoza umutungo we." 
Psalms79:8 Ntuduhore ibicumuro by’abasekuruza bacu, udusanganize bwangu impuhwe zawe, kuko tugeze ahaga!" 
Psalms79:9 Dutabare, Mana y’agakiza kacu, ugiriye ikuzo ry’izina ryawe; turokore, maze utubabarire ibyaha byacu, ugiriye izina ryawe." 
Psalms79:10 Ni iki cyatuma amahanga avuga ngo «Mbese Imana yabo iba hehe?» Nibabimenye, natwe tubyirebere, ko uhorera amaraso y’abagaragu bawe." 
Psalms79:11 Wumvane impuhwe amaganya y’ababoshye; wowe ufite ubushobozi umenye ubuzima bw’abaciriwe urwo gupfa. 
Psalms79:12 Nyagasani, inabi wagiriwe n’abaturanyi bacu, urayikube karindwi ibashegeshe umutima." 
Psalms79:13 Naho twebwe, umuryango wawe, ubushyo wiragiriye, tuzakuririmbire ibisingizo iteka, mu mbyaro zose twamamaze ikuzo ryawe." 
Psalms80:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Mu ijwi rya «Lisi y’Isezerano». Ni zaburi ya Asafu. 
Psalms80:2 Mushumba wa Israheli, tega amatwi, wowe uyobora Yozefu nk’ubushyo, wowe wicaye hejuru y’Abakerubimu, garagaza uwo uri we!" 
Psalms80:3 Mu maso ya Efurayimu, Benyamini na Manase, garagaza ububasha bwawe, maze udutabare!" 
Psalms80:4 Mana, tuzahure; ubengeranishe uruhanga rwawe, maze dukire!" 
Psalms80:5 Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, uzahereza he kurakara, kandi umuryango wawe ukwiyambaza?" 
Psalms80:6 Abawe wabahagije agahinda, ubuhira amarira barayasinda;" 
Psalms80:7 watugize irwaniro ry’abaturanyi, abanzi bacu baduhindura urw’amenyo!" 
Psalms80:8 Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, tuzahure, ubengeranishe uruhanga rwawe, maze dukire!" 
Psalms80:9 Mu Misiri wahagemuye umuzabibu, wirukana amahanga, ngo wongere uwutere;" 
Psalms80:10 wawukijije ibyari biwubambiye, na wo ushora imizi, ukwira igihugu cyose." 
Psalms80:11 Igicucu cyawo cyatwikiriye imisozi, maze amashami yawo yugamisha n’amasederi yatumburutse;" 
Psalms80:12 ugaba amashami yawo kugeza ku nyanja, n’imishibuka yawo igera ku Ruzi." 
Psalms80:13 Ni kuki waciye icyuho mu ruzitiro rwawo, ukaba usoromwa n’abahisi n’abagenzi;" 
Psalms80:14 amasatura ava mu ishyamba akawonona, n’inyamaswa z’agasozi zikawurisha?" 
Psalms80:15 Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, dukundire, ugaruke, urebere mu ijuru, witegereze, maze utabare uwo muzabibu;" 
Psalms80:16 urengere igishyitsi witereye, n’umucwira ugukesha imbaraga." 
Psalms80:17 Abawutwitse bakawurimbura, bazamarwe n’umunya w’uruhanga rwawe!" 
Psalms80:18 Ikiganza cyawe kizahore kiramburiye kuri ya Ntore ishyigikiwe n’ukuboko kwawe, uwo mwana w’umuntu ugukesha imbaraga." 
Psalms80:19 Bityo ntituzongera kuguhungaho, uzatubeshaho, twiyambaze izina ryawe." 
Psalms80:20 Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, tuzahure, ubengeranishe uruhanga rwawe, maze dukire." 
Psalms81:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha, ikajyana n’inanga y’Abagati. Ya Asafu." 
Psalms81:2 Nimuvugirize impundu Uhoraho, we mbaraga zacu, nimuhimbaze Imana ya Yakobo;" 
Psalms81:3 Ngaho nimuririmbe, muvuze ishako, mucurange inanga, ijyane n’iningiri;" 
Psalms81:4 nimuvuze impanda ku mboneko y’ukwezi, no ku nzora yako, umunsi wacu w’ibirori." 
Psalms81:5 Iryo ni itegeko muri Israheli, ryishyiriweho n’Imana ya Yakobo," 
Psalms81:6 itegeko yashinze inzu ya Yozefu, igihe yibasiye igihugu cya Misiri. Ndumva imvugo idasanzwe ngo" 
Psalms81:7 «Urutugu rwe naruruhuye umuzigo, n’ibiganza bye birekura agatebo!" 
Psalms81:8 Igihe untakambiye uri mu kaga, ndagutabara; ngusubiza nihishe mu bicu no mu nkuba, nkugeragereza ku mazi y’i Meriba." 
Psalms81:9 Umva, muryango wanjye, nkuburire, Israheli, iyaba washoboraga kunyumva!" 
Psalms81:10 Iwawe ntihakabe imana yindi, ntugapfukamire imana y’imvamahanga!" 
Psalms81:11 Ndi Uhoraho, Imana yawe, yakuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri; wasamure cyane umunwa wawe, nzawuzuza." 
Psalms81:12 Nyamara, umuryango wanjye ntiwumvise ijwi ryanjye, kandi Israheli ntiyanyumvira;" 
Psalms81:13 nuko mbarekera ubugundire bw’umutima wabo, ngo bikurikirire ibyifuzo byabo." 
Psalms81:14 Iyaba ariko umuryango wanjye wanyumvaga! Iyaba Israheli yagenderaga mu nzira zanjye," 
Psalms81:15 mu kanya gato nakubita abanzi bayo, ngacyamurira ikiganza ku bayirwanya," 
Psalms81:16 abanga Uhoraho bagatangira kumukeza, bagahora bakangaranye ubuziraherezo!" 
Psalms81:17 Naho umuryango wanjye nkawutungisha ingogore y’ingano, maze nkawuhaza ubuki bwo mu rutare!»" 
Psalms82:1 Ni zaburi ya Asafu. Imana ihagaze mu ikoraniro ry’ibyegera byayo, iracira imanza rwagati mu bikomangoma;" 
Psalms82:2 iti «Muzahereza he guca imanza zidahwitse, no gushyigikira abagiranabi mubabera?" 
Psalms82:3 Ahubwo nimurenganure abanyantege nke n’impfubyi, murengere imbabare n’indushyi;" 
Psalms82:4 nimurokore umunyantegenke n’umukene, mubagobotore mu minwe y’abagome!" 
Psalms82:5 Ariko nta cyo baramenya, nta n’icyo bumva, bararindagira mu mwijima, bigeza n’aho inkingi z’isi zijegajega." 
Psalms82:6 Jyewe narivugiye nti ’Muri imana, kandi mwese muri abana b’Umusumbabyose!" 
Psalms82:7 Nyamara, muzapfa kimwe na rubanda, maze muzashire nk’ikinyamubiri cyose!’»" 
Psalms82:8 Uhoraho, haguruka ucire isi urubanza, kuko ari wowe mugenga w’amahanga yose." 
Psalms83:1 Iyi zaburi ni indirimbo ya Asafu. 
Psalms83:2 Mana, wikomeza kwicecekera; wirebera gusa nk’ikiragi!" 
Psalms83:3 Dore ngaha abanzi bawe barahinda, n’abakurwanya babyukije umutwe." 
Psalms83:4 Baragambanira umuryango wawe, banamanama kugusha abo urengera;" 
Psalms83:5 baravuga ngo «Nimuze dutsembe umuryango wabo, maze izina rya Israheli rye kuzavugwa ukundi!»" 
Psalms83:6 Bahurije inama hamwe, bumvikanira kukurwanya." 
Psalms83:7 Abo ni abatuye Edomu n’Abayismaheli, ab’i Mowabu, na bene Hagara," 
Psalms83:8 bene Gebali, Hamoni na Amaleki, Abafilisiti hamwe n’Abanyatiri;" 
Psalms83:9 ndetse n’Abanyashuru bifatanyije na bo, ngo batize amaboko bene Loti." 
Psalms83:10 Uzabagire nk’ab’i Madiyani na Sizera, nka Yabini ku mugezi wa Kishoni;" 
Psalms83:11 bashiriye ku iriba rya Harodi, bahinduka ifumbire y’ubutaka." 
Psalms83:12 Ibikomangoma byabo uzabigenzereze nka Orebu na Zehebu, abatware babo bose ubagire nka Zebahi na Salimuna," 
Psalms83:13 bo bari barihaye kuvuga ngo «Twigarurire igikingi cy’Imana!» 
Psalms83:14 Mana yanjye, urabahungabanye nk’uko umurama uhuherwa n’umuyaga." 
Psalms83:15 Nk’uko umuriro uyogoza ishyamba, cyangwa ikirimi cyawo kikababura imisozi," 
Psalms83:16 nawe ubakurikize inkubi y’umuyaga, bahahamurwe na serwakira." 
Psalms83:17 Uruhanga rwabo urukwize ikimwaro, maze babaririze izina ryawe, Uhoraho!" 
Psalms83:18 Bazahorane iteka isoni n’ubwoba, babure amizero, bicwe n’ikimwaro;" 
Psalms83:19 maze bazamenyereho ko ari wowe wenyine, Uhoraho, Umusumbabyose ku isi hose!" 
Psalms84:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ikajyana n’inanga y’Abagati. Ni zaburi y’abahungu ba Kore. 
Psalms84:2 Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, mbega ngo ingoro zawe zirantera ubwuzu!" 
Psalms84:3 Umutima wanjye wahogojwe no gukumbura inkomane z’Uhoraho; umutima wanjye n’umubiri wanjye, biravugiriza impundu, Imana Nyir’ubuzima." 
Psalms84:4 Ndetse n’igishwi cyibonera inzu, n’intashya icyari ishyiramo ibyana byayo, ku ntambiro zawe, Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, Mwami wanjye, kandi Mana yanjye!" 
Psalms84:5 Hahirwa abatuye mu Ngoro yawe, bakagusingiza ubudahwema!" 
Psalms84:6 Hahirwa abantu bisunga ububasha bwawe, bahorana umugambi wo kugana Ingoro yawe." 
Psalms84:7 Iyo bambutse ikibaya cya Rurira, bakibyaza amasoko, maze imvura y’impangukano ikahuzuza ibidendezi." 
Psalms84:8 Uko bagenda ni ko imbaraga zabo ziyongera, maze bagatunguka imbere y’Imana i Siyoni." 
Psalms84:9 Uhoraho, Mana y’ingabo, umva isengesho ryanjye: utege amatwi, Mana ya Yakobo." 
Psalms84:10 Mana, wowe ngabo twikingira, reba, witegereze uruhanga rw’intore yawe." 
Psalms84:11 Kuko umunsi umwe mu nkomane zawe undutira iyindi igihumbi namara ahandi, mpisemo kwigumira mu irebe ry’Ingoro y’Imana yanjye, aho gutura mu mahema y’abagiranabi." 
Psalms84:12 Koko Imana ni izuba, n’ingabo inkingira, Uhoraho agaba ubutoneshwe n’ikuzo; ntiyima ihirwe abagendera mu butungane." 
Psalms84:13 Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, hahirwa umuntu ukwiringira!" 
Psalms85:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi y’abahungu ba Kore. 
Psalms85:2 Uhoraho, watonesheje igihugu cyawe, ugarura bene Yakobo bari barajyanyweho iminyago;" 
Psalms85:3 wababariye umuryango wawe icyaha cyawo, uzimanganya ibicumuro byawo byose." 
Psalms85:4 Wahosheje ubukana bwawe, uzibukira igikatu cy’uburakari bwawe." 
Psalms85:5 Tugarure, Mana mukiza wacu, maze ushire umujinya wari udufitiye." 
Psalms85:6 Mbese uzahora uturakariye igihe cyose, maze uburakari bwawe buhore bwiyongera?" 
Psalms85:7 Si wowe se uzadukomorera ubuzima, maze umuryango wawe ukakuboneramo ibyishimo!" 
Psalms85:8 Uhoraho, twereke impuhwe zawe kandi uduhe agakiza kawe." 
Psalms85:9 Ndashaka kumva icyo Uhoraho Imana avuze; aravuga iby’amahoro y’umuryango we n’abayoboke be, bapfa gusa kudasubira mu busazi bwabo." 
Psalms85:10 Koko ubuvunyi bwe buba hafi y’abamutinya, kugira ngo ikuzo rye rigume mu gihugu cyacu." 
Psalms85:11 Impuhwe n’ubudahemuka byarahuriranye, ubutabera n’amahoro birahoberana." 
Psalms85:12 Ubudahemuka buzamera busagambe ku isi, maze ubutabera bubururukireho buva mu ijuru." 
Psalms85:13 Uhoraho ubwe azabaha ihirwe, maze isi yacu izarumbuke imbuto." 
Psalms85:14 Ubutabera buzamugenda imbere, n’intambwe ze zigaragaze inzira." 
Psalms86:1 Isengesho mu yo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, tega amatwi, unsubize, kuko ndi umunyabyago w’umukene." 
Psalms86:2 Undwaneho kuko nakuyobotse, wowe Mana yanjye, ukize umugaragu wawe ukwiringiye." 
Psalms86:3 Nyagasani, ngirira imbabazi, ni wowe ntakira umunsi wose." 
Psalms86:4 Shimisha umutima w’umugaragu wawe, kuko ari wowe ndangamiye, Nyagasani." 
Psalms86:5 Nyagasani, wowe ugwa neza kandi ukagira ibambe, wowe ugirira impuhwe zihebuje abakwirukira bose." 
Psalms86:6 Utege amatwi, wumve isengesho ryanjye, uhugukire ijwi ryanjye ndagutakambira." 
Psalms86:7 Umunsi w’amage ndakwiyambaza, maze ukansubiza." 
Psalms86:8 Nyagasani, nta mana n’imwe muhwanye! Ibikorwa byawe ntibigereranywa." 
Psalms86:9 Amahanga yose wiremeye azaza agupfukamire, Nyagasani, maze ahimbaze izina ryawe," 
Psalms86:10 kuko uri igihangange, kandi ugakora ibitangaza, wowe wenyine, Mana y’ukuri!" 
Psalms86:11 Uhoraho, unyigishe inzira zawe, nshobore gukurikiza ukuri kwawe; utoze umutima wanjye igitinyiro cy’izina ryawe." 
Psalms86:12 Nyagasani, Mana yanjye, nzakurata n’umutima wanjye wose, nzahimbaza izina ryawe iteka ryose," 
Psalms86:13 kuko impuhwe ungirira ari nyinshi, ukaba warazahuye umutima wanjye mu kuzimu." 
Psalms86:14 Mana yanjye, abirasi barampagurukiye, inteko y’abagiranabi yahigiye kunkuraho; ndetse nawe ntibanakwitaho." 
Psalms86:15 Ariko wowe, Nyagasani, Mana y’imbabazi n’impuhwe, wowe utinda kurakara, wowe wuje urukundo n’ubudahemuka," 
Psalms86:16 ngarukira maze undwaneho, utere inkunga umugaragu wawe, urokore umwana w’umuja wawe." 
Psalms86:17 Ugaragaze ko ngufiteho ubutoni, maze abanyibasiye bazakorwe n’isoni, nibabona ko ari wowe, Uhoraho, untabara ukampoza." 
Psalms87:1 Ni indirimbo, iri muri zaburi z’abahungu ba Kore. Siyoni yubatse hejuru y’imisozi mitagatifu:" 
Psalms87:2 Uhoraho akunda amarembo yayo kurusha ingoro zose za Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Abakuvuga bose baragusingiza, wowe, murwa w’Uhoraho!" 
Psalms87:4 «Mbarira Misiri na Babiloni mu bihugu binzi, kimwe n’Ubufilisiti, Tiri na Etiyopiya; hamwe n’abahavukiye bose!" 
Psalms87:5 Naho Siyoni bose bazayite ’Mubyeyi!’ kuko buri muntu wese ayivukamo, kandi Umusumbabyose, ni we uyikomeje.»" 
Psalms87:6 Uhoraho yandika mu gitabo cy’imiryango, ati «Uyu n’uriya, na bo bayivukiyemo!»" 
Psalms87:7 Maze ababyinnyi n’abaririmbyi bazatangarize hamwe ikuzo ryawe, Murwa w’Uhoraho!" 
Psalms88:1 Ni indirimbo iri muri zaburi z’abahungu ba Kore. Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ikaririmbwa bikiranya mu majwi anyuranamo.... Iri mu za Hemani, Umwezirahi." 
Psalms88:2 Uhoraho, Mana Mukiza wanjye, ndagutakira amanywa n’ijoro;" 
Psalms88:3 wakirane ubwuzu isengesho ryanjye, maze utege amatwi amaganya yanjye." 
Psalms88:4 Kuko nugarijwe n’ibyago, n’urupfu rukaba rundi hafi." 
Psalms88:5 Nsigaye mbarirwa mu batakiriho, nk’umuntu washizemo agatege." 
Psalms88:6 Umwanya wanjye uri mu bapfuye, kimwe n’intumbi zirambitse mu mva, izo utacyibuka ukundi, kuko wabakuyeho amaboko." 
Psalms88:7 Wanzitse ikuzimu mu rwobo, mu mwijima w’icuraburindi;" 
Psalms88:8 uburakari bwawe buranshikamira n’imivumba yawe irancundagura. 
Psalms88:9 Abari abanjye bose ubancaho, ungira agaterashozi mu maso yabo; ubu ndaboshye, ubutinyagambura," 
Psalms88:10 nahumye amaso kubera agahinda. Uhoraho, ndagutabaza umunsi wose, nteze ibiganza mbikwerekejeho." 
Psalms88:11 Mbese abapfuye ni bo uzakorera ibitangaza? Hari ubwo se baziyegura ngo bagusingize? 
Psalms88:12 Mbese mu mva ni ho baratira impuhwe zawe, cyangwa bakahavugira ubudahemuka bwawe?" 
Psalms88:13 Mbese mu mwijima hari icyo bazi ku bitangaza byawe, cyangwa cy’ubutabera bwawe mu gihugu cy’abibagiranye?" 
Psalms88:14 Ariko jyewe, ndagutakira, Uhoraho, kuva mu gitondo mba nakugejejeho isengesho ryanjye." 
Psalms88:15 Uhoraho, ni iki cyatuma untererana, ukampisha uruhanga rwawe?" 
Psalms88:16 Nararushye ngera kure kuva mu buto bwanjye! Narihanganye, none ndananiwe." 
Psalms88:17 Uburakari bwawe bwaranyokereye, urancundagura none nsigaye ndi ubusa." 
Psalms88:18 Bwarangose nk’amazi umunsi wose, bunkoraniraho icyarimwe uko bungana." 
Psalms88:19 Abari abanjye bose wabanciyeho, nsigaye ntaramana n’umwijima." 
Psalms89:1 Ni inyigisho iri mu za Etani, Umwezirahi." 
Psalms89:2 Nzaririmba iteka ryose impuhwe z’Uhoraho, kuva mu gisekuruza kujya mu kindi; umunwa wanjye nzawamamarisha ubudahemuka bwawe," 
Psalms89:3 kuko wavuze uti «Impuhwe zashyizweho ubuziraherezo, ubudahemuka bwanjye bushinze umuzi mu ijuru." 
Psalms89:4 Nagiranye isezerano n’intore yanjye, nuko ndahira Dawudi, umugaragu wanjye nti" 
Psalms89:5 ’Inkomoko yawe nyishyizeho ubuziraherezo, kandi intebe yawe y’ubwami, nzayikomeza kuva mu gisekuruza kujya mu kindi.’»" 
Psalms89:6 Uhoraho, ijuru niryamamaze ibitangaza byawe, n’ubudahemuka bwawe mu ikoraniro ry’intungane." 
Psalms89:7 Mbese hejuru iyo, ni nde wagereranywa n’Uhoraho? Ni nde mu batuye ijuru wagereranywa n’Uhoraho?" 
Psalms89:8 Uhoraho ni igihangange mu ikoraniro ry’intungane, arusha igitinyiro ibyegera bye byose." 
Psalms89:9 Uhoraho, Mana y’ingabo, ni nde umeze nkawe? Uhoraho, uri impangare, ukikijwe n’ubudahemuka!" 
Psalms89:10 Ni wowe uhosha ubwivumbagatanye bw’inyanja, ugacubya imivumba yayo yatutumbye." 
Psalms89:11 Ni wowe wahonyoye Rahabu nk’intumbi, abanzi bawe ubasanjisha ukuboko kwawe k’ububasha." 
Psalms89:12 Ijuru ni iryawe, isi na yo ni iyawe, umubumbe w’isi n’ibiwurimo, ni wowe wabihanze." 
Psalms89:13 Amajyaruguru n’amajyepfo, ni wowe wabiremye, Taboru na Herimoni birasingiza izina ryawe." 
Psalms89:14 Ni wowe nyir’ukuboko k’ubutwari, nyir’ikiganza cy’ububasha n’indyo y’impangare." 
Psalms89:15 Ubutabera n’ubucamanza ni ikibanza cy’intebe yawe, impuhwe n’ubudahemuka bikugenda imbere." 
Psalms89:16 Hahirwa umuryango wamenyereye kugusingiza, ukagendera mu cyezezi cy’uruhanga rwawe, Uhoraho;" 
Psalms89:17 umunsi bahimbazwa n’izina ryawe, bagaterwa ishema n’ubutabera bwawe," 
Psalms89:18 kuko ubatera inkunga y’ikirenga, maze ugatuma twubura uruhanga." 
Psalms89:19 Uhoraho, ni wowe ngabo twikingira, kandi umwami wacu akomejwe na Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Psalms89:20 Kera wavuganiye n’abayoboke bawe mu ibonekerwa, maze uravuga uti «Nateye inkunga umuntu w’intwari, umwana w’umusore mutora muri rubanda." 
Psalms89:21 Nsanga Dawudi yambera umugaragu, maze musiga amavuta yanjye matagatifu;" 
Psalms89:22 ikiganza cyanjye kizamuramira, n’ukuboko kwanjye kuzamutize imbaraga!" 
Psalms89:23 Nta bwo azatungurwa n’umwanzi, n’umubisha nta bwo azamukangaranya;" 
Psalms89:24 abamutambamiye nzabararika imbere ye, maze abamwanga nzabacurangure." 
Psalms89:25 Ubudahemuka bwanjye n’impuhwe zanjye bizahorana na we, maze azegure umutwe kubera izina ryanjye." 
Psalms89:26 Nzamuha kugenga inyanja, azagire n’ububasha ku nzuzi." 
Psalms89:27 We azanyiyambaza, agira ati ’Uri Data, uri Imana yanjye, uri urutare nkesha agakiza!’" 
Psalms89:28 Nanjye nzamugira imfura yanjye, n’ikirenga mu bami b’isi." 
Psalms89:29 Nzamukomereza impuhwe zanjye ubuziraherezo, kandi iryo sezerano ntirizasubirwaho." 
Psalms89:30 Ingoma ye nzayikomeza iteka, n’intebe ye y’ubwami izarambe nk’ijuru." 
Psalms89:31 Abana be nibarenga ku mategeko yanjye maze ntibakurikize amabwiriza yanjye," 
Psalms89:32 nibaca ku matangazo yanjye, kandi ntibakomeze amategeko yanjye," 
Psalms89:33 igicumuro cyabo nzagihanisha umunyafu, n’icyaha cyabo ngihanishe inkoni." 
Psalms89:34 Ariko sinzamunyaga impuhwe zanjye, kandi sinzahemuka ku Isezerano ryanjye." 
Psalms89:35 Sinzahuganya Isezerano ryanjye, kandi sinzisubira ku byo navuze." 
Psalms89:36 Narahirishije rimwe rizima ubutagatifu bwanjye, sinabeshya Dawudi bibaho!" 
Psalms89:37 Inkomoko ye izahoraho ubuziraherezo, n’intebe ye y’ubwami izahoraho imbere yanjye nk’izuba;" 
Psalms89:38 izahoraho ubudahungabana nk’ukwezi kuzaba gihamya, idahinyuka mu kirere.»" 
Psalms89:39 Cyakora, wowe wahigitse intore yawe, urayisuzugura kandi urayirakarira;" 
Psalms89:40 wihakanye isezerano wagiranye n’umugaragu wawe, uhumanya ikamba rye maze urita hasi!" 
Psalms89:41 Waciye ibyuho mu nzitiro ze zose, ingerero ze zose uzigira amatongo;" 
Psalms89:42 abahisi n’abagenzi baramusahura, abaturanyi be bose baramunnyega." 
Psalms89:43 Washishikaje abamutambamiye, abanzi be ubatera ishema;" 
Psalms89:44 inkota ye uyimaraho ubugi, maze ntiwamutera inkunga mu mirwano." 
Psalms89:45 Wamushikuje mu kiganza inkoni y’ubwami, maze intebe ye uyitembagaza hasi;" 
Psalms89:46 wageruye iminsi y’ubusore bwe, umukwiza ikimwaro." 
Psalms89:47 Uhoraho, uzihisha ugeze na ryari? Mbese uburakari bwawe buzakomeza bugurumane?" 
Psalms89:48 Uribuke ko ubuzima bwanjye ari bugufi cyane, ko bene muntu wabaremeye ubusa!" 
Psalms89:49 Ni nde muntu uzabaho, maze ntahure n’urupfu, amagara ye akayarura mu nzara z’ikuzimu?" 
Psalms89:50 Mbese za mpuhwe zawe za kera zahereye he, Nyagasani, izo wari warasezeraniye Dawudi mu budahemuka bwawe?" 
Psalms89:51 Uhoraho, uzirikane ukuntu basuzugura umugaragu wawe, hamwe n’iyi mbaga yose ndagijwe." 
Psalms89:52 Uhoraho, abanzi bawe barannyega, bagakurikiza umuvumo intore yawe!" 
Psalms89:53 Uhoraho aragasingizwa iteka ryose! Amen! Amen! 
Psalms90:1 Isengesho rya Musa, umuntu w’Imana. Nyagasani watubereye ikiramiro, kuva mu gisekuruza kujya mu kindi." 
Psalms90:2 Mbere y’uko imisozi ibaho, isi n’ibiyiriho byose bitararemwa, uri Imana iteka ryose rizira iherezo." 
Psalms90:3 Abantu ubasubiza mu mukungugu, kuko wavuze uti «Bene muntu, nimusubire iyo mwavuye!»" 
Psalms90:4 Mu maso yawe imyaka igihumbi ni nk’umunsi w’ejo wahise, ni nk’isaha imwe y’ijoro." 
Psalms90:5 Ubuzima bwa muntu ubukuraho nk’ibitotsi, bishira mu gitondo nk’icyatsi;" 
Psalms90:6 mu gitondo kirarabya, ururabyo rugakura, nimugoroba rukarabirana, rugahunguka." 
Psalms90:7 Ni koko uburakari bwawe buradushegesha, maze ubukana bwawe bugatuma duhungabana." 
Psalms90:8 Ibyaha byacu ubishyira ahagaragara, urumuri rwawe rutahura amabanga yacu." 
Psalms90:9 Iminsi yacu yose irakendera ku mpamvu y’ubukana bwawe, n’imyaka yacu igahera nk’umwuka uhumekwa rimwe." 
Psalms90:10 Imyaka y’ubugingo bwacu ni mirongo irindwi, na mirongo inani ku bakomeye; nyamara tuyigiramo imiruho n’ibyago gusa, kuko ihita bwangu, maze tukigendera." 
Psalms90:11 Ni nde watahuye uburakari bwawe bukaze, ngo arusheho kubumenya kuko agutinya?" 
Psalms90:12 Utwumvishe ko iminsi yacu ibaze, bityo tuzagire umutima ushishoza." 
Psalms90:13 Uhoraho, tugarukire! Uzaturakarira na ryari? Babarira abagaragu bawe," 
Psalms90:14 utugwirize ineza yawe kuva mu gitondo, kugira ngo duhimbarwe iminsi yose y’ubugingo bwacu;" 
Psalms90:15 udushimishe mu minsi ingana n’iyo waduhannyemo, n’imyaka ingana n’iyo twababayemo!" 
Psalms90:16 Ibikorwa byawe nibigaragarire abagaragu bawe, n’ubuhangare bwawe bwiyereke abana babo!" 
Psalms90:17 Nyagasani Mana yacu, utugaragarize ubugwaneza bwawe, ukomeze imirimo y’amaboko yacu, kandi uyihe kugira akamaro karambye!" 
Psalms91:1 Umuntu utuye aho Usumbabyose yibera, yikinga mu gacucu k’Ushoborabyose." 
Psalms91:2 Ndabwira Uhoraho nti «Uri Ubuhungiro bwanjye, n’inkunga yanjye, Mana yanjye, ni wowe niringiye!»" 
Psalms91:3 Ni we uzakugobotora mu mutego w’umuhigi w’inyoni, anagukize icyorezo kirimbura imbaga." 
Psalms91:4 Azagutwikiriza amababa ye, maze uzahungire mu nsi y’amoya ye; ubudahemuka bwe ni ingabo n’umwambaro w’intamenwa." 
Psalms91:5 Ntuzatinya ibikuramutima by’ijoro, cyangwa umwambi uvumera wo ku manywa," 
Psalms91:6 icyorezo cyubikiye mu mwijima, cyangwa icyago kiyogoza ku manywa y’ihangu." 
Psalms91:7 N’ubwo iruhande rwawe hagwa igihumbi, n’ibihumbi cumi bikagwa iburyo bwawe, wowe ariko ntakizaguhuganya." 
Psalms91:8 Uzabe maso gusa, maze wirebere igihano cy’abagiranabi." 
Psalms91:9 Koko Uhoraho ni wowe miringiro yanjye. Usumbabyose wamugize ubuhungiro bwawe," 
Psalms91:10 icyago ntikizagushyikira, n’icyorezo ntikizegera ihema ryawe," 
Psalms91:11 kuko yategetse abamalayika be kukurinda mu nzira zawe zose. 
Psalms91:12 Bazagutwara mu maboko yabo, ngo ikirenge cyawe kitazatsitara ku ibuye;" 
Psalms91:13 uzakandagira intare n’impiri, uribate urusamagwe n’ikiyoka kinini." 
Psalms91:14 «Ubwo yanyiziritseho nzamuzigura, nzamurinda, kuko azi izina ryanjye." 
Psalms91:15 Nanyiyambaza, nzamwitaba, nzamuba hafi mu gihe cy’amage, nzamurokora, maze nzamuheshe ikuzo." 
Psalms91:16 Nzamuhaza iminsi irambye, maze nzamwereke agakiza kanjye.»" 
Psalms92:1 Ni zaburi. Indirimbo igenewe umunsi wa Sabato. 
Psalms92:2 Ni byiza kugusingiza, Uhoraho, no gucurangira izina ryawe, Musumbabyose;" 
Psalms92:3 kwamamaza ineza yawe kuva mu gitondo, n’ubudahemuka bwawe ijoro ryose," 
Psalms92:4 ku nanga no ku muduri, no mu ijwi ry’iningiri." 
Psalms92:5 Kuko ibyo wakoze, Uhoraho, byanshimishije, nkaba ndata umurimo w’ibiganza byawe." 
Psalms92:6 Mbega ngo ibikorwa byawe, Uhoraho, biraba agatangaza! Mbega ngo ibitekerezo byawe biraba indashyikirwa!" 
Psalms92:7 Ibyo umuntu w’ikiburabwenge ntabimenya, n’uw’igipfayongo ntabisobanukirwa." 
Psalms92:8 Abagome basagamba nk’ibyatsi, abagiranabi bagahora batohagiye, nyamara bazatsiratsizwa buheriheri." 
Psalms92:9 Naho wowe, Uhoraho, uri Indashyikirwa ubuziraherezo;" 
Psalms92:10 ngaha abanzi bawe Uhoraho bagiye kurimbuka, abagiranabi bose batatane." 
Psalms92:11 Wampaye imbaraga nk’iz’imbogo, unsesekazaho amavuta akiri mashyashya;" 
Psalms92:12 ijisho ryanjye ryiboneye abangenzaga, n’amatwi yanjye yiyumviye abangiriraga nabi." 
Psalms92:13 Umuntu w’intungane yatumburutse nk’umukindo, asagamba nka sederi yo muri Libani;" 
Psalms92:14 ameze nk’igiti cyatewe mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, akisanzurira mu nkike z’Imana yacu." 
Psalms92:15 No mu busaza bwe aba akera imbuto, aba acyuzuyemo ubuzima n’ubutohagire," 
Psalms92:16 kugira ngo yamamaze ko Uhoraho ari umunyabutungane, we Rutare rwanjye, ntiyigiramo uburiganya." 
Psalms93:1 Uhoraho ni Umwami, yisesuyeho ubuhangare, Uhoraho yambaye ububasha, yarabukindikije. Isi yarayishinze arayikomeza." 
Psalms93:2 Intebe yawe y’ubwami yashinzwe ubutajegajega, uriho kuva kera na kare!" 
Psalms93:3 Uhoraho, inzuzi zararanguruye, inzuzi zaranguruye ijwi ryazo, inzuzi zaranguruye umuririmo wazo." 
Psalms93:4 Igisumbya ijwi amazi nyamwinshi, kigasumba ibitunda by’inyanja, ni Uhoraho, Urukerereza mu ijuru." 
Psalms93:5 Ibyo waduhishuriye ni amanyakuri; Ingoro yawe ikwiranye n’ubutungane, Uhoraho, uko ibihe bizahora bisimburana." 
Psalms94:1 Uhoraho, Mana ihora inzigo, Mana ihora inzigo, igaragaze!" 
Psalms94:2 Haguruka, mucamanza w’isi, uhimure abirasi!" 
Psalms94:3 Uhoraho, abagiranabi bazahereza he, bazahereza he kwitera hejuru?" 
Psalms94:4 Bihaye kuvuga bihandagaje, abo bagizi ba nabi, bafite uruvugiro." 
Psalms94:5 Uhoraho, umuryango wawe barawutsikamira, umurage wawe barawisha agahato;" 
Psalms94:6 barica umupfakazi n’umusuhuke, impfubyi bakazihotora." 
Psalms94:7 Kandi ni ko bavuga ngo «Uhoraho ntabibona, Imana ya Yakobo ntibyitayeho!»" 
Psalms94:8 Muritonde, mwebwe biburabwenge mu bandi bose! Mwa bipfapfa mwe muzumva ryari?" 
Psalms94:9 Mbese nyir’uguhanga amatwi, ni we utumva? Uwahimbye amaso se, ni we utabona?" 
Psalms94:10 Ukosora amahanga se, ni we udashobora guhana? Uwigisha muntu ubuhanga se, ni we mubura bwenge?" 
Psalms94:11 Uhoraho azi neza ibitekerezo bya muntu, ko ari ubusabusa." 
Psalms94:12 Uhoraho, hahirwa umuntu wowe ukosora, maze ukamwigishisha amategeko yawe," 
Psalms94:13 kugira ngo ahorane ituze mu minsi y’amakuba, igihe umugiranabi acukurirwa imva." 
Psalms94:14 Kuko Uhoraho adatererana umuryango we akaba atareka umurage we; 
Psalms94:15 ubucamanza buzakurikiza ubutabera, ab’umutima ugororotse bose bazabuyoboke." 
Psalms94:16 Ni nde uzamvuganira akankiza abagome, akandenganura imbere y’abagiranabi?" 
Psalms94:17 Iyo Uhoraho ataza kuntabara, hari hato nkiturira mu gihugu cy’abanumye!" 
Psalms94:18 Iyo mvuze nti «Nta ho mpagaze!» ubuntu bwawe, Uhoraho, burandamira;" 
Psalms94:19 igihe impagarara zinyuzuye umutima, ubuhumurize bwawe burampimbaza." 
Psalms94:20 Mbese waba icyitso cy’urukiko rurenganya, rutera amakuba runyuranya n’amategeko?" 
Psalms94:21 Bibasira ubuzima bw’intungane, bagacira urwo gupfa umuziranenge." 
Psalms94:22 Ariko Uhoraho yambereye nk’ubuhungiro butavogerwa, Imana yanjye ni Urutare nikingamo;" 
Psalms94:23 yabituye ububisha bwabo, maze abarimbuza ubugome bwabo, Uhoraho, Imana yacu, arabatsemba!" 
Psalms95:1 Nimuze, tuvugirize impundu Uhoraho, turirimbe Urutare rudukiza;" 
Psalms95:2 tumuhinguke imbere tumurata, tumuririmbire ibisingizo." 
Psalms95:3 Kuko Uhoraho ari Imana y’igihangange, ni Umwami w’igihangange, asumba imana zose." 
Psalms95:4 Ni we ufashe imizi y’isi mu kiganza cye, maze akagenga n’impinga z’imisozi." 
Psalms95:5 Inyanja ni iye, ni we wayiremye, n’ubutaka bwumutse bwabumbwe n’ibiganza bye." 
Psalms95:6 Nimwinjire, duhine umugongo twuname; dutere ivi imbere y’Uhoraho waturemye." 
Psalms95:7 Kuko we ari Imana yacu, naho twe tukaba imbaga yo mu rwuri rwe, n’ubushyo buragiwe n’ikiganza cye. Iyaba uyu munsi mwakundaga mukumva ijwi rye!" 
Psalms95:8 «Ntimunangire umutima wanyu nk’i Meriba, nko ku munsi w’i Masa, mu butayu," 
Psalms95:9 aho abasekuruza banyu banyinjaga, aho bangeragerezaga, n’ubwo bari barabonye ibikorwa byanjye." 
Psalms95:10 Mu myaka mirongo ine nazinutswe iyo nyoko, maze ndavuga nti ’Ni imbaga y’umutima wararutse, ntibazi amayira yanjye!’" 
Psalms95:11 Ni cyo cyatumye ndahirana uburakari ko batazinjira mu buruhukiro bwanjye.» 
Psalms96:1 Nimuririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nshya, isi yose niririmbire Uhoraho!" 
Psalms96:2 Nimuririmbire Uhoraho, musingize izina rye. Uko bukeye mwogeze agakiza ke!" 
Psalms96:3 Nimwamamaze ikuzo rye mu mahanga, n’ibyiza bye mu miryango yose!" 
Psalms96:4 Kuko Uhoraho ari igihangange, akaba akwiye rwose ibisingizo, indahangarwa isumba imana zose;" 
Psalms96:5 kuko imana zose z’amahanga ari ubusa, naho Uhoraho akaba yararemye ijuru." 
Psalms96:6 Arashashagira ubuhangare n’ishema, ingoro ye yuzuye ububasha n’ububengerane." 
Psalms96:7 Nimwegurire Uhoraho, miryango y’amahanga, nimwegurire Uhoraho ikuzo n’ububasha," 
Psalms96:8 nimwegurire Uhoraho ikuzo ry’izina rye. Nimuzane ituro mwinjire mu ngombe ze," 
Psalms96:9 nimwunamire Uhoraho wisesuyeho ubutagatifu, nimuhinde umushyitsi, bantu b’isi yose." 
Psalms96:10 Nimuvuge mu mahanga, muti «Uhoraho ni Umwami!» Yashinze isi yose, ntihungabana; imiryango yose ayicira urubanza rutabera." 
Psalms96:11 Ijuru niryishime, kandi isi nihimbarwe! Inyanja niyorome, n’ibiyirimo byose!" 
Psalms96:12 Imisozi nisabagire kimwe n’ibiyisesuyeho byose, n’ibiti byose by’ishyamba bivugirize impundu icyarimwe," 
Psalms96:13 mu maso y’Uhoraho, kuko aje, kuko aje gutegeka isi; azacira isi urubanza mu butabera, arucire n’imiryango mu butarenganya bwe." 
Psalms97:1 Uhoraho ni Umwami! Isi nihimbarwe, abaturiye inkombe nibasagwe n’ibyishimo!" 
Psalms97:2 Igicu cy’urwijiji kiramukikije, ubutabera n’ubutarenganya ni ikibanza cy’intebe ye." 
Psalms97:3 Ikibatsi cy’umuriro kimugenda imbere, maze kigatwika abanzi be impande zose." 
Psalms97:4 Imirabyo ye iboneshereza isi, ubutaka burabirabukwa, maze bugahinda umushyitsi." 
Psalms97:5 Imisozi irashonga nk’ibishashara, mu maso y’Uhoraho, Umutegetsi w’isi yose." 
Psalms97:6 Ijuru riramamaza ubutabera bwe, maze imiryango yose ikarangamira ikuzo rye." 
Psalms97:7 Abayoboka ibigirwamana bose nibakorwe n’isoni, abiratana bose ibyo bipfabusa; bigirwamana mwese, nimupfukame imbere ye!" 
Psalms97:8 Siyoni yarabyumvise maze irishima, imigi ya Yuda irahimbarwa, ku mpamvu y’imanza zawe, Uhoraho." 
Psalms97:9 Kuko wowe Uhoraho, uri Musumbabyose ku isi yose, utambutse kure imana zose." 
Psalms97:10 Mwebwe abakunda Uhoraho, nimwange ikibi, kuko amenya ubuzima bw’abayoboke be, akabagobotora mu kiganza cy’ababi." 
Psalms97:11 Urumuri rurasira ku ntungane, ab’umutima ugororotse bakagira ibyishimo." 
Psalms97:12 Ntungane, nimwishimire Uhoraho, maze mumusingirize ubutungane bwe." 
Psalms98:1 Zaburi. Nimuririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nshya, kuko yakoze ibintu by’agatangaza; indyo ye, ukuboko kwe k’ubutagatifu byatumye atsinda." 
Psalms98:2 Uhoraho yagaragaje ugutsinda kwe, atangaza ubutabera bwe mu maso y’amahanga." 
Psalms98:3 Yibutse ubuntu bwe n’ubudahemuka bwe, agirira inzu ya Israheli. Imipaka yose y’isi yabonye ugutsinda kw’Imana yacu." 
Psalms98:4 Nimusingize Uhoraho ku isi hose, nimuvuze impundu kandi muririmbe," 
Psalms98:5 nimucurangire Uhoraho ku nanga, ku nanga no mu majwi y’indirimbo," 
Psalms98:6 mu karumbeti no mu ijwi ry’impanda; nimusingize Umwami, Uhoraho." 
Psalms98:7 Inyanja niyorome hamwe n’ibiyirimo, isi yose, hamwe n’abayituye." 
Psalms98:8 Inzuzi nizikome mu mashyi, n’imisozi ivugirize impundu icyarimwe," 
Psalms98:9 imbere y’Uhoraho, kuko aje gutegeka isi; azacira isi urubanza rutabera, arucire n’imiryango mu butarenganya bwe." 
Psalms99:1 Uhoraho ni Umwami, imiryango nihinde umushyitsi; atetse hejuru y’Abakerubimu, isi nihindagane!" 
Psalms99:2 Uhoraho ni igihangange muri Siyoni, yisumbuye kure imiryango yose." 
Psalms99:3 Nibarate izina ryawe ry’impangare kandi ritinyitse: koko uri Nyir’ubutagatifu. 
Psalms99:4 Ububasha bw’umwami ni ugukunda ubutungane. Ni wowe waboneje byose, ni wowe washyize ubutungane n’ubutabera muri Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Nimusingize Uhoraho, Imana yacu, nimupfukame imbere y’akabaho k’ibirenge bye, kuko ari Nyir’ubutagatifu!" 
Psalms99:6 Musa na Aroni bari mu baherezabitambo be, Samweli akaba mu biyambaza izina rye; biyambazaga izina ry’Uhoraho, maze na we akabumva." 
Psalms99:7 Yababwiriraga mu nkingi y’agacu kererana, bagakurikiza amabwiriza ye, n’amategeko yari yarabahaye." 
Psalms99:8 Uhoraho, Mana yacu, wowe warabasubizaga, ubagaragariza ko uri Imana itinda kurakara, ariko ukabahanira n’ibyaha byabo." 
Psalms99:9 Nimurate Uhoraho, Imana yacu, maze mupfukame imbere y’umusozi we mutagatifu, kuko Uhoraho, Imana yacu, ari Nyir’ubutagatifu." 
Psalms100:1 Ni zaburi yo gushimira Nimusingize Uhoraho bantu b’isi yose," 
Psalms100:2 nimumugaragire mwishimye, nimumusanganize impundu z’ibyishimo!" 
Psalms100:3 Nimwemere ko Uhoraho ari we Mana, ni we waturemye, none turi abe, turi umuryango we n’ubushyo yiragiriye." 
Psalms100:4 Nimutahe amarembo ye mumushimira, mwinjirane ibisingizo mu ngombe ze, mumusingize, murate izina rye." 
Psalms100:5 Kuko Uhoraho ari umugwaneza, urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka, ubudahemuka bwe bugahoraho uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana." 
Psalms101:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Ngiye kuririmba impuhwe n’ubutungane, maze ngucurangire, wowe Uhoraho." 
Psalms101:2 Ngiye kwibanda ku nzira y’ubutungane; mbese uzansanganira ryari? Nzaharanira ubutungane bw’umutima wanjye, mu bo tubana." 
Psalms101:3 Sinzigera nshimishwa n’ibidakwiye, nk’uko nanga imyifatire y’abahakanyi; ntiteze kuzanyanduza." 
Psalms101:4 Uw’umutima uryarya arangendere kure; nta ho mpuriye n’ubukozi bw’ibibi. 
Psalms101:5 Ubeshyera mugenzi we rwihishwa, nzamucecekesha. Abasuzugura abandi n’abirata, abo sinzabihanganira." 
Psalms101:6 Mu gihugu, nzahitamo abantu b’inyangamugayo, kugira ngo abe ari bo bankikiza. Ugendera mu nzira iboneye, ni we uzambera umunyamirimo." 
Psalms101:7 Umuntu wazobereye mu kubeshya, nta cyicaro azagira mu nzu yanjye, umunyabinyoma na we, ntazantunguka mu maso." 
Psalms101:8 Buri gitondo nzatsemba abagiranabi bose bo mu gihugu, kugira ngo abakora ibibi bose, mbarimbure mu murwa w’Uhoraho." 
Psalms102:1 Isengesho ry’umunyabyago igihe adandabiranye, maze agatura Imana amaganya ye." 
Psalms102:2 Uhoraho, umva isengesho ryanjye, induru yanjye nikugereho!" 
Psalms102:3 Ntukampishe uruhanga rwawe umunsi nasumbirijwe; jya untega amatwi igihe ngutabaje, maze wihutire kunsubiza!" 
Psalms102:4 Koko iminsi yanjye irayoyoka nk’umwotsi, n’amagufwa yanjye agakongoka nk’inkekwe y’umuriro." 
Psalms102:5 Umutima wanjye urarabirana nk’ubwatsi batemye, bikanyibagiza no kurya umugati wanjye." 
Psalms102:6 Aho ndi hose mpora nganya, ku buryo nsigaye ndi uruhu rusa." 
Psalms102:7 Ndasa na sakabaka yo mu butayu, meze nk’igihunyira cyo mu matongo;" 
Psalms102:8 ndara ntagohetse nk’inyoni yigungiye hejuru y’inzu. 
Psalms102:9 Umunsi wose abanzi banjye barantuka, barankwena, bakampigira." 
Psalms102:10 Ivu nsigaye ndirya nk’umugati, ibyo nywa nkabivanga n’amarira," 
Psalms102:11 ku mpamvu y’uburakari n’ubukana bwawe, waranteruye maze uranjugunya." 
Psalms102:12 Iminsi yanjye irarembera nk’igicucu, kandi ndumirana nk’ibyatsi." 
Psalms102:13 Nyamara wowe, Uhoraho, uri umwami ubuziraherezo, kandi imbyaro zose zizahora zikwibuka!" 
Psalms102:14 Uzahagurutswa n’urukundo ufitiye Siyoni, kuko ari igihe cyo kuyigirira imbabazi, ayo magingo akaba ageze." 
Psalms102:15 Abagaragu bawe batewe ubwuzu n’amabuye yayo, bagashavuzwa n’itongo ryayo." 
Psalms102:16 Amahanga yose azatinya izina ry’Uhoraho, n’abami bose b’isi bazatinye ikuzo ryawe," 
Psalms102:17 kuko Uhoraho azubaka Siyoni bundi bushya, akahigaragariza yuje ikuzo;" 
Psalms102:18 ubwo agahugukira isengesho ry’abanyazwe ibyabo, akita ku byo bamusaba." 
Psalms102:19 Ibyo ngibyo nibyandikirwe igisekuruza kizaza, maze umuryango mushya uzasingize Uhoraho;" 
Psalms102:20 kuko Uhoraho yarungurukiye mu bushorishori bw’ijuru, aho ari mu Ngoro ye, akareba ku isi," 
Psalms102:21 kugira ngo yumve amaganya y’imfungwa, kandi abohore abaciriwe urwo gupfa." 
Psalms102:22 Nuko bazamamaze muri Siyoni izina ry’Uhoraho, n’ibisingizo bye muri Yeruzalemu," 
Psalms102:23 igihe ingoma n’amahanga bizibumbira hamwe, kugira ngo bigaragire Uhoraho!" 
Psalms102:24 Yacogoreje imbaraga zanjye mu nzira, agerura iminsi yanjye!" 
Psalms102:25 Ndavuga nti «Mana yanjye, ntunkureho ncagashije iminsi yanjye!» Imyaka yawe isumba ibisekuruza byose." 
Psalms102:26 Kera wahanze isi, kandi ijuru ni igikorwa cy’ibiganza byawe." 
Psalms102:27 Byo bizashira, ariko wowe uzahoraho, byose bizasaza nk’umwambaro, ubihindure nk’uko bahindura umwenda;" 
Psalms102:28 ariko wowe uzahora uri wa wundi, n’imyaka yawe ntizagira iherezo!" 
Psalms102:29 Abahungu b’abagaragu bawe bazatura, maze ababakomokaho bazarambe imbere yawe." 
Psalms103:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Mutima wanjye, singiza Uhoraho, n’icyo ndi cyo cyose gisingize izina rye ritagatifu!" 
Psalms103:2 Mutima wanjye, singiza Uhoraho, kandi ntiwibagirwe na kimwe mu byo yaguhaye!" 
Psalms103:3 We ubabarira ibicumuro byawe byose, akakuvura indwara zawe zose;" 
Psalms103:4 we warura ubugingo bwawe mu mva, akagutamiriza ubutoneshwe n’impuhwe;" 
Psalms103:5 we uhunda ubuzima bwawe ihirwe, maze ubuto bwawe bukiyuburura nk’ubwa kagoma." 
Psalms103:6 Uhoraho akoresha ubutabera, akarenganura abapfukiranwa bose." 
Psalms103:7 Yamenyesheje Musa imigambi ye, n’abana ba Israheli abagaragariza ibigwi bye." 
Psalms103:8 Uhoraho ni umunyambabazi n’umunyampuhwe, atinda kurakara, kandi akagira ibambe." 
Psalms103:9 Ntatongana ngo bishyire kera, ntarwara inzika ubuziraherezo;" 
Psalms103:10 ntaduhana bihwanye n’ibicumuro byacu, ntatwihimura akurikije amafuti yacu." 
Psalms103:11 Uko ijuru ryisumbuye kure hejuru y’isi, ni ko impuhwe ze zisagiranira abamutinya;" 
Psalms103:12 uko uburasirazuba butandukanye n’uburengerazuba, ni ko adutandukanya n’ibicumuro byacu." 
Psalms103:13 Uko umubyeyi agirira ibambe abana be, ni ko Uhoraho agirira ibambe abamutinya;" 
Psalms103:14 koko azi neza icyo twabumbwemo, akibuka ko turi umukungugu." 
Psalms103:15 Iminsi y’umuntu ni nk’ibyatsi, akabumbuka nk’ururabo rwo mu murima;" 
Psalms103:16 umuyaga wamuhuhaho akazimira, akazimira adasize akarari." 
Psalms103:17 Naho impuhwe z’Uhoraho zikomerezwa abamutinya, kuva iteka kuzageza iteka ryose, n’ubutabera bwe bugahora ku bana" 
Psalms103:18 no ku buzukuru b’abakomeza Isererano rye, kandi bakibuka amatangazo ye ngo bayakurikize." 
Psalms103:19 Uhoraho yashinze mu ijuru ijabiro rye, maze ingoma ye ikagenga byose." 
Psalms103:20 Nimusingize Uhoraho, bamalayika be mwese, mwe ntwari z’indatwa, mwubahiriza ijambo rye, mukamwumvira ako kanya akivuga." 
Psalms103:21 Nimusingize Uhoraho, ngabo ze mwese, mwe mutunganya icyo ashatse cyose." 
Psalms103:22 Nimusingize Uhoraho, biremwa bye mwese, aho muri hose mu ngoma ye. Mutima wanjye, singiza Uhoraho!" 
Psalms104:1 Mutima wanjye, singiza Uhoraho! Uhoraho, Mana yanjye, uri igihangange rwose! Wisesuyeho icyubahiro n’ububengerane," 
Psalms104:2 wambaye urumuri nk’igishura, urambura ijuru nk’ihema." 
Psalms104:3 Hejuru y’amazi wahubatse Ingoro yawe, ibicu ubigira igari ryawe, ugatambagirira ku mababa y’umuyaga." 
Psalms104:4 Imiyaga wayigize intumwa zawe, umuriro uwugira umufasha wawe." 
Psalms104:5 Isi wayiteretse mu kibanza cyayo, ntizigera na rimwe ihungabana." 
Psalms104:6 Wayisesuyeho inyanja nk’umwambaro, amazi yayo agomererwa hejuru y’imisozi." 
Psalms104:7 Iyo uyakangaye arahunga, ku ijwi ry’inkuba zawe akicubura;"
