Psalms104:8 aharamba imisozi, akamanuka imibande, yerekeje ahantu wayageneye." 
Psalms104:9 Wahashinze umupaka atagomba kurenga, ku buryo atazongera kurengera ubutaka." 
Psalms104:10 Uvubukisha amasoko y’amazi mu myoma, agatemba hagati y’imisozi;" 
Psalms104:11 akuhira inyamaswa zose zo mu gasozi, indogobe z’ishyamba zikahashirira inyota;" 
Psalms104:12 hafi yayo inyoni zo mu kirere zihubaka ibyari, zikaririmba zibereye mu mashami." 
Psalms104:13 Imisozi uyivomerera uri hejuru iyo, isi ukayihaza imbuto z’ibikorwa byawe;" 
Psalms104:14 umeza ubwatsi bw’amatungo, n’imyaka muntu ahinga, maze ubutaka bukamuha ikimutunga," 
Psalms104:15 na divayi ihimbaza umutima wa mwene muntu, kimwe n’amavuta amukesha uruhanga, n’umugati uramira imbaraga ze." 
Psalms104:16 Ibiti by’Uhoraho bifite amazi abihagije, kimwe n’amasederi yateye yo muri Libani;" 
Psalms104:17 aho ni ho inyoni zarika, maze itanangabo ikiturira mu mizonobari." 
Psalms104:18 Imisozi miremire ni iy’ihene z’agasozi, amasenga yo mu bitare akaba ubwikingo bwa nyiramuhari." 
Psalms104:19 Ukwezi yakuremeye kuranga ibihe, izuba rikamenya igihe rirengera." 
Psalms104:20 Uzana umwijima, maze hakaba ijoro, inyamaswa z’ishyamba zikayagara;" 
Psalms104:21 ibyana by’intare bigatontoma bishaka icyo bifata, maze bigasaba Imana icyo birya." 
Psalms104:22 Izuba ryarasa bikitahira, bikajya kubunda mu ndiri yabyo." 
Psalms104:23 Noneho muntu agasohoka iwe ajya gukora, akajya guhinga kugeza bwije." 
Psalms104:24 Uhoraho, mbega ngo ibikorwa byawe biraba byinshi! Byose wabikoranye ubwitonzi, isi yuzuye ibiremwa byawe!" 
Psalms104:25 Ngiyo inyanja ngari, kandi yagutse impande zose, maze inyamaswa zitabarika, inini n’intoya, zikayijagatamo." 
Psalms104:26 Ni na ho amato magari acuragana, na cya Leviyatani waremeye kuhadabagirira." 
Psalms104:27 Byose ni wowe byiringira, biteze ko ubiha icyo kurya mu gihe gikwiye;" 
Psalms104:28 urabiha bikayoragura, wabumbura ikiganza cyawe, bigahaga ibyiza." 
Psalms104:29 Uhisha uruhanga rwawe bigakangarana; wabivanamo umwuka bigahwera, bigasubira mu mukungugu byavuyemo." 
Psalms104:30 Wohereza umwuka wawe, bikaremwa, maze imisusire y’isi ukayihindura mishya." 
Psalms104:31 Ikuzo ry’Uhoraho riragahoraho ubuziraherezo! Uhoraho arakishimira ibikorwa bye! 
Psalms104:32 We ureba isi, maze igahinda umushyitsi, yakorakora imisozi igacumba umwotsi!" 
Psalms104:33 Nzaririmba Uhoraho, mu buzima bwanjye bwose, iminsi yose nkiriho nzacurangire Imana yanjye." 
Psalms104:34 Icyampa ngo umuvugo wanjye umunyure, maze Uhoraho ambere isoko y’ibyishimo!" 
Psalms104:35 Abanyabyaha nibakendere ku isi, maze abagiranabi bekubaho ukundi! Mutima wanjye, singiza Uhoraho!" 
Psalms105:1 Alleluya! Nimushimire Uhoraho, mwambaze izina rye, nimurate ibigwi bye mu yandi mahanga;" 
Psalms105:2 nimumuririmbire, mumucurangire, nimuzirikane ibitangaza yakoze;" 
Psalms105:3 nimwishimire izina rye ritagatifu, muhimbarwe, mwebwe abashakashaka Uhoraho!" 
Psalms105:4 Nimugarukire Uhoraho Nyir’ububasha, mushakashake uruhanga rwe ubudahwema." 
Psalms105:5 Nimwiyibutse ibikorwa bye bihebuje, ibitangaza yakoze, n’amatangazo yivugiye," 
Psalms105:6 mwebwe, nkomoko ya Abrahamu umugaragu we, bahungu ba Yakobo, abatoni be!" 
Psalms105:7 Ni we Uhoraho, Imana yacu, umugenga w’isi yose." 
Psalms105:8 Ahora yibuka ibyo yasezeranye bidasubirwaho, ijambo yarahiriye amasekuruza igihumbi," 
Psalms105:9 rya sezerano yagiranye na Abrahamu, akarisubiriramo Izaki mu ndahiro," 
Psalms105:10 rikaba umugambi yakomereje Yakobo, n’isezerano ry’iteka yagiriye Israheli," 
Psalms105:11 igihe avuze ati «Nzaguha igihugu cya Kanahani, kibe umugabane wegukanye!»" 
Psalms105:12 N’ubwo bari bakiri mbarwa, ari agatsinda k’abasuhuke," 
Psalms105:13 bava mu gihugu bajya mu kindi, bava mu mahanga bajya mu yandi," 
Psalms105:14 Uhoraho ntiyaretse hagira ubahuganya, ndetse yihaniza abami," 
Psalms105:15 agira ati «Ntimugakore ku ntore zanjye, kandi ntimukagirire nabi abahanuzi banjye!»" 
Psalms105:16 Nuko ateza inzara mu gihugu, ibyo kurya birabura;" 
Psalms105:17 abanza koherezayo umuntu, Yozefu, wari umaze kugurwa bucakara." 
Psalms105:18 Ibirenge bye babibohesha ingoyi, ijosi rye baryambika iminyururu," 
Psalms105:19 kugeza ubwo ijambo ry’Uhoraho rigaragaje ko ari umwere. 
Psalms105:20 Umwami ategeka kumubohora, umutegetsi w’amahanga aramufunguza." 
Psalms105:21 Amugira umugenga w’urugo rwe, umutegetsi w’ibintu bye byose," 
Psalms105:22 kugira ngo yigishe ibikomangoma uko ashaka, n’abanyacyubahiro be abatoze ubuhanga." 
Psalms105:23 Nuko Israheli aza mu Misiri, Yakobo asuhukira mu gihugu cya Kamu." 
Psalms105:24 Uhoraho aha umuryango we kororoka, urusha amaboko abanzi bawo;" 
Psalms105:25 abahindura umutima ngo bange umuryango we, ngo bicishe amayeri abagaragu be." 
Psalms105:26 Atuma Musa, umugaragu we, na Aroni yari yaritoreye." 
Psalms105:27 Bombi berekanira ibimenyetso mu Misiri, n’ibitangaza by’Uhoraho mu gihugu cya Kamu." 
Psalms105:28 Yohereza umwijima, haba icuraburindi, ariko ntibahugukira ijambo rye." 
Psalms105:29 Amazi yabo ayahindura amaraso, yica amafi yabo." 
Psalms105:30 Igihugu cyabo kijagatamo imitubu, ndetse no mu byumba by’abami babo." 
Psalms105:31 Avuga rimwe, maze ibibugu birabatera, n’udukoko dutwikira igihugu cyabo cyose." 
Psalms105:32 Agusha urubura mu mwanya w’imvura, n’imirabyo ikwiza umuriro mu gihugu cyose;" 
Psalms105:33 aritagura imizabibu n’imizeti byabo, avunagura ibiti by’igihugu cyabo." 
Psalms105:34 Yongera kuvuga, maze inzige ziratera, n’ibihore bitagira ingano;" 
Psalms105:35 birya ibyatsi byose mu gihugu cyabo, birya n’imbuto z’ubutaka bwabo." 
Psalms105:36 Nyuma anangura icyitwa uburiza cyose mu gihugu, n’abana b’imfura bibarutse bakiri abasore." 
Psalms105:37 Nuko ahakura abe bitwaje feza na zahabu, nta n’umwe uhutaye mu miryango yabo." 
Psalms105:38 Misiri yishimira ko bagiye, kuko ubuhahamuke bwari bwabajunjitse." 
Psalms105:39 Uhoraho ababambika hejuru igicu kibatwikira, akongeza n’inkingi y’umuriro wo kubamurikira nijoro." 
Psalms105:40 Bamutakiye, aboherereza inkware, abahaza umugati uturutse ku ijuru." 
Psalms105:41 Akingura urutare, maze amazi aravubuka; atemba nk’uruzi mu butaka bwumiranye." 
Psalms105:42 Koko yibutse isezerano rye ritagatifu yagiriye Abrahamu, umugaragu we!" 
Psalms105:43 Nuko yimura umuryango wishimye, intore ze zisohokana urwamo rw’impundu." 
Psalms105:44 Abaha ibihugu by’abanyamahanga, maze bazungura ibyaruhiwe n’indi miryango," 
Psalms105:45 kugira ngo bazakurikize amatangazo ye, kandi bazakomeze amategeko ye." 
Psalms106:1 Alleluya! Nimusingize Uhoraho, kuko ari umugwaneza, kandi urukundo rwe rugahoraho iteka!" 
Psalms106:2 Ni nde wavuga ibigwi by’Uhoraho, akamamaza ibisingizo bye byose?" 
Psalms106:3 Hahirwa abita ku mategeko y’Uhoraho, igihe cyose bagakurikiza ubutabera!" 
Psalms106:4 Uhoraho, uranyibuke, wowe ugirira neza umuryango wawe, maze uze untabare," 
Psalms106:5 kugira ngo niyumvemo ihirwe ry’intore zawe, mpimbazwe n’ibyishimo by’umuryango wawe, nsangire umunezero n’abo wagize ingarigari zawe!" 
Psalms106:6 Koko twaracumuye nk’abasekuruza bacu, twaragomye duteshuka inzira!" 
Psalms106:7 Abasekuruza bacu mu Misiri ntibigeze bumva ibitangaza byawe; biyibagije impuhwe zawe nyinshi, bivumbura ku Musumbabyose hafi y’inyanja y’Urufunzo." 
Psalms106:8 Nyamara we, agirira izina rye arabarokora, kugira ngo yerekane ubushobozi bwe." 
Psalms106:9 Akangara inyanja y’Urufunzo, maze irumuka; abanyuza mu ndiri yayo, bayigendamo nk’uko bagenda mu butayu." 
Psalms106:10 Yabakijije abari babibasiye, abagobotora mu nzara z’umwanzi;" 
Psalms106:11 amazi arenga ku banzi babo, ntihasigara n’umwe;" 
Psalms106:12 nuko bemera ijambo ry’Uhoraho, baririmba ibisingizo bye." 
Psalms106:13 Ariko ntibatindiganyije kwibagirwa ibikorwa bye, ndetse ntibarindira ko yuzuza umugambi we;" 
Psalms106:14 batangira kurarikira ibyo badafite, maze bagondoza Uhoraho mu butayu;" 
Psalms106:15 na we abaha ibyo bifuzaga, ariko bibatera umurengwe." 
Psalms106:16 Hanyuma bagiriye Musa ishyari mu ngando, na Aroni, intungane y’Uhoraho;" 
Psalms106:17 nuko isi irasama, imira Datani, iyongobeza n’abo mu ishyaka rya Abiramu;" 
Psalms106:18 umuriro utwika igico cyabo, ikibatsi cyawo gitsemba abo bagiranabi." 
Psalms106:19 Kuri Horebu bacuze inyana, bapfukama imbere y’icyo cyuma;" 
Psalms106:20 Uhoraho, we kuzo ryabo, bamusimbuza ishusho ry’ikimasa kirisha ubwatsi!" 
Psalms106:21 Bibagiwe batyo Uhoraho, umukiza wabo, we wakoreye mu Misiri ibintu bikomeye," 
Psalms106:22 ibitangaza mu gihugu cya Kamu, n’akataraboneka ku nyanja y’Urufunzo." 
Psalms106:23 Yari mu migambi yo kubatsemba, iyo Musa, intore ye, atamwitambika imbere, ngo abuze ubukana bwe kubarimbura." 
Psalms106:24 Nyuma birozonze igihugu cyiganjemo ibyiza, ntibizera ijambo rye;" 
Psalms106:25 bijujutira mu mahema yabo, ntibumvira ijwi ry’Uhoraho." 
Psalms106:26 Ni bwo abanguye ukuboko ararahira ko azabararika mu butayu," 
Psalms106:27 akazatatanya inkomoko yabo, bakazagwa mu bihugu by’amahanga." 
Psalms106:28 Nyuma bohotse kuri Behali w’i Pewori, biha kurya ku nyama zatuwe abazimu;" 
Psalms106:29 imigenzereze yabo ishavuza Uhoraho, maze icyorezo kibadukamo." 
Psalms106:30 Ubwo ngubwo Pineyasi arahaguruka, arabahana, maze icyorezo kirahosha;" 
Psalms106:31 ibyo bimuviramo ubutungane ku Mana, bwamuranzweho mu mbyaro zose zakurikiye." 
Psalms106:32 Bagomeye Uhoraho ku mazi y’i Meriba, batuma Musa ahagirira akaga;" 
Psalms106:33 bamutesheje umutwe, maze avuga ibiterekeranye." 
Psalms106:34 Ntibatsembye ya miryango Uhoraho yari yababwiye; 
Psalms106:35 ahubwo bivangavanze n’abanyamahanga, maze biha gukurikiza imico yabo." 
Psalms106:36 Bagaragiye ibigirwamana byabo, maze bibagusha mu mutego;" 
Psalms106:37 abahungu babo n’abakobwa babo, babaturaho ibitambo by’ibigirwamana!" 
Psalms106:38 Koko bamennye amaraso y’abatacumuye, bamena amaraso y’abahungu babo n’ay’abakobwa babo batambiriwe ibigirwamana by’i Kanahani; nuko igihugu cyanduzwa n’umuvu w’ayo maraso." 
Psalms106:39 Barihumanyije kubera ibyo bakora, imigenzereze irabandarika;" 
Psalms106:40 nuko uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira umuryango we, azinukwa abo yari yaragize abe." 
Psalms106:41 Ni ko kubagabiza ibiganza by’abanyamahanga, maze ababangaga, barabigarurira;" 
Psalms106:42 abanzi babo babisha agahato, bashikamirwa n’ikiganza cyabo." 
Psalms106:43 Kenshi na kenshi Uhoraho yarabagobotoraga, ariko bo bagakomeza kumugomera, bakarushaho gusaya mu cyaha cyabo." 
Psalms106:44 Nyamara Uhoraho yareba akaga barimo, akumva amaganya yabo;" 
Psalms106:45 yazirikana isezerano yari yarabagiriye, ubudahemuka bwe bukamutera kwisubiraho;" 
Psalms106:46 maze abari barabigaruriye bose, akabatera kubagirira impuhwe." 
Psalms106:47 Uhoraho, Mana yacu, dukorakoranye, utuvane mu bihugu by’amahanga, maze tuzahimbaze izina ryawe ritagatifu, twizihirwe no kugusingiza." 
Psalms106:48 Haragasingizwa Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, kuva iteka n’iteka ryose! Maze imbaga yose izavuge iti «Amen!»" 
Psalms107:1 Alleluya! Nimushimire Uhoraho kuko agwa neza, n’urukundo rwe rugahoraho iteka." 
Psalms107:2 Abo Uhoraho yarwanyeho nibabyivugire, bo yakuye mu maboko y’umwanzi," 
Psalms107:3 maze akabakorakoranya abavana mu bihugu byose, mu burasirazuba no mu burengerazuba, mu majyaruguru no mu majyepfo." 
Psalms107:4 Hari ababungeraga mu butayu, bakagenda ahantu hataba na mba, ntibabone inzira yerekera mu mugi utuwe;" 
Psalms107:5 bakicwa n’inzara n’inyota, bakumva imitima yabo yaguye isari." 
Psalms107:6 Nuko batakambira Uhoraho mu mage barimo, na we abakiza imibabaro yabo;" 
Psalms107:7 abayobora mu nzira ibangutse, kugira ngo bagere mu mugi utuwe." 
Psalms107:8 Nibashimire rero Uhoraho impuhwe ze, n’ibitangaza akorera bene muntu!" 
Psalms107:9 Kuko yahaye icyo kunywa uwicwaga n’inyota, uwari ushonje akamufungurira, akijuta." 
Psalms107:10 Hari abari batuye mu mwijima no mu gicucu cy’urupfu, bafungiranye mu byago no mu minyururu," 
Psalms107:11 kubera ko bari bigize ibigande ntibumvire Imana, maze bagasuzugura imigambi y’Umusumbabyose." 
Psalms107:12 Ni bwo imitima yabo ayicishije agahinda, bagwa umudari batagira kirengera." 
Psalms107:13 Nuko batakambira Uhoraho mu mage barimo, na we abakiza imibabaro yabo;" 
Psalms107:14 abasohora mu mwijima no mu gicucu cy’urupfu, acagagura ingoyi zari zibaboshye." 
Psalms107:15 Nibashimire rero Uhoraho impuhwe ze, n’ibitangaza akorera bene muntu!" 
Psalms107:16 Kuko yamenaguye inzugi z’imiringa, akajanjagura ibihindizo by’ibyuma." 
Psalms107:17 Hari abandi bari ibirimarima kubera ubusare bwabo, bahinduka nabi kubera ibyaha bahoragamo;" 
Psalms107:18 imitima yabo ihurwa icyitwa ibyo kurya, byanga hato ngo barenge amarembo y’ikuzimu." 
Psalms107:19 Nuko batakambira Uhoraho mu mage barimo, na we abakiza imibabaro yabo;" 
Psalms107:20 avuga ijambo ryo kubakiza, abarinda kujya mu mva." 
Psalms107:21 Nibashimire rero Uhoraho impuhwe ze, n’ibitangaza akorera bene muntu!" 
Psalms107:22 Nibature ibitambo byo kumusingiza, bamamaze ibikorwa bye bishimye." 
Psalms107:23 Abakunda kugenda mu nyanja batwawe n’amato manini, bagacururiza mu mazi y’isanzure," 
Psalms107:24 abo ngabo biboneye ibikorwa by’Uhoraho, n’ibitangaza agaragariza mu ngeri y’inyanja." 
Psalms107:25 Yavuze rimwe, maze habyuka umuyaga w’inkubi, ututumbisha ibitunda mu nyanja." 
Psalms107:26 Nuko bakajya mu birere, hanyuma bagacubira ikuzimu, bakarwara bakamererwa nabi cyane;" 
Psalms107:27 bakagira isereri bakadandabirana nk’abasinzi, ubuhanga bari basanganywe bukayoyoka." 
Psalms107:28 Nuko batakambira Uhoraho mu mage barimo, na we abakiza imibabaro yabo;" 
Psalms107:29 wa muyaga w’inkubi awugaruramo ituze, ibitunda by’inyanja birahwama." 
Psalms107:30 Nuko bishimira ko ituze rigarutse, maze Uhoraho abajyana mu mwaro bashakaga." 
Psalms107:31 Nibashimire rero Uhoraho impuhwe ze, n’ibitangaza akorera bene muntu!" 
Psalms107:32 Nibamuratire mu ikoraniro rya rubanda, bamusingirize no mu iteraniro ry’abakuru b’imiryango." 
Psalms107:33 Inzuzi azihindura ubutayu, ahari amasoko y’amazi hakumagara," 
Psalms107:34 n’igihugu cyera akagihindura ubutaka bw’umunyu, ku mpamvu y’ubugiranabi bw’abahatuye." 
Psalms107:35 Ubundi kandi ubutayu akabuhindura ikidendezi cy’amazi, n’ahantu h’imburamazi akahahindura amasoko;" 
Psalms107:36 maze akahatuza abari bashonje, bakahubaka umugi wo kubamo," 
Psalms107:37 bagahinga imirima, bagatera imizabibu, bagasarura imbuto zeze." 
Psalms107:38 Uhoraho akabaha umugisha, bakororoka uko bukeye, kandi ntareke amatungo yabo agabanuka." 
Psalms107:39 Nyuma bakaza kugenda bagabanuka, bakazahara, babitewe n’ubutindahare, ibyago n’ububabare." 
Psalms107:40 Nuko agasuzuguza abakomeye, akababungereza ku gasi batazi iyo bajya." 
Psalms107:41 Nyamara akazamura umukene amukuye mu butindahare, n’imiryango akayiha kugwira nk’amashyo y’amatungo." 
Psalms107:42 Abantu b’intungane barabireba, bakishima, naho abagizi ba nabi bakaruca bakarumira." 
Psalms107:43 Mbese hari uwaba ashaka kumenya ubwenge? Niyitondere rero ibyo byose, maze azasobanukirwe n’ukuntu Uhoraho agira neza!" 
Psalms108:1 Indirimbo. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms108:2 Mana yanjye, umutima wanjye wasubiye mu gitereko, none reka ndirimbe, ncurange ibyishongoro; iryo ni ryo shema ryanjye." 
Psalms108:3 Kanguka, nanga y’imirya, nawe cyembe, maze nkangure umuseke!" 
Psalms108:4 Uhoraho, nzagusingiriza no mu yindi miryango, ngucurangire aho ndi hose mu mahanga;" 
Psalms108:5 kuko impuhwe zawe zikabakaba ku ijuru, n’ubudahemuka bwawe bugatumbagira mu bicu." 
Psalms108:6 Mana yanjye, baduka wemarare hejuru y’ijuru, ikuzo ryawe ritumbagire hejuru y’isi yose!" 
Psalms108:7 Kugira ngo inkoramutima zawe zirokoke, dukirishe indyo yawe, maze udusubize." 
Psalms108:8 Imana yavugiye mu Ngoro yayo ntagatifu iti «Ndatsinze! Negukanye Sikemu, ntambagira umubande wa Sukoti!" 
Psalms108:9 Gilihadi ibaye iyanjye, na Manase ni iyanjye; Efurayimu ihindutse ingofero y’icyuma nambaye ku mutwe, naho Yuda ni inkoni yanjye y’ubutegetsi," 
Psalms108:10 Mowabu yo ibaye igikarabiro niyuhagiriramo, inkweto zanjye nkazirambika kuri Edomu, ngakoma akamu, nteye Ubufilisiti.»" 
Psalms108:11 Ni nde uzanjyana mu mugi ucinyiye? Ni nde uzangeza muri Edomu? 
Psalms108:12 Nta wundi utari wowe, Mana yatuzinutswe, none ukaba utagitabarana n’ingabo zacu." 
Psalms108:13 Gira uze udutabare, udufashe kurwanya abanzi, kuko ubuvunyi buturuka ku bantu ari nta cyo bugeraho." 
Psalms108:14 Nituba kumwe n’Imana ni bwo tuzatsinda, ni yo izaribata abanzi bacu." 
Psalms109:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Mana wowe nsingiza, wikomeza kwinumira!" 
Psalms109:2 Kuko abanyakarimi kabi n’abanyabinyoma bakokereza ari jye bibasiye, bakamvugisha bandyarya." 
Psalms109:3 Amagambo yabo y’urwango yanturutse impande zose, maze bakandwanya nta mpamvu." 
Psalms109:4 Umubano mwiza nabagiriye bawitura ibirego, nyamara jyewe nkavuga amasengesho mbasabira." 
Psalms109:5 Ineza mbagirira bayitura inabi, ubucuti mbagaragariza bakabwitura urwango." 
Psalms109:6 «Mushakire umugome umuhagarara iburyo, maze amushinje!" 
Psalms109:7 Urubanza aburana, nirurangire atsinzwe ruhenu, maze najurira bimuviremo icyaha!" 
Psalms109:8 Iminsi ye yo kubaho irabe mikeya, imirimo yari ashinzwe ihabwe undi," 
Psalms109:9 abahungu be bahinduke impfubyi, n’umugore we abe umupfakazi!" 
Psalms109:10 Abahungu be barabe inzererezi n’abasabirizi, maze birukanwe mu matongo yabo;" 
Psalms109:11 uwo yari abereyemo umwenda arakukumbe ibyo yungutse; abavamahanga basahure ibyo yaruhiye! 
Psalms109:12 Ntihakagire n’umwe umubera indahemuka, ntihakabe n’umwe ugirira ibambe impfubyi asize;" 
Psalms109:13 urubyaro rwe rurakarimbuka, izina rye risibangane mu gisekuru kimwe gusa!" 
Psalms109:14 Ibicumuro by’ababyeyi be biributswe Uhoraho, icyaha cy’umukecuru we cyoye guhanagurika." 
Psalms109:15 Ibyo byose ntibigasobe Uhoraho, maze atsembe ku isi icyatuma babibuka cyose!" 
Psalms109:16 Ubwo uwo muntu atagira agatima k’imbabazi, agatoteza umukene ngo amwice, akibasira umutindahare wasumbirijwe," 
Psalms109:17 akanogerwa no kuvuma, yokokamwa n’umuvumo we, ntashake gutunga umugisha, yokabura umugisha." 
Psalms109:18 Ubwo yambaye umuvumo nk’igishura, ukamucengeramo nk’amazi, ugacengera mu mubiri we nk’amavuta," 
Psalms109:19 uwo muvumo urakamubera nk’umwambaro yambaye, umubere nk’umukandara ahora akindikije!»" 
Psalms109:20 Nguko uko Uhoraho azitura abandega, kimwe n’abamvuga nabi bose." 
Psalms109:21 Naho wowe, Nyagasani, Mana yanjye, ndengera ugiriye izina ryawe; ubudahemuka bwawe burangwa no kugira neza, none nyirokorera." 
Psalms109:22 Ndi umukene n’umutindahare, n’umutima wanjye wankomerekeye mu nda." 
Psalms109:23 Ndarembera nk’igicucu kijya kurenga, barampinda nk’abirukana inzige." 
Psalms109:24 Sinkibasha guhagarara bitewe no kubura icyo ndya, n’umubiri wanjye wanyunyujwe no kutagira ibinure." 
Psalms109:25 Kuri bo nabaye insuzugurwa bikabije, iyo bambonye barajiginywa." 
Psalms109:26 Ntabara, Uhoraho, Mana yanjye, nkiza ukurikije impuhwe zawe;" 
Psalms109:27 maze bamenye ko ari wowe wakinze ukuboko, bamenye ko ari wowe, Uhoraho, ukora byose." 
Psalms109:28 Bo baravuma, wowe ugatanga umugisha: bari banteye, ariko baracemererwa, maze umuyoboke wawe arishima." 
Psalms109:29 Abandegaga nibicwe n’ipfunwe, bamanjirwe, isoni bafite zibisesureho nk’igishura." 
Psalms109:30 Nzamamaza Uhoraho ndanguruye ijwi, nzamusingirize hagati y’imbaga y’abantu;" 
Psalms109:31 kuko ahagarara iburyo bw’umutindahare, kugira ngo amukize abamucira urubanza." 
Psalms110:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho yabwiye Umutegetsi wanjye, ati «Icara iburyo bwanjye, kugeza igihe abanzi bawe mbagira umusego w’ibirenge byawe!»" 
Psalms110:2 Inkoni yawe y’ubutegetsi, yuje ububasha, Uhoraho azayirambura igere kure, uhereye i Siyoni: «Ganza, ugenge abanzi bagukikije!" 
Psalms110:3 Wahawe ubutware kuva ukivuka, wimikirwa ku misozi mitagatifu; mbese nk’urume rutonda mu museke, uko ni ko nakwibyariye!»" 
Psalms110:4 Uhoraho yarabirahiriye, kandi ntazisubiraho na gato, ati «Uri umuherezabitambo iteka ryose, ku buryo bwa Malekisedeki.»" 
Psalms110:5 Nyagasani ahora iburyo bwawe, agatikiza abami ku munsi w’uburakari bwe." 
Psalms110:6 Acira amahanga imanza, akagerekeranya imirambo, ku isi hose agatsemba abatware." 
Psalms110:7 Mu rugendo anywa amazi ku mugezi uhurura, bigatuma yongera kubyutsa umutwe." 
Psalms111:1 Alleluya! Nzasingiza Uhoraho n’umutima wanjye wose, mu nteko y’intungane no mu ikoraniro rusange." 
Psalms111:2 Ibyo Uhoraho yakoze biratangaje, ababyitayeho bose bahugukira kubizirikana." 
Psalms111:3 Ibikorwa bye birangwa n’ubwiza n’ubudasumbwa, kandi ubutungane bwe bugahoraho iteka." 
Psalms111:4 Yashatse ko bagenda bibukiranya ibitangaza bye, Uhoraho ni umunyaneza n’umunyampuhwe." 
Psalms111:5 Abamwubaha abaha ibibatunga, akibuka iteka Isezerano rye." 
Psalms111:6 Umuryango we yaweretse ibikorwa bye bihambaye, igihe awugabiye ayandi mahanga ho umunani." 
Psalms111:7 Ibyo akora byose birangwa n’ukuri n’ubutungane, amategeko ye yose akwiye kwiringirwa." 
Psalms111:8 Yashyiriweho abo mu bihe byose kandi ku buryo budasubirwaho, akaba agenewe kubahirizwa nta buryarya n’ubuhemu." 
Psalms111:9 Uhoraho yazaniye umuryango we ikiwubohora, agena rimwe rizima imiterere y’Isezerano rye. Izina rye ni ritagatifu, kandi rigatera ubwoba." 
Psalms111:10 Intangiriro y’ubwenge ni ugutinya Uhoraho; abagenza batyo bose ni bo inararibonye. Ibisingizo bye bizahoraho iteka ryose. 
Psalms112:1 Alleluya! Hahirwa umuntu utinya Uhoraho, agahimbazwa n’amategeko ye!" 
Psalms112:2 Urubyaro rwe ruzagira amaboko mu gihugu, ubwoko bw’abantu b’intungane bugire umugisha." 
Psalms112:3 Ubukungu n’umunezero bibarizwa iwe, n’ubutungane bwe buhoraho iteka." 
Psalms112:4 Mu gihe cy’umwijima, yaka nk’urumuri, rumurikira abantu b’intagorama. Koko impuhwe, ineza n’ubutungane, ni byo bimuranga." 
Psalms112:5 Hahirwa umuntu ugira impuhwe, kandi akaguriza abandi, ibintu bye aba abigengana ubutungane." 
Psalms112:6 Nta bwo azigera ahungabana bibaho, azasiga urwibutso rudasibangana." 
Psalms112:7 Ntakangaranywa n’ibihuha bibi, akomeza umutima akiringira Uhoraho," 
Psalms112:8 umutima we uhora mu gitereko, ntagire icyo yikanga, agashobora kwirebera uko abanzi be bigorerwa." 
Psalms112:9 Agira ubuntu, agaha abakene ataziganya; ubutungane bwe bugahoraho iteka, akagendana ishema n’ubwemarare." 
Psalms112:10 Umugomeramana, iyo amubonye, arajiginywa, agahekenya amenyo, agashenguka; ibyifuzo by’abagomeramana biburiramo." 
Psalms113:1 Alleluya! Bayoboke b’Uhoraho, nimuhanike ibisingizo, maze musingize izina ry’Uhoraho!" 
Psalms113:2 Izina ry’Uhoraho nirisingizwe, ubu ngubu n’iteka ryose!" 
Psalms113:3 Kuva igihe izuba rirashe kugeza ubwo rirenga, nihasingizwe izina ry’Uhoraho!" 
Psalms113:4 Uhoraho asumba kure amahanga yose, n’ikuzo rye rigasumba ijuru." 
Psalms113:5 Ni nde wamera nk’Uhoraho Imana yacu, we utetse ijabiro hejuru iyo gihera," 
Psalms113:6 maze akunama areba ijuru n’isi hasi ye? 
Psalms113:7 Ahagurutsa indushyi mu mukungugu, akavana umutindi mu cyavu," 
Psalms113:8 kugira ngo amwicaze hamwe n’abakomeye, abakomeye bo mu muryango we." 
Psalms113:9 Umugore wari ingumba amushakira inzu, akamugira umubyeyi wizihiwe mu bana be." 
Psalms114:1 Alleluya! Igihe Abayisraheli basohotse mu Misiri, inzu ya Yakobo ikava mu gihugu cy’abanyamahanga," 
Psalms114:2 Yuda yahindutse igicumbi cy’Uhoraho, Israheli ihinduka ingarigari ye." 
Psalms114:3 Inyanja yarababonye, irahunga, Yorudani na yo irakimirana isubira inyuma;" 
Psalms114:4 imisozi miremire isimbagurika nk’amapfizi y’intama, n’utununga dusimbagurika nk’abana b’intama." 
Psalms114:5 Mbe nyanja, utewe n’iki guhunga? Nawe Yorudani, utewe n’iki gukimirana usubira inyuma?" 
Psalms114:6 Mbe misozi miremire, mutewe n’iki gusimbagurika nk’amapfizi y’intama? namwe tununga, mutewe n’iki gusimbagurika nk’abana b’intama?" 
Psalms114:7 Butaka, itere hejuru imbere y’Umutegetsi, imbere y’Imana ya Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 yo igira urutare ikaruhindura ikidendezi cy’amazi, n’ikibuye cy’intamenwa ikagihindura isoko idudubiza." 
Psalms117:1 Alleluya! Mahanga mwese, nimusingize Uhoraho, miryango mwese, mumwamamaze;" 
Psalms117:2 kuko urukundo adukunda rutagira urugero, n’ubudahemuka bwe bugahoraho iteka!" 
Psalms118:1 Alleluya! Nimusingize Uhoraho, kuko ari umugwaneza, kandi urukundo rwe rugahoraho iteka!" 
Psalms118:2 Imiryango ya Israheli nibivuge ibisubiremo, iti «Urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka!»" 
Psalms118:3 N’inzu ya Aroni nibivuge ibisubiremo, iti «Urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka!»" 
Psalms118:4 N’abatinya Uhoraho nibabivuge babisubiremo, bati «Urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka!»" 
Psalms118:5 Mu magorwa yanjye, natakiye Uhoraho, maze Uhoraho aranyumva, anshyira ahantu hagutse." 
Psalms118:6 Uhoraho turi kumwe, nta cyantera ubwoba: umuntu wagira icyo antwara yaturuka he?" 
Psalms118:7 Uhoraho turi kumwe, arantabara, maze abanzi banjye nkabarebana akajogo." 
Psalms118:8 Ibyiza ni ukwisunga Uhoraho, aho kwiringira abantu!" 
Psalms118:9 Ibyiza ni ukwisunga Uhoraho, aho kwiringira abanyamaboko." 
Psalms118:10 Amahanga yose yari yantangatanze, ariko ku izina ry’Uhoraho ndayatsemba!" 
Psalms118:11 Bari bantangatanze impande zose, ariko ku izina ry’Uhoraho ndabatsemba!" 
Psalms118:12 Bari bantangatanze nk’amarumbo y’inzuki, ariko bazima nk’umuriro w’ibitovu, kuko ku izina ry’Uhoraho nabatsembye!" 
Psalms118:13 Bashatse kumpirika ngo bangushe, ariko Uhoraho arantabara." 
Psalms118:14 Uhoraho ni we mbaraga zanjye n’icyivugo cyanjye; ni we nkesha agakiza kose! 
Psalms118:15 Impundu z’ibyishimo n’iz’ubutsinzi, nizihore zivuga mu ngo z’ab’intungane, baririmbe bati «Indyo y’Uhoraho yagaragaje ibigwi!" 
Psalms118:16 Indyo y’Uhoraho yarihanukiriye, maze indyo y’Uhoraho igaragaza ibigwi!»" 
Psalms118:17 Oya, nta bwo nzapfa, ahubwo nzaramba, maze mpore namamaza ibikorwa by’Uhoraho." 
Psalms118:18 Ni koko Uhoraho yari yampaye igihano gikaze, ariko ntiyagejeje aho kungabiza urupfu!" 
Psalms118:19 None nimunkingurire imiryango nyabutungane, maze ninjire, nshimire Uhoraho!" 
Psalms118:20 Dore irembo rigana Uhoraho aho riherereye: ab’intungane ni bo baryinjiramo! 
Psalms118:21 Reka ngusingize, Nyagasani, kuko wanyumvise, maze ukambera umukiza!" 
Psalms118:22 Ibuye abubatsi bari barajugunye, ni ryo ryahindutse ibuye ry’insanganyarukuta!" 
Psalms118:23 Uhoraho ni we wagennye ko biba bityo, maze biba agatangaza mu maso yacu." 
Psalms118:24 Nguyu umunsi Uhoraho yigeneye: nutubere umunsi w’ibirori n’ibyishimo. 
Psalms118:25 Emera, Uhoraho, emera utange umukiro! Emera, Uhoraho, emera utange umutsindo!" 
Psalms118:26 Nihasingizwe uje mu izina ry’Uhoraho! Tubifurije umugisha mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho! 
Psalms118:27 Uhoraho ni Imana, aratumurikira. Cyo nimukorane, mutambagire mufite amashami mu ntoki, murinde mugera ku mpembe z’urutambiro." 
Psalms118:28 Ni wowe Imana yanjye, ndagushimira, Mana yanjye, ndakurata." 
Psalms118:29 Nimusingize Uhoraho, kuko ari umugwaneza, kandi urukundo rwe rugahoraho iteka!" 
Psalms119:1 Hahirwa abadakemwa mu mibereho yabo, bagakurikiza amategeko y’Uhoraho!" 
Psalms119:2 Hahirwa abumvira ibyemezo bye, bakamushakashaka babikuye ku mutima!" 
Psalms119:3 Abo birinda gukora ikibi, ahubwo bagakurikira inzira ze." 
Psalms119:4 Ni wowe witangarije amabwiriza, ugira ngo bayakurikize ubutayahuga." 
Psalms119:5 Icyampa ngo inzira zanjye zihame, kugira ngo nkurikize ugushaka kwawe!" 
Psalms119:6 Ubwo rero sinzagira isoni zo kurangamira amategeko yawe yose. 
Psalms119:7 Nzagushimagiza n’umutima uboneye maze kumenya amateka atunganye uciye. 
Psalms119:8 Ugushaka kwawe nzagukurikiza, ntuzantererane bibaho." 
Psalms119:9 Mbese ukiri muto yaba indakemwa ate mu nzira ye? Yabigeraho akurikiza ijambo ryawe. 
Psalms119:10 Ndagushakashakana umutima wanjye wose, ntuncishe ukubiri n’amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:11 Amasezerano yawe nayikomeje mu mutima, ngira ngo ntagucumuraho." 
Psalms119:12 Uragasingizwa, Uhoraho! Umenyeshe ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:13 Mpora ntondagura amateka yose waciye. 
Psalms119:14 Mpimbazwa no gukurikiza ibyemezo byawe kuruta uko ubukire butera ibyishimo. 
Psalms119:15 Nzazirikana amabwiriza yawe, maze ndangamire inzira zawe." 
Psalms119:16 Nzahimbazwa n’ugushaka kwawe, noye kuzibagirwa ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:17 Ugirire ubuntu umugaragu wawe, nzabeho, maze nzakurikize ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:18 Mpumura amaso maze nzirebere ibyiza by’amategeko yawe. 
Psalms119:19 Ndi umushyitsi ku isi, ntumpishe imigambi yawe." 
Psalms119:20 Umutima wanjye wazonzwe no guhora nifuza kumenya amateka uciye. 
Psalms119:21 Ukangara ibivume by’abirasi bagendera kure y’amategeko yawe. 
Psalms119:22 Urandinde igitutsi n’agasuzuguro, kuko nakurikije ibyemezo byawe." 
Psalms119:23 N’aho ibikomangoma byakorana bikamvuga nabi, umugaragu wawe ahora azirikana ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:24 Ibyemezo byawe bintera guhimbarwa, imigambi yawe ni yo mfatiraho inama." 
Psalms119:25 Dore ndambaraye mu mukungugu, umbesheho ukurikije ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:26 Nakugaragarije inzira zanjye, nawe uransubiza, unyigishe ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:27 Unyumvishe inzira y’amabwiriza yawe, kugira ngo njye nzirikana ibyiza byawe." 
Psalms119:28 Umutima wanjye urashengurwa n’agahinda, unzahure ukurikije ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:29 Urandinde inzira y’ikinyoma, maze ungirire ubuntu, umpe amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:30 Nahisemo kutazagutenguha, nsobanukirwa n’amateka yawe." 
Psalms119:31 Nakomeye ku byemezo byawe, Uhoraho, ntuzankoze isoni!" 
Psalms119:32 Inzira y’amatangazo yawe irambangukiye, kuko waguye umutima wanjye." 
Psalms119:33 Uhoraho, unyigishe inzira y’ugushaka kwawe, kugira ngo nyikomeze kugera mu ndunduro." 
Psalms119:34 Umpe ubwenge, kugira ngo nkomeze amategeko yawe, maze nyakurikize n’umutima wanjye wose." 
Psalms119:35 Unkomeze mu nzira y’amatangazo yawe, kuko ari yo anezereje." 
Psalms119:36 Werekeze umutima wanjye ku byemezo byawe, aho kohoka ku maronko." 
Psalms119:37 Amaso yanjye uyarinde ibitagirashinge, unkomeze mu nzira zawe." 
Psalms119:38 Ukomereze umugaragu wawe isezerano, wateganyirije abayoboke bawe." 
Psalms119:39 Undinde igitutsi kintera ubwoba, kuko amateka uciye ari yo nyuramutima." 
Psalms119:40 Icy’ingenzi nifuza ni ugukurikiza amabwiriza yawe, untungishe ubutungane." 
Psalms119:41 Uhoraho, ubuntu bwawe nibunsendere, unkize nk’uko wabisezeranye!" 
Psalms119:42 Sinzabure icyo nsubiza abantuka, kuko niringiye ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:43 Ntunkure mu kanwa ijambo ry’ukuri, kuko niringiye amateka waciye." 
Psalms119:44 Ndashaka gukurikiza amategeko yawe, iteka ryose rizira iherezo." 
Psalms119:45 Nzagire ubuzima buzira inkomyi, kuko nibanda ku mabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:46 Nzatangariza ibyemezo byawe, imbere y’abami, nta soni mfite." 
Psalms119:47 Amatangazo yawe yaranyuze, narayakunze cyane." 
Psalms119:48 Nerekeje ibiganza byanjye ku matangazo yawe yanyuze, maze nzazirikane ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:49 Wibuke ijambo wabwiye umugaragu wawe, ari na ryo nakomeje kwizera." 
Psalms119:50 Ikintera ihumure mu byago byanjye, ni ijambo ryawe rizambeshaho." 
Psalms119:51 N’ubwo abirasi bansetse bikabije, sinigeze nteshuka ku mategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:52 Ndibuka amateka waciye kera, Uhoraho, maze bikantera guhumurizwa." 
Psalms119:53 Nshengurwa n’uburakari imbere y’abakwihakana, batandukiriye amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:54 Imigambi yawe ni yo ndirimbo yanjye mu nzu ntuyemo bushyitsi. 
Psalms119:55 Uhoraho, nijoro nibuka izina ryawe, kandi ngakurikiza amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:56 Mu by’ukuri icyo ngenewe ni ugukurikiza amabwiriza yawe. 
Psalms119:57 Uhoraho, ndabivuze: umugabane wanjye ni ugukurikiza ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:58 Ndashaka kukunyura n’umutima wanjye wose, umbabarire nk’uko wabisezeranye!" 
Psalms119:59 Nasuzumye imibereho yanjye, nkaba nshaka kugarukira ibyemezo byawe." 
Psalms119:60 Nshishikariye ndatindiganyije gukurikiza amatangazo yawe. 
Psalms119:61 Nkikijwe n’imitego y’abagiranabi, ariko sinibagiwe amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:62 Rwagati mu ijoro ndabyuka ngo ngushimire, ku mpamvu y’amateka atunganye waciye." 
Psalms119:63 Nifatanyije n’abagutinya bose, bagakurikiza amabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:64 Uhoraho, isi isendereye impuhwe zawe, unyigishe ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:65 Wagiriye neza umugaragu wawe, Uhoraho, ukurikije ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:66 Unyigishe ibyiza by’ubushishozi n’ubumenyi, kuko niringiye amatangazo yawe." 
Psalms119:67 Mbere yo gucishwa bugufi, narayobagurikaga, naho ubu ngubu, nkurikiza amasezerano yawe." 
Psalms119:68 Uri umugwaneza n’umugiraneza, unyigishe ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:69 Abirasi baranyandavurisha ibinyoma, ariko jyewe, nkurikiza amabwiriza yawe mbikuye ku mutima." 
Psalms119:70 Umutima wabo wazibiranywe n’ikinure, naho jyewe ngahimbazwa n’amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:71 Byanguye neza kuba naracishijwe bugufi, kugira ngo nitoze ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:72 Amategeko y’umunwa wawe andutira ibihumbi by’amasikeli ya zahabu na feza. 
Psalms119:73 Ibiganza byawe byarandemye, maze birankomeza, umpe ubwenge, ngo nitoze amatangazo yawe." 
Psalms119:74 Abagutinya nibandeba, bazishima, kuko nizeye ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:75 Uhoraho, nzi ko amateka waciye atunganye, kandi nta bwo wibeshye uncisha bugufi." 
Psalms119:76 Urukundo rwawe ni rwo rwampoza, nk’uko wabisezeranije umugaragu wawe." 
Psalms119:77 Impuhwe zawe nizincengere maze mbeho, kuko amategeko yawe antera ubwuzu." 
Psalms119:78 Abirasi banyicisha ibinyoma nibakorwe n’ikimwaro, jyewe nzirikana amabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:79 Abagutinya nibangarukire, bazamenye ibyemezo byawe." 
Psalms119:80 Umutima wanjye nuberwe no gukora icyo ushaka, bityo sinzakorwa n’ikimwaro." 
Psalms119:81 Umutima wanjye uhangarije agakiza kawe, nizeye ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:82 Amaso yanjye ahangarije amasezerano yawe, nibaza nti «Mbese uzampoza ryari?»" 
Psalms119:83 Nari meze nk’uruhago rutaze ku mwotsi, cyakora sinibagiwe ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:84 Mbese iminsi uteganyirije umugaragu wawe ingana iki? Kandi uzacira ryari urubanza abantoteza? 
Psalms119:85 Abirasi barancukurira imyobo, batitaye ku mategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:86 Amatangazo yawe yose ni ukuri, barantotereza ubusa, urantabare." 
Psalms119:87 Narabandagaye, nsa n’ureba ikuzimu, cyakora sinateshutse ku mabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:88 Girira ubuntu bwawe, umbesheho, nzakurikize ibyemezo wivugiye." 
Psalms119:89 Uhoraho, iteka ryose ijambo ryawe rihoraho mu ijuru." 
Psalms119:90 Ukuri kwawe guhoraho kuva mu gisekuruza kujya mu kindi; isi wayishinze ubutajegajega. 
Psalms119:91 Kugeza uyu munsi, byose biracyariho uko wabishatse, kuko isi yose ikugaragiye." 
Psalms119:92 Iyaba amategeko yawe atari anteye ubwuzu, mba narahitanywe n’ibyago." 
Psalms119:93 Sinzigera nibagirwa amabwiriza yawe, kuko ari yo untungishije." 
Psalms119:94 Ndi uwawe, unyirokorere, kuko ndangamiye amabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:95 Abagiranabi barashaka icyankuraho, jyewe nkomeza guhugukira ibyemezo byawe." 
Psalms119:96 N’aho byose byaba biboneye, bigira iherezo, ariko amatangazo yawe ntagira urubibi!" 
Psalms119:97 Mbega ukuntu nkunda amategeko yawe! Iminsi yose ndayazirikana. 
Psalms119:98 Amatangazo yawe ni yo bukire bwanjye igihe cyose, yanyigishije ubwenge butambutse ubw’abanzi banjye." 
Psalms119:99 Ubujijuke mburusha abarezi banjye bose, kuko nakunze kuzirikana ibyemezo byawe." 
Psalms119:100 Ndusha abasaza gusobanukirwa, kuko numviye amabwiriza yawe yose." 
Psalms119:101 Nanze gukurikira inzira zose z’ikibi, kugira ngo nkomeze ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:102 Nta bwo nacishije ukubiri n’amateka waciye, kuko ari wowe uyantoza." 
Psalms119:103 Mbega ngo amasezerano yawe arandyohera, kurusha ubuki mu kanwa kanjye!" 
Psalms119:104 Amabwiriza yawe yampaye gusobanukirwa, bituma nanga inzira zose z’ibinyoma." 
Psalms119:105 Ijambo ryawe rimurikira intambwe zanjye, rikaboneshereza inzira yanjye." 
Psalms119:106 Narahiriye gukurikiza amateka atunganye waciye, kandi ni na ko nzabikomeza." 
Psalms119:107 Nacishijwe bugufi bikabije, Uhoraho, umbesheho nk’uko wabisezeranye." 
Psalms119:108 Uhoraho, wakire amasengesho ngutuye, maze unyigishe amateka waciye." 
Psalms119:109 Amagara yanjye asa nahora ancika, ariko sinibagirwe amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:110 Abagiranabi banshandikiye umutego, ariko sinahuga ngo nitaze ibyo wantegetse." 
Psalms119:111 Ibyemezo byawe ni byo murage wanjye, ni na byo byishimo by’umutima wanjye." 
Psalms119:112 Nshishikajwe no gukurikiza ugushaka kwawe, ni cyo gihembo cyanjye iteka ryose." 
Psalms119:113 Nanga imitima ijajanganya, maze ngakunda amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:114 Ni wowe buhungiro bwanjye n’ingabo yanjye, niringiye ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:115 Bagiranabi, nimumve iruhande, kugira ngo nkomeze amatangazo y’Imana yanjye." 
Psalms119:116 Unshyigikire ukurikije amasezerano yawe, kugira ngo mbeho, ntukoze isoni amizero yanjye." 
Psalms119:117 Untere imbaraga kugira ngo ndokoke, nzarangamire ubudahwema ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:118 Abadakora icyo ushaka urabahigika, kuko ibyo bigira byose ari ibinyoma." 
Psalms119:119 Abagiranabi bose b’isi, wabagize ibiseswa, ni cyo gituma nkunda ibyemezo byawe." 
Psalms119:120 Umubiri wanjye uradagadwa kubera kugutinya, kandi amateka uciye antera ubwoba." 
Psalms119:121 Nakoranye umurava n’ubutabera, ntunyegurire abanyisha agahato." 
Psalms119:122 Unyizeze ko byose bizantunganira, maze abirasi boye kunshikamira." 
Psalms119:123 Amaso yanjye ahangarije agakiza kawe, n’ijambo ryawe ry’ubutabera." 
Psalms119:124 Ugenzereze umugaragu wawe ukurikije impuhwe zawe, maze unyigishe amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:125 Ndi umugaragu wawe, umpe ubwenge, kugira ngo menye neza imigambi yawe." 
Psalms119:126 Uhoraho, amagingo arageze ngo uhaguruke, kuko barenze ku mabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:127 Ni cyo gituma nkunda amategeko yawe, kurusha zahabu, ndetse zahabu iyunguruye." 
Psalms119:128 Ni cyo cyatumye nsanga amatangazo yawe atunganye, nkanga imigirire yose y’ububeshyi." 
Psalms119:129 Amategeko yawe ni agatangaza, ni cyo gituma umutima wanjye uyakomeyeho." 
Psalms119:130 Guhishura amagambo yawe ni urumuri, abiyoroshya akabaha ubwenge." 
Psalms119:131 Mbumbuye umunwa wanjye ngo miragure, kuko mfite inyota y’amatangazo yawe." 
Psalms119:132 Hindukira undebe maze ungirire ibambe, nk’uko wabiteganyirije abagukunda." 
Psalms119:133 Intambwe zanjye uzikomereshe amategeko yawe, ntureke ubukozi bw’ibibi bunyigarurira." 
Psalms119:134 Unkize abantu banshikamiye, kugira ngo nkurikize amabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:135 Umurikishe uruhanga rwawe ku mugaragu wawe, kandi unyigishe amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:136 Amarira arashoka mu maso yanjye, kuko badakurikiza amabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:137 Uhoraho, uri umunyabutungane, ukaba intarenganya mu bucarubanza bwawe." 
Psalms119:138 Washyizeho amategeko yawe mu butabera, ugaragaza ukuri gushyitse." 
Psalms119:139 Ishyaka ry’uburakari rirangurumanamo, kuko abanzi banjye bibagirwa ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:140 Ijambo ryawe rizira ihinyu, kandi umugaragu wawe ararikunda." 
Psalms119:141 N’ubwo ndi intamenyekana n’insuzugurwa, sinigeze nibagirwa amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:142 Ubutabera bwawe buhoraho iteka ryose, kandi amategeko yawe ni ukuri kudakuka." 
Psalms119:143 Ishavu n’ihagarikamutima byamfashe, ariko amatangazo yawe yo antera ubwuzu." 
Psalms119:144 Ibyemezo byawe ni ubutabera bw’iteka ryose, umpere ubwenge kubyumva maze nzabeho." 
Psalms119:145 Uhoraho, ndagutabaza n’umutima wanjye wose, unsubize; ndashaka gukurikiza ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:146 Ndagutakambiye, urantabare, kugira ngo nkomeze ibyemezo byawe." 
Psalms119:147 Mbere y’umuseke mba ngutabaza, nizeye icyo uri buvuge." 
Psalms119:148 Mba nkanuye mbere y’uko bucya, kugira ngo nzirikane amasezerano yawe." 
Psalms119:149 Uhoraho, wumve ijwi ryanjye, kuko uri umunyampuhwe, umbesheho ukurikije amateka waciye." 
Psalms119:150 Inkozi z’ibibi zintoteza ziransatiriye, amategeko yawe ziyagendera kure." 
Psalms119:151 Wowe, Uhoraho, undi hafi, kandi amatangazo yawe ni yo y’ukuri." 
Psalms119:152 Kuva kera namenye ko ibyemezo byawe, wabishingiye kuzahoraho iteka." 
Psalms119:153 Reba ubutindi bwanjye, maze undokore, kuko ntibagiwe amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:154 Burana urubanza rwanjye, maze ungobotore, undwaneho ukurikije amasezerano yawe." 
Psalms119:155 Abagiranabi umukiro ubari kure, kuko batumvira ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:156 Uhoraho, impuhwe zawe ni igisagirane, umbesheho ukurikije amateka waciye." 
Psalms119:157 Abantoteza n’abanzi banjye ntibagira ingano, ariko sinateshutse ku byemezo byawe." 
Psalms119:158 Nshenguka umutima iyo mbonye abahakanyi, kuko badakurikiza amasezerano yawe." 
Psalms119:159 Reba ukuntu nkunda amabwiriza yawe, Uhoraho, umbesheho ukurikije impuhwe zawe." 
Psalms119:160 Mbere ya byose ijambo ryawe ni ukuri: n’amateka waciye aratunganye kandi azahoraho iteka. 
Psalms119:161 Ibikomangoma biranyikomye nta mpamvu, ariko amagambo yawe yonyine ni yo mfitiye igitinyiro." 
Psalms119:162 Nshimishwa n’amasezerano yawe, nk’uwabonye iminyago itabarika." 
Psalms119:163 Nanga ikinyoma urunuka, ariko ngakunda amategeko yawe." 
Psalms119:164 Ngusingiza karindwi mu munsi, ku mpamvu y’amateka atunganye waciye." 
Psalms119:165 Abakunda amategeko yawe bagira amahoro yuzuye, kuri bo nta kibakoma imbere." 
Psalms119:166 Uhoraho, nizeye uburokozi bwawe, kandi nakurikije amatangazo yawe." 
Psalms119:167 Nkurikiza ibyemezo byawe mbikuye ku mutima, maze nkabikunda bihebuje." 
Psalms119:168 Nkurikiza amatangazo n’ibyemezo byawe, kandi ibyo nkora byose uba ubibona." 
Psalms119:169 Uhoraho, induru mvuza ikugereho, umpe ubwenge ukurikije ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:170 Ugutakamba kwanjye nikugere imbere yawe, undokore ukurikije amasezerano yawe." 
Psalms119:171 Umunwa wanjye wamamaza ibisingizo byawe, kuko umenyesha ugushaka kwawe." 
Psalms119:172 Ururimi rwanjye niruhimbaze amasezerano yawe, kuko amatangazo yawe yose atunganye." 
Psalms119:173 Ikiganza cyawe nikimbere ikiramiro, kuko nahisemo amabwiriza yawe." 
Psalms119:174 Uhoraho, icyo nifuza ni uko wandokora, kandi amategeko yawe antera ibyishimo." 
Psalms119:175 Icyampa ngo mbereho kugusingiza, maze amateka waciye ambere ikiramiro." 
Psalms119:176 Ndabungera nk’intama yazimiye; ngwino utarure umugaragu wawe, kuko ntibagiwe amatangazo yawe." 
Psalms120:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko Igihe nari mu kaga natakambiye Uhoraho, maze na we aranyumva." 
Psalms120:2 Uhoraho, urandinde abantu babeshya, kandi bakarahira ibinyoma!" 
Psalms120:3 Nk’ubwo se Imana izabahanisha iki, mwebwe, murahira ibinyoma?" 
Psalms120:4 Izabahanisha imyambi yo ku rugamba, yatyarijwe ku makara y’umugenge." 
Psalms120:5 Mbega ibyago ngira byo gutura mu banyamahanga, no gutura rwagati mu bagome!" 
Psalms120:6 Natuye igihe kirekire mu bantu banga amahoro; 
Psalms120:7 maze naba mvuze amahoro, bo bagashoza intambara." 
Psalms121:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Amaso nyahanze impinga y’imisozi: mbese nzatabarwa n’uvuye he? 
Psalms121:2 Ubuvunyi bwanjye buturuka kuri Uhoraho waremye ijuru n’isi. 
Psalms121:3 Ntazareka intambwe zawe zidandabirana, umurinzi wawe ntasinziriye." 
Psalms121:4 Oya, umurinzi wa Israheli ntasinziriye, ntanahunyiza." 
Psalms121:5 Uhoraho ni we murinzi n’ubwikingo bwawe, ahora akurengera mu rugendo." 
Psalms121:6 Bityo ntuzicwa n’izuba ry’amanywa cyangwa umwezi wa nijoro. 
Psalms121:7 Uhoraho azakurinda ikibi cyose, anakurindire amagara yawe." 
Psalms121:8 Ni koko, Uhoraho azakurinda, kuva uhagurutse kugeza uhindukiye, uhereye ubu n’iteka ryose." 
Psalms122:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Mbega ibyishimo nagize igihe bambwiye, bati «Ngwino tujye mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho!»" 
Psalms122:2 None urugendo rwacu rutugejeje ku marembo yawe, Yeruzalemu!" 
Psalms122:3 Yeruzalemu, uri umurwa wubatse neza, umugi ucinyiye cyane." 
Psalms122:4 Aho ni ho imiryango ya Israheli, imiryango y’Uhoraho iza mu mutambagiro, gusingiza Uhoraho uko Israheli yabitegetswe." 
Psalms122:5 Aho ni ho hari intebe y’ukomoka kuri Dawudi, intebe yicaraho igihe aca imanza." 
Psalms122:6 Nimwifurize Yeruzalemu amahoro, muti «Abagukunda bose baragahorana ituze;" 
Psalms122:7 amahoro naganze mu nkike zawe, n’ituze rikwire mu rugo rwawe!»" 
Psalms122:8 Kubera abavandimwe banjye n’incuti zanjye, mpimbajwe no kukubwira nti «Amahoro naganze iwawe!»" 
Psalms122:9 Kubera Ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana yacu, nkwifurije ishya n’ihirwe!" 
Psalms123:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Nubuye amaso ari wowe ndangamiye, wowe uganje mu ijuru." 
Psalms123:2 Nk’uko abagaragu bahanga amaso ibiganza bya shebuja, nk’uko umuja adakura amaso ku kiganza cya nyirabuja, ni na ko natwe amaso twayahanze Uhoraho Imana yacu, dutegereje ko ari butugirire impuhwe." 
Psalms123:3 Tugirire impuhwe, Uhoraho, tugirire impuhwe, kuko twahagijwe agashinyaguro!" 
Psalms123:4 Tumaze guhazwa agasuzuguro k’abirasi n’agashinyaguro k’abikuza. 
Psalms124:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Iyo Uhoraho ataturengera — ngaho Israheli nibyivugire — 
Psalms124:2 iyo Uhoraho ataturengera, igihe abantu bari baduhagurukiye," 
Psalms124:3 baba baratumize bunguri mu mugurumano w’uburakari bwabo. 
Psalms124:4 Ubwo ngubwo amazi aba yaraturenzeho, umugezi uhurura uba waraduhitanye;" 
Psalms124:5 ubwo ngubwo amazi asuma, aba yaraturenze hejuru!" 
Psalms124:6 Arakarama Uhoraho, we utatugabije amenyo yabo!" 
Psalms124:7 Twararusimbutse nk’inyoni ivuye mu mutego w’umuhigi; umutego waracitse, turarusimbuka!" 
Psalms124:8 Ubuvunyi bwacu buba muri Uhoraho nyirizina, we waremye ijuru n’isi." 
Psalms125:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Abiringira Uhoraho, bameze nk’umusozi wa Siyoni: ntuhungabana, uhoraho iteka." 
Psalms125:2 Uko Yeruzalemu ikikijwe n’imisozi impande zose, ni ko Uhoraho abumbatiye umuryango we, kuva ubu n’iteka ryose." 
Psalms125:3 Nta na rimwe abategetsi b’abagiranabi bazigabiza umugabane w’intungane, ngo intungane na zo zibe zararikira ubukozi bw’ibibi." 
Psalms125:4 Uhoraho, abeza ubagirire neza, kimwe n’abafite umutima ugororotse." 
Psalms125:5 Naho abakurikiye inzira zigoramanze, Uhoraho urabigizeyo, kimwe n’abateza abandi ibyago! Amahoro arakaba kuri Israheli!" 
Psalms126:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Igihe Uhoraho agaruye i Siyoni abari barajyanywe bunyago, twabanje kugira ngo turi mu nzozi!" 
Psalms126:2 Ubwo umunwa wacu wuzura ibitwenge, n’ururimi rwacu rutera indirimbo z’ibyishimo. Nuko mu mahanga bakavuga bati «Uhoraho yabakoreye ibintu by’agatangaza!»" 
Psalms126:3 Koko Uhoraho yadukoreye ibintu by’agatangaza, ni yo mpamvu twasazwe n’ibyishimo!" 
Psalms126:4 Uhoraho, cyura amahoro abacu bajyanywe bunyago, ubazane nk’isumo y’amazi atembera mu butayu." 
Psalms126:5 Ni koko, umuhinzi ubibana amarira, asarurana ibyishimo." 
Psalms126:6 Uko agiye, agenda arira, yitwaje ikibibiro cy’imbuto; yagaruka, akaza yishimye, yikoreye imiba y’umusaruro." 
Psalms127:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Iri mu zo bitirira Salomoni. Niba Uhoraho atari we wubatse inzu, ba nyir’ukuyubaka baba bagokera ubusa. Niba Uhoraho atari we urinze umugi, abanyezamu bawo baba bagokera ubusa." 
Psalms127:2 N’aho mwabyuka mu gitondo cya kare kare, n’aho mwaryama mukesheje, mukanahirimbana mushaka ibibatunga, na bwo mwaba mugokera ubusa; ibyo byose Uhoraho abiha umukunzi we wisinziriye!" 
Psalms127:3 Ni ukuri koko, abana umuntu abyaye ni ingabire y’Uhoraho, abuzukuru n’abuzukuruza ni ingororano imuturukaho." 
Psalms127:4 Abana umuntu abyariye mu busore, bameze nk’imyambi mu ntoki z’uri ku rugamba." 
Psalms127:5 Hahirwa umuntu wayujuje mu mutana we! Nta bwo azaheranwa n’abanzi be, igihe azaba akotana na bo ku irembo ry’umugi." 
Psalms128:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Hahirwa umuntu wese utinya Uhoraho, agakurikira inzira ze!" 
Psalms128:2 Uzatungwa n’ibivuye mu maboko yawe, uzahirwe kandi byose bigutunganire." 
Psalms128:3 Umugore wawe azamera nk’umuzabibu, warumbukiye mu nzu yawe; abana bawe bazamera nk’ingemwe z’imitini, zikikije ameza yawe." 
Psalms128:4 Nguko uko ahabwa umugisha, umuntu utinya Uhoraho." 
Psalms128:5 Uhoraho araguhere umugisha i Siyoni, unagirire amahirwe muri Yeruzalemu, iminsi yose y’ubugingo bwawe," 
Psalms128:6 maze uzabone abana b’abana bawe! Amahoro arakaba kuri Israheli! 
Psalms129:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Barandwanyije kuva mu buto bwanjye, — ngaho Israheli nibyivugire!—" 
Psalms129:2 barandwanyije kuva mu buto bwanjye, ariko ntibashoboye kuntsinda." 
Psalms129:3 Umugongo wanjye bawuciyeho imihora, boshye abahinga umurima." 
Psalms129:4 Ariko Uhoraho ntarenganya, yacagaguye ingoyi abagome bambohesheje." 
Psalms129:5 Nibakorwe n’isoni abanga Siyoni bose, maze bihinde basubira inyuma!" 
Psalms129:6 Nibahinduke nk’ibyatsi bimera ku nzu, byo byumirana batarabirandura!" 
Psalms129:7 Ni byo umusaruzi atuzuza mu biganza bye, n’ubihambira ntabikuremo umuba." 
Psalms129:8 Abahisi ntibakababwire bati «Nimugire umugisha w’Uhoraho, tubasabiye umugisha mu izina ry’Uhoraho.»" 
Psalms130:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Uhoraho, ndagutakambira ngeze kure," 
Psalms130:2 Uhoraho, umva ijwi ryanjye. Utege amatwi ijwi ry’amaganya yanjye!" 
Psalms130:3 Uhoraho, uramutse witaye ku byaha byacu, Nyagasani, ni nde warokoka?" 
Psalms130:4 Ariko rero usanganywe imbabazi, kugira ngo baguhoranire icyubahiro." 
Psalms130:5 Nizeye Uhoraho n’umutima wanjye wose, nizeye ijambo rye." 
Psalms130:6 Umutima wanjye urarikiye Uhoraho kurusha uko umuraririzi ategereza umuseke, rwose kurusha uko umuraririzi ategereza umuseke." 
Psalms130:7 Israheli niyizere Uhoraho, kuko ahorana imbabazi, akagira ubuntu butagira urugero." 
Psalms130:8 Ni we uzakiza Israheli ibicumuro byayo byose. 
Psalms131:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, umutima wanjye nta cyo wakwiratana, n’amaso yanjye nta cyo arangamiye; nta bwo ndarikiye ubukuru, cyangwa ibintu by’agatangaza bindenze." 
Psalms131:2 Ahubwo umutima wanjye uratuje, kandi uriyoroheje, nk’umwana w’igitambambuga mu gituza cya nyina!" 
Psalms131:3 Israheli, wiringire Uhoraho, kuva ubu n’iteka ryose!" 
Psalms132:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Uhoraho, ibuka Dawudi, n’ubuyoboke bwe bwose," 
Psalms132:2 we warahiriye Uhoraho, agasezeranya Nyir’Ububasha wa Yakobo," 
Psalms132:3 ati «Nta bwo nzinjira mu ihema ryanjye, ngo ndambarare ku buriri bwanjye," 
Psalms132:4 ngo amaso yanjye ahumirize, n’ingohe zanjye zitore agatotsi," 
Psalms132:5 ntarabonera Uhoraho ikibanza, ntarabonera Nyir’ububasha wa Yakobo aho atura!»" 
Psalms132:6 Twari twumvise ko buba i Efurata twabusanze mu mataba y’i Yahari! 
Psalms132:7 Nimuhogi twinjire aho atuye, dupfukame imbere y’umusego w’ibirenge bye!" 
Psalms132:8 Haguruka, Uhoraho, uze mu buruhukiro bwawe, wowe, n’Ubushyinguro bw’ububasha bwawe!" 
Psalms132:9 Abaherezabitambo bawe nibambare ubutungane, maze abayoboke bawe bavuze impundu." 
Psalms132:10 Girira umugaragu wawe Dawudi, woye gutererana umwami wisigiye amavuta." 
Psalms132:11 Uhoraho yarahiye Dawudi, ni indahiro atazivuguruzaho, ati «Nzitoranyiriza umwe mu bahungu bawe, nzamugire umwami uzakuzungura!" 
Psalms132:12 Abahungu bawe nibakomeza isezerano twagiranye, n’amatangazo nabamenyesheje, abahungu babo na bo bazicara ku ntebe yawe y’ubwami ubuziraherezo.»" 
Psalms132:13 Kuko Uhoraho yihitiyemo Siyoni, ashaka ko imubera ingoro," 
Psalms132:14 ati «Ni yo buruhukiro bwanjye iteka ryose, ni ho nzatura kuko nabyifuje!" 
Psalms132:15 Nzayiha umugisha, nyigwizemo ibiyitunga, abakene bayo mbahaze umugati;" 
Psalms132:16 abaherezabitambo bayo mbasesureho umukiro, n’abayoboke bayo bazavuze impundu." 
Psalms132:17 Ni ho nzaturutsa inkomoko ya Dawudi, nzahakomeze urumuri rw’intore yanjye." 
Psalms132:18 Abanzi be nzabakoza ikimwaro, maze ikamba rye rizamubengeranireho.»" 
Psalms133:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Mbega ngo biraba byiza, bikananyura umutima, kwibumbira hamwe, turi abavandimwe!" 
Psalms133:2 Bimeze nk’amavuta y’umubavu asutswe mu mutwe, agasesekara mu bwanwa, mu bwanwa bwa Aroni, maze akamanukira ku ncunda z’umwambaro we." 
Psalms133:3 Bimeze nk’ikime cyo ku musozi wa Herimoni, kisesa mu bitwa bya Siyoni! Aho nyine ni ho Uhoraho yagishishirije imigisha, hamwe n’ubugingo ingoma ibihumbi." 
Psalms134:1 Indirimbo y’amazamuko. Cyo nimusingize Uhoraho, mwese abagaragu b’Uhoraho, bahora mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, mu bikari by’Inzu y’Imana yacu." 
Psalms134:2 Nimukeshe amajoro mwerekeje amaboko ku Ngoro ntagatifu, maze musingize Uhoraho." 
Psalms134:3 Uhoraho, naguhere umugisha kuri Siyoni, we waremye ijuru n’isi!" 
Psalms135:1 Alleluya! Nimusingize izina ry’Uhoraho, nimumusingize, bagaragu b’Uhoraho," 
Psalms135:2 mwebwe abahora mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, mu bikari by’Inzu y’Imana yacu." 
Psalms135:3 Nimusingize Uhoraho, kuko ari umunyampuhwe, nimuririmbe izina rye, kuko ari umugwaneza." 
Psalms135:4 Koko Uhoraho yihitiyemo Yakobo, Israheli ayigira inyarurembo ye." 
Psalms135:5 Jyewe nzi neza ko Uhoraho ari igihangange, ko Umutegetsi wacu asumba ibigirwamana byose." 
Psalms135:6 Icyo Uhoraho ashatse cyose, aragikora, ari mu ijuru, ari no mu nsi, ari mu nyanja, ari n’ikuzimu.." 
Psalms135:7 Atumburutsa ibicu abivanye iyo gihera, akarekura imirabyo imvura ikagwa, akabyutsa imiyaga mu ndiri yayo." 
Psalms135:8 Ni we warimbuye ibyavutse uburiza mu Misiri, ari ubw’abantu, ari n’ubw’amatungo." 
Psalms135:9 Yohereje ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza, iwawe mu Misiri nyir’izina, arwanya Farawo n’abagaragu be bose." 
Psalms135:10 Ni we watsinze amahanga menshi, yica n’abami b’ibihangange," 
Psalms135:11 barimo Sihoni, umwami w’Abahemori, na Ogi, umwami wa Bashani, n’ingoma zose za Kanahani;" 
Psalms135:12 nuko igihugu cyabo agitangaho umunani, umunani yageneye Israheli, umuryango we." 
Psalms135:13 Uhoraho, izina ryawe rizavugwa iteka, uzahora wibukwa n’imbyaro zose," 
Psalms135:14 kuko Uhoraho arenganura umuryango we, akagirira impuhwe abagaragu be." 
Psalms135:15 Ibigirwamana by’amahanga ni feza na zahabu, ni ibintu byabumbwe n’intoki za muntu." 
Psalms135:16 Bifite umunwa, ariko ntibivuge, bikagira amaso, ariko ntibibone;" 
Psalms135:17 bifite amatwi, ariko ntibyumve, nta mwuka na busa ubiva mu kanwa!" 
Psalms135:18 Ababikoze barakamera nka byo, kimwe n’ababyiringira bose!" 
Psalms135:19 Mwebwe abo mu nzu ya Israheli, nimusingize Uhoraho, mwebwe abakomoka kuri Aroni, nimusingize Uhoraho," 
Psalms135:20 mwebwe abo mu bwoko bwa Levi, nimusingize Uhoraho, mwebwe abatinya Uhoraho, nimusingize Uhoraho!" 
Psalms135:21 Uhereye i Siyoni nihasingizwe Uhoraho, we uganje muri Yeruzalemu!" 
Psalms136:1 Alleluya! Nimushimire Uhoraho, kuko ari umugwaneza, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:2 Nimushimire Imana isumba izindi zose, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:3 Nimushimire Umutegetsi w’abategetsi, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:4 Ni we wenyine wakoze ibintu by’agatangaza, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:5 arema ijuru abigiranye ubuhanga, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:6 akomeza ubutaka hejuru y’amazi, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:7 Ni we wahanze imuri nini, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:8 arema izuba ngo rigenge amanywa, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:9 arema ukwezi n’inyenyeri ngo bigenge ijoro, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:10 Ni we washegeshe Misiri yica uburiza bwayo, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:11 maze ahavana Abayisraheli, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:12 abigiranye ububasha n’ukuboko kureze, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:13 Ni we wasatuyemo kabiri inyanja y’Urufunzo, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:14 maze ayinyuzamo Abayisraheli, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:15 ayirohamo Farawo n’ingabo ze, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:16 Nuko yiyoborera umuryango we mu butayu, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:17 abatsindira abami bakomeye cyane, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:18 arimbura abami b’ibihangange, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:19 barimo Sihoni, umwami w’Abahemori, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:20 na Ogi, umwami wa Bashani, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:21 Maze ibihugu byabo abibahaho umunani, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:22 umunani yageneye Israheli, umuyoboke we, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:23 Ni we watwibutse igihe twari ducishijwe bugufi, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka," 
Psalms136:24 maze atugobotora abanzi bacu, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:25 Ibiremwa byose abiha ikibitunga, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka." 
Psalms136:26 Nimushimire Imana iganje mu ijuru, kuko urukundo rwe ruhoraho iteka!" 
Psalms137:1 Ku nkombe z’inzuzi z’i Babiloni, ni ho twicaraga, maze tukarira iyo twibukaga Siyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Mu mashami y’imizibaziba yaho, ni ho twamanikaga inanga zacu." 
Psalms137:3 Ni bwo abari baratwigaruriye badusabaga kubaririmbira, n’abatwicishaga agahato, bakatwinginga ngo tubabyinire, bagira bati «Nimuturirimbire akaririmbo k’i Siyoni.»" 
Psalms137:4 Twaririmba dute indirimbo y’Uhoraho mu gihugu cy’amahanga? 
Psalms137:5 Yeruzalemu, ningira ubwo nkwibagirwa, indyo yanjye izumirane!" 
Psalms137:6 Ururimi rwanjye ruzumire mu gisenge cy’akanwa, niba ndetse kukuzirikana, niba ntagize Yeruzalemu imena mu binshimisha!" 
Psalms137:7 Uhoraho, urajye wibuka abahungu ba Edomu, ku munsi wa Yeruzalemu, bo bavugaga ngo «Nimuyirandurane n’imizi n’imiganda!»" 
Psalms137:8 Yewe, mwari wa Babiloni, wayogoje ibihugu, hahirwa uzakwihimura ibyago waduteye!" 
Psalms137:9 Hahirwa uzasumira ibitambambuga byawe, maze akabihondagura ku rutare!" 
Psalms138:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, ndakogeza n’umutima wanjye wose, ndakuririmbira imbere y’ab’ijuru bose." 
Psalms138:2 Mpfukamye nerekeye Ingoro yawe ntagatifu, maze nkogeza izina ryawe, kubera impuhwe zawe n’ubudahemuka bwawe, kuko warangije amasezerano yawe, bigatuma ubwamamare bwawe burushaho kugaragara." 
Psalms138:3 Umunsi nagutakiye, waranyumvise, maze urampumuriza, unyongerera imbaraga." 
Psalms138:4 Uhoraho, abami bo ku isi bose bazagusingiza, kuko bumvise amasezerano wivugiye." 
Psalms138:5 Bazarata inzira z’Uhoraho, bavuga bati «Koko ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ntirigira urugero!" 
Psalms138:6 N’ubwo Uhoraho akomeye bwose, ntabura kwita ku baciye bugufi, naho abirasi akabamenyera kure!»" 
Psalms138:7 N’aho naba mu makuba y’urudubi, urangoboka ukambeshaho; ukubitagura abanzi banjye, maze indyo yawe igatuma mbatsinda." 
Psalms138:8 Uhoraho azankorera byose! Uhoraho, impuhwe zawe zihoraho ubuziraherezo, ntuzatererane uwo waremesheje ibiganza byawe!" 
Psalms139:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, undeba mu nkebe z’umutima, ukamenya wese;" 
Psalms139:2 iyo nicaye n’iyo mpagaze, byose uba ubizi, imigambi yanjye uyimenya mbere y’igihe;" 
Psalms139:3 iyo ngenda n’iyo ndyamye, byose uba ubiruzi neza, mu migenzereze yanjye yose nta na kimwe kigusoba." 
Psalms139:4 Ijambo riba ritarangera ku rurimi, woweho, Uhoraho, ukaba warimenye kare ryose." 
Psalms139:5 Ari imbere, ari n’inyuma yanjye, hose uba uhari, maze ukantwikiriza ikiganza cyawe." 
Psalms139:6 Bene ubwo bumenyi bumbera urujijo bukandenga; burajimije by’ihabu ku buryo ntabasha kubushyikira. 
Psalms139:7 Najya hehe kure y’uruhanga rwawe? Nahungira hehe kure y’amaso yawe? 
Psalms139:8 N’aho nazamuka ku ijuru, uba uhari! N’aho narigita nkaryama ikuzimu, uba uhari!" 
Psalms139:9 N’aho namera amababa nk’ay’umuseke weya, maze nkajya kwiturira ku mpera y’inyanja," 
Psalms139:10 n’aho ngaho ukuboko kwawe ni ko kuhanjyana, indyo yawe ntigire ubwo indekura." 
Psalms139:11 Wenda nava aho nibwira nti «Nibura umwijima wo uzantwikira, maze amanywa ahinduke nk’ijoro rinkikije!»" 
Psalms139:12 Nyamara kuri wowe, n’ahatabona ntihakubera umwijima, n’ijoro ubwaryo rirabonesha, uboshye amanywa." 
Psalms139:13 Ni wowe waremye ingingo zanjye, umbumbabumbira mu nda ya mama." 
Psalms139:14 Ndagushimira ko wandemye ku buryo buhimbye, ibikorwa byawe biratangaje: umutima wanjye urabizi neza rwose." 
Psalms139:15 Amagufwa yanjye ntiyakwikinze, igihe naremerwaga mu ibanga, nkaremwaremwa mu nda ya mama." 
Psalms139:16 Nkiri n’urusoro, amaso yawe yarambonaga; iminsi wangeneye yose yari isanzwe yanditse mu gitabo cyawe, na mbere yuko umwe muri yo utangira kubaho." 
Psalms139:17 Mana yanjye, mbega ngo ibitekerezo byawe birandenga, n’umubare wabyo ukambera urujijo!" 
Psalms139:18 Iyo niyumije ngo ndabibarura, nsanga biruta umusenyi ubwinshi; nakeka ko mbirangije, ngasanga ukindenze!" 
Psalms139:19 Mbe Mana, wakuyeho umugiranabi, n’abamena amaraso bakigira kure yanjye!" 
Psalms139:20 Dore abanzi bawe bitwaje izina ryawe bagamije kubeshya, bakarivuga bagambiriye kugira nabi." 
Psalms139:21 Uhoraho, nabura nte kwanga abakwanga? Nabura nte kuzinukwa abakurwanya?" 
Psalms139:22 Dore mbanga urunuka, babaye abanzi banjye bwite." 
Psalms139:23 Mana yanjye, ngenzura ugeze mu nkebe z’umutima wanjye; nsuzuma, maze umenye ibyo mpirimbanira." 
Psalms139:24 Urebe niba ntari mu nzira mbi, maze ungarure mu nzira wigishije kuva kera!" 
Psalms140:1 Igenewe umuririmbisha. Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. 
Psalms140:2 Uhoraho, nkiza umuntu w’umugiranabi, undinde n’abanyarugomo," 
Psalms140:3 ba bandi bahora bazirikana kugira nabi, buri munsi bagasembura intambara;" 
Psalms140:4 bagatyaza ururimi rwabo nk’urw’inzoka, bagahora bajunditse mu kanwa ubumara nk’ubw’impiri." 
Psalms140:5 Uhoraho, ntutume ngwa mu maboko y’umugiranabi, undinde n’abanyarugomo, ba bandi bahora bazirikana icyangusha." 
Psalms140:6 Abirasi banteze umutego ngo bamfatiremo, babohanyije imigozi barayishandika, maze ku nzira nyuramo bahaca ibico." 
Psalms140:7 Nuko mbwira Uhoraho, nti «Ni wowe Imana yanjye! Uhoraho, tega amatwi, wumve ijwi ryanjye rigutakambira!»" 
Psalms140:8 Nyagasani Mana yanjye, wowe mbaraga nkesha agakiza kose, urarinde umutwe wanjye ku munsi w’intambara." 
Psalms140:9 Uhoraho, ntuzemerere umugiranabi icyo yifuza, ntuzareke imigambi ye imushobokera, naho ubundi yakwishyira hejuru." 
Psalms140:10 Abantangatanze hose bamvuga nabi, iyo nabi irakabahama!" 
Psalms140:11 Barakanyagirwa n’amakara yaka, barohwe mu muriro, mu nyenga batazashobora kuvamo!" 
Psalms140:12 Abanyakarimi kabi ntibakabeho mu gihugu; umuntu w’umunyarugomo n’umugiranabi, ibyago birakamujujubya ubudahwema." 
Psalms140:13 Nzi ko Uhoraho azarenganura abanyakababaro, akazarengera abakene." 
Psalms140:14 Nuko intungane zizogeze izina ryawe, abantu b’intagorama bature imbere yawe." 
Psalms141:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, ndagutabaza, tebuka umbe hafi! Jya utega amatwi ijwi ryanjye igihe ngutakiye." 
Psalms141:2 Isengesho ryanjye niribe nk’ububani bucumbekera imbere yawe, n’amaboko ndambuye abe nk’ituro rya nimugoroba." 
Psalms141:3 Uhoraho, genzura irembo ry’ururimi rwanjye, ushyire umurinzi ku munwa wanjye." 
Psalms141:4 Ntureke umutima wanjye utwarwa n’ikibi, ngo nohoke mu bikorwa by’ubugiranabi, mfatanyije n’abantu b’abagome; sinzasogongere na busa ku byo bakunda." 
Psalms141:5 Intungane inkubise impana, byo nabyemera: biba ari ukungirira neza! Naho amavuta y’abagiranabi, ntakangere ku mutwe bibaho, ahubwo isengesho ryanjye rihore rirwanya ubugome bwabo!" 
Psalms141:6 Abatware babo bazahananturirwa mu manga, ni bwo bazumva ko amagambo yanjye yari aboneye." 
Psalms141:7 Nk’uko barima ubutaka, bakabutengura, ni ko amagufwa yabo azanyanyagira mu marembo y’ikuzimu." 
Psalms141:8 Nyagasani Mana yacu, ni wowe mpanze amaso, ni wowe mpungiraho, urandinde gupfa!" 
Psalms141:9 Undinde imitego banshandikiye, undinde n’imishibuka y’inkozi z’ibibi;" 
Psalms141:10 abo bagiranabi abe ari bo bagwa mu mitego mitindi, naho jye nyice iruhande nikomereze." 
Psalms142:1 Ni inyigisho iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi, ikaba n’isengesho yaba yaravuze igihe yari yihishe mu buvumo." 
Psalms142:2 Ndanguruye ijwi ntabaza Uhoraho, ndanguruye ijwi ntakambira Uhoraho." 
Psalms142:3 Ndamutekerereza akababaro kanjye, ndamurondorera akaga ndimo." 
Psalms142:4 Igihe ntakigira icyo nshoboye, ni wowe umenya aho ngana; mu nzira ngendamo bahanteze umutego." 
Psalms142:5 Reba iburyo, witegereze: nta muntu n’umwe ukimenya! Sinkigira amahungiro, nta n’umwe ukinyitayeho!" 
Psalms142:6 Ndagutakiye, Uhoraho, mvuga nti «Ni wowe bwikingo bwanjye, ni wowe mugabane wanjye ku isi y’abazima!»" 
Psalms142:7 Wite ku miborogo yanjye, kuko ndi inkeho! Nkiza abantoteza, kuko bandusha amaboko." 
Psalms142:8 Nkura mu buroko, kugira ngo namamaze izina ryawe; maze intungane zizankikize, kuko uzaba wangiriye neza." 
Psalms143:1 Ni zaburi iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Uhoraho, umva isengesho ryanjye, tega amatwi amaganya yanjye, maze unsubize ukurikije ubudahemuka n’ubutungane byawe!" 
Psalms143:2 Ntushyire umuyoboke wawe mu rubanza, kuko imbere yawe nta n’umwe waba umwere." 
Psalms143:3 Hari umwanzi unyibasiye, ubugingo bwanjye arabukunenga hasi, dore aranyohera mu mwijima, mu bapfuye bo mu gihe cya kera." 
Psalms143:4 Sinkigira akuka, umutima wanjye wahahamutse." 
Psalms143:5 Ndibuka iminsi yo hambere, nkazirikana ibyo wakoze byose, ngatekereza ibikorwa by’amaboko yawe," 
Psalms143:6 maze nkarambura ibiganza mbikwerekejeho: kuko imbere yawe meze nk’ubutaka bwumiranye. 
Psalms143:7 Gira unsubize, Uhoraho, dore nta cyo nkishoboreye! Ntumpishe uruhanga rwawe, naho ubundi namera nk’abamanurirwa mu mva." 
Psalms143:8 Ngaragariza impuhwe zawe kuva mu gitondo, kuko ari wowe niringiye. Menyesha inzira ngomba kunyura, dore ni wowe ndangamiye." 
Psalms143:9 Uhoraho, nkiza abanzi banjye, dore ni wowe nashatseho ubuhungiro." 
Psalms143:10 Nyigisha kujya nkora icyo ushaka, kuko ari wowe Mana yanjye. Umwuka wawe mwiza, unjyane ahantu hategamye." 
Psalms143:11 Uhoraho, uzagirira izina ryawe umbesheho; uzagirira ubutungane bwawe umvane mu kaga ndimo;" 
Psalms143:12 uzagirira impuhwe zawe urimbure abanzi banjye, kandi utsembe abanyibasiye bose, kuko ndi umuyoboke wawe." 
Psalms144:1 Iri mu zo bitirira Dawudi. Nihasingizwe Uhoraho, rutare rwanjye, we utoza amaboko yanjye ibyo kurwana, n’intoki zanjye ibyo kurema urugamba." 
Psalms144:2 Ni we mbaraga zanjye, n’ubuhungiro bwanjye, ibirindiro byanjye n’umukiza wanjye; ni we ngabo inkingira, nkihugika iruhande rwe; ni na we ucogoza amahanga ngo nyategeke." 
Psalms144:3 Uhoraho, umuntu ni iki ngo abe yagushishikaza? Mwene muntu ni iki ngo ube wamwitaho?" 
Psalms144:4 Umuntu ameze nk’umwuka uhumekwa rimwe, n’iminsi ye ikamera nk’igicucu gihita." 
Psalms144:5 Uhoraho, bogeka ijuru umanuke; kora ku misozi, icumbe umwotsi!" 
Psalms144:6 Ohereza imirabyo, utatanye abanzi; rasa imyambi yawe ubakwize imishwaro." 
Psalms144:7 Ramburira ukuboko kwawe mu ijuru, maze undohore mu mazi magari, unkize amaboko y’abanyamahanga," 
Psalms144:8 bo bafite umunwa uvuga ibinyoma gusa, n’ukuboko kwabo kw’indyo kukavuguruza indahiro yabo." 
Psalms144:9 Mana yanjye, nzakuririmbira indirimbo nshya, ngucurangire inanga y’imirya cumi," 
Psalms144:10 wowe uha abami kuganza, ugakiza Dawudi, umugaragu wawe." 
Psalms144:11 Urankize inkota kirimbuzi, umvane mu maboko y’abanyamahanga, bo bafite umunwa wo kuvuga ibinyoma gusa, n’imvugo yabo ntijyane n’ibikorwa." 
Psalms144:12 Abahungu bacu barabe nk’ingemwe, zakuze neza kuva zikiri nto. Abakobwa bacu barabe beza, nk’inkingi zitakishijwe Ingoro." 
Psalms144:13 Ibigega byacu birakuzura no hejuru, bisesekare imbuto z’amoko yose. Intama zacu zizororoke incuro ibihumbi, zibe uduhumbagiza mu bikingi byacu." 
Psalms144:14 Inka zacu zirakagwira, nta cyuho, nta bushimusi, nta n’induru ikivugwa iwacu." 
Psalms144:15 Hahirwa umuryango wifitiye ibyo byose, hahirwa umuryango Uhoraho abereye Imana!" 
Psalms145:1 Igisingizo, cyitiriwe Dawudi. Mana yanjye, mwami wanjye, nzakurata, nzasingiza izina ryawe iteka ryose." 
Psalms145:2 Buri munsi nzagusingiza, nogeze izina ryawe iteka ryose." 
Psalms145:3 Uhoraho ni igihangange, akaba rwose akwiriye gusingizwa; ubwamamare bwe ntibugereranywa." 
Psalms145:4 Kuva mu gisekuru kugera mu kindi bazibukiranye ibyo wakoze, bamamaze ibigwi byawe." 
Psalms145:5 Nzajya ndondorera abandi ibitangaza byawe, mvuge ikuzo ryawe ry’urukerereza, rijyana n’ubwiza bwawe." 
Psalms145:6 Bazajya bavuga ububasha bwawe, wagaragaje ukora ibintu bihambaye, nanjye mvuge ubuhangange bwawe." 
Psalms145:7 Bazajya bahimbaza urwibutso rw’ibyiza byinshi wagiriye abantu, maze bahe amashyi n’impundu ubutungane bwawe." 
Psalms145:8 Uhoraho ni umunyampuhwe n’umunyaneza, atinda kurakara kandi akagira urugwiro." 
Psalms145:9 Uhoraho agirira bose ibambe, maze imbabazi ze zigasakara ku biremwa bye byose." 
Psalms145:10 Uhoraho, ibiremwa byawe byose nibijye bigushima, abayoboke bawe bagusingize!" 
Psalms145:11 Bazarate ikuzo ry’ingoma yawe, batangaze ubushobozi bwawe," 
Psalms145:12 bamenyeshe bene muntu ibigwi byawe, n’ikuzo ritamanzuye ry’ingoma yawe." 
Psalms145:13 Ingoma yawe ni ingoma ihoraho mu bihe byose, ubutegetsi bwawe buzaramba, uko ibisekuruza bigenda bisimburana. Uhoraho ni mutabeshya, akaba indahemuka mu byo akora byose." 
Psalms145:14 Uhoraho aramira abagwa bose, abunamiranye akabaha kwemarara." 
Psalms145:15 Bose ni wowe bahanga amaso bakwiringiye, maze ukabaha icyo barya igihe kigeze." 
Psalms145:16 Ubumbura ikiganza cyawe, maze ibinyabuzima byose ukabihaza icyo byifuza." 
Psalms145:17 Uhoraho ni umunyabutungane mu nzira ze zose, akarangwa n’urukundo mu bikorwa bye byose." 
Psalms145:18 Uhoraho aba hafi y’abamwiyambaza, hafi y’abamwiyambaza babikuye ku mutima." 
Psalms145:19 Ibyo abamwubaha bashaka arabikora; baba bamutabaje, akabumva, akabagoboka." 
Psalms145:20 Uhoraho arinda abamukunda bose, ariko abagiranabi bose akazabarimbura." 
Psalms145:21 Umunwa wanjye uzavuga ibisingizo by’Uhoraho, n’ikinyamubiri cyose kizarate izina rye ritagatifu, iteka ryose rizira iherezo!" 
Psalms146:1 Alleluya! Mutima wanjye, singiza Uhoraho!" 
Psalms146:2 Nzasingiza Uhoraho mu buzima bwanjye bwose, ncurangire Imana yanjye igihe cyose nzaba nkiriho." 
Psalms146:3 Ntimukiringire abantu bakomeye, ntimukizigire mwene muntu udashobora kubakiza." 
Psalms146:4 Umwuka we umara kumuvamo, agasubira mu gitaka yaturutsemo; kuva ubwo, imigambi yari afite ikayokana na we." 
Psalms146:5 Hahirwa uwo Imana ya Yakobo ibereye umuvunyi, maze akiringira gusa Uhoraho, Imana ye!" 
Psalms146:6 We Muremyi w’ijuru n’isi, inyanja n’ibiyirimo byose, akaba mudahemuka iteka ryose," 
Psalms146:7 akarenganura abapfa akarengane, abashonji akabaha umugati. Uhoraho abohora imfungwa," 
Psalms146:8 Uhoraho ahumura amaso y’impumyi, Uhoraho agorora ingingo z’abahinamiranye, Uhoraho agakunda ab’intungane." 
Psalms146:9 Uhoraho arengera abavamahanga, agashyigikira impfubyi n’umupfakazi, ariko akayobagiza inzira z’ababi." 
Psalms146:10 Uhoraho ni nyir’ingoma ubuziraherezo, akaba Imana yawe, Siyoni, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana iteka." 
Psalms148:1 Alleluya! Nimusingirize Uhoraho mu ijuru, mumusingize mwebwe abatuye hejuru y’ibicu!" 
Psalms148:2 Nimumusingize, bamalayika be mwese, namwe, ngabo ze mwese nimumusingize!" 
Psalms148:3 Nimumusingize, zuba nawe kwezi, mumusingize, nyenyeri zose zakirana!" 
Psalms148:4 Juru ryisumbuye ayandi, ngaho musingize, nawe mazi yo hejuru y’ikirere!" 
Psalms148:5 Byose nibisingize izina ry’Uhoraho, we wategetse bigahita bibaho;" 
Psalms148:6 yabishyize mu myanya bizahoramo iteka, abishingira amategeko atazigera akuka." 
Psalms148:7 Nimusingize Uhoraho, namwe biremwa byo ku isi: bisimba byo mu nyanja no mu bizenga," 
Psalms148:8 muriro n’amahindu, rubura n’ibihu, nawe muyaga w’inkubi usohoza ijambo rye." 
Psalms148:9 Nimumusingize misozi mwese n’utununga, namwe biti byera imbuto n’amasederi yose;" 
Psalms148:10 nyamaswa z’ishyamba n’amatungo yo mu ngo, nyoni zo mu kirere n’ibikururuka hasi!" 
Psalms148:11 Nimumusingize bami b’isi, hamwe n’amahanga yose, bikomangoma byo ku isi namwe bacamanza," 
Psalms148:12 basore namwe bakobwa b’inkumi, basaza namwe kandi rubyiruko!" 
Psalms148:13 Bose nibasingize izina ry’Uhoraho, kuko ari ryo rihatse ayandi yose, n’ikuzo rye rigasumba ijuru n’isi." 
Psalms148:14 Ni we wateye ishema n’isheja umuryango we, bituma abayoboke be bamurata: ari bo Bayisraheli, imbaga y’ibyegera bye! Alleluya!" 
Psalms149:1 Alleluya! Nimuririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nshya, mumusingirize mu ikoraniro ry’abayoboke be." 
Psalms149:2 Israheli niyishimire Uwayiremye, abahungu b’i Siyoni bahimbazwe n’ibirori bakorera umwami wabo." 
Psalms149:3 Nibasingize izina rye bahamiriza, bamuvugirize ingoma n’inanga." 
Psalms149:4 Kuko Uhoraho ashimishwa n’umuryango we, ab’intamenyekana akabahaza umukiro." 
Psalms149:5 Abayoboke be nibahimbazwe no kumukuza, ndetse bavugirize impundu no ku mariri yabo;" 
Psalms149:6 bakore mu gahogo barata Imana, ari na ko bafashe mu ntoki inkota y’amugi abiri;" 
Psalms149:7 kugira ngo bihimure amahanga, bahanireho imiryango y’ahandi;" 
Psalms149:8 abami bayo bababoheshe iminyururu, abanyacyubahiro bayo babate ku mapingu," 
Psalms149:9 maze babarangirizeho urubanza rwabaciriwe. Ngiryo ishema ry’abayoboke b’Imana! Alleluya! 
Psalms150:1 Alleluya! Nimusingirize Imana mu Ngoro yayo ntagatifu, muyisingirize aho itetse ijabiro!" 
Psalms150:2 Nimuyisingirize ibigwi yagize, muyisingirize ubukuru bwayo butagira imbibi." 
Psalms150:3 Nimuyisingize muvuza akarumbeti, muyisingize mucuranga inanga n’iningiri." 
Psalms150:4 Nimuyisingize muvuza ingoma kandi muhamiriza, muyisingize mucuranga ibinyamirya, muvuza n’imyirongi." 
Psalms150:5 Nimuyisingize muvuza ibyuma birangira, muyisingize muvuza ibyuma binihira neza. Ibihumeka byose nibisingize Uhoraho!" 
Proverbs1:1 Imigani ya Salomoni, mwene Dawudi, umwami wa Israheli." 
Proverbs1:2 Iyi migani igamije kwigisha ubuhanga n’ubumenyi, no gusobanura amagambo aboneye." 
Proverbs1:3 Igamije gutoza uburere nyakuri burangwa n’ubutabera, ubutungane n’umurava." 
Proverbs1:4 Ab’ibihubutsi ibaha kwitonda, abasore ikabaha kumenya no guhumuka." 
Proverbs1:5 Umuhanga nayumva aziyungura ubumenyi, naho umunyabwenge abonereho uko ayobora abandi." 
Proverbs1:6 Igamije kandi kungura ubwenge bwo gusobanukirwa n’imigani n’amarenga, ibiganiro by’abanyabuhanga hamwe n’inshoberamahanga zabo." 
Proverbs1:7 Gutinya Uhoraho ni ryo shingiro ry’ubumenyi, naho abasazi bahinyura ubuhanga n’uburere." 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wanjye, ujye wumva inyigisho za so, kandi ntugahinyure icyo nyoko agutoza;" 
Proverbs1:9 bizakubera nk’ikamba ry’ineza ku mutwe, cyangwa urunigi rwiza mu ijosi ryawe." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wanjye, abagome nibashaka kukoshya, uzange!" 
Proverbs1:11 Bazagushuka bati «Ngwino tureme igico, tumene amaraso, umwere tumugwe gitumo nta mpamvu;" 
Proverbs1:12 tuzamurigisa ari mutaraga nk’uzimiriye ikuzimu, agende wese nk’uwo bahambye!" 
Proverbs1:13 Tuzaronka ibyiza by’amoko menshi, amazu yacu tuyuzuze iminyago." 
Proverbs1:14 Nawe uzagira uruhare rwawe, twese tuzasangire iryo yabo.»" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wanjye, ntuzabakurikire, uzirinde guca mu mayira banyuzemo," 
Proverbs1:16 kuko bashingura intambwe bagamije ikibi, bakihutira kumena amaraso." 
Proverbs1:17 Ni byo, nta cyo bimaze gutega inyoni, kandi zose ziruzi umutego!" 
Proverbs1:18 Ariko bo, barema ibico, nyamara amaraso bagambiriye kuzamena ni ayabo bwite kandi babe ari bo bafatirwa mu mutego wabo!" 
Proverbs1:19 Nguko uko bigendekera umuntu wese urarikira iminyago: ageza n’aho yinyaga ubuzima bwe bwite. 
Proverbs1:20 Ubuhanga buvugira ahagaragara, bugatera hejuru mu mayira yose;" 
Proverbs1:21 ijwi ryabwo rikarenga hejuru y’andi yose, rigahamagarira hafi y’imiryango y’umugi, rigira riti" 
Proverbs1:22 «Yemwe, mwa bihubutsi mwe, muzaba ibicucu kugeza ryari? Abapfayongo bazishimira guseka ubusa kugeza ryari? Naho se injiji zo zizanga ubwenge kugeza ryari?" 
Proverbs1:23 Nimugarukire amabwiriza yanjye! Dore, ngiye kubasakazaho umwuka wanjye, mbamenyeshe amagambo yanjye." 
Proverbs1:24 Kubera ko nabahamagaye mukananira, nkabahereza ikiganza ntihagire n’umwe ucyitaho," 
Proverbs1:25 mukamaganira kure inama zanjye kandi mukanga amabwiriza yanjye," 
Proverbs1:26 nanjye rero nzabashungera amakuba nabagwirira. Koko, nzabaseka igihe icyago kizaba cyabugarije;" 
Proverbs1:27 cyabateye nk’inkubi y’umuyaga, amakuba yabayogoje nka serwakira, agahinda n’ishavu bibashengura." 
Proverbs1:28 Ubwo nyine bazampamagara, ariko sinzitaba; bazanshakashaka ariko ntibazambona." 
Proverbs1:29 Kubera ko banze kujijuka, ntibahitemo gutinya Uhoraho," 
Proverbs1:30 bakanga inama zanjye, kandi bagasuzugura amabwiriza yanjye," 
Proverbs1:31 ni cyo gituma bazarya imbuto z’ingeso zabo, bagahazwa n’imigambi yabo mibi." 
Proverbs1:32 Ab’ibihubutsi bazira kutumva inama, kandi bakicwa no kwishongora." 
Proverbs1:33 Ariko untega amatwi, agira amahoro, akaba mu ituze kure y’impungenge z’icyago.»" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wanjye, uzumve amagambo yanjye kandi amategeko yanjye aguturemo." 
Proverbs2:2 Uzatege ugutwi ubuhanga, umutima wawe wumve ukuri." 
Proverbs2:3 Ni koko, niwitabaza ubwenge ukiyambaza ubushishozi," 
Proverbs2:4 ukabushakashaka nka feza, ukabucukumbura nk’ubukungu," 
Proverbs2:5 ni bwo uzasobanukirwa gutinya Uhoraho icyo ari cyo, kandi ubonereho kumenya Imana," 
Proverbs2:6 kuko Uhoraho ari we utanga ubuhanga, mu munwa we ni ho haturuka ubumenyi n’ukuri." 
Proverbs2:7 Ab’indakemwa abafashisha inama ze, abanyamurava akababera nk’ingabo ibakingira;" 
Proverbs2:8 arinda abagenda mu nzira iboneye, akaragira abayoboke be." 
Proverbs2:9 Ubwo rero, uzasobanukirwa n’ubutabera, ubutungane n’umurava; mbese uzamenya inzira zose zitanga amahirwe." 
Proverbs2:10 Bityo rero, ubuhanga nibumara kugucengera mu mutima, n’ubumenyi bukagutera kunezerwa," 
Proverbs2:11 ni bwo ubushishozi buzakurinda, n’ubwenge bukubere ubuhungiro." 
Proverbs2:12 Bizakubuza icyerekezo kibi, bigutsindire umuntu wese ugenza amagambo y’ubugome," 
Proverbs2:13 n’abataye inzira y’ubutungane bakaboneza iy’umwijima; 
Proverbs2:14 bamwe nyine banyurwa no gukora ikibi, bagahimbazwa n’ubugome bwabo bukabije." 
Proverbs2:15 Ni bo barangwa n’uburyarya, kandi bakanyura inzira ziziguye." 
Proverbs2:16 Nugenza utyo, uzirinda umugore w’undi cyangwa se uw’umuvantara w’amagambo asize umunyu," 
Proverbs2:17 wa wundi watereranye incuti ye yo mu busore kandi akibagirwa isezerano ry’Imana ye. 
Proverbs2:18 Ni koko, inzu ye ihengamiye ku rupfu, naho inzira ze zigana mu nyenga." 
Proverbs2:19 Umuntu wese ugiye iwe, ntaba akigarutse ukundi, nta n’ubwo agera mu nzira y’ubuzima." 
Proverbs2:20 Naho wowe, uzanyure inzira z’ab’inyangamugayo, ukurikize imyifatire y’intungane." 
Proverbs2:21 Ab’indakemwa bazatura mu gihugu, abanyamurava bakiganzemo;" 
Proverbs2:22 naho abagome bacyirukanwemo, abagambanyi na bo bagicibwemo." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wanjye, ntuzibagirwe inyigisho zanjye, kandi umutima wawe ujye wizirika ku mategeko yanjye;" 
Proverbs3:2 bizakuviramo kuramba biguhe n’amahoro menshi. 
Proverbs3:3 Ubupfura n’ubudahemuka uzabikomereho, ubyambare mu ijosi, ubyandike mu mutima wawe," 
Proverbs3:4 kuko ari byo bizagutonesha ukagira ishya mu maso y’Imana n’ay’abantu. 
Proverbs3:5 Uzizere Uhoraho n’umutima wawe wose, woye kwiringira ubwenge bwawe;" 
Proverbs3:6 mu migenzereze yawe yose, ujye umwibuka, na we azaringaniza inzira zawe." 
Proverbs3:7 Ntuzibonemo ubuhanga, ahubwo uzatinye Uhoraho kandi wirinde ikibi," 
Proverbs3:8 bizatuma umubiri wawe unoga, n’ingingo zawe zose zigororoke." 
Proverbs3:9 Uzahimbaze Uhoraho mu byo utunze byose, umuture umuganura w’umusaruro wawe;" 
Proverbs3:10 bityo ibigega byawe bizuzura ingano, na divayi isendere urwengero rwawe." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wanjye, ntugahinyure uburere Uhoraho agutoza, cyangwa ngo winubire amabwiriza ye," 
Proverbs3:12 kuko Uhoraho acyaha uwo akunda nk’uko umubyeyi agenzereza umwana umwizihiza. 
Proverbs3:13 Hahirwa uwageze ku buhanga, akaba yarungutse ubwenge," 
Proverbs3:14 kuko uwo mutungo uruta feza, n’inyungu yabyo igasumba kure iya zahabu." 
Proverbs3:15 Ubuhanga buruta amasaro y’igiciro, kandi nta n’ikindi bihwanye mu byo umuntu yakwifuza." 
Proverbs3:16 Iburyo bwabwo hatanga kuramba, naho ibumoso hagatanga umukiro n’ikuzo!" 
Proverbs3:17 Inzira zabwo zuzuyemo ibyishimo kandi ziganjemo amahoro. 
Proverbs3:18 Ni igiti cy’ubuzima ku babushyikiriye; hahirwa ababufite! 
Proverbs3:19 Uhoraho yahangishije isi ubuhanga, akomeresha ijuru ubwenge." 
Proverbs3:20 Ubuhanga bwe ni bwo bwatumye inyenga zifunguka, n’ibicu bikabyara urume." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wanjye, ubwitonzi n’ubushishozi ntukabikureho amaso, ahubwo uzabikurikirane," 
Proverbs3:22 ubitungishe roho yawe, bibe umurimbo w’ijosi ryawe."
