Proverbs3:23 Bityo rero, uzagenda mu nzira nta cyo wikanga, ikirenge cyawe cyoye gutsikira." 
Proverbs3:24 Nujya kuryama nta kizaguhungabanya, uzasinzira mu mahoro." 
Proverbs3:25 Ntuzatinye icyago cy’impanuka cyangwa igitero cy’abagome," 
Proverbs3:26 kuko Uhoraho azakwishingira, intambwe zawe akazirinda umutego." 
Proverbs3:27 Ntukirengagize kugirira neza ubikeneye kandi ubishoboye. 
Proverbs3:28 Niba ufite icyo agusaba, ntukamubwire ngo «Genda uzagaruke ejo, ni ho nzaguha.»" 
Proverbs3:29 Ntukagambanire mugenzi wawe kandi ari we mwabanaga akwizeye. 
Proverbs3:30 Ntihazagire uwo mutongana nta mpamvu, mu gihe nta kibi yagukoreye." 
Proverbs3:31 Ntuzifuze kumera nk’umunyarugomo, cyangwa ngo ukurikire imwe mu nzira ze," 
Proverbs3:32 kuko Uhoraho yanga abagome, agakunda ab’indakemwa." 
Proverbs3:33 Uhoraho avuma inzu y’umugome, ariko agaha umugisha aho intungane zituye." 
Proverbs3:34 Asuzugura abapfayongo, agatonesha abicisha bugufi." 
Proverbs3:35 Abanyabuhanga bazagabirwa ikuzo, naho ibicucu bikorwe n’ikimwaro." 
Proverbs4:1 Bana, nimwumve inyigisho y’umubyeyi, mwihatire kumenya ubwenge icyo ari cyo." 
Proverbs4:2 Ni koko, inyigisho nabahaye ni ingirakamaro: ntimuzarenge ku byo nabatoje." 
Proverbs4:3 Nanjye, data namubereye umwana mwiza, naho mama yankundaga nk’umuhungu w’ikinege." 
Proverbs4:4 Nuko data akanyigisha, agira ati «Umutima wawe ujye wibuka amagambo yanjye, ukurikize amabwiriza yanjye, maze bizakuviremo kubaho." 
Proverbs4:5 Jya wunguka ubuhanga, wunguke ubwenge; ntukabyirengagize, ngo uce ukubiri n’amagambo yanjye." 
Proverbs4:6 Ntuzatatire ubuhanga, buzakuragira; uzabukunde, buzakurinda." 
Proverbs4:7 Ujye ushakashaka ubuhanga: ni byo ntangiriro yabwo. Ujye ushakashaka ubwenge wifashishije ibyo utunze byose! 
Proverbs4:8 Uzabupfumbate, buzagukuza; nubuhobera buzaguhesha icyubahiro." 
Proverbs4:9 Buzakwambika umutamirizo w’ineza ku mutwe, bukwambike ikamba ry’ikuzo.»" 
Proverbs4:10 Mwana wanjye, tega amatwi, wakire amagambo yanjye, bizaguha kuramba umare imyaka myinshi." 
Proverbs4:11 Nakuyoboye mu nzira y’ubuhanga, ngutoza inzira y’ukuri." 
Proverbs4:12 Nta kizakubogamira mu rugendo rwawe, kandi niwiruka ntuzatsikira." 
Proverbs4:13 Uzatsimbarare ku burere bwawe, ntuzabute, ahubwo uzabukomeze, kuko ari bwo buzima bwawe!" 
Proverbs4:14 Ntuzakurikire inzira y’abagome, cyangwa ngo uce mu nzira y’abagizi ba nabi." 
Proverbs4:15 Uzahirinde, ntuzahanyure! Uzabyihunze uboneze ahandi!" 
Proverbs4:16 Kuko bo batajya basinzira, batabanje gukora ikibi, ntibagoheka batagize uwo bagusha." 
Proverbs4:17 Koko rero umugati barya ni umwibano, na divayi banywa bayikesha urugomo." 
Proverbs4:18 Inzira y’intungane yo, ni nk’umuseke ukebye ugatangaza kugeza ku manywa y’ihangu;" 
Proverbs4:19 naho inzira y’abagome ni nk’umwijima, ntibaba bazi icyo bari butsikireho." 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wanjye, witondere amagambo yanjye, utege amatwi ibyo nkubwiye!" 
Proverbs4:21 Ntibizakujye kure y’amaso, uzabibike mu mutima wawe," 
Proverbs4:22 kuko ubizirikanye, bimubera ubugingo kandi bikamukomeza." 
Proverbs4:23 Cyane cyane uzahore urinze umutima wawe, kuko ari wo ubuzima bushingiyeho." 
Proverbs4:24 Uzamagane amagambo y’ubugome, ugendere kure imvugo isebanya." 
Proverbs4:25 Jya ureba imbere yawe, ugende uromboreje inzira imwe." 
Proverbs4:26 Shakira ibirenge byawe aho binyura, kandi inzira zawe zihore ziboneye." 
Proverbs4:27 Ntukayobagurike hirya no hino, ibirenge byawe ujye ubihungisha ikibi." 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wanjye, uritondere ubuhanga bwanjye, utege amatwi amabwiriza yanjye," 
Proverbs5:2 kugira ngo ugumane ibitekerezo biboneye, n’imvugo yawe ihoremo ubumenyi." 
Proverbs5:3 Ni koko, iminwa y’umugore w’indaya iba isize ubuki, n’amagambo ye aryohereye kurusha amavuta." 
Proverbs5:4 Ariko ibyo ntibimubuza gusharira nk’umuravumba, amaherezo ugasanga atyaye nk’inkota ifite ubugi impande zombi." 
Proverbs5:5 Ibirenge bye biramanuka bigana urupfu, intambwe ze zasatiriye inyenga." 
Proverbs5:6 Aho kugira ngo ashake inzira igana ubuzima, arorongotana aho atazi." 
Proverbs5:7 None rero, bana banjye, muntege amatwi, mwoye kwirengagiza amagambo yanjye." 
Proverbs5:8 Uzagendere kure inzira ye, woye kwegera umuryango w’inzu ye," 
Proverbs5:9 hato atazavaho aha icyubahiro cyawe abandi, n’ubuzima bwawe akabutegeza abanyarugomo;" 
Proverbs5:10 abavantara bagahazwa n’imitsi yawe, ibyo wagokeye bigatunga undi," 
Proverbs5:11 maze amaherezo wamara kuzongwa wese, ugacura imiborogo." 
Proverbs5:12 Ubwo rero uzicuza, ugira uti «Byangendekeye bite kugira ngo nange guhanwa, umutima wanjye usuzugure inyigisho?" 
Proverbs5:13 Ni kuki ntumvise ijwi ry’abigisha banjye, nkanga gutega amatwi abanyoboraga?" 
Proverbs5:14 Habuze gato ngo mbonere akaga mu ikoraniro no mu muryango!» 
Proverbs5:15 Uzajye unywa amazi yo mu iriba ryawe, amazi ava mu isoko wicukuriye." 
Proverbs5:16 Amasoko yawe ntakavuburire hanze, n’amariba yawe ngo asendere mu mayira." 
Proverbs5:17 Uzayiharire wenyine, woye kuyasangira n’abanyamahanga." 
Proverbs5:18 Isoko yawe nigire umugisha! Jya unezezwa n’umugore washatse mukiri bato; 
Proverbs5:19 akubere nk’impara y’inkundwakazi, cyangwa isha iteye ubwuzu. Amabere ye azahore agushyushya, ntugahweme kunyurwa n’urukundo rwe." 
Proverbs5:20 Mwana wanjye, ni kuki wararukira umugore w’undi, ugahobera umuvantara umusoma mu gituza?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ni koko, imigenzereze ya buri wese yiyerekana mu maso y’Uhoraho, agakurikirana inzira ze." 
Proverbs5:22 Umugome azafatirwa mu mutego w’ubwicanyi bwe, ajishwe n’ingoyi y’icyaha cye." 
Proverbs5:23 Azicwa no kutagira uburere, azire ubusazi bwe bwamurenze." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wanjye, niba warishingiye mugenzi wawe, hakaba hari n’undi mwagiranye amasezerano," 
Proverbs6:2 niba rero waraguye mu mutego biturutse ku magambo y’akanwa kawe, n’imvugo yawe bwite ikaba ari yo ikuboshye," 
Proverbs6:3 dore uko uzagenza, mwana wanjye, kugira ngo wigobotore. Kubera ko mugenzi wawe yakwigaruriye, genda umwinginge, umuguyaguye." 
Proverbs6:4 Uramenye ntuzasinzire cyangwa ngo urushye ugoheka; 
Proverbs6:5 ugomba kwibohora mu mutego, nk’uko isha cyangwa inyoni zigobotora iyo zatezwe." 
Proverbs6:6 Wowe w’umunebwe, sanga urutozi! Uzitegereze imigenzereze yarwo, uzahungukira ubwenge." 
Proverbs6:7 Nta we urugenzura, ntirugira umukoresha cyangwa umutware." 
Proverbs6:8 Mu mpeshyi rwishakira ibizarutunga, naho ku mwero rugahunika ibiryo byarwo." 
Proverbs6:9 Wowe w’umunebwe, uzaryamira kugeza ryari? Uzabaduka mu bitotsi byawe ryari?" 
Proverbs6:10 Uti «Henga nsinzire gato, ngoheke gato, nirambike gato, mbe nipfumbase!»" 
Proverbs6:11 Ngaha rero ubukene bwagutungura nk’igisambo, n’ubwinazi bukakugwa gitumo nk’igisumizi." 
Proverbs6:12 Umuntu w’imbunzamunwa aba ari ikiburaburyo n’inkozi y’ibibi! 
Proverbs6:13 Agenda yica ijisho, akavugisha ibirenge, agaca amarenga akoresheje intoki." 
Proverbs6:14 Ubutindi bumwarika ku mutima, agahorana imigambi y’ubugome, kandi aba ari gashozantambara." 
Proverbs6:15 Ni yo mpamvu amakuba azamugwa gitumo, akenyagurike ibi bitagira urwungo." 
Proverbs6:16 Hari ibintu bitandatu Uhoraho yanga, hakaba na birindwi bimutera ishozi. Ni ibi:" 
Proverbs6:17 amaso y’agasuzuguro, akarimi kabeshya, ibiganza bimena amaraso y’umwere," 
Proverbs6:18 umutima wiga imigambi y’ubugome, intambwe zikatarije ikibi," 
Proverbs6:19 uwo batanzeho umugabo, akemeza ibinyoma, n’uwigira gashozantambara mu bavandimwe." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wanjye, uzakurikize amategeko ya so, kandi woye guhinyura inyigisho za nyoko." 
Proverbs6:21 Uzabikomeze ku mutima igihe cyose, kandi uhore ubyiziritse ku ijosi." 
Proverbs6:22 Aho uzajya hose bizakuyobore, bibe hafi y’uburiri bwawe bikubikire, maze abe ari byo utekereza ukangutse." 
Proverbs6:23 Koko rero, itegeko ni itara, naho inyigisho ikaba urumuri. Inama z’uburere bwiza ni inzira y’ubuzima," 
Proverbs6:24 ni zo zizakurinda umugore w’inkozi y’ibibi, n’akarimi gasize umunyu k’umuvantara." 
Proverbs6:25 Ntuzararikire uburanga bwe mu mutima wawe, kandi ntuzemere ko akwicira ijisho," 
Proverbs6:26 kuko umugore w’indaya aba yishakira igisate cy’umugati, naho uwashyingiwe, iyo musambana, ashobora kukwicira ubuzima." 
Proverbs6:27 Umuntu yakwirahuriraho umuriro ate, maze imyenda ye ntishye?" 
Proverbs6:28 Naho se uwagenda hejuru y’amakara agurumana, ibirenge bye byareka gushya bite?" 
Proverbs6:29 Nguko uko bigendekera ushigukira umugore wa mugenzi we: uzamujyaho wese, ntazamuvaho amahoro." 
Proverbs6:30 Igisambo kibira ko gishonje, kugira ngo cyuzuze igifu cyacyo kirimo ubusa, ibyo ntikibigayirwa." 
Proverbs6:31 Nyamara ariko iyo gifashwe, gisubiza ibyo cyibye incuro ndwi, kigatanga ibyo gifite mu nzu byose." 
Proverbs6:32 Naho usambanya umugore w’undi aba ari umusazi; amukomoraho intandaro y’urupfu. 
Proverbs6:33 Bimukururira inkoni n’ibitutsi, kandi ikimwaro cye ntigihanagurika." 
Proverbs6:34 Koko rero, gufuha bizatera umugabo umujinya mwinshi, yoye kuzagira impuhwe mu gihe cyo kwihorera." 
Proverbs6:35 Nta ndishyi ibaho azemera; nta yo azakira n’iyo wamuhongera ibya mirenge. 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wanjye, uzite ku magambo yanjye, amategeko yanjye uzayahamane." 
Proverbs7:2 Amategeko yanjye ujye uyatunganya, bizakuviramo kubaho, inyigisho zanjye zikubere nk’imboni zo mu maso." 
Proverbs7:3 Uzabihambire ku ntoki zawe, ubyandike mu mutima wawe, nk’aho ari ku kabaho." 
Proverbs7:4 Uzabwire ubuhanga, uti «Uri mushiki wanjye!» naho ubwenge ubwite ngo «Mugenzi wanjye.»" 
Proverbs7:5 Ibyo bizakurinda umugore w’indaya n’umuvantara ufite amagambo aryohereye. 
Proverbs7:6 Nahagaze mu idirishya, ndebera mu myenge yaryo," 
Proverbs7:7 mbona kimwe muri bya bicucu; mu bahungu narabutswemo umusore utagira ubwenge. 
Proverbs7:8 Yanyuraga mu nzira, hafi y’aho uwo mugore w’indaya yari atuye, nuko akaboneza agana iwe," 
Proverbs7:9 haba ku mugoroba ku gicamunsi, haba mu gicuku mu ijoro rwagati." 
Proverbs7:10 Noneho uwo mugore akamusanganira, yambaye nk’indaya, uburyarya bumwuzuye umutima." 
Proverbs7:11 Aba yarubiye, nta rutangira, amaguru ye ahora yirukanka, ntajya aguma iwe." 
Proverbs7:12 Nguwo mu mayira, nguwo mu isoko; aho ari hose, aba afite icyo yubikiye." 
Proverbs7:13 Ubwo rero, aramusingira, akamusomagura, akamubwira nta soni, ati" 
Proverbs7:14 «Nagombaga gutura igitambo cyo gushimira Uhoraho, none uyu munsi narangije amasezerano yanjye." 
Proverbs7:15 Ni yo mpamvu naje kugusanganira kugira ngo ngushake, none nakubonye." 
Proverbs7:16 Uburiri bwanjye nabushasheho ibiringiti, imyenda y’amabara menshi, na hariri yo mu Misiri." 
Proverbs7:17 Nabuminjagiyeho manemane, ishangi n’umusagavu." 
Proverbs7:18 Ngwino twishimishe kugeza mu gitondo; tunezerwe hamwe mu rukundo! 
Proverbs7:19 Umugabo wanjye ntari imuhira, yazindukiye ahantu kure;" 
Proverbs7:20 yitwaje isaho ya feza, azagaruka ukwezi gutaha kwazoye.»" 
Proverbs7:21 Ubwo nyine yifashisha iyo mvugo y’indyarya, akamwemeza, akamushukisha amagambo ye asize umunyu." 
Proverbs7:22 Nuko wa musore akamwoma mu nyuma, nk’imfizi y’inka igiye mu ibagiro, cyangwa umusazi baboshye bakamujyana mu ihaniro kugeza ubwo umwambi umuhinguranije umwijima." 
Proverbs7:23 Aba ameze nk’inyoni yirukankira umutego, ntamenye ko ari ubuzima bwe agiye koreka." 
Proverbs7:24 None rero, bana, nimuntege amatwi, mwumve amagambo mbabwira." 
Proverbs7:25 Umutima wawe ntuzigere uboneza muri ibyo birere, ngo uyobere muri ayo mayira." 
Proverbs7:26 Koko rero, bene abo bagore bishe benshi, barabagusha, ndetse muri abo bishwe, harimo abanyembaraga!" 
Proverbs7:27 Inzu y’indaya ni inzira iboneza ikuzimu, imanuka igana mu masenga y’umwijima n’urupfu." 
Proverbs8:1 Mbese ubuhanga ntibutera hejuru? Mbese ubwenge ntiburangurura ijwi? 
Proverbs8:2 Buhagarara mu mpinga ndende y’imisozi iruhande rw’umuhanda, bugahamagarira mu mayira abiri," 
Proverbs8:3 hafi y’imiryango binjiriramo bajya mu mugi, bugira buti" 
Proverbs8:4 «Bantu mwese, ni mwe mpamagara! Ijwi ryanjye rirabwira bene muntu!" 
Proverbs8:5 Ab’ibicucu, nimumenye kwitonda; abapfayongo, mumenye ubwenge." 
Proverbs8:6 Nimutege amatwi, ibyo mbabwira ni ingirakamaro, kandi iminwa yanjye ivuga ukuri." 
Proverbs8:7 Ni koko, umunwa wanjye uvuga ukuri gusa, ubugome buwutera ishozi." 
Proverbs8:8 Amagambo yanjye yose araboneye, ntarangwamo igitotsi cy’uburyarya n’ubugome." 
Proverbs8:9 Uzi kumva wese asanga ari amanyakuri, kandi yorohera uwajijukiwe n’ubumenyi." 
Proverbs8:10 Nimufate ibyo mbatoza, aho guharanira feza; muhitemo ubumenyi aho gushaka zahabu iyunguruye.»" 
Proverbs8:11 Koko rero, ubuhanga busumbye amasaro y’igiciro, kandi mu byo umuntu yifuza, nta na kimwe bihwanye." 
Proverbs8:12 Jyewe ubuhanga, indaro yanjye ni ubwitonzi, nkagira n’ubwenge bwo gushishoza." 
Proverbs8:13 Kubaha Uhoraho, ni ukwanga ikibi. Nanga ubwirasi, agasuzuguro, imyifatire mibi n’umunwa wuzuye ubugome." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndangwa n’inama n’ubushishozi, ndi ubwenge, mfite n’ububasha." 
Proverbs8:15 Ni jye wimika abami, n’ibikomerezwa nkabiha guca amateka aboneye." 
Proverbs8:16 Abategetsi ni jye bakesha gutwara, n’ibikomangoma nkabiha guca imanza zitabera." 
Proverbs8:17 Jyewe nkunda abankunda, kandi abanshaka bose barambona." 
Proverbs8:18 Iwanjye haba ubukire n’ikuzo, ubukungu budashira n’ubutabera." 
Proverbs8:19 Imbuto yanjye iruta kure zahabu iyunguruye, kandi umusaruro wanjye usumbye kure feza y’igiciro." 
Proverbs8:20 Ngendera mu nzira y’ubutabera, no mu nzira y’ubutungane," 
Proverbs8:21 kugira ngo nkungahaze abankunda kandi ngo nuzuze ibigega byabo. 
Proverbs8:22 Uhoraho ni jye yahereyeho arema, mbanziriza ibindi yahanze byose." 
Proverbs8:23 Nimitswe kuva kera na kare, kuva mu ntangiriro, mbere y’uko isi ibaho." 
Proverbs8:24 Igihe amazi magari yari atarabaho, n’amasoko adudubiza atararemwa, jyewe nari naravutse." 
Proverbs8:25 Igihe imisozi n’utununga byari bitarashingwa, jyewe nari naravutse." 
Proverbs8:26 Nariho mbere y’uko arema isi, hamwe n’ubutaka n’ibiyigize byose." 
Proverbs8:27 Igihe yahangaga ijuru agaca uruziga rw’ikirere hejuru y’amazi magari, nari mpari." 
Proverbs8:28 Igihe yakoranyaga ibicu byo mu kirere, n’amasoko yo mu nsi y’isi akuzura amazi," 
Proverbs8:29 igihe yategekaga inyanja kutarenga inkombe yayo, akanatera imbago z’urugabaniro rw’isi," 
Proverbs8:30 ubwo nari iruhande rwe nk’umwana ukunzwe, ngahora mushimisha buri munsi, simpweme kumukina imbere," 
Proverbs8:31 no kwisanzura ku isi ye, kandi nezezwa no kuba mu bantu." 
Proverbs8:32 None rero, bana banjye, muntege amatwi. Hahirwa abakurikira inzira zanjye!" 
Proverbs8:33 Nimwumve inyigisho, muce akenge, mwoye kuyirengagiza." 
Proverbs8:34 Hahirwa umuntu untega amatwi, akaguma ku muryango wanjye, agahora ari maso imbere y’inzu yanjye!" 
Proverbs8:35 Koko rero, uwambonye aba yabonye ubuzima, aba yaronse ubutoni kuri Uhoraho." 
Proverbs8:36 Naho uncumuyeho aba yibabaje ubwe, abanyanga bose baba bakunda urupfu.»" 
Proverbs9:1 Ubuhanga bwubatse inzu yabwo, burayinogereza buteramo inkingi ndwi," 
Proverbs9:2 bubaga amatungo yabwo, butegura divayi, maze ndetse butunganya ameza." 
Proverbs9:3 Bwohereje abaja babwo, na bwo bwigira mu mpinga z’umugi burangurura ijwi, bugira buti" 
Proverbs9:4 «Ushaka kujijuka, nanyure hano!» Bubwira n’uw’igicucu, buti" 
Proverbs9:5 «Nimuze, murye ku mugati wanjye, munywe no kuri divayi nabateguriye." 
Proverbs9:6 Nimureke ubupfayongo, muboneze inzira y’ubwenge maze muzabeho!»" 
Proverbs9:7 Uhana umusekanyi agakurizaho kugusuzugura, wacyaha umugome bikagukururira ibitutsi." 
Proverbs9:8 Ntuzahane uhora asekana, atazavaho akwanga; ariko nuhana umuhanga azagukundira icyo." 
Proverbs9:9 Uzihere umuhanga azunguka kurushaho, niwigisha intungane iziyungura ku byo isanganywe." 
Proverbs9:10 Kubaha Uhoraho, ni yo ntangiriro y’ubuhanga, bikaba n’ubumenyi buranga abatagatifujwe be." 
Proverbs9:11 Koko rero, nzatuma ubaho igihe kirekire, kandi n’imyaka y’ubuzima bwawe iziyongera." 
Proverbs9:12 Niba uri umuhanga, ni wowe wigirira neza, naho niba ukwenana, ni wowe wihemukira." 
Proverbs9:13 Ubusazi ni umugore nyirabiruru, ni umupfayongo kandi ntabimenye!" 
Proverbs9:14 Yicaye mu muryango w’inzu ye, ku ntebe, mu mpinga y’umugi," 
Proverbs9:15 akabiza abagenzi bigendera, agira ati" 
Proverbs9:16 «Ushaka kujijuka, nanyure hano!» Abwira n’uw’igicucu, ati" 
Proverbs9:17 «Amazi yahishwe araryoha, naho ibiryo byo mu mbere bikaryohera!»" 
Proverbs9:18 Ubwo ariko cya gicucu nticyamenya ko cyegereye abapfuye, kimwe n’abandi yahamagaye bakagana mu kibaya cy’ikuzimu." 
Proverbs10:1 Iyi migani ni iya Salomoni. Umwana witonda anezeza se, naho uw’igicucu agatera nyina agahinda." 
Proverbs10:2 Umutungo w’umuhuguzanyo nta cyo umara, ariko ubutungane bukiza ingoyi y’urupfu." 
Proverbs10:3 Uhoraho ntiyemera ko intungane yicwa n’inzara, ahubwo yamagana umururumba w’abagiranabi." 
Proverbs10:4 Ukuboko k’umunebwe kuramukenesha, naho uk’umunyamwete kukamukiza." 
Proverbs10:5 Uwizigamira mu mpeshyi aba ari umunyabwenge, naho usinzira imyaka yeze ni ikigoryi!" 
Proverbs10:6 Umugisha uranga umutwe w’intungane, naho umunwa w’abanyabyaha uba uhishe urugomo." 
Proverbs10:7 Intungane bahora bayibuka bakayirata, naho izina ry’abagiranabi rirazima." 
Proverbs10:8 Umutima w’umunyabuhanga wemera amategeko, naho umuntu w’umunyamagambo aba yihiga." 
Proverbs10:9 Ugendera mu budahemuka, agendana amahoro, naho ukurikiza inzira ziziguye, bazamutahura." 
Proverbs10:10 Uwica ijisho atera guhangayika, naho ucyaha yeruye agatera amahoro." 
Proverbs10:11 Umunwa w’intungane ni isoko y’ubuzima, naho uw’abagome uhisha urugomo." 
Proverbs10:12 Urwango rukurura amahane, naho urukundo rukababarira ibicumuro byose." 
Proverbs10:13 Iminwa y’umunyabwenge irangwa n’ubuhanga, naho umugongo w’igicucu ukavuzwa amahiri." 
Proverbs10:14 Abanyabuhanga bahunika ubwenge; naho akanwa k’umusazi, ni rwo rupfu rumwugarije!" 
Proverbs10:15 Umutungo w’umukungu ni umurwa we ukomeye, igihe rubanda bicwa n’ubukene bwabo." 
Proverbs10:16 Igihembo cy’intungane ni cyo kiyibeshaho, naho inyungu y’umugome ikamubyarira icyaha." 
Proverbs10:17 Ukurikiza inama nziza aba ari mu nzira y’ubuzima, ariko uwanga kuburirwa arayoba." 
Proverbs10:18 Ushaka kubundikira urwango rwe avugana uburyarya, kandi utinyuka gusebanya ni umusazi." 
Proverbs10:19 Aho basukagura amagambo, icyaha ntikihatangwa, naho uzirika ururimi rwe ni umunyabwenge." 
Proverbs10:20 Ururimi rw’intungane ni nka feza iyunguruye, naho umutima w’umugiranabi nta gaciro ufite." 
Proverbs10:21 Iminwa y’intungane igaburira imbaga, naho abasazi bakicwa n’ubucucu bwabo." 
Proverbs10:22 Umugisha w’Uhoraho ni wo ukiza, naho umuhihibikano nta cyo umaze." 
Proverbs10:23 Umupfayongo anezezwa no gukora ishyano, naho ubuhanga bukizihira umuntu ushyira mu gaciro." 
Proverbs10:24 Icyo umugiranabi atinya ni cyo kimubaho, ariko icyo intungane yifuje, iragihabwa." 
Proverbs10:25 Iyo serwakira ije ihitana umugiranabi, intungane yo ikaguma mu byimbo, ntiyegayege." 
Proverbs10:26 Nk’uko siki yonona amenyo, umwotsi ukangiza amaso, ni ko umunebwe agenzereza abamukoresha." 
Proverbs10:27 Kubaha Uhoraho bituma umuntu aramba; naho iminsi y’abagiranabi iragabanywa. 
Proverbs10:28 Intungane zitegereje ibyishimo, naho icyizere cy’abagiranabi kizayoyoka." 
Proverbs10:29 Inzira y’Uhoraho ni ubuhungiro bw’inyangamugayo, naho inkozi z’ibibi ikazibera impamvu yo kurimbuka." 
Proverbs10:30 Intungane nta na rimwe zizakangaranywa, ariko abagiranabi bo, ntibazaguma mu gihugu." 
Proverbs10:31 Umunwa w’intungane usohokamo ubuhanga, naho ururimi rugenza amagambo y’ubugome ruzacibwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Iminwa y’intungane irangwa n’ubugwaneza, naho ururimi rw’ababi rukagenza ubugome." 
Proverbs11:1 Uhoraho azirana n’iminzani ibeshya, ariko akunda ibipimo by’ukuri." 
Proverbs11:2 Ubwirasi buhamagara ikimwaro, ariko abiyoroshya bahorana ubuhanga." 
Proverbs11:3 Umurava w’abantu b’intabera ni wo ubayobora, ariko ubugome bw’abagambanyi ni bwo bubarimbura." 
Proverbs11:4 Umunsi w’urubanza nuza, ubukire nta cyo buzaba bukimaze, ariko ubutungane bwo bukiza ingoyi y’urupfu." 
Proverbs11:5 Ubutungane bw’umuntu w’indakemwa bumuringaniriza inzira, ariko umugiranabi yicwa n’ubugome bwe." 
Proverbs11:6 Ubutungane bw’abantu b’intabera burabakiza, naho abagambanyi bagafatwa n’irari ryabo." 
Proverbs11:7 Iyo umugiranabi apfuye, amizero ye aba ashize, n’ubukungu yishingikirizagaho, nta cyo buba bukimumariye." 
Proverbs11:8 Intungane irokorwa mu makuba, umugiranabi akayagwamo mu cyimbo cyayo." 
Proverbs11:9 Umunwa w’umugome urimbura mugenzi we, naho intungane zikarokorwa n’ubumenyi bwazo." 
Proverbs11:10 Iyo intungane zinezerewe, umugi wose urishima, iyo abagiranabi barimbutse, impundu ziravuga." 
Proverbs11:11 Umugisha w’abantu b’intabera wubaka umugi, naho umunwa w’abagiranabi ukawusenya." 
Proverbs11:12 Usuzugura mugenzi we, aba ari imburabwenge, ariko umuntu uzi ubwenge aricecekera." 
Proverbs11:13 Nyir’ugusebanya amena amabanga, utari inzimuzi ahishira byinshi." 
Proverbs11:14 Imbaga itagira umutware, irorama, naho umukiro uturuka ku bajyanama benshi." 
Proverbs11:15 Uwishingira abandi yikururira ibyago, ariko uwirinda kubemararira agira amahoro." 
Proverbs11:16 Umugore ugwa neza ahabwa ikuzo, abantu b’abanyamwete bakaronka ubukungu." 
Proverbs11:17 Umuntu w’umunyampuhwe yigirira neza ubwe, naho umunyamwaga ababaza umubiri we." 
Proverbs11:18 Umugiranabi aronka inyungu idafashe, naho ubiba ubutungane agahabwa igihembo gishyitse." 
Proverbs11:19 Ukomera ku butungane aba agana ubuzima, uwoma mu nyuma y’ikibi agasanga urupfu." 
Proverbs11:20 Imitima y’uburyarya itera ishozi Uhoraho, ab’umutima uboneye akabatonesha." 
Proverbs11:21 Nta kabuza umugiranabi azahanwa, ariko abakomoka ku ntungane bazakizwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Umugore w’uburanga ariko utagira ubwenge, ni nk’impeta ya zahabu ikwikiye ku kizuru cy’ingurube." 
Proverbs11:23 Intungane zihora zishaka icyiza gusa, naho abagiranabi bikururira uburakari." 
Proverbs11:24 Hariho abatanga batitangiriye itama, bakongererwa, hari n’abagundira ibintu bagakabya, bagatindahara." 
Proverbs11:25 Umutima ugira ubuntu uzatengamara, uwicira inyota abandi, na we azayikizwa." 
Proverbs11:26 Uwimana ingano, rubanda baramuvuma, ariko uzigurisha bamwifuriza umugisha." 
Proverbs11:27 Ushaka icyiza azatoneshwa, naho ugambiriye ikibi, kizamwokama." 
Proverbs11:28 Uwiringira ubukire bwe, azarimbuka, naho intungane zizasagamba nk’amababi atoshye." 
Proverbs11:29 Utera impagarara mu rugo rwe, bizamuviramo umuyaga, kandi umusazi azagaragira umunyamutima." 
Proverbs11:30 Imbuto y’intungane ni nk’igiti cy’ubuzima, naho abagiranabi bagakinduka." 
Proverbs11:31 Niba intungane ihabwa ibiyikwiye ikiri ku isi, hazacura iki ku bagome n’abanyabyaha?" 
Proverbs12:1 Uharanira ubwenge aba akunda kwigishwa, naho uwanga guhanwa ni igicucu." 
Proverbs12:2 Uhoraho atonesha umuntu ukora neza, akamagana ugambiriye ikibi." 
Proverbs12:3 Nta muntu ukomezwa no kugira nabi, kandi imizi y’intungane ntizarimburwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Umugore ushiritse ubute ni ikamba ry’umugabo we, ariko utagira isoni aba ari nk’imungu mu magufa ye." 
Proverbs12:5 Ibitekerezo by’intungane biba biboneye, naho imigambi y’umugiranabi ikaba iy’ibinyoma." 
Proverbs12:6 Amagambo y’abagiranabi ni imitego yica, ariko umunwa w’intabera ni wo uzirokora." 
Proverbs12:7 Iyo abagiranabi babirinduwe, bose bapfira gushira, ariko inzu y’intungane igahora ikomeye." 
Proverbs12:8 Umuntu ashimirwa ko ashyira mu gaciro, naho uw’umutima w’ibinyoma akabigayirwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Umuntu usanzwe ariko ufite umugaragu, aruta umwirasi utagira ikimutunga." 
Proverbs12:10 Intungane imenya icyo amatungo yayo akeneye, ariko umutima w’umugiranabi uyagirira umwaga." 
Proverbs12:11 Uhinga umurima we abona ibimutunga bihagije, ariko uwiruka inyuma y’ibitagira shinge aba ari igicucu." 
Proverbs12:12 Umugome ashaka umugabane ku byafatiwe mu mutego w’abagiranabi, nyamara imizi y’intungane ni yo yeza imbuto." 
Proverbs12:13 Umunwa ucumura ubera nyirawo umutego, ariko intungane yikura mu kaga." 
Proverbs12:14 Ibyiza bihaza umuntu, abikomora ku munwa we, kandi buri wese abona igihembo cy’ibyo yakoze." 
Proverbs12:15 Inzira y’umusazi, kuri we iba iboneye, ariko umunyabuhanga agisha inama." 
Proverbs12:16 Umujinya w’umusazi, awugaragariza aho, naho umunyabwenge arenza ku kababaro ke." 
Proverbs12:17 Umunyakuri agaragaza ibiboneye, naho umunyabinyoma ashyigikira akarengane." 
Proverbs12:18 Amahomvu y’umupfayongo ajombana nk’inkota, ariko ururimi rw’abanyabuhanga rurakiza." 
Proverbs12:19 Umunwa uvuga ukuri uhora uhamye, naho ururimi rubeshya ni urw’umwanya muto gusa." 
Proverbs12:20 Ikinyoma cyarika mu mutima w’abagambiriye ikibi, naho abajyanama b’amahoro barangwa n’ibyishimo." 
Proverbs12:21 Nta cyago gitera intungane, ariko abagiranabi birabugariza." 
Proverbs12:22 Iminwa irangwa n’ibinyoma itera ishozi Uhoraho, igihe abakorana ukuri bamuronkaho ubutoni." 
Proverbs12:23 Umunyabwenge ntagaragaza ubumenyi bwe, naho umutima w’ibicucu wamamaza ubusazi bwawo." 
Proverbs12:24 Ukuboko k’umunyamwete kuzategeka, naho uk’umunebwe kuzakoreshwa uburetwa." 
Proverbs12:25 Impungenge zishengura umutima w’umuntu, naho ijambo ryiza rikamushimisha." 
Proverbs12:26 Intungane iyobora mugenzi wayo, naho inzira y’abagiranabi irabayobya." 
Proverbs12:27 Ubunebwe ntibucyura umuhigo ngo buwuteke, ariko umwete ufitiye umuntu akamaro kanini." 
Proverbs12:28 Inzira y’ubutungane itanga ubuzima, naho iy’abagome iganisha ku rupfu." 
Proverbs13:1 Umwana uzi ubwenge akunda guhugurwa na se, ariko umusekanyi ntiyemera guhanwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Ibyiza bitunga umuntu abikomora ku munwa we, ariko umutima w’abagambanyi uhazwa n’urugomo." 
Proverbs13:3 Uhana umunwa we aba arinze ubuzima bwe, naho usukagura amagambo azarohama." 
Proverbs13:4 Umunebwe agira irari rikamupfana ubusa, ariko icyo abanyamwete bifuje bakigeraho." 
Proverbs13:5 Intungane yangana n’ikinyoma, ariko umugiranabi aragayisha, agakoza isoni." 
Proverbs13:6 Ubutungane burinda umunyamurava, ariko icyaha kigatera abagiranabi korama." 
Proverbs13:7 Hari abigira abakire kandi ari abatindi, abandi bakigira abakene, kandi batunze ibya mirenge." 
Proverbs13:8 Incungu y’ubuzima bw’umuntu ni umutungo we, ariko umukene nta cyo akangishwa." 
Proverbs13:9 Urumuri rw’intungane rutera ibyishimo, ariko itara ry’abagiranabi rizazima." 
Proverbs13:10 Ubwirasi bukurura amahane, ariko ubuhanga buhorana abemera kugirwa inama." 
Proverbs13:11 Ubukire buje bugubugu burayoyoka, ariko ubwo umuntu yitondeye bukiyongera." 
Proverbs13:12 Iyo umutima utabonye icyo wifuza urarwara, wakibona, kikawubera nk’igiti cy’ubuzima." 
Proverbs13:13 Uhinyura inama azayoba, naho ukurikiza amabwiriza azahembwa." 
Proverbs13:14 Inyigisho y’umunyabuhanga ni isoko y’ubuzima, itoza kwirinda imitego y’urupfu." 
Proverbs13:15 Gushyira mu gaciro bitera igikundiro, ariko inzira y’abagambanyi irabaroha." 
Proverbs13:16 Umunyabwenge akora abanje gutekereza, naho umupfayongo akasasa ubusazi bwe." 
Proverbs13:17 Intumwa mbi igusha mu makuba, naho iy’indahemuka irakiza." 
Proverbs13:18 Uwanga guhugurwa bimutera ubukene akamwara, ariko uwemera guhanwa azakuzwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Umutima unezezwa no kuronka icyo wifuza, abapfayongo baterwa ishozi no kureka ikibi!" 
Proverbs13:20 Nugendana n’umunyabuhanga nawe uzaba we, ariko ubana n’abapfayongo, ahinduka mubi." 
Proverbs13:21 Ibyago bikurikirana abanyabyaha, ariko ihirwe rikaba igihembo cy’intungane." 
Proverbs13:22 Umuntu w’umunyamutima asigira abuzukuru be umurage, ariko umutungo w’umunyabyaha uzahabwa intungane." 
Proverbs13:23 Imirima y’abakene irumbuka imyaka myinshi, ariko hariho abapfa bazize ubuhendanyi." 
Proverbs13:24 Urinda umwana we inkoni, aba amwanga, naho umukunda, ntatinda kumuhana." 
Proverbs13:25 Intungane irarya igahaga, ariko inda y’abagiranabi ihorana icyena." 
Proverbs14:1 Ubuhanga bwiyubakira urugo rwabwo, naho ubusazi bukisenyera." 
Proverbs14:2 Ugenda mu nzira igororotse aba yubashye Uhoraho, naho unyura mu y’uburyarya aba amusuzuguye." 
Proverbs14:3 Umunwa w’igicucu ni indiri y’ubwirasi, naho uw’umunyabuhanga ni wo umurinda." 
Proverbs14:4 Ahatari ibimasa bihinga ibigega biba birimo ubusa, naho imfizi ifite imbaraga ituma umusaruro wiyongera." 
Proverbs14:5 Umugabo w’indahemuka ntabeshya, ariko uw’umuhemu ahorana ikinyoma." 
Proverbs14:6 Umusekanyi ashakashaka ubuhanga, ntabugeraho, ariko kugera ku bumenyi, byorohera umunyabwenge." 
Proverbs14:7 Uzagendere kure umuntu w’igicucu, kuko nta jambo ry’ubwenge uzamukuraho." 
Proverbs14:8 Ubuhanga bw’umuntu ujijutse, ni ugushishoza inzira ye, ariko ubusazi bw’ibicucu buba mu binyoma byabo." 
Proverbs14:9 Amahema y’abapfayongo ni indiri y’icyaha, ariko inzu y’intabera irangwamo ubugiraneza." 
Proverbs14:10 Umutima ni wo umenya akababaro kawo, mbese nk’uko nta we ushobora gufatanya na wo ibyishimo." 
Proverbs14:11 Inzu y’abagome izasenywa, naho ihema ry’intabera rizashimangirwa." 
Proverbs14:12 Hari inzira isa n’itunganiye umuntu, amaherezo ariko, ikaba iganisha ku rupfu." 
Proverbs14:13 Ndetse no mu byishimo, umutima wakuramo ishavu, kandi amaherezo y’ibitwenge ni ugushavura." 
Proverbs14:14 Umuntu ufite umutima wahabye anyurwa n’imyifatire ye, naho umugiraneza akanezezwa n’ibikorwa bye." 
Proverbs14:15 Igihubutsi cyemera ikivuzwe cyose, ariko uzi ubwenge yitondera aho anyura." 
Proverbs14:16 Umunyabuhanga atinya ikibi kandi akagihunga, naho igicucu kirirakaza kandi kikiyemera." 
Proverbs14:17 Ugira umujinya hafi akora amarorerwa, n’umunyamayeri ariyangisha." 
Proverbs14:18 Umugabane w’ibihubutsi ni ubusazi, naho abazi ubwenge batamiriza ikamba ry’ubumenyi." 
Proverbs14:19 Ababi bunamira abeza, abagome bagapfukama imbere y’imiryango y’intungane." 
Proverbs14:20 Umukene yangwa na bose, ndetse n’umuturanyi we, ariko incuti z’umukire ntizibarika." 
Proverbs14:21 Usuzuguye mugenzi we aba acumuye, kandi hahirwa ugirira impuhwe abakene." 
Proverbs14:22 Ese abagenda bakwiza ikibi, ntibaba bayoba? Abagamije icyiza bo barangwa n’ubudahemuka n’umurava." 
Proverbs14:23 Umurimo wose ugira icyo wungura, ariko amazimwe akurura ubutindi." 
Proverbs14:24 Ikamba ry’abanyabuhanga ni ukumenya gushishoza, naho iby’abapfayongo ni ubusazi bwabo." 
Proverbs14:25 Utanzweho umugabo akavuga ukuri, akiza imbaga, naho ubeshye, aba yaritswemo n’ikinyoma." 
Proverbs14:26 Utinya Uhoraho aba abonye ubuhungiro bukomeye, kuko adahwema kurinda abana be." 
Proverbs14:27 Gutinya Uhoraho ni isoko y’ubuzima, bikanarinda imitego y’urupfu." 
Proverbs14:28 Imbaga nyinshi ihesha umwami ikuzo, iyo yabuze abo atwara, na we aba yarimbutse." 
Proverbs14:29 Utagira umujinya hafi aba ari umunyabwenge, naho urakara vuba yasasa ubusazi bwe." 
Proverbs14:30 Umutima utuje unogera umubiri, naho ishyari ni imungu mu magufa." 
Proverbs14:31 Ukandamiza utishoboye aba atutse Iyamuremye, naho ugirira impuhwe umukene aba ayubashye." 
Proverbs14:32 Umugiranabi abirindurwa n’uburyarya bwe, naho intungane igakizwa n’umurava wayo." 
Proverbs14:33 Ubuhanga buba mu mutima w’umunyabwenge, naho mu bapfayongo, ni nde wahabusanga?" 
Proverbs14:34 Ubutungane butuma igihugu gisagamba, naho icyaha gikoza isoni amahanga yose." 
Proverbs14:35 Umwami atonesha umugaragu w’umutima, ariko akarakarira utagira isoni." 
Proverbs15:1 Igisubizo cyiza gicubya uburakari, ariko ijambo risesereza rikabyutsa umujinya." 
Proverbs15:2 Ururimi rw’abanyabuhanga rutuma barata ubumenyi, ariko umunwa w’abapfayongo ukasasa ubusazi bwabo." 
Proverbs15:3 Amaso y’Uhoraho areba hose, akagenzura ababi n’abeza." 
Proverbs15:4 Ururimi rugusha neza ni nk’igiti cy’ubuzima, naho ururimi rubi rukomeretsa umutima." 
Proverbs15:5 Umusazi yanga ko se amuhana, ariko uzi ubwenge yemera gucyahwa." 
Proverbs15:6 Mu nzu y’intungane habamo ubukungu bwinshi, ariko amahaho y’umunyabyaha atera ibyago." 
Proverbs15:7 Iminwa y’abanyabuhanga ikwirakwiza ubumenyi, ariko umutima w’abapfayongo ntugenza utyo." 
Proverbs15:8 Igitambo cy’abagiranabi gitera Uhoraho ishozi, ariko amasengesho y’intabera akamushimisha." 
Proverbs15:9 Uhoraho yanga imyifatire y’abagome, ariko agakunda abitangiye ubutungane." 
Proverbs15:10 Uta inzira abishaka, azahanwa bikomeye! kandi uwanga gucyahwa azapfa." 
Proverbs15:11 Ibiri ikuzimu no mu nyenga ntibyihishe Uhoraho, yayoberwa ate rero ibiri mu mitima y’abantu!" 
Proverbs15:12 Umusekanyi ntakunda guhanwa, yirinda kwegera abanyabuhanga." 
Proverbs15:13 Ufite umutima wishimye, acya mu maso, naho umutima ushavuye utera kwiheba." 
Proverbs15:14 Umutima w’umunyabwenge ushakashaka ubumenyi, naho umunwa w’abapfayongo uhazwa n’ubusazi." 
Proverbs15:15 Umutindi ahora mu minsi mibi, naho uwishimye ku mutima agahora mu birori." 
Proverbs15:16 Uduke turimo gutinya Uhoraho, turuta ibyinshi birimo impagarara." 
Proverbs15:17 Igaburo ry’imboga ririmo urukundo, riruta iry’inyama z’ikimasa riherekejwe n’urwango." 
Proverbs15:18 Ugira umujinya hafi akurura amahane, naho utarakara vuba ahosha intonganya." 
Proverbs15:19 Inzira y’umunebwe ni nk’uruzitiro rw’amahwa, naho iy’abanyamwete ni umuhanda nyabagendwa." 
Proverbs15:20 Umwana witonda ashimisha se, naho umupfayongo asuzugura nyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Ubusazi bwizihira abatagira umutima, naho umunyabwenge aboneza inzira itunganye." 
Proverbs15:22 Aho inama itari, imigambi ntihama, abajyanama benshi batera gutsinda." 
Proverbs15:23 Umuntu ashimishwa n’igisubizo cyiza kimuvuye mu kanwa, kandi ijambo rivugiwe igihe ni ryo rinyura." 
Proverbs15:24 Umunyabwenge akurikira inzira y’ubuzima imuzamura, bityo akirinda umumanura ikuzimu." 
Proverbs15:25 Uhoraho asenya urugo rw’abirasi, ariko agakomeza urubibi rw’umupfakazi." 
Proverbs15:26 Ibitekerezo by’ubugome bitera ishozi Uhoraho, naho amagambo y’urukundo aba akeye." 
Proverbs15:27 Ugabanye ibyibano ahangayikisha urugo rwe, naho uwanga ruswa azabaho." 
Proverbs15:28 Umutima w’intungane uzirikana icyo uri busubize, naho umunwa w’abagiranabi uvundereza ubugome." 
Proverbs15:29 Uhoraho yitaza abagiranabi, ariko akumva isengesho ry’intungane." 
Proverbs15:30 Indoro nziza inezeza umutima, inkuru nziza ikongera imbaraga." 
Proverbs15:31 Utega amatwi inama z’ubuzima, akwiye kubana n’abanyabuhanga." 
Proverbs15:32 Uwanga gukosorwa aba yisuzuguye ubwe, naho uwemera gucyahwa yunguka ubwenge." 
Proverbs15:33 Gutinya Uhoraho ni ko kwitoza ubuhanga, kandi mbere yo gushaka ikuzo, ni ngombwa kwiyoroshya." 
Proverbs16:1 Umuntu yigira imigambi ku mutima, ariko igisubizo gitangwa n’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs16:2 Inzira za muntu zose, ahora abona zimunogeye, ariko Uhoraho ni we ugenzura ikiri ku mutima." 
Proverbs16:3 Ibikorwa byawe biragize Uhoraho, maze imigambi yawe izatungane." 
Proverbs16:4 Uhoraho yahanze byose bifite icyo bigenewe, yewe n’umugiranabi yaremewe umunsi w’ibyago." 
Proverbs16:5 Umutima wikuza utera Uhoraho ishozi, nta kabuza uzahanwa!" 
Proverbs16:6 Ubudahemuka n’umurava bihanagura icyaha, gutinya Uhoraho birinda umuntu ikibi." 
Proverbs16:7 Iyo Uhoraho yashimye imyifatire y’umuntu, ageza n’aho atuma abanzi be bigorora na we." 
Proverbs16:8 Uduke turimo ubutungane, turuta inyungu nyinshi z’amahugu." 
Proverbs16:9 Umutima w’umuntu uzirikana inzira anyuramo, ariko Uhoraho ni we uyimukomezamo." 
Proverbs16:10 Umwami aba afite imvugo y’Imana mu munwa we, iyo aca imanza, ururimi rwe ntirurenganya." 
Proverbs16:11 Uhoraho ashimishwa n’iminzani iboneye, ni we wategetse uko bagomba gupima." 
Proverbs16:12 Umwami ugira nabi aba akoze ishyano, kuko ubutabera ari bwo bushimangira ingoma." 
Proverbs16:13 Iminwa itaryarya itona ku mwami, abavuga ukuri arabakunda." 
Proverbs16:14 Uburakari bw’umwami bushobora kurimbura benshi, ariko umunyabuhanga arabuhosha." 
Proverbs16:15 Iyo mu maso y’umwami hakeye, benshi bibaviramo ubuzima, ubugwaneza bwe bunezeza nk’imvura yo ku muhindo." 
Proverbs16:16 Kunguka ubuhanga biruta zahabu iyunguruye, kandi kuronka ubwenge bisumba feza." 
Proverbs16:17 Inzira y’intabera ni ukwirinda ikibi, uwitondera aho anyura akiza amagara ye." 
Proverbs16:18 Ujya kurimbuka abanza kwirata! n’ugiye guhanuka abanza kwikuza! 
Proverbs16:19 Kwicisha bugufi hamwe n’abanyabyago, biruta gusangira iminyago n’abirasi." 
Proverbs16:20 Uwita ku ijambo azatengamara, kandi hahirwa uwisunga Uhoraho." 
Proverbs16:21 Umunyabuhanga ku mutima, bamwita umunyabwenge, kandi umunwa utuje wongera ubumenyi." 
Proverbs16:22 Abashyira mu gaciro bibabera isoko y’ubuzima, naho ubusazi ni cyo gihano cy’ubucucu." 
Proverbs16:23 Umutima w’umunyabuhanga ubwiriza ururimi rwe, kandi umwungura ubwenge mu byo avuga." 
Proverbs16:24 Amagambo yuje ubwuzu ni nk’umushongi w’ubuki, aryohera mu kanwa, kandi agakomeza amagufa." 
Proverbs16:25 Hari inzira isa n’itunganiye umuntu, amaherezo ariko, ikaba iganisha ku rupfu." 
Proverbs16:26 Ipfa ry’umukozi ni ryo rimutera ubwira, kuko akanwa ke kaba kamwaka ubutitsa." 
Proverbs16:27 Umuntu w’ikigwari ateza ibyago, ururimi rwe rwotsa nk’umuriro." 
Proverbs16:28 Umuntu w’umugome akurura amahane, kamenabanga agatanya incuti." 
Proverbs16:29 Umunyarugomo ashuka mugenzi we, akamunyuza mu nzira idakwiye." 
Proverbs16:30 Uwubika ingohe aba azirikana ubugome, naho urya iminwa aba yarangije guhemuka." 
Proverbs16:31 Uruyenzi rw’imvi ni ikamba ry’ikuzo, umuntu arigabanira mu nzira y’ubutungane." 
Proverbs16:32 Utihutira kurakara aruta intwari, kandi umuntu witsinda aruta uganza umugi." 
Proverbs16:33 Umuntu asasa igishura akakijugunyaho amabuye y’ubufindo, nyamara Uhoraho ni we umuha igisubizo." 
Proverbs17:1 Akamanyu k’umugati ukakaye umuntu ariye mu mahoro, karuta inzu yuzuye inyama ariko irimo amahane." 
Proverbs17:2 Umugaragu ushyira mu gaciro aruta umwana w’ikigoryi, kandi azahabwa umunani hamwe n’abandi bana." 
Proverbs17:3 Uruganda rutunganya feza, itanura rigatunganya zahabu, ariko Uhoraho ni we ucengera mu mitima." 
Proverbs17:4 Umugiranabi yita ku munwa w’umuhendanyi, umubeshyi agahugukira akarimi k’indyarya." 
Proverbs17:5 Usetse umukene aba atutse Iyamuremye, uwishimira ibyago by’abandi azahanwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Ikamba ry’abasaza ni abuzukuru babo, naho ibyishimo by’abana ni ba se." 
Proverbs17:7 Imvugo inoze ntikwiranye n’igicucu, nkanswe amagambo y’ibinyoma ku gikomangoma." 
Proverbs17:8 Umuntu uzi kugabira abandi, na we biramuhira, aho yerekeye hose, agera ku cyo yifuza." 
Proverbs17:9 Uwihanganira igicumuro aba akomeje umubano, ariko ugitaranga atandukanya incuti." 
Proverbs17:10 Ijambo rimwe uhanishije umunyabwenge rimugirira akamaro, karuse ak’inkoni ijana ku mupfayongo." 
Proverbs17:11 Umugiranabi ahora ashaka kwigomeka, ariko bazamwoherereza intumwa y’inkazi." 
Proverbs17:12 Guhura n’ikirura bambuye ibyana, biruta guhubirana n’igicucu cyasaze." 
Proverbs17:13 Uwitura ineza inabi, ibyago ntibizava mu nzu ye." 
Proverbs17:14 Gushoza amahane ni nko kugomorora amazi, ujye wigendera intonganya zitaravuka." 
Proverbs17:15 Ari ukwirengagiza icyaha cy’umugome, ari no kukigereka ku ntungane, byombi, Uhoraho arabyanga." 
Proverbs17:16 Mbese imari y’umupfayongo yamumarira ike? Nta n’ubwo yayigura ubuhanga, kuko nta bwenge agira." 
Proverbs17:17 Incuti ntihwema gukunda, kandi umuvandimwe avukira gutabara aho rukomeye." 
Proverbs17:18 Umuntu w’igicucu yishingira abandi, akitangaho ingwate kuri mugenzi we." 
Proverbs17:19 Ukunda amahane aba akunze icyaha, uwiterura aba ashaka kurimbuka." 
Proverbs17:20 Ufite umutima wuzuye uburyarya, ntagira ihirwe, kandi ufite ururimi rubi, agwa mu makuba." 
Proverbs17:21 Ubyaye umupfayongo, bimutera agahinda, kandi se w’igicucu ntiyigera yishima bibaho." 
Proverbs17:22 Umutima ukeye ukomeza ubuzima, naho umutima ushavuye wumisha amagufa." 
Proverbs17:23 Umugiranabi yakira ruswa, kugira ngo arenganye umunyamurava." 
Proverbs17:24 Umunyabwenge ahora ahanze amaso ubuhanga, ariko amaso y’igicucu kirayazerereza kugeza iyo gihera." 
Proverbs17:25 Umwana w’igicucu ababaza se, kandi agatera agahinda nyina wamubyaye." 
Proverbs17:26 Guca ibihano intungane si byiza, ariko gukubita ibikomangoma, byo birenze urugero." 
Proverbs17:27 Uwifata mu magambo ye aba afite ubumenyi, kandi udapfa guhubuka aba ari umunyabwenge." 
Proverbs17:28 N’umusazi, iyo yicecekeye, bamwita umunyabuhanga, yafunga umunwa we, bakamwita umunyabwenge." 
Proverbs18:1 Ushaka kwitaza abandi, abibonera impamvu, bamugira inama akarakara." 
Proverbs18:2 Umupfayongo ntashaka kujijuka, ahubwo aharanira kwihesha ishema mu mvugo ye." 
Proverbs18:3 Aho ubugome bwaje umugayo ntuhatangwa, kandi ubuhemu bukurura ikimwaro." 
Proverbs18:4 Amagambo ava mu kanwa k’umuntu ni nk’amazi maremare, abamo isoko y’ubuhanga, akamera nk’umugezi utemba." 
Proverbs18:5 Nta bwo ari byiza guca urubanza ubera umugome, ukarenganya intungane." 
Proverbs18:6 Umunwa w’umupfayongo umukururira intonganya, naho ururimi rwe rumutegeza inkoni." 
Proverbs18:7 Amagambo y’umupfayongo ni yo amworeka, kandi umunwa we ni wo mutego w’ubuzima bwe." 
Proverbs18:8 Amagambo y’inzimuzi aba asize umunyu, aragenda agashyika ku nkingi z’umutima." 
Proverbs18:9 Unebwa ku murimo we, aba ava inda imwe n’usenya." 
Proverbs18:10 Izina ry’Uhoraho ni nk’umunara ukomeye, intungane iwirukiramo ikaba ikize icyago." 
Proverbs18:11 Umutungo w’umukire umubera nk’umugi ukomeye, ahora yizeye ko ari urukuta rutarengwa." 
Proverbs18:12 Ubwirasi bw’umutima bubanziriza kurimbuka, naho uzi kwicisha bugufi, ni we uzakuzwa." 
Proverbs18:13 Usubiza atarumva icyo bamubwiye, aba ari umusazi n’umupfayongo." 
Proverbs18:14 Umutima w’umuntu umuramira mu ndwara, none se umutima washavuye ni nde wawuhembura?" 
Proverbs18:15 Umutima w’umunyabwenge uronka ubwitonzi, kandi ugutwi kw’abanyabuhanga gushaka ubumenyi." 
Proverbs18:16 Icyo umuntu atanze kimuhesha inzira, kikamugeza imbere y’abakomeye." 
Proverbs18:17 Ushoje urubanza asa n’uri butsinde, ariko umuburanyi we iyo aje, aramuhinyuza." 
Proverbs18:18 Ubufindo bumara impaka, kandi bugakiranura ibikomerezwa." 
Proverbs18:19 Umuvandimwe warakajwe ni nk’umugi w’intikorerezwa, kandi intonganya zihoraho nk’amapata yo ku nzugi z’umugi." 
Proverbs18:20 Umuntu ahazwa n’imbuto y’iminwa ye, ikimuva mu kanwa ni cyo gituma yijuta." 
Proverbs18:21 Ururimi ni rwo rugenga urupfu n’ubuzima, abarwishinga bazabona ingaruka zabyo." 
Proverbs18:22 Uwashatse umugore aba yarashyikiriye umukiro, kandi aba yararonse ubutoni kuri Uhoraho." 
Proverbs18:23 Umukene avuga yinginga, naho umukire agasubizanya umwaga." 
Proverbs18:24 Hari incuti zishora umuntu mu kaga, hari n’izishobora kumukunda kurusha umuvandimwe we." 
Proverbs19:1 Umukene urangwa n’umurava aruta ufite ururimi rw’uburiganya akaba n’umupfayongo. 
Proverbs19:2 Ahatari ubumenyi, umwete nta cyo umara, kandi iyihuse yabyaye ibihumye." 
Proverbs19:3 Ubusazi bw’umuntu ni bwo bumuyobya, n’umutima we ukarakarira Uhoraho." 
Proverbs19:4 Ubukire bukurura incuti nyinshi, naho umukene atana n’incuti ye." 
Proverbs19:5 Utangwaho umugabo akabeshya, azahanwa, kandi n’ubunza ibinyoma ntazarokoka." 
Proverbs19:6 Igikomerezwa gishagarwa n’indyarya nyinshi, kandi abantu bose bakunda ugira ubuntu." 
Proverbs19:7 Abavandimwe b’umukene bamwanga bose, none se incuti ni zo zitazamuhungaho?" 
Proverbs19:8 Uwunguka ubwenge aba yikunda ubwe, naho ukomeza ubumenyi aba agira amahirwe." 
Proverbs19:9 Utangwaho umugabo akabeshya, azahanwa, kandi n’ubunza ibinyoma azarimbuka." 
Proverbs19:10 Kuba mu bukire, ntibibereye umupfayongo, n’umugaragu ntakwiriye gutegeka abatware." 
Proverbs19:11 Umuntu ushyira mu gaciro, bituma atarakara vuba, agaheshwa ikuzo no kwihanganira inabi yagiriwe." 
Proverbs19:12 Uburakari bw’umwami ni nk’imitontomo y’intare, ariko ineza ye ikamera nk’ikime cyatonze ku byatsi." 
Proverbs19:13 Umwana w’ikigoryi ashyira se mu makuba, naho intonganya z’umugore ni nk’umutonyi udahwema kujojoba." 
Proverbs19:14 Umurage uva ku babyeyi ni inzu n’umutungo, naho umugore uzi ubwenge, Uhoraho ni we umutanga." 
Proverbs19:15 Ubunebwe butera gusinzira ubuticura, kandi umunyamwete muke ahorana inzara." 
Proverbs19:16 Uwubahiriza amategeko aba arinze ubuzima bwe, naho uhinyura inzira zayo azapfa." 
Proverbs19:17 Ugiriye impuhwe umukene, aba agurije Uhoraho, kandi iyo neza ni we uzayimwitura." 
Proverbs19:18 Jya uhana umuhungu wawe bikiri mu maguru mashya, ariko ntukarakare ngo ugeze aho kumwica." 
Proverbs19:19 Umunyamujinya wa cyane yikururira ibihano, iyo umwihoreye, arashyekerwa." 
Proverbs19:20 Jya wumva inama, wemere bakwigishe, bizatuma uhinduka umunyabuhanga." 
Proverbs19:21 Umuntu yigira imigambi myinshi ku mutima, ariko icyo Uhoraho ashaka ni cyo gikorwa." 
Proverbs19:22 Icyo umuntu yifuza ku wundi, ni ubudahemuka, kandi umukene aruta umubeshyi." 
Proverbs19:23 Gutinya Uhoraho bitanga ubuzima, uzijuta, usinzire neza, nta cyago kiguteye." 
Proverbs19:24 Umunebwe ashora ikiganza ku mbehe, ariko ntashobore kwitamika." 
Proverbs19:25 Uzakubite umusekanyi, injiji izakurizaho guca akenge, nucyaha umunyabwenge, azasobanukirwa amenye." 
Proverbs19:26 Ujujubya se kandi akirukana nyina, aba ari umwana gito kandi uteye ishozi." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wanjye, nureka kumva inyigisho, bizakuviramo kohoha kure y’amagambo y’ubumenyi." 
Proverbs19:28 Uhamya ibinyoma aba asuzuguye ubutabera, kandi umunwa w’abagiranabi unyurwa n’amahugu." 
Proverbs19:29 Abasekanyi bateganirijwe ibihano, kandi ibicucu bizakubitwa inkoni mu bitugu." 
Proverbs20:1 Divayi itera ubupfu, inzoga zigakurura isindwe, uzishinga ntaba ari umunyabwenge." 
Proverbs20:2 Uburakari bw’umwami ni nk’imitontomo y’intare, umurakaje aba yihemukiye ubwe." 
Proverbs20:3 Umuntu wirinda impaka arabishimirwa, ariko uwitwa umusazi wese arazishigukira." 
Proverbs20:4 Ku muhindo, umunebwe ntahinga, ku mwero, agashakashaka akabura icyo afata." 
Proverbs20:5 Inama umutima wigira ni nk’amazi magari, umuntu uzi ubwenge ni ho avoma." 
Proverbs20:6 Abantu benshi biratana ubudahemuka, ariko se ni nde wabona umuntu uvuga ukuri?" 
Proverbs20:7 Intungane irangwa n’umurava, hahirwa abana izasiga!" 
Proverbs20:8 Umwami aca imanza yicaye ku ntebe ye, ikibi cyose akagitahura n’amaso ye." 
Proverbs20:9 Ni nde washobora kuvuga ngo «Nasukuye umutima wanjye, icyaha cyanjye naragihanaguye»?" 
Proverbs20:10 Ingero zitareshya n’iminzani ibeshya, byombi bitera Uhoraho ishozi." 
Proverbs20:11 Ibikorwa by’umusore byerekana niba azagira imyifatire itunganye kandi iboneye. 
Proverbs20:12 Ugutwi kumva n’ijisho rireba, byombi byaremwe n’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs20:13 Ntugakunde ibitotsi kugira ngo utazakena, kanguka ube maso uzabone ikigutunga." 
Proverbs20:14 Uriho agura aravuga ati «Murampenda!» ariko avayo yirya icyara. 
Proverbs20:15 Hariho zahabu n’ibirezi byinshi, ariko icy’ingenzi ni ururimi rwuje ubumenyi." 
Proverbs20:16 Fata umwenda we kuko yishingiye uwo atazi, umwake ingwate kuko yemarariye abavantara!" 
Proverbs20:17 Umugati w’ubwambuzi uryohera umuntu, ariko nyuma yaho akanwa ke kuzura umusenyi." 
Proverbs20:18 Imigambi ikomezwa no kuyigira hamwe n’abandi, uzashoze urugamba umaze kugisha inama abanyabwenge." 
Proverbs20:19 Usebanya amena amabanga, ntukuzure n’ufite akarimi karekare!" 
Proverbs20:20 Uvuma se na nyina, urumuri rwe ruzamuzimiraho mu ijoro ry’icuraburindi." 
Proverbs20:21 Umurage uje huti huti amaherezo ntubona umugisha. 
Proverbs20:22 Ntuzavuge ngo «Nzitura inabi!» iyumanganye, Uhoraho azagukiza." 
Proverbs20:23 Uhoraho yanga ibipimo bihuguza, iminzani yiba si myiza." 
Proverbs20:24 Uhoraho ni we uyobora intambwe z’umuntu, we yakumva ate aho ava n’aho agana?" 
Proverbs20:25 Byakora ku muntu wavuga akina ngo «Iki nkeguriye Uhoraho», kandi atabanje kuzirikana neza icyo ari busezerane." 
Proverbs20:26 Umwami uzi ubwenge atahura abagome akabahana yihanukiriye. 
Proverbs20:27 Umutima w’umuntu ni itara Uhoraho yamuhaye, ngo rimurike ibimwihishemo byose." 
Proverbs20:28 Ubudahemuka n’umurava birinda umwami, na we ingoma ye akayishimangiza ubutabera." 
Proverbs20:29 Ishema ry’abasore ni ubugangare bwabo, naho umutako w’abasaza ni imvi zabo." 
Proverbs20:30 Inguma z’amaraso zicubya ubugome, naho imihini igakiza ingeso mbi." 
Proverbs21:1 Umutima w’umwami uri mu kiganza cy’Uhoraho, akawuyobora, mbese nk’uko bayobora umugezi w’amazi aho bashatse hose." 
Proverbs21:2 Inzira za muntu zose abona zimunogeye, ariko Uhoraho ni we upima imitima." 
Proverbs21:3 Ubutungane n’ubutabera binyura Uhoraho, kuruta ibitambo." 
Proverbs21:4 Indoro y’agasuzuguro n’umutima wirata ni byo bigaragaza icyaha cy’abagome. 
Proverbs21:5 Imigambi y’umunyamwete iramukiza, ariko uhubuka wese aba asanga ubutindi." 
Proverbs21:6 Umutungo w’umwibano ni ubusa buyoyoka, na bene wo baba bashaka urupfu." 
Proverbs21:7 Ububisha bw’abagome ni bwo buboreka, kuko banga gukurikiza ubutabera." 
Proverbs21:8 Inzira y’umwicanyi iba iziguye, naho imigenzereze y’intungane irangwa n’ubutabera." 
Proverbs21:9 Biraruta kwinugika mu ngombe iri mu rugo, aho kubana mu nzu n’umugore w’umunyamahane." 
Proverbs21:10 Umutima w’umugiranabi uhora ushaka ikibi, ndetse n’incuti ye ntayireba neza." 
Proverbs21:11 Nibakubita umusekanyi, injiji izakurizaho guca akenge, nibigisha umunyabuhanga, azunguka ubumenyi." 
Proverbs21:12 Nyir’ubutungane yitegereza inzu y’abagiranabi, abagome bose akabarindimurira mu makuba." 
Proverbs21:13 Uwanga kumva umunyantege nke amutabaje, na we azataka abure umutabara." 
Proverbs21:14 Nta gihosha umujinya w’umuntu wafungije, nko kumugabira mwiherereye, cyangwa kumutura mu ibanga." 
Proverbs21:15 Intungane inezezwa no kubahiriza ubutabera, naho abagiranabi bazarimbuka." 
Proverbs21:16 Umuntu ubungera ntanyure inzira y’ubwitonzi, azaruhukira mu rugaga rw’ab’ikuzimu." 
Proverbs21:17 Ukunda amaraha, azatindahara, ukunda divayi n’amavuta ntazakira." 
Proverbs21:18 Umugome aba incungu y’intungane, naho umugambanyi akagwa mu kigwi cy’intabera." 
Proverbs21:19 Gutura mu gihugu cy’ubutayu, biruta kubana n’umugore w’umushiha n’umunyamahane." 
Proverbs21:20 Mu nzu y’umunyabuhanga, habamo ubukungu bwinshi n’amavuta, ariko umunyabwenge buke atagaguza ibye." 
Proverbs21:21 Ukurikirana ubutungane n’ubwitonzi, azaronka ubugingo, umukiro n’icyubahiro." 
Proverbs21:22 Umunyabuhanga afata mpiri umugi urimo ingabo z’intwari, agasenya inkuta zarindaga abawutuye." 
Proverbs21:23 Ufata ururimi rwe akabumba umunwa we, umutima we aba awurinze amakuba." 
Proverbs21:24 Uwirata agatukana, bamwita «umusekanyi», imigenzereze ye irangwa n’ubwirasi bukabije." 
Proverbs21:25 Umunebwe apfa yifuza, kuko amaboko ye yanga gukora." 
Proverbs21:26 Umugome yiriza umunsi wose ararikiye iby’abandi, naho intungane itanga ititangiriye itama." 
Proverbs21:27 Igitambo cy’abagome gitera ishozi Uhoraho, nkanswe iyo bagituranye ubuhemu." 
Proverbs21:28 Uhamya ibinyoma azarimbuka, ariko utega amatwi, azahabwa ijambo arihorane." 
Proverbs21:29 Umuntu w’umugome yerekana ko yigize, naho uw’intabera atsimbarara ku myifatire ye." 
Proverbs21:30 Nta buhanga, nta bwenge, nta n’inama y’umuntu yahangara Uhoraho." 
Proverbs21:31 Ku munsi w’urugamba, ifarasi barayambika bakayitunganya, ariko Uhoraho ni we utanga gutsinda." 
Proverbs22:1 Kuvugwa neza biruta ubukungu bwinshi, kubahwa bikaruta feza na zahabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Umukire n’umukene bafite icyo bahuriyeho, bombi ni Uhoraho wabaremye." 
Proverbs22:3 Umunyabwenge abona icyago kije, akihisha, naho injiji zikiyahuramo, zikabiryora." 
Proverbs22:4 Uwicisha bugufi abisaruramo gutinya Uhoraho, ubukire, icyubahiro n’ubugingo." 
Proverbs22:5 Inzira y’indyarya ibamo amahwa n’imitego, ushaka gukiza ubuzima bwe, arayirinda." 
Proverbs22:6 Nutoza umwana muto inzira agomba gukurikira, naba n’umusaza ntazayiteshukaho." 
Proverbs22:7 Umukire ategeka abakene, kandi uguza ahinduka umugaragu w’umugurije." 
Proverbs22:8 Ubiba ubuhemu asarura ibyago, kandi azahazwa n’ingaruka z’ubugome bwe." 
Proverbs22:9 Ufite ijisho rirebana impuhwe azahabwa umugisha, kuko agabanya ku mugati we, agaha umukene." 
Proverbs22:10 Niwamagana umusekanyi, intonganya zizashira, imanza n’agasuzuguro bihoshe." 
Proverbs22:11 Ukunda imitima iboneye akarangwa n’ineza ku munwa, aba ari incuti y’umwami." 
Proverbs22:12 Amaso y’Uhoraho arengera ubumenyi, kandi agatahura amagambo y’abagambanyi." 
Proverbs22:13 Umunebwe aravuga ngo «Hanze hari intare, ninsohoka irantsinda mu mayira.»" 
Proverbs22:14 Akanwa k’umugore w’undi ni nk’urwobo rurerure, uwo Uhoraho azinutswe, azagwamo." 
Proverbs22:15 Ubusazi buba buziritse ku mutima w’umwana muto, ariko inkoni ihana ibumucaho." 
Proverbs22:16 Ukandamiza umukene agezaho akamukuza, kandi uha umukire aba amukenesheje." 
Proverbs22:17 Tega amatwi, wumve amagambo y’abanyabuhanga, umutima wawe uwuhatire ubumenyi bwanjye," 
Proverbs22:18 kuko uzanezezwa no kuyabika mu mutima wawe, no kuyahoza ku munwa wawe yose." 
Proverbs22:19 Kugira ngo wiringire Uhoraho, nawe, ubu ngiye kukwigisha." 
Proverbs22:20 Ese si wowe nandikiye igitabo kigizwe n’imitwe mirongo itatu, kirimo inama n’ubumenyi," 
Proverbs22:21 ngira ngo nkumenyeshe amagambo y’ukuri, bityo nawe ukayageza yose ku wagutumye?" 
Proverbs22:22 Ntuzambure umukene kuko ari umukene, ntuzahutarize ku rugi utishoboye," 
Proverbs22:23 kuko Uhoraho azababuranira, akica ababakandamiza." 
Proverbs22:24 Ntugacudike n’umunyamujinya, kandi ntukagendane n’umuntu warakaye," 
Proverbs22:25 utazavaho utora inzira ze, ubugingo bwawe bugafatirwa mu mutego." 
Proverbs22:26 Ntukagenze nk’abemararira abandi, bakishingira abarimo imyenda;" 
Proverbs22:27 ntuzi se ko ubuze icyo wishyura, bagutwara n’uburiri uryamyeho?" 
Proverbs22:28 Ntuzimure imbago ya kera, iyo abasokuru bawe bashinze." 
Proverbs22:29 Uwo ajye yiyereka abami, yoye kuguma muri rubanda rugufi." 
Proverbs23:1 Niwicara ugiye gusangira n’igikomerezwa, uzitondere ibiri imbere yawe;" 
Proverbs23:2 uzirinde kugira umururumba, niba uzi ko ufite inda nini." 
Proverbs23:3 Ntuzararikire ibiryo bye biryoshye, kuko ari ibishukisho." 
Proverbs23:4 Ntuzirushye ngo urashaka ubukire, uzirinde ndetse no kubutekereza;" 
Proverbs23:5 umara kubura amaso ubureba, ugasanga bwayoyotse, kuko wagira ngo bumera amababa, maze bukaboneza iy’ikirere nka kagoma." 
Proverbs23:6 Ntuzarye umugati w’umuntu ukureba nabi, kandi ntuzararikire ibiryo bye biryoshye," 
Proverbs23:7 kuko icyo atekereza ku mutima ari na ko agikora; arakubwira ati «Rya kandi unywe», ariko ntaba agushyizeho umutima!" 
Proverbs23:8 Ibyo umaze kumira uzabiruka n’amagambo yawe meza agupfane ubusa. 
Proverbs23:9 Ntuzabwire amatwi y’igicucu, kuko cyasuzugura ukuri kw’amagambo yawe." 
Proverbs23:10 Ntukimure imbago ya kera, ngo urengere umurima w’imfubyi," 
Proverbs23:11 kuko zifite umuhozi ukomeye; ni we uzaziburanira akurwanye. 
Proverbs23:12 Umutima wawe uwukangurire inyigisho, n’amatwi yawe uyatoze amagambo y’ubumenyi." 
Proverbs23:13 Ntukange guhana umwana, numukubita umunyafu, ntazaherako ngo apfe!" 
Proverbs23:14 Wowe rero, numukubita umunyafu, ubuzima bwe uzaba ubukijije inyenga." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wanjye, umutima wawe nurangwaho ubuhanga, nanjye uwanjye uzishima," 
Proverbs23:16 kandi nzanezerwa cyane, umunwa wawe nuvuga amagambo aboneye." 
Proverbs23:17 Umutima wawe ntukagirire ishyari abanyabyaha, ahubwo ujye uhora utinya Uhoraho," 
Proverbs23:18 kuko bucyana ayandi, hakazaza igihe uzabona ko icyizere cyawe atari imfabusa." 
Proverbs23:19 Tega amatwi, mwana wanjye, ube umunyabuhanga, kandi umutima wawe uwuyobore inzira iboneye." 
Proverbs23:20 Ntuzabarirwe mu banywi ba divayi, cyangwa mu bashimusi," 
Proverbs23:21 kuko abanywi n’abashimusi batindahara, naho kuryamira bikambika umuntu incabari." 
Proverbs23:22 Uzajye wumvira so wakubyaye, kandi ntugasuzugure nyoko namara gukecura." 
Proverbs23:23 Ujye uharanira ukuri, woye kugutezukaho, uronke ubuhanga, ubumenyi n’ubwenge." 
Proverbs23:24 Se w’intungane ntazahwema kwishima, kandi ubyaye umunyabuhanga aranyurwa." 
Proverbs23:25 So na nyoko nibanezerwe, uwakubyaye avuze impundu." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wanjye, wite ku byo nkubwira, kandi amaso yawe anyurwe n’inzira zanjye:" 
Proverbs23:27 ni koko, umugore w’indaya ameze nk’urwobo rurerure, naho uw’umuvantara ni nk’iriba ry’imfungane;" 
Proverbs23:28 ng’uwo ararekereje nk’umujura, abantu akabagwizamo abagambanyi." 
Proverbs23:29 Ni nde uhora ataka? Ni nde uhora yicuza icyo yakoze? Ni nde nyir’intonganya? Ni nde nyir’amaganya? Ni nde nyir’inguma zitagira imvano? Ni nde nyir’amaso yatukuye? 
Proverbs23:30 Ni iby’abarara inkera kuri divayi bagahora bashakisha inzoga z’amuki. 
Proverbs23:31 Uramenye ntukarebe divayi; usanga ari intuku, ibengerana mu nkongoro, ikamanuka inzira imwe mu muhogo," 
Proverbs23:32 ariko amaherezo ikaryana nk’inzoka, ikadomana nk’impiri." 
Proverbs23:33 Amaso yawe azabona ibintu by’amayobera, uvuge amagambo y’urudubi;" 
Proverbs23:34 umere nk’umuntu uryamye mu mazi magari, cyangwa mu bushorishori bw’ibiti!" 
Proverbs23:35 Uzavuga uti «Bankubise, ariko sindibwa, bampondaguye, ariko nta cyo numva! Mbese nzakanguka ryari? Ay’ubusa nzongera nyivumbe!»" 
Proverbs24:1 Ntukagirire abagome ishyari kandi ntukifuze kubana na bo," 
Proverbs24:2 kuko umutima wabo ugambiriye ubwicanyi, iminwa yabo ikavuga ibibi." 
Proverbs24:3 Inzu yubakwa n’ubuhanga, kandi igakomezwa n’ubwenge;" 
Proverbs24:4 ubumenyi ni bwo butuma ibigega byuzura ibintu byiza byose kandi by’agaciro. 
Proverbs24:5 Umunyabuhanga aruta umunyembaraga, kandi n’ufite ubumenyi akaruta umunyabigango;" 
Proverbs24:6 nuko rero nushoza urugamba, uzabanze urwitegure, kandi wizeye abajyanama benshi bazaguha gutsinda." 
Proverbs24:7 Ubumenyi burenze kure umupfayongo, ntakagire icyo arevura abaturage bakoranye." 
Proverbs24:8 Ugambiriye kugira nabi, bamwita umunyamayeri." 
Proverbs24:9 Igicucu nta kindi gitekereza atari icyaha, kandi umupfayongo atera abantu ishozi." 
Proverbs24:10 Nuba ikigwari amakuba yaje, ubutwari bwawe buzaba ari nta bwo." 
Proverbs24:11 Uzarokore abakatiwe urwo gupfa, utabare n’abahutazwa bajyanywe aho bazicirwa!" 
Proverbs24:12 Ntuzavuge ngo «Ariko ntitwari tubizi!» Upima imitima se ntabyumva? Uwakubumbye arabizi, kandi azitura buri muntu akurikije imyifatire ye." 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wanjye, jya urya ubuki kuko ari bwiza, kandi ikinyagu cyabwo kinurira akanwa kawe." 
Proverbs24:14 Ubimenye, n’ubuhanga ni ko bumereye umutima wawe. Nuburonka, uzabaho neza mu gihe kizaza, maze icyizere cyawe cyoye gupfa ubusa." 
Proverbs24:15 Wa mugome we, ntukareme igico ku rugo rw’intungane, kandi ntuzayisenyere inzu!" 
Proverbs24:16 Koko rero, intungane n’iyo yagwa incuro ndwi, irongera ikabyuka, naho abagome borama mu makuba." 
Proverbs24:17 Umwanzi wawe nagwa, ntukabyinire ku rukoma, natsikira, umutima wawe ntukishime," 
Proverbs24:18 hato Uhoraho atavaho abibona akabigaya, maze akirengagiza uburakari yari yamugiriye." 
Proverbs24:19 Ntugahagarikwe umutima n’abagiranabi, cyangwa ngo ugirire ishyari abagome," 
Proverbs24:20 kuko umuntu mubi ataramba, n’itara ry’abagome rirazima." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wanjye, jya wubaha Uhoraho n’umwami, kandi ntugacudike n’abakunda guhindagura ibintu," 
Proverbs24:22 kuko ibyago bizabatungura, ndetse nta n’uzi amakuba azabatera." 
Proverbs24:23 Izi na zo ni inama z’abanyabuhanga: Si byiza guca urubanza ubera. 
Proverbs24:24 Ubwira umugome ngo «Uri intungane», imbaga iramuvuma, n’amahanga akamwanga urunuka;" 
Proverbs24:25 ariko abamucyaha baranezerwa, kandi bakaronka umugisha n’umukiro." 
Proverbs24:26 Uguhaye igisubizo cy’ukuri, aba aguhobeye agusoma." 
Proverbs24:27 Banza ukiranuke n’imirimo y’igasozi, utunganye imirima yawe, hanyuma uzabone kubaka inzu yawe." 
Proverbs24:28 Ntugashinje mugenzi wawe nta mpamvu, wakwiyemeza se kubeshyeshya umunwa wawe?" 
Proverbs24:29 Ntuzavuge ngo «Uko yangenje, ni ko nzamugenzereza! Buri wese nzamwitura ibyo yangiriye!»" 
Proverbs24:30 Nanyuze hafi y’umurima w’umunebwe, warimo imizabibu y’uwo munyabwenge buke." 
Proverbs24:31 Nasanze wararariyemo ikigunda, wuzuyemo amahwa, n’uruzitiro rw’amabuye rwarasenyutse." 
Proverbs24:32 Jyewe naritegereje, ndatekereza, ndareba, maze nkuramo iyi nyigisho:" 
Proverbs24:33 «Urasinzira gato, ugahwekera, ukipfumbata kugira ngo usinzire;" 
Proverbs24:34 nyamara ubwo ubukene n’ubutindi biba birekereje, bikagutera nk’umujura w’ingufu.»" 
Proverbs25:1 Dore indi migani ya Salomoni, uko yakusanijwe n’abantu ba Hezekiya, umwami wa Yuda." 
Proverbs25:2 Ikuzo ry’Imana ni ukugira ibanga, naho iry’abami ni ugucengera ibintu." 
Proverbs25:3 Uko nta we uzi ubujyejuru bw’ikirere n’ubujyakuzimu bw’isi, ni na ko imitima y’abami idashobora gusesengurwa." 
Proverbs25:4 Iyo feza uyikijije ibishunga, iza iyunguruye neza;" 
Proverbs25:5 nukura umugome imbere y’umwami, ingoma ye izaganzamo ubutabera." 
Proverbs25:6 Ntukibonekeze imbere y’umwami, cyangwa ngo ufate icyicaro cy’abakomeye," 
Proverbs25:7 kuko byaruta ko bakubwira ngo «Tambuka uze hano », aho gusuzugurirwa imbere y’igikomangoma." 
Proverbs25:8 Ibyo amaso yawe yabonye, ntukihutire kubijyana mu rubanza; none se amaherezo wabigenza ute, mugenzi wawe aramutse agutsinze?" 
Proverbs25:9 Uzajye uburana na mugenzi wawe, ariko wirinde kugira uwo umenera ibanga," 
Proverbs25:10 hato batazabimenya bakakugaya, maze ugata agaciro burundu." 
Proverbs25:11 Ijambo rivugiwe igihe, ni nk’ikirezi cya zahabu gitakishije feza." 
Proverbs25:12 Inama umunyabuhanga agira umwumva, ni nk’impeta cyangwa umutamirizo bikoze muri zahabu." 
Proverbs25:13 Nk’uko amafu yo mu mpeshyi ashimisha abasaruzi, ni ko intumwa y’indahemuka imeze; koko rero, isusurutsa umutima wa shebuja." 
Proverbs25:14 Umuntu uhora asezerana ntagire icyo atanga, asa n’ibicu n’umuyaga bitavamo imvura." 
Proverbs25:15 Kutarambirwa bituma umuntu yigarurira umucamanza, kandi ururimi rucisha make ruvuna igufa." 
Proverbs25:16 Ese ufite ubuki? Uryeho ubuguhagije, nurenza urugero, uzaburuka." 
Proverbs25:17 Uzajye usura mugenzi wawe rimwe na rimwe, kuko nakurambirwa, azakwanga." 
Proverbs25:18 Umuntu ushinja ibinyoma mugenzi we, amubabaza nk’ubuhiri, inkota cyangwa umwambi utyaye." 
Proverbs25:19 Kwiringira umugambanyi amakuba yaje, ni nko kwizera iryinyo ryaboze cyangwa ikirenge gicumbagira." 
Proverbs25:20 Kuririmbira umuntu wishavuriye, ni nko gusuka siki ku gisebe, cyangwa kwiyambura ikoti mu mbeho." 
Proverbs25:21 Niba umwanzi wawe ashonje, muhe umugati wo kurya, niba afite inyota, umuhe amazi anywe;" 
Proverbs25:22 ubwo uzaba usa n’umurahurira ibishirira ku mutwe, kandi Uhoraho azabikwitura." 
Proverbs25:23 Uko umuyaga wo mu majyaruguru uzana imvura, ni na ko akarimi kazimura gatera abantu ishavu." 
Proverbs25:24 Biraruta kwinugika mu ngombe iri mu rugo, aho kubana mu nzu n’umugore w’umunyamahane." 
Proverbs25:25 Inkuru nziza iturutse mu gihugu cya kure, isa n’amazi afutse mu muhogo wakakaye." 
Proverbs25:26 Intungane idohoka kubera umugome, ni nk’iriba ry’ibirohwa cyangwa isoko banduje." 
Proverbs25:27 Si byiza kurya ubuki bwinshi, cyangwa guharanira ikuzo rihanitse." 
Proverbs25:28 Umuntu utitangira muri kamere ye, ameze nk’umugi wasenyutse utagira inkike." 
Proverbs26:1 Urubura mu mpeshyi, imvura mu isarura, byombi ntibikwiye; nkanswe icyubahiro ku mupfayongo." 
Proverbs26:2 Nk’uko igishwi gihunga, cyangwa intashya ikaguruka, ni na ko umuvumo w’amaherere udahama." 
Proverbs26:3 Ikiboko gikwiriye ifarasi, icyuma gikwiriye akanwa k’indogobe; inkoni zo zibereye ibitugu by’umupfayongo!" 
Proverbs26:4 Ntugasubize umupfayongo ukurikije ubusazi bwe, hato utazavaho umera nka we." 
Proverbs26:5 Ujye usubiza umupfayongo ukurikije ubusazi bwe, hato atazibeshya ko yabaye umunyabuhanga." 
Proverbs26:6 Utumye umupfayongo, aba yigoreye ubusa, ni nk’aho yakubise amaguru y’ubusa." 
Proverbs26:7 Uko amaguru y’ucumbagurika aba adashinga, ni na ko umugani uvuzwe n’igicucu uba udafashe." 
Proverbs26:8 Guha umupfayongo icyubahiro, ni nko gupfunyika ibuye mu muhumetso." 
Proverbs26:9 Umugani uvuzwe n’umupfayongo, ni nk’ihwa rihanda mu kiganza cy’umusinzi." 
Proverbs26:10 Ukoresha umupfayongo cyangwa umusinzi, aba ari nk’umurashi w’umuheto ukomeretsa abihitira bose." 
Proverbs26:11 Uko imbwa isubira ku birutsi byayo, ni na ko umupfayongo akomera ku busazi bwe." 
Proverbs26:12 Ese wabonye umuntu wirata ko ari umunyabuhanga? Uwo nguwo we, wakwizera ko n’umupfayongo azabumutanga." 
Proverbs26:13 Umunebwe aravuga ati «Mu nzira hari ikirura! Mu mayira hari intare!» 
Proverbs26:14 Uko urugi rwihindukiza ku mapata yarwo, ni na ko umunebwe yihindukiza ku buriri bwe." 
Proverbs26:15 Umunebwe ashora ikiganza ku mbehe, bikamunanira kukigarura ku munwa." 
Proverbs26:16 Umunebwe yibwira ko arusha ubuhanga abantu barindwi basubizanya ubushishozi. 
Proverbs26:17 Kwivanga mu ntonganya z’abandi, ni nko gukurura amatwi y’imbwa yigendera." 
Proverbs26:18 Hari usa n’umuntu wihindura umusazi, akajugunya amafumba yaka, akarasa n’imyambi yica!" 
Proverbs26:19 Ni wa wundi ubeshya mugenzi we, agahindukira, akavuga ngo «Nikiniraga!»" 
Proverbs26:20 Iyo umuriro ubuze inkwi, urazima, kandi iyo inzimuzi zidahari, intonganya zirahosha." 
Proverbs26:21 Nk’uko umuntu yongera amakara mu ziko n’inkwi mu muriro, ni na ko umunyamahane asembura intonganya." 
Proverbs26:22 Amagambo y’inzimuzi araryoha, kandi ashyika ku nkingi z’umutima." 
Proverbs26:23 Amagambo meza avuye ku mutima mubi, ni nk’ibishunga bya feza bitatse ku rujyo." 
Proverbs26:24 Uwangana ahorana amagambo areshya, ariko mu mutima we aba abitsemo ikinyoma;" 
Proverbs26:25 nakuzanaho imvugo nziza, ntukamwizere, kuko umutima we uba wuzuye amahano." 
Proverbs26:26 N’aho urwango rwe rwakwikingiranya mu buryarya, amaherezo umugome azatahurwa imbere ya bose." 
Proverbs26:27 Ucukura urwobo azarugwamo, kandi ushungura ibuye, ni we rizagarukaho." 
Proverbs26:28 Ururimi rubeshya rwanga abo rwahemukiye, kandi umunwa w’indyarya ukurura urupfu." 
Proverbs27:1 Ntukiringire iby’ejo, kuko utazi icyo uyu munsi uhaka." 
Proverbs27:2 Aho kwirata, waratwa n’abandi; washimwa n’umuvantara aho kwishima ubwawe!" 
Proverbs27:3 Ibuye riraremera, n’umucanga ni uko, ariko umujinya w’umusazi ubirusha byombi!" 
Proverbs27:4 Uburakari butera urugomo, umujinya wo ugahurura nk’isuri, ariko se ni nde wakwihanganira ishyari?" 
Proverbs27:5 Intonganya zeruye ziruta ubucuti buhishe. 
Proverbs27:6 Incuti y’indahemuka ntizatindiganya kuguhana, ariko umwanzi agusoma akubeshya." 
Proverbs27:7 Akanwa kahaze kinemfaguza ibinyagu by’ubuki, ariko iyo inda ishonje, n’icyaruraga kirayiryohera." 
Proverbs27:8 Umuntu uhunze igihugu cye, aba ameze nk’igishwi gitaye icyari cyacyo." 
Proverbs27:9 Amavuta n’imibavu binezeza umutima, kandi incuti ituje irasusurutsa kurusha inama wakwigira." 
Proverbs27:10 Ntuzatererane incuti yawe cyangwa incuti ya so, ntuzirukire ku muvandimwe wawe mu gihe cy’amakuba; umuturanyi uri bugufi aruta umuvandimwe uri iyo gihera." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wanjye, urabe umunyabuhanga, unezeze umutima wanjye, bityo nshobore gusubiza untuka." 
Proverbs27:12 Umunyabwenge abona icyago akihisha, naho injiji zikakiyahuraho, zikabizira." 
Proverbs27:13 Fata umwenda we, kuko yishingiye uwo atazi, umwake ingwate kuko yemarariye abavantara!" 
Proverbs27:14 Umuntu nazinduka arangurura ijwi aha umugisha mugenzi we, ibyo bizitwa ko amuvumye." 
Proverbs27:15 Umugore w’ingare asa n’umutonyi ujojoba ubutitsa imvura yaguye; 
Proverbs27:16 gushaka kumutangira, ni nko gufata umuyaga, cyangwa kuyoza amavuta intoki." 
Proverbs27:17 Icyuma gityazwa n’icyuma, n’umuntu anoza imyifatire ya mugenzi we." 
Proverbs27:18 Uwita ku giti cy’umutini azarya imbuto zacyo, kandi urinda shebuja, na we azabishimirwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Nk’uko amazi agaragaza ishusho y’uyarebamo, ni na ko umutima w’umuntu uranga nyirawo." 
Proverbs27:20 Nk’uko ikuzimu no mu nyenga hadahaga, ni na ko amaso y’umuntu adahaga kurora." 
Proverbs27:21 Uruganda rutunganya feza, itanura rigatunganya zahabu, ariko umuntu ashimirwa imyifatire ye." 
Proverbs27:22 N’iyo wasekurira umupfayongo mu isekuru, mbese nk’uko umuhini umenagura ingano, ubusazi bwe ntibwamuvaho." 
Proverbs27:23 Uzajye umenya uko amatungo yawe ameze, wite ku mashyo yawe;" 
Proverbs27:24 kuko ubukire budahoraho iteka, ndetse n’ikamba ry’abami ntirihererekanywa ubuziraherezo." 
Proverbs27:25 Jya utema ubwatsi maze ubundi butohe, wahire n’ubwo ku misozi;" 
Proverbs27:26 intama zawe zizakwambike ubwoya bwazo, naho amasekurume uyaguremo akarima;" 
Proverbs27:27 ihene zawe zizakamwe cyane zigutunge, hamwe n’umuryango wawe n’abaja bawe." 
Proverbs28:1 Umugome ahunga nta we umwirukanye, ariko intungane ni nk’icyana cy’intare, nta cyo zikanga." 
Proverbs28:2 Iyo igihugu kivumbagatanyije, abategetsi baba benshi, ariko umuntu w’umuhanga kandi uzi ubwenge aragicubya." 
Proverbs28:3 Umukene ukandamiza abanyantege nke, ni nk’imvura y’umuriri igwa, abantu bakabura ikibatunga." 
Proverbs28:4 Abica amategeko bogagiza umugiranabi, naho abayakurikiza, bakamurakarira." 
Proverbs28:5 Inkozi z’ibibi ntizumva ubutabera, ariko abashaka Uhoraho bumva byose." 
Proverbs28:6 Umukene urangwa n’umurava aruta umukire uzwiho uburyarya. 
Proverbs28:7 Ukurikiza itegeko aba ari umwana uzi ubwenge, naho uwuzura n’ibyomanzi akoza se ikimwaro." 
Proverbs28:8 Uwongera umutungo we yaka inyungu z’agakabyo, aba awurundira undi uzagirira impuhwe abakene." 
Proverbs28:9 Uwica amatwi ngo atumva itegeko, n’isengesho rye riba riteye ishozi." 
Proverbs28:10 Uyobya intabera mu nzira mbi, azagwa mu rwobo yicukuriye ubwe, naho ab’intungane bazahirwa." 
Proverbs28:11 Umukire yibwira ko ari umunyabuhanga, ariko umukene uzi ubwenge akamutahura." 
Proverbs28:12 Iyo intungane zanezerewe, biba ari ibirori, ariko iyo abagome bahagurutse, buri wese arahunga." 
Proverbs28:13 Uhisha ibyaha bye, ntakizamuhira, ariko ubyanga akabyicuza, azababarirwa." 
Proverbs28:14 Hahirwa umuntu uhora akenga, naho unangira umutima we azagwa mu makuba." 
Proverbs28:15 Umutware mubi ukandamiza imbaga y’abanyantege nke, ni nk’intare itontoma cyangwa ikirura gishonje." 
Proverbs28:16 Umutware utagira ubwenge akunda guhuguza, uwanga indamu mbi ni we uzaramba." 
Proverbs28:17 Umuntu wahamwe n’amaraso y’uwo yishe azahunga arinde apfa, ntihazagire umutangira." 
Proverbs28:18 Ugendana umurava azakizwa, indyarya yo inyura inzira ebyiri, imwe ikazayigwamo." 
Proverbs28:19 Uhinga umurima we azabona ikimutunga ahage, naho ukurikirana amateshwa azatindahara." 
Proverbs28:20 Umuntu uvuga ukuri azahundagazwaho imigisha, naho uwihutira gukira azahanwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Nta bwo ari byiza kubera umuntu mu rubanza, ariko hari abacumura batyo kubera igisate cy’umugati." 
Proverbs28:22 Umuntu ararikira yiruka inyuma y’ubukire, ariko ntamenye ko ari ubutindi bumutegereje." 
Proverbs28:23 Ucyaha abandi amaherezo aratoneshwa, kurusha ubarata agakabya." 
Proverbs28:24 Ucuza se na nyina akavuga ngo «Si icyaha», nta ho atandukaniye n’umujura." 
Proverbs28:25 Umunyamururumba abyutsa intonganya, ariko uwiringira Uhoraho azatengamara." 
Proverbs28:26 Uwiringira ubwenge bwe gusa, aba ari umupfayongo, naho uwitwarana ubuhanga, nta kizamuhungabanya." 
Proverbs28:27 Uha abakene ntazigera akena, ariko utabareba azavumwa cyane." 
Proverbs28:28 Iyo abagome bahagurutse, buri wese arihisha, ariko iyo barimbutse, intungane ziragwira." 
Proverbs29:1 Umuntu bahana agashinga ijosi, nta kabuza azavunika atunguwe." 
Proverbs29:2 Iyo intungane zigwiriye, abantu barishima, naho iyo umugiranabi atwara, rubanda bacura imiborogo." 
Proverbs29:3 Ukunda ubuhanga ashimisha se, naho ugenda mu ndaya atagaguza ibintu bye." 
Proverbs29:4 Umwami w’intabera atengamaza igihugu cye, naho uwaka imisoro y’ikirenga aragisenya." 
Proverbs29:5 Umuntu urata mugenzi we akabya, aba amushyize umutego mu maguru." 
Proverbs29:6 Icyaha cy’umugiranabi ni umutego azafatirwamo, naho intungane irishima ikavuza impundu." 
Proverbs29:7 Intungane ihangayikwa n’amagorwa y’abakene, naho umugome ntakozwa ubumenyi." 
Proverbs29:8 Abasekanyi batera impagarara mu mugi, ariko abanyabuhanga bahosha uburakari." 
Proverbs29:9 Iyo umunyabuhanga aburana n’umupfayongo, yaba arakaye cyangwa se aseka, ntashobora kumugusha neza." 
Proverbs29:10 Abantu b’abicanyi banga umunyamurava, naho ab’intabera baramushakashaka." 
Proverbs29:11 Umupfayongo yasasa umujinya we, naho umunyabuhanga arawubundikira, akawucubya." 
Proverbs29:12 Iyo umutware yita ku mazimwe, abayoboke be bose baba abagome." 
Proverbs29:13 Umukene n’umugiranabi bafite icyo bahuriyeho, Uhoraho ni we umurikira amaso yabo bombi." 
Proverbs29:14 Umwami ukemura imanza z’abakene acishije mu kuri, ingoma ye yashinze imizi burundu." 
Proverbs29:15 Inkoni no gucyaha bitoza ubuhanga, naho umusore batereye iyo, akoza nyina isoni." 
Proverbs29:16 Iyo abagome biyongera, icyaha cyiha intebe, ariko intungane zizababona barimbuka." 
Proverbs29:17 Hana umuhungu wawe, uzagira amahoro, kandi azagutera ibyishimo ku mutima." 
Proverbs29:18 Iyo abahanuzi babuze, imbaga yiberaho uko ibonye, ariko ukurikiza itegeko azahirwa." 
Proverbs29:19 Nta bwo amagambo ari yo ahana umucakara, n’iyo yayumvise, ntayitaho." 
Proverbs29:20 Ese ujya witegereza umuntu wihutira kuvuga? Uwo nguwo we, wakwizera ko n’umupfayongo azamutanga kuri byinshi." 
Proverbs29:21 Niba umucakara ateteshejwe kuva mu bwana, amaherezo azigomeka." 
Proverbs29:22 Umuntu w’umunyamushiha akurura intonganya, umunyamwaga akagwiza ibicumuro." 
Proverbs29:23 Ubwirasi bw’umuntu buzamutesha agaciro, naho ufite umutima wiyoroshya azakuzwa." 
Proverbs29:24 Usangira n’igisambo aba yiyanga ubwe, yumva imivumo bagitongera, akinumira." 
Proverbs29:25 Gutinya abantu birimo umutego, naho uwiringira Uhoraho ntazahungabana." 
Proverbs29:26 Benshi baharanira ubutoni ku mutware, ariko Uhoraho ni we uha buri wese ikimukwiye." 
Proverbs29:27 Intungane ziterwa ishozi n’umugiranabi, umugome agatera isoni abanyamurava." 
Proverbs30:1 Amagambo ya Aguri, mwene Yake, w’i Masa. Uwo muntu ni we wivugiye ati Mana yanjye, ndananiwe! Ndananiwe, Mana yanjye, ndarushye." 
Proverbs30:2 Koko rero, nta muntu undusha ubucucu, kandi nta bwenge bw’abantu ngira;" 
Proverbs30:3 sinatojwe ubuhanga, n’ubumenyi bwa Nyir’ubutungane simbuzi." 
Proverbs30:4 Ni nde wazamutse mu ijuru akagaruka? Ni nde wapfumbase umuyaga mu biganza bye? Ni nde wapfunyitse amazi mu gishura cye? Ni nde washinze imbago z’isi? Izina rye ni irihe kandi umuhungu we yitwa nde? Wowe uramuzi! 
Proverbs30:5 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rikwiye kwizerwa, umwiringiye rimubera ingabo imukingira." 
Proverbs30:6 Ntuzagire icyo wongera ku magambo ye, hato atazaguhana, ugatahurwaho ikinyoma." 
Proverbs30:7 Hari ibintu bibiri nkwisabiye, ntuzabinyime mbere y’uko mpfa:" 
Proverbs30:8 uzandinde ikinyoma n’uburyarya, undinde ubutindi cyangwa umurengwe, ahubwo ungenere ikintunga gihagije," 
Proverbs30:9 ejo ntazarengwa ngahemuka, mvuga ngo «Uhoraho ni nde?» cyangwa natindahara nkiba, ngasuzuguza izina ry’Imana yanjye." 
Proverbs30:10 Ntuzasebye umugaragu kuri shebuja, hato atazakuvuma bikakokama." 
Proverbs30:11 Hari ubwoko bw’abantu buvuma se, batigeze kwifuriza nyina umugisha;" 
Proverbs30:12 ubwoko bw’abantu bibwira ko ari abaziranenge, kandi batarahanaguweho ibicumuro byabo;" 
Proverbs30:13 ubwoko bw’abantu b’indoro y’ubwirasi, barangwa n’amaso y’agasuzuguro;" 
Proverbs30:14 ubwoko bw’abantu b’amenyo y’inkota n’urwasaya rw’icyuma, batanyagurisha abanyantege nke ku isi, n’abakene mu bantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Umusundwe ufite abakobwa babiri bawubwira ngo «Duhe, duhe!» Hari ibintu bitatu by’indahaga, hakaba ndetse bine bitigera bivuga ngo «Ndanyuzwe!»" 
Proverbs30:16 Ibyo ni inyenga y’ikuzimu, inda y’ingumba, ubutaka budahaga amazi, ndetse n’umuriro utigera uvuga ngo «Ndanyuzwe!»" 
Proverbs30:17 Ijisho ry’umuntu useka se, akannyega ubukecuru bwa nyina, ibikona byo mu gasozi bizaritobagura, maze ibyana bya kagoma biriyongobeze." 
Proverbs30:18 Hari ibintu bitatu bindenze, hakaba na bine ntazi:" 
Proverbs30:19 uko kagoma iguruka mu kirere, uko inzoka igenda ku rutare, uko ubwato bwoga mu mazi, n’ikiyobora umugabo ku mugore ukiri inkumi." 
Proverbs30:20 Dore uko imyifatire y’umugore w’umusambanyi imeze: ararya, akihanagura ku munwa, ubundi akavuga ati «Nta kibi nakoze!»" 
Proverbs30:21 Hari ibintu bitatu bihindisha isi umushyitsi, hakaba na bine idashobora kwihanganira." 
Proverbs30:22 Ni ibi: umucakara wimye ingoma, umupfayongo warenzwe ibiryo," 
Proverbs30:23 umugore usendwa akabona umugabo, n’umuja usubira mu kiryamo cya nyirabuja." 
Proverbs30:24 Hari ibintu bine birusha ibindi ubuto ku isi, ariko bikaba inyaryenge mu zindi." 
Proverbs30:25 Ni intozi zitagira imbaraga, ariko ku mpeshyi zigahunika ibizazitunga;" 
Proverbs30:26 n’impereryi na zo zitagira ingufu, ariko zigacukura indaro yazo mu rutare." 
Proverbs30:27 Hari n’inzige zitagira umwami, ariko zikagendera ku murongo uboneye;" 
Proverbs30:28 hakaba n’umuserebanya bashobora gufatisha intoki, ariko ugatura mu ngoro z’umwami." 
Proverbs30:29 Hari n’ibindi bitatu bifite umubyimba unoze, hakaba na bine birangwa n’ingendo nziza:" 
Proverbs30:30 hari intare y’intwari mu nyamaswa, kandi ntigire icyo ihunga kibaho;" 
Proverbs30:31 hari rusake igenda ishinjagira, cyangwa se ruhaya; hakaba n’umwami iyo ashoreye ingabo ze." 
Proverbs30:32 Niba warigannye umupfayongo, wowe ubwawe ukikuza, nubitekerezaho, uzahite ufunga umunwa wawe;" 
Proverbs30:33 kuko iyo ucunze amata abyara amavuta, wakanda izuru rikava amaraso, kandi wasembura umujinya ukabyara intonganya." 
Proverbs31:1 Ngaya amagambo Lemuweli, umwami wa Masa, yatojwe na nyina:" 
Proverbs31:2 Umva, mwana wanjye, mwana nibyariye! Nkubwire iki se, mwana namye nsaba Imana?" 
Proverbs31:3 Ntuzategeze ubusore bwawe abagore, cyangwa ngo wishinge indaya zoreka n’abami." 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuweli we, dore ibitabereye abami: abami ntibakwiye kunywa divayi, n’ibikomangoma ngo birarikire inzoga zihiye," 
Proverbs31:5 kugira ngo batanywa bakibagirwa ibyategetswe, maze bakaburizamo imanza z’abakene bose." 
Proverbs31:6 Inzoga ihiye, mujye muyiha uri burimbuke, divayi na yo muyihe ufite intimba ku mutima;" 
Proverbs31:7 bityo azanywa yibagirwe amagorwa ye, yoye kwibuka umuruho we!" 
Proverbs31:8 Ujye uvuganira ikiragi, wite ku batagira kivurira," 
Proverbs31:9 wature, uce imanza mu butungane, maze usubize abakene n’abatishoboye uburenganzira bwabo." 
Proverbs31:10 Umugore w’umutima azabonwa na nde? Ko asumbije agaciro amasaro meza! 
Proverbs31:11 Umugabo we amwiringira abikuye ku mutima, maze agakunda agatunganirwa." 
Proverbs31:12 Uwo mugore aramunezereza, na rimwe ntajya amutenguha, iminsi yose y’ubuzima bwe." 
Proverbs31:13 Ashakashaka ubudodo n’ubuhivu bworoshye, maze intoki ze zigashishikarira kuboha." 
Proverbs31:14 Amera nk’amato y’abacuruzi, ibimutunga akabikura kure." 
Proverbs31:15 Abyuka kare butaracya, agateganya ifunguro ry’abo mu rugo, akabona gukwiza imirimo mu baja." 
Proverbs31:16 Yaba abonye umurima umushimishije akawugura, akawuteramo imizabitu ibyawe n’urwunguko rw’imirimo ye." 
Proverbs31:17 Arakenyera agakomeza, ahasigaye agakora atikoresheje." 
Proverbs31:18 N’ubwo abona ibintu bye bigenda neza, na nijoro itara rye riba ryaka akora." 
Proverbs31:19 Ikiganza cye agicyamurira ku rubohero, maze intoki ze zigasingira ikizingo cy’ubudodo." 
Proverbs31:20 Amaboko ye ayaramburira abakene, akagirira ubuntu ababuraniwe." 
Proverbs31:21 Ntajya yikanga imbeho y’itumba, kuko abo mu nzu ye bose bambaye ibisusurutse." 
Proverbs31:22 Ubwe yibohera ibiringiti, umwambaro we ni hariri inoze y’umuhemba." 
Proverbs31:23 Umugabo we yubahwa mu nama y’abakuru, iyo yicaranye n’abasheshe akanguhe b’ako karere." 
Proverbs31:24 Aboha imyenda akayigurisha, n’umucuruzi uhita akamuguraho imikandara." 
Proverbs31:25 Umwete n’umurava ni byo bimuranga, maze ibihe bizaza akabirebana agatwenge." 
Proverbs31:26 Agira ubwitonzi iyo ajya kuvuga, agatanga inama zuje urugwiro." 
Proverbs31:27 Akurikirira hafi iby’urugo rwe, maze ntakunde kwicara nta cyo akora." 
Proverbs31:28 Abahungu be burabahagurutsa bakamushima, umugabo we akamuvuga ibigwi." 
Proverbs31:29 Ati «Hari abakobwa benshi bagize ubutwari, ariko wowe wabarushije bose!»" 
Proverbs31:30 Ikimero kirashukana n’uburanga bugashonga, ahubwo umugore utinya Uhoraho ni we ukwiye kuratwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mujye mumwegurira ibyavuye mu kuboko kwe, kandi aratirwe mu ruhame ibyo yakoze!" 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Dore amagambo ya Koheleti, mwene Dawudi, umwami w’i Yeruzalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Koheleti yaravugaga ati: Ibintu ni ubusa, ni ubusabusa koko, byose ni ubusa!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ni iyihe nyungu umuntu akura mu miruho yose imushengurira kuri iyi si? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Igisekuru kirahita, ikindi kigataha, nyamara isi yo ikomeza kubaho." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Izuba rirarasa, nyuma rikarenga, maze rikihutira gusubira aho rizongera kurasira." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Umuyaga uhuhira mu majyepfo, ugahindukirira mu majyaruguru, nyuma ukazenga ukazenguruka, amaherezo ugakomeza inzira yawo."
