Ecclesiastes1:7 Inzuzi zose zisuka mu nyanja, ariko inyanja ntijya yuzura. Nyamara na zo ntizihwema kujya iyo zijya." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ibintu byose ugasanga birambiranye, ku buryo umuntu atabona uko abivuga; nyamara ariko ijisho ntirihaga kubireba, n’ugutwi ntikurambirwa kubyumva." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Ibyahozeho, ni byo bizakomeza kubaho; ibyakozwe ni byo bizakomeza gukorwa, ugasanga nta kintu gishyashya cyaduka ku isi." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Hari ubwo haba ikintu bakavuga ngo «Dore kiriya ni gishya!» burya na cyo kiba cyarabayeho mu binyejana byahise. 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Gusa nta rwibutso rw’ibyakera dusigarana, nk’uko n’iby’ubu nta rwo bizasigira ibihe bizaza." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Jyewe, Koheleti, nabaye umwami wa Israheli, nganje i Yeruzalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nashatse gushishozanya ubuhanga ibikorerwa mu nsi y’ijuru byose, nsanga umurimo Imana yashinze abantu utoroshye." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nitegereje ibikorerwa ku isi, nsanga byose ari ubusabusa, bikaba ari ukwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Icyagoramye ntigishobora kugororoka, kandi ibibuze ntibigira ingano." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ubwo nahise nibwira mu mutima, nti «Dore mfite ubushishozi busumbye ubw’abambanjirije i Yeruzalemu bose, n’umutima wanjye nawutoje ubumenyi n’ubuhanga." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Nitondeye gusobanukirwa ubumenyi n’ubuhanga, kumenya ubugoryi n’ubusazi; ibyo na byo nasanze ari ukwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Koko rero, ubuhanga bwinshi bubyara agahinda kenshi, naho ubumenyi bukabije bugakurura imibabaro.»" 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Naribwiye mu mutima, nti «Ngiye kwishimisha, ninezeze», na byo nsanga ari ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Guseka nabonye ari nta cyo bivuze, kwishima nsanga ari nta kamaro." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Nashatse gushimishiriza umubiri wanjye muri divayi, ariko umutima wanjye ugakomeza guhugukira ubuhanga; nshaka kwigira umusazi nk’abandi ngo aha nanyurwa no gukora ibyo abandi bose bakora ku isi igihe bakiriho." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Nageze ku bikorwa bihambaye, nubatse ingoro, ntera n’imizabibu." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nihangiye ubusitani, nshaka amasambu nyateramo ibiti by’imbuto z’amoko yose," 
Ecclesiastes2:6 kandi mfukura amariba y’amazi yo kubivomerera. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Natunze abagaragu n’abaja ngo bankorere; ntunga amatungo maremare n’amagufi, nyarusha abambanjirije i Yeruzalemu bose." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Narunze zahabu na feza, umutungo w’abami n’uw’ibihugu ndawigarurira. Nari mfite abaririmbyi n’abaririmbyikazi, nkagira n’abagore benshi, kuko ari bo batera abagabo guhimbarwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Narakomeye cyane kuruta abambanjirije i Yeruzalemu bose, kandi ngumana ubuhanga bwanjye." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Icyo amaso yanjye yifuzaga cyose, narakiyahaye; umutima wanjye, nta cyo nigeze nywima kiwushimisha. Koko rero, umutima wanjye wanejejwe n’ibyo nakoze byose; iyo iba ari yo ngororano yanjye mu mvune zose nagize." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ariko nasubije amaso inyuma, nitegereza ibikorwa byose nagezeho, nzirikana n’umuruho byanteye, maze ndavuga nti «Byose ni ubusabusa, bikaba ari ukwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga; ku isi nta nyungu na busa ihaba.»" 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ubwo rero, nahise nongera kuzirikana ku buhanga, ku bucucu n’ubusazi. Koko se, uzasimbura umwami azakora iki kindi? Azakora ibyariho na mbere hose." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Nasanze ubuhanga ari bwo bufite akamaro kurusha ubusazi, nk’uko urumuri ruruta umwijima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Umunyabuhanga amenya iyo ajya, naho umusazi akagenda afuragurika; ni byo koko, nyamara bombi bazapfa rumwe." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Noneho ndibwira nti «Ko mpfuye rumwe n’umusazi, ubu buhanga bwose bumariye iki?» Nibwira mu mutima ko ibyo na byo ari ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Koko kandi nta rwibutso rudasibangana umunyabuhanga cyangwa umusazi basiga, kuko iyo bapfuye, bucya kabiri bombi bamaze kwibagirana. Mbega ishyano kubona umunyabuhanga apfa kimwe n’umusazi!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ubuzima ndabuzinutswe, kuko mbona ibikorerwa ku isi biteye agahinda; byose ni ubusabusa, bikaba ari ukwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nazinutswe imiruho yose nagiriye ku isi, kuko ibyo nagezeho nzabisigira uzansimbura;" 
Ecclesiastes2:19 azaba se ari umunyabuhanga cyangwa umusazi? Nyamara, azegukana ibyo nagokeye ku isi byose, n’ubuhanga bwose nabikoranye; ibyo na byo ni ugukorera ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Nareba imiruho yose nagiriye kuri iyi si, nkumva ncitse intege!" 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kubona umuntu wakoranye ubuhanga n’ubwitonzi bikamuhira, hanyuma agasangira ibye n’undi utarigeze abivunikira, na byo ni ukuruhira ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ubwo se koko aba yararuhiye iki? Yaragokeye iki? Afite nyungu ki mu byo yaruhiye ubuzima bwe bwose? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Iyo minsi itabaze y’imiruho, uko guhangayikira ibintu, uko kurara utagohetse, na byo ni ukuvunikira ubusa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ikibereye umuntu, ni ukurya no kunywa, akanezezwa n’umurimo akora. Kandi ibyo nasanze bitangwa n’Imana;" 
Ecclesiastes2:25 kuko ntawashobora kurya cyangwa ngo agire ikimushimisha itabimuhaye. 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Koko rero, ushimisha Imana, imuha ubuhanga, ubumenyi n’ibyishimo; naho abanyabyaha ibagenera umurimo wo kurunda no guhunika ibizahabwa abayinyura. Ibyo na byo ni ukuruhira ubusa, bikaba ari ukwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ku isi, buri kintu kigira umwanya wacyo n’igihe cyacyo:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Hari igihe cyo kubyara, n’igihe cyo gupfa; hari igihe cyo gutera urugemwe, n’igihe cyo kururandura;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 hari igihe cyo kwica, n’igihe cyo gukiza; hari igihe cyo gusenya, n’igihe cyo kubaka;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 hari igihe cyo kurira, n’igihe cyo guseka; hari igihe cyo kuganya, n’igihe cyo kubyina;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 hari igihe cyo gutera amabuye, n’igihe cyo kuyatora; hari igihe cyo guhoberana, n’igihe cyo kwirinda guhoberana;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 hari igihe cyo gushakisha, n’igihe cyo gutakaza; hari igihe cyo kubika, n’igihe cyo kujugunya;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 hari igihe cyo gutabura, n’igihe cyo kudoda; hari igihe cyo guceceka, n’igihe cyo kuvuga;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 hari igihe cyo gukunda, n’igihe cyo kwanga; hari igihe cyo cy’intambara, n’igihe cy’amahoro." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Inyungu y’umuntu ukora yiyuha akuya ni iyihe? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nitegereje umurimo Imana yahaye bene muntu ngo bawusohoze. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Nasanze ibyo yaremye byose biberanye n’igihe cyabyo; yahaye abantu kumenya ibyahise n’ibizaza, ariko badashobora gusesengura ibikorwa by’Imana byose uko bingana." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Nasanze ibyiza kuri bo ari ukwishimisha, bakishakira umunezero bakiriho." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Koko kandi, iyo umuntu ariye, akanywa, agashimishwa n’ihirwe yavunikiye, na byo ni ingabire y’Imana." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Nasanze ibikorwa by’Imana biramba ubuziraherezo, nta kigomba kongerwaho, habe ngo hari n’icyo wagabanyaho. Imana ikora ityo kugira ngo bayitinye." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ibiriho ubu, na mbere byariho, n’ibizabaho bizaba byarahozeho; Imana ihora igarura ibyahozeho." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Dore ibindi nabonye ku isi: ubugome bwahawe intebe aho bacira imanza, n’umubisha yimura intungane mu cyicaro." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Naribwiye mu mutima nti «Intungane n’umugome, Imana izabacira urubanza, kuko ikintu cyose gifite igihe cyacyo, n’igikorwa cyose kikazacirwa urubanza rugikwiye.»" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Mu mutima wanjye, dore icyo navuze ku bantu: Imana ishaka kubagerageza, bityo ikabumvisha ko na bo ubwabo ari ibikoko." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Koko rero, amaherezo y’abantu n’ay’ibikoko ni amwe: urupfu ni rumwe, impumeko ni imwe, kandi umuntu nta cyo asumbya igikoko, kuko byose ari ubusabusa." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Ibintu byose bijya hamwe, byose biva mu gitaka, byose bisubira mu gitaka." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ni nde uzi niba umwuka w’abantu uzamuka ujya ejuru, maze uw’ibikoko ukajya hasi ikuzimu?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ubwo nabonye ko icyiza ku muntu ari ukunezezwa n’ibikorwa bye, kuko ari wo mugabane we. Napfa se, ni nde uzamugarura kureba ibyo asize?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Narongeye nitegereza akarengane kari ku isi, mbona amarira y’abakandamijwe, kandi bo nta we uyabahoza; ntibagira kirengera kuko ingufu zifitwe n’ababarenganya!" 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Nahise nshima abapfu bamaze urwabo, kurusha abazima bakiriho." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Abo bombi ariko, ubarusha ihirwe, ni utarabaho, kuko atarabona amarorerwa yo kuri iyi si!" 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Jyewe nasanze imvune n’ibikorwa byiza umuntu ageraho, biterwa n’ishyari agirira mugenzi we. Ibyo na byo ni ubusa, bikaba no kwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga!" 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Umupfayongo iyo yipfumbase, yiyangiriza umubiri." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Urushyi rumwe rwuzuye ituze, ruruta amashyi yombi yuzuye umuruho wo kwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Jyewe narongeye mbona ikindi kidafite akamaro ku isi: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 nka nyakamwe, utagira uwe, nta mwana, nta muvandimwe, kandi ugasanga adahwema kwikota, agahora ararikiye gukira! Ariko akagera aho yibaza ati «Ubu uwo nduhira ni nde, nkarinda kwibuza umunezero?» Ibyo na byo ni ukugokera ubusa, bikaba n’umurimo w’impfabusa." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kubana muri babiri biruta kwibana wenyine, kuko umurimo wabo ugira icyo ugeraho;" 
Ecclesiastes4:10 kandi iyo umwe aguye, undi aramubyutsa. Hagowe rero nyakamwe, utagira uwo bari kumwe, ngo nagwa amuramire!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Nanone kandi iyo muryamye muri babiri, murashyuha, none se umuntu uryamye wenyine yashyuha ate?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Igihe nyakamwe ashobora gutembagazwa n’umwanzi, iyo ari babiri baramunanira; ubundi kandi umugozi w’inyabutatu ucika bigoranye." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Umusore ukennye kandi uzi ubwenge aruta umwami usazanye ubupfu, ntabe acyemera ko bamugira inama." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Koko rero, n’aho uwo musore yafata ubutegetsi avuye mu buroko, cyangwa akimikwa akiri umukene," 
Ecclesiastes4:15 nasanze abantu bose bo ku isi bahita bamushyigikira, kurusha wa mwami wishyizeho." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Koko, abantu ayobora ntibabarika, nyamara abazaza nyuma ye, ntibazamwishimira. Ibyo na byo ni ukuruhira ubusa, bikaba no kwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga!" 
Ecclesiastes4:17 Ujye ugenda witonze nugana ku Ngoro y’Imana, ujye wegera maze utege amatwi; ibyo biruta igitambo cy’abapfayongo, n’ubwo badatekereza ko bakora nabi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Ntukihutire kubumbura umunwa, maze ngo umutima wawe uhubukire kurogombwa imbere y’Imana, kuko Imana iba mu ijuru, naho wowe ukaba ku isi; bityo rero ujye uvuga make." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Koko rero, imiruho myinshi itera kurota, n’amagambo menshi agakurura amazimwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Nuhigira Imana, ntugatinde kuzuza umuhigo wawe, kuko idakunda abapfayongo; icyo wahigiye, ujye ugikora." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kutagira umuhigo uhiga, biruta kuwuhiga ntuwurangize." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Umunwa wawe ntuzatere umubiri wawe gucumura, kandi ntuzabwire intumwa y’Imana ngo «Nari nibeshye!» Ni kuki Imana yagomba kukurakarira kubera amagambo yawe, ikanayogoza ibikorwa byawe?" 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Koko rero, imiruho myinshi itera kurota, naho amagambo menshi agakurura amatiku. None rero jya utinya Imana." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Nubona mu gihugu umukene akandamijwe, ukabona ubutabera n’ubutungane bititaweho, ntibizagutere inkeke; bazakubwira ko hejuru y’abakomeye haba hari ababarusha imbaraga, na bo kandi bakaba bazirushwa n’abandi." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Bazitwaza igifitiye akamaro rubanda nyamwinshi, cyangwa kubahiriza umwami." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ukunda amafaranga, ntajya ayagwiza; ukunda iby’isi nta nyungu abivanamo. Ibyo na byo ni ukugokera ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ahuzuye ibintu, hagwira n’abaryi; ubwo se inyungu y’ubitunze ni iyihe uretse kubirebesha amaso gusa?" 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Umukozi mwiza asinzira neza n’iyo yarya bike; ariko umukungu n’iyo yagwa ivutu ntagoheka. 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Hari ikintu kibabaje nabonye ku isi: kubona umuntu yaragwije umutungo, nyuma ukamushirana!" 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Iyo uwo mutungo uhombye, umwana yabyaye asigara amara masa." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Uko yagasohotse mu nda ya nyina yambaye ubusa, azasubirayo uko yaje; umuruho we wose nta cyo azawukuramo ngo akijyane." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Na byo biteye agahinda, kubona uko yaje ari na ko agenda, ubwo se bimwunguye iki kubona yararuhiye ubusa?" 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ubundi kandi imibereho ye irangwa n’umwijima, agahinda, indwara n’impungenge nyinshi." 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Dore jyewe uko nabibonye: ikibereye umuntu ni ukurya no kunywa agaha umutima we ikivuye mu mvune ze, mu gihe cyose Imana yamutije ngo abeho; kuko ari wo mugabane we." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Nanone kandi, umuntu Imana igabira umukiro n’ibintu, ikamuha kubirya no kubitunga, bityo agashimishwa n’ibyo yavunikiye, na byo ni ingabire y’Imana." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ubwo rero ntaba agihangayitswe n’imibereho ye, kuko Imana iba imwitayeho, ikamunezeza umutima." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Hari ikindi kibabaje nabonye ku isi, kandi gikomereye umuntu." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Umuntu Imana yamugabiye umukiro, ibintu n’icyubahiro; ntiyagira icyo abura mu byo umutima we wifuzaga byose. Nyamara ariko Imana ntimureka ngo abirye, ahubwo biribwa n’undi w’umuvantara! Ibyo na byo ni ukugokera ubusa, bikaba n’ibyago bibi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Nk’umuntu wabyara abana ijana, akaramba akabaho imyaka myinshi, umutima we ntunezerwe muri icyo gihe cyose, yaba apfuye akabura gihamba, ibyo byose byaba byaramumariye iki? Ndemeza ko umwana upfuye akivuka aba amurusha ibyishimo." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Koko rero, uwo mwana aba avuye mu mwijima, kandi aba agiye mu mwijima, n’izina rye rigahita risibangana." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Nta n’ubwo aba yabonye izuba cyangwa ngo arimenye, bityo akaba arusha ituze uwarambiye ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Mbese ariko n’iyo yabaho imyaka ibihumbi bibiri atigeze asogongera ku munezero, harya bose ntibajya hamwe?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Imvune z’umuntu aziterwa n’inda ye, kandi ntijya ihaga na rimwe." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 None se icyo umunyabuhanga arusha umupfayongo ni iki? Ni iyihe nyungu y’umukene uzi kwifata neza imbere y’abantu? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Ibyiza ni ugushimishwa n’ibyo ufite aho guhora urarikiye. Ibyo na byo ni ubusa, bikaba no kwiruka inyuma y’umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ikiriho cyose kiba cyarahawe izina, tuzi n’umuntu icyo ari cyo, ko adashobora kujya impaka n’umurusha imbaraga." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Koko rero amagambo menshi yongera amazimwe; umuntu se ayakuramo nyungu ki? 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Mbese ni nde wamenyera muntu ikimutunganiye mu buzima bwe, ko iminsi ye itagira shinge ihita bwangu nk’igihu? Ni nde se koko uzamuhishurira ibizaza nyuma ye amaze gupfa?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Kuvugwa neza biruta amavuta y’igiciro, kandi umunsi wo gupfa uruta uw’amavuko." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Aho kujya mu nzu y’ibirori wajya mu nzu y’abapfushije, kuko ari yo maherezo ngombwa ya buri muntu, kandi uriho wese akwiye kubizirikana." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Agahinda karuta ibitwenge, kuko ijisho ribabaye ritera umutima kwibaza." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Umutima w’umunyabuhanga uba mu nzu irimo agahinda, naho uw’umupfayongo ukaba mu nzu y’ibirori." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kumva umunyabuhanga agucyaha, biruta gutega amatwi indirimbo y’umupfayongo;" 
Ecclesiastes7:6 kuko ibitwenge bye biba bimeze nk’amahwa aturagurikira mu nsi y’inkono itetse. Na byo ni ukugokera ubusa. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Koko rero, inyota y’ubutegetsi ihinyuza umunyabuhanga, naho umutima uhawe iby’ubusa ugakurizaho guhemuka." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Iherezo ry’ikintu riruta intangiriro yacyo; kwihangana bikaruta kwirata. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ntukihutire kurakara, kuko uburakari ari bwo buranga abapfayongo." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ntukibaze ngo «Bishoboka bite ko kera nari merewe neza kuruta ubu?» kuko icyo kibazo kitaba gishingiye ku buhanga. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ubuhanga ni bwiza nk’umurage, kandi bufitiye akamaro abatuye kuri iyi si." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Koko kandi, uwisunze ubuhanga angana uwisunze feza; kandi akamaro k’ubumenyi, ni uko ubuhanga bubeshaho nyirabwo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Uzitegereze ibikorwa by’Imana: ni nde washobora kugorora icyo yahese? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ku munsi w’umunezero ujye wishima, naho ku uw’amakuba utekereze uti «Imana yabiremye byombi, kugira ngo umuntu adahishura ikizaba nyuma y’urupfu rwe.»" 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ibi byose nabibonye mu buzima bwanjye butagira shinge: hari intungane ikindukana n’ubutungane bwayo, nyamara ariko umugome akarambana n’ububisha bwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ntukabe intungane ngo ukabye, kandi ntukifate nk’umunyabuhanga ngo urenze urugero: ese waba wiyangiza ushaka iki?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ntugakabye ubugome cyangwa ngo usare: none se kuki warinda gupfa igihe kitaragera? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ni byiza gufata ikintu ariko n’ikindi utakirekuye, kuko utinya Imana, abitunganya byombi." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ubuhanga buha nyirabwo imbaraga ziruta iz’abatware cumi bari mu mugi. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Koko rero, ku isi nta ntungane ihari ikora neza ntiyigere icumura." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ubundi kandi, ntukite ku mabwire, hato utazumva ko umugaragu wawe akuvuma." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Ni koko, umutima wawe urabizi, nawe ubwawe kenshi wavumye abandi." 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ibyo byose narabigerageje, mbigiranye ubuhanga. Naravuze nti «Ndifuza kuba umunyabuhanga!» ariko nasanze bindenze." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ibiriho biri kure, birahishe cyane; ni nde uzabihishura?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Mu mutima wanjye, jyewe nahagurukiye gushakashaka no gucengera ubuhanga n’ukuri kw’ibintu, nsanga ubugome ari ubucucu, naho ubusazi ari uguhangwaho." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Nasanze umugore atera agahinda kurusha urupfu, kuko ubwe ari umutego, umutima we ukaba urushundura, n’amaboko ye akaba ingoyi. Umuntu ushimisha Imana aramurokoka, naho umunyabyaha abura uko amwiyaka." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Dore rero ibyo jyewe, Koheleti, nabonye, maze gusuzuma ibintu kimwe kimwe, ngira ngo menye ukuri kwabyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Ariko icyo umutima wanjye ushaka, nkaba ntarakibona ni iki: mu bagabo igihumbi, nabonyemo umwe uhamye, ariko mu bagore bose uko bangana, nabuzemo n’umwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Dore rero ibyo nashoboye kubona: Imana yaremye abantu ari abanyamurava, noneho bo bihangira inzira nyinshi zibayobya." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ni nde wamera nk’umunyabuhanga, akamenya ukuri kw’ibintu? Ubuhanga bw’umuntu bumutera gucya mu maso, bukamumara umunya." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Uzubahirize itegeko ry’umwami kubera amasezerano wagiriye Imana. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ntukihutire kuryitarutsa, cyangwa ngo wange kuva ku izima; kuko icyo umwami ashaka akigeraho," 
Ecclesiastes8:4 kandi ijambo rye rikaba iteka ridakuka, hakaba nta wamutinyuka ngo agire ati «Urakora iki?»" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ukurikiza itegeko, nta kibi kimugeraho, kandi umutima w’umunyabuhanga uba uzi igihe uzacirirwa urubanza." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Ni koko, ikintu cyose gifite umwanya w’urubanza rwacyo, kuko ubugome bw’umuntu buzamugaruka." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Mu by’ukuri ntaba azi ibizaba, n’uko bizagenda; none se ni nde wabimuhishurira?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Nta muntu utegeka umwuka w’ubuzima, kugira ngo awubuze gushira, nta we utegeka umunsi w’urupfu, kandi nta wasonewe urwo rugamba, n’ubugome ntibukiza nyirabwo." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ibyo byose nabibonye nitegereje ibibera ku isi, mu gihe umuntu akandamiza mugenzi we, ashaka kumugirira nabi." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Nabonye abagome bikoreye bajya kubahamba, bakabatambagiza umugi, bakiyibagiza ko bagize nabi. Ibyo na byo ni ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Kubera ko icyemezo cyo guhana ikibi kitaziraho, umutima w’abantu urarikira kugira nabi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 N’iyo umunyabyaha yacumuye incuro ijana, kandi akaramba, sinshidikanya ko ihirwe ari iry’abubaha Imana, kuko bayitinya." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Nyamara ariko umunyabyaha nta hirwe azagira, azahita vuba nk’igihu, kuko adatinya Imana." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Hari ikindi kintu cy’impfabusa ku isi: intungane zimwe zigira ibyago byagombaga kugwirira abanyabyaha, hakaba n’abanyabyaha baronka ibyiza byagombaga guhabwa intungane. Ndemeza ko n’ibyo ari amashyengo." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Jyewe rero nakunze ibyishimo, kuko nta kindi kinyura umuntu ku isi atari ukurya, akanywa hanyuma agatengamara. Ndetse iyaba ibyo yabihoranaga mu miruho ye yose, igihe agifite ubuzima Imana yamuhaye ku isi." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Nahagurukiye kumenya ubuhanga no gucengera ibikorerwa ku isi, nsanga umuntu atigera aruhuka haba ku manywa cyangwa nijoro;" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ubwo maze kwitegereza ibikorwa byose by’Imana, nahise ntahura ko nta washobora kumenya ibikorerwa ku isi, ko nta wasobanura impamvu umuntu atagera ku cyo avunikira. Ndetse n’umunyabuhanga wikekaho kumenya byinshi, na we ntashobora kubigeraho." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Koko, ibyo byose umutima wanjye wabizirikanyeho maze nsanga intungane n’abanyabuhanga hamwe n’ibikorwa byabo, byose biri mu maboko y’Imana. Umuntu ntasobanukiwe n’urukundo cyangwa n’urwango." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Kuri we byose ni amashyengo; kuko ari intungane n’umunyabyaha, ari utura ibitambo n’utigera abitura, ari umugiraneza n’umunyabyaha, ari upfa kurahira ari n’ubitinya, bose bapfa kimwe!" 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ni akaga k’urujijo kuri iyi isi, kubona abantu bose bagira iherezo rimwe. Ni yo mpamvu usanga imitima y’abantu isobetse amaganya, bati «Reka twisarire igihe tukiriho»; nyuma yaho bagapfa bakajya ikuzimu!" 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ukiri kumwe n’abandi ku isi aba agifite amizero, kuko «imbwa igihagaze, iruta intumbi y’intare»." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Abazima baba bazi ko bazapfa; abapfuye bo, nta cyo bazi, nta n’igihembo cyabo kibaho, kuko baba baribagiranye." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Urukundo rwabo, inzangano zabo n’amashyari yabo, byose biba byarasibanganye; nta n’uruhare baba bazongera kugira mu bikorerwa ku isi." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Genda urye umugati wawe mu byishimo, unywe divayi yawe mu munezero, kuko Imana yishimiye ibikorwa byawe." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Igihe cyose imyambaro yawe izabe yererana, n’amavuta ntazigere abura ku mutwe wawe." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Wishimane n’umugore ukunda igihe ukiriho muri ubwo buzima buyoyoka Imana yaguhaye, kuko ari yo ngororano ukura mu mvune z’ubuzima bwawe ku isi." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Icyo ushoboye gukora cyose, jya ugikora ukibishoboye, kuko ikuzimu aho uzajya, nta murimo, nta kuri, nta bumenyi, nta n’ubuhanga bihari." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ikindi nasanze ku isi ni uko abavuduka mu kwiruka atari bo batsinda, kandi ab’intwari si bo batsinda ku rugamba. Umugati ntuhabwa abanyabuhanga, ubukire ntibusanga abanyabwenge, cyangwa ngo abaminuje mu bumenyi abe ari bo batoneshwa; kuko bose bahura n’ibizazane." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Nta muntu umenya igihe azapfira; uko amafi afatirwa mu rushundura cyangwa inyoni zikagwa mu mutego, ni na ko umuntu atungurwa n’ibyago, iyo bimwubikiye bikamugwa gitumo." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ikindi nasanze gikomeye cyane, ni akamaro k’ubuhanga kuri iyi si." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Hari umugi muto ukagira abaturage bake; haza umwami ukomeye arawutera, arawugota yubaka inkuta ziwuzengurutse." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Muri uwo mugi harimo umugabo w’umukene ariko w’umunyabuhanga nuko arokora umugi akoresheje ubuhanga bwe. Nyamara nta muntu n’umwe wongeye kwibuka uwo mukene. 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Nuko nanjye ndavuga nti «Ubuhanga buruta ubutwari; ariko ubuhanga bw’umukene burasuzugurwa, nta we utega amatwi amagambo ye»." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Amagambo atuje y’abanyabwenge yumvikana neza kurusha urusaku rw’umwami w’abasazi. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ubuhanga buruta intwaro z’intambara, ariko inkunguzi imwe ivutsa ibyiza byinshi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Isazi zapfuye zinutsa amavuta y’umubavu; kandi ubusazi, n’iyo ari buke, butesha ubuhanga agaciro." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Umutima w’umunyabuhanga umuyobora inzira igororotse, naho uw’umupfayongo ukamuyobagiza." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Iyo umusazi agenda mu nzira, abura ubwenge akereka bose ko yasaze." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Umwami nakurakarira, ntugahindagane, kuko ubwitonzi buzakurinda kugwa mu byaha." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Hari ikintu kibi nabonye ku isi, gisa n’aho umwami yibeshya:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 kubona umusazi ahabwa imirimo ihanitse, naho abashoboye bagasubizwa inyuma!" 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nabonye abagaragu bari hejuru y’amafarasi, naho abatware bagendesha amaguru nk’abacakara." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ucukura umwobo, azawugwamo, kandi usenya urukuta, inzoka izamuruma." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ucukura amabuye, azamukomeretsa, naho uwasa inkwi yikururire icyago." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Iyo ishoka igimbye ntibayityaze, kuyitemesha bizasaba imbaraga; ariko ubuhanga bwo buhorana akamaro." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Kumenya kuzinga inzoka byaba bimaze iki, niba umugombozi ari we ibanje kuruma?" 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Amagambo avuye mu munwa w’umunyabuhanga atera ubwuzu, naho akanwa k’umupfayongo karamuroha." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Iyo ateruye kuvuga ararogombwa, akarangiza avuga amateshwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Umusazi aravuga ntahora. Nyamara nta we umenya akazaza ejo; ni nde se washobora kumuhishurira ibizaba nyuma y’urupfu rwe? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Umupfayongo avunikira ubusa, kubona atazi n’inzira imujyana mu mugi." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Uragowe, wowe gihugu gifite umwami ukiri umwana, n’abatware bazindukira ku mbehe!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Urahirwa, wowe gihugu gifite umwami w’imfura, n’abatware barira igihe, atari ukugira ngo basinde, ahubwo bashaka kunguka imbaraga." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Umunebwe agwirwa n’igisenge cy’inzu ye, naho umunyabute ikamuvira." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Mu birori, abakomeye barira kwinezeza, na divayi ikabahimbariza ubuzima; maze amafaranga akabakemurira ibibazo byose." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ntuzigere uvuma umwami, haba no mu bitekerezo; nuba unaryamye mu nzu yawe ntuzavume umukire, kuko n’akanyoni ko mu kirere kagutwara ijambo, rigatangira kuguruka nta mababa." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Jugunya umugati wawe hejuru y’amazi amaherezo uzakugarukira. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Umutungo wawe, jya uwugabana n’abandi barindwi cyangwa umunani, kuko utazi icyago gishobora gutera ku isi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Iyo ibicu birese imvura, biyicuburira ku isi. Igiti, cyagwa mu majyepfo cyangwa mu majyaruguru, aho kikubise ni ho kiguma." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Uwakwishinga umuyaga, ntiyakwirirwa abiba, kandi n’uwareba ibicu ntiyasarura." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nk’uko utazi umwuka ubeshaho inda y’umugore utwite, ni na ko utazi uko Imana yaremye byose." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Ujye uhera mu gitondo ubiba imbuto yawe, ugeze nimugoroba utaruhutse, kuko utazi ikizaguhira, ari iki cyangwa kiriya, cyangwa se niba byombi ari mahire." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Urumuri ni rwiza, kandi amaso anyurwa no kubona izuba." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Niba umuntu arambye imyaka myinshi, yose ajye ayishimamo, atekereze iminsi y’amakuba, kuko izaza ari myinshi. Ibitubaho byose ni impfabusa." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Wa musore we, ishime mu gihe ukibyiruka; maze umutima wawe uguhe ibyishimo mu minsi y’ubuto bwawe. Uzajye aho umutima wawe ukujyanye, n’aho amaso yawe akweretse, ariko umenye ko ibyo byose Imana izabiguciramo urubanza." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Jya urinda umutima wawe agahinda, umubiri wawe uwurinde ububabare; kuko ubuto n’ubusore ari impfabusa!" 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Uzibuke Uwakuremye mu gihe cy’ubuto bwawe, mbere y’uko usatirwa n’ibihe bibi, n’imyaka uzavugiraho uti «Iyi yo nta shema inteye.»" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Uzamwibuke mbere y’uko urumuri rw’izuba, ukwezi n’inyenyeri rukuzimiraho, n’ibicu bikongera kubudika imvura ihitutse." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Icyo gihe amaboko yakurwanagaho azaba atitira, intugu wikorezaga zihetame, amenyo wari usigaranye ananirwe gutapfuna, n’amaso warebeshaga ahume." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Icyo gihe amatwi yawe ntazaba acyumva, ijwi ryawe rizatitimira, uzabura ibitotsi mu bunyoni, utanagiheruka indirimbo z’ibitaramo." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Ubwo ntuzaba ugiterera umusozi, nugera mu nzira uzazengerezwa, umutwe wawe uzabe uruyenzi, nk’igiti kirabije, amaguru yawe ananirwe kwiterura, kuko nta kabaraga uzaba usigaranye, ahubwo uzagenda ugana indaro y’ikuzimu, maze abategereje kukuririra bahore mu muharuro." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Ubwo ni mbere y’uko unogoka, ubwonko butarasandara, ngo igifu gitabuke, n’umutima uturike," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 maze umukungugu usubire mu gitaka wavuyemo, n’umwuka w’ubugingo usubire ku Mana yawutanze." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Koko Koheleti yarabivuze ati «Ibintu ni ubusa, ni ubusabusa koko, byose ni ubusa.»" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Uretse ko Koheleti yari umunyabuhanga, yatoje na rubanda ubumenyi; yarashishoje, aracengera, anonosora imigani myinshi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Koheleti yihatiye gushaka imvugo iboneye, no kwandika amagambo y’ukuri." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Imvugo y’abanyabuhanga ni nk’agashinge gatuma umuntu yinyakura, naho imigani ni nk’imisumari ifatanya ubumenyi bwose. Byose bibwirizwa n’Imana, yo mushumba umwe rukumbi w’ukuri." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ikindi kandi, mwana wanjye, umenye ko kwandika ibitabo byinshi bitajya birangira, kandi ko no kwiga cyane ugakabya binaniza umubiri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Umwanzuro: muri make rero, ujye utinya Imana kandi ukurikize amategeko yayo; ni cyo umuntu abereyeho." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Koko rero, Imana izahamagaza ikiremwa cyose, igicire urubanza ku byihishe byose, ari ibyiza ari n’ibibi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Indirimbo ihebuje yahimbwe na Salomoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Nansome uko umunwa we usanzwe unsoma! Kuko urukundo rwe rundutira divayi. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Imibavu yawe ifite impumuro nziza, izina ryawe ni impumuro itamye, ni na yo mpamvu abakobwa bagukunda." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Reka nkujye inyuma unyijyanire, ngaho twirukanke! Umwami yanyinjije mu byumba bye. Tunezerwe tukwishimire, duhimbaze urukundo kurusha divayi. Erega bazi ubwenge abakwikundira!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ndi umuyumbu ariko mfite igikundiro, bari ba Yeruzalemu, nsa n’amahema ya Kedari nsa n’inyegamo zo kwa Salima." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ntimungaye ibara ngo ndirabura: ni izuba ryambabuye. Bene mama barandakariye; banyohereza kubarindira imizabibu, ariko iyanjye mizabibu sinayirinda." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Mbwira se, wowe umutima wanjye ukunda, aho ujyana umukumbi wawe kurisha, mbwira aho uwujyana kubyagira, ntava aho nsa n’ubwerabwera, hafi y’imikumbi ya bagenzi bawe." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Niba utabizi, wowe gitego mu bakobwa, sohoka ukurikire umukumbi wawe, maze abana b’ihene ubajyane kurisha iruhande rw’ibiraro by’abungeri." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ncuti yanjye, nakugereranya n’imwe mu mafarasi y’ingore, amwe akurura amagare ya Farawo." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Imisaya yawe ni ihogoza, itatse amasaro, kimwe n’ijosi ryawe ritamirije inigi." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Turagutungira inigi za zahabu, duharagemo amabara ya feza." 
SongOfSongs1:12 — Igihe umwami bamushagaye, ni bwo akarabo kanjye gatama impumuro nziza," 
SongOfSongs1:13 Uwo nkunda ni nk’agapfunyika k’umubavu kegama hagati y’amabere yombi. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Uwo nkunda ni nk’agashandiko k’indabo hagati y’imizabibu ya Enigadi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 — Koko uri mwiza, mukobwa nkunda, koko uri mwiza! Amaso yawe ni nk’ay’inuma." 
SongOfSongs1:16 — Uri mwiza, muhungu nkunda, koko uteye ubwuzu. Uburiri bwacu ni ubwatsi butoshye." 
SongOfSongs1:17 — Inkingi z’inzu yacu ni sederi, n’imishoro yayo ni imizonobari." 
SongOfSongs2:1 — Ndi akarabo k’amarebe y’i Saroni ndi umwangange wariboye wo mu mibande. 
SongOfSongs2:2 — Mu bandi bakobwa, uwo nkunda ameze nka lisi mu mahwa." 
SongOfSongs2:3 — Nk’ipera mu biti by’ishyamba, ni ko uwo nkunda ameze mu bana b’abahungu. Nicaye mu gicucu cye uko nabirarikiye, akabuto ke kandyohera mu kanwa." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yanyinjije mu rwengero rwe, anshyiraho ikimenyetso cy’urukundo rwe." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Nimumpembuze agatsima k’imizabibu, nimundamize akabuto k’ipera, dore nzonzwe nzira urukundo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Ukuboko kwe kw’imoso kuranseguye, ukw’iburyo kurampfumbase." 
SongOfSongs2:7 — Nyabuna, bari ba Yeruzalemu, ndabinginze, mbarahije amasha n’amasirabo y’agasozi, muramenye ntimunkangurire uwo nkunda, ntimumubyutse atarabishaka." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ndumva ijwi ry’uwo nkunda! Nguyu araje, arataraka mu mpinga, arasimbuka imisozi." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Uwo nkunda ameze nk’isha cyangwa ishashi y’impara. Dore nguyu ari inyuma y’inkike yacu, ararungurukira mu madirishya, arahengereza mu mbariro." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Uwo nkunda yateruye kuvuga, arambwira ati «Haguruka, ncuti; iyizire, mwiza wanjye," 
SongOfSongs2:11 Dore itumba rirashize, imvura irahise yaracitse." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Indabo zakwiriye igihugu, igihe cy’inkera cyageze, ijwi ry’inuma ryumvikanye mu gihugu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Umutini waturitse imbuto zawo za mbere, n’imizabibu yarabije, iratama impumuro zayo nziza. Cyo haguruka, ncuti; iyizire, mwiza wanjye." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Kanuma kanjye kibera mu mitutu y’urutare, mu bwihisho bw’imanga, reka nirebere mu maso yawe, niyumvire n’akajwi kawe, kuko ijwi ryawe rishimishije n’uburanga bwawe bugatera ubwuzu!»" 
SongOfSongs2:15 Nimudufatire imihari, bya byana by’imihari byonona imizabibu, kandi imizabibu yacu ari uruyange." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Uwo nkunda ni uwanjye, nanjye ndi uwe. Aragira mu ndabo z’amalisi." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Garuka, ncuti yanjye, mbere y’agasusuruko, mbere y’uko umwijima utamuruka; sa n’isha cyangwa ishashi y’impara, mu mpinga z’imisozi ya Beteri." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ijoro ryose naraye nshatse ku buriri bwanjye, uwo umutima wanjye ukunda. Namushatse ndamubura." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Reka mbyuke, nirukanke umugi, imihanda n’amayirabiri, nshakashake uwo umutima wanjye ukunda. Namushakashatse ariko namubuze." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Nahuye n’abarinzi, bamwe barara irondo mu mugi; ndababwira nti «Mbese ntimwabonye uwo umutima wanjye ukunda?»" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Twari tugitandukana gato, mbona uwo umutima wanjye ukunda; ndamufata nanga kumurekura, ntamwinjije mu nzu ya mama, mu cyumba cy’uwanyibarutse." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Nyabuna, bari ba Yeruzalemu, ndabinginze, mbarahije amasha n’amasirabo y’agasozi, muramenye ntimunkangurire urukundo, ntimurubyutse rutarabishaka." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Uriya ni nde uzamuka aturuka mu butayu, asa n’inkingi y’umwotsi, atama imibavu n’ububani, n’udufu duhumura neza tumwe tubunzwa n’abaducuruza?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Nimwirebere ingobyi ya Salomoni, ishagawe n’abagabo mirongo itandatu barobanuwe mu ntwari za Israheli;" 
SongOfSongs3:8 bose bitwaje inkota, bamenyereye intambara, buri wese afatiye inkota ku itako ku mpamvu y’akamu ka nijoro." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Umwami Salomoni yiyubakiye indaro mu biti byo muri Libani. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Inkingi yazicuze muri feza, ahegamirwa ahataka zahabu, ahicarwa ahataka umuhemba, mu mbere, abari ba Yeruzalemu bahataka urukundo." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Nimusohoke, bari ba Siyoni, mwitegereze umwami Salomoni, mutangarire ikamba Nyina yamwambitse umunsi w’ubukwe bwe, umunsi umutima we wari wuje umunezero." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Mbega ukuntu uri mwiza, ncuti yanjye, mbega ukuntu uri mwiza! Amaso yawe ni nk’ay’inuma, aragaragara inyuma y’umwenda witwikiriye. Imisatsi yawe imeze nk’umukumbi w’ihene zimanuka imanga ya Gilihadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amenyo yawe arera nk’umukumbi w’intama zogoshwe, iyo zikutse umugezi zimaze kwiyuhagira; buri ryinyo rijyana n’iryaryo nk’impanga, kandi nta gihanga kiyabamo." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Iminwa yawe imeze nk’agashumi k’umuhemba, mu kanwa uteye ubwuzu. Imisaya yawe mu mwenda witwikiriye, ni nk’akabuto k’itunda basatuyemo kabiri." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ijosi ryawe ni nk’umunara wa Dawudi, wubakiwe kubika intwaro, na ryo ritendetseho ingabo igihumbi, nk’ingabo intwari zikinga ku rugamba." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabere yawe yombi ni nk’inyagazi ebyiri zavutse ku isha ari impanga, zikarisha mu ndabo z’amalisi." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Mbere y’agasusuruko, mbere y’uko umwijima utamuruka, ndajya mu mpinga ibyara imibavu, ku musozi wera ububani." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Koko uri mwiza wese, ncuti yanjye, nta nenge ikurangwaho!" 
SongOfSongs4:8 Turajyana tuva muri Libani, mugeni wanjye. Urava muri Libani tujyane, urava mu mpinga ya Amana, mu mpinga ya Seniri na Herimoni mu buvumo intare zihishamo, mu misozi ituwe n’ingwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Uwanjye umbereye umugeni, erega wantwaye umutima, wandoye rimwe gusa, mbonye n’isaro rimwe ry’urunigi rwawe, ni bwo wantwaye wese!" 
SongOfSongs4:10 Mbega ukuntu urukundo rwawe ari rwiza, uwanjye umbereye umugeni! Mbega ukuntu urukundo rwawe rundutira divayi, n’impumuro y’imibavu yawe ikandutira ibihumura byose!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Iminwa yawe, mugeni wanjye, iratemba ubuki, ururimi rwawe rutwikiriye amata n’ubuki. Imyenda yawe irahumura nka Libani." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Uri umurima uzitiwe, uwanjye umbereye umugeni, uri isoko igipfundikiye n’iriba nagenewe." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Ikimero cyawe ni agashyamba kera amatunda aryohereye," 
SongOfSongs4:14 kakera n’ibiti bibyara imibavu y’indobanure, n’amavuta y’impumuro zinyuranye." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Uri iriba rivomera imirima, uri isoko y’amazi afutse, uri umugezi uturuka muri Libani!" 
SongOfSongs4:16 Haguruka, muyaga wa ruguru, banguka, muyaga w’epfo! Huhera mu busitani bwanjye, maze imibavu yabwo itame. Uwo nkunda niyinjire ubusitani, yirire imbuto zabwo ziryoha ukwazo." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ninjiye mu busitani bwanjye, uwanjye umbereye umugeni, nasoromye imibavu yanjye n’ububani bwanjye, nariye ikinyagu cyanjye n’ubuki bwanjye, nanyoye divayi yanjye n’amata yanjye. Incuti, nimurye, munywe musinde urukundo!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Nari nsinziriye ariko umutima wanjye uri maso. Numvise ijwi ry’uwo nkunda, nguwo arakomanze ati «Nkingurira, muvandimwe wanjye, ncuti yanjye, kanuma kanjye, muziranenge wanjye, kuko umutwe wanjye watonzweho n’ikime, n’imisatsi yanjye yuzuye ibitonyanga by’ijoro.»" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Mbese ko nari niyambuye ikanzu yanjye, nayisubizamo nte? Ko nari noze ibirenge, nabyanduza nte?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Uwo nkunda yanyujije ikiganza mu mwenge w’urugi, maze umutima wanjye urashiguka kubera we." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Jyewe nabyutse ngo nkingurire uwo nkunda, maze ibiganza byanjye bitonyanga imibavu, n’intoki zanjye ziyagirana imibavu y’amazi itonyangira ku byuma bikinga urugi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Jyewe nakinguriye uwo nkunda, ariko uwo nkunda yari yakimiranye arigendera. Nataye umutwe nsanze yagiye; naramushatse sinamubona, naramuhamagaye ntiyanyitaba." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Abarinzi twahuye, bamwe barara irondo mu mugi, bankubise barankomeretsa; banyambuye igishura, babandi barinda inkike y’umugi." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Bari b’i Yeruzalemu, ndabibasabye, nimuhura n’uwo nkunda, muramubwira iki? Ko nazonzwe nzira urukundo." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Mbese uwo ukunda arusha iki abandi, wowe gitego mu bakobwa? Rwose ni iki uwo ukunda arusha abandi, ngo urinde kutwinginga utyo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Uwo nkunda ni izuba, ni inzobe idahanda, mu bihumbi icumi ni we wagaragara." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Umutwe we ni nka zahabu iyunguruye, agasatsi ke kanoze nk’imikindo, kandi kirabura nk’icyiyone." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amaso ye ni nk’ay’inuma ku nkombe y’imigezi, zoga amata, ntizirenge inkombe." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Imisaya ye ni nk’akarima kera imibavu, kakera ibihumura. Iminwa ye ni indabo z’amalisi, ivubura imibavu ishashagira." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Ibiganza bye ni imibumbe ya zahabu, iharaze amabuye meza y’i Tarishishi. Umubyimba we ni ihembe ry’inzovu, ritatse safiri." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Amaguru ye ni inkingi zera de, zihagaze ku bitereko bya zahabu iyunguruye. Uburanga bwe ni Libani nzima, ni rudasumbwa nk’amasederi!" 
SongOfSongs5:16 Mu kanwa ke ni uburyohere busa, uko aremye wese atera kwifuza. Nguwo uwo nkunda, ngiyo incuti yanjye, bari ba Yeruzalemu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Mbese uwo ukunda yagiye he, wowe, gitego mu bakobwa? Uwo ukunda yaba yerekeye he, ngo tugufashe kumushaka?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Uwo nkunda yamanutse agana mu busitani bwe, mu mirima y’ibiti bivamo imibavu, kuragira mu mirima no guca indabo z’amalisi." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Uwo nkunda ni uwanjye, nanjye ndi uwe." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Uri mwiza, ncuti yanjye, usa na Tirisa; uteye ubwuzu nka Yeruzalemu. Uteye igitinyiro nk’igitero cy’ingabo." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Mpisha amaso yawe kuko antwara umutima. Imisatsi yawe ni nk’umukumbi w’ihene zimanuka imanga ya Gilihadi. 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amenyo yawe arera nk’umukumbi w’intama iyo zikutse umugezi zimaze kwiyuhagira; buri ryinyo rijyana n’iryaryo nk’impanga, kandi nta gihanga kiyabamo." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Imisaya yawe mu mwenda witwikiriye, ni nk’akabuto k’itunda basatuyemo kabiri." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Abamikazi ni mirongo itandatu, inshoreke ni mirongo inani, abakobwa bo ntibagira ingano." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Ariko umwe gusa ni we kanuma kanjye, ni ikinege kwa nyina. Uwamwibarutse ni we yatonesheje. Abakobwa bamubonye bamwita nyaguhirwa, ndetse n’abamikazi n’inshoreke bamwita igitego," 
SongOfSongs6:10 bati «Uriya ni nde utungutse nk’umuseke weya, mwiza nk’ukwezi, waka nk’izuba, uteye igitinyiro nk’igitero cy’ingabo?»" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Namanutse njya mu busitani bw’ibiti by’ibinyobwa, kureba imbuto zashibutse mu kabande, kureba niba umuzabibu warapfunduye, niba amatunda ari uruyange." 
SongOfSongs6:12 None sinkimenya iyo nerekeza... 
SongOfSongs7:1 Garuka, garuka, mukobwa w’Abashulami, garuka, garuka, tukwirebere! Kuki mwitegereza Umushulamikazi, nk’abareba umudiho w’ingamba ebyiri?" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Byaba byiza ibirenge byawe mu nkweto zabyo, mukobwa w’igikomangoma! Amatako yawe ni nk’umutako wahanzwe n’umuhanga." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Umukondo wawe ni nk’agakebano katabura divayi ihumura. Inda yawe ni nk’akarundo k’ingano gakikijwe n’amalisi. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Amabere yawe yombi ni nk’inyagazi ebyiri, zavutse ku isha ari impanga." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Ijosi ryawe ni nk’umunara wubatswe n’amahembe y’inzovu. Amaso yawe ni nk’ibyuzi bya Heshiboni, iruhande rw’umuryango w’uwo mugi utuwe cyane. Izuru ryawe ni nk’umunara wa Libani, bagenzuriramo ibituruka i Damasi." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Umutwe wawe wemye nka Karumeli, n’imisatsi iwutenderaho ni nk’umwenda w’umuhemba; umwami yafatiwe mu mapfundo yayo." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Waba mwiza, watera ubwuzu, rukundo rwanjye, mukobwa utera kunezerwa!" 
SongOfSongs7:8 Mu gihagararo usa n’umukindo, amabere yawe ameze nk’amahundo y’umuzabibu." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Naravuze nti «Nzurira umukindo, maze nywusingire amaseri.» Reka amabere yawe ambere nk’amahundo y’umuzabibu, umwuka wawe umbere nk’impumuro y’amapera," 
SongOfSongs7:10 n’akanwa kawe nka divayi yahebuje... Yisuke igana uwo nkunda, itembe ku minwa y’abahunikira." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Ndi uw’uwo nkunda, kandi ni jye ararikira." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngwino, musore nakunze, twigire ku gasozi! Dukeshe ijoro mu midugudu," 
SongOfSongs7:13 tuzindukire mu mirima y’imizabibu kureba ko imizabibu yapfunduye, cyangwa ko yarabije, cyangwa ko amatunda yabaye uruyange, ni ho nzaguhera urukundo rwanjye." 
SongOfSongs7:14 Ubu ngubu imikunde iratama imibavu yayo, no ku irembo ryacu hari imbuto zose z’akataraboneka, iza vuba n’iza kera; ncuti yanjye, narazikuzigamiye." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Iyaba koko wari musaza wanjye, ngo ube waronse amabere ya mama, twahuriye ahagaragara nkagusoma, kandi ntihagire ubingaya." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nakujyanye, nkakwinjiza mu nzu ya mama, ukanyigisha uko nkwiye kukunyura. Nakunywesheje kuri divayi irimo umubavu, no ku mutobe w’amatunda yanjye." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Ukuboko kwe kw’imoso kuranseguye, ukw’indyo kurampfumbase." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Nyabuna, bari ba Yeruzalemu, ndabinginze, ntimunkangurire uwo nkunda, ntimumubyutse atarabishaka!" 
SongOfSongs8:5 Uriya mukobwa ni nde uzamuka aturuka mu butayu, yiyegamije uwo akunda? Nagukanguriye mu nsi y’igiti cy’ipera, aho nyoko yagusamiye, ni ho yagusamiye uwakwibarutse." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Nshyira mu mutima wawe, mbe nk’ikimenyetso kidasibangana, mbe nk’icyapa giteye no ku kuboko kwawe, kuko urukundo rufite amaboko nk’urupfu; umutima ukunda ukagundira nka rwo, ugurumana nk’ikibatsi cy’umuriro, nk’umuriro w’Uhoraho." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Imivumba y’amazi ntiyashobora gucubya urukundo, n’inzuzi ntizarurengera. Umuntu watanga umutungo w’urugo rwe rwose, akeka ko yawugura urukundo, nta kindi yaronka, uretse umugayo." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Dufite gashiki kacu katarapfundura amabere, tuzakagenzereza dute umunsi batangiye kukarambagiza?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Niba ari urukuta tuzarutamiriza feza; niba ari umuryango tuzawukinga n’imbaho za sederi. 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndi urukuta, n’amabere yanjye ni nk’iminara; ni yo mpamvu mu maso ye ari jye umutera umunezero." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Salomoni yari afite imizabibu i Behali‐Hamoni, ayigabanya abarinzi, ngo buri wese ajye atanga ku mwero ibiceri igihumbi bya feza by’icyatamurima." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Umuzabibu wanjye, nywigengaho. Wowe Salomoni, dore igihumbi cyawe, n’amagana abiri y’abakurindira imbuto." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Wowe utuye ubusitani, bagenzi bawe bateze ugutwi ijwi ryawe, ngusabye kurinyumvisha." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Banguka, ncuti nkunda, use n’isha, cyangwa n’inyagazi y’isha, mu mpinga y’imisozi yera imibavu!" 
Isaiah1:1 Ibyo Izayi mwene Amosi yabonye byerekeye Yuda na Yeruzalemu ku ngoma ya Oziya, iya Yotamu, iya Akhazi n’iya Hezekiya, abami ba Yuda." 
Isaiah1:1 Ibyo Izayi mwene Amosi yabonye byerekeye Yuda na Yeruzalemu ku ngoma ya Oziya, iya Yotamu, iya Akhazi n’iya Hezekiya, abami ba Yuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Umva, wa juru we! Nawe wa si we, tega amatwi! Uhoraho avuze atya: Nareze abana, ndabakuza, ariko bo barangomera!" 
Isaiah1:3 Ikimasa kimenya nyiracyo, n’indogobe ikamenya aho irira kwa shebuja, ariko Israheli yo nta cyo izi, umuryango wanjye nta cyo witaho." 
Isaiah1:4 Uragowe! Wa gihugu we cy’abacumuzi, wa muryango we wuje ubugome, bwoko bw’abagiranabi, bana b’inkozi z’ibibi! Mwimuye Uhoraho, muhinyura Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli, mumutera umugongo!" 
Isaiah1:5 Murashaka se kandi ko babahana bate, mwebwe mukomeza gukabya ubwigomeke? Umutwe wanyu wose urarwaye, n’umutima wanyu umeze nabi." 
Isaiah1:6 Kuva mu bworo bw’ikirenge kugera ku mutwe, nta hakiri hazima: ahubwo ni inguma nsa, ibisebe, ibikomere bivirirana, bitarakandwa, bitarapfukwa cyangwa ngo byogeshwe amavuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Igihugu cyanyu cyahindutse amatongo, imigi yanyu ikongorwa n’umuriro; abanyamahanga barabanyaga igihugu mubareba, none gitsiratsijwe nk’ikigaruriwe n’ingabo z’ahandi." 
Isaiah1:8 Umwari wa Siyoni asigaye ameze nk’akaruri kari mu mizabibu, ameze nk’indaro iri mu murima w’amadegede, mbese nk’umugi ugoswe n’ingabo." 
Isaiah1:9 Iyo Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, atajya kuturokoramo bamwe bahonotse, twari kuba aka Sodoma, tukamera nka Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwe batware ba Sodoma, mutege amatwi inyigisho y’Imana yanyu, bantu ba Gomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 Uhoraho avuze atya: Ibitambo byanyu bitagira ingano bimbwiye iki? Ibitambo bitwikwa bya za rugeyo n’urugimbu rw’inyana, maze kubihaga; amaraso y’ibimasa, ay’intama n’ay’amasekurume, sinkibishaka!" 
Isaiah1:12 Iyo muje kunshengerera, ni nde uba yababwiye kuza kumvogerera Ingoro?" 
Isaiah1:13 Nimusigeho kuzana amaturo y’imburamumaro, umwotsi wayo narawuzinutswe. Imboneko z’ukwezi, amasabato n’andi makoraniro, iminsi mikuru ivanze n’ubugome, singishobora kubyihanganira!" 
Isaiah1:14 Imboneko z’ukwezi n’ibirori byanyu ndabyanze, kuko bindemerera, nkaba ntagishoboye kubyihanganira." 
Isaiah1:15 Iyo muntegeye ibiganza, mbima amaso; mwakungikanya amasengesho, sinyatege amatwi, kuko ibiganza byanyu byuzuye amaraso." 
Isaiah1:16 Nimwiyuhagire, mwisukure, nimumvane imbere ibikorwa bibi byanyu, kandi muherukire aho kugira nabi!" 
Isaiah1:17 Nimwige gukora ikiri icyiza, muharanire ubutabera, murenganure urengana, murwane ku mpfubyi, mutabare umupfakazi." 
Isaiah1:18 Uhoraho avuze atya: Nimuze, tuburane! N’aho ibyaha byanyu byatukura nk’indubaruba, bizahinduka urwererane nk’urubura. Naho niba byatukuraga nk’umuhemba, bizererana nk’ubwoya bw’intama." 
Isaiah1:19 Niba kandi mwemeye kumvira, muzarya ku byiza byeze mu gihugu." 
Isaiah1:20 Naho niba mubyanze, mugakomeza kuganda, inkota ubwayo ni yo izabarya. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah1:21 Ni ko ye, umugi wari indahemuka, uganje ubutabera, ubutungane ariho bubarizwa, waje kugwa ute mu bwiyandarike, none ukaba wuzuye ubwicanyi?" 
Isaiah1:22 Feza yawe yahindutse uruhumbu, divayi yawe nziza ihinduka amaganura." 
Isaiah1:23 Abatware bawe ni abagome n’ibyitso by’abajura, bakunda amaturo, bose bagakurikirana ruswa; ntibarenganura imfubyi kandi ntibumva amaganya y’umupfakazi." 
Isaiah1:24 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani, Umugaba w’ingabo, Umunyembaraga wa Israheli, avuze atya: Muragowe! Kuko nzaruhuka nihimuye abandwanya, kandi abanzi banjye, nzabahore." 
Isaiah1:25 Nzakugaruraho amaboko yanjye, nshongeshe uruhumbu rukuriho, nguhanagureho ubwandure bwawe." 
Isaiah1:26 Nzahindura imico y’abacamanza bawe bamere nka kera, n’abajyanama bawe bamere nko mu ntangiriro, maze uzitwe Umugi w’Ubutabera, Umurwa udahemuka." 
Isaiah1:27 Siyoni izarokorwa n’ubutabera, abahindutse bayo bakizwe n’ubutungane." 
Isaiah1:28 Abagome n’abanyabyaha bose bazavunagurirwa icyarimwe, abimura Uhoraho bazarimburwe." 
Isaiah1:29 Muzakozwa isoni bitewe n’imishishi mwakundaga, mumwazwe n’ubusitani bwanyu bwabashimishaga," 
Isaiah1:30 kuko muzamera nk’umushishi w’amababi yumiranye, cyangwa nk’ubusitani butagifite amazi." 
Isaiah1:31 Umunyambaraga azahinduka ubusabusa, ibyo akora bibe nk’agashashi k’umuriro, maze byose bigurumanire hamwe, kandi habure ubizimya." 
Isaiah2:1 Ibyo Izayi mwene Amosi yabonye, byerekeye Yuda na Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah2:1 Ibyo Izayi mwene Amosi yabonye, byerekeye Yuda na Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah2:2 Mu bihe bizaza, hari ubwo umusozi w’Ingoro uzashyirwa ku kanunga usumbe imisozi yose. Nuko amahanga yose agende awugana." 
Isaiah2:3 Abantu b’ibihugu byinshi bahaguruke, bavuga bati «Nimuze tuzamuke, tujye ku musozi w’Uhoraho, ku Ngoro y’Imana ya Yakobo. Azatwereka inzira ze, tuzikurikire.» Ni byo koko, amategeko ava i Siyoni, i Yeruzalemu hagaturuka ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah2:4 Azacira amahanga imanza, akiranure abantu b’ibihugu byinshi. Inkota zabo bazazicuramo amasuka, amacumu yabo bayacuremo ibihabuzo. Ihanga ntirizongera gutera irindi inkota, ntibazongera ukundi kwiga kurwana." 
Isaiah2:5 Nzu ya Yakobo, nimuze, tugendere mu rumuri rw’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah2:6 Watereranye inzu ya Yakobo, umuryango wawe: abapfumu babo bariyongereye, bangana n’ab’Abafilisiti, n’abanyamahanga benshi babivanzemo." 
Isaiah2:7 Igihugu cyabo cyuzuye feza na zahabu, ubukungu bwabo ntibugereranywa, cyuzuye kandi n’amafarasi, amagare y’intambara ntagira umubare." 
Isaiah2:8 Igihugu cyabo cyuzuyemo ibigirwamana, bagapfukama imbere y’icyavuye mu biganza byabo, imbere y’icyakozwe n’intoki zabo." 
Isaiah2:9 Bazagomba kwiyoroshya, muntu acishwe bugufi, naho ubundi ntuzabababarira." 
Isaiah2:10 Jya mu masenga, wihishe mu mukungugu, utinye Uhoraho n’ububengerane bw’ikuzo rye." 
Isaiah2:11 Ubwibone bw’abantu buzacogozwa, abikuza biyoroshye: uwo munsi hakuzwe Uhoraho wenyine." 
Isaiah2:12 Kuko hazabaho umunsi, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yigeneye, wo gucira imanza umuntu wese w’umwirasi, umwibone n’uwikuza, maze bagacishwa bugufi." 
Isaiah2:13 Uwo munsi ukazaba no ku masederi yo muri Libani, yiboneje kandi akishyira ejuru, no ku mishishi y’i Bashani yose," 
Isaiah2:14 ku misozi yose miremire no ku tununga twose twishyize ejuru," 
Isaiah2:15 ku minara miremire yose no ku nkike yose icinyiye," 
Isaiah2:16 ku mato yose y’i Tarishishi no ku bwato bwose bw’agaciro gakomeye. 
Isaiah2:17 Ubwibone bw’abantu buzacogozwa, abikuza bacishwe bugufi: uwo munsi hakuzwe Uhoraho wenyine," 
Isaiah2:18 maze ibigirwamana byose bishirire icyarimwe. 
Isaiah2:19 Bazinjira mu masenga yo mu bitare no mu myobo y’ikuzimu, batinya Uhoraho, n’ububengerane bw’ikuzo rye, ubwo azaba aje gukangaranya isi." 
Isaiah2:20 (Uwo munsi ibigirwamana byabo bya feza n’ibya zahabu, byari byarakorewe gusengwa, bazabijugunyira amafuku n’ubucurama.)" 
Isaiah2:21 Bazajya kwihisha mu masenga no mu myobo yo mu bitare, batinya Uhoraho, n’ububengerane bw’ikuzo rye, ubwo azaba aje gukangaranya isi." 
Isaiah2:22 Nimureke rero kwishingikiriza muntu, ugizwe gusa n’akuka ko mu zuru! Hari akandi gaciro agira?" 
Isaiah3:1 Dore Nyagasani, Imana, Umugaba w’ingabo, azima Yeruzalemu na Yuda inkunga iyo ari yo yose, abime icyitwa umugati n’amazi cyose," 
Isaiah3:2 abagomwe intwari n’umutabazi, umucamanza n’umuhanuzi, umupfumu n’umukuru w’umuryango," 
Isaiah3:3 umukuru w’ingabo n’umunyacyubahiro, umujyanama, umunyabukorikori n’umuhanga mu by’ubushitsi." 
Isaiah3:4 Nzabaha abasore ho abatware, bazategekwe n’abana bato!" 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu bazagirirana nabi, umwe arenganye undi, umwana akangaranye umusaza, umutindi asuzugure umunyacyubahiro." 
Isaiah3:6 Umuntu azafata umuvandimwe wo mu nzu ya se, agira ati «Ubwo wowe ufite umwambaro, utubere umutware, n’aya matongo abe ari wowe uyategeka!»" 
Isaiah3:7 Nuko undi azatere hejuru ati «Sinshoboye kubabera umukiza, iwanjye nta mugati, nta n’umwambaro: ntimushobora rero kungira umutware wa rubanda!»" 
Isaiah3:8 Yeruzalemu iradandabiranye, naho Yuda iratembye. Amagambo n’ibikorwa byabo bibangamira Uhoraho, bigasuzuguza ikuzo rye." 
Isaiah3:9 Imisusire yabo ni yo ibashinja, beruye ibyaha byabo nka Sodoma, ntibakibihisha. Nibigorerwe! Bo bikururiye amakuba." 
Isaiah3:10 Nimuvuge muti «Intungane irahirwa, kuko izanezezwa n’imbuto z’ibikorwa byayo;" 
Isaiah3:11 umugome agushije ishyano, kuko azahanwa hakurikijwe ibikorwa bye.»" 
Isaiah3:12 Muryango wanjye, urenganywa n’umwana, ugategekwa n’abagore! Muryango wanjye, abagutegeka barakuyobya, bakakunyuza inzira itaboneye!" 
Isaiah3:13 Uhoraho arahagurutse ngo ace urubanza, arahagaze ngo ashinje amahanga." 
Isaiah3:14 Uhoraho agiye gucira imanza abakuru n’abatware b’umuryango we: «Ni mwebwe mwayogoje umuzabibu murawutsemba, kandi mubitse mu mazu yanyu, imicuzo y’abakene." 
Isaiah3:15 Ni iki gituma mushikamira umuryango wanjye, kandi mukanyukanyuka abakene?» Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze." 
Isaiah3:16 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kubera ko abakobwa b’i Siyoni bishyize ejuru, bakagenda bagamitse amajosi, bica amaso, kubera kugendera ikimero, bacinya amayugi bambaye ku maguru yabo," 
Isaiah3:17 Nyagasani azateza ibihushi imitwe y’abakobwa b’i Siyoni, maze bimyore uruhanga rwabo." 
Isaiah3:18 Uwo munsi, Nyagasani azabambura imirimbo yose: amayugi, inigi n’ibirezi," 
Isaiah3:19 amasaro, ibitare n’ibitambaro byo mu mutwe," 
Isaiah3:20 ingori n’imikufi, imikandara iboshye, imyeko n’impigi," 
Isaiah3:21 impeta zo ku ntoki n’izo ku zuru," 
Isaiah3:22 imyambaro y’umunsi mukuru, ibishura, imyitero n’amasakoshi," 
Isaiah3:23 indorerwamo, amashati y’ubwoya, udutambaro bazinguriza ku mutwe n’amakamba." 
Isaiah3:24 Umubavu uzasimburwa n’umunuko, umweko uhinduke umugozi, ahari inweri hazaba ibiharanjongo, imyenda inyerera isimburwe n’ibigunira, ahari uburanga hahinduke inkovu y’icyasha." 
Isaiah3:25 Abagabo bawe bazamarwa n’inkota, intwari zawe zigwe ku rugamba." 
Isaiah3:26 Inkike zawe zizacura imiborogo, ziganye, kandi muri ubwo butindi, uzicare mu mukungugu." 
Isaiah4:1 Uwo munsi, abagore barindwi bazihambira ku mugabo umwe, bamubwira bati «Tuzatungwa n’ibikorwa byacu, tuniyambike, ariko nibura dushobore kwitirirwa izina ryawe; udukureho ikimwaro.»" 
Isaiah4:2 Kuri uwo munsi, umumero w’Uhoraho uzaba icyubahiro n’ikuzo, imyaka izera mu gihugu, izatere ishema n’ubwema udusigisigi twa Israheli." 
Isaiah4:3 Nuko abarokotse b’i Siyoni, n’imponoke za Yeruzalemu bitwe intungane; abo bose bazandikwe i Yeruzalemu, kugira ngo babashe kubaho." 
Isaiah4:4 Ubwo Uhoraho azamara guhanagura ubwandu bw’abakobwa b’i Siyoni, akuhagira Yeruzalemu amaraso yahamenewe, akoresheje urubanza n’umwuka utwika," 
Isaiah4:5 ahantu hose ho ku musozi wa Siyoni no ku makoraniro yaho, azahatwikiriza igicu ku manywa, n’umwotsi utera ibishashi by’umuriro mu ijoro. Ikuzo ry’Uhoraho rizabitwikire byose," 
Isaiah4:6 nk’ihema cyangwa inzu y’ibyatsi, itanga igicucu mu minsi y’icyocyere, ikaba ubwihisho n’ubwugamo mu gihe cy’imvura n’umuyaga." 
Isaiah5:1 Reka ndirimbire incuti yanjye, indirimbo y’uwo nkunda n’iy’umuzabibu we. Inkoramutima yanjye yari ifite umuzabibu, ku musozi urumbuka." 
Isaiah5:2 Atabira ubutaka, abukuramo amabuye, abuteramo ingemwe z’indobanure. Hagati mu muzabibu yubakamo umunara, acukuramo n’urwengero. Yizeraga ko uzera imbuto nziza, ariko wo wera imbuto mbi." 
Isaiah5:3 None rero, baturage ba Yeruzalemu, namwe bantu bo muri Yuda, nimunkiranure n’umuzabibu wanjye." 
Isaiah5:4 Icyo nagombaga gukorera umuzabibu wanjye, nkaba ntaragikoze ni iki? Ko nari nywizeyeho imbuto nziza, ni kuki weze imbuto mbi?" 
Isaiah5:5 Reka rero mbabwire uko nzagenzereza umuzabibu wanjye: nzawambura uruzitiro, maze wonwe; nsenye urukuta rwawo, bawunyukanyuke." 
Isaiah5:6 Nzawureka ube ikigunda, ntuzicirwa cyangwa ngo uhingirwe, uzameremo amahwa n’imifatangwe, nzabuze n’ibicu kuwugushaho imvura." 
Isaiah5:7 Umuzabibu w’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, ni inzu ya Israheli, ingemwe z’indobanure yakundaga, zikaba abantu bo muri Yuda. Yari abatezeho ubutungane, none baratemagurana! Yari abategerejeho ubutabera, none abatishoboye baracura imiborogo!" 
Isaiah5:8 Baragowe! Abagereka amazu ku yandi, cyangwa se amasambu ku yandi, kugeza ubwo biharira ahantu hose, bagatura bonyine mu gihugu!" 
Isaiah5:9 Numvise Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo arahira atya: Amazu menshi manini kandi meza azaba amatongo yose, atagira abayabamo." 
Isaiah5:10 Imirima cumi y’umuzabibu izera ibyuzuye ikibindi kimwe, ibibibiro cumi by’imbuto bibyare icyibo kimwe gusa." 
Isaiah5:11 Baragowe! Ababyuka mu gitondo cya kare, biruka inyuma y’inzoga zikaze, bakageza ko bwira bagisinda divayi." 
Isaiah5:12 Ubusinzi bwabo buherekezwa n’inanga, iningiri, ingoma n’umwirongi, nyamara ntibite ku byo Uhoraho akora, ngo bitegereze igikorwa cy’ibiganza bye." 
Isaiah5:13 Ni cyo gitumye umuryango wanjye uzajyanwa bunyago, kubera ko utamenye. Ab’ingenzi muri bo bakazicwa n’inzara, rubanda rukazamarwa n’inyota." 
Isaiah5:14 Nuko rero, ikuzimu hagiye kwasama bikabije, urwasaya rwaguke, hamire umunyacyubahiro na rubanda, bamanukaneyo n’umunezero wabo." 
Isaiah5:15 Abantu bazagomba kwiyoroshya, muntu acishwe bugufi, abikuza bubike amaso." 
Isaiah5:16 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, azakuzwa igihe azacira imanza, maze Imana Nyirubutagatifu izigaragarize mu butabera bwayo." 
Isaiah5:17 Intama zizahagira urwuri rwazo, utwana tw’ihene tugikeneye kubyibuha, turishe ayo matongo." 
Isaiah5:18 Baragowe! Abacumura bakoresheje imbehe ziragura, n’abapfumu baboha utuziriko ngo batubeshyeshye!" 
Isaiah5:19 Nuko bakavuga bati «Ngaho natebuke, agire bwangu icyo ashaka gukora tukibone. Umugambi wa Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli niwigaragaze, niwuzuzwe maze tuwumenye.»" 
Isaiah5:20 Baragowe! Abita icyiza ikibi, ikibi bakacyita icyiza. Umwijima bawugira urumuri, urumuri rukaba umwijima, ibisharira babyita ibiryohera, naho ibiryohera bakabyita ibisharira." 
Isaiah5:21 Baragowe! Abiyita abahanga, bakibonamo abanyabwenge." 
Isaiah5:22 Baragowe! Ab’intwari zo mu runywero, kimwe n’inkwakuzi mu kuvanga inzoga," 
Isaiah5:23 bo bagira umwere umunyacyaha ari uko abaguriye, bakima intungane ibyo yatsindiye." 
Isaiah5:24 Bazakongoka nk’ibyatsi bitwitswe n’umuriro, cyangwa nk’ibikenyeri byahiye, bashanguke bahereye ku mizi, imbuto zabo zizatumuke nk’umukungugu, kuko birengagije itegeko ry’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, bagahinyura ijambo rya Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Isaiah5:25 Ni cyo gitumye uburakari bw’Uhoraho bugurumanira umuryango we, akaba abanguye ikiganza ngo awutsembe. Imisozi yahinze imishyitsi, imirambo y’abapfuye imera nk’imyanda inyanyagiye mu mayira. Nyamara n’ubwo bimeze bityo bwose, uburakari bw’Uhoraho ntiburacogora, ukuboko kwe kuracyabanguye." 
Isaiah5:26 Uhoraho arembuje ihanga rya kure, arihamagaye riva mu mpera z’isi, none ngaha riraje ningoga, ryihuta cyane." 
Isaiah5:27 Nta n’umwe muri bo wananiwe cyangwa ngo asitare, nta wahunikiye cyangwa ngo asinzire. Imikandara yabo nta wakenyurutse, n’imishumi y’inkweto zabo ntiyapfundutse." 
Isaiah5:28 Imyambi yabo iratyaye, imiheto yabo yose irareze, ibinono by’amafarasi yabo ni nk’amasarabwayi, inziga z’amagare yabo zirihuta nk’izitwawe n’umuyaga." 
Isaiah5:29 Barivuga, baratontoma nk’intare y’ingore, cyangwa nk’ibyana byayo, barasakuza, bagahumira ku muhigo wabo, bakawutwara ntihagire uwubambura." 
Isaiah5:30 Uwo munsi, umworomo ukaze nk’umuhengeri wo mu nyanja, uzugariza iyi mbaga, nibareba imisozi babone umwijima n’umubabaro, urumuri rwijime kubera ibicu byinshi bicucitse." 
Isaiah6:1 Mu mwaka umwami Oziya yatanzemo, nabonye Nyagasani yicaye ku ntebe ya cyami ndende kandi itumburutse. Ibinyita by’igishura cye byari byuzuye icyumba gitagatifu cy’Ingoro y’Imana." 
Isaiah6:2 Abaserafimu bari bahagaze hejuru ye, bafite umwe umwe amababa atandatu: abiri yo gukingira uruhanga, yandi abiri yo gutwikira ibirenge, n’abiri yo kuguruka." 
Isaiah6:3 Nuko bakikiranya amajwi bavuga bati «Nyirubutagatifu, Nyirubutagatifu, Nyirubutagatifu! Ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, isi yose yuzuye ikuzo rye!»" 
Isaiah6:4 Umuririmo w’ayo majwi uhindisha umushyitsi inzugi n’ibizingiti byazo, maze Ingoro isabwa n’umwotsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Nuko ndavuga nti «Ndagowe! Bincikiyeho, kuko ndi umuntu w’iminwa yandavuye, ngatura mu muryango w’iminwa yahumanye, none amaso yanjye akaba abonye Umwami, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo.»" 
Isaiah6:6 Ariko umwe mu Baserafimu aguruka ansanga, afashe mu kiganza cye ikara ryaka, yari akuye ku rutambiro, ariteruje igifashi." 
Isaiah6:7 Arinkoza ku munwa, maze arambwira ati «Ubwo iri kara rigukoze ku munwa, ubuhemu bwawe burahanaguwe, icyaha cyawe kirakijijwe.»" 
Isaiah6:8 Nuko numva ijwi rya Nyagasani rigira riti «Mbese ndatuma nde? Ni nde twakohereza?» Ni ko kumusubiza nti «Ndi hano, ntuma!»" 
Isaiah6:9 Arambwira ati «Genda ubwire utya uriya muryango: Mutege amatwi, ariko mwoye kumva, mwitegereze, ariko mwoye kubona." 
Isaiah6:10 Uzanangire imitima yabo, ubazibe amatwi, ubapfuke n’amaso. Amaso yabo ntakagire icyo abona, n’amatwi yabo ntakumve. Umutima wabo ntukagire icyo umenya, bataboneraho guhinduka, maze bagakira.»" 
Isaiah6:11 Nuko ndabaza nti «Ibyo se bizageza ryari Nyagasani?» Aransubiza ati «Kugeza ubwo imigi izaba yatsembwe, nta bayituye, amazu atakirimo umuntu n’umwe, n’ubutaka bwarahindutse umushike." 
Isaiah6:12 Uhoraho azimurira abantu kure, imisozi myinshi mu gihugu ihinduke imishike." 
Isaiah6:13 Kandi n’iyo hasigara kimwe cya cumi, na cyo nzongera ngitwike nk’umushishi watemwe, maze hazasigare igishyitsi cyonyine. Icyo gishyitsi rero, kizakomokaho imbuto ntagatifu.»" 
Isaiah7:1 Ku ngoma ya Akhazi mwene Yotamu, mwene Oziya umwami wa Yuda, Rasoni umwami wa Aramu, na Peka mwene Remaliyahu, umwami wa Israheli, barazamutse batera Yeruzalemu, ariko ntibashobora kuyigarurira." 
Isaiah7:2 Babimenyesha abo mu muryango wa Dawudi, bati «Aramu yashinze ibirindiro muri Efurayimu.» Nuko umwami na rubanda bakuka umutima, boshye ibiti by’ishyamba bihungabanywa n’umuyaga." 
Isaiah7:3 Uhoraho abwira Izayi ati «Sohoka, ujyane n’umuhungu wawe Sheyari‐Yashubi, musanganire Akhazi ku mpera y’umugende ujyana amazi mu kigega cya ruguru, ku muhanda ugana ku murima w’umumeshi;" 
Isaiah7:4 maze umubwire uti ’Humura! Witinya kandi ntugire ubwoba. Wihagarika umutima kubera buriya busabusa bw’amafumba abiri acumbeka, cyangwa se kubera uburakari bukaze bwa Rasoni, umwami wa Aramu, na mwene Remaliyahu." 
Isaiah7:5 Aramu yagiye inama na Efurayimu na mwene Remaliyahu, ngo bazakurimbure, bavuga bati" 
Isaiah7:6 ’Tuzamuke dutere igihugu cya Yuda, tubakure umutima, tukinjiremo maze tukigarurire, twimike mwene Tebeyeli ahabere umwami.’" 
Isaiah7:7 Nyamara Nyagasani Imana avuze atya: Ibyo ntibiteze guhama, ntibizigera bibaho!" 
Isaiah7:8 Damasi ni umutwe wa Aramu, naho Rasoni akaba umutware wa Damasi, — hasigaye imyaka itarenga mirongo itandatu n’itanu, Efurayimu ikaneshwa, ntibe icyitwa igihugu.—" 
Isaiah7:9 Samariya ni umutwe wa Efurayimu, naho mwene Remaliyahu akaba umutware wa Samariya. Nimudakomera ku Mana, ntimuzakomera.»" 
Isaiah7:10 Uhoraho arongera abwira Akhazi, ati" 
Isaiah7:11 «Saba Uhoraho, Imana yawe, aguhe ikimenyetso cyaba icyo hasi ikuzimu, cyangwa se icyo hejuru mu kirere.»" 
Isaiah7:12 Akhazi arasubiza ati «Nta cyo nsabye, kandi sinshaka no kwinja Uhoraho.»" 
Isaiah7:13 Nuko Izayi aravuga ati «Tega amatwi rero, muryango wa Dawudi! Mbese ntibibahagije kunaniza abantu, kugira ngo mube mutangiye no kunaniza Imana yanjye?" 
Isaiah7:14 Noneho rero, ni Nyagasani ubwe uzabihera ikimenyetso: Dore ngaha umwari asamye inda, akazabyara umuhungu, maze akazamwita Emanuweli." 
Isaiah7:15 Azatungwa n’amata y’ikivuguto n’ubuki, kugira ngo azabashe kwanga ikibi, ahitemo icyiza." 
Isaiah7:16 Na mbere y’uko uwo mwana azabasha kwanga ikibi agahitamo icyiza, ibihugu by’abo bami bombi utinya, bizaba bitakivugwa." 
Isaiah7:17 Naho wowe, umuryango wawe n’inzu ya so, Uhoraho azabateza iminsi mibi, itarigeze ibaho, kuva igihe Efurayimu yitandukanyije na Yuda. (Yavugaga umwami wa Ashuru.)" 
Isaiah7:18 Uwo munsi, Uhoraho azahamagara isazi zo ku mpera y’imigezi ya Misiri, n’inzuki zo mu gihugu cya Ashuru," 
Isaiah7:19 maze zose zize, zihumbike mu mikokwe yo ku misozi, no mu masenga yo mu bitare, mu bihuru byose no mu mirima hose." 
Isaiah7:20 Uwo munsi, Uhoraho azakogosha umusatsi wo ku mutwe, n’ubwoya bwo ku birenge ndetse n’ubwanwa abumareho, akoresheje urwembe atiye hakurya y’uruzi rwa Efurati. (Yavugaga umwami wa Ashuru)" 
Isaiah7:21 Uwo munsi kandi, buri muntu azaba atunze itungo rimwe mu matungo maremare, n’abiri mu matungo magufi," 
Isaiah7:22 maze kubera amata azaba ari menshi mu gihugu, bazanywe ikivuguto. Ni koko, abazaba basigaye mu gihugu, bazatungwa n’amata y’ikivuguto n’ubuki." 
Isaiah7:23 Uwo munsi nanone, ahantu hari ingemwe igihumbi z’imizabibu, zikwiranye n’ibiceri igihumbi bya feza, hazahinduka ibihuru by’amahwa n’imifatangwe." 
Isaiah7:24 Hazagerwa gusa n’uwitwaje umuheto n’imyambi, kuko igihugu cyose kizahinduka amahwa n’imifatangwe." 
Isaiah7:25 Imisozi yahingishwaga amasuka ntibazayigarukamo, kubera gutinya amahwa n’imifatangwe, izahinduke urwuri rw’inka n’intama." 
Isaiah8:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Fata igisate kinini cy’ibuye, wandikeho aya magambo, ukoresheje itindo isanzwe: Kuri Maheri‐Shalali‐Hashi‐Bazi, (Minyago‐iri hafi‐Isahura‐iregereje)." 
Isaiah8:2 Nuko ibyo birangiye, mfata Uriya umuherezabitambo, na Zekariyahu mwene Yeberekiyahu, abagabo b’abahamya kandi bemewe." 
Isaiah8:3 Hanyuma nsanga umuhanuzikazi (ari we mugore wanjye), asama inda maze abyara umuhungu. Uhoraho arambwira ati «Uwo mwana, mwite Maheri‐Shalali‐Hashi‐Bazi," 
Isaiah8:4 kuko mbere y’uko amenya kuvuga ngo ’data’ cyangwa ’mama’, bazaba bashyikirije umwami wa Ashuru ubukungu bw’i Damasi, n’iminyago y’i Samariya." 
Isaiah8:5 Uhoraho arongera ambwira muri aya magambo: 
Isaiah8:6 Kubera ko uyu muryango wanze amazi ya Silowe atembana ituze, ugakangarana imbere ya Rasoni na mwene Remaliyahu," 
Isaiah8:7 kubera iyo mpamvu, Uhoraho azawuteza amazi menshi, afite imivumba y’uruzi rwa Efurati (yavugaga umwami wa Ashuru n’ikuzo rye ryose), azasohoke mu kiryamo cyayo, arenge inkombe zayo zose." 
Isaiah8:8 Azagera kuri Yuda amusendereho, amugere mu ijosi, yagure inkombe zayo yuzure igihugu cyawe, wowe Emanuweli!" 
Isaiah8:9 Miryango, nimwumve kandi muhinde umushyitsi! Nimutege amatwi, namwe mahanga yose ya kure! Nimukindikize intwaro zanyu, nyamara muzaneshwa!" 
Isaiah8:10 Nimujye imigambi, ariko izapfa ubusa. Muvuge ayo mushatse yose, ariko nta cyo bizabamarira, kuko «Imana turi kumwe»." 
Isaiah8:11 Uhoraho yamfashe akaboko, antegeka kudakurikira inzira y’uwo muryango, muri aya magambo:" 
Isaiah8:12 Ntimukite ubugambanyi, ibyo uwo muryango wita ubugambanyi byose. Ntimugaterwe ubwoba n’ibyo batinya, kandi ntibikabakange." 
Isaiah8:13 Ahubwo mumenye ko Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, ari we muzita Intungane, ni we mugomba gutinya, ni we ushobora kubakanga." 
Isaiah8:14 Inzu zombi za Israheli, azazibera Ingoro, ibuye basitaraho n’urutare batembaho, abere urushundura n’umutego ab’i Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah8:15 Benshi bazasitara kuri urwo rutare bikubite hasi, bashenjagurike, bagwe mu mutego ubutazawuvamo." 
Isaiah8:16 (Uhoraho arambwira ati) «Inyigisho zanjye, uzizigame neza, uzikomeze mu mitima y’abigishwa banjye.»" 
Isaiah8:17 Ahasigaye ntegereza Uhoraho wimaga amaso inzu ya Yakobo, mba ari we niringira." 
Isaiah8:18 Jyewe n’abana Uhoraho yampaye, turi ibimenyetso n’impanuro muri Israheli, biturutse kuri Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, utuye ku musozi wa Siyoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Nibababwira bati «Nimubaze abagirwa n’abapfumu, bavugiriza, bakavugira no mu matamatama», bakababaza ngo «Ese ntibikwiye ko umuryango ubaza imana zawo n’abapfuye bawo, ubigirira abazima?»" 
Isaiah8:20 Nibababaza batyo, muzabasubize muti «Amategeko n’amabwiriza y’Uhoraho, ni byo mugomba gukurikiza.» Baragowe abatazakurikiza iryo jambo, kuko batazongera kubona umuseke weya!" 
Isaiah8:21 Ahubwo bazambuka igihugu, ari imbabare n’abashonji, maze kubera iyo nzara, barakare, bavume umwami wabo n’Imana yabo. Bazarangamira hejuru," 
Isaiah8:22 hanyuma buname barebe hasi, babone ububabare n’umwijima, n’ubwire buteye inkeke. Ni iryo joro bazaba bajugunywemo." 
Isaiah8:23 Nta mwijima ukirangwa mu gihugu cyarimo umubabaro. Kuko mu gihe cyahise, Uhoraho yasuzuguje igihugu cya Zabuloni n’icya Nefutali, ariko hanyuma aha ikuzo inzira igana ku nyanja, hakurya ya Yorudani n’intara y’abanyamahanga." 
Isaiah9:1 Abantu bagendaga mu mwijima babonye urumuri nyamwinshi, abari batuye mu gihugu cy’icuraburindi, urumuri rwabarasiyeho." 
Isaiah9:2 Wabagwirije ineza, ubasakazaho ibyishimo, none bariho bariyereka imbere yawe, boshye abishimira umusaruro, baranezerewe nk’abagabana iminyago," 
Isaiah9:3 kuko wabakijije umuzigo bari bikoreye, ingiga yabashenguraga ibitugu n’ikiboko cy’uwabakoreshaga agahato, warabijanjaguye nko kuri wa munsi w’Abamadiyani." 
Isaiah9:4 Inkweto zose z’intambara zarimburaga ubutaka, n’igishura cyose cyazirinzwe mu maraso, byarakongotse boshye inkwi baroshye mu muriro." 
Isaiah9:5 Kuko umwana yatuvukiye, twahawe umuhungu. Ubutegetsi bumuri ku bitugu, ahawe izina: «Umujyanama w’agatangaza, Imana Idahangarwa, Umubyeyi iteka, Umwami w’amahoro.»" 
Isaiah9:6 Hazaba ingoma irambye n’amahoro atagira iherezo, ku ntebe ya Dawudi n’ubwami bwe, azabishinga kandi abikomeze mu butungane n’ubutabera, ubu n’iteka ryose. Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo azabisohoza, kubera umwete we wuje urukundo." 
Isaiah9:7 Uhoraho yabwiye ijambo Yakobo, maze Israheli irita mu gutwi." 
Isaiah9:8 Imbaga yose uko yakabaye izarimenya, ndetse na Efurayimu kimwe n’abatuye Samariya; bo bishongora mu bwibone bwabo n’ukwikuza kwabo, bavuga bati" 
Isaiah9:9 «Ubwo inkuta z’amatafari zasenyutse, tuzubakisha amabuye abaje; naho inkingi z’imivumu zatsembwe, tuzisimbuze amasederi.»" 
Isaiah9:10 Uhoraho ayiteje abanzi, ayigabije abayirwanya." 
Isaiah9:11 Dore Aramu iturutse iburasirazuba, Abafilisiti mu burengero bwayo, ngo bamiragure bunguri Israheli! Nyamara n’ubwo bimeze bityo bwose, uburakari bw’Uhoraho ntiburacogora, ukuboko kwe kuracyabanguye." 
Isaiah9:12 Ariko Israheli ntirakagarukira uwayihannye, ngo ishakashake Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Isaiah9:13 Ni cyo cyatumye, mu munsi umwe gusa, Uhoraho yatemaguye muri Israheli, umutwe n’umurizo, imikindo n’imfunzo." 
Isaiah9:14 Umukuru w’umuryango n’umunyacyubahiro, ni bo mutwe, umuhanuzi wigisha ibinyoma, akaba umurizo." 
Isaiah9:15 Abayobozi b’icyo gihugu barakiyobeje, abo bayoboraga barazikama." 
Isaiah9:16 Ni yo mpamvu, Uhoraho atazishimira abasore babo, ntagirire impuhwe imfubyi n’abapfakazi babo, kuko bose ari abahemu n’abagiranabi, ibyo bavuga byose bikaba ibiterashozi. Nyamara n’ubwo bimeze bityo bwose, uburakari bw’Uhoraho ntiburacogora, ukuboko kwe kuracyabanguye." 
Isaiah9:17 Koko ubugome bugurumana nk’umuriro utwika amahwa n’imifatangwe, ugakongeza ibihuru by’ishyamba, maze umwotsi ugatumbagira ikirere." 
Isaiah9:18 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, buteye igihugu kujegajega, abagituye bameze nk’inkwi zijugunywe mu muriro, nta we ubabarira umuvandimwe we." 
Isaiah9:19 Hirya baratemagurana, ntibashire inzara, hino bararyana, ariko ntibijute, buri muntu arashiha inyama yo ku kaboko ke." 
Isaiah9:20 Abo mu muryango wa Manase barashiha abo kwa Efurayimu, n’abo mu muryango wa Efurayimu bakarya abo kwa Manase, hanyuma iyo miryango yombi ikavira inda imwe kuri Yuda. Nyamara n’ubwo bimeze bityo bwose, uburakari bw’Uhoraho ntiburacogora, ukuboko kwe kuracyabanguye." 
Isaiah10:1 Baragowe! Abo bantu bashyiraho amategeko arenganya, bakandika amabwiriza akandamiza," 
Isaiah10:2 birengagiza imanza za rubanda rugufi, barenganya abakene bo mu muryango wanjye, bagira abapfakazi iminyago yabo, kandi bagacuza imfubyi." 
Isaiah10:3 Muzamera mute ku munsi w’irimburwa, ubwo umuhengeri uzaba uturutse iyo bigwa? Ni nde muzahungiraho kugira ngo abatabare, muzahisha hehe ubwo bukungu bwanyu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Ubwo muzagenza amavi rwagati mu mbohe, cyangwa se murambarare hagati mu ntumbi. Nyamara n’ubwo bimeze bityo bwose, uburakari bw’Uhoraho ntiburacogora, ukuboko kwe kuracyabanguye." 
Isaiah10:5 Uragowe, Ashuru! Wowe kiboko cy’ubukana bwanjye; n’inkoni witwaje ikaba iy’uburakari bwanjye." 
Isaiah10:6 Nyohereje kurwanya ihanga ry’abahemu, nyihutishirije gutera igihugu cyandakaje, bagisahure kandi bakinyage, bakiribate nk’icyondo cyo mu nzira." 
Isaiah10:7 Nyamara (umwami wa Ashuru) we si ko abyumva, aratekereza ukundi, kuko agamije gusa gusenya no kurimbura amahanga menshi." 
Isaiah10:8 Aravuga ati «Mbese, abagaba b’ingabo banjye bo si abami?" 
Isaiah10:9 Mbese ye, umugi wa Kaluno ntiwahindutse nk’umugi wa Karikemishi, uwa Hamati ukaba nk’uwa Arupadi, cyangwa uwa Samariya ukamera nk’uwa Damasi?" 
Isaiah10:10 Niba se narashoboye ingoma z’ibigirwamana, kandi ibigirwamana byabo bikaba byararutaga ubwinshi iby’i Yeruzalemu n’i Samariya," 
Isaiah10:11 ni iki cyambuza kugenzereza Yeruzalemu n’amashusho yayo, nk’uko nagenjeje Samariya n’ibigirwamana byayo?»" 
Isaiah10:12 Ariko rero, igihe Uhoraho azaba arangije gukora icyo yagambiriye cyose ku musozi wa Siyoni no kuri Yeruzalemu, azahindukirira guhana umwami wa Ashuru kubera ubwirasi n’ubwibone bwe," 
Isaiah10:13 kuko yibwiye ati «Ibyo nakoze byose mbikesha imbaraga zanjye, n’ubuhanga bwanjye kuko ndi umunyabwenge. Navanyeho imipaka y’ibihugu mbasahura ibyabo, nabaye intwari, nkura abami ku ntebe zabo." 
Isaiah10:14 Nanyaze ubukungu bw’amahanga, nk’uko batwara amagi mu cyari, ntagire kirengera; nanjye ni ko nafashe isi yose, ntihagira n’umwe ukoma, wabumbura umunwa cyangwa se ngo atabaze.»" 
Isaiah10:15 Mbese ye, intorezo yakwirata ku uyitemesha? Urukero se rwo, rwakwibonekeza ku urukeresha? Ibyo byaba nk’aho ikiboko cyagarukana ukibanguye, inkoni ikazungaguza uyitwaje!" 
Isaiah10:16 Ni cyo gitumye Uhoraho, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo, azateza ab’imishishe kuzongwa, maze mu nsi y’ubwamamare, hagurumane nk’inkongi y’umuriro." 
Isaiah10:17 Urumuri rwa Israheli ruzahinduka umuriro, Nyirubutagatifu wayo ahinduke ikirimi cy’umuriro, kizatwike kandi kirimbure umunsi umwe, amahwa n’imifatangwe byayo." 
Isaiah10:18 Azatsembaho ubwiza bw’ishyamba rye n’ubw’umurima we, umuntu azamere nk’uwashegeshwe n’indwara izahaza." 
Isaiah10:19 Ibisigisigi by’ishyamba rye bizaba bike, mbese nk’ibyo umwana muto yashobora kubara." 
Isaiah10:20 Uwo munsi, udusigisigi twa Israheli, n’abazaba barokotse bo mu nzu ya Yakobo, bazaherukire aho kwisunga uwabakandamizaga, ahubwo bisunge by’ukuri Uhoraho, Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Isaiah10:21 Kandi ni koko, udusigisigi tuzagaruka, abacitse ku icumu bo mu nzu ya Yakobo, bazagarukira Imana Idahangarwa." 
Isaiah10:22 Israheli we! N’ubwo umuryango wawe wangana n’umusenyi wo ku nyanja, hazagaruka bake mu bacitse ku icumu, kuko ukurimburwa kwanyu kutagisibye, urubanza rukarangirira aho;" 
Isaiah10:23 maze Uhoraho, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo, akazasohoza atyo uwo mugambi we, mu gihugu cyose." 
Isaiah10:24 Ni cyo gitumye Uhoraho, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Muryango wanjye, mwebwe abatuye Siyoni, ntimutinye Abanyashuru babakubita ibiboko, bakababangurira inkoni, nk’Abanyamisiri," 
Isaiah10:25 kuko hasigaye igihe gito cyane, uburakari mbafitiye bugacogora, ahubwo bugahindukirira Abanyashuru." 
Isaiah10:26 Nuko Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo akazabangura ikiboko, nk’uko yagenjereje Madiyani ku rutare rwa Orebu, kandi abangure inkoni ye ku nyanja, nk’uko yabigize mu Misiri." 
Isaiah10:27 Uwo munsi, umutwaro wanyu uzururutswa ku ntugu zanyu, ubushikamirwe buvanwe ku ijosi ryanyu, bwimukire umudendezo." 
Isaiah10:28 Umwanzi ageze i Ayati, yambukiranya Migoroni; i Mikimasi ahasiga ibintu bye." 
Isaiah10:29 Anyura mu nzira y’impatanwa, aca ingando i Geba. Ubwo ab’i Rama bahinda umushyitsi, i Geba ya Sawuli barahunga." 
Isaiah10:30 Bantu b’i Bati‐Galimu, nimutere hejuru! Mutege amatwi namwe, bantu b’i Layishi!" 
Isaiah10:31 Anatoti ibonye ishyano, i Madimena barahunga, ab’i Gebimu bakijije amagara yabo!" 
Isaiah10:32 Uwo munsi nyine ahagarara i Nobu, abangura ukuboko kwe, akangaranya umusozi w’umwari w’i Siyoni, n’umurenge wa Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Dore Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, amashami ayamariye hasi n’ingufu ze ziteye ubwoba, amaremare yayatemye, n’asumba ayandi yayakonkoboye." 
Isaiah10:34 Ibiti byose by’ishyamba yabitsembesheje intorezo, n’amasederi atagira uko asa ya Libani yararitswe." 
Isaiah11:1 Umumero uzashibuka ku gishyitsi cya Yese, inkomoko ye izamuke ku muzi wacyo," 
Isaiah11:2 Umwuka w’Uhoraho uzamwururukiraho, umwuka w’ubuhanga n’uw’ubushishozi, umwuka w’ubujyanama n’uw’ubudacogora, umwuka w’ubumenyi n’uw’ukubaha Uhoraho," 
Isaiah11:3 kandi unamutoze gutinya Uhoraho. Ntazaca imanza akurikije igihagararo, cyangwa ngo azikemure akurikije amabwire." 
Isaiah11:4 Intamenyekana azazicira imanza zitabera, azarenganure abakene bo mu gihugu. Umugome azamukubitisha inkoni y’ijambo rye, umwuka wo mu munwa we awicishe umugiranabi." 
Isaiah11:5 Azakindikirisha ubutabera nk’umukandara, akenyeze ubudahemuka nk’umweko." 
Isaiah11:6 Ikirura kizabana n’umwana w’intama, ingwe iryame iruhande rw’umwana w’ihene. Inyana n’icyana cy’intare bizagaburirwa hamwe, biragirwe n’akana k’agahungu." 
Isaiah11:7 Inka n’igicokoma bizarisha mu rwuri rumwe, ibyana byabyo bibane mu kiraro kimwe, intare irishe ubwatsi nk’ikimasa." 
Isaiah11:8 Umwana ukiri ku ibere azakinira ku kiryamo cy’inshira, igitambambuga cyinjize ikiganza mu mwobo w’impiri." 
Isaiah11:9 Nta we uzaba akigira nabi, cyangwa ngo akore amahano ku musozi wanjye mutagatifu, kuko igihugu kizasakarwamo n’ubumenyi bw’Uhoraho, nk’uko amazi yuzura inyanja!" 
Isaiah11:10 Uwo munsi ni bwo inkomoko ya Yese, izashyirwa ejuru nk’ibendera ry’igihugu, amahanga yose akazayigana, aho atuye hakazabengerana ikuzo." 
Isaiah11:11 Uwo munsi kandi, Uhoraho azongera abangure ukuboko kwe, kugira ngo agobotore udusigisigi tw’umuryango we, abazaba bakiri muri Ashuru no mu Misiri, i Patorosi, n’i Kushi, i Elamu, n’i Shimeyari, i Hamati no mu birwa byo ku nyanja." 
Isaiah11:12 Azashinga ikimenyetso kimenyesha amahanga, ko agiye gukorakoranya abajyanywe bunyago ba Israheli, abumbire hamwe abatatanye bo muri Yuda, abakuye mu mpande zose z’isi." 
Isaiah11:13 Ishyari rya Efurayimu rizashira, n’abanzi ba Yuda batsembwe. Efurayimu ntizongera ukundi kugirira Yuda ishyari, na Yuda ye kuzongera ukundi kugirira nabi Efurayimu." 
Isaiah11:14 Bazirohera icyarimwe ku misozi y’Abafilisiti b’iburengerazuba, bishyire hamwe basahure abatuye iburasirazuba. Bazabangura ukuboko kwabo kuri Edomu na Mowabu, naho bene Amoni bazabayoboke." 
Isaiah11:15 Uhoraho azakamya ikigobe cy’inyanja yo mu Misiri, abangure ukuboko akwerekeje kuri Efurati, ku bw’imbaraga z’umwuka we, ayigabanyemo amashami arindwi, ku buryo bazashobora kuyambuka n’ibirenge." 
Isaiah11:16 Hazabaho inzira imwe ku barokotse b’umuryango we, abazaba basigaye muri Ashuru, nk’uko byagenze ku Bayisraheli, umunsi bazamutse bava mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Isaiah12:1 Uwo munsi uzavuga uti «Ndagushimira Uhoraho, kuko wandakariye, ariko uburakari bwawe bwacogora, ukampoza." 
Isaiah12:2 Dore Imana, Umukiza wanjye, ndamwiringira kandi sinkigira ubwoba, kuko imbaraga zanjye n’indirimbo yanjye ari Uhoraho, wambereye agakiza.»" 
Isaiah12:3 Muzavoma amazi ku masoko y’agakiza, mwishimye," 
Isaiah12:4 maze uwo munsi muvuge muti «Nimushimire Uhoraho, murate izina rye, nimwamamaze ibikorwa bye mu mahanga." 
Isaiah12:5 Nimuririmbe Uhoraho, kuko yakoze ibintu by’agatangaza, kandi mubyamamaze mu nsi hose." 
Isaiah12:6 Rangurura ijwi uvuze impundu, wowe utuye i Siyoni, kuko Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli, utuye iwawe rwagati, ari Igihangange.»" 
Isaiah13:1 Iteka ryaciriwe Babiloni, uko Izayi mwene Amosi yarihawe." 
Isaiah13:1 Iteka ryaciriwe Babiloni, uko Izayi mwene Amosi yarihawe." 
Isaiah13:2 Nimushinge ikimenyetso ku musozi w’agasi, murangurure amajwi, mubarembuze, binjire mu marembo y’abanyacyubahiro." 
Isaiah13:3 Ni jyewe ubwanjye wihamagarije abanyobotse, nitumiriza ingabo zanjye z’intwari, zitabira uburakari bwanjye, zigaharanira ishema ryanjye." 
Isaiah13:4 Nimwumve uwo muririmo uri mu misozi, wagira ngo ni igitero cy’abantu benshi. Nimutege amatwi urwo rusaku rw’amahanga yakoranye: Uhoraho, umugaba w’ingabo, aranyura hagati y’ingabo zigiye ku rugamba." 
Isaiah13:5 Baturutse mu gihugu cya kure, iyo riterwa inkingi, bitabiriye uburakari bw’Uhoraho, baje kurimbura igihugu cyose."
