Isaiah13:6 Nimuganye, muboroge, kuko umunsi w’Uhoraho wegereje, nk’umunsi w’uburimbuke, butewe n’Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Isaiah13:7 Ni cyo gitumye amaboko yose adandabirana, buri muntu agacika intege." 
Isaiah13:8 Ngaho barakangaranye, bafashwe n’ububabare bw’amoko yose, bararibwa nk’umugore uramutswe. Bararebana bakumirwa, bakagira isoni mu maso." 
Isaiah13:9 Nguyu uraje umunsi w’Uhoraho, umunsi utimirwa, uzanye n’uburakari bw’igikatu, buje kurimbura igihugu, bukagitsembamo abanyabyaha." 
Isaiah13:10 Inyenyeri zo ku ijuru n’ubwinshi bwazo, ntizizongera kumurika ukundi, izuba rizijima rikirasa, ukwezi koye kumurika." 
Isaiah13:11 Nzahana isi kubera ubugome bwayo, inkozi z’ibibi nzihore ibicumuro byazo. Nzakuraho ukwikuza kw’abibone, nzacogoze ubwirasi bw’abategetsi b’abagome." 
Isaiah13:12 Nzagabanya abantu batube nka zahabu igogoye, babe ingume kurusha zahabu y’i Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Ijuru rizahubangana, isi ihinde umushyitsi, bitewe n’ubukana bw’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ku munsi azagaragarizaho uburakari bwe." 
Isaiah13:14 Bityo rero, bazamere nk’isha ikurikiwe n’umuhigi, cyangwa nk’umukumbi utagira umushumba. Buri wese azirukanke asanga umuryango we, ahungire mu gihugu cye." 
Isaiah13:15 Abo bazahura bose babahinguranye n’imyambi, abo bazafata, babamarire ku nkota." 
Isaiah13:16 Abana babo bazahonyorerwa mu maso yabo, basahure amazu yabo; bigabize abagore babo ku gahato." 
Isaiah13:17 Ngiye kubateza Abamedi, bo batitaye kuri feza, na zahabu ntibashishikaze." 
Isaiah13:18 Abasore bazarimbuzwa imiheto, ntibazababarira impinja zikivuka, n’ibitambambuga ntibazabigirira impuhwe." 
Isaiah13:19 Babiloni, yari umutako w’abami n’ingoma zabo, ikaba umurato w’akataraboneka ku Bakalideya, izarimbuka nk’uko Imana yagenjeje Sodoma na Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Ingoma ibihumbi idatuwe ukundi, izagume ityo, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana. Ndetse n’abangara ntibazahashinga ihema ryabo, n’abashumba ntibazahahagarara." 
Isaiah13:21 Inturo zizahagira indiri yazo, amazu atahwe n’ibihunyira. Za mbuni zizahagira intaho yazo, n’ibikoko bihabyinire." 
Isaiah13:22 Impyisi zizahumira mu minara yabo, imbwebwe zimokere mu ngoro z’ibyishimo. Igihe cyayo kiregereje, iminsi yayo irabaze." 
Isaiah14:1 Uhoraho azagirira impuhwe bene Yakobo, azatoranya bundi bushya umuryango wa Israheli, azabatuze mu gihugu cyabo. Abanyamahanga bazaza babagana, bifatanye n’inzu ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Abo mu bihugu bya kure bazajyana n’Abayisraheli, babasubize mu gihugu cyabo; nuko nibamara kugera ku butaka bw’Uhoraho, Israheli ibagire abacakara n’abaja bayo, itegeke abayishikamiraga, inabashyire ku ngoyi bari barashyizweho." 
Isaiah14:3 Umunsi Uhoraho azaba amaze kukugarura mu gihugu cyawe, nyuma y’imiruho, imibabaro n’ubucakara wari urimo," 
Isaiah14:4 uzabyinira hejuru y’umwami w’i Babiloni uti: Mbese wa munyagitugu, yaherera he? Ubwibone bwe se bwo bwazimiriye he?" 
Isaiah14:5 Uhoraho yavunaguye inkoni z’abagome, kimwe n’ibiboko by’abanyagitugu," 
Isaiah14:6 bakubitanaga umujinya ibihugu badahwema, bakigarurira amahanga n’uburakari, bakayaburagiza batayasonera, bakigarurira amahanga n’uburakari." 
Isaiah14:7 None isi yose iratuje, abantu basabwe n’ibyishimo." 
Isaiah14:8 Ndetse n’imizonobari irakwishimaho, kandi kuva wagwa, amasederi yose ya Libani aravuga ati «Ntakizanzamutse ukundi, uwazanwaga no kudutsemba.»" 
Isaiah14:9 Ab’ikuzimu bakimenya ko uje, biteguye kukwakira. Bakanguye abapfuye bose ku mpamvu yawe, abigeze kuba ibikomerezwa ku isi, abari abami b’amahanga bahagurutswa ku ntebe zabo." 
Isaiah14:10 Abo bose bafashe ijambo barakubwira bati «Nawe dore ubaye umunyantege nke nkatwe, usigaye warahindutse nkatwe!" 
Isaiah14:11 Ubukire bwawe bwamanukanye n’amajwi y’inanga ikuzimu, uzisasira umujagato w’inyo, uwiyorose." 
Isaiah14:12 Mbese waba waramanutse ute mu ijuru, Nyenyeri yakirana, Mwana w’umuseke weya? Waba se warahanutse ute ukagwa ku isi, wowe wayogozaga amahanga, uvuga uti" 
Isaiah14:13 ’Nzazamuka mu ijuru, nshyire intebe yanjye hejuru y’inyenyeri z’Imana, nzature ku musozi imana zikoraniraho, aherekera mu majyaruguru." 
Isaiah14:14 Nzazamuka njye ku mpera z’ibicu, maze nzareshye n’Umusumbabyose.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Ariko dore wamanutse kwa Nyirarupfu, mu muhenengero w’ikuzimu!»" 
Isaiah14:16 Abakubona barakwitegereza ubudahwema, bakitonda bakakureba, bibaza bati «Mbese uyu yaba wa mugabo wahindishaga isi umushyitsi, agahungabanya abami n’ingoma zabo," 
Isaiah14:17 uwahinduraga isi ubutayu, agasenya imigi, ntarekure imbohe ngo zigaruke iwabo?»" 
Isaiah14:18 Abami bose b’amahanga, udakuyemo n’umwe, buri wese mu mva ye baruhukiye mu mahoro." 
Isaiah14:19 Ariko wowe wajugunywe kure y’imva yawe, uteye ubwoba boshye uruhinja rwavutse rupfuye. Umeze nk’intumbi banyukanyutse; ukikijwe n’imirambo y’abahinguranyijwe n’inkota, ikaba igaramye ku mabuye ashashe mu rwobo." 
Isaiah14:20 Ntuzabangikana na bo mu mva, kuko wayogoje igihugu cyawe, ukica umuryango wawe: inyoko y’abagome ntizongera kuvugwa ukundi." 
Isaiah14:21 Nimwitegure kwica abana, kubera icyaha cy’ababyeyi babo, hato batava aho baduhagurukana, bakigarurira isi, maze bakayubakaho imigi." 
Isaiah14:22 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Ngiye ubwanjye kubahagurukira. Nzatsembaho izina Babiloni n’ibiyiranga byose, abayikomokaho bose n’urubyaro rwabo. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah14:23 Nzahahindura ibidendezi by’amazi, n’intaho ya za nyirabarazana, mpakubuze umweyo ukumunzura byose. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Isaiah14:24 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ararahiye ati «Icyo natekereje kizaba, n’icyo nagambiriye kizarangira." 
Isaiah14:25 Nzavunagurira Abanyashuru mu gihugu cyanjye, mbarimbure ku misozi yanjye. Abo bicishaga uburetwa nzabubakiza, n’umutwaro babakoreraga nywubature.»" 
Isaiah14:26 Uwo ni umugambi Uhoraho yafatiye isi yose, ni igihano yageneye amahanga yose." 
Isaiah14:27 Niba se Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yafashe umugambi, ni nde uzamugamburuza? Niba se yamaze kubangura ukuboko kwe ngo ahane, ni nde uzamugeruza?" 
Isaiah14:28 Umwaka umwami Akhazi yatanzemo, hatangazwa aya magambo:" 
Isaiah14:29 Mwebwe mwese, Abafilisiti, ntimwishimire ko ikiboko mwakubitwaga cyacitsemo kabiri, kuko mu mwiyuburure w’inzoka hazasohokamo impiri, naho mu mpiri hakazasohokamo ikiyoka kiguruka." 
Isaiah14:30 Imbabare zizagaburirwa, abakene babeho mu ituze; ariko abagukomokaho nzabisha inzara, abayirokotse mbasonge." 
Isaiah14:31 Mwe migi izitiwe, nimurire kandi muboroge! Abafilisiti bose uko bangana bahwereye: kuko mu majyaruguru haturutse umwotsi, hakaba ari nta n’umwe ubuze muri icyo gitero." 
Isaiah14:32 Bazasubiza iki intumwa batumweho n’Abafilisiti? Dore uko bazazisubiza: Ni Uhoraho ubwe washinze Siyoni, ni ho abakene b’umuryango we bafite ubuhungiro nyabwo." 
Isaiah15:1 Iteka ryaciriwe igihugu cya Mowabu: Ari‐Mowabu yarazimanganye, itsembwa mu ijoro rimwe! Kiri‐Mowabu na yo yarimbutse nijoro, ishiraho!" 
Isaiah15:2 Barazamutse bagiye ahirengeye, ku ngoro ya Diboni kuririrayo. Abamowabu bararirira ku musozi wa Nebo n’i Medeba, imitwe yabo barayikomboje, n’ubwanwa bwose barabwogosha." 
Isaiah15:3 Mu nzira baragenda bambaye ibigunira, bose baraborogera hejuru y’amazu no ku karubanda." 
Isaiah15:4 Ab’i Heshiboni n’i Eleyale barataka bikagera i Yahasi, ingabo za Mowabu ziravuza induru, umutima wabo washengutse." 
Isaiah15:5 Mowabu irambabaje: dore abantu bayo barahunga bagana i Sowari n’i Egalati‐Shelishiya. Bazamutse umusozi wa Luhiti barira, induru yabo ndende irumvikanira ku nzira igana i Horonayimu." 
Isaiah15:6 Amazi y’i Mimirimu yarakamye, ubwatsi bwaragwengeye, ntibukiharangwa." 
Isaiah15:7 None ubutunzi bari basigaranye, babwimuriye hakurya y’umugezi w’inturusu." 
Isaiah15:8 Induru ni yose, impande zose z’igihugu cya Mowabu, imiborogo irumvikanira i Egalayimu, ikagera no ku mariba y’i Elimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Amazi y’i Diboni yuzuyemo amaraso, kandi i Diboni hiyongereyeho n’ikindi cyago, intare igiye gutanyagura abarokotse ba Mowabu, abazaba basigaye mu gihugu." 
Isaiah16:1 Nimwoherereze intama umutware w’igihugu, muhereye i Sela mukanyura ku butayu, mwerekeza ku musozi w’umwari wa Siyoni." 
Isaiah16:2 Abakobwa b’i Mowabu barabuyera ku byambu bya Arunoni, boshye inyoni ziyagara, zirukanwe mu cyari cyazo." 
Isaiah16:3 Baravuga bati «Tugire inama kandi udufashe! Ku manywa y’ihangu, udutwikirize igicucu cyawe nk’ijoro, uhishire ibicibwa, kandi ntutererane inzererezi." 
Isaiah16:4 Wemere impunzi z’i Mowabu, zibone ubuhungiro iwawe, ubahishe ugambiriye kubarimbura. Nuko, igihe ugushikamirwa kuzaba kutakiriho, ukurimbura kukarangira burundu, n’utegekesha igituga akavanwa mu gihugu," 
Isaiah16:5 ni bwo intebe y’ubwami bwawe izakomera, kubera ubuntu watugiriye, maze mu ihema rya Dawudi hazaganze umucamanza, ushishikarira kurenganura abarengana, no guca imanza zitabera.»" 
Isaiah16:6 Twumvise bavuga ukwikuza kurengutse kwa Mowabu, ubwibone bwayo, ubwikunde n’ubwikanyize, n’ubwirasi bwayo butagize icyo bumaze." 
Isaiah16:7 None dore Abamowabu bararirira igihugu cyabo, dore bose baraboroga, bashavuye kandi bacitse intege, kubera udutsima tw’imizabibu bazanaga ho ituro i Kiri‐Hareseti." 
Isaiah16:8 Koko, imirima y’i Heshiboni imaze kuraba, kimwe n’umuzabibu w’i Sibima, wengwagamo divayi yasindishaga abatware b’amahanga, wari urambuye kugera i Yezeri no ku butayu, ukagaba amashami yawo hakurya y’inyanja y’Umunyu." 
Isaiah16:9 Ni cyo gituma hamwe n’abantu b’i Yezeri, ndirira umuzabibu w’i Sibima; amarira yanjye akuhira Heshiboni na Eleyale, kuko igihe cy’umusaruro wanyu, mutazongera gutera indirimbo z’ibyishimo." 
Isaiah16:10 Mu mirima yanyu ntihakiboneka ibyishimo n’umunezero, amashyi n’impundu ntibikirangwa no mu mizabibu yanyu. Ntibazongera kwengera divayi mu mivure, indirimbo z’ibyishimo zirarangiye." 
Isaiah16:11 Ndahindaganwa nk’inanga, mbabajwe na Mowabu, n’umutima wanjye uraborogera Kiri‐Heresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Bazabona Abamowabu bakururuka, bagana ahirengeye, kugira ngo bajye mu ngoro gutakambira imana yabo: ariko nta cyo bazageraho." 
Isaiah16:13 Ibyo ni byo Uhoraho yavuze kuri Mowabu kuva kera. 
Isaiah16:14 None Uhoraho aravuze ati «Mu myaka itatu, itarengaho n’umunsi n’umwe, ab’ingenzi b’i Mowabu kimwe na rubanda bazasigara ari mbarwa. N’abazarokoka kandi, bazaba ari bake cyane, nta cyo bakimaze.»" 
Isaiah17:1 Iteka ryaciriwe ku mugi wa Damasi. Damasi nticyongeye kwitwa umugi ukundi, ahubwo igiye guhinduka ikirundo cy’amabuye." 
Isaiah17:2 Imigi yategekaga nticyongeye kwitabwaho ukundi, izaruhukirwamo n’amatungo nta n’uzayakoma imbere." 
Isaiah17:3 Nta nkike zikomeye zizongera kubaho muri Efurayimu, i Damasi ntihazigera ubwami, n’abarokotse ba Aramu ntibazaruta ubwinshi Abayisraheli. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Isaiah17:4 Uwo munsi, icyubahiro cya Yakobo kizagabanuka, n’umubyibuho we uzashira." 
Isaiah17:5 Bizamera nko mu gihe cy’isarura, iyo batema ingano bakagesa n’amahundo, cyangwa nko mu gihe bahumba amahundo, mu kibaya cy’Abarefayimu:" 
Isaiah17:6 hazasigara gusa uduhumbano, bimere mbese nk’iyo banyeganyeje umutini, hagasigara imbuto ebyiri cyangwa eshatu zo mu bushorishori, enye cyangwa eshanu zo ku mashami yera. Uwo ni Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli ubivuze." 
Isaiah17:7 Uwo munsi, umuntu azahindukiza amaso yitegereze Uwamuremye, arebe Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Isaiah17:8 Ntazongera kwita ukundi ku ntambiro yiyubakiye, ku biti byeguriwe ibigirwamana cyangwa ibishushanyo by’izuba, byakozwe n’intoki ze." 
Isaiah17:9 Uwo munsi kandi, imigi yanyu muzayihungamo, nk’uko byagendekeye Abahivi n’Abahemori, ubwo Abayisraheli babatahiranaga, isigare ari ubutayu buteye ubwoba," 
Isaiah17:10 kuko wirengagije Imana, Umukiza wawe, ntiwibuke urutare rw’ubuhungiro bwawe. Wahinze mu busitani ibihingwa wishimira, ububibamo imbuto z’inyamahanga." 
Isaiah17:11 Uwo munsi uzitera, ubona zirakuze, bucyeye bw’aho, ubona zitangiye kuzana imbuto, ariko igihe cy’isarura, umusaruro urabura, ayo makuba kandi akaba atagira umuti." 
Isaiah17:12 Yoo! Mbega umuririmo w’imbaga nyamwinshi, boshye umururumo w’inyanja, n’ikiriri cy’amahanga nk’amasumo y’amazi!" 
Isaiah17:13 Mbega umuhindagano w’amahanga umeze nk’inkubi y’amazi magari! Nyamara Uhoraho arabanesheje, bahungiye kure, barayoyotse nk’umurama ugurukanywe n’umuyaga ku musozi, cyangwa se imbuto z’amahwa zitwawe na serwakira." 
Isaiah17:14 Ku mugoroba byari biteye ubwoba, ariko bujya gucya, nta cyari kikiharangwa. Uwo ni wo mugabane w’abatwambura, kikaba n’igihembo cy’abadusahura." 
Isaiah18:1 Uragowe! Wa gihugu we cyuzuye urusaku rw’amababa y’udukoko turi ku nzuzi z’i Kushi," 
Isaiah18:2 wowe wohereza intumwa zinyuze mu nyanja, zikaza mu mato y’imfunzo hejuru y’amazi. Nimwihute, ntumwa zabuhiriye, mutahe iwanyu muri kiriya gihugu cy’abantu barebare b’umubiri unogereye, igihugu gitinywa kugera ku mpera z’isi, igihugu gikomeye kandi gishikamira abanzi, kikaba cyambukiranyijwe n’inzuzi." 
Isaiah18:3 Yemwe, bantu batuye isi mwese, ubwo ikimenyetso kizigaragaza ku musozi, muzacyitegereze! Naho ihembe nirivuga, muzatege amatwi." 
Isaiah18:4 Kuko Uhoraho yambwiye ati «Nzigumira hamwe, maze nitegerereze aho ntuye, mere nk’ubushyuhe hejuru y’urumuri, cyangwa nk’urwokotsi, igihe cy’ubushyuhe bw’isarura." 
Isaiah18:5 Nuko ahagana igihe cy’isarura, ururabyo ruhunduye, amahundo amaze guhisha, imbuto bazitemesha umuhoro, naho amashami adafite akamaro akajugunywa," 
Isaiah18:6 ibyo byose bizagabizwe inkongoro zo ku misozi n’inyamaswa z’inkazi. Inkongoro zizahamara impeshyi yose, inyamaswa z’inkazi zose, zihugame itumba.»" 
Isaiah18:7 Icyo gihe, mu gihugu cy’abantu barebare b’umubiri unogereye, igihugu gitinywa kugera ku mpera z’isi, igihugu gikomeye kandi gishikamira abanzi, kikambukiranywa n’inzuzi, kizazanira amaturo Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo ku musozi wa Siyoni aho aganje." 
Isaiah19:1 Iteka ryaciriwe ku gihugu cya Misiri. Dore Uhoraho aragendera mu bicu byihuta: aje mu Misiri. Ibigirwamana byaho bizahinda umushyitsi imbere ye, na Misiri ubwayo icike intege." 
Isaiah19:2 Nzateranya Abanyamisiri basubiranemo, buri muntu arwane n’umuvandimwe cyangwa umuturanyi we, umugi urwane n’undi, n’ingoma zisubiranemo." 
Isaiah19:3 Abanyamisiri bazata umutwe, bityo mburizemo umugambi wabo. Nuko biyambaze ibigirwamana byabo, abacunnyi, abashitsi n’abapfumu babo." 
Isaiah19:4 Nzabateza ubutegetsi bw’igitugu, umwami w’umunyamaboko azabategeke. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Isaiah19:5 Amazi y’inyanja azarigita, uruzi rukame hume," 
Isaiah19:6 imigezi izahinduka umunuko, amashami y’uruzi rwa Misiri azagabanuka, akame, bityo imbingo n’imfunzo zumirane." 
Isaiah19:7 Urufunzo rwo ku nkombe za Nili, n’urw’aho yirohera mu nyanja, mbese ibimera byose ku nkombe y’uruzi bizume, bishireho, he kugira na kimwe gisigara." 
Isaiah19:8 Abarobyi bazashavura, abarobesha indobani muri Nili baganye, n’abatega imitego mu mazi bazongwe bose." 
Isaiah19:9 Abahinzi b’ibihingwa bivamo ubudodo bazashoberwe, abadozi n’ababoshyi b’imyenda basuherwe," 
Isaiah19:10 abategura ibinyobwa bazakuke umutima, n’abenga amayoga bacikemo igikuba." 
Isaiah19:11 Abatware b’i Tanisi ni ibigoryi rwose, inama y’abajyanama ba Farawo ni amanjwe. Mushobora mute kubwira Farawo, muti «Ndi umuhanga, ndi uwo mu nkomoko y’abami ba kera»?" 
Isaiah19:12 Abahanga bawe se bari hehe? Nibakwigishe rero, kandi bakumenyeshe umugambi w’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, werekeye Misiri." 
Isaiah19:13 Abatware b’i Tanisi bahindutse ibigoryi, ab’i Memfisi bibereye mu nzozi, bariho barayobya Misiri, kandi ari bo gahuzamiryango." 
Isaiah19:14 Uhoraho yabatesheje umutwe, bityo bayobya Misiri mu byo ikora byose, boshye umusinzi wigaragura mu birutsi bye." 
Isaiah19:15 Kuva ku muntu wo hejuru kugera ku uciye bugufi mu Misiri, kuva ku bakomeye kugera ku boroheje, nta n’umwe uzagira icyo ageraho kimufitiye akamaro." 
Isaiah19:16 Uwo munsi, Abanyamisiri bazamera nk’abagore, bazahahamuka kandi batengurwe, nibabona Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, abanguye ukuboko kugira ngo abatsembe." 
Isaiah19:17 Igihugu cya Yuda kizahora gikangaranya Abanyamisiri, buri gihe uko bazajya babwirwa amateka yacyo bahinde umushyitsi, kubera umugambi w’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, werekeye Misiri." 
Isaiah19:18 Uwo munsi kandi, imigi itanu yo mu Misiri izavuga igihebureyi, bityo igirane isezerano n’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo. Umwe muri iyo migi ukazitwa Iri‐Haheresi, ari byo kuvuga ngo: umugi w’uburimbuke." 
Isaiah19:19 Uwo munsi, hazubakwa urutambiro rw’Uhoraho rwagati mu gihugu cya Misiri, n’inkingi yeguriwe Uhoraho ahagana ku mupaka." 
Isaiah19:20 Icyo kizaba ikimenyetso n’intangamugabo ko Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ari mu gihugu cya Misiri. Igihe bazatakambira Uhoraho bugarijwe n’ababisha, azaboherereza umukiza ubatabara, ababohoze." 
Isaiah19:21 Uhoraho azimenyesha Abanyamisiri, uwo munsi na bo bamumenye. Bazamutura ibitambo n’andi maturo, bagirire Uhoraho amasezerano kandi bayakomeze." 
Isaiah19:22 Nuko rero, niba Uhoraho yarahannye bikomeye Abanyamisiri, noneho agiye kubakiza: bazagarukire Uhoraho uzabababarira, akabakiza." 
Isaiah19:23 Uwo munsi hazaboneka umuhanda uhuza Misiri na Ashuru, Abanyashuru bajye mu Misiri, n’Abanyamisiri baze muri Ashuru. Abanyamisiri bazasenga Imana ya Israheli kimwe n’Abanyashuru." 
Isaiah19:24 Uwo munsi rero, Israheli izaza ari iya gatatu kuri Misiri na Ashuru, ari na yo," 
Isaiah19:25 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, azaheramo isi umugisha muri aya magambo: Nigire umugisha Misiri igihugu cyanjye, na Ashuru igikorwa cy’ibiganza byanjye, na Israheli umugabane wanjye!" 
Isaiah20:1 Umwaka umugaba mukuru w’ingabo, woherejwe na Sarugoni, umwami wa Ashuru, ateye Ashidodi akanayigarurira..." 
Isaiah20:2 Icyo gihe Uhoraho yari yahaye Izayi mwene Amosi ubutumwa, agira ati «Genda wiyambure ikigunira ukenyeye, ukuremo n’inkweto mu birenge.» Nuko abigenza atyo, agendera aho, nta mwabaro nta n’inkweto." 
Isaiah20:2 Icyo gihe Uhoraho yari yahaye Izayi mwene Amosi ubutumwa, agira ati «Genda wiyambure ikigunira ukenyeye, ukuremo n’inkweto mu birenge.» Nuko abigenza atyo, agendera aho, nta mwabaro nta n’inkweto." 
Isaiah20:3 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Umugaragu wanjye Izayi yagendeye aho nta mwambaro, nta n’inkweto — bikazaba imyaka itatu yose — bikaba ikimenyetso gicira amarenga Misiri na Kushi." 
Isaiah20:4 Kandi koko, umwami wa Ashuru azanyaga imfungwa z’Abanyamisiri n’Abanyakushi, abajyane bunyago, abasore n’abasaza nta mwambaro, nta n’inkweto, amatako yabo yanamye, kugira ngo akoze isoni Abanyamisiri." 
Isaiah20:5 Abiringiraga Kushi bakiratana Misiri, bazagira ubwoba, bakorwe n’ikimwaro." 
Isaiah20:6 Nuko abatuye hano bazavuge bati «Ngaho rero, aba ni bo twari twiringiye ngo duhungire iwabo badutabare, banadukize umwami wa Ashuru. Ubu se noneho twe tuzerekeza he?»" 
Isaiah21:1 Iteka ryaciriwe ku butayu bwo ku nyanja Ng’uwo araje, aturutse mu butayu, mu gihugu giteye ubwoba, arahutera nk’inkubi y’umuyaga yambukiranya Negebu." 
Isaiah21:2 Ni ibintu biteye ubwoba neretswe: «Umugambanyi ariho aragambana, umurimbuzi ararimbura. Elamu, ngaho zamuka utere; namwe, Bamedi, nimufate umugi! Kuko ngiye guhoza abari mu maganya bose.»" 
Isaiah21:3 None ndumva impyiko zimbaga, nafashwe n’ububabare nk’umugore uramutswe. Meze nabi bituma ntumva, mfite n’ubwoba simbona." 
Isaiah21:4 Nataye ubwenge, ndatengurwa kubera ubwoba, amafu y’umugoroba nifuje, ampindukiyemo iterabwoba." 
Isaiah21:5 Ameza yateguwe, ibirago byadanduwe, bariho bararya kandi baranywa... ‥.. Nimuhaguruke, batware b’imitwe! Musige amavuta ingabo zanyu z’imitamenwa." 
Isaiah21:6 Kuko Nyagasani yambwiye ati «Genda, ushyireho umunetsi, abamenyeshe ibyo areba." 
Isaiah21:7 Nabona igare rikururwa n’amafarasi abiri, cyangwa ugendera ku ndogobe no ku ngamiya, azitonde kandi yitegereze neza!»" 
Isaiah21:8 Nuko umunetsi atera hejuru, ati «Shobuja, umunsi wose mba ndi ku izamu, nkarara mpagaze ijoro ryose nkora uwo murimo." 
Isaiah21:9 None dore ibyo mbona: Haje umuntu uri ku igare rikururwa n’amafarasi abiri.» Arongera ati «Babiloni iratsinzwe, iraneshejwe Babiloni, n’ibishushanyo by’ibigirwamana byayo bishiriye ku butaka, bihindutse ivu.»" 
Isaiah21:10 Muryango wanjye, wowe Uhoraho yahondaguye, boshye imyaka bahurira ku mbuga; ibyo ni byo numvanye Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, none ndabikumenyesheje." 
Isaiah21:11 Iteka ryaciriwe kuri Duma. Ijwi riturutse i Seyiri rirabaza riti «Yewe wa munyezamu we, ijoro rigeze he? Mbese ijoro ryaba rigeze he, wa munyezamu we?»" 
Isaiah21:12 Umunyezamu arasubiza ati «Bugiye gucya, ariko bwongere bwire. Niba mushaka kongera kumbaza, muze kugaruka.»" 
Isaiah21:13 Iteka ryaciriwe kuri Arabiya. Bagenzi b’i Dedani mwe, mu bihuru byo muri Arabiya ni ho muzarara." 
Isaiah21:14 Naho mwe, baturage b’i Tema, nimujye gusanganira abishwe n’inyota, nimubashyire amazi yo kunywa. Nimusanganire impunzi, muzishyire umugati," 
Isaiah21:15 kuko ziriho zihunga inkota, inkota yakuwe mu rwubati, zirahunga imiheto ifoye, zigahunga n’amakuba y’intambara." 
Isaiah21:16 Nyamara dore ibyo Nyagasani yambwiye: Hasigaye umwaka umwe gusa, utarengaho n’umunsi n’umwe, maze ikuzo ryose ry’i Kedari rikarangira," 
Isaiah21:17 hakazasigara mbarwa mu banyamiheto b’ingabo z’i Kedari. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli ubivuze." 
Isaiah22:1 Iteka ryaciriwe ku kibaya cy’ibonekerwa. Ubaye ute se, wa mugi we? Ni iki gitumye abagutuye bose bazamuka ahitaruye hejuru y’amazu?" 
Isaiah22:2 Ni kuki wuzuyemo urusaku n’umuvurungano, wa murwa we warangwagamo umunezero? Abantu bawe bapfuye ntibishwe n’inkota, yewe nta n’ubwo baguye ku rugamba." 
Isaiah22:3 Abagaba b’ingabo bawe bose barahunze, bagizwe imfungwa batarasanye. Abatahuwe bose bagizwe imbohe, ndetse n’abari barahungiye kure." 
Isaiah22:4 Ni cyo gitumye ngira nti «Nimuhindukire, mwindeba, mundeke niririre ayo kwarika, ntimwirushye mumpoza, kubera umubabaro ntewe n’ukurimburwa k’umuryango wanjye!»" 
Isaiah22:5 Koko uwo munsi uteye ubwoba, ni umunsi w’uburimbuke n’ubuhahamuke, watejwe na Nyagasani Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo. Inkike iratembye mu kibaya cy’ibonekerwa, n’induru zirarengera mu misozi." 
Isaiah22:6 Abo muri Elamu bitwaje imitana, bazamutse ku magare akururwa y’intambara, naho ab’i Kiri bitwaje ingabo zabo z’imitamenwa." 
Isaiah22:7 Ibibaya byawe byiza cyane, byuzuyemo amagare y’intambara, abanyamafarasi bashinze ibirindiro ku marembo yawe," 
Isaiah22:8 Yuda yabuze kirengera. Uwo munsi mwibutse gusuzuma intwaro zanyu, zibitswe mu nzu yitwa iy’Ishyamba," 
Isaiah22:9 mwibonera ukuntu ibyuho ari byinshi mu murwa wa Dawudi. Amazi muyakoranyiriza mu kigega cyo mu majyepfo," 
Isaiah22:10 mubarura amazu y’i Yeruzalemu, amwe murayasenya, ngo mubone ubukomeza inkike." 
Isaiah22:11 Mufukura ikibumbiro hagati y’inkike zombi, kugira ngo muyoboremo amazi yo mu kigega cyari gisanzwe. Ariko ntimwazirikanye uwatumye ibyo byose bikorwa, ntimwita ku Uwabihanze, kuva kera na kare." 
Isaiah22:12 Uwo munsi, Nyagasani Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yabahamagariye kurira no kuganya, kwiyogoshesha no kwambara ibigunira," 
Isaiah22:13 none bo bibereye mu byishimo n’umunezero, barakinja ibimasa, bagasogota intama, bararya inyama, bakanywa na divayi, bavuga bati «Turye, tunywe, ejo tuzipfire!»" 
Isaiah22:14 Nyamara, dore ibyo namenyeshejwe n’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: «Noneho ubwo mutapfuye, icyo cyaha ntimuzakibabarirwa.» Nyagasani Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo arabirahiriye." 
Isaiah22:15 Nyagasani Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Jya kureba uwo munyabintu Shebuna, umutware w’ingoro y’umwami, umubwire uti" 
Isaiah22:16 «Ufite munani ki hano, cyangwa se ababyeyi uhafite ni abahe, kugira ngo wicukurire imva ndende imeze nk’inzu, witeganyirize ubushyinguro bwawe mu rutare?" 
Isaiah22:17 Ni cyo gitumye Uhoraho agiye kukugaragura, wa gihangange we! Agiye kugupfunyika," 
Isaiah22:18 akujugunye wizingazinze nk’umupira mu gihugu kigari. Aho ni ho uzapfira, wowe n’amagare yawe wiratana, kubera isoni wakojeje inzu ya shobuja!" 
Isaiah22:19 Ngiye kukwirukana ku murimo wawe, nkunyage umwanya wawe." 
Isaiah22:20 Uwo munsi kandi, nzahamagara Eliyakimu, mwene Hilikiyahu, umugaragu wanjye," 
Isaiah22:21 nzamwambike ikanzu yawe, mukenyeze umukandara wawe, mugabire ubutware bwawe, azabere umubyeyi abatuye Yeruzalemu n’abo mu nzu ya Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Nzashyira ku ntugu ze urufunguzo rw’inzu ya Dawudi, nakingura, he kugira ushobora gukinga, nakinga, he kugira ukingura." 
Isaiah22:23 Nzamushyigikira akomere nk’inkingi ishinze ahantu hakomeye, azabe intebe y’ikuzo ry’inzu ya se." 
Isaiah22:24 Amashami yose y’umuryango we, ayoroshye n’akomeye, azamujishweho, nk’uko bajisha ibikoresho byose byo mu gikoni: ibibindi, ibicuma, inzuho n’ibindi, ku giti kimwe." 
Isaiah22:25 Uwo munsi, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuga: icyo giti gishimangiye ahantu hakomeye kizashinguka, cyiture hasi, nuko ibizaba bikijisheho byose bimenagurike; kuko Uhoraho yabivuze." 
Isaiah23:1 Iteka ryaciriwe kuri Tiri. Mato y’i Tarishishi nimworome, kuko i Tiri harimbutse; ntihagire inzu n’imwe isigara. Iyo nkuru bakaba bayimenye baturutse mu kirwa cya Shipure." 
Isaiah23:2 Nimuceceke, mwebwe abatuye ku nkombe z’inyanja, namwe, bacuruzi b’i Sidoni, mwanyuzaga ibintu byanyu mu nyanja, mukoresheje intumwa zanyu." 
Isaiah23:3 Imyaka yabibwaga kuri Nili n’umusaruro w’aho, n’ibyanyuzwaga mu mazi magari, ni wowe byaramiraga: wari isoko ry’amahanga." 
Isaiah23:4 Mbega ngo urakorwa n’ikimwaro, Sidoni, umugi ukomeye wo ku nyanja! Nuko Inyanja ifata ijambo, iravuga iti “Sinigeze ndamukwa kandi sinabyaye, nta bahungu nareze, nta n’abakobwa nabyiruye.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Misiri niramuka ibimenye izababara, nk’imaze kumva inkuru y’i Tiri." 
Isaiah23:6 Nimwambuke inyanja mugere i Tarishishi, nimurire mwebwe, abatuye ku nkombe z’inyanja!" 
Isaiah23:7 Mbese uyu ni wo murwa wanyu, warangwaga n’umunezero, umurwa wahozeho kera na kare, woherezaga abawo gutura mu bihugu bya kure?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ni nde waba yarafatiye Tiri uyu mugambi, yo yahoze yambika abami amakamba? Abacuruzi bayo bari ibikomangoma, abahashyi bayo bakaba ibikomerezwa byo ku isi!" 
Isaiah23:9 Ni uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, wabigambiriye, kugira ngo asuzugure ubwibone bw’abubahwaga, ahinyuze ibikomerezwa byose by’isi." 
Isaiah23:10 Hinga ubutaka bwawe, mwari w’i Tarishishi, nk’uko abaturiye Nili babigira, kuko nta cyambu kigihari." 
Isaiah23:11 Uhoraho yabanguye ukuboko kwe ku nyanja, ahindisha umushyitsi ibihugu; yategetse ab’i Kanahani gutsemba inkike zayo zikomeye." 
Isaiah23:12 Yaravuze ati “Ntuzongere kwishima ukundi, mwari w’i Sidoni, kuko bakwigabije ku gahato kandi wari isugi. Haguruka ugende unyuze i Shipure, naho kandi ntuzahabona uburuhukiro.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Witegereze igihugu cy’Abakarideya: uwo muryango ntukibaho. Abanyashuru bahahinduye icyanya cy’inturo; bari bahubatse iminara y’ubutasi n’amazu akomeye, ariko byose babihinduye amatongo." 
Isaiah23:14 Nimworome, mato y’i Tarishishi, kuko inkike zanyu zikomeye zaridutse." 
Isaiah23:15 Guhera uwo munsi, Tiri izibagirana igihe cy’imyaka mirongo irindwi, mbese iminsi ihwanye n’iy’ubuzima bw’umwami umwe gusa. Ariko, iyo myaka mirongo irindwi nishira, i Tiri hazaboneke ibivugwa muri iyi ndirimbo ku mugore w’indaya:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Fata inanga, uzenguruke umugi, wa ndaya we yibagiranye! Ucurange uko ubishoboye, usubire mu ndirimbo yawe, kugira ngo babone ubukwibuka.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Imyaka mirongo irindwi nishira, Uhoraho azagenderera ab’i Tiri, bongere babe indaya z’ibihugu byose biri ku isi, bisubirane inyungu zabo." 
Isaiah23:18 Ariko noneho ibicuruzwa n’urwunguko rwabo, bizegurirwe Uhoraho. Ntibizarundwa cyangwa ngo bizahunikwe ukundi, ahubwo bizahabwa abahora imbere y’Uhoraho, kugira ngo barye bijute kandi bambare n’imyambaro ikomeye." 
Isaiah24:1 Dore Uhoraho agiye kuyogoza isi no kuyirimbura, ayihindure ukundi, atatanye abayituye:" 
Isaiah24:2 abaherezabitambo kimwe n’imbaga, umutware kimwe n’umugaragu, umugore kimwe n’umuja, umucuruzi kimwe n’umuguzi, uguzwa kimwe n’ugurizwa, ugomba kwishyura n’uwishyurwa." 
Isaiah24:3 Isi izarimbuka ishireho burundu, nk’uko Uhoraho yabivuze." 
Isaiah24:4 Igihugu kiri mu cyunamo, kirononekara, isi yose iriho irakendera, ijuru na ryo ryacitse intege kimwe n’isi." 
Isaiah24:5 Isi yahindanyijwe n’abayituye, kuko baciye ku mategeko, baciye ku mabwiriza, bica isezerano ry’iteka bagiranye n’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah24:6 Ni yo mpamvu umuvumo uyogoje isi, ugakururira amakuba abayituye; none abatuye isi bakaba bashizeho, hagasigara mbarwa." 
Isaiah24:7 Divayi nshya iri mu mubabaro, umuzabibu urarabiranye, abari bamerewe neza bose baraganya." 
Isaiah24:8 Amajwi y’ingoma yanezezaga ararangiye, isahinda ry’abanezerewe rirashize, n’amajwi ashimishije y’inanga arahwekereye." 
Isaiah24:9 Nta bakinywa divayi baririmba, ibinyobwa bikomeye bisigaye bibarurira." 
Isaiah24:10 Umurwa w’akajagari ubaye amatongo, amazu yose akinzwe ubudakinguka." 
Isaiah24:11 Mu mihanda y’umugi barabaririza divayi, umunezero wose wayotse, ibyishimo ntibikirangwa mu gihugu." 
Isaiah24:12 Umugi usigaye ari amatongo, n’irembo ryawo ryarimbutse." 
Isaiah24:13 Igihugu kirakendereye kimwe n’abagituye, boshye imizeti yahuruweho imbuto, cyangwa imihumbano y’umuzabibu, nyuma y’isarura." 
Isaiah24:14 Abarokotse ngaho bahanitse amajwi, bararirimba icyubahiro cy’Uhoraho, abo ku nkengero y’inyanja, basabagijwe n’ibyishimo." 
Isaiah24:15 Mu burasirazuba barasingiza Uhoraho, mu birwa byo mu nyanja bararata izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli." 
Isaiah24:16 Twumvise n’abo mu mpera z’isi baririmba bati «Nasinginzwe Nyir’ubutungane!» Ariko ndibwira nti «Nta bwo! Ndahejeje! Noneho ndagowe!» Abagambanyi baragambanye! Mbega ubugambanyi! Abagambanyi baragambanye! 
Isaiah24:17 Ubwoba, umwobo n’umutego, ng’ibyo ibikugarije wowe utuye iki gihugu." 
Isaiah24:18 Uzahunga urusaku ruteye ubwoba, azagwa mu mwobo; nazamuka mu mwobo, afatwe mu mutego. Ingomero zo mu ijuru zafunguwe, imfatiro z’isi zitangiye kunyeganyega." 
Isaiah24:19 Isi iriyashije, irataraka, iratigita." 
Isaiah24:20 Isi iradandabiranye nk’umusinzi, irayegayeze boshye inzu ijya gutemba, icyaha cyayo kirayiremereye, yirunze hasi, kandi ntigishoboye kuhiyegura." 
Isaiah24:21 Uwo munsi, mu ijuru, Uhoraho azahana ingabo zihari, naho ku isi, ahane abami b’aho." 
Isaiah24:22 Bazarundwa mu mwobo ari imbohe, bashyirwe mu munyururu, ariko nibahamara igihe kirekire, bazashyikirizwe ubucamanza." 
Isaiah24:23 Nuko ukwezi kuzahindure ibara, gukorwe n’isoni, izuba ryijime, rimware, kuko Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ari we mwami w’umusozi wa Siyoni n’uwa Yeruzalemu kandi ikuzo rye rikabengerana mu maso y’abakuru b’umuryango." 
Isaiah25:1 Ndagusingiza Uhoraho, uri Imana yanjye, ndamamaza izina ryawe, kuko wakoze ibitangaza bikomeye kandi bidahinduka, wagambiriye kuva kera na kare." 
Isaiah25:2 Umugi wawugize igishyinga cy’amabuye, umurwa ukikijwe inkike uwuhindura amatongo. Ikigo gikomeye cy’abanyamahanga ntikitwa umugi, nta n’ubwo kizongera kubakwa ukundi." 
Isaiah25:3 Ni cyo gituma umuryango ukomeye uzagukuza, umurwa w’abatware b’amahanga ukagutinya," 
Isaiah25:4 kuko uri umurinzi w’abanyantegenke, umukene uri mu byago ukamubera ikiramiro. Uri ubuhungiro igihe cy’imvura y’impangukano, n’agacucu igihe cy’icyokere. Koko uburakari bw’ababisha ni nk’inkubi y’umuyaga," 
Isaiah25:5 cyangwa nk’icyokere ku butaka bwumiranye. Ucubya ubukana bw’abanyamahanga, boshye igicucu cy’igihu kizimya icyokere, ugacogoza n’imihigo y’ababisha." 
Isaiah25:6 Uhoraho azakorera amahanga yose umunsi mukuru kuri uyu musozi, abazimanire inyama z’ibinure, banywe divayi iryohereye, abahe inyama zoroshye na divayi imininnye neza." 
Isaiah25:7 Azatanyagurira kuri uyu musozi, umwenda wari ubambitse hejuru y’imiryango yose, n’igishura cyari cyoroshe amahanga yose." 
Isaiah25:8 Azatsemba burundu icyitwa urupfu, Uhoraho Imana, ahanagure amarira ku maso yose, avaneho ikimwaro cy’umuryango we, mu gihugu cyose. Ibyo ni Uhoraho ubwe wabivuze." 
Isaiah25:9 Uwo munsi bazavuga bati «Uhoraho ni we Mana yacu. Twaramwiringiye aratubohora, amizero yacu ari muri Uhoraho. Nitwishime, tunezerwe, kuko aducungura.»" 
Isaiah25:10 Uhoraho agiye kuramburira ukuboko kwe kuri uyu musozi. Ariko Mowabu izaribatwa ihinduke inoge, imere nk’ibyatsi byaribatiwe mu kimpoteri cy’ifumbire." 
Isaiah25:11 Aho ni ho azaramburira amaboko, nk’uko abagiye koga babigenza. Ubwibone bwabo buzacogora, kimwe n’ibikorwa by’ibiganza byabo." 
Isaiah25:12 Inkuta zitamenwa z’inkike zawe, Uhoraho arazirimbuye, azisenye, azihirike hasi mu mukungugu." 
Isaiah26:1 Uwo munsi, mu gihugu cyose cya Yuda, bazatera iyi ndirimbo, bagira bati «Dufite umurwa ukomeye; Uhoraho, kugira ngo aturengere, yawuzengurukijeho inkike icinyiye." 
Isaiah26:2 Nimwugurure amarembo! Ryinjire, ihanga ry’intungane kandi ry’indahemuka." 
Isaiah26:3 Umugambi wawe ntukuka: Uzabakomeza mu mahoro, kuko amizero yabo ari muri wowe." 
Isaiah26:4 Nimwizere Uhoraho iteka ryose, we rutare ruhoraho," 
Isaiah26:5 kuko yacogoje abari batuye mu bitwa, umurwa ukomeye arawurimbura, uratsiratsizwa, maze awuziringa mu mukungugu." 
Isaiah26:6 Abiyoroshya bazawuribata, n’abanyantegenke bawunyukanyuke.»" 
Isaiah26:7 Inzira y’umuntu w’intungane iraboneye, nawe Uhoraho, urayimutunganyiriza." 
Isaiah26:8 Mu nzira udutegeka kunyuramo, Uhoraho turakwiringira, icyo twifuza, ni ukurata izina ryawe." 
Isaiah26:9 Ijoro ryose ndakuzirikana, nkagushakashaka n’umutima wanjye, kuko iyo amategeko yawe akurikizwa ku isi, abayituye bayamenyeraho ubutungane." 
Isaiah26:10 Ariko iyo bababariye umugome, ntamenya ubutabera icyo ari cyo. Akora nabi mu gihugu cy’ubutungane, ntabone ikuzo ry’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah26:11 Wabanguye ukuboko kwawe, Uhoraho, ntibakubona, nyamara bazabona ishyaka urwanirira umuryango wawe, bakorwe n’isoni, kandi batwikwe n’umuriro wagenewe abanzi bawe." 
Isaiah26:12 Ni wowe uduha amahoro, Uhoraho; ukadusohoreza ibyo dukora byose." 
Isaiah26:13 Uhoraho, Mana yacu, abandi bategetsi bigeze kudutegeka, ariko ni izina ryawe ryonyine twiyambaza." 
Isaiah26:14 Ubwo abapfuye batazongera kubaho, ntibazashobora kweguka ukundi, warabateye urabarimbura, urabasibanganya ubutazagira urwibutso." 
Isaiah26:15 Watugize umuryango ukomeye, wowe Uhoraho, utugira ihanga rikomeye, ugaragaza utyo ikuzo ryawe, kandi wagura imipaka y’igihugu cyacu." 
Isaiah26:16 Mu mubabaro wacu twarakwirukiye, igihe uduhannye turagutakambira." 
Isaiah26:17 Imbere yawe, Uhoraho, twari tumeze nk’umugore utwite, uhindagana kuko ari hafi kubyara, agatakishwa n’ububabare." 
Isaiah26:18 Natwe twari dutwite, turi mu mibabaro y’iramukwa, ariko tumera nk’aho tubyaye umuyaga: nta bwo twazaniye isi agakiza, cyangwa ngo tuyibyarire abaturage bashya." 
Isaiah26:19 Abawe bapfuye bazongera kubaho, imirambo yabo izazuka. Mwebwe abari mu mukungugu, nimukanguke, nimusabwe n’ibyishimo! Kuko ikime cy’Uhoraho ari urumuri rutonyanga ku isi, bityo abari barapfuye bazagaruke imusozi." 
Isaiah26:20 Muryango wanjye, genda winjire iwawe, kandi ufunge inzugi zombi. Ihishe akanya gato, uburakari bugiye guhita." 
Isaiah26:21 Dore Uhoraho asohotse iwe, kugira ngo ahane abatuye isi kubera ubugome bwabo. Isi igiye gutahurwaho amaraso yamennye, kandi ntizongera guhisha imirambo y’abapfuye." 
Isaiah27:1 Uwo munsi, Uhoraho azatabara, afite inkota nini, ityaye kandi ikomeye, atere icyo gikoko Leviyatani, ya nzoka yihotagura kandi yihuta, yice Ikiyoka cyo mu nyanja." 
Isaiah27:2 Uwo munsi, muzaririmba umuzabibu utagira uko usa:" 
Isaiah27:3 Jye, Uhoraho ndawumenya, nkawuvomerera buri gihe. Ndawurinda amanywa n’ijoro, kugira ngo batawangiza." 
Isaiah27:4 Nta bwo njya ndakara, iyo nywubonyemo amahwa n’imifatangwe, ahubwo ndayatema nkayarunda hamwe, maze nkayatwika." 
Isaiah27:5 Ariko uzanyiringira, tuzabana mu mahoro, koko amahoro azaba yose hagati yacu." 
Isaiah27:6 Mu bihe bizaza, bene Yakobo bazashinga imizi bundi bushya, Israheli izapfundika yere ururabyo, imbuto zarwo zikwire ku isi." 
Isaiah27:7 Uhoraho se yaba yarabahannye, uko yahannye ababakubitaga? Yaba se yarabishe, uko yishe ababicaga?" 
Isaiah27:8 Oya! Ahubwo yabaciriye urubanza, abamenesha mu gihugu, yabirukanye umunsi umwe, akoresheje umwuka we ukaze, n’inkubi y’umuyaga uturutse mu burasirazuba." 
Isaiah27:9 Ni na ko icyaha cya bene Yakobo kizahanagurwa, maze bagakira ingaruka z’igicumuro cyabo: Amabuye yose yari yubatse urutambiro bazayahindura ivu, boshye ishwagara yashongeshejwe; ibiti byeguriwe ibigirwamana n’ibishushanyo by’izuba, byoye kuzashingwa ukundi." 
Isaiah27:10 Umugi wari ukomeye uzasigarire aho, waratereranywe nk’ubutayu butagituwe. Inyana zizahahuka, zinaharare, kandi zirishe amashami y’ibihuru." 
Isaiah27:11 Ayo mashami namara kugwengera, abagore bazayavunagure, maze bayacane. Ni koko uyu muryango ntiwumva; ni yo mpamvu Uwawuremye atawugiriye impuhwe, Uwawuhanze ntawubabarire." 
Isaiah27:12 Uwo munsi, Uhoraho azahura imyaka ye, uhereye ku ruzi rwa Efurati kugeza ku mugezi wa Misiri. Nuko mwebwe Abayisraheli, muzasarurwe mutyo, umwe umwe." 
Isaiah27:13 Uwo munsi kandi, ihembe rirangira rizavuga, abatataniye mu gihugu cya Ashuru, hamwe n’abirukanywe mu gihugu cya Misiri, bose baze bapfukamire Uhoraho, ku musozi mutagatifu, i Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Uragowe! Wowe kamba ry’ubwibone bw’abasinzi b’i Efurayimu. Uzabona ishyano, wowe wubatswe hejuru y’ikibaya kirumbuka, kuko umeze nk’indabyo zumiranye, zitatse ku mutwe w’abazahajwe na divayi." 
Isaiah28:2 Dore umurwanyi ukomeye, aturutse kuri Uhoraho, ameze nk’amahindu y’urubura n’inkubi y’umuyaga urimbura, cyangwa se umuhengeri utumbagira amazi akarenga inkombe, azatsemba byose n’ingufu nyinshi." 
Isaiah28:3 Azaribata rya kamba ry’ubwibone bw’abasinzi b’i Efurayimu," 
Isaiah28:4 na za ndabyo zumiranye zitatse ku mutwe w’abatuye hejuru y’ikibaya kirumbuka. Bazamera nk’imbuto y’umutini, ihishije mbere y’icyi: uyirabutswe wese, agahera ko ayifata akayimira." 
Isaiah28:5 Uwo munsi, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, azaba ikamba ribengerana, urugori n’umutako, bitatse ku mutwe w’abasigaye b’umuryango we." 
Isaiah28:6 Ni we mwuka w’ubutabera w’abaca imanza zitabera, akaba ubutwari bw’abirukana umwanzi mu marembo y’umugi." 
Isaiah28:7 Abaherezabitambo n’abahanuzi barayobye kubera divayi, baradandabirana kubera ibinyobwa bikaze, ibiyobyabwenge birabayobeje na divayi irabatabitse, baradandabirana kubera ibinyobwa bikaze, barayoba mu ibonekerwa ryabo, bakibeshya igihe bahanura." 
Isaiah28:8 Ameza yabo yuzuyeho ibirutsi binuka, imyanda yabo bayikwije ahantu hose." 
Isaiah28:9 Barabazanya bati «Mbese ni bande uriya muhanuzi ashaka kwigisha? Ni bande yaba ashaka gusobanurira iby’ibonekerwa rye? Ni abana se bamaze gucuka, cyangwa ni abakiri ku ibere," 
Isaiah28:10 ku buryo yatinyuka kutubwira ngo ’Ca aha, icara, gira utya, tatata, dadada ’?" 
Isaiah28:11 Nyamara kandi, ni muri iyo mvugo ididimanga, muri urwo rurimi rw’amahanga, Uhoraho azavugana n’umuryango we." 
Isaiah28:12 We wari warababwiye ati «Dore ikiruhuko, nimureke unaniwe aruhuke, aha ni ahantu h’uburuhukiro.» Nyamara ntibashatse kumwumva." 
Isaiah28:13 Bityo ijambo ry’Uhoraho kuri bo, rizabe rya rindi: «Ca aha, icara, gira utya, tatata, dadada!» Nibaba bagenda, bazitura hasi, babirinduke, bavunike umugongo, bafatwe n’umutego ubutazawuvamo." 
Isaiah28:14 Nuko rero, nimutege amatwi ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwe bashungerezi, bategeka uyu muryango w’i Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah28:15 Muravuga muti «Twagiranye isezerano n’urupfu, duhana igihango n’ab’ikuzimu. N’ubwo haza icyorezo gikaze nticyadushyikira, kuko dufite ikinyoma ho ubuhungiro, uburyarya bukaba ubwugamo bwacu.»" 
Isaiah28:16 Nyamara, Nyagasani Imana avuze atya: Dore nshyize muri Siyoni ibuye rikomeye, ibuye ry’insanganyarukuta kandi ry’agaciro gakomeye, kugira ngo ribabere ifatizo. Uzaryishingikiriza wese, nta bwo azanyeganyega." 
Isaiah28:17 Ubutungane buzambera inago yo gupimisha, ubutabera bumbere imbaho y’amazi. Urubura ruzakubura ubuhungiro bw’ikinyoma, amazi ahitane ubwugamo bwanyu." 
Isaiah28:18 Isezerano ryanyu n’Urupfu rizasibangana, igihango cyanyu n’ikuzimu ntikizafata. Icyorezo gikaze rero nikiza, kizabayogoze." 
Isaiah28:19 Buri gihe uko kije kizabageraho, kuko kizahita buri gitondo, ku manywa na nijoro, igihe muzacyumva muzagira ubwoba bukabije." 
Isaiah28:20 Uburiri buzaba bugufi, ku buryo umuntu atarambya, ikiringiti kibe gito, ku buryo yiyorosa ntikimukwire." 
Isaiah28:21 Uhoraho agiye guhaguruka, uko yabigenje ku musozi wa Perasimu, arakare nko mu kibaya cya Gibewoni, kugira ngo arangize igikorwa cye kidasanzwe, asoze umurimo we w’agatangaza." 
Isaiah28:22 None rero, ntimukongere ukundi kumuseka, hato ingoyi zanyu zitarushaho kubakanaga, kuko Nyagasani, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, ambwiye ko yamaze gufata umugambi wo kurimbura igihugo cyose." 
Isaiah28:23 Nimutege amatwi munyumve! Nimwitonde, mwumve amagambo yanjye!" 
Isaiah28:24 Mbese umuhinzi ujya guhinga umurima we, amarira igihe cye cyose mu kurima, gutabira, cyangwa se mu gucoca amasinde gusa?" 
Isaiah28:25 Ntageza aho agasanza ubutaka bwe, hanyuma akabibamo umurama w’icyatsi gihumura neza, ingano nini n’inkori, n’andi moko yose y’imbuto, n’ibigori ku ruhande." 
Isaiah28:26 Nuko rero, Imana ni yo imwerekera, ikamwigisha." 
Isaiah28:27 Icyatsi gihumura neza ntigihurishwa imashini, cyangwa ngo gihonyozwe inziga z’amagare, ahubwo icyatsi gihumura neza gihurishwa ikibando kigahonyozwa inshyimbo." 
Isaiah28:28 Ingano se zo zihurwa ku buhe buryo? Iyo bazihura ntibazisya burundu, bazinyuza hejuru imashini n’igare riyikurura, ariko bakirinda kuzimenagura." 
Isaiah28:29 Ibyo na byo bikomoka kuri Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, wigaragaza nk’umujyanama mwiza, n’umuhanga mu kumenya gukora." 
Isaiah29:1 Yewe Ariyeli, Ariyeli! Wowe murwa Dawudi yigaruriye! Murangize umwaka, mufatire undi, n’iminsi mikuru muyikorere igihe cyayo," 
Isaiah29:2 ariko amaherezo nzahana Ariyeli; izasigare irangwa n’amarira n’imiborogo. Kuri jye, izaba imeze nk’urutambiro batwikiraho ibitambo." 
Isaiah29:3 Nk’uko Dawudi yabigize, nanjye nzashinga ingando impande zawe zose, nzakuzengurutseho ibikudindiza, nkurundeho ibyuma bigusenyure." 
Isaiah29:4 Umaze kugwa uzavugira hasi; nuvuga, ijwi ryawe rijwigire rizamuke mu mukungugu, rivugire mu butaka rijwigira, rizamuke ikuzimu boshye iry’umuzimu." 
Isaiah29:5 Abanzi bawe batabarika bazatumuka nk’umukungugu, abanyagitugu bamere nk’umurama utwawe n’umuyaga." 
Isaiah29:6 Ako kanya, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, azahita akurenganura, amanutse mu muhindagano w’inkuba, mu mutingito, mu rusaku rukomeye, no mu nkubi y’umuyaga, mu muhengeri no mu ndimi z’umuriro utwika." 
Isaiah29:7 Ubwo imbaga y’abantu batabarika izaba iteye Ariyeli, abazaba bakurwanya, abakugose n’abagushikamiye, bizababere urujijo, nk’inzozi za nijoro." 
Isaiah29:8 Bizabamerera nk’umushonji urota arya, nyamara akaramukana inzara, cyangwa uwishwe n’inyota, akarota anywa, ariko akaramuka ananiwe n’umuhogo wumiranye. Ni ko bizagendekera n’iyo mbaga y’abantu, izaba irwanya umusozi wa Siyoni." 
Isaiah29:9 Nimutangare kandi mwumirwe, muhinduke impumyi ubudahunyeza, mube abasinzi, ariko mutasomye kuri divayi, mudandabirane, ariko mutanyoye ibisindisha," 
Isaiah29:10 kuko Uhoraho yabasutseho umwuka ubasinziriza, akabahuma amaso, mwe bahanuzi, agapfuka imitwe yanyu, mwe bashishozi." 
Isaiah29:11 Ibi mweretswe, bibabereye nk’amagambo y’umuzinge ufungishije kashe, bahereje umuntu uzi gusoma bamubwira bati «Soma ibi ngibi», we agasubiza ati «Sinabishobora, kuko umuzinge ufungishije kashe.»" 
Isaiah29:12 Noneho bawuhereza utazi gusoma bamubwira bati «Soma ibi ngibi», arasubiza ati «Nta bwo nzi gusoma.»" 
Isaiah29:13 Uhoraho aravuga ati «Uyu muryango unyubahisha ururimi gusa, bakampesha ikuzo iminwa misa, ariko umutima wabo ukaba kure yanjye. Icyubahiro bampa ni icyahimbwe n’abantu, kimeze nk’isomo bigishijwe." 
Isaiah29:14 Ni cyo gitumye ngiye gukomeza kuwubera urujijo, ku buryo ubuhanga bw’abahanga babo buzazima, n’ubwenge bw’abanyabwenge babo bukajijwa.»" 
Isaiah29:15 Baragowe, abakorera mu bwihisho, bagakinga Uhoraho imigambi yabo, bakagambana mu mwijima, bavuga bati «Ni nde utubona cyangwa se ngo atumenye?»" 
Isaiah29:16 Mbega ngo muracurika ibintu! Umubumbyi se ushobora kumufata nk’ibumba? Noneho se, igikoresho cyabwira uwagikoze kiti «Nta bwo ari wowe wankoze!» Ikibindi kikabwira uwakibumbye kiti «Wamaze iki?»" 
Isaiah29:17 Bigenze bityo se, mu gihe gito ishyamba rya Libani ntiryaba ryahindutse umurima w’imbuto ziribwa, naho umurima w’imbuto ziribwa ugahinduka ishyamba?" 
Isaiah29:18 Uwo munsi, ibipfamatwi bizumva amagambo y’igitabo, n’impumyi zizasohoke mu mwijima w’icuraburindi, maze zibone." 
Isaiah29:19 Abaciye bugufi bazarushaho kwishimira Uhoraho, n’abakene banezerwe kubera Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Isaiah29:20 Kuko uwo munsi uzaba ari iherezo ry’abategetsi b’abagome, abashungerezi bagakozwa isoni, n’abashaka gukora nabi bose bakarimburwa." 
Isaiah29:21 Bizagendekera bityo abagambanira abandi mu mvugo yabo, abatega abandi imitego mu manza, n’aboshya intungane gukora nabi." 
Isaiah29:22 Ni cyo gitumye Uhoraho, Imana y’inzu ya Yakobo, we warokoye Abrahamu, avuze atya: Umuryango wa Yakobo ntuzongera gukozwa isoni ukundi, n’uruhanga rwe ntiruzongera kwijima." 
Isaiah29:23 Kuko abana babo, babonye ibyo nakoreye muri bo, bazatagatifuza izina ryanjye, batagatifuze Nyirubutagatifu wa Yakobo, bityo bazatinye Imana ya Israheli." 
Isaiah29:24 Imitima yahabye izahabuka, n’abatavaga ku izima bemere kwigishwa." 
Isaiah30:1 Uhoraho avuze atya: Baragowe, abana b’ibirara! Bo bacura imigambi itanturutseho, bakagirana amasezerano anyuranyije n’ayanjye, bityo bakagereka icyaha ku kindi." 
Isaiah30:2 Baramanuka bakajya mu Misiri batangishije inama, bagashakira ubuhungiro mu ngoro ya Farawo, n’ubwihisho mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Isaiah30:3 Nyamara, ubwo buhungiro bwo kwa Farawo buzabakoza isoni, ubwihisho bwo mu gihugu cya Misiri, bubatere ikimwaro," 
Isaiah30:4 n’ubwo abatware banyu bari i Tanisi, n’intumwa zanyu zikaba zigeze i Hanesi." 
Isaiah30:5 Bose bazakorwa n’isoni, kubera icyo gihugu cy’imburakamaro bisunze, kidashobora kubarengera cyangwa kugira ikindi cyabamarira, uretse kubamwaza no kubatukisha." 
Isaiah30:6 Iteka ryaciriwe ku bikoko by’i Negevu: Mu gihugu giteye ubwoba, kandi cyuje umubabaro, igihugu gituwe n’intare y’ingore n’iy’ingabo, kigaturwa n’inzoka z’impiri, n’ibiyoka biguruka, ni ho banyujije ubukungu n’ubutunzi bwabo babuhekesheje indogobe n’ingamiya, babushyiriye igihugu kitabafitiye akamaro." 
Isaiah30:7 Inkunga ya Misiri isa n’umuyaga nta cyo iteze kubamarira, ni cyo gitumye icyo gihugu nkita «Igitero kidashyiguka»." 
Isaiah30:8 None rero, genda ubyandikire imbere yabo ku kabaho, ubyandukuremo inyandiko ebyiri, bizabere intangamugabo izahoraho abo mu bihe bizaza." 
Isaiah30:9 Koko ni umuryango wivumbagatanyije, ni abana b’indyarya, kandi badashaka kumva amategeko y’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah30:10 Babwira abashishozi bati «Ntimushishoze», n’abahanuzi bati «Ntimuhanure ibiri ukuri, nimutubwire gusa ibidushimisha, muhanure ibitagira shinge." 
Isaiah30:11 Nimuhindukire, mureke gukurikira inzira iboneye, nimudukuremo Uwo Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli.»" 
Isaiah30:12 None rero, Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli avuze atya: Kuko muhinyuye iri jambo, mukaba mwiringiye ubucabiranya, mukishingikiriza amatiku," 
Isaiah30:13 icyo cyaha kizababere nk’umututu wiyashije mu rukuta rurerure: uwo mututu ugakomeza kwiyongera, nuko mu kanya gato, urukuta rukariduka." 
Isaiah30:14 Bikamera nk’ikibindi cy’umubumbyi kijanjagurikamo utujanju dutoya tutazasubirana, ku buryo mu tumene twacyo batabonamo n’urujyo, rwo kurahura umuriro wo gucana mu nzu, cyangwa rwo kudahisha amazi mu iriba." 
Isaiah30:15 Nyagasani Uhoraho, Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli avuze atya: Muzakizwa n’uko mungarukiye kandi mugacisha make. Muzaterwa imbaraga n’uko mutuje kandi mukanyizera. Ariko mwe, ntimubikozwa!" 
Isaiah30:16 Ahubwo muravuga muti «Ibyo nta cyo bitwaye! Tuzurira amafarasi duhunge.» Ni byo koko, ariko nyine muzaba muhunze. Mukongera muti «Tuzafata amagare anyaruka.» Na byo ni byo, ariko abazaba babakurikiranye, bazihuta kubarusha." 
Isaiah30:17 Umuntu umwe azirukana abantu igihumbi muri mwe, abantu batanu bazaba bahagije, babirukane muhunge, kugeza ubwo hazasigara bake muri mwe, mbese nk’igiti gihagaze ku kanunga k’umusozi, gisigaye ari cyo kimenyetso cyonyine iyo mu mpinga." 
Isaiah30:18 Nyamara, Uhoraho ategereje ko igihe kigera akabibuka, agiye guhaguruka, kugira ngo abagaragarize impuhwe ze, kuko Uhoraho ari Imana itabera: barahirwa abamwiringira bose!" 
Isaiah30:19 Ni byo koko, mbaga y’i Siyoni, mwebwe abatuye i Yeruzalemu, ntimuzongera kurira ukundi. Igihe muzaba mumutakambiye, azabibuka; nabumva, azaherako abasubiza." 
Isaiah30:20 Mu makuba, azabaha umugati; abahe amazi igihe cy’amage. Ugomba kukwigisha ntazongera kwihisha ukundi, uzamwirebera n’amaso yawe." 
Isaiah30:21 Igihe uzaba ugomba kugana iburyo cyangwa ibumoso, amatwi yawe azumva ijwi rivuga inyuma yawe riti «Dore inzira, nimube ari yo munyuramo.»" 
Isaiah30:22 Uzahinyura feza isizwe ku mashusho yawe y’amabazanyo, na zahabu yo ku bigirwamana byawe byashongeshejwe. Uzabijugunya nk’ibintu byanduye, ubibwira uti «Hoshi! Nimuve aho!»" 
Isaiah30:23 Uhoraho azagusha imvura mu myaka uzaba wabibye mu butaka, buzarumbuke umusaruro utubutse kandi ushimishije. Uwo munsi, amatungo yawe azabona inzuri ngari arishamo," 
Isaiah30:24 ibimasa n’indogobe bihingishwa birye ubwatsi buryohereye, bwabikanywe isuku." 
Isaiah30:25 Ku munsi w’icyorezo iminara yose izahirima, ku misozi yose no ku tununga twose hazavubuka amasoko menshi y’amazi." 
Isaiah30:26 Igihe Uhoraho azaba yapfutse ibisebe by’umuryango we, akomora ibikomere byawo, urumuri rw’ukwezi ruzaka nk’urw’izuba, naho urw’izuba rwikube karindwi, nk’aho rwabaye urumuri rw’iminsi irindwi." 
Isaiah30:27 Ngaha Uhoraho araje aturutse kure, afite uburakari bugurumana kandi bukaze, iminwa ye yuzuye umujinya, ururimi rwe rumeze nk’umuriro utwika." 
Isaiah30:28 Umwuka we ni nk’uruzi rwakutse, amazi akuzura akagera mu ijosi. Aje kunyuza amahanga mu kayunguruzo gatsemba, abacishe umukoba mu rwasaya, kugira ngo abayobye bajye iyo badashaka." 
Isaiah30:29 Ubwo muzaririmba nko mu gitaramo cy’umunsi mukuru, imitima inezerwe, boshye umuntu ukurikiye ijwi ry’umwirongi, agana ku musozi w’Uhoraho, ku rutare rwa Israheli." 
Isaiah30:30 Uhoraho azumvikanisha ijwi rye ry’icyubahiro, bazabone ukuntu ukuboko kwe gukubitanye uburakari bukaze, mu kirimi cy’umuriro utwika, no mu murindi w’imvura y’amahindu." 
Isaiah30:31 Ashuru izahindishwa umushyitsi n’ijwi ry’Uhoraho, uzabakubitisha ikiboko." 
Isaiah30:32 Uko Uhoraho azajya ayikubita inkoni, ni na ko hazumvikana amajwi y’ingoma n’inanga; nabangura ukuboko kwe, abatsembe." 
Isaiah30:33 Icyocyezo cyarangiye kare gutegurwa, — ndetse kigenewe n’umwami ubwe — cyateguwe ahantu hagari kandi harehare; inkwi nyinshi cyane zo gucanisha umuriro, zarunzwe hamwe ku ruziga. Umwuka w’Uhoraho, umeze nk’ikibatsi cy’umuriro, ni wo uzakongeza icyo cyocyezo." 
Isaiah31:1 Baragowe! Abamanuka bajya mu Misiri gutabaza! Barishingikiriza amafarasi, bakiringira amagare y’intambara kuko ari menshi, n’abanyamafarasi kuko ari abanyamaboko, ariko ntibite kuri Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli, ntibashakashake Uhoraho." 
Isaiah31:2 Nyamara ariko na we azi gushishoza: ashobora guteza amakuba, kandi ntiyivuguruze. Ahagurukiye gutera agatsiko k’abagome, n’abagiranabi bahururijwe gutabara." 
Isaiah31:3 Umunyamisiri ni umuntu, ariko si Imana, amafarasi ye ni inyamaswa zigenda, si imbaraga z’Imana. Igihe Uhoraho azaba abanguye ukuboko kwe, utabaye azasitara, naho utabawe yiture hasi, nuko bombi bahinduke ivu." 
Isaiah31:4 Dore rero uko Uhoraho yambwiye: Igihe intare cyangwa icyana cyayo itontomera ku muhigo, n’ubwo haba abashumba benshi bayihururijwe, ntikangwa na busa n’urusaku rwabo, cyangwa ngo icogozwe n’induru yabo. Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ni ko azamanukira kuri Siyoni, umusozi we, kugira ngo aharwanire." 
Isaiah31:5 Nk’uko ibisiga birambura amababa yabyo, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, azabigenza atyo, bityo arengere Yeruzalemu; azayirengera kandi ayitabare; azayirinda kandi ayikize." 
Isaiah31:6 Bayisraheli, nimugarukire Uwo mwagomeye!" 
Isaiah31:7 Uwo munsi, buri wese azajugunya ibigirwamana bye bya feza n’ibya zahabu, byakozwe n’ibiganza byanyu, bikabaviramo gucumura." 
Isaiah31:8 Ashuru izamarwa n’inkota itari nk’iy’umuntu, izarimburwa n’inkota y’Ubasumbye, ntizayihunga; maze abasore bayo bakoreshwe imirimo y’uburetwa." 
Isaiah31:9 Urutare rwayo ruzarimbuka, rushireho, abatware bayo bacike intege, batererane ibendera ryabo. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, we ucanye ikome ry’umuriro i Siyoni, n’itanura i Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah32:1 Nuko hazime umwami utegekana ubutabera, n’abatware bakurikira amategeko." 
Isaiah32:2 Buri muntu muri bo, azamera nk’ubuhungiro bw’umuyaga, n’ubwugamo igihe cy’imvura n’imirabyo. Bazamera nk’amazi atemba ku butaka bwumiranye, cyangwa igicucu cy’urutare runini, mu gihugu cy’ubutayu." 
Isaiah32:3 Amaso y’abashishozi ntazongera guhuma ukundi, n’amatwi y’abumva abahanuzi yumve kurushaho." 
Isaiah32:4 Abatatekerezaga, bazazirikana kugira ngo bumve, ab’ururimi rudidimanga, bavuge bwangu, kandi ku buryo bwumvikana." 
Isaiah32:5 Igipfamutima ntikizitwa umunyabuntu, n’indyarya ntizitwa umugiraneza." 
Isaiah32:6 Koko kandi, uw’igipfamutima avuga ibinyabasazi, mu mutima we agatekereza ibibi; akora ibidatunganye kandi agatuka Uhoraho, ntagaburire umushonji, cyangwa ngo ahe icyo kunywa ufite inyota." 
Isaiah32:7 Naho uw’indyarya yitwaza ubwicanyi; ashakisha amayeri yo kwicisha abanyabyago, ababeshyera, mu gihe abo bakene bo barwanaga ku burenganzira bwabo." 
Isaiah32:8 Ariko umunyabuntu atekereza ibitunganye, ntagire ikindi yakora, kitari igikorwa cyiza." 
Isaiah32:9 Bagore b’abadabagizi, nimuhaguruke munyumve! Bakobwa b’abapfayongo, nimutege amatwi ibyo ngiye kubabwira!" 
Isaiah32:10 Nyuma y’umwaka muzaba muhagaritse umutima, mwa bapfayongo mwe, kuko imizabibu yanyu izaba yararumbye, maze ntimugire n’icyo musarura." 
Isaiah32:11 Nimuhinde umushyitsi, mwa badabagizi mwe, namwe bapfayongo, muhagarike umutima; nimwiyambure imyambaro yanyu, mukenyere ibigunira!" 
Isaiah32:12 Muzikomanga ku gituza, muririra imirima yabanezezaga, n’imizabibu yanyu yarumbukaga." 
Isaiah32:13 Muzaririra ubutaka bw’umuryango wanjye, igihe buzaba bumeraho ibihuru by’amahwa, muririre n’amazu meza yose mwishimiragamo, mu murwa w’umunezero." 
Isaiah32:14 Kuko ingoro y’umwami yatereranywe, umugi wari utuwe, ukaba uhindutse amatongo. Akarere ka Ofeli n’umunara w’abarinzi bizaba iteka ryose ubuvumo bw’indogobe z’ishyamba, n’urwuri rw’amatungo..." 
Isaiah32:15 ... kugeza ko umwuka uturutse mu ijuru udusenderaho. Nuko ubutayu buhinduke ubusitani burumbuka, naho ubusitani burumbuka bwitwe ishyamba." 
Isaiah32:16 Ubutungane buzatura mu butayu, ubutabera buture mu busitani burumbuka." 
Isaiah32:17 Amahoro azaba imbuto y’ubutabera, ubutabera burumbuke ituze n’umutekano iteka ryose." 
Isaiah32:18 Umuryango wanjye uzatura ahantu h’amahoro, mu mazu akomeye, ahantu hatuje kandi h’uburuhukiro." 
Isaiah32:19 Ariko ishyamba rizarimburwa n’urubura, naho umugi usenyuke." 
Isaiah32:20 Murahirwa mwe muzaba mwarabibye imbuto ahari amazi hose, mukareka ibimasa n’indogobe bikishyira bikizana." 
Isaiah33:1 Uragowe! Wowe urimbura kandi utarabigiriwe; wowe ugwa abandi gitumo, kandi utarabikorewe. Igihe uzahosha kurimbura, nawe uzaherako urimburwa; igihe uzareka kugwa gitumo, nawe uzatungurwa." 
Isaiah33:2 Uhoraho, tugirire impuhwe! Turakwiringiye. Utubere imbaraga buri gitondo, n’agakiza igihe cy’amage." 
Isaiah33:3 Iyo uranguruye ijwi, ibihugu birahunga, wahaguruka, amahanga agatatana." 
Isaiah33:4 Iminyago bayirohaho, boshye inzige ziteye, ibyawe bakabyikwiza, boshye ibihore mu mirima." 
Isaiah33:5 Uhoraho arakuzwa, kuko atuye mu bushorishori bw’ijuru, akaba yarasendereje kuri Siyoni ubutungane n’ubutabera." 
Isaiah33:6 Bityo uzagira umutekano iminsi yawe yose; ubuhanga n’ubumenyi ni byo bukungu bukiza, kugirira Uhoraho igitinyiro, ngubwo ubukire bwawe!" 
Isaiah33:7 Dore abo mu mugi wa Ariyeli baraborogera mu mayira, intumwa z’amahoro zirarira zahogoye." 
Isaiah33:8 Imihanda nyabagendwa irimo ubusa, nta bagenzi bakirangwa mu mayira. Amasezerano yasheshwe, imigi yatereranywe, nta muntu n’umwe ukitaweho." 
Isaiah33:9 Igihugu kirababaye, cyahwereye. Imisozi ya Libani yamanjiriwe, irarabiranye. Ikibaya cy’i Sharoni kibaye ubutayu. Ibiti by’i Bashani n’iby’i Karumeli byakokotse." 
Isaiah33:10 None rero, Uhoraho avuze atya: Ngiye guhaguruka ubu nonaha, aka kanya ngiye kwemarara, ubu noneho ngiye gukuzwa." 
Isaiah33:11 Muzasama ibishogoshogo, mubyare ibyakatsi, umwuka wanyu ubabere umuriro ubatwika." 
Isaiah33:12 Amahanga azatwikwa nk’amatanura y’ishwagara, azakongoke, boshye amahwa yatemwe agashyirwa mu muriro." 
Isaiah33:13 Nimwumve ibyo nkoze, mwe abari kure; aba bugufi namwe, mumenye ko ndi umunyabubasha." 
Isaiah33:14 Muri Siyoni, abanyabyaha bagize ubwoba, abahemu barahinda umushyitsi, bakabazanya bati «Ni nde muri twe uzahangara uwo muriro utwika? Ni nde muri twe uzahangara iryo tanura ritazima?»" 
Isaiah33:15 — Ni umuntu ukurikiza ubutabera, akavuga ukuri, ni umuntu wanga amahugu, akigizayo abamushukisha amaturo, akica amatwi ngo atumva amagambo y’ubwicanyi, agahumbya amaso kugira ngo atareba ikibi." 
Isaiah33:16 Uwo ni we uzatura mu bushorishori, ibitare bikomeye bikazamubera ubwihisho, akazahabwa umugati, ntazabure n’amazi yo kunywa." 
Isaiah33:17 Amaso yawe azitegereza uburanga bw’Umwami, azarebe n’igihugu, mu bwisanzure bwacyo." 
Isaiah33:18 Uzazirikana ibyajyaga bigutera ubwoba, uvuge uti «Mbese ari hehe, uwanyinjaga? Ari ahagana he, uwangenzuraga? Uwabaruraga imigi ikomeye yagannye he?»" 
Isaiah33:19 Ntuzongera kubona ukundi ihanga ry’abanyagasuzuguro, ihanga ry’imvugo itumvikana, imvugo y’amanjwe kandi idasobanutse." 
Isaiah33:20 Itegereze Siyoni, umurwa w’iminsi mikuru yacu, amaso yawe narebe Yeruzalemu, ahantu h’ituze, ihema ritazasenywa ukundi, n’imambo zaryo ntizishingurwe, imigozi yaryo ntiyongere gupfundurwa." 
Isaiah33:21 Aho ni ho Uhoraho azatwerekera ikuzo rye, hakazaba akarere k’imigezi n’inzuzi ngari; ariko nta bwato bugashywa buzayanyuramo, nta n’amato manini azambuka ako karere." 
Isaiah33:22 Ni koko, Uhoraho ni we mucamanza wacu, ni we muyobozi wacu. Uhoraho ni we Mwami wacu, ni we gakiza kacu." 
Isaiah33:23 Imigozi yawe iradohotse, ntigifashe ku giti, bituma batagishobora ukundi kuzamura ibendera. Nuko bazagabane iminyago itagira ingano, ndetse n’abacumbagira bazayigireho umugabane." 
Isaiah33:24 Nta muturage uzongera kuvuga ati «Ndarwaye», imbaga yose ituye Yeruzalemu izababarirwa icyaha yakoze." 
Isaiah34:1 Mahanga, nimwegere kugira ngo mwumve, bihugu, namwe nimutege amatwi. Isi n’ibiyiriho byose, nibitege amatwi, kimwe n’ubutaka n’ibibumeraho byose." 
Isaiah34:2 Uhoraho yarakariye amahanga yose, yagiriye umujinya ingabo zayo zose. Yagambiriye kubarimbura, yarabatanze ngo bicwe." 
Isaiah34:3 Abapfuye babo bazajugunywa ku gasozi, imirambo yabo izatungure umunuko, n’imisozi itembeho amaraso yabo." 
Isaiah34:4 Ingabo zose z’ijuru zizayagara, ijuru ryizingazinge boshye umuzinge w’igitabo, ingabo zaryo zihanantuke nk’amababi y’umuzabibu, cyangwa se ay’umutini." 
Isaiah34:5 Uhoraho avuze atya: Inkota yanjye yo mu ijuru, narayuhiye irahaga, none ngiyo imanukiye kuri Edomu, kuri icyo gihugu natanze ngo kirimburwe." 
Isaiah34:6 Inkota y’Uhoraho yuzuye amaraso, yahaze urugimbu, n’amaraso y’intama n’ay’amasekurume, ibinure by’impyiko za rugeyo, kuko Uhoraho agiye gutambirwa igitambo i Bosira, ari cyo rupfu rw’icyorezo muri Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Imbogo, ibimasa n’amapfizi bizicirwa icyarimwe: igihugu cyabo gisindishwe n’amaraso, naho ubutaka buhage urugimbu." 
Isaiah34:8 Kuko ari umunsi w’ukwihorera k’Uhoraho, akaba ari umwaka wo kubitura ibibi bakoreye Siyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Imigezi yo muri Edomu izahinduka ubujeni, naho umukungugu uhinduke ubumara. Icyo gihugu cyose kizahinduka ubujeni bugurumana," 
Isaiah34:10 butazigera buzima, haba nijoro cyangwa se ku manywa, umwotsi wabwo uzacumbeka ubudahwema; uko ibihe biha ibindi, kizagumya kuba ubutayu, ntikizongera kugendwa ukundi." 
Isaiah34:11 Kizaba intaho y’ibihunyira n’ibinyogote, giturwe n’ibyanira n’ibikona. Uhoraho azakigeresha inago y’icyorezo, agipime cyose akiringanize, maze gihinduke ubusa." 
Isaiah34:12 Abanyacyubahiro ntibazongera kuhimika abami ukundi, nta n’abatware bazongera kuharangwa." 
Isaiah34:13 Ingoro zabo zizameramo amahwa, ibigo bikomeye bimeremo ibisura n’ibitovu, habe indiri y’ingunzu, n’imbuga ya za mbuni." 
Isaiah34:14 Inturo zizahahurira n’impyisi, hahinduke ibonaniro ry’ibikoko. Hazaba kandi intaho ya Liliti, ikazahabona uburuhukiro." 
Isaiah34:15 Ni ho inzoka izashyira icyari cyayo, ihatere amagi, iyararire, iyarinde kandi iyaturage. Ni na ho inkongoro zizakoranira, ingabo n’ingore zazo." 
Isaiah34:16 Nimushakashake mu gitabo cy’Uhoraho, musome aya magambo: «Nta n’imwe izabura muri zo, nta n’imwe izazimiza mugenzi wayo, kuko zitegekwa n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho, umwuka we ukazikoranyiriza hamwe." 
Isaiah34:17 Buri yose muri zo yayikoreyeho ubufindo, azigabanya igihugu akoresheje inago, zikazagitunga ubuziraherezo, zikazagituramo ingoma ibihumbi.»" 
Isaiah35:1 Ubutayu n’ubutaka bubi nibihimbarwe, amayaga anezerwe kandi arabye indabyo." 
Isaiah35:2 Natwikirwe n’indabyo zo mu mirima, nasabagire, abyine kandi atere urwamo rw’ibyishimo. Uhoraho yayagabiye ubwiza bw’imisozi ya Libani, uburabagirane bwa Karumeli n’ubwa Sharoni, kandi abantu bakazareba ikuzo ry’Uhoraho, ububengerane bw’Imana yacu." 
Isaiah35:3 Nimukomeze amaboko yananiwe, mutere imbaraga amavi adandabirana," 
Isaiah35:4 mubwire abakutse umutima, muti «Nimukomere, mwoye gutinya; dore Imana yanyu. Ije guhora abanzi banyu, ni cyo gihembo cyanyu. Iraje ubwayo kubakiza.»" 
Isaiah35:5 Nuko impumyi zizabone, n’ibipfamatwi bizumve." 
Isaiah35:6 Abacumbagira bazasimbuke nk’impara, n’iminwa y’ibiragi itere urwamo rw’ibyishimo. Ubutayu buzavubukamo amasoko, n’imigezi itembe ahantu h’amayaga." 
Isaiah35:7 Ubutaka butwika buzahinduka ikiyaga, akarere kishwe n’inyota, kavubukemo amasoko y’amazi, naho mu ndiri y’ingunzu, hazamere imbingo n’imfunzo." 
Isaiah35:8 Aho ngaho hazahangwa inzira, bayite inzira ntagatifu; uwahumanye ntazayinyuramo, kuko izagenerwa umuryango w’Uhoraho, kandi ab’ibipfamutima ntibazahacaracara." 
Isaiah35:9 Nta we uzayihuriramo n’intare, nta n’inyamaswa y’inkazi izayibonekamo. Abazaba ab’Uhoraho, ni bo bazayinyuramo." 
Isaiah35:10 Abakijijwe n’Uhoraho bazatahuka, bagere i Siyoni batera urwamo rw’ibyishimo. Ku ruhanga rwabo hazabengerana ibyishimo bitazashira, ibinezaneza n’umunezero bibasanganire, agahinda n’amaganya bizahunge." 
Isaiah36:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n’ine w’ingoma ya Hezekiya, Senakeribu, umwami w’Abanyashuru, atera imigi yose ikomeye yo mu gihugu cya Yuda, arayitsinda." 
Isaiah36:2 Umwami w’Abanyashuru wari i Lakishi, yohereza ku mwami Hezekiya, i Yeruzalemu, umufasha w’ingando we bwite, aherekejwe n’ingabo nyinshi. Baragenda, bagezeyo umufasha w’ingando ahagarara ku muhanda hafi y’umuyoboro w’amazi uyavana mu cyuzi cya ruguru ukayageza ku murima w’umumeshi." 
Isaiah36:3 Nuko umutegeka w’ingoro witwa Eliyakimu mwene Hilikiyahu, umwanditsi Shebuna, n’umunyamabanga w’umwami witwa Yowa mwene Asafu, barahamusanga." 
Isaiah36:4 Umufasha w’ingando wa Senakeribu arababwira ati «Nimugende mubwire Hezekiya, muti ’Umwami mukuru, ari we mwami w’Abanyashuru, arabajije ngo: Icyo wishingikirijeho ni iki?" 
Isaiah36:5 Uribwira ko amagambo atagira shinge ari yo uzakuraho inama n’ubutwari byo gushoza urugamba? Ni nde rero wishingikirije kugira ngo ube waranyivumbagatanyijeho? 
Isaiah36:6 Uwo wiringiye ubu — ari we Misiri — ameze nk’urubingo rwavunaguritse, maze rugasesereza ikiganza cy’urwishingikirijeho rukagikomeretsa. Uko ni ko Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, amerera abamwizera." 
Isaiah36:7 Ahari ubwo mwansubiza muti ’Uwo twishingikirijeho ni Uhoraho Imana yacu’, nyamara se si we Hezekiya yasenyeye amasengero y’ahirengeye n’intambiro zaho, agategeka Yuda na Yeruzalemu kujya bambariza imbere y’urutambiro rw’i Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah36:8 Ngaho tinyuka utege na databuja, umwami w’Abanyashuru, maze nzaguhe amafarasi ibihumbi bibiri niwibonera abantu bo kuyagenderaho!" 
Isaiah36:9 Ubwo washobora no gutsimbura n’umwe wo mu bagaragu boroheje ba databuja? Rero ngo wizeye ko Abanyamisiri bazaguha amagare n’abanyamafarasi! 
Isaiah36:10 Ubona ko naje gutera iki gihugu no kukiyogoza ntabitegetswe n’Uhoraho? Uhoraho ni we wambwiye ati ’Zamuka, utere kiriya gihugu, ukirimbure!’»" 
Isaiah36:11 Eliyakimu, Shebuna, na Yowa basubiza uwo mufasha wa Senakeribu, bati «Tubabarire utubwire, twebwe abagaragu bawe, mu rurimi rw’Abaramu kuko turwumva; woye kutuvugisha mu rw’Abayuda rwumvwa n’abantu bari hejuru y’urukuta.»" 
Isaiah36:12 Ariko umufasha w’ingando arabasubiza ati «Ubwo se murabona ko ayo magambo, databuja yantumye kuba ari mwe mwenyine nyabwira na shobuja gusa? Ntiyantumye ahubwo kuri aba bantu bicaye ku rukuta, bagiye kurya amabyi yabo bakarenzaho inkari zabo kimwe namwe?»" 
Isaiah36:13 Nuko umufasha w’ingando arahagarara avuga mu ijwi riranguruye mu rurimi rw’Abayuda, ati «Nimwumve amagambo y’umwami mukuru, umwami w’Abanyashuru!" 
Isaiah36:14 Umwami aravuze ngo ’Hezekiya ntakomeze kubashuka, kuko adashobora kubarokora." 
Isaiah36:15 Hezekiya ntababeshye ngo mwizere Uhoraho, avuga ngo: Nta shiti, Uhoraho azadukiza, uyu mugi ntuzigarurirwa n’umwami w’Abanyashuru." 
Isaiah36:16 Ntimwumve Hezekiya, kuko umwami w’Abanyashuru avuze ngo: Nimunsabe amahoro," 
Isaiah36:17 mungarukire, maze buri wese azarye imbuto z’imizabibu ye n’iz’imitini ye, anywe n’amazi yo mu kizenga cye, mu gihe mugitegereje ko nza nkabajyana mu gihugu kimeze nk’icyanyu, igihugu cyera ingano kikengerwamo divayi, igihugu kibamo imigati kikera n’imizabibu." 
Isaiah36:18 Nimureke kumva aya Hezekiya ubabwira ababeshya ngo: Uhoraho azabakiza! Hari ubwo imana z’abanyamahanga zigeze zishobora kugobotora ibihugu byabo mu maboko y’umwami wa Ashuru? 
Isaiah36:19 Imana z’i Hamati n’iz’i Arupadi ziri he? Iz’i Sefaruwayimu ziri he? Imana zo mu gihugu cya Samariya zo ziri hehe? Zashoboye se kurokora Samariya ikiganza cyanjye? 
Isaiah36:20 Ni izihe muri izo mana zose z’ibyo bihugu zabashije kugobotora ibihugu byazo mu ntoki zanjye, ngo bibe byakwemeza ko Uhoraho yakura Yeruzalemu mu maboko yanjye?»" 
Isaiah36:21 Bose baraceceka, ntibagira ijambo na rimwe bamusubiza kuko umwami yari yategetse ati «Ntimumusubize.»" 
Isaiah36:22 Umutegeka w’ingoro Eliyakimu, mwene Hilikiyahu, umwanditsi Shebuna, na Yowa mwene Asafu wari umunyamahanga, bagaruka bashishimuye imyambaro yabo, basanga Hezekiya, bamutekerereza ibyo umufasha w’ingando yababwiye byose." 
Isaiah37:1 Umwami Hezekiya amaze kubyumva ashishimura imyambaro ye, yambara ibigunira, hanyuma ajya mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah37:2 Ubwo yohereza umutegeka w’ingoro Eliyakimu, umwanditsi Shebuna n’abakuru bo mu baherezabitambo, bose bari bambaye ibigunira, basanga umuhanuzi Izayi mwene Amosi," 
Isaiah37:2 Ubwo yohereza umutegeka w’ingoro Eliyakimu, umwanditsi Shebuna n’abakuru bo mu baherezabitambo, bose bari bambaye ibigunira, basanga umuhanuzi Izayi mwene Amosi," 
Isaiah37:3 baramubwira bati «Hezekiya yadutumye ngo uyu munsi ni umunsi w’umubabaro, w’igihano n’ugushinyagurirwa. Abana bageze igihe cyo kuvuka, ariko ba nyina ntibafite imbaraga zo kubabyara!" 
Isaiah37:4 Uwazana ngo Uhoraho Imana yawe yumve amagambo yavuzwe n’umufasha w’ingando, ayatumwe n’umwami w’Abanyashuru, ngo atuke Imana nzima. Icyazana ngo Uhoraho Imana yawe abahanire ayo magambo yumvise! Ngaho takambira Uhoraho, usabira aka gasigisigi kagihumeka!»" 
Isaiah37:5 Abagaragu b’umwami Hezekiya basanga Izayi," 
Isaiah37:6 arababwira ati «Ubutumwa muza kugeza kuri shobuja ni uko Uhoraho avuze ati ’Ntuterwe ubwoba n’amagambo wumvanye abagaragu b’umwami w’Ashuru, n’ibitutsi bantutse." 
Isaiah37:7 Ngiye kumushyiramo undi mutima, yumve inkuru ituma asubira mu gihugu cye, maze nagerayo nzamwicishe inkota.’»" 
Isaiah37:8 Umufasha w’ingando aratahuka, amenye ko umwami w’Abanyashuru yavuye i Lakishi, amusanga i Libuna aho yarwaniraga." 
Isaiah37:9 Koko rero, umwami w’Abanyashuru yari yumvise inkuru yerekeye Tiruhaka, umwami wa Kushi, ivuga ngo «Dore yakoranyije ingabo zo kukurwanya!» Umwami w’Abanyashuru yongera gutuma kuri Hezekiya, ngo bamubwire bati" 
Isaiah37:10 «Imana yawe wizera cyane ntizagushuke ngo ikwizeze, ikubwira ko Yeruzalemu itazafatwa n’umwami w’Abanyashuru." 
Isaiah37:11 Wowe ubwawe, wiyumviye uko abami b’Abanyashuru bagenjeje ibihugu byose, barabirimbuye; none se ni wowe uzarokoka?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ubwo abasokuruza banjye barimburaga imigi ya Gozani, Harani, Resefu, na bene Edeni bari i Telasari, hari ubwo imana zabo zabakijije?" 
Isaiah37:13 Umwami w’i Hamati, uw’Arupadi, uw’i Layini, uw’i Sefaruwayimu, uw’i Hena n’uwa Hiwa ubu bari hehe?»" 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekiya yakira ibaruwa ayishyikirijwe n’intumwa, arayisoma, hanyuma arazamuka ajya mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho. Aramburira iyo baruwa imbere y’Uhoraho," 
Isaiah37:15 maze asenga Uhoraho, agira ati" 
Isaiah37:16 «Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, Mana ya Israheli, wowe wicaye ku bakerubimu, ni wowe Mana wenyine y’abami bose bo ku isi, kuko ari wowe waremye ijuru n’isi." 
Isaiah37:17 Uhoraho, tega amatwi maze wumve; rambura amaso maze witegereze, wumve amagambo ya Senakeribu wohereje abaza gutuka Imana nzima." 
Isaiah37:18 Mu by’ukuri koko, Uhoraho, abami b’Abanyashuru barimbuye abanyamahanga n’ibihugu byabo," 
Isaiah37:19 batwika imana zabo kuko zitari Imana y’ukuri, ahubwo ari amashusho yabajwe n’intoki z’abantu mu biti no mu mabuye, bituma Abanyashuru babirimbura." 
Isaiah37:20 None rero, wowe Uhoraho, Mana yacu, tugobotore mu nzara za Senakeribu, kugira ngo abami bose bo ku isi bamenye ko wowe, Uhoraho, ari wowe Mana wenyine!»" 
Isaiah37:21 Nuko Izayi mwene Amosi atuma kuri Hezekiya, agira ati «Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli aravuze ngo ’Kubera isengesho wangejejeho ku byerekeye Senakeribu, umwami w’Abanyashuru," 
Isaiah37:21 Nuko Izayi mwene Amosi atuma kuri Hezekiya, agira ati «Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli aravuze ngo ’Kubera isengesho wangejejeho ku byerekeye Senakeribu, umwami w’Abanyashuru," 
Isaiah37:22 dore icyo Uhoraho amutangajeho: Umwari, umukobwa w’i Siyoni aragusuzuguye, aragusetse; Umukobwa w’i Yeruzalemu akuzungurije umutwe ari inyuma yawe." 
Isaiah37:23 Ni nde watutse ukamwandagaza? Ni nde wavugishije umurebana agasuzuguro? Ni Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli! 
Isaiah37:24 Watutse Uhoraho ukoresheje abagaragu bawe, uvuga uti ’Mfashijwe n’amagare yanjye y’intambara atagira ingano, narazamutse ngera mu mpinga z’imisozi, mu mirenge itavogerwa yo hagati ya Libani, ntemayo amashami y’amasederi, n’imizonobari miremire cyane, ngera mu mpinga y’imisozi, no mu mashyamba ahatwikiriye." 
Isaiah37:25 Mu mahanga nahafukuye amariba, nywa amazi y’aho; nkamya inzuzi zose zo mu Misiri, nzikandagijemo ibirenge byanjye." 
Isaiah37:26 Rwose ntuzi ko uwo mugambi nari nywufite kuva kera kose, ko kuva kera na kare nari narawuteganyije, none nkaba ngiye kuwuzuza? Icyo wowe ushoboye, ni uguhindura amatongo iyo migi ikomeye." 
Isaiah37:27 Abaturage b’aho bafite intege nke, bakutse umutima, bashobewe; bameze nk’icyatsi cyo mu mirima, nk’akanyatsi ko mu busitani. Bameze nk’utwatsi tumera hejuru y’inzu, cyangwa se nk’ingano zirwaye zikiri nto." 
Isaiah37:28 Wowe ariko, waba wicaye, usohotse cyangwa winjiye, mba mbizi." 
Isaiah37:29 Ubwo rero wanyiteyeho hejuru, agasuzuguro kawe kakangeraho; amazuru yawe nzayafungisha icyuma, maze ngushyire umurunga mu kanwa, nzagutere gusubira iwawe, ngucishije mu nzira wanyuzemo uza.’»" 
Isaiah37:30 (Nuko Izayi arongera abwira Hezekiya ati) «Naho wowe, dore ikizakubera ikimenyetso: muri uyu mwaka muzarya ibyasigaye mu bibuba, umwaka ukurikiyeho murye ibyimejeje ubwabyo, ariko mu wa gatatu muzabiba, musarure, kandi muzatera imizabibu, murye imbuto zayo." 
Isaiah37:31 Abasigaye batishwe bo mu nzu ya Yuda, bazarokoka nk’igiti gishora imizi mu butaka, kikera imbuto mu mashami yacyo," 
Isaiah37:32 kuko i Yeruzalemu hazaduka agasigisigi, no ku musozi wa Siyoni hahinguke abazaba bacitse ku icumu. Ibyo bizaba bikozwe n’urukundo rukomeye rw’Uhoraho, umugaba w’ingabo.»" 
Isaiah37:33 Dore ibyo Uhoraho avugiye ku mwami w’Abanyashuru: Ntazinjira muri uyu murwa, ntazaharasa imyambi, ntazanategeka abitwaje ingabo kuwuhangara, n’imbere y’inkike zawo ntazaharunda igitaka." 
Isaiah37:34 Inzira yanyuze aza, ni yo izamusubizayo, ntazagera muri uyu murwa, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah37:35 Nzarinda uyu murwa nywukize, mbigiriye jye ubwanjye, n’umugaragu wanjye Dawudi." 
Isaiah37:36 Mu ijoro rikurikiyeho, Malayika w’Uhoraho araza yambukiranya ingando y’Abanyashuru, yicamo abantu ibihumbi ijana na mirongo inani na batanu. Mu gitondo bose bari babaye imirambo!" 
Isaiah37:37 Senakeribu, umwami w’Abanyashuru, arataha asubira mu murwa we i Ninivi, agumayo." 
Isaiah37:38 Umunsi umwe ari mu ngoro y’ikigirwamana cye Nisiroki asenga, abahungu be Adaramaleki na Saraseri baraza bamwicisha inkota, maze bahungira mu gihugu cya Ararati. Umuhungu we Esarihadoni amuzungura ku ngoma." 
Isaiah38:1 Muri iyo minsi, Hezekiya afatwa n’indwara ya simusiga. Umuhanuzi Izayi mwene Amosi aza kumureba, maze aramubwira ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo ’Raga abo mu rugo rwawe kuko ugiye gupfa, utazakira.’»" 
Isaiah38:1 Muri iyo minsi, Hezekiya afatwa n’indwara ya simusiga. Umuhanuzi Izayi mwene Amosi aza kumureba, maze aramubwira ati «Uhoraho aravuze ngo ’Raga abo mu rugo rwawe kuko ugiye gupfa, utazakira.’»" 
Isaiah38:2 Hezekiya yerekeza amaso ku rukuta asaba Uhoraho, agira ati" 
Isaiah38:3 «Ndagusabye, Uhoraho, ibuka ko nagenze imbere yawe n’umurava mwinshi kandi n’umutima utunganye, ngakora ibigushimishije.» Nuko Hezekiya asuka amarira menshi cyane." 
Isaiah38:4 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Izayi muri aya magambo: 
Isaiah38:5 Genda ubwire Hezekiya uti «Uhoraho, Imana ya sokuruza Dawudi aravuze ngo ’Numvise amasengesho yawe, mbona n’amarira yawe, none ngiye kugukiza, ndetse mu minsi itatu uzashobora kuzamuka ujye mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho. Nkongereyeho imyaka cumi n’itanu ku gihe wari kuzabaho." 
Isaiah38:6 Kandi nzagukiza wowe n’uyu murwa, mbagobotore mu nzara z’umwami w’Abanyashuru; nzarinde uyu murwa.’»" 
Isaiah38:7 Izayi aramusubiza ati «Dore ikimenyetso kizakwereka ko Uhoraho azuzuza Ijambo yavuze. 
Isaiah38:8 Igicucu kimanukira ku madarajya y’inzu yo hejuru ya Akhazi, ngiye kugisubiza inyuma ho intambwe cumi.» Nuko izuba risubirayo, maze cya gicucu gisubira inyuma ho za ntambwe cumi." 
Isaiah38:9 Dore igisigo Hezekiya, umwami wa Yuda, yahimbye amaze gukiruka ya ndwara ye." 
Isaiah38:10 Jyewe naribwiraga nti «Nari ncagashije iminsi y’ubugingo bwanjye, none ngaha ngiye kwinjira mu marembo ajya ikuzimu, nzahaheranwe mu gihe cyose nari nshigaje kubaho.»" 
Isaiah38:11 Naravugaga nti «Sinzabona Uhoraho ku isi y’abazima, no mu bantu batuye iyi si sinzongera kurabukwa n’umwe." 
Isaiah38:12 Inzu yanjye irashenywe, ijugunywe kure yanjye, ak’ihema ry’abashumba. Ngeze ku ndunduro y’ubuzima bwanjye, ak’umuboshyi umaze kuzuza umwenda, akawuzingazinga amaze kuwutotoraho indodo zisagutse;" 
Isaiah38:13 kuva mu gitondo kugeza nimugoroba waranyishe urahorahoza! Ncura imiborogo ngeza mu kindi gitondo. Ak’intare ikocagura amagufwa ni na ko amenagura ayanjye; kuva mu gitondo kugeza nimugoroba akanyica, agahorahoza!" 
Isaiah38:14 Dore ndajwigira kimwe n’intashya, nkaguguza nk’intungura, amaso yanjye arahondoberezwa no guhora ntumbiriye ijuru. Nyagasani ndagowe, ngwino untabare." 
Isaiah38:15 Ubu se mvuge iki kindi, kandi byose ari we ubikora? Mu gihe cyose nzaba nkiriho umutima wanjye uzahora usobetse amaganya." 
Isaiah38:16 Abo Nyagasani yiragiriye, abo bazaramba, kandi ubuzima bafite babuhabwa n’umwuka we; nanjye uzankiza maze umbesheho." 
Isaiah38:17 Ngaha ubujuganirwe bwanjye ubumpinduriyemo umunezero, ni wowe uzikuye amagara yanjye uyakura mu mva, n’ibyaha byanjye byose ubijugunya kure inyuma yawe." 
Isaiah38:18 Koko rero ikuzimu si ho haguha ikuzo, cyangwa se ngo urupfu rukwamamaze, n’abamanukira mu rwobo, ntibaba bacyizeye ubudahemuka bwawe." 
Isaiah38:19 Umuzima, ni we wenyine ugusingiza, nk’uko nanjye uyu munsi mbigenje. Umubyeyi azamenyesha abana be ubudahemuka bwawe." 
Isaiah38:20 Uhoraho, ngwino untabare, maze mu gihe cyose tuzaba tukiriho, tuzacurangire inanga zacu mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah38:21 Izayi aravuga ati «Nimuzane umugati wakozwe mu mbuto z’umutini, muwushyire ku bibyimba by’umwami azakira.»" 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiya abaza Izayi ati «Ni ikihe kimenyetso kizanyemeza ko nzashobora kuzamuka nkajya mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho?» 
Isaiah39:1 Muri icyo gihe Merodaki‐Baladani, umwami w’i Babiloni, atuma kuri Hezekiya kuko yari yumvise ko yarwaye ariko akaba yarorohewe, amwoherereza amabaruwa n’amaturo." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiya yakirana ibyishimo izo ntumwa, azereka ububiko bwe bwose, feza, zahabu, amavuta ahumura cyane, inzu yarimo intwaro zo kurwanisha, n’ibindi byo mu mutungo we wose; ntihagira ikintu na kimwe cyo mu nzu ye no mu gihugu cye gisigara atakizeretse." 
Isaiah39:3 Nuko umuhanuzi Izayi asanga Hezekiya, aramubaza ati «Bariya bantu bakubwiye iki, kandi bavaga he?» Hezekiya aramusubiza ati «Baje baturuka mu gihugu cya kure, cy’i Babiloni.»" 
Isaiah39:4 Izayi yongera kumubaza ati «Babonye iki mu ngoro yawe?» Hezekiya ati «Ibiri mu rugo rwanjye byose babibonye, nta kintu na kimwe mu byo ntunze ntaberetse.»" 
Isaiah39:5 Nuko Izayi abwira Hezekiya ati «Umva ijambo ry’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo!" 
Isaiah39:6 Hazaza igihe ibintu biri mu rugo rwawe, n’ibyo abasokuruza bahabitse kugeza ubu, byose bizajyanwa i Babiloni; nta na kimwe kizasigara, ni ko Uhoraho avuze." 
Isaiah39:7 Abenshi mu bana wibyariye, bazabajyana babahindure abakone bo kuba mu ngoro y’umwami w’i Babiloni.»" 
Isaiah39:8 Hezekiya abwira Izayi ati «Ijambo ry’Uhoraho uvuze ni ryiza.» Yaribwiraga ati «Mu gihe nzaba nkiriho hazabaho amahoro n’umudendezo.» 
Isaiah40:1 Nimuhumurize umuryango wanjye, nimuwuhumurize — ni ko Imana ivuze —" 
Isaiah40:2 nimukomeze Yeruzalemu; muyimenyeshe ko ubucakara bwayo burangiye, igihano cyayo kikaba gihanaguwe; Uhoraho yayihannye yihanukiriye, kubera amakosa yayo." 
Isaiah40:3 Ijwi rirarangurura riti «Nimutegure mu butayu inzira y’Uhoraho, muringanirize Imana yacu umuhanda ahantu h’amayaga." 
Isaiah40:4 Akabande kose gasibanganywe, umusozi wose n’akanunga kose bisizwe, n’imanga ihinduke ikibaya." 
Isaiah40:5 Nuko ikuzo ry’Uhoraho rizigaragaze, ibinyamubiri byose bizaribonere icyarimwe, bimenye ko Uhoraho yavuze.»" 
Isaiah40:6 Ijwi riravuga riti «Ngaho vuga!» Nanjye ndabaza nti «Mvuge iki se? Ibinyamubiri byose ni ibyatsi, imikomerere yabyo ikaba nk’iy’ururabyo mu murima:" 
Isaiah40:7 icyatsi kiruma, ururabyo rukarabirana, iyo umwuka w’Uhoraho ubinyuzeho. Ni byo koko, imbaga y’abantu ni icyatsi:" 
Isaiah40:8 icyatsi kiruma, ururabyo rukarabirana, ariko ijambo ry’Imana yacu rizahoraho iteka!»" 
Isaiah40:9 Naho wowe, zamuka ku musozi muremure, urangurure ijwi, wowe uzaniye Siyoni inkuru nziza, ntutinye, wowe ntumwa y’inkuru nziza igenewe Yeruzalemu! Rangurura ijwi ubwire imigi ya Yuda uti «Dore Imana yanyu!»" 
Isaiah40:10 Ni byo koko, dore Nyagasani Imana! Araje n’imbaraga nyinshi, afite amaboko, aje gutegeka; dore azanye n’iminyago, abo yatabaye bamubanje imbere." 
Isaiah40:11 Ameze nk’umushumba uragiye ubushyo, akabwegeranya n’ukuboko kwe; abana b’intama akabatwara mu gituza cye, intama z’imbyeyi akazemera mu rwuri rutoshye." 
Isaiah40:12 Ni nde wapimisha ikiganza cye amazi y’inyanja, ikirere akakigeresha intambwe y’intoki, agashyira mu kebo ubutaka bw’isi, imisozi akayishyira ku gipimo, n’udusozi akadupimisha umunzani?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ni nde wigeze gucengera ibitekerezo by’Uhoraho, akamubera umujyanama w’ingirakamaro?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ni nde muntu Uhoraho yaba yaragishije inama, agashobora kumuyobora, akamwigisha guca imanza, akamuha ubumenyi, akamwereka inzira imugeza ku bwenge?" 
Isaiah40:15 Dore amahanga ameze nk’igitonyanga kiva mu nyanja, aragerwa ku mukungugu wafashe ku munzani! Dore n’ibirwa bimeze nk’agafu ahushye!" 
Isaiah40:16 Amashyamba ya Libani ntahagije mu gucana umuriro, n’inyamaswa zayo ntizihagije ku bitambo bitwikwa." 
Isaiah40:17 Amahanga yose nta cyo avuze imbere ye; kuri we yose ni ubusa, nta n’icyo amaze." 
Isaiah40:18 Imana mwayinganya na nde, ni ikihe se mwayigereranya?" 
Isaiah40:19 Ikigirwamana se? Cyacuzwe n’umuntu! Ukora amashusho agitakaho zahabu, akagishyiraho n’imikufi ya feza."
