Isaiah40:20 Umutindi utabona ituro ringana rityo, ahitamo igiti kitamungwa, agashaka umubaji w’umuhanga, ushobora kumubariza ikigirwamana kitajegajega." 
Isaiah40:21 Ntimwari mubizi se? Nta n’ubwo mwigeze kumva bivugwa? Ntimwabimenyeshejwe se kuva mu ntangiriro? Ntimwigeze mumenya Uwahanze isi? 
Isaiah40:22 Aganje hejuru y’ikirere gitwikiriye isi, akabona abahatuye bameze nk’inzige! Yakuruye ikirere arakikingira nk’umwenda, akibamba nk’ihema kugira ngo arituremo." 
Isaiah40:23 Abategetsi b’igihugu abahindura amanjwe, n’abacamanza b’isi akabagira ubusabusa." 
Isaiah40:24 Nta kamaro kuba bashinze imizi, nta kamaro ko bakwira hose, nta kamaro ko imizi yabo ifata mu butaka, none dore umwuka urabahushye, ngaho barumiranye, na serwakira irabagurukanye nk’ibyatsi." 
Isaiah40:25 «Ni nde mwangereranya na we? Ni nde twaba duhwanye?» Uwo ni Nyir’ubutagatifu ubivuze. 
Isaiah40:26 Nimwubure amaso yanyu murebe: ni nde waremye biriya binyarumuri mubona, akabizengurutsa ikirere nk’ingabo ziyereka, akabihamagara byose mu mazina yabyo? Afite imbaraga nyinshi akagira n’umurego ukomeye, bigatuma nta na kimwe kibura." 
Isaiah40:27 Yewe Yakobo, yewe Israheli, ni kuki wavuga uti «Inzira yanjye yihishe Uhoraho, Imana yayobewe ibyanjye!»" 
Isaiah40:28 Mbese ntiwari ubizi? Nta n’ubwo wigeze kumva bivugwa? Uhoraho ni Imana y’ibihe byose, yaremye isi kuva aho itangirira n’aho iherera. Ntiyigeze ananirwa, nta n’ubwo acogora, nta buryo wacengera ubwenge bwe." 
Isaiah40:29 Umunyantege amuha imbaraga, agakomeza unaniwe." 
Isaiah40:30 Abakiri bato bacika intege, bagacogora, ndetse n’abagabo b’intwari bakagwa rwose." 
Isaiah40:31 Ariko abiringira Uhoraho, bazongera kubona imbaraga: bazatumbagira mu kirere nka za kagoma, biruke ubutananirwa; bihute, nta kudohoka!" 
Isaiah41:1 Nimuceceke imbere yanjye, mwa birwa mwe, amahanga niyiyongeremo imbaraga, yigire hino maze avuge. Nimuze dukoranire hamwe, tuburane!" 
Isaiah41:2 Ni nde wahagurukije umutabazi iburasirazuba, akamuhamagara ngo amube hafi, agatsinda amahanga imbere ye, abami akabacisha bugufi? Inkota ye ibahindura ivu, imyambi ye ikabakwiza hose, nk’ibyatsi bitwawe n’umuyaga," 
Isaiah41:3 ku buryo abakurikirana bose, akabanyuramo nta cyo yikanga, adakoza ibirenge hasi." 
Isaiah41:4 Ni nde wabigennye, akanabikora, akanakurikiranya ibisekuruza kuva mu ntangiriro? — Ni jyewe Uhoraho, nkaba n’Uwa mbere, kandi nzaba nkiri Jyewe no mu bihe by’abo hanyuma." 
Isaiah41:5 Ibirwa byarabirebye bigira ubwoba, abo mu mpera z’isi bahinda umushyitsi, batangiye guhaguruka ngo babikurikirire hafi." 
Isaiah41:6 Buri muntu arafasha mugenzi we, arabwira incuti ye ati «Komera!»" 
Isaiah41:7 Umubaji arakomeza ushongesha, usena agakomeza umucuzi, agira ati «Ni byiza rwose», ikigirwamana akagikomeresha imisimari, kugira ngo kitanyeganyega." 
Isaiah41:8 Ariko wowe Israheli, mugaragu wanjye, Yakobo nihitiyemo, inkomoko ya Abrahamu, incuti yanjye," 
Isaiah41:9 wowe nikomereje kuva ku mpera z’isi, nkaguhamagara kuva ku mipaka yayo, narakubwiye nti «Uri umugaragu wanjye; naragutoranyije, aho kugutererana.»" 
Isaiah41:10 Witinya, kuko ndi kumwe nawe, wikwiheba, kuko ndi Imana yawe. Ni byo rwose, ndagukomeje, ndagutabaye, nkuramize ukuboko kwanjye kurenganura." 
Isaiah41:11 Dore ngo barakorwa n’isoni, bakamwara, abari baguhagurukiye bose; bazahinduka amanjwe, barimbuke, abantu bakurakariye." 
Isaiah41:12 Abaguhigira uzabashakashaka, ariko ntuzongera kubabona ukundi, abakurwanya bazahinduka ubusabusa, bashire." 
Isaiah41:13 Kuko jye, Uhoraho, Imana yawe, ngufashe ukuboko kw’iburyo, nkakubwira nti «Witinya! Ni jye ugutabara!" 
Isaiah41:14 Witinya Yakobo, wowe bahonyora nk’akanyorogoto, witinya Israheli, n’ubwo ubu bakugereranya n’intumbi. Ni jye ugutabara — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Umuvunyi wawe ni Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Isaiah41:15 Dore nkugize imashini nshya icukura ubutaka kandi ifite amenyo asongoye, ugiye gutengagura imisozi, uyishwanyaguze, n’udusozi uduhindure umurama." 
Isaiah41:16 Uzayigosora itwarwe n’umuyaga, maze serwakira iyinyanyagize. Naho wowe uzasingiza Uhoraho, uhimbarwe kubera Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Isaiah41:17 Abasuzuguwe n’abatishoboye bashakashaka amazi, ariko bikaba iby’ubusa, ururimi rwabo rukumirana kubera inyota; ni jye Uhoraho, uzabasubiza, jyewe Imana ya Israheli, sinzabatererana." 
Isaiah41:18 Nzavubura inzuzi ku misozi itameraho akatsi, mu mikokwe hadudubize amasoko, ubutayu buhinduke ikidendezi, n’ubutaka bwumiranye buhinduke amariba." 
Isaiah41:19 Nzameza amasederi mu butayu, iminyinya, ibiti bihumura n’imitini; ahantu h’amayaga mpatere imizonobari, imisave n’imigenge bikurire hamwe," 
Isaiah41:20 bityo abantu barebe kandi bamenye, bigishanye kandi bumve, ko ari ikiganza cy’Uhoraho cyabikoze, ko ari Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli wabiremye." 
Isaiah41:21 Ngaho (bigirwamana by’amahanga), nimugaragaze ingingo zanyu, ni ko Uhoraho avuze. Nimukomeze mwisobanure, uwo ni Umwami wa Yakobo ubivuga." 
Isaiah41:22 Nimuze maze mutumenyeshe ibigiye kuba. Mbese ibyo mwahanuye mbere byahereye he? Nimudusubirire mu byahanuwe, maze tubyibuke, kandi tumenyereho uko byagenze! Cyangwa se, nimutubwire ibigiye kuza," 
Isaiah41:23 mutumenyeshe iby’ibihe bizaza, maze twemere koko ko muri imana! Ngaho se! Nimuhitemo icyo mushaka kuduteza ari amahirwe cyangwa ibyago, maze dutangarire ubushobozi bwanyu!" 
Isaiah41:24 Nyamara dore icyo muri cyo: murarutwa n’ubusa; ibikorwa byanyu na byo bikaba ari nta byo! Uwabigize imana ze, na we ni igipfamutima!" 
Isaiah41:25 Naho jyewe, nahagurukije umuntu mu majyaruguru, kandi ngaha araje. Kuva mu burasirazuba arahamagarwa mu izina rye; aravuyanga abategetsi nk’uribata icyondo, cyangwa nk’umubumbyi ukata ibumba." 
Isaiah41:26 Ni nde rero wabimenyekanyije kuva mu ntangiriro, kugira ngo tubimenye, cyangwa se akaba yarabivuze no mu bihe byahise, ngo tuvuge tuti «Ni byo koko»? Reka da! Nta n’umwe muri mwe wabishoboye! Oya rwose, nta wigeze abicisha mu ijwi, kandi nta n’uwigeze agira icyo abumvana!" 
Isaiah41:27 Ni jye wabanje kubitangaza muri Siyoni, nti «Dore ngabo!» I Yeruzalemu mpohereza intumwa, izanye Inkuru nziza." 
Isaiah41:28 Naritegereje neza: sinabona umuntu n’umwe, sinagira n’umwe mbona muri bo, wambera umujyanama! Mba narabagishije inama, na bo bakampa igisubizo!" 
Isaiah41:29 Dore bose uko bangana ni imburaburyo. Ibikorwa byabo se byo? Ni impfabusa. Ibishushanyo byabo? Ni umuyaga, nta kamaro!" 
Isaiah42:1 Dore umugaragu wanjye nshyigikiye, intore yanjye inyizihira. Namushyizeho umwuka wanjye; azagaragariza amahanga ubutabera," 
Isaiah42:2 ntazasakuza kandi ntazatera ijwi hejuru, ntazumvikanisha ijwi rye mu mayira." 
Isaiah42:3 Ntazavuna urubingo rwarabiranye, ntazazimya ifumba igicumbeka, kandi nta kabuza, azagaragaza ubutabera." 
Isaiah42:4 We ntazigera acogora, cyangwa ngo acike intege, kugeza ubwo azaba yamaze gukwiza ubutabera ku isi, n’ibirwa bitegereje amategeko ye." 
Isaiah42:5 Nguko uko avuze Uhoraho, Imana, we waremye ijuru akaribambika, akarambura isi n’ibiyiriho byose, ibiyimeraho akabiha guhumeka, agaha n’umwuka abayigendaho bose." 
Isaiah42:6 Ni jye Uhoraho, wakwihamagariye, nkurikije umugambi wanjye, ngufata ikiganza, ndakwizigamira, nkugenera kwemararira isezerano ry’imbaga, no kuba urumuri rw’amahanga," 
Isaiah42:7 kugira ngo uhumure amaso y’impumyi, uvane imfungwa mu nzu y’imbohe, kandi ukure mu munyururu abari mu mwijima." 
Isaiah42:8 Ni jye, Uhoraho, iryo ni ryo zina ryanjye, ikuzo ryanjye nkaba ntazagira undi ndiha, cyangwa ibigirwamana ngo mbihe ibisingizo bingenewe." 
Isaiah42:9 Dore ibyabaye mbere byarahise, jye kandi mbamenyesheje ibishya, ndabiberetse ngo mubimenye mbere y’uko biba." 
Isaiah42:10 Nimuririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nshya, kuva ku mpera z’isi, muririmbe ibisingizo bye, mwebwe bantu bo ku nyanja n’ibiyirimo byose, namwe birwa kimwe n’ababituye." 
Isaiah42:11 Ubutayu buhanike amajwi, kimwe n’imigi yabwo, hamwe n’imidugudu Kedari atuyemo; abaturage b’i Sela bamusingize, abo mu tununga tw’imisozi basabagizwe n’ibyishimo." 
Isaiah42:12 Nibakuze Uhoraho, bamamarize mu birwa ibisingizo bye!" 
Isaiah42:13 Uhoraho agiye gusohoka nk’intwari, azinze umunya nk’ingabo iri ku rugamba, avugije akamo k’impuruza, aratontomye, kandi ateye abanzi be nk’umurwanyi w’intwari." 
Isaiah42:14 «Namaze igihe kirekire nicecekeye, ndiyumanganya sinagira icyo mvuga; narashinyirije ndetse umwuka urahera, boshye umugore uri ku nda." 
Isaiah42:15 Noneho ngiye kurimbura imisozi n’udusozi, ibyayimezeho byose mbyumishe; inzuzi nzazihindura ibirwa, ibizenga by’amazi mbyumutse." 
Isaiah42:16 Nzayobora impumyi mu nzira zitamenyereye, nzinyuze mu tuyira zitazi. Nzahindura umwijima mo urumuri imbere yabo, n’inzira ziyobaguritse, zigororwe. Iyo migambi ngiye kuyirangiza, kandi sinteze kuyireka na rimwe.»" 
Isaiah42:17 Ngabo basubiranye inyuma ikimwaro, abashyira amiringiro yabo mu bigirwamana, bakabwira ubutare bushongeshejwe bati «Imana zacu ni mwebwe!»" 
Isaiah42:18 Mwe bipfamatwi, nimwumve, impumyi namwe nimwitegereze, mubone!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ni nde mpumyi, uretse umugaragu wanjye? Ni nde gipfamatwi atari intumwa ngiye kohereza? Ni nde mpumyi atari icyegera cyanjye? Ni nde gipfamatwi atari umugaragu w’Uhoraho?" 
Isaiah42:20 Wabonye byinshi, ariko nta cyo wafashe; ufite amatwi azibutse, ariko ntiwumva!" 
Isaiah42:21 Kubera ukudahemuka k’umugambi we, Uhoraho yashatse ko amategeko ye akomera, akaba akataraboneka." 
Isaiah42:22 Ariko dore imbaga yanyazwe ibyayo, irasenyerwa, bose babaroshye mu myobo, babahisha no mu mazu y’imbohe; babaye abo kujyanwa bunyago, babuze n’umwe wabarengera, barashimutwa, habura n’uwagira ati «Bangarurire!»" 
Isaiah42:23 Ni nde muri mwe uri butege amatwi aya magambo, akitondera kumva icyo asobanura?" 
Isaiah42:24 Ni nde watanze Yakobo ngo anyagwe ibye, Israheli ngo ijyanwe bunyago? Aho ntiyaba ari Uhoraho twacumuyeho, ntidushake gukurikira inzira ye, kandi ntitwite ku mategeko ye?" 
Isaiah42:25 Ni yo mpamvu yaroshye kuri Israheli umujinya w’uburakari bwe, ayiteza n’intambara ikomeye, iyokera impande zose, ariko yo ntiyabyumva, igeza n’aho ishya irakongoka, ariko ntiyagira icyo yitaho." 
Isaiah43:1 Ariko noneho — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — uwakuremye wowe Yakobo, uwaguhanze Israheli agize ati «Witinya kuko nakwicunguriye, uri uwanjye, nakwihamagariye mu izina ryawe." 
Isaiah43:2 Nuramuka unyuze mu mazi, nzaba ndi kumwe nawe, ukanyura mu nzuzi, ntuzarohama. Nunyura rwagati mu muriro, nta bwo uzashya, n’indimi zawo nta cyo zizagutwara," 
Isaiah43:3 kuko jye, Uhoraho, ndi Imana yawe, nkaba Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli, Umukiza wawe. Natanze Misiri ho incungu yawe, Kushi na Seba ho ingurane yawe," 
Isaiah43:4 bitewe n’agaciro gakomeye ufite mu maso yanjye; uri uwo kubahwa, kandi nanjye nkaba ngukunda. Natanze rero abantu ho incungu yawe, n’amahanga ho ingurane yawe." 
Isaiah43:5 Witinya kuko ndi kumwe nawe, nzagarura urubyaro rwawe kuva iyo izuba rirasira, nzakwegeranye kugeza iyo rirengera." 
Isaiah43:6 Nzabwira abo mu majyaruguru nti ’Bampe’, n’abo mu majyepfo nti ’Wibanyima!’ Ngarurira abahungu banjye bari mu gihugu cya kure, n’abakobwa banjye bari ku mpera z’isi," 
Isaiah43:7 abo bose bitiriwe izina ryanjye, nabaremeye kumpa ikuzo, nkaba narababumbye, ndabahanga.»" 
Isaiah43:8 Nimushyire ahagaragara uwo muryango, w’impumyi ariko kandi ufite amaso; w’ibipfamatwi, kandi ufite amatwi yo kumva." 
Isaiah43:9 Imiryango yose uko ingana niyibumbire hamwe, amahanga yose akorakorane! Ni nde muri yo wari wamenyekanyije ibi bikorwa, agatuma twumva ibyabayeho mbere? Nibatange abagabo, ngaho nibiregure, babumve, maze bavuge bati «Ibyo ni ukuri!»" 
Isaiah43:10 Abahamya banjye ni mwebwe, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, umugaragu wanjye, ni mwebwe natoranyije, kugira ngo mubashe kumva, munyemere, kandi mumenye uko meze: mbere yanjye nta yindi mana yigeze kubaho, kandi nta n’izabaho nyuma yanjye." 
Isaiah43:11 Ndi Uhoraho, jye ubwanjye, nta wundi Mukiza, utari jyewe." 
Isaiah43:12 Ni jye ubwanjye wabatangarije umukiro, kandi nywubagezaho; nta bwo ari imana y’inyamahanga iba iwanyu. Bityo rero, muri abahamya banjye, naho jye ndi Imana — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze —" 
Isaiah43:13 Kuva kera kose, ni ko meze: nta wabasha kunyambura icyo nafashe, kandi icyo nakoze, ni nde wagihungabanya?" 
Isaiah43:14 Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli, ubacungura avuze atya: Kubera mwe, nohereje umuntu i Babiloni, kugira ngo asenyagure ibihindizo byose bibafungiranye, maze urwamo rw’ibyishimo by’Abakalideya ruzahinduke imiborogo." 
Isaiah43:15 Ndi Uhoraho, Nyir’ubutagatifu wanyu, uwaremye Israheli, nkaba n’umwami wanyu." 
Isaiah43:16 Avuze atya Uhoraho, we washatse inzira mu nyanja rwagati, agatanga akayira mu mazi magari," 
Isaiah43:17 we wahagaritse amagare n’amafarasi, ingabo n’abantu b’intwari bose hamwe, bikagwa ubutazegura umutwe, bigahwekera nk’agatara, hanyuma bikazima." 
Isaiah43:18 Mwikwibuka ibyabayeho mbere, ngo mukurwe umutima n’ibya kera," 
Isaiah43:19 dore ngiye gukora ikintu gishya, ndetse cyatangiye no kugaragara; ntimukiruzi se? Ni ukuri rwose, ndahanga inzira rwagati mu butayu, inzuzi zitembe ahantu h’amayaga." 
Isaiah43:20 Inyamaswa z’inkazi zizampe ikuzo, kimwe n’imbwebwe na za mbuni, kuko navubuye amazi rwagati mu butayu, n’inzuzi zigatemba ahantu h’amayaga, kugira ngo nuhire umuryango wanjye nihitiyemo," 
Isaiah43:21 umuryango nihangiye, kandi uzahora uvuga ibisingizo byanjye." 
Isaiah43:22 Yakobo, uwo watakambiye si jyewe, kuko umaze igihe waranyibagiwe, Israheli we!" 
Isaiah43:23 Ntiwanzaniye intama kugira ngo uzintwikire, kandi ntiwanyubahirije untura ibitambo byawe. Sinigeze nguhatira kunzanira amaturo atabarika, cyangwa ngo nkunanize nkwaka ububani." 
Isaiah43:24 Nta bwo wigeze ungurira imibavu utanze ku byawe, cyangwa ngo mpage ibinure by’intama zawe! Ahubwo wangeretseho ibyaha byawe, urananiza kubera amafuti yawe." 
Isaiah43:25 Nyamara jye ni ko meze; ku bw’izina ryanjye, nkubabariye ibyaha byawe, sinzibuka amakosa yawe." 
Isaiah43:26 Ibuka umbwire ibyo unshinja maze tuburane. Ni byo rwose, ngaho garagaza ingingo ushingiraho." 
Isaiah43:27 Umukurambere wawe, na we ni ko yancumuyeho, abavugizi bawe barangomera," 
Isaiah43:28 nuko nsuzuguza ab’ingenzi mu batware bawe, Yakobo ndamutanga ngo arimburwe, Israheli nyegurira abashinyaguzi." 
Isaiah44:1 Ariko noneho, tega amatwi, Yakobo, mugaragu wanjye, Israheli, nihitiyemo." 
Isaiah44:2 Avuze atya Uhoraho wakuremye, uwaguhanze kuva ukiri mu nda ya nyoko, kandi n’ubu akaba akigufasha: Witinya, Yakobo, mugaragu wanjye, uwo nishumbushije kandi nihitiyemo," 
Isaiah44:3 kuko uwishwe n’inyota nzamuha amazi, uwumiranye mubere isoko idudubiza; nzasendereza umwuka wanjye mu rubyaro rwawe, n’umugisha wanjye ku nkomoko yawe." 
Isaiah44:4 Bazakura nk’ibyatsi mu gihe cy’imvura, cyangwa nk’urufunzo ku nkombe z’imigezi." 
Isaiah44:5 Umwe azavuga ati «Neguriwe Uhoraho», undi azitwe izina rya Yakobo, undi na we yandike ku kiganza cye, ati «Ndi uw’Uhoraho», kandi yihimbe izina rya Israheli." 
Isaiah44:6 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umwami wa Israheli, uwayicunguye, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Ni jye ntangiriro, nkaba n’iherezo, nta yindi mana ibaho, itari jye." 
Isaiah44:7 Ni nde uhwanye nanjye? Ngaho nafate ijambo, avuge uko biri, kandi anabinsobanurire! Ibyabaye kuva kera nabivuge uko biteye, ahereye ubwo nshyizeho imbaga nyamwinshi, n’ibigomba kuzaza na byo abibarondorere!" 
Isaiah44:8 Mwihinda umushyitsi, kandi mwitinya! Narabibabwiye, mbibamenyesha kuva kera! Si mwebwe se bagabo bo kubihamya? Hari indi mana yindi ibaho, itari jye? Kandi nta rundi Rutare rubaho, naba ntazi!" 
Isaiah44:9 Abakora ibigirwamana bose, nta cyo bari cyo, ibyo bashushanya na byo nta cyo bimaze; ababiramya na bo ntibagira icyo babona cyangwa ngo bumve, bigatuma bakorwa n’isoni." 
Isaiah44:10 Ni nde wigeze kubumba ikigirwamana, agashongesha ishusho ryacyo nta nyungu akuramo?" 
Isaiah44:11 Ababiyobotse bose bazakorwa n’ikimwaro, kuko ababikora ari abantu gusa. Nibiyegeranye, maze biyerekane: bose icyarimwe bazahinda umushyitsi, kandi bakorwe n’isoni!" 
Isaiah44:12 Umucuzi w’icyuma abanza kugikata, akagishyira mu makara yaka, akagicurisha inyundo, akoresheje ingufu z’ukuboko kwe. Ariko se iyo ashonje bigenda bite? Agwa isari. Naho se iyo atanyoye amazi? Agwa agacuho." 
Isaiah44:13 Umubaji w’amashusho y’ibiti akoresha umugozi, agashushanya icyo ashaka, akagikatisha imakasi. Ariko nanone, akoresha icyuma cyabigenewe, akagiha imisusire nk’iy’umuntu, n’ubwiza bw’uruhanga rw’umuntu, kugira ngo agishyire mu ngoro." 
Isaiah44:14 Yihitiramo isederi kugira ngo ayiteme, afata gereveriya cyangwa umushishi yari yararetse ngo bikure mu bindi biti by’ishyamba, cyangwa se agafata pinusi yari yarateye, maze igakuzwa n’imvura." 
Isaiah44:15 Ubusanzwe izo ni inkwi zo gucana; uwo muntu na we azifataho maze akazicana, akisusurutsa, akazitekesha umugati. Nyuma y’ibyo, ibisigaye akabikoramo ikigirwamana akagipfukamira, agakuramo ishusho, akaryunamira." 
Isaiah44:16 Igice kimwe cy’igiti agicanisha umuriro, akawugerekaho inyama zo kwirira; akarya, agahaga; agasusuruka maze akavuga ati «Yayaaaa, noneho nshize imbeho! Mbega ukuntu ari byiza kureba umuriro!»" 
Isaiah44:17 Mu giti gisigaye, agakoramo imana ye, ikigirwamana yunamira, akanagipfukamira, akagisenga, agira ati «Ngoboka, kuko ari wowe mana yanjye!»" 
Isaiah44:18 Bene abo bantu nta kenge na mba, ntibazi gusesengura ibintu, kuko amaso yahumye, ku buryo batabona na busa, imitima yabo na yo iranangiye nta cyo yumva." 
Isaiah44:19 Nta n’umwe ugarura umutima, ngo yumve, anasesengure ku buryo yagira ati «Igice kimwe nakimariye mu muriro, nteka umugati ku makara, notsa inyama maze ndazirya; none igisigaye singiye kugikoramo ishyano, ngo nuname imbere y’ingeri y’igiti!»" 
Isaiah44:20 Ahubwo yiziritse ku ivu, umutima we wacuramye uramuyobya, nta bwo azigera agobotorwa! Ntanarushya yibaza ati «Aho iki mfite mu ntoki si amanjwe?»" 
Isaiah44:21 Yakobo we, ibuka ibi ngibi, Israheli, uri umugaragu wanjye, narakwihangiye ngo umbere umugaragu, wowe Israheli, sinzakwibagirwa." 
Isaiah44:22 Nahanaguye ubugome bwawe nk’igicu, ibyaha byawe mbimaraho nk’igihu; ngarukira kuko nakwicunguriye." 
Isaiah44:23 Ijuru nirisabwe n’ibyishimo, kuko Uhoraho yakoze, ikuzimu mu nsi y’isi nihirangire, imisozi ndetse n’ishyamba kumwe n’ibiti byaryo byose nibitere urwamo rw’ibyishimo, kuko Uhoraho yacunguye Yakobo, akagaragaza ikuzo rye muri Israheli." 
Isaiah44:24 Avuze atya Uhoraho, umurokozi wawe, uwakwihangiye kuva ukiri mu nda ya nyoko: Ni jye Uhoraho, uwahanze ibintu byose! Naguye ijuru, jyewe jyenyine, ndambura isi nta n’umwe twari kumwe." 
Isaiah44:25 Noneho rero, ibinyoma by’abacunnyi mbihinduye ubusa, abapfumu mbateye kuvugishwa, abahanga mbashubije inyuma, n’ubuhanga bwabo mbuhinduye amanjwe." 
Isaiah44:26 Mpaye agaciro gakomeye ijambo ry’umugaragu wanjye, umugambi w’intumwa zanjye nywuzuze. Ku byerekeye Yeruzalemu ndavuze nti «Niturwe», n’imigi ya Yuda nti «Niyongere yubakwe, ibyasenyutse nzabisana.»" 
Isaiah44:27 Mbwiye inyanja nti «Kama, imigezi yawe ngiye kuyumutsa!»" 
Isaiah44:28 Kuri Sirusi ndavuze nti «Ni umushumba wanjye.» Ibinshimisha byose, azabigeraho, atangaze kuri Yeruzalemu, ati «Niyongere yubakwe», naho ku Ngoro ati «Niyubakwe bundi bushya!»" 
Isaiah45:1 Uhoraho abwiye atya Sirusi, uwo yisigiye amavuta y’ubutore: Ngushyigikirishije ukuboko kwanjye kw’iburyo, kugira ngo amahanga nyacishe bugufi imbere yawe, kandi ngo ngukingurire inzugi, maze imiryango ikinguke imbere yawe." 
Isaiah45:2 Jyewe ubwanjye nzakugenda imbere, ahari udusindu nzaharinganiza, inzugi z’umuringa nzimenagure, ibihindizo by’ibyuma mbicagagure." 
Isaiah45:3 Nzaguha ubutunzi buri mu bubiko, nguhe ubukungu buhishe ahatagaragara, bityo uzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, uguhamagara mu izina ryawe." 
Isaiah45:4 Koko rero, Yakobo, umugaragu wanjye, na Israheli nihitiyemo, yatumye nguhamagara mu izina ryawe; nkwita izina, n’ubwo wowe utanzi." 
Isaiah45:5 Ni jye Uhoraho nta wundi ubaho, uretse jye, nta yindi mana ibaho. Nagukenyeje umukandara, kandi utanzi," 
Isaiah45:6 kugira ngo iburasirazuba kimwe n’iburengerazuba, bamenye ko uretse jye ibindi ari ubusa; ni jye Uhoraho, nta wundi ubaho." 
Isaiah45:7 Mbeshaho urumuri, nkarema umwijima, ntanga amahirwe, ngateza n’amakuba: ni jye Uhoraho ukora ibyo byose." 
Isaiah45:8 Ijuru niritonyange nk’ikime, ibicu bigushe ubutabera, isi nibumbuke, maze umukiro usagambe, ubutabera buhere ko buba umumero! Ngibyo ibyo jye Uhoraho, nihangiye." 
Isaiah45:9 Aragowe umuntu, ikibindi mu bindi, witotombera uwamubumbye! Ibumba se ryabaza uribumba, riti «Urakora iki?», cyangwa se icyo ukoze kikakubwira ngo «Uri umuswa!»" 
Isaiah45:10 Aragowe ubaza se w’umwana, ati «Wabyaye mwana nyabaki?» akabaza nyina w’umwana, ati «Waruhutse iki?»" 
Isaiah45:11 Avuze atya Uhoraho, we wahanze Israheli, akaba na Nyir’ubutagatifu wayo: Ahari aho mwaba ari mwe mumbaza ibyerekeye abahungu banjye! Mbese muntegeka ku byo niremeye n’ibiganza byanjye?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ni jye ubwanjye wahanze isi, nyiremeraho abantu bayituye; ni jye waguye ijuru n’ibiganza byanjye, mpa amategeko ingabo zaryo zose." 
Isaiah45:13 Ni jye wahagurukije uwo muntu, nkurikije umugambi wanjye, kandi nkazaringaniza amayira ye yose. Ni we uzongera kubaka umugi wanjye, akazagarura abanjye bajyanywe bunyago, nta kiguzi ahawe cyangwa impongano. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze." 
Isaiah45:14 Uhoraho avuze atya: Urwunguko rwo mu Misiri, ubucuruzi bw’i Kushi, n’abantu b’i Seba, abagabo barebare cyane, bazaza iwawe kandi babe abawe, bakugende inyuma, baboheshejwe iminyururu. Bazagupfukama imbere, bagutakambire bati «Usibye iwawe honyine, nta handi hari Imana; izindi mana zose ni amanjwe!»" 
Isaiah45:15 Ariko mu by’ukuri, uri Imana itagaragara, Mana ya Israheli, wowe utanga umukiro." 
Isaiah45:16 Dore bose uko bangana, bakozwe n’isoni, abacuzi n’ababaji b’amashusho bakozwe n’ikimwaro." 
Isaiah45:17 Israheli izakizwa n’Uhoraho, kandi azaba ayikijije burundu; mwebwe rero, ntimuteze kuzakorwa n’isoni, ntimuzanagira ikimwaro bibaho." 
Isaiah45:18 Uhoraho, Umuremyi w’ijuru, we Mana yaremye isi akayitunganya, akayikomeza kandi ntayiremere kuba umurangara, ahubwo kugira ngo iturwe; avuze atya: Ni jye Uhoraho, nta wundi ubaho." 
Isaiah45:19 Nta bwo navugiye mu bwihisho, cyangwa mu mfuruka yijimye y’isi, sinabwiye urubyaro rwa Yakobo ngo «Nimunshakashakire aho ntari!» Ni jye Uhoraho: mvuga ikiri ukuri, ngatangaza igitunganye!" 
Isaiah45:20 Nimukorakorane maze muze, nimungane mwese icyarimwe, abarokotse bo mu mahanga. Nta bwenge bagira, abatambagiza amashusho yabo y’ibiti, kandi bagasenga imana idashobora kubakiza." 
Isaiah45:21 Ngaho nimuvuge ingingo zanyu, muzibonere na gihamya; ndetse tujye n’inama! Ni nde wamenyekanyije ibyo ngibyo mu bihe byahise, akaba yarabitangaje kuva kera na kare? Si jyewe Uhoraho? Kandi nta yindi mana ibaho uretse jye. Koko nta yindi mana y’ukuri kandi itanga umukiro ibaho, uretse jyewe jyenyine." 
Isaiah45:22 Ngaho nimungarukire, maze mubone gukizwa, mwebwe mwese abatuye mu mpera z’isi, kuko ari jye Mana, akaba nta yindi ibaho." 
Isaiah45:23 Jyewe ubwanjye, narabirahiriye, n’ibiturutse mu kanwa kanjye ni ukuri, ijambo ryanjye ntirivuguruzwa: icyitwa ivi cyose kizamfukamira, n’icyitwa ururimi cyose kinyirahire kiti" 
Isaiah45:24 «Ubutabera n’ububasha ni iby’Uhoraho wenyine.» Bose bazakorwa n’isoni, baze bamugana, abahoze bamurwanya." 
Isaiah45:25 Ku bw’impuhwe z’Uhoraho, urubyaro rwose rwa Israheli ruzarenganurwa, kandi rusabagizwe n’ibyishimo." 
Isaiah46:1 Beli irasukuma, ngiyo na Nebo igiye kurunduka! Ibishushanyo byazo bihekeshejwe amatungo. Imitwaro iremereye mwajyaga mwikorera ngiyo ihetswe n’amatungo yananiwe." 
Isaiah46:2 Arasukuma ndetse agiye gutemba, ntagishoboye no kuramira imitwaro yikoreye, na yo ubwayo ajyanywe bunyago." 
Isaiah46:3 Nzu ya Yakobo, nimuntege amatwi, abarokotse mwese bo mu muryango wa Israheli, mwebwe nitayeho mukiri mu nda, nkabaheka mukivuka." 
Isaiah46:4 Nzakomeza kubagenzereza ntyo kugeza mu busaza bwanyu, mbashyigikire kugeza ubwo muzamera imvi. Ni jye ubatabara, nkanabaterura, ni jye uzabavunikira kandi nkanabarengera." 
Isaiah46:5 Mbese ubu mwandeshyeshya na nde, mukaba mwanyitiranya na we? Ni nde mwangereranya na we, mukaba mwavuga ko dusa?" 
Isaiah46:6 Bamwe bapfusha ubusa zahabu yabo, bagapima feza ku munzani, bagahemba umucuzi ngo abakorere ikigirwamana, nuko bakacyunamira, bakanagipfukamira." 
Isaiah46:7 Ni bo bagishyira ku ntugu bakagiheka; bakakigeza aho kiruhukira. Kiguma aho ubutanyeganyega ntikive mu mwanya wacyo, ugitakambiye ntikimusubize, cyangwa ngo kimukize umubabaro we." 
Isaiah46:8 Nimwibuke ibyo kugira ngo murusheho kwibaza, nimwisubireho, mwa bahemu mwe;" 
Isaiah46:9 mwibuke ibyababayeho mbere, igihe cya kera: Koko ni jye Mana, nta yindi ibaho, ndi Imana, ibindi byose ni amanjwe ubigereranyije nanjye." 
Isaiah46:10 Kuva mu ntangiriro, natangaje uko bizakurikirana, mu bihe byahise navuze ibitari byakorwa. Nuko ndavuga nti «Umugambi wanjye uzahoraho, n’ikinshimisha cyose nzagikora.»" 
Isaiah46:11 Nzahamagaza iburasirazuba igisiga kiryana, n’uwo nageneye kurangiza umugambi wanjye, muhamagaze mu gihugu cya kure, narawutangiye kandi nzawusohoza, narabyiyemeje, nkazabikora." 
Isaiah46:12 Nimutege amatwi mwe, ab’imitima inangiye, kandi mukagendera kure ubutabera:" 
Isaiah46:13 Ubutabera bwanjye ngubu buri hafi, buregereje, n’umukiro wanjye ntugitinze; nzashyira muri Siyoni umukiro wanjye, Israheli nyihe ubwiza bw’ikuzo ryanjye." 
Isaiah47:1 Hanuka wikubite hasi, wigaragure mu mukungugu, mwari, mukobwa wa Babeli, mukobwa w’Abakalideya, va ku ntebe y’ubwami, wigaragure ku butaka, kuko utazongera ukundi kwitwa «Akataraboneka na Nyaguhirwa.»" 
Isaiah47:2 Fata urusyo maze usye ifu, pfukura imisatsi yawe, uhine ikanzu yawe, ugaragaze ibibero byawe, wambuke inzuzi;" 
Isaiah47:3 ubwambure bwawe nibwitangaze, maze isoni zawe zigaragare!" 
Isaiah47:4 Uducungura ni Uhoraho, izina rye ni Umugaba w’ingabo, Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Isaiah47:5 Iyicarire mu mwijima winumire, mukobwa w’Abakalideya, kuko utazongera kwitwa ukundi «Umugabekazi»." 
Isaiah47:6 Nari nararakariye umuryango wanjye, nsuzuguza umurage wanjye, mbagabiza ibiganza byawe; nyamara ntiwigeze ubagirira impuhwe, umusaza umushenguza imizigo yawe!" 
Isaiah47:7 Waribwiraga uti «Nzabaho iteka, nzahora nganje!» Ntiwatekereje uko ibintu bizagenda, ngo uzirikane amaherezo yabyo." 
Isaiah47:8 Noneho rero, tega amatwi, wowe watengamaye, ukicara ku ntebe ya cyami nta cyo wishisha, wowe wibwiraga uti «Ni jye uriho, abandi ni ubusa! Humura sinteze gupfakara, cyangwa ngo mpfushe abana.»" 
Isaiah47:9 Umunsi umwe, ibyo byago byombi bizakugwirira: ari ugupfusha abana, ari no gupfakara. Icyo cyago kizakugeraho, n’ubwo amayeri y’abapfumu bawe yiyongera ubutitsa." 
Isaiah47:10 Wiringiye ubugome bwawe, uribwira uti «Nta we undeba.» Ariko «ubuhanga» bwawe ndetse n’ «ubwenge» bwawe, ni byo byagushutse, noneho ukibwira uti «Ni jye uriho, abandi ni ubusa!»" 
Isaiah47:11 Ngaho rero icyago kirakugarije, kandi ntuzamenya aho ugihungira; ugiye kugusha ishyano, utazashobora kwikiza. Ni koko, bidatinze ugiye kurimbuka, ku buryo udashobora kubyiyumvisha." 
Isaiah47:12 Nuko rero komera ku mayeri y’ubupfumu bwawe no ku mafuti witoje kuva mu buto bwawe, ahari byazakugirira akamaro, bikaguha gutera ubwoba." 
Isaiah47:13 Wajijishijwe n’abakugira inama batabarika, none ngaho nibigaragaze, bagukize, abo bihaye kwigabanya ikirere, bitegereza inyenyeri, maze bakaguhanurira ibizaza bifashishije imboneko y’ukwezi!" 
Isaiah47:14 Ngaha bagiye kumera nk’ibyatsi bitwikwa n’umuriro, ntibazashobora no kuwiyaruramo, kuko utazaba ari inkekwe yo kwisusurutsa, cyangwa se igishyito cyo kwicarwa imbere." 
Isaiah47:15 Nguko uko abo wahirimbaniye bazakumerera, abo waruhiye kuva mu buto bwawe bazigendera, umwe ace ukwe undi ukwe, nta n’umwe uzakurengera." 
Isaiah48:1 Nzu ya Yakobo, nimutege amatwi ibi ngibi, mwebwe abitwa izina rya Israheli, mukaba mukomoka ku rubyaro rwa Yuda, mwebwe abarahirisha izina ry’Uhoraho, mukanitabaza Imana ya Israheli, ariko mu bitari ukuri no mu bidatunganye." 
Isaiah48:2 Koko biyita «Ab’Umurwa Mutagatifu!» bakishingikiriza Imana ya Israheli, izina ryayo rikaba Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Isaiah48:3 Ibyababayeho mbere, nari narabibabwiye, byavuye mu munwa wanjye, ntuma bimenyekana, ako kanya ndabikora, kandi bibaho." 
Isaiah48:4 Kuko nari nzi neza ko utumva, ijosi ryawe rireze nk’umukwege w’icyuma, n’uruhanga rwawe rukomeye nk’umuringa." 
Isaiah48:5 Ibyo nakoze nabikumenyesheje mbere y’igihe, mbikumvisha mbere y’uko bibaho, kugira ngo utavaho uvuga uti, «Ni ishusho nibarije ribikoze», cyangwa se ngo «Ni ikigirwamana cyanjye gitanze aya mategeko.»" 
Isaiah48:6 Wumvise ibyahanuwe: none ngibi birujujwe. Ubu se wowe ntiwabitangaza? Ngaha noneho ngiye kuguhishurira ibishya, ibyo nazigamye, wowe utigeze umenya." 
Isaiah48:7 Ubu ni ho bikimara kuremwa, nta bwo ari ibya kera, kugeza kandi uyu munsi, nta cyo wari ubiziho, kugira ngo utavaho uvuga uti «Ibi nari nsanzwe mbizi!»" 
Isaiah48:8 Nzi neza ko utigeze ubyumva, kandi ko nta n’icyo wigeze umenya, ko na mbere hose, ugutwi kwawe kutigeze kuzibuka; nkamenya neza ko wangambaniye incuro nyinshi, ukaba witwa «Umugome wabuvukanye.»" 
Isaiah48:9 Ariko kubera izina ryanjye, noroshya uburakari, ngirira n’ibisingizo bingenewe, bituma nifata, maze nkirinda kukurimbura." 
Isaiah48:10 Dore narakugerageje ngo ngusukure, ntagucishije mu ruganda nk’ushongesha umuringa, ahubwo ngusukuza kugucisha bugufi." 
Isaiah48:11 Nabikoreye kwanga kwitesha agaciro, none se nareka izina ryanjye rigasuzugurwa? Ikuzo ryanjye nta wundi nzariha." 
Isaiah48:12 Yakobo, ntega amatwi; Israheli, ni wowe mpamagara. Uko ni ko nteye: ndi intangiriro, nkaba kandi n’iherezo." 
Isaiah48:13 Ni koko, isi yahanzwe n’ikiganza cyanjye, ukuboko kwanjye kw’indyo kwarambuye ijuru, ndabihamagara, ako kanya bikanyitaba." 
Isaiah48:14 Nimukoranire hamwe mwese, maze muntege amatwi! Ni nde muri mwe wamenyekanyije ibyo byose? Koko, uwo Uhoraho akunda azamwuzuriza imigambi, amushoborere Babiloni n’inyoko yayo ngo ni Abakalideya." 
Isaiah48:15 Ni koko, ni jye wabivuze, ni ukuri naramuhamagaye, ni jye watumye aza, kandi umurimo we azawusohoza." 
Isaiah48:16 Nimunyegere kandi muntege amatwi: kuva mu ntangiriro, sinigeze mvugira mu bwihisho; kandi kuva aho ibyo bibereye, nari ndiho. Ubu rero ni Nyagasani Imana wanyohereje, ampa n’umwuka we." 
Isaiah48:17 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli, uwagucunguye: Ni jye Uhoraho, Imana yawe, ukwigisha ibikugirira akamaro, nkakuyobora mu nzira unyuramo." 
Isaiah48:18 Nyamara iyo ujya kwita ku mategeko yanjye, amahoro yawe aba asendereye nk’uruzi, n’ubutungane bwawe bukamera nk’imivumba yo mu nyanja;" 
Isaiah48:19 urubyaro rwawe rwari kuzangana nk’umusenyi, abagukomokaho bakangana nk’urusekabuye; izina ryawe ntiryari kuzasibangana, cyangwa se ngo ryibagirane imbere yanjye." 
Isaiah48:20 Nimusohoke muri Babiloni! Nimuhunge Abakalideya! Nimurangurure amajwi mubitangaze, nimubimenyekanishe, mubyamamaze kugera ku mpera z’isi, muvuga muti «Uhoraho yacunguye Yakobo, umugaragu we!»" 
Isaiah48:21 Mu butayu aho yabajyanye, ntibigeze bicwa n’inyota, yabavuburiye amazi mu rutare, koko yashije urutare, amazi aratemba." 
Isaiah48:22 Nyamara abagome ntibateze kugira amahoro, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah49:1 Birwa, nimunyumve; bihugu bya kure, muntege amatwi! Uhoraho yampamagaye ntaravuka; nkiri mu nda ya mama, izina ryanjye yararivugaga." 
Isaiah49:2 Umunwa wanjye yawugize nk’inkota ityaye, ankinga mu gacucu k’ikiganza cye, angira nk’umwambi utyaye, ampisha mu mutana we." 
Isaiah49:3 Yarambwiye ati «Uri umugaragu wanjye, (Israheli,) ni wowe nzagaragarizamo ikuzo ryanjye.»" 
Isaiah49:4 Ariko jye naribwiraga nti «Naruhiye ubusa, mvunwa n’ibidafite akamaro.» Nyamara Uhoraho ni we uzandenganura, igihembo nagiteguriwe iruhande rw’Imana yanjye." 
Isaiah49:5 None ngaha, Uhoraho yabyivugiye, we wandemeye kumubera umugaragu, kuva nkiri mu nda ya mama, kugira ngo mugarurire Yakobo, mukorakoranyirize Israheli; guhera ubu rero, mfite ubutoni kuri Uhoraho, ububasha bwanjye bukaba ari Imana yanjye." 
Isaiah49:6 Yarambwiye ati «Gusubiranya imiryango ya Yakobo, no kugarura abarokotse ba Israheli, ibyo ntibihagije ku mugaragu wanjye; ahubwo nakugeneye kuba urumuri rw’amahanga, kugira ngo umukiro wanjye usakare kugera mu mpera z’isi.»" 
Isaiah49:7 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umucunguzi; Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli abwira umuntu w’insuzugurwa, uwo abantu bareba nk’agaterashozi, umucakara w’abategekesha igitugu, ati «Abami ndetse n’ibikomangoma bazareba bahaguruke, bapfukamire Uhoraho kuko ari indahemuka, akaba Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli wakwihitiyemo.»" 
Isaiah49:8 Uhoraho avuze atya: Igihe cy’ubutoneshwe naragusubije, ku munsi wo gukizwa naragutabaye, ndaguhanga, nkugenera kuvugurura isezerano nagiranye n’imbaga nyamwinshi, kugira ngo mbyutse igihugu, maze nsubize iminani abari barayinyazwe." 
Isaiah49:9 Imfungwa nzazibwire nti «Nimusohoke» n’abari mu mwijima nti «Nimujye ahabona.» Iruhande rw’inzira, bazahabona ubwatsi, ku misozi yose y’agasi, bazahagire urwuri." 
Isaiah49:10 Inzara n’inyota ntibizabica, icyocyere cy’umusenyi cyangwa izuba ntibizabageraho; kuko ubakunda bihebuje azabayobora, akaberekeza ku masoko y’amazi afutse." 
Isaiah49:11 Ku misozi yose nzahahanga inzira, n’imihanda yanjye nyabagendwa iringanizwe." 
Isaiah49:12 Ngabo baraje, baturutse iyo bigwa, bamwe mu majyaruguru no mu burengerazuba, abandi baturutse mu gihugu cya Asuwani." 
Isaiah49:13 Ijuru nirivuze impundu, isi nisabagire, imisozi itere indirimbo z’ibyishimo, kuko Uhoraho yahumurije umuryango we, abakozwaga isoni, akabereka urukundo rwe." 
Isaiah49:14 Siyoni yaravugaga iti «Uhoraho yarantereranye, Nyagasani yaranyibagiwe.»" 
Isaiah49:15 Mbese ye, umugore yakwibagirwa umwana yonsa? Ese yaburira impuhwe umwana yibyariye? Kabone n’aho we yarengwaho, jyewe sinzigera nkwibagirwa." 
Isaiah49:16 Dore nakwanditse mu kiganza cyanjye, inkike zawe nzihozaho ijisho ubudahumbya." 
Isaiah49:17 Abubatsi bawe ngabo baraje, naho abagusenya n’abagusahura barahunze." 
Isaiah49:18 Raranganya amaso hirya no hino, maze urebe: bose bakoranye, baje bakugana. Ndahije ubuzima bwanjye, bose bazagutaka nk’umurimbo, ubakenyere nk’umweko w’umugeni. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah49:19 Igihugu cyawe cyahindutse amatongo, cyari cyarasahuwe kandi kidatuwe, guhera ubu kizabana gito abaturage bawe, abakubuzaga uruhumekero bazaguhunge." 
Isaiah49:20 Abana wari waranyazwe, bazakubwira bati «Hano habaye impatanwa! Duhe aho dutura! Nimwiyegeranye tubone aho dukwirwa.»" 
Isaiah49:21 Nuko mu mutima wawe uzibaze uti «Aba se bo, nababyariwe na nde? Jye ko nari naraciwe ku bana, naragumbashye, narajyanywe bunyago, nkaba n’igicibwa; aba bo bakujijwe na nde? Ko naherutse nsigara jyenyine, bariya bo babaga he?»" 
Isaiah49:22 Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Ngiye kwerekeza ikiganza cyanjye ku mahanga, nzamure ibendera ryanjye, ibihugu biribone: bazane abahungu bawe babatwaye mu maboko, abakobwa bawe babahetse ku ntugu." 
Isaiah49:23 Abami bazakurera, abagore babo bakonse. Bazakunamira bakoze uruhanga ku butaka, barigate umukungugu wo mu birenge byawe. Bityo uzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, n’uko abanyiringira batazakorwa n’ikimwaro." 
Isaiah49:24 Mbese intwari yakwamburwa umunyago wayo? Imfungwa yaboshywe n’igihangange yo se, yagobotorwa?" 
Isaiah49:25 Nyamara, dore uko Uhoraho yavuze: Uwaboshywe n’intwari azagobotorwa, n’umuryango wanyazwe n’igihangange uzagaruzwa. Uguteraho amahane, ni jye uzamurwanya, abahungu bawe, ni jye uzabakiza." 
Isaiah49:26 Abagutegekesha igitugu, nzabagaburira imibiri yabo, bazasinde amaraso yabo bwite, boshye abasinze divayi nshya, maze ibinyamubiri byose bimenyereho ko Umukiza wawe ari jyewe Uhoraho, Umucunguzi wawe, Indatsimburwa ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah50:1 Uhoraho avuze atya: Ruri hehe urwandiko rw’ubusende, ruhamya ko nirukanye nyoko? Cyangwa se, ni nde mbereyemo umwenda, nkaba naramubahayeho ubwishyu? Nuko rero, mwagurishijwe ku mpamvu y’ibyaha byanyu, na nyoko asendwa kubera imyivumbagatanyo yanyu." 
Isaiah50:2 Bishoboka bite! Naraje sinagira n’umwe mbona! Mpamagaye, ntihagira unyitaba? Mbese, ukuboko kwanjye kwaba ari kugufi cyane, ku buryo kutabasha kubakiza? Ni ukuvuga se ko ntabona imbaraga zo kubacungura? Dore ngiye gukamya inyanja n’igitero cyanjye, imigezi na yo nyihindure ubutayu, amafi yicwe n’icyorezo kuko yabuze amazi." 
Isaiah50:3 Ijuru nzaryambika ibyirabura, maze ndyorose ibigunira." 
Isaiah50:4 Nyagasani Uhoraho yampaye ururimi, ambwira icyo mvuga kugira ngo menye kuramira uwarushye. Buri gitondo arankangura, akanyigisha gutega amatwi nk’abigishwa." 
Isaiah50:5 Nyagasani Uhoraho yanzibuye amatwi, nanjye sinabyangira, ndetse sinatezuka." 
Isaiah50:6 Nategeye umugongo abankubitaga, imisaya yanjye nyitegeza abamfuraga ubwanwa; uruhanga rwanjye sinaruhisha abantukaga, bancira mu maso." 
Isaiah50:7 Cyakora Nyagasani Uhoraho arantabara, agatuma ibitutsi bitanca intege. Uruhanga rwanjye ndarukomeza nk’ibuye, kandi nzi ko ntazakorwa n’ikimwaro." 
Isaiah50:8 None se ko undenganura ari hafi, ni nde watinyuka kumburanya? Naze tujyane imbere y’umucamanza! Ni nde uzanshinja mu rubanza? Ngaho niyigaragaze, maze anyegere!" 
Isaiah50:9 Ni byo rwose, Nyagasani Uhoraho arantabara; ni nde rero wanshinja icyaha? Koko abo bose bazasaza nk’umwambaro, maze bazaribwe n’inzukira." 
Isaiah50:10 Mbese muri mwe haba hari utinya Uhoraho, agatega amatwi ijwi ry’umugaragu we, none akaba agenda mu mwijima, ntagire urumuri na busa abona? Uwo nguwo niyiringire izina ry’Uhoraho, yishingikirize Imana ye." 
Isaiah50:11 Naho mwebwe abacana umuriro, mukitwaza imyambi igurumana, nimujye mu gishyito cy’umuriro wanyu, rwagati mu nkongi y’umuriro mwicaniye. Kuko ibyo muzabigirirwa n’ikiganza cyanjye, mukazapfana umubabaro." 
Isaiah51:1 Nimunyumve, mwe abaharanira ubutabera, mwe mushakashaka Uhoraho. Nimwitegereze urutare mwabajwemo, mutekereze inganzo mwacukuwemo." 
Isaiah51:2 Nimwitegereze so, Abrahamu, na Sara wababyaye. Koko, yari wenyine igihe muhamagaye, nyamara namuhaye umugisha, ngwiza urubyaro rwe." 
Isaiah51:3 Ni koko, Uhoraho ahumurije Siyoni, agiriye impuhwe amatongo yayo yose; ubutayu bw’aho, abuhinduye nka Edeni, amayaga y’aho, ayagira ubusitani bw’Uhoraho. Bazahasanga ibyishimo n’umunezero, indirimbo n’imbyino zo gushimira." 
Isaiah51:4 Nimunyumve neza, muryango wanjye, namwe ab’Umurwa wanjye, muntege amatwi: kuko amategeko ari jye aturukaho, imanza zanjye zikaba urumuri rw’amahanga." 
Isaiah51:5 Ubutabera bwanjye buregereje, agakiza kanjye kasesekaye, ukuboko kwanjye kugiye gucira amahanga imanza. Ibirwa bizangirira icyizere, bitegereze ububasha bw’ukuboko kwanjye." 
Isaiah51:6 Nimwubure amaso murebe ejuru, hanyuma mwuname murebe hasi ku butaka: koko, ijuru rizayoka nk’umwotsi, naho isi isaze nk’umwambaro, abayituye bapfe nk’udukoko. Ariko agakiza kanjye kazabaho iteka ryose, ubutabera bwanjye ntibuzashira." 
Isaiah51:7 Nimuntege amatwi, mwe abazi ubutabera, muryango w’abashyinguye amategeko yanjye mu mutima: mwitinya amenyo y’abasetsi, cyangwa ngo ibitutsi byabo bibakangaranye," 
Isaiah51:8 kuko bazaribwa n’inzukira boshye umwambaro, umuswa ukabamunga nk’ubwoya bw’intama. Nyamara ubutabera bwanjye n’agakiza kanjye bizabaho iteka ryose, uko ibihe bigenda bisimburana." 
Isaiah51:9 Haguruka, haguruka! Wambare ububasha, Uhoraho Munyamaboko! Haguruka nko ku minsi y’ibihe byahise, nko mu bisekuruza bya kera. Si wowe se watemaguye Rahabu, ugahinguranya icyo kiyoka?" 
Isaiah51:10 Si wowe se wakamije inyanja, n’amazi yayo magari, ugahanga inzira mu nsi yayo, kugira ngo abarokotse batambuke?" 
Isaiah51:11 Abarokotse b’Uhoraho bazagaruka, binjire muri Siyoni baririmba, ibyishimo bidashira bizahora biranga uruhanga rwabo, basabwe n’ibyishimo n’umunezero, kuko amarira n’amaganya bizaba byarangiye." 
Isaiah51:12 Ni jyewe, ni jye ubwanjye ubahumuriza: ni iki cyatuma utinya uwagenewe gupfa, mwene muntu, umeze nk’icyatsi?" 
Isaiah51:13 Waba se waribagiwe Uhoraho waguhanze, akarambura ikirere, agahanga n’isi? Ni iki gituma uhinda umushyitsi umunsi wose ubudatuza, imbere y’uburakari bw’ugutegekesha igitugu, nk’aho afite ububasha bwo kukurimbura? Uburakari bw’umugome se bushingiye he?" 
Isaiah51:14 Ni akanya gato uwari yarapfukiranywe, akishyira akizana, ntazapfa cyangwa ngo ajye mu nyenga y’ikuzimu, ntazigera abura umugati wo kurya." 
Isaiah51:15 Ni jye, Uhoraho Imana yawe, usimbagiza inyanja, imivumba ikoroma, izina ryanjye rikaba: Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Isaiah51:16 Nashyize amagambo yanjye mu munwa wawe, nkugamisha mu gicucu cy’ukuboko kwanjye, igihe nashyiragaho ijuru, ngahanga n’isi, ari bwo nabwiraga Siyoni nti «Ni wowe muryango wanjye.»" 
Isaiah51:17 Zanzamuka, zanzamuka, uhaguruke Yeruzalemu! Wowe Uhoraho yasomeje ku nkongoro y’uburakari bwe; igikombe cy’ibisindisha, urakinywa, urakiranguza." 
Isaiah51:18 Mu bahungu wabyaye, nta n’umwe waguhembuye, mu bo wareze ukabakuza, nta n’umwe wagusindagije." 
Isaiah51:19 Ibyago bibiri kandi bisa birakugarije: isenywa n’ukurimburwa, inzara n’intambara. Ni nde uzakuririra? Ni nde uzaguhumuriza?" 
Isaiah51:20 Abahungu bawe ngabo bararambaraye, barasambagurika ku mayira yose, boshye impongo zafashwe mu mutego, bazira uburakari bw’Uhoraho, n’igihano cy’Imana yawe." 
Isaiah51:21 Ubu rero, tega amatwi ibi ngibi, wa nsuzugurwa we y’umusinzi, ariko utabitewe na divayi!" 
Isaiah51:22 Avuze atya Umutegetsi wawe, Uhoraho Imana yawe, we wemera kujya impaka z’umuryango we: Dore nakuye mu biganza byawe igikombe cy’ibisindisha, inkongoro y’uburakari bwanjye, guhera ubu ntuzongera kuyisomaho ukundi." 
Isaiah51:23 Nzayishyira mu biganza by’abakubuza uburyo, abakubwiraga bati «Rambarara, tubone uko dutambuka», nuko ukabategera umugongo nk’aho uri ubutaka, cyangwa umuhanda waharuriwe abagenzi." 
Isaiah52:1 Kanguka, kanguka, Siyoni, usubirane ishema ryawe! Yeruzalemu, murwa mutagatifu, ambara imyambaro yawe y’ikuzo, kuko guhera ubu, utagenywe n’uwahumanye batazongera kukwinjiramo ukundi." 
Isaiah52:2 Hehe n’umukungugu, ihungure maze uhaguruke, Yeruzalemu, wowe wari imbohe! Ngaho ikuremo izo ngoyi zikuri mu ijosi, wa mfungwa we, mwari wa Siyoni!" 
Isaiah52:3 Uhoraho avuze atya: Mwagurishijwe ku buntu, nanone muzacungurwa nta feza ibatanzweho." 
Isaiah52:4 Koko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Ubwa mbere umuryango wanjye waramanutse, usuhukira mu Misiri, hanyuma Ashuru irawigarurira, iwicisha agahato;" 
Isaiah52:5 none se, ubu nungutse iki? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Kubona umuryango wanjye urengana nta mpamvu, abawushikamiye bakaba baganje, kandi izina ryanjye ritukwa buri munsi, ubudatuza! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah52:6 Guhera ubu rero, umuryango wanjye uzamenya izina ryanjye; uwo munsi ukazamenya ko ari jye uvuga nti «Ndaje.»" 
Isaiah52:7 Mbega ngo biraba byiza kurabukwa mu mpinga y’imisozi, ibirenge by’intumwa izanye inkuru nziza, ivuga amahoro, igatangaza amahirwe, ikabwira Siyoni iti «Imana yawe iraganje!»" 
Isaiah52:8 Umva ukuntu abarinzi bawe, bahanikiye icyarimwe ijwi ry’ibisingizo, kuko biboneye n’amaso yabo Uhoraho agaruka muri Siyoni." 
Isaiah52:9 Matongo ya Yeruzalemu, nimuhanike, murangururire icyarimwe amajwi y’ibisingizo, kuko Uhoraho ahumurije umuryango we, agacungura Yeruzalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 Uhoraho agaragaje mu maso y’amahanga ububasha bw’ukuboko kwe gutagatifuza, bityo, impande zose z’isi zizabone agakiza k’Imana yacu." 
Isaiah52:11 Nimugende, nimusohoke muve hano; ntimugire icyo mukoraho cyahumanye, nimusohoke rwagati muri Babiloni; nimwisukure, mwe abatwaye ibintu byeguriwe Uhoraho." 
Isaiah52:12 Ntimuzasohoke mwihuta, cyangwa ngo mugende mudagadwa; kuko Uhoraho ari we uzabagenda imbere, akabajya n’inyuma, we Mana ya Israheli." 
Isaiah52:13 Dore umugaragu wanjye azasagamba, azakuzwa, yererezwe asumbe byose." 
Isaiah52:14 Nk’uko imbaga y’abantu yamubonye igakangarana, kuko yari yangiritse bitavugwa, imisusire ye nta ho igihuriye n’iy’umuntu, n’uburanga bwe ntibuse n’ubwa bene muntu," 
Isaiah52:15 ni na ko bizatangaza amahanga menshi, abami nibamugera imbere bumirwe, kuko bazaba babonye icyo batigeze babwirwa, bakitegereza ikintu kitigeze kibaho." 
Isaiah53:1 Ni nde wakwemera ibyo twebwe twumvise? Ni nde wahishuriwe ukuboko kwa Nyagasani? 
Isaiah53:2 Yakuriye imbere y’Uhoraho nk’umumero ushibutse, ameze nk’umuzi wanamye mu gitaka cyumiranye: nta buranga, nta n’igikundiro byo kurembuza amaso yacu, yewe nta n’igihagararo cyamutera igikundiro." 
Isaiah53:3 Yari yasuzuguwe kandi yatereranywe n’abantu, umunyamibabaro n’umumenyerane w’ibyago; mbese nk’uwo bagera imbere, bakipfuka mu maso, kuko yari asuzuguritse, twese nta we umwitaho." 
Isaiah53:4 Nyamara kandi, ni imibabaro yacu yari yikoreye, ni ibyago byacu byari bimuremereye; ariko twe, tukamubonamo uwahawe igihano, nk’uwibasiwe n’Imana ikamucisha bugufi." 
Isaiah53:5 Nyamara we yahinguranyijwe kubera ibyaha byacu, ajanjagurirwa ibicumuro byacu: igihano cye cyadukomoreye amahoro, ibikomere bye tubikesha umukiro." 
Isaiah53:6 Twese twarabuyeraga nk’intama zazimiye, tugenda intatane, buri wese atomereye inzira ye, maze Uhoraho amugerekaho ububi bwacu bwose." 
Isaiah53:7 Yarashinyaguriwe, ariko yicisha bugufi, ntiyabumbura umunwa, boshye umwana w’intama bajyanye mu ibagiro, cyangwa intama yicecekera imbere y’abayogosha ubwoya, na we ntiyaruhije abumbura umunwa." 
Isaiah53:8 Yafashwe ku gahato, bamucira urw’akarengane, kandi nta n’umwe wigeze amwitaho. Ni koko, yakuwe mu isi y’abazima, ahanirwa ubugome bw’umuryango we." 
Isaiah53:9 Yahambwe hamwe n’abagiranabi, imva ye ishyirwa hamwe n’iy’abakungu, n’ubwo we nta bugome yigeze agira, akaba nta n’ikinyoma cyigeze mu munwa we." 
Isaiah53:10 Uhoraho yashatse kumujanjaguza imibabaro, kandi namara gutura ubuzima bwe ho impongano z’ibyaha, azabona abamukomokaho, azarambe, maze azuzuze atyo umugambi w’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah53:11 Nyuma y’iyo mibabaro yose, azabona urumuri, azanezerwe; namara kumenyekana ko ari intungane, azageza benshi ku butungane. Umugaragu wanjye azakiranura imbaga y’abantu, kuko yikoreye ubwe ibicumuro byabo." 
Isaiah53:12 Ni cyo gituma nzamugenera umugabane mu bihangange, akazagabana umunyago n’abanyamaboko; kuko ubwe yigabije urupfu, akabarirwa mu banyabyaha. Ubwe yikoreye ibicumuro by’imbaga, nuko atakambira abagiranabi." 
Isaiah54:1 Vuza impundu, wa ngumba we itakibyara; ishime kandi ubyine, wowe utakiramukwa, kuko ngaba, baje ari benshi abahungu b’umugore w’intabwa, bararuta ubwinshi ab’umugore ufite umugabo, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah54:2 Agura ikibanza cy’ihema ryawe, inkingi zo mu mazu yawe bazimure. Ntugire kandi icyo uzigama, ungura imigozi yawe n’imambo zawe uzishimangire," 
Isaiah54:3 kuko ugiye kugwira, haba iburyo cyangwa ibumoso, abana bawe bazazungura amahanga, bature mu migi yari yaribagiranye." 
Isaiah54:4 Wigira ubwoba, kuko utazakorwa n’ikimwaro, wimanjirwa, kuko utazongera gukozwa isoni, ukazibagirwa ikimwaro cyo mu bukumi bwawe, n’umugayo wo mu bupfakazi bwawe ntuwibuke ukundi." 
Isaiah54:5 Kuko uwaguhanze ari we mugabo wawe, izina rye rikaba Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo; uwagucunguye, Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli, yitwa Imana y’isi yose!" 
Isaiah54:6 Mugore w’intabwa kandi ushavuye, Uhoraho aguhamagaye, agira ati «Umugore wo mu busore bwanjye se yasendwa?» Iyo ni Imana yawe ibivuze." 
Isaiah54:7 Nabaye ngutaye akanya gato, ariko kubera impuhwe nguhoranira, ngiye kugucyura." 
Isaiah54:8 Mu burakari bwinshi nagize, naguhishe uruhanga rwanjye akanya gato, ariko mu rukundo ruzira iherezo ngufitiye, ngiye kukugaragariza impuhwe zanjye, uwo ni Uhoraho, uwagucunguye, ubivuze." 
Isaiah54:9 Bizamera nko mu gihe cya Nowa, ubwo ndahiye ko amazi atazongera kurengera ku isi; nko muri icyo gihe cya Nowa, ni na ko narahiye ko ntazongera kukurakarira, no kutazasubira kukwirukana ukundi." 
Isaiah54:10 N’iyo imisozi yava mu myanya yayo, ndetse n’udusozi tugahungabana, urukundo rwanjye ntiruzavaho, n’isezerano ryanjye ry’amahoro ntirizahugana, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, ukugaragariza impuhwe ze." 
Isaiah54:11 Wagize ibyago, uhuhwa n’umuyaga ubura uguhumuriza, none dore, amabuye yawe ngiye kuyakikizaho imitako, bityo nkubake ku masarabwayi abengerana." 
Isaiah54:12 Inkuta zawe nzazubakisha amabuye atukura, inkike zawe nzizengurutseho amabuye y’agaciro gakomeye." 
Isaiah54:13 Abahungu bawe bose bazaba abigishwa b’Uhoraho, kandi bazagira amahoro, atagira uko angana." 
Isaiah54:14 Uzashingira imizi ku butabera, ubwo ukize ugushikamira, nta cyo uzatinya; kuko ukize uwagukangaranyaga, akaba atazongera kukwegera." 
Isaiah54:15 Niba bashaka no kukugambanira, ibyo si jye bizaba biturutseho; ariko uzagutera wese, azakuzira!" 
Isaiah54:16 Dore ni jye waremye umucuzi uvuguta umuriro w’amakara, agacura igikoresho kimufitiye akamaro; ni jye kandi waremye umuntu ugenewe kurimbura!" 
Isaiah54:17 Intwaro yose yakorewe kukurwanya, ntizabigeraho, ururimi rw’uzaguhagurukira mu rubanza, uzarushinja ikinyoma. Nguwo umugabane uzigamiwe abagaragu b’Uhoraho; ngubwo uburenganzira mbahaye. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah55:1 Yemwe, abafite inyota, nimugane ku mazi, n’iyo mwaba mudafite feza, nimuze mwese! Nimusabe ingano zo kurya ku buntu; nimuze kandi munywe amata na divayi nta feza, nta n’ubwishyu!" 
Isaiah55:2 Kuki mwatagaguza feza yanyu ku biribwa bitari byo, n’imari yanyu mukayitanga ku bidashobora kubahaza? Nimutege amatwi rero munyumve, kandi murye ikiri cyiza; muronkere ibyishimo byanyu mu biribwa biryohereye." 
Isaiah55:3 Nimutege amatwi, nimunsange, mwumve maze muzabeho. Nzagirana namwe isezerano rizahoraho, nzabakomereze ibyiza nasezeranyije Dawudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Dore nari naramugize umuhamya mu miryango yose, aba umutware n’umutegetsi w’amahanga." 
Isaiah55:5 Nawe ihanga utazi, uzarihamagara, n’ihanga ritigeze rikumenya, rizakwirukira, ku mpamvu y’Uhoraho, ari we Mana yawe, no kubera Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli, waguhaye ikuzo rye." 
Isaiah55:6 Nimushakashake Uhoraho igihe agishobora kubonwa, nimumwiyambaze igihe akiri hafi." 
Isaiah55:7 Umugome nareke inzira ye, n’umugiranabi areke ibitekerezo bye. Nagarukire Uhoraho uzamwereka impuhwe ze, ahindukirire Imana ikenutse ku mbabazi." 
Isaiah55:8 Kandi ni koko, ibitekerezo byanyu si byo byanjye, n’inzira zanjye si zo zanyu, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah55:9 Nk’uko ijuru ryisumbuye cyane ku isi, ni na ko inzira zanjye zisumbye kure izanyu, n’ibitekerezo byanjye bigasumba ibyanyu." 
Isaiah55:10 Nanone kandi, nk’uko umvura n’urubura bimanuka ku ijuru, ntibisubireyo bitabobeje ubutaka, bitabumejejeho imyaka kandi ngo biyikuze, ngo bihe umubibyi imbuto, n’ifunguro rimutunga," 
Isaiah55:11 ni na ko ijambo risohotse mu munwa wanjye: ritangarukaho amara masa, ritarangije ugushaka kwanjye, ngo risohoze icyo naritumye." 
Isaiah55:12 Ni koko, muzasohoka mu byishimo, mugaruke iwanyu amahoro. Aho muzanyura hose, imisozi n’udusozi bizasabagizwa n’ibyishimo, n’ibiti byose byo mu gasozi bikome mu mashyi." 
Isaiah55:13 Ahari amahwa, hazamera umuzonobari, n’ahari igisura hazamere ibyatsi bihumura neza. Ibyo byose bizahesha Uhoraho ikuzo, bibe ikimenyetso gihoraho, kitazasibangana bibaho." 
Isaiah56:1 Uhoraho avuze atya: Nimuharanire ubutungane, mukurikize ubutabera, kuko umukiro wanjye wegereje, n’ubuntu bwanjye bugiye kwigaragaza." 
Isaiah56:2 Arahirwa umuntu ubigenza atyo, mwene muntu ubikomeraho, akubahiriza isabato, ntayice, akirinda gukora ikibi icyo ari cyo cyose." 
Isaiah56:3 Umunyamahanga wiziritse kuri Uhoraho ntakibwire ngo «Nta kabuza, Uhoraho azantandukanya n’umuryango we», cyangwa se inkone ivuge iti «Dore jye nsanzwe ndi igiti cyumye.»" 
Isaiah56:4 Kuko Uhoraho avuze atya: Abagabo b’inkone bubahiriza isabato yanjye, bagahitamo gukora ibinshimisha, kandi bagakomera ku Isezerano ryanjye," 
Isaiah56:5 nzabazigamira mu Ngoro yanjye i Yeruzalemu inkingi iriho izina ryabo; ibyo bizababere byiza kuruta abahungu n’abakobwa. Nzabaha izina rizahoraho ubutazasibangana. 
Isaiah56:6 Naho abanyamahanga bizirika kuri Uhoraho, bakamuyoboka bakunze izina rye kandi bakamubera abagaragu, abo bose bubahiriza isabato, ntibayice, bagakomera ku Isezerano ryanjye," 
Isaiah56:7 nzabazana ku musozi wanjye mutagatifu, nzatuma bishimira mu Ngoro yanjye bansengeramo. Ibitambo byabo bitwikwa n’andi maturo, bizakirwa ku rutambiro rwanjye, kuko Ingoro yanjye izitwa «Ingoro yo gusengerwamo n’amahanga yose.»" 
Isaiah56:8 Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, we utarurukanya abajyanywe bunyago ba Israheli. Uretse n’abo nzaba narakoranyije, nzongera mbakoranyirizeho n’abandi." 
Isaiah56:9 Nyamaswa zose zo mu gasozi, nimuze mwirishirize, ndetse namwe mwese, nyamaswa z’ishyamba!" 
Isaiah56:10 Abarinzi ba Israheli ni impumyi, bose uko bakabaye nta cyo bazi; ni nk’imbwa z’ibiragi, zidashobora kumoka, bararotagizwa, bakaryamira, bagahora bahunyiza;" 
Isaiah56:11 ariko kandi ni n’imbwa z’ibisambo: ntibazi kuvuga ngo «Turahaze», ngabo abitwa abashumba! Nta cyo biyumvira na mba, buri wese atomera ukwe; buri wese yishakira inyungu ye gusa." 
Isaiah56:12 Baravuga bati «Nimuze, tujye gushaka divayi, tunywe ku kayoga gakaze, n’ejo bizagende bityo, ibinyobwa ntibibuze.»" 
Isaiah57:1 Intungane irapfa, ntihagire n’umwe bibabaza; abagiraneza barashimutwa, ntihagire ubarengera. Ni koko, intungane ziricwa zizira akarengane." 
Isaiah57:2 Ariko rero, amahoro azaza, maze abakurikira inzira itunganye bazashobore kuruhukira mu ituze." 
Isaiah57:3 Naho mwebwe, nimwigire hino, bana b’umupfumukazi, bibyarirane by’uburaya n’ubwomanzi." 
Isaiah57:4 Uwo muriho museka ni nde? Uwo mwasamiye mukaba mumunegura, ni nde? Aho ntimuri abana b’ibyigomeke, n’inyoko y’abatekamutwe?" 
Isaiah57:5 Mwebwe mwishimishiriza mu nsi y’imishishi, no mu nsi ya buri giti cyose gitoshye, mugatambira abana mu mikokwe, no mu masenga yo mu bitare." 
Isaiah57:6 Amabuye asennye yo mu mikokwe wiziritseho, ni yo mugabane wawe, ni yo uzegukana; kuko ari yo utura ibitambo, ukayazanira amaturo. Urabona se ibyo byatuma mererwa neza?" 
Isaiah57:7 Mu mpinga y’umusozi muremure cyane, ni ho wibera n’abagore b’indaya, ni na ho uzamuka ujya gutura ibitambo." 
Isaiah57:8 Inyuma y’urugi n’inkomanizo, wahashyize impigi zawe. Ni koko, wagiye kure yanjye, wiyambika ubusa, udendura uburiri bwawe, uraryama, wihitiramo abo bantu, mwagiranye agakungu." 
Isaiah57:9 Wirukankanye amavuta uyashyira Meleki, umumarira imibavu yawe, wohereza intumwa zawe kugera kure, wisuzuguza utyo ukorera Sekuzimu." 
Isaiah57:10 Muri urwo rugendo rwose, warinanije, habe no kwibwira uti «Ibi nta cyo bimaze.» Ahubwo byaguteye kugira ishyaka, kuva ubwo ntiwongeye gucika intege." 
Isaiah57:11 Mbese ni nde waguteye ubwoba, maze bigatuma umpemukaho? Wowe ntukirushya unyibuka, ntunanzirikana mu mutima wawe. Kuva kera nariyumanganyije sinakwakura, nuko bikuviramo kuntinyuka." 
Isaiah57:12 Ariko jyewe nzagaya «ubuyoboke» bwawe n’ibikorwa byawe bitagira icyo bikumarira. 
Isaiah57:13 Nutakamba, ibyo bigirwamana byawe bizagutabare! Nyamara, umuyaga uzabitwara byose, serwakira ibyamukane. Ariko uzampungiraho wese azahabwa igihugu ho umunani, umusozi wanjye mutagatifu uzabe umugabane we." 
Isaiah57:14 Bazavuga bati «Nimutunganye umuhanda, mwagure inzira, mukureho icyitwa inkomyi cyose, mu nzira y’umuryango wanjye." 
Isaiah57:15 Kuko avuze atya, Usumba byose, agahoraho iteka, n’izina rye rikaba ritagatifu: Jyewe ndi Nyir’ubutagatifu ngasumba byose, nkaba no hafi y’uwicuza n’uwiyoroshya, kugira ngo nsubize ubuzima abasuzuguwe, mpembure imitima yashengutse." 
Isaiah57:16 Nta bwo nshaka guhora njya impaka, cyangwa se guhora ndakaye, kuko ibiremwa naremye, byarimbukira imbere yanjye." 
Isaiah57:17 Narakariye Israheli kubera ubusambo n’ubujura bwayo, nyihanisha kuyitarura gato, kuko nari ndakaye: nuko irivumbura, iragenda inyura inzira yishakiye," 
Isaiah57:18 kandi izo nzira zayo narazibonye! Nyamara ariko, nzayikiza, nyiyobore, nyihumurize kimwe n’abayo bababaye," 
Isaiah57:19 nshyire ibinezaneza mu minwa yabo. Amahoro azaba yose ku uwahabye, kimwe no ku uri bugufi; ni byo rwose, nzayikiza! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah57:20 Ariko rero, abagome ni nk’inyanja yisimbiza ntishobore gutuza, amazi yayo akazamura ibyondo n’isayo." 
Isaiah57:21 Abagome ntibazagira amahoro! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. 
Isaiah58:1 Shyira ejuru, uhamagare ubutizigama, urangurure ijwi nk’iry’akarumbeti, umenyeshe umuryango wanjye ibicumuro byawo, n’inzu ya Yakobo, amakosa yayo." 
Isaiah58:2 Ni jye bashakashaka uko bukeye, bifuza kumenya inzira zanjye. Bameze nk’abantu bakurikiza ubutabera, ntibirengagize ubutungane bw’Imana yabo. Baransaba kubacira imanza zitabera, bishimira kubana n’Imana." 
Isaiah58:3 Baravuga bati «Bitumariye iki gusiba, niba utabibona, cyangwa se kwicisha bugufi, niba utabimenya?» Ariko ku munsi wo gusiba, ntibibabuza kwigira mu byanyu, no kugirira nabi abakozi banyu." 
Isaiah58:4 Koko rero, ugusiba kwanyu kubyutsa impaka n’amahane, kandi mukirirwa mutimburana by’ubugome. Ntimusiba uko bikwiye, byatuma ijwi ryanyu ryumvikana mu ijuru!" 
Isaiah58:5 Icyo se cyaba ari cyo gisibo nshima, ku munsi umuntu yicishije bugufi? Byaba se ari ukugonda ijosi nk’urufunzo, cyangwa se kurambarara ku bigunira no mu ivu? Ibyo se ni byo wita igisibo, umunsi ushimisha Uhoraho?" 
Isaiah58:6 Igisibo kinshimisha ni iki ngiki: kudohora ingoyi z’akarengane, guhambura iminyururu y’uburetwa, kurekura abashikamirwaga, mbese muri make, gukuraho ibyashikamiraga muntu byose." 
Isaiah58:7 Ikindi kandi ni ugusangira umugati wawe n’umushonji, ugacumbikira abakene batagira aho bikinga, wabona uwambaye ubusa, ukamwambika, ntiwirengagize umuvandimwe wawe!" 
Isaiah58:8 Bityo urumuri rwawe ruzarase nk’umuseke weya, n’igikomere cyawe kizasubirane bwangu. Ubutabera buzakugenda imbere, n’ikuzo ry’Uhoraho rigumane nawe." 
Isaiah58:9 Bityo, uzatakambe maze Uhoraho agusubize, nuhamagara, avuge ati «Ndi hano.» Niba iwawe uhaciye akarengane n’amagambo mabi," 
Isaiah58:10 ugaharira umushonji igaburo ryawe bwite, kandi ugahembura uwazahaye, urumuri rwawe ruzarasira mu mwijima, ijoro ry’urwijiji rihinduke amanywa y’ihangu." 
Isaiah58:11 Uhoraho azakuyobora ubudahwema, azaguhaze mu gihe cy’amapfa, amagufa yawe ayakomeze. Uzamera nk’ubusitani buvomererwa, cyangwa se nk’isoko idudubiza kandi ikagira amazi adakama." 
Isaiah58:12 Uzubaka bundi bushya amatongo ya kera, usubukure imishinga yari iriho mbere, bazakwite «Umuzibabyuho, usibura amayira ngo abe nyabagendwa.»" 
Isaiah58:13 Niwirinda kwica isabato, no guharanira inyungu zawe ku munsi wanjye mutagatifu, ukita isabato «Umunsi w’umunezero», umunsi mutagatifu w’Uhoraho ukakubera «Umunsi w’icyubahiro», ukawubaha wirinda kugira umurimo ukora, wirinda guharanira inyungu zawe, cyangwa guhihibikana mu bucuruzi bw’urudaca," 
Isaiah58:14 ni ho uzagira umunezero muri Uhoraho, maze nzakujyane mu igare, hejuru y’imisozi y’isi, ngutungishe umunani wa Yakobo, umukurambere wawe. Ni byo rwose, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah59:1 Muribeshya! Akaboko k’Uhoraho si kagufi cyane ku buryo atabasha gukiza, n’ugutwi kwe ntikwazibye, ku buryo kutumva." 
Isaiah59:2 Ahubwo ni ibyaha byanyu byabatandukanyije n’Imana, ni ibicumuro byanyu byatumye abahisha uruhanga rwe, abihisha kure cyane, bituma atabumva." 
Isaiah59:3 Kuko ibiganza byanyu byandujwe n’amaraso, intoki zanyu zikuzura ubugome; iminwa yanyu igahwihwisa ibinyoma, ururimi rwanyu rukavuga ibitagira shinge." 
Isaiah59:4 Nta n’umwe uregana ibiri byo, cyangwa ngo ahamye ukuri; bishingikiriza ubusa, bakavuga amahomvu, basama ubugiranabi, bakabyara amakuba." 
Isaiah59:5 Baraturaga amagi y’inshira, bakabohekanya indodo z’igitagangurirwa; uriye ku magi yabo arapfa, igi rimenetse, rigahubukamo impiri." 
Isaiah59:6 Ubudodo bwabo ntibuvamo umwambaro, ntibashobora kwambara ibyo baboshye, kuko bihanda umubiri, ibikorwa byabo bikabyara amatiku." 
Isaiah59:7 Ibirenge byabo byiruka bigana ku kibi, bigasiganwa bijya kumena amaraso y’indacumura; ibitekerezo byabo ni ibitekerezo by’ubugome, aho banyuze hose, bahabiba amatiku n’iterabwoba." 
Isaiah59:8 Nta bwo bazi inzira y’amahoro, aho banyura hose, ntibakurikira ubutabera; bihangira utuyira tutaboneye, uhanyuze wese ntagire amahoro." 
Isaiah59:9 Koko agakiza k’Imana karacyaturi kure, n’ubutungane ntibutugeraho. Twari twizeye urumuri, none dore ni umwijima, twizera umwezi, none turagenda mu icuraburindi." 
Isaiah59:10 Turashakisha ku rukuta nk’impumyi, boshye abantu batagira amaso. Turasitara ku manywa nko mu kabwibwi, turi bazima, ariko tukamera nk’intumbi." 
Isaiah59:11 Twese turahuma nk’ibirura, tukaguguza nk’inuma. Twari dutegereje agakiza none karabuze, dutegereje umukiro, none uri kure yacu." 
Isaiah59:12 Koko ibicumuro byacu ni byinshi imbere yawe, ibyaha byacu biradushinja. Ni koko, ubugome bwacu turabuhorana, ubugiranabi bwacu turabuzi neza:" 
Isaiah59:13 kwivumbagatanya, kuryarya Uhoraho, kwihakana Imana yacu, guhimba inama z’ubujura n’ubwambuzi, gutekereza no kuvuga ibinyoma, tubikuye ku mutima." 
Isaiah59:14 Bityo, agakiza tukagasubiza inyuma, ubuntu bukihagararira kure, kuko ukuri kwaguye ku karubanda, ubutabera ntibuhabone umwanya," 
Isaiah59:15 ukuri kwarazimye, uwirinze kugira nabi akabizira. Uhoraho yarabibonye, asanga ari bibi, ababazwa n’uko nta butungane bukibaho." 
Isaiah59:16 Yabonye nta muntu n’umwe bishishikaje, atangazwa n’uko nta n’umwe ubihagurukira, nuko yiyemeza kubyikorera ubwe, abitewe n’ubudahemuka bwe." 
Isaiah59:17 Yakindikije ubutabera nk’umukandara w’icyuma, ashyira mu mutwe ingofero y’umukiro: ikanzu yambaye iba umwambaro wo guhora, yisesuraho ishyari nk’umwitero we." 
Isaiah59:18 Uko bamukoreye ni ko azabitura, abamurwanya abarakarire, n’abanzi be abacyahe." 
Isaiah59:19 Nuko kuva mu burengerazuba bazatinye izina ry’Uhoraho, no kuva mu burasirazuba batinye ikuzo rye, kuko azaza nk’uruzi ruhurura, rwihutishwa n’umwuka w’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah59:20 Azaza ari Umucunguzi wa Siyoni, n’uw’abo muri Yakobo bahindutse bakanga ibyaha byabo. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah59:21 Naho jye, uwo ari Uhoraho ubivuze, dore isezerano nzagirana na bo: umwuka wanjye ugutwikiriye, n’amagambo nashyize mu munwa wawe ntateze kuzava ku munwa wawe, habe no ku munwa w’abana bawe, cyangwa se ku uw’urubyaro rw’abana bawe, uhereye ubu n’iteka ryose. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah60:1 Haguruka, ubengerane Yeruzalemu! Kuko urumuri rwawe ari nguru, kandi ikuzo ry’Uhoraho rikaba rikurasiyeho." 
Isaiah60:2 Nyamara dore umwijima utwikiriye isi, n’icuraburindi ribundikiye amahanga; ariko wowe, Uhoraho azakurasiraho, n’ikuzo rye rikubengeraneho." 
Isaiah60:3 Amahanga azagana urumuri rwawe, abami basange umucyo ukurasiyeho." 
Isaiah60:4 Kebuka impande zose, maze witegereze: dore bose barakoranye, baje bakugana, abahungu bawe baturutse iyo bigwa, n’abakobwa bawe baje bahagatiwe." 
Isaiah60:5 Nuko uzabirebe maze unezerwe, umutima wawe wisimbize, utaratswe n’ibyishimo, kuko ari wowe bazazanira ubukire bwo hakurya y’inyanja, n’umutungo w’amahanga ukazataha iwawe." 
Isaiah60:6 Amashyo y’ingamiya azakuzuranaho, ingamiya zikiri nto z’i Madiyani n’i Eyifa; abantu bose b’i Saba bazaza, bikoreye zahabu n’ububani, kandi baze baririmba ibisingizo by’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah60:7 Amatungo magufi yose y’i Kedari azakoranyirizwa iwawe, za rugeyo z’i Nebayoti uzazitureho ibitambo; zizajye ku rutambiro rwanjye, zishimwe. Ni koko, nzatuma Ingoro ibengerana ikuzo ryanjye." 
Isaiah60:8 Abo ni bande baguruka nk’igihu, cyangwa nk’inuma zigana ibyari byazo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Ni koko, ibirwa byose ni jye biza bigana, amato y’i Tarishishi yafashe iya mbere, kugira ngo bazane abahungu bawe bari iyo bigwa, kumwe na feza na zahabu byabo, baje gusingiza izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana yawe, Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli, kuko yagukujije." 
Isaiah60:10 Abanyamahanga bazubaka bundi bushya inkike zawe, abami bazakuyoboke, kuko mu burakari bwanjye naguhannye, ariko mu bugwaneza bwanjye nkakugirira impuhwe." 
Isaiah60:11 Amarembo yawe azahora yuguruye, haba ku manywa cyangwa nijoro ntazugarirwa na rimwe, kugira ngo binjire iwawe, abakuzaniye ubukungu bw’amahanga, n’abami babo, umwe inyuma y’undi." 
Isaiah60:12 Igihugu n’ingoma bitazakuyoboka, bizarimbuka, amahanga azasenywe burundu." 
Isaiah60:13 Ikuzo ryo muri Libani rizaza iwawe, umuzonobari n’ibindi biti byiza bizire icyarimwe, kugira ngo bibe umurimbo w’ahubatswe Ingoro yanjye, bityo mpeshe ikuzo aho nshyize umusego w’ibirenge byanjye." 
Isaiah60:14 Abahungu b’abagucishaga bugufi bazakugana bakububira; abagusuzuguraga bose bazagupfukamire. Bazakwita «Umugi w’Uhoraho», «Siyoni ya Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli.»" 
Isaiah60:15 Ubwo wari waratereranywe, wanzwe kandi nta muntu n’umwe ukugeraho, nzakugira ishema rizahoraho, n’ibyishimo by’ibihe bizaza, uko bizasimburana." 
Isaiah60:16 Uzonka amashereka y’amahanga, wijute ubukire bw’abami, bityo umenyereho ko Umukiza wawe ari jye, Uhoraho, nkaba Indatsimburwa ya Yakobo igucungura." 
Isaiah60:17 Mu kigwi cy’umuringa, nzakuzanira zahabu, mu kigwi cy’icyuma, nguhe feza; mu kigwi cy’ibiti, nzakuzanira umuringa, mu kigwi cy’amabuye, nguhe icyuma. Nzimika Amahoro akubere umwami, nguhe Ubutabera mu kigwi cy’abagutegekesha igitugu." 
Isaiah60:18 Nta we uzongera kumva havugwa iterabwoba mu gihugu cyawe, ubwangizi n’amatongo ntibizarangwa mu mipaka yawe; ahubwo inkike zawe uzazita «Agakiza», amarembo yawe yitwe «Ibisingizo»." 
Isaiah60:19 Ntuzongera kumurikirwa n’izuba ku manywa, ukwezi ntikuzakumurikira ukundi nijoro: Uhoraho ni we uzakubera urumuri ruhoraho, Imana yawe ikubere ikuzo." 
Isaiah60:20 Izuba ryawe ntirizarenga ukundi, n’ukwezi kwawe ntikuzijima, kuko Uhoraho azakubera urumuri ruhoraho, iminsi y’amaganya yawe ikibagirana." 
Isaiah60:21 Mu muryango wawe bose bazaba intungane, bazatunge igihugu iteka ryose. Abo naremye bazaba nk’umucwira w’ibihingwa byanjye, wagenewe kumenyekanyisha ikuzo ryanjye." 
Isaiah60:22 Umuryango muto uzabarwamo abantu igihumbi, uw’inkeho ube ihanga ry’imbaga itabarika. Ni jye Uhoraho uzabyitaho, igihe cyabyo nikigera." 
Isaiah61:1 Umwuka w’Uhoraho urantwikiriye, kuko Uhoraho yantoye akansiga amavuta; yanyohereje gushyira abakene inkuru nziza, komora abafite umutima wamenaguritse, gutangariza imbohe ko zibohowe, n’abapfukiranwaga ko bafunguwe," 
Isaiah61:2 kwamamaza umwaka w’impuhwe z’Uhoraho, umunsi w’ukwihorera kw’Imana yacu, guhumuriza abari mu cyunamo bose," 
Isaiah61:3 kwambika ikamba abashavuye b’i Siyoni. Bazambikwa ikamba mu kigwi cy’ivu, umwambaro w’umurimbo mu cyimbo cy’ibigunira, basigwe amavuta y’ibyishimo mu mwanya w’umubabaro. Bityo bazabite «Imishishi y’ubutabera, ibihingwa by’Uhoraho, bigenewe kumenyekanyisha ikuzo rye.»" 
Isaiah61:4 Bazubaka bundi bushya amatongo ya kera, begure ibyangiritse ku byanyazwe abakurambere, basane imigi yasenyutse, n’amatongo yariho kuva mbere hose." 
Isaiah61:5 Abantu baturutse impande zose bazaragira amatungo yanyu, abanyamahanga bababere abahinzi n’abakozi bo mu mizabibu." 
Isaiah61:6 Naho mwebwe, muzitwa «abaherezabitambo b’Uhoraho», bazabite «abagaragu b’Imana yacu». Muzatungwa n’umusaruro w’amahanga, mushimishwe no kwigarurira ikuzo ryabo." 
Isaiah61:7 Mwebwe, mwakozwe n’isoni inkubwe ebyiri, mu kigwi cy’ikimwaro, ibyishimo bizababera umugabane; muzabona umunani wikubye kabiri mu gihugu cyanyu, kandi musubirane ibyishimo mwahoranye." 
Isaiah61:8 Kuko jye, Uhoraho, nkunda ubutabera, nkanga ubujura buvanze n’ububisha. Nzabaha igihembo cyanyu nta buryarya, nzagirane namwe Isezerano rizahoraho iteka." 
Isaiah61:9 Ababakomokaho bazamenyekana mu mahanga, urubyaro rwanyu rwamamare mu miryango; abazarubona bose bazamenyereho ko ari urubyaro Uhoraho yahaye umugisha." 
Isaiah61:10 Ndasabagizwa n’ibyishimo muri Uhoraho, umutima wanjye uhimbajwe n’Imana yanjye, kuko yanyambitse umwambaro w’umukiro, akansesuraho umwitero w’ubutungane. Nishimye nk’umukwe utamirije ikamba rye, cyangwa umugeni witatse imirimbo ye." 
Isaiah61:11 Uko ubutaka bumeza imbuto zabwo, n’ubusitani bugakuza icyo bwabibwemo, ni na ko Uhoraho azameza ubutungane n’ibisingizo, imbere y’amahanga yose." 
Isaiah62:1 Sinzigera ntererana Siyoni, sinzareka guhihibikanira Yeruzalemu, kugeza ubwo ubutungane bwayo butangaje nk’icyezezi, n’umukiro wayo ukakirana nk’urumuri." 
Isaiah62:2 Bityo, amahanga azabone ubutungane bwawe, abami bose babone ikuzo ryawe. Nuko bazakwite izina rishya, rizatangazwa n’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah62:3 Uzamera nk’ikamba ribengerana mu kiganza cy’Uhoraho, nk’igisingo mu ntoki z’Imana yawe." 
Isaiah62:4 Ntibazongera kukwita «Nyirantabwa», n’igihugu cyawe ngo cyitwe «Itongo», ahubwo uzitwa «Inkundwakazi», n’igihugu cyawe cyitwe «Umugeni», kuko Uhoraho azaba agukunze, igihugu cyawe akibengutse." 
Isaiah62:5 Uko umusore ashaka umugeni w’isugi, ni ko Uwaguhanze azakubenguka; kandi nk’uko umukwe yishimira umugeni we, Imana yawe ni ko izakwishimira." 
Isaiah62:6 Ku nkike zawe, Yeruzalemu, nahashyize abarinzi; amanywa n’ijoro ntibazigera baceceka na rimwe. «Mwebwe, abibutsa Uhoraho ibya Yeruzalemu, ntimukaruhuke!" 
Isaiah62:7 Ntimukamuhwemere kugeza ubwo azaba yasubiranyije Yeruzalemu, akayigira ’Ikuzo ry’isi’.»" 
Isaiah62:8 Uhoraho yarahije indyo ye, ukuboko kwe k’ububasha, ati «Sinzongera gutanga ingano zawe nzigaburira abanzi bawe, abanyamahanga ntibazongera kukunywera divayi waruhiye." 
Isaiah62:9 Ariko rero, abasaruzi b’ingano bazaziryaho, maze basingize Uhoraho; ababengera divayi na bo bazayinywaho, bari mu bikari by’Ingoro yanjye.»" 
Isaiah62:10 Nimusohoke! Nimusohoke munyure mu marembo, nimwagure inzira y’umuryango wanjye. Nimuringanize, mutegamishe umuhanda, muvanemo amabuye, muzamure ibendera imbere y’amahanga." 
Isaiah62:11 Dore ibyo Uhoraho atangaza kugera ku mpera z’isi: Nimubwire umukobwa wa Siyoni, muti «Dore Umukiza wawe araje, azanye iminyago, abo yatabaye bamubanje imbere." 
Isaiah62:12 Bazabita ’Umuryango mutagatifu’, ’Abacunguwe n’Uhoraho’. Naho wowe bazakwite ’Agahebuzo’, ’Umugi utaratereranywe’.»" 
Isaiah63:1 Uwo se yaba ari nde, uturutse Edomu, uhagurutse i Bosira yambaye iby’imihemba? Ntagira uko asa mu myambaro ye myiza, aragenda yemye n’imbaraga ze nyinshi. — Ni jyewe uvugana ubutabera, nkibasira amahanga ngo nkize umuryango wanjye." 
Isaiah63:2 — Uwo mutuku ku myambaro yawe ni uw’iki, ni kuki wambaye nk’abenga imizabibu?" 
Isaiah63:3 — Umuvure nawiyengesheje jyenyine, nta n’umwe twari kumwe wo mu muryango wanjye. Nuko mu burakari bwanjye, ndabahonyora, mu mujinya wanjye, ndabaribata, umutobe wabo utarukira ku myambaro yanjye, ibyo nambaye byose birahindana." 
Isaiah63:4 Kuko mu mutima wanjye wari umunsi wo kwihorera, none umwaka w’ubucungurwe na wo ukaba utashye." 
Isaiah63:5 Nararebye hirya no hino: mbura untabara, nguma aho numiwe: sinabona unkomeza! Nuko ukuboko kwanjye kurangoboka, n’uburakari bwanjye burankomeza." 
Isaiah63:6 Mu burakari bwanjye najanjaguye amahanga, mu mujinya wanjye ndabasindisha, amaraso yabo nyasesa hasi." 
Isaiah63:7 Nzajya nibuka ibyiza by’Uhoraho n’ibisingizo bimurata, kubera ibyiza byose yadukoreye. Nzogeza ubuntu Uhoraho yagiriye inzu ya Israheli, n’ibyo yabakoreye byose, kubera impuhwe ze." 
Isaiah63:8 Yaravuze ati «Koko ni umuryango wanjye, abana batazantenguha!» maze yemera kubabera Umukiza," 
Isaiah63:9 mu mibabaro yabo yose. Nta bwo ari umuhagarariye cyangwa intumwa ye, ni we ubwe bwite wabakijije; mu rukundo rwe no mu mpuhwe ze, ni we ubwe wabacunguye. Yarabahagurukije, arabaterura muri iyo iminsi yose ya kera." 
Isaiah63:10 Ariko bo barijujuse, bababaza umwuka we mutagatifu, ni bwo rero abateye umugongo, maze we ubwe abarwanya nk’umwanzi." 
Isaiah63:11 Nuko bibuka ibyabaye kera mu gihe cya Musa: «Ari hehe uwarohoye mu mazi umushumba w’umuryango we? Yahereye he, uwabashyiragamo umwuka we mutagatifu?" 
Isaiah63:12 Ari he Nyir’ukuboko kurabagirana, wagendaga iburyo bwa Musa, uwatandukanyije amazi imbere yabo, kugira ngo yiheshe ikuzo?" 
Isaiah63:13 Ari he uwabanyujije rwagati mu nyanja, boshye ifarasi yiruka mu butayu?" 
Isaiah63:14 Bari bameze nk’amatungo akinagira mu kibaya, Umwuka w’Uhoraho ubageza aho baruhukira.» Nguko uko wayoboye umuryango wawe, kugira ngo wiheshe izina ry’icyubahiro." 
Isaiah63:15 Itegereze maze urebe, uhereye mu ijuru, no ku Ngoro yawe ntagatifu kandi ibengerana ikuzo. Umwete wawe, n’ubutwari bwawe, kimwe na za mpuhwe zawe byahereye he? Waba se warisubiyeho, ukareka kunkunda?" 
Isaiah63:16 Nyamara ariko, ni wowe Data! Kuko Abrahamu atatumenye, Israheli na we akaba atatuzi; Uhoraho, ni wowe Data n’Umucunguzi wacu. Ng’iryo izina ryawe, kuva kera kose." 
Isaiah63:17 Uhoraho, kuki ureka duteshuka inzira zawe, tukanangira imitima yacu, kugeza n’aho tutakikubaha? Tugarukire, turi abagaragu bawe, turi n’imiryango y’umunani wawe." 
Isaiah63:18 Umuryango wawe mutagatifu ntiwaregamye mu murage wawo, ntibyatinze abanzi bacu banyukanyutse Ingoro yawe." 
Isaiah63:19 Dore igihe kibaye kirekire utakidutegeka, nk’aho tutacyitirirwa izina ryawe. None iyaba wari ukinguye ijuru, ngo umanuke, imisozi yose yarindimukira imbere yawe." 
Isaiah64:1 Waza nk’umuriro utwika, amazi akatura, ukamenyesha izina ryawe mu bagutambamira; amahanga yose yahinda umushyitsi imbere yawe," 
Isaiah64:2 kubera ibintu biteye ubwoba waba ukoze tutabyiteguye. 
Isaiah64:3 Nta na rimwe bigeze babyumva, nta na rimwe bigeze babibwirwa, nta n’ijisho ryigeze ribona indi mana ikora ityo, ngo irengere uwayizeye, uretse wowe." 
Isaiah64:4 Usanganira abishimira gukurikira ubutabera, bakwibuka, bagakurikira inzira zawe: None waraturakariye, kuko twagucumuyeho, ariko kandi tuzakizwa n’uko tugarutse mu nzira zawe." 
Isaiah64:5 Twese twari nk’abahumanye, n’ibikorwa byacu by’ubutabera bimeze nk’umwenda urimo imyanda; twese twararabiranaga nk’amababi yahungutse, ibicumuro byacu bikatugurukana nk’umuyaga." 
Isaiah64:6 Nta n’umwe wari ukiyambaza izina ryawe, ngo yisubireho maze akwizirikeho, kuko wari wadukuyeho amaso, ukatugabiza ibicumuro byacu." 
Isaiah64:7 Nyamara kandi Uhoraho, ni wowe Mubyeyi, turi ibumba ribumbwa na we, twese turi igikorwa cy’ibiganza byawe." 
Isaiah64:8 Uhoraho, wirakara birenze urugero, ntukomeze kwibuka ibibi twakoze, ahubwo utwitegereze, twese turi umuryango wawe." 
Isaiah64:9 Imigi yawe mitagatifu yabaye amatongo, Siyoni na yo ihinduka ubutayu, Yeruzalemu iribagirana." 
Isaiah64:10 Ingoro yacu ntagatifu kandi itagira uko isa, aho abasekuruza bacu baririmbiraga ibisingizo byawe, yahindutse umuyonga, n’ibyo twakundaga byose byarangiritse." 
Isaiah64:11 Uhoraho, ushobora se kwihanganira ibyo byose? Wakomeza se kwicecekera, ukadukoza isoni bene ako kageni?" 
Isaiah65:1 Abatangishaga inama, nararetse baransanga, abatanshakaga, ndabareka barambona, ndavuga nti «Ndi hano, ndi hano», mbwira ihanga ritiyambazaga izina ryanjye." 
Isaiah65:2 Buri munsi nahoraga ndamburiye ibiganza byanjye ku muryango wararutse, ku bantu badakurikira inzira iboneye, bakihambira ku bitekerezo byabo bwite." 
Isaiah65:3 Ni umuryango uhora unsuzugura ku mugaragaro, baturira ibitambo mu busitani bwabo, bagatwikira ububani ku ntambiro z’amatafari;" 
Isaiah65:4 bibera mu marimbi, bakarara amajoro mu buvumo, barya inyama z’ingurube, bagashyira ku mbehe zabo ibyahumanye!" 
Isaiah65:5 Nuko bakavuga bati «Igirayo, ntunyegere, kuko wakurizaho gupfa!» Abo ni bo banyuka umwotsi mu mazuru, n’umuriro wabo ugurumana, ukiriza umunsi." 
Isaiah65:6 Baritonde, kuko ibyo byose byanditse imbere yanjye, nkaba ndateze guceceka, kugeza ubwo nzaba nabituye, kandi nzabitura ibicumuro byabo, kimwe n’iby’abasekuruza babo," 
Isaiah65:7 ku buryo bibagera ku mutima — Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Abatwikiraga imibavu mu mpinga z’imisozi, bakantuka bahagaze ku tununga, nzabitura nkurikije iyo myifatire yabo, ku buryo bibagera ku mutima." 
Isaiah65:8 Uhoraho uvuze atya: Nk’uko bigenda, iyo basanze iseri rihishije ry’umuzabibu, baravuga bati «Ntimuryonone, kuko ririmo umugisha», nanjye ni ko nzagenzereza abagaragu banjye, kugira ngo ntabatsembera icyarimwe." 
Isaiah65:9 Nzaha inzu ya Yakobo urubyaro, muri Yuda havuke ingenerwamurage y’imisozi yanjye, intore zanjye zizayitunge, abagaragu banjye bayitureho." 
Isaiah65:10 Sharoni izaba urwuri rw’amatungo magufi, ikibaya cya Akori kibe ibuga ry’amatungo maremare, kubera ko umuryango wanjye uzaza unshakashaka." 
Isaiah65:11 Ariko mwebwe, abimuye Uhoraho, mukibagirwa umusozi wanjye mutagatifu, mugategurira Gadi ameza, mugasukira Meni inkongoro yuzuye divayi y’imvange," 
Isaiah65:12 nzabagenera kwicishwa inkota: mwese muzapfukame, kugira ngo mwicwe. Kuko nabahamagaye, ntimunyitabe; nabavugisha, ntimunyumve. Mwakoreye ikibi mu maso yanjye, kandi muhitamo ibitanshimisha." 
Isaiah65:13 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho Imana avuze atya: abagaragu banjye bazarya, naho mwebwe mwicwe n’inzara; abagaragu banjye bazanywa, naho mwebwe mwicwe n’inyota; abagaragu banjye bazanezerwa, naho mwebwe mukorwe n’ikimwaro;" 
Isaiah65:14 abagaragu banjye bazavuza impundu umutima wabo, wuzure ibinezaneza; naho mwebwe muvuze induru, umutima usobetse amaganya, munaboroge mufite umutima ushavuye!" 
Isaiah65:15 Intore zanjye zizibuka izina ryanyu zirivume, zigira ziti «Urakicwa n’Imana ihoraho!» Ariko abagaragu banjye bazahabwa irindi zina," 
Isaiah65:16 maze uzashaka kwiha umugisha ku isi, azawiheshe «Imana y’ukuri», n’uwo ku isi uzashaka kugira indahiro, azarahirishe «Imana y’ukuri», kuko imibabaro ya kera izaba yaribagiranye, ikazaba itakibarwa mu maso yanjye." 
Isaiah65:17 Dore ngiye kurema ijuru rishya n’isi nshya; bityo, ibya kera byoye kuzibukwa ukundi, kugeza ubwo bitagitekerezwa." 
Isaiah65:18 Ahubwo ibyo ngiye kurema ni ibyishimo n’umunezero bizahoraho, kuko umunezero nzarema ari Yeruzalemu, ibyishimo bikaba abaturage bayo." 
Isaiah65:19 Koko nzanezerwa kubera Yeruzalemu, nsagwe n’ibyishimo kubera umuryango wanjye. Ntihazongera kumvikana amarira n’imiborogo." 
Isaiah65:20 Ntihazongera gupfa uruhinja rw’iminsi mike, cyangwa se umusaza utagejeje ku gihe cye; kuko uzapfa ari muto, azaba amaze nibura imyaka ijana, utazagera ku myaka ijana azaba yaravumwe." 
Isaiah65:21 Bazubaka amazu bayaturemo, bahinge imizabibu barye imbuto zayo;" 
Isaiah65:22 ntibazongera kubaka ngo itahwe n’undi, ngo nibahinga, biribwe n’utabihinze, kuko umuryango wanjye uzaramba nk’igiti, intore zanjye zizanezwa n’ibyavuye mu maboko yazo." 
Isaiah65:23 Ntibazongera kuvunikira ubusa, ntibazabyarira gupfusha, kuko bazaba urubyaro Uhoraho yahaye umugisha, ari bo, ari n’abazabakomokaho." 
Isaiah65:24 Ndetse, na mbere y’uko bampamagara, nzabasubiza; ni baba bakivuga, mbe nabumvise hakiri kare." 
Isaiah65:25 Ikirura n’umwana w’intama bizarisha hamwe, intare izarishe ubwatsi nk’ikimasa, naho inzoka itungwe n’umukungugu. Nta we uzaba akigira nabi cyangwa ngo akore amahano ku musozi wanjye mutagatifu. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah66:1 Uhoraho avuze atya: Ijuru ni intebe yanjye y’ubwami, isi ikaba akabaho nkandagizaho ibirenge byanjye. Mwanyubakira rero inzu nyabaki? Aho naruhukira, ni hehe?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ikindi kandi, ibi byose byakozwe n’ikiganza cyanjye, ibyaremwe byose ni ibyanjye, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Ariko uwo nitaho cyane ni umukene, ufite umutima ushavuye kandi akubaha ijambo ryanjye." 
Isaiah66:3 Kugira ngo bature igitambo, bica ikimasa, ariko kandi bakica n’umuntu! Basogota umwana w’intama, bagahotora n’imbwa! Bahereza ituro, rikaba ari amaraso... y’ingurube! Bagira urwibutso rw’ububani, nyamara bakosa... ikigirwamana! Koko rero, abo bantu bihimbiye inzira zabo bwite, bishimira kuguma mu mahano yabo." 
Isaiah66:4 Nanjye nzashimishwa n’ingaruka mbi z’ibikorwa byabo, nzabateze ibibatera ubwoba, kuko nahamagaye, ntihagire unyumva. Bakoreye ikibi mu maso yanjye, bahitamo ibitanshimisha." 
Isaiah66:5 Nimutege amatwi ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebwe mwese, abahindishwa umushyitsi n’ijambo rye! Abavandimwe banyu babanga, babaciye kubera izina ryanjye, baravuga bati «Ngaho Uhoraho niyerekane ikuzo rye, maze tubone ibyishimo byanyu.» Nyamara ni bo bazakorwa n’ikimwaro." 
Isaiah66:6 Nimwumve ahubwo urusaku ruvuye mu mugi, n’urwamo ruturutse mu Ngoro! Ni ijwi ry’Uhoraho witura abanzi be, abaha igihembo kibakwiye." 
Isaiah66:7 Mbere y’iramukwa, Yeruzalemu yarabyaye, mbere y’uko igira ibise, ibyara umuhungu." 
Isaiah66:8 Ni nde wigeze kumva ibintu nk’ibyo? Ni nde wigeze kubona ibintu bisa bityo? Igihugu se cyabyarwa umunsi umwe gusa, cyangwa ihanga rikagira ritya rikavuka? Nyamara ni ko byagendekeye Siyoni, yabaye ikiramukwa, ihita ibyara abahungu." 
Isaiah66:9 Ese ye, yaba ari jye utuma umubyeyi ajya ku nda, ngahindukira nkamubuza kubyara? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Niba kandi ari jyewe utanga ibyara, nahindukira nkabangamira ikivutse? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze."
