Isaiah66:10 Nimwishimane na Yeruzalemu; mwebwe mwese abayikunda, nimuhimbarwe. Nimusabe ibyishimo hamwe na yo, namwe mwese abayiririraga." 
Isaiah66:11 Muzonke amashereka, kandi muhazwe n’ibere ryayo ribahumuriza, nimukomeze mwonke, kandi muryoherwe n’ibere ryayo ryarese." 
Isaiah66:12 Uhoraho avuze atya: Dore ngiye kuyiyoboraho amahoro atemba nk’uruzi, n’ikuzo ry’amahanga ribasendereho nk’umugezi. Muzamera nk’abana bari ku ibere bahagatirwa, kandi bagasimbagirizwa ku bibero." 
Isaiah66:13 Uko umubyeyi ahumuriza umwana we, nanjye ni ko nzabahumuriza, maze muri Yeruzalemu muzahumurizwe." 
Isaiah66:14 Muzabibona, umutima wanyu uzasabagizwe n’ibyishimo, ingingo zanyu zizatohagire nk’ibyatsi. Ikiganza cy’Uhoraho kiziyereka abagaragu be, ariko abanzi be, azabarakarira." 
Isaiah66:15 Dore Uhoraho aje mu muriro rwagati; amagare ye ni nk’inkubi y’umuyaga, kugira ngo uburakari bwe abumarire mu mujinya, n’imiburo ye isimburwe n’indimi z’umuriro." 
Isaiah66:16 Uhoraho azitwaza umuriro n’inkota, kugira ngo acire abantu imanza: abenshi muri bo bakazicwa n’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah66:17 Abo ni abiyita «abaziranenge», bakihumanura kugira ngo binjizwe mu busitani buri ahirengeye, bakurikiye umukuru wabo ubayobora; ni na bo kandi barya inyama z’ingurube, bakarya inyamaswa zizira hamwe n’imbeba. Abo bose bazarimbukira icyarimwe, hamwe n’ibikorwa n’ibitekerezo byabo! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah66:18 Naho jyewe, nzanywe no gukoranyiriza hamwe amahanga y’indimi zose, kugira ngo azarebe ikuzo ryanjye." 
Isaiah66:19 Koko, nzashyira ikimenyetso rwagati muri yo, maze nzohereze mu mahanga abarokotse muri bo: i Tarishishi, i Puti n’i Ludi (mu bahanga b’umuheto), i Tubali, i Yabani no mu birwa bya kure bitigeze byumva bamvuga, bitanigeze bibona ikuzo ryanjye, bazamamaze ikuzo ryanjye mu mahanga." 
Isaiah66:20 Nuko bazagarure abavandimwe banyu bo mu mahanga yose, bahetswe ku mafarasi no mu magare; mu ngobyi, ku nyumbu no ku ntebe nziza, babageze ku musozi wanjye mutagatifu, i Yeruzalemu, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Bazabampaho ituro, nk’uko Abayisraheli bazana ku nkoko zisukuye, ituro ryabo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah66:21 Ndetse bamwe muri bo, nzabagira abaherezabitambo, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah66:22 Uko ijuru rishya n’isi nshya ndemye, bizakomera imbere yanjye, ni na ko urubyaro rwanyu n’izina ryanyu bizakomera, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah66:23 Hazaza igihe ikinyamubiri cyose kizapfukama imbere yanjye, uhereye ku mboneko y’ukwezi, kugeza ku mboneko y’ukundi, kuva kuri sabato kugeza ku yindi, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Isaiah66:24 Nuko nibasohoka, bazarebe intumbi z’abandwanyije, kuko urunyo ruzabamunga rutazapfa, n’umuriro uzabatwika ntuzazime. Bazatera ishozi icyitwa ikinyamubiri cyose." 
Jeremiah1:1 Ngaya amagambo ya Yeremiya, mwene Hilikiyahu, wari umwe mu baherezabitambo babaga i Anatoti mu ntara ya Benyamini," 
Jeremiah1:2 ari na ho Uhoraho yamubwiriye ijambo rye; ubwo hari mu mwaka wa cumi n’itatu w’ingoma ya Yoziya, mwene Amoni, umwami wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah1:3 Uhoraho yongeye kumubwira ijambo rye mu gihe cya Yoyakimu, mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda, kugeza ku ndunduro y’ingoma ya Sedekiya, na we wari mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda. Ubwo hari mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe w’ingoma ye, mu kwezi kwa gatanu, igihe abaturage ba Yeruzalemu bajyanwaga bunyago." 
Jeremiah1:4 Uhoraho yambwiye iri jambo, agira ati" 
Jeremiah1:5 «Ntarakuremera mu nda ya nyoko, nari nkuzi; nakwitoreye utaravuka, nkugira umuhanuzi w’amahanga.»" 
Jeremiah1:6 Ubwo nanjye ndatakamba nti «Rwose Nyagasani Mana, sinashobora kuvuga, dore ndacyari muto!»" 
Jeremiah1:7 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati «Wivuga ngo ndacyari muto, kuko aho nkohereza hose uzajyayo, kandi n’ibyo ngutuma byose, ukazabivuga." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ntugire umuntu utinya, humura turi kumwe, ndagutabara. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Jeremiah1:9 Uhoraho anyegereza ikiganza, ankora ku munwa, maze arambwira ati «Dore nshyize amagambo yanjye mu kanwa kawe." 
Jeremiah1:10 Umenye ko uyu munsi nguhaye ububasha ku mahanga no ku bihugu byose, kugira ngo urandure kandi uhirike, utsembe kandi usenye, kugira ngo wubake kandi utere imbuto.»" 
Jeremiah1:11 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo agira ati «Yeremiya, urabona iki?» Ndasubiza nti «Icyo mbona ni ishami ry’umurinzi.»" 
Jeremiah1:12 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Urebye neza! Nanjye rero ndi umurinzi, ngaharanira kuzuza ijambo ryanjye.»" 
Jeremiah1:13 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira iri jambo agira ati «Urabona iki?» Ndasubiza nti «Icyo mbona, ni inkono ibira, umuriro wenyegejwe n’umuyaga uturuka mu majyaruguru.»" 
Jeremiah1:14 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Koko mu majyaruguru ni ho haturuka ibyago bikayogoza abaturage bose bo mu gihugu. 
Jeremiah1:15 Ngiye guhamagaza imiryango yose yo mu bihugu by’amajyaruguru — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — bazaza, maze buri mwami ashinge intebe imbere y’amarembo ya Yeruzalemu, ahateganye n’inkike ziyikikije, n’imbere y’imigi yose ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Mbamenyesheje ibyemezo nabafatiye kubera ubugome bwabo: dore barantaye, batura ibitambo ibigirwamana, maze bapfukamira amashusho bakoresheje ibiganza byabo." 
Jeremiah1:17 Naho wowe kenyera ukomeze, uhaguruke maze ubamenyeshe ibyo ngutegetse kubabwira. Ntuzareke bagutera ubwoba, kuko nubugira ari wowe, nzagutera guhinda umushyitsi imbere yabo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Jyewe, uyu munsi nkugize nk’umurwa ukomeye, inkingi y’icyuma, cyangwa nk’inkike y’umuringa imbere y’igihugu cyose, imbere y’abami ba Yuda, abatware bayo, abaherezabitambo bayo n’abatuye igihugu bose." 
Jeremiah1:19 Bazakurwanya ariko ntibazagushobora — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — humura turi kumwe ndagutabara.» 
Jeremiah2:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo agira ati 
Jeremiah2:2 «Genda! Urangurure mu matwi ya Yeruzalemu, uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Ndakwibutsa ubuyoboke bwo mu bukumi bwawe, n’urukundo wari umfitiye ukirambagizwa. Icyo gihe wankurikiraga mu butayu, mu butaka butagira ikibumeramo." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israheli yari umwihariko w’Uhoraho n’umuganura umugenewe; uwawuryagaho wese yarawuryozwaga, maze agaterwa n’ibyago. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah2:4 Nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebwe abo mu nzu ya Yakobo, namwe abo mu miryango yose ya Israheli." 
Jeremiah2:5 Uhoraho avuze atya: Ba so bangaye iki cyabateye kunyitaza? Birutse inyuma y’ibidafite akamaro, none na bo barinze guhinduka imburamumaro." 
Jeremiah2:6 Nta bwo bibajije bati «Uhoraho wadukuye mu gihugu cya Misiri ari he, we watuyoboye mu butayu, akatunyuza mu bihugu by’amayaga n’imanga, ahantu h’agasi n’umwijima w’icuraburindi, ahantu hatagendwa ntihanaturwe?»" 
Jeremiah2:7 Nabazanye mu gihugu cy’uburumbuke kugira ngo murye ku mbuto zacyo, kandi munyurwe n’ibyiza byacyo. Nyamara mwebwe mukigezemo, muragihindanya, maze umurage wanjye muwuhindura umwaku." 
Jeremiah2:8 Abaherezabitambo ntibagize bati «Uhoraho ari he?» Abazi amategeko yanjye baranyirengagije, abayobora rubanda banyiteruyeho. Abahanuzi bahanura mu izina rya Behali, maze biruka inyuma y’ibidafite akamaro." 
Jeremiah2:9 Ni cyo gituma ngiye kubashinja, mwebwe n’abuzukuru banyu. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah2:10 Nimujye ku birwa by’Abakitimu maze murebe, mutume kubaririza i Kedari mubimenye neza; murebe niba hari ibintu nk’ibi byigeze bibayo." 
Jeremiah2:11 Mbese igihugu kigeze kwimura imana zacyo ngo kiyoboke izindi? Nyamara kandi nta n’ubwo twazita imana! Umuryango wanjye wo, waguranye Uhoraho ikuzo ryawo, ibidafite akamaro." 
Jeremiah2:12 Juru, ibyo nibigutangaze, wumirwe kandi ujunjame. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah2:13 Koko, umuryango wanjye wakoze amahano abiri: barantaye, jye soko y’amazi afutse, bifukurira amariba yabo bwite, amariba yatobotse adashobora no kuregamamo amazi." 
Jeremiah2:14 Mbese Israheli ni umugaragu? Yavukiye se mu buja, kugira ngo bamugire ingaruzwamuheto?" 
Jeremiah2:15 Ibibwana by’intare birabwejagura biyitontomera. Israheli yahindutse umwirare, imigi yayo yaratwitswe, nta muturage ukiyirangwamo." 
Jeremiah2:16 Dore ndetse ab’i Nofu n’i Dafune baragukandagira ku gahanga! 
Jeremiah2:17 Ibyo wabitewe n’iki, atari uko witandukanyije n’Uhoraho Imana yawe, igihe yakuyoboraga mu nzira?" 
Jeremiah2:18 None se kuki ujya mu Misiri kunywa amazi ya Nili? Ni kuki ujya muri Ashuru kunywa amazi y’Uruzi rwabo? 
Jeremiah2:19 Uragahanirwa ubugome bwawe, maze ubugambanyi bwawe uburyozwe! Iyumvishe ukuntu ari bibi kandi bibabaje kuba warihakanye Uhoraho Imana yawe, maze wangera imbere ntuhinde umushyitsi! Uwo ni Nyagasani, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Jeremiah2:20 Kuva kera, washatse kwigobotora ubuhake, uca ingoyi zawe, ugira uti «Sinshaka kuba umuja ukundi.» Nuko urambarara kuri buri musozi no mu nsi ya buri giti gitoshye, boshye umugore w’indaya." 
Jeremiah2:21 Nyamara jyewe nari naraguteye uri umuzabibu nihitiyemo, uko wakabaye utagira amakemwa. Waje guhinduka ute umuzabibu w’ishyamba, ukera imbuto zirura?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Naho wakwiyuhagiza ibimeze bite, ugakoresha amasabune y’amoko yose, ububi bwawe buracyari nk’ico mu maso yanjye. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah2:23 Watinyuka ute kuvuga ngo «Sinanduye», cyangwa uti «Sinayobotse za Behali»? Ibuka imyifatire yawe aho wanyuze mu kabande, maze wemere icyo wakoze. Wari umeze nk’ihene y’ishashi yariye isoni, itana igana impande zose," 
Jeremiah2:24 cyangwa indogobe y’ingore imenyereye ubutayu! Iyo yarinze ireha umuyaga, ni nde wayirindura? Ingabo ziyishaka ntizirirwa ziruha, ziyitegera mu kwezi kwayo." 
Jeremiah2:25 Reka kwirukanka utyo, utava aho ubura epfo na ruguru, n’umuhogo wawe ukumagara. Ariko uravuga uti «Biramaze! kuko nkunda abanyamahanga, kandi nkaba nshaka kubayoboka.»" 
Jeremiah2:26 Mbese nk’uko igisambo kimwara iyo gifashwe, ni ko n’Abayisraheli bamwaye, bo n’abami babo, abatware babo, abaherezabitambo babo n’abahanuzi babo." 
Jeremiah2:27 Barahura n’igiti bakakibwira ngo «Uri data!» babona ibuye bati «Ni wowe wambyaye!» Banteye umugongo aho kunyerekeza amaso, nyamara kandi basumbirizwa n’ibyago, bakantakambira ngo «Haguruka udukize!»" 
Jeremiah2:28 Ni ko se, gihugu cya Yuda: ibigirwamana wikoreye biri ahajya he? Ngaho nibihaguruke niba bishobora kugukiza, igihe uzaba uri mu makuba; dore ko byabaye byinshi nk’imigi yawe!" 
Jeremiah2:29 Ni iki gitumye munshyira mu rubanza? Mwese uko mungana mwarampemukiye. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. 
Jeremiah2:30 Abana banyu narabahannye, ariko biba iby’ubusa ntibumva. Inkota yanyu yatsembye abahanuzi, boshye intare kirimbuzi." 
Jeremiah2:31 None rero, bantu b’aya magingo, nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho: Israheli se naba nayibereye ubutayu, cyangwa igihugu cy’umwijima? Ni iki se gituma umuryango wanjye uvuga uti «Tuzigira aho dushaka, ntituzakugarukira ukundi?»" 
Jeremiah2:32 Umukobwa ukiri muto yakwibagirwa imirimbo ye, cyangwa se uwashyingiwe akibagirwa umweko we? Nyamara umuryango wanjye waranyibagiwe, hashize igihe kirekire." 
Jeremiah2:33 Ushoboye rwose gucuragana ushakisha uwagukunda. Nyamara kugira ngo ubigereho, wageze n’aho kwica abantu ubigira akamenyero." 
Jeremiah2:34 Amaraso y’abakene n’intungane bayasanga ku bishura by’imyambaro yawe, kandi ari nta n’umwe muri bo wafatiye mu cyuho." 
Jeremiah2:35 Ibyo byose ubirengaho ukavuga ngo «Ndi intungane, uburakari bwe ntibungeraho.» Jyewe rero, ngiye kugushinja kuko wivugira uti «Sinacumuye.»" 
Jeremiah2:36 Uko witesha agaciro witwaje uburiganya, mu Misiri uzahakura ikimwaro, nk’icyo wavanye muri Ashuru." 
Jeremiah2:37 Naho uzahava wubitse umutwe kuko Uhoraho adashaka abo wari wiringiye, kandi nta n’amahoro uzagira uri kumwe na bo." 
Jeremiah3:1 Uhoraho avuze atya: Iyo umugabo asenze umugore we bagatandukana, nyuma uwo mugore agashaka undi mugabo, bakongera kubana se? Ubwo se uwo mugore ntaba yarahumanye burundu? Wowe rero wasambanye n’abagabo batagira ingano, none ngo urangarukiye! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah3:2 Ubura amaso urebe mu mpinga zose: aho waba utasambaniye ni he? Wahoraga mu mayira nk’Umwarabu mu butayu, utegereje abasambane bawe. Igihugu waragihumanije kubera ubuhabara n’ingeso mbi byawe." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ibyo byatumye imvura itagwa, ndetse n’iyo mu itumba irabura, ariko wowe wakomeye ku busambanyi bwawe, ntibwagutera isoni." 
Jeremiah3:4 Nyamara na n’ubu uracyatinyuka kuntakira uti «Dawe, ni wowe ncuti y’amagara yo mu buto bwanjye!" 
Jeremiah3:5 Mbese uzahwema ryari kungirira inzika no kundakarira?» Nyamara n’ubwo uvuga utyo, ntibikubuza kohoka mu bibi no kubikomeza." 
Jeremiah3:6 Ku ngoma y’umwami Yoziya, Uhoraho arambwira ati «Ese wabonye ubuhakanyi bwa Israheli, ukuntu yagiye kuri buri musozi muremure, no mu nsi ya buri giti gitoshye, maze ikahasambanira?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Nahoze nibwira ko nimara gukora ibyo byose, izangarukira, ariko ntiyigeze igaruka. Na Yuda, mwene nyina w’umugambanyi, ibyo byose yarabyiboneye." 
Jeremiah3:8 Yabonye ukuntu nasenze Israheli w’umuhakanyi kubera ubusambanyi bwayo, nkayiha urwandiko rw’ubusende. Nyamara, Yuda mwene nyina w’umugambanyi ntiyatinye, na we yaragiye yiroha mu busambanyi," 
Jeremiah3:9 bituma igihugu cyose gihumana kubera ubuhabara n’ingeso mbi ze; asambanya ibyo abonye byose, ari igiti, ari n’ibuye." 
Jeremiah3:10 Ibyo byose Yuda w’umugambanyi yabirenzeho, ntiyangarukira n’umutima we wose, ahubwo ibyaha bye abyicuzanya uburyarya. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Jeremiah3:11 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Israheli n’ubwo yanyihakanye, irusha ubutungane Yuda yangambaniye." 
Jeremiah3:12 Genda rero ugana mu majyaruguru, maze urangurure ijwi, ugira uti ’Israheli wanyihakanye, ngarukira, sinzongera kukurakarira. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Jyewe ndi umudahemuka; kandi inzika yanjye ntimara igihe. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah3:13 Gusa, emera icyaha cyawe: wemere ko witeruye kuri Uhoraho Imana yawe. Wabungagiye hirya no hino mu banyamahanga, mu nsi ya buri giti gitoshye, wanga kumva ijwi ryanjye. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.’»" 
Jeremiah3:14 Uhoraho avuze atya: Nimungarukire, mwa nyoko y’abahakanyi mwe, kuko ari jye mutware wanyu. Nzagenda mpabavana, umwe mu mugi, abandi babiri mu muryango, maze mwese mbajyane i Siyoni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Nzabaha abashumba banogeye umutima wanjye, maze babaragirane ubushobozi n’ubwitonzi bwinshi." 
Jeremiah3:16 Icyo gihe, nimumara kororoka, mukagwira mu gihugu — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nta we uzaba akivuze ngo «Ubushyinguro bw’Isezerano ry’Uhoraho!» Ni koko nta we uzabutekereza, nta we uzongera kubwibuka cyangwa ngo abwiteho, nta we uzababazwa n’uko butakiriho, ndetse nta n’uzongera gukora ubundi Bushyinguro." 
Jeremiah3:17 Icyo gihe Yeruzalemu izitwa «Intebe y’Uhoraho», maze amahanga yose azaze ayigana, kuko izaba yitiriwe Uhoraho; kandi, ayo mahanga azareka gukurikiza inama z’imitima mibi yayo yanangiye." 
Jeremiah3:18 Muri iyo minsi, inzu ya Yuda izasanga iya Israheli, maze zombi zituruke mu majyaruguru, zitahe mu gihugu nahaye abasekuruza babo ho umurage. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah3:19 Jyewe nahoze nibwira nti «Icyampa ngo nshobore kugutandukanya n’abandi bana, nguhe igihugu gitoshye, n’umurage uhebuje andi mahanga ubwiza.» Naribwiraga nti «Muzajya munyita ’Dawe’, kandi ntimuzongera kwitandukanya nanjye ukundi.»" 
Jeremiah3:20 Nyamara ariko nk’uko umugore ahemukira umugabo we, namwe, bantu bo mu muryango wa Israheli, ni ko mumpemukira. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah3:21 Induru ni yose mu mpinga y’imisozi; ayo ni amarira n’amaganya y’Abayisraheli, kuko bayobye inzira, birengagiza Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Nimungarukire, mwa birara mwe, ndashaka kubakiza ubwo buhakanyi bwanyu.» (Rubanda:) Ngaha turaje, turagusanze kuko turi abawe; ni wowe Uhoraho, Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Ni koko, kwiringira ibikorerwa mu mpinga y’imisozi n’ibihavugirwa nta kamaro; umukiro w’ukuri wa Israheli, uri muri Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah3:24 Ariko kuva tukiri bato, gusenga ibigirwamana byatsembye ibikorwa by’abasokuruza bacu, biyogoza amatungo yabo, amagufi n’amaremare, bigeza no ku bahungu n’abakobwa babo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Isoni nizidukore maze ikimwaro kitworose! Rwose, kuva mu buto bwacu kugeza uyu munsi, twacumuye kuri Uhoraho Imana yacu, twanga gutega amatwi ijwi rye." 
Jeremiah4:1 Israheli, nuramuka ushatse kugaruka, ni jyewe ugomba gusanga. Nuvana ibigirwamana byawe mu maso yanjye, ntuzongera kubungera ukundi." 
Jeremiah4:2 Niba kandi urahiye mu izina ry’Uhoraho muzima, ukabikora mu kuri, mu buryo butunganye no mu butabera, ubwo amahanga yose azamperwamo umugisha kandi azakurizwa muri jye." 
Jeremiah4:3 Dore ibyo Uhoraho abwira abantu ba Yuda n’ab’i Yeruzalemu: Nimuteme ishyamba, muhinge umurima mushya, mureke gukomeza kubiba mu mahwa!" 
Jeremiah4:4 Bantu ba Yuda, namwe ab’i Yeruzalemu, nimwiyegurire Uhoraho, nimwiyorosoreho ibyugarije umutima wanyu. Nimutagenza mutyo, uburakari bwanjye buzavubuka nk’umuriro; buzatwika ku buryo nta we ushobora kubuzimya, kubera imigenzereze yanyu mibi." 
Jeremiah4:5 Nimubitangaze muri Yuda, mubyamamaze muri Yeruzalemu, nimuvuze ihembe hose mu gihugu, murangurure amajwi muti «Nimukoranire hamwe mwese, twinjire mu bigo bikomeye." 
Jeremiah4:6 Ibendera ryanyu muryerekeze i Siyoni; muhunge, nta guhagarara mu nzira! Kuko mbateje ibyago, biturutse mu majyaruguru; ishyano rikaba riguye!" 
Jeremiah4:7 Intare yavumbutse mu kibira; umurimbuzi w’amahanga arahagurutse, avuye iwe azanywe no guhindura igihugu cyawe itongo. Imigi yawe izatwikwa, abayituye bayicikemo.»" 
Jeremiah4:8 Kubera ibyo rero, nimwambare ibigunira, nimuganye kandi mucure imiborogo, kuko uburakari bukaze bw’Uhoraho butaratuvirira!" 
Jeremiah4:9 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kuri uwo munsi nyine umwami n’abatware bazacika intege, abaherezabitambo basuherwe, n’abahanuzi bahinde umushyitsi. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah4:10 Ubwo ndavuga nti «Nyagasani Mana, mu by’ukuri wabeshye uyu muryango na Yeruzalemu, igihe uvuze uti ’Muzagira amahoro’, none ngaha twamazwe n’inkota.»" 
Jeremiah4:11 Icyo gihe Uhoraho azabwira uwo muryango na Yeruzalemu, ati «Ngaha umuyaga ugurumana uturutse mu butayu, unyura mu mpinga z’imisozi ugana umuryango wanjye. Nta bwo ari umuyaga wo kugosora cyangwa gusukura:" 
Jeremiah4:12 ahubwo ni umuyaga w’inkubi, nohereje uturutse aho ngaho. Ubu rero nanjye ngiye kubacira urubanza.» (Rubanda:)" 
Jeremiah4:13 Dore umwanzi atwahutsemo nk’ibicu biyagara, amagari ye y’intambara ni nk’ishuheri y’umuyaga, naho amafarasi ye araguruka kurusha kagoma. Turagatoye! Turashize! (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah4:14 Yeruzalemu, tsemba ubugome mu mutima wawe, maze ukunde urokoke. Mbese iyo migambi mibi ikurimo, uzayibundikira kugeza ryari?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ijwi rirangururiye i Dani no ku musozi wa Efurayimu, rimenyesha amakuba agiye gutera." 
Jeremiah4:16 Nimuburire amahanga, muhururize Yeruzalemu! Ababisha baturutse mu gihugu cya kure, baje bavugiriza induru mu migi ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Bayigose impande zose nk’abarinzi b’umurima, kuko yanyiteruyeho. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah4:18 Imyifatire yawe n’ibikorwa byawe, ni byo byagukururiye ibyo byose. Ngicyo igihano cyawe, wumve n’uko gikarishye, ndetse n’ukuntu kigushegesha umutima! (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah4:19 Ayiwe we, ayiwe, ndashize! Mfite ubwoba, nkutse umutima, uradiha, sinahora, kuko numvise impuruza y’ihembe n’akamu k’intambara!" 
Jeremiah4:20 Haravugwa ibyago by’inkurikirane! Ni koko, igihugu cyose kirarimbutse. Dore ingando yanjye yarimbutse, amahema yanjye yasenyutse mu kanya gato." 
Jeremiah4:21 Nzahereza he kureba ibendera ry’intambara, nzumva impuruza y’ihembe ngeze ryari? (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah4:22 Umuryango wanjye ni ibigoryi, koko nta bwo banzi. Ni abana badatekereza, nta cyo bashobora kwiyumvisha. Bashoboye kugira nabi, ariko kugira neza byo ntibabizi. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah4:23 Nitegereje isi, nsanga ari ikivangitirane, yambaye ubusa; naho ku ijuru, urumuri rwazimiye." 
Jeremiah4:24 Nitegereje imisozi, nsanga ihinda umushyitsi; n’udusozi twose tunyeganyega." 
Jeremiah4:25 Nitegereje, nsanga nta muntu ukiriho, n’inyoni zose zarahunze." 
Jeremiah4:26 Nitegereje, nsanga igihugu cyari gitoshye, cyarahindutse ubutayu, n’imigi yose yarakongotse, itwitswe n’uburakari bukaze bw’ Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah4:27 Uhoraho avuze atya: Isi yose izaba umwirare, nyamara ariko, sinyitsembye buheriheri." 
Jeremiah4:28 Kubera ibyo, isi izagwa mu cyunamo, mu kirere ijuru ricure umwijima, kuko nabitegetse, ukaba ari wo mugambi niyemeje. Sinjya nivuguruza, kandi sinsubira inyuma!" 
Jeremiah4:29 Urwamo rw’abanyamafarasi n’abanyamiheto ngo ruvuge, rutera umugi wose guhunga. Bamwe baracengera mu bihuru, abandi barurira amabuye y’ibitare. Imigi yose isigaye ubusa, nta muturage ukiyirangwamo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Wowe se, ubwo uragokera iki? Wambara imihemba n’imitako ya zahabu, n’amaso yawe ukayasiga ibiyahindura ukundi! Urarushywa n’ubusa wigira mwiza, kuko abakurarikiraga bakuzinutswe, ahubwo bakaba bashaka kukurimbura." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ndumva igisa nk’iminiho y’umugore uramutswe; mbese nk’iy’ububabare bw’umugore ukibyara ubwa mbere. Iyo ni induru y’umwari mwiza Siyoni, uganya, agatakamba arashya amaboko, ati «Ndagowe, ndapfuye, nzira abishi banjye!»" 
Jeremiah5:1 Muzenguruke amayira ya Yeruzalemu, murebe, mubaririze, mushakashake ahantu hose: hari umuntu n’umwe mwahasanga ukora ibitunganye, agaharanira ukuri? Nimumubona, uwo mugi nzawubabarira. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah5:2 Iyo barahira baravuga ngo «Turahiye Uhoraho muzima!», kandi indahiro zabo ari ibinyoma." 
Jeremiah5:3 Niko se Uhoraho, ukuri si ko amaso yawe ashaka kureba? Urabahana ariko ntibabikangwa, urabatsemba ariko bakanga kukumva, bigira ba rutare, banga kukugarukira." 
Jeremiah5:4 Naho jye naribwiraga nti «Ni ba rubanda, nta bwenge bazi, ntibazi inzira z’Uhoraho, n’amategeko y’Imana yabo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Nzasanga abakuru babo tuvugane, kuko bo nibura, bazi inzira z’Uhoraho n’amategeko y’Imana yabo.» Nyamara nasanze bose ari kimwe: bigobotoye ubuhake baca ingoyi zabwo." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ni cyo gituma bazaribwa n’intare zo mu ishyamba, ibirura byo mu bigunda bikazabatsemba. Ibisamagwe bizagota imigi yabo; usohotsemo bihite bimutanyagura, kuko imyigaragambyo yabo ikabije, kandi n’ubuhakanyi bwabo ntibuhweme kwigaragaza. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah5:7 Ubwo se ibyo byose nabirengaho nkakubabarira? Abahungu bawe barantaye, ahubwo bakarahira mu izina ry’ibigirwamana. Narabagaburiye barahaga, nyamara bo bohoka mu busambanyi, bakabyiganira ku nzu y’indaya." 
Jeremiah5:8 Bameze nk’amafarasi yarinze, agatana, buri wese ariruka inyuma y’umugore w’undi." 
Jeremiah5:9 Ubwo se si ngomba kubahagurukira, nkihimura igihugu giteye gityo? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah5:10 Nimwurire inkike zacyo! Muzirimbure, ariko ntimuzitsembe. Nimucyambure amashami yacyo, kuko atari ay’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah5:11 Ni koko, ab’inzu ya Israheli kimwe n’iya Yuda, barangambaniye n’ubugome bwinshi, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah5:12 Bahakana Uhoraho, bavuga ngo «Ntabaho! Nuko rero ibyago ntibizadutera, ntituzigera twicwa n’inkota cyangwa inzara." 
Jeremiah5:13 Abahanuzi bameze nk’umuyaga uhuha, kuko atari Imana ibavugiramo. Ibyo byago batuvugaho bizabe ari bo bihama!»" 
Jeremiah5:14 Ni cyo gitumye avuze atya, Uhoraho Imana, Umugaba w’ingabo: «Kuko muvuze mutyo, amagambo yanjye ari mu kanwa kawe, nzayahindura umuriro, uyu muryango nywugire imiba y’inkwi: uwo muriro uzabatwike, bakongoke!" 
Jeremiah5:15 Bantu ba Israheli — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ngiye kubateza igihugu cya kure; igihugu kidashobora kuganzwa, igihugu kimaze imyaka n’imyaka, igihugu utazi ururimi rwacyo, ntiwumve n’ibyo bavuga." 
Jeremiah5:16 Imyambi yabo ni icyorezo, bose bakaba n’intwari ku rugamba." 
Jeremiah5:17 Bazatsemba ibyawe byose: imisaruro yawe n’imigati yawe, abahungu n’abakobwa bawe, batsembe amatungo magufi n’amaremare, imizabibu yawe n’imitini yawe. Igihe bazaba baje n’inkota zabo, bazasenya imigi ikomeye, wari wiringiye ko nta cyayigutereramo." 
Jeremiah5:18 Icyo gihe ariko na bwo, sinzabatsemba buheriheri, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah5:19 Ariko nibabaza bati «Ni kuki Uhoraho, Imana yacu yaduteje ibi byago byose?» uzabasubize uti «Nk’uko mwamwanze, mugakorera imana z’abanyamahanga mu gihugu cyanyu, ni ko muzakorera abanyamahanga mu gihugu kitari icyanyu.»" 
Jeremiah5:20 Nimutangarize ibi bene Yakobo, mubyumvikanishe muri Yuda, muti" 
Jeremiah5:21 «Nimwumve ibi, muryango utagira ubwenge n’umutima: bafite amaso ariko ntibabona, bakagira amatwi ariko ntibumve." 
Jeremiah5:22 Ese ntimuzanyubaha? — Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — Ese nta bwo muzahinda umushyitsi imbere yanjye, jye washyizeho umusenyi ngo ube urubibi rw’inyanja, urugabano itazigera irenga? Ibyutsa umuhengeri ariko ntigire icyo ishobora, imivumba yayo irasuma ariko ntirurenge." 
Jeremiah5:23 Ariko uyu muryango ufite umutima unangiye kandi wararutse: baranyanze, maze barigendera!" 
Jeremiah5:24 Ntibibwiye mu mutima, bati ’Reka twubahe Uhoraho Imana yacu, we uduha imvura iyo tuyikeneye, ari iy’umuhindo cyangwa iy’itumba, kandi akanatumenyera ibihe byagenewe isarura.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Ibicumuro byanyu ni byo byahinduye ibyo bihe, ibyaha byanyu bibangamira ibyo byiza." 
Jeremiah5:26 Koko mu muryango wanjye harimo abagiranabi, bari mu gico barubikiye nk’abahiga inyoni, batega imitego, igafata... abantu!" 
Jeremiah5:27 Amazu yabo yuzuye iminyago, nk’uko agatebo k’umuhigi kuzura inyoni, nguko uko bahindutse ibikomerezwa n’abakire," 
Jeremiah5:28 babyibushye kandi bakabengerana. Barakabije mu bugizi bwa nabi, ntibubahiriza ubutungane, ntibita ku mfubyi; nyamara ariko bikabahira, kandi nta n’ubwo barengera abakene." 
Jeremiah5:29 None se ubwo singomba kubahagurukira? Singomba kwihimura icyo gihugu kimeze gityo?» Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. 
Jeremiah5:30 Amahano ateye ishozi arakorerwa muri iki gihugu: 
Jeremiah5:31 abahanuzi barahanura ibinyoma, abaherezabitambo barishakira inyungu zabo; kandi umuryango wanjye ukabyishimira! Ariko se ubwo amaherezo azaba ayahe?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Nimuve i Yeruzalemu, mwebwe bene Benyamini, mujye gushakira ubuhungiro ahandi. Nimuvugirize ihembe i Tekowa, kuri Betikeremu muhashinge ibendera: mu misozi yo mu majyaruguru, hari icyago kibubikiye, ishyano ry’icyorezo!" 
Jeremiah6:2 Umwiza Siyoni, uteye ubwuzu akaba n’ihoho, ararimbutse!" 
Jeremiah6:3 Ni we abashumba baje basanga n’amatungo yabo. Bamugose impande zose, bahashinze amahema, buri wese yaragiye ahe." 
Jeremiah6:4 Nimushoze intambara ntagatifu, tumutere! Nimuhaguruke! Tumutere ku manywa y’ihangu! Turagowe, kuko umunsi uciye ikibu, ibicu by’umugoroba bikaba byiyongeranya." 
Jeremiah6:5 Nimuhaguruke, tumutere igicuku kinishye, dusenye ingoro ze nziza!" 
Jeremiah6:6 Avuze atya Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo: Nimutsinde ibiti, mukore umuhanda ugana i Yeruzalemu. Uwo mugi wangabijwe; ntugire ikindi kiwurangwamo kitari urugomo." 
Jeremiah6:7 Nk’uko iriba ribika amazi yaryo, ni ko na wo ubundikira ubugome bwawo. Muri wo nta kindi kiharangwa, kitari amahane n’ubwambuzi. Imibabaro n’ibikomere byawo, nabibona iteka bikanshavuza." 
Jeremiah6:8 Isubireho, Yeruzalemu! Naho ubundi nzitandukanya nawe, maze nguhindure ubutayu, igihugu kidatuwe." 
Jeremiah6:9 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nibahumbahumbe abasigaye muri Israheli nk’uko bahumba imizabibu! Ikiganza cyawe cyongere gufata ku mashami, nk’umusaruzi w’imizabibu! (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ni nde nzabwira amagambo yanjye, n’ubuhamya bwanjye akabyumva? Dore amatwi yabo yarapfuye, ntibashobora kumva, ijambo ry’Uhoraho barigize igitutsi, ntibarishaka. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah6:11 Nuzuye uburakari, jyewe Uhoraho singishoboye kubuzinzika. Bucuranurire ku bana bari mu nzira, no ku ikoraniro ryose ry’abasore, buzagere no ku bagabo, n’abagore, ku bakuru n’abasaza." 
Jeremiah6:12 Amazu yabo azahabwa abandi, hamwe n’imirima yabo, n’abagore babo, kuko ndamburiye ikiganza ku baturage b’iki gihugu. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!" 
Jeremiah6:13 Kuva ku muto kugera ku mukuru, bose bararuwe n’inyungu zabo, abahanuzi n’abaherezabitambo bose bakifata nabi." 
Jeremiah6:14 Barazinzika ishyano ry’umuryango wanjye, bavuga ngo «Ni amahoro, byose bimeze neza!» Nyamara ariko nta mahoro ariho." 
Jeremiah6:15 Bakozwe n’ikimwaro kubera amarorerwa bakora, nyamara nta mpungenge bibatera, ngo bazirikane ko bitesheje agaciro! Kubera iyo mpamvu, bazarimbuka nk’abandi bose, bakazatemba, igihe nzaba mbahagurukiye. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah6:16 Uhoraho avuze atya: Nimuhagarare ku mihanda mutekereze, mubaririze inzira abasokuruza banyuzemo. Inzira y’amahirwe ni iyihe? None rero, nimuyikurikire, bityo muzabona aho muruhukira. Ariko baravuga bati «Ntituzayikurikira!»" 
Jeremiah6:17 Nashyizeho abarinzi kugira ngo babarinde, none rero, muritonde nimwumva ihembe! Ariko baravuga ngo «Nta bwo dushaka kuryitaho.»" 
Jeremiah6:18 None rero, mahanga, nimwumve! Nawe wa koraniro we, menya ibigiye kukugwirira." 
Jeremiah6:19 Isi na yo niyumve! Jyewe ngiye guterereza uyu muryango ibyago; ari byo ngaruka y’ibitekerezo bibi byabo. Nta bwo bitondera amagambo yanjye, amategeko yanjye barayasuzugura." 
Jeremiah6:20 Umubavu uvuye i Saba, cyangwa urubingo ruhumura rwo mu gihugu cya kure, bimbwiye iki? Ibitambo byanyu bitwikwa, simbishaka; amaturo yanyu, ntanezeza." 
Jeremiah6:21 None rero, Uhoraho avuze atya: Imbere y’uyu muryango mpateze umutego bazasitaraho: umuhungu na se, abaturanyi n’incuti, bakazashirira icyarimwe." 
Jeremiah6:22 Uhoraho avuze atya: Umuryango uturutse mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru, ihanga rikomeye, rihagurutse mu mpera z’isi." 
Jeremiah6:23 Bitwaje imiheto n’amacumu, ni abagome ntibagira impuhwe; umuriri wabo ni nk’uw’inyanja isuma. Baje ku mafarasi, bari kuri gahunda y’ingabo ziri ku rugamba, baraguteye wowe, umwiza Siyoni. (Rubanda:)" 
Jeremiah6:24 Twumvise iyo nkuru ducika intege, dukuka umutima, tugira n’ububabare nk’ubw’umugore uramutswe." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ntujye ku gasozi cyangwa ngo ugere mu mihanda, kuko inkota y’umwanzi hose yahakwije iterabwoba. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah6:26 Wowe muryango wanjye, ambara ibigunira, kandi wiziringe mu mukungugu! Rangiza imihango yose y’uri mu cyunamo, ucure umuborogo nk’uwiraburiye umuhungu w’ikinege, kuko mu kanya gato umurimbuzi araba atugezeho. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah6:27 Ngushyiriyeho kugerageza umuryango wanjye. Uzawumenye kandi usuzume imyifatire yawo, nk’umucuzi usuzuma icyuma. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah6:28 Bose ni ibirara birenze ihaniro, ni abanyamagambo asebanya; bakomeye nk’umuringa n’icyuma, bose ni abarimbuzi." 
Jeremiah6:29 Umuvuba urahuhera, umuriro ukavana imyanda ku cyuma, ariko nta kamaro gukomeza kugitwika, niba imyanda itacyomokaho." 
Jeremiah6:30 Bazabita «Feza igayitse», kuko Uhoraho yabagaye!" 
Jeremiah7:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah7:2 «Hagarara mu muryango w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, maze utangaze aya magambo: Nimutege amatwi ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebwe mwese bantu ba Yuda mwinjirana muri iyi miryango, muje kuramya Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah7:3 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Nimuvugurure imyifatire yanyu n’imigenzereze yanyu, bityo nshobore guturana namwe aha hantu." 
Jeremiah7:4 Nimusigeho kwibeshyeshya amagambo atagira aho ashingiye, muvuga ngo: Ingoro y’Uhoraho! Ingoro y’Uhoraho! Uhoraho ari hano!" 
Jeremiah7:5 Ahubwo nimuhindure rwose imyifatire yanyu n’imigenzereze yanyu, muharanira igitunganiye umubano mu bantu." 
Jeremiah7:6 Ntimugakandamize umusuhuke, imfubyi n’umupfakazi; ntimukamenere amaraso y’indacumura aha hantu, kandi ntimukirukire ibigirwamana kuko byabakururira ibyago." 
Jeremiah7:7 Nimugenza mutyo, nzabona guturana namwe aha hantu, mu gihugu nahaye abasokuruza banyu kuva kera n’iteka ryose." 
Jeremiah7:8 Nyamara ariko dore muriringira amagambo y’ibinyoma adafite akamaro. 
Jeremiah7:9 Ubwo se muziba, mwice, musambane, murahire mu binyoma, mutwikire Behali ibitambo, mwiruke inyuma y’ibigirwamana bitigeze bibitaho," 
Jeremiah7:10 nimurangiza munze imbere muri iyi Ngoro yitiriwe izina ryanjye, muvuga ngo «Turakijijwe!», maze nyuma mwongere mwikorere ayo marorerwa yose?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Iyi Ngoro yitiriwe izina ryanjye, mwibwira se ko ari ubuvumo bw’abajura? Jyewe, ibyo ari byo byose, ndabona ari uko bimeze! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah7:12 Ngaho nimujye i Silo ahahoze ari ahanjye, aho nari nabanje gutuza izina ryanjye, murebe uko nahagenjereje bitewe n’ubugome bw’umuryango wanjye Israheli!" 
Jeremiah7:13 None rero ubu, ubwo mwakoze ibyo byaha byose — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nkabavugisha ubutitsa ntimunyumve, nkabahamagara ntimwitabe," 
Jeremiah7:14 iyi Ngoro yitiriwe izina ryanjye mwari mufitiye icyizere, n’aha hantu nabahaye mwebwe n’abasokuruza banyu, nzahagenzereza uko nagenjereje Silo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Nzabajugunya kure yanjye nk’uko najugunye abavandimwe banyu bose, urubyaro rwose rwa Efurayimu." 
Jeremiah7:16 Wowe rero, ntiwirirwe uvuganira uyu muryango, ngo ubahingukirize amarira cyangwa isengesho, uruhe untitiriza, kuko ntakumva." 
Jeremiah7:17 Ese ntubona ibyo bakorera mu migi ya Yuda no mu mayira ya Yeruzalemu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Abana batora inkwi, abagabo bagacana umuriro, maze abagore bakavuga umutsima kugira ngo bakorere utugati Umwamikazi w’ijuru. Byongeye muratura ibitambo biseswa izindi mana, bityo mukanshavuza." 
Jeremiah7:19 Ubwo se ni jye bashavuza — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — cyangwa ni bo ubwabo bishavuza? Nyamara ariko byagombye kubatera isoni. 
Jeremiah7:20 Nuko rero, Uhoraho Imana avuze atya: Uburakari bwanjye n’umujinya wanjye bigiye kwisuka aha hantu, ku bantu no ku matungo, ku biti byo ku gasozi no ku mbuto zo mu mirima; bihinduke umuriro udateze kuzima." 
Jeremiah7:21 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Nimwongere ibitambo byanyu bitwikwa ku bindi bitambo byanyu, maze mwirire inyama zabyo!" 
Jeremiah7:22 Igihe mvanye abasokuruza banyu mu gihugu cya Misiri, nta cyo nababwiye, nta gitambo gitwikwa cyangwa ikindi gitambo nigeze mbaka;" 
Jeremiah7:23 gusa nabisabiye ibi bikurikira: Nimwumve ijwi ryanjye nzababere Imana, namwe muzambere umuryango; mukurikire neza inzira mberetse, bityo muzahirwa." 
Jeremiah7:24 Ariko ntibumvise, nta bwo bateze amatwi, ahubwo bigenjereje uko bishakiye, maze banangira umutima ku buryo buteye ishozi; aho bandebye bantera umugongo." 
Jeremiah7:25 Kuva abasekuruza babo bava mu gihugu cya Misiri, sinigeze ntuza kuboherereza buri munsi abagaragu banjye bose b’abahanuzi kugeza na n’ubu." 
Jeremiah7:26 Ariko ntibanyumvise, nta bwo banteze amatwi, bashingaritse ijosi ryabo, barusha abasekuruza babo ubugome." 
Jeremiah7:27 Ubasobanurira ayo magambo yose, ariko ntibakumve. Urabahamagara, ariko ntibakwitabe." 
Jeremiah7:28 None rero ubabwire uti «Dore umuryango utumva Uhoraho Imana yawo, ukanga kwigishwa: ukuri kwarayotse, ntikukirangwa ku munwa wabo.»" 
Jeremiah7:29 Kemura iyo misatsi yawe yagaragazaga ko weguriwe Imana, uyijugunye kure; mu mayira utere indirimbo y’amaganya, kuko Uhoraho yanga, agatererana igisekuru kimurakaza!" 
Jeremiah7:30 Abayuda bakora ibibi nanga — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Bashyira ibiterashozi mu Ngoro yitiriwe izina ryanjye, nuko bakayihumanya." 
Jeremiah7:31 Bubatse urutambiro rw’i Tofeti mu kibaya cya Mwene Hinomi, kugira ngo abahungu n’abakobwa babo bahatwikirwe. Ibyo sinigeze mbisaba, sinigeze nabitekereza." 
Jeremiah7:32 Dore rero, igihe kiregereje — Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ntibazongere kuvuga ngo «Tofeti» cyangwa ngo «Ikibaya cya Mwene Hinomi», ahubwo hazajye havugwa «Ikibaya cy’urwicaniro»; ndetse kubera kubura ahandi, Tofeti ubwayo izahinduka irimbi." 
Jeremiah7:33 Muri uyu muryango hazicwamo benshi cyane, intumbi zabo zizatunge inyoni zo mu kirere n’inyamaswa zo mu gasozi; kandi nta muntu uzaba ugihari ngo azirukane!" 
Jeremiah7:34 Mu migi ya Yuda no mu mayira ya Yeruzalemu, nahosheje agasaku k’ibyishimo n’amagambo y’umunezero, indirimbo y’umukwe n’ibyishimo by’umugeni, kuko igihugu kigiye guhinduka amatongo." 
Jeremiah8:1 Icyo gihe — Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — bazataburura mu mva amagufa y’abami n’abatware ba Yuda, ay’abaherezabitambo n’abahanuzi, hamwe n’ay’abaturage ba Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah8:2 Bazayadendeza imbere y’izuba, y’ukwezi n’imbere y’ibindi binyarumuri byo mu kirere, byo bacuditse na byo, bakabigaragira, bakabikurikira, bakabigisha inama ndetse bakanabipfukama imbere. Ayo magufa, ntazarundarundwa ngo ahambwe; azahama aho afumbire ubutaka." 
Jeremiah8:3 Naho abazasigara, abazarokoka muri iyo nyoko mbi n’abazacika ku icumu mu duce twose nzaba nabatatanyirijemo, bazifuza gupfa aho kubaho — uwo ni Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze." 
Jeremiah8:4 Uzababwire uti «Uhoraho avuze atya: Ese iyo umuntu aguye ntabyuka? Ese umuntu arayoba ntahindukire? 
Jeremiah8:5 Ni iki gituma uyu muryango wa Yeruzalemu uyoba, ugakomeza kuzikama mu buhakanyi bwawo? Batsimbaraye ku binyoma byabo bibeshyeshya, bakanga kugaruka." 
Jeremiah8:6 Naritonze ntega amatwi, nsanga amagambo yabo adafashije. Nta n’umwe ubabajwe n’ubugome bwe ngo agire ati «Ese ubu nakoze ibiki?» Buri wese ariruka akurikiye ubwomanzi bwe, mbese nk’ifarasi igiye ku rugamba." 
Jeremiah8:7 N’ikiyongoyongo cyo mu kirere kimenya ubwacyo igihe kizasuhukira; inuma, intashya n’umusambi bikamenya igihe bizahindukirira. Ariko umuryango wanjye ntiwita ku mategeko y’Uhoraho!" 
Jeremiah8:8 Mwashobora mute kuvuga ngo «Turi abahanga, kuko dutunze itegeko ry’Uhoraho?» Ni byo, ariko ryahindutse ibinyoma, kubera inyandiko y’abigishamategeko yuzuye ububeshyi." 
Jeremiah8:9 Abahanga bazakorwa n’ikimwaro, bumirwe, kandi bafatirwe mu mutego; basuzugura ijambo ry’Uhoraho: ubwo se bavuga bate ko ari abahanga?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Nuko rero abagore babo ndabaha abandi, imirima yabo nyiteze abayigabiza; kuko bose, ari umuto n’umukuru, bararuwe n’inyungu zabo; abahanuzi n’abaherezabitambo bose, bakifata nabi." 
Jeremiah8:11 Bazinzika ishyano ry’umuryango wanjye, bavuga ngo «Ni amahoro, byose bimeze neza!» Nyamara ariko nta mahoro ariho." 
Jeremiah8:12 Mbese hari ikimwaro bagize kubera amarorerwa bakora? Oya, nta mpungenge bibatera, ngo bazirikane ko bitesheje agaciro! Kubera iyo mpamvu, bazarimbuka nk’abandi bose; bakazatemba, igihe nzaba mbibaryoza. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah8:13 Niyemeje kubatsemba — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nta mbuto zizarangwa ku muzabibu, kimwe no ku mutini, amababi na yo yarabiranye: nyateje abayanyukanyuka. (Rubanda:)" 
Jeremiah8:14 Ni kuki duhagaze nta cyo dukora? Nidukoranire hamwe, twinjire mu migi yacu ikomeye, twigumireyo, kuko Uhoraho Imana yacu atubuza kuhatirimuka, akatwuhira amazi mabi, kuko twamucumuyeho." 
Jeremiah8:15 Twizeraga amahoro, none nta n’agahenge; twari dutegereje kuzanzamuka, none ahubwo dore igikuba kiracitse." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kuva i Dani harumvikana induru y’amafarasi; isi yose irahinda umushyitsi kubera urusaku n’inkubiri byayo. Umwanzi aje kuyogoza isi n’ibiyiriho byose, ari umugi, ari n’abawutuye. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah8:17 Dore mbashumurije inzoka n’impiri zidashobora kugomborwa, maze zizabarume! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah8:18 Agahinda kanjye ntikagira umuti, amagara yanjye yose arakendera." 
Jeremiah8:19 Induru ibabaje y’umuryango wanjye irumvikana iturutse mu gihugu cya kure: «Muri Siyoni se Uhoraho ntakibaho? Umwami wayo se ntakiyibamo?» (Uhoraho:) Ni kuki banshavuza n’ibigirwamana byabo, n’ariya manjwe yavuye ahandi? (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah8:20 Isarura ryararangiye, icyi cyarashize, ariko twebwe nta mukiro turabona!" 
Jeremiah8:21 Narashengutse kubera amahano y’umuryango wanjye! Ndi mu cyunamo, amakuba yancigatiye!" 
Jeremiah8:22 Ese nta muti ukirangwa muri Gilihadi? Nta muvuzi se uhaba? Ni kuki ibikomere by’umuryango wanjye bidakira? 
Jeremiah8:23 Ni nde uzahindura umutwe wanjye mo umugezi, amaso yanjye akayagira isoko y’amarira, kugira ngo ndirire umunsi n’ijoro, abapfuye bo mu muryango wanjye?" 
Jeremiah9:1 Ubonye ngo mbe ndafite akaruri k’abagenzi mu butayu, maze ngo ntererane umuryango wanjye njye kuhatura! Bose ni abasambanyi, ni agatsiko k’abagambanyi. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah9:2 Ururimi rwabo ni umuheto ureze, baganje mu gihugu atari ukubera ukuri, ahubwo ibinyoma. Bakorera ibyaha ku bindi, naho jyewe, ntibamenya. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah9:3 Murabe maso, buri wese yitondere mugenzi we; ntihazagire umuvandimwe wanyu n’umwe mwizera, kuko buri muvandimwe ari umuhendanyi, na buri mugenzi wanyu akaba umubeshyi." 
Jeremiah9:4 Buri wese aryarya mugenzi we, nta jambo ry’ukuri rikibaho! Ururimi rwabo barumenyereje amagambo y’ibinyoma. Baguye mu bugizi bwa nabi, ku buryo batagishoboye kwisubiraho." 
Jeremiah9:5 Ngurwo urugomo rudasiba, ngicyo ikinyoma kidahwema! Bahakanye kunyoboka! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah9:6 None rero, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Ngiye kubahana, mbagerageze. Mbega ukuntu ngiye guhagurukira ubugome bw’umuryango wanjye!" 
Jeremiah9:7 Ururimi rwawo rusa n’umwambi kirimbuzi, bakwirakwiza ibinyoma. Mugenzi wabo bamwifuriza amahoro ku munwa gusa, ariko mu mutima bamushandikira umutego." 
Jeremiah9:8 Ubwo se si ngomba kubahana, nkihimura igihugu giteye gityo? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah9:9 Ndaririra mu mpinga y’imisozi, nkaganya, nkaborogera no mu biraro byo ku gasi, kuko byose byakongotse, hakaba nta muntu n’umwe ukihacaracara, habe n’amatungo ngo aracyahumvikana. Ari inyoni, ari n’amatungo, byose byarahunze, nta gisigaye! (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah9:10 Yeruzalemu, nzayigira ikirundo cy’amabuye, isenga y’imbwebwe, naho imigi ya Yuda nyihindure amatongo atagira abayatuye. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah9:11 Niba hari umuhanga uriho, niyumve, kandi yamamaze ijambo yabwiwe n’Uhoraho. Ni kuki igihugu cyayogojwe, kigakongoka nk’ubutayu butagendwa?" 
Jeremiah9:12 Uhoraho aravuze ati «Birengagije inyigisho zanjye nabahaye; aho kumva ijwi ryanjye ngo barikurikire," 
Jeremiah9:13 bakomeje kunangira umutima, bizirika kuri za Behali batojwe n’abasekuruza babo.»" 
Jeremiah9:14 None rero, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, aravuze ati «Ngiye kubanywesha uburozi bukaze, kandi mbuhire amazi aroze;" 
Jeremiah9:15 mbatatanyirize mu bihugu batigeze bamenya ari bo ubwabo, cyangwa abasekuruza babo, kandi mbakurikize inkota kugeza ubwo mbatsembye.»" 
Jeremiah9:16 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Nimubaririze, mutumire abagore bo kurira! Muhamagare ababizobereyemo, maze baze!" 
Jeremiah9:17 Nibatebuke, baduterere indirimbo y’amaganya! Amaso yacu nazengemo amarira, naho ingohe zacu zitembemo amazi! (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah9:18 Induru y’amaganya iturutse i Siyoni igira iti «Turashize, ikimwaro kiradukoze! Tugomba kwimuka mu gihugu: ingo zacu barazishenye.»" 
Jeremiah9:19 Bagore, nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho! Amatwi yanyu niyakire ijambo rivuye mu kanwa ke! Nimutoze abakobwa banyu iyi ndirimbo y’amaganya, maze namwe muyigishe bagenzi banyu, mugira muti" 
Jeremiah9:20 «Urupfu rwuriye ku madirishya yacu, rugacengera mu mazu yacu meza, ruje gutsemba abana mu mayira n’abasore ku bibuga." 
Jeremiah9:21 Intumbi zandagaye nk’ifumbire mu mirima, cyangwa nk’imiba inyuma y’umusaruzi, kandi nta muntu uhari ngo azandurure!»" 
Jeremiah9:22 Uhoraho avuze atya: Umuhanga ntaziratane ubuhanga bwe! Umunyembaraga ntaziratane ingufu ze! Umukungu ntaziratane ubukire bwe! 
Jeremiah9:23 Uzashaka kwirata, aziratane ko anzi bihagije, jye Uhoraho, ushyigikira ubufatanye, ubutungane n’ubutabera ku isi. Ni koko, ibyo ni byo binshimisha. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah9:24 Iminsi iregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze nzahagurukire uwagenywe ku mubiri wese. 
Jeremiah9:25 Nzahagurukira Misiri na Yuda, Edomu n’Abahamoni, Mowabu n’Abogoshe imisaya batuye mu butayu, kuko abo banyamahanga bose, kimwe n’Abayisraheli ubwabo, batagenywe ku mutima." 
Jeremiah10:1 Nimutege amatwi ijambo Uhoraho ababwira, bantu ba Israheli!" 
Jeremiah10:2 Uhoraho avuze atya: Ntimugakurikize imico y’abanyamahanga; ibimenyetso byo mu kirere ntibikabakangaranye, amahanga ni yo akangaranywa na byo." 
Jeremiah10:3 Ni koko, imigenzo yayo ni amanjwe: baratema igiti mu ishyamba, umunyabukorikori akakigegenesha icyuma," 
Jeremiah10:4 akagitakisha feza na zahabu, maze akagitera imisumari, akoresheje inyundo, kugira ngo kitajegajega." 
Jeremiah10:5 Ibyo bigirwamana bimeze nk’ibishusho bikanga inyoni mu murima w’imyungu; ntibivuga kandi bagomba kubyikorera kuko bidashobora kugenda. Ntibizabatere ubwoba, kuko nta kibi byabakorera, ariko na none nta n’akamaro byabagirira!" 
Jeremiah10:6 Uhoraho, nta n’umwe muhwanye! Uri igihangange, n’izina ryawe ni ikirangirire, kubera ibigwi byaryo." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ni nde utakubaha, mwami w’amahanga? Ibyo ni wowe bikwiye, kuko mu bahanga bose b’amahanga no mu bihugu byose, nta n’umwe muhwanye." 
Jeremiah10:8 Bose, nta n’umwe usigaye, bihinduye ibicucu maze bata ubwenge. Inyigisho bahabwa muri ubwo bucucu, ni zo zatumye bamera batyo." 
Jeremiah10:9 Ibyo bigirwamana ni feza isennye ituruka i Tarishishi, cyangwa zahabu yo muri Ufazi; byakozwe n’umunyabukorikori hamwe n’umucuzi, babitakisha ibara ry’isine n’iritukura. Nyamara ariko ntibibibuza kuba bikozwe n’abanyabukorikori." 
Jeremiah10:10 Ariko Uhoraho Imana ni umunyakuri, ni Imana nzima, akaba n’umwami ubuziraherezo. Iyo arakaye, isi ihinda umushyitsi, amahanga ntashobora guhangara uburakari bwe." 
Jeremiah10:11 (Dore ibyo muzababwira: imana zitaremye isi n’ijuru, zigomba gucibwa ku isi no mu nsi y’ijuru!)" 
Jeremiah10:12 Uhoraho ni we waremesheje isi ububasha bwe, ibiyituye abihangana ubuhanga, ubwenge bwe aburamburisha ijuru." 
Jeremiah10:13 Iyo avuze wagira ngo ni amasumo y’amazi mu ijuru, ni we ukoranya ibicu nyamunini mu mpera z’isi, akarekura imirabyo imvura ikagwa, kandi agakura imiyaga mu ndiri zayo." 
Jeremiah10:14 Umuntu wese arumirwa, bikamubera urujijo, umucuzi wese agaterwa isoni n’ikigirwamana cye: rwose amashusho ye ni ibinyoma, nta mwuka uyarimo." 
Jeremiah10:15 Byose ni ubucucu n’amanjwe baseka, igihe cyo guhanwa nikigera, bizarimburwa." 
Jeremiah10:16 Naho Imana, yo mugabane wa Yakobo si uko iteye! Yo, ni umuremyi wa byose; Israheli ikaba ari umuryango yeguriweho umugabane; Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, ni ryo zina rye. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah10:17 Ngaho terura imitwaro yawe, wowe wugarijwe!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Kuko Uhoraho avuze atya: Ubu noneho ngiye kujugunya ku gasi abaturage b’iki gihugu, kandi nkomeze mbabe hafi, kugira ngo batancika. (Yeruzalemu:)" 
Jeremiah10:19 Ndagowe! Mbega amakuba! Igikomere cyanjye nticyomorwa! Jyewe naribwiraga nti «Ibyago byanjye ni ibyo, nzabyihanganira!" 
Jeremiah10:20 None ihema ryanjye ryasenyutse, imigozi yaryo yose yarandutse. Abana banjye ntibakiriho. Nta muntu ugihari ngo anshingire ihema ryanjye, ngo anyegurire ingando yanjye!» (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah10:21 Abashumba babaye ibicucu: ntibagishaka Uhoraho. Ni yo mpamvu nta cyo bagishoboye, amatungo akaba yaratereranywe." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ndumva induru ivuga itugana, ni umuriri munini uturutse mu gihugu cy’amajyaruguru, uje guhindura imigi ya Yuda itongo, n’isenga y’imbwebwe." 
Jeremiah10:23 Uhoraho, nzi ko umuntu atari we utegeka inzira ye; umugenzi ntagene ubwe iby’urugendo rwe." 
Jeremiah10:24 Uhoraho, nkosora ariko mu rugero, utabigiranye uburakari, kuko wahita unkuraho." 
Jeremiah10:25 Homborera umujinya wawe ku mahanga adashaka kukumenya, ku bihugu bitiyambaza izina ryawe; kuko baconcomeye inzu ya Yakobo, barayiconcomera, bayitsembaho, igihugu cye barakiyogoza." 
Jeremiah11:1 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo: 
Jeremiah11:2 «Nimutege amatwi amagambo y’iri Sezerano! Uzayabwire abantu ba Yuda n’abaturage ba Yeruzalemu," 
Jeremiah11:3 ugira uti ’Avuze atya, Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli: Aragowe umuntu utumva amagambo y’iri Sezerano" 
Jeremiah11:4 nagiranye n’abasokuruza banyu igihe mbakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, muri rya tanura rishongesha ubutare. Nimutege amatwi ijwi ryanjye kandi mukurikize ibyo mbabwiye, bityo muzambera umuryango nanjye mbabere Imana," 
Jeremiah11:5 noneho mbone kurangiza isezerano nagiriye ku mugaragaro abakurambere banyu, ryo kubaha igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki; kandi ubu ngubu akaba ari mwe mugituye.’» Nuko ndasubiza nti «Ni byo koko, Uhoraho!»" 
Jeremiah11:6 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Genda utangaze aya magambo yose mu migi ya Yuda no mu mayira ya Yeruzalemu: Nimutege amatwi amagambo y’iri sezerano, kandi muyakurikize." 
Jeremiah11:7 Kuva umunsi nabakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri kugeza ubu, abasokuruza banyu nakomeje kubihanangiriza ngasubiramo ngira nti ’Nimutege amatwi ijwi ryanjye!’" 
Jeremiah11:8 Ariko ntibanyumvise, ngo bantege amatwi: buri wese yakomeje kunangira umutima we. Ni bwo rero mbarangirijeho amagambo yose ya rya sezerano nari narabasabye gukurikiza, maze ntibarikurikize.»" 
Jeremiah11:9 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Habonetse akagambane mu bantu ba Yuda no mu baturage ba Yeruzalemu. 
Jeremiah11:10 Basubiye mu bicumuro by’abakurambere babo banze gutega amatwi amagambo yanjye: na bo birukanka inyuma y’izindi mana kugira ngo baziyoboke. Uko ni ko abantu ba Israheli n’aba Yuda batatiye isezerano nari naragiranye n’abasekuruza babo. 
Jeremiah11:11 None rero, Uhoraho avuze atya ’Ngiye kubateza icyago batazashobora kwigobotora. Bazantakambira, ariko sinzabumva." 
Jeremiah11:12 Imigi ya Yuda n’abaturage ba Yeruzalemu baziyambaza ibigirwamana batwikiye ibitambo, ariko ntibizashobora kubarokora mu byago!’" 
Jeremiah11:13 Wowe Yuda, ibigirwamana byawe bimaze kunganya ubwinshi n’imigi yawe; nawe Yeruzalemu, intambiro wubakiye ikigirwamana — intambiro zo gutwikiraho ibitambo Behali —, zinganya ubwinshi n’amayira yawe!" 
Jeremiah11:14 Wowe rero, Yeremiya, ntiwirirwe uvuganira uyu muryango, ntubatakambire cyangwa ngo ubasabire; kuko nibantakira mu byago byabo ntazabumva.»" 
Jeremiah11:15 Inkundwakazi yaje gukora iki mu Ngoro yanjye? Imigenzereze ye yuzuye amayeri. Ni ko se ye, impigu n’inyama z’ibitambo bizakurinda ibyago byawe? Ni uko nguko uzashobora kubirokoka?" 
Jeremiah11:16 «Muzeti uhora utoshye, utatse ubwiza bw’imbuto ziryoshye», iryo ni ryo zina Uhoraho yari yarakwise. Mu rusaku rwinshi yatwitse amababi yawo, n’amashami barayakonyagura." 
Jeremiah11:17 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo waguteye, ni we uguteje icyago kubera ikibi abantu ba Israheli n’aba Yuda bakoze; kuko bamucumuyeho, igihe batwikiraga ibitambo Behali." 
Jeremiah11:18 Igihe Uhoraho amburiye nkabyumva, ni ho natahuye imigambi mibi yabo." 
Jeremiah11:19 Jyewe nari nk’umwana w’intama utuje bajyanye mu ibagiro; sinari nzi ko bangiriye imigambi mibi bagira bati «Nimucyo dutsinde igiti kigitoshye, tugitsembe mu gihugu cy’abazima; izina rye ryoye kuzongera kuvugwa ukundi!»" 
Jeremiah11:20 Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, wowe utegekana ubutabera, ugasuzuma umutima n’ibitekerezo, nzareba uko uzabihimura, kuko ari wowe nashinze akarengane kanjye." 
Jeremiah11:21 None rero, dore icyo Uhoraho avuze ku bantu b’i Anatoti bashaka kukuvutsa ubuzima, bavuga ngo «Wihanura mu izina ry’Uhoraho, naho ubundi tuzakwiyicira twebwe ubwacu.»" 
Jeremiah11:22 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Ngiye kubahagurukira: urubyiruko rwabo ruzicwa n’inkota, abahungu n’abakobwa babo bamarwe n’inzara." 
Jeremiah11:23 Iwabo nta n’umwe uzarokoka; nzateza ibyago abantu b’i Anatoti mu mwaka bazagomba kuryozwa ibyo bakoze. 
Jeremiah12:1 Wowe Uhoraho, uri intungane! Nyamara ariko ndashaka kugira icyo nkuburanya. Ni koko, ndagira ngo tujye impaka ku bibazo bimwe na bimwe. Ni kuki imigambi y’abagome ibahira? Ni kuki abagambanyi bose bamererwa neza?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Urabatera bagashinga imizi, bakageza n’aho bera imbuto. Uba bugufi y’umunwa wabo, ariko ukaba kure y’umutima wabo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Wowe Uhoraho, uranzi, urambona, kandi usuzuma ibitekerezo byanjye, biri kumwe nawe. Abagome bashyire ukwabo nk’intama zigomba kubagwa; ubazigamire umunsi wo kubica!" 
Jeremiah12:4 Isi izahora mu cyunamo kugeza ryari, ibyatsi byo ku gasozi bizahereza he kumirana? Inyamaswa zose zirarimbutse, kubera ubugome bw’abaturage bayo, bo bibwira ngo «Uhoraho ntabona inzira zacu.» (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah12:5 Niba wiruka n’abanyamaguru bakakunaniza, uzashobora ute gusiganwa n’amafarasi? Niba ugomba igihugu kirimo amahoro kugira ngo ugire ituze, uzifata ute mu nzitane za Yorudani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ndetse n’abo muva inda imwe, abo mu muryango wawe, na bo barakugambanira, bakaguca inyuma, bagakoranya abandi ngo bagushandikire utabizi. Ntukabizere, kabone n’iyo bakubwirana umutima mwiza." 
Jeremiah12:7 Inzu yanjye ndayitereranye, ntaye umurage wanjye; uwo nari narakundwakaje mugabije abanzi be." 
Jeremiah12:8 Umurage wanjye wambereye nk’intare mu ishyamba, urantontomera, none narawuzinutswe." 
Jeremiah12:9 Ese umurage wanjye waba ari nk’inyoni y’amabara ibyaruzi biza bishikira biturutse impande zose? Nimugende, mukoranye ibikoko byo mu ishyamba byose; mubizane mu munsi mukuru!" 
Jeremiah12:10 Igitero cy’abashumba cyayogoje imizabibu yanjye, kindibatira umurima utagira uko usa, kiwuhindura ubutayu bw’umwirare." 
Jeremiah12:11 Bawuhinduye umwirare, ndawureba imbere yanjye warangiritse, uteye agahinda. Igihugu cyose cyabaye umwirare, nyamara ariko nta n’umwe ubyitayeho." 
Jeremiah12:12 Mu mpinga zose z’imisozi yo mu butayu, haturutse abasahuzi. Inkota ibanguwe n’Uhoraho ihinguranyije isi, irayitsemba: nta n’umwe ukiranganwa amahoro." 
Jeremiah12:13 Barabiba ingano, bagasarura amahwa; baragoka ariko nta cyo bageraho. Nimukozwe isoni rero n’ibyo musaruye, bitewe n’uburakari bugurumana bw’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah12:14 Uhoraho avuze atya: Abagome bose duturanye bigabiza umurage nahaye Israheli, umuryango wanjye, ngiye kubarimbura ku butaka bwabo; abantu ba Yuda na bo, nzabarandura, mbavangure na bo." 
Jeremiah12:15 Ariko, nimara kubarandura, nzabagirira impuhwe bundi bushya, maze ngarure buri muntu mu murage we, no mu gihugu cye." 
Jeremiah12:16 Nibitoza kwitwara neza nk’umuryango wanjye, bakageza aho barahira izina ryanjye bati «Mu izina ry’Uhoraho muzima», mbese bakagenza nk’uko bigishije umuryango wanjye kurahira mu izina rya Behali, bityo bazashobora gutura mu muryango wanjye rwagati." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ariko nibatumva, iki gihugu nzakirimbura burundu, maze ngitsembe. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah13:1 Dore uko Uhoraho ambwiye: «Genda ugure umukandara wa hariri, maze uwukenyere, nyamara ariko wirinde kuwumesa.»" 
Jeremiah13:2 Naguze umukandara nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze, maze ndawukenyera." 
Jeremiah13:3 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati 
Jeremiah13:4 «Haguruka ugende ukenyeye wa mukandara waguze, maze ujye i Perati, nuhagera uzawuhishe mu isenga ry’urutare.»" 
Jeremiah13:5 Naragiye nywuhisha i Perati, nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabintegetse." 
Jeremiah13:6 Hashize iminsi myinshi, Uhoraho arambwira ati «Haguruka ujye i Perati uvaneyo wa mukandara nari nagutegetse guhishayo.»" 
Jeremiah13:7 Ubwo nagiye i Perati gushakashaka no kuvanayo wa mukandara aho nari narawuhishe. Umukandara nsanga warononekaye, nta cyo ukimaze." 
Jeremiah13:8 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati 
Jeremiah13:9 «Uhoraho avuze atya: Nguko uko nzahindanya ubwirasi bwa Yuda, n’ubwirasi bukabije bwa Yeruzalemu:" 
Jeremiah13:10 uyu muryango mubi, wanze kumva amagambo yanjye, ugakomeza kunangira umutima, ukiruka inyuma y’ibigirwamana kugira ngo ubiyoboke kandi unabipfukamire. Uragahinduka nk’uwo mukandara utagifite akamaro!" 
Jeremiah13:11 Nk’uko umuntu akenyera umukandara, nanjye nari nariziritse ku bantu ba Israheli n’aba Yuda, kugira ngo bambere umuryango, ubwamamare, ikuzo n’umutako, ariko bo banze kunyumva. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Jeremiah13:12 Uzababwira iri jambo, uti «Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ikibindi icyo ari cyo cyose, bacyuzuzamo divayi. Nibagusubiza bati ’N’ubundi tuzi neza ko ikibindi cyose bacyuzuzamo divayi’," 
Jeremiah13:13 uzababwire uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Abaturage bose bo muri iki gihugu, abami bakomoka kuri Dawudi bicaye ku ntebe ye, abaherezabitambo, abahanuzi n’abaturage bose ba Yeruzalemu, nzabahindura abasinzi buzuye." 
Jeremiah13:14 Nzabahuramo umwiryane, abagabo n’abahungu babo bose hamwe bacagagurane — Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Ari impuhwe, ari amatakirangoyi cyangwa imbabazi, ntibizambuza kubarimbura.’»" 
Jeremiah13:15 Nimwumve, mutege amatwi, mureke kwirarika: Uhoraho ni we uvuze!" 
Jeremiah13:16 Nimukuze Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mbere y’uko aboherereza umwijima, mbere y’uko ibirenge byanyu bitsikira mu misozi yaguweho n’ijoro. Mutegereje urumuri, ariko yaruhinduyemo umwijima, arugira igicu cyijimye." 
Jeremiah13:17 Nimudatega amatwi, nzigunga mu mfuruka yanjye, maze kubera ako kababaro, amaso yanjye azengemo kandi ahongoboke amarira, kuko ubushyo bw’Uhoraho bujyanywe bunyago!" 
Jeremiah13:18 Bwira umwami n’umugabekazi uti «Nimuce bugufi noneho! Ikamba ryanyu ry’agatangaza ryahanantutse ku mutwe wanyu. 
Jeremiah13:19 Imigi ya Negebu yafunzwe, nta muntu n’umwe uza kuyifungura. Yuda yose yajyanywe bunyago, bayinyaze yose uko yakabaye.»" 
Jeremiah13:20 Ubura amaso maze urebe: baturutse mu majyaruguru! Ubushyo bwakuragijwe buri he? Intama zawe z’agahebuzo ziri he? 
Jeremiah13:21 Uzongera kuvuga iki kandi ubwo uzaba wahagurukiwe n’abo wigeze kwitabaza bakaguhinduka? Ni koko, uzafatwa n’ububabare, nk’uko bufata umugore uramutswe." 
Jeremiah13:22 Ubwo ujye unyuzamo wibaze uti «Ni kuki ibi bimbaho?» Ni ukubera ubwomanzi bwawe, butuma bazamura ingutiya yawe, maze bakagukorera amarorerwa." 
Jeremiah13:23 Umwirabura ashobora se guhindura uruhu rwe, cyangwa urusamagwe rugahindura ubwoya bwarwo? Naho se mwebwe mumenyereye ikibi, mushobora se gukora icyiza?" 
Jeremiah13:24 Ngiye kubanyanyagiza nk’isa y’ubwatsi mu muyaga wo mu butayu. 
Jeremiah13:25 Nguwo umugabane wawe, umunani ngukebeye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — wowe unyibagirwa ugahitamo kwishuka." 
Jeremiah13:26 Dore ngiye guterera ingutiya yawe ku mutwe wawe, maze babone igitsina cyawe." 
Jeremiah13:27 Mbega ubusambanyi bwawe n’urusaku rwawe! Mbega ubwomanzi bwawe ngo buratera ishozi! Ku misozi no mu mirima, ndahabona imyanda yawe! Yeruzalemu, uragowe wowe udashaka kwisukura ngo unkurikire. Ibyo se bizahereza he?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya ku byerekeye amapfa: 
Jeremiah14:2 Yuda iri mu cyunamo, imigi yayo irasenyutse, iri mu kababaro kandi yakangaranye, none induru izamutse ituruka i Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah14:3 Abatware barahatira rubanda rugufi kuvoma amazi: rwagera ku bidendezi rugasanga byarakamye, rukagaruka rufite isoni, rwumiwe kandi rwashobewe, ibivomesho birimo ubusa." 
Jeremiah14:4 Ubutaka bwiyashije imitutu kubera kubura imvura, abaturage barumiwe, barashoberwa." 
Jeremiah14:5 Mu gasozi, imparakazi irabyara umwana, ikamuta aho kubera kubura urwuri rutoshye." 
Jeremiah14:6 Indogobe zirahagarara ku mpinga z’imisozi, zikareha umwuka nk’imbwebwe, amaso yazo akananizwa no gushakisha ubwatsi butakibaho. (Rubanda:)" 
Jeremiah14:7 Niba ibyaha byacu bidushinja, Uhoraho, gira icyo ukora uheshe izina ryawe ikuzo! Ni koko, ntidusiba kukwihakana, imbere yawe turi abanyabyaha." 
Jeremiah14:8 Mizero ya Israheli, wowe ukiza mu gihe cy’amagorwa, ni kuki wakwitwara nk’umunyamahanga mu gihugu, cyangwa umugenzi ushaka icumbi?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Ni kuki wakwitwara nk’umuntu wakangaranye, cyangwa intwari itagishoboye gukiza? Nyamara ariko, Uhoraho, uri muri twe rwagati, twitiriwe izina ryawe: sigaho kudutererana." 
Jeremiah14:10 Uhoraho abwiye atya uwo muryango: Koko bakunda kubungera, ntibitondere ingendo zabo. Kubera ko badashimisha Uhoraho, ubu arabibutsa ububi bwabo, akabahanira amakosa yabo." 
Jeremiah14:11 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Ntiwirirwe utakambira uyu muryango, cyangwa ngo uwifurize amahirwe!" 
Jeremiah14:12 N’iyo basiba, sinakumva amaganya yabo, n’iyo bantura ibitambo bitwikwa n’andi maturo, nta bwo byanshimisha. Nzabatsembesha inkota, inzara n’icyorezo.»" 
Jeremiah14:13 Nuko ndavuga nti «Ariko rero, Nyagasani Mana, dore uko abahanuzi bababwira: Ntimuzigera mubona inkota, kandi inzara ntizabatungura; kuko aha hantu nzahabahera amahoro y’umudendezo.»" 
Jeremiah14:14 Uhoraho aransubiza ati «Ibyo abahanuzi bahanura mu izina ryanjye ni ibinyoma. Sinabohereje, nta cyo nigeze mbategeka, nta n’ubwo nigeze mbavugisha. Ubuhanuzi bwabo ni amabonekerwa y’ibinyoma, ni ubupfumu, amateshwa n’amahomvu bitagira shinge." 
Jeremiah14:15 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho avuze atya: Abo bahanuzi bahanura mu izina ryanjye ntarabohereje, n’ubwo babeshya ko inkota n’inzara bitazatungura iki gihugu, ahubwo ni bo inkota n’inzara bizatsemba." 
Jeremiah14:16 Abantu bahanuriwe na bo, bazararikwa mu mayira ya Yeruzalemu bazize inzara n’inkota. Nta muntu n’umwe bazabona wo kubahamba, ari bo ubwabo, abagore babo, abahungu babo n’abakobwa babo. Bityo nzabacubanurireho ntyo ubugome bwabo.»" 
Jeremiah14:17 Uzababwire aya magambo, uti «Amaso yanjye ahongoboka amarira adakama umunsi n’ijoro, kuko icyago gikomeye cyavunaguye umukobwa w’isugi, umuryango wanjye ukaba washegeshwe n’intikuro idakira." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ngana mu mirima nkahasanga abishwe n’inkota, nagaruka mu mugi ngahura n’abahonyorwa n’inzara. Abahanuzi n’abaherezabitambo barazenguruka igihugu, ariko ntibasobanukirwe.» (Rubanda:)" 
Jeremiah14:19 Waba se waratereranye Yuda, Siyoni ukaba warayizinutswe? Ni kuki uduteza ibyago bidakira? Twari twiringiye amahoro, none nta n’icyiza tubona, igihe twari gukira, ahubwo dutashywe n’ubwoba!" 
Jeremiah14:20 Uhoraho, tuzi neza ububi bwacu, ndetse n’ubuhemu bw’abasekuruza bacu; ni byo koko, twagucumuyeho." 
Jeremiah14:21 Girira icyubahiro cy’izina ryawe, maze woye kutugaya, wisuzuguza intebe y’ikuzo ryawe! Ibuka isezerano watugiriye, maze ureke kuryirengagiza!" 
Jeremiah14:22 Mu bigirwamana by’amahanga se, hari na kimwe kigusha imvura? Ijuru se ni ryo ubwaryo rigusha imvura y’umuvumbi? Si wowe se Uhoraho, Imana yacu? Turakwiringiye rero, kuko ari wowe ukora ibyo byose." 
Jeremiah15:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Kabone n’aho Musa na Samweli baba bampagaze imbere, nta bwo nagirira impuhwe bariya bantu. Bankure imbere bamvire aha!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Nibakubaza bati ’None se ubu tujye he?’, uzabasubize uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: abagenewe gupfa, bazapfa! abagenewe kwicishwa inkota, bazazira inkota! abagenewe kwicwa n’inzara, bazazira inzara! abagenewe kujyanwa bunyago, bazajyanwa bunyago!" 
Jeremiah15:3 Mbateganyirije ibi bintu bine — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze —: inkota izabica, imbwa zizabakurubana, inyoni zo mu kirere n’ibisimba byo mu ishyamba bizabatanyagura, bibatsembe." 
Jeremiah15:4 Nzabatangaho urugero ruzakangaranya ibihugu byose byo ku isi kubera ibyo Manase mwene Hezekiya, umwami wa Yuda, yakoreye muri Yeruzalemu byose.»" 
Jeremiah15:5 Yeruzalemu, ni nde wakugirira impuhwe, ni nde ugufitiye umutima ukwitayeho, ni nde wakwitera umwanya abaririza uko umerewe?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Ni wowe wanyanze, untera umugongo. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze! Nakuramburiyeho ikiganza ngo nkurimbure, kuko narambiwe guhora nkugirira imbabazi!" 
Jeremiah15:7 Nabagoshoje intara, mbatatanyiriza mu midugudu yo mu gihugu. Umuryango wanjye ndawutsemba, nywuvutsa abana, ariko ntiwahinduye imyifatire." 
Jeremiah15:8 Nagwije umubare w’abapfakazi, baruta ubwinshi umusenyi wo ku nkombe z’inyanja. Ku manywa y’ihangu, nazanye umurimbuzi, atera nyina w’umusore w’indwanyi, namuguye gitumo mugusha mu gihirahiro." 
Jeremiah15:9 Uwabyaye abahungu barindwi yacitse intege, arahumekana impumu. Izuba rye ryarenze amanywa ava; yakozwe n’isoni, aramwaragurika. Ibyo bari basigaranye, ngiye kubigabiza inkota n’ibitero by’abanzi babo. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze! (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah15:10 Mbega ibyago, mawe, kubona warambyaye! None nkaba ndi umuntu igihugu cyose kinubira, kikanamvuguruza. Nta we nigeze nguza cyangwa ngo mugurize, ariko bose baramvuma!" 
Jeremiah15:11 Mu by’ukuri, Uhoraho, ese sinagukoreye uko nshoboye? Ese sinakwinginze mu gihe cy’ibyago n’amakuba? Ni wowe ubizi! (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah15:12 Icyuma giturutse mu majyaruguru, cyangwa umuringa, hari ikindi cyuma se cyashobora kubicamo kabiri?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Ubukungu bwawe n’umutungo wawe, Yuda, byose mbigabije ababisahura. Icyo ni cyo gihembo cy’ibyaha byawe wakwije mu gihugu cyawe." 
Jeremiah15:14 Nzakugira umucakara w’abanzi bawe mu gihugu utazi. Umuriro w’uburakari bwanjye uragurumanye, ugiye kubatwika. (Yeremiya:)" 
Jeremiah15:15 Uhoraho, nyibuka, unyiteho, maze umporere abantoteza; sinzarinde gupfa nzize ubwihangane bwawe. Ubimenye neza ko nihanganira ibitutsi kubera wowe." 
Jeremiah15:16 Iyo numvise amagambo yawe, ndayamira: ijambo ryawe ryaranyuze, rinsendereza umunezero. Nitiriwe izina ryawe, Uhoraho Imana, Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Jeremiah15:17 Sinshakira ibyishimo byanjye gushyikirana n’abikinira; ikiganza cyawe kintegeka kubitarura kuko wantegetse kuvugana ubukana. 
Jeremiah15:18 Kuki akababaro kanjye kambayeho akaramata, igikomere cyanjye ntigikire, kikananira imiti? Rwose wambereye nk’isoko idashobora kwizerwa, ntigire amazi igihe cyose. (Uhoraho:)" 
Jeremiah15:19 None rero, Uhoraho avuze atya: Nungarukira ari jye ukugaruye, uzampagarara imbere. Nuvuga amagambo ashyira mu gaciro, ukareka amahomvu, umunwa wawe uzaba uwanjye. Bazakugarukira, ariko wowe ntugomba kubasanga." 
Jeremiah15:20 Imbere y’abo bantu, nkugize nk’inkike ikomeye y’umuringa. Bazakurwanya, ariko nta cyo bazagukoraho; humura turi kumwe, ndagutabara kandi nkurenganure. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!" 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndakuvana mu kiganza cy’abagome, nkugobotore mu nzara z’abanyarugomo." 
Jeremiah16:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati 
Jeremiah16:2 «Ntuzashaka umugore, nta muhungu cyangwa umukobwa uzabyarira aha hantu." 
Jeremiah16:3 Koko rero, Uhoraho avuze atya ku byerekeye abahungu n’abakobwa bazavukira aha hantu, kuri ba nyina na ba se bazababyarira muri iki gihugu:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Bazamarwa n’inzara, ntibazaririrwa cyangwa ngo bahambwe; bazahinduka ifumbire y’ubutaka. Bazarimburwa n’inkota n’inzara; intumbi zabo zizaribwa n’inyoni zo mu kirere, n’inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba." 
Jeremiah16:5 Koko rero, Uhoraho avuze atya: Ntuzinjire mu nzu ikoraniwemo n’abari mu cyunamo, ntuzajye mu mihango y’ihamba, kandi bariya bantu ntuzigere ubaririra, kuko uriya muryango nywunyaze amahoro nawuhaye, hamwe n’ubudahemuka n’impuhwe nari nywufitiye. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah16:6 Muri iki gihugu, abakuru n’abato bazapfa; ntibazahambwa cyangwa ngo baririrwe, nta n’uzabiraburira ngo yirasage cyangwa yiyogosheshe." 
Jeremiah16:7 Nta wuzamanyura umugati ngo ahe uri mu cyunamo kugira ngo amukomeze mu kababaro k’uwe wapfuye; yaba yapfushije se cyangwa nyina, nta n’uzamutura inkongoro y’ikiyagano." 
Jeremiah16:8 Uramenye ntuzinjire no mu nzu bakoreyemo ibirori kugira ngo wicarane na bo, musangire ibiryo n’inzoga." 
Jeremiah16:9 Koko rero, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Kuva ubu namwe mubyirebera, aha hantu ngiye kuhacubya urusaku rw’ibyishimo, amagambo y’umunezero, ndetse n’indirimbo y’umukwe n’imbyino y’umugeni." 
Jeremiah16:10 Numara kugeza kuri abo bantu aya magambo yose, maze bakakubaza bati ’Ni kuki Uhoraho yiyemeje kuduterereza icyago gikomeye gityo? Icyaha cyacu ni ikihe? Ni ikihe gicumuro twagiriye Uhoraho Imana yacu?’," 
Jeremiah16:11 uzabasubize uti ’Impamvu ni uko abasokuruza banyu bantaye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — bakiruka inyuma y’ibigirwamana kugira ngo babikorere kandi babipfukamire. Jyewe barantaye, n’Itegeko ryanjye ntibarikomeza." 
Jeremiah16:12 Naho mwebwe, mwakoze nabi birengeje abasokuruza banyu. Buri wese muri mwe atsimbarara ku bubi bwe buteye ishozi, yanga kunyumva!" 
Jeremiah16:13 Ni yo mpamvu nzabakura muri iki gihugu, mbarohe mu kindi mutazi, ndetse n’abasokuruza banyu batigeze bamenya. Aho nyine, muzakorera izindi mana umunsi n’ijoro, kuko ntazongera kubababarira!’»" 
Jeremiah16:14 Igihe rero kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze ntibazongere kuvuga ngo «Uhoraho ni Nyir’ubuzima, we wakuye Abayisraheli mu gihugu cya Misiri!»" 
Jeremiah16:15 ahubwo bazajye bavuga ngo «Uhoraho ni Nyir’ubuzima, we wakuye Abayisraheli mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru, no mu bindi byose yari yarabatatanyirijemo!» Ni byo koko, nzabagarura mu gihugu nari narahaye abasekuruza babo." 
Jeremiah16:16 Nzohereza imbaga y’abarobyi — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze bazabarobe; nzohereze kandi imbaga y’abahigi, bazabahige ku misozi yose no ku tununga twose, bagere no mu masenga yo mu bitare." 
Jeremiah16:17 Amaso yanjye aritegereza imyifatire yabo yose, nta kincika. Ubugome bwabo ntibushobora kwihisha amaso yanjye." 
Jeremiah16:18 Nzabanza mbaryoze incuro ebyiri ibyaha byabo n’ibicumuro byabo; kuko igihugu cyanjye bagihindanyishije ibigirwamana byabo na byo bitibereyeho, maze umurage wanjye bakawuzuza ibiterashozi byabo." 
Jeremiah16:19 Uhoraho, uri imbaraga zanjye, ubwikingo bwanjye, n’ubuhungiro bwanjye igihe cy’amakuba; ni wowe amahanga aturutse mu mpera z’isi azaza asanga, avuga ati «Ibyo abasokuruza bacu begukanyeho umugabane, ni ibinyoma, n’amanjwe adafite akamaro." 
Jeremiah16:20 Umuntu yashobora kwiremera Imana ate, kandi na we ubwe atari imana?»" 
Jeremiah16:21 Ubu noneho ngiye kubaha ubumenyi: nzabereka ububasha bw’ikiganza cyanjye; bityo bazamenyereho ko izina ryanjye ari «Uhoraho». 
Jeremiah17:1 Icyaha cya Yuda cyandikishijwe ikaramu y’icyuma ifite umusyi wa diyama; cyanditswe mu mitima yabo no ku mahembe y’intambiro zabo," 
Jeremiah17:2 cyanditswe kuri za nkingi z’amabuye basenga, no ku biti bihora bitoshye byeguriwe imana zabo, biri mu mpinga z’imisozi cyangwa mu bibaya." 
Jeremiah17:3 Baturage ba Yuda mwe, ubukungahare bwanyu n’umutungo wanyu wose, nzabitegeza ababinyaga, kubera ibyaha mwakoreye mu masengero y’ahirengeye, aho ari hose, mu gihugu cyanyu." 
Jeremiah17:4 Muzanyagwa umurage nari narabahaye; nzabagira abacakara b’abanzi banyu mu gihugu mutazi, kuko mwatumye umuriro w’uburakari bwanjye ugurumana, ukazatwika ubuziraherezo." 
Jeremiah17:5 Uhoraho avuze atya: Aravumwe umuntu wiringira abandi bantu, kuko imbaraga zimurimo ziba ari iz’umubiri, umutima we ukirengagiza Uhoraho!" 
Jeremiah17:6 Ameze nk’agati mu mayaga, katazigera gakura ngo kagare, kuko kibera ahantu hashyuhiranye mu butayu, mu butaka bw’urusekabuye budashobora guturwa." 
Jeremiah17:7 Arahirwa umuntu wiringira Uhoraho, kuko Uhoraho amubera ikiramiro." 
Jeremiah17:8 Ameze nk’igiti giteye ku nkombe y’amazi, kigashora imizi yacyo ku nkengero y’umugezi. Nta cyo cyumva iyo icyokere kije, amababi yacyo ahora atohagiye mu gihe cy’amapfa. Ntakigikangaranya kandi ntigihwema kurumbuka imbuto." 
Jeremiah17:9 Mu nda y’umuntu ni ho kure, kuruta ahandi hose; ni nde wacengera umutima we mubi ngo awuhane?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Ni jye Uhoraho ucengera ibitekerezo, nkagenzura imitima, kandi ngahembera buri wese imyifatire ye, nkurikije imbuto z’ibikorwa bye." 
Jeremiah17:11 Nk’uko inkware irarira ayo itateye, n’uwakijijwe n’ubuhendanyi ni ko ameze; umukiro we umusiga mu bukwerere, amaherezo agahinduka igishushungwe." 
Jeremiah17:12 Intebe y’ikuzo iri mu ijuru kuva mu ntangiriro, ngiryo isengero ryacu." 
Jeremiah17:13 Uhoraho, mizero ya Israheli, abakwanga bazakorwa n’isoni, abakwihunza bazahanwa, kuko bihungije isoko y’amazi afutse, ari yo Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah17:14 Uhoraho, numvura nzakira, nundokora nzabaho; kuko ari wowe shingiro ry’ikuzo ryanjye!" 
Jeremiah17:15 Barambaza ngo «Ubu se ijambo ry’Uhoraho riri he? Ngaho niryigaragaze!» 
Jeremiah17:16 Jyewe sinateye mu ryawe ngo nkunde ntebutse amakuba, sinigeze nifuza umunsi w’icyorezo, wowe urabizi; iryamvuye mu kanwa, narivugiye imbere yawe." 
Jeremiah17:17 Wintera gukangarana, kandi ari wowe buhungiro bwanjye mu gihe cy’amakuba!" 
Jeremiah17:18 Abantoteza, ni babe ari bo bakorwa n’isoni, aho kuba ari jyewe umwara! Ni babe ari bo bakangarana, aho kuba ari jyewe uhindagana! Baterereze umunsi w’amakuba, ubarimbuze icyago gikubye kabiri." 
Jeremiah17:19 Uhoraho avuze atya: Genda uhagarare imbere y’irembo rya rubanda, abami ba Yuda binjiriramo bakanarisohokeramo, no ku marembo yose ya Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah17:20 Uzababwire uti «Nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, bami ba Yuda, bantu ba Yuda, baturage ba Yeruzalemu, namwe mwese mwinjirira muri aya marembo." 
Jeremiah17:21 Uhoraho avuze atya: Muririnde kuzana imitwaro ku munsi w’isabato, no kuyinjirana mu miryango ya Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah17:22 Ntimuzasohokane ngo mujyane imitwaro hanze y’amazu yanyu ku munsi w’isabato, ntimuzagire umurimo n’umwe mukora, ahubwo muzatagatifuze umunsi w’isabato nk’uko nabitegetse abasokuruza banyu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Bo nyine banze kunyumva, ntibantega amatwi; banshinganye ijosi, banga kumva no kwakira inyigisho." 
Jeremiah17:24 Mwebwe rero nimunyumva — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ku munsi w’isabato mukirinda kwinjirana imitwaro mu marembo y’uyu mugi, mugatagatifuza umunsi w’isabato ntimugire umurimo uwo ari wo wose mukora," 
Jeremiah17:25 ni bwo abami bicaye ku ntebe ya Dawudi bazinjirira mu marembo y’uyu mugi bashagawe n’abatware babo. Abo bami bazinjira bari mu magari y’intambara no ku mafarasi, bashagawe n’abatware babo, n’abantu ba Yuda n’abaturage ba Yeruzalemu, maze uyu mugi uzahore utuwe ubuziraherezo." 
Jeremiah17:26 Nuko mu migi ya Yuda n’ahakikije Yeruzalemu, mu gihugu cya Benyamini, mu karere k’imirambi n’ak’imisozi miremire no muri Negevu, hazaturuke abantu bazanywe no gutura ibitambo bitwikwa, n’iby’ubuhoro, bazose n’imibavu, kugira ngo bashimire Uhoraho mu Ngoro ye." 
Jeremiah17:27 Naho nimutanyumva ngo mutagatifuze umunsi w’isabato mwirinda kwikorera imitwaro no kuyinjirana mu marembo ya Yeruzalemu kuri uwo munsi w’isabato, ubwo kuri iyo miryango nyine nzahakongeza umuriro udateze kuzima, uzayogoze amazu meza y’i Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah18:1 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati 
Jeremiah18:2 «Manuka bwangu ujye iw’umubumbyi, ni ho nzakubwirira amagambo yanjye.»" 
Jeremiah18:3 Nuko ndamanuka njya iw’umubumbyi, nsanga ariho arabumba." 
Jeremiah18:4 Iyo yagiraga ibyago agacikwa n’icyo yabumbaga, yakoraga ikindi akurikije uburyo bw’umubumbyi w’umuhanga." 
Jeremiah18:5 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati 
Jeremiah18:6 «Bantu ba Israheli — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — murakeka ko ntabagira nk’uko uriya mubumbyi abigenza? Bantu ba Israheli, muri mu kiganza cyanjye nk’ibumba riri mu kiganza cy’umubumbyi!" 
Jeremiah18:7 Hari ubwo niyemeza kurandura, guhirika no kurimbura iki gihugu cyangwa iriya ngoma;" 
Jeremiah18:8 ariko, icyo gihugu cyakwihana ubugome bwacyo nkisubiraho nkareka icyo cyago nari ngiye kugiteza." 
Jeremiah18:9 Hari n’ubwo niyemeza kubaka no gushinga iki gihugu cyangwa se iriya ngoma; 
Jeremiah18:10 ariko bakwanga kumva ijwi ryanjye, ahubwo bagakora ikibi nanga, nkisubiraho nkareka ibyiza nari niyemeje kubakorera." 
Jeremiah18:11 Noneho rero, ubwire abantu ba Yuda n’abaturage ba Yeruzalemu, uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Ndiho ndabategurira amakuba, kandi hari n’undi mugambi mbafitiye. Nimwihane rero imyifatire yanyu mibi, maze muvugurure imyifatire n’imigenzereze yanyu!" 
Jeremiah18:12 Ariko bo baravuga bati ’N’iyo yagira ate, tuzakomeza imigambi yacu kandi buri muntu atsimbarare ku bubi bw’umutima we.’»" 
Jeremiah18:13 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho avuze atya: Muzabaririze mu mahanga muti «Hari uwaba yarigeze kumva ibintu nk’ibi?» Koko umwari wa Israheli yakoze amahano akabije! 
Jeremiah18:14 Hari ubwo se urubura rwo kuri Libani rwigeze rushonga, rugashira mu mpinga yayo? Cyangwa se amazi afutse amanuka ku misozi, hari ubwo yigeze akama?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Nyamara umuryango wanjye wo, waranyibagiwe, utwikira imibavu ibidafite akamaro, bituma uteshuka inzira zawo, inzira za kera na kare, maze uyoboka amayira n’imihanda idatunganye." 
Jeremiah18:16 Uko ni ko bahinduye igihugu cyabo urw’amenyo, gihinduka ahantu hateye ubwoba; abahanyuze bose bakumirwa, bakazunguza umutwe." 
Jeremiah18:17 Nk’uko umuyaga w’iburasirazuba utumura umukungugu, ni ko nanjye nzabatatanyiriza imbere y’umwanzi; kandi umunsi bazaba batsinzwe nzabatera umugongo, aho kubereka uruhanga rwanjye." 
Jeremiah18:18 Baravuga ngo «Nimuze dutegure imigambi mibi irwanya Yeremiya; kuko nitumara kumwigizayo, ntituzabura abandi baherezabitambo ngo batwigishe Itegeko ry’Imana, n’abasheshe akanguhe ngo batugire inama, cyangwa abahanuzi ngo batubwire ijambo ryayo. Nimuze, tumusarike tumusebya, twoye kwita ku magambo ye.»" 
Jeremiah18:19 Uhoraho, ndakwinginze ngo untege amatwi, kandi wumve ibyo abandega bavuga." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ese inyiturano y’ineza ni inabi? Bo, barancukurira urwobo ngo ngwemo. Ibuka ukuntu naguhagaze imbere mbavuganira kugira ngo ubakureho uburakari bwawe." 
Jeremiah18:21 None rero, abana babo, bananguze inzara, unabarimbuze ubugi bw’inkota! Abagore babo ubacuze abana n’abagabo; abagabo na bo bicwe na nyamunsi, naho abasore barimburwe n’inkota ku rugamba!" 
Jeremiah18:22 Iwabo hazacure imiborogo, igihe uzaba ubateje igitero kibatunguye, kuko banteze imitego ngo bamfate bayiteze aho nyura hose." 
Jeremiah18:23 Uhoraho, wowe uzi neza imigambi yabo mibi bangiriye. Ntubahanagureho icyaha cyabo, igicumuro cyabo ntigisibangane mu maso yawe. Nibadagadwe imbere yawe; igihe uzabarakarira uzabumvishe!" 
Jeremiah19:1 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati «Genda ugure ikibindi, maze uhitemo bamwe mu bakuru b’umuryango no mu baherezabitambo." 
Jeremiah19:2 Hanyuma uzasohokera mu kibaya cya Bene Hinomi, ku irembo ry’Injyo, maze uhatangarize amagambo ngiye kukubwira." 
Jeremiah19:3 Uzavuga uti ’Nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, bami ba Yuda namwe baturage ba Yeruzalemu. Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ngiye guterereza aha hantu icyago, ku buryo uzabyumva wese azumirwa." 
Jeremiah19:4 Kubera ko bantaye, bakanduza aha hantu bahatwikira ibitambo by’izindi mana batigeze bamenya, ari bo ubwabo, ari n’abasekuruza babo cyangwa abami ba Yuda; bahasendereje amaraso y’abana b’indacumura." 
Jeremiah19:5 Bubaka intambiro za Behali, kugira ngo bazazitwikireho abana babo, babatura Behali, kandi ibyo ntarigeze mbitegeka, ntarigeze mbivuga ndetse habe no kubitekereza!" 
Jeremiah19:6 Noneho rero, igihe kirageze — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze aha hantu hoye kuzongera kwitwa Tofeti cyangwa ikibaya cya Bene Hinomi, ahubwo hazitwe ikibaya cy’Urwicaniro." 
Jeremiah19:7 Nzahungabanya ubutegetsi bwa Yuda na Yeruzalemu, nzabamarisha inkota imbere y’abanzi babo. Nzabagabiza ikiganza cy’ababahigira maze mbagaburire ibisiga n’ibikoko byo mu ishyamba." 
Jeremiah19:8 Uyu mugi nzawuhindura ahantu hateye ubwoba, uzawunyura hafi azumirwe, kandi nabona iryo tongo na we acure imiborogo iteye ubwoba." 
Jeremiah19:9 Nzabagaburira abahungu babo n’abakobwa babo; bazasubiranamo baryane, biturutse ku gahinda n’umubabaro bazaterwa n’abanzi babo bashaka kubarimbura.’" 
Jeremiah19:10 Hanyuma uzajanjagurire cya kibindi mu maso y’abazaba baguherekeje," 
Jeremiah19:11 maze ubabwire uti ’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Nzarimbura uyu muryango n’uyu mugi, nk’uko bajanjagura ikibindi cy’umubumbyi nticyongere gusanwa ukundi. I Tofeti na ho hazahinduka irimbi, kuko aho bahambaga hazaba hababanye hato." 
Jeremiah19:12 Nguko uko nzagira aha hantu n’abahatuye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ngahindura uyu mugi nka Tofeti. 
Jeremiah19:13 Bazahumanya amazu y’i Yeruzalemu n’ay’abami ba Yuda, ahinduke nka Tofeti; ni koko ayo mazu yose batwikiraho ibitambo basenga ibinyarumuri byo mu kirere, bakanayamishaho ibitambo biseswa baramya izindi mana, azahumana uko angana.’»" 
Jeremiah19:14 Yeremiya yavuye i Tofeti aho Uhoraho yari yamwohereje guhanura, ahagarara mu kibuga cy’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, maze abwira umuryango wose, ati" 
Jeremiah19:15 «Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ngiye guteza muri uyu mugi no mu yindi yose iwukikije, ibyago byose nawuteganyirije kuko banshinganye ijosi, banga kumva amagambo yanjye.»" 
Jeremiah20:1 Umuherezabitambo Pashuri mwene Imeri akaba n’umutware w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, yumva Yeremiya ahanura ibyo byose." 
Jeremiah20:2 Pashuri akubita umuhanuzi Yeremiya, amubohera ku nkomanizo z’umuryango wa ruguru wa Benyamini, ari wo w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah20:3 Bukeye, Pashuri aje kumubohoza, Yeremiya aramubwira ati «Uhoraho ntakikwita Pashuri, ahubwo akwise ’Iterabwoba hose’." 
Jeremiah20:4 Koko rero, Uhoraho avuze atya: Wowe n’incuti zawe zose, kuva ubu ngiye kubahindura ibishushungwe; bazarimburwa n’inkota y’abanzi babo, naho wowe uzabibere umuhamya! Abantu ba Yuda, nzabagabiza umwami w’i Babiloni, abajyane bunyago cyangwa abicishe inkota." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ibyahunitswe muri uyu mugi byose, ibyo baruhiye byose, ibintu byose by’agaciro batunze, umutungo wose w’abami ba Yuda, byose nzabigabiza abanzi babo babisahure, maze babijyane i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Naho wowe Pashuri, n’ababa mu rugo rwawe bose, muzajyanwa muri imbohe; ujye i Babiloni, abe ari ho uzapfira. Ni ho uzahambwa, wowe n’incuti zawe zose wahanuriye ibinyoma.»" 
Jeremiah20:7 Uhoraho, wantwaye umutima, nanjye nemera gutwarwa. Warangwatiriye, maze undusha amaboko. Umunsi wose nahindutse urw’amenyo, bose bangize iciro ry’imigani." 
Jeremiah20:8 Igihe cyose ngize ngo ndavuze, ngomba kurangurura ijwi, nkamagana ububisha n’ubusahuzi. Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryambereye impamvu yo gutukwa no kunnyegwa umunsi wose."
