Jeremiah20:9 Ubwo nkibwira nti «Sinzongera kumucisha mu ijwi kandi sinzasubira kuvuga mu izina rye», ariko mu mutima wanjye risa n’umuriro utwika uvumbitse mu magufa yanjye; nkagerageza kwipfukirana, ariko simbishobore." 
Jeremiah20:10 Numvise imigambi y’ubugome bwa rubanda, iterabwoba impande zose ngo «Nimumushinje, natwe tumushinje!» Abahoze ari incuti zanjye, bari barekereje ko nagwa, bati «Wenda ahari yashukika tukamubona uburyo, tukamwihimura.»" 
Jeremiah20:11 Cyakora Uhoraho ari kumwe nanjye, ak’intwari idahangarwa; abanzi banjye ni bo bagiye kudandabirana, batsindwe. Bazakorwa n’ikimwaro cy’uko batsinzwe; bazahorane ikimwaro iteka, ubutazabyibagirwa." 
Jeremiah20:12 Uhoraho Imana, Umugaba w’ingabo, ni wowe uzi imibereho y’intungane, ugasuzuma umutima n’ibitekerezo bye, nzareba ukuntu uzabantsindira kuko ari wowe naragije akaga kanjye." 
Jeremiah20:13 Nimuririmbire Uhoraho, mumusingize, kuko yaruye ubugingo bw’umuzigirizwa mu minwe y’abagiranabi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Uragatsindwa umunsi navutseho! Umunsi mama yambyayeho, urakabura umugisha!" 
Jeremiah20:15 Aragatsindwa uwagiye kubwira data, ngo «Wabyaye umwana w’umuhungu», agasabwa atyo n’ibyishimo." 
Jeremiah20:16 Uwo muntu arakaba aka ya migi, Uhoraho yoretse nta cyo yikanga; ahore yumva induru ya mu gitondo n’urwamo rw’intambara ku manywa y’ihangu." 
Jeremiah20:17 Yanze kunyicira mu nda ya mama; ubwo mama yari kumbera imva, nkamurigitiramo ubuziraherezo." 
Jeremiah20:18 Ubu se koko mama yaba yarambyariye iki kugira ngo nicwe n’ishavu n’agahinda, iminsi y’ubugingo bwanjye iherekezwe n’ikimwaro?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya, igihe umwami Sedekiya amutumyeho Pashuri mwene Malikiya, n’umuherezabitambo Sefaniya mwene Maseya, ngo bamubwire bati" 
Jeremiah21:2 «Tubarize Uhoraho kuko Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, ariho aturwanya; wenda ahari Uhoraho yakongera akadukorera ibitangaza maze akamumenesha.»" 
Jeremiah21:3 Yeremiya yarabashubije ati 
Jeremiah21:4 «Dore uko muzabwira Sedekiya: Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Intwari ziri inyuma y’inkike ziharwanyiriza umwami w’i Babiloni n’Abakalideya babateye, nzazigarura nziteranyirize muri uyu mugi rwagati." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ni jye ubwanjye uzabarwanya nkoresheje imbaraga n’umurego by’ukuboko kwanjye, mbigirane uburakari, umujinya n’impirita nyinshi." 
Jeremiah21:6 Nzatsemba abatuye uyu mugi bose, ari abantu ari n’amatungo; bazicwa n’icyorezo cy’ingutu." 
Jeremiah21:7 Nyuma y’ibyo — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — Sedekiya umwami wa Yuda, abagaragu be n’abantu bose bo muri uyu mugi bazaba bararokotse icyo cyorezo, inkota n’inzara; nzabegurira mu biganza by’umwami w’i Babiloni, iby’abanzi babo n’iby’abandi bose babahigira; bazabarimbura bashirire ku icumu, nta kubagirira impuhwe cyangwa imbabazi." 
Jeremiah21:8 Naho uwo muryango, uzawubwire uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Ngiye kubahitishamo ubuzima n’urupfu." 
Jeremiah21:9 Uzaguma muri uyu mugi azicwa n’inkota, inzara n’icyorezo; naho uzawuvamo agasanga Abakalideya babagose, azabaho maze nibura yishimire ko yarokotse." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ni koko, ubu ngiye guhindukirana uyu mugi, nywugirire nabi aho kuwugirira neza — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — uzagabizwe umwami w’i Babiloni, awutwike.’»" 
Jeremiah21:11 Muryango w’umwami wa Yuda, nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho!" 
Jeremiah21:12 Muryango wa Dawudi, Uhoraho avuze atya: Buri gitondo mujye muca imanza zitabera, uryamirwa mumukize ingoyi y’umurenganya! Naho ubundi uburakari bwanjye buzagurumana nk’umuriro, utwike ku buryo nta n’umwe ushobora kuwuzimya kubera ibikorwa byanyu byuzuye ubugome." 
Jeremiah21:13 Ubu noneho ngiye kukwibasira, wowe utuye mu kibaya no ku rutare rwo mu gisiza — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — mwe mugira muti «Ni nde uzaza kudutera, maze agacengera mu bwibereko bwacu?»" 
Jeremiah21:14 Nzabahagurukira, mbahane nkurikije ibikorwa byanyu — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze —. Nzakongeza umuriro mu ishyamba rye, maze utsembe ibirikikije byose." 
Jeremiah22:1 Uhoraho avuze atya: Manuka ujye mu rugo rw’umwami wa Yuda, uhavugire aya magambo uti" 
Jeremiah22:2 «Mwami wa Yuda uganje ku ntebe ya Dawudi, umva ijambo ry’Uhoraho, wowe n’abagaragu bawe, n’abantu bawe bose banyura muri aya marembo!" 
Jeremiah22:3 Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Nimuharanire ubutabera n’ubutungane, uryamirwa mumukize ingoyi y’umurenganya, ntimukagire uwo mukandamiza cyangwa ngo mugirire nabi umunyamahanga, imfubyi n’umupfakazi; muzirinde kumena aha hantu amaraso y’indacumura." 
Jeremiah22:4 Koko rero nimugenza mutyo, muri aya marembo hazakimbagira abami baganje ku ntebe ya Yuda, bari ku magari y’intambara n’amafarasi, bashagawe n’abagaragu babo n’imbaga yabo." 
Jeremiah22:5 Naho rero nimutumva ayo magambo, ndabirahiye ubwanjye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — uru rugo nzaruhindura itongo.»" 
Jeremiah22:6 Koko rero Uhoraho avuze atya ku rugo rw’umwami wa Yuda: N’ubwo umereye nka Gilihadi, ukaba umeze nk’impinga y’umusozi wa Libani, sinzashidikanya kuguhindura ubutayu, nk’imigi idatuwe." 
Jeremiah22:7 Nzagutumaho abakurimbura, buri muntu yitwaje intwaro ze, amasederi yawe meza bayateme, maze bayarohe mu muriro." 
Jeremiah22:8 Abanyamahanga bose nibanyura hafi y’uyu mugi, bazajye babwirana bati «Ni kuki Uhoraho yagenjereje atya uyu mugi wari ukomeye?»" 
Jeremiah22:9 Nuko bazabasubize bati «Ni ukubera ko batubahirije Isezerano ry’Uhoraho Imana yabo, bagapfukamira ibigirwamana, kandi bakabikorera.»" 
Jeremiah22:10 Mwiririra uwapfuye cyangwa ngo mumugire mu cyunamo! Ahubwo nimuririre ugiye, kuko atazongera kubona ukundi igihugu cye kavukire." 
Jeremiah22:11 Koko rero, Uhoraho avuze atya kuri Shalumi mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda, wari warazunguye se ku ngoma none akaba amaze kuva muri iki gihugu: Ntazakigarukamo ukundi," 
Jeremiah22:12 kuko azagwa aho bamujyanye bunyago; naho iki gihugu ntazongere kukibona ukundi. 
Jeremiah22:13 Aragowe uwubaka inzu ye adakurikiza ubutabera, akagerekeranya amagorofa yayo atita ku butungane, agakoresha abandi ku busa, ntabahe igihembo," 
Jeremiah22:14 ahubwo akavuga ngo «Ndiyubakira inzu nini y’amagorofa magari», maze akayicamo amadirishya, akayisakaza amasederi, kandi akayisiga irangi ritukura!" 
Jeremiah22:15 Urakeka ko kwitandukanya n’abandi usakaza amasederi, ari byo bizatuma ubwami bwawe bukomera? So yararyaga, akanywa, ariko agaharanira ubutabera n’ubutungane, kandi byaramuhiriye!" 
Jeremiah22:16 Yarwanaga ku muntu w’insuzugurwa cyangwa uw’umukene, bimuviramo ihirwe! Utabigenza atyo se, yaba anzi ate? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah22:17 Amaso n’umutima byawe birarikiye inyungu gusa, icyawe ni ukumena amaraso y’indacumura, ukabikorana ubuhubutsi n’ubunyamaswa." 
Jeremiah22:18 None rero Uhoraho avuze atya, kuri Yoyakimu mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda: Ntihazagire umuririra avuga ngo «Bavandimwe, mbega ibyago! Bashiki banjye, mbega ishyano!» Ntihazagire rwose umuririra, avuga ngo «Mbega ibyago, databuja! Mbega ibyago, nyakubahwa!»" 
Jeremiah22:19 Azahambwa nk’uko bazika indogobe! Bazamukurubana, bamujugunye kure y’amarembo ya Yeruzalemu!" 
Jeremiah22:20 Zamuka ujye muri Libani utere hejuru, urangurure ijwi muri Bashani; mbese ahantu hose uhacure imiborogo, kuko abakunzi bawe bose nabatsembye." 
Jeremiah22:21 Narakuvugishije igihe wari umerewe neza, uransubiza ngo: Ndacurangira abahetsi! Ibyo ni byo wakoze kuva mu buto bwawe, nta bwo wigeze wumva ijwi ryanjye!" 
Jeremiah22:22 Abashumba bawe bose umuyaga uzababungereza, kandi abakunzi bawe bazajyanwe bunyago. Koko rero, ikimwaro n’umugayo bizakomaho, kubera ubugome bwawe bwose." 
Jeremiah22:23 Wowe utuye muri Libani, ukagira inzu yawe mu masederi hagati, mbega ukuntu uzaboroga nuhura n’imibabaro, n’ibise nk’iby’umugore uramutswe!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Ndabirahiye ubwanjye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kabone n’iyo Koniyahu mwene Yoyakimu, umwami wa Yuda, yaba ari nk’impeta nambaye ku kiganza cyanjye cy’iburyo, nayikuraho." 
Jeremiah22:25 Ni koko, nzakugabiza abaguhigira kandi utinya, ari bo Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, n’Abakalideya." 
Jeremiah22:26 Wowe na nyoko wakubyaye, nzabajugunya mu kindi gihugu mutavukiyemo; ni na ho muzagwa." 
Jeremiah22:27 Igihugu muzifuza kugarukamo, ntimuteze kuzagisubiramo ukundi!" 
Jeremiah22:28 Ese Koniyahu uwo ntiyaba ari nk’ikibindi cyamenetse, cyangwa icyungo kitagikenewe? Ni kuki babajugunye we n’abana be, bakabata mu gihugu batazi?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Gihugu cyanjye, rwose gihugu cyanjye, tega amatwi ijambo ry’Uhoraho:" 
Jeremiah22:30 Uhoraho aravuze ngo «Muzandike kuri uwo muntu, muti ’Ni incike, ni umuntu utagize icyo yimarira mu buzima bwe.’ Mu bana be, nta n’umwe uzicara ku ntebe ya Dawudi, ngo aganze ku butegetsi muri Yuda.»" 
Jeremiah23:1 Baragowe abashumba batererana ubushyo bwanjye bukagwa mu rwuri! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. 
Jeremiah23:2 None rero, Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze atya ku bashumba baragiye umuryango wanjye: Ni mwebwe mwatereranye ubushyo bwanjye, murabutatanya, ntimwabwitaho. Nyamara ariko jyewe — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ngiye kubahagurukira, mbahanire ubugome bwanyu!" 
Jeremiah23:3 Jyewe nzakoranya ayarokotse mu mashyo yanjye, nyavane mu bihugu byose nayatatanyirijemo, nyagarure mu biraro byayo, maze yororoke." 
Jeremiah23:4 Nzayashinga abashumba bayaragire; kuva ubwo ntazongera kugira ubwoba cyangwa ngo akangarane, kandi nta na rimwe muri yo rizongera kuzimira — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah23:5 Igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze nzagoborere Dawudi umumero, umwuzukuruza w’indahemuka; azaza ari umwami ufite ubushishozi, kandi uharanira ubutabera n’ubutungane mu gihugu." 
Jeremiah23:6 Ku ngoma ye, Yuda izarokorwa, maze Israheli iture mu mutekano. Izina azitwa ni iri «Uhoraho ni we butabera bwacu.»" 
Jeremiah23:7 Ni koko, igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze boye kuzongera kuvuga ngo «Uhoraho ni Nyir’ubuzima, we wakuye Abayisraheli mu gihugu cya Misiri»," 
Jeremiah23:8 ahubwo bajye bagira bati «Uhoraho ni Nyir’ubuzima, we wakuye urubyaro rw’Abayisraheli mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru no mu bindi byose yari yarabatatanyirijemo, kugira ngo abatuze ku butaka bwabo.»" 
Jeremiah23:9 Ku byerekeye abahanuzi: Nashengutse umutima, ndatengurwa ingingo zose; nahindutse nk’umusinzi, boshye umuntu wishwe na divayi, kubera Uhoraho n’amagambo ye matagatifu." 
Jeremiah23:10 Mu gihugu, bose ni abasambanyi; igihugu cyose kiri mu cyunamo, kandi cyuzuye imivumo; none inzuri zo mu butayu zagwengeye; nta kindi kibashishikaje uretse ikibi, n’umwete wo gusenya." 
Jeremiah23:11 Abahanuzi n’abaherezabitambo barahumanye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — bigera n’aho nsanga ubugome bwabo mu ngoro yanjye. 
Jeremiah23:12 None rero, inzira yabo izazamo ubunyereri, bazimirire mu mwijima, maze bahagwe. Umwaka wo kubiryozwa nugera, nzabaterereza amakuba — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!" 
Jeremiah23:13 Mu bahanuzi bo muri Samariya nahabonye ibintu biteye ishozi: bahanura mu izina rya Behali, bakayobya umuryango wanjye Israheli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Ariko mu bahanuzi b’i Yeruzalemu, ho nahabonye amahano arushijeho: bohotse mu busambanyi, batsimbarara ku kinyoma kandi bashyigikira abagizi ba nabi, ku buryo nta n’umwe ushobora kuzibukira ubugome bwe. Bose bambereye nk’abantu ba Sodoma, abaturage ba Yeruzalemu bameze nk’ab’i Gomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya kuri abo bahanuzi: Ngiye kubagaburira ibamba, mbuhire amazi aroze, kuko mu baherezabitambo b’i Yeruzalemu, ari ho haturuka ubugome bwanduza igihugu cyose." 
Jeremiah23:16 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nimwime amatwi amagambo y’ibinyoma; abo bahanuzi bahanura! Babigisha ibyo umutima wabo wihimbiye, nta bwo bituruka mu kanwa k’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah23:17 Batinyuka kubwira abasuzugura ijambo ry’Uhoraho, ngo «Mwebwe byose bizabahira!» Naho umuntu wese ukomeje kunangira umutima, bakamubwira ngo «Nta cyago kizagutera!»" 
Jeremiah23:18 Ese hari uwigeze ajya mu nama y’Uhoraho, ngo yitegereze kandi yumve ijambo rye? Ni nde witondeye ijambo rye maze akaryumva?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Nguwo umuhengeri w’Uhoraho, uburakari bwe buragurumanye, umuyaga w’ishuheri uriho urahuhera ku mitwe y’abanyabyaha." 
Jeremiah23:20 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho ntibuzashira mbere y’uko asohoza umugambi yiyemeje: muzabisobanukirwa neza mu minsi iri imbere! 
Jeremiah23:21 Bariya bahanuzi sinigeze mbatuma, ariko bariruka hose! Sinigeze mvugana na bo, ariko barahanura!" 
Jeremiah23:22 Iyo baba mu nama yanjye, bari kugeza ku muryango wanjye amagambo nivugiye, bakabatoza kuzibukira imyifatire yabo mibi n’ibikorwa byabo by’ubugome!" 
Jeremiah23:23 Ese naba ndi Imana y’abandi bugufi gusa? — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze abandi kure simbabere Imana? 
Jeremiah23:24 Ubwo se umuntu yashobora kwihisha ahiherereye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze jye simubone? Ni ko se, si jye wuzuye ijuru n’isi? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!" 
Jeremiah23:25 Numvise uburyo abahanuzi bahanura ibinyoma mu izina ryanjye, bavuga ngo «Nabonekewe mu nzozi! Nabonekewe mu nzozi!»" 
Jeremiah23:26 Ibyo bizagarukira he? Ubwo se abo bahanuzi bahanura ibinyoma bafite ubwenge buzima? Ibyo bahanura ni amahomvu bihimbiye! 
Jeremiah23:27 Iyo barotorerana izo nzozi zabo, baba bagamije kwibagiza izina ryanjye mu muryango wanjye, nk’uko abasekuruza baryibagiwe kubera Behali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Umuhanuzi warose, narotore inzozi ze, ariko ufite ijambo ryanjye, naritangaze uko rimeze! Ese umurama uhuriye he n’ingano? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah23:29 Ijambo ryanjye se ntirimeze nk’umuriro, cyangwa inyundo imenagura urutare?" 
Jeremiah23:30 None rero, ngiye guhagurukira abo bahanuzi — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kuko bakingakingana amagambo yanjye." 
Jeremiah23:31 Nzahagurukira abo bahanuzi — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kuko bafite akarimi karyohereye ko kuvuga ibyabo. 
Jeremiah23:32 Ngiye guhagurukira abahanuzi barota inzozi zoshya — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — bakazirotora, maze ibinyoma byabo n’amahomvu yabo akayobya umuryango wanjye. Jyewe sinabohereje kandi sinigeze ngira icyo mbasaba, nta cyo bamariye uriya muryango. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah23:33 Nihagira umuntu wo mu muryango, yaba umuhanuzi cyangwa umuherezabitambo, wakubaza ngo «Umuzigo w’Uhoraho ni uwuhe?» uzamusubize uti «Ni mwebwe muzigo, kandi ngiye kubatererana — Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!»" 
Jeremiah23:34 Kandi nihagira umuhanuzi, umuherezabitambo, cyangwa undi wo mu muryango uvuga ngo «Mbega umuzigo uremereye Uhoraho yatugeretseho!» uwo muntu nzamwikoma hamwe n’urugo rwe." 
Jeremiah23:35 Dore rero ibyo muzajya mubwirana: «Uhoraho ashubije iki? Uhoraho atangaje iki?» 
Jeremiah23:36 Naho iryo jambo «Umuzigo w’Uhoraho», ntimuzongere kurihingutsa ukundi. Nta wundi muzigo wa buri muntu, uretse ijambo rye bwite, kuko muhindanya amagambo y’Imana nzima, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo akaba n’Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Dore ibyo uzabwira umuhanuzi: «Uhoraho agushubije iki? Uhoraho atangaje iki?» 
Jeremiah23:38 Ariko nimuvuga ngo «Umuzigo w’Uhoraho», kandi narababujije kuvuga mutyo," 
Jeremiah23:39 nzabikorera, maze mbajugunye kure yanjye, hamwe n’umugi nabahaye mwebwe n’abasekuruza banyu." 
Jeremiah23:40 Nzabambika ikimwaro ubuziraherezo; umugayo uzabokama, kandi ntibizibagirana." 
Jeremiah24:1 Uhoraho yanyeretse ibitebo bibiri byuzuye imbuto z’umutini, biteretse imbere y’Ingoro ye. Ubwo hari nyuma y’uko Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, yajyanaga bunyago Yekoniya mwene Yoyakimu, umwami wa Yuda, hamwe n’abatware ba Yuda, abacuzi n’abanyabukorikori, akabavana i Yeruzalemu abajyana i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah24:2 Igitebo kimwe cyarimo imbuto z’umutini nziza cyane zatanze izindi guhisha, ikindi kirimo imbuto mbi cyane ku buryo zitashoboraga kuribwa." 
Jeremiah24:3 Nuko Uhoraho arambaza ati «Yeremiya, urabona iki?» Ndasubiza nti «Ndabona imbuto z’umutini. Inziza zirasa neza cyane, naho imbi zirasa nabi cyane ku buryo zidashobora kuribwa.»" 
Jeremiah24:4 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati 
Jeremiah24:5 «Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Uko umuntu abona izi mbuto nziza z’umutini, ni na ko ndebana umutima ukeye abantu ba Yuda bajyanywe bunyago, nkaba narabirukanye aha hantu nkabajyana mu gihugu cy’Abakalideya." 
Jeremiah24:6 Mbarebana umutima ukeye, kandi nzabagarura muri iki gihugu; nzabubakira kandi sinzongera kubatsemba ukundi; nzabakomeza, ubutazongera kubarimbura ukundi." 
Jeremiah24:7 Nzabaha umutima wo kumenya, jyewe Uhoraho: bazambera umuryango, nanjye mbabere Imana, kandi bazangarukira babikuye ku mutima." 
Jeremiah24:8 Nyamara ariko, uko bagenza imbuto mbi z’umutini, imbuto mbi zigeze aho zidashobora kuribwa — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ni ko nzagenzereza Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, abatware be bose n’abasigaye muri Yeruzalemu bose, abasigaye muri iki gihugu bose, hamwe n’abatuye mu gihugu cya Misiri bose." 
Jeremiah24:9 Nzabagirira ibya mfura mbi, mbatangeho urugero ruzakangaranya ingoma zose zo ku isi. Ahantu hose nzabatatanyiriza, bazaba iciro ry’imigani n’urw’amenyo, babatuke kandi babahindure ruvumwa." 
Jeremiah24:10 Nzabahuramo inkota, inzara n’icyorezo, kugeza ubwo bazashira mu gihugu nabahaye, bo n’abasekuruza babo.»" 
Jeremiah25:1 Dore ijambo ryabwiwe Yeremiya ryerekeye umuryango wa Yuda wose, mu mwaka wa kane w’ingoma ya Yoyakimu mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda. Ubwo kandi hari mu mwaka wa mbere w’ingoma ya Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah25:2 Iryo jambo rero, umuhanuzi Yeremiya aritangariza abantu ba Yuda bose, n’abaturage bose ba Yeruzalemu, agira ati" 
Jeremiah25:3 «Kuva mu mwaka wa cumi n’itatu w’ingoma ya Yoziya mwene Amoni, umwami wa Yuda, kugeza aya magingo, ni ukuvuga igihe cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’itatu, nashyikirijwe ijambo ry’Uhoraho nanjye ndibabwira ubutitsa, ariko mwe ntimwanyumva." 
Jeremiah25:4 Uhoraho ntiyahwemye kuboherereza abagaragu be bose b’abahanuzi, ariko ntimwabumva, ntimwirirwa mutega amatwi kugira ngo mubumve." 
Jeremiah25:5 Uhoraho yarababwiye ati ’Nimwihane imyifatire yanyu mibi n’ibikorwa byanyu by’ubugome, bityo muzatura mu gihugu Uhoraho yabahaye kuva kera na kare, mwebwe n’abasekuruza banyu." 
Jeremiah25:6 Ntimukiruke inyuma y’ibigirwamana kugira ngo mubikorere cyangwa mubipfukamire, nimureke kundakaza mukora nabi, nanjye sinzabakura.’" 
Jeremiah25:7 Ariko nta bwo mwumvise — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ahubwo mwarandakaje, ari na byo byago byanyu, mukomeza gukora nabi." 
Jeremiah25:8 None rero, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Kubera ko mutumvise amagambo yanjye," 
Jeremiah25:9 ngiye gukoranya imiryango yose yo mu majyaruguru — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuzempuruze umugaragu wanjye Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, maze mbagabize iki gihugu n’abagituye, hamwe n’amahanga yose agikikije. Nzabatsemba ubudasubirwaho; iwabo hazahinduka ahantu hateye ubwoba; mbese hazabe itongo ubuziraherezo." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ntihazongera kumvikana urusaku rw’ibyishimo n’amagambo y’umunezero, indirimbo y’umukwe cyangwa imbyino y’umugeni; ntihazumvikana ijwi ry’urusyo kandi ntibazongera kubona urumuri rw’itara." 
Jeremiah25:11 Iki gihugu cyose kizahinduka amatongo n’ahantu hateye ubwoba, kandi bazagaragire andi mahanga mu gihe cy’imyaka mirongo irindwi." 
Jeremiah25:12 Ariko, iyo myaka mirongo irindwi nishira, nzahagurukira umwami w’i Babiloni n’iri hanga kubera ibyaha byabo — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ndetse n’igihugu cy’Abakalideya na cyo, nzagihindure itongo ubuziraherezo." 
Jeremiah25:13 Amagambo yose maze kuvugira kuri iki gihugu nzayuzuza, hamwe n’ibyanditswe muri iki gitabo byose. Dore ibyo Yeremiya yahanuye byerekeye amahanga yose," 
Jeremiah25:14 (kuko na bo bazakandamizwa n’amahanga menshi, ndetse n’abami b’ibihangange.) Koko rero, jyewe Uhoraho nzabaryoza ibikorwa byabo n’imigenzereze yabo." 
Jeremiah25:15 Dore ibyo Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli yambwiye: «Akira iyi nkongoro ya divayi iri mu kiganza cyanjye, ni divayi y’uburakari, maze uzayihe amahanga yose nzakoherezamo." 
Jeremiah25:16 Bazanywa, badandabirane, basaragurike babitewe n’inkota nzahura muri bo rwagati.»" 
Jeremiah25:17 Nakiriye iyo nkongoro yari mu kiganza cy’Uhoraho, maze nyiha amahanga yose Uhoraho yari yanyoherejemo:" 
Jeremiah25:18 ari yo Yeruzalemu, imigi ya Yuda, abami bayo n’abatware bayo; kugira ngo aho hose harimbuke, hasigare ari ahantu hateye ubwoba n’urugero rw’ibyavumwe — mbese nk’uko bimeze ubu!" 
Jeremiah25:19 Bazakurikirwa na Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, abagaragu be, abatware be n’imbaga ye;" 
Jeremiah25:20 ab’uruvange rw’amoko yose n’abami bose bo mu gihugu cya Uzi; abami bose bo mu gihugu cy’Abafilisiti: uw’i Ashikeloni, Gaza, Ekironi n’abasigaye bo muri Ashidodi;" 
Jeremiah25:21 abo muri Edomu, i Mowabu, n’Abahamoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 abami bose b’i Tiri n’i Sidoni, n’abami bose bo mu ntara yo hakurya y’inyanja;" 
Jeremiah25:23 ab’i Dedani, i Tema, i Buzi, n’Abogoshe imisaya;" 
Jeremiah25:24 Abarabu n’abami babo bose, abami bose b’uruvange rw’amoko atuye mu butayu;" 
Jeremiah25:25 abami bose bo muri Zimuri, abami bose ba Elamu, abami bose b’Abamedi;" 
Jeremiah25:26 abami bose bo mu majyaruguru, ari aba hafi ari n’aba kure buri muntu azagira igihe cye; mbese ingoma zose zo ku isi, (maze umwami wa Sheshaki abaheruke.)" 
Jeremiah25:27 Uzababwira uti «Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Nimunywe, musinde! Muruke, mugwe ubutabyuka kubera inkota mbahuyemo." 
Jeremiah25:28 Nibanga kwakira iyo nkongoro iri mu kiganza cyawe ngo bayinyweho, uzababwire uti ’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Muzayinywaho ntakabuza.’" 
Jeremiah25:29 None se ko ngiye guteza amakuba mpereye ku mugi witiriwe izina ryanjye, mwebwe mwarokoka mute? Oya, ntimuzarokoka, kuko ngiye kwahura inkota mu baturage bose bo ku isi. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze!»" 
Jeremiah25:30 Nawe rero, uzababwira aya magambo yose abahanura, ugira uti «Uhoraho ararakaye cyane, aho ari mu Ngoro ye ntagatifu aranguruye ijwi. Ararakaye, ni koko arakariye igihugu cye, aravugiriza akamu abaturage bose b’isi, nk’ak’abenga imizabibu." 
Jeremiah25:31 Urusaku rwageze no ku mpera z’isi; Uhoraho ashoje urubanza arega amahanga, araburanya icyitwa ikinyamubiri cyose, maze abanyabyaha abagabize inkota, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!»" 
Jeremiah25:32 Uhoraho Umushoborabyose avuze atya: Ibyago bizava mu muryango bijya mu wundi, kandi inkubi y’umuyaga ituruke mu mpera z’isi." 
Jeremiah25:33 Kuri uwo munsi, abo Uhoraho azaba yishe ntibazaririrwa; ntibazakoranywa kugira ngo bahambwe, ahubwo bazaba ifumbire y’ubutaka." 
Jeremiah25:34 Bashumba, nimuboroge kandi mutabaze! Nimwikurunge hasi, mwebwe batware b’ubushyo, kuko igihe cyanyu cyo kwicwa cyageze, muzabagwa ak’ibisekurume by’intama." 
Jeremiah25:35 Nta buhungiro bw’abashumba, nta bwihisho abatware b’ubushyo bazabona." 
Jeremiah25:36 Abashumba barataka, abatware b’ubushyo bakaboroga, kuko Uhoraho yatsembye inzuri zabo." 
Jeremiah25:37 Ibiraro byarimo amahoro, byasenyutse kubera uburakari bw’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah25:38 Baragiye ak’intare itaye indiri yayo; igihugu cyabo cyabaye amatongo kubera inkota kirimbuzi n’ubukana bw’uburakari bwe. 
Jeremiah26:1 Yoyakimu mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda, amaze kwima, Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya, ati" 
Jeremiah26:2 «Uhoraho avuze atya: Hagarara ku kibuga cy’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, maze abaturage bose b’imigi ya Yuda baza gusenga bapfukamye mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, ubatongere amagambo yose ngutegetse kuvuga, nta na rimwe usize." 
Jeremiah26:3 Ahari wenda bazumva, maze buri wese yihane imyifatire ye mibi, bityo nanjye ndeke amakuba nari ngiye kubateza kubera ubugome bwabo." 
Jeremiah26:4 Uzababwire uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Niba mutanyumviye ngo mwite ku mategeko yanjye nabahaye," 
Jeremiah26:5 kandi ngo mutege amatwi abagaragu banjye b’abahanuzi ndahwema kubatumaho, nyamara ntimubumve," 
Jeremiah26:6 iyi Ngoro nzayigenzereza nka Silo, n’uyu mugi nywugire urugero rw’ibivume mu mahanga yose y’isi.’»" 
Jeremiah26:7 Abaherezabitambo, abahanuzi n’umuryango wose bari bateze amatwi Yeremiya igihe yavugiraga ayo magambo mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah26:8 Yeremiya arangije kuvuga ibyo Uhoraho yari yamutegetse kubwira umuryango wose, abaherezabitambo, abahanuzi na rubanda baramufata, bavuga bati «Wiciriye urwo gupfa!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Uratinyuka guhanura mu izina ry’Uhoraho ngo ’Iyi Ngoro izaba nka Silo, n’uyu mugi uzarimbuke, ushiremo abaturage bawo!’» Ubwo bose bakikiza Yeremiya mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah26:10 Abatware ba Yuda bumvise iyo nkuru, bava ibwami bajya mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, maze bicara mu irebe ry’Umuryango Mushya w’Ingoro." 
Jeremiah26:11 Abaherezabitambo n’abahanuzi ni ko kubwira abatware n’umuryango wose, bati «Uyu muntu akwiye igihano cyo gupfa! Yavugiye kuri uyu mugi amagambo namwe ubwanyu mwiyumviye.»" 
Jeremiah26:12 Yeremiya abwira abatware n’umuryango wose, ati «Uhoraho ni we wanyohereje guhanurira kuri iyi Ngoro no kuri uyu mugi ibyo namwe mwiyumviye." 
Jeremiah26:13 Ariko guhera ubu, nimuvugurura imyifatire yanyu n’imigenzereze yanyu, mukumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, Uhoraho azareka amakuba yari yariyemeje kubateza." 
Jeremiah26:14 Naho jyewe, ndi mu maboko yanyu; nimunkoreshe icyo mushaka, icyo mubona gikwiye." 
Jeremiah26:15 Cyakora nimuramuka munyishe, mumenye ko mwebwe, kimwe n’uyu mugi n’abaturage bawo, muraba mwihamije icyaha cyo kwica umwere, kuko mu by’ukuri, Uhoraho ari we wanyohereje kuvuga aya magambo yose kugira ngo muyumve.»" 
Jeremiah26:16 Abatware n’umuryango wose babwira abaherezabitambo n’abahanuzi, bati «Uyu muntu ntakwiye igihano cyo gupfa: yatubwiye mu izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu.»" 
Jeremiah26:17 Bamwe mu bakuru b’umuryango barahaguruka, babwira imbaga yose yari ikoraniye aho, bati" 
Jeremiah26:18 «Mika w’i Moresheti wari umuhanuzi ku ngoma ya Hezekiya, umwami wa Yuda, yabwiye umuryango wose wa Yuda, ati ’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Siyoni izahingwa nk’umurima, Yeruzalemu ibe itongo, naho umusozi w’Ingoro ube impinga y’ibihuru.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Hari ubwo se Hezekiya, umwami wa Yuda n’imbaga ye bigeze bica uwo muhanuzi? Ahubwo ntibagaragarije Uhoraho icyubahiro, bagahagurukira kumwurura? Uhoraho na we areka amakuba yari yiyemeje kubateza, none twebwe twari tugiye kwikururira ishyano.»" 
Jeremiah26:20 Hari n’undi muntu wahanuraga mu izina ry’Uhoraho: ari we Uriyahu, mwene Shemayahu, w’i Kiriyati‐Yeyarimu. Yavugiye kuri uyu mugi no kuri iki gihugu, amagambo asa n’aya Yeremiya;" 
Jeremiah26:21 nuko umwami Yoyakimu, abasirikare be, n’abatware be babyumvise, bashaka kumwica. Uriyahu abimenye agira ubwoba, ahungira mu Misiri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Ariko umwami Yoyakimu yohereza abantu mu Misiri; hagenda Elinatani mwene Akubori n’abandi bagera mu Misiri. 
Jeremiah26:23 Bakuye Uriyahu mu Misiri bamuzanira umwami Yoyakimu, aramwica maze intumbi ye ayijugunya mu rwobo bahambagamo rubanda." 
Jeremiah26:24 Yeremiya we, yari ashyigikiwe na Ahikamu mwene Shafani, ni yo mpamvu atagabijwe abahigiraga kumwica." 
Jeremiah27:1 Sedekiya mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda, amaze kwima, Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo, agira ati" 
Jeremiah27:2 «Shaka ibiziriko n’ingeri z’ibiti, ubyishyire ku ijosi;" 
Jeremiah27:3 maze ubyoherereze umwami wa Edomu, uwa Mowabu, uw’Abahamoni, uwa Tiri n’uwa Sidoni. Bizajyanwa n’intumwa zabo zaje i Yeruzalemu kwa Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Uzabatume kuri ba shebuja, uti ’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Muzabwire ba shobuja, muti:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Ni jye waremye isi, n’abantu, n’inyamaswa ziyiriho, mbikesheje imbaraga zanjye n’ububasha bwanjye, maze nyiha uwo nihitiyemo." 
Jeremiah27:6 Na n’ubu rero, ibi bihugu mbigabiye umugaragu wanjye Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni; ndetse n’inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba, ndazimweguriye zimukorere’." 
Jeremiah27:7 (Amahanga yose azamuyoboka, umuhungu we, n’umwuzukuru we, ariko igihe cyagenwe nikimara kugera, amahanga akomeye n’abami b’ibihangange bazamutsinda.)" 
Jeremiah27:8 Igihugu cyangwa umuryango bizanga kuyoboka Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, ngo byemere uburetwa bwe, nzabyahuramo inkota, inzara n’icyorezo, kugeza ubwo nzatuma abarimbura, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah27:9 Naho mwebwe, nimwime amatwi abahanuzi banyu, abapfumu banyu, ababasobanurira inzozi, abacunnyi n’abanyamayeri banyu, kuko bababeshya babizeza ko mutazagaragira umwami w’i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:10 Ibyo babahanurira ni ibinyoma, bizatuma muva mu gihugu cyanyu. Ni koko, nzabatatanya maze murimbuke." 
Jeremiah27:11 Nyamara ariko, igihugu kizemera uburetwa bw’umwami w’i Babiloni, kikamukorera, nzakirekera ku butaka bwacyo kibeho mu mahoro, kizanabutureho. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!»" 
Jeremiah27:12 Naho Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, mutangarije ibi bikurikira: «Emera uburetwa bw’umwami w’i Babiloni, umuyoboke n’abe bose, bityo uzabaho." 
Jeremiah27:13 Ni kuki wakwemera gupfa, wowe n’umuryango wawe, mukarimburwa n’inkota, inzara n’icyorezo nk’uko Uhoraho yabyemeje ku gihugu kizanga kuyoboka umwami w’i Babiloni?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Nimwime amatwi abahanuzi babemeza ko mutazigera mugaragira umwami w’i Babiloni. Ibyo babahanurira ni ibinyoma. 
Jeremiah27:15 Sinigeze mbohereza — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kandi ibyo bahanura mu izina ryanjye ni ibinyoma; ni yo mpamvu nzabatatanya, mukarimbuka, mwebwe n’abahanuzi babahanurira.»" 
Jeremiah27:16 Abaherezabitambo n’uwo muryango wose, ndababwiye nti «Uhoraho avuze atya: Nimwime amatwi abahanuzi babahanurira ngo ibikoresho by’Ingoro y’Uhoraho biri i Babiloni bizahita bigarurwa bidatinze. Ibyo babahanurira ni ibinyoma;" 
Jeremiah27:17 ntimukabumve na gato. Nimukorere umwami w’i Babiloni, bityo muzabaho. Ni kuki mwashaka ko uyu mugi wahinduka itongo?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Niba ari abahanuzi, bakaba bifitemo ijambo ry’Uhoraho, nibinginge Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, kugira ngo ibikoresho bikiri mu Ngoro, mu gikari n’i Yeruzalemu bitajyanwa i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Ni koko, Uhoraho, afite ijambo ku byerekeye inkingi, ikizenga cy’amazi, ibitereko n’ibindi bikoresho bikiri muri uyu mugi," 
Jeremiah27:20 mbese ibikoresho byose Nebukadinetsari atatwaye igihe ajyanye bunyago Yekoniya mwene Yoyakimu, umwami wa Yuda, akamuvana i Yeruzalemu amujyana i Babiloni, hamwe n’abanyacyubahiro bose ba Yuda n’ab’i Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah27:21 Ni koko, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya ku byerekeye ibikoresho bikiri mu Ngoro, mu gikari n’i Yeruzalemu:" 
Jeremiah27:22 bizajyanwa i Babiloni bihagume kugeza umunsi nzabyitaho — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — icyo gihe ni ho nzabizamura, nkabigarura aha hantu.»" 
Jeremiah28:1 Muri uwo mwaka, Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, amaze kwima, ubwo hari mu kwezi kwa gatanu k’umwaka wa kane, nuko umuhanuzi Hananiya mwene Azuru ukomoka i Gibewoni ambwirira mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, mu maso y’abaherezabitambo na rubanda bose, ati" 
Jeremiah28:2 «Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Nciye uburetwa bw’umwami w’i Babiloni!" 
Jeremiah28:3 Nihashira imyaka ibiri, uko bukeye, nzajya ngarura aha hantu ibikoresho byose by’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni yahakuye akabijyana i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah28:4 Kandi nzagarura aha hantu, Yekoniya mwene Yoyakimu, umwami wa Yuda, hamwe n’abantu ba Yuda bose bajyanywe bunyago i Babiloni, kuko nyine nzaca uburetwa bw’umwami w’i Babiloni. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!»" 
Jeremiah28:5 Umuhanuzi Yeremiya asubiriza umuhanuzi Hananiya imbere y’abaherezabitambo n’imbaga yose yari ihagaze mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho," 
Jeremiah28:6 amubwira ati «Amen! Uhoraho nabigenze atyo! Narangize amagambo uhanuye, maze agarure aha hantu ibikoresho by’Ingoro biri i Babiloni, n’abantu bose bahajyanywe bunyago." 
Jeremiah28:7 Nyamara ariko tega amatwi iri jambo ngiye kukubwira wowe n’umuryango wose: 
Jeremiah28:8 Kuva kera na kare, abahanuzi batubanjirije jye nawe, bahanuriye ibihugu byinshi n’ingoma zikomeye, bakabamenyesha intambara, amakuba n’ibyorezo." 
Jeremiah28:9 Ariko niba umuhanuzi mu guhanura kwe amenyesha amahoro, azemerwa ko yoherejwe n’Uhoraho koko igihe ibyo yavuze bizagaragara!»" 
Jeremiah28:10 Nuko umuhanuzi Hananiya afata za ngeri z’ibiti zari ku ijosi rya Yeremiya, arazivuna," 
Jeremiah28:11 maze avugira imbere ya rubanda rwose, ati «Uhoraho avuze atya: imyaka ibiri nishira, uko bukeye, ni uko nzaca uburetwa bwa Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, nkabuvana ku ijosi ry’amahanga yose.» Nuko Yeremiya aragenda." 
Jeremiah28:12 Umuhanuzi Hananiya amaze kuvuna bya biti byari ku ijosi rya Yeremiya, Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati" 
Jeremiah28:13 «Genda ubwire Hananiya, uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Ingeri z’ibiti wazivunnye; none zisimbuze iz’icyuma." 
Jeremiah28:14 Koko rero, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ingoyi y’icyuma ni yo nzabohesha amahanga yose kugira ngo agaragire Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni; azamukorera, ndetse n’inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba ndazimweguriye.’»" 
Jeremiah28:15 Umuhanuzi Yeremiya ni ko kubwira Hananiya, ati «Hananiya, tega amatwi: Uhoraho ntiyakohereje; ni wowe utuma uyu muryango wiringira ibinyoma." 
Jeremiah28:16 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho avuze atya: Ngiye kuguca ku isi, uyu mwaka uzapfa, kuko watoje imbaga kugomera Uhoraho.»" 
Jeremiah28:17 Nuko umuhanuzi Hananiya apfa mu kwezi kwa karindwi k’uwo mwaka. 
Jeremiah29:1 Dore amagambo akubiye mu ibaruwa umuhanuzi Yeremiya yanditse ari i Yeruzalemu, akayoherereza abakuru b’umuryango bose mu bajyanywe bunyago, abaherezabitambo, abahanuzi n’umuryango wose Nebukadinetsari yari yaranyaze i Yeruzalemu, akabajyana i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah29:2 Ibyo byabaye igihe umwami Yekoniya, umugabekazi n’ibyegera by’ibwami, abatware ba Yuda na Yeruzalemu, abacuzi n’abanyabukorikori bari bamaze kuva i Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah29:3 Iyo baruwa yajyanywe na Eleyasa mwene Shafani na Gemariya mwene Hilikiya, ari bo Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda yari yohereje i Babiloni, abatumye kuri Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah29:4 Yari iteye itya: «Dore ibyo Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli abwiye abajyanye bunyago i Babiloni bose, bavuye i Yeruzalemu:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Nimwubake amazu muyaturemo, muhinge ubusitani murye imbuto zabwo," 
Jeremiah29:6 nimushake abagore mubyare abahungu n’abakobwa, mushyingire abasore n’inkumi zanyu na bo bunguke abahungu n’abakobwa. Aho muri mwororoke, ntimukagabanuke bibaho!" 
Jeremiah29:7 Nimuharanire amahoro y’umugi mwajyanywemo bunyago, kandi muwusabire kuri Uhoraho kuko amahoro yawo ari ayanyu. (8–9)" 
Jeremiah29:8 Nyamara Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Ntimukemere ko abahanuzi n’abapfumu bari muri mwe bababeshya, ntimukite ku nzozi murota;" 
Jeremiah29:9 ibyo babahanurira mu izina ryanjye ni ibinyoma — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — sinigeze mbatuma. 
Jeremiah29:10 Kuko Uhoraho avuze atya: Imyaka mirongo irindwi nishira muri i Babiloni, nzabitaho maze nuzuze amasezerano yanjye yo kubagarura aha hantu." 
Jeremiah29:11 Jyewe nzi imigambi nabagiriye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ni imigambi y’amahoro itari iy’amakuba: nzabaha kugera ku bihe bizaza no kwizera. 
Jeremiah29:12 Nimunyiyambaza kandi mukaza kunsenga, nanjye nzabumva." 
Jeremiah29:13 Nimunshakashaka muzambona. Nimunshakashake mubikuye ku mutima," 
Jeremiah29:14 nzabareka mumbone — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nzabahumuriza, mbakoranye mbakuye mu mahanga n’ahantu hose nabatatanyirije — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — mbagarure aho nabakuye nkabajyana bunyago." 
Jeremiah29:15 Ni koko muravuga muti ’Uhoraho yadutumyeho abahanuzi i Babiloni.’ 
Jeremiah29:16 Ni koko, dore ibyo Uhoraho abwiye umwami wicaye ku ntebe ya Dawudi, n’abantu bose bagituye muri wa mugi, ari bo bavandimwe banyu batajyanywe bunyago hamwe namwe:" 
Jeremiah29:17 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nzabahuramo inkota, inzara n’icyorezo, nzabagenzereza uko bagira imbuto z’imitini zaboze, zikaba mbi ku buryo zidashobora kuribwa." 
Jeremiah29:18 Nzabakurikirana n’inkota, inzara n’icyorezo, mbagire urugero rw’abavumwe bose bo ku isi; nzabahindura itongo riteye ubwoba. Mu mahanga yose nzabatatanyirizamo bazahinduka iciro ry’imigani," 
Jeremiah29:19 kuko banze kumva amagambo yanjye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kandi ntarahwemye kubatumaho abagaragu banjye b’abahanuzi, nyamara bo, ntibanyumva — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah29:20 Naho mwebwe, abajyanywe bunyago, nkabirukana i Yeruzalemu mukajya i Babiloni, nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho!" 
Jeremiah29:21 Dore ibyo Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze kuri Akabu mwene Kolaya, no kuri Sedekiya mwene Maseya, bihaye kubahanurira ibinyoma mu izina ryanjye: Nzabagabiza Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, abatsembere mu maso yanyu." 
Jeremiah29:22 Abajyanywe bunyago bose bari i Babiloni bizabaviramo umuvumo, kuko bazavuga bati ’Uhoraho azakugenzereze uko yahannye Sedekiya na Akabu, batwitswe n’umwami w’i Babiloni!’" 
Jeremiah29:23 Icyaha cyabo, ni uko bakoze ishyano muri Israheli: basambanije abagore ba bagenzi babo, biha guhanura ibinyoma mu izina ryanjye kandi ntarabibatumye. Jye ndabizi, mbibereye n’umuhamya. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!»" 
Jeremiah29:24 (Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo:) Uzabwire Shemayahu w’i Nahalamu, uti" 
Jeremiah29:25 «Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Woherereje umuryango wose uri i Yeruzalemu, n’umuherezabitambo Sefaniya mwene Maseya, n’abaherezabitambo bose, amabaruwa wiyandikiye ubwawe uvuga ngo" 
Jeremiah29:26 ’Uhoraho ni we wagushyize mu mwanya w’umuherezabitambo Yehoyada, kugira ngo ugenzure umuntu wese uvuga amahomvu n’uwiha guhanura mu Ngoro, maze umushyire ku ngoyi." 
Jeremiah29:27 None dore nturakarira Yeremiya w’i Anatoti wiha guhanurira muri mwe," 
Jeremiah29:28 kandi yaratwandikiye turi i Babiloni avuga ngo: Uburetwa buzashira kera! Nimwubake amazu muyaturemo, muhinge ubusitani, maze murye imbuto zabwo.’... »" 
Jeremiah29:29 Iyo baruwa ya Shemayahu, umuherezabitambo Sefaniya ayisomera umuhanuzi Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah29:30 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo, ati" 
Jeremiah29:31 «Oherereza abantu bose bajyanywe bunyago ubu butumwa Uhoraho avuze kuri Shemayahu w’i Nahalamu, ati ’Kubera ko uwo mugabo yihaye kubahanurira kandi ntaramwohereje, akiha kubabeshyeshya ibinyoma," 
Jeremiah29:32 nzamuhagurukira, we n’abamukomokaho. Nta n’umwe muri bo uzagira umwanya muri uyu muryango wanjye kugira ngo anezezwe n’ibyiza nzawukorera. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze! None se si we watoje abantu kwivumbura kuri Uhoraho?’»" 
Jeremiah30:1 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo: 
Jeremiah30:2 «Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Uzandike mu gitabo amagambo yose nakubwiye. 
Jeremiah30:3 Igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze nzagandure Israheli umuryango wanjye; yo na Yuda mbagarure mu gihugu nahaye abasekuruza babo, bazagihabweho umurage.»" 
Jeremiah30:4 Dore amagambo Uhoraho yavuze kuri Israheli no kuri Yuda: 
Jeremiah30:5 Uhoraho agize ati «Turumva induru ziteye ubwoba, igikuba kiracitse, nta mahoro ariho." 
Jeremiah30:6 Nimubaririze, murebe: ese hari igitsinagabo kiramukwa? Ndabona umugabo wese ukomeye akorakora inda ye nk’umugore uramutswe! Mu maso hose hasuherewe, hijimye." 
Jeremiah30:7 Karabaye! Ni koko, uwo munsi urakomeye, nta wundi usa na wo. Kuri Yakobo, ni igihe cy’umubabaro, ariko azawukira." 
Jeremiah30:8 (Uwo munsi — uwo ni Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze — nzamukura ku buretwa bwamushenguraga ijosi, ingoyi zabwo nzicagagure; yoye kuzongera guhakwa n’abanyamahanga ukundi." 
Jeremiah30:9 Bazakorera Uhoraho Imana yabo, hamwe na Dawudi, umwami wabo ngiye kubimikira.)" 
Jeremiah30:10 Wowe Yakobo, mugaragu wanjye, ntugire ubwoba, Israheli, ntukangarane! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Dore ngiye kugukiza nkuvanye mu bihugu bya kure, n’urubyaro rwawe ndukure mu buretwa. Yakobo azagaruka ashyitse umutima mu nda, aruhuke; nta n’uzamutera ubwoba bibaho." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ndi kumwe nawe kugira ngo ngukize, — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ngiye gutsemba amahanga yose nabatatanirijemo, ariko wowe sinzagutsemba. Ahubwo nzaguhana uko bikwiye, kuko sinakureka ntaguhannye." 
Jeremiah30:12 Ni jye ubwanjye wabatangarije umukiro, kandi nywubagezaho; nta bwo ari imana y’inyamahanga iba iwanyu. Bityo rero, muri abahamya banjye, naho jye ndi Imana — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze —" 
Jeremiah30:13 Nta muntu ufite wo kukurengera, igikomere cyose kibonerwa umuti, ariko icyawe nta miti yakivura." 
Jeremiah30:14 Abakunzi bawe bose barakwirengagije, ntibakikwitayeho! Naragukomerekeje boshye ukubiswe n’umwanzi; ari na cyo gihano cyawe kubera ibicumuro byawe bitagira ingano, n’ibyaha byawe bidahwema kwigaragaza." 
Jeremiah30:15 Kuki utakishwa n’uruguma rwawe? Igikomere cyawe ntigishobora gukira! Nakugize ntyo kubera ibicumuro byawe bitagira ingano, n’ibyaha byawe bidahwema kwigaragaza." 
Jeremiah30:16 Cyakora abakurimbura bose, na bo bazashirira ku icumu, abanzi bawe bose bazajyanwa bunyago, abakunyaga na bo bazanyagwa, abagusahura na bo bazasahurwa." 
Jeremiah30:17 Kuko nzakuvura, nkagukiza ibikomere byawe — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — wowe bitaga «Igicibwa», na «Siyoni itagira uyitaho.»" 
Jeremiah30:18 Uhoraho avuze atya: Nzavugurura amahema ya Yakobo, abayatuye mbagirire impuhwe: buri mugi uzongera wubakwe ku musozi wawo, na buri nzu nziza isubire mu kibanza cyayo." 
Jeremiah30:19 Abantu bazavuza impundu zo gushimira, ziherekezwe n’amajwi menshi y’ibyishimo. Nzabaha kororoka ubutazagabanuka, nzabubahiriza kandi ntibazasuzugurwa." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abana babo bazasubizwa ubutoneshwe bahoranye, umuryango wabo ushinge imizi imbere yanjye, maze mpane ababashikamiraga bose." 
Jeremiah30:21 Umwami wabo azaba ari umwe muri bo, umutware wabo azabakomokemo, kandi nzamuzane mwiyegereze. Ni nde rero watinyuka kunyegera? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah30:22 Muzambera umuryango, nanjye mbabere Imana." 
Jeremiah30:23 Dore umuhengeri uraje, ni uburakari bw’Uhoraho, inkubi y’umuyaga igiye guhuherera ku mutwe w’abanyabyaha." 
Jeremiah30:24 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho ntibuzashira atamaze kurangiza umugambi yiyemeje. Ibyo muzabisobanukirwa neza hanyuma. 
Jeremiah31:1 Icyo gihe — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nzaba Imana y’imiryango yose ya Israheli, na yo izambere umuryango." 
Jeremiah31:2 Uhoraho avuze atya: Umuryango warokotse inkota mu butayu wangizeho ubutoni. Israheli igiye kwiruhutsa. 
Jeremiah31:3 Uhoraho yambonekeye mu gihugu cya kure, agira ati «Nagukunze urukundo ruhoraho, kandi ubudahemuka ngufitiye ni bwo butuma nkwiyegereza." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndashaka kukubaka bundi bushya, kandi koko uzubakwa, wowe mwari Israheli. Uzasubirana ingoma zawe, maze ushagarwe n’abantu bari mu birori." 
Jeremiah31:5 Uzongera utere imizabibu ku misozi ya Samariya, kandi abazaba bayihinze babe ari na bo bayisarura.»" 
Jeremiah31:6 Koko, hateganyijwe umunsi abarinzi bazatera hejuru ku musozi wa Efurayimu, bagira bati «Duhaguruke! Tuzamuke i Siyoni; dusange Uhoraho Imana yacu.»" 
Jeremiah31:7 Uhoraho avuze atya: Nimuvugirize Yakobo impundu z’ibyishimo, nimwakirane amashyi y’urufaya umutware w’amahanga! Nimwiyamire, mwishime, mugira muti «Uhoraho yakijije umuryango we, agasigisigi ka Israheli!»" 
Jeremiah31:8 Nzabavana mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru, mbakoranye mbakuye mu mpera z’isi. Muri bo hari impumyi, ibirema, abagore batwite n’abaramutswe, bose bagarutse hano ari imbaga nyamwinshi." 
Jeremiah31:9 Baje barira, bantakira ngo ’Tubabarire’; maze mbajyana mu bibaya bitemba amazi, banyuze mu nzira iboneye, aho batazatsikira. Ni koko, ndi umubyeyi wa Israheli, Efurayimu ni we buriza bwanjye." 
Jeremiah31:10 Mahanga yose, nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, muryamamaze mu ntara za kure, mugira muti «Uwatatanirije Israheli impande zose arayikoranije, azayirinda nk’uko umushumba arinda ubushyo bwe.»" 
Jeremiah31:11 Uhoraho yacunguye Yakobo, aramuharanira, kandi amugobotora mu maboko y’umunyembaraga." 
Jeremiah31:12 Bazaza batera indirimbo z’ibyishimo ku musozi wa Siyoni; bahadendeze basanga ibyiza by’Uhoraho: ingano, divayi nshyashya n’amavuta, amatungo magufi n’amaremare. Baziyumvamo ubuzima bushya nk’ubusitani buvomerewe neza, ntibazongera kunanirwa ukundi." 
Jeremiah31:13 Ubwo inkumi zizabyina zidagadure, kimwe n’abasore n’abasaza. Umubabaro wabo nzawuhinduramo ibyishimo, mbakomeze, abagowe mbahe kwidagadura." 
Jeremiah31:14 Abaherezabitambo nzabahaza ku nyama z’urugimbu, n’umuryango wanjye nzawuhaze ibyiza byanjye.» Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!" 
Jeremiah31:15 Uhoraho avuze atya: I Rama harumvikanira ijwi ry’amaganya n’imiborogo ikomeye: ni Rasheli uririra abana be, kandi yanze guhozwa kuko batakiriho.»" 
Jeremiah31:16 Uhoraho avuze atya: Rekeraho wikomeza kuganya, hanagura amarira ku maso yawe! Uhawe ingororano y’umubabaro wawe — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — abana bawe bazagaruka bave mu gihugu cy’abanzi." 
Jeremiah31:17 Mu gihe kizaza cyuzuye amiringiro — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — abana bawe bazagaruka mu gihugu cyabo. 
Jeremiah31:18 Numvise neza amaganya ya Efurayimu, agira ati «Warampannye ndabyemera nk’ikimasa cyananiranye; ngarura maze mbone ubugaruka, kuko wowe Uhoraho, uri Imana yanjye." 
Jeremiah31:19 Koko rero, maze kugutera umugongo, nisubiyeho, narisuzumye none nikubise agashyi, naramwaye, nkorwa n’isoni; ni koko, nari mfite umugayo mu busore bwanjye. None mbonye ingaruka zabyo.»" 
Jeremiah31:20 — Ese Efurayimu ntakiri umwana wanjye nkunda, umwana rwose nihitiyemo? Buri gihe ntekereje kumuhana, numva anteye impuhwe. Mbega igishyika mufitiye! Ndamukunda, koko ndamukunda cyane, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah31:21 Shinga ibimenyetso ku nzira yawe, urore neza umuhanda wanyuzemo. Israheli, mwari w’isugi, garuka hano, garuka usange imigi yawe!" 
Jeremiah31:22 Uzarekeraho kubwerabwera ryari, mwari wigize ishyano? Uhoraho ariho ararema ibintu bishyashya ku isi: umugore arashakashaka umugabo we." 
Jeremiah31:23 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Nimara kubagandura, mu gihugu cya Yuda no mu migi yacyo bazongera bavuge bati «Uhoraho naguhe umugisha, wowe kibanza cy’ubutabera ukaba n’umusozi mutagatifu!»" 
Jeremiah31:24 Abahinzi n’aborozi bose bazatura hamwe muri Yuda no mu migi yayo. 
Jeremiah31:25 Nzahembura abishwe n’inyota, kandi ndamire abanyantege nke bose." 
Jeremiah31:26 Icyo gihe, ni bwo nakangutse, maze numva nasinziriye neza." 
Jeremiah31:27 Dore igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze inzu ya Israheli n’iya Yuda nzazigwizemo abantu n’amatungo. 
Jeremiah31:28 Nk’uko nabahagurukiye ngira ngo mbarandure, mbahirike, mbasenye, mbatsembe kandi mbagirire nabi, ni ko nzabahangaho amaso ngira ngo nubake kandi ntere imbuto. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!" 
Jeremiah31:29 Icyo gihe, ntibazongera kuvuga ngo «Ababyeyi bariye imizabibu idahishije, none amenyo y’abana babo yaramunzwe.»" 
Jeremiah31:30 Oya, ahubwo buri muntu azazira icyaha cye bwite; kandi urya imizabibu idahishije, amenyo ye bwite ni yo azamungwa." 
Jeremiah31:31 Igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze nzagirane Isezerano rishya n’umuryango wa Israheli n’uwa Yuda. 
Jeremiah31:32 Rizaba ritandukanye n’iryo nagiranye n’abasekuruza babo, igihe nabafataga ukuboko nkabakura mu gihugu cya Misiri. Bo bishe Isezerano ryanjye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ariko jye nakomeje kubabera umutegetsi." 
Jeremiah31:33 Dore iryo Sezerano nzagirana n’umuryango wa Israheli nyuma y’iyo minsi — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — amategeko yanjye nzayabacengezamo, nyabandike mu mutima, bityo mbabere Imana na bo bambere umuryango." 
Jeremiah31:34 Ntibazongera kwigishanya bavuga ngo «Menya Uhoraho», kuko bose bazaba banzi, uhereye ku muto kugeza ku mukuru — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nkabababarira ubugome bwabo, sinongere no kwibuka icyaha cyabo ukundi." 
Jeremiah31:35 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, we waremye izuba ngo ribe urumuri rw’amanywa, agashyiraho ukwezi n’inyenyeri mu mwanya wabyo kugira ngo bimurikire ijoro, akaba ari we utera inyanja kwivumbagatanya, imivumba igahogera, avuze atya:" 
Jeremiah31:36 Ayo mategeko asanzwe agenga ijuru n’isi aramutse ahindutse — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ubwo n’inkomoko ya Israheli yareka burundu kuba igihugu mu maso yanjye! 
Jeremiah31:37 Uhoraho agize ati «Nihagira ushobora gupima aho ijuru rigarukira, agatahura aho inkingi z’isi zitereye, icyo gihe nanjye nzabona gutererana inkomoko ya Israheli kubera ibyo yakoze byose» — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah31:38 Dore igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze umugi wongere wubakirwe Uhoraho, guhera ku munara wa Hananeli kugeza ku irembo ry’Iguni." 
Jeremiah31:39 Hanyuma umugozi wo kugeresha uzongere uramburwe neza kugera ku musozi wa Garebi, maze uzazenguruke ugana i Gowa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Ikibaya cyose cy’intumbi n’ivu ry’ibinure, n’imirima yose yerekeye ku kibaya cya Sedironi, kugeza ku iguni ry’irembo ry’Amafarasi ahagana iburasirazuba, aho hose hazegurirwa Uhoraho; ntihazongera gusenywa bibaho." 
Jeremiah32:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya mu mwaka wa cumi Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, ari ku ngoma; ubwo hari mu mwaka wa cumi n’umunani w’ingoma ya Nebukadinetsari." 
Jeremiah32:2 Icyo gihe ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni zari zigose Yeruzalemu, naho umuhanuzi Yeremiya afungiye mu gikari cy’ingoro y’umwami wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, yari yamufunze amwihaniza ati «Ni kuki uhanura ngo Uhoraho avuze atya: Ngiye kugabiza uyu mugi umwami w’i Babiloni maze awigarurire." 
Jeremiah32:4 Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, ntazava mu maboko y’Abakalideya; umwami w’i Babiloni azamuta muri yombi, amuvugishe imbonankubone kandi bahanganye amaso." 
Jeremiah32:5 Sedekiya azajyanwa i Babiloni agumeyo, kugeza igihe nzamutabarira — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Kandi nimugerageza kurwanya Abakalideya, ntimuzabatsinda.»" 
Jeremiah32:6 Dore rero inkuru ya Yeremiya: Uhoraho yarambwiye ati 
Jeremiah32:7 «Hanameli mwene Shalumi so wanyu, azagusanga akubwira ati ’Gura umurima wanjye uri Anatoti, kuko ufite uburenganzira bwo kuwugura.’»" 
Jeremiah32:8 Nk’uko Uhoraho yari yabivuze, Hanameli mwene data wacu yansanze mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe, arambwira ati «Ndakwinginze, ugure umurima wanjye uri i Anatoti, mu gihugu cya Benyamini; kandi kuko ari wowe ufite uburenganzira bwo kuwugura, uwigurire.» Ubwo nahise numva ko ari ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah32:9 Naguze rero uwo murima na Hanameli mwene data wacu, umurima wari i Anatoti, mubarira amasikeli cumi n’arindwi ya feza." 
Jeremiah32:10 Nanditse inyandiko y’amasezerano ndayifunga, nshyiraho ikashe yanjye imbere y’abagabo nari natumiye, maze mupimira feza ku munzani." 
Jeremiah32:11 Nafashe inzandiko z’ubuguzi, ari urwari rufunze bikurikije amategeko, ari n’urwari rufunguye," 
Jeremiah32:12 nziha Baruki mwene Neriya wa Mahiseya; mbikorera imbere ya Hanameli mwene data wacu, imbere y’abagabo bashyize umukono kuri izo nyandiko z’ubuguzi, n’imbere y’Abayuda bose bari mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe." 
Jeremiah32:13 Mu maso yabo nategetse Baruki, nti" 
Jeremiah32:14 «Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Fata izi nyandiko z’ubuguzi, ari uru rufunze, ari na ruriya rudafunze, uzishyire mu kibindi gihiye neza kugira ngo zitazangirika." 
Jeremiah32:15 Ni koko, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Inzu, imirima n’imizabibu yo muri iki gihugu, bizongera bigurwe.»" 
Jeremiah32:16 Namaze guha Baruki mwene Neriya inyandiko z’ubuguzi, ntakambira Uhoraho, ngira nti" 
Jeremiah32:17 «Uhoraho Mana, ni wowe waremye ijuru n’isi ukoresheje imbaraga nyinshi n’ububasha bw’ukuboko kwawe. Kuri wowe nta kidashoboka!" 
Jeremiah32:18 Ugaragariza ubuntu bwawe ibisekuruza ibihumbi, ariko ibicumuro by’ababyeyi ukabihanira abana babo. Wowe, Mana y’igihangange, izina ryawe ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo!" 
Jeremiah32:19 Imigambi yawe irahebuje kandi urangwa n’ibikorwa bikomeye. Witegereza imyifatire ya buri muntu, maze buri wese ukamuhemba ibihwanye n’imyifatire ye, mbese ibikwiranye n’ibikorwa bye!" 
Jeremiah32:20 Wigaragaje mu gihugu cya Misiri, uhakora ibitangaza n’ibimenyetso bikiratwa muri Israheli no mu bantu bose kugeza na n’ubu; bityo wihesheje izina ry’ikirangirire, nk’uko bigaragara muri iki gihe." 
Jeremiah32:21 Wakuye umuryango wawe mu gihugu cya Misiri wifashishije ibimenyetso by’ibitangaza, n’imbaraga z’ukuboko kwawe, bituma bose bashya ubwoba." 
Jeremiah32:22 Hanyuma wabahaye iki gihugu wari wararahiriye abasekuruza babo ko uzakibegurira, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubuki." 
Jeremiah32:23 Baraje bagituramo, ariko ntibumva ijwi ryawe, ntibakurikiza amategeko yawe, ntibagira icyo bakora mu byo wabategetse, ni bwo ubagushijeho aya makuba yose." 
Jeremiah32:24 Dore abanzi bacu barunze igitaka iruhande rw’inkike z’umugi bazuririraho badutera; none kubera inkota, inzara n’icyorezo, umugi ugiye gutabwa mu maboko y’Abakalideya bawurwanya. Iryo wavuze riratashye kandi nawe urabiruzi." 
Jeremiah32:25 Nyamara, Nyagasani Mana, ni wowe wambwiye uti ’Tanga feza ugure uwo murima kandi ubitorere abagabo’, none umugi ushyizwe mu maboko y’Abakalideya!»" 
Jeremiah32:26 Nuko Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya ati 
Jeremiah32:27 «Jyewe Uhoraho, ndi Imana y’icyitwa ikinyamubiri cyose, ni iki kitanshobokera?" 
Jeremiah32:28 None rero — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — uyu mugi ngiye kuwugabiza Abakalideya na Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, maze azawufate." 
Jeremiah32:29 Abakalideya bagose uyu mugi bazawinjiramo bawutwike; ukongokane n’ibisenge by’amazu batwikiragaho amaturo ya Behali, n’ibyo baturiragaho ibitambo biseswa basenga ibigirwamana kugira ngo banshavuze." 
Jeremiah32:30 Ni koko, kuva mu bwana bwabo, Abayisraheli n’Abayuda bakoze ibyo nanga gusa; Abayisraheli baranshavuje kubera imigenzereze yabo — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah32:31 Uyu mugi wanteye uburakari n’umujinya kuva washingwa kugeza na n’ubu! Ngomba rero kuwigiza kure yanjye," 
Jeremiah32:32 kubera ibyaha Abayisraheli n’Abayuda bakoze: baranshavuje ubwabo, n’abatware babo, n’abaherezabitambo n’abahanuzi babo, mbese abantu bose ba Yuda n’abaturage ba Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Banshinganye ijosi ntibandeba n’irihumye; n’ubwo mbigisha ubudahwema ntibumva, ntibakira inyigisho yanjye." 
Jeremiah32:34 Bashyira ibiterashozi byabo mu Ngoro yitiriwe izina ryanjye, bityo bakayihumanya." 
Jeremiah32:35 Bubakiye Behali urutambiro mu kabande ka Bene Hinomi, kugira ngo batwikire Moleki abahungu babo n’abakobwa babo; ibyo kandi sinigeze mbisaba, sinigeze natekereza gukoresha iryo shyano riyobya Yuda!»" 
Jeremiah32:36 None rero, dore ibyo Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze kuri uwo mugi muvuga ko waguye mu maboko y’umwami w’i Babiloni, akoresheje inkota, inzara n’icyorezo:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Ngiye kubakoranya, mbakure mu bihugu byose nabatatanyirijemo kubera uburakari bwanjye, umujinya n’ubwivumbagatanye bukabije, mbagarure aha hantu maze mpabatuze mu mahoro." 
Jeremiah32:38 Bazambera umuryango, nanjye mbabere Imana." 
Jeremiah32:39 Nzabashyiramo ibitekerezo bimwe n’imico imwe, mbatoze kunyubaha iteka ryose, bitume bagira ihirwe, bo n’urubyaro rwabo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Nzagirana na bo isezerano rihoraho, sinzareka kubitaho kugira ngo mbagirire neza; nzabatera kunyubaha mu mutima wabo, maze boye kunyitarura bibaho." 
Jeremiah32:41 Nzashimishwa no kubagirira neza; kandi ni koko, nzabakomeza muri icyo gihugu mbishyizeho umutima wanjye wose n’imbaraga zanjye zose." 
Jeremiah32:42 Ni koko, Uhoraho avuze atya: Nk’uko nateje ibi byago bikomeye uyu muryango, ni na ko nzabagezaho ibyiza narahiriye kuzabaha." 
Jeremiah32:43 Hazagurwa imirima muri icyo gihugu muvuga ngo «Ni amatongo gusa, ntikigira abantu n’amatungo, kandi cyaguye mu maboko y’Abakalideya.»" 
Jeremiah32:44 Bazagura iyo mirima batanze feza, bandike inyandiko z’ubuguzi, bazishyireho ikashe babanje gutora abagabo mu gihugu cya Benyamini, mu mpande za Yeruzalemu no mu migi ya Yuda, mu migi yo mu misozi, iyo mu mirambi, n’iyo muri Negevu, kuko ngiye kubagarura. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!" 
Jeremiah33:1 Igihe Yeremiya yari afungiye mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe, Uhoraho yongera kumubwira ati" 
Jeremiah33:2 «Uhoraho, we waremye isi, akayibumba akayikomeza — izina rye rikaba Uhoraho — avuze atya:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Ambaza izina ryanjye, nzagutabara nguhishurire ibintu bikomeye, wowe utazi." 
Jeremiah33:4 Koko rero, Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli avuze atya ku mazu y’uyu mugi no ku mazu y’abami ba Yuda: Ayo mazu mwarayashenye, mugira ngo amabuye yayo muyasanishe inkike zirusheho gukomera," 
Jeremiah33:5 mubone uko murinda Abakalideya. Nyamara ntibizabuza uyu mugi kuzura intumbi z’abo nzaba nishe kubera umujinya n’uburakari bwanjye, kuko ntakibitayeho bitewe n’ubugome bwabo." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ariko rero, nyuma y’ibyo, nzabazanzamura, mbakize ndetse mbahishurire icyabazanira amahoro n’umutekano." 
Jeremiah33:7 Yuda na Israheli nzabasubiza agaciro kabo nk’uko bari bameze mbere," 
Jeremiah33:8 nzabahanaguraho ibyaha bari barangiriye byose; nzabagirira imbabazi z’ibyaha byose bankoreye, ubwo banyivumburagaho." 
Jeremiah33:9 Izina rya Yeruzalemu rizaba izina ry’ibyishimo; izampesha icyubahiro n’ububengerane imbere y’amahanga yose y’isi. Igihe azamenya ibyiza byose ngiye gukorera Yuda na Israheli, azashya ubwoba, ahindagane kubera ibyo byiza byose n’amahoro nzabahundagazaho." 
Jeremiah33:10 Uhoraho avuze atya: Aha hantu muvuga ko ari itongo ritagira abantu n’amatungo, mu migi ya Yuda no mu mayira yasibye ya Yeruzalemu itakirangwamo abantu, abaturage cyangwa inyamaswa," 
Jeremiah33:11 hazongera humvikane urusaku rw’ibyishimo n’umunezero, indirimbo y’umukwe n’imbyino y’umugeni, ndetse n’indirimbo z’abazanye ibitambo byo gushimira mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, bagira bati «Nimusingize Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo kuko ari umugwaneza; urukundo rwe rugahoraho iteka!» Ni koko — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — iki gihugu nzakivugurura, gisubire uko cyahoze mbere." 
Jeremiah33:12 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Muri aya matongo atagira abantu n’amatungo no mu migi yaho yose, hazongera hubakwe ibiraro maze abashumba babicyuremo amatungo yabo." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mu migi yo mu misozi n’iyo mu mirambi, mu migi ya Negevu no mu gihugu cya Benyamini, mu mpande za Yeruzalemu no mu migi ya Yuda, imikumbi y’intama izongera itambagire imbere ya nyirazo azibare. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah33:14 Igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze nzuzuze amasezerano nagiriye umuryango wa Israheli n’uwa Yuda. 
Jeremiah33:15 Icyo gihe nyine, mu muryango wa Dawudi nzahagobora umumero, umwuzukuruza w’indahemuka, maze azaharanire ubutungane n’ubutabera mu gihugu." 
Jeremiah33:16 Ubwo rero Yuda izarokorwa, Yeruzalemu iture mu mutekano. Dore izina bazita uwo mugi: Uhoraho ni we butabera bwacu." 
Jeremiah33:17 Uhoraho avuze atya: Ntihazabura na rimwe muri bene Dawudi, uzicara ku ntebe y’ubwami mu muryango wa Israheli." 
Jeremiah33:18 No mu baherezabitambo b’abalevi ntihazaburamo abazahagarara imbere yanjye, bagatura ibitambo bitwikwa n’andi maturo, kandi bakantura ibitambo iminsi yose." 
Jeremiah33:19 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo: 
Jeremiah33:20 Uhoraho avuze atya: Nimushobora kwica gahunda nahaye umunsi n’ijoro, maze ntibibere igihe mbishakiye," 
Jeremiah33:21 ni bwo isezerano nagiranye n’umugaragu wanjye Dawudi rizakuka, yoye kuzagira umukomokaho wicara ku ntebe y’ubwami. Ibyo bizamera bityo no ku baherezabitambo b’abalevi, ari bo bakozi banjye." 
Jeremiah33:22 Uko ibinyarumuri byo mu kirere badashobora kubibara, n’umusenyi wo mu nyanja ntibashobore kuwupima, ni ko nzagwiza abakomoka kuri Dawudi, umugaragu wanjye n’abalevi bankorera." 
Jeremiah33:23 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo: 
Jeremiah33:24 Nk’uko ubyibonera, bariya bantu bibwira ko Uhoraho yatereranye ya miryango ibiri yihitiyemo. Ni yo mpamvu basuzugura umuryango wanjye, kuko kuri bo utakiri igihugu." 
Jeremiah33:25 Nyamara ariko, Uhoraho avuze atya: Jyewe wagennye gahunda y’umunsi n’ijoro, ngaha amategeko ijuru n’isi," 
Jeremiah33:26 natererana nte inkomoko ya Yakobo n’iy’umugaragu wanjye Dawudi? Ese ubwo nareka gutora mu buzukuru be abatware b’umuryango wa Abrahamu, Izaki na Yakobo? Oya, nzabagarura, kuko nabagiriye impuhwe." 
Jeremiah34:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya, igihe Nebukadinetsari umwami w’i Babiloni afatanije n’ingabo ze zose, n’ibihugu byose byo ku isi yatwaraga, n’amahanga yose, ateye Yeruzalemu n’imigi iyikikije yose." 
Jeremiah34:2 Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, aravuze ngo «Genda ubwire ukomeje Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Uyu mugi, ngiye kuwugabiza umwami w’i Babiloni, maze awutwike." 
Jeremiah34:3 Nawe, ntuzamucika, azagufata, akwigarurire. Wowe n’umwami w’i Babiloni muzahangana amaso, akuvugishe imbonankubone, hanyuma ujyanwe i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Nyamara ariko, Sedekiya, mwami wa Yuda, umva ijambo ry’Uhoraho: Uhoraho avuze ko utazazira inkota." 
Jeremiah34:5 Uzipfira neza, maze bazakose n’imibavu, nk’uko bosheje abakurambere bawe bakubanjirije ku ntebe ya cyami. Bazakuririra bagira bati ’Mbega ibyago, mutegetsi wanjye!’ Ni koko, ni jye ubikweruriye. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Jeremiah34:6 Ayo magambo yose, umuhanuzi Yeremiya ayavugira i Yeruzalemu, imbere ya Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah34:7 Icyo gihe ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni zarimo zigota Yeruzalemu n’imigi ya Yuda; naho iya Lakishi na Azeka, yari ikirwana inkundura, kuko ari yo yari isigaye ikomeye mu yindi yose ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah34:8 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya, nyuma y’uko umwami Sedekiya arahije umuryango wari i Yeruzalemu, bakiyemeza kurekura abacakara babo." 
Jeremiah34:9 Buri wese yagombaga kurekura abagaragu be b’Abahebureyi, abagabo n’abagore, bityo ntihagire uwongera guhaka umuvandimwe we w’Umuyuda." 
Jeremiah34:10 Abatware bose n’abandi bose bari biyemeje kurekura abacakara babo, abagabo cyangwa abagore, ntibazongere kubahaka ukundi, barabyubahirije, maze barabarekura." 
Jeremiah34:11 Nyamara ariko, nyuma yaho bisubiyeho, bisubiza abacakara bari barekuye, abagabo n’abagore, bongera kubakoresha nk’abacakara." 
Jeremiah34:12 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo: 
Jeremiah34:13 «Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ni jyewe wagiranye iri sezerano n’abasokuruza banyu, igihe mbakuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, mu nzu y’ubucakara:" 
Jeremiah34:14 ’Nyuma y’imyaka irindwi, buri muntu muri mwe azarekura umuvandimwe we w’Umuhebureyi uzaba yarishyize mu maboko ye; azakubera umugaragu imyaka itandatu, hanyuma umurekure.’ Ariko abasokuruza banyu ntibabyumvise, nta bwo banteze amatwi." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ariko rero ubu mwebwe mwari mwarigaruye, mukora ibintunganiye: buri wese muri mwe yemera kurekura mugenzi we, bityo mwuzuza indahiro mwagiriye imbere yanjye, mu Ngoro yitiriwe izina ryanjye." 
Jeremiah34:16 Nyuma ariko, mwageze aho mwisubiraho, musuzugura izina ryanjye, buri muntu asubirana abacakara be, abagabo n’abagore mwari mwararekuye, murongera mubakoresha nk’abacakara banyu." 
Jeremiah34:17 None rero, Uhoraho avuze atya: Nta bwo mwanyumvise ngo buri muntu asubize ubwigenge umuvandimwe, cyangwa mugenzi we. Ubu rero jyewe — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ngiye kubateza inkota, icyorezo n’inzara, maze mbagire ikintu giteye ubwoba ibihugu byose by’isi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Naho abo bantu barenze ku ndahiro bangiriye, nzabatererana, kuko batakurikije amagambo y’isezerano twagiranye, igihe basaturaga cya kimasa mo kabiri bakanyura hagati yacyo." 
Jeremiah34:19 Abategetsi ba Yuda n’aba Yeruzalemu, abatware b’ibwami, abaherezabitambo n’abatuye igihugu bose, mbese abantu bose banyuze hagati y’ibice bibiri bya cya kimasa," 
Jeremiah34:20 nzabagabiza abanzi babo n’ababisha bashaka kubambura ubuzima; intumbi zabo zizaribwa n’inyoni zo mu kirere n’inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba. 
Jeremiah34:21 Naho Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, hamwe n’abatware be, nzabagabiza abanzi babo n’ababisha bashaka kubambura ubuzima; mbateze ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni umaze kubitarura gato." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ngiye guca iteka — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze bagaruke kurwanya uyu mugi, bawugote, bawufate, banawutwike. Imigi ya Yuda nzayihindura amatongo, abaturage bayo bayicikemo.»" 
Jeremiah35:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yeremiya ku ngoma ya Yoyakimu, mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda:" 
Jeremiah35:2 «Jya mu muryango wa Bene Rekabu, uganire na bo, ubazane mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho mu cyumba kimwe, maze ubazimanire divayi banywe.»" 
Jeremiah35:3 Ubwo nafashe Yazaniya, mwene Yirimuyahu wa Habakiniya, abavandimwe be bose n’abahungu be bose, mbese umuryango wose w’Abarekabu." 
Jeremiah35:4 Nuko mbajyana mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, mu cyumba cya Mwene Yohanani mwene Yigidaliyahu, umuntu w’Imana, iruhande rw’icyumba cy’abatware, hejuru y’icya Maseya, mwene Shalumi, umurinzi w’ingoro." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ntereka imbere y’umuryango w’Abarekabu utunoga twuzuye divayi, mbaha ibikombe maze ndababwira nti «Nimunywe divayi.»" 
Jeremiah35:6 Ariko bo, baransubiza bati «Ntitunywa divayi kuko umukurambere wacu Yonadabu mwene Rekabu yabitubujije, agira ati ’Mwebwe n’abana banyu, ntimuzigere munywa divayi;" 
Jeremiah35:7 ntimuzubake inzu, ntimuzabibe imbuto cyangwa ngo muhinge imizabibu, muri ibyo byose ntimuzagire icyo mutungamo; ahubwo muzature mu mahema igihe cyose muzaba mukiriho kugira ngo muzashobore kuramba muri iki gihugu mutuyemo.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Twumviye itegeko twasigiwe n’umukurambere wacu Yonadabu mwene Rekabu; ntitwanywa divayi na rimwe, ari twe ubwacu, abagore bacu, abahungu n’abakobwa bacu;" 
Jeremiah35:9 ntitwubatse amazu yo guturamo, ntitwigeze dutunga imizabibu, imirima cyangwa imbuto ziribwa;" 
Jeremiah35:10 ahubwo twemeye gutura mu mahema. Twarumviye, dukora icyo umukurambere wacu Yonadabu yadutegetse." 
Jeremiah35:11 Cyakora, igihe Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni yateraga iki gihugu, ni ho twagize tuti ’Nimuze twinjire muri Yeruzalemu, maze duhunge ingabo z’Abakalideya n’iz’Abaramu!’ Nguko uko twatuye i Yeruzalemu.»" 
Jeremiah35:12 Nuko, Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo:" 
Jeremiah35:13 «Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Genda ubwire abantu ba Yuda n’abatuye Yeruzalemu uti ’Ese muzageza ubwo mwemera kandi mugatega amatwi amagambo yanjye? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuga." 
Jeremiah35:14 Yonadabu mwene Rekabu yasize abujije abana be kunywa divayi, barabyubahiriza. Bumviye amabwiriza y’umukurambere wabo, ntibigera na rimwe banywa divayi kugeza na n’ubu. Nyamara jyewe wakomeje kubabwira mbihanangiriza ubudahwema, ntimwigeze munyumvira." 
Jeremiah35:15 Sinahwemye kubatumaho abagaragu banjye b’abahanuzi, ngira nti ’Buri wese nareke imyifatire ye mibi, muvugurure imikorere yanyu, maze mwoye kwiruka inyuma y’izindi mana ngo muzikorere, bityo muzaramba ku butaka nabahaye, mwebwe n’abasokuruza banyu!’ Ariko, ntimwanteze amatwi, ntimwanyumvise." 
Jeremiah35:16 Bene Yonadabu bubahirije amabwiriza basigiwe n’umukurambere wabo, ariko uyu muryango wo, wanze kunyumvira." 
Jeremiah35:17 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli agize ati ’Ubu, ngiye guteza Yuda n’abaturage ba Yeruzalemu ibyago byose nabageneye, kuko nababwiye ntibanyumve, nanabahamagara ntibanyitabe.’»" 
Jeremiah35:18 Nuko Yeremiya abwira umuryango wa Bene Rekabu, ati «Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Kubera ko mwubahirije amabwiriza y’umukurambere wanyu Yonadabu, mugakurikiza amategeko ye yose, kandi mugashyira mu bikorwa ibyo yari yabasabye byose," 
Jeremiah35:19 kubera iyo mpamvu, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Muri bene Yonadabu mwene Rekabu, nta na rimwe hazabura abazakomeza gutura kuri iyi si, bagahora imbere yanjye.»" 
Jeremiah36:1 Mu mwaka wa kane Yoyakimu mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda ari ku ngoma, Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo:" 
Jeremiah36:2 «Fata umuzingo w’igitabo, wandikemo amagambo nakubwiye yose, yerekeye Yeruzalemu, Yuda n’andi mahanga yose kuva umunsi natangiye kukuvugisha, uhereye ku ngoma ya Yoziya, kugeza ubu." 
Jeremiah36:3 Ahari abo mu muryango wa Yuda, nibumva ibibi byose niyemeje kubagirira, bizabatera kugaruka, buri muntu areke imyifatire ye mibi; bityo nzashobore kubababarira ubugome bwabo n’ibyaha byabo.»" 
Jeremiah36:4 Nuko Yeremiya yiyambaza Baruki mwene Neriya, akamubwira na we akandika mu gitabo amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yaramubwiye." 
Jeremiah36:5 Hanyuma, Yeremiya yinginga Baruki, ati «Mfite impamvu, sinemerewe kwinjira mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah36:6 Genda wowe ubwawe, amagambo y’Uhoraho ari muri icyo gitabo nakwandikishije; uyasomere imbaga mu Ngoro ku munsi wo gusiba kurya, uyasomere kandi n’abantu bose bo mu gihugu cya Yuda baturutse mu migi yabo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Ahari wenda byabatera kwinginga Uhoraho, maze buri wese akareka imyifatire ye mibi, kuko uburakari n’umujinya Uhoraho afitiye uyu muryango, birengeje urugero.»" 
Jeremiah36:8 Baruki mwene Neriya akorana umutima mwiza ibyo umuhanuzi Yeremiya yari yamusabye byose; asomera mu Ngoro cya gitabo cyarimo amagambo y’Uhoraho. 
Jeremiah36:9 Mu kwezi kwa cyenda k’umwaka wa gatanu Yoyakimu mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda ari ku ngoma, bahamagaza abantu bose b’i Yeruzalemu n’abo mu migi ya Yuda bazaga i Yeruzalemu, kugira ngo basibe kurya imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah36:10 Nuko Baruki asoma mu gitabo amagambo ya Yeremiya. Bari mu ngoro, mu cyumba cya Gemariyahu mwene Shafani umunyacyubahiro, mu nkike ya ruguru, ahagana mu mwinjiro w’Umuryango Mushya w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho. Rubanda rwose rwashoboraga kumva." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikayehu mwene Gemariyahu wa Shafani, amaze kumva amagambo y’Uhoraho yanditse mu gitabo," 
Jeremiah36:12 yaramanutse ajya mu ngoro y’umwami, mu cyumba cy’ubwanditsi, asanga abanyacyubahiro bose ari ho bateraniye. Hari umwanditsi Elishama, Delayahu mwene Shemayahu, Elinatani mwene Akibori, Gemariyahu mwene Shafani, Sedekiya mwene Hananiya, n’abandi banyacyubahiro bose." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikayehu yabamenyesheje amagambo yose yari yumvise igihe Baruki yayasomeraga rubanda. 
Jeremiah36:14 Nuko abo banyacyubahiro bose batuma kuri Baruki, bamwoherezaho Yehudi mwene Netaya, na Shelemiya mwene Kushi, kumubwira bati «Fata icyo gitabo wasomeye rubanda, maze uze.» Baruki, mwene Neriya, afata icyo gitabo, maze arabasanga." 
Jeremiah36:15 Baramubwira bati «Icara, maze uyadusomere twumve.» Nuko Baruki arayabasomera." 
Jeremiah36:16 Bamaze kumva amagambo yose, bashya ubwoba, bararebana. Hanyuma babwira Baruki bati «Aya magambo yose tugomba kuyabwira umwami.»" 
Jeremiah36:17 Nuko bamwinginga bagira bati «Tubwire ukuntu wanditse aya magambo yose.» 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruki arabasubiza ati «Ni Yeremiya wayambwiraga yose, nanjye nkayandikisha wino muri iki gitabo.»" 
Jeremiah36:19 Nuko abo bategetsi babwira Baruki, bati «Genda wihishe, wowe na Yeremiya, ntihagire umuntu umenya aho muri.»" 
Jeremiah36:20 Nuko babika icyo gitabo mu cyumba cy’umunyamabanga Elishama, hanyuma basanga umwami iwe, bamutekerereza ibyari byabaye byose." 
Jeremiah36:21 Umwami yohereje Yehudi gushaka icyo gitabo, akizana agikuye mu cyumba cy’umunyamabanga Elishama, maze agisomera umwami n’abatware bose bari bahagaze bamukikije." 
Jeremiah36:22 Umwami yari yicaye mu nzu yabagamo mu gihe cy’itumba; ubwo hari mu kwezi kwa cyenda, imbere ye hakaba hacanye umuriro mu cyotezo." 
Jeremiah36:23 Uko Yehudi yamaraga gusoma ibice nka bitatu cyangwa bine, umwami yabikegeteshaga akuma k’abanditsi, akabijugunya mu muriro hejuru y’icyotezo, kugeza ubwo igitabo cyose gikongotse." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ubwo kandi, ari umwami, ari n’abagaragu be, bumvise ayo magambo yose, ntibagira ubwoba cyangwa ngo bashishimure imyambaro yabo." 
Jeremiah36:25 Nyamara ariko, Elinatani, Delayahu na Gemaliyahu binginze umwami ngo asigeho gutwika icyo gitabo, ariko abima amatwi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Nuko umwami ategeka igikomangoma Yerahameyeli, Serayahu mwene Aziriyeli na Shelemiyahu mwene Abudeyeli ngo bafate umwanditsi Baruki n’umuhanuzi Yeremiya. Uhoraho ariko yari yabahishe." 
Jeremiah36:27 Umwami amaze gutwika igitabo cyarimo amagambo Baruki yari yanditse ayabwiwe na Yeremiya, Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo:" 
Jeremiah36:28 «Fata ikindi gitabo, wandikemo amagambo yose yari yanditse muri cya gitabo cya mbere, Yoyakimu, umwami wa Yuda yatwitse." 
Jeremiah36:29 Naho Yoyakimu, umubwire uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Wowe watwitse cya gitabo unshinja ko nanditsemo ngo umwami w’i Babiloni azaza kuyogoza iki gihugu, atsembe abantu n’inyamaswa!" 
Jeremiah36:30 Ni yo mpamvu Uhoraho avuze atya kuri Yoyakimu, umwami wa Yuda: Ntazagira umusimbura ku ntebe y’ubwami bwa Dawudi, n’umurambo we uzanama ku nkuba y’izuba ry’amanywa n’imbeho y’ijoro." 
Jeremiah36:31 We ubwe, abamukomokaho n’abagaragu be, nzabahanira ibyaha byabo; maze bo ubwabo, abaturage ba Yeruzalemu n’aba Yuda, nzabateze ibyago bikomeye byose nakomeje kubakangisha, ariko bakanga kunyumva.’»" 
Jeremiah36:32 Nuko Yeremiya ashaka ikindi gitabo, agiha umwanditsi Baruki mwene Neriya, na we yandikamo ya magambo yose yari mu gitabo cyatwitswe na Yoyakimu, umwami wa Yuda, ayabwirwa na Yeremiya. Haje kandi kongerwaho andi amagambo menshi ateye nk’ayo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Sedekiya mwene Yoziya, yasimbuye Koniyahu mwene Yoyakimu ku ntebe y’ubwami, ari we Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, yari yarimitse mu gihugu cya Yuda." 
Jeremiah37:2 Ariko, ari we, ari abagaragu be, ari n’abaturage b’icyo gihugu, bari barimye amatwi amagambo Uhoraho yavuze yifashishije umuhanuzi Yeremiya wari waratorewe uwo murimo." 
Jeremiah37:3 Umwami Sedekiya yohereza Yukali mwene Shelemiya n’umuherezabitambo Sefaniyahu mwene Maseya, abatuma kuri Yeremiya kumubwira bati «Ndakwinginze, dutakambire kuri Uhoraho Imana yacu!»" 
Jeremiah37:4 Icyo gihe Yeremiya yarishyiraga akizana mu muryango we; yari atarafungwa. 
Jeremiah37:5 Icyo gihe, ingabo za Farawo zari zihagurutse mu Misiri; nuko Abakalideya bari bagose Yeruzalemu, bamenye iyo nkuru, bajya kubatanga imbere." 
Jeremiah37:6 Uhoraho ni ko kubwira umuhanuzi Yeremiya, ati" 
Jeremiah37:7 «Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Umwami wa Yuda wabohereje ngo mungishe inama, muzamubwire muti ’Ingabo za Farawo zahagurutse mu Misiri zije kubatabara, zizasubira mu gihugu cyazo cya Misiri." 
Jeremiah37:8 Abakalideya bazagaruka gutera uyu mugi, bawufate maze bawutwike." 
Jeremiah37:9 Uhoraho avuze atya: «Ntimwibeshye mukeka ko Abakalideya bavuye iwanyu ubutazagaruka; nta ho bagiye. 
Jeremiah37:10 N’iyo mwaba mwatsembye ingabo z’Abakalideya zibugarije, inkomere zarokoka zava mu mahema yazo, zigatwika uyu mugi.’»" 
Jeremiah37:11 Igihe ingabo z’Abakalideya zavaga mu mugi wa Yeruzalemu zikanze iza Farawo," 
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremiya yasohotse i Yeruzalemu ashaka kujya mu gihugu cya Benyamini, azinduwe no guhabwa umunani mu muryango we." 
Jeremiah37:13 Ageze ku irembo rya Benyamini, ahasanga umutware w’abarinzi witwaga Yiriya mwene Shelemiya wa Hananiya. Uwo murinzi yataye muri yombi umuhanuzi Yeremiya, agira ati «Ugiye mu Bakalideya!»" 
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya arasubiza ati «Urabeshya, singiye mu Bakalideya!» Nyamara ariko Yiriya ntiyashaka kumwumva, ahubwo aramufata amujyana imbere y’abatware." 
Jeremiah37:15 Abo batware baramurakarira, baramukubita, maze bamufungira mu nzu y’umunyamabanga Yehonatani yari yarahinduwemo uburoko." 
Jeremiah37:16 Ubwo rero Yeremiya afungirwa mu nzu iri hasi y’izindi, amaramo igihe kirekire." 
Jeremiah37:17 Hanyuma, umwami Sedekiya ategeka ko bamumuzanira. Nuko amujyana iwe rwihishwa, aramubaza ati «Hari ijambo Uhoraho yakubwiye?» Yeremiya arasubiza ati «Rirahari», ndetse yongeraho ati «Ugiye kuzatabwa mu maboko y’umwami w’i Babiloni.»" 
Jeremiah37:18 Yeremiya arongera abwira Sedekiya, ati «Ni ikihe cyaha nagukoreye wowe, n’abagaragu bawe, n’umuryango wawe, kugira ngo mube mwarandoshye mu buroko?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Ese ba bahanuzi banyu bari he, bamwe bababwiraga ko mwebwe n’igihugu cyanyu mutagomba kwikanga igitero cy’umwami w’i Babiloni?" 
Jeremiah37:20 None rero, mwami, mutegetsi wanjye, wumve neza icyo ngusaba: ntunsubize mu nzu y’umunyamabanga Yehonatani, ntava aho mpapfira.»" 
Jeremiah37:21 Umwami Sedekiya ategeka ko bafungira Yeremiya mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe, kandi bakajya buri munsi bamuha umugati uguzwe ku muhanda w’abayikora; kugeza ubwo imigati izashira mu mugi. Nguko uko Yeremiya yagumye mu gikari cy’imbohe." 
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatiya mwene Matani, Gedaliyahu mwene Pashuri, Yukali mwene Shelemiyahu na Pashuri mwene Milikiya bumva amagambo Yeremiya yasubiriragamo rubanda rwose." 
Jeremiah38:2 Yaravugaga ati «Uhoraho avuze atya: Umuntu wese uzaguma muri uyu mugi, azicwa n’inkota, n’inzara n’icyorezo; ariko uzawuvamo akayoboka Abakalideya azabaho, azashimishwa n’uko yarokoye ubugingo bwe, maze yibereho!" 
Jeremiah38:3 Uhoraho aragira ati ’Ni koko, uyu mugi uzagabizwa ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni, azawigarurire.’»" 
Jeremiah38:4 Nuko abo batware babwira umwami, bati «Uyu muntu akwiye kwicwa, kuko iyo avuga amagambo ameze atya, mu by’ukuri aba aca intege abantu bose, n’ingabo zisigaye muri uyu mugi. Koko kandi, uyu muntu nta bwo ashakira rubanda amahoro, ahubwo arabashakira amakuba!»" 
Jeremiah38:5 Umwami Sedekiya arabasubiza ati «Dore nguwo ari mu maboko yanyu; umwami nta cyo ari bubatware.» 
Jeremiah38:6 Ubwo bafata Yeremiya, bamujugunya mu iriba ry’igikomangoma Malikiyahu ryari mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe, bamumanurisha imigozi. Muri iryo riba nta mazi yari akirimo, ahubwo hari huzuyemo isayo. Yeremiya rero arigita muri iyo sayo." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ebedi Meleki w’Umunyakushi, umukone wakoraga mu gikari cy’ibwami, yumva ko bashyize Yeremiya mu iriba; ubwo umwami yari yicaye ku irembo rya Benyamini." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedi Meleki ava ibwami, asanga umwami, aramubwira ati" 
Jeremiah38:9 «Mwami, mutegetsi wanjye, ibyo bariya bantu bakoreye umuhanuzi Yeremiya ni ubugome; bamujugunye mu iriba, none agiye kugwa mu mwobo yishwe n’inzara, kuko nta mugati ukiboneka mu mugi.»" 
Jeremiah38:10 Nuko umwami ategeka Ebedi Meleki w’Umunyakushi, ati «Fata abantu batatu, mujyane gukura umuhanuzi Yeremiya mu iriba atarapfa.»" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ebedi Meleki ajyana n’abo bantu, ajya ibwami yinjira mu nzu y’ububiko, ahakura ibitambaro bishaje, maze abihereza Yeremiya akoresheje imigozi." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedi Meleki w’Umunyakushi abwira Yeremiya, ati «Ibyo bitambaro bishaje bishyire mu maha mu nsi y’imigozi.» Yeremiya abigenza atyo." 
Jeremiah38:13 Nuko bakurura Yeremiya, bakoresheje ya migozi, bamuzamura mu iriba, maze aguma mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe." 
Jeremiah38:14 Umwami Sedekiya ategeka ko bamushakira Yeremiya bakamumusangisha ku muryango wa gatatu w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho. Umwami abwira Yeremiya, ati «Hari icyo ngiye kukubaza, ntukimpishe.»" 
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremiya asubiza Sedekiya, ati «Ninkubwira ukuri uzanyica, kandi ninkugira inama ntuzayikurikiza!»" 
Jeremiah38:16 Umwami Sedekiya amurahira biherereye, ati «Ndahiye mu izina ry’Uhoraho Nyir’ubuzima, sinzakwica cyangwa ngo nkwegurire aba bantu bashaka kukwambura ubuzima.»" 
Jeremiah38:17 Yeremiya abwira Sedekiya, ati «Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Nusohoka ku bwawe, ugasanga abatware b’ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni, uzarokora ubuzima bwawe, kandi uyu mugi ntuzatwikwa, ndetse uzabaho wowe n’abo mu muryango wawe." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ariko, niwanga gusanga abatware b’ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni, Abakalideya bazigabiza uyu mugi, bawutwike, kandi nawe ntuzabava mu nzara.»" 
Jeremiah38:19 Umwami Sedekiya asubiza Yeremiya, ati «Ikinteye impungenge, ni Abayuda bagiye mu Bakalideya, kuko bashobora kubangabiza, bakanyica urubozo.»" 
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya arasubiza ati «Nta cyo bazagutwara; gusa wowe tega amatwi ijwi ry’Uhoraho, wumve icyo nkubwira, bityo uzabaho mu mahoro, ukize ubuzima bwawe." 
Jeremiah38:21 Nyamara ariko niwanga kubishyira, dore uko bizakugendekera:" 
Jeremiah38:22 abagore bose bakiri mu ngoro y’umwami wa Yuda bazashyirwa abatware b’ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni. Abo bagore bazavuga bati ’Incuti zawe zaragushutse zigera ku byo zari zigambiriye; none ibirenge byawe birasaya mu cyondo, bo bigendeye!’" 
Jeremiah38:23 Ni koko, abagore bawe bose n’abana bawe bazashyirwa Abakalideya; kandi nawe ntuzabava mu nzara, uzafungwa ugume mu maboko y’umwami w’i Babiloni, naho uyu mugi wo, uzatwikwa.»" 
Jeremiah38:24 Sedekiya abwira Yeremiya, ati «Ntihazagire umuntu umenya ibyo twaganiriye, bitazakuviramo gupfa!" 
Jeremiah38:25 Abatware nibamenya ko twaganiriye bakaza kugushimuza ngo ’Tubwire ibyo wamenyesheje umwami n’ibyo umwami yakubwiye; naho ubundi nubiduhisha urapfa’," 
Jeremiah38:26 uzasubize uti ’Ningingaga umwami musaba imbabazi ngo atanyohereza gupfira mu nzu ya Yehonatani.’» 
Jeremiah38:27 Koko rero, abatware bose baje kubaza Yeremiya, maze mu kubasubiza ntiyarenga ku mabwiriza y’umwami; bityo na bo ntibirirwa bamuhata, ikiganiro cy’umwami kiguma mu ibanga." 
Jeremiah38:28 Yeremiya rero aguma mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe kugeza igihe Yeruzalemu ifatiwe. Ni ho yari ari, ubwo Yeruzalemu yafatwaga." 
Jeremiah39:1 Mu kwezi kwa cumi k’umwaka wa cyenda w’ingoma ya Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, ni bwo Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, yazanye n’ingabo ze zose atera Yeruzalemu, maze umugi arawugota." 
Jeremiah39:2 Ku munsi wa cyenda w’ukwezi kwa kane mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe w’ingoma ya Sedekiya, umugi bawucamo icyuho."
