Jeremiah39:3 Abatware b’ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni bawinjiramo, bigarurira ahagana ku Muryango wo hagati. Abo ni Nerigali‐Sareseri, Samugari‐Nebo, Sari‐Sekimu umunyacyubahiro, na Nerigali‐Sareseri umujyanama mukuru, n’abandi batware b’imitwe y’ingabo bose." 
Jeremiah39:4 Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda, n’ingabo ze zose bababonye barahunga, basohoka mu mugi nijoro, banyura mu irembo riri hagati y’inkike zombi, hafi y’umurima w’Umwami, bagenda berekeje iy’Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Nyamara ingabo z’Abakalideya zirabakurikirana, zifatira Sedekiya mu kibaya cy’i Yeriko. Nuko zimuta muri yombi zimushyira Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, aho yari i Ribula mu gihugu cya Hamati, kugira ngo amucire urubanza." 
Jeremiah39:6 Umwami w’i Babiloni yica abahungu ba Sedekiya abyirebera, yica kandi n’abanyacyubahiro bose ba Yuda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Hanyuma, anogoramo amaso ya Sedekiya, amubohesha umunyururu w’inyabubiri w’umuringa, maze bamujyana i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah39:8 Hanyuma Abakalideya batwika ingoro y’umwami n’amazu y’abaturage, inkike za Yeruzalemu barazisenyagura." 
Jeremiah39:9 Nebuzaradani, umutware w’abarinda umwami, ajyana bunyago i Babiloni abaturage bari basigaye mu mugi, n’ingabo zari zaganjwe zikishyira mu maboko ye, hamwe n’abanyabukorikori bari bahasigaye." 
Jeremiah39:10 Ariko mu gihugu cya Yuda ahasiga abakene gusa batari bafite icyo batunze, nuko asiga abahaye imizabibu n’imirima." 
Jeremiah39:11 Naho ku byerekeye Yeremiya, Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, yari yihanangirije Nebuzaradani umutware w’abarinda umwami, agira ati" 
Jeremiah39:12 «Umwishingire, umwiteho, ntumugirire nabi, kandi umugenzereze uko abishaka.»" 
Jeremiah39:13 Nebuzaradani umukuru w’abarinda umwami, Nebushazibani umukuru w’abagaragu b’ibwami, na Nerigali‐Sareseri umujyanama mukuru, hamwe n’abandi batware b’ingabo z’umwami w’i Babiloni," 
Jeremiah39:14 bohereza abantu kuvana Yeremiya mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe, bamushinga Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu wa Shafani, ngo amucumbikire. Yeremiya aguma atyo rwagati muri rubanda." 
Jeremiah39:15 Igihe Yeremiya yari afungiye mu gikari cy’inzu y’imbohe, Uhoraho yaramubwiye ati" 
Jeremiah39:16 «Genda ubwire Ebedi Meleki w’Umunyakushi uti ’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ngiye kurangiriza kuri uyu mugi amagambo yanjye yose nawuvugiyeho, awuteze ibyago aho kuwuha guhirwa. Icyo gihe kandi uzaba ubyirebera." 
Jeremiah39:17 Kuri uwo munsi, nzagutabara — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nta bwo uzagwa mu maboko y’abagukangaranya." 
Jeremiah39:18 Nzagukiza, ntuzicishwa inkota: nunyiringira uzashimishwa n’uko ubuzima bwawe burokotse — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!’»" 
Jeremiah40:1 Dore uko Uhoraho yarwanye kuri Yeremiya, igihe yari i Rama abohesheje iminyururu hamwe n’izindi mfungwa zose za Yeruzalemu n’iza Yuda, zari zijyanywe bunyago i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah40:2 Nebuzaradani, umutware w’abarinda umwami, yamukuye muri iyo mbaga, aramuhamagaza maze aramubwira ati «Uhoraho Imana yawe ni yo yiyemeje guteza aya makuba yose aha hantu." 
Jeremiah40:3 None dore birabaye, Uhoraho akoze uko yari yarabivuze abihanangiriza. Impamvu iki cyago kibagwiririye, ni uko mwacumuriye Uhoraho, ntimwumve ijwi rye." 
Jeremiah40:4 Ubu rero, ngaho ngiye kuguhamburaho iminyururu ikuboshye ibiganza; niba ushaka kumperekeza i Babiloni, uze nzakwitaho, niba kandi bitagushimishije kujyana nanjye, wirorerere. Reba iki gihugu kiri imbere yawe, ushobora kujya aho ubona hatakubangamiye.»" 
Jeremiah40:5 Ariko, kubera ko Yeremiya yatindiganije guhindukira, aramubwira ati «Ushobora kujya kwa Gedaliyahu, mwene Ahikamu wa Shafani, ni we umwami w’i Babiloni yagize umutware w’imigi ya Yuda, maze ugumane na we rwagati muri rubanda; cyangwa ujye aho ubona hose hagutunganiye.» Hanyuma umutware w’abarinda umwami amuha impamba n’amaturo, maze aramusezerera." 
Jeremiah40:6 Nuko Yeremiya ajya i Misipa kwa Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu, acumbika iwe, mu baturage rwagati bari basigaye mu gihugu." 
Jeremiah40:7 Abatware b’ingabo zari zarahungiye mu misozi n’abantu babo, baza kumenya ko umwami w’i Babiloni yagabiye Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu, akamugira umutware w’igihugu, akamwegurira abagabo, abagore, abana, mbese abaturage bose batari bajyanywe bunyago i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah40:8 Ubwo rero, bahise basanga Gedaliyahu i Misipa. Muri bo hari Yishimayeli mwene Netaniyahu, Yohanani na Yonatani bene Kareya, Seraya mwene Tanihumeti, bene Efayi w’i Netofa, Yizaniyahu mwene Maka; abo bose kandi bari kumwe n’ingabo zabo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu wa Shafani, aberurira ku mugaragaro, bo n’ingabo zabo, ati «Ntimutinye gukorera Abakalideya. Nimugume mu gihugu cyanyu, mukorere umwami w’i Babiloni muzagubwa neza." 
Jeremiah40:10 Jyewe nzaguma i Misipa, mbahakirwe ku Bakalideya baza iwacu, naho mwebwe, muzasarure imizabibu n’imbuto n’amavuta, muhunike maze mwigumire mu migi murimo.»" 
Jeremiah40:11 Abayuda bose bari i Mowabu, mu Bahamoni no muri Edomu cyangwa mu bindi bihugu, baza kumenya ko umwami w’i Babiloni yari yasize abacitse ku icumu mu gihugu cya Yuda, maze abashinga Gedaliyahu, mwene Ahikamu wa Shafani, ngo ababere umutware." 
Jeremiah40:12 Nuko Abayuda bose baturutse aho bari baratatanyirijwe hose, bageze mu gihugu cya Yuda kwa Gedaliyahu i Misipa, basarura imizabibu myinshi n’imbuto nyinshi." 
Jeremiah40:13 Yohanani mwene Kareya n’abatware b’ingabo bose bari barahungiye mu misozi, bageze kwa Gedaliyahu i Misipa," 
Jeremiah40:14 baramubwira bati «Ese uzi ko Balisi, umwami w’Abahamoni, yahaye Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya, itegeko ryo kukwica?» Ubwo ariko Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu yanga kubyemera." 
Jeremiah40:15 Nuko Yohanani mwene Kareya abariza Gedaliyahu i Misipa mu ibanga, ati «Nyemerera, ngende nice Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya, kandi nta muntu uzabimenya. Ese urashaka ko aba ari we ugutanga akakwica? Abayuda bose bakugenderaho baba bagowe, maze abasigaye muri Yuda bose bagashirira ku icumu!»" 
Jeremiah40:16 Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu asubiza Yohanani mwene Kareya, ati «Ntuzabikore! Ibyo uvuga kuri Yishimayeli ni ibinyoma.»" 
Jeremiah41:1 Mu kwezi kwa karindwi, Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya wa Elishama, wari ufitanye isano n’umwami akaba n’umwe mu banyacyubahiro bakomeye b’ibwami, aza i Misipa kwa Gedaliyahu, aherekejwe n’abagabo cumi, maze bafungurira hamwe." 
Jeremiah41:2 Icyo gihe ni bwo Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya, n’abo bagabo cumi bari bamuherekeje, bicishije inkota Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu; bica batyo uwo umwami w’i Babiloni yari yarahaye gutegeka igihugu." 
Jeremiah41:3 Yishimayeli yica n’Abayuda bose bari kumwe na Gedaliyahu i Misipa, atsemba n’ingabo z’Abakalideya bari aho." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ku munsi wa kabiri w’urupfu rwa Gedaliyahu, nta muntu n’umwe wari wakabimenya." 
Jeremiah41:5 Nuko, i Sikemu, i Silo n’i Samariya, haturuka abagabo mirongo inani bogoshe ubwanwa, batanyuye imyambaro yabo kandi birasaze umubiri, bari bazanye amaturo n’ububani bigenewe Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah41:6 Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya asohoka i Misipa abasanganiye, uko ateye intambwe akarira. Abagezeho arababwira ati «Nimuze murebe Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu!»" 
Jeremiah41:7 Ngo bagere mu mugi rwagati, Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya, afatanyije n’abantu bari kumwe na we, barabica maze intumbi zabo bazijugunya mu rwobo rwuzuyemo amazi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Ariko muri abo bantu havamo icumi babwira Yishimayeli, bati «Witwica, twahishe mu gisambu ibintu byinshi birimo ingano nini, n’iza bushoki, amavuta y’imizeti n’ubuki.» Nuko arabareka, ntiyabicana n’abavandimwe babo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Urwobo Yishimayeli yatayemo imirambo y’abantu yari yishe rwari runini, ni rwo umwami Asa yari yaracukuye igihe atewe na Bayesha umwami wa Israheli. Nuko Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya, arwuzuzamo abantu yishe." 
Jeremiah41:10 Yishimayeli rero agira imfungwa abantu bose bari basigaye i Misipa: abakobwa b’umwami, n’abantu bose bari bagituye i Misipa, mbese ba bandi Nebuzaradani, umutware w’abarinda umwami, yari yarashinze Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu. Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya abajyana bose ari imbohe, maze aragenda yerekeza mu Bahamoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Yohanani mwene Kareya, n’abatware b’ingabo bari kumwe na we, bumvise ibibi byose Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya yakoze," 
Jeremiah41:12 bakoranya abantu babo bose, maze bajya kurwanya Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya, bamusanga hafi y’ikidendezi kinini cy’i Gibewoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Abantu bose bari kumwe na Yishimayeli, babonye Yohanani mwene Kareya n’abatware b’ingabo bamuherekeje, basagwa n’ibyishimo." 
Jeremiah41:14 Abo bantu bose Yishimayeli yari yaravanye i Misipa, barahindukira, bisangira Yohanani mwene Kareya." 
Jeremiah41:15 Naho Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya, ngo abone ko Yohanani mwene Kareya yamusatiriye, ahungana n’abantu munani bacikira mu gihugu cy’Abahamoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Yohanani mwene Kareya n’abatware b’ingabo bari bamuherekeje, bishingira abantu bari basigaye, bamwe Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya yari yazanye ari imbohe abavanye i Misipa, igihe yishe Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu. Abo bose rero, ari abagabo, abagore n’abana, ari n’abarinzi b’ibwami, babavana i Gibewoni, barabagarura." 
Jeremiah41:17 Bashyira nzira baragenda, bahagarara ku ngando y’i Kimuhamu, hafi ya Betelehemu, bitegura kujya mu Misiri." 
Jeremiah41:18 Ubwo nyine bahungaga Abakalideya kuko babatinyaga, kubera Yishimayeli mwene Netaniya wari warishe Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu, wa wundi umwami w’i Babiloni yari yarahaye gutegeka igihugu." 
Jeremiah42:1 Abatware bose b’ingabo, barimo Yohanani mwene Kareya na Azariya mwene Hoshaya, n’imbaga yose, abakuru n’abato," 
Jeremiah42:2 begera umuhanuzi Yeremiya, baramubwira bati «Ibyo tugusaba ubyumve! Dutakambire kuri Uhoraho Imana yawe, twebwe abacitse ku icumu — ni koko, dore dusigaye turi mbarwa kandi twarahoze turi benshi nk’uko nawe ubyirebera —" 
Jeremiah42:3 kugira ngo Uhoraho Imana yawe, atwereke inzira twakurikira, n’icyo twakora.»" 
Jeremiah42:4 Umuhanuzi Yeremiya arabasubiza ati «Numvise! Ngiye kubatakambira kuri Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nk’uko mubyifuza. Ijambo ryose Uhoraho azansubiza nzaribagezaho nta cyo mbahishe.»" 
Jeremiah42:5 Na bo baramwemerera bati «Uhoraho azadushinje atabereye: tuzakurikiza ijambo Uhoraho Imana yawe azakudutumaho. 
Jeremiah42:6 Ryaba ritunyuze cyangwa ritatunyuze, tuzumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yawe tukoherejeho; kandi byose bizaba mahire, kuko tuzumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu.»" 
Jeremiah42:7 Nyuma y’iminsi cumi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Na we ahamagara Yohanani mwene Kareya, hamwe n’abatware b’ingabo bose bari kumwe na we, n’imbaga yose, abakuru n’abato," 
Jeremiah42:9 arababwira ati «Uhoraho Imana ya Israheli, we mwanyoherejeho kugira ngo mbatakambire, avuze atya:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Nimwemera kuguma muri iki gihugu, nzabubaka, ubutazongera kubarimbura; nzabatera noye kuzabarandura ukundi, kuko nicujije ikibi nabagiriye." 
Jeremiah42:11 Ntimutinye umwami w’i Babiloni ubatera gukangarana! Ntimuzongera kumutinya — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kuko ndi kumwe namwe kugira ngo mbagobotore mu maboko ye. 
Jeremiah42:12 Nzabagira abaterambabazi kugira ngo abagirire impuhwe, maze abarekere mu gihugu cyanyu." 
Jeremiah42:13 Ariko nimwanga kumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, muvuga ngo ’Ntidushaka kuguma muri iki gihugu," 
Jeremiah42:14 ahubwo turashaka kujya mu Misiri, aho tutazongera ukundi guhura n’intambara, ntituzongere no kumva ijwi ry’ihembe, cyangwa ngo tubure umugati; ni ho dushaka gutura’..." 
Jeremiah42:15 niba rero, bantu ba Yuda mwacitse ku icumu, ari uko muvuze, nimwumve uko Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli ababwira nimuramuka mugenje mutyo: Niba koko mwiyemeje gushyira nzira mukajya mu Misiri ngo ni ho muhungiye," 
Jeremiah42:16 inkota mutinya izabasanga aho mu gihugu cya Misiri, inzara ibakangaranya izabagendaho kugera mu Misiri, ndetse ni na ho muzapfira!" 
Jeremiah42:17 Abantu bose biyemeje guhungira mu Misiri, bazahapfira bishwe n’inkota, inzara, ndetse n’icyorezo. Nta n’umwe uzacika ku icumu cyangwa ngo arokoke icyago ngiye kuboherereza." 
Jeremiah42:18 Ni koko, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Nk’uko umujinya wanjye n’uburakari bwanjye byivunduriye ku baturage ba Yeruzalemu, ni na ko bizabavunduriraho nimugera mu Misiri. Muzaba ibivume, mube ibicibwa, muhore munegurwa kandi musekwa, n’iki gihugu ntimuzongera kukibona ukundi." 
Jeremiah42:19 Bantu ba Yuda mwacitse ku icumu, Uhoraho arabihanangirije agira ati ’Ntimujye mu Misiri!’ Mumenye ko uyu munsi mbaburiye ku mugaragaro." 
Jeremiah42:20 Mwikozeho, igihe munyohereje kuri Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mugira muti ’Dutakambire kuri Uhoraho Imana yacu, maze utubwire ibyo azaba yategetse, tuzabikora.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Maze kubibabwira, ariko ntimwumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nta n’icyo mwumva mu byo yanyohereje kubabwira." 
Jeremiah42:22 Ubu rero nimumenye neza ko muzicwa n’inkota, inzara, ndetse n’icyorezo, mukagwa aho mugiye guhungira.»" 
Jeremiah43:1 Yeremiya amaze kugeza kuri rubanda amagambo yose Uhoraho yari yamutumye kubabwira," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya mwene Hoshaya, na Yohanani mwene Kareya, hamwe n’abandi bagabo b’indakoreka barahaguruka, babwira Yeremiya bati «Ibyo uvuga ni ibinyoma; Uhoraho Imana yacu ntiyagutumye kutubwira ngo ’Ntimuhungire mu Misiri!’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Ahubwo Baruki mwene Neriya ni we ukoshya kuturwanya; arashaka kutugabiza Abakalideya ngo batwice, cyangwa ngo batujyane bunyago i Babiloni.»" 
Jeremiah43:4 Ari Yohanani mwene Kareya, ari n’abatware b’ingabo, ari n’abandi bose, nta n’umwe witaye ku ijwi ry’Uhoraho, wabasabaga kuguma mu gihugu cya Yuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Yohanani mwene Kareya, n’abatware b’ingabo, bahata Abayuda bari basigaye bacitse ku icumu, ngo bajyane na bo; bajyana batyo ba bandi bari baragarutse gutura muri Yuda, baturutse mu bihugu bibakikije bari baratataniyemo." 
Jeremiah43:6 Harimo abagabo, abagore, abana, abakobwa b’umwami, mbese abantu bose Nebuzaradani, umutware w’abarinda umwami, yari yashinze Gedaliyahu mwene Ahikamu wa Shafani. Umuhanuzi Yeremiya na we yari muri bo, hamwe na Baruki mwene Neriya." 
Jeremiah43:7 Nuko banga kumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho bajya mu Misiri, ni bwo bageze i Tafune." 
Jeremiah43:8 Nuko Uhoraho abwirira Yeremiya i Tafune iri jambo: 
Jeremiah43:9 Fata amabuye manini, maze nugera imbere ya bamwe mu Bayuda, uyatabe mu kibuga kiri imbere y’umuryango w’ingoro ya Farawo i Tafune." 
Jeremiah43:10 Hanyuma, uzababwire uti «Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ngiye gutumira umugaragu wanjye Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, ashyire intebe ye y’ubwami hejuru y’ayo mabuye natabye, maze azayatwikirize ihema rye." 
Jeremiah43:11 Azaza ahungabanye Misiri! Uwagenewe gupfa azapfa! Uwagenewe kujyanwa bunyago azajyanwa bunyago! Uwagenewe inkota na we azicwe n’inkota! 
Jeremiah43:12 Azakongeza ingoro z’ibigirwamana byo mu Misiri, naho amashusho yabyo ayajyane. Azahanagura igihugu cya Misiri agitsembe nk’uko umushumba ahanagura umwambaro we, narangiza yigendere nta we umwakuye." 
Jeremiah43:13 Mu Misiri hose azahamenagura amabuye manini bashinze bukingi akegurirwa izuba, anatwike n’ingoro zose z’ibigirwamana by’aho.»" 
Jeremiah44:1 Uhoraho abwira Yeremiya iri jambo ryerekeye Abayuda bose bari batuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, i Migidoli, i Tafune, i Memfisi no mu gihugu cya Patorosi, agira ati" 
Jeremiah44:2 «Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Muzi neza amakuba naterereje Yeruzalemu n’imigi yose ya Yuda; na n’ubu ni mu matongo nta muntu uhatuye. 
Jeremiah44:3 Ibyo byatewe n’ibibi bakoze, bakanshavuza igihe bajyaga gukorera no gutwikira imibavu izindi mana batigeze bamenya, ari bo ubwabo, ari namwe cyangwa abasokuruza banyu." 
Jeremiah44:4 Sinahwemye kuboherereza abagaragu banjye b’abahanuzi kugira ngo bababwire bati ’Ntimugakore ibintu biteye ishozi kandi mbyanga.’ 
Jeremiah44:5 Nta bwo bumvise, ntibateze amatwi, ngo bihane ubugome, kandi bareke gutwikira imibavu izindi mana." 
Jeremiah44:6 Nuko umujinya wanjye n’uburakari bwanjye bigurumana nk’umuriro, biyogoza imigi ya Yuda n’amayira ya Yeruzalemu; none ubu habaye mu matongo, ahantu hatagerwa." 
Jeremiah44:7 Ubu rero, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ni kuki mukomeza kwikururira ibyo byago byose, kugeza ubwo muntera kubatsemba muri Yuda, ari abagabo n’abagore, ari abana b’ibitambambuga n’abakiri ku ibere, ntihagire n’uwo kubara inkuru usigara?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Ni koko, muranshavuza kubera imigenzereze yanyu: mutwikira imibavu izindi mana mu gihugu cya Misiri mwahungiyemo. Muzageza aho mwikururira urupfu, mube ba ruvumwa, kandi mutukwe mu mahanga yose yo ku isi." 
Jeremiah44:9 Ese mwibagiwe ibicumuro by’abasokuruza banyu, iby’abami ba Yuda n’abatware babo? Mwaba se mwarirengagije ibyaha mwebwe n’abagore banyu mwakoreye mu gihugu cya Yuda no mu mayira ya Yeruzalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Kugeza uyu munsi, ntimwigeze mwisubiraho, ntimwigeze mwubaha cyangwa ngo mukurikize amategeko n’amabwiriza nabagejejeho, mwebwe n’abasokuruza banyu." 
Jeremiah44:11 None rero, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ngiye kubahagurukira, mbagirire nabi, kandi ntsembe Yuda yose uko yakabaye." 
Jeremiah44:12 Nzigarurira abasigaye bo muri Yuda, bagahungira mu Misiri bakahatura. Bazapfa bose, bagwe mu gihugu cya Misiri bazize inkota n’inzara. Bose bazazira inkota n’inzara, babe ba ruvumwa, batukwe kandi basekwe." 
Jeremiah44:13 Nzahana abagiye gutura mu gihugu cya Misiri nk’uko nahannye ab’i Yeruzalemu, nkabicisha inkota, inzara n’icyorezo." 
Jeremiah44:14 Nta n’umwe uzarokoka, nta n’uzacika ku icumu mu basigaye ba Yuda bahungiye mu Misiri. Nta n’umwe uzagaruka mu gihugu cya Yuda, dore ko bifuza kuzasubirayo, bakahatura. Nta bwo bazahagaruka, uretse ab’imbarwa bazacika ku icumu.»" 
Jeremiah44:15 Abagabo bari bazi ko abagore babo batwikira imibavu izindi mana, hamwe n’abagore bari aho mu ikoraniro, mbese abantu bose bari batuye mu gihugu cya Misiri n’i Patorosi, basubiza Yeremiya bati" 
Jeremiah44:16 «N’ubwo utubwira ibyo mu izina ry’Uhoraho, nta bwo tukumva." 
Jeremiah44:17 Tugiye gukora ibyo twiyemeje byose, dutwikire imibavu Umwamikazi wo mu kirere, tumumurikire ibitambo biseswa nk’uko twabigenzaga mu migi ya Yuda no mu mayira ya Yeruzalemu, ari twebwe ubwacu, abasokuruza bacu, abami bacu, n’abatware bacu. Icyo gihe twari dufite imigati ihagije, tukabaho mu munezero uzira amakuba." 
Jeremiah44:18 Kuva ubwo turetse gutwikira amaturo Umwamikazi wo mu kirere no kumumurikira ibitambo biseswa, twabuze byose kandi turapfa tuzira inkota n’inzara.»" 
Jeremiah44:19 Abagore bungamo bati «Yego, dutwikira imibavu Umwamikazi wo mu kirere tukanamumurikira ibitambo biseswa; ariko se abagabo bacu bo ntibadufasha mu gutegura utugati two kumwubahiriza, bakadufasha no kumumurikira ibyo bitambo biseswa?»" 
Jeremiah44:20 Nuko Yeremiya abwira imbaga yose, abagabo n’abagore, n’abandi bantu bose bari bamushubije batyo, ati" 
Jeremiah44:21 «Imibavu mwatwikiye mu migi ya Yuda no mu mayira ya Yeruzalemu, ari mwebwe, abasokuruza banyu, abami banyu, abatware banyu n’imbaga yose, aho none si yo Uhoraho abibutsa akayibahanira?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Uhoraho ntiyari agishoboye kwihanganira ibikorwa byanyu bibi n’amahano mwakoraga; ni yo mpamvu igihugu cyanyu cyahindutse itongo, kikaba giteye ubwoba, cyabaye ruvumwa, n’abaturage bacyo bagicikamo, nk’uko bimeze ubu!" 
Jeremiah44:23 Kubera ko mwatwikiye amaturo izindi mana, mugacumura kuri Uhoraho, mukanga kumva no gukurikiza amateka, amabwiriza n’amategeko ye, ni yo mpamvu ibyago byabagwiririye, nk’uko bimeze ubu!»" 
Jeremiah44:24 Nuko Yeremiya abwira imbaga yose n’abagore bose, ati «Nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebwe Bayuda muri mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Jeremiah44:25 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Mwebwe bagore, ngaho nimurangize icyo mwasezeranye! Muravuga ngo ’Turashaka kurangiza amasezerano twiyemeje, dutwikire Umwamikazi wo mu kirere imibavu, tunamumurikire ibitambo biseswa’; ngaho da, nimurangize ayo masezerano yanyu, munamurike ibitambo biseswa!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Nyamara ariko, Bayuda mutuye mu gihugu cya Misiri, nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho: Ndabirahiye mu izina ryanjye ry’impangare — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nta Muyuda uzongera kurevura izina ryanjye mu gihugu cya Misiri, avuga ati ’Uhoraho ni Nyir’ubuzima.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Nzabahagurukira mbagirire nabi aho kubagirira neza. Abayuda bari mu gihugu cya Misiri bazazira inkota n’inzara, maze barimbuke." 
Jeremiah44:28 Abantu b’imbarwa bazaba barokotse inkota, ni bo bazava mu gihugu cya Misiri, bagasubira mu cya Yuda. Abacitse ku icumu bose bo muri Yuda, bahungiye mu Misiri, bazamenya neza uvuga ukuri uwo ari we, ari jye cyangwa bo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Dore rero ikimenyetso — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kizabereka ko ngiye guhana aha hantu, ibyo bikabumvisha ko amagambo nabavuzeho agiye kuzuzwa, maze mukagwirirwa n’ibyago." 
Jeremiah44:30 Uhoraho avuze atya: Farawo Hofura, umwami wa Misiri, nzamugabiza abanzi be bamwifuriza urupfu, nk’uko nashyize Sedekiya umwami wa Yuda mu maboko y’umwanzi we Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’iBabiloni, washakaga kumwica.»" 
Jeremiah45:1 Dore ijambo umuhanuzi Yeremiya yabwiye Baruki mwene Neriya, mu mwaka wa kane w’ingoma ya Yoyakimu mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda, ubwo Baruki yandikaga mu gitabo ya magambo yabwirwaga na Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah45:2 «Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli akuvuzeho atya, wowe Baruki:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Uravuga uti ’Ndagowe! Uhoraho arahuhura imvune mfite; maze kunanizwa n’imiborogo, sinkiruhuka.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 Uzamubwire uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Kuisi yose, icyo nubatse ngiye kugisenya, icyo nateye ngiye kukirandura." 
Jeremiah45:5 None wowe ugamije imishinga ihambaye? Ntiwongere no kubirota! Ngiye guterereza amakuba icyitwa ikinyamubiri cyose, ariko wowe nta cyo uzaba aho uzajya hose.’»" 
Jeremiah46:1 Dore amagambo Uhoraho yabwiye umuhanuzi Yeremiya, yerekeye abanyamahanga." 
Jeremiah46:2 Ubutumwa bwerekeye Misiri n’ingabo za Farawo Neko, umwami wa Misiri. Uwo mwami yari ku nkombe za Efurati i Karikemeshi ubwo Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni yamuneshaga; hari mu mwaka wa kane w’ingoma ya Yoyakimu mwene Yoziya, umwami wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah46:3 Nimwegeranye ingabo, intoya n’inini, maze mujye ku rugamba!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Nimutegure intebe ku mafarasi maze muzicareho, muhagurukane ingofero z’ibyuma mutyaze amacumu, mwambare imyambaro y’intambara." 
Jeremiah46:5 Ariko se, biriya ni iki? Ibyo mbonye ni ibiki? Ng’abo baraganjwe, baratsimbuwe, ab’intwari muri bo barishwe; batatanye bahunga, ubutareba inyuma! Ubwoba bwakwiriye hose — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze!" 
Jeremiah46:6 Uw’inkwakuzi ntashobora guhunga cyangwa uw’intwari ngo acike ku icumu. Mu majyaruguru, ku nkombe ya Efurati, baradandabirana bakihonda hasi!" 
Jeremiah46:7 Ni nde se umeze nka Nili izamuka cyangwa amazi asuma mu nzuzi ngari? 
Jeremiah46:8 Iyo ni Misiri imeze nka Nili izamuka, cyangwa nk’amazi asuma mu nzuzi ngari. Yaravugaga ngo «Nzazamuka nsendere isi, ntsembe imigi n’abaturage bayo!" 
Jeremiah46:9 Amafarasi nahaguruke, amagari y’intambara ashoze urugamba! Ab’intwari nibatabare, ab’i Kushi na Puti bazi gukinga ingabo, cyangwa ab’i Ludi bazi gufora umuheto!»" 
Jeremiah46:10 Ariko uwo munsi uzabera Uhoraho, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo, umunsi wo kwihorera no kwihimura abanzi be. Inkota izagotomera, ihage kandi isinde amaraso yabo. Ibyo bizabera Uhoraho, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo, igitambo mu gihugu cy’amajyaruguru, ku nkombe ya Efurati!" 
Jeremiah46:11 Mwari w’isugi wa Misiri, zamuka ujye muri Gilihadi ushake icyomoro. Nyamara uravunikira ubusa ushakisha imiti, nta n’umwe wakuvura!" 
Jeremiah46:12 Amahanga yamenye ikimwaro cyawe, kuko induru yawe yasakaye ku isi yose; uw’intwari yahubiranye n’indi ntwari, bose bihonda hasi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye umuhanuzi Yeremiya amumenyesha ko Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni azaza gutsemba igihugu cya Misiri:" 
Jeremiah46:14 Ubitangaze mu Misiri, ubyamamaze i Migidoli, ubigeze i Memfisi n’i Tafune, ugira uti «Urarye uri menge, inkota yabiciye impande zawe." 
Jeremiah46:15 Ngaho, cya kimasa cyawe Apisi kirahunze, nticyashoboye gushinga ibirindiro! Uhoraho aragihutaje, none kiradandabiranye!" 
Jeremiah46:16 Abantu na bo baragwirirana umwe hejuru y’undi. Barabwirana bati ’Nimuhaguruke, dusubire mu muryango wacu n’igihugu cyacu kavukire kure y’inkota kirimbuzi!’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Farawo umwami wa Misiri, muzamuhimbe ’Gasaku kabura ku itabaro!’" 
Jeremiah46:18 Mbirahije ubuzima bwanjye — uwo ni Umwami ubivuze, ari we Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo — aje, ameze uko Taboru isumba imisozi miremire, cyangwa Karumeli isumba inyanja." 
Jeremiah46:19 Baturage ba Misiri, nimutegure impago zo guhungana; kuko Memfisi igiye guhinduka agasi, ibe umuyonga n’itongo ridatuwe." 
Jeremiah46:20 Misiri yari nk’inyana iteye ubwuzu, ariko amasazi aturutse mu majyaruguru ayihundagayeho." 
Jeremiah46:21 N’abacancuro bayo bari bameze nk’ibimasa by’imishishe; na bo barahindukiye, bose barahunze, ntibashobora guhangara urugamba. Kandi koko, umunsi wabo wageze, igihe cyabo cyo kuryozwa cyatashye." 
Jeremiah46:22 Wagira ngo ni nk’inzoka inyerera ivuza ubuhuha; baje ari igitero basanganije Misiri amashoka, bayiroshyeho nk’abatema ibiti." 
Jeremiah46:23 Nimuteme ishyamba ryayo — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — n’ubwo ryari intamenwa. Bararusha inzige ubwinshi, nta we ushobora kubabara." 
Jeremiah46:24 Misiri y’ihogoza ikojejwe isoni, igabijwe ibihugu byo mu majyaruguru.»" 
Jeremiah46:25 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, aravuze ati «Ngiye guhagurukira Amono, ikigirwamana cy’i Tebesi, hamwe na Farawo, Misiri n’imana zayo n’abami bayo. Nzahagurukira Farawo n’abamwisunga bose," 
Jeremiah46:26 mbagabize abashaka kubica, ari bo Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni n’abagaragu be. Hanyuma Misiri isubire uko yahoze mbere.» Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah46:27 Naho wowe, Yakobo mugaragu wanjye, ntugire ubwoba; Israheli ntiwemere ko bagukangaranya! Nzagukura mu bihugu bya kure, urubyaro rwawe nduvane mu gihugu cy’ubucakara. Yakobo azagaruka nta cyo yikanga kandi agire amahoro, nta n’uzongera kumutera impungenge." 
Jeremiah46:28 Wowe Yakobo mugaragu wanjye, ntugire ubwoba — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ndi kumwe nawe. Nzatsemba amahanga yose nabatatanyirijemo, ariko wowe, sinzagutsemba: cyakora nzaguhana nkurikije ubutabera, sinzabura kugukosora." 
Jeremiah47:1 Ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye umuhanuzi Yeremiya ryerekeye Abafilisiti, mbere y’uko Farawo atsemba Gaza:" 
Jeremiah47:2 Uhoraho avuze atya: Amazi aturutse mu majyaruguru aruzuriranye, abaye umuvumba ukomeye, asendera igihugu n’ibikirimo byose: yuzura umugi no ku bawutuye. Abantu baratabaza, abaturage bo mu gihugu baravuza induru," 
Jeremiah47:3 bumvise umuriri w’amafarasi arimbura ubutaka n’ibinono byayo, urusaku rw’amagare y’intambara n’inziga zayo. Ababyeyi barata umutwe bagatererana abana babo," 
Jeremiah47:4 kubera ko umunsi wageze wo kuyogoza Abafilisiti bose, no gutsembera abacitse ku icumu i Tiri n’i Sidoni, abacitse ku icumu bose bashobora kubafasha. Ni koko, Uhoraho aje kuyogoza Abafilisiti, abacitse ku icumu bo mu kirwa cya Kafutori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Icyuma cyogosha kigiye kumyora ab’i Gaza, Ashikeloni iherukire aho kurevura. Bantu mwarokotse mutuye mu bibaya byabo, muzirasaga umubiri mugeze ryari?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Mbega ibyago! Mbese, nkota y’Uhoraho, hari ubwo uzigera uruhuka? Subira mu rwubati, urekere aho maze utuze!" 
Jeremiah47:7 Yaruhuka ite, kandi yoherejwe n’Uhoraho gutsemba Ashikeloni n’inkengero z’inyanja? Aho ni ho yayitumye." 
Jeremiah48:1 Dore ibyo Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, avuze kuri Mowabu: Nebo ibonye ishyano, irasenyutse! Kiriyatayimu yakozwe n’ikimwaro, irafashwe. Umurwa wakojejwe isoni, wasenyutse;" 
Jeremiah48:2 ubwamamare bwa Mowabu burarangiye! Heshiboni barayigambanira, bagira bati «Tugende dutsembe kiriya gihugu!» Nawe Madimeni, wacecekeshejwe, inkota iragukurikiranye." 
Jeremiah48:3 Induru z’impuruza ziturutse i Horonayimu, harimbutse kandi amakuba akomeye yahatashye!" 
Jeremiah48:4 Mowabu yasenyutse, abana bayo baraboroga." 
Jeremiah48:5 Abazamuka i Luhiti baragenda barira, abamanuka i Horonayimu barataka ko bari mu kaga." 
Jeremiah48:6 Nimuhunge biracitse! Mubaye aka Aroweri mu butayu! 
Jeremiah48:7 Barakwigabije kuko wiringiye imbaraga zawe n’ubukungu bwawe. Kemoshi ajyanywe bunyago, n’abaherezabitambo be n’abatware be bose." 
Jeremiah48:8 Umurimbuzi yinjiye mu migi yose, nta n’umwe muri yo uzarokoka. Ibibaya birayogozwa naho ibisiza babitsembe. Noneho rero Uhoraho avuze atya:" 
Jeremiah48:9 Nimwubake irimbi muri Mowabu kuko yabaye amatongo, imigi yayo igahinduka imbuga, abaturage bayo bakayicikamo." 
Jeremiah48:10 Arakaba ikivume, umuntu ukorana ingononwa umurimo w’Uhoraho, arakavumwa umuntu urinda inkota ye amaraso." 
Jeremiah48:11 Mowabu kuva mu buto bwayo yari ituje, imeze nka divayi nziza itigeze icuranurwa, mbese ntiyigeze ijyanwa bunyago. Ni yo mpamvu itigeze ita uburyohe bwayo, n’impumuro yayo ntiyagabanuka." 
Jeremiah48:12 None rero, igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze nzohereze abantu bayicuranure, bayivane mu bibindi byayo, maze babijanjagure." 
Jeremiah48:13 Mowabu izarakarira Kemoshi, nk’uko abantu ba Israheli barakariye Beteli bizeraga." 
Jeremiah48:14 Mutinyuka mute kuvuga ngo «Turi intwari, turi ingabo zavukiye urugamba»?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Umurimbuzi wa Mowabu arazamutse ateye imigi yayo; ab’intwari mu basore bayo ngabo baramanuka bajya mu ibagiro — uwo ni Umwami ubivuze, ari we Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo!" 
Jeremiah48:16 Mowabu iri hafi gutsiratsizwa, amakuba aje yihuta." 
Jeremiah48:17 Abaturanyi bayo, namwe mwese abayikunda, nimuyiririre, mugira muti «Bishoboka bite ko igihugu gikomeye kandi kitagira uko gisa cyaganzwa!»" 
Jeremiah48:18 Bantu b’i Diboni, nimuve ku ikuzo ryanyu, mwicare mu mukungugu, umurimbuzi wa Mowabu arabateye, azasenya ibigo bikomeye byanyu." 
Jeremiah48:19 Bantu b’i Aroweri, nimuhaguruke mube maso. Nimubaze abahunga n’abacitse ku icumu, muti «Habaye iki?»" 
Jeremiah48:20 Mowabu yasenyutse none yakozwe n’ikimwaro. Nimutere hejuru, mutabaze! Mubitangaze muri Arunoni muti «Mowabu yarimbutse!»" 
Jeremiah48:21 Ibihugu byo mu bisiza byaciriwe urubanza, rucirwa kandi na Holoni, Yahasi, Mefati," 
Jeremiah48:22 Diboni, Nebo, BetiDibilatayimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriyatayimu, Betigamuli, Betimewoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriyoti na Bosora, mbese ni imigi yose y’igihugu cya Mowabu, ari iya kure ari n’iya hafi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Mowabu yacitse intege, nta maboko igifite — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah48:26 Nimumusindishe kuko yihaye gusumba Uhoraho. Nguwo arigaragura mu birutsi bye, igihe cye cyo gusekwa cyageze!" 
Jeremiah48:27 Israheli se yo ntiwayihinduye urw’amenyo? Hari ubwo se wasanze ibarirwa mu bisambo ku buryo buri gihe uyivuga uzunguza umutwe? 
Jeremiah48:28 Baturage ba Mowabu, nimuhunge imigi, mwihishe mu masenga! Nimugenze nk’inuma zubaka ibyari byazo ahantu hatagerwa, mu mwinjiro w’ubuvumo!" 
Jeremiah48:29 Twumvise ubwirasi bwa Mowabu! Mbega ukuntu yikuzaga, mbega agasuzuguro n’umwirato! Mbega ubwibone n’ukwiyemera kudafashe!" 
Jeremiah48:30 Nzi neza ko yibeshya — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze‐namenye amagambo yayo adafashe, n’ibikorwa byayo bidafite ishingiro." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ni yo mpamvu ndirira Mowabu, ngatabariza Mowabu yose uko yakabaye, nkaririra abantu b’i Kiri‐Heresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Wowe, muzabibu w’i Sibima, unteye agahinda kurusha Yazeri. Amashami yawe yageraga hakurya y’inyanja, agafata kuri Yazeri. None umurimbuzi yageze ku mbuto zawe, no ku musaruro wawe." 
Jeremiah48:33 Hehe n’ibyishimo bisesuye mu mizabibu yo mu misozi ya Mowabu! Nzakamya divayi mu mivure; hehe n’ibyishimo byarangaga urwengero. 
Jeremiah48:34 Induru z’impuruza zivuye i Heshiboni zageze n’i Eleyale; urusaku rwazo rurumvikanira i Yahasi h’i Sowari, i Horonayimu, i Egalati‐Shelishiya, kuko n’amazi y’i Nimurimu yakamye." 
Jeremiah48:35 Muri Mowabu — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze— nzatsemba abajya ahantu hirengeye, gutura ibitambo bitwikwa, bagatwikira n’andi maturo ibigirwamana byabo." 
Jeremiah48:36 Ni yo mpamvu umutima wanjye uririra Mowabu, ukaririra n’abantu b’i Kiri‐Heresi, uboroga nk’imyirongi, kubera ko ubukungu bwabo bwabashizeho." 
Jeremiah48:37 Imitwe yose iramyoye, ubwanwa bwose burogoshe; ibiganza byose birarasaze, n’abantu bose bakenyeye ibigunira." 
Jeremiah48:38 Hejuru y’amazu y’i Mowabu no ku bibuga baraboroga. Mowabu ndayivunaguye, nk’igikoresho kitanshimishije — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah48:39 Bigenze bite! Ngiyo irarimbutse, nimuboroge! Mowabu yanteye umugongo kubera isoni! Mowabu yahindutse urw’amenyo, iba n’igiterashozi mu baturanyi bayo bose." 
Jeremiah48:40 Uhoraho avuze atya: Ni nka kagoma ije iguruka, ikaramburira amababa yayo kuri Mowabu." 
Jeremiah48:41 Imigi yafashwe n’ibigo bikomeye birarimburwa. Uwo munsi, umutima w’intwari za Mowabu uzaba nk’uw’umugore uramutswe." 
Jeremiah48:42 Mowabu yararimbutse ntikiri umuryango, kuko yashatse gusumba Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah48:43 Baturage ba Mowabu, muzazira iterabwoba, icyobo n’umutego — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah48:44 Uzahunga iterabwoba azagwa mu rwobo, uvuye mu cyobo, agwe mu mutego. Ni koko, igihe kizaza, maze Mowabu iryozwe ibyo yakoze, — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah48:45 Mu gacucu k’i Heshiboni hahagaze impunzi zananiwe, ariko umuriro uturutse mu ngoro ya Sihoni, utwitse imisaya ya Mowabu, ndetse n’agahanga k’iyo nyoko y’inyarusaku." 
Jeremiah48:46 Mowabu, mbega ngo uragira ibyago! Umuryango wa Kemoshi woretswe, abahungu bawe bajyanywe bunyago n’abakobwa bawe bajyanywe ari imbohe." 
Jeremiah48:47 Ariko mu bihe bizaza, nzasubiza Mowabu amahoro. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Urubanza rwa Mowabu ruhagarariye aha." 
Jeremiah49:1 Uhoraho abwiye atya Abahamoni: Ese Israheli nta bahungu ifite? Ese nta bagenerwamurage ifite? None se ni kuki Milikomu yegukanye igihugu cya Gadi, n’umuryango we ugatura mu migi yaho?" 
Jeremiah49:2 None rero, igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze i Raba y’Abahamoni hazumvikane induru y’intambara. Hazahinduka amatongo, n’imigi yaho itwikwe, maze Israheli izasubirane umugabane wayo, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah49:3 Heshiboni, boroga; Ayi irarimbutse! Imigi ya Raba nivuze induru! Nimwambare ibigunira murire, mubuyere imbere y’inkike z’umugi. Milikomu yahunze, ajyana n’abaherezabitambo, n’abatware be bose." 
Jeremiah49:4 Ni kuki wiratana ikibaya cyawe? Yego, mukobwa w’icyomanzi, ikibaya cyawe gitemba amazi, kandi wiringira ubukire bwawe, uvuga ngo «Ni nde uzampangara?»" 
Jeremiah49:5 None rero, ngiye kuguteza iterabwoba riturutse ku baturanyi bawe, uwo ni Uhoraho Imana Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze. Muzakwirwa imishwaro, buri muntu atomere imbere ye, impunzi zibure uzikoranyiriza hamwe!" 
Jeremiah49:6 Nyuma y’ibyo, igihugu cya Hamoni nzagisubiza amahoro, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah49:7 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo abwiye atya Edomu: Ese i Temani nta bahanga bakihaba? Indyarya ni zo zahawe ijambo, ubuhanga bwabo bwaramunzwe!" 
Jeremiah49:8 Bantu b’i Dedani, nimuhunge! Nimuhindukire muhungire mu myobo! Ezawu ndamworetse, igihe cye cyo kubazwa ibyo yakoze kirageze." 
Jeremiah49:9 Abasaruzi b’imizabibu nibaza iwawe, ntibazagusigira na duke two guhumba. Ibisambo nibiza mu ijoro, bizagutwara ibyo bishoboye byose." 
Jeremiah49:10 Ni jyewe ubwanjye ugiye gucuza Ezawu, nshyire ahagaragara ubukungu bwe buhishe; ntazashobora kwiyoberanya. Urubyaro rwe, abavandimwe be n’abaturanyi be bazarimbuka, hoye no kugira uvuga ati" 
Jeremiah49:11 «Ntubunze imitima y’uko imfubyi zawe zizamera, nzazirera; abapfakazi bawe na bo, nzabitaho.»" 
Jeremiah49:12 Ni koko Uhoraho avuze atya: Dore n’abatagombaga kunywa ku nkongoro, bahanishijwe kuyinywaho, none ngo ni wowe uzarokoka? Oya, ntuzarokoka, uzayinywaho nta shiti." 
Jeremiah49:13 Ni koko ndabirahiye jyewe ubwanjye — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — Bosora izahinduka itongo, ibe ruvumwa, bajye bahora bayituka. Imigi yose iyikikije izahinduka amatongo ubuziraherezo." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ndumva ubutumwa buturutse kuri Uhoraho, kandi integuza yoherejwe mu mahanga kuvuga iti «Nimukorane mutere icyo gihugu! Nimuhaguruke mujye ku rugamba!»" 
Jeremiah49:15 Ni koko, nzagutesha agaciro mu mahanga, ngusuzuguze mu bantu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Warishutse utera abandi ubwoba, wikuza mu mutima wawe, wowe utuye mu masenga yo mu rutare, ukisunga imisozi miremire. N’iyo wamanika icyari cyawe mu bushorishori nka kagoma, naguhananturayo. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah49:17 Edomu izahinduka itongo, abazayinyuraho bose bazumirwa, nibabona ayo marorerwa yose bakome akaruru." 
Jeremiah49:18 Nk’uko byagendekeye Sodoma na Gomora, n’imidugudu iyegereye, nta muntu n’umwe uzahatura, nta kiremwa muntu kizahaba, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah49:19 Nzayibirukanamo igitaraganya, bamere nk’intare iturumbutse mu rufunzo rwa Yorudani, igana ibiraro birimo amatungo. Nzayiteza ingabo z’insoresore. None se ni nde umeze nkanjye? Ni nde wansumba mu butabera? Ni nde mushumba wampangara?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Nimwongere mwumve imigambi Uhoraho yageneye Edomu, n’iyo yateganirije abaturage b’i Temani! Ni koko, bazabakurubana nk’amatungo ananutse! Uhoraho azatsemba inzuri zayo ku mpamvu yabo." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ukurimbuka kwabo kuzatuma isi ihinda umushyitsi, umuririmo wayo ugere ku Nyanja y’Urufunzo." 
Jeremiah49:22 Bizamera nka kagoma igurutse, ikorosa amababa yayo kuri Bosora, maze kuri uwo munsi, umutima w’intwari zo muri Edomu uzadihe nk’uw’umugore uramutswe." 
Jeremiah49:23 Dore ibyavuzwe kuri Damasi: Hamati na Arupadi bakozwe n’isoni kubera ko bumvise inkuru mbi. Bahungabanye nk’inyanja irimo umuyaga. Mbega ubwoba! Nta we ushobora kuguma hamwe ngo atuze! 
Jeremiah49:24 Damasi irasenyutse; ishatse guhindukira ngo ihunge, ariko ifatwa n’umushyitsi. Itashywe n’ubwoba n’ububabare nk’umugore uramutswe." 
Jeremiah49:25 Bigenze bite! Umurwa w’ikirangirire uratereranywe kandi ari wo wanteraga kwishima. 
Jeremiah49:26 Uwo munsi nyine ingabo zawo z’insoresore zizawugwamo, maze abawurwaniriraga bose baceceke, — uwo ni Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze." 
Jeremiah49:27 Inkike za Damasi nzazikongeza n’umuriro, ntwike n’ingoro za Beni Hadadi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Uhoraho avuze atya kuri Kedari n’ingoma za Hasoni ari zo Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, yatsinze: Nimuhaguruke mutere Kedari, mutsembe abantu b’i Kedemu!" 
Jeremiah49:29 Bazigabiza amahema yabo, n’amashyo yabo, imyenda yabo n’ibyabo byose. Bazatwara ingamiya zabo, maze babakomere, bagira bati «Mwatanzwe impande zose.»" 
Jeremiah49:30 Bantu b’i Hasori, nimuhunge, mukizwe n’amaguru! Nimuhungire mu myobo — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kuko Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni yabahagurukiye, agambiriye kubagirira nabi." 
Jeremiah49:31 Nimuhaguruke, mutere igihugu kitagira icyo kikanga, kisanganiwe umutekano — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ntibagira inzugi cyangwa ingufuri, batuye ukwabo kwa bonyine." 
Jeremiah49:32 Ingamiya zabo bazazamburwa, naho amashyo yabo anyagwe. Bamwe bogoshe imisaya nzabatatanyiriza impande zose kandi mbahuremo icyorezo aho bari hose, — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hasori izahinduka isenga y’imbwebwe n’ahantu hazahora itongo; nta we uzahatura ukundi, icyitwa ikiremwamuntu ntikizahaba." 
Jeremiah49:34 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryerekeye Elamu ribwirwa umuhanuzi Yeremiya; ubwo hari mu ntangiriro y’ingoma ya Sedekiya, umwami wa Yuda." 
Jeremiah49:35 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Jyewe ngiye kuvunagura umuheto wa Elamu, wo shingiro ry’ubutwari bwayo." 
Jeremiah49:36 Nzabateza umuyaga uturutse mu byerekezo bine by’isi, nzabatatanyirize hose, ku buryo nta gihugu kizasigara kitarimo impunzi za Elamu." 
Jeremiah49:37 Abelamu nzabakangaranya imbere y’abanzi babo, n’imbere y’abashaka kubacuza ubuzima. Nzabateza ibyago: mbagabize uburakari bwanjye bugurumana uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Nzabakurikiza inkota kugeza ubwo nzabatsemba." 
Jeremiah49:38 Nzashyira intebe yanjye muri Elamu, nirukane umwami n’abatware be," 
Jeremiah49:39 ariko mu bihe bizaza, Elamu nkayisubiza amahoro, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah50:1 Ijambo Uhoraho yavuze kuri Babiloni n’igihugu cy’Abakalideya, arinyujije ku muhanuzi Yeremiya: (Babiloni)" 
Jeremiah50:2 Nimubimenyekanishe mu mahanga yose, mubitangaze kandi mubivuge; nimubikwize mutabihisha; mugira muti «Babiloni yafashwe, Beli yakozwe n’isoni, na Mariduki yasandaye. Impigi zayo zizashyirwa ahagaragara, ibigirwamana byayo birimburwe.»" 
Jeremiah50:3 Ni koko, igihugu cyo mu majyaruguru kirayiteye, kiyihindure itongo ridashobora guturwa. Ari abantu, ari amatungo, byose byarahunze nta gisigaye. (Israheli)" 
Jeremiah50:4 Icyo gihe nyine — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — Abayisraheli n’Abayuda bazazana barira, bashakisha Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Bazabaririza inzira igana i Siyoni, amaso yabo abe ari ho arangamira. Bazaza biyunge n’Uhoraho, bagirane isezerano ridakuka kandi ritazibagirana." 
Jeremiah50:6 Umuryango wanjye wari warabaye nk’intama zazimiye; abashumba bazo bari baraziyobeje, bazizerereza mu misozi miremire. Zavaga mu misozi zijya mu yindi, zaribagiwe ibiraro byazo." 
Jeremiah50:7 Abazibonaga bose baraziryaga, abanzi bazo bakavuga ngo «Nta cyo ducumuyeho, kuko na zo zacumuye kuri Uhoraho, kandi ari we rwuri rw’ubutungane, n’amizero y’abasekuruza babo.» (Babiloni)" 
Jeremiah50:8 Nimuhunge Babiloni n’igihugu cy’Abakalideya! Nimusohoke, mumere nka za ruhaya zirangaje imbere y’umukumbi w’ihene." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ni koko, nzakoranya amahanga akomeye yo mu gihugu cy’amajyaruguru, maze atere Babiloni. Baziremamo urugamba maze bayirwanye, ibyayo bibe biyirangiriyeho! Imyambi yabo ni nk’intwari itava ku rugamba amara masa." 
Jeremiah50:10 Kalideya izanyagwa, abasahuzi bayo bose bihaze iminyago, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah50:11 Mwebwe abigabije umugabane wanjye nimwishime, munezerwe! Nimwikinangure nk’inyana ziri mu rwuri, kandi mwivuge nk’amafarasi!" 
Jeremiah50:12 Dore nyoko yakozwe n’isoni, uwababyaye yashobewe. Yabaye uwa nyuma mu mahanga yose, ahinduka ubutayu, agasi n’amayaga." 
Jeremiah50:13 Uburakari bw’Uhoraho bwamuhinduye itongo ritagishobora guturwa; abanyuze hafi ya Babiloni bose barumirwa, babona ayo marorerwa yose bagakoma akaruru." 
Jeremiah50:14 Mwebwe mwese, abahanga b’umuheto, nimureme urugamba mugote Babiloni. Nimuyirase, mwoye kuzigama imyambi, kuko yacumuye kuri Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah50:15 Nimuyivugirize induru muyiturutse impande zose. Dore irihebye iteze amaboko, inkingi zayo ziraguye n’inkike zayo zirasenyutse. Ni Uhoraho wihorera! Nimuyihimureho, muyigenzereze nk’uko na yo yabagenjeje!" 
Jeremiah50:16 Nimuvane muri Babiloni umubibyi n’umusaruzi wese. Buri wese nahunge inkota kirimbuzi, asange umuryango we, ahungire mu gihugu cye. (Israheli)" 
Jeremiah50:17 Israheli yari intama iri ukwayo, intare ziyihiga. Umwami w’Ashuru ni we wayanjamye ubwa mbere; hakurikiraho Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni arayihenebereza." 
Jeremiah50:18 None rero, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli avuze atya: Ngiye guhagurukira umwami w’i Babiloni n’igihugu cye, mugenzereze uko nagize umwami wa Ashuru." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ngiye kugarura Israheli mu rwuri rwayo, irishe i Karumeli n’i Bashani, nigera ku misozi ya Efurayimu n’iya Gilihadi, ipfa ryayo rizaba rishize." 
Jeremiah50:20 Muri icyo gihe nyine, — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — bazashakashaka ubugome bwa Israheli, babubure, ndetse n’ibyaha bya Yuda ntibazongera kubibona ukundi. Ni koko, nzababarira abo nzaba naretse bakarokoka. (Babiloni)" 
Jeremiah50:21 Gaba igitero mu gihugu cya Meratayimu, ugitere cyo n’abaturage b’i Pekodi! Uzabice, abasigaye ubatsembe — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze ugenze nk’uko ngutegetse." 
Jeremiah50:22 Urwamo rw’intambara n’induru nyinshi biravuga mu gihugu cyose! 
Jeremiah50:23 Bishoboka bite! Inyundo ikomeye ku isi yose irajanjaguritse, ibaye ubushingwe! Byashoboka bite se ko, mu mahanga yose, Babiloni yaba ari yo ihinduka itongo!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Mbe ko naguteze umutego, Babiloni, none ukaba uwuguyemo! Waratahuwe, none urafashwe, kuko wihaye kurwanya Uhoraho!" 
Jeremiah50:25 Uhoraho yapfunduye ububiko bwe, maze akuramo intwaro z’uburakari bwe. Ni koko, icyo ni igikorwa cy’Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, mu gihugu cy’Abakalideya." 
Jeremiah50:26 Nimuyitere mwese muturutse mu mpera z’isi, mupfundure ibigega byayo; muyikorakoranye nk’urunda imiganda y’ibyatsi, muyitsembe ntihagire igisigara!" 
Jeremiah50:27 Muzice impfizi zose bazijyane mu ibagiro! Mbega ibyago bibagwiririye! Umunsi wabo wo kuryozwa ibyo bakoze wageze. (Israheli) 
Jeremiah50:28 Ngurwo urusaku rw’impunzi zacitse ku icumu, zivuye mu gihugu cya Babiloni, zije gutangaza muri Siyoni ko Uhoraho Imana yacu yihoreye, ko Nyir’ijuru yihimuye. (Babiloni)" 
Jeremiah50:29 Nimukoranye abarashi, abahanga b’umuheto bose batere Babiloni. Nimuce ingando impande zayo, hoye kugira n’umwe urokoka! Nimuyiryoze imyifatire yayo, muyigenzereze na yo uko yagenjeje, dore ko yihaye kwishongora kuri Uhoraho, isuzugura Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ni koko, kuri uwo munsi nyine ingabo zayo z’insoresore zizayigwamo, maze abayirwaniraga bose baceceke, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah50:31 Wowe w’umunyagasuzuguro, tuzabonana, uwo ni Uhoraho Imana Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze! Umunsi wawe wageze, ari cyo gihe ugomba kuryozwa ibyo wakoze." 
Jeremiah50:32 Umunyagasuzuguro aratsikiye aragwa, kandi nta muntu wo kumubyutsa. Imigi ye nzayiha inkongi, akongoke impande zose." 
Jeremiah50:33 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Abayisraheli n’Abayuda barashikamiwe, nta we ubababarira. Ababajyanye bunyago barabakomeje, ntibashaka kubarekura." 
Jeremiah50:34 Ariko kandi n’ubarwanirira arakomeye, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo ni ryo zina rye. Arabarwanaho akomeje, kugira ngo agarure ihumure mu gihugu, kandi akangaranye abaturage b’i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah50:35 Inkota nitere mu Bakalideya — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — no mu baturage b’i Babiloni, mu batware bayo no mu bahanga bayo!" 
Jeremiah50:36 Inkota nitere mu bapfumu, kuko ari ibicucu! Inkota nitere mu ntwari zayo, zishye ubwoba!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Inkota nitere mu mafarasi n’amagare y’intambara, itere no mu moko y’abantu b’ibivange bayituye: bahinduke nk’abagore b’inyanda! Inkota nitere mu kigega cyayo cy’intwaro, gisahurwe;" 
Jeremiah50:38 itere no mu mazi yayo, iyakamye! Ni igihugu cy’ibigirwamana, bya bikangisho bibatesha umutwe." 
Jeremiah50:39 Dore inturo zihabana n’imbwebwe, ndetse n’ibyaruzi birahatuye. None kuva ubu ntizongera guturwa ukundi, izahinduka itongo ubuziraherezo." 
Jeremiah50:40 Nk’uko byagenze igihe Uhoraho ateza amakuba i Sodoma n’i Gomora no mu migi ihakikije — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nta we uzongera kuhatura, mwene muntu ntazahaba ukundi." 
Jeremiah50:41 Igihugu kiraje giturutse mu majyaruguru, ihanga rikomeye n’abami baryo benshi barahagurutse, bavuye mu mpera z’isi." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bitwaje imiheto n’amacumu, ni abagome kandi ntibagira impuhwe. Urusaku rwabo ni nk’isumo y’inyanja; bari ku mafarasi, kandi bahagaze nk’ingabo ziteguye urugamba, bashaka kugutera, wowe Babiloni." 
Jeremiah50:43 Umwami w’i Babiloni yumvise iyo nkuru, ata umutwe, ubwoba buramutaha, ashengurwa n’umubabaro nk’uw’umugore uramutswe." 
Jeremiah50:44 Nk’uko intare iturumbuka mu rufunzo rwa Yorudani, igana ibiraro birimo amatungo, ni ko nanjye mu mwanya muto nzirukana abaturage ba Yeruzalemu, nyiteze ingabo z’insoresore. None se ni nde umeze nkanjye? Ni nde wansumba mu butabera? Ni nde mushumba wampangara?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Nimwongere mwumve uko Uhoraho azagenzereza Babiloni, mutege amatwi imigambi yagiriye igihugu cy’Abakalideya. Ni koko bazabakurubana nk’amatungo ananutse! Uhoraho azatsemba inzuri zayo ku mpamvu yabo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Irimbuka rya Babiloni rizatuma isi ihinda umushyitsi, induru ibe yose mu mahanga." 
Jeremiah51:1 Uhoraho avuze atya: Babiloni n’abaturage ba Kalideya, nzabaterereza inkubi y’umuyaga ubarimbure." 
Jeremiah51:2 Nzayiterereza abayitera hejuru nk’umurama banayisahure. Bazayituruke impande zose ku munsi w’amakuba. 
Jeremiah51:3 Ntimuzagire uwo musiga, yaba umurashi utwaye umuheto we, cyangwa uwambaye umwambaro w’icyuma, habe n’ingabo ze z’insoresore. Abarwanyi bayo bose muzabatsembe!" 
Jeremiah51:4 Inkomere ziragwirirana mu gihugu cya Kalideya, naho abahinguranyijwe n’amacumu bandagaye mu mayira," 
Jeremiah51:5 kuko igihugu cyabo cyasagutswe n’ibicumuro bagiriye Nyir’ubutagatifu wa Israheli. Nyamara ariko, ari Israheli, ari na Yuda, ntibaciwe ku Mana yabo, Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Jeremiah51:6 Nimuhunge Babiloni, buri wese akize amagara ye, naho ubundi muzarimbuka igihe izaryozwa ubugome bwayo. Ni igihe cy’Uhoraho cyo kwihorera akayigenera icyo ikwiye." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloni yahoze ari nk’inkongoro ya zahabu mu biganza by’Uhoraho, ikanezeza isi yose. Amahanga yanyoye kuri divayi yayo, ata umutwe." 
Jeremiah51:8 Dore mu kanya gato Babiloni iraguye, irasenyutse. Nimuyiririre, mwomore ibikomere byayo, ahari wenda izakira!" 
Jeremiah51:9 Twagerageje gukiza Yeruzalemu, ariko ntishobora gukizwa. Nimuyivemo, buri wese atahe mu gihugu cye, kuko ibyago byayo byasumbye ijuru, bikaba byakoze ku bicu." 
Jeremiah51:10 Uhoraho yatugaragarije umukiro, nimuze turate muri Siyoni, ibikorwa by’Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah51:11 Nimutyaze imyambi, mufate ingabo; Uhoraho akanguye abami b’Abamedi. Ni koko, Uhoraho yagiriye Babiloni umugambi wo kuyisenya. Uhoraho arihoreye, ni ko Nyir’ijuru yihimura." 
Jeremiah51:12 Nimushinge ibendera ku nkike za Babiloni, mwongere abarara irondo, mushyireho abararirizi, muteganye n’abantu mu bico. Ni byo, Uhoraho agiye kuzuza umugambi afitiye abaturage ba Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:13 Wowe uhora hafi y’amazi magari, ukagira umutungo utubutse, umunsi wawe urageze, ibyawe byakurangiriyeho." 
Jeremiah51:14 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, ubwe yarahiye agira ati «Nzakuzuzamo abantu banganya ubwinshi n’inzige, bakuvugirize induru y’intambara.»" 
Jeremiah51:15 Uhoraho ni we waremesheje isi ububasha bwe, ibiyituye abihangana ubuhanga, ubwenge bwe aburamburisha ijuru." 
Jeremiah51:16 Iyo avuze wagira ngo ni amasumo y’amazi mu ijuru, ni we ukoranya ibicu nyamunini mu mpera z’isi, akarekura imirabyo imvura ikagwa, kandi agakura imiyaga mu ndiri zayo." 
Jeremiah51:17 Umuntu wese arumirwa, bikamubera urujijo, umucuzi wese agaterwa isoni n’ikigirwamana cye: rwose amashusho ye ni ibinyoma, nta mwuka uyarimo!" 
Jeremiah51:18 Byose ni ubucucu n’amanjwe baseka, igihe cyo guhanwa nikigera, bizarimburwa." 
Jeremiah51:19 Naho Imana, yo mugabane wa Yakobo si uko iteye! Yo, ni umuremyi wa byose; Israheli ikaba ari umuryango yeguriweho umugabane; Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo, ni ryo zina rye." 
Jeremiah51:20 Wahoze uri inyundo yanjye, ukambera intwaro y’intambara. Ni wowe najanjagurishije amahanga, ndimbura ibihugu." 
Jeremiah51:21 Ni wowe najanjagurishije amafarasi n’abayagenderaho, njanjagura amagare y’intambara n’abayagenderaho." 
Jeremiah51:22 Ni wowe najanjagurishije abagabo n’abagore, njanjagura abasaza n’abasore, abahungu n’abakobwa." 
Jeremiah51:23 Ni wowe najanjagurishije abashumba n’amashyo yabo, njanjagura abahinzi n’ibimasa byabo, abatware n’abategetsi." 
Jeremiah51:24 Mu maso yanyu, nzaryoza Babiloni n’abaturage ba Kalideya ubugome bwose bagiriye Siyoni, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah51:25 Tuzabonana nawe, Musozi w’icyorezo, wowe urimbura isi yose, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Nzaguhagurukira, nguhananture hejuru y’urutare, maze nguhindure umuyonga." 
Jeremiah51:26 Ntuzongera gucukurwamo ukundi ibuye ry’insanganyarukuta cyangwa iry’imfatizo, uzahinduka itongo ubuziraherezo — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah51:27 Nimuzamure ibendera ku isi, muvuze ihembe mu mahanga! Nimukoranye amahanga ayirwanye, muyiteze ibihugu bya Ararati, Mini n’Ashikenazi. Mushyireho n’abatware b’ingabo, muzane amafarasi menshi acukiranye nk’inzige." 
Jeremiah51:28 Nimukoranye amahanga ayirwanye; ari abami b’Abamedi, abatware babo n’abategetsi babo, mbese igihugu cyabo cyose." 
Jeremiah51:29 Isi yose iratengurwa n’ubwoba, kuko imigambi Uhoraho yagiriye Babiloni igiye kuzuzwa: igihugu cya Babiloni kigiye guhinduka amatongo, abaturage bayo bayicikemo." 
Jeremiah51:30 Intwari z’i Babiloni zatinye kurwana, zigungiye mu bwihisho, zacitse intege; zahindutse nk’abagore b’inyanda! Amazu yayo bayatwitse, inzugi zayo barazisandaza." 
Jeremiah51:31 Ujyanye inkuru arahura n’undi uyijyanye, intumwa igahura n’indi, bajya gutangariza umwami w’i Babiloni ko umugi wafashwe impande zose," 
Jeremiah51:32 amayira akaba yafunzwe, ibigo bikomeye bigatwikwa, naho ingabo ze zigakwirwa imishwaro." 
Jeremiah51:33 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Babiloni imeze nk’imbuga bariho batunganya, ni akanya gato bagahura umusaruro." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni yarandiye, aranyunyuza, ansiga ndi igikanka. Yaranconshomeye nk’igisimba, amaze guhaga umusokoro wanjye, aranjugunya." 
Jeremiah51:35 Abatuye Siyoni baravuga bati «Ibyago n’amakuba twagiriwe nibiryozwe Babiloni!» n’ab’i Yeruzalemu bati «Amaraso yacu naryozwe Abakalideya!» 
Jeremiah51:36 None rero, Uhoraho avuze atya: Ngiye kukurwanirira, maze nguhorere. Nzakamya inyanja yayo n’amasoko yayo;" 
Jeremiah51:37 Babiloni izahinduka ikirundo cy’amabuye, n’isenga y’imbwebwe, mbese bahinduke itongo riteye ubwoba; nta we uzahatura ukundi." 
Jeremiah51:38 Igihe bo bazaba bakoranye, batontoma nk’intare z’ibisore, bagahuma nk’ibyana by’intare z’ingore," 
Jeremiah51:39 ibyishimo byabo nibimara kuba byose nzabategurira ibirori: mbasindishe bamere nk’abapfuye, basinzire ubuticura, boye kuzakanguka ukundi, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah51:40 Nzabayobora mu ibagiro nk’amasekurume y’intama, cyangwa intama z’inyagazi n’amasekurume y’ihene." 
Jeremiah51:41 Bishoboka bite! Sheshaki yafashwe, iranyazwe ari yo yari ububengerane bw’isi yose! Byashoboka bite ko mu mahanga yose Babiloni yaba ari yo ihinduka itongo!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Inyanja yuzuriye kuri Babiloni imivumba yayo isuma iyirengaho. 
Jeremiah51:43 Imigi yayo yabaye amatongo, ihindutse igihugu cy’amapfa n’amayaga, igihugu kitagira ugituye, ntikigire ukigenda." 
Jeremiah51:44 Nzahagurukira Beli y’i Babiloni, nyikure mu kanwa ibyo iriho iconshomera. Amahanga ntazongera kubyigana ayisanga, inkike ya Babiloni na yo izasenyuka." 
Jeremiah51:45 Mwebwe abo mu muryango wanjye, nimuyivemo, buri wese arwane ku magara ye, muhunge umuriro w’uburakari bw’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah51:46 Nzabarinda gucika intege no guterwa ubwoba n’impuha zizakwira mu gihugu; mu mwaka umwe bavuga ibi, mu wundi bakavuga biriya, ubwo kandi ariko urugomo ruca ibintu mu gihugu, umunyamaboko akirukana undi nka we." 
Jeremiah51:47 None rero, mubimenye, igihe kiregereje, maze mpagurukire ibigirwamana by’i Babiloni. Igihugu cyose kizakozwa isoni, n’intumbi zacyo zicyararikwemo." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ubwo rero, ijuru n’isi n’ibiyiriho byose, bizayikine ku mubyimba. Koko rero, ngabo abarimbuzi bayiteye baturutse mu majyaruguru, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah51:49 Ku isi yose hapfuye abantu batabarika, bazize Babiloni; ubu na yo ubwayo izarimbuka, izize abo yishe muri Israheli." 
Jeremiah51:50 Mwebwe abarokotse inkota nimufate inzira, ntimuhagarare. Nimutakambire Uhoraho mukiri kure, kandi mujye mwibuka Yeruzalemu!" 
Jeremiah51:51 Nta bwo twishimiye gutukwa, isoni zaradukoze, kuko abanyamahanga bacengeye ahantu hatagatifu mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah51:52 None rero, igihe kiregereje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nzahagurukire ibyo bigirwamana byayo, maze mu gihugu cye cyose inkomere zenda gupfa ziboroge." 
Jeremiah51:53 N’iyo Babiloni yakwiyubakira inkike zikomeye, zigera hejuru mu birere, ndamutse mbitegetse abarimbuzi bayishyikira, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Jeremiah51:54 I Babiloni haturutse induru y’impuruza, mu gihugu cya Kalideya ibintu byadogereye!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Ni Uhoraho urimbura Babiloni, agacubya urwo rusaku rukabije. N’iyo induru yabo yaba isumbye kure amasumo y’amazi magari, ntiyabura kuyicecekesha." 
Jeremiah51:56 Ni koko, umurimbuzi ateye Babiloni: intwari zayo yazifashe mpiri, imiheto yazo yavunaguritse, kuko Uhoraho ari Imana yihorera, ikamenya no kwihimura." 
Jeremiah51:57 Nzasindisha ibikomangoma byayo, abahanga bayo, abategetsi bayo, abatware bayo n’intwari zayo. Bazasinzira nk’abapfuye, boye kuzakanguka ukundi. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, izina rye rikaba Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Jeremiah51:58 Uhoraho Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Inkike ngari ya Babiloni yarimbutse burundu, amarembo yayo maremare asenyurwa n’umuriro. Ibihugu biravunwa n’ubusa, amahanga aragokera umuriro!" 
Jeremiah51:59 Dore amabwiriza umuhanuzi Yeremiya yahaye Seraya, mwene Neriya wa Mahiseya, igihe ajyanye n’umwami Sedekiya i Babiloni, mu mwaka wa kane w’ingoma ye. Seraya ni we wari umufasha w’umwami mu ngando." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremiya akaba yari yarakomatanyirije mu gitabo kimwe amakuba yose yari kuzagwirira Babiloni; mbese harimo amagambo yose yavuzwe haruguru yerekeye Babiloni. 
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremiya ni ko kubwira Seraya, ati «Nugera i Babiloni uzihutire gusoma aya magambo yose mu ijwi riranguruye," 
Jeremiah51:62 maze uzavuge uti ’Uhoraho, ni wowe wemeje ko aha hantu uzahatsemba ntihazagire ikinyabuzima kihasigara, ari abantu, ari amatungo; hakazahinduka itongo ubuziraherezo.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Nurangiza gusoma iki gitabo, uzagihambireho ibuye, maze ukijugunye rwagati muri Efurati," 
Jeremiah51:64 ugira uti ’Nguko uko Babiloni izarohama, ntizongere kubyutsa umutwe ukundi, kubera amakuba yose nyiterereje.’» Amagambo ya Yeremiya ni hano arangiriye." 
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekiya yagiye ku ngoma afite imyaka makumyabiri n’umwe, maze ategeka Yeruzalemu igihe cy’imyaka cumi n’umwe; nyina yitwaga Hamutali, umukobwa wa Irimeyahu w’i Libuna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Yakoze ibidatunganiye Uhoraho, mbese nk’uko Yoyakimu yabigenjeje." 
Jeremiah52:3 Ibyabereye i Yeruzalemu no muri Yuda byasembuye uburakari bw’Uhoraho, kugeza ubwo abatereranye arabazinukwa. Sedekiya na we yaje kwigomeka ku mwami w’i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:4 Ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa cumi, mu mwaka wa cyenda w’ingoma ya Sedekiya, Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni yazanye n’ingabo ze zose, baca ingando imbere ya Yeruzalemu barayigota impande zose." 
Jeremiah52:5 Uwo mugi wakomeje kugotwa kugeza mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe w’ingoma y’umwami Sedekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ku munsi wa cyenda w’ukwezi kwa kane, inzara yari imaze guca ibintu mu mugi, n’abantu babuze ibibatunga," 
Jeremiah52:7 nuko urukuta rw’umugi barucamo icyuho. Ingabo zose zahise ziva mu mugi nijoro zirahunga, zinyura mu irembo ryari hagati y’inkike zombi hafi y’umurima w’umwami, maze bakomeza inzira igana Araba. Ubwo ariko ibyo byabaye Abakalideya bakigose umugi." 
Jeremiah52:8 Nyamara ingabo z’Abakalideya zikurikirana umwami, maze zifatira Sedekiya mu kibaya cy’i Yeriko, ubwo ingabo ze ziratatana, ziramutererana." 
Jeremiah52:9 Abakalideya bamaze gufata umwami, bamujyana i Ribula mu gihugu cya Hamati, bamushyikiriza umwami w’i Babiloni kugira ngo amucire urubanza." 
Jeremiah52:10 Umwami w’i Babiloni yica abahungu ba Sedekiya, abyirebera; abatware bose ba Yuda na bo yabagenjereje atyo, abatsinda i Ribula." 
Jeremiah52:11 Nyuma, anogoramo amaso ya Sedekiya, amubohesha umunyururu w’inyabubiri w’umuringa. Umwami w’i Babiloni amujyana i Babiloni, amushyira mu buroko kugeza ubwo abuguyemo." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa gatanu mu mwaka wa cumi n’icyenda w’ingoma ya Nebukadinetsari, umwami w’i Babiloni, niho Nebuzaradani umutware w’abarinda umwami akaba n’umwe mu byegera by’umwami w’i Babiloni, yageze i Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Nuko atwika Ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro y’umwami, ndetse n’amazu yose y’i Yeruzalemu." 
Jeremiah52:14 Naho inkike za Yeruzalemu zari ziyikikije impande zose, zisenywa n’ingabo z’Abakalideya, ziyobowe n’umutware w’abarinda umwami." 
Jeremiah52:15 Abantu bari basigaye mu mugi, ingabo zaganjwe zikiyegurira umwami w’i Babiloni na bamwe mu banyabukorikori, Nebuzaradani umutware w’abarinda umwami abajyana bunyago bose;" 
Jeremiah52:16 ariko yasize mu gihugu bamwe bo muri rubanda rugufi kugira ngo babe abanyamizabibu n’abahinzi b’imirima. 
Jeremiah52:17 Naho inkingi z’umuringa zo mu Ngoro, ibitereko hamwe n’ikizenga cy’amazi kibumbye mu muringa byari mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, Abakalideya barabimenaguye, bajyana icyitwa umuringa cyose i Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Batwaye kandi ibyungo, ibitiyo, imikasi, inzuho zigenewe gutera icyuhagiro, inkongoro, hamwe n’ibindi bikoresho bya ngombwa mu mirimo ikorerwa mu Ngoro." 
Jeremiah52:19 Umutware w’abarinda umwami w’i Babiloni afata kandi amabesani, amasafuriya, inzuho zigenewe gutera icyuhagiro, ibyungo, ibinyarumuri, inkongoro n’indobo, byose bikozwe muri zahabu, no muri feza." 
Jeremiah52:20 Izo nkingi ebyiri, hamwe n’icyo kizenga cy’amazi n’ibimasa cumi na bibiri cyari giteretseho, byose bikozwe mu muringa, ni Umwami Salomoni wabikoreshereje Ingoro y’Uhoraho, kandi nta washoboye gupima uburemere bw’umuringa wabigiyeho." 
Jeremiah52:21 Inkingi ya mbere yari nk’igitembo, ifite uburebure bw’imikono cumi n’umunani, umuzenguruko w’imikono cumi n’ibiri, n’umubyimba w’intoki enye." 
Jeremiah52:22 Yari ifite umutwe w’umuringa, ufite uburebure bw’imikono itanu, kandi yari isesuyeho incundura zitatseho imbuto zitukura, byose bikozwe mu muringa. Inkingi ya kabiri na yo yanganaga ityo, kandi ifite imitako nk’iyo." 
Jeremiah52:23 Hariho imitako y’imbuto zitukura mirongo cyenda n’itandatu ku mpande, yose hamwe ikaba imitako y’imbuto ijana, zikikije incundura." 
Jeremiah52:24 Umutware w’abarinzi b’umwami w’i Babiloni afata Seraya umuherezabitambo mukuru, na Sefaniya umuherezabitambo umwungirije, hamwe n’abarinzi batatu b’irembo." 
Jeremiah52:25 Yagiye no mu mugi afata umunyacyubahiro wari umutware w’ingabo, ahafata n’abagabo barindwi b’ibyegera by’umwami, hamwe n’umunyamabanga w’umutware w’ingabo wari ushinzwe kwandika abinjiye mu ngabo z’igihugu; byongeye, afata n’abagabo mirongo itandatu bari mu mugi rwagati." 
Jeremiah52:26 Abo bose Nebuzaradani umutware w’abarinda umwami arabafunga, hanyuma abashyira umwami w’i Babiloni, i Ribula." 
Jeremiah52:27 Umwami w’i Babiloni abicishiriza aho i Ribula mu gihugu cya Hamati. Nguko uko Yuda yajyanywe bunyago kure y’igihugu cye. 
Jeremiah52:28 Dore umubare w’abantu Nebukadinetsari yajyanye bunyago. Mu mwaka wa karindwi hagiye Abayuda 3023. 
Jeremiah52:29 Naho mu mwaka wa cumi n’umunani w’ingoma ye, umwami Nebukadinetsari yavanye i Yeruzalemu abantu 823." 
Jeremiah52:30 Hanyuma mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n’itatu w’ingoma ya Nebukadinetsari, Nebuzaradani umutware w’abarinda umwami ajyana bunyago Abayuda 745. Bose hamwe ni abantu 4,600." 
Jeremiah52:31 Ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’itanu w’ukwezi kwa cumi n’abiri, mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu n’irindwi w’ubunyagwe bwa Yoyakini, umwami wa Yuda, Evili‐Merodaki, umwami w’i Babiloni, wari ukijya ku ngoma, ababarira Yoyakini, umwami wa Yuda, aramufungura." 
Jeremiah52:32 Nuko amuganiriza gicuti kandi amuha intebe y’icyubahiro isumba iz’abandi bami bari hamwe i Babiloni. 
Jeremiah52:33 Yoyakini yiyambura imyambaro ye ya kinyururu, maze agasangira n’umwami ku meza ye, mu gihe cyose yari akiriho;" 
Jeremiah52:34 ibimutunga bya buri munsi, akabihabwa n’umwami w’i Babiloni kugeza ubwo apfuye." 
Lamentations1:1 Mbega ngo umugi wari utuwe n’imbaga nyamwinshi urasigaramo ubusa! Uwahoze ari igikomerezwa mu mahanga n’umwamikazi w’ibihugu, ameze nk’umupfakazi, arakoreshwa imirimo y’uburetwa!" 
Lamentations1:2 Arara arira ijoro ryose, amarira akamutemba ku matama; mu bamukundaga bose nta n’umwe umuhoza, incuti ze zose zaramutereranye, zihinduka abanzi be." 
Lamentations1:3 Yuda yajyanywe bunyago, irasuzugurwa kandi ishikamirwa n’ubucakara; ituye mu mahanga ntihagira uburuhukiro, abari bayikurikiranye bayifatiye mu mfutanwa." 
Lamentations1:4 Amayira y’i Siyoni ari mu cyunamo, nta muntu n’umwe ukiza mu minsi mikuru; amarembo yayo yose yabaye amatongo, abaherezabitambo bayo baraganya, n’abari bayo baguye mu kantu: mbega agahinda gakomeye ka Siyoni!" 
Lamentations1:5 Abayirwanyaga barayinesheje, abanzi bayo baranezerewe, kuko ari Uhoraho wayibabaje, ayiryoza ibicumuro byayo bitagira ingano. Ibitambambuga byayo byajyanywe bunyago, umwanzi abijya inyuma." 
Lamentations1:6 Ikuzo ry’umwari wa Siyoni ryarayoyotse, abatware bayo bamera nk’impara zitagira urwuri; bagendaga nta kabaraga, imbere y’ababashoreye." 
Lamentations1:7 Yeruzalemu iribuka ya minsi y’umubabaro n’agahinda, ubwo abantu bayo bagwaga mu biganza by’umwanzi kandi itagira kirengera; abanzi bayo babibonaga, bishimira irimbuka ryayo." 
Lamentations1:8 Yeruzalemu yaracumuye bikomeye, none yahindutse nk’ikintu cyahumanye, abahoze bayirata basigaye bayinnyega, kuko babona ubwandure bwayo; na yo ubwayo iraganya, ikabahisha amaso." 
Lamentations1:9 Ingutiya yayo yahomyeho umwanda, ibyayibayeho, nta na rimwe yigeze ibitekereza mbere; yacishijwe bugufi bitangaje, ibura n’uyihumuriza, none iravuga iti «Uhoraho, itegereze umubabaro wanjye, urebe ukuntu umwanzi wanjye anyishimaho!»" 
Lamentations1:10 Umwanzi yaramburiye ikiganza ku byiza byayo byose, maze abanyamahanga binjira mu rusengero rwayo, ibyirebera, kandi warategetse ngo «Ntibazinjire mu ikoraniro ryawe!»" 
Lamentations1:11 Imbaga yayo yose uko yakabaye iraganya, bariho barashakashaka umugati; baragurana ibyiza byabo ibyo kurya ngo bagarure ubuyanja. Yeruzalemu iratakamba igira iti «Uhoraho, itegereze, urebe ukuntu nasuzuguritse!" 
Lamentations1:12 «Yemwe, bahisi n’abagenzi mwese, nimurebe, mwitegereze, niba hari akababaro kamera nk’aka kanjye, ari na ko natejwe n’Uhoraho, ku munsi w’uburakari bwe bukaze." 
Lamentations1:13 Yankongejemo umuriro uturutse hejuru, utwika amagufa yanjye; yanteze umutego aho nyura maze arambirindura, yangize nk’umugore w’intabwa, buri gihe mba merewe nabi." 
Lamentations1:14 Yagenzuye ibibi nkora byose, abicigatira mu kiganza; umutwaro wabyo awungereka ku bitugu, ugahungabanya imbaraga zanjye. Uhoraho yangabije ibiganza by’abanzi, kandi ndashoboye guhangana na bo!" 
Lamentations1:15 Uhoraho yirukanye intwari zose zari iwanjye, yarankomanyirije kugira ngo bavunagure abasore banjye. Uhoraho yaribatiye umwari mu rwengero, ari we mukobwa wa Yuda." 
Lamentations1:16 Ngibyo ibyatumye mpogora, amaso yanjye agasesa amarira, koko rero uwari kumpumuriza akandema agatima, andi kure. Abana banjye barihebye, kuko umwanzi yabarushije amaboko.»" 
Lamentations1:17 Siyoni iteze ibiganza, ariko nta we uyihumuriza. Uhoraho yategeje Yakobo abamushikamira impande zose; Yeruzalemu yahindutse umwanda rwagati muri bo." 
Lamentations1:18 «Uhoraho ni umunyakuri, koko nasuzuguye amategeko ye. Nimutege amatwi, miryango mwese, mwitegereze umubabaro wanjye, kuko abakobwa banjye n’abasore banjye bajyanywe bunyago." 
Lamentations1:19 Natakambiye amacuti yanjye, yo arantererana; abaherezabitambo n’abakuru banjye baguye mu mugi, bariho bashaka ibyo kurya ngo bagarure ubuyanja." 
Lamentations1:20 Uhoraho, itegereze amakuba ndimo! Ndatengurwa nkabunza umutima, kuko nagusuzuguye bikabije. Ku gasozi inkota yancuje abana, no mu rugo hameze nk’ahatashywe n’Urupfu." 
Lamentations1:21 Tega amatwi amaganya yanjye, kuko nta n’umwe umpumuriza! Abanzi banjye bose bumvaga amakuba ndimo, bakishimira ibyago wanteje. Na bo urakabateza umunsi nk’uwo wangeneye, maze bapfe urwanjye!" 
Lamentations1:22 Ubugome bwabo nibwigaragaze imbere yawe, ubahane nk’uko wampannye, umpoye ibicumuro byanjye byose, kuko amaganya yanjye ari menshi, kandi ngahora nsuhuza umutima." 
Lamentations2:1 Mbega ngo Uhoraho ararakarira umwari w’i Siyoni, bigatuma amutera gusuherwa! Yahanantuye ikuzo rya Israheli ariroha hasi; ntiyibuka akabaho akandagizaho ibirenge bye, ku munsi w’uburakari bwe!" 
Lamentations2:2 Uhoraho yatsembye inzuri zose za Yakobo, atazibabariye; mu burakari bwe asenya ibigo by’umwari wa Yuda; yabirunze hasi, ahindanya igihugu n’abatware bacyo." 
Lamentations2:3 Kubera uburakari bwe bukaze yatsembye ububasha bwose bwa Israheli, ayihina akaboko k’iburyo imbere y’abanzi; muri Yakobo ahacana umuriro ugurumana, uhatwika impande zose." 
Lamentations2:4 Yafoye umuheto we nk’umwanzi, abangura ukuboko kw’iburyo nk’umubisha; atsemba abari bafite igikundiro bose. Yacuranuriye uburakari bwe ku ihema ry’umwari w’i Siyoni, nuko buragurumana nk’umuriro." 
Lamentations2:5 Uhoraho yahindutse nk’umwanzi atsemba Israheli, yatsembye iminara yayo yose, asenya n’ibigo byayo; umwari w’i Siyoni amugwiriza amaganya n’umubabaro." 
Lamentations2:6 Nk’uko bangiza ubusitani n’akazu kaburimo, ni ko yayogoje igihugu cyose n’umurwa wacyo, avanaho ahantu haberaga amakoraniro matagatifu. Uhoraho yatumye iminsi mikuru n’amasabato byibagirana muri Siyoni; kubera uburakari bwe bugurumana, yigizayo umwami n’umuherezabitambo." 
Lamentations2:7 Uhoraho yahigitse urutambiro rwe, azinukwa Ingoro ye, inkike z’iminara azigabiza ibiganza by’umwanzi; none barasakuriza mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho nk’abari mu minsi mikuru!" 
Lamentations2:8 Uhoraho agambiriye kurimbura inkike y’umwari w’i Siyoni; agiye kuharinganiza ateyeho umugozi, kandi ntazahina akaboko atamaze kuhatsemba. Inkuta n’inkike azishyize mu cyunamo; zose zizasenyukira icyarimwe." 
Lamentations2:9 Amarembo yayo yarigise mu butaka, ibihindizo yarabikuye, arabicagagura; umwami wayo n’abatware bayo bigaruriwe n’abanyamahanga, nta mategeko akiharangwa, n’abahanuzi bayo ntibakibonekerwa n’Uhoraho!" 
Lamentations2:10 Abakuru b’umwari w’i Siyoni bicaye hasi, bagwa mu kantu; none baritumurira umukungugu mu mutwe, bakenyeye ibigunira. Abari b’i Yeruzalemu bubitse umutwe ukora ku butaka." 
Lamentations2:11 Amaso yanjye yakobowe n’amarira, ndiho ndatengurwa; nacitse intege kuko umwari w’umuryango wanjye yarimbutse, abana b’ibitambambuga n’abakiri ku ibere, bakaba basambagurikira ku bibuga by’umurwa." 
Lamentations2:12 Barabaza ba nyina, bati «Ingano na divayi biri he?» ari na ko barabirana nk’inkomere ku bibuga by’umurwa, basambagurika mu maboko ya ba nyina." 
Lamentations2:13 Icyo nakuvugaho se ni iki? Nakugereranya n’iki se, mwari w’i Yeruzalemu? Uwagukiza akaguhumuriza, yaba ari nde, wa mukobwa we, mwari w’i Siyoni? Akaga urimo ko kangana n’inyanja, ni nde washobora kugukiza?" 
Lamentations2:14 Amabonekerwa abahanuzi bawe bakugejejeho, ni ibinyoma n’impfabusa! Ntibakugaragarije igicumuro cyawe, kugira ngo wirinde ibi byakugwiririye, ahubwo impanuro bakubwiye, zarakurindagije zirakuyobya." 
Lamentations2:15 Abahisi n’abagenzi barakuryanira inzara, barakuvugiriza induru, bakakuzunguriza umutwe, wowe, mwari w’i Yeruzalemu, bagira bati «Mbese uyu ni wa mugi wavugwagaho ubwiza buhebuje, ukaba n’umunezero w’isi yose?»" 
Lamentations2:16 Abanzi bawe bose barakwasamiye, baravuza induru, bagahekenya amenyo, bavuga bati «Twaramuyongobeje! Koko uyu ni wo munsi twari dutegereje, none tuwugezeho, turawubonye!»" 
Lamentations2:17 Uhoraho yageze ku cyo yagambiriye, ashoje icyo ijambo rye ryagennye kuva kera; yatsembye nta mbabazi, atuma umwanzi akwishimaho, yongera ububasha bw’ababisha bawe." 
Lamentations2:18 Takambira Uhoraho, umuganyire, mwari w’i Siyoni; reka amarira yawe yisuke amanywa n’ijoro, boshye amazi y’umugezi; ntiwigere uruhuka, n’amarira ntakame mu maso yawe!" 
Lamentations2:19 Haguruka, utakambe ijoro ryose, uhereye igihe izamu ritangirira; curanurira umutima wawe imbere y’uruhanga rw’Uhoraho nk’uko basuka amazi; mutegere amashyi kubera ibitambambuga byawe, byarabiraniye hose mu mayirabiri, bizize inzara." 
Lamentations2:20 «Uhoraho, reba kandi witegereze; abo wakoreye ibi ni bande? Byagenze bite kugira ngo ababyeyi barye abana babo, bya bitambambuga byabateraga ubwuzu? Byagenze bite kugira ngo abaherezabitambo n’abahanuzi bicirwe icyarimwe mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho?" 
Lamentations2:21 Umwana n’umusaza barambaraye mu mayira; abakobwa banjye n’abasore banjye bamazwe n’inkota, ku munsi w’uburakari bwawe warishe, usogota bose nta mbabazi." 
Lamentations2:22 Wampagurukirije abaterabwoba bankikije, mbese nk’abantu batumiriwe umunsi mukuru; ntihagira urokoka cyangwa ucika ku icumu, ku munsi w’uburakari bw’Uhoraho. Abo nirereye nkabakuza, umwanzi yabantsembyeho.»" 
Lamentations3:1 Ndi umuntu wamenyeranye n’umubabaro; nywutewe n’inkoni y’uburakari bwe. 
Lamentations3:2 Yaranshoreye anyuza mu mwijima, aho kungendesha mu rumuri." 
Lamentations3:3 Ni jye jyenyine acyamuriraho ikiganza cye, akabigira iminsi yose." 
Lamentations3:4 Yanyoshye buhoro buhoro umubiri wanjye, amagufa yanjye arayajanjagura;" 
Lamentations3:5 yanzengurukijeho urukuta rurangota, ankikizaho ibitotezo n’ibyago;" 
Lamentations3:6 antuza mu mwijima mbese nk’abapfuye bo mu bihe bya kera. 
Lamentations3:7 Yarankingiranye sinashobora gusohoka, ambohesha iminyururu iremereye." 
Lamentations3:8 Naratakambye ndanatabaza, ariko isengesho ryanjye ararizinzika." 
Lamentations3:9 Inzira zanjye yarazizitiye n’amabuye abajije, aho nanyuraga arahazibira." 
Lamentations3:10 Amereye nk’ikirura cyubikiye cyangwa nk’intare irekereje; 
Lamentations3:11 yayobagije amayira yanjye, aranshwanyaguza; ansiga ndi igiterashozi." 
Lamentations3:12 Yafoye umuheto we maze angira nk’intego y’umwambi we. 
Lamentations3:13 Yampinguranyije impyiko n’imyambi yo mu mutana we. 
Lamentations3:14 Umuryango wanjye wose wampinduye urw’amenyo, barantaramana igihe cyose." 
Lamentations3:15 Yampagije indurwe, anyuhira ibinyobwa bisharira." 
Lamentations3:16 Yampekenyesheje umusenyi, andisha ivu." 
Lamentations3:17 Umutima wanjye nta mahoro ukiranganwa, sinkibuka icyitwa amahirwe!" 
Lamentations3:18 Nuko ndavuga nti «Imbaraga zanjye zarayoyotse, kimwe n’icyizere nari mfitiye Uhoraho.»" 
Lamentations3:19 Ibuka umubabaro wanjye n’agahinda kanjye, umenye indurwe n’uburozi wanyuhiye!" 
Lamentations3:20 Ndabizirikana maze umutima wanjye ugashenguka; 
Lamentations3:21 ariko kandi nzakomeza nibuke n’ibi ngibi bintera icyizere: 
Lamentations3:22 ni koko, imbabazi z’Uhoraho ntizirashira, urukundo rwe ntirugira iherezo," 
Lamentations3:23 ahubwo ineza ye ayivugurura uko bukeye, ubudahemuka bwe ntibugira urugero!" 
Lamentations3:24 Ubwo ndavuga nti «Uhoraho ni we munani wanjye, ni cyo kintera kumwiringira.»" 
Lamentations3:25 Uhoraho ni mwiza ku bamutegereje, anezeza umutima w’abamushakashaka." 
Lamentations3:26 Ni byiza ko umuntu yategereza mu ituze umukiro uzaturuka kuri Uhoraho," 
Lamentations3:27 akanikorera umuzigo we, akiri muto." 
Lamentations3:28 Ni byiza ko umuntu yakwicara ahiherereye agatuza, mu gihe umutwaro w’Uhoraho ukimuremereye;" 
Lamentations3:29 ajye yunama akoze umunwa mu mukungugu: ahari byamuviramo kwizera! 
Lamentations3:30 Nategere umusaya umukubita, maze yemere guhazwa n’ibitutsi," 
Lamentations3:31 kuko Uhoraho nta we atererana buheriheri. 
Lamentations3:32 Ni koko, arahana ariko akagira imbabazi, akurikije impuhwe ze zitagira urugero;" 
Lamentations3:33 ntanezezwa no gucyaha abantu cyangwa ngo agambirire kubababaza. 
Lamentations3:34 Iyo bakandamiza imbohe zose z’igihugu," 
Lamentations3:35 bagahinyura uburenganzira bw’ikiremwamuntu mu maso y’Umusumbabyose," 
Lamentations3:36 bakarenganya umuntu mu rubanza, ubwo se Uhoraho yaba atabibona?" 
Lamentations3:37 Ni nde uvuga ijambo rimwe, ibyo avuze bikabaho? Uhoraho se, si we utegeka?" 
Lamentations3:38 Mu kanwa k’Umusumbabyose se, si ho haturuka amakuba n’amahirwe?" 
Lamentations3:39 Noneho se muntu yakwinubira iki, niba akiriho, kandi ari n’umunyabyaha?" 
Lamentations3:40 Nidusuzume inzira zacu, tuzigenzure maze tugarukire Uhoraho;" 
Lamentations3:41 twerekeze ibiganza byacu ejuru, imitima yacu ihugukire Imana iri mu ijuru." 
Lamentations3:42 Ni koko, twaracumuye turigomeka, naho wowe, wanga kutubabarira!" 
Lamentations3:43 Wimiramijeho uburakari bwawe, uraduhiga, maze uradutsemba nta mbabazi;" 
Lamentations3:44 wikingiriza igicu cyawe kugira ngo isengesho ryacu ritakugeraho," 
Lamentations3:45 uduhindura ibiseswa n’umwanda rwagati mu bihugu. 
Lamentations3:46 Abanzi bacu bose baratwasamiye; 
Lamentations3:47 umugabane dusigaranye ni ubwoba n’urwobo, amakuba n’ukurimbuka;" 
Lamentations3:48 none amaso yanjye arasesa amarira adakama, kubera ukurimbuka k’umwari w’umuryango wanjye." 
Lamentations3:49 Amaso yanjye ararira ubudatuza, kandi nta na rimwe ajya ahwema," 
Lamentations3:50 kugeza ubwo Uhoraho azunama, akarebera aho ari mu ijuru." 
Lamentations3:51 Amaso yanjye arambaga kubera agahinda natewe n’abakobwa bose bo mu Mugi wanjye. 
Lamentations3:52 Abanyanga nta mpamvu barantoteza, bakampiga nk’inyoni;" 
Lamentations3:53 baroshye ubugingo bwanjye mu rwobo, bangerekaho ibuye;" 
Lamentations3:54 amazi andenga ku mutwe, ni ko kuvuga nti «Ndahejeje!»" 
Lamentations3:55 Uhoraho, natakambiye izina ryawe, ndi ikuzimu mu rwobo;" 
Lamentations3:56 umva ijwi ryanjye rigutakira, rigira riti «Wikwima amatwi imiborogo n’induru byanjye.»" 
Lamentations3:57 Waranyegereye umunsi nagutakambiraga, maze uravuga uti «Wigira ubwoba!»" 
Lamentations3:58 Uhoraho, mu rubanza banciraga, wambereye umuvugizi, ugobotora ubugingo bwanjye;" 
Lamentations3:59 Wabonye ukuntu bampohoteraga, Uhoraho, ngwino undenganure." 
Lamentations3:60 Wabonye uko bashishikajwe no kwihorera, n’imigambi yose mibi bamfitiye." 
Lamentations3:61 Uhoraho, wumvise ibitutsi byabo, n’uko bahihibikanira kungambanira;" 
Lamentations3:62 mu byo bavuga no mu byo bongorerana abanzi banjye ntibahwema kundenguriraho. 
Lamentations3:63 Bitegereze: baba bicaye, baba bahagaze, ni jye bataramana." 
Lamentations3:64 Uhoraho, na bo uzabiture ukurikije ibikorwa byabo;" 
Lamentations3:65 umutima wabo uzawukomeze nk’ibuye, ube ari wo muvumo ubavumye." 
Lamentations3:66 Uzabakurikirane wuzuye uburakari, ubatsembe mu nsi y’ijuru ryawe, Uhoraho." 
Lamentations4:1 Mbega ngo zahabu irahindana, ya zahabu iyunguruye yarononekaye! Mbega ngo amabuye matagatifu aranyanyagira agakwira hose mu mayirabiri!" 
Lamentations4:2 Byagenze bite kugira ngo abana ba Siyoni, bo bagereranywaga na zahabu inogereye, bageze aho gufatwa nk’ibibindi by’ibumba, byabumbwe n’ibiganza by’umubumbyi?" 
Lamentations4:3 Yewe, n’imbwebwe zigira impuhwe, zikonsa ibyana byazo; ariko umuryango wanjye wo ni intavumera, boshye za mbuni zo mu butayu." 
Lamentations4:4 Ururimi rw’ikibondo kikiri ku ibere, rwumiye mu rusenge rw’akanwa kubera inyota; ibitambambuga birasaba umugati, ariko ntihagire uwubaha." 
Lamentations4:5 Abari basanzwe barya bakijuta, ngabo baguye umudari mu mayira; abarerewe mu mihemba, barigaragura mu myanda." 
Lamentations4:6 Amafuti y’umwari w’umuryango wanjye, asumbye kure ibyaha bya Sodoma, yo yarimbutse mu kanya kangana urwara, nta n’uyikojejeho ikiganza." 
Lamentations4:7 Abahungu bayo barabagiranaga kurusha urubura, bakarusha n’amata kwererana; imibiri yabo yashashagiraga kurusha umuhemba, mu maso habo hakabengerana kurusha ibuye ry’agaciro." 
Lamentations4:8 None dore mu ruhanga rwabo harirabura kurusha imbyiro: ntibakimenyekana mu mayira; uruhu rwabo rwafashe ku magufa, rubumiraho uboshye igiti." 
Lamentations4:9 Abicishijwe inkota barahiriwe kurusha abishwe n’inzara, bakagwa umudari, kubera ko imirima yarumbye." 
Lamentations4:10 Abagore bafashe abana babo bagiriraga igishyika, barabateka kugira ngo babarye, kubera amakuba y’umwari w’umuryango wanjye." 
Lamentations4:11 Uhoraho yasagutswe n’umujinya, abadudubizaho uburakari bwe bw’igikatu; yacanye umuriro muri Siyoni, maze imfatiro zayo zose zirakongoka." 
Lamentations4:12 Ari abami bo mu mahanga ari n’abatuye ku isi bose, nta n’umwe watekerezaga ko umubisha kimwe n’umwanzi, bazigera binjira mu marembo ya Yeruzalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Ibyo byatewe n’ibyaha by’abahanuzi bayo, kimwe n’amafuti y’abaherezabitambo bayo; bameneye amaraso y’intungane rwagati muri yo." 
Lamentations4:14 Barindagiraga mu mayira, nk’impumyi; bihumanyije n’amaraso, bituma nta we utinyuka gukora ku myambaro yabo." 
Lamentations4:15 Barabamaganaga bagira bati «Nimwigireyo mwarahumanye! Nimwigireyo, nimwigireyo! Ntimugire icyo mukoraho!» Uko babuyeraga bahunga, abo mu mahanga baravugaga bati «Ntibazongere gutura iwacu ukundi!»" 
Lamentations4:16 Uhoraho yarabarebye maze arabatatanya, ntagishaka kubabona; ntibongeye kwita ku baherezabitambo, cyangwa ngo bubahe abasaza." 
Lamentations4:17 Twebweho, amaso yacu yari yatukujwe no kurira, igihe twari dutegereje ko umutabazi yaza; twarakenguzaga ariko biba iby’ubusa: mu mahanga ntibashoboye kudukiza!" 
Lamentations4:18 Baratugenzuraga aho twajyaga hose, bakatubuza guhurira mu bibuga byacu. Twari tugiye gushira, akacu kari kashobotse, mbese igihe cyacu cyari cyageze." 
Lamentations4:19 Abari badukurikiranye barihutaga kurusha za kagoma mu kirere; ku misozi baratujujubyaga, naho mu mayaga bakadusatira."
