Lamentations4:20 Intore y’Uhoraho twakeshaga guhumeka, bayifatiye mu myobo yabo, kandi twaribwiraga tuti «Mu gicucu cyayo, ni ho tuzibera rwagati mu mahanga!»" 
Lamentations4:21 Ishime, uhimbarwe, mwari wa Edomu, wowe utuye mu gihugu cya Usi: nawe inkongoro izakugeraho, uzasinde maze wiyambike ubusa!" 
Lamentations4:22 Mwari w’i Siyoni, amafuti yawe arababariwe; Uhoraho ntazongera kukujyana bunyago. Naho wowe, mwari w’i Edomu, azaguhanira amafuti yawe, agaragaze ibyaha byawe!" 
Lamentations5:1 Uhoraho, ibuka ibyatugwiririye, itegereze maze urebe uko badutuka!" 
Lamentations5:2 Umurage wacu wigaruriwe n’abanyamahanga, amazu yacu agabizwa abantu tutazi." 
Lamentations5:3 Dore turi impfubyi nta ba data tukigira, na ba mama babaye nk’abapfakazi." 
Lamentations5:4 Amazi, tuyanywa ari uko dutanze feza, n’inkwi tuzibona tubanje kuzishyura." 
Lamentations5:5 Baturi nabi rwose, turatotezwa, turarembye, ntitukigira ikiruhuko." 
Lamentations5:6 Dutegeye amashyi Misiri na Ashuru, kugira ngo tubone imigati idutunga." 
Lamentations5:7 Ababyeyi bacu baracumuye, ariko ntibakiriho, ubu ni twebwe dushengurwa n’ibicumuro byabo." 
Lamentations5:8 Dusigaye dutegekwa n’abacakara, ntihagire n’umwe utuvana mu nzara zabo." 
Lamentations5:9 Dusarura ingano zacu ari uko duhaze amagara, kubera abasahuzi baturuka mu butayu bakadutera." 
Lamentations5:10 Umubiri wacu urahinda umuriro uboshye itanura, kubera inzara yatuzahaje." 
Lamentations5:11 Muri Siyoni, abagore barafatwa ku gahato, kimwe n’abari mu migi ya Yuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Bafashe abatware barabamanika, ntibacyubaha abakuru b’umuryango." 
Lamentations5:13 Abasore baraheka urusyo n’ingasire, abahungu barikorera inkwi zikabaheta." 
Lamentations5:14 Abasaza ntibakijya mu nama, abasore baretse gutera indirimbo zabo." 
Lamentations5:15 Ibyishimo by’umutima wacu byarayoyotse, imbyino yacu ihinduka amaganya." 
Lamentations5:16 Ikamba ryo ku mutwe wacu riraguye. Mbega ishyano! Turagowe kuko twahemutse! 
Lamentations5:17 Icyatumye umubiri wacu wose urwara n’amaso yacu akaba yarahumye," 
Lamentations5:18 ni uko umusozi wa Siyoni wabaye itongo, ugahinduka isenga ry’ingunzu." 
Lamentations5:19 Ariko wowe, Uhoraho, uri umwami iteka ryose, intebe yawe ihoraho, uko amasekuruza agenda asimburana." 
Lamentations5:20 Ni iki cyatuma watwibagirwa ubuziraherezo, ukadutererana igihe kireshya gitya?" 
Lamentations5:21 Uhoraho, twigarurire natwe tukugarukire, vugurura imibereho yacu, tumere nka mbere." 
Lamentations5:22 Naho ubundi se, waba waratuzinutswe burundu, ku buryo watugirira uburakari bukabije gutyo?" 
Ezekiel1:1 Ku munsi wa gatanu w’ukwezi kwa kane, mu mwaka wa mirongo itatu, nari ku nkombe y’uruzi rwa Kebari rwagati mu bari barajyanywe bunyago, nuko ijuru rirakinguka, ndabonekerwa." 
Ezekiel1:2 Kuri uwo munsi wa gatanu nyine — hari mu mwaka wa gatanu umwami Yoyakini ajyanywe bunyago — 
Ezekiel1:3 ubwo ijambo ry’Uhoraho ringeraho, jyewe Ezekiyeli mwene Buzi, umuherezabitambo, mu gihugu cy’Abakalideya, ku nkombe y’uruzi rwa Kebari. Aho ni ho ububasha bw’Uhoraho bwansesekayeho." 
Ezekiel1:4 Nuko ngo ndebe, mbona umuyaga w’inkubi wahuhaga uturuka mu majyaruguru, mbona n’igicu kinini n’umuriro warabyaga n’umucyo impande zose; rwagati muri uwo muriro hakarabagirana nka zahabu." 
Ezekiel1:5 Muri icyo cyezezi, nahabonaga ikintu kimeze nk’ibinyabuzima bine byasaga n’abantu." 
Ezekiel1:6 Buri kinyabuzima cyari gifite umutwe w’impande enye n’amababa ane. 
Ezekiel1:7 Amaguru yabyo yari agororotse n’ibirenge bimeze nk’ibinono by’ibimasa, bikarabagirana nk’umuringa usennye." 
Ezekiel1:8 Mu nsi y’amababa yabyo habonekaga ibiganza nk’iby’umuntu byarebaga mu byerekezo bine, kimwe n’imitwe yabyo." 
Ezekiel1:9 Ayo mababa yabyo yari afatanye rimwe n’irindi, bikagenda ubudahindukira kimwe kiromboreje imbere yacyo." 
Ezekiel1:10 Mu ruhanga rwabyo hasaga n’ah’umuntu, byose uko ari bine mu musaya w’iburyo bigasa n’intare, mu w’ibumoso bigasa n’ikimasa, uko ari bine kandi bikagira umutwe nk’uwa kagoma." 
Ezekiel1:11 Amababa yabyo yari arambuye yerekeye hejuru, buri kinyabuzima gifite amababa abiri afatanye, n’andi abiri agitwikiriye;" 
Ezekiel1:12 buri kinyabuzima kikagenda kiromboreje imbere yacyo bigana aho umwuka ubyerekeje, kandi bikagenda ubudahindukira." 
Ezekiel1:13 Ibyo binyabuzima nabibonaga bimeze nk’amafumba agurumana, agenda anyuranamo hagati yabyo, hakaba n’umucyo w’umuriro urabya;" 
Ezekiel1:14 ibinyabuzima bikagenda binyuranamo kandi bisa n’umurabyo. 
Ezekiel1:15 Nuko ngo ndebe, mbona uruziga ku butaka, iruhande rw’ibyo binyabuzima uko ari bine." 
Ezekiel1:16 Izo nziga zari zikoze mu ibuye ry’agaciro gakomeye. Zari zikoze kimwe kandi zisa, ku buryo wabonaga uruziga rumwe rusa n’urunyuze mu rundi." 
Ezekiel1:17 Zazengurukaga zigana mu byerekezo bine nta guhindukira. 
Ezekiel1:18 Umuzenguruko wa buri ruziga ukaba mugari ku buryo buteye ubwoba, kandi izo nziga uko ari enye zikaba zizengurutsweho n’amaso." 
Ezekiel1:19 Uko ibyo binyabuzima byagendaga, inziga na zo zaragendaga, byajya mu kirere na zo zikazamuka." 
Ezekiel1:20 Aho umwuka wabyerekezaga ni ho byajyaga, zikajyanirana na byo mu kirere, kuko umwuka w’ibinyabuzima wari muri izo nziga." 
Ezekiel1:21 Iyo ibyo binyabuzima byagendaga izo nziga na zo zaragendaga, byahagarara na zo zigahagarara, byajya mu kirere na zo zikazamuka; kuko umwuka w’ibinyabuzima wari muri izo nziga." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ku mutwe w’ibinyabuzima hari harambuyeho ikintu kimeze nk’igisenge, kikabengerana nk’ibuye ry’agaciro gakomeye, gitwikiriye imitwe yabyo;" 
Ezekiel1:23 naho mu nsi y’icyo gisenge ni ho amababa yabyo yari aramburiye, rimwe rirebana n’irindi; buri kinyabuzima kikagira n’amababa abiri agitwikiriye." 
Ezekiel1:24 Nuko numva ijwi ry’urusaku rw’amababa yabyo rwari rumeze nk’umworomo w’amazi magari, iyo byatambukaga; mbese rwose rumeze nk’umworomo w’amazi magari cyangwa nk’ijwi ry’Umushoborabyose, nk’urusaku rw’imbaga nyamwinshi cyangwa nk’imirindi y’ingabo. Byaba bihagaze amababa yabyo bikayabumba." 
Ezekiel1:25 Humvikanaga rero urusaku rwinshi, ruturutse kuri cya kintu kimeze nk’igisenge cyari hejuru y’imitwe y’ibinyabuzima." 
Ezekiel1:26 Hejuru y’icyo gisenge cyari kirambuye hejuru y’imitwe yabyo, hari ikindi kintu gisa n’ibuye ry’agaciro gakomeye, gikoze nk’intebe y’ubwami; kuri iyo ntebe y’ubwami, hejuru rwose, hakaba igisa n’umuntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Hanyuma mbona wa wundi akikijwe hejuru y’urukenyerero n’ikintu gisa n’umuriro, no mu nsi y’urukenyerero akikijwe n’urumuri rurabagirana nk’umuringa;" 
Ezekiel1:28 urwo rumuri rugasa kandi n’umukororombya uboneka mu bicu ku minsi y’imvura, rwasaga mbese n’ikuzo ry’Uhoraho. Uko nakitegereje nitura hasi nubamye, maze numva ijwi ryavugaga." 
Ezekiel2:1 Nuko rirambwira riti «Mwana w’umuntu, haguruka ngire icyo nkubwira.»" 
Ezekiel2:2 Nuko rikibivuga, umwuka unyinjiramo, utuma mpagarara maze numva uwamvugishaga." 
Ezekiel2:3 Arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, ngutumye ku Bayisraheli, kuri ibyo birara byanyigometseho. Bo n’abasekuruza babo banyigometseho kugeza uyu munsi." 
Ezekiel2:4 Urwo rubyaro rufite umutwe ukomeye n’umutima unangiye; ndugutumyeho ngo uzarubwire uti ’Ni ko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze.’ 
Ezekiel2:5 Bakumva cyangwa batakumva, kuko ari inyoko y’ibirara, ariko nibura bazamenya ko barimo umuhanuzi." 
Ezekiel2:6 Naho rero wowe, mwana w’umuntu, ntubatinye, ntuzaterwe ubwoba n’amagambo yabo nibakuvuguruza cyangwa se bakaguhinyura, kabone n’iyo wakwicara hejuru ya za manyenga. Witinya amagambo yabo cyangwa indoro yabo, kuko ari inyoko y’ibirara." 
Ezekiel2:7 Uzabagezeho amagambo yanjye, bakumva batakumva, kuko nyine ari inyoko y’ibirara." 
Ezekiel2:8 Naho rero wowe, mwana w’umuntu, uramenye ntuzabe ikirara ak’iyo nyoko yararutse; ahubwo tega amatwi wumve icyo ngiye kukubwira. Cyo ngaho asama maze urye icyo ngiye kuguha.»" 
Ezekiel2:9 Nuko ngo ndebe mbona ikiganza kiza kingana kirimo igitabo kizinze," 
Ezekiel2:10 icyo kiganza kikiramburira imbere yanjye; icyo gitabo cyari cyanditseho imbere n’inyuma amaganya, iminiho n’imiborogo." 
Ezekiel3:1 Arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, ngaho rya! Icyo gitabo weretswe, kirye; hanyuma ugende ubwire umuryango wa Israheli.»" 
Ezekiel3:2 Nuko ni ko kwasama icyo gitabo ndakirya. 
Ezekiel3:3 Hanyuma arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, rya kandi uhazwe n’iki gitabo nguhaye.» Igihe nakiryaga numvaga mu kanwa kanjye haryohereye nk’ubuki." 
Ezekiel3:4 Hanyuma arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, genda usange umuryango wa Israheli, ubashyire amagambo yanjye." 
Ezekiel3:5 Singutumye ku muryango uvuga ururimi rutumvikana cyangwa se rukomeye kurwumva, ahubwo ngutumye ku muryango wa Israheli." 
Ezekiel3:6 Si ku miryango myinshi ivuga ururimi rutumvikana, kandi rukomeye kurwumva ku buryo mutakumvikana — kuko iyo aba ari bo nari ngutumyeho bajyaga kukumva —" 
Ezekiel3:7 nyamara umuryango wa Israheli uzanga kugutega amatwi, kuko nyine udashaka kunyumva. Koko rero, abo mu muryango wa Israheli ni abantu b’umutwe ukomeye n’umutima unangiye." 
Ezekiel3:8 None dore umutwe wawe nywukomeje nk’uwabo, n’agahanga kawe nk’akabo;" 
Ezekiel3:9 ngukomeje nka diyama ikomeye kurusha urutare. Ntuzabatinye cyangwa ngo udagadwe imbere yabo, kuko ari inyoko y’ibirara.»" 
Ezekiel3:10 Nuko arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, amagambo yose nkubwira ujye uyakira mu mutima wawe, uyatege amatwi yawe yombi," 
Ezekiel3:11 maze usange abana b’umuryango wanjye bajyanywe bunyago, uyababwire. Bakumva cyangwa batakumva, uzababwire uti ’Ni ko Nyagasani Imana avuze.’»" 
Ezekiel3:12 Nuko ntwarwa n’umwuka, maze numva inyuma yanjye urusaku rw’umuririmo ukaze w’ijwi rigira riti «Uhoraho Nyirikuzo nasingirizwe mu Ngoro ye!»" 
Ezekiel3:13 Urwo rusaku rwari urw’amababa y’ibinyabuzima yakubitanaga, urw’inziga zari iruhande rwabyo n’urw’induru ikaze." 
Ezekiel3:14 Hanyuma umwuka uranterura uranjyana, ngenda nshavuye kandi ntengurwa, ari na ko ikiganza cy’Uhoraho kinshikamiye bikomeye." 
Ezekiel3:15 Nuko ngera i Telabibu, aho abajyanywe bunyago bari batuye hafi y’uruzi rwa Kebari; marana na bo iminsi irindwi, meze nk’uwakutse umutima." 
Ezekiel3:16 Nyuma y’iminsi irindwi, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel3:17 «Mwana w’umuntu, nagushyiriyeho kuburira umuryango wa Israheli. Igihe rero uzaba wumvise ijambo rivuye mu kanwa kanjye, ujye ubaburira mu kigwi cyanjye." 
Ezekiel3:18 Nindamuka mbwiye umugome nti ’Ugiye gupfa’, maze ntumuburire, ntugire icyo umubwira kugira ngo areke imyifatire ye mibi maze abeho, uwo mugome azapfa azize amakosa ye, ariko ni wowe nzaryoza amaraso ye." 
Ezekiel3:19 Naho nuramuka uburiye uwo mugome, ariko ntahinduke ngo azibukire ubugome bwe n’imyifatire ye mibi, azapfa azize amakosa ye, nyamara wowe uzaba ukijije ubugingo bwawe." 
Ezekiel3:20 Niba umuntu w’intungane ateshutse ku butungane bwe agakora ikibi maze nkamutega umutego, azapfa kuko utamuburiye. Azapfa azize icyaha cye nta no kwibuka ukundi ubutungane yagize, ariko ni wowe nzaryoza amaraso ye." 
Ezekiel3:21 Nyamara nuburira intungane ngo idacumura kandi nticumure, izabaho ibikesha ko yaburiwe, kandi nawe uzaba ukijije ubugingo bwawe.»" 
Ezekiel3:22 Ubwo nari aho ngaho, ububasha bw’Uhoraho bunsesekaraho maze arambwira ati «Haguruka ujye mu kibaya, mfite icyo mpakubwirira.»" 
Ezekiel3:23 Nuko ndahaguruka nerekeza mu kibaya, mbona ikuzo ry’Uhoraho rihaganje, rimeze rwose nk’iryo nabonye ku nkombe y’uruzi rwa Kebari, maze nitura hasi nubamye." 
Ezekiel3:24 Ubwo umwuka unyinjiramo, urampagurutsa maze urambwira, uti «Genda wikingirane mu nzu.»" 
Ezekiel3:25 Wungamo uti «Umva rero, mwana w’umuntu, abantu bagiye kugushyira ku ngoyi, bakubohe maze woye kuzongera kubasanga ukundi." 
Ezekiel3:26 Nanjye nzafatisha ururimi rwawe mu rusenge rw’akanwa, uzabe ikiragi ubutazasubira kubatonganya ukundi, kuko ari inyoko y’ibirara." 
Ezekiel3:27 Ariko igihe nzaba ngize icyo nkubwira, nzakubumbura umunwa maze ubabwire uti ’Ni ko Nyagasani Imana avuze: ushaka kumva niyumve, utabishaka kandi niyirorerere, kuko ari inyoko yararutse.’" 
Ezekiel4:1 None rero, mwana w’umuntu, fata itafari urirambike imbere yawe urishushanyeho umugi, ari wo Yeruzalemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Hanyuma werekane ko ugoswe uwukikiza imikingo; uharunde imigina y’ibitaka, uhace ingando z’ibitero kandi uwukikize imashini z’intambara impande zose." 
Ezekiel4:3 Uzafate ipanu y’icyuma uyishinge hagati yawe n’umugi nk’inkike y’icyuma, uwuhange amaso bityo uzaba ugoswe; ni wowe uzawugota. Bizabera ikimenyetso umuryango wa Israheli." 
Ezekiel4:4 Ngaho rero ryamira urubavu rw’ibumoso, maze wiyorose ibyaha by’umuryango wa Israheli. Igihe cyose uzamara uryamye utyo, uzaba wikoreye ibyaha byabo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ni jyewe ukubarira iminsi nkurikije imyaka umuryango wa Israheli wamaze ucumura, bityo ukazamara iminsi ijana na mirongo cyenda wikoreye ibyaha byabo." 
Ezekiel4:6 Icyo gihe nukirangiza, uzahindukire uryamishe urubavu rw’iburyo wikorere ibyaha by’inzu ya Yuda, iminsi mirongo ine yose. Ku mwaka umwe naguteganyirije igihe kingana n’umunsi umwe." 
Ezekiel4:7 Hanyuma uzahange amaso Yeruzalemu izaba igoswe, ushyire hejuru ukuboko kwawe kwambaye ubusa maze uyihanurire ibiyerekeyeho." 
Ezekiel4:8 Dore ngushyize ku ngoyi, ntuzahindura urundi rubavu kugeza ubwo iminsi yo kugota umugi izaba yarangiye." 
Ezekiel4:9 Cyo ngaho rero shaka ingano nini n’ingano za bushoki, ibishyimbo n’inkori, amasaka n’uburo; ubivangire mu cyungo kimwe maze ubikoremo umugati. Uwo mugati uzagutunga igihe cyose uzaba uryamiye urubavu — iminsi magana atatu na mirongo cyenda." 
Ezekiel4:10 Ibiryo uzarya, uzajye upima ibingana n’amasikeli makumyabiri ku munsi, bikazagutunga kugeza ku munsi ukurikiyeho." 
Ezekiel4:11 Amazi uzanywa na yo azaba ageze, azaba angana n’incuro y’agakebano ku munsi." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ibyo biryo bizaba bimeze nk’umugati w’ingano za bushoki, uzabitekere hejuru y’icyavu abantu bitumyemo; bose babireba.»" 
Ezekiel4:13 Uhoraho yungamo ati «Nguko uko Abayisraheli bazarya ibiryo byabo byahumanye, igihe bazaba bari mu mahanga ngiye kubatatanyirizamo.»" 
Ezekiel4:14 Nuko ndavuga nti «Nyabuneka, Nyagasani Uhoraho, nta bwo nigeze nandavura na rimwe. Kuva mu bwana bwanjye kugeza ubu, nta bwo ndigera ndya inyamaswa yanizwe cyangwa yatanyaguwe n’izindi, ndetse n’inyama zahumanye ntizigeze zingera ku munwa.»" 
Ezekiel4:15 Uhoraho ni ko kumbwira ati «Noneho kubera iyo mpamvu, nkwemereye guteka umugati wawe hejuru y’ibisheshe by’amase y’inka, aho kubiteka hejuru y’icyavu abantu bitumyemo.»" 
Ezekiel4:16 Hanyuma arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, dore ngiye gusenya ibigega by’imigati by’i Yeruzalemu; bazaryana agahinda umugati upimye, banywe bishisha amazi agezwe," 
Ezekiel4:17 maze kubera ko bazabura umugati n’amazi, bazakangarane kandi bacike intege ku mpamvu y’ibyaha byabo.»" 
Ezekiel5:1 Uhoraho yongera kumbwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, fata icyuma gityaye, ugifate nk’urwembe rwa kimyozi, ucyiyogosheshe imisatsi n’ubwanwa; hanyuma ufate umunzani maze ubigabanyemo imigabane." 
Ezekiel5:2 Igihe iminsi y’ifatwa ry’umugi izaba irangiye, uzafate umugabane uhwanye na kimwe cya gatatu uwutwikire mu mugi rwagati. Ikindi cya gatatu uzagende ugicagagura n’inkota ari na ko uzenguruka umugi; igice gisigaye uzakinyanyagize mu muyaga, ni bwo nanjye nzakura inkota yanjye mbakurikirane." 
Ezekiel5:3 Uzafateho umusatsi muke uwushyire mu mufuka w’igishura cyawe," 
Ezekiel5:4 hanyuma uzongere ufateho uwujugunye mu muriro, bityo uhembere umuriro uzagera ku muryango wa Israheli.»" 
Ezekiel5:5 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Iyo ni Yeruzalemu nashyize hagati y’amahanga n’ibihugu biyikikije. 
Ezekiel5:6 Yarigometse isuzugura amategeko n’amabwiriza yanjye kurusha amahanga n’ibihugu biyikikije; kuko bahigitse amabwiriza yanjye kandi ntibakurikize n’amategeko yanjye.» 
Ezekiel5:7 Ni yo mpamvu Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati «Kubera ko agasuzuguro kanyu gatambukije ububi ak’amahanga abakikije, ntimunakurikize amategeko yanjye ngo mwubahirize n’amabwiriza yanjye, ahubwo mugakurikiza imico y’amahanga abakikije," 
Ezekiel5:8 kubera iyo mpamvu nimwumve uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ’Nanjye ndakwibasiye, nzagucira urubanza ku mugaragaro mu maso y’amahanga." 
Ezekiel5:9 Nzakwibasira ku buryo ntigeze mbikora kandi ntazigera nongera kubikora, kubera ayo mahano wakoze." 
Ezekiel5:10 Ababyeyi bazarya abana babo n’abana barye ababyeyi babo ku mugaragaro mu maso yawe. Nzagucira urugukwiye, nzatatanyirize imihanda yose uzaba arokotse wese mu bagukomokaho." 
Ezekiel5:11 Ni cyo gituma mbirahiriye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — kubera ko wahindanyije Ingoro yanjye n’ibyo biterashozi byose n’ayo mahano yose, nanjye nzagutsemba, sinzigera nkurebana impuhwe kandi sinzanakubabarira." 
Ezekiel5:12 Icya gatatu cy’abaturage bawe kizicwa n’ibyorezo maze barimburwe n’inzara ku mugaragaro mu maso yawe, ikindi gice cya gatatu gitsemberwe n’inkota iruhande rwawe, hanyuma icya gatatu gisigaye ngitatanyirize imihanda yose ngikurikiranye n’inkota." 
Ezekiel5:13 Nzimara ntyo uburakari, n’umujinya wanjye nywubarangirizeho maze nihorere; bityo bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho, kandi ko mu burakari bwanjye navuze, kugeza ubwo mbarangirijeho umujinya wanjye." 
Ezekiel5:14 Nzakugira itongo n’ikinnyego mu mahanga agukikije, no mu maso y’abagenzi;" 
Ezekiel5:15 maze igihe nzaba naguciriye urugukwiye mbigiranye uburakari, umujinya n’ibihano bikaze, uzabere amahanga agukikije ikinnyego n’igitutsi, akarorero n’impamvu yo gutinya kuko ari jye Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel5:16 Nzabaterereza imyambi iteye ubwoba ibarimbure; koko nzayibaterereza kubatsemba, nongereho n’inzara nsenya ibigega byanyu by’imigati." 
Ezekiel5:17 Nzabaterereza inzara n’ibikoko by’inkazi bibamareho urubyaro; ibyorezo n’amaraso bizakugariza kandi nzakugabize n’inkota: ni jye Uhoraho ubivuze.’» 
Ezekiel6:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel6:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hindukira urebe imisozi ya Israheli maze uhanure ibiyerekeyeho." 
Ezekiel6:3 Uzavuge uti ’Misozi ya Israheli, nimutege amatwi ijambo rya Nyagasani Uhoraho. Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho abwira imisozi n’utununga, imikokwe n’ibibaya: Ngiye kubagabiza inkota, ndimbure ahantu hanyu hatagatifu." 
Ezekiel6:4 Intambiro zanyu z’ibitambo zizasandazwa, n’iz’imibavu zimenagurwe; nzabatsinda imbere y’ibigirwamana byanyu;" 
Ezekiel6:5 intumbi z’Abayisraheli nzishyire imbere y’ibigirwamana byabo, kandi nyanyagize amagufa yabo impande zose z’intambiro zanyu." 
Ezekiel6:6 Imigi mutuyemo izahinduka amatongo n’ahantu hanyu hatagatifu hasenywe; bityo intambiro zanyu zizasenywe kandi zirimburwe, ibigirwamana byanyu bisandazwe kandi binyanyagire, intambiro z’imibavu zizamenagurwe maze ibikorwa byanyu bihinduke ubusa." 
Ezekiel6:7 Nzararika abazaba bashegeshwe rwagati muri mwe, maze muzamenyereho ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel6:8 Ariko rero, nzasigaza bamwe muri mwe bazaba bacitse ku icumu bakazatatanira mu mahanga;" 
Ezekiel6:9 maze bazanyibukire mu mahanga aho bazaba ari imbohe, kuko nzaba namenaguye umutima wabo wararutse ukanyanga, n’amaso yabo yohotse inyuma y’ibigirwamana byabo. Bazizinukwa na bo ubwabo kubera ibibi byose bakoze n’ayo mahano yabo." 
Ezekiel6:10 Bityo nimbateza ayo makuba, bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho kuko ibyo navuze bitabaye imfabusa.’»" 
Ezekiel6:11 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: «Koma mu mashyi, udihe n’ikirenge hasi maze utere hejuru uti ’Karabaye!’ Israheli igiye kwicishwa inkota, inzara n’ibyorezo kubera amahano yose yakoze." 
Ezekiel6:12 Abari kure bazicwa n’ibyorezo, naho abari bugufi bazatsembwe n’inkota. Abazaba baracitse ku icumu bazamarwa n’inzara, kuko nzabarangirizaho umujinya wanjye." 
Ezekiel6:13 Muzamenyeraho ko ndi Uhoraho, igihe abazaba bashegeshwe bazaba barambaraye mu bigirwamana byabo n’iruhande rw’intambiro zabo, ku tununga duhanitse no mu mpinga z’imisozi yose, mu nsi ya buri giti gitoshye no mu nsi ya buri mushishi ubyibushye, n’aho baturiraga imibavu yo kurura ibigirwamana byabo byose." 
Ezekiel6:14 Nzabacyamuriraho ikiganza cyanjye, igihugu cyabo kimwe n’aho batuye hose, hahinduke ahantu hadatuwe kuva ku butayu kugera i Ribula, bityo bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.»" 
Ezekiel7:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel7:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, vuga uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho, abwiye atya umuryango wa Israheli: Birarangiye! Dore amaherezo yagwiririye impande enye z’igihugu." 
Ezekiel7:3 Noneho bikurangiriyeho, ngiye kukuvunduriraho uburakari bwanjye, kugira ngo ngucire urubanza nkurikije imyifatire yawe kandi nkuryoze n’amahano yose wakoze." 
Ezekiel7:4 Sinzigera nkurebana impuhwe kandi sinzanakubabarira, ahubwo nzagushinja imyifatire yawe, amahano wakoze azakugumeho maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
Ezekiel7:5 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Dore ngicyo icyago kiraje, icyago cya kabutindi!" 
Ezekiel7:6 Amaherezo yawe aregereje, ngayo rwose yaje ahagurutse akugana, araje rwose." 
Ezekiel7:7 Ubu ni wowe utahiwe, muntu utuye igihugu. Igihe kiraje n’umunsi uregereje, ntibikiri ibyishimo, ahubwo ni imvururu ku misozi." 
Ezekiel7:8 Ngaha ngiye kukuvunduriraho umujinya wanjye, nkurangirizeho uburakari bwanjye, ngucire urubanza nkurikije imyifatire yawe, kandi nkuryoze amahano yose wakoze." 
Ezekiel7:9 Sinzigera nkurebana impuhwe kandi sinzanakubabarira; ahubwo nzaguhana nkurikije imyifatire yawe, amahano wakoze akugumeho maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, nkaba mbahannye." 
Ezekiel7:10 Nguyu umunsi urageze, ubu ni wowe utahiwe; ubuhubutsi buragwiriye, agasuzuguro kakwiriye hose," 
Ezekiel7:11 urugomo rurabyutse nk’inkoni y’ubugiranabi... 
Ezekiel7:12 Igihe kirageze n’umunsi uregereje! Umuguzi narekere aho kwishima, umucuruzi areke kwiheba kuko umujinya wanjye wibasiye igihugu cyose." 
Ezekiel7:13 Umucuruzi ntakigarutse ku cyo yagurishije, kabone n’aho yaba akiriho, kuko ibyavuzwe bigomba kugwirira ubukungu bw’igihugu bizaba, maze ntihazagire urokoka bazira icyaha cyabo." 
Ezekiel7:14 Ngaha bavugije akarumbeti, n’ibyangombwa byose byateguwe, ariko nta muntu n’umwe wo kujya ku rugamba, kuko umujinya wanjye waziye ubukungu bw’igihugu cyose." 
Ezekiel7:15 Abazaba bari hanze bazicishwa inkota, abari mu mazu bazire ibyorezo n’inzara. Umuntu wese uzaba ari ku gasozi azicwa n’inkota, naho uzaba ari mu mugi azahitanwe n’ibyorezo n’inzara." 
Ezekiel7:16 Abazaba bacitse ku icumu bazahungira mu misozi nk’inuma zo mu gasozi, bose nzabice buri muntu azira icyaha cye." 
Ezekiel7:17 Ibiganza byombi bizacika intege, amavi yose azarohame mu mazi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Bazakenyera ibigunira n’umushyitsi ubatahe; mu ruhanga rwabo hazakorwe n’ikimwaro n’imitwe yabo bayiharanguze. 
Ezekiel7:19 Feza yabo bazayinyanyagiza mu mihanda na zahabu yabo ihindane; ari zahabu cyangwa feza yabo, nta kizashobora kubakiza umunsi w’uburakari bw’Uhoraho. Ntibazongera guhaga cyangwa kurengwa ukundi, kuko ari byo byari imvano y’ugucumura kwabo." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ubwibone bwabo babugaragarizaga mu bwiza bw’imitamirizo yabo, none ngaho bayikozemo amashusho y’amahano n’ibigirwamana byabo. Nanjye, ni yo mpamvu iyo mitamirizo yabo nyigize umwanda kuri bo." 
Ezekiel7:21 Ngiye kuyigabiza abanyamahanga, bayisahure n’abajura bo mu gihugu bayitwareho iminyago, babanje kuyandavuza." 
Ezekiel7:22 Nzabirengagiza igihe bazaba bandavuza umutungo w’Ingoro yanjye, ibisambo bizinjiremo maze biwuhindanye." 
Ezekiel7:23 Ngaho rero cura umunyururu kuko igihugu cyuzuyemo ubwicanyi bumena amaraso, n’umugi ukaba wuzuyemo urugomo." 
Ezekiel7:24 Nzazana abanyamahanga b’abagome bigarurire amazu yabo, ncubye ubwirasi bw’abanyamaboko n’ingoro zabo nzihumanye." 
Ezekiel7:25 Ngaha iterabwoba riraje; bazashakashaka amahoro ariko bizabe iby’ubusa. 
Ezekiel7:26 Icyago kizasimburwa n’ikindi, inkuru mbi zisimburane. Bazatakambira umuhanuzi ngo agire icyo yababonera ariko bibe iby’ubusa; umuherezabitambo ntazaba akimenya amategeko, nk’uko n’abakuru b’umuryango batazaba bakijya inama." 
Ezekiel7:27 Umwami azajya mu cyunamo, igikomangoma kizikame mu bwihebe, n’ibiganza by’abatuye igihugu bihinde umushyitsi. Nzabahana nkurikije imyifatire yabo, mbacire urubanza nkurikije uko na bo baca izabo, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel8:1 Mu mwaka wa gatandatu, ku munsi wa gatanu w’ukwezi kwa gatandatu, nari nicaye iwanjye n’abakuru b’umuryango bicaye imbere yanjye; nuko ububasha bwa Nyagasani Uhoraho bunsesekaraho." 
Ezekiel8:2 Nuko ngo ndebe, mbona igisa n’umuntu. Kuva mu nsi y’urukenyerero yari akikijwe n’umuriro, hejuru y’urukenyerero akikijwe n’urumuri rurabagirana nka zahabu." 
Ezekiel8:3 Arambura igisa n’ikiganza maze amfata umusatsi, ubwo umwuka ungurukana mu kirere unjyana i Yeruzalemu mu mabonekerwa matagatifu, ungeza ku rugi rw’amarembo y’imbere yerekera mu majyaruguru, ariho hari intebe y’ikigirwamana cy’ishyari, gitera ishyari." 
Ezekiel8:4 Nuko mbona haganje ikuzo ry’Imana ya Israheli, ryasaga rwose n’iryo nigeze kubona mu kibaya." 
Ezekiel8:5 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, ubura amaso urebe mu majyaruguru.» Ubwo nubura amaso ndareba, maze mbona cya kigirwamana cy’ishyari, cyari kiri mu majyaruguru y’urugi rw’amarembo agana ku rutambiro." 
Ezekiel8:6 Arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, urareba se ibyo bakora? Urareba ayo mahano yose akabije umuryango wa Israheli ukora, kugira ngo banyimure mu Ngoro yanjye? Ba woroheje, uzabona n’andi mahano akabije bakora.»" 
Ezekiel8:7 Ubwo anjyana ku marembo y’igikari cy’Ingoro. Nuko ngo ndebe, mbona umwobo mu rukuta." 
Ezekiel8:8 Arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, ngaho nawe cukura umwobo mu rukuta.» Mpera ko ndawucukura maze haboneka umwenge." 
Ezekiel8:9 Noneho arambwira ati «Injira maze urebe amahano ateye isoni bakorera hano.» 
Ezekiel8:10 Nuko ndinjira, ngo ndebe mbona ibishushanyo by’inyamaswa zikururuka ku butaka z’amoko yose, ibikoko byose biteye ishozi n’ibigirwamana by’ubwoko bwose, Abayisraheli bashushanyije ku mpande zose z’urukuta." 
Ezekiel8:11 Abakuru b’umuryango wa Israheli bagera kuri mirongo irindwi hamwe na Yazanyahu mwene Shafani hagati yabo, bari bahagaze imbere y’ibigirwamana — buri muntu afite icyotezo mu ntoki — maze umwotsi w’ububani ukazamuka nk’igicu." 
Ezekiel8:12 Arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, wiboneye se ibyo abakuru b’umuryango wa Israheli bahakorera bikingirije umwijima, buri muntu mu cyumba cye giharabitse ibishushanyo? Baribwira bati ’Uhoraho ntatureba, yavuye mu gihugu.’»" 
Ezekiel8:13 Nuko yungamo ati «Ba woroheje, uzabona n’andi mahano akabije bakora.»" 
Ezekiel8:14 Noneho anjyana ku rugi rw’amarembo y’Ingoro y’Uhoraho yerekeraga mu majyaruguru, hakaba abagore baririraga ikigirwamana Tamuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Nuko arambwira ati «Wabibonye se, mwana w’umuntu? Ba woroheje uzabona n’andi mahano akabije kuruta aya ngaya.»" 
Ezekiel8:16 Hanyuma anjyana imbere y’igikari cy’Ingoro y’Uhoraho. Nuko mbona abantu bagera kuri makumyabiri na batanu bari mu muryango w’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, hagati y’urwinjiriro n’urutambiro. Bari bateye umugongo Ingoro y’Uhoraho birebera mu burasirazuba, ari na ko bunamira izuba bareba aho rirasira." 
Ezekiel8:17 Arambwira ati «Wabibonye se, mwana w’umuntu? Ayo mahano ab’inzu ya Yuda bakorera aha ngaha se ntiyaba ahagije? Dore igihugu bacyujujemo urugomo, bariho barasembura uburakari bwanjye; irebere nawe ngo baregereza ishami ku zuru ryabo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Nanjye nzabahanana umujinya, sinzigera mbarebana impuhwe kandi sinzanabababarira. Bazantakambira baranguruye amajwi, nyamara ariko sinzabumva.»" 
Ezekiel9:1 Nuko numva ijwi riranguruye rigira riti «Mube hafi, mwe mushinzwe guhana umugi, buri wese afate mu kiganza intwaro yo kurimbura.»" 
Ezekiel9:2 Hanyuma nbona abantu batandatu, batambuka baturutse mu irembo ryo hejuru ryerekera mu majyaruguru, buri muntu yitwaje intwaro yo kwica. Hagati yabo hari umuntu wambaye umwenda w'ihariri, akagira no ku mukandara we igikoresho cyo kwandikisha, cyari kigenewe umwanditsi. Nuko barinjira, maze bahagarara imbere y'urutambiro rw'umuringa." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ikuzo ry'Imana ya Israheli riva ku mukerubimu ryari ririho rigana ku muryango w'Ingoro, rihamagara wa muntu wambaye umwenda w'ihariri akagira no ku mukandara igikoresho cyo kwandikisha;" 
Ezekiel9:4 maze Uhoraho aramubwira ati «Nyura mu mugi, rwagati muri Yeruzalemu maze ushyire ikimenyetso ku gahanga k'abantu bariho baganya, bakaba barizwa n'ayo mahano yose ariho ayikorerwamo.»" 
Ezekiel9:5 Nuko abwira abandi bantu ati «Nimukurikire uwo muntu, namwe munyure mu mugi kandi mwice. Ntimugire n'umwe murebana impuhwe cyangwa ngo mumubabarire;" 
Ezekiel9:6 baba abasaza, abasore n'amasugi, abana n'abagore, mwice kandi mubatsembe bose. Ariko umuntu wese ufite ikimenyetso ku gahanga, uwo ntimumukoreho. Ndetse ahubwo nimutangirire ku Ngoro yanjye.» Nuko bahera ku basaza bari mu Ngoro." 
Ezekiel9:7 Hanyuma arababwira ati «Nimuhindanye Ingoro, ibikari byayo mubyuzuzemo intumbi! Ngaho mugende.» Nuko baragenda bica abatuye umugi bose." 
Ezekiel9:8 Igihe bariho bica, nsigara jyenyine maze nikubita hasi nubamye, ni ko gutera hejuru nti «Nyagasani Uhoraho, rwose ugiye gutsemba agasigisigi ka Israheli, ucubanurira umujinya wawe kuri Yeruzalemu?»" 
Ezekiel9:9 Arambwira ati «Icyaha cy'umuryango wa Israheli n'inzu ya Yuda kirakabije; dore igihugu cyuzuyemo amaraso, n'umugi wasagutswe n'ubugizi bwa nabi. Baribwira bati 'Uhoraho yavuye mu gihugu, ntakibona.'" 
Ezekiel9:10 None rero nanjye sinzigera mbarebana impuhwe, kandi sinzanabababarira; nzabahora iyo myifatire mibi yabo.»" 
Ezekiel9:11 Nuko mbona wa muntu wambaye umwenda w'ihariri, akagira no ku mukandara igikoresho cyo kwandikisha, agarutse avuga ati «Narangije ibyo wantegetse.»" 
Ezekiel10:1 Nuko ngo ndebe mbona ku gisenge cyari hejuru y’umutwe w’abakerubimu, ikintu cyasaga nk’ibuye rya safiri, kimeze nk’intebe y’ubwami." 
Ezekiel10:2 Uhoraho abwira wa muntu wari wambaye umwenda w’ihariri, ati «Nyura hagati mu nziga ziri mu nsi y’abakerubimu, ucigatire mu biganza amakara yaka ari hagati y’abakerubimu maze uyanyanyagize ku mugi.» Nuko ajyayo mwirebera." 
Ezekiel10:3 Igihe uwo muntu yinjiraga, abakerubimu bari bahagaze iburyo bw’Ingoro, nuko mu gikari igihu kirabudika." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ikuzo ry’Uhoraho rizamuka ku mukerubimu rigana imbere y’umuryango w’Ingoro, ubwo n’Ingoro ubwayo yuzuramo igihu, n’igikari cyuzuramo icyezezi cy’ikuzo ry’Imana." 
Ezekiel10:5 Nuko urusaku rw’amababa y’abakerubimu rwumvikana kugera inyuma y’igikari cy’Ingoro, mbese rwose ukaba wagira ngo ni ijwi ry’Imana ishobora byose, iyo ivuze." 
Ezekiel10:6 Igihe Uhoraho yabwiraga wa muntu wambaye umwenda w’ihariri, ati «Fata umuriro uri mu ruziga rw’igare riri hagati y’abakerubimu», umuntu yaraje maze ahagarara iruhande rw’igare." 
Ezekiel10:7 Umukerubimu arambura ukuboko akunyujije hagati y’abandi bakerubimu, akwerekeza ku muriro wari hagati yabo; arawufata maze awushyira mu kiganza cya wa muntu wambaye umwenda w’ihariri. Na we rero arawucigatira, arasohoka." 
Ezekiel10:8 Nuko mu nsi y’amababa y’abakerubimu haboneka ikintu kimeze nk’ikiganza cy’umuntu. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ngo ndebe, mbona inziga enye iruhande rw’abakerubimu, uruziga iruhande rwa buri mukerubimu, kandi n’imisusire y’izo nziga ikarabagirana nk’ibuye ry’agaciro gakomeye." 
Ezekiel10:10 Izo nziga uko ari enye zari zikoze kimwe, ku buryo wabonaga rumwe rusa n’urunyuze mu rundi." 
Ezekiel10:11 Zazengurukaga zigana mu byerekezo bine nta guhindukira, ariko zikaragaga zerekera mu ruhande umutwe waganagamo, kandi ntizihindukire." 
Ezekiel10:12 Ari igihimba cyose n’umugongo, ibiganza n’amababa by’abakerubimu kimwe n’inziga zabo uko ari enye, byari byuzuyeho ibyezezi hirya no hino." 
Ezekiel10:13 Nuko numva izo nziga zihawe izina rya «Galigali ». 
Ezekiel10:14 Buri mukerubimu yari afite umutwe w’impande enye: uruhande rwa mbere rwari urw’ikimasa, urwa kabiri rwari urw’umuntu, urwa gatatu rwari urw’intare, urwa kane ari urwa kagoma." 
Ezekiel10:15 Abakerubimu ngo batumburuke, mbona ni cya kinyabuzima nari nabonye ku ruzi rwa Kebari." 
Ezekiel10:16 Uko abakerubimu batambukaga, inziga na zo zabagendaga iruhande; bazamura amababa kugira ngo bazamuke, inziga zikabaguma iruhande ariko ntizongere kwikaraga." 
Ezekiel10:17 Iyo babaga bahagaze na zo zarahagararaga; bazamuka zikazamukana na bo, kuko umwuka w’ibinyabuzima ari zo wari urimo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Ikuzo ry’Uhoraho risohoka riturutse imbere y’umuryango w’Ingoro, maze rihagarara ku bakerubimu." 
Ezekiel10:19 Nuko abakerubimu barambura amababa, bazamuka mbareba n’inziga zizamukana na bo; bahagarara ku rugi rw’irembo ry’iburasirazuba bw’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, ikuzo ry’Imana ya Israheli riri hejuru yabo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Byari bimeze rwose nka bya binyabuzima nigeze kubona mu nsi y’Imana ya Israheli, ubwo nari ndi ku ruzi rwa Kebari, nuko menya ko bari abakerubimu." 
Ezekiel10:21 Buri mukerubimu yari afite umutwe w’impande enye n’amababa ane, bakagira n’ibintu bimeze nk’ibiganza by’umuntu mu nsi y’amababa yabo." 
Ezekiel10:22 Imitwe yabo yasaga rwose nk’iyo nari nigeze kubona, ubwo nari ndi ku nkombe y’uruzi rwa Kebari. Nuko buri mukerubimu akagenda aboneje imbere ye." 
Ezekiel11:1 Nuko umwuka uranjyana ungeza ku irembo ry’iburasirazuba bw’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, ryerekera nyine iburasirazuba; ku rugi rw’iryo rembo hakaba hahagaze abantu makumyabiri na batanu. Muri bo mbona Yazanya mwene Azuru, na Pelatiyahu mwene Benayahu, abatware b’umuryango." 
Ezekiel11:2 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, ngabo abantu bagambirira gukora ikibi, bagakwiza inama mbi muri uyu mugi." 
Ezekiel11:3 Baribwira bati ’Igihe se nticyaba cyegereje maze bakatwubakira andi mazu! Umugi ni nk’inkono, naho twebwe tukaba nk’inyama ziyirimo.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Ni cyo gituma rero, mwana w’umuntu, ugomba guhanura ibiberekeyeho.»" 
Ezekiel11:5 Nuko umwuka w’Uhoraho unsesekaraho, maze arambwira ati «Ngaho babwire uti ’Uhoraho avuze atya: Koko ni ko muvuga, muryango wa Israheli, kandi nzi n’ibitekerezo byanyu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Abo mwica muri uyu mugi bakabije ubwinshi, kimwe n’abo mwararika ku mayira yose." 
Ezekiel11:7 Ni yo mpamvu rero Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Abapfu mwujuje mu mugi ni bo nyama, umugi ukaba inkono; ariko mwebwe nkazawubavanamo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Kubera ko mutinya inkota, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, nzabateza inkota." 
Ezekiel11:9 Nzabavana mu mugi mbagabize ibiganza by’abanyamahanga, maze mbacire urwo mukwiye." 
Ezekiel11:10 Muzashirira ku nkota kandi mbacire urubakwiye ku butaka bwa Israheli nyirizina, maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel11:11 Uyu mugi ntuzigera ubabera inkono, nta n’ubwo muzawubamo inyama, ahubwo nzabacira urubakwiye ku butaka bwa Israheli," 
Ezekiel11:12 bityo muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, mukaba mwaranze gukurikiza amategeko yanjye n’imigenzo yanjye; ahubwo mugakurikiza imigenzereze y’amahanga abakikije.’»" 
Ezekiel11:13 Mu gihe nahanuraga rero, Pelatiyahu mwene Benayahu arapfa. Nuko nitura hasi nubamye, maze ntera hejuru mu ijwi riranguruye nti «Nyagasani Uhoraho, waba se ugiye gutsiratsiza agasigisigi ka Israheli?»" 
Ezekiel11:14 Nuko Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel11:15 «Mwana w’umuntu, abaturage ba Yeruzalemu barabwira buri muntu mu bavandimwe bawe, mu babyeyi bawe n’umuryango wose wa Israheli, bati ’Nimwigumire aho kure y’Uhoraho, iki gihugu ni twebwe cyahaweho umurage.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Ni yo mpamvu itumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga atya: Ni koko nabigije kure yanjye mu mahanga, mbatatanyiriza mu bindi bihugu; ariko no muri ibyo bihugu sinaretse gutura muri mwe nk’igihe nari mu Ngoro yanjye." 
Ezekiel11:17 Nuko rero ubabwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Nzabakorakoranya mbakuye mu mahanga, mbakoranyirize hamwe mbakuye mu bihugu mwatataniyemo, maze mbahe igihugu cya Israheli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Muzakigarukamo, mugitsembemo ibiterashozi byose n’amahano yose." 
Ezekiel11:19 Nzabaha umutima umwe, mbashyiremo umwuka mushya; nzavana mu mubiri wanyu umutima w’ibuye, mbashyiremo umutima wumva," 
Ezekiel11:20 kugira ngo mugendere ku mategeko yanjye n’imigenzo yanjye kandi mubikurikize; maze muzambere umuryango, nanjye mbe Imana yanyu." 
Ezekiel11:21 Naho ab’umutima ukihambiriye ku biterashozi byabo no ku mahano yabo, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, nzabibaryoza nkurikije imyifatire yabo.’»" 
Ezekiel11:22 Nuko abakerubimu bazamura amababa yabo, inziga na zo zijyana na bo n’ikuzo ry’Imana ya Israheli riguma hejuru yabo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Hanyuma ikuzo ry’Uhoraho rihaguruka mu mugi, rihagarara ku musozi wari mu burasirazuba bwawo." 
Ezekiel11:24 Nuko njyanwa n’umwuka kugera mu Bakalideya hafi y’abajyanywe bunyago; ibyo kandi biba mu ibonekerwa no mu mwuka w’Imana, maze ibyo nerekwaga kandi nari mbereye umuhamya birazimira." 
Ezekiel11:25 Hanyuma ntekerereza abari barajyanywe bunyago ibyo Uhoraho yari yanyeretse byose. 
Ezekiel12:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel12:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, utuye mu bantu b’inyoko y’ibirara, bafite amaso yo kureba ariko ntibabone, bakagira n’amatwi yo kumva ariko ntibumve, kuko nyine ari inyoko y’ibirara." 
Ezekiel12:3 None rero, mwana w’umuntu, tegura umutwaro nk’uw’umuntu ujyanywe bunyago, maze ufate inzira ku manywa y’ihangu bose babireba. Uzahaguruke aha hantu uri, ugane ahandi, bose babireba; wenda ahari byazatuma bamenya ko ari inyoko y’ibirara." 
Ezekiel12:4 Uzegeranye ibintu byawe nk’umutwaro w’ujyanywe bunyago, ubigire ku manywa y’ihangu bose babireba, maze uzasohoke ku mugoroba mu maso yabo nk’uko abajyanywe bunyago babigenza." 
Ezekiel12:5 Uzacukure mu rukuta umwenge wo gusohokeramo bose babireba," 
Ezekiel12:6 ushyire umutwaro wawe ku rutugu, usohoke mu kabwibwi bose babireba; ariko kandi uzipfuke mu maso kugira ngo utareba igihugu, kuko nagushyiriyeho kubera umuryango wa Israheli ikimenyetso.»" 
Ezekiel12:7 Nuko ngenza ntyo nkurikije itegeko nahawe: ku manywa y’ihangu negeranya ibintu byanjye nk’umutwaro w’ujyanywe bunyago, nimugoroba ncukura umwenge mu rukuta nkoresheje ikiganza; hanyuma mu kabwibwi ndasohoka n’umutwaro wanjye ku rutugu, bose babireba." 
Ezekiel12:8 Mu gitondo cya kare, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel12:9 «Mwana w’umuntu, umuryango wa Israheli ni inyoko y’ibirara koko! Ntibanarushya bakubaza nibura ngo ’Ibyo ukora ni ibiki?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Noneho ubabwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Uhoraho araburira abatuye i Yeruzalemu n’abo mu muryango wose wa Israheli, aho batuye hose." 
Ezekiel12:11 Unababwire kandi uti ’Mbabereye ikimenyetso; uko nabigenje ni ko namwe bazabagenzereza; bazabatwara babajyane bunyago.’ 
Ezekiel12:12 Uw’igikomangoma uzaba abarimo, azashyira umutwaro we ku bitugu, maze igihe cy’akabwibwi azasohokere mu rukuta aho bazaba bacukuye ngo haboneke inzira, anipfuke mu maso kugira ngo atareba igihugu." 
Ezekiel12:13 Nzamutega umutego awugwemo, hanyuma mujyane i Babiloni mu gihugu cy’Abakalideya. Ntazareba icyo gihugu, ariko ni ho azagwa." 
Ezekiel12:14 Nzakwiza imishwaro abari bamukikije bose; abarinzi be n’ingabo ze maze mbakurikirane nitwaje inkota. 
Ezekiel12:15 Igihe nzaba nabakwije imishwaro mu mahanga, nkanabatatanyiriza mu bihugu bya kure, bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel12:16 Ariko nzareka bamwe muri bo barokoke inkota, inzara n’ibyorezo, kugira ngo bazatekerereze abo mu mahanga bazajyamo amahano yabo yose; bityo na bo bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
Ezekiel12:17 Nuko Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel12:18 «Mwana w’umuntu, uzarya umugati wawe uhinda umushyitsi, n’amazi yawe uyanywe utengurwa kandi ufite ishavu;" 
Ezekiel12:19 maze ubwire abatuye igihugu uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho arabwira abaturage ba Yeruzalemu batuye mu gihugu cya Israheli, ngo bazarya umugati wabo bashavuye, banywe amazi yabo bahinda umushyitsi, kuko igihugu kigiye kurimbuka ntihagire ikigisigaramo, bitewe n’urugomo rw’abagituye bose." 
Ezekiel12:20 Imigi yari ituwe izasenywa, igihugu gihinduke amatongo maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
Ezekiel12:21 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel12:22 «Mwana w’umuntu, mushaka kuvuga iki iyo muca uyu mugani mu gihugu cya Israheli ngo: Ibihe birahita, ibindi bigataha, ariko nta bonekerwa na rimwe ryujujwe?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Ahubwo ndetse ubabwire uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Sinzongera kureka baca uwo mugani, ntuzasubirwamo ukundi mu gihugu cya Israheli.’ Ariko kandi unababwire uti ’Igihe kiregereje, maze ibonekerwa iryo ari ryo ryose ryuzuzwe." 
Ezekiel12:24 Ntihazongera kubaho ukundi amabonekerwa y’amafuti, cyangwa impanuro z’ibinyoma mu muryango wa Israheli," 
Ezekiel12:25 kuko jyewe Uhoraho ibyo mvuze byose birangira bidatinze. Igihe mukiriho, mwa nyoko y’ibirara mweuwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ijambo nzaba navuze nzaryuzuza.’»" 
Ezekiel12:26 Nuko Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel12:27 «Mwana w’umuntu, dore umuryango wa Israheli uriho uravuga ngo: Ibyo uriya muntu abona nta bwo ari ibya vuba, arahanura ibizaba bitinze mu bihe bizaza." 
Ezekiel12:28 None rero, babwire uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Nta jambo ryanjye rizongera gutinda — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kuko iryo mvuze rizataha.’»" 
Ezekiel13:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel13:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hanura ibyerekeye abahanuzi ba Israheli bahanura ibinyoma, ubwire abahanura bavuga ibyo bitekerereje ubwabo, uti ’Nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:3 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo biyimbire, abo bahanuzi b’ibipfamutima bakurikiza ibitekerezo byabo bwite, kandi nta cyo beretswe!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Israheli we, abo bahanuzi bawe bameze nk’ingunzu zangara mu matongo!" 
Ezekiel13:5 Ntimurakazamuka ngo muzibe ibyuho, cyangwa se ngo mwubake inkike y’urugo rw’umuryango wa Israheli, kugira ngo nibura uzabe ukomeye igihe cy’intambara y’umunsi w’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:6 Mwitwaje amabonekerwa y’amafuti n’impanuro z’ibinyoma, munagerekaho ngo: Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, kandi atari Uhoraho wabatumye, ndetse mukanizera ko Uhoraho azarangiza ijambo ryabo." 
Ezekiel13:7 Mbese ye, ntibyaba ari ukuri mvuze ko amabonekerwa yanyu ari amafuti, n’impanuro mutanga zikaba ibinyoma, igihe muvuga ngo: Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, kandi jye nta cyo navuze?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Dore noneho rero uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Kubera amagambo yanyu y’amafuti n’amabonekerwa yanyu y’ibinyoma, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, kuva ubu ngiye kubibasira." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ikiganza cyanjye kizibasira abo bahanuzi b’amabonekerwa y’amafuti n’inyigisho z’ibinyoma; ntibazakirwa mu nama y’umuryango wanjye, ntibazandikwa mu gitabo cy’umuryango wa Israheli, yewe ntibazinjira no mu gihugu cya Israheli; bityo muzamenye ko ndi Nyagasani Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:10 Koko rero, bayobeje umuryango wanjye bavuga ngo: Ni amahoro, kandi ari nta yo. Irebere nawe, iyo hagize uwubaka inkike, bayihoma by’urwiyerurutso!" 
Ezekiel13:11 Ubwire rero abo bahoma inkike by’urwiyerurutso, ko hagiye kugwa imvura y’umurindi, urubura rukisuka n’umuyaga w’inkubi ugahuhera," 
Ezekiel13:12 maze bigahirika iyo nkike. Ubwo se ntibazabaza bati ’Ya sima mwari mwarahomesheje inkike iri ahajya he?’ 
Ezekiel13:13 Nuko rero Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Kubera umujinya mfite ngiye guhindisha umuyaga w’inkubi, mu burakari bwanjye ngushe imvura y’umurindi, no mu bukana bwanjye ngushe urubura rukomeye rurimbure iyo nkike." 
Ezekiel13:14 Nzasenya iyo nkike mwahomye mwiyerurutsa, nyihirike, maze imfatiro zayo zisigarire aho. Izahirima, namwe mushirire mu nsi yayo, bityo muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:15 Igihe umujinya wanjye nzaba nywumariye ku nkike no ku bayihomye biyerurutsa — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nzababwira nti ’Inkike ntikiriho kimwe n’abayihomye by’urwiyerurutso," 
Ezekiel13:16 ari na bo bahanuzi bahanuriraga Yeruzalemu, bakanayigirira amabonekerwa y’amahoro kandi ari nta yo.’»" 
Ezekiel13:17 Naho rero wowe, mwana w’umuntu, rebana igitsure abakobwa b’umuryango wawe bahanura bavuga ibyo bitekerereje ubwabo, maze uhanure ibiberekeyeho." 
Ezekiel13:18 Uzababwire uti «Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo biyimbire abo bagore badoda ibipfuko byo ku bikonjo, bakaboha ibitambaro byo gupfuka imitwe y’abantu b’ikigero icyo ari cyo cyose, kugira ngo babonereho uburyo bwo kubayobya! Murayobya se abantu bo mu muryango wanjye, ngo mukunde mukize ubugingo bwanyu bwite?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Muransuzuguza imbere y’umuryango wanjye, kubera amashyi y’ingano za bushoki n’utumanyu tw’umugati muhabwa; mwicisha abantu batagombaga gupfa, mukareka abatagomba kubaho; byongeye kandi mukabeshya umuryango wanjye wumva ibinyoma byanyu." 
Ezekiel13:20 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ngiye kwibasira ibyo bipfuko byanyu mushukisha abantu mubatega imitego boshye inyoni. Nzabishwanyaguriza ku maboko yanyu, mbaryoze abantu mwagerageje gufatira mu mutego nk’inyoni." 
Ezekiel13:21 Nzashwanyaguza ibitambaro byanyu byo mu mitwe, maze mvane umuryango wanjye mu biganza byanyu; kugira ngo mutazongera kubahiga ukundi boshye inyamaswa, bityo muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:22 Ku mpamvu y’ibinyoma byanyu byaciye intege umutima w’intungane, kandi jyewe ntarigeze mbimugirira, kuko mushyigikira abagome ngo batareka imyifatire mibi yabo bakongera kubaho;" 
Ezekiel13:23 ntimuzongera kubona ukundi ayo mabonekerwa y’amafuti cyangwa ngo mwongere kwigisha ibinyoma. Nzavana umuryango wanjye mu biganza byanyu, maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.»" 
Ezekiel14:1 Ubwo bamwe mu bakuru b’umuryango baransanga maze bicara imbere yanjye. 
Ezekiel14:2 Nuko Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel14:3 «Mwana w’umuntu, abo bantu bahindanyije umutima wabo bayoboka ibigirwamana; mbese rwose ibibatera gucumura ni byo bashyize imbere. Birakwiye se ko bagira icyo bambaza?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Ngaho rero vugana na bo maze ubabwire uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Umuntu uwo ari we wese wo mu muryango wa Israheli wanduza umutima we ayoboka ibigirwamana, cyangwa agashyira imbere ibimutera gucumura hanyuma agasanga umuhanuzi; uwo ni jye ubwanjye Uhoraho uzamwisubiriza. Naramuka aje nzamwisubiriza nkurikije ubwinshi bw’ibigirwamana bye," 
Ezekiel14:5 kugira ngo mbashe gushyikira bundi bushya umutima w’umuryango wanjye Israheli, kuko bose uko bangana banyimuye babitewe n’ibyo bigirwamana.’" 
Ezekiel14:6 Kubera iyo mpamvu, ubwire umuryango wa Israheli, uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Nimungarukire, nimuhinduke muzinukwe ibigirwamana byanyu, mwirengagize ayo mahano yose." 
Ezekiel14:7 Umuntu wese wo mu muryango wa Israheli, cyangwa se umunyamahanga ubarimo, naramuka anyimuye kugira ngo abone uko ahindanya umutima we, ashyire imbere ibimutera gucumura, hanyuma agahindukira agasanga umuhanuzi yitwaje kugira icyo amubaza, uwo ni jye ubwanjye Uhoraho uzamwisubiriza." 
Ezekiel14:8 Nzamwirengagiza mugire akarorero n’iciro ry’imigani, nzamuca mu muryango wanjye maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel14:9 Niba kandi umuhanuzi yemeye gushukwa akagira ijambo avuga, ni jye Uhoraho uzaba mbimuteye. Nzamwibasira n’ikiganza cyanjye, murimbure ave mu muryango wa Israheli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Bazahanirwa ibyaha byabo; igicumuro cy’umuhanuzi kizaba kimwe n’icy’umuhanuzaho," 
Ezekiel14:11 bityo umuryango wa Israheli ntuzongera kwitandukanya nanjye, cyangwa ngo wongere kwiyandurisha ibicumuro byawo byose. Bazambera umuryango, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, nanjye nzabe Imana yabo.’»" 
Ezekiel14:12 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel14:13 «Mwana w’umuntu, igihugu kiramutse gicumuye kikampemukira, nkakiramburiraho ikiganza cyanjye ngasenya ibigega byacyo by’imigati, nkagiteza inzara kugira ngo ngitsembemo abantu n’amatungo," 
Ezekiel14:14 n’aho icyo gihugu cyabamo aba bantu batatu: Nowa, Daneli na Yobu, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, abo batatu bonyine bakiza ubugingo bwabo babikesheje ubutungane bwabo bwite." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ndamutse nteje ibikoko by’inkazi muri icyo gihugu kugira ngo bibamare ku bana, bicyangize kandi bigihindure amatongo, ku buryo nta muntu n’umwe waba agitinyuka kuhanyura kubera ibyo bikoko," 
Ezekiel14:16 n’aho icyo gihugu cyabamo abo bantu batatu, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye ko batazashobora gukiza abahungu babo cyangwa abakobwa babo; bazarokoka bonyine ariko igihugu gihinduke amatongo." 
Ezekiel14:17 Cyangwa se icyo gihugu ndamutse ngiteje inkota, nkavuga nti ’Inkota ninyure mu gihugu kugira ngo ngitsembemo abantu n’amatungo’," 
Ezekiel14:18 n’aho abo bantu batatu baba muri icyo gihugu, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye ko batazashobora gukiza abahungu babo cyangwa abakobwa babo; ni bo bonyine bazarokoka." 
Ezekiel14:19 Ndamutse na none nteje ibyorezo muri icyo gihugu, mu burakari bwanjye nkamena amaraso ntsemba abantu n’amatungo," 
Ezekiel14:20 n’aho Nowa, Daneli na Yobu baba muri icyo gihugu, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye ko batazashobora gukiza umuhungu wabo cyangwa umukobwa wabo; ahubwo bazakiza ubugingo bwabo babikesheje ubutungane bwabo bwite." 
Ezekiel14:21 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «N’ubwo Yeruzalemu nayiteje ibi byago bine bikomeye: inkota, inzara, ibikoko by’inkazi n’ibyorezo, nkayitsembamo abantu n’amatungo," 
Ezekiel14:22 nyamara abarokotse baracyariho, ngabo abahungu n’abakobwa barasohotse bavuye mu mugi babasanga, kugira ngo nimubona imyifatire yabo n’ibikorwa byabo, mushire intimba mwatewe n’ibyago byose nateje Yeruzalemu." 
Ezekiel14:23 Nuko rero, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, bazabamara intimba nimubona imyifatire yabo n’ibikorwa byabo, maze muzamenye ko ibyo nakoreye Yeruzalemu byose bitabaye impfabusa.»" 
Ezekiel15:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel15:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, igiti cy’umuzabibu kirusha iki ibindi biti byose? Amashami yacyo arusha iki andi y’ibiti byo mu ishyamba?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Bashobora se kugira icyo bagikoramo? Hari uwakibazamo se akantu ko kumanikaho ibikoresho? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ngaha rero bakijugunye mu muriro ngo gishye, gikongoke: kiramutse se gihiye imitwe yombi ndetse n’igihimba kigakongoka, hari icyo se cyaba kikimaze?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Mbere y’uko bagitwika, nta cyo cyari kimaze; none dore umuriro wagitwitse cyakongotse. Hari icyo se kikimaze?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Ni yo mpamvu Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati ’Uko nagenjereje umuzabibu mu bindi biti byo mu ishyamba, nkawujugunya mu muriro ngo ushye, ukongoke, ni ko nzagenzereza n’abaturage b’i Yeruzalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Naraboroheye bibwira ko barokotse umuriro, nyamara undi muriro uzabatwika; maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, igihe nzaba nabazinutswe." 
Ezekiel15:8 Igihugu nzagihindura amatongo, kuko bambereye abahemu. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.’»" 
Ezekiel16:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel16:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, menyesha Yeruzalemu amahano yose yakoze." 
Ezekiel16:3 Uzavuge uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho abwira Yeruzalemu: Inkomoko yawe n’amavukiro yawe ni igihugu cya Kanahani; so yari Umuhemori, na nyoko ari Umuhetikazi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Umunsi uvuka ntibakugenye, ntibakuhagije amazi ngo bagusukure, ntibagusize umunyu habe no kwirirwa bagufubika n’udutambaro." 
Ezekiel16:5 Nta n’umwe wigeze akurebana impuhwe, ngo abe yagukorera umwe muri iyo mirimo abitewe n’imbabazi akugiriye; ahubwo wajugunywe mu gasozi, kuko umunsi uvutse wari uteye ishozi." 
Ezekiel16:6 Nanyuze hafi yawe, nkubona wigaragura mu maraso yawe, ariko n’ubwo wari ukigaragura mu maraso yawe bwose, ndakubwira nti ’Baho.’" 
Ezekiel16:7 Ubwo ndagukuza nk’icyatsi mu murima; uriyongera, uragimbuka, ugera aho uba inkumi nziza; upfundura amabere, umusatsi wawe urakura uba mwinshi, ariko ubwo wari ucyambaye ubusa." 
Ezekiel16:8 Nza kunyura hafi yawe ndakubona nsanga ugeze mu gihe cyo kubengukwa, ngufubika igishura cyanjye, ndakwambika. Nakurahiye ko ntazaguhe — mukira, tugirana isezerano — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — maze uba uwanjye." 
Ezekiel16:9 Nagushyize mu mazi nkuhagira amaraso yari akuzuyeho maze ngusiga amavuta; 
Ezekiel16:10 nkwambika imyenda itatse amabara yose n’inkweto z’uruhu runogereye, ngukenyeza umwenda w’ihariri ngerekaho n’igishura cy’akataraboneka." 
Ezekiel16:11 Nagusesuyeho imitamirizo, nkwambika imiringa ku maboko n’urunigi mu ijosi." 
Ezekiel16:12 Nashyize impeta ku zuru ryawe n’amaherena ku matwi yawe, nkwambika ikamba ritagira uko risa ku mutwe wawe." 
Ezekiel16:13 Wari wisesuyeho imitamirizo ya zahabu n’umuringa, wambaye imyenda y’ihariri y’akataraboneka n’indi itatse amabara yose, ugatungwa n’ifu y’inono, ubuki n’amavuta; bityo ugenda urushaho kugira uburanga maze umera nk’umwamikazi." 
Ezekiel16:14 Uburanga bwawe bwatumye wamamara mu mahanga kuko butagiraga amakemwa, wabukomoraga ku ikuzo ryanjye ribengerana; uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel16:15 Nyamara wiringiye uburanga bwawe, wishingikiriza ubwamamare bwawe ujya mu buraya; usambana n’abahisi n’abagenzi." 
Ezekiel16:16 Wahisemo imyenda y’amabara meza uyitakisha ahantu hirengeye, aho nyine wigiriye indaya; ukora ibintu bitigeze kubaho kandi bitazongera no kubaho ukundi." 
Ezekiel16:17 Wafashe imitamirizo ya zahabu n’iya feza nari naguhaye, uyikoramo amashusho y’ibigirwamana by’abagabo usambana na byo;" 
Ezekiel16:18 ufata imyenda yawe itatse amabara uyitwikiriza ayo mashusho, maze uyatura amavuta yanjye n’ububani bwanjye." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ndetse n’umugati naguhaye, ifu y’inono, amavuta n’ubuki nagutungishaga, ni byo watuyeho igitambo cyo kugusha neza ayo mashusho yawe." 
Ezekiel16:20 Byongeye kandi, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, byageze n’aho ufata abahungu bawe n’abakobwa bawe wari waribyariye, ubatura ibyo bigirwamana. Ni ko se ye, urabona ubwo buraya bwawe bwonyine butari buhagije?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Wishe abahungu banjye urabatanga ubatura ayo mashusho yawe; 
Ezekiel16:22 kandi muri ayo mahano yose n’ubwo buraya, nturakibuka ya minsi y’ubuto bwawe, igihe wari utumbuje wigaragura mu maraso yawe." 
Ezekiel16:23 Ariko noneho wiyimbire, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, uriyimbire nyuma y’ubwo bugome bwose!" 
Ezekiel16:24 Wiyubakiye amazu ahirengeye, wiyubakishiriza isengero ahantu hose abantu bakunda gukoranira." 
Ezekiel16:25 Muri buri mayirabiri wahubatse inzu yo guhindanyirizamo uburanga bwawe wiha umuhisi n’umugenzi, bityo ukagwiza ubwo buraya bwawe." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wigize indaya y’Abanyamisiri, ari bo baturanyi bawe b’abanyamaboko, ugwiza uburaya bwawe ari ukugira ngo undakaze." 
Ezekiel16:27 None rero, dore nkuramburiyeho ikiganza cyanjye, ibyagutungaga ndabigabanyije. Nkweguriye abanzi bawe, ari bo bakobwa b’Abafilisiti bakugenze uko bashaka, kuko na bo ubwabo batewe isoni n’imyifatire yawe." 
Ezekiel16:28 Byongeye kandi kubera ko utigeze unyurwa, wigize indaya y’Abanyashuru. Ni koko, wigize indaya yabo, ariko ntiwanyurwa." 
Ezekiel16:29 Wagwirije uburaya bwawe no mu bacuruzi bo mu gihugu cy’Abakalideya, ariko na none ntiwanyurwa." 
Ezekiel16:30 Mbega ukuntu uba ufite umutima utari hamwe, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, iyo uhihibikana mu mirimo y’uburaya!" 
Ezekiel16:31 Igihe wiyubakiraga amazu muri buri mayirabiri, wiyubakishiriza isengero ahantu hose abantu bakunda gukoranira; muri ibyo bikorwa byose kandi ukanga ko baguhonga nk’izindi ndaya!" 
Ezekiel16:32 Umugore w’umusambanyi yigabiza ab’imuhana mu kigwi cy’umugabo we. 
Ezekiel16:33 Ubundi indaya zose barazihonga; ariko wowe uhonga ubwawe abakunzi bawe bose, ukabaha amaturo ugira ngo baturuke impande zose, bahururiye uburaya bwawe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Wowe rero, uburaya bwawe bunyuranye n’ubw’abandi bagore: nta n’umwe mu bakunzi bawe wigeze akwiruka inyuma; ahubwo ni wowe ubwawe ubahonga naho bo ntibagire icyo baguha, akaba ari na yo mpamvu uburaya bwawe bunyuranye n’ubw’abandi." 
Ezekiel16:35 None rero wa ndaya we, tega amatwi ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel16:36 Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Kubera ko wiyambitse ubusa, ukagaragaza ubwambure bwawe mu buraya bwawe hamwe n’abakunzi bawe, kimwe n’amahano yose akabije wuhiye amaraso y’abahungu bawe," 
Ezekiel16:37 ngiye kugukoranyirizaho abakunzi bawe bakunyuze, abo wakunze bose ndetse n’abo wanze, nkwambike ubusa imbere yabo babone ubwambure bwawe bwose uko bwakabaye." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ngiye kuguha igihano gikwiriye abagore b’abasambanyi kandi bamena amaraso, nkugabize uburakari n’ishyari byanjye." 
Ezekiel16:39 Nzabakugabiza barimbure ayo mazu yawe n’insengero wubakishije ahirengeye, bagucuze imyambaro kandi bakwambure n’imitako yawe; bagusige uri umutumbuze." 
Ezekiel16:40 Ibyo nibirangira, bazaguteza rubanda bagutere amabuye kandi bagushwanyaguze n’inkota," 
Ezekiel16:41 bazatwika amazu yawe, bagucire urugukwiye mu maso y’abagore batabarika; bityo uherukire aho kugira uwo uhonga kandi ntsembe ntyo uburaya bwawe." 
Ezekiel16:42 Nzakurangirizaho uburakari bwanjye, mperukire aho kukugirira ishyari, nzacururuka ubutazongera kukurakarira ukundi." 
Ezekiel16:43 Kubera ko utibutse iminsi y’ubuto bwawe, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, ahubwo ukanyanga ukora ibyo bibi byose; nanjye ngiye kukugerekaho ingaruka z’iyo myifatire yawe. Ni ko se ye, ayo mahano yose wakoze urabona atarengeje urugero?" 
Ezekiel16:44 Dore nawe ba gacamigani bose barakurenguriraho, bagira bati ’Umukobwa ni uwa nyina.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Koko rero, uri uwa nyoko wanze umugabo we n’abana be, kandi nta ho utaniye n’abandi bakobwa muva inda imwe, banze abagabo babo n’abana babo. Nyoko yari Umuhetikazi, naho so akaba Umuhemori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Mukuru wawe w’uburiza ni Samariya, utuye ibumoso bwawe n’abakobwa be; murumuna wawe w’umuhererezi akaba Sodoma, utuye iburyo bwawe n’abakobwa be." 
Ezekiel16:47 Nta bwo wiganye imyifatire yabo cyangwa se ngo ukore amahano nk’ayabo byonyine, ahubwo wowe mu migenzereze yawe yose wabatambukije ububi." 
Ezekiel16:48 Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, ko Sodoma murumuna wawe n’abakobwa be batagejeje ahawe n’abakobwa bawe." 
Ezekiel16:49 Igicumuro cya Sodoma murumuna wawe ni ubwirasi, ubusambo no kutagira icyo yitaho; ngibyo ibicumuro bya Sodoma n’abakobwa be. Ntibigeze batabara umukene n’umunyabyago," 
Ezekiel16:50 bigize abibone kandi bakorera amahano imbere yanjye, ni yo mpamvu na bo nabatsembye nk’uko wabyiboneye." 
Ezekiel16:51 Naho Samariya we ntiyigeze akora na kimwe cya kabiri cy’ibyaha byawe. Wagwije amahano kubarusha, uko gukabya kwawe gutuma abavandimwe bawe basa n’intungane, ugereranyije n’amahano yose wakoze." 
Ezekiel16:52 Wowe rero, ukorwe n’isoni z’ibyaha wakoze byatumye abavandimwe bawe basa n’indacumura iruhande rwawe. Ukomeze ugire isoni kandi ukorwe n’ikimwaro, kuko watumye abavandimwe bawe basa n’intungane." 
Ezekiel16:53 Ngiye kubakomorera: nzakomorera Sodoma n’abakobwa be kimwe na Samariya n’abakobwa be, hanyuma nawe ndetse nzagusubize umwanya wawe rwagati muri bo," 
Ezekiel16:54 kugira ngo ukorwe n’ikimwaro kandi uterwe isoni n’ibyo wakoze byose, bikaba byarabaviriyemo guhumurizwa." 
Ezekiel16:55 Abavandimwe bawe, Sodoma n’abakobwa be bazongera kumera nka kera, Samariya n’abakobwa be na bo bazongera kumera nka mbere, nawe n’abakobwa bawe mwongere kumera uko mwahoze kera." 
Ezekiel16:56 Sodoma, murumuna wawe, harya si we wataramanaga igihe wari ukiri mu bwibone," 
Ezekiel16:57 ibikorwa bibi byawe bitaragaragara? None dore abakobwa ba Edomu baguhinduye urw’amenyo kimwe n’abandi bo mu bihugu bigukikije; ndetse n’Abafilisitikazi baragushungera baguturutse impande zose. 
Ezekiel16:58 Ubupfamutima bwawe n’amahano wakoze, ni wowe bishengura, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel16:59 Nuko rero, Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Nzakugenzereza nk’uko wangenje, wowe warenze ku ndahiro ukageza n’aho wica amasezerano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Nyamara jyewe nzibuka Isezerano nagiranye nawe igihe cy’ubuto bwawe, maze nzagushyirireho Isezerano rihoraho." 
Ezekiel16:61 Bityo nawe uzibuka imyifatire yawe maze ukorwe n’isoni igihe uzaba wakira abavandimwe bawe, bakuru bawe na barumuna bawe, ubwo nzaba nabaguhayeho abakobwa, ariko kandi nta ruhare bazaba bafite ku isezerano ryawe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Nzakomeza Isezerano ryanjye nawe maze uzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho," 
Ezekiel16:63 ubonereho no kwibuka kandi ukorwe n’isoni; muri uko kumwara kwawe woye kongera kubumbura umunwa, igihe nzaba nakubabariye ibyo wakoze byose, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.’»" 
Ezekiel17:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel17:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, sakuza n’umuryango wa Israheli kandi uwucire n’umugani." 
Ezekiel17:3 Ubabwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Kagoma nini cyane, ifite amababa manini kandi maremare, ikagira n’ubwoya bwinshi bw’amabara anyuranye yaje muri Libani, itwara ishami ryo mu bushorishori bw’isederi." 
Ezekiel17:4 Yaciye ishami risumba ayandi, irijyana mu gihugu cy’abacuruzi, maze irishyira mu mugi wabo." 
Ezekiel17:5 Hanyuma ijyana urugemwe mu mbuto z’igihugu, irutera mu murima uhinze neza hafi y’umugezi w’amazi menshi, irusiga ku nkombe nk’igiti gikunda ubukonje." 
Ezekiel17:6 Urugemwe rurakura, ruhinduka umuzabibu urumbuka kandi w’uburebure buringaniye, ugaba amashami yawo uyerekeje kuri ya kagoma, imizi yawo uyishora mu nsi yayo. Nuko uba umuzabibu nyakuri, ushamikaho amashami, na yo arakomera." 
Ezekiel17:7 Nyamara hariho n’indi kagoma, ikagira amababa manini cyane n’ubwoya bwinshi. Nuko uwo muzabibu ushora imizi mu nsi yayo, ugaba n’amashami yawo uhereye ku iyogi wari uteyemo, uyerekeza kuri iyo kagoma, kugira ngo iwuvomerere." 
Ezekiel17:8 Wari uteye mu murima urumbuka cyane ku nkombe y’umugezi w’amazi menshi, kugira ngo ushobore kugaba amashami were n’imbuto, kandi ube n’umuzabibu utagira uko usa.’" 
Ezekiel17:9 Babwire uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Mbese aho uwo muzabibu uzakura ube mwiza? Aho iyo kagoma ntizarandura imizi yawo, ikawushikuzaho n’imbuto, ku buryo amashami yose yameraga yuma, ntihabe hagikenewe umunyamaboko, cyangwa imbaga y’abantu, kugira ngo bawurandurane n’imizi?" 
Ezekiel17:10 Guterwa ko ngaha uratewe, ariko se uzakura ube mwiza? Umuyaga w’iburasirazuba se wo nuhindura, ntuzawumisha? Ibyo ni koko, uzumira ku iyogi aho wamereye.’»" 
Ezekiel17:11 Nuko Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel17:12 «Baza iyo nyoko y’ibirara uti ’Mbese ntimuzi icyo uwo mugani usobanura?» Hanyuma ubabwire uti «Dore umwami w’i Babiloni yaje i Yeruzalemu, ahanyaga umwami n’ibikomangoma maze abajyana iwe i Babiloni." 
Ezekiel17:13 Afata umuntu wo mu muryango w’umwami agirana na we isezerano, aranamurahiza. Hanyuma anyaga n’abakomeye bo mu gihugu," 
Ezekiel17:14 kugira ngo ubutegetsi budakomera bukanabyutsa umutwe, ahubwo ngo babe indahemuka ku masezerano ye kandi bayakomereho." 
Ezekiel17:15 Ariko uwo muntu yaje kumugomera, yohereza intumwa mu gihugu cya Misiri ngo bamwoherereze amafarasi n’igitero cy’abantu benshi. Ibyo se ariko bizamuhira? Uwakoze ibyo se, aho we azarokoka? Azabasha se kurokoka kandi yarishe isezerano?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, azagwa i Babiloni mu gihugu cy’umwami wari wamwimitse akaba yarahinyuye indahiro ye, akica n’amasezerano ye." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ariko rero, n’ubwo Farawo yagira ingabo zikomeye n’ibitero by’abantu benshi ntazashobora kumukirisha intambara, igihe abandi bazaba bamaze kurunda imigina y’ibitaka ngo buririreho, no kubaka inkike ngo barimbure abantu benshi." 
Ezekiel17:18 Yahinyuye indahiro, yica amasezerano kandi yari yabyiyemeje, abirengaho akora ibyo byose; ntateze rero kubirokoka." 
Ezekiel17:19 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati ’Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye, nzamuryoza indahiro yanjye yahinyuye n’Isezerano ryanjye yishe." 
Ezekiel17:20 Nzamutega umutego azawugwemo, mujyane i Babiloni maze muhanireyo kubera ko yampemukiye." 
Ezekiel17:21 Ab’ingenzi mu ngabo ze bose bazicwa n’inkota, abacitse ku icumu bakwirwe imishwaro; maze muzamenye ko ari jyewe Uhoraho wabivuze.’" 
Ezekiel17:22 Dore Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Nanjye nzafata ishami ryo mu bushorishori bw’isederi nini, mu mashami yo hejuru cyane nzacemo rimwe ritoshye, maze nditere jye ubwanjye ku musozi muremure kandi wirengeye." 
Ezekiel17:23 Nzaritera ku musozi muremure wa Israheli, na ryo rizakure rigabe amashami, rizere imbuto kandi ribe isederi itagira uko isa. Inyoni z’amoko yose zizayarikamo, ibisiga by’amoko yose bizugame mu mashami yayo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Bityo ibiti byose byo mu gasozi bizamenye ko ari jye, Uhoraho ucisha bugufi igiti kirekire, ngashyira ejuru ikigufiya, ngatuma igiti gitoshye cyuma, n’icyumye gitoha. Ni jye Uhoraho ubivuze kandi nzabikora.’»" 
Ezekiel18:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel18:2 «Ni iki gituma mu gihugu cya Israheli muca uyu mugani uvuga ngo: ’Ababyeyi bariye imizabibu idahishije, none amenyo y’abana babo yaramunzwe ’?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjyeuwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuzeuwo mugani ntimuzongera kuwuca ukundi muri Israheli," 
Ezekiel18:4 kuko ubugingo bwose ari ubwanjye; ari ubw’umubyeyi cyangwa se ubw’umwana, bwose ni ubwanjye." 
Ezekiel18:5 Niba umuntu ari intungane, agakora ibitunganye kandi agakurikiza ubutabera," 
Ezekiel18:6 ntarire ku misozi kandi ntiyubure amaso ngo arebe ibigirwamana by’umuryango wa Israheli, ntagundire umugore wa mugenzi we, ntiyegere umugore uhumanye," 
Ezekiel18:7 ntagire umuntu akandamiza, agasubiza ingwate umubereyemo umwenda, ntagire uburiganya, umushonji akamuha umugati kandi akambika uwambaye ubusa," 
Ezekiel18:8 ntagurize yishakira inyungu, ntiyake urwunguko rurengeje urugero, ntagire uwo arenganya, ahubwo agacira abantu urubanza rutabera," 
Ezekiel18:9 agakora akurikije amategeko yanjye n’amabwiriza yanjye nta buryarya — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — uwo muntu ni intungane koko kandi azabaho. 
Ezekiel18:10 Ariko niba uwo muntu abyaye umwana w’umugome kandi umena amaraso, agakora kimwe muri ibyo bicumuro," 
Ezekiel18:11 nyamara we nta na kimwe yigeze akora muri byo, ariko uwo mwana we akageza aho kurira ku misozi no kugundira umugore wa mugenzi we," 
Ezekiel18:12 agakandamiza umukene n’umunyabyago, akagira uburyarya, ntasubize ingwate umwishyuye umwenda, akubura amaso akareba ibigirwamana, agakora amahano," 
Ezekiel18:13 akaguriza yishakira inyungu kandi agasaba urwunguko rurengeje urugero, uwo mwana se azabaho? Ntateze kubaho! Namara gukora ayo mahano yose azapfa kandi amaraso ye ni we azabarwaho." 
Ezekiel18:14 Nyamara niba uwo mugome abyaye umwana, akareba ibyaha se yakoze ariko ntabikurikize," 
Ezekiel18:15 ntarire ku misozi, ntiyubure amaso ngo arebe ibigirwamana by’umuryango wa Israheli, ntagundire umugore wa mugenzi we," 
Ezekiel18:16 ntagire umuntu akandamiza, agasubiza ingwate umwishyuye umwenda, ntagire uburiganya, umushonji akamuha umugati kandi akambika uwambaye ubusa," 
Ezekiel18:17 ntagire uwo arenganya, ntagurize kubera kuronka inyungu cyangwa ngo yake urwunguko rurengeje urugero, agakora akurikije amabwiriza yanjye n’amategeko yanjye, uwo mwana nta bwo azapfa azira ibicumuro bya se, ahubwo azabaho." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ariko kubera ko se yabaye umugome, akariganya kandi agakorera ibidatunganye rwagati mu muryango we, azapfa azira ibicumuro bye bwite." 
Ezekiel18:19 Byongeye kandi muravuga muti ’Umwana yabuzwa n’iki kuzira ibicumuro bya se!’ Nyamara rero, niba umwana yarakoze ibitunganye kandi agakurikiza ubutabera, yarubahirije amategeko yanjye akanayakurikiza, agomba kubaho." 
Ezekiel18:20 Uwacumuye ni we uzapfa. Umwana ntazazira ibicumuro bya se cyangwa ngo umubyeyi azire ibicumuro by’umwana we; intungane izahemberwa ubutungane bwayo, n’umugiranabi ahanirwe ubugiranabi bwe." 
Ezekiel18:21 Umugiranabi naramuka yanze ibyaha byose yakoze, akubahiriza amategeko yanjye, agakora ibitunganye kandi agakurikiza ubutabera, azabaho nta bwo azapfa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ibicumuro bye ntibizibukwa ukundi; azabaho abikesheje ko yakurikije ubutabera. 
Ezekiel18:23 Mbese nakwishimira nte urupfu rw’umunyabyaha, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, ahubwo nakwishimiye ko yahinduye imyifatire ye maze akabaho?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Ariko se niba uwari intungane aretse ubutungane bwe, agakora icyaha akurikiza amahano yose umugiranabi akora, ubwo se murabona yazabaho? Ntibazibuka ukundi ko yakurikizaga ubutabera, ahubwo kubera ubuhemu bwe n’ibyaha yakoze, azapfa." 
Ezekiel18:25 Muravuga kandi muti ’Imigenzereze ya Nyagasani ntitunganye.’ Tega amatwi rero, muryango wa Israheli: mbese koko imigenzereze yanjye yaba ari yo idatunganye? Cyangwa se imigenzereze yanyu ni yo idatunganye?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Niba uwari intungane aramutse aretse ubutungane bwe agacumura maze agapfa, azaba azize ibyaha yakoze." 
Ezekiel18:27 Ariko niba umunyabyaha yanze ibyaha yakoraga, kugira ngo akore ibitunganye kandi akurikize ubutabera, aba arengeye ubugingo bwe." 
Ezekiel18:28 Niba yanze ibicumuro bye byose, nta bwo azapfa, ahubwo azabaho." 
Ezekiel18:29 Nyamara umuryango wa Israheli uravuga uti ’Imigenzereze ya Nyagasani ntitunganye.’ Ni ko se, muryango wa Israheli, koko imigenzereze yanjye yaba ari yo idatunganye? Cyangwa se imigenzereze yanyu ni yo idatunganye?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Ni cyo gitumye rero, muryango wa Israheli — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — nzacira buri muntu urubanza nkurikije imigenzereze ye. Nimuhinduke mwange ibyaha byanyu byose, icyababera impamvu yo gucumura cyose mukirinde." 
Ezekiel18:31 Nimuzibukire ibyaha byose mwakoze, maze mwirememo umutima mushya n’umwuka mushya. Ni ko se, muryango wa Israheli, ni iki rwose cyatuma mugomba gupfa?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Nta bwo nishimira urupfu rw’umuntu uwo ari we wese, nimuhinduke maze mubeho! Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel19:1 Naho wowe rero, uririmbe indirimbo y’amaganya atewe n’ibikomangoma bya Israheli." 
Ezekiel19:2 Uzavuge uti «Nyoko yari nde? Yari intare y’ingore mu zindi ntare, ikiryamira hagati y’ibyana byayo, ikanabyonsa." 
Ezekiel19:3 Nuko irera kimwe mu byana byayo kiba intare y’igisore, kimenya guhiga ndetse no kurya abantu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Abanyamahanga baza kumenya iby’iyo ntare, barayitega maze igwa mu mutego wabo, bayikururisha inkonzo bayijyana mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Ezekiel19:5 Nyina irategereza iraheba, isanze nta cyizere igifite, ni ko gufata ikindi mu byana byayo, irakirera na cyo kiba igisore." 
Ezekiel19:6 Kikazerera mu zindi ntare, na cyo gihinduka koko intare y’igisore, kimenya guhiga ndetse no kurya abantu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Nuko irimbura ingoro z’abantu, isenya n’imigi yabo, igihugu n’abagituye bakuka umutima, kubera urusaku rw’umutontomo wayo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Abanyamahanga bahegereye, baturuka mu bihugu byabo baje kuyirwanya, barayitega maze igwa mu mutego wabo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Bayikuruza inkonzo bayishyira mu rudandi, bayishyikiriza umwami w’i Babiloni ayifungira mu buvumo, kugira ngo umutontomo wayo utazongera kumvikana mu misozi ya Israheli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Byongeye kandi, nyoko yari ameze nk’umuzabibu watewe ku nkengero y’amazi. Wararumbukaga kandi ukagira amababi menshi, ubikesha ko wabonaga amazi ahagije," 
Ezekiel19:11 ukagira amashami akomeye, avamo inkoni z’abami, uburebure bwawo bugera rwagati mu bicu, bugatangarirwa kimwe n’ubwinshi bw’amashami yawo." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ariko waranduranye uburakari bawutura hasi, umuyaga w’iburasirazuba wumisha imbuto zawo, igihimba cyawo gikomeye kiravunika maze kiruma, umuriro uragitwika." 
Ezekiel19:13 Dore noneho watewe mu butayu, mu gihugu cyumiranye, kitakigira amazi." 
Ezekiel19:14 Umuriro uhinguka mu gihimba cyawo, utwika amashami yawo n’imbuto zawo. Ntuzongera ukundi kugira ishami rikomeye, ryashobora kuvamo inkoni y’umwami.» Uwo ni umuvugo, waririmbwe nk’amaganya." 
Ezekiel20:1 Nuko mu mwaka wa karindwi, ku munsi wa cumi w'ukwezi kwa gatanu, bamwe mu bakuru b'umuryango wa Israheli baraza bicara imbere yanjye, bazanywe no guhanuza Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ubwo Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel20:3 «Mwana w'umuntu, bwira abakuru b'umuryango wa Israheli uti 'Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ese ye, ubwo muzanywe no kugira icyo mumpanuza? Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye - uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze - nta bwo nzemera guhanuzwa namwe.'" 
Ezekiel20:4 Ni ko se mwana w'umuntu, ntugiye se kubacira urubanza? Ngaho bamenyeshe amahano yakozwe n'abakurambere babo." 
Ezekiel20:5 Uzababwire uti 'Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Umunsi nitoreye umuryango wa Israheli, nkarahira ndamburiye ikiganza ku nzu ya Yakobo; nabibamenyesheje muri mu gihugu cya Misiri, mbaramburiraho ikiganza kandi mbabwiza indahiro nti 'Ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.'" 
Ezekiel20:6 Uwo munsi nabaramburiyeho ikiganza, mbarahira ko nzabavana mu gihugu cya Misiri nkabajyana mu gihugu nabahitiyemo, igihugu gitemba amata n'ubuki, kikaba na cyiza kuruta ibindi byose." 
Ezekiel20:7 Nuko ndababwira nti 'Buri muntu nazibukire ibiterashozi bibashuka, mureke kwiyanduza n'ibigirwamana byo mu Misiri; ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.'" 
Ezekiel20:8 Nyamara bambereye ibirara banga kunyumva, ntihagira n'umwe uzibukira ibiterashozi byabashukaga; ntibareka n'ibigirwamana byo mu Misiri. Ni bwo ntekereje kubavunduriraho uburakari bwanjye, ngo mbubamarireho rwagati mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Ariko nagiriye izina ryanjye, nkora uko nshoboye ngo ritandavurizwa imbere y'abanyamahanga bari batuyemo, ari na bo bandebaga igihe mbimenyesheje, mbavana mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:10 Hanyuma nabavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri mbajyana mu butayu," 
Ezekiel20:11 mbaha amategeko yanjye kandi mbamenyesha amabwiriza yanjye, ari byo bagombaga gukurikiza ngo babone kubaho." 
Ezekiel20:12 Nageze aho mbaha sabato zanjye ngo zibabere ikimenyetso cyanjye muri bo, kugira ngo bamenye ko ari jye, Uhoraho ubatagatifuza." 
Ezekiel20:13 Nyamara aho mu butayu, Abayisraheli baranga bambera ibirara, ntibakurikiza amategeko yanjye, birengagiza amabwiriza yanjye kandi ari byo bagombaga gukurikiza ngo babone kubaho; bandavuza na sabato zanjye. Ni bwo ntekereje kubavunduriraho uburakari bwanjye, ngo mbarimburire aho mu butayu." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ariko nagiriye izina ryanjye, nkora uko nshoboye ngo ritandavurizwa mu maso y'amahanga nari narabavanyemo." 
Ezekiel20:15 Byongeye kandi, nabaramburiyeho ikiganza aho mu butayu, mbarahira ko ntazabajyana mu gihugu nari narabahaye, igihugu gitemba amata n'ubuki kikaba na cyiza kuruta ibindi byose," 
Ezekiel20:16 kuko bari barirengagije amabwiriza yanjye, ntibakurikize amategeko yanjye kandi bakandavuza sabato zanjye, n'umutima wabo ukikurikirira ibigirwamana." 
Ezekiel20:17 Ariko jye nabarebanye impuhwe, sinashaka kubatsemba ngo mbatsinde muri ubwo butayu." 
Ezekiel20:18 Nuko abana babo bari mu butayu ndababwira nti 'Muramenye ntimuzitware nk'abakurambere banyu cyangwa se ngo mugenze nka bo, ntimukiyandavuze n'ibigirwamana byabo;" 
Ezekiel20:19 ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu. Nimukore ibihuje n'amategeko yanjye, mwubahirize amabwiriza yanjye kandi muyakurikize." 
Ezekiel20:20 Nimutagatifuze sabato zanjye, zibabere ikimenyetso cyanjye muri mwe, kugira ngo bamenye ko ndi Uhoraho Imana yanyu.'" 
Ezekiel20:21 Nyamara n'abana babo bambereye ibirara, ntibakora ibihuje n'amategeko yanjye, ntibakurikiza amabwiriza yanjye, ari byo bagombaga gukurikiza ngo babone kubaho, bandavuza na sabato zanjye. Ni bwo ntekereje kubavunduriraho uburakari bwanjye, ngo mbubamarireho aho mu butayu." 
Ezekiel20:22 Ariko nisubiyeho ngirira izina ryanjye, nkora uko nshoboye ngo ritandavurizwa mu maso y'amahanga nari narabavanyemo." 
Ezekiel20:23 Nuko ndongera mbaramburiraho ikiganza cyanjye aho mu butayu, mbarahira ko ngiye kubatatanyiriza mu mahanga, nkabakwiza imishwaro mu bihugu bya kure," 
Ezekiel20:24 kuko batakurikije amabwiriza yanjye, bakirengagiza amategeko yanjye, bakandavuza sabato zanjye kandi bakihambira ku bigirwamana by'abakurambere babo." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ndetse nageze n'aho mbaha amategeko y'amananiza n'amabwiriza atashoboraga kubabeshaho," 
Ezekiel20:26 mbandurisha amaturo yabo, igihe banturaga abana babo b'uburiza ho ibitambo, ari ukugira ngo bakangarane maze bamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.»" 
Ezekiel20:27 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, mwana w'umuntu, ubwire umuryango wa Israheli uti «Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Abakurambere banyu barantutse bikabije bakomeza kumpemukira." 
Ezekiel20:28 Nyamara kandi nabazanye mu gihugu narahiye ku mugaragaro ko nzakibaha; bahabona imisozi miremire y'amoko yose, ibiti bitoshye by'amoko yose, bahaturira ibitambo byabo banahatangira amaturo yabo andakaza; bahashyira imibavu yabo ihumura neza kandi bahaturira n'ibitambo biseswa." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ni ko kubabaza nti 'Aho hantu hirengeye mujya ni hantu nyabaki?' Nuko aho hantu bahita 'Boma ' kugeza na n'ubu. 
Ezekiel20:30 None rero, bwira umuryango wa Israheli uti 'Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Mbese ye, musanga ari byiza, igihe mwiyanduza mugenza nk'abakurambere banyu, mwohoka mu buraya bw'ibigirwamana byabo," 
Ezekiel20:31 mutanga amaturo yanyu kandi mutwika abana banyu? Ni iki gituma mukomeza kwiyanduza n'ibyo bigirwamana byose kugeza na n'ubu? Hanyuma se, muryango wa Israheli, jyewe nzemera ko mumpanuza? Mbarahiye ubugingo bwanjye, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, nta bwo nzemera ko mumpanuza." 
Ezekiel20:32 Naho ibyo mwibwira mu mutima wanyu, igihe muvuga muti 'Tuzamera nk'abanyamahanga cyangwa se imiryango yo mu bindi bihugu, dusenge ibiti n'amabuye', ibyo ntibiteze kubaho." 
Ezekiel20:33 Mbarahiye ubugingo bwanjye, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, ni jyewe uzababera umwami, nkoresheje ikiganza cyanjye cy'impangare n'ukuboko kwanjye kurambuye, ari na ko mbavunduriraho n'uburakari bwanjye." 
Ezekiel20:34 Nzabavana rwagati mu yindi miryango, mbakoranye mbavanye mu bihugu by'amahanga mwatataniyemo, mbikoresheje ikiganza cyanjye cy'impangare n'ukuboko kwanjye kurambuye; ari na ko mbavunduriraho uburakari bwanjye," 
Ezekiel20:35 mbajyane mu butayu bw'amahanga, abe ari ho mbacira urubanza duhanganye amaso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Urwo naciriye abakurambere banyu mu butayu bwo mu gihugu cya Misiri, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, ni rwo nzabacira namwe." 
Ezekiel20:37 Nzabategeka kuba ubushyo bwanjye no kumvira Isezerano ryanjye; 
Ezekiel20:38 nzabatandukanya n'ab'ibirara bangomeye, mbakure mu gihugu batuyemo, ariko ntibazinjira mu gihugu cya Israheli; maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel20:39 Namwe rero, muryango wa Israheli, dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ngaho buri muntu nagende akureho ibigirwamana bye, ahasigaye mbarahiye ko muzanyumva, ntimuzongere ukundi kwandavuza izina ryanjye ritagatifu, muryandurisha ibitambo n'ibigirwamana byanyu!" 
Ezekiel20:40 Koko rero, umuryango wa Israheli wose uko wakabaye, uko bangana mu gihugu, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, bazankorera bari ku musozi mutagatifu, ku musozi muremure wa Israheli; ni ho inzu ya Israheli yose izaba ituye mu gihugu izankorera. Aho ni ho nzongera kubakira kandi nkemera n'ibitambo byanyu, iby'ingenzi mu maturo yanyu n'ibintu mushaka kunyegurira byose." 
Ezekiel20:41 Nzabakira nk'umubavu uhumura neza igihe nzabavana rwagati mu mahanga, nzabakoranya mbavanye mu bihugu mwatataniyemo, maze muzagaragaze ubutagatifu bwanjye mu maso y'abanyamahanga." 
Ezekiel20:42 Muzamenya ko ndi Uhoraho, igihe nzaba nabagaruye ku butaka bwa Israheli, igihugu narahiriye ku mugaragaro kuzagiha abakurambere banyu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Aho muzahibukira imyifatire yanyu n'ibikorwa byanyu byatumye mwiyanduza, maze bibatere namwe ubwanyu kwizinukwa kubera ibyo bibi byose mwakoze." 
Ezekiel20:44 Ni bwo rero muzamenya ko ndi Uhoraho, nimara kubagenzereza ntyo ngiriye izina ryanjye, ntitaye ku myifatire mibi yanyu, muryango wa Israheli, n'ibikorwa byanyu byahumanye. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel21:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel21:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hindukira urebe mu majyepfo maze ubwire ijambo ryawe abo mu majyepfo, uhanurire ishyamba ryo mu karere k’amajyepfo." 
Ezekiel21:3 Uzabwire ishyamba ryo mu karere k’amajyepfo uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ngiye kugucanamo umuriro, uzatwike ibiti byose, ibibisi n’ibyumye. Uzaba ari inkongi idateze kuzima, uzatwika abantu bose kuva mu majyepfo kugera mu majyaruguru." 
Ezekiel21:4 Buri kinyamubiri cyose kizamenya ko ari jyewe Uhoraho wawucanye, kandi ntuteze no kuzima.’»" 
Ezekiel21:5 Nuko ndavuga nti «Ni ko se, Nyagasani Uhoraho, dore baramvugiraho bagira bati ’Mbese aho uriya si gacamigani.’»" 
Ezekiel21:6 Uhoraho ni ko kumbwira ati 
Ezekiel21:7 «Mwana w’umuntu, hindukirira Yeruzalemu, uvume Ingoro ntagatifu kandi uhanurire igihugu cya Israheli ibicyerekeyeho." 
Ezekiel21:8 Uzabwire igihugu cya Israheli uti ’Dore uko Uhoraho avuze: Ndakwibasiye, ngiye gukura inkota yanjye mu rwubati maze ngutsembeho intungane kimwe n’umunyabyaha." 
Ezekiel21:9 Igitumye ngiye gukura inkota yanjye mu rwubati, ni ukugira ngo ngutsembeho intungane kimwe n’umunyabyaha, nibasire icyitwa ikinyamubiri cyose kuva mu majyepfo kugera mu majyaruguru." 
Ezekiel21:10 Nuko ikinyamubiri cyose kizamenye ko jyewe, Uhoraho, nkuye inkota yanjye mu rwubati, ikaba itazongera gusubiramo ukundi!" 
Ezekiel21:11 Naho rero wowe, mwana w’umuntu, tangira uganye, unihe kandi ushavure, uganyire mu maso yabo." 
Ezekiel21:12 Nibakubaza bati ’Ni kuki uganya?’ uzababwire uti ’Ni ukubera inkuru mbi y’ibigiye kuba numvise: Imitima yose izahahamuka n’ibiganza birabirane, imbaraga zizashire kandi amavi acike intege. Dore ngibi biraje, kandi birabaye. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.’»" 
Ezekiel21:13 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati"
