Ezekiel21:14 «Mwana w’umuntu, ngaho hanura. Uzavuge uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Mbega inkota we! Mbega inkota ityaye kandi irabagirana!" 
Ezekiel21:15 Yatyarijwe kwica, none irarabagirana kandi igatera ibishashi." 
Ezekiel21:16 Yahawe kurabagirana ngo ibone gukoreshwa, iratyazwa ku buryo irabagirana, kugira ngo ihabwe umwicanyi." 
Ezekiel21:17 Taka kandi uboroge, mwana w’umuntu, kuko inkota irimbura umuryango wanjye, n’ibikomangoma byose bya Israheli. Nuko rero ngaho ikomange ku gituza," 
Ezekiel21:18 kuko ari ibigeragezo. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.’ 
Ezekiel21:19 Naho rero wowe, mwana w’umuntu, hanura ukomanye n’ibiganza ugira uti ’Inkota iri bukubite incuro ebyiri ndetse n’eshatu! Ni inkota isogota abantu benshi; ya nkota ndende ibahinguranya!" 
Ezekiel21:20 Ibyo bibereyeho kugira ngo ucike intege, n’ibikugusha birusheho kuba byinshi. Dore kuri buri muryango mpashyize inkota, inkota yacuriwe gutera ibishashi, igatyarizwa kwica." 
Ezekiel21:21 Nigaragaze ko ityaye amugi yombi, ndetse yerekere no mu mpande zose.’" 
Ezekiel21:22 Nanjye ubwanjye ngiye gukomanya ibiganza, ngiye kukumariraho uburakari bwanjye. Ni jye Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel21:23 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel21:24 «Naho rero wowe, mwana w’umuntu, shushanya inzira ebyiri zashobora kunyurwamo n’inkota y’umwami w’i Babiloni; izo nzira zombi kandi zive mu gihugu kimwe. Hanyuma aho izo nzira zitangiriye, uhashyire icyapa cyerekana aho zigana." 
Ezekiel21:25 Imwe muri zo izayobora inkota ije igana Raba y’Abahamoni, indi iyobore inkota ije igana mu kigo gikomeye cy’i Yeruzalemu muri Yuda." 
Ezekiel21:26 Koko rero, umwami w’i Babiloni ahagaze mu mayirabiri, aho inzira zombi zitangiriye, kugira ngo akoreshe ubufindo. Ariho aramisha imyambi hirya no hino, abaza abaterafimu, akitegereza n’inyama y’umwijima." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ubufindo bwo mu kiganza cy’iburyo bwaguye kuri Yeruzalemu, kugira ngo hatangwe itegeko ryo kwica, banashinge imashini z’intambara. Bazakoma akamo k’intambara, amarembo bayegereze imashini zo kuyasenya, baharunde imigina y’ibitaka kandi bahakikize imikingo impande zose." 
Ezekiel21:28 Nyamara abantu b’i Yeruzalemu bo babona ko ibyo nta cyo biteze kubatwara, kuko bari biringiye indahiro barahiwe; ariko umwami w’i Babiloni azabibutse ubuhemu bwabo maze bafatwe." 
Ezekiel21:29 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati ’Kubera ko mukomeza kunyibutsa ibyaha byanyu mumpemukira ku mugaragaro, mukagaragaza amafuti yanyu mu byo mukora byose, muzajyanwa bunyago kuko mutabinyibagije.’" 
Ezekiel21:30 Naho wowe rero, mwami wa Israheli, uri umugome w’imburamumaro; igihe cyawe kirageze n’ubugome bwawe burarangiye." 
Ezekiel21:31 Dore Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Bazakwambura umutamirizo wo mu mutwe wawe, bakunyage ikamba maze byose bihinduke ukundi: ibyari biciye bugufi bizashyirwe ejuru, n’ibyari ejuru bicishwe bugufi." 
Ezekiel21:32 Uzahinduka amatongo, bagusenye usigare uri itongo! Yeruzalemu we, nguko uko nzakugenzereza mbere y’uko nyir’uguca urubanza aza maze nkarumwegurira.’»" 
Ezekiel21:33 Naho wowe rero, mwana w’umuntu, hanurira Abahomoni bagenzwa no gutukana, uti «Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Dore inkota iraje! Inkota yakuwe mu rwubati, yabanguriwe kwica, irarabagirana ngo itsembe kandi itere ibishashi!" 
Ezekiel21:34 Mu gihe mwebwe mucyibeshya ngo murabonekerwa, mugihanuza abanyabinyoma, iyo nkota yiteguye gusogota abagome n’imburamumaro kuko igihe cyabo kigeze n’ubugome bwabo bukaba burangiye." 
Ezekiel21:35 Ngaho, nimusubize inkota zanyu mu rwubati, kuko nzabacira urubanza mugeze mu gihugu mukomokamo, aho mwaremewe." 
Ezekiel21:36 Nzakumariraho umujinya wanjye, nkurahurireho umuriro w’uburakari bwanjye maze nkugabize ibiganza by’abanyarugomo, ba kabuhariwe mu kurimbura." 
Ezekiel21:37 Muzatwika n’umuriro, amaraso yanyu azatembe rwagati mu gihugu, nta na kimwe muzasigazaho urwibutso, kuko jyewe, Uhoraho, ari ko mvuze!»" 
Ezekiel22:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel22:2 «Ni ko se, mwana w’umuntu, umugi umena amaraso ntukwiye kuwucira urubanza? Ngaho rero wumenyeshe amahano yose wakoze." 
Ezekiel22:3 Uzawubwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Uragowe, wa mugi we, wowe umena amaraso iwawe nyirizina ugira ngo wihutishe igihe cyawe, ukaba warabarije ibigirwamana ku butaka bwawe ngo wiyanduze!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Dore amaraso wamennye aragushinja, n’ibigirwamana wakoze byarakwanduje! Wihutishije utyo igihe cyawe, none wageze ku ndunduro y’imyaka wagombaga kumara. Ni cyo gitumye rero nkugize urw’amenyo mu banyamahanga, ugahinduka urwo baseka mu bihugu byose." 
Ezekiel22:5 Abari kure kimwe n’abari hafi yawe bazaguseka kuko izina ryawe ryasuzuguritse kandi ukaba wuzuyemo umuvurungano. 
Ezekiel22:6 Dore aho iwawe, ibikomangoma bya Israheli bishishikajwe no kumena amaraso, buri muntu akurikije uko imbaraga ze zingana." 
Ezekiel22:7 Iwawe barasuzugura ba se na ba nyina, barafata nabi umunyamahanga kandi bakarenganya imfubyi n’umupfakazi." 
Ezekiel22:8 Wakomeje gusuzugura ibintu byanjye bitagatifu, wandavuza n’amasabato yanjye." 
Ezekiel22:9 Iwawe hari ababeshyera abandi ngo babone uko bamena amaraso, bararira ku misozi bagakorera ibiterashozi rwagati muri wowe." 
Ezekiel22:10 Iwawe bambitse ubusa ba se, basagarira umugore ukiri mu mihango y’abakobwa." 
Ezekiel22:11 Um we muri mwe yakoranye ibiterashozi n’umugore wa mugenzi we, undi akorana amahano n’umukazana we, naho undi asagarira mushiki we basangiye se." 
Ezekiel22:12 Iwawe kandi barakira amaturo kugira ngo bamene amaraso, uguriza abandi ushaka inyungu kandi ukabaka urwunguko rurengeje urugero, wambura mugenzi wawe ku ngufu, ndetse nanjye ubwanjye uranyibagirwa. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel22:13 Dore ngiye kukubanguriraho ukuboko, kubera uburiganya bwawe n’amaraso atemba rwagati muri wowe." 
Ezekiel22:14 Mbese ye, umutima wawe uzabasha kwihangana, n’ibiganza byawe bikomere, igihe nzaba nakwibasiye? Jyewe, Uhoraho, ndabivuze kandi nzabikora." 
Ezekiel22:15 Nzagukwiza imishwaro mu mahanga, ngutatanyirize mu bihugu bya kure, maze nzaguhanagureho ubwandure bwawe;" 
Ezekiel22:16 uzandavuzwa mu maso y’amahanga kubera amafuti yawe, maze uzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
Ezekiel22:17 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel22:18 «Mwana w’umuntu, kuri jye umuryango wa Israheli wahindutse nk’ubutare bwangiritse, bose babaye nka feza, umuringa, icyuma, porombi, itini; bahindutse nk’ubutare bwangiritse." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Imana avuga ati ’Kubera ko mwese muri nk’ubutare bwangiritse, ngiye kubakorakoranyiriza rwagati muri Yeruzalemu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Nk’uko bakoranyiriza mu itanura rimwe feza, umuringa, icyuma, porombi n’itini kugira ngo babishongeshe, nanjye ni ko nzabakorakoranyiriza mu burakari bwanjye no mu mujinya wanjye, maze mbashongeshe." 
Ezekiel22:21 Nzabarunda hamwe mbatwikire mu muriro w’uburakari bwanjye, mbashongeshereze mu mugi rwagati." 
Ezekiel22:22 Uko bashongesha feza mu ruganda, namwe ni ko muzashongesherezwa rwagati mu mugi, bityo muzamenye ko ari jye Uhoraho, wabavunduriyeho uburakari bwanjye.»" 
Ezekiel22:23 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel22:24 «Mwana w’umuntu, bwira Yeruzalemu uti ’Umeze nk’igitaka kitigeze imvura, habe n’urume, kubera uburakari bwanjye." 
Ezekiel22:25 Abatware bagutuye bameze nk’intare itontoma, itanyaguza umuhigo wayo; bariye rubanda, bigabiza ubukire n’ibintu by’agaciro, bakugwizamo abapfakazi." 
Ezekiel22:26 Abaherezabitambo baciye ku mategeko yanjye kandi bandavuza insengero zanjye; ntibagitandukanya ahatagatifu n’ahantu hasanzwe, kandi ntibakigisha kumenya gutandukanya icyahumanye n’ikitahumanye. Birengagije ku bwende bwabo amasabato yanjye, maze ndasuzugurika muri bo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Abatware bawe bameze nk’ibirura bitanyagura umuhigo wabyo, kandi baramena amaraso bicisha abantu ngo babasahure ibyabo." 
Ezekiel22:28 Abahanuzi bawe bababeshyeshya amabonekerwa yabo y’amafuti n’inyigisho zabo z’ibinyoma, bababwira ngo: Ni ko Nyagasani Imana avuze! kandi nta byo Uhoraho yigeze avuga." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abaturage b’igihugu bakabije urugomo n’uburiganya, bararenganya umukene n’umunyabyago, baragirira umunyamahanga urugomo nta burenganzira babifitiye." 
Ezekiel22:30 Nashatse umuntu n’umwe muri bo wasana inkike ngo ahagarare imbere yanjye mu cyuho, maze arwane ku gihugu cye ambuze kukirimbura, ariko naramubuze." 
Ezekiel22:31 Nuko bituma mbamariraho umujinya wanjye — uwo ni Nyagasani Imana ubivuze — mbatsembesha umuriro w’uburakari bwanjye mbahora iyo myifatire mibi yabo.’» 
Ezekiel23:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel23:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, kera habayeho abagore babiri bavaga inda imwe." 
Ezekiel23:3 Kuva mu bukumi bwabo, bombi bajya kuba indaya mu gihugu cya Misiri, abantu bakabakirigita, ari na ko bakorakora ku mabere yabo atigeze yonsa." 
Ezekiel23:4 Dore amazina y’abo bakobwa: uw’uburiza yitwaga Ohola, naho murumuna we akitwa Oholiba; nuko bombi baba abanjye bambyarira abahungu n’abakobwa. Dore rero icyo amazina yabo asobanura: Ohola ni we Samariya, Oholiba akaba Yeruzalemu." 
Ezekiel23:5 Nuko Ohola aba indaya aho kuba uwanjye, yishakira abakunzi mu Banyashuru," 
Ezekiel23:6 bakaba abasirikare bambaye imyambaro y’imihemba, abategetsi n’abanyacyubahiro, bose bakaba abasore bafite igikundiro, bakagendera ku mafarasi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Nuko arabiyegurira bose uko bari ingenzi mu Banyashuru, yagera ku bo yakunze bose akiyandurisha ibigirwamana byabo byose." 
Ezekiel23:8 Ariko ntiyigera areka uburaya bwe yari yaratangiriye mu Misiri igihe aryamanye n’abantu baho kuva mu bukumi bwe bagakorakora ku mabere ye atigeze yonsa kandi bakamuraruza ibiterashozi byabo. 
Ezekiel23:9 Ni cyo cyatumye mwegurira ibiganza by’abakunzi be b’Abanyashuru yari yarihebeye," 
Ezekiel23:10 ari na bo bamwambitse ubusa, bagafata abahungu be n’abakobwa be; na we ubwe bakamwicisha inkota. Nuko aba ikirangirire atyo mu bagore bose, kuko yari yaciriwe urumukwiye." 
Ezekiel23:11 Murumuna we Oholiba yarabyiboneye; nyamara kubera irari rikabije, uburaya bwe na we bwaje kuba bubi cyane kurusha ubwa mukuru we." 
Ezekiel23:12 Yiyeguriye Abanyashuru, bari abategetsi n’abanyacyubahiro, abasirikare bambaraga imyambaro y’akataraboneka bakagendera ku mafarasi, bakaba kandi bose abasore b’igikundiro." 
Ezekiel23:13 Nuko mbona ko na we yiyanduje, m’imyifatire yabo bombi ibaye imwe." 
Ezekiel23:14 Oholiba ndetse yarushijeho gukabya mu buraya bwe igihe abonye ibishushanyo by’abagabo b’Abakalideya byari bishushanyije mu ibara ritukura ku rukuta," 
Ezekiel23:15 bakenyeje imikandara, bafite ibitambaro mu mutwe kandi bameze bose nk’abarwanyi b’intwari. Byari ibishushanyo by’Abakalideya bakomokaga muri Kalideya." 
Ezekiel23:16 Nuko ababonye arabiyegurira, anabatumaho intumwa muri Kalideya." 
Ezekiel23:17 Abo Banyababiloni baramusanga baryamana na we ku buriri bw’ubugeni, barabuhindanya n’uburaya bwabo, ngo bamare kumwanduza arabazinukwa." 
Ezekiel23:18 Ariko yihambira ku buraya bwe akomeza kwiyambika ubusa; maze nanjye ndamuzinukwa nk’uko nabigenjeje kuri mukuru we. 
Ezekiel23:19 Yakomeje kugwiza uburaya bwe, yibuka igihe cy’ubukumi bwe ubwo yari indaya mu gihugu cya Misiri," 
Ezekiel23:20 kuko ari ho yatangiriye kurarikira abakunzi be bagurumanaga, irari bakaringanya n’indogobe n’amafarasi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Wishakiraga imyifatire nk’iyo mu bukumi bwawe, igihe wari mu Misiri, ubwo bagukorakoraga ku mabere, bakagukabakaba no mu gituza." 
Ezekiel23:22 Ni yo mpamvu, wowe Oholiba — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — ngiye kuguteza abakunzi bawe wazinutswe, mbagukoranyirizeho baturutse impande zose:" 
Ezekiel23:23 Abanyababiloni n’Abakalideya bose, ab’i Pekodi, ab’i Showa n’ab’i Kowa, hamwe n’Abanyashuru bose, ba basore b’igikundiro, abatware n’abanyacyubahiro, abarwanyi b’ibyamamare n’abagendera ku mafarasi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Bazagutera baguturutse mu majyaruguru ari ingabo zitagira ingano, bafite amagare n’intwaro nyinshi, bakugote impande zose bikingiye ingabo n’ingofero z’ibyuma. Nzabegurira urubanza rwawe, bazaruce bakurikije amategeko yabo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Nzabakugabiza mbitewe n’ishyari ngufitiye, bakurakarire, baguce izuru n’amatwi, n’abawe barokotse batsembeshwe inkota. Bazakunyaga abahungu n’abakobwa, abacitse ku icumu batwikwe n’umuriro." 
Ezekiel23:26 Bazakwambura imyambaro, bakunyage n’imitamirizo yawe." 
Ezekiel23:27 Nzasoza ntyo imyifatire yawe mibi n’uburaya watangiriye mu Misiri, ntuzongera kubireba ukundi kandi na Misiri ntuzigera uyibuka." 
Ezekiel23:28 Koko rero, Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Dore nkugabije ibiganza by’abo wanze n’abo wazinutswe." 
Ezekiel23:29 Bazakwanga urunuka, bakunyage n’ibyo waruhiye byose, bagusige amara masa; maze ikimwaro cy’uburaya bwawe, ubusambanyi bwawe n’imyifatire yawe mibi, kigaragare." 
Ezekiel23:30 Bazakugenza batyo kuko wigize indaya y’abanyamahanga, ukiyanduza n’ibigirwamana byabo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Wiganye imyifatire ya mukuru wawe, ni cyo gituma ngiye gushyira igikombe cye mu biganza byawe." 
Ezekiel23:32 Dore uko Nyagasani Imana avuze: ‘Uzanywa ku gikombe cya mukuru wawe, igikombe kinini kandi cyagutse, kizatuma baguseka, banakunnyege, kubera ko kizaba gisendereye cyane," 
Ezekiel23:33 kizagutera ubusinzi n’umubabaro. Koko, ni igikombe giteye ubwoba kandi cy’ububabare, ari na cyo cya mukuru wawe Samariya!" 
Ezekiel23:34 Uzakinywa, unakiranguze, hanyuma ukijanjaguze amenyo yawe, ibyo bijaju ubyishwanyurishe agatuza, kuko ari Nyagasani Imana ubivuze.’" 
Ezekiel23:35 Ni yo mpamvu Nyagasani Imana avuze kandi ati «Kubera ko wanyibagiwe, ukananyirengagiza, ngaho nawe ikorere umutwaro w’ububi n’uburaya bwawe.»" 
Ezekiel23:36 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, urashaka se gucira urubanza Ohola na Oholiba, no kubashinja amahano bakoze?" 
Ezekiel23:37 Dore babaye indaya, ibiganza byabo bimena amaraso, basambana n’ibigirwamana byabo; naho abana bari barambyariye babatwikisha umuriro, barakongoka." 
Ezekiel23:38 Byongeye kandi, uwo munsi bahindanyije Ingoro yanjye, bandavuza n’amasabato yanjye." 
Ezekiel23:39 Bakimara kwica abana babo bakabatambira ibigirwamana byabo, bahise bajya guhindanya Ingoro yanjye. Ngibyo ibyo bakoreye mu Ngoro yanjye bwite." 
Ezekiel23:40 Si n’ibyo byonyine kandi, mwahamagaje abantu baturutse kure, mubatumyeho intumwa maze baraza. Ngo mubabone baje muriyuhagira, mwisiga mu maso, mushyiramo imitamirizo yanyu," 
Ezekiel23:41 mwicara ku buriri bw’icyubahiro maze imbere yabwo bahashyira ameza, muyaterekaho ububani bwanjye n’amavuta yanjye." 
Ezekiel23:42 Iwabo humvikanaga urusaku rw’imbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu batagize icyo bitayeho; bari benshi cyane bakabamo n’abantu b’abasinzi baturutse mu butayu, bambitse abo bagore bombi ibitare ku maboko n’ikamba ritagira uko risa ku mutwe wabo." 
Ezekiel23:43 Nuko ndibwira nti ’Bariya bagore basaziye mu busambanyi, baracyasambana na bo," 
Ezekiel23:44 bagakomeza kuza iwabo nk’abajya ku ndaya!’ Nguko uko bajya kwa Ohola na Oholiba, abo bagore bandavuye!" 
Ezekiel23:45 Nyamara ariko, abantu b’intungane bazabacira urubanza rukwiye abagore b’indaya n’abamena amaraso; kuko na bo ari indaya n’ibiganza byabo bikaba byarahindanyijwe n’amaraso.’»" 
Ezekiel23:46 Nuko Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuga ati «Nibahamagaze igitero cy’abantu benshi, babahahamure umutima kandi babasahure;" 
Ezekiel23:47 babatere amabuye kandi babicishe inkota, bice abahungu babo n’abakobwa babo, amazu yabo bayatwike." 
Ezekiel23:48 Nzavana mu gihugu ububi bwacyokamye, nzaburire abagore bose bareke kuzongera gukurikiza imyifatire mibi yanyu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Bazabaryoza ubugiranabi bwanyu, mwikorere umutwaro w’ibyaha mwakoranye n’ibigirwamana byanyu, bityo muzamenye ko ndi Nyagasani Imana.»" 
Ezekiel24:1 Nuko mu mwaka wa cyenda, ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi kwa cumi, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel24:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, andika itariki y’uyu munsi, kuko uyu munsi nyine umwami w’i Babiloni yateye Yeruzalemu." 
Ezekiel24:3 Cira uyu mugani iyo nyoko y’ibirara, ubabwire uti «Nyagasani aravuze ngo: Shyira inkono ku ziko, numara kuyishyiraho, uyisukemo amazi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Uyishyiremo intongo z’inyama, intongo zose z’akaguru n’iz’akaboko, wuzuzemo n’amagufa meza yose," 
Ezekiel24:5 uvanye ku itungo ryiza ryo mu bushyo bwawe. Hanyuma ushyire inkwi nyinshi mu ziko, ubicanire cyane bihinduke ikinyiga, ku buryo n’amagufa arimo yose, ari bushye agahwana." 
Ezekiel24:6 Ni koko, Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Uriyimbire, wa mugi we umena amaraso, wowe umeze nk’inkono yatoye ingese, n’izo ngese zikaba zitagishoboye kuyivaho! Aruramo inyama imwe imwe hatagombye ubufindo," 
Ezekiel24:7 kuko amaraso yawo wamennye awurimo rwagati, wayashyize ku rutare rw’umwiyanike, ntiwayasesa ku butaka ngo nibura uyazimanganye n’umukungugu." 
Ezekiel24:8 None kugira ngo uburakari bwanjye bwihembere nihorere, nashyize amaraso yawe ku rutare rw’umwiyanike, sinagira icyo nyatwikiriza.’" 
Ezekiel24:9 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati ‘Uriyimbire, wa mugi we umena amaraso! Dore ngiye kurunda ikirundo kinini cy’inkwi." 
Ezekiel24:10 Ngaho rero egeranya inkwi maze ucane umuriro, uteke inyama, utegure n’ibiziryoshya, n’amagufa yose ashye ahwane." 
Ezekiel24:11 Tereka inkono irimo ubusa ku makara maze icamuke, kugira ngo umuringa ushye n’umwanda uyirimo ushonge, maze ingese zishye zikongoke.’" 
Ezekiel24:12 Nyamara ariko, ingese zingana zityo ntizizakurwaho n’umuriro." 
Ezekiel24:13 Ubwandure bwawe ubuterwa n’ibibi ukora, kuko nashatse kuguhumanura ariko ukaba warabyanze. Ntuteze rero guhumanurwa kugeza ko nkumariraho uburakari bwanjye." 
Ezekiel24:14 Jyewe Uhoraho nabivuze kandi nzabikora, ndetse nzabikora ubutisubiraho, sinzakugirira impuhwe cyangwa ngo nkubabarire, uzacirwa urubanza hakurikijwe imyifatire yawe n’ibikorwa byawe. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel24:15 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel24:16 «Mwana w’umuntu, dore ngiye kukugwa gitumo nkwambure uwashimishaga amaso yawe, ariko rero ntuzaboroge, ntuzarire cyangwa ngo usuke amarira." 
Ezekiel24:17 Uzaganye bucece, ntuzajye mu cyunamo nk’uwapfushije; ahubwo uzatamirize igitambaro cyawe mu mutwe, wambare inkweto zawe mu birenge; ntuzipfuke ubwanwa kandi ntuzarye umugati uzaniwe n’abaturanyi.»" 
Ezekiel24:18 Nabwiraga rubanda mu gitondo, nuko nimugoroba umugore wanjye arapfa, maze bukeye bw’uwo munsi mbigenza uko nari nategetswe." 
Ezekiel24:19 Nuko rubanda barambaza bati «Mbese ntiwadusobanuriza icyo ibyo ukora bishaka kuvuga?» 
Ezekiel24:20 Ndabasubiza nti «Uhoraho yantegetse kubwira umuryango wa Israheli, nti" 
Ezekiel24:21 ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Dore ngiye guhindanya Ingoro yanjye, yo yabateraga kwiratana imbaraga zanyu, ikaba ibyishimo by’amaso yanyu n’amizero y’imitima yanyu; maze abahungu banyu n’abakobwa banyu mwatereranye bazicishwe inkota." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ubwo rero namwe muzigana Ezekiyeli: ntimuzipfuka ubwanwa, ntimuzarya umugati muhawe n’abaturanyi," 
Ezekiel24:23 muzagumana ibitambaro byanyu mu mutwe n’inkweto zanyu mu birenge, ntimuzaboroga kandi ntimuzarira. Muzacika intege kubera ibicumuro byanyu, buri muntu aganye kubera ibyago bya mugenzi we." 
Ezekiel24:24 Ezekiyeli azababera ikimenyetso, naho mwebwe muzakora nk’ibyo yakoze. Nuko igihe ibyo bizaba byabaye, muzamenye ko ndi Nyagasani Imana.’" 
Ezekiel24:25 Nawe rero, mwana w’umuntu, umunsi nzaba nabanyaze ibyabateraga imbaraga, imirimbo ibanezeza, ibishimisha amaso yabo, amizero y’imitima yabo, abahungu babo n’abakobwa babo," 
Ezekiel24:26 uwo munsi nyine, uzacika ku icumu wese azakugeraho akuzaniye ayo makuru." 
Ezekiel24:27 Uwo munsi kandi, umunwa wawe uzabumbuka kugira ngo wigishe uzaba yacitse ku icumu. Uzavuga kandi ntuzongera ukundi kuba ikiragi; uzababera ikimenyetso maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.»" 
Ezekiel25:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel25:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hindukirira Abahamoni maze ubahanurire ibiberekeyeho." 
Ezekiel25:3 Uzababwire uti ’Dore Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo nimutege amatwi ijambo rye. Kubera ko mwishongoye ku Ngoro yanjye, mukavuga ngo ‘Awa’ igihe yandavujwe, mukishongora ku gihugu cya Israheli igihe bakiyogoje, no ku muryango wa Yuda ubwo ujyanywe bunyago;" 
Ezekiel25:4 ngiye kubagabiza abantu b’iburasirazuba bace ingando iwanyu, maze bahature. Ni bo bazarya imbuto zanyu, banywe n’amata yari ayanyu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Raba nzayigira igikingi cy’ingamiya, imigi y’Abahamoni nyihindure ibiraro by’amatungo, maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’" 
Ezekiel25:6 Dore Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Kubera ko mwakomye mu mashyi kandi mukabyina, mukishimana agasuzuguro ku gihugu cya Israheli;" 
Ezekiel25:7 ngiye kubibasira, mbagabize amahanga abasahure; mbatsembe mu miryango kandi mbarimbure no mu bindi bihugu; mbatsiratsize maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho!»" 
Ezekiel25:8 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Kubera ko abantu b’i Mowabu n’ab’i Seyiri bavuze bati «Umuryango wa Yuda wahindutse nk’andi mahanga yose’," 
Ezekiel25:9 ngiye gutsemba imigi ya Mowabu, nyirimbure mpereye ku myiza cyane nka Betiyeshimoti, Behalimewoni na Kiriyatayimu." 
Ezekiel25:10 Nzayihera abantu b’iburasirazuba bayiture nk’uko bigaruriye Abahamoni, bizatume abo Bahamoni batongera kwibukwa ukundi mu yandi mahanga." 
Ezekiel25:11 Mowabu nzayicira uruyikwiye, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.»" 
Ezekiel25:12 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Kubera ko Edomu yihoreye ku muryango wa Yuda, ikihamya ityo icyaha;" 
Ezekiel25:13 jye Nyagasani Uhoraho, ngiye kwibasira Edomu, maze nyimare ku bantu no ku matungo. Nzayihindura amatongo kuva i Temani kugera i Dedani, bamarwe n’inkota." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ubwanjye nzahora Edomu mbigirishije ikiganza cya Israheli umuryango wanjye; bazayigirire nabi bakurikije uburakari bwanjye n’umujinya wanjye, maze bazamenye ko ari jye wihoreye. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel25:15 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Kubera ko Abafilisiti bihoreye, bakabigirana agasuzuguro bashaka gusenya ku mpamvu y’urwango rw’akarande;" 
Ezekiel25:16 jye, Nyagasani Uhoraho, ngiye kwibasira Abafilisiti, ntsembe Abakereti, ndimbure n’abasigaye mu batuye ku nkengero y’inyanja." 
Ezekiel25:17 Nzihorera bikomeye mbahanisha ibihano bikaze, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, igihe nzaba maze kubahana, nihorera." 
Ezekiel26:1 Nuko mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe, ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel26:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, kubera ko Tiri yishongoye kuri Yeruzalemu, ivuga ngo: Awa! Urangarukiye, wa mugi wari ihuriro ry’amahanga! kandi n’ubukire bwawo burayoyotse," 
Ezekiel26:3 ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati ’Dore ngiye kukwibasira, wowe Tiri, ngiye kuguteza amahanga menshi, akwiroheho nk’uko inyanja ivubura imivumba yayo." 
Ezekiel26:4 Bazasenya inkike za Tiri, bahirike iminara yayo, nanjye nzakubure umukungugu wabyo, mpahindure urutare rw’umwiyanike." 
Ezekiel26:5 Izaba nk’imbuga banikaho inshundura rwagati mu nyanja — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze kandi arabihamya — izaba umunyago w’amahanga. 
Ezekiel26:6 Abakobwa bayo bari mu gasozi bazicishwa inkota, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’" 
Ezekiel26:7 Koko Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Dore i Tiri mpohereje Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni n’umwami w’abami, ahatere aturutse mu majyaruguru, afite amafarasi, amagare y’intambara, ingabo n’imbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu." 
Ezekiel26:8 Abakobwa bawe bari mu gasozi azabicisha inkota, azagukikiza imikingo miremire, akurundeho n’imigina y’ibitaka, akuzengurutseho n’urukuta rwo kwikingira." 
Ezekiel26:9 Inkike zawe azazisenyesha ingiga zikoze nk’ubuhiri, iminara yawe ayirimbuze intwaro ze." 
Ezekiel26:10 Amafarasi ye atagira ingano azagutumuriraho umukungugu ukurengeho, inkike zinyeganyezwe n’urusaku rw’amafarasi, n’urw’amagare yabo igihe bazaba binjira mu marembo, nk’uko biroha mu mugi baciyemo icyuho." 
Ezekiel26:11 Amafarasi ye azangiza imihanda yawe n’ibinono byayo, abantu bawe azabicishe inkota, arimbure n’inkingi zawe zikomeye." 
Ezekiel26:12 Bazakunyaga ibyo wari utunze, basahure n’ibicuruzwa byawe, bazasenya inkike zawe, n’amazu yawe meza bayarimbagure, amabuye n’ibiti bikubatse babirohe mu mazi, ndetse n’ishingwe ryose." 
Ezekiel26:13 Nzazibya abaririmbaga basakuza, n’ijwi ry’inanga zawe ntirizongera kumvikana ukundi." 
Ezekiel26:14 Nzakugira urutare rw’umwiyanike, nguhindure imbuga banikaho inshundura, maze we kuzongera kubakwa bibaho. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze kandi arabihamya!»" 
Ezekiel26:15 Dore Nyagasani Uhoraho arabwira Tiri, ati «Aho ibirwa ntibizahinda umushyitsi, nibiramuka byumvise urusaku rw’ukurimbuka kwawe n’imiborogo y’inkomere zawe, n’amarorerwa y’ubwicanyi mu nkike zawe?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Abami bose baturiye inyanja bazava ku ntebe zabo, bakuremo ibishura byabo, biyambure n’imyambaro yabo itatse. Bazatahwa n’ubwoba bicare hasi, batengurwe ubutitsa kandi bagwe mu kantu kubera ibikubayeho." 
Ezekiel26:17 Bazatera indirimbo y’amaganya bagira bati ’Dore ishyano re! Warimbutse wiroha mu nyanja, wa mugi w’icyamamare, nyamara wari igikomerezwa ku nyanja, wo n’abaturage bawo, ugakwiza iterabwoba mu bihugu byose.’" 
Ezekiel26:18 Koko rero ibirwa birahinda umushyitsi ku munsi w’ukurimbuka kwawe, n’ibirwa byo mu nyanja bihagaritse umutima kubera itsiratsizwa ryawe.’" 
Ezekiel26:19 Koko Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Igihe nzaba nakurimbuye umeze nk’imigi itagituwe, nzaguteza imivumba n’amazi menshi bikurengeho," 
Ezekiel26:20 nguhirikire mu rwobo uhasange abagiyeyo mbere, nzagutuza ikuzimu mu matongo ya kera, ubane n’abapfuye, kugira ngo utazagaruka ukongera gutura mu gihugu cy’abazima." 
Ezekiel26:21 Nzaguhindura ikintu giteye ubwoba kandi ntuzongera kubaho ukundi. Bazagushakashaka, ariko ntibazongera kukubona ukundi. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel27:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel27:2 «Nawe rero, mwana w’umuntu, ririmbira Tiri indirimbo y’amaganya." 
Ezekiel27:3 Uzabwire Tiri uti ’Wowe wubatswe ku masangano y’inyanja, ukaba iguriro ry’amahanga n’ibirwa bitabarika, dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Tiri, wowe wirataga uvuga ngo «Meze nk’ubwato bw’akataraboneka!»" 
Ezekiel27:4 Imipaka yawe yageraga mu nyanja rwagati; abubatsi bawe baragutatse ubwiza buhebuje. 
Ezekiel27:5 Impande zawe zose zubatswe n’imbaho zabajwe mu mizonobari y’i Seniri. Muri wowe hagati bahashinze inkingi ndende yatoranyijwe mu masederi yo muri Libani. 
Ezekiel27:6 Ingashya zawe zari zarabajwe mu mishishi y’i Bashani, naho abasare bawe bakicara ku ntebe zakozwe mu masederi yo mu birwa by’Abakitimu, ziriho imitako yabajwe mu mahembe y’inzovu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Imyenda ya hariri yo mu Misiri itatseho imirimbo ni yo wagize ibendera n’amahema yawe, ubishumika ku nkingi ngo bihuhwe n’umuyaga; naho ibicuruzwa byawe ukabitwikiriza ay’umuhemba n’umutuku wakuye mu birwa bya Elisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 Tiri we, abaturage b’i Sidoni n’i Arubadi barakugashyaga, maze abanyabwenge bawe bakakubera abasare." 
Ezekiel27:9 Abakuru b’i Gebali n’abanyabukorikori baho, babaga bari aho ngo bagusane aho wangiritse. Amato yose yo mu nyanja n’abasare bayo, babaga iwawe bazanywe n’ubucuruzi." 
Ezekiel27:10 Abo mu Buperisi, ab’i Ludi n’ab’i Puti bari abarwanyi b’intwari mu ngabo zawe, bagashyingura iwawe ingabo n’ingofero zabo z’ibyuma, byaguheshaga ishema." 
Ezekiel27:11 Abantu b’i Arubadi bahoraga bakikije inkike zawe, Abanyagemadi bakarinda iminara yawe. Bamanikaga ingabo zabo ku nkike zawe, bityo bakarushaho kunoza ubwiza bwawe." 
Ezekiel27:12 Ab’i Tarishishi baguranye nawe ibyiza byinshi, baguha imitwaro ya feza, ibyuma, itini na porombi." 
Ezekiel27:13 Yabani, Tubali, na Mesheki mwarahahiranaga, bakuzaniraga abacakara n’ibintu byacuzwe mu muringa, bakabigurana ibicuruzwa byawe." 
Ezekiel27:14 Abantu b’i Betitogaruma baguhaga amafarasi y’intambara n’inyumbu," 
Ezekiel27:15 ab’i Dedani na bo mugahahirana; n’abo mu birwa bitabarika bari abaguzi bawe, bakakwishyura amahembe y’inzovu n’ibiti by’ubwoko." 
Ezekiel27:16 Abantu b’i Aramu na bo baguranaga nawe ibintu kubera ko wari utunze ibintu byinshi; bakaguha amabuye y’agaciro n’imyenda y’imihemba, ibintu bitatse amabara n’ubudodo bunoze, ibirezi n’inigi zibengerana." 
Ezekiel27:17 Yuda n’igihugu cya Israheli na bo mwarahahiranaga, bakakuzanira ingurane y’ingano z’i Miniti, uburo n’ubuki, amavuta n’imibavu." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ab’i Damasi baguranye ibintu nawe, kubera ko wari ukize, utunze ibintu by’amoko yose, bakuzaniraga divayi y’i Heliboni n’ubwoya bw’intama z’i Sahari." 
Ezekiel27:19 Abantu b’i Wedani n’ab’i Yabani, kuva Uzeli, baguhaga ibintu bicuzwe mu byuma n’ibiti by’imibavu;" 
Ezekiel27:20 ab’i Dedani bakakugurishaho imyenda isaswa ku mafarasi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabiya yose n’ibikomangoma byose by’i Kedari, na bo bari abaguzi bawe bakakwishyura abana b’intama, amapfizi y’intama n’amasekurume y’ihene." 
Ezekiel27:22 Abacuruzi b’i Sheba n’ab’i Rama mwarahahiranaga, ibicuruzwa byawe bakabigurana imibavu ihumura neza, amabuye y’agaciro y’ubwoko bwose ndetse na zahabu." 
Ezekiel27:23 Abantu b’i Harani, ab’i Kane n’ab’i Edeni, abacuruzi b’i Sheba, ab’i Ashuru n’ab’i Kilimadi, bose bahahiranaga nawe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Bacuruzaga mu masoko yawe imyambaro y’igiciro, ibishura by’imihemba n’imitako myinshi, imyenda y’amabara menshi n’ibiziriko bikomeye." 
Ezekiel27:25 Amato y’i Tarishishi yogogaga inyanja ajyanye ibicuruzwa bikugenewe, nawe ubwawe wari nk’ubwato mu nyanja rwagati, wuzuye ibicuruzwa kandi unaremerewe." 
Ezekiel27:26 Abasare bawe bagushoye mu mazi magari, umuyaga w’iburasirazuba ugusandariza mu nyanja nyirizina." 
Ezekiel27:27 Ubukire bwawe, ibicuruzwa byawe n’ibindi bintu wari wikoreye, abasare n’abatware bawe, abasannyi n’abacuruzi bawe, abasirikare n’abagenzi bose utwaye, bagiye kurokera mu nyanja ku munsi w’ukurohama kwawe!" 
Ezekiel27:28 Ubwo inkombe zihinde umushyitsi, zumvise induru y’abasare bawe." 
Ezekiel27:29 Nuko abashinzwe kugashya bose bururuke mu mato yabo, mbese abasare bose bambukaga inyanja bigumire imusozi." 
Ezekiel27:30 Dore baratera hejuru bakuririra, baraboroga cyane bababaye. Baritumurira umukungugu mu mutwe, maze bakigaragura mu ivu." 
Ezekiel27:31 Bariharanguza kubera wowe, bakenyere n’ibigunira, umubabaro wabo ubateye kukuririra, baraboroga bikabije." 
Ezekiel27:32 Mu kababaro kabo n’agahinda bafite baracura imiborogo, bakakuririra bagira bati ’Ni nde wari ukwiriye kugereranywa na Tiri, iyo yabaga iri mu nyanja rwagati?’" 
Ezekiel27:33 Iyo wabaga womokanye ibicuruzwa byawe, wahazaga amahanga atagira ingano, ubukire bwawe bwinshi n’ibyo utunze, bigakungahaza abami b’isi." 
Ezekiel27:34 None dore wajanjaguriwe n’imivumba mu mazi magari, imitwaro yawe n’abagenzi birohamana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:35 Abatuye ibirwa bakutse umutima kubera ibikubayeho, abami babo batashywe n’ubwoba, barasuhererwa." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abacuruzi b’amahanga baragukubitira akavugirizo, kuko wahindutse ikintu giteye ubwoba, kandi ukaba utazongera kubaho ukundi.»" 
Ezekiel28:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel28:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, bwira icyo gikomangoma cy’i Tiri, uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Kubera ko umutima wawe wirase, ukaba waravuze ngo: Ndi imana, nganje mu nyanja rwagati; nyamara kandi uri umuntu nturi Imana, n’ubwo wigereranya n’Imana bwose." 
Ezekiel28:3 Wigize umuhanga utambutse Daneli, dore ngo ko nta banga ujya uyoberwa." 
Ezekiel28:4 Kubera ubuhanga n’ubwenge ufite, wagwije umutungo, zahabu na feza ubihunika mu bubiko bwawe." 
Ezekiel28:5 Ubwenge bwawe n’ubucuruzi, byatumye wongera umutungo wawe, maze ubukire bwawe butera umutima wawe kwikuza!" 
Ezekiel28:6 Ni yo mpamvu Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati ’Kuko wigereranyije n’Imana," 
Ezekiel28:7 ngiye kuguteza abanyamahanga b’ababisha kurusha abandi. Bazakura inkota barwanye ubwo buhanga bwawe, icyubahiro cyawe bagihindanye." 
Ezekiel28:8 Bazakuroha mu rwobo, maze upfire rubi mu nyanja nyirizina.’" 
Ezekiel28:9 Uzongera se uvuge ngo: Ndi Imana, igihe abishi bawe bazaba bagusatiriye? Oya da! Nturi Imana, ahubwo uri umuntu, ndetse uri mu maboko y’abagusogota." 
Ezekiel28:10 Uzapfa urw’abatagenywe ugwe mu maboko y’abanyamahanga, kuko jyewe Uhoraho ari ko navuze.’»" 
Ezekiel28:11 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel28:12 «Mwana w’umuntu, ririmba indirimbo y’amaganya yerekeye umwami w’i Tiri. Uzamubwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Wahoze uri intangarugero mu butungane, wuje ubuhanga, ukagira n’ubwiza buhebuje," 
Ezekiel28:13 ugatura muri Edeni, ubusitani bw’Imana. Wari wisesuyeho igishura gitatse amabuye y’agaciro: irya sarudoni, topazi, diyama, kirisolite, na onigisi, irya yasipi, safiri, malakita na emerodi; ingoma n’imyirongi byawe bitatswe na zahabu, ibyo byose byarateguwe umunsi w’iremwa ryawe." 
Ezekiel28:14 Wowe wari umukerubimu urambuye amababa, naragushyiriyeho kuba umurinzi. Wari ku musozi mutagatifu w’Imana, ukagenda rwagati mu makara agurumana." 
Ezekiel28:15 Imyifatire yawe iba intangarugero kuva ukiremwa, kugeza ubwo utahuwemo ubwo bugome." 
Ezekiel28:16 Kubera imihihibikano y’ubucuruzi bwawe, wigwijemo ubugome n’ibyaha; ni bwo nguhanantuye hejuru y’umusozi w’Imana, nkugira igicibwa, wowe, mukerubimu nari narashyiriyeho kuba umurinzi, nkwirukana rwagati mu makara agurumana." 
Ezekiel28:17 Ubwiza bwawe bwaguteye kwirata, ubwamamare bwawe bukuyobya ubwenge; ubwo mpera ko nkwesa hasi, ngutangaza imbere y’abami ngo bagushungere." 
Ezekiel28:18 Kubera ibyaha byawe byinshi n’ubucuruzi bwawe bwuje uburiganya, wandavuje amasengero yawe. Ni cyo cyatumye nguhemberamo umuriro, urashya urakongoka, nguhindura ivu ku isi mu maso y’abakurebaga bose." 
Ezekiel28:19 Amahanga yose yari akuzi yakutse umutima, kubera ko wahindutse ikintu giteye ubwoba, kandi ukaba utazongera kubaho ukundi!’»" 
Ezekiel28:20 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel28:21 «Mwana w’umuntu, hindukirira Sidoni maze uyihanurire ibiyerekeyeho." 
Ezekiel28:22 Uzayibwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Dore ngiye kukwibasira, wowe Sidoni, iwawe ni ho ngiye guherwa ikuzo. Bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho, ubwo nzacira Sidoni uruyikwiye, nkayerekaniraho ubutungane bwanjye." 
Ezekiel28:23 Nzayiteza icyorezo, amayira yayo atembemo amaraso. Abantu bazagwa mu mugi rwagati, bishwe n’inkota ziturutse impande zose, maze bamenyereho ko ndi Uhoraho.’" 
Ezekiel28:24 Umuryango wa Israheli ntuzongera kugira amahwa n’imifatangwe bihanda, biturutse mu bayikikije bayisuzugura; maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel28:25 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Igihe nzakoranya umuryango wa Israheli mbavanye mu mahanga batataniyemo, nzagaragariza muri bo ubutungane bwanjye mu maso y’amahanga; bazature ku butaka nahaye Yakobo, umugaragu wanjye." 
Ezekiel28:26 Bazahatura mu ituze, biyubakire amazu batere n’imizabibu, maze bibereho mu mutekano. Icyo gihe ababakikije bose banabasuzugura nzabacira urubakwiye, maze bamenyereho ko ndi Uhoraho, Imana yabo.»" 
Ezekiel29:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi, ku munsi wa cumi n’ibiri w’ukwezi kwa cumi, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel29:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hindukirira Farawo, umwami wa Misiri; umuhanurire ibimwerekeyeho, we n’igihugu cye cya Misiri." 
Ezekiel29:3 Mubwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Dore ngiye kukwibasira, Farawo, mwami wa Misiri, wowe umeze nk’ingona nyamunini, irambaraye rwagati mu nzuzi zawe, ukaba waravuze uti ’Uruzi rwa Nili ni urwanjye bwite, ni jye warwihangiye.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Ngiye kuzirika imikwege ku nzasaya zawe, amafi y’inzuzi zawe nyakomekeho, ngukure mu nzuzi zawe, n’amafi yazo yose uko yakabaye, akometseho," 
Ezekiel29:5 nkunage mu butayu n’amafi y’inzuzi zawe zose, uzagwe ku gasi ubutagira ukuraruza cyangwa uguhamba. Nzakugabiza inyamaswa zo ku isi n’ibisiga byo mu kirere," 
Ezekiel29:6 nuko Abanyamisiri bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho: bo Israheli yishingikirijeho bakayibera nk’inkoni y’urubingo," 
Ezekiel29:7 bayifata ikabavunikira mu ntoki, ikabahinguranya urutugu; bayicumba ikavunagurika, igatuma bacika umugongo.’»" 
Ezekiel29:8 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati «Dore nguterereje inkota kugira ngo ikumare ku bantu no ku matungo. 
Ezekiel29:9 Igihugu cya Misiri nzagihindura ubutayu n’amatongo, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho kuko wavuze ngo ’Uruzi rwa Nili ni urwanjye bwite, ni jye warwihangiye.’" 
Ezekiel29:10 Kuva ubu rero ndakwibasiye wowe n’inzu zawe: igihugu cya Misiri nzagihindura amatongo n’ubutayu, uhereye i Migidoli ukagera i Siyeni no ku rugabano rwa Kushi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Nta kirenge cy’umuntu cyangwa urwara rw’inyamaswa bizongera kuhakandagira, igihugu kizamare imyaka mirongo ine yose kidatuwe." 
Ezekiel29:12 Igihugu cya Misiri nzagihindura ubutayu rwagati mu bindi bihugu byayogojwe; imigi yacyo nyihindure amatongo hagati y’indi migi yashenywe, igihe cy’imyaka mirongo ine yose. Abanyamisiri nzabatatanyiriza mu mahanga, mbakwize imishwaro mu bindi bihugu." 
Ezekiel29:13 Koko rero Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Nyuma y’imyaka mirongo ine, nzakorakoranya Abanyamisiri mbavane mu mahanga bari batataniyemo;" 
Ezekiel29:14 nzagarura Abanyamisiri bari bajyanywe bunyago, mbatuze bundi bushya mu gihugu cya Patorosi, ari cyo gihugu cyabo kavukire, maze bashinge ingoma yoroheje." 
Ezekiel29:15 Misiri izaba igihugu cy’intege nke kurusha ibindi byose, kireke kuzongera guhagurukira amahanga. Nzagicisha bugufi kugira ngo kitazava aho cyongera gushikamira amahanga ukundi." 
Ezekiel29:16 Ntikizongera kwiringirwa n’umuryango wa Israheli, kuko byawibutsa ikosa wagize igihe wisunze Misiri; bityo bazamenye ko ndi Nyagasani Uhoraho’»" 
Ezekiel29:17 Nuko mu mwaka wa makumyabiri n’irindwi, ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel29:18 «Mwana w’umuntu, Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni, yagabye igitero gikomeye, agambiriye gutera Tiri. Imitwe y’ingabo ze zose yamyotseho imisatsi n’intugu zose zirakobagurika; nyamara ari we ari n’ingabo ze, icyo gitero yagabye muri Tiri nta n’umwe cyagize icyo kimarira." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga, ati ’Dore igihugu cya Misiri nkeguriye Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni. Azakinyaga ubukire bwacyo, agitware iminyago, ibyo azagisahura byose bizabe igihembo cy’ingabo ze." 
Ezekiel29:20 Mugabiye igihugu cya Misiri ho ingororano y’umuruho azaba yagize — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — kuko ari jye bazaba bakoreye. 
Ezekiel29:21 Uwo munsi nzagoborera umuryango wa Israheli ububasha bukomeye, hanyuma nawe, mwana w’umuntu, nguhe ubushobozi bwo kuvugira rwagati muri bo; maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
Ezekiel30:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel30:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hanura maze uvuge uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Nimuboroge muvuga muti ’Mbega umunsi!’" 
Ezekiel30:3 Kuko umunsi wegereje, umunsi w’Uhoraho ukaba uri hafi. Uzaba umunsi ubuditse ibihu, icyo gihe amahanga azaba asakiwe." 
Ezekiel30:4 Inkota izayogoza Misiri, igihugu cya Kushi kizashya ubwoba, igihe intumbi zizaba zararikwa mu Misiri, bakayinyaga ubukire bwayo n’imfatiro zayo zikarimburwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kushi, Puti na Ludi, Arabiya yose, Kubi n’abatuye ibihugu byunze ubumwe bose bazicishwa inkota." 
Ezekiel30:6 Dore uko Uhoraho avuga: Abari bashyigikiye Misiri bazacisha make, ubwirasi bushingiye ku mbaraga buyoyoke; guhera i Megidoli kugeza i Siyeni — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — bazashirira ku nkota." 
Ezekiel30:7 Bazarimburwa kimwe n’ibihugu byarimbuwe, imigi yabo ibarirwe mu yasenyaguritse." 
Ezekiel30:8 Nuko bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, ubwo nzateza Misiri inkongi y’umuriro, n’abayishyigikiye bose nkabahashya." 
Ezekiel30:9 Uwo munsi, nzohereza itumwa mu mato, zijye guhungabanya umutekano muri Kushi; abayituye bazashya ubwoba, kuri uwo munsi wa Misiri. Ni koko kandi, ngibi biregereje!" 
Ezekiel30:10 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga: Nzatsemba imbaga y’Abanyamisiri mbigirishije ukuboko kwa Nebukadinetsari, umwami wa Babiloni." 
Ezekiel30:11 We n’abantu be b’ababisha kurusha andi mahanga, bazazanwa no kuyogoza igihugu. Bazakura inkota barwanye Misiri, igihugu bacyuzuzemo intumbi." 
Ezekiel30:12 Nzakamya inzuzi za Misiri, igihugu nkigurishe n’abagome; ntsembe igihugu n’ibyo gitunze byose mbigirishije ukuboko kw’abanyamahanga. Jyewe Uhoraho ndabivuze." 
Ezekiel30:13 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga: Ngiye gutsemba burundu ibigirwamana, mvaneho ibishushanyo by’i Nofu; ndetse nta n’igikomangoma kizongera kubaho ukundi mu gihugu cya Misiri. Ngiye guteza ubwoba igihugu cya Misiri." 
Ezekiel30:14 Nzayogoza Patorosi, Sowani nyiteze inkongi y’umuriro, naho umugi wa No nywucire uruwukwiye." 
Ezekiel30:15 Nzamarira uburakari bwanjye kuri Sini, ikigo gikomeye cyo mu Misiri; nzatsembe n’imbaga itabarika yo muri uwo mugi wa No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Igihugu cya Misiri nzagiteza inkongi y’umuriro; i Sini bagire umubabaro ukomeye, umugi wa No nywucemo icyuho, naho Nofu amazi ayisenderemo." 
Ezekiel30:17 Abasore b’i Oni n’i Pibezeti bazicishwa inkota, n’imigi ubwayo izatwarwe bunyago." 
Ezekiel30:18 I Tafunesi umuseke ntuzakeba, igihe nzaba nakuyeho uburetwa bwa Misiri, n’ubwibone baterwa n’imbaraga zayo bukarangira. Igicu kizayibundikira, maze abakobwa bayo bajyanwe bunyago." 
Ezekiel30:19 Nguko uko nzacira Misiri uruyikwiye, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.»" 
Ezekiel30:20 Nuko mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe, ku munsi wa karindwi w’ukwezi kwa mbere, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel30:21 «Mwana w’umuntu, navunaguye ukuboko kwa Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, none dore nta n’umwe watekereje komora igikomere cye ngo agipfuke, kugira ngo nibura yongere kugira imbaraga zo kurwanisha inkota." 
Ezekiel30:22 Ni cyo gitumye Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga ati ’Dore ngiye kwibasira Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, muvunagure amaboko yombi, ukwari kuzima kimwe n’ukwavunitse, maze muteshe inkota iri mu kiganza cye, yiture hasi." 
Ezekiel30:23 Abanyamisiri nzabatatanyiriza mu mahanga, mbakwize imishwaro mu bindi bihugu." 
Ezekiel30:24 Nzakomeza amaboko y’umwami w’i Babiloni, nshyire inkota yanjye mu kiganza cye. Nzavunagura amaboko ya Farawo maze azacure umuborogo boshye ujya gupfa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Nzakomeza amaboko y’umwami w’i Babiloni, naho aya Farawo azacike intege; bityo bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, igihe nzaba nashyize inkota yanjye mu biganza by’umwami w’i Babiloni, akayibangura ngo arwanye igihugu cya Misiri." 
Ezekiel30:26 Abanyamisiri nzabatatanyiriza mu mahanga, mbakwize imishwaro mu bindi bihugu, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
Ezekiel31:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe, ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa gatatu, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel31:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, bwira Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, n’imbaga y’abantu be, uti ’Nakugereranya n’iki se mu buhangange bwawe?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Dore rwose umeze nk’isederi yo muri Libani, ifite amashami meza nk’ishyamba ricucitse, ikaba ndende n’ubushorishori bwayo bugakabakaba ku bicu." 
Ezekiel31:4 Imvura yatumye ikura, amazi azamuka mu butaka ayiha gusagamba, igihe atembesha inzuzi mu mpande zayo zose, akohereza imigezi mu biti byose byo mu gasozi." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ni cyo cyatumye ikura, igasumbya uburebure ibindi biti byo mu gasozi, imicwira yayo ikagwira n’amashami yayo akiyongera, irasagamba, ibikesheje ko yahaze amazi." 
Ezekiel31:6 Inyoni zose zo mu kirere zarikaga mu mashami yayo, inyamaswa z’ishyamba zikabyarira mu nsi yayo, igicucu cyayo kikugamisha abantu batagira ingano." 
Ezekiel31:7 Iyo sederi yari yizihije kubera ubunini bwayo n’uburebure bw’amashami yayo; kuko yashoreraga imizi yayo mu mazi menshi. 
Ezekiel31:8 Nta yindi ihwanye na yo mu masederi yo mu busitani bw’Imana, n’imizonobari ntiyagereranywaga n’amashami yayo. Imyerezi ubwayo nta ho yari ihuriye n’ibishami byayo, nta n’igiti na kimwe cyo mu busitani bw’Imana, cyari gihwanyije na yo ubwiza." 
Ezekiel31:9 Nari narayitatse nyihundazaho amababi, bituma ibiti byose byo muri Edeni, ari bwo busitani bw’Imana, biyigirira ishyari.’" 
Ezekiel31:10 None rero, dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Iyo sederi, ari yo mwami wa Misiri, yarakuze, iratumbagira ubushorishori bwayo bukabakaba hejuru mu bicu, umutima wayo wiratana iyo ndeshyo." 
Ezekiel31:11 Ni yo mpamvu nayizibukiriye, nyigabiza umutware w’amahanga, kugira ngo ayigirire ibikwiranye n’ubugome bwayo, kuko nayirukanye." 
Ezekiel31:12 Nuko abanyamahanga, abanyarugomo kurusha andi mahanga yose, barayitema maze bayisiga aho barigendera. Amababi yayo anyanyagira ku misozi no mu bibaya byose; amashami yayo avunagurikira mu mihora yose y’igihugu, abantu bose bazibukira igicucu cyayo, barayihunga." 
Ezekiel31:13 Inyoni zose zo mu kirere zatururiye ku bisigazwa byayo, inyamaswa z’ishyamba ziribata amashami yayo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Nuko rero, ntihazagire igiti na kimwe cyegereye amazi cyongera kureshya gityo, ntihazagire icyongera kugeza ubushorishori bwacyo mu bicu, cyangwa ngo igiti cyavomerewe cyongere kugira uburebure bureshya butyo; kuko byose byagenewe gupfa bikajya mu kuzimu, bigasanga abarambitswe mu rwobo." 
Ezekiel31:15 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Umunsi iyo sederi imanukira ikuzimu, maze nkayifungiranira mu nyenga, nategetse isi yose kujya mu cyunamo. Nahagaritse inzuzi ntizongera gutemba, n’amazi menshi arakama. Libani yacuze umwijima ku mpamvu y’iyo sederi, n’ibiti byose byo mu gasozi biruma kubera yo." 
Ezekiel31:16 Mu rusaku rw’ukurimbuka kwayo nahungabanyije amahanga, igihe nyihananturiye ikuzimu ngo ihasange abarambitswe mu rwobo. Igeze mu kuzimu, ibiti byose byahoze muri Edeni byari byarayihabanjirije, kimwe n’ibiti byose by’intoranywa byahoze muri Libani bikahuhirirwa, byose byarahumurijwe." 
Ezekiel31:17 Nuko n’inkomoko yayo, yari yarugamye mu gicucu cyayo mu yandi mahanga, na yo imanukira ikuzimu isanga abicishijwe inkota." 
Ezekiel31:18 Nakugereranya rero n’ikihe giti mu byo muri Edeni, cyagera ku ikuzo ryawe n’ubuhangange bwawe? Nyamara wahananturiwe ikuzimu hamwe n’ibiti byo muri Edeni, ujya rwagati mu batagenywe, none dore urambaraye hamwe n’abicishijwe inkota. Nguko uko byagendekeye Farawo n’imbaga ye yose. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel32:1 Mu mwaka wa cumi n’ibiri, ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel32:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, ririmbira Farawo, umwami wa Misiri, indirimbo y’amaganya. Uzamubwire utya: Wari nk’icyana cy’intare mu maso y’amahanga, wari umeze nk’ingona mu mazi magari, wakinira mu nzuzi zawe, amazi ukayatera hejuru n’amaguru yawe, maze yose ukayahindura imivumba." 
Ezekiel32:3 None rero Nyagasani Uhoraho aragira ati ‘Nzagutega umutego wanjye amahanga menshi yakoranye, maze bazagukurubanire muri uwo mutego wanjye." 
Ezekiel32:4 Nzakuroha ku butaka, nkujugunye ku gasi; nzakumanuriraho ibisiga byose byo mu kirere, nkugaburire inyamaswa zose zo ku isi zihage." 
Ezekiel32:5 Nzanika inyama zawe ku misozi, ibibaya mbyuzuze ibisigazwa byawe." 
Ezekiel32:6 Igihugu kizuhirwa amaraso akuvamo nk’imivu, azatembe ku misozi, maze asendere mu mikokwe." 
Ezekiel32:7 Igihe uzaba umaze kuzima, nzatwikira ijuru nzimye n’inyenyeri, izuba nzaritwikiriza ibicu, n’ukwezi koye kuzongera kumurika ukundi." 
Ezekiel32:8 Nzazimya ibinyarumuri byose byo mu kirere ku mpamvu yawe, igihugu cyawe ngiteze umwijima w’icuraburindi. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel32:9 Nzashavuza imitima y’abantu b’amoko menshi igihe nzakurimburira mu mahanga, no mu bihugu utigeze umenya." 
Ezekiel32:10 Nzatera amahanga menshi gukuka umutima ku mpamvu yawe n’abami bayo bashye ubwoba, igihe nzaba mbanguye inkota yanjye mu maso yabo. Bazahinda umushyitsi ubudatuza kuri uwo munsi w’ukurimbuka kwawe, buri muntu arwana ku magara ye;" 
Ezekiel32:11 kuko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze ati ‘Inkota y’umwami w’i Babiloni izagukurikirana. 
Ezekiel32:12 Abantu bawe batagira ingano nzabarimbuza inkota y’intwari ku rugamba, ari bo banyarugomo kurusha andi mahanga; bazacishe bugufi ubwirasi bwa Misiri n’abantu bayo bose bazabatsembe." 
Ezekiel32:13 Nzatsemba amatungo yose ya Misiri ari ku nkombe z’amazi magari; bityo nta kirenge cy’umuntu cyangwa ikinono cy’amatungo kizongera kuyavurunga ukundi. 
Ezekiel32:14 Nuko rero nzahe amazi yayo gutuza, inzuzi zayo nzihe gutemba zinyerera nk’amavuta. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel32:15 Igihe igihugu cya Misiri nzaba nagihinduye ubutayu kizamburwa ibyo cyari gitunze, n’igihe nzarimbura abagituye bose, ni bwo bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho.’" 
Ezekiel32:16 Ngiyo indirimbo y’amaganya izaririmbwa n’abakobwa bo mu mahanga; bakazayiririmba baganya kubera Misiri n’imbaga yayo yose. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.» 
Ezekiel32:17 Nuko mu mwaka wa cumi n’ibiri, ku munsi wa cumi n’itanu w’ukwezi kwa mbere, Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel32:18 «Mwana w’umuntu, ngaho boroga: uririre imbaga ya Misiri, ufatanyije n’abakobwa bo mu mahanga, maze mubamanurire ikuzimu. Dore nzahabamanurira, basangeyo abandi bose barambitswe mu rwobo." 
Ezekiel32:19 Yemwe, mbaga ya Misiri, mwikwibwira ko hari icyo murusha andi mahanga! Ngaho rero, manuka urambarare hamwe n’abatagenywe," 
Ezekiel32:20 rwagati mu bicishijwe inkota. Bakuye inkota mu rwubati, ikubita Misiri hamwe n’imbaga yayo yose." 
Ezekiel32:21 Iyo ngiyo ikuzimu abari intwari zikomeye, bazabwira Farawo bati ‘Wowe n’abafasha bawe nimumanuke, murambarare hamwe n’abatagenywe bicishijwe inkota.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 Dore umwami wa Ashuru, hamwe n’ingabo ze zose zikikije imva ye, bose bicishijwe inkota." 
Ezekiel32:23 Imva ye bayicukuye mu rwobo rurerure, ingabo ze zirayikikiza. Mbega ngo barazira inkota, kandi ari bo bakwizaga iterabwoba mu gihugu cy’abazima!" 
Ezekiel32:24 Dore n’umwami wa Elamu hamwe n’abantu be bakikije imva ye, bose bicishijwe inkota. Abo batagenywe bamanukiye ikuzimu, kandi ari bo bakwizaga iterabwoba mu gihugu cy’abazima; none barahasangirira ikimwaro n’abandi barambitswe mu rwobo." 
Ezekiel32:25 Dore n’umwami wa Elamu, hamwe n’imbaga ye ikikije imva ye, bose bicishijwe inkota. Abo batagenywe bamanukiye ikuzimu kandi ari bo bakwizaga iterabwoba mu gihugu cy’abazima; none barahasangirira ikimwaro n’abandi barambitswe mu rwobo, bashyirwa hagati y’izo ntumbi." 
Ezekiel32:26 Dore umwami wa Mesheki n’uwa Tubali n’imbaga zabo zose zikikije imva zabo. Abo bose ni abatagenywe bazize inkota, kuko bakwije iterabwoba mu gihugu cy’abazima." 
Ezekiel32:27 Ntibarambaraye hamwe n’intwari za kera, zo zamanukiye ikuzimu zitwaje intwaro, zigasegurwa inkota zazo, zigasasirwa ingabo zazo, kuko iterabwoba ryari rikiri ryose mu gihugu cy’abazima." 
Ezekiel32:28 Naho wowe uzatsembwa, urambarare hagati mu batagenywe bicishijwe inkota." 
Ezekiel32:29 Dore na Edomu, abami bayo n’ibikomangoma byayo byose; n’ubwo bari intwari bwose, ngaba na bo bashyizwe mu bicishijwe inkota. Barambaraye mu batagenywe, hamwe n’abamanukira mu rwobo." 
Ezekiel32:30 Dore n’ibikomangoma byose byo mu majyaruguru, Abanyasidoni bose bamanukanye n’abishwe kubera iterabwoba ryaturukaga ku mbaraga zabo. Abo batagenywe bakozwe n’isoni, barambaraye mu bicishijwe inkota, kandi bajyanye n’ikimwaro cyabo hamwe n’abamanukira mu rwobo." 
Ezekiel32:31 Farawo rero, azabitegereza ahumurizwe no kubona iyo mbaga." 
Ezekiel32:32 Koko kandi, Farawo n’ingabo ze zose bazicishwa inkota, bazamurambika mu batagenywe, hamwe n’abicishijwe inkota. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel33:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel33:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, noneho abo mu muryango wawe, uzababwire utya: Iyo hari igihugu nteje inkota, abantu baho bafata umwe muri bo bakamushinga kureba ko hari uza," 
Ezekiel33:3 iyo abonye inkota ije iteye igihugu avuza ihembe kugira ngo aburire rubanda. 
Ezekiel33:4 Nihagira uwumva iryo hembe ariko ntaryiteho hanyuma inkota ikaza ikamwica, amaraso y’uwo muntu ni we ubwe azabarwaho." 
Ezekiel33:5 Yumvise ihembe rivuga ariko ntiyaryitaho; none amaraso ye azamubarwaho. Nyamara uwaryumvise akanaryitaho, uwo yakijije ubugingo bwe." 
Ezekiel33:6 Ariko niba ushinzwe kuburira rubanda yabonye inkota ije ntavuze ihembe, rubanda ntirubimenye, maze inkota ikahagera ikica umwe muri bo, uwo muntu azapfa azize ikosa ry’umurinzi, azabe ari we uryozwa amaraso ya mugenzi we." 
Ezekiel33:7 Nawe rero, mwana w’umuntu, nagushyiriyeho kuburira umuryango wa Israheli. Igihe uzaba wumvise ijambo rivuye mu kanwa kanjye, ujye ubaburira mu kigwi cyanjye." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ndamutse mbwiye umugome nti ’Wa mugome we, ugiye gupfa’, naho wowe ntumuburire ngo ahindure imyifatire ye, uwo mugome azapfa azize ikosa rye, kandi ni wowe nzaryoza amaraso ye." 
Ezekiel33:9 Ariko nuramuka umuburiye, ntazibukire imyifatire ye mibi ngo ahinduke, uwo mugome azapfa azize icyaha cye, naho wowe uzaba ukijije ubugingo bwawe.»" 
Ezekiel33:10 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, ubwire umuryango wa Israheli, uti «Mukunda gusubira muri aya magambo ngo: Ibicumuro byacu biradushikamiye, bigatuma turimbuka; ubu se, twashobora kubaho dute?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Babwire ko mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuzenta bwo njya nishimira urupfu rw’umugome, ahubwo nishimira ko yahinduka akazibukira imyifatire ye mibi, kugira ngo abone kubaho. Nimuhinduke rero muzibukire iyo nzira mbi yanyu! Ni kuki se mwarinda gupfa, muryango wa Israheli?»" 
Ezekiel33:12 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, ubwire abo mu muryango wawe, uti «Uko ubutungane bw’intungane butazayikiza ku munsi yacumuye, ni ko n’ubugiranabi bw’umugome butazamwicisha, umunsi azaba yahindutse akazibukira ubugiranabi bwe. Intungane ntizongera kubeshwaho n’ubutungane bwayo ku munsi izaba yacumuye." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ndamutse mbwiye intungane nti ‘Uzabaho’, ariko we kubera kwiringira ubwo butungane bwe agakora ikibi, ubwo butungane bwe ntibuzongera kwibukwa ukundi, ahubwo azapfa azize ikibi icyo ari cyo cyose azaba yakoze." 
Ezekiel33:14 Ariko nimbwira umugome nti ‘Uzapfa’, maze akazibukira ibyaha bye kandi agakurikiza amategeko n’ubutungane," 
Ezekiel33:15 agasubiza icyo yahaweho ingwate, akagarura icyo yibye, agakurikiza amategeko atanga ubugingo ntasubire gukora ikibi ukundi, azabaho ntateze gupfa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Nta cyaha mu byo yakoze kizibukwa, ahubwo azabaho kuko yakurikije amategeko n’ubutabera." 
Ezekiel33:17 Abo mu muryango wawe baravuga bati ’Imigenzereze ya Nyagasani ntitunganye.’ Nyamara, imigenzereze yanyu ni yo idatunganye." 
Ezekiel33:18 Umuntu w’intungane ateshwa ubutungane bwe agakora ikibi, agapfa kubera ibyo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Umugome na we nazibukira ubugiranabi bwe, agakurikiza amategeko n’ubutungane, ibyo bizatuma abaho." 
Ezekiel33:20 Naho mwebwe muravuga ngo ‘Imigenzereze ya Nyagasani ntitunganye!’ Muryango wa Israheli, nzacira buri muntu urubanza nkurikije imyifatire ye!»" 
Ezekiel33:21 Mu mwaka wa cumi n’umwe, ku munsi wa gatanu w’ukwezi kwa cumi tujyanywe bunyago, umuntu wacitse ku icumu aza ansanga aturutse i Yeruzalemu, maze arambwira ngo «Umugi warafashwe.»" 
Ezekiel33:22 Ku mugoroba wabanzirizaga umunsi uwo muntu yajeho, ikiganza cy’Uhoraho kikaba kiranshikamiye, nuko mu gitondo mbere y’uko wa wundi angeraho, Uhoraho ambumbura umunwa, maze umunwa wanjye urabumbuka sinongera kuba ikiragi ukundi." 
Ezekiel33:23 Nuko Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel33:24 «Mwana w’umuntu, abatuye ku butaka bwa Israheli, abari muri ayo matongo, baravuga bati ’Abrahamu yari wenyine igihe agabiwe iki gihugu; none turi benshi, ni twebwe twagihaweho umurage.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 Babwire rero uti ‘Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Muraryana inyama n’amaraso yazo, murubura amaso mukitegereza ibigirwamana byanyu, mukamena amaraso, none ngo muzatunga iki gihugu?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Mwishingikiriza inkota zanyu, mugakora amahano, buri wese akagundira umugore wa mugenzi we, none ngo muzatunga iki gihugu?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Bawire ibi ngibi: Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye, abo bakiri mu matongo bazicishwa inkota, uri mu gasozi nzamugabize inyamaswa zimutanyaguze, naho abari mu bihanamanga no mu buvumo bazatsembwe n’ibyorezo." 
Ezekiel33:28 Igihugu nzagihindura ubutayu, maze ubwo bwirasi muterwa n’imbaraga mufite burangirire aho. Imisozi ya Israheli izayogozwa kandi nta n’uzongera kuhanyura ukundi." 
Ezekiel33:29 Bityo bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, igihe nzahindura igihugu ubutayu ku mpamvu y’amahano yose bakoze.’" 
Ezekiel33:30 None rero, mwana w’umuntu, dore abo mu muryango wawe aho bahagaze iruhande rw’inkike no ku miryango y’amazu, bariho baraganira ibyawe. Umwe arabwira undi, buri muntu akabwira mugenzi we ati ’Nimuze twumve ijambo riturutse kuri Uhoraho.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Nuko bakagusanga ari imbaga, umuryango wanjye ukicara imbere yawe, bagatega amatwi amagambo yawe, ariko ntibayakurikize. Ibyo bashyize imbere ni ibinyoma biri mu kanwa kabo, n’umutima wabo ukihambira ku rwunguko ruturutse ku buriganya." 
Ezekiel33:32 Batega amatwi amagambo yawe nk’aho wabaye umuririmbyi wagoroye ijwi ucuranga indirimbo z’urukundo; naho kuyakurikiza ibyo ntibabiranganwa. 
Ezekiel33:33 Nyamara, igihe ibyo bizaba byageze — kandi dore biraje — ni bwo bazamenya ko muri bo higeze kuba umuhanuzi.»" 
Ezekiel34:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel34:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hanurira abashumba ba Israheli ibiberekeyeho. Bahanurire ubabwira uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Bariyimbire abo bashumba ba Israheli biragira ubwabo! Mbese ye, ubundi abashumba ntibagomba gukenura ubushyo?" 
Ezekiel34:3 None mwebwe murinywera amata, murambara imyambaro y’ubwoya bw’intama, mukibagira iz’imishishe kurusha izindi, ariko ntimwite ku matungo." 
Ezekiel34:4 Intama zinanutse ntimwazondoye, iyari irwaye ntimwayivura cyangwa ngo mwomore iyakomeretse. Ntimwagaruye iyari yatannye, ngo mushakashake iyazimiye; ahubwo mukazishorerana ubugome n’umwaga." 
Ezekiel34:5 Zaratatanye kuko nta mushumba, zihinduka umuhigo w’inyamaswa z’ishyamba kuko zatatanyijwe." 
Ezekiel34:6 Dore amatungo yanjye arangara ku misozi yose n’ahantu hose hirengeye; yakwiriye imishwaro mu gihugu cyose, nta n’umwe uyitaho, nta n’uwaruhije ayashakashaka." 
Ezekiel34:7 None rero, mwa bashumba mwe, nimutege amatwi ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel34:8 Mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — kubera ko amatungo yanjye yatejwe abashimusi, agahinduka umuhigo w’inyamaswa z’ishyamba kuko nta mushumba afite, abashumba banjye ntibite ku matungo yanjye, bakiragira ubwabo aho kuragira amatungo yanjye;" 
Ezekiel34:9 nimwumve noneho, mwa bashumba mwe, ijambo ry’Uhoraho!" 
Ezekiel34:10 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Dore ngiye kwibasira abo bashumba, nzabanyaga amatungo yanjye kandi kuva ubu mbabuze kundagirira, bityo na bo baherukire aho kongera kwiragira ubwabo. Nzavana intama zanjye mu kanwa kabo, ntibazongera kuzirya ukundi.»" 
Ezekiel34:11 Koko Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Dore jye ubwanjye ngiye gukenura amatungo yanjye kandi nyiteho. 
Ezekiel34:12 Uko umushumba yita ku matungo ye igihe aba ari hagati y’intama zibyagiye, nanjye ni ko nzita ku ntama zanjye, nzivane ahantu hose zatatanirijwe ku munsi w’ibihu n’umwijima." 
Ezekiel34:13 Koko, nzazivana mu gihugu zari zirimo, nzikoranye nzivanye mu bihugu by’amahanga, maze nzigarure ku butaka bwazo. Nzaziragira ku misozi ya Israheli, mu mibande no mu turere twose dutuwe tw’igihugu." 
Ezekiel34:14 Nzaziragira mu rwuri rutoshye, maze imisozi isumbya iyindi uburebure ya Israheli, ibe ikiraro cyazo. Ni ho zizaruhukira mu kiraro cyiza; zizarishe ubwatsi butoshye bwo ku misozi ya Israheli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ni jye ubwanjye uziragirira intama zanjye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuzejye nzazibyagiza ziruhuke. 
Ezekiel34:16 Nzashakashaka iyazimiye, ngarure iyari yatannye, iyakomeretse nyomore, naho iyari irwaye nyondore, ibyibushye ikanagira ubuzima bwiza nkomeze kuyitaho. Nzaziragira zose nkurikije ubutabera." 
Ezekiel34:17 Naho mwebwe rero, ntama zanjye, nimwumve uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Dore ngiye gukiranura inyagazi n’izindi ntama, nkiranure amapfizi y’intama n’amasekurume." 
Ezekiel34:18 Bite se? Ntimwanyuzwe no kurisha mu rwuri rutoshye, ahubwo munyukanyuka ubwatsi busigaye! Ntimwanyuzwe no kunywa amazi y’urubogobogo, ahubwo n’asigaye muyatobesha ibinono byanyu!" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ubwo se murabona ko intama zanjye ari zo zigomba kurisha ubwatsi mwanyukanyutse, zikanywa n’amazi ibinono byanyu byatobye?" 
Ezekiel34:20 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Ngaha nje gukiranura intama z’imishishe n’izinanutse." 
Ezekiel34:21 Ubwo mwihaye kubyiga no gutera igitugu, intama zose zinanutse mukazitsimbisha amahembe, mukageza n’aho muzisuka hanze zigatatana," 
Ezekiel34:22 ngiye kuza gukiza intama zanjye kugira ngo zitazongera gushimutwa bibaho; ngiye gukiranura inyagazi n’izindi ntama.’ 
Ezekiel34:23 Abo mu bushyo bwanjye nzababonera umushumba mbamushinge abaragire; umugaragu wanjye Dawudi ni we uzabaragira, ababere umushumba." 
Ezekiel34:24 Jyewe Uhoraho, nzababera Imana, naho umugaragu wanjye Dawudi abe igikomangoma rwagati muri bo. Nguko uko jye Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Ezekiel34:25 Nzagirana na bo isezerano ry’amahoro, nzirukane inyamaswa z’inkazi mu gihugu. Bazatura mu butayu nta mpungenge, biryamire no mu mashyamba." 
Ezekiel34:26 Nzabatuza impande z’umusozi wanjye, nzagushe imvura igihe cyayo maze bazayibonereho umugisha." 
Ezekiel34:27 Ibiti mu murima bizera imbuto zabyo, ubutaka butange umusaruro; bazabeho mu mutekano ku butaka bwabo. Bityo bose bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho, igihe nzaba naciye ingoyi zabo, nkabagobotora mu biganza by’ababishaga agahato." 
Ezekiel34:28 Ntibazongera ukundi kuba umunyago w’amahanga, n’inyamaswa zo mu gihugu ntizizongera kubarya bibaho, maze bazibereho mu ituze nta kibakanga." 
Ezekiel34:29 Nzabaha imirima izwiho kurumbuka, ntibazongera ukundi kwicirwa n’inzara mu gihugu, kandi ntibazongera gutukwa n’abanyamahanga." 
Ezekiel34:30 Nuko bazamenye ko ari jye Imana yabo nkabana na bo — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — banamenye ko n’ab’inzu ya Israheli bose ari umuryango wanjye. 
Ezekiel34:31 Namwe rero, ntama zanjye, muri ishyo ry’abantu niragirira — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — maze jye nkaba Imana yanyu.»" 
Ezekiel35:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel35:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hindukirira imisozi ya Seyiri maze uyihanurire ibiyerekeyeho." 
Ezekiel35:3 Uzayibwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ngaha ndakwibasiye, wowe musozi wa Seyiri, nkuramburiyeho ikiganza cyanjye nzaguhindure ubutayu." 
Ezekiel35:4 Imigi yawe nzayihindura amatongo, nawe ubwawe uzahinduke ubutayu, maze umenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel35:5 Ntiwigeze uhwema kwanga Abayisraheli urunuka, ahubwo wabamariye ku nkota umunsi w’amakuba yabo, babonyeho igihano gikaze." 
Ezekiel35:6 Kubera iyo mpamvu — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — ndahiriye ko ngiye kukuvusha amaraso kandi akazagukurikirana, kuko wayakunze azakwibasira." 
Ezekiel35:7 Umusozi wa Seyiri nzawuhindura ubutayu kandi nywubuze kugendwa. 
Ezekiel35:8 Imisozi yawe nzayararikaho intumbi; abantu bazagwe ku mirenge yawe, mu mibande no mu mihora yawe yose bazize inkota." 
Ezekiel35:9 Nzaguhindura ubutayu budatuwe iteka ryose, imigi yawe ntizongera guturwa ukundi, maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel35:10 Kubera ko wavuze uti ’Amahanga yombi n’ibyo bihugu byombi ngiye kubyigarurira bizabe ibyanjye’ kandi Uhoraho ahibereye," 
Ezekiel35:11 mbirahiye ubugingo bwanjye — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — nzakugenzereza uko wabagenjereje, nkwiture uburakari n’ishyari wabagiriye, ubitewe n’urwango wari ubafitiye. Nzimenyekanisha mu gihugu cyawe igihe nzaba nguhana," 
Ezekiel35:12 maze uzamenye ko jye, Uhoraho, numvise ibitutsi watutse imisozi ya Israheli, ugira uti ’Yahindutse amatongo, turayihawe ngo tuyirimbagure!’" 
Ezekiel35:13 Agasuzuguro wanyeretse karakabije, n’amagambo atagira ingano mwamvuze byose narabyumvise." 
Ezekiel35:14 Dore rero uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Kubera ko mu gihugu cyawe bishimye batyo bagakabya, wowe nzaguhindura ubutayu." 
Ezekiel35:15 Mbese nk’uko washimishijwe no kubona umurage wa Israheli urimburwa, nanjye nzakugenzereza ntyo! Nzaguhindura ubutayu, wowe musozi wa Seyiri, kimwe na Edomu yose uko yakabaye, maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
Ezekiel36:1 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, hanurira imisozi ya Israheli, uyibwire uti «Misozi ya Israheli, nimutege amatwi iri jambo Uhoraho abagezaho:" 
Ezekiel36:2 Ni koko umwanzi yabishongoyeho agira ati ’Awa! Ngaha ya misozi miremire kuva kera turayigaruriye!’ 
Ezekiel36:3 Kubera ibyo, mwana w’umuntu, hanura noneho uti ’Yemwe, misozi ya Israheli, nimutege amatwi iri jambo Nyagasani Uhoraho abafitiye. Barabayogoje, mutangatangwa impande zose, mwigarurirwa n’amahanga yose n’abantu baho babishongoraho." 
Ezekiel36:4 Imisozi n’imirenge yanyu, hamwe n’imihora n’ibibaya, byahindutse amatongo, imigi ntigituwe kandi amahanga ayikikije yarayisahuye, ayihindura urw’amenyo." 
Ezekiel36:5 Ni yo mpamvu, jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho, mbirahijwe n’uburakari bungurumanamo, ko ngiye kwibasira ya mahanga yandi na Edomu yose uko yakabaye, bo bansuzuguye bakishimira kwigabiza igihugu cyanjye, ngo bakigarurire, banagisahure." 
Ezekiel36:6 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, hanura ku byerekeye ubutaka bwa Israheli. Uzabwire imisozi n’imirenge, imihora n’ibibaya, uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze. Mbitewe n’uburakari bungurumanamo, ndavuze nti ’Kubera ko mwatutswe n’amahanga," 
Ezekiel36:7 jyewe Nyagasani Uhoraho, ndabyiyemeje kandi mbirahiye manitse ukuboko: amahanga abakikije na yo azakorwa n’ikimwaro!’" 
Ezekiel36:8 Mwebwe rero, misozi ya Israheli, mugiye kugaba amashami maze murumbuke imbuto zigenewe umuryango wanjye Israheli, kuko uri hafi kugaruka." 
Ezekiel36:9 Dore nje mbasanga, ndabagarukiye, mugiye guhingwa mubibweho imbuto." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ngiye kubagwizaho abantu, maze umuryango wa Israheli ubakwireho wose uko wakabaye. Imigi izongera iturwe n’amatongo yubakwe." 
Ezekiel36:11 Nzabagwizaho abantu n’amatungo, bizagwire kandi byororoke. Nzabaha guturwaho nka mbere, mbagirire neza kurusha hambere, maze muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel36:12 Nzatuma ubutaka bwanyu bwongera gukandagirwaho n’abantu, ari bo umuryango wanjye Israheli; muzabe isambu yabo n’umurage wabo, kandi ntimuzongera kubacuza abana babo ukundi." 
Ezekiel36:13 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuga: Kubera ko bakuvuze nabi ngo ’Israheli ni igihugu kirya abantu, gihekura abagituye’," 
Ezekiel36:14 noneho ntuzongera gukenya abantu — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — ngo uhekure abagutuye. 
Ezekiel36:15 Sinzatuma wongera gutukwa n’amahanga, cyangwa ngo usekwe n’indi miryango — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — kandi ntuzongera guhekura ukundi abagutuye.»" 
Ezekiel36:16 Nuko Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel36:17 «Mwana w’umuntu, abo mu muryango wa Israheli bari batuye igihugu cyabo, bacyandurishije imyifatire yabo n’ibikorwa bibi byabo; mbese rwose imyifatire yabo imbere yanjye, yari imeze nk’ubwandure bw’umugore wahumanye." 
Ezekiel36:18 None rero, ngiye kubamariraho uburakari bwanjye, mbaryoza amaraso bamennye mu gihugu, kimwe n’ibigirwamana bacyandurishije." 
Ezekiel36:19 Nabatatanyirije mu mahanga, mbakwiza imishwaro mu bindi bihugu. Nabaciriye urubanza nkurikije imyifatire yabo n’ibikorwa byabo." 
Ezekiel36:20 Umuryango wanjye wagiye mu mahanga, ugezeyo wandavuza izina ryanjye ritagatifu, bituma babataramiraho bavuga ngo ’Uyu ni umuryango w’Uhoraho, ariko bavuye mu gihugu cye.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Nyamara nagiriye izina ryanjye ritagatifu, ari ryo umuryango wa Israheli wandavurije mu mahanga wajemo." 
Ezekiel36:22 Ngaho rero, bwira umuryango wa Israheli uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ibyo byose si mwe mbigirira, muryango wa Israheli, ahubwo ndagirira izina ryanjye ritagatifu mwandavurije mu mahanga mwajemo." 
Ezekiel36:23 Nzakuza izina ryanjye ry’ikirangirire mwandavurije muri ayo mahanga — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — maze amahanga azamenye ko ndi Uhoraho, nimara kugaragariza muri mwe ubutungane bwanjye, babyirebera n’amaso yabo." 
Ezekiel36:24 Nzabavana mu mahanga, mbakorakoranye, mbavane mu bindi bihugu, maze nzabagarure ku butaka bwanyu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Nzabuhagiza amazi asukuye maze mube abasukure; mbahanagureho ubwandure bwanyu bwose muce ukubiri n’ibigirwamana byanyu byose. 
Ezekiel36:26 Nzabaha umutima mushya, mbashyiremo n’umwuka mushya. Mu mubiri wanyu, nzakuramo umutima w’ibuye, nshyiremo umutima wumva." 
Ezekiel36:27 Nzabuzuzamo umwuka wanjye, mbatere gukurikiza amategeko yanjye, mwubahirize amabwiriza yanjye." 
Ezekiel36:28 Muzatura igihugu nahaye abakurambere banyu, mumbere umuryango nanjye mbe Imana yanyu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Nzabakiza ubwandu bwanyu bwose. Nzameza ingano kandi nzigwize, sinzongera kubicisha inzara ukundi." 
Ezekiel36:30 Nzagwiza imbuto z’ibiti n’umusaruro wo mu mirima, kugira ngo amahanga atazongera kubannyega ngo muhorana inzara." 
Ezekiel36:31 Ubwo rero, muzibuka ko mwari mwarayobye mugakora nabi, bibatere namwe ubwanyu kwizinukwa kubera amakosa yanyu n’amahano mwakoze." 
Ezekiel36:32 Mubimenye neza — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — ko atari mwebwe ngirira; ahubwo nimugire isoni, muryango wa Israheli, kandi mumwazwe n’iyo myifatire yanyu.»" 
Ezekiel36:33 Nyagasani Uhoraho aragira ati «Umunsi nzabahanaguraho ibyaha byanyu byose, imigi yanyu nzayiha kongera guturwa, n’amatongo yayo yubakwe bundi bushya." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ubutaka bwari bwarayogojwe buzongera guhingwa, aho kuba ubutayu mu maso y’abahisi n’abagenzi." 
Ezekiel36:35 Ibyo bizabatera kuvuga bati ’Iki gihugu cyari kimaze igihe ari ubutayu, none dore ni nk’ubusitani bwa Edeni; imigi yari amatongo, yarashenywe irarimburwa, none bayigize ibigo bikomeye kandi bituwe.’" 
Ezekiel36:36 Ubwo uzaba yarokotse mu mahanga abakikije, azamenya ko ari jye Uhoraho wongeye kubaka ibyari byasenyutse, nkongera no gutera imbuto ahari hagizwe ubutayu. Ni jye Uhoraho ubivuze, kandi ndabikoze.»" 
Ezekiel36:37 Nyagasani Uhoraho arongeye aravuze ati «Dore n’ibindi nzakora: nzareka umuryango wanjye unshakashake kugira ngo ngire icyo nywumarira, maze nzabahe kugwira nk’ishyo rigizwe n’abantu." 
Ezekiel36:38 Koko bazaba nk’ishyo ry’amatungo yanyeguriwe, mbese nk’ishyo rikoraniye i Yeruzalemu ku minsi y’amateraniro yabo. Nguko uko imigi yanyu yari amatongo izuzuzwamo inteko z’abantu, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.»" 
Ezekiel37:1 Ububasha bw’Uhoraho bunzaho, antwarisha umwuka we maze angeza rwagati mu kibaya cyari cyuzuyemo amagufa." 
Ezekiel37:2 Nuko anzengurukana muri icyo kibaya aho yari akikije hose, maze nsanga ayo magufa ari menshi cyane, kandi yarumye rwose." 
Ezekiel37:3 Uhoraho arambaza ati «Mwana w’umuntu, aya magufa se yabasha kongera kuba mazima?» Ndamusubiza nti «Nyagasani Uhoraho, ni wowe wabimenya.»" 
Ezekiel37:4 Arambwira ati «Ngaho hanurira aya magufa maze uyabwire uti ’Yemwe mwa magufa yumiranye mwe, nimutege amatwi ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel37:5 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho ababwiye: Ngiye kubashyiramo umwuka maze mwongere mubeho. 
Ezekiel37:6 Ngiye kubateraho imitsi, mbashyireho inyama, mboroseho uruhu, mbashyiremo umwuka maze mubeho; bityo muzamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’»" 
Ezekiel37:7 Ubwo ndahanura nk’uko nari nabitegetswe. Igihe ndiho mpanura, ako kanya numva urusaku, ayo magufa arakorakorana, rimwe rikegera irindi." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ngo ndebe mbona imitsi iyafasheho, inyama zirayatwikira n’uruhu rurayorosa, ariko nta mwuka wari urimo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Nuko arambwira ati «Ngaho, mwana w’umuntu, hanura, uhanurire umwuka. Wubwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Wa mwuka we, turuka mu mpande zose uko ari enye, uhuhere kuri iyi mirambo maze yongere ibeho.’»" 
Ezekiel37:10 Igihe ndiho mpanura nk’uko nabitegetswe, umwuka uza muri ya mirambo, yongera kugira ubuzima, nuko barahaguruka biremamo igitero kinini cyane." 
Ezekiel37:11 Hanyuma arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, ayo magufa ni umuryango wa Israheli wose. Ngabo baravuga bati ’Amagufa yacu yarumiranye, nta cyizere tugifite, turashize.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Ni yo mpamvu rero ugomba guhanura, ubabwira uti ’Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze. Ngiye gukingura imva zanyu nzabavanemo, mwebwe muryango wanjye, maze nzabagarure ku butaka bwa Israheli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Muzamenya ko ndi Uhoraho, mwebwe muryango wanjye, ubwo nzaba nakinguye imva zanyu nkazibavanamo." 
Ezekiel37:14 Nzabashyiramo umwuka wanjye mubeho, kandi mbatuze ku butaka bwanyu; bityo muzamenye ko ari jye Uhoraho wabivuze kandi nkabikora. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.’»" 
Ezekiel37:15 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel37:16 «None rero, mwana w’umuntu, fata akabaho maze wandikeho uti ’Yuda, n’Abayisraheli bahatuye.’ Ufate n’akandi wandikeho uti ’Yozefu (ari we Efurayimu), n’umuryango wose wa Israheli uhatuye.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Nurangiza wegeranye utwo tubaho twombi, maze uduhuze, tube nk’aho ari urubaho rumwe mu kiganza cyawe." 
Ezekiel37:18 Nuko abo mu muryango wawe, nibaramuka bakubajije bati ’Ntiwatuburira se icyo ibyo bisobanura?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 Uzabasubize uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Dore ngiye gufata akabaho ka Yozefu (ari we Efurayimu), hamwe n’imiryango ya Israheli bari kumwe, nkegeranye n’aka Yuda mbikoremo urubaho, rube rumwe rukumbi mu kiganza cyanjye.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 Igihe uzaba ufashe mu kiganza cyawe utwo tubaho twombi wanditseho ayo mazina bose babyirebera," 
Ezekiel37:21 uzababwire uti ’Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ngiye gushaka Abayisraheli, mbavane mu mahanga bari barajyanywemo. Ngiye kubakorakoranya baturuke impande zose, maze mbagarure ku butaka bwabo." 
Ezekiel37:22 Nzabagira umuryango umwe mu gihugu no mu misozi ya Israheli, bazagira umwami umwe ubategeka bose, ubutazongera ukundi kwigabanyamo imiryango ibiri cyangwa se ibihugu bibiri." 
Ezekiel37:23 Ntibazongera kwiyandurisha ibigirwamana byabo, ibiterashozi byabo ndetse n’ibicumuro byabo. Nzabakiza ubuhemu bagize, mbasukure bazabe umuryango wanjye, nanjye mbe Imana yabo." 
Ezekiel37:24 Umugaragu wanjye Dawudi azababera umwami; bazagire umushumba umwe, bubahirize amabwiriza yanjye n’amategeko yanjye kandi babikurikize." 
Ezekiel37:25 Bazatura igihugu nahaye Yakobo umugaragu wanjye, igihugu abakurambere banyu bari batuyemo. Bazagituramo bo ubwabo n’abana babo ndetse n’abuzukuru babo ubuziraherezo; umugaragu wanjye Dawudi azababere umwami iteka ryose." 
Ezekiel37:26 Nzagirana na bo Isezerano ry’amahoro, rizababere isezerano rihoraho. Nzabatuza, mbagwize kandi nshinge Ingoro yanjye rwagati muri bo ubuziraherezo." 
Ezekiel37:27 Nzatura muri bo, mbabere Imana na bo bambere umuryango." 
Ezekiel37:28 Bityo amahanga azamenya ko ndi Uhoraho utagatifuza Israheli, igihe Ingoro yanjye izaba iri rwagati muri bo, ubuziraherezo.’»" 
Ezekiel38:1 Uhoraho ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Ezekiel38:2 «Mwana w’umuntu, hindukirira Gogi wo mu gihugu cya Magogi, igikomangoma n’umutware w’i Mesheki n’i Tubali, maze umuhanurire ibimwerekeyeho." 
Ezekiel38:3 Uzamubwire uti ’Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Ndakwibasiye, wowe Gogi, igikomangoma n’umutware w’i Mesheki n’i Tubali." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ngiye kuzirika imikwege ku nzasaya zawe, ngukurure nguteshe inzira maze nkujyane n’ingabo zawe zose. Amafarasi n’abayagenderaho, bose bitwaje intwaro; abantu benshi bitwaje ingabo kandi bazi kurwanisha inkota bose muzajyana." 
Ezekiel38:5 Dore n’ingabo z’Ubuperisi, iz’i Kushi n’i Puti, zose zifite ingabo n’ingofero z’ibyuma, zifatanyije namwe." 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomeri n’ingabo zayo zose, Betitogaruma yo mu majyaruguru n’ingabo zayo zose, ndetse n’ibihugu bitagira ingano biragushyigikiye." 
Ezekiel38:7 Witegure neza, wowe n’ikoraniro ry’abagushyigikiye bose, maze munyoboke." 
Ezekiel38:8 Nyuma y’iminsi myinshi uzabona amabwiriza. Nihashira imyaka uzatera igihugu cya Israheli. Ku misozi yaho yamaze igihe kirekire yarabaye amatongo, uzahasanga abacitse ku icumu, bahateraniye bavuye mu bihugu byinshi bari baratataniyemo. Kuva aho batandukanyirijwe n’abo mu yindi miryango, bituriye mu mutekano." 
Ezekiel38:9 Ubwo rero uzazamukana n’ingabo zawe zose, hamwe ndetse n’abanyamahanga batagira ingano bazaba bagushyigikiye, uze nk’umuhengeri, cyangwa se uzamere nk’igihu kibuditse hejuru y’igihugu." 
Ezekiel38:10 Dore rero uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze. Uwo munsi mu mutima wawe hazavuka ibitekerezo byinshi, biguteremo imigambi mibi." 
Ezekiel38:11 Uzibwira uti ’Ngiye kuzamuka, ntere kiriya gihugu kitagira ukirengera, mbuze uburyo bariya bantu batuje bakaba banibereye mu mutekano, kandi batuye bose mu migi itazitiye, itagira ibihindizo habe n’inzugi.’" 
Ezekiel38:12 Nuko uzajye gusahura utware n’iminyago, uramburire ikiganza cyawe kuri ayo matongo yongeye guturwa, ukiramburire no ku muryango w’abikoranyirije hamwe bavuye mu mahanga, bakikorera imirimo y’ubworozi n’ubucuruzi kandi bakaba batuye mu isi rwagati." 
Ezekiel38:13 Abantu b’i Sheba n’i Dani, abacuruzi b’i Tarishishi n’abatuye mu ntara zaho bazakubaza bati ’Mbese ariko wazamuwe no gusahura? Izo ngabo zawe se wazikoranyirije kwikorera iminyago? Waba se wazanywe no gusahura zahabu na feza, amatungo n’ibicuruzwa, ngo utware iminyago itubutse?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 Kubera iyo mpamvu rero, mwana w’umuntu, hanurira Gogi, umubwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze. Koko mu gihe umuryango wanjye Israheli uzaba uri mu mutekano, ni bwo uzashyira nzira." 
Ezekiel38:15 Icyo gihe uzimuka iwawe mu majyaruguru, uri kumwe n’imbaga nyamwinshi y’abantu mwese muri ku mafarasi, muri igitero kinini n’ingabo zitagira ingano." 
Ezekiel38:16 Uzaza gutera Israheli, umuryango wanjye, boshye igihu kibuditse hejuruy’ isi. Mu minsi y’imperuka nzakuzana utere igihugu cyanjye, bityo amahanga azakurizeho kumenya igihe nzagaragariza ubutungane bwanjye mu maso yabo, nifashishije wowe, Gogi.’" 
Ezekiel38:17 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati ’Ni wowe wavuzwe mu bihe byo hambere, igihe mbivugishije abagaragu banjye b’abahanuzi ba Israheli, bahanuye icyo gihe bamenyesha ko uzaza ubateye." 
Ezekiel38:18 Kuri uwo munsi, umunsi Gogi azaziraho gutera igihugu cya Israheli, uburakari bwanjye buzarushaho kugurumana. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze. Kubera uburakari mfite" 
Ezekiel38:19 n’umujinya utuma mfureka, ndabivuze ndetse ndanabirahiye ko uwo munsi hazacika igikuba mu gihugu cya Israheli." 
Ezekiel38:20 Ubwo rero, amafi yo mu nyanja n’inyoni zo mu kirere, inyamaswa z’ishyamba n’izikururuka ku butaka zose, hamwe n’abantu bose bari ku isi, byose bizahinde umushyitsi imbere yanjye. Imisozi izarindimuka, ibitare bihanamye bihinde umushyitsi, n’inkike zirunde hasi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ubwo Gogi nzamuteza inkota ku misozi yanjye yose — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — maze bazasubiranemo baterane inkota. 
Ezekiel38:22 Nzamuhanisha ibyorezo no kumena amaraso, nzagusha imvura nyinshi n’urubura, umuriro n’umuyaga w’ishuheri bimugwe hejuru, bigwe no ku ngabo ze no ku mbaga itagira ingano izaba iri kumwe na we." 
Ezekiel38:23 Nzagaragaza ubuhangange bwanjye n’ubutungane bwanjye, nzimenyekanye mu maso y’amahanga atagira ingano, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho.’" 
Ezekiel39:1 None rero, mwana w’umuntu, hanurira Gogi ibimwerekeyeho, umubwire uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze. Ndakwibasiye wowe Gogi, igikomangoma n’umutware w’i Mesheki n’i Tubali." 
Ezekiel39:2 Nzagutesha inzira yawe nkuzane nkwerekeza mu majyaruguru, maze nkugeze mu misozi ya Israheli." 
Ezekiel39:3 Nzavunagurira umuheto wawe mu kiganza cyawe cy’ibumoso, nguteshe imyambi yari mu kiganza cy’iburyo." 
Ezekiel39:4 Wowe ubwawe uzagwa ku misozi ya Israheli, kimwe n’ingabo zawe zose n’imbaga izaba iri kumwe nawe, nkugaburire ibisiga by’amoko yose n’inyamaswa z’ishyamba," 
Ezekiel39:5 kuko uzagwa ku gasi nk’uko jyewe, Nyagasani Uhoraho, mbivuze." 
Ezekiel39:6 Nzohereza inkongi y’umuriro muri Magogi no ku batuye mu birwa bari mu ituze, maze bazamenye ko ndi Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel39:7 Nzamenyekanya izina ryanjye ritagatifu muri Israheli, umuryango wanjye; sinzatuma bongera kwandavuza izina ryanjye ritagatifu, maze amahanga yose azamenye ko ndi Uhoraho na Nyirubutagatifu wa Israheli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Dore kandi ibyo byose bigiye kuba, ndetse biraje, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze; koko uraje wa munsi namenyekanyije kuva kera." 
Ezekiel39:9 Nuko abatuye imigi ya Israheli bazajye gutwika intwaro zabo n’ingabo zabo, imiheto yabo n’imyambi, ibihosho n’amacumu; bizagurumane bimare imyaka irindwi yose." 
Ezekiel39:10 Ntibazasubira gutashya ukundi inkwi mu gasozi cyangwa se gutema ibiti mu mashyamba, kuko bazacana intwaro zabo. Bazasahura na bo ababasahuraga, na bo banyage ababatwaye ibyabo. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel39:11 Uwo munsi nzaha Gogi aho azahambwa muri Israheli, ahantu hazwi cyane ho mu kibaya cy’Abagenzi mu burasirazuba bw’inyanja, bitume abagenzi batongera no kuhanyura. Bazahahamba Gogi n’imbaga ye yose, maze bazakurizeho kuhita: Ikibaya cya Hamoni‐Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Abayisraheli bazahamara amezi arindwi babahamba, kugira ngo bahumanure igihugu." 
Ezekiel39:13 Abatuye igihugu bose bazananizwa no kubahamba — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — bizabaheshe icyubahiro ku munsi nzagaragarizaho ikuzo ryanjye. 
Ezekiel39:14 Hazashyirwaho abantu bashinzwe umurimo wo kuzenguruka igihugu, bahamba intumbi zizaba zasigaye zandagaye ku gasozi kugira ngo bahahumanure; bakazatangira gushakashaka izo ntumbi nyuma y’ayo mezi arindwi."
