Ezekiel39:15 Mu gihe bazaba bazenguruka igihugu nibabona amagufa y’umuntu, bazashinga ikimenyetso iruhande rwayo, kugeza ubwo abacukura bazaza bakayajyana, bakayahamba mu kibaya cya Hamoni‐Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Hazabaho kandi n’umugi witwe Hamona (ari byo kuvuga «Imbaga nyamwinshi») maze bahumanure batyo igihugu.’ 
Ezekiel39:17 None rero, mwana w’umuntu, Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Bwira ibisiga by’amoko yose n’inyamaswa z’ishyamba zose, uti ’Nimukorakorane, mwegerane muturutse impande zose, muze musangire igitambo gikomeye nturiye ku misozi ya Israheli, murye inyama kandi munywe n’amaraso." 
Ezekiel39:18 Muzarya intumbi z’abari intwari, munywe n’amaraso y’ibikomangoma byo ku isi; ni bo za rugeyo, abana b’intama, amasekurume n’ibimasa by’imishishe by’i Bashani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Icyo ni cyo gitambo mbatumiyemo; muzarya ibinure mwijute, munywe n’amaraso muyasinde." 
Ezekiel39:20 Muzahagira ku meza yanjye, muhage amafarasi n’abayagenderaho, hamwe n’izindi ntwari z’ingeri zose. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.’" 
Ezekiel39:21 Nzagaragariza amahanga ikuzo ryanjye, amahanga yose azabone urubanza nzayacira, ububasha bw’ukuboko kwanjye buyashikamire." 
Ezekiel39:22 Ubwo, guhera uwo munsi, umuryango wa Israheli uzamenya ko ndi Uhoraho, Imana yawo, bazabihorane iteka." 
Ezekiel39:23 Amahanga na yo azamenya ko umuryango wa Israheli wajyanywe bunyago kubera ko wancumuyeho, nkaba narabakinze uruhanga rwanjye kubera ko bampemukiye, bigatuma mbagabiza amaboko y’abanzi maze bose bagatsembwa n’inkota." 
Ezekiel39:24 Nabagenjereje uko bikwiranye n’ubwandure bwabo n’ibicumuro byabo, maze mbakinga uruhanga rwanjye." 
Ezekiel39:25 Ni yo mpamvu rero, Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Noneho ngiye kugarura imbohe za Yakobo, ngirire impuhwe umuryango wose wa Israheli, mbereke ko bagomba kubaha izina ryanjye ritagatifu." 
Ezekiel39:26 Bazibagirwa agasuzuguro kabo n’ubuhemu bangiriye, igihe bari mu ituze mu gihugu cyabo nta we ubatera inkeke." 
Ezekiel39:27 Igihe nzaba maze kubavana mu mahanga, nkabakoranya mbavanye mu bihugu by’abanzi; nkabagaragarizamo ubutungane bwanjye mu maso y’amahanga atagira ingano," 
Ezekiel39:28 bazamenya ko ndi Uhoraho Imana yabo. Nguko uko nzabagenzereza maze kubatarura mu mahanga bari barajyanywemo bunyago, igihe nzabakoranyiriza ku butaka bwabo nta n’umwe nsizeyo." 
Ezekiel39:29 Sinzongera kandi kubakinga uruhanga rwanjye ukundi, kuko nzasesekaza umwuka wanjye ku muryango wa Israheli. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel40:1 Mu ntangiriro y’umwaka wa makumyabiri n’itanu tujyanywe bunyago, ku munsi wa cumi w’ukwezi, hakaba hashize imyaka cumi n’ine umugi ufashwe, uwo munsi nyine Uhoraho anshyiraho ikiganza cye, nuko anjyanayo." 
Ezekiel40:2 Muri iryo bonekerwa, anjyana mu gihugu cya Israheli maze ampagarika hejuru y’umusozi muremure cyane, wasaga n’uwubatseho umugi ahagana mu majyepfo." 
Ezekiel40:3 Anjyana aho hantu, maze ngo ndebe mbona umuntu, mu maso he hasaga n’umuringa. Yari ahagaze mu marembo, akagira mu ntoki ze umugozi w’imigwegwe n’inkoni yo gupimisha." 
Ezekiel40:4 Uwo muntu arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, itegereze neza, utege amatwi kandi wite ku byo ngiye kukwereka byose, kuko ari cyo wazaniwe hano. Byongeye kandi, umenyeshe umuryango wa Israheli ibyo uri bubone byose.»" 
Ezekiel40:5 Nuko mbona Ingoro y’Uhoraho yari ikikijwe n’inkike impande zose. Uwo muntu akagira mu ntoki inkoni yo gupimisha ireshya n’imikono itandatu, kandi buri mukono urengaho ahangana n’ikiganza. Apima umubyimba w’inkike uba incuro imwe y’inkoni, ubuhagarike na bwo bugira incuro imwe y’inkoni." 
Ezekiel40:6 Hanyuma, aratambuka agana ku irembo riteganye n’iburasirazuba, azamuka amadarajya yaryo, apima uburebure bwayo bugira incuro imwe y’inkoni." 
Ezekiel40:7 Buri kazu k’umurinzi kari gafite uburebure bw’incuro imwe y’inkoni ku ncuro imwe y’ubugari, naho urukuta rwatandukanyaga utwo tuzu twombi rukagira imikono itanu. Ubugari bw’irembo ry’imbere y’ikirongozi binjiriramo bajya mu nzu, bwareshyaga n’incuro imwe y’inkoni." 
Ezekiel40:8 Apima ikirongozi," 
Ezekiel40:9 kigira imikono umunani, n’inkuta zacyo zigira imikono ibiri. Icyo kirongozi kandi kikaba aherekera imbere mu nzu." 
Ezekiel40:10 Utuzu tw’abarinzi two ku irembo ry’iburasirazuba, twari dutatu kuri buri ruhande, kandi twose tungana, n’inkuta zatwo muri buri ruhande na zo zingana." 
Ezekiel40:11 Noneho apima ubugari bw’irembo bugira imikono icumi, ku mikono cumi n’itatu y’uburebure." 
Ezekiel40:12 Imbere y’utuzu tw’abarinzi hari hubatse agakuta kakagira umukono umwe w’uburebure kuri umwe w’ubugari, maze buri kazu kakagira imikono itandatu kuri buri ruhande." 
Ezekiel40:13 Arongera apima irembo ahereye ku rukuta rw’inyuma rw’akazu kamwe ageza ku urw’akandi biteganye, abona ubugari bw’imikono makumyabiri n’itanu, imiryango yatwo irebana." 
Ezekiel40:14 Apima n’ikirongozi kigira imikono makumyabiri y’ubugari, cyari gikikijwe n’igikari hirya no hino y’irembo." 
Ezekiel40:15 Uhereye imbere y’irembo aho binjirira, ukagera aho ikirongozi giherera, hari imikono mirongo itanu." 
Ezekiel40:16 Utwo tuzu twari dufite amadirishya y’utwuma dusobekeranye; mu nkuta zatwo, kimwe no mu zindi nkuta zose, ndetse no ku kirongozi hari hakikije amadirishya, kandi buri rukuta rutatseho imikindo." 
Ezekiel40:17 Nuko uwo mugabo anjyana mu gikari cyo hanze, ngo ndebe mbona imbuga ishashemo amabuye, ikaba yubatseho amazu akikije impande zose z’igikari; yose hamwe yari mirongo itatu." 
Ezekiel40:18 Iyo mbuga yagarukiraga ku marembo yose; amabuye ayishasheho aringaniye no hasi aho buri rembo ritangirira. 
Ezekiel40:19 Apima ubugari bw’icyo gikari cyo hanze, ahereye imbere ku irembo ryo hasi, ageza ku rukuta aho igikari cy’imbere gitangirira, hagira imikono ijana. Aho ni aherekera mu burasirazuba." 
Ezekiel40:20 Apima ubugari n’uburebure bw’irembo ryo ku gikari cyo hanze, ryarebaga mu majyaruguru." 
Ezekiel40:21 Utuzu tw’abarinzi twari dutatu kuri buri ruhande rw’irembo, inkuta zaryo n’ikirongozi cyaryo bingana n’iby’irembo rya mbere, bigira imikono mirongo itanu y’uburebure kuri makumyabiri n’itanu y’ubugari." 
Ezekiel40:22 Amadirishya, ikirongozi n’imikindo byaryo, byanganyaga ingero n’iby’irembo ryerekera mu burasirazuba. Baryinjiragamo babanje kuzamuka amadarajya arindwi, ikirongozi cyaryo kiri imbere yabo." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ku gikari cy’imbere na ho hari n’irindi rembo riteganye n’iryo mu majyaruguru, nk’uko bimeze ku ry’iburasirazuba. Apima umwanya uri hagati y’irembo n’irindi, hagira imikono ijana." 
Ezekiel40:24 Nuko anjyana mu ruhande rwerekera mu majyepfo, na ho hari irembo rireba mu majyepfo, maze apima utuzu, inkuta n’ikirongozi byaryo, byose bingana n’ibya mbere." 
Ezekiel40:25 Irembo n’ikirongozi byari bikikijwe n’amadirishya asa n’aya mbere, iryo rembo rikagira imikono itanu y’uburebure kuri makumyabiri n’itanu y’ubugari." 
Ezekiel40:26 Ryari rifite amadarajya arindwi bazamukiraho, abanziriza ikirongozi cyaryo; ku nkuta zaryo hatatseho imikindo, umwe umwe kuri buri ruhande." 
Ezekiel40:27 Ku gikari cy’imbere na ho hari n’irindi rembo ryerekeye mu majyepfo, apima umwanya uri hagati y’ayo marembo yombi yo mu majyepfo, abona imikono ijana." 
Ezekiel40:28 Hanyuma tunyura mu irembo ryo mu majyepfo anjyana mu gikari cy’imbere, apima iryo rembo ryari rifite ingero zingana;" 
Ezekiel40:29 utuzu tw’abarinzi, inkuta zaryo n’ikirongozi cyaryo na byo byari bifite ingero zimwe. Irembo n’ikirongozi cyaryo byari bikikijwe n’amadirishya, rikagira imikono mirongo itanu y’uburebure kuri makumyabiri n’itanu y’ubugari." 
Ezekiel40:30 (...) 
Ezekiel40:31 Ikirongozi cyaryo cyari aherekera ku gikari cyo hanze, inkuta zaryo zitatseho imikindo, naho icyo kirongozi kikagira amadarajya munani." 
Ezekiel40:32 Ubwo anjyana mu gikari cy’imbere aherekera mu burasirazuba, apima irembo ryaho rigira ingero zingana n’iz’aya mbere." 
Ezekiel40:33 Utuzu twaryo tw’abarinzi, inkuta zaryo n’ikirongozi cyaryo, na byo bigira ingero zimwe. Irembo kimwe n’ikirongozi cyaryo byari bikikijwe n’amadirishya, rikagira imikono mirongo itanu y’uburebure kuri makumyabiri n’itanu y’ubugari." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ikirongozi cyaryo cyari aherekera ku gikari cyo hanze, inkuta zaryo zitatseho imikindo, naho icyo kirongozi kikagira amadarajya munani." 
Ezekiel40:35 Hanyuma anjyana ku irembo ryo mu majyaruguru, araripima ringanya ingero n’aya mbere." 
Ezekiel40:36 Utuzu twaryo tw’abarinzi, inkuta zaryo n’ikirongozi cyaryo, na byo byari bifite ingero zimwe. Iryo rembo ryari rikikijwe n’amadirishya, rikagira imikono mirongo itanu y’uburebure kuri makumyabiri n’itanu y’ubugari." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ikirongozi cyaryo cyari aherekera ku gikari cyo hanze, inkuta zaryo zitatseho imikindo, naho icyo kirongozi kikagira amadarajya munani." 
Ezekiel40:38 Hari icyumba cyakingurirwaga mu kirongozi; ari na cyo bogerezagamo amatungo agenewe guturwaho ibitambo bitwikwa. 
Ezekiel40:39 Mu kirongozi hakaba ameza abiri muri buri ruhande, yari agenewe gusogoterwaho ibitambo bitwikwa, ibihongerera ibyaha n’ibyo kwigorora." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ku ruhande rwo hanze, umuntu azamukiye mu irembo ryo mu majyaruguru hari ameza abiri, no ku rundi ruhande aherekera mu kirongozi hakaba andi meza abiri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Ubwo rero hari ameza ane ku ruhande rumwe rw’irembo, n’andi meza ane ku rundi, yose hamwe akaba umunani, ari na yo biciragaho ibitambo." 
Ezekiel40:42 Usibye n’ibyo, hari n’andi meza ane akozwe mu mabuye y’amabazanyo, yakoreshwaga igihe cyo gutegura ibitambo bitwikwa; akagira uburebure bw’umukono umwe n’igice, ubugari bw’umukono umwe n’igice, n’ubujyejuru bw’umukono umwe. Ayo rero ni yo bashyiragaho ibikoresho byabaga bikenewe mu kwica ibitambo bitwikwa, kimwe n’ibindi bitambo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Imigende ifite ubugari bungana n’ikiganza yari iteganyijwe impande zose z’ameza. Kuri ayo meza rero, bahashyiraga inyama ziri buturweho ibitambo." 
Ezekiel40:44 Hanyuma anjyana mu gikari cy’imbere; muri icyo gikari hakaba ibyumba bibiri, kimwe cyari kiri iruhande rw’irembo ryo mu majyaruguru, riteganye n’iryo mu majyepfo, ikindi kiri iruhande rw’irembo ryo mu majyepfo, riteganye n’iryo mu majyaruguru." 
Ezekiel40:45 Nuko arambwira ati «Icyo cyumba giteganye n’amajyepfo, cyagenewe abaherezabitambo bashinzwe imirimo yo mu Ngoro;" 
Ezekiel40:46 naho icyumba giteganye n’amajyaruguru, kikaba cyaragenewe abaherezabitambo bashinzwe imirimo yo ku rutambiro. Abo rero, ni bene Sadoki bo mu muryango wa Levi, bagenewe kwegera Uhoraho ngo bamukorere.»" 
Ezekiel40:47 Nuko apima icyo gikari cy’imbere, kigira imikono ijana y’uburebure ku ijana y’ubugari, kuko cyari gifite impande enye zingana, kikabamo n’urutambiro rwari imbere y’Ingoro." 
Ezekiel40:48 Ubwo anjyana imbere y’urwinjiriro rw’Ingoro, apima inkuta zarwo, abona imikono itanu kuri buri ruhande, n’ubugari bw’irembo bugira imikono itatu kuri buri ruhande." 
Ezekiel40:49 Uburebure bw’urwinjiriro bwari imikono makumyabiri kuri cumi n’ibiri y’ubugari; mbere yo kurugeraho wabanzaga kuzamuka amadarajya cumi. Hafi y’inkomanizo z’umuryango, hari inkingi imwe kuri buri ruhande." 
Ezekiel41:1 Arongera anjyana mu cyumba gitagatifu, apima inkuta, zigira imikono itandatu ku ruhande rumwe n’imikono itandatu ku rundi." 
Ezekiel41:2 Ubugari bw’umuryango bwari imikono icumi, naho impande zombi z’urukuta uwo muryango wari utoboreyemo, rumwe rukagira imikono itanu, urundi na rwo itanu. Apima uburebure bw’icyumba gitagatifu, bugira imikono mirongo ine kuri makumyabiri y’ubugari." 
Ezekiel41:3 Nuko yinjiramo imbere, apima urukuta rurimo umuryango, rugira imikono ibiri. Apima n’umuryango ubwawo, ugira imikono itandatu y’ubugari; naho impande zombi z’urukuta uwo muryango wari utoboreyemo, rumwe rukagira imikono irindwi, urundi na rwo irindwi." 
Ezekiel41:4 Apima uburebure bw’icyo cyumba cya kabiri, bugira imikono makumyabiri kuri makumyabiri y’ubugari, maze arambwira ati «Aha ni Ahatagatifu rwose.»" 
Ezekiel41:5 Hanyuma apima urukuta rw’Ingoro, rugira imikono itandatu; naho andi mazu yari akikije Ingoro agira ubugari bw’imikono ine." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ayo mazu agizwe n’utwumba tugerekeranye mu magorofa atatu, igorofa imwe igizwe n’utwumba mirongo itatu. Urukuta rw’imbere rw’utwo twumba rwari rwegeranye n’urw’Ingoro, ariko rutarwubakiyeho." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ubugari bw’utwo twumba bwagendaga bwiyongera kuva hasi ugana ejuru, kuko ubugari bw’urukuta rw’Ingoro bwazamukaga bugabanuka. Hari kandi n’aho umuntu anyura, ashatse kuva mu nzu yo hasi ajya mu yo hagati, cyangwa se mu yo hejuru." 
Ezekiel41:8 Nuko mbona ko Ingoro yari iseguwe hasi n’ikirundo cy’ibitaka kiyikikije, cyari gifite uburebure bw’imikono itandatu, kikaba ari na cyo mfatiro za twa twumba turi iruhande rw’Ingoro." 
Ezekiel41:9 Hagati ya twa twumba twometse ku Ngoro 
Ezekiel41:10 n’andi mazu yubatse hirya yayo, hari ikibuga gifite ubugari bw’imikono makumyabiri, kizengurutse Ingoro." 
Ezekiel41:11 Imiryango yajyaga muri utwo twumba yerekeraga ahari hasigaye umwanya, umuryango umwe werekeraga mu majyaruguru, undi ukerekera mu majyepfo, maze ubugari bwayo bukaba imikono itanu." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ku ruhande rw’iburengerazuba hari hubatse inzu iteganye n’ikibuga, ikagira ubugari bw’imikono mirongo irindwi, na mirongo cyenda y’uburebure, naho umubyimba w’urukuta rwayo ukaba imikono itanu." 
Ezekiel41:13 Hanyuma apima Ingoro igira uburebure bw’imikono ijana. Ikibuga na cyo wongeyeho iyo nzu n’inkike zayo, na byo bigira uburebure bw’imikono ijana." 
Ezekiel41:14 Ubugari bw’uruhande rw’imbere rw’Ingoro, wongeyeho ikibuga giherereye iburasirazuba buba imikono ijana." 
Ezekiel41:15 Arongera apima uburebure bw’inzu ahereye ku ruhande rw’ikibuga cyari inyuma yayo, ndetse n’amabaraza y’impande zose, bigira imikono ijana. Imbere mu cyumba gitagatifu no mu birongozi byerekera mu gikari," 
Ezekiel41:16 ku bitabo by’imiryango, ku madirishya no ku mabaraza y’impande uko ari eshatu yagendaga ateganye n’igitabo cya buri muryango, aho hose hari hakikijeho imbaho z’igiciro kuva hasi kugera ku madirishya. Ayo madirishya ubwayo na yo yari akikijeho utwuma dusobekeranye." 
Ezekiel41:17 Kuva ku rwinjiriro kugera imbere mu Ngoro, ndetse no ku nkuta hose imbere n’inyuma," 
Ezekiel41:18 hari hatatsweho ibishushanyo by’abakerubimu n’imikindo. Hagati y’umukerubimu n’undi hari umukindo, kandi buri mukerubimu akagira imitwe ibiri:" 
Ezekiel41:19 umutwe werekeraga ku mukindo w’uruhande rumwe wasaga n’uw’umuntu, uwerekera ku mukindo wo ku rundi ruhande ugasa n’uw’intare, bikaba bimeze bityo ku mpande zose z’Ingoro." 
Ezekiel41:20 Ibishushanyo by’abakerubimu n’iby’imikindo byari byarabajwe mu rukuta, byaheraga hasi bikagera ndetse no hejuru y’umuryango;" 
Ezekiel41:21 kandi inkomanizo z’umuryango w’icyumba gitagatifu zari zifite impande enye zingana. Imbere y’icyumba gitagatifu rwose hari ikintu gisa 
Ezekiel41:22 n’urutambiro rubajwe mu biti, rufite imikono itatu y’ubujyejuru, imikono ibiri y’uburebure kuri ibiri y’ubugari. Hasi yarwo mu maguni no mu mpande, hose hari habajwe mu biti. Nuko wa muntu arambwira ati «Aya ni ameza ari imbere y’Uhoraho.»" 
Ezekiel41:23 Icyumba gitagatifu cyari gikinzwe n’urugi rurimo ebyiri; icyumba gitagatifu rwose na cyo ari uko. 
Ezekiel41:24 Urugi rumwe rwari rugizwe n’inzugi ebyiri zikingurwa zose, n’urundi na rwo rugizwe n’inzugi ebyiri." 
Ezekiel41:25 Ku nzugi z’icyumba gitagatifu hari hatatsweho ibishushanyo by’abakerubimu n’iby’imikindo, mbese rwose nk’ibyari bishushanyije ku nkuta. Imbere y’umuryango hari ibaraza risakaje imbaho." 
Ezekiel41:26 Hirya no hino ku nkuta hari amadirishya ariho utwuma dusobekeranye, hatatseho n’imikindo, kimwe no ku twumba dukikije Ingoro no ku ibaraza ry’imbere y’umuryango." 
Ezekiel42:1 Wa muntu aransohokana, anjyana mu gikari cy’imbere aherekera mu majyaruguru, mu byumba byubatswe aho ikibuga giherera, hirya gato, ugana mu majyaruguru ya ya nzu iri inyuma y’Ingoro." 
Ezekiel42:2 Mu ruhande rw’imbere, aherekera mu majyaruguru, ibyo byumba byari bifite uburebure bw’imikono ijana, ku bugari bw’imikono mirongo itanu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Ahateganye ’amarembo y’igikari cy’imbere, kimwe n’ahateganye n’imbuga ishashemo amabuye mu gikari cyo hanze, hari ibaraza." 
Ezekiel42:4 Imbere y’ibyo byumba hari inzira ngari y’imikono icumi, ku burebure bw’imikono ijana; naho imiryango yabyo yerekeye mu majyaruguru." 
Ezekiel42:5 Iyo nzu yari ifite amagorofa atatu; utwumba two hejuru twari duto kurusha utwo hagati no hasi kuko amabaraza yadutubyaga. 
Ezekiel42:6 Koko kandi, hari amabaraza atatu, rimwe rigeretse hejuru y’irindi, kandi nta nkingi yari afite nk’izari ku yo mu gikari. (Mu igorofa yo hejuru, ibaraza ryari rigari kurusha iryo hagati no hasi,) ariko ibyumba by’aho hejuru bikaba bito kurusha ibyo bisigaye." 
Ezekiel42:7 Urukuta rw’inyuma y’ibyo byumba, rwari rufite uburebure bw’imikono mirongo itanu, upimye aherekera ku gikari cyo hanze, mbese nk’uko ibyo byumba ubwabyo byareshyaga." 
Ezekiel42:8 Koko rero, uburebure bw’ibyumba byo mu gikari cyo hanze bwari imikono mirongo itanu, naho uburebure bw’ibyumba byo mu gikari cy’imbere bukaba imikono ijana." 
Ezekiel42:9 Mu nsi y’ibyo byumba hari irembo rituruka mu burasirazuba, ryanyurwagamo n’abinjiye baturutse mu gikari cyo hanze." 
Ezekiel42:10 Urukuta rw’igikari cy’ahagana mu majyepfo, na rwo rwari rwubakiyeho ibindi byumba biteganye n’ikibuga, aherekera kuri ya nzu." 
Ezekiel42:11 Hari inzira yanyuraga imbere y’ibyo byumba, byari bimeze rwose nk’ibyumba byo mu majyaruguru: binganya uburebure n’ubugari, aho basohokera hameze kimwe, imyubakire n’aho binjirira hameze kimwe." 
Ezekiel42:12 Inzugi z’ibyumba byo mu majyepfo na zo zari zimeze kimwe n’iz’ibya mbere; aho inzira ituruka hari umuryango uteganye n’inkike ikikije Ingoro, ukanyurwamo n’abaturutse mu burasirazuba." 
Ezekiel42:13 Nuko wa muntu arambwira ati «Ibyo byumba biri imbere y’ikibuga, mu majyaruguru no mu majyepfo, ni ibyumba by’Ingoro. Ni ho abaherezabitambo begera Uhoraho bazajya barira ibiribwa bitagatifu rwose, bakahashyingura ibintu bitagatifu rwose n’andi maturo, ibitambo byo guhongerera ibyaha n’ibyo kwigorora, kuko ari ahantu hatagatifu." 
Ezekiel42:14 Igihe abaherezabitambo bazaba bahinjiye, ntibazasohoka ahantu hatagatifu ngo bajye mu gikari cyo hanze, batabanje kuhasiga imyambaro y’ubuherezabitambo kuko ari imyambaro mitagatifu. Bazabanza bambare indi myambaro, kugira ngo babone kujya hanze, ahagenewe rubanda.»" 
Ezekiel42:15 Wa muntu ngo arangize gupima imbere mu Ngoro, aransohokana twerekeje mu irembo rireba mu burasirazuba, maze apima impande zose z’igikari." 
Ezekiel42:16 Apima uruhande rw’iburasirazuba akoresheje ya nkoni yabigenewe, rugira imikono magana atanu." 
Ezekiel42:17 Arongera na none akoresheje ya nkoni yabigenewe, apima uruhande rw’amajyaruguru, rugira imikono magana atanu." 
Ezekiel42:18 Hanyuma apima uruhande rw’amajyepfo, akoresheje ya nkoni yabigenewe, rugira imikono magana atanu." 
Ezekiel42:19 N’uruhande rw’iburengerazuba, arupimisha ya nkoni, na rwo rugira imikono magana atanu." 
Ezekiel42:20 Ubwo aba apimye impande enye zose z’iyo nkike, abona uburebure bw’imikono magana atanu ku mikono magana atanu y’ubugari, iyo nkike ikaba yari iyo gutandukanya aheguriwe Imana n’umwanya wagenewe rubanda." 
Ezekiel43:1 Nuko anjyana ku irembo rigana mu burasirazuba," 
Ezekiel43:2 mbona ikuzo ry’Imana ya Israheli rije rituruka mu burasirazuba, riza mu rusaku rumeze nk’imyoromo y’amazi magari, maze isi yose ibengerana ikuzo." 
Ezekiel43:3 Iryo bonekerwa ryari rimeze nk’iryo nigeze kubona igihe Uhoraho aje gusenya umugi, cyangwa iryo nari naraboneye ku ruzi rwa Kebari. Ako kanya ngwa hasi nubamye." 
Ezekiel43:4 Nuko ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryinjira mu Ngoro rinyuze mu irembo riteganye n’iburasirazuba. 
Ezekiel43:5 Umwuka unjyana ubwo, unyinjiza mu gikari cy’imbere, maze mbona ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryuzuye mu Ngoro." 
Ezekiel43:6 Numvaga uwamvugishaga ari mu Ngoro, naho wa muntu akaba ahagaze iruhande rwanjye." 
Ezekiel43:7 Uhoraho arambwira, ati «Mwana w’umuntu, aha ni ho hagenewe intebe yanjye y’ubwami, ni na ko kabaho nzajya nkandagizaho ibirenge byanjye. Nzatura mu Bayisraheli rwagati iteka ryose; kandi umuryango wa Israheli, bo ubwabo n’abami babo, ntibazongera kwandavuza ukundi izina ryanjye ritagatifu, nk’uko babigenje mbere. Mu by’ukuri ntibahwemye kuryandavurisha uburaya bwabo n’imva z’abami babo;" 
Ezekiel43:8 ntibatinye kubangikanya irembo ryabo n’iryanjye, baransatiriye, dusigara dutandukanyijwe n’urukuta gusa. Bandavuje izina ryanjye ritagatifu kubera amahano bakoraga, ari na cyo cyatumye mbarakarira, nkabarimbura." 
Ezekiel43:9 None rero, nibajugunye kure yanjye amahano yabo n’intumbi z’abami babo, maze nzature muri bo iteka ryose." 
Ezekiel43:10 Naho wowe, mwana w’umuntu, umuryango wa Israheli wereke iyi Ngoro, maze baterwe isoni n’amahano bakoze; kandi bayipime bakurikije igishushanyo cyayo." 
Ezekiel43:11 Nibaramuka batewe isoni n’iyo myifatire yabo, ubasobanurire uko Ingoro iteye n’igishushanyo cyayo, aho basohokera n’aho binjirira, imiterere n’imyubakire yayo yose, imikoreshereze yayo n’amategeko yose ayigenga. Ibyo byose uzabyandike bose babireba, kugira ngo bajye bazirikana imiterere y’iyi Ngoro n’amategeko yose ayigenga, maze babone ubuyakurikiza." 
Ezekiel43:12 Ngiryo itegeko rigenga Ingoro. Iyi mpinga y’umusozi n’akarere kose kayikikije, ni ahantu hatagatifu. Nuko rero, iryo ni ryo tegeko rigenga Ingoro.»" 
Ezekiel43:13 Dore kandi n’ingero z’urutambiro zapimishijwe imikono, buri mukono wongeweho ahangana n’ubugari bw’ikiganza. Mu nsi y’igisasiro, hari urufatiro rufite umukono umwe w’ubuhagarike.... Hagati y’umuferege ukikije urutambiro no hasi ku gisasiro hangana n’uburebure bw’ikiganza." 
Ezekiel43:14 Igisasiro ubwacyo kigabanyijemo ibice bibiri: icyo hasi gifite imikono ibiri y’ubuhagarike..... icyo hejuru gifite imikono ine y’ubuhagarike..... 
Ezekiel43:15 Uburebure bw’urutambiro ni imikono ine, kandi hejuru yarwo hakaba amahembe ane." 
Ezekiel43:16 Urwo rutambiro rufite impande enye zingana, zifite imikono cumi n’ibiri y’uburebure, kuri cumi n’ibiri y’ubugari." 
Ezekiel43:17 Igisasiro cyarwo gifite imikono cumi n’ine y’uburebure, kuri cumi n’ine y’ubugari, kikagira na cyo impande enye zingana. Umuguno ukizengurutse ufite umubyimba upima igice cy’umukono n’ubuhagarike bw’umukono umwe. Amadarajya bazamukiragaho bajya ku rutambiro, yari yubatse mu burasirazuba." 
Ezekiel43:18 Noneho wa muntu arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ngo: Ngaya amabwiriza yerekeye urutambiro, akazakurikizwa umunsi barwubatse kugira ngo babashe kuruturiraho ibitambo bitwikwa no kurusesaho amaraso." 
Ezekiel43:19 Igihe abaherezabitambo b’Abalevi, ari bo bene Sadoki, bazanyegera ngo banture igitambouwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — uzabahe akamasa kababere igitambo gihongerera ibyaha." 
Ezekiel43:20 Uzafate ku maraso y’ako kamasa uyasige ku mahembe uko ari ane, ku maguni ane y’urutambiro no ku muguno urukikije, bityo uzabe urukijije icyitwa ubwandu cyose kandi uruhumanuye." 
Ezekiel43:21 Ibyo nibirangira, uzafate ikimasa cy’impongano y’ibyaha, ugitwikire ahantu hitaruye, hanze y’Ingoro." 
Ezekiel43:22 Ku munsi ukurikiyeho, uzature isekurume itagira inenge ho igitambo cy’impongano y’ibyaha, urutambiro ruzabe rukijijwe rutyo ubwandu nk’uko babigenjeje kuri cya kimasa." 
Ezekiel43:23 Numara kurukiza ubwandu uzature akamasa n’impfizi y’intama byakuwe mu mashyo, byose bitagira inenge." 
Ezekiel43:24 Uzabiture Uhoraho, n’abaherezabitambobabiminjagireho umunyu maze babiture Uhoraho ho igitambo gitwikwa." 
Ezekiel43:25 Mu minsi irindwi yose, uzajye utura buri munsi isekurume ho igitambo gihongerera ibyaha; ikimasa n’impfizi y’intama bizaba byakuwe mu mashyo kandi bitagira inenge," 
Ezekiel43:26 na byo bizaturwa muri iyo minsi irindwi. Nuko urutambiro ruzabe rukijijwe rutyo ubwandu, baruhumanure kandi banarutahe." 
Ezekiel43:27 Icyo gihe nikirangira, ku munsi wa munani n’indi minsi izakurikiraho, abaherezabitambo bazaruturiraho ibitambo byanyu bitwikwa n’andi maturo yanyu, maze nanjye nzabibashimire. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Ezekiel44:1 Nuko wa muntu aranzana no ku irembo ryo hanze ry’Ingoro, rya rindi ryari riteganye n’iburasirazuba, ubwo kandi rikaba rikinze." 
Ezekiel44:2 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Iri rembo rizahora rikinze. Ntibazarikingura kandi nta n’uzaryinjiriramo, kuko Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, yaryinjiriyemo. Rero, rizahore rikinze." 
Ezekiel44:3 Nyamara ariko, umwami we azahicara kugira ngo afungurire imbere y’Uhoraho, kubera ko ari umwami nyine. Azinjirira mu kirongozi cy’iryo rembo, kandi abe ari na ho asohokera.»" 
Ezekiel44:4 Wa muntu aranzana no ku irembo ryo mu majyaruguru angeza imbere y’Ingoro, ngo ndebe mbona ikuzo ry’Uhoraho ryari ryuzuye mu Ngoro ye, nuko ngwa hasi nubamye." 
Ezekiel44:5 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, itonde witegereze neza kandi utege amatwi ibyo ngiye kugusobanurira byerekeye amabwiriza ajyana n’Ingoro kimwe n’amategeko yose ayigenga. Uritondere kumenya abafite uburenganzira bwo kwinjira mu Ngoro, kimwe n’ababujijwe kuyinjiramo." 
Ezekiel44:6 Uzabwire ibyo birara by’umuryango wa Israheli, uti ’Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze. Narambiwe amahano yanyu, muryango wa Israheli;" 
Ezekiel44:7 ya mahano mwakoze mwinjiza abanyamahanga batagenywe ku mutima no ku mubiri mu Ngoro yanjye, bakayijyamo kandi bakayandavuza, mugasangira na bo ikinure n’amaraso byanyeguriwe, mukica mutyo Isezerano ryanjye kubera ayo mahano vose!" 
Ezekiel44:8 Aho kwita ku mirimo y’imihango yanjye mitagatifu, mwishyiriyeho abanyamahanga ngo babe ari bo bayikorera mu Ngoro yanjye." 
Ezekiel44:9 None rero, dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Nta munyamahanga utagenywe ku mutima no ku mubiri uzinjira mu Ngoro yanjye, habe no mu banyamahanga batuye rwagati mu Bayisraheli." 
Ezekiel44:10 Abalevi banyitaruye igihe Israheli yari yarayobye igakurikira ibigirwamana byayo, bazagarukwa n’ibyaha byabo." 
Ezekiel44:11 Bazaguma mu Ngoro yanjye, ariko babe abagaragu bashinzwe kurinda amarembo kandi bakore n’imirimo yo mu Ngoro. Ni bo bazajya basogota ibitambo bitwikwa n’ibindi bitambo by’imbaga, kandi banashingwe gukorera rubanda." 
Ezekiel44:12 Kubera ko bakoreye imbaga imbere y’ibigirwamana, ibyo bigatuma babera umuryango wa Israheli impamvu yo gucumura — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — ni cyo gitumye mbaramburiraho ukuboko kwanjye, maze bazagarukwe n’ibyaha byabo." 
Ezekiel44:13 Ntibazongera kunyegera ukundi ngo baratunganya umurimo w’ubuherezabitambo, ntibazakora ku bintu byanjye bitagatifu habe no ku bitagatifu rwose; ahubwo bazakorwa n’ikimwaro kubera ayo mahano bakoze." 
Ezekiel44:14 Nzabashinga kwita ku mirimo yo mu Ngoro, mbese ibihakorerwa byose n’ibihakenewe byose." 
Ezekiel44:15 Naho abaherezabitambo b’Abalevi, ari bo bene Sadoki, batahemutse ku murimo wabo mu Ngoro yanjye igihe Abayisraheli bari barayobye, ni bo bazanyegera bankorere — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — bahagarare imbere yanjye banture ibinure n’amaraso." 
Ezekiel44:16 Ni bo bazinjira mu Ngoro yanjye, begere ameza yanjye kugira ngo bampereze; bazarangize batyo umurimo wanjye." 
Ezekiel44:17 Igihe bazaba binjiye mu marembo y’igikari cy’imbere, bazaba bambaye imyambaro y’ihariri. Ntibazambara umwambaro w’ubwoya bw’intama, igihe cyose bazaba bakora umurimo wabo ku marembo y’igikari cy’imbere kimwe no mu Ngoro." 
Ezekiel44:18 Bazambara ibitambaro by’ihariri mu mutwe, bambare amakabutura y’amahariri, kandi birinde gukenyera umwenda wabatera gututubikana." 
Ezekiel44:19 Nibasohoka bagana mu gikari cyo hanze basanze imbaga, baziyambure imyambaro bari bambaye bari ku murimo wabo bayibike ahabigenewe mu byumba bitagatifu, maze bambare indi kugira ngo imbaga itava aho ikora kuri iyo myambaro mitagatifu." 
Ezekiel44:20 Ntibaziharanguze, ariko kandi ntibazanatereke umusatsi, ahubwo bajye bawukemuza, bawutunganye." 
Ezekiel44:21 Nta muherezabitambo wemerewe kunywa divayi ku munsi azaba ari bwinjire mu gikari cy’imbere. 
Ezekiel44:22 Ntibazacyura umupfakazi cyangwa umugore wasenzwe n’umugabo we, ahubwo bazarongore umwari ukomoka mu muryango wa Israheli, cyangwa se bacyure umupfakazi usizwe n’undi muherezabitambo." 
Ezekiel44:23 Bazigisha umuryango wanjye gutandukanya icyeguriwe Imana n’ikitarayeguriwe; babamenyeshe itandukanyirizo ry’ikitahumanye n’icyahumanye. 
Ezekiel44:24 Ni bo bazajya baca imanza za rubanda, kandi bazazice bakurikije itegeko ryanjye. Mu minsi mikuru yanjye yose bazakurikiza amategeko yanjye n’amabwiriza yanjye, batagatifuze amasabato yanjye." 
Ezekiel44:25 Bazirinde kwegera intumbi y’umuntu ngo batava aho bihumanya; ariko nihagira upfusha se cyangwa nyina, cyangwa se agapfusha umwana we, murumuna we, mushiki we, ariko atarashaka, ashobora kwihumanya akegera intumbi ye." 
Ezekiel44:26 Igihe umwe muri bo azaba amaze kwihumanura, bazabara iminsi irindwi;" 
Ezekiel44:27 hanyuma ku munsi wo kwinjira mu cyumba gitagatifu no mu gikari cy’imbere kugira ngo arangize umurimo we — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — aziturire igitambo cy’impongano y’ibyaha. 
Ezekiel44:28 Ntibazagira umunani, kuko ari jye munani wabo. Nta mugabane muzabaha muri Israheli, kuko ari jyewe mugabane wabo." 
Ezekiel44:29 Bazatungwa n’amaturo, ibitambo by’impongano y’ibyaha n’ibitambo byo kwigorora; mbese icyashinganywe n’Imana cyose muri Israheli kizaba icyabo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Ibyiza byo mu miganura yanyu yose no mu maturo yanyu yose bizahabwa abaherezabitambo; ndetse n’imyiza mu mitsima y’umuganura wanyu, kugira ngo ingo zanyu zihabwe umugisha." 
Ezekiel44:31 Abaherezabitambo ntibazarya inyama z’itungo na rimwe ryipfushije cyangwa ryatanyaguwe n’irindi, ryaba iriguruka cyangwa se indi nyamaswa iyo ari yo yose." 
Ezekiel45:1 Nimukora ubufindo kugira ngo mugabane igihugu, muzasige umugabane w’Uhoraho, ufite uburebure bw’imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu, ku bihumbi makumyabiri by’ubugari. Uwo mugabane wose uko wakabaye uzaba weguriwe Imana." 
Ezekiel45:2 Muri uwo mugabane, hazapimwa ikibanza cy’Ingoro gifite impande enye zingana, zifite imikono magana atanu kuri magana atanu, ndetse bongereho n’indi mikono mirongo itanu ku mpande zose." 
Ezekiel45:3 Muri uwo mugabane kandi uzapime ahantu hafite imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu by’uburebure, ku mikono ibihumbi cumi by’ubugari, abe ari aho hazubakwa Ingoro irimo icyumba gitagatifu rwose." 
Ezekiel45:4 Uwo uzaba ari umugabane weguriwe Imana, ugenewe abaherezabitambo bakora umurimo w’Ingoro, bakegera Uhoraho ngo bamuhereze. Aho ni ho bashobora kubaka amazu yabo kandi hakaba n’ahantu heguriwe Imana." 
Ezekiel45:5 Ahasigaye na ho hafite imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu by’uburebure ku bihumbi cumi by’ubugari, hazazigamirwa abalevi bakora mu Ngoro yanjye, hazabe ahabo bature mu migi ihari." 
Ezekiel45:6 Iruhande rw’uwo mugabane w’Uhoraho, bazahapima n’uwundi ufite uburebure bw’imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu ku bihumbi bitanu by’ubugari; ni ho hazagenerwa Umugi, maze Umuyisraheli wese ubishatse azahature." 
Ezekiel45:7 Umwami azahabwa umunani ku mpande ebyiri z’umugabane weguriwe Uhoraho n’ahagenewe Umugi. Uwo munani w’umwami uzahera ku mugabane w’Uhoraho n’ahagenewe Umugi, maze ugende ugere ku nyanja iri mu burengerazuba, naho mu burasirazuba ugere aho igihugu kigarukira." 
Ezekiel45:8 Aho ni ho hazaba ah’umwami muri Israheli; bityo abami banjye ntibazongera gushikamira ukundi umuryango wanjye, bazegurire Abayisraheli n’imiryango yabo igihugu." 
Ezekiel45:9 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze: Ibyo rwose birahagije, bami ba Israheli! Nimusigeho urwo rugomo rwanyu n’ubujura bwanyu; nimukurikize ubutabera n’ubutungane — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze — murekere aho gutera hejuru umuryango wanjye, muwaka ibirenze urugero." 
Ezekiel45:10 Nimukoreshe iminzani itunganye, ikibindi n’igitebo mugeresha bibe byuzuye." 
Ezekiel45:11 Ikibindi n’igitebo nibigire urugero rumwe, igitebo kigire kimwe cya cumi cy’intonga n’ikibindi na cyo kibe icya cumi cy’intonga. Ibigeresho byose uko byakabaye bizajya bigereranywa ku ntonga." 
Ezekiel45:12 Isikeli imwe izangana na gera makumyabiri; amasikeli mirongo itandatu azahwana na mini imwe. 
Ezekiel45:13 Dore urugero rw’amaturo muzavana ku byo mutunze: ku ntonga imwe y’ingano muzafataho kimwe cya gatandatu cy’igitebo, na kimwe cya gatandatu cy’igitebo ku ntonga y’ingano za bushoki." 
Ezekiel45:14 Ku mavuta muzafataho urweso rumwe, ni ukuvuga kimwe cya cumi cy’ikibindi — koko, ikibindi kimwe gihwanye n’igitebo kimwe, maze byaba icumi bigahwana n’intonga imwe." 
Ezekiel45:15 Muzafata intama imwe mu mukumbi w’intama magana abiri zo mu rwuri rwa Israheli, yaba iy’ituro, iy’igitambo gitwikwa cyangwa igitambo cy’ubuhoro, kugira ngo muronke imbabazi z’ibyaha. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel45:16 Imbaga yose y’igihugu igomba guha umwami wa Israheli ayo maturo. 
Ezekiel45:17 Umwami na we azishingira ibitambo bitwikwa, andi maturo kimwe n’amaturo aseswa igihe cy’ibirori by’iminsi mikuru, imboneko z’ukwezi, amasabato n’andi makoraniro yose y’umuryango wa Israheli. Ni we uzatanga ibikenewe mu gitambo cyo guhongerera ibyaha no mu yandi maturo, mu gitambo gitwikwa no mu bitambo by’ubuhoro, kugira ngo umuryango wa Israheli uronke imbabazi z’ibyaha." 
Ezekiel45:18 Dore uko Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze. Ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere, uzafate akamasa katagira inenge kugira ngo uhumanure Ingoro." 
Ezekiel45:19 Umuherezabitambo azafate ku maraso yako, ayasige ku nkomanizo z’umuryango w’Ingoro, ku maguni ane y’igisasiro cyo hasi y’urutambiro no ku nkomanizo z’umuryango w’igikari cy’imbere." 
Ezekiel45:20 Uzabigenze utyo na none ku munsi wa karindwi w’ukwezi, ubigirira uwaba yacumuye kubera uburangare cyangwa se atabishakaga. Bityo muzaba muhongereye ubwandu bw’Ingoro." 
Ezekiel45:21 Umunsi wa cumi n’ine w’ukwezi kwa mbere uzababera umunsi mukuru wa Pasika; mu minsi irindwi muzaraya imigati idasembuye. 
Ezekiel45:22 Uwo munsi, umwami azatura ikimasa ho igitambo gihongerera ibyaha, akiturire ubwe, kimwe n’imbaga yose ituye igihugu." 
Ezekiel45:23 Mu minsi irindwi y’ibirori, azatura Uhoraho ibimasa birindwi n’impfizi z’intama ndwi, byose bitagira inenge, ibyo akazabikora buri munsi muri iyo uko ari irindwi; ature n’isekurume ho igitambo gihongerera ibyaha." 
Ezekiel45:24 Naho ku yandi maturo: azatura akebo kamwe k’ifu kuri buri kimasa, n’akandi kebo kamwe kuri buri mpfizi y’intama, yongereho n’urweso rw’amavuta kuri buri kebo." 
Ezekiel45:25 Ku munsi wa cumi n’itanu w’ukwezi kwa karindwi, mu birori by’umunsi mukuru, azabigenza atyo iminsi irindwi yose, ature igitambo gihongerera ibyaha, igitambo gitwikwa, ituro ry’ifu n’iry’amavuta.»" 
Ezekiel46:1 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Irembo ry’igikari cy’imbere ryerekera mu burasirazuba, rizahora rifunze mu minsi itandatu y’akazi, ariko ku isabato kimwe no ku minsi y’imboneko y’ukwezi rifungurwe." 
Ezekiel46:2 Umwami azajya yinjirira mu kirongozi cy’irembo ryo hanze, ahagarare iruhande rw’inkomanizo z’umuryango; hanyuma abaherezabitambo bature mu kigwi cye igitambo gitwikwa n’igitambo cy’ubuhoro. Umwami azapfukama mu irebe ry’umuryango hanyuma asohoke, ariko irembo ntirizafungwa kugeza nimugoroba." 
Ezekiel46:3 Imbaga ituye igihugu na yo izapfukamira Uhoraho imbere y’iryo rembo, ijye ibikora kuri buri sabato no ku minsi y’imboneko y’ukwezi." 
Ezekiel46:4 Kuri sabato, umwami azatura Uhoraho abana b’intama batandatu n’impfizi imwe y’intama, byose bitagira inenge," 
Ezekiel46:5 agerekeho n’akebo kamwe k’ifu kuri iyo mpfizi y’intama, naho ku bana b’intama ature uko ashaka; azature n’urweso rumwe rw’amavuta kuri buri ntango." 
Ezekiel46:6 Ku minsi y’imboneko hazaturwa akamasa, abana b’intama batandatu n’impfizi y’intama byose bitagira inenge." 
Ezekiel46:7 Na none kuri uwo munsi, umwami azatura akebo kamwe k’ifu ku kimasa n’akandi kebo ku mpfizi y’intama, naho ku bana b’intama ature uko ashaka; ature n’akabindi kamwe k’amavuta kuri buri ntango." 
Ezekiel46:8 Umwami naramuka yinjiye, azinjirire mu kirongozi cy’irembo, kandi abe ari na ho asohokera." 
Ezekiel46:9 Igihe abatuye igihugu bazaba baje mu makoraniro imbere y’Uhoraho, abinjiriye mu irembo ryo mu majyaruguru baje gusenga, bazasohokera mu ryo mu majyepfo; naho abinjiriye mu irembo ryo mu majyepfo basohokere mu ryo mu majyaruguru. Ntihazagire usubiza mu irembo yinjiriyemo; ahubwo ajye akomeza imbere ye." 
Ezekiel46:10 Umwami azajyana na bo, yinjire nk’uko binjiye kandi asohoke nka bo." 
Ezekiel46:11 Ku minsi y’ibirori n’amakoraniro, ituro rizaba akebo kamwe k’ifu ku kimasa n’akandi kamwe ku mpfizi y’intama, naho ku bana b’intama azature uko ashaka; ature n’urweso rumwe rw’amavuta kuri buri ntango." 
Ezekiel46:12 Igihe umwami azaba yishakiye gutura Uhoraho igitambo gitwikwa cyangwa igitambo cy’ubuhoro, bazamukingurire irembo ryerekera mu burasirazuba, maze ature ibitambo bye nk’uko asanzwe abigenza ku isabato, narangiza asohoke bahite bakinga." 
Ezekiel46:13 Buri munsi azatura Uhoraho intama y’umwaka umwe kandi itagira inenge, ayitureho igitambo gitwikwa; azajya agitura buri gitondo." 
Ezekiel46:14 Byongeye kandi, azatura buri gitondo kimwe cya gatandatu cy’akebo k’ifu na kimwe cya gatatu cy’urweso rw’amavuta yo kuvangisha ifu. Iryo ni ryo turo ry’Uhoraho, rikaba n’itegeko ridakuka kandi rihoraho." 
Ezekiel46:15 Bazatura umwana w’intama, hamwe na ya maturo y’ifu n’amavuta, bibe igitambo gihoraho cya buri gitondo.»" 
Ezekiel46:16 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Niba umwami agiriye ubuntu umwe mu bahungu be, akamuha ku mugabane we, icyo amuhaye kizaba icy’abahungu be, kibe umurage wabo." 
Ezekiel46:17 Nyamara niba ubwo buntu abugiriye umwe mu bagaragu be akamuha ku mugabane we, icyo ahawe kizakomeza kuba icye kugeza mu mwaka ababariwemo, hanyuma gisubizwe umwami. Abahungu b’umwami bonyine ni bo bazagumana icyo bahawe ho umurage." 
Ezekiel46:18 Umwami ntazagire ikintu na kimwe afata ku mugabane wa rubanda, ngo abambure ibiri ibyabo; ibyo atunze ni byo azahaho umurage abahungu be, kugira ngo hatazagira n’umwe mu muryango wanjye uva aho anyagwa ibye.»" 
Ezekiel46:19 Hanyuma wa muntu anyuza mu cyanzu cyari iruhande rw’irembo, anzana ku byumba bitagatifu biri mu majyaruguru, byagenewe abaherezabitambo; nuko ngo ndebe hirya aherekera mu burengerazuba, mbona ahantu hasigaye umwanya utagira ikiwurimo." 
Ezekiel46:20 Arambwira ati «Hariya, abaherezabitambo ni ho bazajya batekera ibitambo bihongerera ibyaha, ibitambo bindi n’amaturo, kugira ngo batabijyana mu gikari cyo hanze, imbaga ikava aho ikora kuri ayo maturo matagatifu.»" 
Ezekiel46:21 Hanyuma anjyana mu gikari cyo hanze, anyuza mu mfuruka uko ari enye z’igikari," 
Ezekiel46:22 hakaba ingombe enye ntoya zifite uburebure bw’imikono mirongo ine kuri mirongo itatu y’ubugari, kandi zose uko ari enye zikagira ingero zimwe." 
Ezekiel46:23 Izo ngombe uko ari enye zari zikikijwe n’inkike, mu nsi yayo hubatse amaziko impande zose. Wa muntu arambwira ati «Ayo ni amaziko, abagaragu bakora mu Ngoro bazajya batekaho ibitambo by’imbaga.»" 
Ezekiel47:1 Ubwo aranjyana no ku muryango w’Ingoro, nuko mbona amazi yavubukaga mu nsi y’igitabo cy’umuryango w’Ingoro aherekera mu burasirazuba, kuko Ingoro nyine yarebaga mu burasirazuba. Ayo mazi yatembaga agana iburyo bw’Ingoro, akanyura mu majyepfo y’urutambiro." 
Ezekiel47:2 Uwo muntu aransohokana anyujije mu irembo ryo mu majyaruguru, antambagiza aho hanze kugeza ku irembo ryo hanze ryarebaga mu burasirazuba; ndebye mbona ya mazi atemba agana iburyo." 
Ezekiel47:3 Ubwo wa muntu agenda yerekeje mu burasirazuba, apima imikono igihumbi akoresheje umugozi yari afite mu ntoki; hanyuma aranjyana anyambutsa ya mazi yangeraga ku bugombambari." 
Ezekiel47:4 Arongera apima indi mikono igihumbi, ari na ko anyambutsa ya mazi yangeraga noneho mu mavi. Arakomeza apima indi mikono igihumbi, anyambutsa ya mazi yangeraga mu rukenyerero." 
Ezekiel47:5 Hanyuma apima indi mikono igihumbi, noneho ya mazi aba abaye umugezi ntagishoboye kwambuka, kuko amazi yari yiyongereye aba maremare, aba mbese uruzi rutavogerwa." 
Ezekiel47:6 Nuko arambwira ati «Mwana w’umuntu, urabibonye se?» Hanyuma aranjyana no ku nkombe y’umugezi." 
Ezekiel47:7 Igihe mpindukiye, mbona ku nkombe zombi z’umugezi hari ibiti byinshi cyane." 
Ezekiel47:8 Wa muntu arambwira ati «Ariya mazi aratemba agana mu ntara y’iburasirazuba, akamanukira muri Araba maze akiroha mu nyanja y’Umunyu; yamara kuyirohamo, amazi yayo agahinduka meza." 
Ezekiel47:9 Ikinyabuzima cyose kizaba kiri aho uwo mugezi unyura kizabaho; amafi azaba menshi cyane kuko aho ayo mazi yinjiye ayo ahasanze aba meza, n’ubuzima buzasagambe aho uwo mugezi uzanyura hose." 
Ezekiel47:10 Abarobyi bazakikiza inkombe zawo, kuva i Enigadi kugera i Enigalayimu bateze inshundura zabo, kuko hazabamo amafi menshi cyane, mbese nk’ayo mu nyanja Nini." 
Ezekiel47:11 Nyamara ibishanga byawo n’inkuka byo ntibizasukurwa, ahubwo bizarumbukamo umunyu." 
Ezekiel47:12 Ku nkombe zombi z’umugezi hazamera amoko yose y’ibiti byera imbuto ziribwa, amababi yabyo ntazigera arabirana n’imbuto zabyo ntizizahundura. Bizajya bihora byera buri kwezi, bibikesha aya mazi avubuka mu Ngoro. Imbuto zabyo bazazirya, naho amababi bayakuremo umuti.»" 
Ezekiel47:13 Nyagasani Uhoraho aravuze ati «Dore igihugu muzagabanya imiryango uko ari cumi n’ibiri ya Israheli, ariko Yozefu akazahabwa imigabane ibiri." 
Ezekiel47:14 Muzagira mwese umugabane ungana, kuko nabirahiye abakurambere banyu ko nzawubaha, n’iki gihugu mukaba mugomba kugihabwa ho umurage." 
Ezekiel47:15 Dore rero imbibi z’igihugu: ku ruhande rw’amajyaruguru uhereye ku nyanja Nini, urubibi ruzakurikira umuhanda w’i Hetiloni unyura i Hamati n’i Sedadi," 
Ezekiel47:16 rukomeze i Berota n’i Siburayimu — ari yo migi iri hagati y’igihugu cya Damasi n’icya Hamati — rukomeze i Haserihatikoni rugana ku gihugu cya Hawurani. 
Ezekiel47:17 Muri make rero, urubibi ruzaturuka ku nyanja Nini, rugere i Hasarenani mu burasirazuba; igihugu cya Damasi n’icya Hamati bibe mu majyaruguru yarwo. Urwo ni urubibi rw’amajyaruguru." 
Ezekiel47:18 Ku ruhande rw’iburasirazuba, urubibi ruzanyura hagati ya Hawurani na Damasi, no hagati ya Gilihadi n’igihugu cya Israheli; naho Yorudani ibe urugabano kugera ku nyanja y’iburasirazuba, ahagana i Tamari: urwo ni urubibi rw’iburasirazuba." 
Ezekiel47:19 Ku ruhande rw’amajyepfo ruzaturuka i Tamari rugere ku mazi ya Meriba y’i Kedeshi, rwerekere ku mugezi rugarukire ku nyanja Nini: urwo ni urubibi rw’amajyepfo." 
Ezekiel47:20 Ku ruhande rw’iburengerazuba, inyanja Nini izaba urugabano kugera ahateganye n’i Hamati: urwo ni urubibi rw’iburengerazuba." 
Ezekiel47:21 Mwebwe rero, imiryango cumi n’ibiri ya Israheli, ni mwe muzigabanya icyo gihugu." 
Ezekiel47:22 Muzakigabanya ubwanyu, kimwe n’abanyamahanga batuye muri mwe bakabyarira abana iwanyu, kuko mugomba kubafata nk’aho ari Abayisraheli. Na bo bazakora ubufindo hamwe namwe, kugira ngo bagire umugabane mu miryango ya Israheli." 
Ezekiel47:23 Umuryango umunyamahanga azaba atuyemo, ni wo azahabwamo umugabane we. Uwo ni Nyagasani ubivuze." 
Ezekiel48:1 Dore amazina y’imiryango ya Israheli (n’imigabane yayo): uhereye mu majyaruguru, mu cyerekezo cy’i Hetiloni ugana i Hamati n’i Hasarenani, naho igihugu cya Damasi ukagisiga mu majyaruguru, ugakikira Hamati kuva ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: uwo ni umugabane wa Dani." 
Ezekiel48:2 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Dani, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Asheri." 
Ezekiel48:3 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Asheri, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Nefutali." 
Ezekiel48:4 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Nefutali, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Manase." 
Ezekiel48:5 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Manase, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Efurayimu." 
Ezekiel48:6 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Efurayimu, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Rubeni." 
Ezekiel48:7 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Rubeni, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Yuda." 
Ezekiel48:8 Naho kuva ku rubibi rwa Yuda, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba, muzahasige umugabane w’imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu by’ubugari, ufite kandi n’uburebure nk’ubwa buri mugabane: ni ukuvuga uburebure buhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba bukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba; Ingoro ikazaba rwagati muri uwo mugabane." 
Ezekiel48:9 Umugabane muzasigira Uhoraho, uzagira uburebure bw’imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu, ku bihumbi cumi by’ubugari." 
Ezekiel48:10 Abaherezabitambo ni bo bene uwo mugabane mutagatifu, ukazagira mu majyaruguru imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu by’uburebure, no mu burengerazuba ubugari bw’imikono ibihumbi cumi; iburasirazuba uzagira ubugari bw’imikono ibihumbi cumi, naho mu majyepfo imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu by’uburebure: Ingoro y’Uhoraho ikazaba rwagati muri uwo mugabane." 
Ezekiel48:11 Uzaba uw’abaherezabitambo banyeguriwe, ari bo bene Sadoki bakomeye ku murimo wanjye, bakirinda kugwa mu buyobe bw’Abayisraheli, mbese nk’uko abalevi babyirinze." 
Ezekiel48:12 Abo rero bazahabwa umunani ku mugabane mutagatifu rwose w’igihugu, hafi y’igihugu cy’abalevi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Abalevi na bo bazagira umugabane ungana n’uw’abaherezabitambo, ufite uburebure bw’imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu, ku mikono ibihumbi cumi by’ubugari; uburebure bwose hamwe bube imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu, ku bugari bw’imikono ibihumbi cumi." 
Ezekiel48:14 Nta cyo bazashobora kugurishaho cyangwa ngo kiguranwe, kandi n’ibyeze muri ubwo butaka ntibizagire undi bihabwa, kuko bweguriwe Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel48:15 Naho imikono ibihumbi bitanu bisigaye by’ubugari, ku mikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu by’uburebure, bizaba indeka y’umugi, ibibanza byo guturamo n’inzuri z’amatungo; umugi ukazaba rwagati muri uwo mugabane." 
Ezekiel48:16 Dore rero ingero z’umugi: ku ruhande rw’amajyaruguru, uzagira imikono ibihumbi bine na magana atanu, no ku urw’amajyepfo ugire imikono ibihumbi bine na magana atanu. Ku ruhande rw’iburasirazuba uzagira imikono ibihumbi bine na magana atanu, no ku urw’iburengerazuba ugire imikono ibihumbi bine na magana atanu." 
Ezekiel48:17 Urwuri rw’umugi ruzagira imikono magana abiri na mirongo itanu ugana mu majyaruguru, ku mikono magana abiri na mirongo itanu ugana mu majyepfo; rugire n’imikono magana abiri na mirongo itanu ugana mu burasirazuba, ku mikono magana abiri na mirongo itanu ugana mu burengerazuba." 
Ezekiel48:18 Ku mukika w’umugabane weguriwe Imana, hazasaguka ahantu h’uburebure bw’imikono ibihumbi cumi ugana mu majyaruguru, ku mikono ibihumbi cumi ugana mu burasirazuba, hakazajya hava ibitunga abakozi b’umugi." 
Ezekiel48:19 Abakozi bo mu mugi bazahahinga, bazava mu miryango yose ya Israheli." 
Ezekiel48:20 Umugabane wose rero uzagira imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu ku bihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu, mukazafata igice cy’impande enye zingana kuri uwo mugabane mutagatifu, kikazaba icy’umugi." 
Ezekiel48:21 Ahasigaye hirya no hino h’umugabane mutagatifu n’indeka y’umugi hazaba ah’umwami; aho ni ku mukika w’imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu by’iburasirazuba, kugeza ku rugabano rw’iburengerazuba, no ku mukika w’imikono ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu by’iburengerazuba, kugeza ku rugabano rw’iburengerazuba. Umwami rero azagira umugabane we iruhande rw’iyindi, maze muri yo rwagati hazabe umugabane weguriwe Imana n’ahagenewe Ingoro." 
Ezekiel48:22 Bityo rero, umugabane w’abalevi n’indeka y’umugi bizaba rwagati y’ahagenewe umwami, no hagati y’igihugu cya Yuda n’icya Benyamini." 
Ezekiel48:23 Ku yindi miryango isigaye; uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Benyamini. 
Ezekiel48:24 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Benyamini, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Simewoni." 
Ezekiel48:25 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Simewoni, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku rw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Isakari." 
Ezekiel48:26 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Isakari, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Zabuloni." 
Ezekiel48:27 Kuva ku rugabano rwa Zabuloni, uhereye ku rubibi rw’iburasirazuba ukageza ku urw’iburengerazuba: ni umugabane wa Gadi." 
Ezekiel48:28 Naho kuva ku rugabano rwa Gadi, ku ruhande rw’amajyepfo, urubibi ruzahere i Tamari no ku mazi ya Meriba y’i Kadeshi, rukomeze umugezi wose kugera ku nyanja Nini." 
Ezekiel48:29 Ngicyo igihugu muzagabanya imiryango ya Israheli mukoresheje ubufindo, ikazaba ari yo migabane yabo. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Ezekiel48:30 Dore rero n’amarembo y’umugi: uruhande rw’amajyaruguru y’umugi ruzagira imikono ibihumbi bine na magana atanu, hakazajya amarembo atatu." 
Ezekiel48:31 Amarembo y’umugi azitirirwa amazina y’imiryango ya Israheli; mu majyaruguru hakazajya irembo rya Rubeni, irya Yuda n’irya Levi." 
Ezekiel48:32 Uruhande rw’iburasirazuba na rwo ruzagira imikono ibihumbi bine na magana atanu, n’amarembo atatu: irya Yozefu, irya Benyamini n’irya Dani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Uruhande rw’amajyepfo ruzagira imikono ibihumbi bine na magana atanu, n’amarembo atatu: irya Simewoni, irya Isakari n’irya Zabuloni." 
Ezekiel48:34 Uruhande rw’iburengerazuba na rwo ruzagira imikono ibihumbi bine na magana atanu, n’amarembo atatu: irya Gadi, n’irya Asheri n’irya Nefutali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Umuzenguruko wose w’umugi ukazagira imikono ibihumbi cumi n’umunani. Kuva uwo munsi kandi, umugi ukazitwa ’Uhoraho arahibereye.’»" 
Hosea1:1 Dore ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryabwiwe Hozeya, mwene Beyeri, mu gihe Oziya, Yotamu, Akhazi na Hezekiya bari abami ba Yuda, no mu gihe Yerobowamu, mwene Yowasi, yari umwami wa Israheli." 
Hosea1:2 Intangiriro y’amagambo Uhoraho yabwiye Hozeya. Uhoraho abwira Hozeya, ati «Genda ushake umugore w’indaya, uzakubyarira abana bameze nka we, kuko iki gihugu kigize indaya, kikirengagiza Uhoraho.»" 
Hosea1:3 Nuko aragenda acyura Gomeri, umukobwa wa Dibilayimu, araza asama inda maze amubyarira umuhungu." 
Hosea1:4 Uhoraho abwira Hozeya, ati «Mwite Yizireyeli, kuko hasigaye igihe gito, inzu ya Yehu nkayiryoza amaraso yameneye i Yizireyeli, kandi ngatsemba ubwami bw’inzu ya Israheli." 
Hosea1:5 Uwo munsi nyine, umuheto wa Israheli nzawuvunagurira mu kibaya cya Yizireyeli.»" 
Hosea1:6 Umugore arongera asama inda, abyara umukobwa. Uhoraho abwira Hozeya, ati «Mwite Lo‐Ruhama (Ntambabazi), kuko inzu ya Israheli ntazongera kuyigirira impuhwe ukundi, ngo nyibabarire." 
Hosea1:7 Naho inzu ya Yuda yo nzayigirira impuhwe, maze mbakize, jyewe Uhoraho, Imana yabo. Nta bwo rero nzabakiza nkoresheje umuheto, inkota cyangwa ngo ndeme intambara, nta n’ubwo nzakoresha amafarasi cyangwa abayagenderaho.»" 
Hosea1:8 Lo‐Ruhama ngo amare gucuka, Gomeri arongera asama inda abyara umuhungu." 
Hosea1:9 Uhoraho abwira Hozeya, ati «Mwite Lo‐Ami (Si umuryango wanjye), kuko mutakiri umuryango wanjye, nanjye simbe Imana yanyu.»" 
Hosea2:1 Abana ba Israheli bazangana n’umusenyi wo mu nyanja, udashobora gupimwa cyangwa se kubarurwa; kandi aho kubwirwa ngo «Ntimuri umuryango wanjye», noneho bazabwirwe ngo «Muri abana b’Imana nzima»." 
Hosea2:2 Abayuda n’Abayisraheli bazateranira hamwe, bishyirireho umutware umwe rukumbi maze buzure igihugu; kuko umunsi wa Yizireyeli uzaba ikirangirire." 
Hosea2:3 Nimubwire abavandimwe banyu, muti «Ntimukiri Lo‐Ami, ahubwo muri umuryango wanjye», na bashiki banyu, muti «Ntimukiri Lo‐Ruhama, ahubwo abagiriwe imbabazi.»" 
Hosea2:4 Nimuburanye nyoko! Ngaho nimumuburanye, kuko atakiri umugore wanjye, nanjye simbe umugabo we! Navane mu maso ye imirimbo y’uburaya bwe, akure hagati y’amabere ibiranga ubusambanyi bwe." 
Hosea2:5 Nibitaba ibyo, nzamucuza imyambaro, asigare atumbuje, mugire nk’uko yari ameze umunsi avuka. Nzamugira nk’ubutayu, abe nk’ubutaka bwumagaye, kandi nzamwicishe inyota." 
Hosea2:6 Abana be sinzabagirira igishyika, kuko ari abana bo mu buraya." 
Hosea2:7 Koko rero, nyina ubabyara yigize indaya, uwabatwise yikojeje isoni igihe avuze ati «Ngiye kwiruka inyuma y’amacuti yanjye, kuko ari bo bampa umugati n’amazi, hamwe n’ubwoya bw’intama n’ihariri, bakanyihera amavuta n’ibyo ninywera.»" 
Hosea2:8 Ni cyo gituma ngiye gufungisha inzira ye amahwa, nyizitire kugira ngo atazabona aho anyura ukundi." 
Hosea2:9 Aziruka inyuma y’amacuti ye, ariko ntazayashyikira, azayashakashake yoye kuyabona, maze azavuge ati «Ngiye gusubira ku mugabo wanjye wa mbere, kuko nari merewe neza kuruta ubu ngubu.»" 
Hosea2:10 Ntiyigeze amenya ko ari jye wamuhaga ingano, divayi nshyashya n’amavuta matoto; namukungahaje kuri feza na zahabu, ari na byo bakoresherezaga Behali." 
Hosea2:11 Ni yo mpamvu nzaza nkisubiza ingano zanjye igihe cy’isarura, na divayi yanjye nshyashya igihe cy’umwero wayo; nzamwambure ubwoya bw’intama n’ihariri byanjye byahishiraga ubutumbuze bwe." 
Hosea2:12 Noneho ngiye kumwambika ubusa mu maso y’amacuti ye, kandi nta n’umwe uzaba akimunkuye mu nzara." 
Hosea2:13 Nzavanaho ibyishimo bye n’iminsi mikuru ye, ibirori bya buri mboneko y’ukwezi, amasabato ye, n’andi makoraniro akomeye yajyagamo." 
Hosea2:14 Nzarimbura umuzabibu we n’umutini we yavugaga ngo «Dore igihembo niherewe n’amacuti yanjye», mbihindure ibihuru birishwe n’inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba." 
Hosea2:15 Nzamuryoza iminsi yamaze agaragiye za Behali, azitwikira imibavu, ubwo yabaga yambaye amaherena ye n’inigi ze, akiruka inyuma y’amacuti ye, naho jye akanyibagirwa. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Hosea2:16 Ni yo mpamvu ubu ari jye ugiye kumuhendahenda, nzamujyane mu butayu maze mwurure umutima." 
Hosea2:17 Nzamusubiza imizabibu ye, ikibaya cya Akori nkigire irembo ry’amizero. Azahanganiriza nk’igihe cy’ubuto bwe, mbese nk’igihe yazamukaga ava mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Hosea2:18 Uwo munsi kandi — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuga — uzanyita ngo «Umugabo wanjye», uzahurwe burundu kongera kunyita ngo «Behali wanjye »." 
Hosea2:19 Nzavana mu kanwa ke amazina ya za Behali, amazina yazo ntazavugwa ukundi." 
Hosea2:20 Uwo munsi nyine, nzamuha kugirana isezerano n’inyamaswa zo mu gasozi, inyoni zo mu kirere n’ibyikurura ku butaka; nzavunagura imiheto n’inkota by’intambara, ubutazongera kuboneka mu gihugu; bityo abaturage bazibereho mu mudendezo." 
Hosea2:21 Nzagucyura ube uwanjye iteka ryose, dushyingiranwe bishingiye ku butabera n’ubutungane, duhorane urugwiro n’urukundo." 
Hosea2:22 Nzashyingiranwa nawe nkugaragarize ubudahemuka, maze uzamenye Uhoraho." 
Hosea2:23 Uwo munsi — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuga — nzatuma ijuru riha isi imvura yifuza," 
Hosea2:24 nuko isi yere ingano, itange na divayi nshyashya n’amavuta matoto, maze isubize ityo ibyifuzo bya Yizireyeli." 
Hosea2:25 Nzamugwiza mu gihugu, kandi ngirire imbabazi Lo‐Ruhama, nzabwira Lo‐Ami nti «Uri umuryango wanjye», na we ambwire ati «Uri Imana yanjye!»" 
Hosea3:1 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Genda, wongere ukunde wa mugore w’umusambanyi kandi ukunda undi mugabo. Jya umukunda nk’uko Uhoraho akunda Abayisraheli, ariko bo bakamwirengagiza bayoboka izindi mana, zikunda utugati tw’imbuto z’imizabibu batura.»" 
Hosea3:2 Nuko wa mugore ndamucyura mutanzeho amasikeli cumi n’atanu, n’ikigega n’igice by’ingano za bushoki," 
Hosea3:3 maze ndamubwira nti «Uzigumire iwanjye igihe kirekire, wirinde uburaya cyangwa kurarikira undi mugabo; nanjye kandi ni ko nzakugenzereza.»" 
Hosea3:4 Koko rero, n’Abayisraheli bazamara igihe kirekire batagira umwami, nta mutware, nta n’igitambo, nta nkingi, nta n’uruhago cyangwa amabuye y’ubufindo." 
Hosea3:5 Nyuma y’ibyo, Abayisraheli bazisubiraho bashakashake bundi bushya Uhoraho, Imana yabo, na Dawudi, umwami wabo; kandi mu bihe bizaza bazagarukire Uhoraho n’ibyiza bye, bamusange bamwubashye." 
Hosea4:1 Bayisraheli, nimwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho: Uhoraho araburanya abaturage b’igihugu, kuko nta kuri, nta n’urukundo rwa mugenzi wabo, cyangwa kumenya Imana, bikirangwa mu gihugu;" 
Hosea4:2 ahubwo bararahira ibinyoma bakabeshya, baricana bakiba, barasambana kandi bakagira urugomo; amaraso amenwe agasimburwa n’andi!" 
Hosea4:3 Ni cyo gitumye rero igihugu kiri mu cyunamo, abaturage bacyo bose bakarimbukira rimwe, inyamaswa zo mu ishyamba n’inyoni zo mu kirere, ndetse n’amafi yo mu nyanja, byose bigapfa." 
Hosea4:4 Muramenye! Ntihagire n’umwe ushinja mugenzi we, cyangwa ngo mwitane ba mwana; ahubwo uwo mburanya, ni wowe, muherezabitambo!" 
Hosea4:5 Uzasitara ku manywa y’ihangu, n’umuhanuzi asitarane nawe nijoro, kandi n’igihugu cyakubyaye nzakirimbura." 
Hosea4:6 Umuryango wanjye urarimbutse kuko utamenye! None rero kubera ko wanze kumenya, ndaguhigitse ntuzongera kumbera umuherezabitambo; kuko wirengagije amategeko y’Imana yawe, nanjye nzirengagiza abana bawe." 
Hosea4:7 Bose uko bangana bancumuyeho, ikuzo ryabo barihinduye urukozasoni." 
Hosea4:8 Batungwa n’amaturo y’umuryango wanjye wampemukiye, bityo bakifuza ko wakomeza ugacumura." 
Hosea4:9 Uko bizagendekera umuherezabitambo, bizagenda bityo no kuri rubanda; nzabaryoza imyifatire yabo, mbahanire n’ibikorwa byabo." 
Hosea4:10 Bazarya ubudahaga, basambane ubutororoka, kuko bibagiwe Uhoraho, bakohokera ubuhabara." 
Hosea4:11 Irari ry’uburaya n’ubusinzi bibatesha umutwe," 
Hosea4:12 umuryango wanjye ukagisha inama igiti cyawo, ishami ryacyo rikaba ari ryo riwugira inama. Kuko irari ry’uburaya ryawuyobeje, mu buhabara bwabo bakitandukanya n’Imana yabo." 
Hosea4:13 Baraturira ibitambo mu mpinga z’imisozi, ku tununga bakahatwikira imibavu, ndetse no mu nsi y’umwerezi, umunyinya n’umushishi, kuko bashimishwa no kwibera mu gicucu cyabyo. Ni cyo gituma rero n’abakobwa banyu baba indaya, abakazana banyu bagasambana." 
Hosea4:14 Sinzaryoza abakobwa banyu uburaya, abakazana banyu ngo mbahanire ubusambanyi; kuko namwe ubwanyu mwihererana indaya, mugafatanya na zo gutura ibitambo. Nguko uko umuryango utagira ubwenge ugiye kurimbuka!" 
Hosea4:15 Israheli rero, nuramuka wigize indaya, Yuda ntakagenze nkawe! Ntimukajye i Giligali cyangwa ngo muzamuke i Betaveni, kandi ntimukavuge ngo «Nkurahije Uhoraho Muzima!»" 
Hosea4:16 Ni koko, Israheli yari yarigometse nk’inka yica; noneho se Uhoraho azabarungika mu rwuri rugari, nk’intama?" 
Hosea4:17 Efurayimu yo yisunze ibigirwamana, nimuyireke!" 
Hosea4:18 Ubusinzi bwabo niburangira, bazohokera mu busambanyi, kuko Ikuzo ryabo bariguranye ibikozasoni." 
Hosea4:19 Ariko umuyaga w’inkubi uzabagurukana, bakozwe isoni n’ibitambo byabo." 
Hosea5:1 Baherezabitambo, nimwumve ibi ngibi, nimubitege amatwi namwe, ab’inzu ya Israheli, namwe abo ku rurembo rw’ibwami, mubyumve! Ni mwebwe mwashinzwe guca imanza, nyamara i Misipa mwabereye inkomyi umuryango wanjye, munawubere umutego ku musozi wa Taboru." 
Hosea5:2 Bongereye urwobo rw’i Shitimu, barugira rurerure, none nanjye ngiye kubahana bose." 
Hosea5:3 Efurayimu ndayizi neza, na Israheli sinyiyobewe; kubera ko Efurayimu yoramye mu buraya, Israheli na yo yarandavuye." 
Hosea5:4 Ibikorwa byabo bibabuza kugarukira Imana yabo, kuko batwawe n’irari ry’uburaya, maze ntibamenye Uhoraho." 
Hosea5:5 Ubwibone bwa Israheli burayishinja, Israheli na Efurayimu baradandabirana kubera ibicumuro byabo, bityo na Yuda ikabatutuba inyuma." 
Hosea5:6 Bazajyana n’amatungo yabo magufi n’amaremare, bajye gushakashaka Uhoraho, ariko ntibazamubona kuko azaba yabazinutswe!" 
Hosea5:7 Bahemukiye Uhoraho kuko babyaye ibinyendaro; none mu kwezi kumwe bazarimbukana n’umunani wabo. 
Hosea5:8 Nimuvugirize ihembe i Gibeya, i Rama havugire akarumbeti, muvugirize induru i Betaveni, muti «Benyamini we, ngaho baguturutse inyuma!»" 
Hosea5:9 Umunsi wo guhanwa, Efurayimu izahinduka itongo, naho imiryango ya Israheli nyimenyeshe ibizayibaho." 
Hosea5:10 Abatware ba Yuda bameze nk’abimura imbibi z’igihugu, nzabacuburiraho imivumba y’uburakari bwanjye." 
Hosea5:11 Efurayimu yashikamiwe izatsindwa n’urubanza, kuko yanyuzwe no kwiruka inyuma y’ibitagira shinge." 
Hosea5:12 Nanjye, Efurayimu nzayimerera nk’ibihushi, naho inzu ya Yuda nyimunge." 
Hosea5:13 Efurayimu yabonye uburwayi bwayo, na Yuda ibona igikomere cyayo; Efurayimu ni ko kwirukira muri Ashuru, kandi yohereza intumwa ku mwami mukuru. Nyamara na we ntazashobora kubavura, cyangwa ngo abomore igikomere cyanyu." 
Hosea5:14 Byongeye kandi, Efurayimu nzayimerera nk’intare, inzu ya Yuda nyimerere nk’icyana cy’intare; jye ubwanjye nzabatanyaguza maze nigendere, njyane umuhigo wanjye kandi nta we uteze kuwunyambura." 
Hosea5:15 Nzagenda nigumire iwanjye kugeza ko bazumva igicumuro cyabo, maze bagashakashaka uruhanga rwanjye; koko kandi igihe bazaba bari mu mubabaro, ni bwo bazanshakashaka." 
Hosea6:1 Nuko muravuga muti «Nimuze tugarukire Uhoraho. Ni we wadukomerekeje kandi ni we uzatuvura, ni we wadukubise, azomora ibikomere byacu." 
Hosea6:2 Nyuma y’iminsi ibiri azaba yaduhembuye, ku munsi wa gatatu aduhagurutse, maze twibanire." 
Hosea6:3 Nidushishikarire kumenya Uhoraho, nta shiti, azatunguka nk’umuseke ukebye, azatugeraho ameze nk’imvura yuhira imyaka, mbese nk’uko imvura y’umuhindo isomya ubutaka.»" 
Hosea6:4 — Yewe Efurayimu, nkugenze nte koko? Nawe Yuda, rwose nkugire nte? Urukundo rwanyu ni nk’igihu cya mu gitondo, cyangwa ikime cyumuka ako kanya." 
Hosea6:5 Ni cyo gitumye rero mbahanisha abahanuzi, nkabicisha amagambo avuye mu kanwa kanjye, kandi urubanza rwanjye rukazabagwa gitumo nk’urumuri;" 
Hosea6:6 kuko nshimishwa n’urukundo kuruta ibitambo, no kumenya Imana bikandutira ibitambo bitwikwa." 
Hosea6:7 Ariko bo bishe isezerano bakiri i Adama, ari na ho bampemukiriye." 
Hosea6:8 Gilihadi yahindutse umugi w’abagiranabi, wahindanyijwe n’amaraso." 
Hosea6:9 Uko abambuzi biremamo ibico, ni na ko agatsiko k’abaherezabitambo kicira abantu ku nzira y’i Sikemu! Ngayo amarorerwa bariho bakora!" 
Hosea6:10 I Beteli nahabonye ibintu biteye ubwoba: Efurayimu ni ho ikorera uburaya bwayo, na Israheli yose ikiyandavuza." 
Hosea6:11 Nawe rero Yuda, icyo nguteze kiri aho, igihe nzaba nibutse umuryango wanjye." 
Hosea7:1 Igihe nshatse gukiza Israheli, amafuti ya Efurayimu n’ubugome bwa Samariya ni bwo byigaragaje; ni koko ibyo bakora ni ibinyoma: umujura arinjira mu nzu, agatsiko k’abambuzi kagaca ibintu ku gasozi." 
Hosea7:2 Ntibajya batekereza na rimwe ko nibuka ubugome bwabo! None ibikorwa byabo birabagose, kandi biri imbere yanjye." 
Hosea7:3 Banezeza umwami n’ubwo bugome bwabo, uburyarya bwabo bugashimisha abatware." 
Hosea7:4 Bose uko bangana ni abasambanyi; bameze nk’itanura rikomeza kugurumana, ndetse n’iyo umutetsi w’imigati atongeyemo inkwi, kuva igihe avanze umutsima kugeza ubwo ututumba." 
Hosea7:5 Ku munsi mukuru w’umwami wacu, abatware basinda divayi nyinshi banyoye, bagategera ibiganza abasetsi bari kumwe." 
Hosea7:6 Ni abagambanyi, bakamera nk’umuriro w’itanura, umutima wabo wuzuye uburyarya; ijoro ryose uburakari bwabo buracururuka; bwacya bakagurumana nk’itanura." 
Hosea7:7 Bose baragurumana nk’itanura, bariho baratanyagura abacamanza babo, abami babo bose baraguye, kandi nta n’umwe muri bo ukintakira!" 
Hosea7:8 Dore Efurayimu yivanze n’indi miryango, imeze nk’umutsima utabirinduwe wahiye uruhande rumwe." 
Hosea7:9 Abanyamahanga barayinyunyuza imitsi, ariko yo nta cyo ibiziho! Ndetse n’umutwe wayo wameze imvi, nyamara yo ntibimenya!" 
Hosea7:10 Ubwibone bwa Israheli burayishinja, nyamara ntibagarukira Uhoraho, Imana yabo, n’ubwo babona ibyo byose, nta bwo bamushakashaka!" 
Hosea7:11 Efurayimu ni nk’inuma y’injiji idatekereza, baratakira Misiri, bakirukankira no muri Ashuru;" 
Hosea7:12 aho bazajya hose, ni ko nzabatega umutego. Nzabahanantura nk’ibisiga byo mu kirere, mbahane bakimara kurema ikoraniro." 
Hosea7:13 Nibagushe ishyano kuko bampunze, barimbuke kuko banyigometseho! Nanjye se naba uwo kubacungura, kandi bambwira ibinyoma?" 
Hosea7:14 Ntibantakambira babikuye ku mutima; baborogera ku buriri bwabo, bakirasaga umubiri, babitewe no kwishakira ingano na divayi nshyashya, naho jye bakangomera." 
Hosea7:15 Nyamara jye narabayoboye, nkomeza amaboko yabo, ariko bo bakangira imigambi yo kungirira nabi." 
Hosea7:16 Iyo bagarutse, si jye baba bagarukiye, ahubwo baba bameze nk’umuheto utanoze. Abatware babo bazarimburwa n’inkota, bazazira ubugome bw’ururimi rwabo, maze basekerwe mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Hosea8:1 Nimuvuze ihembe! Icyago kiguye nka kagoma hejuru y’inzu y’Uhoraho, kuko bishe Isezerano ryanjye kandi bagahemuka ku mategeko yanjye." 
Hosea8:2 Barantakira, bagira bati «Mana yanjye, twebwe Abayisraheli turakuzi.»" 
Hosea8:3 Nyamara Israheli yazibukiriye ibyiza, none umwanzi nayikurikirane." 
Hosea8:4 Biyimikiye abami batambajije, bishyiriraho n’abatware jyewe ntabizi. Bariremera ibigirwamana muri zahabu na feza yabo, bakikururira batyo kurimbuka." 
Hosea8:5 Samariya rero, ikimasa cyawe ndagihigitse! (Koko, uburakari bwanjye bwabagurumaniye: mbese bazanga gusukurwa kugeza ryari?)" 
Hosea8:6 Cyakomotse muri Israheli, gikozwe n’umunyabukorikori, kikaba rero atari Imana. Ni yo mpamvu ikimasa cyo muri Samariya kizahinduka ishingwe." 
Hosea8:7 Babibye umuyaga, bazasarura serwakira; bameze nk’ingano zitagira amahundo, ntizivemo n’ifu, n'aho kandi yabonekamo yaribwa n’abanyamahanga." 
Hosea8:8 Israheli irayongobejwe, barasuzugurwa n’amahanga, mbese nk’abantu batagira agaciro," 
Hosea8:9 bitewe n’uko bazamutse bakajya muri Ashuru, ya ndogobe y’ishyamba yibera yonyine, Efurayimu ikagurira amacuti!" 
Hosea8:10 N’ubwo baha amaturo atagira ingano abanyamahanga, ngiye kubakoranya bidatinze, maze mu gihe gito bazashengurwe n’umutwaro umwami w’abami agiye kubagerekaho." 
Hosea8:11 Efurayimu yagwije intambiro zo kuvanaho ibyaha, none dore zayibereye impamvu yo gucumura kurushaho." 
Hosea8:12 N'aho nayandikira ingingo igihumbi mu mategeko yanjye, babifata nk’aho ari ikintu cy’icyaduka!" 
Hosea8:13 Bakunda kuntura ibitambo, no kurya inyama zabyo, nyamara jye Uhoraho, ntibinshimisha. Kuva ubu nzakomeza kwibuka amakosa yabo, mbaryoze ibyaha byabo, basubire mu Misiri." 
Hosea8:14 Israheli yirengagije Uwayiremye maze yiyubakira ingoro, naho Yuda igwiza imigi ikomeye; ariko nzohereza umuriro muri iyo migi yayo, n’ibigo byayo bikongoke." 
Hosea9:1 Israheli, wikwishima birenze urugero, wisabagizwa n’ibyishimo nk’indi miryango, kuko wigize indaya witarura Imana yawe, ukishimira igihembo cyahumanye uherwa ku mbuga zose zihurirwaho ingano." 
Hosea9:2 Ibivuye ku mbuga no mu rwengero ntibizabahaza, na divayi nshyashya bari bategereje ntibazayibona." 
Hosea9:3 Ntibazongera gutura mu gihugu cy’Uhoraho, kuko Efurayimu izasubira mu Misiri, bakazajya no muri Ashuru kurya ibyahumanye." 
Hosea9:4 Ntibazongera kumurikira Uhoraho divayi ho ituro riseswa, n’ibitambo byabo ntibizamushimisha ukundi. Bizabamerera nk’umugati barya bari mu cyunamo, abazabiryaho bose bazabe bahumanye; uwo mugati ni bo uzatunga ubwabo, ariko ntuzinjizwa mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Hosea9:5 Ubwo se muzakora iki ku munsi w’ikoraniro, ari wo munsi mukuru w’Uhoraho?" 
Hosea9:6 Dore ngabo bahunze igihugu cyabo cyarimbutse, Misiri izabakira, ariko i Memfisi hazabe imva yabo; ibintu byabo by’agaciro gakomeye bizarengwaho n’ibitovu, n’amahwa apfukirane ahari amahema yabo." 
Hosea9:7 Ngiyi iminsi y’igihano iregereje, igihe cyo kuryozwa kirageze; Israheli nibimenye! Bariyamiriye bati «Umuhanuzi ahindutse umusazi, uwuzuwemo n’umwuka w’Uhoraho aravugaguzwa!» — Ni byo koko, ariko bitewe n’ubwinshi bw’ibicumuro byawe, kandi amagorwa azakugwirira, arakomeye cyane!" 
Hosea9:8 Umuhanuzi uri kumwe n’Imana ye, ni we murinzi urengera Efurayimu; ariko baramutega imitego aho anyura hose, bakamutera no mu nzu y’Imana ye." 
Hosea9:9 Barihumanyije bikabije, nko mu gihe cy’i Gibeya, ariko Imana izibuka ibicumuro byabo, ibaryoze ibyaha bakoze." 
Hosea9:10 Kera nigeze kurabukwa Israheli, imeze nk’imbuto y’umuzabibu mu butayu, mbona n’abasekuruza banyu bameze nk’imbuto y’umutini ihishije mbere; ariko bakigera i Behali‐Pewori biyegurira Sesoni, bahinduka batyo amahano nk’ibyo byabararuye!" 
Hosea9:11 Ni cyo gitumye ikuzo rya Efurayimu rigurutse nk’inyoni: nta we ukibyara, nta n’uzatwara inda cyangwa ngo hagire uyisama." 
Hosea9:12 Ndetse n’iyo babyirura abahungu, nababagomwa bataraba abagabo; ni koko, bazabona ishyano nimara kwitandukanya na bo!" 
Hosea9:13 Efurayimu ndabona imeze nka Tiri, yubatse ahantu hatohagiye, nyamara bazayihatira gutanga abana ngo bicwe!" 
Hosea9:14 Uhoraho, jya ubahana! Ariko se uzabahanisha iki?... Bahanishe kuba ingumba, n’amabere uyumishe!" 
Hosea9:15 Ububi bwabo bwose bwigaragarije i Giligali, ari na ho nahereye nkabanga urunuka. Nzabirukana mu nzu yanjye, mbahoye ububi bw’ibikorwa byabo, sinzongera kubakunda ukundi, bo n’abatware babo b’abahemu." 
Hosea9:16 Efurayimu yarafashwe none imizi yayo yarumagatanye, ntibazongera kwera imbuto ukundi. Ndetse nibanabyara, nzabagomwa ibyo byiza bibarutse." 
Hosea9:17 Imana yanjye izabaca kuko batayumvise, maze bazajye kubuyera mu mahanga." 
Hosea10:1 Israheli yari umuzabibu mwiza ukera imbuto zishimishije. Uko imbuto zayo ziyongeraga, ni na ko yagwizaga intambiro; uko igihugu cyayo cyarushagaho kurumbuka, ni ko n’inkingi z’ibigirwamana zarushagaho kuba nziza." 
Hosea10:2 Umutima wabo ni ibinyoma bisa, none bagiye kubiryozwa. Uhoraho ubwe agiye gusenya intambiro zabo no guhirika inkingi zabo." 
Hosea10:3 Ubwo noneho bazavuga bati «Nta mwami tukigira kuko tutubashye Uhoraho. Ariko se ubundi bwo, umwami yatumarira iki?»" 
Hosea10:4 Barasukiranya amagambo, bararahira ibinyoma, bakagirana amasezerano, ariko ubutungane bwo bakabwitaza, nk’aho ari icyatsi kirimo uburozi cyameze mu murima." 
Hosea10:5 Abaturage b’i Samariya barahinda umushyitsi kubera ikimasa cy’i Betaveni; koko rero, imbaga yose ikibereye mu cyunamo, kimwe n’abaherezabitambo bacyo. Ngaho nibakomeze barate ikuzo ryacyo, kandi ryamaze kuyoyoka!" 
Hosea10:6 Icyo kimasa kizajyanwa muri Ashuru, giturwe umwami mukuru. Efurayimu izakorwa n’isoni, na Israheli imwazwe n’uburiganya bwayo." 
Hosea10:7 Ibya Samariya byo birarangiye: umwami wayo aragenda ayobagurika nk’agashami gatwawe n’amazi. 
Hosea10:8 Amasengero y’ahirengeye y’i Aveni, ari na yo mvano y’icyaha cya Israheli, azasenywa; amahwa n’ibitovu bipfukirane intambiro zabo, maze bazabwire imisozi bati «Nimuturidukireho! », n’utununga bati «Nimudutwikire!»" 
Hosea10:9 Mbese Israheli, i Gibeya si ho watangiriye gucumura, kandi kuva ubwo ntiwisubireho! None se intambara yareka ite gutera abagiranabi aho i Gibeya?" 
Hosea10:10 Ndaje nzanywe no kubahana! Abanyamahanga bazakoranira kubarwanya, igihe bazahanirwa bya bicumuro byombi byahakorewe." 
Hosea10:11 Efurayimu yari nk’inyana imeze neza, igakunda guhonyorera ingano ku mbuga. Naho jyewe, ijosi ryayo ryiza ndihambiraho ibiziriko kugira ngo ijye ikurura icyuma gihingishwa. Yuda azahinga, naho Yakobo asanze intabire." 
Hosea10:12 Nimubiba mukurikije ubutungane, muzasarura imyaka myiza. Nimwitongorere imirima ikiri mishyashya; kuko ari cyo gihe cyo gushakashaka Uhoraho, kugeza ubwo azaza akadusesekazaho ubutungane." 
Hosea10:13 Mwahinze ubugome, musarura ubuhemu, kandi murya ku mbuto y’ikinyoma! Wiringiye amagare yawe y’intambara, n’ubwinshi bw’ingabo zawe;" 
Hosea10:14 ni cyo gitumye hagiye kuba umuvurungano mu bantu bawe, ibigo byawe bikomeye bikarimburwa, mbese nk’uko Shalumani yarimbuye Beti‐Arubeli, kuri wa munsi abana bicanwaga na ba nyina." 
Hosea10:15 Ngiryo ishyano mwikururiye kubera Beteli, n’ubugome bwanyu bukabije; naho umwami wa Israheli azarimburwe, umuseke ugikeba!" 
Hosea11:1 Igihe Israheli yari akiri muto, naramukunze, kandi nahamagaye umwana wanjye ngo ave mu Misiri." 
Hosea11:2 Ariko uko nabahamagaraga, ni ko barushagaho kunyitarura; batura ibitambo za Behali, maze amashusho yazo bakayosereza imibavu." 
Hosea11:3 Nyamara Efurayimu, ni jye wamufataga akaboko, nkamwigisha gutambuka, ariko ntibigeze bamenya ko ari jye wabitagaho." 
Hosea11:4 Narabiyegerezaga mbigiranye urukundo, nkabizirikaho nk’uko abantu babigenza; mbiyegamiza ku musaya nk’umubyeyi uteruye umwana we, nca bugufi ndabagaburira." 
Hosea11:5 Nuko rero, Israheli ntizasubira mu gihugu cya Misiri, ahubwo izategekwa n’umwami wa Ashuru, kuko yanze kungarukira!" 
Hosea11:6 Inkota izibasira imigi yayo, isenye inzugi zayo, ibarimbure bazize imigambi yabo mibi." 
Hosea11:7 Umuryango wanjye wihambira ku bucibwe bwawo; barawuhamagarira kugarukira Umusumbabyose, nyamara ntihagire n’umwe wibakura!" 
Hosea11:8 Efurayimu, nabasha nte kugutererana, Israheli, nayigabiza nte? Nakugira se nka Adama, cyangwa nkakugenza uko nagenje Seboyimu? Mu mutima wanjye nisubiyeho, impuhwe zanjye zirangurumanamo." 
Hosea11:9 Sinzakurikiza ubukana bw’uburakari bwanjye, kandi sinzarimbura ukundi Efurayimu; kuko ndi Imana simbe umuntu, nkaba Nyir’ubutagatifu rwagati muri mwe, sinzongera kugusanga mfite uburakari." 
Hosea11:10 Bazaza bakurikiye Uhoraho uzaba yivuga nk’intare; natangira kwivuga abana bazahinda umushyitsi, baze baturuka mu burengerazuba." 
Hosea11:11 Bazaturuka mu Misiri bameze nk’uruhuri, bave no mu gihugu cya Ashuru bameze nk’inuma; maze nzabatuze mu mazu yabo. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Hosea12:1 Efurayimu irantangatanga n’ibinyoma, inzu ya Israheli ikabigirisha uburiganya. (Ariko inzu ya Yuda yo iracyari kumwe n’Imana, ntihemukira Nyir’ubutagatifu.)" 
Hosea12:2 Efurayimu itungwa n’umuyaga, buri munsi ikiruka inyuma y’umuyaga w’iburasirazuba, bityo ikagwiza ibinyoma n’urugomo: igirana amasezerano na Ashuru, ikagemura amavuta mu Misiri." 
Hosea12:3 Uhoraho afitanye urubanza na Israheli, agiye guhanira Yakobo imyifatire ye, kandi amwiture ibihwanye n’ibikorwa bye." 
Hosea12:4 Yaryamiye umuvandimwe we bakiri mu nda ya nyina, amaze no gukura akiranya Imana." 
Hosea12:5 Yakiranye n’Umumalayika maze aramutsinda, ararira kandi aramwinginga. I Beteli ni ho yahuriye n’Imana, ari na ho yavuganiye na yo:" 
Hosea12:6 «Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo», ni ryo zina ryayo!" 
Hosea12:7 Naho wowe, Yakobo, garukira Imana yawe, ukomere ku budahemuka n’ubutungane, kandi ujye uhora wiringiye Imana yawe." 
Hosea12:8 Abakanahani bafite iminzani y’ubuhendanyi mu ntoki, kuko bashimishwa n’ubwambuzi." 
Hosea12:9 Naho Efurayimu yo iravuga iti «Narikungahaje, mfite umutungo uhagije», nyamara kandi muri ibyo byose yungutse, nta na kimwe izasigarana, kuko yahemutse igakora ibibi." 
Hosea12:10 Nyamara ndi Uhoraho Imana yawe, kuva nkuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri. Nzagutuza bundi bushya mu mahema nko ku minsi y’Ikoraniro." 
Hosea12:11 Nzavugana n’abahanuzi, ngwize amabonekerwa, kandi mbabwirire mu migani, nifashishije abahanuzi." 
Hosea12:12 Niba Gilihadi yarahemutse, bo ubwabo bahindutse indyarya bikabije! I Giligali ntibahwema gutura ibimasa ho ibitambo, ni yo mpamvu intambiro zabo zizamera nk’udushyinga tw’amabuye, arundarunze ku mayogi mu mirima." 
Hosea12:13 Yakobo ahungiye mu bibaya bya Aramu, nuko Israheli ahakirwa umugore, kugira ngo amubone aba umushumba w’amatungo." 
Hosea12:14 Ariko Uhoraho, yifashishije umuhanuzi, yavanye Israheli mu Misiri, kandi Israheli iragirwa n’umuhanuzi." 
Hosea12:15 Efurayimu yarakaje Uhoraho bikomeye: Umutegetsi wayo azayiryoza amaraso yamennye, ayigarureho n’imivumo yavumanye." 
Hosea13:1 Igihe Efurayimu yabaga ivuze, yakwizaga iterabwoba hose; kuko yari ikomeye muri Israheli. Ariko kubera ko yayobotse Behali, yaracumuye ikurizaho gupfa." 
Hosea13:2 Na n’ubu baracyakomeza gucumura: bikoreye ibishushanyo mu cyuma gishongeshejwe, feza yabo bayikoramo ibigirwamana bihimbiye, kandi ibyo byose ari ibikorwa by’umunyabukorikori! Nuko bakavuga bati «Nimubiture ibitambo», naho abantu bakunamira ibimasa!" 
Hosea13:3 Ni cyo gituma bazamera nk’igihu cya mu gitondo, cyangwa nk’ikime cyo mu rukerera kiyoyoka ako kanya, bakazamera nk’umurama utwawe n’umuyaga, cyangwa se umwotsi uhemema mu idirishya." 
Hosea13:4 Nyamara jye, ndi Uhoraho Imana yawe, kuva nkuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri. Nta yindi Mana wamenye itari jye, nta wundi Mukiza uriho uretse jye." 
Hosea13:5 Jyewe nakumenye igihe wari ukiri mu butayu, mu gihugu cy’amapfa." 
Hosea13:6 Narabaragiye barahaga, bamaze kurengwa bishyira ejuru, bakurizaho kunyibagirwa!" 
Hosea13:7 Ni yo mpamvu nabamereye nk’intare, mbategera ku nzira nk’urusamagwe." 
Hosea13:8 Nabateye nk’ikirura bacuje ibyana byacyo, mbamenagura agatuza; nabaconshomeye nk’intare y’ingore, n’inyamaswa z’ishyamba zirabatanyagura." 
Hosea13:9 Israheli, ngaha urarimbutse, kandi ni jyewe washoboraga kugutabara." 
Hosea13:10 Umwami wawe se ari hehe ngo aze agukize? Abacamanza bawe bari mu migi yose, bo bagiye hehe? Nyamara ni bo wifuzaga, ubwo wavuze uti «Nimunshyirireho umwami n’abatware!»" 
Hosea13:11 Umwami rero, mu burakari bwanjye ndamuguhaye, none ndanamukunyaze, kubera umujinya ngufitiye." 
Hosea13:12 Amakosa ya Efurayimu yashyizwe hamwe, icyaha cye cyashyizwe mu bubiko." 
Hosea13:13 Yagwiririwe n’imibabaro nk’umugore uramutswe: ariko ni umwana w’ikigoryi; igihe cye cyo kuvuka cyageze, ariko we ntabishaka!" 
Hosea13:14 Nanjye se, murabona ndi uwabakura ikuzimu, nkabavana mu nzara z’Urupfu? Ni ko se Rupfu, ibyago watezaga biri hehe? Kuzimu se wowe, icyorezo cyawe kiri ahagana he? Nta kundi rero, amaso yanjye ntakigize impuhwe." 
Hosea13:15 Naho Efurayimu yakororoka mu bavandimwe be, umuyaga uzaza uturutse mu burasirazuba, umuyaga w’Uhoraho uzazamuke mu butayu, maze isoko ye izazibe n’iriba rye rikame. Ni wo uzazana abasahura ububiko bwe, batware ibintu byose by’agaciro gakomeye." 
Hosea14:1 Samariya igomba guhanwa kuko yigometse ku Mana yayo. Bazarimburwa n’inkota, abana babo b’ibitambambuga bazicwe, abagore babo batwite babakuremo inda." 
Hosea14:2 Israheli, garukira Uhoraho Imana yawe, kuko wayobejwe n’ibicumuro byawe." 
Hosea14:3 Garukira Uhoraho, umubwire uti «Duhanagureho ibicumuro byose maze wakire ikiri cyiza. Aho kugutura ibimasa ho ibitambo, tuzakwegurira amagambo avuye mu kanwa kacu." 
Hosea14:4 Ashuru ntizongera kudukiza ukundi, ntituzongera kugendera ku mafarasi, cyangwa ngo tubwire igikorwa cy’ibiganza byacu tuti ’Uri Imana yacu!’ kuko ari wowe impfubyi zikesha kugirirwa impuhwe!»" 
Hosea14:5 — Nzabakiza ubugambanyi bwabo, mbakunde mbikuye ku mutima, kandi sinzongera kubarakarira ukundi." 
Hosea14:6 Israheli nzayimerera nk’ikime, irabye indabyo nk’iza lisi, kandi ishore imizi nk’ibiti byo muri Libani." 
Hosea14:7 Imicwira yayo izasagamba, ubwiza bwayo bumere nk’ubw’umuzeti, n’impumuro yayo imere nk’iya Libani." 
Hosea14:8 Bazagaruka bature mu gicucu cyanjye, bongere bashibuke nk’ingano, barabye indabyo nk’umuzabibu, kandi ube ikirangirire nka divayi yo muri Libani." 
Hosea14:9 Efurayimu izavuga iti «Ndacyahuriye he n’ibigirwamana!» Ni koko ndayumva kandi nkayitaho, meze nk’umuzonobari utohagiye, ni jyewe ukesha umusaruro." 
Hosea14:10 Ni nde muhanga ngo yumve ibyo bintu, cyangwa se umunyabwenge ngo abimenye? Inzira z’Uhoraho ziraboneye, zikagenderwamo n’intungane, naho abahemu bakaziteshuka." 
Joel1:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Yoweli, mwene Petuweli." 
Joel1:2 Nimwumve ibi ngibi, mwe bakuru b’umuryango, mutege amatwi, mwebwe mwese abatuye igihugu! Ibintu nk’ibi hari ibyigeze bibaho, ari mu gihe cyanyu, cyangwa se mu gihe cy’abasokuruza banyu?" 
Joel1:3 Nimubitekerereze abana banyu, abana banyu babitekerereze ababo, na bo bazabitekerereze ab’igisekuru kizaza!" 
Joel1:4 Ibyo insanane zasize, byariwe n’inzige; ibyo inzige zisize, biribwa n’indahaga; ibyo indahaga zishigaje, na byo biribwa n’ibihore." 
Joel1:5 Nimukanguke, mwa basinzi mwe, nimurire kandi muboroge, mwebwe mwese abanywi ba divayi, kubera divayi nshyashya mutacyongeye gukoza mu kanwa!" 
Joel1:6 Dore ingabo ziteye igihugu cyanjye, ni imbaga y’indatsimburwa kandi itabarika; amenyo yazo ni nk’ay’intare, zifite n’inzasaya nk’iz’intare y’ingore." 
Joel1:7 Umuzabibu wanjye ziwuhinduye ubutayu, imitini yanjye zirayivunagura; zirayikokora ziyiragarika hasi, amashami yayo asigara ari imyeru!" 
Joel1:8 Ganya, nk’inkumi yapfushije umusore wayisabye, ikamuririra yambaye ikigunira." 
Joel1:9 Amaturo n’ibitambo byaciwe mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, abaherezabitambo bashinzwe umurimo w’Uhoraho bari mu cyunamo." 
Joel1:10 Imirima yayogojwe, ubutaka buri mu cyunamo, ingano zononekaye, divayi yabuze n’amavuta mashyashya yakamye." 
Joel1:11 Bahinzi, nimwumirwe; bene imizabibu, muboroge; muririre ingano nini n’iza bushoki: kuko umusaruro wo mu mirima wangiritse." 
Joel1:12 Umuzabibu warabiranye, umutini urumirana, imikomamanga, imikindo, amapera, mbese ibiti byose byo mu mirima, byumiranye. Bityo rero, nta munezero ukirangwa mu bantu." 
Joel1:13 Nimukenyere maze muganye, mwe baherezabitambo! Namwe abashinzwe imirimo yo ku rutambiro, nimuboroge! Nimurare ijoro mwambaye ibigunira, mwe abashinzwe imirimo y’Imana yanjye."
