Joel1:14 Nimwitagatifurishe gusiba kurya, mutangaze iteraniro ritagatifu, mukoranyirize abakuru b’umuryango n’abatuye igihugu bose mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, maze mutakambire Uhoraho." 
Joel1:15 Yuu! Mbega umunsi! Umunsi w’Uhoraho uregereje! Dore nguyu, uje ari kirimbuzi, uturutse kuri Nyir’ububasha." 
Joel1:16 None se ntitwabyiboneraga n’amaso yacu ko ibiribwa bivanyweho, ibyishimo n’umunezero bikabura mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho?" 
Joel1:17 Imbuto zumiye ku mayogi, imitiba nta kikiyihunitsemo; ibigega byarasenyutse kuko ingano zabuze." 
Joel1:18 Nimwiyumvire namwe ukuntu amatungo aboroga! Amashyo y’inka arangara kuko atakigira urwuri; ndetse n’amatungo magufi yacitse intege. 
Joel1:19 Uhoraho, ni wowe ntakambira, kuko umuriro wayogoje inzuri zo mu mayaga, ikirimi cy’umuriro gitwika ibiti byose byo mu murima." 
Joel1:20 Dore, ndetse n’inyamaswa z’ishyamba ziguhanze amaso, kuko imigezi yakamye n’umuriro ukayogoza mu mayaga." 
Joel2:1 Nimuvugirize ihembe i Siyoni, muvugirize induru ku musozi mutagatifu! Abatuye igihugu bose nibakangarane, kuko Uhoraho aje, nguyu umunsi we uregereje!" 
Joel2:2 Ni umunsi w’umwijima n’icuraburindi, umunsi w’ibicu n’ibihu bibuditse! Dore, ya mbaga y’indatsimburwa kandi itabarika yadutse, uboshye umuseke umurikiye ku mpinga z’imisozi. Ni inyoko itigeze iboneka na rimwe, nta n’iyindi izaboneka nka yo, kugeza kera cyane, mu bisekuruza bizaza." 
Joel2:3 Mbega igitero! Kibanjirijwe n’umuriro ugurumana, kigakurikirwa n’ikibatsi cy’umuriro utwika. Kitaraza, igihugu cyasaga n’ubusitani bwa Edeni, kimaze kuhanyura, hasigara ari ubutayu bwiyanitse. Ni iki cyashoboraga kugihonoka?" 
Joel2:4 Iyo nyoko imeze nk’amafarasi, iragenda isiganwa, uboshye abanyamafarasi." 
Joel2:5 Urwamu rwayo ni nk’urw’amagare y’intambara asimbuka mu mpinga z’imisozi, cyangwa umuriri w’ibikenyeri bigurumana. Mbega ingabo z’intwari, ngo zirakera urugamba!" 
Joel2:6 Amahanga yakangaranye imbere yayo, abantu bose basuherewe." 
Joel2:7 Inzige zirihuta nk’ingabo z’intwari, ziratondagira inkike nk’abamenyereye intambara, zose ziboneje inzira, nta na rumwe ruyiteshukaho." 
Joel2:8 Nta na rumwe rubyigana n’urundi, zose ziragenda ziromboreje imbere. No mu isibaniro ry’imyambi zo ziratwaza, kandi ntizigera zitatana." 
Joel2:9 Zirambukiranya umugi ziruka ku nkike; zirurira amazu, zigasesera mu madirishya nk’abajura." 
Joel2:10 Isi irahinda umushyitsi, ijuru rigahungabana imbere yazo! Izuba n’ukwezi bikijima, inyenyeri ntizongere kumurika!" 
Joel2:11 Uhoraho ararangururira ijwi imbere y’ingabo ze! Ingabo ze ntizigira ingano, ni zo ntwari zirangiza icyo ategetse. Koko rero, Umunsi w’Uhoraho urakomeye cyane, kandi uteye ubwoba! Ni nde wawuhangara?" 
Joel2:12 Na n’ubu kandi, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, nimungarukire n’umutima wanyu wose, mwigomwe mu byo kurya, murire kandi muganye." 
Joel2:13 Nimushishimure imitima yanyu, aho gushishimura ibyo mwambaye, maze mugarukire Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, kuko agwa neza akanagira impuhwe; atinda kurakara akaba n’indahemuka, kandi ntakunda guteza ibyago." 
Joel2:14 Hari uwabimenya se? Ahari wenda ntiyazisubiraho! Ahari wenda icyago ntiyazagisimbuza umugisha, akongera gushimishwa n’amaturo n’ibitambo mwatura Uhoraho, Imana yanyu!" 
Joel2:15 Nimuvugirize ihembe i Siyoni, mutangaze hose igisibo gitagatifu, kandi mutumize bose mu iteraniro." 
Joel2:16 Nimukoranye rubanda, muhamagaze ikoraniro ryose. Nimukoranye abasaza, n’abato, ndetse n’abakiri ku ibere. Umukwe nasohoke mu nzu ye, umugeni na we ave mu cyumba cye." 
Joel2:17 Abaherezabitambo, ari bo bashinzwe imirimo y’Uhoraho, nibaririre hagati y’umuryango w’Ingoro n’urutambiro; nibatakambe bagira bati «Uhoraho, babarira imbaga yawe; wikoza isoni umurage wawe, ngo amahanga awuhindure urw’amenyo. Ni iki cyatuma mu mahanga bavuga ngo: Mbese Imana yabo iba he?»" 
Joel2:18 Ni bwo Uhoraho agiriye ishyaka igihugu cye, maze ababarira umuryango we." 
Joel2:19 Nuko Uhoraho asubiza umuryango we, ati «Noneho ngiye kuboherereza ingano na divayi, hamwe n’amavuta mashyashya, muzabihage; kandi sinzongera kubakoza isoni bibaho mu maso y’amahanga." 
Joel2:20 Uje aturutse mu majyaruguru, nzamunyuza kure yanyu; nzamuhinda mwerekeza mu gihugu cyumaganye kandi kitera. Ingabo ze z’imbere nzaziganisha mu nyanja y’iburasirazuba, iz’inyuma nziganishe mu nyanja y’iburengerazuba, maze umunuko uzatongore kubera ububore bwazo, kuko Uhoraho azaba yakoze ibintu bikomeye!»" 
Joel2:21 Witinya, wa si we, ishime kandi unezerwe, kuko Uhoraho agiye gukora ibintu bikomeye!" 
Joel2:22 Namwe, nyamaswa zo mu gasozi, mwitinya; inzuri zo mu mayaga zongeye kumera ubwatsi, ibiti byeze imbuto zabyo, umutini n’umuzabibu byarumbutse." 
Joel2:23 Bantu b’i Siyoni, nimunezerwe, mwishimire muri Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, kuko abahaye imvura y’umuhindo ibakwiye, akaba abagushirije imvura y’itumba n’iy’umuhindo nka kera." 
Joel2:24 Imbuga zizuzuraho ingano, urwengero rusagukwe na divayi n’amavuta mashyashya." 
Joel2:25 «Nzabariha ibyariwe n’insanane muri ya myaka yose, bikaribwa n’inzige, n’indahaga, n’ibihore, ari byo cya gitero cyanjye nabateje." 
Joel2:26 Muzarya mwijute, muzasingize izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, yabakoreye ibintu by’agatangaza. Umuryango wanjye ntuzongera gukorwa n’isoni bibaho!" 
Joel2:27 Ubwo muzamenya ko ndi rwagati muri Israheli, nkaba ndi Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, kandi ko nta yindi ibaho! Umuryango wanjye ntuzongera gukorwa n’isoni bibaho.»" 
Joel3:1 «Nyuma y’ibyo nzasendereza Umwuka wanjye ku cyitwa ikiremwa cyose. Abahungu banyu n’abakobwa banyu bazahanure, abasaza banyu bazabonere mu nzozi, urubyiruko rwanyu ruzabonekerwe." 
Joel3:2 Koko muri iyo minsi, abagaragu n’abaja nzabasenderezamo Umwuka wanjye." 
Joel3:3 Nzakora ibitangaje mu kirere no hasi ku isi, hazaboneke amaraso, umuriro n’inkingi y’umwotsi." 
Joel3:4 Izuba rizijima, ukwezi guhinduke amaraso, mbere y’uko haza Umunsi w’Uhoraho, umunsi ukomeye kandi uteye ubwoba!" 
Joel3:5 Ubwo abaziyambaza izina ry’Uhoraho bose, bazakizwa. Ni koko kandi, ku musozi wa Siyoni, hazaboneka abacitse ku icumu, nk’uko Uhoraho yabivuze, kandi i Yeruzalemu hazaboneke abarokotse, mbese abo bose Uhoraho azabahamagare." 
Amos1:1 Amagambo ya Amosi, wari umwe mu borozi b’i Tekowa, yerekeye ibyo yabonye bireba Israheli, mu gihe cya Oziya, umwami wa Yuda, na Yerobowamu, mwene Yowasi, umwami wa Israheli, igihe umutingito w’isi wari ushigaje imyaka ibiri ngo ube." 
Amos1:2 Yaravuze ati «Uhoraho yivugiye kuri Siyoni, arangururira ijwi rye i Yeruzalemu; inzuri z’abashumba ziri mu kababaro, n’ibitwa bya Karumeli birumirana.»" 
Amos1:3 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kabiri gatatu Damasi icumura! Niyemeje kuyihana kandi sinzivuguruza! Kubera ko bakubitishije Gilihadi ibibando by’ibyuma," 
Amos1:4 nzatwika inzu ya Hazayeli maze ingoro za Beni‐Hadadi zitsembwe n’umuriro; 
Amos1:5 nzamenagura ibyuma bifunze inzugi za Damasi, nturumbure igikomangoma kiri i Bikati‐Aveni, ntsembe n’ufite inkoni ya cyami i Betedeni, maze abantu b’Aramu bajyanwe bunyago i Kiri. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos1:6 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kabiri gatatu Gaza icumura! Niyemeje kuyihana kandi sinzivuguruza! Kubera ko bajyanye bunyago imbaga y’abantu bakabagabiza Edomu," 
Amos1:7 nzatwika inkike za Gaza, maze ingoro zayo zitsembwe n’umuriro;" 
Amos1:8 nzavanaho igikomangoma cy’Ashidodi, n’uwitwaje inkoni ya cyami wo muri Ashikeloni, nzahindukira ntere Ekironi, maze Abafilisiti bazaba basigaye barimbuke. Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos1:9 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kabiri gatatu Tiri icumura! Niyemeje kuyihana kandi sinzivuguruza! Kubera ko bagabije Edomu imbaga y’abo bari baratwayeho iminyago, bakibagirwa amasezerano ya kivandimwe bari baragiranye na bo," 
Amos1:10 nzatwika inkike za Tiri, maze ingoro zayo zitsembwe n’umuriro." 
Amos1:11 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kabiri gatatu Edomu icumura! Niyemeje kuyihana kandi sinzivuguruza! Kubera ko yatoteje umuvandimwe we ashaka kumwicisha inkota kandi akamwima imbabazi, kuko uburakari bwe butigeze bugabanuka kandi akagumana inzika igihe cyose," 
Amos1:12 nzatwika Temani, maze ingoro za Bosira zitsembwe n’umuriro." 
Amos1:13 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kabiri gatatu Abahamoni bacumura! Niyemeje kubahana kandi sinzivuguruza! Kubera ko bafomoje abagore batwite b’i Gilihadi kugira ngo bagure imipaka y’igihugu cyabo," 
Amos1:14 nzatwika inkike za Raba, maze umuriro utsembe ingoro zayo, habe urusaku rw’intambara rumeze nk’urw’umunsi w’imirwano, ruvanze n’inkubi y’umuyaga;" 
Amos1:15 umwami wabo azajyanwa bunyago, kimwe n’abategeka b’ingabo ze. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos2:1 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kabiri gatatu Mowabu icumura! Niyemeje kuyihana kandi sinzivuguruza! Kubera ko yatwitse amagufa y’umwami wa Edomu, ikayahindura ivu," 
Amos2:2 nzatwika Mowabu, maze umuriro utsembe ingoro za Keriyoti, Mowabu izarimbuka habaye urusaku ruvanze n’induru n’impanda;" 
Amos2:3 nzavana umwami wayo rwagati muri yo, maze mwicane n’abafasha be. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos2:4 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kabiri gatatu Yuda icumura! Niyemeje kuyihana kandi sinzivuguruza! Kubera ko basuzuguye inyigisho z’Uhoraho, ntibakurikize amategeko ye, kubera ko ibinyoma byabo byari byarabaroshye, ibyo binyoma ari na byo abasekuruza babo bakurikizaga;" 
Amos2:5 nzatwika Yuda, maze ntsembe ingoro z’i Yeruzalemu." 
Amos2:6 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kabiri gatatu Israheli icumura! Niyemeje kuyihana kandi sinzivuguruza! Kubera ko bagurana intungane amafeza, umukene bakamugurana umuguru w’inkweto," 
Amos2:7 kubera ko bakandamiza rubanda rugufi bakayobya abakene inzira, kubera ko umuhungu na se bahurira ku ihabara imwe ngo basebye izina ryanjye ritagatifu," 
Amos2:8 kubera ko imyambaro batwaye ho ingwate bayicuje urutambiro, no kubera divayi batwaye ho ingwate bakayinywera mu nzu y’Imana yabo..." 
Amos2:9 Nyamara jyewe nari nabasenyaguriye Abahemori, bareshya n’ibiti by’amasederi bagakomera nk’ibiti by’imishishi! Nari natsotsobye imbuto zabo mpereye hejuru, ndandura n’imizi yabo mpereye hasi." 
Amos2:10 Naho mwebwe nabazamuye mu Misiri, mbayobora imyaka mirongo ine mu butayu kugira ngo mwigarurire igihugu cy’Abahemori." 
Amos2:11 Natoye abahanuzi mu bana banyu, mu basore banyu ntoramo abanyiyegurira, si ko byagenze se, bana ba Israheli? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos2:12 Nyamara mwebwe mwanywesheje divayi abanyiyeguriye, abahanuzi mubaha iri tegeko ngo «Ntimugahanure»." 
Amos2:13 ... kubera ibyo byose ngiye kubanyukanyukira aho muri, nk’uko imashini bahurisha imyaka inyukanyuka imiba y’umusaruro;" 
Amos2:14 umuntu w’ibakwe ntazashobora guhunga, umunyamaboko azabure ingufu ze, n’uw’intwari ntazacika ku icumu," 
Amos2:15 umuhanga w’umuheto ntazaba agishoboye kurinda, uw’impayamaguru ntazashobora guhunga, n’ugendera ku ifarasi ntazarokora ubugingo bwe," 
Amos2:16 n’umuntu warahiriwe ubutwari azahunga yambaye ubusa uwo munsi! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. 
Amos3:1 Nimwumve ijambo Uhoraho ababwiye, bana ba Israheli, mwe n’umuryango wose navanye mu gihugu cya Misiri." 
Amos3:2 Ni mwebwe mwenyine namenye mu miryango yose yo ku isi; ni yo mpamvu nzabibaryoza mbaziza ibicumuro byanyu byose. 
Amos3:3 Mwabonye abantu babiri bafatanya urugendo batabanje kubisezerana? 
Amos3:4 Mbese hari ubwo intare itontoma mu ishyamba itabonye icyo ihiga? Icyana cy’intare se cyomonganya ijwi mu ndiri yacyo nta cyo cyafashe? 
Amos3:5 Mbese inyoni igwa mu mutego nta cyo bayishukishije? Umutego se washibuka ari nta cyo ufashe? 
Amos3:6 Ihembe se ryo, ryavugira mu mugi, abantu ntibaryamire amajanja? Hari ubwo se ibyago byatera mu mugi, atari Uhoraho ubiteye?" 
Amos3:7 Nyagasani Uhoraho rero nta cyo akora adahishuriye ibanga rye abagaragu be, abahanuzi." 
Amos3:8 Intare itontomye, ni nde utatinya? Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze, ni nde utahanura?" 
Amos3:9 Nimubyamamaze mu ngoro zo muri Ashuru, no mu ngoro zo mu gihugu cya Misiri, muvuge muti «Nimuteranire ku misozi ya Samariya, mwitegereze imvururu zihari n’ubutsikamirwe buhiganje." 
Amos3:10 Ntibazi gukora ibitunganye, bashimishwa n’urugomo no gusahura.» Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos3:11 Ni yo mpamvu, Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Umwanzi azagota igihugu, ayogoze imbaraga zawe, n’ingoro zawe azisahure." 
Amos3:12 Uhoraho avuze atya: Nk’uko umushumba ashikanuza amaguru abiri cyangwa igice cy’ugutwi mu rwasaya rw’intare, ni ko Abayisraheli bazarokorwa, bo batengamaye i Samariya mu ntebe nziza no mu mariri anepa." 
Amos3:13 Nimwumve kandi mushinje inzu ya Yakobo: — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo —" 
Amos3:14 umunsi nzaziza Israheli ibicumuro byayo, nzasenya urutambiro rw’i Beteli, inguni zarwo zizasenywa maze zigwe hasi." 
Amos3:15 Nzasenya inzu zoroheje n’izikomeye; inzu ziharaze amahembe y’inzovu nzitsembe, n’ibizu bya rutura bizariduke. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos4:1 Nimwumve iri jambo, mwa nka mwe z’i Bashani, murisha ku musozi wa Samariya, mugatsikamira abakene, mukaryamira abatindi, mukabwira abagabo banyu muti «Nimuzane icyo kunywa»." 
Amos4:2 Nyagasani Uhoraho abirahije ubutagatifu bwe, ati «Dore iminsi iregereje aho bazabakuruza inkonzo, n’abaja banyu bakabakwegesha uruhabuzo;" 
Amos4:3 muzasohokera mu byuho, buri mugore ace ukwe, maze mujugunywe ahagana i Herimoni.» Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos4:4 Nimujye i Beteli maze mucumure! Mujye i Giligali mwungikanye ibicumuro! Muhere mu gitondo mutura ibitambo, ku munsi wa gatatu mujyane amaturo yanyu." 
Amos4:5 Nimutwikishe umusemburo ho igitambo cy’ishimwe, mwamamaze amaturo yanyu mwishakiye, muyarate kuko ari byo mukunda, bana ba Israheli! Uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos4:6 Ni jye watumye mu migi yanyu yose nta cyo kurya kihaboneka, inzara igatera aho muri hose, nyamara ariko ntimwangarukira! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos4:7 Ni jye wari warabimye imvura hasigaye amezi atatu ngo musarure, nkagusha imvura mu mugi uyu n’uyu, nkayima uriya, umurima umwe wagwagamo imvura, utayibonye ukuma;" 
Amos4:8 abantu bo mu migi ibiri cyangwa itatu bajyaga kunywa amazi mu mugi uyafite, inyota yabo ntishire, ariko ntimwangarukira! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos4:9 Nateje nkongwa n’inanda mu myaka yanyu; ubukungu bw’ubusitani bwanyu, imizabibu yanyu, imitini yanyu n’ibiti byanyu bivamo amavuta byonwa n’inzige, ariko ntimwangarukira! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos4:10 Nabateje icyorezo nka kimwe cyo mu Misiri, nicisha inkota abasore banyu, njyana amafarasi yanyu ho iminyago, ntuma umunuko w’intumbi zo mu ngando zanyu ubazamukira mu mazuru, ariko ntimwangarukira! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos4:11 Nabazambije nk’uko nazambije Sodoma na Gomora, maze mumera nk’igiti cyafashwe cyaruwe mu nkongi y’umuriro, ariko ntimwangarukira! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos4:12 Ni yo mpamvu rero nzakugenzereza ntyo, Israheli, Ubwo nzakugenzereza ntyo rero, Israheli, itegure kubonana n’Imana yawe!" 
Amos4:13 Nguwo Uwabumbabumbye imisozi, akarema umuyaga, agahishurira umuntu imigambi ye, we ugenga umwijima n’umucyo, agatambagira ibitwa byo ku isi. Izina rye ni Uhoraho, Imana umugaba w’ingabo." 
Amos5:1 Nimwumve iri jambo, iyi ndirimbo y’amaganya ibumvishe, nzu ya Israheli!" 
Amos5:2 Ngaha araguye umwari wa Siyoni, ntazongera kweguka ukundi, arambaraye hasi adafite umwegura." 
Amos5:3 Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya: Umugi wajyaga ujyana abantu igihumbi ku rugamba uzasigarana ijana gusa; naho umugi wajyaga ujyana ijana, uzasigarana icumi gusa." 
Amos5:4 Uhoraho abwiye inzu ya Israheli atya: Nimunshakashake, muzaronka ubugingo," 
Amos5:5 ariko ntimunshakashakire i Beteli, ntimwinjire i Giligali, ntimuce i Berisheba, kuko Giligali yose izatwarwa ho umunyago, Beteli igahinduka inzu y’impfabusa." 
Amos5:6 Nimushakashake Uhoraho, muzaronka ubugingo. Naho ubundi, azagwa gitumo inzu ya Yozefu nk’inkongi y’umuriro, ayihindure umuyonga, kandi i Beteli nta muntu wo kuyizimya uzahaboneka." 
Amos5:7 Bariyimbire abahumanyije ubutabera, birengagiza gukiranura abandi." 
Amos5:8 Uwaremye urujeje rw’inyenyeri z’ibihangange n’izitwa Oriyoni, we uhindura umwijima mo igitondo gitangaje, agahindura umunsi mo ijoro ryijimye, agahamagara amazi yo mu nyanja ngo ayasandaze ku isi; izina rye ni Uhoraho!" 
Amos5:9 Ni we utuma abanyamaboko bamburwa, agatuma n’umugi usahurwa." 
Amos5:10 Banga uwibutsa ubutabera mu rukiko, uvuga ukuri bakamwanga urunuka." 
Amos5:11 Ubwo rero muryamira umutindi mukamutwara umugabane we w’ingano, ayo mazu mwubakishije amabuye abaje, ntimuzayabamo; iyo mizabibu myiza mwateye ntimuzanywa divayi yayo." 
Amos5:12 Kuko nzi umubare utabarika w’ibicumuro byanyu, n’ububi bw’ibyaha byanyu, mwe murenganya intungane, mukakira indishyi z’amahugu, mugatera ijanja abakene babatakambiye mu rukiko." 
Amos5:13 Ni yo mpamvu umuntu uzi ubwenge yakwicecekera mu gihe nk’iki, kuko ari igihe cy’amakuba." 
Amos5:14 Nimushake ikiri icyiza, ikibi mukireke, kugira ngo mushobore kubaho, maze Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, azabane namwe, uko mubivuga." 
Amos5:15 Nimwange ikibi, mukunde icyiza, nimusubize ubucamanza umwanya wabwo mu rukiko, wenda ahari Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yazababarira agasigisigi ko mu muryango wa Yozefu." 
Amos5:16 Uhoraho, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo, Nyagasani avuze atya: Ku karubanda hose bazarira, mu mayira yose bavuge bati «Mbega ishyano! Mbega ishyano!» Bazatumira umuhinzi ngo yirabure, n’abamenyereye imiborogo ngo barire." 
Amos5:17 Mu mizabibu yose hazaba icyunamo igihe nzanyura muri mwe rwagati. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. 
Amos5:18 Bariyimbire abarambirije ku munsi Uhoraho azaziraho! Bimaze iki? Umunsi w’Uhoraho uzaba umeze ute ku bwanyu? Uzaba ari umunsi w’umwijima, si uw’urumuri." 
Amos5:19 Ni nk’umuntu uhunze intare, hanyuma agahura n’indi nyamaswa y’inkazi, yagera iwe akishingikiriza ku rukuta, nuko inzoka ikamurya!" 
Amos5:20 Si byo se, umunsi w’Uhoraho ntuzaba ari umwijima aho kuba umucyo, umwijima w’icuraburindi uzira icyezezi?" 
Amos5:21 Nanga urunuka kandi nkagaya ingendo mukora muje kundamya, sinshobora gushimishwa n’amakoraniro yanyu," 
Amos5:22 igihe muntura ibitambo bitwikwa, no mu maturo yanyu nta na rimwe rinshimisha; sinduha ndeba n’ibitambo byanyu by’ibimasa." 
Amos5:23 Igiza kure urusaku rw’indirimbo zawe, n’umurya w’inanga zanyu sinshobora kuwumva." 
Amos5:24 Ahubwo uburenganzira nibudendeze nk’amazi, n’ubutabera butembe nk’umugezi udakama!" 
Amos5:25 Hari ubwo se mwigeze kuntura ibitambo n’amaturo mu butayu, muri ya myaka mirongo ine, muryango wa Israheli?" 
Amos5:26 Ahubwo muzaheka Sakuti umwami wanyu, n’inyenyeri ya Kewani, ikigirwamana cyanyu, ayo mashusho mwikoreye ubwanyu." 
Amos5:27 Nzabajyana bunyago mbarenze Damasi! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, izina rye ni Imana Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Amos6:1 Bariyimbire abatengamaye bo muri Siyoni, n’abashingiye amahoro yabo ku musozi wa Samariya, bo nyarurembo z’igihugu cy’ikirenga mu bindi byose, bo inzu ya Israheli igisha inama." 
Amos6:2 Nimugere i Kaline maze mwitegereze, nimuhava mujye i Hamati umugi mukuru, hanyuma mumanuke i Gati mu Bafilisiti: iyo migi hari ubwo yaba irusha umutekano ibi bihugu byacu? Hari ubwo se igihugu cyabo kiruta icyanyu ubunini?" 
Amos6:3 Mushaka guhigika umunsi w’amagorwa, hanyuma mukigiza bugufi igihe cy’imidugararo." 
Amos6:4 Ngabo baryamye ku mariri akoze mu mahembe y’inzovu, bagaramye mu ntebe zabo, bakarya abana b’intama n’inyana z’imitavu," 
Amos6:5 baregura inanga bagapfa gucuranga, bakaririmba nka Dawudi indirimbo bihimbiye," 
Amos6:6 bakanywera divayi mu bikombe, bakisiga amavuta y’agaciro, ariko ntibahangayikwe n’uko umuryango wa Yozefu ugiye kurimbuka." 
Amos6:7 Ni cyo gituma guhera ubu bagiye kujyanwa bunyago, bakagenda ku isonga y’abandi bose, maze bikarangirira aho ibyishimo by’abo bantu b’abapfayongo!" 
Amos6:8 Nyagasani Uhoraho arabirahiye, Uhoraho, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo avuze atya: Nanga urunuka ubwirasi bw’umuryango wa Yakobo, nkanga n’ingoro zayo, umugi wose uko wakabaye nzawutererana." 
Amos6:9 Haramutse hagize nk’abantu icumi bacika ku icumu mu nzu imwe, na bo bazapfa." 
Amos6:10 Hazasigara abantu mbarwa bo guhamba bene wabo. Nihagira uwiyambaza usigaye mu nzu ati «Nta muntu musigaranye aho mu nzu?» undi amusubize ati «Nta we usigaye». Nta muntu uzasigara, habe n’umwe wo kwambaza izina ry’Uhoraho!" 
Amos6:11 Ni koko, Uhoraho ni we utegeka, akoma imbarutso, inzu nini igahirima, intoya ikiyasa." 
Amos6:12 Hari ubwo se amafarasi yiruka mu mabuye ashinyitse? Hari ubwo se bahingisha inyanja ibimasa, kugira ngo mubonereho guhumanya ubutabera, maze ubucamanza mukabuhindura umwanda?" 
Amos6:13 Murishimira ko mwigaruriye umugi wa Lodebari, ariko ni ay’ubusa; nuko mukavuga muti «Si ku ngufu zacu se twigaruriye Karinayimu?»" 
Amos6:14 Ngaha rero, nzu ya Israheli, ngiye kubateza igihugu kizabakandamiza guhera i Lebohamati kugera mu karere ka Araba. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, Imana Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Amos7:1 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: yoherezaga inzige igihe ubwatsi bwabaga butangiye kumera — ndashaka kuvuga ubwatsi butoha nyuma y’umuganura wagenewe umwami — 
Amos7:2 mbonye izo nzige zimaze gutsemba ibyatsi byose byo mu gihugu, ndavuga nti «Uhoraho, Mana yanjye, gira impuhwe, ndakwinginze: umuryango wa Yakobo se wabaho ute? Ni muto cyane!»" 
Amos7:3 Uhoraho yisubiraho, arasubiza ati «Ntibizabaho.»" 
Amos7:4 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: Nyagasani Uhoraho yitabaje umuriro ngo ace urubanza, nuko umuriro wuzura inyenga nini, ukongora n’intara ya Israheli." 
Amos7:5 Ni ko kuvuga nti «Uhoraho Mana yanjye, sigaho ndakwinginze, umuryango wa Yakobo se wabaho ute? Ni muto cyane!»" 
Amos7:6 Nya gasani Uhoraho yisubiraho, arasubiza ati «Ibyo na byo ntibizabaho.»" 
Amos7:7 Dore ibyo Nyagasani yanyeretse: yari ahagaze iruhande rw’urukuta, afite rujora mu ntoki." 
Amos7:8 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati «Amosi we, urabona iki?» Maze ndamusubiza nti «Ni rujora mbona.» Nuko Nyagasani arambwira ati «Dore rero, ngiye gushinga rujora rwagati mu muryango wanjye Israheli, mbaringanize, kandi kuva ubu sinzongera kuyibabarira." 
Amos7:9 Amasengero y’ahirengeye ya Izaki azahinduka amatongo, n’ingoro za Israheli zizarimbagurike, maze mfate inkota, inzu ya Yerobowamu nyihagurukire.»" 
Amos7:10 Amasiya, umuherezabitambo w’i Beteli, atuma kuri Yerobowamu, umwami wa Israheli, ati «Amosi ariho arakugambanira rwagati mu nzu ya Israheli; igihugu ntikigishoboye kwihanganira ibyo avuga." 
Amos7:11 Kuko avuga ngo: Yerobowamu azazira inkota, n’Abayisraheli bajyanwe bunyago kure y’igihugu cyabo.»" 
Amos7:12 Amasiya ni ko kubwira Amosi ati «Ngaho genda, wa mubonekerwa we; cika ujye mu gihugu cya Yuda; ho uzashobora kwirwanaho no guhanura!" 
Amos7:13 Naho hano i Beteli ntuzongere kuhahanurira kuko ari ingoro y’umwami, urusengero rwa cyami!»" 
Amos7:14 Amosi asubiza Amasiya, ati «Sinari umuhanuzi, sinari n’umwe mu itorero ry’abahanuzi; nari umworozi, ngakonora n’ibiti byera imbuto." 
Amos7:15 Nyamara Uhoraho yankuye inyuma y’amatungo, nuko arambwira ati ’Genda uhanurire umuryango wanjye Israheli!’" 
Amos7:16 Ubu ngubu umva ijambo ry’Uhoraho, wowe uvuga ngo ’Ntuzahanurire Israheli, ntuzongere guhindanya inzu ya Izaki!’" 
Amos7:17 Uhoraho rero avuze atya: ’Umugore wawe azigira ihabara mu mugi, abahungu bawe n’abakobwa bawe bazazira inkota, isambu yawe izagabanishwa umugozi, naho wowe uzapfira mu gihugu cy’amahanga, na Israheli yose ijyanwe bunyago kure y’igihugu cyayo.’»" 
Amos8:1 Dore ibyo Nyagasani Uhoraho yanyeretse: yanyeretse igitebo cyuzuye imbuto zeze impeshyi igiye kurangira. 
Amos8:2 Nuko arambwira ati «Amosi, urabona iki?» Ndamusubiza nti «Ndabona igitebo kirimo imbuto zeze impeshyi igiye kurangira.» Uhoraho arambwira ati «Israheli, umuryango wanjye, ugeze ku ndunduro yawo, sinzongera kugaruka ari wo unzanye." 
Amos8:3 Uwo munsi mu ngoro bazaririmba indirimbo z’amaganya, uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze, intumbi zizaba nyinshi, aho bazazijugunya, bose bazumirwa.»" 
Amos8:4 Nimwumve ibi ngibi, mwebwe murenganya abakene, mugira ngo mutsembe ab’intamenyekana bo mu gihugu," 
Amos8:5 muvuga ngo «Mbese imboneka z’ukwezi zizarangira ryari, kugira ngo dushobore kugurisha ingano, na sabato izashira ryari, ngo dushobore gufungura imifuka y’ingano twahunitse, tugabanye igipimo twunguriramo n’igiciro, tubeshyeshye iminzani y’ubuhendanyi," 
Amos8:6 abatindi tubagure amafeza, n’abakene ku giciro cy’amasandari abiri? Yemwe tuzagurisha ingano zacu, tugeze no ku nkumbi!»" 
Amos8:7 Uhoraho abirahije ikuzo rya Yakobo, ati «Sinzibagirwa na kimwe mu bikorwa byabo.»" 
Amos8:8 Ibyo se ntibigiye gutuma isi ihinda umushyitsi, n’abaturage bayo bose bakirabura? Izuzura rwose nk’Uruzi, isese hanyuma yike nka rwa ruzi rwo mu Misiri." 
Amos8:9 Kuri uwo munsi — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze— nzategeka izuba kurenga ku manywa y’ihangu, kandi ntume ku isi hacura umwijima izuba riva." 
Amos8:10 Ingendo zanyu zigamije kunsenga nzazihinduramo iminsi y’ibyago, indirimbo zanyu zose nzihindure iz’amaganya. Abantu bose nzabakenyeza amagunira, imitwe yabo iharangurwe. Nzabatera akababaro k’urupfu, nk’ak’upfushije umwana we w’umuhungu w’ikinege, n’ibizakurikiraho bizasa n’iby’umunsi w’amaganya." 
Amos8:11 Ngiyi iminsi iraje — uwo ni Nyagasani Uhoraho ubivuze— ari yo nzateza ho inzara mu gihugu. Ntizaba inzara yo gusonzera umugati, cyangwa inyota y’amazi, ahubwo izaba inzara yo gusonzera kumva Ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Amos8:12 Abantu bazajarajara, bave ku nyanja bajye ku yindi, bazerere kuva mu majyaruguru kugera mu burasirazuba, bashakashaka Ijambo ry’Uhoraho, ariko ntibazaribona." 
Amos8:13 Uwo munsi, abakobwa b’amasugi beza n’abasore bazicwa n’inyota," 
Amos8:14 abarahiza icyaha cya Samariya bavuga bati «Harakabaho Imana yawe, Dani! Harakabaho Ububasha buri i Berisheba!» bazagwa kandi ntibazongera kubyuka." 
Amos9:1 Nuko mbona Nyagasani ahagaze ku rutambiro, avuga ati «Kubita inkingi yo ku muryango, inkomanizo zizanyeganyega; byose bisenyukire ku bari imbere bose, naho abasigaye nzabicisha inkota; nta n’umwe uzashobora guhunga, nta n’umwe uzacika ku icumu." 
Amos9:2 Nibanarwanira kujya iku zimu, ikiganza cyanjye kizabavanamo; nibanazamuka mu ijuru, nzabakonkoborayo." 
Amos9:3 Nibihisha mu bitwa bya Karumeli, nzabashakashaka mbahanantureyo; nibanyihisha hasi mu nyanja, nzabategeza Ikiyoka kibarye." 
Amos9:4 Nibitegeza abanzi babo ngo babagire imbohe, nzabategeza inkota ibicire aho. Nzabagenzaho ijisho, atari icyiza mbashakira ahubwo ari ikibi.»" 
Amos9:5 Nyagasani Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, agera ku isi ikanyeganyega, n’abayituye bagacura imiborogo; uko yakabaye iratutumba nk’uruzi, ikika nka rwa ruzi rwo mu Misiri." 
Amos9:6 Ni we wubaka ingazi mu ijuru, akubaka igisenge cye hejuru y’isi. Ni we ukorakoranya amazi yo mu nyanja, akayasuka ku isi. Uhoraho ni ryo zina rye." 
Amos9:7 Ku bwanjye, mumeze nk’Abanyakushi, bana ba Israheli, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Si jyewe se wazamuye Israheli nkayivana mu gihugu cya Misiri, Abafilisiti nkabavana muri Kafutori, n’abo muri Aramu nkabavana i Kiri?»" 
Amos9:8 Dore Nyagasani Uhoraho yerekeje amaso ku gihugu cy’abanyabyaha avuga ati «Ngiye kubavana ku isi mbatsembe, ariko nta bwo nzarimbura buheriheri inzu ya Yakobo. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Amos9:9 Ni koko, ngiye gutanga amategeko: mu mahanga yose ngiye kujegeza inzu ya Israheli, nk’uko bazunguza urutaro bagosora, ntihagire imbuto nzima n’imwe igwa hasi." 
Amos9:10 Abanyabyaha bo mu muryango wanjye bose bazicishwa inkota, bo bavuga bati «Ntuzatwegereze ikibi, ntuzatume kidushyikira.»" 
Amos9:11 Muri iyo minsi, nzegura inzu ya Dawudi yari igiye kugwa, nzasane ibyuho byayo, nzegure ahari harasenyutse; nzayihagarika nyisubize uko yahoze kera," 
Amos9:12 ku buryo bazategeka udusigisigi twa Edomu n’utw’amahanga yose yamenye izina ryanjye. Ibyo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, ari na we uzabikora." 
Amos9:13 Ngiyi iminsi iraje — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — maze umuhinzi n’umusaruzi bakurikirane, umwenzi w’imizabibu azakurikirane n’uyibiba, divayi iryoshye izakwira ku misozi, buri murenge uyiyame." 
Amos9:14 Nzagarura umuryango wanjye Israheli, bazubake imigi yari yarashenywe maze bayituremo, bazahinge imizabibu bayinywemo divayi, bahinge imirima maze barye ibyezemo," 
Amos9:15 nzabagarura iwabo bakomere, ntibazongera kuvanwa ukundi mu gihugu cyabo nabahaye. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Imana yawe, ubivuze." 
Obadiah1:1 Ibonekerwa rya Obadiya. Nyagasani Uhoraho avuze atya kuri Edomu: Twumvise ubutumwa buturutse kuri Uhoraho, kandi n’intumwa yoherejwe mu mahanga kuyabwira iti «Nimuhaguruke dutere uwo muryango! Twese tujye ku rugamba!»" 
Obadiah1:2 Dore ngiye kugucisha bugufi rwagati mu mahanga, ngusuzuguze ndetse ibi bikabije!" 
Obadiah1:3 Ubwibone bwawe bwarakuyobeje, wowe wibera mu buvumo, ukanatura ahirengeye, wowe wibwira mu mutima wawe, uti «Ku isi ni nde wampangara?»" 
Obadiah1:4 N’aho waba watumbagiye mu kirere nka kagoma, ugashyira icyari cyawe rwagati mu nyenyeri, naguhananturayo! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Obadiah1:5 Mbese abajura n’abasahuzi ba nijoro baje iwawe, wagumana amahoro? Ntibatwara se ibyo babashije byose? Ibisambo se nibigusarurira imizabibu, aho bizagusigira n’utwo uzahumba?" 
Obadiah1:6 Bene Ezawu mwe, mbega ukuntu mwasatswe! Mbega ukuntu bavumbuye ubukire bwanyu buhishe!" 
Obadiah1:7 Abanywanyi bawe baragushutse, bakumenesha mu gihugu cyawe! Incuti zawe ziraguhagurukiye! Abo mwasangiye umugati baguteze umutego, baravuga bati «Nta bwenge akigira!»" 
Obadiah1:8 Koko, kuri uwo munsi nyine — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — nzatsemba abanyabuhanga bo muri Edomu, n’umusozi wa Ezawu sinzawusigira umunyabwenge n’umwe!" 
Obadiah1:9 Temani nawe, intwari zawe zizashya ubwoba, ku buryo muri icyo cyorezo, icyitwa umuntu cyose kizatsembwa ku musozi wa Ezawu." 
Obadiah1:10 Urugomo n’ubwicanyi wagiriye umuvandimwe wawe Yakobo, ni byo bitumye uzakorwa n’ikimwaro, ukarimbuka ubuziraherezo!" 
Obadiah1:11 Umunsi wari wiheje uhagaze ahitaruye, ubwo abanyamahanga bamusahuraga ibye ku ngufu, abanzi bakinjira mu marembo ye, bagafindira kuri Yeruzalemu, nawe wari umeze nk’umwe muri bo!" 
Obadiah1:12 Ntukanezezwe no kubona umuvandimwe wawe, umunsi yagwiririwe n’amakuba! Ntukishimire kuri bene Yuda, ku munsi w’irimbuka ryabo, kandi ntukabavuge nabi ku munsi w’akababaro!" 
Obadiah1:13 Ntukinjire mu marembo y’umugi w’umuryango wanjye, ku munsi w’amagorwa yawo! Ntukanezezwe nawe n’amakuba awugwiririye, ku munsi w’amagorwa yawo! Ntukawusahure ibyiza utunze, ku munsi w’amagorwa yawo!" 
Obadiah1:14 Ntugahagarare mu mayirabiri ngo ubone uko utsemba abawo bahunga! Ntugatange abawo bacitse ku icumu ku munsi w’akababaro! 
Obadiah1:15 Ni koko, umunsi w’Uhoraho uregereje, umunsi wo kurimbura amahanga yose! Uko wagenjeje nawe ni ko uzagenzerezwa, ibikorwa byawe birakugaruke!" 
Obadiah1:16 Koko rero, nk’uko mwanywereye ku musozi wanjye mutagatifu, ni ko n’amahanga yose azanywa ubudatuza; bazanywa bageze n’aho basinda, bamere nk’abatigeze kubaho!" 
Obadiah1:17 Nyamara abacitse ku icumu bazakoranira ku musozi wa Siyoni, wongere ube mutagatifu; na bene Yakobo basubirane ibyabo byanyazwe!" 
Obadiah1:18 Nuko bene Yakobo bazahinduke nk’umuriro, bene Yozefu babe nk’ikirimi cy’umuriro, naho bene Ezawu bazahinduke umurama! Iyo miriro yombi izabatwika maze bakongoke, ku buryo nta n’umwe uzacika ku icumu wo kwa Ezawu. Ng’uko uko Uhoraho avuze!" 
Obadiah1:19 Ab’i Negevu bazigarurira umusozi wa Ezawu; abo mu karere k’imirambi bigarurire igihugu cy’Abafilisiti, begurirwe n’intara ya Efurayimu n’iya Samariya; naho abo kwa Benyamini bigarurire igihugu cya Gilihadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Abajyanywe bunyago mu Bayisraheli bazaba baremye icyo gitero: bazanyaga igihugu cy’Abakanahani kugera i Sareputa, naho abajyanywe bunyago b’i Yeruzalemu bazature i Sefaradi, bigarurire n’imigi yo muri Negevu." 
Obadiah1:21 Abazaba batsinze bazazamuka umusozi wa Siyoni, kugira ngo bacire urubanza umusozi wa Ezawu. Bityo Uhoraho azabe yimye ingoma!" 
Jonah1:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa Yonasi, mwene Amitayi, riti" 
Jonah1:2 «Haguruka ujye i Ninivi, umugi mugari, maze uyimenyeshe ko ubukozi bw’ibibi bwabo bwangezeho!»" 
Jonah1:3 Yonasi ashyira nzira, ariko agenda ahungira i Tarishishi kure y’Uhoraho. Amanuka ajya i Yope ahasanga ubwato bwerekeje i Tarishishi, yishyura urugendo, arabwurira ngo ajyane na bo i Tarishishi kure y’Uhoraho." 
Jonah1:4 Nuko Uhoraho ateza inkubi y’umuyaga mu nyanja maze inyanja igira umuhengeri ukabije, ku buryo ubwato bwari bugiye gusandara." 
Jonah1:5 Abasare bashya ubwoba, buri wese atakambira imana ye. Ni bwo bajugunye imitwaro yose mu nyanja ngo borohereze ubwato. Ubwo Yonasi we yari yibereye mu bwato hasi, aryamye, yisinziriye." 
Jonah1:6 Umukuru w’abasare aramwegera, maze aramubwira ati «Ni kuki wisinziriye? Baduka utakire Imana yawe, ahari yo iratwibuka maze twoye kurimbuka.»" 
Jonah1:7 Nuko barabwirana bati «Nimuze dukoreshe ubufindo, maze tumenye uwadukururiye iki cyago.» Bakora ubufindo, maze bufata Yonasi." 
Jonah1:8 Baramubwira bati «Ngaho tubwire ikikugenza! Uraturuka he? Iwanyu ni he? Mbese mu bwoko uri umuki?» 
Jonah1:9 Arabasubiza ati «Ndi Umuhebureyi, nkaba nemera Uhoraho, Imana y’ijuru, yo yaremye inyanja n’ubutaka.»" 
Jonah1:10 Ba bantu bagira ubwoba bwinshi, maze baramubaza bati «Wacumuye iki rero?» Bari bazi ko ahunze Uhoraho kuko ubwe yari yabibatekerereje." 
Jonah1:11 Baramubwira bati «Tukugenze dute kugira ngo inyanja itworohere?» Kuko inyanja yagendaga irushaho kwicunda. 
Jonah1:12 Arabasubiza ati «Nimunterure munjugunye mu nyanja, irahita iborohera kuko, ndabizi, ni jye watumye umuhengeri ukaze ubabuza uburyo.»" 
Jonah1:13 Ba bantu baragashya bagira ngo bashyikire inkombe, biba iby’ubusa: inyanja yarushagaho kwicunda ibarwanya." 
Jonah1:14 Ni ko kwambaza Uhoraho, bavuga bati «Uhoraho, tubabarire, twoye gushira tuzira kurwana ku buzima bw’uyu muntu, utagize icyo adutwara, kandi amaraso ye ntadusame, kuko ari wowe, Uhoraho, wabyishakiye.»" 
Jonah1:15 Nuko bajuguta Yonasi bamujugunya mu nyanja, na yo ihita icubya ubukana." 
Jonah1:16 Ba bantu bagirira Uhoraho igitinyiro cyinshi. Bamutura igitambo kandi bamugirira amasezerano. 
Jonah2:1 Uhoraho ategeka ifi nini kumira Yonasi. Yonasi amara mu nda y’ifi iminsi itatu n’amajoro atatu. 
Jonah2:2 Aho yari aho mu nda y’ifi, asenga Uhoraho Imana ye, ati" 
Jonah2:3 «Ubwo nari mu kaga natakiye Uhoraho maze aransubiza. Ubwo nari ikuzimu narahamagaye, wumva ijwi ryanjye." 
Jonah2:4 Wari waranjugunye mu ndiba y’inyanja, rwagati muri zo, maze ngotwa n’umwuzure. Imivumba yawe yose n’ingashya byawe binyirohaho." 
Jonah2:5 Nanjye nkavuga nti ’Nciwe mu maso yawe; nzongera kureba nte Ingoro yawe ntagatifu?’ 
Jonah2:6 Amazi yaramize ngerwa mu mihogo, imihengeri irangota, icyatsi cyo mu nyanja kinyizinguriza ku mutwe." 
Jonah2:7 Nagarukiye aho imisozi itewe inkingi, bampeza inyuma y’ishyanga ubuziraherezo. Nyamara ni wowe wazahuye mu rwobo ubuzima bwanjye, Uhoraho Mana yanjye." 
Jonah2:8 Igihe nari nihebye, nta mutima nkigira, ni bwo nibutse Uhoraho, maze isengesho ryanjye rikugeraho mu Ngoro yawe ntagatifu." 
Jonah2:9 Abibeshya bakiringira ibitagira shinge, nibizeyukire." 
Jonah2:10 Jyewe nzagutura igitambo, nkuririmbire ngushimira, nzarangiza n’icyo nasezeranye. Uhoraho ni we mukiza!»" 
Jonah2:11 Uhoraho ategeka ifi, iruka Yonasi ku nkombe." 
Jonah3:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa Yonasi ubwa kabiri, riti" 
Jonah3:2 «Haguruka ujye i Ninivi, umugi mugari, maze ubamenyeshe icyo nzakubwira.»" 
Jonah3:3 Yonasi arahaguruka maze ajya i Ninivi akurikije ijambo ry’Uhoraho. Ninivi rero ikaba umugi mugari bihebuje, kuwugenda byari iminsi itatu." 
Jonah3:4 Yonasi yinjira mu mugi, akora urugendo rw’umunsi umwe. Yigisha agira ati «Hasigaye iminsi mirongo ine, maze Ninivi ikarimbuka.»" 
Jonah3:5 Abantu b’i Ninivi bemera Imana, batangaza igisibo, bambara ibigunira, kuva ku mukuru kugeza ku muto." 
Jonah3:6 Rya jambo riza kugera ku mwami wa Ninivi, na we ahaguruka ku ntebe ye y’ubwami, yambura igishura, yambara ikigunira, yicara mu ivu." 
Jonah3:7 Nuko batangaza muri Ninivi iteka ry’umwami n’abakuru bo mu gihugu, rivuga riti «Abantu n’inyamaswa n’amatungo, ari amaremare n’amagufi, ntibigire icyo birya, ntibirishe kandi ntibinywe n’amazi." 
Jonah3:8 Nibyambare ibigunira, baba abantu, zaba inyamaswa, nibitakambire Imana n’imbaraga zose, maze buri wese areke imigirire ye mibi, n’urugomo rwitwaza amaboko." 
Jonah3:9 Ni nde wamenya niba Imana itahindura imigambi, umujinya ugashira mu mutima, maze ntitube tugipfuye?»" 
Jonah3:10 Imana ibonye ibyo bakoraga, n’uko bahinduye bakareka imigenzereze yabo mibi, na yo ihindura imigambi, icyago yari yabateguje ntiyakibateza." 
Jonah4:1 Yonasi biramubabaza cyane, maze ararakara." 
Jonah4:2 Yambaza Uhoraho, avuga ati «Si ibi nari navuze igihe nari nkiri mu gihugu cyanjye? Ni cyo cyatumye mbanza guhungira i Tarishishi. Nari nzi nyine ko uri Imana y’impuhwe n’ibambe, utinda kurakara kandi ukungahaye ubudahemuka, ntukomeza umugambi wo kugira nabi." 
Jonah4:3 None rero, Uhoraho, nkiza ubuzima bwanjye, kuko gupfa bindutiye kubaho.»" 
Jonah4:4 Uhoraho arasubiza ati «Ubwo koko hari impamvu ufite yo kurakara?» 
Jonah4:5 Yonasi ava mu mugi yicara iburasirazuba bwawo, ahiyubakira akazu, maze akugamamo izuba, ategereje ikizaba kuri uwo mugi." 
Jonah4:6 Hanyuma Uhoraho Imana ategeka ko hamera ikibonobono, maze kikazamuka hejuru ya Yonasi kugira ngo kimutwikire bityo kimugabanyirize akababaro. Yonasi yishimira bikomeye icyo giti." 
Jonah4:7 Ariko bukeye bwaho, umuseke ukebye, Imana itegeka ko haza inanda ikarya cya giti maze kikuma." 
Jonah4:8 Nuko izuba rirashe, Imana iteza umuyaga utwika w’iburasirazuba, izuba ricanira umutwe wa Yonasi maze araraba. Asaba gupfa, aravuga ati «Kuri jye biraruta ko napfa aho kubaho.»" 
Jonah4:9 Uhoraho abwira Yonasi ati «Ubwo koko hari impamvu ufite yo kurakazwa n’iki giti?» Arasubiza ati «Yego, birakwiye ko ndakara byo gupfa.»" 
Jonah4:10 Uhoraho arongera ati «Wowe ubabajwe n’iki giti utigeze uruhira cyangwa ngo ugihe gukura, kikaba cyarakuze mu ijoro rimwe, kikuma mu rindi." 
Jonah4:11 Naho jyewe, mbese sinkwiriye kubabazwa na Ninivi, umugi mugari, utuwe n’abantu ibihumbi ijana na makumyabiri batazi gutandukanya indyo n’imoso, hamwe n’amatungo atabarika?»" 
Micah1:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Mika w’i Moresheti, mu gihe cya Yotamu, Akhazi na Hezekiya, abami ba Yuda. Dore ibyo yeretswe byerekeye Samariya na Yeruzalemu." 
Micah1:2 Mahanga yose, nimwumve! Isi nawe, tega amatwi kimwe n’ibikurimo byose! Uhoraho Imana aje kubashinja, Nyagasani asohotse mu Ngoro ye ntagatifu." 
Micah1:3 Koko, nguyu Uhoraho asohotse iwe, aramanutse, akandagira ahirengeye ho ku isi." 
Micah1:4 Aho anyuze, imisozi irashonga, ibibaya bikika, mbese nk’ibishashara bishongeshwa n’umuriro, cyangwa nk’amazi amanuka ahantu hacuramye." 
Micah1:5 Ibyo byose biraterwa n’ubugome bwa Yakobo, kimwe n’icyaha cy’inzu ya Israheli. Ubwo bugome bwa Yakobo ni ubuhe? Si Samariya se? Icyo cyaha cya Yuda ni ikihe? Si Yeruzalemu se?" 
Micah1:6 Samariya rero ngiye kuyihindura amatongo yo mu cyaro, nyigire nk’umurima uhingwamo imizabibu. Amabuye yayo nzayahirika mu kabande, ndimbure imfatiro zayo zijye imusozi." 
Micah1:7 Amashusho yayo yose azajanjagurwa, amaturo bayahaga yose ajugunywe mu muriro; ibigirwamana byayo byose nzabimenagura, kuko byagwijwe n’inyungu ziturutse ku buhabara, nuko bizasubire aho byavuye." 
Micah1:8 Ngicyo ikinteye kuganya, nkaboroga; ngiye kwiyambura inkweto, nambare ubusa, moke nk’imbwebwe, mboroge nka za mbuni," 
Micah1:9 koko icyago simusiga giteye Samariya! Dore ngicyo kigeze muri Yuda, cyasatiriye amarembo y’umuryango wanjye, kugera i Yeruzalemu!" 
Micah1:10 Abantu b’i Gati mwibagaragariza ayo makuba, mwibereka n’amarira yanyu! I Beti‐Leyafura, nimuganye, mwigaragura mu mukungugu!" 
Micah1:11 Ngaho hunga, nawe muturage w’i Shafiri, ugende ufite isoni kandi wambaye ubusa! Ab’i Sanani ntibagitinyutse gusohoka ukundi! Amaganya ni yose i Betiheseli, nta cyo igishoboye!" 
Micah1:12 Umuturage w’i Maroti yafashwe n’umushyitsi udashira, kuko icyago giturutse kuri Uhoraho cyasatiriye amarembo ya Yeruzalemu." 
Micah1:13 Zirika amafarasi ku igare ry’intambara, we muturage w’i Lakishi, (wowe, nkomoko y’igicumuro cy’umwari w’i Siyoni, kuko iwawe ari ho habonetse ubugome bwa Israheli.)" 
Micah1:14 Ni yo mpamvu uzaca umubano ufitanye na Moresheti‐Gati, naho Betakizibu ikazabera umutego abami ba Israheli." 
Micah1:15 Nzaguteza bundi bushya abakunyaga, wowe muturage w’i Maresha; ikuzo rya Israheli rizigire i Adulamu." 
Micah1:16 Iharanguze, wimareho umusatsi, (mwari w’i Yeruzalemu); umutwe wawe uhinduke umwunu nk’uwa mbuni, kubera abana bawe wakundaga, none bakaba bajyanywe bunyago kure yawe!" 
Micah2:1 Bariyimbire abagambirira kugira nabi, igihe baryamye bagahimbahimba igikorwa kibi, bwacya bagahita bagikora, kuko bagifitiye ububasha!" 
Micah2:2 Bararikira imirima bakayinyaga, amazu bakayambura bene yo; nuko bagafata umugabo n’urugo rwe, bagatwara umuntu n’umurage we." 
Micah2:3 Ni cyo gitumye Uhoraho avuze atya: Nanjye ngambiriye kubatera icyago mutazashobora kwigobotora, cyangwa ngo mugende mwemaraye, kuko kizaba ari igihe cy’amakuba." 
Micah2:4 Uwo munsi bazabagira iciro ry’imigani, batere indirimbo y’amaganya, bagira bati «Katubayeho, turarimbutse! Umugabane w’umuryango wanjye uranyazwe! Bitewe n’iki se kugira ngo nywamburwe, maze abagome bakigabanya amasambu yacu?»" 
Micah2:5 Ni cyo gituma nta n’umwe muri mwe uzongera guhabwa umunani mu ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho. 
Micah2:6 Bamwe baravuga bati «Rekera aho kubara izo nkuru, kuko ari ubusazi kwemeza ko tuzakorwa n’ikimwaro." 
Micah2:7 Ni ko se, umuryango wa Yakobo waba waravumwe? Uhoraho yaba se atakihangana? Yabasha se gukora atyo?» — Nyamara amagambo ye agirira neza ugendera mu butungane!" 
Micah2:8 Naho mwebwe mwafashe umuryango wanjye nk’abanzi banyu; abavuye mu ntambara bigendera mu mahoro, mubacuza ibishura byabo bari biteye!" 
Micah2:9 Mwirukana abagore bo mu muryango wanjye, mubatesha ingo bakundaga; abana babo mubambura burundu agaciro nabahaye!" 
Micah2:10 Nimuhaguruke mugende, si igihe cyo kuruhuka; kubera ubuhemu bwanyu mwikururiye ukurimbuka, kandi kukazaba ukurimbuka gukaze!" 
Micah2:11 Iyaba habonekaga umuntu wiruka inyuma y’umuyaga, agakwirakwiza ibinyoma agira ati «Nguhanuriye ko uzagwirizwa divayi n’ibindi bisindisha!» uwo ni we waba umuhanuzi ukwiriye uyu muryango." 
Micah2:12 Ngiye kugukorakoranya, wowe Yakobo, uko wakabaye; ngiye gushyira hamwe udusigisigi twa Israheli! Nzabakoranyiriza hamwe nk’intama mu kiraro, cyangwa nk’ishyo riri mu rwuri, maze bahinduke imbaga nyamwinshi y’abishimye." 
Micah2:13 Nguwo abazamutse imbere, ubashakira inzira; babonye inzira bagera mu irembo basohokeramo: Umwami wabo abarangaje imbere, Uhoraho ubwe ari imbere yabo." 
Micah3:1 Nuko ndavuga nti «Nimuntege amatwi, batware ba Yakobo, namwe, bacamanza b’inzu ya Israheli! Si mwebwe se mwagombye kumenya ubutabera," 
Micah3:2 mwebwe mwanga icyiza, mugakunda ikibi! Ngaha muruna abantu ho uruhu, mugashishimura inyama ku magufa yabo!" 
Micah3:3 Abo bantu barya inyama z’umuryango wanjye, bakabunaho uruhu, bakabajanjagura n’amagufa, bakabacagaguramo uduce nk’inyama ziri mu cyungo cyangwa mu isafuriya," 
Micah3:4 abo bose, ku munsi bazatakambira Uhoraho, we azabima amatwi! Koko rero azabahisha uruhanga rwe, kuri uwo munsi, abitewe n’ibikorwa bibi bakoze.»" 
Micah3:5 Uhoraho avuze atya ku bahanuzi bayobya umuryango wanjye: Iyo babonye icyo birira batangaza amahoro; naho utagize icyo abanaga mu kanwa, bagashoza intambara." 
Micah3:6 Ni yo mpamvu ijoro rizabagwaho, mwoye kubonekerwa, mubundikiwe n’umwijima, nta cyo mugihanura; abahanuzi izuba ribarengeyeho, umunsi ubiriyeho." 
Micah3:7 Ubwo abashishozi bazakorwa n’isoni, abapfumu bagwe mu kantu; bose bipfuke mu maso kuko Imana itabashubije." 
Micah3:8 Ariko jyewe, mbikesheje umwuka w’Uhoraho, nuzuyemo imbaraga, ubutabera n’ubutwari, kugira ngo ngaragarize Yakobo ubuhemu bwe, na Israheli icyaha cye." 
Micah3:9 Nimutege amatwi ibi ngibi, batware b’inzu ya Yakobo, namwe, bacamanza b’inzu ya Israheli; mwebwe muterwa ishozi n’ubutabera, mugatoteza icyitwa ubutungane cyose;" 
Micah3:10 mwebwe mwubakisha Siyoni amaraso, Yeruzalemu mukayishingira ku bugome!" 
Micah3:11 Abatware bayo baraca imanza ari uko babonye ruswa, abaherezabitambo bayo barigishiriza kuronka inyungu, abahanuzi bayo barahanura ari uko bahawe feza. Kandi bagatinyuka kwishingikiriza Uhoraho, bavuga bati «Uhoraho ari muri twe, icyago ntikizatugwirira!»" 
Micah3:12 Ni cyo gituma Siyoni izahingwa nk’umurima, Yeruzalemu igahinduka amatongo, bitewe namwe, umusozi wubatseho Ingoro ugapfukiranwa n’ibihuru." 
Micah4:1 Hazaba ubwo mu bihe bizaza, umusozi wubatseho Ingoro y’Uhoraho ushyirwa ejuru, ukazasumba imisozi yose n’untununga twose, maze amahanga agahurura awugana." 
Micah4:2 Imiryango myinshi izashyira nzira, ivuga iti «Nimuze tuzamuke ku musozi w’Uhoraho, tugane Ingoro y’Imana ya Yakobo, azatwereke inzira ze, maze tuzikurikire.» Koko, kuri Siyoni ni ho haturuka amategeko, ijambo ry’Uhoraho rigaturuka i Yeruzalemu." 
Micah4:3 Azaca imanza z’ibihugu byinshi, akiranure amahanga akomeye, ndetse n’aya kure. Inkota zabo bazazicuramo amasuka, amacumu yabo bayacuremo imihoro. Nta hanga rizongera kubangurira irindi inkota, kandi ntibazongera ukundi kwitoza imirwano." 
Micah4:4 Buri muntu azatura mu nsi y’umuzabibu n’umutini we, kandi nta n’uzongera kumutera intugunda. Ni ko avuze Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Micah4:5 Nk’uko ibihugu byose biyoboka izina ry’Imana yabyo, natwe tuzayoboka izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu, iteka ryose." 
Micah4:6 Uhoraho avuze atya: Kuri uwo munsi nzakorakoranya abacumbagira, nshyire hamwe abatannye n’abo nafashe nabi." 
Micah4:7 Abacumbagira nzabagira udusigisigi, abazaba bari kure mbagire ihanga rikomeye. Uhoraho azababera umwami ku musozi wa Siyoni, ubu n’iteka ryose." 
Micah4:8 Naho wowe, munara w’Ubushyo, musozi w’umwari w’i Siyoni, ubutware bwa kera bugiye kukugarukira, ubwami busubizwe umwari w’i Yeruzalemu." 
Micah4:9 None se ubu, ni iki gituma uvuza induru? Ni uko se utagira umwami? Mbese umujyanama wawe yavuyeho, ukurizaho gufatwa n’ububabare nk’ubw’umugore uramutswe?" 
Micah4:10 Hinahinwa n’ububabare, mwari w’i Siyoni, kandi uboroge nk’umugore uramutswe, kuko ugiye kuva mu murwa ukajya mu gasozi, ukazagera ndetse n’i Babiloni. Aho ni ho Uhoraho azakugobotora, akakuvana mu nzara z’abanzi." 
Micah4:11 Ngaha amahanga menshi yagukoraniyeho, bagira bati «Nibahahindanye maze tubone n’amaso yacu akaga ka Siyoni!»" 
Micah4:12 Ibyo babiterwa no kutamenya imigambi y’Uhoraho, ntibasobanukirwe n’ibitekerezo bye: yabakoranyirije hamwe nk’imiba y’ingano ku mbuga." 
Micah4:13 Haguruka unyukanyuke ingano, mwari w’i Siyoni! Amahembe yawe nzayahindura ibyuma, ibinono byawe mbihindure umuringa, maze uzahonyore amahanga menshi. Ibyo uzabanyaga kimwe n’ubukungu bwabo, ubyegurire Uhoraho, Umutegeka w’isi yose." 
Micah4:14 None rero itegure kurwana, mwari w’indwanyi; dore ngaha batugose, kandi ucira Israheli imanza baramukoza inkoni ku itama." 
Micah5:1 Naho wowe, Betelehemu Efurata, uri mutoya cyane mu miryango ya Yuda, ariko iwawe nzahavana ugomba gutegeka Israheli; inkomoko ye ni iyo hambere, mu bihe bya kera cyane." 
Micah5:2 Ni cyo gituma Uhoraho azabatererana kugeza igihe ugomba kubyara azabyarira, maze udusigisigi tw’abavandimwe be dusange Abayisraheli." 
Micah5:3 We rero azemarara, aragire ubushyo bwe, abikesheje ububasha bw’Uhoraho n’ubuhangange bw’izina ry’Imana ye. Icyo gihe bazashinga imizi, kuko azakomera, akanategeka kugera ku mpera z’isi." 
Micah5:4 Ni we ubwe uzazana amahoro! Abanyashuru nibadutera bagakanagira ku butaka bwacu, tuzabateza abashumba barindwi n’abatware umunani." 
Micah5:5 Igihugu cya Ashuru n’icya Nemurodi bazabitegekesha inkota, maze we ubwe azadukize Ashuru, niramuka iteye igihugu cyacu, ikarenga umupaka wacu." 
Micah5:6 Ubwo udusigisigi twa Yakobo tuzatura rwagati mu miryango myinshi; bamere nk’ikime cyangwa ibijojoba bigwa ku byatsi, biturutse kuri Uhoraho, atagize icyo asaba umuntu cyangwa se icyo amutezeho." 
Micah5:7 Nuko udusigisigi twa Yakobo tuzabe mu mahanga, rwagati mu miryango myinshi, mbese nk’intare mu nyamaswa z’ishyamba, cyangwa nk’icyana cy’intare mu mashyo y’intama; uko itambutse igakacanga, igashwanyaguza, kandi ntihagire uyitesha icyo ifashe." 
Micah5:8 Nawe rero, cyamurira ikiganza cyawe ku bakurwanya, maze abanzi bawe bose barimbuke!" 
Micah5:9 Dore uko bizagenda kuri uwo munsi, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze! Nzakwambura amafarasi, ntsembe n’amagare yawe y’intambara." 
Micah5:10 Nzasenya imigi y’igihugu cyawe, ndimbure n’ibigo byawe bikomeye byose." 
Micah5:11 Nzavana ibinyabapfumu mu kiganza cyawe, n’abacunnyi ntuzongera kubagira ukundi." 
Micah5:12 Nzatsemba iwawe amashusho n’inkingi, uherukire aho gupfukamira ibyakozwe n’ibiganza byawe." 
Micah5:13 Nzarimbura iwawe ibiti weguriye ibigirwamana, n’imigi yawe nzayisenye." 
Micah5:14 Hanyuma nzihimure no ku mahanga atanyumviye, mbigiranye uburakari n’umujinya mwinshi." 
Micah6:1 Nimwumve icyo Uhoraho avuze: «Haguruka, uburanire imbere y’imisozi, maze utununga twumve ijwi ryawe!»" 
Micah6:2 Misozi, nimwumve urubanza rw’Uhoraho, namwe mfatiro zitajegajega z’isi, nimutege amatwi, kuko Uhoraho afitanye urubanza n’umuryango we, akaba aburana na Israheli:" 
Micah6:3 «Muryango wanjye, nagutwaye iki? Mbese icyo nakuruhijeho ni ikihe? Ngaho nsubiza!" 
Micah6:4 Naba nzira se ko nakuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri, nkakugobotora mu nzu y’uburetwa? Cyangwa se ko nakoherereje Musa, Aroni na Miriyamu ho abayobozi?" 
Micah6:5 Ibuka kandi, muryango wanjye, icyo Balaki, umwami wa Mowabu, yari agambiriye, n’icyo Balamu, mwene Bewori, yamushubije! Wibuke n’uko wanyuze i Shitimu ukagera i Giligali, bityo umenye ibikorwa byiza Uhoraho yagukoreye.»" 
Micah6:6 — Nzahingukana iki imbere y’Uhoraho kugira ngo mpfukamire Imana yo mu ijuru? Nzamutura se ibitambo bitwikwa, cyangwa ibimasa bimaze umwaka umwe?" 
Micah6:7 Uhoraho se yakwemera amapfizi y’intama agahumbagiza, cyangwa se amavuta atemba nk’imivu? Nzamutura se umwana wanjye w’uburiza, ngo abe icyiru cy’ubugome bwanjye, cyangwa se umwana wo mu bura bwanjye, ngo abe impongano y’ibyaha byanjye bwite?" 
Micah6:8 — Mwana w’umuntu, bakumenyesheje ikiri cyiza, ari cyo Uhoraho agushakaho: nta kindi uretse kubahiriza ubutabera, gukunda ubudahemuka, no kugendana n’Imana yawe mu bwiyoroshye." 
Micah6:9 Uhoraho, we ukiza abubaha izina rye, arahamagara abatuye umugi, ati «Nimutege amatwi, miryango n’amakoraniro byo mu mugi!" 
Micah6:10 Nashobora nte se kwihanganira igipimisho kibeshya, n’ikigeresho gitubye kandi cyamaganywe?" 
Micah6:11 Nakwemera nte se ukoresha iminzani idatunganye, n’umufuka urimo ibipimisho bitari byo?" 
Micah6:12 Wa mugi we, abakungu bawe buzuye urugomo, abaturage bawe bakavuga ibinyoma, n’ururimi rwo mu kanwa kabo rukabeshya!" 
Micah6:13 Ni yo mpamvu nanjye niyemeje kuguhana, nkugira amatongo kubera ibicumuro byawe." 
Micah6:14 Uzarya ariko ntuzahaga, inzara izahora iwawe. Uzazigama ariko nta cyo uzashobora gutunga, n’icyo watunga nakigabiza inkota." 
Micah6:15 Uzatera imbuto ariko ntuzasarura, uzakamura imizeti ariko ntuzisiga amavuta yayo, uzenga imizabibu ariko ntuzanywa divayi." 
Micah6:16 Wizirika ku mategeko ya Omari, no ku migenzereze yose y’inzu ya Akabu; ugakurikiza amabwiriza yabo, ari na yo mpamvu nzaguhindura amatongo! Abaturage bawe nzabagira iciro ry’imigani, ukazagerekwaho n’ikimwaro cy’umuryango wanjye!»" 
Micah7:1 Nta bwo ndagowe! Meze nk’abasaruzi bo mu cyi, cyangwa nk’abahumbahumba mu gikorera cy’imizabibu; nyamara nta n’iseri na rimwe ryo kurya, cyangwa akabuto gasigaye mu two nakundaga cyane!" 
Micah7:2 Nta ndahemuka ikirangwa mu gihugu, nta ntungane ikiboneka mu bantu! Bose bararikiye kumena amaraso, buri muntu arashandikira umuvandimwe we umutego." 
Micah7:3 Ibiganza byabo bimenyereye gukora ibibi gusa: umutware arasaba amaturo ngo abone gutunganya umurimo we, umucamanza na we araka ruswa; umunyacyubahiro aravuga yeruye irari ry’umubiri we." 
Micah7:4 Uwitwa umwere muri bo ameze nk’ihwa rihanda, uw’intungane akamera nk’uruzitiro rw’imifatangwe. Ngaha rero, umunsi bamenyeshejwe n’abarinzi babo urageze, maze bose bakorwe n’ikimwaro!" 
Micah7:5 Mwikwisunga bene wanyu cyangwa ngo mwiringire incuti, ndetse n’imbere y’uwo upfumbase uritondere ijambo rivuye mu kanwa kawe," 
Micah7:6 kuko umuhungu yita se umusazi, umukobwa agashira isoni nyina, umukazana agahangana na nyirabukwe, buri muntu akagira umwanzi mu nzu ye bwite." 
Micah7:7 Naho jyewe, Uhoraho ni we mpanze amaso, niringiye Imana, Umukiza wanjye; koko rero, Imana yanjye izanyumva." 
Micah7:8 Sigaho kunkina ku mubyimba, mwanzi wanjye! Niba naguye nzabyuka, niba kandi ndi mu mwijima, Uhoraho azambera urumuri." 
Micah7:9 Ngomba kwihanganira uburakari bw’Uhoraho, kuko ari we nacumuyeho, kugeza igihe azamburanira, akansubiza uburenganzira bwanjye. Azangarura mu rumuri, nzatangarire ubutabera bwe." 
Micah7:10 Umwanzi wanjye azabibona akorwe n’ikimwaro, we wambazaga ati «Uhoraho, Imana yawe, aba he?» Amaso yanjye azamwitegereza, ubwo azanyukanyukwa nk’icyondo mu mayira." 
Micah7:11 Umunsi wo kubaka bundi bushya inkike zawe uregereje, ari na wo munsi imipaka yawe izagurwa." 
Micah7:12 Uwo munsi nyine bazaza bakugana kuva Ashuru kugera mu Misiri, kuva mu Misiri kugera ku Ruzi, kuva ku nyanja kugera ku yindi, no kuva ku musozi kugera ku wundi!" 
Micah7:13 (Ahandi ho hazahinduka ubutayu ku mpamvu y’abahatuye, bitewe n’imyifatire mibi yabo.)" 
Micah7:14 Ragira umuryango wawe n’inkoni yawe, ari wo bushyo wahaweho umurage, busigaye ari bwonyine rwagati mu ishyamba ry’inzitane, maze burishe muri Bashani n’i Gilihadi, nk’uko byahoze kera!" 
Micah7:15 Wongere utugaragarize ibitangaza, nk’iby’igihe utuvanye mu gihugu cya Misiri!" 
Micah7:16 Abanyamahanga bazabireba maze bakorwe n’ikimwaro, bo biringiye ububasha bwabo bwinshi, bazumirwe bipfuke ku munwa banazibe n’amatwi." 
Micah7:17 Bazarigata umukungugu nk’inzoka, cyangwa nk’ibindi bikoko byikurura ku butaka. Bazasohoka mu bigo byabo bikomeye, basange Uhoraho, Imana yacu, badagadwa, bazahinde umushyitsi kandi bagire ubwoba kubera wowe!" 
Micah7:18 Mbese wagereranywa n’iyihe Mana, wowe wihanganira icyaha, ukirengagiza ubugome? Urukundo ugirira udusigisigi tw’umuryango wawe rutuma udakomeza kuwurakarira, ahubwo ugashimishwa no kutugirira impuhwe." 
Micah7:19 Tugaragarize bundi bushya impuhwe zawe, unyukanyuke ibicumuro byacu, kandi ibyaha byacu byose ubirohe mu nyanja!" 
Micah7:20 Yakobo uzamugaragarize ubudahemuka bwawe, na Abrahamu umwereke ineza yawe, nk’uko wabirahiye abasekuruza bacu kuva mu bihe bya kera." 
Nahum1:1 Ibyahanuwe kuri Ninivi. Ngiki igitabo cy’ibyahishuriwe Nahumu w’i Elikoshi. 
Nahum1:2 Uhoraho ni Imana ifuha kandi ikihorera, Uhoraho arihorera, uburakari bwe bugatera ubwoba, Uhoraho yihorera ku bamurwanya, abanzi be akabagirira inzika." 
Nahum1:3 Uhoraho atinda kurakara, n’ubwo afite imbaraga nyinshi; ariko amaherezo akazahana umugira nabi. Agenda mu muyaga no mu muhengeri, ibicu bikaba umukungugu utumurwa n’ibirenge bye." 
Nahum1:4 Acyaha inyanja akayumutsa, agakamya n’inzuzi zose. I Bashani n’i Karumeli harumagatanye, ibimera byo muri Libani birarabiranye." 
Nahum1:5 Imisozi irahinda umushyitsi imbere ye, utununga tugashonga, isi irahindagana imbere y’uruhanga rwe, kimwe n’abayituye bose." 
Nahum1:6 Ni nde wahangana n’ubukana bwe, akihanganira uburakari bwe bugurumana? Umujinya we urisukiranya nk’inkongi y’umuriro, ibitare bikiyasa imbere ye." 
Nahum1:7 Uhoraho ni mwiza, akaba n’ubuhungiro ku munsi w’amage, akagirira neza abamwiringira bose," 
Nahum1:8 ndetse n’iyo haza umuvumba ukabije. Azatsemba abamugomera, abanzi be abarohe mu mwijima." 
Nahum1:9 Mbese Uhoraho, muramuhimbira migambi nyabaki? Ni we utsemba; umubabaro ntugaruke ukundi." 
Nahum1:10 Koko bameze nk’amahwa asobekeranye, bityo bazakongoka bashire nk’ibyatsi byumye." 
Nahum1:11 Iwawe habonetse umuntu ugambanira Uhoraho, akagira imigambi y’ubugiranabi." 
Nahum1:12 Uhoraho avuze atya: N’ubwo abanzi banyu ari benshi bakagira n’imbaraga, bazatsembwa maze bashireho. Naragusuzuguje, ariko sinzongera kugusuzuguza ukundi." 
Nahum1:13 Kuva ubu ngiye kujanjagura umutwaro wari ugushikamiye, nkubohore n’ingoyi zari zikuboshye." 
Nahum1:14 Uhoraho akuvuzeho ibi ngibi: Ntuzongera kugira urubyaro ruzitirirwa izina ryawe; ibigirwamana byawe by’ibibazanyo cyangwa by’ibicurano, ngiye kubivana mu ngoro yabyo; ngucukurire imva kuko nta cyo umaze." 
Nahum2:1 Ngiyo intumwa itungutse mu mpinga z’imisozi, izanywe no kubamenyesha amahoro. Yuda, ngaho himbaza iminsi mikuru yawe, urangize n’imihigo wahize, kuko umugiranabi atazagera iwawe ukundi, akaba yarimbuwe burundu!" 
Nahum2:2 Igitero kiguteye kiguturutse imbere! Rinda ibigo byawe, ugenzure n’amayira! Kenyera ukomeze, ukoreshe imbaraga zawe zose!" 
Nahum2:3 Dore Uhoraho agarukanye ikuzo rya Yakobo, ni we ubwe kuzo rya Israheli, kuko abasahuzi bari barabacuje, bakabatsembaho umuzabibu." 
Nahum2:4 Ingabo z’intwari zabo zisize ibara ritukura, abakurwanya bambaye imyambaro y’umuhemba. Dore biteguye kugaba igitero: ibyuma byose by’amagare y’intambara birarabagirana, amacumu aratigita yerekera impande zose!" 
Nahum2:5 Mu mayira amagare y’intambara aragenda nk’ayasaze, ngayo mu bibuga arihuta cyane, ameze nk’amafumba y’umuriro, aranyaruka nk’umurabyo." 
Nahum2:6 Umwami wa Ninivi ahamagaje abagaba b’ingabo ze, ngabo baragenda babyigana. Barihutira kugera ku nkike, aho bateguye ibyo bari bwikingeho." 
Nahum2:7 Amarembo yerekera ku Ruzi arasunitswe, ingoro y’umwami irafashwe." 
Nahum2:8 Ishusho ry’imanakazi yabo riramanuwe, bararisahuye; abaja bayo baraganya nk’inuma, bikomanga ku gituza." 
Nahum2:9 Kuva kera Ninivi yari nk’ikizenga cy’amazi menshi, ariko none dore atangiye gusandara impande zose. Barabahamagara bati «Nimuhagarare, mukomere!» ariko ntihagire n’umwe ugaruka." 
Nahum2:10 Nimusahure feza! Musahure na zahabu! Ubukungu bw’aho ntibugira ingano, barunze ibintu birenze urugero by’agaciro gakomeye." 
Nahum2:11 Byose birasenyutse, birasahuwe, birarimbutse! Abantu b’aho bose bacitse intege, amavi arakomangana, barahinda umushyitsi umubiri wose, mu maso habo harasuherewe." 
Nahum2:12 Mbese rya senga ry’intare riri he? Ibyana by’intare ni ho byiberaga, n’igihe yabaga yagiye guhiga, ntibigire ikibihungabanya!" 
Nahum2:13 Intare yacagaguraga umuhigo ikagaburira ibyana byayo, yawutanyaguriraga n’ingore zayo; yuzuzaga ibyo yishe mu buvumo bwayo, no mu masenga yayo inyama yacagaguye." 
Nahum2:14 Noneho dore ndakwibasiye, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze. Amagare yawe y’intambara nzayahindura umwotsi, ibyana by’intare byawe mbitsembeshe inkota. Nzakubuza ibyo wasahuraga ku isi yose, n’ijwi ry’intumwa zawe ntirizongera kumvikana ukundi." 
Nahum3:1 Ugushije ishyano, mugi umena amaraso, ukaba wuzuye ubujura n’urugomo, ntunahweme kunyaga iby’abandi!" 
Nahum3:2 Nimwumve urusaku rw’ikiboko n’urw’inziga zikocagurana, imirindi y’amafarasi n’umuvuduko w’amagare y’intambara." 
Nahum3:3 Abanyamafarasi biteguye kurasa, inkota ziragurumana nk’amafumba, amacumu ararabya nk’umurabyo. Abapfuye ni benshi, imirambo irandagaye hose, intumbi ntizibarika, baragenda bazisitaraho!" 
Nahum3:4 Ibyo byose ubitewe n’uburaya bwawe bukabije, wowe, mupfumukazi wabuhiriye ukagira n’uburanga butangaje, ugashikamira amahanga n’ubwo buhabara bwawe, n’ibihugu ukabyicisha uburetwa kubera ubupfumu bwawe." 
Nahum3:5 Noneho dore ndakwibasiye, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze, nzazamura ingutiya yawe kugera ku gahanga, kugira ngo nkwambike ubusa imbere y’amahanga, n’ibihugu mbyereke ubwambure bwawe." 
Nahum3:6 Nzakujugunyaho imyanda, nkugire akarorero, kugira ngo ukorwe n’ikimwaro," 
Nahum3:7 maze ugukubise amaso wese, ahunge avuza induru, agira ati «Ninivi yarimbutse!» Ni nde uzayigirira impuhwe? Ni ko se, uzavana he abaguhumuriza?" 
Nahum3:8 Waba se hari icyo urusha Tebesi, wa mugi wubatse hagati y’imiyoboro ya Nili, ugakikizwa n’amazi impande zose, uruzi rukawubera inkike iwurinda?" 
Nahum3:9 Kushi na Misiri ni byo wishingikirizaga buri gihe, Puti n’Abanyalibiya baragiranye na wo amasezerano." 
Nahum3:10 Nyamara abaturage bawo barafashwe, bajyanwa bunyago; abana bawo b’ibitambambuga bicirwa mu mayira yose, abanyacyubahiro bawo bagabanywa ababatsinze, hakoreshejwe ubufindo, n’abatware bawo bose baboheshwa iminyururu." 
Nahum3:11 Nawe rero uramukiwe no gusinda ukarohama! Uzahatirwa gushakira hose ubuhungiro kugira ngo ucike umwanzi! 
Nahum3:12 Ibigo byawe bikomeye byose bimeze nk’imitini iriho imbuto zihishije; iyo bayinyeganyeje na gatoya, imbuto zihungukira mu kanwa k’uzirya." 
Nahum3:13 Reba abantu usigaranye: bifashe rwose nk’abagore! Amarembo y’igihugu cyawe yugururiwe abanzi, umuriro watwitse ibihindizo byawe." 
Nahum3:14 Nimuvome amazi, uyabikire igihe uzaba ugoswe; komeza inkike zikuzitiye, jya gushaka ibumba, urikate maze ubumbe amatafari." 
Nahum3:15 Nyamara ni ho umuriro uzagutwikira, inkota igutsembe, kabone n’iyo waba imbaga nyamwinshi ingana n’isanane cyangwa n’inzige." 
Nahum3:16 Wigwijeho abacuruzi baruta inyenyeri zo mu kirere, none bose barayoyotse nk’inzige zigurutse." 
Nahum3:17 Abarinzi bawe bari benshi nk’inzige, abagenzuzi bawe ari nk’irumbo ry’isanane; zihumbitse ku gihuru kubera ubukonje, nyamara iyo izuba rirashe, zose ziraguruka, ntihagire umenya n’aho zihungiye." 
Nahum3:18 Mbe, mwami wa Ashuru, abatware bawe ko bahunyiza, intwari zawe zikaba zisinziriye! Imbaga yawe yatataniye mu misozi, kandi nta muntu n’umwe uri bubakoranyirize hamwe!" 
Nahum3:19 Amakuba yawe ntagira igaruriro, ibikomere byawe ntibishobora gukira. Uwumvise akaga urimo wese aravuza impundu, ariko kandi ni mu gihe: none se ni nde utigeze ugirira nabi?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Dore ubutumwa bwashyikirijwe umuhanuzi Habakuki, mu ibonekerwa." 
Habakkuk1:2 Uhoraho, nzagutabaza kugeza ryari, utanyumva, ko ngutakambira merewe nabi, ntunkize?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Ni kuki ungaragariza ubuhemu, waba se ushyigikiye ubushikamirwe? Nta kindi nkibona kitari ukurimbuka n’urugomo, ahantu hose hari impaka n’amahane!" 
Habakkuk1:4 Amategeko ntagikurikizwa, ubutabera bwarapfukiranywe, kuko umugiranabi ashikamira intungane; bityo ubutabera bw’iki gihe bukaba ibinyoma bisa." 
Habakkuk1:5 Nimurebe ishyano rigwiririye amahanga maze mwumirwe; kuko icyo ngiye gukora guhera ubu, mutari bucyemere, kabone n’aho hagira ukibabwira!" 
Habakkuk1:6 Ngaha ngiye guhagurutsa Abakalideya, iryo hanga ritagira impuhwe, kandi ry’irinyamaboko, rizenguruke isi yose, kugira ngo ryigarurire ibihugu bitari ibyaryo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Ni ihanga riteye ubwoba kandi ryihagazeho, imbaraga zaryo zituma nta we urihangara." 
Habakkuk1:8 Amafarasi yabo yihuta kurusha ingwe, akarusha ibirura bya nijoro kunyaruka. Abanyamafarasi babo bariho barasimbuka, ngabo baturutse kure baguruka nka kagoma yihutira gufata icyo irya." 
Habakkuk1:9 Bose icyarimwe bazanywe no kugira nabi, ngabo baraje baromboreje imbere yabo; barundanyije imfungwa zingana n’umusenyi!" 
Habakkuk1:10 Ni abantu badakangwa abami, bagasuzugura abategetsi; bahinyura ibigo byose bikomeye, ahubwo bakarundarunda igitaka imbere yabyo, ari cyo bazamukiraho, bakabyigarurira." 
Habakkuk1:11 Baragenda nk’umuyaga w’inkubi, bakihutira kujya n’ahandi kuhayogoza; imbaraga zabo ni zo bagize imana yabo." 
Habakkuk1:12 Uhoraho, kuva mu ntangiriro se si wowe Mana yanjye, Nyir’ubutagatifu wanjye kandi utazapfa bibaho? Uhoraho, washyizeho uwo mwanzi ngo aducire urubanza, uramukomeza, wowe Rutare, kugira ngo aduhane." 
Habakkuk1:13 Nyamara se, ko amaso yawe azira inenge, washobora ute kwitegereza ikibi, no kwihanganira akarengane? Ni kuki ukomeza kwirengagiza amahano akorwa n’abagambanyi, ukicecekera igihe umugiranabi aconcomera umurusha ubutungane?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Abantu ubagenzereza nk’amafi yo mu nyanja, mbese nk’ibikururuka mu mazi bitagira umutware!" 
Habakkuk1:15 Abo bose umwanzi azabarobesha ururobo, abafatire mu rushundura rwe, abashyire mu mutego we. Icyo gihe azishima kandi asabagire," 
Habakkuk1:16 nuko ature igitambo rwa rushundura rwe, atwikire ububani uwo mutego we, kuko ari byo akesha kurya ibitubutse kandi byiza." 
Habakkuk1:17 Mbese azareka ryari gufatira amahanga mu rushundura rwe, ngo akomeze kuyatsemba nta mbabazi?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Jyewe rero ngiye gukomera ku izamu ryanjye, nkomeze mpagarare hejuru y’inkike; nzagenzure kugira ngo numve icyo Imana izambwira, mbese igisubizo izampa kuri aya magambo yanjye." 
Habakkuk2:2 Nuko Uhoraho ansubiza, agira ati «Andika iby’iri bonekerwa, ubishyire ku tubaho, maze babashe kubisoma neza." 
Habakkuk2:3 Gusa iby’iri bonekerwa bizaza mu gihe cyagenwe, ni bwo byose bizuzuzwa nta kabuza; n’aho ryatinda kandi uzaritegereze, kuko rizaza ku gihe cyaryo nta gihindutse!" 
Habakkuk2:4 Ni koko, azarimbuka umuntu wuzuye ubwirasi, naho intungane izabeshwaho n’ubudahemuka bwayo.»" 
Habakkuk2:5 Ni ukuri koko, ubukungu bukabije buvamo kurimbuka! Umuntu wikuza ntajya aguma hamwe, ahubwo umuhogo we awagura nk’ukuzimu, akamera nk’urupfu rutigera ruhaga! Akoranyiriza amahanga yose iruhande rwe, n’imiryango yose akayiyegereza!" 
Habakkuk2:6 Uwo muntu se, abandi ntibazamuciraho imigani, bose bakamusekera icyarimwe, bagira bati: Ariyimbire, uwigwizaho ibitari ibye, (ariko se azageza ryari?) akikungaharisha ibintu bitabarika yatseho amakoro!" 
Habakkuk2:7 Aho abo ubereyemo umwenda ntibagiye guhaguruka bwangu, abagukura umutima na bo bagakanguka? Nyamara ntuzabava mu nzara!" 
Habakkuk2:8 Nk’uko wasahuye amahanga atagira ingano, abasigaye bose b’iyo miryango bazagusahura; kuko wamennye amaraso y’abantu, ugahungabanya igihugu, umurwa n’abawutuye bose." 
Habakkuk2:9 Ariyimbire ushyingura mu nzu ye ibyo yambuye, agatekereza kwarika icyari cye hejuru cyane, kugira ngo azahungireyo icyago!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Ibyo wiyemeje ni urukozasoni rw’umuryango wawe: igihe warimburaga amahanga atagira ingano, wikururiye ibyago wowe ubwawe." 
Habakkuk2:11 Ni ukuri koko, ibuye ryubatse urukuta rizatabaza, maze rizasubizwe n’igiti cyo mu gisenge cy’inzu." 
Habakkuk2:12 Ariyimbire uwubaka umugi hejuru y’amaraso, agashingira umurwa ku bugome!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Mbese ye, ibi ntibyaturutse kuri Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, igihe avuze ati «Ibihugu biragokera umuriro n’amahanga aravunwa n’ubusa»," 
Habakkuk2:14 kuko isi yose izasakarwamo n’ubumenyi bw’Uhoraho, nk’uko amazi asendera inyanja." 
Habakkuk2:15 Ariyimbire unywekesha mugenzi we, akavanga inzoga n’uburozi kugeza ko amusindisha, agashimishwa no kumureba yambaye ubusa!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Wihagije ibikozasoni aho kwiha ikuzo, ubu rero ni igihe cyawe cyo gusinda ukiyambika ubusa, kuko inkongoro iri mu kiganza cy’iburyo cy’Uhoraho none ikaba igiye kugucubanurirwaho, maze ikuzo ryawe rikaguhindukiramo ikimwaro!" 
Habakkuk2:17 Ni ukuri koko, urugomo wagiriye Libani ruzakugaruka, no kuba wararimbuye inyamaswa zayo, uzabiryozwe, bitewe n’uko wamennye amaraso y’abantu, ugahungabanya igihugu, umurwa n’abawutuye bose." 
Habakkuk2:18 Rimaze iki, ishusho ribajwe n’umunyabukorikori, cyangwa iricuzwe mu muringa, rigahanura ibinyoma? Uwayakoze yashobora ate kuyiringira, kandi ari ibigirwamana bitavuga?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Ariyimbire ubwira ingiga y’igiti, ati «Haguruka», akabwira ibuye ritavuga, ati «Kanguka», nyamara ntibigire icyo bimusubiza! Yego na none, bisize zahabu na feza, ariko nta mwuka ubirimo!" 
Habakkuk2:20 Nyamara Uhoraho ari mu Ngoro ye ntagatifu: isi yose niceceke imbere ye! 
Habakkuk3:1 Isengesho ry’umuhanuzi Habakuki, rimeze nk’amaganya." 
Habakkuk3:2 Uhoraho, numvise ibigwi byawe, birantangaza! Uhoraho, ongera ugenze utyo no muri iki gihe! Ibikorwa byawe bimenyekanye no mu minsi turimo; ariko mu burakari bwawe uribuke no kugira imbabazi!" 
Habakkuk3:3 Imana iturutse i Temani, Nyir’ubutagatifu aturutse ku musozi wa Parani. Ubwamamare bwe bwakwiriye ijuru, ibisingizo bye byuzura isi." 
Habakkuk3:4 Ububengerane bwe burakirana nk’urumuri, imirasire nk’iy’izuba isohotse mu kiganza cye, ni na yo ububasha bwe bwihishemo." 
Habakkuk3:5 Icyorezo kiragenda imbere ye, naho indwara iramukurikiye." 
Habakkuk3:6 Arahagaze, isi ihinda umushyitsi, arebye, akangaranya amahanga. Imisozi yahozeho iratengagurika, utununga twa kera turarigita, izo ni zo nzira ze za kera!" 
Habakkuk3:7 Nabonye amahema y’i Kushani ari mu kaga, amazu yo mu gihugu cya Madiyani ahinda umushyitsi!" 
Habakkuk3:8 Uhoraho, waba se wararakariye inzuzi, cyangwa se umujinya wawuterwa n’inyanja, ku buryo ugendera ku mafarasi yawe, no ku magare y’indatsimburwa?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Umuheto wawe wawujishuye, injishi yawo uyihaza imyambi yica; isi yose wayisatagurishije imigezi." 
Habakkuk3:10 Imisozi irakubona igahinda umushyitsi, amasumo y’amazi akadudubiza, ukuzimu kugatakamba, gushyize amaboko ejuru." 
Habakkuk3:11 Izuba n’ukwezi bihagaze mu mwanya wabyo, bihunga icyezezi cy’imyambi yawe iguruka, n’imirabyo y’icumu ryawe." 
Habakkuk3:12 Mu burakari bwawe uzenguruka isi, unyukanyuka amahanga n’umujinya wawe." 
Habakkuk3:13 Wazanywe no gukiza umuryango wawe, unakiza uwo wisigiye amavuta y’ubutore. Wasambuye inzu y’umugome, urayisenya kugeza ku mfatiro zayo." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wahinguranyije umugaba w’ingabo ze n’amacumu ye bwite, kandi bari bahuruye, bishimiye kudutatanya, bameze nk’abaremye igico, kugira ngo baconcomere umunyabyago." 
Habakkuk3:15 Wavogereye inyanja n’amafarasi yawe, rwagati mu muvumba w’amazi menshi." 
Habakkuk3:16 Narabyumvise maze nkuka umutima, iyo nkuru ituma iminwa yanjye ihinda umushyitsi, ingingo zanjye ziratatana, amaguru yanjye aradandabirana. Nyamara ntegereza nitonze uwo munsi w’amakuba, ugiye kugwirira ihanga ryadushikamiye!" 
Habakkuk3:17 Ni ukuri koko, umutini ntukirabya indabyo, imizabibu ntikigira imbuto, imizeti yarekeye aho kwera, imirima ntigitanga umusaruro, amatungo magufi yashize mu ngo, nta n’amatungo maremare akirangwa mu biraro." 
Habakkuk3:18 Naho jyewe nzahora mu byishimo ku bw’Uhoraho, nzahimbarwe mbikesheje Imana yanjye!" 
Habakkuk3:19 Uhoraho ni Umutegetsi wanjye n’imbaraga zanjye, ibirenge byanjye abihindura nk’iby’imparakazi, akantambagiza mu mpinga z’imisozi! (Iyo ndirimbo igenewe umuririmbisha, icurangishwa inanga z’imirya.)" 
Zephaniah1:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho yabwiye Sofoniya mwene Kushi, mwene Gedaliya, mwene Amariya, mwene Hezekiya; ubwo hakaba igihe Yoziya mwene Amoni, yari umwami wa Yuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Ngiye gutsemba ibiri ku isi byose, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Zephaniah1:3 Nzatsemba abantu n’inyamaswa, inyoni zo mu kirere n’amafi yo mu nyanja, n’abagome bose mbatere gutsitara; koko, nzarimbura abantu ku isi! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Zephaniah1:4 Ngiye kuramburira ikiganza cyanjye kuri Yuda, no ku baturage bose ba Yeruzalemu; mpatsembe abasigaye mu basengaga Behali, kimwe n’izina ry’abaherezabitambo bayo." 
Zephaniah1:5 Nzatsemba aburira hejuru y’amazu kugira ngo bapfukamire ingabo zo mu ijuru, kimwe n’abapfukamira Uhoraho, bakirahira imana yabo Milikomu." 
Zephaniah1:6 Nzatsemba abirengagije Uhoraho, batakimushakashaka kandi ntibamugishe inama." 
Zephaniah1:7 Nimuceceke imbere ya Nyagasani Uhoraho, kuko umunsi w’Uhoraho wegereje! Ni koko, Uhoraho yateguye igitambo, anatagatifuza abatumirwa be." 
Zephaniah1:8 Bityo rero, ku munsi w’igitambo cy’Uhoraho, nzahana abategetsi n’abatware; kimwe n’abambara nk’abanyamahanga bose." 
Zephaniah1:9 Uwo munsi nzahana abazamuka amadarajya (y’umwami), maze inzu y’umutegetsi wabo bakayuzuza ibivuye ku rugomo no ku buhendanyi." 
Zephaniah1:10 Uwo munsi — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ku Irembo ry’amafi hazumvikana induru, mu Mugi mushya hacure umuborogo, ku musozi humvikane urusaku rukaze!" 
Zephaniah1:11 Nimuboroge, mwe abatuye mu karere k’epfo, kuko inyoko y’abacuruzi yatsiratsijwe, n’abapimaga feza bose bakaba batsembwe!" 
Zephaniah1:12 Icyo gihe nyine, nzanyura muri Yeruzalemu hose, nifashishije amafumba y’umuriro, kugira ngo ntahure abasutamye ku mwanda wabo, maze bakibwira mu mutima wabo bati «Uhoraho nta cyo akora, ari icyiza ari n’ikibi.»" 
Zephaniah1:13 Nuko rero, ubukungu bwabo buzagabizwa abasahuzi, n’amazu yabo asenywe; bubatse amazu ariko ntibazayaturamo, bahinze imizabibu, ariko ntibazanywa divayi yayo." 
Zephaniah1:14 Umunsi ukomeye w’Uhoraho uregereje, uri hafi kandi uraje bwangu! Mbega imiborogo ikakaje izaba ku munsi w’Uhoraho, ku buryo n’intwari ubwazo zizatabaza!" 
Zephaniah1:15 Uwo munsi uzaba umunsi w’uburakari, umunsi w’amakuba n’agahinda, umunsi w’akaga n’ukurimbuka, umunsi w’umwijima n’icuraburindi, umunsi w’igihu n’ibicu byijimye," 
Zephaniah1:16 umunsi w’urusaku rw’ihembe n’induru y’intambara, kuko ari bwo bazatera imigi ikomeye n’iminara miremire yo ku nkike zayo." 
Zephaniah1:17 Nzagusha abantu mu makuba, barindagire nk’impumyi, kuko bacumuye kuri Uhoraho; amaraso yabo azanyanyagizwa nk’umukungugu, intumbi zabo zijugunywe nk’imyanda." 
Zephaniah1:18 Ari feza, ari na zahabu yabo, nta kizashobora kubagobotora. Ku munsi w’uburakari bw’Uhoraho, isi yose izakongorwa n’umuriro w’ugufuha kwe! Koko, agiye gutsemba anarimbure burundu abatuye isi bose." 
Zephaniah2:1 Nimwisuganye, bantu mutagira isoni, ngaho nimwisuganye," 
Zephaniah2:2 mbere y’uko mutumurwa mu munsi umwe, nk’umurama utwawe n’umuyaga, mbere y’uko mugwirirwa n’umujinya ukaze w’Uhoraho, mukagwirirwa n’umunsi w’uburakari bwe!" 
Zephaniah2:3 Ahubwo, nimushakashake Uhoraho, mwebwe, abiyoroshya bo ku isi mwese, mugakurikiza amategeko ye! Ngaho, nimuharanire ubutungane n’ubwiyoroshye; ahari byazabaviramo kubona aho mwikinga, ku munsi w’uburakari bw’Uhoraho!" 
Zephaniah2:4 Koko rero, Gaza igiye gutereranwa, Ashikeloni itsiratsizwe, Ashidodi izameneshwa amanywa ava, naho Ekironi irimburwe." 
Zephaniah2:5 Muriyimbire, baturage bo ku nkengero y’inyanja, mwebwe, hanga ry’Abanyakireta! Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rirakwibasiye, wowe Kanahani, rigira riti «Gihugu cy’Abafilisiti, ngiye kukumaraho abaturage!»" 
Zephaniah2:6 Ku nkengero y’inyanja hazahinduka urwuri, habe igikingi cy’abashumba n’ibiraro by’amatungo," 
Zephaniah2:7 kandi hegurirwe abasigaye bo mu nzu ya Yuda. Bazaza kuharagira amatungo yabo, ku mugoroba baruhukire mu mazu ya Ashikeloni; kuko Uhoraho, Imana yabo, azabibuka akabakiza bundi bushya." 
Zephaniah2:8 Numvise ibitutsi bya Mowabu n’agasuzuguro ka bene Hamoni, igihe batutse umuryango wanjye, bakikuza barenga imbago z’igihugu cyabo." 
Zephaniah2:9 Ni yo mpamvu mbirahije ubugingo bwanjye, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana ya Israheli, ubivuze: Mowabu izahinduka nka Sodoma, bene Hamoni bamere nka Gomora; hazaba ahantu h’ibihuru by’amahwa, igisimu cy’umunyu n’amatongo y’iteka ryose. Abasigaye bo mu muryango wanjye bazahasahura, abacitse ku icumu b’ubwoko bwanjye bahahabweho umurage." 
Zephaniah2:10 Ngicyo igihembo cy’ubwirasi bwabo, kuko batutse umuryango w’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, bakikuza barengera imbago zawo." 
Zephaniah2:11 Uhoraho azabatera gukangarana bikabije, atsembe n’ibigirwamana byose by’isi, maze amahanga yose ya kure azamupfukamire, buri hanga mu gihugu cyaryo." 
Zephaniah2:12 Namwe rero, Banyakushi: «Inkota yanjye izabahinguranya.»" 
Zephaniah2:13 Uhoraho azaramburira ikiganza cye ku majyaruguru maze atsembe Ashuru; Ninivi azayihindura amatongo, yumagatane nk’ubutayu." 
Zephaniah2:14 Amatungo kimwe n’inyamaswa z’amoko yose bizayibyagiramo; igihunyira n’ikinyogote bizarara hejuru y’inkingi zayo, bazabyumve bihumira mu madirishya. Guhera mu irebe ry’umuryango hazaba amatongo, amasederi y’igisenge asigarire aho." 
Zephaniah2:15 Nguko uko uzamera, umugi w’ibyishimo wahoranaga ituze, ukibwira uti «Ni jye uriho, nta wundi!» Waba se uhindutse ute amatongo n’isenga ry’inyamaswa? Uhanyuze wese aratangara, akahamama n’ikiganza." 
Zephaniah3:1 Uwo mugi w’ikirara uriyimbire, wo wahindanye kandi ugategekesha igitugu!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Ntiwumvise ijwi riwuhamagara cyangwa ngo ukurikize amabwiriza; ntiwigeze wiringira Uhoraho, ntiwegera n’Imana yawo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Abatware bawo ni nk’intare zitontomera rwagati muri wo, abacamanza bawo bakamera nk’ibirura bihiga iyo ijoro rikubye, ntibiraze icyo birya bukeye." 
Zephaniah3:4 Abahanuzi bawo ni abirasi n’ababeshyi; abaherezabitambo bawo bahindanyije ibintu bitagatifu, barenga no ku mategeko!" 
Zephaniah3:5 Mu mugi rwagati, Uhoraho ni we Ntungane, ntiyigera akora ikibi; uko bukeye atangaza ubutabera bwe, nta munsi n’umwe asiba. Nyamara abagome bo ntibakorwa n’ikimwaro." 
Zephaniah3:6 Natsembye amahanga — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — iminara yo ku nkike zabo, ndayisenya, imihanda yabo narayirimbuye nta mugenzi ukihanyura. Koko imigi yabo yahindutse amatongo: nta muntu ukihagera, nta n’uhatuye." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ubwo naribwiye nti «Nibura wazanyubaha, wakire amabwiriza yanjye maze aho utuye hoye kurimbuka!» Ariko uko nje ngasanga barushijeho gukora nabi." 
Zephaniah3:8 None rero, nimuntegereze — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — ku munsi nzahagurukira kubashinja, kuko niyemeje guhuriza hamwe amahanga, no gukorakoranya ibihugu, kugira ngo mbacubanurireho umujinya wanjye, mbamarireho ubukana bwose bw’uburakari bwanjye, (kuko isi yose uko yakabaye izatsembwa n’umuriro w’ugufuha kwanjye.)" 
Zephaniah3:9 Koko rero, nzahindura abanyamahanga bazire ubwandure, kugira ngo bose bazambaze izina ry’Uhoraho, bamukorere n’amatwara amwe." 
Zephaniah3:10 Ndetse no hakurya y’inzuzi z’i Kushi, abansenga bazanzanira amaturo yabo." 
Zephaniah3:11 Uwo munsi ntuzaba ukimwazwa n’ibikorwa bibi byose wankoreye, kuko icyo gihe nzaba nakuvanyemo abirasi bikuza, bityo ukazarekera aho kwiyemera ku musozi wanjye mutagatifu." 
Zephaniah3:12 Nzagusigamo umuryango wiyoroshya, ukanicisha bugufi, ukazashakira ubuhungiro mu izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Zephaniah3:13 Abasigaye bo muri Israheli ntibazongera gucumura ukundi, cyangwa ngo bavuge ibinyoma; ururimi rubeshya ntiruzongera kumvikana ku kanwa kabo, ahubwo bazarya kandi baruhuke nta we ubatera intugunda." 
Zephaniah3:14 Rangurura ijwi wishimye, mwari w’i Siyoni! Israheli, hanika uririmbe! Ishime, uhimbarwe, mwari w’i Yeruzalemu!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Uhoraho yakuvanyeho imanza zari zigushikamiye, yirukanye abanzi bawe! Umwami wa Israheli, Uhoraho ubwe, akurimo rwagati; ntuzongera ukundi gutinya icyago." 
Zephaniah3:16 Uwo munsi bazabwira Yeruzalemu, bati «Witinya, Siyoni! Ibiganza byawe nibireke gucika intege!" 
Zephaniah3:17 Uhoraho Imana yawe akurimo rwagati, ni we Ntwari ikiza! Azishima cyane ku mpamvu yawe, mu rukundo rwe azakuvugurura; azabyina kandi azarangurure ijwi kubera wowe," 
Zephaniah3:18 mbese nko mu byishimo by’iminsi mikuru.» Nakuvanyeho icyitwa icyago cyose ngo udakomeza gukorwa n’ikimwaro. 
Zephaniah3:19 Icyo gihe nzatsemba abakurenganya bose, nzavure intama zavunitse, nkorakoranye izari zatannye. Nzabahesha icyubahiro n’ubwamamare, mu bihugu byose basuzuguriwemo." 
Zephaniah3:20 Icyo gihe nzabagarura, mbakoranyirize hamwe, maze izina ryanyu rizamamare hose, kandi mbubahishe mu bihugu byose byo ku isi, nimara kubavugurura mubyirebera ubwanyu, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Haggai1:1 Mu mwaka wa kabiri Dariyusi ari ku ngoma, ku munsi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa gatandatu, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa Zorobabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli, umutware wa Yuda, na Yozuwe mwene Yehosadaki, umuherezabitambo mukuru, barimenyeshejwe na Hagayi umuhanuzi, agira ati" 
Haggai1:2 «Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Aba bantu baravuga bati ’Igihe cyo kongera kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho ntikiragera!’»" 
Haggai1:3 Nuko Uhoraho atuma Hagayi umuhanuzi, ngo abasubize muri aya magambo:" 
Haggai1:4 «Ese mwebwe murabona ari igihe cyo kwibera mu mazu yanyu ameze neza, kandi iriya Ngoro y’Uhoraho yarabaye amatongo?" 
Haggai1:5 Noneho rero, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nimuzirikane neza ibyababayeho!" 
Haggai1:6 Mwabibye byinshi ariko musarura bike; murarya ariko ntimwijuta; muranywa ariko inyota ikaba yose; murambara ariko ntimushire imbeho! Koko uwakoze yarahembwe, ariko inyungu ayibika mu mufuka utobotse!" 
Haggai1:7 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nimuzirikane neza ibyababayeho!" 
Haggai1:8 Ngaho nimuzamuke ku misozi, muzane ibiti maze mwongere mwubake Ingoro, kugira ngo mbone kuyishimiramo no kuyigaragarizamo ikuzo ryanjye; uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Haggai1:9 Mwari mwizeye kubona byinshi, ariko umusaruro uba muke; mumaze no kuwugeza mu ngo zanyu nawuhushyeho uranyanyagira, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze. Ibyo se byatewe n’iki? Byatewe n’uko Ingoro yanjye yabaye amatongo, naho buri muntu muri mwe ashishikajwe no kwiyubakira inzu ye." 
Haggai1:10 Ni cyo cyatumye ijuru ribafungira imvura, n’isi ikabangira kwera imbuto." 
Haggai1:11 Nateje amapfa ku butaka no ku misozi, mu mirima y’ingano, ku mizabibu, ku biti by’imizeti no ku kimera cyose ku isi: abantu barakakaye kimwe n’inyamaswa, n’ibyo mwakoze bipfa ubusa.»"
