Haggai1:12 Nuko Zorobabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli, na Yozuwe mwene Yehosadaki, umuherezabitambo mukuru, hamwe n’abari basigaye bose b’umuryango bumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho, Imana yabo, n’amagambo Hagayi umuhanuzi yababwiye, akurikije ubutumwa Uhoraho, Imana yabo, yari yamuhaye; maze rubanda ruhinda umushyitsi imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Haggai1:13 Ubwo Hagayi, intumwa y’Uhoraho, abwira rubanda uko Uhoraho yamutumye, agira ati «Ndi kumwe namwe, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze.»" 
Haggai1:14 Nuko Uhoraho akangura umutima wa Zorobabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli, umutware wa Yuda, n’uwa Yozuwe mwene Yehosadaki, umuherezabitambo mukuru, hamwe n’abasigaye bose b’umuryango; baraza batangira imirimo yo kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho, Imana yabo." 
Haggai1:15 Ubwo hari ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’ine w’ukwezi kwa gatandatu. Mu mwaka wa kabiri umwami Dariyusi ari ku ngoma," 
Haggai2:1 ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’umwe w’ukwezi kwa karindwi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa umuhanuzi Hagayi, ngo" 
Haggai2:2 «Bwira Zorobabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli, umutware wa Yuda, na Yozuwe mwene Yehosadaki, umuherezabitambo mukuru, hamwe n’abasigaye bose b’umuryango, uti" 
Haggai2:3 ’Ni nde muri mwe uko mukiriho, wigeze kubona iyi Ngoro mu ikuzo ryayo rya kera? Ubu se bwo murabona imeze ite? Mu maso yanyu se, ntimeze nk’akantu k’ubusabusa?" 
Haggai2:4 Noneho rero, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, komera, Zorobabeli! Ukomere nawe, Yozuwe mwene Yehosadaki, umuherezabitambo mukuru! Mukomere namwe, rubanda mwese mutuye igihugu! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Nimutangire imirimo kuko ndi kumwe namwe, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Haggai2:5 Nk’uko nabibasezeranyije igihe mwavaga mu Misiri, umwuka wanjye uzaba uri rwagati muri mwe; ntimutinye!’" 
Haggai2:6 Koko rero, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Hasigaye igihe gito maze ngahubanganya ijuru n’isi, inyanja n’ubutaka." 
Haggai2:7 Nzahubanganya amahanga yose, ubukungu bwayo buzaze maze iyi Ngoro nyisendereze ikuzo, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Haggai2:8 Feza ni iyanjye, na zahabu ikaba iyanjye! Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Haggai2:9 Ikuzo iyi Ngoro izagira mu minsi iri imbere rizasumba kure iryo yahoranye, ni ko Uhoraho avuze, kandi aha hantu nzahagwiza amahoro, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze.»" 
Haggai2:10 Mu mwaka wa kabiri umwami Dariyusi ari ku ngoma, ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’ine w’ukwezi kwa cyenda, Uhoraho abwira umuhanuzi Hagayi iri jambo, ati" 
Haggai2:11 «Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Sanga abaherezabitambo bagusobanurire iki kibazo gikurikira:" 
Haggai2:12 Hagize umuntu utwara inyama yatagatifujwe mu kinyita cy’umwambaro we, noneho uwo mwambaro we ugakora ku mugati, ku mboga, kuri divayi, ku mavuta cyangwa ku kiribwa kibonetse cyose, ese na byo byaba bitagatifujwe?» Abaherezabitambo barasubiza bati «Oya!»" 
Haggai2:13 Hagayi arongera ati «Hanyuma se umuntu wahumanyijwe n’uko akoze ku ntumbi, akoze kuri kimwe muri ibyo bintu, icyo akozeho cyaba gihumanye?» Abaherezabitambo barasubiza bati «Icyo kintu kizaba gihumanye!»" 
Haggai2:14 Hagayi ni ko kuvuga ati «N’uyu muryango ni ko umeze! Iri hanga riri imbere yanjye ni ko riteye! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Ibivuye ku murimo w’amaboko yabo na byo ni ko bimeze, kandi n’ibyo batura na byo byarahumanye!" 
Haggai2:15 Noneho rero, guhera uyu munsi nimushishoze neza, ndetse no mu bihe bizaza. Mbere y’uko batangira kurunda amabuye yo kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho," 
Haggai2:16 mwari mumerewe mute? Umuntu yajyaga ku mbuga yizeye ko ahakura ibitebo makumyabiri by’ingano, akahasanga icumi gusa, n’uwataze mu rwengero yizeye kuzarura ibibindi mirongo itanu, agasangamo makumyabiri gusa." 
Haggai2:17 Narabahannye, nangiza ibyo mwakoresheje amaboko yanyu byose mbiteza nkongwa, kagungu n’urubura, ariko mwanga kungarukira, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Haggai2:18 None rero, nimushishoze neza guhera uyu munsi ndetse no mu bihe bizaza; mbese kuva ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’ine w’ukwezi kwa cyenda, ari na wo munsi batangiyeho kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho, maze mushishoze neza uko bizabagendekera:" 
Haggai2:19 Kuva ubu ingano ntizizongera gushira mu bigega, kandi n’umuzabibu, umutini, umukomamanga n’umuzeti ntibizahwema kwera imbuto. Guhera uyu munsi rero, ngiye kubaha umugisha.»" 
Haggai2:20 Uhoraho yongera kubwira Hagayi, ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’ine w’uko kwezi, muri aya magambo, ati" 
Haggai2:21 «Bwira Zorobabeli, umutware wa Yuda, uti ’Ngiye guhubanganya ijuru n’isi." 
Haggai2:22 Ngiye kubirindura intebe z’abami kandi ntsembe ububasha bw’ibihugu by’amahanga; nzabirindura amagare y’intambara n’abayagenderaho; amafarasi n’abayagenderaho bazitura hasi, buri muntu yicwe n’inkota y’umuvandimwe we." 
Haggai2:23 Uwo munsi nyine, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze, nzakujyana wowe, Zorobabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli, umugaragu wanjye, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. Nzakugira impeta ishushanyijeho kashe kuko ari wowe nitoranyirije! Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze’»." 
Zechariah1:1 Mu kwezi kwa munani k’umwaka wa kabiri umwami Dariyusi ari ku ngoma, Uhoraho abwira iri jambo umuhanuzi Zakariya, mwene Berikiya, mwene Ido, agira ati" 
Zechariah1:2 «Uhoraho yarakariye cyane abasekuruza banyu. 
Zechariah1:3 Uzababwire uti ’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nimungarukire — uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga — nanjye nzabagarukira! Nguko uko Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze.’" 
Zechariah1:4 Ntimugakurikize abasekuruza banyu, bo abahanuzi ba kera babwiye bati ’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nimuhinduke, muzinukwe imyifatire yanyu mibi n’ibikorwa byanyu bibi’. Ariko bo ntibanyumva kandi ntibanyitaho, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Zechariah1:5 Abasekuruza banyu se bari hehe? Abo bahanuzi baracyariho se? 
Zechariah1:6 Nyamara se, amategeko n’amabwiriza yanjye nashinze abagaragu banjye b’abahanuzi, ntiyageze ku basekuruza banyu? Nuko rero, bisubiyeho maze baravuga bati ’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yaduhannye akurikije imyifatire yacu mibi n’ibikorwa byacu bibi, nk’uko yari yarabigambiriye.’»" 
Zechariah1:7 Ku munsi wa makumyabiri n’ine w’ukwezi kwa cumi na kumwe, ari ko Shebati, mu mwaka wa kabiri w’ingoma ya Dariyusi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa umuhanuzi Zakariya, mwene Berikiya, mwene Ido, kuri ubu buryo:" 
Zechariah1:8 Iri joro nabonekewe. Mbona umuntu uri ku ifarasi y’igaju, ahagaze mu biti bihumura neza byari mu kabande; inyuma ye hari amafarasi y’amagaju, amasine, imikara n’imyeru." 
Zechariah1:9 Ubwo ndabaza nti «Ibi birasobanura iki se, Nyagasani?’ Nuko umumalayika twavuganaga aransubiza ati «Ngiye kukwereka icyo bisobanura.»" 
Zechariah1:10 Wa muntu uhagaze mu biti bihumura neza aravuga ati «Abo ni abatumwe n’Uhoraho kuzenguruka isi.» 
Zechariah1:11 Nuko na bo basubiza umumalayika w’Uhoraho wari uhagaze mu biti bihumura neza, bati «Twazengurutse isi, dore isi yose iratuje kandi iri mu mahoro.»" 
Zechariah1:12 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho aravuga ati «Uhoraho, Mugaba w’ingabo, uzatinda na ryari kubabarira Yeruzalemu n’imigi ya Yuda, warakariye imyaka mirongo irindwi yose?»" 
Zechariah1:13 Nuko Uhoraho aha wa mumalayika twavuganaga, igisubizo kibakomeza kandi kikabahumuriza." 
Zechariah1:14 Umumalayika twavuganaga arambwira ati «Tangaza ugira uti ’Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Ngirira ishyaka rikomeye Yeruzalemu na Siyoni." 
Zechariah1:15 Ariko na none ndakariye cyane amahanga yiyemera; kuko igihe nari ntarakaye cyane, ayo mahanga yazaga kongerera Israheli amakuba." 
Zechariah1:16 Ni cyo gitumye Uhoraho avuze atya: Ngarukiye Yeruzalemu mbitewe n’impuhwe, hazubakwe bundi bushya Ingoro yanjye, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze, n’inago izaramburirwa kuri Yeruzalemu.’" 
Zechariah1:17 Ongera utangaze uti ’Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Imigi yanjye iracyabura amahirwe, ariko Uhoraho agiye kongera guhoza Siyoni, kandi yongere yitorere Yeruzalemu.’»" 
Zechariah2:1 Ngo nubure amaso ndabonekerwa: mbona amahembe ane. 
Zechariah2:2 Ni ko kubaza umumalayika twavuganaga nti «Ariya mahembe arasobanura iki?» Aransubiza ati «Ariya ni amahembe yatatanyije Yuda, na Yeruzalemu.»" 
Zechariah2:3 Hanyuma Uhoraho anyereka abacuzi bane. 
Zechariah2:4 Nuko ndabaza nti «Aba se bo baje kumara iki?» Aransubiza ati «Amahembe wabonye ni yo yatatanyije Yuda ntihagira n’ubyutsa umutwe. None aba bacuzi baje kujegeza no gukura amahembe y’ayo mahanga, yahagurukiye gutatanya igihugu cya Yuda.»" 
Zechariah2:5 Ngo nubure amaso ndabonekerwa: mbona umuntu ufashe mu kiganza inago yo gupimisha. 
Zechariah2:6 Ndamubaza nti «Uragana he?» Aransubiza ati «Ngiye gupima Yeruzalemu, kugira ngo menye ubugari n’uburebure bwayo.»" 
Zechariah2:7 Nuko wa mumalayika twavuganaga aratambuka, undi mumalayika aza amusanganiye." 
Zechariah2:8 Aramubwira ati «Irukanka ubwire uriya musore uri hariya, uti ’Yeruzalemu igomba kuba umugi utagira inkike, kubera ubwinshi bw’abantu n’amatungo bizawubamo." 
Zechariah2:9 Ubwo nanjye nzaba nywurwanaho, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, nzawubere inkike y’umuriro kandi mbe n’ikuzo ryawo muri wo nyirizina.’»" 
Zechariah2:10 Ngaho, vuba na vuba! Nimuve mu gihugu cy’amajyaruguru — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze — kuko nari narabatatanyirije mu byerekezo bine by’ikirere! Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Zechariah2:11 Siyoni, ngaho hunga, wowe utuye i Babiloni!" 
Zechariah2:12 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, we wanyohereje n’ububasha, abwiye atya amahanga yabanyaze: Ni koko, ubakozeho ni jyewe ubwanjye aba akoze mu jisho." 
Zechariah2:13 Dore abo banyamahanga, ngiye kubacyamuriraho ikiganza cyanjye, kugira ngo bahinduke umunyago w’abacakara babo, maze mumenyereho ko ari Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, wantumye." 
Zechariah2:14 Sabagizwa n’ibyishimo, uhimbarwe, mwari w’i Siyoni, kuko nje kuguturamo rwagati, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Zechariah2:15 Uwo munsi, amahanga menshi azayoboka Uhoraho: ahinduke umuryango wanjye bwite ntuyemo nyirizina, maze uzamenyereho ko ari Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, wakuntumyeho." 
Zechariah2:16 Uhoraho azigarurira Yuda nk’umurage we uzatura mu gihugu gitagatifu, yitorere bundi bushya Yeruzalemu." 
Zechariah2:17 Buri kinyamubiri cyose nigiceceke imbere y’Uhoraho, kuko abadutse, akaba asohotse mu Ngoro ye ntagatifu." 
Zechariah3:1 Hanyuma Uhoraho anyereka Yozuwe, umuherezabitambo mukuru, wari uhagaze imbere y’umumalayika w’Uhoraho, ariko Sekibi akaba ahagaze iburyo bwe kugira ngo amurege." 
Zechariah3:2 Umumalayika w’Uhoraho abwira Sekibi, ati «Uhoraho agucecekeshe, wowe Sekibi! Ni koko, Uhoraho, we wihitiyemo Yeruzalemu, nagucecekeshe! Naho uriya muntu se, si igishirira cyaruwe mu ziko?»" 
Zechariah3:3 Yozuwe yari ahagaze imbere y’umumalayika, yambaye imyambaro yahindanye." 
Zechariah3:4 Umumalayika abwira abari bahagaze imbere ye, ati «Nimumwambure iyo myambaro yahindanye.» Hanyuma abwira Yozuwe, ati «Dore nagukijije icyaha cyawe kandi bakwambike imyambaro y’umunsi mukuru.»" 
Zechariah3:5 Yungamo ati «Nibashyire mu mutwe wawe igitambaro gifite isuku.» Bamushyira igitambaro gifite isuku mu mutwe, baranamwambika. Ubwo umumalayika w’Uhoraho na we yari ahagaze aho." 
Zechariah3:6 Nuko umumalayika w’Uhoraho abwira Yozuwe, ati" 
Zechariah3:7 «Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nugendera mu nzira zanjye, ugakurikiza amategeko yanjye, uzategeka Ingoro yanjye kandi urinde n’ibikari byanjye; nzaguha n’umwanya mu bahagaze hano.»" 
Zechariah3:8 Tega amatwi, wowe Yozuwe, umuherezabitambo mukuru, na bagenzi bawe bicaye imbere yawe, kuko abo bantu ari ikimenyetso cy’ibizaza. Dore ngiye kuzana umugaragu wanjye «Mumero»." 
Zechariah3:9 Koko rero, dore ibuye nshinze imbere ya Yozuwe. Iryo buye rimwe rukumbi rifite amaso arindwi. Jyewe ubwanjye ngiye kuryandikaho, maze mu munsi umwe mpanagure icyaha cy’iki gihugu, uwo ni Uhoraho, umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze." 
Zechariah3:10 Uwo munsi, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo ubivuze, muzatumirana kivandimwe mwicare mu nsi y’umuzabibu no mu nsi y’umutini." 
Zechariah4:1 Umumalayika twavuganaga aza kunkangura nk’umuntu bakangura mu bitotsi. 
Zechariah4:2 Arambaza ati «Urabona iki?» Ndasubiza nti «Ndabona ikinyarumuri gikozwe muri zahabu gusa, kiriho urwabya rw’amavuta, kikabaho n’amatara arindwi n’imiheha irindwi yo gushyira amavuta muri buri tara." 
Zechariah4:3 Ku mpande zacyo zombi hakaba amashami abiri y’imizeti, rimwe iburyo, irindi ibumoso bw’urwabya rw’amavuta.»" 
Zechariah4:4 Ndongera mbaza umumalayika twavuganaga, nti «Biriya bisobanura iki se, shobuja?»" 
Zechariah4:5 Umumalayika twavuganaga aransubiza ati «Ntuzi icyo biriya bisobanura?» Nuko ndasubiza nti «Oya, shobuja.»" 
Zechariah4:6 Arambwira ati Umumalayika arambwira ati «Dore ijambo ry’Uhoraho abwiye Zorobabeli: Si ukubera ubutwari cyangwa se ku bw’imbaraga, ahubwo ubikesha Umwuka wanjye, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Zechariah4:7 Uri iki se, wa musozi we muremure? Uzahinduka ikibaya imbere ya Zorobabeli, azakuramo ibuye ry’ifatizo bashimagiza, bagira bati ’Mbega ibuye ryiza! Ni ryiza rwose!»" 
Zechariah4:8 Nuko Uhoraho arambwira ati 
Zechariah4:9 «Ibiganza bya Zorobabeli ni byo byashinze ifatizo y’iyi Ngoro, kandi ni na byo bizayuzuza; bityo muzamenye ko ari Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo wantumye." 
Zechariah4:10 «Ayo matara arindwi ni amaso y’Uhoraho, yitegereza ibiri ku isi byose.» Ubwo se ni nde wahinyura intango y’iyo mirimo y’ibanze? Ahubwo bazanezezwe no kubona mu biganza bya Zorobabeli iryo buye ryatoranijwe.»" 
Zechariah4:11 Ndongera ndamubaza nti «Naho se ariya mashami abiri y’imizeti ari iburyo n’ibumoso bw’ikinyarumuri, byo bisobanura iki?»" 
Zechariah4:12 Ubwo nungamo nti «Ariya mashami abiri y’imizeti aturukamo amavuta ya zahabu, akanyura mu miheha ibiri ya zahabu, byo bisobanura iki?»" 
Zechariah4:13 Arambwira ati «Ntuzi icyo biriya bisobanura?» Ndasubiza nti «Oya, shobuja.»" 
Zechariah4:14 Nuko arambwira ati «Ni abantu babiri basizwe amavuta, bahagaze imbere y’Umugenga w’isi yose.»" 
Zechariah5:1 Ngo nongere kubura amaso ndabonekerwa: mbona umuzinge w’igitabo kiguruka. 
Zechariah5:2 Umumalayika arambaza ati «Urabona iki?» Ndamusubiza nti «Ndabona umuzinge w’igitabo kiguruka, ufite uburebure bw’imikono makumyabiri, n’imikono icumi y’ubugari.»" 
Zechariah5:3 Nuko arambwira ati «Uwo ni umuvumo usatira igihugu cyose. Bityo, nk’uko byanditswe kuri rumwe mu mpande z’uwo muzinge, uwitwa umujura wese azatsembwa mu gihugu, kimwe n’urahira ibinyoma wese nk’uko byanditse ku rundi ruhande." 
Zechariah5:4 Narawohereye, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze, kugira ngo usakize inzu y’umujura n’iy’urahira ibinyoma, uhatsimbarare maze uyitwike yose, ibiti n’amabuye bikongoke.»" 
Zechariah5:5 Umumalayika twavuganaga aregera maze arambwira ati «Ngaho ubura amaso maze urebe kiriya kije.» 
Zechariah5:6 Ndabaza nti «Kiriya se cyo gisobanura iki?» Aransubiza ati «Kiriya kije ni icyibo.» Yungamo ati «Biriya ni ibyaha by’abo mu gihugu cyose.» 
Zechariah5:7 Nuko umutemeri w’icyuma ureguka: mbona umugore wicaye muri cya cyibo. 
Zechariah5:8 Arambwira ati «Uyu ni we bugome.» Hanyuma amutsindagira mu cyibo maze asubizaho umutemeri uremereye w’icyuma. 
Zechariah5:9 Ngo nongere kubura amaso ndabonekerwa: mbona abandi bagore babiri basohoka, umuyaga uhuha mu mababa yabo yasaga n’aya nyirabarazana; baterura icyo cyibo bakerereza mu kirere hagati y’isi n’ijuru." 
Zechariah5:10 Ubwo mbaza umumalayika twavuganaga, nti «Kiriya cyibo bakijyanye he?»" 
Zechariah5:11 Arambwira ati «Bakijyanye mu gihugu cya Shineyari, ngo bakihubakire ingoro. Iyo ngoro nimara kuzura, bazagitereka aho bazaba bagiteguriye, ubutazahava ukundi.»" 
Zechariah6:1 Nongeye kubura amaso ndabonekerwa: mbona amagare ane y’intambara yanyuraga hagati y’imisozi ibiri, iyo misozi igasa n’umuringa." 
Zechariah6:2 Igare rya mbere ryari riziritse ku mafarasi y’amagaju; irya kabiri ku mafarasi y’umukara; 
Zechariah6:3 irya gatatu ku mafarasi y’umweru; irya kane ku mafarasi y’umutuku. 
Zechariah6:4 Nuko mbaza wa mumalayika twavuganaga, nti «Ibi bisobanura iki se, shobuja?»" 
Zechariah6:5 Umumalayika aransubiza ati «Iyo ni imiyaga ine yo mu kirere, iragiye ariko ibanje guhagarara imbere y’Umugenga w’isi yose.»" 
Zechariah6:6 Igare rikururwa n’amafarasi y’imikara rigenda ryerekeza mu gihugu cy’amajyaruguru, ay’imyeru agenda akurikiye ayo y’imikara. Amafarasi y’amagaju agenda yerekeje mu majyepfo," 
Zechariah6:7 naho ay’umutuku agenda afite umuhati wo kuzenguruka isi. Uhoraho arayategeka ati «Nimugende muzenguruke isi.» Nuko azenguruka isi. 
Zechariah6:8 Uhoraho arampamagara maze arambwira ati «Itegereze! Ariya agiye mu majyaruguru kururukiriza Umwuka wanjye mu gihugu cyo mu majyaruguru.» 
Zechariah6:9 Uhoraho arambwira ati 
Zechariah6:10 «Shyikira aya maturo agenewe abajyanywe bunyago, yatanzwe na Helidayi, Tobiya na Yedaya; ugende ubwawe uyu munsi winjire mu nzu ya Yoshiya, mwene Sefaniya, aho abo bantu bageze bavuye i Babiloni." 
Zechariah6:11 Uzafate feza na zahabu ubikoremo ikamba, uryambike Yozuwe, mwene Yehosadaki, umuherezabitambo mukuru." 
Zechariah6:12 Uzamubwire uti ’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Dore umuntu witwa «Mumero», aho ahagaze hazamera ibintu byose, kandi azubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
Zechariah6:13 Ni we uzubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho, ni we uzambara imyambaro y’icyubahiro, akicara ku ntebe ya cyami kugira ngo ategeke. Umuherezabitambo azicarana na we ku ntebe ye ya cyami, maze bombi bazahamye icyizere nyakuri hagati yabo... ’" 
Zechariah6:14 Naho rya kamba rizaguma mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, ryubahirize Helidayi, Tobiya, Yedaya na mwene Sefaniya, kandi ribe n’urwibutso rw’ubuntu bagize." 
Zechariah6:15 Bityo rero, n’abari kure bazaza gufasha kubaka Ingoro y’Uhoraho, kandi muzamenya ko Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yabantumyeho. Ibyo ariko bizaba nimwumvira uko bikwiye Uhoraho, Imana yanyu.»" 
Zechariah7:1 Mu mwaka wa kane, umwami Dariyusi ari ku ngoma, ku munsi wa kane w’ukwezi kwa cyenda, ari ko Kisilewu, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ribwirwa Zakariya." 
Zechariah7:2 Ubwo Beteli‐Sareseri icyegera cy’umwami, we n’abantu be bohereza intumwa zo kurura Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo," 
Zechariah7:3 no gusiganuza abaherezabitambo bakorera Ingoro y’Uhoraho hamwe n’abahanuzi bagira bati «Mbese ngomba gukomeza kurira no gusiba kurya mu kwezi kwa gatanu, nk’uko nabigenjeje muri iyi myaka yose?»" 
Zechariah7:4 Nuko Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, arambwira ati" 
Zechariah7:5 «Bwira rubanda rwose n’abaherezabitambo uti ’Igihe mwasibaga kurya, mubivanzemo n’amaganya, mu kwezi kwa gatanu n’ukwa karindwi, imyaka mirongo irindwi yose, uko gusiba se, ni jye mwakugiriraga?" 
Zechariah7:6 Igihe se mwiriraga kandi mukanywa, si mwe ubwanyu mwiriraga kandi mukinywera?" 
Zechariah7:7 Mbese ye, aho ntibyaba ari byo Uhoraho yavugishije abahanuzi ba kera; igihe Yeruzalemu yari mu mahoro no mu ituze, ikikijwe n’imigi yayo, Negevu n’ibihugu by’imirambi bigituwe?’»" 
Zechariah7:8 (Nuko Uhoraho akomeza kubwira Zakariya ati) 
Zechariah7:9 «Icyo gihe Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yavugaga atya: Nimuce imanza zitabera kandi buri muntu agirire impuhwe n’imbabazi umuvandimwe we." 
Zechariah7:10 Ntimukarenganye umupfakazi n’impfubyi, umusuhuke n’umukene; ntihakagire n’umwe utekereza kugirira nabi umuvandimwe we." 
Zechariah7:11 Ariko ababyeyi banyu banze kumva, bazamura intugu kandi bipfuka mu matwi ngo batumva." 
Zechariah7:12 Binangiye umutima, ukomera nka diyama, kugira ngo batumva amabwiriza n’amagambo y’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yabagejejeho abigirishije Umwuka we, akayavugisha abahanuzi ba kera. Icyo gihe, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yari arakaye cyane." 
Zechariah7:13 Kubera iyo mpamvu, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nk’uko nabahamagaye ntibanyumve, ni ko nanjye bampamagaye sinabumva." 
Zechariah7:14 Ahubwo nabatatanyirije mu mahanga yose batigeze bamenya, baragenda, igihugu gisigara gusa, ntihagira uhanyura cyangwa ngo ahagaruke. Nuko igihugu kitagiraga uko gisa bagihindura amatongo.»" 
Zechariah8:1 Dore ijambo Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, yambwiye:" 
Zechariah8:2 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Siyoni nyifitiye ishyaka rikomeye, kandi nkanayigirira urukundo rwinshi." 
Zechariah8:3 Ni cyo gitumye Uhoraho avuze atya: Ngiye kugarukira Siyoni, nture rwagati muri Yeruzalemu. Yeruzalemu bazayita «Umugi udahemuka», naho umusozi w’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, bawite «Umusozi mutagatifu.»" 
Zechariah8:4 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Abasaza n’abakecuru, buri wese yicumba akabando ke, bazongera kwicara ku bibuga by’i Yeruzalemu." 
Zechariah8:5 Ibibuga by’i Yeruzalemu bizuzuranaho abana, abahungu n’abakobwa bazahakinira." 
Zechariah8:6 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Niba se iby’uwo munsi byaba ibidashoboka mu maso y’abasigaye b’uwo muryango, no ku bwanjye se ntibizashoboka? Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Zechariah8:7 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Ni koko, ngiye kugobotora umuryango wanjye, nywuvane mu gihugu cy’iburasirazuba n’icy’iburengerazuba." 
Zechariah8:8 Nzabagarura bature rwagati muri Yeruzalemu, bazambere umuryango, nanjye mbe Imana yabo, mu budahemuka no mu butungane." 
Zechariah8:9 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Nimukomere, mwebwe uyu munsi mwumva amagambo yavuzwe n’abahanuzi, muri iyi minsi hazatangirwa urufatiro rw’Ingoro y’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, kugira ngo iyo Ngoro yongere yubakwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Kuko mbere y’iyi minsi, abantu nta cyo bari bafite, n’amatungo nta cyo yari abamariye. Uwagendaga ntiyizeraga kugaruka amahoro ku mpamvu y’uwamusagarira; kuko abantu bose nabaretse bagasubiranamo." 
Zechariah8:11 Ariko noneho, abasigaye b’uyu muryango sinzongera kubamerera nka mbere, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Zechariah8:12 Koko rero, ngiye kubiba amahoro, umuzabibu urumbuke imbuto, ubutaka butange umusaruro wabwo, n’ijuru rigushe ikime cyaryo, maze ibyo byose nzabigabire abasigaye b’uy’umuryango." 
Zechariah8:13 Nuko rero, bantu b’inzu ya Yuda n’ab’inzu ya Israheli, nk’uko mwari mumeze nk’ibivume mu mahanga, ni na ko nzabakiza maze mukaba abanyamugisha. Mwitinya, ahubwo nimukomere!" 
Zechariah8:14 Koko rero, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, avuze atya: Nk’uko nari naragambiriye kubagirira nabi, mbitewe n’ababyeyi banyu bari barandakaje, kandi simbireke — ni ko Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo avuze —" 
Zechariah8:15 ni na ko nisubiyeho, noneho nkaba niyemeje kugirira neza Yeruzalemu n’inzu ya Yuda. Mwitinya rero na gato!" 
Zechariah8:16 Dore amabwiriza muzakurikiza: buri muntu nabwire mugenzi we ukuri, mu nkiko zanyu muce imanza zitabera, zishyigikiye amahoro;" 
Zechariah8:17 ntimugatekereze kugirirana nabi; ntimukarahire ibinyoma kuko ibikorwa nk’ibyo mbyanga. Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze. 
Zechariah8:18 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ambwira iri jambo, ati" 
Zechariah8:19 «Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Ugusiba kurya ko mu kwezi kwa kane, mu kwezi kwa gatanu, mu kwezi kwa karindwi no mu kwezi kwa cumi, inzu ya Yuda kuzayihindukiramo iminsi y’umunezero, y’ibyishimo n’ibirori bihimbaje. Nyamara ariko, nimukunde ukuri n’amahoro!»" 
Zechariah8:20 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Ni koko, muzongera kubona haje abanyamahanga n’abaturage b’imigi minini." 
Zechariah8:21 Abaturage b’umugi umwe bazajya kubwira abo mu wundi bati «Nimuze tujye kurura uruhanga rw’Uhoraho, dushakashake Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo; natwe turajyayo.»" 
Zechariah8:22 Nuko imiryango myinshi n’amahanga akomeye bazaze i Yeruzalemu gushakashaka Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, no kumwurura." 
Zechariah8:23 Avuze atya Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo: Uwo munsi, abanyamahanga cumi bavuga indimi zinyuranye bazafata igishura cy’umwambaro w’Umuyahudi, bazamwizirikeho bavuga bati «Turashaka kujyana namwe kuko twumvise bavuga ngo ’Imana iri kumwe namwe.’»" 
Zechariah9:1 Iteka ryaciwe. Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryageze mu gihugu cya Hadaraki, i Damasi rirahahagarara; kuko isoko ya Aramu ari iy’Uhoraho kimwe n’imiryango yose ya Israheli," 
Zechariah9:2 na Hamati umuturanyi wayo, ndetse na Tiri na Sidoni, ari ho hari ubuhanga bwinshi." 
Zechariah9:3 Tiri yiyubakiye ikigo gikomeye, irundarunda feza nyinshi ingana n’umukungugu, na zahabu ingana n’icyondo cyo mu mayira." 
Zechariah9:4 Nyamara Uhoraho azayigarurira, arohe inkike zayo mu nyanja, na yo ubwayo izatwikwe n’umuriro." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashikeloni izaterwa ubwoba n’ibyo bikubara, Gaza ishengurwe n’umubabaro, na Ekironi ibure ibyo yari yishingikirije. Gaza ntizongera kugira umwami, na Ashikeloni yoye guturwa ukundi." 
Zechariah9:6 Ashidodi izaturwa n’ibinyendaro, nzatsembe n’ubwibone bw’Umufilisiti." 
Zechariah9:7 Nzavana amaraso mu kanwa ke, muvane mu menyo ibiribwa bizira, bityo na we azabe uwasigaye w’Imana yacu. Azagira uruhare mu muryango wa Yuda, na Ekironi izamere nk’Umuyebuzi." 
Zechariah9:8 Nzashinga ingando imbere y’inzu yanjye nyirinde abagenda n’abagaruka; nta munyamaboko uzongera guhonyora umuryango wanjye, kuko ubu mbyirebera n’amaso yanjye." 
Zechariah9:9 Ishime unezerwe, mwari w’i Siyoni! Urangurure urwamo rw’ibyishimo, mwari w’i Yeruzalemu! Dore umwami wawe aragusanze, ni intungane n’umutsinzi, aroroshya kandi yicaye ku ndogobe, ku cyana cy’indogobe kikiri gitoya." 
Zechariah9:10 Amagare y’intambara azayavana muri Efurayimu, no muri Yeruzalemu amagare y’urugamba. Azavunagura umuheto w’intambara, ibihugu abitangarize amahoro. Ingoma ye izava ku nyanja igere ku yindi, ihere no ku Ruzi igarukire ku mpera z’isi." 
Zechariah9:11 Naho wowe, ubikesheje isezerano ry’amaraso twagiranye, ngiye kukurekurira imfungwa zawe, zifungiye mu cyobo cyakamye." 
Zechariah9:12 Nimuhaguruke mu mugi ukomeye, mfungwa zuzuye amizero, n’uyu munsi ndetse ndabihamya: nzaguha ibyiza byikubye kabiri." 
Zechariah9:13 Nafoye umuheto wanjye ari wo Yuda, nywutamikamo umwambi wanjye, ari wo Efurayimu. Naho wowe Siyoni, ngiye gukaza abahungu bawe, batere aba Yavani, kandi nzakubangure nk’uko intwari ibangura inkota yayo." 
Zechariah9:14 Uhoraho azabagwa gitumo, umwambi we ubatungure nk’umurabyo. Uhoraho Imana azavuza akarumbeti, aze agendera mu nkubi y’umuyaga wo mu majyepfo." 
Zechariah9:15 Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, azabarinda: amabuye y’umuhumetso azatsemba kandi ajanjagure abanzi, anywe amaraso nk’aho ari divayi, asendere nk’urwabya rw’icyuhagiro rwuzuye amaraso y’ibitambo, cyangwa nk’amahembe yo ku rutambiro." 
Zechariah9:16 Uwo munsi nyine, Uhoraho Imana yabo azabakiza, bo ntama z’umuryango we. Bazasa n’amabuye y’agaciro gakomeye, bazabengerane mu gihugu cyabo." 
Zechariah9:17 Mbega ukuntu bazahirwa! Mbega ukuntu bazaba ari beza! Ingano zizashishisha abasore, na divayi nshyashya ishimishe inkumi." 
Zechariah10:1 Nimusabe Uhoraho ngo imvura y’itumba icikire igihe. Uhoraho ni we utuma habaho imirabyo, agatanga imvura ihagije, imeza buri cyatsi cyo mu mirima." 
Zechariah10:2 Ni koko, ibigirwamana byatanze ibisubizo bya nta byo, n’ibyo abapfumu bahanuye biba ibinyoma. Barotora inzozi zibeshya, bakanatanga amahumure adafashe. Ni cyo cyatumye imbaga yigendera nk’ubushyo bumerewe nabi, kuko bwabuze umushumba." 
Zechariah10:3 Uburakari bwanjye bugiye kugurumanira abashumba, maze amasekurume nyibasire. Koko, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, azasura ubushyo bwe, ari bwo nzu ya Yuda; azayigire nk’ifarasi y’indatwa ku rugamba." 
Zechariah10:4 Mu nzu ya Yuda hazaturuka ibuye nsanganyarukuta, haturuke n’inkingi ifashe ihema, n’umuheto w’intambara, haturukemo n’abatware bose." 
Zechariah10:5 Bazaba ari intwari, bazarwane baribata ibyondo byo mu mayira; bazatsinda kuko Uhoraho azaba ari kumwe na bo, abazaba bari ku mafarasi bazakorwe n’isoni." 
Zechariah10:6 Nzakomeza ubutwari bw’inzu ya Yuda, nkize n’inzu ya Yozefu. Nzabasubiranya kuko mbafitiye impuhwe nk’aho ntigeze mbatererana; nzabumva kuko ndi Uhoraho, Imana yabo." 
Zechariah10:7 Ab’inzu ya Efurayimu bose bazaba intwari, basagwe n’ibyishimo nk’abanyoye divayi. Abana babo nibababona bazishima, basabwe n’umunezero babikesheje Uhoraho." 
Zechariah10:8 Nzabahamagara mbakoranyirize hamwe kuko nabacunguye, bazongere bagwire nk’uko bahoze kera." 
Zechariah10:9 Nabatatanyirije mu mahanga; ariko n’ubwo bazaba kure, bazanyibuka; bazabyara abana kandi bazatahuke." 
Zechariah10:10 Nzabagarura mbakoranyirize hamwe, mbavanye mu gihugu cya Misiri na Ashuru. Nzabinjiza mu gihugu cya Gilihadi no muri Libani, ariko n’ibyo ntibizaba bihagije." 
Zechariah10:11 Bazambuka inyanja ya Misiri, Uhoraho azacubya imivumba yo mu nyanja, amazi yose ya Nili azakama. Ubwirasi bwa Ashuru buzashira, inkoni ya Misiri ivanweho." 
Zechariah10:12 Imbaraga zabo zizaba muri Uhoraho, kandi baziratane izina rye, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze." 
Zechariah11:1 Libani we, kingura amarembo yawe, maze umuriro utwike amasederi yawe." 
Zechariah11:2 Mizonobari, nimuboroge kuko isederi yaguye, ibihangange bikaba byatsinzwe. Mishishi y’i Bashani, nimuboroge, kuko ishyamba ry’intamenwa ryashiriye hasi." 
Zechariah11:3 Nimwumve amaganya y’abashumba, kuko ikuzo ryabo ryahindutse ubusa; mwumve umutontomo w’ibyana by’intare, kuko ubwirasi bwa Yorudani bwatsiratsijwe." 
Zechariah11:4 Uhoraho, Imana yanjye, avuze atya: Ragira izo ntama zigenewe kubagwa," 
Zechariah11:5 zo abaguzi bazo babaga uko bishakiye; bakazicuruza bavuga bati «Imana irakarama, birankungahaje!», mu gihe n’abashumba bazo batakizigirira impuhwe." 
Zechariah11:6 Nanjye rero, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, sinzongera kugirira impuhwe abatuye isi. Koko rero, ngiye gutanga abantu, buri muntu mugabize umuturanyi we n’umwami we. Abami bazasenyagura ibihugu, kandi sinzagobotora abantu mu nzara zabo»." 
Zechariah11:7 Nuko ndagira intama abacuruzi bari bageneye kubagwa. Mfata inkoni ebyiri, imwe nyita «Butoneshwe», indi nyita «Bwumvikane», maze ndagira intama." 
Zechariah11:8 Hanyuma, mu kwezi kumwe nkuraho abashumba batatu; ariko n’intama sinabasha kuzihanganira kandi na zo ziranzinukwa." 
Zechariah11:9 Nuko ndavuga nti «Sinzongera kuziragira! Igomba gupfa, nipfe; igomba kuzimira nizimire; izizarokoka, zizaryane.»" 
Zechariah11:10 Ubwo mfata inkoni yanjye «Butoneshwe», nyivunamo kabiri, kugira ngo mvaneho isezerano nagiranye n’amahanga yose." 
Zechariah11:11 Nuko rya sezerano rivanwaho uwo munsi, n’abacuruzi b’intama bandebaga bamenyeraho ko iryo ari ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Zechariah11:12 Nuko ndababwira nti «Niba ari uko mubishaka, nimumpe igihembo cyanjye; niba bitabaye ibyo, mubyihorere.» Koko bampa igihembo cyanjye gihwanye n’amasikeli mirongo itatu ya feza." 
Zechariah11:13 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Iyo ngirwagihembo bangereranyije na yo, yijugunyire umucuzi.» Ubwo mfata ya masikeli mirongo itatu ya feza, nyajugunyira umucuzi wari mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Zechariah11:14 Hanyuma mvuna inkoni ya kabiri yitwa «Bwumvikane», kugira ngo ubuvandimwe bwa Yuda na Israheli buveho." 
Zechariah11:15 Uhoraho arambwira ati «Noneho ambara nk’umushumba w’umusazi. 
Zechariah11:16 Koko rero, dore ngiye kuzana umushumba muri iki gihugu: intama yazimiye ntazayitaho; iyatannye ntazayishakashaka; iyakomeretse ntazayomora n’imerewe neza ntazayikenura. Ahubwo azarya amatungo y’imishishe, ayasature n’ibinono." 
Zechariah11:17 Ariyimbire umushumba w’imburamumaro, utererana ubushyo! Inkota izamusature ukuboko, imunogoremo n’ijisho ry’iburyo. Ukuboko kwe kurakumirana rwose, ijisho rye ry’iburyo rihume burundu.»" 
Zechariah12:1 Iteka ryaciwe. Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryabwiwe Israheli. Uhoraho warambuye ijuru, agahanga isi, we waremye umutima w’umuntu mu bantu, avuze atya:" 
Zechariah12:2 Yeruzalemu ngiye kuyigira inkongoro izengereza amahanga yose ayikikije. Yuda na yo bizayigendekera bityo, igihe Yeruzalemu izaba yafashwe." 
Zechariah12:3 Koko rero, uwo munsi Yeruzalemu nzayigira nk’ibuye rinini amahanga adashobora guterura. Uzashaka kuriterura wese azarikomerekeraho, amahanga yose y’isi azakoranire kuyirwanya." 
Zechariah12:4 Uwo munsi kandi, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, amafarasi nzayatera ubwoba n’abayagenderaho mbatere ibisazi, ariko inzu ya Yuda nzayihanga amaso, amafarasi yose y’amahanga nyahindure impumyi." 
Zechariah12:5 Nuko abatware ba Yuda bazibwire bati «Imbaraga z’abatuye Yeruzalemu ziri muri Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, Imana yabo.»" 
Zechariah12:6 Uwo munsi, abatware ba Yuda bazahinduka nk’ikara ryakira mu nsi y’inkwi, cyangwa nk’ifumba imurika mu nsi y’umushandiko w’ingano. Bazatsemba impande zose amahanga abakikije, ariko Yeruzalemu yo ikazaguma mu kibanza cyayo." 
Zechariah12:7 Uhoraho azarwana mbere na mbere ku mahema ya Yuda, kugira ngo ishema ry’inzu ya Dawudi n’iry’umuturage w’i Yeruzalemu, ritamamara kuruta irya Yuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Uwo munsi, Uhoraho azarinda abaturage ba Yeruzalemu: udandabiranye kurusha abandi muri bo, uwo munsi azamere nka Dawudi, n’inzu ya Dawudi izamere nk’Imana cyangwa nk’umumalayika w’Uhoraho, ubarangaje imbere." 
Zechariah12:9 Uwo munsi, nzahagurukira gutsemba amahanga yose azatera Yeruzalemu." 
Zechariah12:10 Nzasendereza ku nzu ya Dawudi no ku muturage w’i Yeruzalemu, Umwuka mwiza kandi wiyoroshya, bityo bazandangamire. Naho uwo bahinguranyije, bazamugira mu cyunamo nk’umwana w’ikinege, bazamuririre cyane nk’abaririra umwana w’uburiza." 
Zechariah12:11 Uwo munsi, icyunamo kizaba ari cyose muri Yeruzalemu, mbese nk’icyo bagirira Hadadi‐Rimoni mu kibaya cy’i Megido." 
Zechariah12:12 Igihugu kizajya mu cyunamo, buri muryango ukwawo: umuryango wa Dawudi ukwawo, n’abagore ukwabo; umuryango wa Natani ukwawo, n’abagore ukwabo;" 
Zechariah12:13 umuryango wa Levi ukwawo, n’abagore ukwabo; umuryango wa Shimeyi ukwawo, n’abagore ukwabo;" 
Zechariah12:14 n’indi miryango yose ukwayo, n’abagore ukwabo." 
Zechariah13:1 Uwo munsi, hazavubuka isoko yo guhanagura icyaha n’ubwandure ku nzu ya Dawudi, no ku baturage b’i Yeruzalemu." 
Zechariah13:2 Kuri uwo munsi — uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze — nzatsemba amazina y’ibigirwamana mu gihugu, ntibazayibuka ukundi; abahanuzi n’umutima wabo wahumanye, mbirukane mu gihugu." 
Zechariah13:3 Nuko nihagira ukomeza guhanura, se na nyina bamubyaye bazamubwire bati «Ntugomba kubaho, kuko ibyo utangaza mu izina ry’Uhoraho ari ibinyoma.» Nuko igihe azaba ariho ahanura, se na nyina bamubyaye bazamusogote." 
Zechariah13:4 Uwo munsi, buri muhanuzi azaterwa isoni n’ibonekerwa rye igihe azaba ahanura, kandi ntazatinyuka kongera kubeshya abantu, yambara igishura cy’ubwoya cyagenewe abahanuzi." 
Zechariah13:5 Azahakana avuga ati «Nta bwo ndi umuhanuzi, ahubwo ndi umuhinzi ndetse ntunze n’isambu kuva mu buto bwanjye.»" 
Zechariah13:6 Nuko bazamubaze bati «Ibyo bikomere bikuri ku gituza ni iby’iki?» Azasubize ati «Nabikomerekeye mu nzu z’amahabara yanjye.» 
Zechariah13:7 Baduka wa nkota we, wibasire umushumba, urwanye mugenzi wanjye w’intwari, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze. Kubita umushumba maze umukumbi w’intama utatane, ikiganza cyanjye na cyo kibasire abana bazo." 
Zechariah13:8 Nuko rero, mu gihugu cyose, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuze, bibiri bya gatatu by’abaturage bishire, birimbuke, ariko kimwe cya gatatu kirokoke." 
Zechariah13:9 Abo barokotse nzabanyuze mu muriro, mbasukure nk’uko basukura feza, mbasuzume nk’uko basuzuma zahabu; bityo baziyambaze izina ryanjye, nanjye nzabababarire. Nzavuga nti «Ni umuryango wanjye», na bo bavuge bati «Uhoraho ni we Mana yacu»." 
Zechariah14:1 Nguyu umunsi w’Uhoraho uraje, uwo bazagabanaho iminyago rwagati muri wowe, Yeruzalemu." 
Zechariah14:2 Nzakoranyiriza amahanga yose hafi ya Yeruzalemu kugira ngo ashoze urugamba: umugi uzafatwa, amazu asahurwe, abagore babafate ku gahato. Igice cya kabiri cy’abaturage kizajyanwa bunyago, ariko abazaba bacitse ku icumu ntibazatsembwa mu mugi." 
Zechariah14:3 Nuko Uhoraho, umunsi azatabara, umunsi w’isibaniro, azajye ku rugamba kurwanya ayo mahanga." 
Zechariah14:4 Uwo munsi, azashinga ibirenge bye ku musozi w’imizeti uteganye na Yeruzalemu, aherekera mu burasirazuba. Uwo musozi w’imizeti uzasadukamo kabiri, uhereye iburasirazuba werekeza iburengerazuba, uhinduke igisiza kinini cyane. Igice kimwe cy’uwo musozi kizashyiguka kigana mu majyaruguru, ikindi kigane mu majyepfo." 
Zechariah14:5 Nuko muzahungire mu kibaya cy’imisozi yanjye, kuko ikibaya cy’imisozi kizagera i Yasali. Muzahunga nk’uko mwahunze umutingito w’isi ku gihe cya Oziya, umwami wa Yuda. Hanyuma Uhoraho, Imana yanjye azaza, ari kumwe n’abatagatifu be bose." 
Zechariah14:6 Uwo munsi, nta rumuri, nta bukonje cyangwa ikibunda bizabaho;" 
Zechariah14:7 uzaba umunsi w’imbonekarimwe, Uhoraho arawuzi. Nta manywa cyangwa ijoro bizabaho ukundi, ariko nibigeza ku mugoroba urumuri ruzamurika." 
Zechariah14:8 Uwo munsi kandi, amazi y’ubugingo azavubuka muri Yeruzalemu, igice kimwe kigane mu nyanja y’iburasirazuba, ikindi kijye mu nyanja y’iburengerazuba. Bizamera bityo mu cyi kimwe no mu itumba;" 
Zechariah14:9 nuko Uhoraho azabe umwami w’isi yose. Uwo munsi, Uhoraho azaba umwe rukumbi, n’izina rye rimwe rukumbi." 
Zechariah14:10 Igihugu cyose kizahinduka ikibaya kuva i Geba kugera i Rimoni, mu majyepfo ya Yeruzalemu. Ubwo Yeruzalemu izashyirwa ejuru aho yahoze, kuva ku irembo rya Benyamini kugera ku irembo rya kera; ukagera no ku irembo ry’imfuruka no kuva ku munara wa Hananeli kugera ku rwengero rw’umwami." 
Zechariah14:11 Bazahatura kandi nta n’umuvumo uzahaba ukundi; Yeruzalemu izaguma mu mutekano. 
Zechariah14:12 Noneho rero, dore icyorezo Uhoraho azahanisha amahanga yose azaba yararwanyije Yeruzalemu: azatera imibiri yabo kubora kandi buri muntu agihagaze; amaso yabo azaborera mu kinogo cyayo n’ururimi rwabo ruborere mu kanwa." 
Zechariah14:13 Uwo munsi, Uhoraho azabakangaranya bikomeye, buri muntu asingire mugenzi we maze barwane." 
Zechariah14:14 Yuda izarwanirira Yeruzalemu, ubukungu bw’amahanga yose ahakikije buzarundanywe; ari ubwa zahabu, feza n’imyambaro itagira ingano." 
Zechariah14:15 Icyorezo nk’icyo kizasingira n’amafarasi, inyumbu, ingamiya, indogobe n’amatungo yose azaba ari mu ngando yabo: icyorezo kizaba kimwe." 
Zechariah14:16 Nuko abacitse ku icumu bose bo mu mahanga azaba yararwanyije Yeruzalemu, uko umwaka utashye bajye bazamurwa no gupfukamira Umwami, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, no guhimbaza umunsi mukuru w’Ingando." 
Zechariah14:17 Ariko imiryango yo ku isi itazazamuka ngo ijye i Yeruzalemu gupfukamira Umwami, Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, abo ntibazagusha imvura." 
Zechariah14:18 Ariko se niba umuryango wo mu Misiri utaje, uzahonoka icyorezo Uhoraho yageneye amahanga, atazamukira guhimbaza umunsi mukuru w’Ingando?" 
Zechariah14:19 Icyo ni cyo kizaba igihano cya Misiri, kimwe n’amahanga yose atazazamuka ngo ajye guhimbaza umunsi mukuru w’Ingando." 
Zechariah14:20 Uwo munsi, ku nzogera zambawe n’amafarasi hazaba handitsweho ngo «Yeguriwe Uhoraho»; inkono zo mu Ngoro zizamera nk’inzabya z’icyuhagiro ziri imbere y’urutambiro." 
Zechariah14:21 Inkono zose z’i Yeruzalemu n’izo muri Yuda zizegurirwa Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo. Abazaba baje gutura igitambo bose bazazitekamo amaturo yabo. Uwo munsi kandi, nta mucuruzi uzaba akirangwa mu Ngoro y’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Malachi1:1 Dore ubutumwa Uhoraho yoherereje Abayisraheli, abunyujije kuri Malakiya." 
Malachi1:2 Narabakunze — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuga — ariko mwe murabaza muti «Udukunda ku buhe buryo?» Yemwe, Ezawu se ntiyari umuvandimwe wa Yakobo? — uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuga — nyamara nakunze Yakobo," 
Malachi1:3 Ezawu ndamwanga. Imisozi ye nayigabije abayihindura amatongo, umurage we nywugabira imbwebwe zo mu butayu." 
Malachi1:4 Edomu aravuga ati «Twarasenyewe, ariko tuzongera twubake ahahindutse amatongo!» None Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, arasubije ati «Nibubake, ariko nzabisenya! Bityo bazitwa ’Igihugu cy’ubugome n’umuryango Uhoraho ahora arakariye.’" 
Malachi1:5 Muzabyirebera ubwanyu maze muvuge muti ’Uhoraho ni igihangange, ndetse n’ahatari mu gihugu cya Israheli.’»" 
Malachi1:6 Umwana yubaha se, umugaragu akubaha shebuja. None se, niba ndi so, icyubahiro mumpa ni ikihe? Niba se ndi shobuja, igitinyiro kinkwiye kiri hehe? Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubibabwira, mwebwe baherezabitambo, musuzugura izina ryanjye. Murabaza muti «Izina ryawe twarisuzuguye dute?»" 
Malachi1:7 Murisuzugura buri gihe mumuritse ibiribwa byahumanye ku rutambiro rwanjye. Murabaza na none, muti «Twaguhumanyishije iki?» Mumpumanya igihe muvuga muti «Ameza y’Uhoraho nta cyo amaze.»" 
Malachi1:8 Ni ko se, iyo muntuye itungo ryahumanye ho igitambo, nta bwo ari bibi? Igihe mutuye itungo ricumbagira cyangwa rirwaye, nta bwo se ari bibi? Cyo ngaho rero, riture umutegetsi wawe; azakwishimira se? Ubwo se, azakwakira nk’aho umufiteho ubutoni? Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Malachi1:9 Noneho rero, cyo nimugerageze kurura Imana kugira ngo itugirire impuhwe, kuko ibi byose ari mwe byaturutseho. Ariko se, izashobora ite kubakirana urugwiro? Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga." 
Malachi1:10 Nibura nihaboneke umwe muri mwe akinge inzugi z’Ingoro, kugira ngo mutava aho mwongera gucana umuriro w’impfabusa ku rutambiro rwanjye! Sinkibishimira na gato, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga, n’amaturo yanyu ndayanze!" 
Malachi1:11 Nyamara guhera mu burasirazuba kugera mu burengero bwaryo, izina ryanjye rirasingizwa mu mahanga, kandi ahantu hose bosereza ububani izina ryanjye, bakanzanira ituro ritagira inenge, kuko izina ryanjye ari igihangange mu mahanga! Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga." 
Malachi1:12 Nyamara mwebwe muravuga muti «Ameza y’Uhoraho yarahumanye; ibiribwa bayashyiraho birasuzuguritse.» 
Malachi1:13 Murongera muti «Uyu murimo uraruhanyije!» maze mukansuzugura, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga. Murazana itungo munyaze, iricumbagira cyangwa irirwaye, mukarintura; bene ayo maturo, nshobora se kuyakira? Uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuga." 
Malachi1:14 Arakaba ikivume, uwampigiye kumpa ikimasa cyo mu bushyo bwe, akantura ituro rifite inenge, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga, kuko ndi Umwami w’igihangange, n’izina ryanjye rikaba rikwiye gutinywa mu mahanga." 
Malachi2:1 Nuko rero, ibi ni mwe bibwirwa, mwebwe baherezabitambo!" 
Malachi2:2 Nimwanga kunyumva ntimugerageze no guha izina ryanjye icyubahiro, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga, nzabavuma maze umugisha wanyu nywuhinduremo umuvumo. Ni koko nzabavuma, kuko nta n’umwe muri mwe ukigira icyo yitaho." 
Malachi2:3 Dore ngiye kubaca ukuboko, mbatere mu maso amayezi y’amatungo mutura ku minsi mikuru, maze muzayoranwe na yo." 
Malachi2:4 Icyo gihe muzumva ko ari jyewe ubihanangirije, ngira ngo nkomeze isezerano nagiranye na Levi; uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga." 
Malachi2:5 Isezerano twagiranye ryamuheshaga ubugingo n’amahoro; koko nabimuhanye n’igitinyiro, kugira ngo ajye anyubaha. Yahindaga umushyitsi imbere y’izina ryanjye," 
Malachi2:6 umunwa we wamamazaga amanyakuri. Nta kinyoma kigeze kirangwa mu kanwa ke, ahubwo yagendanaga nanjye mu budahemuka no mu butungane, agahindura abantu benshi." 
Malachi2:7 Ni koko, iminwa y’umuherezabitambo ishinzwe kwita ku bumenyi, kandi n’inyigisho zigashakirwa mu kanwa ke, kuko ari we ntumwa y’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Malachi2:8 Nyamara kuri mwe si ko bimeze: mwateshutse inzira maze muyobya benshi n’inyigisho zanyu, mwishe isezerano rya Levi; uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga." 
Malachi2:9 Nanjye, ni cyo gitumye mbagira insuzugurwa n’ibigoryi muri rubanda rwose, kuko mutakurikije inzira zanjye kandi mukabera mu gukemura imanza." 
Malachi2:10 Twese se, Data si umwe? Ntitwaremwe se n’Imana imwe? None se kuki tugambanirana, tukica isezerano Imana yagiranye n’abasekuruza bacu?" 
Malachi2:11 Yuda yishe isezerano, akorera amahano muri Israheli n’i Yeruzalemu. Ni koko, bene Yuda bandavuje ahantu hatagatifu hakundwa n’Uhoraho, barongora abakobwa basenga ibigirwamana by’amahanga." 
Malachi2:12 Buri muntu wese ugenza atyo, Uhoraho arakamwima umwishingira n’umuvugizi mu mahema ya Yakobo, ndetse ntakabone n’umuturira igitambo cyo kumusabira kuri Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo." 
Malachi2:13 Si ibyo gusa kandi, hari n’ibindi mukora: mwahindanyije urutambiro rw’Uhoraho n’amarira, muraniha mukaganya mubitewe n’uko atacyita ku maturo yanyu, akaba nta cyo acyakira kivuye mu biganza byanyu." 
Malachi2:14 Muribaza muti «Ibyo se abiterwa n’iki?» Abiterwa n’uko yabaye umuhamya w’amasezerano wagiranye n’umugore wo mu busore bwawe, none ukaba waramwirukanye. Nyamara yari mugenzi wawe, uwo wihitiyemo!" 
Malachi2:15 None se Uhoraho ntiyabafatanyije ku buryo muba ikiremwa kimwe, kigizwe n’umubiri n’umwuka w’ubugingo? Icyo kiremwa se cyifuza iki? Si uko Imana yagiha urubyaro? Nuko rero, nimwubahe uwo mwuka w’ubugingo ubarimo, kandi ntihakagire uhemukira umugore wo mu busore bwe." 
Malachi2:16 Koko rero, Uhoraho, Imana ya Israheli, avuze atya: Nanga ko umugabo yasenda umugore we, maze ako karengane akakanwanwagiza. Ahubwo nimwubahe ubugingo bwanyu, maze mwirinde guhemuka! Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Malachi2:17 Murananiza Uhoraho n’amagambo yanyu! Nyamara mukabaza muti «Ese icyo tumunanizaho ni iki?» Mumunaniza igihe muvuga muti «Umuntu wese ukora ikibi aba atunganye mu maso y’Uhoraho; bene abo ni bo yishimira», cyangwa ngo «Imana ituma ubutabera buganza iri hehe?»" 
Malachi3:1 Ngaha ngiye kohereza intumwa yanjye kugira ngo intunganyirize inzira. Ni bwo Umutegetsi mushaka azaza mu Ngoro ye abatunguye; koko rero, Umumalayika w’isezerano mwifuza, nguyu araje! Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga." 
Malachi3:2 Ni nde uzihanganira umunsi azazaho? Ni nde uzakomeza agahagarara igihe azigaragariza? Azaba ameze nk’umuriro w’umucuzi cyangwa nk’isabune y’umumeshi. 
Malachi3:3 Azicara hamwe kugira ngo ashongeshe kandi asukure. Azasukura bene Levi, abayungurure nk’uko bagenzereza zahabu na feza, maze bazegurirwe Uhoraho kugira ngo bamuhereze amaturo bakurikije amategeko." 
Malachi3:4 Ubwo rero amaturo ya Yuda n’aya Yeruzalemu azongera kunyura Uhoraho, mbese nko hambere, mu myaka ya kera." 
Malachi3:5 Nzabegera mbacire imanza; nzashinja abapfumu, abasambanyi n’abarahira ibinyoma, nzashinje abacuza abakozi igihembo cyabo, n’abarenganya umupfakazi n’impfubyi, kimwe n’abashikamira umusuhuke, n’abandi bose batanyubaha. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Malachi3:6 Jyewe, Uhoraho, nta bwo nahindutse; ahubwo ni mwebwe, bene Yakobo, muhora muhinduka!" 
Malachi3:7 Kuva mu bihe by’abasekuruza banyu, mwirengagiza amabwiriza yanjye, ntimuyakurikize. Nimungarukire, nanjye nzabagarukira! Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga. Nyamara murabaza muti «Tuzakugarukira dute?»" 
Malachi3:8 Ni ko se, umuntu ashobora kubeshya Imana? Ariko mwebwe murambeshya! Murongera muti «Twakubeshye mu biki?» Mumbeshya mu gutanga igice cya cumi cy’ibyo mutunze, no mu gutanga amaturo yanyu." 
Malachi3:9 Nuko rero, muravumwe, mwebwe na rubanda bose, kuko mumbeshya!" 
Malachi3:10 Nimuzane mu cyumba cy’ububiko igice cya cumi cyose cy’ibyo mutunze, maze mu Ngoro yanjye habemo ibyo kurya. Bityo muzabe mungerageje, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga, maze murebe neza uko nzabakingurira imiyoboro yo mu ijuru, nkabasenderezaho imigisha myinshi." 
Malachi3:11 Nzabuza isanane kubangiriza imyaka, zoye gutsemba umusaruro w’ubutaka bwanyu, maze imizabibu yo ku misozi yanyu irumbuke, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga." 
Malachi3:12 Amahanga yose azabita abanyahirwe, kuko muzatura mu gihugu cy’umunezero. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Malachi3:13 Muravuga amagambo ansesereza, uwo ni Uhoraho ubivuga, hanyuma mukabaza muti «Ese amagambo twakuvuze ni ayahe?»" 
Malachi3:14 Muravuga muti «Nta kamaro gukorera Imana. Bimaze iki gukurikiza amategeko yayo no kujya mu cyunamo imbere y’Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo?" 
Malachi3:15 Ubu abirasi, ni bo twita abanyamahirwe, ndetse n’abagiranabi ni bo bamerewe neza; n’ubwo bagerageza Imana bwose, nta cyo bibatwara!»" 
Malachi3:16 Ibyo byatumye abubaha Uhoraho bajya impaka, maze Uhoraho abatega amatwi yumva amagambo yabo. Nuko imbere ye, handikwa mu gitabo amazina y’abantu bubaha Uhoraho, bakambaza izina rye." 
Malachi3:17 Nuko Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, aravuga ati «Umunsi nzigaragaza, abo bantu bazaba abanjye, bazaba nk’umunani wanjye bwite. Nzabagirira neza nk’uko umubyeyi agenzereza umwana we umukorera;" 
Malachi3:18 bityo muzongere murebe imitandukanire y’intungane n’umugome, iy’ukorera Imana n’utayikorera." 
Malachi3:19 Dore haje Umunsi utwika nk’itanura; abirasi bose n’abagome bakazagurumana nk’ibyatsi. Umunsi uje uzabahindura umuyonga, uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuga, nta cyo uzabasigira na busa, cyaba umuzi cyangwa ishami." 
Malachi3:20 Naho mwebwe, abubaha izina ryanjye, izuba ry’ubutabera rigiye kubarasiraho, ribazanire agakiza mu mirasire yaryo. Muzasohoka maze mwikinagure nk’inyana zivuye mu kiraro." 
Malachi3:21 Muzanyukanyuka abagome, bamere nk’ivu mu nsi y’ibirenge byanyu kuri uwo munsi nateganyije. Uwo ni Uhoraho, Umugaba w’ingabo, ubivuze." 
Malachi3:22 Nimwibuke Amategeko ya Musa, umugaragu wanjye, we nahaye amategeko n’amabwiriza kuri Horebu, kugira ngo ayashyikirize Israheli yose." 
Malachi3:23 Dore kandi mbere y’uko uwo munsi w’Uhoraho ugera, wa munsi mukuru kandi uteye ubwoba, ngiye kuboherereza Eliya, umuhanuzi." 
Malachi3:24 Ni we uzunga ababyeyi n’abana, yunge abana n’ababyeyi babo, kugira ngo ntazaza ngatsemba igihugu." 
Luke3:25 wa Matatiyasi, wa Amosi, wa Nawumu, wa Esili, wa Nagayi,"
